Genesis1:1 Omu kutandika Ruhanga akahanga eiguru n'ensi. 
Genesis1:2 Ensi ekaba etari mu buteeka, kandi erimu busha; omwirima gukaba gushwekire amaizi maingi, kandi Omwoyo wa Ruhanga akaba naagyendagyenda ahaiguru y'amaizi." 
Genesis1:3 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Habeho omushana. Omushana gwabaho. 
Genesis1:4 Ruhanga yaareeba omushana guri murungi; yaataanisa omushana n'omwirima. 
Genesis1:5 Ruhanga yaayeta omushana Nyomushana, n'omwirima yaagweta Nyekiro. Bwaira, bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro ky'okubanza." 
Genesis1:6 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Habeho omwanya ahagati y'amaizi, gutaanise amaizi n'agandi." 
Genesis1:7 Ruhanga yaataho ogwo mwanya, gwataanisa amaizi g'ahansi yaagwo n'ag'ahaiguru yaagwo. Kyaba nikwo kyaba." 
Genesis1:8 Ruhanga yaayeta ogwo mwanya Eiguru. Bwaira bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya kabiri." 
Genesis1:9 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Amaizi g'ahansi y'eiguru gaateeranire omu mwanya gumwe, eitaka rireebekye. Kyaba nikwo kyaba." 
Genesis1:10 Ruhanga yaayeta eryo itaka Ensi, n'eiteeraniro ry'amaizi yaaryeta Enyanja. Ruhanga yaareeba kiri kirungi." 
Genesis1:11 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Ensi emere ebirikumera, ebirikwera enjuma, kandi n'ebiti ebirikwana ebijuma, ebirimu embibo, buri kimwe omu muringo gwakyo. Kyaba nikwo kyaba." 
Genesis1:12 Ensi yaamera ebirikumera, ebirikwera enjuma omu miringo yaabyo, n'ebiti ebirikwana ebijuma ebirimu embibo, buri kimwe omu muringo gwakyo. Ruhanga yaareeba kiri kirungi." 
Genesis1:13 Bwaira, bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya kashatu." 
Genesis1:14 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Habeho ebirikwaka omu mwanya omu iguru, bitaanise nyomushana na nyekiro; kandi bibe eby'okumanyisa obunaku n'ebiro n'emyaka;" 
Genesis1:15 bigume byakye omu mwanya omu iguru, bibone kwakira ensi. Kyaba nikwo kyaba." 
Genesis1:16 Ruhanga yaakora ebirikwaka bihango bibiri, ekirikwaka ekihango okutegyeka nyomushana, kandi ekikye okutegyeka nyekiro; kandi yaakora n'enyonyoozi." 
Genesis1:17 Ruhanga yaabita omu mwanya omu iguru okujwera ensi. 
Genesis1:18 N'okutegyeka nyomushana na nyekiro, kandi n'okutaanisa omushana n'omwirima. Ruhanga yaareeba kiri kirungi." 
Genesis1:19 Bwaira, bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya kana." 
Genesis1:20 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Amaizi gaijure ebirikwegyendesa ebiine amagara, kandi n'ebirikuguruka bigurukye ahaiguru omu kaabunga." 
Genesis1:21 Ruhanga yaahanga emigoye mihango, n'ebirikwegyendesa byona ebiine amagara, ebi amaizi gaazaire omu miringo yaabyo, n'ebirikuguruka byona ebiine amapapa omu miringo yaabyo. Ruhanga yaareeba kiri kirungi." 
Genesis1:22 Ruhanga yaabiha omugisha, naagira ati: Muzaare, mukanye, mwijure omu maizi g'omu nyanja, kandi n'ebirikuguruka bikanye omu nsi." 
Genesis1:23 Bwaira, bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya kataano." 
Genesis1:24 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Ensi ezaare ebiine amagara omu miringo yaabyo, amatungo n'ebirikugyendesa enda n'enyamaishwa z'omunsi omu miringo yaabyo; kyaba nikwo kyaba." 
Genesis1:25 Ruhanga yaahanga enyamaishwa z'omu nsi omu miringo yaazo, n'amatungo omu miringo yaago, n'ebirikwekurura ahansi omu miringo yaabyo; Ruhanga yaareeba kiri kirungi." 
Genesis1:26 Ruhanga yaagira ati. Katuhangye omuntu omu muringo gwaitu, ashushane naitwe; bategyekye eby'omu nyanja, n'ebirikuguruka omu mwanya, n'amatungo, n'ensi yoona, na byona ebirikugyendesa enda ahansi." 
Genesis1:27 Ruhanga yaahanga omuntu orikumushusha; omu kushusha kwa Ruhanga yaaba nimwo yaamuhangira; yaahanga omushaija n'omukazi. 
Genesis1:28 Ruhanga yaabaha omugisha, kandi yaabagira ati: Muzaare, mukanye, mwijure ensi, ebe eyaanyu; mutegyekye eby'omu nyanja, n'ebirikuguruka omu mwanya, na byona ebiine amagara ebirikwegyendesa ahansi." 
Genesis1:29 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Reeba, naabaha ebirikumera byona ebirikwera enjuma, ebiri omu nsi yoona, n'ekiti kyona ekirikwana ebijuma ebirimu embibo; bibe eby'okurya byanyu." 
Genesis1:30 Kandi enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu nsi, n'ebirikuguruka byona eby'omu mwanya, n'ekintu kyona ekirikugyendesa enda, buri kintu kyona ekiine omwitsyo, naabiha ebirikumera byona ebibisi, bibe eby'okurya byabyo. Kyaba nikwo kyaba." 
Genesis1:31 Ruhanga yaareeba byona ebi ahangire; kandi reeba, bikaba biri birungi munonga. Bwaira, bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya mukaaga." 
Genesis2:1 Eiguru n'ensi n'ebirimu byona byahwa kuhangwa. 
Genesis2:2 Aha kiro kya mushanju Ruhanga yaaheza ebi yaabaire naakora; kandi aha kiro ekyo yaahuumura emirimo ye yoona ei yaakozire. 
Genesis2:3 Ruhanga yaaha omugisha ekiro kya mushanju, yaakyeza; ahabw'okuba nikyo yaahuumuriireho emirimo yoona ei yaakozire omu kuhanga kwe." 
Genesis2:4 Okwo nikwo kuhangwa kw'eiguru n'ensi obu byahangwa. Obu MUKAMA Ruhanga yaahanga ensi n'eiguru," 
Genesis2:5 hakaba hatariho kishaka kyona aha nsi, kandi n'obunyaatsi bwona bukaba butakamezire ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga akaba atakagwisize njura aha nsi, kandi hatariho muntu weena w'okuhinga eitaka;" 
Genesis2:6 kwonka oruho rukaba rwimuka, rujubya ensi yoona." 
Genesis2:7 Bwanyima MUKAMA Ruhanga yaahanga omuntu omu mucuucu gw'ahansi, yaamuhuuha omu nyindo omwitsyo gw'amagara, omuntu yaaba ohuriire." 
Genesis2:8 Kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga yaagira ekibanja omuri Edeni aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba; yaakitamu omuntu ou yaahangire. 
Genesis2:9 MUKAMA Ruhanga yaamezamu omuti gwona ogurikushemeza amaisho, n'omuti gwona ogushemereire kuriibwa; kandi ahagati y'ekibanja yaataho omuti gw'amagara, n'omuti ogw'okumanya oburungi n'obubi." 
Genesis2:10 Kandi omugyera gukaba gusheneneka niguruga omuri Edeni, kufukiiriza ekyo kibanja; kandi gukihika aho, gwebaganisamu emigyera ena." 
Genesis2:11 Ogw'okubanza gukaba nigwetwa Pishoni; ogwo nigwo gweziguurukire ensi yoona eya Havila erimu ezaabu; 
Genesis2:12 kandi ezaabu ey'omu nsi egyo ni nungi; na bedolaki n'amaabare agarikwetwa shohamu niyo biba. 
Genesis2:13 Eiziina ry'omugyera gwa kabiri ni Gihoni; ogwo nigwo gweziguurukire ensi yoona ya Kuushi. 
Genesis2:14 Eiziina ry'ogwa kashatu ni Hidekeeli; ogwo nigwo guraba omu maisho g'ensi ya Asiria. Kandi omugyera ogwa kana ni Furaati. 
Genesis2:15 MUKAMA Ruhanga yaatwara ogwo muntu, yaamuta omu kibanja ky'omuri Edeni okukihinga n'okukirinda." 
Genesis2:16 MUKAMA Ruhanga yaaragiira ogwo muntu, naagira ati: Omuti gwona ogw'omu kibanja noikirizibwa kuryaho nk'oku orikwenda;" 
Genesis2:17 kwonka omuti gw'okumanya oburungi n'obubi otariguryaho, ahabw'okuba eizooba eri origuryaho, buzimazima oryafa." 
Genesis2:18 Bwanyima MUKAMA Ruhanga yaagira ati: Ti kirungi omuntu kuguma wenka; ka mmukorere omuhwezi omushemereire. 
Genesis2:19 MUKAMA Ruhanga yaahanga omu itaka enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ishwa, n'ebirikuguruka omu mwanya byona; yaabireetera ogwo muntu, ngu areebe oku araabyete; kandi oku yaayetsire ekihangirwe kyona ekiine amagara, niryo ryabaire eiziina ryakyo." 
Genesis2:20 Ogwo muntu yaayeta amatungo goona n'ebirikuguruka omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ishwa amaziina; kwonka omuhwezi omushemereire akaba atakabonekire. 
Genesis2:21 MUKAMA Ruhanga yaagwejegyeza ogwo muntu obutasisiimuka; ku yaagwejegyeire, yaamwihamu orubaju rumwe, yaagarura enyama omu mwanya gwaarwo;" 
Genesis2:22 orwo rubaju oru MUKAMA Ruhanga yaihire omu muntu, yaaruhangamu omukazi, yaamureetera ogwo muntu." 
Genesis2:23 Omuntu yaagira ati: Ogu n'eigufa eryaruga omu magufa gangye, kandi n'omubiri ogwaruga omu mubiri gwangye; ayetwe omukazi, ahakuba yaihwa omu mushaija." 
Genesis2:24 Nikyo omushaija aritsigiraho ishe na nyina, akaguma n'omukazi we; bombi bakaba omubiri gumwe." 
Genesis2:25 Kandi ogwo mushaija n'omukazi we bombi bakaba bataine ki bajwaire, kandi batarikukwatwa nshoni." 
Genesis3:1 Kandi enjoka ekaba eri enyabwengye okukira enyamaishwa zoona ezi MUKAMA Ruhanga yaahangire. Yaabuuza omukazi eti; N'eky'amazima, Ruhanga akagira ngu mutarirya aha muti gwona ogw'omuri eki kibanja?" 
Genesis3:2 Omukazi yaagarukamu enjoka ati: Nitwikirizibwa kurya ebijuma by'emiti y'omu kibanja," 
Genesis3:3 kureka ebijuma by'omuti oguri ahagati y'ekibanja; nibyo Ruhanga yaagizire ati: Mutaribirya, n'obu kwakuba okubikoraho, mutakaafa." 
Genesis3:4 Enjoka yaagambira omukazi eti: Okufa kwo, buzima timurifa;" 
Genesis3:5 ahabw'okuba Ruhanga naamanya ngu eizooba eri muriguryaho, amaisho gaanyu garyaiguka, naimwe mube nka Ruhanga, mumanye oburungi n'obubi." 
Genesis3:6 Omukazi ku yaareebire omuti guri murungi kurya, nigushemeza amaisho, kandi nigwetengwa ahabw'okuha omuntu obwengye, yaacwa aha bijuma byagwo, yaarya, yaahaho na iba, nawe yaarya." 
Genesis3:7 Ahonaaho amaisho gaabo bombi gaiguka, baamanya ku bajwaire busha, baayebaziirira amababi g'omutiini g'okwekingaho." 
Genesis3:8 Omu mabeho g'omwabazyo baahurira MUKAMA Ruhanga naagyendagyenda omu kibanja; omushaija n'omukazi we baayeshereka MUKAMA Ruhanga omu miti y'omu kibanja. 
Genesis3:9 MUKAMA Ruhanga yaayeta omushaija, naagira ati: Ori nkahi?" 
Genesis3:10 Omushaija yaagira ati: Naakuhurira ori omu kibanja; naatiina, ahakuba naaba njwaire busha; naayeshereka." 
Genesis3:11 Ruhanga yaamubuuza ati: N'oha okugambiire ku ojwaire busha? Waarya aha muti ogu naakuzibiire kuryaho? 
Genesis3:12 Omushaija yaagarukamu ati: Omukazi ou wampaire kuguma naanye, niwe yampa aha bijuma by'ogwo muti, naanye nkarya." 
Genesis3:13 MUKAMA Ruhanga yaabuuza omukazi ati: Iwe ekyo waakora ki? Omukazi yaagarukamu ati: Enjoka niyo yambeihabeiha, naanye nkarya." 
Genesis3:14 MUKAMA Ruhanga yaagira enjoka ati: Ahabw'okukora ekyo, waakyeenwa okukira amatungo goona n'enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ishwa; oryaguma ogyendesa enda, orye omucuucu ebiro byona eby'amagara gaawe;" 
Genesis3:15 kandi ndyata obuzigu ahagati yaawe n'ogu mukazi, n'ahagati y'oruzaaro rwawe n'orwe; orwe ruryakuteera omutwe, naiwe oryaruteera ekitsintsiino." 
Genesis3:16 Yaakubuukana omukazi, yaamugira ati: Ndyakanyisa munonga obusaasi bwawe omu kuzaara; omu busaasi nimwo orizaarira abaana; n'okwetenga kwawe kuryaguma kube ahari baro; nawe aryakutegyeka." 
Genesis3:17 Kandi yaagira Adamu ati: Ahabw'okuhurira eiraka ry'omukazi waawe, okarya aha muti ogu naakuzibiire kuryaho, eitaka ryakyeenwa ahabwawe; oryaguma oriihemu eby'okurya obihendekyeire ebiro byona eby'amagara gaawe;" 
Genesis3:18 riryakumerera amahwa n'amatojo; oryaguma otungwe ebirikumera omu misiri; 
Genesis3:19 ebi orirya biryakutuutura aha maisho, okuhitsya obu origaruka omu itaka; ahakuba nimwo waihirwe; ahabw'okuba ori omucuucu, n'omumucuucu nimwo origaruka." 
Genesis3:20 Omushaija yaayeta omukazi we eiziina Haawa, ahakuba niwe nyina w'abahuriire boona." 
Genesis3:21 MUKAMA Ruhanga yaakorera Adamu n'omukazi we ebijwaro by'empu, yaabajweka." 
Genesis3:22 Bwanyima MUKAMA Ruhanga yaagira ati: Reeba, omuntu ogu ahindukire nk'omwe ahariitwe omu by'okumanya oburungi n'obubi; mbwenu nu arekye kugorora omukono gwe, akatwara aha muti gw'amagara, akarya, akagumaho ebiro byona-" 
Genesis3:23 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA Ruhanga yaamwiha omu kibanja kya Edeni, ngu aze kuhinga eitaka eri yaihirwemu," 
Genesis3:24 Ruhanga nikwo kubinga omuntu, akata baakerubi aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izoba bw'ekibanja kya Edeni, na rurara erikumurinkana kandi erikuhindahinduka embaju zoona, okurinda omuhanda ogurikuza aha muti gw'amagara." 
Genesis4:1 Bwanyima Adamu yaamanya Haawa omukazi we, yaagira enda, yaazara Kaini; yaagira ati: Ntungire omwana w'omwojo ahabw'okuhwerwa MUKAMA." 
Genesis4:2 Yaagaruka, yaazaara Abeeli omurumuna. Abeeli yaaba omuriisa w'entaama, Kaini we yaaba omuhingi." 
Genesis4:3 Ebiro ku byagyenzire nibihingura, Kaini yaareetera MUKAMA omutoijo gw'ebi yaahingire." 
Genesis4:4 Na Abeeli yaareeta aha mijigaijo y'entaama ze n'ebishaju byazo. Ruhanga yaasiima Abeeli n'ebi yaatoija; 
Genesis4:5 kwonka tiyaasiima Kaini n'ebi yaatoija. Kaini yaagira ekiniga kingi, yairirimba aha maisho." 
Genesis4:6 MUKAMA yaabuuza Kaini ati: N'enki ekyakukwatsa ekiniga? Kandi n'enki ekyakwiririmbya aha maisho? 
Genesis4:7 Ku oraakore gye, torikwija kusiimwa? Kwonka ku oraabe otakozire gye, ekibi nikiija kuguma kibandami aha rwigi, kikugwereire; kwonka iwe oshemereire kukitegyeka." 
Genesis4:8 Kaini yaagambira Abeeli omurumuna ati: Ija, tuze omu ishwa. Ku baahikireyo, Kaini yaagurukira Abeeli omurumuna, yaamwita." 
Genesis4:9 MUKAMA yaabuuza Kaini ati: Abeeli murumuna waawe arahi? Kaini yaagarukamu ati: Tindikuhamanya. Niinye murinzi wa murumuna wangye? 
Genesis4:10 MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Eki waakora ki? Eiraka ry'eshagama ya murumuna waawe, nirimpururiza omu itaka." 
Genesis4:11 Mbwenu hati waakyeenwa omu nsi, eyaayashamya akanwa kumira eshagama ya murumuna waawe, ei omukono gwawe gwasheesha;" 
Genesis4:12 ku orihinga eitaka, tiririkwereza by'okurya; oryaguma ori empungi, n'ekizengyerezi omu nsi." 
Genesis4:13 Kaini yaagira MUKAMA ati: Ekifubiro eki wampa ni kihango, tikirikubaasa kwemerwa." 
Genesis4:14 Reeba, eri izooba wancwa aha itaka, kandi tinkireebwa mu maisho gaawe; ndyaguma ndi empungi n'ekizengyerezi omu nsi; kandi orindeeba weena aryanyita." 
Genesis4:15 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Mbwenu oriita Kaini, ahoorwe emirundi mushanju. MUKAMA yaata ahari Kaini akamanyiso, ngu orimubugana weena atarimwita." 
Genesis4:16 Bwanyima Kaini yaaruga omu maisho ga MUKAMA, yaatuura omu nsi ya Noodi aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba bwa Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Bwanyima Kaini yaamanya omukazi we, yaagira enda, yaazaara Enoka; yaayombeka orurembo, yaarweterera ogwo mutabani Enoka." 
Genesis4:18 Enoka yaazaara Iradi; Iradi yaazaara Mehuyaeli; Mehuyaeli yaazaara Mesushaeli; na Mesushaeli yaazaara Lameka. 
Genesis4:19 Lameka yaashwera abakazi babiri, omwe naayetwa Ada, n'ondiijo naayetwa Ziila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada yaazaara Yabali; niwe ishenkuru w'abariisa b'ente abatuura omu mahema. 
Genesis4:21 Kandi omurumuna orikwetwa Yubali niwe ishenkuru w'abateezi b'enanga n'emikuri. 
Genesis4:22 Na Ziila yaazaara Tubali-kaini, omuheesi w'ebintu byona ebirikushara eby'emiringa n'eby'ebyoma; na munyaanya wa Tubali-kaini akaba ari Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameka yaagira abakazi be ati: Ada na Ziila, mumpurire; Naimwe baka Lameka, muhurire ebi ndikugamba; Nyitsire omushaija ahabw'okumputaaza, N'omutsigazi ahabw'okunteera." 
Genesis4:24 Kaini ku araabe naahoorerwa emirundi mushanju, Buzima Lameka naija kuhoorerwa emirundi makumi mushanju na mushanju." 
Genesis4:25 Adamu yaagaruka yaamanya omukazi we, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo, yamweta Seezi; ahakuba Haawa akagira ati: Ruhanga yanshumbuusha ondiijo mwana omu mwanya gwa Abeeli, ou Kaini yaitsire." 
Genesis4:26 Na Seezi yaazaara omwojo, yaamweta Enosi; omu bunaku obwo abantu baatandika kutakira eiziina rya MUKAMA." 
Genesis5:1 Eki n'ekitabo ky'oruzaaro rwa Adamu. Aha izooba eri Ruhanga yaahangiireho omuntu, akamuhanga naashushana nawe;" 
Genesis5:2 yaahanga omushaija n'omukazi, yaabaha omugisha, yaabeeta Omuntu, aha izooba eri baahangiirweho." 
Genesis5:3 Adamu ku yaamazire emyaka igana na makumi ashatu, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo orikumushusha omu muringo gwe, yaamweta Seezi." 
Genesis5:4 Ku yaaherize kuzaara Seezi, yaamara emyaka magana munaana ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis5:5 Emyaka yoona ei Adamu yaamazire yaahika magana mwenda na makumi ashatu; yaafa. 
Genesis5:6 Seezi ku yaamazire emyaka igana n'etaano, yaazaara Enosi;" 
Genesis5:7 ku yaaherize kuzaara Enosi, yaamara emyaka magana munaana na mushanju, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis5:8 Emyaka yoona ei Seezi yaamazire, yaahika magana mwenda na ikumi n'ebiri; yaafa." 
Genesis5:9 Enosi ku yaamazire emyaka makumi mwenda, yaazaara Kenani;" 
Genesis5:10 ku yaaherize kuzaara Kenani, yaamara emyaka magana munaana na ikumi n'etaano, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis5:11 Emyaka yoona ei Enosi yaamazire yaahika magana mwenda na itaano; yaafa. 
Genesis5:12 Kenani ku yaamazire emyaka makumi mushanju, yaazaara Mahalaleeli;" 
Genesis5:13 ku yaaherize kuzaara Mahalaleeli, yaamara emyaka magana munaana na makumi ana, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis5:14 Emyaka yoona ei Kenani yaamazire, yaahika magana mwenda na ikumi; yaafa." 
Genesis5:15 Mahalaleeli ku yaamazire emyaka makumi mukaaga n'etaano, yaazaara Yaredi;" 
Genesis5:16 ku yaaherize kuzaara Yareedi, yaamara emyaka magana munaana na makumi ashatu, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis5:17 Emyaka yoona ei Mahalaleeli yaamazire yaahika magana munaana na makumi mwenda n'etaano; yaafa. 
Genesis5:18 Yaredi ku yaamazire emyaka igana na makumi mukaaga n'ebiri, yaazaara Enoka;" 
Genesis5:19 ku yaaherize kuzaara Enoka, yaamara emyaka magana munaana, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis5:20 Emyaka yoona ei Yaredi yaamazire yaahika magana mwenda na makumi mukaaga n'ebiri; yaafa. 
Genesis5:21 Enoka ku yaamazire emyaka makumi mukaaga n'etaano, yaazaara Mesuseela." 
Genesis5:22 Ku yaaherize kuzaara Mesuseela, yaaguma naagyenda na Ruhanga okumara emyaka magana ashatu, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'aishiki." 
Genesis5:23 Emyaka yoona ei Enoka yaamazire yaahika magana ashatu na makumi mukaaga n'etaano. 
Genesis5:24 Enoka yaagyenda na Ruhanga, yaabura, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akamutwara." 
Genesis5:25 Mesuseela ku yaamazire emyaka igana na makumi munaana na mushanju, yaazaara Lameka;" 
Genesis5:26 ku yaaherize kuzaara Lameka, yaamara emyaka magana mushanju na makumi munaana n'ebiri, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis5:27 Emyaka yoona ei Mesuseela yaamazire yaahika magana mwenda na makumi mukaaga na mwenda; yaafa. 
Genesis5:28 Lameka ku yaamazire emyaka igana na makumi munaana n'ebiri, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo;" 
Genesis5:29 yaamweta Noa, naagira ati: Ogu niwe aritutambira enaku ezi turikureeba omu mirimo n'okufa kubi nitukoresa emikono yaitu, ebirikuruga omu itaka eri MUKAMA yaakyeenire." 
Genesis5:30 Ku yaaherize kuzaara Noa, yaamara emyaka magana ataano na makumi mwenda n'etaano, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis5:31 Emyaka yoona ei Lameka yaamazire yaahika magana mushanju na makumi mushanju na mushanju; yaafa. 
Genesis5:32 Noa ku yaahikize emyaka magana ataano, yaazaara Sheemu, Haamu na Yafeesi." 
Genesis6:1 Abantu ku baatandikire kukanya omu nsi, kandi baazaara abaishiki," 
Genesis6:2 abaana ba Ruhanga baareeba abaishiki b'abantu bari barungi; baashweramu abakazi boona abu baakunzire. 
Genesis6:3 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Omwoyo wangye tariguma naahakana n'abantu ebiro byona; ahakuba n'abantu-buntu; kandi emyaka yaabo eryaba igana na makumi abiri. 
Genesis6:4 Omu biro ebyo hakaba hariho abantu b'ebikaaka; kandi bwanyima y'ebyo abaana ba Ruhanga ku baashweire bahara b'abantu, baabazaaraho abaana; abaana abo nibo bantu b'amaani aba ira abaarangainwe." 
Genesis6:5 MUKAMA yaareeba obubi bw'abantu buri bwingi omu nsi, na buri kiteekateeko ky'omumitima yaabo kiri kibi obutoosha." 
Genesis6:6 MUKAMA yaayefuuza eki yaahangiire omuntu omu nsi, kandi kyamugwisa kubi omu mutima gwe." 
Genesis6:7 MUKAMA nikwo kugira ati: Ndyahwerekyereza abantu abu naahangire omu nsi, mbamareho, abantu n'enyamaishwa n'ebirikugyendesa enda, n'ebirikuguruka omu mwanya; ahabw'okuba nyefuurize eki naabihangiire." 
Genesis6:8 Kwonka Noa we Ruhanga yaamugirira embabazi. 
Genesis6:9 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Noa. Noa akaba ari ohikiriire, otaine kabara omu busingye bwe. Noa yaaguma naagyenda na Ruhanga." 
Genesis6:10 Kandi Noa akaba aine abaana bashatu b'aboojo, Sheemu, Haamu na Yafeesi." 
Genesis6:11 Ensi ekaba esiisikaire omu maisho ga Ruhanga, eijwire eiraro." 
Genesis6:12 Ruhanga yaareeba ensi, kandi reeba, ekaba esiisikaire, ahakuba byona ebiine omubiri bikaba biherize kusiisikara omu mitwarize yaabyo." 
Genesis6:13 Ruhanga yaagambira Noa ati: Mmaririire kumaraho abaine omubiri boona; ahabw'okuba bareeteire ensi kwijura eiraro; reeba ndyabahwerekyereza hamwe n'ensi. 
Genesis6:14 N'ahabw'ekyo oyekorere emeeri omu muti ogurikwetwa goferi, ocwemu ebishengye, ogisiigye koroto omunda n'enyima." 
Genesis6:15 Kandi oku nikwo oraagikore; oburaingwa bwayo bube mikono magana ashatu, obuhango bwayo mikono makumi ataano, n'obwemi bwayo mikono makumi ashatu." 
Genesis6:16 Ku oriheza ahaiguru, ocwemu edirisa okuruga ahaiguru mukono gumwe; omuryango gwayo ogucwe omu rubaju; kandi ogitemu kanyinaibiri na kanyinaishatu." 
Genesis6:17 Kandi reeba, ndyareeta omwegyemure gw'amaizi, gushwekye ensi okucwekyereza byona ebiine omubiri n'omwitsyo gw'amagara, mbimareho ahansi y'eiguru; ebiri omu nsi byona bife." 
Genesis6:18 Kwonka ndyahamya endagaano yangye naiwe; oryataaha omu meeri na batabani baawe n'omukazi waawe na bakaamwana baawe. 
Genesis6:19 Aha bintu byona ebiine amagara oryataasya bibiri bibiri ebya buri muringo, obirinde bigume naiwe bihuriire; biryaba ekishaija n'ekikazi." 
Genesis6:20 Aha birikuguruka omu miringo yaabyo, aha nyamaishwa omu miringo yaazo n'aha birikugyendesa enda omu miringo yaabyo, bibiri bibiri ebya buri muringo biryaija ahariiwe, obirinde bigume bihuriire;" 
Genesis6:21 kandi oyetwarire aha by'okurya byona ebirikuriibwa, obyehunikire, bibe eby'okurya byawe n'eby'ebi oine byona." 
Genesis6:22 Noa yaakora atyo, nka byona ebi Ruhanga yaamuragiire oku biri; kandi yaaba nikwo yaatwaza." 
Genesis7:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Noa ati: Ija n'eka yaawe yoona, mutaahe omu meeri; ahakuba omu b'obusingye obu niiwe ndeebire ohikiriire." 
Genesis7:2 Aha nyamaishwa ezitarikuzira otwareho mushanju mushanju, ekishaija n'ekikazi; aha zirikuzira ibiri ibiri, enshaija n'enkazi;" 
Genesis7:3 n'aha birikuguruka nabyo mushanju mushanju, ekishaija n'ekikazi, oruzaaro rwabyo rubone kugumaho omu nsi yoona." 
Genesis7:4 Ahakuba ebiro mushanju ku biraahwe, niinyija kugwisa enjura aha nsi okumara ebiro makumi ana, nyomushana na nyekiro; kandi buri kintu kyona ekihuriire eki naahangire, ndyakimariraho kimwe aha nsi." 
Genesis7:5 Noa yaakora byona nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiire. 
Genesis7:6 Obu omwegyemure gw'amaizi gwaija aha nsi, Noa akaba ahikize emyaka magana mukaaga." 
Genesis7:7 Noa yaataaha omuri egyo meeri n'abatabani n'omukazi we na bakaamwana, ahabw'omwegyemure gw'amaizi." 
Genesis7:8 Aha nyamaishwa ezitarikuzira n'ezirikuzira n'aha birikuguruka, n'aha birikugyendesa enda byona," 
Genesis7:9 haataaha bibiri bibiri, byashanga Noa omu meeri, ekishaija n'ekikazi, nk'oku Ruhanga yaaragiire Noa." 
Genesis7:10 Ebiro mushanju ku byahingwire, omwegyemure gw'amaizi gwashandaara aha nsi." 
Genesis7:11 Omu mwaka gwa Noa ogwa magana mukaaga omu kwezi kwa kabiri aha kiro kya ikumi na mushanju, eryo izooba enshuro zoona ez'okuzimu zikaiguka, n'amadirisa g'omu iguru gaigurwa." 
Genesis7:12 Enjura yaamara ebiro makumi ana neegwa nyomushana na nyekiro. 
Genesis7:13 Eryo izooba Noa n'abatabani, Sheemu, Haamu na Yafeesi, n'omukazi we na bakaamwana bashatu baataaha omu meeri." 
Genesis7:14 Bo n'enyamaishwa zoona omu miringo yaazo, n'amatungo goona omu miringo yaago, n'ebirikugyendesa enda ahansi byona omu miringo yaabyo, n'ebirikuguruka byona, enyonyi z'emiringo yoona," 
Genesis7:15 byona byashanga Noa omu meeri, bibiri bibiri ahari byona ebiine omubiri n'omwitsyo gw'amagara." 
Genesis7:16 Ebyataahiremu byona hakataaha ekishaija n'ekikazi, nk'oku Ruhanga yaamuragiire; MUKAMA yaamukingiranamu." 
Genesis7:17 Omwegyemure gwamara aha nsi ebiro makumi ana; amaizi gaakanya, gaimutsya emeeri, yaaruga aha nsi." 
Genesis7:18 Amaizi gaakanya, gaaba maingi munonga aha nsi; emeeri yaaguma neegazeereeraho." 
Genesis7:19 Amaizi gaayeyongyera munonga kushandaara aha nsi; enshozi zoona ez'ahansi y'eiguru zaashwekwa amaizi. 
Genesis7:20 Amaizi gaayeyongyera kwijura, gaahika ahaiguru mikono ikumi n'etaano okuruga aha mitwe y'enshozi." 
Genesis7:21 Ebiine omubiri byona ebirikwegyendesa byafa, ebirikuguruka n'amatungo n'enyamaishwa n'ebirikugyendesa enda ahansi byona, na buri muntu weena;" 
Genesis7:22 byona ebyabaire biri ahansi, ebiine omwitsyo gw'amagara, byafa." 
Genesis7:23 Buri kintu kyona ekihuriire ekyabaire kiri ahansi kyacwekyerezibwa, abantu, enyamaishwa, ebirikugyendesa enda n'ebirikuguruka omu mwanya; byamarirwaho kimwe omu nsi; Noa wenka yaaba niwe yaatsigaraho, n'abu yaabaire aine omu meeri." 
Genesis7:24 Kandi amaizi gaamara ebiro igana na makumi ataano, gakishandaire aha nsi." 
Genesis8:1 Ruhanga yaijuka Noa n'ebiine amagara byona, n'amatungo goona agu yaabaire aine omu meeri; Ruhanga yaareeta omuyaga gwahuuha ensi, amaizi gaatandika kwijururuka." 
Genesis8:2 Enshuro z'okuzimu n'amadirisa g'omu iguru byaigarwa, n'enjura eyaabaire neeruga omu iguru yaazibirwa;" 
Genesis8:3 amaizi gaaguma nigatuuba aha nsi; bwanyima y'ebiro igana na makumi ataano amaizi gaabaganukaho; 
Genesis8:4 emeeri yaahika aha nshozi za Araraati aha kiro kya ikumi na mushanju ky'okwezi kwa mushanju. 
Genesis8:5 Amaizi gaaguma nigatuuba okuhitsya omu kwezi kwa ikumi; aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwo kwezi emitwe y'ebibungo yaareebeka. 
Genesis8:6 Ku haahingwireho ebiro makumi ana, Noa yaigura edirisa y'emeeri ei yaakozire;" 
Genesis8:7 yaashohoza ekikoona, kyaguma nikizengyerera okuhitsya obu amaizi gaayomeire kimwe aha nsi." 
Genesis8:8 Kandi yaashohoza enkombe, ngu amanye amaizi ku garaabe gaayomire ahansi;" 
Genesis8:9 kwonka enkombe tiyaabona h'okuteekama, yaagaruka kumushanga omu meeri, ahabw'okuba amaizi gakaba gakishwekire ensi yoona; yaashohoza omukono gwe, yaagikwata, yaagitaasya omu meeri." 
Genesis8:10 Yaamara ebiro mushanju, yaagaruka yaashohoza egyo nkombe;" 
Genesis8:11 egyo nkombe yaagaruka ahariwe omu mwabazyo; kandi reeba, ekaba eine akababi k'omuzeituuni omu kanwa. Ekyo kyamanyisa Noa ku amaizi gaatuubire aha nsi." 
Genesis8:12 Noa yaamara ebindi biro mushanju, yaashohoza egyo nkombe; yaagyenderayo, tiyaagaruka." 
Genesis8:13 Omu mwaka gwa magana mukaaga na gumwe, omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro ky'okubanza, amaizi gaayomera kimwe aha nsi; Noa yaihaho ekyabaire kishwekire emeeri, yaanaga amaisho aheeru, kandi reeba, ahansi hakaba hoomire." 
Genesis8:14 Kandi omu kwezi kwa kabiri, aha kiro kya makumi abiri na mushanju, ensi yaayomera kimwe." 
Genesis8:15 Ruhanga yaagambira Noa ati: 
Genesis8:16 Shohora orugye omu meeri, n'omukazi waawe na batabani baawe na bakaamwana baawe." 
Genesis8:17 Kandi oshohoze byona ebiine amagara ebi obaire oine, ebiine omubiri byona, ebirikuguruka n'enyamaishwa n'ebirikwekurura ahansi, bibone kuzaara munonga omu nsi, bikanye, bigiijuremu." 
Genesis8:18 Noa yaashohora n'abatabani n'omukazi we na bakaamwana; 
Genesis8:19 enyamaishwa zoona, ebirikugyendesa enda byona, ebirikuguruka byona, na byona ebirikwegyendesa aha nsi, nk'enganda zaabyo oku zaabaire ziri, byaruga omu meeri." 
Genesis8:20 Bwanyima Noa yaayombekyera MUKAMA eitambiro, yaatoorana enyamaishwa n'ebirikuguruka ebya buri ruganda orutarikuzira, yaabitambira aha itambiro kuba ebitambo byokize." 
Genesis8:21 MUKAMA yaahurira ekisooroora kirungi, yaagira omu mutima gwe ati: Tindikyeena nsi obundi ningitura omuntu, ahakuba ebiteekateeko by'omumutima gw'omuntu biba bibi okuruga omu buto bwe; kandi tindigaruka kwita kintu kyona ekiine amagara, nk'oku nkozire." 
Genesis8:22 Omu bunaku bwona ensi ekiriho, eibiba n'eigyesha, embeho n'obutagatsi, ekyanda n'eitumba, nyomushana na nyekiro, tibirihwaho." 
Genesis9:1 Ruhanga yaaha Noa n'abatabani omugisha, yaabagira ati: Muzaare, mukanye, mwijure ensi." 
Genesis9:2 Enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu nsi n'ebirikuguruka byona muryabiitsa obwoba, bibatiine, na byona ebirikugyendesa enda ahansi n'eby'omu nyanja byona; mubihairwe kubitegyeka." 
Genesis9:3 Ebirikwegyendesa byona ebiine amagara biryaba eby'okurya byanyu; mbibahaire byona, nk'oku naabahaire ebirikumera." 
Genesis9:4 Kwonka mutarirya enyama n'amagara gaayo, niyo shagama yaayo." 
Genesis9:5 Kandi buzima eshagama y'amagara gaanyu ndyagihoora, ngihoorere enyamaishwa yoona n'omuntu; amagara g'omuntu weena ndyagahoora ahabwa mugyenzi we." 
Genesis9:6 Orisheesha eshagama y'omuntu, n'eye baryagisheesha; ahakuba Ruhanga akahangira omuntu omu muringo gwe." 
Genesis9:7 Mbwenu muzaare, mukanye, muzaare munonga omu nsi, mugiijure." 
Genesis9:8 Ruhanga yaagambira Noa n'abatabani, ati:" 
Genesis9:9 Reeba, nyowe naahamya endagaano yangye naimwe, kandi na baijukuru baanyu abaribakurata," 
Genesis9:10 n'ebihangirwe byona ebiine amagara ebiri hamwe naimwe, ebirikuguruka, amatungo n'enyamaishwa yoona eri hamwe naimwe omu nsi, nka byona ebirugire omu meeri oku biri." 
Genesis9:11 Kandi nimpamya endagaano yangye naimwe, ebiine omubiri byona tibirigaruka kucwekyerezibwa maizi g'omwegyemure; kandi tiharigaruka kubaho mwegyemure kucwekyereza ensi." 
Genesis9:12 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Aka niko kamanyiso k'endagaano ei naaragaana naimwe na buri kihangirwe kyona ekiine amagara ekiri hamwe naimwe okuhitsya obusingye bwona; 
Genesis9:13 naata omuhanganzima gwangye omu kicu, gugume guri akamanyiso k'endagaano ei naaragaana n'ensi." 
Genesis9:14 Ahundihikisiza enjura hoona, omuhanganzima gwareebeka omu bicu," 
Genesis9:15 ndyaijuka endagaano yangye naimwe n'ekihangirwe kyona ekiine omubiri; amaizi tigarigaruka kuba omwegyemure gw'okuhwerekyereza ebiine omubiri byona. 
Genesis9:16 Omuhanganzima ku guriba guri omu bicu, ndyagureeba, nyijukye endagaano etarihwaho ey'Omuhangi n'ekihangirwe kyona ekiine amagara ekiri omu nsi." 
Genesis9:17 Ruhanga yaagambira Noa ati: Aka niko kamanyiso ak'endagaano ei naaragaana n'ebiine omubiri byona, ebiri aha nsi." 
Genesis9:18 Batabani ba Noa abaarugire omu meeri ni Sheemu, Haamu na Yafeesi; kandi Haamu niwe ishe wa Kanaani." 
Genesis9:19 Abo bonshatu nibo batabani ba Noa; kandi nibo baakomookirweho abaabugire ensi yoona. 
Genesis9:20 Noa yaatandika kuhinga; yaabyara omusiri gw'emizaabibu; 
Genesis9:21 yaanywa viinyo yaayo, yaasinda, yaabyama omu ihema rye ajwaire busha." 
Genesis9:22 Haamu ishe wa Kanaani ku yaareebire ishe ajwaire busha, yaashohora, yaagambira bakuru be aheeru." 
Genesis9:23 Sheemu na Yafeesi baatwara ekijwaro, bakitaire aha mabega gaabo bombi, baagyenda ekisiganyima, baashweka ishebo ajwaire busha." 
Genesis9:24 Noa ku yaasinduukire, yaamanya eki omutabani omuto akozire;" 
Genesis9:25 yaagira ati: Kanaani akyeenwe; aryaba omuhuuku w'abahuuku ahari beene ishe. 
Genesis9:26 Kandi ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Sheemu asiimwe; kandi Kanaani abe omuhuuku we. 
Genesis9:27 Ruhanga ahangusye Yafeesi; atuure omu mahema ga Sheemu, kandi Kanaani abe omuhuuku we." 
Genesis9:28 Bwanyima y'omwegyemure Noa yaamara emyaka magana ashatu na makumi ataano. 
Genesis9:29 Emyaka yoona ei Noa yaamazire, yaahika magana mwenda na makumi ataano; yaafa." 
Genesis10:1 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa beene Noa, Sheemu, Haamu na Yafeesi; omwegyemure gw'amaizi ku gwahweireho, baazaara abaana b'aboojo." 
Genesis10:2 Aba nibo batabani ba Yafeesi, Gomeri, Magogi, Madai, Yavani, Tubalo, Mesheki na Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Batabani ba Gomeri ni Ashikenaazi, Rifaasi, na Togaruma;" 
Genesis10:4 Batabani ba Yavani ni Elisha, Tarushiishi, Kitimu na Dodanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Abo nibo baakomookirweho abantu abaabugire ensi ez'aha rubaju rw'enyanja; kandi abo nibo beene Yafeesi, buri omwe nk'orurimi rwe oku ruri, omu miryango yaabo n'omumahanga gaabo." 
Genesis10:6 Aba nibo batabani ba Haamu, Kuushi, Miziraimu, Puuti na Kanaani." 
Genesis10:7 Batabani ba Kuushi ni Seeba, Havila, Sabuta, Raama na Sabuteeka; na batabani ba Raama ni Sheeba na Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Na Kuushi yaazaara Nimuroodi; yaatandika kuba emanzi omu nsi. 
Genesis10:9 Akaba ari omuhiigi rugambwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA; nk'oku bagira ngu, N'omuhiigi rugambwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA nka Nimuroodi." 
Genesis10:10 Ensi ei yaabandiizemu kuba omugabe ni Shinaari, eyaabaire erimu Babeeli, Ereki, Akadi na Kalune." 
Genesis10:11 Okuruga okwo yaagumizamu yaaza Ashuri, yaayombeka Nineeve, Rehoboosira, Kaala," 
Genesis10:12 na Reseni ey'ahagati ya Nineeve na Kaala, (nirwo rurembo rukuru)." 
Genesis10:13 Miziraimu yaazaara Ludimu, Anamimu, Lehabimu, Nafutuhimu," 
Genesis10:14 Patirusimu, Kasiluhimu (owaakomookirweho Abafilistia) na Kafutorimu." 
Genesis10:15 Na Kanaani yaazaara Sidoni omwana w'omujigaijo na Heesi; 
Genesis10:16 n'Abayebusi, Abaamori, Abagirugashi," 
Genesis10:17 Abahiivi, Abaaruki, Abasini," 
Genesis10:18 Abaarivadi, Abazemari, n'Abahamasi. Bwanyima emiryango y'Abanyakanaani yaabuga hoona." 
Genesis10:19 Omwatano gw'Abanyakanaani gukaba nigutandikira Sidoni, gugyema Gerari okuhika Gaaza, kandi gutoora Sodoma, Gomora, Aduma na Zeboimu okuhika Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Abo nibo beene Haamu nk'emiryango yaabo n'endimi zaabo, n'ensi zaabo n'amahanga gaabo oku byabaire biri." 
Genesis10:21 Na Sheemu mukuru wa Yafeesi, ishenkuru w'abaana ba Eberi boona, nawe yaazaara abaana." 
Genesis10:22 Aba nibo beene Sheemu, Elamu, Ashuri, Arufakisaadi. Ludi na Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Aramu yaazaara Uzi, Huli, Geseri, na Maasha." 
Genesis10:24 Arufakisaadi yaazaara Sheela, na Sheela yaazaara Eberi." 
Genesis10:25 Eberi yaazaara aboojo babiri; eiziina ry'omwe akaba ari Pelegi, ahabw'okuba omu bunaku bwe nibwo abantu b'omu nsi baabaganisibwamu; kandi omurumuna akaba naayetwa Yokitaani." 
Genesis10:26 Yokitaani yaazaara Alimodaadi, Shelefu, Hazarimaveesi, Yeera," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoramu, Uzali, Dikila," 
Genesis10:28 Obali, Abimaeli, Sheeba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofiri, Havila, na Yobabu; abo boona ni beene Yokitaani." 
Genesis10:30 Ensi ei baabaire batwiremu, ekaba neetandikira Meesha, etoora Sefari, ehika omu nsi y'ebibungo oburugwa-izooba." 
Genesis10:31 Abo nibo baana ba Sheemu nk'emiryango yaabo n'endimi zaabo n'ensi zaabo n'amahanga gaabo oku byabaire biri. 
Genesis10:32 Egyo niyo miryango ya beene Noa nk'oruzaaro rwabo n'amahanga gaabo oku byabaire biri; kandi nibo baakomookirweho amahanga agaabugire hoona omu nsi bwanyima y'omwegyemure. 
Genesis11:1 Ensi yoona ekaba eine orurimi rumwe n'engambo emwe. 
Genesis11:2 Ku baafurukiire oburugwa-izooba, baareeba oruhita omu nsi ya Shinaari; baarutuuramu." 
Genesis11:3 Baagambirana bati: Mwije tubumbe, amatafaari, tugootsye gye. N'ahabw'ekyo baagira amatafaari omu mwanya gw'amabaare, na koroto omu mwanya gw'obudongo." 
Genesis11:4 Baagira bati: Mwije tweyombekyere orurembo n'omunaara, guhikye ahaiguru, tubone kurangaanwa, turekye kutaataanira hoona omu nsi yoona." 
Genesis11:5 MUKAMA yaashuuma kureeba orurembo n'omunaara, ebi abantu baabaire nibombeka." 
Genesis11:6 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Reeba, abantu aba n'eihanga rimwe, kandi baine orurimi rumwe; ku baraabe baatandika kukora ebi, omu bi barikuteekateeka kukora, tihariho kiribarema." 
Genesis11:7 Katushuume tuhindahindure orurimi rwabo, barekye kuhurirana." 
Genesis11:8 Atyo MUKAMA yaabataataanisa, baarugayo, baabuga ensi yoona; baarekyera aho kwombeka orurembo." 
Genesis11:9 Nikyo rwayeteirwe Babeeli; ahakuba niho MUKAMA yaahindahindwire orurimi rw'ensi yoona; kandi okuruga obwo MUKAMA yaabataataanisa, baabuga ensi yoona." 
Genesis11:10 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Sheemu. Ku yaabaire aine emyaka igana, omwegyemure gumazire emyaka ebiri guhweireho, yaazaara Arufakisaadi." 
Genesis11:11 Ku yaaherize kuzaara Arufakisaadi, yaamara emyaka magana ataano, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis11:12 Arufakisaadi, ku yaamazire emyaka makumi ashatu n'etaano, yaazaara Sheela;" 
Genesis11:13 ku yaaherize kuzaara Sheela, yaamara emyaka magana ana n'eshatu ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis11:14 Sheela ku yaamazire emyaka makumi ashatu, yaazaara Eberi." 
Genesis11:15 Ku yaaherize kuzaara Eberi, yaamara emyaka magana ana n'eshatu, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis11:16 Eberi ku yaamazire emyaka makumi ashatu n'ena, yaazaara Pelegi." 
Genesis11:17 Ku yaaherize kuzaara Pelegi, yaamara emyaka magana ana na makumi ashatu, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis11:18 Pelegi ku yaamazire emyaka makumi ashatu, yaazaara Reu;" 
Genesis11:19 ku yaaherize kuzaara Reu, yaamara emyaka magana abiri na mwenda, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis11:20 Reu ku yaamazire emyaka makumi ashatu n'ebiri, yaazaara Serugi." 
Genesis11:21 Ku yaaherize kuzaara Serugi, yaamara emyaka magana abiri na mushanju, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis11:22 Serugi ku yaamazire emyaka makumi ashatu, yaazaara Nahori." 
Genesis11:23 Ku yaaherize kuzaara Nahori, yaamara emyaka magana abiri, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori ku yaamazire emyaka makumi abiri na mwenda, yaazaara Teera;" 
Genesis11:25 ku yaaherize kuzaara Teera, yaamara emyaka igana na ikumi na mwenda, ei yaazaariiremu abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
Genesis11:26 Teera ku yaamazire emyaka makumi mushanju, yaazaara Abramu, na Nahori na Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Teera. Teera akazaara Abramu na Nahori na Harani; Harani yaazaara Looti," 
Genesis11:28 Harani yaafa ishe akiriho, yaagwa Uri ey'aba Kaludaaya, omu nsi ei yaazaariirwemu." 
Genesis11:29 Abramu na Nahori baashwera; eiziina rya muka Abramu akaba ari Sarai; n'eiziina rya muka Nahori akaba ari Milika, muhara wa Harani, ishe wa Milika, na Isika." 
Genesis11:30 Kwonka Sarai akaba ari engumba, ataine mwana." 
Genesis11:31 Teera yaatwara Abramu omutabani, na Looti mwene Harani omwijukuru, na Sarai omukaamwana, muka omutabani Abramu; baaruga kumwe Uri ey'aba Kaludaaya, kuza omu nsi ya Kanaani; kwonka ku baahikire Harani, baaba niyo baatuura." 
Genesis11:32 Emyaka yoona ei Teera yaamazire yaahika magana abiri n'etaano; yaafa, yaagwa Harani." 
Genesis12:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Abramu ati: Ruga omu nsi yaanyu, n'omu ruganda rwanyu n'omu nju ya sho, oze omu nsi ei ndikworeka;" 
Genesis12:2 ndyakuhindura eihanga rihango; kandi ndyakuha omugisha, ndangaanise eiziina ryawe; naiwe oryahaisa abandi omugisha." 
Genesis12:3 Ndyaha omugisha abarikushabira omugisha, n'orikukyeena ndyamukyeena; kandi omuriiwe enganda zoona ez'omu nsi nimwo ziriheerwa omugisha." 
Genesis12:4 Atyo Abramu yaagyenda, nk'oku MUKAMA yaamugambiire, na Looti yaagyenda nawe; kandi Abramu akaba ahikize emyaka makumi mushanju n'etaano, obu yaaruga Harani." 
Genesis12:5 Abramu yaagyenda na Sarai omukazi we, na Looti omwana w'omurumuna, n'ebi baabaire batungire byona, n'abantu abu baatungiire Haraani; baarugayo kuza omu nsi ya Kanaani. Ku baahikire omu nsi ya Kanaani," 
Genesis12:6 Abramu yaaraba omu nsi egyo, yaahika omu mwanya ogurikwetwa Shekemu aha mwela gwa Moore. Omu bunaku obwo aba Kanaani bakaba bari omuri egyo nsi." 
Genesis12:7 MUKAMA yaayeyoreka Abramu, yaamugira ati: Ensi egi ndyagiha oruzaaro rwawe. Aho yaayombekyeraho MUKAMA, owaamweyorekire, eitambiro." 
Genesis12:8 Yaarugayo, yaaza omu kibungo aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba bwa Beseeli, emuri oburengyerwa-izooba na Ai oburugwa-izooba; okwo nayo yaayombekyerayo MUKAMA eitambiro, yaatakira eiziina rye." 
Genesis12:9 Abramu yaagumizamu, naatoora omu nsi ya Negebu." 
Genesis12:10 Bwanyima haabaho enjara omuri egyo nsi; Abramu yaashuuma Misri kushuhuukirayo; ahakuba enjara ekaba eri nyingi omu nsi egyo. 
Genesis12:11 Ku yaabaire ari haihi kuhika Misri, yaagambira omukazi we Sarai ati: Reeba nimmanya ku ori omukazi murungi orikureebwa;" 
Genesis12:12 kandi aba Misri ku barikureeba, baryagira bati: Ogu n'omukazi we; baanyite, haza iwe bakurekye." 
Genesis12:13 Mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, ogume ogire oti: Ni munyaanyazi mbone kutunga omugisha ahabwawe, ndekye kufa, nkaba niiwe naazira." 
Genesis12:14 Abramu ku yaahikire Misri, aba Misri baareeba omukazi ari murungi munonga." 
Genesis12:15 Abanyiginya ba Faraho baamureeba, baamusiimira Faraho; bwanyima baamutwara omu nju ya Faraho." 
Genesis12:16 Faraho yaatwaza gye Abramu ahabwa Sarai; kandi Abramu akaba aine entaama n'ente n'enimi z'endogoya n'abahuuku n'abazaana, ebuguma z'endogoya n'engamira." 
Genesis12:17 MUKAMA yaareetera Faraho n'eka ye ebibonaboneso bingi ahabwa Sarai muka Abramu. 
Genesis12:18 Faraho yaatuma Abramu, yaamugira ati: Beitu shi, ontuzire ki? Ahabw'enki tongambiire ku ari omukazi waawe?" 
Genesis12:19 Ongiriire ki oti: Ni munyaanazi? Naanye nikyo mmutwariire kuba omukazi wangye. Mbwenu omukazi waawe ngugwo, omutware, oyegyendere." 
Genesis12:20 Faraho nikwo kuragiira abashaija be oku baraamutwaze; batyo bakamushendekyereza n'omukazi we n'ebi yaabaire aine byona. 
Genesis13:1 Abramu yaaruga Misri n'omukazi we n'ebi yaabaire aine byona, na Looti, baataaha Negebu." 
Genesis13:2 Kandi Abramu akaba ari omutungi munonga, aine amatungo maingi n'efeeza n'ezaabu." 
Genesis13:3 Yaaruga omuri Negebu, yaagumizamu okuhika Beseeli, yaahika omu mwanya ahagati ya Beseeli na Ai, ahu yaabandize kuteera eihema omu kubanza;" 
Genesis13:4 kandi aho niho eitambiro eri yaabandize kwombeka, ryabaire riri. Okwo Abramu yaatakirirayo eiziina rya MUKAMA." 
Genesis13:5 Kandi Looti nawe, owaagyenzire na Abramu, akaba aine amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente n'amahema." 
Genesis13:6 Ensi egyo ekaba etabahikire kugituuranamu, ahakuba amatungo gaabo gakaba gari maingi; nikyo baabaire batarikubaasiza kutuura hamwe omuri obwo bunaku." 
Genesis13:7 Abariisa b'Abramu n'aba Looti baagira empaka. Omu bunaku obwo Abanyakanaani n'Abaperizi bakaba batwire omu nsi egyo. 
Genesis13:8 Abramu yaagambira Looti ati: Ninkweshengyereza, turekye kugirirana amahari, n'obu baakuba abariisa bangye n'abaawe; ahabw'okuba turi ishe-emwe." 
Genesis13:9 Ensi yoona tekuri omumaisho? Naakweshengyereza, reka tutaane; ku oraatware orubaju bumosho, naanye niinyija aha kuza aha rwa buryo; nari shi ku oraatware orwa buryo, nyowe niinyija kuza aha rwa bumosho." 
Genesis13:10 Looti yaanaga amaisho, yaareeba oruhita rwa Yorudani rwona okuhika Zoari, nirufuka rwona nk'omusiri gwa MUKAMA, nari nk'ensi ya Misri, MUKAMA atakahwerekyereize Sodoma na Gomora." 
Genesis13:11 N'ahabw'ekyo Looti yaihamu oruhita rwa Yorudani rwona; yaatoora oburugwa-izooba. Okwo nikwo baataine. 
Genesis13:12 Abramu yaatuura omu nsi ya Kanaani, na Looti yaatuura omu ndembo z'omu ruhita; yaafurura eihema rye, yaariteera haihi na Sodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Kwonka abantu ba Sodoma bakaba bari abanyabibi, nibacumura munonga ahari MUKAMA." 
Genesis13:14 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagambira Abramu, aherize kutaana na Looti, ati: Yema omumwanya ogu orimu, onagye amaisho, oreebe obukiizi-bwa bumosho n'obwa-buryo, oburubwa-izooba n'oburengyerwa-izooba;" 
Genesis13:15 ahakuba ensi egi yoona ei orikureeba, ndyagikuha, ebe eyaawe kandi n'eya baijukuru baawe okuhitsya ebiro byona." 
Genesis13:16 Kandi oruzaaro rwawe ndyarukanyisa, rube nk'omucuucu gw'ahansi; omuntu ku araabe naabaasa kubara omucuucu gw'ahansi, na baijukuru baawe nabo aryabaasa kubabara." 
Genesis13:17 Imuka ogyende, orabe omu nsi egi, oreebe oburaingwa n'obuhango bwayo; ahakuba niiwe ndigiha." 
Genesis13:18 Abramu nikwo kufurura eihema rye, akagyenda, akatuura haihi n'emyela ya Mamure eyaabaire eri Heburooni, akombekyerayo MUKAMA eitambiro." 
Genesis14:1 Omu biro bya Amurafeli omugabe wa Shinaari, na Arioki omugabe wa Elasaari, na Kedolaomeeri omugabe wa Elamu, na Tidali omugabe wa Goyimu," 
Genesis14:2 abo bagabe bakarwanisa Beera omugabe wa Sodoma na Birusha omugabe wa Gomora, na Shinabu omugabe wa Aduma, na Shemebeeri omugabe wa Zeboimu, n'omugabe wa Beela (niyo Zoari)." 
Genesis14:3 Abo boona baateeranira engabo zaabo omu ruhita rwa Sidimu, niyo Nyanja y'omwonyo." 
Genesis14:4 Bakaba bamazire emyaka ikumi n'ebiri nibakorera Kedolaomeeri; kwonka omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'eshatu baamugomera. 
Genesis14:5 Bwanyima omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ena Kedolaomeeri yaija n'abagabe abaahurwire nawe, baateera aba Reefa ab'omuri Ashetaroosi-karunaimu, n'aba Zuuzi omuri Haamu, n'aba Emimu omuri Shave-kiryasaimu," 
Genesis14:6 n'aba Hoori, omu bibungo byabo bya Seiri, okuhika Eli-parani, haihi n'eihamba; baabagomoora." 
Genesis14:7 Bwanyima baagaruka, baahika Enimishipati (niyo Kadeshi), baakubuura ensi yoona ey'Abaamaleki, n'Abaamori abaabaire batwire Hazazori-tamaari." 
Genesis14:8 Bwanyima haahurura omugabe wa Sodoma n'owa Gomora n'owa Aduma n'owa Zeboimu n'owa Beela (niyo Zoari), baatenga orugamba omu ruhita rwa Sidimu," 
Genesis14:9 baarwanisa Kedolaomeeri omugabe wa Elamu na Tidali omugabe wa Goyimu na Amurafeeli omugabe wa Shinaari na Arioki omugabe wa Elasari, abagabe bana baarwanisa abataano." 
Genesis14:10 Kandi oruhita rwa Sidimu rukaba rwijwire ebiina bya koroto; abagabe ba Sodoma na Gomora baahunga, abamwe baabigwamu, abandi baahungira omu bibungo." 
Genesis14:11 Abagabe abaababingire baanyaga ebintu byona eby'omuri Sodoma na Gomora n'eby'okurya byabo, baayegyendera." 
Genesis14:12 Baanyagiranamu na Looti, mutabani wa murumuna wa Abramu, owaabaire atwire Sodoma, n'ebintu bye; baagyenda." 
Genesis14:13 Bwanyima haija omwe owaacwire, yaakigambira Abramu Omuheburaayo, owaabaire atwire haihi n'emyela ya Mamure omuamori, murumuna wa Eshikooli na Aneri; abo bakaba nibakwatanisa na Abramu." 
Genesis14:14 Abramu ku yaahuriire ngu mutabani w'omurumuna anyagirwe, yaahurura n'abashaija be abeegyesiibwe eby'okurwana, abaazairwe omu ka ye, magana ashatu na ikumi na munaana, baabakurata okuhika Daani." 
Genesis14:15 Abramu yaabaganisa omu ngabo ze kubarwanisa nyekiro, yaabateera, yaababinga yaabahitsya Hooba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho obwa Damasiko." 
Genesis14:16 Yaabaaka ebi baabaire banyagire byona, yaagarura na Looti mutabani w'omurumuna n'ebintu bye n'abakazi n'abandi bantu." 
Genesis14:17 Abramu ku yaatabaarukire, naaruga kwita kedolaomeeri n'abagabe abaabaire bahurwire nawe, omugabe wa Sodoma yaashohora kumubuganira omu ruhita rwa Shaave (oruhita rw'omugabe)." 
Genesis14:18 Na Melikizedeki omugabe wa Saalemu yaareeta omugaati na viinyo; kandi akaba ari omunyamurwa wa Ruhanga Rukira-boona. 
Genesis14:19 Yaamushabira omugisha, naagira ati: Abramu aheebwe omugisha Ruhanga Rukira-boona. Omuhangi w'eiguru n'ensi;" 
Genesis14:20 kandi Ruhanga Rukira-boona, ohaireyo abazigu baawe omu mikono yaawe, asiimwe. Bwanyima Abramu yaamuha ekicweka kya ikumi ekya byona." 
Genesis14:21 N'omugabe wa Sodoma yaagambira Abramu ati: Nyowe mpa abantu, reero iwe eminyago ogyetwarire." 
Genesis14:22 Abramu yaamugarukamu ati: Ndahiire MUKAMA Ruhanga Rukira-boona, Omuhangi w'eiguru n'ensi," 
Genesis14:23 ku ntaritwara kahuuzi n'obu kaakuba akakoba k'enkaito nari ekintu kyawe kyona, nyentsya otakaagira oti: Niinye naatungiise Abramu." 
Genesis14:24 Tinditwara kintu kyona, kureka ebi abatsigazi bariire, n'omugabo gw'abashaija abu mpurwire nabo; kandi Aneri na Eshikooli na Mamure nabo batware omugabo gwabo." 
Genesis15:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Abramu omu kworekwa, MUKAMA naamugira ati: Abramu, otatiina. Niinye ngabo yaawe; kandi oryaheebwa ebihembo bingi munonga." 
Genesis15:2 Abramu yaagira ati: Ai Mukama RUHANGA, oryampa ki, obu naaguma ndi encwekye, haza omuhunguzi w'ebyangye ari Eliezeeri owa Damasiko." 
Genesis15:3 Kandi Abramu yaagaruka yaagira ati: Reeba torampaire ruzaaro; kandi owaazaariirwe omu ka yangye niwe ariba omuhunguzi w'ebyangye. 
Genesis15:4 Reeba, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyamwizira, MUKAMA naamugira ati: Ogwo tiwe arihungura ebyawe, kureka omwana, ou oryezaarira, niwe aribihungura." 
Genesis15:5 Yaamushohoza aheeru, yaamugira ati: Rarama oreebe ahaiguru, obare enyonyoozi, oreebe ku oraabe noobaasa kuzibara. Yaamugira ati: Na baijukuru baawe nikwo bariingana batyo." 
Genesis15:6 Abramu yaikiriza MUKAMA, MUKAMA yaakimubarira kuba okuhikiirira." 
Genesis15:7 Kandi yaagaruka, yaamugira ati: Niinye MUKAMA owaakwihire omuri Uri ey'aba Kaludaaya, kukuha ensi egi ngu ogihungure." 
Genesis15:8 Abramu yaamubuuza ati: Ai Mukama RUHANGA, nimmanyira hi ku ndigihungura?" 
Genesis15:9 Yaamugarukamu ati: Ndeetera enyana ehikize emyaka eshatu, n'ebuguma y'embuzi ehikize emyaka eshatu, n'empaya y'entaama nayo ey'emyaka eshatu, n'akaiba n'enkombe nto." 
Genesis15:10 Yaabimutwarira byona, yaabishaturamu habiri, yaabirambika naabireebanisa; kwonka enyoni zo tiyaazishaturamu." 
Genesis15:11 Amahungu ku gaabaire gaija kugwa aha mitumbi, Abramu agabinga." 
Genesis15:12 Eizooba ku ryabaire nirirengarenga, Abramu yaakwatwa oturo twingi; kandi reeba, omwirima mwingi ogurikutiinisa gwamushweka." 
Genesis15:13 MUKAMA yaagambira Abramu ati: Omanyire kimwe ku oruzaaro rwawe rurishuhuukira omu nsi etari yaarwo, bakakorera ab'ensi egyo, nibaitwa kubi emyaka magana ana." 
Genesis15:14 Kwonka eihanga eryo, eri barikorera, ndyaritaho orubanja; kandi bwanyima baryarugayo baine eitungo ringi." 
Genesis15:15 Kwonka iwe oryashanga baashwenkuru n'obusingye, oryaziikwa gye ohikize emyaka ya bukuru." 
Genesis15:16 Omu bwijukuruza bwa kana baryagaruka aha, ahabw'okuba ebibi by'Abaamori tibikakanyire kurengyesereza." 
Genesis15:17 Bwanyima eizooba ku ryaherize kurenga, haabaho omwirima, reeba ekikoomi ekirikucumbuuka, n'orumuri orurikwaka byaraba ahagati y'ebyo bishate." 
Genesis15:18 Aha izooba eryo MUKAMA yaaragaana na Abramu endagaano, naagira ati: Oruzaaro rwawe ndyaruha egi nsi, okuruga aha kagyera ka Misri okuhika aha mugyera omuhango Furaati." 
Genesis15:19 Ensi y'Abakeeni, ey'Abakenizi, ey'Abakadumooni," 
Genesis15:20 ey'Abahiiti, ey'Abaperizi, ey'Abareefa," 
Genesis15:21 ey'Abaamori, ey'Abanyakanaani, ey'Abagirugashi, n'ey'Abayebusi." 
Genesis16:1 Reero Sarai muka Abramu akaba atamuzaariire baana; kandi akaba aine omuzaana Omunyamisrikazi, owaabaire naayetwa Hagari." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai yaagambira Abramu ati: Reeba, MUKAMA anyimire oruzaaro; ninkweshengyereza, byama n'omuzaana wangye; shana nkaamutungaho abaana. Abramu yaikiriza enaama ya Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 N'ahabw'ekyo Abramu ku yaabaire amazire emyaka ikumi omu nsi ya Kanaani, Sarai omukazi we yaatwara omuzaana we Hagari, Omunyamisrikazi, yaamuha iba kuba omukazi we." 
Genesis16:4 Abramu yaaraarira Hagari yaatwara enda; ku yaareebire yaagira enda, yaagaya mugore we." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai yaagambira Abramu ati: Okuhemurwa kwangye kube niiwe kwazaho; ahakuba nkakuha omuzaana wangye kukufumbata; mbwenu ku areebire yaagira enda, yangaya. MUKAMA atucwere orubanja, nyowe naiwe." 
Genesis16:6 Abramu yaamugarukamu ati: Reeba, omuzaana waawe ari omu bushoboorozi bwawe; omugire nk'oku orikwenda. Sarai nikwo kumutwaza kubi, nawe akamuhunga." 
Genesis16:7 Bwanyima maraika wa MUKAMA yaamushanga omu ihamba haihi n'eiziba eriri aha muhanda ogurikutoora Shuuri; 
Genesis16:8 yaamubuuza ati: Hagari omuzaana wa Sarai, nooruga hi? Kandi nooza hi? Yaagira ati: Nimpunga mugore wangye Sarai." 
Genesis16:9 Maraika wa MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Garuka ahari mugore waawe, omworobere." 
Genesis16:10 Maraika wa MUKAMA yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Ndyakanyisa munonga oruzaaro rwawe, rureme eibara ahabw'obwingi." 
Genesis16:11 Kandi maraika wa MUKAMA yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Reeba oine enda, oryagizaaramu omwana w'omwojo, omwete Ishimaeli, ahakuba MUKAMA ahuriire okwitwa kubi kwawe." 
Genesis16:12 Aryaba nk'enturegye omu bantu, aryaguma arwanise omuntu weena, n'abantu boona baryamurwanisa; aryatuura beene ishe boona hangahari." 
Genesis16:13 MUKAMA owaagambire nawe Hagari yaamweta eiziina, naagira ati: Niiwe Ruhanga oreeba; ahakuba Hagari akagira ati: Biri Otuura nandeeba nkaamureebera n'aha?" 
Genesis16:14 Nikyo eiziba eryo ryayeteirwe Beeri-lahairoi; kandi riri ahagati ya Kadeshi na Beredi. 
Genesis16:15 Bwanyima Hagari yaazaarira Abramu omwana w'omwojo; Abramu yaayeta omwana w'omwojo, ou Hagari yaazaire, Ishimaeli." 
Genesis16:16 Obwo Abramu akaba ahikize emyaka makumi munaana na mukaaga, obu Hagari yaamuzaarira Ishimaeli." 
Genesis17:1 Abramu ku yaahikize emyaka makumi mwenda na mwenda, MUKAMA yaamweyoreka, yaamugira ati: Ndi Ruhanga ow'Obushoboorozi bwona; ogume ogyende gye omu maisho gangye, kandi obe ohikire;" 
Genesis17:2 naanye ndyaragaana naiwe endagaano, kandi ndyakukanyisa munonga." 
Genesis17:3 Abramu yaagwa ahansi, yaajuumara; Ruhanga yaamugambira ati:" 
Genesis17:4 Reeba, endagaano yangye ogiine; oryaba ishe w'amahanga maingi munonga." 
Genesis17:5 Kandi tokigaruka kwetwa Abramu, kureka Abrahamu, ahakuba naakugira ishe w'amahanga maingi munonga." 
Genesis17:6 Kandi ndyakuha okuzaara munonga, nkukanyise, nkuhindure amahanga, n'abagabe bakukomookyemu." 
Genesis17:7 Ndyahamya endagaano yangye naiwe, kandi ngihamye n'oruzaaro rwawe bwanyima yaawe okuhitsya obusingye bwarwo bwona, ebe endagaano etarihwaho, nyowe kuba Ruhanga waawe n'ow'oruzaaro rwawe orwa bwanyima." 
Genesis17:8 Bwanyima iwe n'oruzaaro rwawe ndyabaha ensi ei oshuhuukiiremu, ensi yoona eya Kanaani, ebe eyaawe obusingye bwona; naanye ndyaguma ndi Ruhanga waabo." 
Genesis17:9 Ruhanga yaagaruka yaagambira Abrahamu ati: Oryaguma orinde endagaano yangye, iwe n'oruzaaro rwawe orwa bwanyima yaawe obusingye bwarwo bwona." 
Genesis17:10 Egi niyo ndagaano yangye ei muriguma nimurinda, ei ndikuragaana naimwe kandi n'oruzaaro rwawe orwa bwanyima; omushaija weena omuriimwe aryasharwa." 
Genesis17:11 Muryasharwa ekishushu ky'omubiri gwanyu, kabe akamanyiso k'endagaano yangye naimwe." 
Genesis17:12 Omwojo weena omuriimwe omu busingye bwanyu bwona, ku arihitsya ebiro munaana azairwe, asharwe, yaaba ozairwe omu ka yaawe, nari otari w'omu ruzaaro rwawe, owaaguzirwe empiiha aha banyamahanga." 
Genesis17:13 Orizaarwa omu ka yaawe n'origurwa empiiha zaawe, bashemereire kusharwa; kandi endagaano yangye eryaba aha mibiri yaanyu, ebe endagaano etarihwaho." 
Genesis17:14 Kandi omushaija weena oriba atashazirwe kishushu ky'omubiri gwe aryacuubwa omu ihanga rye; ahabw'okuba aryaba aitsire endagaano yangye. 
Genesis17:15 Ruhanga yaagambira Abrahamu ati: Ebya Sarai omukazi waawe, otarigaruka kumweta Sarai kureka omwete Saara." 
Genesis17:16 Naanye ndyamuha omugisha; kandi ndyamukuhaho omwana w'omwojo; buzima ndyamuha omugisha, abe nyina w'amahanga; abagabe b'amahanga niwe barikomookaho." 
Genesis17:17 Abrahamu yaagwa ahansi, yaajuumara, yaasheka, yaayebuuza ati: Beitu shi omwana aryazaarwa omugurusi w'emyaka igana? Kandi na Saara, azaare?" 
Genesis17:18 Abrahamu yaagambira Ruhanga ati: Ishimaeli ku yaakugizire amagara omu maisho gaawe! 
Genesis17:19 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Ngaaha! Kwonka na Saara omukazi waawe aryakuzaarira omwana w'omwojo, omwete Isaaka; kandi ndyahamya endagaano yangye nawe n'oruzaaro rwe orwa bwanyima, ebe endagaano etarihwaho." 
Genesis17:20 Kandi ebya Ishimaeli nabyo, naakuhurira. Reeba, ndyamuha omugisha, mmuhe okuzaara munonga, mmukanyise. Aryazaara abategyeki ikumi na babiri, kandi ndyamugira eihanga rihango." 
Genesis17:21 Kwonka endagaano yangye ndyagihamya ahari Isaaka, ou Saara arikuzaarira omu bunaku obwatairweho omu mwaka ogurikwija." 
Genesis17:22 Ruhanga ku yaaherize kugamba na Abrahamu, yainamuka, yaaruga ahu Abrahamu yaabaire ari." 
Genesis17:23 Bwanyima Abrahamu yaatwara Ishimaeli omutabani n'abaazaariirwe omu ka ye boona n'abaaguzirwe empiiha ze boona, yaashara ekishushu ky'omubiri gw'omushaija weena owaabaire ari omu ka ye, nk'oku Ruhanga yaamugambiire." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahamu akaba ahikize emyaka makumi mwenda na mwenda, obu yaasharwa." 
Genesis17:25 Na Ishimaeli omutabani akaba ahikize emyaka ikumi n'eshatu, obu yaasharwa." 
Genesis17:26 Abrahamu akasharwa aha izooba rimwe na Ishimaeli omutabani. 
Genesis17:27 Kandi n'abashaija boona, abaazaariirwe omu ka ye, n'abaaguzirwe empiiha ze aha banyamahanga, bakasharwa hamwe nawe." 
Genesis18:1 MUKAMA yaayeyorekyera Abrahamu aha myela ya Mamure, ashutami omu muryango gw'eihema rye omu ihangwe;" 
Genesis18:2 ku yaimukize amaisho, yaareeba abashaija bashatu beemereire hangahari. Ku yaabareebire, yaimuka omu muryango gw'eihema, yairuka kubabugana, yainama ahansi, yaagira ati:" 
Genesis18:3 Mukama wangye, ku ndaabe ningirirwa embabazi omu maisho gaawe, ninkweshengyereza otahingura omwiru waawe." 
Genesis18:4 Kabareete otwizi, munaabe aha bigyere, mwije ahansi y'omuti, muhuumure," 
Genesis18:5 naanye ndeete akagaati, mugarukwemu amaani mubone kugumizamu, nk'oku mwahunguka aha mwiru waanyu. Baagira bati: Kora nk'oku waagamba." 
Genesis18:6 Abrahamu yaayehuuta, yaataaha omu ihema, yaashangamu Saara, yaamugira ati: Rahuka ogire encuro ishatu z'esaano y'obunono, okibumbabumbe, ogiihemu otugaati." 
Genesis18:7 Kandi yairuka, yaaza omu masyo, yaihamu enyana nto nungi, yaagiha omushumba we, nawe yaagibaaga ahonaaho, yaagiteeka." 
Genesis18:8 Abrahamu yaatwara amajuta n'amate n'enyama y'enyana ei yaateeka, yaabita omu maisho gaabo; yaaguma ayemereire aha rubaju rwabo ahansi y'omuti, nibarya." 
Genesis18:9 Baamubuuza bati: Saara omukazi wawe arahi? Yaagarukamu ati: Ari omu ihema. 
Genesis18:10 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Buzimazima, obunaku ku burihika, ndyagaruka; kandi reeba, Saara omukazi waawe aryazaara omwana w'omwojo. Saara akaba ari omu muryango gw'eihema enyima ye, abihuriire." 
Genesis18:11 (Obwo Abrahamu na Saara bakaba bakuzire, bahikire omu ngingo zaabukuru; kandi Saara akaba atakiza mu micwe y'abakazi.)" 
Genesis18:12 N'ahabw'ekyo Saara yaashekyera aha mutima, naagira ati: Nimbaasa kushemererwa naakaikwire, na ibanye ari omugurusi?" 
Genesis18:13 MUKAMA yaagambira Abrahamu ati: N'enki ekyashetsya Saara, akagira ati: N'eky'amazima ndyazaara omwana nkaikwire?" 
Genesis18:14 Hariho ekirema MUKAMA? Omu bunaku obwatairweho ndyagaruka; kandi ebiro bye ku birihika, Saara aryazaara omwana w'omwojo." 
Genesis18:15 Kwonka Saara yaayehakana ati: Tinaasheka; ahakuba akaba atiinire. Yaamugarukamu ati: Ngaaha! Okusheka kwo waasheka. 
Genesis18:16 Abo bashaija baimuka, baarugayo, baagyenda bagyemire Sodoma; na Abrahamu yaabashendekyereza" 
Genesis18:17 MUKAMA yaayebuuza ati: Abrahamu ku araabe arihinduka eihanga rikuru ery'amaani, kandi n'amahanga goona ag'omu nsi gariheerwa omugisha omuriwe, nshemereire kumushereka eki ndikuza kukora?" 
Genesis18:18  
Genesis18:19 Ngaaha! Ahakuba nkamutoorana, ngu abone kuragiira abaana be n'ab'omu ka ye abarimukurata, okuguma omu muhanda gwa MUKAMA, nibakora eby'okuhikiirira n'eby'oburyo, ngu MUKAMA abone kureetera Abrahamu ebi yaamugambiire." 
Genesis18:20 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Nk'oku okutaka kw'abarikurega Sodoma na Gomora kuri kwingi ahabw'ekibi kyabo ekihinguraine munonga," 
Genesis18:21 nikyo naaza kushuumira hati, nkareeba kwo, ku baraabe bakozire nk'okutaka kw'abarikubarega, oku mpuriire, oku kuri; nari ku kiraabe kitari kityo, nakyo nkimanye." 
Genesis18:22 Abashaija abo baaruga aho, baagumizamu nibaza Sodoma; kwonka Abrahamu yaaguma ayemereire omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Genesis18:23 Abrahamu yaamwirira haihi, yaagira ati: Buzima noija kucwekyereza abahikiriire hamwe n'ababi:" 
Genesis18:24 Mbwenu omu rurembo ku haakuba harimu abahikiriire makumi ataano, okaarucwekyereza, oyanga kurusaasira ahabw'abahikiriire makumi ataano abarimu?" 
Genesis18:25 Nikikabure ekyo kukurugaho, okwita abahikiriire hamwe n'ababi, n'okureeba abahikiriire nibatwazibwa nk'ababi! Ekyo nikikabure! Omucwi w'emanja z'ensi yoona tarikora ebihikire?" 
Genesis18:26 MUKAMA yaagarukamu ati: Omu rurembo rwa Sodoma ku ndaashangyemu abahikiriire makumi ataano, niinyija kurusaasira rwona ahabwabo." 
Genesis18:27 Abrahamu yaagaruka yaagira ati: Reeba, naayehanga kugamba na Mukama wangye, haza ndi omucuucu n'eiju." 
Genesis18:28 Mbwenu shi, abahikiriire makumi ataano kuhaakuburaho bataano, okaacwekyereza orurembo rwona ahabw'abo abataano abaaburaho? Yaagira ati: Ku ndaashangyeyo makumi ana na bataano, tindikwija kurucwekyereza." 
Genesis18:29 Abrahamu yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Ku haraabonekyeyo makumi ana! Yaagarukamu ati: Tindikwija kurucwekyereza ahabw'abo makumi ana. 
Genesis18:30 Kandi yaagaruka yaagira ati: Mukama wangye arekye kungwerwa kubi, ngarukye ngambe. Ku haraabonekyeyo makumi ashatu. Yaamugarukamu ati: Tindikwija kurucwekyereza, ku ndaashangyeyo makumi ashatu." 
Genesis18:31 Yaagira ati: Reeba, naayehanga kugamba na Mukama wangye. Ku haraabonekyeyo makumi abiri. Yaagarukamu ati: Tindikwija kurucwekyereza ahabw'abo makumi abiri." 
Genesis18:32 Bwanyima yaagira ati: Mukama wangye arekye kuguubwa kubi, ngarukye ngambe omurundi ogu gwonka. Mbwenu shi ku haraabonekyemu ikumi." 
Genesis18:33 Yaamugarukamu ati: Tindirucwekyereza ku hakubonekayo ikumi. 
Genesis18:34 MUKAMA ku yaaherize kugamba na Abrahamu, yaagyenda; kandi na Abrahamu yaagaruka owe." 
Genesis19:1 Baamaraika abo bombi baahika Sodoma omu mwabazyo; baashanga Looti ashutami aha irembo rya Sodoma. Looti ku yaabareebire, yaimukakubabugana; yainama ahansi, yaagira ati:" 
Genesis19:2 Bakama bangye, nimbeeshengyereza mukubuukye, mutaahe omu ka y'omwiru waanyu, munaabe aha bigyere, muraare; omu kasheeshe kare mwimukye, mugyende. Baagarukamu bati: Ngaaha; kureka nitwija kuraara omu muhanda, burugyeho busheeshe." 
Genesis19:3 Yaabagyema munonga, baakubuuka, baataaha omu ka ye; yaabateekyera obugyenyi, yaateeka emigaati etatumbisiibwe, baarya." 
Genesis19:4 Kwonka ku baabaire batakabyamire, abashaija b'omu rurembo Sodoma, abato n'abakuru, abantu boona abaarugire embaju zoona baayehinguririza egyo nju;" 
Genesis19:5 baayeta Looti, nibagira bati: Abashaija abaija owaawe ogu mwabazyo barahi? Batureetere, tubamanye." 
Genesis19:6 Looti yaashohora, yaabashanga aha muryango, yaagaruraho orwigi;" 
Genesis19:7 yaabagira ati: Bagyenzi bangye, nimbeeshengyereza mutakora ekibi ekirikushusha kityo." 
Genesis19:8 Reeba, nyine bahara bangye babiri abatakamanyaga mushaija; ka mbabashohoreze, mubakore, nk'oku murikwenda; kwonka mutagira eki mwakora ahari aba bashaija, ahakuba baizire kuraara omu nju yangye." 
Genesis19:9 Baagira bati: Rugaho, tuhigize. Baagaruka baagira bati: Orushaija oru rukaija rushuhuukire, mbwenu nirwenda kwehindura omuramuzi? Hati twaza kukugira kubi okukira oku twakubagizire. Baamiganira ahari ogwo mushaija Looti, bairira haihi kucwa orwigi." 
Genesis19:10 Abashaija abaabaire bari omu nju, baashohoza emikono yaabo, baataasya Looti, baakinga orwigi." 
Genesis19:11 Baahumya amaisho g'abashaija abaabaire bari aha rwigi, abato n'abakuru; nahabw'ekyo baafa kubi, nibakorakora nibasherura orwigi." 
Genesis19:12 Bwanyima abo bashaija baabuuza Looti bati: Oine abandi bantu aha? Mukwe waawe, na batabani baawe, na bahara baawe, n'omuntu weena ou oine omuri oru rurembo, obaihe omuri ogu mwanya;" 
Genesis19:13 ahakuba twaza kugucwekyereza, ahabw'okuba okutaka kw'abarikubarega kurengyesereize omu maisho ga MUKAMA; kandi MUKAMA atutumire kugucwekyereza." 
Genesis19:14 Looti yaashohora, yaagambira abakwe, abaabaire nibenda kushwera bahara be, naagira ati: Mwimukye, murugye omu mwanya ogu; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA naayenda kucwekyereza orurembo. Kwonka omu maisho ga bakwe be yaashusha nk'orikuteera obuyaga." 
Genesis19:15 Ku bwaseesire, baamaraika baateera Looti obwira, nibagira bati: Imuka otware omukazi waawe na bahara baawe bombi abari aha, mutakaagwa omu rubanja rw'orurembo." 
Genesis19:16 Kwonka yaaguma naayeziringa; abashaija abo nikwo kumukwata omukono, n'omukono gw'omukazi we, n'emikono ya bahara be bombi, bakamushohoza aheeru y'orurembo, nk'oku MUKAMA yaamusaasiire." 
Genesis19:17 Ku baaherize kubashohoreza kimwe, omwe yaagira ati: Hunga otafa; otareeba enyima, n'obu kwakuba okwemereraho omu ruhita rwona; hungira omu bibungo, otakaacwekyerezibwa." 
Genesis19:18 Looti yaabagira ati: Ngaaha, Mukama wangye." 
Genesis19:19 Reeba omwiru waawe naaheebwa omugisha omu maisho gaawe, waakanyisa embabazi zaawe ezi wangirira kunkiza okufa. Tindikubaasa kuhungira mu bibungo, ntakaahikwaho akabi, nkafa." 
Genesis19:20 Reeba, orurembo ruriya ruri haihi okuhungiramu, kandi ni rukye. Naakweshengyereza mbe nirwo naahungiramu (ti rukye?), amagara gangye nigaija kukiriramu." 
Genesis19:21 Yaamugarukamu ati: Naakwikiriza n'ekyo nakyo, okutahwerekyereza rurembo oru waagambaho." 
Genesis19:22 Yehuute ohungireyo; ahakuba tindikubaasa kukora kintu kyona, otakahikireyo. Orwo rurembo nikyo rwayeteirwe Zoari." 
Genesis19:23 Looti yaahika Zoari, akashana kaatagata." 
Genesis19:24 MUKAMA yaabona kunaga ahari Sodoma na Gomora omuriro n'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti, nibiruga ahari MUKAMA omu iguru;" 
Genesis19:25 yaacwekyereza ezo ndembo, n'oruhita rwona n'abaatuuzi baamwo boona, n'ekyabaire kimezire ahansi." 
Genesis19:26 Kwonka omukazi we, owaabaire amukuratiire, yaareeba enyima, yaahinduka enyomyo y'omwonyo." 
Genesis19:27 Abrahamu yaimuka omu kasheeshe, yaaza ahu ayemereire omu maisho ga MUKAMA," 
Genesis19:28 yareeba aha bukiizi bwa Sodoma na Gomora n'oruhita rwona; kandi reeba, ensi ekaba neecumba omwika nk'ogw'ekikoomi." 
Genesis19:29 Kandi Ruhanga, ku yaabaire naacwekyereza endembo z'omuri orwo ruhita, yaijuka Abrahamu, yaatuma ahari Looti ngu azirugyemu, omu kucwekyereza ezo ndembo ezi Looti yaabaire atwiremu." 
Genesis19:30 Bwanyima Looti yaaruga Zoari yainamuka omu bibungo na bahara be bombi; ahakuba akatiina kutuura Zoari; atyo yaataaha omu nyanga na bahara be bombi. 
Genesis19:31 Omukuru yaagambira omuto ati: Tataitwe akuzire; kandi omu nsi tiharimu muntu oriija kutushwera, nk'emicwe y'ensi yoona oku eri." 
Genesis19:32 Ija tunywaise tataitwe viinyo, tumusinze, tubyame nawe, tutungye oruzaaro, turekye kufa bucwekye." 
Genesis19:33 Baasinza ishebo ekyo kiro; omukuru yaataahamu, yaabyama na ishe; kandi ishe tiyaamanya bunaku bu yaabyamiramu nawe, n'obu yaimukiramu." 
Genesis19:34 Ku bwaseesire, omukuru yaagira omuto ati: Reeba, nyekiro mbyamire na taata; ka tugarukye tumusinze eki kiro; naiwe otaahemu, obyame nawe, tutungye oruzaaro, turekye kufa bucwekye." 
Genesis19:35 Batyo baagaruka baasinza ishebo na viinyo ekyo kiro; omuto yaimuka, yaabyama nawe; ishe tiyaamanya bunaku bu yaabyamiramu nawe, nobu yaimukiramu." 
Genesis19:36 Okwo nikwo bahara ba Looti baatwekirwe ishebo. 
Genesis19:37 Omukuru yaazaara omwana w'omwojo, yaamweta Moabu; niwe ishe w'Abamoabu n'okuhitsya hati." 
Genesis19:38 Omuto nawe yaazaara omwana w'omwojo, yaamweta Ben-ami; niwe ishe w'Abaamoni n'okuhitsya hati." 
Genesis20:1 Abrahamu yaarugayo, yaaza aha bukiizi bw'ensi ya Negebu, yaatuura ahagati ya Kadeshi na Shuuri; bwanyima yaashuhuukira Gerari." 
Genesis20:2 Abrahamu yaagamba ku omukazi we Saara ari munyaanya. Abimeleki omugabe wa Gerari yaatuma ahari Saara, yaamutwara." 
Genesis20:3 Kwonka Ruhanga yaija ahari Abimeleki nyekiro omu kirooto, yaamugira ati: Reeba, waafa, ahabw'okuba omukazi ou otwaire aine iba." 
Genesis20:4 Kwonka Abimeleki akaba atakamuhikire; Abimeleki nikwo kugarukamu ati: Nooyenda kwita eihanga eritaina rubanja? 
Genesis20:5 We wenka tarangizire ati: Ogu ni munyaanyazi? Kandi omukazi nawe akagira ati: Ndi munyaanya. Eki eki nkozire nkikozire, nyine omutima gw'amazima n'emikono etaine rubanja." 
Genesis20:6 Ruhanga yaamugarukamu omu kirooto, ati: Eego, nimmanya ngu okikozire, oine omutima gw'amazima; kandi naanye nkuzibiire kuncumuraho; nikyo ntakwikiririize kumukoraho." 
Genesis20:7 Mbwenu nu garurira ogwo mushaija omukazi we, ahakuba ni nabi, akushabire orekye kufa; kwonka ku oraabe otamumugaruriire, omanyire kimwe ngu noija kufa hamwe n'abaawe boona." 
Genesis20:8 Abimeleki yaaguruka kare, yaatuma aha bairu be boona, yaabateekyerereza ebyo byona, baatiina munonga." 
Genesis20:9 Bwanyima yaatuma ahari Abrahamu, yaamubuuza ati: otutuzire ki? Nkucumwireho ki, waaza kundeetaho ekibi kihango, nyowe n'obugabe bwangye? Onkoreire ebitakorwa." 
Genesis20:10 Kandi yaagaruka yaabuuza Abrahamu ati: Okareeba ki, ekyakureeteire kukora otyo?" 
Genesis20:11 Abrahamu yaagarukamu ati: Nkakikora ahabw'okuteekateeka ngu: Buzima omu mwanya ogu tiharimu kutiina Ruhanga; nibaija kuunyita ahabw'omukazi wangye. 
Genesis20:12 Kandi ekindi, ni munyaanyazi buzima, owa taata otari wa maawe; kwonka nkamushwera." 
Genesis20:13 Bwanyima Ruhanga ku yaanyihire omu ka ya taata, yampindura ow'okuzengyerera, naagira Saara nti: Eky'embabazi eki oshemereire kunkorera n'eki; buri mwanya gwona ogu turizamu, ogume ogire oti: Ogu ni munyaanyazi." 
Genesis20:14 Abimeleki yaareeta entaama n'ente n'abahuuku n'abazaana, yaabiha Abrahamu, yaamugarurira na Saara omukazi we." 
Genesis20:15 Kandi yaamugira ati: Reeba, ensi yangye ekuri omumaisho; otuure ahu orikwenda hoona." 
Genesis20:16 Yaagambira na Saara ati: Reeba, naaha munyaanyoko ebicweka by'efeeza rukumi, kukwihaho ekihemu omu maisho g'abari hamwe naiwe boona; kandi omu maisho g'abantu boona oryaguma ori ohikire." 
Genesis20:17 Bwanyima Abrahamu yaashaba Ruhanga; Ruhanga yaakiza Abimeleki n'omukazi we n'abazaana be; baazaara abaana; 
Genesis20:18 ahakuba MUKAMA akaba ayigariire kimwe enda z'ab'omu ka ya Abimeleki ahabwa Saara muka Abrahamu. 
Genesis21:1 MUKAMA yaataayaayira Saara nk'oku yaagambire, kandi MUKAMA yaakorera Saara nk'oku yaaraganiise." 
Genesis21:2 Saara yaagira enda, yaazaarira Abrahamu omwana w'omwojo yaakuzire, omu bunaku obu Ruhanga yaamugambiire." 
Genesis21:3 Abrahamu yaayeta ogwo mwana ou yaazaire Isaaka, ou Saara yaamuzaariire." 
Genesis21:4 Abrahamu yaashara omwana we Isaaka amazire ebiro munaana azairwe, nk'oku Ruhanga yaamuragiire." 
Genesis21:5 Kandi Abrahamu akaba ahikize emyaka igana, obu yaazaara ogwo mwana Isaaka." 
Genesis21:6 Saara yaagira ati: Ruhanga anshekize; n'oraakihurire weena naija kusheka. 
Genesis21:7 Yaagaruka yaagira ati: N'oha owaakugizire Abrahamu, ngu Saara nawe aryayontsya abaana? Ahakuba mmuzaariire omwana w'omwojo omu bugurusi bwe." 
Genesis21:8 Omwana yaakura, yaacuuka; Abrahamu yaateeka obugyenyi bwingi aha izooba eri Isaaka yaacuukiireho." 
Genesis21:9 Saara yaareeba omwana wa Hagari Omunyamisrikazi, ou yaazairweho Abrahamu, naazaana n'omutabani." 
Genesis21:10 Nikyo yaagiriire Abrahamu ati: Binga ogu muzaana n'omwana we; ahakuba omwana w'ogu muzaanakazi tarihungura n'omwana wangye Isaaka. 
Genesis21:11 Ekigambo ekyo kyagwisa kubi Abrahamu ahabw'omwana we. 
Genesis21:12 Ruhanga yaagambira Abrahamu ati: Otaguubwa kubi ahabw'omwana n'ahabw'omuzaanakazi waawe. Kyona eki Saara araakugambire, omworobere; ahabw'okuba baijukuru baawe baryayetererwa Isaaka." 
Genesis21:13 Kandi omwana w'omuzaana nawe ndyamuhindura eihanga, ahabw'okuba n'omwana waawe." 
Genesis21:14 N'ahabw'ekyo Abrahamu yaimuka omu kasheeshe kare, yaagira eby'okurya n'efurebe y'amaizi, yaabiha Hagari, yaabimuta aha ibega, yaamuha n'ogwo mwana, yaamwohereza. Yaarugayo, yaaguma naagyendagyenda omu ihamba rya Beerisheba." 
Genesis21:15 Amaizi ku gaahweire omu furebe, yaarambika omwana ahansi y'ekishaka," 
Genesis21:16 yaagyenda, yaashutama hangahari naamureeba, kaanya nk'aharikurashwa omwambi; ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Ka ndekye kureeba omwana wangye naakaba. Ku yaabaire ashutami naareeba ei ari, omwana yaimutsya eiraka, yaarira." 
Genesis21:17 Ruhanga yaahurira eiraka ry'ogwo mwana; maraika wa Ruhanga yaayema omu iguru, yaayeta Hagari, yaamugira ati: Waaba ota, Hagari? Otatiina, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga yaahurira eiraka ry'omwojo ah' ari." 
Genesis21:18 Imuka, oimutsye omwana, omweyegamize aha mukono; ahakuba ndyamuhindura eihanga rihango." 
Genesis21:19 Omuri ogwo mwanya Ruhanga yaigura amaisho ga Hagari, yaareeba eiziba ry'amaizi, yaagyenda, yaijuza efurebe amaizi, yaanywaisa omwana." 
Genesis21:20 Okuruga aho Ruhanga yaaguma n'omwojo, yaakura, yaatuura omu ihamba, yaaba omurasi rugambwa." 
Genesis21:21 Yaaguma omu ihamba rya Parani; nyina yaamushwererera Omunyamisrikazi. 
Genesis21:22 Omu biro ebyo Abimeleki na Fikooli omukuru w'engabo ze baagambira Abrahamu bati: Ruhanga ari hamwe naiwe omu bi orikukora byona. 
Genesis21:23 N'ahabw'ekyo ondahire Ruhanga, ku otarimbeiha nari mutabani wangye, n'obu yaakuba mwijukuru wangye; kureka nk'embabazi ezi naakugiriire oku ziri, naiwe ku nikwo oringirira n'ensi, ei waashuhuukiiremu." 
Genesis21:24 Abrahamu yaamugarukamu ati: Naaza kukurahira. 
Genesis21:25 Bwanyima Abrahamu yaatonganisa Abimeleki ahabw'eiziba eri abairu ba Abimeleki baamwakire n'empaka. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki yaagarukamu ati: Tindikumanya owaakozire ekyo; naiwe tokabingambiraga, kandi tinkakihuriraga, kureka eri izooba." 
Genesis21:27 Abrahamu yaatwara entaama n'ente, yaaziha Abimeleki; bombi baaragaana endagaano." 
Genesis21:28 Abrahamu yaashoroora omu busyo abaagazi b'entaama mushanju. 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleki yaabuuza Abrahamu ati: Abaagazi b'entaama aba mushanju abu waashoroora, n'aba ki?" 
Genesis21:30 Yaagarukamu ati: Aba baagazi b'entaama mushanju naabakuha, obatware, babe eky'okuhamya eiziba eri ku niinye naarifukwire." 
Genesis21:31 Nikyo yaayeteire omwanya ogwo Beeri-sheba, ahakuba aho niho baarahiriire bombi." 
Genesis21:32 Batyo baaragaanira endagaano Beeri-sheba; bwanyima Abimeleki na Fikooli omukuru w'engabo ze baimuka, baagaruka omu nsi y'Abafilistia." 
Genesis21:33 Kandi Abrahamu yaabyara ekiti ky'omwesheli ahari Beeri-sheba; yaaramizaho eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga otahwaho. 
Genesis21:34 Bwanyima Abrahamu yaamara ebiro bingi, ashuhuukiire omu nsi y'Abafilistia." 
Genesis22:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo Ruhanga yaagyeza Abrahamu, yaamweta ati: Abrahamu! Yaamweetaba ati: Nyamuhanga!" 
Genesis22:2 Yaamugira ati: Twara omwana waawe omwe nyamunegyere Isaaka, ou okunda, oze omu nsi ya Moria, omutambire aha kibungo kimwe omu bibungo by'aho, eki ndaakugambire, kuba ekitambo ekyokize." 
Genesis22:3 Atyo Abrahamu yaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, yaatandiika endogoya ye, yaatwara babiri aha batsigazi be na Isaaka omwana we; yaashatura enku z'okwotsya ekitambo, yaimuka, yaaza omu mwanya ogu Ruhanga amugambiire." 
Genesis22:4 Aha kiro kya kashatu Abrahamu yaanaga amaisho, yaareeba omwanya gukiri hare." 
Genesis22:5 Abrahamu yaagira abatsigazi be ati: Imwe mugume aha n'endogoya, nyowe n'omwojo tuze kuriya, turamye, haza tugarukye, tubashangye aha." 
Genesis22:6 Abrahamu yaakwata enku z'okwotsya ekitambo, yaazikorera Isaaka omwana we; we yaatwara omuriro n'omusyo gw'endiga; baagyenda hamwe bombi." 
Genesis22:7 Isaaka yaayeta Abrahamu ishe ati: Taata! Abrahamu yaamwetaba ati: N'enki, mwana wangye? Yaagira ati: Beitu shi ka twine omuriro n'enku; omwana gw'entaama ogw'okutamba gurahi?" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahamu yaagarukamu ati: Mwana wangye, Ruhanga naija kwebonera omwana gw'entaama gw'ekitambo ky'okwotsya. Batyo baagumizamu bombi." 
Genesis22:9 Ku baahikire omu mwanya ogu Ruhanga amugambiire, Abrahamu yaayombekayo eitambiro, yaariteekyeraho enku, yaaboha Isaaka omwana we, yaamugarika aha itambiro aha nku." 
Genesis22:10 Abrahamu yaakununkirira omusyo kurezya omutabani. 
Genesis22:11 Maraika wa MUKAMA yaayema omu iguru, yaamweta ati: Abrahamu! Abrahamu! Yaayetaba ati: Nyamuhanga!" 
Genesis22:12 Yaamugira ati: Otakora ahari ogwo mwana, nari kugira eki waamwitsa; ahabw'okuba hati naamanya ku orikutiina Ruhanga ahabw'okutaanyima mwana waawe omwe nyamunegyere." 
Genesis22:13 Abrahamu yaimutsya amaisho, yaamagamaga, yaareeba enyima ye empaya y'entaama ekwatsirwe ebikamba omu mahembe; Abrahamu yaagyenda, yaihayo egyo mpaya, yaagitamba kuba ekitambo ekyokize omu mwanya gw'omwana we." 
Genesis22:14 Abrahamu yaayeta ogwo mwanya Yehovayire, nk'oku kirikugambwa na hati ngu, Aha kibungo kya MUKAMA kiryaheebwa." 
Genesis22:15 Maraika wa MUKAMA yaagaruka yaayema omu iguru, yaayeta Abrahamu omurundi gwa kabiri," 
Genesis22:16 yaamugira ati: Naayerahira, nikwo MUKAMA arikugira, ahabw'okukora eki, otanyime mwana waawe omwe nyamunegyere," 
Genesis22:17 nti: Okukuha ndyakuha omugisha, kandi n'okukanyisa ndyakanyisa oruzaaro rwawe rube nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, kandi nk'omusheenyi gw'aha rubaju rw'enyanja; n'oruzaaro rwawe ruryakubuura amarembo g'abazigu baarwo;" 
Genesis22:18 kandi omurirwo amahanga goona ag'omu nsi nimwo gariheerwa omugisha, ahabw'okuba oyorobeire eiraka ryangye." 
Genesis22:19 Bwanyima Abrahamu yaagaruka aha batsigazi be; baimuka baagyenda hamwe Beeri-sheba; Abrahamu yaaba niyo yaatuura. 
Genesis22:20 Bwanyima y'ebyo baagambira Abrahamu bati: Reeba, Milika nawe azaariire Nahori abaana;" 
Genesis22:21 omujigaijo ni Uzi, n'omurumuna Buuzi, na Kemueli ishe wa Aramu;" 
Genesis22:22 na Kesedi, Haazo, Piludashi, Yidulafu na Besueli." 
Genesis22:23 Besueli yaazaara Rebeka; abo omunaana nibo Milika yaazaariire Nahori, murumuna wa Abrahamu." 
Genesis22:24 Kandi n'omukazi we w'ekinyanshunju orikwetwa Reuma, nawe yaazaara Teeba, Gahamu, Tahashi na Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Saara akamara emyaka igana na makumi abiri na mushanju; egyo niyo myaka ei yaahikize. 
Genesis23:2 Yaafeera Kiryasiaraba (niyo Heburooni) omu nsi ya Kanaani; Abrahamu yaataaha omu ihema kuririra Saara n'okumucurira; 
Genesis23:3 yaaruga aha mutumbi gwe, yaashohora, yaagambira aba Heesi ati:" 
Genesis23:4 Ndi omunyaihanga kandi omushuhuuki omuriimwe; mumpe omwanya gw'okuziikamu, mbone kuziika omufu wangye, andugye omumaisho." 
Genesis23:5 Aba Heesi baagarukamu Abrahamu bati: 
Genesis23:6 Mukama waitu, tuhurire; ori omuntu mukuru munonga omuriitwe; ziika omufu waawe omu kituuro eki oraatoorane omu bituuro byaitu byona; tihariho n'omwe omuriitwe oraakwime ekituuro kye, ngu otaziikamu omufu waawe." 
Genesis23:7 Abrahamu yaimuka, yainama omu maisho ga bakama b'ensi, aba Heesi." 
Genesis23:8 Yaabagira ati: Ku muraabe nimwikiriza ngu nziikye omufu wangye, andugye omumaisho, mumpurire, munyeshengyerereze Efurooni mwene Zohari," 
Genesis23:9 ampe enyanga ya Makipeela ei aine, eri aha muheru gw'ekibanja kye; agingurize omu maisho gaanyu nk'obuguzi bwayo oku buri, gube omwanya gwangye ogw'okuziikamu." 
Genesis23:10 Kandi obwo Efurooni akaba ashutami omu ba Heesi; Efurooni ogwo Omuhiiti yaagarukamu Abrahamu, aba Heesi boona abaabaire nibataaha omu irembo ry'orurembo rwe bamuhuriire, naagira ati:" 
Genesis23:11 Ngaaha, Mukama wangye, mpurira. Ekyo kibanja naakikuha, n'enyanga yaamwo; naabikuheera omu maisho g'eihanga ryaitu. Oziikyemu omufu waawe." 
Genesis23:12 Abrahamu yainama omu maisho ga bakama b'ensi. 
Genesis23:13 Yaagambira Efurooni, boona bahuriire, ati: Ku oraabe nookisiima, naakweshengyereza, ompurire; nkuheereze obuguzi bw'ekibanja nk'oku buri; kandi ikiriza obutware, naanye mbone kuziikamu omufu wangye." 
Genesis23:14 Efurooni yaagarukamu Abrahamu ati: 
Genesis23:15 Mukama wangye, mpurira. Akabanja akarikugurwa shekeli z'efeeza magana ana nikyo ki ahariiwe naanye? Mbwenu ziikamu omufu waawe." 
Genesis23:16 Abrahamu yaikiriza Efurooni, yaamurengyera efeeza ezi yaagambira omu maisho g'aba Heesi, shekeli magana ana z'efeeza, ezirikukoresibwa abashuubuzi." 
Genesis23:17 Okwo nikwo Efurooni yaaguzire ekibanja kye, ekyabaire kiri Makipeela, aharikureeba Mamure, ekibanja n'enyanga yaamwo, n'emiti yoona eyaabaire erimu okuhika aha mwatano ogwabaire gukyehinguririize," 
Genesis23:18 byahamibwa omu maisho b'aba Heesi n'ag'abaabaire nibataaha omu irembo ry'orurembo rwe kuba ebya Abrahamu. 
Genesis23:19 Bwanyima y'ekyo, Abrahamu yaaziika omukazi we Saara omu nyanga y'omu kibanja kya Makipeela, aharikureeba Mamure (niyo Heburooni) omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Genesis23:20 Ekyo kibanja n'enyanga yaamwo byahamibwa aba Heesi kuba ebya Abrahamu n'okuba omwanya gwe gw'okuziikamu. 
Genesis24:1 Abrahamu akaba akuzire, ahikire omu ngingo zaabukuru; kandi MUKAMA akaba amuhaire omugisha omuri byona." 
Genesis24:2 Abrahamu yaagambira omugaragwa we mukuru owaabaire naategyeka eby'omu ka ye byona, ati: Ija ote omukono gwawe ahansi y'ekibero kyangye;" 
Genesis24:3 nkurahize MUKAMA Ruhanga w'eiguru n'ensi, ku otarishwererera mwana wangye omuri bahara b'Abanyakanaani, abu ntwiremu;" 
Genesis24:4 kureka ku ogigyenda omu ihanga ryaitu, kandi omuri beene waitu, okaba niyo waashwererera omwana wangye Isaaka omukazi." 
Genesis24:5 Omugaragwa yaamugarukamu ati: Shana akaayanga kwija naanye omu nsi egi. Ku kiriba kyabaire kityo, omwana waawe mmugarure omu nsi ei waarugiremu?" 
Genesis24:6 Abrahamu yaamugira ati: Oyerinde, otarigarurayo omwana wangye." 
Genesis24:7 MUKAMA Ruhanga w'eiguru owaanyihire omu ka ya taata n'omu nsi ei naazairwemu, kandi owangambiire naarahira ati: Oruzaaro rwawe ndyaruha ensi egi, Ogwo aryatuma maraika we akwebembere, oshwererereyo omwana wangye omukazi." 
Genesis24:8 Omukazi ku aryanga kwija naiwe, orwo tiruriba rubanja rwawe ahabw'endahiro ei naakurahiza; kwonka eki ndikukwehanangiriza, otarigarurayo omwana wangye." 
Genesis24:9 Omugaragwa nikwo kuta omukono ahansi y'ekibero kya Abrahamu mukama we, akamurahira ku arikikora." 
Genesis24:10 Bwanyima omugaragwa yaatwara engamira ikumi aha za mukama we n'ebintu birungi eby'okuriimisa eby'emiringo yoona ebi yaahairwe mukama we, yaimuka yaaza Mesopotamia, yaahika haihi n'orurembo rwa Nahori." 
Genesis24:11 Yaateeza engamira ebikokora ahansi aheeru y'orurembo aha iziba ry'amaizi omu mwabazyo, ahu abakazi batahira amaizi." 
Genesis24:12 Yaashaba ati: Ai MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa mukama wangye Abrahamu, ninkweshengyereza, mpa omugisha hati, ogirire mukama wangye Abrahamu embabazi." 
Genesis24:13 Reeba, nyemereire aha aha iziba; kandi abaishiki b'abanyarurembo nibaija kutaha amaizi."
