Genesis24:14 Mbwenu kibe kiti; omwishiki, ou ndaagire nti, Tuura orunywero rwawe, nnyweho, naakweshengyereza, nawe akagarukamu ati, Nywaho, kandi naaza kweshera n'engamira zaawe, abe ogwo ou waatooraniire omwiru waawe Isaaka; kandi aho niho ndaamanyire ku waagirira mukama wangye embabazi." 
Genesis24:15 Ku yaabaire atakaherize kushaba, reeba, haashohora Rebeka, muhara wa Besueli, mutabani wa Milika, muka Nahori murumuna wa Abrahamu, aine orunywero rwe aha ibega." 
Genesis24:16 Kandi omwishiki ogwo akaba ari murungi munonga orikureebwa, omwishiki otakamanyaga mushaija; yaashuuma aha iziba, yaijuza orunywero rwe amaizi, yainamuka." 
Genesis24:17 Omugaragwa yairuka kumubugana, yaagira ati: Naakweshengyereza, mpa otwizi, nnywere aha runywero rwawe." 
Genesis24:18 Yaamugira ati: Nywaho, Mukama wangye. Yaarahuka, yaata orunywero rwe aha kiganja, yaamunywaisa." 
Genesis24:19 Ku yaaherize kumunywaisa, yaagira ati: Naaza kweshera n'engamira zaawe, nazo zinywe okuhitsya obu ziraakuukye." 
Genesis24:20 Yaarahuka yaashuka amaizi omu bwato, yaagaruka omu iziba kutaha, yaayeshera engamira ze zoona." 
Genesis24:21 Omushaija yaamugumyaho amaisho ahunami, kumanya ku MUKAMA araabe ahaire orugyendo rwe omugisha, nari shi ataruguhaire." 
Genesis24:22 Engamira ku zaakuukire, omushaija yaihayo empeta y'ezaabu ey'oburemeezi bw'ekicweka kya shekeli, n'engoro ibiri ez'okumujweka aha mikono, ziine oburemeezi bwa shekeli ikumi z'ezaabu," 
Genesis24:23 yaamugira ati: Ori muhara w'oha? Ngambira, naakweshengyereza. Kandi tukaabona oburaaro omu ka ya sho?" 
Genesis24:24 Yaamugarukamu ati: Ndi muhara wa Besueli, mutabani wa Milika, ou yaazairweho Nahori." 
Genesis24:25 Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Twine obunyaatsi n'eby'okurya byazo ebirikumara; kandi n'oburaaro buriyo. 
Genesis24:26 Omushaija yainama, yaaramya MUKAMA," 
Genesis24:27 yaagira ati: MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa mukama wangye Abrahamu, ahimbisibwe, ahakuba tarekire kugirira mukama wangye embabazi n'obwesigwa; kandi naanye MUKAMA anyebembeire, yampitsya ahari beene ishe ba mukama wangye." 
Genesis24:28 Omwishiki yairuka, yaagambira ab'omwa nyina ebigambo ebyo byona." 
Genesis24:29 Kandi Rebeka akaba aine munyaanya orikwetwa Labaani; Labaani ogwo yaashohora, yairuka kubugana ogwo mushaija aha iziba." 
Genesis24:30 Ku yaareebire empeta y'ezaabu n'engoro aha mikono ya munyaanya, kandi yaahurira Rebeka munyaanya naagamba ebi yaagambirwa ogwo mushaija, yaija ah' ari, yaashanga ayemereire aha rubaju rw'engamira aha iziba." 
Genesis24:31 Yaamugira ati: Ija otaahe, iwe ou MUKAMA ahaire omugisha. N'enki ekikwemereize aheeru? Ahakuba naakuteekateekyera enju, n'ahu engamira ziraaraare." 
Genesis24:32 Atyo omushaija yaataaha omu nju, Labaani yaatandiikurura engamira, yaareeta obunyaatsi n'eby'okurya by'engamira, n'amaizi g'okunaabisa ebigyere bye n'eby'abashaija abu yaabaire aine." 
Genesis24:33 Bwanyima baamureetera eby'okurya; kwonka we yaagira ati: Tindikwija kurya, ntakagambire bi ntumirwe. Ndi Labaani ati: Bigambe." 
Genesis24:34 Yaagira ati: Ndi omugaragwa wa Abrahamu. 
Genesis24:35 Kandi MUKAMA akaha mukama wangye omugisha mwingi munonga, yaahinduka omuntu rugambwa. Yaamuha amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente, efeeza n'ezaabu, abahuuku n'abazaana, engamira n'endogoya." 
Genesis24:36 Na Saara muka mukama wangye yaamuzaarira omwana w'omwojo yaakuzire; n'omwana ogwo ishe amuhaire ebi aine byona. 
Genesis24:37 Mbwenu mukama wangye akndahiza, naagira ati: Otarishwererera omwana wangye omukazi omu baishiki b'Abanyakanaani, abu ntwire omu nsi yaabo;" 
Genesis24:38 kureka oryagaruka omu muryango gwa taata n'omuri beene waitu, obe niyo waashwererera omwana wangye omukazi." 
Genesis24:39 Naagambira mukama wangye nti: Shana omukazi tariikiriza kwija naanye. 
Genesis24:40 Yangarukamu ati: MUKAMA ou ngyenda nandeeba, aryatuma maraika we, ahe orugyendo rwawe omugisha, obone kushwererera omwana wangye omukazi omuri beene waitu n'omu muryango gwa taata." 
Genesis24:41 Ku orihika omuri beene waitu, oryaba otakiine rubanja ahabwendahiro ei naakurahiza; kandi n'obu bariba batamukuhaire, nabwo torigira rubanja ahabw'endahiro egyo." 
Genesis24:42 Mbwenu eri izooba ku naahika aha iziba, naashaba nti: Ai MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa mukama wangye Abrahamu, ku oraabe ohaire omugisha orugyendo rwangye oru ndimu," 
Genesis24:43 reeba, naayemerera aha iziba; mbwenu kibe kiti; omwishiki oraije kutaha amaizi, ou ndaashabe nti, Mpa aha maizi g'omu runywero rwawe, nnyweho," 
Genesis24:44 nawe akangira ati: Nywaho, kandi naaza kweshera n'engamira zaawe, abe niwe yaaba omukazi, ou MUKAMA yaateekateekyeire omwana wa mukama wangye." 
Genesis24:45 Ku naaba ntakaherize bi naaba ninshaba omu mutima gwangye, naayecura Rebeka naashohora omu rurembo, aine orunywero rwe aha ibega; yaashuuma aha iziba, yaataha amaizi, naamugira nti: Mpa nnyweho, naakweshengyereza." 
Genesis24:46 Ahonaaho yaiha orunywero rwe aha ibega, yaagira ati: Nywaho; kandi ka nyeshere n'engamira zaawe. Ntyo naanywaho, kandi yaayeshera n'engamira." 
Genesis24:47 Naamubuuza nti: Ori muhara w'oha? Yaagarukamu ati: Ndi muhara wa Besueli, mutabani wa Nahori, ou yaazaire ahari Milika; naanye nikwo kumujweka empeta aha nyindo, n'engoro aha mikono ye." 
Genesis24:48 Bwanyima nainama, naaramya MUKAMA, kandi naasiima MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa mukama wangye Abrahamu, onyebembeire omu muhanda oguhikire kushwererera omwana wa mukama wangye omukazi omuri beene waabo." 
Genesis24:49 Mbwenu ku muraabe nimwikiriza kukorera mukama wangye eby'embabazi n'eby'amazima, mungambire; nari shi, ku muraabe mutarikwikiriza, nabwo mungambire, mbone kugira orubaju oru naatoora, yaaba rwa buryo yaaba rwa bumosho." 
Genesis24:50 Labaani na Besueli baagarukamu nibagira bati: Enaama egi n'eya MUKAMA; titwine ki turikubaasa kukugambira, yaaba kukwikiriza, nari kukwangira." 
Genesis24:51 Reeba, Rebeka akuri omu maisho, mutware, mugyende, abe muka omwana wa mukama waawe, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambire." 
Genesis24:52 Omugaragwa wa Abrahamu ku yaahuriire okugarukamu kwabo, yainama, yaaramya MUKAMA." 
Genesis24:53 Ogwo mugaragwa yaihayo ebintu birungi by'efeeza n'ezaabu n'ebijwaro, yaabiha Rebeka; kandi yaaha munyaanya na nyina ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi." 
Genesis24:54 Bwanyima baarya, baanywa, we n'abashaija abu yaabaire aine, baaraarayo; ku baimukire omu kasheeshe, yaagira ati; Mundagye, ngarukye owa mukama wangye." 
Genesis24:55 Munyaanya na nyina baamugarukamu bati: Reka omwishiki agume naitwe okumara ebiro nka ikumi nari okukiraho, bwanyima abone kugyenda." 
Genesis24:56 Yaabagira ati: Nk'oku MUKAMA ahaire orugyendo rwangye omugisha, mutantuuza aha; kureka mundagye, ngarukye owa mukama wangye." 
Genesis24:57 Baagira bati: Ka twete omwishiki, tumubuuze, ayegambire." 
Genesis24:58 Baayeta Rebeka, baamubuuza bati: Noikiriza kugyenda n'ogu mushaija? Yaagira ati: Niinyikiriza." 
Genesis24:59 Batyo baaraga Rebeka munyaanyabo n'omurezi we n'omugaragwa wa Abrahamu n'abashaija be. 
Genesis24:60 Baashabira Rebeka omugisha, nibagira bati: Munyaanyiitwe, obe nyina w'abantu enkumi n'obukumi; kandi oruzaaro rwawe rukubuure amarembo g'abarikurwanga." 
Genesis24:61 Rebeka yaimuka n'abazaana be, baatemba engamira, baagyenda n'ogwo mushaija. Okwo nikwo omugaragwa yaatwaire Rebeka, akeegyendera." 
Genesis24:62 Obwo Isaaka akaba yaarugire Beeri-lahairoi, atwire omu nsi ya Negebu." 
Genesis24:63 Omu mwabazyo Isaaka yaashohora, yaaza omu ishwa kutunga omwanya gw'okuteekateeka; ku yaanagire amaisho, yaareeba engamira niziija." 
Genesis24:64 Kandi Rebeka yaimutsya amaisho ge; ku yaareebire Isaaka, yaaruga aha ngamira." 
Genesis24:65 Yaabuuza omugaragwa ati: Omushaija oriya orikwija kutubugana n'oha? Omugaragwa yaagira ati: Niwe mukama wangye. Rebeka yaakwata omwenda gwe, yaagwetwekyerera." 
Genesis24:66 Omugaragwa yaateekyerereza Isaaka ebi yaakozire byona. 
Genesis24:67 Bwanyima Isaaka yaatwara Rebeka omu ihema rya Saara nyina yaaba omukazi we, yaamukunda, yaayebwa enaku z'okufa kwa nyina." 
Genesis25:1 Bwanyima Abrahamu yaashwera ondiijo mukazi orikwetwa Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Yaazaara nawe Zimuraani, Yokishaani, Medani, Midiani, Ishibaaki na Shua." 
Genesis25:3 Yokishaani yaazaara Sheeba na Dedani. Kandi beene Dedani n'aba Ashuri n'aba Letushi n'aba Leumi. 
Genesis25:4 Kandi abaana ba Midiani ni Efa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida na Elidaa. Abo boona n'oruzaaro rwa Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahamu yaaha Isaaka ebye byona. 
Genesis25:6 Kwonka abaana b'ebinyanshunju bye ebi yaabaire aine, yaabaha ebiconco. Bwanyima yaaboohereza akiriho, ngu bataane n'omwana we Isaaka; baatoora oburugwa-izooba, baahika omu nsi y'obwo bukiizi." 
Genesis25:7 Emyaka ei Abrahamu yaahikize ekaba eri igana na makumi mushanju n'etaano. 
Genesis25:8 Abrahamu ku yaahikire omu ngingo zaabukuru, omwitsyo gwamuhwamu, yaafa gye ari omugurusi w'emyaka mingi, yaakurata baishenkuru." 
Genesis25:9 Isaaka na Ishimaeli abatabani baamuziika omu nyanga ya Makipeela omu kibanja kya Efurooni mwene Zohari Omuhiiti, aharikureeba Mamure," 
Genesis25:10 ekibanja eki Abrahamu yaaguzire ahari beene Heesi. Aho niho Abrahamu yaaziikirwe hamwe na Saara omukazi we. 
Genesis25:11 Bwanyima y'okufa kwa Abrahamu Ruhanga yaaha Isaaka omwana we omugisha. Isaaka yaatuura Beeri-lahairoi. 
Genesis25:12 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Ishimaeli mwene Abrahamu, ou yaazaire ahari Hagari Omunyamisrikazi, omuzaana wa Saara." 
Genesis25:13 Kandi aga nigo maziina ga beene Ishimaeli, nk'oku baakurataine. Omujigaijo gwa Ishimaeli ni Nebayoosi; haataho Kedari, Adubeeli, Mibusamu," 
Genesis25:14 Mishuma, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadadi, Teema, Yetura, Nafishi na Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Abo nibo batabani ba Ishimaeli, kandi ago nigo maziina gaabo, omu birorero byabo n'omu maka gaabo abategyeki ikumi na babiri nk'amahanga gaabo oku gaabaire gari." 
Genesis25:17 Emyaka ei Ishimaeli yaahikize ekaba igana na makumi ashatu na mushanju; yaahwamu omwitsyo, yaafa, yaakurata baishenkuru." 
Genesis25:18 Baatura okuruga Havila okuhika Shuuri eri omu maisho ga Misri, nootoora Asiria. Kandi Ishimaeli yaatuura beene ishe boona hangahari." 
Genesis25:19 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Isaaka mwene Abrahamu. Abrahamu akazaara Isaaka; 
Genesis25:20 Isaaka ku yaahikize emyaka makumi ana, yaashwera Rebeka muhara wa Besueli Omusiria wa Padanaramu, munyaanya wa Labaani Omusiria." 
Genesis25:21 Isaaka yaayeshengyereza MUKAMA ahabw'omukazi we, ahakuba akaba ari engumba; MUKAMA yaahurira okweshengyereza kwe, Rebeka omukazi we yaagira enda." 
Genesis25:22 Abaana baamurwanira omunda; yaagira ati: Ku kiraabe kiri kiti, ngumiireho ki? Yaayehanuuza ahari MUKAMA." 
Genesis25:23 MUKAMA yaamugarukamu ati: Enda yaawe erimu amahanga abiri, Enganda ibiri ezi orizaara ziryataanamu habiri; Oruganda rumwe ruryakiza orundi amaani, Kakuru aryaheereza Kato." 
Genesis25:24 Ebiro bye eby'okuzaara ku byahikire, yaashangwa aine enda y'empasha." 
Genesis25:25 Kakuru yaazaarwa naatukura, aine obwoya aha mubiri gwe gwona nk'omwenda gw'ebyoya; baamweta Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Haakurataho Kato, omukono gwe gukwaitse ekitsintsiino kya Esau; baamweta Yakobo. Obwo Isaaka akaba ahikize emyaka makumi mukaaga, obu omukazi we yaabazaara." 
Genesis25:27 Abo boojo baakura; Esau yaaba omuhiigi w'obwengye ruraaramahamba; Yakobo yaaba omucureezi, yaaguma omuka." 
Genesis25:28 Kandi Isaaka akaba naakunda Esau, ahabw'okuba akaba arya aha nyama z'enyamaishwa ezi yaabaire ahiiga; kwonka Rebeka akaba akunda Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Eizooba rimwe Yakobo akaba ateekire ekicumbe; Esau yaija naaruga kuhiiga, naakooza aine enjara." 
Genesis25:30 Esau yaagira Yakobo ati: Mpa ekyo kicumbe ekirikutukura, ndyeho; ahakuba naaza kugwa enshazi. (Eiziina rye nikyo ryayeteirwe Edomu.)" 
Genesis25:31 Yakobo yaamugira ati: Kureka obanze onguze obukuru bwawe. 
Genesis25:32 Esau yaagira ati: Ndi haihi kwefeera. Eby'obukuru shi biryangasiraki? 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo yaagira ati: Banza ondahire, Esau yaamurahira, yaamuguza obukuru bwe." 
Genesis25:34 Bwanyima Yakobo yaaha Esau omugaati n'ekicumbe ky'ebihimba; yaarya, yaanywa, yaimuka, yaayegyendera. Okwo nikwo Esau yaagayire obukuru bwe." 
Genesis26:1 Omu biro ebyo hakateera endiijo njara, etari eyaateire omu biro bya Abrahamu. Isaaka yaaza Gerari owa Abimeleki omugabe w'Abafilistia." 
Genesis26:2 MUKAMA yaayeyoreka Isaaka, yaamugira ati: Otashuuma Misri; ogume omu nsi, ei naaza kukugambira," 
Genesis26:3 obe niyo waashuhuukiramu; naanye ndyaguma naiwe, nkuhe omugisha; ahabw'okuba iwe n'oruzaaro rwawe ndyabaha ensi ezi zoona, mpamye endahiro, ei naarahiire sho Abrahamu." 
Genesis26:4 Kandi ndyakanyisa oruzaaro rwawe, rube nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, nduhe ezi nsi zoona; kandi omurirwo amahanga goona ag'omu nsi nimwo gariheerwa omugisha;" 
Genesis26:5 ahabw'okuba Abrahamu akanyorobera, yaahurira ebi naamwehanangiriize, n'ebi naamuragiire, n'ebi naataireho, n'ebiragiro byangye." 
Genesis26:6 Isaaka yaatuura Gerari; 
Genesis26:7 abantu baayo baamubuuza eby'omukazi we, yaabagarukamu ati: Ni munyaanyazi; ahakuba akatiina kugira ati, N'omukazi wangye, yaateekateeka ngu abashaija b'omuri ogwo mwanya nibaija kumwita azire Rebeka, ahakuba akaba ari murungi munonga orikureebwa." 
Genesis26:8 Bwanyima ku yaamazireyo ebiro bingi, Abimeleki omugabe w'Abafilistia yaayozya amaisho omu dirisa, yaareeba Isaaka naazaana n'omukazi we Rebeka." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleki yaayeta Isaaka, yaamugira ati: Buzimazima, n'omukazi waawe. Ahanki ogizire oti, Ni munyaanyazi? Isaaka yaamugarukamu ati: Ahakuba nteekateekire ngu niinyija kwitwa ahabwe." 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki yaagira ati: Mbwenu shi ekyo, otukozire ki? Obundi kikaarahukire omwe aha bashaija bangye kubyama n'omukazi waawe atakimanyire, haza obwo niiwe waakubaire otureeteire orubanja." 
Genesis26:11 N'ahabw'ekyo Abimeleki yaayehanangiriza abantu be boona, naagira ati: Orikora aha mushaija ogu nari aha mukazi we, buzimazima aryaitwa." 
Genesis26:12 Isaaka yaahinga omu nsi egyo; omu mwaka ogwo yaashaaruura ebirikukira ebi yaabibire emirundi igana; MUKAMA yaamuha omugisha. 
Genesis26:13 Yaaba omushaija omutungi, yaaguma naayeyongyera kutunga, okuhitsya obu yaabaire omutungi rugambwa;" 
Genesis26:14 yaagira eitungo ringi ry'amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente, n'eby'omuka bingi; Abafilistia baamugirira eihari (" 
Genesis26:15 Amaziba goona agaafukwirwe abairu ba ishe Abrahamu akiriho, Abafilistia bakaba baagatabire n'eitaka.)" 
Genesis26:16 Abimeleki yaagira Isaaka ati: Turugyemu, ogyende, ahabw'okuba nootukiza munonga amaani." 
Genesis26:17 Isaaka yaarugayo, yaagomberera omu ruhita rwa Gerari, yaatuurayo." 
Genesis26:18 Isaaka yaagaruka, yaigura amaziba agaafukwirwe omu biro bya Abrahamu ishe; ahakuba Abafilistia bakaba baagatabire bwanyima y'okufa kwa Abrahamu; yaageeta amaziina agu ishe yaabaire ageetsire." 
Genesis26:19 Bwanyima abairu ba Isaaka baafukura omu ruhita, baagwa aha iziba ry'enshuro y'amaizi." 
Genesis26:20 Abariisa ba Gerari baarwanisa aba Isaaka, nibagira bati: Amaizi aga n'agaitu. Yaayeta eryo iziba Eseki, ahakuba bakatongana nawe." 
Genesis26:21 Baagaruka, baafukura erindi iziba, naryo baaritonganira; yaaryeta Sitina." 
Genesis26:22 Okwo yaarugayo, yaafukura erindi iziba; eryo tibaaritonganira; yaaryeta Rehoboosi; yaagira ati: Ahakuba hati MUKAMA atuhaire ah'okweshanzira, nitwija kukanyira omuri egi nsi." 
Genesis26:23 Yaarugayo, yainamuka Beerisheba." 
Genesis26:24 Aha kiro ekyo MUKAMA yaamweyoreka, yaagira ati: Ndi Ruhanga wa sho Abrahamu; otatiina, ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe; ndyakuha omugisha, nkanyise oruzaaro rwawe ahabw'omwiru wangye Abrahamu." 
Genesis26:25 Okwo yaayombekayo eitambiro, yaatakirirayo eiziina rya MUKAMA, yaateerayo eihema rye; okwo nayo abairu be baafukurayo eiziba." 
Genesis26:26 Bwanyima Abimeleki yaaruga Gerari, hamwe na Ahuzaasi munywani we, na Fikooli omukuru w'engabo ze, baamushangayo." 
Genesis26:27 Isaaka yaababuuza ati: Mureetsirwe ki owangye, haza mwanyangire, kandi mukambinga owaanyu?" 
Genesis26:28 Baamugarukamu bati: Tukareeba ku MUKAMA ari naiwe buzima; nikwo kugira tuti: Ka tugire endahiro ahagati yaitu naiwe, kandi turagaane n'endagaano," 
Genesis26:29 ku otaritukora kubi, nkaitwe oku tutarakukozireho, kandi nk'oku tutaine kintu kyona eki twakwitsize, kureka okukukorera ebirungi n'okukuraga n'obusingye. Mbwenu ori omuntu ou MUKAMA ahaire omugisha." 
Genesis26:30 Bwanyima Isaaka yaabateekyera obugyenyi, baarya, baanywa." 
Genesis26:31 Baimuka nibutaagurukana, baarahirana na Isaaka, yaabaraga, baamurugaho n'obusingye." 
Genesis26:32 Aha izooba eryo abairu ba Isaaka baija, baamugambira eby'eiziba eri bafukwire, nibagira bati: Tufumukire aha maizi." 
Genesis26:33 Yaaryeta Shiiba; nikyo orwo rurembo rwayeteirwe Beerisheba, n'okuhitsya hati." 
Genesis26:34 Esau ku yaahikize emyaka makumi ana, yaashwera Yudeesi muhara wa Beeri Omuhiiti, na Basemaasi muhara wa Eloni Omuhiiti;" 
Genesis26:35 abo bakazi baagwisa kubi Isaaka na Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Bwanyima Isaaka ku yaakuzire, n'amaisho ge gaagiirweho oruho, atakibaasa kureeba gye, yaayeta omutabani Kakuru, Esau, yaamugira ati: Mwana wangye! Onu ati: Ndi aha, Taata." 
Genesis27:2 Yaamugira ati: reeba, nkuzire, tindikumanya izooba ri ndifeeraho." 
Genesis27:3 N'ahabw'ekyo ninkweshengyereza, ihayo ebi ohiigisa, omutana gwawe n'obuta bwawe, oze omu ihamba, onyitireyo enyamaishwa," 
Genesis27:4 onteekyere enyama, ozirungye nk'oku nkunda, ozindeetere, ndye, nkushabire omugisha ntakafiire." 
Genesis27:5 Isaaka ku yaabaire naagambira omutabani Esau, Rebeka yaashangwa amuhuriire. Atyo Esau yaaza omu ihamba kuhiiga enyamaishwa n'okugireeta." 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka yaagambira omutabani Yakobo ati: Naahurira sho naagambira mukuru waawe Esau ati: 
Genesis27:7 Gyenda onyitire enyamaishwa, onteekyere enyama, ozirungye, ndye, nkushabire omugisha omu maisho ga MUKAMA natakafiire." 
Genesis27:8 Mbwenu nu, mwana wangye, nyorobera okore eki ndikukuragiira." 
Genesis27:9 Irooko oze omu busyo bw'embuzi, onyihireyo ebyagazi bibiri bito birungi, naanye nteekyere sho enyama, ngirungye nk'oku akunda;" 
Genesis27:10 haza ogimutwarire, arye, akushabire omugisha atakafiire." 
Genesis27:11 Yakobo yaagambira Rebeka nyina ati: Noomanya Esau mukuru wangye ku ari omushaija w'ebyoya, haza nyowe omubiri gwangye ku gurikuterera." 
Genesis27:12 Obundi taata akaankoraho, anteekateekaho ku ndi engobya, nyihayo omukyeeno omu mwanya gw'omugisha." 
Genesis27:13 Nyina yaamugira ati: Omukyeeno gwawe gube niinye gwazaho, mwana wangye; iwe fa okunyorobera, obindeetere." 
Genesis27:14 Yakobo yaagyenda, yaabireetera nyina; nawe yaateeka enyama, yaagirunga, nk'oku ishe yaabaire naakunda." 
Genesis27:15 Kandi Rebeka yaihayo ebijwaro birungi by'omutabani Esau kakuru; ebi Rebeka yaabaire aine omu nju, yaabijweka omutabani Yakobo kato;" 
Genesis27:16 kandi yaata empu z'ebyo byana by'embuzi aha mikono ye, n'aha bitsya bye aharikuterera;" 
Genesis27:17 bwanyima yaamuha enyama zirungire n'omugaati ogu yaateekateeka. 
Genesis27:18 Yakobo yaija ahari ishe, yaagira ati: Taata! Onu ati: Ndi aha; ori oha, mwana wangye?" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo yaagarukamu ishe ati: Niinye Esau kakuru omwana waawe; naakora nk'oku wandagiira; mbwenu imuka oshutame, orye aha nyama ei naakureetera, obone kunshabira omugisha." 
Genesis27:20 Isaaka yaabuuza omwana we ati: Beitu shi, waagirahutsya ota, mwana wangye? Onu ati: Ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yampiira." 
Genesis27:21 Isaaka yaagira Yakobo ati: Irira aha, mwana wangye, nkukoreho, ndeebe ku oraabe ori omwana wangye Esau buzimazima, nari shi otari we." 
Genesis27:22 Yakobo yairira haihi Isaaka ishe; Isaaka yaamukoraho, yaagira ati: Eiraka n'erya Yakobo, kwonka emikono n'eya Esau." 
Genesis27:23 Tiyaamumanya, ahabw'okuba engaro ze zikaba ziine ebyoya, nk'eza mukuru we Esau; yaiha aho, yaamushabira omugisha." 
Genesis27:24 Yaagaruka yaamubuuza ati: Beitu kwo buzima, ori omwana wangye Esau? Yaamugarukamu ati: Ndi we." 
Genesis27:25 Isaaka yaagira ati: Ginyirize haihi, ndyeho, mwana wangye, nkushabire omugisha. Yaagimwiriza haihi, yaarya, yaamureetera na viinyo, yaanywa." 
Genesis27:26 Isaaka ishe yaamugira ati: Irira haihi, onnywegyere, mwana wangye." 
Genesis27:27 Yaamwirira haihi, yaamunywegyera. Isaaka yaahurira omugaju gw'ebijwaro bye, yaamushabira omugisha, naagira ati: Reeba, okutaamirana kw'omugaju gw'omwana wangye Nikushusha nk'okw'eishwa, eri MUKAMA ahaire omugisha." 
Genesis27:28 Kandi Ruhanga akuhe aha rume orurikuruga omu iguru, N'aha mweru gw'ensi, n'engano nyingi na viinyo nyingi." 
Genesis27:29 Enganda z'abantu zikuheereze, n'amahanga gakwinamire; Otegyekye beene sho, n'abaana ba nyoko bakwinamire. Weena orikukyeena, akyeenwe; Kandi weena orikushabira omugisha, nawe aheebwe omugisha." 
Genesis27:30 Bwanyima Isaaka ku yaabaire yaaheza kushabira Yakobo omugisha, Yakobo yaiha ati ebigyere omu maisho ga Isaaka ishe, Esau mukuru we yaija naaruga kuhiiga." 
Genesis27:31 Nawe yaateeka enyama, yaagirunga, yaagitwarira ishe; yaagira ishe ati: Taata, imuka orye aha nyama ei omwana waawe yaakureetera, obone kunshabira omugisha." 
Genesis27:32 Isaaka ishe yaamubuuza ati: Kandi shi, iwe ori oha? Onu ati: Ndi omwana waawe w'omujigaijo Esau." 
Genesis27:33 Isaaka yaatetema munonga, yaagira ati: Owaaruga aha, andeeteire enyama, nkarya ahari byona, nkamushabira omugisha otakaizire, n'oha? Kandi n'omugisha ogwo aryaguheebwa." 
Genesis27:34 Esau ku yaahuriire ebigambo bya ishe, yaarira, yaaborooga munonga n'obusaasi bwingi, yaagira ishe ati: Ai bambe, Taata, naanye nshabira omugisha." 
Genesis27:35 Yaagira ati: Murumuna waawe yaija aha n'obugobya, yaatwara omugisha gwawe." 
Genesis27:36 Esau yaagira ati: Yakobo ni Yakobo kwo; eiziina niwe muntu. Eki n'ekya kabiri nangobeza; akanyihaho obukuru bwangye; mbwenu reeba kandi yaanyihaho n'omugisha gwangye. Yaagaruka yaamubuuza ati: Toine kagisha naanye aku wantsigiraho? 
Genesis27:37 Isaaka yaamugarukamu ati: Reeba, naamuhindura mukama waawe, na beene ishe boona naabamuha kuba abairu be; naamujarika, naamuha engano na viinyo eby'okumutunga; mbwenu shi, ninkikukorera ki, mwana wangye?" 
Genesis27:38 Esau yaabuuza ishe ati: Oine omugisha gumwe gwonka, Taata? Ai bambe Taata, naanye nshabira omugisha. Esau yaaborooga, yaarira." 
Genesis27:39 Isaaka nikwo kumugira ati: Oryatuura hare n'omweru gw'ensi, N'orume orurikuruga omu iguru ahaiguru." 
Genesis27:40 Rurara yaawe niyo erikubaisaho. Oryaheereza murumuna waawe; Kwonka ku orimwehindurira, Oryaruga omu butegyeki bwe." 
Genesis27:41 Okuruga aho Esau yaayanga Yakobo ahabw'omugisha ogu ishe yaamushabiire; Esau yaagira omu mutima gwe ati: Ebiro by'okucurira taata biri haihi; bwanyima yaabyo ndyaita murumuna wangye Yakobo. 
Genesis27:42 Baagambira Rebeka ebi Esau omwana we mukuru agambire; yaatuma ow'okweta Yakobo omwana we omuto, yaamugira ati: Omanye mukuru waawe Esau ku amaririire kukwita, kwemara ekiniga." 
Genesis27:43 Mbwenu nu, mwana wangye, hurira eki ndikukugambira; imuka ohungire Harani owa Labaani munyaanyazi," 
Genesis27:44 obe oriyo omuri ebi biro, okuhitsya obu ekiniga kya mukuru waawe kiraahwe," 
Genesis27:45 n'enziika ye ekakurugaho, akeebwa eki omukozire; obwo ndyakutumaho, ogarukye. Ningasirwa ki, ku ndaabafiise mwembi eizooba rimwe?" 
Genesis27:46 Rebeka yaagira Isaaka ati: Amagara gangye garuhire na bahara ba Heesi; Yakobo ku arishwera omwishiki omuri bahara ba Heesi, ori nk'aba ab'omu nsi egi, kiryagasira ki amagara gangye?" 
Genesis28:1 Isaaka yaayeta Yakobo, yaamushabira omugisha, yaamwehanangiriza ati: Otarishwera omu Bakanaanikazi." 
Genesis28:2 Imuka oze Padanaramu owa Besueli shwenkuru, oshwereyo omukazi omuri bahara ba Labaani nyokoromi." 
Genesis28:3 Kandi Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona akuhe omugisha, akuhe okuzaara munonga, akukanyise, obe omutwe muhango gw'amahanga;" 
Genesis28:4 kandi akuhe omugisha gwa Abrahamu, iwe n'oruzaaro rwawe, obone kuhungura ensi ei waashuhuukiiremu, ei Ruhanga yaahaire Abrahamu." 
Genesis28:5 Atyo Isaaka yaayohereza Yakobo, yaaza Padanaramu owa Labaani mwene Besueli Omusiria, munyaanya wa Rebeka, nyina wa Yakobo na Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Esau ku yaareebire Isaaka yaashabira Yakobo omugisha, kandi yaamwohereza Padanaramu kushwerayo omukazi; n'omu kumushabira omugisha yaamwehanangiriza ngu atarishwera omukazi omu baishiki ba Kanaani;" 
Genesis28:7 na Yakobo yaayorobera ishe na nyina, yaaza Padanaramu," 
Genesis28:8 Esau yaamanyira aho ku abaishiki ba Kanaani batarikugwisa gye Isaaka ishe; 
Genesis28:9 Esau nikwo kuza owa Ishimaeli, akashwera Mahalaasi muhara wa Ishimaeli mwene Abrahamu, kandi munyaanya Nebayoosi, akamwongyera aha bakazi abu yaabaire aine." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo yaaruga Beeri-sheba, naatoora Harani;" 
Genesis28:11 yaahika omu mwanya, yaaguraaramu, ahakuba eizooba rikaba ryarengire; yaatwara eibaare rimwe aha mabaare agaabaire gari omu mwanya ogwo, yaaryeshegura, yaabyama, yaagwejegyera." 
Genesis28:12 Yaaroota, naareeba amatembero gatsimbire ahansi, omutwe gwago guhikire omu iguru, baamaraika ba Ruhanga nibagatemberaho, kandi nibagatemburukiraho." 
Genesis28:13 Kandi reeba, MUKAMA akaba ayemereire ahaiguru yaago, naagira ati: Ndi MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Abrahamu shwenkuru, kandi Ruhanga wa Isaaka; ensi egi ei obyamiho ndyagikuha n'oruzaaro rwawe;" 
Genesis28:14 n'oruzaaro rwawe ruryaba nk'omucuucu gw'ahansi, rubugye oburengyerwa-izooba, n'oburugwa-izooba, obukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'obwa-buryo; kandi omuriiwe n'omu ruzaaro rwawe enganda zoona ez'omu nsi nimwo ziriheerwa omugisha." 
Genesis28:15 Reeba ndi hamwe naiwe, ndyaguma ninkurinda ahu oriza hoona, kandi nkugarure omu nsi egi; ahakuba tindikutsigaho, okuhitsya obu ndiheza kukora ebi naakugambira." 
Genesis28:16 Yakobo yaasisiimuka omu turo, yaagira ati: Buzimazima MUKAMA ari omu mwanya ogu, nyowe naaba ntakimanyire." 
Genesis28:17 Yaatiina, yaagira ati: Omwanya ogu ka nigutiinisa! Omwanya ogu ti kindi, n'enju ya Ruhanga, kandi n'eirembo ry'eiguru." 
Genesis28:18 Yakobo yaimuka nibutaagurukana, yaihaho eibaare, eri yaabaire ayeshegwire, yaaribyara kuba enyomyo, yaashuka amajuta aha mutwe gwaryo." 
Genesis28:19 Omwanya ogwo yaagweta Beseeli; kwonka eiziina ry'orurembo rwaho rikaba riri Luuzi obunyakare. 
Genesis28:20 Yakobo yaahiga naagira ati: Ruhanga ku ariguma naanye, yandinda omuri oru rugyendo oru ndimu, yaaguma nampa eby'okurya n'eby'okujwara," 
Genesis28:21 bwanyima naagaruka owa taata n'obusingye, obwo MUKAMA aryaba Ruhanga wangye;" 
Genesis28:22 n'eri ibaare eri naabyara nk'enyomyo, eryaba enju ya Ruhanga; kandi ahari byona ebi origuma nompa, tindibura kukuha ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi." 
Genesis29:1 Yakobo yaagumizamu orugyendo rwe, yaahika omu nsi y'abantu b'oburugwa-izooba." 
Genesis29:2 Yaimutsya amaisho, yaareeba eiziba omu ishwa, n'amasyo ashatu g'entaama gabyami haihi naryo; ahabw'okuba aha iziba eryo niho baabaire bageeshera; eibaare eryabaire riri aha munwa gw'eiziba rikaba riri rihango munonga." 
Genesis29:3 Amasyo goona ku gaabaire gateeranira aho, abariisa baiha eibaare aha munwa gw'eiziba, beeshera, bwanyima barigaruraho." 
Genesis29:4 Yakobo yaabuuza abariisa ati: Beene waitu, nimuruga hi? Baamugarukamu bati: Nituruga Harani." 
Genesis29:5 Yaababuuza ati: Nimumanya Labaani mwene Nahori? Banu bati: Nitumumanya. 
Genesis29:6 Yaababuuza ati: Ariyo agumire? Banu bati: Agumire. Nangwa reeba, na Rakeeli muhara we, nguriya naija n'entaama." 
Genesis29:7 Yakobo yaagira ati: Reeba, bukiri omu ihangwe, n'obunaku bw'okuzaagiza amasyo tibukahikire; mweshere entaama, mugyende muziriise." 
Genesis29:8 Baamugira bati: Titurikubaasa, amasyo goona gatakateeraine, bakaiha eibaare aha munwa gw'eiziba, tukabona kweshera entaama." 
Genesis29:9 Ku yaabaire naakigamba nabo, Rakeeli yaija n'entaama za ishe; ahakuba niwe yaabaire aziriisa." 
Genesis29:10 Yakobo ku yaareebire Rakeeli muhara wa Labaani nyinarumi n'entaama ze, yaahika aha iziba, yaiha eibaare aha munwa gwaryo, yaayeshera entaama za Labaani nyinarumi" 
Genesis29:11 Yakobo yaanywegyera Rakeeli, yaimutsya eiraka, yaarira naaborooga." 
Genesis29:12 Yaayetondera Rakeeli ku aine obuzaare na ishe, kandi ku ari mutabani wa Rebeka. Rakeeli yairuka, yaabigambira ishe." 
Genesis29:13 Labaani ku yaahuriire ebigambo bya Yakobo omwihwa, yairuka kumubugana, yaamubumbatira, yaamunywegyera, yaamutaasya omu ka ye. Yakobo yaagambira Labaani ebyabaireho byona." 
Genesis29:14 Labaani yaamugira ati: Buzimazima ori owangye ow'aha mara. Yaaguma nawe okumara okwezi kwona. 
Genesis29:15 Bwanyima Labaani yaamubuuza ati: Beitu shi, oshemereire kunkorerera busha, ngu ahakuba twine obuzaare? Okaayenzire ku nkuha bihembo ki?" 
Genesis29:16 Kandi Labaani akaba aine abaishiki babiri; eiziina ry'omukuru akaba ari Lea, kandi ery'omuto ari Rakeeli." 
Genesis29:17 Lea akaba ataine maisho garikwera; kwonka Rakeeli akaba ari murungi munonga w'okurigirwa. 
Genesis29:18 N'ahabw'ekyo Yakobo akakunda Rakeeli. Yakobo nikwo kugarukamu Labaani ati: Niinyija kukukorera emyaka mushanju, ompingire Rakeeli muhar waawe omuto." 
Genesis29:19 Labaani yaamugarukamu ati: Ni kirungi okumukuha okukira okumuha ondiijo muntu weena. Guma naanye. 
Genesis29:20 Atyo Yakobo yaakora emyaka mushanju ahabwa Rakeeli; kandi egyo myaka yaamubeera nk'ebiro bikye, ahabw'okukunda oku yaabaire naamukunda." 
Genesis29:21 Bwanyima Yakobo yaagira Labaani ati: Mpingira omukazi wangye, mmushwere, ahabw'okuba mpikize ebiro byangye." 
Genesis29:22 Labaani yaateeka obugyenyi, yaayeta abantu boona ab'omuri ogwo mwanya." 
Genesis29:23 Omu mwabazyo yaareeta muhara we Lea, yaamuhingira Yakobo, yaamushwera." 
Genesis29:24 Kandi Labaani yaaha muhara we Lea omuzaana we Zilupa kuba omuzaana we. 
Genesis29:25 Omu kasheeshe Yakobo yashanga ari Lea; yaayetomboitera Labaani, naagira ati: Beitu shi, ongizire ota? Tindakukoreire ahabwa Rakeeli? Mbwenu ongobereize ki?" 
Genesis29:26 Labaani yaagira ati: Owaitu tikwo tugira, okuhingira omuto omukuru atakashweirwe." 
Genesis29:27 Banza omare saabiti n'ogwo, haza tukuhingire n'ogu, ogarukye onkorere endiijo myaka mushanju." 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo yaakora atyo; yaamara saabiiti na Lea; bwanyima Labaani yaamuhingira Rakeeli muhara we. 
Genesis29:29 Kandi Labaani yaaha Rakeeli omuzaana we Biliha kuba omuzaana we. 
Genesis29:30 Atyo Yakobo yaashwera Rakeeli; kandi yaamukunda munonga okukira Lea; yaagaruka yaakorera Labaani endiijo myaka mushanju. 
Genesis29:31 MUKAMA ku yaareebire Lea yaaba enyangwakazi, yaigura enda ye; kwonka Rakeeli we yaaba engumba." 
Genesis29:32 Lea yaagira enda, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo; yaamweta Reubeeni; ahakuba akagira ati: MUKAMA areebire okwitwa kubi kwangye; mbwenu ibanye naija kunkunda." 
Genesis29:33 Yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaara ondiijo mwojo; yaagira ati: MUKAMA ahuriire ku ndikwangwa, nikyo yampeera n'ogu; yaamweta Simeoni." 
Genesis29:34 Yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaara omwojo; yaagira ati: Aha murundi ogu ibanye naija kukwatanisa naanye, ahakuba mmuzaariire aboojo bashatu; n'ahabw'ekyo yaamweta Leevi." 
Genesis29:35 Yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaara omwojo; yaagira ati: Omurundi ogu naaza kuhimbisa MUKAMA; nikyo yaamweteire Yuda; bwanyima oruzaaro rwayemerera." 
Genesis30:1 Rakeeli ku yaareebire atazaariire Yakobo baana yaagirira mukuru we eihari; yaagambira Yakobo ati: Mpa abaana; ku oraabe otabampaire, ninfa." 
Genesis30:2 Yakobo yaagirira Rakeeli ekiniga, yaagira ati: Niinye waata omu mwanya gwa Ruhanga owaakwimire oruzaaro?" 
Genesis30:3 Yaamugarukamu ati: Reeba omuzaana wangye Biliha, omushwere, abone kuzaarira aha maju gangye, naanye mmubonereho abaana." 
Genesis30:4 Yaamuha Biliha omuzaana we; Yakobo yaamushwera. 
Genesis30:5 Biliha yaagira enda, yaazaarira Yakobo omwana w'omwojo." 
Genesis30:6 Rakeeli yaagira ati: Ruhanga ancwereire orubanja, kandi yaahurira okushaba kwangye, yampa omwana w'omwojo. Nikyo yaamweteire Daani." 
Genesis30:7 Biliha omuzaana wa Rakeeli yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaarira Yakobo omwojo wa kabiri." 
Genesis30:8 Rakeeli yaagira ati: Nfukaine munonga na mukuru wangye, naamwikarira. Nikyo yaamweteire Nafutaali." 
Genesis30:9 Lea ku yaareebire atagaruka kuzaara, yaatwara Zilupa omuzaana we, yaamuha Yakobo kuba omukazi we." 
Genesis30:10 Zilupa omuzaana wa Lea yaazaarira Yakobo omwana w'omwojo. 
Genesis30:11 Lea yaagira ati: Eshi naahiirwa! Yaamweta Gaadi. 
Genesis30:12 Zilupa omuzaana wa Lea yaazaarira Yakobo omwojo wa kabiri; 
Genesis30:13 Lea yaagira ati: Eshi nyine omugisha! Ahakuba abakazi baryanyeta Ohiiriirwe; yaamweta Asheri. 
Genesis30:14 Omu igyesha ry'engano Reubeeni yaaza omu ishwa, yaagwa aha madudaimu, yaagareetera Lea nyina. Rakeeli yaashaba Lea ati: Ninkweshengyereza, mpa aha madudaimu ga mutabani waawe." 
Genesis30:15 Lea yaamugarukamu ati: Iwe okyetsire ekigambo kikye okuncwa aha mushaija wange; mbwenu nooyenda kutwara n'amadudaimu g'omwana wangye? Rakeeli yaagira ati: Mbwenu ku orampe amadudaimu g'omwana waawe, baro naija kukuraarira." 
Genesis30:16 Omu mwabazyo Yakobo ku yaabaire naaruga omu ishwa naataaha, Lea yaashohora kumubugana, yaamugira ati: Oshemereire kundaarira, ahabw'okuba naaha amadudaimu g'omwana wangye ahabwawe. Yakobo nikwo kumuraarira ekyo kiro." 
Genesis30:17 Ruhanga yaahurira okushaba kwa Lea, yaagira enda, yaazaarira Yakobo omojo wa kataano." 
Genesis30:18 Lea yaagira ati: Ruhanga yampa ebihembo, ahakuba nkaha ibanye omuzaana wangye; ogwo mwana yaamweta Isakaari." 
Genesis30:19 Lea yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaarira Yakobo omwojo wa mukaaga." 
Genesis30:20 Lea yaagira ati: Ruhanga yampa ekiconco kirungi eky'obugore; mbwenu ibanye naija kuguma naanye, ahakuba mmuzaariire aboojo mukaaga; omwana yaamweta Zebuluuni." 
Genesis30:21 Bwanyima yaazaara omwishiki, yaamweta Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Ruhanga yaijuka Rakeeli, yaahurira okushaba kwe, yaigura enda ye." 
Genesis30:23 Yaagira enda, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo, yaagira ati: Ruhanga yaanyihaho ekihemu;" 
Genesis30:24 yaamweta Yosefu, naagira ati: MUKAMA anyongyere akandi koojo." 
Genesis30:25 Rakeeli ku yaaherize kuzaara Yosefu, Yakobo yaagira Labaani ati: Ndaga, ngarukye omuka omu nsi y'owaitu." 
Genesis30:26 Ompe abakazi bangye n'abaana bangye, abu naakukorereire, ngyende; ahakuba noomanya omurimo ogu naakukoreire." 
Genesis30:27 Labaani yaamugarukamu ati: Ku oraabe nongirira embabazi, ogume aha; ahakuba nyetegyereize ku MUKAMA ampaire omugisha ahabwawe." 
Genesis30:28 Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Oncwere ebihembo ebi orikwenda, niinyija kubikuha." 
Genesis30:29 Yakobo yaamugarukamu ati: Noomanya oku naakukoreire, n'oku amatungo gaawe gaabaire, obu naabaire ninkigariisa." 
Genesis30:30 Ahakuba agu waabaire oine ntakaizire, gakaba gari makye; mbwenu gakanyire, gaaba maingi munonga; kandi MUKAMA akakuha omugisha, ahu naabaire nza hoona. Mbwenu nyowe ndyatunga ryari eby'okukwatsa eka yangye?" 
Genesis30:31 Onu ati: Mbwenu nkuhe ki? Yakobo yaagarukamu ati: Toine ki orampe; kureka ku oraabe noikiriza kunkorera eki, niinyija kugumizamu kuriisa amasyo gaawe n'okugarinda." 
Genesis30:32 Onyikirize ndabe omu busyo bwawe bwona eri izooba, nyihemu entaama zoona ez'ebigabo n'ez'amayenje, n'abaana baazo abarikwiragura, n'embuzi z'obugondo n'ez'ebitanga; ezirikushusha zityo nizo ziriba ebihembo byangye." 
Genesis30:33 Bwanyima ku oraije kureeba ebihembo byangye, amazima gangye nigaija kweyoreka; embuzi yoona ei oraashangye etari y'ebitanga nari ey'obugondo, n'entaama yoona etari erikwiragura, biri n'enyibano." 
Genesis30:34 Labaani yaagira ati: Ni kirungi; ka kibe nk'oku waagamba. 
Genesis30:35 Eryo izooba Labaani yaashorooramu empaya z'embuzi ez'ebihuuga n'ez'obugondo n'ebuguma zoona ez'ebitanga n'ez'obugondo n'eine ekigabo yoona, n'entaama ezirikwiragura zoona, yaaziha abatabani;" 
Genesis30:36 yaatsiga ahagati ye na Yakobo omwanya gw'orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu. Yakobo yaariisa amasyo ga Labaani agaatsigaraho. 
Genesis30:37 Yakobo yaatwara enkoni z'emilebeni mibisi, n'ez'emiluzi, n'ez'arumoni, yaazicwamu amabara agarikwera maraingwa, gaareebeka." 
Genesis30:38 Yaazita omu mikura erikutwara amaizi omu bwato, ahu amasyo ganywera;" 
Genesis30:39 ku gaabaire gaija kunywa, ezirikwenda kwema zaayema nizireeba ezo nkoni, zizaara ez'ebihuuga n'ez'ebigabo n'ez'amayenje." 
Genesis30:40 Yakobo yaashoroora abo baana b'entaama, kandi amasyo yaagareebesa ez'ebihuuga n'ezirikwiragura zoona eziri omu busyo bwa Labaani; bwanyima eze yaazita aha kwazo, yaareka kuziteerana n'obusyo bwa Labaani." 
Genesis30:41 Enungi ku zaabaire ziba nizeema, Yakobo ata enkoni omu mikura omu maisho gaazo, ngu zeemere ahagati y'ezo nkoni;" 
Genesis30:42 kwonka ku zaabaire ziba ziri mbi, areka kutaho enkoni; n'ahabw'ekyo embi ziri eza Labaani, enungi ziba eza Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Okwo nikwo ogwo mushaija yaayeyongyeire kutunga munonga, n'okugira amasyo maingi, abazaana n'abahuuku, engamira n'endogoya." 
Genesis31:1 Yakobo yaahurira batabani ba Labaani nibagira bati: Yakobo atwaire byona ebyabaire biri ebya tataitwe, kandi nimwo aihire eitungo eri ryona." 
Genesis31:2 Kandi yaareeba Labaani atakimureeba gye nk'okubanza. 
Genesis31:3 MUKAMA yaagambira Yakobo ati: Garuka omu nsi ya baashwenkuru n'omuri beene waanyu; kandi ndyaguma hamwe naiwe. 
Genesis31:4 Yakobo yaatuma ahari Rakeeli na Lea kumushanga omu ishwa, ei amasyo ge gaabaire gari," 
Genesis31:5 yaabagira ati: Ndeebire shoimwe atakindeeba gye nk'okubanza; kwonka Ruhanga wa taata akaguma naanye. 
Genesis31:6 Naimwe nimumanya ku naakoreire shoimwe n'amaani gangye goona. 
Genesis31:7 Kandi shoimwe atuura nangobeza, ahindwire ebihembo byangye emirundi ikumi; kwonka Ruhanga taramwikiriize kunkora kubi." 
Genesis31:8 Ku yaabaire angira ati: Ez'obugondo nizo ziriba ebihembo byawe, obusyo bwona buzaara ez'obugondo; akigira ati; Ez'ebihuuga nizo ziriba ebihembo byawe, obusyo bwona buzaara ez'ebihuuga." 
Genesis31:9 Okwo nikwo Ruhanga yaayakire shoimwe amatungo, akagampa." 
Genesis31:10 Omu bunaku bu amasyo gaabaire geemeramu, nkanaga amaisho nindoota, naareeba empaya z'embuzi ezaabaire nizeemya obusyo ziri ez'ebihuuga, n'ez'obugondo, n'ez'ebihuura." 
Genesis31:11 Maraika wa Ruhanga yangambirira omuri ekyo kirooto ati: Yakobo! Naagarukamu nti: Mukama wangye. 
Genesis31:12 Yangira ati: Imutsya amaisho gaawe, oreebe empaya z'embuzi zoona ezirikwemya obusyo ku ziri ez'ebihuuga n'ez'obugondo n'ez'ebihuura; ahakuba ndeebire ebi Labaani arikukwitsa." 
Genesis31:13 Niinye Ruhanga wa Beseeli, ei waashukiire amajuta aha ibaare, kandi ei waahigiire nondahira; mbwenu imuka orugye omu nsi egi, ogarukye omu nsi ei waazaariirwemu." 
Genesis31:14 Rakeeli na Lea baamugarukamu bati: Noogira ngu tukiine omugabo nari obuhunguzi owa tataitwe? 
Genesis31:15 Tarikutubara nk'abanyamahanga? Ahakuba akatutunda, kandi yaamariraho kimwe empiiha zaitu." 
Genesis31:16 Eitungo ryona eri Ruhanga yaayakire tataitwe, n'eryaitu n'abaana baitu. N'ahabw'ekyo eki Ruhanga akugambiire kyona, okikore." 
Genesis31:17 Atyo Yakobo yaimuka, yaata abatabani n'abakazi be aha ngamira," 
Genesis31:18 yaatwara amatungo ge goona n'ebintu byona ebi yaayetungiire, nigo matungo agu yaihire omuri Padanaramu, okuza owa Isaaka ishe omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Genesis31:19 Omuri ebyo biro Labaani akaba agiire kushara ebyoya by'entaama ze; Rakeeli yaiba ebishushani by'emandwa za ishe. 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo yaayeiba ahari Labaani Omusiria, ahakuba taramugambiire ku arikwenda kuhunga." 
Genesis31:21 Atyo yaacwa n'ebi yaabaire aine byona; yaimuka, yaayambuka omugyera Furaati, yaatoora omuhanda ogurikuza omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Gileadi," 
Genesis31:22 Aha kiro kya kashatu baagambira Labaani ku Yakobo acwire. 
Genesis31:23 Labaani nikwo kutwara beene ishe akamukurata; bwanyima y'ebiro mushanju akamushanga omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Gileadi. 
Genesis31:24 Nyekiro Ruhanga yaizira Labaani Omusiria omu kirooto, yaamugira ati: Oyerinde, otagambira Yakobo ekigambo kyona, ekirungi nari ekibi." 
Genesis31:25 Labaani yaahika Yakobo, yaashanga ateire eihema rye omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Geleadi; Labaani na beene ishe nabo baateerayo amahema gaabo." 
Genesis31:26 Labaani yaagambira Yakobo ati: Eki okozire ki okunyeibaho, okatwara bahara bangye nk'abu banyagire na rurara?" 
Genesis31:27 Ohungiire ki ntakimanyire, okanyeibaho, otangambiire nkabona kukuraga tushemereirwe, nitweshongora n'ebitaasa n'enanga?" 
Genesis31:28 Kandi ahabw'enki otaanyikiriize kunywegyera baijukuru bangye na bahara bangye nimbaraga? Eki okozire n'eky'obushema. 
Genesis31:29 Naaba nimbaasa kukukora kubi; kwonka Ruhanga wa sho araire angambiire ati: Oyerinde, otagambira Yakobo ekigambo kyona ekirungi nari ekibi." 
Genesis31:30 Nimmanya ku ogyenzire ahabw'okugirira eka ya sho orushusho; beitu shi oibiire ki emandwa zangye? 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo yaagarukamu Labaani ati: Ahakuba nkatiina, naagira ngu noija kuunyaka bahara baawe n'empaka." 
Genesis31:32 Kandi weena ou oraashangye aine emandwa zaawe, atakira. Tukiri aha omu maisho ga beene waitu, caaka, ekyawe eki oraashangye nyine okitware. Kwonka Yakobo akaba atarikumanya ku Rakeeli aziibire." 
Genesis31:33 Labaani yaataaha omu ihema rya Yakobo n'erya Lea n'omu ihema ry'abazaana bombi; kwonka tiyaazishangamu. Yaaruga omu ihema rya Lea, yaataaha omu rya Rakeeli." 
Genesis31:34 Rakeeli ogwo akaba yaazitwaire, yaazitaire omu matandiiko g'engamira, azishutamiire, Labaani yaacaaka eihema ryona, tiyaazibona." 
Genesis31:35 Rakeeli yaagambira ishe ati: Mukama wangye, kitakugwisa kubi ahabw'okutakwimukira, ahakuba ndi omu kwezi. Labaani yaacaaka, kwonka tiyaazibona." 
Genesis31:36 Yakobo yaagira ekiniga, yaatonganisa Labaani, naagira ati: Nshobize ki? Nkozire kibi ki ekikureeteire okunkurata otyo n'ekiniga?" 
Genesis31:37 Mbwenu ku waacaaka omu bintu byangye byona, aha bintu by'omu nju yaawe byona waashangamu ki? Kite aha omu maisho ga beene waitu na beene waanyu, batucwere orubanja." 
Genesis31:38 Mmazire naiwe emyaka makumi abiri; omuri egyo myaka entaama zaawe n'embuzi zaawe tizikatoroogaga, kandi tinkaryaga mpaya z'omu masyo gaawe." 
Genesis31:39 Ezaabaire ziitwa enyamaishwa, nkaba ntazikureetera, niinye zaabaire zifeera; kandi eyaabaire eibwa nyomushana nari nyekiro okaba ogindihisa." 
Genesis31:40 Okwo nikwo naabaire nfa kubi; nyomushana nyitwa omushana, na nyekiro nyitwa embeho; ngurukwa oturo." 
Genesis31:41 Mmazire egi myaka makumi abiri omu ka yaawe; ikumi n'ena nkagikukorera ahabwa bahara baawe bombi, n'omukaaga ahabw'obusyo bwawe; kandi ebihembo byangye okabihindura emirundi ikumi." 
Genesis31:42 Kuri Ruhanga wa taata, Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, ou Isaaka yaabaire atiina, atarabaire hamwe naanye, buzimazima okaanyohereize ntaine kantu. Ruhanga areebire okubonabona n'okufa kubi kwangye ninkora, yaakuteisa eki kiro." 
Genesis31:43 Labaani yaagarukamu Yakobo ati: Abaishiki aba ni bahara bangye, n'abaana aba n'abaana bangye, kandi n'amasyo aga n'amasyo gangye, n'ebi byona ebi orikureeba n'ebyangye. Mbwenu eri izooba ngire nta aba baishiki bangye n'abaana baabo abu baazaire?" 
Genesis31:44 Mbwenu ija tukore endagaano, nyowe naiwe; ebe omujurizi ahagati yangye naiwe." 
Genesis31:45 Yakobo yaatwara eibaare, yaaribyara kuba enyomyo." 
Genesis31:46 Yaagamibira beene ishe ati: Mutorotoore amabaare. Ku baagatorotoire, baagarunda hamwe; baariira aha rubaju rw'ekirundo kyago." 
Genesis31:47 Labaani yaayeta ogwo mwanya Yegari-sahadusa; kwonka Yakobo yaagweta Galeedi. 
Genesis31:48 Labaani yaagira ati: Eri izooba ekirundo eki kyaba omujurizi ahagati yangye naiwe. Nikyo kyayeteirwe Galeedi; 
Genesis31:49 kandi na Mizipa; ahakuba akagira ati; MUKAMA agumye eriisho ahagati yangye naiwe, ku turiba twataine." 
Genesis31:50 Ku oriita kubi abaishiki bangye, nari waabashwereraho abandi bakazi, n'obu hariba hataine oriho, omanye ngu Ruhanga niwe kareebi wangye naiwe." 
Genesis31:51 Kandi yaagira Yakobo ati: Omanye eki kirundo, n'egi nyomyo, ebi naata ahagati yangye naiwe." 
Genesis31:52 Ekirundo eki n'eky'okuhamya, n'enyomyo egi n'ey'okuhamya, ku ntariraba aha kirundo eki kukukora kubi, kandi naiwe ku otarikirabaho nari egi nyomyo kunkora kubi." 
Genesis31:53 Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, Ruhanga wa Nahori, Ruhanga wa ishebo, atucwere orubanja. Yakobo yaarahira Ou Isaaka ishe yaabaire atiina." 
Genesis31:54 Bwanyima Yakobo yaatambira ekitambo aha kibungo, yaayeta beene ishe kurya eby'okurya; baarya, baaraara aho, bwarugaho bwasheesha." 
Genesis31:55 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurukana, Labaani yaimuka, yaanywegyera abaijukuru na bahara be, yaabashabira omugisha. Yaagyenda, yaagaruka owaabo." 
Genesis32:1 Yakobo yaagumizamu yaagyenda, baamaraika ba Ruhanga baamubugana." 
Genesis32:2 Ku yaabareebire, yaagira ati: Aba n'eihe rya Ruhanga. Omwanya ogwo yaagweta Mahanaimu." 
Genesis32:3 Yaatuma entumwa kumubandiza ahari Esau mukuru we omu nsi ya Seiri, niyo nsi ya Edomu," 
Genesis32:4 yaabaragiira ati: Mugambire mukama wangye Esau muti: Oku nikwo omwiru waawe Yakobo arikugamba, naagira ati: Nkashuhuukira owa Labaani naagumayo n'okuhitsya hati." 
Genesis32:5 Nyine ente n'endogoya n'amasyo g'entaama n'abahuuku n'abazaana. Mbwenu ntumire ahariiwe, mukama wangye, kukugambira, ngu okaangirira embabazi." 
Genesis32:6 Entumwa zaagaruka ahari Yakobo, zaagira ziti: Esau mukuru waawe tumuhikireho; kandi naija n'abashaija magana ana kukubugana." 
Genesis32:7 N'ahabw'ekyo Yakobo yaatiina munonga, yaashoberwa. Abantu abu yaabaire aine n'amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente n'engamira, yaabicwamu ebicweka bibiri;" 
Genesis32:8 yaagira ati: Esau ku araahikye aha kicweka kimwe, yaakicwekyereza, ekindi kicweka nikiija kukira." 
Genesis32:9 Yakobo yaashaba ati: Ai Ruhanga wa tatenkuru Abrahamu, Ruhanga wa taata Isaaka, MUKAMA owangizire oti: Garuka owaanyu omuri beene waanyu, ndyakukorera gye." 
Genesis32:10 Aha mbabazi zaawe zoona n'obwesigwa bwawe bwona ebi waayorekire omwiru waawe, tinshemereire kuheebwaho nangwa n'akati kaingana busha; ahakuba nkambuka Yorudani egi n'enkoni yonka; mbwenu ndugiremu emitwe ebiri." 
Genesis32:11 Ninkweshengyereza, onkize mukuru wangye Esau; ahakuba nimmutiina, ngu atakaija akanyita n'abaana bangye na baanyinabo." 
Genesis32:12 Kandi naiwe okandaganisa oti: Buzimazima ndyakukorera gye, mpindure oruzaaro rwawe rube nk'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja, ogutarikubaasa kubarwa." 
Genesis32:13 Ekyo kiro yaaraara aho; yaiha omu bi yaabaire aine ekiconco ky'okuha Esau mukuru we," 
Genesis32:14 ebuguma z'embuzi magana abiri, n'empaya makumi abiri, ebuguma z'entaama magana abiri n'empaya makumi abiri," 
Genesis32:15 engamira ezirikukamwa makumi ashatu n'enyana zaazo, ente z'ejigija makumi ana n'enimi ikumi, n'ebuguma z'endogoya makumi abiri n'abaana baazo ikumi." 
Genesis32:16 Yaaziha abairu be, buri busyo okwabwo, yaabagira ati: Munyebembere, mwambukye, mutsigye omwanya ahagati y'obusyo n'obundi." 
Genesis32:17 Yaaragiira omwebembezi ati: Mukuru wangye Esau ku araakubugane, yaakubuuza ati: Ori ow'oha? Kandi, Nimuza hi? Kandi amatungo aga n'ag'oha?" 
Genesis32:18 Omugire oti: N'ag'omwiru waawe Yakobo, mukama wangye Esau; n'ekiconco eki waatwekyerwa; kandi nawe atukuratiire." 
Genesis32:19 Kandi yaaragiira atyo owa kabiri n'owa kashatu, n'abaabaire nibafunya amasyo boona, naabagira ati: Mube nikwo mwagira Esau, ku muraamubugane;" 
Genesis32:20 kandi mumugire muti: Reeba, n'omwiru waawe Yakobo atukuratiire. Ahakuba Yakobo akagira ati: Naaza kumucureeza n'ekiconco ekinyebembeire, bwanyima tureebane; shana akaanyikiriza." 
Genesis32:21 Ekiconco nikwo kumwebembera, kikambuka; kwonka we akaraara aho ahu baagombekire ekyo kiro." 
Genesis32:22 Ekyo kiro yaimuka, yaatwara abakazi be bombi n'abazaana be na'abaana be ikumi n'omwe, baayambukira aha nyambukiro ya Yaboki." 
Genesis32:23 Yaabambutsya ako kagyera n'ebi yaabaire aine byona. 
Genesis32:24 Yakobo yaatsigarayo wenka; omushaija yaija, yaafukaana nawe bwarugaho bwatagurukana." 
Genesis32:25 Omushaija ogwo ku yaareebire yaamurema, yaamukora aha igufa ry'eitako eitako rya Yakobo ryateruka nibakifukaana." 
Genesis32:26 Omushaija yaamugira ati: Ndekura, ahakuba nibutaagurukana. Yakobo yaamugira ati: Tindikwija kkukurekura aotampaire mugisha." 
Genesis32:27 Onu ati: Eiziina ryawe ori oha? Ati: Ndi Yakobo. 
Genesis32:28 Onu ati: Okuruga hati torigaruka kwetwa Yakobo kureka Israeli; ahakuba ohakaine na Ruhanga n'abantu, waasinga." 
Genesis32:29 Bwanyima Yakobo yaamugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ngambira eiziina ryawe. Onu ati: Nooyendera ki kumanya eiziina ryangye? Atyo yaamuheera aho omugisha." 
Genesis32:30 Yakobo yaayeta ogwo mwanya Penueli, naagira ati: Nyereebaniire na Ruhanga amaisho n'amaisho, tinaafa." 
Genesis32:31 Eizooba ryarasha naarengyera Penueli, naagyenda omunyugu aha bw'eigufa ry'eitako." 
Genesis32:32 Abaisraeli nikyo bazirira enyama y'aha mutsi gw'eitako ry'ekibero n'okuhitsya hati; ahabw'okuba ogwo mushaija akakora aha mutsi gw'eitako ry'ekibero kya Yakobo. 
Genesis33:1 Yakobo yaimutsya amaisho, yaareeba Esau naija n'abashaija be magana ana; yaabaganisa abaana, yaaha Lea abe, na Rakeeli abe, n'abazaanakazi bombi abaabo." 
Genesis33:2 Yaayebembeza abazaanakazi n'abaana baabo, yaakuratsaho Lea n'abaana be, haahereeruka Rakeeli na Yosefu." 
Genesis33:3 Yakobo yaabeebembera, yainama ahansi emirundi mushanju, okuhitsya obu yaahikire haihi na mukuru we." 
Genesis33:4 Esau yairuka kumubugana, yaamubumbatira, yaamugwa omu kifuba, yaamunywegyera; bombi baarira." 
Genesis33:5 Esau ku yaimukize amaisho, yaareeba abakazi n'abaana, yaagira ati: Aba abu oine nibaahi? Yakobo yaagarukamu ati: N'abaana abu Ruhanga yaahaire omwiru waawe ahabw'embabazi ze." 
Genesis33:6 Abazaanakazi n'abaana baabo bairira haihi, bainama." 
Genesis33:7 Lea nawe yaija n'abaana be, bainama; bwanyima Yosefu na Rakeeli nabo baija, bainama." 
Genesis33:8 Esau yaabuuza ati: Ebintu byona ebi mbugaine bibaire biri ebya ki? Onu ati: N'ebi ntwekyeire mukama wangye, ngu angirire embabazi." 
Genesis33:9 Esau yaagira ati: Ebi nyine nibimmara, mwana wa maawe; ebyo ebi oine yegumire nabyo." 
Genesis33:10 Yakobo yaamugira ati: Ngaaha! Naakweshengyereza, ku oraabe wangirira embabazi, ikiriza ekiconco eki nkureeteire; ahabw'okuba ku naareeba amaisho gaawe, naashusha nk'owaareeba amaisho ga Ruhanga, kandi wanshemerererwa." 
Genesis33:11 Naakweshengyereza, yakiira ekiconco eki nkureeteire, ahakuba Ruhanga ankoreire eby'embabazi, kandi ebi nyine, nibimaara. Yaamweshengyereza munonga; yaakitwara." 
Genesis33:12 Bwanyima Esau yaagira ati: Ka tugumizemu tugyende, nyowe mbeebembere." 
Genesis33:13 Yakobo yaamugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, noomanya abaana ku bataine maani, kandi amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente agu nyine nigontsya; ku baraagabindirane eizooba rimwe, goona nigafa." 
Genesis33:14 Ninkweshengyereza, mukama wangye, orabe aha mwiru waawe, ogyende, nyowe niinyija kwija mpora, nk'oku amasyo agu nyine garikugyenda, kandi n'abaana oku barikugyenda, okuhitsya ahu ndaahikire Seiri owa mukama wangye." 
Genesis33:15 Esau yaagira ati: Ka nkutsigire abashaija bamwe ahari aba abu nyine. Onu ati: Mbwenu n'ab'enki? Nsaasira, mukama wangye, obarekye." 
Genesis33:16 Atyo Esau yaagyenda eryo eizooba naagaruka Seiri. 
Genesis33:17 Kwonka Yakobo yaagyenda naaza Sukosi; ku yaahikireyo, yaayeyombekyera enju, kandi yaayombekyerayo amasyo ge ebiju. Omwanya ogwo nikyo gwayeteirwe Sukosi." 
Genesis33:18 Yakobo ku yaarugire Padanaramu, yaahika n'obusingye aha rurembo rwe Shekemu omu nsi ya Kanaani, yaasiisira omu maisho gaayo." 
Genesis33:19 Yaagura ekibanja ahari beene Hamori ishe wa Shekemu ebicweka by'efeeza igana, ahu yaateire eihema rye." 
Genesis33:20 Yaayombekayo eitambiro, yaaryeta Elelohe-Israeli." 
Genesis34:1 Omu biro ebyo Dina, muhara wa Lea, ou yaazaariire Yakobo, akaza kutaayaayira abaishiki b'omu nsi egyo." 
Genesis34:2 Shekemu, mwene Hamori Omuhiivi omutegyeki w'ensi egyo, ku yaamureebire, yaamutwara, yaamuhamba, yaamushiisha." 
Genesis34:3 Ogwo mushaija yaamarira omutima gwe ahari Dina muhara wa Yakobo, yaamukunda, yaamugambira eby'okumugwisa gye." 
Genesis34:4 Shekemu yaagambira Hamori ishe, ati: Nshwererera ogu mwishiki." 
Genesis34:5 Yakobo yaahurira ku Shekemu asiisire Dina muhara we; obwo abatabani bakaba bariisize; Yakobo yaahunama, okuhitsya ahu baiziire." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori ishe wa Shekemu yaaruga omu rurembo, yaaza kuhanuura na Yakobo." 
Genesis34:7 Beene Yakobo, ku baakihuriire, baaruga omu iriisizo, baataaha. Baashaasha, kandi baagira ekiniga kingi, ahabw'okuba akakora ekihagaro omu ba Israeli okubyama na muhara wa Yakobo, ekintu ekitashemereire kukorwa." 
Genesis34:8 Hamori yaahanuura nabo, ati: Omutima gwa mutabani wangye gukunzire muhara waanyu; naabeeshengyereza mumumuhe amushwere." 
Genesis34:9 Mushwererane naitwe, mutuhingire bahara baanyu, naimwe mushwere abaitu." 
Genesis34:10 Haza mutuure naitwe; ensi ngigi ebari omumaisho, mugituuremu, mugikoreremu eby'obushuubuzi, kandi mugitungiremu." 
Genesis34:11 Na Shekemu yaagambira ishe w'omwishiki na banyaanya ati: Mungirire embabazi; eki murancwe kyona, ninkibaha." 
Genesis34:12 Enjugano n'ekiconco ebi murancwe, n'obu byakwingana ki, niinyija kubiha, nk'oku muraabincwe; beitu mumpingire ogu mwishiki." 
Genesis34:13 Beene Yakobo baagarukamu Shekemu na Hamori ishe nibabaryarya, ahabw'okushiisha Dina munyaanyabo;" 
Genesis34:14 baabagira bati: Eki titurikubaasa kukikora, okuhingira munyaanyaitwe omuntu otashazirwe; ahakuba omuriitwe kikaaba ekihemu." 
Genesis34:15 Hariho kimwe kyonka ekyakutureetera kubaikiriza, nikwo kwikiriza kuba nkaitwe, buri mushaija weena omuriimwe akasharwa;" 
Genesis34:16 obwo nibwo turibahingira bahara baitu, naitwe tukashwera bahara baanyu, tukatuura naimwe, tukaba eihabga rimwe." 
Genesis34:17 Ku muraabe mutatwikiriize mukasharwa, nitwija kutwara omwishiki waitu, twegyendere." 
Genesis34:18 Ebigambo byabo byashemeza Hamori na Shekemu omutabani. 
Genesis34:19 Omutsigazi ogwo tiyaayeziringa, yaarahuka kukikora, ahabw'okukunda munonga omwishiki wa Yakobo; kandi akaba naasiimwa munonga okukira boona ab'omu ka ya ishe." 
Genesis34:20 Hamori na Shekemu omutabani baaza aha irembo ry'orurembo rwabo, baahanuura n'abashaija b'omuri orwo rurembo, bati:" 
Genesis34:21 Abashaija abo twine nabo obusingye; n'ahabw'ekyo ka batuure omu nsi egi, bakoreremu eby'obushuubuzi; ahakuba ensi egi ni mpango, neebamara; tushwere bahara baabo, naitwe tubahingire abaitu." 
Genesis34:22 Hariho kimwe kyonka ekyakureetera abashaija abo okutuura naitwe, tukaba eihanga rimwe, nikwo buri mushaija weena omuriitwe okusharwa, nkabo oku bashazirwe." 
Genesis34:23 Nimugira ngu ente zaabo n'ebintu byabo n'amatungo gaabo goona tibirikwija kuba ebyaitu? Ka tufe okubaikiriza; nibwo baraatuure naitwe. 
Genesis34:24 Boona abaashohoire nibaraba omu irembo ry'orurembo rwe, baikiriza ebi Hamori na Shekemu omutabani baabagambira. Buri mushaija weena owaarabire omu irembo ry'orurembo rwe yaasharwa." 
Genesis34:25 Aha kiro kya kashatu, ku baabaire bakirwaire obuhuta, batabani ba Yakobo babiri, Simeoni na Leevi, banyaanya ba Dina, biru omwe yaihayo rurara ye, baateera orurembo kitamanyirwe, baita abashaija boona." 
Genesis34:26 Baitsa Hamori na Shekemu omutabani rurara, baiha Dina omu nju ya Shekemu, baagyenda." 
Genesis34:27 Beene Yakobo baija aha mitumbi, baagicwijura, baanyaga eby'omu rurembo, nibabatura okushiisha munyaanyabo." 
Genesis34:28 Baatwara n'amasyo gaabo ag'entaama n'ag'ente, n'endogoya zaabo, n'ebyabaire biri omu rurembo n'omu ishwa byona;" 
Genesis34:29 baanyaga eitungo ryabo ryona, n'abaana baabo abato n'abakazi baabo, n'ebintu byona ebyabaire biri omu maju, byaba eminyago yaabo." 
Genesis34:30 Bwanyima Yakobo yaagira Simeoni na Leevi ati: Mungwisiize akagwe, mwandeetera kwangirwa kimwe abantu abatwire omu nsi egi, Abanyakanaani n'Abaperizi; haza nimureeba ku turi bakye; ku baraayeteerane kundwanisa, niinyija kucwekyerezibwa n'eka yangye." 
Genesis34:31 Baagira bati: Hoona tukaamurekire agira munyaanyaitwe nka maraaya? 
Genesis35:1 Ruhanga yaagira Yakobo ati: Imuka, oinamukye Beseeli, otuureyo; kandi okwo oyombekyereyo Ruhanga eitambiro, owaakweyorekire noohunga mukuru waawe Esau." 
Genesis35:2 Bwanyima Yakobo yaagambira ab'omu ka ye n'abandi boona abaabaire bari hamwe nawe, ati: Mwiheho baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga abari omuriimwe, mweyeze, mujware ebindi bijwaro;" 
Genesis35:3 bwanyima mwimukye twinamukye Beseeli; niinyija kwombekyerayo Ruhanga eitambiro, owampuriire aha izooba ry'obusaasi bwangye, akaguma naanye omu muhanda ogu naarabiremu." 
Genesis35:4 Nabo nikwo kuha Yakobo baaruhanga ba'banyamahanga abu baabaire baine, n'empeta ezi baabaire bajwaire aha matu gaabo; Yakobo akabishereka ahansi y'omwela ogwabaire guri haihi na Shekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Ku baabaire nibakigyenda, Ruhanga yaakwatsa obwoba ab'omu ndembo ezaabaire zibeehinguririize; n'ahabw'ekyo tibaakurata batabani ba Yakobo." 
Genesis35:6 Bwanyima Yakobo n'abu yaabaire aine boona baahika Luuzi, niyo Beseeli, ey'omu nsi ya Kanaani;" 
Genesis35:7 yaayombekayo eitambiro, yaayeta ogwo mwanya Eli-Beseeli, ahabw'okuba niyo Ruhanga yaamweyorekyeire, obu yaahunga mukuru we." 
Genesis35:8 Kandi Debora, omurezi wa Rebeka, yaafa, yaaziikwa ifo ya Beseeli ahansi y'omwela; n'ahabw'ekyo baagweta Aloni-bakuusi." 
Genesis35:9 Yakobo, ku yaarugire Padanaramu, Ruhanga yaagaruka yaamweyoreka, kandi yaamuha omugisha." 
Genesis35:10 Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Eiziina ryawe ori Yakobo; kwonka tokyetwa Yakobo obundi, kureka noija kwetwa Israeli. Ruhanga nikwo kumweta Israeli." 
Genesis35:11 Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Ndi Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona; ozaare, okanye; eihanga n'omutwe gw'amahanga biryaruga omuriiwe, kandi n'abagabe baryakukomookamu." 
Genesis35:12 Ndyakuha ensi ei naahaire Abrahamu na Isaaka, kandi bwanyima ngihe n'oruzaaro rwawe." 
Genesis35:13 Ruhanga yaamutsiga omu mwanya ogu yaabaire naagaaniriramu nawe, yaatemba omu iguru." 
Genesis35:14 Yakobo yaabyara enyomyo y'eibaare omu mwanya ogu yaagaaniriiremu nawe, yaagishukaho empongano y'eky'okunywa, kandi yaagishukaho n'amajuta." 
Genesis35:15 Yakobo yaayeta omwanya ogu Ruhanga yaagaaniriiremu nawe Beseeli. 
Genesis35:16 Bwanyima baaruga Beseeli; ku baabaire bakiri kaanya, batakahikire Efuraata, Rakeeli yaarumwa kuzaara, yaahangaanirwa." 
Genesis35:17 Ku yaabaire akihangaaniirwe, omuzaarisa yaamugira ati: Otatiina; waaza kugaruka kuzaara omwojo." 
Genesis35:18 Ku yaabaire ari haihi kufa, omu kukaba kwe yaamweta Benoni; kwonka ishe yaamweta Benyamiini." 
Genesis35:19 Atyo Rakeeli yaafa, yaaziikwa aha muhanda ogurikuza Efuraata, niyo Betelehemu." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobo yaabyara enyomyo aha kituuro kye; niyo nyomyo y'aha kituuro kya Rakeeli; kandi ekiriho n'okuhitsya eri izooba. 
Genesis35:21 Israeli yaagumizamu, bwanyima yaateera eihema rye seeri y'omunaara gwa Ederi." 
Genesis35:22 Israeli ku yaabaire akiri omuri ekyo kyanga, Reubeeni yaagyenda, yaabyama na Biliha muka ishe ow'ekinyanshunju; Israeli yaakimanya. Obwo batabani ba Yakobo bakaba baahikire ikumi na babiri." 
Genesis35:23 Batabani ba Lea, Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Yakobo, Simeoni, Leevi, Yuda, Isakaari na Zebuluuni." 
Genesis35:24 Batabani ba Rakeeli, Yosefu na Benyamiini." 
Genesis35:25 Batabani ba Biliha, omuzaana wa Rakeeli, Daani na Nafutaali." 
Genesis35:26 Batabani ba Zilupa omuzaana wa Lea, Gaadi na Asheri. Abo nibo batabani ba Yakobo abaazaariirwe Padanaramu." 
Genesis35:27 Bwanyima Yakobo yaashanga ishe Mamure, nari Kiryasiaraba, niyo Heburooni, ei Abrahamu na Isaaka baabaire bashuhuukiire." 
Genesis35:28 Emyaka ya Isaaka ekahika igana na makumi munaana. 
Genesis35:29 Atyo omwitsyo gwamuhwamu, yaafa, yaakurata abaabo, ari omugurusi ahwitsire; abatabani Esau na Yakobo baamuziika." 
Genesis36:1 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Esau, niwe Edomu." 
Genesis36:2 Esau akashwera abakazi omu baishiki ba Kanaani; Ada muhara wa Eloni Omuhiiti, Oholibama muhara wa Aana, kandi mwijukuru wa Zibeoni Omuhiivi," 
Genesis36:3 na Basemaasi muhara wa Ishimaeli, munyaanya wa Nebayoosi." 
Genesis36:4 Ada yaazaarira Esau Elifaazi; Basemaasi yaazaara Reueli," 
Genesis36:5 na Oholibama yaazaara Yeushi, Yalamu na Koora. Abo nibo batabani ba Esau abaazaariirwe omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Genesis36:6 Esau yaatwara abakazi be, batabani be, bahara be, n'ab'omu ka ye boona n'ente ze n'amatungo ge goona kandi n'ebintu bye byona, ebi yaihire omu nsi ya Kanaani; yaaza omu nsi ya hare, ngu ataane n'omurumuna Yakobo;" 
Genesis36:7 ahabw'okuba eitungo ryabo rikaba riri ringi, tibaabaasa kutuurana; ensi ei baabaire baashuhuukiiremu, terabaasize kubamara ahabw'amatungo gaabo." 
Genesis36:8 N'ahabw'ekyo Esau yaatuura omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Seiri; Esau ogwo niwe Edomu. 
Genesis36:9 Aba nibo baijukuru ba Esau, ishenkuru w'Abanyaedomu abaabaire batwire omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Seiri." 
Genesis36:10 Aga nigo maziina ga batabani ba Esau: Elifaazi mutabani wa Ada muka Esau, Reueli mutabani wa Basemaasi muka Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Na batabani ba Elifaazi bakaba bari Temani, Omari, Zeefo, Gatamu na Kenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Kandi Timuna akaba ari omukaza wa Elifaazi mwene Esau ow'ekinyanshunju; yaazaarira Elifaazi Amaleki. Abo nibo baijukuru ba Ada muka Esau. 
Genesis36:13 Aba nibo baijukuru ba Basemaasi muka Esau. 
Genesis36:14 Aba nibo batabani ba Oholibama muka Esau, muhara wa Aana mwijukuru wa Zibeoni; yaazaarira Esau Yeushi, Yalamu na Koora." 
Genesis36:15 Aba nibo bakuru b'enganda beene Esau; batabani ba Elifaazi omujigaijo gwa Esau, omutware Temani, omutware Omari, omutware Zeefo, omutware Kenazi," 
Genesis36:16 omutware Koora, omutware Gatamu n'omutware Amaleki; abo nibo bakuru b'enganda abaazairwe Elifaazi omu nsi ya Edomu, kandi nibo baijukuru ba Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Aba nibo batabani ba Reueli mwene Esau: omutware Nahasi, omutware Zeera, omutware Shama n'omutware Miiza; abo nibo batware abaazairwe Reueli omu nsi ya Edomu, kandi nibo baijukuru ba Basemaasi muka Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Aba nibo batabani ba Oholibama muka Esau: omutware Yeushi, omutware Yalamu, n'omutware Koora; abo nibo batware abaazairwe Oholibama muka Esau, kandi muhara wa Aana." 
Genesis36:19 Abo nibo batabani ba Esau, niwe Edomu; kandi abo nibo batware baabo." 
Genesis36:20 Aba nibo batabani ba Seiri Omuhoori, abaashangirwe batwire omuri egyo nsi: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Aaba," 
Genesis36:21 Dishoni, Ezeeri na Dishani; abo nibo baami b'Abahoori beene Seiri ab'omu nsi ya Edomu." 
Genesis36:22 Na batabani ba Lotani bakaba bari Hoori na Hemani; kandi Timuna akaba ari munyaanya wa Lotani. 
Genesis36:23 Aba nibo batabani ba Shobali: Alivani, Manahaasi Ebali, Sheefo na Onamu." 
Genesis36:24 Aba nibo batabani ba Zibeoni: Aaya na Aana; Aana ogwo niwe yaazoire ekitagata omu ihamba, obu yaabaire ariisize endogoya za Zibeoni ishe." 
Genesis36:25 Aba nibo baana ba Aana: Dishoni na Oholibama muhara wa Aana. 
Genesis36:26 Aba nibo batabani ba Dishoni: Hemidaani, Eshibaani, Isuraani, na Kerani." 
Genesis36:27 Aba nibo batabani ba Ezeeri: Biluhaani, Zaavani na Akani." 
Genesis36:28 Aba nibo batabani ba Dishani: Uuzi na Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Aba nibo batware b'Abahoori; omutware Lotani, omutware Shobali, omutware Zibeoni, omutware Aana," 
Genesis36:30 omutware Dishoni, omutware Ezeri n'omutware Dishani; abo nibo batware b'Abahoori omu nsi ya Seiri, nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri." 
Genesis36:31 Aba nibo bagabe abaategyekire omu nsi ya Edomu, Abaisraeli obu baabaire batakategyekirwe mugabe weena." 
Genesis36:32 Beela mwene Beori akategyeka Edomu, kandi eiziina ry'orurembo rwe rikaba riri Dinihaba." 
Genesis36:33 Beela yaafa, Yobabu mwene Zeera owa Bozira yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
Genesis36:34 Yobabu yaafa, Hushamu ow'omu nsi y'Abatemani yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
Genesis36:35 Hushamu yaafa, Hadadi mwene Bedadi, owaabingire Abamidiani omu nsi ya Moabu, yaayema omu mwanya gwe; eiziina ry'orurembo rwe rikaba riri Aviisi." 
Genesis36:36 Hadadi yaafa, Samula owa Masireka yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
Genesis36:37 Samula yaafa, Shauli owa Rehoboosi aha mugyera Furaati yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
Genesis36:38 Shauli yaafa, Baali-hanani mwene Akiboori yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
Genesis36:39 Baali-hanani mwene Akiboori yaafa, Hadari yaayema omu mwanya gwe, n'eiziina ry'orurembo rwe rikaba riri Pau, kandi omukazi we akaba naayetwa Mehetabeeli, muhara wa Matireedi, kandi mwijukuru wa Mezahaabu." 
Genesis36:40 Aga nigo maziina g'abatware abaakomookire ahari Esau, n'emiryango yaabo n'emyanya yaabo n'amaziina gaabo; omutware Timuna, omutware aliva, omutware Yeseti," 
Genesis36:41 omutware Oholibama, omutware Eela, omutware Pinoni," 
Genesis36:42 omutware Kenazi, omutware Temani, omutware Mibuzaari," 
Genesis36:43 omutware Magudieli n'omutware Iraamu; abo nibo batware ba Edomu, niwe Esau ishenkuru w'Abanyaedomu, nk'emyanya yaabo ey'omu nsi ei baakubwire, oku yaabaire eri." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo akatuura omu nsi ya Kanaani, ei ishe yaashuhuukiiremu." 
Genesis37:2 Ebi nibyo byabaire aha ruzaaro rwa Yakobo. Yosefu akaba naariisa amasyo hamwe na bakuru be, aine emyaka ikumi na mushanju; omu kukura kwe akanyeeta na batabani ba Biliha n'aba Zilupa baka ishe; kandi Yosefu akaba agambira ishe ebibi ebi baabaire bakora." 
Genesis37:3 Kandi Israeli akaba akunda Yosefu okukira abandi baana be boona, ahakuba akaba ari omwana ou yaazaire yaabaire omugurusi; n'ahabw'ekyo akamubaziiriza ekanzu ndaingwa y'amabara." 
Genesis37:4 Bakuru be ku baareebire ishe naamukunda okubakira boona, baamwanga, tibaabaasa kugamba gye nawe." 
Genesis37:5 Yosefu yaaroota ekirooto; ku yaakigambiire bakuru be, baayeyongyera kumwanga." 
Genesis37:6 Yaabagira ati: Nimbeeshengyereza muhurire ekirooto eki ndootsire; 
Genesis37:7 tubaire nituboha ebiba omu misiri; ekiba kyangye kyaimuka, kyayemerera; ebyanyu biba nabyo byayemerera byayehinguririza ekyangye, byakiinamira." 
Genesis37:8 Bakuru be baamubuuza bati: Noogira ngu oryaba omugabe waitu? Buzima oryatutegyeka? Baayeyongyera kumwanga ahabw'ebirooto bye n'ebigambo bye. 
Genesis37:9 Yaagaruka yaaroota ekindi kirooto, yaakigambira bakuru be, naagira ati: Ngarukire naarota ekindi kirooto; eizooba n'okwezi n'enyonyoozi ikumi n'emwe nibiinyinamira." 
Genesis37:10 Ku yaakigambiire ishe na bakuru be, ishe yaamuteisa, yaamugira ati: Ekyo ni kirooto ki eki orootsire? Noogira ngu nyowe na nyoko na bakuru baawe buzima turyaija twiname ahansi omu maisho gaawe?" 
Genesis37:11 Bakuru be baamugirira eihari, kwonka ishe yaaguma naijuka ekyo kigambo." 
Genesis37:12 Bwanyima bakuru be baaza kuriisa amasyo ga ishebo haihi na Shekemu. 
Genesis37:13 Israeli yaagira Yosefu ati: Bakuru baawe tibarikuriisiza Shekemu? Ija mbakutumeho. Yaamugarukamu ati: Ntuma, Taata." 
Genesis37:14 Ishe yaamugira ati: Irooko oreebe bakuru baawe ku baraabe bari gye n'amasyo ku garaabe gari gye, ogarukye ongambire. Nikwo kumutuma, akaruga omu Ruhanga rwa Heburooni, akaza Shekemu." 
Genesis37:15 Ku yaahikireyo, omuntu yaamushanga naagyendagyenda omu bwerere; yaamubuuza ati: Noosherura ki?" 
Genesis37:16 Onu ati: Ninsherura bakuru bangye; ninkweshengyereza, ngambira ahu bariisiize." 
Genesis37:17 Omushaija yaamugarukamu ati: Bafurukire, ahakuba mpuriire nibagira ngu, Tuze Dosani. Atyo Yosefu yaakurata bakuru be, yaabashanga Dosani." 
Genesis37:18 Ku baamureebire akiri hare, atakabahikire haihi, baagira enaama y'okumwita." 
Genesis37:19 Baagambirana bati: Reeba, ruroota yaija." 
Genesis37:20 Mbwenu murekye tumwite, tumunagye omu kiina; turyagira tuti: Enyamaishwa endi y'abantu ekamurya; haza tureebe ebirooto bye ahu biriherera." 
Genesis37:21 Reubeeni yaakihurira, yaamubakiza, yaagira ati: Katurekye kumwitira kimwe." 
Genesis37:22 Yaagaruka yaabagira ati: Mutasheesha eshagama, mumunagye aha omu ihamba omuri eki kiina, kwonka emikono yaanyu etagira eki yaamukoraho. Akagira atyo ngu abone kumubakiza, amugarurire ishe." 
Genesis37:23 Yosefu ku yaahikire bakuru be, baamujuura ekanzu eri endaingwa ei yaabaire ajwaire," 
Genesis37:24 baamutwara, baamunaga omu kiina; ekyo kiina kikaba kirimu busha, kitarimu maizi." 
Genesis37:25 Baashutama kurya; ku baimukize amaisho, baareeba omutwe gw'Abaishimaeli nibaruga Gileadi, baine engamira zeekoreire emigaju n'emibazi na sumuruna, nibabitwara Misri." 
Genesis37:26 Yuda yaagira beene ishe ati: Nikitugasira ki kwita murumuna waitu, tukashereka eshagama ye?" 
Genesis37:27 Mwije tumuguze Abaishimaeli, emikono yaitu erekye kuba niyo yaamwita; ahabw'okuba ni murumuna waitu, kandi turi ab'orura rumwe. Beene ishe baamwikiriza." 
Genesis37:28 Omuri ako kaanya abashuubuzi b'Abamidiani baarabaho; banu baiha Yosefu omu kiina, baamuguza Abaishimaeli shekeli makumi abiri z'efeeza; baatwara Yosefu Misri." 
Genesis37:29 Reubeni ku yaagarukire aha kiina, yaashanga Yosefu atarimu, yaataagura ebijwaro bye;" 
Genesis37:30 yaagaruka ahari beene ishe, yaagira ati: Omwana tariyo; mbwenu ntoore hi?" 
Genesis37:31 Baatwara ekanzu ya Yosefu, baita empaya y'embuzi, baagijabika omu shagama yaayo;" 
Genesis37:32 egyo kanzu ndaingwa baagitwarira ishebo, baagira bati: Tugwire aha kanzu egi; reeba ku eraabe eri ey'omwana waawe, nari etari yo." 
Genesis37:33 Yakobo yaagimanya, yaagira ati: N'ekanzu y'omwana wangye; enyamaishwa endi y'abantu emuriire; tihariho kubanganisa, Yosefu ataagataagwirwe." 
Genesis37:34 Yakobo yaataagura ebijwaro bye, yaayezirika ekiguniya, yaamara ebiro bingi naacurira omwana we." 
Genesis37:35 Batabani be na bahara be boona baimuka baija kumwebesa enaku; yaayanga, yaagira ati: Ndyarugaho, nshangye omwana wangye okuzimu ninkicura. Nikwo ishe yaamucuriire atyo." 
Genesis37:36 Kandi Abamidiani abo ku baahikire Misri, baamuguza Potifaari, omwe aha bakuru b'engabo za Faraho, owaabaire ategyeka abarinzi." 
Genesis38:1 Omu biro ebyo Yuda akaruga omuri beene ishe, yaashuuma, yaataaha ow'omuntu orikwetwa Hiira owa Adulaamu." 
Genesis38:2 Yuda yaareebayo omwishiki w'Omunyakanaani orikwetwa Shua; yaamutwara, yaabyama nawe;" 
Genesis38:3 yaagira enda, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo, yaamweta Eeri." 
Genesis38:4 Yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaara ondiijo mwojo, yaamweta Onani;" 
Genesis38:5 kandi yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaara ondiijo mwojo, yaamweta Sheela; obwo akaba ari Keziba, obu omukazi we yaazaara ogwo mwana." 
Genesis38:6 Yuda yaashwererera omutabani omukuru Eeri omukazi eiziina rye Tamari. 
Genesis38:7 Kwonka Eeri omujigaijo gwa Yuda akaba mubi omu maisho ga MUKAMA, MUKAMA nikwo kumwita." 
Genesis38:8 Bwanyima Yuda yaagira Onani ati: Irooko otaahe omwa muka mukuru waawe, oraare nawe, omumuzaarireho omwana." 
Genesis38:9 Onani yaamanya ngu omwana tarikwija kuba owe; n'ahabw'ekyo ku yaabyamire na muka mukuru we, yaasheesha ahansi, ngu atazaarira mukuru we." 
Genesis38:10 Eki yaakozire kyaba kibi omu maisho ga Mukama; nawe yaamwita. 
Genesis38:11 Bwanyima Yuda yaagambira Tamari omukaamwana ati: Guma ori omufaakazi omu ka ya sho, okuhitsya obu omwana wangye Sheela arikura; ahakuba akatiina ngu naija kufa nka bakuru be. Tamari nikwo kugyenda, akaguma omu ka ya ishe." 
Genesis38:12 Bwanyima ku haahingwireho ebiro, muhara wa Shua, muka Yuda, yaafa. Yuda ku yaarugire omu rufu rw'omukazi we, yainamuka Timuna hamwe na mugyenzi we Hiira owa Adulaamu, baaza ei abariisa be baabaire nibasharira ebyoya by'entaama." 
Genesis38:13 Baagira Tamari bati: Shozaara yainamuka, yaaza Timuna kusharisa entaama ze ebyoya." 
Genesis38:14 Yaajuura ebijwaro by'obufaakazi, yaayetwekyerera akenda ah'amaisho, ogundi yaagwehumbika, yaashutama omu irembo rya Enaimu, eriri aha muhanda ogurikuza Timuna; ahabw'okuba akareeba Sheela akuzire, haza tibamumuha kumuhungura." 
Genesis38:15 Yuda ku yaamureebire, yaagira ngu ni maraaya; ahakuba akaba ayetwekyereire ah'amaisho." 
Genesis38:16 Yaakiikama aha rubaju rw'omuhanda ahu yaabaire ari, yaamugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ija tubyame hamwe; (kwonka akaba atamanyire ku ari omukaamwana). Onu ati: Nompa ki, ku oraabyame naanye?" 
Genesis38:17 Yaagira ati: Niinyija kukutwekyera omwana gw'embuzi ogw'omu busyo bwangye. Onu ati: Noija kunkwatiriza ki, okuhitsya obu oraaguntwekyere?" 
Genesis38:18 Yaagira ati: Nkukwatirize ki? Onu ati: Ontsigire empeta yaawe eriho akamanyiso, n'orukoba rwawe, n'egyo nkoni ei oine omu ngaro. Yaabimuha, yaabyama nawe, yaamutweka." 
Genesis38:19 Omukazi yaimuka, yaayegyendera, yaayeiha ako kenda ahamutwe, yaagaruka yaajwara ebijwaro bye by'obufaakazi." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda yaatweka munywani we Omunyadulaamu omwana gw'embuzi ngu omukazi amugarurire ebi amukwatiriize; kwonka tiyaamushangayo. 
Genesis38:21 Yaabuuza abashaija b'omuri ogwo mwanya ati: Maraaya obaire ari Enaimu aha rubaju rw'omuhanda agiire hi? Banu bati: Tihariho maraaya obaire ari aha. 
Genesis38:22 Yaagaruka ahari Yuda, yaamugira ati: Tinaamushangayo; kandi abaayo bangira ngu, Habaire hatariyo maraaya." 
Genesis38:23 Yuda yaagira ati: K'agume nabyo, turekye kuhemuka; ahakuba naakutweka omwana gw'embuzi, tiwaamushangayo." 
Genesis38:24 Ku haahingwireho nk'ameezi ashatu, baagambira Yuda bati: Tamari mukaamwana waawe akeegira maraaya, mbwenu aine enda y'obushambani. Yuda yaagira ati: Mumushohoze, bamunagye omu muriro." 
Genesis38:25 Ku baamushohoize, yaatuma ahari ishezaara, naagira ati: Mukama w'ebintu ebi niwe yantwekire enda; kandi ati: Ninkweshengyereza, obyetegyereze, empeta eriho akamanyiso n'orukoba n'enkoni, omanye mukama waabyo." 
Genesis38:26 Yuda yaikiriza ku biri ebye, yaagira ati: We niwe ahikiriire okunkira, ahakuba tindamuhaire Sheela mutabani wangye. Tiyaagaruka kubyama nawe obundi." 
Genesis38:27 Obunaku bwe bw'okuzaara ku bwahikire, yaareebeka aine enda y'empasha." 
Genesis38:28 Ku yaabaire naarumwa, omwe yaashohoza omukono, omuzaarisa yaagukwata, yaagukomaho akahuuzi akarikutukura, yaagira ati: Ogu niwe yaabanza kushohora." 
Genesis38:29 Bwanyima ogwo mwana ku yaabaire naagarurayo omukono, mugyenzi we yaashohora. Omuzaarisa yaagira ati: Ahabw'enki waayeyozyaho? Nikyo yaayeteirwe Pereezi." 
Genesis38:30 Bwanyima na mugyenzi we owaabaire akomire akahuuzi akarikutukura aha mukono yaazaarwa. Baamweta Zeera. 
Genesis39:1 Baatwara Yosefu Misri; Potifaari omwe aha bakuru b'engabo za Faraho kandi Omunyamisri owaabaire naategyeka abarinzi, yaamugura aha Baishimaeli abaamutwaireyo." 
Genesis39:2 MUKAMA yaaguma hamwe na Yosefu, yaaba omunyamigisha. Yaaguma omu ka ya mukama we Omunyamisri." 
Genesis39:3 Mukama we yaareeba oku MUKAMA ari hamwe nawe, kandi oku MUKAMA amuhaire omugisha omuri byona ebi arikukora." 
Genesis39:4 Yosefu yaashongoka ahari mukama we, yaamuheereza, mukama we yaamugira omureeberezi w'eka ye na byona ebi yaabaire atungire yaabimukwatsa." 
Genesis39:5 Ku yaaherize kumugira omureeberezi w'eka ye kandi ow'ebintu byona ebi yaabaire aine, MUKAMA yaaha eka y'ogwo Munyamisri omugisha ahabwa Yosefu; kandi omugisha gwa MUKAMA gwaza ahari byona ebi yaabaire aine, eby'omuka n'eby'omu misiri." 
Genesis39:6 Yaakwatsa Yosefu ebi yaabaire aine byona; tiyaagaruka kufa aha kintu kyona eki yaabaire aine, kureka eby'okurya byonka, ebi yaabaire arya. Yosefu akaba anyeetsire gye, aine ahamaisho harungi." 
Genesis39:7 Bwanyima y'ebyo muka mukama we yaamureeba, yaamurigira, yaagira ati: Ija tubyame hamwe." 
Genesis39:8 Kwonka Yosefu yaayanga, yaagira muka mukama we ati: Reeba, mukama wangye taine ki arikumanya omuri egi ka; akankwatsa ebi aine byona;" 
Genesis39:9 egi ka tihariho orikuginkiramu; kandi tihariho ki atarandekuriire, kureka iwe wenka, ahabw'okuba ori omukazi we. Mbwenu nimbaasa nta kukora ekibi ekirikwingana kityo, n'okucumura ahari Ruhanga?" 
Genesis39:10 Kandi n'obu araabe yaabaire abimugambira obutoosha, Yosefu akaba ataikiriza kubyama nawe, n'obu kwakuba okuguma nawe." 
Genesis39:11 Eizooba rimwe Yosefu ku yaataahire omu nju kukora omurimo gwe, hataine mushaija weena ow'omuri egyo ka orimu," 
Genesis39:12 omukazi yaamukwata ekijwaro, yaamugira ati: Ija tubyame hamwe. Yosefu yaatsiga ekyo kijwaro omu ngaro ze, yaahunga, yaashohora aheeru." 
Genesis39:13 Omukazi ku yaareebire yaamutsigira ekijwaro kye, yaahunga," 
Genesis39:14 yaayeta abashaija b'omu ka ye, yaabagira ati: Reeba, bakareeta Omuheburaayo okutweshungiraho; mbwenu yantaahirira kubyama naanye, naateera enduuru;" 
Genesis39:15 ku yaahurira naayamuza ninteera enduuru, yaatsigaho ekijwaro kye, yaahunga, yaashohora aheeru." 
Genesis39:16 Omukazi nikwo kweta ekyokijwaro haihi, okuhitsya ahu mukama we yaagarukiire omuka," 
Genesis39:17 akamuteekyerereza ebigambo ebyo byona, oku bibaire, ati: Omwiru Omuheburaayo, ou waatureeteire, yantaahirira kunyeshungiraho;" 
Genesis39:18 ku naayamuza naateera enduuru, yantsigira ekijwaro kye, yaahunga, yaashohora." 
Genesis39:19 Mukama we ku yaahuriire ebigambo ebi omukazi we yaamugambira naagira ati: Omwiru waawe nikwo yangira, yaagira ekiniga kingi." 
Genesis39:20 Yaakwata Yosefu, yaamuta omu kihome, ahu embohe z'omugabe zaabaire ziboherwa; yaaguma okwo omu kihome." 
Genesis39:21 Kwonka MUKAMA yaaguma hamwe na Yosefu, yaamugirira embabazi, yaamuha okukundwa omurinzi w'ekihome." 
Genesis39:22 Ogwo murinzi w'ekihome yaakwatsa Yosefu embohe zoona ezaabaire ziri omu kihome; byona ebi zaabaire zikora, Yosefu niwe yaabaire abikoresa." 
Genesis39:23 Omurinzi w'ekihome tiyaagaruka kureeberera kintu kyona omu bi yaamukwatsize, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akaba ari hamwe nawe, kandi ebi yaabaire akora byona, MUKAMA akaba abiha omugisha." 
Genesis40:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo omugabuzi wa viinyo ow'omugabe wa Misri n'omuteeki we w'emigaati baagwisa kubi mukama waabo, omugabe wa Misri." 
Genesis40:2 Faraho yaagirira ekiniga abakuru abo bombi, omukuru w'abagabuzi ba viinyo n'omukuru w'abateeki b'emigaati;" 
Genesis40:3 yaabata omu kihome ekyabaire kiri omu ka y'omukuru w'abarinzi, ahu Yosefu yaabaire akomeirwe." 
Genesis40:4 Omukuru w'abarinzi yaabakwatsa Yosefu kuguma naabaheereza; baamara ebiro bari omu kihome. 
Genesis40:5 Ekiro kimwe bombi baaroota ebirooto, buri omwe ekirooto kye, kiine amakuru gaakyo, omugabuzi wa viinyo n'omuteeki w'emigaati ab'omugabe wa Misri, abaabaire bari omu kihome." 
Genesis40:6 Yosefu ku yaizire kubareeba omu kasheeshe, yaashanga bagwirwe kubi;" 
Genesis40:7 yaabuuza abo bakuru ba Faraho abaabaire bakomeirwe omu nju ya mukama we hamwe nawe, ati: Ahabw'enki eri izooba mwaimuka mugwirwe kubi?" 
Genesis40:8 Baamugarukamu bati: Turootsire ebirooto, twabura ow'okubitushobororera. Yosefu yaabagira ati: Okushoboorora shi t'okwa Ruhanga? Nimbashaba mubindootororere." 
Genesis40:9 Omugabuzi wa viinyo omukuru yaarootororera Yosefu ekirooto kye, naagira ati: Ndootsire omuzaabibu guri omu maisho gangye;" 
Genesis40:10 ogwo muzaabibu gubaire gwine amataagi ashatu; ku guginire, gwarabya, gwaragaza ebijuma byagwo byahiisa." 
Genesis40:11 Obwo ekikopo kya Faraho kindi omu ngaro; naacwa ebyo bijuma, naabikamuurira omu kikopo kya Faraho, naakimukwatsa omu ngaro." 
Genesis40:12 Yosefu yaamugira ati: Aga nigo makuru gaakyo: ago mataagi ashatu nibyo biro bishatu; 
Genesis40:13 omuri ebyo biro bishatu Faraho naija kwimutsya omutwe gwawe akugarure omu bugabuzi bwawe, oheereze Faraho ekikopo kye, nk'oku waabaire omuheereza okiri omugabuzi we wa viinyo." 
Genesis40:14 Ku oriba waabaire gye, naakweshengyereza onyijukye, ongirire embabazi, ongambe owa Faraho, onyihise omuri egi nju." 
Genesis40:15 Omanye ku naihirwe omu nsi y'Abaheburaayo; kandi na kunu tinkakorayoga ekyakuntaisize omu kihome. 
Genesis40:16 Omuteeki w'emigaati omukuru ku yaareebire ebi yaamushobororera byaba birungi, yaagambira Yosefu ati: Naanye ndootsire nyekoreire ebitemere bishatu by'emigaati." 
Genesis40:17 Aha kitemere eky'aha mutwe gw'ebindi hariho emigaati y'emiringo yoona ningitwarira Faraho; enyonyi zaija, zaagindiira aha mutwe ahari ekyo kitemere." 
Genesis40:18 Yosefu yaamugarukamu ati: Aga nigo makuru gaakyo; ebitemere ebyo ebishatu nibyo biro bishatu; 
Genesis40:19 omuri ebyo biro bishatu Faraho naija kwimutsya omutwe gwawe, agucweho, akuhanikye aha muti, amahungu gakushokoorereho." 
Genesis40:20 Aha kiro kya kashatu, aha izooba ry'okwijuka okuzaarwa kwa Faraho, yaateekyera abairu be boona obugyenyi; yaimutsya omutwe gw'omugabuzi wa viinyo omukuru n'ogw'omuteeki w'emigaati omukuru ahagati y'abairu be;" 
Genesis40:21 yaagarura omukuru w'abagabuzi ba viinyo omu bugabuzi bwe, yaaguma naabonetsya Faraho omu kikopo kye." 
Genesis40:22 Kwonka omuteeki w'emigaati omukuru yaamuhanika, nk'oku Yosefu yaashoboroire amakuru g'ebirooto byabo." 
Genesis40:23 Kwonka omugabuzi wa viinyo omukuru tiyaijuka Yosefu, yaamwebwa." 
Genesis41:1 Ku haahingwireho emyaka ebiri, Faraho yaaroota ayemereire aha rubaju rw'omugyera;" 
Genesis41:2 omuri ogwo mugyera haarugamu ente nungi mushanju ezigomokire, zaayahukira ekibingo, zaarya." 
Genesis41:3 Bwanyima haakurataho ezindi nte mbi mushanju ezihweire aha magufa, nazo niziruga omu mugyera; zaayemerera na ziri aha nkungu." 
Genesis41:4 Embi ezihweire aha magufa zaarya ezo enungi mushanju ezigomokire. Bwanyima Faraho yaasisiimuka.
