Genesis41:5 Yaagaruka yaagwejegyera, yaaroota ekirooto kya kabiri; yaareeba ebishiisha by'engano mushanju birungi by'enjuma, biri aha mushengye gumwe;" 
Genesis41:6 kandi otundi tushiisha mushanju otwomiibwe omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba natwo twakurataho, twamera." 
Genesis41:7 Otushiisha otwo twamira ebishiisha mushanju ebirungi eby'enjuma. Faraho ku yaasisiimukire, yaashanga kiri ekirooto." 
Genesis41:8 Omu kasheeshe yaimuka ashobeirwe, yaatuma ku bamwetera abafumu boona ab'omuri Misri, n'abanyabwengye baamwo boona, yaabarootororera ebirooto bye, kwonka tihaabaho n'omwe owaabaasa kubimushobororera." 
Genesis41:9 Bwanyima omugabuzi wa viinyo omukuru yaagambira Faraho ati: Eri izooba naijuka eby'orubanja rwangye ruri; 
Genesis41:10 Faraho akaba agwereirwe kubi abairu be, yanta omu kihome omu nju y'omukuru w'abarinzi hamwe n'omukuru w'abateeki b'emigaati." 
Genesis41:11 Ekiro kimwe twembi twaroota ebirooto, buri omwe ekirooto kye kiine amakuru gaakyo." 
Genesis41:12 Omu kihome ekyo tukaba turimu n'omutsigazi Omuheburaayo, omwiru w'omukuru w'abarinzi. Twamurootororera ebirooto byaitu, yaabitushobororera, buri omwe nk'ekirooto kye oku kyabaire kiri." 
Genesis41:13 Kandi nk'oku yaatushobororeire, nikwo byabaire; nyowe naagarurwa omu bugabuzi bwangye, mugyenzi wangye yaahanikwa." 
Genesis41:14 Bwanyima Faraho yaatuma kweta Yosefu, baarahuka baamwiha omu kihome, yaamwaisa eishokye, yaajwara ebindi bijwaro, yaataaha owa Faraho." 
Genesis41:15 Faraho yaagambira Yosefu ati: Ndootsire ekirooto, haabura ow'okukinshobororera; mbwenu mpuriire nibakugambaho ngu, ku bakurootororera ekirooto, okishoboorora." 
Genesis41:16 Yosefu yaagarukamu Faraho naagira ati: Tiinye; Ruhanga niwe araagarukyemu Faraho eby'obusingye. 
Genesis41:17 Faraho yaagambira Yosefu ati: Ndootsire nyemereire aha nkungu y'omugyera. 
Genesis41:18 Omuri ogwo mugyera haarugamu ente nungi mushanju ezigomokire, zaayahukira ekibingo, zaarya." 
Genesis41:19 Bwanyima zaakuratwa ezindi nte mbi mushanju ezihweire aha magufa, ente mbi ezi ntakareebaga mu nsi yoona eya Misri." 
Genesis41:20 Ente ezo embi ezihweire aha magufa zaarya ziri omushanju enungi ezigomokire ez'okubanza. 
Genesis41:21 Ku ziherize kuzirya, waashusha oti tizaazirya; zaaguma ziri mbi nk'okubanza. Bwanyima naasisiimuka." 
Genesis41:22 Naagaruka naaroota nindeeba ebishiisha mushanju birungi by'enjuma, biri aha mushengye gumwe;" 
Genesis41:23 kandi otundi tushiisha mushanju tuhotokire, twomiibwe omuyaga ogw'oburugwa-izooba, natwo twakurataho twamera;" 
Genesis41:24 otwo tushiisha twamira ebishiisha ebirungi mushanju. Naabirootororera abafumu, kwonka haabura owaabaasa kubinshobororera." 
Genesis41:25 Yosefu yaagambira Faraho ati: Ebirooto bya Faraho nibishushana; Ruhanga ayorekire Faraho eki arikwenda kukora 
Genesis41:26 Ente mushanju enungi niyo myaka mushanju; n'ebishiisha mushanju ebirungi nayo n'emyaka mushanju; ekirooto ni kimwe. 
Genesis41:27 Kandi n'ente ezindi mushanju embi ezihweire aha magufa, ezikuratsire ziri n'emyaka mushanju, n'otushiisha mushanju otutarimu njuma otwomiibwe omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba; egyo eryaba emyaka mushanju y'enjara." 
Genesis41:28 Ekyo nikyo naagambira Faraho nti: Ruhanga akworekire, iwe Faraho, eki arikwenda kukora." 
Genesis41:29 Reeba nihaija kubaho emyaka mushanju ey'omweru mwingi omu nsi yoona eya Misri; 
Genesis41:30 bwanyima y'egyo haryabaho emyaka mushanju ey'enjara, omweru gwona gwebe omu nsi ya Misri; egyo njara eryamaraho ensi." 
Genesis41:31 Omweru guryaba gutakiijukwa mu nsi ahabw'enjara erikurataho, ahabw'okuba eryaba nyingi munonga." 
Genesis41:32 Ekireeteire Faraho okuroota ekirroto ekyo omu miringo ebiri n'ahabw'okuba kitairweho Ruhanga, kandi niwe arikwija kukihikiiriza juba." 
Genesis41:33 Mbwenu nu Faraho asherure omuntu orikwetegyereza kandi omunyabwengye, amuhe obushoboorozi bw'okutegyeka ensi ya Misri." 
Genesis41:34 Faraho akore atyo, ateho ab'okureeberera ensi, bahunikise ekicweka kya kataano ky'eby'okurya by'ensi yoona eya Misri omu myaka mushanju ey'omweru;" 
Genesis41:35 bateeranire hamwe ebirikuhunikwa byona eby'omu myaka egyo emirungi eyaaza kwija, babihunikye omu ndembo, babirinde biri omu bushoboorozi bwa Faraho." 
Genesis41:36 Eby'okurya ebyo biryabiikirwa ensi ahabw'emyaka mushanju ey'enjara, eribaho omu nsi ya Misri, ensi erekye kwitwa enjara." 
Genesis41:37 Ekyo kigambo kyasiimwa Faraho n'abaheereza be boona. 
Genesis41:38 Farao yaabuuza abaheereza be ati: Ebyo tukaabaasa kubona omuntu orikushusha nk'ogu, oine Omwoyo wa Ruhanga?" 
Genesis41:39 Faraho yaagambira Yosefu ati: Nk'oku Ruhanga akworekire ebyo byona, tihariho ondiijo orikwetegyereza kandi omunyabwengye nkaiwe." 
Genesis41:40 Naakuha okutegyeka eka yangye, kandi abantu bangye boona baryatwaza nk'oku oribaragiira; kureka eki ndikweshumbya n'ekitebe ky'obugabe kyonka." 
Genesis41:41 Faraho yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Reeba, naakuha obushoboorozi bw'okutegyeka ensi yoona eya Misri." 
Genesis41:42 Faraho yaajuura empeta ye eriho akamanyiso omu rukumu rwe, yaagijweka Yosefu omu rukumu; yaamujweka n'ebijwaro birungi bya kitaani, kandi n'omukuufu gw'ezaabu omu bitsya;" 
Genesis41:43 yaamugyendeseza omu kigaari ekya kabiri aha kye, baateera akaari omu maisho ge, nibagira bati: Mumutsimbire amaju. Yaamuha obushoboorozi kutegyeka ensi yoona eya Misri." 
Genesis41:44 Faraho yaagambira Yosefu ati: Nk'oku ndi Faraho, tihariho muntu weena oriimutsya omukono n'obu kyakuba ekigyere omu nsi yoona eya Misri, otamwikiriize." 
Genesis41:45 Faraho yaakubya Yosefu Zafunasi-panea; yaamuha Asenasi, muhara wa Potifeera omunyamurwa wa Oni kumushwera. Okuruga aho Yosefu yaarambura ensi ya Misri." 
Genesis41:46 Yosefu akaba ahikize emyaka makumi ashatu, obu yaayemerera omu maisho ga Faraho omugabe wa Misri. Yosefu yaaruga omu maisho ga Faraho, yaaza kurambura ensi yoona eya Misri." 
Genesis41:47 Omu myaka egyo mushanju ey'omweru ensi tiyaayeza, yaacwa ebintu." 
Genesis41:48 Yosefu yaateeranira hamwe eby'okurya ebirikuhunikwa byona ebi baasharwire omu myaka mushanju eyaabaireho omu nsi ya Misri, yaabihunikisa omu ndembo; eby'okurya by'omu misiri eyaabaire eba eyehinguririize buri rurembo, nimwo yaabaire abihunika." 
Genesis41:49 Yosefu yaahunika eby'okurya bingi munonga ebirikwingana n'omusheenyi ogw'aha nyanja, okuhitsya obu yaarekire kubara; ahakuba bikaba bitakibaasa kubarwa." 
Genesis41:50 Enjara etakateire, Yosefu akazaara abaana b'aboojo babiri, abu Asenasi muhara wa Potifeera omunyamurwa wa Oni yaamuzaariire." 
Genesis41:51 O'womujigaijo yaamweta Manaase, naagira ati: Ahakuba Ruhanga akanyebesa okufa kubi kwangye kwona n'eka ya taata yoona." 
Genesis41:52 Owa kabiri yaamweta Efuraimu, naagira ati: Ahakuba Ruhanga ampeereire oruzaaro omu nsi ei naareebeiremu enaku." 
Genesis41:53 Egyo myaka mushanju ey'omweru eyaabaireho omu nsi ya Misri yaahwa. 
Genesis41:54 Emyaka mushanju ey'enjara yaatandika, nk'oku Yosefu yaagambire; enjara yaabuga ensi zoona, kwonka omu nsi ya Misri yoona hakaba harimu eby'okurya." 
Genesis41:55 Ensi yoona eya Misri ku yaateirwe enjara, baayetuurira Faraho ngu abahe eby'okurya. Faraho yaagambira Abanyamisri boona ati: Muze owa Yosefu; eki araabagambire kyona, mukikore." 
Genesis41:56 Enjara yaabuga ensi yoona. Yosefu yaigura ebitara byona, yaashakisa Abanyamisri; enjara yaaba nyingi omu nsi ya Misri." 
Genesis41:57 Ab'omu nsi zoona baija ahari Yosefu omuri Misri kushaka eby'okurya, ahakuba enjara ekaba eri nyingi omu nsi yoona." 
Genesis42:1 Yakobo ku yaahuriire ngu omuri Misri hariyo eby'okurya, yaagira abatabani ati: Ahabw'enki nimureebana aha riisho?" 
Genesis42:2 Yaagira ati: Reeba, mpuriire ngu Misri hariyo eby'okurya; mwirooko muzeyo, mutushakire eby'okurya, bitutambire tutafa." 
Genesis42:3 Bakuru ba Yosefu ikumi baashuuma, baaza Misri kushaka;" 
Genesis42:4 kwonka Benyamiini murumuna wa Yosefu, Yakobo tiyaamwohereza na bakuru be; ahakuba akatiina ngu shana atakaaguubwaho akabi." 
Genesis42:5 Batabani ba Israeli baija n'abandi abaizire kushaka, ahakuba enjara ekaba eri nyingi omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Genesis42:6 Obwo Yosefu niwe yaabaire ari omutegyeki w'ensi egyo, kandi naashakisa ab'omuri egyo nsi boona eby'okurya. Bakuru ba Yosefu baija, baamugwa omu maisho, bainama." 
Genesis42:7 Yosefu ku yaareebire bakuru be, yaabamanya, kwonka yaayehindura nk'omunyaihanga aharibo, yaabakabukira, yaababuuza ati: Nimuruga hi? Banu bati: Nituruga omu nsi ya Kanaani, twizire kusahaka." 
Genesis42:8 Yosefu yaamanya bakuru be, kwonka bo tibaamumanya." 
Genesis42:9 Yosefu yaijuka ebirooto biri ebi yaabarootsireho; yaabagira ati: Muri entatsi; mwizire kureeba ahu ensi etaine maani. 
Genesis42:10 Baamugarukamu bati: Ngaaha, mukama waitu; abairu baawe tureetsirwe okushaka." 
Genesis42:11 Twena turi eishe-emwe; turi abantu b'amazima, abairu baawe tituri ntatsi." 
Genesis42:12 Yaabagira ati: Ngaaha; mwizire kureeba ahu ensi etaine maani. 
Genesis42:13 Baamugarukamu bati: Abairu baawe turi eishe-emwe ikumi na babiri, abaana b'omushaija omwe omu nsi ya Kanaani; murumuna waitu omuto hati tariho, atsigaire na tataitwe, kandi ondiijo takibaho." 
Genesis42:14 Yosefu yaabagira ati: Ekyo nikyo naabagirira nti, muri entatsi." 
Genesis42:15 Mbwenu aha niho muraamanyirwe; nindahira Faraho, timurikwija kuruga aha, murumuna waanyu omuto atakaizire." 
Genesis42:16 Mutume omwe ahariimwe, areete murumuna waanyu, abandi mutsigare mubohirwe, ebigambo byanyu bibone kuhamibwa, tumanye ku muri ab'amazima; ku kiraabe kitabaire kityo, nindahira Faraho, buzima muri entatsi." 
Genesis42:17 Boona yaabata omu kihome okumara ebiro bishatu. 
Genesis42:18 Aha kiro kya kashatu Yosefu yaabagira ati: Mukore muti, nimwija kukira; ahakuba nintiina Ruhanga." 
Genesis42:19 Ku muraabe muri ab'amazima, omwe ahariimwe atsigare omu nju y'ekihome ahu mubaire mukomeirwe; abandi mugyende mutware eby'okurya ahabw'enjara y'omu maka gaanyu;" 
Genesis42:20 bwanyima mundeetere murumuna waanyu omuto; obwo ebigambo byanyu biryahamibwa, timurifa. Nabo baatwaza batyo." 
Genesis42:21 Baagambirana bonka bati: Buzima twine orubanja ahabwa murumuna waitu; ahakuba tukareeba aine obusaasi omu mutima, obu yaatweshengyereza, tukanga kumuhurira; nikyo kyatureetera akabi aka." 
Genesis42:22 Reubeeni yaabagarukamu naagira ati: Tindabagambiire nti: Mutakora kubi omwana, mukanga kumpurira? Mbwenu reeba, twazira eshagama ye." 
Genesis42:23 Kwonka tibaamanya ku Yosefu yaabahurira, ahabw'okuba akaba naagambirirwa omuhinduzi." 
Genesis42:24 Yosefu yaabateera amabega, yaarira; bwanyima yaagaruka ahu bari, yaagamba nabo, yaabaihamu Simeoni, yaamukomera omu maisho gaabo." 
Genesis42:25 Okuruga aho Yosefu yaaragiira kwijuza enshaho zaabo eby'okurya, n'okugarura efeeza ya buri muntu omu nshaho ye, n'okubaha entanda y'okuriira omu muhanda; okwo nikwo baabakoreire." 
Genesis42:26 Banu baata eby'okurya byabo aha ndogoya zaabo, baagyenda." 
Genesis42:27 Ku baahikire omu icumbi, omwe aharibo yaakomorora enshaho ye okuriisa endogoya, yaashanga efeeza ye eri omu minwa yaayo;" 
Genesis42:28 yaagambira bagyenzi be ati: Efeeza yangye baagingarurira; reeba ngigi omu nshaho yangye; baahuruutuka emitima, bahindukirana nibatetema, nibagira bati: Eki n'enki eki Ruhanga yaatukorera?" 
Genesis42:29 Ku baahikire ahari Yakobo ishebo omu nsi ya Kanaani, baamugambira byona ebyababaireho, nibagira bati:" 
Genesis42:30 Omushaija orikutegyeka egyo nsi akatukabukira, yaatweta abaizire kutata ensi;" 
Genesis42:31 naitwe twamugira tuti: Turi ab'amazima, tituri ntatsi;" 
Genesis42:32 turi eishe-emwe ikumi na babiri, abaana b'omushaija omwe; omwe takibaho, kandi na murumuna waitu omuto atsigaire n'omugurusi waitu omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Genesis42:33 Omushaija ogwo orikutegyeka ensi yaatugira ati: Eki nikyo kirimmanyisa ku muri ab'amazima. Muntsigire omwe ahariimwe, mutware eby'okurya ahabw'enjara y'omu maka gaanyu, mugyende;" 
Genesis42:34 mundeetere murumuna waanyu omuto; niho ndimanyira ku mutari ntatsi, kureka ku muri ab'amazima; reero naanye ndyabagarurira mugyenzi waanyu, mubone kushuubura omu nsi egi." 
Genesis42:35 Ku baabaire nibaiha eby'okurya omu nshaho zaabo, buri muntu yaashanga ekifunyika ky'efeeza kiri omu nshaho ye; bo na ishebo ku baareebire ebifunyika by'efeeza, baatiina." 
Genesis42:36 Ishebo Yakobo yaabagira ati: Mbwenu ho mwancwa; Yosefu takibaho, na Simeoni tariho; mbwenu nimwenda kuunyihaho na Benyamiini. Ebyo byona niinye biiziire!" 
Genesis42:37 Reubeeni yaagira ishe ati: Ku ndiba ntamukugaruriire, oite batabani bangye bombi; munkwatse, ndyamukugarurira." 
Genesis42:38 Onu ati: Omwana wangye tarikwija kugyenda naimwe; ahabw'okuba mukuru we akafa, niwe atsigaireho wenka; akabi katakaamuhikaho, mukandeetera obujune bukampuhura, nkashuuma okuzimu nk'oku murikundeeba n'ezi nju." 
Genesis43:1 Enjara yaagumizamu kuba nyingi omu nsi. 
Genesis43:2 Aba Yakobo ku baaherize engano ezi baihire Misri, ishebo yaabagira ati: Mugarukyeyo, mutushakire ak'okurya." 
Genesis43:3 Yuda yaamugarukamu ati: Omushaija ou twakugambiire akatwehanangiriza, naagira ati: Timuringaruka mu maisho, mutareetsire murumuna waanyu." 
Genesis43:4 Ku oraatwohereze na murumuna waitu, nitwija kuzayo, tukushakire;" 
Genesis43:5 kwonka ku oraabe otamwohereize, titurikuzayo; ahabw'okuba ogwo mushaija akatugira ati: Timuringaruka mumaisho mutaine murumuna waanyu." 
Genesis43:6 Israeli yaababuuza ati: Ahabw'enki mwangiriire kubi mutyo, mukagambira ogwo mushaija, ku mwine murumuna waanyu ondiijo?" 
Genesis43:7 Baamugarukamu bati: Omushaija ogwo akatubuuza naatucondooza, oku turi, n'ab'owaitu, kandi yaatugira ati: Shoimwe akibaho? Mwineho murumuna waanyu ondiijo? Naitwe twamugarukamu, nk'oku yaatubuurize. Tukaba nitumanya ku arikwenda kugira ati: Mureete murumuna waanyu?" 
Genesis43:8 Yuda yaagambira Israeli ishe ati: Omwojo mwohereze, agyende naanye, twimukye tugyende, tukize amagara gaitu, tutafa, itwe naiwe n'abaana baitu abato." 
Genesis43:9 Nyowe ndyamwemererera; niinye orimubuuza. Ku ndiba ntamugarwire, nkamuhitsya omu maisho gaawe, obwo ndyagiibwaho orubanja orutarindugaho ebiro byona;" 
Genesis43:10 ahakuba kuri tutareeziringire, buzima hati kuri twagarukire omurundi gwa kabiri." 
Genesis43:11 Israeli ishebo yaabagira ati: Ku kiraabe nikwo kiri, mugire muti; mutware aha bijuma by'ensi egi ebirikukira oburungi omu nshaho zaanyu, mubitoijere ogwo mushaija hamwe n'omubazi mukye, n'obwoki bukye, n'emigaju na sumuruna, n'ebinyobwa, n'endozi;" 
Genesis43:12 kandi mutware efeeza ezirikwingana na ziri kabiri, n'efeeza ezaagarwirwe omu minwa y'enshaho zaanyu nazo muzitware; shana bakakikora batakimanyire." 
Genesis43:13 Kandi mutware murumuna waanyu, mwimukye mugarukye ow'ogwo mushaija." 
Genesis43:14 Kandi Ruhanga Ow'obushoboorozi bwona abahe omugisha, ogwo mushaija abagirire embabazi, abagarurire mugyenzi waanyu na Benyamiini. Ku ndiba naafeereirwe abaana bangye, biri naafeereirwe." 
Genesis43:15 Abo bashaija baatwara egyo mitoijo, n'efeeza eziri nka ziri kabiri, baatwara na Benyamiini, baimuka baashuuma Misri, baayemerera omu maisho ga Yosefu." 
Genesis43:16 Yosefu ku yaareebire baine Benyamiini, yaagambira omubiiki w'eby'omuka ye ati: Twara abashaija aba omuka, obabaagire, otebeekanise byona, ahakuba abashaija aba nibaija kurya naanye omu ihangwe." 
Genesis43:17 Omubiiki yaakora nk'oku Yosefu yaamugambira, yaatwara abo bashaija omu k ya Yosefu." 
Genesis43:18 Baatiina ahabw'okutwarwa omu nju ya Yosefu; baagira bati: Eki baatutaahiza omu n'ahabw'efeeza ezaagarwirwe omu nshaho zaitu obw'okubanza, ngu agire eki yaatureebaho, atugurukire atukwate, atugire abahuuku, kandi anyagye n'endogoya zaitu." 
Genesis43:19 Bairira haihi omubiiki w'eby'omu nju ya Yosefu, baagambira nawe aha muryango gw'enju," 
Genesis43:20 nibagira bati: Mukama waitu, n'eky'amazima, tukaija omurundi gw'okubanza kushaka;" 
Genesis43:21 ku twahikire omu icumbi, twakomorora enshaho zaitu, twashanga efeeza za buri muntu ziri omu minwa y'enshaho ye, zoona ziri nk'oku zaabaire ziri; mbwenu nzizi, twazigarura." 
Genesis43:22 Kandi twareeta n'ezindi kushaka eby'okurya; titurikumanya owaazitaire omu nshaho zaitu. 
Genesis43:23 Yaabagira ati: Muhuumure, mutatiina; Ruhanga waanyu, kandi Ruhanga wa shoimwe niwe yaataire obutungi omu nshaho zaanyu. Nyowe nkaakiira efeeza zaanyu. Yaabashohoreza Simeoni." 
Genesis43:24 Yaabataasya omu nju ya Yosefu, yaabaha amaizi g'okunaaba aha bigyere; yaaha n'endogoya zaabo eby'okurya." 
Genesis43:25 Baatebeekanisa emitoijo y'okuha Yosefu yaija omu ihangwe; ahakuba bakahurira ngu, nibaija kuriirayo." 
Genesis43:26 Yosefu ku yaagarukire omuka, baamushangisa omu nju emitoijo ei baareetsire, baamwinamira." 
Genesis43:27 Yaababuuza oku bari, kandi ati: Shoimwe agumire, omugurusi ou mwagambireho? Akibaho?" 
Genesis43:28 Banu bati: Omwiru waawe tataitwe akiriho agumire? Bainika emitwe, baamuramya." 
Genesis43:29 Yaanaga amaisho, yaareeba Benyamiini mwene nyina, yaababuuza ati: Ogu niwe murumuna waanyu omuto ou mwangambiire? Yaamugambira ati: Ruhanga akugirire embabazi mwana wangye." 
Genesis43:30 Yosefu yaarahuka kubarugaho, ahakuba akaba ainiire mwene nyina orushusho ruhango; yaasherura ah'okuririra, yaataaha omu kishengye kye, yaaririramu." 
Genesis43:31 Bwanyima yaanaaba ah'amaisho, yaashohora, yaayegumya, yaagira ati: Mwihure eby'okurya." 
Genesis43:32 Baamugaburira ahakwe, na bari ahakwabo, n'Abanyamisri abaabaire barya nawe nabo ahakwabo, ahabw'okuba Abanyamisri bakaba batarya n'Abaheburaayo; kikaba kiri ekihagaro aha Banyamisri." 
Genesis43:33 Beene ishe baashutama omu maisho ge, nk'oku barikukuratana omu kuzaarwa okuruga aha mukuru okuhika aha muto; baareebana nibatangaara." 
Genesis43:34 Yosefu yaababegyera ebitongye aha by'okurya ebyabaire biri omu maisho ge, kwonka ekitongye kya Benyamiini kyakira ekya buri omwe aharibo emirundi etaano. Bwanyima baanywa, baashemererwa hamwe nawe." 
Genesis44:1 Bwanyima Yosefu yaaragiira omubiiki w'eby'omu nju ye ati: mwijuze enshaho z'abo bashaija, nk'oku omuntu weena arikubaasa kwekorera, ote n'efeeza ya buri muntu omu minwa y'enshaho ye," 
Genesis44:2 kandi ote ekikopo kyangye ky'efeeza omu minwa y'enshaho ya murumuna waabo omuto hamwe n'efeeza ei yaabaire areetsire kushakisa. Nawe yaatwaza nk'oku Yosefu yaamuragiira. 
Genesis44:3 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurukana, abo bashaija baaragwa, baagyenda n'endogoya zaabo." 
Genesis44:4 Ku baabaire baaruga omu rurembo, batakahikire hare, Yosefu yaagira omubiiki we ati: Imuka okurate abo bashaija; ku oraabahikye, obabuuze oti: Ahabw'enki mwaihura obubi, haza mugiriirwe gye? Ahanki mwaiba ekikopo kye ky'efeeza?" 
Genesis44:5 Tikyo mukama wangye anywaisa, kandi tikyo aragurisa? Mukozire kubi okukora mutyo." 
Genesis44:6 Ku yaabahikire, yaabagambira ebigambo ebyo." 
Genesis44:7 Baamugarukamu bati: Mukama wangye, ahabw'enki waatugambira ebigambo nk'ebyo? Nikikabure abairu baawe okukora ekintu nk'ekyo!" 
Genesis44:8 Noomanya ngu efeeza ezi twashangire omu minwa y'enshaho zaitu tukazikugarurira, obu twaruga Kanaani. Mbwenu nitubaasa tuta kwiba efeeza nari ezaabu eby'omu nju ya mukama waawe?" 
Genesis44:9 Weena ou oraashangye akiine omu bairu baawe, afe, kandi naitwe tube abahuuku ba mukama waitu." 
Genesis44:10 Nawe yaagira ati: Mbwenu hati kibe nk'oku mwagamba. Ou turaashangye akiine, niwe araabe omuhuuku wangye; haza obwo abandi nimurugwaho orubanja." 
Genesis44:11 Baarahuka, buri muntu yaata enshaho ye ahansi, yaagikomorora." 
Genesis44:12 Omushaija ogwo yaacaaka, naatandikira aha mukuru okuhitsya obu yaahikire aha muto; ekikopo kyashangwa omu nshaho ya Benyamiini." 
Genesis44:13 Baatagura ebijwaro byabo, buri muntu yaata ebintu bye aha ndogoya ye, baagaruka omu rurembo." 
Genesis44:14 Yuda na bagyenzi be baahika omu nju ya Yosefu, baashanga akiri aho, baagwa ahansi omu maisho ge." 
Genesis44:15 Yosefu yaabagira ati: Eki eki mukozire n'enki? Timurikumanya ngu omuntu nkaanye nimbaasa kuragura? 
Genesis44:16 Yuda yaagira ati: Mbwenu nitukyenda kukugambira ki, mukama waitu? Ekindi tugambe ki? Nari shi twetonganire tuta? Ruhanga asherembwire obubi bw'abairu baawe. Mbwenu twaba abahuuku ba mukama waitu, hamwe n'ou baashanga aine ekikopo." 
Genesis44:17 Kwonka Yosefu yaagira ati: Nikikabure nyowe okukora ntyo; kureka omushaija ou baashanga aine ekikopo, niwe araabe omuhuuku wangye; haza imwe mwegyendere n'obusingye, mugarukye owa shoimwe." 
Genesis44:18 Yuda nikwo kumwirira haihi, akamugira ati: Mukama wangye, ninkweshengyereza reka omwiru waawe agire eki yaakugambira; kandi otagirira omwiru waawe ekiniga, Mukama wangye; ahakuba ori nka Faraho buzima." 
Genesis44:19 Mukama wangye akabuuza abairu be, naagira ati: Mwine shoimwe, nari murumuna waanyu ondiijo?" 
Genesis44:20 Twagarukamu mukama wangye tuti: Twine tataitwe, n'omugurusi, kandi na murumuna waitu ou yaazaire yaakuzire; mukuru we akafa, niwe atsigaireho omu nda ya nyina, kandi ishe naamukunda." 
Genesis44:21 Naiwe waagambira abairu baawe, oti: Mumundeetere, mmureebe;" 
Genesis44:22 naitwe twagambira mukama wangye tuti: Omwana ogwo tarikubaasa kutsigaho ishe; ahakuba ku yaakumutsigaho, ishe akaafa." 
Genesis44:23 Waagarukamu abairu baawe oti: Murumuna waanyu omuto ku ariba ataizire naimwe, timuringaruka mumaisho." 
Genesis44:24 Ku twagarukire aha mwiru waawe tataitwe, twamugambira ebigambo bya mukama wangye." 
Genesis44:25 Bwanyima tataitwe yaagira ati: Mugarukyeyo, mutugurire ak'okurya." 
Genesis44:26 Naitwe twagira tuti: Titurikubaasa kuzayo; murumuna waitu omuto ku araagyende naitwe, obwo naitwe nitwija kuzayo; ahakuba tituribaasa kugaruka ogwo mushaija mumaisho, kureka murumuna waitu omuto yaagyenda naitwe." 
Genesis44:27 N'ahabw'ekyo omwiru waawe taata aktugira ati: Nimumanya ku omukazi wangye yanzaariire aboojo babiri; 
Genesis44:28 omwe akandugaho, naateekateeka nti: Buzima akataagataagurwa; kandi n'okuhitsya hati tinkamureebaga." 
Genesis44:29 Mbwenu ku muraanyiheho n'ogu, haagira ekyamubaho, nimwija kundeetera obujune bumpuhure, nshuume okuzimu nk'oku murikundeeba n'ezi nju." 
Genesis44:30 N'ahabw'ekyo ku ndigaruka aha mwiru waawe taata, omwojo tutamwine, yaareeba tutaija nawe, aryafa," 
Genesis44:31 ahabw'okuba amagara ge gakwaitswe ag'ogu mwana; kandi itwe abairu baawe turyaba tureeteire omwiru waawe tataitwe obujune bw'okumuhuhura, ogwo mugurusi ashuume okuzimu n'ezo nju." 
Genesis44:32 Omanye ngu nyowe omwiru waawe niinye naayemerereire ogu mwana ahari taata, ningira nti: Ku ndiba ntamukugaruriire, ndyagiibwaho orubanja orutarindugaho." 
Genesis44:33 N'ahabw'ekyo ninkweshengyereza, Mukama wangye, mbe niinye naaguma aha, mbe omuhuuku waawe, haza omwana ogu we ataahe na bakuru be." 
Genesis44:34 Mbwenu nimbaasa nta kugaruka ahari taata, ntaine ogu mwojo? Nintiina kureeba akabi akarihika ahari taata." 
Genesis45:1 Yosefu yaaremwa kwegumya omu maisho ga boona abaabaire bamwemereire haihi, yaagira ati: Ragiira abantu boona bashohore bampigize. Tihaagira muntu weena owaatsigara na Yosefu, omu kwegambira beene ishe." 
Genesis45:2 Yaarira naaborooga munonga; Abanyamisri n'ab'omu nju ya Faraho baamuhurira. 
Genesis45:3 Yosefu yaagambira beene ishe, ati: Niinye Yosefu. Taata akibaho? Beene ishe baabura eki baamugarukamu, ahakuba bakashobererwa omu maisho ge." 
Genesis45:4 Yosefu yaagira beene ishe ati: Nimbeeshengyereza muunyirire haihi. Baamwirira haihi. Yaagira ati: Niinye Yosefu murumuna waanyu, ou mwagurize kutwarwa Misri." 
Genesis45:5 Mbwenu mutashaasha, n'obu kwakuba okwegwerwa kubi ahabw'okunguza nkaija kunu; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga niwe yantumire kubabandiza kunu kukiza amagara g'abantu." 
Genesis45:6 Ahakuba hati enjara emazire emyaka ebiri omu nsi, kandi hakiriyo endiijo myaka etaano, ei abantu batarihingiramu, n'obu kwakuba okugyesha." 
Genesis45:7 Kandi Ruhanga akantuma kubabandiza kunu ngu abakwatire eihembe omu nsi, kandi abajune omu buryo bw'okutangaaza." 
Genesis45:8 N'ahabw'ekyo tiimwe mwanyohereize kunu, ni Ruhanga; kandi angizire nk'omuzaire ahari Faraho, mukama w'eka ye yoona, kandi omutegyeki w'ensi yoona eya Misri." 
Genesis45:9 Nimwimukye mwehuute, muze owa taata, mumugire muti: Omwana waawe Yosefu atutumire naagira ati: Ruhanga angizire mukama wa wa Misri yoona; shuuma onshangye kunu, oteeziringa;" 
Genesis45:10 kandi noija kutuura omu kyanga kya Gosheni, onze haihi iwe n'abaana baawe na baijukuru baawe n'amasyo gaawe ag'entaama n'ag'ente, n'ebi oine byona." 
Genesis45:11 Okwo ndyakuheerayo eby'okurya, ahabw'okuba hakitsigaireyo endiijo myaka etaano y'enjara, otakaitwa obworo, iwe n'ab'omu ka yaawe n'abu oine boona." 
Genesis45:12 Kandi reeba, hati imwe na murumuna wangye Benyamiini nimwereebera ku niinye ndikugamba naimwe." 
Genesis45:13 Mushemereire kugambira taata eby'ekitiinisa kyangye kyona eki nyine omuri Misri, n'ebi mureebire byona; kandi murahukye mureete taata kunu." 
Genesis45:14 Yaagwa Benyamiini omurumuna omu bitsya, yaarira; na Benyamiini nawe yaarira amugwire omu bitsya." 
Genesis45:15 Kandi yaanywegyera bakuru be boona naarira; bwanyima y'ebyo bakuru be baagaaniira nawe. 
Genesis45:16 Amakuru ku gaahikire owa Faraho ngu beene ishe wa Yosefu baizire, byashemeza Faraho n'abaheereza be." 
Genesis45:17 Faraho yaagira Yosefu ati: Gambira beene sho oti: Mugire muti: Mute emitwaro aha ndogoya zaanyu, mugyende, mugarukye omu nsi ya Kanaani;" 
Genesis45:18 mureete shoimwe n'ab'omu maka gaanyu, mwije owangye; naanye ndyabaha ebirungi by'omu nsi ya Misri, naimwe murye aha bishaju byayo." 
Genesis45:19 Kandi obaragiire oti: Mutwaze muti: mutware ebigaari by'omu nsi ya Misri eby'okureetamu abaana baanyu abato n'abakazi baanyu, mureete na shoimwe, mwije." 
Genesis45:20 Kandi murekye kufa aha bintu byanyu, ahakuba ebirungi by'omu nsi yoona eya Misri n'ebyanyu." 
Genesis45:21 Beene Israeli baatwaza batyo; Yosefu yaabaha ebigaari, nk'oku Faraho aragiire, yaabaha n'entanda y'okuriira omu muhanda." 
Genesis45:22 Boona oku baingana, buri omwe yaamuha ebijwaro by'okwihaihanisa; kwonka Benyamiini we yaamuha ebicweka by'efeeza magana ashatu n'ebijwaro by'okwihaihanisa kataano." 
Genesis45:23 Kandi ishe yaamutwekyera endamutsyo y'endogoya ikumi ezeekoreire ebintu birungi bya Misri, n'ezindi ndogoya ikumi z'ebuguma ezeekoreire engano n'emigaati n'entanda ya ishe y'okuriira omu muhanda." 
Genesis45:24 Atyo yaaraga beene ishe; ku baabaire nibaimuka kugyenda, yaabagira ati: Mwerinde, mutatonganira omu muhanda." 
Genesis45:25 Bainamuka baaruga Misri, baahika omu nsi ya Kanaani ahari ishebo Yakobo," 
Genesis45:26 baamugambira bati: Yosefu abaho, kandi niwe mutegyeki w'ensi yoona eya Misri. Omutima gwe gwagwa enshazi, ahakuba tarabaikiriize." 
Genesis45:27 Baamutekyerereza ebi Yosefu yaabagambiire byona; kandi ku yaareebire ebigaari, ebi Yosefu yaatwekire kumutwara, omutima gwe gwagaruka eruguru;" 
Genesis45:28 Israeli nikwo kugira ati: Nikimara; Yosefu omwana wangye obu ariho; ka ngyende, ndeebane nawe ntakafiire." 
Genesis46:1 Atyo Israeli yaimuka, yaagyenda n'ebi yaabaire aine byona, yaahika Beerisheba, yaatambira Ruhanga wa Isaaka ishe ebitambo." 
Genesis46:2 Ruhanga yaayeta Israeli omu kworekwa kwa nyekiro, ati: Yakobo! Yakobo! Onu ati: Ndi aha, Mukama wangye." 
Genesis46:3 Yaamugira ati: Ndi Ruhanga, Ruhanga wa sho; otatiina kushuuma Misri; ahakuba okwo niyo ndikuhindurira eihanga rihango;" 
Genesis46:4 ndyashuuma naiwe Misri, kandi buzima ndyagaruka nkwiheyo; na Yosefu niwe arikukwata ahamaisho nookaba." 
Genesis46:5 Yakobo yaimuka, yaaruga Beeri-sheba; abatabani baamutwara hamwe n'abaana baabo abato n'abakazi baabo omu bigaari ebi Faraho yaatwekire kumureetamu." 
Genesis46:6 Kandi baatwara amatungo gaabo n'ebintu byabo ebi baatungiire omu nsi ya Kanaani, baaza omuri Misri, Yakobo n'oruzaaro rwe rwona," 
Genesis46:7 abatabani na batabani baabo, na bahara be, na bahara ba batabani be; orwonirwo ruzaaro rwe rwona oru yaagyenzire narwo Misri." 
Genesis46:8 Aga nigo maziina g'abaana ba Israeli abaagiire Misri, Yakobo n'abatabani; Reubeeni omujigaijo gwe;" 
Genesis46:9 batabani ba Reubeeni, Hanoki, Palu, Hezirooni na Karumi." 
Genesis46:10 Batabani ba Simeoni ni Yemueli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Zohari, na Shauli omutabani, w'Omunyakanaanikazi." 
Genesis46:11 Batabani ba Leevi ni Gereshoni, Kohasi na Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Batabani ba Yuda ni Eeri, Onani, Sheela, Pereezi na Zeera; kwonka Eeri na Onani bakafeera omu nsi ya Kanaani; batabani ba Pereezi ni Hezirooni na Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Batabani ba Isakaari ni Toola, Puuva, Yobu na Shimirooni." 
Genesis46:14 Batabani ba Zebuluuni ni Seredi, Eloni na Yahaleeli." 
Genesis46:15 Abo nibo batabani ba Lea, abu yaazaariire Yakobo omuri Padanaramu hamwe na muhara we Dina; abaana be b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki boona bakaba bari makumi ashatu na bashatu." 
Genesis46:16 Batabani ba Gaadi ni Zifioni, Haagi, Shuuni, Ezibooni, Eeri, Arodi na Areeli." 
Genesis46:17 Batabani ba Asheri ni Imuna, Ishiva, Ishivi na Beeria na munyaanyabo Seera; batabani ba Beria ni Heberi na Malikieli." 
Genesis46:18 Abo nibo baana ba Zilupa ou Labaani yaahaire Lea muhara we, kandi abo nibo yaazaariire Yakobo, abantu ikumi na mukaaga." 
Genesis46:19 Batabani ba Rakeeli muka Yakobo ni Yosefu na Benyamiini. 
Genesis46:20 Kandi Yosefu yaazaarira Manaase na Efuraimu omu nsi ya Misri, abu Asenaasi muhara wa Potifeera omunyamurwa wa Oni yaamuzaariire." 
Genesis46:21 Batabani ba Benyamiini ni Beela, Bekeri, Ashubeeli, Geera, Naamani, ehi, Roshi, Mupimu, Hupimu na Aridi." 
Genesis46:22 Abo nibo batabani ba Rakeeli abu yaazaariire Yakobo; boona bakaba bari ikumi na bana. 
Genesis46:23 Mutabani wa Daani ni Hushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Batabani ba Nafutaali ni Yahazeeli, Guuni, Yezeri na Shileemu." 
Genesis46:25 Abo nibo batabani ba Biliha ou Labaani yaahaire Rakeeli muhara we, abu yaazaariire Yakobo; boona bakaba bari mushanju." 
Genesis46:26 Abantu boona ab'omu nda ya Yakobo abaagyenzire nawe Misri, otabariiremu bakaamwana be, bakaba bari makumi mukaaga na mukaaga." 
Genesis46:27 Batabani ba Yosefu abu yaazaariire Misri bakaba bari babiri; abantu boona ab'omu ka ya Yakobo abaagiire Misri bakaba bari makumi mushanju. 
Genesis46:28 Yakobo yaatuma Yuda ahari Yosefu ku amushanga Gosheni; batyo baahika omu kyanga kya Gosheni. 
Genesis46:29 Yosefu yaaboneza ekigaari kye, yainamuka, yaaza kubugana Israeli ishe omuri Gosheni; yaamwetondera, yaamugwa omu bitsya, yaamara omwanya naarira akimuri omu bitsya." 
Genesis46:30 Israeli yaagira Yosefu ati: N'obu naakufa nka hati, niho naakureeba, nkamanya ku obaho." 
Genesis46:31 Yosefu yaagambira beene ishe n'ab'omu ka ya ishe ati: Ka ngyende ngambire Faraho, mmugira nti: Beene taata n'ab'omu ka ye abaabaire batwire omu nsi ya Kanaani naatsiga baija;" 
Genesis46:32 nti, kandi abo bashaija n'abariisa, ahakuba omurimo gwabo n'okuriisa; na mbwenu baareeta amasyo gaabo ag'entaama n'ag'ente, n'ebindi byona ebi baatungire." 
Genesis46:33 Faraho ku araabeete, yaababuuza ati: Mukora murimo ki?" 
Genesis46:34 Mumugire muti: Abairu baawe turi abariisa okwiha omu buto bwaitu n'okuhitsya hati, itwe na baatatenkuriitwe; mubone kutuura omu kyaro kya Gosheni; ahakuba omuriisa weena n'ekihagaro aha Banyamisri." 
Genesis47:1 Yosefu yaaza owa Faraho, yaamugira ati: Taata na beene taata n'amasyo gaabo ag'entaama n'ag'ente n'ebi baatungire byona barugire omu nsi ya Kanaani, hati bari omu kyanga kya Gosheni." 
Genesis47:2 Omuri beene ishe yaatooranamu bataano, yaabatondera Faraho." 
Genesis47:3 Faraho yaababuuza ati: Mukora murimo ki? Baamugarukamu bati: Abairu baawe turi abariisa, itwe na baatatenkuriitwe." 
Genesis47:4 Baagaruka baagambira Faraho bati: Twizire kushuhuukira omu nsi egi; ahakuba abairu baawe tukabura obunyaatsi bw'amasyo gaitu owaitu Kanaani, kandi hariyo n'enjara nyingi; mbwenu nitukweshengyereza, oikirize abairu baawe batuure omu kyaro kya Gosheni." 
Genesis47:5 Faraho yaagambira Yosefu ati: Sho na beene sho bakuhikire; 
Genesis47:6 ensi ya Misri ekuri omumaisho; ohe sho na beene sho ah'okutuura aharikukira oburungi; batuure omu kyanga kya Gosheni. Kandi ku oraabe oine abu orikumanyamu abarikumanya gye eby'ente, obahindure abakuru b'amasyo gangye." 
Genesis47:7 Bwanyima Yosefu yaataasya Yakobo ishe owa Faraho, yaamuta omu maisho ge; Yakobo yaashabira Faraho omugisha." 
Genesis47:8 Faraho yaabuuza Yakobo ati: Mbwenu oine emyaka engahi? 
Genesis47:9 Yakobo yaamugarukamu ati: Ebiro by'emyaka ei mmazire ningyendagyenda nibihika emyaka igana na makumi ashatu; ebiro by'egyo myaka y'amagara gangye ni bikye kandi ni bibi; terikwingana n'ei baatatenkuru baamazire omu kugyendagyenda kwabo. 
Genesis47:10 Yakobo ku yaaherize kushabira Faraho omugisha, yaashohora, yaaruga omumaisho ge." 
Genesis47:11 Yosefu yaaha ishe na beene ishe ah'okuzingura omu nsi ya Misri omu kyaro kya Rameseesi aharikukira oburungi okuba obutaka bwabo, nk'oku Faraho yaaragiire." 
Genesis47:12 Kandi Yosefu yaaguma naaha ishe eby'okurya na beene ishe n'ab'omu ka ya ishe boona, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri." 
Genesis47:13 Kandi omuri egyo nsi yoona hakaba hatarimu by'okurya; ahakuba enjara ekaba eri nyingi munonga, kyareetera ab'omu nsi ya Misri n'eya Kanaani okukuuhura ahabw'egyo njara." 
Genesis47:14 Yosefu yaateerana hamwe empiiha zoona ezaabaire ziri omu nsi ya Misri n'eya Kanaani, ezaarugire omu ngano ezi baaguzire; empiiha ezo zoona yaazireeta omu nju ya Faraho." 
Genesis47:15 Empiiha ku zaahwereire kimwe omu nsi ya Misri n'eya Kanaani, Abanyamisri boona baayetuurira Yosefu, baagira bati: Tuhe eby'okurya. Mbwenu tukugwe omumaisho ahabw'okubura empiiha?" 
Genesis47:16 Yosefu yaagira ati: Empiiha ku ziraabe zihweire, mureete amatungo gaanyu, mbaguze eby'okurya." 
Genesis47:17 Batyo baareetera Yosefu amatungo gaabo; yaabaguza eby'okurya, baamuha embaraasi n'entaama n'ente n'endogoya; omuri ogwo mwaka gwona yaabaha eby'okurya, nibabishakisa amatungo gaabo." 
Genesis47:18 Omwaka ogwo ku gwahweire, baamugarukaho omu gundi ogwakuratsireho, baamugira bati: Titurikubaasa kushereka mukama waitu ku empiiha zaitu zihwereire kimwe, kandi n'amatungo gaitu ku gabaire age; tihaine kitsigaireho omumaisho ga mukama waitu, kureka emibiri yaitu n'ebibanja byaitu." 
Genesis47:19 Mbwenu tukugwe omumaisho n'ebibanja byaitu? Otugure n'ebibanja byaitu, otuhe eby'okurya; haza itwe turyaba abahuuku ba Faraho n'ebibanja byaitu; otuhe embibo, tukire tutafa, ensi erekye kuhinduka amatongo." 
Genesis47:20 Atyo Yosefu yaagurira Faraho ensi yoona eya Misri; ahakuba Omunyamisri weena akatunda omusiri gwe, ahabw'okuba enjara ekabateera munonga. Ensi yoona yaaba eya Faraho." 
Genesis47:21 Abantu boona yaabagira abahuuku, okuruga aha rubaju rumwe rwa Misri okuhika aha rundi." 
Genesis47:22 Kwonka ebibanja by'abanyamurwa nibyo ataraguzire; ahabw'okuba abanyamurwa bakaba baine omugabo gwabo ogu baahairwe Faraho, kandi nigwo baabaire baryaho; nikyo bataratundiire bibanja byabo." 
Genesis47:23 Bwanyima Yosefu yaagambira abantu ati: Reeba, eri izooba naaheza kubagura n'ebibanja byanyu kuba ebya Faraho. Mbwenu reeba, naabaha embibo, mugyende mubibe omu misiri yaangu." 
Genesis47:24 Omu ishaaruura muryaha Faraho ekicweka kimwe kya kataano, kandi ebicweka bina bibe ebyanyu, mwiheho embibo, ebindi bibe eby'okurya byanyu n'ab'omu maka gaanyu hamwe n'abaana baanyu abato." 
Genesis47:25 Baagarukamu bati: Otutambiire, titwafa; Mukama waitu, na mbwenu otugirire embabazi, nitwija kuguma turi abahuuku ba Faraho." 
Genesis47:26 Okuruga aho Yosefu yaataho ekiragiro ky'ebibanja omu nsi ya Misri, ekikiriho na hati, Faraho okutunga ekicweka kimwe kya kataano; kureka ebibanja by'abanyamurwa bonka nibyo bitarabaire bya Faraho." 
Genesis47:27 Abaisraeli baatuura omu nsi ya Misri, omu kyanga kya Gosheni; baagitungiramu ebintu, baagizaariramu, baakanya munonga." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobo yaamara emyaka ikumi na mushanju omu nsi ya Misri; n'ahabw'ekyo emyaka yoona ei yaamazire yaahika igana na makumi ana na mushanju. 
Genesis47:29 Obunaku bw'okufa kwa Israeli ku bwabaire buri haihi, yaayeta omutabani Yosefu, yaamugira ati: Ku oraabe nongirira embabazi, ninkweshengyereza ta omukono gwawe ahansi y'ekibero kyangye, onkorere eby'embabazi kandi eby'amazima; otarinziika Misri," 
Genesis47:30 orekye nshangye baatatenkuru; onyihe Misri, onziikye omu kituuro kyabo. Onu ati: Ndyakora nk'oku waagamba." 
Genesis47:31 Yaagira ati: Ndahira. Yaamurahira. Israeli yainama aha mushego gw'ekitabo kye. 
Genesis48:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo baagambira Yosefu ku ishe arwaire; yaatwara abatabani bombi, Manaase na Efuraimu." 
Genesis48:2 Baagambira Yakobo bati: Yosefu omwana waawe yaija kukureeba. Israeli yaayehangaana, yaashutama aha kitabo." 
Genesis48:3 Yakobo yaagira Yosefu ati: Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona akanyeyorekyera Luuzi omu nsi ya Kanaani, yampa omugisha;" 
Genesis48:4 yangira ati: Ndyakuha oruzaaro, nkukanyise, nkuhindure omutwe muhango gw'amahanga; kandi ensi egi ndyagiha oruzaaro rwawe orurikukurata kuba eyaabo ey'ebiro n'ebiro." 
Genesis48:5 Kandi mbwenu batabani baawe bombi, abu waazaariire Misri, ntakakushangireyo, n'abangye; Efuraimu na Manaase baryaba abangye nka Reubeeni na Simeoni oku bari." 
Genesis48:6 Abandi baana, abu orizaara bwanyima yaabo, baryaba baawe; baryayetererwa bakuru baabo omu by'obuhunguzi bwabo." 
Genesis48:7 Eky'obusaasi, ku naabaire ninduga Padani, naahika Kanaani tukiri omu muhanda, naafeerwa Rakeeli, hakitsigaire omwanya okuhika Efuraata; naamuziika aho aha muhanda ogurikuza Efuraata, (niyo Betelehemu)." 
Genesis48:8 Bwanyima Israeli ku yaareebire beene Yosefu, yaamubuuza ati: Aba ni baahi?" 
Genesis48:9 Yosefu yaagarukamu ishe ati: Ni batabani bangye, abu Ruhanga yampeereire kunu. Ishe yaamugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza bampitsye, mbashabire omugisha." 
Genesis48:10 Obwo Israeli akaba atakibaasa kuhweza ahabw'obukuru. Yosefu yaabamuhitsya, Israeli yaabanywegyera ababumbatiire;" 
Genesis48:11 yaagira Yosefu ati: Nkaba ntarikuteekateeka ngu turyareebana; mbwenu reeba Ruhanga yandeebesa n'oruzaaro rwawe. 
Genesis48:12 Yosefu yaabaiha aha maju ga ishe, yainama ahansi." 
Genesis48:13 Yaabatwara bombi, akwaitse Efuraimu n'omukono gwe gwa buryo amugyemire omukono gwa Israeli ogwa bumosho, na Manaase amukwaitse n'omukono gwe gwa bumosho amugyemire omukono gwa Israeli ogwa buryo, yaabamuhitsya." 
Genesis48:14 Israeli yaananuura omukono gwe ogwa buryo, yaata engaro ze aha mutwe gwa Efuraimu omuto, kandi ez'ogwa bumosho yaazita aha mutwe gwa Manaase, arabaniisemu emikono ye, akigyendereire; ahakuba Manaase niwe yaabaire ari omujigaijo." 
Genesis48:15 Yaashabira Yosefu omugisha, naagira ati: Ruhanga, ou tatenkuru Abrahamu na taata Isaaka baabaire bagyendera gye omu maisho; Ruhanga owantungire ebiro byona eby'amagara gangye n'okuhitsya hati;" 
Genesis48:16 na maraika owancungwire omu bubi bwona, ahe aba boojo omugisha; kandi beetererwe eiziina ryangye n'amaziina g'abanzaire Abrahamu na Isaaka, kandi barugyemu omutwe muhango gw'abantu omu nsi." 
Genesis48:17 Yosefu ku yaareebire ishe ataire omukono gwe gwa buryo aha mutwe gwa Efuraimu, kyamugwisa kubi; yaakwata omukono gwa ishe kugwiha aha mutwe gwa Efuraimu kuguta aha gwa Manaase." 
Genesis48:18 Yaagira ishe ati: Ngaaha, Taata; ogu niwe mujigaijo; ba niwe waataho omukono gwawe gwa buryo." 
Genesis48:19 Kwonka ishe yaayanga, yaagira ati: Ninkimanya, mwana wangye, ninkimanya; ogu nawe aryahinduka eihanga, kandi aryaba mukuru; kwonka omurumuna aryamukiza obukuru, n'oruzaaro rwe ruryahinduka omutwe muhango gw'amahanga." 
Genesis48:20 Atyo yaabashabira omugisha eryo izooba, naagira ati: Muryaba eky'okureeberaho aha Baisraeli, baaba nibashabirana emigisha, bagire bati: Ruhanga akugire nka Efuraimu na Manaase. Okwo nikwo yaatungwire Efuraimu okukira Manaase." 
Genesis48:21 Bwanyima Israeli yaagira Yosefu ati: Reeba, naaza kufa; kwonka Ruhanga aryaguma naimwe, kandi aryabagarura omu nsi ya baashwenkuriimwe;" 
Genesis48:22 kandi iwe naakuha omugabo gumwe okweshumba beene sho, ogu naanyagire Abaamori na rurara yangye n'obuta bwangye." 
Genesis49:1 Bwanyima Yakobo yaayeta abatabani, yaagira ati: Mweteerane hamwe, mbahanuurire ebiribabaho omu biro by'omumaisho." 
Genesis49:2 Imwe beene Yakobo, muteeranire hamwe, muhurire; Mutegye shoimwe Israeli amatu." 
Genesis49:3 Reubeeni, niiwe naabandize kuzaara, Amaani gangye, kandi omujigaijo gw'obutsigazi bwangye. Ow'amaryo rurangaanwa, kandi ow'amaani rugambwa." 
Genesis49:4 Ori nk'amaizi agatahamira hamwe; toriheebwa bukuru, Ahakuba okatemba ekitabo kya sho; Waakihagara. Waaza ahu mbyama!" 
Genesis49:5 Simeoni na Leevi n'enyineemwe Zaarurara zaabo n'ez'okwitanisa. 
Genesis49:6 Iwe magara gangye, otariza omu naama zaabo, Iwe kitiinisa kyangye, otarikwatanisa nabo bateeraine; Ahakuba ahabw'ekiniga bakaita abantu, Ahabw'okwenda kwemara ak'aha mutima baatema n'ente ebiteega." 
Genesis49:7 Ekiniga kyabo kikyeenwe, ahakuba ni kingi; Ekiniga kyabo kikaba kiine obushaarizi. Ndyababaganisiza omuri Yakobo, Mbataataanisize omuri Israeli." 
Genesis49:8 Iwe Yuda, beene sho baryakuhimbisa; Omukono gwawe guryakwata abazigu baawe aha bitsya; Beene sho baryakwinamira." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda n'ekitsigazi ky'entare; Mwana wangye, oinamukire, nooruga aha ki waita; Yainama, yaabundama nk'entare, Kandi nk'entare enkazi; n'oha owaakwemera kumusisiimura?" 
Genesis49:10 Enkoni y'obugabe teriruga ahari Yuda, N'obu yaakuba ey'obutegyeki kumuruga aha bigyere, Okuhitsya obu mukama waayo ariija;" 
Genesis49:11 Aryatsibika omwana gw'embaraasi ye aha muzaabibu, N'omwana gw'endogoya ye aha muzaabibu ogutoorainwe; Ayogyese ebijwaro bye viinyo, N'eby'okujwara bye abyogyese eshande y'emizaabibu." 
Genesis49:12 Amaisho ge garyatukuzibwa viinyo, Namaino ge geezibwe amate." 
Genesis49:13 Zebuluuni aryatuura aha rubaju rw'enyanja; Abe enyambukiro y'emeeri; Omwatano gwe guryagarukira ahari Sidoni. 
Genesis49:14 Isakaari n'endogoya y'amaani Ebyami ahagati y'engo z'entaama. 
Genesis49:15 Akareeba omwanya gw'okuruhuukiramu ku guri murungi, Kandi n'ensi ku erikushemeza; Yainika eibega rye okwekorera; Atyo yaahinduka omuhuuku w'okugyemwa emirimo." 
Genesis49:16 Daani aryacwera oruganda rwe emanja, Nk'oku oruganda rwe ruri rumwe aha nganda za Israeli." 
Genesis49:17 Daani aryaba enjoka omu muhanda, Kandi encwera omu kahanda, Eruma ebitsintsiino by'embaraasi, Ngu egaranjure ogitembire." 
Genesis49:18 Ai MUKAMA, ntegyereize okujuna kwawe." 
Genesis49:19 Gaadi ababisha baryamuteera, Kwonka aryababinga abahambize." 
Genesis49:20 Omuri Asheri haryarugamu eby'okurya birungi, Baryareeta eby'okurya ebishemereire abagabe." 
Genesis49:21 Nafutaali n'ebuguma y'ensa etsibwirwe; Agamba ebigambo birungi. 
Genesis49:22 Yosefu n'eitaagi eririkwana munonga, Eitaagi eririkwana munonga haihi n'enshuro; Amataagi ge garengyera aha rugo rw'amabaare." 
Genesis49:23 Abarasi bakamugwisa kubi, Baamurasha, baamuhiiga." 
Genesis49:24 Kwonka obuta bwe bwaguma bureegire, Emikono ye n'engaro ze byaheebwa amaani Omukono gw'Ow'obushoboorozi owa Yakobo Omu iziina ry'omuriisa, Orukiri rwa Israeli," 
Genesis49:25 Niwe Ruhanga wa sho, orikuhwera, Ow'obushoboorozi bwona orikuha omugisha, Emigisha erikuruga omu iguru, N'emigisha erikuruga hare okuzimu, N'emigisha ey'aha mabeere n'ey'omu nda." 
Genesis49:26 Emigisha ei sho akushabira Neekira eya taata na tatenkuru, Neehika aha muheru gw'enshozi ezitahwaho. Emigisha egyo eryaguma aha mutwe gwa Yosefu, Aha kazingiro k'ogwo owaatoorainwe omuri beene ishe." 
Genesis49:27 Benyamiini n'omushega ogurikutaanyagura; Omu kasheeshe gurya eki gwitsire, Omu mwabazyo gubagana eminyago." 
Genesis49:28 Abo boona n'enganda za Israeli ikumi na ibiri; kandi ebyo nibyo ishebo yaabagambiire naabashabira omugisha; buri muntu nk'omugisha gwe oku guri, nikwo yaabashabiire atyo." 
Genesis49:29 Bwanyima yaabeehanangiriza, naabagira ati: Niinyija kushanga abaitu; muryanziika hamwe na baatatenkuru omu nyanga y'omu kibanja kya Efurooni Omuhiiti," 
Genesis49:30 egyo nyanga eri omu kibanja kya Makipeela ahashungaine na Mamure omu nsi ya Kanaani, niyo nyanga ei Abrahamu yaaguzire hamwe n'ekibanja ahari Efurooni Omuhiiti, okuba obutaka bw'okuziikamu." 
Genesis49:31 Okwo niyo baaziikire Abrahamu na Saara omukazi we; niyo baaziikire Isaaka na Rebeka omukazi we, kandi niyo naaziikire Lea;" 
Genesis49:32 ekyo kibanja n'enyanga yaamwo bikagurwa aha ba Heesi. 
Genesis49:33 Yakobo ku yaaherize kwehanangiriza abatabani, yaagarura amaguru ge aha kitabo, gwahwamu, yaashanga abaabo." 
Genesis50:1 Yosefu yaajuumara aha maisho ga ishe, yaamuriririraho, yaamunywegyera." 
Genesis50:2 Yosefu yaaragiira abaheereza be abafumu okwomya omutumbi gwa ishe n'omubazi; abafumu nikwo kwomya Israeli. 
Genesis50:3 Baamara ebiro makumi ana nibamwomya; ahakuba ebiro by'okwomya nikwo byabaire bingana; kandi Abanyamisri baamara ebiro makumi mushanju omu rufu rwe. 
Genesis50:4 Ebiro by'orufu rwe ku byahweire, Yosefu yaagambira ab'eka ya Faraho ati: Ku muraabe nimungirira embabazi, nimbeeshengyereza mumpikire Faraho, mumugambire ku taata yandahiize, naagira ati:" 
Genesis50:5 Reeba, naaza kufa; oryanziika omu kituuro kyangye eki naayekoreire omu nsi ya Kanaani. Mumugire muti: Mbwenu naakweshengyereza omurekye ainamukye, aziikye ishe, agarukye." 
Genesis50:6 Faraho yaagarukamu ati: Inamuka oziikye sho, nk'oku yaakurahiize." 
Genesis50:7 Yosefu yainamuka kuziika ishe; yaagyenda hamwe n'abagaragwa ba Faraho boona, abakuru b'omu ka ye, kandi n'abakuru boona ab'ensi ya Misri," 
Genesis50:8 n'eka ye yoona na beene ishe n'ab'eka ya ishe; kwonka abaana baabo abato n'amasyo gaabo g'entaama nag'ente baabitsiga omu kyanga kya Gosheni. 
Genesis50:9 Yainamuka n'ebigaari n'ab'aha mbaraasi; gwaba omutwe muhango munonga. 
Genesis50:10 Baahika omu ihuuriro rya Atadi eriri seeri ya Yorudani; aho niho baacuriire munonga n'obusaasi; bwanyima yaamara ebiro mushanju naaririra ishe. 
Genesis50:11 Abatuuzi b'ensi egyo Abanyakanaani ku baareebire nibacurira omu ihuuriro rya Atadi, baagira bati: Oku n'okucura kw'obusaasi aha Banyamisri; nikyo omwanya ogwo gwayeteirwe Abeeli-misraimu, kandi guri seeri ya Yorudani." 
Genesis50:12 Batabani be baamukorera nk'oku yaabaragiire; 
Genesis50:13 ahakuba bakamutwara omu nsi ya Kanaani, baamuziika omu nyanga y'omu kibanja kya Makipeela, ahashungaine na Mamure, ei Abrahamu yaagurzire hamwe n'ekyo kibanja ahari Efurooni Omuhiiti, okuba obutaka bw'okuziikamu." 
Genesis50:14 Yosefu ku yaaherize kuziika ishe, yaagaruka Misri na beene ishe n'abandi boona abaagyenzire nawe kumuziikisa ishe." 
Genesis50:15 Beene ishe ba Yosefu ku baareebire ishebo aherize kufa, baagira bati: Obundi Yosefu akaatwanga, atutura ebibi byona ebi twamwitsize." 
Genesis50:16 Baatuma ahari Yosefu, nibagira bati: Sho atakafiire, akaragiira ati: Muryagambira Yosefu muti:" 
Genesis50:17 Naakweshengyereza osaasire beene sho okushiisha kwabo n'ekibi kyabo; ahakuba bakakukora kubi. Mbwenu nitukweshengyereza osaasire okushiisha kw'abairu ba Ruhanga wa sho. Yosefu ku baamugizire batyo, yaarira." 
Genesis50:18 Na beene ishe nabo baija, baamugwa omu maisho; baagira bati: Reeba, hati twaba abairu baawe." 
Genesis50:19 Yosefu yaabagira ati: Mutatiina; nimugira ngu ndi omu mwanya gwa Ruhanga? 
Genesis50:20 Imwe enaama yaanyu ekaba eri ey'okunkora kubi, kwonka eya Ruhanga ekaba eri ey'okureeta ebirungi okukiza abantu baingi, ngu barekye kufa nk'oku kiri hati." 
Genesis50:21 N'ahabw'ekyo hati mutatiina; niinyija kubaha eby'okubatunga n'abaana baanyu abato. Yaabahamiza, yaabagarura omutima omunda." 
Genesis50:22 Bwanyima Yosefu yaatuura omuri Misri, we n'ab'eka ya ishe; yaahitsya emyaka igana na ikumi." 
Genesis50:23 Yaareeba baijukuru ba Efuraimu aba kashatu; kandi n'abaana ba Makiri mwene Manaase bakamuzaarirwa aha maju. 
Genesis50:24 Yosefu yaagambira beene ishe ati: Naaza kufa; kwonka buzimazima Ruhanga aryabataayaayira, abaihe omu nsi egi, abate omu nsi ei yaarahiire kuha Abrahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo." 
Genesis50:25 Bwanyima Yosefu yaarahiza abaana ba Israeli, naagira ati: Buzimazima Ruhanga aryabataayaayira; naimwe muryaiha amagufa gangye omu nsi egi, mugagyendane." 
Genesis50:26 Atyo Yosefu yaafa, ahikize emyaka igana na ikumi; baamwomya n'omubazi, baamuta omu shanduukye y'okuziikamu omuri Misri." 
Exodus1:1 Aga nigo maziina ga batabani ba Israeli abaizire omuri Misri na Yakobo, buri muntu n'eka ye." 
Exodus1:2 Reubeeni, Simeoni, Leevi, Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 Isakaari, Zebuluuni, Benyamiini," 
Exodus1:4 Daani, Nafutaali, Gaadi na Asheri." 
Exodus1:5 Abantu boona abaarugire omu nda ya Yakobo bakaba bari makumi mushanju kwonka Yosefu we akashangwa ari omuri Misri. 
Exodus1:6 Bwanyima Yosefu yaafa na beene ishe boona, n'ab'omu busingye obwo boona." 
Exodus1:7 Abaisraeli baazaara, baayeyongyera munonga, baakanya, baaba ab'amaani maingi munonga; n'ahabw'ekyo baijura ensi." 
Exodus1:8 Bwanyima haayema omugabe musya omuri Misri, owaabaire atarikumanya Yosefu." 
Exodus1:9 Yaagira abantu be ati: Reeba, Abaisraeli ni baingi kandi n'ab'amaani okutukira;" 
Exodus1:10 mwije tubacwere obwengye, barekye kukanya; nyentsya tukiguubwaho orugamba, bakeeteerana n'abazigu baitu, bakaturwanisa, bakacwa, bakaruga omuri omuri egi nsi." 
Exodus1:11 Nikyo baabateereireho abanyampara, ngu babareebese enaku nibabeekoreza emitwaro erikuremeera. Baayombekyera Faraho endembo z'okuhunikamu, Pisomu na Ramaseesi." 
Exodus1:12 Kwonka ei baagarukiire kubabonabonesa, nabo niyo baagarukiire kukanya n'okubuga hoona. Ekyo kyareetera Abanyamisri kugira obwoba bwingi ahabw'Abaisraeli." 
Exodus1:13 Abanyamisri baakoresa Abaisraeli emirimo y'amaani; 
Exodus1:14 baabatamisa amagara gaabo ahabw'okubakoresa emirimo y'obuhuuku, nibabakaatisa obudongo n'okubabumbisa amatafaari, kandi baabakoresa emirimo y'emiringo yoona omu misiri; buri murimo gwona ogu baabaire babakoresa, baagubakoresa n'amaani." 
Exodus1:15 Bwanyima omugabe wa Misri yaagambira abazaarisa b'Abaheburaayo, omwe orikwetwa Shifira, n'ondiijo orikwetwa Pua;" 
Exodus1:16 naagira ati: Ku muraabe nimuzaarisa Abaheburaayokazi, mwareeba bari aha butebe oburikuzaarirwaho, haazaarwa omwojo, mumwite; ku araabe ari omwishiki, agumeho." 
Exodus1:17 Kwonka abazaarisa baatiina Ruhanga, tibaakora nk'oku omugabe wa Misri abaragiire, baaguma kureka abaana b'aboojo bahuriire." 
Exodus1:18 Omugabe wa Misri yaayeta abazaarisa, yaababuuza ati: Ahabw'enki mukozire muti okureka abaana b'aboojo bakagumaho?" 
Exodus1:19 Abazaarisa baagarukamu Faraho bati: Manya Abaheburaayokazi tibari nk'Abanyamisrikazi, ahakuba baine amaani, omuzaarisa ku aza kwija, ashanga baazaire." 
Exodus1:20 N'ahabw'ekyo Ruhanga yaakorera gye abo bazaarisa; eihanga ry'Ahaheburaayo ryakanya, ryaba ery'amaani maingi." 
Exodus1:21 Kandi abo bazaarisa ahabw'okutiina Ruhanga, yaabaha oruzaaro, baarugwamu enganda." 
Exodus1:22 Bwanyima Faraho yaaragiira abantu be boona ati: Buri mwojo weena oraazaarwe Omuheburaayokazi, mumunagye omu mugyera; kwonka omwishiki weena agumeho." 
Exodus2:1 Omushaija ow'omu ruganda rwa Leevi akagyenda, yaashwera omwishiki w'omu Baleevi." 
Exodus2:2 Omukazi ogwo yaagira enda, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo; ku yaareebire ari omwana murungi, yaamushereka okumara ameezi ashatu." 
Exodus2:3 Bwanyima ku yaareebire atakibaasa kuguma amusherekire, yaareeta akagozi k'omubimbiri k'okumutamu, yaakasiiga eibumba na koroto, yaamutamu; ako kagozi yaakata ahagati y'ebifunjo omu nkungu y'omugyera;" 
Exodus2:4 munyaanya yaayemerera hangahari kureeba ekiraamubeho. 
Exodus2:5 Muhara wa Faraho yaashuuma aha mugyera kwoga, abazaana be baagyendagyenda aha rubaju rw'omugyera; ku yaareebire akagozi ahagati y'ebifunjo, yaatuma omuzaana kukareeta." 
Exodus2:6 Ku yaakafundwire, yaashangamu omwana, ogwo mwana yaarira. Yaamugirira esaasi, yaagira ati: Ogu n'omwe aha baana b'Abaheburaayo." 
Exodus2:7 Ahonaaho munyaanya yaabuuza muhara wa Faraho ati: Nze kukwetera omurezi omu bakazi b'Abaheburaayo, akurerere ogu mwana?" 
Exodus2:8 Muhara wa Faraho yaamugira ati: Irooko. Omwishiki yaagyenda, yaayeta nyina." 
Exodus2:9 Muhara wa Faraho yaamugira ati: Twara omwana ogu, omunderere, ndyakuha ebihembo. Omukazi nikwo kutwara omwana, akamurera." 
Exodus2:10 Bwanyima omwana ku yaakuzire, nyina yaamureetera muhara wa Faraho, yaaba omwana we. Yaamweta Musa, naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba nkamwiha omu maizi." 
Exodus2:11 Eizooba rimwe Musa, ku yaakuzire, yaaza kureeba beene waabo, yaareeba obuhuuku obu barimu; kandi yaareeba Omunyamisri naateera Omuheburaayo, omwe ahari beene waabo." 
Exodus2:12 Yaamagamaga; ku yaareebire hataine oriho, yaita ogwo Munyamisri, yaashereka omutumbi gwe omu musheenyi." 
Exodus2:13 Ku bwaseesire, yaagarukayo, yaashanga Abaheburaayo babiri nibarwana, yaagambira owaashaagiza mugyenzi we ati: Ahabw'enki nooteera mugyenzi waawe?" 
Exodus2:14 Onu ati: N'oha owaakuhaire obushoboorozi bw'okututegyeka n'okutucwera emanja? Nooyenda kunkuratsa Omunyamisri ou oitsire? Musa yaatiina, yaagira ati: Buzima eki nkozire kimanyirwe." 
Exodus2:15 Bwanyima Faraho ku yaakihuriire, yaasherura oku araite Musa. Kwonka Musa yaahunga Faraho, yaaza omu nsi ya Midiani; ku yaahikireyo, yaashutama aha rubaju rw'eiziba." 
Exodus2:16 Hakaba hariyo omunyamurwa wa Midiani, aine bahara be mushanju; baija, baataha amaizi, baijuza amaato kweshera obusyo bwa ishebo." 
Exodus2:17 Haija abariisa, baababinga, kwonka Musa yaimuka, yaabarwanaho, yaayeshera obusyo bwabo." 
Exodus2:18 Ku baataahire, Reueli ishebo yaagira ati: Byaba bita eri izooba? Ka mwarahukayo!" 
Exodus2:19 Baagarukamu bati: Omunyamisri niwe yaatujuna abariisa, akatutahira amaizi, kandi akatwesherera n'obusyo." 
Exodus2:20 Yaabuuza bahara be ati: Mbwenu shi ogwo mushaija arahi? Ahabw'enki mwamutsigayo? Mumwete, tumufungurire." 
Exodus2:21 Okuruga aho Musa yaasiima kuguma n'ogwo mushaija; bwanyima omusahaija ogwo yaamuhingira muhara we Zipora. 
Exodus2:22 Yaazaara omwana w'omwojo, ishe yaamweta Gereshomu; ahakuba akagira ati: Nkashuhuukira omu nsi etari yaitu." 
Exodus2:23 Ku haahingwireho ebiro bingi, omugabe wa Misri yaafa. Abaisraeli baatsinda ahabw'emirimo y'obuhuuku, baataka, n'okutaka kwabo ahabw'obuhuuku kwahika ahari Ruhanga." 
Exodus2:24 Ruhanga yaahurira okutsinda kwabo, Ruhanga yaijuka endagaano ei yaaragaine na Abrahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Ruhanga yaareeba Abaisraeli, Ruhanga yaamanya oku bari." 
Exodus3:1 Omu biro ebyo Musa akaba naariisa obusyo bwa ishezaara Yesero omunyamurwa wa Midiani; yaatwara obusyo aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba bw'eihamba, yaahika aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga orurikwetwa Horebu." 
Exodus3:2 Maraika wa MUKAMA yaamweyorekyera omu rurimi rw'omuriro nigunaga enkobe ahagati y'orushaka; yaayetegyereza, yaareeba orushaka nirwaka, kwonka rutarikusya." 
Exodus3:3 Musa yaagira ati: Ka nkiikame, ndeebe eri ihano, orushaka okwaka rutasye." 
Exodus3:4 MUKAMA ku yaareebire yaakiikama kureeba, Ruhanga yaamweta naayema ahagati omu rushaka, naagira ati: Musa, Musa! Yaamwetaba ati: Ndi aha, Mukama wangye." 
Exodus3:5 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Otairira haihi; juura enkaito omu bigyere byawe, ahakuba omwanya ogu oyemereiremu n'ogurikwera." 
Exodus3:6 Kandi yaagira ati: Ndi Ruhanga wa sho, Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, Ruhanga wa Yakobo. Musa yaayekwata aha maisho, ahakuba akatiina kureeba Ruhanga." 
Exodus3:7 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Buzimazima ndeebire okubonabonesibwa kw'abantu bangye abari omuri Misri, naahurira okutaka kwabo oku barikutakisibwa abanyampara; ahabw'okuba nimmanya obusaasi bwabo," 
Exodus3:8 kandi naashuuma kubajuna, kubaiha omu mikono y'Abanyamisri, barugye omu nsi egyo, mbatware omu nsi enungi kandi egarami, ensi ey'amate n'obwoki, ensi ey'Abanyakanaani, ey'Abahiiti, ey'Abaamori, ey'Abaperizi, ey'abahiivi n'ey'Abayebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Na mbwenu reeba, okutaka kw'Abaisraeli kumpikireho, kandi ndeebire okuhatwa oku Abanyamisri barikubahata." 
Exodus3:10 N'ahabw'ekyo ija, nkutume ahari Faraho, oihe abantu bangye Abaisraeli omuri Misri." 
Exodus3:11 Musa yaagira Ruhanga ati: Niinye oha kuturukirira Faraho nkaiha Abaisraeli omuri Misri? 
Exodus3:12 Yaamugira ati: Buzimazima ndyaba nkwine. Akamanyiso akarihamya ku niinye naakutumire n'aka; ku oriba waihire abantu omuri Misri, muryaheerereza Ruhanga aha rushozi oru." 
Exodus3:13 Musa yaagarukamu Ruhanga ati: Ku ndihika Abaisraeli, naabagira nti: Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe abantumireho; bambuuza bati: Eiziina rye n'oha? ndyabagarukamu nta?" 
Exodus3:14 Ruhanga yaagira Musa ati: Ndi MBAHO; kandi yaagira ati: Oku nikwo origambira Abaisraeli, oti: MBAHO niwe abantumireho." 
Exodus3:15 Kandi Ruhanga yaagambira Musa ati: Oku nikwo origambira Abaisraeli, oti: MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe, Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, Ruhanga wa Isaaka, Ruhanga wa Yakobo niwe abantumireho; eryo niryo iziina ryangye ebiro byona, kandi okwo nikwo nshemereire kwijukwa obusingye bwona." 
Exodus3:16 Irooko oteeranire hamwe abakuru b'Abaisraeli, obagire oti: MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe, Ruhanga wa Abrahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo akanyeyoreka naagira ati: Mbareebire, naareeba n'okubarikubagira omuri Misri;" 
Exodus3:17 mbwenu nindaganisa okubaiha omu kubonabona kwa Misri, mbatware omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani, ey'Abahiiti, ey'Abaamori, ey'Abaperizi, ey'Abahiivi kandi n'ey'Abayebusi, ensi ey'amate n'obwoki." 
Exodus3:18 Nabo baryakuhurira; bwanyima oryagyenda n'abakuru b'Abaisraeli ow'omugabe wa Misri mumugire muti: MUKAMA Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo atutaayaayiire; mbwenu nitukweshengyereza, orekye tugyende orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu omu ihamba tutambiririreyo MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu ebitambo." 
Exodus3:19 Kandi nimmanya ku omugabe wa Misri ataribaikiriza kugyenda, kureka yaagyemwa omukono gw'amaani." 
Exodus3:20 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyabanga omukono gwangye, nteere Misri n'eby'okutangaaza byangye byona, ebi ndigikoreramu; bwanyima aryabarekura." 
Exodus3:21 Kandi aba bantu ndyabaha okukundwa Abanyamisri; n'ahabw'ekyo ku muriba nimurugayo, timurirugayo ngaro nsha;" 
Exodus3:22 kureka buri mukazi aryashaba mutaahi we, ashabe n'oriba acumbikire omu nju ye, ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi eby'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, n'ebijwaro, mubijwekye abaana baanyu b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki; okwo nikwo murinyaga Abanyamisri." 
Exodus4:1 Musa yaagarukamu naagira ati: Kwonka nimmanya ngu tibariinyikiriza, n'obu kwakuba okumpurira; ahakuba baryagira bati: MUKAMA tarakweyorekire." 
Exodus4:2 MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Ekyo eki oine omu ngaro niki? Onu ati: N'enkoni. 
Exodus4:3 Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Ginagye ahansi. Yaaginaga ahansi; enkoni yaahinduka enjoka; Musa yaagihunga. 
Exodus4:4 MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Tayo omukono gwawe, ogikwate omukira, (yaatayo omukono, yaagikwata, yaagaruka yaahinduka enkoni omu ngaro ze):" 
Exodus4:5 okwo nikwo orikora, bakabona kwikiriza ku MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo, Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, Ruhanga wa Isaaka, kandi Ruhanga wa Yakobo, yaakweyorekire." 
Exodus4:6 Kandi MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Ta omukono gwawe omu kifuba. Yaagutamu; ku yaagwihiremu, yaashanga gubembire nigwera nk'orubaare." 
Exodus4:7 Yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Garura omukono gwawe omu kifuba. Yaagugaruramu; ku yaagwihiremu, yaashanga guri nk'omubiri gwe ogundi." 
Exodus4:8 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Ku bariba batakwikiriize, n'obu kwakuba okwikiririsibwa akamanyiso k'okubanza, baryaikiririsibwa aka kabiri." 
Exodus4:9 Kandi ku bariba bataikiririsiibwe obwo bumanyiso bwombi, n'obu kwakuba okuhurira ebi orikubagambira, oryatwara aha maizi g'omu mugyera, ogashukye hansi; amaizi ago agu oritaha omu mugyera, garyahinduka eshagama ahari eryo itaka." 
Exodus4:10 Musa yaagira MUKAMA ati: Mukama wangye, na ira ryona omwiru waawe nshangwa ntaba mugambi murungi, nangwa n'ahu waatandikira kugamba naanye, ahabw'okuba nyetwara omu kugamba, n'orurimi rwangye runaamuuka." 
Exodus4:11 MUKAMA yaamugira ati: N'oha owaahangire akanwa k'omuntu? Nari n'oha ohindura omuntu ekiteta, nari ekifamatu, nari shi n'oha omureebesa, nari omuhumya? Tiinye MUKAMA?" 
Exodus4:12 N'ahabw'ekyo irooko ogyende, ndyaba ndi hamwe n'akanwa kaawe, nkuhabure ebi origamba." 
Exodus4:13 Musa yaagarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, ninkweshengyereza, ou orikwenda kutuma, mutume." 
Exodus4:14 MUKAMA yaagirira Musa ekiniga kingi, yaagira ati: Arooni mwene sho Omuleevi tariho? Nimmanya we ku arikubaasa kugamba gye. Kandi reeba, hati naija kukubugana; ku araakureebe, naija kwesiimira aha mutima." 
Exodus4:15 Oryaguma omugambire, ote ebigambo omu kanwa ke; naanye ndyaba ndi hamwe n'akanwa kaawe n'ake, mbahabure ebi murikora." 
Exodus4:16 Aryaba ow'okukugambirira abantu, abe akanwa kaawe, naiwe omubeere nka Ruhanga." 
Exodus4:17 Kandi oryaguma otware enkoni egi omu ngaro, ei orikoresa obumanyiso." 
Exodus4:18 Musa yaagaruka ahari Yesero ishezaara, yaamugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, reka ngyende, ngarukye ahari beene waitu abari omuri Misri, ndeebe ku baraabe bakibaho. Yesero yaagira Musa ati: Gyenda n'obusingye." 
Exodus4:19 Kandi MUKAMA yaagambira Musa akiri omuri Midianai ati: Irooko ogarukye Misri, ahabw'okuba abaabaire nibenda kukwita bafiire." 
Exodus4:20 Musa yaatwara omukazi we n'abatabani, yaabata aha ndogoya, yaagaruka omu nsi ya Misri; kandi yaatwara egyo nkoni ya Ruhanga omu ngaro ze." 
Exodus4:21 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Ku oraagarukye Misri, otarireka kukorera omu maisho ga Faraho eby'okutangaaza byona ebi nkuhaire kukora; kwonka ndyagangaaza omutima gwe, tarireka bantu kugyenda." 
Exodus4:22 Kandi oryagambira Faraho to: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, naagira ati: Israeli n'omwana wangye w'omujigaijo;" 
Exodus4:23 kandi ninkugambira nti: Reka omwana wangye agyende, ampeereze; ku oraayangye kumurekura, niinyija kwita omwana waawe ow'omujigaijo." 
Exodus4:24 Ku baabaire nibakigyenda, baahika omu icumbi, MUKAMA yaamushangamu, yaayenda kumwita." 
Exodus4:25 Zipora yaakwata eibaare ry'obwogi, yaashara ekishushu ky'omubiri gw'omwana we, yaakinaga aha bigyere bya Musa, yaamugira ati: Wampindukira omugore orikujwisa eshagama." 
Exodus4:26 MUKAMA nikwo kumureka. Zipora akagira ati: Ori omugore orikujwisa eshagama! ahabw'okushara. 
Exodus4:27 MUKAMA yaagambira Arooni ati: Irooko oze kubugana Musa omu ihamba. Yaagyenda, yaamubugana aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga, yaamunywegyera." 
Exodus4:28 Musa yaagambira Arooni ebigambo byona ebi MUKAMA yaamutumire, n'obumanyiso bwona obu yaamuragiire kukora." 
Exodus4:29 Musa na Arooni baagyenda, baateeranira hamwe abakuru b'Abaisraeli boona," 
Exodus4:30 Arooni yaabagambira ebigambo byona, ebi MUKAMA yaagambiire Musa, kandi yaakorera obwo bumanyiso omu maisho g'abantu." 
Exodus4:31 Abantu baikiriza; kandi ku baahuriire ngu MUKAMA ataayaayiire Abaisraeli, yaareeba okubonabonesibwa kwabo, bainika emitwe yaabo, baaramya." 
Exodus5:1 Bwanyima Musa na Arooni baija ahari Faraho, baamugira bati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende omu ihamba, bankorereyo obugyenyi." 
Exodus5:2 Faraho yaabagira ati: MUKAMA niwe oha, ou nyowe nshemereire kuhurira, nkarekura Abaisraeli bakagyenda? MUKAMA ogwo tindikumumanya; kandi n'ekindi tindikwija kubarekura, bakagyenda." 
Exodus5:3 Baagira bati: Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo atutaayaayiire; mbwenu nitukweshengyereza, orekye tugyende orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu omu ihamba, tutambirireyo MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu ebitambo, atakaatwitsa orufu nari rurara." 
Exodus5:4 Omugabe wa Misri yaabagira ati: Iwe Musa na Arooni, ahabw'enki nimwiha abantu aha mirimo yaabo? Mwirooko mugarukye aha mirimo yaanyu." 
Exodus5:5 Faraho yaagaruka yaagira ati: Reeba, abantu bakanyire omu nsi; haza imwe nimwenda kubaiha omu buhuuku bwabo." 
Exodus5:6 Eizooba eryo Faraho yaaragiira abanyampara b'abantu n'abatware baabo, naagira ati:" 
Exodus5:7 Mutagaruka kuha abantu embuba z'engano z'okukoresa amatafaari nka ira; murekye bagyende bazeesherurire. 
Exodus5:8 Omubaro gw'amatafaari, ogu baabaire nibabumba n'okuhitsya hati, mube nigwo mwabagumyaho; mutagutuubyaho na kakye; ahakuba n'abeeremwa; nikyo kirikubatakisa nibagira bati: Ka tuze kutambira Ruhanga waitu ebitambo." 
Exodus5:9 Abashaija abo mubahe emirimo erikukiraho amaani, bagikore; barekye kuta omutima aha bigambo by'ebishuba." 
Exodus5:10 Abanyampara b'abantu n'abatware baabo nikwo kushohora, bakagambira abantu bati: Oku nikwo Faraho arikugamba naagira ati: Tindibaha mbuba z'engano;" 
Exodus5:11 mwirooko mugyende, muzeesherurire ahu muraazishangye hoona, mumanye ngu omurimo gwanyu tiguricuubwaho na kakye." 
Exodus5:12 N'ahabw'ekyo abantu baabugibwa omu nsi yoona eya Misri kutorotoora ebitsintsi by'engano omu mwanya gw'embuba zaazo. 
Exodus5:13 Abanyampara baabeezirikisa munonga nibagira bati: Muhitsye emirimo yaanyu eya buri izooba, nk'oku mubaire nimugikora mwine embuba z'engano." 
Exodus5:14 Abanyampara b'Abaisraeli, abatairweho abanyampara ba Faraho, baaterwa, kandi baabuuzibwa bati: N'enki ekibazibiire kuhitsya omubaro gw'amatafaari, ogu mucwereirwe nyomwabazyo n'eri izooba, nk'oku mubaire nimukora?" 
Exodus5:15 Bwanyima abanyampara b'Abaisraeli baija ahari Faraho kwetonganira nibagira bati: Ahabw'enki otukozire oti, itwe abairu baawe?" 
Exodus5:16 Tibakituha mbuba z'engano; kandi bagarukire batugira bati: Mubumbe amatafaari; haza obwo bwona itwe abairu baawe nituteerwa, kandi orubanja ruri orw'abantu baawe." 
Exodus5:17 Kwonka yaagarukamu ati: Muri abeeremwa; muri abeeremwa! nikyo kirikubagirisa muti: Ka tugyende tutambire MUKAMA ebitambo. 
Exodus5:18 Mwirooko mugarukye aha mirimo yaanyu, mukore; ahakuba timurigaruka kuheebwa mbuba z'engano, kandi mugume muhitsye omubaro gw'amatafaari ogu mwacwereirwe." 
Exodus5:19 Ku baagambiirwe ngu tibaricwerwaho mubaro gw'amatafaari ogwa buri izooba na kakye, abanyampara b'Abaisraeli baamanya ku bagwereirwe akagwe." 
Exodus5:20 Ku baabaire nibaruga owa Faraho, baashanga Musa na Arooni beemereire omu muhanda;" 
Exodus5:21 baabagira bati: MUKAMA abareebe, kandi abacwere orubanja, ahabw'okuba niimwe mureeteire Faraho n'abashaija be kutwangira kimwe, n'okukwata rurara kutwita." 
Exodus5:22 Musa yaagaruka ahari MUKAMA, yaagira ati: Ai bambe MUKAMA, abantu aba abakoreire ki kubi? Okaba wantumira ki?" 
Exodus5:23 Ahakuba kwiha naaza owa Faraho kugamba omu iziina ryawe, akozire kubi aba bantu; kandi naiwe tiwaajuna bantu baawe na kakye." 
Exodus6:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Hati noija kureeba oku ndaagire Faraho; ahakuba, ahabw'okugyemwa omukono gw'amaani, aryabarekura, nangwa n'okubabinga ababingye omu nsi ye ahabw'ogwo mukono." 
Exodus6:2 Ruhanga yaagamba na Musa naamugira ati: Niinye Yehova. 
Exodus6:3 Kandi nkeeyoreka Abrahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo, ndi Ruhanga Ow'obushoboorozi bwona; kwonka tindabeemanyiise mu iziina ryangye erya Yehova." 
Exodus6:4 Nkahamya endagaano yangye nabo, ku ndibaha ensi ya Kanaani, ensi ei baatwiremu nk'abashuhuuki." 
Exodus6:5 Kandi mpuriire okutsinda kw'Abaisraeli, abu Abanyamisri baagizire abahuuku; naanye naijuka endagaano yangye." 
Exodus6:6 N'ahabw'ekyo gambira Abaisraeli ku ndi Yehova, kandi ku ndibatuura emitwaro ei Abanyamisri baabakoreire, nkabaiha omu buhuuku bwabo, nkabacunguza omukono gubangire n'ebifubiro by'amaani." 
Exodus6:7 Bwanyima ndyabeetwarira mube abantu bangye, kandi naanye mbe Ruhanga waanyu; aho niho murimanyira ku ndi Yehova Ruhanga waanyu, obatwire emitwaro ei Abanyamisri baabeekoreize;" 
Exodus6:8 kandi ndyabatwara omu nsi, ei naimukiize omukono kuha Abrahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo; ngibahe kuba obuhunguzi bwanyu. Nyowe Yehova." 
Exodus6:9 Musa yaagambira Abaisraeli ebigambo ebyo; kwonka baayanga kumuhurira ahabw'obusaasi bw'omu mitima yaabo, n'ahabw'obuhuuku bubi." 
Exodus6:10 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus6:11 Za owa Faraho omugabe wa Misri, omugambire arekye Abaisraeli barugye omu nsi ye." 
Exodus6:12 Musa yaagambira MUKAMA ati: Reeba, Abaisraeli tibampuriire; mbwenu Faraho we naabaasa ata kumpurira, nyowe ow'eminwa etashazirwe?" 
Exodus6:13 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa na Arooni, naabatuma aha Baisraeli n'ahari Faraho omugabe wa Misri, kwiha Abaisraeli omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus6:14 Aba nibo bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo; Batabani ba Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Israeli, ni Hanoki, Palu, Hezirooni na Karumi; egyo niyo miryango ya Reubeeni." 
Exodus6:15 Batabani ba Simeoni ni Yemueli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Zohari, na Shauli omutabani, ow'Omunyakanaanikazi; egyo niyo miryango ya Simeoni." 
Exodus6:16 Kandi aga nigo maziina ga batabani ba Leevi, nk'oku baagyenzire nibakuratana omu kuzaara; Gereshoni, Kohasi na Merari. Emyaka ei Leevi yaahikize ekaba eri igana na makumi ashatu na mushanju." 
Exodus6:17 Batabani ba Gereshoni ni Libuni na Shimei, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri;" 
Exodus6:18 na batabani ba Kohasi ni Amuraamu, Izuhaari, Heburooni, na Uzieli; kandi emyaka ei Kohasi yaahikize ekaba eri igana na makumi ashatu n'eshatu;" 
Exodus6:19 kandi na batabani ba Merari ni Mahili na Muushi. Egyo niyo miryango y'Abaleevi nk'oku baagyenzire nibakuratana omu kuzaara. 
Exodus6:20 Amuraamu yaashwera Yokebedi ishenkazi, yaamuzaarira Arooni na Musa; emyaka ei Amuraamu yaahikize ekaba eri igana na makumi ashatu na mushanju." 
Exodus6:21 Batabani ba Izuhaari ni Koora, Nefegi na Zikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Batabani ba Uzieli ni Mishaeli, Elizafani na Zitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Arooni yaashwera Elisheba, muhara wa Aminadabu, munyaanya wa Nahashooni; yaamuzaarira Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazaari na Itamaari." 
Exodus6:24 batani ba Koora ni Asiri, Elukaana na Abiasaafu; egyo niyo miryango y'aba Koora." 
Exodus6:25 Eleazaari mwene Arooni yaashwera omwe ahari bahara ba Putieli; yaamuzaarira Finehaasi. Abo nibo bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru b'Abaleevi nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri. 
Exodus6:26 Abo nibo ba Arooni na Musa abu MUKAMA yaagambiire kwiha Abaisraeli omu nsi ya Misri, nk'oku amahe gaabo gaabaire gari." 
Exodus6:27 Abo nibo baagambiire Faraho omugabe wa Misri eby'okwiha Abaisraeli omuri Misri; abo nibo Musa na Arooni bari. 
Exodus6:28 Aha izooba eri MUKAMA yaagambiriireho Musa omu nsi ya Misri," 
Exodus6:29 akamugira ati: Niinye MUKAMA; gambira Faraho omugabe wa Misri ebigambo byona ebi ndikukugambira. 
Exodus6:30 Musa yaagambira MUKAMA ati: Nyowe ndi omuntu w'eminwa etashazirwe; Faraho aryabaasa ata kumpurira? 
Exodus7:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Reeba, naakugira nka Ruhanga ahari Faraho, na mukuru waawe Arooni naija kuba nabi waawe." 
Exodus7:2 Oryagamba byona ebi ndikuragiira; na mukuru waawe Arooni abigambire Faraho, naamuragiira kureka Abaisraeli kuruga omu nsi ye." 
Exodus7:3 Kwonka ndyagangaaza omutima gwa Faraho, nkanyise obumanyiso bwangye n'eby'okutangaaza byangye omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus7:4 Faraho taribahurira; haza nyowe mbone kuta omukono gwangye ahari Misri, nyiheyo amahe gangye, nibo bantu bangye Abaisraeli, nimbajuna Abanyamisri n'ebifubiro by'amaani." 
Exodus7:5 Ku ndibanga omukono gwangye ahari Misri, naiha Abaisraeli omuribo, obwo nibwo Abanyamisri barimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Exodus7:6 Musa na Arooni baakora batyo; nk'oku MUKAMA yaabaragiire, baaba nikwo baakora." 
Exodus7:7 Obwo Musa akaba ahikize emyaka makumi munaana, kandi mukuru we Arooni akaba aine emyaka makumi munaana n'eshatu, obu baagamba na Faraho." 
Exodus7:8 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Exodus7:9 Faraho ku araabagire ati: Mukore eky'okutangaaza ky'okubahamya, obwo ogire Arooni oti: Twara enkoni yaawe, oginagye ahansi omu maisho ga Faraho, ehindukye enjoka." 
Exodus7:10 Batyo Musa na Arooni baataaha owa Faraho, baakora nk'oku MUKAMA yaabaragiira; Arooni yaanaga enkoni ye ahansi omu maisho ga Faraho n'abaheereza be, yaahinduka enjoka." 
Exodus7:11 Faraho nawe yaayeta abanyabwengye n'abarogi, kandi n'abafumu ba Misri, baakora batyo n'oburogo bwabo;" 
Exodus7:12 ahakuba nabo bakanaga ahansi, buri muntu enkoni ye zaahinduka enjoka; kwonka enkoni ya Arooni yaamira ezaabo." 
Exodus7:13 Omutima gwa Faraho gwagangaara, tiyaabahurira, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambire." 
Exodus7:14 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Omutima gwa Faraho gugangaire, ayangire kurekura abantu." 
Exodus7:15 Omu kasheeshe oze owa Faraho; naija kuba naaza aha mugyera; iwe oyemerere aha nkungu y'omugyera, akushangyeho; kandi n'enkoni eyaahindukire enjoka ogigyendane;" 
Exodus7:16 omugire oti: MUKAMA Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo akuntumireho, naagira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende, bampeerereze omu ihamba; kandi n'okuhitsya hati oyangire kuhurira." 
Exodus7:17 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, naagira ati: Aha niho oraamanyire ku ndi MUKAMA; niinyija kuteera amaizi g'omu mugyera n'enkoni ei nyine omu ngaro, gahindukye eshagama;" 
Exodus7:18 eby'enyanja by'omu mugyera bife, omugyera gunuukye ekijunde; Abanyamisri banugye amaizi g'omuri ogwo mugyera, bangye kuganywa." 
Exodus7:19 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: enkoni yaawe, obangye omukono gwawe ahaiguru y'amaizi g'omuri Misri, emigyera yaabo n'otugyera twabo n'ebiyanja byabo n'ahu amaizi gateeraniire hoona, gahindukye eshagama; kandi omu nsi ya Misri yoona omu bintu byabo eby'ebiti n'eby'amabaare nihaija kubamu eshagama." 
Exodus7:20 Musa na Arooni baakora nk'oku MUKAMA abaragiire; yaimutsya egyo nkoni, yaateera amaizi g'omu mugyera omu maisho ga Faraho n'abaheereza be; amaizi goona ag'omu mugyera gaahinduka eshagama." 
Exodus7:21 Eby'enyanja ebyabaire biri omu mugyera byafa; omugyera gwanuuka ekijunde, Abanyamisri tibaabaasa kunywa maizi gaagwo; haabaho eshagama omu nsi ya Misri yoona." 
Exodus7:22 Abafumu ba Misri baakora batyo n'oburogo bwabo; omutima gwa Faraho gwagangaara, tiyaabahurira, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambire." 
Exodus7:23 Faraho yaarugayo, yaagaruka omuka, n'ekyo tiyaakyetaho." 
Exodus7:24 Abanyamisri boona baatimba haihi n'omugyera, ngu batungye amaizi g'okunywa; ahakuba tibarabaasize kunywa ha maizi g'omuri ogwo mugyera." 
Exodus7:25 Haahinguraho ebiro mushanju, MUKAMA aherize kuteera ogwo mugyera." 
Exodus8:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Za owa Faraho, omugire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende, bampeereze." 
Exodus8:2 Kandi ku oraayangye kubarekura, reeba niinyija kuteeza ensi yaawe yoona ebikyere;" 
Exodus8:3 omugyera nigwija kwijura ebikyere, biinamukye, bitaahe omu ka yaawe, bize omu kishengye eki oraaramu, bihikye n'aha kitabo kyawe, n'omu nju z'abaheereza baawe n'abantu baawe, bihikye n'omu mateekyero gaawe n'omu bintu byawe eby'okugoyeramu emigaati;" 
Exodus8:4 kandi ebikyere bikutembe, bitembe abantu baawe n'abaheereza baawe boona." 
Exodus8:5 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Gambira Arooni oti: Banga omukono gwawe ogukwaitse enkoni aha migyera n'otugyera n'ebiyanja, ebikyere biinamukye, bibugye ensi ya Misri." 
Exodus8:6 Arooni yaabanga omukono gwe aha maizi ga Misri; ebikyere byainamuka, byashweka ensi ya Misri." 
Exodus8:7 Abafumu nabo baakora batyo n'oburogo bwabo, bainamura ebikyere aha nsi omuri Misri." 
Exodus8:8 Ahonaaho Faraho yaatuma kweta Musa na Arooni; ku baizire, yaabagira ati: Mweshengyereze MUKAMA anyiheho ebikyere, abiihe n'aha bantu bangye; naanye naaza kureka abantu be, bagyende bamutambire ebitambo." 
Exodus8:9 Musa yaagira Faraho ati: Obe niiwe waanyegambirira obunaku obu ndaayeshengyererezemu MUKAMA iwe n'abaheereza baawe n'abantu baawe, ebikyere bikacwekyerezibwa bikakurugaho, bikahwa n'omu maju gaawe, bikatsigara omu mugyera gwonka." 
Exodus8:10 Faraho yaamugarukamu ati: Nyencakare. Nawe ati: Kibe nk'oku waagamba, obone kumanya ku hatariho orikushushana na MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu." 
Exodus8:11 Ebikyere nibiija kukurugaho, birugye n'omu maju gaawe, n'aha baheereza baawe n'aha bantu baawe, bitsigare omu mugyera gwonka." 
Exodus8:12 Musa na Arooni baaruga owa Faraho; Musa yaatakira MUKAMA ahabw'ebikyere, nk'oku aikirizaine na Faraho." 
Exodus8:13 MUKAMA yaakora nk'oku Musa agambire; ebikyere byafeera omu maju n'omu bibuga n'omu misiri, byahwaho." 
Exodus8:14 Baabirunda emituumo n'emituumo; ensi yaanuuka ekijunde. 
Exodus8:15 Kwonka Faraho ku yaareebire byabaho gye, yaagangaaza omutima gwe, tiyaabahurira, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambire." 
Exodus8:16 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Gambira Arooni oti: Banga enkoni yaawe, oteere omucuucu gw'aha nsi, guhindukye enda omu nsi yoona eya Misri." 
Exodus8:17 Baakora batyo; Arooni yaabanga omukono gwe ogukwaitse enkoni ye, yaateera omucuucu gw'aha nsi; enda zaanyiga aha bantu n'aha matungo; omucuucu gwona ogw'omu nsi ya Misri gwahinduka enda." 
Exodus8:18 Abafumu nabo baateeraho kureeta enda n'oburogo bwabo, tibaabaasa; enda zaanyiga aha bantu n'aha matungo." 
Exodus8:19 Abo bafumu baagira Faraho bati: Mbwenu ho oru n'orukumu rwa Ruhanga. Omutima gwa Faraho gwagangaara, tiyaabahurira nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambire." 
Exodus8:20 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Ogurukye kare omu kasheeshe, oyemerere omu maisho ga Faraho, naija kuba naaza aha mugyera, omugire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende, bampeereze." 
Exodus8:21 Ku oraabe otabarekwire, niinyija kukuteeza emizinga y'eshohera, iwe n'abaheereza baawe n'abantu baawe, zitaahe n'omu maju gaawe; kandi n'amaju g'Abanyamisri nigaija kwijura n'emizinga y'eshohera, zishwekye n'omwanya ogubarimu." 
Exodus8:22 Eizooba eryo niinyija kutsiga ekyanga kya Gosheni, eki abantu bangye batwiremu, emizinga y'eshohera erekye kuhikayo, obone kumanya ku ndi MUKAMA ori ahagati y'ensi." 
Exodus8:23 Niinyija kuta omutaano ahagati y'abantu bangye n'abantu baawe; nyencakare ako kamanyiso nikaija kubaho. 
Exodus8:24 MUKAMA yaakora atyo; emizinga mingi y'eshohera yaataaha omu nju ya Faraho n'omu maju g'abaheereza be n'omu nsi yoona eya Misri; ensi yaasiisikara ahabw'egyo mizinga y'eshohera. 
Exodus8:25 Faraho yaatuma ahari Musa na Arooni, yaagira ati: Mugyende mutambire Ruhanga waanyu ebitambo omu nsi egi." 
Exodus8:26 Musa yaagira ati: Tikihikire kukora tutyo; ahakuba nitwija kutambira MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu ebitambo ebirikuzira aha Banyamisri. Mbwenu ku turaatambire ebitambo omu maisho g'Abanyamisri ebi barikuzira, tibarikwija kututeera amabaare?" 
Exodus8:27 Kureka tushemereire kugyenda orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu omu ihamba, tutambire MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu ebitambo, nk'oku arikuturagiira." 
Exodus8:28 Faraho yaagira ati: Niinyija kubareka mugyende, mutambire MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ebitambo omu ihamba; kwonka mutaza hare munonga; kandi munyeshengyerereze MUKAMA." 
Exodus8:29 Musa yaagira ati: Reeba naaza kuruga omu maisho gaawe, nze kweshengyereza MUKAMA, emizinga y'eshohera erugye ahari Faraho n'abaheereza be n'aha bantu be nyencakare; kwonka Faraho atagaruka kugobya obundi, okutareka bantu kuza kutambira MUKAMA ebitambo." 
Exodus8:30 Musa yaaruga omu maisho ga Faraho, yaayeshengyereza MUKAMA." 
Exodus8:31 MUKAMA yaakora nk'oku Musa yaagamba, yaiha emizinga y'eshohera ahari Faraho n'aha baheereza be n'aha bantu be; tihaatsigaraho shohera n'emwe." 
Exodus8:32 N'obwo nabwo Faraho yaagangaaza omutima gwe, tiyaareka bantu kugyenda." 
Exodus9:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Za owa Faraho, omugire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo arikugamba naagira ati: Reka abangu bangye bagyende, bampeereze." 
Exodus9:2 Ahakuba ku oraayangye kubarekura, waabagumya," 
Exodus9:3 reeba omukono gwa MUKAMA gwaza kureeta omubyamo mubi ogw'amaani aha matungo gaawe ag'omu mariisizo, aha mbaraasi n'endogoya n'engamira n'aha masyo g'ente n'ag'entaama." 
Exodus9:4 MUKAMA naija kworeka omutaano ahagati y'amatungo g'Abaisraeli n'ag'Abanyamisri; aha matungo g'Abaisraeli goona tiharifaho na rimwe. 
Exodus9:5 MUKAMA yaataho obunaku, naagira ati: Nyencakare MUKAMA naija kukora ekyo omu nsi." 
Exodus9:6 Ku bwaseesire, MUKAMA yaakikora; amatungo g'Abanyamisri goona gaafa; kwonka aha matungo g'Abaisraeli tihaafaho na rimwe." 
Exodus9:7 Faraho yaatuma kubuuza, baashanga aha matungo g'Abaisraeli hatafiireho na rimwe. Kwonka omutima gwa Faraho gwagangaara, tiyaareka bantu kugyenda." 
Exodus9:8 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa na Arooni ati: Mutware amagaro g'eiju rya kashenda ery'omu tanuuru, Musa arimiishe ahaiguru omu maisho ga Faraho;" 
Exodus9:9 niriija kuhinduka omucuucu, gubugye ensi yoona eya Misri, gurwaze abantu n'enyamaishwa ebizimba birugyemu ebironda omu nsi yoona eya Misri." 
Exodus9:10 Baatwara eiju ry'omu tanuuru, baayemerera omu maisho ga Faraho; Musa yaarimiisha ahaiguru, rya rwaza abantu n'enyamaishwa ebizimba ebirikurugamu ebironda." 
Exodus9:11 Abafumu bari tibaabaasa kwemerera omu maisho ga Musa ahabw'ebizimba; ahakuba ebyo bizimba bikrwaza abo bafumu n'Abanyamisri boona. 
Exodus9:12 Kwonka MUKAMA yaagangaaza omutima gwa Faraho, tiyaabahurira, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambiire Musa." 
Exodus9:13 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Ogurukye kare omu kasheeshe, oyemerere omu maisho ga Faraho, omugire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo arikugamba naagira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende bampeereze;" 
Exodus9:14 ahakuba aha murundi ogu niinyija kukureetera ebibonaboneso byangye byona, bihikye aha mutima gwawe n'aha baheereza baawe n'aha bantu baawe, obone kumanya ku hatariho orikushushana naanye omu nsi yoona."
