Exodus9:15 Ahabw'okuba hati nkaabangire omukono gwangye, nkuteeza orufu n'abantu baawe, ohwerekyerera, oruga omu nsi;" 
Exodus9:16 kwonka buzima, eki nkurekyeireho n'okukworeka amaani gangye, ngu eiziina ryangye ribone kugambwa omu nsi zoona." 
Exodus9:17 Mbwenu na hati nookyehimbisiza aha bantu bangye, oyangire kubarekura." 
Exodus9:18 Reeba, nyencakare nk'aga magingo niinyija kugwisa orubaare rwingi munonga, orutakagwaga muri Misri okwiha obu ensi egyo yaabaho n'okuhitsya hati." 
Exodus9:19 N'ahabw'ekyo otume bataasye amatungo gaawe n'ebi oine omu ishwa byona; ahakuba omuntu weena n'eitungo ryona ekiraashangwe omu ishwa, kitakataahire, nikiija kuteerwa orubaare, kife." 
Exodus9:20 Bwanyima weena owaatiinire ekigambo kya MUKAMA aha baheereza ba Faraho, yaahungiza abairu be n'amatungo ge omu maju;" 
Exodus9:21 kwonka otareetaire ha kigambo kya MUKAMA, yaareka abairu be n'amatungo ge omu ishwa." 
Exodus9:22 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Imutsya omukono gwawe, ogworekye ahaiguru, orubaare rugwe omu nsi ya Misri yoona, aha bantu n'amatungo n'aha bimezire byona omu nsi ya Misri yoona." 
Exodus9:23 Musa yaimutsya enkoni ye, agyorekire ahaiguru; MUKAMA yaahindisa eiguru, yaagwisa orubaare, omuriro gwashuuma ahansi; MUKAMA yaagwisa atyo orubaare omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus9:24 Haagwa orubaare, n'omuriro gwaguma nigutyankana ahagati yaarwo, orubaare rwingi munonga, orutakagwaga mu nsi ya Misri yoona okwiha obu yaaba eihanga." 
Exodus9:25 Orwo rubaare rwaita byona ebyabaire biri omu ishwa, abantu n'amatungo, omu nsi ya Misri yoona; kandi rwateera ebimezire byona, rwahendagura n'emiti yoona, eby'omu ishwa;" 
Exodus9:26 kureka omu kyaro kya Gosheni kyonka, eki Abaisraeli baabaire batwiremu, nimwo orubaare rutarahikire." 
Exodus9:27 Faraho yaatuma kweta Musa na Arooni; ku baizire, yaabagira ati: Aha murundi ogu nsiisire; MUKAMA niwe ahikiriire, nyowe n'abantu bangye turi babi." 
Exodus9:28 Mweshengyereze MUKAMA, ahakuba okuhinda oku okw'amaani n'orubaare nibimara; naaza kubareka mugyende, timukiguma aha." 
Exodus9:29 Musa yaamugira ati: Ku ndaarugye omu rurembo, ahonaaho niinyija kutega MUKAMA emikono, okuhinda nkwija kuhwaho, kandi n'orubaare tirurigaruka kubaho, obone kumanya ku ensi eri eya MUKAMA." 
Exodus9:30 Kwonka iwe n'abaheereza baawe, nimmanya ku murikwija kuba mutakitiina MUKAMA Ruhanga." 
Exodus9:31 (Ahabw'orubaare orwo furakisi na sayiri bikafa, ahabw'okuba sayiri ekaba eri obushiisha, kandi furakisi ekaba neerabya." 
Exodus9:32 Kwonka engano na kusemeti tibirateirwe, ahakuba bikaba bitakamezire.)" 
Exodus9:33 Musa yaaruga ahari Faraho omu rurembo, yaatega MUKAMA emikono; okuhinda n'orubaare byahwaho, n'enjura tiyaagaruka kugwa." 
Exodus9:34 Faraho ku yaareebire enjura n'orubaare n'okuhinda byahwaho, yaayeyongyera kushiisha, yaagangaaza omutima gwe, we n'abaheereza be." 
Exodus9:35 Omutima gwa Faraho gwagangaara, tiyaareka Baisraeli kugyenda, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa kugamba." 
Exodus10:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Za owa Faraho; ahakuba ngangaize omutima gwe n'emitima y'abaheereza be, ngu mbone kworeka obumanyiso bwangye obu ahagati yaabo," 
Exodus10:2 kandi ngu naiwe obone kubiteekyerereza omwana waawe na mwijukuru waawe, bahurire ebi naakozire omuri Misri, n'obumanyiso obu naakoreire omuribo; mumanye ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Exodus10:3 Musa na Arooni baaza owa Faraho, baamugira bati: oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo arikugamba naagira ati: Oryahitsya hi okwanga kwecureeza omu maisho gangye? Reka abantu bangye bagyende, bampeereze." 
Exodus10:4 Ku oraayangye kubarekura, reeba, nyencakare niinyija kureeta enzigye omu nsi yaawe," 
Exodus10:5 zishwekye ensi, omuntu abure ah'okureeba, zirye ebyatsigaireho, bitaitsirwe rubaare, zirye n'emiti yaanyu yoona erikumera omu misiri;" 
Exodus10:6 kandi ziijure amaju gaawe n'amaju g'abaheereza baawe boona n'ag'Abanyamisri boona, ezi baasho na baashwenkuru baabaire batakareebaga, okwiha obu baabaho n'okuhitsya hati. Yaakuba, yaaruga omu maisho ga Faraho." 
Exodus10:7 Abaheereza ba Faraho baamubuuza bati: Omushaija ogu aryahitsya hi okutubeera omutego? Reka abantu bagyende, baheereze MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo. Tokamanyire ku Misri ecwekyereire?" 
Exodus10:8 Baagarura Musa Faraho; Faraho yaabagira ati: Mwirooko, muheereze MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu; beitu shi ni bantu ki abaraagyende?" 
Exodus10:9 Musa yaagira ati: Turyagyenda n'abaana baitu abakuru, tugyende na batabani baitu na bahara baitu hamwe n'amasyo gaitu ag'entaama n'ag'ente; ahakuba tushemereire kukorera MUKAMA obugyenyi n'okumutambira ebitambo." 
Exodus10:10 Onu yaabagira ati: MUKAMA akinture, ku ndaabe naabaikiriize kugyenda n'abaana baanyu abato; kwonka mumanye ku enaama yaanyu eri mbi." 
Exodus10:11 Ngaaha! naayanga; abashaija mube niimwe mwagyenda, mukaheereza MUKAMA, ahakuba nikyo murikwenda. Baabingwa omu maisho ga Faraho." 
Exodus10:12 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Banga omukono gwawe aha nsi ya Misri, enzigye ziije, zigiteere, zirye ekimeziremu kyona, ekitaraitsirwe rubaare." 
Exodus10:13 Musa yaabanga enkoni aha nsi ya Misri, MUKAMA yaareeta omuyaga ogurikuruga oburugwa-izooba, gwahuuha ensi eryo izooba ryona n'ekyo kiro kyona; ku bwaseesire, omuyaga ogwo gwareeta enzigye." 
Exodus10:14 Enzigye zaabuga ensi yoona eya Misri, zaagwa omu byanga byayo byona; zikaba ziri enzigye nyingi munonga ez'eihano, ezitakabahoga okwiha ira, kandi ezitaribaho bundi." 
Exodus10:15 Ahakuba zikashweka ensi yoona, ensi yaagira omwirima; zaarya ebimezire byona n'ebijuma byona eby'emiti yoona etaraitsirwe rubaare; omu nsi ya Misri yoona tihaatsigaramu kintu kyona ekibisi, yaaba kiti nari obunyaatsi eby'omu ishwa." 
Exodus10:16 Ahonaaho Faraho yaatuma Musa na Arooni; yaabagira ati: Ncumwire ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu n'ahariimwe. 
Exodus10:17 Mbwenu nimbeeshengyereza munsaasire ekicumuro kyangye omurundi ogu gwonka, muunyeshengyerereze MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, afe okunyihaho orufu oru rwonka." 
Exodus10:18 Musa yaaruga omu maisho ga Faraho, yaayeshengyereza MUKAMA." 
Exodus10:19 MUKAMA yaareeta omuyaga mwingi gw'amaani, ogurikuruga oburengywerwa-izooba, gwatuntumura ezo nzigye, gwazinaga omu Nyanja erikutukura; tihaatsigara ruzigye na rumwe omu byanga byona ebya Misri." 
Exodus10:20 Kwonka MUKAMA yagangaaza omutima gwa Faraho, tiyaareka Baisraeli kugyenda." 
Exodus10:21 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Imutsya omukono gwawe, ogworekye eiguru, ensi ya Misri eshwekwe omwirima, omwirima ogubambire ndindindi." 
Exodus10:22 Musa yaimutsya omukono gwe, yaagworeka omu iguru, haabaho omwirima ndindindi omu nsi yoona eya Misri okumara ebiro bishatu;" 
Exodus10:23 baamara ebiro bishatu batarikureebana, n'obu yaakuba omuntu okuruga ah'ari; kwonka omu maka g'Abaisraeli boona baaguma nibahweza." 
Exodus10:24 Faraho yaatuma Musa, yaamugira ati: Mwirooko muze kuheereza MUKAMA; kandi n'abaana baanyu abato mugyende nabo; kwonka amasyo gaanyu ag'entaama n'ag'ente go gatsigare." 
Exodus10:25 Musa yaagira ati: Oshemereire kutuha eby'okutamba n'eby'okuhonga by'okwotsya, tubone kutambira MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu ebitambo." 
Exodus10:26 N'amatungo gaitu nago nitwija kugatwara; nangwa n'ekyara tikiritsigara; ahabw'okuba nigo turiba tushemereire kwihamu eby'okuheereza MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu; kandi titurikumanya bi turikoresa omu kuheereza MUKAMA, okuhitsya obu turihikayo." 
Exodus10:27 Kwonka MUKAMA yaagangaaza omutima gwa Faraho, tiyaabareka kugyenda." 
Exodus10:28 Faraho yaagambira Musa ati: Ruga aha, oyerinde, otaringaruka omumaisho; ahakuba eizooba eri oringaruka omumaisho; oryafa." 
Exodus10:29 Musa yaagira ati: Eki waagamba nikwo; tindikugaruka mumaisho obundi. 
Exodus11:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Hatsigaire ekibonaboneso kimwe eki ndaabonabonesese Faraho na Misri yoona; bwanyima aryabareka mugyende; okumanya ku aribareka, n'okubabinga aryababingira kimwe." 
Exodus11:2 Gambira abantu, buri mushaija ashabe mutaahi we, na buri mukazi ashabe mutaahi we, bashabe ebintu by'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu." 
Exodus11:3 MUKAMA yaaha abantu okukundwa Abanyamisri. Kandi na Musa yaaba omushaija orikutiinwa munonga omu nsi ya Misri, omu baheereza ba Faraho, n'omu bantu boona." 
Exodus11:4 Musa yaagira Faraho ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, naagira ati: Nyekiro nk'omu itumbi niinyija kuraba omuri Misri;" 
Exodus11:5 emijigaijo yoona ey'omu nsi ya Misri efe, okwiha aha mujigaijo gwa Faraho ori aha ngoma okuhitsya aha mujigaijo gw'omuzaana orikusa aha rubengo, n'emijigaijo yoona ey'amatungo." 
Exodus11:6 Kandi haryabaho okucura kwingi omu nsi ya Misri yoona, okutakabahoga, kandi okutarigaruka kubaho." 
Exodus11:7 Kwonka omu Baisraeli embwa terikankamira muntu weena, n'obu ryakuba rimwe aha matungo gaabo, mubone kumanya ku MUKAMA arikworeka omutaano ahagati y'Abanyamisri n'Abaisraeli." 
Exodus11:8 Kandi abaheereza baawe aba boona nibaija kushuuma, baije, banyinamire, nibagira bati: Irooko, n'abantu boona abarikukukuratira, bwanyima ngyende. Yaaruga omu maisho ga Faraho, aine ekiniga kingi." 
Exodus11:9 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Faraho tarikwija kubahurira, eby'okutangaaza byangye bibone kukanya omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus11:10 Musa na Arooni baakora eby'okutangaaza ebyo byona omu maisho ga Faraho; MUKAMA yaagangaaza omutima gwa Faraho, tiyaareka Abaisraeli kuruga omu nsi ye." 
Exodus12:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa na Arooni omu nsi ya Misri, ati:" 
Exodus12:2 Okwezi oku kuryababeera obutandikiro bw'ameezi; ahariimwe kuryaba okwezi kw'okubanza omu mwaka. 
Exodus12:3 Mugambire omutwe gwona ogw'Abaisraeli muti: Aha kiro kya ikumi eky'okwezi oku omuntu weena aryayetwarira omwana gw'entaama, nk'emiryango ya baishebo oku eri, buri ka omwana gw'entaama gumwe." 
Exodus12:4 Kandi eka ku eriba eri nkye, etarikubaasa kumaraho omwana gw'entaama gwona, nyineeka agukwatanise na mutaahi we ohereraine nawe, nk'obwingi bw'abantu oku buri; mubariirire omwana gw'entaama nk'okurya kwa buri muntu oku kuri." 
Exodus12:5 Omwana gw'entaama gwanyu ogwo guryaba empaya ehikize omwaka, etaine kamogo; muryagwiha omu ntaama nari omu mbuzi;" 
Exodus12:6 muryagurinda okuhitsya ha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'oku kwezi; aha kiro ekyo eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli baryagwita omu mwabazyo beeteeraine. 
Exodus12:7 Baryatwara aha shagama, bagimiisiire aha biti by'omuryango byombi n'aha kisasi ky'enju, ei bariguriiramu." 
Exodus12:8 Omuri ekyo kiro baryarya enyama yaagwo eyokize hamwe n'omugaati ogutatumbisiibwe; kandi bagirye n'emboga ezirikushaarira. 
Exodus12:9 Mutarigirya mbisi, nari eteekire, kureka mugirye eyokize hamwe n'omutwe n'amaguru n'eby'omunda." 
Exodus12:10 Mutarigira eki mwatsigaho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe; ekiriba kyatsigaireho kyona, mukyokyeze kimwe." 
Exodus12:11 Oku nikwo murigirya; muryagirya mwezirikire, mujwaire enkaito, n'enkoni zaanyu muziine omu ngaro; muryagirya n'obwira. Okwo nikwo Kuhinguraho kwa MUKAMA;" 
Exodus12:12 ahakuba ekyo kiro ndyaraba omu nsi ya Misri, nyite emijigaijo yoona ey'omuri egyo nsi, ey'abantu n'ey'amatungo; na baaruhanga boona aba Misri mpikiirize orubanja oru mbacwereire; Nyowe MUKAMA." 
Exodus12:13 Egyo shagama eryaba akamanyiso ahariimwe, akatairwe aha maju agu murimu; naanye ku ndireeba egyo shagama, ndyabahinguraho: ku nditeera ensi ya Misri, imwe timurihikwaho rufu rwona kubacwekyereza." 
Exodus12:14 Kandi eryo izooba riryaba ery'okubaijutsya; muryaguma muriijukye, ribe obugyenyi ahari MUKAMA; omu busingye bwanyu bwona muryarigira eizooba ry'obugyenyi, gube omugyenzo ogubateereirweho ebiro byona." 
Exodus12:15 Muryamara ebiro mushanju nimurya emigaati etatumbisiibwe; kwonka aha kiro ky'okubanza mubanze mwihe ekitumbisa omu maka gaanyu; ahakuba omuntu weena orirya omugaati ogutumbisiibwe, okwiha aha kiro ky'okubanza okuhitsya aha kiro kya mushanju, omuntu ogwo aryacuubwa omu ihanga rya Israeli." 
Exodus12:16 Ahari ekyo kiro ky'okubanza muryagira okuteerana okurikwera, n'aha kya mushanju muryatwaza mutyo. Omuri ebyo biro hatarigira omurimo gwona ogwakorwa; kureka eby'okurya ebi omuntu ashemereire kurya, nibyo murikora byonka." 
Exodus12:17 Kandi muryaguma mwijukye obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe; ahabw'okuba ahari ekyo kiro nikyo ndikwija kwihiraho amahe gaanyu omu nsi ya Misri; n'ahabw'ekyo muryaguma mwijukye ekyo kiro omu busingye bwanyu bwona, gube omugyenzo ogubateereirweho ebiro byona." 
Exodus12:18 Omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro kya ikumi na bina omu mwabazyo, muryarya emigaati etatumbisiibwe, okuhitsya aha kiro kya makumi abiri na kimwe eky'okwo kwezi omu mwabazyo." 
Exodus12:19 Omu biro mushanju ekitumbisa kyona kitarireebwa omu maka gaanyu; ahakuba omuntu weena orirya ekitumbisiibwe aryacuubwa omu ihanga rya Israeli, n'obu ariba ari omunyaihanga obashuhuukiiremu, nari enzaarwa." 
Exodus12:20 Mutarirya ekitumbisiibwe kyona; omu maka gaanyu goona mugume murye emigaati etatumbisiibwe. 
Exodus12:21 Bwanyima Musa yaatuma abakuru boona ab'Abaisraeli, yaabagira ati: Mwetooranire abaana b'entaama, nk'emiryango yaanyu oku eri, mubaite ahabw'obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho;" 
Exodus12:22 mutware enganda y'enyaweera, mugijabikye omu shagama eri omu rwabya, mugimiisiire aha kisasi n'aha biti by'omuryango; kandi hatarigira n'omwe omuriimwe owaaruga omu nju ye okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Exodus12:23 Ahakuba MUKAMA aryaraba omuriimwe naija kuteera Abanyamisri; ku arireeba eshagama aha kisasi n'aha biti by'emiryango byombi, aryaraba ahaiguru y'orwo rwigi, kandi tariikiriza Muhwerekyerezi kutaaha omu maju gaanyu kubaita." 
Exodus12:24 Kandi muryaguma mwijukye eki, gube omugyenzo ogubateereirweho n'abaana baanyu ebiro byona." 
Exodus12:25 Kandi ku muriba mwahikire omu nsi ei MUKAMA aribaha nk'oku yaaraganiise, muryakora omugyenzo ogu ogurikwera." 
Exodus12:26 Bwanyima abaana baanyu ku baribabuuza bati: Ogu mugyenzo, ogu murikukora, nigumanyisa ki?" 
Exodus12:27 Naimwe muryabagarukamu muti: N'ekitambo ky'Okuhinguraho kwa MUKAMA, ahakuba akahingura ahaiguru y'amaju g'Abaisraeli omuri Misri, obu yaita Abanyamisri, akakiza amaka gaitu. Abantu bainika emitwe yaabo, baaramya." 
Exodus12:28 Abaisraeli baagyenda, baakora batyo; nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa na Arooni, baaba nikwo baatwaza." 
Exodus12:29 Ku bwabaire buri omu itumbi, MUKAMA yaita emijigaijo yoona omu nsi ya Misri, okwiha aha mujigaijo gwa Faraho, owaabaire ari aha ngoma okuhika aha mujigaijo gw'enkwatwa, eyaabaire eri omu kihome, kandi n'emijigaijo yoona ey'amatungo." 
Exodus12:30 Ahonaaho Faraho n'abaheereza be boona n'Abanyamisri boona baimuka nyekiro; haabaho okuborooga kuhango omuri Misri, ahabw'okuba tiharabaireho nju yoona etarafiiremu muntu." 
Exodus12:31 Yaatuma Musa na Arooni ekyo kiro, yaabagira ati: Mwimukye, murugye omu bantu bangye, imwe n'Abaisraeli; mugyende muheereze MUKAMA nk'oku mwagambire." 
Exodus12:32 Kandi mutware amasyo gaanyu ag'entaama n'ag'ente, nk'oku mwagambire, mwegyendere; naanye munshabire omugisha." 
Exodus12:33 Abanyamisri baateera Abaisraeli obwira, ngu babone kubarahutsya kuruga omu nsi; ahakuba bakagira bati: Twena twafiire!" 
Exodus12:34 Abaisraeli baatwara eisyanga ryabo ritakatumbisiibwe, baakoma ebintu byabo eby'okugoyeramu emigaati omu minagiro yaabo, baabyekorera aha mabega." 
Exodus12:35 Baakora nk'oku Musa abaragiire; baashaba Abanyamisri ebintu by'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu n'eby'okujwara. 
Exodus12:36 MUKAMA yaaha abantu okukundwa Abanyamisri, baikiriza kubaha ebi baabaire nibabashaba byona. Okwo nikwo baanyagire Abanyamisri." 
Exodus12:37 Abaisraeli baaruga Rameseesi, baahika Sukoosi, abashaija nk'obusiriira mukaaga nibagyendesa ebigyere, otabariiremu bakazi n'abaana." 
Exodus12:38 Kandi omutwe muhango gw'ebijwangye by'abantu bainamuka, baagyenda nabo n'amatungo maingi munonga g'entaama n'ag'ente." 
Exodus12:39 Baateeka emigaati etatumbisiibwe omu isyanga eri baihire Misri, ahakuba rikaba ritatumbisiibwe; ahabw'okuba bakabingwa omuri Misri, tibaabaasa kwetwara n'obu kwakuba okwekomera entanda." 
Exodus12:40 Emyaka ei Abaisraeli baamazire omuri Misri bashuhuukire, ekaba eri magana ana na makumi ashatu." 
Exodus12:41 Aha kiro eki egyo myaka magana ana na makumi ashatu yaahikiireho, ahari ekyo kiro kyonka amahe goona aga MUKAMA gakaruga omuri Misri." 
Exodus12:42 Ekyo kiro nikyo MUKAMA yaaraire naareeba abantu be, ngu abone kubaiha omu nsi ya Misri; n'ahabw'ekyo ekiro ekyo kishemereire kwijukwa Abaisraeli boona ahari MUKAMA omu busingye bwabo bwona." 
Exodus12:43 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa na Arooni ati: Ogu nigwo mugyenzo ogutairweho ahabw'Okuhingurwaho. Omunyaihanga tariikirizibwa kukuryaho; 
Exodus12:44 kwonka omuhuuku weena oguzirwe empiiha naikirizibwa kukuryaho, mwaherize kumushara." 
Exodus12:45 Omushuhuuki n'orikukorera ebihembo tarikwikirizibwa kukuryaho. 
Exodus12:46 Kuryaguma kuriirwe omu nju emwe; otarishohoza akanyama koona aheeru y'enju; kandi mutarihenda eigufa ryayo. 
Exodus12:47 Eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli riryaguma rikwijukye. 
Exodus12:48 Omunyaihanga ku ariija kutuura naimwe, yaayenda kukwatanisa naimwe omu bugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho ahari MUKAMA, oyetwa omushaija weena omuribo asharwe, abone kwija kubutaaha; obwo aryaba nk'enzaarwa omu nsi yaanyu; kwonka omuntu weena otashazirwe atariburyaho." 
Exodus12:49 Enzaarwa n'omunyaihanga obatwiremu baryategyekwa ekiragiro kimwe. 
Exodus12:50 Okwo nikwo Abaisraeli boona baakozire; nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa na Arooni, nikwo baatwarize." 
Exodus12:51 Ahari ekyo kiro kyonka MUKAMA akaiha Abaisraeli omu nsi ya Misri, nk'oku amahe gaabo gaabaire gari." 
Exodus13:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus13:2 Munyereze emijigaijo yoona; ekiigura-nda kyona omu Baisareli, yaaba mu bantu nari omu matungo, n'ekyangye." 
Exodus13:3 Musa yaagambira abantu ati: Muryaguma mwijukye eizooba eri, eri mwarugiireho Misri, omu nju y'obuhuuku; ahakuba MUKAMA akabaiha omu mwanya ogwo n'omukono gw'amaani; hatarigira omugaati gwona ogutumbisiibwe ogwariibwa." 
Exodus13:4 Eizooba eri ery'omu kwezi Abibu niryo mwaza kurugiramu. 
Exodus13:5 Kandi MUKAMA ku arikuhitsya omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani, n'Abahiiti n'Abaamori n'Abahiivi n'ey'Abayebusi, ensi ey'amate n'obwoki, ei yaagambiire baashwenkuru naarahira kugikuha, oryaguma oijukye kukora omugyenzo ogu omu kwezi oku." 
Exodus13:6 Oryamara ebiro mushanju noorya emigaati etatumbisiibwe; kandi aha kiro kya mushanju haryabaho obugyenyi bw'ekiro kikuru kya MUKAMA. 
Exodus13:7 Omuri ebyo biro mushanju muryaguma nimurya emigaati etatumbisiibwe; mutarireebwa mwine omugaati gwona ogutumbisiibwe, n'obu kyakuba ekitumbisa kyona, omu nsi yaanyu yoona." 
Exodus13:8 Kandi ahari eryo izooba oryagambira omwana waawe oti: Eki ninkikora ahabw'eki MUKAMA yankoreire, obu naaruga omuri Misri." 
Exodus13:9 Kandi kiryakubeera akamanyiso aha mukono gwawe, n'ekiijutsyo ahagati y'amaisho gaawe, ekiragiro kya MUKAMA kirekye kukuruga omu kanwa; ahakuba MUKAMA akakwiha omuri Misri n'omukono gw'amaani." 
Exodus13:10 N'ahabw'ekyo oryaguma oijukye omugyenzo ogu omu bunaku bwagwo buri mwaka. 
Exodus13:11 Kandi MUKAMA ku arikuhitsya omu nsi ya Kanaani, yaagikuha, nk'oku yaaraganiise na baashwenkuru naarahira," 
Exodus13:12 oryashoroorera MUKAMA ekiigura-nda kyona. Emijigaijo yoona ey'omu matungo gaawe, ekyetwa ekishaija kyona, kiryaba ekya MUKAMA." 
Exodus13:13 Omujigaijo gwona ogw'endogoya oryagucunguza omwana gw'entaama; ku oriba otarikwenda kugucungura, oryaguhenda ebitsya; kandi emijigaijo yoona ey'abantu omu baana baawe oryagicungura." 
Exodus13:14 Kandi omwana waawe ku arikubuuza omu biro ebiriija naagira ati: Eki nikimanyisa ki? oryamugarukamu oti: MUKAMA akatwiha omuri Misri, omu nju y'obuhuuku, n'omukono gw'amaani;" 
Exodus13:15 ahakuba Faraho akaba agangaire, ayangire kuturekura, MUKAMA yaita emijigaijo yoona omu nsi ya Misri, ey'abantu n'ey'amatungo. Nikyo ntambirira MUKAMA ebiigura-nda byona, ebyetwa ebishaija; kwonka emijigaijo yoona omuri batabani bangye, nkagicungura." 
Exodus13:16 Eki kiryaba akamanyiso aha mukono gwawe, n'ekiijutsyo aha buso bwawe; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akatwiha omuri Misri n'omukono gw'amaani." 
Exodus13:17 Faraho ku yaaherize kurekura abantu kugyenda, Ruhanga tiyaabarabya mu muhanda ogurikuraba omu nsi y'Abafilistia, n'obu guraabe gwabaire guri haihi; ahakuba Ruhanga akagira ati: Nyentsya abantu ku barishangayo orugamba, bataryefuuza, bakagaruka Misri." 
Exodus13:18 Kureka Ruhanga akabakiikuura omu muhanda ogw'omu ihamba aha rubaju rw'Enyanja erikutukura. Abaisraeli baaruga Misri, bahagatiire eby'okurwanisa." 
Exodus13:19 Musa yaatwara amagufa ga Yosefu; ahabw'okuba Yosefu akaba arahiize Abaisraeli naabahamiza ati: Buzimazima Ruhanga aryabataayaayira; naimwe muryaiha amagufa gangye omu nsi egi, mugagyendane." 
Exodus13:20 Baaruga Sukoosi, baateera amahema Esamu aha munwa gw'eihamba." 
Exodus13:21 MUKAMA akaba abeebembera nyomushana, ari omu nyomyo y'ekicu, ngu abahabure, kandi nyekiro omu nyomyo y'omuriro, ngu abamurikire, babone kugyenda nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Exodus13:22 Egyo nyomyo y'ekicu nyomushana, kandi ey'omuriro nyekiro, ekaba etabaruga mumaisho." 
Exodus14:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus14:2 Gambira Abaisraeli bagarukye enyima, bateere amahema omu maisho ga Pihahiroosi ahagati ya Migidooli n'enyanja, omu maisho ga Baalizefooni; muteere amahema ahashungaine naho aha rubaju rw'enyanja." 
Exodus14:3 Kandi Faraho naija kugamba aha Baisraeli ati: Bashobereirwe omu nsi, eihamba ribatangire." 
Exodus14:4 Naanye niinyija kugangaaza omutima gwa Faraho, abakurate; nyetungire ekitiinisa ahari Faraho n'aha ihe rye ryona, Abanyamisri baamanye ku ndi MUKAMA. Abaisraeli baakora batyo." 
Exodus14:5 Baagambira omugabe wa Misri ku Abaisraeli bacwire; omutima gwa Faraho n'ey'abaheereza be yaahinduka, baayefuuza ahabwabo, nibagira bati: Beitu eki, tukozire ki, okwikiriza Abaisraeli kugyenda bakareka kutukorera?" 
Exodus14:6 Yaatebeekanisa ekigaari kye eky'okurwanisa, yaagyenda n'engabo ze;" 
Exodus14:7 yaatwara ebigaari magana mukaaga ebitoorainwe, n'ebindi bigaari bya Misri byona eby'okurwanisa, buri kimwe n'omukuru waakyo." 
Exodus14:8 MUKAMA yaagangaaza omutima gwa Faraho omugabe wa Misri, yaakurata Abaisraeli; ahakuba Abaisraeli bakaruga Misri nibeemurika." 
Exodus14:9 Abanyamisri baabakurata n'embaraasi n'ebigaari bya Faraho byona, n'ab'aha mbaraasi n'engabo ze, baabahika, baashanga bateire amahema haihi n'enyanja aha rubaju rwa Pihahiroosi, ahashungaine na Baali-zefooni." 
Exodus14:10 Faraho ku yaahikire haihi, Abaisraeli baanaga amaisho, baareeba Abanyamisri nibaija babakuratiire, baatiina munonga; baatakira MUKAMA." 
Exodus14:11 Baagambira Musa bati: Beitu shi, ebituuro bikaba bibuzire omuri Misri, waaza kutureeta kugwa omu ihamba? Eki okatukorera ki, okutwiha omuri Misri?" 
Exodus14:12 Eki tikyo twakugambiire, obu twabaire tukiri Misri tuti: Fa okutureka, tugume tukorere Abanyamisri? Haakiri tukorera Abanyamisri okukira okugwa omu ihamba." 
Exodus14:13 Musa yaagambira abantu ati: Mutatiina mwemerere muhamire, haza mureebe okujunwa oku MUKAMA araabareetere eri izooba; ahakuba Abanyamisri abu murikureeba eri izooba, timurigaruka kubareeba bundi." 
Exodus14:14 MUKAMA niwe araabarwanirire; ekyanyu n'okwemerera kwonka. 
Exodus14:15 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Ahabw'enki nontakira? Gambira Abaisraeli bagumizemu bagyende. 
Exodus14:16 Naiwe oyereeze enkoni yaawe, ogorore omukono gwawe aha nyanja, ogibaganise, Abaisraeli barabe ahagati y'enyanja aha itaka ryomire." 
Exodus14:17 Naanye niinyija kugangaaza emitima y'Abanyamisri bazemu babakurate, nyetungire ekitiinisa ahari Faraho n'aha ihe rye ryona n'aha bigaari bye n'aha bantu be ab'aha mbaraasi." 
Exodus14:18 Kandi Abanyamisri nibaija kumanya ku ndi MUKAMA, ku ndaaheze kwetungira ekitiinisa ahari Faraho n'ebigaari bye n'aha bantu be ab'aha mbaraasi." 
Exodus14:19 Bwanyima maraika wa Ruhanga, owaabaire ayebembera eihe ry'Abaisraeli, yaarugayo, yaabaza enyima; n'enyomyo y'ekicu yaabaruga omumaisho, yaabeemerera enyima," 
Exodus14:20 yaaza ahagati y'eihe ry'Abanyamisri n'ery' Abaisraeli. Aha rubaju rwa bari egyo nyomyo yaaba ekicu n'omwirima, kwonka aha rubaju rwa banu yaabamurikira nyekiro; n'ahabw'ekyo bari tibaabaasa kuhika banu ekyo kiro kyona." 
Exodus14:21 Bwanyima Musa yaagorora omukono gwe aha nyanja; MUKAMA yaareeta omuyaga mwingi ogw'oburugwa-izooba ekyo kiro kyona, gwagarura enyanja enyima, amaizi gaabaganisibwamu habiri, ahagati yaayo haaba eitaka ryomire." 
Exodus14:22 Abaisraeli baaza ahagati y'enyanja aha itaka ryomire, amaizi gaaba nk'ekisiika aha rubaju rwabo orwa buryo n'orwa bumosho." 
Exodus14:23 Abanyamisri baabakurata; embaraasi za Faraho zoona n'ebigaari bye n'abantu be ab'aha mbaraasi baaza ahagati y'enyanja babakuratiire. 
Exodus14:24 Omu itumbi ahu abarinzi abarikuhitsya omu kasheeshe batandikira, MUKAMA yaayema omu nyomyo y'omuriro n'ekicu, yaareeba eihe ry'Abanyamisri, yaabahahaaza emitima." 
Exodus14:25 Yaashayisa enziga z'ebigaari byabo, byarema eikurura; Abanyamisri nikwo kugira bati: Murekye tuhungye Abaisraeli; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA niwe arikubarwanira n'Abanyamisri." 
Exodus14:26 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Gorora omukono gwawe aha nyanja, amaizi gagarukye, gashwekye Abanyamisri n'ebigaari byabo n'abantu baabo ab'aha mbaraasi." 
Exodus14:27 Musa yaagorora omukono gwe aha nyanja; ku bwabaire nibutaagurukana, enyanja yaagaruka omu maani gaayo nk'oku eshangwa etuura; Abanyamisri omu kuhunga baabugabugana nayo; MUKAMA yaabinga Abanyamisri, baakunkumukira omuri egyo nyanja." 
Exodus14:28 Amaizi gaagaruka, gaashweka ebigaari n'ab'aha mbaraasi n'eihe ryona erya Faraho, eryagiire omu nyanja ribakuratiire; tihaatsigaraho n'omwe aharibo." 
Exodus14:29 Kwonka Abaisraeli bo omu kuraba omuri egyo nyanja bakaraba ahoomire; amaizi gaaba nk'ekisiika aha rubaju rwabo orwa buryo n'orwa bumosho. 
Exodus14:30 Okwo nikwo MUKAMA yaakirize Abaisraeli omu mikono y'Abanyamisri eryo izooba; Abaisraeli baareeba emitumbi y'Abanyamisri aha rubaju rw'enyanja. 
Exodus14:31 Kandi Abaisraeli baareeba omurimo muhango ogu MUKAMA yaakozire aha Banyamisri; abantu baatiina MUKAMA; kandi baikiriza MUKAMA n'omugaragwa we Musa. 
Exodus15:1 Bwanyima Musa n'Abaisraeli baayeshongorera MUKAMA ekyeshongoro eki, nibagira bati: Niinyeshongorera MUKAMA, ahakuba asingwire n'ekitiinisa; q1 Embaraasi n'ogitembire abinagire omu nyanja." 
Exodus15:2 MUKAMA niwe maani gangye n'ekyeshongoro kyangye, Kandi ahindukire okujunwa kwangye. Ogu niwe Ruhanga wangye, nimmuhimbisa; Ruhanga wa taata; nimmuha ekitiinisa." 
Exodus15:3 MUKAMA n'emanzi omu rugamba; MUKAMA niryo iziina rye. 
Exodus15:4 Ebigaari bya Faraho n'eihe rye abinagire omu nyanja; Abakuru b'engabo ze abatoorainwe barohamire omu Nyanja erikutukura. 
Exodus15:5 Amaizi g'ahagati y'enyanja gabashwekire; baakyengyera okuzimu nk'eibaare. 
Exodus15:6 MUKAMA, omukono gwawe gwa buryo gwine ekitiinisa ahabw'obushoboorozi bwagwo; MUKAMA, omukono gwawe ogwa buryo gusheenyagura abazigu." 
Exodus15:7 Omu bukuru bw'ekitiinisa kyawe otuura ahansi abaimuka kukurwanisa; Oyohereza ekiniga kyawe, kibasiriiza nk'ebitsintsi by'embuba." 
Exodus15:8 Omwitsyo gw'amaani ogw'omu nyindo zaawe gutuumire hamwe amaizi, Amaizi agaaba nigagyenda gaayetuuma hamwe omutuumo; Okuzimu omunda y'enyanja haakwata." 
Exodus15:9 Abazigu bagizire bati: Ka tubakurate, tubakwate, Tubagane eminyago, tubeemarireho akaturi aha mutima; Nitwija kusyorayo zaarurara zaitu, emikono yaitu ebacwekyereze." 
Exodus15:10 Waareeta omuyaga gwawe, enyanja yaabashweka; Baarohama nka rusasi omu maizi maingi ag'amaani." 
Exodus15:11 Ai MUKAMA, omuri baaruhanga orikushushana naiwe n'oha? N'oha ori nkaiwe, iwe orikuhimbisibwa ahabw'okwera kwawe, Ow'okutiinwa ahabw'eby'ekitiinisa n'eby'okutangaaza, ebi okora?" 
Exodus15:12 Ogoroire omukono gwawe ogwa buryo, Ensi yaabamira." 
Exodus15:13 Iwe ahabw'embabazi zaawe oyebembeire abantu baawe abu ocungwire, Waabeebembera n'amaani gaawe kubahitsya omu mwanya gwawe ogurikwera." 
Exodus15:14 Amahanga gakihuriire, gaatetema; Abatwire Filistia baagira obujune." 
Exodus15:15 Hati abatware ba Edomu ni batangaara; Emanzi za Moabu nizitetema; Abatwire omuri Kanaani boona emitima ebahweire omunda. 
Exodus15:16 Baitsirwe obwoba n'okutiina; Ahabw'obukuru bw'omukono gwawe tibarikwehiga, ni nk'eibaare, Okuhitsya obu abantu baawe baraarabeho, Okuhitsya obu abantu abu waayeguriire baraarabeho." 
Exodus15:17 Oryabahitsya omu nsi egyo, obabyare aha rushozi rw'obuhunguzi bwawe, Omwanya, ogu waayeshemereize kutuuramu, ai MUKAMA, Omwanya Ogurikwera, ogu waahamize n'emikono yaawe." 
Exodus15:18 MUKAMA aryaguma aha ngoma ebiro byona. 
Exodus15:19 Embaraasi za Faraho ku zaagiire omu nyanja n'ebigaari bye n'abantu be ab'aha mbaraasi, MUKAMA yaagarura amaizi g'enyanja, gaabashweka; kwonka Abaisraeli bo bakaraba ahagati y'enyanja aha itaka ryomire." 
Exodus15:20 Bwanyima Miriamu nabikazi, munyaanya wa Arooni, yaatwara ekitaasa; n'abakazi boona baagyenda bamukuratiire, baine ebitaasa nibazina." 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu yaabebeembera, naagira ati: Mweshongorere MUKAMA, aha kuba asingwire n'ekitiinisa, Embaraasi n'ogitembire abinagire omu nyanja." 
Exodus15:22 Musa yaayebembera Abaisraeli okuruga aha Nyanja erikutukura, baagyenda, baahika omu ihamba rya Shuuri, baarimaramu ebiro bishatu nibagyenda, babuzire amaizi." 
Exodus15:23 Ku baahikire Maara, tibaabaasa kunywa maizi gaayo, ahakuba gakaba nigashaarira; nikyo haayeteirwe Maara." 
Exodus15:24 Abantu baayetomboitera Musa, nibagira bati: Tunywe ki?" 
Exodus15:25 Musa yaatakira MUKAMA; MUKAMA yaamworeka ekiti, yaakinaga omuri ago maizi, amaizi gaanura. Aho niho MUKAMA yaabaheereire ekiragiro n'omugyenzo ogu yaataireho; kandi niho yaabagyereize," 
Exodus15:26 naagira ati: Ku oryezirika kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, waakora ebihikire omu maisho ge, waatega amatu ebiragiro bye, waarinda byona ebi yaataireho, tindikureetaho ndwara n'emwe ahari ezo ezi naareetsire aha Banyamisri; ahakuba niinye MUKAMA orikukutambira endwara." 
Exodus15:27 Bwanyima baahika Elimu, ahu enshuro z'amaizi ikumi na ibiri n'emikindo makumi mushanju byabaire biri; baateera amahema aha rubaju rw'ago maizi." 
Exodus16:1 Eihanga ryona ey'Abaisraeli baaruga Elimu, baahika omu ihamba rya Siini, eriri ahagati ya Elimu na Sinai aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano eky'okwezi kwa kabiri, baherize kuruga omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus16:2 Eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli baayetomboitera Musa na Arooni omu ihamba," 
Exodus16:3 nibagira bati: Nangwa kuri twaitsirwe omukono gwa MUKAMA, tukiri omu nsi ya Misri, obu twabaire tushutama aha nyungu z'enyama, tukarya emigaati, tukahaaga. Mbwenu mukatwihayo, mwatureeta omuri eri ihamba kwitsa eri ihanga ryona enjara." 
Exodus16:4 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Niinyija kubagwisiza eby'okurya nk'enjura okuruga omu iguru; ebiro byona abantu nibaija kuguma nibatorotoora omugabo gw'eizooba rimwe, mbone kubagyeza, mmanye ku baraabe nibaija kuguma niboorobera ebiragiro byangye, nari batarikubyorobera." 
Exodus16:5 Kandi ahari buri kiro kya mukaaga baryayeteguura eby'okutwara omuka, biingane n'ebi batorotoora buri izooba kabiri." 
Exodus16:6 Musa na Arooni baagambira Abaisraeli boona bati: Omu mwabazyo nimwija kumanya ku owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misri ari MUKAMA; 
Exodus16:7 kandi omu kasheeshe nibwo murikwija kureeba ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba ahuriire ebi murikumwetomboitera. Mbwenu itwe turi baahi, abu murikwetomboitera?" 
Exodus16:8 Musa yaagaruka yaabagira ati: MUKAMA ku araabahe enyama y'okurya omu mwabazyo, n'omu kasheeshe yaabaha omugaati mwahaaga; niho muraamanyire ku ahuriire okwetomboita kwanyu oku murikumwetomboitera. Mbwenu itwe turi baahi? Tiitwe murikwetomboitera, kureka nimwetomboitera MUKAMA." 
Exodus16:9 Musa yaagambira Arooni ati: Gambira eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli oti: Mwirire haihi omu maisho ga MUKAMA, ahakuba ahuriire ebi murikwetomboita." 
Exodus16:10 Arooni ku yaabareinaakigambira eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli, baanaga amaisho omu ihamba, baareeba ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA nikireebekyera omuri kiri kicu." 
Exodus16:11 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus16:12 Mpuriire okwetomboita kw'Abaisraeli; bagambire oti: Omu mwabazyo nimwija kurya enyama, kandi omu kasheeshe nimwija kurya eby'okurya muhaagye; haza mumanye ku ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu." 
Exodus16:13 Omu mwabazyo haija endahi, zaashweka orusiisira; kandi omu kasheeshe baashanga haimukiireho orume rwehinguririize orusiisira." 
Exodus16:14 Orume ku rwakyeire, aha nsi omu ihamba haareebeka otuntu tukye twekuringiriire, nk'amatondo g'orume rw'embeho." 
Exodus16:15 Abaisraeli ku baatureebire, baabuuzana bati: Ebi n'enki? ahakuba tibarabimanyire. Musa yaabagira ati: Ebyo nibyo by'okura ebi MUKAMA abahaire kurya." 
Exodus16:16 Eki nikyo MUKAMA arikubaragiira, naagira ati: Mutorotoore, buri muntu nk'okurya kwe oku kuri, omuntu weena homeri emwe nk'omubaro gw'abantu baanyu oku guri; buri muntu abitwarire ab'omu ihema rye." 
Exodus16:17 Abaisraeli baakora batyo, abamwe baatorotoora bingi, n'abandi bikye." 
Exodus16:18 Bwanyima ku baabirengire omuri homeri, owaashangurwize bingi, tiyaashaazyaho; n'owaashangurwize bikye, tiyaakyenire. Buri muntu yaatorotoora nk'okurya kwe oku kwabaire kuri." 
Exodus16:19 Kandi Musa yaabagira ati: Hatagira omuntu owaabiraazaho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe. 
Exodus16:20 Beitu kwonka tibaamuhurira; abamwe aharibo baabiraazaho okuhihitsya omu kasheeshe, byagiibwamu enyogori, byanuuka. Musa yaabagirira ekiniga." 
Exodus16:21 Okuruga aho baaguma nibatorotoora buri kasheeshe, nk'okurya kwa buri muntu oku kwabaire kuri; omushana gukijwa, bihwerera." 
Exodus16:22 Aha kiro kya mukaaga baatorotoora eby'okurya ebirikwingana na biri kabiri, buri muntu homeri ibiri; abakuru b'eihanga boona baija, baabigambira Musa." 
Exodus16:23 Yaabagarukamu ati: Okwo nikwo MUKAMA agizire ati: Nyencakare n'eizooba rikuru ry'okuruhuukiraho, sabato eyereziibwe MUKAMA; mwotsye ebi murikwenda kwotsya; muteekye ebi muri kwenda kuteeka; ebiraashaagye byona mubibiikye okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Exodus16:24 Baabiraaza, byahitsya omu kasheeshe, nk'oku Musa yaaragiire, tibyanuuka, n'obu kwakuba okugiibwamu enyogori n'emwe." 
Exodus16:25 Musa yaabagira ati: Ebyo mube nibyo mwarya eri izooba, ahakuba eri izooba ni sabato ahari MUKAMA; eri izooba timurikwija kubibona omu ishwa." 
Exodus16:26 Muryaguma nimubitorotoora okumara ebiro mukaaga; kwonka aha kiro kya mushanju, niyo sabato, tibirireebeka." 
Exodus16:27 Bwanyima aha kiro kya mushanju abantu bamwe baashohora, baaza kutorotoora, tibaabibona." 
Exodus16:28 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Muryahitsya hi okwanga kworobera ebiragiro byangye n'ebi naaragiire? 
Exodus16:29 Mumanye ngu MUKAMA akabaha sabato, n'ahabw'ekyo ahakiro kya mukaaga nikyo abaheera eby'okurya by'okumara amazooba abiri; omuntu weena agume omu mwanya gwe; hatarigira omuntu weena owaaruga omu mwanya gwe aha kiro kya mushanju." 
Exodus16:30 N'ahabw'ekyo abantu baaruhuuka aha kiro kya mushanju. 
Exodus16:31 Eby'okurya ebyo ab'enju ya Israeli baabyeta Emaanu; ekaba neeyera nk'enjuma z'obunyaatsi oburikwetwa gaadi; kandi neenura nk'omugaati ogukoreirwemu obwoki. 
Exodus16:32 Musa yaagira ati: Eki nikyo MUKAMA arikubaragiira, naagira ati: Encuro ya homeri emwe ebiikwe ahabwa baijukuru baanyu ab'obusingye oburiija, nyentsya bareebe eby'okurya ebi naabaire mbariisiza omu ihamba, obu naabaiha omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus16:33 Musa yaagira Arooni ati: Twara orwabya, orutemu homeri y'emaanu, orubiikye omu maisho ga MUKAMA, emaanu egyo ebiikwe ahabwa baijukuru baanyu ab'obusingye oburiija." 
Exodus16:34 Atyo Arooni yaagibiika omu maisho g'Ebirikuhamya, ngu egumeho, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus16:35 Kandi Abaisraeli bakamara emyaka makumi ana nibarya emaanu, okuhitsya obu baahikire omu nsi etwirwemu abantu; baagumizamu nibarya emaanu okuhitsya obu baahikire aha myatano y'ensi ya Kanaani." 
Exodus16:36 Kandi homeri emwe ekaba eri ekicweka kya ikumi kya eefa emwe. 
Exodus17:1 Eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli ryaruga omu ihamba rya Siini, baagyenda nibaraarira nk'oku MUKAMA yaabaire abaragiira. Ku baahikire Refidimu, baateerayo amahema; kwonka abantu baaburayo amaizi g'okunywa." 
Exodus17:2 N'ahabw'ekyo abantu baatonganisa Musa nibagira bati: Tuhe amaizi g'okunywa. Musa yaabagira ati: Nimuntonganisiza ki? Ahabw'enki nimugyeza MUKAMA? 
Exodus17:3 Abantu baagirirayo eiriho, baayetomboitera Musa nibagira bati: Okatwihira ki Misri kutwitsa eiriho, itwe n'abaana baitu n'amatungo gaitu?" 
Exodus17:4 Musa yaatakira MUKAMA, naagira ati: Abantu aba mbagire nta? Bari hakye kunteera amabaare." 
Exodus17:5 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Raba omu maisho g'abantu, otware abamwe aha bakuru b'Abaisraeli, otware n'enkoni, ei waateire omugyera guri, ogyende." 
Exodus17:6 Reeba, niinyija kwemerera omu maisho gaawe aha rukiri rw'ahari Horebu; oteere orwo rukiri, harugyemu amaizi, abantu banywe. Musa yaakora atyo omu maisho g'abakuru b'Abaisraeli." 
Exodus17:7 Omwanya ogwo yaagweta Maasa na Meriba ahabw'okutongana oku Abaisraeli baamutonganiise, kandi ahabw'okuba bakagyeza MUKAMA nibagira bati: Ebyo MUKAMA ari ahagati omuriitwe, nari tariho?" 
Exodus17:8 Bwanyima haija Abaamaleki, baarwanisiza Abaisraeli ahari Refidimu." 
Exodus17:9 Musa yaagambira Yoshua ati: Tutooranire engabo, mugyende murwanise Abaamaleki; nyencakare niinyija kwemerera aha mutwe gw'ekibungo, nkwaitse enkoni ya Ruhanga omu ngaro." 
Exodus17:10 Yoshua yaakora nk'oku Musa amuragiire, yaarwanisa Abaamaleki; Musa na Arooni na Huuri bainamuka, baahika aha mutwe gw'ekyo kibungo." 
Exodus17:11 Musa ku yaabaire aimutsya omukono, Abaisraeli babinga; akigugwisa, Abaamaleki babinga." 
Exodus17:12 Kwonka emikono ya Musa yaaruha; baareeta eibaare, baarita ahansi ye, yaarishutamaho; Arooni na Huuri baaramira emikono ye, omwe aha rubaju rumwe n'ondi aha rundi; emikono ye yaahama okuhitsya obu eizooba ryarengire." 
Exodus17:13 Yoshua yaasingura Amaleki n'engabo ze na rurara. 
Exodus17:14 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Ekyo okihandiikye omu kitabo, kibe ekiijutsyo, okiteekyerereze Yoshua, ku ndimariraho kimwe Amaleki, atagarukye kwijukwa ahansi y'eiguru." 
Exodus17:15 Kandi Musa yaayombeka eitambiro, yaaryeta Yehova-niisi;" 
Exodus17:16 yaagira ati: MUKAMA yaarahira ku ariguma naarwanisa Abaamaleki, nk'oku obusingye burigyenda nibwihaihana." 
Exodus18:1 Yesero omunyamurwa wa Midiani, ishezaara wa Musa, akahurira byona ebi Ruhanga yaakoreire Musa n'abantu be Abaisraeli, kandi n'oku yaihire Abaisraeli omuri Misri." 
Exodus18:2 Kandi Yesero, ishezaara wa Musa, akaba atwaire Zipora muka Musa, ou Musa yaabaire ayohereizeyo n'abatabani bombi." 
Exodus18:3 Eiziina ry'omwe akaba ari Gereshomu, (ahakuba ishe akagira ati: Nkaba ndi omushuhuuki omu nsi etari yaitu;" 
Exodus18:4 n'ondiijo akaba naayetwa Eliezeeri, ahakuba ishe akagira ati: Ruhanga wa taata akambeera Omuhwezi, yankiza rurara ya Faraho.)" 
Exodus18:5 Yesero ishezaara wa Musa yaareetera Musa abatabani n'omukazi we, yaamushanga omuri eryo ihamba, ahu yaabaire ari omu rusiisira aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga." 
Exodus18:6 Yaagambira Musa ati: Nyowe shozaara Yesero naakureetera omukazi waawe na batabani be bombi. 
Exodus18:7 Musa yaashohora kubugana ishezaara, yainama omu maisho ge, yaamunywegyera; baabuuzana oku barikuraara; baataaha omu ihema." 
Exodus18:8 Musa yaateekyerereza ishezaara byona ebi MUKAMA yaakozire ahari Faraho n'Abanyamisri ahabw'Abaisraeli, n'enaku zoona ezi baareebire omu muhanda, kandi n'oku MUKAMA yaabakirize." 
Exodus18:9 Yesero yaashemererwa ahabw'ebirungi byona ebi MUKAMA yaakoreire Abaisraeli, ahabw'okubajuna omu mikono y'Abanyamisri." 
Exodus18:10 Yesero yaagira ati: MUKAMA owaabakirize Abanyamisri na Faraho ahimbisibwe! 
Exodus18:11 Mbwenu naamanya ku MUKAMA arikukira baaruhanga abandi boona, ahakuba akaiha abantu omu mikono y'Abanyamisri, obu baabaire nibabaita kubi babaineho amaryo." 
Exodus18:12 Yesero ishezaara wa Musa yaatwara ekitambo ky'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo by'okutambira Ruhanga; Arooni n'abakuru b'Abaisraeli boona baija kuriira hamwe na ishezaara wa Musa omu maisho ga Ruhanga. 
Exodus18:13 Ku bwaseesire, Musa yaashutama kucwera abantu emanja; abantu baayemerera beehinguririize Musa okwiha omu kasheeshe okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Exodus18:14 Ishezaara wa Musa ku yaareebire byona ebi arikukorera abantu, yaagira ati: Eki eki orikukorera abantu niki? Ahabw'enki nooshutama wenka, abantu boona bakakwehinguririza okwiha omu kasheeshe okuhitsya omu mwabazyo?" 
Exodus18:15 Musa yaagarukamu ishezaara ati: N'ahabw'okuba abantu nibaija ahariinye, ngu mbabuurize ahari Ruhanga." 
Exodus18:16 Omuntu na mutaahi we ku baba baine eki barikufa, baija ahariinye, mbaramura, kandi mbamanyisa ebiragiro bya Ruhanga n'ebi arikuragiira." 
Exodus18:17 Ishezaara wa Musa yaamugira ati: Eki eki orikukora ti kirungi. 
Exodus18:18 Noija kwomera ahaiguru, iwe n'aba bantu abu oine; ahakuba omurimo ogu nigukukira; torikubaasa kugukora wenka." 
Exodus18:19 Mbwenu hurira eki ndikukugambira, nkuhe obwengye; kandi Ruhanga agume naiwe. Obe niiwe waaguma noohikira abantu ahari Ruhanga, kandi ogume obahikizeyo emanja zaabo;" 
Exodus18:20 kandi oryabeegyesa ebiragiro n'ebi Ruhanga arikuragiira, oboorekye oku bashemereire kutwaza n'ebi bashemereire kukora." 
Exodus18:21 Kandi otoorane omu bantu boona abashaij b'oburyo, abarikutiina Ruhanga, ab'amazima, kandi abarikwanga enguzi; abantu nk'abo obateho bategyekye abantu, abamwe bategyekye buri omwe rukumi, abandi igana, abandi ataano, n'abandi ikumi;" 
Exodus18:22 babe nibo baaguma nibacwera abantu emanja obutoosha. Orubanja orugumire rwona baryarukureetera, kwonka emanja ezoorobi babe nibo baazicwa; obwo nibwo oryanguhirwa, nabo bakaguma nibakwatanisa naiwe oburemeezi." 
Exodus18:23 Ku oraakore ekigambo ekyo, kandi Ruhanga yaaba niwe yaakikuragiira, obwo oryabaasa kugumaho, kandi n'aba bantu baryaguma nibagaruka owaabo n'obusingye." 
Exodus18:24 Musa yaahurira ebigambo bya ishezaara, yaakora ebi yaamugambira byona." 
Exodus18:25 Yaatoorana omu Baisraeli boona abashaija b'oburyo, yaabahindura abakuru b'abantu, abamwe kutegyeka buri omwe rukumi, abandi igana, abandi ataano n'abandi ikumi." 
Exodus18:26 Baaguma nibacwera abantu emanja obutoosha; emanja ezigumire bazireetera Musa, kwonka ezoorobi zoona bazeemarira." 
Exodus18:27 Bwanyima Musa yaaraga ishezaara, yaagaruka owaabo." 
Exodus19:1 Omu kwezi kwa kashatu Abaisraeli baherize kuruga omu nsi ya Misri, aha kiro eki okwezi okwo kwabonekyeireho, bakahika omu ihamba rya Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Ku baarugire Refidimu, baahika omu ihamba rya Sinai, baateera amahema omuri eryo ihamba; kandi Abaisraeli baaguma omu rusiisira omu maisho g'orushozi." 
Exodus19:3 Musa yainamuka ahari Ruhanga, MUKAMA yaamweta naayema aha rushozi, yaagira ati: Oku nikwo oraagambire enju ya Yakobo, noogambira Abaisraeli, oti:" 
Exodus19:4 Mukareeba ebi naakozire Abanyamisri, kandi naimwe oku naabatwariire aha mapapa nk'empungu, nkabareeta ahariinye." 
Exodus19:5 N'ahabwekyo ku murihurira eiraka ryangye, mwarinda endagaano yangye, muryaba abantu bangye ahabwangye abatoorainwe omu mahanga goona; ahakuba ensi yoona n'eyangye;" 
Exodus19:6 kandi muryambeera obukama bw'abanyamurwa n'eihanga eririkwera. Ebyo nibyo bigambo ebi oraagambire Abaisraeli. 
Exodus19:7 Musa yaija, yaayeta abakuru b'abantu, yaata omu maisho gaabo ebigambo ebyo byona ebi MUKAMA yaamuragiire." 
Exodus19:8 Abantu boona baagarukiramu hamwe, nibagira bati: Byona ebi MUKAMA yaagamba, nitwija kubikora. Musa yaagambira MUKAMA ebigambo ebyo ebi abantu baagamba." 
Exodus19:9 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Reeba, niinyija ahariiwe omu kicu kikwaitse, ngu abantu bahurire ningamba naiwe, babone kukwikiriza ebiro byona. Bwanyima Musa yaagambira MUKAMA ebigambo by'abantu." 
Exodus19:10 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Irooko oze omu bantu, obeeze eri izooba na nyencakare, boozye ebijwaro byabo," 
Exodus19:11 aha kiro kya kashatu bashangwe beeteekateekire; ahakuba ahari ekyo kiro kya kashatu MUKAMA naija kushuuma aha rushozi Sinai omu maisho g'abantu boona. 
Exodus19:12 Oteereho abantu obugarukiro okwehinguririza orushozi, obagire oti: Mwerinde, mutainamuka aha rushozi, n'obu kwakuba okukora aha bugarukiro bwarwo; omuntu weena oraakore aha rushozi, buzimazima naija kwitwa;" 
Exodus19:13 kandi hatagira omuntu weena owaamukoraho, kureka bamwitse amabaare, nari bamurashe; n'obu eraabe enyamaishwa nari omuntu, atagumaho. Enzamba ku eraagambe akasirikiriro, bainamukye, bahikye aha rushozi." 
Exodus19:14 Bwanyima Musa yaashuuma orushozi, yaaza omu bantu, yaabeeza, baayozya ebijwaro byabo;" 
Exodus19:15 yaagambira abantu ati: Ekiro kya kashatu kishangye mweteekateekire; mutagira obu muhikire abakazi baanyu. 
Exodus19:16 Ku bwaseesire aha kiro kya kashatu, enkuba zaahinda, emirabyo yaatyankana, ekicu kikwaitse kyaija ahari orwo rushozi, eiraka ry'enzamba ryagamba munonga, abantu boona, abaabaire bari omu rusiisira, baatetema." 
Exodus19:17 Musa yaashohoza abantu omu rusiisira kubugana Ruhanga, baayemerera ahansi y'orushozi." 
Exodus19:18 Orwo rushozi Sinai rwona rwacumba omwika, ahakuba MUKAMA akarushuumaho naizira omu muriro; omwika gwagwo gwacumbuuka nk'ogw'ekikoomi, orushozi rwona rwatengyeta munonga." 
Exodus19:19 Eiraka ry'enzamba ku ryayeyongyeire kugamba munonga, Musa yaagamba, MUKAMA yaamugarukamu n'eiraka." 
Exodus19:20 MUKAMA yaashuuma aha rushozi Sinai, aha mutwe gwarwo, yaayeta Musa kwinamuka aha mutwe gw'orwo rushozi; Musa yainamuka." 
Exodus19:21 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Irooko oshuume, oyehanangirize abantu, batakaayoga aha bugarukiro kuhika ahu MUKAMA ari kumushamaarira, baingi omuribo bakacwekyerera." 
Exodus19:22 Kandi n'abanyamurwa abairira haihi MUKAMA beeyeze, MUKAMA atakaabagwaho." 
Exodus19:23 Musa yaagambira MUKAMA ati: Abantu tibarikubaasa kwinamuka ahari oru rushozi Sinai; ahakuba okaturagiira oti: Oteho obugarukiro okwehinguririza orushozi, orweze." 
Exodus19:24 MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Irooko oshuume, haza oinamukye na Arooni; kwonka abanyamurwa n'abantu barekye kwoga aha bugarukiro kuhika ahu MUKAMA ari, atakaabagwaho." 
Exodus19:25 Musa nikwo kushuuma, akaza ahu abantu bari, akabibagambira." 
Exodus20:1 Ruhanga akagamba ebigambo ebi byona, naagira ati:" 
Exodus20:2 Niinye MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misri, omu nju y'obuhuuku." 
Exodus20:3 Otarigira baaruhanga abandi, nyowe ndiho." 
Exodus20:4 Otaryekorera ekishushani kyona ekibaizire, n'obu kyakuba ekishushani ky'ekintu kyona ekiri ahaiguru omu iguru, nari ekiri omu nsi ahansi, nari ekiri omu maizi okuzimu;" 
Exodus20:5 Otaribiinamira, kandi otaribiheereza; ahakuba nyowe MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ndi Ruhanga ow'eihato, ntura abaana eby'okushiisha bya baishebo abarikuunyanga, okuhitsya aha b'obusingye bwa kashatu n'obwa kana;" 
Exodus20:6 kwonka abaana b'abarikunkunda bakoorobera ebiragiro byangye, mbagirira embabazi okuhitsya obusingye enkumi n'enkumi." 
Exodus20:7 Otarizaanisa eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; ahakuba MUKAMA tarimubara nk'otaine rubanja orikuzaanisa eiziina rye. 
Exodus20:8 Ijuka kweza ekiro kya sabato; 
Exodus20:9 omu biro mukaaga ogume okore; obe nimwo waakorera emirimo yaawe yoona; 
Exodus20:10 kwonka ekiro kya mushanju niyo sabato ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; otarikoreraho omurimo gwona, iwe nari mutabani waawe, nari muhara waawe, nari omuhuuku waawe, nari omuzaana waawe, nari amatungo gaawe, nari omunyaihanga ori omu ka yaawe;" 
Exodus20:11 ahabw'okuba omu biro mukaaga nimwo MUKAMA yaahangiire eiguru n'ensi, enyanja n'ebirimu byona, akahuumura aha kiro kya mushanju; nikyo MUKAMA yaaheereire omugisha ekiro kya mushanju, akakyeza." 
Exodus20:12 Otiine sho na nyoko, obone kumara ebiro bingi omu nsi, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha." 
Exodus20:13 Otariita. 
Exodus20:14 Otarishambana. 
Exodus20:15 Otariiba. 
Exodus20:16 Otaribeiherera mutaahi waawe. 
Exodus20:17 Otaryetenga enju ya mutaahi waawe; otaryetenga muka mutaahi waawe, n'obu yaakuba omuhuuku we, nari omuzaana we, nari ente ye, nari endogoya ye, n'obu kyakuba ekintu kyona ekya mutaahi waawe." 
Exodus20:18 Abantu boona ku baahuriire okuhinda kw'enkuba, baareeba okutyankana kw'emirabyo, baahurira eiraka ry'enzamba, kandi baareeba orushozi nirucumba omwika, baatetema, baayemerera hare munonga." 
Exodus20:19 Baagira Musa bati: Obe niiwe waagamba naitwe, nitwija kuhurira; kwonka Ruhanga arekye kugamba naitwe, tutakaafa." 
Exodus20:20 Musa yaagarukamu abantu ati: Mutatiina; ahakuba Ruhanga yaija kubagyeza, ngu okutiinwa kwe kubagume omumaisho, murekye kushiisha." 
Exodus20:21 Abantu baayemerera hare munonga; reero Musa we yairira haihi omwirima ndindindi, ahu Ruhanga yaabaire ari." 
Exodus20:22 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Oku nikwo orangambirire Abaisraeli ebi ndikubagambira nti: Imwe ahabwanyu mwayereebera oku naagamba naimwe niinyema omu iguru. 
Exodus20:23 Mutaryekorera baaruhanga abandi kubamparika; baaruhanga b'efeeza nari ab'ezaabu mutaribeekorera. 
Exodus20:24 Ombumbire eitambiro ry'eitaka, otambireho ebitambo byawe eby'okwotsya, n'empongano zaawe ez'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, entaama zaawe n'ente zaawe; omu mwanya gwona ogu eiziina ryangye ririijukirwaho, ndyaija ah' ori, nkuhe omugisha." 
Exodus20:25 Kandi ku orinkorera eitambiro ry'amabaare, otaririkoresa amabaare gabaizire; ahakuba ku oriribaizisaho oti ekyoma kyawe, oryaba orihagaire." 
Exodus20:26 Otarita amatembero aha itambiro ryangye kutemberaho, orekye kureebwa ojwariireho busha." 
Exodus21:1 Ebi nibyo biragiro ebi oraate omu maisho gaabo. 
Exodus21:2 Ku origura Omuheburaayo kuba omuhuuku waawe, akuheereze emyaka mukaaga; omu mwaka gwa mushanju agyende n'obusingye, ataine ki ayecungwize." 
Exodus21:3 Ku ariba aizire wenka, agyende wenka; ku ariba aizire n'omukazi, omukazi we agyende nawe." 
Exodus21:4 Mukama we ku arimushwererera omukazi, yaamuzaarira abaana b'aboojo nari ab'abaishiki, ogwo mukazi n'abaana be baryaba aba mukama we; we agyende wenka." 
Exodus21:5 Kwonka ogwo muhuuku ku aryegambira butunu ati: Ninkunda mukama wangye n'omukazi wangye kandi n'abaana bangye; tindikwenda kugyenda kuruga omu buhuuku; 
Exodus21:6 mukama we aryamutwara omu maisho ga Ruhanga, amwemereze aha rwigi nari aha kiti ky'omuryango, amufumure okutu n'empindu; omuhuuku ogwo agume naamukorera ebiro byona." 
Exodus21:7 Omushaija ku aritunda muhara we kuba omuzaana, atariruga omu buzaana, nk'oku abahuuku batwazibwa." 
Exodus21:8 Ku ariba atashemeize mukama we, owaabaire amwereeteire kumushwera, amurekye acungurwe; tarigira bushoboorozi bw'okumutunza abanyamahanga, ahabw'okuba niwe ariba amureebize." 
Exodus21:9 Kandi ku arimushwererera omutabani, amutwaze nka muhara we." 
Exodus21:10 Ku arimuharika, atarituubya aha by'okurya bye, nari aha bijwaro bye, n'obu kwakuba okumwitira embu." 
Exodus21:11 Ku ariba atamuhikiize ebyo byonshatu, aryagyenda atazimuuriirwe." 
Exodus21:12 Oriteera omuntu, akamwita, nawe aitwe." 
Exodus21:13 Kwonka omuntu ku ariita ondi atamugwereire, beitu kyaruga ahari Ruhanga kumugwa omu mikono, ndyakuteeraho omwanya, ogu ashemereire kuhungiramu." 
Exodus21:14 Omuntu ku aritaahirira mutaahi we, yaamureebya, yaamwita nkana, omwihe aha itambiro ryangye, aitwe." 
Exodus21:15 Oriteera ishe nari nyina, aitwe." 
Exodus21:16 Oriiba omuntu, akamutunda, nari bakamukwata akimwine, aitwe." 
Exodus21:17 Orijuma ishe nari nyina, aitwe." 
Exodus21:18 Abantu ku baritongana, omwe yaateera mugyenzi we eibaare nari entomi, ataafa, kwonka yaaguma aha kishegu arwaire," 
Exodus21:19 ku ariimuka, yaashotookyera aha kibango, owaamuteire atarigiibwaho orubanja, kureka arihe ebiro ebi amazire arwaire, kandi amuragurize okuhitsya obu arikira gye." 
Exodus21:20 Omuntu ku ariteera omuhuuku we nari omuzaana we enkoni, yaamugwisaho, aryaheebwa ekiheneso;" 
Exodus21:21 kwonka ogwo muhuuku ku arimaraho ekiro kimwe nari bibiri, tariheebwa kiheneso ahakuba ogwo muhuuku n'empiiha ze." 
Exodus21:22 Abashaija ku barirwana, baasaasa omukazi oine enda, enda yaarugamu, kwonka ataagira kundi oku yaaba, owaamusaasa aryariha iba w'ogwo mukazi, nk'oku arimurihisa; kandi aryariha, nk'oku abaramuzi barisiima." 
Exodus21:23 Kwonka ku arigira okundi oku yaaba, obwo amagara garyarihwa agandi," 
Exodus21:24 eriisho ririhwe erindi, eriino ririhwe erindi, ekiganja kirihwe ekindi, ekigyere kirihwe ekindi," 
Exodus21:25 okwotsya kuhoorerwe okundi, obuhuta buhoorerwe obundi, n'okuteerwa kuhoorerwe okundi." 
Exodus21:26 Omuntu ku ariteera omuhuuku we nari omuzaana we, yaamwata eriisho, aryamurekura, arugye omu buhuuku ahabw'eryo riisho." 
Exodus21:27 Kandi ku ariteera omuhuuku we nari omuzaana we, yaamuhigura eriino, aryamurekura, arugye omu buhuuku ahabw'eryo riino." 
Exodus21:28 Ente ku ericumita omushaija nari omukazi, yaamwita, egyo nte baryagiitsa amabaare, kandi etaririibwa; kwonka mukama waayo atarigiibwaho orubanja." 
Exodus21:29 Kwonka egyo nte ku eraabe yaabaire neecumita abantu, baagambira mukama waayo, yaayanga kugirinda, bwanyima yaita omushaija nari omukazi, egyo nte baryagiitsa amabaare, na mukama waayo bamwite." 
Exodus21:30 Ku barimucwa eby'okwecunguza, ahe ebi barimucwa byona ahabw'okucungura amagara ge." 
Exodus21:31 N'obu ericumita mutabani w'omuntu nari muhara w'omuntu, mukama w'ente aryatwazibwa, nk'ekiragiro ekyo oku kiri." 
Exodus21:32 Kandi egyo nte ku ericumita omuhuuku nari omuzaana, mukama waayo aryariha mukama waabo shekeli makumi ashatu z'efeeza, n'egyo nte bagiitse amabaare." 
Exodus21:33 Omuntu ku aritsiga ekiina kyashami, nari yaarima ekiina, ataakitinda, ente nari endogoya yaakigwamu," 
Exodus21:34 mukama w'ekyo kiina aryagiriha, ahe mukama waayo empiiha, kandi omutumbi gwayo guryaba ogwa mukama w'ekiina." 
Exodus21:35 Ente y'omuntu ku ericumita ey'ondiijo, yaagiita, baryatunda egyo ehuriire, babagane empiiha zaayo, kandi bagarukye babagane n'eyaitwa." 
Exodus21:36 Nari ku kirimanywa ngu ente egyo eshangwa ecumita, kandi mukama waayo tagirinda, aryariha endi omu mwanya gwayo, kandi omutumbi guryaba ogwa kiriha." 
Exodus22:1 Omuntu ku ariiba ente nari entaama, yaagiita nari yaagitunda, egyo nte aryagiriha ente itaano, kandi egyo ntaama agirihe entaama ina. Aryariha; kwonka ku ariba ataine kantu, aryatundwa ahabw'obushuma bwe." 
Exodus22:2 Omushuma ku arishangwa naafumura enju, baamuteera, yaafa, tihaine origiibwaho orubanja ahabw'eshagama ye;" 
Exodus22:3 kwonka ku barimwita bwaseesire, baryagiibwaho orubanja ahabw'eshagama ye." 
Exodus22:4 Ekiibirwe ku barishanga akiine kikihuriire, yaaba nte, nari endogoya nari entaama, aryagiriha ibiri." 
Exodus22:5 Omuntu ku aryonesa nkana omusiri gw'ondi, nari omusiri gwe ogw'emizaabibu; nari ku aritsibura amatungo ge, gaayona omusiri gw'ondiijo, aryamuriha aha bi ahingire ebirikukira oburungi, nari amurihe aha byana by'emizaabibu eby'omu musiri gwe ebirikukira oburungi." 
Exodus22:6 Omuriro ku guryaka, gwakwata amahwa, gwayotsya ebiba by'engano, nari ezikyemereire, nari omusiri gwona, owaatweka ogwo muriro aryariha byona ebyasya." 
Exodus22:7 Omuntu ku aribiitsya mutaahi we empiiha nari ebindi bintu, byaibirwa omu nju ye, obiibire ku ariboneka, amurihe kabiri." 
Exodus22:8 Kwonka obiibire ku aribura, mukama w'enju aryairira Ruhanga haihi, kimanywe ku atarakwatsire ha bintu bya mutaahi we." 
Exodus22:9 Ahakuba okuryangatanisa ekintu kyona, yaaba nte nari endogoya nari entaama, nari ekijwaro nari ekintu kyona ekibuzire, eki nyinakyo yaahamya ati: Nikyo eki; orubanja rwabo bombi ruryatonganirwa omu maisho ga Ruhanga; ou Ruhanga aricwera orubanja rukamusinga, aryariha mutaahi we kabiri." 
Exodus22:10 Omuntu ku arihereka mutaahi we endogoya nari ente nari entaama, nari ekitungirwe kyona ngu akiriise, kyafa, nari kyagira oku kyaba, nari kyatwarwa hataine okireebire," 
Exodus22:11 habeho okurahira MUKAMA ahagati yaabo bombi, kiherekwa ku atarakwatsire ha kintu kya mutaahi we; mukama waakyo aryaikiriza okwo kurahira, onu arekye kuriha." 
Exodus22:12 Kwonka ku kiriibirwa owa kiherekwa, aryariha mukama waakyo." 
Exodus22:13 Ku kiritaanyagurwa enyamaishwa, areete ekiriira kyakyo kibe eky'okuhamya ku kiri ekye; obwo taririha kitaanyagwirwe." 
Exodus22:14 Omuntu ku aritiiza ekintu kyona ekya mutaahi we, kyasiisikara, nari kyafa, mukama waakyo atariho, buzimazima nyakukitiizibwa aryakiriha." 
Exodus22:15 Kwonka mukama waakyo ku ariba ariho, tarikiriha. Kandi ku kiriba kiguririirwe, kiryagwana n'eki baakiguririire." 
Exodus22:16 Omuntu ku aribeihabeiha omwishiki otakamanyaga mushaija, kandi otarikugambwa bugyenyi, yaabyama nawe, aryamujuga, amushwere." 
Exodus22:17 Kwonka ishe ku aryangira kimwe kumumuhingira, aryariha enjugano nk'ezi bajuga omwishiki." 
Exodus22:18 Otariikiriza omurogikazi kugumaho. 
Exodus22:19 Oribyama n'enyamaishwa weena, aitwe." 
Exodus22:20 Oritambira Ruhanga ondiijo weena ekitambo, atari MUKAMA, acwekyererezibwe kimwe." 
Exodus22:21 Omunyaihanga otarimukora kubi, n'obu kwakuba okumuhata; ahakuba naimwe mukaba muri abanyaihanga omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus22:22 Mutaribonabonesa omufaakazi weena nari efuuzi. 
Exodus22:23 Ku murigira eki mwabaitsa, bantakira, buzimazima ndyahurira okutaka kwabo," 
Exodus22:24 ngirire imwe ekiniga kingi, mbaitse rurara; abakazi baanyu babe abafaakazi, n'abaana baanyu babe efuuzi." 
Exodus22:25 Ku origuza omworo weena omu bantu bangye empiiha, otarimutwaza nk'abaihuza boona oku bagira, kandi otarimushaba enshaagi." 
Exodus22:26 Ku oriba waakwatiriziibwe omwenda gwa mutaahi waawe, otarirenzya eizooba otagumugaruriire;" 
Exodus22:27 ahabw'okuba nigwo ayeshweka gwonka; nikyo kijwaro ky'omubiri gwe. Noogira ngu aryayeshweka ki? Kandi ku arintakira, ndyamuhurira; ahakuba ndi omunyambabazi." 
Exodus22:28 Otarijuma Ruhanga, n'obu kwakuba okukyeena omutegyeki w'eihanga ryawe." 
Exodus22:29 Otarikyerererwa kuntoijera ahari byona ebi oshaarwire, kandi n'aha by'okunywa ebirugire omu manyuukiro gaawe. Omujigaijo omuri batabani baawe oryamumpa." 
Exodus22:30 Kandi nikwo oritwaza ente zaawe n'entaama zaawe; omujigaijo gwayo guryamara ebiro mushanju na nyinagwo; aha kiro kya munaana oryaguntoijera. 
Exodus22:31 Muryaba abantu abaanyereziibwe; n'ahabw'ekyo mutarirya enyama n'ekintu kyona eki enyamaishwa eriire, ekatsiga omu ishwa; muryaguma mukitambikire embwa." 
Exodus23:1 Otaritwara enkuru z'ebishuba; otarikwatanisa n'omubi okuba mushinja w'eitima. 
Exodus23:2 Otarikurata abaingi kukora ebibi; ku oryetwa kuba mushinja, otarigwera orubaju rw'abaingi okajurira eby'okusingisiriza orubanja;" 
Exodus23:3 kandi otarigwera orubaju rw'omuntu, ngu ahabw'okuba n'omworo." 
Exodus23:4 Ku oribugana ente y'omuzigu waawe, nari endogoya ye ehabire, ogimutangire." 
Exodus23:5 Ku orishanga endogoya y'orikukwanga egwire n'omutwaro, otaryehuzya, okatsiga naafa kubi atyo, kureka omuhwere kugiimutsya." 
Exodus23:6 Otariita orubanja rw'omworo w'owaanyu, yaaba naatongana." 
Exodus23:7 Oyetantare ekigambo kyona eky'ebishuba; kandi otariita otaine rubanja kandi ohikiriire; ahabw'okuba omubi tindimwihaho rubanja. 
Exodus23:8 Otarirya enguzi, ahakuba enguzi eita amaisho g'abarikureeba, kandi ekiikamya ebigambo by'abataine rubanja." 
Exodus23:9 Otariita kubi omunyaihanga, haza kunu noomanya omutima gw'omunyaihanga; ahabw'okuba naimwe mukaba muri abanyaihanga omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus23:10 Oryamara emyaka mukaaga noohinga emisiri yaawe, kandi nooshaaruura ebi oyerizemu;" 
Exodus23:11 kwonka omu mwaka gwa mushanju ogirekye eraare, abooro barye ebyemerizemu; kandi ebiritsigaramu biriibwe enyamaishwa. Okwo nikwo oritwaza omusiri gwawe ogw'emizaabibu, n'ogw'emizeituuni." 
Exodus23:12 Omu biro mukaaga obe nimwo waakorera emirimo yaawe; aha kiro kya mushanju ohuumure, ente yaawe n'endogoya yaawe zihuumure, mutabani w'omuzaana waawe n'omunyaihanga bagarukwemu amaani." 
Exodus23:13 Mute omutima aha bi mbagambiire byona; mutarigira obu mugambire aha maziina ga baaruhanga abandi, kandi gatarihurirwa omu kanwa kaanyu." 
Exodus23:14 Oryaguma ogire obugyenyi bw'ebiro bikuru ahabwangye kashatu omu mwaka. 
Exodus23:15 Oryagira obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe; omare ebiro mushanju noorya emigaati etatumbisiibwe, nk'oku naakuragiire, omu bunaku obwatairweho omu kwezi Abibu, ahakuba nikwo waarugiiremu Misri; hatarigira owaija omu maisho gangye engaro nsha." 
Exodus23:16 Kandi oryagira obugyenyi bw'eigyesha ry'ebi waahingire omu misiri, nigwo muganuro gw'ebi waahendekyeire; kandi ku oriheza kushaaruura byona eby'omu misiri yaawe ebi waahendekyeire aha muheru gw'omwaka, oryagira obugyenyi bw'eishaaruura." 
Exodus23:17 Oyetwa omushaija weena aryaija areebwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga kashatu omu mwaka. 
Exodus23:18 Otarihonga eshagama y'ekitambo, eki ntambiirwe, hamwe n'omugaati ogutumbisiibwe; kandi ebishaju by'obugyenyi bwangye otaribiraaza okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Exodus23:19 Omuganuro gw'ebirikubanza kwera omu misiri yaawe, oryaguma ogureete omu nju ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe. Otariteeka omwana gw'embuzi omu mahenehene ga nyinagwo." 
Exodus23:20 Reeba, nintuma maraika okukwebembera, n'okukurinda omu muhanda, akakuhitsya omu mwanya ogu naakuteekateekyeire." 
Exodus23:21 Omworobere, ohurire eiraka rye, otamugwisa kubi; ahakuba tarisaasira bicumuro byanyu; ahabw'okuba eiziina ryangye riri omuriwe." 
Exodus23:22 Kwonka ku orihurira eiraka rye, otaireho omutima, waakora byona ebi ndikugamba, obwo ndyaba omuzigu w'abazigu baawe, n'omubisha w'ababisha baawe." 
Exodus23:23 Ahakuba maraika wangye aryakwebembera, akuhitsye omu Baamori, Abahiiti, Abaperizi, Abanyakanaani, Abahiivi n'Abayebusi, mbamareho." 
Exodus23:24 Otariramya baaruhanga baabo, otaribaheereza, n'obu kwakuba okutwaza nkabo; kureka oryabahwerekyerereza kimwe, n'enyomyo zaabo ez'amabaare ozisheenyagure." 
Exodus23:25 Muryaheereza MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, nawe aryaha eby'okurya byawe n'amaizi gaawe omugisha; kandi ndyaiha endwara omuriimwe." 
Exodus23:26 Tihaine orirugwamu enda, nari oriba engumba omu nsi yaawe; kandi ndyahitsya omubaro gw'ebiro byawe." 
Exodus23:27 Ndyayohereza okutiinisa kwangye kukwebembere, mpahaaze emitima y'abantu boona abu orihikamu, ndeetere abazigu baawe boona kukuhunga." 
Exodus23:28 Kandi ndyayohereza enwa, zikwebembere, nizo ziribinga Abahiivi n'Abanyakanaani n'Abahiiti omu maisho gaawe." 
Exodus23:29 Kwonka tindibabinga mu maisho gaawe kuruga omu nsi omu mwaka gumwe gwonka, ensi etakaaba ekifurukwa, n'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba zikakanya, zikakunyangaraza." 
Exodus23:30 Kureka ndyababinga mporampora omu maisho gaawe, okuhitsya obu orikanya, okahungura ensi." 
Exodus23:31 Kandi ndyakuteeraho omwatano okuruga aha Nyanja erikutukura okuhika aha Nyanja y'Abafilistia, n'okuruga aha ihamba okuhika aha mugyera Furaati; ahakuba ndyahayo abantu abatwire omu nsi egyo omu mikono yaawe, obabingye barugye omu maisho gaawe." 
Exodus23:32 Otariragaana nabo endagaano n'obu kwakuba okuragaana na baaruhanga baabo. 
Exodus23:33 Batariguma omu nsi yaawe, nyentsya bakakuncumuzaho; ahabw'okuba ku oriheereza baaruhanga baabo, buzimazima kiryakubeera omutego." 
Exodus24:1 Ruhanga yaagambira Musa ati: Inamuka, iwe na Arooni na Nadabu na Abihu n'abakuru b'Abaisraeli makumi mushanju, muze ei MUKAMA ari, mumuramize hangahari." 
Exodus24:2 Musa wenka abe niwe yairira haihi MUKAMA, kwonka abandi batamwirira haihi; kandi abandi boona batainamuka nawe." 
Exodus24:3 Musa yaaza omu bantu, yaabagambira ebigambo bya MUKAMA byona n'ebiragiro byona; abantu boona baagarukiramu hamwe, nibagira bati: Ebigambo byona ebi MUKAMA yaagamba, nitwija kubikora." 
Exodus24:4 Musa yaahandika ebigambo bya MUKAMA byona; kandi yaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, yaayombeka eitambiro ahansi y'orushozi, n'enyomyo ikumi na ibiri, nk'enganda za Israeli ikumi na ibiri oku zaabaire ziri." 
Exodus24:5 Yaatuma abatsigazi b'omu Baisraeli, baahongyera MUKAMA ebitambo by'okwotsya, baamutambira ebitambo by'ente eby'okusiima ahabw'obusingye." 
Exodus24:6 Musa yaabaganisa eshagama omu bicweka bibiri ebirikwingana; kimwe yaakita omu nyabya, ekindi yaakimiisiira aha itambiro." 
Exodus24:7 Bwanyima yaakwata ekitabo ky'endagaano, yaakishomera abantu; nabo baagarukamu bati: Byona ebi MUKAMA yaagamba, nitwija kuguma nitubikora, kandi tubyorobere." 
Exodus24:8 Musa yaatwara eshagama, yaagimiisiira abantu, naagira ati: Mureebe eshagama y'endagaano, ei MUKAMA yaaragaana naimwe, nk'ebigambo ebyo byona oku biri." 
Exodus24:9 Bwanyima Musa yainamuka na Arooni na Nadabu na Abihu n'abakuru b'Abaisraeli makumi mushanju; 
Exodus24:10 baareeba Ruhanga wa Israeli; ahansi y'ebigyere bye nihashusha nk'amabaare ga safiro agaariire, agarikumurinkana nk'eiguru." 
Exodus24:11 Abo bakuru b'Abaisraeli Ruhanga tiyaagira ku yaabagira; kureka baamureeba, baarya, baanywa." 
Exodus24:12 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Inamuka, onshangye aha rushozi, ogumeyo; Nyowe niinyija kukuha ebishate by'amabaare, ebiriho ebiragiro n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi mpandiikire ngu obyegyese." 
Exodus24:13 Musa yaimuka na Yoshua omuheereza we, yainamuka aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga." 
Exodus24:14 Ku yaabaire atakagyenzire, yaagambira abo bakuru ati: Mututegyerereze aha, okuhitsya obu turigaruka, tukabashanga aha; kandi reeba, mwatsigara na Arooni na Huuri; omuntu weena oriba aine eki arikufa, abe nibo yaareeba." 
Exodus24:15 Bwanyima Musa yainamuka aha rushozi, ekicu kyarushweka." 
Exodus24:16 Ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kyaza aha rushozi Sinai, n'ekicu kyarushweka okumara ebiro mukaaga; aha kiro kya mushanju MUKAMA yaayeta Musa, naayema omuri ekyo kicu." 
Exodus24:17 Ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kikaba nikishusha nk'omuriro ogurikurya busha aha mutwe gw'orushozi omu maisho g'Abaisraeli. 
Exodus24:18 Musa yaataaha omu kicu, yainamuka aha rushozi; Musa yaamara ahari orwo rushozi ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Exodus25:1 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Exodus25:2 Gambira Abaisareli bandeetere emitoijo; mwakiire omutoijo ogu omuntu weena arantoijere, ayekundiire." 
Exodus25:3 Egi niyo mitoijo yaabo ei muryakiira: ezaabu, efeeza, emiringa," 
Exodus25:4 emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari n'eya bafuta, obwoya bw'embuzi," 
Exodus25:5 empu z'empaya z'entaama zizigirwe n'erangi erikutukura, empu z'engongi, embaaho z'eminyinya," 
Exodus25:6 amajuta g'etabaaza, eby'emigaju eby'okuta omu majuta ag'okushukaho, n'eby'okukoramu obubaane oburikutaamirana," 
Exodus25:7 amabaare agarikwetwa shohamu, n'agandi mabaare ag'okuhundisa efodi n'eky'aha kifuba." 
Exodus25:8 Kandi bankorere Omwanya ogurikwera, mbone kutuura ahagati omuribo." 
Exodus25:9 Nk'ebi ndikwija kukworeka byona oku biri, omuringo gw'eihema n'ogw'ebintu byaryo byona, mube nikwo mwabikora." 
Exodus25:10 Baryakora eshanduukye omu munyinya; oburaingwa bwayo mikono eibiri n'ekicweka, obuhango bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka, n'obwemi bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus25:11 Ogishekye n'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, ogishwekye omunda n'enyima, kandi ogyehinguririze omuguno gw'ezaabu." 
Exodus25:12 Oyazye ezaabu, ogikoremu ebifunga bina, obite aha maguru gaayo ana, bibiri aha rubaju rumwe, kandi bibiri aha rundi." 
Exodus25:13 Okore n'emigamba omu munyinya, ogishwekye n'ezaabu." 
Exodus25:14 Ote egyo migamba omu bifunga by'omu mbaju z'eshanduukye, bagume bagiheekyese." 
Exodus25:15 Emigamba egyo egume omu bifunga by'eshanduukye, etariihwamu." 
Exodus25:16 Kandi omuri egyo shanduukye oryatamu Ebirikuhamya ebi ndikuha. 
Exodus25:17 Okore ekitebe ky'okusaasira omu zaabu eshemeziibwe; oburaingwa bwakyo mikono ebiri n'ekicweka, n'obuhango bwakyo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus25:18 Kandi okore ebishushani bya baakerubi babiri omu zaabu; omu kubikora obiheeshe aha mitwe yombi ey'ekyo kitebe ky'okusaasira. 
Exodus25:19 Okore ekya kerubi omwe aha mutwe gumwe, n'eky'ondi aha gundi; mubiheesherane n'ekitebe ky'okusaasira aha mitwe yaakyo yombi." 
Exodus25:20 Baakerubi bashashaanure amapapa gaabo ahaiguru, bagasangize ekitebe ky'okusaasira, boorekyeraine nibareeba ekyo kitebe." 
Exodus25:21 Ekitebe ky'okusaasira okite aha shanduukye, kandi omu shanduukye otemu Ebirikuhamya ebi ndikuha." 
Exodus25:22 Aho niho ndiguma nimbugaabuganira naimwe, nkagamba naiwe ahari byona, ebi ndikugambira kuragiira Abaisraeli, niinyema ahaiguru y'ekitebe ky'okusaasira, ahagati ya baakerubi abari aha shanduukye y'Ebirikuhamya." 
Exodus25:23 Kandi oryabaija emeeza omu munyinya; oburaingwa bwayo mikono ebiri, obuhango bwayo mukono gumwe, n'obwemi bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus25:24 Ogishwekye n'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, ogiteho omuguno gw'ezaabu gugyehinguririze." 
Exodus25:25 Ogikorere ebizingiti okugyehinguririza, obuhango bwabyo ekita kimwe, nabyo obiteho omuguno gw'ezaabu, gubyehinguririze." 
Exodus25:26 Ogikorere ebifunga bina by'ezaabu, obite aha maguru gaayo, aha nkokora zaayo ina." 
Exodus25:27 Ebifunga ebyo bize haihi n'ebizingiti, bibe eby'okutamu emigamba ey'okuheeka emeeza." 
Exodus25:28 Egyo migamba ogibaije omu munyinya, ogishwekye n'ezaabu, ebe ey'okuheekyesa emeeza." 
Exodus25:29 Okore enyabya zaayo n'ebikopo byayo, kandi okore emidumo yaayo n'ebakuri zaayo eby'okushukisibwa empongano; obiheeshe omu zaabu eshemeziibwe." 
Exodus25:30 Ogume ote ahari egyo meeza emigaati ey'okumurika, ebe omu maisho gangye obutoosha." 
Exodus25:31 Kandi oryakora ekikondo ky'etabaaza omu zaabu eshemeziibwe; omu kukikora okiheeshere hamwe; ekibunu kyakyo n'omukono gwakyo n'ebikopo byakyo n'ebintu ebyebumburikire byakyo n'ebirabyo byakyo, biheesheranwe nakyo." 
Exodus25:32 Kigire amataagi mukaaga agarikuruga ahari ogwo mukono, ashatu aha rubaju rumwe, n'ashatu aha rundi;" 
Exodus25:33 aha itaagi rimwe habeho ebikopo bishatu ebirikushusha nk'ebirabyo by'endozi, hamwe n'ekintu ekyebumburikire n'ekirabyo kyakyo; aha itaagi erindi habeho ebikopo bishatu ebirikushusha nk'ebirabyo by'endozi, hamwe n'ekintu ekyebumburikire n'ekirabyo kyakyo; goona omukaaga nk'oku garikuruga aha mukono gw'etabaaza gabe nikwo gaaba." 
Exodus25:34 Ogwo mukono gw'etabaaza gugire ebikopo bina ebirikushusha nk'ebirabyo by'endozi, n'ebintu ebyebumburikire n'ebirabyo byabyo." 
Exodus25:35 Ekintu ekyebumburikire kiheesheranwe n'omukono gw'etabaaza ahansi ya buri mataagi abiri agarikugurugaho; goona omukaaga gabe nikwo gaaba. 
Exodus25:36 Ebyebumburikire n'amataagi eby'ogwo mukono bibe biheesherainwe nagwo omu zaabu eshemeziibwe. 
Exodus25:37 Oheeshe amatabaaza gaakyo mushanju; bagume bagate ahu garikubaasa kwakira, gakahwezesa omwanya ogugari omumaisho." 
Exodus25:38 Empana zaago n'otusohaani twago biryaba biheesirwe omu zaabu eshemeziibwe. 
Exodus25:39 Ekikondo ky'amatabaaza n'ebintu byago byona biryakorwa omu zaabu eshemeziibwe ey'oburemeezi bw'etalanta emwe. 
Exodus25:40 Oteho omutima kubiheesha, nooreebera aha ky'okureeberaho kyabyo, eki oyorekyeirwe aha rushozi oru." 
Exodus26:1 Kandi oryakora Obutaaho n'emikingo ikumi; ogikore n'emyenda ya kitaani n'eya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari; ogitemu ebishushani bya baakerubi ebikozirwe abanyamwoga baabyo. 
Exodus26:2 Oburaingwa bwa buri mukingo bube mikono makumi abiri na munaana, n'obuhango bwagwo mikono ena; emikingo ebe ey'orugyero rumwe." 
Exodus26:3 Emikingo etaano eteeranwe hamwe, n'endiijo etaano eteeranwe okwayo." 
Exodus26:4 Obaziire obufunga bwa bururu aha mukugiro ogw'aharubaju rw'emikingo etaano ey'okubanza, n'aha mukugiro gw'aha rubaju rw'emikingo endiijo etaano." 
Exodus26:5 Ote obufunga makumi ataano aha mukingo gumwe oguteeraine, n'obundi makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogwa kabiri; obwo bufunga bureebane." 
Exodus26:6 Kandi okore ebikwatsi by'ezaabu makumi ataano, obikwatanisise egyo mikingo; obutaaho bube bumwe." 
Exodus26:7 Kandi oryakora emikingo y'obwoya bw'embuzi ey'okushakaara; okore emikingo ikumi na gumwe. 
Exodus26:8 Oburaingwa bwa buri mukingo bube mikono makumi ashatu, n'obuhango bwagwo mikono ena; egyo mikingo yoona ikumi na gumwe ebe ey'orugyero rumwe." 
Exodus26:9 Emikingo etaano ogiteerane okwayo; n'emikingo mukaaga okwayo ogwa mukaaga ogukube, gureereetere omu maisho g'eihema." 
Exodus26:10 Kandi okore obufunga makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogurikuheererukayo omu y'okubanza, n'obundi makumi ataano aha mukugiro ogw'omukingo ogurikuheererukayo omu ya kabiri." 
Exodus26:11 Okore ebikwatsi by'emiringa makumi ataano, obite omu bufunga, oteerane eihema, ribe rimwe." 
Exodus26:12 Ekicweka ky'omukingo ekiraatsigare aha mikingo y'eihema, nikyo kicweka ky'omukingo ekirikushaagaho, kireereetere enyima y'obutaaho." 
Exodus26:13 Mukono gumwe ogw'emikingo y'obwoya bw'embuzi ogurikushaaga aha rubaju oru n'oru aha buraingwa bw'emikingo y'eihema ereereetere aha mbaju zombi ez'obutaaho, erishwekye." 
Exodus26:14 Kandi okore eby'okushweka Eihema omu mpu z'empaya z'entaama ezizigirwe n'erangi erikutukura, kandi otungikyeho eky'okushakaara ekindi ekikozirwe omu mpu z'engongi." 
Exodus26:15 Kandi oryabaija embaaho z'obutaaho omu munyinya, ozeemereze;" 
Exodus26:16 oburaingwa bwa buri rubaaho rube mikono ikumi, obuhango bwarwo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka;" 
Exodus26:17 okore endimi ibiri omuri buri rubaaho okuruteerana na rugyenzi rwarwo; obe nikwo waakora embaaho zoona ez'obutaaho. 
Exodus26:18 Aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo oteho embaaho z'obutaaho makumi abiri," 
Exodus26:19 kandi okore ebiina makumi ana omu feeza eby'okubyaramu ezo mbaaho makumi abiri; ebiina bibiri ahansi y'orubaaho rumwe ahabw'endimi zaarwo zombi, n'ebindi biina bibiri ahansi y'orundi rubaaho ahabw'endimi zaarwo." 
Exodus26:20 Aha rubaju rw'obutaaho orwa kabiri, oruri aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, habeho embaaho makumi abiri," 
Exodus26:21 n'ebiina byazo by'efeeza makumi ana, ebiina bibiri ahansi y'orubaaho rumwe, n'ebindi bibiri ahansi y'orundi." 
Exodus26:22 Kandi okore embaaho mukaaga ahabw'orubaju rw'obutaaho orw'enyima orurikureeba oburengyerwa-izooba; 
Exodus26:23 okore n'embaaho ibiri ez'enshonda z'obutaaho aha mbaju zombi ez'enyima. 
Exodus26:24 Ezo mbaaho ahansi zitaane, kwonka ahaiguru ziteeranire aha mpeta ey'okubanza; zombi zibe nikwo zaaba; zibe ez'okuhamya ezo nshonda zombi." 
Exodus26:25 aho habeho embaaho munaana n'ebiina byazo by'efeeza, ebiina byona ikumi na mukaaga; ahansi y'orubaaho rumwe ebiina bibiri, n'ahansi y'orundi bibiri." 
Exodus26:26 Kandi okore embazi itaano omu munyinya ahabw'embaaho z'orubaju rumwe rw'obutaaho," 
Exodus26:27 ezindi itaano ahabw'embaaho z'orundi rubaju; n'ezindi itaano ahabw'embaaho z'orubaju rw'obutaaho orw'enyima orurikureeba oburengyerwa-izooba. 
Exodus26:28 Orubazi rw'ahagati y'ezindi rwogyemu, ruhikye oku n'oku." 
Exodus26:29 Ezo mbaaho ozishwekye n'ezaabu, oheeshe empeta z'ezaabu ez'okurabyamu ezo mbazi; nazo ozishewkye n'ezaabu." 
Exodus26:30 Oryayemereza obutaaho bushushane n'eky'okureeberaho eki oyorekirwe aha rushozi oru. 
Exodus26:31 Kandi oryakora omukingo gwa bururu na bujwa na karari na kitaani, ogutemu ebishushani bya baakerubi ebikozirwe abanyamwoga baabyo." 
Exodus26:32 Oguhanikye aha nyomyo ez'eminyinya ina ezishwekirwe n'ezaabu, n'eby'okuhanikaho by'ezaabu; ezo nyomyo ina zibyarwe omu biina by'efeeza bina." 
Exodus26:33 Omukingo ogwo oguhanikye ahansi y'ebikwatsi biri. Bwanyima ote eshanduukye y'Ebirkuhamya omunda y'omukingo; omukingo ogwo guryaba ogw'okutaanisa Omwanya ogurikwera n'Omwanya ogurikwera munonga; 
Exodus26:34 Kandi ote ekitebe kiri ky'okusaasira aha shanduukye y'Ebirikuhamya omu Mwanya ogurikwera munonga. 
Exodus26:35 Kandi emeeza eri ogite kunu y'omukingo; aharikureebana nayo omu butaaho oteho ekikondo ky'etabaaza, kize aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, kandi emeeza eze aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa bumosho." 
Exodus26:36 Kandi oryakora omukingo gw'okukinga aha muryango gw'eihema, ogukore omu myenda ya bururu, eya bujwa, eya karari n'eya kitaani, gutariizemu amabara gacwereraine." 
Exodus26:37 Kandi ogwo mukingo ogukorere enyomyo z'eminyinya itaano, ozishwekye n'ezaabu; eby'okuhanikaho byazo bibe eby'ezaabu; kandi oyazye omuringa, ogukoremu ebiina byazo bitaano." 
Exodus27:1 Kandi oryakora eitambiro omu munyinya, oburaingwa bwaryo mikono etaano, obuhango bwaryo mikono etaano, embaju zoona zingaingane; obwemi bwaryo bube mikono eshatu." 
Exodus27:2 Aha nshonda zaaryo ina oribaijeho amahembe ana; ago mahembe gabaiziranwe naryo; orishwekye n'emiringa. 
Exodus27:3 Oriheeshere eby'okuyooreraho eiju ryaryo n'eby'okuriyooresa n'enyabya n'eby'okwihuza enyama n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro; ebyo bintu byaryo byona obiheeshe omu miringa. 
Exodus27:4 Oriheeshere ekintu ekishobeekaine nk'ekigoye, okiheeshe omu muringa; okiheeshere ebifunga by'emiringa bina, obite aha nshonda zaakyo ina;" 
Exodus27:5 okite ahansi y'omuguno ogwehinguririize eitambiro, kirugye ahansi, kihikye rwagati y'eitambiro." 
Exodus27:6 Kandi obaijere eitambiro emigamba omu munyinya, ogishwekye n'emiringa." 
Exodus27:7 Egyo migamba yaaryo ogite omu bifunga, eze embaju zombi z'eitambiro, ebe ey'okuriheekyesa." 
Exodus27:8 Oribaije omu mbaaho, omunda ribe omurangara; barikore nk'oku oryorekirwe aha rushozi oru." 
Exodus27:9 Kandi oryakora ekibuga ky'Obutaaho; aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo orugo rube orw'emikingo ya kitaani, oburaingwa bwayo mikono igana aha rubaju rumwe;" 
Exodus27:10 orwo rugo rugire enyomyo makumi abiri, n'ebiina by'okuzitamu makumi abiri; bibe eby'emiringa; eby'okuhanikaho eby'ahari ezo nyomyo n'obufunga bwabyo bibe eby'efeeza." 
Exodus27:11 Kandi n'aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho orugo rube orw'emikingo, oburaingwa bwayo mikono igana; enyomyo zaarwo makumi abiri n'ebiina byazo makumi abiri bibe eby'emiringa, kandi eby'okuhanikaho eby'aha nyomyo n'obufunga bwabyo bibe eby'efeeza." 
Exodus27:12 Aha rubaju rw'oburgengyerwa-izooba narwo habeyo emikingo, obuhango bwayo mikono makumi ataano; enyomyo zaayo zibe ikumi, n'ebiina byazo nabyo ikumi." 
Exodus27:13 Orubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba narwo obuhango bwarwo bube mikono etaano. 
Exodus27:14 Emikingo y'orugo rw'aha rubaju rumwe rw'eirembo ebe mikono ikumi n'etaano, enyomyo zaayo zibe ishatu, n'ebiina byazo nabyo bibe bishatu." 
Exodus27:15 Orundi rubaju rwaryo narwo rugire orugo rw'emikingo ya mikono ikumi n'etaano; enyomyo zaayo zibe ishatu, n'ebiina byazo nabyo bibe bishatu." 
Exodus27:16 Kandi eirembo ry'orwo rugo rigire omukingo gwa mikono makumi abiri obuhango, ogukozirwe omu myenda ya bururu, eya bujwa, eya karari n'eya kitaani, gutariizemu amabara gacwereraine; enyomyo zaagwo zibe ina, n'ebiina byazo bibe bina." 
Exodus27:17 Enyomyo zoona ez'orwo rugo ziteebweho obufunga bw'efeeza; eby'okuhanikaho byazo bibe eby'efeeza, n'ebiina byazo bibe eby'emiringa." 
Exodus27:18 Oburaingwa bw'ekibuga kyona bube mikono igana n'obukiika bwakyo mikono makumi ataano embaju zoona, n'obwemi bw'orugo bube mikono etaano; rube orw'emyenda ya kitaani, kandi ebiina by'enyomyo zaarwo bibe eby'emiringa." 
Exodus27:19 Ebintu byona eby'Obutaaho n'eby'okubukoresa byona n'enkondo zaabwo zoona n'enkondo z'orugo zoona bibe eby'emiringa. 
Exodus27:20 Kandi oryaragiira Abaisraeli bakureetere amajuta marungi agashekwirwe omu mizeituuni ahabw'okuhemba, gabe ag'okwatsya etabaaza obutoosha." 
Exodus27:21 Omu ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu enyima y'omukingo ogukingiire Ebirikuhamya Arooni n'abatabani babe niho baaguma nibashemereza etabaaza, egume neeyakira omu maisho ga MUKAMA, okuruga omu mwabazyo okuhitsya omu kasheeshe. Kibe ekiragiro ky'ebiro byona eki Abaisraeli bashemereire kworobera omu busingye bwabo bwona." 
Exodus28:1 Oyeirize Arooni mukuru waawe n'abatabani, Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazaari na Itamaari, obaihe omu Baisraeli, bankorere omurimo gw'obunyamurwa." 
Exodus28:2 Okorere Arooni mukuru waawe ebijwaro birikwera, bimuhaise ekitiinisa n'okureebeka gye." 
Exodus28:3 Kandi ogambire boona abarikumanya munonga kubaziira, abu nyijwize omwoyo gw'obwengye, bakore ebijwaro bya Arooni okumushoroora, abone kunkorera omurimo gw'obunyamurwa." 
Exodus28:4 Ebijwaro ebi baraakore nibyo ebi eky'aha kifuba, efodi, ekanzu yaayo, n'ekooti y'akatimba, ekikwemba n'eky'okwezirikisa; kandi bakorere Arooni mukuru waawe n'abatabani ebijwaro birikwera, babone kunkorera omurimo gw'obunyamurwa." 
Exodus28:5 Batware eby'okukoresa, ezaabu, emyenda ya bururu, eya bujwa, eya karari n'eya bafuta." 
Exodus28:6 Efodi baryagikoresa ezaabu n'emyenda ya bururu, eya bujwa, eya karari n'eya kitaani, abahangu baabyo babe nibo baagikora." 
Exodus28:7 Egire ebiremu bibiri aha mabega, biteerane emikugiro yaayo yombi, efodi ebone kuteeranwa." 
Exodus28:8 Eky'okwezirikisa ekigikoreirweho, ekirukirwe abanyamwoga, kikorwe nkayo, kandi kirukwe omu bintu bimwe n'ebyayo, ezaabu, emyenda ya bururu, eya bujwa, eya karari n'eya kitaani." 
Exodus28:9 Kandi ogire amabaare abiri agarikwetwa shohamu, ogasharureho amaziina g'abaana ba Israeli;" 
Exodus28:10 amaziina gaabo mukaaga ogahandiikye aha ibaare rimwe, n'amaziina g'abandi mukaaga ogahandiikye aha rindi, nk'oku barikukuratana omu bukuru bwabo." 
Exodus28:11 Nk'oku omusharuzi asharura aha ibaare akamanyiso, obe nikwo waasharura ahari ago mabaare gombi amaziina g'abaana ba Israeli; ogahamise ezaabu ekwegire."
