Exodus28:12 Ago mabaare ogate aha biremu bya efodi eby'aha mabega, gabe ag'okwijukiraho abaana ba Israeli; kandi Arooni aryaguma atware amaziina gaabo aha mabega ge gombi omu maisho ga MUKAMA kuba ekiijutsyo." 
Exodus28:13 Okore omu zaabu ekwegire eby'okuhamya amabaare," 
Exodus28:14 n'emikuufu y'ezaabu eshemeziibwe ebiri, ogikore omu zaabu ehotoire nk'omugoye guhotoire." 
Exodus28:15 Okore n'eky'aha kifuba eky'okumanyisa eby'oburyo, ekikozirwe omunyamwoga; okikore nk'oku efodi ekozirwe, okikore omu zaabu, omu myenda ya bururu, omu ya bujwa, omu ya karari, n'omu ya kitaani," 
Exodus28:16 kingane embaju zoona kikubiraine, oburaingwa bwakyo bube ekita, n'obuhango bwakyo nabwo ekita." 
Exodus28:17 Okiteho emishorongo y'amabaare ena; omushorongo ogw'okubanza gubemu amabaare aga sarudio, topazi na barekesi," 
Exodus28:18 omushorongo gwa kabiri simaragido, safiro na arimasi," 
Exodus28:19 omushorongo gwa kashatu huwakinto, kalukedoni na amesuusito," 
Exodus28:20 n'omushorongo ogwa kana berulo, shohamu na yasipi; goona gahamibwe omu zaabu ekwegire." 
Exodus28:21 Ago mabaare garyaba ikumi n'abiri, nk'amaziina g'abaana ba Israeli oku gari; gahandiikwe nk'oku basharura akamanyiso, buri rimwe rihandiikweho eiziina ryaryo, ahabw'enganda ikumi na ibiri." 
Exodus28:22 Kandi okorere eky'aha kifuba emikuufu ehotoire nk'emigoye ekozire omu zaabu eshemeziibwe. 
Exodus28:23 Oheeshere eky'aha kifuba empeta z'ezaabu ibiri, ozite aha nshonda zombi ez'aha mutwe gwakyo," 
Exodus28:24 orabye emikuufu y'ezaabu yombi omuri ezo mpeta ez'aha nshonda zombi ez'eky'aha kifuba; 
Exodus28:25 emitwe yombi ey'emikuufu yombi ogikome aha by'okuhamya amabaare, obone kukikwatsa aha biremu bya efodi eby'aha mabega aha rubaju rwabyo orw'omumaisho." 
Exodus28:26 Kandi okore ezindi mpeta z'ezaabu ibiri, ozite aha nshonda ibiri ez'omukugiro gw'eky'aha kifuba ogw'omunda, aha rubaju oruri haihi na efodi." 
Exodus28:27 Kandi okore empeta z'ezaabu ibiri, ozite aha mukugiro gw'ahansi ogw'ebiremu bibiri eby'aha mabega omumaisho, ahu birikuteeranira n'eky'okwezirikisa efodi ekirukirwe abanyamwoga." 
Exodus28:28 Kandi eky'aha kifuba bakikome aha mpeta za efodi, bakikomese otwenda twa bururu nibaturabya omu mpeta zaakyo, kibone kuza aha ky'okwezirikisa kya efodi, ekirukirwe abanyamwoga, eky'aha kifuba kirekye kuyuga kikataana na efodi." 
Exodus28:29 Arooni aryaguma ajware aha mutima gwe amaziina g'abaana ba Israeli agahandiikirwe aha ky'aha kifuba eky'okumanyisa eby'oburyo, yaaba naataaha omu Mwanya ogurikwera, kuba ekiijutsyo omu maisho ga MUKAMA obutoosha." 
Exodus28:30 Kandi omu ky'aha kifuba eky'okumanyisa eby'oburyo oryatamu Urimu na Tumimu, bibe biri aha mutima gwa Arooni yaaba naaza omu maisho ga MUKAMA; Arooni aryatwara orubanja rw'Abaisraeli aha mutima gwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA obutoosha." 
Exodus28:31 Kandi oryakora ekanzu ya efodi, yoona ebe bururu." 
Exodus28:32 Egire ebitsya by'okurabyamu omutwe; egire n'omutarizo ogurukire okwehinguririza ebitsya byayo, nk'oku bakora ebitsya by'ekijwaro kya kitaani, ngu etataaguka." 
Exodus28:33 Aha mukugiro gwayo ogw'ahansi obaziireho ebirikushusha amakoma-mahanga ebirukire omu huuzi za bururu na bujwa na karari, bigwehinguririze; ohundemu amajugo g'ezaabu, gagyende nigaza ahagati yaabyo," 
Exodus28:34 eijugo ry'ezaabu rikuratwe eikoma-mahanga, eijugo ry'ezaabu eikoma-mahanga, bityo bityo, okwehinguririza omukugiro gw'ekanzu gwona." 
Exodus28:35 Arooni agume agijware, yaaba naaza kuheereza; ago majugo gagambe, yaaba naaza omu Mwanya ogurikwera omu maisho ga MUKAMA, kandi naarugayo, atakaafa." 
Exodus28:36 Kandi oryakora ekipande ky'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, okisharureho enyuguta, ezirikushusha nk'akamanyiso kasharwirwe aha ibaare, ezihandiikirwe ngu: Oyereziibwe MUKAMA;" 
Exodus28:37 okite aha kikwemba, obikwatanise n'otwenda twa bururu, kize omu maisho g'ekyo kikwemba." 
Exodus28:38 Ekyo kipande kigume aha buso bwa Arooni, kandi Arooni aryayekorera okutahikiirira kw'Abaisraeli oku barishiisha bareetsire empongano zaabo ezirikwera; kigume aha buso bwe obutoosha, zibone kwikirizibwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Exodus28:39 Ekooti oryagiruka omuri bafuta, n'ekyo kikwemba nakyo okikore omuri bafuta, kandi eky'okwezirikisa ekyo okitarizemu amabara gacwereraine." 
Exodus28:40 Batabani ba Arooni obakorere ekooti n'eby'okwezirikisa n'enkofiira, okubahaisa ekitiinisa n'okureebeka gye." 
Exodus28:41 Obijwekye Arooni mukuru waawe hamwe n'abatabani; kandi obashukyeho amajuta, obashoroore, obeeze, babone kunkorera omurimo gw'obunyamurwa." 
Exodus28:42 Kandi obakorere empare za kitaani, bazijware, barekye kujwara busha; ezo mpare zirugye omu bwezirikiro zihikye omu bibero;" 
Exodus28:43 zijwarwe Arooni n'abatabani, baaba nibaza omu ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, nari baaba nibaza aha itambiro kuheereza omu Mwanya ogurikwera, batakaayereetaho orubanja, bakafa. Ekyo kiryaba ekiragiro ky'ebiro byona ahariwe n'aha baijukuru abarimukurata." 
Exodus29:1 Oku nikwo oritwaza noobeeza kunkorera omurimo gw'obunyamura. Oryatwara enimi nto, empaya z'entaama ibiri ezitaine kamogo," 
Exodus29:2 emigaati etatumbisiibwe, otugaati twa keeki otutatumbisiibwe oturimu amajuta g'emizeituuni, na capati ezitatumbisiibwe ezisiigirweho amajuta; obikore omu saano y'engano ey'obunono;" 
Exodus29:3 obite omu kiibo kimwe, obireete hamwe n'egyo nimi n'ezo mpaya ibiri." 
Exodus29:4 Kandi Arooni n'abatabani obareete aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, oboozye n'amaizi." 
Exodus29:5 Bwanyima oiheyo ebijwaro, ojwekye Arooni ekooti n'ekanzu ya efodi, na efodi, n'eky'aha kifuba; omuzirikye n'eky'okwezirikisa ekirukirwe abanyamwoga eky'ahari efodi;" 
Exodus29:6 omujwekye ekikwemba omu mutwe; aha kikwemba oteho ekirunga kirikwera. 
Exodus29:7 Bwanyima oiheyo amajuta ag'okushukaho, ogamushukye aha mutwe, ogamushoroorese." 
Exodus29:8 Kandi oreete n'abatabani, obajwekye ekooti;" 
Exodus29:9 Arooni n'abatabani obazirikye n'eby'okwezirikisa, kandi obajwekye enkofiira, obunyamurwa bube obwabo, buhamibwe ekiragiro ekitarihwaho. Okwo nikwo orishoroora Arooni n'abatabani." 
Exodus29:10 Bwanyima oryareeta enimi omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, Arooni n'abatabani bate engaro zaabo aha mutwe gwayo." 
Exodus29:11 Oitire enimi omu maisho ga MUKAMA aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu," 
Exodus29:12 otware aha shagama y'enimi, ogisiigye aha mahembe g'eitambiro n'orukumu rwawe; eshagama eraatsigareho ogishukye ahansi aha kibunu ky'eitambiro;" 
Exodus29:13 otware ebishaju byona ebishwekire amara, ekishaabo ky'aha kitugu, entsigo zombi n'ebishaju ebiziriho, obyokyeze aha itambiro." 
Exodus29:14 Kwonka enyama z'egyo nimi, oruhu rwayo n'efa yaayo, obyokyeze kimwe aheeru y'orusiisira; ekyo n'ekitambo ky'ekibi." 
Exodus29:15 Kandi oryareeta emwe ahari ezo mpaya z'entaama; Arooni n'abatabani bate engaro zaabo aha mutwe gwayo; 
Exodus29:16 bwanyima ogiite, otware eshagama yaayo, ogishukyere embaju zoona ez'eitambiro;" 
Exodus29:17 omutumbi gwayo ogucwemu ebicweka, oyozye amara gaayo n'amaguru gaayo, obiteerane n'ebindi bicweka byayo n'omutwe gwayo." 
Exodus29:18 Egyo mpaya yoona ogyokyeze kimwe aha itambiro; ekyo n'ekitambo ekyokize ahari MUKAMA; kandi n'empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro, ehongyeirwe MUKAMA, ey'ekisooroora kirungi." 
Exodus29:19 Oryatwara endiijo mpaya, Arooni n'abatabani bate engaro zaabo aha mutwe gwayo." 
Exodus29:20 Bwanyima ogiite, otware aha shagama yaayo, ogisiigye aha nshonga y'okutu kwa buryo kwa Arooni n'aha nshonga z'amatu ga buryo ag'abatabani, n'aha bikumu bishaija eby'engaro zaabo eza buryo, n'aha bikumu bishaija eby'ebigyere byabo ebya buryo; eshagama eraatsigareho ogishukyere embaju zoona ez'eitambiro." 
Exodus29:21 Kandi otware aha shagama ey'aha itambiro n'aha majuta ag'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora, obimiisiire Arooni n'ebijwaro bye, n'abatabani n'ebijwaro byabo, abe oyeziibwe n'ebijwaro bye, n'abatabani n'ebijwaro byabo." 
Exodus29:22 Kandi oryatwara ebishaju by'egyo mpaya n'omukira gwayo ogw'ebishaju, n'ebishaju byayo ebishwekire eby'omunda, n'ekishaabo ky'ekitugu kyayo, n'entsigo zombi n'ebishaju ebiziriho, n'ekivune ky'okuguru kwa buryo; ahakuba egyo n'empaya y'entaama ey'okushoroorwa kw'abanyamurwa;" 
Exodus29:23 otware n'omugaati gumwe, n'akagaati kamwe ka keeki akarimu amajuta na capati emwe, obiihe omu kiibo ky'emigaati etatumbisiibwe etuura omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Exodus29:24 Ebyo byona obite omu ngaro za Arooni n'abatabani, babizongazongye, ebe empongano ezongazongiibwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA;" 
Exodus29:25 bwanyima obiihe omu ngaro zaabo, obyotsye n'ekitambo ekirikwokibwa aha itambiro, kibe ekisooroora kirungi omu maisho ga MUKAMA; egyo n'empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ehongyeirwe MUKAMA." 
Exodus29:26 Kandi oryatwara enkoro y'egyo mpaya y'entaama ey'okushoroorwa kwa Arooni, ogizongazongyeze omu maisho ga MUKAMA, ebe empongano ezongazongiibwe; enkoro egyo eryaba omugabo gwawe." 
Exodus29:27 Kandi oyeze egyo nkoro y'empongano ezongazongiibwe, n'ekivune ky'empongano erikwihwaho ahari egyo mpaya y'entaama ey'okushoroorwa, kibe ekya Arooni n'abatabani." 
Exodus29:28 Ekivune ekyo kiryaguma kibe ekya Arooni n'abatabani eki Abaisraeli bashemereire kubaha ebiro byona, ahakuba n'empongano erikwihwa omu mpongano z'Abaisraeli ez'okusiima ahabw'obusingye; niyo mpongano yaabo ei baihaho ahabwa MUKAMA." 
Exodus29:29 Kandi ebijwaro ebirikwera ebya Arooni biryaba eby'abatabani abarimukurata, babe nibyo baashukirwamu amajuta, kandi babe nibyo baashoroorerwamu." 
Exodus29:30 Omutabani oriba omunyamurwa omu mwanya gwe, aryamara ebiro mushanju naabijwara, yaaba naaza omu ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, okuheereza omu Mwanya ogurikwera." 
Exodus29:31 Kandi oryatwara empaya y'entaama ey'okushoroorwa kw'omunyamurwa, oteekyere enyama yaayo omu mwanya gwona ogurikwera;" 
Exodus29:32 Arooni n'abatabani barye egyo nyama y'empaya y'entaama n'omugaati oguri omu kiibo, babiriire aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu." 
Exodus29:33 Kandi barye ebyo bintu ebihongirwe ahabw'okubashoroora n'okubeeza; kwonka otari munyamurwa ataribiryaho, ahakuba n'ebirikwera." 
Exodus29:34 Ku harigira enyama nari omugaati ebyatsigara aha by'okushoroora okuhitsya omu kasheeshe, oryabyotsya omu muriro; tibiririibwa, ahakuba n'ebirikwera." 
Exodus29:35 Okwo nikwo oritwaza Arooni n'abatabani nka byona ebi nkuragiire oku biri; oryamara ebiro mushanju noobeeza. 
Exodus29:36 Buri izooba oryahayo enimi ey'okuhonga ahabw'ekibi, ebe empongano; kandi oryayeza eitambiro, ku oriba noorihongyerera; kandi orishukyeho amajuta ahabw'okuryeza." 
Exodus29:37 Oryamara ebiro mushanju noohongyerera eitambiro, nooryeza; ribe eririkwera munonga; kyona ekirikora ahari eryo itambiro kiryaba ekirikwera." 
Exodus29:38 Ebi nibyo origuma noohongyera aha itambiro; buri izooba oryaguma nootamba abaana b'entaama babiri abahikize omwaka; 
Exodus29:39 omu kasheeshe ohongye omwana gw'entaama gumwe, n'omu mwabazyo ohongye ogundi;" 
Exodus29:40 kandi hamwe n'ogwo mwana gw'entaama ohe ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi ekya eefa y'esaano y'obunono ejwangize n'ekicweka kimwe kya kana kya hiini y'amajuta g'emizeituuni agashekwirwe, kandi ekicweka kimwe kya kana kya hiini ya viinyo, kuba empongano y'eky'okunywa." 
Exodus29:41 Ogundi mwana gw'entaama oryaguhonga omu mwabazyo, nagwo oguhongye n'empongano y'esaano n'ey'eky'okunywa, nk'eby'omu kasheeshe, kuba ekisooroora ekirungi, empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro, ehongyeirwe MUKAMA." 
Exodus29:42 Omu busingye bwanyu bwona kiryaguma kibe ekitambo ky'okwotsya, nikitambirwa aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu omu maisho ga MUKAMA, ahu ndibugaabuganira naimwe, nkagamba naiwe." 
Exodus29:43 Aho niho ndibugaabuganira n'Abaisraeli; kandi eryo Ihema riryayezibwa ekitiinisa kyangye. 
Exodus29:44 Ndyayeza eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, n'eitambiro; kandi Arooni n'abatabani ndyabeeza, babone kunkorera omurimo gw'obunyamurwa." 
Exodus29:45 Kandi ndyaguma omu Baisraeli, mbe Ruhanga waabo." 
Exodus29:46 Nabo baryamanya ku ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misri, ngu ngume omuribo. Niinye MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo." 
Exodus30:1 Kandi oryakora ekyoterero ky'obubaane, okibaije omu munyinya;" 
Exodus30:2 oburaingwa bwakyo kibe mukono gumwe, obuhango bwakyo nabwo mukono gumwe, kiingaingane embaju zoona, obwemi bwakyo kibe mikono ebiri, kandi amahembe gaakyo gabaiziranwe nakyo." 
Exodus30:3 Okishwekye n'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, ahaiguru n'omu mbaju zaakyo n'aha mahembe gaakyo; kandi okiteho omuguno gw'ezaabu gukyehinguririze." 
Exodus30:4 Okiheeshere ebifunga bibiri by'ezaabu, obite ahansi y'omuguno gwakyo aha mbaju zaakyo zombi, bibe eby'okutamu emigamba y'okukiheekyesa." 
Exodus30:5 Egyo migamba ogibaije omu minyinya, ogishwekye n'ezaabu." 
Exodus30:6 Okite omu maisho g'omukingo ogukingiire eshanduukye y'Ebirikuhamya omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'okusaasira ekiri ahaiguru y'Ebirikuhamya, ahu ndiguma nimbugaabuganira naiwe." 
Exodus30:7 Arooni aryayotereraho obubaane obw'emigaju erikutaamirana, abwotere buri kasheeshe, yaaba naashemeza amatabaaza;" 
Exodus30:8 kandi n'omu mwabazyo, Arooni yaaba naahemba amatabaaza, abwotere, bube obubaane oburiguma nibwoterwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA obutoosha omu busingye bwanyu bwona." 
Exodus30:9 Mutarikyotereraho obubaane obw'ogundi muringo, n'obu kyakuba ekitambo ekyokize, nari empongano y'esaano; kandi mutarikishukaho empongano yoona ey'ebyokunywa." 
Exodus30:10 Rimwe omu mwaka Arooni aheere aha mahembe gaakyo eky'okurihiirira; eshagama y'empongano ey'okurihiirira ekibi abe niyo yaarihiirira eryo itambiro rimwe omu mwaka omu busingye bwanyu bwona; n'ekirikwera munonga ahari MUKAMA. 
Exodus30:11 Kandi MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus30:12 Ku oribara Abaisraeli, buri muntu areetere MUKAMA eky'okucungura amagara ge omuri orwo rubaro, abantu batakaateerwa rufu noobabara." 
Exodus30:13 Eki nikyo omuntu weena, ohikire kuza omu barikubarwa, ariha; ekicweka kimwe kya kabiri kya shekeli, nka shekeli ey'Omwanya ogurikwera oku erikwingana, (shekeli emwe neingana geera makumi abiri); ekyo kicweka kya shekeli kibe eky'okuhongyera MUKAMA." 
Exodus30:14 Buri muntu weena ohikire kuza omu barikubarwa, ohikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, aryaha MUKAMA eky'okuhonga ekyo;" 
Exodus30:15 abatungi batarirenzya aha kicweka kya shekeli, n'abooro batarikicwaho, mwaba nimuha MUKAMA eky'okurihiirira amagara gaanyu." 
Exodus30:16 Oryaiha aha Baisraeli efeeza ez'okubarihiirira, ozite aha murimo gw'eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, zibeere Abaisraeli ekiijutsyo ky'okubaijukiraho omu maisho ga MUKAMA, okurihiirira amagara gaanyu." 
Exodus30:17 Kandi MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus30:18 Oryaheesha ekinaabiro omu miringa, n'ekibunu kyakyo obe nimwo waakiheesha, kibe eky'okunaabiramu; okite ahagati y'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu n'eitambiro; kandi okitemu amaizi." 
Exodus30:19 Omwo nimwo Arooni n'abatabani bariguma nibanaabira engaro zaabo n'ebigyere byabo; 
Exodus30:20 baaba nibaza kutaaha omu ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, bagume banaabe amaizi batakaafa, nari baaba nibaza aha itambiro okukora omurimo gwabo gw'okwotsya empongano ey'okwotsya omu muriro ey'okuhongyera MUKAMA;" 
Exodus30:21 banaabe engaro zaabo n'ebigyere byabo batakaafa; kibabeere ekiragiro ky'ebiro byona, we n'oruzaaro rwe omu busingye bwabo bwona." 
Exodus30:22 Kandi MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus30:23 Otware eby'emigaju erikuhita endiijo yoona, shekeli magana ataano za sumuruna y'amaizi, shekeli magana abiri na makumi ataano z'omudarasiini ogurikutaamirana, shekeli magana abiri na makumi ataano za kaane erikutaamirana," 
Exodus30:24 na shekeli magana ataano za kasiya, nka shekeli ey'Omwanya ogurikwera oku eri; kandi na hiini emwe y'amajuta g'emizeituuni." 
Exodus30:25 Obijwanzye, bibe amajuta agarikwera ag'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora, emigaju ejwangiibwe abanyamwoga; gabe amajuta agarikwera ag'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora." 
Exodus30:26 Ogashukye aha ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, n'aha shanduukye y'Ebirikuhamya," 
Exodus30:27 n'aha meeza n'ebintu byayo byona, n'aha kikondo ky'etabaaza n'ebintu byakyo, n'aha kyoterero ky'obubaane," 
Exodus30:28 n'aha itambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo n'ebintu byaryo byona, n'aha kinaabiro n'ekibunu kyakyo." 
Exodus30:29 Obyeze, bibe ebirikwera munonga. Ekiribikoraho kyona kiryaba ekirikwera." 
Exodus30:30 Kandi ogashukye ahari Arooni n'abatabani, obeeze, babone kunkorera omurimo gw'obunyamurwa." 
Exodus30:31 Kandi ogambire Abaisraeli oti: Aga garyaba amajuta aganyereziibwe ag'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora omu busingye bwanyu bwona. 
Exodus30:32 Gatarishukwa aha mubiri gw'omuntu weena otari munyamurwa kandi mutarikora agandi agajwangize nkago; n'agarikwera, naimwe garyababeera agarikwera." 
Exodus30:33 Orijwanzya amajuta agarikushushana nago, nari origashuka aha muntu otari munyamurwa, aryacuubwa omu ihanga rye." 
Exodus30:34 Kandi MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Otware eby'emigaju egi erikutaamirana, natafi, shekelesi, na kelibena, eby'emigaju ebyo hamwe n'ogundi oguri kwetwa lebona; byona bibe nibinganisa oburemeezi." 
Exodus30:35 Obikoremu obubaane, nk'oku abanyamwoga baabwo babijwanzya, otemu omwonyo, bube obushemeire kandi oburikwera;" 
Exodus30:36 otwareho bukye, obuhonde, obunozye, obute omu maisho g'Ebirikuhamya omu ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, ahu ndibugaabuganira naiwe; naimwe buryababeera oburikwera munonga." 
Exodus30:37 Kandi obubaane obu orikora bujwangire nk'obwo, otaribwejwangiza; buryakubeera obwereziibwe MUKAMA." 
Exodus30:38 Orijwanzya obubaane oburikushushana nabwo, kubukoresa nk'omugaju, acuubwe omu ihanga rye." 
Exodus31:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus31:2 Reeba, naayeta Bezaleeli omu iziina mutabani wa Uuri, mwene Huuri, ow'omuruganda rwa Yuda." 
Exodus31:3 Naamwijuza Omwoyo wa Ruhanga n'obwengye n'okwetegyereza n'okumanya n'obuhangu bwona obw'okukora; 
Exodus31:4 okugunja emirimo y'obuhangu, okuheesha ezaabu n'efeeza n'emiringa," 
Exodus31:5 okubaija amabaare ag'okuhunda omu bintu, okusharura ebibaizirwe omu miti, n'okukora emirimo y'emiringo yoona." 
Exodus31:6 Kandi reeba, naamutaho Oholiabu, mwene Ahisamaaki, ow'omu ruganda rwa Daani. Kandi boona abaine omutima ogurikwetegyereza, naabaha obwengye, ngu bakore ebi naakuragiira byona," 
Exodus31:7 Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, eshanduukye y'Ebirikuhamya, ekitebe ky'okusaasira ekigifundikiire, n'ebintu byona eby'Eihema," 
Exodus31:8 n'emeeza n'ebintu byayo, n'ekikondo ky'etabaaza eky'ezaabu eshemeziibwe n'ebintu byakyo byona, n'ekyoterero ky'obubaane," 
Exodus31:9 n'eitambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo n'ebintu byaryo byona, n'ekinaabiro n'ekibunu kyakyo," 
Exodus31:10 n'ebijwaro ebibaziirwe gye, n'ebijwaro ebirikwera ebya Arooni omunyamurwa n'eby'abatabani, eby'okujwara nibakora omurimo gw'obunyamurwa," 
Exodus31:11 n'amajuta ag'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora, n'obubaane bw'emigaju erikutaamirana ahabw'Omwanya ogurikwera. Nkebi naakuragiira byona oku biri, babe nikwo baabikora." 
Exodus31:12 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus31:13 Kandi ogambire Abaisraeli oti: Buzimazima mutaribura kurinda sabato zangye; ahabw'okuba niko kamanyiso ahagati yangye naimwe omu busingye bwanyu bwona, mubone kumanya ku niinye MUKAMA orikubeeza." 
Exodus31:14 N'ahabw'ekyo muryaguma murinde sabato; ahabw'okuba n'erikwera ahariimwe; omuntu weena origishiisha, aryaitwa; omuntu weena origikoreraho omurimo gwona, acuubwe omu ihanga rye." 
Exodus31:15 Omu biro mukaaga emirimo ebe nimwo yaakorerwa; kwonka ekiro kya mushanju niyo sabato ey'okuruhuukiriraho kimwe, eyereziibwe MUKAMA. Orikora omurimo gwona aha izooba rya sabato, buzimazima aitwe." 
Exodus31:16 N'ahabw'ekyo Abaisraeli baryarinda sabato, bagume nibahitsya emigyenzo yaayo omu busingye bwabo bwona, ebe endagaano etarihwaho." 
Exodus31:17 Ako n'akamanyiso ahagati yangye n'Abaisraeli akarigumaho ebiro byona; ahabw'okuba omu biro mukaaga nimwo MUKAMA yaahangiire eiguru n'ensi, akahuumura aha kiro kya mushanju, akaruhuuka." 
Exodus31:18 MUKAMA ku yaaherize kugambira na Musa aha rushozi Sinai, yaamuha ebishate by'amabaare bibiri ebiriho Ebirikuhamya, ebihandiikirwe orukumu rwa Ruhanga." 
Exodus32:1 Abantu ku baareebire Musa yaatuura aha rushozi atagarukire, baayeteeranira ahari Arooni, baamugira bati: Imuka, otukorere Ruhanga w'okutwebembera; ahabw'okuba omushaija ori Musa, owaatwihire omu nsi ya Misri, titurikumanya oku abaire." 
Exodus32:2 Arooni yaabagira ati: Mujuure empeta z'ezaabu eziri aha matu g'abakazi baanyu n'aga batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu, muzindeetere." 
Exodus32:3 Abantu boona baajuura empeta ezaabaire ziri aha matu gaabo, baazitwarira Arooni." 
Exodus32:4 Yaaziiha omu ngaro zaabo; ku yaaherize kuziheeshamu ekishushani ky'enimi, yaakishemeza n'ekyoma ekirikusharura. Baagira bati: Iwe Israeli, ogu niwe Ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus32:5 Arooni ku yaakireebire, yaayombeka eitambiro omu maisho gaakyo; yaaranga, naagira ati: Nyencakare nihaija kubaho obugyenyi bw'ekiro kikuru kya MUKAMA." 
Exodus32:6 Ku bwaseesire, baimuka kare, baatamba ebitambo by'okwotsya, baahonga empongano y'okusiima ahabw'obusingye. Abantu baashutama kurya n'okunywa, baimuka kuzaana." 
Exodus32:7 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Irooko, oshuume; ahabw'okuba abantu baawe abu waihire omu nsi ya Misri beesiisire," 
Exodus32:8 baarahuka kuteishuka omuhanda ogu naabaragiire; baayeheeshera ekishushani ky'enimi, baakiramya, baakitambira ebitambo nibagira bati: Iwe Israeli, ogu niwe Ruhanga waawe, owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misri." 
Exodus32:9 Kandi MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Naayetegyereza abantu aba; n'abantu b'ebitsya bigangaire. 
Exodus32:10 N'ahabw'ekyo ndeka, ekiniga kyangye kibaakyeho, mbamareho; haza iwe ndyakuhindura eihanga rihango." 
Exodus32:11 Musa yaayeshengyereza MUKAMA Ruhanga we, naagira ati: MUKAMA, ahabw'enki ekiniga kyawe nikyaka aha bantu baawe, abu waihire omu nsi ya Misri n'obushoboorozi bwingi n'omukono gw'amaani?" 
Exodus32:12 Ahabw'enki nooyenda kureetera Abanyamisri kwesiima nibagira bati: Akabaihayo kubakora kubi, ngu abaitire omu nshozi, abamare omu nsi? Reka ekiniga kyawe kingi, oyegarukyemu, orekye kureeta akabi ako aha bantu baawe." 
Exodus32:13 Ijuka Abarahamu, isaaka na Israeli abairu baawe, abu waagambiire noorahira oti: Ndyakanyisa oruzaaro rwanyu, rube nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, kandi ensi egi yoona ei naagambaho ndyagiha oruzaaro rwanyu, ebe obuhunguzi bwarwo ebiro byona." 
Exodus32:14 MUKAMA yaayegarukamu, yaareka akabi aku yaabaire naayenda kureeta aha bantu be." 
Exodus32:15 Musa yaahinduka, yaashuuma naaruga aha rushozi, aine omu ngaro ze ebishate bibiri ebiriho Ebirikuhamya, ebihandiikire embaju zaabyo zombi omunda n'enyima." 
Exodus32:16 Ebyo bishate bikaba bikozirwe Ruhanga okuhandiika okwo kukaba kuri okwa Ruhanga kusharwirwe aha bishate. 
Exodus32:17 Yoshua ku yaahuriire orwari rw'abantu nibayomba, yaagambira Musa ati: Orwo rwari oruri omu rusiisira n'orw'okurwana." 
Exodus32:18 Musa yaagira ati: Orwo rwari ti rwari rw'abarikuteera akaari ahabw'okubinga, nari orw'abarikuyomba ahabw'okubingwa; kureka oru ndikuhurira, n'orw'abarikweshongora." 
Exodus32:19 Musa ku yaahikire haihi n'orusiisira, yaareeba ekishushani ky'enimi n'abarikuzina, yaagira ekiniga kingi, yaatambika ebishate ebi yaabaire aine omu ngaro, yaabyatira ahansi y'orushozi." 
Exodus32:20 Yaatwara ekishushani eki babaire baheesire, yaakyotsya omu muriro, yaakihondahonda, yaakicwa eiju, yaarinaganaga omu maizi, yaaganywaisa Abaisraeli." 
Exodus32:21 Musa yaabuza Arooni ati: Aba bantu bakugizire bata, waaza kubareetera kukora ekibi kihango ekirikwingana kiti?" 
Exodus32:22 Arooni yaagarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, reka kungirira ekiniga; noomanya aba bantu ku bamaririire kukora kubi;" 
Exodus32:23 ahakuba bangizire bati: Tukorere Ruhanga oraatwebembere, ahakuba omushaija ori Musa owaatwihire omu nsi ya Misri, titurikumanya oku abaire." 
Exodus32:24 Naanye naabagarukamu nti: Oine ezaabu weena, agijuure; nabo baazimpa naazinaga omu muriro, zaarugamu egyo nimi." 
Exodus32:25 Musa ku yaareebire abantu bagomire, (ahakuba Arooni akabaikiriza kugoma, baahinduka eky'okugaaniiza omu bazigu baabo)," 
Exodus32:26 yaayemerera omu irembo ry'orusiisira, yaagira ati: Weena ori aha rubaju rwa MUKAMA, aije ahi ndi. Abaleevi boona bateeranira ah'ari." 
Exodus32:27 Yaabagira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba, naagira ati: Buri muntu ahagatire rurara ye, mugyendagyende hoonahoona omu rusiisira nimuruga aha irembo nimuza aha rindi, buri muntu aite mwene ishe, na mugyenzi we, na mutaahi we." 
Exodus32:28 Abaleevi baakora nk'oku Musa yaabaragiira; aha izooba eryo omu Baisraeli haafa abashaija nk'enkumi ishatu. 
Exodus32:29 Musa yaagira ati: Eri izooba mweyeze ahari MUKAMA, ahakuba buri muntu arwaniise omutabani na mwene ishe, MUKAMA abone kubaha omugisha eri izooba." 
Exodus32:30 Ku bwaseesire, Musa yaagambira abantu ati: Mukozire ekibi kihango; mbwenu naaza kwinamuka ahari MUKAMA; obundi nkaabaasa kukora eky'okurihiirira ekibi kyanyu." 
Exodus32:31 Musa yaagaruka ahari MUKAMA, yaagira ati: Ai bambe, abantu aba bakozire ekibi kihango, baayekorera Ruhanga omu zaabu." 
Exodus32:32 Mbwenu hati, ku oraabe noikiriza kubasaasira ekibi kyabo, obasaasire; kwonka ku oraabe otarikubasaasira, naakweshengyereza onyihe omu kitabo eki waahandiikire." 
Exodus32:33 MUKAMA yaagarukamu Musa ati: Weena oncumwireho, niwe ndaihe omu kitabo kyangye." 
Exodus32:34 Mbwenu irooko otware abantu abo omu mwanya ogu naakugambiire; reeba, maraika wangye naija kukwebembera. Kwonka aha izooba ry'okuhoora, ndyabatura ekibi kyabo." 
Exodus32:35 MUKAMA yaitsa abantu orufu, ahakuba bakakoresa ekishushani ky'enimi eki Arooni yaakozire." 
Exodus33:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Irooko orugye aha, iwe n'abantu abu waihire omu nsi ya Misri, muze omu nsi ei naarahiire Abrahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo, ningira nti: Ndyagiha oruzaaro rwawe." 
Exodus33:2 Naanye ndyayohereza maraika akwebembere, kandi ndyabinga Abanyakanaani, Abaamori, Abahiiti, Abaperizi, Abahiivi n'Abayebusi;" 
Exodus33:3 mutaahe omu nsi y'amate n'obwoki; kwonka Nyowe tindigyenda naimwe, ntakaabaitira omu muhanda; ahabw'okuba muri abantu b'ebitsya bigangaire." 
Exodus33:4 Abantu ku baahuriire ebyo bigambo bibi, baashaasha munonga, tihaagira n'omwe owaajwara eby'okweshemeza." 
Exodus33:5 Ahakuba MUKAMA akaba yaagambiire Musa ati: Gambira Abaisraeli oti: Muri abantu b'ebitsya bigangaire; ku naakugyenda naimwe nangwa n'akaanya kakye, nkaabamaraho. Mbwenu nu, mujuure eby'okweshemeza byanyu, mbone kumanya oku ndaabagire." 
Exodus33:6 N'ahabw'ekyo Abaisraeli baajuura eby'okweshemeza, okutandikira aha rushozi Horebu n'okweyongyerayo." 
Exodus33:7 Kandi okuruga obwo Musa yaaguma naatwara Eihema naariteera aheeru y'orusiisira hare narwo; yaaryeta Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu. Kandi omuntu weena owaabaire aba naasherura MUKAMA, akaba ashohora aza aha Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, eryabaire riri aheeru y'orusiisira." 
Exodus33:8 Musa ku yaabaire aruga omu rusiisira, naaza aha Ihema, abantu boona baimuka, buri muntu ayemerera aha muryango gw'eihema rye, baguma nibamureeba okuhitsya obu araataahe omu Ihema." 
Exodus33:9 Musa ku yaabaire aheza kutaahamu, enyomyo eri ey'ekicu eshuuma, eyemerera aha muryango gw'Eihema, MUKAMA agamba nawe." 
Exodus33:10 Abantu boona bakireeba enyomyo y'ekicu eyemereire aha muryango gw'Eihema, baimuka, baramya, buri muntu ari aha muryango gw'eihema rye." 
Exodus33:11 Okwo nikwo MUKAMA yaabaire agamba na Musa nibareebana, nk'oku omuntu agamba na mugyenzi we. Bwanyima Musa agaruka omu rusiisira; kwonka omuheereza we Yoshua mwene Nuuni, omutsigazi, akaba ataruga omuri eryo Hema." 
Exodus33:12 Musa yaagambira MUKAMA ati: Reeba, nongira oti: Twara abantu aba; kwonka tiwammanyisa u orantume nawe. Kandi okagira oti: Ninkumanya eiziina, kandi ogiriirwe embabazi omu maisho gangye." 
Exodus33:13 Mbwenu nu, ninkweshengyereza, ku ndaabe ngiriirwe embabazi omu maisho gaawe, hati onyorekye enaama zaawe, nkumanye, mbone kuguma ningirirwa embabazi omu maisho gaawe; kandi oijukye eihanga eri ku riri eihanga ryawe." 
Exodus33:14 MUKAMA yaamugarukamu ati: Nyowe nyenka ndyagyenda naiwe, kandi ndyakuha obuhuumure." 
Exodus33:15 Musa yaamugira ati: Iwe wenka ku oraabe otarikugyenda naanye, otatwiha aha." 
Exodus33:16 Mbwenu kiryamanywa kita, nyowe n'abantu baawe ku tugiriirwe embabazi omu maisho gaawe? Tiiwe kugyenda naitwe, kikareetera nyowe n'abantu baawe kugira omutaano n'amahanga goona agari omu nsi?" 
Exodus33:17 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Ekigambo eki eki waagamba nakyo niinyija kukikora; ahabw'okuba ogiriirwe embabazi omu maisho gangye, kandi ninkumanya eiziina." 
Exodus33:18 Musa yaagira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, nyoreka ekitiinisa kyawe." 
Exodus33:19 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Niinyija kurabya oburungi bwangye bwona omu maisho gaawe, ndangye eiziina ryangye YEHOVA omu maisho gaawe; ndyagirira embabazi ou ndigirira embabazi, kandi nsaasire, ou ndisaasira." 
Exodus33:20 Kandi yaamugira ati: Torikubaasa kundeeba hamaisho; ahakuba tihariho muntu orindeeba, akagumaho." 
Exodus33:21 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Reeba, aha rubaju rwangye hariho omwanya, ahu orikwija kwemerera aha rukiri." 
Exodus33:22 Ekitiinisa kyangye ku kiraabe nikihinguraho, niinyija kukuta omu bwatika bwarwo, nkusangire n'ekiganja kyangye, okuhitsya obu ndaarabeho;" 
Exodus33:23 bwanyima nyiheho omukono gwangye, ondeebe omugongo; kwonka aha maisho gangye tiharikwija kureebwa." 
Exodus34:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Shatura ebishate bibiri by'amabaare nk'eby'okubanza; naanye niinyija kubihandiikaho ebigambo ebyabaire biri aha by'okubanza ebi waayatsire. 
Exodus34:2 Nyencakare omu kasheeshe obe oyeteekateekire, oinamukye aha rushozi Sinai, oyeyorekye omu maisho gangye aha mutwe gwarwo." 
Exodus34:3 Hatagira omuntu owainamuka naiwe, kandi otaikiriza omuntu weena kureebwa aha rushozi rwona, n'obu gaakuba amasyo g'entaama nari ag'ente kuriira omu maisho gaarwo." 
Exodus34:4 Musa yaashatura ebishate bibiri by'amabaare nk'eby'okubanza, yaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, yainamuka aha rushozi Sinai nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiire, aine omu ngaro ebyo bishate byombi by'amabaare." 
Exodus34:5 MUKAMA yaashuumira omu kicu, yaayemererayo nawe, yaaranga eiziina rye YEHOVA." 
Exodus34:6 MUKAMA yaaraba omu maisho ga Musa, yaaranga naagira ati: MUKAMA, MUKAMA, Ruhanga ow'okusaasira n'embabazi, otarahuka kugira ekiniga, oijwire embabazi n'amazima," 
Exodus34:7 ogirira embabazi abantu enkumi n'enkumi, osaasira okutahikiirira n'okushiisha n'ekibi; otasingisiriza na kakye abaine orubanja; ohoora abaana ahabw'eby'okushiisha bya baishebo, n'abaijukuru baabo okuhitsya aha busingye bwa kashatu n'obwa kana." 
Exodus34:8 Musa yaarahuka, yainika omutwe ahansi, yaaramya;" 
Exodus34:9 yaagira ati: Ai MUKAMA, mbwenu ku ndaabe naagirirwa embabazi omu maisho gaawe, ninkweshengyereza, MUKAMA, ogyende ahagati yaitu, n'obu turaabe turi eihanga ry'ebitsya bigangaire, osaasire okutahikiirira kwaitu n'ekibi kyaitu, otwakiire tube obuhunguzi bwawe." 
Exodus34:10 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Reeba, nindagaana endagaano; omu maisho g'abantu baawe boona ndyakora eby'okutangaaza ebitakakorwaga mu nsi yoona nari omu ihanga ryona; kandi abantu boona, abu orimu, baryareeba eki MUKAMA arikora, ahakuba eki ndikora, kiryaba eky'okutiinisa." 
Exodus34:11 Ogume oyorobere eki ndikukuragiira eri izooba. Reeba, ndyabinga Abaamori omu maisho gaawe, n'Abanyakanaani, Abahiiti, Abaperizi, Abahiivi n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Oyerinde, otariragaana endagaano n'abatwire omu nsi ei orikuzamu, ekaba omutego omuriimwe;" 
Exodus34:13 kureka musheenye amatambiro gaabo, muhigure enyomyo zaabo, mutemagure na Ashera zaabo." 
Exodus34:14 (Mumanye ngu timuriramya Ruhanga ondiijo weena; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA, ou eiziina rye ririkwetwa Ow'eihato, ni Ruhanga ow'eihato.)" 
Exodus34:15 Otariragaana endagaano n'abatwire omuri egyo nsi; ahakuba ku barikurata baaruhanga baabo nk'abarikuraaya, baabatambira ebitambo, nyentsya omwe aharibo akaakweta, orya aha kitambo kye," 
Exodus34:16 oshwererera batabani baawe bahara baabo, bwanyima bahara baabo bakurata baaruhanga baabo nk'abarikuraaya, bareetera batabani baawe kukurata baaruhanga baabo omu muringo ogwo." 
Exodus34:17 Otaryekorera ebishushani bya baaruhanga ebiheesirwe. 
Exodus34:18 Oryaguma orinde obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe. Omu bunaku obwatairweho omu kwezi Abibu oryamara ebiro mushanju noorya emigaati etatumbisiibwe, nk'oku naakuragiire; ahabw'okuba omuri okwo kwezi Abibu nimwo waarugiire omuri Misri." 
Exodus34:19 Ekiigura-nda kyona n'ekyangye, ekyetwa ekishaija ky'omu matungo gaawe goona ag'ente n'ag'entaama." 
Exodus34:20 Kwonka omujigaijo gw'endogoya oryagucunguza omwana gw'entaama; ku oriba otarikwenda kugucungura, oguhende ebitsya. Emijigaijo ya batabani baanyu yoona muryagicungura. Hatarigira owaija omu maisho gangye engaro nsha." 
Exodus34:21 Omu biro mukaaga oryakora, kwonka aha kiro kya mushanju oryahuumura; omu ibiba n'omu igyesha oryahuumura." 
Exodus34:22 Kandi oryarinda obugyenyi bwa saabiiti mushanju, ez'omuganuro gw'eigyesha ry'engano, kandi n'obugyenyi bw'eishaaruura ry'aha muheru gw'omwaka." 
Exodus34:23 Kashatu omu mwaka abeetwa abashaija boona baryaguma baije, bareebwe omu maisho ga Mukama RUHANGA, Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
Exodus34:24 Ahakuba ndyabinga amahanga, garugye omu maisho gaawe, nyirizeyo emyatano yaawe; ku oriba ogiire kureebwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA kashatu omu mwaka, tihaine muntu weena oryetenga ensi yaawe." 
Exodus34:25 Otarihayo eshagama y'ekitambo ekintambiirwe hamwe n'omugaati ogutumbisiibwe, kandi ekitambo ky'obugyenyi bw'ekiro kikuru ky'Okuhingurwaho kitaritsigaraho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Exodus34:26 Emiganuro y'ebirikubanza kwera omu misiri yaawe oryagireeta omu nju ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe. Otariteeka omwana gw'embuzi omu mahenahene ga nyinagwo. 
Exodus34:27 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Handiika ebigambo ebyo; ahakuba endagaano ei ndagaine naiwe n'Abaisraeli neehamira aha bigambo ebyo. 
Exodus34:28 Musa yaamarayo ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro, ari hamwe na MUKAMA; omu biro ebyo tarariire by'okurya n'obu kwakuba okunywa amaizi. Yaahandiika ahari ebyo bishate by'amabaare ebigambo by'endagaano egyo, nibyo biragiro ikumi." 
Exodus34:29 Musa yaashuuma, yaaruga aha rushozi Sinai, aine ebishate bibiri eby'Ebirikuhamya omu ngaro; ku yaabaire naashuuma, tiyaamanya aha maisho ge ku harikumurinkana, ahakuba akaba naagaaniira na Ruhanga." 
Exodus34:30 Arooni n'Abaisraeli boona ku baareebire Musa, reeba aha maisho ge hakaba nihamurinkana; baatiina kumuhika haihi." 
Exodus34:31 Musa yaabeeta, Arooni n'abategyeki boona ab'eihanga eryo baagaruka ah'ari; Musa yaagaaniira nabo." 
Exodus34:32 Bwanyima Abaisraeli boona bairira haihi; yaabamanyisa ebiragiro byona oku biri, ebi MUKAMA amugambiriire aha rushozi Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Musa ku yaaherize kugamba nabo, yaata eky'okwetwekyerera aha maisho ge." 
Exodus34:34 Kwonka ku yaabaire aza omu maisho ga MUKAMA kugamba nawe, akiihaho okuhitsya ahu araashohorere; kandi ku yaabaire ashohora kugambira Abaisraeli ebi yaaragiirwa," 
Exodus34:35 Abaisraeli bareeba aha maisho ge nihamurinkana; Musa agaruka ayeta eky'okwetwekyerera aha maisho, okuhitsya obu yaabaire agarukayo kugaaniira na MUKAMA." 
Exodus35:1 Musa yaateerana eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli, yaabagira ati: Ebi nibyo MUKAMA abaragiire kukora." 
Exodus35:2 Omu biro mukaaga emirimo ebe nimwo yaakorerwa, kwonka ekiro kya mushanju kiryaba ekiro ekirikwera ahariimwe, sabato ey'okuhuumuririraho kimwe, eyereziibwe MUKAMA; origikoreraho omurimo gwona, aryaitwa." 
Exodus35:3 Mutarihemba omuriro gwona omu maka gaanyu aha izooba rya sabato. 
Exodus35:4 Musa yaagambira eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli ati: Eki nikyo MUKAMA aragiire kukora. 
Exodus35:5 Mwihe omuriimwe emitoijo y'okutoijera MUKAMA; omuntu weena oine omutima ogurikukunda kuha, areete omutoijo gwa MUKAMA; ezaabu, efeeza, emiringa," 
Exodus35:6 emyenda ya bururu, eya bujwa, eya karari, eya bafuta, n'obwoya bw'embuzi," 
Exodus35:7 empu z'empaya z'entaama ezizigirwe n'erangi erikutukura, empu z'engongi, embaaho z'eminyinya," 
Exodus35:8 amajuta g'etabaaza, eby'emigaju eby'okuta omu majuta ag'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora, n'eby'okujwanzya n'obubaane oburikutaamirana," 
Exodus35:9 amabaare agarikwetwa shohamu, n'agandi mabaare ag'okuhundisa efodi n'eky'aha kifuba." 
Exodus35:10 Omu nyamwoga weena omuriimwe aije akore ebi MUKAMA aragiire byona; 
Exodus35:11 obutaaho n'Eihema ryabwo n'eby'okubushweka n'ebikwatsi byabwo n'embaaho zaabwo n'embazi zaabwo n'enyomyo zaabwo n'ebiina byabwo; 
Exodus35:12 eshanduukye y'endagaano n'emigamba yaayo, n'ekitebe ky'okusaasira, n'omukingo gw'okukingira Aharikwera munonga;" 
Exodus35:13 n'emeeza n'emigamba yaayo n'ebintu byayo byona, n'emigaati y'okumurika;" 
Exodus35:14 n'ekikondo ky'etabaaza y'okuhwezesa n'ebintu byakyo, n'amatabaaza gaakyo n'amajuta g'okuhemba;" 
Exodus35:15 n'ekyoterero ky'obubaane n'emigamba yaakyo n'amajuta g'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora, n'obubaane oburikutaamirana, n'omukingo gw'okukinga aha muryango gw'obwo butaaho;" 
Exodus35:16 n'eitambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo n'ekintu kyaryo ky'emiringa ekishobeekaine nk'ekigoye, n'emigamba yaaryo n'ebintu byaryo byona, n'ekinaabiro n'ekibunu kyakyo;" 
Exodus35:17 n'emikingo y'orugo rw'ekibuga n'enyomyo zaarwo n'ebiina byazo n'emikingo y'eirembo ry'ekibuga; 
Exodus35:18 n'enkondo z'obwo butaaho n'ez'orugo rwabwo n'emigoye yaazo; 
Exodus35:19 n'ebijwaro ebibaziirwe gye eby'okukoresa omu Mwanya ogurikwera, nibyo bijwaro ebirikwera eby'okujwarwa Arooni omunyamurwa n'eby'abatabani, nibakora omurimo gw'obunyamurwa." 
Exodus35:20 Eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli ryaruga omu maisho ga Musa. 
Exodus35:21 Bwanyima baagaruka, buri muntu owaagyemirwe omutima gwe, na buri muntu ou omutima gwe gwayekundiire, baareeta emitoijo ya MUKAMA ey'okukoresa Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, n'emirimo yaaryo yoona n'ey'okukoresa ebijwaro ebirikwera." 
Exodus35:22 Haija abashaija n'abakazi, boona abaabaire baine emitima eyekundiire, baareeta empeta z'aha nyindo n'ez'omu matu, empeta eziriho obumanyiso n'enkwanzi, byona biri eby'ezaabu; buri muntu weena owaatoijiire, MUKAMA yaareeta omutoijo gw'ezaabu." 
Exodus35:23 Kandi buri muntu owaashangirwe aine emyenda ya bururu, eya bujwa, eya karari n'eya bafuta, n'obwoya bw'embuzi, n'empu z'empaya z'entaama ezizigirwe n'erangi erikutukura, n'empu z'engongi, yaabireeta." 
Exodus35:24 Buri muntu owaabaasize kureeta omutoijo gw'efeeza nari ogw'emiringa, yaagutoijera MUKAMA; kandi n'omuntu weena owaabaire aine embaaho z'omunyinya ezaakubaasa kukorwamu ekintu kyona omuri ogwo murimo, yaazireeta." 
Exodus35:25 Kandi n'abakazi boona abanyamyoga baakaraga n'engaro zaabo, baareeta ebi baakaragire ebya bururu, ebya bujwa, ebya karari n'ebya bafuta." 
Exodus35:26 Kandi abakazi boona abanyamwoga omu kukaraga abaagyemirwe emitima yaabo, baakaraga obwoshe bw'embuzi." 
Exodus35:27 N'abategyeki baareeta amabaare agarikwetwa shohamu n'amabaare ag'okuhundisa efodi n'eky'aha kifuba," 
Exodus35:28 n'eby'emigaju, n'amajuta ag'okuhemba n'ag'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora, n'ahabw'obubaane oburikutaamirana." 
Exodus35:29 Abaisraeli baareetera MUKAMA emitoijo n'emitima eyekundiire, omushaija weena n'omukazi weena, abaagyemirwe emitima yaabo kureeta ekintu kyona ahabw'omurimo ogu MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa kukora." 
Exodus35:30 Musa yaagambira Abaisraeli ati: Reeba, MUKAMA ayetsire Bezaleeli omu iziina, mutabani wa Uuri, mwene Huuri, ow'omu ruganda rwa Yuda," 
Exodus35:31 yaamwijuza Omwoyo wa Ruhanga n'obwengye n'okwetegyereza n'okumanya n'obuhangu bwona obw'okukora emirimo," 
Exodus35:32 okugunja emirimo y'emyoga, okuheesha ezaabu n'efeeza n'emiringa," 
Exodus35:33 okubaija amabaare ag'okuhunda omu bintu, okusharura ebibaizirwe omu miti, n'okukora emirimo y'emiringo yoona." 
Exodus35:34 Kandi yaata omu mutima gwe okwegyesa abandi, we na Oholiabu mwene Ahisamaaki, ow'omu ruganda rwa Daani." 
Exodus35:35 Bombi yaijuza emitima yaabo obuhangu bw'okukora emirimo ya buri muringo, erikukorwa abasharuzi n'ababaziizi b'ebicwererane by'ehuuzi za bururu n'eza bujwa n'eza karari aha mwenda gwa bafuta, n'abaruki, ebirikukorwa omukozi w'omuringo gwona n'omugunji w'obwengye." 
Exodus36:1 Bezaleeli na Oholiabu n'omuntu weena omunyamwoga, ou MUKAMA yaahaire obwengye n'okwetegyereza okumanya kukora omurimo gwona ahabw'okukora Omwanya ogurikwera, baryakora nk'ebi MUKAMA yaaragiire byona oku biri." 
Exodus36:2 Bwanyima Musa yaayeta Bezaleeli na Oholiabu n'omunyamwoga weena, ou MUKAMA yaataire obwengye omu mutima gwe, na weena owaagyemirwe omutima gwe kwija kukora omurimo ogwo;" 
Exodus36:3 Musa yaabaha emitoijo ei Abaisraeli baareetsire ey'okukores omurimo gw'Omwanya ogurikwera n'okuguhereza kimwe. Kandi buri kasheeshe abantu baaguma nibamureetera emitoijo n'emitima eyekundiire. 
Exodus36:4 N'ahabw'ekyo abanyamwoga boona abaabaire nibakora omurimo gwona ogw'Omwanya ogurikwera, buri omwe yaaruga aha murimo gwe ogu yaabaire naakora," 
Exodus36:5 yaagira Musa ati: Abantu nibareeta bingi munonga okukira ebirikwetengwa ahabw'omurimo, ogu MUKAMA yaaturagiire kukora." 
Exodus36:6 Musa yaaragiira, eki yaaragiira kyarangirirwa omu rusiisira rwona, nibagira bati: Hatagira omushaija nari omukazi owaagaruka kukora ogundi murimo ahabw'emitoijo y'Omwanya ogurikwera. Okwo nikwo abantu baazibiirwe kureeta endiijo mitoijo;" 
Exodus36:7 ahakuba ebintu ebi baabaire baine bikaba nibimara okukora omurimo gwona, kandi nibishaaga." 
Exodus36:8 Abanyamyoga boona ab'omu bakozi baakora obwo butaaho n'emikingo ikumi; egyo mikingo baagikoresa emyenda ya kitaani n'eya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari, baagitamu ebishushani bya baakerubi ebikozirwe abanyamwoga baabyo." 
Exodus36:9 Oburaingwa bwa buri mukingo bukaba buri mikono makumi abiri na munaana, n'obuhango bwagwo mikono ena; emikingo yoona ekaba eri ey'orugyero rumwe." 
Exodus36:10 Emikingo etaano yaagiteerana okwayo, n'endiijo etaano okwayo." 
Exodus36:11 Yaakora obufunga bwa bururu aha mukugiro ogw'aha rubaju rw'emikingo etaano ey'okubanza, n'aha mukugiro gw'aha rubaju rw'emikingo endiijo etaano;" 
Exodus36:12 yaakora obufunga makumi ataano aha mukingo gumwe oguteeraine, n'obundi makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'omukingo gwa kabiri; obwo bufunga bwareebana." 
Exodus36:13 Kandi yaakora ebikwatsi by'ezaabu makumi ataano, yaabikwatanisisa egyo mikingo; obutaaho bwaba bumwe." 
Exodus36:14 Kandi yaakora emikingo y'obwoshe bw'embuzi kuba eihema ry'okushweka obutaaho; yaakora emikingo ikumi na gumwe. 
Exodus36:15 Oburaingwa bwa buri mukingo bukaba buri mikono makumi ashatu, n'obuhango bwagwo mikono ena; egyo mikingo ikumi na gumwe ekaba eri ey'orugyero rumwe." 
Exodus36:16 Emikingo etaano yaagiteerana okwayo, n'emikingo mukaaga okwayo." 
Exodus36:17 Yaakora obufunga makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogurikuheererukayo omu y'okubanza, n'obundi makumi ataano aha mukugiro ogw'omukingo ogurikuheererukayo omu ya kabiri." 
Exodus36:18 Yaakora ebikwatsi makumi ataano by'emiringa okukwatanisa eihema ku riba rimwe. 
Exodus36:19 Kandi yaakora eky'okushweka eihema ky'empu z'empaya z'entaama ezizigirwe n'erangi erikutukura, yaatungikaho eky'empu z'engongi." 
Exodus36:20 Kandi yaakora embaaho z'obutaaho omu munyinya ez'okwemereza; 
Exodus36:21 oburaingwa bwa buri rubaaho mikono ikumi, n'obuhango bwarwo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus36:22 Buri rubaaho rwagira endimi ibiri ez'okuruteerana na rugyenzi rwarwo. Okwo nikwo yaakozire embaaho zoona ez'obutaaho. 
Exodus36:23 Aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo yaakora embaaho makumi abiri," 
Exodus36:24 yaakora n'ebiina by'efeeza makumi ana, yaabita ahansi y'ezo mbaaho makumi abiri, ebiina bibiri ahansi y'orubaaho rumwe ahabw'endimi zaarwo ibiri, n'ebindi biina bibiri ahansi y'orundi rubaaho ahabw'endimi zaarwo ibiri." 
Exodus36:25 Aha rubaju rw'obutaaho orwa kabiri, oruri aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, yaakoraho embaaho makumi abiri," 
Exodus36:26 n'ebiina byazo by'efeeza makumi ana, ebiina bibiri ahansi y'orubaaho rumwe n'ebindi bibiri ahansi y'orundi." 
Exodus36:27 Aha rubaju rw'obutaaho orw'enyima orurikureeba oburengyerwa-izooba, yaakoraho embaaho mukaaga;" 
Exodus36:28 yaakora n'embaaho ibiri ez'enshonda z'obutaaho aha mbaju zombi ez'enyima. 
Exodus36:29 Ezo mbaaho ahansi zaataana, kwonka ahaiguru zaateeranira aha mpeta ey'okubanza; nikwo zombi yaazikozire atyo aha nshonda zombi." 
Exodus36:30 N'ahabw'ekyo haabaho embaaho munaana n'ebiina byazo by'efeeza; byona byaba ikumi na mukaaga, ebiina bibiri ahansi ya buri rubaaho." 
Exodus36:31 Kandi yaakora embazi omu munyinya; itaano ahabw'embaaho z'orubaju rumwe orw'obutaaho," 
Exodus36:32 n'itaano ahabw'embaaho z'orubaju orundi orw'obutaaho, n'ezindi itaano ahabw'embaaho z'obutaaho ez'orubaju orw'enyima orurikureeba oburengyerwa-izooba." 
Exodus36:33 Orubazi orw'ahagati y'ezindi yaarwozyamu, rwahika oku n'oku." 
Exodus36:34 Embaaho zoona yaazishweka n'ezaabu, yaaheesha empeta z'ezaabu ez'okurabyamu ezo mbazi; nazo yaazishweka n'ezaabu." 
Exodus36:35 Kandi yaakora omukingo gwa bururu na bujwa na karari na kitaani; yaagutamu ebishushani bya baakerubi ebikozirwe abanyamwoga baabyo. 
Exodus36:36 Omukingo ogwo yaagukorera enyomyo ina z'eminyinya, yaazishweka n'ezaabu; eby'okuhanikaho byazo byaba eby'ezaabu; yaaziheeshera ebiina by'efeeza bina." 
Exodus36:37 Kandi yaakora omukingo gw'okukinga aha muryango gw'Eihema, yaagukora omu myenda ya bururu, eya bujwa, eya karari n'eya kitaani, ebaziirwemu amabara gacwereraine;" 
Exodus36:38 yaakora n'enyomyo zaagwo itaano n'eby'okuhanikaho byazo. Yaashweka emitwe yaazo n'obufunga bwazo n'ezaabu; kwonka ebiina byazo ebitaano byaba eby'emiringa. 
Exodus37:1 Kandi Bezaleeli yaakora eshanduukye omu munyinya, oburaingwa bwayo mikono ebiri n'ekicweka, obuhango bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka, n'obwemi bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus37:2 Yaagishweka n'ezaabu eshemeziibwe omunda n'enyima, yaagitaho omuguno gw'ezaabu kugyehinguririza." 
Exodus37:3 Yaayazya ezaabu, yaagiheeshamu ebifunga bina, yaabita aha nshonda zaayo ina, bibiri aha rubaju rumwe, n'ebindi bibiri aha rundi." 
Exodus37:4 Yaakora emigamba omu munyinya, yaagishweka n'ezaabu;" 
Exodus37:5 yaata egyo migamba omu bifunga eby'omu mbaju z'eshanduukye, ngu bagume bagiheekyese." 
Exodus37:6 Yaakora ekitebe ky'okusaasira omu zaabu eshemeziibwe, oburaingwa bwakyo mikono ebiri n'ekicweka, n'obuhango bwakyo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus37:7 Kandi yaakora baakerubi babiri omu zaabu; omu kubakora yaabaheeshera aha mitwe yombi ey'ekyo kitebe ky'okusaasira; 
Exodus37:8 kerubi omwe aha mutwe gumwe, n'ondi aha gundi; yaabaheesherana n'ekitebe ky'okusaasira aha mitwe yaakyo yombi." 
Exodus37:9 Baakerubi baashashaanura amapapa gaabo ahaiguru, baagasangiza ekitebe ky'okusaasira, boorekyeraine nibareeba ekyo kitebe." 
Exodus37:10 Kandi yaabaija emeeza omu munyinya, oburaingwa bwayo mikono ebiri, obuhango bwayo mukono gumwe n'obwemi bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus37:11 Yaagishweka n'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, yaagitaho omuguno gw'ezaabu kugyehinguririza." 
Exodus37:12 Yaagikorera ebizingiti kugyehinguririza, obuhango bwabyo ekita kimwe; nabyo yaabitaho omuguno gw'ezaabu kugyehinguririza." 
Exodus37:13 Yaagiheeshera ebifunga bina by'ezaabu, yaabita aha maguru gaayo aha nshonda zaayo ina." 
Exodus37:14 Ebifunga ebyo byaza haihi n'ebizingiti, kuba eby'okutamu emigamba y'okuheekyesa emeeza." 
Exodus37:15 Egyo migamba y'okuheekyesa emeeza, yaagibaija omu munyinya, yaagishweka n'ezaabu." 
Exodus37:16 Kandi yaakora ebintu by'okuta ahari egyo meeza omu zaabu eshemeziibwe, enyabya zaayo n'ebikopo byayo, kandi emidumo n'ebakuri byayo eby'okushukisa empongano z'eby'okunywa." 
Exodus37:17 Kandi yaakora ekikondo ky'amatabaaza omu zaabu eshemeziibwe; ekibunu kyakyo, omukono gwakyo, ebikopo byakyo, ebintu byakyo ebyebumburikire, n'ebirabyo byakyo byaheesheranwa nakyo." 
Exodus37:18 Kyagira amataagi mukaaga agarikuruga ahari ogwo mukono, ashatu aha rubaju rumwe, n'ashatu aha rundi," 
Exodus37:19 aha itaagi rimwe ebikopo bishatu ebirikushusha nk'ebirabyo by'endozi, hamwe n'ekintu ekyebumburikire n'ekirabyo kyakyo; aha itaagi erindi ebikopo bishatu ebirikushusha nk'ebirabyo by'endozi, hamwe n'ekintu ekyebumburikire n'ekirabyo kyakyo; goona mukaaga nk'oku garikuruga aha mukono gumwe gaaba nikwo gaaba gatyo." 
Exodus37:20 Ahari ogwo mukono gw'ekikondo ky'etabaaza haabaho ebikopo bina ebirikushusha nk'ebirabyo by'endozi, n'ebintu ebyebumburikire n'ebirabyo byabyo;" 
Exodus37:21 ekintu ekyebumburikire kyaheesheranwa n'omukono gw'etabaaza ahansi ya buri mataagi abiri agarikugurugaho; goona mukaaga gaaba nikwo gaaba. 
Exodus37:22 Ebyebumburikire n'amataagi gaabyo byaheesheranwa nagwo omu zaabu eshemeziibwe. 
Exodus37:23 Yaaheesha amatabaaza gaakyo mushanju n'empana zaago n'otusohaani twago omu zaabu eshemeziibwe. 
Exodus37:24 Ekikondo y'amatabaaza n'ebintu byakyo byona, yaabikora omu zaabu eshemeziibwe ey'oburemeezi bw'etalanta emwe." 
Exodus37:25 Kandi yaabaija ekyoterero ky'obubaane omu munyinya, oburaingwa bwakyo mukono gumwe, n'obuhango bwakyo mukono gumwe, kyaingaingana embaju zoona; kandi obwemi bwakyo bwaba mikono ebiri; amahembe gaakyo gaabaijeranwa nakyo." 
Exodus37:26 Yaakishweka n'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, aha mutwe gwakyo n'embaju zaakyo n'amahembe gaakyo; kandi yaakitaho omuguno gw'ezaabu kukyehinguririza." 
Exodus37:27 Yaakiheeshera ebifunga bibiri by'ezaabu, yaabita ahansi y'omuguno gwakyo aha mbaju zaakyo zombi, kuba eby'okutamu emigamba y'okukiheekyesa;" 
Exodus37:28 egyo migamba yaagikora omu munyinya, yaagishweka n'ezaabu." 
Exodus37:29 Kandi yaakora amajuta garikwera ag'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora, n'obubaane burungi obw'eby'emigaju erikutaamirana, nk'oku abanyamwoga baabwo babujwanzya." 
Exodus38:1 Kandi yaabaija eitambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo omu munyinya, oburaingwa bwaryo mikono etaano, obuhango bwaryo mikono etaano, ryaingaingana embaju zoona, n'obwemi bwaryo mikono eshatu." 
Exodus38:2 Aha nshonda zaaryo ina yaabaijaho amahembe ana; ago mahembe gaabaijeranwa naryo; yaarishweka n'emiringa. 
Exodus38:3 Kandi yaariheeshera ebintu byaryo byona, eby'okuyooreraho eiju, n'eby'okuriyooresa, n'enyabya, n'eby'okwihuza enyama, n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro; ebintu byaryo byona yaabikora omu miringa." 
Exodus38:4 Kandi yaariheeshera ekintu ekishobeekaine nk'ekigoye omu miringa, yaakita ahansi y'omuguno ogwehinguririize eitambiro, kyaruga ahansi, kyahika rwagati y'eitambiro." 
Exodus38:5 Yaaheesha ebifunga bina, yaabita aha nshonda ina z'ekyo kintu ky'emiringa ekishobeekaine kuba eby'okutamu emigamba." 
Exodus38:6 Yaabaija emigamba omu munyinya, yaagishweka n'emiringa;" 
Exodus38:7 egyo migamba yaagita omu bifunga aha mbaju z'eitambiro kuba ey'okuriheekyesa. Yaaribaija omu mbaaho, omunda ryaba omurangara." 
Exodus38:8 Kandi yaaheesha ekinaabiro omu miringa, n'ekibunu kyakyo nakyo omu miringa; yaabiheesha omu miringa y'endeeberwamu z'abakazi, abaabaire bateerana kuheereza aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu." 
Exodus38:9 Kandi yaakora ekibuga; aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo orugo rwakyo rukaba ruri orw'emikingo y'emyenda ya kitaani, oburaingwa bwarwo mikono igana," 
Exodus38:10 enyomyo zaayo ziri makumi abiri, n'ebiina byazo by'emiringa nabyo makumi abiri; kwonka eby'okuhanikaho eby'ahari ezo nyomyo n'obufunga bwabyo biri eby'efeeza." 
Exodus38:11 Kandi aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa bumosho oburaingwa bwarwo buri mikono igana, enyomyo zaarwo ziri makumi abiri, n'ebiina byazo by'emiringa makumi abiri, kwonka eby'okuhanikaho eby'aha nyomyo n'obufunga bwabyo biri eby'efeeza." 
Exodus38:12 Aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba oburaingwa bw'emikingo bwaba mikono makumi ataano, n'enyomyo zaakyo ikumi, n'ebiina byazo ikumi; eby'okuhanikaho eby'aha nyomyo n'obufunga bwabyo biri eby'efeeza." 
Exodus38:13 Kandi omumaisho aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba obuhango bwarwo bukaba buri mikono makumi ataano. 
Exodus38:14 Obuhango bw'emikingo ey'aha rubaju rumwe rw'eirembo buri mikono ikumi n'etaano, enyomyo zaayo ishatu, n'ebiina byazo bishatu;" 
Exodus38:15 byaba bityo n'aha rubaju; aha rundi rubaju rw'eirembo oru na ruriya obuhango bw'emikingo bukaba buri mikono ikumi n'etaano, enyomyo zaayo ishatu, n'ebiina byazo bishatu." 
Exodus38:16 Emikingo yoona eyaabaire eyehinguririize ekibuga ekaba ekozirwe omu myenda ya kitaani; 
Exodus38:17 ebiina by'okutamu enyomyo bikaba biri eby'emiringa; eby'okuhanikaho by'enyomyo n'obufunga bwazo biri eby'efeeza; n'emitwe yaazo eshwekirwe efeeza; n'enyomyo zoona ez'orugo rw'ekibuga zikaba ziine obufunga bw'efeeza. 
Exodus38:18 Kandi omukingo gw'eirembo ry'ekibuga gukaba gubaziirwemu ebicwererane by'ehuuzi za bururu na bujwa na karari na kitaani; obuhango bwagwo bukaba buri mikono makumi abiri, n'obwemi bwagwo buri mikono etaano, nibwingana n'emikingo y'orwo rugo rwona." 
Exodus38:19 Enyomyo zaagwo ziri ina, n'ebiina byazo by'emiringa bina; eby'okuhanikaho byazo biri eby'efeeza; emitwe yaazo eshwekirwe n'efeeza, n'obufunga bwazo buri obw'efeeza." 
Exodus38:20 Kandi enkondo zoona ez'obutaaho n'ez'orugo orwabaire rwehinguririize ekibuga zikaba ziri ez'emiringa. 
Exodus38:21 Ogu nigwo mubaro gw'ebintu byona ebyakozirwe ahabw'obutaaho, nibwo butaaho bw'Ebirikuhamya, nk'oku Musa yaaragiire ku bibarwa Abaleevi, abaabaire nibabibara, nibareebererwa Itamaari mwene Arooni omunyamurwa." 
Exodus38:22 Bezaleeli mutabani wa Uuri mwene Huuri ow'omu ruganda rwa Yuda akakora byona, ebi MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa," 
Exodus38:23 naakwatanisa na Oholiabu mwene Ahisamaaki, ow'omu ruganda rwa Daani, omusharuzi w'amabaare, omu nyamwoga omu by'emirimo, omubaziizi w'ebicwererane by'ehuuzi za bururu na bujwa na karari na bafuta." 
Exodus38:24 Oburemeezi bw'ezaabu zoona ezi baatoizire ahabw'okukora omurimo gwona ogw'Omwanya ogurikwera bukaba buri talanta makumi abiri na mwenda, na shekeli magana mushanju na makumi ashatu, nka shekeli ey'Omwanya ogurikwera oku eri." 
Exodus38:25 Kandi oburemeezi bw'efeeza ezaahairwe ab'omu ihanga eryo abaabazirwe bukaba buri etalanta igana na shekeli rukumi na magana mushanju na makumi mushanju na itaano, nka shekeli ey'Omwanya ogurikwera oku eri;" 
Exodus38:26 nizo zaahairwe abashaija obusiriira mukaaga n'enkumi ishatu na magana ataano na makumi ataano; buri mushaija owaagiire omu baabazirwe ahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho akaba aha beeka emwe, nikyo kicweka kimwe kya kabiri kya shekeli nka shekeli ey'Omwanya ogurikwera oku eri." 
Exodus38:27 Ezo talanta z'efeeza igana zikaba ziri ez'okuheeshamu ebiina by'embaaho z'Omwanya ogurikwera, n'eby'enyomyo z'omukingo, etalanta igana zirugwamu ebiina igana, ekiina kimwe etalanta emwe." 
Exodus38:28 Kandi ezo shekeli rukumi na magana mushanju na makumi mushanju na itaano yaaziheeshamu eby'okuhanikaho eby'aha nyomyo n'obufunga bwazo, yaagaruka yaazishwekyesa emitwe y'ezo nyomyo." 
Exodus38:29 Kandi oburemeezi bw'emiringa ei baatoizire bukaba buri etalanta makumi mushanju na shekeli enkumi ibiri na magana ana. 
Exodus38:30 Egyo miringa yaagiheeshamu ebiina by'enyomyo z'omuryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, n'eitambiro ry'omuringa hamwe n'ekintu ky'emiringa ekishobeekaine nk'ekigoye, n'ebintu byaryo byona," 
Exodus38:31 n'ebiina by'enyomyo z'orugo orwehinguririize ekibuga, n'eby'ez'eirembo ryakyo, n'enkondo zoona ez'obutaaho, n'ez'orugo orwehinguririize ekibuga." 
Exodus39:1 Kandi egyo myenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari baagikoramu ebijwaro ebikozirwe gye eby'okukoresa omu Mwanya ogurikwera, kandi baakorera Arooni ebijwaro birikwera, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Yaakora efodi n'emikwengye y'ezaabu n'ehuuzi za bururu na bujwa na karari na kitaani. 
Exodus39:3 Ezaabu baagiheesha, yaaba akahwahwari, baagisharamu emikwegye y'okucwererana amabara omu myenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari n'eya bafuta, omurimo ogurikukorwa abanyamyoga b'obwengye." 
Exodus39:4 Baakorera efodi ebiremu by'aha mabega biteerainwe nayo aha mikugiro yaayo yombi; 
Exodus39:5 eky'okwezirikisa ekigikoreirweho, ekirukirwe abahangu, kyakorwa nkayo, kandi kyarukwa omu bintu bimwe n'ebyayo, emikwegye y'ezaabu, ehuuzi za bururu n'eza bujwa, n'eza karari, n'eza kitaani, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Baashemeza amabaare agarikwetwa shohamu, baagahamisa ezaabu ekwegire, baagasharuraho amaziina g'abaana ba Israeli, nk'oku basharura akamanyiso aha ibaare." 
Exodus39:7 Yaagata aha biremu bya efodi eby'aha mabega kuba amabaare g'okwijukiraho abaana ba Israeli, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:8 Kandi yaakora eky'aha kifuba, kyakorwa abanyamwoga, nk'oku baakozire efodi, baakikoresa emikwegye y'ezaabu, n'ehuuzi za bururu, n'eza bujwa, n'eza karari, n'eza kitaani." 
Exodus39:9 Kikaba nikiingaingana embaju zoona; baakikora kikubiremu; oburaingwa bwakyo bwaba ekita kimwe, n'obuhango bwakyo nabwo bwaba ekita, waaba okikubiremu." 
Exodus39:10 Baakitaho emishorongo y'amabaare ena; omushorongo ogw'okubanza gwabamu amabaare aga sarudio, topazi na barekesi," 
Exodus39:11 omushorongo ogwa kabiri, samaragido, safiro na arimaasi," 
Exodus39:12 omushorongo gwa kashatu huwakinto, kalukedoni na amesuusto," 
Exodus39:13 n'omushorongo ogwa kana berulo, shohamu na yasipi; goona gaahamibwa omu zaabu ekwegire." 
Exodus39:14 Amabaare ago gaaba ikumi n'abiri, nk'amaziina g'abaana ba Israeli oku gari; gaahandiikwa nk'oku basharura akamanyiso, biru rimwe ryahandiikwaho eiziina ryaryo ahabw'enganda ikumi na ibiri." 
Exodus39:15 Kandi baakorera eky'aha kifuba emikuufu ehotoire nk'omugoye, ekozire omu zaabu eshemeziibwe." 
Exodus39:16 Kandi baaheesha eby'okuhamya amabaare bibiri n'empeta ibiri omu zaabu; ezo mpeta baazita aha nshonda zombi ez'aha mutwe gw'eky'aha kifuba," 
Exodus39:17 baarabya egyo mikuufu yombi ey'ezaabu ehotoire omuri ezo mpeta ez'aha nshonda zaakyo zombi. 
Exodus39:18 Emitwe yombi ey'egyo mikuufu ehotoire baagikoma aha by'okuhamya amabaare byombi, baabikwatsa aha biremu by'efodi eby'aha mabega aha rubaju rwabyo orw'omumaisho." 
Exodus39:19 Kandi baakora ezindi mpeta z'ezaabu ibiri, baazita aha nshonda ibiri ez'omukugiro gw'eky'aha kifuba ogw'omunda aha rubaju oruri haihi na efodi." 
Exodus39:20 Kandi baakora empeta z'ezaabu ibiri, baazita aha mukugiro gw'ahansi ogw'ebiremu bibiri eby'aha mabega omumaisho, ahu birikuteeranira n'eky'okwezirikisa kya efodi ekirukirwe abanyamwoga." 
Exodus39:21 Kandi eky'aha kifuba baakikoma aha mpeta za efodi, bakikomesa otwenda twa bururu, nibaturabya omu mpeta zaakyo, ngu eky'aha kifuba kirekye kuyuga kikataana na efodi, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Kandi yaakora ekanzu ya efodi, erukirwe omu mwenda gwa bururu gwonka;" 
Exodus39:23 yaagira ebitsya by'okurabyamu omutwe, nk'oku bakora ebijwaro bya kitaani, ebikugiire n'omutarizo, ngu etataaguka." 
Exodus39:24 Aha mukugiro gwayo ogw'ahansi baabaziiraho ebirikushusha amakoma-mahanga ebirukire omu huuzi za bururu na bujwa na karari. 
Exodus39:25 Baaheesha amajugo omu zaabu eshemeziibwe, baagahunda ahagati y'ago makoma-mahanga aha mukugiro gw'egyo kanzu okugyehinguririza," 
Exodus39:26 eijugo ryakuratwa eikoma-mahanga, eijugo eikoma mahanga, bityo bityo byayehinguririza omukugiro gw'egyo kanzu, ngu ebe ey'okujwarwa orikukora omurimo gw'obuheereza, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Kandi baakorera Arooni n'abatabani ekooti ezirukire omuri bafuta," 
Exodus39:28 n'ekikwemba kya bafuta, n'enkofiira nungi eza bafuta, n'empare za kitaani," 
Exodus39:29 n'eky'okwezirikisa kya kitaani n'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari, ebaziirwemu ebicwererane, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Kandi baakora ekipande ky'ekirunga kirikwera omu zaabu eshemeziibwe, baakihandiikaho ekihandiiko ekirikushusha nk'akamanyiso akasharwirwe aha ibaare, ekirikugira kiti: Oyereziibwe MUKAMA." 
Exodus39:31 Baakikomaho otwenda twa bururu, kukikwatanisa n'ekyo kikwemba aharuguru, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Okwo nikwo omurimo gwona gw'okukora obutaaho bw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu gwahweire, Abaisraeli bakakora byona nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa. Nikwo baakozire batyo." 
Exodus39:33 Baareetera Musa obutaaho n'Eihema n'ebintu byaryo byona, ebikwatsi byaryo, embaaho zaaryo, embazi zaaryo, enyomyo zaaryo, ebiina byaryo," 
Exodus39:34 eky'okushweka ky'empu z'empaya z'entaama ezizigirwe n'erangi erikutukura, eky'okushweka ky'empu z'engongi, omukingo gw'okukingira Aharikwera munonga," 
Exodus39:35 eshanduukye y'Ebirikuhamya n'emigamba yaayo n'ekitebe ky'okusaasira," 
Exodus39:36 emeeza n'ebintu byayo byona n'emigaati y'okumurika," 
Exodus39:37 ekikondo ky'etabaaza ky'ezaabu eshemeziibwe n'amatabaaza gaakyo g'okukitaho n'ebintu byakyo byona n'amajuta g'okuhemba," 
Exodus39:38 ekyoterero ky'ezaabu, amajuta g'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora, obubaane oburikutaamirana, omukingo gw'aha muryango gw'Eihema," 
Exodus39:39 eitambiro ry'emiringa n'ekintu kyaryo ky'emiringa ekishobeekaine, n'emigamba yaaryo n'ebintu byaryo byona, ekinaabiro n'ekibunu kyakyo," 
Exodus39:40 emikingo y'orugo rw'ekibuga n'enyomyo zaayo n'ebiina byazo, omukingo gw'eirembo ry'ekibuga, emiguha yaarwo n'enkondo zaarwo, kandi n'ebintu byona eby'okukoresa omu butaaho, niryo Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu," 
Exodus39:41 n'eby'okujwara ebibaziirwe gye eby'okukoresa omu Mwanya ogurikwera, n'ebijwaro ebirikwera ebya Arooni omunyamurwa n'eby'abatabani eby'okukoresa omurimo gw'obunyamurwa." 
Exodus39:42 Abaisraeli baakora omurimo gwona, nibakuratira byona ebi MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:43 Musa yaayetegyereza emirimo yoona, yaareeba bagiherize; nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire, nikwo baabaire bagikozire. Musa yaabashabira omugisha." 
Exodus40:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus40:2 Aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kw'okubanza oryaimutsya obutaaho bw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu; 
Exodus40:3 obutemu eshanduukye y'Ebirikuhamya, oteho omukingo gw'okugikingira," 
Exodus40:4 otemu emeeza, otebeekanise ebintu ebigiriho, otemu ekikondo ky'etabaaza, okiteho amatabaaza gaakyo," 
Exodus40:5 okyoterero ky'ezaabu eky'okwotereraho obubaane okite omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'Ebirikuhamya, ote omukingo aha muryango gw'obutaaho," 
Exodus40:6 ote eitambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo omu maisho g'omuryango gw'obutaaho bw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu," 
Exodus40:7 ote ekinaabiro ahagati y'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu n'eitambiro, kandi okishukyemu amaizi," 
Exodus40:8 oimutsye orugo, rwehinguririze ekibuga, ote omukingo aha irembo ryakyo," 
Exodus40:9 otware amajuta g'okushukaho ahabw'okushoroora, ogashukye aha butaaho n'aha bintu byona ebirimu, obweze n'ebintu byabwo byona, bube oburikwera;" 
Exodus40:10 ogashukye n'aha itambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo, n'ebintu byaryo byona, oryeze; eryo itambiro ribe eririkwera munonga," 
Exodus40:11 kandi ogashukye n'aha kinaabiro n'aha kibunu kyakyo, okyeze." 
Exodus40:12 Bwanyima oreete Arooni n'abatabani aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, oboozye n'amaizi," 
Exodus40:13 ojwekye Arooni ebijwaro birikwera, omushukyeho amajuta, omweze, abone kunkorera omurimo gw'obunyamurwa;" 
Exodus40:14 oreete n'abatabani, obajwekye ekooti," 
Exodus40:15 obashukyeho amajuta, nk'oku oriba waagashukire ahari ishebo, babone kunkorera omurimo gw'obunyamurwa; okwo kushukwaho kwabo kuryabahaisa obunyamurwa bw'ebiro byona omu busingye bwabo bwona." 
Exodus40:16 Musa yaakora atyo; nk'ebi MUKAMA yaamuragiire byona oku byabaire biri, nikwo Musa yaakozire." 
Exodus40:17 Omu kwezi kw'okubanza okw'omu mwaka gwa kabiri, aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwo kwezi obutaaho bwaimukibwa." 
Exodus40:18 Musa yaimutsya obwo butaaho, yaataho ebiina byabwo, yaimutsya embaaho zaabwo, yaatamu embazi zaabwo, yaabyara n'enyomyo zaabwo." 
Exodus40:19 Bwanyima yaashakaaza obutaaho eihema, yaaritaho eky'okurishweka, nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:20 Yaatwara Ebirikuhamya, yaabita omu shanduukye, yaata emigamba omu bifunga byayo, ahaiguru yaayo yaataho ekitebe ky'okusaasira;" 
Exodus40:21 yaataasya egyo shanduukye omu butaaho, yaataho omukingo gw'okukingira eshanduukye y'Ebirikuhamya, nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:22 Bwanyima yaata emeeza omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu enyima y'omukingo aha rubaju rw'obutaaho orurikureeba obukiizi-bwa-bumosho," 
Exodus40:23 yaagitebeekanisaho emigaati omu maisho ga MUKAMA, nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:24 Kandi yaata ekikondo ky'etabaaza omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, kyareebana n'emeeza, aha rubaju rw'obutaaho aharikureeba obukiizi-bwa-buryo," 
Exodus40:25 yaakitaho amatabaaza omu maisho ga MUKAMA, nk'oku yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:26 Yaata ekyoterero ky'ezaabu omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu omu maisho g'omukingo," 
Exodus40:27 yaakyotereraho obubaane bw'eby'emigaju ebirikutaamirana, nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:28 Yaata omukingo aha muryango gw'obutaaho; 
Exodus40:29 yaata eitambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo omu maisho g'omuryango gw'obutaaho bw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, yaaritambiraho ekitambo ky'okwotsya n'eky'esaano, nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:30 Kandi yaata ekinaabiro ahagati y'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu n'eryo itambiro, yaakishukamu amaizi g'okunaaba," 
Exodus40:31 eki Musa na Ariooni n'abatabani baabaire banaabiramu engaro zaabo n'ebigyere byabo; 
Exodus40:32 ku baabaire baba nibataaha omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, kandi nibaza aha itambiro, banaaba, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus40:33 Bwanyima yaimutsya orugo kwehinguririza obutaaho n'eitambiro, yaataho omukingo gw'eirembo ry'ekibuga. Atyo Musa yaaheza omurimo." 
Exodus40:34 Bwanyima ekicu kyashweka Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kyaijura obwo butaaho." 
Exodus40:35 Musa tiyaabaasa kutaaha omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, ahabw'okuba ekyo kicu kikaba kiririho, kandi ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kiijwire obwo butaaho." 
Exodus40:36 Omu ngyendo zaabo zoona ekyo kicu ku kyabaire kiihwa ahari obwo butaaho, Abaisraeli baimuka, bagyenda;" 
Exodus40:37 kwonka ku kyabaire kiba kitaihirweho, bakaba batagyenda, okuhitsya aha izooba eri kyabaire kiihirwaho." 
Exodus40:38 Ahakuba ekicu kya MUKAMA kikaba kiguma ahari obwo butaaho nyomushana, kandi kibamu omuriro nyekiro omu maisho g'ab'enju ya Israeli boona omu ngyendo zaabo zoona." 
Leviticus1:1 MUKAMA akeeta Musa, yaagambira nawe omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, naagira ati:" 
Leviticus1:2 Gambira Abaisraeli, obagire oti: Omuntu weena omuriimwe ku ariba naareetera MUKAMA ekitambo, muryaguma muhongye ekirugire omu masyo g'ente nari ag'entaama." 
Leviticus1:3 Ekitambo kye ku arikiiha omu busyo bw'ente, ahongye enimi y'ekimasha etaine kamogo, agiheere aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, abone kwikirizibwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Leviticus1:4 Ate engaro ze aha mutwe gw'ekitambo ky'okwotsya, kiikirizibwe ahabwe okumurihiirira." 
Leviticus1:5 Aitire egyo nimi omu maisho ga MUKAMA, batabani ba Arooni abanyamurwa bareete eshagama yaayo, bagishukyere eitambiro eriri aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu embaju zoona." 
Leviticus1:6 Abaagye ekyo kitambo ky'okwotsya, akicwagure nk'oku emyanya yaakyo eri." 
Leviticus1:7 Bwanyima batabani ba Arooni omunyamurwa bate omuriro aha itambiro, baguteekyereho enku," 
Leviticus1:8 bate ebyo bicweka n'omutwe n'ebishaju aha nku eziri aha muriro aha itambiro, nibabikuratanisa gye;" 
Leviticus1:9 kwonka eby'omunda byakyo n'amaguru gaakyo babyozye n'amaizi; kandi omunyamurwa abyokyeze kimwe aha itambiro, kuba ekitambo ekyokize, empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ey'ekisooroora kirungi, ehongyeirwe MUKAMA." 
Leviticus1:10 Ekitambo kye eky'okwotsya ku kiriba nikiruga omu busyo bw'entaama nari obw'embuzi, atambe empaya etaine kamogo." 
Leviticus1:11 Agiitire omu maisho ga MUKAMA aha rubaju rw'eitambiro orurikureeba obukiizi-bwa-bumosho; batabani ba Arooni abanyamurwa bashukyere eitambiro eshagama yaayo embaju zoona; 
Leviticus1:12 agicwagacwagure nk'oku emyanya yaayo eri n'omutwe gwayo n'ebishaju byayo, omunyamurwa abite aha nku eziri aha muriro gw'aha itambiro, naabikuratanisa gye;" 
Leviticus1:13 kwonka eby'omunda byayo n'amaguru gaayo abyozye n'amaizi, abitambe byona, abyokyeze aha itambiro; ekyo n'ekitambo ekyokize, empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ey'ekisooroora kirungi ehongyeirwe MUKAMA." 
Leviticus1:14 Kandi ekitambo kye eky'okwotsya ku kiriba kiri enyonyi, areete ekitambo ky'obwiba nari enkombe nto." 
Leviticus1:15 Omunyamurwa agireete aha itambiro, agihotore ebitsya, agicweho omutwe, agyokyeze aha itambiro; eshagama yaayo egikamuukyemu neejwera aha rubaju rw'eitambiro;" 
Leviticus1:16 agiihemu ekitondoro, agihaanyeho ebyoya, abinagye aha rubaju rw'eitambiro orurikureeba oburugwa-izooba, ahu baata eiju ry'akashenda." 
Leviticus1:17 Akwate amapapa gaayo, agitaagure, kwonka atagitaanisamu, agyokyeze aha itambiro aha nku eziri aha muriro; ekyo n'ekitambo ekyokize, empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ey'ekisooroora kirungi, ehongyeirwe MUKAMA." 
Leviticus2:1 Omuntu weena ku arihongyera MUKAMA empongano y'esaano, ahongye esaano y'obunono; agishukyeho amajuta g'emizeituuni, agimemeerereho obubaane oburikwetwa lebona;" 
Leviticus2:2 agireetere batabani ba Arooni abanyamurwa, agiiheho oruhi rw'esaano y'obunono n'amajuta, hamwe n'obubaane bwayo bwona, omunyamurwa abyokyeze aha itambiro kuba ekiijutsyo, empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro y'ekisooroora kirungi ahari MUKAMA." 
Leviticus2:3 Ekiritsigara ahari egyo mpongano y'esaano kibe ekya Arooni n'abatabani; egyo n'empongano erikwera munonga omu mpongano ezihongyeirwe MUKAMA ezokiibwe omu muriro. 
Leviticus2:4 Ku orihonga empongano y'esaano eteekire omu iteekyero ry'emigaati, ebe twakeeki otutatumbisiibwe otw'esaano y'obunono otujwangizemu amajuta, nari capati ezitatumbisiibwe ezisiigirweho amajuta." 
Leviticus2:5 Kandi ku orihonga empongano y'esaano ekarangire, ebe esaano y'obunono etatumbisiibwe, ejwangizemu amajuta." 
Leviticus2:6 Okicwemu ebicweka, obishukyeho amajuta; egyo n'empongano y'esaano." 
Leviticus2:7 Empongano yaawe ku eriba eri ey'esaano ekarangisiibwe amajuta aha kyoma, ebe ey'esaano y'obunono ejwangizemu amajuta." 
Leviticus2:8 Empongano y'esaano ekozirwe omu miringo egyo oryagireetera MUKAMA; ku erireetwa aha munyamurwa, agitware aha itambiro," 
Leviticus2:9 aihe ahari egyo mpongano ekiijutsyo kyayo, akyokyeze aha itambiro kuba empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro y'ekisooroora kirungi ahari MUKAMA." 
Leviticus2:10 Ekiritsigara ahari egyo mpongano y'esaano, kibe ekya Arooni n'abatabani; egyo n'empongano erikwera munonga omu mpongano ezihongyeirwe MUKAMA, ezokiibwe omu muriro." 
Leviticus2:11 Hatarigira empongano y'esaano ei mwahongyera MUKAMA ekozirwe n'ekitumbisa; ahabw'okuba timushemereire kwotsya kitumbisa nari obwoki bwona kuba empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ehongyeirwe MUKAMA. 
Leviticus2:12 Empongano z'esaano ezirimu ekitumbisa n'obwoki muryazihongyera MUKAMA nk'omuganuro, kwonka zitarihongyerwa aha itambiro kuba empongano y'ekisooroora kirungi." 
Leviticus2:13 Empongano y'esaano yoona oryaguma ogitemu omwonyo, kandi otariikiriza empongano zaawe ez'esaano kuburamu omwonyo gw'endagaano ya Ruhanga waawe; empongano zaawe zoona oryaguma ozihongye n'omwonyo." 
Leviticus2:14 Kandi ku orihongyera MUKAMA empongano y'esaano ey'omuganuro, oryareeta obushiisha bw'engano obutarikire aha muriro, ebihere by'engano mbisi, kuba empongano y'esaano ey'omuganuro gwawe;" 
Leviticus2:15 ogishukyeho amajuta, kandi ogimemeerereho obubaane bwa lebona; egyo n'empongano y'esaano." 
Leviticus2:16 Omunyamurwa ayotsye akacweka k'ebihere by'engano n'amajuta hamwe n'obwo bubaane bwona kuba ekiijutsyo kyayo; egyo n'empongano ehongyeirwe MUKAMA eyokiibwe omu muriro. 
Leviticus3:1 Kandi empongano ye ku eriba eri ekitambo ky'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, yaakiiha omu busyo bw'ente yaaba nimi nari enyana, ahongye ekitaine kamogo omu maisho ga MUKAMA," 
Leviticus3:2 ate engaro ze aha mutwe gw'empongano ye, agiitire aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu; batabani ba Arooni abanyamurwa bashukyere eitambiro eshagama embaju zoona." 
Leviticus3:3 Aihe ahari ekyo kitambo ky'okusiima ahabw'obusingye empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ehongyeirwe MUKAMA, ebishaju ebishwekire eby'omunda n'ebishaju byona ebibiriho," 
Leviticus3:4 n'entsigo zombi eziri aha mugongo n'ebishaju byazo, n'ekishaabo ky'aha kitugu, abihongye;" 
Leviticus3:5 batabani ba Arooni bagyokyeze aha itambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo aha nku eziri aha muriro; egyo n'empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ey'ekisooroora kirungi ahari MUKAMA. 
Leviticus3:6 Empongano ye ey'ekitambo ky'okusiima MUKAMA ahabw'obusingye ku eriba eri ey'omu busyo bw'entaama, yaaba mpaya nari omwagazi, ahongye ekitaine kamogo." 
Leviticus3:7 Ku arihayo omwana gw'entaama kuba empongano ye, aguhongye omu maisho ga MUKAMA;" 
Leviticus3:8 kandi ate engaro ze aha mutwe gw'empongano ye, agiitire omu maisho g'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu; batabani ba Arooni bashukyere eitambiro eshagama embaju zoona." 
Leviticus3:9 Aihe ebishaju ahari ekyo kitambo ky'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, ekyokiibwe omu muriro, ekihongyeirwe MUKAMA, n'omukira gwona ogw'ebishaju agukuuriraine n'engugi, n'ebishaju ebishwekire eby'omunda, n'ebishaju byona ebibiriho," 
Leviticus3:10 n'entsigo zombi eziri aha mugongo n'ebishaju byazo, n'ekishaabo eky'aha kitugu akitwarirane n'entsigo;" 
Leviticus3:11 omunyamurwa akyokyeze aha itambiro kuba empongano y'eby'okurya eyokiibwe omu muriro ehongyeirwe MUKAMA. 
Leviticus3:12 Empongano ye ku eriba eri ey'embuzi, agihongye omu maisho ga MUKAMA;" 
Leviticus3:13 ate engaro ze aha mutwe gwayo, agiitire omu maisho g'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu; batabani ba Arooni bashukyere eitambiro eshagama yaayo embaju zoona;" 
Leviticus3:14 aihe ahari ekyo kitambo empongano ye eyokiibwe omu muriro ei ahongyeire MUKAMA, ebishaju ebishwekire eby'omunda, n'ebishaju byona ebibiriho," 
Leviticus3:15 n'entsigo zombi eziri aha mugongo n'ebishaju ebiziriho, n'ekishaabo eky'aha kitugu akitwarirane n'entsigo." 
Leviticus3:16 Omunyamurwa abyokyeze aha itambiro; n'eby'okurya by'empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro eby'ekisooroora kirungi; ebishaju byona n'ebya MUKAMA. 
Leviticus3:17 Kiryaba ekiragiro ekitarihwaho omu busingye bwanyu bwona n'omu maka gaanyu goona, imwe okutarya bishaju nari eshagama." 
Leviticus4:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus4:2 Gambira Abaisraeli oti: Omuntu ku arikora ekibi atakikozire nkana, yaakora kimwe aha bi MUKAMA yaazibiire," 
Leviticus4:3 ku ariba ari omunyamurwa owaashukirweho amajuta okozire ekibi ekyo, akareetera eihanga ryona orubanja, ahongyerere ekibi eki akozire enimi y'ekimasha etaine kamogo, agihongyere MUKAMA kuba empongano y'ekibi." 
Leviticus4:4 Areete egyo nimi aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu omu maisho ga MUKAMA, ate engaro ze aha mutwe gwayo, agiitire omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Leviticus4:5 Omunyamurwa owaashukirweho amajuta atware aha shagama yaayo, agireete omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu," 
Leviticus4:6 akoze orukumu omuri egyo shagama, agimiisiire emirundi mushanju omu maisho ga MUKAMA omu maisho g'omukingo ogukingiire Omwanya ogurikwera munonga;" 
Leviticus4:7 kandi atware ahari egyo shagama, agite aha mahembe g'ekyoterero ky'obubaane oburikutaamirana omu maisho ga MUKAMA ekiri omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu; kandi eshagama y'egyo nimi y'ekimasha eyaatsigaraho yoona agishukye ahansi aha kibunu ky'eitambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo, eriri aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu." 
Leviticus4:8 Kandi ebishaju byona by'egyo nimi ey'empongano y'ekibi abiiheho, ebishaju ebishwekire eby'omunda n'ebishaju byona ebibiriho," 
Leviticus4:9 n'entsigo zombi eziri aha mugongo n'ebishaju byazo, n'ekishaabo eky'aha kitugu abitwarirane n'ezo ntsigo," 
Leviticus4:10 nk'oku babiiha aha nimi y'ekitambo ky'okusiima ahabw'obusingye; omunyamurwa abyokyeze aha itambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo. 
Leviticus4:11 Kwonka oruhu rwayo n'enyama zaayo zoona n'omutwe gwayo n'amaguru gaayo n'eby'omunda byayo n'efa yaayo," 
Leviticus4:12 eby'egyo nimi yoona abitware aheeru y'orusiisira omu mwanya murungi, ahu baata eiju ry'akashenda, abite aha nku, abyotsye; aho ahu baata eiju, bibe niho byayokyezibwa." 
Leviticus4:13 Eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli ku ririba niryo rikozire ekibi aha bi MUKAMA yaazibiire, ritakikozire nkana, haza kyasherekwa omutwe gw'abantu abateeraine, eihanga ryagiibwaho orubanja," 
Leviticus4:14 bwanyima ekibi eki bakozire kyamanywa, eihanga ryona rihongye enimi y'ekimasha kuba empongano y'ekibi, bagireete omu maisho g'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu." 
Leviticus4:15 Abakuru b'eihanga bate engaro zaabo aha mutwe gw'egyo nimi omu maisho ga MUKAMA, kandi eitirwe omu maisho ge;" 
Leviticus4:16 omunyamurwa owaashukirweho amajuta areete aha shagama y'egyo nimi omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu," 
Leviticus4:17 agikozemu orukumu, agimiisiire emirundi mushanju omu maisho ga MUKAMA omu maisho g'ogwo mukingo;" 
Leviticus4:18 kandi atware ahari egyo shagama, agite aha mahembe g'ekyoterero, ekiri omu maisho ga MUKAMA omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu; kandi eshagama y'egyo nimi eyaatsigaraho yoona agishukye ahansi aha kibunu ky'eitambiro ery'okwokyezaho ebitambo, eriri aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu;" 
Leviticus4:19 kandi ebishaju byayo byona abiiheho, abyokyeze aha itambiro." 
Leviticus4:20 Okwo abe nikwo yaatwaza egyo nimi; nk'oku atwarize enimi y'empongano y'ekibi, abe nikwo yaatwaza n'egi; omunyamurwa ahongye atyo eky'okubarihiirira, nabo baryasaasirwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Bwanyima atware egyo nimi aheeru y'orusiisira, agyotsye nk'oku ayokize ey'okubanza; egyo n'empongano y'ekibi ehongirwe ahabw'eihanga ryona." 
Leviticus4:22 Kandi omutegyeki ku arikora ekibi aha bi MUKAMA Ruhanga we yaazibiire, atakikozire nkana, yaagiibwaho orubanja," 
Leviticus4:23 bwanyima yaamanyisibwa ekibi eki akozire, areete empaya y'embuzi etaine kamogo, agihongye," 
Leviticus4:24 ate engaro ze aha mutwe gw'egyo mbuzi, agiitire omu maisho ga MUKAMA ahu baitira ebitambo by'okwotsya; egyo n'empongano y'ekibi." 
Leviticus4:25 Bwanyima omunyamurwa atware aha shagama y'egyo mpongano y'ekibi aha rukumu rwe, agite aha mahembe g'eitambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo, endiijo shagama yoona agishukye ahansi aha kibunu ky'eryo itambiro." 
Leviticus4:26 Ebishaju byayo byona abyokyeze aha itambiro, nk'oku bootsya ebishaju by'ebitambo by'okusiima ahabw'obusingye; omunyamurwa amuhongyerere empongano y'okurihiirira ekibi kye, nawe aryasaasirwa." 
Leviticus4:27 Kandi omuntu weena ow'omu bantu b'obutoosha ku arikora ekibi aha bi MUKAMA yaazibiire, atakikozire nkana, yaagiibwaho orubanja," 
Leviticus4:28 bwanyima yaamanyisibwa ekibi eki akozire, areete omwagazi gw'embuzi ogutaine kamogo, aguhongye ahabw'ekibi eki akozire." 
Leviticus4:29 Ate engaro ze aha mutwe gw'egyo mpongano y'ekibi, agiitire ahu baitira ebitambo by'okwotsya." 
Leviticus4:30 Omunyamurwa atware aha shagama yaagwo aha rukumu rwe, agite aha mahembe g'eitambiro ery'okwokyezaho ebitambo; endiijo shagama yoona agishukye ahansi aha kibunu ky'eryo itambiro;" 
Leviticus4:31 kandi ebishaju byagwo byona abiiheho, nk'oku babiiha aha bitambo by'okusiima ahabw'obusingye; omunyamurwa abyokyeze aha itambiro kuba ekisooroora kirungi ahari MUKAMA; omunyamurwa amuhongyerere empongano y'okurihiirira ekibi kye, nawe aryasaasirwa." 
Leviticus4:32 Kandi ku arireeta omwana gw'entaama kuba empongano y'ekibi, areete omwagazi ogutaine kamogo;" 
Leviticus4:33 ate engaro ze aha mutwe gw'egyo mpongano y'ekibi, agiitire ahu baitira ebitambo eby'okwotsya kuba empongano y'ekibi." 
Leviticus4:34 Omunyamurwa atware aha shagama y'egyo mpongano y'ekibi aha rukumu rwe, agite aha mahembe g'eitambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo; endiijo shagama yaagwo agishukye ahansi aha kibunu ky'eryo itambiro;" 
Leviticus4:35 ebishaju byagwo byona abiiheho, nk'oku babiiha aha mwana gw'entaama gw'ekitambo eky'okusiima ahabw'obusingye; omunyamurwa abyokyeze aha itambiro aha mpongano ezookiibwe omu muriro ahari MUKAMA, amuhongyerere empongano y'okurihiirira ekibi eki akozire; nawe aryasaasirwa." 
Leviticus5:1 Omuntu weena ku arirahizibwa, yaakora ekibi ky'okwanga kujurira eki areebire, nari eki arikumanya, aryagiibwaho orubanja rw'okutahikiirira." 
Leviticus5:2 Nari omuntu weena ku arikora aha kintu kyona ekirikuzira, yaaba omutumbi gw'enyamaishwa erikuzira, nari ogw'ekitungirwe ekirikuzira, nari ogw'ekirikugyendesa enda ekirikuzira, atakimanyire, yaasiisikara, aryagiibwaho orubanja." 
Leviticus5:3 Nari ku arikora aha kirikuzira ekirikuruga omu muntu ondiijo eky'omuringo gwona atakimanyire, ku arikimanya, aryagiibwaho orubanja." 
Leviticus5:4 Nari omuntu ku arirahukwa aha rurimi, yaarahira kukora kubi nari kukora gye kyonakyona eki arirahuka kurahira atakimanyire, ku arikimanya aryagiibwaho orubanja rw'ekyo eki yaarahukire kurahira."
