Numbers22:24 Bwanyima maraika wa MUKAMA yaayemerera omu kahanda kafunzire, akarikuraba ahagati y'emisiri y'emizaabibu, orugo rumuri oku n'oku." 
Numbers22:25 Egyo ndogoya ku yaareebire maraika wa MUKAMA, yaayemigisiriza aha rugo, yaarumigiraho ekigyere kya Balamu; Balamu yaagaruka yaagiteera." 
Numbers22:26 Maraika wa MUKAMA yaagaruka enyima, yaayemerera ahafunzire munonga, ahataine buhindukiro aha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho." 
Numbers22:27 Endogoya ku yaareebire maraika wa MUKAMA, yaabyama omu maguru ga Balamu; Balamu yaagira ekiniga kingi, yaagiteera enkoni." 
Numbers22:28 MUKAMA yaayashamya akanwa k'egyo ndogoya, yaabuuza Balamu eti: Wantura ki okunteera egi mirundi yonshatu?" 
Numbers22:29 Balamu yaagigarukamu ati: Naakutura okungaya. Kuri naaba nyine rurara mu ngaro, naaba ninkwita." 
Numbers22:30 Endogoya yaabuuza Balamu eti: Tiinye endogoya yaawe, ei otuura nootemba obutoosha n'okuhitsya eri izooba? Hariho obu ndakugizire nti? Onu ati: Ngaaha!" 
Numbers22:31 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaahwezesa amaisho ga Balamu, yaareeba maraika wa MUKAMA ayemereire omu muhanda, aine rurara omu ngaro; yainama, yaajuumara." 
Numbers22:32 Maraika wa MUKAMA yaamubuuza ati: Waateerera ki endogoya yaawe egi mirundi yonshatu? Reeba, naija kukutanga omu maisho, ahabw'okuba orugyendo oru orimu n'orw'obugomi omu maisho gangye;" 
Numbers22:33 endogoya yaawe ku yandeeba, yampigiza egyo mirundi eshatu; kuri etampigiza, buzimazima hati kuri naakwitsire, yo ngireka ehuriire." 
Numbers22:34 Balamu yaagarukamu maraika wa MUKAMA ati: Naacumura, ahakuba naaba ntamanyire ku onyemereire omu maisho kuntanga; mbwenu ku kiraabe nikikugwisa kubi, naaza kugarukayo." 
Numbers22:35 Maraika wa MUKAMA yaagira Balamu ati: Irooko ogyende n'abo bashaija; kwonka ekigambo eki ndaakugambire, obe nikyo waagamba. Atyo Balamu yaagumizamu, yaagyenda n'abanyiginya ba Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Balaki ku yaahuriire ngu Balamu yaija, yaaza kumubugana omu rurembo rwa Moabu, orwabaire ruri aha mwatano gwa Arunooni, ahu ogwo mwatano gurikugarukira." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki yaagira Balamu ati: Tindakutumireho kukweta? N'enki ekyakuzibiire kwija? Torikumanya ku ndikubaasa kukukuza nkakuhindura omuntu w'ekitiinisa? 
Numbers22:38 Balamu yaagarukamu Balaki ati: Reeba, mbwenu naija; noogira ngu nyine obushoboorozi bwona kugira eki naagamba ahabwangye? Ekigambo eki Ruhanga araate omu kanwa kangye, nikyo ndaagambe." 
Numbers22:39 Balamu yaagyenda na Balaki, baahika Kiryasi-huzoosi." 
Numbers22:40 Balaki yaatamba ebitambo by'ente n'entaama, yaatwekyeraho Balamu n'abanyiginya abaizire nawe." 
Numbers22:41 Ku bwaseesire, Balaki yaatwara Balamu yaamwinamura omu kibungo ekirikwetwa Bamosi-baali; yaareebera okwo orubaju rumwe orw'Abaisraeli orwabaire rumuri haihi." 
Numbers23:1 Balamu yaagira Balaki ati: Nyombekyera aha amatambiro mushanju, ondeetereho enimi mushanju n'empaya z'entaama mushanju." 
Numbers23:2 Balaki yaakora nk'oku Balamu yaamugambira; Balaki na Balamu baatambira ahari buri itambiro enimi n'empaya y'entaama. 
Numbers23:3 Balamu yaagira Balaki ati: Yemerera aha rubaju rw'ekitambo kyawe ekyokize, nyowe ngyende; shana MUKAMA akaija kumbugana; eki MUKAMA araanyorekye kyona, niinyija kukikugambira. Yaaza aha mutwe gw'ekibungo, ahataine kati." 
Numbers23:4 Ruhanga yaabugana Balamu, Balamu yaamugira ati: Naatebeekanisa amatambiro mushanju, naatambira ahari buri itambiro enimi n'empaya y'entaama." 
Numbers23:5 MUKAMA yaata ekigambo omu kanwa ka Balamu, yaamugira ati: Garuka ahari Balaki, oku obe nikwo waagamba." 
Numbers23:6 Balamu yaagaruka ahari Balaki, yaashanga akyemereire aha rubaju rw'ekitambo kye ekyokize hamwe n'abanyiginya ba Moabu boona." 
Numbers23:7 Yaagamba ebigambo bye naahanuura ati: Omuri Aramu niyo Balaki yaanyihire, Omugabe wa Moabu akanyiha omu bibungo by'oburugwa-izooba; Ati: Ija onkyeenere Yakobo, Rugayo, ohayire Israeli." 
Numbers23:8 Nkaakyeena nta abu Ruhanga atakyeenire? Kandi nkaahayira nta abu Ruhanga atahayiire? 
Numbers23:9 Ahakuba nimmureebera ahaiguru y'enkiri, Mmwetegyerereza aha mitwe y'ebibungo; Reeba, n'eihanga erituura ryonka, Eriteebarira mu gandi." 
Numbers23:10 N'oha owaakubaasa kubara omucuucu gwa Yakobo, Nari akabara ekicweka kimwe kya kana kya Israeli? Ka nyefeere nk'oku ohikiriire afa, N'omuheru gw'amagara gangye gube nk'ogwe." 
Numbers23:11 Balaki yaagira Balamu ati: Wankorera ki? Nkwetsire kunkyeenera abazigu; mbwenu reeba, waabashabira omugisha gwonka." 
Numbers23:12 Balamu yaamugarukamu ati: Ebi MUKAMA yaata omu kanwa kangye, tinshemereire kubyerinda, nkaba nibyo naagamba?" 
Numbers23:13 Balaki yaamugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ija nkutware ahandi, ahu oraabaase kubareebera; noija kureeba ekicweka kyabo ekirikuhera haihi, torikwija kubareeba boona; aho obe niho waayema, abankyeenere." 
Numbers23:14 Yaamutwara omu bwerere bwa Zofimu aha mutwe gwa Pisiga, yaayombekayo amatambiro mushanju, yaatambira ahari buri itambiro enimi n'empaya y'entaama." 
Numbers23:15 Balamu yaagira Balaki ati: Yemerera aha rubaju rw'ekitambo kyawe ekyokize, mbanze mbugane MUKAMA hariya." 
Numbers23:16 MUKAMA yaabugana Balamu, yaata ekigambo omu kanwa ke, yaamugira ati: Garuka ahari Balaki, oku obe nikwo waagamba." 
Numbers23:17 Yaija ahari Balaki, yaashanga akyemereire aha rubaju rw'ekitambo kye ekyokize, ari hamwe n'abanyiginya ba Moabu. Balaki yaamubuuza ati: MUKAMA yaagamba ki?" 
Numbers23:18 Balamu yaagamba ebigambo bye, naahanuura ati: Imuka, Balaki, ohurire; Iwe mwene Zipori, ntega amatu!" 
Numbers23:19 Ruhanga ti muntu, ngu abeihe; Kandi ti mwana w'omuntu, ngu ayefuuze. Ebi yaagambire, taribikora? Kandi ebyarugire omu kanwa ke, taribihikiiriza?" 
Numbers23:20 Reeba, nkaragiirwa kubashabira omugisha; Ruhanga agubahaire, tindikubaasa kugubaaka." 
Numbers23:21 Tareebire kutahikiirira omuri Yakobo, Kandi omuribo tareebire bugomi omuri Israeli. MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo ari hamwe nabo, Kandi omuribo harimu akaari aku barikuteerera Omugabe waabo." 
Numbers23:22 Ruhanga owaabaihire omuri Misri, akabareeta, Aine amaani nk'ag'embogo." 
Numbers23:23 Buzima tihariho burogo bw'okuroga Yakobo, N'obu kwakuba okuragurira kubi Israeli; Hati nikiija kugambwa ahari Yakobo na Israeli ngu, Eki Ruhanga abakoreire ka n'eky'okutangaaza!" 
Numbers23:24 Reeba, eri ihanga niribandatuka nk'entare y'enkazi, Kandi niriimuka nk'entare y'enshaija; Teribyama, etakariire ki ekwatsire, Etakanyweire shagama y'ebi eitsire." 
Numbers23:25 Balaki yaagira Balamu ati: Otabakyeena na kakye, n'obu kwakuba okubashabira omugisha." 
Numbers23:26 Kwonka Balamu yaagarukamu Balaki ati: Tinkugambiire nti: Byona ebi MUKAMA araagambe, nibyo nshemereire kukora?" 
Numbers23:27 Balaki yaagira Balamu ati: Ija nu, nkutware omu gundi mwanya; obundi Ruhanga akaasiima ku oyema okwo, okabankyeenera." 
Numbers23:28 Balaki yaatwara Balamu aha mutwe gwa Peori, aharikureeba ahansi omu ihamba." 
Numbers23:29 Balamu yaagira Balaki ati: Nyombekyera aha amatambiro mushanju, ondeetereho enimi mushanju n'empaya z'entaama mushanju." 
Numbers23:30 Balaki yaakora nk'oku Balamu yaamugambira, yaatambira ahari buri itambiro enimi n'empaya y'entaama." 
Numbers24:1 Balamu ku yaareebire ngu MUKAMA asiimire kuha Israeli omugisha, tiyaagyenda, nk'oku abaire naagyenda obundi, kusherura endagu, kureka yaahanga amaisho omu ihamba." 
Numbers24:2 Bwanyma yaimutsya amaisho, yaareeba Abaisreli basiisiire nk'enganda zaabo oku ziri. Omwoyo wa Ruhanga yaamwijaho." 
Numbers24:3 Yaagamba ebigambo bye, naahanuura ati: Okuhanuura kwa Balamu mwene Beori, Okuhanuura kw'omushaija obaire ahumire," 
Numbers24:4 Okuhanuura kw'ogwo orikuhurira ebigambo bya Ruhanga, Akareeba okworekwa kw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona, Ogwire ahansi, kwonka amaisho ge nigareeba; Naagira ati:" 
Numbers24:5 Amahema gaawe ka ni marungi, iwe Yakobo; N'ensiisira zaawe ka ni nungi, iwe Israeli!" 
Numbers24:6 Zaaririkire, zaahika hare nk'empita, Nk'emisiri y'aha rubaju rw'omugyera, Nk'enkaka ezi MUKAMA yaabyaire, Nk'emyereezi y'aha rubaju rw'amaizi." 
Numbers24:7 Amaizi garyahimintika, nigaruga omu ndobo ze, N'oruzaaro rwe ruryatuura ahu amaizi maingi gari; Omugabe we aryaba mukuru okukira Agagi, Kandi obugabe bwe buryahimbisibwa." 
Numbers24:8 Ruhanga amwihire omuri Misri; Aine amaani nk'ag'embogo; Aryamaraho amahanga agarikumurwanisa, Ahendagure amagufa gaabo, Abarashe, aboozyemu emyambi ye." 
Numbers24:9 Abunzire, yaabyama nk'entare y'enshaija, N'entare y'enkazi; n'oha owaakwemera kumwimutsya? Orikukushabira omugisha weena, aguheebwe; N'orikukukyeena weena, akyeenwe." 
Numbers24:10 Balaki yaagirira Balamu ekiniga kingi, yaateera omu ngaro, yaamugira ati: Nkakweta kunkyeenera abazigu; mbwenu waabashabira omugisha egi mirundi yonshatu." 
Numbers24:11 N'ahabw'ekyo irooko, ogarukye owaawe; nkaba ninteekateeka kukukuza, nkakuhindura omuntu w'ekitiinisa kingi; mbwenu MUKAMA akikwimire." 
Numbers24:12 Balamu yaagira Balaki ati: Tindagambiire entumwa zaawe, ezi wantumireho, nti:" 
Numbers24:13 N'obu Balaki yaakumpa enju ye eijwire efeeza n'ezaabu, tinkaabaasa kuhingura aha kigambo kya MUKAMA kukora ekirungi nari ekibi omu bwengye bwangye nyenka; kureka eki MUKAMA araagambe, nikyo ndaagambe?" 
Numbers24:14 Mbwenu reeba, naaza kugaruka owaitu; ija nkuhanuurire eki eri ihanga ririkora abantu baawe omu biro bya bwanyima." 
Numbers24:15 Balamu yaagamba ebigambo bye, naahanuura ati: Okuhanuura kwa Balamu mwene Beori, Okuhanuura kw'omushaija obaire ahumire;" 
Numbers24:16 Okuhanuura kw'ogwo orikuhurira ebigambo bya Ruhanga, Akamanya obwengye bwa Rukira-boona, Akareeba okworekwa kw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona, Ogwire ahansi, kwonka amaisho ge nigareeba, Naagira ati:" 
Numbers24:17 Nimmureeba, n'obu ndaabe ntarikumureeba hati; Mmuhangire amaisho, n'obu araabe atari haihi; Enyonyoozi eryaruga omuri Yakobo, N'enkoni y'obugabe eimukye omuri Israeli; Eryateera embaju zoona eza Moabu Ecwekyereze beene Sheesi boona." 
Numbers24:18 Edomu eryakubuurwa, Seiri ekubuurwe, ensi ey'abazigu be, Obwo Israeli naakora eby'obumanzi." 
Numbers24:19 Omuri Yakobo haryarugamu omutegyeki, Acwekyereze ab'omu ndembo abaahonokireho." 
Numbers24:20 Bwanyima yaareeba Abaamaleki, yaagamba ebigambo bye, naahanuura ati: Amaleki niwe yaabaire ari ow'okubanza omu mahanga, Kwonka omuheru gwe guryaba okucwekyerezibwa." 
Numbers24:21 Yaagaruka yaareeba Abakeeni, yaagamba ebigambo bye naahanuura ati: Ahu otwire n'ah'amaani; N'ekyashuri kyawe kiri omu rukiri;" 
Numbers24:22 Kwonka Kaini aryanyagwa, Okuhitsya obu Abaashuri barikutwara omu bunyagwa." 
Numbers24:23 Yaagaruka yaagamba ebigambo bye naahanuura ati: Ai bambe, Ruhanga ku arikora ekyo, n'oha origumaho?" 
Numbers24:24 Kwonka emeeri ziryaruga Kitimu, Zibonabonese Ashuri na Eberi; Nawe acwekyerere." 
Numbers24:25 Bwanyima Balamu yaimuka, yaagyenda, yaagaruka owe; na Balaki yaayegyendera." 
Numbers25:1 Abaisraeli baaguma omuri Shitimu, baatandika kushambana n'abaishiki b'Abamoabu;" 
Numbers25:2 ahakuba Abamoabu bakaba babeeta aha magyenyi g'okutambira baaruhanga baabo ebitambo; Abaisraeli bakiija, barya nabo, baramya baaruhanga baabo." 
Numbers25:3 Batyo Abaisraeli baayeteerana na Baali-peori, MUKAMA yaabagirira ekiniga kingi ekirikwaka nk'omuriro." 
Numbers25:4 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Reeta abakuru b'eihanga boona, obahanikye omu mushana omu maisho gangye, ekiniga kyangye kingi kibone kuruga ahari Israeli." 
Numbers25:5 Musa yaagambira abaramuzi b'Abaisraeli ati: Buri muntu omuriimwe aite abashaija be abeeteeraine na Baali-peori. 
Numbers25:6 Omwe aha Baisraeli yaija, areeteire beene waabo Omumidianikazi omu maisho ga Musa n'omu maisho g'eihanga ryona ry'Abaisraeli, yaashanga nibaririra aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu." 
Numbers25:7 Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari, mwijukuru wa Arooni omunyamurwa, ku yaakireebire, yaimuka ahagati y'abantu, yaakwata eicumu omu ngaro," 
Numbers25:8 yaakurata ogwo Mwisraeli omu ihema, yaabacumita bombi, eicumu ryayoga omu Mwisraeli, ryateera omukazi aha nda. N'ahabw'ekyo orufu rwazibirwa omu Baisraeli." 
Numbers25:9 Boona abaitsirwe orwo rufu bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
Numbers25:10 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers25:11 Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari, mwijukuru wa Arooni omunyamurwa, aihire ekiniga kyangye aha Baisraeli, ahabw'okuba andwaniire eihato omuribo, tinaabacwekyereza habw'eihato ryangye." 
Numbers25:12 N'ahabw'ekyo omugambire ebi ndikugamba ningira nti: Naakuha endagaano yangye ey'obusingye; 
Numbers25:13 eryaba endagaano y'obunyamurwa obutarihwaho ei naaragaana naiwe n'oruzaaro rwawe orurikurataho, ahabw'okurwanira Ruhanga waawe eihato, okarihiirira Abaisraeli." 
Numbers25:14 Kandi ogwo Mwisraeli owaitsirwe n'ogwo Mumidianikazi akaba naayetwa Zimuri mwene Saalu, omukuru w'enju ya baishenkuru omu ruganda rwa Simeoni;" 
Numbers25:15 kandi ogwo Mumidianikazi owaitsirwe akaba naayetwa Kozibi muhara wa Zuuri; nawe akaba ari omukuru w'omutwe gw'ab'enju ya baishenkuru omu Bamidiani. 
Numbers25:16 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers25:17 Tuntuza Abamidiani, obaite," 
Numbers25:18 ahabw'okuba babatuntwize n'oburyarya bwabo, obu baababeihabeihiise omu bya Peori, n'omu bya Kozibi muhara w'omukuru w'Abamidiani, munyaanyabo oitsirwe aha izooba ry'orufu orureetsirwe ebya Peori." 
Numbers26:1 Bwanyima y'orwo rufu MUKAMA yaagambira Musa na Eleazaari mwene Arooni omunyamurwa, ati:" 
Numbers26:2 Mubare eihanga ry'Abaisraeli ryona, abahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, nk'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku eri, ab'omu Baisraeli boona abarikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers26:3 Musa na Eleazaari omunyamurwa baagamba nabo bari omu mpita za Moabu, haihi na Yorudani, ahashungaine na Yeriko, nibagira bati:" 
Numbers26:4 Mubare abantu abahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, nk'oku MUKAMA aragiire Musa. Abaisraeli abaarugire omu nsi ya Misri nibo aba:" 
Numbers26:5 Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Israeli; beene Reubeeni, abaazairwe Hanoki, omuryango gw'aba Hanoki; abaazairwe Palu, omuryango gw'aba Palu," 
Numbers26:6 abaazairwe Hezirooni, omuryango gw'aba Hezirooni; abaazairwe Karumi, omuryango gw'aba Karumi." 
Numbers26:7 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abareubeeni; abaabazirwe omuribo bakaba bari obukumi buna n'enkumi ishatu na magana mushanju na makumi ashatu. 
Numbers26:8 Omuri beene Palu, Eliabu." 
Numbers26:9 Beene Eliabu Nemueli, Dasani na Abiraamu, Dasani na Abiraamu abo nibo baatoorainwe omu ihanga, bakahakanisa Musa na Arooni bakwataniise na Koora, obu baahakanisa MUKAMA," 
Numbers26:10 ensi ekaashamya akanwa, ekabamira hamwe na Koora, obu ekigombe kye ekyo kyafa, omuriro gukootsya abashaija magana abiri na makumi ataano, bakahinduka eky'okureeberaho." 
Numbers26:11 Kwonka beene Koora tibarafiire. 
Numbers26:12 Beene Simeoni nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Nemueli, omuryango gw'aba N'emueli; abaazairwe Yamini, omuryango gw'aba Yamini; abaazairwe Yakini, omuryango gw'aba Yakini;" 
Numbers26:13 abaazairwe Zeera, omuryango gw'aba Zeera; abaazairwe Shauli, omuryango gw'aba Shauli." 
Numbers26:14 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abasimeoni, abashaija obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri na magana abiri." 
Numbers26:15 Beene Gaadi nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Zefoni, omuryango gw'aba Zefoni; abaazairwe Haagi, omuryango gw'aba Haagi; abaazairwe Shuuni, omuryango gw'aba Shuuni;" 
Numbers26:16 abaazairwe Ozini, omuryango gw'aba Ozini; abaazairwe Eeri, omuryango gw'aba Eeri;" 
Numbers26:17 abaazairwe Arodi, omuryango gw'aba Arodi; abaazairwe Areeli, omuryango gw'aba Areeli." 
Numbers26:18 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abagaadi, nk'abo abaabazirwe aharibo oku baabaire bari, obukumi buna na magana ataano." 
Numbers26:19 Beene Yuda Eeri na Onani; Eeri na Onani abo bakagwa omu nsi ya Kanaani. 
Numbers26:20 Beene Yuda nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri, abaazairwe Sheela, omuryango gw'aba Sheela; abaazairwe Pereezi, omuryango gw'aba Pereezi, abaazairwe Zeera, omuryango gw'aba Zeera." 
Numbers26:21 Beene Pereezi nibo aba; abaazairwe Hezirooni, omuryango gw'aba Hezirooni; abaazairwe Hamuli, omuryango gw'aba Hamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Egyo niyo miryango ya Yuda, nk'abo abaabazirwe aharibo, obukumi mushanju n'enkumi mukaaga na magana ataano." 
Numbers26:23 Beene Isakaari nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Toola, omuryango gw'aba Toola; abaazairwe Puuva, omuryango gw'aba Puuna;" 
Numbers26:24 abaazairwe Yashubu, omuryango gw'aba Yashubu; abaazairwe Shimirooni, omuryango gw'aba Shimirooni." 
Numbers26:25 Egyo niyo miryango ya Isakaari, nk'abo abaabazirwe oku baabaire bari, obukumi mukaaga n'enkumi ina na magana ashatu." 
Numbers26:26 Beene Zebuluuni nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Seredi, omuryango gw'aba Seredi; abaazairwe Eloni, omuryango gw'aba Eloni; abaazairwe Yahaleeli, omuryango gw'aba Yahaleeli." 
Numbers26:27 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abazebuluuni, nk'abo abaabazirwe aharibo oku baabaire bari, obukumi mukaaga na magana ataano." 
Numbers26:28 Beene Yosefu nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; Manaase na Efuraimu. 
Numbers26:29 Beene Manaase, abaazairwe Makiri, omuryango gw'aba Makiri; kandi Makiri akazaara Gileadi; abaazairwe Gileadi, omuryango gw'aba Gileadi." 
Numbers26:30 Kandi aba nibo beene Gileadi, abaazairwe Yezeri, omuryango gw'aba Yezeri; abaazairwe Heleki, omuryango gw'aba Heleki;" 
Numbers26:31 abaazairwe Asirieli, omuryango gw'aba Asirieli; abaazairwe Shekemu, omuryango gw'aba Shekemu;" 
Numbers26:32 abaazairwe Shemida, omuryango gw'aba Shemida; abaazairwe Heferi, omuryango gw'aba Heferi." 
Numbers26:33 Zelofehaadi mwene Heferi tarazaire boojo, kureka abaishiki; amaziina ga bahara ba Zelofehaadi ni Maala na Noa, Hogula, Milika na Tiruza." 
Numbers26:34 Egyo niyo miryango ya Manaase; abaabazirwe aharibo bakaba bari obukumi butaano n'enkumi ibiri na magana mushanju. 
Numbers26:35 Aba nibo beene Efuraimu nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Shuseela, omuryango gw'aba Shuseela; abaazairwe Bekeri, omuryango gw'aba Bekeri; abaazairwe Tahani, omuryango gw'aba Tahani." 
Numbers26:36 Kandi nibo beene Shuseela; abaazairwe Erani, omuryango gw'aba Erani." 
Numbers26:37 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abaefuraimu, nk'abo abaabazirwe aharibo oku baabaire bari, obukumi bushatu n'enkumi ibiri na magana ataano. Abo nibo beene Yosefu nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri." 
Numbers26:38 Beene Benyamiini nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Beela, omuryango gw'aba Beela; abaazairwe Ashubeeli, omuryango gw'aba Ashubeeli; abaazairwe Ahiraamu, omuryango gw'aba Ahiraamu;" 
Numbers26:39 abaazairwe Shufaamu, omuryango gw'aba Shufaamu; abaazairwe Hufaamu, omuryango gw'aba Hufaamu." 
Numbers26:40 Kandi beene Beela bakaba bari Arudi na Naamani; abaazairwe Arudi, omuryango gw'aba Arudi; abaazairwe Naamani, omuryango gw'aba Naamani." 
Numbers26:41 Abo nibo beene Benyamiini nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaabazirwe aharibo bakaba bari obukumi buna n'enkumi itaano na magana mukaaga. 
Numbers26:42 Aba nibo beene Daani nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Shuhaamu, omuryango gw'aba Shuhaamu; egyo niyo miryango y'Abadaani." 
Numbers26:43 Emiryango yoona ey'aba Shuhaamu, nk'abo abaabazirwe aharibo oku baabaire bari, n'obukumi mukaaga n'enkumi ina na magana ana." 
Numbers26:44 Beene Asheri nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Imuna, omuryango gw'aba Imuna; abaazairwe Ishuvi, omuryango gw'aba Ishuvi; abaazairwe Beria, omuryango gw'aba Beeri;" 
Numbers26:45 omuri beene Beria, abaazairwe Heberi, omuryango gw'aba Heberi; abaazairwe Malikieli, omuryango gw'aba Malikieli;" 
Numbers26:46 kandi muhara wa Asheri akaba naayetwa Seera. 
Numbers26:47 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abaasheri, nk'abo abaabazirwe aharibo oku baabaire bari, obukumi butaano n'enkumi ishatu na magana ana." 
Numbers26:48 Beene Nafutaali nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Yahazeeli, omuryango gw'aba Yahazeeli; abaazairwe Guuni, omuryango gw'aba Guuni;" 
Numbers26:49 abaazairwe Yezeri, omuryango gw'aba Yezeri; abaazairwe Shileemu, omuryango gw'aba Shileemu." 
Numbers26:50 Egyo niyo miryango ya Nafutaali nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaabazirwe aharibo bakaba bari obukumi buna n'enkumi itaano na magana ana. 
Numbers26:51 Abo nibo baabazirwe aha Baisraeli, boona bakaba bari obusiriira mukaaga na rukumi na magana mushanju na makumi ashatu." 
Numbers26:52 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers26:53 Abo nibo baribaganisizibwa ensi kuba obuhunguzi, nk'omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo oku guri." 
Numbers26:54 Abaingi oryabaha obuhunguzi bwingi, kandi abakye obahe obuhunguzi bukye; buri ruganda ruheebwe obuhunguzi nk'omubaro gw'abantu baarwo abaabazirwe oku guri." 
Numbers26:55 Kwonka ensi eryabaganisibwa n'enteenyu; baryagihungura nk'amaziina g'enganda za baishenkurubo oku gari. 
Numbers26:56 Nk'oku enteenyu eriba, nikwo n'obuhunguzi buribaganisizibwa abaingi n'abakye." 
Numbers26:57 Aba nibo baabazirwe omu Baleevi, nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri; abaazairwe Gereshoni, omuryango gw'aba Gereshoni; abaazairwe Kohasi, omuryango gw'aba Kohasi; abaazairwe Merari, omuryango gw'aba Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Egyo niyo miryango ya Leevi, omuryango gw'aba Libuni, omuryango gw'aba Heburooni, n'ogw'aba Mahili n'ogw'aba Muushi, n'ogw'aba Koora. Kandi Kohasi niwe yaazaire Amuraamu." 
Numbers26:59 Kandi muka Amuraamu akaba naayetwa Yokebedi, muhara wa Leevi, ou Leevi yaazaariire Misri; yaazaara na Amuraamu, Arooni na Musa, na Miriamu munyaanyabo." 
Numbers26:60 Na Arooni yaazaara Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazaari na Itamaari." 
Numbers26:61 Kwonka Nadabu na Abihu bakafa, obu baayoteza omuriro ogundi ogutararagiirwe kwoteza omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Numbers26:62 Abaleevi abaabazirwe, oyetwa omushaija weena okwiha aha mwana ohikize okwezi bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ishatu; kandi tibarabazirwe na Baisraeli abandi, ahabw'okuba tibarahairwe buhunguzi hamwe nabo." 
Numbers26:63 Abo nibo baabazirwe Musa na Eleazaari omunyamurwa, abaabariire Abaisraeli omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudani ahashungaine na Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Kwonka omuri abo hakaba hatarimu n'omwe omu baabazirwe Musa na Arooni omunyamurwa, abaabariire Abaisraeli omu ihamba rya Sinai." 
Numbers26:65 Ahakuba MUKAMA akabagambaho, naagira ati: Buzimazima baryafeera omu ihamba. Tihariho n'omwe aharibo owaatsigaireho kureka Kalebu mwene Yefune na Yoshua mwene Nuuni." 
Numbers27:1 Bwanyima haija bahara ba Zelofehaadi, mwene Heferi ya Gileadi, ya Makiri, ya Manaase ab'emiryango ya Manaase ab'emiryango ya Manaase mwene Yosefu; bahara be bakaba nibeetwa Maala, Noa, Hogula, Milika na Tiruza;" 
Numbers27:2 baayemerera omu maisho ga Musa na Eleazaari omunyamurwa n'abeebembezi n'eihanga ryona aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu; baagira bati: 
Numbers27:3 Tataitwe akagwa omu ihamba; kandi akaba atari mu mutwe gw'abaayeteeraine kugomera MUKAMA omu kigombe kya Koora; akafeera omu bibi bye wenka, kandi akaba atazaire boojo." 
Numbers27:4 N'enki ekirikwihisa eiziina rya tataitwe omu b'omuryango gwe, ngu ahabw'okuba tarazaire mwojo? Otuhe obutaka omu b'oruganda rwa tataitwe." 
Numbers27:5 Musa yaatwarira MUKAMA ebigambo byabo. 
Numbers27:6 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers27:7 Ebi bahara ba Zelofehaadi barikufa n'eby'amazima; buzimazima otaribura kubaha obutaka omu b'omuryango gwa ishebo; obarekye bahungure obuhunguzi bwe. 
Numbers27:8 Kandi ogambire Abaisraeli oti: Omuntu ku arifa, atatsigire mwana w'omwojo, muryareka obuhunguzi bwe bube obwa muhara we." 
Numbers27:9 Ku ariba atatsigire muhara, obuhunguzi mubuhe beene ishe." 
Numbers27:10 Ku ariba ataine beene ishe, mubuhe baishento." 
Numbers27:11 Kwonka ishe ku ariba ataine bakuru be nari abarumuna, obuhunguzi mubuhe omunyaruganda omuri haihi, abuhungure. Ekyo kibe ekiragiro ky'okucweraho emanja z'obuhunguzi omu Baisraeli, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers27:12 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Oryainamuka ahari oru rushozi rwa Abariimu, oreebe ensi ei mpaire Abaisraeli." 
Numbers27:13 Ku oriheza kugireeba, naiwe oryafa, okurate abaanyu, nka Arooni mukuru waawe oku yaabakuratsire," 
Numbers27:14 ahabw'okuba mukagomera ekiragiro kyangye omu ihamba rya Ziini, obu eihanga ryampakanisa, mukanga kumpaisa ekitiinisa omu maisho gaaryo aha maizi. Ago nigo maizi ga Meriba omuri Kadeshi omu ihamba rya Ziini." 
Numbers27:15 Musa yaagira MUKAMA ati: 
Numbers27:16 MUKAMA Ruhanga w'emyoyo y'abantu boona atoorane omushaija w'okutegyeka eri ihanga," 
Numbers27:17 ow'okubeebembera nibashohora, kandi nibataaha, oraabashohoze, kandi akabataasya, eihanga rya MUKAMA rirekye kuba nk'entaama ezitaine muriisa." 
Numbers27:18 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Twara Yoshua mwene Nuuni, omuntu oine omwoyo, omuteho engaro;" 
Numbers27:19 bwanyima omwemereze omu maisho ga Eleazaari omunyamurwa n'omu g'eihanga ryona, omukwatsize omurimo omu maisho gaabo." 
Numbers27:20 Kandi omuhe aha kitiinisa kyawe, ab'eihanga ry'Abaisraeli boona babone kumworobera." 
Numbers27:21 Aryaguma ayemerere omu maisho ga Eleazaari omunyamurwa, nawe aije omu maisho gangye amubuurize ahariinye naakoresa Urimu; ahabw'okuragiira kwa Eleazaari baryaguma bashohore, kandi bataahe ahabw'okuragiira kwe, Yoshua hamwe n'Abaisraeli boona, niryo ihanga ryona." 
Numbers27:22 Musa yaakora nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiira; yaatwara Yoshua, yaamwemereza omu maisho ga Eleazaari omunyamurwa n'eihanga ryona," 
Numbers27:23 yaamutaho engaro, yaamukwatsa omurimo, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire naaraba omuri Musa." 
Numbers28:1 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers28:2 Ragiira Abaisraeli, obagambire ebi ndikugamba ningira nti: Ebi mpongyeirwe, eby'okurya ebi murikumpongyera ebyokiibwe omu muriro, eby'ekisoroora ekirikunshemeza, mugume mwijukye kubimpongyera omu bunaku bwabyo obwatairweho." 
Numbers28:3 Obagire oti: Egi niyo mpongano y'okwotsya omu muriro, ei muriguma nimuhongyera MUKAMA; buri izooba muhongye empaya nto z'entaama ibiri ezitaine kamogo, kuba ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha." 
Numbers28:4 Ogume ohongye omwana gw'entaama gumwe omu kasheeshe, n'ogundi omu mwabazyo," 
Numbers28:5 hamwe n'ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi kya eefa y'esaano y'obunono kuba empongano y'esaano, ejwangizemu ekicweka kimwe kya kana kya hiini y'amajuta g'emizeituuni agashekwire." 
Numbers28:6 Egyo n'empongano y'okwotsya ey'obutoosha, eyaaragiriirwe aha rushozi Sinai kuba ey'ekisoroora kirungi, empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ehongyeirwe MUKAMA." 
Numbers28:7 Kandi empongano y'eby'okunywa ey'okuhongwa n'omwana gw'entaama gumwe, eryaba ekicweka kimwe kya kana kya hiini. Omu mwanya ogurikwera nimwo origuma nooshuka empongano ya viinyo y'amaani, ebirikuhongyerwa MUKAMA." 
Numbers28:8 Ogundi mwana gw'entaama oguhongye omu mwabazyo; oguhongye n'empongano yaagwo y'esaano n'ey'eby'okunywa nk'eby'omu kasheeshe, kuba empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ey'ekisoroora ekirikushemeza MUKAMA." 
Numbers28:9 Aha izooba rya sabato muhongye empaya nto z'entaama ibiri, ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo, hamwe n'ebicweka bibiri bya ikumi ebya eefa y'esaano y'obunono ejwangizemu amajuta n'empongano yaayo y'eby'okunywa;" 
Numbers28:10 egyo niyo mpongano y'okwotsya buri sabato, mutabariireho ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo y'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers28:11 Aha kutandika kwa buri kwezi mugume muhongyere MUKAMA empongano y'okwotsya enimi z'ebimasha ibiri, n'empaya y'entaama emwe, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama mushanju ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers28:12 n'ebicweka bishatu bya ikumi bya eefa y'esaano y'obunono kuba empongano y'esaano ejwangizemu amajuta ey'okuhongwa na buri nimi, n'ebicweka bibiri bya ikumi bya eefa y'esaano y'obunono kuba empongano y'esaano ejwangizemu amajuta ey'okuhongwa na buri mpaya y'entaama," 
Numbers28:13 kandi n'ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi ky'esaano y'obunono, ejwangizemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano ey'okuhongwa na buri mwana gw'entaama, byona bibe empongano y'okwotsya ey'ekisooroora kirungi, empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro ehongyeirwe MUKAMA." 
Numbers28:14 Kandi empongano z'eby'okunywa ez'okuhongwa nabyo zibe ekicweka kimwe kya kabiri kya hiini ya viinyo ahabwa buri nimi, n'ekicweka kimwe kya kashatu kya hiini ahabwa buri mpaya y'entaama, kandi n'ekicweka kimwe kya kana kya hiini ahabwa buri mwana gw'entaama; egyo niyo mpongano ey'okwotsya eya buri kwezi okumara ameezi goona ag'omu mwaka." 
Numbers28:15 Kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi ekihongyeirwe MUKAMA, mutabariireho ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo y'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers28:16 Omu kwezi kw'okubanza aha kiro kya ikumi na bina n'ekiro ky'Okuhinguraho kwa MUKAMA. 
Numbers28:17 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano eky'okwo kwezi hagume habeho ekiro kikuru ky'obugyenyi; muryaguma mumare ebiro mushanju nimurya emigaati etatumbisiibwe. 
Numbers28:18 Aha izooba eririkubibandiza habeho okuteerana okurikwera; mutarikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya; 
Numbers28:19 kureka muhongyereho empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro, ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'okuhongyera MUKAMA, enimi z'ebimasha ibiri, n'empaya y'entaama emwe, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama mushanju ezihikize omwaka; mureebe ngu tibiine kamogo;" 
Numbers28:20 mubihongye n'empongano zaabyo ez'esaano ejwangizemu amajuta, ebicweka bishatu bya ikumi ahabwa buri nimi, n'ebicweka bibiri bya ikumi ahabwa buri mpaya y'entaama," 
Numbers28:21 kandi n'ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi ahabwa buri mwana gw'entaama ahari ezo mushanju; 
Numbers28:22 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi ky'okubarihiirira. 
Numbers28:23 Mugume mubihongye mutabariireho ekitambo ky'okwotsya ekya buri kasheeshe, empongano y'okwotsya ey'obutoosha." 
Numbers28:24 Kandi mugume muhongye mutyo buri izooba, okumara ebiro mushanju, eby'okurya by'empongano ezookiibwe omu muriro kuba ekisooroora ekirikushemeza MUKAMA; bihongwe nibyongyerwa aha kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo y'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers28:25 Aha kiro kya mushanju mugire okuteerana okurikwera; mutarikikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya. 
Numbers28:26 Kandi n'aha izooba ry'emiganuro, ku muriba nimuhongyera MUKAMA empongano z'emiganuro omu bugyenyi bwa saabiiti mushanju, muryaguma mugire okuteerana okurikwera; mutaririkoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya;" 
Numbers28:27 kureka muhongye ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'ekisooroora ekirikushemeza MUKAMA, enimi z'ebimasha ibiri, n'empaya y'entaama emwe, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama mushanju ezihikize omwaka," 
Numbers28:28 n'empongano z'esaano ez'okuhongwa nabyo, esaano y'obunono ejwangizemu amajuta, ebicweka bishatu bya ikumi ahabwa buri nimi, n'ebicweka bibiri bya ikumi ahabwa buri mpaya," 
Numbers28:29 kandi n'ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi ahabwa buri mwana gw'entaama ahari ezo mushanju," 
Numbers28:30 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi emwe ey'okubarihiirira. 
Numbers28:31 Mugume mubihongye n'empongano zaabyo z'eby'okunywa, mutabariireho kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha. Mureebe ngu tibiine kamogo." 
Numbers29:1 Omu kwezi kwa mushanju aha kiro ky'okubanza, mugume mugire okuteerana okurikwera; mutarikikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya. Eryo izooba riryaba eizooba eri muriguma nimuteereraho amakondere." 
Numbers29:2 Kandi muryaguma nimurihongyeraho empongano y'okwotsya ey'ekisooroora ekirikushemeza MUKAMA, enimi y'ekimasha emwe, n'empaya y'entaama emwe, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama mushanju ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:3 n'empongano ez'okuhongwa nabyo z'esaano ejwangizemu amajuta, ebicweka bishatu bya ikumi ahabw'egyo nimi, n'ebicweka bibiri bya ikumi ahabw'egyo mpaya y'entaama," 
Numbers29:4 kandi n'ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi ahabwa buri mwana gw'entaama ahari ezo mushanju; 
Numbers29:5 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi eky'okubarihiirira," 
Numbers29:6 mutabariireho kitambo ky'okwotsya ekihongwa aha kuboneka kw'okwezi n'empongano y'esaano yaakyo, n'ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano y'esaano yaakyo, n'ey'eby'okunywa yaakyo, nk'ekiragiro kyabyo oku kiri, kuba empongano y'ekisooroora kirungi, eyokiibwe omu muriro, erikuhongyerwa MUKAMA." 
Numbers29:7 Aha kiro kya ikumi eky'okwo kwezi kwa mushanju mugume mugire okuteerana okurikwera; ahari eryo izooba mwebonabonese, mutaririkoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya;" 
Numbers29:8 kureka muhongyere MUKAMA empongano y'okwotsya ey'ekisooroora kirungi, enimi y'ekimasha emwe n'empaya y'entaama emwe, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama mushanju, ezihikize omwaka; bibe ebitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:9 n'empongano z'esaano ez'okuhongwa nabyo, ez'esaano y'obunono ejwangizemu amajuta, ebicweka bishatu bya ikumi ahabw'egyo nimi, n'ebicweka bibiri bya ikumi ahabw'egyo mpaya y'entaama," 
Numbers29:10 kandi n'ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi ahabwa buri mwana gw'entaama ahari ezo mushanju; 
Numbers29:11 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi emwe kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi; mutabariiremu kitambo ky'okurihiirira ekibi, n'ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha, n'empongano yaakyo y'esaano, n'empongano zaabyo z'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers29:12 Kandi aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano omuri okwo kwezi kwa mushanju muryaguma mugire okuteerana okurikwera; mutarikikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya; kandi muryamara ebiro mushanju nimurinda obugyenyi bw'ebiro bikuru ahari MUKAMA. 
Numbers29:13 Kandi muryahonga ebitambo by'okwotsya, empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro, ey'ekisooroora kirungi ahari MUKAMA; enimi z'ebimasha ikumi na ishatu, n'empaya z'entaama ibiri, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama ikumi na ina, ezihikize omwaka; bibe ebitaine kamogo;" 
Numbers29:14 obihongye n'empongano zaabyo ez'esaano y'obunono ejwangizemu amajuta, ebicweka bishatu bya ikumi ahabwa buri nimi ahari ezo ikumi na ishatu, n'ebicweka bibiri bya ikumi ahabwa buri mpaya ahari ezo zombi," 
Numbers29:15 kandi n'ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi ahabwa buri mwana gw'entaama ahari ezo ikumi na ina; 
Numbers29:16 muhongye n'empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi, mutabariireho kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo y'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers29:17 Aha izooba rya kabiri muhongye enimi z'ebimasha ikumi na ibiri, n'empaya z'entaama ibiri, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama ikumi na ina, ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo;" 
Numbers29:18 mubihongye n'empongano yaabyo y'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa ahabw'ezo nimi, n'ahabw'ezo mpaya z'entaama, kandi n'ahabw'abo baana b'entaama, nk'omubaro gwabyo oku guri, nk'oku ebiragiro byabyo biri;" 
Numbers29:19 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi, mutabariireho kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo y'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers29:20 Aha kiro kya kashatu muhongye enimi z'ebimasha ikumi na emwe n'empaya z'entaama ibiri, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama ikumi na ina ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:21 mubihongye n'empongano zaabyo ez'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa ahabw'ezo nimi n'ezo mpaya, kandi n'abo baana b'entaama, nk'omubaro gwabyo oku guri, nk'oku ebiragiro byabyo biri;" 
Numbers29:22 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi, mutabariireho ekyo kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano y'esaano yaakyo n'ez'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers29:23 Aha kiro kya kana muhongye enimi z'ebimasha ikumi, n'empaya z'entaama ibiri, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama ikumi na ina ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:24 mubihongye n'empongano zaabyo z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa ahabw'ezo nimi, n'ezo mpaya, n'abo baana b'entaama, nk'omubaro gwabyo oku guri, nk'oku ebiragiro byabyo biri;" 
Numbers29:25 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi, mutabariireho ekyo kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo y'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers29:26 Aha kiro kya kataano muhongye enimi z'ebimasha mwenda n'empaya z'entaama ibiri, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama ikumi na ina ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo." 
Numbers29:27 mubihongye n'empongano zaabyo z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa ahabw'ezo nimi n'ezo mpaya kandi n'abo baana b'entaama, nk'omubaro gwabyo oku guri, kandi nk'oku ebiragiro byabyo biri;" 
Numbers29:28 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi, mutabariireho ekyo kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo y'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers29:29 Aha kiro kya mukaaga muhongye enimi z'ebimasha munaana, n'empaya z'entaama ibiri kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama ikumi na ina ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:30 mubihongye n'empongano zaabyo z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa ahabw'ezo nimi n'ezo mpaya z'entaama kandi n'abo baana b'entaama, nk'omubaro gwabyo oku guri, kandi nk'oku ebiragiro byabyo biri;" 
Numbers29:31 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi, mutabariireho kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo y'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers29:32 Aha kiro kya mushanju muhongye enimi z'ebimasha mushanju n'empaya z'entaama ibiri kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama ikumi na ina ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:33 mubihongye n'empongano zaabyo z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa ahabw'ezo nimi n'ezo mpaya z'entaama kandi n'abo baana b'entaama, nk'omubaro gwabyo oku guri, kandi nk'oku ebiragiro byabyo biri;" 
Numbers29:34 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi, mutabariireho kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo y'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers29:35 Aha kiro kya munaana mugume mugire okuteerana kw'okwecureeza; mutarikikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya; 
Numbers29:36 kureka muhongye ekitambo ky'okwotsya, kuba empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro, ey'ekisooroora kirungi ahari MUKAMA; muhongye enimi emwe n'empaya y'entaama emwe, kandi n'empaya nto z'entaama mushanju ezihikize omwaka ezitaine kamogo;" 
Numbers29:37 mubihongye n'empongano zaabyo z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa ahabw'egyo nimi n'egyo mpaya y'entaama, kandi n'abo baana b'entaama, nk'omubaro gwabyo oku guri, nk'oku ebiragiro byabyo biri;" 
Numbers29:38 kandi muhongye empaya y'embuzi kuba ekitambo ky'ekibi, mutabariireho ekyo kitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha n'empongano yaakyo ey'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa." 
Numbers29:39 Ebyo nibyo muriguma nimuhongyera MUKAMA omu biro by'amagyenyi gaanyu agaatairweho, kuba ebitambo byanyu by'okwotsya, n'empongano zaanyu z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa, kandi n'empongano zaanyu z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, mutabariireho bi muhonga ahabw'ebi mwaraganiise n'ebi mutoija ahabw'okweyendera." 
Numbers29:40 Bwanyima Musa yaagambira Abaisraeli byona, nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiire." 
Numbers30:1 Musa yaagambira abakuru b'enganda z'Abaisraeli ati: Eki nikyo kiragiro eki MUKAMA yaaragiira. 
Numbers30:2 Omuntu ku arihiga omu maisho ga MUKAMA, nari shi ku arirahira, yaayekwatiriza, atariita egyo ndahiro ye, kureka ahikiirize ekyamurugire omu kanwa kyona." 
Numbers30:3 Kandi omwishiki ku arihiga omuhigo omu maisho ga MUKAMA, yaayekwatiriza, akiri omu ka ya ishe omu buhangare bwe," 
Numbers30:4 ishe yaahurira okuhiga kwe, n'okwekwatiriza kwe, yaamwetsiza, okuhiga kwe kwona n'okwekwatiriza kwe kwona n'endahiro biryahama." 
Numbers30:5 Kwonka ishe ku aryanga ebi arikurahira aha izooba eri yaabihuririraho, ebi yaahiga byona, n'okwekwatiriza kwe tibirihama; kandi MUKAMA aryamusaasira, ahabw'okuba ishe yaamwangira." 
Numbers30:6 Kandi ku arishwerwa omushaija naakitegyekwa ebi yaahigire, nari shi akibohirwe endahiro ei yaarahiriire eryo," 
Numbers30:7 iba yaabihurira, yaamwetsiza aha izooba eri yaabihuririraho, ebi yaahigire biryahama, n'ebi yaarahiire naayekwatiriza nabyo bihame." 
Numbers30:8 Kwonka iba ku arimwangira aha izooba eri yaabihuririraho, aryaba aihireho okuhiga kwe oku yaahigire, n'endahiro ei yaarahiriire eryo kurahira naayesinga; kandi MUKAMA aryamusaasira." 
Numbers30:9 Kwonka omufaakazi nari omukazi oshenzirwe ku arihiga, eki yaahigire kyona, akarahira endahiro, naayekwatiriza, kiryamutukurira." 
Numbers30:10 Kandi ku ariba ahigiire omwa iba, nari ku ariba arahiire naayekwatiriza," 
Numbers30:11 iba yaabihurira, yaamwetsiza, ataamwangira, ebi yaahigire byona biryahama, n'ebi yaarahiire naayekwatiriza byona nabyo bihame." 
Numbers30:12 Kwonka iba ku aribiihaho, yaabyanga aha izooba eri yaabihuririraho, ebyarugire omu kanwa ke naahiga, nari shi ebi yaarahiire naayekwatiriza, tibirihama, ahakuba iba aryaba abiihireho; kandi MUKAMA aryamusaasira." 
Numbers30:13 Okuhiga kwona n'endahiro yoona ei ogwo mukazi arirahira kwebonabonesa, iba aine obushoboorozi bw'okugihamya nari kugiihaho." 
Numbers30:14 Kwonka iba ku arimara ebiro naamwetsiza, biri ahamize emihigo ye yoona n'endahiro ze zoona ezi yaarahiire naayekwatiriza; iba aryaba abihamize, ahakuba akamwetsiza aha izooba eri yaabihuririireho." 
Numbers30:15 Kwonka ku aribiihaho, amazire ebiro naabihurira, aryagiibwaho okutahikiirira kw'omukazi we." 
Numbers30:16 Ebyo nibyo biragiro ebi MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa, aha mushaija n'omukazi we, n'aha mushaija na muhara we, okiri empangare omu ka ya ishe." 
Numbers31:1 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers31:2 Hoora Abamidiani, obahoorere Abaisraeli; bwanyima oryafa okurate abaanyu." 
Numbers31:3 Musa yaagambira abantu ati: Mutoorane abantu omuriimwe, mubahe eby'okurwanisa, bateere Midiani, babahoore enzigu ahabwa MUKAMA." 
Numbers31:4 Omuri buri ruganda rw'enganda zoona eza Israeli mwihemu engabo rukumi, muzoohereze aha rugamba." 
Numbers31:5 Batyo omu nkumi z'Abaisraeli baatooranamu engabo rukumi-rukumi omuri buri ruganda, baihamu engabo kakumi n'enkumi ibiri eziine eby'okurwanisa." 
Numbers31:6 Musa yaaboohereza aha rugamba, rukumi omuri buri ruganda, hamwe na Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari omunyamurwa, baine ebintu by'Aharikwera n'enzamba z'okuhuruza." 
Numbers31:7 Baarwanisa Abamidiani, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa, baita abashaija boona." 
Numbers31:8 Kandi hamwe n'abo abaitsirwe, baitiranamu abagabe bataano ba Midiani, Evi, Rekemu, Zuuri, Huuri na Reeba, kandi na Balamu mwene Beori baamwitsa rurara." 
Numbers31:9 Abaisraeli baanyaga abakazi b'Abamidiani n'abaana baabo abato; n'ente zaabo zoona n'amasyo gaabo goona ag'entaama n'embuzi, n'ebintu byabo byona nabyo baabinyaga." 
Numbers31:10 Kandi endembo zaabo zoona omu myanya ei baabaire batwiremu, n'ensiisira zaabo zoona baabyotsya." 
Numbers31:11 Baatabaarukana ebi baanyagire byona, abantu n'amatungo." 
Numbers31:12 Enkwatwa n'eminyago n'ebintu baabireetera Musa na Eleazaari omunyamurwa n'eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli, ahu baabaire basiisiire omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudani ahashungaine na Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Musa na Eleazaari n'abeebembezi boona ab'eihanga baashohora kubabugana aheeru y'orusiisira. 
Numbers31:14 Musa yaagwerwa kubi abakuru b'eihe, abeebembezi b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, n'aba igana-igana, abaabaire nibatabaaruka." 
Numbers31:15 Musa yaababuuza ati: Abakazi boona mubarekire, timwabaita?" 
Numbers31:16 Nimumanya ngu abo nibo baacumwize Abaisraeli ahari MUKAMA omu bya Peori, ahabw'okuhaburwa Balamu, kikareeta orufu omu ihanga rya MUKAMA." 
Numbers31:17 N'ahabw'ekyo hati mwite omwojo weena omu baana, na buri mukazi weena orabyamire n'omushaija." 
Numbers31:18 Kwonka abaishiki boona abatakabyamaga na bashaija, mubeetsigireho." 
Numbers31:19 Bwanyima muteere amahema gaanyu aheeru y'orusiisira, mumareyo ebiro mushanju; oitsire omuntu weena, n'okozire aha muntu oitsirwe weena, mweshemeze aha kiro kya kashatu n'aha kya mushanju, imwe n'enkwatwa zaanyu." 
Numbers31:20 Kandi mushemeze buri kijwaro kyona, n'ekintu kyona ekikozirwe omu mpu n'omu bwoya bw'embuzi, n'ekibaizire kyona." 
Numbers31:21 Eleazaari omunyamurwa yaagambira engabo ezitabaarukire ati: Eki nikyo kiragiro eki MUKAMA aragiire Musa; 
Numbers31:22 kwonka ezaabu, n'efeeza, n'emiringa, n'ebyoma, n'amabaati na rusasi," 
Numbers31:23 ekintu kyona ekitarikubaasa kusya, mukirabye omu muriro, kibone kushemera; kwonka kandi mukishemeze n'amaizi gari ag'okweza; kandi ekintu kyona ekirikubaasa kusya, mukirabye omuri ago maizi." 
Numbers31:24 Bwanyima aha kiro kya mushanju mwozye ebijwaro byanyu, mubone kushemera, mugarukye omu rusiisira." 
Numbers31:25 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers31:26 Iwe na Eleazaari omunyamurwa n'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'eryo ihanga mubare eminyago enyagirwe, ey'abantu n'ey'amatungo," 
Numbers31:27 mubaganise egyo minyago omu bicweka bibiri, ekimwe mukihe abarwani abagiire aha rugamba, n'ekindi mukihe eihanga ryona." 
Numbers31:28 Mwihe aha barwani abagiire omu rugamba ebi muraabacwere kuha MUKAMA, kimwe kya ikumi ahari magana ataano, eky'abantu, eky'ente, eky'endogoya, n'eky'amasho g'entaama," 
Numbers31:29 mubiihe aha mugabo gwabo, mubihe Eleazaari omunyamurwa kuba empongano ehongyeirwe MUKAMA." 
Numbers31:30 Kandi aha mugabo gw'Abaisraeli mwiheho kimwe kya makumi ataano, eky'abantu, eky'ente, eky'endogoya, n'eky'amasyo g'entaama, nigo matungo goona, mubihe Abaleevi abarikurinda Obutaaho bwa MUKAMA." 
Numbers31:31 Musa na Eleazaari omunyamurwa baakora nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa. 
Numbers31:32 Eminyago eyaatsigaire ahari byona ebi abarwani baanyagire, ekaba eri entaama obusiriira mukaaga n'obukumi mushanju n'enkumi itaano," 
Numbers31:33 n'ente obukumi mushanju n'enkumi ibiri," 
Numbers31:34 n'endogoya obukumi mukaaga na rukumi; 
Numbers31:35 kandi abaishiki boona abaabaire batakabyamaga n'abashaija bakaba bari obukumi bushatu n'enkumi ibiri. 
Numbers31:36 Ekicweka kyabyo, nigwo mugabo gw'abaagiire aha rugamba, kikaba kiri entaama obusiriira bushatu n'obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mushanju na magana ataano;" 
Numbers31:37 ahari ezo ntaama, ekicweka ekyaihirweho kuba ekya MUKAMA, zikaba ziri entaama magana mukaaga na makumi mushanju na itaano." 
Numbers31:38 Ente zikaba ziri obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mukaaga; ahari ezo ezaihirweho kuba eza MUKAMA zikaba ziri makumi mushanju na ibiri. 
Numbers31:39 Endogoya zikaba ziri obukumi bushatu na magana ataano; ahari ezo ezaihirweho kuba eza MUKAMA zikaba ziri makumi mukaaga n'emwe. 
Numbers31:40 Kandi n'abantu bakaba bari kakumi n'enkumi mukaaga; ahari abo abaihirweho kuba aba MUKAMA bakaba bari makumi ashatu na babiri. 
Numbers31:41 Musa yaaha Eleazaari omunyamurwa ebyo ebyaihirweho kuba empongano ehongyeirwe MUKAMA, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers31:42 Ekicweka kyabyo eky'Abaisraeli, eki Musa yaihire aha by'abantu abaagiire omu rugamba" 
Numbers31:43 (Kandi omugabo gw'eihanga zikaba ziri entaama obusiriira bushatu n'obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mushanju na magana ataano," 
Numbers31:44 ente obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mukaaga," 
Numbers31:45 n'endogoya obukumi bushatu na magana ataano," 
Numbers31:46 kandi n'abantu kakumi n'enkumi mukaaga.) 
Numbers31:47 ahari ogwo mugabo gw'Abaisraeli Musa yaihaho kimwe kya makumi ataano ky'abantu n'amatungo, yaabiha Abaleevi, abaabaire barinda Obutaaho bwa MUKAMA, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers31:48 Bwanyima abakuru abaabaire nibategyeka enkumi ez'omu ihe, n'abeebembezi ba rukumi-rukumi, n'aba igana-igana, baija ahari Musa, baamugira bati:" 
Numbers31:49 Itwe abairu baawe, twabara engabo ezi turikutegyeka, twashanga hataine obuzire n'omwe." 
Numbers31:50 Mbwenu tureeteire MUKAMA empongano aha bi buri muntu anyagire, ebintu by'obuguzi eby'ezaabu, emikuufu y'aha maguru, n'engoro z'aha mikono, n'empeta z'obumanyiso, n'ez'omu matu, kandi n'enkwanzi, eby'okurihiirira amagara gaitu omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Numbers31:51 Musa na Eleazaari omunyamurwa baayakiira ebyo bintu byona ebiheesirwe omu zaabu. 
Numbers31:52 Ezo zaabu zoona ez'empongano ei baahongyeire MUKAMA, ezaahongirwe abeebembezi b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, na igana-igana, zikaba ziri shekeli kakumi n'enkumi mukaaga na magana mushanju na makumi ataano." 
Numbers31:53 (Ahabw'okuba buri murwani akaba aine ebi yaayenyagiire.) 
Numbers31:54 Musa na Eleazaari omunyamurwa baayakiira ezaabu z'abo beebembezi b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, na igana-igana, baazitwara omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu kuba ekiijutsyo ky'Abaisraeli omumaisho ga MUKAMA." 
Numbers32:1 Abareubeeni n'Abagaadi bakaba baine amatungo maingi munonga; ku baareebire ensi ya Yazeri n'ensi ya Gileadi ziri ensi z'amatungo," 
Numbers32:2 Abagaadi n'Abareubeeni baija, baagambira Musa na Eleazaari omunyamurwa n'abeebembezi b'eihanga bati:" 
Numbers32:3 Ataroosi, Diboni, Yazeri, Nimura, Heshibooni, Eleale, Shebamu, Neebo na Beoni," 
Numbers32:4 ensi ei MUKAMA yaasingwire omu maisho g'Abaisraeli, n'ensi y'amatungo, kandi itwe abairu baawe tugaine." 
Numbers32:5 Baagaruka baagira bati: Ku oraabe nootugirira embabazi, itwe abairu baawe tuheebwe egi nsi ebe eyaitu, otatwambutsya Yorudani." 
Numbers32:6 Musa yaabuuza Abagaadi n'Abareubeeni ati: Beene waanyu nibaija kuhurura, imwe mugume aha?" 
Numbers32:7 Nimuhahaariza ki Abaisraeli emitima, ngu batambuka kuza omu nsi ei MUKAMA yaabahaire?" 
Numbers32:8 Okwo nikwo baashoimwe baagizire, obu naabatuma kutata egyo nsi, tukiri Kadeshi-barunea;" 
Numbers32:9 ahakuba, ku bainamukire omu ruhanga rwa Eshikooli, baareeba egyo nsi, baahahaaza Abaisraeli emitima, ngu bataza omu nsi ei MUKAMA yaabahaire." 
Numbers32:10 MUKAMA yaabagirira ekiniga ekirikwaka nk'omuriro eryo izooba, yaarahira naagira ati:" 
Numbers32:11 Buzimazima tihariho n'omwe omuri aba bashaija abaarugire Misri, abahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, orireeba ensi ei naarahiire kuha Abrahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo; ahabw'okuba tibankuratiriire kimwe," 
Numbers32:12 kureka Kalebu mwene Yefune Omukenizi, na Yoshua mwene Nuuni, ahakuba bo bankuratiriire kimwe." 
Numbers32:13 MUKAMA yaagirira Abaisraeli ekiniga, yaabazengyereza omu ihamba okumara emyaka makumi ana, okuhitsya obu ab'obusingye obwo bwona, abaakozire ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, baahweireho." 
Numbers32:14 Mbwenu reeba, naimwe mugarukire omu mwanya gwa baashoimwe, oruzaaro rw'enkozi z'ebibi, kugaruka kwongyera ekiniga kya MUKAMA, ku kiba kingi munonga aha Baisraeli." 
Numbers32:15 Ahabw'okuba ku muraamurugyeho, mwayanga kumukuratira, naija kugaruka abatsigye omuri eri ihamba; haza naimwe mureetere eihanga eri ryona kucwekyerera." 
Numbers32:16 Baamwirira haihi, baamugira bati: Nitwija kuzitirira amasyo gaitu, twombekyere abaana baitu endembo;" 
Numbers32:17 Kwonka itwe twenka nitwija kukwata eby'okurwanisa, twebembere Abaisraeli, okuhitsya obu turibahitsya omu nsi yaabo; kandi abaana baitu baryaguma omuri ezi ndembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare ahabw'okwerinda abatwire omuri egi nsi." 
Numbers32:18 Titurigaruka mu maka gaitu, buri muntu omu Baisraeli atakatungire buhunguzi bwe;" 
Numbers32:19 ahakuba tituriheebwa buhunguzi hamwe nabo seeri ya Yorudani kandi n'okweyongyerayo; ahabw'okuba obuhunguzi bwaitu tubuhairwe seenu ya Yorudani aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba. 
Numbers32:20 Musa yaabagarukamu ati: Ku murikora ekyo, mwatwara eby'okurwanisa, mwahurura mwebembeire MUKAMA," 
Numbers32:21 abashaija boona omuriimwe abaine eby'okurwanisa ku baryambuka Yorudani omu maisho ga MUKAMA, okuhitsya obu aribingira kimwe abazigu be omu maisho ge," 
Numbers32:22 ensi ekagomoorerwa MUKAMA, bwanyima muryagaruka mutaine rubanja omu maisho ga MUKAMA n'omu maisho g'Abaisraeli; kandi ensi egi eryaba eyaanyu omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Numbers32:23 Kwonka ku muriba mutakozire mutyo, muryaba mucumwire ahari MUKAMA; kandi mumanyire kimwe ngu ekibi kyanyu kiryabahindukana." 
Numbers32:24 Mbwenu mwombekyere abaana baanyu endembo, muzitirire entaama zaanyu, mukore ekyo eki mwagamba." 
Numbers32:25 Abagaadi n'Abareubeeni baagira Musa bati: Itwe abairu baawe turyakora nk'oku waaturagiira, mukama waitu." 
Numbers32:26 Abaana baitu n'abakazi baitu n'entaama zaitu, kandi n'ente zaitu zoona biryaguma omu ndembo za Gileadi;" 
Numbers32:27 kwonka itwe twena abairu baawe abaine eby'okurwanisa turyayambuka, tuhurure twebembeire MUKAMA, nk'oku waagamba, mukama waitu." 
Numbers32:28 Bwanyima ebyabo Musa yaabiragiira Eleazaari omunyamurwa na Yoshua mwene Nuuni n'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'enganda z'Abaisraeli. 
Numbers32:29 Yaabagira ati: Abagaadi n'Abareubeeni ku baryambuka Yorudani naimwe, beebembeire MUKAMA kuhurura, buri muntu aine eby'okurwanisa bye, ensi yaagomoorwa omu maisho gaanyu, bwanyima muryabaha ensi ya Gileadi ebe eyaabo." 
Numbers32:30 Kwonka ku bariba batambukire naimwe baine eby'okurwanisa, baryaheebwa naimwe obutaka omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Numbers32:31 Abagaadi n'Abareubeeni baagarukamu nibagira bati: Oku MUKAMA yaaragiira abairu baawe, nikwo turikora." 
Numbers32:32 Turyayambuka twine eby'okurwanisa, tuze omu nsi ya Kanaani twebembeire MUKAMA, obutaka bwaitu tugume nabwo seenu ya Yorudani." 
Numbers32:33 Abagaadi n'Abareubeeni n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase mwene Yosefu, Musa yaabaha obugabe bwa Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, n'obwa Ogi omugabe wa Bashani, ensi n'endembo zaayo hamwe n'ebyanga ebihereraine nazo, endembo eziri omu nsi egyo yoona." 
Numbers32:34 Abagaadi baayombeka Diboni, Ataroosi, Aroeri," 
Numbers32:35 Atiroosi-shofani, Yazeri, Yogibeha," 
Numbers32:36 Besi-nimura na Besi-harani; ezo ndembo baazeehinguririza engo z'amabaare, kandi baazitirira entaama zaabo." 
Numbers32:37 Abareubeeni baayombeka Heshibooni, Eleale, Kiryasaimu," 
Numbers32:38 Neebo, Baalimeoni (baahindura amaziina gaazo) na Sibuma; endembo ezi baayombekire baazeeta agandi maziina." 
Numbers32:39 Aba Makiri mwene Manaase baaza Gileadi, baagikwata, baabingamu Abaamori abaabaire batwiremu." 
Numbers32:40 Musa yaaha Makiri mwene Manaase Gileadi, yaagituuramu." 
Numbers32:41 Na Yairi mwene Manaase yaakwata ebirorero byayo, yaabyeta Havosi-yairi." 
Numbers32:42 Kandi na Nooba yaagyenda, yaakwata Kenaasi n'ebirorero byayo, yaagyeterera eiziina rye Nooba." 
Numbers33:1 Ezi nizo ndaariro z'Abaisraeli, obu baaruga Misri, nk'amahe gaabo oku gaabaire gari, beebembeirwe Musa na Arooni." 
Numbers33:2 Musa yaahandiika endaariro zaabo, nk'oku zaabaire nizikuratana omu ngyendo zaabo naaragiirwa MUKAMA; mbwenu ezi nizo ndaariro zaabo nk'oku baagyenzire." 
Numbers33:3 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano omu kwezi kw'okubanza bakaimutsya orugyendo, baaruga Rameseesi; Okuhingurwaho kuraire kuhweire, Abaisraeli baarugayo nibeemurika omu maisho g'Abanyamisri;" 
Numbers33:4 baatsiga banu nibakiziika emijigaijo yaabo yoona, ei MUKAMA yaabaire abaitsiremu; kandi na baaruhanga baabo MUKAMA akaba abacwereire orubanja." 
Numbers33:5 Abaisraeli baaruga Rameseesi, baasiisira Sukoosi." 
Numbers33:6 Baaruga Sukoosi, baasiisira Etamu eri aha rubaju rw'eihamba." 
Numbers33:7 Baaruga Etamu, baagaruka enyima, baaza Pihahiroosi, aharikureebana na Baali-zefooni, baasiisira omu maisho ga Migidooli." 
Numbers33:8 Baaruga ahu baabaire bari omu maisho ga Hahiroosi, baaraba omu nyanja, baahika omu ihamba; baagyenda orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu omu ihamba rya Etamu, baasiisira Maara." 
Numbers33:9 Baaruga Maara, baahika Elimu; omuri Elimu hakaba harimu enshuro z'amaizi ikumi na ibiri, n'emikindo makumi mushanju; baasiisirayo." 
Numbers33:10 Baaruga Elimu, baasiisira aha rubaju rw'Enyanja erikutukura." 
Numbers33:11 Baaruga aha Nyanja erikutukura, baasiisira omu ihamba rya Siini." 
Numbers33:12 Baaruga omu ihamba rya Siini, baasiisira Dofika." 
Numbers33:13 Baaruga Dofika, baasiisira Alushi." 
Numbers33:14 Baaruga Alushi, baasiisira Refidimu, ahu abantu baaburiire amaizi g'okunywa." 
Numbers33:15 Baaruga Refidimu, baasiisira omu ihamba rya Sinai." 
Numbers33:16 Baaruga omu ihamba rya Sinai, baasiisira Kibiroosi-hatava." 
Numbers33:17 Baaruga Kibiroosi-hatava, baasiisira Hazeroosi." 
Numbers33:18 Baaruga Hazeroosi, baasiisira Risima." 
Numbers33:19 Baaruga Risimai baasiisira Rimoni-pereezi. 
Numbers33:20 Baaruga Rimoni-pereezi, baasiisira Libuna." 
Numbers33:21 Baaruga Libuna, baasiisira Risa." 
Numbers33:22 Baaruga Risa, baasiisira Kehelaasa." 
Numbers33:23 Baaruga Kehelaasa, baasiisira omu kibungo kya Sheferi." 
Numbers33:24 Baaruga omu kibungo kya Sheferi, baasiisira Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Baaruga Harada, baasiisira Maki-heloosi." 
Numbers33:26 Baaruga Maki-heloosi, baasiisira Tahasi." 
Numbers33:27 Baaruga Tahasi, baasiisira Teera." 
Numbers33:28 Baaruga Teera, baasiisira Misika." 
Numbers33:29 Baaruga Misika, baasiisira Hashimoona." 
Numbers33:30 Baaruga Hashi-moona, baasiisira Moseroosi." 
Numbers33:31 Baaruga Moseroosi, baasiisira Bene-yakani." 
Numbers33:32 Baaruga Bene-yakani, baasiisira Hori-hagidigadi." 
Numbers33:33 Baaruga Hori-hagidigadi, baasiisira Yotibaasa." 
Numbers33:34 Baaruga Yotibaasa, baasiisira Abiroona." 
Numbers33:35 Baaruga Abiroona, baasiisira Ezioni-geberi." 
Numbers33:36 Baaruga Ezioni-geberi, baasiisira omu ihamba rya Ziini, niyo Kadeshi." 
Numbers33:37 Baaruga Kadeshi, baasiisira aha rushozi Hoori aha mwatano gw'ensi ya Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Arooni omunyamurwa yainamuka aha rushozi Hoori ahabw'ekiragiro kya MUKAMA, yaafeerayo omu mwaka gwa makumi ana Abaisraeli barugire omu nsi ya Misri, omu kwezi kwa kataano aha kiro ky'okubanza." 
Numbers33:39 Kandi Arooni akaba ahikize emyaka igana na makumi abiri n'eshatu, obu yaagwa aha rushozi Hoori." 
Numbers33:40 Omunyakanaani omugabe wa Aradi, owaabaire atwire Negebu omu nsi ya Kanaani, yaahurira ngu Abaisraeli baizire." 
Numbers33:41 Baaruga aha rushozi Hoori, baasiisira Zalumoona." 
Numbers33:42 Baaruga Zalumoona, baasiisira Punooni." 
Numbers33:43 Baaruga Punooni, baasiisira Obosi." 
Numbers33:44 Baaruga Obosi, baasiisira Iye-abariimu eri omu mwatano gwa Moabu." 
Numbers33:45 Baaruga Iyimu, baasiisira Diboni-gaadi." 
Numbers33:46 Baaruga Diboni-gaadi, baasiisira Alimoni-dibulasaimu." 
Numbers33:47 Baaruga Alimoni-dibulasaimu, baasiisira omu nshozi za Abariimu omu maisho ga Neebo." 
Numbers33:48 Baaruga omu nshozi za Abariimu, baasiisira omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudani ahashungaine na Yeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Bwanyima baasiisira haihi na Yorudani okuruga Besi-yeshimooseveni okuhika Abeeli-shitimu omu mpita za Moabu. 
Numbers33:50 MUKAMA yaagambirira Musa omu mpita za Moabu, haihi na Yorudani ahashungaine na Yeriko, ati:" 
Numbers33:51 Gambira Abaisraeli oti: Ku muryambuka Yorudani, mwahika omu nsi ya Kanaani," 
Numbers33:52 mubingye abatuuzi boona ab'omuri egyo nsi, babarugye omumaisho, mucwekyereze ebishushani byabo byona ebibaizirwe omu mabaare, n'ebishushani byabo byona ebiheesire, kandi musheenye emyanya yaabo yoona emikuru ey'okuramizamu," 
Numbers33:53 mukubuure ensi, mugituuremu; ahabw'okuba niimwe ngihaire kuba eyaanyu." 
Numbers33:54 Ensi egyo muryagihungura nimugiteerera enteenyu, nk'emiryango yaanyu oku eri; abaingi muryabaha obuhunguzi bwingi, n'abakye mubahe bukye; ahu enteenyu erikwatira omuntu, niho hariba ahakwe; muryagihungura nk'enganda za bashwenkuriimwe oku ziri." 
Numbers33:55 Kwonka ku muriba mutabingire abagitwiremu, mukabaiha omu maisho gaanyu, abumuritsigamu baryababeera ebirikucumita omu maisho, n'amahwa omu mbaju, babatuntuze omuri egyo nsi ei muriba mutwiremu." 
Numbers33:56 Kandi oku naabaire niinyenda kubagira, naimwe nikwo ndibagira." 
Numbers34:1 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers34:2 Ragiira Abaisraeli oti: Ku murihika omu nsi ya Kanaani, (niyo nsi ei muriheebwa kuba obuhunguzi, nk'emyatano yaayo oku eri)" 
Numbers34:3 ekicweka kyanyu eky'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo kiryaruga aha ihamba rya Ziini, kirabe aha rubaju rwa Edomu, kandi omwatano gwanyu ogw'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo guryatandikira aha Nyanja y'Omwonyo okwiha aha muheru gwayo aha bukiizi bw'oburugwa-izooba;" 
Numbers34:4 ogwo mwatano gwanyu gukiikame gutoore aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aharikwinamuka Akarabiimu, gwogyemu guhikye Ziini, gugarukire aha rubaju rwa Kadeshi-barunea aha bukiizi bwayo obwa-buryo; gugumizemu, guhikye Hazari-adaari, gwogyemu guhikye Azimooni." 
Numbers34:5 Bwanyima gurugye Azimooni, gukiikame, guhikye aha kagyera ka Misri, gugarukire aha Nyanja Empango." 
Numbers34:6 Omwatano gwayo ogw'aha burengyerwa-izooba guryaba Enyanja Empango n'embaju zaayo; ogwo nigwo guriba omwatano gwanyu aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba. 
Numbers34:7 N'ogu nigwo guriba omwatano gwanyu aha rubaju r'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho; okwiha aha Nyanja Empango muryataho omwatano guhikye aha rushozi Hoori. 
Numbers34:8 Okuruga aha rushozi Hoori muteho omwatano guhikye ahu orikutaahira nooza Hamasi, gugarukire Zedadi." 
Numbers34:9 Bwanyima omwatano gugumizemu guhikye Zifurooni, gugarukire Hazari-enani; ogwo gube nigwo gwaba omwatano gwanyu ogw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Numbers34:10 Kandi muryataho omwatano gwanyu aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba okuruga Hazari-enani okuhika Shefamu. 
Numbers34:11 Gurugye Shefamu, gushuume, guhikye Ribula aha rubaju rwa Aini orw'oburugwa-izooba; gugumizemu gushuume, guhikye aha rubaju rw'enyanja ya Kinereesi oburugwa-izooba;" 
Numbers34:12 gugumizemu gushuume guhikye Yorudani, gugarukire aha Nyanja y'Omwonyo; egyo niyo eriba ensi yaanyu, nk'emyatano yaayo egyehinguririize oku eri." 
Numbers34:13 Musa yaaragiira Abaisraeli ati: Egi niyo nsi ei murihungura nimugiteerera enteenyu ei MUKAMA yaaragiire kuha enganda mwenda n'ekicweka; 
Numbers34:14 ahabw'okuba oruganda rwa Reubeeni nk'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku eri, n'oruganda rwa Gaadi nk'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku eri, n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase, baherize kuheebwa obuhunguzi bwabo." 
Numbers34:15 Ezo nganda ibiri n'ekicweka ziherize kuheebwa obuhunguzi bwazo seenu ya Yorudani ahashungaine na Yeriko aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba. 
Numbers34:16 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers34:17 Aga nigo maziina g'abantu abaribabaganisiza ensi kuba obuhunguzi bwanyu; Eleazaari omunyamurwa na Yoshua mwene Nuuni. 
Numbers34:18 Kandi muryatoorana omwebembezi omwe omuri buri ruganda, babaganise ensi kuba obuhunguzi." 
Numbers34:19 Amaziina gaabo n'aga; ow'oruganda rwa Yuda, Kalebu mwene Yefune;" 
Numbers34:20 ow'oruganda rwa Simeoni, Shemueli mwene Amihuudi;" 
Numbers34:21 ow'oruganda rwa Benyamiini Elidaadi mwene Kisilooni; 
Numbers34:22 ow'oruganda rwa Daani omwebembezi Buuki mwene Yogili; 
Numbers34:23 owa beene Yosefu, ow'oruganda rwa Manaase, omwebembezi Hanieli mwene Efodi;" 
Numbers34:24 ow'oruganda rwa Efuraimu omwebembezi Kemueli mwene Shifitaani; 
Numbers34:25 ow'oruganda rwa Zebuluuni omwebembezi Elizafaani mwene Parinaaki; 
Numbers34:26 ow'oruganda rwa Isakaari omwebembezi Palitieli mwene Azaani; 
Numbers34:27 ow'oruganda rwa Asheri omwebembezi Ahihuudi mwene Shelomi; 
Numbers34:28 ow'oruganda rwa Nafutaali omwebembezi Pedaheli mwene Amihuudi. 
Numbers34:29 Abo nibo MUKAMA yaaragiire kubaganisiza Abaisraeli obuhunguzi bwabo omu nsi ya Kanaani. 
Numbers35:1 MUKAMA yaagambirira Musa omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudani ahashungaine na Yeriko, ati:" 
Numbers35:2 Ragiira Abaisraeli bahe Abaleevi endembo z'okutuuramu, nibaziiha aha nsi yaabo ei bahungwire; kandi mubahe amariisizo ageehinguririize ezo ndembo." 
Numbers35:3 Ezo ndembo zibe ezaabo z'okutuuramu, n'amariisizo gabe ag'ente zaabo n'ebintu byabo, n'amatungo gaabo goona." 
Numbers35:4 Amariisizo ag'aha ndembo agu muriha Abaleevi, gatandikire aha ngo z'endembo, gahitsye entambwe magana ataano embaju zoona." 
Numbers35:5 Aheeru y'orurembo aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba mugyere entambwe rukumi, aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo entambwe rukumi, aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba entambwe rukumi, kandi n'aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho entambwe rukumi, orurembo rugume ahagati. Ago gabe nigo gaaba mariisizo g'aha ndembo zaabo." 
Numbers35:6 Endembo ezi muriha Abaleevi zibe endembo mukaaga ez'okuhungiramu, oriita omuntu weena azihungiremu; kandi ahari ezo mukaaga mwongyereho ezindi makumi ana na ibiri." 
Numbers35:7 Endembo zoona ezi muriha Abaleevi zibe makumi ana na munaana; muzibahe hamwe n'amariisizo gaazo. 
Numbers35:8 Endembo ezi muriiha aha butaka bw'Abaisraeli kuha Abaleevi, abaingi muryabaihaho nyingi, n'abakye mubaiheho nkye. Buri ruganda nk'obuhunguzi bwarwo oku buri, nikwo ruribaha aha ndembo zaarwo." 
Numbers35:9 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers35:10 Gambira Abaisraeli oti: Ku muryambuka Yorudani, mwahika omu nsi ya Kanaani," 
Numbers35:11 muryayetooranira endembo zibe ezaanyu z'okuhungiramu, oitsire omuntu weena, atamwitsire nkana, ahungiremu." 
Numbers35:12 Ezo ndembo ziryababeera obuhungiro bw'okukiriramu omuhoozi w'enzigu, oriba aitsire omuntu arekye kufa, atakeemereire mu maisho g'omutwe gw'abakuru kucwerwa orubanja." 
Numbers35:13 Kandi ezo ndembo ezi muriha, nizo ziriba endembo zaanyu mukaaga ez'okuhungiramu." 
Numbers35:14 Muryaha endembo ishatu seenu ya Yorudani, n'ezindi ishatu omu nsi ya Kanaani, zibe endembo z'okuhungiramu." 
Numbers35:15 Ezo ndembo zoona mukaaga ziryaba obuhungiro bw'Abaisraeli n'obw'abanyamahanga n'obw'abariba babashuhuukiiremu, oriita omuntu weena, atamwitsire nkana, ahungiremu." 
Numbers35:16 Kwonka ku arimuteeza ekyoma, yaafa, biri n'omwitsi; kandi omwitsi ataribura kwitwa." 
Numbers35:17 Nari ku arimuteera eibaare, eri aine omu ngaro, eririkubaasa kwita omuntu, yaafa, biri n'omwitsi; kandi omwitsi ataribura kwitwa." 
Numbers35:18 Nari shi, ku arimuteeza ekiti kibaizire eki akwaitse omu ngaro, ekirikubaasa kwita omuntu, yaafa, biri n'omwitsi; kandi omwitsi ataribura kwitwa." 
Numbers35:19 Orikuhoorera nyakufa niwe ariyeitira oitsire omuntu; ku arimureeba, amwite." 
Numbers35:20 Kandi oitsire omuntu, ku ariba amucumitsire ahabw'okumwanga, nari aine eki yaamurekyeire, akamuteera amugwereire, akafa," 
Numbers35:21 nari shi amuteire entomi ahabw'okumwanga, yaagwa ahansi, yaafa, owaamuteire ataribura kwitwa; biri n'omwitsi; orikuhoorera nyakufa aite ogwo mwitsi, ku arimureeba." 
Numbers35:22 Kwonka ku arihikiirirwa, yaacumita omuntu atamwineho rwango, nari yaagira eki yaamuteera, atamugwereire;" 
Numbers35:23 nari shi ku arimuteera eibaare eririkubaasa kwita omuntu atamureebire, yaarimuteera, yaafa, kandi ashangirwe atari muzigu we, kandi atarikwenda kumukora kubi," 
Numbers35:24 obwo omutwe gw'abakuru guryacwera omwitsi n'orikuhoorera eshagama orubanja, nk'ebiragiro ebyo oku biri;" 
Numbers35:25 abo bakuru bakize oitsire omuntu orikumuhoorera nyakufa, bamugarure omu rurembo rw'obuhungiro, oru abaire ahungiiremu, arugumemu okuhitsya obu omunyamurwa omukuru, owaashukirweho amajuta g'okushoroora, arifa." 
Numbers35:26 Kwonka ogwo muntu oitsire ondiijo ku arirenga omwatano gw'orurembo rw'obuhungiro, oru ahungiiremu," 
Numbers35:27 orikuhoorera eshagama yaamushanga aheeru y'orwo rurembo rw'obuhungiro, yaamwita, tarigiibwaho rubanja rw'eshagama ye;" 
Numbers35:28 ahakuba ogwo akaabaire agumire omu rurembo rw'obuhungiro bwe, okuhitsya ahu omunyamurwa omukuru arifeera; kwonka omunyamurwa omukuru ku ariheza kufa, ogwo oitsire omuntu agarukye omu butaka bwe." 
Numbers35:29 Ebyo bigume bibabeere ebiragiro n'emitwarize ebitairweho omu busingye bwanyu bwona n'omu maka gaanyu goona. 
Numbers35:30 Oriita omuntu weena aryaitwa ahabwa baamushinja, kwonka atariitwa ahabwa mushinja omwe." 
Numbers35:31 Kandi mutaryakiira eky'okucungura oitsire omuntu, oshemereire kwitwa; kureka omuntu ogwo buzimazima aryaitwa." 
Numbers35:32 Kandi mutariikiriza ekarabo y'omuntu ohungiire omu rurembo rw'obuhungiro, ngu agarukye kutuura omu nsi, omunyamurwa omukuru atakafiire." 
Numbers35:33 Ku muritwaza mutyo, timurishiisha nsi ei murituuramu; ahabw'okuba eshagama niyo eshiisha ensi, kandi tihariho ky'okurihiirira ensi, ahabw'eshagama eyaagisheeshekireho, kureka eshagama y'ogwo owaagijwisize." 
Numbers35:34 Mutarishiisha ensi ei mutwiremu, ei ntuuramu ahagati; ahabw'okuba nyowe MUKAMA ntuura ahagati y'Abaisraeli." 
Numbers36:1 Abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo ag'emiryango ya beene Gileadi mwene Makiri, mwene Manaase, ab'omu miryango ya beene Yosefu, bairira haihi, baagambira omu maisho ga Musa n'abeebembezi n'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'Abaisraeli," 
Numbers36:2 nibagira bati: MUKAMA akakuragiira, iwe mukama waitu, kubaganisa ensi n'enteenyu noogiha Abaisraeli kuba obuhunguzi; kandi, mukama waitu, okaragiirwa MUKAMA kuha bahara ba Zelofehaadi mwene waitu obuhunguzi bwe." 
Numbers36:3 Kwonka ku barishwerwa abuntu b'omu nganda ezindi ez'Abaisraeli, obuhunguzi bwabo buryaihwa aha buhunguzi bwa baatatenkuriitwe, bwongyerwe aha buhunguzi bw'enganda ezi barishwerwamu; n'ahabw'ekyo buryaba bwihirwe aha mugabo gw'obuhunguzi bwaitu." 
Numbers36:4 Kandi omwaka gwa jubili y'Abaisraeli ku gurihika, obuhunguzi buryayongyerwa aha buhunguzi bw'oruganda oru baashweirwemu; n'ahabw'ekyo obuhunguzi bwabo buryaihirwa kimwe aha buhunguzi bw'oruganda rwa baatatenkuriitwe." 
Numbers36:5 Musa yaaragiira Abaisraeli nk'ekigambo kya MUKAMA oku kyabaire kiri, naagira ati: Ebi oruganda rwa beene Yosefu rurikufa n'eby'amazima." 
Numbers36:6 Eki nikyo MUKAMA arikuragiira aha bya bahara ba Zelofehaadi, ati: Mubarekye bagume bashwerwe abu barisiima; kwonka bashwerwe omu muryango gw'oruganda rwa baishenkurubo." 
Numbers36:7 Hatarigira obuhunguzi bw'Abaisraeli obwaruga omu ruganda bukaza omurundi; kureka buri muntu omu Baisraeli agume omu buhunguzi bw'oruganda rwa baishenkuru. 
Numbers36:8 Kandi omwishiki weena, oriheebwa obuhunguzi omu ruganda rw'Abaisraeli, ashwerwe ow'omu muryango gw'oruganda rwa baishenkuru, buri muntu ow'omu Baisraeli abone kuheebwa obuhunguzi bwa baishenkuru." 
Numbers36:9 N'ahabw'ekyo tiharibaho buhunguzi obwaruga omu ruganda bukaza omu rundi; ahakuba buri ruganda omu nganda z'Abaisraeli ruryagumya obuhunguzi bwarwo. 
Numbers36:10 Bwanyima bahara ba Zelofehaadi baakora, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiira Musa;" 
Numbers36:11 ahakuba Maala, Tiruza, Hogula, Milika na Noa, bahara ba Zelofehaadi, bakashwerwa batabani ba baishentobo." 
Numbers36:12 Baashwerwa ab'omu miryango ya beene Manaase, mwene Yosefu; obuhunguzi bwabo bwaguma omu ruganda rw'omuryango gwa ishebo." 
Numbers36:13 Ebyo nibyo biragiro n'emitwarize ebyatairweho, ebi MUKAMA yaaragiire Abaisraeli naaraba omuri Musa, bari omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudani, ahashungaine na Yeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Ebi nibyo bigambo ebi Musa yaagambiire Abaisraeli boona bari seeri ya Yorudani omu ihamba rya Araba ahashungaine na Suufu ahagati ya Parani, Tofeli, Labani, Hazeroosi na Dizahaabu." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Okuruga Horebu okuhika Kadeshi-barunea, orabire aha rushozi Seiri, n'orugyendo rw'ebiro ikumi na kimwe." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ana omu kwezi kwa ikumi na kumwe, aha kiro kyakwo ky'okubanza, Musa akagambira Abaisraeli ebi MUKAMA yaamuragiire kubagambira byona, nk'oku byabaire biri;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 yaabimugambira aherize kusingura Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, owaabaire atwire Heshibooni, na Ogi omugabe wa Bashani owaabaire atwire Ashitaroosi omuri Edurei;" 
Deuteronomy1:5 Musa yaatandika kushoboorora ebiragiro ebyo, ari omu nsi ya Moabu seeri ya Yorudani, naagira ati:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu akatugambirira Horebu, naagira ati: Omwanya ogu mumazire ahari oru rushozi ni muhango munonga;" 
Deuteronomy1:7 muhindukye, mwimutsye orugyendo, muze omu nsi y'ebibungo ey'Abaamori n'ahandi hoona ahahereraine naho, omuri Araba, n'omu nsi y'ebibungo, n'omu mpita, na Negebu n'omu mpita z'aha rubaju rw'Enyanja Empango, omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani, n'aha rushozi Lebanooni, muhikye n'aha mugyera muhango Furaati." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Reeba, egyo nsi ngitaire omu maisho gaanyu; mugizemu, mukubuure egyo nsi ei MUKAMA yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe, Abarahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo, na baijukuru baabo abarikurataho." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Naanye obwo nkabagira nti: Tindikubaasa kubaheeka nyenka; 
Deuteronomy1:10 MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu abakanyiise; reeba hati muri baingi nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru. 
Deuteronomy1:11 MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe abakanyise emirundi rukumi okukira oku muri, kandi abahe omugisha, nk'oku yaabaraganiise." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Nimbaasa nta kwemera oburemeezi bwanyu n'empaka zaanyu ebirikumpenda? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Mutoorane abanyabwengye, abarikwetegyereza kandi abarikumanywa, nk'enganda zaanyu oku ziri, mbateho kuba abeebembezi baanyu." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Mwangarukamu muti: Ebi waagamba ni birungi itwe kubikora. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Naanye nikwo kutwara abakuru b'enganda zaanyu, abanyabwengye kandi abarikumanywa, nkabahindura abeebembezi baanyu, abamwe kutegyeka buri omwe rukumi, abandi igana, abandi ataano n'abandi ikumi, kandi n'abakuru b'engabo, nk'oku enganda zaanyu ziri." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Kandi obwo nkeehanangiriza abaramuzi baanyu, ningira nti: Mugume muhurire ebi beene waanyu barikufa, mucwere omuntu na mwene ishe n'omunyaihanga otwire nawe emanja z'oburyo." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Omu kucwa emanja kwanyu mutarishoroora omu bantu; muhurire abataine kitiinisa n'abakiine nimubainganisa; mutaritiina amaisho g'omuntu, ahabw'okuba okucwa orubanja n'okwa Ruhanga; kandi emanja eziribarema, mugume muzindeetere, naanye ndyazihurira." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Kandi omu bunaku obwo nkabaragiira byona ebi mushemereire kukora. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Bwanyima twaruga Horebu, twaraba omuri eryo ihamba ryona erihango eririkutiinisa, eri mwareebire nimuza omu nsi y'ebibungo y'Abaamori, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaaturagiire; twahika Kadeshi-barunea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ku twahikireyo, naabagira nti: Mwaija omu nsi y'ebibungo ey'Abaamori, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu arikutuha." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Reeba, MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ataire egyo nsi omu maisho gaanyu; mwinamukye, mugikubuure, nka MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe oku yaabagambiire; mutatiina, n'obu kwakuba okuhahaaza omutima." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Bwanyima mwena mwanyirira haihi, mwagira muti: Ka tutume abantu batubandizeyo, batutatire ensi, bagarukye batugambire omuhanda ogu turaatoore nitwinamuka, n'endembo ezi turaahikyemu." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ekigambo ekyo kyangwisa gye munonga, naabaihamu abantu ikumi na babiri, omwe omuri buri ruganda." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Baahinduka, bainamuka omu nsi y'ebibungo, baahika omu ruhanga rwa Eshikooli, baarutata." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Baiha aha bijuma by'egyo nsi, baabitureetera omu ngaro zaabo, kandi baatureetera n'enkuru nungi nibagira bati: Ensi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu arikutuha ni nungi." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Kwonka imwe mwayanga kwinamuka, mwagomera ekiragiro kya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu;" 
Deuteronomy1:27 mwayetomboitera omu mahema gaanyu nimugira muti: Ruhanga ahabw'okutwanga akatwiha omu nsi ya Misri okutuhayo omu mikono y'Abaamori kutucwekyereza. 
Deuteronomy1:28 Nitwinamuka hi? Beene waitu batumazire omutima omunda nibagira bati: Abo bantu ni bahango kandi ni baraingwa nibatukira; endembo zaabo ni mpango, kandi zeehinguririziibwe engo ezizitiire okuhika ahaiguru munonga; kandi tureebireyo beene Anaki." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Naanye nikwo kubagumya nimbagira nti: Mutagira obwoba, kandi mutabatiina." 
Deuteronomy1:30 MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu orikubeebembera niwe araabarwanirire, nk'ebi yaabakoreire omuri Misri byona nimureeba, oku byabaire biri," 
Deuteronomy1:31 kandi n'omu ihamba ahu mwareebeire oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaabaheekire, omu muhanda gwona ogu mwarabiremu okuhika aha, nk'oku omuntu aheeka omwana we." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kwonka n'obu ndaabe naabagambiire ekyo, timuraikiriize MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 owaabeebembeire omu muhanda kubasherurira omwanya gw'okuteeramu amahema gaanyu, ari omu muriro nyekiro n'omu kicu nyomushana, kubahabura omuhanda ogu muraatooremu." 
Deuteronomy1:34 MUKAMA yaahurira ebigambo byanyu, yaagira ekiniga, yaarahira ati:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 Buzimazima tihariho n'omwe omuri aba bantu ab'obusingye obu obubi orireeba egyo nsi nungi ei naarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe," 
Deuteronomy1:36 kureka Kalebu mwene Yefune niwe arigireeba; kandi ensi ei yaaribatsiremu ndyagimuha n'abaana be, ahabw'okuba kakuratirira kimwe MUKAMA." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Kandi naanye MUKAMA akangwerwa kubi ahabwanyu, yaagira ati: Naiwe torigihikamu." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Kwonka Yoshua mwene Nuuni, omuheereza waawe niwe aritaahamu; omugumye, ahakuba niwe arihunguza Abaisraeli egyo nsi." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Kandi abaana baanyu abato abu mwagizire ngu baryaba eminyago, n'abaana baanyu abatakamanyire kirungi nari kibi, nibo barigitaahamu, kandi nibo ndigiha bakagikubuura." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Kwonka imwe muhindukye mugarukye omu ihamba, mutoore omuhanda ogurikuza aha Nyanja erikutukura." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Bwanyima mwangarukamu nimugira muti: Tucumwire ahari MUKAMA; nitwija kwinamuka, turwane nk'ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaaturagiire byona oku biri. Buri omuntu weena omuriimwe yaahagatira eby'okurwanisa bye, mwateekateeka ngu nikirahuka kwinamuka omu nsi y'ebibungo." 
Deuteronomy1:42 MUKAMA yangira ati: Obangirire oti: Mutainamuka, kandi mutarwana; ahakuba tindi muriimwe, mutakaitwa bazigu baanyu." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ntyo naabibagambira, kwonka timwabihurira, mwagomera ekiragiro kya MUKAMA, mwainamuka n'ekigaazo omuri egyo nsi y'ebibungo." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Abaamori abaabaire bagitwiremu baija kubarwanisa, baababinga nk'enjoki, baabaitira Seiri, baabahitsya Horuma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Mwagaruka, mwarira omu maisho ga MUKAMA; kwonka MUKAMA tiyaabeetaho n'obu kwakuba okubatega okutu." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Mutyo mwamara ebiro bingi muri Kadeshi, nk'ebiro ebi mwamazireyo oku byabaire nibiingana." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Bwanyima twahinduka, twaimutsya orugyendo nituza omu ihamba, twatoora omuhanda ogurikuza aha Nyanja erikutukura, nk'oku MUKAMA yandagiire; twamara ebiro bingi nitwehinguririza orushozi Seiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 MUKAMA yangira ati: 
Deuteronomy2:3 Omwanya ogu mumazire nimwehinguririza oru rushozi ni muhango munonga; mukiikame mutoore aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Kandi oragiire abantu oti: Mwaza kuraba omu nsi ya beene waanyu aba Esau, abatwire Seiri; bo baryabatiina; n'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde munonga," 
Deuteronomy2:5 mutaribarwanisa; ahakuba tindibaha ha nsi yaabo, n'obu haakuba ah'okuribata ekigyere; ahabw'okuba nkaha Esau orushozi Seiri kuba orwe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Muryaguma mubashakyemu eby'okurya, mubone kurya, kandi mugure nabo amaizi, mubone kunywa." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akakuha omugisha omu mirimo yoona ey'emikono yaawe, yaamanya engyendo zaawe ez'omuri eri ihamba rihango; kandi emyaka egi yoona makumi ana MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe agumire naiwe, otaine ki obuzire." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Tutyo twagumizamu, twayetantara beene waitu aba Esau, abatwire Seiri, twayetantara n'omuhanda ogurikuraba Araba niguruga Elaasi na Ezionigeberi; twakuba, twatoora omuhanda ogurikuza omu ihamba rya Moabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 MUKAMA yangira ati: Mutarahura Abamoabu, mukabarwanisa; ahakuba tindibaha buhunguzi mu nsi yaabo, ahabw'okuba nkaha aba Looti ensi ya Aari kuba eyaabo." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Obunyakare aba Emimu bakaba batwireyo, n'eihanga ry'amaani ery'abantu baingi kandi baraingwa nk'aba Anaki," 
Deuteronomy2:11 kandi bakaba nibeetwa aba Reefa nk'aba Anaki; kwonka Abamoabu bakabeeta aba Emimu. 
Deuteronomy2:12 Kandi obunyakare Abahoori nabo bakaba batwire Seiri, baabanyaga, baabaita, baatuura omu nsi yaabo, nk'Abaisraeli oku baakubwire ensi yaabo ei MUKAMA yaabahaire.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 MUKAMA yaagaruka yaagira ati: Mbwenu mwimukye, mwambukye akagyera Zeredi. Ako kagyera Zeredi twakambuka." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Emyaka ei twamazire okwiha obu twaruga Kadeshi-barunea okuhitsya obu twayambukire ako kagyera Zeredi, ekahika makumi ashatu na munaana; okuhitsya obu abarwani boona ab'obusingye obwo baahwereire kimwe omu nsiisira zaitu, nk'oku MUKAMA yaabagambiire naarahira." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Buzimazima omukono gwa MUKAMA gukabarwanisa okubahwerekyerereza omu nsiisira zaitu, okuhitsya obu baahweireho." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Bwanyima abarwani boona ku baaherize kufa, baahwa omu bantu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 MUKAMA yangira ati: 
Deuteronomy2:18 Eri izooba nimwija kuraba omuri Aari, mucwekanise omwatano gwa Moabu;" 
Deuteronomy2:19 kandi ku oraahikye haihi n'Abaamoni, otabarahura, n'obu kwakuba okubarwanisa; ahakuba tindikuha buhunguzi omu nsi y'Abaamoni, ahabw'okuba nkagiha aba Looti kuba eyaabo. (" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Ensi egyo nayo neeyetwa ey'aba Reefa; obunyakare aba Reefa bakaba bagitwiremu; kwonka Abaamoni hati nibabeeta Abazamuzumi; 
Deuteronomy2:21 rikaba riri eihanga ry'amaani, ery'abantu baingi kandi baraingwa nk'aba Anaki; kwonka MUKAMA akabacwekyerereza omu maisho g'Abaamoni, baabanyaga, baatuura omu nsi yaabo," 
Deuteronomy2:22 nk'oku yaagiriire aba Esau, abatwire Seiri, obu yaacwekyerereza aba Hoori omu maisho gaabo, bakabanyaga, bakatuura omu nsi yaabo n'okuhitsya hati." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Kandi n'aba Avimu, abaabaire batwire omu birorero okuhika Gaaza, aba Kafutoori, abaarugire Kafutoori, bakabacwekyereza, baatuura omu nsi yaabo.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 MUKAMA yaagaruka yangira ati: Mwimukye mugyende, mwambukye oruhanga rwa Arunooni; reeba naahayo Sihooni Omuamori, omugabe wa Heshibooni, n'ensi ye omu mikono yaawe; otandikye kumurwanisa n'okukubuura ensi ye." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Eri izooba niinyija kwitsa amahanga agari ahansi y'eiguru obwoba n'okugatiinisa ahabwawe; nibaija kuhurira okurangaanwa kwawe, bateteme, bagire amaganya maingi ahabwawe." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ku twabaire tukiri omu ihamba rya Kedemoosi, naatuma entumwa ahari Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni ebigambo by'obusingye, ningira nti:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 Onyikirize, ndabe omu nsi yaawe; niinyija kutoora omuhanda rugyendwa, tindikwija kukiikama aha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho."
