Deuteronomy2:28 Eby'okurya oryabinguza nkuhe empiiha, mbone kurya; n'amaizi oganguze nkuhe empiiha, mbone kunywa; kwonka ondekye, ndabemu n'ebigyere," 
Deuteronomy2:29 nk'aba Esau abatwire Seiri, n'Abamoabu abatwire Aari, oku bangiriire, okuhitsya obu ndyambuka Yorudani, nkahika omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu arikutuha." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Kwonka Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni yaayanga kutureka kuraba omu nsi ye, ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akamugangaaza omutima, yaamutizya, ngu abone kumuhayo omu mukono gwawe, nk'oku kiri na hati." 
Deuteronomy2:31 MUKAMA yangira ati: Reeba, naatandika kuhayo Sihooni n'ensi ye omumaisho gaawe; naiwe otandikye kugikubuura, obone kugihungura." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Bwanyima Sihooni yaija n'engabo ze zoona kuturwanisiza ahari Yahazi. 
Deuteronomy2:33 MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaamuhayo omu maisho gaitu, twamwita n'abatabani n'abantu be boona." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Omu bunaku obwo twakwata endembo ze zoona, twazicwekyerereza kimwe, abashaija, n'abakazi n'abaana; titwatsigamu na wa kizira." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Kureka amatungo gonka nigo twayenyagiire hamwe n'ebi twanyagire omu ndembo ezi twakwatsire. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Okuruga Aroeri eri aha rubaju rw'oruhanga rwa Arunooni, n'okuruga aha rurembo oruri omuri orwo ruhanga, okuhika Gileadi, tihaagira rurembo rwaturema ahabw'oburaingwa bwarwo. MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaazihayo zoona omu maisho gaitu." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kwonka tiwaahika haihi n'ensi y'Abaamoni, n'obu haakuba aha nkungu z'omugyera Yaboki, nari endembo z'omu nsi y'ebibungo, n'ahandi hoona ahu MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaatuzibiire." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Bwanyima twakuba, twatoora omuhanda ogurikwinamuka Bashani; Ogi omugabe wa Bashani yaija n'engabo ze zoona kuturwanisiza omuri Edurei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 MUKAMA yangira ati: Otamutiina; ahakuba naamuhayo n'abantu be boona n'ensi ye omu mukono gwawe; omugire nk'oku waagizire Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori owaabaire atwire Heshibooni. 
Deuteronomy3:3 Atyo MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaahayo na Ogi omugabe wa Bashani n'abantu be boona omu mikono yaitu; twabaita, tiyaahonoraho n'omwe." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Omu bunaku obwo twakwata endembo ze zoona; tihaatsigaraho rurembo na rumwe oru tutarabanyagire – endembo makumi mukaaga, ekyaro kyona ekya Arugoobi, obugabe bwa Ogi omuri Bashani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Ezo zoona zikaba ziri endembo ezizitiire n'engo ndaingwa, ziine amarembo g'enyigi ezirikukingwa empimbi, otabariireho birorero bingi munonga ebitaine ngo." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Twazicwekyerereza kimwe, nk'oku twagizire Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni, nitucwekyereza buri rurembo, abashaija n'abakazi n'abaana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Kwonka amatungo goona, n'ebi twanyagire omu rurembo, twabyetwarira kuba eminyago." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Tutyo omuri obwo bunaku twakubuura ensi z'abo bagabe b'Abaamori bombi, abaabaire batwire seenu ya Yorudani, okwiha aha ruhanga rwa Arunooni, okuhika aha rushozi Herumooni;" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (orwo rushozi Herumooni Abasidoni bakaba barweta Sirioni, n'Abaamori barweta Seniiri;)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 kandi twakwata endembo zoona ez'omu ruhita, na Gileadi yoona, na Bashani yoona okuhika Saleka n'omuri Edurei, endembo z'omu bugabe bwa Ogi omuri Bashani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ahabw'okuba Ogi omugabe wa Bashani niwe wenka owaabaire akiriho omu ba Reefa abaatsigaireho; ekitanda kye kikaba kiri ky'ebyoma; tikiri omuri Rabba ey'Abaamoni? Oburaingwa bwakyo bukaba buri mikono mwenda, n'obuhango bwakyo mikono ena, nk'orugyero rw'abantu orwa mukono gumwe oku ruri.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Ku twakubwire egyo nsi omu bunaku obwo, naaha aba Reubeeni n'aba Gaadi ekyanga ekirikutandikira Aroeri eri aha rubaju rw'oruhanga rwa Arunooni n'ekicweka ky'ensi y'ebibungo ya Gileadi n'endembo zaamwo." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ekicweka kya Gileadi ekyatsigaireho na Bashani yoona, obugabe bwa Ogi, naabiha ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase, ekyanga kyona kya Arugoobi, niyo Bashani yoona. (Egyo nsi ekaba neeyetwa ensi y'aba Reefa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yairi mwene Manaase yaatwara ekyaro kyona ekya Arugoobi, niyo Bashani, okuhika aha mwatano gw'aba Geshuri n'aba Maakasi, yaakyeyeterera, kyayetwa Havosi-yairi n'okuhitsya hati.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Kandi naaha Makiri Gileadi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Aba Reubeeni n'aba Gaadi naabaha okuruga ahari Gileadi okuhika aha ruhanga rwa Arunooni, omwatano gwayo gwaraba ahagati y'orwo ruhanga, gwahika aha mugyera Yaboki, ogurikubaatanisa n'Abaamoni;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 kandi naabaha Araba, omwatano gwayo gwaba Yorudani, okuruga Kinereesi okuhika aha nyanja ya Araba, niyo Nyanja y'Omwonyo, ahansi y'orushozi Pisiga aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Omu bunaku obwo nkabaragiira, ningira nti: MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu abahaire ensi egi kugikubuura; abashaija baanyu amamanzi baryayambuka bakwaitse eby'okurwanisa beebembeire beene waanyu Abaisraeli." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Kwonka abakazi baanyu n'abaana baanyu n'amatungo gaanyu, – (nimmanya ku mwine amatungo maingi) biryaguma omu ndembo zaanyu, ezi naabahaire," 
Deuteronomy3:20 okuhitsya obu MUKAMA ariha beene waanyu okuhuumura, nk'oku yaakubahaire, nabo bakakubuura ensi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha seeri ya Yorudani; bwanyima muryagaruka buri muntu omu butaka bwe obu mbahaire." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Omu bunaku obwo nkaragiira Yoshua ningira nti: Amaisho gaawe geereebeire byona ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu akozire abo bagabe bombi; kandi nikwo MUKAMA arigira obugabe bwona omu nsi ei murikwambukamu. 
Deuteronomy3:22 Mutaribatiina; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu niwe abarwanirira. 
Deuteronomy3:23 Omu bunaku obwo nkeeshengyereza MUKAMA ningira nti: 
Deuteronomy3:24 Ai Mukama RUHANGA, otandikire kworeka omwiru waawe obukuru bwawe n'omukono gwawe ogw'amaani; ahakuba ni ruhanga ki omu iguru nari aha nsi, orikubaasa kukora emirimo nk'eyaawe, kandi n'eby'amaani ebi waakozire oku biri?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Ninkweshengyereza onyikirize nyambukye, ndeebe ensi egyo enungi eri seeri ya Yorudani, n'ebyo bibungo birungi na Lebanooni." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Kwonka MUKAMA yangwerwa kubi ahabwanyu, tiyaanyikiriza; yangira ati: Rekyera aho, otagaruka kungambira ahari ekyo kigambo." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Inamuka oze aha mutwe gwa Pisiga, onagye amaisho oburengyerwa-izooba, n'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'aha bwa buryo, n'oburugwa-izooba, oreebe n'amaisho gaawe; ahakuba toryambuka Yorudani egi." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kwonka oyehanangirize Yoshua, omwezirikise, omugumye; ahabw'okuba niwe aryambuka ayebembeire aba bantu, akabahunguza ensi ei oraareebe." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Tutyo twaguma omu ruhanga orushungaine na Besi-peori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Mbwenu, Baisraeli 'mwe, muhurire ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi ndikubeegyesa, mubyorobere, mubone kugumaho n'okutaaha omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe arikubaha, mugikubuure." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Mutaryongyera aha kigambo eki ndikubaragiira, kandi mutarikicwaho, mubone kukwata ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ebi ndikubaragiira." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Amaisho gaanyu gakeereebera ebi MUKAMA yaakozire ahabw'ebya Baali-peori; ahabw'okuba abashaija boona, abaakuratiire Baali-peori, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akabacwekyereza, yaabamara omuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Kwonka imwe, abahamiire ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, mukiriho mwena n'eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Reeba, naabeegyesa ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye yandagiire, ngu mube nikwo mwatwaza omu nsi ei murikuza kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy4:6 N'ahabw'ekyo mugume mubikwate, mubyorobere; obwo nibwo bwengye bwanyu n'okwetegyereza kwanyu omu maisho g'amahanga agarihurira ebyo biragiro byona, gakagira gati: N'ekya buzima eri ihanga rikuru n'eihanga ry'abantu b'obwengye kandi abarikwetegyereza." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Ni ihanga ki erikuru eriine ruhanga oriri haihi nka MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu oku atuba haihi, twamutakira?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Kandi ni ihanga ki erikuru eriine ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe ebihikire nk'Ebiragiro ebi byona ebi naata omu maisho gaanyu eri izooba? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Kwonka oyerinde, oteho omutima orinde amagara gaawe, orekye kwebwa ebi amaisho gaawe gaareebire, bitarikuruga aha mutima ebiro byona ebi oriba okiriho; kureka obimanyise abaana baawe na baijukuru baawe." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Ogume oijukye eizooba eri waayemerereireho omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ahari Horebu, obu MUKAMA yangira ati: Nteeranira abantu, mbagambire ebigambo byangye, babone kwega kuntiina ebiro byona ebi barimara omu nsi, kandi beegyese n'abaana baabo." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Naimwe mwairira haihi, mwayemerera ahansi y'orushozi; orwo rushozi rwayaka omuriro, gwahika ahagati y'eiguru, rwashwekwa omwirima, n'ekicu, kandi omwirima ndindindi." 
Deuteronomy4:12 MUKAMA yaabagambira naayema omu muriro; mwahurira ebyagambwa, kwonka timwagira ki mwareeba, kureka eiraka ryonka." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Yaabagambira endagaano ye, ei yaabaragiire kuhitsya, nibyo biragiro ikumi; yaabihandiika aha bishate bibiri by'amabaare." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Omu bunaku obwo MUKAMA yandagiira kubeegyesa ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe ngu mubone kubyoroberera omu nsi ei murikuza kukubuura. 
Deuteronomy4:15 N'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde munonga. Nk'oku mutarareebire kishushani kyona ekya MUKAMA, obu yaabagambirira omu muriro ahari Horebu," 
Deuteronomy4:16 mwerinde mutakaashiisha, mukeekorera ekishushani ekirikushusha ekintu kyona, ekishushani ky'ekishaija nari eky'ekikazi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 ekishushani ky'enyamaishwa yoona eri omu nsi, nari eky'ekintu kyona ekiine amapapa ekirikuguruka omu mwanya," 
Deuteronomy4:18 ekishushani ky'ekintu kyona ekirikugyendesa enda ahansi nari eky'eky'enyanja kyona ekiri omu maizi okuzimu. 
Deuteronomy4:19 Kandi mwerinde, mutakaimutsya amaisho ahaiguru, mukireeba eizooba n'okwezi n'enyonyoozi, nigo mahe goona ag'omu iguru, mukabeihwabeihwa, mukabiramya, mukabiheereza, haza biri ebintu ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaahaire amahanga goona agari ahansi y'eiguru." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ahabw'okuba imwe nimumanya ku MUKAMA yaabakwatsire, akabashahura omu iziiko ry'ebyoma eririkubugumwamu omuriro, niyo Misri, kuba abantu be buzima, nk'oku muri na hati." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Kandi MUKAMA akangwerwa kubi ahabwanyu, yaarahira ku ntaryambuka Yorudani kuza omu nsi egyo enungi, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuba obuhunguzi." 
Deuteronomy4:22 N'ahabw'ekyo nshemereire kufeera omu nsi egi; tinshemereire kwambuka Yorudani; kwonka imwe muryayambuka, mukubuure ensi egyo nungi." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Mwerinde, mutaryebwa endagaano ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, ei yaaragaine naimwe, mukeekorera ekishushani ekibaizire, ekirikushusha ekintu kyona, MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu eki yaabazibiire;" 
Deuteronomy4:24 ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu n'omuriro ogurikurya busha, Ruhanga ow'eihato." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Ku murizaara abaana, nabo baazaara abandi, mwamara omwanya muhango mutwire omu nsi egyo, bwanyima ku murishiisha, mwakora ekishushani ekibaizire, ekirikushusha ekintu kyona, mwakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu kumugwisa kubi," 
Deuteronomy4:26 eri izooba niinyeta eiguru n'ensi kuba baamushinja, kuhamya ku murihwerekyerera juba, mukahwa omu nsi ei muryambuka Yorudani kuza kukubuura; timurigimaramu mwanya muhango, kureka muryagicwekyerereramu kimwe." 
Deuteronomy4:27 MUKAMA aryabataataanisa, abanagye omu banyamahanga, mutsigare muri bakye omu mahanga, agu MUKAMA aribatwaramu." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Okwo muryaheererezayo baaruhanga abaakozirwe emikono y'abantu omu biti n'omu mabaare, abatarikureeba, abatarikuhurira, nari okurya, n'obu kwakuba okukaga." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Kwonka okwo ku murisherurirayo MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, muryamureeba, ku murimusherura n'omutima gwanyu gwona n'amagara gaanyu goona." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ku origira obusaasi, ebyo byona byakuhikaho, omu biro bya bwanyima oryagarukira MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, oyorobere eiraka rye;" 
Deuteronomy4:31 ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ni Ruhanga orikusaasira; tarikuhemukaho, kandi tarikucwekyereza, n'obu kwakuba okwebwa endagaano ei yaaragaine na baashwenkuru naarahira." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Obuuze eby'ebiro ebyahingwire ebyakubandiize, okwiha aha kiro eki Ruhanga yaahangiireho omuntu omu nsi, kandi n'okuruga aha muheru gw'eiguru okuhika aha gundi, ku haraabe harabaireho ekintu kyona ekikuru nk'eki, nari ku haraabe harahuriirweho ekirikushushana nakyo." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Hariho abantu abarahuriire eiraka rya Ruhanga nirigambira omu muriro, nkaimwe oku mwarihuriire, bakagumaho bari abahuriire?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Nari shi hariho ruhanga orateireho kuza kwetwarira eihanga, naariihisa omu rindi ebigyezo n'obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza n'engamba n'omukono gw'amaani n'omukono ogubangire, kandi n'ebirikutiinisa munonga, nk'ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaakoreire omuri Misri byona omu maisho gaanyu oku byabaire biri?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Niiwe waayorekirwe ebyo, ngu obone kumanya ku MUKAMA ari Ruhanga; ku hatariho ondiijo kureka We wenka." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Akeema omu iguru, yaakuhuriza eiraka rye, ngu abone kukwegyesa; n'omu nsi yaakworeka omuriro gwe omwingi; kandi waahurira ebigambo bye nibigurugamu." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Kandi ahabw'okukunda baashwenkuru, nikyo yaatooraniire baijukuru baabo abaakuratsireho, akakweihira omuri Misri n'amaani ge maingi," 
Deuteronomy4:38 ngu abingye amahanga agarikukukiza ekitiinisa n'amaani, garugye omu maisho gaawe, akutaasye omu nsi yaabo, agikuhe kuba obuhunguzi, nk'oku kiri n'eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Mbwenu eri izooba omanye eki kandi okite aha mutima, ku MUKAMA ari Ruhanga ori omu iguru ahaiguru n'omu nsi ahansi; tihariho ondiijo weena." 
Deuteronomy4:40 N'ahabw'ekyo ogume okwate ebiragiro bye ebyatairweho n'ebi yaaragiire, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, obone kuba gye n'abaana baawe abarikurataho, n'okuhangaarira omu nsi, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuba eyaawe ebiro byona." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Bwanyima Musa yaatoorana endembo ishatu aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba seeri ya Yorudani," 
Deuteronomy4:42 ngu oriita omuntu weena ahungireyo, oriba aitsire mutaahi we, atamwitsire nkana, oshangirwe ataine buzigu nawe omu biro ebihingwire, akize amagara ge ahabw'okuhungira omu rurembo rumwe ahari ezo;" 
Deuteronomy4:43 endembo ezo nizo ezi–Bezeeri omu ihamba eriri omu nsi y'empita ahabw'aba Reubeeni, Ramosi omuri Gileadi ahabw'aba Gaadi, na Golani omuri Bashani ahabw'aba Manaase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ebi nibyo biragiro ebi Musa yaataire omu maisho g'Abaisraeli; 
Deuteronomy4:45 n'ebirikuhamya, n'ebiragiro ebyatairweho, n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi Musa yaagambiire Abaisraeli obu baaruga Misri," 
Deuteronomy4:46 bakiri seeri ya Yorudani omu ruhanga orushungaine na Besi-peori, omu nsi ya Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, owaabaire atwire Heshibooni, ou Musa n'Abaisraeli baitsire, obu baaruga Misri," 
Deuteronomy4:47 bakakubuura ensi ye n'eya Ogi omugabe wa Bashani, kandi abo nibo bagabe bombi b'Abaamori, abaabaire batwire seeri ya Yorudani aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba," 
Deuteronomy4:48 okuruga Aroeri eri aha rubaju rw'oruhanga rwa Arunooni okuhika aha rushozi Sioni (egyo niyo Herumooni)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 kandi na Araba yoona seeri ya Yorudani aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, n'okuhika aha nyanja ya Araba ahansi y'orushozi Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Musa yaayeta Abaisraeli boona, yaabagira ati: Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, muhurire ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi ndikugamba muhuriire eri izooba, mubone kubyega n'okubyorobera." 
Deuteronomy5:2 MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu akaragaanira naitwe endagaano ahari Horebu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Baatatenkuriitwe tibo MUKAMA yaaragaine nabo egyo ndagaano, kureka akaragaana naitwe abari aha, abakiriho eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy5:4 MUKAMA akagamba naimwe nimureebana, ari aha rushozi ahagati omu muriro." 
Deuteronomy5:5 (Omu bunaku obwo nkeemerera ahagati ya MUKAMA naimwe okubagambira ekigambo kya MUKAMA; ahabw'okuba mukaba mutiinire ogwo muriro, timwainamuka ahari orwo rushozi.) Yaagira ati:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 Niinye MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misri, omu nju y'obuhuuku;" 
Deuteronomy5:7 otarigira baaruhanga abandi nyowe ndiho. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Otaryekorera ekishushani kyona ekibaizire, n'obu kyakuba ekishushani ky'ekintu kyona ekiri ahaiguru omu iguru nari ekiri omu nsi ahansi, nari ekiri omu maizi okuzimu;" 
Deuteronomy5:9 otaribiinamira, kandi otaribiheereza; ahakuba nyowe MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ndi Ruhanga w'eihato, ntura abaana eby'okushiisha bya baishebo abarikuunyanga okuhitsya aha b'obusingye bwa kashatu n'obwa kana;" 
Deuteronomy5:10 kwonka abaana b'abarikunkunda bakoorobera ebiragiro byangye, mbagirira embabazi okuhitsya obusingye enkumi n'enkumi." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Otarizaanisa eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; ahakuba MUKAMA tarimubara nk'otaine rubanja orikuzaanisa eiziina rye. 
Deuteronomy5:12 Ijuka okweza ekiro kya sabato; nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaakuragiire. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Omu biro mukaaga ogume okore; obe nimwo waakorera emirimo yaawe yoona; 
Deuteronomy5:14 kwonka ekiro kya mushanju niyo sabato ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; otarikoreraho omurimo gwona, iwe nari mutabani waawe, nari muhara waawe, nari omuhuuku waawe, nari omuzaana waawe, nari ente yaawe, nari endogoya yaawe, nari eki otungire kyona omu matungo gaawe, nari omunyaihanga ori omu ka yaawe; omuhuuku waawe n'omuzaana waawe bahuumure nkaiwe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Kandi oryaguma oijukye ku waabaire ori omuhuuku omu nsi ya Misri, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akakwihayo n'omukono gw'amaani kandi ogubangire. Nikyo MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaakuragiriire kurinda sabato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Otiine sho na nyoko, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaakuragiire, obone kuhangaara n'okuba gye omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Otariita; 
Deuteronomy5:18 Kandi otarishambana; 
Deuteronomy5:19 Kandi otariiba; 
Deuteronomy5:20 Kandi otaribeiherera mutaahi waawe; 
Deuteronomy5:21 Kandi otaryetenga omukazi wa mutaahi waawe, otaryetenga enju ya mutaahi waawe, n'obu gwakuba omusiri gwe, nari omuhuuku we, nari omuzaana we, nari ente ye, nari endogoya ye n'obu kyakuba ekintu kyona ekya mutaahi waawe." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Ebyo nibyo bigambo ebi MUKAMA yaagambiire eihanga ryanyu ryona aha rushozi ruri, ari ahagati omu muriro, n'omu kicu, n'omu mwirima ndindindi, naabigamba n'eiraka rihango; tiyaagira kindi eki yaayongyeraho. Yaabihandiika aha bishate bibiri by'amabaare, yaabimpa." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Ku mwahuriire eiraka eririkuruga omu mwirima, mwareeba orushozi nirwaka omuriro, abeebembezi b'enganda zaanyu boona n'abakuru baanyu baanyirira haihi;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 mwangira muti: Reeba MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaatworeka ekitiinisa kye n'obukuru bwe, kandi twahurira eiraka rye niriruga omu muriro; eri izooba twareeba Ruhanga ku arikugamba n'omuntu, akagumaho." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Mbwenu twaza kwitirwa ki? Guriya muriro mwingi ka gwaza kutumaraho. Ku turaagarukye kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, nitwija kufa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Mbwenu n'oha omu bantu boona orahuriire eiraka rya Ruhanga otahwaho naagambira ahagati omu muriro, nk'oku twarihurira, akagumaho?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Ba niiwe wairira haihi, ohurire ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu arikugamba byona, otugambire ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu araakugambire byona; naitwe nitwija kubihurira, tubyorobere." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Ku mwangambiire ebigambo byanyu, MUKAMA yaabihurira; yangira ati: Mpuriire ebigambo ebi abantu abo bakugambiire; ebi bagambire byona, babigambire gye." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Nangwa ku baakugira omutima nk'ogwo gukabareetera kuntiina obutoosha n'okworobera ebiragiro byangye byona, bakaaba gye, n'oruzaaro rwabo ebiro byona." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Irooko obagire oti: Mugarukye omu mahema gaanyu. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kwonka iwe, ogume aha, ahu ndi, naanye nkugambire eki ndikuragiira kyona n'ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi oshemereire kubeegyesa, babone kubyoroberera omu nsi ei ndikubaha kuba eyaabo." 
Deuteronomy5:32 N'ahabw'ekyo muteho omutima, mukore, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu abaragiire; mutariteishukira aha mukono gwa buryo nari ogwa bumosho." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Mugume mugyendere omu muhanda gwona ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu abahabwire, mubone kugumaho muri gye, muhangaarire omu nsi ei murikubuura." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Mbwenu eki nikyo kyaragiirwe n'ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yandagiire kubeegyesa, ngu mubone kubyoroberera omu nsi ei murikwambukamu kukubuura;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 otiine MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, oyorobere ebiragiro bye byona ebyatairweho, ebi ndikukuragiira, iwe na mutabani waawe na mwijukuru waawe, ebiro byona ebi orimara omu nsi, haza obone kuhangaara." 
Deuteronomy6:3 N'ahabw'ekyo, hurira, iwe Israeli, oteho omutima, obyorobere, obone kuba gye, n'okukanyira munonga omuri egyo nsi y'amate n'obwoki, nka MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuru oku yaakuraganiise." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Hurira, iwe Israeli! MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu n'omwe;" 
Deuteronomy6:5 kandi ogume okunde MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe n'omutima gwawe gwona, n'amagara gaawe goona, n'amaani gaawe goona." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Kandi ebigambo ebi, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, bishemereire kukuguma aha mutima;" 
Deuteronomy6:7 ogume oyezirikye kubyegyesa abaana baawe, ogume obigaaniireho oshutami omu nju yaawe, nari noogyenda omu muhanda, kandi waaba nooza kubyama, kandi noimuka." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Obikome aha mukono gwawe, bibe akamanyiso, obite aha buso bwawe ahagati y'amaisho gaawe." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Oryabihandiika aha biti by'omuryango gw'enju yaawe n'aha nyigi z'amarembo gaawe. 
Deuteronomy6:10 Bwanyima MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ku arikuhitsya omu nsi ei yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuru, Abrahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo, yaakuha endembo mpango kandi nungi, ezi otarombekire," 
Deuteronomy6:11 n'amaju agaijwire ebirungi byona, agu otaraijwize, n'amaziba g'amaizi agu otarafukwire, n'emisiri y'emizaabibu n'emizeituuni ei otarabyaire, waarya, waahaaga," 
Deuteronomy6:12 oyerinde otaryebwa MUKAMA owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misri, omu nju y'obuhuuku." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Ogume otiine MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, omuheereze, n'eiziina rye obe niryo waarahira." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Mutarikuratira baaruhanga abandi ab'abanyamahanga, abahereraine naimwe;" 
Deuteronomy6:15 ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe obari ahagati ni Ruhanga w'eihato; MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe nyentsya atarikugirira ekiniga, akakuhwerekyereza, akakwiha omu nsi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Mutarigyeza MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, nk'oku mwamugyereize Maasa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Mugume mwezirikye kworobera ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, n'ebi yaahamize, n'ebiragiro ebyatairweho ebi yaabaragiire." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Kandi ogume okore ebihikire n'ebirungi omu maisho ga MUKAMA, obone kuba gye, oze omuri egyo nsi nungi ei MUKAMA yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuru, ogikubuure," 
Deuteronomy6:19 ahabw'okubinga abazigu baawe boona omu maisho gaawe, nk'oku yaagambire." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Mutabani waawe ku arikubuuza omu biro ebiriija, naagira ati: Amakuru g'ebirikuhamya n'ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaabaragiire n'enki?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 oryamugarukamu oti: Tukaba turi abahuuku ba Faraho omuri Misri; MUKAMA yaatwiha omuri Misri n'omukono gw'amaani; 
Deuteronomy6:22 yaayoreka obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza eby'amaani ebirikusaasa, naabikora ahari Misri na Faraho n'eka ye yoona omu maisho gaitu;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 yaatwihayo, ngu atureete omu nsi ei yaaraganiise baatatenkuriitwe ku arigituha." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Kandi MUKAMA yaaturagiira kworobera ebyo biragiro byona, n'okutiina MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, ngu tubone kuba gye ebiro byona, kandi ngu akize amagara gaitu okufa, nk'oku kiri n'eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Ku turitaho omutima, twayorobera ebyo biragiro byona omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, nk'oku yaaturagiire, kiryatubarirwa kuba okuhikiirira." 
Deuteronomy7:1 MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ku arikuhitsya omu nsi ei orikuza kukubuura, yaabinga amahanga maingi omu maisho gaawe, Abahiiti, Abagirugashi, Abaamori, Abanyakanaani, Abaperizi, Abahiivi n'Abayebusi, amahanga mushanju agarikubakira obuhango n'amaani," 
Deuteronomy7:2 kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ku ariheza kugahayo omu maisho gaawe, waagasingura, ogacwekyerereze kimwe; otarigira endagaano yoona ei waaragaana nabo, kandi otaribagirira esaasi;" 
Deuteronomy7:3 otarishwererana nabo, kuhingira muhara waawe mutabani waabo, nari mutabani waawe kumushwererera muhara waabo;" 
Deuteronomy7:4 ahabw'okuba baryahindura mutabani waawe arekye kunkurata, kureka aheereze baaruhanga abandi; haza kireetere MUKAMA kukugirira ekiniga, n'okurahuka kukucwekyereza." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Kwonka oku nikwo muribatwaza; muryasheenya amatambiro gaabo, musheenyagure enyomyo zaabo z'amabaare ezi baayombekire, mutemagure Ashera zaabo, kandi mwotsye ebishushani byabo ebibaizire." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Omanye ngu ori eihanga eryereziibwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akakutoorana omu mahanga goona agari omu nsi, kuba eihanga eri yaayetooraniire." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Ekyareeteire MUKAMA kubakunda n'okubatoorana, ti habw'okugira ngu mukaba muri eihanga eririkukira agandi obuhango; ahakuba mukaba muri eihanga eririkukira obukye omu gandi goona;" 
Deuteronomy7:8 kureka akabatoorana ahabw'okubakunda, yaayenda ngu ahikiirize endahiro ei yaarahiire baashwenkuriimwe. Nikyo MUKAMA yaabaihiireyo n'omukono gw'amaani, akabacungura okubaiha omu nju y'obuhuuku n'omu mukono gwa Faraho omugabe wa Misri." 
Deuteronomy7:9 N'ahabw'ekyo omanye ngu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe niwe Ruhanga, Ruhanga omwesigwa, orikurinda endagaano, akagirira embabazi abarikumukunda, bakoorobera ebiragiro bye okuhitsya obusingye rukumi," 
Deuteronomy7:10 oihura abamwanga okubacwekyereza nibareebana; taryeganda kwihura orikumwanga, kureka aryamwihura nibareebana." 
Deuteronomy7:11 N'ahabw'ekyo ogume oyorobere ekiragiro kye, n'ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Bwanyima ahabw'okuhurira ebirikuragiirwa ebyo, n'okubirinda noobyorobera, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryagumizamu ahitsye endagaano n'okukugirira embabazi, ebi yaaragaine na baashwenkuru;" 
Deuteronomy7:13 kandi aryakukunda, akuhe omugisha, akukanyise; kandi aryaha omugisha abaana b'enda yaawe, n'ebyana by'eitaka ryawe, n'engano zaawe, na viinyo yaawe, n'amajuta gaawe g'emizeituuni, n'okukanya kw'ente zaawe n'okw'abaana b'obusyo bw'entaama zaawe omu nsi ei yaaragaine na baashwenkuru kukuha." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Oryaheebwa omugisha okukira agandi mahanga goona; tiharibaho mushaija nari omukazi oriba engumba omuriimwe, nari omu matungo gaanyu." 
Deuteronomy7:15 MUKAMA aryakwihaho endwara zoona; kandi tarikurwaza ndwara mbi yoona aha ndwara za Misri, ezi murikumanya; kureka aryazirwaza boona abarikukwanga." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Oryacwekyereza amahanga goona, agu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arihayo ahariiwe; amaisho gaawe gatarigasaasira; kandi naimwe mutariheereza baaruhanga baabo, ahabw'okuba ekyo kiryababeera omutego." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Ku origira omu mutima gwawe oti: Amahanga aga nigankiza amaani; nimbaasa nta kuganyaga? 
Deuteronomy7:18 otarigatiina, kureka oijukye ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaakoreire Faraho na Misri yoona," 
Deuteronomy7:19 ebigyezo by'amaani ebi amaisho gaawe gaareebire, obumanyiso, eby'okutangaaza, n'omukono gw'amaani kandi ogubangire, ebi MUKAMA yaakwihiiseyo; nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arigira amahanga goona agu orikutiina." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryayohereza enwa, zibateere, okuhitsya obu abo, abariba batsigaireho babeesherekire, baricwekyererezibwa omu maisho gaawe." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Otaribatiina, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ari omuriiwe, Ruhanga omukuru kandi orikutiinisa." 
Deuteronomy7:22 MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryabingamu ago mahanga, gakurugyeho mporampora; orekye kugamaraho ahonaaho, enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba zikakukanyaho, zikarengyesereza." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Kureka MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryagahayo omu maisho gaawe, agarabanisemu munonga, okuhitsya obu garihwerekyerera." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Kandi n'abagabe baabo aryabahayo omu mukono gwawe, naiwe oryabacwekyereza, eiziina ryabo ryebere kimwe ahansi y'eiguru; tihariho muntu weena oribaasa kukuza omu kaso, okuhitsya obu oribamariraho kimwe." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Ebishushani bya baaruhanga baabo ebibaizire oryabyotsya omu muriro; otaryetenga efeeza nari ezaabu eriba ebiriho, n'obu kwakuba okugyetwarira, nyentsya okagwa omu mutego gwayo; ahabw'okuba n'ekihagaro ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Kandi otarireeta ekihagaro omu nju yaawe, okakyeenwa nkakyo; oryakyangira kimwe, okinugire kimwe, ahakuba n'ekintu ekikyeenirwe." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Ebiragiro byona ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba, muryabitaho omutima, mubyorobere, mubone kugumaho mukakanya, mukaza omu nsi ei MUKAMA yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe, mukagikubuura." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Oryaguma oijukye omuhanda gwona ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaakurabizemu omu ihamba emyaka egi yoona makumi ana, kukucwa eishaija, naakugyeza ngu amanye ebiri omu mutima gwawe, yaaba oraayorobere ebiragiro bye, nari otarikwija kubyorobera." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Yaakucureeza, yaakureka waagira enjara, yaakugaburira emaanu, ei waabaire otakamanyaga, n'obu baakuba baashwenkuru, ngu akumanyise ku omuntu atatungwa by'okurya byonka, kureka ku atungwa ekigambo kyona ekiruga omu kanwa ka Ruhanga." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Ebijwaro byawe tibirakukuriireho, n'ekigyere kyawe tikirazimbire, emyaka egyo yoona makumi ana." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Kandi omanye omu mutima gwawe, ku MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akuhana, nk'oku omuntu ahana omwana we." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Oryakwata ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe noogyendera omu mihanda ye, noomutiina;" 
Deuteronomy8:7 ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe naakutwara omu nsi enungi, erimu otugyera tw'amaizi, n'enshuro n'ebiyanja by'amaizi maraingwa, agarikuhimintika nigaruga omu mpanga n'omu bibungo;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 ensi ey'engano na sayiri n'emizaabibu n'emitiini kandi n'amakomamahanga; ensi y'amajuta g'emizeituuni n'obwoki; 
Deuteronomy8:9 ensi ei oriryamu eby'okurya bitatuube, kandi ei otarikyeneramu kintu kyona; ei amabaare gaayo gari obutare, kandi ei oritimba emiringa omu bibungo byayo." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Oryarya, oigute, osiime MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ahabw'ensi nungi ei akuhaire." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Oyerinde otaryebwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, okanga kworobera ebiragiro bye, n'ebi yaaragiire, n'ebiragiro ebyatairweho, ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Ku oriba waariire waigutsire, waayombekire enju nungi, waazitwiremu," 
Deuteronomy8:13 amasyo gaawe g'ente n'ag'entaama ku gariba gaakanyire, efeeza n'ezaabu zaawe nazo zaakanya, n'ebi otungire byona byakanya," 
Deuteronomy8:14 oyerinde omutima gwawe gutaryehimbisa, okeebwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misri, omu nju y'obuhuuku," 
Deuteronomy8:15 akakurabya omuri eryo ihamba rihango kandi eririkutiinisa, eri waashangiremu enjoka z'obushegu oburikubabiirira na skorupio, n'ensi y'empaama etarimu maizi, owaakwihiire amaizi omu rukiri rugumire munonga;" 
Deuteronomy8:16 owaakugabuririire emaanu omu ihamba, ei baashwenkuru baabaire batakamanyaga; ngu akucwe eishaija, akugyeze abone kukukora gye aha muheru." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Oyerinde otarigira omu mutima gwawe oti: Obushoboorozi bwangye n'amaani gangye nibyo byampaisize obutungi obu bwona. 
Deuteronomy8:18 Oryaguma oijukye MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, ahakuba niwe akubaasisa kutunga eitungo ngu abone kuhamya endagaano, ei yaaragaine na baashwenkuru naarahira, nk'oku kiri eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Kwonka ku oryebwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, waakuratira baaruhanga abandi, waabaheereza, kandi waabaramya, ninkumanyisiza kimwe eri izooba ku otaribura kuhwerekyerera." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Nk'amahanga agu MUKAMA arikuhwerekyerereza omu maisho gaanyu, nikwo naimwe murihwerekyerera, ahabw'okwanga kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Hurira, iwe Israeli! Noija kwambuka Yorudani eri izooba kunyaga amahanga agarikukukira ekitiinisa n'amaani, endembo mpango, ezeehinguririziibwe engo ezizitiire okuhika ahaiguru munonga," 
Deuteronomy9:2 n'abantu bahango kandi baraingwa beene Anaki, abu orikumanya, kandi abu orahuriire nibagambaho bati: N'oha orikubaasa kuza aba Anaki omu kaso?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Eri izooba omanye ngu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe niwe ogwo oraayambukye, akwebembeire nk'omuriro gurikurya busha; niwe araabacwekyereze, akabagomoorera omu maisho gaawe; naiwe oryababingamu, obahwerekyereze ahonaaho, nk'oku MUKAMA yaakugambiire." 
Deuteronomy9:4 MUKAMA Ruhanga ku ariheza kubabinga, baakuruga omu maisho, otarigira omu mutima gwawe oti: MUKAMA andeetsire omu nsi egi kugikubuura ahabw'okuhikiirira kwangye; haza kunu MUKAMA abingire ago mahanga omu maisho gaanyu ahab'wobubi bwago." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Torikuza omu nsi yaabo kugikubuura ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe nari okugororoka kw'omutima gwawe, kureka ahabw'obubi bw'ago mahanga nikyo MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikubabingira omu maisho gaawe, kandi ngu abone kuhamya ekigambo eki yaarahiire naaraganisa baashwenkuru, Abrahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 N'ahabw'ekyo omanye MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ku atarikukuha nsi egi kugikubuura ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe; ahabw'okuba ori eihanga ery'ebitsya bigangaire. 
Deuteronomy9:7 Oijukye, kandi oteebwa oku waitsize MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ekiniga omu ihamba; okwiha aha izooba eri waarugiireho omu nsi ya Misri, n'okuhitsya obu muhikire aha, mukaba mugomera MUKAMA." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Kandi n'ahari Horebu mukaitsizaho MUKAMA ekiniga, yaabagirira ekiniga, yaayenda kubacwekyereza." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ku nainamukire aha rushozi kwakiira ebishate biri eby'amabaare, nibyo bishate by'endagaano ei MUKAMA yaaragaine naimwe, naamara ahari orwo rushozi ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro; nkaba ntarya kintu kyona, n'obu kwakuba okunywa amaizi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 MUKAMA yampa ebyo bishate bibiri by'amabaare ebihandiiikirweho orukumu rwa Ruhanga; bikaba biriho ebigambo byona ebi MUKAMA agambiire naimwe ahari orwo rushozi, ari ahagati omu muriro, aha izooba ry'okuteeraniraho." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ebyo biro makumi ana ku byahweire, MUKAMA yampa ebyo bishate bibiri by'amabaare, nibyo bishate by'endagaano;" 
Deuteronomy9:12 yangira ati: Imuka, orugye aha, orahukye oshuume; ahabw'okuba abantu baawe abu waihire Misri, beesiisire; baarahuka kuteishuka omuhanda, ogu naabaragiire kutoora; baayeheeshera ekishushani." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Kandi MUKAMA yangira ati: Ndeebire eihanga eri, reeba n'eihanga ry'ebitsya bigangaire;" 
Deuteronomy9:14 reka mbacwekyereze, eiziina ryabo ryebere kimwe ahansi y'eiguru, nkuhindure eihanga eririkubakiza amaani n'ekitiinisa." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Naanye naahinduka, naaruga aha rushozi, kandi orwo rushozi rukaba nirwaka omuriro; ebyo bishate bibiri by'amabaare nkaba mbiine omu ngaro zombi." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ku naayetegyereize, naareeba mucumwire ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, mweheesheire ekishushani ky'enyana omu zaabu, muteishukire omuhanda ogu MUKAMA yaabaire abaragiire kutoora." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Naakwata ebyo bishate bibiri by'amabaare, ebyabaire bindi omu ngaro zombi, naabiteera ahansi, naabyatira omu maisho gaanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Naagwa ahansi omu maisho ga MUKAMA nk'okubanza, okumara ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro; tinaarya kintu kyona, n'obu kwakuba okunywa amaizi, ahabw'ekibi kyanyu kyona eki mwakozire, nimukora ekirikwangwa MUKAMA, kumwitsa ekiniga." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ahakuba nkatiina ahabw'ekiniga n'okubiihirwa kwingi, ebi MUKAMA yaabagiriire, akenda kubacwekyereza. Kwonka omuri obwo bunaku nabwo MUKAMA yampurira." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Kandi MUKAMA yaagirira Arooni ekiniga kingi, yaayenda kumwita; omuri obwo bunaku na Arooni nawe naamushabira." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Naakwata ekibi kyanyu, nikyo kishushani ky'enyana eki mwaheesire, naakyotsya omu muriro, naakihondahonda, naakisa, naakicwa obunono; esaano yaakyo naaginaga omu kagyera, akaabaire nikaruga omu rushozi." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Kandi n'ahari Tabera na Maasa na Kibiroosi-hatava mukaitsa MUKAMA ekiniga. 
Deuteronomy9:23 Kandi n'obu MUKAMA yaabatumira Kadeshi-barunea, naagira ati: Mwinamukye, mukubuure ensi ei mbahaire; nabwo mukagomera ekiragiro kya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, timwamwikiriza, n'obu kwakuba okumuhurira." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Mukaba mugomera MUKAMA, okwiha aha izooba eria naatandikiireho kubamanya." 
Deuteronomy9:25 Ntyo naajuumara ahansi omu maisho ga MUKAMA, okumara ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro, ahakuba MUKAMA akagamba ku arikwija kubacwekyereza." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Naashaba MUKAMA nti: Ai Mukama RUHANGA, otacwekyereza abantu baawe, nibwo buhunguzi bwawe, abu waacungwize ekitiinisa kyawe, okabaiha omuri Misri n'omukono gw'amaani." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Ijuka abairu baawe Abarahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo; oteeta aha bugangaazi bw'aba bantu, nari aha bubi bwabo n'ekibi kyabo;" 
Deuteronomy9:28 abantu b'omu nsi ei waatwihiremu batakaagira ngu: MUKAMA akaremwa kubahitsya omu nsi ei yaabaraganiise, kandi ngu, ahabw'okubanga, akabaihayo kubaitira omu ihamba." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Haza kunu bari abantu baawe, kandi obuhunguzi bwawe, abu waihireyo n'omukono gwawe ogw'amaani kandi ogubangire." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Omu bunaku obwo MUKAMA akangambira ati: Baija ebishate bibiri by'amabaare ebirikushusha eby'okubanza, oinamukye, onshangye aha rushozi, kandi obaije n'eshanduukye y'ekiti;" 
Deuteronomy10:2 naanye niinyija kuhandiika ahari ebyo bishate ebigambo ebyabaire biri aha bishate by'okubanza, ebi waayatsire, obite omuri egyo shanduukye." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Ntyo naabaija eshanduukye y'omunyinya, n'ebishate bibiri by'amabaare ebirikushusha eby'okubanza, nainamuka aha rushozi, nyine ebyo bishate byombi omu ngaro." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Yaabihandiikaho ebiragiro ikumi, nk'oku yaahandiikire aha by'okubanza, ebi MUKAMA yaabagambiriire aha rushozi ari ahagati omu muriro aha izooba eri mwateeraniireho; MUKAMA yaabimpa." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Naahinduka, naashuuma okuruga ahari orwo rushozi, naabita omu shanduukye ei naabaizire; kandi nimwo biri, nk'oku MUKAMA yandagiire. (" 
Deuteronomy10:6 Abaisraeli bakaimutsya orugyendo okuruga Beeroosi-beene-yakani, baaza Mosera; okwo niyo Arooni yaagwire, kandi niyo yaaziikirwe; Eleazaari omutabani yaakora omurimo g'wobunyamurwa omu mwanya gwe." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Okuruga aho baimutsya orugyendo, baaza Gudigoda; baaruga Gudigoda, baaza Yotibaasa, ensi y'otugyera tw'amaizi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Omu bunaku obwo nimwo MUKAMA yaashorooreire oruganda rwa Leevi kuguma nibaheeka eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, n'okwemerera omu maisho ga MUKAMA nibamuheereza, kandi n'okushabira abantu omugisha omu iziina rye, nk'oku kiri na hati." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Nikyo Abaleevi batagirira mugabo n'obu bwakuba obuhunguzi omuri beene waabo; MUKAMA niwe buhunguzi bwabo, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaabagambiire.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 Naaguma ahari orwo rushozi okumara ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro, nk'okubanza; obwo nabwo MUKAMA yampurira, tiyaayenda kubacwekyereza." 
Deuteronomy10:11 MUKAMA yangira ati: Imuka ogyende, oyebembere abo bantu, baze omu nsi ei naarahiire kuha baishenkurubo, bagikubuure." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Mbwenu Israeli, ekindi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe naakwenza ki? T'okutiina MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, okugyendera omu mihanda ye yoona, okumukunda, okumuheereza n'omutima gwawe gwona n'amagara gaawe goona," 
Deuteronomy10:13 n'okukwata ebiragiro bye n'ebi yaataireho, ebi ndikukuragiira hati ngu obe gye?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 Reeba, eiguru, n'eiguru eriri ahaiguru y'agandi, n'ensi n'ebirimu byona n'ebya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy10:15 N'obu kiraabe kiri kityo, MUKAMA akata omutima ahari baashwenkuru, yaabakunda okukira agandi mahanga goona, yaatoorana oruzaaro rwabo orwakuratsireho, nibo imwe nk'oku kiri na hati." 
Deuteronomy10:16 N'ahabw'ekyo mushare ekishushu eky'aha mitima yaanyu, murekye kugaruka kuba ab'ebitsya bigangaire." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ni Ruhanga wa baaruhanga, kandi MUKAMA w'abakama, Ruhanga omukuru ow'amaani kandi orikutiinisa, otashoroora mu bantu, kandi otarya nguzi," 
Deuteronomy10:18 ocwera efuuzi n'abafaakazi emanja z'oburyo, kandi okunda omunyaihanga, akamuha eby'okurya n'eby'okujwara." 
Deuteronomy10:19 N'ahabw'ekyo mukunde abanyamahanga, ahakuba naimwe mukaba muri abanyaihanga omu nsi ya Misri." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Oryaguma otiine MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; obe niwe waaheereza, omuhamireho, kandi eiziina rye obe niryo waarahira." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Niwe kwesiima kwawe kandi Ruhanga waawe, owaakukoreire ebikuru biri kandi ebirikutiinisa, ebi waayereebeire." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Baashwenkuru bakashuuma Misri, bari abantu makumi mushanju; mbwenu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe abagizire baingi nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru." 
Deuteronomy11:1 N'ahabw'ekyo oryaguma okunde MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, orinde obutoosha ebi yaakukwatsize, n'ebyatairweho, n'ebyaragiirwe, n'ebiragiro bye." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Eri izooba mumanye ebi, (ahakuba tindikugambira baana baanyu, abatakabimanyire n'obu kwakuba okubireeba), muteekateekye aha kuhana kwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, obukuru bwe, omukono gwe gw'amaani kandi ogubangire," 
Deuteronomy11:3 obumanyiso bwe n'ebi yaakozire Faraho omugabe wa Misri n'ensi ye yoona omu nsi ya Misri; 
Deuteronomy11:4 n'ebi yaakozire eihe rya Misri n'embaraasi zaabo n'ebigaari byabo; oku yaagarwire amaizi g'Enyanja erikutukura, gakabashweka babakuratiire, MUKAMA akabacwekyerereza kimwe, batagarukye kwimutsya omutwe n'okuhitsya hati;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 n'ebi yaabakozire muri omu ihamba, okuhitsya obu mwahikire aha;" 
Deuteronomy11:6 n'ebi yaakozire Dasani na Abiraamu beene Eliabu, mutabani wa Reubeeni, oku eitaka ryayashamire, rikabamira n'ab'omu maka gaabo n'amahema gaabo n'ebintu byona ebihuriire ebi baabaire nibagyenda nabyo, bikacwekyererera ahagati y'Abaisraeli boona;" 
Deuteronomy11:7 ahakuba amaisho gaanyu gakeereebera ebikuru byona ebi MUKAMA yaakozire. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Nikyo mushemerereire kukwata ebiragiro byona ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba, mubone kuba ab'amaani, muze omu nsi ei murikuza kwambukamu kukubuura, ku eba eyaanyu," 
Deuteronomy11:9 kandi mubone kuhangaarira omu nsi ei MUKAMA yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe n'oruzaaro rwabo, ensi ey'amate n'obwoki." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ahakuba ensi ei murikuzamu kukubuura ti nk'eya Misri ei mwarugiremu, ei mwabaire mubiba embibo, mukareetamu amaizi n'ebigyere byanyu, nk'oku bagira omusiri gw'emboga;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 kureka ensi, ei murikuzamu kukubuura, n'ensi y'ebibungo n'empanga erikuguubwamu amaizi g'enjura erikuruga omu iguru," 
Deuteronomy11:12 n'ensi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikutaho omutima; kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu atuura agitaireho amaisho, okwiha aha kutandika kw'omwaka okuhitsya aha muheru gwagwo." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Ku muryezirika kworobera ebiragiro byangye, ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba, okukunda MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, n'okumuheereza n'omutima gwanyu gwona n'amagara gaanyu goona," 
Deuteronomy11:14 naanye ndyagwisiza ensi yaanyu enjura omu bunaku bwayo, ey'eibiba n'eya katumba, mubone kushaaruura engano zaanyu, na viinyo yaanyu n'amajuta gaanyu g'emizeituuni." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Ndyameza obunyaatsi omu mariisizo gaanyu ahabw'amatungo gaanyu, murye, mwigute." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Mwerinde, emitima yaanyu etaribeihwa-beihwa, mukateishuka, mukaheereza baaruhanga abandi, mukabaramya," 
Deuteronomy11:17 MUKAMA akabagirira ekiniga kingi, akakinga eiguru, enjura ekabura, ensi ekareka kweza emyaka yaayo, mukarahuka kuhwerekyerera, mukahwa omu nsi enungi ei MUKAMA arikubaha." 
Deuteronomy11:18 N'ahabw'ekyo mute ebigambo byangye ebi aha mitima yaanyu n'omu magara gaanyu, mubikome aha mikono yaanyu, bibe akamanyiso, mubite aha buso bwanyu ahagati y'amaisho gaanyu." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Mugume mubyegyese abaana baanyu, mubigaaniireho mushutami omu maka gaanyu, nimugyenda omu muhanda, nimuza kubyama, kandi nimwimuka." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Muryabihandiika aha biti by'emiryango y'amaju gaanyu n'aha nyigi z'amarembo gaanyu; 
Deuteronomy11:21 ebiro byanyu n'eby'abaana baanyu bibone kukanya omu nsi ei MUKAMA yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe omwanya gwona ogu eiguru ririmara riri ahaiguru y'ensi. 
Deuteronomy11:22 Ahakuba ku muryezirika kukwata ebiragiro ebi byona ebi ndikubaragiira, mwabyorobera, okukunda MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, n'okugyendera omu mihanda ye yoona, n'okumuhamiraho," 
Deuteronomy11:23 obwo MUKAMA aryabinga amahanga ago goona omu maisho gaanyu, kandi muryakubuura amahanga agarikubakira obukuru n'amaani." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Omwanya gwona ogu muriribatamu n'ebigyere byanyu guryaba ogwanyu; omwatano gwanyu guryatandikira aha ihamba na Lebanooni, n'aha mugyera Furaati, guhikye aha Nyanja y'oburengyerwa-izooba." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Tihaine muntu weena oribaasa kubaza omu kaso; MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aryaitsa obwoba ensi yoona ei muriribatamu, kandi agireetere okutiina ahabwanyu, nk'oku yaabaraganiise." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Reeba, eri izooba ninta omu maisho gaanyu omugisha n'omukyeeno;" 
Deuteronomy11:27 omugisha ku muryorobera ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba," 
Deuteronomy11:28 n'omukyeeno ku muryanga kworobera ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, mwateishuka omuhanda ogu ndikubaragiira eri izooba, mwakuratira baaruhanga abandi, abu mutakamanyaga." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ku aribahitsya omu nsi, ei murikuza kukubuura, muryata omugisha aha rushozi Gerizimu n'omukyeeno aha rushozi Ebali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Enshozi ezo tiziri seeri ya Yorudani, oburengyerwa-izooba bw'omuhanda omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani, abatwire omuri Araba, ahashungaine na Gilugaali, aha rubaju rw'emyela ya Moore?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Ahakuba nimwija kwambuka Yorudani kuza omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kukubuura, kandi kwo muryagikubuura, mugituuremu." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Kandi muryaguma mute omutima aha biragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe byona, ebi ndikuta omu maisho gaanyu eri izooba, mubyorobere." 
Deuteronomy12:1 Ebi nibyo biragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi mushemereire kutaho omutima, mukabyorobera muri omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe yaabahaire kukubuura, ebiro byona ebi murimara omu nsi." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Mutaribura kusheenya emyanya yoona, ei amahanga, agu murikwija kunyaga, gaabaire gaheererezamu baaruhanga baago, ey'aha nshozi ndaingwa, n'aha bibungo, n'ey'ahansi ya buri kiti ekyetwa omurinzi;" 
Deuteronomy12:3 kandi muryasheenya amatambiro gaabo, musheenyagure enyomyo zaabo z'amabaare ezi baayombekire, mwotsye Ashera zaabo n'omuriro, mutemagure ebishushani bya baaruhanga baabo ebibaizire; mumareho eiziina ryabo omu mwanya ogwo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Kwonka imwe tikwo murigirira MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu; 
Deuteronomy12:5 kureka muryasherura omwanya, ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aritoorana omu nganda zaanyu zoona, kuba nigwo yaatamu eiziina rye, akagugira Obutaaho bwe;" 
Deuteronomy12:6 okwo niyo muriguma nimuza, kandi okwo niyo muriguma nimureeta ebitambo byanyu eby'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo, na kimwe kya ikumi kyanyu, n'empongano ezi muhonga, n'ebi muhayo ahabw'okuhiga, n'ebi muhayo mweyendeire, n'emijigaijo y'amasyo gaanyu g'ente n'ag'entaama;" 
Deuteronomy12:7 okwo niyo muririira omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, niyo imwe n'ab'omu maka gaanyu murishemerererwa ekintu kyona eki muritaho engaro, eki MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ariba abaheereiremu omugisha." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Mutarikora nk'ebi byona ebi turikukora omu bunaku obu, obu buri muntu arikukora eki arikusiima;" 
Deuteronomy12:9 ahabw'okuba timukahikire h'okuhuumurira n'omu buhunguzi, obu MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Kwonka ku muryambuka Yorudani, mwatuura omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kuhungura, yaabahuumuza engamba z'abazigu baanyu boona abariba babeehinguririize, ngu mubone kugituuramu buhooro," 
Deuteronomy12:11 obwo muryaguma nimureeta ebi ndikubaragiira byona omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aritoorana kugumyamu eiziina rye, ebitambo byanyu eby'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo, na kimwe kya ikumi kyanyu, n'empongano ezi muhonga n'ebi muritoorana kuragaanisa kuhayo ahari MUKAMA;" 
Deuteronomy12:12 kandi muryayesiimira omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, imwe na batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu n'abahuuku baanyu n'abazaana baanyu, n'Abaleevi abari omu maka gaanyu, ahakuba tibaine mugabo n'obu bwakuba obuhunguzi omuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Mwerinde mutaritambira ebitambo byanyu ahu murishanga hoona; 
Deuteronomy12:14 kureka omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA aritoorana omuri rumwe aha nganda zaanyu, mube nimwo mwatambira ebitambo byanyu by'okwotsya, kandi mube nimwo mwakorera ebi ndikubaragiira byona." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Kwonka nimwikirizibwa kwita enyamaishwa n'okurya enyama yaazo, nk'oku murikwenda, omu maka gaanyu goona, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ariba abahaire omugisha; abatashemeire n'abashemeire boona nibaikirizibwa kugiryaho, nk'oku barya esirabo n'empara." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kwonka mutarirya eshagama, kureka muryagyata ahansi nk'amaizi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Kandi kimwe kya ikumi ky'engano zaanyu n'ekya viinyo yaanyu n'eky'amajuta gaanyu g'emizeituuni, n'emijigaijo y'amasyo gaanyu g'ente n'ag'entaama, n'ekintu kyona eki mwaraganiise kuhayo, n'eki murihayo n'omutima ogweyendeire, n'empongano ezi murihonga, ebyo byona mutaribiriira omu maka gaanyu;" 
Deuteronomy12:18 kureka muryabiriira omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu omu mwanya ogu aritoorana, imwe na batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu n'abahuuku baanyu n'abazaana baanyu n'Abaleevi abari omu maka gaanyu; kandi muryayesiimira omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu omuri byona ebi muritaho engaro." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Mwerinde mutaryebwa Omuleevi ebiro byona ebi murimara omu nsi yaanyu. 
Deuteronomy12:20 MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ku arihangusya ensi yaawe nk'oku yaakuraganiise, waagira oti: Niinyenda kurya enyama, ahakuba amagara gangye niyo gakunda; oryaikirizibwa kurya enyama nk'oku orikwenda." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Omwanya ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ariba atooraine kugumyamu eiziina rye, ku guriba gukuri hare, oryaita omu masyo gaawe g'ente n'ag'entaama, agu MUKAMA yaakuhaire, nk'oku naakuragiire; oryariira omu ka yaawe, nk'oku orikwenda kwona." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Nk'oku barya esirabo n'empara, nikwo orirya egyo nyama; abatashemeire n'abashemeire boona nibaikirizibwa kugirya." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kwonka eki oryerinda, n'okurya eshagama; ahakuba eshagama n'amagara; n'ahabw'ekyo otarirya enyama n'amagara gaayo." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Otarigirya, kureka oryagyata ahansi nk'amaizi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Otarigirya, obone kuba gye, hamwe n'abaana baawe abarikurataho, ku oriba waakozire ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Kwonka ebintu byanyu ebirikwera, ebi oshemereire kuhonga, n'empongano zaawe z'ebi oragaanisa noohiga, oryabitwara, oze omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA aritoorana," 
Deuteronomy12:27 otambire ebitambo byawe eby'okwotsya, enyama n'eshagama, aha itambiro rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; eshagama y'ebitambo byawe eryashukwa aha itambiro rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, reero enyama ogirye." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Ogume oteho omutima kuhurira ebigambo ebi byona, ebi ndikukuragiira, obone kuba gye ebiro byona hamwe n'abaana baawe abarikurataho, ku oriba waakozire ebirungi kandi ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy12:29 MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ku arihwerekyereza amahanga omu maisho gaawe omu nsi ei orikuza kukubuura, waagikubuura, waagituuramu," 
Deuteronomy12:30 oyerinde otaritegwa kugakuratira, gaherize kuhwerekyerezibwa omu maisho gaawe, okabuuririza ebya baaruhanga baabo noogira oti: Amahanga aga gakaba gaheereza gata baaruhanga baago? naanye nkabona kutwaza ntyo." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Kwonka iwe tikwo origirira MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; ahakuba bo bakaba bakorera baaruhanga baabo buri kintu kyona ekirikunugwa eki MUKAMA ayanga; nangwa na batabani baabo na bahara baabo nabo babookyeza baaruhanga baabo omu muriro. 
Deuteronomy12:32 Eki ndikubaragiira kyona, nikyo mushemereire kutaho omutima kukora; mutarikyongyeraho, kandi mutarikicwaho." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Omuriimwe ku hariimukamu nabi nari omurootsi w'ebirooto, yaabakorera akamanyiso nari eky'okutangaaza," 
Deuteronomy13:2 kandi ako kamanyiso nari eky'okutangaaza ekyo eki abagagambiireho kyahikiirira, yagaruka yaagira ati: Ka tukuratire baaruhanga abandi abu mutakamanyaga, tubaheereze;" 
Deuteronomy13:3 mutarihurira ebigambo bya nabi ogwo nari eby'ogwo murootsi w'ebirooto; ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aryaba naabagyeza, kumanya ku muraabe nimukunda MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu n'omutima gwanyu gwona n'amagara gaanyu goona." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Muryaguma mukuratire MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, mumutiine, mukwate ebiragiro bye, muhurire eiraka rye, mumuheereze, kandi mumuhamireho." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kandi nabi ogwo, nari ogwo murootsi w'ebirooto, aryaitwa, ahabw'okubagambira eby'okugomera MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misri, akabacungura omu nju y'obuhuuku, n'ahabw'okubateishura omuhanda ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaabaragiire kugyenderamu. Ku muritwaza mutyo, muryaiha ekibi omuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Murumuna waawe, omwana wa nyoko, nari mutabani waawe, nari muhara waawe, nari omukazi waawe ow'aha mukono, nari munywani waawe ow'aha mara, ku arikwosyosya omu mubonano naagira ati: Ija, tuze kuheereza baaruhanga abandi, abu otakamanyaga, n'obu baakuba baashwenkuru," 
Deuteronomy13:7 baaruhanga b'amahanga agabeehinguririize, agari haihi naimwe, nari agabari hare, okuruga aha muheru gw'ensi, okuhika aha gundi;" 
Deuteronomy13:8 otarimwikiriza n'obu kwakuba okumuhurira; otarimureebesa eriisho ry'esaasi, otarimusaasira, kandi otarimushereka," 
Deuteronomy13:9 kureka buzimazima oryamwita; omukono gwawe gube nigwo gwamubanza, bwanyima hateho ey'abandi boona;" 
Deuteronomy13:10 oryamuteera amabaare, afe, ahabw'okuba ayenzire kukubeihabeiha, ngu akwihe ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misri, omu nju y'obuhuuku." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Kandi Abaisraeli boona baryakihurira, batiine, tibarigaruka kukora kibi ekirikwingana kityo omuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Ku orihurira amakuru ahari rumwe aha ndembo zaawe, ezi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaakuhaire kutuuramu, ngu," 
Deuteronomy13:13 hariho abantu babi abarugire omuriimwe, bakoosyosya abatwire omu rurembo rwabo, nibagira bati: Ka tugyende tuheereze baaruhanga abandi, abu mutakamanyaga;" 
Deuteronomy13:14 obibuuririze, obikuratirire, obicondooze; ku orishanga biri eby'amazima bitarikubanganisibwa, ku ekihagaro ekirikushusha kityo kikoreirwe omuriimwe," 
Deuteronomy13:15 otaribura kwitsa ab'omuri orwo rurembo rurara, okarucwekyerereza kimwe n'ebirimu byona hamwe n'amatungo gaamwo." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Eminyago yaamwo yoona oryagirunda ahu emihanda erikuteeranira, oyotsye orwo rurembo n'eminyago yaamwo yoona, nk'oku bootsya ekitambo eky'okwokyeza kimwe ekitambiirwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu; orwo rurembo ruryaguma ruri omutuumo ebiro byona; tiruryombekwa bundi." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Otarigira ekintu kyona eki waagumya omu ngaro ahari ebyo ebyashorooreirwe MUKAMA, abone kureka ekiniga kye kingi, akugirire embabazi n'esaasi, akukanyise, nk'oku yaaraganiise baashwenkuru naarahira;" 
Deuteronomy13:18 ku origuma noohurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, nookwata ebiragiro bye byona, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, nookora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Muri abaana ba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu; mutaryesharashara n'obu kwakuba okwemwa omu buso, nari okumwa bahungu ahabw'okuba omu rufu." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Ahakuba muri eihanga eryereziibwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, kandi MUKAMA akabatoorana omu mahanga goona ag'omu nsi kuba eihanga rye, eri yaayetooraniire." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Otarirya ekintu kyona ekirikuzira. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Ezi nizo nyamaishwa ezi murikwikirizibwa kurya-ente, entaama, embuzi," 
Deuteronomy14:5 empara, esirabo, esa, enkorongo, enyemera, n'ekihondamabaare." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Omu nyamaishwa zoona buri nyamaishwa eyatsizemu ebyara, eine ebigyere by'ebyara bibiri, kandi erikwekuuma, mube niyo mwaguma nimurya." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Kwonka omuri ezo ezirikwekuuma, nari ezaatsizemu ebyara, ezi mutarizirya; engamira, orumi n'endirira ahabw'okuba zeekuuma, kwonka tizaatsizemu byara; zibe ezirikuzira ahariimwe;" 
Deuteronomy14:8 kandi empunu, ahabw'okuba eyatsizemu ebyara, kwonka teyekuuma; ahariimwe nikizira; mutarirya enyama yaazo, n'obu kwakuba okukora aha mitumbi yaazo." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Ahari byona eby'omu maizi ebi nibyo murikwikirizibwa kurya; ebiine amapapa n'engamba, mube nibyo mwarya;" 
Deuteronomy14:10 ekitaine mapapa na ngamba mutarikirya; ahariimwe nikizira. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Enyonyi zoona ezitarikuzira nimwikirizibwa kuzirya. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Kwonka ezi nizo mutarikwikirizibwa kurya–eishamba, empungumareere, kaamushungu-shungu," 
Deuteronomy14:13 ekyanira, nyakabaka n'oruganda rwayo," 
Deuteronomy14:14 ekikoona kyona n'oruganda rwakyo," 
Deuteronomy14:15 maaya, ekishoma-bwire, enyangi, akaca n'oruganda rwako," 
Deuteronomy14:16 ekihihizi ekikye n'ekihango, enyawaawa," 
Deuteronomy14:17 nyamunyonyi, ekihuhura-bahuta, ekiyoyo," 
Deuteronomy14:18 enkongoro, oruyongoyongo n'oruganda rwarwo, enkooherwa, n'orubaka." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Ebikooko byona ebiine amapapa, ebirikugyendesa amaguru ahariimwe nikizira; mutaribirya;" 
Deuteronomy14:20 kureka enyonyi zoona ezitarikuzira nizo murikwikirizibwa kurya. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Mutarirya ekintu kyona ekyefeereire; nimwikirizibwa kukiha omunyaihanga otwire naimwe, akirye; nari shi nimwikirizibwa kukiguza omunyaihanga; ahakuba muri eihanga eryereziibwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu. Mutariteeka omwana gw'embuzi omu mahenehene ga nyinagwo." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Otaribura kuha kimwe kya ikumi eky'ebi oyeza omu misiri yaawe buri mwaka. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Kandi oryaguma oriire omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, omu mwanya ogu aritoorana kugumyamu eiziina rye, kimwe kya ikumi ky'engano zaawe, n'ekya viinyo yaawe n'eky'amajuta gaawe g'emizeituuni, n'emijigaijo y'amasyo gaawe g'ente n'ag'entaama, obone kwega kuguma nootiina MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Obundi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ku ariheza kukuha omugisha, orugyendo ruryakubeera ruraingwa, oremwe kukitwarayo ahabw'omwanya kukuba hare ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ariba atooraine kugumyamu eiziina rye." 
Deuteronomy14:25 Ku kiriba kyabaire kityo, oryabiihamu efeeza, ozizingirire, ozitware omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ariba atooraine;" 
Deuteronomy14:26 oziguremu ebi orikwenda byona, yaaba nte, nari entaama, nari viinyo, nari eky'okunywa eky'amaani, nari ekindi kyona eki omutima gwawe gurikwenda; obiriire omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe n'ab'omu ka yaawe boona, mushemererwe." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Kandi n'Omuleevi otwire naiwe otarimwebwa, ahabw'okuba taine mugabo n'obu bwakuba obuhunguzi omuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Aha muheru gwa buri myaka eshatu oryaiha aha bi oyerize omuri ogwo mwaka kimwe kya ikumi, okibiikye omu ka yaawe;" 
Deuteronomy14:29 reero Omuleevi ahabw'okutagira mugabo n'obu bwakuba obuhunguzi omuriimwe, n'omunyaihanga, n'efuuzi, n'omufaakazi, abatwire naiwe, nabo baije, barye, bahaagye, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe abone kukuha omugisha omu mirimo yoona ei oriba nookora n'emikono yaawe." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Aha muheru gwa buri myaka mushanju oryaha abantu obusingye. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Ogu nigwo muringo ogu murihamu obusingye; buri muntu weena oriba aine ou arikwihuza, aryareka ekyo eki yaagurize mutaahi we; atarikiihuza mutaahi we nari mwene ishe; ahabw'okuba okuha obusingye, okuragiirwe MUKAMA, kuherize kurangwa." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Noikirizibwa kwihuza omunyaihanga; kwonka ekintu kyawe kyona ekiinwe mwene waanyu, oryakimurekyera." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Kwonka ku orihurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, waataho omutima kworobera ebiragiro ebyo byona ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba," 
Deuteronomy15:5 tiharibaho booro omuriimwe; ahakuba MUKAMA taribura kukuha omugisha omu nsi ei MUKAMA arikukuha kukubuura kuba obuhunguzi; 
Deuteronomy15:6 ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryakuha omugisha, nk'oku yaakuraganiise; oryaguza amahanga maingi, kwonka iwe torigeeguzaho; oryategyeka amahanga maingi, kwonka go tigarikutegyeka." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Ku haribaho omworo omuri beene waanyu omu ka emwe aha maka gaanyu omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha, otarigangaaza omutima, okaba engumya ahari mwene waanyu omworo;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 kureka omushashaanurire engaro, omuguze ekirikubaasa kumumarira obukyene bw'ekyo eki akyenire." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Oyerinde otarigira ekiteekateeko ky'obufura bukye omu mutima gwawe, okagira oti: Omwaka gwa mushanju ogw'okuha obusingye guri haihi; okareeba mwene waanyu eriisho ribi, okanga kugira eki waamuha, nawe akatakira MUKAMA naakutabaariza, haza kikakurugiramu ekibi." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Otaribura kumuha; kandi ku orimuha, otaritsigara noonyomwa omu mutima; ahabw'okuba ahabw'ekigambo ekyo MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryakuha omugisha omu mirimo yaawe yoona n'omuri byona ebi orikora n'emikono yaawe." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Mumanye ngu abooro tibarihwa mu nsi; nikyo ndikukuragiirira nti: Otaribura kushashaanurira mwene waanyu engaro, omukyene n'omworo abari omu nsi yaawe." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Ku barikuguza mwene waanyu Omuheburaayo nari Omuheburaayokazi, akukorere emyaka mukaaga; omu gwa mushanju omurekure, agyende n'obusingye." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Kandi ku orimurekura, otarimureka, akagyenda engaro nsha;" 
Deuteronomy15:14 kureka oryamuha aha bi otungire omu masyo gaawe, n'eby'aha mbuga yaawe, n'omu inyuukiro ryawe otarikunyomwa; nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ariba akuhaire omugisha, naiwe nikwo orimuha." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Oryaijuka naiwe ku waabaire ori omuhuuku omu nsi ya Misri, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akakucungura; nikyo ndikukuragiirira eki eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Kwonka ku arikugambira ahabw'okukukunda n'eka yaawe, kandi n'okuba gye naiwe, ati: Tindikwija kukurugaho," 
Deuteronomy15:17 oryareeta empindu, ogimufumuze okutu, eyogyemu, ekwate orwigi; obwo aryaguma ari omuhuuku waawe ebiro byona. Kandi n'omuzaana waawe nikwo orimutwaza otyo." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Ku orimurekura yaakurugaho n'obusingye, otaritsigara n'akangonongono; ahabw'okuba aryaba akukoreire emyaka mukaaga, iwe omwihwire kimwe kya kabiri eky'ebihembo by'omupakasi. Ku oritwaza otyo, MUKAMA aryakuha omugisha omu bi orikukora byona." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Emijigaijo yoona ey'enimi n'empaya erizaarwa omu masyo gaawe g'ente n'ag'entaama, oryaguma ogyereze MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; otarikoresa omujigaijo gw'ente yaawe, kandi otarikyemura ebyoya by'omujigaijo gw'entaama yaawe." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Kureka iwe n'ab'omu ka yaawe muryaguriira omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe buri mwaka omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA aritoorana. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Kwonka ku guriba gwine akamogo, oburema nari obuhumi, nari akandi kamogo koona akabi, otarigutambira MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Oryaguriira omu ka yaawe; abatashemeire n'abashemeire boona nibaikirizibwa kuguryaho, nk'oku barya esirabo n'empara." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kwonka otarirya eshagama yaagwo, kureka oryagyata ahansi nk'amaizi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 Oryaguma oijukye okwezi kwa Abibu, orinde obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; ahabw'okuba omu kwezi kwa Abibu nibwo MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaakwiha omuri Misri nyekiro." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Kandi oryatambira MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ekitambo ky'Okuhingurwaho, nookiiha omu masyo g'entaama nari ag'ente, okitambire omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA aritoorana kugumyamu eiziina rye." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Otarikiriisa omugaati gutumbisiibwe; oryamara ebiro mushanju nookiriisa omugaati gutatumbisiibwe, nigwo mugaati gw'okubonabona,–ahabw'okuba okaruga omu nsi ya Misri n'obwira,–obone kwijuka eizooba eri waarugiireho omu nsi ya Misri ebiro byawe byona." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Otarireebwa oine ekitumbisa kyona omu nsi yaawe yoona okumara ebiro mushanju; kandi hatarigira enyama yoona ey'eikitambo, eki oritamba aha izooba ry'okubanza omu mwabazyo, eyaaraaraho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Otaritambira ekitambo ky'Okuhingurwaho omu rurembo rwona aha ndembo ezi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha; 
Deuteronomy16:6 kureka omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aritoorana kugumyamu eiziina rye, nimwo oritambira omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho omu mwabazyo, eizooba nirirengarenga, omu bunaku obu waarugiiremu Misri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Oryagwotsya, oguriire omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aritoorana; kandi omu kasheeshe ohindukye ogarukye omu mahema gaawe." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Oryamara ebiro mukaaga noorya emigaati etatumbisiibwe, kandi aha kiro kya mushanju habeho okuteerana okwereziibwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe; otarikikoreraho omurimo gwona." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Oryayebarira saabiiti mushanju; ozibare noihirira aha bunaku obu oritandikiraho kuta omusyo gw'engyesho aha ngano zaawe. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Oryarinda obugyenyi bwa saabiiti mushanju ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe nooreeta omutoijo gw'empongano yaawe ogu oritoija n'omutima ogwekundiire, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ariba akuhaire omugisha;" 
Deuteronomy16:11 kandi oryayesiimira omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA aritoorana kugumyamu eiziina rye, iwe na mutabani waawe na muhara waawe n'omuhuuku waawe n'omuzaana waawe n'Omuleevi otwire omu marembo gaawe n'omunyaihanga n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi abatwire naimwe;" 
Deuteronomy16:12 kandi oryaijuka ku waabaire ori omuhuuku omuri Misiri; ote omutima aha biragiro ebi ebyatairweho, kandi obyorobere." 
Deuteronomy16:13 Kandi oryarinda obugyenyi bw'Ensiisira, okumara ebiro mushanju, ku oriheza kuhunika eby'aha mbuga yaawe n'eby'omu inyuukiro ryawe;" 
Deuteronomy16:14 oryashemererwa aha bugyenyi bwawe, iwe na mutabani waawe na muhara waawe n'omuhuuku waawe n'omuzaana waawe n'Omuleevi n'omunyaihanga n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi abatwire naiwe." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Oryamara ebiro mushanju noorinda obwo bugyenyi ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, ori omu mwanya ogu aritoorana; ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryakuha omugisha omu bi oriba oyerize byona, n'omu bi oriba okozire n'emikono yaawe byona; kandi oshemerererwe kimwe." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Buri mwaka abantu baawe boona abeetwa abashaija baryaguma bareebwe kashatu omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe omu mwanya ogu aritoorana-aha bugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, aha bugyenyi bwa saabiiti mushanju, n'aha bugyenyi bw'Ensiisira; kandi batarireebwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA engaro nsha;" 
Deuteronomy16:17 buri muntu aryaguma ahe nk'oku arikubaasa, nk'omugisha ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ariba amuhaire oku guri." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Oryataho abaramuzi n'abategyeki omu ndembo zaawe zoona ezi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha, nk'enganda zaawe oku ziri, bagume bacwere abantu emanja z'oburyo." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Otariita orubanja; otarishoroora omu bantu; kandi otarirya enguzi, ahakuba enguzi eita amaisho g'abanyabwengye, kandi eita emanja z'abahikiriire." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Eby'oburyo, eby'oburyo byonka, obe nibyo waakuratira, obone kugumaho, ohungure ensi, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Otaribyara ekiti kyona eky'omurinzi aha rubaju rw'eitambiro rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, eri orikora." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Kandi otaryebyarira enyomyo y'eibaare, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ayanga." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Otaritambira MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe enimi nari entaama, eine akamogo nari akacokore koona; ahabw'okuba ekyo ne'kihagaro ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Omuriimwe, omuri ibara rurembo aha ndembo zaanyu, ezi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha, ku harireebekamu omushaija nari omukazi orikukora ekirikwangwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, ekirikwita endagaano ye," 
Deuteronomy17:3 akaza kuheereza baaruhanga abandi, akabaramya, nari shi akaramya eizooba nari okwezi nari ekintu kyona eky'omu ihe ry'eby'omu iguru, eki ntarabaragiire;" 
Deuteronomy17:4 ku baribikugambira, waabihurira, oyezirikye kubibuuririza; ku orishanga biri eby'amazima, bitarikubanganisibwa, ku ekyo kihagaro kikoreirwe omuri Israeli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 muryashohoza ogwo mushaija nari ogwo mukazi okozire ekyo kihagaro, mumutware omu irembo ry'orurembo rwanyu, yaaba mushaija nari omukazi, mumuteere amabaare, afe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ow'okufa aryaitwa ahabwa baamushinja babiri nari bashatu; atariitwa ahabwa mushinja omwe. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Emikono ya baamushinja ebe niyo yaamubanza, bwanyima hateho ey'abandi boona. Ku muritwaza mutyo, muryaiha ekibi omuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Ku haribaho orubanja rwakurema, yaaba rw'obwitani bw'emiringo etari emwe, nari orw'entongane, nari orw'endwano, ebi barikufa omu marembo gaanyu, bwanyima oryaimuka, oze omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ariba atooraine," 
Deuteronomy17:9 ohikye aha Baleevi abanyamurwa, n'aha muramuzi oriba ariho omu biro ebyo, obeebuuzeho, babone kukumanyisa oku orubanja rushemereire kucuubwa;" 
Deuteronomy17:10 bwanyima oryatwaza nk'okucwa kwabo oku kuri, oku barikuhaburira omuri ogwo mwanya gu MUKAMA ariba atooraine, oteho omutima kukora byona ebi barikwegyesa." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Oryakora nk'ebi bariba bakuhabwire oku biri, kandi nk'okucwa oku bariba bakugambiire oku kuri; otariza aha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho, okateishuka aha rubanja nk'oku bariba bakuhabwire." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Kandi omuntu origira amaryo, akanga kuhurira omunyamurwa, oriba naayemerera okwo omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, nari omuramuzi, ogwo muntu aryaitwa, obone kwiha ekibi omuri Israeli." 
Deuteronomy17:13 N'abantu boona baryahurira, batiine, barekye kugaruka kugira amaryo." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Ku muriba mwahikire omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha, mwagikubuura, mwagituuramu, mwagira muti, Ka tweteereho omugabe atutegyekye, nk'amahanga goona agatwehinguririize oku gari," 
Deuteronomy17:15 buzimazima mutaribura kweteeraho omugabe ou MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aritoorana. Ou muritaho aryaba ow'omuri beene waanyu; mutaritaho omunyaihanga otari w'omuri beene waanyu. 
Deuteronomy17:16 Kwonka ataritunga embaraasi nyingi, n'obu kwakuba okugarura abantu omuri Misri, ngu abone kwetungirayo embaraasi nyingi; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akabagira ati: Mutarigaruka kutoora ogwo muhanda." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Kandi arekye kushwera abakazi baingi, omutima gwe gukahinduka gukaruga ahari MUKAMA; kandi ataryekanyisiza efeeza n'ezaabu nyingi." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Kandi ku ariheza kuza aha ngoma, aryayehandiikira ebiragiro ebi omu kitabo, naabiiha omu kitabo ky'Abaleevi abanyamurwa." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Ekyo kitabo agume nakyo, agume akishomemu ebiro byona ebi arimara akiriho, abone kwega kutiina MUKAMA Ruhanga we, n'okukwata ebigambo byona eby'ebiragiro n'ebyatairweho, n'okubyorobera," 
Deuteronomy17:20 omutima gwe gurekye kwehimbisiza ahari beene waabo, akateishuka aha biragiro, akatoora aha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho, haza obwo abone kuhangaarira omu bugabe bwe omuri Israeli, we n'oruzaaro rwe." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Abaleevi abanyamurwa nirwo ruganda rwona orwa Leevi, batarigira omugabo nari obuhunguzi omu Baisraeli, kureka baryaguma nibarya aha mpongano z'okwokibwa omu muriro, ezihongyeirwe MUKAMA, n'ebindi ebi bashemereire kuheebwa." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Batarigira obuhunguzi omuri beene waabo. MUKAMA niwe buhunguzi bwabo, nk'oku yaabagambiire." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Kandi ogwo nigwo mugabo gw'abanyamurwa ogushemereire kwihwa omu bantu; abarikutamba ebitambo, yaaba nte nari entaama, baryaguma nibaihiraho omunyamurwa ekivune ky'omukono, n'emishaya yombi, n'ekishansha." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Kandi omunyamurwa muryamuha aha miganuro y'ebi mwerize, engano zaanyu, na viinyo yaanyu, n'amajuta gaanyu ag'emizeituuni, kandi n'ebyoya by'okubanza eby'entaama zaanyu." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Ahakuba niwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaatooraine omu nganda zaanyu zoona, ngu ayemerere kuheereza omu iziina rya MUKAMA, we n'abatabani ebiro byona." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Kandi Omuleevi ku arifuruka omuri ibara rurembo aha ndembo zaanyu, ahu ariba atwire hoona omuri Israeli, yaaza omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA aritoorana akyekundiire," 
Deuteronomy18:7 nawe aryaikirizibwa kuheereza omu iziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga we, nka bagyenzi be boona Abaleevi, abeemerera okwo omu maisho ga MUKAMA, oku baheereza." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Aryatunga omugabo gw'eby'okurya ogurikwingana n'ey'abandi, otabariireho ebyarugire omu kutunda ebi ishe yaamuragire." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Ku murihika omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha, mutaritooreza emicwe y'amahanga ago erikwangwa." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Hatarigira omuntu weena omuriimwe owaarabya mutabani we nari muhara we omu muriro, nari owaaba omufumu, nari orikuragura ebiribaho, nari omuteezi w'ebyatsi, nari omucecezi," 
Deuteronomy18:11 nari omuhi w'engisha, nari orikubandwa emizimu, nari omurogi, nari orikubuuza abafu." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Ahakuba orikukora ebyo weena n'ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA, kandi ahabw'ebirikunugwa ebyo MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu nikyo arikubingira amahanga ago omu maisho gaanyu." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Mube abahikire omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu; 
Deuteronomy18:14 ahakuba amahanga ago, agu murikubuura, gata omutima aha barikuragura ebiribaho n'aha bafumu; kwonka imwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu takabaikirizaga kukora mutyo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aryabaimukiza nabi nkaanye, arugye omuriimwe omuri beene waanyu; ogwo niwe murihurira;" 
Deuteronomy18:16 buzima kiryaba nk'ebi mwashabire MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu byona, muri ahari Horebu aha izooba riri eri mwabaire muteeraine, nimugira muti: Nitukweshengyereza tutagaruka kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, n'obu kwakuba okureeba ogu muriro mwingi obundi, tutakaafa." 
Deuteronomy18:17 MUKAMA yangira ati: Ebi bagambire byona, bihikire." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndyabaimukiza nabi nkaiwe omuribo omuri beene waabo, nte ebigambo byangye omu kanwa ke, abagambire ebi ndimuragiira byona." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Kandi weena oryanga kuhurira ebigambo byangye ebi arigamba omu iziina ryangye, ndyakimutura." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Kwonka nabi oryetuma kugamba ekigambo omu iziina ryangye eki ntamuragiire kugamba, nari shi origamba omu iziina rya baaruhanga abandi, nabi ogwo aryafa." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Kandi ku muryebuuza omu mitima yaanyu muti: Nitubaasa tuta kumanya ekigambo eki MUKAMA atagambire? 
Deuteronomy18:22 Nabi ku arigamba omu iziina rya MUKAMA, eki yaagamba kitaabaho, nari kitaabakwo, biri ekigambo ekyo MUKAMA tiwe akigambire; kureka nabi ogwo niwe akyetumire; mutarimutiina." 
Deuteronomy19:1 MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ku ariheza kucwekyereza amahanga agu arikubaha ensi yaago, mwagakubuura, mwatuura omu ndembo zaabo n'omu maka gaabo," 
Deuteronomy19:2 muryayetooranira endembo ishatu omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kukubuura; 
Deuteronomy19:3 mweteereho emihanda, mubaganise ensi yaanyu ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha omu bicweka bishatu, oriita omuntu weena ahungireyo." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Ebi nibyo byatairweho ahabw'oriita omuntu, ngu ahungireyo, akire. Omuntu weena oriita omuntu, atamwitsire nkana, kandi ashangirwe atarikumwanga," 
Deuteronomy19:5 (nk'oku omuntu agyenda na mugyenzi we omu kibira kutiganda, akeereeza empango kutema ekiti, ekasyoka omu muhini, ekateera mugyenzi we ogwo, ekamwita), ahungire omuri rumwe ahari ezo ndembo, akire," 
Deuteronomy19:6 orikuhoorera kiitwa atarikurata kiita akiine ekiniga, akamukwatira omu muhanda ahabw'okuba hare, akamuteera, akamugwisaho; haza kunu yaaba atashemereire kwitwa, ahabw'okuba abaire atarikumwanga." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Nikyo ndikubaragiirira nti: Muryayetooranira endembo ishatu. 
Deuteronomy19:8 Kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ku arihangusya ensi yaanyu, nk'oku yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe, yaabaha ensi yoona ebi yaaraganiise baashwenkuriimwe kubaha," 
Deuteronomy19:9 kandi ku murigumizamu kukwata ebiragiro ebi byona ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba, okukunda MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu n'okugyendera omu mihanda ye ebiro byona, ahari ezo ndembo ishatu muryayongyeraho ezindi ishatu," 
Deuteronomy19:10 eshagama y'abataine rubanja erekye kusheesherwa omu nsi yaanyu, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kuba obuhunguzi, mukagiibwaho orubanja rwayo." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Kwonka omuntu ku ariba naayanga mugyenzi we, yaamugwera, yaamugurukira, yaamuteera munonga, yaafa; bwanyima yaahungira omuri rumwe ahari ezo ndembo," 
Deuteronomy19:12 abakuru b'orurembo rwe baryatuma, bamwiheyo, bamuheyo aha muhoozi w'enzigu, aitwe." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Amaisho gaanyu gatarimusaasira, kureka muryaiha omuri Israeli eshagama y'otaine rubanja, mubone kuba gye." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Otarikuura ekiti ky'omwatano gwa mutaahi waawe, ekyabyairwe aba ira omu buhunguzi obu oriheebwa omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Mushinja omwe atariikirizibwa kushinja omuntu eki ashobize nari ekibi kyona eki akozire; kureka okushinja kwa baamushinja babiri nari bashatu nikwo kurihamya ekigambo kyona. 
Deuteronomy19:16 Mushinja w'ebishuba ku ariimuka kushinja omuntu ekibi," 
Deuteronomy19:17 abarikutongana bombi baryayemerera omu maisho ga MUKAMA, omu maisho g'abanyamurwa n'abaramuzi abariba bariho omu biro ebyo;" 
Deuteronomy19:18 abaramuzi babuuririze munonga; mushinja ku ariba ari ow'ebishuba, abeihereire mugyenzi we," 
Deuteronomy19:19 mumugire nk'oku abaire naayenda kugira mugyenzi we; ku muritwaza mutyo, muryaiha ekibi omuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Abaritsigaraho baryabihurira, batiine; okuruga aho tibarigaruka kukorera omuriimwe ekibi nk'ekyo." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Amaisho gaanyu gatarigira esaasi; amagara garyaguma garihwe agandi, eriisho ririhwe erindi, eriino ririhwe erindi, engaro erihwe endiijo, n'ekigyere kirihwe ekindi." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Ku murihurura kurwanisa abazigu baanyu, mwareeba embaraasi n'ebigaari, n'engabo ezirikukira ezaanyu, mutaribatiina; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misri aryaba ari hamwe naimwe." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Kandi ku muriba muri haihi kurwana, omunyamurwa airire haihi abantu," 
Deuteronomy20:3 abagire ati: Muhurire, imwe Abaisraeli; eri izooba mwairira haihi abazigu baanyu kubarwanisa; emitima yaanyu etafoobeera; mutatiina, mutatetema, mutahahaaza emitima ahabwabo;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu niwe arikugyenda naimwe kubarwanira n'abazigu baanyu n'okubajuna. 
Deuteronomy20:5 N'abakuru b'engabo baryabuuza abantu bati: Omuriimwe harimu obaire ayombekire enju nsya, otakagyerize; ku araabe ariho, agarukyeyo, ataahe omuri egyo nju, atakaafeera omu rugamba, ekeezibwa ondiijo." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Hariho owaabyaire omusiri gw'emizaabibu, otakariire ha bijuma byagwo? Nawe agarukyeyo, ataahe omu ka ye, atakaafeera omu rugamba, ondiijo akabirya." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Hariho ogambire omukazi obugyenyi, otakamushweire? Nawe agarukyeyo, ataahe omu ka ye, atakaafeera omu rugamba, ondiijo akamushwera." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Kandi abakuru b'engabo baryagaruka babuuze abantu bati: Omuriimwe harimu omuntu ekinyabwoba, ow'omutima gufoobeire? Ogwo nawe agarukyeyo, ataahe omu ka ye, emitima ya beene waabo etakaahaha nk'ogwe." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Abo bakuru b'engabo ku bariheza kugambira abantu ebigambo ebyo, bateho abakuru b'amahe kwebembera abantu." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Ku murihika haihi n'orurembo kururwanisa, mubanze murugambire eby'obusingye." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Ku ruribagarukamu eby'obusingye, rwabaigurira, boona abu murishangamu baryabakorera emirimo y'obuhuuku, kandi babaheereze." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Kwonka ku ruryanga kuragaana naimwe eby'obusingye, kureka rwayenda kubarwanisa, muryarugota;" 
Deuteronomy20:13 MUKAMA ku ariruhayo omu mikono yaanyu, muryaita oyetwa omushaija weena na rurara;" 
Deuteronomy20:14 kwonka abakazi n'abaana bato, n'ebirurimu byona, n'amatungo, niyo minyago yaamwo yoona mubyetwarire; kandi muryarya ebi murinyaga aha bazigu baanyu, ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu abahaire." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Okwo nikwo muritwaza endembo zoona ezibari hare munonga, ezitari z'aga mahanga." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Kwonka omu ndembo ez'aga mahanga, ezi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kuba obuhunguzi, mutarigira ekintu kyona ekirikwitsya eki mwarokora;" 
Deuteronomy20:17 kureka muryabahwerekyerereza kimwe, Abahiiti, n'Abaamori, n'Abanyakanaani, n'Abaperizi, n'Abahiivi, n'Abayebusi, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaabaragiire," 
Deuteronomy20:18 nyentsya bataribeegyesa kutooreza ebihagaro byabo byona ebi baabaire nibakorera baaruhanga baabo, mukacumura ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Ku murimara omwanya muraingwa mugotsire orurembo nimururwanisa kurukwata, mutaritema emiti yaarwo n'empango, mukagiraza; ahabw'okuba obundi mukaabaasa kurya aha bijuma byayo; n'ahabw'ekyo mutarigitema. Nimugira ngu emiti y'omu ishwea nayo n'abantu, imwe okugigota?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Emiti ei murikumanya ngu teeyera bijuma ebirikuriibwa, egyo yonka niyo muritema, mukaraza, mukombekyesa eby'okwemereraho ahari orwo rurembo orurikubarwanisa, okuhitsya obu rurisingurwa." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kukubuura, omutumbi gw'omuntu oitsirwe ku gurishangwa omu ishwa, omwitsire atarikumanywa," 
Deuteronomy21:2 abakuru baanyu n'abaramuzi baryaija, bateere entambwe okuruga aha mutumbi gw'oitsirwe okuhika aha ndembo ezeehinguririizeho;" 
Deuteronomy21:3 abakuru b'orurembo oruri haihi n'ogwo mutumbi baryatwara enyana y'eruutsi etakakoresiibweho n'obu kwakuba okukurura ekintu kyona n'endiijo,"
