Deuteronomy21:4 bagishuumye omu ruhanga orurimu akagyera k'amaizi agarikugyenda, oruhanga orutahingirwe, kandi orutabibirwemu, bagihendere ebitsya omuri orwo ruhanga." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Abanyamurwa beene Leevi bairire haihi; ahakuba nibo MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaatooraine kumuheereza n'okushabira abantu omugisha omu iziina rya MUKAMA, kandi nibo bashemereire kucwa orubanja rw'empaka zoona n'orw'obuhuta bwona." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Bwanyima abakuru boona ab'orwo rurembo oruri haihi n'omutumbi gw'oitsirwe banaabire engaro zaabo ahari egyo nyana y'eruutsi, ei ebitsya byayo byahenderwa omuri orwo ruhanga;" 
Deuteronomy21:7 beehakane nibagira bati: Emikono yaitu tiyo eseesire egi shagama, kandi n'amaisho gaitu tigagireebire neesheesheka." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Ai MUKAMA, saasira abantu baawe Israeli, abu waacungwire, otata orubanja rw'eshagama y'otaine rubanja aha bantu baawe Israeli; kureka basaasirwe orubanja rw'egyo shagama." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Ku muritwaza mutyo, mwakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA, muryaiha omuriimwe orubanja rw'eshagama y'otaine rubanja." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Ku orihurura kurwanisa abazigu baawe, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe yaabahayo omu mikono yaawe, waabatwara bari enkwatwa," 
Deuteronomy21:11 waabareebamu omukazi murungi, waamurigira, waayenda kumushwera," 
Deuteronomy21:12 oryamutwara owaawe, amweise eishokye rye, acwe ebyara," 
Deuteronomy21:13 ajuure ebijwaro ebi akwatiirwemu, agume omu ka yaawe, amare okwezi kwona naaririra ishe na nyina; bwanyima obone kumushwera, obe iba, nawe abe omukazi waawe." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Bwanyima ku otarimusiima, omurekye agyende, aze ahi arikwenda; kwonka otarimutunda empiiha, kandi otarimutwaza nk'omuzaana, ahabw'okuba oryaba omusiisire." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Omushaija, ku ariba aine abakazi babiri, omwe ari enkundwakazi, n'ondi ari enyangwakazi, kandi bombi bamuzaariire abaana, enkundwakazi n'enyangwakazi; kandi omwana w'omwojo ow'okubanza ku ariba ari ow'enyangwakazi," 
Deuteronomy21:16 aha izooba eri ariragiraho abaana be ebi atungire, tariikirizibwa kuhindura omwana w'enkundwakazi kuba omwana we mukuru okukira ogwo ow'enyangwakazi owaabandize kuzaarwa;" 
Deuteronomy21:17 kureka aryaikiriza omwana w'enyangwakazi owaabandize kuzaarwa, ahabw'okumuraga emigabo ebiri y'ebi atungire; ahabw'okuba niwe maani ge ag'okuzaara gaatandikiireho; n'ebishemereire omwana w'okubanza n'ebye." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Omuntu ku ariba aine omwana w'omwojo empiga kandi omugomi, otarikuhurira ishe nari nyina, n'obu baakumuhana bata," 
Deuteronomy21:19 ishe na nyina baryamukwata, bamutwarire abakuru b'orurembo rwabo aha irembo ryarwo," 
Deuteronomy21:20 bagambire abakuru b'orwo rurembo bati: Ogu mwana waitu aba empiga kandi omugomi, tatuhurira; n'omunyamururu kandi omusinzi." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Abashaija boona ab'omu ruembo rwabo baryamuteera amabaare, afe. Ku muritwaza mutyo, muryaiha ekyo kibi omuriimwe; Abaisraeli boona baryakihurira, batiine." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Kandi omuntu ku arikora ekibi ekishemereire kumwitsa, bwanyima yaitwa, waamuhanika aha muti," 
Deuteronomy21:23 omutumbi gwe gutariguraaraho, kureka omuziikye eryo izooba; ahabw'okuba ohanikwa aha muti, aba akyeenirwe Ruhanga-orekye kushiisha ensi, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuba obuhunguzi." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Otarireeba ente nari entaama ya mwene waanyu neebura, okagyehuzya; buzimazima oryagigarurayo owa mwene waanyu." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Kandi mwene waanyu ku ariba akuri hare, nari ku oriba otarikumumanya, oryagitaasya omuka, ogume nayo, okuhitsya obu mwene waanyu arigisherura; bwanyima okagimugarurira." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Kandi n'endogoya ye oryagitwaza otyo, n'ekijwaro kye okitwaze otyo, kandi otwaze otyo n'ekindi kintu kyona ekya mwene waanyu, ekiriba kibuzire okakibona; otaribyehuzya." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Otarireeba endogoya ya mwene waanyu nari ente ye egwire aha muhanda, okagyehuzya; otaribura kumuhwera kugiimutsya." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Omukazi atarijwara kishaija; kandi n'omushaija atarijwara kikazi; ahakuba weena orikukora ebyo, n'ekihagaro ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Ku origwa aha kyashuri ky'enyonyi omu muti nari ahansi, kirimu ebyana nari amahuri, nyinabyo ebibumbatiire, otarigitwara nabyo;" 
Deuteronomy22:7 oryareka nyinabyo egyende, reero ebyana obitware, obone kuba gye, ohangaare." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Ku oryombeka enju nsya, ote aha mutwe gwayo eky'okuzibira abantu kugwa, kigyehinguririze, orekye kureetera enju yaawe orubanja rw'eshagama ahabw'omuntu kugihanukaho, akagwa ahansi." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Otaribiba omu musiri gwawe gw'emizaabibu embibo z'emiringo ebiri, okaakwa ebyeziremu byona, eby'ezo mbibo n'eby'emizaabiru." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Otarikomerana ente n'endogoya kukurura ekyoma ky'okuhingisa. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Otarijwara ekijwaro ekikozirwe omu byoya by'entaama n'ehuuzi za kitaani. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Oryaguma ote ebijwengye aha nshonda ina z'omukugiro gw'omunagiro, ogu orikujwara." 
Deuteronomy22:13 Omushaija ku arishwera omwishiki, yaabyama nawe, bwanyima yaamwanga," 
Deuteronomy22:14 yaamugambaho ebigambo ebirikumuhemura, yaashiisha eiziina rye naagira ati: Nshweire ogu mwishiki; ku mbyamire nawe, naashanga ataine bumanyiso bw'okutamanya mushaija;" 
Deuteronomy22:15 bwanyima ishe w'omwishiki na nyina baryatwara obumanyiso bwe bw'okutamanya mushaija, babuhitsye aha bakuru b'orurembo rwabo aha irembo ryarwo;" 
Deuteronomy22:16 ishe w'ogwo mwishiki agambire abakuru ati: Nkahingira ogu mushaija muhara wangye; mbwenu amwangire," 
Deuteronomy22:17 kandi yaamugambaho ebirikumuhemura, naagira ati: Nshangire muhara waawe ataine bumanyiso bw'okutamanya mushaija. Mbwenu obu nibwo bumanyiso bwa muhara wangye bw'okutamanya mushaija. Baryayara omwenda omu maisho g'abakuru b'orurembo." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Abakuru b'orwo rurembo bakwate ogwo mushaija, bamuteere;" 
Deuteronomy22:19 bamuhongyese shekeli z'efeeza igana, bazihe ishe w'omwishiki, nibamutura okushiisha eiziina ry'omwishiki Omwisraeli, agarukye abe omukazi we; atarimushenda ebiro byona ebi arimara omu nsi." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Kwonka ku kirishangwa kiri eky'amazima ngu ogwo mwishiki tarashangirwe na bumanyiso bw'okutamanya mushaija," 
Deuteronomy22:21 baryashohoza omwishiki aha muryango gw'enju ya ishe, abashaija b'omu rurembo rw'owaabo bamwitse amabaare, ahabw'okukora ekibi ky'obufamutima omuri Israeli, kuraayira omu ka ya ishe; ku muritwaza mutyo, muryaiha ekyo kibi omuri Israeli." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Omushaija ku arishangwa naashambana na muka omushaija, bombi baryaitwa, omushaija owaaba abyami n'omukazi, kandi n'ogwo mukazi; ku muritwaza mutyo, muryaiha ekyo kibi omuri Israeli." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Ku hariba hariho omwishiki, orikugambwa obugyenyi, omushaija yaamushanga omu rurembo, yaabyama nawe," 
Deuteronomy22:24 bombi muryabashohoza aha irembo ry'orwo rurembo, mubaitse amabaare; omwishiki mumwite ahabw'okutateera nduuru, haza ari omu rurembo; n'omushaija mumwite ahabw'okushiisha omukazi wa mutaahi we; ku muritwaza mutyo, muryaiha ekyo kibi omuri Israeli." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Kwonka omushaija ku arishanga omwishiki orikugambwa obugyenyi omu ishwa, yaamuhamba, yaabyama nawe, obwo ogwo mushaija obyamire nawe niwe ariitwa wenka;" 
Deuteronomy22:26 kwonka omwishiki mutarigira eki mwamukora; aryaba ataine rubanja orushemereire kumwitsa; nimumanya ngu orubanja orwo ni nk'orw'omuntu ogurukaine mutaahi we, akamwita;" 
Deuteronomy22:27 ahakuba omushaija aryaba amushangire omu ishwa; ogwo mwishiki orikugambwa obugyenyi, n'obu yaakuteire enduuru, tihaine waakumujunire." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Omushaija ku arishanga omwishiki otakagambirwe bugyenyi, yaamuhamba, yaabyama nawe, kandi baakwatwa;" 
Deuteronomy22:29 ogwo mushaija obyamire nawe aryariha ishe w'omwishiki shekeli z'efeeza makumi ataano, bwanyima abe omukazi we, ahabw'okuba amusiisire; kandi atarimushenda ebiro byona ebi ariba akiriho." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Omushaija atarishwera muka ishe, akajweka ishe busha." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Oyatikire amagosi, nari oshazirweho obushaija atariza omu kuteerana kw'abantu ba MUKAMA." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Ekinyandaaro kitariza omu kuteerana kw'abantu ba MUKAMA; hatarigira ow'omu ruzaaro rwakyo owaaza omu kuteerana kw'abantu ba MUKAMA okuhitsya aha ruzaaro rwakyo rw'omwijukuru wa ikumi. 
Deuteronomy23:3 Omuamoni nari Omumoabu atariza omu kuteerana kw'abantu ba MUKAMA; hatarigira ow'omu ruzaaro rwabo owaaza omu kuteerana kw'abantu ba MUKAMA ebiro byona okuhitsya aha ruzaaro rwabo rw'omwijukuru wa ikumi; 
Deuteronomy23:4 ahabw'okuba tibarababuganiise by'okurya n'amaizi omu muhanda nimuruga Misri, n'ahabw'okugurira Balamu mwene Beori owa Pesori wa Mesopotamia, ngu abakyeene." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Kwonka MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaayanga kuhurira Balamu, kureka MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu omukyeeno yaaguhindura omugisha ahariimwe, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu akabakunda." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Mutaribatengyera obusingye n'obu kwakuba okuba gye ebiro byanyu byona. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Mutaryangira kimwe Abanyaedomu, ahabw'okuba ni beene waanyu; mutaryangira kimwe Abanyamisri, ahabw'okuba mukaba muri abanyaihanga omu nsi yaabo." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Oruzaaro rwabo orw'abaana ba baijukuru baabo baryaikirizibwa kuza omu kuteerana kw'abantu ba MUKAMA. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Ku murihurura kurwanisa abazigu baanyu, mwateera orusiisira, muryaguma mwerinde ekintu kyona ekibi." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Omuriimwe ku harireebekamu omuntu otashemeire ahabw'ekiriba kimubaireho nyekiro, ashohore aarugye omu rusiisira, arekye kurugarukamu;" 
Deuteronomy23:11 kwonka ku burihika omu mwabazyo, ayogye omu maizi; kandi eizooba ku ririheza kurenga, agarukye omu rusiisira." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Kandi muryagira omwanya aheeru y'orusiisira ahu muriguma nimushohorera; 
Deuteronomy23:13 omu by'okurwanisa byanyu muryagiramu ekihosho; omuntu ku arishohora kuza aha ishaazi, akitimbise ekiina; yaaza kurugaho, ashwekye ahi yaaruga;" 
Deuteronomy23:14 ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe agyendagyenda omu rusiisira rwanyu, okubajuna n'okuhayo abazigu baanyu omu maisho gaanyu; n'ahabw'ekyo orusiisira rwanyu rushemereire kuba orurikwera; MUKAMA arekye kureeba omuriimwe ekintu kyona ekitashemeire, akahinduka akabarugaho." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Omuhuuku owaacwire kuruga ahari mukama we, akakwehongyera, otarimumugarurira;" 
Deuteronomy23:16 aryaguma naiwe, atuure omuriimwe omu mwanya ogu aritoorana omuri rumwe aha ndembo zaanyu, ahu arisiima hoona; otarimwita kubi." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Hatarigira owaaba maraaya omuri bahara b'Abaisraeli, kandi hatarigira owaaba ekitingwa omuri batabani baabo." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Otarireeta omu nju ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ekiconco kya maraaya nari eky'ekitingwa, kuhikiiriza eki waaraganiise noorahira kuha MUKAMA; ahabw'okuba ebyo n'ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ayangira kimwe." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Otariguza mwene waanyu, ngu akutemu ekiteebwamu, ekiteebwamu aha mpiiha, aha by'okurya, nari aha kindi kintu kyona ekiguzibwa kwihamu ekiteebwamu." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Kwonka omunyaihanga noikirizibwa kumuguza ahabw'ekiteebwamu; beitu mwene waanyu otarimuguza ahabw'enshaagi, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe abone kukuha omugisha omuri byona ebi orikora n'emikono yaawe omu nsi ei orikuza kuhungura." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Ku origira eki waaraganisa MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe noorahira, otaryeganda kukihikiiriza; ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe taribura kukikubuuza, kikakurugiramu ekibi." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Kwonka ku oriba otakiraganiise, tikirikurugiramu kibi." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Oryataho omutima kuhikiiriza ekirugire omu kanwa kaawe, ahakuba eki waaraganiise MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe n'akanwa kaawe, okakiraganisa oyekundiire." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Ku oriza omu musiri gwa mutaahi waawe gw'emizaabibu, noikirizibwa kurya ebijuma by'emizaabibu nk'oku orikwenda, okahaaga; kwonka otarigira ebi waashoromera omu kintu eki oine." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Kandi ku oriza omu ngano za mutaahi waawe, noikirizibwa kucwa obushiisha n'engaro, kwonka otarigyeshesa omusyo engano ze." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Omushaija ku aritwara omukazi, yaamushwera, bwanyima ataamusiima ahabw'okureeba aine emicwe mibi, naikirizibwa kuhandiika ebaruha y'okumushenda, agimukwatse, amubingye omu nju ye." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Ogwo mukazi ku araarugye omuri egyo nju, naikirizibwa kushwerwa ondiijo mushaija." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Kwonka ogwo mushaija owaaba amushweire bushumbakazi nawe ku araamwangye, yaahandiika ebaruha y'okumushenda, yaagimukwatsa, yaamubinga omu nju ye, nari shi yaafa," 
Deuteronomy24:4 omushaija we ow'okubanza owaamubingire tariikirizibwa kumugarura akaba omukazi we, yaaherize kusiisikara atyo; ahabw'okuba ekyo n'ekihagaro omu maisho ga MUKAMA, kandi mutarireeta orubanja aha nsi, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kuba obuhunguzi." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Omushaija ku arishwera omukazi, atarihurura n'abandi aha rugamba, n'obu kwakuba okukoresibwa omurimo gwona; kureka aryamara omwaka gwona ari omuka, naashemererwa n'omukazi we, ou ashweire." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Hatarigira owaakwatirizibwa orubengo nari eseiso, ahakuba naaba akwatiriziibwe amagara ga mukama waabyo." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Omuntu ku arishangwa aine ou yaibire weena omuri beene waabo Abaisraeli, naamutwaza nk'omuhuuku, nari yaamutunda, ogwo mushuma aryaitwa; ku muritwaza mutyo, muryaiha ekyo kibi omuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Ku oriba waakwatsirwe ebibembe, oyerinde, oteho omutima okore ebi abanyamurwa Abaleevi barikuhabura byona; nk'oku naabaragiire, naimwe mube nikwo mwakora." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Mwijukye oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaagizire Miriamu, muri omu rugyendo nimuruga Misri." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Ku origuza mutaahi waawe, nari waamutiiza ekintu kyona, otariza omu nju ye kwihamu eky'okukukwatiriza;" 
Deuteronomy24:11 kureka oryayemerera aheeru; ou ogurize abe niwe yaakureetera eky'okukukwatiriza. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Kandi ku ariba ari omworo, otariraazayo eki akukwatiriize;" 
Deuteronomy24:13 otaribura kukimugarurira, eizooba nirirengarenga, abone kuraara omu kijwaro kye, akushabire omugisha; ekyo kiryakurugiramu okuhikiirira omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Otariita kubi omupakasi, oriba ari omworo nari omukyene, yaaba w'omuri beene waanyu, nari ow'omu banyamahanga oriba atwire omu rurembo rwona aha ndembo z'omu nsi yaanyu;" 
Deuteronomy24:15 oryaguma omuhe ebihembo bye ebi yaakorera, eizooba ritarirenga otakabimuhaire, nyentsya atakaatakira MUKAMA naakutabaariza, haza kikakurugiramu ekibi; ahabw'okuba n'omworo, kandi ebihembo bye nibyo ataireho omutima." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Baishe b'abaana batariitwa nibaturwa abaana baabo; kandi n'abaana batariitwa nibaturwa baishebo; kureka omuntu weena aryaitwa ahabw'ekibi kye. 
Deuteronomy24:17 Otariita orubanja rw'omunyaihanga, nari orw'efuuzi; kandi otarikwatirizibwa ekijwaro ky'omufaakazi;" 
Deuteronomy24:18 kureka oryaguma oijukye ku waabaire ori omuhuuku omuri Misri, kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ku yaakucungwire, akakwihayo; nikyo ndikukuzibirira kutwaza otyo." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Ku orishaaruura omusiri gwawe, waayebwayo ekiba, otarigarukayo kukiihayo; kiryaba eky'omunyaihanga n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe abone kukuha omugisha omu bi orikukora n'emikono yaawe byona." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Ku oriteera omuti gwawe gw'omuzeituuni kwihamu ebijuma, otarigaruka omu mataagi gaagwo; ebiritsigaramu biryaba eby'omunyaihanga n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Kandi ku orishoroma ebijuma by'emizaabibu yaawe, otarigarukamu kuhumba; ebiritsigaramu bibe eby'omunyaihanga n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Oryaguma oijukye ku waabaire ori omuhuuku omu nsi Misri; nikyo ndikukuragiirira kutwaza otyo. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Abantu ku bariba baine eki barikutongana, baija kucwerwa orubanja, abaramuzi baarubacwera, baryaiha orubanja aha muntu otarwine, barusingise okozire kubi;" 
Deuteronomy25:2 kandi ogwo muntu okozire kubi ku ariba ashemereire kuteerwa, omuramuzi aryaragiira bamurambikye omu maisho ge, bamuteere kiboko ezishemereire ekibi kye." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Naikirizibwa kumuteera kiboko makumi ana, kwonka atarizirenzya; ahakuba ku arigumizamu kumuteera, yaayeshumbya ahari ezo, aryaba amumaziremu ak'obuntu, haza ari mwene waanyu." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Otariboha akanwa k'ente neejunga oburo. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Abashaija enyine-emwe ku bariba batwire hamwe, omwe yaafa atazaire mwana w'omwojo, omukazi wa nyakufa atarishwerwa otari w'omu ruganda rwa iba; murumuna wa iba niwe arimuhungura, akamushwera, akamukorera ebi muramu w'omuntu akorera muka mukuru we." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Kandi omwojo ou aribanza kuzaara aryahungurira nyakufa, ayetwe eiziina rye, rirekye kweba omuri Israeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Kwonka ogwo mushaija ku ariba atarikwenda kuhungura muka mukuru we, ogwo mukazi aryaza aha bakuru omu irembo ry'orurembo, abagira ati: Muramu wangye ayangire kugaruraho eiziina rya mukuru we omuri Israeli; tarikwenda kunkorera ebi muramu w'omuntu akorera muka mukuru we." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Abakuru b'orurembo rwabo bamwete, bagambe nawe; ku ariguma ayangire, yaagira ati: Tindikwenda kumuhungura," 
Deuteronomy25:9 ogwo mukazi muramu we amuhikye haihi omu maisho g'abakuru, amujuure enkaito, amucwere amacwante omu maisho, amugire ati: Omuntu weena oryanga kwombeka eka ya mukuru we, akorwe atyo." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Eiziina ry'eka ye omuri Israeli riryayetwa, Eka y'owaajwirwe enkaito." 
Deuteronomy25:11 Abashaija ku barirwana, omukazi w'omwe aharibo yaaza kujuna iba orikumuteera, yaatayo omukono, yaakwata kiteera iba eifo," 
Deuteronomy25:12 ogwo mukazi oryamucwaho engaro; eriisho ryawe ritarimusaasira. 
Deuteronomy25:13 Omu nshaho yaawe otaritwaramu amabaare g'okurengyesa oburemeezi bumwe, haza kunu nigakiraakirana;" 
Deuteronomy25:14 n'omu nju yaawe otarigiramu endengo z'okurengyesa obwingi bumwe, haza kunu nizikiraakirana." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Kureka oryagira amabaare gahikire kandi agarikwinganira kimwe; kandi n'endengo ezihikire kandi ezirikwinganira kimwe nizo origira, obone kuhangaarira omu nsi ei MUKAMA waawe arikukuha;" 
Deuteronomy25:16 ahabw'okuba boona abakora nk'ebyo, boona abakora eby'okutahikiirira, abo n'ebirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Mwijukye oku Abaamaleki baabagizire nimuruga Misri," 
Deuteronomy25:18 oku baababugaine omu muhanda, bakashanga muruhire, mugwire enshazi, bakaita abantu baanyu abaabaire bataine maani, batsigaire enyima; kandi tibaratiinire Ruhanga." 
Deuteronomy25:19 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ku ariheza kubahuumuza engamba z'abazigu baanyu ababeehinguririize omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kukubuura kuba obuhunguzi bwanyu, muryamariraho kimwe eiziina ry'Abaamaleki, rirekye kwijukwa ahansi y'eiguru; mutarikyebwa." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Ku oriba waahikire omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuba obuhunguzi, waagikubuura, waagituuramu," 
Deuteronomy26:2 oryatwara emiganuro y'ebi oyerize omu misiri yaawe byona, ebi orishaaruura omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha, obite omu kiibo, obitware omu mwanya ogu MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aritoorana kugumyamu eiziina rye," 
Deuteronomy26:3 ohikye aha munyamurwa oriba ariho omu biro ebyo, omugire oti: Eri izooba nimpamya omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, ku mpikire omu nsi ei MUKAMA yaarahiire naaraganisa baatatenkuriitwe kugituha." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Ogwo munyamurwa akwakiire ekyo kiibo, akite ahansi omu maisho g'eitambiro rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Naiwe oryagarukamu ogambire omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, oti: Tatenkuru akaba ari Omuaramu, ari haihi kufa; bwanyima yaashuuma Misri n'abantu bakye, baashuhuukirayo; yaahindukirayo eihanga rikuru, ry'amaani, kandi ery'abantu baingi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Abanyamisri baatwita kubi, baatubonabonesa, baatukoresa emirimo y'obuhuuku." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Twatakira MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe, yaatuhurira, yaareeba okubonabona kwaitu, n'okufa kubi kwaitu n'okuhatwa kwaitu;" 
Deuteronomy26:8 bwanyima MUKAMA yaatwiha omuri Misri n'omukono gw'amaani kandi ogubangire, n'ebirikutiinisa munonga, n'obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza;" 
Deuteronomy26:9 yaatureeta omu mwanya ogu, yaatuha egi nsi y'amate n'obwoki." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Mbwenu MUKAMA, reeba ndeetsire emiganuro y'ebyezire omu misiri ei wampaire. Bwanyima okite ahansi omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, oramize omu maisho ge," 
Deuteronomy26:11 oshemerererwe ebirungi byona ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akuhaire n'eka yaawe, iwe n'Omuleevi n'omunyaihanga, abatwire naimwe." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Ku oriheza kwiha kimwe kya ikumi ahari byona ebi oyerize omu mwaka gwa kashatu nigwo mwaka gw'okuheeramu kimwe kya ikumi, bwanyima okihe Omuleevi n'omunyaihanga n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi, kuriira owaawe, bahaagye;" 
Deuteronomy26:13 kandi ogambire omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe oti: Nyihire omu ka yangye ebintu ebishoroirwe, naabiha Omuleevi, omunyaihanga, efuuzi, n'omufaakazi, nk'ebiragiro byawe byona ebi wandagiire oku biri; omu biragiro byawe byona tihaine ki nshobize, nari eki nyebirwe." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Tindabiriireho ndi omu rufu; tihariho bi naihireho nsiisikaire; kandi tihariho bi naagaburiire emizimu y'abafiire; kureka nkahurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, naakora ebi wandagiire byona." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Naga amaisho ahansi nooyema omu iguru, omu mwanya gwawe ogurikwera, ohe abantu baawe Israeli omugisha, kandi n'ensi ei waatuhaire ogihe omugisha, ensi y'amate n'eobwoki, nk'oku waarahiire nooraganisa baatatenkuriitwe." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Eri izooba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu naabaragiira kworoberar ebiragiro ebi ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe; n'ahabw'ekyo muryaguma muteho omutima kubyorobera n'omutima gwanyu gwona n'amagara gaanyu goona. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Eri izooba mwagamba nimuhamya ku MUKAMA ari Ruhanga waanyu, kandi ku murikwija kugyendera omu mihanda ye, n'okukwata ebiragiro bye n'ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, kandi n'okuhurira eiraka rye." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Kandi eri izooba MUKAMA yaagamba naahamya ku muri eihanga rye eri yaayetooraniire, nk'oku yaabaraganiise, kandi ku muriguma nimworobera ebiragiro bye," 
Deuteronomy26:19 n'oku aribatunguura okukira agandi mahanga goona agu yaahangire, mukagakiza okusiimwa n'okurangaanwa n'ekitiinisa, naimwe mube abantu abeereziibwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, nk'oku yaagambire." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Musa n'abakuru b'Abaisraeli baaragiira abantu nibagira bati: Mukwate ebiragiro byona ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba. 
Deuteronomy27:2 Kandi aha izooba eri muryambukiraho Yorudani kutaaha omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha, muryabyara amabaare mahango, mugasiigye einoni," 
Deuteronomy27:3 mugahandiikyeho ebigambo byona eby'ebiragiro ebi, ku muriheza kwambuka n'okutaaha omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha, ensi y'amate n'obwoki, nka MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe, oku yaabaraganiise." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Ku muriheza kwambuka Yorudani, ago mabaare agu naabaragiira eri izooba, muryagabyara aha rushozi Ebali, mugasiigye einoni." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Kandi okwo niyo muryombekyera MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu eitambiro ry'amabaare; mutarigabaizisa ekyoma kyona. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Eryo itambiro rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu muryaryombekyesa amabaare agatabaizire; kandi muritambirireho MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ebitambo by'okwotsya; 
Deuteronomy27:7 kandi muhongye empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, muriireyo; mushemerererwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Kandi muryahandiika ahari ago mabaare ebigambo byona eby'ebi biragiro, bihwezibwe gye." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Musa n'abanyamurwa Abaleevi baagambira Abaisraeli boona bati: Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, muhuname, muhurire. Eri izooba mwahinduka eihanga rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Nikyo mushemerereire kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, mukoorobera ebiragiro bye n'ebyatairweho, ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Musa yaayehanangiriza abantu eryo izooba, naagira ati:" 
Deuteronomy27:12 Ku muriheza kwambuka Yorudani, aba nibo baryemerera aha rushozi Gerizimu okushabira abantu omugisha; ab'oruganda rwa Simeoni, orwa Leevi, orwa Yuda, orwa Isakaari, orwa Yosefu n'orwa Benyamiini;" 
Deuteronomy27:13 kandi aba nibo baryemerera aha rushozi Ebali ahabw'okukyeena; ab'oruganda rwa Reubeeni, orwa Gaadi, orwa Asheri, orwa Zebuluuni, orwa Daani n'orwa Nafutaali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Kandi Abaleevi baryagambira Abaisraeli boona n'eiraka rihango, nibagira bati:" 
Deuteronomy27:15 Omuntu orikora ekishushani ekibaizire nari ekiheesirwe, eki MUKAMA ayangira kimwe, ekikozirwe omunyamwoga, akakyemereza bwesherekye, akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Orikugaya ishe nari nyina akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina. 
Deuteronomy27:17 Orikwirizayo ekiti ky'omwatano gwa mutaahi we akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina. 
Deuteronomy27:18 Orikuhabya empumi, akagiiha omu muhanda akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina." 
Deuteronomy27:19 Orikwita orubanja rw'omunyaihanga, orw'efuuzi n'orw'omufaakazi akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina." 
Deuteronomy27:20 Orikubyama na muka ishe akyeenwe, ahabw'okuba naaba ajwekire ishe busha. Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina." 
Deuteronomy27:21 Orikubyama n'enyamaishwa yoona akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina. 
Deuteronomy27:22 Orikubyama na munyaanya owa ishe nari owa nyina akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina. 
Deuteronomy27:23 Orikubyama na nyina-zaara akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina. 
Deuteronomy27:24 Orikwita mutaahi we bwesherekye akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina. 
Deuteronomy27:25 Orikurya enguzi kwita otaine rubanja akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina. 
Deuteronomy27:26 Otarikuhamya bigambo by'ebiragiro ebi omu kubikora akyeenwe! Abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Amiina. 
Deuteronomy28:1 Ku oryezirika kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, waataho omutima kworobera ebiragiro bye byona ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryakutunguura okukira amahanga goona ag'omu nsi;" 
Deuteronomy28:2 kandi ku oryorobera eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, emigisha egi yoona eryaija ekuhikyeho." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Oryagira omugisha omu rurembo, kandi ogugire n'omu misiri." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Oryagira omugisha omu ruzaaro rwawe, n'omu bi oyerize omu misiri yaawe, n'omu by'amatungo gaawe, okukanya kw'ente zaawe n'okuzaara kw'amasyo gaawe g'embuzi n'ag'entaama." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Omugisha gube aha kitenga kyawe n'aha nyungu yaawe egoya. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Oryagira omugisha omu magyenda n'omu magaruka. 
Deuteronomy28:7 MUKAMA aryareetera abazigu baawe abariimuka kukurwanisa kukuhunga; baryareetwa omuhanda gumwe baizire kukurwanisa; omu kukuhunga bagabe ebirari mushanju. 
Deuteronomy28:8 MUKAMA aryaragiira omugisha gukwijeho, guze omu bitara byawe n'ahari byona ebi orikora n'emikono yaawe; kandi akuheere omugisha omu nsi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuha." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Ku orikwata ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, waagyendera omu mihanda ye, aryakuhamya obe eihanga eririkwera eri yaayetooraniire, nk'oku yaarahiire naakuraganisa." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Kandi amahanga goona ag'omu nsi garyareeba ku oyetereirwe eiziina rya MUKAMA, gakutiine." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Kandi MUKAMA aryakutungisa, ogogyerere omu ruzaaro rwawe n'omu by'amatungo gaawe n'omu bi oryeza omu misiri yaawe omu nsi, ei MUKAMA yaaraganiise baashwenkuru naarahira kugikuha." 
Deuteronomy28:12 MUKAMA aryakwigurira eibiikiro rye erirungi, niryo iguru, agwisize ensi yaawe enjura omu bunaku bwayo, ahe omugisha ebi orikora n'emikono yaawe byona; oryaguza amahanga maingi, kwonka iwe torigeeguzaho." 
Deuteronomy28:13 MUKAMA aryakuhindura omutwe, ti mukira; oryaguma nootunguuka, torigaruka hansi, ku oryorobera ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, waataho omutima kubikwata;" 
Deuteronomy28:14 otaateishuka kureka ekigambo na kimwe ahari ebyo ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, okatoora aha mukono gwa buryo nari aha gwa bumosho, okukuratira baaruhanga abandi kubaheereza." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Kwonka ku oryanga kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, otaataho mutima kworobera ebiragiro bye byona n'ebyatairweho, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, egi mikyeeno yoona eryaija, ekuhikyeho." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Oryaba okyeenirwe omu rurembo, kandi n'omu misiri." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Omukyeeno gube aha kitenga kyawe n'aha nyungu yaawe egoya. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Oryaba okyeenirwe omu ruzaaro rwawe, n'omu bi oyerize omu misiri yaawe, n'omu kukanya kw'ente zaawe, n'okuzaara kw'amasyo gaawe g'entaama n'ag'embuzi." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Oryaba okyeenirwe omu magyenda n'omu magaruka. 
Deuteronomy28:20 MUKAMA aryakwoherereza omukyeeno, omunyangararo, n'okuburaaburirwa omuri byona ebi orikwenda kukora, okuhitsya obu orihwerekyerera, okarahuka kuhwaho, naakutura ebibi ebi oriba okozire omu kumwimuura." 
Deuteronomy28:21 MUKAMA aryakureetera orufu rukugumeho, okuhitsya obu arikumaraho omu nsi ei orikuza kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy28:22 MUKAMA aryakurwaza omunywengyerero n'omushwija n'obuzimba oburikuhurura n'okubabiirirwa, kandi akwitse omushana, n'okubabuka n'okusya-nyamwenga omu bi ohingire; biryakukurata okuhitsya obu orihwerekyerera." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Eiguru eriri ahaiguru yaawe riryaba nk'emiringa, kandi eitaka eri oyemereireho ribe nk'ekyoma." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Omu mwanya gw'okugwisa enjura omu nsi yaawe, MUKAMA aryagwisa omucuucu n'omusheenyi; biryaruga omu iguru, bikugweho okuhitsya obu orihwerekyerera." 
Deuteronomy28:25 MUKAMA aryabareetera okubingwa abazigu baanyu; muryatoora omuhanda gumwe, mwizire kubarwanisa; omu kubahunga mugabe ebirari mushanju; muryatwarwa oku n'oku omu bugabe bwona obw'omu nsi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Emitumbi yaanyu eryariibwa amahungu goona ag'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu nsi, zibure kubinga." 
Deuteronomy28:27 MUKAMA aryabarwaza ebihuute bya Misri n'ebishebe n'efumbi n'obuhere ebi mutarikira. 
Deuteronomy28:28 MUKAMA aryakugwisa eiraro, akuhumye, akuhunguture omutima." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Oryagyenda noobandagira nyomushana, nk'oku empumi egyenda neebandagira omu mwirima; torigira mugisha omu bi orikora byona; oryaguma oitwe kubi, kandi onyagwe obutoosha, obure kijuna." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Oryagamba omwishiki obugyenyi, ondiijo abyame nawe; oryayombeka enju, torigitaahamu; oryabyara emizaabibu, obure kurya ebijuma byayo." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Ente yaawe eryakubaagirwa omumaisho, torigiryaho. Endogoya yaawe eryanyagisibwa amaani noogireeba, torigigarurirwa. Entaama zaawe baryaziha abazigu baawe, obure owaakuha emikono." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Batabani baawe na bahara baawe baryaheebwa ab'erindi ihanga; obakuratse amaisho, gagwe omu nkiro ahabw'obusaasi eizooba ryona; haza iwe obure obushoboorozi bw'okukizibira." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Emyaka y'omu misiri yaawe n'ebi waahendekyeire byona biryariibwa eihanga eri otarikumanya; oryaba ow'okwitwa kubi kwonka, ogume noohondagurwa;" 
Deuteronomy28:34 ekirirugamu ogwisibwe eiraro ebi amaisho gaawe garireeba. 
Deuteronomy28:35 MUKAMA aryabarwaza ebihuute ebirikuhurura munonga, ebitarikutambwa, aha maju n'aha maguru, okwiha aha mara g'ebigyere okuhitsya aha kazingiro k'eishokye." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Imwe n'omugabe waanyu ou muriba mwemekire, MUKAMA aryabatwara omu ihanga eri mutakamanyaga n'obu baakuba baashwenkuriimwe; muheererezeyo baaruhanga abandi ab'ebiti n'ab'amabaare." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Muryahinduka eky'okutangaarira, eky'okucweraho enfumu n'eky'okugaaniiza omu mahanga goona agu MUKAMA aribatwaramu." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Muryabiba embibo nyingi, mushaaruure bikye; ahabw'okuba biryariibwa enzigye." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Muryabyara emizaabibu, mugihingirire, kwonka timurinywa hari viinyo yaayo, n'obu kwakuba okushoroma ebijuma byayo; ahabw'okuba eryariibwa obukooko." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Muryagira emizeituuni omu nsi yaanyu yoona, kwonka timuryesiiga amajuta gaayo; ahakuba emizeituuni yaanyu eryaragaza ebijuma byayo bitakeezire." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Muryazaara aboojo n'abaishiki; kwonka tibariba baanyu, ahabw'okuba baryatwarwa omu bunyagwa." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Emiti yaanyu yoona n'emyaka y'omu misiri yaanyu biryaba eby'enzigye. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Abanyamahanga abariba bari omuriimwe baryaguma nibeeyongyera kutunguuka, babakire, haza imwe mugume nimweyongyera kugaruka ahansi." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Baryabaguza, kwonka imwe timuribaguza; baryaba omutwe, haza imwe mube omukira." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Emikyeeno egyo yoona eryabaizira, egume ebahiigye, ebahikyeho okuhitsya obu murihwerekyerera, ahabw'okuba muryaba mwangire kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, okukwata ebiragiro bye n'ebyatairweho, ebi yaabaragiire;" 
Deuteronomy28:46 kandi egyo mikyeeno eryabahikaho, imwe na baijukuru baanyu, kuba akamanyiso n'eky'okutangaaza ebiro byona." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Ahabw'okuba mukanga kuheereza MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu n'omutima ogurikwesiima kandi ogushemereirwe, nimusiima Ruhanga ahabw'ebintu byona ebi yaabakanyisiize, bikashaagirirana;" 
Deuteronomy28:48 nikyo muriheerereza abazigu baanyu, abu MUKAMA aryohereza kubarwanisa, mwine enjara n'eiriho, mutaine ky'okujwara, kandi mukyenire ebintu byona; kandi aryabata enkomo y'ekyoma omu bitsya, okuhitsya obu aribahwerekyereza." 
Deuteronomy28:49 MUKAMA aryabareetera eihanga rya hare, ariihe aha muheru gw'ensi, riije nirirahuka nk'empungu, eihanga eri oriba otarikumanya rurimi rwaryo," 
Deuteronomy28:50 eriine ahamaisho harikutiinisa, eritaryeta ha bagurusi, n'obu kwakuba okusaasira abaana;" 
Deuteronomy28:51 baryarya ebi amatungo gaanyu garizaara, n'ebi emisiri yaanyu eryeza, okuhitsya obu murihwerekyerera. Kandi tibaribatsigira ngano yoona, nari viinyo, nari amajuta, nari okukanya kw'ente zaanyu, n'obu kwakuba okuzaara kw'amasyo g'entaama zaanyu n'ag'embuzi, okuhitsya obu baribahwerekyereza." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Kandi baryabagotera omu ndembo zaanyu zoona, okuhitsya obu engo zaanyu z'amabaare ndaingwa kandi ezigumire, ezi mwabaire nimwesiga omu nsi yaanyu yoona, zirikumbagara; baryabagotera omu ndembo zaanyu zoona omu nsi yaanyu yoona ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu abahaire." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Kandi muryarya abaana baanyu abu mwezaariire, enyama ya batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu, abu MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ariba abahaire, ahabw'okugotwa n'okutagira bwehigiro, oku abazigu bariba babafundize." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Kandi omushaija omutetsi kandi omwegiragye aryagira eriisho ribi aha murumuna, aha mukazi we w'aha mukono, n'aha mwana we ou ariba atsigaize," 
Deuteronomy28:55 arekye kuha n'omwe aharibo aha nyama z'abaana be abu ariba naarya; ahabw'okuba aryaba atakiine ki atsigaize ahabw'okugotwa n'okubura obwehigiro, oku abazigu baanyu bariba babafundize omu ndembo zaanyu zoona." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Kandi n'omukazi, oriba ari omuriimwe, omutetsi kandi omwegiragye, owaabaire atenda kigyere kye kuhika ahansi ahabw'obutetsi n'obwegiragye, nawe aryagira eriisho ribi ahari iba, aha mutabani n'ahari muhara we," 
Deuteronomy28:57 abaime ekyanyima ekiriba kimuri omu maguru, n'abaana abu ariba azaire; ahabw'okuba aryabarya bwesherekye ahabw'okukyena ebintu byona, ahabw'okugotwa n'okubura obwehigiro oku abazigu baanyu bariba babafundize omu ndembo zaanyu zoona." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Ku muriba mutataireho mutima kuhurira ebigambo by'ebiragiro ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo eki, mukatiina eiziina eri ery'ekitiinisa kandi eririkutiinisa, MUKAMA RUHANGA WAAWE;" 
Deuteronomy28:59 MUKAMA aryabareetera, imwe na baijukuru baanyu, okubonabonesibwa okutakareebwaga, okurimara omwanya muhango, n'endwara ezirikusaasa, zibabeho akarande;" 
Deuteronomy28:60 kandi abagarureho endwara zoona eza Misri, ezi mwabaire mutiina, zibagumeho." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Kandi ezindi ndwara n'ezindi nfu zoona, ezitahandiikirwe mu kitabo ky'ebiragiro ebi, nazo MUKAMA aryazibarwaza, okuhitsya obu murihwerekyerera." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Muryatsigara bakye, haza mwabaire muri baingi nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, ahabw'okutahurira iraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Kandi nk'oku MUKAMA yaabaire abashemerererwa omu kubakora gye n'okubakanyisa, nikwo MUKAMA aribashemerererwa omu kubacwekyereza n'okubamaraho; muryasikurwa, mwihwe omu nsi, ei murikuzamu kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy28:64 MUKAMA aryabataataanisiza omu mahanga goona, okuruga aha muheru gw'ensi okuhika aha gundi; kandi oryaheererezayo baaruhanga abandi ab'ebiti n'ab'amabaare, abu mwabaire mutakamanyaga, n'obu baakuba baashwenkuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Kandi ago mahanga timurigagiriramu busingye, n'obu kwakuba okubona ah'okuhuumuza ekigyere; kureka MUKAMA aryabaheerayo omutima gurikutetema, n'amaisho agagwire omu nkiro, kandi n'omutima ogwitsirwe orushusho;" 
Deuteronomy28:66 amagara gaanyu garyatuura omu kubanganisa, mugire obwoba nyomushana na nyekiro; timurigira ky'okuhamizaho yaaba muri ab'okugumaho." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ahabw'eby'okutiinisa ebi emitima yaanyu eriba neetiina, n'ebi amaisho gaanyu gariba nigareeba, ku burisheesha, muryagira muti: Kuri bwizire! kandi ku buriira, mugire muti: Kuri buseesire!" 
Deuteronomy28:68 MUKAMA aryabagarura Misri n'emeeri, omu muhanda ogu naabaire naabagambiire nti: Timurigaruka kugutoora. Okwo muryayetundirayo aha bazigu baanyu, kuba abahuuku n'abazaana; kwonka tihaine oribagura." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Ebi nibyo bigambo by'endagaano, ei MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa kuragaana n'Abaisraeli omu nsi ya Moabu, ebyayongyeirwe aha ndagaano ei yaaraganiire nabo aha rushozi Horebu." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Musa yaayeta Abaisraeli boona yaabagira ati: Mukareeba byona ebi MUKAMA yaakozire Faraho n'abaheereza be boona n'ensi ye yoona omu nsi ya Misri, omu maisho gaanyu," 
Deuteronomy29:3 n'ebigyezo by'amaani n'obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza bikuru, ebi mwayereebeire." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Kwonka MUKAMA takabahaire mutima gw'okwetegyereza, nari amaisho g'okureeba, nari amatu g'okuhurira n'okuhitsya hati." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Nkamara emyaka makumi ana nimbeebembera omu ihamba; ebijwaro byanyu tibikabakuriireho, n'enkaito tizikabakuriire mu bigyere." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Timukaryaga mugaati n'obu kwakuba okunywa viinyo nari eby'okunywa ebirikusinza, ngu mubone kumanya ku ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Kandi ku mwahikire omu mwanya ogu, Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni na Ogi omugabe wa Bashani baahurura kuturwanisa, twabasingura;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 twanyaga ensi yaabo, twagiha Abareubeeni n'Abagaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase kuba obuhunguzi bwabo." 
Deuteronomy29:9 N'ahabw'ekyo mukwate ebigambo by'endagaano egi, mubihitsye, mubone kutunga omugisha omu bi murikukora byona." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Eri izooba mwena mwemereire omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, abeebembezi b'enganda zaanyu, abakuru baanyu, abategyeki baanyu, abashaija boona ba Israeli," 
Deuteronomy29:11 abaana baanyu abato, abakazi baanyu n'abanyamahanga abari omu nsiisira zaanyu, okuruga aha barikubasheenyera enku okuhika aha barikubatahira amaizi," 
Deuteronomy29:12 mureetsirwe kutaaha omu ndagaano ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, ei yaahamize naarahira, kandi ei arikuragaana naimwe eri izooba;" 
Deuteronomy29:13 abone kubahamya eri izooba kuba eihanga rye, nawe akaba Ruhanga waanyu, nk'oku yaabagambiire, kandi nk'oku yaarahiire naaraganisa baashwenkuriimwe, Abrahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Kandi tiimwe mwenka abari aha abu ndikuragaana nabo egi ndagaano n'endahiro," 
Deuteronomy29:15 kureka n'abatari aha naitwe eri izooba, otaihiremu abari aha, abeemereire naitwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Nimumanya oku twatwire omu nsi ya Misri, kandi n'oku twarabire omu mahanga agu mwarabiremu;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 mukareeba ebirikunugwa byabo n'ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa, eby'ebiti, eby'amabaare, eby'efeeza, n'eby'ezaabu, ebyabaire biri omuribo." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Mwerinde, omuriimwe hatarigira omushaija nari omukazi nari omuryango nari oruganda, ou omutima gwe gwateishuka gukaruga ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, akaza kuheereza baaruhanga ab'ago mahanga, kandi hatarigira omuriimwe owaamerwamu omuzi ogurikwana ebyana ebirikushaarira nk'omuravunga;" 
Deuteronomy29:19 akihurira ebigambo by'endagaano egi, akeehimbisa omu mutima gwe, naagira ati: Tiinyine ku ndiba, n'obu ndigumizamu n'obugangaazi bw'omutima gwangye; atyo akareetera ababisi n'aboomire kucwekyerera." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Omuntu ogwo MUKAMA tarimusaasira, kureka ekiniga kya MUKAMA n'eihato rye biryamwakaho nk'omuriro omuri obwo bunaku, emikyeeno yoona ehandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo emubeho, kandi MUKAMA aryamaraho eiziina rye, ryebe ahansi y'eiguru." 
Deuteronomy29:21 MUKAMA aryamutoorana omu nganda za Israeli zoona abe engwerwakagwe, nk'emikyeeno yoona ey'omu ndagaano ehandiikirwe omu kitabo eki eky'ebiragiro oku eri." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Kandi ab'obusingye oburiija, nibo baana baanyu abarikurataho, n'omunyaihanga oriruga omu nsi ya hare, baryataka ku barireeba ebibonaboneso by'ensi egyo n'endwara ezi MUKAMA agireetsireho," 
Deuteronomy29:23 kandi ku egyo nsi yoona ehindukire obuganga bw'ekibiriiti, n'omwonyo, n'eitaka erihiire nyamwenga, eritarikuhingwa, eritarikwera, n'obu kwakuba okumerwaho akanyaatsi, ecwekyereziibwe nka Sodoma, Gomora, Aduma na Zeboimu, ei MUKAMA yaagiriire ekiniga, akagicwekyereza agigwereirwe kubi;" 
Deuteronomy29:24 kandi buzima n'amahanga goona garyabuuza gati: Ahabw'enki MUKAMA agizire ati egi nsi? Eki kiniga kingi nikimanyisa ki? 
Deuteronomy29:25 Abantu baryabagarukamu nibagira bati: Ahabw'okuba bakareka endagaano ya MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo, ei yaaragaine nabo, obu yaabaiha omu nsi ya Misri;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 baagyenda, baaheereza baaruhanga abandi, abu baabaire batarikumanya, kandi abu MUKAMA yaabaire atabahaire, baabaramya." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Nikyo ekiniga kya MUKAMA kyakiire ahari egi nsi, kikagireetera emikyeeno yoona eyaahandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Nikyo kyareeteire MUKAMA kubabiihirirwa, okubagwerwa kubi n'okubagirira ekiniga kingi, akabarandura omu nsi yaabo, akabanaga omu nsi endiijo, nk'oku kiri hati." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Eby'emibonano n'ebya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, kwonka ebishuurwirwe n'ebyaitu n'oruzaaro rwaitu ebiro byona, ngu tubone kworobera ebigambo byona eby'ebiragiro ebi." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Ebyo byona ku biriheza kubabaho, eby'emigisha n'eby'emikyeeno, ebi naataire omu maisho gaanyu, mwabiijukira omu mahanga goona, agu MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ariba ababingiiremu," 
Deuteronomy30:2 mwagaruka ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, mwahurira eiraka rye, mwakora ebyo byona ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba, imwe n'abaana baanyu, mwabikora n'omutima gwanyu gwona n'amagara gaanyu goona;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 obwo MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aryagarura abantu baanyu abaanyagirwe, abagirire esaasi, agarukye abateeranire hamwe, abaihe omu mahanga goona, agu MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaabataataanisiizemu." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Abantu baanyu ababingirwe, n'obu bariba bari aha muheru gw'ensi, MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aryabataruura, abaiheyo;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 kandi aryabagarura omu nsi eyaabaire eri eya baashwenkuriimwe, mugizemu ebe eyaanyu; abagirire gye, abakanyise mukire baashwenkuriimwe obwingi." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aryashara ekishushu ky'aha mitima yaanyu n'ey'oruzaaro rwanyu, mukunde MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu n'omutima gwanyu gwona n'amagara gaanyu goona, mubone kugumaho." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aryata egyo mikyeeno yoona aha bazigu baanyu n'aha barikubanga boona bakabahiiga. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Kandi muryagaruka muhurire eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, mworobere ebiragiro bye byona ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu aryabaha omugisha, abagogyeze omu bi murikukora byona, oruzaaro rwanyu, okuzaara kw'amatungo gaanyu n'emyaka y'omu misiri yaanyu, mube gye; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aryagaruka abashemerererwe omu kubagogyeza, nk'oku yaabaire ashemerererwa baashwenkuriimwe," 
Deuteronomy30:10 ku murihurira eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, mwakwata ebiragiro bye n'ebyatairweho, ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo eki eky'ebiragiro, kandi ku murigaruka ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu n'omutima gwanyu gwona n'amagara gaanyu goona." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Ahakuba ekiragiro eki, eki ndikukuragiira eri izooba, tikirikukurema, n'obu kwakuba okukuba hare." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Tikiri mu iguru, iwe okugira oti: N'oha oritemba omu iguru, akakitureetera, ngu tukihurire, tukyorobere?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Kandi tikiri seeri y'enyanja, iwe okugira oti: N'oha oritwambukirayo, akakitureetera, ngu tukihurire, tukyorobere?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Kureka ekyo kigambo kikuri haihi munonga omu kanwa kaawe n'omu mutima gwawe, ngu obaase kukyorobera." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Reeba, eri izooba naata omu maisho gaawe amagara n'ebirungi, kandi okufa n'ebibi." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Ku oryorobera ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, okukunda MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, okugyendera omu mihanda ye, n'okukwata ebiragiro bye n'ebi yaataireho n'ebi yaaragiire, obwo oryagumaho, okanye, kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryakuheera omugisha omu nsi ei orikuza kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Kwonka omutima gwawe ku guriteishuka, waayanga kuhurira, waabeihwabeihwa, waaramya baaruhanga abandi, waabaheereza," 
Deuteronomy30:18 nimbagambirira kimwe eri izooba, muryahwerekyerera, timurihangaarira mu nsi, ei murikuza kwambuka Yorudani kuza kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Eri izooba niinyeta eiguru n'ensi kubashinja, ku naata omu maisho gaanyu amagara n'okufa, omugisha n'omukyeeno; n'ahabw'ekyo mutoorane amagara, mubone kugumaho, imwe n'oruzaaro rwanyu," 
Deuteronomy30:20 okukunda MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, okuhurira eiraka rye, n'okumuhamiraho,–ahabw'okuba niwe magara gaanyu n'okuhangaara kwanyu, mubone kuguma omu nsi ei MUKAMA yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe, Abrahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Musa yaagyenda, yaagambira Abaisraeli boona ebigambo ebi." 
Deuteronomy31:2 Yaabagira ati: Eri izooba naahitsya emyaka igana na makumi abiri; tinkibaasa kushohora n'okutaaha; kandi MUKAMA akangira ati: Toryambuka Yorudani egi. 
Deuteronomy31:3 MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu niwe aribeebembera kwambuka, kandi niwe arihwerekyereza amahanga ago omu maisho gaanyu, mukagakubuura; kandi Yoshua niwe aribeebembera kwambuka, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambire." 
Deuteronomy31:4 MUKAMA aryagagira, nk'oku yaagizire Sihooni na Ogi, abagabe b'Abaamori, abu yaacwekyereize, n'ensi yaabo." 
Deuteronomy31:5 MUKAMA aryagahayo omu maisho gaanyu, mugagire nk'ebiragiro byona ebi naabaragiire oku biri." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Mube ab'amaani, mugume omutima; mutagira obwoba, kandi mutabatiina; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu niwe arikubeebembera; taribahemukaho, kandi taribatsigaho." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Musa yaayeta Yoshua, yaamugambirira omu maisho g'Abaisraeli boona ati: Ba ow'amaani, ogume omutima, ahakuba oryagyenda n'abantu aba omu nsi ei MUKAMA yaarahiire kuha baishenkurubo; kandi niiwe origibahunguza." 
Deuteronomy31:8 MUKAMA niwe arikukwebembera; aryaguma naiwe, tarikuhemukaho, kandi tarikutsigaho; otatiina, n'obu kwakuba okuhahaaza omutima." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Musa yaahandiika ebyo biragiro, yaabiha abanyamurwa beene Leevi, abaabaire baheeka eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, n'abakuru b'Abaisraeli boona." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Musa yaabaragiira naagira ati: Aha muheru gwa buri myaka mushanju, omu bunaku obwatairweho omu mwaka gw'okuha obusingye, aha bugyenyi bw'Ensiisira," 
Deuteronomy31:11 Abaisraeli boona ku bariba baizire kumurikwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu omu mwanya ogu aritoorana, oryaguma oshomere ebiragiro ebi omu maisho g'Abaisraeli boona, nibabihurira." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Oryateerana abantu, abashaija n'abakazi n'abaana n'abashuhuuki abariba batwire naimwe, babihurire, beegye kutiina MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, bateho omutima kworobera ebigambo byona eby'ebi biragiro," 
Deuteronomy31:13 kandi n'abaana baabo, abatakabimanyaga, babihurire, beegye kutiina MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ebiro byona ebi murimara omu nsi, ei murikwambuka Yorudani kuza kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy31:14 MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: Reeba, obunaku bw'okufa kwawe buri haihi; yeta Yoshua, mwije mweyorekye omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, mbone kumukwatsa omurimo. Musa na Yoshua baagyenda, baayemurika omu Ihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu." 
Deuteronomy31:15 MUKAMA yaayeyoreka omuri eryo Ihema, ari omu nyomyo y'ekicu, kandi egyo nyomyo y'ekicu yaayemerera ahaiguru y'omuryango gwaryo." 
Deuteronomy31:16 MUKAMA yaagambira Musa ati: Reeba, noija kufa, oshangye baashwenkuru; bwanyima aba bantu baryaimuka, baraaye nibakurata baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga ab'omu nsi, ei barikuza kutuuramu, banyimuure, baite endagaano yangye ei naaragaine nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Obwo bunaku ekiniga kyangye kiryabaakaho nk'omuriro, mbarugyeho, mbaime amaisho, bamarweho, bahikweho ebibi bingi n'eminyangararo; n'ahabw'ebyo omu bunaku obwo baryagira bati: Ekitureeteire kuhikwaho ebibi ebi, t'ahabw'okuba Ruhanga tari muriitwe?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Buzimazima omu bunaku obwo ndyabaima amaisho, mbature ebibi byona ebi bariba bakozire, omu kwehongyera baaruhanga abandi." 
Deuteronomy31:19 N'ahabw'ekyo muhandiikye ekyeshongoro eki, iwe okyegyese Abaisraeli, kandi okibeeshongoze, kimbeere obujurizi bw'okushinja Abaisraeli;" 
Deuteronomy31:20 ahabw'okuba ku ndiheza kubahitsya omu nsi ei naarahiire kuha baishenkurubo, ensi y'amate n'obwoki, baaheza kurya n'okuhaaga, baagomoka, baryayehongyera baaruhanga abandi, babakorere, bangaye, baite endagaano yangye." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Bwanyima ku barihikwaho ebibi bingi n'eminyangararo, ekyeshongoro eki kiryaba mushinja w'okuhamya omu maisho gaabo, ahabw'okuba tikiryeba, kiryaguma nikyeshongorwa oruzaaro rwabo. Ahakuba nimmanya ebiteekateeko byabo, ebi baine na hati, ntakabahikize mu nsi ei naarahiire kubaha." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Atyo Musa yaahandiika ekyeshongoro ekyo ahari eryo izooba, yaakyegyesa Abaisraeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Kandi MUKAMA yaayehanangiriza Yoshua mwene Nuuni, naagira ati: Ba ow'amaani, ogume omutima, ahakuba niiwe orihitsya Abaisraeli omu nsi ei naarahiire kubaha; kandi ndyaguma naiwe." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Musa ku yaaherize kuhandiika ebigambo by'ebyo biragiro omu kitabo, yaabimariramu," 
Deuteronomy31:25 yaaragiira Abaleevi abaabaire baheeka eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, naagira ati:" 
Deuteronomy31:26 Mwakiire eki kitabo ky'ebiragiro, mukite aha rubaju rw'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, kigume kiri omujurizi w'okubashinja." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Ahakuba nimmanya obugomi bwanyu n'ebitsya byanyu ebigangaire. Reeba, eri izooba mwagomera MUKAMA nkibaine; kaashwa ku ndiba naafiire, muryashura ki?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Munteeranire abakuru b'enganda zaanyu boona n'abategyeki baanyu, mbone kugamba ebigambo ebi, babihurire, n'okweta eiguru n'ensi kubashinja." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ahabw'okuba nimmanya ngu, ku ndiheza kufa, muryayesiisira kimwe, muteishukye omuhanda ogu naabaragiire; kandi omu biro ebirikurataho muryahikwaho ebibi bingi, ahabw'okuba muryakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, kumugwisa kubi n'ebi murikora n'emikono yaanyu." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Atyo Musa yaagamba ebigambo by'ekyeshongoro eki, Abaisraeli boona babihuriire, okuhitsya obu yaabiherize." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Iwe iguru 'we, tega amatu, ngambe; N'ensi ehuriire ebigambo by'omu kanwa kangye." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Eby'okwegyesa byangye nibiija kugwa nk'enjura, N'ebigambo byangye bitonde nk'orume, Nk'orutoonyerera aha bunyaatsi bubisi, Nk'orujura aha bishaka." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ahakuba naaza kuranga eiziina rya MUKAMA. Muhamye Ruhanga waitu ku ari mukuru rugambwa. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Rukiri, omurimo gwe guhikire; Ahakuba emitwarize ye yoona n'ey'oburyo; Ni Ruhanga ow'okwesigwa, otagira kutahikiirira; N'ow'amazima, kandi ohikiriire." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Bamukoreire ebitahikire; Tibakiri baana be ahabw'obumogo bwabo; N'ab'obusingye oburikwehabagiza kandi obukiikami. 
Deuteronomy32:6 Imwe bashema 'mwe, abataine bwengye, Okwo nikwo murikuzimuurira MUKAMA? Tiwe Shoimwe owaabacungwire? Niwe yaabahangire, akabagumyaho." 
Deuteronomy32:7 Mwijukye ebiro ebya ira, Muteekateekye aha myaka y'obusingye bwingi obwa baashwenkuriimwe. Mubuuze baashoimwe, nibaija kubibashobororera; Mubuuze abakuru baanyu, nibaija kubibagambira." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Rukira-boona obu yaaha amahanga obuhunguzi bwago, Akataanisa enganda z'abantu, Obwo akataho emyatano y'amahanga, Nk'omubaro gw'Abaisraeli oku gwabaire guri." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Ahakuba abantu ba MUKAMA nigwo mugabo gwe; Yakobo niwe mugabo gw'obuhunguzi bwe. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Akamushanga omu nsi erimu busha, Omu ihamba ei enyamaishwa zigambira; Yaamwehinguririza, yaamutaho omutima, Yaamurinda nk'emboni y'eriisho rye." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Nk'oku empungu esisiimura ebyana byayo, Ekaimutsya amapapa ahaiguru yaabyo, Ekagajanjamura, ekabitwara, Ekabiheeka aha mapapa gaayo;" 
Deuteronomy32:12 Nikwo MUKAMA wenka yaamwebembeire atyo, Hatariho ruhanga ondiijo w'abanyamahanga owaakwataniise nawe." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Akamutunguura, yaamugyendesa omu myanya y'ahaiguru ey'omu nsi, Yaarya aha byezire omu misiri, Yaamunyuunyutisa obwoki bw'omu rukiri, N'amajuta omu rukiri orugumire munonga;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 Amate g'ente g'amakamo, n'amate g'entaama, N'ebishaju by'abaana b'entaama, n'empaya z'entaama, Amasyo ga Bashani g'ente n'ag'embuzi, N'engano ezirikukira oburungi; Kandi yaakunywaisa viinyo erikuruga omu shande y'emizaabibu." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Bwanyima Yeshuruuni yaagomoka, yaatera omugyere. K'ogomokire, okahanguha, okabengyeya! Yaimuura Ruhanga owaamuhangire, Yaagaya Rukiri w'okujunwa kwe." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Baamwitsa eihari ahari baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga; Baamukwatsa ekiniga ahabw'ebirikunugwa byabo. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Baatambira baadaimoni, abatari Ruhanga Nyamuhanga, Baaruhanga abu batakamanyaga, Baaruhanga abasya, abahangire, Abu baashwenkuriimwe baabaire batakamanyaga." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Rukiri owaabakire enda yaawe, toramutaireho mutima, Waayebwa Ruhanga owaakuzaire." 
Deuteronomy32:19 MUKAMA yaakireeba, yaabatamirwa kimwe, Ahabw'okwitsibwa ekiniga batabani be na bahara be." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Yaagira ati: Ndyabaima amaisho, Ndeebe omuheru gwabo oku guriba; Ahabw'okuba n'ab'obusingye bw'obugomi, N'abaana abataine bwesigwa." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Banyitsize eihari aha kitari Ruhanga Nyamuhanga; Bankwatsize ekiniga n'ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa; Naanye ndyabaitsa eihari aha bantu abatari ihanga buzima; Mbakwatse ekiniga n'eihanga eritaine bwengye; 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ahakuba ekiniga kyangye kyakize omuriro, Kandi nigwaka okuhika okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, Nigubuguma omu nsi n'ebigyeziremu, Kandi nigwotsya emisingi y'enshozi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndyabarundaho obubi bwingi, Mbamarireho emyambi yangye." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Baryakuuhuzibwa enjara, Bamarweho ekibabo ky'omuriro n'orufu orurikwita; Ndyabahayo omu maino g'enyamaishwa, N'aha biine obushegu ebirikugyendesa enda omu mucuucu." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Aheeru rurara eryabamaraho abaabo, N'omu nju bashangwemu ebirikutiinisa, Bicwekyereze abatsigazi n'empangare, Abarikwonka n'abagurusi b'enju." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Nkaagizire nti: Ndyabataataanisa, mbanagye hare, Mbamareho, barekye kwijukwa omu bantu," 
Deuteronomy32:27 Kuri ntaratiinire kurahurwa abazigu, bakankwatsa ekiniga, Ngu ababisha baabo barekye kwebeiha nibagira bati: Emikono yaitu niyo eriho; MUKAMA tiwe akozire ebi byona." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Ahakuba n'eihanga ry'abantu abatagira naama; Kandi abataine kwetegyereza. 
Deuteronomy32:29 Kuri baabaire baine obwengye, bakaayetegyereize eki, Bateekateeka aha by'omuheru gwabo." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Omwe akaabaasize ata kubinga rukumi, N'ababiri okubinga kakumi, Kuri Rukiri waabo atarabarekwire, Kuri MUKAMA atarabahaireyo?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Ahakuba Rukiri waabo tari nka Rukiri waitu, Nangwa n'abazigu baitu ahabwabo nibakihamya." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Kandi omuzaabibu gwabo gukakomooka aha gwa Sodoma, N'omu misiri ya Gomora; Ebijuma by'emizaabibu yaabo n'endurwe, Emitsitsa y'ebijuma byayo neeshaarira;" 
Deuteronomy32:33 Viinyo yaabo n'obushegu bw'ebijoka, N'obushegu bw'encwera oburikwita." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Ebyo tibibiikirwe owangye, Bikakomwa n'akamanyiso omu mabiikiro gangye?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Okuhoora enzigu n'okwangye, n'okuzimuura n'okwangye, Omu bunaku obu ebigyere byabo biriterereramu; Ahabw'okuba ekiro kyabo eky'okuhikwaho akabi kiri haihi; N'ekifubiro kyabo kiryarahuka;" 
Deuteronomy32:36 Ahakuba MUKAMA ku arireeba abantu be bahweirwemu amaani, Kandi hataine otsigaireho, yaaba muhuuku, nari ow'obusingye, Aryabaihaho orubanja, Agirire abairu be esaasi." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Kandi aryagira ati: Baaruhanga baabo bari nkahi, Rukiri waabo ou baayesigire," 
Deuteronomy32:38 Abaabaire barya ebishaju by'ebitambo byabo, Bakanywa viinyo y'empongano zaabo z'eby'okunywa? Mbwenu nibaimukye, babahwere, Babe nibo baabarinda." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Mureebe hati, Nyowe, Nyowe ekiti, ku ndi We, Ku hatariho ruhanga ondiijo, kureka Nyowe. Niinye nyita, nkazoora; Kandi niinye mputaaza, nkatamba. Tihaine orikubaasa kwiha omu mukono gwangye ou naakwatsire." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ahakuba niinyimutsya omukono gwangye ahaiguru, Nindahira, nk'oku mbaho ebiro byona," 
Deuteronomy32:41 Ku ndityaza rurara yangye erikumurinkana, Omukono gwangye gwagikwata kucwa emanja; Ndyahoora abazigu bangye, Nzimuurire abarikuunyanga;" 
Deuteronomy32:42 Emyambi yangye ndyagisinza n'eshagama, Na rurara yangye erye enyama- Eshagama y'abaitsirwe n'ey'enkwatwa, Okwiha aha bakuru b'abategyeki b'abazigu." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, nimusiime abantu be; Ahakuba aryahoorera eshagama y'abairu be, Ahoore abazigu be, Kandi ahongyerere ensi y'abantu be." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Musa yaija, we na Yoshua mwene Nuuni baagamba ebigambo byona eby'ekyo kyeshongoro, abantu babihuriire." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Musa ku yaaherize kugambira Abaisraeli boona ebyo bigambo byona," 
Deuteronomy32:46 yaabagira ati: Mute emitima yaanyu aha bigambo byona, ebi naabeehanangiriza eri izooba, mubiragiire abaana baanyu, babone kworobera ebigambo byona eby'ebi biragiro." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Ahakuba okubyorobera ti ky'okufa busha, kureka nigo magara gaanyu, kandi nikyo kiribahaisa okuhangaarira omu nsi ei murikwambuka Yorudani kuza kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Ahari eryo izooba MUKAMA yaagira Musa ati: 
Deuteronomy32:49 Temba oru rushozi Neebo ya Abariimu orw'omu nsi ya Moabu, orushungaine na Yeriko, oreebe ensi ya Kanaani, ei ndikuha Abaisraeli kuba eyaabo;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 ofeere ahari orwo rushozi oru waaza kutemba, oshangye abaanyu, nk'oku Arooni mukuru waawe yaafeereire aha rushozi Hoori, akashanga abaabo;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 ahabw'okuba mukancumuraho omu maisho g'Abaisraeli, muri aha maizi ga Meriba ahari Kadeshi omu ihamba rya Ziini; kandi timwampaisa kitiinisa omu Baisraeli." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Noija kureeba egyo nsi ei ndikuha Abaisraeli omu maisho gaawe, kwonka torigihikamu." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ogu nigwo mugisha, ogu Musa omushaija wa Ruhanga yaashabire Abaisraeli, atakafiire." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Naagira ati: MUKAMA akaruga Sinai; Yaabajugutira nk'omushekye, naaruga Seiri, Yaayakira aha rushozi Parani; Yaaruga omu bukumi bw'abarikwera, Omuriro guri aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Eego, akakunda abantu be, Abarikwera be boona bakaba bari omu mukono gwe, Bashutami aha bigyere bye, Nibahurira ebi arikubahabura." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Musa akaturagiira ebiragiro Kuba obuhunguzi bw'eihanga rya Yakobo. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Atyo MUKAMA yaaba omukama omuri Yeshuruuni, Obu abakuru b'eihanga baateerana hamwe N'enganda za Israeli zoona." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Reubeeni agumeho, arekye kufa; N'abantu be barekye kuba bakye." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Ebi nibyo yaagambire ahari Yuda, naagira ati: Ai MUKAMA, hurira eiraka rya Yuda, Omureete omu bantu be; Akeerwanirira n'emikono ye, Naiwe omuhe emikono kurwanisa abazigu be." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ahari Leevi yaagira ati: Ohe Leevi Tumimu yaawe, Kandi Urimu yaawe ogihe omuntu waawe orikutiina Ruhanga, Ou waagyereize ahari Maasa, Ou waahakanisiize aha maizi ga Meriba;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 Owaagambire ahari ishe na nyina, Ati: Tindikubamanya; Akooga beene ishe, kandi ateete aha baana be; Ahakuba Abaleevi bakoorobera ekigambo kyawe, Baakwata endagaano yaawe." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Baryayegyesa Yakobo eby'oburyo byawe, Beegyese na Israeli ebiragiro byawe; Baryaguma nibata obubaane omu maisho gaawe, Batambire aha itambiro ryawe ekitambo ky'okwokyeza kimwe." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ai MUKAMA, ogume ohe omugisha ebi atungire, Oikirize ebi arikukora n'emikono ye; Ohondahonde obwezirikiro bw'abarikwimuka kumurwanisa, Kandi n'obw'abarikumwanga, barekye kugaruka kwimuka." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Ahari Benyamiini yaagira ati: Orikukundwa MUKAMA aryatuura nawe buhooro; Agume naamusangira eizooba ryona, Obutaaho bwe bube amabega ge." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ahari Yosefu yaagira ati: Ensi ye MUKAMA agihe omugisha Gw'eby'obuguzi bwingi eby'ahaiguru omu iguru, N'eby'ahansi okuzimu," 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ogw'ebijuma by'obuguzi bwingi ebirikwezibwa eizooba, N'ogw'omweru mwingi ogw'emyaka eya buri kwezi," 
Deuteronomy33:15 Ogw'ebintu ebirikukira oburungi ebirikuruga omu nshozi eza ira, N'ogw'eby'obuguzi bwingi ebirikuruga omu bibungo ebitahwaho," 
Deuteronomy33:16 Ogw'eby'obuguzi bwingi eby'omu nsi n'ebigirimu, N'obuganzi ahari Ogwo owaabaire ari omu rushaka ruri. Emigisha egyo eze aha mutwe gwa Yosefu, Aha kazingiro k'ogwo owaashoroirwe omuri beene ishe, akaba omutegyeki waabo." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Enimi ye y'omujigaijo ekitiinisa n'ekyayo; Amahembe gaayo n'ag'embogo; Eryagabingisa amahanga goona Gahikye aha muheru gw'ensi; Ago mahembe nibwo bukumi bwingi bwa Efuraimu, N'enkumi nyingi za Manaase." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ahari Zebuluuni yaagira ati: Iwe Zebuluuni, oyesiimire amagyenda gaawe, Naiwe Isakaari, oyesiimire amahema gaawe." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Baryayeta amahanga, gaije aha rushozi rwabo, Batambireyo ebitambo by'abahikiriire; Ahakuba banyuunyuuta ebintu bingi ebirikuruga omu nyanja, N'eby'obutungi ebitarikumanywa ebiri omu musheenyi." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ahari Gaadi yaagira ati: Orikuhangusya Gaadi aheebwe omugisha; Gaadi abundama nk'entare, Ataagura omukono n'akazingiro k'eishokye." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Akeetooranira ekicweka ky'ensi ekirikukira oburungi, Ahakuba okwo niyo omugabo gw'omukuru w'engabo gwabaire gubiikirwe. Yaija n'abandi bakuru b'eihanga, Yaakwatanisa na Israeli okuhikiiriza ebiragiro bya MUKAMA, N'eby'oburyo bye ebi yaaragiire." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ahari Daani yaagira ati: Daani n'ekyana ky'entare, Ekirikuguruka nikiruga Bashani." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Ahari Nafutaali yaagira ati: Iwe Nafutaali, ohaagire obuganzi bwa MUKAMA, Oigutsi omugisha gwe, Kubuura ensi y'oburengyerwa-izooba n'ey'obukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Deuteronomy33:24 N'ahari Asheri yaagira ati: Asheri aheebwe omugisha gw'okuzaara abaana; Akundwe beene ishe; Ajabikye ekigyere kye omu majuta. 
Deuteronomy33:25 Empimbi zaawe zibe ebyoma n'emiringa; Nk'oku ebiro byawe biriingana, N'amaani gaawe nikwo gariba." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Iwe Yeshuruuni, tihariho ondiijo orikushushana na Ruhanga. Oritemba eiguru, naarirabamu kuza kukuhwera, Naaraba omu kaabunga n'ekitiinisa kye kingi." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Ruhanga otahwaho niwe butaaho bwawe, Kandi ahansi yaawe hariho emikono etahwaho. Akabinga abazigu omu maisho gaawe, Yaagira ati: Bacwekyereze." 
Deuteronomy33:28 N'ahabw'ekyo Israeli atuura buhooro, Eiziba rya Yakobo erituura ryonka Omu nsi y'engano na viinyo; Eego, eiguru rye ritoonyereza orume." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Iwe Israeli, ohiiriirwe! N'oha orikushushana naiwe, Eihanga eryajunirwe MUKAMA, Engabo y'okuhwerwa kwawe, Kandi rurara y'okusingura kwawe! Abazigu baawe baryakugomookyera, Oribatiirire emyanya yaabo mikuru ey'okuramizamu." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Musa yaaruga omu mpita za Moabu, yaatemba orushozi Neebo, yaahika aha mutwe gwa Pisiga, ahashungaine na Yeriko. MUKAMA yaamworeka ensi ya Gileadi yoona okuhika Daani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 na Nafutaali yoona, n'ensi ya Efuraimu na Manaase n'ensi yoona eya Yuda okuhika aha Nyanja y'oburengyerwa-izooba;" 
Deuteronomy34:3 yaamworeka na Negebu, n'oruhita rwa Yorudani, nirwo ruhanga rwa Yeriko orurembo rw'emikindo, okuhika Zoari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Eriya niyo nsi ei naarahiire ningira Abrahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo nti: Ndyagiha oruzaaro rwawe. Mbwenu naakwikiriza kugireeba n'amaisho, kwonka toryambuka kugizamu." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Atyo Musa omugaragwa wa MUKAMA yaafeera okwo omu nsi ya Moabu, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambire." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Yaamuziika omu ruhanga omu nsi ya Moabu ahashungaine na Besi-peori; kwonka tihariho orikumanya ahu ekituuro kye kiri n'okuhitsya hati. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Musa ogwo yaafa ahikize emyaka igana na makumi abiri, amaisho ge gatakagiirwemu ruho, n'amaani ge gatakatuubire." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Abaisraeli baamara ebiro makumi ashatu, nibacurira Musa omu mpita za Moabu. Bwanyima ebiro by'okuba omu rufu rwa Musa n'okumucurira byahwa." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoshua mwene Nuuni akaba aijwire omwoyo gw'obwengye; ahabw'okuba Musa akaba yaamutaireho engaro. Abaisraeli baamuhurira, baakora nk'oku MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Okuruga obwo tiharagarukire kubaho nabi ori nka Musa, ou MUKAMA yaabaire amanya, kandi akareebana nawe;" 
Deuteronomy34:11 kandi tihariho owaakugyeragyeranisibwa nawe omu by'obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza byona, ebi MUKAMA yaamutumire kukora omu nsi ya Misri, ahari Faraho n'abaheereza be boona, n'ensi ye yoona," 
Deuteronomy34:12 n'omu by'amaani maingi byona, n'ebirikutiinisa byona, ebi Musa yaakoreire omu maisho g'Abaisraeli boona." 
Joshua1:1 Bwanyima y'okufa kwa Musa omugaragwa wa MUKAMA, MUKAMA akagambira Yoshua mwene Nuuni, omuheereza wa Musa, ati:" 
Joshua1:2 Musa omugaragwa wangye afiire; n'ahabw'ekyo imuka, oyambukye omugyera ogu Yorudani, iwe n'eihanga eri ryona, mutaahe omu nsi ei ndikuha Abaisraeli." 
Joshua1:3 Omwanya gwona ogu muriribatamu, ngubahaire, nk'oku naagambiire Musa." 
Joshua1:4 Okuruga aha ihamba n'orushozi oru Lebanooni, okuhika aha mugyera omuhango Furaati, ensi yoona ey'Abahiiti, okuhika aha Nyanja empango ey'oburengyerwa-izooba, egyo niyo eriba emyatano yaanyu." 
Joshua1:5 Tihaine muntu weena oribaasa kukuza omu kaso ebiro byona eby'amagara gaawe; nk'oku naabaire ndi na Musa, nikwo ndiguma naiwe; tindikuhemukaho, kandi tindikutsigaho." 
Joshua1:6 Ba ow'amaani, ogume omutima; ahakuba niiwe orihunguza eihanga eri ensi ei naarahiire kuha baishenkurubo." 
Joshua1:7 Kwonka ba ow'amaani, ogumire kimwe omutima, kandi oyerinde ohitsye ebiragiro byona ebi Musa omugaragwa wangye yaakuragiire; otaribiteishukaho kutoora aha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho, obone kubaasikirwa, ei oriza yoona." 
Joshua1:8 Ekitabo eki eky'ebiragiro kitarikuruga omu kanwa; kureka ogume nookiteekateekaho nyomushana na nyekiro, obone kwerinda, ohitsye byona ebihandiikirwemu; obwo nibwo oriheebwa omugisha ei oriza yoona, okabaasa gye byona." 
Joshua1:9 Tiinye naakuragiira? Ba ow'amaani, ogume omutima; otatiina, n'obu kwakuba okuhahaaza omutima; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe aryaguma naiwe, ei oriza yoona." 
Joshua1:10 Ahonaaho Yoshua yaaragiira abatware b'abantu ati: 
Joshua1:11 Mugyende nimuraba omu rusiisira rwona, muragiire abantu muti: Mwekomere entanda, ahakuba omu biro bishatu nimwija kwambuka ogu mugyera Yorudani, kuza kukubuura ensi, ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kuba eyaanyu." 
Joshua1:12 Kandi Abareubeeni n'Abagaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase, Yoshua yaabagira ati:" 
Joshua1:13 Mwijukye ekigambo eki Musa omugaragwa wa MUKAMA yaabaragiire naagira ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu abahaire oburuhuukiro, kandi aryabaha ensi egi." 
Joshua1:14 Abakazi baanyu n'abaana baanyu n'amatungo gaanyu biryaguma omu nsi ei Musa yaabahaire seenu ya Yorudani; kwonka imwe mwena amamanzi nimwija kwambuka, mwebembeire beene waanyu, mwine eby'okurwanisa, mubahwere," 
Joshua1:15 okuhitsya obu MUKAMA ariha beene waanyu oburuhuukiro, nk'oku naimwe yaabubahaire, nabo bakakubuura ensi ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha. Bwanyima imwe muryagaruka omu nsi ei mwakubwire, mugirye, niyo nsi ei Musa omugaragwa wa MUKAMA yaabahaire seenu ya Yorudani aha bukiizi bw'oburugwa-izooba." 
Joshua1:16 Baagarukamu Yoshua nibagira bati: Ebi waaturagiira byona turyabikora, kandi yoona ei oritutuma turyazayo." 
Joshua1:17 Nk'oku twayorobeire Musa omuri byona, naiwe nikwo turikworobera; kwonka MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe agume naiwe, nk'oku yaabaire ari na Musa." 
Joshua1:18 Omuntu weena origomera ebiragiro byawe, akanga kuhurira ebigambo byona ebi orikumuragiira, aryaitwa. Kwonka ba ow'amaani, ogume omutima." 
Joshua2:1 Ku baabaire bari omuri Shitimu, Yoshua mwene Nuuni yaatuma abantu babiri omu mubonano kuza kutata, naagira ati: Mwirooko mwetegyereze ensi, muno-muno Yeriko. Baagyenda, baahikira omu nju ya maraaya orikweta Rahabu, baaraaramu." 
Joshua2:2 Haabaho owaagambira omugabe wa Yeriko, naagira ati: Twahurira ngu abashaija babiri b'Abaisraeli baija kunu eki kiro kutata ensi." 
Joshua2:3 Omugabe wa Yeriko yaatuma ahari Rahabu, ati: Shohoza abantu abaizire owaawe, bakataaha omu nju yaawe; ahakuba baizire kutata ensi yoona." 
Joshua2:4 Kwonka ogwo mukazi akaba yaatwaire abo bashaija babiri, yaabasherekire-mbwenu yaagira ati: N'eky'amazima, haine abashaija baizire owangye; kwonka timmanyire ie babaire nibaruga;" 
Joshua2:5 ku bwizire, bari haihi kukinga eirembo, abo bashaija baashohora; tindikumanya i batoire; murahukye kubakurata, nimwija kubakwata." 
Joshua2:6 Kwonka we akashangwa yaabatembize aha mutwe gw'enju, abasherekireyo, abashwekire furakisi ei yaabaire ayanikireyo." 
Joshua2:7 Abashaija b'omugabe nikwo kugyenda nibabasherura omu muhanda ogurikuza Yorudani okuhika aha nyambukiro; ahonaaho abarikubasherura ku baabaire baarugaho, eirembo ryakingwa." 
Joshua2:8 Ku baabaire batakabyamire, Rahabu yaatemba, yaabashanga aha mutwe gw'enju;" 
Joshua2:9 yaabagira ati: Nimmanya ku Mukama abahaire egi nsi, tugizire obwoba bwingi ahabwanyu, kandi n'abatuuzi boona ab'omu nsi egi nibahwerera omu maisho gaanyu;" 
Joshua2:10 ahakuba tukahurira oku MUKAMA yaayomize amaizi g'Enyanja erikutukura omu maisho gaanyu, obu mwaruga Misri, kandi n'oku mwagizire abagabe b'Abaamori bombi, abaabaire bari seeri ya Yorudani, Sihooni na Ogi, abu mwacwekyerereize kimwe." 
Joshua2:11 Ahonaaho ku twakihuriire, emitima yaatuhwa omunda, kandi tihaine muntu weena owaatsigairwe omutima omunda ahabwanyu; ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu niwe Ruhanga ow'ahaiguru omu iguru, kandi ow'ahansi omu nsi." 
Joshua2:12 N'ahabw'ekyo nimbeeshengyereza, nk'oku mbagiriire eby'embabazi, mundahire MUKAMA, naimwe ku murizigirira enju ya taata, haza mumpe akamanyiso kahamire," 
Joshua2:13 kandi ku murirokora tata na maawe, banyaanyazi na barumuna bangye n'ebi baine byona, mukakiza amagara gaitu." 
Joshua2:14 Abashaija baamugarukamu bati: Nk'oku mukirize amagara gaitu, turyakiza agaanyu; ku muraabe mutatwatiire naama, turyabagirira embabazi omu mazima, MUKAMA ku arituha ensi egi." 
Joshua2:15 Bwanyima yaabashuumya n'omurunga naabarabya omu dirisa; ahakuba enju ye ekaba eyombekirwe aha mutwe gw'orugo rw'amabaare orw'orurembo, kandi niho yaabaire atuura." 
Joshua2:16 Yaabagira ati: Muhungire omu bibungo, abarikubasherura batakaababugana; mumareyo ebiro bishatu mwesherekire, okuhitsya abarikubasherura obu baraagarukye; bwanyima mubone kwegyendera." 
Joshua2:17 Abashaija baamugarukamu bati: Tituriturwa egi ndahiro ei waaturahiza. 
Joshua2:18 Reeba, ku turiba twaizire omu nsi egi, oryakoma aka kagoye akarikutukura omu dirisa ei waaturabyamu, oteeranire omu nju yaawe sho na nyoko na banyaanyoko n'ab'omu ka ya sho boona." 
Joshua2:19 Omuntu weena oriba yaarugire omu nju, akaza omu nguuto, eshagama ye niwe eritukurira, kwonka itwe teritubaho; kandi ou oriba oine omu nju, yaagira ekyamubaho, eshagama ye niitwe eritukurira." 
Joshua2:20 Kwonka ku oritwatira enaama, titurigira rubanja rw'endahiro ei waaturahiza." 
Joshua2:21 Yaagira ati: Kibe nk'oku mwagamba. Atyo yaaboohereza, baagyenda; yaakoma akagoye karikutukura omu dirisa." 
Joshua2:22 Baagyenda baaza omu bibungo, baamarayo kashatu, okuhitsya obu abaabaire nibabasherura baagarukireyo; ahabw'okuba bakabasherura omu muhanda gwona, baababurira." 
Joshua2:23 Bwanyima ezo entatsi zombi zaaruga omu bibungo, zaashuuma, zaayambuka; ku zaahikire ahari Yoshua mwene Nuuni, zaamuteekyerereza byona ebyazibaireho." 
Joshua2:24 Zaagira Yoshua ziti: N'eky'amazima, MUKAMA atuhaire ensi egi yoona, kandi n'abatuuzi baamwo boona nibahwerera omu maisho gaitu." 
Joshua3:1 Yoshua yaimuka kare omu kasheeshe; we n'Abaisraeli boona baaruga Shitimu, baahika Yorudani, baaraarayo batakambukire." 
Joshua3:2 Bwanyima y'ebiro bishatu abatware baagyenda baaraba omu rusiisira," 
Joshua3:3 nibaragiira abantu bati: Ku muraareebe eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu eyekoreirwe abanyamurwa Abaleevi, ahonaaho murugye ahu muri, mugikuratire," 
Joshua3:4 mubone kumanya omuhanda ogu muraatoore, ahakuba timukagurabamuga. Kwonka mutsigye ahagati yaanyu nayo omwanya gwa mikono nk'enkumi ibiri; mutagiirira haihi." 
Joshua3:5 Yoshua yaagambira abantu ati: Mweyeze, ahabw'okuba nyencakare MUKAMA naija kukorera omuriimwe eby'okutangaaza." 
Joshua3:6 Kandi Yoshua yaagambira abanyamurwa ati: Muheekye eshanduukye y'endagaano, mwambukye mwebembeire abantu. Baaheeka eshanduukye y'endagaano, baayebembera abantu." 
Joshua3:7 MUKAMA yaagambira Yoshua ati: Eri izooba niinyija kutandika kukuha ekitiinisa omu maisho g'Abaisraeli boona, bamanye ngu nk'oku naabaire ndi na Musa, nikwo ndikwija kuba naiwe." 
Joshua3:8 Noija kuragiira abanyamurwa abaheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano oti: Ku muraahikye aha nkungu y'amaizi ga Yorudani, muragaremu, mwemerere." 
Joshua3:9 Yoshua yaagambira Abaisraeli ati: Muhikye aha, muhurire ebigambo bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu." 
Joshua3:10 Yoshua yaagira ati: Eki nikyo muraamanyireho ku Ruhanga otahwaho ari omuriimwe kandi ku atariremwa kubinga Abanyakanaani omu maisho ganyu, Abahiiti, Abahiivi, Abaperizi, Abagirugashi, Abaamori n'Abayebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Reeba, eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA ow'ensi yoona neija kubabandiza kuza omuri Yorudani." 
Joshua3:12 Mbwenu mutoorane abantu ikumi na babiri omu nganda za Israeli, omuri buri ruganda mwihemu omuntu omwe." 
Joshua3:13 Ebigyere by'abanyamurwa abaheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, Mukama ow'ensi yoona, ku biraahikye omu maizi ga Yorudani, amaizi ago agarikushuuma nigaruga eruguru nigaija kuzibirwa kugyenda, geemerere geerunzire hamwe." 
Joshua3:14 Batyo abantu baaruga omu mahema gaabo kwambuka Yorudani, beebembeirwe abanyamurwa abaheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano;" 
Joshua3:15 ababaire bagiheekire, ku baahikire ahari Yorudani, baahitsya ebigyere byabo omu maizi, (omu igyesha amaizi ga Yorudani gaijura, garengyera aha nkungu zaayo zoona)" 
Joshua3:16 amaizi agaabaire nigashuuma, nigaruga eruguru, gaayemerera, gaayerunda hamwe hare munonga aha rurembo orurikwetwa Adamu aha rubaju rwa Zaretaani, n'agaabaire nigashuuma omu nyanja ya Araba, niyo Nyanja y'omwonyo, gaahweraho kimwe; abantu baayambuka bagyemire Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Abanyamurwa, abaabaire baheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano eya MUKAMA, baayemerera ahoomire batarikuterera ahagati ya Yorudani; n'Abaisraeli boona baayambukira ahoomire, okuhitsya obu eihanga ryona ryaherize kwambuka Yorudani." 
Joshua4:1 Eihanga ryona ku ryaherize kwambuka Yorudani, MUKAMA yaagambira Yoshua ati:" 
Joshua4:2 Iha abantu ikumi na babiri omu ihanga ryona, omuri buri ruganda oihemu omwe," 
Joshua4:3 obaragiire oti: Mutorotoore amabaare ikumi n'abiri ahagati ya Yorudani, ahi ebigyere by'abanyamurwa byemereire, mugambukane, mugate ahu muraaraare eki kiro." 
Joshua4:4 Yoshua yaayeta abo bantu abu yaatooraine omu Baisraeli, omuntu omwe omuri buri ruganda;" 
Joshua4:5 yaabagira ati: Mwirooko mwebembere eshanduukye ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu okuhika ahagati ya Yorudani, buri muntu weena omuriimwe nk'oku enganda za Israeli zirikwingana, atorotoore eibaare, arite aha ibega," 
Joshua4:6 ako kabe akamanyiso omuriimwe, abaana baanyu ku baribabuuza omu biro ebiriija bati: Amabaare aga nigamanyisa ki?" 
Joshua4:7 naimwe muryabagira ngu amaizi ga Yorudani gakacuubwamu habiri omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA; obu yaayambuka Yorudani, amaizi gaayo gakacuubwamu habiri. Kandi amabaare aga garyaba ekiijutsyo ky'ebiro byona aha Baisraeli." 
Joshua4:8 Abaisraeli baakora nk'oku Yoshua yaabaragiira, baatorotoora amabaare ikumi n'abiri ahagati ya Yorudani agarikwingana n'omubaro gw'enganda z'Abaisraeli, nk'oku MUKAMA agambiire Yoshua; baagambukana, baahika omu mwanya ahu baaraire, baagata aho." 
Joshua4:9 Kandi Yoshua nawe yaabyara amabaare ikumi n'abiri ahagati ya Yorudani ahi ebigyere by'abanyamurwa abaabaire baheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano byayemereire; gakibaho n'okuhitsya hati. 
Joshua4:10 Abanyamurwa abaabaire baheekire eshanduukye baayemerera ahagati ya Yorudani, okuhitsya obu byona ebi MUKAMA yaagambiire Yoshua kumanyisa abantu byahweireyo, nk'ebi Musa yaaragiire Yoshua byona oku byabaire biri; abantu baayambuka nibeehuuta." 
Joshua4:11 Abantu boona ku baaherize kwambuka, eshanduukye ya MUKAMA nayo yaayambuka hamwe n'abanyamurwa, abantu nibabareeba." 
Joshua4:12 Aba Reubeeni n'aba Gaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase nabo baayambuka bakwaitse eby'okurwanisa, beebembeire Abaisraeli, nk'oku Musa yaabagambiire;" 
Joshua4:13 bari nk'obukumi buna beeteekateekyeire orugamba, baayambuka omu maisho ga MUKAMA kurwanira omu mpita za Yeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Aha izooba eryo MUKAMA yaaha Yoshua ekitiinisa omu maisho g'Abaisraeli boona; baaguma nibamutiina ebiro byona eby'amagara ge, nk'oku baabaire batiina Musa." 
Joshua4:15 Kandi MUKAMA yaagambira Yoshua ati: 
Joshua4:16 Ragiira abanyamurwa abaheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano, bainamukye barugye omuri Yorudani." 
Joshua4:17 Yoshua nikwo kuragiira abanyamurwa ati: Mwinamukye murugye omuri Yorudani. 
Joshua4:18 Kandi abanyamurwa abaabaire baheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA ku baarugire omuri Yorudani, ebigyere byabo byahika aha nkungu, amaizi ga Yorudani gaagaruka omu mwanya gwago, gaarengyera aha nkungu zaayo zoona, nk'oku gaabaire gari." 
Joshua4:19 Abantu baaruga omuri Yorudani aha kiro kya ikumi ky'okwezi kw'okubanza, baasiisira Gilugaali aha mwatano gwa Yeriko ogw'oburugwa-izooba." 
Joshua4:20 Kandi amabaare gari ikumi n'abiri agu baihire omuri Yorudani, Yoshua yaagabyara Gilugaali." 
Joshua4:21 Bwanyima yaagambira Abaisraeli ati: Abaana baanyu ku baribuuza baishebo omu biro ebiriija bati: Amabaare aga nigamanyisa ki? 
Joshua4:22 obwo muryabashobororera muti: Abaisraeli bakambuka Yorudani egi eyomire. 
Joshua4:23 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu akoomya amaizi ga Yorudani omu maisho gaanyu, okuhitsya obu mwayambukire, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu yaagizire Enyanja erikutukura, ei yaayomize omu maisho gaitu, okuhitsya obu twayambukire;" 
Joshua4:24 ngu amahanga goona ag'ensi gabone kumanya omukono gwa MUKAMA ku guri ogw'amaani; kandi naimwe mubone kutiina MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ebiro byona. 
Joshua5:1 Abagabe b'Abaamori boona, abaabaire bari seeri ya Yorudani orubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba, n'abagabe b'Abanyakanaani boona, abaabaire batwire aha rubaju rw'enyanja, ku baahuriire ngu MUKAMA ayomize amaizi ga Yorudani omu maisho g'Abaisraeli, okuhitsya obu bambukire, emitima yaabahwa omunda, kandi tibaatsigarwamu mwoyo gwona ahabw'eihanga ry'Abaisraeli." 
Joshua5:2 Omu bunaku obwo MUKAMA akagambira Yoshua ati: Mwebaijere emisyo omu mabaare, oshare Abaisraeli obwa kabiri." 
Joshua5:3 Yoshua yaabaija emisyo omu mabaare, yaasharira Abaisraeli aha mugongo Aralooti." 
Joshua5:4 Kandi ekyareeteire Yoshua okubashara n'eki; abashaija boona abaarugire Misri bakaba baherize kugwa omu muhanda ogurikuraba omu ihamba, barimu abarwani boona abaarugire Misri." 
Joshua5:5 Abantu boona abaarugire Misri bakaba bashazirwe; kwonka boona abu baazaariire omu ihamba bakiri omu muhanda baarugire Misri, bo bakaba batakashazirwe." 
Joshua5:6 Ahakuba Abaisraeli bakamara emyaka makumi ana nibazengyerera omu ihamba, okuhitsya obu abashaija abarwani b'eihanga ryabo ryona baafiire bakahwaho ahabw'okutahurira iraka rya MUKAMA; kandi MUKAMA akaba yaabarahiire ku ataribaikiriza kureeba ensi ei yaaraganiise baishenkurubo kutuha, ensi ey'amate n'obwoki." 
Joshua5:7 N'ahabw'ekyo abaana baabo abu MUKAMA yaagarwire omu mwanya gwabo, nibo Yoshua yaashazire; bakaba batashazirwe, ahabw'okuba tibarashazirwe bakiri omu muhanda." 
Joshua5:8 Abashaija boona, ku baaherize kusharwa, baaguma omu myanya yaabo omu rusiisira, okuhitsya obu baakizire." 
Joshua5:9 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagambira Yoshua ati: Eri izooba naabaihaho ekijumo eky'Abanyamisri. N'ahabw'ekyo omwanya ogwo gukeetwa Gilugaali n'okuhitsya hati. 
Joshua5:10 Abaisraeli ku baabaire bakiri Gilugaali, baagira obugyenyi bw'okwijuka Okuhingurwaho aha kiro ky'okwezi ekya ikumi na bina omu mwabazyo omu mpita za Yeriko."
