Judges16:7 Samusooni yaamugira ati: Ku baakumbohesa enshuri mbisi mushanju ezitakoomire, obwo nkaahwa amaani, mba nk'abandi bantu." 
Judges16:8 Abategyeki b'Abafilistia nikwo kumureetera eshuri mbisi mushanju ezitakoomire, akazimubohesa." 
Judges16:9 Kandi akaba aine abashaija abaabaire bagwereire omu kishengye ky'omunda. Yaamugira ati: Samusooni, waafa, Abafilistia baakwita! Samusooni yaacwa ezo nshuri, nk'akagoye k'obugoigo oku kacweka kaahikwaho omuriro. Obwo tibaamanya i amaani ge gakomooka." 
Judges16:10 Delila yaagira Samusooni ati: Reeba wansungisa, tiwangambira mazima; mbwenu naakweshengyereza, ngambira eki baakukubohesa." 
Judges16:11 Yaamugira ati: Ku baakumbohesa emirunga misya etakagizire ki yaaboha, obwo nkaahwa amaani, mba nk'abandi bantu." 
Judges16:12 Delila nikwo kureeta emirunga misya, akagimubohesa, akamugira ati: Samusooni, waafa, Abafilistia baakwita. Kandi abashaija abaabaire bagwereiire bakaba bari omu kishengye ky'omunda. Egyo mirunga yaagicwa nk'ehuuzi, yaamuruga aha mikono." 
Judges16:13 Delila yaagira Samusooni ati: N'okuhitsya hati nookinshungisa, torikungambira mazima; ngambira eki baakukubohesa. Onu yaamugira ati: Ku waakutsiba obutsibo bwe'eishokye ryangye mushanju, waaburukirana n'omwenda ogurikurukirwa aha biti, waabuhamisa orubambo, obwo nkaahwa amaani, mba nk'abandi bantu." 
Judges16:14 Atyo yaabuhamisa orubambo, yaamugira ati: Samusooni, waafa, Abafilistia baakwita! Yaasisiimuka, yaakuura orwo rubambo n'ebyo biti n'ogwo mwenda." 
Judges16:15 Delila yaamugira ati: Noobaasa ota kugira oti, Ninkukunda, haza omutima gwawe gutandiho? Onshungiise emirundi egi yoona eshatu, kandi otarikungambira i amaani gaawe maingi gakomooka." 
Judges16:16 Ku yaamucondoorize munonga buri izooba, yaaguma naamujugutirira, Samusooni yaarugaho yaaremba;" 
Judges16:17 nikwo kumugambira omubonano gwe gwona, akamugira ati: Orumweiso tirukandabaga ha mutwe, ahakuba okwiha obu naaruga omu nda ya maawe, ntuura ndi Omunaziiri ahari Ruhanga. Ku baakuumwa, obwo nkaahwamu amaani, mba otaine maani, nk'abandi bantu." 
Judges16:18 Deila ku yaareebire yaamugambira omubonano gwe gwona, yaatuma kweta abategyeki b'Abafilistia naagira ati: Mwije obu bwonka, ahakuba yangambira omubonano gwe gwona. Ahonaaho abategyeki b'Abafilistia baija owe, baine empiiha omu ngaro zaabo." 
Judges16:19 Delila yaamugwejegyereza aha maju ge; yaayeta omushaija, yaamugambira kumumwa obutsibo bw'eishokye rye mushanju; yaatandika kumwita kubi, amaani gaamuhweramu kimwe." 
Judges16:20 Yaamugira ati: Samusooni, waafa, Abafilistia baakwita! Yaasisimuka, yaagira ati: Ka nshohore nyekunkumure nk'okwangye. Kwonka akaba atamanyire ku MUKAMA amurugireho." 
Judges16:21 Abafilistia baamukwata, baamwihamu amaisho, baamushuumya Gaaza, baamukomesa emihama y'emiringa; yaaguma naakora omurimo gw'okusa omu nju y'embohe." 
Judges16:22 Kwonka eishokye rye ryagaruka ryamera bwanyima y'okumumwa. 
Judges16:23 Abategyeki b'Abafilistia baateerana abantu okutambira Dagoni ruhanga waabo ekitambo kihango, n'okwesiima; ahakuba bakagira bati: Ruhanga waitu ahaireyo Samusooni omuzigu waitu omu mikono yaitu." 
Judges16:24 Abantu ku baamureebire, baasiima ruhanga waabo; ahakuba bakagira bati: Ruhanga waitu ahaireyo omu mikono yaitu omuzigu waitu obaire naahwerekyereza ensi yaitu, naatwitamu abantu baingi." 
Judges16:25 Bwanyima emitima yaabo ku yaashemerereirwe munonga, baagira bati: Mwete Samusooni, atuzaanire. Baayeta Samusooni kuruga omu nju y'embohe; yaabazaanira; baamuta ahagati y'enyomyo." 
Judges16:26 Samusooni yaagambira omwojo owaabaire amukwaitse omukono, ati: Ka nkorakoze, nkwate enyomyo ezi enju ehamiizeho, nzeegamire." 
Judges16:27 Obwo enju ekaba eijwire abashaija n'abakazi; n'abategyeki b'Abafilistia boona bakaba barimu; kandi n'aha mutwe gw'enju hakaba hariho abantu nk'enkumi ishatu, abashaija n'abakazi, abaabaire nibareeba Samusooni oku arikubazaanira." 
Judges16:28 Samusooni yaatakira MUKAMA ati: Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga, ninkweshengyereza mpa amaani omurundi ogu gwonka, mpoore Abafilistia ahabw'amaisho gangye gombi." 
Judges16:29 Samusooni yaakwata ezo nyomyo ez'ahagati zombi, ezi enju yaabaire ehamiizeho; yaazeegamira, emwe yaagikwatsa omukono gwe gwa buryo, n'endiijo ogwa bumosho." 
Judges16:30 Samusooni yaagira ati: Ka ngwane n'Abafilistia. Yainama n'amaani ge goona; ahonaaho enju yaagwera abategyeki n'abantu boona abaabaire bagirimu. N'ahabw'ekyo abu yaitsire omu kufa kwe baakira abu yaitsire akihuriire. 
Judges16:31 Bwanyima beene waabo n'ab'enju ya ishe boona baashuuma, baamutwara, baamuziika omu kituuro kya Manoa ishe, ahagati ya Zoora na Eshitaoli; obwo akaba amazire emyaka makumi abiri naacwera Abaisraeli emanja." 
Judges17:1 Hakaba hariho omushaija omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, owaabaire naayetwa Miika." 
Judges17:2 Yaagira nyina ati: Ebicweka by'efeeza biri rukumi na igana, ebi baakwibire, bikakureetera kukyeena, nkuhuriire, reeba niinye mbiine. Niinye naabiibire. Nyina yaamugarukamu ati: Mwana wangye, MUKAMA akuhe omugisha." 
Judges17:3 Miika ku yaagaruriire nyina ebyo bicweka by'efeeza rukumi na igana, nyina yaagira ati: Ebi bicweka by'efeeza ebindi omu ngaro, naabishoroorera MUKAMA, ngu omwana wangye abiheeshemu ekishushani ekisharwire; na mbwenu niinyija kubikugarurira." 
Judges17:4 Ku yaaherize kugarurira nyina ezo feeza, nyina yaatwaraho ebicweka magana abiri, yaabiha omuheesi, yaabiheeshamu ekishushani kisharwire; kyaguma omu nju ya Miika." 
Judges17:5 Kandi omushaija ogwo Miika akaba aine endaaro ya baaruhanga be, yaakora efodi na terafimu, kandi yaashoroora omwe aha batabani kuba omunyamurwa we." 
Judges17:6 Omu bunaku obwo hakaba hatariho mugabe omuri Israeli, kureka buri muntu akaba naayekorera nk'oku arikwenda." 
Judges17:7 Kandi hakaba hariho omutsigazi owa Betelehemu-yuda, ow'omu ruganda rwa Yuda, Omuleevi, owaabaire ashuhuukiireyo." 
Judges17:8 Omushaija ogwo yaaruga omu rurembo rwa Betelehemu-yuda, yaaza kusherura ah'okutuura. Ku yaabaire naakigyenda, yaahika aha nju ya Miika omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu." 
Judges17:9 Miika yaamubuuza ati: Nooruga hi? Onu ati: Ndi Omuleevi owa Betelehemu-yuda, ninza kusherura ah'okutuura." 
Judges17:10 Miika yaamugira ati: Tuura naanye, ombeere omuzaire kandi omunyamurwa; naanye ngume nkuhe ebicweka by'efeeza ikumi buri mwaka, nkujwekye kandi nkugaburire. Atyo ogwo Muleevi yaataahamu." 
Judges17:11 Bwanyima yaasiima kuguma n'ogwo mushaija; ogwo mutsigazi yaamubeera nk'omwe aha batabani. 
Judges17:12 Miika yaashoroora ogwo Muleevi, yaaba omunyamurwa we, yaaguma omu nju ye." 
Judges17:13 Bwanyima Miika yaagira ati: Mbwenu nimmanya ngu MUKAMA naija kumpa omugisha, obu ngizire Omuleevi omunyamurwa wangye." 
Judges18:1 Omu bunaku obwo hakaba hatariho mugabe omuri Israeli; kandi omu biro ebyo ab'oruganda rwa Daani bakaba nibasherura ensi y'okutuuramu; ahabw'okuba okuhitsya omu bunaku obwo bakaba batakatungire buhunguzi omu nganda za Israeli. 
Judges18:2 Abadaani baiha omu ruganda rwabo rwona abashaija bataano amamanzi, baabatuma okuruga Zoora na Eshitaoli kuza kutata ensi n'okugyetegyereza; baabagira bati: Nimwirooko mwetegyereze ensi. Baahika aha nju ya Miika omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, baaraarayo." 
Judges18:3 Ku baabaire bari haihi n'enju ya Miika, baamanya eiraka ry'ogwo mutsigazi Omuleevi, baakiikama, baamubuuza bati: Okureetsire aha n'oha? Aha nookoraho ki, kandi oineho murimo ki?" 
Judges18:4 Onu ati: Oku nikwo Miika yantwarize, akandaganisa ebihembo kumukorera; naanye nkaba omunyamurwa we." 
Judges18:5 Baamugira bati: Twakweshengyereza, buuza Ruhanga, tumanye yaaba nitwija kugira omugisha omuri orurugyendo rwaitu." 
Judges18:6 Omunyamurwa yaabagarukamu ati: Mugyende n'obusingye; MUKAMA naija kubarinda omu rugyendo rwanyu. 
Judges18:7 Abo bashaija bataano baagyenda, baahika Laishi, baareeba abantu abaabaire bariyo, beetuuriire n'obusingye, nk'oku omucwe gw'Abasidoni gwabaire guri, batuurize, bataine ki beetaireho; bakaba bari abatungi bataine ki bakyenire omu nsi; bari hare n'Abasidoni, bataine bandi boona abu barikukwatanisa nabo." 
Judges18:8 Ku baagarukire ahari beene waabo omuri Zoora na Eshitaoli, beene waabo baababuuza bati: Nigaahi?" 
Judges18:9 Banu bati: Mwimukye tuze kubateera; ahakuba tureebire ensi, kandi ensi egyo ni nungi munonga. Mushutikirwe ki? Murekye kweziringa, muze omuri egyo nsi, mugikubuure." 
Judges18:10 Ku muraagyende, nimwija kushangayo abantu abeetuuriire n'obusingye, kandi n'ensi eri mpango; buzima Ruhanga agihaireyo omu mikono yaanyu; n'ensi etabuziremu kintu kyona eky'omu nsi." 
Judges18:11 Bwanyima abashaija magana mukaaga ab'omu ruganda rwa Daani, baaruga Zoora na Eshitaoli, bakwaitse eby'okurwanisa." 
Judges18:12 Bainamuka, baateera orusiisira Kiryasi-yearimu omuri Yuda; n'ahabw'ekyo omwanya ogwo baagweta Mahane-Daani n'okuhitsya hati; guri enyima ya Kiryasi-yearimu." 
Judges18:13 Baarugayo, baahika omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu aha nju ya Miika." 
Judges18:14 Ku baahikireyo, abo bashaija bataano abaabaire nibaza kutata ensi ya Laishi, baagira beene waabo bati: Nimumanya ku omuri aga maju harimu efodi na terafimu n'ekishushani kiheesire, kandi ekisharwire? N'ahabw'ekyo muteekateekye eki muraakore." 
Judges18:15 Baakiikama, baataaha omu nju y'ogwo mutsigazi Omuleevi omu ka ya Miika, baamubuuza oku araire;" 
Judges18:16 kandi abo bashaija magana mukaaga ab'omu ruganda rwa Daani baayemerera aha irembo, bakwaitse eby'okurwanisa byabo;" 
Judges18:17 bwanyima abo bashaija bataano abaagiire kutata ensi, baazayo, baataahamu, baihamu ekyo kishushani kiheesire kandi ekisharwire, na efodi na terafimu; omunyamurwa yaayemerera omu irembo hamwe n'abo bashaija magana mukaaga abakwaitse eby'okurwanisa." 
Judges18:18 Abashaija bari ku baataahire omu nju ya Miika, baihamu ekishushani kiheesire kandi ekisharwire, na efodi na terafimu, omunyamurwa yaababuuza ati: Nimukora ki?" 
Judges18:19 Baamugarukamu bati: Hurikiza, igara akanwa; gyenda naitwe otubeere omuzaire kandi omunyamurwa. Ekirikukukirira oburungi n'okuba omunyamurwa w'eka y'omuntu omwe, nari okuba omunyamurwa w'oruganda n'omuryango omuri Israeli?" 
Judges18:20 Omunyamurwa yaashemererwa munonga omu mutima, yaatwara efodi na terafimu n'ekyo kishushani kisharwire, yaagyenda n'abo bashaija bamushagatiire." 
Judges18:21 Batyo baakiikama, baagyenda beebembeize abaana n'amatungo n'ebintu." 
Judges18:22 Ku baabaire baagyendaho akaanya okuruga aha ka ya Miika, abantu abaabaire bari omu maju agari haihi n'eka ya Miika baayeteerana, baakurata Abadaani, baabahika haihi." 
Judges18:23 Baabeeta nibabakubukira. Abadaani baahinduka, baabuuza Miika bati: Obaire ota okutuhururira n'omutwe ogurikwingana gutyo?" 
Judges18:24 Miika yaabagarukamu ati: Mwanyaga baaruhanga bangye abu naakozire, n'omunyamurwa wangye, mwayegyendera; kandi ekindi naatsigarana ki? Mbwenu nimumbuuriza ki ngu, Obaire ota?" 
Judges18:25 Abadaani baamugira bati: Tutagaruka kukuhurira, abanyakiniga batakaakugwaho, bakakwita n'ab'omu ka yaawe." 
Judges18:26 Abadaani baayegyendera; Miika ku yaareebire bamukiza amaani, yaakuba yaagaruka owe." 
Judges18:27 Baatwara ebi Miika yaabaire akozire, n'omunyamurwa ou yaabaire aine, baaza Laishi, baahika omu bantu bari abatuurize, abataine ki beetaireho; baabaitsa rurara, baayotsya orurembo rwabo." 
Judges18:28 Abo bantu baabura kijuna, ahabw'okuba orurembo rwabo rukaba ruri hare na Sidoni, kandi bakaba batarikukwatanisa n'abandi; kandi orurembo rwabo ruri omu ruhanga oruri haihi na Besirehobu. Bwanyima Abadaani baayombekayo orundi rurembo, baarutuuramu." 
Judges18:29 Orwo rurembo baarweta Daani, nibarweterera ishenkurubo Daani, owaazairwe Israeli; kwonka eiziina ry'orwo rurembo ery'okubanza rikaba riri Laishi." 
Judges18:30 Abadaani baayeteeraho ekyo kishushani; kandi Yonasaani mwene Gereshoni, mutabani wa Musa, we n'abatabani baaguma bari abanyamurwa b'oruganda rwa Daani okuhitsya aha izooba eri ensi yaanyagiirweho." 
Judges18:31 Batyo baataho ekyo kishushani kisharwire, eki Miika yaakozire, kyagumaho ebiro byona ebi enju ya Ruhanga yaamazire omuri Shiilo." 
Judges19:1 Omu biro ebi Abaisraeli baabaire bataine mugabe, hakaba hariho Omuleevi owaabaire ashuhuukiire enyima y'ensi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu; yaashwera omukazi w'ekinyanshunju, ou yaihire omuri Betelehemu-yuda." 
Judges19:2 Omukazi we yaamugwerwa kubi, yaayangana, yaagaruka owa ishe omuri Betelehemu-yuda, yaamarayo ameezi ana." 
Judges19:3 Bwanyima iba yaimuka, yaamukurata yaaza kumweshengyereza kumugarura, yaagyenda n'omugaragwa we n'endogoya ibiri; omukazi yaamutaasya omu ka ya ishe; ishezaara ku yaamureebire, yaija kumubugana ashemereirwe." 
Judges19:4 Ishezaara, ishe w'ogwo mwishiki, yaamwosesa, yaamara nawe ebiro bishatu; baarya, baanywa, baaguma aho." 
Judges19:5 Aha kiro kya kana baimuka omu kasheeshe kare, ogwo Muleevi yaimuka kurugayo; ishe w'omwishiki yaagambira omukwe ati: Banza orye akagaati, ogarukwemu amaani, bwanyima obone kugyenda." 
Judges19:6 Batyo baashutama bombi hamwe, baarya, baanywa; bwanyima ishe w'omwishiki yaagambira omukwe ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ikiriza ogarukye oraare, omutima gwawe gushemererwe." 
Judges19:7 Ogwo mushaija ku yaimukire kugyenda, ishezaara yaamweshengyereza, okuhitsya obu yaagarukire akaraarayo." 
Judges19:8 Aha izooba rya kataano yaimuka omu kasheeshe kare kugyenda; ishe w'omwishiki yaagira ati: Huumuza omutima, ninkweshengyereza, osiibe aha okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Batyo baarya hamwe." 
Judges19:9 Omushaija ku yaimukire kugyenda, we n'omukazi we n'omugaragwa we, ishezaara, ishe w'ogwo mwishiki, yaamugira ati: Reeba, eizooba ryahendekire, nimbeeshengyereza mugarukye muraare; reeba, bwaizire, raara, omutima gwawe gushemererwe; nyencakare mugurukye kare, mutaahe." 
Judges19:10 Kwonka omushaija tiyaikiriza kuraara, yaimuka, yaagyenda, yaahika ahashungaine na Yebusi, niyo Yerusalemu; obwo aine endogoya ibiri eziriho amatandiiko, kandi aine n'omukazi we." 
Judges19:11 Ku baahikire haihi na Yebusi, bwashangwa buri haihi kwira; omugaragwa yaagira mukama we ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ija tukiikame, turaare omuri oru rurembo rw'Abayebusi." 
Judges19:12 Mukama we yaamugira ati: Titurikwija kukiikama omu rurembo rw'abanyamahanga, orutari rw'Abaisraeli, kureka twambukye tuhikye Gibea." 
Judges19:13 Yaagaruka yaagambira omugaragwa we ati: Ija tuhikye haihi na Gibea nari Raama, turaare omu rurembo rumwe ahari ezo." 
Judges19:14 Batyo baayogaho, baagyenda; ku baahikire haihi na Gibea eya Benyamiini, eizooba ryarenga." 
Judges19:15 Baakiikamira aho, baaza Gibea kuraarayo. Ku yaahikireyo, yaashutama ahu emihanda y'omu rurembo erikuteeranira, ahakuba tiharabaireho owaikiriize kubaraaza." 
Judges19:16 Bwanyima omuri ogwo mwabazyo haija omugurusi naaruga omu musiri ei yaabaire naakora; omugurusi ogwo akaba ari ow'omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, owaabaire ashuhuukiire Gibea; kwonka ab'omuri orwo rurembo bakaba bari Ababenyamiini." 
Judges19:17 Ku yaanagire amaisho, yaareeba omugyenzi omu nguuto y'orwo rurembo. Ogwo mugurusi yaamubuuza ati: Nooruga hi, kandi nooza hi?" 
Judges19:18 Yaamugarukamu ati: Nituruga Betelehemu-yuda, nituza enyima y'ensi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu; niyo naarugire, ninza Betelehemu-yuda; mbwenu ninza omu nju ya MUKAMA, ahakuba tihariho owaikiriza kundaaza." 
Judges19:19 Kwonka twine embuba n'eby'okurya by'endogoya zaitu; kandi twine omugaati na viinyo ahabwangye n'omuzaana waawe n'omutsigazi ou twine; titwine ki turikwetenga. 
Judges19:20 Omugurusi yaagira ati: Huumura! niinyija kukukorera ebi orikwetenga byona; kwonka otaraara omu muhanda. 
Judges19:21 Atyo yaabataasya omu ka ye, yaaha endogoya z'ogwo mushaija eby'okurya, baanaaba ebigyere, baarya, baanywa." 
Judges19:22 Ku baabaire nibakishemererwa, haija abantu b'abanyarurembo abataine mugasho, baayehinguririza egyo nju, baateera orwigi, baagambira ogwo mugurusi nyineeka, bati: Shohoza ogwo mushaija owaija omu nju yaawe, tumumanye." 
Judges19:23 Omushaija nyineeka yaashohora ahu baabaire bari, yaabagira ati: Beene waitu, murekye, naabeeshengyereza, mutakora ekibi ekirikwingana kityo; ogu mushaija yaataahire omu nju yangye, mutakora ekihagaro ekirikushusha kityo." 
Judges19:24 Reeba, hariho muhara wangye empangare, n'omukazi w'ogu mushaija; ka mbe nibo naashohoza hati, mubashiishe, mubagire nk'oku murikwenda; kwonka omushaija ogu mutamukoraho ekihagaro ekirikushusha kityo." 
Judges19:25 Abo bashaija baayanga kumuhurira; ogwo mushaija omugyenyi nikwo kukwata omukazi we w'ekinyanshunju, akamushohoza ahu bari, bakamumanya, bakamushiisha ekiro kyona okuhitsya omu kasheeshe; ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, baamurekura." 
Judges19:26 Omukazi yaija nibusheesha, yaagwa aha rwigi rw'enju y'ogwo mushaija, omu mukama we yaabaire ari, okuhitsya obu bwaseesire." 
Judges19:27 Mukama we ku yaimukire omu kasheeshe, yaigura enyigi z'enju, naashohora kugyenda, yaashanga ogwo mukazi we w'ekinyanshunju agwire ahansi, engaro ze ziri omu kisasi." 
Judges19:28 Yaamugira ati: Imuka tugyende. Akateezo kaabura; bwanyima omushaija yaamuta aha ndogoya, yaimuka, yaaza owaabo." 
Judges19:29 Ku yaataahire omu nju ye, yaihayo omusyo, yaakwata omutumbi gw'omukazi we, yaagutemaatemera omu ngingo, yaagucwamu ebicweka ikumi na bibiri, yaabyohereza omu mashaza goona aga Israeli." 
Judges19:30 Abaakireebire boona baagira bati: Ekintu nk'eki tikikakorwaga, kandi tikikareebwaga, okwiha obu Abaisraeli baaruga omu nsi ya Misri n'okuhitsya hati. Mukiteekateekyeho, mukihanuureho, kandi mukigambeho." 
Judges20:1 Bwanyima Abaisraeli boona baaruga omu ndembo zaabo, baateeranira hamwe baine enaama emwe, okuruga ahari Daani okuhika Beeri-sheba, hamwe n'ab'ensi ya Gileadi, baateeranira Mizipa omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Judges20:2 Abategyeki b'eihanga ryona ery'enganda za Israeli zoona, baayeyoreka omu mutwe gw'abantu ba Ruhanga, abashaija enkwata-rurara obusiriira buna abarikugyendesa ebigyere." 
Judges20:3 (Kandi Ababenyamiini bakaba bahuriire ku Abaisraeli bainamukire Mizipa.) Abaisraeli baabuuza bati: Tugambire, ekibi ekyo kikakorwa kita?" 
Judges20:4 Ogwo Muleevi, iba w'omukazi owaitsirwe, yaagarukamu naagira ati: Nyowe nkaija Gibea eya Benyamiini n'omukazi wangye w'ekinyanshunju kuraarayo." 
Judges20:5 Abashaija ba Gibea bantaahirira, bankubira omu nju nyekiro; nyowe baayenda kuunyita, n'omukazi wangye baamuhamba n'amaani, yaafa." 
Judges20:6 Naakwata omukazi wangye, naamucwamu ebicweka, naabyohereza omu mashaza goona ag'obuhunguzi bwa Israeli; ahabw'okuba bakakora ekibi ky'obushambani, kandi ekihagaro omuri Israeli." 
Judges20:7 Imwe Abaisraeli mwena, mureebe, mukihanuureho, mugambire aha ekishemereire kukorwa." 
Judges20:8 Abantu boona baimuka nk'omuntu omwe, nibagira bati: Tihaine n'omwe omuriitwe oraaze omu ihema rye, nari oraagarukye omu ka ye." 
Judges20:9 Kureka hati oku nikwo turaagire Gibea; nitwija kugiteera, twaheza kuteera enteenyu." 
Judges20:10 Kandi nitwija kutoorana abashaija ikumi omu bantu igana, na igana omu bantu rukumi, na rukumi omu bantu kakumi, nitubaiha omu nganda zoona eza Israeli, b'okuza kureetera engabo entanda, ezo ngabo ku ziraahikye Gibea eya Benyamiini, zibone kubakora nk'ebihagaro byona ebi baakozire omuri Israeli oku biri." 
Judges20:11 Batyo Abaisraeli boona baateeranira hamwe, baine enaama emwe, kurwanisa orwo rurembo." 
Judges20:12 Ab'enganda za Israeli baatuma entumwa omu ruganda rwona orwa Benyamiini, nizigira ziti: Eki ni kibi ki ekikozirwe omuriimwe?" 
Judges20:13 Mbwenu nu mutuhe abo bashaija ba Gibea abataine mugasho, tubaite, twihe ekibi omuri Israeli. Kwonka Ababenyamiini baayanga kuhurira Abaisraeli beene waabo." 
Judges20:14 Ababenyamiini baaruga omu ndembo zaabo, baateeranira Gibea kurwanisa Abaisraeli." 
Judges20:15 Eryo izooba baabara Ababenyamiini abarugire omu ndembo zaabo, abashaija enkwata-rurara obukumi bubiri n'enkumi mukaaga, otabariiremu ab'omuri Gibea, abashaija b'entoore magana mushanju." 
Judges20:16 Omuri abo bantu boona hakaba harimu abashaija b'entoore magana mushanju abarikutwara emosho; buri muntu omuribo akaba abaasa kurekyeza enjungu y'eibaare, n'akashokye akateera, atahembye." 
Judges20:17 N'Abaisraeli abaabazirwe, otabariiremu Ababenyamiini, bakaba bari obusiriira buna enkwata-rurara; kandi abo boona bakaba bari abarwani." 
Judges20:18 Abaisraeli baimuka, baaza Beseeli, baabuuza Ruhanga obwengye, nibagira bati: Nibaahi omuriitwe abaraabanze kurwanisa Ababenyamiini? MUKAMA yaagarukamu ati: Abayuda nibo baraabanzeyo." 
Judges20:19 Abaisraeli baimuka omu kasheeshe, baateera orusiisira kurwanisa Gibea;" 
Judges20:20 baahurura kuteera Ababenyamiini, baatenga orugamba kurwanira nabo Gibea." 
Judges20:21 Ababenyamiini baashohora, baita Abaisraeli, baabaraza nk'ebiti, haafa abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri." 
Judges20:22 Kwonka Abaisraeli baayezirika, baagaruka baatenga orugamba omu mwanya ogu baarutengyeiremu okubanza." 
Judges20:23 Abaisraeli bainamuka, baaririra omu maisho ga MUKAMA okuhitsya omu mwabazyo, baabuuza MUKAMA bati: Tugarukye turwane n'Ababenyamiini beene waitu? MUKAMA yaagarukamu ati: Nimwirooko mubateere." 
Judges20:24 Batyo Abaisraeli bairirira Ababenyamiini kubarwanisa aha izooba rya kabiri. 
Judges20:25 Aha izooba eryo Ababenyamiini baaruga omuri Gibea, baabarwanisa, baagaruka baababingira kimwe, baabaitamu abantu kakumi n'enkumi munaana; kandi abo boona bakaba bari abashaija enkwata-rurara." 
Judges20:26 Bwanyima Abaisraeli boona, engabo zoona, bainamuka, baaza Beseeli, baashutama omu maisho ga MUKAMA, baarira; eryo izooba baayesiibyakwo okuhitsya omu mwabazyo; baahonga ebitambo by'okwotsya n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Judges20:27 Abaisraeli baabuuza MUKAMA, (ahakuba omuri ebyo biro eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA niyo yaabaire eri;" 
Judges20:28 na Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari, mutabani wa Arooni niwe yaabaire aheereza MUKAMA omu maisho gaayo) nibagira bati: Tugarukye turwane n'Ababenyamiini beene waitu, nari turereere? MUKAMA yaagarukamu ati: Nimwirooko; ahakuba nyencakare niinyija kubahayo omu mikono yaanyu." 
Judges20:29 Abaisraeli baataho ab'okugwera aha mbaju zoona eza Gibea. 
Judges20:30 Aha izooba rya kashatu Abaisraeli baahurura kuteera Ababenyamiini, baatenga orugamba kurwanira nabo Gibea, nk'oku babaire baarwaine nabo obundi." 
Judges20:31 Ababenyamiini baashohora kubarwanisa, baabeihwabeihwa, baaruga omu rurembo; baatandika kuteera Abaisraeli n'okubaita nk'oku babaire baakozire obundi; baabaitira omu muhanda ogurikuza Beseeli n'ogurikuza Geeba, n'omu bwerere; baabaitamu abantu nka makumi ashatu." 
Judges20:32 Ababenyamiini baagira bati: Twababinga nk'okubanza. Kwonka Abaisraeli baagira bati: Ka tuhungye, tubabeihabeihe, tubaihe omu rurembo tubahitsye omu mihanda." 
Judges20:33 Abaisraeli boona baimuka omu mwanya ogu babaire barimu, baatenga orugamba Baali-tamari; kandi abaabaire bagwereire baajumbutuka omu mwanya ogu babaire barimu Maaregeeba." 
Judges20:34 Omu Baisraeli boona haarugamu abashaija entoore kakumi, baateera Gibea; orugamba rwahama; kwonka aba Gibea bakaba batamanyire ku bari omu kabi." 
Judges20:35 MUKAMA yaasingura Ababenyamiini omu maisho g'Abaisraeli; eryo izooba Abaisraeli baacwekyereza omu Babenyamiini abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano na igana; kandi abo boona bakaba bari abashaija enkwata-rurara. 
Judges20:36 Ababenyamiini baareeba Abaisraeli ku baabingwa, ahabw'okuba Abaisraeli bakabahunga ahabw'okwesiga abagwereire abu bataire haihi na Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Abaabaire bagwereire baajumbutuka, baayetuura omuri Gibea, baacwekyereza orurembo rwona na rurara." 
Judges20:38 Kandi Abaisraeli boona bakaba baragaine akamanyiso n'abaabaire bagwereire, ngu ku baraacumbuutsye omwika mwingi nk'ekicu omu rurembo," 
Judges20:39 Abaisraeli bakubuukye, barwane. Obwo Ababenyamiini bakaba batandikire kubinga Abaisraeli n'okubaitamu abantu nka makumi ashatu; ahakuba bakagira bati: Buzimazima twababingira kimwe nk'okubanza." 
Judges20:40 Kwonka omwika ogurikushusha nk'enyomyo ku gwatandikire kucumbuuka omu rurembo, Ababenyamiini baareeba enyima, baashanga orurembo rwona nirucumbuuka omwika okuhika ahaiguru." 
Judges20:41 Abaisraeli baabahindukana, Ababenyamiini baashoberwa, ahakuba bakareeba akabi kaabahikaho." 
Judges20:42 N'ahabw'ekyo baateera Abaisraeli amabega, baahunga nibatoora omu ihamba; kwonka engabo z'Abaisraeli zaabakurata zibahambize, kandi ezaarugire omu ndembo zaabatanga omumaisho, zaabacwekyereza." 
Judges20:43 Batyo baatangatanga Ababenyamiini embaju zoona, baababinga, baabaribatiirira okuruga ahari Noha, okuhika ahashungaine na Geeba oburugwa-izooba." 
Judges20:44 Omu Babenyamiini haafamu abantu kakumi n'enkumi munaana, boona abaabaire bari amamanzi." 
Judges20:45 Abaatsigaireho baahinduka, baahungira omu ihamba okuhika aha rukiri rwa Rimona; bakiri omu muhanda Abaisraeli baabaitamu abantu enkumi itaano; baagumizamu bababingire okuhika Gidomu, baitirayo abandi enkumi ibiri." 
Judges20:46 N'ahabw'ekyo boona abaafiire omu Babenyamiini eryo izooba baahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano, abashaija enkwata-rurara kandi amamanzi." 
Judges20:47 Kwonka abashaija magana mukaaga baahinduka, baahungira omu ihamba, baahika aha rukiri rwa Rimona, baagumayo okumara ameezi ana." 
Judges20:48 Abaisraeli baagaruka baahindukana Ababenyamiini, baacwekyereza orurembo rwona na rurara, abantu n'amatungo n'ebi baashangiremu byona; kandi n'endembo zoona ezi baahikiremu baazootsya n'omuriro." 
Judges21:1 Kandi Abaisraeli bakaba barahiriire Mizipa bati: Tihariho muntu weena omuriitwe orihingira omu Babenyamiini muhara we. 
Judges21:2 Abantu baagaruka Beseeli, baaguma bashutami omu maisho ga Ruhanga okuhitsya omu mwabazyo, baarira nibaborooga munonga." 
Judges21:3 Baagira bati: Ai bambe MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, eki kibeereireho ki, oruganda rumwe hati okubura omuri Israeli?" 
Judges21:4 Ku bwaseesire, abantu baimuka kare, baayombekayo eitambiro, baahonga ebitambo by'okwotsya n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye." 
Judges21:5 Abaisraeli baabuuza bati: Omu nganda za Israeli otaizire mu iteeraniro ahari MUKAMA n'oha? Ahakuba bakaba barahiire endahiro ehamire aha muntu weena oriba ataizire Mizipa ahari MUKAMA, nibagira bati: Buzimazima aryaitwa." 
Judges21:6 Abaisraeli baayefuuza ahabw'Ababenyamiini beene waabo, nibagira bati: Eri izooba hariho oruganda orucwirwe omuri Israeli." 
Judges21:7 Mbwenu tugire tuta okusherurira abaahonokireho abakazi, ku turaabe twarahiire ngu tituribahingira bahara baitu?" 
Judges21:8 Baagaruka baabuuza bati: Ni ruganda ki omu nganda za Israeli orutainamukire Mizipa ahari MUKAMA? Ku baagiire kwetegyereza, baashanga hataine n'omwe orugire Yabeshi-gileadi okwija omu rusiisira ahu bateeraniire;" 
Judges21:9 ahabw'okuba ku baabazire abantu, baashanga omu bantu ba Yabeshi-gileadi hatariho n'omwe." 
Judges21:10 Eiteeraniro ryona ryatumayo abashaija amamanzi, abarikukira abandi boona, kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, baabaragiira bati: Mugyende mucwekyereze aba Yabeshi-gileadi na rurara, n'abakazi baabo n'abaana baabo." 
Judges21:11 Eki mube nikyo mwakora; mucwekyerereze kimwe abashaija boona na buri mukazi weena oraraire n'omushaija. 
Judges21:12 Omu ba Yabeshi-gileadi baashangayo abaishiki magana ana, abaabaire batakamanyaga bashaija; baabareeta omu rusiisira orwabaire ruri Shiilo omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Judges21:13 Eihanga ryona ryatuma aha Babenyamiini, abaabaire bari omu rukiri rwa Rimona, baabahuumuriza." 
Judges21:14 Ababenyamiini baagaruka obwo; baabaha abo baishiki abu baakirize omu ba Yabeshi-gileadi; kwonka tibaabahika. 
Judges21:15 Abantu baagaruka baayefuuza ahabw'Ababenyamiini, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akaba areetsire ekyasha omuri Israeli." 
Judges21:16 Bwanyima abakuru b'eihanga baagira bati: Mbwenu tugire tuta okusherurira abatsigaireho abakazi, abakazi ku baraabe bahweireho omuri Benyamiini?" 
Judges21:17 Baagira bati: Ababenyamiini abahonokire aha icumu bashemereire kugira ab'okubahungurira, harekye kugira oruganda orwahwaho muri Israeli." 
Judges21:18 Kwonka titurikubaasa kubahingira bahara baitu, ahabw'okuba Abaisraeli bakaba barahiire bati: Omuntu weena orihingira muhara we omu Babenyamiini akyenwe." 
Judges21:19 Baagaruka baagira bati: Nimumanya ku habaho obugyenyi bwa MUKAMA buri mwaka omuri Shiilo, eri aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bwa Beseeli aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba bw'omuhanda ogurikuruga Beseeli nigwinamuka Shekemu, kandi aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bwa Lebona." 
Judges21:20 Baaragiira Ababenyamiini bati: Mwirooko muze omu misiri y'emizaabibu," 
Judges21:21 mugume mugwereire; abaishiki ba Shiilo ku baraabe nibaza kuzina, mugurukye omu misiri y'emizaabibu, buri muntu ayekwatire omukazi omuri abo baishiki ba Shiilo; bwanyima mugarukye omu nsi ya Benyamiini." 
Judges21:22 Baishebo nari banyaanyabo ku baraije kututonganaho, nitwija kubagira tuti: Mubatuhe ahabw'embabazi, ahabw'okuba buri muntu tituramunyagiire mukazi omu rugamba; kandi naimwe timurababahaire; kuri niimwe mwababahaire, mukaagizire orubanja." 
Judges21:23 Ababenyamiini baakora batyo; baayekwatira abakazi omuri abo abaabaire nibaza kuzina, nk'oku abashaija baabaire nibaingana, baabatwara; bwanyima baagyenda, baagaruka omu buhunguzi bwabo, baayombeka endembo ezaabaire zisheenyirwe, baazituuramu." 
Judges21:24 Kandi Abaisraeli baarugayo omu bunaku obwo, buri muntu yaagaruka omu ruganda rwe n'omuri beene waabo. Okuruga aho buri muntu yaaza omu buhunguzi bwe." 
Judges21:25 Omu bunaku obwo hakaba hatariho mugabe omuri Israeli; kureka buri muntu akaba naayekorera nk'oku arikwenda. 
Ruth1:1 Omu biro by'okutegyeka kw'abaramuzi, hakabaho enjara omu nsi. Omushaija wa Betelehemu-Yuda yaashuhuukira omu nsi ya Moabu, we n'omukazi we n'abatabani bombi." 
Ruth1:2 Ogwo mushaija akaba naayetwa Elimeleki, n'omukazi we naayetwa Naomi, n'amaziina g'abatabani gakaba gari Mahalooni na Kilioni; bakaba bari aba Efuraata, aba Betelehemu-Yuda. Ku baahikire omu nsi ya Moabu, baatuurayo." 
Ruth1:3 Bwanyima Elimeleki iba wa Naomi yaafa; Naomi yaatsigara n'abatabani bombi. 
Ruth1:4 Baashwera Abamoabukazi, omwe akaba naayetwa Orupa, n'ondi Ruusi; baamarayo emyaka nka ikumi." 
Ruth1:5 Bwanyima Mahalooni na Kilioni bombi baafa; Naomi ogwo yaafeerwa iba n'abatabani bombi. 
Ruth1:6 Bwanyima yaimuka n'abakaamwana kugarukayo naaruga omu nsi ya Moabu; ahakuba akaba yaahuririire omu nsi ya Moabu, ku MUKAMA ataayaayiire abantu be, akabaha eby'okurya." 
Ruth1:7 Yaaruga ahu yaabaire ari hamwe n'abakaamwana bombi, baakwata omuhanda kugaruka omu nsi ya Yuda." 
Ruth1:8 Naomi yaagira abakaamwana ati: Mwirooko, buri omwe agarukye omu nju ya nyina. MUKAMA abakorere eby'embabazi, nk'oku mwabinkoreire na baanyakufa." 
Ruth1:9 MUKAMA abahe obuhuumure, buri omwe omu ka ya iba. Yaabanywegyera, baimutsya amaraka, baarira." 
Ruth1:10 Baamugarukamu bati: Ngaaha, kureka nitwija kugarukayo naiwe omu bantu b'owaanyu." 
Ruth1:11 Naomi yaabagira ati: Baana bangye, mugarukyeyo; nimwendera ki kugyenda naanye? Nimugira ngu nkiine abandi baana omunda, ngu nyentsya babe abashaija baanyu?" 
Ruth1:12 Baana bangye, mwegyendere, mugarukyeyo, ahakuba nkuzire, tinkiri w'okushwerwa. Nangwa n'obu naakugira nti, nyine amatsiko, nari n'obu naakushwerwa omushaija eki kiro, naazaara abaana b'aboojo," 
Ruth1:13 ebyo mukaabategyereza, okuhitsya ahu barikurira? Haza ekyo kibazibira kushwerwa? Ngaaha, baana bangye; ninshaasha munonga ahabwanyu, ahakuba MUKAMA abangire omukono gwe kundwanisa." 
Ruth1:14 Baagaruka baimutsya amaraka gaabo, baarira. Orupa yaanywegyera nyinazaara, kwonka Ruusi we yaamubaho akaramata." 
Ruth1:15 Naomi yaamugira ati: Reeba, muka baro yaagaruka omuri beene waabo, n'ahari ruhanga we; naiwe garukayo, okurate muka baro." 
Ruth1:16 Ruusi yaamugarukamu ati: Reka kuunyeshengyereza kukutsigaho, n'obu kwakuba okugarukayo, ngu ndekye kukukuratira; ahakuba ahu oriza hoona, naanye niho ndiza; ahu oriraara, naanye niho ndiraara; abantu baawe nibo bariba abantu bangye, kandi Ruhanga waawe niwe ariba Ruhanga wangye." 
Ruth1:17 Ahu origwa, naanye niho ndigwa, kandi niho ndiziikwa. Ku harigira ekyantaanisa naiwe, kitari rufu, MUKAMA akinture n'okukiraho." 
Ruth1:18 Naomi ku yaareebire amaririire kimwe kugyenda nawe, yaarekyera aho kumugambira." 
Ruth1:19 Batyo baagumizamu bombi okuhitsya obu baahikire Betelehemu. Ku baahikireyo, ab'omu rurembo boona baajagarara ahabwabo, abakazi baabuuzana bati: Beitu ogu ni Naomi?" 
Ruth1:20 Yaabagarukamu ati: Murekye kuunyeta Naomi, kureka muunyete Maara; ahabw'okuba Ow'obushoboorozi bwona akankorera ebirikushaarira munonga." 
Ruth1:21 Nkaruga kunu nyijwire, mbwenu MUKAMA yangarura ntaine kantu. Nimuunyetera ki Naomi, haza nimureeba oku MUKAMA ambonaboneise, kandi Ow'obushoboorozi bwona oku angwisiize akagwe." 
Ruth1:22 Okwo nikwo Naomi yaagarukire na Ruusi Omumoabukazi omukaamwana, nibaruga omu nsi ya Moabu. Baahika Betelehemu omu itogyera rya sayiri." 
Ruth2:1 Kandi Naomi akaba aine omunyabuzaare ow'oruganda rwa iba, omushaija omutungi rugambwa, ow'omuryango gwa Elimeleki, eiziina rye Boazi." 
Ruth2:2 Ruusi Omumoabukazi yaagira Naomi ati: Ka nze omu misiri, mpumbe engano ninkuratira orangirire embabazi. Yaamugira ati: Irooko, mwana wangye." 
Ruth2:3 Yaagyenda, yaahika omu misiri, yaahumba akuratiire abarikugyesha; yaahika aha kicweka ky'emisiri ekyabaire kiri ekya Boazi, ow'omuryango gwa Elimeleki, kwonka atakimanyire." 
Ruth2:4 Kandi reeba, Boazi yaija naaruga Betelehemu, yaaramutsya abagyesi ati: MUKAMA agume naimwe. Nabo baamugarukamu bati: MUKAMA akuhe omugisha." 
Ruth2:5 Bwanyima Boazi yaabuuza omunyampara w'abagyesi ati: Omwishiki ogu n'ow'oha? 
Ruth2:6 Omunyampara ogwo yaagarukamu ati: N'omwishiki w'Omumoabu owaagarukire na Naomi okuruga omu nsi ya Moabu. 
Ruth2:7 Ku yaija, yangira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, nyikiriza mpumbe ninshanguruza nkuratiire abagyesi ahagati y'ebiba. Atyo yaija, yaiha omu kasheeshe naahumba n'okuhitsya hati, kureka akaanya kakye, aku yaahuumuraho omu nju." 
Ruth2:8 Bwanyima Boazi yaagira Ruusi ati: Hurira, mwana wangye! Otaza kuhumba omu gundi musiri, kandi otaruga omuri ogu, kureka ogume haihi n'abazaana bangye." 
Ruth2:9 Ogume otaire amaisho aha musiri ogu barikugyesha, kandi obakuratire. Tiwaahurira ku naayehanangiriza abatsigazi, ngu hatagira owaakukoraho? Kandi ku oraagire eiriho, oze aha nyungu, onywe aha maizi agu abatsigazi baataha." 
Ruth2:10 Ruusi yaajuumara ahansi, yaamugira ati: N'enki ekyakureetera kungirira embabazi n'okuunyetaho, haza ndi omunyaihanga?" 
Ruth2:11 Boazi yaamugarukamu ati: Banshobororeire gye byona ebi waakoreire nyokozaara okwiha obu baro yaafa, kandi n'oku waatsigireho sho na nyoko n'ensi yaanyu, okaija omu bantu abu waabaire otakamanyaga." 
Ruth2:12 MUKAMA akuzimuurire ahabw'ebi waakozire; MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli; ou waahungiire omu mapapa ge, akuhe ebihembo byawe byona bitacwirweho." 
Ruth2:13 Ruusi yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, wangirira embabazi nyingi, ahabw'okuba wampuumuriza, kandi waagamba gye n'omuzaana waawe, n'obu ndaabe ntari nk'omwe aha bazaana baawe." 
Ruth2:14 Obunaku bw'okurya ku bwahikire, Boazi yaamugira ati: Ija aha, orye eby'okurya, okoze ekitongye kyawe omuri viinyo. Ruusi yaashutama aha rubaju rw'abagyesi; baamuha sayiri ekarangire, yaarya, yaahaaga, yaagitsigaho." 
Ruth2:15 Kandi ku yaimukire kugaruka kuhumba, Boazi yaaragiira abatsigazi be ati: Mumurekye ahumbe n'omu biba, mutamujuma." 
Ruth2:16 Kandi mumwihire ezindi omu biba, muzitsigye aho, azihumbe, mutamugambaho." 
Ruth2:17 Atyo yaahumba omuri ogwo musiri okuhitsya omu mwabazyo; bwanyima yaahuura ebi yaahumba, haarugamu eefa ya sayiri." 
Ruth2:18 Yaagyekorera, yaaza omu rurembo, nyinazaara yaareeba ei yaahumba; Ruusi yaiha omu kikondooro ebi yaatsigaza yaaheza kurya, yaabimuha." 
Ruth2:19 Nyinazaara yaamubuuza ati: Waahumba hi eri izooba? Kandi waakora hi? Owaakwetaho aheebwe omugisha. Yaagambira nyinazaara mukama w'omusiri, ogu yaakoramu, yaamugira ati: Mukama w'omusiri ogu naakoramu eri izooba naayetwa Boazi." 
Ruth2:20 Naomi yaagira omukaamwana ati: Ogwo mushaija aheebwe omugisha ahari MUKAMA, otarekire kugirira mbabazi abakiriho na baanyakufa. Naomi yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Ogwo mushaija ni mwene waitu ow'obuzaare bwa haihi, omwe ah'abashemereire kutucungura." 
Ruth2:21 Ruusi Omumoabukazi yaamugira ati: N'ekya buzima yangira ati: Ogume haihi n'abairu bangye, okuhitsya obu baraaheze kugyesha emisiri yangye yoona." 
Ruth2:22 Naomi yaagira Ruusi omukaamwana ati: Mwana wangye, ni kirungi ogume ogyende n'abazaana be, barekye kukushanga omu gundi musiri." 
Ruth2:23 Okuruga obwo yaaguma haihi n'abazaana ba Boazi, naahumba okuhitsya aha muheru gw'eishaaruura rya sayiri n'engano; kandi yaaguma na nyinazaara." 
Ruth3:1 Bwanyima Naomi nyinazaara yaagira Ruusi ati: Mwana wangye, tinshemereire kukusherurira amaka, okabona kuba gye?" 
Ruth3:2 Boazi, ou obaire ori hamwe n'abazaana be, titwine nawe obuzaare? Reeba, eki kiro naaheheeza sayiri aha mbuga y'okuhuuriraho." 
Ruth3:3 N'ahabw'ekyo yoga, oyesiigye, ojware gye, oshuume aha mbuga y'okuhuuriraho; kwonka orekye kumwegambira, atakaherize kurya n'okunywa." 
Ruth3:4 Kandi ku araabyame, oyetegyereze ahu yaabyama, ogyende omushwekuure ebigyere, obyame; bwanyima naija kukugambira eki oraakore." 
Ruth3:5 Ruusi yaamugarukamu ati: Ebi waagamba byona naaza kubikora. 
Ruth3:6 Yaashuuma yaaza aha mbuga, yaakora nk'oku nyinazaara yaamuragiira." 
Ruth3:7 Boazi ku yaaherize kurya n'okunywa, omutima gwe gwashemererwa, yaagyenda yaabyama aha rubaju rw'ekirundo ky'engano; Ruusi yaija naashooba, yaashwekuura ebigyere bye, yaabyama." 
Ruth3:8 Omu itumbi ogwo mushaija yaayekanga, yaahinduka, yaashanga omukazi abyami aha bigyere bye." 
Ruth3:9 Yaamubuuza ati: Ori oha, iwe? Onu yaagarukamu ati: Ndi omuzaana waawe Ruusi; shweka omuzaana waawe ekijwaro kyawe; ahakuba niiwe waitu ow'okutucungura." 
Ruth3:10 Boazi yaagira ati: Mwana wangye, MUKAMA akuhe omugisha! Ebirungi ebi waayoreka hati nibikira ebi waayorekire ira, ahabw'okuba tosherwire batsigazi, yaaba booro nari abatungi." 
Ruth3:11 Mbwenu mwana wangye, otatiina. Niinyija kukukorera ebi waagamba byona; ahabw'okuba bagyenzi bangye boona ab'omuri oru rurembo nibamanya ku ori omukazi w'omutima." 
Ruth3:12 N'ekya buzima kwo ndi oshemereire kubacungura; kwonka hariho ondiijo orikunkira kuba haihi. 
Ruth3:13 Raara aha eki kiro; omu kasheeshe ku araikirize kukukorera ebi omunyabuzaare akora, ni kirungi; abikore; kwonka ku araayangye kubikukorera, nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, niinyija kukukorera ebi omucunguzi w'obuzaare bwa haihi ashemereire kukora; mbwenu byama busheeshe." 
Ruth3:14 Yaabyama aha bigyere bye, bwarugaho bwasheesha; yaimuka butakahwerize, ahu omuntu ateetegyerereza mugyenzi we; ahabw'okuba Boazi akagira ngu kirekye kumanywa ku ogwo mukazi aizire aha mbuga." 
Ruth3:15 Kandi yaamugira ati: Reeta ogwo munagiro gu ojwaire, ogutegye. Onu yaagumutega; yaamushukiraho encuro mukaaga za sayiri, yaazimukorera; Ruusi yaataaha omu rurembo." 
Ruth3:16 Ku yaahikire owa nyinazaara, nyinazaara yaamubuuza ati: Bigyenzire bita, mwana wangye? Ruusi yaamugambira ebi ogwo mushaija amukoreire byona." 
Ruth3:17 Kandi ati: Ezi ncuro mukaaga za sayiri niwe yaazimpa; ahakuba yangira ati: Otagaruka ahari nyokozaara engaro nsha. 
Ruth3:18 Naomi yaamugira ati: Yeshutamire, mwana wangye, okuhitsya ahu oraamanyire oku biraabe; ahabw'okuba ogwo mushaija tarikwija kuhuumura atakabiherize." 
Ruth4:1 Bwanyima Boazi yaaza aha irembo, yaashutama; kandi reeba, ogwo ow'obuzaare bwa haihi, ou Boazi yaagambireho, yaija naarabaho. Boazi yaamweta ati: Yeiwe! ndabaho, oshutame aha kakye. Yaakiikama, yaashutama." 
Ruth4:2 Boazi yaareeta abashaija ikumi aha bakuru b'orwo rurembo, yaabagira ati: Mushutame aha! Baashutama." 
Ruth4:3 Yaagambira ogwo ow'obuzaare bwa haihi ati: Naomi ogarukire naaruga omu nsi ya Moabu, naatunda ekibanja ekyabaire kiri ekya mwene waitu Elimeleki;" 
Ruth4:4 mbwenu nteekateekire kukikugambira, nti: Okigurire omu maisho g'aba abari aha n'omu maisho g'abakuru b'oruganda rwaitu. Ku oraabe nooyenda kukicungura, okucungure; nari ku oraabe otarikwenda, nabwo ongambire, nkimanye; ahabw'okuba tihariho ondiijo ow'okukicungura kureka iwe, naanye orikukukurata. Onu yaagira ati: Niinyija kukicungura." 
Ruth4:5 Bwanyima Boazi yaagira ati: Eizooba eri oraagurireho ekyo kibanja na Naomi, omanye ku oshemereire kukigura n'ahari Ruusi Omumoabukazi, muka nyakufa, okugaruraho eiziina rya nyakufa omu buhunguzi bwe." 
Ruth4:6 Ogwo munyabuzaare bwa haihi yaagarukamu ati: Nyowe tindikubaasa kukicungura, ntakaashisha obuhunguzi bwangye. Okicungure omu mwanya gwangye, ahakuba tindikubaasa kukicungura." 
Ruth4:7 Kandi obunyakare ogu nigwo gwabaire guba omucwe omuri Israeli omu by'okucungura n'eby'okuhingisa; ku baabaire benda kuhamya eki baakora, omwe akaba ajuura enkaito, agiha mugyenzi we; okwo nikwo Abaisraeli baabaire bahamya endagaano." 
Ruth4:8 N'ahabw'ekyo ogwo munyabuzaare bwa haihi, ku yaagambiire Boazi ati: Okicungure, yaajuura enkaito ye." 
Ruth4:9 Bwanyima Boazi yaagambira abakuru n'abantu boona ati: Eri izooba muri baakareebi b'okuhamya ku naagura na Naomi byona ebyabaire biri ebya Elimeleki n'ebya Kilioni byona n'ebya Mahalooni byona. 
Ruth4:10 Kandi Ruusi Omumoabukazi owaabaire ari muka Mahalooni, nawe naamugura kuba omukazi wangye, mbone kugaruraho eiziina rya nyakufa omu buhunguzi bwe, eiziina rya nyakufa rirekye kweba omuri beene waabo n'omu irembo ry'eka ye. Muri baakareebi eri izooba." 
Ruth4:11 Abantu boona abaabaire bari omu irembo n'abakuru baagira bati: Turi baakareebi. Ogu mukazi owaaza omu nju yaawe MUKAMA amugire nka Rakeeli na Lea oku baakwataniise bombi kwimutsya enju ya Israeli; naiwe okore ebishemeire omuri Efuraata, kandi orangaanwe omuri Betelehemu," 
Ruth4:12 kandi enju yaawe ebe nk'eya Pereezi, ou Tamari yaazaariire Yuda, ahabw'abaana abu MUKAMA arikuha omuri ogwo mukazi muto." 
Ruth4:13 Atyo Boazi yaatwara Ruusi, yaaba omukazi we; yaamuta aha mukono, MUKAMA yaamuha enda, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo." 
Ruth4:14 Abakazi baagira Naomi bati: MUKAMA asiimwe ahabw'okutakureka otaine w'obuzaare bwa haihi; kandi eiziina rye rirangaanwe omuri Israeli. 
Ruth4:15 Aryaba ow'okukugaruramu amagara, kandi ow'okukuriisa omu bukaikuru bwawe; ahabw'okuba mukaamwana waawe, orikukukunda, kandi orikukukirira abaana b'aboojo mushanju, niwe amuzaire." 
Ruth4:16 Naomi yaakwata omwana, yaamukiikira, yaaba omurezi we." 
Ruth4:17 Kandi abakazi bataahi be baamweta eiziina, nibagira bati: Omwana w'omwojo azaariirwe Naomi. Baamweta Obedi; niwe ishe wa Yese, ishe wa Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Kandi oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Pereezi; Pereezi akazaara Hezirooni," 
Ruth4:19 Hezirooni yaazaara Raamu; Raamu yaazaara Aminadabu; 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu yaazaara Nahashooni; Nahashooni yaazaara Salumooni; 
Ruth4:21 Salumooni yaazaara Boazi; Boazi yaazaara Obedi; 
Ruth4:22 Obedi yaazaara Yese, na Yese yaazaara Daudi." 
1Samuel1:1 Hakaba hariho omushaija owa Ramasaimu-zofimu omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, eiziina rye Elukaana, mwene Yerohaamu, mwijukuru wa Elihu, mwene Tobu ya Zuufi, Omuefuraimu." 
1Samuel1:2 Akaba aine abakazi babiri, omwe naayetwa Hanna, n'ondiijo Penina; Penina akaba naazaara, kwonka Hanna ari engumba." 
1Samuel1:3 Omushaija ogwo akaba aruga omu rurembo rw'owaabo buri mwaka, ainamuka Shiilo kuramizayo MUKAMA ow'amahe n'okumutambira ebitambo. Kandi beene Eli bombi, Hofuni na Finehaasi, niyo baabaire nibakora omurimo gwa MUKAMA ogw'obunyamurwa." 
1Samuel1:4 Aha izooba eri Elukaana yaabaire atambiraho ebitambo, akaba agira emigabo, agiha Penina omukazi we n'abaana be b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki," 
1Samuel1:5 kwonka Hanna amuha emigabo ebiri, ahabw'okuba akaba naamukunda, n'obu MUKAMA yaabaire amwimire oruzaaro." 
1Samuel1:6 Kandi muka iba akaba amuteerera enaku, ngu amugwise kubi, ahakuba MUKAMA akaba amwimire oruzaaro." 
1Samuel1:7 Okwo nikwo byabaire biba buri mwaka; Hanna ku yaabaire aza omu nju ya MUKAMA, muka iba amuteerera enaku. Ekyo kimuriza, ayanga n'okurya." 
1Samuel1:8 Kandi Elukaana iba akaba amubuuza ati: Beitu shi, Hanna, orizibwa ki? N'enki ekikuzibira kurya? Ahabw'enki omutima gwawe gutuura n'amaganya? Tindikukukirira abaana b'aboojo ikumi?" 
1Samuel1:9 Eizooba rimwe ku baaherize kurya n'okunywa, Hanna yaimuka ahu baabaire bari omuri Shiilo. Obwo Eli omunyamurwa akaba ashutami aha kitebe kye aha kiti ky'omuryango gwa hekalu ya MUKAMA." 
1Samuel1:10 Hanna yaatandika kushaba MUKAMA, aine obusaasi bwingi omu mutima, naarira munonga;" 
1Samuel1:11 yaaragaanisa naahiga omu maisho ga MUKAMA, naagira ati: Ai MUKAMA ow'amahe, ku oraareebe okubonabona kw'omuzaana waawe, waanyijuka, otaanyebwa, wampa omwana w'omwojo, ndyamukuhongyera, abe owaawe ebiro byona ebi arimara omu nsi, kandi orumweiso tirurimuraba ha mutwe." 
1Samuel1:12 Ku yaagumiizemu naashaba atyo omu maisho ga MUKAMA, Eli yaaguma naamureeba aha minwa." 
1Samuel1:13 Kwonka Hanna we akaba naashabira aha mutima, eminwa ye neimuka, eiraka rye ritarikuhurirwa; nikyo Eli yaateekateekyeire ngu asinzire." 
1Samuel1:14 Eli nikwo kumubuuza ati: Oryahitsya hi n'esindo? Ku ocwa viinyo? 
1Samuel1:15 Hanna yaamugarukamu ati: Tikwo kiri, Mukama wangye; ndi omukazi oine omutima gw'obusaasi; tiinyweire viinyo nari ekirikusinza kyona, kureka ninshuka amaganya g'omu mutima gwangye omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
1Samuel1:16 Otateekateeka ngu omuzaana waawe n'ekifa-mutima; ahakuba ebi naaba ningamba n'okuhitsya hati, mbireeteirwe amaganya maingi n'okugwisibwa kubi." 
1Samuel1:17 Eli yaamugira ati: Yegyendere n'obusingye; MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli akuhe eki waamushaba. 
1Samuel1:18 Onu yaagira ati: Omuzaana waawe agirirwe embabazi omu maisho gaawe. Atyo ogwo mukazi yaayegyendera yaarya, tiyaagaruka kureebwa aine enaku." 
1Samuel1:19 Baimuka kare omu kasheeshe, baaza omu maisho ga MUKAMA, baaramya; bwanyima baagarukayo, baataaha omu ka yaabo Raama; ku baahikireyo, Elukaana yaamanya omukazi we Hanna, MUKAMA yaamwijuka." 
1Samuel1:20 Obunaku ku bwahikire, Hanna yaagira enda, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo, yaamweta Samueli; ahakuba akagira ati: Nkamushaba MUKAMA." 
1Samuel1:21 Bwanyima omushaija ogwo Elukaana yainamuka n'eka ye yoona kutambira MUKAMA ekitambo kya buri mwaka, kandi n'okuhikiiriza eki yaaraganiise;" 
1Samuel1:22 kwonka Hanna tiyainamukayo; ahakuba akagira iba ati: Tindizayo, okuhitsya obu omwana aricuuka, nkabona kumutwara, nkamumurikira MUKAMA, akagumayo ebiro byona." 
1Samuel1:23 Iba Elukaana yaamugira ati: Kora eki orikusiima; otegyereze okuhitsya obu orimucuutsya; kwonka MUKAMA ahamye ekigambo kye. Atyo ogwo mukazi yaaguma aho naayontsya omwana we, okuhitsya obu yaamucuukize." 
1Samuel1:24 Ku yaaherize kumucuutsya, yaamwinamura n'enimi ishatu, na eefa emwe y'esaano y'obunono, n'efureebe ya viinyo; yaamutwara Shiilo omu nju ya MUKAMA; kandi ogwo mwana akaba akiri muto." 
1Samuel1:25 Batyo baita enimi, baareetera Eli omwana." 
1Samuel1:26 Ogwo mukazi yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, buzimazima nk'oku okiriho, niinye mukazi ori, owaabaire ayemereire aha omu maisho gaawe naashaba MUKAMA." 
1Samuel1:27 Omwana ogu nkamushaba MUKAMA; kandi agarukiremu okushaba kwangye; 
1Samuel1:28 nikyo naamuhongyerera MUKAMA; ebiro byona ebi arimara omu nsi, aryaguma ahongyeirwe MUKAMA. Baaramizayo MUKAMA." 
1Samuel2:1 Bwanyima Hanna yaasiima naagira ati: Omutima gwangye nigwesiimira omuri MUKAMA; Eihembe ryangye ritunguuriirwe omuri MUKAMA; N'akanwa kangye nikashekyerera abazigu bangye, Ahakuba ninshemerererwa okujuna kwawe." 
1Samuel2:2 Tihariho orikwera nka MUKAMA, Tihariho ondiijo kureka Iwe wenka; Kandi tihariho Rukiri ori nka Ruhanga waitu." 
1Samuel2:3 Mutagaruka kugamba eby'okwehimbisa; N'eby'amaryo birekye kuruga omu kanwa kaanyu; Ahakuba MUKAMA ni Ruhanga orikumanya byona; Kandi niwe arenga ebi abantu bakora. 
1Samuel2:4 Amata g'amamanzi gahendekire; Kwonka abarikutsibaaza beezirikire amaani. 
1Samuel2:5 Abaabaire nibaiguta, hati nibakorera eby'okurya; N'abaabaire baine enjara, tibakigiine. Eego, engumba ezaire mushanju, N'ow'abaana baingi atentebukire." 
1Samuel2:6 MUKAMA aita, kandi akiza; Ashuumya okuzimu, kandi aihayo." 
1Samuel2:7 MUKAMA ainaza, kandi atungisa; Agarura ahansi, kandi atunguura." 
1Samuel2:8 Aimutsya abooro omu mucuucu, Aiha abakyene omu rubungo, Kubashutamya n'abanyiginya, Kandi n'okuhungura ekitebe ky'ekitiinisa; Ahakuba enyomyo z'ensi n'eza MUKAMA, Kandi nizo yaagihangiriize." 
1Samuel2:9 Aryarinda ebigyere by'abarikwera be, Kwonka ababi baryahwerekyererera omu mwirima; Ahakuba tihariho muntu orisinguza amaani ge." 
1Samuel2:10 Abarwanisa MUKAMA baryacwanyagurika; Abahindireho naayema omu iguru. MUKAMA aryacwera emperu z'ensi orubanja. Aryaheereza omugabe we amaani, Atunguure eihembe ry'ou yaashukireho amajuta." 
1Samuel2:11 Bwanyima Elukaana yaagaruka omu ka ye Raama; kandi omwana yaaguma naaheereza MUKAMA omu maisho ga Eli omunyamurwa. 
1Samuel2:12 Kandi batabani ba Eli bakaba bari abantu abataine mugasho, abatarikumanya MUKAMA." 
1Samuel2:13 Ogu nigwo gwabaire guri omucwe gw'abo banyamurwa omu mitwarize yaabo n'abantu. Omuntu weena ku yaabaire atamba ekitambo, omuheereza w'omunyamurwa aija bakiteekire enyama, aine orwoma rw'amaino ashatu omu ngaro;" 
1Samuel2:14 arucumita omu safuriya, nari omu binika, nari omu nyungu, nari omu rwabya; ekintu kyona eki orwoma rwabaire rujaburamu, nikyo omunyamurwa yaabaire atwara. Okwo nikwo baabaire batwaza Abaisraeli boona abaabaire baza Shiilo." 
1Samuel2:15 Kandi ebishaju ku byabaire biba bitakookiibwe, omuheereza w'omunyamurwa akaba aija, agira orikutamba ati: Mpa enyama y'okwokyeza omunyamurwa; ahabw'okuba tarikwenda eteekire, kureka embisi." 
1Samuel2:16 Kandi ogwo muntu akimugarukamu ati: Ka babanze bootsye ebishaju, obone kutwara ei orikwenda yoona, onu amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha! gimpe hati; kandi ku oraayangye, ningitwaza amaani." 
1Samuel2:17 Okwo nikwo ekibi ky'abo batsigazi kyabaire kihango omu maisho ga MUKAMA; ahabw'okuba bikareetera abantu kutambira MUKAMA ebitambo babitamirwe. 
1Samuel2:18 Samueli akatandika kuheereza MUKAMA akiri omwana muto, ajwaire efodi ya kitaani." 
1Samuel2:19 Kandi nyina akaba amubaziirira akakooti, akamutwarira buri mwaka, nainamuka na iba kutamba ekitambo kya buri mwaka." 
1Samuel2:20 Kandi Eli akaba ashabira Elukaana n'omukazi we omugisha naagira ati: MUKAMA akuhe oruzaaro omuri ogu mukazi omu mwanya gw'ogu ou yaahongyeire MUKAMA. Batyo bagaruka owaabo. 
1Samuel2:21 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaataayaayira Hanna, yaagira enda, yaazaara abaana b'aboojo bashatu n'abaishiki babiri. Omwana ogwo Samueli yaakurira omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
1Samuel2:22 Omu bunaku obwo Eli akaba ahikire omu ngingo zaabukuru; yaaguma naahurira byona ebi abatabani baabaire nibakora omu Baisraeli boona, kandi n'oku barikushambana n'abakazi, abaabaire baheereza aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu." 
1Samuel2:23 Yaababuuza ati: N'enki ekirikubakoresa ebirikushusha bityo? Ahakuba nimpurira omu bantu boona eby'emicwe yaanyu emibi. 
1Samuel2:24 Ngaaha, baana bangye! Ebi ndikuhurira abantu nibabagambaho ti birungi; nimusiisisa abantu ba MUKAMA." 
1Samuel2:25 Omuntu ku arikushiisha ahari mugyenzi we, Ruhanga naamucwera orubanja; mbwenu omuntu ku arikushiisha ahari Ruhanga, n'oha orikubaasa kumweshengyerereza? Kwonka baayanga kuhurira ishebo, ahakuba MUKAMA akaba naayenda kubaita." 
1Samuel2:26 Ogwo mwana Samueli yaagumizamu naakura, naasiimwa MUKAMA n'abantu." 
1Samuel2:27 Bwanyima haija omuntu wa Ruhanga ahari Eli, yaamugira ati: MUKAMA naagira ati: Noomanya ku naayeyorekire eka ya sho, obu baabaire bari omu buhuuku bw'enju ya Faraho." 
1Samuel2:28 Niwe naatooraine omu nganda zoona eza Israeli kuba omunyamurwa wangye, okuza aha itambiro ryangye, okwotera obubaane, n'okujwara efodi omu maisho gangye. Kandi nkaha oruganda rwa sho empongano z'Abaisraeli zoona ez'ebitambo by'okwotsya omu muriro." 
1Samuel2:29 Mbwenu ahabw'enki nimureebesa omururu ebitambo byangye n'empongano zangye, ezi naaragiire kumpongyera, okaha batabani baawe ekitiinisa okunkira, ngu mweyitirire n'ebicweka ebirikukira oburungi by'empongano zoona ezi abantu bangye Abaisraeli barikumpongyera?" 
1Samuel2:30 Nikyo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugirira ati: N'ekya buzima nkaba ngizire nti; Ab'enju yaawe n'ab'enju ya sho nibo bariguma nibaheereza omu maisho gangye ebiro byona; mbwenu hati MUKAMA naagira ati: Nikikabure! ahakuba abarikumpa ekitiinisa, nibo ndikiha; kwonka abarikungaya, baryagaywa." 
1Samuel2:31 Reeba, ebiro nibiija, obu ndimaraho amaani gaawe n'ag'enju ya sho, hakabura omugurusi omu nju yaawe." 
1Samuel2:32 Kandi omu kubonabona kwawe oryareebesa eihari ebirungi byona ebi Abaisraeli bariheebwa omu Butaaho bwangye; n'omu nju yaawe tiharibamu mugurusi ebiro byona. 
1Samuel2:33 Ku harigira omuntu waawe owaahonokaho, akatsigara aha itambiro ryangye, aryaba ow'okukuhwereza amaisho noorira, n'okukusaasa omutima; oruzaaro rw'enju yaawe rwona ruryahenderwa omunyeeto." 
1Samuel2:34 Ako kagwe akarigwera batabani baawe bombi, Hofuni na Finehaasi, karyakubeera akamanyiso; bombi baryafa eizooba rimwe." 
1Samuel2:35 Naanye ndyayeimukiza omunyamurwa orikwesigwa, orikora nk'ebindi aha mutima n'omu biteekateeko oku biri. Ndyamwombekyera enju ehamire; kandi aryaheerereza omu maisho g'ou naashukireho amajuta ebiro byona." 
1Samuel2:36 Bwanyima weena oriba yaatsigaireho omu nju yaawe, aryaija, amukwate amaguru ngu amuhe akacweka k'efeeza nari omugaati, amushabe ati: Ninkweshengyereza, mpa omurimo gumwe aha y'abanyamurwa, beitu nkaabona ak'okurya." 
1Samuel3:1 Omwana Samueli akaba aheereza MUKAMA naategyekwa Eli. Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaba kiri eky'eicweka omu biro ebyo, hatariho kworekwa kwa butunu." 
1Samuel3:2 Omu bunaku obwo Eli amaisho ge gakaba gaagiirwemu oruho, atakihweza gye. Ekiro kimwe, ku yaabaire abyami omu mwanya gwe," 
1Samuel3:3 etabaaza ya Ruhanga etakaraire, na Samueli abyami omuri hekalu ya MUKAMA, ahu eshanduukye ya Ruhanga yaabaire eri," 
1Samuel3:4 MUKAMA yaayeta Samueli; nawe yaamwetaba ati: Ndi aha, Mukama wangye." 
1Samuel3:5 Yairuka, yaaza ahari Eli, yaamugira ati: Naija, ahakuba waanyeta. Eli yaamugira ati: Tinaakweta; garukayo obyame. Yaagarukayo, yaabyama." 
1Samuel3:6 MUKAMA yaagaruka yaamweta ati: Samueli! Samueli yaimuka yaaza ahari Eli, yaagira ati: Naija, ahakuba waanyeta. Yaamugarukamu ati: Tinaakweta, mwana wangye; garukayo obyame." 
1Samuel3:7 Obwo Samueli akaba atakamanyire MUKAMA, n'ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaba kitakamushuururiirwe." 
1Samuel3:8 MUKAMA yaayeta Samueli omurundi gwa kashatu. Yaimuka, yaaza ahari Eli, yaagira ati: Naija; ahakuba waanyeta. Ekyo kyamanyisa Eli ku MUKAMA niwe arikweta ogwo mwana." 
1Samuel3:9 Nikyo Eli yaagiriire Samueli ati: Irooko obyame; ku araagarukye yaakweta, ogire oti: Gamba, MUKAMA; ahakuba omwiru waawe ahuriire. Samueli nikwo kugarukayo, akabyama." 
1Samuel3:10 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaija, yaayemerera aho, yaamweta nk'oku yaaheza kumweta, ati: Samueli, Samueli! Na Samueli yaayetaba naagira ati: Gamba; ahakuba omwiru waawe ahuriire." 
1Samuel3:11 MUKAMA yaagira Samueli ati: Reeba, ndyakora ekintu omuri Israeli, ekirireetera amatu g'orikihurira weena kuteera enduuru." 
1Samuel3:12 Eryo izooba ndyahikiiriza ahari Eli ebi naagaambire aha nju ye byona, okwiha obu byatandika n'okuhitsya aha muheru gwabyo." 
1Samuel3:13 Ahakuba nkamugambira ku ndiha enju ye ekifubiro eky'ebiro byona, nimbatura eby'okushiisha ebi yaamanyire; ahabw'okuba batabani be bakeeshiisha, tiyaabazibira." 
1Samuel3:14 N'ahabw'ekyo ndahiriire enju ya Eli nti: Eby'okushiisha by'enju ya Eli tibirihongyererwa yaaba kitambo nari empongano ebiro byona. 
1Samuel3:15 Samueli yaabyama, bwarugaho bwasheesha; ku yaimukire, yaigura enyigi z'enju ya MUKAMA; yaatiina kugambira Eli ebi ayorekirwe." 
1Samuel3:16 Bwanyima Eli yaayeta Samueli, naagira ati: Samueli mwana wangye! Onu ati: Ndi aha, Mukama wangye." 
1Samuel3:17 Eli yaamubuuza ati: MUKAMA akugambiire ki? Ninkweshengyereza, otakinshereka. Ku oraagire eki wanshereka omuri ebyo byona ebi akugambiire, Ruhanga akikuture, n'okukiraho." 
1Samuel3:18 Atyo Samueli yaamugambira byona, tiyaagira ki yaamushereka. Onu ati: Ni MUKAMA; ka akore eki arikusiima kyona." 
1Samuel3:19 Samueli yaakura; MUKAMA yaaguma nawe, tiyaareka kigambo kye na kimwe kufa busha." 
1Samuel3:20 N'Abaisraeli boona, okuruga Daani okuhika Beeri-sheba, baamanya ku Samueli ahamiibwe kuba nabi wa MUKAMA." 
1Samuel3:21 Kandi MUKAMA yaagaruka yaayeyoreka omuri Shiilo; ahakuba MUKAMA akeeyorekyera Samueli Shiilo omu kigambo kye. Kandi ekigambo kya Samueli kyahika aha Baisraeli boona. 
1Samuel4:1 Abaisraeli bakahurura kurwanisa Abafilistia; baateera orusiisira rwabo aha rubaju rwa Ebenezeeri; n'Abafilistia nabo baateera orwabo ahari Afeki. 
1Samuel4:2 Abafilistia baatenga orugamba kurwanisa Abaisraeli; ku baarwaine, Abafilistia baabinga Abaisraeli, babaitamu abantu enkumi ina." 
1Samuel4:3 Engabo ku zaagarukire omu rusiisira, abakuru ba Israeli baabuuzana bati: Ahabw'enki MUKAMA yaatubingisa omu maisho g'Abafilistia eri izooba? Ka tuze kwenda eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, tugiihe Shiilo, tugireete aha; ku eraatuhikyemu, etujune omu mikono y'abazigu baitu." 
1Samuel4:4 Batyo baatuma abantu Shiilo, baihayo eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA ow'amahe, oshutami ahari baakerubi. Kandi beene Eli bombi, Hofuni na Finehaasi, abaabaire bari hamwe n'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Ruhanga, baija nayo." 
1Samuel4:5 Eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA ku yaahikire omu rusiisira, Abaisraeli boona baateera munonga akaari, ensi yaateera obwaku." 
1Samuel4:6 Abafilistia ku baahuriire orwo rwari, baagira bati: Orwo rwari rwingi oruri omu rusiisira rw'Abaheburaayo n'orw'enki? Bwanyima baamanya ku eshanduukye ya MUKAMA yaahika omu rusiisira rwabo." 
1Samuel4:7 Abafilistia baatiina, ahakuba bakagira bati: Ruhanga yaahika omu rusiisira rwabo. Baagaruka baagira bati: Eshi twareeba enaku! Ahabw'okuba tihakabahoga kintu nk'eki okwiha ira ryona." 
1Samuel4:8 Twareeba enaku! N'oha oraabaase kutujuna baaruhanga aba ab'amaani? Aba nibo baaruhanga abaitsiize Abanyamisri enfu za buri muringo omu ihamba. 
1Samuel4:9 Mube ab'amaani, murwane mashaija, imwe Bafilistia 'mwe, murekye kuba abahuuku b'Abaheburaayo, nk'oku baabaire bari ahariimwe, mufe mashaija murwane." 
1Samuel4:10 Batyo Abafilistia baarwana; Abaisraeli baabingwa, baahunga, buri muntu yairukira omu ihema rye; haabaho kwitwa kuhango; ahakuba Abaisraeli bakafamu abantu abarikugyendesa ebigyere obukumi bushatu." 
1Samuel4:11 Kandi eshanduukye ya Ruhanga yaanyagwa, na beene Eli bombi Hofuni na Finehaasi baitwa." 
1Samuel4:12 Omushaija Omubenyamiini yaacwa omu ngabo, yaahika Shiilo eryo izooba, ebijwaro bye bitaagukire, n'eitaka rimuri omu mutwe." 
1Samuel4:13 Obu yaija, Eli akaba ashutami aha kitebe kye aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, ataireyo amaisho; ahakuba omutima gukaba gumuhweire omunda ahabw'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga. Ogwo mushaija ku yaahikire omu rurembo, yaabagambira ebibaireho; ab'omu rurembo boona baayeha ekiboroogo." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli ku yaahuriire okwo kuborooga, yaabuuza ati: Okwo kujagarara n'okw'enki? Ogwo mushaija yaija naayehuuta, yaabimugambira." 
1Samuel4:15 Obwo Eli akaba ahikize emyaka makumi mwenda na munaana; amaisho ge gaahumire, atakihweza." 
1Samuel4:16 Ogwo mushaija yaagira Eli ati: Niinye ogwo owaaruga omu rugamba eri izooba, naacwa omu ngabo. Onu yaamubuuza ati: Bibaire bita, mwana wangye?" 
1Samuel4:17 Ogwo owaareeta amakuru yaamugarukamu ati: Abaisraeli baahunga Abafilistia, haabaho okwitwa kw'abantu baingi, batabani baawe bombi, Hofuni na Finehaasi, baafa; kandi eshanduukye ya Ruhanga yaanyagwa." 
1Samuel4:18 Ku yaagambire eby'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, Eli yaaruga aha kitebe kye, yaagwa agarami aha kiti ky'omuryango, yaahendeka ebitsya, yaafa; ahakuba akaba ari omugurusi, orikweremeera. Kandi akaba amazire emyaka makumi ana naacwera Abaisraeli emanja." 
1Samuel4:19 Obwo mukaamwana wa Eli, muka Finehaasi, akaba aine enda ari haihi kuzaara; ku yaahuriire enkuru ngu eshanduukye ya Ruhanga enyagirwe, kandi ngu ishezaara na iba baafa, yaafukama, yaazaara, ahakuba ebisha bikamukwatira aho." 
1Samuel4:20 Ku yaabaire ari haihi kufa, abakazi abaabaire nibamuzaaza, baamugira bati: Otatiina; ahabw'okuba waazaara omwana w'omwojo. Kwonka tiyaabagarukamu, n'obu kwakuba okukyetaho." 
1Samuel4:21 Yaayeta ogwo mwana Ikabodi, naagira ati: Ekitiinisa kyaruga ahari Israeli. Yaakigamba ahabw'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga kunyagwa, n'ahabw'ebya ishezaara na iba." 
1Samuel4:22 Kandi yaagira ati: Ekitiinisa kyaruga ahari Israeli; ahabw'okuba eshanduukye ya Ruhanga yaanyagwa. 
1Samuel5:1 Abafilistia ku baaherize kunyaga eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, baagiha Ebenezeeri, baagitwara Ashidoodi;" 
1Samuel5:2 baagitaasya omu ndaaro ya Dagoni, baagita aha rubaju rwe." 
1Samuel5:3 Omu kasheeshe abantu ba Ashidoodi ku baimukire kare, baashanga Dagoni agwire ajuumaire ahansi omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya MUKAMA. Baamujuumuura, baamugarura aha mwanya gwe." 
1Samuel5:4 Kandi ku baimukire kare omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, baashanga Dagoni agwire ajuumaire ahansi omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, kandi omutwe gwe n'engaro ze bicwirweho, biri omu muryango; haatsigaire ekihinju kya ifo kyonka." 
1Samuel5:5 Eki nikyo abagirwa ba Dagoni n'abataaha omu ndaaro ya Dagoni boona omuri Ashidoodi bataribatira mu kisasi ky'omuryango n'okuhitsya hati. 
1Samuel5:6 Bwanyima omukono gwa MUKAMA gwahingamira abantu ba Ashidoodi n'ab'omu butegyeki bwayo; yaabatiinisa, kandi yaababonabonesa n'ebizimba." 
1Samuel5:7 Abantu ba Ashidoodi ku baarebire byaba bityo, baagira bati: Eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Israeli etaguma naitwe; ahabw'okuba omukono gwe gutuhingamiire na ruhanga waitu Dagoni." 
1Samuel5:8 Nikwo kutuma abategyeki b'Abafilistia boona kuteeranira hamwe, bakagira bati: Tugire tuta eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Israeli? Baabagarukamu bati: Eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Israeli mugyohererezane, ehikye Gaasi. Batyo baayohererezana eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Israeli, baagihitsyayo." 
1Samuel5:9 Bwanyima ku baaherize kugihitsyayo, omukono gwa MUKAMA gwarwanisa orwo rurembo, yaabahahaaza emitima munonga; yaarwaza abanyarurembo, abato n'abakuru, ebizimba aha mibiri yaabo." 
1Samuel5:10 N'ahabw'ekyo eshanduukye ya Ruhanga baagyohereza Ekurooni; aba Ekurooni ku baagicwire eriisho neija, baayombera kimwe nibagira bati: Boohererezaine eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Israeli, mbwenu baagituhitsyaho kutwita n'abantu baitu." 
1Samuel5:11 N'ahabw'ekyo baatuma abategyeki b'Abafilistia boona, baateeranira aho, aba Ekurooni baabagira bati: Mwohereze eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Israeli, egarukye omu mwanya gwayo, erekye kutwita n'abantu baitu. Ahabw'okuba omuri orwo rurembo rwona hakaba hariho okuhahaaza emitima ahabw'okutiina kufa; n'omukono gwa MUKAMA gubahingamiire munonga." 
1Samuel5:12 Abashaija abaatsigaireho batafiire, baarwara ebizimba; n'okuborooga kw'orwo rurembo kwahika omu iguru." 
1Samuel6:1 Eshanduukye ya MUKAMA yaamara ameezi mushanju omu nsi y'Abafilistia. 
1Samuel6:2 Bwanyima Abafilistia baayeta abagirwa n'abafumu, baababuuza bati: Egi shanduukye ya MUKAMA tugigire tuta? Mutuhabure oku turaagigarureyo, tukagihitsya omu mwanya gwayo." 
1Samuel6:3 Baabagarukamu bati: Ku muraayohereze eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Israeli, mutagyohereza yonka; kureka mucwe obwengye bwona kugigarurayo n'empongano y'okwihaho orubanja. Obwo nibwo muraakire, kandi mukamanya ekizibiire omukono gwe kubarugaho." 
1Samuel6:4 Banu bagira bati: Ni mpongano ki ey'okwihaho orubanja ei turaamwoherereze? Baagarukamu bati: Ebizimba bitaano by'ezaabu, n'embeba itaano z'ezaabu, nk'omubaro gw'abategyeki b'Abafilistia oku gurikwingana; ahakuba imwe mwena n'abategyeki baanyu mukajuumikirwa orwo rufu." 
1Samuel6:5 N'ahabw'ekyo mushemereire kuheesha ebishushani by'ebizimba byanyu, n'eby'embeba ezirikushiisha ensi yaanyu; kandi muryaha Ruhanga wa Israeli ekitiinisa; obundi akaatuubya oburemeezi bw'omukono gwe ahariimwe, n'ahari baaruhanga baanyu, n'aha nsi yaanyu." 
1Samuel6:6 Mbwenu shi nimugangaariza ki emitima, nk'Abanyamisri na Faraho oku baagangaize eyaabo? Obu yaakora eby'amahano omuribo, tibararekire abo bantu bakarugayo, bakagyenda?" 
1Samuel6:7 N'ahabw'ekyo hati mureete ekigaari kisya, mukiboneze, n'ente ibiri ezirikwontsya, ezitakakururaga kintu, muzikomeho ekigaari, muzaakye enyana zaazo, muzigarure omuka;" 
1Samuel6:8 bwanyima mutware eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, mugite aha kigaari, kandi n'ebintu by'ezaabu, ebi murikumwoherereza kuba empongano y'okwihaho orubanja, mubite omu kashanduukye aha rubaju rwayo; bwanyima mugyohereze, egyende." 
1Samuel6:9 Kandi mureebe ahu eraatoore; ku eraarabe ogurikuza aha mwatano gwayo, yaagyema Beti-shemeshi, nitwija kumanya ku MUKAMA niwe atureeteire aka kabi koona; kandi ku kiraabe kitabaire kityo, nabwo nitwija kumanya ku gutari mukono gwe ogwatwitsire; kureka ku kari akagwe akatugwereire." 
1Samuel6:10 Abo bashaija baatwaza batyo, baareeta ente ibiri zirikwontsya, baazikomaho ekigaari, enyana zaazo baazikingira omuka;" 
1Samuel6:11 baata eshanduukye ya MUKAMA aha kigaari, baataho n'akashanduukye akarimu embeba eziheesire omu zaabu n'ebishushani by'ebizimba byabo." 
1Samuel6:12 Ezo nte zaatoora omuhanda ogurikucwekanisa niguza Beti-shemeshi, zaagumizamu omu muhanda rugyendwa nizijuga, tizaakiikama ha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho; kandi abategyeki b'Abafilistia baagyenda bazikuratiire okuhika aha mwatano gwa Beti-shemeshi." 
1Samuel6:13 Eryo izooba aba Beti-shemeshi bakaba nibagyesha engano omu ruhita; ku baanagire amaisho, baareeba eshanduukye, baashemererwa munonga kugireeba." 
1Samuel6:14 Ekyo kigaari kyahika omu musiri gwa Yoshua owa Beti-shemeshi, kyayemerera aho, ahu eibaare rihango ryabaire riri; bwanyima baashatura embaaho z'ekyo kigaari, baatambira aho ezo nte kuba ekitambo ky'okwokyeza MUKAMA." 
1Samuel6:15 Abaleevi baihaho eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, n'akashanduukye akaabaire kari hamwe nayo, akarimu ebyo bintu by'ezaabu, baabita aha mutwe gw'eryo ibaare rihango; kandi eryo izooba aba Beti-shemeshi baatambira MUKAMA ebitambo by'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo." 
1Samuel6:16 Abo bategyeki ku baaherize kubireeba, baagaruka Ekurooni eryo izooba." 
1Samuel6:17 Ebi nibyo bizimba by'ezaabu ebi Abafilistia baahongyeire MUKAMA kuba empongano y'okwihaho orubanja; kimwe aha bwa Ashidoodi, ekindi ahabwa Gaaza, ekindi ahabwa Ashikelooni, ekindi ahabwa Gaasi, n'ekindi ahabwa Ekurooni;" 
1Samuel6:18 kandi n'embeba z'ezaabu, nk'omubaro gw'endembo zoona ez'Abafilistia, ezaabaire nizitwarwa abo bategyeki bataano, oku gwabaire guri, endembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, n'ebirorero by'omu byaro. Kandi eryo ibaare rihango, eri baataireho eshanduukye ya MUKAMA aha rubaju omu musiri gwa Yoshua owa Beti-shemeshi, niryo kareebi n'okuhitsya hati." 
1Samuel6:19 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaita abantu ba Beti-shemeshi makumi mushanju, ahabw'okuringuriza omu shanduukye ya MUKAMA; abantu baacura munonga, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akabaitamu abantu baingi." 
1Samuel6:20 Abashaija ba Beti-shemeshi baagira bati: N'oha orikubaasa kwemerera omu maisho ga MUKAMA, Ruhanga ogu orikwera? Kandi ku araaturugyeho, naaza ahari oha?" 
1Samuel6:21 Batyo baatuma entumwa aha batwire Kiryasi-yearimu, nibagira bati: Abafilistia bagarwire eshanduukye ya MUKAMA. Mushuume, mugiinamure owaanyu." 
1Samuel7:1 Aba Kiryasi-yearimu baija, baatwara eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, baagiinamura, baagitaasya omu nju ya Abinadabu eyaabaire eri aha kabungo; bwanyima baashoroora omutabani Eleazaari okurinda egyo shanduukye ya MUKAMA." 
1Samuel7:2 Okwiha aha izooba eri eshanduukye ya MUKAMA yaataahiireho Kiryasi-yearimu, hakahinguraho omwanya muraingwa; ahakuba ogwo mwanya gwona gukahika emyaka makumi abiri. Ab'enju ya Israeli boona baatakira MUKAMA." 
1Samuel7:3 Samueli yaabagambira ati: Ku muraagarukye ahari MUKAMA n'omutima gwanyu gwona, mwihe omuriimwe baaruhanga b'enduga-mahanga n'aba Ashitaroosi, mushemereze MUKAMA emitima yaanyu, mube niwe mwaheereza wenka; nawe naija kubakiza, abaihe omu mikono y'Abafilistia." 
1Samuel7:4 Batyo Abaisraeli baihaho Baabaali n'aba Ashitaroosi, baaheereza MUKAMA wenka." 
1Samuel7:5 Samueli yaaragiira ati: Muteeranire Abaisraeli boona Mizipa, nyije mbashabire ahari MUKAMA." 
1Samuel7:6 Baateeranira Mizipa, baataha amaizi, baagashuka omu maisho ga MUKAMA; eryo izooba baayesiibyakwo, nibagira bati: Tukacumura ahari MUKAMA. Obwo Samueli yaatandika kucwera Abaisraeli emanja ahari Mizipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Abafilistia ku baahuriire ngu Abaisraeli bateeraniire Mizipa, abategyeki baabo bainamuka kurwanisa Abaisraeli. Abaisraeli ku baakihuriire, baabatiina." 
1Samuel7:8 Abaisraeli baashaba Samueli nibagira bati: Otareka kutakira MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu ahabwaitu, abone kutujuna omu mikono y'Abafilistia." 
1Samuel7:9 Bwanyima Samueli yaatwara omwana gw'entaama gurikwonka, yaaguhongyera MUKAMA kuba ekitambo ky'okwotsya; Samueli yaatakira MUKAMA ahabw'Abaisraeli, MUKAMA yaamugarukamu." 
1Samuel7:10 Samueli ku yaabaire naahonga ekitambo eky'okwotsya, Abafilistia bairira haihi kurwanisa Abaisraeli; kwonka MUKAMA yaahinda okuhinda kw'amaani aha Bafilistia eryo ezooba, yaabarabanisamu, baabingwa omu maisho g'Abaisraeli." 
1Samuel7:11 Abaisraeli baaruga Mizipa, baakurata Abafilistia, baagyenda nibabaita, baabahitsya Besi-kaari." 
1Samuel7:12 Bwanyima Samueli yaakwata eibaare, yaaribyara ahagati ya Mizipa na Sheeni, yaaryeta eiziina Ebenezeeri, naagira ati: MUKAMA naakituhwera n'okuhitsya hati." 
1Samuel7:13 Okwo nikwo Abafilistia baacwirwe eishaija, batagarukye kurenga omwatano gw'Abaisraeli. Omu biro byona ebya Samueli omukono gwa MUKAMA gukaguma nigurwanisa Abafilistia." 
1Samuel7:14 Kandi endembo ezi Abafilistia baabaire banyagire Abaisraeli, zaabagarurirwa, okuruga Ekurooni n'okuhika Gaasi; Abaisraeli baiha ensi yaabo omu mikono y'Abafilistia; haabaho obusingye ahagati y'Abaisraeli n'Abaamori." 
1Samuel7:15 Samueli yaaguma naacwera Abaisraeli emanja ebiro bye byona. 
1Samuel7:16 Kandi buri mwaka akaba arambura Beseeli, Gilugaali na Mizipa, naacwera Abaisraeli emanja omuri egyo myanya yoona;" 
1Samuel7:17 bwanyima agaruka Raama; ahakuba eka ye niyo yaabaire eri; okwo niyo yaabaire acwerera Abaisraeli emanja; kandi niyo yaayombekyeire MUKAMA eitambiro. 
1Samuel8:1 Samueli ku yaakuzire, yaataho abatabani kuba abaramuzi b'Abaisraeli." 
1Samuel8:2 Omwana we w'omujigaijo akaba naayetwa Yoeli; ow'omushubiro naayetwa Abiya; bakaba bari abaramuzi omuri Beeri-sheba. 
1Samuel8:3 Kwonka abo batabani tibaratwarize nka ishebo, kureka bakateishuka emihanda ye ahabw'okukunda empiiha, baaguma nibarya enguzi, kandi nibaita emanja z'abantu." 
1Samuel8:4 Bwanyima abakuru ba Israeli boona baayeteerana hamwe, baija ahari Samueli Raama." 
1Samuel8:5 Baamugira bati: Reeba, okuzire; kandi batabani baawe tibarikutwaza nkaiwe; mbwenu otuteereho omugabe w'okututegyeka nk'agandi mahanga oku gatwaza." 
1Samuel8:6 Kwonka ekigambo ekyo kyagwisa kubi Samueli, eki baagizire bati: Otuhe omugabe, atutegyekye. Samueli yaashaba MUKAMA." 
1Samuel8:7 MUKAMA yaagira Samueli ati: Hurira ebi abo bantu barikukugambira byona; ahakuba tiiwe bangire, kureka niinye bangire ngu ntaba omugabe waabo." 
1Samuel8:8 Nk'ebi baakozire byona oku byabaire biri, okwiha aha izooba riri eri naabaihiireho Misri n'okuhitsya hati, obu baanyimuura, bakaheereza baaruhanga abandi, naiwe nikwo barikukugira." 
1Samuel8:9 N'ahabw'ekyo hati hurira eki barikukugambira; kwonka obeehanangiririze kimwe, noobashobororera emitwarize y'omugabe oribategyeka, oku eriba." 
1Samuel8:10 Atyo Samueli yaagambira abantu abamushabire omugabe ebigambo bya MUKAMA byona. 
1Samuel8:11 Yaabagira ati: Egi niyo eriba emitwarize y'omugabe oribategyeka; aryatwara batabani baanyu, abamwe abagire ab'ebigaari bye, n'ab'okugyendera aha mbaraasi ze, n'ab'okuguma nibairuka omu maisho g'ebigaari bye." 
1Samuel8:12 Abandi abateho kuba abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'aba makumi ataano-ataano; abandi babe ab'okumuhingira, n'ab'okumugyeshera, abandi babe ab'okumuheeshera eby'okurwanisa, n'eby'okukoresa omu bigaari bye." 
1Samuel8:13 Kandi aryatwara bahara baanyu kuba ab'okukora eby'emigaju, n'ab'okuteeka eby'okurya, n'abateeki b'emigaati." 
1Samuel8:14 Kandi aryabaaka emisiri yaanyu, n'emizaabibu yaanyu, n'emizeituuni yaanyu, ebirikukira ebindi oburungi, abihe abaheereza be." 
1Samuel8:15 Kandi aryabaihaho kimwe kya ikumi ky'ebi muhunikire n'eky'emisiri yaanyu y'emizaabibu, abihe abakuru b'abantu be n'abaheereza be." 
1Samuel8:16 Kandi aryabanyaga abahuuku, n'abazaana baanyu, n'ente zaanyu ezirikukira oburungi, n'endogoya zaanyu, abikorese emirimo ye." 
1Samuel8:17 Kandi n'aha masyo gaanyu g'entaama n'ag'embuzi aryaihaho kimwe kya ikumi; naimwe muryaba abairu be. 
1Samuel8:18 Omu bunaku obwo muryarira ahabw'ogwo mugabe waanyu ou muriba mwetooraniire; kwonka omuri obwo bunaku MUKAMA taribagarukamu. 
1Samuel8:19 Kwonka abantu baayanga kuhurira ebi Samueli yaabagambira, baagira bati: Ngaaha; kureka nitwenda ngu tutegyekwe omugabe," 
1Samuel8:20 naitwe tube nk'amahanga goona; omugabe waitu agume atucwere emanja, kandi atwebembere aturwanirire omu ngamba zaitu." 
1Samuel8:21 Samueli ku yaaherize kuhurira ebigambo by'abo bantu byona, yaabigambira MUKAMA." 
1Samuel8:22 MUKAMA yaagira Samueli ati: Hurira eki barikugamba, obateereho omugabe. Bwanyima Samueli yaagira abashaija ba Israeli ati: Mwirooko mugarukyeyo, buri muntu omu rurembo rw'owaabo." 
1Samuel9:1 Hakaba hariho omushaija Omubenyamiini, orikwetwa Kiishi mwene Abieli, mwijukuru wa Zerori, mwene Bekoraasi ya Afia omwana w'Omubenyamiini, omushaija w'amaani emanzi." 
1Samuel9:2 Kandi akaba aine omutabani murungi omutsigazi, orikwetwa Saulo. Omu Baisraeli boona hakaba hatarimu orikumuhita; akaba naakira abantu boona aha mutwe, nibamugarukira aha ibega." 
1Samuel9:3 Eizooba rimwe endogoya za Kiishi, ishe wa Saulo, zikabura, Kiishi nikwo kugira omutabani Saulo ati: Twara omwe aha bairu baitu, mwimukye muze kusherura endogoya." 
1Samuel9:4 Atyo Saulo yaagyenda yaaraba omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, n'omu nsi ya Shalisha; kwonka tibaazibona. Bwanyima baaraba omu nsi ya Shalimu, zaaburayo; baaraba omu nsi y'Ababenyamiini, nayo zaaburayo." 
1Samuel9:5 Ku baahikire omu nsi ya Zuufi, Saulo yaagira omwiru ou yaabaire aine ati: Ija, tugarukyeyo, taata atakaiha omutima aha ndogoya, akagwemereza ahabwaitu." 
1Samuel9:6 Onu yaamugira ati: Reeba, omuri ruriya rurembo harimu omuntu wa Ruhanga; kandi n'omuntu w'ekitiinisa. Ebi agamba byona, buzima bibakwo. Mbwenu tuzeyo; obundi akaatushobororera eby'oru rugyendo rwaitu oru turimu." 
1Samuel9:7 Saulo yaabuuza omwiru we ati: Mbwenu shi, ku turaazeyo, ogwo mushaija nitumutwarira ki? Ahakuba entanda zihweire omu nshaho zaitu, kandi titwine mukimbo gw'okutwarira ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga. Mbwenu twine ki?" 
1Samuel9:8 Omwiru we yaamugarukamu ati: Reeba, nyine omu ngaro ekicweka kimwe kya kana kya shekeli y'efeeza; nikyo ndaaheereze ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga, akabona kutuhabura omuhanda." 
1Samuel9:9 (Obunyakare omuri Israeli, omuntu ku yaabaire aza kwehanuuza ahari Ruhanga, akaba agira ati: Ija tuze ow'omuhanuuzi; ahabw'okuba orikwetwa nabi omu biro ebi, ira akaba ayetwa omuhanuuzi.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Saulo yaagira omwiru we ati: Ebi waagamba nibyo; ija tugyende. Batyo baataaha omu rurembo omu ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga yaabaire ari. 
1Samuel9:11 Ku baabaire nibakiinamuka akabungo nibaza omu rurembo, baabugana abaishiki nibaza kutaha amaizi, baababuuza bati: Omuhanuuzi ariyo?" 
1Samuel9:12 Baabagarukamu bati: Ariyo; reeba ari omu maisho gaanyu aho; mwehuute, ahabw'okuba nibwo yaija omu rurembo; kandi eri izooba abantu nibaija kutambira ebitambo omu mwanya mukuru gw'okuramizamu." 
1Samuel9:13 Ku muraahikye omu rurembo, ahonaaho nimwija kumureeba, atakainamukire kuza kuriira omuri ogwo mwanya mukuru; kandi abantu tibarikubaasa kurya atakaizire, ahakuba niwe ashemereire kushabira ekitambo omugisha; bwanyima abeetsirwe bakabona kurya. Mbwenu mwinamukye; nimwija kumubugana hati." 
1Samuel9:14 Batyo bainamuka nibaza omu rurembo; ku baabaire nibakitaahamu, baabugana Samueli naashohora, naaza omuri ogwo mwanya mukuru gw'okuramizamu." 
1Samuel9:15 Kandi eryo izooba eri Saulo yaiziireho, MUKAMA akaba araire ashuururiire Samueli, naamugira ati:" 
1Samuel9:16 Nyencakare nk'aga magingo niinyija kukwoherereza omushaija orikuruga omu nsi ya Benyamiini, omushukyeho amajuta g'okumushoroora kuba omugabe w'abantu bangye Abaisraeli; kandi niwe arijuna abantu bangye, akabaiha omu mikono y'Abafilistia; kandi ndeebire abantu bangye, ahabw'okuba okutaka kwabo kumpikireho." 
1Samuel9:17 Samueli ku yaareebire Saulo, MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Ngugwo omushaija ou nkugambiire! Niwe aritegyeka abantu bangye." 
1Samuel9:18 Atyo Saulo yaashanga Samueli omu irembo ahu yaabaire ari, yaamubuuza ati: Ninkweshengyereza, mpabura ahu enju y'omuhanuuzi eri." 
1Samuel9:19 Samueli yaamugarukamu ati: Manya niinye muhanuuzi; mbwenu nyebembera, tuze omu mwanya mukuru; ahakuba eri izooba nimwija kurya naanye; kandi nyencakare omu kasheeshe niinyija kukwohereza, naaheza kukushobororera ebikuri aha mutima byona." 
1Samuel9:20 Kandi eby'endogoya zaawe ezimazire ebiro bishatu zibuzire, birekye kukwemereza omutima; ahakuba zibonekire. Mbwenu ebirungi by'omuri Israeli byona bibiikiirwe oha? Tiiwe n'enju ya sho yoona?" 
1Samuel9:21 Saulo yaamugarukamu ati: Torikumanya ku ndi Omubenyamiini, ow'omu ruganda orurikukira obukye omu nganda za Israeli? Kandi omu miryango y'oruganda rwa Benyamiini yoona, ogwaitu tigwo gurikukira obukye? Ahabw'enki nongambira ebigambo nk'ebyo?" 
1Samuel9:22 Samueli yaatwara Saulo n'omwiru we, yaabataasya omu kishengye, yaabashutamya omu mwanya gw'ekitiinisa ahagati y'abeetsirwe, abaabaire bari nka makumi ashatu." 
1Samuel9:23 Samueli yaagira omuteeki ati: Reeta omugabo ogu nkuhaire, nkakugira nti: Gubiikye." 
1Samuel9:24 Omuteeki yaareeta ekivune ky'okuguru n'enyama zaakyo, yaakita omu maisho ga Saulo. Samueli yaagira ati: Reeba, ekibaire kibiikirwe, nkiki omu maisho gaawe; okirye; ahakuba kibaire kikubisiirwe okuhitsya aha bunaku obubaire butairweho, ngu obone kurya n'abeetsirwe. Atyo Saulo yaarya na Samueli eryo izooba." 
1Samuel9:25 Ku baarugire omuri ogwo mwanya mukuru, baashuuma omu rurembo, baatemba aha mutwe gw'enju, Samueli yaagaaniirirayo na Saulo." 
1Samuel9:26 Omu kasheeshe baimuka kare; ku bwabaire nibutaagurukana, Samueli yaayeta Saulo ayemi ahaiguru y'enju, yaamugira ati: Imuka, nkuragye. Saulo yaimuka; baashohora bombi, we na Samueli, baaza aheeru." 
1Samuel9:27 Ku baabaire nibashuuma kuhika ahu orurembo rurikugarukira, Samueli yaagira Saulo ati: Gambira omwiru waawe arabeho; ku araarabeho, haza iwe oyemerereho kakye, nkugambire ekigambo kya Ruhanga." 
1Samuel10:1 Ahonaaho Samueli yaakwata eihembe ry'amajuta, yaagamushuka aha mutwe, yaamunywegyera, yaagira ati: MUKAMA tiyaakushukaho amajuta kuba omugabe w'abantu be Israeli?" 
1Samuel10:2 Eri izooba ku orandugyeho, noija kubugana abashaija babiri aha kituuro kya Rakeeli, ahari Zeliza omu mwatano gwa Benyamiini, bakugire bati: Endogoya ezi obaire ogiire kusherura, zibonekire; mbwenu sho takyemereize mutima ahabw'endogoya, kureka agwemereize ahabwawe, naagira ati: Mbwenu ngire nta ahabw'omwana wangye?" 
1Samuel10:3 Bwanyima orugye aho, ogumizemu; ku oraahikye aha mwela gwa Tabora, noija kubugana abashaija bashatu nibainamuka Beseeli ahari Ruhanga, omwe ayekoreire abaana b'embuzi bashatu, ondi aine emigaati eshatu, n'ondiijo ayekoreire efurebe ya viinyo;" 
1Samuel10:4 bakuramutsye, bakuhe emigaati ebiri, ogyakiire." 
1Samuel10:5 Bwanyima noija kuhika aha kibungo kya Ruhanga, ahu engabo z'Abafilistia ziteire orusiisira; ku oraahikye omu rurembo, noija kubuganamu omutwe gwa baanabi nibaruga omu mwanya mukuru gw'okuramizamu, endingiri n'ebitaasa n'emikuri n'enanga bibeebembeire; kandi noija kushanga nibaragura." 
1Samuel10:6 Omwoyo wa MUKAMA naija kukwijaho n'amaani, oragure nabo, ohindukye omuntu musya." 
1Samuel10:7 Kandi obwo bumanyiso ku buraakuhikyeho, okore nk'oku kiraabe nikyetengwa; ahakuba Ruhanga ari naiwe." 
1Samuel10:8 Bwanyima oshuume Gilugaali, ombandizeyo; naanye niinyija kukushangayo, kutamba ebitambo by'okwotsya n'eby'okusiima ahabw'obusingye; omareyo ebiro mushanju ontegyereize, okuhitsya obu ndaija, nkakushobororera eki oshemereire kukora." 
1Samuel10:9 Ku yaateire ati Samueli amabega kumurugaho, Ruhanga yaamuha ogundi mutima; obw'okureeberaho obwo bwona bwahikiirira eryo izooba." 
1Samuel10:10 Ku baahikire ahari ekyo kibungo, omutwe gwa baanabi gwamubugana, Omwoyo wa Ruhanga yaamwijaho n'amaani, yaaragura nabo." 
1Samuel10:11 Boona abaabaire nibamumanya obunyakare, ku baareebire naaragura hamwe na baanabi, baagambirana bati: Beitu mwene Kiishi yaaba ata? Saulo nawe ari omuri baanabi?"
