1Samuel10:12 Omwe aha batwire omu mwanya ogwo yaabagarukamu naagira ati: Beitu shi ni beene oha? N'ahabw'ekyo kyahinduka enfumu, ngu: Saulo nawe ari omuri baanabi?" 
1Samuel10:13 Ku yaaherize kuragura, yaaza omu mwanya mukuru gw'okuramizamu." 
1Samuel10:14 Ishento wa Saulo yaamubuuza n'omwiru we ati: Mubaire mugiire hi? Yaamugarukamu ati: Tubaire tugiire kusherura endogoya; ku tureebire zitaaboneka, twaza owa Samueli." 
1Samuel10:15 Ishento yaagaruka yaagira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ngambira ebi Samueli akugambiire." 
1Samuel10:16 Saulo yaagarukamu ishento ati: Atugambiriire kimwe ku endogoya zibonekire. Kwonka ebirikukwata aha by'obugabe, ebi Samueli agambire, tiyaabimugambira." 
1Samuel10:17 Bwanyima Samueli yaayeta abantu kuteeranira Mizipa omu maisho ga MUKAMA; 
1Samuel10:18 yaagambira Abaisraeli ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Nkaiha Abaisraeli Misri, naabajuna naabaiha omu mikono y'abanyamisri, n'omu mikono y'abagabe boona abaabaire nibabaita kubi;" 
1Samuel10:19 kwonka eri izooba mwayanga Ruhanga waanyu, obajuna omu kabi kaanyu koona n'omu busaasi bwanyu; mbwenu mwangira muti: Ngaaha, kureka otuteereho omugabe. N'ahabw'ekyo hati mweyorekye omu maisho ga MUKAMA muri omu nganda zaanyu n'omu nkumi zaanyu." 
1Samuel10:20 Atyo Samueli yairiza haihi enganda za Israeli zoona, oruganda rwa Benyamiini rwatooranwa." 
1Samuel10:21 Yairiza haihi oruganda rwa Benyamiini bari omu miryango yaabo, omuryango gwa Matiri gwatooranwa; na Saulo mwene Kiishi yaatooranwa. Kwonka ku baamusherwire, tiyaaboneka." 
1Samuel10:22 N'ahabw'ekyo baayongyera kwehanuuza ahari MUKAMA, nibamubuuza bati: Ogwo mushaija aizire aha? MUKAMA yaabagarukamu ati: Reeba, ayesherekire omu bintu." 
1Samuel10:23 Baagyenda nibairuka, baamwihayo; ku yaayemereire ahagati yaabo, yaakira abantu boona aha mutwe, baamugarukira aha ibega." 
1Samuel10:24 Samueli yaagira abantu boona ati: Nimureeba ou MUKAMA atooraine? Tihariho ori nkawe omu bantu boona. Abantu boona baateera akaari, nibagira bati: Omugabe nakaramaare!" 
1Samuel10:25 Bwanyima Samueli yaashobororera abantu emitwarize y'obugabe, yaagihandika omu kitabo, yaakibiika omu maisho ga MUKAMA. Samueli yaaraga abantu boona, buri omwe yaagaruka omu ka ye." 
1Samuel10:26 Saulo nawe yaataaha owe Gibea, yaagyenda n'omutwe gw'amamanzi, abu MUKAMA yaakozire aha mutima, bamushendekyereize." 
1Samuel10:27 Kwonka abashaija bamwe abataine mugasho baagira bati: Omushaija ogu naabaasa ata kutujuna? Baamugaya, baayanga kumureetera entabaarutsyano. Kwonka we yaayehunamira." 
1Samuel11:1 Bwanyima Nahashi Omuamoni yainamuka, yaateera Yabeshi-gileadi orusiisira kugirwanisa; aba Yabeshi boona baamugira bati: Tukorese endagaano, tugume tukuheereze." 
1Samuel11:2 Nahashi Omuamoni yaabagira ati: Ku muraikirize ku mbanonkoramu amaisho ga buryo, niinyija kugibakoresa; kandi nkigire ekijumo ahari Israeli yoona." 
1Samuel11:3 Abakuru ba Yabeshi baamugarukamu bati: Ba oturekire okumara ebiro mushanju, tubanze tutume entumwa, zirabe omuri Israeli yoona; ku turaabure kijuna, nitwija kukwehongyera." 
1Samuel11:4 Ezo ntumwa ku zaahikire Gibea owa Saulo, zaateekyerereza abantu ebyo bigambo; abantu boona baarira munonga, baaborooga." 
1Samuel11:5 Omuri ako kaanya Saulo yaija akuratiire ente, naaruga omu misiri; yaabuuza ati: Abantu aba baaba bata, ka nibaborooga? Baamuteekyerereza eby'aba Yabeshi." 
1Samuel11:6 Saulo ku yaahuriire ebigambo ebyo, Omwoyo wa Ruhanga yaamwijaho n'amaani, yaagira ekiniga kingi." 
1Samuel11:7 Yaihayo ente ibiri, yaaziita, yaazitematemamu ebicweka, yaabiha entumwa kubitwara omuri Israeli yoona, yaazituma ati: Weena oraayangye kuhurura na Saulo na Samueli, okwo nikwo ente ze ziraatwazibwe. Okutiinisa kwa MUKAMA kwakwata abantu, baahururira kimwe nk'omuntu omwe." 
1Samuel11:8 Ku yaabateeraniire Bezeki, yaababara, Abaisraeli baaba obusiriira bushatu, n'Abayuda baaba obukumi bushatu." 
1Samuel11:9 Bwanyima baagambira entumwa ziri eziizire, bati: Mugambire aba Yabeshi-gileadi muti: Nyencakare akashana kaatagata, nimwija kuheebwa emikono. Ezo ntumwa zaagyenda, zaabigambira aba Yabeshi; baashemererwa." 
1Samuel11:10 Aba Yabeshi nikwo kugambira Abaamoni bati: Nyencakare nitwija kubeehongyera, mutugire nk'oku murikwenda kwona." 
1Samuel11:11 Ku bwaseesire, Saulo yaabaganisa abantu omu mitwe eshatu, baayeshuka omu rusiisira rw'Abaamoni enkoko nizigamba, baabaita okuhitsya omu ihangwe; abaahonokireho baataataana, nangwa n'ababiri tibaaguma hamwe." 
1Samuel11:12 Bwanyima abantu baagira Samueli bati: Hari n'oha owaagizire ati: Ebyo Saulo aryatutegyeka? Mureete abo bashaija, tubaite." 
1Samuel11:13 Kwonka Saulo yaagira ati: Hatagira omuntu n'omwe owaitwa eri izooba; ahakuba eri izooba MUKAMA yaakora eby'okujuna Abaisraeli. 
1Samuel11:14 Samueli yaagira abantu ati: Mwije tuze Gilugaali, tuhamizeyo obugabe." 
1Samuel11:15 Abantu boona baaza Gilugaali; okwo niyo baayemekyeire Saulo omu maisho ga MUKAMA, bakatambirayo empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye omu maisho ge; kandi niyo Saulo n'Abaisraeli boona baayesiimiire munonga." 
1Samuel12:1 Samueli yaagambira Abaisraeli boona ati: Reeba, nyikiriize ebi mwanshabire byona, naabateeraho omugabe w'okubategyeka." 
1Samuel12:2 Ogwo mugabe niwe arikubeebembera; nyowe nkuzire, naagizire enju; mbwenu reeba, batabani bangye bari hamwe naimwe. Kandi nyowe nkabeebembera okwiha omu butsigazi bwangye okuhitsya hati." 
1Samuel12:3 Reeba, ndi aha; munyomesereze omu maisho ga MUKAMA n'omu maisho g'ogu muntu we, owaashukirweho amajuta. Ndanyagire ente y'oha? Ndanyagire endogoya y'oha? Nari ndaryangataniise oha? N'oha ou ndaitsire kubi? Nari shi n'oha ou ndariireho enguzi, kuunyita amaisho? nkabimuriha." 
1Samuel12:4 Baamugarukamu bati: Tokaturyangatanisaga, kandi tokatwitaga kubi, n'obu kwakuba okunyaga ekintu ky'omuntu weena." 
1Samuel12:5 Yaabagira ati: MUKAMA niwe mujurizi w'okubashinja, kandi n'omuntu we owaashukirweho amajuta ni kareebi w'okuhamya, ku mutaine ki mwanshanga omu ngaro. Baagira bati: Niwe kareebi." 
1Samuel12:6 Kandi Samueli yaagira abantu ati: MUKAMA niwe yaataireho Musa na Arooni, akaiha baashwenkuriimwe omu nsi ya Misri." 
1Samuel12:7 N'ahabw'ekyo eri izooba nimwemerere, ntongane naimwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA eby'okujuna byona ebi MUKAMA yaabakoreire na baashwenkuriimwe." 
1Samuel12:8 Yakobo obu yaaza Misri, baashwenkuriimwe bakatakira MUKAMA, yaatuma Musa na Arooni, baiha baashwenkuriimwe Misri, baabata omu nsi egi kutuuramu." 
1Samuel12:9 Kwonka baayebwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, yaabarekurira Sisera, omukuru w'eihe rya Hazori, n'Abafilistia, n'omugabe wa Moabu, baabarwanisa." 
1Samuel12:10 Bwanyima baatakira MUKAMA nibagira bati: Tukacumura, ahakuba tukaimuura MUKAMA, twaheereza Baabaali n'aba Ashitaroosi; mbwenu otujune, otwihe omu mikono y'abazigu baitu, tukuheereze." 
1Samuel12:11 MUKAMA yaatuma Yerubabaali, Baraki, Yefusa na Samueli, yaabaiha omu mikono y'abazigu baanyu embaju zoona, mwatuura buhooro." 
1Samuel12:12 Bwanyima ku mwareebire Nahashi omugabe w'Abaamoni yaabateera, mwangira muti: Ngaaha, nitwenda kutegyekwa omugabe; haza kunu omugabe waanyu ari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu." 
1Samuel12:13 Mbwenu hati, nimureebe omugabe ou mwayetooraniire, kandi ou mwashabire. Mpaho MUKAMA abateereireho omugabe w'okubategyeka." 
1Samuel12:14 Ku muritiina MUKAMA, mwamuheereza, mwahurira eiraka rye, mutaagomera kiragiro kya MUKAMA, kandi imwe n'omugabe orikubategyeka ku murikuratira MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, biryaba gye." 
1Samuel12:15 Kwonka ku muryanga kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA, mwagomera ekiragiro kye, omukono gwa MUKAMA guryabarwanisa, nk'oku gwarwaniise baashwenkuriimwe." 
1Samuel12:16 N'ahabw'ekyo hati mwemerere mureebe ekintu eki ekikuru eki MUKAMA yaaza kukora omu maisho gaanyu. 
1Samuel12:17 Hati t'obunaku bw'eishaaruura ry'engano? Mbwenu naaza kushaba MUKAMA, areete okuhinda kw'enkuba n'enjura; haza mwetegyereze mureebe obubi bwanyu ku buri bwingi, obu mwagizire omu maisho ga MUKAMA, obu mwayeshabira omugabe." 
1Samuel12:18 Atyo Samueli yaashaba MUKAMA; eryo izooba MUKAMA yaareeta okuhinda kw'enkuba n'enjura; abantu boona baatiina munonga MUKAMA na Samueli. 
1Samuel12:19 Baagira Samueli bati: Shabira abairu baawe ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, turekye kufa; ahabw'okuba tukongyera aha bibi byaitu byona ekibi eki eky'okweshabira omugabe." 
1Samuel12:20 Samueli yaagambira abantu ati: Mutatiina; n'ekya buzima, ebyo bibi byona kwo mukabikora; kwonka mutateishuka mukareka kukuratira MUKAMA, kureka mumuheereze n'omutima gwanyu gwona;" 
1Samuel12:21 kandi mutateishuka mukakuratira ebitaine mugasho, kandi ebitarikubaasa kubagasira, n'obu kwakuba okubajuna; ahakuba tibiine mutambo." 
1Samuel12:22 Mumanye ngu MUKAMA taritsigaho bantu be ahabw'eiziina rye erikuru, ahakuba MUKAMA akasiima kubagira eihanga rye ahabwe." 
1Samuel12:23 Kandi ahabwangye nikikabure okucumura ahari MUKAMA, okureka kubashabira; kureka ndyaguma mbahabure omuhanda murungi kandi oguhikire." 
1Samuel12:24 Kwonka mugume mutiine MUKAMA, mumuheereze omu mazima n'omutima gwanyu gwona; ahabw'okuba mushemereire kuteekateeka aha bi MUKAMA yaabakoreire ku biri bikuru." 
1Samuel12:25 Kwonka ku muriguma nimukora kubi, muryahwerekyerera imwe n'omugabe waanyu." 
1Samuel13:1 Saulo akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi ashatu, yaamara emyaka ebiri naategyeka Israeli." 
1Samuel13:2 Bwanyima Saulo yaatoorana abashaija enkumi ishatu omu Baisraeli; enkumi ibiri zaaguma na Saulo Mikimaashi n'aha kibungo kya Beseeli; kandi orukumi rwaguma na Yonasaani omuri Gibea eya Benyamiini; abandi boona yaabaraga, buri muntu yaataaha omu ka ye." 
1Samuel13:3 Bwanyima Yonasaani yaateera ekigo ky'Abafilistia ekyabaire kiri Gibea; Abafilistia baakimanya. Bwanyima Saulo yaaragiira kuteera enzamba omu nsi yoona, naagira ati: Abaheburaayo bahurire." 
1Samuel13:4 Abaisraeli boona baahurira ngu Saulo ateire ekigo ky'Abafilistia, kandi ngu Abaisraeli bahindukire ekirikunugwa aha Bafilistia. Abantu baahuruzibwa kushanga Saulo Gilugaali." 
1Samuel13:5 Kandi Abafilistia baayeteerana kurwanisa Abaisraeli, baine ebigaari obukumi bushatu, n'ab'aha mbaraasi enkumi mukaaga, n'ezindi ngabo nyingi, eziri nk'omusheenyi gw'aha rubaju rw'enyanja; bainamuka, baasiisira Mikimaashi, aha burugwa-izooba bwa Besaveeni." 
1Samuel13:6 Abashaija ba Israeli ku baareebire bari omu kabi, (ahakuba abantu bakaba batuntuziibwe) baayeshereka omu nyanga n'omu bishaka n'omu nkiri n'omu nengo kandi n'omu biina." 
1Samuel13:7 Kandi Abaheburaayo abamwe bakaba bambukire Yorudani, nibaza omu nsi ya Gaadi na Gileadi; kwonka Saulo akaba akiri Gilugaali, abantu boona baamukuratayo nibatetema." 
1Samuel13:8 Saulo yaamarayo ebiro mushanju, ebi Samueli yaabaire amuragiire; kwonka Samueli tiyaija; n'ahabw'ekyo abantu baatandika kutaataana nibamurugaho mporampora." 
1Samuel13:9 Saulo nikwo kugira ati: Mundeetere ekitambo ky'okwotsya n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye. Atyo yaatamba ekyo kitambo ky'okwotsya. 
1Samuel13:10 Ku yaabaire yaaheza ati kukitamba, Samueli yaija. Saulo yaashohora kumubugana, ngu amuramutsye." 
1Samuel13:11 Samueli yaamubuuza ati: Eki waakora ki? Saulo yaamugarukamu ati: Ku ndeebire abantu baatandika kutaataana nibampwaho, naiwe otaizira mu biro bi ongambiire, kandi n'Abafilistia baateeraniire Mikimaashi," 
1Samuel13:12 naanye nikwo kugira nti: Hati Abafilistia baaza kushuuma, banteerere Gilugaali, ntakeeshengyereize MUKAMA kumpa omugisha. Nikyo nyegyemeserereize kutamba ekitambo ky'okwotsya." 
1Samuel13:13 Samueli yaagambira Saulo ati: Waakora eky'obushema; tiwaakwata kiragiro kya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, eki yaakuragiire; reeba MUKAMA yaaba ari ow'okuhamya obugabe bwawe omuri Israeli ebiro byona." 
1Samuel13:14 Kwonka mbwenu obugabe bwawe tiburigumaho. MUKAMA yaaheza kwesherurira omuntu ori nk'omutima gwe oku gurikwenda, kandi niwe yaataho kuba omugabe w'abantu be, ahakuba tokwatsire ki MUKAMA yaakuragiire." 
1Samuel13:15 Samueli yaimuka, yaaruga Gilugaali, yaaza Gibea eya Benyamiini. Saulo yaabara abantu abu yaabaire aine, baaba nka magana mukaaga." 
1Samuel13:16 Saulo n'omutabani Yonasaani n'abantu abu baabaire baine baaguma Geeba eya Benyamiini; kwonka Abafilistia baaguma omu rusiisira Mikimaashi. 
1Samuel13:17 Kandi abanyagi b'omu Bafilistia baaruga omu rusiisira rwabo, baayecwamu emitwe eshatu; ogumwe gwatoora omuhanda ogurikuza Ofura omu nsi ya Shuali;" 
1Samuel13:18 ogundi gwatoora omuhanda ogurikuza Besi-horoni; n'ogundi gwatoora omuhanda ogw'aha mwatano ogurikureeba omu ruhanga rwa Zeboimu haihi n'eihamba. 
1Samuel13:19 Omu biro ebyo hakaba hatariho muheesi n'omwe omu nsi ya Israeli; ahabw'okuba Abafilistia bakagira bati: Abaheburaayo batakaayeheeshera zaarurara n'amacumu. 
1Samuel13:20 Kandi Abaisraeli boona bakaba bashuuma omu Bafilistia, buri muntu kutyazayo efuka ye, oruhabyo rwe, empango ye, n'omuhoro gwe;" 
1Samuel13:21 kwonka bakaba baine eityazo ry'okutyazaho emihoro n'empabyo, n'efuka z'amaino n'empango, n'eby'okutyazaho ebihosho." 
1Samuel13:22 N'ahabw'ekyo aha izooba ry'orugamba omu bantu abu Saulo n'omutabani Yonasaani baabaire baine, tihariho n'omwe owaabaire agira rurara nari eicumu; kureka bikaba bigirwa Saulo n'omutabani Yonasaani." 
1Samuel13:23 Bwanyima ab'omu kigo ky'Abafilistia baashohora, baaza omu nkiro ya Mikimaashi." 
1Samuel14:1 Eizooba rimwe Yonasaani mwene Saulo akagambira omutsigazi, omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye ati: Ija twambukye seeri omu kigo ky'Abafilistia. Kwonka tiyaagambira ishe." 
1Samuel14:2 Kandi Saulo akaba ari omu kicweka kya Gibea ekirikuheererukayo ahansi y'omukoma-mahanga ogwabaire guri Migirooni; n'abashaija abu yaabaire aine bakaba bari nka magana mukaaga; 
1Samuel14:3 kandi hakaba hariho na Ahiya, mwene Ahitubu, mukuru wa Ikabodi, mwene Finehaasi, mwijukuru wa Eli, omunyamurwa wa MUKAMA omuri Shiilo, ajwaire efodi. Kandi n'abo bantu tibaramanyire ku Yonasaani agyenzire." 
1Samuel14:4 Omuri egyo nkiro ahu Yonasaani yaabaire naayenda kucwekanisiza kuhika omu kigo ky'Abafilistia, hakaba hariho ebibaare bihango embaju zombi; ekimwe nikyetwa Bozezi, n'ekindi nikyetwa Senehi." 
1Samuel14:5 Ekibaare kimwe kikaba kirumbaire aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, ahashungaine na Mikimaashi; n'ekindi aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo ahashungaine na Geeba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonasaani yaagambira ogwo mutsigazi omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye ati: Ija twambukye omuri kiriya kigo kyabatashazirwe; obundi MUKAMA akaagira eki yaatukorera, ahakuba tihariho kirikubaasa kuzibira MUKAMA kujuna, okujunisa baingi nari bakye." 
1Samuel14:7 Omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye yaamugarukamu ati: Kora ekikuri aha mutima kyona. Reeba ndi hamwe naiwe; oku omutima gwawe guri, n'ogwangye nikwo guri." 
1Samuel14:8 Yonasaani yaagira ati: Ka twambukye omuri abo bashaija, tubeeyorekye." 
1Samuel14:9 Ku baraatugire ngu, mube murekire, okuhitsya obu turaabashangye aho, obwo nitwija kuguma twemereire omu mwanya gwaitu; titurikwija kwinamuka ei bari." 
1Samuel14:10 Kwonka ku baraagire ngu, mwinamukye mwije, obwo nitwija kwinamuka; ibiri MUKAMA naaba abahaireyo omu mikono yaitu. Ako niko karaatubeere akamanyiso." 
1Samuel14:11 Batyo bombi baayeyoreka ab'omu kigo ky'Abafilistia; Abafilistia ku baabareebire, baagira bati; Reeba, Abaheburaayo nibaruga omu biina omu babaire beesherekire." 
1Samuel14:12 Ab'omu kigo baagambira Yonasaani n'omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye bati: Nimwinamukye, tuboorekye. Yonasaani yaagira omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye ati: Nkurata; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA yaabahayo omu mikono y'Abaisraeli." 
1Samuel14:13 Atyo Yonasaani yaatemba naayajura, n'omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye amuri enyima. Abafilistia baagwa omu maisho ga Yonasaani; kandi omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye yaabaita amukuratiire." 
1Samuel14:14 Omuri okwo kwita kw'okubanza Yonasaani n'omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye bakaita abashaija nka makumi abiri omu mwanya ogurikwingana ekicweka ky'omusiri. 
1Samuel14:15 Bwanyima haabaho obwoba bwingi omu rusiisira, omu ishwa n'omu bantu boona; kandi ab'omu kigo n'abanyagi bari nabo baatetema; n'ensi yaatengyeta; haabaho okutengyeta kwingi munonga." 
1Samuel14:16 Kandi abarinzi ba Saulo, abaabaire bari Gibea eya Benyamiini, ku baanagireyo amaisho, baareeba emitwe y'abantu neegaba ebirari." 
1Samuel14:17 Saulo nikwo kugambira abantu abu yaabaire aine ati; Mubare abantu, mureebe ku haraabe haine oturugiremu. Ku baaherize kubara, baashanga Yonasaani n'omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye batabarimu." 
1Samuel14:18 Saulo yaagira Ahiya ati: Reeta eshanduukye ya Ruhanga; ahabw'okuba omuri ebyo biro eshanduukye ya Ruhanga ekaba eri omu Baisraeli. 
1Samuel14:19 Saulo, ku yaabaire naakigamba n'omunyamurwa, orwari orwabaire ruri omu rusiisira rw'Abafilistia rwaguma nirweyongyera; Saulo yaagira omunyamurwa ati: Ihayo omukono gwawe." 
1Samuel14:20 Atyo Saulo n'abantu boona abu yaabaire aine, baayeteerana, baaza omu rugamba; baashanga nibaitana bonka na rurara, buri muntu na mugyenzi we; haabaho omurabanamu muhango munonga." 
1Samuel14:21 Kandi Abaheburaayo, abaabaire bari hamwe n'Abafilistia obunyakare, abaagyenzire nabo omu rusiisira, nabo baagarukira Abaisraeli abaabaire bari hamwe na Saulo na Yonasaani, baakwatanisa nabo." 
1Samuel14:22 Kandi n'Abaisraeli boona abaabaire beesherekire omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, ku baahuriire ngu Abafilistia baahunga, baababinga babahambize." 
1Samuel14:23 Atyo MUKAMA yaajuna Abaisraeli eryo izooba; bwanyima orugamba rwagumizamu, rwahika seeri ya Besaveeni." 
1Samuel14:24 Eryo izooba Abaisraeli baaruha munonga, ahabw'okuba Saulo akaba arahiize abantu naagira ati: Omuntu weena oraagire eki yaarya butakahikire mu mwabazyo, kandi ntakahoire bazigu bangye, akyeenwe. N'ahabw'ekyo tihaagira n'omwe owaagira eki yaatamira." 
1Samuel14:25 Abantu boona baahika aha kibira ekyabaire kirimu obwoki ahansi; 
1Samuel14:26 ku baakitaahiremu, baashanga obwoki nibushononoka; kwonka tihaagira owaayekoza orukumu omu kanwa; ahakuba bakaba nibatiina egyo ndahiro." 
1Samuel14:27 Kwonka Yonasaani we, obu ishe yaabaire naarahiza abantu, taramuhuriire. N'ahabw'ekyo yaihayo enkoni ei yaabaire akwaitse omu ngaro, yaacumita eifundo ryayo omu ngabo y'obwoki, yaakoza orukumu rwe omu kanwa, amaisho ge gaahweza." 
1Samuel14:28 Omwe ahari abo bantu yaamugira ati: Sho yaarahiriza kimwe abantu, naagira ati: Omuntu weena oraagire eki yaatamira eri izooba akyeenwe. Kandi abantu bakaba nibagwa enshazi." 
1Samuel14:29 Yonasaani yaagira ati: Taata ka yaakabya ensi; mbwenu nimureebe amaisho gangye ku gaahweza ahabw'okurigatsa ahari aka kooki. 
1Samuel14:30 Kuri noogira ngu abantu eri izooba baikirizibwa kurya aha minyago y'abazigu baabo, ei bashangireyo, tibaakubaire gye okukiraho? Ahakuba tihakabaireho kwita kwingi omu Bafilistia." 
1Samuel14:31 Eryo izooba baabinga Abafilistia okuruga Mikimaashi okuhika Ayalooni. Abantu baagwa enshazi munonga; 
1Samuel14:32 baayeroha omu minyago, baakwata entaama n'ente n'enyana, baaziregyeza ahansi; baaziriirirana n'eshagama yaazo." 
1Samuel14:33 Haabaho abaabigambira Saulo bati: Reeba, abantu nibacumura ahari MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba nibarya enyama n'eshagama yaayo. Yaabagira ati: Mwagobya; mbwenu mukumbagaze eibaare rihango, murindeetere aha." 
1Samuel14:34 Bwanyima Saulo yaagira ati: Murabe omu bantu boona, mubagire muti: Buri muntu areete ente ye, nari entaama ye, muziitire aha, muzirye; kandi mutacumura ahari MUKAMA, mukarya eshagama. Ekyo kiro buri muntu yaareeta ente ye, baaziitira aho." 
1Samuel14:35 Saulo yaayombekyera MUKAMA eitambiro; eryo niryo itambiro ry'okubanza eri yaayombekyeire MUKAMA. 
1Samuel14:36 Bwanyima Saulo yaagira ati: Mwije tushuume, tukurate Abafilistia eki kiro, tubanyagye okuhitsya omu kasheeshe; tutagira omuntu n'omwe ou twatsigaho. Abantu baagira bati: Kora kyona eki orikusiima. Bwanyima omunyamurwa yaabagira ati: Mwije aha, twirire haihi Ruhanga." 
1Samuel14:37 Saulo yaayehanuuza ahari Ruhanga naagira ati: Nshuume nkurate Abafilistia? Noija kubahayo omu mikono y'Abaisraeli? Kwonka MUKAMA tiyaamugarukamu ekyo kiro. 
1Samuel14:38 Saulo nikwo kugira ati: Imwe mwena abakuru b'abantu, nimwirire aha, mwetegyereze mureebe eki kibi kyakorwa eri izooba ahu kiri;" 
1Samuel14:39 ahakuba nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, Omujuni wa Israeli, n'obu kyakuba kiri omuri mutabani wangye Yonasaani, buzimazima naija kwitwa. Kwonka tihaabaho n'omwe omu bantu boona owaamugarukamu." 
1Samuel14:40 Bwanyima yaagambira Abaisraeli boona ati: Muze aha rubaju rumwe, nyowe na mutabani wangye Yonasaani tuze aha rundi. Abantu baagarukamu Saulo bati: Kora eki orikusiima." 
1Samuel14:41 N'ahabw'ekyo Saulo yaagira ati: Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, ahabw'enki tiwaagarukamu omwiru waawe eri izooba? Ku ruraabe ruri orubanja rwangye nari orwa mutabani wangye Yonasaani, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, oyorekye ekihikire; kwonka ku ruraabe ruri orw'abantu baawe Israeli, otuhe Tumimu. Haakwatwa Yonasaani na Saulo, abantu baakira." 
1Samuel14:42 Saulo yaagaruka yaagira ati: Teera enteenyu ahariinye na mutabani wangye Yonasaani. Enteenyu yaakwata Yonasaani. 
1Samuel14:43 Saulo nikwo kugira Yonasaani ati: Ngambira eki waakora. Yonasaani yaamugira ati: N'ekya buzima naakoza eifundo ry'enkoni, ei naaba nyine omu ngaro, omu bwoki, naarigatsaho. Reeba ndi aha, nshemereire kufa." 
1Samuel14:44 Saulo yaagira ati: Yonasaani, buzimazima noija kufa; ku oraabe otafiire, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho." 
1Samuel14:45 Kwonka abantu baagira Saulo bati: Hoona Yonasaani, oreetsire okujunwa okurikwingana kuti omuri Israeli, afe? Nikikabure! Niturahira MUKAMA otahwaho, tiharikwija kugira kashokye na kamwe ak'aha mutwe gwe akaagwa ahansi; ahabw'okuba eri izooba yaakora na Ruhanga. Okwo nikwo abantu baakirize Yonasaani, atafe." 
1Samuel14:46 Okuruga aho Saulo yaarekyeraho kukurata Abafilistia; n'Abafilistia baagaruka owaabo. 
1Samuel14:47 Saulo ku yaaherize kuza aha ngoma omuri Israeli, yaarwana n'abazigu be boona embaju zoona, Abamoabu, Abaamoni, Abanyaedomu, abagabe ba Zooba n'Abafilistia; ahu yaabaire aza hoona, abasingura." 
1Samuel14:48 Yaarwana n'obumanzi, yaasingura Abaamaleki, yaiha Abaisraeli omu mikono y'abaabaire babanyagire." 
1Samuel14:49 Kandi beene Saulo bakaba bari aba: Yonasaani, Ishivi, na Malikishua; n'aga nigo gaabaire gari amaziina ga bahara be bombi: ow'okubanza akaba ari Merabu, n'omurumuna ari Mikaali." 
1Samuel14:50 Eiziina rya muka Saulo akaba naayetwa Ahinoamu, muhara wa Ahimaazi; eiziina ry'omukuru w'engabo ze akaba naayetwa Abuneeri, mutabani wa Neeri, ishento wa Saulo;" 
1Samuel14:51 Kiishi akaba ari ishe wa Saulo, na Neeri, ishe wa Abuneeri, akaba ari mwene Abieli." 
1Samuel14:52 Omu biro bya Saulo byona hakabaho okurwana kw'amaani n'Abafilistia; n'ahabw'ekyo Saulo ku yaabaire areeba omuntu weena ow'amaani nari emanzi, amutwara, aba omushaija we." 
1Samuel15:1 Kandi Samueli akagira Saulo ati: MUKAMA akantuma kukushukaho amajuta kuba omugabe wa Israeli; n'ahabw'ekyo hati hurira ebi MUKAMA arikukugambira. 
1Samuel15:2 MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Nyijukire oku Abaamaleki baagizire Abaisraeli, obu baabatanga omu muhanda nibaruga Misri." 
1Samuel15:3 Mbwenu irooko orwanise Abaamaleki, ocwekyerereze kimwe ebi baine byona, otabasaasira, kureka oite abashaija n'abakazi, abeereere n'abarikwonka, ente n'entaama, engamira n'endogoya." 
1Samuel15:4 Saulo yaayeta abantu, yaababarira Telaimu, abarikugyendesa ebigyere baaba obusiriira bubiri, n'Abayuda baaba kakumi." 
1Samuel15:5 Saulo yaahika aha rurembo rw'Abaamaleki, yaabagwera omu ruhanga." 
1Samuel15:6 Kandi Saulo yaagira aba Keeni ati: Mushuume murugye omu Baamaleki, ntakaabacwekyereza nabo; ahabw'okuba mukagirira Abaisraeli boona embabazi, obu baabaire nibaruga Misri. N'ahabw'ekyo aba Keeni baaruga omu Baamaleki." 
1Samuel15:7 Saulo yaabinga Abaamaleki okuruga Havila okuhika Shuuri, ahashungaine na Misri;" 
1Samuel15:8 yaakwata Agagi omugabe w'Abaamaleki ahuriire, kandi yaacwekyerereza kimwe abantu boona na rurara." 
1Samuel15:9 Kwonka Saulo n'abantu baasaasira Agagi n'entaama n'ente n'abaana b'entaama ebirikukira oburungi kandi ebigomokire, n'ebintu byona ebirungi; tibaabicwekyerereza kimwe; kwonka byona ebirikugaywa kandi ebitaine mugasho baabicwekyerereza kimwe." 
1Samuel15:10 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Samueli nikigira kiti: 
1Samuel15:11 Niinyefuuza eki naateereireho Saulo kuba omugabe; ahabw'okuba agarukire enyima, yaayanga kunkuratira, kandi tiyaakora bi naamuragiire. Samueli yaaguubwa kubi; yaaraara naatakira MUKAMA." 
1Samuel15:12 Samueli yaaguruka kare omu kasheeshe kubugana Saulo. Baamugira bati: Saulo ahikire Karumeeli, yaayebyarirayo eibaare ry'ekiijutsyo, yaakuba yaagumizamu, yaashuuma Gilugaali." 
1Samuel15:13 Samueli yaija ahari Saulo; Saulo yaamugira ati: MUKAMA akuhe omugisha! Nkozire eki MUKAMA andagiire. 
1Samuel15:14 Samueli yaamubuuza ati: Beitu shi, okwo kujuga kw'entaama n'okw'ente oku ndikuhurira n'okw'enki?" 
1Samuel15:15 Onu ati: N'ezi baihire omu Baamaleki; ahakuba abantu basaasiire entaama n'ente ezirikukira oburungi, kuzitambira MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ebitambo; ebindi ebitsigaireho tubicwekyerereize kimwe." 
1Samuel15:16 Samueli yaagira Saulo ati: Ba orekire, nkugambire eki MUKAMA araire angambiire. Onu ati: Gamba." 
1Samuel15:17 Samueli yaagira ati: N'obu oraabe waabaire nooyegaya ngu ori muto, toratoorainwe kuba omutegyeki w'enganda za Israeli? Omanye ku MUKAMA niwe yaakushukireho amajuta kuba omugabe wa Israeli." 
1Samuel15:18 Mbwenu akutumire naagira ati: Gyenda ocwekyerereze kimwe abasiisi Abaamaleki, orwane nabo okuhitsya obu oraabamareho." 
1Samuel15:19 N'enki ekikuzibiire kworobera eiraka rya MUKAMA, okagwa aha minyago n'enda, okakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA?" 
1Samuel15:20 Saulo yaagira Samueli ati: Okworoba kwo nyorobeire MUKAMA, naaza ei MUKAMA antumire, naareeta Agagi omugabe w'Abaamaleki, kandi naacwekyerereza kimwe Abaamaleki;" 
1Samuel15:21 kwonka abantu batwaire eminyago y'entaama n'ente, ebirikukira oburungi omu bibaire biri eby'okucwekyerezibwa, kubitambira MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe omuri Gilugaali." 
1Samuel15:22 Samueli yaamugarukamu ati: Noogira ngu MUKAMA naashemerererwa ebitambo by'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo, nk'oku ashemerererwa okworobera eiraka rye? Manya okworoba kukira ebitambo, n'okuhurira kukira ebishaju by'empaya z'entaama." 
1Samuel15:23 Kwonka obugomi ni nk'ekibi ky'oburogo, n'obugangaazi ni nk'okuramya ebishushani na baateraafi. Nk'oku oyangire ekigambo kya MUKAMA, nawe ayangire ku oguma aha ngoma." 
1Samuel15:24 Saulo yaagira Samueli ati: Ncumwire; ahabw'okuba nsiisire ekiragiro kya MUKAMA n'ebigambo byawe ahabw'okutiina abantu n'okuboorobera. 
1Samuel15:25 Mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, nsaasira ekibi kyangye, oikirize ogyende naanye, mbone kuramya MUKAMA." 
1Samuel15:26 Samueli yaagira Saulo ati: Tindikwija kugarukayo naiwe, ahabw'okuba oyangire ekigambo kya MUKAMA; nawe yaayanga ku oba omugabe wa Israeli." 
1Samuel15:27 Samueli ku yaabaire naakihinduka kugyenda, Saulo yaakwata omukugiro gw'ekijwaro kye, kyataaguka." 
1Samuel15:28 Samueli yaamugira ati: Eri izooba MUKAMA yaakutaaguraho obugabe bwa Israeli, yaabuha mutaahi waawe orikukukira oburungi." 
1Samuel15:29 Kandi Maani ga Israeli tabeiha, n'obu kwakuba okwegarukamu; ahabw'okuba ti muntu ngu ayegarukyemu." 
1Samuel15:30 Bwanyima Saulo yaagira ati: Ncumwire; kwonka hati ninkweshengyereza mpa ekitiinisa omu maisho g'abakuru b'abantu bangye n'omu maisho ga Israeli yoona, ogyende naanye, mbone kuramya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
1Samuel15:31 Atyo Samueli yaahinduka, yaakurata Saulo; Saulo yaaramya MUKAMA." 
1Samuel15:32 Bwanyima Samueli yaagira ati: Mundeetere aha Agagi, omugabe w'Abaamaleki. Agagi yaija ahu ari naanyimbanyimba; yaagira ati: Buzimazima obushaarizi bw'okufa bwahweire." 
1Samuel15:33 Samueli yaagira ati: Nk'oku rurara yaawe yaahindwire abakazi encwekye, nikwo na nyoko yaaza kuhinduka encwekye omu bakazi. Samueli yaatemagurira Agagi omu maisho ga MUKAMA Gilugaali." 
1Samuel15:34 Bwanyima Samueli yaaza Raama, na Saulo yainamuka yaaza owe Gibea eya Saulo." 
1Samuel15:35 Okuruga obwo Samueli tiyaagaruka kwija kureeba Saulo okuhitsya obu yaafire; kwonka yaaguma naamusaasibwa; kandi MUKAMA yaayefuuza eki yaahinduriire Saulo omugabe wa Israeli. 
1Samuel16:1 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagira Samueli ati: Noija kuhitsya hi okusaasibwa Saulo, haza nyowe mmwangire kuba omugabe wa Israeli? Ijuza eihembe ryawe amajuta, oije nkutume ahari Yese owa Betelehemu; ahakuba nyeboneire omugabe omu batabani." 
1Samuel16:2 Samueli yaagira ati: Nimbaasa nta kugyenda? Saulo ku araakihurire, naija kuunyita. MUKAMA yaagira Samueli ati: Twara enyana y'eruutsi; ku oraahikyeyo, ogire oti: Nyizire kutambira MUKAMA ekitambo." 
1Samuel16:3 Kandi oyete na Yese aije ahari okwo kutamba; naanye niinyija kukworeka oku oraatwaze, onshukire amajuta ahari ogwo ou ndaakugambire." 
1Samuel16:4 Samueli yaakora nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiira, yaaza Betelehemu. Ku yaahikireyo, abakuru b'orwo rurembo baija kumubugana nibatetema; baamubuuza bati: Beitu waahuutwa ki? Ni buhooro?" 
1Samuel16:5 Nawe yaabagira ati: Ni buhooro. Nyizire kutambira MUKAMA ebitambo. Mweyeze, mwije tugyendane aha kitambo. Kandi yaayeza Yese n'abatabani, nabo yaabeeta kwija aha kitambo." 
1Samuel16:6 Ku baizire, yaareeba Eliabu, yaateekateeka ati: Buzimazima ou MUKAMA arikwenda kushukaho amajuta niwe ogu ori omu maisho ge." 
1Samuel16:7 Kwonka MUKAMA yaagira Samueli ati: Otareeba oku arikushusha nari ekyemerero kye; ahakuba ogwo tiwe ndikwenda; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA tareeba nk'oku abantu bareeba; abantu bareeba emireebekyere y'aharuguru, kwonka MUKAMA areeba omutima." 
1Samuel16:8 Bwanyima Yese yaayeta Abinadabu, yaamurabya omu maisho ga Samueli. Samueli yaagira ati: N'ogu tiwe MUKAMA atooraine." 
1Samuel16:9 Yese yaagaruka yaarabyaho Shaama. Nabwo Samueli yaagira ati: N'ogu nawe tiwe MUKAMA atooraine. 
1Samuel16:10 Atyo Yese yaarabyaho abatabani, baahika mushanju omu maisho ga Samueli; Samueli yaamugira ati: Omuri aba tiharimu u MUKAMA atooraine." 
1Samuel16:11 Samueli yaabuuza Yese ati: Abaana baawe boona bari aha? Yaamugarukamu ati: Haatsigarayo omuto, kwonka ariisize entaama. Samueli yaagira Yese ati: Tuma bamureete; ahakuba titurikwija kushutama atakahikire aha." 
1Samuel16:12 Yaatuma, baamureeta. Omwana ogwo akaba naayera, aine ahamaisho harungi, kandi ari murungi omu kureebwa. MUKAMA yaagira ati: Imuka omushukyeho amajuta; niwe ogu." 
1Samuel16:13 Samueli yaakwata eihembe ry'amajuta, yaagamushukiraho omu maisho ga bakuru be; okwiha obwo Omwoyo wa MUKAMA yaija ahari Daudi n'amaani, yaamugumaho. Bwanyima Samueli yaimuka, yaagaruka Raama." 
1Samuel16:14 Omu bunaku obwo Omwoyo wa MUKAMA akaba arugire ahari Saulo, kandi omwoyo mubi ogwarugire ahari MUKAMA gwaguma nigumwita kubi." 
1Samuel16:15 Abaheereza ba Saulo baamugira bati: Reeba omwoyo mubi ogurugire ahari Ruhanga nigukwita kubi. 
1Samuel16:16 Mukama waitu, ragiira abairu baawe abakuri omumaisho, bakusherurire omuntu orikumanya kuteera gye enanga; bwanyima omwoyo mubi ogurikuruga ahari Ruhanga ku guraagume gwakwijaho, agikuteerere, obe gye." 
1Samuel16:17 Saulo nikwo kugambira abaheereza be ati: Munsherurire omuntu orikumanya kuteera gye enanga, mumundeetere." 
1Samuel16:18 Omutsigazi omwe yaamugira ati: Nyowe ndeebire mutabani wa Yese owa Betelehemu, naamanya kuteera gye enanga, n'omushaija w'amaani emanzi, orikumanya eby'okurwana, otarikugambira eryo, omuntu murungi omu kureebwa; kandi MUKAMA ari hamwe nawe." 
1Samuel16:19 N'ahabw'ekyo Saulo yaatuma ahari Yese naagira ati: Nyoherereza mutabani waawe Daudi, omuriisa w'entaama." 
1Samuel16:20 Yese yaareeta endogoya, yaagyekoreza emigaati n'efureebe ya viinyo, n'omwana gw'embuzi, yaabitwekyera Saulo, byatwarwa Daudi omutabani." 
1Samuel16:21 Daudi ku yaahikire Saulo, yaatandika kumuheereza; Saulo yaamukunda munonga, yaamugira omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye." 
1Samuel16:22 Saulo yaagaruka yaatuma ahari Yese ati: Ninkushaba oikirize Daudi agume nampeereza; ahabw'okuba atungire obuganzi ahariinye. 
1Samuel16:23 Okuruga aho, omwoyo mubi ogwarugire ahari Ruhanga ku gwabaire gwija ahari Saulo, Daudi akwata enanga, agiteera; Saulo aikaikana, aba gye, ogwo mwoyo mubi gumurugaho." 
1Samuel17:1 Omu bunaku obwo Abafilistia bakateerana engabo zaabo kurwana; baateeranira Sooko eya Yuda, baateera orusiisira Efesi-damimu, ahagati ya Sooko na Azeka." 
1Samuel17:2 Saulo n'Abaisraeli nabo baateerana, baateera orusiisira omu ruhanga rwa Ela, baatenga orugamba kurwana n'Abafilistia." 
1Samuel17:3 Abafilistia baayemerera aha kibungo seeri, n'Abaisraeli baayemerera seenu aha kindi; oruhanga rubari ahagati." 
1Samuel17:4 Bwanyima omu rusiisira rw'Abafilistia haarugamu emanzi rugambwa, orikwetwa Goliasi owa Gaasi; oburaingwa bwe bukaba buri mikono mukaaga n'ekita;" 
1Samuel17:5 akaba ajwaire enkofiira y'omuringa aha mutwe, n'eky'okujwara ky'ekyoma, oburemeezi bwakyo shekeli z'omuringa enkumi itaano;" 
1Samuel17:6 aha maguru ajwaireho ebyoma by'okukingira emirundi, aine akacumu k'omuringa ahagati y'amabega ge;" 
1Samuel17:7 orubango rw'eicumu rye ruri nk'empimbi ei barukiraho emyenda; okuremeera kw'ekyogi kyaryo ziri shekeli z'ekyoma magana mukaaga, kandi omukwatsi w'engabo ye amwebembeire." 
1Samuel17:8 Yaija yaayemerera, yaagambira amahe ga Israeli n'eiraka rihango, ati: Mbwenu mweruhiize ki kwija kutenga orugamba? Tindi Omufilistia? Naimwe timuri engabo za Saulo? Mwetooranire omushaija, ashuume tubugaabugane." 
1Samuel17:9 Ku arandwanise, yaanyita, nitwija kuba abairu baanyu; kwonka ku ndamusingure, naamwita, naimwe nimwija kuba abairu baitu, nimutukorera." 
1Samuel17:10 Omufilistia yaagaruka yaagira ati: Nimpiga amahe ga Israeli eri izooba; nimumpe omushaija, turwane." 
1Samuel17:11 Saulo n'Abaisraeli boona ku baahuriire ebigambo by'ogwo Mufilistia, baahahaara, baatiina munonga." 
1Samuel17:12 Kandi Daudi akaba ari omwana w'Omunyefuraata owa Betelehemu-Yuda, orikwetwa Yese; omushaija ogwo akaba aine abatabani munaana; omu biro bya Saulo akaba ari omugurusi, yaahikire omu ngingo zaabukuru." 
1Samuel17:13 Abatabani abakuru bashatu bakaba bahurwire na Saulo; amaziina g'abo batabani bonshatu gakaba gari aga; ow'omujigaijo Eliabu, ow'omushubiro Abinadabu, n'owa kashatu Shaama." 
1Samuel17:14 Daudi akaba ari muto waabo boona, kandi bakuru be abo bonshatu nibo baabaire bahurwire na Saulo." 
1Samuel17:15 Kwonka Daudi akaba aza owa Saulo, kandi agaruka Betelehemu kuriisa entaama za ishe." 
1Samuel17:16 Kandi ogwo Mufilistia akaba aija buri kasheeshe na buri mwabazyo, abeeringiita omumaisho, okumara ebiro makumi ana." 
1Samuel17:17 Eizooba rimwe Yese akagira Daudi omutabani ati: Irooko ogyemurire bakuru baawe eefa y'engano zikarangire n'egi migaati ikumi, obibatwarire juba omu rusiisira;" 
1Samuel17:18 kandi ezi ncumate ikumi za ciizi ozitwarire omukuru w'engabo rukumi ezi barimu; oreebe bakuru baawe oku bari, haza ondeetere amakuru agarikubarugaho." 
1Samuel17:19 Omu bunaku obwo Saulo n'abo bashaija n'Abaisraeli boona bakaba bari omu ruhita rwa Ela nibarwana n'Abafilistia. 
1Samuel17:20 Daudi yaaguruka kare omu kasheeshe, entaama yaazitsigira omurinzi, yaakwata ebyo bintu, yaagyenda nk'oku Yese amuragiire; yaahikira ahu baabaire beemereize ebigaari, yaashanga engabo nizihiga, nizishohora kurwana." 
1Samuel17:21 Abaisraeli n'Abafilistia baatenga orugamba, engabo zaasyamirana n'ezindi." 
1Samuel17:22 Daudi yaakwatsa omurinzi w'eby'orugamba embintu bye, yairuka, yaayeroha omu ngabo, yaahika bakuru be, yaabaramutsya." 
1Samuel17:23 Ku yaabaire naakigaaniira nabo, egyo manzi rugambwa, Omufilistia wa Gaasi orikwetwa Goliasi, yaasyoka omu ngabo z'Abafilistia, yaatandika kuhiga nk'oku abaire naahiga; Daudi yaabihurira." 
1Samuel17:24 Abaisraeli boona, ku baareebire ogwo mushaija, baamuhunga; baatiina munonga." 
1Samuel17:25 Abaisraeli baagira bati: Ebyo ogwo mushaija waasyokayo mwamureeba? Buzimazima yaija kuhiga Israeli; omuntu oraamwite, omugabe naija kumutungisa munonga, amuhingire muhara we, kandi ahe omuryango gwa ishe obusingye omuri Israeli." 
1Samuel17:26 Bwanyima Daudi yaabuuza abashaija abaabaire bamwemereire aha rubaju ati: Oraite ogwo Mufilistia, yaiha aha Baisraeli ekijumo, naija kukorerwa ki? Beitu shi, oriya Mufilistia otashazirwe niwe oha kwehanga kuhiga amahe ga Ruhanga ohuriire?" 
1Samuel17:27 Abantu baamugarukamu nk'ebi ab'okubanza baagamba, bati: Oraamwite nikwo araakorewe atyo." 
1Samuel17:28 Kandi Eliabu mukuru wa Daudi yaahurira naagamba n'abo bashaija; yaamugirira ekiniga, yaamubuuza ati: Waashuumibwa ki kunu? Obutaama buri waabutsigira oha omu ihamba? Nimmanya amaryo gaawe n'obutigi bw'omu mutima gwawe; waareetwa okureeba orugamba." 
1Samuel17:29 Daudi yaamugarukamu ati: Mbwenu naashobya ki? Noogira ngu tiinyine kyandeeta? 
1Samuel17:30 Yaamuteera amabega, yaahindukira ondiijo, nawe yaamubuuza nk'ebyo; abantu baamugarukamu nk'okubanza." 
1Samuel17:31 Abantu ku baahuriire ebi Daudi yaagamba, baagaruka baabigambira omu maisho ga Saulo; Saulo yaamutuma." 
1Samuel17:32 Daudi yaagira Saulo ati: Hatagira owaahahaaza omutima ahabw'ogwo Mufilistia; omwiru waawe yaaza kurwana nawe. 
1Samuel17:33 Saulo yaagira Daudi ati: Torikubaasa kuturukirira ogwo Mufilistia kurwana nawe, ahabw'okuba okiri muto, kandi we n'omushaija omanyiire engamba okwiha omu buto." 
1Samuel17:34 Daudi yaagarukamu Saulo ati: Nyowe, omwiru waawe, nkaba ndiisa entaama za tata; ku haabaire haija entare nari edubu, yaakwata omwana gw'entaama omu busyo," 
1Samuel17:35 nkaba ngikurata, ngiteera, ngugiiha omu kanwa; ekinyijaijana, ngikwata akareju, ngiteera, ngiita." 
1Samuel17:36 Omwiru waawe akaita entare n'edubu; n'Omufilistia ogwo otashazirwe naija kuba nk'emwe aharizo, ahabw'okuba ahigire amahe ga Ruhanga ohuriire." 
1Samuel17:37 Daudi yaagaruka yaagira ati: MUKAMA owaanyihire omu byara by'entare n'omu byara by'edubu, naija kunjuna n'omu mikono y'ogwo Mufilistia. Saulo yaagira Daudi ati: Irooko, MUKAMA agume naiwe." 
1Samuel17:38 Bwanyima Saulo yaihayo ebijwaro bye eby'okurwanisa, yaabijweka Daudi; yaamuta enkofiira y'omuringa aha mutwe, yaamujweka ekooti y'ekyoma;" 
1Samuel17:39 Daudi yaahagatirira rurara ahari ebyo bijwaro. Yaateeraho kugyenda, byayanga; ahakuba akaba atabimanyiire. Daudi yaagira Saulo ati: Tindikubaasa kugyenda njwaire ebi; ahakuba timbimanyiire. Atyo Daudi yaabijuura." 
1Samuel17:40 Yaakwata enkoni ye omu ngaro, yaayetooranira amabaare ataano omu kagyera, yaagata omu kashaho k'omunda ak'omu furebe y'omuriisa ei yaabaire aine; kandi akaba aine enjungu ye omu ngaro; yairira haihi Omufilistia." 
1Samuel17:41 Omufilistia nawe yaija, yairira haihi Daudi, omukwatsi w'engabo ye amwebembeire." 
1Samuel17:42 Omufilistia ku yaizire naamagamaga, yaareeba Daudi, yaamugaya; ahakuba akaba ari omutsigazi muto, orikwera, oine ahamaisho harungi." 
1Samuel17:43 Omufilistia yaagira Daudi ati: Obu orikumpururira n'enkoni, onyetsire embwa? Yaamukyeenesa baaruhanga be." 
1Samuel17:44 Yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Ija nkubaagire amahungu g'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba. 
1Samuel17:45 Daudi yaagira Omufilistia ati: Wampururira na rurara n'eicumu n'akacumu; kwonka nyowe naija omu iziina rya MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga w'engabo za Israeli, ezi ohigire." 
1Samuel17:46 Eri izooba MUKAMA naakuhayo omu mikono yangye, ninkuteera, noogwa, ninkucwaho omutwe; kandi eri izooba niinyija kugaburira amahungu g'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba emitumbi y'engabo z'Abafilistia, haza ensi yoona neemanya ku habaho Ruhanga omuri Israeli," 
1Samuel17:47 kandi n'omutwe gwona oguri aha nigumanya ku MUKAMA atajunisa rurara na icumu; ahabw'okuba orugamba oru n'orwa MUKAMA, kandi naija kubahayo omu mikono yaitu." 
1Samuel17:48 Omufilistia ku yaarugire ahu yaabaire ari, yaija kubugaabugana na Daudi, Daudi yaija nairuka agyemire ahu baabaire batengire orugamba kubugaabugana n'ogwo Mufilistia." 
1Samuel17:49 Yaata omukono gwe omu furebe, yaihamu eibaare, yaarirekyera, yaariteera Omufilistia omu buso, ryahweramu, yaagwa ajuumaire." 
1Samuel17:50 Okwo nikwo Daudi yaasingwize Omufilistia eibaare ry'enjungu, akamuteera, akamwita; kwonka Daudi akaba ataine rurara mu ngaro." 
1Samuel17:51 Daudi yairuka, yaaza aha Mufilistia, yaamwemereraho, yaakwata rurara ye, yaagisyora omu kyobati kyayo, yaagimwitsa, yaamucwaho omutwe. Abafilistia ku baareebire emanzi yaabo yaafa, baahunga." 
1Samuel17:52 Abaisraeli n'Abayuda baimuka, baateera akaari, baabinga Abafilistia okuhika Gaasi n'aha marembo ga Ekurooni; emputa z'Abafilistia zaagyenda nizigwa aha muhanda ogurikuruga Sharaimu okuhika Gaasi na Ekurooni." 
1Samuel17:53 Bwanyima Abaisraeli baarekyera aho kubinga Abafilistia, baagaruka, baanyaga orusiisira rwabo." 
1Samuel17:54 Daudi yaatwara omutwe gw'Omufilistia, yaaguhitsya Yerusaalemu; kwonka eby'okurwanisa bye yaabita omu ihema rye." 
1Samuel17:55 Saulo ku yaareebire Daudi naaza kurwana n'Omufilistia, yaabuuza Abuneeri omukuru w'engabo ze ati: Abuneeri, hari oriya mwojo ni mwene oha? Abuneeri yaamugarukamu ati: Buso bwawe, Nyakusinga, tindikumumanya." 
1Samuel17:56 Omugabe yaagira ati: Irooko obuuririze ishe w'ogu mwojo. 
1Samuel17:57 Kandi Daudi ku yaatabaarukire ati naaruga kwita Omufilistia, Abuneeri yaamutwara omu maisho ga Saulo, aine omutwe gw'Omufilistia omu ngaro." 
1Samuel17:58 Saulo yaamubuuza ati: Ori mwene oha, mutsigazi 'we? Daudi yaagarukamu ati: Ndi mwene Yese omwiru waawe owa Betelehemu." 
1Samuel18:1 Daudi ku yaaherize kugamba na Saulo, omutima gwa Yonasaani gwanywana n'ogwa Daudi; Yonasaani yaamukunda nk'oku ayekunda." 
1Samuel18:2 Eryo izooba Saulo yaatwara Daudi owe, tiyaamwikiriza bundi kugaruka owa ishe." 
1Samuel18:3 Bwanyima Yonasaani yaaragaana na Daudi endagaano, ahakuba akamukunda nk'oku ayekunda." 
1Samuel18:4 Yonasaani yaayejuura omunagiro ogu yaabaire ajwaire, yaaguha Daudi, n'eby'okurwanisa bye, nangwa na rurara ye n'obuta bwe n'orukoba rwe nabyo yaabimuha." 
1Samuel18:5 Daudi akaba aza ei Saulo yaabaire amutuma yoona; kandi akoresa obwengye. N'ahabw'ekyo Saulo yaamugira omukuru w'engabo ze, abantu boona baakisiima, nangwa n'abagaragwa ba Saulo baakisiima." 
1Samuel18:6 Ku baabaire nibatabaaruka, Daudi aherize kwita ogwo Mufilistia, abakazi baaruga omu ndembo za Israeli zoona, baija kubugana Saulo nibeeshongora, nibaguruka, baine ebitaasa n'enanga z'emirya eshatu, nibashemererwa." 
1Samuel18:7 Omu kweshongora, abo bakazi baikirizana nibagira bati: Saulo aitsire enkumi, Daudi yaita obukumi." 
1Samuel18:8 Saulo yaagira ekiniga kingi, ekyo kigambo kyamugwisa kubi; yaagira ati: Daudi baamubarira obukumi, nyowe bambarira enkumi zonka. Mbwenu shi ekindi atsigariire ki? T'okuza aha ngoma?" 
1Samuel18:9 Okuruga obwo Saulo yaaguma naareeba Daudi eriisho ribi. 
1Samuel18:10 Ku bwaseesire, omwoyo mubi ogwarugire ahari Ruhanga gwaza ahari Saulo n'amaani, yaasharira omu nju ye; obwo Daudi akaba naateera enanga nk'obutoosha; kandi Saulo akaba aine eicumu omu ngaro." 
1Samuel18:11 Saulo yaarirekyera; ahakuba akateekateeka ati: Niinyija kucumita Daudi, eicumu ryogyemu rikwate ekisiika. Daudi yaamweshumba kabiri." 
1Samuel18:12 Saulo yaatiina Daudi, ahakuba MUKAMA akaba ari hamwe nawe, arugire ahari Saulo." 
1Samuel18:13 Nikyo Saulo yaamweihiireho, akamugira omukuru w'omutwe gw'engabo rukumi, Daudi akaguma naazeebembera omu kuhurura, kandi naatabaaruka nazo." 
1Samuel18:14 Kandi Daudi yaaguma naakoresa obwengye omu mitwarize ye yoona; MUKAMA yaaguma nawe. 
1Samuel18:15 Saulo ku yaareebire aine obwengye bwingi omu mitwarize ye, yaamutiina." 
1Samuel18:16 Kwonka Abaisraeli n'Abayuda boona baamukunda, ahakuba akaba abeebembera omu kuhurura, kandi n'omu kutabaaruka." 
1Samuel18:17 Eizooba rimwe Saulo akagambira Daudi ati: Reeba, muhara wangye omukuru Merabu ngugu; niinyija kumukuhingira; kwonka ogume ombeere emanzi, orwane engamba za MUKAMA. Ahakuba Saulo akaba naateekateeka ati: Ndekye kuba niinye naamwita, kureka aitwe Abafilistia." 
1Samuel18:18 Daudi yaagira Saulo ati: Mbwenu nyowe niinye oha, n'abaitu nibo baahi, n'omuryango gwa taata omuri Israeli nigwo guuha, nyowe okuba mukwe w'omugabe?" 
1Samuel18:19 Kwonka obunaku ku bwahikire, Merabu muhara wa Saulo, owaabaire ari ow'okuhingirwa Daudi, baamuhingira Adurieli owa Mehola." 
1Samuel18:20 Bwanyima Mikaali muhara wa Saulo yaarigira Daudi; ku baakigambiire Saulo, kyamushemeza;" 
1Samuel18:21 yaagira ati: Niinyija kumumuha, amubeere omutego, Abafilistia bamurwanise. Nikyo Saulo yaagiriire Daudi obwa kabiri, ati: Mbwenu hati noija kuba mukwe wangye." 
1Samuel18:22 Saulo nikwo kugambira abagaragwa be ati: Mugaaniire na Daudi omu mubonano, mumugire muti: Manya, omugabe naakusiima munonga, n'abagaragwa be boona nibakukunda; n'ahabw'ekyo ikiriza obe mukwe w'omugabe." 
1Samuel18:23 Abagaragwa ba Saulo baagambira Daudi ebyo bigambo. Daudi yaagira ati: Imwe nimukyeta ekintu kikye okuba mukwe w'omugabe; haza ndi omwana w'omworo, kandi otaine kitiinisa?" 
1Samuel18:24 Bwanyima abagaragwa ba Saulo baamugambira oku Daudi agizire. 
1Samuel18:25 Saulo yaagira ati: Oku mube nikwo mwagira Daudi muti: Omugabe tarikwenda njugano, kureka ebishushu igana ebishazirwe aha Bafilistia, abone kuhoora abazigu be. Kwonka Saulo akateekateeka atyo, ngu amwitse Abafilistia." 
1Samuel18:26 Abagaragwa be ku baaherize kugambira Daudi ebyo bigambo, Daudi yaasiima munonga kuba mukwe w'omugabe." 
1Samuel18:27 Ebiro ku byabaire bitakahingwireho, Daudi yaimuka n'engabo ze, baahurura, baita Abafilistia magana abiri; Daudi yaatabaaruka n'ebyo bishushu byabo, baabitwarira omugabe byona, ngu abone kuba mukwe w'omugabe. Atyo Saulo yaamuhingira muhara we Mikaali." 
1Samuel18:28 Kwonka Saulo ku yaabireebire, yaamanya ku MUKAMA ari hamwe na Daudi, kandi ku Abaisraeli boona barikumukunda," 
1Samuel18:29 yaayeyongyera kumutiina. Okuruga aho Saulo yaaguma ari omuzigu wa Daudi ebiro byona. 
1Samuel18:30 Bwanyima abategyeki b'Abafilistia baahurura kubarwanisa; ku baabaire bahurura, Daudi arwana gye okukira abagaragwa ba Saulo boona; n'ahabw'ekyo eiziina rye ryarangaanwa." 
1Samuel19:1 Bwanyima Saulo yaagambira omutabani Yonasaani n'abagaragwa be boona kwita Daudi. 
1Samuel19:2 Kwonka Yonasaani mwene Saulo akaba naakunda Daudi munonga; mbwenu Yonasaani yaagira Daudi ati: Tata Saulo naayenda kukwita; n'ahabw'ekyo omu kasheeshe oyerinde, oyesherekye omu mwanya gwekiikire, ogumeyo;" 
1Samuel19:3 naanye niinyija kushohora, nyemerere aha rubaju rwa taata omu ishwa ahu oraabe ori, ngaaniire nawe aha byawe; ku ndaagire eki naareeba, niinyija kukikugambira." 
1Samuel19:4 Ku bwaseesire, Yonasaani yaagamba gye Daudi ahari Saulo ishe, naamugira ati: Nyakusinga, otakora ekibi aha mwiru waawe Daudi, ahabw'okuba takakucumurahoga, kureka ebi akukorera byona ni birungi;" 
1Samuel19:5 ahakuba akooga amagara, yaita Omufilistia, MUKAMA yaaha Abaisraeli boona obusinguzi buhango. Naiwe okakireeba, waakishemerererwa. Mbwenu ahabw'enki nooyenda kukora kubi kusheesha eshagama y'otaine rubanja, kwitira Daudi busha?" 
1Samuel19:6 Saulo yaahurira ebi Yonasaani yaamugambira, yaarahira naagira ati: Nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, tariitwa." 
1Samuel19:7 Yonasaani yaayeta Daudi, yaamugambira ebyo byona; bwanyima Yonasaani yaagarura Daudi ahari Saulo, yaaguma omu maisho ge nk'obunyakare." 
1Samuel19:8 Haagaruka haabaho obweme; Daudi yaahurura, yaarwanisa Abafilistia, yaabaitamu abantu baingi munonga; baamuhunga." 
1Samuel19:9 Eizooba rimwe Saulo akaba ashutami omu nju ye, aine eicumu omu ngaro, Daudi naamuteerera enanga; omwoyo mubi ogwarugire ahari MUKAMA gwamwijaho;" 
1Samuel19:10 Saulo yaateeraho kucumita Daudi eicumu, ngu rimuhamize aha kisiika; kwonka Daudi yaaryeshumba, ryacumita ekisiika; Daudi yaacwa, yaahunga." 
1Samuel19:11 Ekyo kiro Saulo yaatuma entumwa owa Daudi kuraara bamugwereire, ngu bamwite omu kasheeshe; Mikaali muka Daudi yaamugambira naagira ati: Ku oraabe otakirize magara gaawe eki kiro, nyencakare noija kwitwa." 
1Samuel19:12 Atyo Mikaali yaarabya Daudi omu dirisa, yaacwa, yaahunga." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikaali yaiha ekishushani kya teraafi omu mwanya gwakyo, yaakita aha kitanda, yaakishegura omushego gw'obwoshe bw'embuzi, yaakishweka emyenda." 
1Samuel19:14 Saulo ku yaatumire entumwa kukwata Daudi, Mikaali yaagira ati: Arwaire." 
1Samuel19:15 Bwanyima yaagaruka yaatuma entumwa kureeba Daudi, naagira ati: Mumuheekye aha kitanda, mumundeetere, mmwite." 
1Samuel19:16 Entumwa ku zaataahire omu nju, zaashanga ekishushani kya teraafi omu kitanda kishegwire omushego gw'obwoshe bw'embuzi." 
1Samuel19:17 Saulo ku yaabimanyire, yaagira Mikaali ati: Ombeihiire ki otyo, okareka omuzigu wangye, akacwa, akagyenda. Mikaali yaagarukamu Saulo ati: Angizire ati: Reka ngyende; mbwenu nkwitire ki?" 
1Samuel19:18 Daudi yaacwa, yaahunga, yaashanga Samueli Raama, yaamuteekyerereza oku Saulo amugizire kwona. Yaimuka na Samueli, baaza Nayosi, baagumayo." 
1Samuel19:19 Bwanyima baagambira Saulo ku Daudi ari Nayosi omuri Raama. 
1Samuel19:20 Saulo yaatuma entumwa kukwata Daudi; ku zaareebire omutwe gwa baanabi nibaragura, na Samueli ayemereire aho nk'omukuru waabo, Omwoyo wa Ruhanga yaaza aha ntumwa za Saulo, nazo zaaragura." 
1Samuel19:21 Ku baakigambiire Saulo, yaatuma ezindi ntumwa, nazo zaaragura. Yaagaruka yaatuma ezindi obwa kashatu, nazo zaaragura." 
1Samuel19:22 Bwanyima yaayeimukira, yaaza Raama, yaahika aha iziba rihango rya Seeku, yaabuuza ati: Samueli na Daudi barahi? Baamugarukamu bati: Reeba, bari Nayosi omuri Raama." 
1Samuel19:23 Saulo nikwo kwimuka, akaza Nayosi omuri Raama; ku yaabaire naakigyenda, Omwoyo wa Ruhanga yaamwijaho, yaagyenda naaragura, okuhitsya obu yaahikire Nayosi omuri Raama." 
1Samuel19:24 Nawe yaajuura ebijwaro bye, yaaragurira omu maisho ga Samueli, yaamara eryo izooba ryona n'ekyo kiro kyona, arambiire ajwaire busha. Nikyo kigirirwa kiti: Saulo nawe ari omuri baanabi?" 
1Samuel20:1 Daudi yaahunga, yaaruga Nayosi omuri Raama, yaija ahari Yonasaani, yaamubuuza ati: Beitu nkozire ki? Nsiisire ki? Ncumwire ki ahari sho, eki arikumpiigira kuunyita?" 
1Samuel20:2 Nawe yaamugarukamu ati: Nikikabure! Torikwija kufa. Reeba, taata takora kintu kyona, yaaba kihango nari kikye, atakingambiire. Noogira ngu eki taata akaakinsherekyeire ki? Tikwo kiri." 
1Samuel20:3 Daudi yaarahira naagira ati: Sho naamanya gye ku onkunda, nikwo kugira ati: Ka Yonasaani arekye kubimanya, akashaasha; kwonka buzima ninkurahira Ruhanga otahwaho, magara gaawe, ntsigaizeyo orutambwe rumwe nfe." 
1Samuel20:4 Yonasaani yaagira Daudi ati: Eki omutima gwawe gurikwenda kyona, niinyija kukikukorera." 
1Samuel20:5 Daudi yaagira Yonasaani ati: Reeba, nyencakare okwezi nikuboneka; nkaabaire ntashemereire kubura aha by'okurya by'omugabe; kwonka mbwenu ndeka, ngyende nyesherekye omu kishaka okuhitsya aha kiro kya kashatu omu mwabazyo." 
1Samuel20:6 Sho ku araabe atandeebire, omugire oti: Daudi anyeshengyereize munonga ngu mmurekye ahikyeho owaabo Betelehemu; ahabw'okuba hariyo obugyenyi bw'ebitambo ebitambirwa eka yaabo yoona buri mwaka." 
1Samuel20:7 Ku araagire ati: Ni kirungi, biri omwiru waawe yaaba gye; kwonka ku araaguubwe kubi, noija kumanya ku amaririire kunkora kubi." 
1Samuel20:8 N'ahabw'ekyo girira omwiru waawe embabazi; ahakuba okaragaana n'omwiru waawe endagaano ya MUKAMA; kwonka ku ndaabe nyine eki nsiisire, onyeitire; nooyendera ki kuntwara ahari sho?" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonasaani yaagira ati: Nikikabure! Kuri noogira ngu mbaire nimmanya ku taata amaririire kukukora kubi, tinkukugambiire?" 
1Samuel20:10 Daudi yaabuuza ati: Beitu shi, sho ku araakugarukyemu kubi, n'oha orangambire?" 
1Samuel20:11 Yonasaani yaagira Daudi ati: Ija tushohore, tuze omu ishwa. Baashohora, baaza omu ishwa." 
1Samuel20:12 Yonasaani yaagira Daudi ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli niwe kareebi. Nyencakare nk'aga magingo, nari kwosha nyencakare, ku ndaaheze kugaaniira na taata, nimmukyenguuza, naashanga akwineho ebiteekateeko birungi, niinyija kukutumaho, mbikumanyise." 
1Samuel20:13 Kwonka ku ndaashangye taata naayenda kukukora kubi, ntaabikugambira, nkakuraga, okeegyendera n'obusingye, MUKAMA akinture n'okukiraho. Mbwenu MUKAMA agume naiwe, nk'oku yaabaire aba na taata." 
1Samuel20:14 Ku ndiba nkiriho, ogume ongirire embabazi nk'eza MUKAMA, ndekye kufa;" 
1Samuel20:15 kandi otarireka kugirira eka yangye embabazi ebiro byona. MUKAMA ku ariba naamaraho abazigu ba Daudi omu nsi," 
1Samuel20:16 otariikiriza eiziina rya Yonasaani kumarwaho omu nju ya Daudi. MUKAMA ahoore enzigu abazigu ba Daudi. 
1Samuel20:17 Yonasaani yaagaruka yaarahiza Daudi ahabwa rukundo ei yaabaire naamukunda; ahabw'okuba akaba naamukunda, nk'oku yaabaire naayekunda." 
1Samuel20:18 Bwanyima Yonasaani yaamugira ati: Nyencakare okwezi nikuboneka; nibaija kukusherura, obure, ahakuba omwanya gwawe nigwija kuba gurimu busha." 
1Samuel20:19 Aha kiro kya kashatu oshuume, ogarukye omu mwanya ogu waabaire oyesherekiremu, obu biri byabaho, ogume haihi n'eibaare rya ezeli." 
1Samuel20:20 Ku ndaije, niinyija kurasha emyambi eshatu aha rubaju rwaryo, nk'orikurasha ekimaasho." 
1Samuel20:21 Kandi reeba, niinyija kutuma omwojo, mmugire nti: Irooko osherure emyambi. Ku ndaagire ogwo mwojo nti: Reeba, emyambi eri aha rubaju rwawe orurikuhera kunu, giiheho; haza iwe obwo oije, ahakuba nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, ahariiwe nihaba hariho obusingye, hatariho kabi." 
1Samuel20:22 Kwonka ku ndaagire omwojo nti: Reeba, emyambi eri ahabiso yaawe; obwo oyegyendere; biri MUKAMA niwe yaakwohereza." 
1Samuel20:23 Kandi aha bigambo ebi ebi twagamba hamwe, reeba, MUKAMA niwe araagume ahagati yangye naiwe ebiro byona." 
1Samuel20:24 Atyo Daudi yaayeshereka omu ishwa. Okwezi ku kwabonekire, omugabe yaashutama kurya;" 
1Samuel20:25 yaashutama aha kitebe kye haihi n'ekisiika nk'obutoosha, Yonasaani yaashutama aha rundi rubaju rw'emeeza nibareebana, Abuneeri yaashutama aha rubaju rwa Saulo, kwonka omwanya gwa Daudi gwagumamu busha." 
1Samuel20:26 Eryo izooba Saulo tiyaagira ki yaagamba, ahakuba akateekateeka ati: Shana hariho ekimubaireho; tashemeire; buzimazima tashemeire." 
1Samuel20:27 Kandi ku bwaseesire, okwezi kuraire kubonekire, nabwo omwanya gwa Daudi gwagumamu busha. Saulo yaabuuza omutabani Yonasaani ati: N'enki ekizibiire mwene Yese kwija aha by'okurya nyomwabazyo n'eri izooba?" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonasaani yaamugarukamu ati: Daudi anyeshengyereize munonga kumwikiriza kuza Betelehemu," 
1Samuel20:29 naagira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, reka ngyende; ahabw'okuba owaitu nibaija kutamba ebitambo omu rurembo, kandi mukuru wangye andagiire kubayo. N'ahabw'ekyo ku oraabe nongirira embabazi, reka ngyende, nze kureeba bakuru bangye. Ekyo nikyo kimuzibiire kwija aha meeza y'omugabe." 
1Samuel20:30 Ahonaaho Saulo yaagirira Yonasaani ekiniga kingi, yaamugira ati: Iwe omwana w'omukazi entahurira kandi omugomi, tindikumanya ku waatooraine mwene Yese kwehemura, n'okuhemura nyoko, okamukwatsa enshoni?" 
1Samuel20:31 Omanye ngu mutabani wa Yese ku ariba akiri omuri egi nsi, torihamibwa n'obu bwakuba obugabe bwawe. N'ahabw'ekyo tuma bamundeetere; ahabw'okuba buzimazima naija kufa." 
1Samuel20:32 Yonasaani yaamugarukamu, ati: Beitu naitirwa ki? Acumwire ki?" 
1Samuel20:33 Ahonaaho Saulo yaamurekyera eicumu kumwita; Yonasaani yaamanyira aho ku ishe amaririire kwita Daudi. 
1Samuel20:34 Yonasaani yaimuka, yaaruga aha meeza n'ekiniga kingi, yaayanga kurya eby'okurya ahari ekyo kiro kya kabiri ky'okwezi, ahabw'okuba akaguubwa kubi ahabwa Daudi, kandi n'ahabwa ishe kumuhemura." 
1Samuel20:35 Omu kasheeshe Yonasaani yaashohora, yaaza omu ishwa n'omwojo omu bunaku obu aragaaniise Daudi." 
1Samuel20:36 Yaagira ogwo mwojo we ati: Iruka otorotoore emyambi ei naaza kurasha. Omwojo ku yaabaire nairuka, onu yaarasha omwambi, yaagumurenzya." 
1Samuel20:37 Omwojo ku yaahikire ahu omwambi ogu Yonasaani yaarasha gwagwa, Yonasaani yaayeta omwojo, naagira ati: Omwambi tiguri ahabiso yaawe?" 
1Samuel20:38 Yonasaani yaagaruka yaagambira omwojo ati: Rahuka, gira obwira, oteeziringa. Atyo omwojo wa Yonasaani yaatorotoora emyambi, yaagaruka ahari mukama we." 
1Samuel20:39 Kwonka ogwo mwojo taine ki yaamanyire, kureka Yonasaani na Daudi nibo baakimanyire." 
1Samuel20:40 Yonasaani yaaha omwojo we eby'okurwanisa bye, yaamugira ati: Irooko obitware omu rurembo." 
1Samuel20:41 Omwojo ku yaabaire yaarugaho ati, Daudi yaimuka, yaaruga aha rubaju rw'eibaare riri, yaagwa ahansi, yaajuumara, yaamwinamira kashatu; bwanyima baanywegyerana, bombi baarira, okuhitsya obu Daudi yaarengyesereize." 
1Samuel20:42 Bwanyima Yonasaani yaagira Daudi ati: Yegyendere n'obusingye; ahakuba twembi tukarahirana omu iziina rya MUKAMA nitugira tuti: MUKAMA aryaguma ahagati yangye naiwe, kandi n'hagati y'oruzaaro rwangye n'orwawe ebiro byona. Daudi yaimuka yaagyenda; Yonasaani yaagaruka omu rurembo." 
1Samuel21:1 Bwanyima Daudi yaaza Noobu owa Ahimeleki omunyamurwa; Ahimeleki yaija kumubugana naatetema, yaamubuuza ati: Ahabw'enki ori wenka, otaine muntu?" 
1Samuel21:2 Daudi yaagarukamu Ahimeleki omunyamurwa ati: Omugabe aine eki yandagiira kukora; kandi yangira ati: Hatagira owaamanya eki naakutuma kukora, n'eki naakuragiira; kandi ndagaine n'engabo zangye z'abatsigazi ku tubugaabugana omu mwanya nanka." 
1Samuel21:3 Mbwenu oine eki oine? Mpa emigaati etaano nari ekindi kyona eki oine. 
1Samuel21:4 Omunyamurwa yaagarukamu Daudi ati: Tiinyine mugaati gw'obutoosha, kureka hariho omugaati ogweziibwe, ogu ndikubaasa kubaha, abatsigazi ku baraabe beerinzire abakazi." 
1Samuel21:5 Daudi yaagarukamu omunyamurwa naagira ati: Buzimazima tumazire ebiro bishatu tuzibiirwe kuhika abakazi; nyimukize orugyendo, ebintu by'abatsigazi bangye biri ebirikwera, n'obu ruraabe rubaire ruri orugyendo rw'obutoosha; mbwenu shi eri izooba tibirikukiraho kuba ebirikwera?" 
1Samuel21:6 N'ahabw'ekyo omunyamurwa yaamuha emigaati eyeziibwe; ahakuba hakaba hatariho gundi mugaati, kureka emigaati ey'okumurikwa, eihirwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA, bakagaruraho emigaati eyaaruga kuteekwa." 
1Samuel21:7 Kandi eryo izooba hakaba hariho omwe aha bagaragwa ba Saulo, owaabaire aine ekimutsigaize omu maisho ga MUKAMA, eiziina rye Doegi Omunyaedomu, omukuru w'abashumba ba Saulo." 
1Samuel21:8 Bwanyima Daudi yaabuuza Ahimeleki ati: Beitu shi aha tokaagiraho icumu nari rurara? ahakuba tindeetsire rurara yangye n'obu byakuba eby'okurwanisa byangye; ahabw'okuba omurimo gw'omugabe gubaire nigwenda obwira. 
1Samuel21:9 Omunyamurwa yaagira ati: Rurara eri eya Goliasi Omufilistia, ou waitiire omu ruhita rwa Ela, reeba ngigi; eri aha enyima ya efodi, eshembire omu mwenda; ku oraayende kugitwara, ogitware; ahakuba tihariho ndiijo eri aha kureka egyo. Daudi yaagira ati: Tihariho erikushushana nayo; gimpe." 
1Samuel21:10 Eryo izooba Daudi yaimuka, yaahungira owa Akishi omugabe wa Gaasi ahabw'okutiina Saulo." 
1Samuel21:11 Abagaragwa ba Akishi baamugira bati: Ogu tiwe Daudi omugabe w'eihanga? Tibaramweshongoire omu kuzina kwabo nibaikirizana bati: Saulo aitsire enkumi; Daudi yaita obukumi? 
1Samuel21:12 Daudi ku yaahuriire ebyo bigambo, yaabita aha mutima, yaatiina munonga Akishi omugabe wa Gaasi." 
1Samuel21:13 N'ahabw'ekyo yaayehindura omu maisho gaabo, yaayegwisiza eiraro omu mikono yaabo, yaaguma naaharamba enyigi z'eirembo, naitururuka orufuzi niruza omu bireju." 
1Samuel21:14 Akishi yaagira abagaragwa be ati: Yeimwe, timurikureeba ogu mushaija ku agwire eiraro? Mumundeetereire ki?" 
1Samuel21:15 Nimugira ngu nkyenire abagwa-iraro, mwaza kundeetera eki kishaija kunsharira omumaisho? Eki kishaija nikiija kungiira omuka?" 
1Samuel22:1 Bwanyima Daudi yaarugayo, yaahungira omu nyanga ya Adulaamu; beene waabo n'ab'omu ka ya ishe boona ku baakihuriire, baashuuma, baamushangayo." 
1Samuel22:2 Omuntu weena owaabaire ari omu naku, n'owaabaire aine amabanja, n'owaabaire aine eki arikwetomboita, baateeranira ah'ari; yaaba omukuru waabo; kandi abaamweteeraniireho baahika abantu nka magana ana." 
1Samuel22:3 Bwanyima Daudi yaarugayo, yaaza Mizipe omuri Moabu; yaagira omugabe wa Moabu ati: Ninkweshengyereza, oikirize tata na maawe bafurukire kunu, batuure naiwe, okuhitsya ahu ndaamanyire eki Ruhanga arankorere." 
1Samuel22:4 Yaabatsigira omugabe wa Moabu, baaguma nawe ebiro byona ebi Daudi yaamazire omu kigo." 
1Samuel22:5 Bwanyima nabi Gaadi yaagira Daudi ati: Reka kuguma omu kigo; rugamu oze omu nsi ya Yuda. Daudi nikwo kurugayo, akaza omu kibira kya Heresi." 
1Samuel22:6 Eizooba rimwe Saulo akaba ashutami Gibea ahansi y'omunyinya omuri Raama, aine eicumu omu ngaro, n'abagaragwa be boona beemereire bamwehinguririize. Yaahurira ku Daudi abonekire n'abashaija abu yaabaire aine." 
1Samuel22:7 Saulo yaabuuza abagaragwa be abamwehinguririize ati: Imwe Babenyamiini 'mwe, nimuhurire! Hari nimugira ngu mwene Yese ogwo naija kuha buri muntu omuriimwe emisiri n'emizaabibu, kandi mwena nikwo aribagira abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'ab'eigana-igana," 
1Samuel22:8 mwaza kuza omu naama kungomera? Tihariho n'omwe orikummanyisa ku mutabani wangye ari omu naama na mwene Yese; kandi tihariho n'omwe omuriimwe orikunsaasibwa, nari orikummanyisa ku mutabani wangye angomeseize omugaragwa kundwanisa, akangwera, nk'oku angwereire hati." 
1Samuel22:9 Ahonaaho Doegi Omunyaedomu, owaabaire ayemereire aha rubaju rw'abagaragwa ba Saulo, yaagira ati: Ndeebire mwene Yese naija Noobu, owa Ahimeleki mwene Ahitubu." 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimeleki yaamuhanuuriza ahari MUKAMA, yaamuha eby'okurya, kandi yaamuha rurara ya Goliasi Omufilistia." 
1Samuel22:11 Omugabe ku yaakihuriire, yaatuma Ahimeleki omunyamurwa, mwene Ahitubu, n'ab'enju ya ishe boona, abanyamurwa abaabaire bari Noobu. Boona baija aha mugabe." 
1Samuel22:12 Saulo yaagira ati: Hurira, iwe mwene Ahitubu! Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Gamba, Nyakusinga!" 
1Samuel22:13 Saulo yaamugira ati: Ahabw'enki iwe na mwene Yese mungiiriire omu naama, okamuha emigaati na rurara, kandi okamuhanuuriza ahari Ruhanga, ngu aimukye kundwanisa, n'okungwera, nk'oku angwereire hati?" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki yaagarukamu omugabe ati: Beitu omu bagaragwa baawe boona, n'oha orikwesigwa nka Daudi, mukwe w'omugabe, oshutama omu mibonano y'enaama zaawe, kandi ow'ekitiinisa omu ka yaawe?" 
1Samuel22:15 Noogira ngu hati nibwo naatandika kumuhanuuriza ahari Ruhanga? Ngaaha! Omugabe arekye kwomesereza omwiru we ekintu kyona, n'obu baakuba ab'enju ya taata boona; ahakuba omwiru waawe taine ki arikumanya ahari ebyo byona, yaaba bingi nari bikye." 
1Samuel22:16 Omugabe yaagira ati: Iwe Ahimeleki, okufa kwo noija kufa, n'ab'enju ya sho boona." 
1Samuel22:17 Yaagaruka yaagira abarinzi abaabaire beemereire bamwehinguririize, ati: Muhindukye, mwite abanyamurwa ba MUKAMA, ahakuba nabo bakwataniise na Daudi, kandi bakamanya ku yaahungire, tibaakimmanyisa. Kwonka abagaragwa b'omugabe baayanga kugorora emikono yaabo kwita abanyamurwa ba MUKAMA." 
1Samuel22:18 Omugabe yaagira Doegi ati: Hinduka ogurukire abo banyamurwa, obaite. Doegi yaahinduka, yaabagurukira, yaabaita; eryo izooba yaita abantu abaabaire bajwara efodi ya kitaani makumi munaana na bataano." 
1Samuel22:19 Bwanyima yaacwekyereza Noobu orurembo rw'abanyamurwa na rurara; abashaija n'abakazi, abaana n'abarikwonka, ente, endogoya n'entaama ebyabaire birimu yaabiitsa rurara." 
1Samuel22:20 Kwonka omwe ahari batabani ba Ahimeleki mwene Ahitubu orikwetwa Abiasaari yaahonokaho, yaahunga, yaakurata Daudi." 
1Samuel22:21 Abiasaari yaagambira Daudi ku Saulo aitsire abanyamurwa ba MUKAMA. 
1Samuel22:22 Daudi yaagira Abiasaari ati: Buri, obu Doegi Omunyaedomu yaabaire ariyo, nkamanyira kimwe ku arikwija kugambira Saulo. N'ahabw'ekyo ab'eka ya sho boona niinye bazizire." 
1Samuel22:23 Mbwenu guma naanye, otatiina; ahakuba orikumpiiga kuunyita, naiwe niwe arikukuhiiga kukwita; mbwenu obu wampikire, tokifa." 
1Samuel23:1 Bwanyima baagambira Daudi bati: Reeba Abafilistia nibarwanisa Keila, kandi banyaga engano z'aha mbuga zaabo." 
1Samuel23:2 Daudi nikwo kwehanuuza ahari MUKAMA, naabuuza ati: Mbwenu nze kuteera abo Bafilistia? MUKAMA yaagarukamu Daudi ati: Irooko, obateere, ojune aba Keila." 
1Samuel23:3 Kwonka abantu ba Daudi baamubuuza bati: Mbwenu obu twatiina tukiri aha omuri Yuda, ku turiza Keila kurwana n'amahe g'Abafilistia turyaba tuta?" 
1Samuel23:4 Daudi yaagaruka yaayehanuuza ahari MUKAMA; MUKAMA yaamugarukamu ati: Imuka oshuume Keila; ahakuba niinyija kuhayo Abafilistia omu mikono yaawe. 
1Samuel23:5 Daudi yaimuka n'engabo ze, baaza Keila, baarwana n'Abafilistia, baanyaga ente zaabo, baabaitamu abantu baingi munonga. Okwo nikwo Daudi yaajunire aba Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Obu Abiasaari mwene Ahimeleki yaahungira ahari Daudi ari Keila, akashuumayo aine efodi omu ngaro." 
1Samuel23:7 Eizooba rimwe baagambira Saulo ku Daudi ari Keila. Saulo yaagira ati: Ruhanga amuhaireyo omu mikono yangye, ahakuba obu ataahire omu rurembo orwine eirembo ry'enyigi ezirikukingwa empimbi, ayekingiraine omunda." 
1Samuel23:8 Saulo yaahuruza engabo ze zoona kushuuma Keila kugota Daudi n'abantu be. 
1Samuel23:9 Daudi yaamanya ku Saulo ari omu naama y'okumukora kubi, yaagira Abiasaari omunyamurwa ati: Reeta efodi." 
1Samuel23:10 Daudi yaashaba naagira ati: Ai MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, nyowe omwiru waawe mpuriire ku Saulo arikwenda kuteera Keila, kugicwekyereza ahabwangye." 
1Samuel23:11 Abantu ba Keila nibaija kumpayo omu mikono ye? N'eky'amazima Saulo naija kushuuma kunu, nk'oku omwiru waawe ahuriire? MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, ninkweshengyereza, manyisa omwiru waawe. MUKAMA yaagarukamu ati: Naija kushuuma." 
1Samuel23:12 Daudi yaagaruka yaabuuza ati: Aba Keila nibaija kumpayo n'abantu bangye omu mikono ya Saulo? MUKAMA yaagarukamu ati: Nibaija kukuhayo. 
1Samuel23:13 Atyo Daudi n'abantu be nka magana mukaaga baimuka, baaruga Keila, baaza hoona ahu barikubaasa. Bwanyima baagambira Saulo ku Daudi acwire, akaruga Keila, yaareka kuhurura." 
1Samuel23:14 Daudi yaaguma omu bigo by'omu ihamba, omu nsi y'ebibungo omu ihamba rya Ziifu. Saulo yaaguma naamusherura obutoosha, kwonka Ruhanga tiyaamuhayo mu mikono ye." 
1Samuel23:15 Daudi ku yaareebire Saulo aizire kumuhiiga kumwiita, yaaguma omu ihamba rya Ziifu omu kibira." 
1Samuel23:16 Bwanyima Yonasaani mwene Saulo yaimuka, yaashanga Daudi omuri ekyo kibira, yaamugumya omuri Ruhanga." 
1Samuel23:17 Yaamugira ati: Otatiina; ahakuba tata Saulo tarikubona, kandi oryaba omugabe wa Israeli, naanye nkubeho owa kabiri; kandi ekyo na Saulo tata naakimanya." 
1Samuel23:18 Bombi baaragaana endagaano omu maisho ga MUKAMA. Daudi yaaguma omuri ekyo kibira, Yonasaani yaagaruka owe." 
1Samuel23:19 Omu biro ebyo aba Ziifu bainamuka owa Saulo Gibea, baagira bati: Ebyo noomanya ku Daudi ayesherekire omuriitwe omu kibira ky'omu kibungo kya Hakila, ekiri aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bw'eihamba?" 
1Samuel23:20 Mbwenu Nyakusinga, shuuma, oyemare ekikuri aha mutima; ekyaitu n'okumuhayo omu mikono y'omugabe." 
1Samuel23:21 Saulo yaagira ati: MUKAMA abahe omugisha; ahakuba mwangirira esaasi. 
1Samuel23:22 Mwirooko, mwongyere kuhamya, mwetegyereze mureebe omwanya ogu ayesherekiremu, kandi mumanye n'omureebire; ahakuba nibangambira omushaija ogwo ku aba omunyabwengye." 
1Samuel23:23 N'ahabw'ekyo mureebe, mwetegyereze obweshereko bwe bwona, ahu ayesherekire, haza mugarukye mundeetere enkuru ehamire, naanye niinyija kugyenda naimwe; ku araabe ari omuri egyo nsi, niinyija kumusherura omu nkumi zoona ez'Abayuda." 
1Samuel23:24 Batyo baimuka, baaza Ziifu, baatangayo Saulo. Omu bunaku obwo Daudi n'abashaija be bakaba bari omu ihamba rya Maoni omuri Araba, aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bwa Yeshimooni." 
1Samuel23:25 Saulo n'abantu be baaza kumusherura; haabaho abaagambira Daudi; n'ahabw'ekyo yaaza aha ibaare rihango ery'omu ihamba rya Maoni, yaagumayo. Saulo ku yaakihuriire, yaamukurata omuri eryo ihamba." 
1Samuel23:26 Saulo yaareetwa aha rubaju rumwe rw'ekibungo, na Daudi n'abantu be aha rundi; obwo Daudi akaba nairuka naahunga Saulo, ahakuba Saulo n'engabo ze bakaba nibenda kubakubira ahagati kubakwata." 
1Samuel23:27 Kwonka haija entumwa ahari Saulo, yaamugira eti: Rahuka ogarukye; ahakuba Abafilistia baahurura kuteera ensi yaitu." 
1Samuel23:28 N'ahabw'ekyo Saulo yaagarukayo, yaarereera kukurata Daudi, yaaza kurwanisa Abafilistia. Nikyo baayeteire ogwo mwanya Sela-hama-lekoosi." 
1Samuel23:29 Bwanyima Daudi yaarugayo, yainamuka, yaaguma omu bigo bya Enigeedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Saulo ku yaatabaarukire naaruga kubinga Abafilistia, abantu baamugira bati: Reeba, Daudi ari omu ihamba rya Eni-geedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Saulo nikwo kutoorana engabo enkumi ishatu omuri Israeli yoona, akazitwara, akaza kusherura Daudi n'abantu be aha nkiri z'aha izaagiriro ry'enzaza." 
1Samuel24:3 Ku yaahikire aha ngombe z'entaama ezaabaire ziri aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, yaashangaho enyanga, yaagitaahamu kuza aha ishaazi. Kandi Daudi n'abashaija be bakaba bari hare omunda y'egyo nyanga." 
1Samuel24:4 Abashaija ba Daudi baamugira bati: Eri niryo izooba eri MUKAMA yaakugambiire naagira ati: Reeba, ndyahayo omuzigu waawe omu mikono yaawe, omugire nk'oku orikwenda. Bwanyima Daudi yaimuka, yaagyenda naashooba, yaashara aha mukugiro gw'omunagiro gwa Saulo." 
1Samuel24:5 Kwonka ku yaaherize kukora atyo, yaashinjwa omu mutima ahabw'okushara ahari ogwo munagiro;" 
1Samuel24:6 yaagira abashaija be ati: Nikikabure nyowe okukora ntyo mukama wangye, ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta, okumubangira omukono, haza MUKAMA yaamushukireho amajuta." 
1Samuel24:7 Atyo Daudi yaazibira abashaija be, tiyaabaikiriza kwita Saulo. Bwanyima Saulo yaimuka, yaaruga omu nyanga, yaagyenda." 
1Samuel24:8 Bwanyima Daudi nawe yaimuka, yaaruga omu nyanga, yaayeta Saulo naagira ati: Nyakusinga mukama wangye. Saulo ku yaagarwire amaisho enyima, Daudi yainama, yaamutangirira." 
1Samuel24:9 Daudi yaabuuza Saulo ati: Ahabw'enki noohurira ebi abantu barikukugambira ngu, Daudi naayenda kukukora kubi?" 
1Samuel24:10 Mbwenu tiwaayereebera ku MUKAMA yaaba akuhaireyo omu mikono yangye eri izooba, obu waaba ori omu nyanga? Nangwa hariho abamwe abangambira kukwita, kwonka nyowe naakusaasira, naagira nti: Tindikwija kugorora mukono gwangye ahari mukama wangye, ahakuba niwe MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta." 
1Samuel24:11 Kandi Taata, reeba omukugiro gw'omunagiro gwawe; nk'oku naashara omukugiro gw'omunagiro gwawe, ntakwite, ekyo kikumanyise kandi oreebe ku hatariho kibi nari obugomi omuriinye; kandi ku ntakakucumurahoga, n'obu oraabe otuura noohiiga amagara gangye kugaihaho." 
1Samuel24:12 MUKAMA abe niwe yaatucwera orubanja twembi, kandi abe niwe yaakumpoorera; kwonka omukono gwangye gurekye kuba nigwo gwakwita." 
1Samuel24:13 Nk'oku enfumu y'aba kare egira eti, Ebibi biruga omu babi; kwonka omukono gwangye tigurikukoraho." 
1Samuel24:14 Beitu omugabe wa Israeli aizire kuteera oha? Ou ohiigire n'oha? Ohiigire embwa efiire, ohiigire omura." 
1Samuel24:15 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA abe omuramuzi waitu twembi, atucwere orubanja, areebe, antonganire, akunjune." 
1Samuel24:16 Daudi ku yaaherize kugambira Saulo ebigambo ebyo, Saulo yaagira ati: Mwana wangye Daudi, eryo n'eiraka ryawe? Saulo yaayeha eboroogo, yaarira." 
1Samuel24:17 Yaagaruka yaagira Daudi ati: Wankiza okuhikiirira; ahakuba waanyihura ebirungi, haza nyowe nkwihwire ebibi." 
1Samuel24:18 Kandi eri izooba waayoreka butunu ku wankora gye, ahabw'okuba tiwaanyita n'obu MUKAMA yampayo omu mikono yaawe." 
1Samuel24:19 Noogira ngu omuntu akaareeba omuzigu we, amureka, agyenda? N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA akuzimuurire ebirungi ahabw'eki wankorera eri izooba." 
1Samuel24:20 Kandi reeba, hati nimmanya ku otaribura kuba omugabe, n'obugabe bwa Israeli ku burihamibwa omu mikono yaawe." 
1Samuel24:21 N'ahabw'ekyo ndahira MUKAMA ku otaricwekyereza ruzaaro rwangye naarugaho, kandi ku otarimaraho iziina ryangye omu nju ya tata." 
1Samuel24:22 Daudi yaamurahira. Saulo yaagaruka owe; kwonka Daudi yainamuka yaagaruka omu kigo n'abantu be. 
1Samuel25:1 Ebiro ku byahingwireho, Samueli yaafa; Abaisraeli boona baateeranira hamwe, baamucurira, baamuziika omu nju ye Raama. Bwanyima Daudi yaimuka, yaashuuma, yaaza omu ihamba rya Parani." 
1Samuel25:2 Omuri Maoni hakaba harimu omushaija, ou amatungo ge gaabaire gari Karumeeli; akaba ari omutungi munonga, aine entama enkumi ishatu, n'embuzi rukumi; omuri obwo bunaku akaba naakyemurira ebyoya by'entaama ze Karumeeli." 
1Samuel25:3 Ogwo mushaija akaba naayetwa Nabali, n'eiziina ry'omukazi we ari Abigaili. Ogwo mukazi akaba ari omukazi orikwetegyereza, kandi murungi; kwonka iba akaba ari omunyamwaga, aine emicwe mibi; kandi akaba ari ow'omu muryango gwa Kalebu." 
1Samuel25:4 Daudi ku yaabaire akiri omu ihamba, yaahurira ngu Nabali naakyemura ebyoya by'entaama ze." 
1Samuel25:5 Daudi yaatuma abatsigazi ikumi, yaabagira ati: Mwinamukye Karumeeli, muze owa Nabali, mumundamukize;" 
1Samuel25:6 mugire ogwo mutungi muti: Obusingye bugume ahariiwe, n'aha ka yaawe, n'ahari byona ebi oine." 
1Samuel25:7 Mpuriire ku oine abarikukyemura ebyoya; kandi ebi biro tubaire turi hamwe n'abariisa baawe; omwanya gwona ogu baamazire Karumeeli, titwine ki tubaitsize, kandi tibaine kintu kyona eki baafeereirwe." 
1Samuel25:8 Buuza abatsigazi baawe, nibaija kukugambira. Ninkweshengyereza abatsigazi bangye bagirirwe embabazi omu maisho gaawe, ahakuba twaija aha izooba rirungi ry'obugyenyi. N'ahabw'ekyo eki oraabe oine kyona obe nikyo waaha abairu baawe n'omwana waawe Daudi." 
1Samuel25:9 Abatsigazi ba Daudi ku baahikire aho, baagambira Nabali byona nk'oku Daudi yaabibatuma; baaguma bategyereize." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabali yaagarukamu abo baheereza ba Daudi, ati: Daudi ogwo niwe oha? Kandi mwene Yese niwe oha? Ebi biro hariho abahuuku baingi abacwire ahari bakama baabo." 
1Samuel25:11 Mbwenu nyeyakye eby'okurya byangye, n'amaizi gangye, n'enyama ei mbaagiire abakyemuzi bangye b'ebyoya, mbihe abantu abu ntarikumanya i barikuruga?" 
1Samuel25:12 Batyo abatsigazi ba Daudi baahinduka, baagarukayo, baamuteekyerereza ebyo byona." 
1Samuel25:13 Daudi nikwo kugira abashaija be ati: Buri muntu ahagatire rurara ye. Batyo buri muntu yaahagatira rurara ye, na Daudi yaahagatira eye; abantu nka magana ana bainamuka bakuratiire Daudi; na magana abiri baatsigara aha bintu." 
1Samuel25:14 Omwe aha batsigazi ba Nabali yaagambira Abigaili muka mukama we ati: Reeba, Daudi atumire entumwa, zaaruga omu ihamba kuramutsya mukama waitu; ku baizire, yaabajuukirira." 
1Samuel25:15 Haza abo bashaija bakatubeera efura; tibaine ki baatwitsize nari eki twafeereirwe, omwanya gwona ogu twamazire nabo turi omu mariisizo." 
1Samuel25:16 Bakatubeera orugo nyomushana na nyekiro, omwanya gwona ogu twamazire nabo nituriisa entaama." 
1Samuel25:17 N'ahabw'ekyo hati okimanye, oteekateekye eki oraakore, ahakuba bamaririire kukora kubi mukama waitu n'eka ye yoona; noomanya omuntu mubi nk'ogwo tihaine orikubaasa kugamba nawe." 
1Samuel25:18 Abigaili yaakoresa obwira, yaagira emigaati magana abiri, n'efurebe ibiri za viinyo, n'enyama y'entaama itaano eteekire gye, n'encuro itaano z'engano ezikarangire, n'emitsitsa igana y'emizaabibu eyomire, kandi n'ebiihuro magana abiri by'ebijuma by'emitiini, yaabita aha ndogoya," 
1Samuel25:19 yaagira abatsigazi be ati: Muunyebembere; niinyija kubakurata. Kwonka tiyaabigambira iba Nabali. 
1Samuel25:20 Ku yaabaire ari aha ndogoya naashuuma omu rukiizi rw'ekibungo, reeba Daudi n'abantu be nabo baashuuma nibareebana nawe, baabugaabugana." 
1Samuel25:21 Kandi Daudi akaba agizire ati: Buzimazima nkahendekyera busha kurinda ebintu ebi ekyo kishaija kyabaire kiine omu ihamba byona; tihaagira kintu kyona omu bintu byakyo ekyabura; nkamukorera gye, mbwenu yanzimuurira ebibi." 
1Samuel25:22 Nyowe Daudi ku ndaahitsye omu kasheeshe hakiriho ekyetwa omwojo omu bantu be boona, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho." 
1Samuel25:23 Abigaili ku yaareebire Daudi, yaarahuka yaaruga aha ndogoya ye, yaajuumara omu maisho ga Daudi, yainama ahansi." 
1Samuel25:24 Yaamukwata amaguru naagira ati: Mukama wangye, ekyo kibi kibe niinye kyabarirwa. Ninkweshengyereza ikiriza omuzaana waawe agire eki yaakugambira, naiwe ohurire ebigambo by'omuzaana waawe." 
1Samuel25:25 Mukama wangye, ninkweshengyereza, reka kweta ahari ogwo mushaija mubi Nabali; ahakuba oku arikwetwa, nikwo arikushusha; Nabali niryo iziina rye, n'obushema butuura bumwezingiriire; kwonka nyowe omuzaana waawe tindeebire batsigazi baawe abu otumire, mukama wangye; nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, kandi ninkurahira, timbareebire." 
1Samuel25:26 N'ahabw'ekyo mukama wangye, nk'oku MUKAMA akuzibiire kwehoorera enzigu n'omukono gwawe, okagiibwaho orubanja rw'eshagama, reka abazigu baawe n'abarikukutengyera kubi, mukama wangye, babe nka Nabali." 
1Samuel25:27 Mbwenu ngugu omutoijo ogu omuzaana waawe yaakureetera, mukama wangye, guheebwe abatsigazi abarikugyendana mukama wangye." 
1Samuel25:28 Ninkweshengyereza saasira omuzaana waawe ekyo kibi, ahakuba MUKAMA taribura kukwombekyera enju ehamire; ahabw'okuba mukama wangye, niiwe orwana engamba za MUKAMA, kandi torireebwaho kibi ebiro byona ebi orimara omu nsi." 
1Samuel25:29 Kandi n'obu abantu baimukire kukuhiiga n'okwenda kukwita, mukama wangye, amagara gaawe garyakomwa hamwe na MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe omu mutwaro gumwe gw'abahuriire; kwonka amagara g'abazigu baawe aryagarekyera nk'eibaare ry'enjungu." 
1Samuel25:30 Mbwenu MUKAMA ku ariba yaaherize kuhikiiriza ebirungi byona ebi yaakugambireho, akakugira omugabe wa Israeli," 
1Samuel25:31 nyetsya eki kitarikusaasa nari okukureetera okwefuuza ahabw'okusheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja nari okwehoorera enzigu. Kandi MUKAMA ku ariba yaakukoreire ebirungi, Nyakusinga, oijukye omuzaana waawe." 
1Samuel25:32 Daudi yaagarukamu Abigaili ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, owaakwohereza kumbugana eri izooba, asiimwe." 
1Samuel25:33 Kandi obwengye bwawe busiimwe, naiwe osiimwe ahabw'okunzibira eri izooba kwehoorera enzigu n'omukono gwangye, nkagiibwaho orubanja." 
1Samuel25:34 Ninkurahira MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli owanzibira kukukora kubi, kuri noogira ngu tiwaarahuka kwija kumbugana, bwaba nibuza kusheesha hatakiriho ekyetwa omwojo omu bantu ba Nabali." 
1Samuel25:35 Atyo Daudi yaayakiira ebi yaamutoijera, yaamugira ati: Yeinamukire owaawe n'obusingye; ebi waagamba naabihurira, n'ebi waashaba naabiikiriza." 
1Samuel25:36 Bwanyima Abigaili yaagaruka owa Nabali, yaashanga ateekire obugyenyi omu nju ye, oburikushusha nk'obw'omugabe; kandi agwirwe gye omu mutima, ahabw'okuba akaba asinzire munonga; n'ahabw'ekyo Abigaili tiyaagira ki yaamugambira kyona okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
1Samuel25:37 Ku bwaseesire, Nabali amaarwa gaamurugaho, omukazi we yaamuteekyerereza ebyo byona, omutima gwa Nabali gwamuhwa omunda, yaaba nk'ekiti." 
1Samuel25:38 Ku haahingwireho ebiro ikumi, MUKAMA yaamuteera, yaafa." 
1Samuel25:39 Daudi ku yaahuriire ngu Nabali yaafa, yaagira ati: MUKAMA asiimwe, owaanyihaho ekijumo eki Nabali anjumire, akazibira omwiru we kukora ekibi; kandi MUKAMA azimuuriire Nabali obubi bwe. Bwanyima Daudi yaatuma ahari Abigaili, naamuresya kumutwara, ngu abe omukazi we." 
1Samuel25:40 Abagaragwa ba Daudi ku baahikire Karumeeli owa Abigaili, baamugira bati: Daudi yaakututumaho kumukutwarira, ngu obe omukazi we." 
1Samuel25:41 Yaabandatuka, yainika omutwe ahansi, yaagira ati: Reeba, nyowe omuzaana we ndi ow'okunaabisa ebigyere by'abagaragwa ba mukama wangye." 
1Samuel25:42 Ahonaaho Abigaili yaimuka, yaatemba endogoya, aine abazaana be bataano bamukuratiire; yaakurata entumwa za Daudi, yaaba omukazi we." 
1Samuel25:43 Kandi Daudi yaashwera Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli; bombi baaba abakazi be. 
1Samuel25:44 Kwonka Saulo akaba yaahingiire Paluti mwene Laishi owa Galimu muhara we Mikaali, owaabaire ari muka Daudi." 
1Samuel26:1 Bwanyima aba Ziifu baaza Gibea owa Saulo, baamugira bati: Waamanyire Daudi ku ayesherekire omu kibungo kya Hakila aha burugwa-izooba bwa Yeshimooni?" 
1Samuel26:2 Ahonaaho Saulo yaimuka, yaashuuma omu ihamba rya Ziifu, aine engabo enkumi ishatu ezitoorainwe omuri Israeli, kuza kusherura Daudi omuri eryo ihamba." 
1Samuel26:3 Saulo yaateera orusiisira aha kibungo kya Hakila, ekiri aha rubaju rw'omuhanda aha burugwa-izooba bwa Yeshimooni. Kwonka Daudi yaaguma omu ihamba; ku yaareebire Saulo aizire omu ihamba kumusherura," 
1Samuel26:4 yaatuma entatsi, zaahamiza kimwe Saulo ku aizire." 
1Samuel26:5 Daudi yaimuka, yaija omu mwanya ogu Saulo ateiremu orusiisira; yaayetegyereza ahu Saulo abyami hamwe na Abuneeri mwene Neeri, omukuru w'engabo z'eihe rye; kandi Saulo akaba abyami omu mwanya gw'ahagati y'ebigaari, abantu bateire orusiisira bamwehinguririize." 
1Samuel26:6 Daudi yaagambira Ahimeleki Omuhiiti na Abishai murumuna wa Yoabu mwene Zeruiya, ati: N'oha orikwija kushuuma naanye omu rusiisira ahu Saulo ari? Abishai yaagira ati: Niinye ndaashuumeyo naiwe."
