1Samuel26:7 Daudi na Abishai baahika omuri ezo ngabo nyekiro omu rusiisira, baahika ahu Saulo yaabaire abyami agwejegyeire, omu mwanya gw'ahagati y'ebigaari, eicumu rye ritsimbire aha mushego, Abuneeri n'engabo ze babyami bamwehinguririize." 
1Samuel26:8 Abishai yaagira Daudi ati: Eri izooba Ruhanga yaahayo omuzigu waawe omu mikono yaawe; mbwenu reka mmuteere eicumu rimwe, rimwogyemu, rikwate omu itaka, tindikwija kumuteera rya kabiri." 
1Samuel26:9 Kwonka Daudi yaagira Abishai ati: Reka, otamwita; mbwenu n'oha orikubaasa kubangira omukono ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta, atagiibweho rubanja?" 
1Samuel26:10 Daudi yaagaruka yaagira ati: Ninkurahira MUKAMA otahwaho, MUKAMA niwe arimweyitira; nari shi obunaku bwe ku burihika, aryafa; nari aryashuuma omu rugamba, agweyo." 
1Samuel26:11 Rubuuza nyowe okubanga omukono gwangye aha muntu ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta; kureka iha eicumu n'orunywero rw'amaizi aha mushego gwe, tugyende." 
1Samuel26:12 Atyo Daudi yaiha eicumu n'orunywero rw'amaizi aha mushego gwa Saulo, baagyenda. Tihaagira owaakireeba, nari owaakimanya, n'obu yaakuba owaasisiimuka, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akaba abagwejegyeize obutasisiimuka." 
1Samuel26:13 Bwanyima Daudi yaayambuka seeri, yaayemerera hare aha mutwe gw'ekibungo, ahagati yaabo haaba kaanya." 
1Samuel26:14 Daudi yaayeta engabo na Abuneeri mwene Neeri, naagira ati: Abuneeri, ku otarikuteeza? Abuneeri yaamugarukamu ati: Iwe orikweta omugabe ori oha?" 
1Samuel26:15 Daudi yaagira Abuneeri ati: Tori emanzi? N'oha orikwingana naiwe omuri Israeli? Mbwenu ekikuzibiire kurinda mukama waawe omugabe n'enki? Ahakuba omuntu aizire omuriimwe kwita omugabe mukama waawe. 
1Samuel26:16 Eki okozire ti kirungi. Ninkurahira MUKAMA otahwaho, mushemereire kufa, ahabw'okuba timurinzire gye mukama waanyu, ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta. Mbwenu reeba eicumu ry'omugabe n'orunywero rw'amaizi orubaire ruri aha mushego gwe." 
1Samuel26:17 Saulo yaamanya eiraka rya Daudi, yaagira ati: Beitu eryo iraka n'eryawe, mwana wangye Daudi? Daudi yaagira ati: N'eryangye, mukama wangye omugabe." 
1Samuel26:18 Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Beitu shi, mukama wangye ahiigira ki omwiru we? Nkakora ki? Nari shi ni kibi ki eki nyine?" 
1Samuel26:19 Mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, Nyakusinga omugabe, hurira ebigambo by'omwiru waawe. MUKAMA ku araabe niwe anteeraine naiwe, aikirize empongano; kwonka ku baraabe bari abantu, bakyeenwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA, ahakuba eri izooba bambinga ngu ntagira omugabo omu buhunguzi bwa MUKAMA, nibagira bati: Irooko oheereze baaruhanga abandi." 
1Samuel26:20 N'ahabw'ekyo hati otaikiriza eshagama yangye kugwa ahansi, ahu MUKAMA atari; ahabw'okuba omugabe wa Israeli aizire kusherura omura, nk'ohiigire endahi omu bibungo." 
1Samuel26:21 Saulo yaagira ati: Nkashiisha; garuka, mwana wangye Daudi. Tindigaruka kukukora kubi, ahakuba amagara gangye gaaba ag'obuguzi bwingi omu maisho gaawe eri izooba. Reeba, nkakora eby'obufa-mutima, naahaba munonga." 
1Samuel26:22 Daudi yaamugira ati: Reeba eicumu ryawe ndiri, Nyakusinga! Hagire omwe aha batsigazi baawe, aije aryakiire." 
1Samuel26:23 MUKAMA azimuurira omuntu nk'okuhikiirira kwe n'obwesigwa bwe oku biri. Omanye ku MUKAMA yaakuhayo omu mikono yangye eri izooba, nkanga kubanga omukono gwangye ahariiwe ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta." 
1Samuel26:24 Kandi nk'oku amagara gaawe gaaba ag'obuguzi bwingi omu maisho gangye eri izooba, n'agangye gabe nikwo gaaba ag'obuguzi bwingi omu maisho ga MUKAMA, anjune omu kutuntuzibwa kwona." 
1Samuel26:25 Bwanyima Saulo yaagira Daudi ati: Oheebwe omugisha, mwana wangye Daudi; oryakora bikuru, kandi n'okusingura oryasingura. Atyo Daudi yaayegyendera, Saulo nawe yaagaruka owe." 
1Samuel27:1 Bwanyima Daudi yaagira omu mutima gwe ati: Hoona eizooba rimwe Saulo aryarugaho anyite; tihariho kirikunkirira okuhungira omu nsi y'Abafilistia, kikaareetera Saulo kumpwa amatsiko, akareka kugaruka kunsherurira omu byaro bya Israeli byona; nkamukira ntyo." 
1Samuel27:2 Daudi yaimuka n'abashaija be magana mukaaga abu yaabaire aine, baayambuka, baayehongyera Akishi mwene Maoki, omugabe wa Gaasi." 
1Samuel27:3 Daudi n'abashaija be baatuura na Akishi omuri Gaasi, buri muntu n'ab'omu ka ye, na Daudi n'abakazi be bombi, Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli, na Abigaili owa Karumeeli, owaabaire ari muka Nabali." 
1Samuel27:4 Abantu baagambira Saulo ku Daudi ahungiire Gaasi; tiyaagaruka kumusherura bundi. 
1Samuel27:5 Bwanyima Daudi yaagira Akishi ati: Ku ndaabe ngiriirwe embabazi omu maisho gaawe, bampe ekibanja omu rurembo rumwe aha ndembo z'omu byaro, mbe nimwo naatuura; mbwenu omwiru waawe atuuzibwe ki naiwe omu rurembo rw'omugabe?" 
1Samuel27:6 Atyo Akishi yaamuha orurembo Zikulaagi eryo izooba; nikyo Zikulaagi yaabeereire ey'abagabe ba Yuda okwiha obwo n'okuhitsya hati. 
1Samuel27:7 Ebiro ebi Daudi yaamazire omu nsi y'Abafilistia bikahika omwaka n'ameezi ana. 
1Samuel27:8 Bwanyima Daudi n'abashaija be bainamuka, baateera aba Geshuri n'aba Giruzi n'Abaamaleki; ahakuba ago mahanga ira nigo gaabaire gatwire omuri egyo nsi erikugarukira Shuuri n'aha mwatano gw'ensi ya Misri." 
1Samuel27:9 Daudi yaacwekyereza egyo nsi, tihaarokokamu mushaija nari omukazi; yaanyaga entaama n'ente n'endogoya n'engamira kandi n'ebijwaro; bwanyima yaatabaaruka, yaaza owa Akishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akishi akaba amubuuza ati: Eri izooba waateera hi? Daudi amugarukamu ati: Naateera Negebu eya Yuda, nari Negebu ey'aba Yerameeli, nari ey'aba Keeni." 
1Samuel27:11 Kwonka Daudi akaba atarokora mushaija nari omukazi, ngu abatware Gaasi; ahabw'okuba akaba agira ngu nibaija kubarega bati: Daudi atukozire ati n'ati. Kandi ebiro byona ebi yaamazire omu nsi y'Abafilistia nikwo yaabaire atwaza." 
1Samuel27:12 N'ahabw'ekyo Akishi akeesiga Daudi, yaaguma naagira ati: Ayetamiise munonga beene waabo Abaisraeli; n'ahabw'ekyo naija kuguma ari omugaragwa wangye ebiro byona." 
1Samuel28:1 Omu biro ebyo Abafilistia bakahuruza engabo zaabo, baaziteerana kuza kurwana n'Abaisraeli. Akishi yaagira Daudi ati: Omanyire kimwe iwe n'abashaija baawe ku murikwija kuhurura naanye omu ihe ryaitu." 
1Samuel28:2 Daudi yaamugira ati: Eego, aho niho oraamanyire eki omwiru waawe arikubaasa kukora. Akishi yaagira Daudi ati: Eego, naanye niinyija kukugira omurinzi w'amagara gangye ebiro byona." 
1Samuel28:3 Omu bunaku obwo Samueli akaba amazire omwanya afiire; kandi omu kufa kwe Abaisraeli boona bakamucurira, baamuziika omu rurembo rwe Raama. Kandi Saulo akaba aherize kucwa abarikugambisa emizimu n'abarogi omu nsi ye." 
1Samuel28:4 Omu biro ebyo Abafilistia bakateerana, baaza Shuneemu, baateerayo orusiisira. Saulo nawe yaateerana Abaisraeli boona, baateera orusiisira Giliboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Saulo ku yaareebire eihe ry'Abafilistia, yaatiina, omutima gwamuhwa omunda, yaatetema munonga." 
1Samuel28:6 Ku yaayehanwize ahari MUKAMA, MUKAMA tiyaagira ki yaamugarukamu, yaaba mu birooto nari omuri Urimu, n'obu haakuba omuri baanabi." 
1Samuel28:7 Saulo nikwo kugira abagaragwa be ati: Munsherurire omugirwakazi w'emizimu, nze kumuraguzaho. Abagaragwa be baamugarukamu bati: Reeba, hariho omurogikazi ari Endoori." 
1Samuel28:8 Saulo yaayehindura, yaajwara ebindi bijwaro, yaagyenda n'abashaija babiri, baaza ow'ogwo mukazi nyekiro, yaamugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ndagurira n'omuzimu ogu obandwa, ondeetere ou ndaakugambire." 
1Samuel28:9 Ogwo mukazi yaamugira ati: Noomanyira kimwe eki Saulo yaakozire, ku yaacwire abarikubandwa emizimu n'abarogi omu nsi ye. Mbwenu ahabw'enki nootega amagara gangye omutego ngu baanyite?" 
1Samuel28:10 Saulo yaamurahira MUKAMA naagira ati: Ninkurahira MUKAMA atahwaho, ekyo torikiturwa." 
1Samuel28:11 Omukazi yaamubuuza ati: Nkuzoorere oha? Onu ati: Nzoorera Samueli. 
1Samuel28:12 Ogwo mukazi ku yaareebire Samueli, yaayamuza n'eiraka rihango; yaagira Saulo ati: Wambeihera ki? Kunu ori Saulo." 
1Samuel28:13 Omugabe yaamugira ati: Otatiina! Ngambira eki orikureeba. Omukazi yaagira Saulo ati: Nindeeba ruhanga naaruga okuzimu. 
1Samuel28:14 Yaamubuuza ati: Naashusha ki? Onu ati: N'omugurusi orikwinamuka, kandi ayehumbikire omwenda. Saulo yaamanya ku ari Samueli, yainama, yaamutangirira." 
1Samuel28:15 Samueli yaabuuza Saulo ati: Ahabw'enki waanyomberera, okarugaho okanyiha okuzimu? Saulo yaagarukamu ati: Nshobeirwe munonga; ahabw'okuba Abafilistia nibandwanisa, kandi Ruhanga andugireho; takingarukiramu muri baanabi nari omu birooto. Nikyo naakwetera, ngu ommanyise eki ndaakore." 
1Samuel28:16 Samueli yaagira ati: Ku oraabe noomanya ngu MUKAMA akurugireho, yaahinduka omuzigu waawe, nombuuriza ki?" 
1Samuel28:17 MUKAMA akugizire nk'oku yaagambire naaraba omuriinye, ahakuba MUKAMA akakutaaguraho obugabe, yaabuha mutaahi waawe Daudi." 
1Samuel28:18 Ahabw'okutoorobera iraka rya MUKAMA, n'okutahikiiriza kiniga kye kingi aha Baamaleki, nikyo MUKAMA yaakugirira atyo eri izooba." 
1Samuel28:19 N'ekindi MUKAMA naija kukuhayo hamwe n'Abaisraeli omu mikono y'Abafilistia, kandi nyencakare iwe na batabani baawe nimwija kunshanga ei ndi. MUKAMA naija kuhayo eihe ry'Abaisraeli omu mikono y'Abafilistia." 
1Samuel28:20 Ahonaaho Saulo yaagwa ahansi arambiire, aine obwoba bwingi ahabw'ebigambo bya Samueli; amaani gaamuhwamu, ahabw'okuba akaba asiibirekwo kandi arairekwo." 
1Samuel28:21 Bwanyima ogwo mukazi yaija ahari Saulo; ku yaareebire atiinire munonga, yaamugira ati: Reeba, nyowe omuzaana waawe naakuhurira, naayoga amagara, naakora eki wandagiira." 
1Samuel28:22 Mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, naiwe ohurire omuzaana waawe, onyikirize nkureetere ak'okurya, orye, obone agagyenda." 
1Samuel28:23 Yaayanga, yaagira ati: Tindikwija kurya. Kwonka abagaragwa be hamwe n'ogwo mukazi baamugyema, yaikiriza ebi baamugambira. Yaabandatuka ahansi, yaashutama aha kitanda." 
1Samuel28:24 Ogwo mukazi akaba aine enyana y'ebishaju omu nju; yaakoresa obwira, yaagiita, yaagira esaano, yaagibumbabumba, yaagiteekamu omugaati ogutatumbisiibwe;" 
1Samuel28:25 yaabireetera Saulo n'abagaragwa be, baarya. Bwanyima baimuka ekyo kiro, baagyenda." 
1Samuel29:1 Abafilistia baateeranira engabo zaabo zoona Afeki; n'Abaisraeli baateera orusiisira rwabo Yezereeli haihi n'enshuro yaaho. 
1Samuel29:2 Abategyeki b'Abafilistia baahurura bari omu mitwe ya igana-igana n'eya rukumi-rukumi; kandi Daudi n'abashaija be hamwe na Akishi baabaija enyima. 
1Samuel29:3 Ku baabaire nibakigyenda, abakuru b'engabo z'Abafilistia baagira bati: Beitu shi, aba Baheburaayo nibakora ki aha? Akishi yaabagarukamu ati: Ogu ti Daudi, omugaragwa wa Saulo omugabe wa Israeli, omazire naanye ebiro n'emyaka? Okwiha obu yaanyehongyera n'okuhitsya hati tinkamureebahoga kishobyo kyona." 
1Samuel29:4 Kwonka abakuru b'Abafilistia baamugwerwa kubi, baamugira bati: Garurayo omuntu ogu, agarukye omu kibanja kye eki waamuhaire, otamwikiriza kushuuma naitwe aha rugamba, atakaahika omu rugamba, akatuhindukana, akaba omuzigu waitu. Noogira ngu ogu mushaija akaagarukaine ata na mukama we, yaaba atatwaire mitwe yaitu?" 
1Samuel29:5 Ogu ti Daudi, ou baayeshongoire omu kuzina kwabo nibaikirizana bati: Saulo aitsire enkumi, Daudi yaita obukumi?" 
1Samuel29:6 Akishi nikwo kweta Daudi akamugira ati: Nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, niiwe ohikire; ahabwangye nindeeba ngu oshemereire kuhurura n'okutabaaruka naanye omu ihe ryaitu, ahakuba okwiha obu waanyehongyera n'okuhitsya hati, tinkakureebahoga kishobyo; kwonka abategyeki tibarikukwenda." 
1Samuel29:7 N'ahabw'ekyo yegarukireyo, ogyende n'obusingye, orekye kugwisa kubi abategyeki b'Abafilistia." 
1Samuel29:8 Daudi yaagira Akishi ati: Beitu shi, ncumwire ki? okwiha obu naakwehongyera n'okuhitsya hati n'enki eki orareebire aha mwiru waawe, ekyakunzibira kuza kurwanisa abazigu ba mukama wangye omugabe?" 
1Samuel29:9 Akishi yaamugarukamu ati: Nimmanya ku otaine ky'okuhanwa omu maisho gangye nka maraika wa Ruhanga; kwonka abakuru b'Abafilistia baagira bati: Tarikwija kuhurura naitwe. 
1Samuel29:10 N'ahabw'ekyo ogurukye kare omu kasheeshe n'abairu ba mukama waawe abu oizire nabo; ku muraimukye muti omu kasheeshe, haija nihahweza, mugyende." 
1Samuel29:11 Atyo Daudi yaimuka kare n'abashaija be, baimutsya orugyendo kugaruka omu nsi y'Abafilistia; n'Abafilistia bainamuka, baahika Yezereeli." 
1Samuel30:1 Daudi n'abashaija be baahika Zikulaagi aha kiro kya kashatu, baashanga Abaamaleki baateire Negebu na Zikulaagi; baasingwire Zikulaagi, kandi baagyokize;" 
1Samuel30:2 baanyagire abakazi n'abaabaire bagitwiremu boona, abato n'abakuru; bataine u baitsire, kureka babatwaire, beegyendeire." 
1Samuel30:3 Daudi n'abashaija be ku baahikire omuri orwo rurembo, baashanga barwokize, kandi abakazi baabo na batabani baabo na bahara baabo banyagirwe." 
1Samuel30:4 Ahonaaho Daudi n'abu yaabaire aine, baimutsya amaraka gaabo, baaborooga, okuhitsya obu baahikire ahu batakibaasiza kuborooga." 
1Samuel30:5 Kandi abakazi ba Daudi bombi, Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli na Abigaili owaabaire ari muka Nabali owa Karumeeli, nabo bakaba banyagirwe." 
1Samuel30:6 Daudi yaashaasha munonga, ahabw'okuba abantu bakaba nibagira ngu bamuteere amabaare; ahakuba abantu boona bakaba baine obushaarizi omu mutima, buri muntu naasaasibwa batabani be na bahara be; kwonka Daudi yaayehamiza omuri MUKAMA Ruhanga we." 
1Samuel30:7 Bwanyima Daudi yaagira Abiasaari omunyamurwa, mwene Ahimeleki, ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ndeetera efodi. Atyo Abiasaari yaagimureetera." 
1Samuel30:8 Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari MUKAMA ati: Ku ndaakurate ezo ngabo, niinyija kuzihika? MUKAMA yaamugarukamu ati: Zikurate; ahakuba torikwija kubura kuzihika, kandi torikwija kuremwa kugarura ebintu byona." 
1Samuel30:9 Atyo Daudi yaagyenda n'abashaija magana mukaaga abu yaabaire aine; ku baahikire aha kagyera Besori, abaabaire bari enyima baatsigara aho." 
1Samuel30:10 Kwonka Daudi yaagumizamu n'abashaija magana ana; ahakuba abaatsigaire enyima baruhire, batakiine gambuka, bakaba bari magana abiri." 
1Samuel30:11 Bwanyima baashanga Omunyamisri omu ishwa, baamureetera Daudi, baamuha omugaati, yaarya; baamuha n'amaizi g'okunywa;" 
1Samuel30:12 kandi baamuha omwate gumwe aha kiihuro ky'ebijuma by'emitiini n'emitsitsa ebiri y'emizaabibu eyomire. Ku yaaherize kurya, yaagarukwamu amaani; ahabw'okuba akaba amazire ebiro bishatu atarikurya n'obu kwakuba okunywa, nyomushana na nyekiro." 
1Samuel30:13 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: Ori ow'oha? Kandi nooruga hi? Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Ndi omutsigazi Omunyamisri, omuhuuku w'Omuamaleki; mukama wangye antsigireho, ahakuba ebiro bishatu ebihingwire mbaire ndwaire." 
1Samuel30:14 Tukaba tuteire Negebu ey'Abakeresi n'ey'Abayuda, n'eya Kalebu, twayotsya Zikulaagi." 
1Samuel30:15 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: Okaanyebembera, ompitsya omuri ezo ngabo? Onu ati: Ndahira Ruhanga ku otarikwija kuunyita, n'obu kwakuba okumpayo omu mikono ya mukama wangye, mbone kuzikuhitsyamu." 
1Samuel30:16 Ku yaamuhikizeyo, baashanga bajanjaire aho hoona, nibarya nibanywa nibazina, ahabw'eminyago egyo yoona emingi ei banyagire omu nsi y'Abafilistia n'omu nsi ya Yuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Daudi yaabaita okwiha omu rwita-waabo okuhitsya omu mwabazyo gw'erindi izooba; tihaahonokaho n'omwe omuribo, kureka abatsigazi magana ana, abaatembire engamira bakahunga." 
1Samuel30:18 Daudi yaagarura ebi Abaamaleki babaire banyagire byona; kandi yaajuna abakazi be bombi. 
1Samuel30:19 Tihaagira kintu kyona ekyabura, yaaba kihango nari kikye, yaaba boojo nari abaishiki, yaaba munyago nari ekindi kintu kyona ekibaire kitwairwe; Daudi yaabigarura byona." 
1Samuel30:20 Kandi Daudi yaanyaga amasyo goona ag'entaama n'ag'ente; abantu baagafunya bageebembeize Daudi, nibagira bati: Ogu n'omunyago gwa Daudi." 
1Samuel30:21 Bwanyima Daudi yaahika aha bashaija bari magana abiri, abaruhire bakabura agamukurata, bakabatsiga aha kagyera Besori; baaza kubugana Daudi n'abantu abu abaire aine. Daudi ku yaabahika, yaabaramutsya." 
1Samuel30:22 Kwonka abantu babi boona abataine buntu, omuri abo abahurwire na Daudi, baagira bati: Titurikwija kubaha aha minyago ei tugarwire, ahakuba tibahurwire naitwe, kureka buri muntu tumuhe omukazi we n'abaana be, babatware, bagyende." 
1Samuel30:23 Kwonka Daudi yaagira ati: Beene waitu, tikwo murikwija kutwaza ebi MUKAMA atuhaire, MUKAMA oturinzire, akahayo omu mikono yaitu ezo ngabo ezibaire zituteire." 
1Samuel30:24 Nimugira ngu hariho orikwija kwikiriza ekyo eki murikugamba? Ahakuba omugabo gw'ogiire aha rugamba nikyo kimwe n'ogw'otsigaire aha bintu; boona nibaija kubagana, bainganise." 
1Samuel30:25 Okwiha ahari eryo izooba yaakihindura ekiragiro n'omugyenzo omuri Israeli n'okuhitsya hati. 
1Samuel30:26 Daudi ku yaahikire Zikulaagi, yaatwekyera banywani be abakuru b'Abayuda ahari egyo minyago, naagira ati: Ekiconco kyanyu nkikyo, ekirugire aha minyago y'abazigu ba MUKAMA;" 
1Samuel30:27 yaabitwekyera abaabaire bari Beseeli, na Ramoosi omuri Negebu, na Yatiri," 
1Samuel30:28 na Aroeri, na Sifumoosi, na Eshitemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 na Rakali, n'ab'omu ndembo z'aba Yerameeli n'ez'aba Keeni," 
1Samuel30:30 n'ab'omuri Horuma, na Korashaani, na Ataki," 
1Samuel30:31 na Heburooni n'emyanya yoona ei Daudi n'abantu be baabaire bazengyereramu. 
1Samuel31:1 Abafilistia baarwana n'Abaisraeli, Abaisraeli baabahunga, kwonka baitirwa aha kibungo kya Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Abafilistia baahambya Saulo n'abatabani, baita Yonasaani na Abinadabu na Malikishua, beene Saulo." 
1Samuel31:3 Orugamba rwaba orw'amaani ahari Saulo, abarasi baamugwaho, baamuhutaaza munonga." 
1Samuel31:4 Saulo nikwo kugira omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye, ati: Ihayo rurara yaawe, oginteere, abatashazirwe bariya batakaija, bakancumita, bakanshungisa. Kwonka omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye yaayanga, ahabw'okuba akatiina munonga. Nikyo Saulo yaasyoreireyo rurara ye, akagyetungaho." 
1Samuel31:5 Ogwo mukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye, ku yaareebire yaafa, nawe yaayetunga aha ye, baafa kumwe." 
1Samuel31:6 Okwo nikwo Saulo yaafiire n'abatabani bonshatu, n'omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye, n'engabo ze zoona; bakafeera hamwe eryo izooba." 
1Samuel31:7 Kandi Abaisraeli abaabaire bari seeri y'oruhita, n'abaabaire bari seeri ya Yorudani, ku baareebire Abaisraeli baahunga, na Saulo n'abatabani baafa, baatsigaho endembo zaabo, baahunga; Abafilistia baija, baazituuramu." 
1Samuel31:8 Ku bwaseesire, Abafilistia baija kucwijura emitumbi, baashanga Saulo n'abatabani bonshatu bagwire aha kibungo kya Giliboa," 
1Samuel31:9 baamutemaho omutwe, baamucwijura eby'okurwanisa bye, baatuma entumwa omu nsi y'Abafilistia kubuzya hoona amakuru omuri hekalu z'ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa, n'omu bantu boona." 
1Samuel31:10 Eby'okurwanisa bye baabita omuri hekalu ya Ashitaroosi, n'omutumbi gwe baaguhanika aha rugo rw'amabaare rwa Besi-shaani." 
1Samuel31:11 Abanyayabeshi-gileadi ku baahuriire oku Abafilistia bagizire Saulo," 
1Samuel31:12 abashaija boona amamanzi baimuka, baagyenda ekiro kyona, baahanura omutumbi gwa Saulo n'ey'abatabani aha rugo rwa Besi-shaani, baagaruka Yabeshi; ku baahikireyo, baagyotsya." 
1Samuel31:13 Bwanyima baatwara amagufa gaabo, baagaziika ahansi y'omunyinya ogw'omuri Yabeshi, baamara ebiro mushanju nibeesiibyakwo." 
2Samuel1:1 Bwanyima y'okufa kwa Saulo, Daudi akatabaaruka naaruga kwita Abaamaleki; ku yaahikire Zikulaagi, yaamarayo ebiro bibiri." 
2Samuel1:2 Aha kiro kya kashatu haija omushaija naaruga omu rusiisira rwa Saulo, emyenda ye etaagukire, aine eitaka omu mutwe; ku yaahikire ahari Daudi, yaajuumara ahansi, yaamutangirira." 
2Samuel1:3 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: Nooruga hi? Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Naacwa omu rusiisira rw'Abaisraeli. 
2Samuel1:4 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: Bibaire bita? Ninkweshengyereza, ngambira. Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Abantu bahungire aha rugamba, baingi omuribo bagwire, baafa, kandi Saulo n'omutabani Yonasaani nabo bafiire." 
2Samuel1:5 Daudi yaabuuza ogwo mutsigazi owaamubikira ati: Beitu shi omanyisiibwe ki Saulo n'omutabani Yonasaani ku bafiire? 
2Samuel1:6 Ogwo mutsigazi owaabaire naamubikira yaagira ati: Ku mbaire niinyegyendera, naahika aha kibungo Giliboa, naareeba Saulo ayegamiire eicumu rye; kandi naareeba ab'ebigaari n'ab'embaraasi bamubingire bamuhambize." 
2Samuel1:7 Ku agarwire amaisho enyima, yandeeba, yaanyeta, naanye naamwetaba nti: Ndi aha, Nyakusinga!" 
2Samuel1:8 Yambuuza ati: Ori oha? Naamugarukamu nti: Ndi Omuamaleki. 
2Samuel1:9 Yangira ati: Mpika haihi, onyite; ahakuba nyine obusaasi bwingi, kandi tinkakabire." 
2Samuel1:10 Ntyo naamuhika haihi, naamwita, ahakuba mmanyiire kimwe ku atari w'okukira yaagwire; bwanyima naamucwijura ekirunga ky'aha mutwe gwe n'engoro ebaire emuri aha mukono; mbwenu mbibi, mbikureeteire, mukama wangye." 
2Samuel1:11 Daudi yaataagura emyenda ye, n'abashaija boona abu yaabaire aine baakora batyo." 
2Samuel1:12 Baacura nibaborooga, baayesiibyakwo okuhitsya omu mwabazyo, ahabwa Saulo n'omutabani Yonasaani, n'ahabw'abantu ba MUKAMA n'enju ya Israeli okumarwa rurara." 
2Samuel1:13 Daudi yaabuuza omutsigazi owaamubikira ati: Nooruga hi? Onu ati: Ndi omwana w'omunyaihanga, Omuamaleki." 
2Samuel1:14 Daudi ati: Kirugire hi iwe okutatiina kubanga omukono kwita ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta? 
2Samuel1:15 Daudi yaayeta omwe aha batsigazi, yaamugira ati: Irooko omuhikye haihi, omugurukire. Yaamucumita, yaafa." 
2Samuel1:16 Daudi yaamugira ati: Orubanja rw'eshagama yaawe rube niiwe rwabaho, ahabw'okuba akanwa kaawe niko mushinja ku waahamya noogira oti: Nyitsire ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta." 
2Samuel1:17 Bwanyima Daudi yaacurira Saulo n'omutabani Yonasaani n'ekyoshongoro eki," 
2Samuel1:18 (kandi yaaragiira kukyegyesa Abayuda; reeba kihandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Yashari.) naagira ati: 
2Samuel1:19 Ai bambe Israeli, ekitiinisa kyawe kiitiirwe aha bibungo byawe. Amamanzi ka gagwire!" 
2Samuel1:20 Mutakigamba omuri Gaasi; Mutakibuzya omu mihanda ya Ashikelooni, Abaishiki b'Abafilistia bakeesima, N'abaishiki b'abatashazirwe bakeehimbisa." 
2Samuel1:21 Imwe ebibungo bya Giliboa, Mutatondwaho orume, mukaguubwaho enjura, N'obu kwakuba okugira emisiri y'empongano! Ahakuba okwo niyo engabo y'emanzi enagirwe kubi, Engabo ya Saulo, nk'otarashukirweho majuta." 
2Samuel1:22 Obuta bwa Yonasaani bukaba butagaruka nyima Kuruga aha shagama y'abaitsirwe, n'aha mamanzi ebikaaka; Kandi rurara ya Saulo ekaba etagaruka busha." 
2Samuel1:23 Saulo na Yonasaani bakaba bari barungi kandi abarikukundwa bakiriho, N'omu kufa kwabo tibataanisiibwe. Bakaba barahuka okukira empungu, Kandi baine amaani okukira entare." 
2Samuel1:24 Imwe abaishiki ba Israeli mucurire Saulo, Owaabaire abajweka emyenda ya karari erikunekaneka, Akahunda emyenda yaanyu ezaabu." 
2Samuel1:25 Amamanzi ka gagwire Ahagati y'orugamba! Yonasaani aitiirwe aha bibungo byawe. 
2Samuel1:26 Ninshaasha munonga ahabwawe, mwene waitu Yonasaani; Okaba onshemeza munonga. Okukunda kwawe ahariinye kukaba kuri okw'okutangaaza, Okukira okukunda kw'abakazi." 
2Samuel1:27 Amamanzi ka gagwire, N'eby'okurwanisa ka bicwekyereire!" 
2Samuel2:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari MUKAMA naagira ati; Nyinamukye omu rurembo rumwe aha ndembo za Yuda? MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Inamuka. Daudi yaamubuuza ati: Nyinamukye omuri ruuha? Yaamugarukamu ati: Omuri Heburooni. 
2Samuel2:2 Atyo Daudi yainamukayo n'abakazi be bombi, Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli, na Abigaili owaabaire ari muka Nabali owa Karumeeli." 
2Samuel2:3 Kandi Daudi yainamuka n'abantu abu yaabaire aine, buri muntu n'ab'omu ka ye; baatuura omu ndembo za Heburooni." 
2Samuel2:4 Abayuda baija, baashukiraho okwo Daudi amajuta kuba omugabe w'enju ya Yuda. Bwanyima baagambira Daudi ngu, Aba Yabeshi-gileadi nibo baziikire Saulo." 
2Samuel2:5 Daudi nikwo kubatumaho entumwa naabagira ati: MUKAMA abahe omugisha, ahabw'okuba mugiriire mukama waanyu Saulo embabazi, mwamuziika." 
2Samuel2:6 Mbwenu MUKAMA abagirire embabazi, kandi abakorere eby'obwesigwa; naanye ndabazimuurira ahabw'eby'embabazi ebyo ebi mukozire." 
2Samuel2:7 N'ahabw'ekyo emikono yaanyu egire amaani, mube amamanzi; ahakuba Saulo mukama waanyu afiire, kandi ab'enju ya Yuda banshukireho amajuta kuba omugabe waabo." 
2Samuel2:8 Omu bunaku obwo Abuneeri mwene Neeri, omukuru w'engabo za Saulo, akaba atwaire Isheboshesi, mwene Saulo, amwambukize Mahanaimu," 
2Samuel2:9 amwemekire kuba omugabe wa Gileadi na Ashura na Yezereeli na Efuraimu na Benyamiini na Israeli yoona. 
2Samuel2:10 Kandi Isheboshesi mwene Saulo akaba ahikize emyaka makumi ana obu yaaza aha ngoma kutegyeka Israeli, yaamara aha ngoma emyaka ebiri. Kwonka enju ya Yuda yaakurata Daudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Omwanya ogu Daudi yaamazire Heburooni ari aha ngoma naategyeka enju ya Yuda gukahika emyaka mushanju n'ameezi mukaaga. 
2Samuel2:12 Bwanyima Abuneeri mwene Neeri, n'abagaragwa ba Isheboshesi mwene Saulo, baaruga Mahanaimu, baaza Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:13 Na Yoabu mwene Zeruiya n'abagaragwa ba Daudi baashohora, baabugabugana nabo aha kiyanja kya Gibeoni; abamwe baashutama seeri yaacyo, abandi seenu." 
2Samuel2:14 Abuneeri yaagira Yoabu ati: Abatsigazi baimukye, batuzaanire. Yoabu yaamugarukamu ati: Nibaimukye." 
2Samuel2:15 Batyo baimuka, baayambuka, baababara; ab'orubaju rwa Benyamiini na Isheboshesi mwene Saulo baaba ikumi na babiri, kandi ab'orubaju rwa Daudi nabo baaba ikumi na babiri." 
2Samuel2:16 Buri omwe yaagwa omuzigu we omu maraka, yaamutimbura rurara omu rubaju; boona baagwera kyarimwe, baafa. Nikyo omwanya ogwo gwayeteirwe Helukasi-hazurimu, oguri haihi na Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:17 Eryo izooba orugamba rwaba orw'amaani munonga; Abuneeri n'abashaija ba Israeli baasingurwa abagaragwa ba Daudi. 
2Samuel2:18 Kandi batabani ba Zeruiya bonshatu, Yoabu, Abishai na Asaheeli, bakaba bariyo; kandi Asaheeli ogwo akaba atarikwiruka, akaba ari esirabo." 
2Samuel2:19 Bwanyima Asaheeli yaakurata Abuneeri amubingire; kandi omu kumubinga tiyaareeba ha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho kuteishuka Abuneeri. 
2Samuel2:20 Abuneeri ku yaareebire enyima, yaagira ati: Biri niiwe, Asaheeli? Onu ati: Niinye." 
2Samuel2:21 Abuneeri yaamugira ati: Kikaama, otoore aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho, okwate omwe aha batsigazi, obe niwe waanyaga eby'okurwanisa. Kwonka Asaheeli yaayanga kumurugaho." 
2Samuel2:22 Abuneeri yaagaruka yaagira Asaheeri ati: Toora ahandi orekye kunkurata; mbwenu ku naakucumita, naakutuura aha, okaazira ki? Kandi nkaareebana nta na Yoabu mwene sho?" 
2Samuel2:23 Nabwo hoona yaayanga kumurugaho; nikyo Abuneeri yaamuteereire omuhunda gw'eicumu rye aha nda, gukamwogamu, akeetuura ahansi, akagwaho; kandi abantu boona ku baabaire bahika ahu Asaheeli yaabaire agwire, beemereraho." 
2Samuel2:24 Kwonka Yoabu na Abishai baagyenda, babingire Abuneeri; eizooba ku ryabaire nirirengarenga, baahika aha kibungo Amma ekishungaine na Giya omu muhanda ogurikuza omu ihamba rya Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Ababenyamiini baayeteeranira ahari Abuneeri, baaba omutwe gumwe, baayemerera aha mutwe gw'ekibungo." 
2Samuel2:26 Bwanyima Abuneeri yaayeta Yoabu, yaamubuuza ati: Rurara eryaguma neerya busha obutoosha? Torikumanya omuheru gw'ekyo ku guriba okushaarira? Mbwenu oryahitsya hi okutaragiira bantu baawe kureka kukuratirira beene waabo?" 
2Samuel2:27 Yoabu yaamugarukamu ati: Nindahira Ruhanga otahwaho, kuri noogira ngu tiwaagamba ekyo kigambo, buzimazima abantu baaba nibaija kuseesa ekiro, buri muntu akuratiriire mwene ishe." 
2Samuel2:28 Atyo Yoabu yaateera enzamba, abantu boona baayemerera, tibaagumizamu kukuratirira Abaisraeli, n'obu kwakuba okubarwanisa obundi." 
2Samuel2:29 Abuneeri n'engabo ze baagyenda ekiro kyona, baaraba omuri Araba, baayambuka Yorudani, baahika Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Yoabu yaatabaaruka, yaareka kukuratirira Abuneeri; ku yaaherize kuteeranira abantu boona hamwe, yaashanga omu bagaragwa ba Daudi nihaburamu abantu ikumi na mwenda, otabariiremu Asaheeli." 
2Samuel2:31 Kwonka abagaragwa ba Daudi bakaba baitsire omu Babenyamiini engabo za Abuneeri magana ashatu na makumi mukaaga. 
2Samuel2:32 Bwanyima baatwara Asaheeli, baamuziika Betelehemu omu kituuro kya ishe. Kandi Yoabu, n'engabo ze baaraara nibagyenda, bwasheesha baahika Heburooni." 
2Samuel3:1 Bwanyima haabaho obweme buhango ahagati y'enju ya Saulo n'eya Daudi; kwonka Daudi yaaguma naayeyongyera amaani, enju ya Daulo yo yaagyenda neehwa amaani." 
2Samuel3:2 Kandi Daudi yaazaarira Heburooni abaana b'aboojo; ow'omujigaijo akaba ari Amunooni, ou yaazaire ahari Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli;" 
2Samuel3:3 owa kabiri Kileaba owa Abigaili, owaabaire ari muka Nabali owa Karumeeli; owa kashatu Abusalomu ou yaazaire ahari Maaka omuhara wa Talumai, omugabe wa Geshuri;" 
2Samuel3:4 owa kana Adoniya mutabani wa Hagisi; owa kataano Shefatia mutabani wa Abitaali; 
2Samuel3:5 kandi owa mukaaga akaba ari Itereamu owa Egula muka Daudi. Abo boona nibo Daudi yaazaariire Heburooni. 
2Samuel3:6 Obweme ku bwabaire bukiri ahagati y'enju ya Saulo n'eya Daudi, Abuneeri yaayehindura ow'amaani omu nju ya Saulo." 
2Samuel3:7 Omu bunaku obwo hakaba hariho omukazi orikwetwa Rizipa, muhara wa Ayiya, owaabaire ari omukazi wa Saulo w'ekinyanshunju. Eizooba rimwe Isheboshesi yaagira Abuneeri ati: Ahabw'enki otembire ekitabo kya muka tata?" 
2Samuel3:8 Okuruga aho Abuneeri yaagira ekiniga ahabw'ebigambo ebi Isheboshesi yaamugambira, yaamugarukamu ati: Beitu shi onyetsire omutwe gw'embwa y'Abayuda? Okuhitsya hati ninkiha enju ya sho Saulo ekitiinisa, na beene ishe na bagyenzi be, kandi tinkakuhayoga mu mikono ya Daudi; haza eri izooba oza kuntaho ekibi ky'okuraara n'ogwo mukazi?" 
2Samuel3:9 Nyowe Abuneeri, ku ndaabe ntakoreire Daudi nk'oku MUKAMA yaamurahiire," 
2Samuel3:10 nkaiha obugabe aha nju ya Saulo, nkata Daudi aha kitebe ky'obugabe, akategyeka Israeli na Yuda, okuruga Daani okuhika Beeri-sheba, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho." 
2Samuel3:11 Isheboshesi tiyaabaasa kugarukamu Abuneeri kigambo kyona, ahabw'okumutiina." 
2Samuel3:12 Bwanyima Abuneeri yaatuma entumwa ahari Daudi, ari Heburooni, naagira ati: Mukama w'ensi egi n'oha? Ragaana naanye endagaano, nkwatanise naiwe, nkukubuurire Israeli yoona." 
2Samuel3:13 Daudi yaamugarukamu ati: Ni kirungi; niinyija kuragaana naiwe endagaano; kwonka eki ndikwenda ahariiwe ni kimwe. Omanye ku otarincwa ryera, kureka biri waabanza kundeetera Mikaali muhara wa Saulo, oizire kundeeba." 
2Samuel3:14 Bwanyima Daudi yaatuma entumwa ahari Isheboshesi mwene Saulo, naagira ati: Mpa omukazi wangye Mikaali, ou naajugire ebishushu igana by'Abafilistia." 
2Samuel3:15 Isheboshesi nikwo kumutuma, akamwaka iba Palutieli, mwene Laishi." 
2Samuel3:16 Kwonka iba yaagyenda naarira omuhanda gwona, amukuratiire, okuhitsya obu baahikire Bahurimu. Abuneeri yaamugira ati: Garukayo. Onu yaagarukayo." 
2Samuel3:17 Bwanyima Abuneeri yaagira enaama n'abakuru ba Israeli, naagira ati: Obunaku obwahingwire, mukaba nimwenda Daudi ngu abe omugabe waanyu." 
2Samuel3:18 Mbwenu mukikore; ahakuba MUKAMA akaraganisa Daudi naagira ati: Omukono gw'omugaragwa wangye Daudi nigwo ndijunisa abantu bangye Israeli okuruga omu mikono y'Abafilistia, n'okuruga omu mikono y'abazigu baabo boona." 
2Samuel3:19 Abuneeri yaagaruka yaabigambira Ababenyamiini; kandi yaaza Heburooni kugambira Daudi byona ebi Israeli n'ab'enju ya Benyamiini yoona basiimire kukora. 
2Samuel3:20 Atyo Abuneeri n'abashaija makumi abiri baashanga Daudi Heburooni. Daudi yaateekyera Abuneeri obugyenyi n'abashaija abu yaabaire aine. 
2Samuel3:21 Abuneeri yaagira Daudi ati: Niinyija kwimuka, nteeranire Abaisraeli boona ahari mukama wangye omu gabe, baragaane naiwe endagaano, obone kutegyeka abu omutima gwawe gurikwenda boona. Atyo Daudi yaayohereza Abuneeri; yaagyenda n'obusingye." 
2Samuel3:22 Ago maguru abagaragwa ba Daudi na Yoabu, abaabaire bahurwire, baatabaaruka n'eminyago mingi; kwonka baashanga Abuneeri atakiri na Daudi, ahakuba akaba yaamwohereize, yayengyendeire n'obusingye." 
2Samuel3:23 Yoabu ku yaahikire aho, naatabaaruka n'engabo ze zoona ezi yaabaire aine, baamugira bati: Abuneeri mwene Neeri aizire ow'omugabe; yaamwohereza, yaagyenda n'obusingye." 
2Samuel3:24 Atyo Yoabu yaaza ow'omugabe, yaamubuuza ati: Eki okozire ki? Abuneeri mwene okwija owaawe, okamureka akagyenda?" 
2Samuel3:25 Omanyire kimwe Abuneeri mwene Neeri ku aizire kukubeihabeiha, n'okukutata ngu amanye oku ohurura n'oku otabaaruka, n'okwetegyereza ebi orikukora byona." 
2Samuel3:26 Yoabu ku yaarugire owa Daudi kutabaara, yaatuma entumwa, zaakurata Abuneeri, zaamugarurira aha iziba rya Siira; kwonka Daudi atarikukimanya." 
2Samuel3:27 Abuneeri ku yaagarukire Heburooni, Yoabu yaamutwara hangahari omu irembo ahagati, ngu agambe nawe omu mubonano; ku baahikireho, yaamuteera aha nda, yaamugwisaho naamuhoorera eshagama y'omurumuna Asaheeli." 
2Samuel3:28 Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaagira ati: Nyowe n'engoma yangye titurigiibwaho rubanja rw'eshagama ya Abuneeri mwene Neeri omu maisho ga Ruhanga okuhitsya ebiro byona." 
2Samuel3:29 Kureka ruryaguma ahari Yoabu n'aha ka ya ishe; kandi eka ye teribura kubamu orikurugwamu amahira, nari omubembe, nari okugyendera aha kibango, nari ow'okwitwa rurara, nari omukuuhuzi." 
2Samuel3:30 Okwo nikwo Yoabu na Abishai baitsire Abuneeri, nibamuhoorera murumuna waabu ou yaitiire omu rugamba rwa Gibeoni." 
2Samuel3:31 Bwanyima Daudi yaagambira Yoabu n'abantu boona abu yaabaire aine ati: Mutaagurre ebijwaro byanyu, mwezirikye ebiguniya, mucurire Abuneeri. Kandi omugabe Daudi yaagyenda akuratiire akatanda." 
2Samuel3:32 Baaziika Abuneeri Heburooni; omugabe yaimutsya eiraka rye, yaacurira aha kituuro kya Abuneeri; n'abantu boona baacura." 
2Samuel3:33 Omugabe yaacurira Abuneeri, naagira ati: Abuneeri akaafiire nk'omushema?" 
2Samuel3:34 Emikono yaawe tebohirwe N'ebigyere byawe tibikomirwe na byoma; Nk'omuntu oku agwa omu maisho g'ababi, Naiwe nikwo ofiire. N'abantu boona baagaruka baamucurira." 
2Samuel3:35 Bwanyima abantu boona baija kweshengyereza Daudi kurya ak'okurya bukiri kare; kwonka yaarahira naagira ati: Ku ndaarye aha mugaati nari ekindi kyona, izooba ritakarengire, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho." 
2Samuel3:36 Abantu boona baakyetegyereza, kyabashemeza; kandi ebi omugabe yaabaire akora byona bikaba bishemeza abantu boona." 
2Samuel3:37 N'ahabw'ekyo aha izooba eryo abantu boona n'Abaisraeli boona baamanya ku kitarugire ha mugabe kwita Abuneeri mwene Neeri. 
2Samuel3:38 Omugabe yaagira abagaragwa be ati: Ebyo nimumanya hati omuri Israeli ku hafiiremu omunyiginya, kandi obaire ari omushaija rugambwa?" 
2Samuel3:39 Kandi nyowe, n'obu ndaabe ndi omugabe oshukirweho amajuta, kwonka ndi busha; n'abashaija aba, batabani ba Zeruiya, bagumire, tindikubabaasa. MUKAMA azimuurire enkozi y'ebibi nk'obubi bwayo oku buri." 
2Samuel4:1 Bwanyima Isheboshesi mwene Saulo ku yaahurire ngu Abuneeri agwire Heburooni, emikono ye yaahwa amaani, n'Abaisraeli boona baashoberwa." 
2Samuel4:2 Kandi Isheboshesi ogwo mutabani wa Saulo akaba aine abakuru b'engabo ze babiri; omwe akaba naayetwa Baana, n'ondiijo ari Rekabu, beene Rimona owa Beeroosi, ow'omu ruganda rwa Benyamiini; (ahakuba Beeroosi ekaba neebarirwa ahari Benyamiini;" 
2Samuel4:3 kandi aba Beeroosi bakahungira Gitaimu, baashuhuukirayo n'okuhitsya hati)." 
2Samuel4:4 Kandi Yonasaani mwene Saulo akaba aine omwana oremaire ebigyere. Obu omubiki yaaruga Yezereeli kubika Saulo na Yonasaani, ogwo mwana akaba ahikize emyaka etaano. Omurezi we yaamubakura, yaahunga; ku yaabaire nairuka nawe naahunga, yaamusyoka omu mikono, yaagwa ahansi, yaaremara. Eiziina ry'ogwo mwana akaba naayetwa Mefiboshesi." 
2Samuel4:5 Eizooba rimwe beene Rimona owa Beeroosi, Rekabu na Baana bakaija, baahika owa Isheboshesi omu ihangwe, baashanga abyami ahuumwireho;" 
2Samuel4:6 kandi omurinzi w'enju owaabaire naashemeza engano, baashanga yaakwatwa oturo, yaagwejegyera. N'ahabw'ekyo Rekabu na Baana omurumuna baataahamu." 
2Samuel4:7 Ku baahikire omu nju, baashanga Isheboshesi abyami aha kitanda kye omu kishengye ky'okuraaramu, baamucumita, baamwita, baamutemaho omutwe. Baagutwara, baagyenda ekiro kyona nibatoora omuhanda ogw'omuri Araba." 
2Samuel4:8 Ogwo mutwe gwa Isheboshesi baagutwarira Daudi Heburooni, baagira omugabe bati: Ngugu omutwe gwa Isheboshesi mwene Saulo omuzigu waawe, owaabaire akuhiiga kukwita. Eri izooba MUKAMA yaahoorera mukama waitu omugabe Saulo n'oruzaaro rwe." 
2Samuel4:9 Daudi yaagarukamu, naagira Rekabu na Baana omurumuna beene Rimona owa Beeroosi, ati: Nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, owaakirize amagara gangye omu kabi koona," 
2Samuel4:10 obu omuntu yaija, akangira ati: Reeba, Saulo afiire; akaba naagira ngu andeeteire enkuru nungu; ahonaaho naamukwata, naamwita Zikulaagi; ebyo nibyo bihembo ebi naamuhaire ahabw'enkuru ze." 
2Samuel4:11 Mbwenu shi, nk'abantu babi abaitira ohikiriire omu nju ye abyami aha kitanda, nimugira ngu tindikwija kubahoorera eshagama ye, nkabacwekyereza, nkabaiha omu nsi, okukira ogwo?" 
2Samuel4:12 Bwanyima Daudi yaaragiira abatsigazi be, baabaita, baabatemaho engaro n'ebigyere, baabahanika aha rubaju rw'eiziba rya Heburooni. Kandi omutwe gwa Isheboshesi baagutwara, baaguziika omu kituuro kya Abuneeri Heburooni." 
2Samuel5:1 Bwanyima enganda zoona eza Israeli zaashanga Daudi Heburooni; zaamugira ziti: Reeba, turi abaanyu ab'aha mara." 
2Samuel5:2 Omu biro ebyahingwire, obu Saulo yaabaire ari omugabe waitu, niiwe waabaire oyebembera Abaisraeli nibahurura kandi nibatabaaruka; kandi MUKAMA akakugira ati: Niiwe oririisa abantu bangye Israeli, kandi niiwe oriba omugabe waabo." 
2Samuel5:3 Batyo abakuru ba Israeli boona baashanga omugabe Daudi Heburooni; kandi okwo niyo yaaraganiire nabo endagaano omu maisho ga MUKAMA, bakamushukaho amajuta kuba omugabe wa Israeli." 
2Samuel5:4 Kandi Daudi, obu yaaza aha ngoma, akaba ahikize emyaka makumi ashatu, yaamara emyaka makumi ana ari aha ngoma." 
2Samuel5:5 Omuri Heburooni akamaramu emyaka mushanju n'ameezi mukaaga naategyeka Yuda; kandi omuri Yerusaalemu yaamaramu emyaka makumi ashatu n'eshatu, naategyeka Israeli yoona na Yuda." 
2Samuel5:6 Bwanyima omugabe yaimuka n'engabo ze, baaza Yerusaalemu, baarwanisa aba Yebusi, abatuuzi b'omuri egyo nsi, abaagizire Daudi bati: Ku oriba otamazireho mpumi n'ebirema, torihika aha; ahabw'okuba bakaba niba teekateeka ngu Daudi tarikubaasa kuhikayo." 
2Samuel5:7 N'obu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, Daudi akakwata ekigo kya Saayuuni, nirwo rurembo rwa Daudi." 
2Samuel5:8 Kandi ahari eryo izooba Daudi akaba agizire ati: Orikwenda kuteera aba Yebusi, atembe ahu amaizi garikwerekyerera, abone kwita biri birema n'empumi, ebi Daudi arikwanga. Nikyo bagirira bati: Empumi n'ebirema bitaritaaha omu nju." 
2Samuel5:9 Atyo Daudi yaatuura omuri ekyo kigo, yaakyeta orurembo rwa Daudi. Yaakyombekaho amaju okukyehinguririza, okuruga Miilo n'okugaruka omunda." 
2Samuel5:10 Daudi yaaguma naayeyongyera kugira ekitiinisa; ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe akaba ari hamwe nawe. 
2Samuel5:11 Bwanyima Hiraamu omugabe wa Tuuro yaayohereza entumwa ahari Daudi n'ebiti by'emyereezi, n'ababaizi n'abarikwombekyesa amabaare; baayombekyera Daudi enju." 
2Samuel5:12 Daudi yaamanyira aho ku MUKAMA amuhamize kuba omugabe wa Israeli, kandi ku aimukize obugabe bwe ahabw'abantu be Israeli." 
2Samuel5:13 Daudi ku yaarugire Heburooni, yaahika Yerusaalemu, yaashwererayo ebindi binyanshunju n'abandi bakazi; kandi baamuzaarira abandi baana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
2Samuel5:14 Aga nigo maziina g'abaana abu baamuzaariire ari Yerusaalemu– Shamua, Shobabu, Nasani, Sulemaani," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibuhaari, Elishua, Nefegi, Yafia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishaama, Eliada na Elifeleti." 
2Samuel5:17 Abafilistia ku baahuriire ngu Daudi ashukirweho amajuta kuba omugabe w'Abaisraeli, boona baimuka, baaza kusherura Daudi. Daudi ku yaabihuriire, yaashuuma, yaaza omu kigo." 
2Samuel5:18 Omu bunaku obwo Abafilistia bakaba baizire, bajanjaire oruhita rw'Abareefa rwona." 
2Samuel5:19 Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari MUKAMA naabuuza ati: Nyinamukye, ndwane n'Abafilistia? Noija kubahayo omu mikono yangye? MUKAMA yaagarukamu Daudi ati: Inamuka, ahakuba buzimazima niinyija kuhayo Abafilistia omu mikono yaawe." 
2Samuel5:20 Atyo Daudi yaaza Baali-peraziimu, yaabaitirayo. Bwanyima yaagira ati: MUKAMA ahigwire abazigu bangye omu maisho gangye, nk'oku amizi gahigura omucungiro. Nikyo yaayeteire ogwo mwanya Baali-peraziimu." 
2Samuel5:21 Abafilistia baatsigayo ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa, Daudi n'abashaija be baabitwara." 
2Samuel5:22 Ku haahingwire ebiro, Abafilistia baagaruka bainamuka, baajanjaara oruhita rw'Abareefa." 
2Samuel5:23 Daudi ku yaayehanwize ahari MUKAMA, MUKAMA yaamugarukamu ati: Otainamukayo; kureka obakiikuukye, obareetwe enyima ahashungaine n'akabira k'emitugunda." 
2Samuel5:24 Bwanyima ku oraahurire enshwagara aha mitwe y'emitugunda, ahonaaho oyehuute, ahabw'okuba obwo MUKAMA naaba akwebembeire kuteera engabo z'Abafilistia." 
2Samuel5:25 Daudi yaatwaza nk'oku MUKAMA yaamuragiira, yaagyenda naita Abafilistia okuruga Geeba, okuhika Gezeri." 
2Samuel6:1 Daudi yaagaruka yaateerana engabo zoona ezitoorainwe omuri Israeli, abantu obukumi bushatu." 
2Samuel6:2 Yaimuka, yaagyenda n'ezo ngabo zoona ezi yaabaire aine, baaza Baale eya Yuda, kwihayo eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, erikwetererwa Eiziina rya MUKAMA ow'amahe, oshutama ahari baakerubi." 
2Samuel6:3 Baatwarira eshanduukye ya Ruhanga aha kigaari kisya; baagiiha omu ka ya Abinadabu eyaabaire eri aha kibungo; kandi Uzaa na Ahio batabani ba Abinadabu nibo baabaire nibatwara ekyo kigaari kisya," 
2Samuel6:4 ekyabaire kiriho eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, Ahio agyebembeire." 
2Samuel6:5 Daudi n'ab'enju ya Israeli boona baagyenda nibashemererwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA, nibeeshongora n'amaani gaabo goona, nibateera endingiri, n'enanga n'engarabi n'amataari n'ebitaasa." 
2Samuel6:6 Ku baahikire aha mbuga ya Nakoni, Uzza yaatayo omukono gwe, yaaramira eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba ente zikateera entsibo." 
2Samuel6:7 MUKAMA yaagirira Uzaa ekiniga; Ruhanga yaamwitira aho, naamutura okuramira eshanduukye n'omukono gwe; yaafeera aho aha rubaju rw'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga." 
2Samuel6:8 Daudi yaaguubwa kubi ahabwa MUKAMA kugwa ahari Uzaa; omwanya ogwo yaagweta Pereezi-uzaa, n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Samuel6:9 Eryo izooba Daudi yaatiina MUKAMA, yaagira ati: Mbwenu eshanduukye ya MUKAMA neebaasa eta kuza owangye?" 
2Samuel6:10 N'ahabwe'ekyo Daudi yaayanga kwihayo eshanduukye ya MUKAMA kugitwara owe omu rurembo rwa Daudi; yaagikiikamya, yaagitaasya omu nju ya Obededomu owa Gaasi." 
2Samuel6:11 Eshanduukye ya MUKAMA yaamara ameezi ashatu omu nju ya Obededamu owa Gaasi; MUKAMA yaamuha omugisha n'ab'omu ka ye boona. 
2Samuel6:12 Bwanyima baagambira omugabe Daudi bati: MUKAMA ahaire eka ya Obededamu omugisha n'ebi aine byona ahabw'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga. N'ahabw'ekyo Daudi yaagyenda, yaiha eshanduukye ya Ruhanga omu nju ya Obededamu, yaagiinamura omu rurembo rwa Daudi n'okushemererwa." 
2Samuel6:13 Oku nikwo byatwaziibwe; abaheekire eshanduukye ya MUKAMA ku baagyenzireho entambwe mukaaga, Daudi yaatambiraho enimi y'ekimasha n'enyana y'ebishaju." 
2Samuel6:14 Daudi yaayemurikira omu maisho ga MUKAMA n'amaani ge goona, ayezirikire efodi ya kitaani." 
2Samuel6:15 Atyo Daudi n'ab'enju ya Israeli boona bainamura eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, nibateera akaari n'amakondere." 
2Samuel6:16 Bwanyima eshanduukye ya MUKAMA ku yaabaire neetaaha omu rurembo rwa Daudi, Mikaali muhara wa Saulo yaaringuririza omu dirisa, yaareeba omugabe Daudi naayemurika kandi naazinira omu maisho ga MUKAMA, yamugayira aha mutima." 
2Samuel6:17 Baataasya eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, baagita omu mwanya gwayo omu ihema eri Daudi agiteereireho; Daudi yaatamba ebitambo by'okwotsya n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
2Samuel6:18 Kandi ku yaaherize kutamba ebyo bitambo by'okwotsya n'ezo mpongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, yaashabira abantu omugisha omu iziina rya MUKAMA ow'amahe," 
2Samuel6:19 yaagaburira abantu boona, ab'eihanga ryona erya Israeli, abashaija n'abakazi, buri muntu omugaati, entongo y'enyama n'omwate gw'emizaabibu eyomire. Okuruga aho abantu boona baarugayo, buri muntu yaataaha owe." 
2Samuel6:20 Bwanyima Daudi yaagarukayo kushabira ab'omu ka ye omugisha. Mikaali muhara wa Saulo yaashohora kubugana Daudi, yaagira ati: Eshi eri izooba omugabe wa Israeli yaagira ekitiinisa, obu yaaba naayejwekyera busha omu maisho g'abazaana b'abairu be, nk'omuntu otaine ku ari oku ayejweka busha ataine nshoni!" 
2Samuel6:21 Daudi yaagarukamu Mikaali ati: Ekyo naakikorera omu maisho ga MUKAMA owantooraine akanyeshumbya sho n'ab'omu ka ye boona, akangira omugabe w'abantu be Israeli; nikyo ndigumira niinyemurikira omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
2Samuel6:22 Kandi niinyija kwongyera kwehindura orikugaywa okukira aho, n'okwegarura ahansi omu maisho gaawe; kwonka abo bazaana abu waagambaho, bo baryampa ekitiinisa." 
2Samuel6:23 Okuruga aho Mikaali muhara wa Saulo tiyaagira bu azaara okuhitsya aha izooba eri yaafeereireho. 
2Samuel7:1 Atyo omugabe yaaguma omu ka ye, kandi MUKAMA yaamuha okuhuumura abazibu be boona embaju zoona." 
2Samuel7:2 Bwanyima omugabe yaagira nabi Nasani ati: Reeba hati, ndi omu nju y'emyereezi, kwonka eshanduukye ya Ruhanga eri omu ihema." 
2Samuel7:3 Nasani yaagira omugabe ati: Irooko okore ekikuri aha mutima kyona, ahakuba MUKAMA ari hamwe naiwe." 
2Samuel7:4 Ekyo kiro ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaizira Nasani nikigira kiti: 
2Samuel7:5 Irooko ogambire omwiru wangye Daudi oti: MUKAMA naagira ati: Ebyo oryanyombekyera enju y'okutaahamu? 
2Samuel7:6 Noomanya ku ntakatuuragu mu nju, okwiha obu naiha Abaisraeli Misiri n'okuhitsya hati, kureka nkaba ngyendagyenda nintaaha omu ihema." 
2Samuel7:7 Nimugira ngu omu myanya yoona ei naabaire ngyendamu n'Abaisraeli boona, nkaba ndagizire omwe aha baramuzi ba Israeli, abu naaragiire kuriisa abantu bangye Israeli nti: Ahabw'enki mutakanyombekyeraga nju y'emyereezi?" 
2Samuel7:8 N'habw'ekyo ogire omwiru wangye Daudi oti: MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Nkakwiha omu iriisizo nooriisa entaama, ngu nkuhindure omutegyeki w'abantu bangye Israeli," 
2Samuel7:9 kandi nkaba nguma naiwe ahu waabaire oza hoona, ncwekyerereza abazigu baawe omu maisho gaawe; kandi ndyakuha eiziina rikuru nk'ery'abantu rugambwa ab'omu nsi." 
2Samuel7:10 Ndyatooranira abantu bangye Israeli omwanya, mbabyaremu, babone kugira obutaka bw'okutuuramu, obu batariihwamu bundi. Kandi abantu babi tibarigaruka kubaita kubi nk'obunyakare," 
2Samuel7:11 obu naabaire ndagiira abaramuzi kutegyeka abantu bangye Israeli; kandi ndyakuha okuhuumura abazigu baawe boona. N'ekindi, MUKAMA naakugambira ku arikuhindura oruganda." 
2Samuel7:12 Kandi obunaku bwawe ku burihika, waagwejegyera, waashanga baashwenkuru, ndyayemeka omwana waawe ou oryezaarira, akuhungurire, kandi mpamye obugabe bwe." 
2Samuel7:13 Ogwo niwe aryombekyera eiziina ryangye enju; kandi ndyahamya ekitebe ky'obugabe bwe ebiro byona. 
2Samuel7:14 Ndyaba ishe, nawe abe omwana wangye; ku aricumura, ndyamuhanisa enkoni z'abantu, babe nibo baamuteera;" 
2Samuel7:15 kwonka embabazi zangye tizirimurugaho, nk'oku naaziihire ahari Saulo, ou naacwire nkaiha omu maisho gaawe." 
2Samuel7:16 Enju yaawe n'obugabe bwawe biryahamibwa ebiro byona, n'ekitebe ky'obugabe bwawe kiryaba eky'ebiro byona." 
2Samuel7:17 Ebyo bigambo byona n'okwo kworekwa kwona, Nasani yaabiteekyerereza Daudi nk'oku byabaire biri." 
2Samuel7:18 Bwanyima Daudi omugabe yaataaha omu Ihema, yaashutama omu maisho ga MUKAMA, yaagira ati: Niinye oha, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga? Kandi n'enju yangye nikyo ki, iwe okundinda okampitsya aha?" 
2Samuel7:19 Kwonka ekyo ahariiwe ni kikye, MUKAMA Ruhanga; mbwenu waayongyeraho n'okugamba aha by'enju y'omwiru waawe, oku eriba omu biro bingi munonga ebiriija, nk'oku kiba omu biragiro by'abantu, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga." 
2Samuel7:20 Mbwenu shi, ekindi Daudi akugambire ki? Ahabw'okuba noomanya omwiru waawe, MUKAMA Ruhanga." 
2Samuel7:21 Ahabw'endagaano yaawe okakora ebikuru ebyo byona, kubimanyisa omwiru waawe, nk'oku omutima gwawe gwateekateekire." 
2Samuel7:22 Nikyo obeera mukuru, MUKAMA Ruhanga; ahakuba tihariho orikushushana naiwe, kandi tihariho Ruhanga ondiijo kureka Iwe, nk'ebi twahuriire byona oku biri." 
2Samuel7:23 Kandi na ihanga ki omu nsi eriri nk'abantu baawe Israeli, abu Ruhanga yaagiire kwecungurira kuba abantu be, ngu ayetungire eiziina, ahabw'okubakorera ebikuru kandi ebirikutiinisa, naabinga omu maisho gaabo eihanga na baaruhanga baaryo?" 
2Samuel7:24 Bwanyima okeehamiza abantu baawe Israeli, ngu babe eihnaga eri waayetooraniire ebiro byona; naiwe, MUKAMA, okaba Ruhanga waabo." 
2Samuel7:25 Mbwenu hati, MUKAMA Ruhanga, ekigambo eki waagamba aha mwiru waawe n'aha nju ye, okihamye ebiro byona, kandi okore nk'oku waagamba;" 
2Samuel7:26 n'eiziina ryawe riryahimbisibwa ebiro byona, bagire bati: MUKAMA ow'amahe niwe Ruhanga wa Israeli; kandi enju y'omwiru waawe Daudi eryahamibwa omu maisho gaawe." 
2Samuel7:27 Ahakuba Iwe, MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, oshuuruuriire omwiru waawe, noogira oti: Ndyakwombekyera enju; nikyo omwiru waawe agiriire obumanzi bw'okukushaba ebigambo ebi." 
2Samuel7:28 Mbwenu hati, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga, niiwe Ruhanga, n'ebigambo byawe n'eby'amazima, kandi oraganiise omwiru waawe, ekigambo ekyo ekirungi." 
2Samuel7:29 N'ahabw'ekyo hati ikiriza kuha enju y'omwiru waawe omugisha, egumeho ebiro byona omu maisho gaawe, ahakuba niiwe waakigamba, MUKAMA Ruhanga; kandi omugisha gwawe gugume guheebwe enju y'omwiru waawe ebiro byona." 
2Samuel8:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo Daudi yaasingura Abafilistia, yaabamara eishaija, yaiha Mesegama omu mikono yaabo." 
2Samuel8:2 Bwanyima yaasingura Abamoabu, yaabarambika ahansi, yaabagyeresa omuguha; emishorongo ebiri yaaba ey'okwitwa, n'omushorongo gumwe gwaba ogw'okukira. Okuruga aho Abamoabu baahinduka abahuuku ba Daudi, baaguma nibamutoijera." 
2Samuel8:3 Kandi Daudi yaasingura Hadadezeeri mwene Rehobu omugabe wa Zooba, naaza kugarura ensi eyaabaire eri omu bugabe bwe aha mugyera Furaati." 
2Samuel8:4 Daudi yaamunyagaho engabo z'abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi rukumi na magana mushanju, n'abarikugyendesa ebigyere obukumi bubiri; bwanyima Daudi yaatema ebiteega by'embaraasi ezirikukurura ebigaari zoona; kwonka yaatsigaho ezirikubaasa kukurura ebigaari igana." 
2Samuel8:5 Abasiria ba Damasiko ku baizire kuha Hadadezeeri omugabe wa Zooba emikono, Daudi yaabaitamu abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri." 
2Samuel8:6 Bwanyima Daudi yaata emitwe y'abarinzi omuri Siria eya Damasiko; n'Abasiria baahinduka abahuuku ba Daudi, baaguma nibamutoijera Kandi MUKAMA yaaguma naaha Daudi obusinguzi ahu yaabaire aza hoona." 
2Samuel8:7 Daudi yaanyaga engabo z'ezaabu ezi abagaragwa ba Hadadezeeri baabaire baine, yaazitwara Yerusaalemu." 
2Samuel8:8 Kandi omugabe Daudi yaiha emiringa mingi munonga omuri Beeta na Berosai, endembo za Hadadezeri." 
2Samuel8:9 Toi omugabe wa Hamasi ku yaahuriire ngu Daudi asingwire eihe ryaona erya Hadadezeeri," 
2Samuel8:10 yaatuma Yoramu omutabani aha mugabe Daudi kumuramutsya n'okumutabaarutsya ahabw'okurwana na Hadadezeeri n'okumusingura; ahabw'okuba Hadadezeeri akaba atuura naarwana na Toi. Yoramu ogwo yaijana ebintu by'efeeza, eby'ezaabu n'eby'emiringa." 
2Samuel8:11 Ebyo nabyo omugabe Daudi yaabishoroorera MUKAMA hamwe n'efeeza n'ezaabu ebi yaabaire ashorore, abaihire omu mahanga goona agu yaabaire asingwire," 
2Samuel8:12 ebya Siria, ebya Moabu, eby'Abaamoni, eby'Abafilistia, ebya Amaleki, n'eby'eminyago ya Hadadezeeri mwene Rehobu omugabe wa Zooba." 
2Samuel8:13 Daudi yaayetungira atyo eiziina. Ku yaabaire naagaruka, yaitura omu ruhita rw'omwonyo Abanyaedomu kakumi n'enkumi munaana." 
2Samuel8:14 Yaata emitwe y'abarinzi omuri Edomu; yaababuzya Edomu yoona; Abanyaedomu boona baahinduka abahuuku be. MUKAMA yaaguma naaha Daudi obusinguzi ahu yaabaire aza goona. 
2Samuel8:15 Atyo Daudi yaategyeka Israeli yoona, kandi yaacwera abantu be boona emanja z'oburyo omu bwinganisa." 
2Samuel8:16 Obwo Yoabu mwene Zeruiya akaba ari omukuru w'eihe, Yehoshafaati mwene Ahiluudi ari omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho;" 
2Samuel8:17 Zadoki mwene Ahitubu na Ahimeleki mwene Abiasaari bari abanyamurwa; Seraaya ari omuhandiiki; 
2Samuel8:18 Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada ari omukuru w'aba Keresi n'aba Pelesi; kandi batabani ba Daudi bari abategyeki bakuru. 
2Samuel9:1 Bwanyima Daudi yaabuuza ati: Ebyo haine owaatsigaireho omu nju ya Saulo, nkamukorera eby'embabazi ahabwa Yonasaani?" 
2Samuel9:2 Omu biro ebyo hakaba hariho omuheereza ow'omu nju ya Saulo orikwetwa Ziiba; baamwetera Daudi omugae, yaamubuuza ati: Niiwe Ziiba? Onu ati: Niinye omwiru waawe." 
2Samuel9:3 Omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Omu nju ya Saulo haine okiriho nkamukorera eby'embabazi za Ruhanga? Ziiba yaamugarukamu ati: Hakiriho mutabani wa Yonasaani, oremaire ebigyere." 
2Samuel9:4 Omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Arahi? Ziiba yaamugarukamu ati: Ari Lodebaari omu nju ya Makiri mwene Amieli. 
2Samuel9:5 Omugabe Daudi nikwo kutuma, bakamwiha Lodebaari omu nju ya Makiri mwene Amieli." 
2Samuel9:6 Atyo Mefiboshesi mwene Yonasaani, mwijukuru wa Saulo yaija owa Daudi, yaajuumara omu maisho ge, yaamutangirira. Daudi yaamugira ati: Mefioshesi! Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Omwiru waawe ari aha." 
2Samuel9:7 Daudi yaamugira ati: Otatiina, ahabw'okuba buzimazima niinyija kukukorera eby'embabazi ahabwa Yonasaani sho, nkugarurire ebibanja bya shwenkuru byona; kandi oryaguma nooriira aha meeza yangye obutoosha." 
2Samuel9:8 Mefiboshesi yaagaruka yaamwinamira, yaagira ati: omwiru waawe ni kintu ki, iwe okuunyetaho, nyowe embwa efiire?" 
2Samuel9:9 Bwanyima omugabe yaayeta Ziiba omuheereza wa Saulo, yaamugira ati: Ebyabaire biri ebya Saulo byona n'eby'ab'omu ka ye boona, naabiha mutabani wa mukama waawe." 
2Samuel9:10 Kandi iwe na batabani baawe n'abairu baawe mugume mumuhingire emisiri, mumureetere ebyezire, mutabani wa mukama waawe abone kutunga eby'okurya; kwonka Mefiboshesi mutabani wa mukama waawe aryaguma naariira aha meeza yangye obutoosha. Kandi Ziiba ogwo akaba aine abatabani ikumi na bataano, n'abairu makumi abiri." 
2Samuel9:11 Ziiba yaagira omugabe ati: Ebi Nyakusinga omugabe yaaragiira omwiru we byona, omwiru we nikwo araagume naabitwaza. Okuruga aho Mefiboshesi yaaguma naariira aha meeza y'omugabe, nk'omwana w'omugabe." 
2Samuel9:12 Kandi Mefiboshesi akaba aine omutabani muto orikwetwa Miika; ab'omu ka ya Ziiba boona bakaba bari abairu ba Mefiboshesi. 
2Samuel9:13 Atyo Mefiboshesi yaaguma Yerusaalemu, ahakuba akaba ariira aha meeza y'omugabe obutoosha; kandi akaba aremaire ebigyere byombi." 
2Samuel10:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo omugabe w'Abaamoni yaafa, omutabani Hanuni yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Samuel10:2 Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaagira ati: Niinyija kukorera gye Hanuni mwene Nahashi, nk'oku ishe yankoreire gye. Atyo Daudi yaayohereza abagaragwa be kumuyaagira ahabw'okufeerwa ishe. Abagaragwa ba Daudi baahika omu nsi y'Abaamoni." 
2Samuel10:3 Kwonka abategyeki b'Abaamoni baagira Hanuni mukama waabo bati: Noogira ngu Daudi okukwoherereza ab'okukuyaagira n'okuha sho ekitiinisa? Torikumanya ku Daudi ayohereize abagaragwa be kwetegyereza orurembo n'okurutata, ngu arumareho?" 
2Samuel10:4 N'ahabw'ekyo Hanuni yaakwata abagaragwa ba Daudi, yaabamwa ebireju by'orubaju rumwe, yaahirimburira rwagati ekicweka kya ifo eky'ebijwaro byabo okugarukira aha bibunu, yaaboohereza." 
2Samuel10:5 Ku baabigambiire Daudi, yaayohereza ab'okubabugana, ahabw'okuba bakaba baine enshoni nyingi munonga. Omugabe yaabatumaho ati: Mugume Yeriko okuhitsya obu obureju burikura, mukaija." 
2Samuel10:6 Abaamoni ku baamanyire ngu beetamiise Daudi, baatuma aha Basiria ba Besi-rehobu n'aba Zooba kubagurira ngu babahe engabo ezirikugyendesa ebigyere obukumi bubiri, n'omugabe wa Maaka kureeta engabo rukumi, n'aba Tobu kureeta kakumi n'enkumi ibiri." 
2Samuel10:7 Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaayohereza Yoabu n'eihe ryona ery'amamanzi." 
2Samuel10:8 Abaamoni baashohora, baatenga orugamba aha irembo; kandi Abasiria ba Zooba n'aba Rehobu n'engabo za Tobu na Maaka bakaba bari ahakwabo omu ishwa." 
2Samuel10:9 Yoabu ku yaareebire engabo zimuri omumaisho n'enyima, yaatoorana abashaija entoore omu Baisraeli boona, yaabatengyesa orugamba kurwana n'Abasiria;" 
2Samuel10:10 abandi boona yaabaha omurumuna Abishai, nawe yaabatengyesa orugamba kurwana n'Abaamoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Yaamugira ati: Abasiria ku barankize amaani, oije ompe emikono; kandi naiwe Abaamoni ku baraakukize amaani, naanye niinyija kugikuha." 
2Samuel10:12 Guma omutima, turwane mashaija ahabw'eihanga ryaitu n'ahabw'endembo za Ruhanga waitu; kandi MUKAMA akore eki arikusiima." 
2Samuel10:13 Atyo Yoabu n'engabo ezi yaabaire aine, bairira haihi kurwanisa Abasiria; Abasiria baabahunga." 
2Samuel10:14 Abaamoni ku baareebire Abasiria baahunga, nabo baahunga Abishai, baataaha omu rurembo rwabo. Bwanyima Yoabu yaareka Abaamoni, yaagaruka Yerusaalemu." 
2Samuel10:15 Kwonka Abasiria ku baareebire babingirwe Abaisraeli baayeteerana. 
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezeeri yaatuma aha Basiria abaabaire batwire seeri y'omugyera Furaati baarugayo, baaza Helamu, beebembeirwe Shobaki omukuru w'eihe rya Hadadezeeri." 
2Samuel10:17 Ku baagambiire Daudi, nawe yaateerana Israeli yoona, baayambuka Yorudani, baaza Helamu, Abasiria baatenga orugamba, baarwana na Daudi." 
2Samuel10:18 Abasiria baahunga Abaisraeli, Daudi yaita omu Basiria abantu abarikurwanira aha bigaari magana mushanju, n'ab'aha mbaraasi obukumi buna, kandi baacumita Shobaki omukuru w'eihe ryabo, baamugwisaho." 
2Samuel10:19 Abo bagabe boona abaabaire nibaheereza Hadadezeeri, ku baareebire baasingurwa Abaisraeli, baabeehongyera, baabatabaarira. N'ahabw'ekyo Abasiria baatiina kugaruka kuha Abaamoni emikono." 
2Samuel11:1 Omu kutandika kw'omwaka, omu bunaku obu abagabe baabaire bahururiramu, Daudi akoohereza Yoabu kuhurura n'abagaragwa be n'Abaisraeli, baacwekyereza Abaamoni, bwanyima baagota Rabba. Kwonka Daudi we akaba ayetsigariire Yerusaalemu." 
2Samuel11:2 Eizooba rimwe omu mwabazyo, Daudi yaimuka aha kitanda kye, yaagyendagyenda aha mutwe gwa nyaruju y'omugabe. Ku yaabaire ayemereireho, yaareeba omukazi naayoga; kandi omukazi ogwo akaba ari murungi munonga w'okurigira." 
2Samuel11:3 Daudi yaatuma kumubuuririza. Omuntu omwe yaagira ati: Beitu ogwo ti Batisheba muhara wa Eliamu, muka Uriya Omuhiiti?" 
2Samuel11:4 Daudi yaatuma entumwa, zaamureeta, yaija owe, Daudi yaabyama nawe; ahakuba akaba azirukire; bwanyima yaagaruka omuka." 
2Samuel11:5 Ku haahingwireho ebiro bikye, yaagira enda, yaatuma ahari Daudi ati: Nyine enda." 
2Samuel11:6 N'ahabw'ekyo Daudi yaatuma ahari Yoabu ati: nyoherereza Uriya Omuhiiti. Atyo Yoabu yaamumwoherereza. 
2Samuel11:7 Uriya ku yaahikire Daudi, Daudi yaamubuuza oku Yoabu ari n'engabo ze, n'ahu obweme bwahika." 
2Samuel11:8 Bwanyima Daudi yaamugira ati: Irooko oshuume owaawe, onaabe aha bigyere. Atyo Uriya yaaruga omuri nyaruju y'omugabe, omugabe yaamukuratsa eky'okumufungurira." 
2Samuel11:9 Kwonka Uriya yaabyama aha irembo rya nyaruju hamwe n'abaheereza ba mukama we, tiyaataaha mu ka ye." 
2Samuel11:10 Ku baagambiire Daudi ku Uriya atataahire muka, Daudi yaabuuza Uriya ati: Beitu shi torikuruga omu rugyendo? N'enki ekikuzibiire kutaaha omuka?" 
2Samuel11:11 Uriya yaagarukamu Daudi ati: Eshanduukye ya Ruhanga n'Abaisraeli n'Abayuda nibaraara omu nsiisira; kandi mukama wangye Yoabu n'abagaragwa ba mukama wangye basiisiire omu ishwa. Mbwenu nyowe nze omuka kurya, kunywa n'okuraara n'omukazi wangye? Buso bwawe, ninkurahira tindikwija kukikora." 
2Samuel11:12 Daudi yaagira Uriya ati: Siiba aha n'eri izooba, nyencakare nkuragye ogyende. Atyo Uriya yaasiiba Yerusaalemu eryo izooba n'eryakuratsireho." 
2Samuel11:13 Daudi yaamweta, yaarya, yaanywera omu maisho ge, yaamusinza. Nyekiro Uriya yaashohora, yaaza kubyama aha kitanda kye hamwe n'abagaragwa ba mukama we, tiyaagira bu agiire omuka." 
2Samuel11:14 Ku bwaseesire, Daudi yaahandiikira Yoabu ebaruha, yaagitweka Uriya." 
2Samuel11:15 Omuri egyo baruha yaahandiikamu ati: Mute Uriya omu kaso k'orugamba, ahu ruhamire, mumutsigyeho, bamucumite, afe." 
2Samuel11:16 Bwanyima Yoabu ku yaabaire agotsire orurembo, yaata Uriya ahu arikumanya ku niho amamanzi gari." 
2Samuel11:17 Abanyarurembo baashohora, baarwana na Yoabu, abamwe aha bagaragwa ba Daudi baafa, na Uriya Omuhiiti nwe yaafa." 
2Samuel11:18 Yoabu yaayehereza entumwa kugambira Daudi amakuru goona ag'orugamba," 
2Samuel11:19 yaayehanangiriza entumwa, naagira ati: ku oraaheze kugambira omugabe amakuru g'orugamba," 
2Samuel11:20 yaaguubwa kubi, yaakugira ati: Ahabw'enki murwaine mukahika haihi n'orurembo? Mubaire mutarikumanya ku barikubaasa kubarasha, beemereire aha rugo rw'amabaare?" 
2Samuel11:21 Nimugira ngu owaitsire Abimeleki mwene Yerubeshesi n'oha? T'omukazi owaamuteereire eseiso Tebeza ayemereire aha rugo, akamugwisaho? Ahabw'enki muhikire haihi n'orugo mutyo? naiwe omugarukyemu oti: Manya omushaija waawe Uriya Omuhiiti nawe afiire." 
2Samuel11:22 Etyo entumwa yaagyenda, yaagambira Daudi ebi Yoabu agitumire byona." 
2Samuel11:23 Entumwa yaagira Daudi eti: Abantu baayo batubingire, baatuhitsya omu ishwa ahi tubaire turi, kwonka naitwe twababainga, twarugaho twabahitsya omu irembo." 
2Samuel11:24 Bwanyima abarasi abaabaire beemereire aha rugo baarasha abairu baawe; mbwenu bamwe aha bagaragwa b'omugabe bafiire, Omuhiiti yaabafamu." 
2Samuel11:25 Daudi yaagira egyo ntumwa ati: oku nikwo oraagire Yoabu oti: Ekyo kirekye kukugwisa kubi; ahakubi rurara eita omuntu, obundi eita ondiijo. Yeyongyere kuhamya orugamba; orwane n'orurembo, orusingure. Kandi naiwe, ku oraakikyeyo, omugumye." 
2Samuel11:26 Muka Uriya ku yaahuriire ngu iba afiire, yaamucurira." 
2Samuel11:27 Ku baarugire omu rufu, Daudi yaamutuma, yaamutaasya omwe, yaaba omukazi we, yaamuzaarira omwana w'omwojo. Kwonka eki Daudi yaakozire kyagwisa kubi MUKAMA." 
2Samuel12:1 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaatuma Nasani ahari Daudi. Yaija ah'ari, yaamugira ati: Hakaba hariho abashaija babiri omu rurembo, omwe ari omutungi, n'ondi ari omworo." 
2Samuel12:2 Ogwo mutungi akaba aine amasyo maingi g'entaama n'ag'ente," 
2Samuel12:3 kwonka ogwo mworo akaba ataine kindi eki atungire, kureka akaagazi k'entaama kamwe, aku yaabaire aguzire. Yaakoorora, kaakurira owe n'abaana be; kaaguma nikarya aha tw'okurya twe, nikanywera aha kikopo kye, kandi nikabyama omu kifuba kye; kaaba nka muhara we." 
2Samuel12:4 Eizooba rimwe ogwo mutungi yaaraarirwa omugyenyi; kwonka tiyaayenda kubaagira ogwo muhinguzi owaamuraarira omu masyo ge g'entaama nari ag'ente, kureka yaatwara ako kataama k'ori mworo, yaaba niko yaamubaagira." 
2Samuel12:5 Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaagirira ogwo mushaija ekiniga kingi munonga, yaagira Nasani ati: Nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, omushaija okozire ekyo kintu akaabaire ow'okufa;" 
2Samuel12:6 mbwenu arihe ako kataama kana ahabw'okukora ekyo n'ahabw'okutagira saasi. 
2Samuel12:7 Nasani yaagira Daudi ati: Manya ogwo mushaija niiwe. MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli naakugira ati: Nkakushukaho amajuta kuba omugabe wa Israeli, naakwiha omu mikono ya Saulo;" 
2Samuel12:8 naakuha enju ya mukama waawe, n'abakazi be kukushegura; kandi naakuha enju ya Israeli n'eya Yuda. Eki ku kyakubaire kiri kikye, nkaakwongyeire ebindi bingi." 
2Samuel12:9 Ahabw'enki ogayire ekigambo kya MUKAMA, okakora ekirikwangwa omu maisho ge? Oitsire Uriya Omuhiiti na rurara, waatwara omukazi we, waamushwera; waamwitsa rurara y'Abaamoni." 
2Samuel12:10 N'ahabw'ekyo rurara teriruga mu ka yaawe, ahabw'okungaya, okatwara muka Uriya Omuhiiti kuba omukazi waawe." 
2Samuel12:11 Kandi MUKAMA naakugira ati: Ndyaimutsya ebihikiirizi omu ka yaawe, nkwakye abakazi baawe nooreeba, mbahe mutaahi waawe, abyame nabo nyomushana." 
2Samuel12:12 Okakikora bwesherekye, kwonka ekyangye ndyakikora nyomushana omu maisho ga Israeli yoona." 
2Samuel12:13 Daudi yaagira Nasani ati: Ncumwire ahari MUKAMA. Naasani yaagira Daudi ati: MUKAMA nawe yihaho ekibi kyawe; tokifa. 
2Samuel12:14 Kwonka ahabw'ekyo eki okozire, okareetera abazigu ba MUKAMA kumujuma, omwana ogwo ozairwe buzimazima naija kufa." 
2Samuel12:15 Bwanyima Nasani yaagarukayo owe. MUKAMA yaarwza ogwo mwana, ou muka Uriya yaazaariire Daudi, yaaremba munonga." 
2Samuel12:16 N'ahabw'ekyo Daudi yaayeshengyereza MUKAMA ahabwe; Daudi yaayesiibyakwo, yaataaha omu nju, yaabyama ahansi, bwarugaho bwasheesha." 
2Samuel12:17 Abakuru b'enju ye baamwemerera aha rubaju kumwimutsya ahansi, yaabangira, kandi tiyaarya nabo." 
2Samuel12:18 Aha kiro kya mushanju, ogwo mwana yaakaba. Abagaragwa ba Daudi baatiina kumugambira ku omwana yaakaba; ahakuba bakagira bati: Reeba, ku turaabe tumugambiire, omwana akihuriire, akanga kutuhurira, nitwija kumugambira tuta omwana yaakabire? Tarikwija kwekora kubi?" 
2Samuel12:19 Kwonka Daudi, ku yaareebire abagaragwa nibagambirana omu kutu, yaamanyira aho ku omwana yaakaba. Daudi yaababuuza ati: Omwana yaakaba? Baamugarukamu bati: Yaakaba." 
2Samuel12:20 Daudi yaimuka ahansi, yaayoga, yaayesiiga, yaahindura ebijwaro bye, yaataaha omu nju ya MUKAMA, yaaramya. Ku yaaherize, yaataaha omwe, yaashaba eby'okurya, baabimuta omumaisho, yaarya." 
2Samuel12:21 Abagaragwa be baamubuuza bati: Eki waakora ki? Oyesiibizekwo, waaririra omwana akihuriire; mbwenu omwana ku yaaheza kufa, waimuka waarya!" 
2Samuel12:22 Daudi yaagira ati: Omwana obu abaire akihuriire, nyesiibizekwo, naarira; ahakuba ngizire nti: N'oha orikumanya ngu MUKAMA tarikwija kungirira embabazi, omwana akagumaho?" 
2Samuel12:23 Mbwenu ka yaafiire, niinyesiibizakwo ki? Nimbaasa kumuhimbuura? Ndyamukurata, kwonka we taringarukira." 
2Samuel12:24 Bwanyima Daudi yaagumya omukazi we Betisheba, yaamuraarira; ebiro ku byahingwireho, yaamuzaarira omwana w'omwojo, yaamweta Sulemaani. Omwana ogwo MUKAMA yaamukunda;" 
2Samuel12:25 yaatuma nabi Nasani, yaamweta Yedidiya ahabwa MUKAMA." 
2Samuel12:26 Omuri ebyo biro Yoabu yaarwanisa Rabba ey'Abaamoni, yaakwata orurembo rw'obugabe." 
2Samuel12:27 Yoabu yaatuma entumwa ahari Daudi, naagira ati: Ndwaniise Rabba, kandi naakwata orurembo rw'amaizi." 
2Samuel12:28 N'ahabw'ekyo oteerane engabo ezitsigaireho, ziteere ensiisira ahari orwo rurembo, obe niiwe waarukwata, ntakaarukwata, rukaanyetererwa." 
2Samuel12:29 Atyo Daudi yaateerana engabo zoona, yaaza Rabba, yaagirwanisa, yaagikwata." 
2Samuel12:30 Yaiha ekirunga aha mutwe gwa Milikomu, ekishushani kyabo ekirikuramibwa, oburemeezi bwakyo etalanta emwe y'ezaabu, ekyabaire kirimu eibaare ry'obuguzi bwingi; baakita aha mutwe gwa Daudi. Kandi omuri orwo rurembo yaanyagamu eminyago mingi munonga." 
2Samuel12:31 Yaihamu abantu abaabaire barimu, yaabashara n'emisimeeno n'ebyoma by'amaino, n'empango z'ebyoma, yaabarabya omu tanuuru z'amatafaari; okwo nikwo yaagizire endembo zoona ez'Abaamoni. Bwanyima Daudi n'engabo zoona baagaruka Yerusaalemu." 
2Samuel13:1 Kandi Abusalomu mwene Daudi akaba aine munyaanya murungi orikwetwa Tamari. Ebiro ku byahingwireho, Amunooni mwene Daudi yaamurigira." 
2Samuel13:2 Amunooni ahabw'okurigira okwo okubi oku yaarigiire Tamari munyaanya, yaarwara; ahabw'okuba munyaanya ogwo akaba ari omwishiki otakamanyire mushaija; kandi yaareeba kigumire kugira eki yaamukoraho." 
2Samuel13:3 Kwonka Amunooni akaba aine munywani we orikwetwa Yonadabu, mwene Shimea mukuru wa Daudi; kandi Yonadabu ogwo akaba ari enyabwengye." 
2Samuel13:4 Yaamubuuza ati: Iwe mutabani w'omugabe 'we, ahabw'enki noogyenda noohwa aha magufa? Tokaakingambira? Amunooni yaamugarukamu ati: Ndigiire Tamari, munyaanya wa Abusalomu, mwene tata." 
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu yaamugira ati: Irooko obyame aha kitanda kyawe, oyerwaze; bwanyima aho ku araije kukureeba, omugire oti: Ninkweshengyereza, ikiriza munyaanyazi Tamari aije, andeetere eby'okuraya, abiteekyere omu maisho gangye nimbireeba, mbiriire omu ngaro ze." 
2Samuel13:6 Atyo Amunooni yaabyama, yaayerwaza; bwanyima omugabe ku yaizire kumureeba, Amunooni yaamugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ntwekyera munyaanyazi Tamari, aije, anteekyere omumaisho otukeeki tubiri, nturiire omu ngaro ze." 
2Samuel13:7 Daudi nikwo kutuma omuka ahari Tamari, akamugira ati: Irooko oze owa munyaanyoko Amunooni, omuteekyere eby'okurya." 
2Samuel13:8 Atyo Tamarai yaaza owa munyaanya, yaashanga abyami. Yaagira eisyanga, yaaribumbabumba, yaarikoreramu otukeeki omu maisho ge, yaatuteeka." 
2Samuel13:9 Yaakwata eky'okukarangaho, yaatumwihurira omumaisho, kwonka yaayanga kurya. Amunooni yaagira ati: Abashaija boona bampigize. Abashaija boona bamuhigiza, baashohora." 
2Samuel13:10 Amunooni yaagira Tamari ati: Reeta eby'okurya omu kishengye, mbiriire omu ngaro zaawe. Tamari nikwo kugira otwo tukeeki, otu yaateeka, akatutwarira munyaanya Amunooni omu kishengye." 
2Samuel13:11 Ku yaatumuhikize ngu arye, yaamukwata, yaamugira ati: Ija obyame naanye, munyaanyazi." 
2Samuel13:12 Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, munyaanyazi, otampamba; ahakuba ekintu nk'ekyo tikikorwa muri Israeli; otakora eky'obufamutima nk'ekyo." 
2Samuel13:13 Mbwenu nkaanye, ekyo kihagaro nkaatoora hi nakyo? Kandi naiwe okaahinduka ekifa-mutima omuri Israeli. Mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, okigambire omugabe; ahakuba tarikwija kukuunyima." 
2Samuel13:14 Kwonka yaayanga kumuhurira; kandi ahabw'okumukiza amaani, yaamuhamba, yaabyama nawe." 
2Samuel13:15 Okuruga aho Amunooni yaamwanga okutakareebwaga; kandi okwanga oku yaamwangire kukakira okukunda oku yaabaire naamukunda. Amunooni yaamugira ati: Imuka ogyende. 
2Samuel13:16 Kwonka onu yaamugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, munyaanyazi; ahakuba ekibi eki eki orikukora kumbinga ni kihango okukira ekyo eki wankora. Amunooni yaayanga kumuhurira." 
2Samuel13:17 Yaayeta omutsigazi owaabaire naamuheereza, yaamugira ati: Nyiha ogu mwishiki omumaisho; ku araashohore, omukuratse orwigi, orukome." 
2Samuel13:18 Kandi Tamari akaba ajwaire ekijwaro ky'emikono miraingwa, ahakuba bahara b'omugabe abatakashweirwe nikwo baabaire bajwara. Atyo omuheereza wa Amunooni yaamushohoza, yaakoma orwigi." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamari yaayeshukyera eiju omu mutwe, yaataagura ekyo kijwaro ky'emikono miraingwa eki yaabaire ajwaire, yaayekorera emikono, yaagyenda naaborooga." 
2Samuel13:20 Bwanyima munyaanya Abusalomu yaamubuuza ati: Munyaanyoko Amunooni yaaba ari hamwe naiwe? Mbwenu hunama, munyaanyazi; manya nawe ni munyaanyoko; ekyo orekye kukitaho omutima. Atyo Tamari yaaguma owa munyaanya Abusalomu, ari enshoberwa." 
2Samuel13:21 Omugabe Daudi ku yaahuriire ebyo byona, yaagira ekiniga kingi;" 
2Samuel13:22 kwonka Abusalomu tiyaagira ki yaagambira Amunooni, yaaba kibi nari kirungi; ahabw'okuba akamwanga ahabw'okuhamba Tamari munyaanya." 
2Samuel13:23 Ku haahingwireho emyaka ebiri eijwire, Abusalomu yaatwara abakyemuzi b'okumukyemurira ebyoya by'entaama ze Baali-hazori haihi na Efuraimu; Abusalomu yaayeta batabani b'omugabe boona." 
2Samuel13:24 Yaija aha mugabe, yaamugira ati: Reeba, omwiru waawe aine abakyemuzi b'entaama; ninshaba omugabe n'abairu be, bagyende n'omwiru waawe." 
2Samuel13:25 Kwonka omugabe yaagira Abusalomu ati: Ngaaha, mwana wangye, ka turekye kugyenda twena, tutakaakurusya. Abusalomu yaamugyemesereza kwonka onu yaayanga, yaamushabira omugisha." 
2Samuel13:26 Bwanyima Abusalomu yaamugira ati: Ku oraabe otarikwija, reka tugyende na Amunooni mukuru wangye. Omugabe yaamugira ati: Ahabw'enki ashemereire kugyenda naiwe?" 
2Samuel13:27 Abusalomu yaamugyemesereza, okuhitsya obu yaikiriize Amunooni na batabani b'omugabe boona kugyenda nawe." 
2Samuel13:28 Bwanyima Abusalomu yaaragiira abaheereza be ati: Mugume mutaire eriisho ahari Amunooni; ku murareebe yaasinda viinyo, nkabagira nti: Muteere Amunooni, mumwite mutatiina. Tiinye naabaragiira? Mugume omutima, mube emanzi." 
2Samuel13:29 Batyo abaheereza ba Abusalomu baagira Amunooni, nk'oku Abusalomu yaabaragiira. Ahonaaho batabani b'omugabe boona baimuka, buri omwe yaayenaga aha nyumbu ye, baahunga." 
2Samuel13:30 Ku baabaire bakirii omu muhanda, enkuru yaahika Daudi ngu Abusalomu aitsire batabani b'omugabe boona, tihaatsigaraho na wa kizira." 
2Samuel13:31 Omugabe yaimuka, yaataagura ebijwaro bye, yaabyama ahansi; n'abagaragwa be boona abaabaire beemereireho nabo baataagura ebijwaro byabo." 
2Samuel13:32 Kwonka Yonadabu, mwene Shimea mukuru w'omugabe, yaagira ati: Mukama wangye atagira ngu baitsire abatsigazi boona, batabani b'omugae; kureka ofiire ni Amunooni wenka, ahabw'okuba okwiha obu yaahamba munyaanya Tamari, Abusalomu akamariirira kukora ekyo, kandi niwe akiragiire." 
2Samuel13:33 N'ahabw'ekyo mukama wangye omugabe arekye kukitaho omutima, akagira ngu batabi b'omugabe boona bafiire; kureka Amunooni wenka niwe afiire." 
2Samuel13:34 Okuruga aho Abusalomu yaahunga. Bwanyima omutsigazi owaabaire naarinda, ku yaanagire amaisho, yaareeba abantu baingi nibareetwa omuhanda ogurikuruga Horonaimu aha rubaju rw'ekibungo." 
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabu yaagira omugabe ati: Reeba, batabani b'omugabe baija, nk'oku omwiru waawe yaagira, nikwo byaba." 
2Samuel13:36 Ku yaabaire yaaheza ati kugamba, reeba batabani b'omugabe baija, baimutsya amaraka gaabo, baaborooga; omugabe nawe n'abagaragwa be boona baarira munonga." 
2Samuel13:37 Kwonka Abusalomu yaahunga, yaaza owa Talumai mwene Amihuudi, omugabe wa Geshuri. Kandi Daudi yaaguma naacurira omutabani buri izooba." 
2Samuel13:38 Atyo Abusalomu yaahunga, yaaza Geshuri, yaamarayo emyaka eshatu." 
2Samuel13:39 Bwanyima Daudi yaayetenga munonga kuza kureeba Abusalomu, ahakuba obusaasi bwa Amunooni bukaba bwamurugireho, ahabw'okureeba ku yaafiire." 
2Samuel14:1 Omu biro ebyo Yoabu mwene Zeruiya akamanya ku omutima gwa Daudi guri ahari Abusalomu. 
2Samuel14:2 Yoabu yaatuma Tekoa, yaihayo omukazi w'obwengye, yaamugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, oyehindure nk'ofeereirwe, ojware ebijwaro by'ofeereirwe, orekye kwesiiga amajuta, kureka otwaze nk'omukazi omazire ebiro bingi ari omu rufu;" 
2Samuel14:3 otaahe ow'omugabe omugambire ebigambo ebi. Atyo Yoabu yaamugambira ebi araagambe. 
2Samuel14:4 Ogwo mukazi wa Tekoa ku yaahikire aha mugabe, yaagwa ahansi, yaajuumara omu maisho ge, yaamutangirira, yaamugira ati: Mpa emikono, Nyakusinga!" 
2Samuel14:5 Omugabe yaamubuuza ati: obaire ota? Yaamugarukamu ati: Buzimazima ndi omufaakazi, omushaija wangye akafa." 
2Samuel14:6 Omuzaana waawe akaba aine abaana b'aboojo babiri. Ku baabaire bari omu ishwa, baatongana, baabura kiramura, omwe yaateera ondi, yaamwita." 
2Samuel14:7 Mbwenu reeba, abanyaruganda boona bayookyeire omuzaana waawe, baamugira bati, Tuheereze oitsire mukuru we, tumwite, tumuture ou aitsire. Mbwenu nibenda kwita n'omuhunguzi. Okwo nikwo barikwenda kuzimya eikara eri ntsigaire naryo, ngu batatsigira omushaija wangye eiziina omu nsi n'obu kwakuba okugira ou baatsigaho." 
2Samuel14:8 Omugabe yaagira ogo mukazi ati: Garuka owaawe, naaza kugira eki naakora aha byawe." 
2Samuel14:9 Ogwo mukazi wa Tekoa yaagira omugabe ati: Mukama wangye, Nyakusinga omugabe, mbe niinye naagira orubanja, n'enju ya tata; kwonka omugabe n'engoma ye bitarugira." 
2Samuel14:10 Omugabe yaagira ati: Omuntu weena oraakugambeho, omundeetere, tarikugarukaho bundi." 
2Samuel14:11 Omukazi yaagira ati: Mbwenu Nyakusinga omugabe, ninkweshengyereza, rahira MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, ku hatakiija kubaho muhoozi w'enzigu obundi, bakacwekyereza mutabani wangye. Onu ati: Nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, n'obu kaakuba akashokye kamwe k'omwana waawe tikarigwa hansi." 
2Samuel14:12 Omukazi yaamugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga, omuzaana waawe k'agambire omugabe ekigambo kimwe. Onu ati: Gamba." 
2Samuel14:13 Omukazi yaabuuza ati: Ahabw'enki ocumiire abantu ba Ruhanga enaama erikushusha ebyo? Ahabw'okuba omu kutaho ekiragiro ekyo omugabe naaaba naakyeteeraho, ahakuba takagaruraga muntu we owaabingirwe." 
2Samuel14:14 Twena turi ab'okufa, nitushusha nk'amaizi agaatikire ahansi, agatakibaasa kuyoorwa bundi; kandi na ruhanga ahabwe taihiraho kimwe magara b'omuntu, kureka ataho oburyo, ngu ou yaabingire arekye kubeera kimwe encuubwa." 
2Samuel14:15 bwenu naija kugambira mukama wangye omugabe ekigambo eki, ahabw'okuba abantu bantiiniise. Omuzaana waawe yaateekateeka, naagira ati: Mbwenu niinyija kugamba n'omugabe; obundi omugabe akaakorera omuzaana we eki yaamushaba;" 
2Samuel14:16 ahakuba omugabe naija kubihurira, akize omuzaana we ogwo muntu orikwenda kumucwekyereza n'omwana we, n'okubaiha omu buhunguzi bwa Ruhanga." 
2Samuel14:17 Kandi omuzaana waawe ateekateekire ngu, Ekigambo kya mukama wangye omugabe nikiija kumpuumuza; ahakuba mukama wangye omugabe ni nka maraika wa Ruhanga omu kukyenga ebibi n'ebirungi. MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe agume naiwe!" 
2Samuel14:18 Bwanyima omugabe yaagarukamu ogwo mukazi ati: otanshereka ekigambo kyona eki ndaakubuuze. Omukazi yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye omugabe akigambe. 
2Samuel14:19 Omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Beitu okwataniise na Yoabu omuri ebyo byona? Omukazi yaamugarukamu ati: Ninkurahira, mukama wangye omugabe, tihariho waakubaasa kutoora aha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho, okwetantara ekigambo kyona eki mukama wangye omugabe yaagamba. N'ekya buzima omwiru waawe Yoabu niwe aragiire omuzaana waawe, kandi niwe ampaire ebigambo ebyo byona kubigamba." 
2Samuel14:20 Ahabw'okwenda ku bihinduka okundi, omwiru waawe Yoabu nikyo abitwariize atyo. Kandi mukama wangye n'omunyabwengye nka maraika wa Ruhanga, naamanya ebiri omu nsi byona." 
2Samuel14:21 Bwanyima omugabe yaagira Yoabu ati: Reeba mbwenu naikiriza; irooko, ogarure ogwo mutsigazi Abusalomu." 
2Samuel14:22 Yoabu yaagwa ahansi, yaajuumara omu maisho g'omugabe, yaamusiima; naagira ati: Eri izooba omwiru waawe yaamanya ku yaagirirwa embabazi omu maisho gaawe, Nyakusinga omugabe, ahabw'okuba omugabe yaakorera omwiru we eki amushabire." 
2Samuel14:23 Atyo Yoabu yaimuka, yaaza Geshuri, yaareeta Abusalomu Yerusaalemu." 
2Samuel14:24 Bwanyima omugabe yaagira ati: Naagarukye omu ka ye, kwonka atarindeeba. Atyo Abusalomu yaaguma wenka omu ka ye, tiyaagira bu areebire omugabe." 
2Samuel14:25 Kandi omu Baisraeli boona tihariho waabaire naasiimwa nka Abusalomu ahabw'oburungi bwe; okuruga aha mara g'ekigyere okuhika aha kazingiro k'eishokye akaba ataine kamogo. 
2Samuel14:26 Aha muheru gwa buri mwaka akaba amweisa eishokye rye; ahabw'okumuremeera, nikyo yaabaire arimweisiza, kandi ku yaabaire arimweisa, oburemeezi bwaryo bukaba buba shekeli magana abiri, nka shekeli y'omugabe oku yaabaire eingana." 
2Samuel14:27 Kandi Abusalomu akazaarirwa abaana b'aboojo bashatu, n'omwishiki owaabaire naayetwa Tamari; akaba ari omwishiki murungi omu kureeba." 
2Samuel14:28 Atyo Abusalomu yaamara emyaka ebiri Yerusaalemu, atarikureebana na mugabe." 
2Samuel14:29 Bwanyima Abusalomu yaatuma kweta Yoabu, ngu amutume aha mugabe; kwonka Yoabu yaayanga kwija. Yaagaruka yaamutumaho obwa kabiri; nabwo yaayanga kwija." 
2Samuel14:30 Nikwo kugambira abairu be ati: Reeba, omusiri gwa Yoabu guhereraine n'ogwangye; hati gurimu sayiri; mugyende mugwotsye. Batyo abairu ba Abusalomu baagyenda, baagwotsya." 
2Samuel14:31 Yoabu yaimuka, yaaza owa Abusalomu, yaamubuuza ati: Ahabw'enki abairu baawe baanyokyeize omusiri?" 
2Samuel14:32 Abusalomu yaagarukamu Yoabu ati: Reeba nkutumireho ngu oije aha, nkutume aha mugabe, omumbuurize oti: Nkaihwa ki Geshuri? Haakiri kuri naagumireyo n'okuhitsya hati. Mbwenu omugabe anyikirize ndeebane nawe; ku harabe hariho okutahikiirira omuriinye, anyite." 
2Samuel14:33 Atyo Yoabu yaaza ow'omugabe, yaabimugambira. Bwanyima omugabe yaatuma ahari Abusalomu, yaija; ku yaahikire omugabe, yainama ahansi omu maisho ge; omugabe yaamunywegyera." 
2Samuel15:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo Abusalomu yaayegirira ekigaari n'embaraasi n'abashaija makumi ataano b'okumwebembera. 
2Samuel15:2 Kandi akaba aimuka kare, ayemerera aha rubaju rw'eirembo; omuntu weena owaabaire aija aha mugabe aine eki arikutongana, Abusalomu amweta, amubuuza ati: Ori owa rurembo ki? Onu amugarukamu ati: Nyowe omwiru waawe ndi ow'omu ruganda nanka orw'omu nganda za Israeli." 
2Samuel15:3 Abusalomu amugira ati: Reeba, orubanja rwawe ni rurungi kandi ruhikire; kwonka omugabe taine u atsigiire kuhurira ebyawe." 
2Samuel15:4 Abusalomu agaruka amugira ati: Kuri noogira ngu niinye muramuzi w'omu nsi egi, buri muntu weena owaakubaire aine eki arikufa nari orubanja, akaanyizireho, ncwa orubanja rwe omu buryo obuhikire." 
2Samuel15:5 Kandi omuntu ku yaabaire aija kumutangirira, akaba amukununkirira, amukwata, amunywegyera." 
2Samuel15:6 Okwo nikwo Abusalomu yaabaire atwaza Abaisraeli boona abaabaire bareeta emanja zaabo aha mugabe; omu buryo obwo Abusalomu yaiba emitima y'Abaisraeli. 
2Samuel15:7 Ku haahingwireho emyaka ena, Abusalomu yaagira omugabe ati: Ninkweshengyereza, nyikiriza nze Heburooni, mpikiirize okuhiga oku naahigire nindaganisa MUKAMA." 
2Samuel15:8 Ahakuba nyowe, omwiru waawe, obu naabaire ndi Geshuri omuri Siria, nkahiga nindaganisa nti: MUKAMA ku aringarura Yerusaalemu, buzima ndyamuheereza." 
2Samuel15:9 Omugabe yaamugira ati: Gyenda n'obusingye. Atyo yaimuka yaaza Heburooni.
