2Samuel15:10 Kwonka Abusalomu yaayohereza entatsi omu nganda za Israeli zoona, naagira ati: Ku muraahurire okugamba kw'enzamba, ahonaaho mugire muti: Abusalomu yaaba omugabe omuri Heburooni." 
2Samuel15:11 Kandi omuri okwo kugyenda kwa Abusalomu akagyenda n'abashaija magana abiri, abu yaayetsire kugyenda nawe okuruga Yerusaalemu, baafa okugyenda bataine ki barikumanya." 
2Samuel15:12 Bwanyima Abusalomu ku yaabaire naatamba ebitambo bye, yaatuma kweta Ahisofeeli owa Giilo, omuhi w'obwengye wa Daudi kuruga omu rurembo rw'owaabo Giilo. Kutyo okwebumba okwo kwayeyongyera kuba okw'amaani, ahakuba abantu bakeeyongyera obutoosha kwebumba na Abusalomu." 
2Samuel15:13 Bwanyima haija entumwa ahari Daudi, yaagira eti: Emitima y'Abaisraeli ekumbiire ahari Abusalomu." 
2Samuel15:14 Daudi nikwo kugira abagaragwa be boona, abu yaabaire aine Yerusaalemu ati: Nimwimukye tuhungye; ku turaabe tutahungire, tihariho n'omwe omuriitwe oraakire Abusalomu. Murahukye kugyenda, atakaatuhika, akatukora kubi, akacwekyereza orurembo na rurara." 
2Samuel15:15 Abagaragwa b'omugabe baamugira bati: Reeba, abairu baawe beeteekateekire kukora kyona, eki mukama waitu omugabe arikusiima." 
2Samuel15:16 Atyo omugabe yaashohora n'ab'omu ka ye boona bamukuratiire; kwonka yaatsigamu abakazi ikumi b'ebinyanshunju kurinda eka. 
2Samuel15:17 Omugabe yaagyenda n'abantu boona bamukuratiire; ku baahikire Besi-merubaaki, baayemereraho." 
2Samuel15:18 Batyo abagaragwa be boona baamurabaho; n'aba Keresi boona, n'aba Pelesi boona, n'aba Gaasi boona, abashaija magana mukaaga abaarugire Gaasi omumaisho g'omugabe." 
2Samuel15:19 Omugabe yaagira Itaayi owa Gaasi ati: Ahabw'enki naiwe noogyenda naitwe? Garukayo, ogume n'omugabe; ahabw'okuba ori omunyaihanga, owaarugire owaabo abingirwe." 
2Samuel15:20 Iwe oizire nyomwabazyo; nimbaasa nta kukugambira kuzengyerera naitwe, ntarikumanya i ndikuza? Garukayo, ogarureyo na beene waanyu; MUKAMA abahe embabazi n'obwesigwa." 
2Samuel15:21 Itaayi yaagarukamu omugabe ati: Nindahira MUKAMA otahwaho, na mukama wangye omugabe, ei mukama wangye omugabe ariza, yaaba kufa nari okugumaho, naanye omwiru waawe niyo ndiza." 
2Samuel15:22 Daudi yaagira Itaayi ati: Irooko oyambukye. Atyo Itaayi owa Gaasi yaayambuka n'abantu be boona hamwe n'abaana boona abu yaabaire aine. 
2Samuel15:23 Abantu boona ku baabaire nibarabaho, ab'omuri ekyo kyanga kyona baaborooga; bwanyima omugabe yaayambuka akagyera Kidirooni, n'abantu boona baagumizamu bagyemire omuhanda ogurikuza omu ihamba." 
2Samuel15:24 Kandi Abiasaari yaija, na Zadoki yaija n'aba Leevi boona baheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Ruhanga; baahuumuza egyo shanduukye ya Ruhanga ahansi, okuhitsya obu abantu boona baarugire omu rurembo." 
2Samuel15:25 Omugabe yaagira Zadoki ati: Garura eshanduukye ya Ruhanga omu rurembo; MUKAMA ku arangirire embabazi, aryangarura, anyikirize ngireebe hamwe n'obutaaho bwe." 
2Samuel15:26 Kwonka ku araagire ati: Tindikukushemerererwa; ndi aha, angire oku arikwenda." 
2Samuel15:27 Omugabe yaagaruka yaagira Zadoki omunyamurwa ati: Tori omuhanuuzi? Garuka omu rurembo n'obusingye, iwe na Abiasaari na batabani baanyu bombi, Ahimaazi mutabani waawe, na Yonasaani mutabani we." 
2Samuel15:28 Reeba, niinyija kuguma aha nyambukiro y'omu ihamba, ntegyereize okuhitsya obu murantumeho kungambira." 
2Samuel15:29 Zadoki na Abiasaari nikwo kuheeka eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, bakagigarura Yerusaalemu, bakagumayo." 
2Samuel15:30 Bwanyima Daudi yaatemba aharikwinamuka omu kibungo kya Zeituuni, yaagyenda naarira, ayetwekyereire, atajwaire nkaito; kandi n'abaabaire bari hamwe nawe boona baayetwekyerera, bainamuka nibarira." 
2Samuel15:31 Haagira owaagambira Daudi ku Ahisofeeli n'omwe aha beebumbire na Abusalomu. Daudi yaashaba ati: Ai MUKAMA, ninkweshengyereza, faafaatikanisa enaama ya Ahisofeeli." 
2Samuel15:32 Daudi ku yaahikire aha mutwe gw'ekibungo ahu baabaire bashabira Ruhanga, Hushai mwene Aruki yaija kumubugana, ebijwaro bye bitaagukire, n'eitaka rimuri omu mutwe." 
2Samuel15:33 Daudi yaamugira ati: Ku oraagyende naanye, noija kundusya;" 
2Samuel15:34 kwonka ku oraagaarukye omu rurembo, waagira Abusalomu oti: Nyakusinga, niinyija kuba omwiru waawe; nk'oku naabaire ndi omwiru wa sho omu biro ebyahweire, na hati nikwo ndikwija kuba ahariiwe; noija kunsiisira enaama za Ahisofeeli." 
2Samuel15:35 Beitu torikwija kuba oineyo Zadoki na Abiasaari abanyamurwa? N'ahabw'ekyo eki oraahurire kyona ekirikuruga omu ka y'omugabe, okigambire Zadoki na Abiasaari abanyamurwa." 
2Samuel15:36 Kandi noomanya ku baineyo batabani baabo bombi, Ahimaazi mwene Zadoki na Yonasaani mwene Abiasaari; abo nibo murantumeho kungambira ebi muraabe mwahuriire byona." 
2Samuel15:37 Atyo Hushai munywani wa Daudi yaaza omu rurembo, yaashanga Abusalomu naataaha Yerusaalemu." 
2Samuel16:1 Daudi ku yaabaire yaahika aha mutwe gw'ekibungo, yaarengaho kakye, yaabugana Ziiba omugaragwa wa Mefiboshesi, aine endogoya ibiri eziriho amatandiiko, zeekoreire emigaati magana abiri, n'emitsitsa igana y'emizaabibu eyomire, n'endiijo igana ey'ebijuma by'omu kyanda, n'efurebe ya viinyo." 
2Samuel16:2 Omugabe yaabuuza Ziiba ati: Ebi n'ebya ki? Ziiba yaamugarukamu ati: Endogoya n'ez'okuheeka ab'omu ka y'omugabe, emigaati n'ebijuma by'omu kyanda n'eby'okufugurira abatsigazi, kandi na viinyo n'ey'okunywebwa abaraagwere enshazi omu ihamba." 
2Samuel16:3 Omugabe yaagaruka yaamubuuza ati: Beitu shi, mutabani wa mukama waawe arahi? Ziiba yaamugarukamu ati: Reeba, atsigaire Yerusaalemu; ahakuba agizire ati: Eri izooba enju ya Israeli neija kungarura aha ngoma ya tata." 
2Samuel16:4 Omugabe yaagira Ziiba ati: Reeba, ebibaire biri ebya Mefiboshesi byona, hati n'ebyawe. Ziiba yaagira ati: Kasingye, Nyakusinga omugabe. Ngume ngirirwe ntyo embabazi omu maisho gaawe." 
2Samuel16:5 Omugabe Daudi ku yaahikire haihi na Bahurimu, haarugayo omushaija ow'omu muryango gw'enju ya Saulo orikwetwa Shimei mwene Geera; yaija naamukyeena;" 
2Samuel16:6 yaarekyera Daudi n'abagaragwa be boona amabaare; abantu boona n'abashaija be amamanzi bakaba bamushagatiire aha rubaju rwa buryo n'orwa bumosho. 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei ku yaabaire naamukyeena, yaaguma naagira ati: Rugaho, rugaho, iwe mwitani 'we, ekishaija kitaine mugasho." 
2Samuel16:8 MUKAMA akutuzire eshagama y'enju ya Saulo yoona, ou waahunguriire, okaza aha ngoma ye; mbwenu MUKAMA ahaire Abusalomu mutabani waawe obugabe bwawe; reeba, otuzirwe eitima ryawe, ahakuba ori omwitani." 
2Samuel16:9 Abishai mwene Zeruiya yaagira omugabe ati: Ahabw'enki nitureka egi mbwa efiire kujuma mukama wangye omugabe? Ninkweshengyereza, reka nyambukye, mmutemeho omutwe." 
2Samuel16:10 Omugabe yaati ati: Nyine kakwate ki naimwe, imwe beene Zeruiya? MUKAMA ku araabe niwe amugizire ati: Kyeena Daudi, mbwenu n'oha oraamugire ati: Ahabw'enki waakora otyo?" 
2Samuel16:11 Daudi yaagira Abishai n'abagaragwa be boona ati: Nimureeba mutabani wangye ou nyezaariire nampiiga kuunyita; kaashwa ogu Mubenyamiini. Nimumurekye akyeene, ahakuba MUKAMA amuragiire." 
2Samuel16:12 Obundi MUKAMA akaareeba oku ndikwitwa kubi, arugaho anzimuurira ebirungi ahabw'oku kukyeenwa oku naakyeenwa eri izooba." 
2Samuel16:13 Atyo Daudi n'abashaija be baagumya omuhanda, na Shimei yaakiikama omu rukiizi rw'ekibungo seeri yaabo naamukyeena, naamurekyera amabaare n'omucuucu." 
2Samuel16:14 Bwanyima omugabe n'abantu boona abu yaabaire aine, baahika Yorudani baruhire; omugabe yaaruhuukirayo." 
2Samuel16:15 Abusalomu n'Abaisraeli boona baahika Yerusaalemu hamwe na Ahisofeeli. 
2Samuel16:16 Kandi Hushai mwene Aruki, munywani wa Daudi, yaija owa Abusalomu, yaamugira ati: Omugabe nakaramaare! Omugabe nakaramaare!" 
2Samuel16:17 Abusalomu yaabuuza Hushai ati: Obwo nibwo bwesigwa obu oine ahari munywani waawe? Ekikuzibiire kugyenda nawe n'enki? 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai yaagira Abusalomu ati: Ngaaha! kureka omuntu otoorainwe MUKAMA n'aba bantu n'Abaisraeli boona, niwe ndiba owe, kandi niwe ndiguma nawe." 
2Samuel16:19 Kandi ekindi, n'oha ou nshemereire kuheereza? T'omutabani? Nk'oku naabaire mpeereza sho, naiwe nikwo ndikuheereza." 
2Samuel16:20 Bwanyima Abusalomu yaagira Ahisofeeli ati: Tuhe obwengye, oku turaatwaze." 
2Samuel16:21 Ahisofeeli yaagira Abusalomu ati: Irooko obyame n'ebinyanshunju bya sho, ebi atsigiire eka ye kugirinda; haza Abaisraeli boona nibaija kumanyira aho ku otamirwe sho; n'ahabw'ekyo abu oine boona nibaija kuhama." 
2Samuel16:22 Batyo baateerera Abusalomu eihema aha mutwe gw'enju; Abusalomu yaaritaahamu, yaabyama n'ebinyanshunju bya ishe, Abaisraeli boona nibakireeba." 
2Samuel16:23 Kandi omu biro ebyo obwengye obu Ahisofeeli yaabaire aha, bukaba buba nk'obu omuntu ahairwe Ruhanga; okwo nikwo obwengye bwa Ahisofeeli bwabaire busiimwa Daudi, kandi na Abusalomu." 
2Samuel17:1 Kandi Ahisofeeli yaagaruka yaagira Abusalomu ati: Ka ntoorane engabo kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, nyimukye, nkurate Daudi eki kiro;" 
2Samuel17:2 niinyija kumugwaho aruhire, atakiine maani, mmutiinise, abantu boona abu aine bahungye, nyite omugabe wenka;" 
2Samuel17:3 haza abantu boona mbakugarurire. Manya eki orikwenda n'okwita omuntu omwe, reero abantu boona bakagira obusingye." 
2Samuel17:4 Enaama egyo yaasiimwa Abusalomu n'abakuru ba Israeli boona. 
2Samuel17:5 Bwanyima Abusalomu yaagira ati: Mwete Hushai mwene Aruki, nawe tuhurire eki arikugamba." 
2Samuel17:6 Hushai ku yaahikire ahari Abusalomu, Abusalomu yaamugira ati: Ahisofeeli yaatugambira ati n'ati; mbwenu tukore nk'oku yaagamba? Ku oraabe otarikukisiima, naiiwe otugambire." 
2Samuel17:7 Hushai yaagarukamu Abusalomu ati: Obwengye obu Ahisofeeli yaaha eri izooba ti burungi. 
2Samuel17:8 Kandi yaagaruka yaagira ati: noomanya sho n'engabo ze ku bari amamanzi; kandi hati bashaariire nk'edubu eyaayakwa ebyana byayo omu ihamba; kandi sho aba rugambwa omu kurwana, tarikwenda kuraara mu bantu." 
2Samuel17:9 Mbwenu ayesherekire omu kiina nari ahandi. N'ahabw'ekyo ku haraagire abaafa nibakitandika kurwana, oraakihurire weena naija kugira ati: Hafiire abantu baingi omu ba Abusalomu." 
2Samuel17:10 Ekyo nikyija kureetera omuntu weena kuhahaara, n'obu yaakuba ari emanzi aine omutima nk'ogw'entare, ahabw'okuba Abaisraeli boona nibamanya sho ku ari emanzi, kandi n'abu aine boona ku bari amamanzi." 
2Samuel17:11 Kureka nyowe obwengye obu ndikukuha n'obu. Teeranira hamwe Abaisraeli boona, okutandikira Daani okuhika Beeri-sheba, bangane n'omusheenyi gw'aha rubaju rw'enyanja obwingi, kandi naiwe wenka ohurure nabo." 
2Samuel17:12 Tutyo nitwija kumugwaho ahu turaamushangye hoona, tumutondeho nk'oku orume rutonda ahansi; we n'abantu abu aine boona, titurikwija kutsigaho n'omwe." 
2Samuel17:13 Kandi ku araahungire omu rurembo, nabwo Abaisraeli boona nibaija kureeta emirunga, turukumbagaze omu ruhanga, okuhitsya obu ruraahweho, hatatsigareho kabaare na kamwe." 
2Samuel17:14 Abusalomu n'Abaisraeli boona baagira bati: obwengye bwa Hushai mwene Aruki bwakira obwa Ahisofeeli. Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akaba ataireho enaama y'okushiisha obwengye burungi bwa Ahisofeeli, ngu abone kureetera Abusalomu akabi." 
2Samuel17:15 Bwanyima Hushai yaagira Zadoki na Abiasaari abanyamurwa ati: Obwengye obu Ahisofeeli ahaire Abusalomu n'abakuru ba israeli n'obu; kwonka nyowe obu mmuhaire ni buti na buti. 
2Samuel17:16 N'ahabw'ekyo mutume juba ahari Daudi muti: Eki kiro otaraara aha nyambukiro y'eihamba; oyambukye, hatagira ekyakuzibira, omugabe atakaamirwa n'abantu abu aine boona." 
2Samuel17:17 Kandi Yonasaani na Ahimaazi bakaba bari Eni-rogeli bategyereize; omuzaana yaaguma naija naabibagambira, nabo nibaza kubigambira omugabe Daudi; ahakuba bakaba batarikwikirizibwa kutaaha omu rurembo nibareebwa." 
2Samuel17:18 kwonka haagira omwojo owaabareeba, yaagambira Abusalomu. Abo batsigazi bombi baagyenda nibeehuta, baahika Bahurimu, baataaha omu nju y'omushaija owaabaire aine eiziba omu kibuga kye; baarizamu." 
2Samuel17:19 Omukazi yaagira ekifundikizo, yaakita aha munwa gwaryo, yaakyanikaho omushekure gw'engano; tikyamanywa." 
2Samuel17:20 Abambari ba Abusalomu baahika aha nju, baabuuza omukazi bati: Ahimaazi na Yonasaani barahi? Omukazi yaabagarukamu ati: Baayambuka akagyera. Ku baabasherwire, baabura, baagaruka Yerusaalemu." 
2Samuel17:21 Ku baaherize kugyenda, abo batsigazi baaruga omu iziba, baagyenda, baagambira Daudi ebi batumirwe; baamugira bati: Mwimukye, murahukye kwambuka omugyera, ahakuba Ahisofeeli aine enaama eti n'eti y'okubarwanisa." 
2Samuel17:22 Atyo Daudi yaimuka n'abantu abu yaabaire aine boona, baayambuka Yorudani; omushekye ku gwagiire kujuguta, haashangwa hatakiine n'omwe otakambukire." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahisofeeli ku yaareebire obwengye bwe butaikirizibwa, yaatandiika endogoya ye, yaimuka, yaataaha owe omu rurembo rw'owaabo; yaatebeekanisa eby'omu ka ye, yaayehanika, yaafa, baamuziika omu kituuro kya ishe." 
2Samuel17:24 Bwanyima Daudi yaahika Mahanaimu. Abusalomu nawe yaayambuka Yorudani n'Abaisraeli boona. 
2Samuel17:25 Kandi Abusalomu akaba ataireho Amasa kuba omukuru w'eihe omu mwanya gwa Yoabu. Kandi Amasa ogwo akaba ari mutabani w'omushaija orikwetwa Itura Omuishimaeli, owaashweire Abigaili muhara wa Nahashi, murumuna wa Zeruiya nyina wa Yoabu." 
2Samuel17:26 Bwanyima Abaisraeli na Abusalomu baasiisira omu nsi ya Gileadi. 
2Samuel17:27 Daudi ku yaahikire Mahanaimu, Shobi mwene Nahashi owa Rabba ey'Abaamoni, na Makiri mwene Amieli owa Lodebaari, na Baruzilai Omunyagileadi owa Rogelimu," 
2Samuel17:28 baareeta ebitanda, enyabya, enyungu, engano, sayiri, esaano, engano zikarangire, ebihimba, enkoore zikarangire," 
2Samuel17:29 obwoki, amajuta, entaama n'encumate za ciizi, baabireetera Daudi n'abantu abu yaabaire aine kubafungurira; ahakuba bakagira bati: Abantu baine enjara, baruhire, kandi baitiirwe eiriho omu ihamba." 
2Samuel18:1 Daudi yaabara abantu abu yaabaire aine, yaataho abantu kuba abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'aba igana-igana." 
2Samuel18:2 Yaagaba engabo, ekicweka kimwe kya kashatu yaakiha Yoabu, ekindi yaakiha Abishai mwene Zeruiya, murumuna wa Yoabu, n'ekindi yaakiha Itaayi owa Gaasi. Omugabe yaagira abantu ati: Naanye ahabwangye niinyija kuhurura naimwe." 
2Samuel18:3 Kwonka abantu baamugira bati: Iwe torikwija kuhurura; ahabw'okuba ku turaahungye, tibarikwija kutufaho; nangwa n'obu ekicweka kimwe kya kabiri ky'abantu baintu kyakufa, nabwo tibakaatufaho; ahakube iwe noingana n'abantu baitu kakumi; n'ahabw'ekyo haakiri ogume omu rurembo, otwoherereze ab'okutuha emikono." 
2Samuel18:4 Omugabe yaabagira ati: Eki murikusiima nikyo ndaakore. Bwanyima omugabe yaayemerera aha irembo, engabo zoona nizishohora omu mitwe ya igana-igana na rukumi-rukumi." 
2Samuel18:5 Omugabe yaayehangangiriza Yoabu na Abishai na Itaayi ati: Mutwaze gye ogwo mwojo Abusalomu ahabwangye. Kandi abantu boona baahurira omugabe naayehanangiriza abakuru b'engabo ebya Abusalomu. 
2Samuel18:6 Batyo abantu baaza kurwanira n'Abaisraeli omu ishwa; orugamba rwatengyerwa omu kibira kya Efuraimu. 
2Samuel18:7 Abaisraeli baasingurirwayo abashaija ba Daudi; kandi eryo izooba haafa abantu obukumi bubiri," 
2Samuel18:8 ahakuba orugamba rukaba rujanjaire omuri egyo ensi yoona; eryo izooba ekibira kyamara abantu baingi okukira abaitsirwe rurara. 
2Samuel18:9 Abusalomu yaabugaabugana n'abashaija ba Daudi atakimanyire. Kandi Abusalomu akaba atembire enyumbu ye; egyo nyumbu yaamurabya ahansi y'amataagi g'omwela muhango agakwataine; omutwe gwe gwakwatirwa omuri ago mataagi, yaaguma, naareereetera omu mwanya, enyumbu ei yaabaire atembire yaagumizamu." 
2Samuel18:10 Omushaija yaamureeba, yaagambira Yoabu ati: Naareeba Abusalomu ari omu mwela naareereeta." 
2Samuel18:11 Yoabu yaabuuza owaamugambira ati: Ot'enki! Waamureeba! Ahabw'enki otaamucumita, okamutuura ahansi? Naaba ninkuha ebicweka by'efeeza ikumi n'orukoba." 
2Samuel18:12 Ogwo mushaija yaagarukamu Yoabu ati: N'obu naakuheebwa ebicweka by'efeeza rukumi, tinkaabanga mukono gwangye kwita omwana w'omugabe; ahakuba twahurira omugabe naakwehanangiriza iwe, na Abishai na Itaayi ati: Mwerinde, hatagira owaakora ahari ogwo mwojo Abusalomu." 
2Samuel18:13 Kandi hoona kuri naabitwaza okundi, nkamureebya, (manya omugabe tagira ki asherekwa,) iwe waaba noija kubyejuura." 
2Samuel18:14 Yoabu yaagira ati: Tinaaza kusiisira mwanya gwangye busha ningamba naiwe. Yaakwata emyambi eshatu omu ngaro, yaagitimbura Abusalomu omu mutima, akiri omu mwela ahuriire." 
2Samuel18:15 Bwanyima abatsigazi ikumi abatwazi b'eby'okurwanisa bya Yoabu baayehinguririza Abusalomu, baamurezya, yaafa." 
2Samuel18:16 Yoabu yaateera enzamba, engabo zaagaruka, zaareereera kukurata Abaisraeli, ahabw'okuzibirwa Yoabu." 
2Samuel18:17 Baatwara Abusalomu, baamunaga omu kiina kihango ky'omu kibira, baamurundaho ekirundo kihango munonga ky'amabaare; Abaisraeli baahunga, buri muntu yaaza omu ka ye." 
2Samuel18:18 Kandi Abusalomu, obu yaabaire akihuriire, akatwara enyomyo, yaagibyara omu ruhanga rw'omugabe; ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Tiinyine mwana w'omwojo, ou bariijukiraho eiziina ryangye; kandi egyo nyomyo yaagyeyeterera; n'okuhitsya hati neekyetwa enyomo y'ekiijutsyo kya Abusalomu." 
2Samuel18:19 Bwanyima Ahimaazi mwene Zadoki yaagira ati: ka nyirukye ngambire omugabe ag'aha rugamba, n'oku MUKAMA yaamuhoorera enzigu aha bazigu be." 
2Samuel18:20 Yoabu yaamugira ati: Otaza kugamba amakuru eri izooba, kureka ogagambe obundi. Kwonka eri izooba orekye kugagamba, ahabw'okuba omwana w'omugabe yaafa." 
2Samuel18:21 Yoabu yaagira Omukuushi ati: Irooko ogyende, ogambire omugabe ebi waareeba. Atyo Omukuushi yainama omu maisho ga Yoabu, yairuka." 
2Samuel18:22 Ahimaazi mwene Zadoki yaagaruka yaagira Yoabu ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ka nyirukye nkurate oriya Mukuushi, oku biraabe bibekwo. Yoabu yaagira ati: Noirukibwa ki, mwana wangye, ka noomanya ku otakiheebwa bihembo ahabw'ago makuru?" 
2Samuel18:23 Onu yaagira ati: Ekiraabe kyabaire kibe, naaza kugyenda. Yoabu ati: Iruka. Atyo Ahimaazi yairuka, yaatoora ogw'oruhita, yaatangayo Omukuushi." 
2Samuel18:24 Kandi Daudi akaba ashutami ahagati y'amarembo abiri; omurinzi yaatemba aha mutwe gw'eirembo, yaayemerera aha rugo rw'amabaare; ku yaanagire amaisho, yaareeba omuntu nairuka wenka." 
2Samuel18:25 Omurinzi yaayeta, yaagambira omugabe. Omugabe yaagira ati: ku araabe ari wenka, aine amakuru agu areetsire. Ogwo muntu yaija naayehuuta, yaahika haihi." 
2Samuel18:26 Bwanyima omurinzi yaareeba ondiijo mushaija nairuka; yaayeta omukumiirizi, yaamugira ati: Reeba ondiijo mushaija nairuka wenka. Omugabe yaagira ati: Nawe areetsire amakuru." 
2Samuel18:27 Omurinzi yaagira ati: Okundikureeba, okwiruka kw'oyebembeire nikushusha okwa Ahimaazi mwene Zadoki. Omugabe yaagira ati: Ava omushaija murungi, naija kureeta amakuru marungi." 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaazi yaagambira omugabe n'eiraka rihango, ati: Huumura, ni buhooro. Yainama omu maisho g'omugabe, yaagira ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ahimbisibwe, ohaireyo abashaija ababaire babangire emikono kurwanisa mukama wangye omugabe." 
2Samuel18:29 Omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Omwojo ori Abusalomu ari buhooro? Ahimaazi yaagarukamu ati: Yoabu obu yantuma, nyowe omwiru waawe naareeba abantu nibayogoorekana; kwonka tinaamanya kyaba kiriho." 
2Samuel18:30 Omugabe yaamugira ati: Hingura, oyemerere aha. Atyo yaahingura, yaayemerera." 
2Samuel18:31 Bwanyima ogwo Mukuushi yaija, yaagira ati: Ndeeteire mukama wangye omugabe amakuru; ahakuba eri izooba MUKAMA yaakuhoorera enzigu aha bantu boona ababaire baimukire kukurwanisa." 
2Samuel18:32 Omugabe yaabuuza Omukuushi ati: Omwojo ori Abusalomu ari buhooro? Omukuushi yaamugarukamu ati: Abazigu ba mukama wangye omugabe, n'abantu boona abaimukire kukukora kubi, nibakabe nk'ogwo mwojo." 
2Samuel18:33 Omugabe yaashaasha munonga, yaatemba omu kishengye ky'aha mutwe gw'eirembo, yaarira; ku yaabaire naagyenda, yaagyenda naagira ati: Ai bambe omwana wangye Abusalomu! Omwana wangye, Omwana wangye Abusalomu! Kuri niinye naafa omu mwanya gwawe, ai bambe Abusalomu, mwana wangye, mwana wangye!" 
2Samuel19:1 Bwanyima baagira Yoabu bati: Reeba, omugabe naacurira Abusalomu." 
2Samuel19:2 Eryo izooba okwesiima kw'obusinguzi kwahinduka okucura omu bantu boona; ahakuba eryo izooba abantu bakahurira ngu omugabe ari omu naku ahabw'omwana we. 
2Samuel19:3 Kandi abantu baagaruka omu rurembo nibashobooka, nk'abantu abacwire aha rugamba oku bashoobooka baine enshoni." 
2Samuel19:4 Omugabe yaayetwekyerera ahamaisho, yaacura n'eiraka rihango ati: Ai bambe omwana wangye Abusalomu, Abusalomu, mwana wangye, mwana wangye!" 
2Samuel19:5 Yoabu yaataaha omu nju, yaahika omugabe, yaamugira ati: Eri izooba waahemura abagaragwa baawe boona, abakirize amagara gaawe hati, n'aga batabani baawe na bahara baawe, kandi n'ag'abakazi baawe n'ebinyanshunju byawe;" 
2Samuel19:6 ahabw'eokuba nookunda abarikukwanga, nooyanga abarikukunda. Mbwenu waayorekyera kimwe ku abakuru b'engabo n'abagaragwa baawe bari busha ahariiwe; hati naamanya ngu, kuri Abusalomu agumireho, abandi twena tukafa eri izooba, kuri nooyesiima munonga." 
2Samuel19:7 Mbwenu hati imuka, oshohore, ogambe gye n'abairu baawe; ahakuba nindahira MUKAMA, ku oraabe otashohoire, tihariho mushaija n'omwe, oraatsigare naiwe eki kiro; kandi kiryakurugiramu akabi okukira akabi koona aku orareebire okwiha omu buto bwawe n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Samuel19:8 Omugabe nikwo kwimuka, akashutama aha irembo, bakagambira abantu boona bati: Reeba, omugabe ashutami aha irembo. Bwanyima abantu boona baija kutabaarira omugabe. Obwo Abaisraeli boona bakaba bahungire, buri muntu agarukire omu ka ye." 
2Samuel19:9 Bwanyima abantu boona ab'enganda zoona z'Abaisraeli baagarukanamu nibagira bati: Omugabe niwe yaatwihire omu mikono y'abazigu baitu, akatukiza Abafilistia; mbwenu ahungire Abusalomu yaaruga aha ngoma." 
2Samuel19:10 Na Abusalomu ou twashukireho amajuta kututegyeka, agwire omu rugamba. Mbwenu nimuzibirwa ki kuhanuura aha by'okugarura omugabe?" 
2Samuel19:11 Bwanyima omugabe Daudi yaatuma ahari Zadoki na Abiasaari abanyamurwa naagira ati: Mubuuze abakuru b'Abayuda muti: Ahabw'enki niiwe mwaza kuheererukira abandi kugarura omugabe omu ka ye, haza enaama, ei Abaisraeli boona bacumire kumugarura, emuhikire." 
2Samuel19:12 Niimwe beene tata; niimwe baitu ab'aha mara; mbwenu ahabw'enki mwaza kuheererukira abandi kugarura omugabe? 
2Samuel19:13 Kandi mugambire na Amasa muti: Torikumanya iwe naanye ku turi ab'enda emwe? Ku oraabe otabaire omukuru w'eihe ryangye okuruga hati omu mwanya gwa Yoabu, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho." 
2Samuel19:14 Yaayekubuurira emitima y'Abayuda boona nk'omutima gw'omuntu omwe. Ekyarugiremu baatuma aha mugabe bati: Garuka n'abagaragwa baawe boona. 
2Samuel19:15 Atyo omugabe yaagaruka, yaahika ahari Yorudani. Abayuda baaza Gilugaali kumubugana kumwabutsya Yorudani." 
2Samuel19:16 Bwanyima Shimei mwene Geera Omubenyamiini owa Bahurimu yaayehuuta, yaashuuma n'Abayuda kubugana omugabe Daudi," 
2Samuel19:17 aine abashaija rukumi b'Ababenyamiini, na Ziiba omugaragwa w'enju ya Saulo n'abatabani n'abairu be makumi abiri; baayambuka Yorudani omugabe naabareeba." 
2Samuel19:18 Obwato bwasiiba nibwambutsya ab'omu ka y'omugabe, n'okukora eki arikwenda. Omugabe ku yaaherize kwambuka Yorudani, Shimei mwene Geera yaajuumara ahansi omu maisho ge." 
2Samuel19:19 Yaagira omugabe ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, otambarira okutahikiirira, kandi otaijuka eki omwiru waawe yaakozire n'obugomi aha izooba eri waarugiireho Yerusaalemu, mukama wangye, kandi birekye kukusaasa." 
2Samuel19:20 Ahakuba nyowe, omwiru waawe, nimmanya ku naacumwire; nikyo eri izooba naabandiza ab'enju ya Yosefu boona kushuuma kubugana mukama wangye omugabe." 
2Samuel19:21 Kwonka Abishai mwene Zeruiya yaagira ati: Beitu Shimei tarikwija kwitwa, ahabw'okujuma ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta?" 
2Samuel19:22 Daudi yaagira ati: Mbwenu imwe beene Zeruiya, nyine kakwate ki naimwe, mwaza kuunyimukiza obuzigu eri izooba? Nimugira ngu hariho ow'okwitwa omuri Israeli eri izooba? Nari shi tindikumanya ku ndi omugabe wa Israeli eri izooba?" 
2Samuel19:23 Omugabe yaagira Shimei ati: Torikwija kufa. Yaamurahira. 
2Samuel19:24 Bwanyima Mefiboshesi mwene Saulo yaashuuma kubugana omugabe; kandi okwiha obu omugabe yaagyenda okuhitsya aha izooba eri yaagarukiireho omuka n'obusingye, akaba atakanaabaga bigyere, nari okutuubya aha bireju, n'obu kwakuba okwozya ebijwaro bye." 
2Samuel19:25 Ku yaahikire Yerusaalemu kubugana omugabe, omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Beitu Mefiboshesi, n'enki ekyakuzibiire kugyenda naanye?" 
2Samuel19:26 Yaamugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, omwiru wangye akambeiha; ahakuba nyowe omwiru waawe nkaba ngizire nti: Niinyija kutandiika endogoya, ngizeho, ngyende n'omugabe, ahakuba omwiru waawe ndi ekimuga." 
2Samuel19:27 Kandi akambeiherera ahari mukama wangye; kwonka mukama wangye omugabe ni nka maraika wa Ruhanga; omugabe n'ahabw'ekyo okore eki orikusiima. 
2Samuel19:28 Ahakuba ab'omu ka ya tata boona bakaba bacwereirwe orubanja rw'okufa omu maisho ga mukama wangye omugabe; haza wanshutamya n'abarikuriira aha meeza yaawe. Mbwenu nimbaasa nta kugaruka kutakira omugabe? 
2Samuel19:29 Omugabe yaamugira ati: Ahabw'enki noogaruka omu bigambo? Naabiheza. Iwe na Ziiba mubagane ekibanja. 
2Samuel19:30 Mefiboshesi yaagira omugabe ati: Iwe, reka akitware kyona, niho mukama wangye omugabe yaagaruka omu ka ye n'obusingye." 
2Samuel19:31 Kandi Baruzilai Omunyagileadi yaashuuma naaruga Rogelimu, yaayambua Yorudani n'omugabe kumuhitsya seeri." 
2Samuel19:32 Baruzilai ogwo akaba ari omugurusi munonga aine emyaka makumi munaana; kandi niwe yaabaire agyemurira omugabe obu yaabaire ari Mahanaimu; ahakuba akaba ari omushaija ohamire. 
2Samuel19:33 Omugabe yaagira Baruzilai ati: Ija twambukane, tuze Yerusaalemu; niinyija kugama ninkuriisa." 
2Samuel19:34 Kwonka Baruzilai yaagira omugabe ati: Ntsigaizeyo emyaka engahi, eyaakungyema kwinamuka n'omugabe Yerusaalemu?" 
2Samuel19:35 Eri izooba naahitsya emyaka makumi munaana. Mbwenu ninkibaasa kutaanisa ekirungi n'ekibi? Omwiru waawe naakinurirwa ebi arikurya nari ebi arikunywa? Nkiine agahurira amaraka g'abashaija nari abakazi abarikweshongora? Mbwenu omwiru waawe asiibe naaruhiza ki mukama wangye omugabe? 
2Samuel19:36 Omwiru waawe k'afe okwambuka n'omugabe Yorudani, amuhitsye hariya seeri. Ahabw'enki omugabe ashemereire kumpa ebihembo ebirikwinga bityo?" 
2Samuel19:37 Ninkweshengyereza, nyowe omwiru waawe ka ngarukyeyo, ngwe omu rurembo rw'owaitu, ahu ekituuro kya tata na maawe kiri. Kwonka reeba omwiru waawe Kimuhaamu ngugu; abe niwe yaayambuka na mukama wangye omugabe, omutwaze nk'oku orikwenda." 
2Samuel19:38 Omugabe yaamugarukamu ati: Mbwenu Kimuhaamu naarabeho twambukye; niinyija kuguma nimmukorera, eki orikwenda kyona; kandi naiwe eki orinshaba kyona, ndaykikukorera." 
2Samuel19:39 Batyo abantu boona baayambuka Yorudani; n'omugabe nawe yaayambuka. Omugabe yaanywegyera Baruzilai, yaamushabira omugisha; bwanyima onu yaagaruka owaabo." 
2Samuel19:40 Okwo nikwo omugabe yaayambukire, akaza Giligaali, na Kimuhaamu akambuka nawe. Batyo Abayuda boona hamwe n'ekicweka ky'Abaisraeli baayambutsya omugabe." 
2Samuel19:41 Bwanyima Abaisraeli boona baija aha mugabe, baamugira bati: Ahabw'enki beene waitu Abayuda baakutwaire bwesherekye, bakakwambutsya Yorudaani n'ab'eka yaawe boona n'abagaragwa baawe boona?" 
2Samuel19:42 Abayuda boona baagarukamu Abaisraeli bati: N'ahabw'okuba omugabe aine obuzaare bwa haihi naitwe. Beitu shi imwe kibagwisiize ki kubi? Nimugira ngu twine eky'omugabe eki turiire? Nari shi hariho ekiconco kyona eki atuhaire? 
2Samuel19:43 Abaisraeli baagarukamu Abayuda bati: Itwe twine emigabo ikumi omu mugabe, kandi Daudi n'owaitu kukira imwe. Mbwenu shi mutugayiire ki? Tiitwe tubandize kuhanuura eby'okugarura omugabe waitu? Kwonka ebigambo by'Abayuda byashaarira okukira eby'Abaisraeli." 
2Samuel20:1 Omu bunaku obwo hakabaho omushaija otaine ku ari, orikwetwa Sheeba mwene Bikuri Omubenyamiini; yaateera enzamba naagira ati: Titwine mugabo omuri Daudi N'obu bwakuba obuhunguzi omuri mwene Yese. Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, buri muntu agarukye omu ihema rye!" 
2Samuel20:2 N'ahabw'ekyo Abaisraeli boona baarereera kukuratira Daudi, baakuratira Sheeba mwene Bikuri; kwonka Abayuda, okuruga Yorudani okuhika Yerusaalemu baahamira aha mugabe waabo." 
2Samuel20:3 Bwanyima omugabe Daudi yaataha omu nju ye omuri Yerusaalemu; yaatwara abakazi be b'ebinyanshunju, abu yaabaire atsigiire eka ye kugirinda, yaataba omu nju y'okurindirwamu, yaaguma naabaha eby'okubatunga, kwonka tiyaagaruka kubaraarira. Batyo baaguma nibarindwa okuhitsya obu baafiire, bari nk'abafaakazi." 
2Samuel20:4 Bwanyima omugabe yaagira Amasa ati: Nyetera Abayuda, bateeranire aha ebiro bishatu bitakahweire, haza naiwe obeho." 
2Samuel20:5 Atyo Amasa yaaza kuhuruza Abayuda; kwonka yaarenzya ebiro ebi omugabe yaamuragiire. 
2Samuel20:6 Daudi nikwo kugira Abishai ati: Mbwenu ho Sheeba mwene Bikuri yaaza kutukora kubi okukira Abusalomu; irooko otware abashaija ba mukama waawe, mumukurate, atakaakubuura endembo ezizitiirwe n'engo z'amabaare, akaguma naatuganzya." 
2Samuel20:7 Abishai yaahurura akuratiirwe abashaija ba Yoabu n'aba Keresi n'aba Pelesi n'amamanzi goona; baaruga Yerusaalemu, kukurata Sheeba mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:8 Ku baahikire aha ibaare rihango rya Gibeoni, Amasa yaija kubabugana. Obwo Yoabu akaba ajwaire ebijwaro by'orugamba, abyezirikiise orukoba, oruriho rurara eri aha nyugunyu omu kyobati kyayo; ku yairiireho omumaisho, rurara yaaragara." 
2Samuel20:9 Yoabu yaagira Amasa ati: Ni buhooro, mwana wa tata? Yoabu yaakwata ekireju kya Amasa n'omukono gwe gwa buryo kumunywegyera." 
2Samuel20:10 Kwonka Amasa tiyaayeta hari rurara ei Yoabu yaabaire akwaitse; Yoabu nikwo kugimutimbura aha nda, amara ge gakeeshuka ahansi, atagarukye kugimuteera bundi. Atyo Amasa yaafa. Bwanyima Yoabu na Abishai omurumuna baagumizamu kukurata Sheeba mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:11 Omwe aha bashaija ba Yoabu yaayemerera aha rubaju rwa Amasa, yaagira ati: Orikukunda Yoabu, kandi ori aha rubaju rwa Daudi, akuratire Yoabu." 
2Samuel20:12 Obwo Amasa akaba agarami omu shagama naashamba, ahagati y'omuhanda rugyendwa. Ogwo mushaija ku yaareebire abantu boona baayemerera aho, yaakiriza Amasa, yaamwiha omu muhanda, yaamurambika omu kishaka, yaamushweka ekijwaro." 
2Samuel20:13 Ku baamwihire omu muhanda, abantu boona baakuratira Yoabu kuza kusherura Sheeba mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:14 Sheeba ogwo yaaraba omu nganda za Israeli zoona, yaahika Abeeli eya Besi-maaka, aba Bikuri boona baateerana, baamukurata." 
2Samuel20:15 Abashaija boona aba Yoabu baamugotera Abeeli eya Besi-maaka; baatuuma omutuumo gw'eitaka aha rugo rw'amabaare rw'orurembo; baatandika kuteera orugo kurukumbagaza. 
2Samuel20:16 Bwanyima omukazi omunyabwengye w'omuri orwo rurembo yaagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: Yeimwe nimuhurire, mbagambire! Mungirire Yoabu muti: Ija kunu, akugambire." 
2Samuel20:17 Yoabu yaamuhika haihi; ogwo mukazi yaamubuuza ati: Ori Yoabu? Onu ati: Ndi we. Omukazi yaamugira ati: Hurira ebigambo by'omuzaana waawe. Onu ati: Nimpurira. 
2Samuel20:18 Yaagira ati: ira bakaba bagira ngu, Ka baze kwehanuuza omuri Abeeli. Batyo bamarirayo ekibashobeire." 
2Samuel20:19 Nyowe ndi omwe ahari abo abakunda obusingye, kandi abarikwesigwa omuri Israeli. Mbwenu nooyenda kucwekyereza orurembo n'omuzaire omuri Israeli. Ahabw'enki nooyenda kumaraho obuhunguzi bwa MUKAMA?" 
2Samuel20:20 Yoabu yaamugarukamu ati: nikikabure! Nikikabure nyowe okumaraho nari okucwekyereza. 
2Samuel20:21 Ekyo tikwo kiri. Kureka hariho omushaija ow'omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, orikwetwa Sheeba mwene Bikuri, owaabangire omukono gwe kurwanisa omugabe Daudi. Mube niwe mwahayo wenka, mbone kubarugira aha rurembo. Ogwo mukazi yaagira Yoabu ati: Reeba, omutwe gwe twaza kugukutambikira, tugurenzye orugo." 
2Samuel20:22 Ahonaaho ogwo mukazi yaagaruka aha bantu baamwo boona n'obwo bwengye bwe, baatemaho Sheeba mwene Bikuri omutwe, baagutambikira Yoabu. Yoabu yaateera enzamba, abantu boona baataataana, baaruga aha rurembo, buri muntu yaagaruka omu ka ye. Na Yoabu yaatabaaruka, yaaza Yerusaalemu ow'omugabe." 
2Samuel20:23 Omu bunaku obwo Yoabu niwe yaabaire ari omukuru w'eihe ryona erya Israeli; na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada ari omukuru w'aba Keresi n'aba Pelesi; 
2Samuel20:24 Adoraamu ari omushorooza mukuru w'omushoro, Yehoshafaati mwene Ahiluudi ari omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho;" 
2Samuel20:25 Sheeva ari omuhandiiki; Zadoki na Abiasaari bari abanyamurwa; 
2Samuel20:26 na Iira owa Yayiri ari enganzi ya Daudi. 
2Samuel21:1 Omu biro bya Daudi hakabaho enjara okumara emyaka eshatu: Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari MUKAMA. MUKAMA yaagarukamu ati: Enjara egi eteire ahabwa Saulo n'enju ye y'enyitsi y'abantu, ahabw'okuba akaita aba Gibeoni." 
2Samuel21:2 Omugabe yaatuma kweta aba Gibeoni. (Aba Gibeoni abo bakaba batari b'eihanga ry'Abaisraeli, kureka bakaba bari ab'Abaamori, abaatsigaireho. N'obu Abaisraeli baarahiire kutabaita, kwonka Saulo akaba naayenda kubaita ahabw'eihato eri yaabaire ainiire Abaisraeli n'Abayuda.)" 
2Samuel21:3 Daudi yaabuuza aba Gibeoni ati: Mbwenu mbakorere ki? Nkaakaraba ki, mukabona kushabira obuhunguzi bwa MUKAMA omugisha?" 
2Samuel21:4 Aba Gibeoni baamugarukamu abti: Eki turikwenda ahari Saulo n'enju ye ti feeza, nari ezaabu; kandi okwita omuntu omuri Israeli ti kyaitu. Onu yaagira ati: Eki murikwenda, nikyo ndaabakorere." 
2Samuel21:5 Baagira omugabe bati: Ogwo mushaija waatucwekyereize, akacuma enaama y'okutumariraho kimwe, ngu tutagira ah'okutuura omu nsi ya Israeli yoona;" 
2Samuel21:6 mbwenu mutuhe abashaija mushanju omu batabani, tubahanikye omu maisho ga MUKAMA omuri Gibea ya Saulo owaatoorainwe MUKAMA. Omugabe yaagira ati: Niinyija kubabaha." 
2Samuel21:7 Kwonka omugabe yaarokora Mefiboshesi mwene Yonasaani mutabani wa Saulo, ahabw'endahiro ei Daudi na Yonasaani mwene Saulo baarahiriraine ahari MUKAMA." 
2Samuel21:8 Omugabe yaatwara batabani ba Rizipa muhara wa Aya bombi, abu yaazaariire Saulo, Arumooni na Mefiboshesi, kandi na batabani ba Merabu muhara wa Saulo bataano, abu yaazaariire Adurieli mwene Baruzilai owa Mehola;" 
2Samuel21:9 yaabahayo omu mikono y'aba Gibeoni, baabahanika omu kibungo omu maisho ga MUKAMA; boona mushanju baafeera hamwe. Baitwa omu itogyera, nibatandika kugyesha sayiri." 
2Samuel21:10 Rizipa muhara wa Aya yaatwara ekiguniya, yaaguma naakyeyarira aha rukiri okwiha omu itogyera okuhitsya obu enjura ya katumba yaagwire ahari egyo mintumbi; omu bunaku obwo bwona Rizipa tiyaikiriza mahungu g'omu mwanya kugizaho nyomushana, nari enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba nyekiro." 
2Samuel21:11 Baagambira Daudi eki Rizipa muhara wa Aya, ekinyanshunju kya Saulo, akozire." 
2Samuel21:12 Daudi yaagyenda, yaiha amagufa ga Saulo n'aga Yonasaani omutabani omu bantu ba Yabeshi-gileadi, abaabaire bagaibire omu muhanda gwa Besi-shaani, ei Abafilistia baabaire babahanikire, aha izooba eri Abafilistia baitiireho Saulo omuri Giliboa." 
2Samuel21:13 Yaihayo amagufa ga Saulo n'aga Yonasaani omutabani, kandi baateerana n'amagufa g'ababaire bahanikirwe." 
2Samuel21:14 Batyo baaziika amagufa ga Saulo na Yonasaani omutabani Zeela omu nsi ya Benyamiini omu kituuro kya Kiishi ishe; baahikiiriza ebi omugabe yaabaragiire byona. Bwanyima y'ebyo Ruhanga yaabona kuhurira okushaba kwabo ahabw'ensi. 
2Samuel21:15 Abafilistia baagaruka kurwana n'Abaisraeli. Daudi yaashuuma n'abashaija be, baarwana n'Abafilistia; ku baabaire nibakirwana, Daudi yaatandika kuruha." 
2Samuel21:16 Ishubi-benobu, mwijukuru w'ebikaaka biri, ou eicumu rye ryabaire riine oburemeezi bwa shekeli z'emiringa magana ashatu, ahagatiire rurara nsya, yaayenda kwita Daudi." 
2Samuel21:17 Kwonka Abishai mwene Zeruiya yaija kumuha emikono, yaarwana n'Omufilistia ogwo, yaamwita. Bwanyima engabo za Daudi baamurahiza, nibagira bati: otarigaruka kuhurura naitwe, nyentsya otakaaraaza etabaaza ya Israeli." 
2Samuel21:18 Bwanyima y'ebyo haagaruka kubaho orugamba n'Abafilistia Gobu; Sibekai owa Husha yaita Saafu ow'omuri baijukuru b'ebikaaka. 
2Samuel21:19 Haagaruka haabaho orugamba n'Abafilistia Gobu; Elihanani mwene Yaare-oregimu owa Betelehemu, yaita Goliasi owa Gaasi, ou orubango rw'eicumu rye rwabaire ruri nk'empimbi ei barukiraho emyenda." 
2Samuel21:20 Bwanyima haabaho orundi rugamba Gaasi. Okwo hakaba hariyo omushaija muraingwa munonga, owaabaire aine enkumu mukaaga ahari buri ngaro, n'enkumu z'ebigyere mukaaga ahari buri kigyere, zoona makumi abiri na ina; kandi nawe akaba ari ow'omuri baijukuru b'ebikaaka." 
2Samuel21:21 Ku yaahigire Abaisraeli, Yonasaani mwene Shimei mukuru wa Daudi yaamwita." 
2Samuel21:22 Abo boona bana bakaba bari baijukuru b'ebikaaka bya Gaasi; baitwa Daudi n'abashaija be. 
2Samuel22:1 Aha izooba eri MUKAMA yaajuniireho Daudi omu mikono y'abazigu be boona, n'omu mukono gwa Saulo, Daudi akagambira MUKAMA ebigambo by'ekyeshongoro eki," 
2Samuel22:2 naagira ati: MUKAMA n'orukiri rwangye, orugo rwangye orugumire, kandi Omujuni wangye," 
2Samuel22:3 Ruhanga wangye, orukiri rwangye, ou nyesiga, Omunaara gwangye omuraingwa, n'obuhungiro bwangye; Omujuni wangye, niiwe onkiza omwaga." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndyatakira MUKAMA oshemereire kuhimbisibwa; Obwo nibwo ndikira abazigu bangye. 
2Samuel22:5 Ebingonzi bya Rufu bikanzingazinga, N'emyegyemure y'okuhwerekyerera yantiinisa;" 
2Samuel22:6 Emigoye y'Okuzimu ekanzingazinga, Emitego ya Rufu yantanga omumaisho." 
2Samuel22:7 Omu busaasi bwangye naayeta MUKAMA, Naatakira Ruhanga wangye; Yaahurira eiraka ryangye ari omuri hekalu ye, N'okurira kwangye kwahika omu matu ge." 
2Samuel22:8 Bwanyima ensi yaatengyeta, yaatetema; N'emisingi y'eiguru yaanyiganyiga, Yaatengyetsibwa ekiniga kye." 
2Samuel22:9 Omwika gukaruga omu nyindo ze, N'omu kanwa ke haarugamu omuriro ogurikurya busha, Gwayatsya amakara." 
2Samuel22:10 Kandi akainamya eiguru, yaashuuma, Omwirima ndindindi guri ahansi y'ebigyere bye." 
2Samuel22:11 Yaagaruka aheekirwe kerubi, Yaareebwa ari aha mapapa g'omuyaga." 
2Samuel22:12 Akahindura omwirima obweshereko, nk'eihema erimwehinguririize, N'ebicu ebikwaitse ebirimu amaizi yaabigira eky'okumusangira" 
2Samuel22:13 Omu kumurinkana okwabaire kuri omu maisho ge Haarugamu amakara garikwaka. 
2Samuel22:14 MUKAMA yaahindira omu iguru, Rukira-boona yaagamba n'eiraka rye." 
2Samuel22:15 Yaarasha emyambi ye, yaabataataanisa, Niyo mirabyo ye mingi, yaababinga." 
2Samuel22:16 Obwo nibwo empanga z'ahansi y'enyanja zaareebwa, N'emisingi y'ensi ekashuuruuka Ahabw'okukabuka kwa MUKAMA, Ahabw'okuhuuha kw'amaani okw'omwitsyo gw'omu nyindo zaawe." 
2Samuel22:17 Yankununkirira ari ahaiguru, yankwata, Yaanyiha omu maizi maingi." 
2Samuel22:18 Yankiza omuzigu wangye ow'amaani, N'abo abaabaire nibaanyanga, ahakuba bakaba nibankiza amaani." 
2Samuel22:19 Bakampururira aha izooba ry'okureeberaho enaku; Kwonka MUKAMA yaaba obwegamo bwangye. 
2Samuel22:20 Yaaziinyihamu, yanta omu mwanya ogugarami, Yanjuna, ahabw'okuba akaba nanshemerererwa." 
2Samuel22:21 MUKAMA akampa ebihembo nk'okuhikiirira kwangye oku kuri, Yanzimuurira nk'okushemera kw'emikono yangye oku kuri." 
2Samuel22:22 Ahakuba nkagumira omu mihanda ya MUKAMA, Kandi tinkacumuraga kuruga ahari Ruhanga wangye." 
2Samuel22:23 Ebiragiro bye byona bikaba biri omu maisho gangye; Tinkeetantaraga bi yaaragiire. 
2Samuel22:24 Nkaba ntaine ky'okuhanwa omu maisho ge, Kandi nkeerinda okushiisha." 
2Samuel22:25 Nikyo MUKAMA yaanyihuriire, nk'okuhikiirira kwangye oku kuri, Akanzimuurira ebishemereire okushemera kw'emikono yangye omu maisho ge." 
2Samuel22:26 Aha munyambabazi oyeyoreka ori ow'embabazi, Ahari ohikire oyeyoreka ori ohikire;" 
2Samuel22:27 Ahari oshemeire oyeyoreka ori oshemeire, Aha mugomi oyeyoreka ogumire." 
2Samuel22:28 Ojuna abacureezi, Kwonka amaisho gaawe gari aha banyamaryo okubagarura ahansi." 
2Samuel22:29 Eego, niiwe okongyeza etabaaza yangye, ai MUKAMA; Ruhanga wangye ayakira omwirima gwangye." 
2Samuel22:30 Eego, ahabwawe nimbaasa kurwanisa omutwe gw'engabo; Ahabw'okuhwerwa Ruhanga wangye nimbaasa kuguruka orugo." 
2Samuel22:31 Ruhanga ogwo, omuhanda gwe n'oguhikire, Okuraganisa kwa MUKAMA kurengirwe, n'okw'amazima. Niwe ngabo ekingira abamuhungiraho boona." 
2Samuel22:32 Mbwenu n'oha oba Ruhanga, otari MUKAMA? N'oha oba Rukiri, otari Ruhanga waitu?" 
2Samuel22:33 Ruhanga ogu n'obuhungiro bwangye obugumire; Niwe ahabura abahikire omu mihanda yaabo. 
2Samuel22:34 Agira ebigyere byangye nk'eby'empara, Anyemereza aha nengo mpamire." 
2Samuel22:35 Ayegyesa engaro zangye okurwana, Ngu emikono yangye ebaase kureega obuta bw'emiringa." 
2Samuel22:36 Ompaire engabo y'okujuna kwawe, Okutwaza gye kwawe kunkurize." 
2Samuel22:37 Ompanguhiize ah'okuraba, Ebigyere byangye tibyaterera." 
2Samuel22:38 Nkakurata abazigu bangye, naabahwerekyereza; Kandi tindagarukire okuhitsya obu baahweireho." 
2Samuel22:39 Naabamaraho nimbacumita, tibaabaasa kwimuka; Baagwa ahansi y'ebigyere byangye." 
2Samuel22:40 Ahakuba okanzirika amaani g'okurwana, Waagomoora abaabaire nibaija kundwanisa." 
2Samuel22:41 Okareetera abazigu bangye kumpunga, Kandi n'abaabaire nibaanyanga naabacwekyereza." 
2Samuel22:42 Baamagamaga, kwonka baabura kijuna; Baatakira MUKAMA, tiyaabagarukamu." 
2Samuel22:43 Naabateera, naabagira omucuucu gw'ahansi; Naabaribatiirira nk'ebyondo by'omu nguuto." 
2Samuel22:44 Okankiza okurwana n'amahanga, Wandinda ngu mbe mukuru waago; Naaheerezibwa eihanga eri ntakamanyaga." 
2Samuel22:45 Abanyamahanga baija ahi ndi nibaajura; Ku bampuriire bati, ahonaaho baanyorobera." 
2Samuel22:46 Abo banyamahanga bakeehwa amatsiko, Baaruga omu bigo byabo nibatetema." 
2Samuel22:47 MUKAMA n'ohuriirre; Rukiri wangye ahimbisibwe! Ruhanga orukiri rw'okujunwa kwangye aheebwe ekitiinisa! 
2Samuel22:48 Niwe Ruhanga owampooreire, Akangomoorera amahanga," 
2Samuel22:49 Akaanyiha omu mikono y'abazigu bangye. Eego, okanta ahaiguru y'abarikundwanisa, Waanyiha omu mikono y'abanyamwaga." 
2Samuel22:50 N'ahabw'ekyo, ai MUKAMA, ndyakusiimira omu mahanga, Nyeshongore eby'okuhimbisa eiziina ryawe." 
2Samuel22:51 Omugabe ou yaataireho, amuha obusinguzi bwingi, Kandi ayoreka ou yaashukireho amajuta embabazi, Niwe Daudi n'abaijukuru ebiro n'ebiro." 
2Samuel23:1 Ebi nibyo bigambo bya Daudi eby'aha muheru. Okuhanuura kwa Daudi mwene Yese, Okuhanuura kw'omushaija owaatungwirwe, Okuhanuura kw'owaashukirweho Ruhanga wa Yakobo amajuta, Omuhimbi murungi wa zaaburi za Israeli." 
2Samuel23:2 Omwoyo wa MUKAMA naagambira omuriinye; Ekigambo kye tikinguga ha rurimi. 
2Samuel23:3 Ruhanga wa Israeli agambire, Rukiri wa Israeli angambiire, ati: Omuntu ku ategyeka abantu omu buryo buhikire, Naategyekyera omu kutiina Ruhanga," 
2Samuel23:4 Abaakira nk'omushekye oku gujuguta omu kasheeshe, Nk'oku eizoba ryaka omu kasheeshe akataine kibunda, Aba nk'enjura erikumeza obunyatsi omu itaka." 
2Samuel23:5 N'ekya buzima, enju yangye tikwo eri na Ruhanga, Kwonka We andaganiise endagaano etarihwaho, Etebeekanisiibwe gye omuri byona, kandi ehamire. Tarikwija kuhikiiriza Okuhwerwa kwangye kwona n'ebi ndikwetenga?" 
2Samuel23:6 Kwonka abataine Ruhanga boona baryaba nk'amahwa g'okunagwa, Ahakuba tigarikubaasa kukwatwa n'engaro;" 
2Samuel23:7 Kureka orikwenda kugakoraho Ashemereire kugakoresaho ekyoma n'orubango rw'eicumu; Kandi baryabookyeza kimwe n'omuriro. 
2Samuel23:8 Aga nigo maziina g'amamanzi agu Daudi yaabaire aine; Yehoshebashebesi owa Takimooni niwe yaabaire ari mukuru omuri abo abashatu; akakwata eicumu rye, yaariitsa abantu magana munaana omurundi gumwe." 
2Samuel23:9 Owaabaire naamukurata omuri ago mamanzi ashatu ni Eleazaari mwene Dodo, mwijukuru wa Ahohi. Akaba ari hamwe na Daudi, obu baahiga Abafilistia abaabaire beeteeraniireyo kurwana, Abaisraeli bakabahunga." 
2Samuel23:10 Yaimuka, yaita Abafilistia okuhitsya obu omukono gwe gwaruhire, engaro ye ekaramatana na rurara; eryo izooba MUKAMA yaabaha okusingura kuhango, abandi baamugarukira ahabw'okucwijura abaitsirwe kwonka." 
2Samuel23:11 Kandi ogwo akaba naakuratwa Shama, mwene Ageye, owa Harari. Abafilistia bakaba bateeraniire Leehi, ahu omusiri ogwijwire enkoore gwabaire guri; abashaija boona baahunga Abafilistia;" 
2Samuel23:12 kwonka we yaayemerera ahagati y'ogwo musiri, yaagurinda, yaita Abafilistia; MUKAMA yaabaha okusingura kuhango." 
2Samuel23:13 Omu igyesha abo bashaija bonshatu ab'omu mamanzi makumi ashatu bakashuuma, baashanga Daudi omu nyanga ya Adulaamu. Obwo omutwe gw'engabo z'Abafilistia gukaba gusiisiire omu ruhanga rwa Reefa;" 
2Samuel23:14 Daudi ari omu kigo, n'Abafilistia bari Betelehemu." 
2Samuel23:15 Daudi yaatenga, yaagira ati: Nkaabaasibwa ki hagira owampa otwizi tw'omu kiziba eriri aha irembo rya Betelehemu, ntunywa!" 
2Samuel23:16 Ahonaaho ago mamanzi ashatu gaayataguza omu rusiisira rw'Abafilistia, gaataha amaizi g'omuri eryo iziba rya Betelehemu, eryabaire riri aha irembo, baagatwarira Daudi; kwonka we yaayanga kuganywa, kureka yaagashuka omu maisho ga MUKAMA;" 
2Samuel23:17 yaagira ati: Ai MUKAMA, rubuuza nyowe okukora eki. Nimbaasa kunywa eshagama y'abashaija abaayoga amagara gaabo? Ekyo nikyo yaayangiire kuganywa. Ebyo nibyo ago mamanzi ashatu gaakozire." 
2Samuel23:18 Kandi Abishai mukuru wa Yoabu mwene Zeruiya niwe yaabaire ari mukuru w'abo makumi ashatu. Akakwata eicumu rye, yaarwana n'abashaija magana ashatu, yaabaita, yaarangaanwa nk'abo abashatu." 
2Samuel23:19 Omuri abo makumi ashatu niwe yaakizire kurangaanwa, akahinduka mukuru waabo; kwonka tiyaahika hari abo abashatu." 
2Samuel23:20 Kandi Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada owa Kabuzieli, owaabaire ari emanzi, akakora eby'amaani; yaita beene Arieli babiri aba Moabu. Kandi aha izooba rimwe omu biro by'ebirika akashuuma, yaitira entare omu kiina." 
2Samuel23:21 Kandi yaita Omunyamisri murungi ahamaisho. Omunyamisri ogwo akaba aine eicumu omu ngaro, kwonka Benaaya yaamushuumira n'enkoni, yaamusikura eicumu omu ngaro, yaarimwitsa." 
2Samuel23:22 Ebyo nibyo Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada yaakozire, akarangaanwa nk'abo abashatu ab'amaani." 
2Samuel23:23 Yaarangaanwa omuri abo makumi ashatu, kwonka tiyaahika hari bari abashatu. Daudi yaamuhindura omukuru w'abarinzi be." 
2Samuel23:24 Asaheeli murumuna wa Yoabu akaba ari omwe ahari abo makumi ashatu, na Elihanani mwene Doodo owa Betelehemu," 
2Samuel23:25 Shama owa Harodi, Elika owa Harodi," 
2Samuel23:26 Helezi owa Paluti, Iira mwene Ikishi owa Tekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiezeeri owa Anatoosi, Mebunai owa Huusha," 
2Samuel23:28 Zalumooni owa Ahohi, Maharai owa Netofa," 
2Samuel23:29 Helebu mwene Baana owa Netofa, Itayi, mwene Ribai owa Gibea eya Benyamiini," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaaya owa Piratooni, Hidai ow'omu tugyera twa Gaashi," 
2Samuel23:31 Abialiboni owa Arubasi, Azimaveesi owa Bahurimu," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliahuba owa Shalibooni, beene Yasheni, Yonasaani," 
2Samuel23:33 Shama owa Harari, Ahiamu mwene Sharari owa Arari," 
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti mwene Ahasibai mwijukuru wa Maaka, Eliamu mwene Ahisofeeli owa Giilo," 
2Samuel23:35 Hezero owa Karumeeli, Parati owa Arubi," 
2Samuel23:36 Igaali mwene Nasani owa Zooba, Baani owa Gaadi," 
2Samuel23:37 Zeleki Omuamoni, Naharai owa Beeroosi, Yoabu mwene Zeruiya," 
2Samuel23:38 Iira owa Ituri, Garebu owa Ituri," 
2Samuel23:39 na Uriya Omuhiiti boona makumi ashatu na mushanju. 
2Samuel24:1 Kandi MUKAMA yaagaruka, yaagirira Israeli ekiniga, yaimutsya Daudi kubakora kubi, naagira ati: Gyenda obare Abaisraeli n'Abayuda." 
2Samuel24:2 Omugabe yaagira Yoabu omukuru w'eihe rye, ou yaabaire aine, ati: Gyenda orabe omu nganda za Israeli zoona, okuruga Daani okuhika Beeri-sheba, mubare abantu, mbone kumanya omubaro gwabo." 
2Samuel24:3 Yoabu yaagira omugabe ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ayongyere aha bantu okukira oku bari emirundi igana, kandi omugabe akyereebere. Beitu shi, Nyakusinga omugabe, ahabw'enki nooshemerererwa ekintu ekyo?" 
2Samuel24:4 Kwonka ekigambo ky'omugabe kyakiza ebya Yoabu n'abakuru b'engabo ze amaani. Bwanyima Yoabu n'abo bakuru b'engabo baaruga omumaisho g'omugabe, baaza kubara Abaisraeli." 
2Samuel24:5 Baayambuka Yorudani, baatandikira omuri Aroeli, n'omu rurembo orwabaire ruri ahagati y'oruhita, baaza Gaadi, baagumizamu, baahika Yazeri." 
2Samuel24:6 Bwanyima baahika Gileadi, na Kadeshi ey'omu nsi y'Abahiiti; bwanyima baahika Daani, baagumizamu, baaziguuruka baahika Sidoni;" 
2Samuel24:7 okuruga aho baahika omu kigo kya Tuuro, n'omu ndembo zoona ez'Abahiivi n'Abanyakanaani. Bwanyima baaza omuri Negebu eya Yuda, baahika Beeri-sheba." 
2Samuel24:8 Ku baaherize kubara omu nsi yoona, baagaruka Yerusaalemu, bamazire ameezi mwenda n'ebiro makumi abiri." 
2Samuel24:9 Yoabu yaaha omugabe omubaro gw'abantu abu yaabazire; omuri Israeli hakaba harimu abashaija amamanzi enkwata-rurara obusiriira munaana; kandi Abayuda bakaba bari obusiriira butaano. 
2Samuel24:10 Kwonka ku yaaherize kubara abantu, omutima gwe gwamushinja; yaagira MUKAMA ati: Ncumwire munonga ahabw'ekyo eki nkozire. Kwonka mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, ai MUKAMA, iha aha mwiru waawe okutahikiirira; ahakuba ndengyesereize, naakora eky'obufa-mutima." 
2Samuel24:11 Daudi ku yaimukire omu kasheeshe, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaizira nabi Gaadi, omuhanuuzi wa Daudi, nikigira kiti:" 
2Samuel24:12 Gyenda ogire Daudi oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, naagira ati: Naakuha ebintu bishatu, oiheho kimwe, mbe nikyo naakukora." 
2Samuel24:13 Atyo Gaadi yaija ahari Daudi, yaakimugambira; yaamugira ati: Ahari ebi bishatu ihaho kimwe, ensi yaawe okuteerwa enjara emyaka mushanju; nari okuguma noohunga abazigu baawe bakubingire okumara ameezi ashatu; nari ensi yaawe okujuumikirwa orufu okumara ebiro bishatu. Mbwenu teekateeka, ongambire eki ndaagarukyemu Ontumire." 
2Samuel24:14 Daudi yaagira Gaadi ati: Naashobererwa kimwe; ka tugwe omu mikono ya MUKAMA, ahakuba embabazi ze ni nyingi; ndekye kugwa omu mikono y'abantu." 
2Samuel24:15 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaajuumikiza Israeli orufu, okwiha omuri ako kasheeshe okuhitsya aha bunaku obutairweho; haafa abantu obukumi mushanju, okuruga Daani okuhika Beeri-sheba." 
2Samuel24:16 Kwonka maraika ku yaabangiire Yerusaalemu omukono kugicwekyereza, MUKAMA yaayegarukamu ahabw'ako kabi, yaagira maraika owaabaire naacwekyereza abantu ati: Ekyo nikimara. Banguura omukono. Obwo maraika wa MUKAMA akaba ari haihi n'embuga ya Arauna Omuyebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Daudi ku yaareebire maraika owaabaire naita abantu, yaagira MUKAMA ati: Reeba, niinye ncumwire, nkashiisha mononga; mbwenu entaama ezi zo zikozire ki? Ninkweshengyereza, omukono gwawe gube niinye gwarwanisa n'enju ya tata." 
2Samuel24:18 Eryo izooba Gaadi yaija ahari Daudi, yaamugira ati: Inamuka, oyombekyere MUKAMA eitambiro aha mbuga ya Arauna Omuyebusi." 
2Samuel24:19 Atyo Daudi yainamuka, ahabw'ekigambo kya Gaadi eki MUKAMA amuragiire." 
2Samuel24:20 Arauna ku yaanagire amaisho, yaareeba omugabe n'abagaragwa be nibaija ah'ari; yaashohora, yainama omu maisho g'omugabe;" 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna yaabuuza ati: N'enki ekyareeta mukama wangye omugabe aha mwiru we? Daudi yaamugarukamu ati: Naareetwa okugura embuga yaawe, kwombekyera MUKAMA eitambiro, ngu orufu rurugye omu bantu." 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna yaagira Daudi ati: Mukama wangye omugabe atware eki arikwenda kyona, akihongye; reeba ente ez'ekitambo ky'okwotsya nzizi, n'ebihuuzo n'emigamba y'ente mubiihemu enku." 
2Samuel24:23 Ebyo byona, Nyakusinga, nyowe Arauna naabiha omugabe. Yaagaruka yaagira omugabe ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akwikirize." 
2Samuel24:24 Kwonka omugabe yaagira Arauna ati: Ngaaha; buzimazima niinyija kubigura naiwe, nkuhe obuguzi bwabyo. Tindikwija kuhongyera MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye ebitambo by'okwotsya, ebi ntaheereire byangye. Atyo Daudi yaagura egyo mbuga n'ezo nte shekeli z'efeeza makumi ataano." 
2Samuel24:25 Daudi yaayombekyerayo MUKAMA eitambiro, yaatamba ebitambo by'okwotsya n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye. Atyo MUKAMA yaahurira ebi yaayeshengyereziibwe ahabw'ensi; orufu rwaruga omuri Israeli." 
1Kings1:1 Omugabe Daudi akaba akuzire munonga, ahikire omu ngingo zaabukuru; n'obu baabaire bamushweka ebeshweko, akaba atakibaasa kutagatirwa." 
1Kings1:2 Nikyo abagaragwa be baamugiire bati: Nyakusinga Omugabe, ka bakusherurire omwishiki empangare, agume akuheereze, kandi abyame omu kifuba kyawe, obone kutagatirwa." 
1Kings1:3 Batyo basherura omwishiki murungi omuri Israeli yoona, baabona Abishaagi owa Shuneemu, baamureetera omugabe." 
1Kings1:4 Omwishiki ogwo akaba ari murungi munonga, yaaba omuranga w'omugabe, yaaguma naamuheereza; kwonka omugabe tiyaamumanya." 
1Kings1:5 Bwanyima Adoniya mutabani wa Hagisi yaayekuza, naagira ati: Niinyija kuba omugabe. Yaayeteeraho ebigaari n'ab'aha mbaraasi, kandi n'abashaija makumi ataano b'okumwebembera." 
1Kings1:6 Ishe akaba atakamugwisaga kubi naamugira ati: Ahabw'enki okozire oti n'oti? Akaba ari omushaija murungi munonga omu kureeba; kandi niwe yaabaire naakurata Abusalomu. 
1Kings1:7 Adonia ogwo yaahanuura na Yoabu mwene Zeruiya n'Abiasaari omunyamurwa; baakwatanisa nawe, baamuhwera." 
1Kings1:8 Kwonka Zadoki omunyamurwa na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada, na Nasani nabi, na Shemei, na Rei, na bari bashaija ba Daudi amamanzi bakaba batakwataniise na Adoniya." 
1Kings1:9 Adoniya yaatambira entaama n'ente n'eby'ebishaju haihi n'eibaare rya Zoheleesi, erihereraine na Eni-rogeli; yaayeta beene ishe batabani b'omugabe, n'abategyeki boona ab'omuri Yuda ab'obugabe;" 
1Kings1:10 kwonka nka Nasani nabi na Benaaya n'abo bashaija amamanzi na Sulemaani mwene ishe tiyabeeta. 
1Kings1:11 Bwanyima Nasani yaagira Batisheba nyina wa Sulemaani ati: Tohuriire Adoniya mwene Hagisi ku abaire omugabe, haza mukama waitu Daudi atarikukumanya?" 
1Kings1:12 Mbwenu nu, ija nkuhe obwengye, obone kukiza amagara gaawe n'aga mutabani waawe Sulemaani." 
1Kings1:13 Irooko oze ow'omugabe Daudi, omugire oti: Nyakusinga Omugabe, torikwijuka ku waaraganiise omuzaana waawe noorahira oti: Buzimazima mutabani waawe Sulemaani niwe ariza aha ngoma naarugaho; kandi oti: Niwe arishutama aha kitebe kyangye ky'obugabe? Mbwenu ahabw'enki heemire Adoniya?" 
1Kings1:14 Mbwenu ku oraabe nookigamba n'omugabe, naanye niinyija kutaahamu nkukuratiire, mpamye ebigambo byawe." 
1Kings1:15 Atyo Batisheba yaataaha omu kishengye ky'omugabe; (obwo omugabe akaba akuzire munonga, kandi Abishaagi owa Shuneemu niwe yaabaire naamuheereza)." 
1Kings1:16 Batisheba yainama, yaatangirira omugabe; omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Nooyenda ki?" 
1Kings1:17 Yaamugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, okarahira MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, noogira omuzaana waawe oti: Buzimazima Sulemaani mutabani waawe niwe ariza aha ngoma naarugaho; kandi oti: Niwe arishutama aha kitebe kyangye ky'obugabe." 
1Kings1:18 Mbwenu reeba, Adoniya niwe ayemire, haza, Mukama wangye Omugabe, otarikukimanya." 
1Kings1:19 Aitsire ente n'eby'ebishaju n'entaama bingi, yaabitamaba, kandi yaayeta batabani b'omugabe boona, na Abiasaari omunyamurwa na Yoabu omukuru w'eihe, kwonka Salemaani omwiru waawe tiyaamweta." 
1Kings1:20 Mbwenu, Nyakusinga Omugabe, Abaisraeli boona niiwe bataireho amaisho, kubagambira orishutama aha kitebe kya mukama wangye omugabe yaarugaho." 
1Kings1:21 Nyakusinga Omugabe, ku oraabe otakozire otyo, bwanyima ku ori gwejyegyera waashanga baashwenkuru, nyowe na mutabani wangye Sulemaani turyabarwa nk'abacumwire." 
1Kings1:22 Batisheba ku yaabaire naakigamba n'omugabe, Nasani nabi yaataahamu." 
1Kings1:23 Baagambira omugabe bati: Reeba, Nasani nabi ari aha. Ku yaahikire omu maisho g'omugabe, yainama omu maisho ge." 
1Kings1:24 Nasani yaagira ati: Nyakusinga Omugabe, niiwe ogizire oti: Adoniya niwe ariza aha ngoma naarugaho, kandi niwe arishutama aha kitebe kyangye ky'obugabe?" 
1Kings1:25 Ahabw'okuba eri izooba yaashuuma, yaita ente n'eby'ebishaju n'entaama bingi munonga, yaabitamba, kandi yaayeta batabani b'omugabe boona na Yoabu omukuru w'eihe na Abiasaari omunyamurwa; mbwenu bari omu maisho ge nibarya nibanywa, nibagira bati: Omugabe Adoniya nakaramaare!" 
1Kings1:26 Kwonka nyowe omwiru waawe, na Zadoki omunyamurwa na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada n'omwiru waawe Sulemaani tatwetsire." 
1Kings1:27 Ekyo kirugire ahari mukama wangye omugabe, kandi otagambiire abairu baawe orishutama aha kitebe kyawe ky'obugabe waarugaho." 
1Kings1:28 Omugabe Daudi yaagira ati: Nyetera Batisheba. Batisheba yaija, yaayemerera omu maisho ge." 
1Kings1:29 Omugabe yaarahira naagira ati: Nk'oku MUKAMA ari ohuriire, owaihire amagara gangye omu busaasi bw'emiringo yoona," 
1Kings1:30 buzimazima nk'oku naakurahiire MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli nimpamya nti: Mutabani waawe Sulemaani niwe ariza aha ngoma naarugaho, kandi niwe arishutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe omu mwanya gwangye, nikwo ndaagire eri izooba." 
1Kings1:31 Batisheba yainama, yaaramya omugabe naagira ati: Mukama wangye Omugabe Daudi nakaramaare!" 
1Kings1:32 Omugabe Daudi yaagira ati: Muunyetere Zadoki omunyamurwa na Nasani nabi na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada. Nabo baija omu maisho ge. 
1Kings1:33 Omugabe yaabagira ati: Mugyende n'abagaragwa ba mukama waanyu, mutembye mutabani wangye Sulemaani enyumbu yangye ahabwangye, mumushuumye Gihoni;" 
1Kings1:34 ku muraahikyeyo, Zadoki omunyamurwa na Nasani nabi bamushukyeho amajuta kuba omugabe wa Israeli; bwanyima muteere eikondere, mugire muti: Omugabe Sulemaani nakaramaare!" 
1Kings1:35 Bwanyima mwije enyima ye, aije ashutame aha kitebe kyangye ky'obugabe; ahakuba aryaba omugabe omu mwanya gwangye; kandi niwe naataho kuba omugabe wa Israeli na Yuda." 
1Kings1:36 Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada yaagarukamu omugabe ati: Amiina! MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa mukama wangye omugabe nawe agire atyo." 
1Kings1:37 Nk'oku MUKAMA abaire ari na mukama wangye omugabe n'okuhitsya hati, abe nikwo yaaba na Sulemaani, atunguure ekitebe kye ky'obugabe okukira ekya mukama wangye omugabe Daudi." 
1Kings1:38 Atyo Zadoki omunyamurwa na Nasani nabi na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada n'Abakeresi n'Abapelesi, baashuuma baatembya Sulemaani enyumbu y'omugabe Daudi, baamutwara Gihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Zadoki omunyamurwa yaiha eihembe ry'amajuta omu Ihema, yaagashuka ahari Sulemaani. Baateera eikondere; abantu boona baagira bati: Omugabe Sulemaani nakaramaare!" 
1Kings1:40 Abantu boona baagyenda bamukuratiire, nibateera obunyamurera, nibashemererwa n'okushemererwa kwingi, n'ensi yaashatuka ahabw'akaari kaabo." 
1Kings1:41 Adoniya n'abagyenyi boona abu yaabaire aine, ku baabaire nibaheza bati kurya, baakihurira. Yoabu ku yaahuriire okugamba kw'eikondere, yaagira ati: Orwo rwari ruri omu rurembo n'orw'enki?" 
1Kings1:42 Ku yaabaire naakigamba, yaayecura Yonasaani mwene Abiasaari omunyamurwa; Adoniya yaamugira ati: Taaha omu nju, ahakuba ori omwesigwa, kandi oreetsire amakuru marungi." 
1Kings1:43 Yonasaani yaagarukamu Adoniya ati: Ngaaha! Mukama waitu omugabe Daudi yaayemeka Sulemaani; 
1Kings1:44 kandi omugabe yaamwohereza na Zadoki omunyamurwa, na Nasani nabi, na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada, hamwe n'Abakeresi n'Abapelesi; baamutembya enyumbu y'omugabe;" 
1Kings1:45 kandi Zadoki omunyamurwa na Nasani nabi baamushukaho amajuta kuba omugabe omuri Gihoni; abantu baarugayo nibashemererwa; n'ahabw'ekyo orurembo niruteera akaari. Ako niko kaari aku mwahurira. 
1Kings1:46 Mbwenu Sulemaani ari aha kitebe ky'obugabe. 
1Kings1:47 Kandi abagaragwa b'omugabe baija kushabira mukama waitu omugabe Daudi mugisha, nibagira bati: Ruhanga waawe atunguure eiziina rya Sulemaani rirangaanwe okukira eryawe, kandi n'obugabe bwe abugire obwe'ekitiinisa okukira obwawe. Bwanyima omugabe yainama aha kitanda kye, yaaramya." 
1Kings1:48 Kandi omugabe yaagira ati: MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, asiimwe, owampa omuntu ow'omu nda yangye kushutama aha kitebe kyangye ky'obugabe eri izooba, kandi n'amaisho gangye gakakireeba." 
1Kings1:49 Bwanyima abagyenyi ba Adoniya boona baatiina, baimuka baagyenda, buri muntu yaatoora ogwe." 
1Kings1:50 Adoniya yaatiina Sulemaani; yaimuka, yaagyenda, yaakwata amahembe g'eitambiro." 
1Kings1:51 Baagambira Sulemaani bati: Reeba, Adoniya atiinire omugabe Sulemaani; akwaitse amahembe g'eitambiro, naagira ati: Omugabe Sulemaani andahire eri izooba ku atarikwija kwita omwiru we na rurara." 
1Kings1:52 Sulemaani yaagarukamu ati: ku araayeyorekye ari omushaija omwesigwa, tiharikwija kugira kashokye na kamwe ak'aha mutwe gwe akaagwa ahansi; kwonka ku araabonekiweho ekibi, naafa." 
1Kings1:53 Atyo omugabe Sulemaani yaatuma, baamwiha aha itambiro, yaija yainama omu maisho ge; Sulemaani yaamugira ati: Taaha owaawe." 
1Kings2:1 Obunaku bw'okufa kwa Daudi ku bwairiire haihi, yaayhangangiriza omutabani Sulemaani naamugira ati." 
1Kings2:2 Ndi haihi kugyenda, nk'ab'ensi boona oku bagyenda. Ba ow'amaani, oyeyorekye ori omushaija," 
1Kings2:3 okwate ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikukuragiira, okugyendera omu mihanda ye n'okukwata ebiragiro bye, n'ebi yaaragiire, n'ebyatairweho, kandi n'ebi yaahamize, nk'ebyahandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Musa oku biri, obone kuba gye omu bi orikukora byona, kandi n'ei oraagyende yoona," 
1Kings2:4 MUKAMA abone kuhamya ekigambo kye, eki yangambireho naagira ati: Abaana baawe ku baryerinda omu mitwarize yaabo, baagyendera omu maisho gangye omu mazima n'emitima yaabo yoona n'amagara gaabo goona, toribura oriza aha ngoma ya Israeli." 
1Kings2:5 Kandi noomanya oku Yoabu mwene Zeruiya yangizire, n'oku yaagizire abakuru babiri ab'amahe ga Israeli, Abuneeri, mwene Neeri, na Amasa mwene Yeseri, abu yaitsire naahoora enzigu, akasheesha eshagama omu biro by'obusingye nk'ori aha rugamba, akasiiga egyo shagama aha rukoba oru yaabaire ayezirikiise, n'aha nkaito ezi yaabaire ajwaire." 
1Kings2:6 N'ahabw'ekyo otwaze nk'oku obwengye bwawe buri, kandi otarikiriza omutwe gwe gw'enju kushuuma okuzimu n'obusingye." 
1Kings2:7 Kwonka oryagirira embabazi beene Baruzilai Omunyagileadi, babarirwe omu barikuriira aha meeza yaawe; ahakuba obu naabaire mpungire Abusalomu mwene sho, nikwo bangiriire." 
1Kings2:8 Kandi reeba, hariho Shimei mwene Geera, Omubenyamiini owa Bahurimu, owankyeenire okukyeena kubi munonga aha izooba eri naagiiriireho Mahanaimu; kwonka akaija kuntangirira Yorudani, naamurahira MUKAMA nimmugira nti: Tindikwitsa rurara." 
1Kings2:9 Kwonka mbwenu otarimubara nk'otaine rubanja; ahakuba ori omushaija w'obwengye; oryamanya eki oshemereire kumukora; kandi oryashuumya omutwe gwe gw'enju okuzimu, guriho eshagama." 
1Kings2:10 Bwanyima Daudi yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi." 
1Kings2:11 Emyaka ei Daudi yaamazire aha ngoma naategyeka Israeli ekahika makumi ana; emyaka mushanju akagitegyekyera Heburooni, kandi makumi ashatu n'eshatu, yaagitegyekyera Yerusaalemu." 
1Kings2:12 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaashutama aha kitebe kya Daudi ishe; obugabe bwe bwahamibwa munonga. 
1Kings2:13 Adoniya mwene Hagisi yaija ahari Batisheba nyina wa Sulemaani. Batisheba yaamugira ati: Ni buhooro? Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Ni buhooro. 
1Kings2:14 Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Nyine eki ndikwenda kukugambira. Nyin'omugabe ati: Ngambira. 
1Kings2:15 Yaamugira ati: Noomanya ku obugabe bwabaire buri obwangye, kandi Abaisraeli boona ku baabaire bantaireho amaisho, ngu mbategyekye; kwonka bwanyima kyahinduka bwaba obwa mwene tata, ahabw'okuba akabuheebwa MUKAMA." 
1Kings2:16 Mbwenu nyine eki ndikwenda kushaba; otakinyima. Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Kigambe. 
1Kings2:17 Yaamugira ati: Nshabira omugabe Sulemaani, ahakuba tarikwija kukwangira, ampe Abishaagi owa Shuneemu, mmushwere." 
1Kings2:18 Betisheba yaamugarukamu ati: Eego, niinyija kumukugambirira." 
1Kings2:19 Atyo Betisheba yaaza ow'omugabe kumumugambirira. Omugabe yaimuka kumubugana, yaamwinamira; bwanyima yaashutama aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe, yaaragiira ku bareetera nyina ekitebe, yaashutama aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo." 
1Kings2:20 Yaamugira ati: Nyine ekintu kikye eki ndikwenda kukushaba; kandi otakinyima. Omugabe yaamugira ati: Kinshabe, Mukaikuru wangye; tindikwija kukikwima." 
1Kings2:21 Onu ati: Mbwenu ninkushaba oikirize Abishaagi owa Shuneemu ashwerwe Adoniya mwene sho. 
1Kings2:22 Omugabe Sulemaani yaagarukamu nyina ati: Ahabw'enki nooshabira Adoniya Abishaagi owa Shuneemu? Mushabire nu n'obugabe; ahabw'okuba ni mukuru wangye; kandi shabira na Abiasaari omunyamurwa na Yoabu mwene Zeruiya. 
1Kings2:23 Bwanyima omugabe Sulemaani yaarahira MUKAMA, naagira ati: Adoniya ku araabe atazizire eki kigambo, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho." 
1Kings2:24 N'ahabw'ekyo nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire, owantaireho, akaanyemeka omu mwanya gwa tata Daudi, kandi onyombekyeire eka nk'oku yaaraganiise, buzimazima eri izooba Adoniya naitwa." 
1Kings2:25 Atyo omugabe Sulemaani yaatuma Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada; yaamuteera yaafa. 
1Kings2:26 Kandi omugabe yaagira Abiasaari omunyamurwa ati: Irooko oze Anatoosi omu kibanja kyawe; ahakuba oshemereire kwitwa. Kwonka mbwenu tindikukwita, ahabw'eokuba okeekorera eshanduukye ya Mukama RUHANGA omu maisho ga tata Daudi, kandi okabonabona na tata omuri byona ebi yaabonabonesiibwemu." 
1Kings2:27 Atyo Sulemaani yaabinga Abiasaari omu bunyamurwa, ngu arekye kuba omunyamurwa wa MUKAMA; yaahikiiriza atyo ekigambo kya MUKAMA eki yaagambire ahari Eli omuri Shiilo." 
1Kings2:28 Egyo nkuru ku yaahikire Yoabu, yaahungira omu Ihema rya MUKAMA, yaakwata amahembe g'eitambiro; ahabw'okuba akaba akwataniise na Adoniya, n'obu araabe atarakwataniise na Abusalomu." 
1Kings2:29 Kandi baagambira omugabe Sulemaani bati: Yoabu yaahungira omu Ihema rya MUKAMA; kandi reeba, ari aha itambiro. Sulemaani yaayohereza Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada, ati: Irooko omwite." 
1Kings2:30 Atyo Benaaya yaahika aha Ihema rya MUKAMA, yaamugira ati: Omugabe yaagira ngu, Orugyeyo. Onu ati: Ngaaha! Ka ngwe aha. Benaaya yaagaruka yaagambira omugabe ati: Oku nikwo Yoabu yangira, kandi nikwo yangarukamu." 
1Kings2:31 Omugabe yaamugira ati: Okore nk'oku yaagamba; omwite, omuziikye, obone kwiha ahariinye n'aha nju ya tata orubanja rw'eshagama ei Yoabu yaaseeseire busha." 
1Kings2:32 MUKAMA naija kumuhoora, asheeshe eshagama ye, naamutura abantu babiri abu yaitsize rurara, omugurusi wangye Daudi atakimanyire, haza baabaire bari abantu abarikumukira oburungi n'okuhikiirira, nibo Abuneeri mwene Neeri, omukuru w'eihe rya Israeli, na Amasa mwene Yeseri, omukuru w'eihe rya Yuda." 
1Kings2:33 Okwo nikwo Yoabu arihoorwa naaturwa eshagama yaabo, we n'oruzaaro rwe ebiro byona; kwona Daudi n'oruzaaro rwe n'enju ye n'obugabe bwe biryagira obusingye oburikuruga ahari MUKAMA ebiro byona." 
1Kings2:34 Atyo Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada yaagarukayo, yaamuteera, yaamwita; baamuziika omu ka ye, ahu yaabaire atwire omu ihamba." 
1Kings2:35 Bwanyima omugabe yaata Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada omu mwanya gwe kuba omukuru w'eihe; kandi yaata Zadoki omunyamurwa omu mwanya gwa Abiasaari. 
1Kings2:36 Bwanyima omugabe yaatuma ahari Shimei, yaamugira ati: Oyeyombekyere enju Yerusaalemu, ogigumemu, kandi otarigirugamu kugira ahandi hoona ahu waaza." 
1Kings2:37 Ahakuba eizooba ri orirugayo okambuka akagyera Kidirooni, omanyire kimwe ku otaribura kufa, kandi eshagama yaawe niiwe eribaho." 
1Kings2:38 Shimei yaagarukamu omugabe ati: Ebi wangambira ni birungi; nyowe omwiru waawe niinyija kutwaza, nka Mukama wangye Omugabe oku wandagiira. Atyo Shimei yaamara ebiro bingi ari Yerusaalemu." 
1Kings2:39 Ku haahingwireho emyaka eshatu, abahuuku ba Shimei babiri baacwa, baaza owa Akishi mwene Maaka, omugabe wa Gaasi. Bwanyima bagambira Shimei bati: Abahuuku baawe bari Gaasi." 
1Kings2:40 Shimei yaimuka yaatandiika endogoya ye, yaaza Gaasi owa Akishi kusherura abahuuku be; atyo yaagyenda, yaabaiha Gaasi." 
1Kings2:41 Bwanyima Sulemaani ku yaagambiirwe ngu Shimei arugire Yerusaalemu, yaaza Gaasi, kandi yaagaruka," 
1Kings2:42 omugabe yaatuma ahari Shimei, yaamugira ati: Nkakurahiza MUKAMA, naakwehanangiririza kimwe ninkugira nti: Omanyire kimwe ngu, eizooba ri orirugayo, okagira ahandi hoona ahu waaza, oryafa? Naiwe wangarukamu oti: Ebi waagamba ni birungi; niinyikiriza kubyorobera." 
1Kings2:43 Mbwenu ahabw'enki torinzire ndahiro ei waarahiire ahari MUKAMA, n'ekiragiro eki naakwehanangiriize?" 
1Kings2:44 Omugabe yaagaruka yaagira Shimei ati: Noomanya omu mutima gwawe ebibi byona ebi waakozire tata Daudi; n'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA naija kukuhoora ahabw'obubi bwawe. 
1Kings2:45 Kwonka omugabe Sulemaani aryaheebwa omugisha, kandi ekitebe ky'obugabe bwa Daudi kiryagumaho ebiro byona omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
1Kings2:46 Bwanyima omugabe yaaragiira Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada kumwita; yaashohora, yaamuteera, yaafa. Butyo obugabe bwahamibwa omu mikono ya Sulemaani." 
1Kings3:1 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaakwatanisa na Faraho omugabe wa Misri, yaashwera muhara we, yaamutaasya omu rurembo rwa Daudi, okuhitsya obu yaaherize kwombeka nyaruju ye ahabwe, n'enju ya MUKAMA kandi n'orugo rw'okwehinguririza Yerusaalemu." 
1Kings3:2 Kwonka abantu bakaba bahongyera empongano zaabo omu myanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, ahakuba hakaba hatakombekirwe nju ahabw'eiziina rya MUKAMA." 
1Kings3:3 Sulemaani yaakunda MUKAMA, yaagyendera omu biragiro bya Daudi ishe; kwonka yaaguma naatambira ebitambo omu myanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu, kandi naayotererayo obubaane." 
1Kings3:4 Bwanyima omugabe yaaza Gibeoni kutambirayo ebitambo, ahabw'okuba omwanya ogurikukira obukuru ogw'eokuramizamu niyo gwabaire guri. Atyo yaatambirayo ebitambo rukumi aha itambiro." 
1Kings3:5 Sulemaani ku yaabaire akiri Gibeoni, MUKAMA yaamweyoreka omu kirooto nyekiro; Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Shaba eki orikwenda ngu nkuhe." 
1Kings3:6 Sulemaani yaagira ati: Okaba ogirira omwiru waawe tata Daudi embabazi nyingi, nk'oku yaabaire agyendera omu maisho gaawe omu mazima n'omu kuhikiirira n'omutima ogugororokire ahariiwe; mbwenu omucumiire omugisha ogu omuhango, waamuha omwana w'okuza aha ngoma ye, nk'oku kiri eri izooba." 
1Kings3:7 Mbwenu hati, MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, ogizire omwiru waawe omugabe omu mwanya gwa tata Daudi, n'obu ndaabe ndi omwana muto, ntarikumanya oku ndaashohore, n'oku ndaataahe." 
1Kings3:8 Kandi nyowe, omwiru waawe, ndi ahagati y'abantu baawe abu waatooraine, eihanga rihango munonga, eritarikubaasa kubarwa." 
1Kings3:9 N'ahabw'ekyo ohe omwiru waawe omutima ogurikwetegyereza kutegyeka abantu baawe, mbone kutaanisa ekibi n'ekirungi; mbwenu n'oha orikubaasa kutegyeka eihanga ryawe eri erihango?" 
1Kings3:10 Okwo kushaba kwa Sulemaani kwashemeza MUKAMA ahabw'okushaba ekigambo ekyo. 
1Kings3:11 Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Ahabw'eokushaba ekigambo ekyo, oteeshabire kuhangaara, nari obutungi, nari okushabira abazigu baawe kufa, kureka okeeshabira obwengye bw'okumanya ebihikire," 
1Kings3:12 reeba, naakora nk'oku ekigambo kyawe kiri. Naakuha omutima gw'obwengye kandi ogurikwetegyereza; tihakabahoga orikwingana naiwe omu baakubandiize, kandi n'omu barikukurata taribaho." 
1Kings3:13 Kandi naakuha n'ebi otaashaba, obutungi n'ekitiinisa; tiharibaho ondiijo mugabe oringana naiwe ebiro byawe byona." 
1Kings3:14 Kandi ku origyendera omu mihanda yangye, waayorobera ebyatairweho n'ebiragiro byangye, nk'oku sho Daudi yaabaire abigyenderamu, ndyayongyera aha myaka yaawe." 
1Kings3:15 Sulemaani yaasisiimuka, yaashanga kiri ekirooto. Bwanyima yaija Yerusaalemu, yaayemerera omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, yaatamba ebitambo by'okwotsya, n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye; kandi yaateekyera abairu be boona obugyenyi." 
1Kings3:16 Bwanyima abakazi babiri, abaabaire bari baamaraaya, baija, baayemerera omu maisho g'omugabe." 
1Kings3:17 Omukazi omwe yaagira ati: Nyakusinga Mukama wangye, nyowe n'omukazi ogu nituraara omu nju emwe. Ku tubaire turi hamwe omuri egyo nju, naazaara omwana." 
1Kings3:18 Ku mbaire mmazire ebiro bishatu nzaire, omukazi ogu nawe yaazaara; kandi tubaire turi twenka, hataine ondiijo oriho omuri egyo nju, kureka itwe twembi." 
1Kings3:19 Ku bubaire buri nyekiro omwana w'omukazi ogu yaafa ahabw'okumubyamira. 
1Kings3:20 We nikwo kwimuka omu itumbi, nyowe omuzaana waawe ngwejegyeire, akaanyiha omwana wangye aha rubaju, akamubyamya omu kifuba kye, akareeta owe ofiire, akamubyamya omu kifuba kyangye." 
1Kings3:21 Ku nyimukire kare omu kasheeshe kwontsya omwana wangye, naashanga afiire; kwonka ku ngiire kumwetegyereza bwaseesire, naashanga atari mwana wangye, ou nzaire." 
1Kings3:22 Kwonka ogu mukazi yaagira ati: Ngaaha, omwana ohuriire n'owangye; ofiire n'owaawe. Ow'okubanza ati: Ngaaha, ofiire n'owaawe, ohuriire niwe wangye. Nikwo baabigambire batyo omumaisho g'omugabe." 
1Kings3:23 Bwanyima omugabe yaagira ati: Mbwenu omwe naagira ati: Ohuriire n'owangye, ofiire niwe waawe; ondiijo ati: Ngaaha, ofiire n'owaawe, ohuriirwe niwe wangye." 
1Kings3:24 Omugabe yaagaruka yaagira ati: Nimundeetere rurara. Baagimureetera. 
1Kings3:25 Omugabe yaagira ati: Ogwo mwana ohuriire, mumucwemu ebicweka bibiri; kimwe mukihe omwe, ekindi mukihe ondiijo." 
1Kings3:26 Bwanyima omukazi nyina w'omwana ohuriire, ahabw'okusaasibwa omwana we, yaagira omugabe ati: Mukama wangye, omwana ohuriire mumuhe, otamwita na kakye. Kwonka omukazi ondiijo yaagira ati: Tarikwija kuba wangye nari owaawe; bamucwemu ebicweka bibiri." 
1Kings3:27 Omugabe nikwo kugira ati: Omwana ogwo ohuriire mutamwita na kakye, mumuhe omukazi ow'okubanza, ahabw'okuba niwe nyina." 
1Kings3:28 Kandi Abaisraeli boona baahurira oku omugabe acwire orwo rubanja, baamutiina, ahabw'okuba bakareeba obwengye bwa Ruhanga bw'okucwa emanja z'oburyo buri omuriwe." 
1Kings4:1 Omugabe Sulemaani yaaba omugabe wa Israeli yoona; 
1Kings4:2 kandi aba nibo bategyeki bakuru abu yaabaire aine; Azaria mwene Zadoki akaba ari omunyamurwa," 
1Kings4:3 Elihorefu na Ahiya beene Shiisha bakaba bari abahandiiki; Yehoshafaati mwene Ahiluudi akaba ari omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho; 
1Kings4:4 Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada akaba ari omukuru w'eihe; Zadoki na Abiasaari bakaba bari abanyamurwa; 
1Kings4:5 Azaria mwene Nasani ari omukuru w'abatware; Zabudi mwene Nasani akaba ari omunyamurwa, kandi munywani w'omugabe;" 
1Kings4:6 Ahishaari akaba ari omukuru w'ekikaari na Adoniramu mwene Abuda ari omukuru w'eby'emirimo. 
1Kings4:7 Kandi Sulemaani akaba aine abatware ikumi na babiri omuri Israeli yoona, abo nibo baabaire batoijera omugabe n'ab'mu ka ye boona eby'okurya; buri omwe akaba aragiirwa kureeta eby'okurya by'okwezi kumwe omu mwaka." 
1Kings4:8 Aga nigo maziina gaabo; Benihuuri ow'omu nsi y'ebibungo ya Efuraimu; 
1Kings4:9 Benidekere owa Makazi, Shaalubiimu, Betishemeshi na Eloni-besihanani;" 
1Kings4:10 Benihesedi owa Aruboosi, (kandi niwe yaabaire atwara Sooko n'ensi yoona eya Heferi);" 
1Kings4:11 Ben-abinadabu owa Nafati-doori yoona, (kandi akaba ashweire muhanra wa Sulemaani orikwetwa Tafasi)." 
1Kings4:12 Baana, mwene Ahiluudi, owa Tanaki, Megido na Besi-sheani yoona aha rubaju rwa Zaretaani orwa ifo ya Yezereeli, okuruga Besi-sheani okuhika Abeeli-mehola, kandi n'okuhika seeri ya Yokimeamu;" 
1Kings4:13 Benigeberi owa Ramosi-gileadi, (kandi akaba naatwara tauni za Yairi mwene Manaase ez'omuri Gileadi, n'ekyanga kya Arugoobi, eky'omuri Bashani, ekyabaire kirimu endembo makumi mukaaga ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare eziine amarembo g'enyigi ezirikukingwa empimbi z'emiringa);" 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabu mwene Ido, owa Mahanaimu;" 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaazi owa Nafutaali (kandi nawe niwe yaabaire ashweire muhara wa Sulemaani orikwetwa Basemaasi); 
1Kings4:16 Baana mwene Hushai owa Asheri na Bealoosi; 
1Kings4:17 Yehoshafaati mwene Parua, owa Isakaari;" 
1Kings4:18 Shimei mwene Ela, owa Benyamiini;" 
1Kings4:19 na Geberi mwene Uuri, ow'ensi ya Gileadi, n'ensi ya Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori na Ogi omugabe wa Bashani. Kandi omuri Yuda hakaba harimu omutware omwe." 
1Kings4:20 Abayuda n'Abaisraeli bakaba bari baingi nk'omusheenyi gw'aha rubaju rw'enyanja, nibarya, nibanywa, kandi nibashemererwa." 
1Kings4:21 Atyo Sulemaani yaategyeka ensi z'abagabe zoona okuruga aha mugyera Furaati, okuhika aha nsi y'Abafilistia, n'aha mwatano gwa Misri; baaguma nibamutoijera, kandi nibamukorera ebiro byona ebi yaamazire aha ngoma." 
1Kings4:22 Omutoijo gw'eby'okurya bya Sulemaani omu izooba rimwe gukaba guba encuro z'esaano y'obunono makumi ashatu, n'ez'endiijo saano makumi mukaaga," 
1Kings4:23 enkone z'ente ikumi, n'ezindi makumi abiri ezi baabaire baiha omu mariisizo, n'entaama igana, otabariiremu mpara, esirabo, engabi n'enkoko zigomokire." 
1Kings4:24 Ahakuba akaba atwara ebyanga byona ebyabaire biri seenu y'omugyera Furaati, okuruga Tifusa, okuhika Gaaza, kandi n'abagabe boona abaabaire bari seenu y'ogwo mugyera; kandi akaba aine obusingye aha mbaju zoona." 
1Kings4:25 Abayuda n'Abaisraeli baaguma bari buhooro, buri muntu aha muzaabibu gwe, n'aha mutiini gwe, okuruga Daani okuhika Beeri-sheba omu biro bya Sulemaani byona." 
1Kings4:26 Kandi Sulemaani akaba aine emyanya ei embaraasi ze ezirikukurura ebigaari zirikuraaramu obukumi buna, kandi akaba aine abashaija abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi kakumi n'enkumi ibiri." 
1Kings4:27 Abo batware bakaba batoijera Sulemaani eby'okurya ahabwe n'ahabwa boona abaabaire bariira aha meeza ye, buri mutware okwezi kwe, hatarikugira kintu kyona ekyaburaho." 
1Kings4:28 Brui mutware akaba areeta sayiri n'obunyaatsi bw'embaraasi n'obw'ezirikwiruka munonga, nk'oku yaabaire aragiirwa; abireeta omu mwanya ogu byabaire biba nibyetengwamu." 
1Kings4:29 Kandi Ruhanga yaaha Sulemaani obwengye n'okwetegyereza ebitakareebwaga, kandi n'omutima ogwine okushoborokyerwa kwingi munonga nk'omusheenyi gw'aha rubaju rw'enyanja;" 
1Kings4:30 butyo obwengye bwa Sulemaani bwakira obw'abantu b'oburugwa-izooba n'obwengye bwona obw'Abanyamisri. 
1Kings4:31 Kandi akaba naakiza n'abandi boona obwengye, nka Esaani Omunyaezerahi, na Hemani, Katukooli na Darada beene Mahooli; eiziina rye ryarangaanwa omu mahanga goona agaabaire gamwehinguririize." 
1Kings4:32 Akagunja enfumu enkumi ishatu, yaahimba n'ebyeshongoro rukumi na bitaano." 
1Kings4:33 Akaba naamanya ebirikumera okwiha aha mwela ogw'omuri Lebanooni okuhika aha nyaweera erikumera aha rugo; kandi akaba naamanya enyamaishwa, n'enyonyi, n'ebirikugyendesa enda, n'eby'enyanja." 
1Kings4:34 Abantu bakaba baruga omu mahanga goona, baija kuhurira obwengye bwa Sulemaani, batumirwe abagabe b'omu nsi yoona, abaaherize kuhurira aha bwengye bwe." 
1Kings5:1 Bwanyima Hiraamu omugabe wa Tuuro, ku yahuriire ngu beemekire Sulemaani kuba omugabe kuhungurira ishe, yaamutumaho abairu be; ahabw'okuba okwiha ira akaba ari munywani wa Daudi." 
1Kings5:2 Sulemaani yaatuma ahari Hiraamu naagira ati: 
1Kings5:3 Noomanya ku tata Daudi atarabaasize kwombekyera eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga we enju ahabw'engamba z'abazigu abaabaire bamuri embaju zoona, okuhitsya obu MUKAMA yaabataire ahansi y'ebigyere bye." 
1Kings5:4 Mbwenu hati MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye ampaire okuhuumura embaju zoona; tihakiriho bazigu nari akabi. 
1Kings5:5 N'ahabw'ekyo mmaririire kwombekyera eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye enju, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambiire tata Daudi, ati: Mutabani waawe, ou ndyemeka kukuhungurira, niwe aryombekyera eiziina ryangye enju." 
1Kings5:6 N'ahabw'ekyo hati ragiira bantemere emiti y'emyela omuri Lebanooni; bayakora n'abairu bangye; kandi ndyaguma nkuhe ebihembo by'abairu baawe nk'oku oringambira; ahabw'okuba noomanya ku hatariho n'omwe omuriitwe orikumanya kushara embaaho nk'Abasidoni. 
1Kings5:7 Hiraamu, ku yaahuriire ebigambo bya Sulemaani, yaashemererwa munonga, yaagira ati: Eri izooba MUKAMA asiimwe, ahabw'okuha Daudi omwana w'obwengye kutegyeka eihanga eri erikuru." 
1Kings5:8 Hiraamu yaatuma ahari Sulemaani ati: Mpuriire ebi ontumireho byona; niinyija kukora byona eby'emyereezi n'eby'emiberooshi, nk'oku orikwenda." 
1Kings5:9 Abairu bangye baryagiiha Lebanooni, bagishuumye, bagihitsye aha nyanja, ngikomerane nk'ebibaya, ebone kuraba aha nyanja, ehikye omu mwanya ogu orindagiira; okwo ebe niyo yaakomororerwa, ogyakiire; kandi ku oriheereza ab'omu ka yangye eby'okurya, oryaba ohikize ebi ndikwenda." 
1Kings5:10 Atyo Hiraamu yaatwekyera Sulemaani emyerezi n'emiberooshi ei yaabaire naayenda yoona; 
1Kings5:11 na Sulemaani yaaha Hiraamu encuro z'engano obukumi bubiri n'entsimbo z'amajuta marungi makumi abiri ahabw'eka ye. Okwo nikwo Sulemaani yaagumire naamuha ebyo by'okurya buri mwaka. 
1Kings5:12 Kandi MUKAMA yaaha Sulemaani obwengye, nk'oku yaamuraganiise, yaagira obusingye na Hiraamu; bombi baaragaana endagaano y'okuhwerana." 
1Kings5:13 Omugabe Sulemaani yaatoorana abantu omuri Israeli yoona b'okuguma nibakora nibaihaihana; omubaro gwabo gukaba guri obukumi bushatu. 
1Kings5:14 Yaaguma naayohereza kakumi-kakumi Lebanooni buri kwezi nibaihaihana; bamarayo okwezi kumwe, kandi ameezi abiri bagamara omuka; Adoniramu niwe yaabaire ari omukuru waabo." 
1Kings5:15 Kandi Sulemaani akaba aine abeekorezi obukumi mushanju, n'abaabaire nibabaija amabaare omu nshozi obukumi munaana," 
1Kings5:16 otabariiremu bakuru b'emirimo enkumi ishatu na magana ashatu, abaabaire nibategyeka abakozi."
