2Kings10:29 Kwonka Yehu tararekire kukora bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ebi yaasiisiise Abaisraeli, nibyo bishushani by'enyana eby'ezaabu ebyabaire biri Beseeli na Daani." 
2Kings10:30 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagira Yehu ati: Ahabw'okukora gye, okahikiiriza ebirikusiimwa omu maisho gangye, okagira enju ya Ahabu nk'oku naabaire ninteekateeka omu mutima gwangye kugigira, abaana baawe baryashutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Israeli okuhitsya aha busingye bwa kana." 
2Kings10:31 Kwonka Yehu tiyaayeta aha kugyendera omu biragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli n'omutima gwe gwona; tiyaaruga mu bibi ebi Yeroboamu yaakoreise Abaisraeli, bakacumura." 
2Kings10:32 Omu biro ebyo MUKAMA yaatandika kutuubya ensi ya Israeli. Hazaeli yaabasingura omu myatano ya Israeli yoona," 
2Kings10:33 okutandikira Yorudani nootoora oburugwa-izooba, ensi yoona eya Gileadi, n'ey'Abagaadi, n'ey'Abareubeni, n'ey'Abamanaase, okuruga Aroeri, ey'omu ruhita rwa Arunooni, niyo Gileadi na Bashani." 
2Kings10:34 Endiijo mirimo ya Yehu n'ebi yaakozire byona, n'eby'amaani ge goona, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli?" 
2Kings10:35 Bwanyima Yehu yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika Samaria. Yehoahazi omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings10:36 Kandi emyaka ei Yehu yaamazire aha ngoma naategyeka Israeli omuri Samaria ekahika makumi abiri na munaana. 
2Kings11:1 Atalia nyina wa Ahazia ku yaareebire omutabani yaafa, yaimuka, yaacwekyereza abanyiginya boona." 
2Kings11:2 Kwonka Yehosheba muhara w'omugabe Yehoraamu, munyaanya wa Ahazia, yaatwara Yoasi mutabani wa Ahazia, yaamwiha omuri batabani b'omugabe, abu baabaire nibenda kwita, yaamucwisa n'omurezi we, yaabata omu kishengye ky'okuraaramu. Atyo yaamushereka Atalia, tiyaitwa;" 
2Kings11:3 yaaguma nawe asherekirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA okumara emyaka mukaaga; obwo Atalia naategyeka ensi. 
2Kings11:4 Bwanyima omu mwaka gwa mushanju Yehoyaada yaatuma abakuru b'Abakariiti n'ab'abarinzi b'engabo igana-igana, yaaragiira ku bamushanga omu nju ya MUKAMA; yaaragaana nabo endagaano, kandi yaabarahiriza omu nju ya MUKAMA; ku yaaherize, yaabooreka omwana w'omugabe." 
2Kings11:5 Yaabaragiira, naabagira ati: Oku nikwo muraatwaze. Kimwe kya kashatu kyanyu, abaija aha murimo ahari Sabato, barinde enju y'omugabe;" 
2Kings11:6 kimwe kya kashatu ekindi kize aha irembo rya Suuri; kandi ekindi kigume aha irembo enyima y'abarinzi; 
2Kings11:7 ebyo bicweka byanyu byombi, eby'abaihwa aha murimo, birinde enju ya MUKAMA beehinguririize omugabe." 
2Kings11:8 Mutyo mugume mukiikiize omugabe embaju zoona, buri muntu akwaitse eby'okurwanisa bye omu ngaro. Omuntu weena oraayende kutaaha omu mishorongo yaanyu, mumwite. Imwe mugume n'omugabe yaaba naashohora, kandi yaaba naataaha." 
2Kings11:9 Abakuru b'engabo baakorabyona ebi Yehoyaada omunyamurwa yaaragiira, buri omwe yaareeta abashaija be ab'okwija aha murimo ahari Sabato, hamwe n'ab'okwihwa aha murimo ahari Sabato, baija ahari Yehoyaada omunyamurwa." 
2Kings11:10 Omunyamurwa yaaheereza abo bakuru b'engabo amacumu n'engabo ebyabaire biri eby'omugabe Daudi bibiikirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA; 
2Kings11:11 abarinzi baayemerera, buri muntu akwaitse eby'okurwanisa bye omu ngaro, okuruga aha rubaju rw'enju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, okuhika aha rwa bumosho, beehinguririize eitambiro n'enju." 
2Kings11:12 Bwanyima Yehoyaada yaashohoza omwana w'omugabe, yaamujweka ekirunga aha mutwe, yaamuha Eby'okuhamya; baamuranga ku yaaba omugabe, baamushukaho amajuta, baateera omu ngaro nibagira bati: Omugabe naakaramaare!" 
2Kings11:13 Atalia ku yaahuriire orwari rw'abarinzi n'abantu, yaataaha omu nju ya MUKAMA ahu abantu bari;" 
2Kings11:14 ku yaanagire amaisho, yaareeba omugabe ayemereire aha rubaju rw'enyomyo, nk'oku omugyenzo gwabaire guri, n'abakuru b'engabo n'ab'amakondere bamwemereire aha rubaju, n'abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi nibashemererwa, nibateera amakondere. Ahonaaho Atalia yaataagura ebijwaro bye, naagira ati: Okwebumba! Okwebumba!" 
2Kings11:15 Yehoyaada omunyamurwa yaaragiira abakuru b'engabo abaabaire nibategyeka eihe, naagira ati: Mumurabye omu ngabo, mumushohoze; oraamukurate weena, mumwite na rurara. Ahabw'okuba omunyamurwa akagira ngu arekye kwitirwa omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Kings11:16 Batyo baamutaho engaro, baamurabya omu irembo ry'embaraasi, baamuhitsya ahari nyaruju y'omugabe, baaba niho baamwitira." 
2Kings11:17 Bwayima Yehoyaada yaaragaanisa omugabe n'abantu endagaano na MUKAMA kuba abantu be; kandi yaagaruka yaaragaanisa omugabe n'abantu endiijo ndagaano. 
2Kings11:18 Okuruga aho abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi baaza ahari nyaruju ya Baali, baagisheenya; amatambiro ge n'ebishushani bye baabisheenyagurira kimwe, baitira Mataani omunyamurwa wa Baali omu maisho g'ago matambiro. Kandi omunyamurwa yaata abarinzi aha nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Kings11:19 Bwanyima yaatwara abakuru b'engabo, Abakariti, abarinzi, n'abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi, baiha omugabe omu nju ya MUKAMA, baamushuumya, baamurabya omu irembo ry'abarinzi, baamutaasya omuri nyaruju y'omugabe, yaashutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe." 
2Kings11:20 Batyo abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi baashemererwa; kandi Atalia ku yaaherize kwitirwa aha nju y'omugabe na rurara, haabaho okutuuza omu rurembo." 
2Kings11:21 Yoasi akatandika kutegyeka ahikize emyaka mushanju. 
2Kings12:1 Omu mwaka gwa mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehu, Yoasi akatandika kutegyeka, yaategyekyera omuri Yerusaalemu emyaka makumi ana. Eiziina rya nyina akaba ari Zibia owa Beeri-sheba." 
2Kings12:2 Yoasi yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA ebiro byona ebi yaamazire naahaburwa Yehoyaada omunyamurwa. 
2Kings12:3 Kwonka emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu teraihirweho, kureka abantu bakagumizamu nibgitambiramu ebitambo, kandi nibootereramu obubaane." 
2Kings12:4 Yoasi yaagambira abanyamurwa ati: Empiiha zoona ez'ebintu ebishoroirwe ezireetsirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA, n'empiiha z'abantu boona, nk'oku buri muntu arikucwerwa, kandi n'empiiha ezi omuntu weena arikwesiimira kureeta omu nju ya MUKAMA aihire aha mutima," 
2Kings12:5 abanyamurwa bazitware, buri omwe aziihe ahari mugyenzi we, bazihunduuze enju, ahi esiisikaire hoona." 
2Kings12:6 Kwonka okuhitsya omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Yoasi, abanyamurwa bakaba bataine ki baahundwize kyona ahari egyo nju." 
2Kings12:7 Nikyo omugabe Yoasi yaatumiire Yehoyaada omunyamurwa n'abandi banyamurwa, akababuuza ati: Ahabw'enki mutarikuhunduuza enju? Mbwenu murekyere ahao kwiha empiiha ahari bagyenzi baanyu, kureka muziheyo ahabw'okuhunduuza enju." 
2Kings12:8 Batyo abanyamurwa baikiriza kutagaruka kwiha empiiha aha bantu, n'obu kwakuba okuhunduuza enju." 
2Kings12:9 Bwanyima Yehoyaada omunyamurwa yaareeta eshanduukye, yaafumura ekifundikizo kyayo, yaagita haihi n'eitambiro aha rubaju rwa buryo omuntu yaaba naataaha omu nju ya MUKAMA; kandi abanyamurwa abaabaire barinda eirembo baaguma nibatamu empiiha zoona ezaabaire nizireetwa omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Kings12:10 Ku baabaire bareeba empiiha zaaba nyingi omuri egyo shanduukye, omuhandiiki w'omugabe n'omunyamurwa omukuru baija, bazibara, bazikoma omu nshaho, zoona ezi bashanga omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Kings12:11 Bwanyima ezo mpiiha ezi babazire baziha abakozi abarikureeberera enju ya MUKAMA; nabo baziha ababaizi n'abombeki abarikukora egyo nju," 
2Kings12:12 n'abarikwombekyesa amabaare, n'abarikugashara; ezindi bazihayo kugura embaaho n'amabaare agabaizire eby'okuhunduuza enju ya MUKAMA, n'ahabw'ebindi byona ebirikwetengwa kuhunduuza egyo nju." 
2Kings12:13 Kwonka ezo mpiiha ezi baabaire bareeta omu nju ya MUKAMA tibarazikoreise bikopo by'efeeza, nari makansi z'entambi, nari enyabya, nari amakondere, n'obu byakuba ebindi bintu by'ezaabu nari eby'efeeza," 
2Kings12:14 kureka zo bakaba baziha abakozi abarikuzikoresa enju ya MUKAMA. 
2Kings12:15 Kandi abo bashaija abu baabaire baha empiiha z'okwihura abakozi, bakaba batababuuza oku zikoresiibwe, ahabw'okuba bakaba bazikoresa n'obwesigwa." 
2Kings12:16 Empiiha z'empongano z'okwihaho orubanja, n'ez'empongano z'ekibi zikaba zitareetwa mu nju ya MUKAMA; zikaba ziba ez'abanyamurwa." 
2Kings12:17 Omu biro ebyo Hazaeli omugabe wa Siria akainamuka, yaarwanisa Gaasi, yaagikubuura. Bwanyima Hazaeli amaisho ge yaagata ahari Yerusaalemu, kwinamukayo kugiteera." 
2Kings12:18 N'ahabw'ekyo Yoasi omugabe wa Yuda yaatwara ebintu byona ebirikwera ebyahairwe baishenkuru, Yehoshafaati na Yehoraamu na Ahazia abagabe ba Yuda, hamwe n'ebintu bye ahabwe ebi yaahaireyo, kandi n'ezaabu yoona eyaashangirwe omu mabiikiro g'enju ya MUKAMA n'ag'enju y'omugabe, yaabitwekyera Hazaeli omugabe wa Siria. Atyo Hazaeli yaaruga ahari Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings12:19 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yoasi n'ebi yaakozire byona tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'obusingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda? 
2Kings12:20 Bwanyima abagaragwa be baimuka, baamugiira omu naama, baamwitira omu nju ya Miilo omu muhanda gurikushuuma Siila;" 
2Kings12:21 abo bagaragwa be abaamuteire akafa, ni Yozakaari mwene Shimeasi na Yehozabadi mwene Shomeri. Yaaziikwa omu rurembo rwa Daudi, yaashanga baishenkuru; Amazia omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings13:1 Omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri n'eshatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Yoasi mwene Ahazia omugabe wa Yuda, Yehoahazi mwene Yehu akatandika kutegyekyera Israeli omuri Samaria, yaamara aha ngoma emyaka ikumi na mushanju." 
2Kings13:2 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, yaakurata Yeroboamu mwene Nebati omu bibi bye ebi yaasiisiise Israeli, tiyaabireka." 
2Kings13:3 MUKAMA yaagirira Israeli ekiniga, yaaguma naabahayo omu mikono ya Hazaeli omugabe wa Siria, n'omu mikono ya Benihadadi omutabani." 
2Kings13:4 Bwanyima Yehoahazi yaayeshengyereza MUKAMA, MUKAMA yaamuhurira; ahakuba akareeba okwitwa kubi kw'Abaisraeli, oku omugabe wa Siria yaabaire naabaita kubi. (" 
2Kings13:5 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaaha Abaisraeli omujuni, baaruga omu mikono y'Abaisria; batyo Abaisraeli baatuura omu maka gaabo nk'omu biro bya ira." 
2Kings13:6 Kwonka tibaaruga mu bibi by'enju ya Yeroboamu, ebi yaasiisiise Israeli; baaguma nibabigyenderamu; kandi na Ashera nazo zaaguma omuri Samaria.)" 
2Kings13:7 Ahabw'okuba Yehoahazi taratsigaize bantu, kureka ab'aha mbaraasi makumi ataano, n'ebigaari, n'engabo ezirikugyendesa ebigyere kakumi ahakuba omugabe wa Siria akabacwekyereza, yaabagira nk'omucuucu gw'aha mbuga." 
2Kings13:8 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yehoahazi n'ebi yaakozire byona n'eby'amaani ge tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli? 
2Kings13:9 Atyo Yehoahazi yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika omuri Samaria; Yehoashi omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings13:10 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Yoasi omugabe wa Yuda, Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi akatandika kutegyekyera Israeli omuri Samaria, yamara aha ngoma emyaka ikumi na mukaaga." 
2Kings13:11 Nawe yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ebi yaasiisiise Abaisraeli, kureka yaaguma naabigyenderamu." 
2Kings13:12 Mbwenu endiijo mirirmo ya Yehoashi, n'ebi yaakozire byona, n'eby'amaani ge, agu yaarwaniise naarwana na Amazia omugabe wa Yuda, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli?" 
2Kings13:13 Atyo Yehoashi yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, Yeroboamu yaaza aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe, bwanyima Yehoashi yaaziikwa Samaria hamwe n'abagabe ba Israeli." 
2Kings13:14 Yehoashi omugabe wa Israeli, ku yaabaire akiri aha ngoma, Elisa yaakwatwa endwara eyaamwitsire; omugabe yaashuuma kumwinamira, yaamuririra, naagira ati: Ai bambe Taata! Taata! Ebigaari bya Israeli n'ab'aha mbaraasi baayo!" 
2Kings13:15 Elisa yaamugira ati: Kwata obuta n'emyambi. Atyo yaabikwata. 
2Kings13:16 Yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Nanuura obuta! Yaabunanuura; Elisa yaata engaro aha z'omugabe. 
2Kings13:17 Bwanyima yaagira ati: Igura edirisa erikureeba oburugwa-izooba. Onu yaagiigura. Elisa yaamugira ati: Rasha. Onu yaarasha. Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Ogwo n'omwambi gwa MUKAMA gw'obusinguzi ogw'okusingura Siria! Ahakuba noija kuranira omuri Afeki n'Abasiria, okuhitsya obu oraabaite okabamaraho." 
2Kings13:18 Bwanyima yaagira omugabe wa Israeli ati: Kwata emyambi. Onu yaagikwata. Yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Giteere ahansi. Yaagiteera ahansi kashatu, yaarereera." 
2Kings13:19 Ogwo mushaija wa Ruhanga yaamugwerwa kubi, yaamugira ati: Waaba oshemereire kugiteera ahansi emirundi etaano nari mukaaga; haza obwo obona kusingura Abaisiria, obamariraho kimwe; kwonka hati noija kubasingura emirundi eshatu yonka." 
2Kings13:20 Atyo Elisa yaafa, baamuziika. Kandi omu biro ebyo emitwe y'Abamoabu ekaba eteera ensi aha kutandika kw'omwaka." 
2Kings13:21 Eizooba rimwe ku baabaire nibaziika omuntu, baareeba omutwe gw'abanyagi, baamutambika omu kituuro kya Elisa; omutumbi ku gwahikire guti ha magufa ga Elisa, ogwo muntu yaahimbuuka, yaimuka, yaayemerera." 
2Kings13:22 Omu busingye bwona obwa Yehoahazi, Hazaeli omugabe wa Siria akaita kubi Abaisraeli;" 
2Kings13:23 Kwonka MUKAMA akaba abagirira embabazi n'esaasi, abataho omutima ahabw'endagaano ei yaaragaine na Abarahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo, kandi akaba atacwekyereza, n'obu kwakuba kubabingira kimwe omu maisho ge omu biro ebyo." 
2Kings13:24 Hazaeli omugabe wa Siria ku yaafiire, Beni-hadadi omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings13:25 Bwanyima Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi yaiha ahari Benihadadi mwene Hazaeli endembo ezi Hazaeli yaabaire anyagire ahari ishe omu bweme. Yehoashi yaamusingura kashatu, yaagarura endembo za Israeli." 
2Kings14:1 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi omugabe wa Israeli, Amazia mwene Yoasi omugabe wa Yuda akatandika kutegyeka." 
2Kings14:2 Yaatandika kutegyeka aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano, yaamara emyaka makumi abiri na mwenda ari aha ngoma omuri Yerusaalemu. Eiziina rya nyina akaba ari Yehoadaani owa Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings14:3 Yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA, kwonka tiyaaba nka ishenkuru Daudi; kureka yaakora nk'ebi Yoasi ishe yaakozire byona." 
2Kings14:4 Kwonka emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu tiyaihwaho; abantu baaguma nibagitambiramu ebitambo, kandi nibagyotereramu obubaane." 
2Kings14:5 Bwanyima ku yaaherize kuhama omu bugabe bwe, yaita abashaija be abaitsire ishe ari aha ngoma." 
2Kings14:6 Kwonka abaana b'abo baitsi abaitsire ishe tiyaabaita, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebiragiro bya Musa, eki MUKAMA yaaragiriiremu ati: Baishe b'abaana batariitwa nibaturwa abaana baabo; kandi n'abaana batariitwa nibaturwa baishebo; kureka omuntu weena aryaitwa ahabw'ekibi kye." 
2Kings14:7 Bwanyima yaitira Abanyaedomu kakumi omu ruhanga rw'Omwonyo, kandi yaateera Seela, yaagikubuura, yaagyeta Yokise-eli nk'oku erikwetwa n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Kings14:8 Bwanyima Amazia yaatuma entumwa ahari Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi, mwijukuru wa Yehu omugabe wa Israeli, naagira ati: Rugayo, twereebanire akaso omu kandi." 
2Kings14:9 Yehoashi omugabe wa Israeli yaatuma ahari Amazia omugabe wa Yuda naagira ati: Eitojo rya Lebanooni rikatuma aha mwereezi gwa Lebanooni nirigira riti: Ha mutabani wangye muhara waawe, amushere. Ku bwaseesire, enyamaishwa y'omu ihamba rya Lebanooni yaija neerabaho, yaariribata." 
2Kings14:10 N'ekya buzima oteire Abanyaedomu waabasingura, omutima gwawe gwakureetera eigundu. Yehimbise ahabw'ekitiinisa kyawe, kwonka ogume omuka; ahabw'enki nootaara akabi, ngu ofe na Yuda?" 
2Kings14:11 Kwonka Amazia tiyaabyetaho. N'ahabw'ekyo Yehoashi omugabe wa Israeli yainamuka kubugana Amazia omugabe wa Yuda; baabugaabuganira Beti-shemeshi eya Yuda, baarwanirayo." 
2Kings14:12 Abaisraeli baabinga Abayuda, buri muntu yaahungira omu ka ye." 
2Kings14:13 Yehoashi omugabe wa Israeli yaakwata Amazia omugabe wa Yuda, mwene Yoasi, mwijukuru wa Ahazia, yaamukwatira Betishemeshi; bwanyima yaaza Yerusaalemu, yaasheenya orugo rwayo rw'amabaare ekicweka kya mikono magana ana, okuruga aha irembo rya Efuraimu okuhika aha irembo ry'Akeekubo." 
2Kings14:14 Kandi yaanyaga ezaabu n'efeeza zoona, n'ebintu byona ebyashangirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA n'omu mabiikiro g'enju y'omugabe, kandi yaabaihamu abantu, yaabagira omukwato; bwanyima yaagaruka Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yehoashi, n'ebi yaakozire n'eby'amaani ge, n'oku yaarwaine na Amazia omugabe wa Yuda, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli?" 
2Kings14:16 Yehoashi yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omuri Samaria hamwe n'abagabe ba Israeli. Bwanyima Yeroboamu omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings14:17 Amazia mwene Yoasi omugabe wa Yuda yaamara emyaka ikumi n'etaano bwanyima y'okufa kwa Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi omugabe wa Israeli. 
2Kings14:18 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Amazia tehandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda? 
2Kings14:19 Abantu baamugiira omu naama bari Yerusaalemu, yaahungira Lakishi; kwonka baamukuratsayo abantu, baamwitirayo." 
2Kings14:20 Baamureeta aha mbaraasi, baamuziika Yerusaalemu omu rurembo rwa Daudi hamwe na baishenkuru." 
2Kings14:21 Bwanyima abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi baatwara Uziya owaabaire aine emyaka ikumi na mukaaga, baamwemeka omu mwanya gwa Amazia ishe." 
2Kings14:22 Omugabe ku yaaherize kugwejegyera n'okushanga baishenkuru, Uziya yaayombeka Elaasi, yaarugarurira obugabe bwa Yuda." 
2Kings14:23 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'etaano ogw'omu busingye bwa Amazia mwene Yoasi, omugabe wa Yuda, Yeroboamu mwene Yehoahsi omugabe wa Israeli, akatandika kutegyekyera omuri Samaria, yaamara aha ngoma emyaka makumi na na gumwe." 
2Kings14:24 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ebi yaasiisiise Abaisraeli." 
2Kings14:25 Yaagarura emyatano ya Israeli okuruga ahu orikutaahira nooza Hamasi okuhika aha Nyanja ya Araba, nk'ekigambo kya MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli oku kyabaire kiri, eki yaagambire naaraba omu mwiru we nabi Yona mwene Amitai, owaarugire Gaasi-heferi." 
2Kings14:26 Ahakuba MUKAMA akareeba okubonabona kwa Israeli kuri kwingi munonga; ahabw'okuba tihaine n'omwe owaatsigaireho, yaaba muhuuku, nari ow'obusingye, n'obu yaakuba ow'okuha Israeli emikono." 
2Kings14:27 Ahakuba MUKAMA akaba agizire ngu tarikwija kumariraho kimwe iziina rya Israeli ahansi y'eiguru; n'ahabw'ekyo yaabajunisa Yeroboamu mutabani wa Yehoashi. 
2Kings14:28 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yeroboamu n'ebi yaakozire byona n'eby'amaani ge, oku yaarwaine, n'oku yaagaruriire Israeli Damasiko na Hamasi, ezaabaire ziri eza Yuda, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli?" 
2Kings14:29 Yeroboamu yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru abagabe ba Israeli; Zekaria omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings15:1 Omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri na mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Yeroboamu omugabe wa Israeli Uziya mutabani wa Amaziya omugabe wa Yuda akatandiaka kutegyeka. 
2Kings15:2 Yaatandika kutegyeka aine emyaka ikumi na mukaaga; yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ataano n'ebiri omuri Yerusalemu. Eiziina rya nyina akaba ari Yekolia owa Yerusaalemu. 
2Kings15:3 Yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA, nk'ebi Amazia ishe yaakozire byona oku byabaire biri." 
2Kings15:4 Kwonka emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu teraihirweho; abantu bakaba bagitambiramu, kandi bagyoteerraho obubaane." 
2Kings15:5 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaateera omugabe, yaarwara ebibembe, yaaguma omu nganyo okuhitsya aha izooba eri yaafeereireho. Kandi Yosamu omutabani niwe yaabaire ari omukuru w'ekikaari, naategyeka abantu b'omuri egyo nsi." 
2Kings15:6 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Uziya n'ebi yaakozire byona, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda?" 
2Kings15:7 Uziya yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika hamwe nabo omu rurembo rwa Daudi; Yosamu omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings15:8 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, Zekaria mutabni wa Yeroboamu akategyekyera Israeli omuri Samaria ameezi mukaaga." 
2Kings15:9 Yaakora ebirkwangwa MUKAMA, nk'oku baishenkuru baakozire. Tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, ebi yaasiisiise Israeli." 
2Kings15:10 Eizooba rimwe Shalumu mwene Yabeshi yaamugirira enaama, yaamwitira omu maisho g'abantu, yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings15:11 Endiijo mirimo ya Zekaria n'ebi yaakozire bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli. 
2Kings15:12 Okwo nikow kuragaanisa kwa MUKAMA oku yaaraganiise Yehu naagira ati: Batabani baawe baryashutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe okuhitsya aha bwijukuru bwa kana. Kandi nikwo kyabaire. 
2Kings15:13 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, Shalumu mwene Yabeshi akatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera okwezi kumwe omuri Samaria." 
2Kings15:14 Bwanyima Menahemu mwene Gaadi yaaruga Tiruza, yaija Samaria, yaitirayo Shalumu mwene Yabeshi, yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings15:15 Endiijo mirimo ya Shalumu yoona, n'okugoma oku yaagomire, reeba bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli." 
2Kings15:16 Bwanyima omu biro ebyo Menahemu akateera Tifusa, yaagicwekyereza n'abaabaire barimu boona, n'ebyaro byayo byona okuruga Tiruza okuhika aha myatano yaayo; eki yaagicwekyerereize n'ahabw'okuba bakanga kumwigurira amarembo, kandi n'abakazi baamwo abaabaire baine enda yaabashatura aha nda." 
2Kings15:17 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, Menahemu mwene Gaadi akatandika kutegyeka Israeli, yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi omuri Samaria." 
2Kings15:18 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA; omu biro bye byona tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ebi yaasiisiise Israeli. 
2Kings15:19 Eizooba rimwe Puuli omugabe wa Asiria yaateera egyo nsi; Menahemu yaamuhongyera etalanta z'efeeza rukumi, ngu amuhwere abone kuhama omu bugabe bwe." 
2Kings15:20 Kandi ezo mpiiha Menahemu akaba aziihire omu batungi boona ab'omuri Israeli, buri muntu omuribo shekeli z'efeeza makumi ataano, ngu abone kuziha ogwo mugabe wa Asiria. N'ahabw'ekyo omugabe wa Asiria yaakuba yaagarukayo, tiyaaguma muri egyo nsi." 
2Kings15:21 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Menahemu n'ebi yaakozire byona, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli?" 
2Kings15:22 Menahemu yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru; omutabani Pekahia yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings15:23 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ataano ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda Pekahia mwne Menahemu akatandika kutegyekyera Israeli omuri Samaria; yaamar aemyaka ebiri ari aha ngoma. 
2Kings15:24 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, ebi yaasiisiise Israeli." 
2Kings15:25 Bwanyima Peeka mwene Remalia, omukru w'engabo ze, yaamugiira omu naama, yaamwitira Samaria omu kigo ky'omu kikaari ky'omugabe. Ku yaaherize kumwita, yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings15:26 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Pekahia n'ebi yaakozire byona, bikahandiikwa omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli." 
2Kings15:27 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ataano ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda Peeka mwene Remalia akatandika kutegyekyera Israeli omuri Samaria, yaamara emyaka makumi abiri ari aha ngoma." 
2Kings15:28 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu, ebi yaasiisiise Israeli." 
2Kings15:29 Omu biro bya Peeka omugabe wa Israeli Tigulaasi-pileseeri omugabe wa Asiria yaija, yaakwata Iyooni, Abeelibesi-maaka, Yanoa, Kedeshi, Hazori, Gileadi na Galilaaya, ensi yoona eya Nafutaali; kandi abantu yaabatwara Asiria bari enkwatwa." 
2Kings15:30 Bwanyima Hoshea mwene Ela yaagiira Peeka mwene Remalia omu naama, yaamuteera, yaamwita; yaatandika kutegyeka omu mwanya gwe omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Yosamu mwene Uziya." 
2Kings15:31 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Peeka n'ebi yaakozire byona bikahandiikwa omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli. 
2Kings15:32 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Peeka mwene Remalia omugabe wa Israeli Yosamu mwene Uziya omugabe wa Yuda akatandika kutegyeka. 
2Kings15:33 Obu yaatandikire kutegyeka, akaba ahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano, yaamara emyaka ikumi na mukaaga ari aha ngoma omuri Yerusaalemu. Kandi nyina akaba naayetwa Yerusha mwne Zadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Akakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA, nk'ebi Uziya ishe yaakozire byona." 
2Kings15:35 Kwonka emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu tiyaasheenywa; kureka abantu bakaguma bagitambiramu ebitambo, bagyotereramu obubaane. Kandi yaayombeka eirembo ry'ekikaari kya MUKAMA ery'aharuguru." 
2Kings15:36 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yosamu n'ebi yaakozire byona tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda? 
2Kings15:37 Omu biro ebyo MUKAMA akatandika kutuma Rezini omugabe wa Siria na Peeka mwene Remalia kurwanisa Yuda. 
2Kings15:38 Bwanyima Yosamu yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika hamwe nabo omu rurembo rwa Daudi ishenkuru; Ahazi omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings16:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Peeka mwene Remalia, Ahazi mwene Yosamu omugabe wa Yuda akatandika kutegyeka." 
2Kings16:2 Akaba ahikize emyaka makumi abiri, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mukaaga omuri Yerusaalemu. Tiyaakora birikusiimwa MUKAMA Ruhanga we, nk'oku ishenkuru Daudi yaakozire," 
2Kings16:3 kureka yaagyendera omu mitwarize y'abagabe ba Israeli; kandi yaarabya n'omutabani omu muriro, naakuratira ebirikunugwa eby'abanyamahanga, abu MUKAMA yaabingire omu maisho g'Abaisraeli." 
2Kings16:4 Kandi yaaguma naatambira ebitambo, naayoterera obubaane omu myanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu n'aha bibungo kandi n'ahansi ya buri kiti ekyetwa omurinzi." 
2Kings16:5 Bwanyima Rezini omugabe wa Siria na Peeka mwene Remalia omugabe wa Israeli bainamuka kuteera Yerusaalemu; baagota Ahazi, kwonka tibaabaasa kumusingura." 
2Kings16:6 Omu biro ebyo nimwo omugabe wa Edomu yaagaruriire Elaasi omuri Edomu, akabingamu abashaija ba Yuda; Abanyaedomu bakaija omuri Elaasi; bakagumamu n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Kings16:7 Atyo Ahazi yaatuma entumwa ahari Tigulaasi-pileseeri omugabe wa Asiria, naagira ati: Ndi omwiru waawe kandi omwana waawe. Rugayo onjune omugabe wa Siria n'owa Israeli, abanteire." 
2Kings16:8 Kandi yaatwara efeeza n'ezaabu ezaashangirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA n'omu mabikiro g'enju y'omugabe, yaabitoijera omugabe wa Asiria." 
2Kings16:9 Omugabe wa Asiria yaamwikiriza, yaahurura, yaateera Damasiko, yaagikwata, n'abantu baamwo yaabatwara Kiiri bari enkwatwa, kandi yaita na Reziini." 
2Kings16:10 Omugabe Ahazi ku yaagiire Damasiko kubugana Tigulaasi-pileseeri omugabe wa Asiria, yaareebayo eitambiro. Yaatwekyera Uriya omunyamurwa eky'okureeberaho ky'eryo itambiro, ekyabaire nikishushanira kimwe naryo omu miringo yoona." 
2Kings16:11 Uriya omunyamurwa yaayombeka eryo itambiro, naarishushanisiza kimwe n'ebi omugabe Ahazi yaatwekire ari Damasiko byona; atyo ogwo munyamurwa yaarikora, omugabe Ahazi atakagarukire naaruga Damasiko." 
2Kings16:12 Omugabe ku yaarugire Damasiko, yaareeba eitambiro; bwanyima yaariirira haihi, yaaritembaho." 
2Kings16:13 yaaryokyezaho ekitambo kye ky'okwotsya n'empongano ye y'esaano, yaarishukaho empongano ye y'eky'okunywa, kandi yaarishukyera eshagama y'empongano ze ez'okusiima ahabw'obusingye." 
2Kings16:14 Kandi eitambiro ry'emiringa eryabaire rituura omu maisho ga MUKAMA, yaariiha omu maisho g'enju omu mwanya gwaryo ahagati y'eitambiro rye n'enju ya MUKAMA, yaarita aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho obw'eitambiro rye." 
2Kings16:15 Omugabe Ahazi yaaragiira Uriya omunyamurwa naagira ati: Aha itabiro erihango obe niho waaguma nooyokyeza ekitambo ekyokibwa omu kasheeshe, n'empongano y'esaano ey'omumwabazyo, n'ekitambo ky'omugabe eky'okwotsya n'empongano ye ey'esaano, hamwe n'ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'abantu boona ab'eryo ihanga n'empongano yaabyo ey'esaano n'ey'ebyokunywa; kandi orishukyere eshangama yoona ey'ekitambo ky'okwotsya n'ey'ebindi bitambo; kwonka eitambiro ry'emiringa rigume ribe eryangye ery'okwehanuurizaho." 
2Kings16:16 Uriya omunyamurwa yaakora ebyo byona, nk'oku omugabe Ahazi yaamuragiire." 
2Kings16:17 Bwanyima omugabe Ahazi yaashara aha binaabiro ebiremu by'ebitebe byabyo, yaiha ahari buri kimwe ekinaabiro kyakyo; kandi yaiha ekitanka aha nimi z'emiringa ezaabaire ziri ahansi yaakyo, yaakita aha mabaare agaariire." 
2Kings16:18 Kandi omuhanda ogushakaire ogw'okurabamu ahari Sabato, ogwabaire gwombekire okuruga omu kikaari okuhika aha irembo ry'omugabe ery'aheeru eririkutaaha omuri hekalu, yaagwiha aha nju ya MUKAMA ahabw'omugabe wa Asiria." 
2Kings16:19 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Ahazi n'ebi yaakozire byona tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda? 
2Kings16:20 Ahazi yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika hamwe nabo omu rurembo rwa Daudi; Hezekia omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings17:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ebiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Ahazi omugabe wa Yuda Hoshea mutabani wa Ela akatandika kutegyekyera Israeli omuri Samaria, yaamara emaka mwenda aha ngoma." 
2Kings17:2 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, kwonka tiyaashushana na bagabe ba Israeli abaamubandiize." 
2Kings17:3 Shalumaneseeri omugabe wa Asiria yainamuka, yaamuteera; Hoshea yaahinduka omwiru we, yaaguma naamutoijera." 
2Kings17:4 Bwanyima omugabe wa Asiria yaashanga Hoshea amugiriire enaama; ahakuba akaba atumire entumwa ahari So omugabe wa Misri, kandi ayangire kutwekyera omugabe wa Asiria emitoijo, nk'oku yaabaire amutoijera buri mwaka. Nikyo omugabe wa Asiria yaamuteereire omu kihome akamuboha." 
2Kings17:5 Bwanyima omugabe wa Asira yainamuka, yaaraba omuri egyo nsi yoona, yaahika Samaria, yaagigota okumara emyaka eshatu." 
2Kings17:6 Omu mwaka gwa mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Hoshea, omugabe wa Asiria yaakwata Samaria, yaatwara Abaisraeli Asiria bari enkwatwa, yaabata omuri Haala n'aha mugyera Habora ogw'omuri Gozani, n'omu ndembo z'Abameedi." 
2Kings17:7 Ekyo kikabaho ahabw'okuba Abaisraeli bakacumura ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, owabaihire omu nsi ya Misri omu mikono ya Faraho omugabe waayo, baatiina baaruhanga abandi," 
2Kings17:8 baagyendera omu micwe y'ago mahanga agu MUKAMA yaabingire omu maisho gaabo, kandi n'omu micwe ei abagabe ba Israeli baabaire bareetsire." 
2Kings17:9 Kandi Abaisraeli baaguma nibakorera omu mubonano ebitahikire nibacumura ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo. Baayeyombekyera emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu omuri tauni zaabo zoona, okuruga aha minaara y'abarinzi, okuhika aha ndembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare;" 
2Kings17:10 kandi baayebyarira enyomyo z'amabaare na Ashera ahari buri kibungo kyona ekiraingwa, n'ahansi ya buri kiti ekyetwa omurinzi," 
2Kings17:11 okwo niyo baayoterereire obubaane omu myanya yoona emikuru y'okuramizamu, nk'oku ago mahanga gaakozire agu MUKAMA yaatwaire akaiha omu maisho gaabo. Baakora ebindi bibi, baagwisa kubi MUKAMA," 
2Kings17:12 baaheereza ebishushani ebirikuramibwa ebi MUKAMA yaabaire abagizire ati; Eki mutarikikora. 
2Kings17:13 N'obu biraabe byabaire biba bityo, hoona MUKAMA akaba ateisa Israeli na Yuda, naagambira omuri buri nabi na buri muhanuuzi, naagira ati: Muhindukye murekye emicwe yaanyu emibi, mworobere ebiragiro byangye n'ebi naataireho, nk'ebiragiro byona ebi naaragiire baashwenkuriimwe, kandi n'ebi naabatumireho nimbirabya omu bairu bangye bombi, oku byabaire biri." 
2Kings17:14 Kwonka banga kuhurira, bagangaara, nka baishenkurubo abaabaire bataikiriza MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo." 
2Kings17:15 Bagaya ebi yaataireho, n'endagaano ei yaaragaine na baishenkurubo n'okuteisa oku yaabaire abateisa. Bakuratira ebitaine mugasho, nabo bahinduka ebataine mugasho, batooreza emicwe y'amahanga agabeehinguririze, agu MUKAMA yaabeehanangiriize kutakora nkago." 
2Kings17:16 Batyo baareka ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, baayekorera ebishushani bibiri by'enyana ebiheesire, kandi baaguma nibakora ana Ashera, baramya eihe ryona ery'omu iguru, nibaheereza Baali." 
2Kings17:17 Barabya batabani baabo na bahara baabo omu muriro nk'ebitambo, baragura, baroga, beehayo kukora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, nibamugwisa kubi." 
2Kings17:18 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaagwerwa kubi munonga Abaisraeli yaababinga omu maisho ge, tiyaagira u yaatsigaho kureka oruganda rwa Yuda rwonka." 
2Kings17:19 Kandi Abayuda nabo tibaayorobera biragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, kureka baagyendera omu micwe ei Abaisraeli baareetsire." 
2Kings17:20 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaacwa baijukuru b'Abaisraeli boona, yaababurabuza, yaabahayo omu mikono y'abanyagi, okuhitsya obu yaababingiire kimwe omu maisho ge." 
2Kings17:21 Ahakuba akacwa Israeli aha nju ya Daudi, baahindura Yeroboamu mwene Nebati omugabe. Kandi Yeroboamu yaazibira Abaisraeli kukuratira MUKAMA, yaabakoresa ekibi kihango." 
2Kings17:22 Batyo Abaisraeli baagyendera omu bibi byona ebi Yeroboamu yaakozire, tibaabireka," 
2Kings17:23 okuhitsya obu MUKAMA yaabingira Israeli omu maisho ge, nk'oku yaashangirwe agambire naaraba omu bairu be boona baanabi. Okwo nikwo Abaisraeli baabingirwe omu nsi yaabo, bakatwarwa Asiria, bakagumayo n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Kings17:24 Bwanyima omugabe wa Asiria yaiha abantu Babulooni, Kuusa, Ava, Hamasi, na Sefavaimu, yaabata omu ndembo za Samaria omu mwanya gw'Abaisraeli; baagikubuura, baatuura omu ndembo zaayo." 
2Kings17:25 Ku baabaire bakitandikire kutuurayo, tibaatiina MUKAMA; n'ahabw'ekyo yaabooherereza entare, zaabaitamu abantu." 
2Kings17:26 Batyo baagambira omugabe wa Asiria bati: Amahanga agu otwaire kuta omu ndembo za Samaria tigarikumanya biragiro bya ruhanga w'egyo nsi; n'ahabw'ekyo abooherereize entare; mbwenu reeba, nizibaita, ahabw'okuba tibarikumanya biragiro bya ruhanga w'ensi egyo." 
2Kings17:27 Omugabe wa Asiria nikwo kuragiira ati: Mugarureyo omunyamurwa omwe aha bu mwaihireyo, agyende atuureyo, abeegyese ebiragiro bya ruhanga w'egyo nsi." 
2Kings17:28 N'ahabw'ekyo omwe aha banyamurwa abu baihire Samaria yaija, yaatuura Beseeli, yaaguma naabeegyesa oku bashemereire kutiina MUKAMA." 
2Kings17:29 Kwonka buri ihanga ryaguma niryekorera baaruhanga baaryo, niribata omuri zaanyaruju z'omu myanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu, ezi Abasamaria baabaire bombekire, buri ihanga omu ndembo ezi ryabaire ritwiremu." 
2Kings17:30 Aba Babulooni baakora Sukoosi-benosi; aba Kuusi baakora Neregaali; aba Hamasi baakora Ashima; 
2Kings17:31 aba Ava baakora Nibuhazi na Tarutaaki; n'aba Sefavaimu baaguma nibootsya abaana omu muriro, nibabatambira Adrameleki na Anameleki, baaruhanga ba Sefavaimu." 
2Kings17:32 Kandi bakaba batiina MUKAMA, batoorana omuribo abantu b'emiringo yoona kuba abanyamurwa b'emyanya mikuru; abo nibo baabaire babatambirira ebitambo omuri zaanyaruju z'omuri egyo myanya." 
2Kings17:33 Batyo batiina MUKAMA, kwonka baaguma nibaheereza baaruhanga baabo, nibakuratira emitwarize y'amahanga agu baarugiremu." 
2Kings17:34 Na hati nibakitwaza nk'oku baabaire batwaza ira. Tibarikutiina MUKAMA, tibarikukuratira byatairweho nari emigyenzo, nari ebiragiro ebi MUKAMA yaaragiire beene Yakobo ou yaayetsire Israeli." 
2Kings17:35 Abo nibo MUKAMA yaaragaine nabo endagaano akabeehanangiriza naagira ati: Mutaritiina baaruhanga abandi, mutaribainamira, mutaribaheereza n'obu kwakuba okubatambira ebitambo;" 
2Kings17:36 kureka MUKAMA owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misri n'amaani maingi n'omukono ogubangire, mube niwe mwatiina, mukainamira; kandi mube niwe mwatambira ebitambo." 
2Kings17:37 Kandi ebyatairweho n'emigyenzo n'ebiragiro, ebi yaaragiire akabibahandiikira, mugume mubiteho omutima, mubyorobere; mutarigira baaruhanga abandi abu mwatiina." 
2Kings17:38 N'ahabw'ekyo endagaano ei naaragaine naimwe mutarigyebwa; mutaritiina baaruhanga abandi," 
2Kings17:39 kureka mugume mutiine MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu; niwe aribajuna omu mikono y'abazigu baanyu boona. 
2Kings17:40 Kwonka bo baayanga kuhurira, baagumizamu n'emicwe yaabo eya ira." 
2Kings17:41 Batyo abantu b'ago mahanga baaguma nibatiina MUKAMA, kandi nibaheereza ebishushani byabo ebibaizire; abaana baabo na baijukuru baano nabo baagumizamu baakora nk'oku baishekurubo baabaire bakora, n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Kings18:1 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Hoshea mwene Ela, omugabe wa Israeli, Hezekia mutabani wa Ahazi omugabe wa Yuda akatandika kutegyeka." 
2Kings18:2 Yaatandika aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano, yaategyekyera emyaka makumi abiri na mwenda omuri Yerusaalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Abi muhara wa Zekaria." 
2Kings18:3 Yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA nk'ebi Daudi ishenkuru yaakozire byona oku byabaire biri. 
2Kings18:4 Yaihaho emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu, yaasheenya enyomyo z'amabaare, yaatema Ashara; kandi yaacwagacwagura enjoka y'omuringa ei Musa yaabaire akozire, ahabw'okuba okuhitsya omu bunaku obwo Abaisraeli bakaba nibakigyoterera obubaane; neeyetwa Nehushitaane." 
2Kings18:5 Akaba naayesiga MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli; n'ahabw'ekyo tihariho mugabe weena owaabaire naamushusha omu bagabe ba Yuda boona abaamukuratiire, n'obu baakuba abaamubandiize." 
2Kings18:6 Ahabw'okuba akagumira ahari MUKAMA, tiyaareka kumukuratira, yaaguma naayorobera ebiragiro ebi MUKAMA yaaragiire Musa." 
2Kings18:7 MUKAMA yaaguma nawe; ei yaabaire ahurura yoona, aba gye. Kandi yaagomera omugabe wa Asiria, yaayanga kumuheereza." 
2Kings18:8 Kandi yaateera Abafilistia okuruga aha munaara gw'abarinzi okuhika aha ndembo ezizitiire n'engo z'amabaare, yaabahitsya Gaaza n'omu byanga byayo." 
2Kings18:9 Omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Hezekia, ogwabaire guri omwaka gwa mushanju ogwa Hoshea mwene Ela omugabe wa Israeli, Shalumaneseeri omugabe wa Asiria akainamuka, yaateera Samaria, yaagigota;" 
2Kings18:10 aha muheru gw'omwaka gwa kashatu yaagikwata. Omu mwaka gwa mukaaga ogwa Hezekia, ogwabaire guri omwaka gwa mwenda ogwa Hoshea omugabe wa Israeli, nimwo Samaria yaakwatiirwe." 
2Kings18:11 Bwanyima omugabe wa Asiria yaatwara Abaisraeli omu nsi ye bari enkwatwa, yaabata omuri Haala, n'aha mugyera Habora ogw'omuri Gozani, n'omu ndembo z'Abameedi," 
2Kings18:12 ahakuba tibarahuriire iraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, kureka bakaita endagaano ye, nangwa n'ebi Musa omugaragwa wa MUKAMA yaaragiire byona, baayanga kubihurira, n'obu kwakuba okubyorobera." 
2Kings18:13 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ena ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Hezekia, Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria akainamuka, yaateera endembo zoona eza Yuda ezaabaire zizitiirwe n'engo z'amabaare, yaazikwata." 
2Kings18:14 Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda yaatuma aha mugabe wa Asiria ari Lakishi, ati: Nshobize; ndeka; kyona eki orancwe ninkyemera. Omugabe wa Asiria yaacwa Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda etalanta magana ashatu z'efeeza, kandi n'ez'ezaabu makumi ashatu." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekia yaamuha efeeza yoona eyaashangirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA, n'omu mabiikiro g'enju y'omugabe." 
2Kings18:16 Omu biro ebyo Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda akaiha ezaabu aha nyigi za hekalu ya MUKAMA, n'aha biti by'emiryango, ei yaabaire abishwekire, yaagiha omugabe wa Asiria." 
2Kings18:17 Omugabe wa Asiria, ku yaabaire akiri Lakishi, yaatuma abatware be Tarutaani, Rabusaari, na Rabushaake, n'eihe rihango aha mugabe Hezekia omuri Yerusaalemu. Bainamuka, baaza Yerusaalemu. Ku baahikireyo, baayemerera aha mukura gw'ekiyanja ky'eruguru, ekiri aha muhanda rugyendwa ogurikuza aha kibanja ky'omwozi." 
2Kings18:18 Ku baayetsire omugabe, haija Eliakimu mwene Hilukia, owaabaire ari omukuru w'ekikaari, na Shebuna omuhandiiki, na Yoa mwene Asafu omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho, baabashanga aho." 
2Kings18:19 Omutware Rabushaake yaabagira ati: Mwirooko mugire Hezekia muti: Oku nikwo omugabe rugambwa, omugabe wa Asiria arikugamba naagira ati: Mbwenu ou orikwesiga n'oha?" 
2Kings18:20 Noogira ngu ebigambo bugambo nibyo naama n'amaani eby'okurwanisa? Hari ou oyegamiire hati n'oha, waaza kungomera?" 
2Kings18:21 Reeba, hati oyegamiire Misri, orubango oruri nk'ekibungo kihndekire, ekirikwija kucumita ekiganja ky'omuntu weena orikukihimbagiriraho. Okwo nikwo na Faraho omugabe wa Misri ari ahari boona abarikumwesiga." 
2Kings18:22 Kandi ku murangire muti: Nitwesiga MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, tiwe ogwo ou Hezekia yaihireho emyanya ye mikuru ey'okuramizamu n'amatambiro ge, naagira Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu ati: Mushemereire kuramiza omu maisho g'eri itambiro eriri Yerusaalemu?" 
2Kings18:23 Mbwenu ija okwatirizane na mukama wangye omugabe wa Asiria. Nkuhe embaraasi enkumi ibiri; ku oraabone ab'okuzitemba, ongire kwo!" 
2Kings18:24 Noija kubaasa ota kubinga omwe aha bakuru bangye b'engabo ab'amaani makye okukira abandi, ku oraabe oyesigire Misri kuba nibo baakuha ebigaari n'ab'aha mbaraasi?" 
2Kings18:25 Kandi noogira ngu nyizire kuteera omwanya ogu n'okugucwekyereza ntaragiirwe MUKAMA? Omanye ngu MUKAMA niwe angambiire ati: Inamuka, oteere egyo nsi, ogicwekyereze." 
2Kings18:26 Bwanyima Eliakimu mwene Hilukia na Shebuna na Yoa baagira omutware Rabushaake bati: Twakweshengyereza, gamba n'abairu baawe omu rurimi rw'Abasiria; ahakuba itwe niturumanya; reka kugamba omu rurimi rw'Abayuda, abantu abari ha rugo rw'amabaare babihuriire." 
2Kings18:27 Kwonka omutware Rabushaake yaabagarukamu ati: Nimugira ngu mukama wangye antumire ahari mukama waanyu naimwe kuba niimwe naagambira ebigambo ebi mwenka? Tantumire kubigambira n'abashaija bariya abashutami aha rugo, abarikwija kurya naimwe amazi gaabo, n'okunywa naimwe enkari yaago?" 
2Kings18:28 Ahonaaho omutware Rabushaake yaayemerera, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango omu rurimi rw'Abayuda, naagira ati: Muhurire obutumwa bw'omugabe rugambwa, omugabe wa Asiria." 
2Kings18:29 Oku nikwo omugabe arikugamba naagira ati: Mutaikiriza Hezekia kubabeiha; ahabw'okuba tarikwija kubaasa kubajuna abaihe omu mikono yangye. 
2Kings18:30 Mutaikiriza Hezekia kubeesigisa MUKAMA naabagira ati: Buzimazima MUKAMA naija kutujuna, kandi orurembo oru tirurikwija kuheebwayo mu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria." 
2Kings18:31 Mutahurira Hezekia; ahakuba oku nikwo omugabe wa Asiria arikugamba naagira ati: Mugarukane naanye; mwije munshangye aha; obwo buri omwe omuriimwe nibwo araarye ahamuzaabibu gwe, akarya ahamutiini gwe, kandi akanya amaizi g'omu iziba rye," 
2Kings18:32 okuhitsya obu ndiija, nkabatwra omu nsi erikushushana n'eyaanyu, ensi y'engano na viinyo, ey'emigaati n'emizaabibu, kandi ey'emizeituuni n'obwoki, mukabona kugumaho, mutafe. N'ahabw'ekyo mutahurira Hezekia orikubabeihabeiha naabagira ati: MUKAMA naija kutujuna." 
2Kings18:33 Nimugira ngu hariho ruhanga omuri baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga orajunire ensi ye omu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria? 
2Kings18:34 Mbwenu baaruhanga ba Hamasi na Arupaadi barahi? na baaruhanga ba Sefavaimu, ba Hena n'aba Iiva barahi? Barajunire Samaria omu mikono yangye?" 
2Kings18:35 Ni baahi omuri baaruhanga boona ab'ezo nsi abarajunire ensi yaabo omu mikono yangye, mukabona kwesiga ku MUKAMA arikwija kwiha Yerusaalemu omu mijono yangye?" 
2Kings18:36 Abantu baahunama, tibaagira ki baamugarukamu, ahabw'okuba ekiragiro ky'omugabe kikaba nikigira kiti: Mutamugarukamu." 
2Kings18:37 Bwanyima Eliakimu mwene Hilukia omukuru w'ekikaari, na Shebuna omuhandiiki, na Yoa mwene Asafu omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho baija ahari Hezekia bataagwire ebijwaro byabo, baamuteekyerereza ebigambo bya Rabushaake." 
2Kings19:1 Omugabe Hezekia ku yaabihuriire, yaataagura ebijwaro bye, yaajwara ekiguniya, yaaza omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Kings19:2 Yaatuma Eliakimu omukuru w'ekikaari na Shebuna omuhandiiki n'abanyamurwa abakuru ahari nabi Isaaya mwene Amozi bajwaire ebiguniya. 
2Kings19:3 Baamugira bati: Oku nikwo Hezekia arikugamba naagira ati: Eri izooba n'eizooba ry'obusaasi n'okuhanwa n'okuteererwa enaku, ahakuba abaana bahikire kuzaarwa, kwona amaani g'okubazaara tigariho." 
2Kings19:4 Shana MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ahuriire ebigambo byona ebigambirwe Rabushaake, ou mukama we omugabe wa Asiria atumire kugaya Ruhanga otahwaho, obundi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akaamuhana ahabw'ebigambo ebyo ebi ahuriire; na'ahabw'ekyo imutsya eiraka ryawe oshabire abantu abakiriho abaahonokireho." 
2Kings19:5 Abaheereza b'omugabe Hezekia ku baahikire owa Isaaya," 
2Kings19:6 Isaaya yaabagira ati: Mugambire mukama waanyu muti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Otatiina ebyo bigambo bi ohuriire, ebi abaheereza b'omugabe wa Asiria banjumire." 
2Kings19:7 Reeba, niinyija kumutamu ogundi mutima, ahurire orukuru, agarukye omu nsi ye; kandi ku araahikyeyo, mmwitse rurara." 
2Kings19:8 Bwanyima Rabushaake yaagarukayo, yaashanga omugabe wa Asiria naarwanisa Libuna; ahabw'okuba akaba ahuriire ku arugire Lakishi." 
2Kings19:9 Omugabe ku yaahuriire ebya Tiruhaaka omugabe wa Esiopia nibagira ngu, Reeba aizire kukuteera, yaagaruka yaatuma ahari Hezekia naagira ati:" 
2Kings19:10 Mwirooko mugire Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda muti: Otaikiriza Ruhanga waawe ogwo ou orikwesiga kukubeiha naakuraganisa ati: Yerusaalemu teriheebwayo mu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria. 
2Kings19:11 Reeba, ohuriire oku abagabe ba Asiria baagizire ensi zoona, bakazicwekyerereza kimwe. Noogira ngu niiwe orikwija kukira?" 
2Kings19:12 Amahanga aga, Gozani, Harani, Rzefu, n'ab'omuri Edeni abaabaire batwire Telasaari, agu baatatenkuru baacwekyereize, noogira ngu baaruhanga baago bakagajuna?" 
2Kings19:13 Nyoreka omugabe wa Hamasi, n'owa Arupaadi, n'ow'orurembo Sefavaimu, n'owa Hena, n'owa Iiva!" 
2Kings19:14 Hezekia yaayakiira ebaruha eyaareetwa ezo ntumwa, yaagishoma; bwanyima yainamuka, yaija omu nju ya MUKAMA, yaagishashaanura omu maisho ge." 
2Kings19:15 Hezekia yaashabira omu maisho ga MUKAMA naagira ati: Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, otuura aha kitebe ky'obukama ahagati ya baakerubi, Iwe wenka niiwe Ruhanga ow'obugabe bwona obw'omu nsi; niiwe waahangire eiguru n'ensi." 
2Kings19:16 MUKAMA, tega okutu kwawe, ohurire; igura amaisho gaawe, ai MUKAMA, oreebe; ohurire ebigambo ebi Senakeribu atumire kurogota ahari Ruhanga otahwaho." 
2Kings19:17 N'ekya buzima, MUKAMA, abagabe ba Asiria bakacwekyereza abantu b'ago mahanga n'ensi zaabo," 
2Kings19:18 baanaga baaruhanga baabo omu muriro, ahabw'okuba bakaba batari baaruhanga nyamuhanga, kureka bakaba bakozirwe engaro z'abantu omu biti n'omu mabaare; nikyo baabacwekyerereize." 
2Kings19:19 N'ahabw'ekyo hati, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, ninkweshengyereza otujune, otwihe omu mikono ye, obugabe bwona obw'omu nsi, ai MUKAMA, bumanye ku niiwe wenka oba Ruhanga." 
2Kings19:20 Bwanyima Isaaya mwene Amozi yaatuma ahari Hezekia naagira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Nk'oku onshabire kukuhwera aha bya Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria, naakwikiriza." 
2Kings19:21 Eki nikyo kigambo eki MUKAMA amugambirieho naagira ati: Omwishiki wa Saayuuni otakamanyaga mushaija Naakugaya, naakushekyerera; Kandi Yerusaalemu neekuzongoreza omutwe." 
2Kings19:22 N'oha ou ojumire, okarogotaho? Kandi ou okabukiire, okateera ekitsyori n'oha? N'Orikwera wa Israeli!" 
2Kings19:23 Ojumiise MUKAMA entumwa zaawe, Noogira oti: Nyinamukire n'ebigaari byangye bingi Aha mitwe y'enshozi, Hare munonga ahagati ya Lebanooni. Niinyija kutema emyereezi yaayo emiraingwa, N'emiberooshi yaayo emirungi munonga; Niinyija kuhika omu bweshereko bwayo hare munonga, Omu kibira kyayo ekikwataine." 
2Kings19:24 Nkatimba amaziba g'abanyamahanga, Naanywa amaizi gaago; Naaribatiirira emigyera ya Misiri yoona, Naagyomya." 
2Kings19:25 Torahuriire ku naamaririire ira kukikora? Omu biro bya ira nkacuma enaama y'okukora Ebi ndikuhikiiriza omu biro ebi, Ngu ocwekyereze endembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, Ozihindure amatongo." 
2Kings19:26 Nikyo kyareeteire abazitwiremu kucweka entegye, Bakahahaaza omutima, bakarimbagirirwa, Bakaba nk'obunyaatsi bw'omu ishwa, Nk'obunyaatsi buto, Bakahotoka nk'obunyaatsi obumezire aha mutwe gw'enju, Nk'engano ezooma zitakakuzire." 
2Kings19:27 Kwonka nimmanya emishutamire yaawe, Emihururire yaawe, n'emitabaarukire yaawe, Kandi n'ekiniga eki wangiriire." 
2Kings19:28 Ahabw'okungirira ekiniga, Kandi nkahurira eby'amaryo gaawe, Niinyija kukuta eirobo ryangye omu nyindo, N'ekyoma kyangye omu kanwa, Nkugarure omuhanda ogwakureetsire." 
2Kings19:29 Kandi aka karyakubeera akamanyiso; omu mwaka ogu nimwija kurya ebyemerize; omu gwa kabiri murye ebemerize eby'emiragarika y'ebyo, bwanyima omu mwaka gwa kashatu muryabiba mugyeshe, mubyare emizaabibu, murye ebijuma byayo." 
2Kings19:30 Abatsigaire aha b'enju ya Yuda abaahonokireho baryagaruka batsimbe emizi okuzimu, n'ahaiguru baane ebyana;" 
2Kings19:31 ahakuba omuri Yerusaalemu haryarugamu ekicweka ekiriba kitsigaireho, n'aha rushozi Saayuuni harugyeho omutwe gw'abahonokireho. Obweziriki bwa MUKAMA buryakihikiiriza." 
2Kings19:32 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugambira aha mugabe wa Asiria naagira ati: Tarihika muri oru rurembo, nari okurwemurikira omumaisho aine engabo ye, n'obu kwakuba okurutuumaho omutuumo gw'eitaka." 
2Kings19:33 Omuhanda ogwamureetsire nigwo gurimugarurayo; kandi taritaaha muri oru rurembo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira; 
2Kings19:34 ahakuba ndyarinda oru rurembo, ndujune ahabwangye, n'ahabw'omwiru wangye Daudi." 
2Kings19:35 Ekyo kiro maraika wa MUKAMA yaija, yaateera orusiisira rw'Abaasiria, yaitamu engabo z'Abaasiria akasiriira n'obukumi munaana n'enkumi itaano. Abantu ku baimukire omu kasheeshe, baashanga ezo ngabo zoona ziri emitumbi." 
2Kings19:36 Bwanyima Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria yaarugayo, yaagaruka Nineeve, yaatuurayo." 
2Kings19:37 Ku yaabaire ari omuri nyaruju ya ruhanga we Nisirooki naamuramya, Adurameleki na Sharezeeri abatabani baija baamwitsa rurara, baacwa, baahungira omu nsi ya Araraati. Esari-hadooni omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings20:1 Omu biro ebyo Hezekia akarwara, yaahika aha ncwamba za rufu. Nabi Isaaya mwene Amozi yaija ah'ari, yaamugira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Tebeekanisa eby'eka yaawe; ahabw'okuba noija kufa, tori w'okukira." 
2Kings20:2 Ahonaaho Hezekia yaahinduka, yaareba ekisiika, yaashaba MUKAMA naagira ati:" 
2Kings20:3 Ai MUKAMA, ninkweshengyereza, mbwenu ijuka oku ngyendeire omu maisho gaawe omu bwesigwa n'omutima oguhikire, ninkora ebi orikusiima. Yaarira munonga." 
2Kings20:4 Kwonka Isaaya ku yaabaire atakashohoire kuruga omu kibuga ky'ahagati omu kikaari, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyamwijaho nikigira kiti:" 
2Kings20:5 Garukayo, ogambire Hezekia omukuru w'abantu bangye oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Daudi shwenkuru, arikugamba naagira ati: Naahurira okushaba kwawe, kandi naareeba n'amarira gaawe. Reeba, niinyija kukukiza; aha kiro kya kashatu oinamukye omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Kings20:6 Kandi ndyayongyera aha biro byawe emyaka ikumi n'etaano. Ndyakujuna, iwe n'oru rurembo, omu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria, kandi ndurinde ahabwangye, n'ahabw'omwiru wangye Daudi." 
2Kings20:7 Isaaya yaagira ati: Mureete ekitongye ky'emitiini. Baakireeta, baakibatika aha kizimba eki yaabaire arwaire, yaakira." 
2Kings20:8 Obwo Hezekia akaba yaabuurize Isaaya ati: Ni kamanyiso ki akarikworeka ku MUKAMA arikwija kuntambira, kandi ku ndikwija kwinamuka omu nju ya MUKAMA aha kiro kya kashatu?" 
2Kings20:9 Isaaya yaamugarukamu ati: Aka niko kamanyiso aku MUKAMA yaakuha, akarikuhamya ku arikwija kuhikiiriza eki yaagamba. Nooyenda ngu ekicuucu kigyende omumaisho entambwe ikumi, nari kigarukye enyima entambwe ikumi?" 
2Kings20:10 Hezekia yaamugarukamu ati: Nikirahuka ekicuucu kugyenda omumaisho entambwe ikumi; haakiri kigarukye enyima ezo ntambwe ikumi. 
2Kings20:11 Atyo nabi Isaaya yaashaba MUKAMA; nawe yaagarura ekicuucu enyima entambwe ikumi okuruga ahu kyabaire kyahika aha ky'okugyeresa kya Ahazi. 
2Kings20:12 Omu biro ebyo Merodaakibaladaani mwene Baladaani omugabe wa Babulooni akatuma ahari Hezekia entumwa, zaamutwarira ebaruha n'ekiconco, ahabw'okuba akaba ahuriire ngu arwaire." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekia yaazaakiira n'okushemererwa, yaazooreka enju ye yoona omu abiika ebintu bye eby'obuguzi bwingi, efeeza, ezaabu, emigaju, amajuta ag'obuguzi bwingi, n'ahu abiika eby'okurwanisa bye, n'ebyashangirwe omu mabiikiro ge byona; tihariho kintu kyona omu nju ye nari omu bugabe bwe bwona, eki atarazoorekirre." 
2Kings20:14 Bwanyima nabi Isaaya yaija aha mugabe Hezekia, yaamugira ati: Abashaija abo bagambire ki? kandi baizire owaawe nibaruga hi? Hezekia yaagira ati: Barugire omu nsi ya hare Babulooni." 
2Kings20:15 Onu ati: Bareebire ki omwawe? Hezekia yaagira ati: Byona ebiri omwangye babireebire; tihariho kintu kyona omu mabiikiro gangye eki ntaboorekire. 
2Kings20:16 Isaaya yaagira Hezekia ati: Mbwenu hurira ekigambo kya MUKAMA. 
2Kings20:17 Reeba, obunaku buryahika, ebintu by'omu nju yaawe byona, n'ebi baashwenkuru baabiikire okuhitsya hati, bitwarwe Babulooni, harekye kugira ekyatsigaraho, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
2Kings20:18 Kandi bamwe ahari batabani baawe, abu oriba oyezaariire, baryatwarwa, bahindukye abakonwa omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Babulooni." 
2Kings20:19 Bwanyima Hezekia yaagira Isaaya ati: Ekigambo kya MUKAMA eki waagamba ni kirungi. Ahakuba akagira ati: Mbwenu shi ti kirungi, ku haraabe nihaija kubaho obusingye n'obuhooro omu biro byangye?" 
2Kings20:20 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Hezekia n'eby'amaani ge goona n'oku yaakozire ekiyanja, akateera omukura gw'okureeta amaizi omu rurembo, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'Abagabe ba Yuda?" 
2Kings20:21 Bwanyima Hezekia yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru; Manaase omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings21:1 Manaase akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka ikumi n'ebiri, yaamara aha ngoma emyaka makumi ataano n'etaano naategyekyera Yerusaalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Hefuziba." 
2Kings21:2 Kwonka yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, naatooreza emicwe erikunugwa ey'abanyamahanga, abu MUKAMA yaabingire omu maisho g'Abaisraeli;" 
2Kings21:3 ahabwo'okuba akagaruka yaayombeka zaanyaruju z'omu myanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, ezi Hezekia ishe yaabaire asheenyire; yaayombekyera Baali amatambiro, yaakora Ashera nk'oku Ahabu omugabe wa Israeli yaabaire akora, kandi yaaguma naaramya eihe ryona ery'omu iguru, naariheereza." 
2Kings21:4 Kandi yaayombeka amatambiro omu nju ya MUKAMA, ei MUKAMA yaabaire agambireho ati: Omuri Yerusaalemu nimwo ndita eiziina ryangye." 
2Kings21:5 Kandi yaayombekyera eihe ryona ery'omu iguru amatambiro omu bikaari byombi eby'enju ya MUKAMA. 
2Kings21:6 Yaarabya omutabani omu muriro, yaaguma naakora eby'okumanyisa ebiribaho n'okuragura, kandi yaaraguza aha barikugambisa emizimu n'abarogi. Yaakora ebibi bingi omu maisho ga MUKAMA, yaamugwisa kubi." 
2Kings21:7 Yaata ekishushani kya Ashera ekibaizire omu nju ei MUKAMA yaagambiire Daudi n'omutabani Sulemaani ati: Omu nju egi n'omuri Yerusaalemu ebi naatooraine omu nganda zoona eza Israeli, nimwo ndita eiziina ryangye kugumamu ebiro byona;" 
2Kings21:8 kandi Abaisraeli ku barita omutima aha kworobera ebi naabaragiire byona, n'ebi omwiru wangye Musa yaabaragiire, tindigaruka kubazengyereza kubaiha omu nsi ei naahaire baishenkurubo." 
2Kings21:9 Kwonka tibaahurira, kandi Manaase yaababeihabeiha kukora ebibi ebirikukira obubi ebi amahanga gaakozire, agu MUKAMA yaacwekyerereize omu maisho g'Abaisraeli." 
2Kings21:10 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagamba naaraba omu bairu be baanabi ati: 
2Kings21:11 Ahabwa Manaase omugabe wa Yuda kukora ebirikunugwa ebyo, akakora ebibi ebirikukira obubi ebi Abaamori abaamubandiize baakozire byona, akasiisisa Abayuda ebishushani bye ebirikuramibwa;" 
2Kings21:12 nikyo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugambira naagira ati: Reeba, naaza kureeta akabai ahari Yerusaalemu na Yuda, aku omuntu weena araahurire, amatu gakateera enduuru." 
2Kings21:13 Ndyagyeresa Yerusaalemu akagoye nk'aku naagyereise Samaria, na kariisho ei naashwijumiise enju ya Ahabu; kandi ndyaragaza Yerusaalemu, nk'oku omuntu aragaza eshuhaani, akgijuumika." 
2Kings21:14 Ndyanaga ekicweka ekitsigaire aha buhunguzi bwangye, mbaheyo omu mikono y'abazigu baabo, bahindukye omuhiigo n'omunyago aharibo," 
2Kings21:15 ahakuba bakozire ebi ndikwanga, bangwisa kubi okwiha obu baishenkurubo baaruga Misri n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Kings21:16 Kandi Manaase akasheesha eshagama nyingi y'abataine rubanja, okuhitsya obu yaijwize Yerusaalemu okuruga aha rubaju okuhika aha rundi, akabyongyera aha kibi eki yaasiisiise Abayuda, bakakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA." 
2Kings21:17 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Manaase, n'ebi yaakozire byona, n'ekibi eki yaakozire, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda?" 
2Kings21:18 Manaase yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omu musiri gw'aha nju ye, ogwa Uzza; Amoni omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'ebiri, obu yaatandika kutegyeka, yaategyekyera emyaka ebiri omuri Yerusaalemu, Nyina akaba naayetwa Meshulemeesi, muhara wa Haruzi owa Yotiba." 
2Kings21:20 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA nka Manaase ishe. 
2Kings21:21 Yaagyendera omu muhanda gwona ogu ishe yaagyendeiremu, yaaheereza ebishushani ebi ishe yaaheereize, kandi yaabiramya;" 
2Kings21:22 yaimuura MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baishenkuru, tiyaagyendera mu mihanda ye." 
2Kings21:23 Bwanyima abaheereza b'omugabe Amoni baamugirira enaama, baamwitira omu nju ye." 
2Kings21:24 Kwonka abantu b'omuri egyo nsi baita abamugiriire enaama boona, baata omutabani Yosia aha ngoma omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings21:25 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Amoni ei yaakozire, tehandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda?" 
2Kings21:26 Yaaziikwa omu kituuro kye omu musiri gwa Uzza; Yosia omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe. 
2Kings22:1 Yosia akaba aine emyaka munaana, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ashatu na gumwe omuri Yerusaalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yedida, muhara wa Adaaya owa Bozikaasi." 
2Kings22:2 Yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA naagyendera omu muhanda gwa Daudi ishenkuru, tiyaateishuka kutoora aha rubaju rwa buryo nari rwa bumosho." 
2Kings22:3 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana gw'omu busingye gw'omugabe Yosia, aktuma Shafani mwene Azaliya mwijukuru wa Meshulaamu omuhandiiki, omu nju ya MUKAMA, yaamugira ati:" 
2Kings22:4 Inamuka oze owa Hilukia omunyamurwa omukuru, omugambire abare empiiha ezireetsirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA, ezi abarinzi b'eirembo bashoroize omu bantu," 
2Kings22:5 bazihe abarikureeberera enju ya MUKAMA, nabo bazihe abakozi abari omu nju ya MUKAMA abarikugihunduura ahi esiisikaire," 
2Kings22:6 nibo babaizi, abombeki n'abarikwombekyesa amabaare; kandi ezindi zibe ez'okugura embaaho n'amabaare agahigwire eby'okuhunduuza enju." 
2Kings22:7 Kandi ezo mpiiha ezi baabaire babaha, bakaba batababuuza oku zikoresiibwe; ahabw'okuba bakaba bazikoresa n'obwesigwa." 
2Kings22:8 Hilukia omunyamurwa omukuru yaagira Shafani omuhandiiki ati: Naazoora ekitabo ky'Ebiragiro omu nju ya MUKAMA. Atyo Hilukia yaaha Shafani ekyo kitabo, yaakishoma." 
2Kings22:9 Bwanyima Shafani omuhandiiki yaija ow'omugabe, yaamugambira ati: Abairu baawe baihire omu nju ya MUKAMA empiiha ezishangirwemu; baaziha abarikugireeberera." 
2Kings22:10 Shafani omuhandiiki yaagaruka yaagira omugabe ati: Hilukia omunyamurwa yampa ekitabo. Atyo Shafani yaakimushomera. 
2Kings22:11 Omugabe ku yaahuriire ebigambo by'omu kitabo ky'Ebiragiro, yaataagura ebijwaro bye." 
2Kings22:12 Ahonaaho yaaragiira Hilukia omunyamurwa, Ahikaamu mwene Shafani, Akiboora mwene Mikaaya, Shafani omuhandiiki na Asaaya omugaragwa w'omugabe, naagira ati:" 
2Kings22:13 Mwirooko muhanuuze ahari MUKAMA ahabwangye n'abantu bangye kandi na Yuda yoona eby'ebigambo by'ekitabo eki ekizoirwe; ahakuba ekiniga kya Ruhanga ekituriho ni kingi munonga, ahabw'okuba baatatenkuriitwe tibaroorobeire bigambo by'eki kitabo, okukora ebyahandiikirwe byona ebirikutukwataho." 
2Kings22:14 Atyo Hilukia omunyamurwa, Ahikaamu, Akiboora, Shafani na Asaaya baaza owa Hulida nabikazi muka Shalumu mwene Tikuva, mwijukuru wa Harihaasi, omubiiki w'ebijwaro; (omu biro ebyo ogwo mukazi akaba atwire Yerusaalemu omu kicweka kyayo kya kabiri) baagamba nawe." 
2Kings22:15 Yaabagira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Mugambire omushaija obantumireho muti:" 
2Kings22:16 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyareeta akabi aha mwanya ogu n'aha batuuzi baamwo, nk'ebigambo byona ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo eki omugabe wa Yuda ashomire oku biri." 
2Kings22:17 Ahabw'okuba bakanyimuura, baayoterera baaruhanga abandi obubaane, ngu bangwise kubi n'ebi baakozire n'emikono yaabo byona, n'ahabw'ekyo ekiniga kyangye kiryayaka aha mwanya ogu, kandi tikiriraazibwa." 
2Kings22:18 Kwonka omugabe wa Yuda obatumire kuhanuuza ahari MUKAMA, mumugire muti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Ebirikukwata aha bigambo ebi ohuriire," 
2Kings22:19 ahabw'okugira omutima gworobi, ku ohuriire ebi ngambire aha mwanya ogu n'aha batuuzi baamwo, ku barihinduka amatongo n'omukyeeno, waayecureeza omu maisho ga MUKAMA, waataagura ebijwaro byawe, waaririra omu maisho gangye, n'ahabw'ekyo naanye nkuhuriire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
2Kings22:20 Reeba nikyo ndikusaangisiza baashwenkuru, okaziikwa omu kituuro kyawe n'obusingye, kandi amaisho gaawe tigarireeba kabi koona aku ndireeta aha mwanya ogu. Batyo baagaruka, baabiteekyerereza omugabe." 
2Kings23:1 Bwanyima omugabe yaatuma, abakuru ba Yuda n'aba Yerusaalemu boona baateeranira ah'ari." 
2Kings23:2 Omugabe yainamuka omu nju ya MUKAMA hamwe n'abashaija b'omuri Yuda boona, abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusaalemu boona, abanyamurwa, na baanabi, abantu boona abakuru n'abato; yaabashomera ebigambo byona eby'omu kitabo ky'endagaano ekizoirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Kings23:3 Omugabe yaayemerera aha rubaju rw'enyomyo, yaaragaana endagaano omu maisho ga MUKAMA, naaraganisa ku mukuratira, okworobera ebiragiro bye, n'ebi yaahamize, n'ebi yaataireho, n'omutima gwe gwona n'amagara ge goona, kandi n'okuhikiiriza ebigambo by'omuri egyo ndagaano ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo ekyo; n'abantu boona baakwatanisa nawe omuri egyo ndagaano." 
2Kings23:4 Bwanyima omugabe yaaragiira Hilukia omunyamurwa omukuru, n'abanyamurwa abarikukurataho, kandi n'abarinzi b'eirembo, kwiha omu nju ya MUKAMA ebintu byona ebyakoreirwe Baali na Ashera n'eihe ryona ery'omu iguru; yaabyokyeza aheeru ya Yerusaalemu omu kahanga ka Kidirooni, eiju ryabyo yaaritwara Beseeli." 
2Kings23:5 Yaabinga abanyamurwa b'ebishushani ebirikuramibwa ebyatairweho abagabe ba Yuda kuguma nibabyoterera obubaane omu myanya mikuru y'okuramizamu ey'omu ndembo za Yuda n'eyeehinguririize Yerusaalemu; kandi yaabinga n'abandi abaabaire nibooterera Baali obubaane, n'eizooba n'okwezi n'eigana ry'enyonyoozi n'eihe ryona ery'omu iguru." 
2Kings23:6 Kandi yaiha Ashera omu nju ya MUKAMA, yaagitwara aheeru ya Yerusaalemu aha kagyera Kidirooni, yaagyokyezaho, yaagihondahonda, yaagicwa omucuucu, ogwo mucuucu yaagushuka aha bituuro by'abantu b'obutoosha." 
2Kings23:7 Kandi yaasheenya amaju ga baamaraya agaabaire gari omu nju ya MUKAMA, ahu abakazi baabaire barukira enyegamo z'okukingira Ashera." 
2Kings23:8 Yaiha abanyamurwa boona omu ndembo za Yuda, yaashiisha emyanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, ahu abanyamurwa baabaire booterera obubaane, okuruga Geeba okuhika Beeri sheba; yaasheenya zaanyaruju z'emyanya mikuru eyaabaire eri aha irembo ahu orikutaahira nooza omu nju ya Yoshua omukru w'orurembo, emyanya egyo ekaba eri aha rubaju rwa bumosho rw'eryo irembo." 
2Kings23:9 Kwonka abanyamurwa b'emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu tibainamuka ha itambiro rya MUKAMA omuri Yerusaalemu, kureka baaguma nibariira emigaati etatumbisiibwe omuri bagyenzi baabo." 
2Kings23:10 Kandi yaashiisha Tofesi ey'omu ruhanga rwa beene Hinoomu, ngu hatagira omuntu weena owaarabya omutabani nari muhara we omu muriro kumutambira Moleki." 
2Kings23:11 Yaihaho ebishushani by'embaraasi, ebi abagabe ba Yuda baabaire bahongyeire eizooba, ebyabaire biri ahu orikutaahira nooza omu nju ya MUKAMA, haihi n'ekishengye kya Nasani-meleki omukuru w'enju ekyabaire kihereraine na hekalu; yaayotsya n'ebigaari by'eizooba." 
2Kings23:12 Kandi amatambiro agaabaire gari aha mutwe gw'ekishengye kya Ahazi eki abagabe ba Yuda baayombekire, n'amatambiro agu Manaase yaabaire akozire omu bikaari bibiri eby'enju ya MUKAMA, yaagahanantura, yaagatuura ahansi, yaagasheenyagura, omucuucu gwago yaagunaga omu kagyera Kidirooni." 
2Kings23:13 Kandi omugabe yaashiisha emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu eyaabaire eri aha burugwa-izooba bwa Yerusaalemu, aha rubaju rwa buryo rw'akabungo k'eijundiro, ei Sulemaani omugabe wa Israeli yaabaire ayombekyeire Ashitaroosi ekirikunugwa ky'Abasidoni, na Kemoshi ekirikunugwa ky'Abamoabu, na Milikomu ekririkunugwa ky'Abaamoni." 
2Kings23:14 Yaasheenyagura enyomyo, yaatema ebishushani bya Ashera, kandi omu myanya yaabyo yaijuzamu amafuga g'abantu." 
2Kings23:15 Kandi eitambiro rya Beseeli riri na nyaruju ey'omwanya mukuru ebi Yeroboamu mwene Nebati owaassissise Israeli yaabaire ayombekire, yaabikumbagaza, yaayatagura amabaare gaabyo, yaagacwa omucuucu; yaagaruka yaayotsya Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Yosia ku yaahindukire ati, yaareeba ebituuro hangahari aha kabungo; yaatuma, baiha amagufa omuri ebyo bituuro, yaagookyeza aha itambiro, yaarishiisha nk'ekigambo kya MUKAMA eki omushaija wa Ruhanga ori yaarangire naaragura oku kyabaire kiri." 
2Kings23:17 Bwanyima yaagira ati: Kiriya kiijutsyo eki ndikureeba obuseeri n'eky'enki? Abashaija b'omuri orwo rurembo baamugarukamu bati: N'ekituuro ky'omushaija wa Ruhanga owaarugire Yuda, akaragura ahari ebi ebi waakora eri itambiro." 
2Kings23:18 Omugabe yaagira ati: Mumurekye; hatagira owaaziikuura amagufa ge. Batyo baareka amagufa ge hamwe n'aga nabi owaarugire Samaria. 
2Kings23:19 Kandi zaanyaruju zoona ez'omu myanya mikuru y'okuramizamu ey'omu ndembo za Samaria, ezaabaire zombekirwe abagabe ba Israeli nibagwisa kubi MUKAMA, Yosia yaazigira nk'ebi yaagizire nyaruju ya Beseeli byona oku byabaire biri." 
2Kings23:20 Kandi abanyamurwa b'egyo myanya mikuru boona abaabaire bariyo, yaabaitira aha matambiro, yaayokyezaho n'amagufa g'abantu. Bwanyima yaagaruka Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Bwanyima omugabe yaaragiira abantu boona ati: Mukorere MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo ky'endagaano." 
2Kings23:22 Buzimazima okwiha omu biro by'abaramuzi abaabaire bacwera Abaisraeli emanja n'omu biro byona eby'abagabe ba Israeli n'aba Yuda; tihakabahoga bungyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho oburikushusha nk'obwo; 
2Kings23:23 kureka omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Yosia nibwo baakorera MUKAMA obugyenyi obwo omuri Yerusaalemu. 
2Kings23:24 Kandi Yosia yaihaho abarikugambisa emizimu n'abarogi, na baateraafi n'ebishushani ebirikuramibwa n'ebirikunugwa byona ebyashangirwe omuri Yuda na Yerusaalemu, ngu abone kuhikiiriza ebigambo by'Ebiragiro ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo eki Hilukia omunyamurwa yaazoire omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Kings23:25 Omu bagabe boona abaamubandiize tihaine owaashushaine nawe, owaahindukiire MUKAMA n'omutima gwe gwona, n'amagara ge goona, n'amaani ge goona, nk'ebiragiro bya Musa byona oku biri; kandi n'omu baamukuratiire tihaine waashushaine nawe." 
2Kings23:26 N'obu biraabe byabaire biri bityo MUKAMA tarahindukire kureka ekiniga kye kingi, eki yaagiriire Yuda, naabatura byona ebi Manaase yaakozire naamugwisa kubi." 
2Kings23:27 Ekyarugiremu MUKAMA yaagira ati: Ndyaiha Abayuda omu maisho gangye, nk'oku naihiremu Abaisraeli, kandi nyogye oru rurembo Yerusaalemu oru naatooraine, n'enju ei naagizire nti: Nimwo eiziina ryangye ririguma." 
2Kings23:28 Nbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yosia n'ebi yaakozire byona, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda?" 
2Kings23:29 Kandi omu busingye bwe Faraho Neeko omugabe wa Misri akainamuka aha mugyera Furaati kurwanisa omugabe wa Asiria; omugabe Yosia nawe yaaza kumurwanisa. Faraho Neeko ku yaamureebire, yaamwitira Megido." 
2Kings23:30 Abaheereza be baiha omutumbi gwe Megido, baaguta omu kigaari, baagutwara Yerusaalemu, baamuziika omu kituuro kye. Abantu b'omuri egyo sni baatwara Yehoahazi mwene Yosia, baamushukaho amajuta, baamwemeka omu mwanya gwa ishe." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoahazi akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'eshatu, obu yaatandika kutegyeka, yaategyekyera ameezi ashatu omuri Yerusaalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Hamutaali muhara wa Yeremia owa Libuna." 
2Kings23:32 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, nk'ebi baishenkuru baakozire byona." 
2Kings23:33 Bwanyima Faraho Neeko yaamubohera Ribula omu nsi ya Hamasi, ngu arekye kuguma Yerusaalemu aha ngoma, n'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi yaabacwera omutoijo gw'etalanta z'efeeza igana, n'etalanta emwe y'ezaabu." 
2Kings23:34 Faraho Neeko yaagira Eliakimu mwene Yosia omugabe omu mwanya gwa ishe, yaahindura eiziina rye, yaamweta Yehoyakimu; kandi yaihayo Yehoahazi; Yehoahazi ogwo ku yaahikire Misri, yaagwayo." 
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakimu yaaha Faraho ezo feeza n'ezaabu; kwonka yaacwera ensi omushoro, ngu bareete empiiha nk'ekiragiro kya Faraho oku kyabaire kiri. Yaashoroza efeeza n'ezaabu aha bantu b'omuri egyo nsi, buri muntu nk'oku yaabaire acwereirwe, kubiha Faraho Neeko." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakimu akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano, obu yaatandika kutegyeka, yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na gumwe Yerusaalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Zebida muhara wa Pedaaya owa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA nk'ebi baishenkuru baakozire byona. 
2Kings24:1 Omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu, Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni akainamuka, Yehoyakimu yaamwehongyera, yaamara emyaka eshatu ari omwiru we; bwanyima yaamuhinduka, yaamugomera." 
2Kings24:2 MUKAMA yaamwoherereza emtwe y'engabo z'Abakaludaaya, n'ez'Abasiria, n'ez'Abamoabu kandi n'ez'Abaamoni, ngu bateere Yuda bagicwekyereze, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambire naaraba omu bairu be baanabi." 
2Kings24:3 Buzimazima ekyo kikaba ahari Yuda ahabw'ekiragiro kya MUKAMA, ngu abone kubaiha omu maisho ge, naabatura ebibi bya Manaase nk'oku yaabikozire byona," 
2Kings24:4 kandi n'eshagama y'abataine rubanja ei yaaseesire; ahabw'okuba akagiijuza Yerusaalemu, na'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaayanga kubimusaasira." 
2Kings24:5 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yehoyakimu n'ebi yaakozire byona tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda? 
2Kings24:6 Bwanyima Yehoyakimu yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, Yehoyakiini omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings24:7 Kandi omugabe wa Misri taragarukire kuruga mu nsi ye, ahakuba omugabe wa Babulooni akaba akubwire ensi yoona eyaabaire eri ey'omugabe wa Misri, okuruga aha kagyera ka Misri okuhika aha mugyera Furaati." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakiini akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka ikumi na munaana, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu ameezi ashatu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Nehushiita, muhara wa Elinasani owa Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Naawe yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, nk'ebi ishe yaakozire byona." 
2Kings24:10 Omu biro ebyo abashaija ba Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni bakainamuka, baateera Yerusaalemu, baagota orurembo." 
2Kings24:11 Bwanyima Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaijayo, abashaija be bakirugotsire." 
2Kings24:12 Yehoyakiini omugabe wa Yuda yaashohora, yaayehayo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Babulooni, we na nyina n'abagaragwa be n'abanyiginya be, n'abakuru b'ekikaari kye. Ogwo mugabe wa Babulooni omu mwaka gwe gwa munaana nibwo yaakwata Yehoyakiini, akamutwara ari enkwatwa," 
2Kings24:13 kandi yaanyaga eby'obutungi by'omu nju ya MUKAMA byona n'eby'omu nju y'omgabe, yaatematema ebintu by'ezaabu byona eby'omuri hekalu ya MUKAMA, ebi Sulemaani omugabe wa Israeli yaakozire, nk'oku MUKAMA yaabaire agambire." 
2Kings24:14 Kandi yaatwara ab'omuri Yerusaalemu boona bari enkwatwa n'abanyiginya boona, n'amamanzi goona ag'amaani; enkwatwa zoona hamwe n'abanyamyoga boona n'abaheesi zaaba kakumi; tihaagira owaatsigarayo, kureka abantu abarikuhereerukayo omu bworo bonka omuri egyo nsi." 
2Kings24:15 Atyo yaatwara Yehoyakiini Babulooni; na nyin'omugabe n'abakazi be n'abatware be n'abakuru b'ensi ye, yaabaiha Yerusaalemu, yaabatwara Babulooni bari enkwatwa." 
2Kings24:16 Abashaija boona amamanzi enkumi mushanju, abanyamyoga hamwe n'abaheesi rukumi, boona ab'amaani abarikumanya eby'engamba, omugabe wa Babulooni yaabatwara Babulooni bari enkwatwa." 
2Kings24:17 Bwanyima yaata Matania, ishento wa Yehoyakiini, aha ngoma omu mwanya gwe, yaahindura eiziina rye, yaamweta Zedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekia akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi abiri na gumwe, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka ikumi na gumwe. Nyina akaba naayetwa Hamutaali muhara wa Yeremia owa Libuna." 
2Kings24:19 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA nk'ebi Yehoyakiini yaakozire byona oku byabaire biri. 
2Kings24:20 Ahakuba ekiniga kya MUKAMA kikaba kingi munonga ahari Yerusaalemu na Yuda, okuhitsya obu yaababingiire kimwe omu maisho ge. Bwanyima Zedekia yaagomera omugabe wa Babulooni." 
2Kings25:1 Omu mwaka gwa mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Zedekia omu kwezi kwa ikumi aha kiro kyakwo kya ikumi, Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni akaija n'eihe rye ryona kuteera Yerusaalemu, yaagigota; baagyombekaho eby'okugirwanisizaho okugyehinguririza." 
2Kings25:2 Batyo baagota orwo rurembo okuhitsya omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe ogw'omu busingye bwa Zedekia. 
2Kings25:3 Aha kiro kya mwenda omu kwezi kwa kana enjara yaaba nyingi munonga omuri orwo rurembo, abantu baamwo baarura eky'okurya." 
2Kings25:4 Bwanyima Abakaludaaya baafumura orugo rw'orurembo. Ahonaaho omugabe Zedekia n'engabo ze zoona baacwa ekyo kiro, baaraba omu irembo eryabaire riri haihi n'omusiri gw'omugabe ahagati y'engo zaagwo zombi, baatoora ogurikuza Araba. (Obwo Abakaludaaya bagotsire orurembo embaju zoona)." 
2Kings25:5 Kwonka eihe ry'Abakaludaaya ryakurata omugabe, ryamuhikira omu mpita za Yeriko, engabo ze zoona zaamuhungaho, zaataataana." 
2Kings25:6 Batyo baakwata ogwo mugabe, baamureetera omugabe wa Babulooni ahari Ribula, yaamucwera orubanja." 
2Kings25:7 Baitira batabani ba Zedekia ogwo omu maisho ge, bwanyima nawe baamwihamu amaisho, baamukom n'emihama, baamutwara Babulooni." 
2Kings25:8 Omu kwezi kwa kataano aha kiro kya mushanju ky'okwo kwezi, omu mwaka gwa ikumi na mwenda omu busingye bwa Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni, Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi, omushaija w'omugabe wa Babulooni, akaija Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings25:9 Yaayotsya enju ya MUKAMA n'enju y'omugabe n'amaju goona ag'omuri Yerusaalemu; buri nju yoona empango yaagyotsya. 
2Kings25:10 Eihe ryona ey'Abakaludaaya, abaizire n'omukiru w'abarinzi, baasheenya engo z'amabaare ezaabaire zeehinguririize Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings25:11 Bwanyima abantu abaabaire batsigaire omu rurembo, n'abaabaire baimwire omugabe waabo beehongyeire omugabe wa Babulooni, n'abandi bantu b'obutoosha, abo boona Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaabatawara bari enkwatwa." 
2Kings25:12 Kwonka yaatsigamu abantu bamwe abarikuhereerukayo kuba abooro kuguma nibasharira emizaabibu kandi n'ab'okuhinga. 
2Kings25:13 Kandi enyomyo z'emiringa ezaabaire ziri omu nju ya MUKAMA, n'ebitebe by'ebinaabiro n'ekitanka ky'emiringa ebyabaire biri omu nju ya MUKAMA, Abakaludaaya baabisheenyagura, baatwara emiringa yaabyo Babulooni." 
2Kings25:14 Kandi baatwara enyungu n'ebyoma by'okuyooza eiju, na makansi, n'enyabya z'obubaane, n'ebindi bintu bye'miringa byona ebyabaire bikoresibwa omu murimo gwa hekalu," 
2Kings25:15 n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro, n'enyabya. Ebintu ebyabaire bikozire omu zaabu omukuru w'abarinzi yaabitwara biri efeeza." 
2Kings25:16 Enyomyo zombi ziri, n'ekitanka, n'ebitebe ebi Sulemaani yaakoreire enju ya MUKAMA, emiringa y'ebyo bintu byona ekaba erengire ekigyero." 
2Kings25:17 Obwemi bw'enyomyo emwe bukaba buri mikono ikumi na munaana, kandi eriho omutwe gw'emiringa, obwemi bwagwo mikono eshatu; omutwe ogwo gwehinguririziibwe otugoye tw'emiringa otushobeekaine nk'akatimba, n'ebishushani by'ebijuma by'amakomamahanga, byona biri eby'emiringa; kandi enyomyo ya kabiri ekaba eine nk'ebyo, nabyo biriho ekatimba." 
2Kings25:18 Bwanyima ogwo mukuru w'abarinzi yaakwata Seraaya omunyamurwa omukuru, na Zefania orikukurataho, n'abarinzi b'eirembo bonshatu;" 
2Kings25:19 kandi omu rurembo yihamu omutware owaabaire ari omukuru w'engabo, n'abashaija bataano abaabaire bari bamwe aha bashaija empikamugabe abaashangirwe omu rurembo, n'omuhandiiki w'omukuru w'eihe, owaabaire ahuruza engabo z'omuri egyo nsi, n'abashaija makumi mukaaga b'omu bantu b'obutoosha abaashangirew omu rurembo." 
2Kings25:20 Atyo Nebuzaradaani ogwo, omukuru w'abarinzi, yaabakukumba, yaabatwara Ribula aha mugabe wa Babulooni." 
2Kings25:21 Omugabe wa Babulooni yaabateera, yaabaitira Ribula omu nsi ya Hamasi. Okwo nikwo Abayuda baihirwe omu nsi yaabo, bakatwarwa bari enkwatwa." 
2Kings25:22 Kandi abantu abaatsigaire omu nsi ya Yuda, abu Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaatisigiremu, yaataho Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu, mwijukuru wa Shafani, kuba omutegyeki waabo." 
2Kings25:23 Banyima abakuru b'engabo boona hamwe n'engabo zaabo, ku baahuriire ngu omugabe wa Babulooni ataireho Gedalia kuba omutegyeki, baija Mizipa, ahu yaabaire ari n'engabo zaabo; haija Ishimaeli mwene Nesania, Yohanaani mwene Yanihumeesi owa Netofa, na Yazania mutabani w'omushaija wa Maaka." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia yaabarahira n'abashaija baabo naagira ati: Mutatiina abakuru b'Abakaludaaya; mugume omuri egi nsi, mukorere omugabe wa Babulooni, nimwija kuba gye." 
2Kings25:25 Kwonka omu kwezi kwa mushanju Ishimaeli mwene Nesania, mwijukuru wa Elishaama ow'omuryango gw'omugabe, yaija n'abashaija ikumi, baarwanisa Gedalia, baamwita hamwe n'Abayudaaya n'Abakaludaaya, abu yaabaire aine Mizipa." 
2Kings25:26 Ahonaaho abantu boona, abakuru n'abato, na'bo bakuru b'engabo, baimuka, baahungira Misri ahabw'okutiina Abakaludaaya." 
2Kings25:27 Yehoyakiini omugabe wa Yuda ku yaabaire amazire emyaka makumi ashatu na mushanju ari omu bukwatwa, omu kwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri aha kiro kya makumi abiri na mushanju ky'okwo kwezi, omu mwaka ogu Evili-merodaaki omugabe wa Babulooni yaatandikiiremu kutegyeka, yaiha Yehoyakiini omu kihome," 
2Kings25:28 yaagamba gye nawe, yaamuha ekitebe ekirikukira eby'abandi bagabe abaabaire bari hamwe nawe Babulooni." 
2Kings25:29 Atyo Yehoyakiini yaajuura ebijwaro bye'ekihome. Okuruga aho yaaguma naariira aha meeza y'omugabe ebiro bye byona; 
2Kings25:30 kandi eby'okumutunga omugabe yaaguma naabimuha, buri izooba naamuha omugabo gwaryo, ebiro byona ebi yaamazire akihuriire." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu, Seezi, Enosi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Mahalaleeli, Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoka, Mesuseela, Lameka," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Sheemu, Haamu, Yafeesi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Batabani ba Yafeesi: Gomeri, Magogi, Madai, Yavani, Tubali, Mesheki na Tiraasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Batabani ba Gomeri: Ashikenaazi, Difaasi, Toguruma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Batabani ba Yavani: Elisha, Tarushiishi, Kitimu na Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Batabani ba Haamu: Kuushi, Misri, Puuti na Kanaani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Batabani ba Kuushi: Seeba, Havila, Sabuta, Raama, na Sabuteeka. Batabani ba Raama: Sheeba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuushi yaazaara Nimuroodi; yaaba niwe yaabandize kuba ow'amaani rugambwa omu nsi. 
1Chronicles1:11 Misri yaazaara Ludimu, Anamimu, Lehabimu, Nafutuhimu," 
1Chronicles1:12 Patirusimu, Kasiluhimu, ou Abafilistia baakomookireho, na Kafutorimu." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaani yaajigaija Sidoni, bwanyima yaazaara Heesi," 
1Chronicles1:14 kandi yaakomookwamu Abayebusi, Abaamori Abagirugashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 Abahiivi, Abaaruki, Abasiini," 
1Chronicles1:16 Abaarivadi, Abazemari, n'Abahamasi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Batabani ba Sheemu: Elamu, Ashuri, Arufakisaadi, Luudi, Aramu, Uuzi, Huuli, Geseri, na Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arufakisaadi yaazaara Sheela, Sheela yaazaara Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi yaazaara aboojo babiri, omwe akaba naayetwa Pelegi, ahabw'okuba omu biro bye ensi nibwo yaabaganisibwa, kandi eiziina ry'omurumuna akaba ari Yokitaani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitaani yaazaara Alimodaadi, Shelefu, Hazarimaveesi, Yeera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoramu, Uzali, Dikila," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebali, Abimaeli, Sheeba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havila na Yobabu; abo boona bakaba bari batabani ba Yokitaani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Sheemu, Arufakisaadi, Sheela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Pelegi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Nahori, Teera," 
1Chronicles1:27 Abraamu niwe Abarahamu. 
1Chronicles1:28 Batabani ba Abrahamu: Isaaka na Ishimaeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Orunirwo ruzaaro rwabo; omujigaijo gwa Ishimaeli, Nebayoosi, yaakuratwa Kedari, Adubeeli, Mibusaamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishuma, Duuma, Maasa, Hadadi, Teema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi, Nafishi, na Kedema. Abo nibo batabani ba Ishimaeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Batabani ba Ketura, ekinyashunju kya Abarahamu, akazaara Zimuraani, Yokishaani, Medani, Midiani, Ishibaaki na Shua. Batabani ba Yokishaani, Sheeba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Batabani ba Midiani: Eefa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida, na Eludaya, abo boona bakaba bari batabani ba Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahamu yaazaara Isaaka. Batabani ba Isaaka: Esau na Israeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Batabani ba Esau: Elifaazi, Reueli, Yerushi, Yalamu na Koora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Batabani ba Elifaazi: Temani, Omari, Zeefi, Gatamu, Kenazi, Timuna, na Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Batabani ba Reueli: Nahasi, Zeera, Shama na Miiza."
