1Chronicles1:38 Batabani ba Seiri: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Aana, Dishoni, Ezeeri na Dishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Batabani ba Lotani: Hoori, na Homamu; munyaanya wa Lotani akaba ari Timuna." 
1Chronicles1:40 Batabani ba Shobali: Alivani, Manahaasi, Ebali, Sheefi na Onamu. Batabani ba Zibeoni: Aaya na Aana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mutabani wa Aana: Dishoni. Batabani ba Dishoni: Hamuraani, Eshibaani, Isuraani, na Keraani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Batabani ba Ezeeri: Biluhaani, Zaavani, na Yakani. Batabani ba Dishoni: Uuzi na Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Aba nibo bagabe abaategyekire ensi ya Edomu, hatakabaireho mugabe weena ow'okutegyeka Abaisraeli: Beela mwene Beori, ou orurembo rwe rwabaire nirwetwa Dinihaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Beela ku yaafiire, Yobabu mwene Zeera owa Bozira yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu ku yaafiire, Hushamu ow'omu nsi y'Abatemaani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushamu ku yaafiire, Hadadi mwene Bedadi owaasingwire Abamidiani omu nsi ya Moabu yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe; eiziina ry'orurembo rwe rukaba nirwetwa Aviisi." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadadi ku yaafiire, Samula owa Masireka yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samula ku yaafiire, Shauli owa Rehoboosi ey'aha mugyera Furaati yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles1:49 Shauli ku yaafiire, Baali-hanani mwene Akiboori yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baali-hanani ku yaafiire, Hadadi yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe; n'eiziina ry'orurembo rwe rukaba nirwetwa Pai, kandi omukazi we akaba naayetwa Mehetabeeli muhara wa Matireedi, omwijukuru wa Mezahaabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Bwanyima Hadadi yaafa. Abaami ba Edomu bakaba bari aba: Omwami Timuna, Aliva, Yeseti," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Eela, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenazi, Temani, Mibuzaari," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magudieli na Iraamu; abo nibo baabaire bari abaami ba Edomu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Aba nibo batabani ba Israeli: Reubeni, Simeoni, Leevi, Yuda, Isakaari, Zebuluuni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Daani, Yosefu, Benyamiini, Nafutaali, Gaadi na Asheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Batabani ba Yuda: Eeri, Onani, na Sheela; abo bonshatu nibo Batishua Omunyakanaanikazi yaamuzaariire. Kwonka Eeri omujigaijo gwa Yuda akaba ari mubi omu maisho ga MUKA, A, yaamwita." 
1Chronicles2:4 Kandi mukaamwana Tamari nawe yaamuzaarira Pereezi na Zeera. Yuda akaba aine abatabani bataano. 
1Chronicles2:5 Batabani ba Pereezi: Hezirooni na Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Batabani ba Zeera: Zimuri, Esaani, Hemani, Kalukooli na Daara, boona bataano." 
1Chronicles2:7 Mutabani wa Karumi: Akani owaitsire kubi Abaisraeli akacumura omu byabiikiirwe MUKAMA; 
1Chronicles2:8 kandi mwene Esaani akaba ari Azaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Batabani ba Hezirooni abaamuzaariirwe: Yerameeli, Raamu na Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Raamu yaazaara Aminadabu, Aminadabu yaazaara Nahashooni, omukuru omuri beene Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahashooni yaazaara Saluma, Saluma yaazaara Boazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boazi yaazaara Obedi, Obedi yaazaara Yese," 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese yaajigaija Eliabu, yaakuratwa Abinadabu, omwana we owa kashatu yaaba Shimea," 
1Chronicles2:14 owa kana Nesaneeli, owa kataano Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 owa mukaaga Ozeemu, owa mushanju Daudi;" 
1Chronicles2:16 banyaanya baabo ni Zeruiya na Abigaili. Batabani ba Zeruiya: Abishai, Yoabu, na Asaheeli, bashatu." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili yaazaara Amasa, kandi ishe wa Amasa akaba ari Yeseri Omuishimaeli." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mwene Hezirooni akazaara abaan aha mukazi we Azuuba n'ahari Yeriosi; kandi abaana be nibo aba: Yesheri, Shobabu na Aridooni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuuba ku yaafiire, Kalebu yaashwera Efuraata owaamuzaariire Huuri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huuri yaazaara Uuri, na Uuri yaazaara Bezaleeli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Bwanyima Hezirooni, ku yaahikize emyaka makumi mukaaga, yaataasya muhara wa Makiri ishe wa Gileadi, yaaba omukazi we; yaamuzaarira Seegebu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Seegebu yaazaara Yairi, owaabaire naategyeka endembo makumi abiri na ishatu omu nsi ya Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Kwonka Geshuri na Aramu yaanyagaho Havoosi-yairi, na Kenasi n'ebirorero byayo, tauni zoona makumi mukaaga. Abo boona bakaba bari baijukuru ba Makiri ishe wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hezirooni ku yaafiire, Kalebu yaabyama na Efuraata muka Hezirooni ishe, yaamuzaarira Ashihuuri, ishe wa Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Batabani ba Yerameeli omujigaijo gwa Hezirooni: Raamu omujigaijo gwe, Buna, Oreni, Ozemi na Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerameeli akaba aine ondiijo mukazi orikwetwa Atara owaabaire ari nyina wa Onamu. 
1Chronicles2:27 Batabani ba Raamu omujigaijo gwa Yerameeli: Maazi, Yamini na Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Batabani ba Onamu: Shamai: Nadabu na Abishuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Muka Abishuri akaba naayetwa Abihaili; yaamuzaarira Ahibaani na Molidi. 
1Chronicles2:30 Batabani ba Nadabu: Seleedi na Apayimu: Seleedi ogwo yaafa bucwekye. 
1Chronicles2:31 Mutabani wa Apayimu: Iishi. Mutabani wa Iishi: Sheshani. Mutabani wa Sheshani: Ahilai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Batabani ba Yaada murumuna wa Shamai: Yeseri na Yonasaani. Yeseri ogwo yaafa bucwekye. 
1Chronicles2:33 Batabani ba Yonasaani: Pelesi na Zaaza. Abo nibo baijukuru ba Yerameeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Kandi Sheshani akaba atazaire boojo kureka abaishiki bonka; kwonka Sheshani akaba aine omuhuuku Omunyamisri owaabaire naayetwa Yaruha. 
1Chronicles2:35 Atyo Sheshani yaahingira muhara we ogwo muhuuku we Yaruha, yaamuzaarira Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai ogwo yaazaara Nasani, Nasani yaazaara Zabadi." 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi yaazaara Efulaali, Efulaali yaazaara Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi yaazaara Yehu, Yehu yaazaara Azaria." 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaria yaazaara Helezi, Helezi yaazaara Eleasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa yaazaara Sisumai, Sisumai yaazaara Shalumu;" 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalumu yaazaara Yekamia, na Yekamia yaazaara Elishaama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Batabani ba Kalebu murumuna wa Yerameeli: maresha omujigaijo gwe owaazaire Ziifu. Mutabani wa Maresha: Heburooni. 
1Chronicles2:43 Batabani ba Heburooni: Koora, Tapua, Rekemu na Sheema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sheema yaazaara Rahamu, ishe wa Yorikeamu; kandi Rekemu yaazaara Shamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mutabani wa Shamai: Maoni; kandi Maoni yaazaara Besizuuri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Eefa ekinyanshunju kya Kalebu nawe yaazaara Harani, Mooza na Gazezi; kandi Harani yaazaara Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Batabani ba Yahidai: Regemu, Yosamu, Geshani, Peleti, Eefa, na Shaafi." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka ekinyanshunju kya Kalebu yaazaara Sheberi na Tiruhaana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Kandi yaazaara Shaafi ishe wa Madumaana, Sheeva ishe wa Makibeena na ishe wa Gibea; kandi muhara wa Kalebu akaba ari Akisha." 
1Chronicles2:50 Abo nibo baijukuru ba Kalebu. Batabani ba Huuri omujigaijo gwa Efuraata: Shobaali ishe wa Kiryasi-yearimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 Saluma ishe wa Betelehemu, na Harefu ishe wa Besigadeeri." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobaali ishe wa Kiryasi-yearimu akazaara abandi baana b'aboojo, Harowe, ekicweka ky'Abamenuhosi." 
1Chronicles2:53 Emiryango ya Kiryasi-yearimu; aba Isuri, aba Puuti, aba Shumaasi, n'aba Mishura; omuri abo hakakomookamu aba Zoraasi, n'aba Eshitaoli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Batabani ba Saluma: Betelehemu, aba Netoofaasi, Atiroosi-besiyoabu, n'ekicweka ky'aba Manahaasi abarikwetwa aba zoori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Kandi emirayngo y'abahandiiki abaabaire batwire Yabezi: aba Tiraasi, aba Shimeasi n'aba Sukaasi. Abo nibo ba Keeni, abaakomookire ahari Hamasi, ishenkuru w'enju ya Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Aba nibo batabani ba Daudi abaamuzaariirwe ari Heburooni: omujigaijo gwe akaba ari Amunoni, ou yaazaire ahari Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli; owa kabiri ni Danieli ou yaazaire ahari Abigaili owa Karumeeli," 
1Chronicles3:1 Aba nibo batabani ba Daudi abaamuzaariirwe ari Heburooni: omujigaijo gwe akaba ari Amunoni, ou yaazaire ahari Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli; owa kabiri ni Danieli ou yaazaire ahari Abigaili owa Karumeeli," 
1Chronicles3:2 owa kashatu ni Abusalomu, owaazairwe Maaka, muhara wa Talumai omugabe wa Geshuri: owa kana ni Adoniya, owaazairwe Hagisi," 
1Chronicles3:3 owa kataano Shefatia owaazairwe Abitaali, owa mukaaga Itereamu owaazairwe omukazi we Egula;" 
1Chronicles3:4 abo mukaaga bakamuzaarirwa ari Heburooni, ahu yaategyekyeire emyaka mushanju n'ameezi mukaaga. Kandi yaamara endiijo myaka makumi ashatu n'eshatu, naategyekyera Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Kandi aba nibo baamuzaariirwe ari Yerusaalemu: Shimea, Shobabu, Nasani, na Sulemaani, bana abu yaazaire ahari Batishua muhara wa Amieli;" 
1Chronicles3:6 bwanyima yaazaara Ibuhaari, Elishaama, Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Nooga, Nefegi, Yafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishaama, Eliada na Elifeleti, boona mwenda." 
1Chronicles3:9 Abo boona bakaba bari batabani ba Daudi, otabariiremu batabani b'ebinyanshunju bye; kandi munyaanya waabo akaba ari Tamari." 
1Chronicles3:10 Baijukuru ba Sulemaani: Rehoboamu, owaazire Abiya, owaazaire Asa, owaazaire Yehoshafaati," 
1Chronicles3:11 owaazaire Yehoraamu, owaazaire Ahazia, owaazaire Yoasi," 
1Chronicles3:12 owaazaire Amazia, owaazaire Uziya, owaazaire Yosamu," 
1Chronicles3:13 owaazaire Ahazi, owaazaire Hezekia, owaazaire Manaase," 
1Chronicles3:14 owaazaire Amoni, owaazaire Yosia." 
1Chronicles3:15 Batabani ba Yosia: omujigaijo gwe Yohanaani, owa kabiri Yehoyakimu, owa kashatu Zedekia, owa kana Shalumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Baijukuru ba Yehoyakimu, mutabani we Yekonia, ishe wa Zedekia;" 
1Chronicles3:17 batabani ba Yekonia enkwatwa: Shealutieli," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malikiramu, Pedaaya, Shenazaari, Yekamia, Hoshama na Nedabia;" 
1Chronicles3:19 batabani ba Pedaaya: Zerubabeeli na Shimei; batabani ba Zerubabeeli: Meshulaamu na Hanania, kandi Shelomiisi akaba ari munyaanya;" 
1Chronicles3:20 na Hashuba, Oheli, Berekia, Hasadia, na Yushabu-hesedi, boona bataano." 
1Chronicles3:21 Batabani ba Hanania: Pelatia na Yeshaya, owaazaire Refaaya, owaazaire Arunani, owaazaire Obadia, owaazaire Shekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Mutabani wa Shekania: Shemaya. Batabani ba Shemaya, Hatushi, Igali, Baria, Nearia, na Shafati, boona mukaaga." 
1Chronicles3:23 Batabani ba Nearia: Elio-enai, Hizukia, na Azurikaamu, boona bashatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Batabani ba Elio-enai: Hodavia, Eliashibu, Pelaaya, Akubu, Yohanaani, Delaya na Anani, mushanju." 
1Chronicles4:1 Batabani ba Yuda: Perezi, Hezirooni, Karumi, Huuri na Shobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya mwene Shobali akaba ari ishe wa Yahasi, Yahasi yaazaara Ahumai na Lahadi. Abo nibo b'emiryango y'aba Zorasi." 
1Chronicles4:3 Aba nibo batabani ba Etamu: Yezereeli, Ishuma na Ibudashi, munyaanya waabo akaba naayetwa Hazalelipooni," 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueli yaazara Gedori, na Ezeeri yaazaara Husha. Abo nibo batabani ba Huuri omujigaijo gwa Efuraata ishe wa Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashihuri, ishe wa Tekoa akaba aine abakazi babiri, Heela na Naara;" 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara yaamuzaarira Ahuzamu, Heferi, Temeni na Hahashitari. Abo nibo batabani ba Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Batabani ba Heela: Zeresi, Izuhari, na Esinaani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Koozi yaazaara Anubu, Zobeba n'emiryango ya Ahariheli mwene Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabezi akaba ari omuntu orikusiimwa okukira beene ishe; nyina yaamweta Yabezi, naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba nkamuzaarira omu busaasi." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabezi yaashaba Ruhanga wa Israeli naagira ati: Nkaabaasibwa ki, ompa omugisha, oirizayo emyatano yangye, omukono gwawe guguma naanye, ondinda akabi kareka kuunyita. Ruhanga yaamuha eki yaashabire." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubu murumuna wa Shuuha yaazaara Mehiiri, nawe yaazaara Eshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni yaazaara Besiraafa, Pasea na Tehina, ishe wa Irunahashi. Abo n'abashaija ba reeka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Batabani ba Kenazi: Otinyeli na Seraaya; batabani ba Otinyeli: Hatasi na Meonosai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonosai yaazaara Ofura; na Seraaya yaazaara Yoabu, ishe w'aba Gerashi, bakaba nibeetwa eryo iziina ahabw'okuba abanyamyoga." 
1Chronicles4:15 Batabani ba Kalebu mwene Yefune: Iiru, Ela, na naamu; mutabani wa Ela ni Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Batabani ba Yehaleleli: Ziifu, Ziifa, Tiria na Asareeli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Batabani ba Ezira: Yeseri, Meredi, Eferi, na Yalooni. Abo nibo batabani wa Bisia muhara wa Faraho, ou Meredi yaashweire; yaagira enda, yaazaara Miriamu, Shamai na Ishuba ishe wa Eshitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Kandi omukazi we Omuyudaayakazi yaazaara Yeredi ishe Gedori, Heberi ishe wa Sooko na Yekusieli ishe wa Zanoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Batabani ba muka Hodia, munyaanya wa Nahamu, bakazaara Keila owa Garumi na Eshitemoa owa Maakasi." 
1Chronicles4:20 Batabani ba Shimoni: Amunoni, Riina, Benihanani na Tilooni. Batabani ba Iishi: Zohesi na Benizohesi." 
1Chronicles4:21 Batabani ba Sheela mwene Yuda: Eeri ishe wa Leeka, Laada ishe wa Maresha n'ab'emiryango y'enju y'abarikuruka emyenda ya kitaani ahari Betashibea" 
1Chronicles4:22 na Yokimu n'abashaija ba Kozeba, na Yoasi, na Sarafu owaabaire naategyeka Moabu, na Yashubilehemu. Ebyo bihandiiko n'ebya ira munonga." 
1Chronicles4:23 Abo nibo baabaire bari ababumbi, batwire Netaimu na Gedera; bo bakaba batuurayo n'omugabe nibamukorera." 
1Chronicles4:24 Batabani ba Simeoni: Nemueli, Yamini, Yaribu, Seera na Shauli;" 
1Chronicles4:25 kandi Shalumu n'omutabani, na Mibusamu na Mishima." 
1Chronicles4:26 Batabani ba Mishima: omutabani Hamueli, mwene Hamueli ni zakuru, mwene Zakuri ni Shimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Kandi Shimei ogwo akaba aine abaana b'aboojo ikumi na mukaaga n'ab'abaishiki mukaaga; kwonka beene ishe bakaba batazaire baana baingi, kandi oruganda rwabo rwona tirurakanyire nk'orwa Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Bakaba batwire Beeri-sheba, Molada, Hazari-shuali," 
1Chronicles4:29 Biluha, Ezeemu, Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Besueli, Horuma, zikulaagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 Besi-marikaboosi, Hazarasusimu, Besibiri na Sharaimu. Ezo nizo zaabaire ziri endembo zaabo okuhitsya obu Daudi yaagiire aha ngoma." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ebirorero byabo bikaba biri Etamu, Aini, rimona, Tokemu na Ashani, endembo zoona itaano," 
1Chronicles4:33 hamwe n'ebindi birorero byabo ebyabaire byehinguririize ezo ndembo okuhika Baali. Aho niho baabaire batwire, kandi bakaba baine ekitabo ky'okuhandiikamu oruzaaro rwabo." 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobabu, Yamuleki, Yoosha mwene Amazia," 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoeli, Yehu mwene Yoshibia, mwijukuru wa Seraaya mwene Asieli," 
1Chronicles4:36 Elio-enai, Yakoba, Yeshohaaya, Asaaya, Adieli, Yesimieli, Benaaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziiza mwene Shiifi, Shiifi ya Alooni, Alooni ya Yedaaya, Yedaaya ya Shimuri, Shimuri ya Shemaaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Abo abu amaziina gaabo gagambwa bakaba bari bakuru omu miryango yaabo, kandi amaju ga baishenkurubo gakakanya munonga." 
1Chronicles4:39 Baaza ahu orikutaahira nooza Gedori, aha bukiizi bw'oburugwa-izooba bw'oruhita, kutatira amasyo basbo obunyaatsi," 
1Chronicles4:40 baashangayo amariisizo marungi g'obunyaatsi, kandi ensi yaayo ekaba eri mpango munonga, eine obusingye, etuurize; ahabw'okuba abatuuzi baayo aba ira bakaba bari baijukuru ba Haamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Kandi aba, abu amaziina gaabo gahandiikirwe, bakija omu busingywe bwa Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda, baateera amahema g'aba Haamu, n'ag'aba Meuniimu abu baashangireyo, baabacwekyerereza kimwe, baahwaho, tibaagaruka kwimutsya mutwe n'okuhitsya hati, baakubuura ensi yaabo, ahabw'okuba hakaba hariyo amariisizo g'amasyo gaabo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Kandi abamwe aharibo, beene Simeoni, abashaija magana ataano baaza omu bibungo bya Seiri, baine abeebembezi baabo Pelatia, Nearia, Refaaya na Uzieli beene Iishi;" 
1Chronicles4:43 baacwekyereza ekicweka ky'Abaameleki ekyabaire kihonokireho, baatuurayo okuruga obwo n'okuhitsya hati." 
1Chronicles5:1 Beene Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Israeli: (ahakuba niwe yaabaire ari omujigaijo, kwonka ahabw'okuhagara ekitabo kya ishe, yaayakwa obukuru bwe, bwaheebwa beene Yosefu mutabani wa Israeli; n'ahabw'ekyo omu kukuratana kw'amaziina tarahandiikirwe omu mwanya gw'obukuru," 
1Chronicles5:2 kureka Yuda niwe yaakirize beene ishe amaani, kandi niwe yaakomookirwemu omutegyeki; kwonka obukuru bw'okuba omwana w'omujigaijo bwaguma buri obwa Yosefu.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Batabani ba Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Israeli: Hanoki, Palu, Hezirooni na Karumi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Batabani ba Yoeli: mutabani we ni Shemaaya, mwene Shemaaya ni Googi, mwene Googi ni Shimei," 
1Chronicles5:5 mwene Shimei ni Niika, mwene Milka ni reaya, mwene Reaya ni Baali;" 
1Chronicles5:6 mwene Baali ni Beera; ogwo niwe Tigulaasi-pileseeri omugabe wa Asiria yaatwaire omu bukwatwa, kandi niwe yaabaire ari mukuru omu Bareubeeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Beene waabo bakahandiikwa omu miryango yaabo, nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo oku kwabaire kuri; omukuru Yeyeli; na Zekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 na Beela, mwene Azazi mwijukuru wa Sheema mwene Yoeli owaabaire atwire Aroeri okuhika Neebo na Baali-meoni;" 
1Chronicles5:9 kandi akatuura aha bukiizi bw'oburugwa-izooba, ahu orikutaahira nooza omu ihamba seenu y'omugyera Furaati, ahakuba amatungo gaabo gakaba gakanyire omu nsi ya Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Bwanyima omu busingye bwa Saulo baarwana n'aba Hagari, baabaita; batyo baatuura omu mahema gaabo omu byanga byona eby'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Beene Gaadi baatuura obuseeri bwabo omu nsi ya Bashani okuhika Saleka; 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoeli niwe yaabaire ari mukur, orikukurataho ari Shafamu, n'abandi Yanai na Shafati omuri Bashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Na beene waabo nk'amaju ga baishenkurubo oku gaabaire gari: Mikaeli, Meshulaamu, Sheeba, Yorai, Yakani, zia na Eberi, boona mushanju." 
1Chronicles5:14 Aba nibo batabani ba Abihaili mwene Huuri, mwijukuru wa Yaroa, mwene Gileadi, Gileadi ya Mikaeli, Mikaeli ya Yeshishai, Yeshishai ya Yahudo, na Yahudo ya Buuzi:" 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mwene Abudieli, mwijukuru wa Guuni, niwe yaabaire ari mukuru omu maju ga baishenkurubo." 
1Chronicles5:16 abo bakaba batwire Gileadi n'omuri Bashani n'omu ndembo zaayo, kandi n'omu mariisizo goona ag'omuri Sharooni okuhika ahu garikugarukira." 
1Chronicles5:17 Abo boona bakahandiikwa omu busingye bwa Yosamu omugabe wa Yuda, n'omu bwa Yeroboamu omugabe wa Israeli, nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo oku kwabaire kuri." 
1Chronicles5:18 Abareubeeni n'Abagaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase bakaba baine abashaija amamanzi, abaabaire bahagatira engabo na zaarurara, nibamanya kurwanisa amata, abarwani rukungwa, boona bari obukumi buna n'enkumi ina na magana mushanju na makumi mukaaga, abeeteekateekire kuhurura." 
1Chronicles5:19 Baateera aba Hagari, aba Yeturi, aba Nafishi n'aba Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ku baabaire nibakirwana nabo, baakwerwa, aba Hagari na boona abu baabaire baine baaheebwayo omu mikono yaabo, ahakuba bakatakira Ruhanga omuri orwo rugamba, yaahurira okweshengyereza kwabo, ahabw'okuba bakamwesiga." 
1Chronicles5:21 Baanyaga amatungo gaabo, engamira obukumi butaano, entaama obusiriira bubiri n'obukumi butaano, n'endogoya enkumi ibiri, kandi n'abashaija akasiriira abaakwatsirwe;" 
1Chronicles5:22 ahakuba baingi bakaitwa, ahabw'okuba orwo rugamba rukaba rurugire ahari Ruhanga. Bwanyima baatuura omu nsi ya bari, okuhitsya obu baatwairwe omu bukwatwa." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ab'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase baatuura omuri egyo nsi, bari baingi munonga, okuruga Bashani okuhika Baali-herumooni, na Seniiri n'orushozi Herumooni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Kandi aba nibo baabaire bari bakuru omu maju ga baishenkurubo: Eferi, Iishi, Elieli, Azurieli, Yeremia, Hodavia na Yahudieli, abarwani b'amaani, abashaija rugambwa, abaabaire bari bakuru omu maju ga baishenkurubo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Kwonka bakacumura ahari Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo, baakuratira baaruhanga b'amahanga g'omuri egyo nsi nk'abarikuraaya, agu Ruhanga yaabacwekyerereize omumaisho." 
1Chronicles5:26 N'ahabw'ekyo Ruhanga wa Israeli yaimutsya Puuli omugabe wa Asiria na Tigulaasi-pileseeri omugabe wa Asiria, yaatwara Abareubeeni, Abagaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase bari enkwatwa, yaabata Haala, Habora, Haara n'aha mugyera ogw'omuri Gozani, baagumayo n'okuhitsya hati." 
1Chronicles6:1 Batabani ba Leevi: Gereshoni, Kohasi na Meraei." 
1Chronicles6:2 Batabani ba Kohasi: Amuraamu, Izuhaari, Heburooni na Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Abaana ba amuraamu: Arooni, Musa na Miriamu. Batabani ba Arooni: Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazaari na Itamaari." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazaari yaazaara Finehaasi, Finehaasi yaazaara Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua yaazaara Buuki, Buuki yaazaara Uuzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uuzi yaazaara Zerahia, Zerahia yaazaara Merayoosi," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayoosi yaazaara Amaria, Amaria yaazaara Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubu yaazaara Zadoki, zadoki yaazaara Ahimaazi," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazi yaazaara Azaria, Azaria yaazaara Yohanaani," 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanaani yaazaara Azaria, (ogwo niwe yaabaire akora omurimo gw'obunyamurwa omu nju ei Sulemaani yaayombekire Yerusaalemu)." 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaria yaazaara, Amaria, Amaria yaazaara Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubu yaazaara Zadoki, Zadoki yaazaara Shalumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalumu yaazaara Hilukia, Hilukia yaazaara Azaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaria yaazaara Seraaya, Seraaya yaazaara Yehozadaki," 
1Chronicles6:15 owaatwairwe omu bukwatwa, obu MUKAMA yaimutsya Nebukadeneeza, akatwara Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu omu bukwatwa." 
1Chronicles6:16 Batabani ba Leevi: Gereshoni, Kohasi na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Kandi aga nigo maziina ga batabani ba Gereshoni: Libuni na Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Batabani ba Kohasi: Amuraamu, Isuhaari, Heburooni na Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Batabani ba Merari: Mahili na Muushi. Egi niyo miryango y'Abaleevi nk'oku baishenkuru baabaire bari. 
1Chronicles6:20 Aba Gereshoni: omutabani ni Libuni, mwene Libuni ni Yahasi, mwene Yahasi ni Ziima," 
1Chronicles6:21 mwene Ziima ni Yoa, mwene Yoa ni Iido, mwene Iido ni zeera, mwene Zeera ni Yeaserai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Batabani ba Kohasi: omutabani ni Aminadabu, mwene Aminadabu ni Koora, mwene Koora ni Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:23 mwene Asiri ni Elukaana, mwene Elukaana ni Ebiasaafu, mwene Ebiasaafu ni Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:24 mwene Ariri ni Tahasi, mwene Tahasi ni Urieli, mwene Urieli ni Uziya, mwene Uziya ni Shauli." 
1Chronicles6:25 Batabani ba Elukaana: Amasai na Ahimoosi," 
1Chronicles6:26 omutabani ni Elukaana, mwene Elukaana ni Zofai, mwene Zofai ni Nahasi," 
1Chronicles6:27 mwene Nahasi ni Eliabu, mwene Eliabu ni Yerohaamu, mwene Yerohaamu ni Elukaana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Batabani ba Samueli: omujigaijo gwe ni Yoeli, n'omushubiro ni Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Batabani ba Merari: Mahili, mwene Mahili ni Libuni, mwene Libuni ni Shimei, mwene Shimei ni Uuza," 
1Chronicles6:30 mwene Uuza ni Shimea, mwene Shimea ni Hagia, mwene Hagia ni Asaaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Abo nibo Daudi yaakwatsize omurimo gw'okweshongora omu nju ya MUKAMA, eshanduukye eherize kuza hamwe;" 
1Chronicles6:32 baaguma nibeeshongora omu maisho g'Obutaaho bw'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu omu kuheereza kwabo, okuhitsya obu Sulemaani yaaherize kwombeka enju ya MUKAMA omuri Yerusaalemu; kandi baakora omurimo gwabo, nk'oku embu zaabo zaabaire ziri." 
1Chronicles6:33 Aba nibo baabaire baheereza hamwe na batabani baabo. Omuri beene Kohasi: Hemani omweshongozi mwne Yoeli, Yoeli ya Samueli," 
1Chronicles6:34 Samueli ya Elukaana, Elukaana ya Yerohaamu, Yerohaamu ya Elieli, Elieli ya Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 Toa ya Zuufi, Zuufi ya Elukaana, Elukaana ya Mahasi, Mahasi ya Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasai ya Elukaana, Elukaana ya Yoeli, Yoeli ya Azaria, Azaria ya Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 Zefania ya Tahasi, Tahasi ya Asiri, Asiri ya Ebiasaafu, Ebiasaafu ya Koora," 
1Chronicles6:38 Koora ya Izuhaari, Izuhaari ya Kohasi, mwene Leevi, omwana wa Israeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Murumuna wa Hemani ni Asafu owaabaire ayemerera aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo, niwe Asafu mwene Berekia, Berekia mwene Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 Shimea ya Mikaeli, Mikaeli ya Baseya, Baseyaya Malikiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 Malikiya ya Esuni, Esuni ya Zeera, Zeera ya Adaaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 Adaaya ya Esaani, Esaani ya Ziima, Ziima ya Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 Shimei ya Yahasi, Yahasi mwene Gereshoni, omwana wa Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Aha rubaju rwabo rwa bumosho hakaba hariho beene waabo batabani ba Merari: Esaani mwene Kiishi, Kiishi ya Abudi, Abudi ya Maluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 Maluki ya Hashabia, Hashabia ya Amazia, Amazia ya Hilukia," 
1Chronicles6:46 Hilukia ya Amuzi, amuzi ya Baani, Baani ya Shemeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 Shemeri ya Mahili, Mahili ya Muushi mwene Merari, omwana wa Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Kandi beene waabo Abaleevi bakateebwaho kukora omurimo gwona ogw'omu Butaaho bw'enju ya Ruhanga. 
1Chronicles6:49 Kwonka Arooni n'abatabani bakaba batambira ebitambo aha itambiro ry'ebitambo by'okwotsya, n'aha itambiro ry'okwotereraho obubaane ahabw'omurimo gwona ogw'Aharikwera munonga, okurihiirira Abaisraeli, nk'ebi Musa omwiru wa Ruhanga yaaragiire byona oku byabaire biri." 
1Chronicles6:50 Abo nibo batabani ba Arooni: Eleazaari omutabani, mwene eleazaari ni Finehaasi, mwene Finehaasi ni Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:51 mwene Abishua ni Buuki, mwene Buuki ni Uuzi, mwene Uuzi ni Zerahia," 
1Chronicles6:52 mwene Zerahia ni Merayosi, mwene Merayoosi na Amaria, mwene Amaria ni Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:53 mwene Ahitubu ni Zadoki, mwene Zadoki ni Ahimaazi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Kandi ebi nibyo bibanja byabo ebi baabaire batwiremu, nk'oku baabahaire ah'okutuura omu nsi yaabo yoona; beene Arooni ab'omu miryango y'aba Kohasi, ahabw'okuba omugabo gw'okubanza gukaba guri ogwabo." 
1Chronicles6:55 bakabaha Heburooni omu ishaza rya Yuda n'amariisizo gaayo agaagyehinguririize," 
1Chronicles6:56 kwonka emisiri y'orurembo n'ebirorero byarwo baabiha Kalebu mwene Yefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Beene Arooni abandi baabaha endembo ez'okuhungiramu- Heburooni, Libuna n'amariisizo gaayo, Yatiri, Eshitemoa n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hileeni n'amariisizo gaayo, Debira n'amarisiizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashani n'amariisizo gaayo, na Beti-shemeshi n'amariisizo gaayo;" 
1Chronicles6:60 kandi omu z'oruganda rwa Benyamiini baabaha Geeba n'amariisizo gaayo, Alemeesi n'amariisizo gaayo, na Anatoosi n'amariisizo gaayo. Endembo zaabo zoona ezi baabagaine omu miryango yaabo yoona zaaba ikumi na ishatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Beene Kohasi abandi baaheebwa omugabo gw'endembo ikumi omu kicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase. 
1Chronicles6:62 Beene Gereshoni, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri, baaheebwa endembo ikumi na ishatu omu ruganda rwa Isakaari, orwa Asheri, orwa Nafutaali n'orwa Manaase omuri Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Beene Merari nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri baabaha endembo ikumi na ibiri omu ruganda rwa Reubeeni, orwa Gaadi, n'orwa zebuluuni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Batyo Abaisraeli baaha Abaleevi ezo ndembo n'amariisizo gaazo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Kandi baagaruka baabahaisa enteenyu ezo ndembo ezaagambwaho ez'omu ruganda rwa Yuda, orwa Simeoni n'orwa Benyamiini." 
1Chronicles6:66 Kandi bamwe ab'omu miryango y'aba Kohasi bakaba baine endembo omu ruganda rwa Efuraimu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Baaheebwa n'endembo z'okuhungiramu- Shekemu ey'omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu n'amariisizo gaayo, Gezeri n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokimeamu n'amariisizo gaayo, Besihoroni n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:69 Ayalooni n'amariisizo gaayo, na Gaasi-rimoni n'amariisizo gaayo;" 
1Chronicles6:70 kandi omu kicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase Aneri n'amariisizo gaayo, na Bileamu n'amariisizo gaayo ahabw'emiryango y'aba Kohasi eyaatsigaireho." 
1Chronicles6:71 Beene Gereshoni baaheebwa endembo omu kicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase- Golani ey'omuri Bashani n'amariisizo gaayo, Ashitaroosi n'amariisizo gaayo;" 
1Chronicles6:72 omu ruganda rwa Isakaari- Kedeshi n'amariisizo gaayo, Daberaasi n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramosi n'amariisizo gaayo, na Anemu n'amariisizo gaayo;" 
1Chronicles6:74 omu ruganda rwa Asheri–Mashari n'amariisizo gaayo, Abudooni n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukoki n'amariisizo gaayo, na Rehobu n'amariisizo gaayo;" 
1Chronicles6:76 omu ruganda rwa Nafutaali- Kedeshi ey'omuri Galilaaya n'amariisizo gaayo, na kiryasaimu n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Beene Merari abandi baaheebwa omu ruganda rwa Zebuluuni rimono n'amariisizo gaayo, Tabori n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:78 na seeri ya Yorudani ahari Yeriko, aha rubaju rwayo rw'oburugwa-izooba omu ruganda rwa Reubeeni, Bezeeri ey'omu ihamba n'amariisizo gaayo, Yahuza n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemoosi n'amariisizo gaayo na Mefaasi n'amariisizo gaayo; 
1Chronicles6:80 kandi omu ruganda rwa Gaadi Ramosi ey'omuri Gileadi n'amariisizo gaayo, Mahanaimu n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:81 Heshibooni n'amariisizo gaayo, na Yazeri n'amarisiizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles7:1 Batabani ba Isakaari: Toola, Pua, Yashubu, na Shimirooni, boona bana." 
1Chronicles7:2 Batabani ba Toola: Uuzi, Refaaya, Yerieli, Yahumai, Ibusaamu na Shemueli, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, nibo beene Toola, abaabaire bari abarwani b'amaani omu biro byabo; omu busingye bwa Daudi omubaro gwabo bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri na magana mukaaga." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mutabani wa Uuzi: Izurahia. Batabani ba Izurahia: Mikaeli, Obadia, Yoeli na Ishia, boona bataano bakaba bari abantu bakuru;" 
1Chronicles7:4 kandi omuribo, nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rw'amaju ga baishenkurubo oku kwabaire kuri, hakaba harimu emitwe y'engabo z'okuza aha rugamba obukumi bushantu n'enkumi mukaaga, ahabw'okuba bakaba baine abakazi baingi n'abaana b'aboojo baingi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Kandi beene waabo ab'omu miryango yoona y'Abaisakaari bakaba bari abarwani obukumi munaana n'enkumi mushanju, nk'oku baahandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'okuzaarwa kwabo." 
1Chronicles7:6 Batabani ba Benyamiini: Beela, Bekeri na Yedieli, bashatu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Batabani ba Beela: Ezibooni, Uuzi, Uzieli, Yerimoosi na Iiri, bataano, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, kandi abarwani b'amaani; bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri na makumi mukaaga na bana, nk'oku baahandiikirwe omu kukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo." 
1Chronicles7:8 Batabani ba Bekeri; Zemira, Yoasi, Eliezeeri, Elio-enai, Omuri, Yeremoosi, Abiya, Anatoosi na Alemeesi." 
1Chronicles7:9 Abo boona bakaba bari beene Bekeeri; omu kubarwa kw'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rw'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo nk'oku kwabaire kuri, bakaba bari abarwani b'amaani obukumi bubiri na magana abiri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Mutabani wa Yedieli: Biluhaani: Yeushi, Benyamiini, Ehudi, Kenaana, Zesaani, Tarushiishi na Ahishahaari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Abo boona bakaba bari beene Yedieli; omu kubarwa kw'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo abashaija abarwani b'amaani baaba kakumi n'enkumi mushanju na magana abiri, abeeteekateekire kuza aha rugamba." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shupimu na Hupimu beene Iiri, Hushimu mwene Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Batabani ba Nafutaali: Yahazieli, Guuni, Yezeri na Shalumu, ab'oruzaaro rwa Biluha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Batabani ba Manaase: Asirieli owaazairwe ekinyanshunju Omunyaaramu; kandi niwe yaazaire Makiri ishe wa Gileadi. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri yaashwererera Hupimu na Shupimu. Munyaanya akaba naayetwa Zelofehaadi; kandi Zelofehaadi ogwo akazaara abaishiki bonka. 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka muka Makiri yaazaara omwana w'omwojo, yaamweta Pereshi; n'omurumuna akaba naayetwa Shereshi; batabani be baaba Ulamu na Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Mutabani wa Ulamu: Bedani. Abo nibo baabaire bari beene Gileadi mwene Makiri, mwijukuru wa Manaase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Hamolekesi munyaanya yaazaara Ishihoodi, Abiezeeri na Mahula." 
1Chronicles7:19 Batabani ba Shemida bakaba bari Ahiani, Shekemu, Likuhi na Aniamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Batabani ba Efuraimu: Shuseela, mwene Shuseela ni Beredi, mwne Beredi ni Tahasi, mwene Tahasi ni Eleada, mwene Eleada ni Tahasi," 
1Chronicles7:21 mwene Tahasi ni zabadi, mwene Zabadi ni Shuseela, kandi na Ezeri na Eleada abaitsirwe abashaija ba Gaasi abazaariirwe omuri egyo nsi, ahabw'okuba bakashuumayo kunyaga ente zaabo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Bwanyima Efuraimu ishebo yaamara ebiro bingi naabacurira, beene ishe baija kumugumya." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Efuraimu yaabyama n'omukazi we, omukazi yaagira enda, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo, yaamweta Beria, ahakuba enju ye ekaguubwaho akabi." 
1Chronicles7:24 Muhara we akaba naayetwa Sheera owaayombekire Besi-horoni zombi, eya ifo n'eya uguru, na Uzene-sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Mutabani we ni Reefa, mwene Reefa ni Reshefu, mwene Reshefu ni Teela, mwene Teela ni Tahani," 
1Chronicles7:26 mwene Tahani ni Ladani, mwene Ladani ni Amihuudi, mwene Amihuudi ni Elishaama," 
1Chronicles7:27 mwene Elishaama ni Nuuni, mwene Nuuni ni Yoshua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Kandi ebibanja byabo n'ebi baabaire batungire bikaba biri Beseeli n'omu ndembo zaayo, aha bukiizi bw'oburugwa-izooba Narani, aha burengyerwa-izooba Gezeri n'endembo zaayo, Shekemu n'endembo zaayo na Aaza n'endembo zaayo;" 
1Chronicles7:29 kandi n'aha myatano y'Abamanaase Besi-sheani n'endembo zaayo, Tanaki n'endembo zaayo na Doori n'endembo zaayo. Omuri ezo ndembo beene Yosefu mwene Israeli nimwo baabaire batwire." 
1Chronicles7:30 Batabani ba Ashera: Imuna, Ishuva, Ishuvi, Beria na munyaanya waabo Seera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Batabani ba Beria: Heberi na Malikieli owaabaire ari ishe wa Biruzaisi. 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi yaazaara Yafuleeti, Shomeri, Hosamu na munyaanya waabo Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Batabani ba Yafuleeti Pasaki, Bimuhaali na Ashuvaati. Abo nibo beene Yafuleeti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Batabani ba Shemeri omurumuna: Rohuga, Yehuba, na Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Batabani ba Helemu omurumuna: Zoofa, Imuna, Sheleshi na Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Batabani ba Zoofa: Sia, Harunefeeri, Shuali, Beeri, Imura," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezeeri, Hoodi, Shama, Shilusha, Ituraani na Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Batabani ba Yeseri: Yefune, Pisupa na Araa." 
1Chronicles7:39 Batabani ba Uula: Aara, Hanieli na Rizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Abo boona bakaba bari beene Asheri, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, abashaija abarikusiimwa, abarwani b'amaani, abakuru b'abategyeki. Kandi omubaro ogw'abahandiikirwe kuza aha rugamba, nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo oku kwabaire kuri, gukaba guri obukumi bubiri n'enkumi mukaaga." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamiini yaajigaija Beela, yaakuratsaho Ashubeeli, owa kashatu yaaba Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 owa kana yaaba Nooha n'owa kataano yaaba Raafa. 
1Chronicles8:3 Beela nawe yaazaara abaana b'aboojo: Adari, Geera, Abihuudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishua, Naamani, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Geera, Shefufaani na Huraamu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Kandi aba nibo batabani ba Ehudi, (nibo babaire bari abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'abatuuzi ba Geeba, abaatwairwe omu bukwatwa, bakabata Manahaasi)" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, Ahiya na Geera, niwe Hegulaamu, ishe wa Uuza na Ahihuudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaimu, ku yaaherize kushenda abakazi be Hushimu na Baara, yaazaarira abaana b'aboojo omu nsi ya Moabu." 
1Chronicles8:9 Yaazaara aha mukazi we Hodeshi abatabani, Yobabu, Zibia, Mesha, Malukaamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yeusi, Sakia na Miruma. Abo nibo batabani abaabaire bari abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo." 
1Chronicles8:11 Kandi Hushimu abaana b'aboojo Ahitubu na Elipaali," 
1Chronicles8:12 Batabani ba Elipaali: Eberi, Mishamu, Shemedi owaayombekire Ono na Loodi n'endembo zaayo;" 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria na Sheema abaabaire bari abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo b'abatuuzi ba Ayalooni, abaagingire abatuuzi ba Gaasi," 
1Chronicles8:14 Ahio, Shashaki na Yeremoosi." 
1Chronicles8:15 Batabani ba Beria: Zebadia, Aradi, Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaeli, Ishupa na Yooha." 
1Chronicles8:17 Batabani ba Elipaali: Zebedia, Meshulaamu, Hizuki, Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishimerai, Izulia na Yobabu." 
1Chronicles8:19 Batabani ba Shimei: Yahimu, Zikuri, Zabudi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, zilesai, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya, Beraaya na Shimuraasi." 
1Chronicles8:22 Batabani ba Shashaki: Ishupaani, Eberi, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abudooni, Zikuru, Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania, Elamu, Antosiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifodwa na Penueli. 
1Chronicles8:26 Batabani ba Yerohaamu: Shamusherai, Sheharia, Atalia," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yareshia, Eliya na zikuri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Abo nibo baabaire bari abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, nk'oku kuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo oku kwabaire kuri, abantu bakuru. Abo bakaba batwire Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 Yeyeli ishe wa Gibeoni akaba atwire Gibeoni, omukazi we akaba naayetwa Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 Omwana we w'omujigaijo akaba ari Abudooni, naakuratwa Zuuri, Kiishi, Baali, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori, Ahio, Zekeri" 
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikuloosi owaazaire Shimea. Abo nabo bakaba batwire na beene waabo omuri Yerusaalemu nibareebana. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neeri yaazaara Kiishi, Kiishi yaazaara Saulo, Saulo yaazaara Yonasaani, Malikishua, Abinadabu na Eshibaali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yonasaani yaazaara Meribubaali, Meribu-baali yaazaara Miika." 
1Chronicles8:35 Batabani ba Miika: Pisoni, Meleki, Tarea na Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi yaazaara Yehoada, Yehoada yaazaara Alemeesi, Azimaveesi na Zimuri, Zimuri yaazaara Mooza," 
1Chronicles8:37 Mooza yaazaara Binea; mwene Binea ni Raafa, mwene Raafa ni Eleasa, mwene Eleasa ni Azeeli." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeeli akaba aine aboojo mukaaga, n'amaziina gaabo nigo aga, Azurikaamu, Bokeru, Ishimaeli, Shearia, Obadia na Hanani. Abo boona ni beene Azeeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Beene Esheki omurumuna: Ulaamu omujigaijo gwe, omushubiro Yeushi, n'owa kashatu Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles8:40 Beene Ulaamu bakaba bari abarwani b'amaani, enkwata-mata, kandi bakaba baine abatabani n'abaijukuru baingi, omubaro gwabo guri igana na makumi ataano. Abo boona bakaba bari Ababenyamiini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Batyo Abaisraeli boona bakabarwa nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo oku kwabaire kuri; kandi bahandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Israeli. Bwanyima Abayuda baatwarwa Babulooni omu bukwatwa ahabw'ebicumuro byabo. 
1Chronicles9:2 Abaabandize kugaruka kutuura omu buhunguzi bwabo n'omu ndembo zaabo bakaba bari Abaisraeli, abanyamurwa, Abaleevi n'abaheereza b'omuri hekalu." 
1Chronicles9:3 Kandi bamwe aha Bayuda, Ababenyamiini, Abaefuraimu n'Abamanaase bakatuura omuri Yerusaalemu;" 
1Chronicles9:4 Usai mwene Amihuudi, Amihuudi ya Omuri, Omuri ya Baani, ab'omuri beene Pereezi mwene Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 N'aba Shiilo: omujigaijo gwe ni Asaaya n'abatabani. 
1Chronicles9:6 Ab'omuri batabani ba Zeera: Yeuli na beene waabo magana mukaaga na makumi mwenda. 
1Chronicles9:7 Ab'omuri beene Benyamiini: Saalu mwene Meshulaamu ya Hodavia, Hodavia ya Hasenua," 
1Chronicles9:8 na Ibunea mwene Yerohaamu, na Eela mwene Uuzi ya Makiri, na Meshulaamu mwene Shefatia ya Reuli mwene Ibunia;" 
1Chronicles9:9 na beene waabo nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo oku kwabaire kuri, bakaba bari magana mwenda na makumi ataano na mukaaga. Abo boona bakaba bari abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, nk'oku gaabaire gari." 
1Chronicles9:10 Ab'omu banyamurwa: Yedaaya, Yehoyaribu, Yakiini." 
1Chronicles9:11 Azaria mwene Hilukia ya Meshulaamu, Meshulaamu ya Zadoki, Zadoki ya Merayosi, Merayosi ya Ahitubu, omukuru w'enju ya Ruhanga;" 
1Chronicles9:12 na Adaaya mwene Yerohaamu, Yerohaamu ya Pashihuuri, Pashihuuri ya Malikia; na Masai mwene Adieli ya Yahuzeera, Yahuzeera ya Meshulaamu, Meshulaamu ya Mehsilemiisi mwene Imeri," 
1Chronicles9:13 otabariiremu beene waabo, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, rukumi na magana mushanju na makumi mukaaga, abashaija abarikubaasiza kimwe kukora omurimo gw'enju ya Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ab'omu Baleevi: Shemaaya mwene Hashubu ya Azurikaamu, Azurikaamu ya Hashabia ab'omuri beene Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 na Bakubakari, Hereshi, Galali, na Matania mwene Miika ya zikuri mwene Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 na Obadia mwene Shemaaya ya Galali, Galali ya Yedusiini, Yedusuuni ya Berekia, Berekia ya Aasa mwene Elukaana abaabaire batwire omu birorero by'aba Netofaasi." 
1Chronicles9:17 Abakumiirizi b'amarembo: Shalumu, Akubu, Talumooni, Ahimaanu na beene waabo, (kandi Shalumu niwe yaabaire ari mukuru)" 
1Chronicles9:18 abaabaire batuura aha irembo ry'omugabe ery'aha buziizi bw'oburugwa-izooba n'okuhitsya hati. Kandi abo nibo baabaire bari abakumiirizi b'eirembo ry'orusiisira rw'Abaleevi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalumu mwene Koore ya Eliasafu mwene Koora na beene waabo ab'enju ya ishenkuru, aba Koora, nibo baabaire bakwatsiibwe omurimo gw'okuheereza, nigwo gw'okurinda omuryango gw'Eihema, nka baishenkurubo oku baabaire bakwatsiibwe orusiisira rwa MUKAMA nibarinda eirembo ryarwo." 
1Chronicles9:20 Na Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari niwe yaabaire naabategyeka omu bya ira; kandi MUKAMA akaba ari hamwe nawe. 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekaria mwene Meshelemia niwe yaabaire ari omukumiirizi aha irembo ry'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu. 
1Chronicles9:22 Abo boona abaatoorainwe kuba abakumiirizi b'amarembo bakaba bari magana abiri na ikumi na babiri. Kandi bakaba bahandiikirwe omu birorero byabo, nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo oku kwabaire kuri. Abo nibo Daudi na Samueli omuhanuuzi baahamize omu murimo gwabo ogw'obwesigwa." 
1Chronicles9:23 N'ahabw'ekyo bo na batabani baabo baakwatsibwa omurimo gw'okurinda amarembo g'enju ya MUKAMA, niyo nju y'Eihema." 
1Chronicles9:24 Abo bakumiirizi baaguma nibaza aha mbaju zaayo ina, orw'oburugwa-izooba, orw'oburengyerwa-izooba, orw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'obwa-buryo;" 
1Chronicles9:25 kandi beene waabo ab'omu birorero byabo bakaba nibaragiirwa kwija buri biro mushanju kuguma nabo; 
1Chronicles9:26 ahabw'okuba abo bakumiirizi bakuru bana, abaabaire bari Abaleevi, bakaba baguma aha murimo gwabo batarikwihwa; kandi nibo baabaire bakwatsiibwe ebishengye n'amabiikoro eby'omu nju ya Ruhanga;" 
1Chronicles9:27 baraara beehinguririze egyo nju ya Ruhanga, ahakuba omurimo gwabo gukaba guri okugirinda n'okugiigura buri kasheeshe." 
1Chronicles9:28 Abamwe omuribo bakaba bakwatsiibwe ebintu by'obuheereza; ahakuba bakaba nibaragiirwa kubibara omu kubitaasya n'omu kubishohoza. 
1Chronicles9:29 Abandi omuribo bakaba bakwatsiibwe ebintu by'omu Butaaho n'ebintu byona ebirikwera eby'okukoresa, kandi n'esaano y'obunono, viinyo, amajuta, obubaane n'emigaju." 
1Chronicles9:30 Abandi ab'omuri batabani b'abanyamurwa bakaba bajwanzya emigaju," 
1Chronicles9:31 kandi Matisia ow'omu Baleevi omujigaijo gwa Shalumu ow'omu ba Koora niwe yaabaire akwatsiibwe omurimo gw'okureeberera ebirikukarangwa aha byoma. 
1Chronicles9:32 Kandi n'abandi omuri beene waabo b'Abakohasi nibo baabaire bakwatsiibwe omurimo gw'emigaati y'okumurikwa, okugitebeekanisa buri Sabato." 
1Chronicles9:33 Kandi hakaba hariho abeeshongozi, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'Abaleevi, abaabaire bataaha omu bishengye by'omuri hekalu, bataine gundi murimo, ahabw'okuba bakaba bagira omurimo gwabo nyomushana na nyekiro." 
1Chronicles9:34 Abo nibo baabaire bari bakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'Abaleevi, nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo oku kwabaire kuri, abantu bakuru abaabaire batuura omuri Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Omuri Gibeoni hakaba hatuuramu Yeyeli ishe wa Gibeoni, omukazi we akaba naayetwa Maaka;" 
1Chronicles9:36 omutabani ow'omujigaijo akaba ari Abudooni, naakuratwa Zuuri, Kiishi, Baali, Neeri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori, Ahio, Zekaria na Mikuloosi;" 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikuloosi yaazaara Shimeamu; abo nabo bakaba batwire na beene waabo omuri Yerusaalemu, amaka gaabo nigareebana." 
1Chronicles9:39 Neeri yaazaara Kiishi, Kiishi yaazaara Saulo, Saulo yaazaara Yonasaani, Yonasaani yaazaara Melikishua, Abinadabu na Eshibaali;" 
1Chronicles9:40 mwene Yonasaani akaba ari Meribu-baali, Meribu-baali yaazaara Miika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Batabani ba Miika: Pisoni, Meleki, Tahurea na Ahazi;" 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi yaazaara Yaara, Yaara yaazaara Alimeesi, Azimaveesi na Zimuri; Zimuri yaazaara Mooza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Mooza yaazaara Binea, Binea yaazaara Refaaya, Refaaya yaazaara Eleasa, Eleasa yaazaara Azeeli." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeeli yaazaara abaana b'aboojo mukaaga, n'amaziina gaabo nigo aga: Azurikaamu, Bokeru, Ishimaeli, Shearia, Obadia na Hanani; abo nibo beene Azeeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Omu biro ebyo Abafilitia bakarwanisa Abaisraeli, Abaisraeli baabahunga, baitirwa aha kibungo kya Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafilista baahambya Saulo n'abatabani, baita Yonasaani, Abinadabu na Malikishua beene Saulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Orugamba rwaba orw'amaani ahari Saulo, abarasi baamugwaho, baamuhutaaza." 
1Chronicles10:4 Saulo nikwo kugira omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye, ati: Ihayo rurara yaawe, oginteere, bariya bashaija batashazirwe batakaija, bakanshungisa. Kwonka omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye yaayanga, ahabw'okuba akatiina mononga. Nikyo Saulo yaasyoreireyo rurara ye, akagyetungaho." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ogwo mukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye, ku yaareebire yaafa, nawe yaayetunga aha ye, yaafa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Okwo nikwo Saulo yaafiire; we n'abatabani bonshatu n'ab'omu ka ye boona bakafeera hamwe. 
1Chronicles10:7 Kandi Abaisraeli boona abaabaire bari omu ruhita, ku baareebire eihe ryahunga, na Saulo n'abatabani baafa, baatsigaho endembo zaabo, baahunga, Abafilistia baija baazituuramu." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ku bwaseesire, Abafilistia baija kucwijura emitumbi, baashanga Saulo n'abatani bagwire aha kibungo kya Giliboa," 
1Chronicles10:9 baamucwijura, baamucwaho omutwe, baatwara eby'okurwanisa bye, baatuma entumwa omu nsi yaabo yoona kubuzya amakuru omuri hekalu z'ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa." 
1Chronicles10:10 Eby'okurwanisa bye baabita omuri nyaruju za baaruhanga baabo, n'omutwe gwe baaguhanika omuri hekalu ya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Kwonka aba Yabeshi-gileadi boona, ku baahuriire oku Abafilistia baagizire Saulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 abashaija boona amamanzi baimuka, baihayo omutumbi gwa Saulo n'ey'abatabani, baagitwara Yabeshi. Bwanyima baaziika amagufa gaabo ahansi y'omwela ogw'omuri Yabeshi, baamara ebiro mushanju nibeesiibyakwo." 
1Chronicles10:13 Okwo nikwo Saulo yaafiire ahabw'ekicumuro kye, eki yaacumwire ahari MUKAMA; ahabw'okuba taroorobeire kigambo kya MUKAMA, kandi akeehanuuza aha muntu orikugambisa emizimu," 
1Chronicles10:14 yaayanga kwehanuuza ahari MUKAMA. Nikyo MUKAMA yaamwitiire, obugabe akabuha Daudi mwene Yese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Bwanyima Abaisraeli boona baateeranira ahari Daudi omuri Heburooni, baamugira bati: Reeba turi eigufa ryawe kandi omubiri gwawe." 
1Chronicles11:2 Omu biro ebyahingwire, Saulo akiri omugabe, niiwe waabaire oyebembera Abaisraeli nibahurura kandi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akakugira ati: Niiwe oriba omuriisa w'abantu bangye Israeli, kandi niiwe oriba mugabe waabo." 
1Chronicles11:3 Batyo abakuru ba Israeli boona baija aha mugabe omuri Heburooni, kandi okwo niyo yaaraganiire nabo endagaano omu maisho ga MUKAMA, bakamushukaho amajuta kuba omugabe wa Israeli, nk'ekigambo kya MUKAMA oku kyabaire kiri eki yaagambire naaraba omuri Samueli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Bwanyima Daudi n'Abaisraeli boona baaza Yerusaalemu, niyo Yebusi, ahu Abayebusi abatuuzi b'omuri egyo nsi baabaire bari." 
1Chronicles11:5 Abayebusi baagira Daudi bati: Otaija aha. Kwonka Daudi yaakwata ekigo kya Saayuuni, nirwo rurembo rwa Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Kandi Daudi akaba agizire ati: Oraabanze kuteera aba Yebusi, niwe araabe omutware kandi omukuru w'engabo. Yoabu mwene Zeruiya yaaba niwe yaabanza kwinamukayo; n'ahabw'ekyo yaaba omutware." 
1Chronicles11:7 Daudi yaatuura omuri ekyo kigo, nikyo kyayeteirwe orurembo rwa Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Yaakyombekaho amaju okuruga Miilo n'okukyehinguriririza kimwe; kand Yoabu yaahunduuza ekicweka ky'orurembo ekyatsigaireho. 
1Chronicles11:9 Daudi yaaguma naayeyongyera kugira ekitiinisa; ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe akaba ari hamwe nawe. 
1Chronicles11:10 Aba nibo baabaire bari bakuru omu mamanzi ga Daudi abaamuhaire munonga emikono omu bugabe bwe, bakakwatanisa n'Abaisraeli boona kumwemeka, nk'ekigambo kya MUKAMA eki yaagambire ahari Israeli oku kyabaire kir." 
1Chronicles11:11 Ebi nibyo birikugambwa aha mamanzi agu Daudi yaabaire aine. Yashobeamu owa Hakimooni niwe yaabaire ari mukuru omuri abo abashatu; akakwata eicumu rye, yaariitsa abantu magana ashatu omurundi gumwe." 
1Chronicles11:12 Owaabaire naamukurata omuri ago mamanzi ashatu ni Eleazaari mwene Dodo, mwijukuru wa Ahohi." 
1Chronicles11:13 Akaba ari hamwe na Daudi Pasidamimu, obu Abafilistia baateeranirayo kurwana. Okwo hakaba hariyo omusiri gwa sayiri nyingi; Abaisraeli baahunga Abafilistia;" 
1Chronicles11:14 kwonka we yaayemerera omuri ogwo musiri, yaagurwanaho, yaita Abafilistia; MUKAMA yaabajunisa okusingura kw'amaani." 
1Chronicles11:15 Bashatu omu bashaija bakuru makumi ashatu baashuuma, baashanga Daudi aha rukiri omu nyanga ya Adulaamu; obwo eihe ry'Abafilistia rikaba risiisiire omu ruhita rwa Reefa," 
1Chronicles11:16 Daudi ari omu kigo, n'omutwe gw'engabo z'Abafilistia guri Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Daudi yaatenga, yaagira ati: Nkaabaasibwa ki, hagira owampa otwizi tw'omu iziba eriri aha irembo rya Betelehemu, ntunywa!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ahonaaho ago mamanzi ashatu gaayataguza omu rusiira rw'Abafilistia, gaataha amaizi g'omuri eryo iziba rya Betelehemu, eryabaire riri aha irembo, baagatwarira Daudi. Kwonka Daudi yaayanga kuganywa, kureka yaagashuka omu maisho ga MUKAMA;" 
1Chronicles11:19 yaagira ati: Nikikabure nyowe okukora eki omu maisho ga Ruhanga wangye! Nimbaasa kunywa eshagama y'aba bashaija baayoga amagara gaabo? Ahakuba baagareeta ahabw'okwoga amagara. Ekyo nikyo yaayangiire kuganywa. Ebyo nibyo ago mamanzi gaakozire. 
1Chronicles11:20 Kandi Abishai mukuru wa Yoabu niwe yaabaire ari mukuru omu mamanzi makumi ashatu. Akakwata eicumu rye, yaarwana n'abashaija magana ashatu, yaabaita, yaarangaanwa nk'abo abashatu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Omuri abo makumi ashatu niwe yaakizire kurangaanwa, akahinduka mukuru waabo; kwonka tiyaahika hari abo abashatu." 
1Chronicles11:22 Kandi Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada owa Kabuzieli, owaabaire ari emanzi, akakora eby'amaani, yaita bene Arieli babiri aba Moabu. Kandi aha izooba rimwe omu biro by'ebirika akashuuma, yaitira entare omu kiina." 
1Chronicles11:23 Kandi yaita Omunyamisri muraingwa munonga, oburaingwa bwe mikono etaano. Ogwo Munyamisri akaba aine eicumu omu ngaro, orubango rwaryo ruri nk'empimbi ei barukiraho emyenda; yaamushuumira n'enkoni, yaamusikura eryo icumu omu ngaro, yaarimwitsa." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ebyo nibyo Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada yaakozire, akarangaanwa nk'abo abashatu ab'amaani." 
1Chronicles11:25 Yaarangaanwa omuri abo makumi ashatu, kwonka tiyaahika hari bari abashatu. Daudi yaamuhindura omukuru w'abarinzi be." 
1Chronicles11:26 Kandi ago mamanzi g'omu mahe nigo aga- Asaheeli murumuna wa Yoabu, Elihanani mwene Dodo owa Betelehemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamosi owa Harodi, Helezi owa Pelooni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Iira mwene Ikeshi owa Tekoa, Abiezeeri owa Anatoosi," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai owa Hushati, Ilai owa Ahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai owa Netofa, Heleda mwene Baana owa Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai mwene Ribai owa Gibea ey'Ababenyamiini, Benaaya owa Piratooni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai ow'aha tugyera twa Gaashi, Abieli owa Arubaasi," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azimaveesi owa Baharamu, Eliahuba owa Shalibooni," 
1Chronicles11:34 Hashemi owa Gizooni, Yonasaani mwene Shageri owa Harari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiamu mwene Sakeri owa Harari, Elifaali mwene Uuri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi owa Mekeraasi, Ahiya owa Peloni" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hezero owa Karumeeli, Narai mwene Ezubai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yeli murumuna wa Nasani, Mibuhaari mwene Haguri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zeleki Omuano, Naharai owa Beeroosi, owaabaire ari omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bya Yoabu mwene Zeruiya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Iira owa Ituri, Garebu owa Ituri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uriya Omuhiiti, Zabadi mwene Ahulai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mwene Shiza Omureubeeni omwebembezi w'Abareubeeni, owaizire n'abantu makumi ashatu," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mwene Maaka, Yoshafati owa Misuuni," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uziya owa Ashitaroosi, Shama na Yeyeli beene Hosamu owa Aroeri," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediaeli mwene Shimuri, n'omurumuna Yooha owa Tiizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Elieli owa Mahavi, Yeribai na Yoshavia beene Elunaamu, Ituma Omumoabu," 
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli, Obedi na Yasieli owa Mezoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Aba nibo baashangire Daudi Zikulaagi, obu yaabaire ayesherekire Saulo mwene Kiishi; nabo bakaba bari ab'omu mamanzi agaamuhaire emikono omu bweme." 
1Chronicles12:2 Bakaba nibamanya kurwanisa amata, kandi nibatwara emikono yombi omu kurekyera enjungu n'omu kurasha emyambi; bakaba bari Ababenyamiini beene waabo b'aba Saulo." 
1Chronicles12:3 Omukuru waabo akaba ari Ahiezeeri, naakuratwa Yoasi, bombi bari beene Shemaya owa Gibea, na Yezieli na Peleti beene Azimaveesi; Beraaka, Yehu owa Anatoosi," 
1Chronicles12:4 Ishumaaya owa Gibeoni, omushaija w'amaani omuri bari makumi ashatu, kandi omwebembezi waabo, Yeremia, Yahazieli, Yohanaani, Yozabadi owa Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, Yerimoosi, Bealia, Shemaria, Shefatia owa Harufi," 
1Chronicles12:6 Elukaana, Ishia, Azareeli, Yoezeeri, Yashobeamu ow'aba Koora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 na Yoeli na Zebadia beene Yerohaamu owa Gedori. 
1Chronicles12:8 Kandi omu Bagaadi haarugamu abashaija abarwani b'amaani abamanyiire eby'orugamba, amahano omu kutwara engabo n'amacumu, abu obuso bwabo bwabaire nibushusha obw'entare, abaabaire nibairuka nk'esirabo z'omu bibungo, baashanga Daudi omu kigo ky'omu ihamba." 
1Chronicles12:9 Omukuru akaba ari Ezeri, owa kabiri Obadia, owa kashatu Eliabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 owa kana Mishimana, owa kataano Yeremia," 
1Chronicles12:11 owa mukaaga Atai, owa mushanju Elieli," 
1Chronicles12:12 owa munaana Yohanaani, owa mwenda Elizabadi," 
1Chronicles12:13 owa ikumi Yeremia, owa ikumi n'omwe Makubanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Abagaadi abo bakaba bari abakuru b'engabo, omuto omuribo akaba ari nk'abantu igana, n'omukuru nk'abantu rukumi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Abo nibo baayambukire Yorudani omu kwezi kw'okubanza, obu Yorudani yaabaire eijwire, amaizi garengyeire aha nkungu zaayo zoona, bakabinga ab'omu mpita z'oburugwa-izooba n'oburengyerwa-izooba boona." 
1Chronicles12:16 Bwanyima abamwe omu Babenyamiini n'Abayuda baija, baashanga Daudi omu kigo." 
1Chronicles12:17 Daudi yaashohora kubabugana, yaabagira ati: Ku muraabe mwaija kumpa emikono nk'abanywani bangye, omutima gwangye nigwija kukwatanisa n'eyaanyu; kwonka ku muraabe mwaija kundeebya aha bazigu bangye, haza ntaine ki nshobize, Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe akireebe, kandi abahane." 
1Chronicles12:18 Ahonaaho Omwoyo yaija ahari Amasai, omukuru wa bari makumi ashatu, yaagira ati: Turi abaawe, Daudi! Turi aha rubaju rwawe, iwe mwene Yese! Obusingye, obusingye bube ahariiwe, N'aha barikukuha emikono; Ahakuba Ruhanga waawe akuhwera. Ahonaaho Daudi yaabaakiira, yaabagira abakuru b'engabo ze." 
1Chronicles12:19 Kandi n'abamwe omu Bamanaase bakaimuura, baayehongyera Daudi, obu yaahurura n'Abafilistia kurwanisa Saulo. (Kwonka Daudi tarabahwereire, ahakuba abakuru omu Bafilistia bakaza omu naama, baamubinga nibagira bati: Naija kutureebya agarukire mukama we Saulo, atunagye omu kabi.)" 
1Chronicles12:20 Ku yaabaire naakigaruka Zikulaagi, abashaija aba ab'omu Bamanaase baamwehongyera, Aduna, Yoazabadi, Yediaeli, Mikaeli, Yozabadi, Elihu na Zilesai, abaabaire bari abakuru b'emitwe y'engabo rukumi-rukumi y'eihe ry'Abamanaase;" 
1Chronicles12:21 bakaha Daudi emikono kurwanisa emitwe y'abanyagi. 
1Chronicles12:22 Ahakuba abantu bakaba baija ahari Daudi buri izooba kumuha emikono, okuhitsya obu baabaire eihe rihango, nk'eihe rya Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles12:23 Egi niyo mibaro y'emitwe y'engabo ezaashangire Daudi Heburooni, ziine eby'okurwanisa, kumukubuurira obugabe bwa Saulo, nk'ekigambo kya MUKAMA oku kyabaire kiri." 
1Chronicles12:24 Abayuda abaabaire baine engabo n'amacumu, bakaba bari obukumi mukaaga na magana munaana abeeteekateekyeire orugamba;" 
1Chronicles12:25 Abasimeoni abashaija abarwani b'amaani omu rugamba bari enkumi mushanju na igana; 
1Chronicles12:26 Abaleevi enkumi ina na magana mukaaga; 
1Chronicles12:27 Yehoyaada owaabaire ari omwebembezi w'enju ya Arooni yaija n'engabo enkumi ishatu na magana mushanju; 
1Chronicles12:28 Zadoki omutsigazi w'amaani emanzi yaija n'abakuru b'engabo makumi abiri na babiri ab'enju ya ishe. 
1Chronicles12:29 Ababenyamiini, abaine obuzaare na Saulo, bakaba bari enkumi ishatu, ahabw'okuba okuhitsya omu bunaku obwo abaingi omuribo bakaba bahamiire aha nju ya Saulo;" 
1Chronicles12:30 Abaefuraimu abashaija b'amaani amamanzi, ba rugambwa omu maju ga baishenkurubo bari obukumi bubiri na magana munaana," 
1Chronicles12:31 ab'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase, abu amaziina gaabo gaagamborwejp mgi baije kwemeka Daudi, bari kakumi n'enkumi munaana;" 
1Chronicles12:32 Abaisraeli abaabaire nibeetegyereza eby'obunaku, kandi nibamanya ebi Abaisraeli bashemereire kukora, abakuru bari magana abiri hamwe na beene waabo abu baabaire nibategyeka." 
1Chronicles12:33 Abazebuluuni, abaabaire bamanyiire eby'orugamba baine eby'okurwanisa byona, baizire kuhwera Daudi n'omutima gumwe, bari obukumi butaano;" 
1Chronicles12:34 Abanafutaali abakuru b'engabo rukumi abaizire n'engabo eziine engabo n'amacumu bari obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mushanju; 
1Chronicles12:35 Abadaani abaabaire baine eby'okurwanisa by'orugamba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi munaana na magana mukaaga; 
1Chronicles12:36 Abaasheri engabo ezimanyiire orugamba ezaabaire zeeteekateekire kurwana bari obukumi buna; 
1Chronicles12:37 Abareubeeni n'Abagaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase abaarugire seeri ya Yorudani baine eby'okurwanisa by'orugamba eby'emiringo yoona, bari akasiriira n'obukumi bubiri." 
1Chronicles12:38 Abo barwani boona, abaabaire bamanyiire eby'orugamba, baija Heburooni n'omutima gumwe kwemeka Daudi kuba omugabe wa Israeli yoona; kandi n'Abaisraeli abandi boona bakaba baine omutima gumwe gw'okwemeka Daudi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Baamarayo kashatu bari hamwe na Daudi, nibarya nibanywa; ahabw'okuba beene waabo bakaba bababisiire." 
1Chronicles12:40 Kandi na bataahi baabo, n'abaarugire Isakaari, Zebuluuni na Nafutaali, baija bareetsire eby'okurya aha ndogoya, aha ngamira, aha nyumbu n'aha nte, eby'okurya bingi, esaano, ebiihuro by'emizaabibu eyomire, viinyo n'amajuta, ente n'entaama; ahabw'okuba omuri Israeli hakaba harimu okushemererwa." 
1Chronicles13:1 Bwanyima Daudi yaaza omu naama n'abeebembezi boona, abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi na igana-igana." 
1Chronicles13:2 Kandi yaagambira omutwe gw'Abaisraeli boona abaabaire bateeraine naagira ati: Ku muraabe nimukisiima, kandi kirugire ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, tutume hoona-hoona omuri beene waitu abatsigaire omu nsi ya Israeli yoona, abu abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi batwire nabo omu ndembo zaabo n'amariisizo gaazo, babone kuteeranira ahu turi;" 
1Chronicles13:3 bwanyima tuze kugarura eshanduukye ya Ruhanga waitu; ahabw'okuba omu biro bya Saulo tituragyeteireho. 
1Chronicles13:4 Omutwe gwona gwaikiriza kutwaza gutyo, ahakuba egyo naama ekasiimwa abantu boona." 
1Chronicles13:5 Atyo Daudi yaateerana Abaisraeli boona okuruga Shihoori akagyera ka Misri okuhika ah'orikutaahira nooza Hamasi, ngu babone kwiha eshanduukye ya Ruhanga Kiryasi-yearimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Daudi n'Abaisraeli boona bainamuka, baaza Baala niyo Kiryasi-yarimu ey'Abayuda, kwihayo eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, eyaabaire etakirirwaho Eiziina rya MUKAMA, oshutama aha kitebe kye ahaiguru ya baakerubi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Baatwarira eshanduukye ya Ruhanga aha kigaari kisya, baagiiha omu ka ya Abinadabu, kandi Uzza na Ahio nibo baabaire nibatwara ekyo kigaari." 
1Chronicles13:8 Daudi n'Abaisraeli boona baagyenda nibashemerererwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA n'amaani gaabo goona, nibeeshongora nibateera endingiri, n'enanga n'engarabi, n'amataari n'ebitaasa n'amakondere." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ku baahikire aha mbuga ya Kidoni, Uzza yaatayo omukono gwe kuramira eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba ente zikateera entsibo." 
1Chronicles13:10 MUKAMA yaagirira Uzza ekiniga; yaamwitira aho, naamutura okuramira eshanduukye n'omukono gwe; yaafeera aho omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles13:11 Daudi yaaguubwa kubi ahabwa MUKAMA kugwa ahari Uzza; ogwo mwanya gwayetwa Pereezi-uzza n'okuhitsya hati. 
1Chronicles13:12 Eryo izooba Daudi yaatiina Ruhanga yaagira ati: Nimbaasa nta kutwara eshanduukye ya MUKAMA omu ka yangye? 
1Chronicles13:13 N'ahabw'ekyo Daudi tiyaatwara shanduukye ya Ruhanga owe omu rurembo rwa Daudi, kureka yaagikiikamya, yaagita omu nju ya Obededomu Omunyagaasi." 
1Chronicles13:14 Eshanduukye ya Ruhanga yaamara ameezi ashatu omu nju ya Obededomu; MUKAMA yaaha eka ya Obededomu omugisha, n'ebi yaabaire atungire byona." 
1Chronicles14:1 Bwanyima Hiraamu omugabe wa Tuuro yaayohereza entumwa ahari Daudi n'ebiti by'emyereezi, n'abarikwombekyesa amabaare n'ababaizi, kumwombekyera enju." 
1Chronicles14:2 Daudi yaamanyira aho ku MUKAMA amuhamize kuba omugabe wa Israeli, kandi ku aimukize obugabe bwe ahabw'abantu be Israeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Bwanyima Daudi yaashwerera abandi bakazi omuri Yerusaalemu, yaazaara abandi baana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
1Chronicles14:4 Aga nigo maziina g'abaana abu yaazaariire Yerusaalemu; Shamua, Shobabu, Nasani, Sulemaani," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibuhaari, Elishua, Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nooga, Nefegi, Yafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishaama, Beeliada na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Abafilistia boona ku baahuriire ngu Daudi ashukirweho amajuta kuba omugabe w'Abaisraeli boona, bainamuka baaza kusherura Daudi; Daudi ku yaabihuriire, yaahurura kubarwanisa." 
1Chronicles14:9 Omu bunaku obwo Abafilistia bakaba baizire, bateire oruhita rw'Abareefa." 
1Chronicles14:10 Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari Ruhanga naabuuza ati: Nyinamukye ndwane n'Abafilistia? Noija kubahayo omu mikono yangye? MUKAMA yaamugarukamu ati: Inamuka, ahakuba niinyija kubahayo omu mikono yaawe." 
1Chronicles14:11 Daudi nikwo kuza Baali-peraziimu, akabaitirayo. Bwanyima yaagira ati: Ruhanga ahigwire abazigu bangye, nk'oku amaizi gahigura omu cungiro. Nikyo baayeteire ogwo mwanya Baali-peraziimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Abafilistia baatsigayo ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa, Daudi yaaragiira, baabyotsya." 
1Chronicles14:13 Ku haahingwireho ebiro Abafilistia baagaruka baateera orwo ruhita. 
1Chronicles14:14 Daudi yaagaruka yaayehanuuza ahari Ruhanga, Ruhanga yaamugarukamu ati: Otainamuka kubakurata; kureka obakiikuukye, obashangye ahashungaine n'akabira k'emitugunda." 
1Chronicles14:15 Bwanyima ku oraahurire okukaabuuza aha mitwe y'emitugunda, ahonaaho ogyende obateere; ahakuba Ruhanga naaba akwebembeire kwita engabo z'Abafilistia." 
1Chronicles14:16 Atyo Daudi yaatwaza nk'oku Ruhanga yaamuragiira, baagyenda baita Abafilistia okuruga Gibeoni okuhika Gezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Okurangaanwa kwa Daudi kwabuga ensi zoona, MUKAMA yaareetera amahanga goona kumutiina." 
1Chronicles15:1 Bwanyima Daudi yaayeyombekyera amaju omu rurembo rwe; kandi yaateguurira eshanduukye ya Ruhanga omwanya, yaagiteerera eihema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Daudi yaagira ati: Tihariho n'omwe oshemereire kuheeka eshanduukye ya Ruhanga kureka Abaleevi, ahabw'okuba nibo MUKAMA yaatooraine kuguma nibaheeka eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, n'okumuheereza ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles15:3 Bwanyima Daudi yaateeranira Abaisraeli boona Yerusaalemu, ngu baze kwinamura eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, bagite omu mwanya gwayo ogu agibonereize." 
1Chronicles15:4 Kandi Daudi yaateerana batabani ba Arooni n'Abaleevi; 
1Chronicles15:5 omuri beene Kohasi, omukuru akaba ari Urieli na beene ishe igana na makumi abiri;" 
1Chronicles15:6 omuri beene Merari, omukuru Asaaya na beene ishe magana abiri na makumi abiri;" 
1Chronicles15:7 omuri beene Gereshoni, omukuru Yoeli na beene ishe igana na makumi ashatu;" 
1Chronicles15:8 omuri beene Elizafaani, omukuru Shemaaya na beene ishe magana abiri;" 
1Chronicles15:9 omuri beene Heburooni, omukuru Elieli na beene ishe makumi munaana;" 
1Chronicles15:10 omuri beene Uzieli, omukuru Abinadabu na beene ishe igana na ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles15:11 Bwanyima Daudi yaayeta Zadoki na Abiasaari abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi aba: Urieli, Asaaya, Yoeli, Shemaaya, elieli na Aminadabu," 
1Chronicles15:12 yaabagira ati: Muri abakuru b'amaju ga baashwenkuriimwe Abaleevi; mweyeze, imwe ana beene waanyu, mubone kwinamura eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli kugita omu mwanya ogu ngibonereize." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ahabw'okuba obw'okubanza timuragiheekire, nikyo MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaatugwereireho naatutura okutagitwaza, nk'oku kyaragiirwe." 
1Chronicles15:14 Batyo abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi baayeyeza ahabw'okuza kwinamura eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
1Chronicles15:15 Ku baakhikireyo, Abaleevi baaheeka eshanduukye ya Ruhanga aha mabega gaabo n'emigamba, nk'oku Musa yaragiire naakuratira ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles15:16 Kandi Daudi yaaragiira abakuru b'Abaleevi kutaho abeeshongozi ab'omuri beene waabo, ab'okuteera enanga, endingiri n'ebitaasa, nibateera akaari k'okushemererwa." 
1Chronicles15:17 Batyo Abaleevi baatoorana Hemani mwene Yoeli, omuri beene ishe baatoorana Asafu mwene Berekia, n'omuri beene Merari baatoorana Esaani mwene Kushaya;" 
1Chronicles15:18 kandi hamwe n'abo baatoorana omuri beene waabo abarikukurataho, Zekaria, Yazieli, Shemiramoosi, Yehieli, Uuni, Eliabu, Benaaya, Maaseya, Matisiya, Elefelebu, Mikuneya n'abarinzi b'eirembo Obededomu na Yeyeli." 
1Chronicles15:19 Abeeshongozi aba, Hemani, Asafu na Esaani, bakaba bari ab'okuteera ebitaasa by'emiringa;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Zekaria, Azieli, Shemiramoosi, Yehieli, Uuni, Eliabu, Maaseya na Benaaya bakaba baari ab'okuteera enanga omu iraka rya Alamoosi;" 
1Chronicles15:21 Matisiya, Elefelebu, Mikuneya, Obededomu, Yeyeli na Azazia bakaba bari ab'okuteera enanga omu iraka rya Sheminiisi." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kandi Kenania, omwebembezi w'Abaleevi omu by'okweshongora, niwe yaabaire ari omwebembezi, ahabw'okuba akaba naabimanya munonga." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia na Elukaana bakaba bari abakuumirizi b'eirembo ahabw'eshanduukye. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebania, Yoshafaati, Netaneeli, Amasai, Zekaria, Benaaya na Eliezeeri, abanyamurwa, nibo baabaire bari ab'okugyenda nibateerera amakondere omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga; Obededomu na Yehia nabo bari abakumiirizi b'eirembo ahabw'eshanduukye." 
1Chronicles15:25 Atyo Daudi n'abakuru ba Israeli, n'abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, baaza kwinamura eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, kugiiha owa Obededomu n'okushemererwa." 
1Chronicles15:26 Kandi ahabwa Ruhanga kuhwera Abaleevi ababaire baheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, baatamba enimi mushanju n'empaya z'entaama mushanju." 
1Chronicles15:27 Obwo Daudi akaba ajwaire ekanzu ya kitaani, kandi n'Abaleevi abaabaire baheekire eshanduukye, n'abeeshongozi, na Kenania omwebembezi waabo, nabo bakaba bajwaire batyo; kwonka Daudi we ajwariireho n'efodi ya kitaani." 
1Chronicles15:28 Okwo nikwo Abaisraeli boona bainamwire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA nibateera akaari n'enzamba n'amakondere n'ebitaasa, nibateera munonga endingiri n'enanga." 
1Chronicles15:29 Bwanyima eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA ku yaabaire neetaaha omu rurembo rwa Daudi, Mikaali muhara wa Saulo yaaringuririza omu dirisa, yaareba omugabe Daudi naazina naayemurika, yaamugayira aha mutima." 
1Chronicles16:1 Batyo baataasya enshanduukye ya Ruhanga, baagita omu ihema eri Daudi agiteereireho; baatamba ebitambo by'okwotsya n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles16:2 Daudi ku yaaherize kutamba ebyo bitambo by'okwotsya n'empngano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, yaashabira abantu omugisha omu iziina rya MUKAMA," 
1Chronicles16:3 yaagaburira Abaisraeli boona, abashaija n'abakazi, buri muntu omugaati gumwe, entongo y'enyama kandi n'omwate gw'emizaabibu eyomire." 
1Chronicles16:4 Kandi yaataho Abaleevi bamwe kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya MUKAMA, okuguma nibaijutsya, okusiima n'okuhimbisa MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Omukuru waabo yaaba Asafu, yaakuratwa Zekaria, Yeyeli, Shemiramoosi, Yehieli, Matisiya, Eliabu, Benaaya, Obededomu na Yeyeli, abaatairweho kuteera enanga n'endingiri; Asafu we yaaba ow'okuteera ebitaasa," 
1Chronicles16:6 Benaaya na Yahazieli abanyamurwa baaba ab'okuguma nibateerera amkondere omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Ruhanga. 
1Chronicles16:7 Eryo izooba nibwo Daudi yaatandika kutaho Asafu na beene ishe kuba ab'okusingiza MUKAMA. 
1Chronicles16:8 Musiime MUKAMA, murangaane eiziina rye, Mumanyise ebi yaakozire omu mahanga!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Mumweshongorere, mweshongore eby'okumuhimbisa, Mugambire abantu eby'emirimo ye yoona ey'okutangaaza!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Mwesiime ahabw'eiziina rye eririkwera; Emitima y'abarikusherura MUKAMA eshemererwe! 
1Chronicles16:11 Musherure MUKAMA n'amaani ge, Mwetengye okuguma omu maisho ge obutoosha." 
1Chronicles16:12 Mwijukye emirimo ye ey'okutangaaza N'ebitakareebwaga ebi yaakozire, n'emanja ezi yaacwire," 
1Chronicles16:13 Imwe ab'oruzaaro rw'omwiru we Abrahamu, Abaana ba Yakobo abu yaatooraine." 
1Chronicles16:14 Niwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, Emicwere ye eri omu nsi yoona;" 
1Chronicles16:15 Aijuka endagaano ye ebiro byona, Ekigambo eki yaaragiire ab'obusingye rukumi," 
1Chronicles16:16 Niyo ndagaano ei yaaragaine na Abrahamu, Ei yaarahiire naaraganisa Isaaka," 
1Chronicles16:17 Akagihamiza Yakobo kuba ekiragiro, Na Israeli okuba endagaano etarihwaho," 
1Chronicles16:18 Naagira ati: Niiwe ndiha ensi ya Kanaani, Kuba omugabo gw'obuhunguzi bwanyu." 
1Chronicles16:19 Obu baabaire bakiri bakye, Eego bakye munonga kandi abashuhuuki omu nsi egyo," 
1Chronicles16:20 Nibazengyerera omu mahanga agatari gamwe, Okuruga omu bugabe bumwe okuza omu bundi," 
1Chronicles16:21 Taraikiriize muntu weena kubakora kubi, Akateisa abagabe ahabwabo," 
1Chronicles16:22 Naagira ati: Mutakora aha bu naashukireho amajuta, N'obu kwakuba okukora kubi baanabi bangye." 
1Chronicles16:23 Imwe abari omu nsi mwena, mweshongorere MUKAMA, Mworekye okujuna kwe buri kasheeshe." 
1Chronicles16:24 Mumanyise ekitiinisa kye omu mahanga, Emirimo ye ey'okutangaaza omu mahanga goona." 
1Chronicles16:25 Ahakuba MUKAMA ni mukuru, ashamereire kuhimbisibwa munonga, Kandi n'okutiinwa okukira baaruhanga boona." 
1Chronicles16:26 Ahakuba baaruhanga boona ab'abantu baba ebishushani, Kwonka Ruhanga niwe yaahangire eiguru." 
1Chronicles16:27 Ekitiinisa n'obukuru bimwebembeire; Amaani n'okushemererwa biri ahi atuura. 
1Chronicles16:28 Imwe enganda z'amahanga, mugambe, Mugambe ku MUKAMA aine ekitiinisa n'amaani," 
1Chronicles16:29 Mugambe ku MUKAMA aine ekitiinisa ekishemereire eiziina rye, Mureete empongano, mwije omu maisho ge; Muramye MUKAMA mujwaire ebirikwera;" 
1Chronicles16:30 Muteteme omu maisho ge, imwe ab'omu nsi mwena; Eego, endi ehamire, terikubaasa kutengyetsibwa." 
1Chronicles16:31 Eiguru rishemererwe, n'ensi eyesiime; Bagambire omu mahanga nibagira bati: MUKAMA ari aha ngoma!" 
1Chronicles16:32 Enyanja ehoorere, na byona ebiijwiremu, Emisiri eyesiime n'ebirimu byona!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Obwo nibwo emiti yoona ey'omu kibira eryeshongora Ahabw'okushemererwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA, Ahabw'okuba naija kucwera ensi orubanja." 
1Chronicles16:34 Musiime MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba ni murungi, Kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro n'ebiro!" 
1Chronicles16:35 Kandi mugire muti: Otujune, ai Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwaitu, Otutaaruure, otujune nootwiha omu mahanga, Tubone kusiima eiziina ryawe eririkwera, Twesiimire okuhimbisibwa kwawe." 
1Chronicles16:36 MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, ahimbisibwe Okwiha ira ryona okuhitsya ebiro byona. Bwanyima abantu boona baagira bati: Amiina; baahimbisa MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles16:37 Atyo Daudi yaatsiga Asafu na beene ishe omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA kuguma nibakora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu maisho gaayo, nk'oku kyabaire nikyetengwa buri izooba;" 
1Chronicles16:38 yaatsigayo na Obededomu na beene ishe makumi mukaaga na munaana; kandi yaataho Obededomu mwnee Yedusuuni na Hoosa kuba abakumiirizi b'eirembo. 
1Chronicles16:39 Kandi yaatsiga Zadoki omunyamurwa na beene ishe abanyamurwa omu maisho g'eihema rya MUKAMA eryabaire riri omu mwanya mukuru gw'okuramizamu, ogwabaire guri gibeoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 kuguma nibatambirira MUKAMA ebitambo by'okwotsya aha itambiro ryabyo omu kasheeshe n'omu mwabazyo, nk'oku byona byabaire bihandiikirwe omu biragiro bya MUKAMA ebi yaaragiire Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Kandi hamwe n'abo yaataho Hemani na Yedusuuni n'abandi abaatoorainwe, abu amaziina gaabo gaagambirweho, kuba ab'okusiima MUKAMA ahabw'embabazi ze ezigumaho ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles16:42 Kandi Hemani na Yeduduuni abo bakaba bagira amakondere n'ebitaasa eby'okuteera, n'ebindi bintu by'okuteerwa ahabw'ebyeshongoro ebirikwera. Kandi baataho batabani ba Yedusuuni kuba ab'okurinda eirembo." 
1Chronicles16:43 Bwanyima abantu boona baayaabuuka, buri muntu yaaza owe, na Daudi yaagaruka owe kushabira eka ye omugisha." 
1Chronicles17:1 Bwanyima Daudi, ku yaataahire omu nju ye, yaagogyeera, yaagira Nasani nabi ati: Reeba, hati ndi omu nju y'emyereezi, kwonka eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA eri omu ihema." 
1Chronicles17:2 Nasani yaagira Daudi ati: Kora ekikuru aha mutima kyona, ahakuba Ruhanga ari hamwe naiwe." 
1Chronicles17:3 Kwonka ekyo kiro ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaizira Nasani nikigira kiti: 
1Chronicles17:4 Irooko ogire omwiru wangye Daudi oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Toriinyombekyera nju y'okutuuramu; 
1Chronicles17:5 ahakuba tinkatuuraga mu nju, okwiha aha izooba eri naihiireho Abaisraeli Misri n'okuhitsya hati, kureka nkaba ngyenda ninduga omu ihema nindigarukamu, ninduga omu butaaho nimbugaruakamu." 
1Chronicles17:6 Nimugira ngu omu myanya yoona ei naabaire ngyendamu n'Abaisraeli boona nkaba ndagizire omwe aha baramuzi ba Israeli, abu naaragiire kuriisa abantu bangye Israeli, nti: Ahabw'enki mutakaanyombekyeraga nju y'emyereezi?" 
1Chronicles17:7 N'ahabw'ekyo ogire omwiru wangye Daudi oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Nkakwiha omu iriisizo nooriisa entaama, ngu nkuhindure omutegyeki w'abantu bangye Israeli;" 
1Chronicles17:8 kandi nkaba nguma naiwe ahu waabaire oza hoona, ncwekyerereza abazigu baawe omu maisho gaawe; kandi ndyakuha eiziina nk'ery'abantu rugambwa ab'omu nsi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ndyatooranira abantu bangye Israeli omwanya, mbabyaremu, babone kugira obutaka bw'okutuuramu, obu batariihwamu bundi; kandi abantu babi tibarigaruk kubaita kubi nk'obunyakare," 
1Chronicles17:10 obu naabaire ndagiira abaramuzi kutegyeka abantu bangye Israeli; kandi ndyagomoora abazigu baawe boona. N'ekindi ninkugambira nti: MUKAMA aryakwombekyera eka. 
1Chronicles17:11 Kandi obunaku bwawe obw'okushanga bashwenkuru ku burihika, ndyaimutsya omu ruzaaro rwawe omwe ahari batabani baawe akuhungurire, mpamye obugabe bwe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ogwo niwe ariinyombekyera enju, kandi ndyahamya ekitebe ky'obugabe bwe ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ndyaba ishe, nawe abe omwana wangye. Tindimwihaho mbabazi zangye, nk'oku naaziihire aha waakubandiize," 
1Chronicles17:14 kureka ndyamuhamya omu nju yangye n'omu bugabe bwangye ebiro byona, kandi ekitebe ky'obugabe bwe kiryagumaho ebiro n'ebiro." 
1Chronicles17:15 Ebyo bigambo byona n'okwo kworekwa kwona Nasani yaabiteekyerereza Daudi nk'oku byabaire biri. 
1Chronicles17:16 Bwanyima omugabe Daudi yaataaha, yaashutama omu maisho ga MUKAMA, yaagira ati: Niinye oha, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga, kandi n'enju yangye nikyo ki, iwe okundinda okampitsya aha?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Kwonak ekyo ahariiwe ni kikye, ai Ruhanga; mbwenu waayongyeraho n'okugamba aha by'enju y'omwiru waawe, oku eriba omu biro bingi munonga ebiriija, kandi reeba, waanyinganisa n'omuntu w'ekitiinisa kihango, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga!" 
1Chronicles17:18 Mbwenu shi, ekindi, nyowe Daudi, nkugambire ki ahabw'okuha omwiru waawe ekitiinisa? Ahabw'okuba niiwe orikumumanya." 
1Chronicles17:19 Ai MUKAMA, ebikuru ebyo byona obikoreire omwiru waawe, nk'oku omutima gwawe gurikuteekateeka, ngu obone kworeka ebikuru ebyo byona." 
1Chronicles17:20 Ai MUKAMA, tihariho orikushushana naiwe; tihariho Ruhanga kureka Iwe, nk'ebi twahuriire byona oku biri." 
1Chronicles17:21 Kandi n'ihanga ki omu nsi eriri nk'abantu baawe Israeli, abu Ruhanga yaagiire kwecungurira kuba abantu be, ngu oyetungire eiziina ahabw'okubakorera ebikuru kandi ebirikutiinisa, noobinga amahanga omu maisho g'abantu baawe, abu waacungwire, okaiha Misri?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Bwanyima abantu baawe Israeli okabagira abaawe buzima ebiro byona; naiwe MUKAMA, waaba Ruhanga waabo." 
1Chronicles17:23 Mbwenu hati, ai MUKAMA, ekigambo eki waagamba aha mwiru waawe n'aha nju ye, kihamibwe ebiro byona, kandi okore nk'oku waagamba;" 
1Chronicles17:24 n'eziina ryawe rihamibwe, kandi riheebwe ekitiinisa ebiro byona, nibagira bati: MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, niwe Ruhanga wa Israeli; kandi enju y'omwiru waawe Daudi eryahamibwa omu maisho gaawe." 
1Chronicles17:25 Ahakuba Iwe, Ruhanga wangye, oshuuruuriire omwiru waawe, ku orimwombekyera eka; nikyo omwiru waawe yaagirira obumanzi kushaba omu maisho gaawe." 
1Chronicles17:26 Mbwenu hati, ai MUKAMA, niiwe Ruhanga, kandi waaraganisa omwiru waawe ekyo kigambo kirungi;" 
1Chronicles17:27 n'ahabw'ekyo hati ikiriza kuha enju y'omwiru waawe omugisha, egumeho ebiro byona, eri omu maisho gaawe; ahakuba, MUKAMA, eki ohaire omugisha, kigugira ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles18:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo Daudi yaasingura Abafilistia, yaabamara eishaija, yaakwata Gaasi, n'ebirorero byayo, yaagiiha omu mikono y'Abafilistia." 
1Chronicles18:2 Yaasingura n'Abamoabu, baaba abairu be, baaguma nibamutoijera." 
1Chronicles18:3 Kandi Daudi yaasingura Hadadezeeri omugabe wa Zooba, yaamubinga, yaamuhitsya Hamasi; obwo Hadadezeeri akaba naazakubyara ekiijutsyo kye aha mugyera Furaati." 
1Chronicles18:4 Daudi yaamunyagaho ebigaari rukumi, n'abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi enkumi mushanju, n'engabo ezirikugyendesa ebigyere obukumi bubiri. Bwanyima Daudi yaatema ebiteega by'embaraasi ezirikukurura ebigaari zoona, kwonka yaatsigaho ezirikubaasa kukurura ebigaari igana." 
1Chronicles18:5 Abasiria ba Damasiko ku baizire kuha Hadadezeeri omugabe wa Zooba emikono, Daudi yaabaitamu abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri." 
1Chronicles18:6 Bwanyima Daudi yaata emitwe y'abarinzi omuri Siria eya Damasiko, n'Abasiria baahinduka abairu be, baaguma nibamutoijera. Kandi MUKAMA yaaguma naaha Daudi obusinguzi ei yaabaire aza yoona." 
1Chronicles18:7 Daudi yaanyaga engabo z'ezaabu, ezi abagaragwa ba Hadadezeeri baabaire baine, yaazitwara Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 Kandi Daudi yaiha emiringa mingi munonga omuri Tibuhaasi na Kuuni, endembo za Hadadezeeri." 
1Chronicles18:9 Bwanyima Tou omugabe wa Hamasi, ku yaahuriire ngu Daudi asingwire eihe ryona erya Hadadezeeri omugabe wa Zooba," 
1Chronicles18:10 yaatuma Yoramu omutabani aha mugabe Daudi, kumuramutsya, n'okumutabarutsya, ahabw'okurwana na Hadadezeeri n'okumusingura; ahabw'okuba Hadadezeeri akaba atuura naarwana na Tou. Yaamutwekyera ebintu by'emiringo yoona eby'ezaabu, eby'efeeza n'eby'emiringa;" 
1Chronicles18:11 ebyo nabyo omugabe Daudi yaabishoroorera MUKAMA, hamwe n'efeeza n'ezaabu ebi yaabiare anyagire omu mahanga aga goona, Edomu, Moabu, n'omu Baamoni, Abafilistia, na amaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Bwanyima Abishai mwene Zeruiya yaitira Abanyaedomu kakumi n'enkumi munaana omu ruhita rw'Omwonyo. 
1Chronicles18:13 Yaataho emitwe y'abarinzi omuri Edomu; Abanyaedomu boona baahinduka abairu ba Daudi. Okwo nikwo MUKAMA yaahaire Daudi okusingura, ei yaabaire aza yoona." 
1Chronicles18:14 Atyo Daudi yaategyeka Israeli yoona; kandi yaacwera abantu be boona emanja z'oburyo omu bwinganisa. 
1Chronicles18:15 Obwo Yoabu mwene Zeruiya akaba ari omukuru w'eihe; Yehoshafaati mwene Ahiluudi ari omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho; 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadoki mwene Ahitubu na Abimeleki mwene Abiasaari bari abanyamurwa; Shavusha ari omuhandiiki; 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada ari omukuru w'Abakeresi n'Abapelesi; kandi batabani ba Daudi bari abategyeki bakuru b'omugabe. 
1Chronicles19:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo Nahashi omugabe w'Abaamoni yaafa, omutabani Hanuni yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles19:2 Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaagira ati: Niinyija kukorera gye Hanuni mwene Nahashi, nk'oku ishe yankoreire. Atyo Daudi yaayohereza entumwa kumuyaagira ahabw'okufeerwa ishe. Abagaragwa ba Daudi baahika owa Hanuni omu nsi y'Abaamoni kumuyaagira." 
1Chronicles19:3 Kwonka abanyiginya b'Abaamoni baagira Hanuni bati: Noogira ngu Daudi okukwoherereza ab'okukuyaagira n'okuha sho ekitiinisa? Torikumanya ku ayohereize abagaragwa be kwetegyereza ensi n'okugitata, ngu abone kugicwekyereza?" 
1Chronicles19:4 N'ahabw'ekyo Hanuni yaakwata abagaragwa ba Daudi, yaabamwa ebireju by'orubaju rumwe, yaacegyeta ebijwaro byabo okugarukira aha bibunu, yaaboohereza; baagyenda."
