1Chronicles19:5 Ku baagambiire Daudi eby'abo bashaija, yaatuma ab'okubabugana, ahabw'okuba bakaba baine enshoni nyingi. Omugabe yaagira ati: Mugume Yeriko, okuhitsya ahu obureju bwanyu buraakurire, mukabona kwija." 
1Chronicles19:6 Abaamoni ku baamanyire ngu beetamiise Daudi, Hanuni n'Abaamoni baayohereza etalanta z'efeeza rukumi kupangisa ebigaari n'okuguriirira abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi, ebya Mesopotamia, Aramu-maaka na Zooba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Baapangisa ebigaari obukumi bushatu n'enkumi ibiri, baaguriirira omugabe wa Maaka n'eihe rye, baija, baateera orusiisira aharikureeba Medeba. Kandi Abaamoni baaruga omu ndembo zaabo, baateeranira hamwe kuza kurwana." 
1Chronicles19:8 Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaayohereza Yoabu n'eihe ryona ey'amamanzi." 
1Chronicles19:9 Abaamoni baashohora, baatenga orugamba aha irembo ry'orurembo, kandi abagabe, abaabaire baizire kuhurura, bakaba bari ahakwabo omu ishwa." 
1Chronicles19:10 Yoabu ku yaareebire engabo zimuri omumaisho n'enyima, yaatoorana abashaija entoore omu Baisraeli, yaabatengyesa orugamba kurwana n'Abaisira;" 
1Chronicles19:11 abandi boona yaabaha omurumuna Abishai, nabo baatenga orugamba kurwana n'Abaamoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Yoabu yaagira ati: Abasiria ku barankize amaani, oije ompe emikono; kandi naiwe Abaamoni ku baarakukize amaani, naanye niinyija kugikuha." 
1Chronicles19:13 Guma, turwane mashaija ahabw'eihanga ryaitu, n'ahabw'endembo za Ruhanga waitu; kandi MUKAMA akore eki arikusiima." 
1Chronicles19:14 Atyo Yoabu n'engabo ezi yaabaire aine bairira haihi kurwanisa Abasiria baahunga. 
1Chronicles19:15 Abaamoni ku baareebire Abasiria baahunga, nabo baahunga Abishai murumuna wa Yoabu, baayeroha omu rurembo. Bwanyima Yoabu yaatabaaruka, yaaza Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Kwonka Abasiria ku baareebire baabingwa Abaisraeli, baatuma entumwa, baahuruza Abasiria aba seeri y'omugyera Furaati, baija beebembeirwe Shofaki omukuru w'eihe ry'engabo za Hadadezeeri." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ku baakigambiire Daudi, nawe yaateerana Israeli yoona, baayambuka Yorudani, baahika ahu Abasiria baabaire bari, baatenga orugamba kubarwanisa. Daudi ku yaatengire orugamba kurwanisa Abasiria, baarwana nawe." 
1Chronicles19:18 Abasiria baahunga Abaisraeli; Daudi yaabaitamu abantu abarikurwanira omu bigaari enkumi mushanju, n'arikugyendesa ebigyere obukumi buna, yaita na Shofaki omukuru w'eihe ryabo." 
1Chronicles19:19 Abagaragwa ba Hadadezeeri ku baareebire baasingurwa Abaisraeli baayehongyera Daudi, baahinduka abairu be. N'ahabw'ekyo Abasiria baayanga kugaruka kuha Abaamoni emikono obundi." 
1Chronicles20:1 Omu kutandika kw'omwaka, omu bunaku obu abagabe baabaire bahururiramu, Yoabu akahurura, ayebembeireeihe, yaacwekyereza ensi y'Abaamoni, yaagyenda, yaagota Rabba; kwonka Daudi akaba ayetsigariire Yerusaalemu. Yoabu yaateera Rabba, yaagicwekyereza." 
1Chronicles20:2 Daudi yaiha omugabe waabo ekirunga aha mutwe; yaashanga kiine oburemeezi bw'etalanta emwe y'ezaabu, kandi kikaba kirimu eibaare ry'obuguzi bwingi; baakita ha mutwe gwa Daudi. Kandi omuri orwo rurembo yaanyagamu eminyago mingi munonga." 
1Chronicles20:3 Yaihamu abantu abaabaire barimu, yaabashara n'empango; okwo nikwo Daudi yaagizire endembo zoona ez'Abaamoni. Bwanyima Daudi n'engabo zoona baagaruka Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Bwanyima y'ebyo haabaho orugamba n'Abafilistia Gezeri; omuri orwo rugamba Sibekai owa Husha yaita Sipai ow'omuri baijukuru b'ebikaaka; Abafilistia baacwa eishaija. 
1Chronicles20:5 Haagaruka haabaho orugamba n'Abafilistia; Elihanani mwene Yairi yaitu Lahumi, murumuna wa Goliasi owa Gaasi, ou orubango rw'eicumu rye rwabaire nirwigangana empimbi ei barukiraho emyenda." 
1Chronicles20:6 Kandi haagaruka haabaho orugamba Gaasi. Okwo hakaba hariyo omushaija muraingwa munonga, owaabaire aine enkumu mukaaga ahari buri ngaro, n'enkumu z'ebigyere mukaaga ahari buri kigyere, zoona makumi abiri na ina; nawe akaba ari ow'omuri baijukuru b'ebikaaka." 
1Chronicles20:7 Ku yaahigire Abaisraeli, Yonasaani mwene Shimei mukuru wa Daudi yaamwita." 
1Chronicles20:8 Abo boona bakaba bari baijukuru b'ebikaaka bya Gaasi; baitwa Daudi n'abashaija be. 
1Chronicles21:1 Sitaane akeemerera kurwanisa Israeli, yaayosya Daudi kubara Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles21:2 N'ahabw'ekyo Daudi yaagira Yoabu n'abakuru b'eihe ati: Mugyende, mubare Abaisraeli okuruga Beeri-sheba okuhika Daani, mwije mungambire, mbone kumanya omubaro gwabo." 
1Chronicles21:3 Kwonka Yoabu yaagira ati: MUKAMA ayongyere aha bantu be okukira oku bari emirundi igana! Mukama wangye omugabe, abo boona t'abairu baawe? mbwenu eki nookyendera ki, mukama wangye? Ahabw'enki nooyenda kureetera Abaisraeli orubanja?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kwonka ekigambo ky'omugabe kyakiza ebya Yoabu amaani. Yoabu nikwo kugyenda naaraba omuri Israeli yoona, akagaruka Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Ku yaahikireyo, Yoabu yaaha Daudi omubaro gw'abantu abu yaabazire. Omuri Israeli yoona hakaba harimu abashaija enkwata-rurara akakaikuru n'akasiriira kamwe, n'omuri Yuda abashaija enkwata-rurara obusiriira buna n'obukumi mushanju." 
1Chronicles21:6 Kwonka omuri okwo kubara tiyaabariramu Baleevi n'obu baakuba Ababenyamiini; ahakuba ekiragiro ky'omugabe kikaba kimutamire. 
1Chronicles21:7 Kwonka ekigambo ekyo kyagwisa kubi Ruhanga, n'ahabw'ekyo yaateera Israeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Daudi yaagira Ruhanga ati: Ncumwire munonga ahabw'ekyo eki nkozire. Kwonka hati ninkweshengyereza iha aha mwiru waawe okutahikiirira, ahakuba ndengyesereize, naakora eky'obufa-mutima." 
1Chronicles21:9 MUKAMA yaagambira Gaadi omuhanuuzi wa Daudi ati: 
1Chronicles21:10 Gyenda ogambire Daudi oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Naakuha ebintu bishatu, oiheho kimwe, mbe nikyo naakukora." 
1Chronicles21:11 Atyo Gaadi yaija ahari Daudi, yaamugira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahari ebi byonshatu tooranaho kimwe eki orikwenda;" 
1Chronicles21:12 emyaka eshatu y'enjara; nari okucwekyerezibwa abazigu baawe, noitwa rurara yaabo okumara ameezi ashatu, nari ebiro bishatu bya rurara ya MUKAMA, orufu okujuumikira ensi, kandi na maraika wa MUKAMA naacwekyereza ensi ya Israeli yoona. Mbwenu gira eki waihamu, ongambire eki ndaagarukyemu ontumire." 
1Chronicles21:13 Daudi yaagira Gaadi ati: Naashobererwa kimwe; ka ngwe omu mikono ya MUKAMA, ahakuba embabazi ze ni nyingi munonga; ndekye kugwa omu mikono y'abantu." 
1Chronicles21:14 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaajuumikiza Israeli orufu, haafa Abaisraeli obukumi mushanju." 
1Chronicles21:15 Ruhanga yaatuma maraika Yerusaalemu kugicwekyereza; kwonka ku yaabaire ari haihi kugicwekyereza, MUKAMA yaareeba, yaayegarukamu ahabw'ao kabi; yaagira maraika owaabaire naacwekyereza, ati: Ekyo nikimara; banguura omukono. Obwo maraika wa MUKAMA akaba ari haihi n'embuga ya Orunaani Omuyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Daudi yaimutsya amaisho, yaareeba maraika wa MUKAMA ayemereire ahagati y'ensi n'eiguru, asyoireyo rurara, agyorekyeize Yerusaalemu. Ahonaaho Daudi n'abakuru baagwa ahasni bajuumaire, bajwaire ebiguniya." 
1Chronicles21:17 Daudi yaagira Ruhanga ati: Tiinye ndagiire kubara abantu? Niinye ncumwire, nkakora kuba munonga. Mbwenu entaama ezi zo zikozire ki? Ninkweshengyereza, MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, ba niinye waarwanisa n'enju ya tata; kwonka orekye kureeta orufu aha bantu baawe." 
1Chronicles21:18 Bwanyima maraika wa MUKAMA yaaragiira Gaadi kugambira Daudi ngu ainamukye ayombekyere MUKAMA eitambiro aha mbuga ya Orunaani Omuyebusi. 
1Chronicles21:19 Atyo Daudi yainamuka ahabw'ekigambo kya Gaadi, eki yaagamba omu iziina rya MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles21:20 Obwo Orunaani akaba naahuura engano; yaahinduka, yaareeba maraika, batabani be bana, abu yaabaire aine, baayeshereka." 
1Chronicles21:21 Daudi ku yaabaire naizira Orunaani, Orunaani yaimutsya amaisho, yaamureeba, ahonaaho yaaruga aha mbuga, yainama, yaamutangirira." 
1Chronicles21:22 Daudi yaagira Orunaani ati: Mpa ekibanja eki embuga yaawe erimu, nyombekyeremu MUKAMA eitambiro, orufu rubone kuruga aha bantu; kandi okinguze aha buguzi bwakyo bwona obukishemereire." 
1Chronicles21:23 Orunaani yaagira Daudi ati: Kitware, Nyakusinga omugabe! okore eki orikusiima kyona; reeba, naakuha ente z'ebitambo by'okwotsya, n'ebihuuzo obiihemu enkum n'engano ogiihemu empongano y'esaano. Byona naabikuha." 
1Chronicles21:24 Kwonka omugabe Daudi yaagira Orunaani ati: Ngaaha! kureka niinyija kukigura aha buguzi bwakyo bwona obukishemereire. Tindikwija kuhongyera MUKAMA ebyawe, n'obu kwakuba okutamba ebitambo eby'okwotsya, ebi ntaheereire byangye." 
1Chronicles21:25 Atyo Daudi yaarenga shekeli z'ezaabu magana mukaaga, yaaziihura Orunaani ahabw'ekibanja." 
1Chronicles21:26 Bwanyima Daudi yaayombekyerayo MUKAMA eitambiro, yaamuhongyera ebitambo by'okwotsya n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, yaashaba MUKAMA, nawe yaamugarukamu n'omuriro ogurikuruga omu iguru, gwagwa aha itambiro ry'ebitambo eby'okwotsya." 
1Chronicles21:27 Ahonaaho MUKAMA yaaragiira maraika; yaagarura rurara ye omu kyobati kyayo. 
1Chronicles21:28 Omu bunaku obwo Daudi ku yaareebire MUKAMA amugarukiiremu aha mbuga ya Orunaani Omuyebusi, yaatambirayo ebitambo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ahakuba Eihema rya MUKAMA, eri Musa yaakoreire omu ihamba, n'eitambiro ry'ebitambo by'okwotsya omu biro ebyo bikaba biri Gibeoni omu mwanya mukru gw'okuramizamu." 
1Chronicles21:30 Kwonka Daudi tiyaabaasa kuza omu maisho gaaryo kwehanuuza ahari Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba akaba atiinire rurara ya maraika wa MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles22:1 Bwanyima Daudi yaagira ati: Aha niho enju ya MUKAMA Ruhanga eriba, kandi n'eitambiro ry'okwokyezaho ebitambo ahabwa Israeli." 
1Chronicles22:2 Daudi yaaragiira kuteeranira hamwe abanyamahanga abaabaire bari omu nsi ya Israeli, yaata ababaizi b'amabaare kubaija ag'okwombekyesa enju ya Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles22:3 Kandi yaateekateeka ebyoma bingi by'okuheeshamu emisumaari y'enyigi z'amarembo, n'emiringa mingi munonga erengire kigyero," 
1Chronicles22:4 n'ebiti by'emyereez ebitarikubarwa; ahabw'okuba Abasidoni n'Abatuuro bakareetera Daudi emyereezi mingi. 
1Chronicles22:5 Ahakuba Daudi akagira ati: Sulemaani mutabani wangye akiri muto, takahamire, kandi enju erikwija kwombekyerwa MUKAMA eshemereire kuba ey'ekitiinisa kingi munonga, ekarangaanwa, ekahimbisibwa omu nsi zoona; n'ahabw'ekyo niinyija kugiteekateekyera eby'okugyombeka. Atyo Daudi yaateekateeka ebintu bingi munonga atakafiire." 
1Chronicles22:6 Bwanyima yaayeta omutabani Sulemaani, yaamwehanangiriza kwombekyera MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli enju." 
1Chronicles22:7 Yaagira Sulemaani ati: Mwana wangye, nkashangwa nkiine aha mutima kwombekyera eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye enju." 
1Chronicles22:8 Kwonka ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyizira, nikigira kiti: Okasheesha eshagama nyingi, waarwana engamba nyingi; toryombekyera iziina ryangye nju, ahabw'okuba okasheesha eshagama nyingi omu maisho gangye." 
1Chronicles22:9 Reeba, oryazaarirwa omwana, abe ow'obusingye; kandi ndyamuha obusingye aha bazigu be boona abariba bamwehinguririize; ahakuba ei ziina rye aryayetwa Sulemaani; kandi omu biro bye ndyaha Israeli obusingye n'okutuuza." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ogwo niwe aryombekyera eiziina ryangye enju. Aryaba omwana wangye, naanye mbe ishe; kandi ndyahamya ekitebe ky'obugabe bwe omuri Israeli ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles22:11 Mbwenu, mwana wangye, MUKAMA agume naiwe, obone kwombeka enju ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, ogiheze gye, nk'oku yaakugambireho." 
1Chronicles22:12 Kwonka, MUKAMA akuhe obwengye n'okwetegyereza, ku araakutegyekyese Israeli, oyorobere ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe." 
1Chronicles22:13 Obwo, ku orita omutima ha kworobera ebiragiro n'ebyatairweho ebi MUKAMA yaaragiira Musa ahabwa Israeli, oryaba gye. Ba ow'amaani, ogume; otatiina, kandi otahahaaza omutima." 
1Chronicles22:14 Reeba, omu kufa kubi kwangye nteekateekyeire enju ya MUKAMA etalanta z'ezaabu akasiriira kamwe, n'ez'efeeza akakaikuru, n'emiringa n'ebyoma ebirengire ekigyero, ahabw'okuba ni bingi munoga; kandi nteekateekire embaaho n'amabaare. Ahari ebyo naiwe oryayongyeraho." 
1Chronicles22:15 Kandi oine abakozi baingi munonga, ababaizi b'amabaare, abombeki, ababaizi, abanyamyoga b'emiringo yoona abatarikubarwa," 
1Chronicles22:16 abarikumanya kukoresa ezaabu, efeeza, emiringa n'ebyoma. Imuka okore! MUKAMA agume naiwe." 
1Chronicles22:17 Kandi Daudi yaaragiira abakuru ba Israeli boona kuhwera omutabani Sulemaani naagira ati: 
1Chronicles22:18 Timurikumanya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, ku ari hamwe naimwe? Kandi tabahaire obusignye embaju zoona? Ahabw'okuba akahayo abatuuzi b'ensi egi omu mikono yangye; kandi ensi egomoirwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA n'omu maisho g'bantu be." 
1Chronicles22:19 Mbwenu mute omutima gwanyu gwona aha kusherura MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu. Mwimukye, mwombekye Omwanya ogurikwera ogwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, mubone kureeta eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, n'ebintu ebirikwera bya Ruhanga, omu nju eryombekyerwa eiziina rye." 
1Chronicles23:1 Daudi ku yaakuzire, yaahika omu ngingo zaabukuru, yaayemeka omutabani Sulemaani kuba omugabe wa Israeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Yaateeranira hamwe abakuru ba Israeli boona, n'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Batyo baabara Abaleevi abahikize emyaka makumi ashatu n'abagirengize, boona baaba abashaija obukumi bushatu n'enkumi munaana." 
1Chronicles23:4 Daudi yaagira ati: Omuri aba, obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina bakwatsibwe omurimo gw'okuheereza omu nju ya MUKAMA, enkumi mukaaga babee abatware n'abaramuzi," 
1Chronicles23:5 enkumi ina babe abarinzi b'amarembo, kandi enkumi ina babe ab'okuhimbisa MUKAMA n'ebintu ebi nkozire ahabw'okuhimbisa." 
1Chronicles23:6 Daudi yaabacwamu ebicweka nk'oku batabani ba Leevi baabaire bari: Gereshoni, Kohasi na Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Batabani ba Gereshoni bakaba bari Ladani na Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Beene Ladani: omukuru Yehieli, naakuratwa Zesamu na Yoeli, boona bashatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Beene Shimei, Shelomiisi, Hazieli, na Harani, boona bashatu. Abo nibo baabaire bari abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru ba Ladani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Beene Shimei, Yahasi, Ziina, Yeushi na Beria. Abo bana bakaba bari beene Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahasi niwe yaabaire ari mukuru, naakuratwa Ziiza, kwonka Yeushi na Beria bakaba bataine baana b'aboojo baingi; nikyo kyabareeteire kubarwa nk'ab'enju emwe eya baishenkurubo." 
1Chronicles23:12 Batabani ba Kohasi: Amuraamu, Izuhaari, Heburooni na Uzieli, boona bana." 
1Chronicles23:13 Beene Amuraamu, Arooni na Musa. Kandi Arooni ogwo niwe yaashoroirwe kuba ow'okweza ebintu ebirikwera munonga, we n'oruzaaro rwe kuguma nibootera obubaane omu maisho ga MUKAMA nibamuheereza, kandi n'okushabira abantu omugisha omu iziina rye ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles23:14 Kwonka beene Musa omushaija wa Ruhanga bakaba nibabarirwa omu ruganda rwa leevi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Beene Musa, Gereshoni na Eliezeeri." 
1Chronicles23:16 Beene Gereshoni omukuru ni Shebueli. 
1Chronicles23:17 Beene Eliezeeri; Rehabia, niwe yaabaire ari mukuru, kandi Eliezeeri akaba ataine bandi baana b'aboojo, kwonka beene Rehabia bakaba bari baingi munonga." 
1Chronicles23:18 Beene Izuhaari, Shelomiisi niwe yaabaire ari mukuru." 
1Chronicles23:19 Beene Heburooni, Yeria niwe yaabaire ari mukuru, owa kabiri Amaria, owa kashatu Yahazieli, n'owa kana Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles23:20 Beene Uzieli, Miika niwe yaabaire ari mukuru, naakuratwa Ishia." 
1Chronicles23:21 Batabani ba Merari: Mahili na Muushi; beene Mahili, Eleazaari na Kiishi." 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazaari yaafa atazaire baana b'aboojo, kureka abaishiki bonka; beene waabo batabani ba Kiishi baabashwera." 
1Chronicles23:23 Beene Muushi, Mahili, Ederi na Yeremoosi, boona bashatu." 
1Chronicles23:24 Abo nibo baabaire bari batabani ba Leevi, nk'amaju ga baishenkurubo oku gaabaire gari, kandi inibo bakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, nk'oku baahandiikirwe, nibakuratira amaziina gaabo buri omwe, abahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'abagirengize, abaabaire bari ab'okukora omurimo gw'okuheereza omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles23:25 Ahabw'okuba Daudi akagira ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli ahaire abantu be obusingye; kandi atuura omuri Yerusaalemu ebiro byona. 
1Chronicles23:26 N'ahabw'ekyo Abaleevi tibakyetenga kuheeka Iheka, n'obu kyakuba ekintu kyona eky'okukoresa omurimo gwaryo;" 
1Chronicles23:27 (ahakuba ahabw'ekiragiro kya Daudi eky'aha muheru Abaleevi abahikize emayka makumi abiri n'abagirengize bakabarwa) 
1Chronicles23:28 kureka omurimo gwabo guryaba okuhwera beene Arooni ahabw'obuheereza omu nju ya MUKAMA, bakwatsiibwe ebibuga, ebishengye, okushemeza ebintu byona ebirikwera, kandi n'omurimo gwona ogw'okukora aha nju ya Ruhanga;" 
1Chronicles23:29 kandi n'okuhwera omu by'emigaati ey'okumurikwa, omu by'esaano ahabw'empongano z'esaano, omu bya capati z'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, omu by'empongano eziteekire, omu by'empongano ezijwangizemu amajuta, n'omu bigyero byona eby'okurengyesa obwingi n'obuhango." 
1Chronicles23:30 Buri kasheeshe baryayemerera basiime MUKAMA, nibamuhimbisa, kandi n'omu mwabazyo batyo;" 
1Chronicles23:31 kandi ku bariba nibahongyera MUKAMA ebitambo by'okwotsya ahari buri sabato, nari ahari buri kuboneka kw'okwezi, nari aha biro bikuru by'amagyenyi, nk'ebiragiro byabyo oku biri, bakore batyo obutoosha omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles23:32 Okwo nikwo baririnda Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, kandi bakaheereza beene waabo, beene Arooni, omu buheereza bw'omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles24:1 Embu za beene Arooni zikaba ziri ziti. Batabani ba Arooni: Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazaari na Itamaari." 
1Chronicles24:2 Kwonka Nadabu na Abihu bakabandiza ishebo kufa, kandi bakaba bataine baana; nikyo Eleazaari na Itamaari baabeereire abanyamurwa." 
1Chronicles24:3 Daudi yaahwerwa Zadoki ow'omuri beene Eleazaari, na Ahimeleki ow'omuri beene Itamaari, kubabaganisa omu buheereza bwabo nk'emirimo ei bateereirweho oku eri." 
1Chronicles24:4 Ahabwa beene Eleazaari kugira abantu bakuru baingi okweshumba beene Itamaari, baataho abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo ikumi na mukaaga omuri beene Eleazaari, na munaana omuri beene Itamaari." 
1Chronicles24:5 Baababaganisa n'enteenyu, boona omu muringo gumwe; ahakuba omuri beene Eleazaari n'omuri beene Itamaari hakaba harimu abatware b'Omwanya Ogurikwera, n'abatware ba Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles24:6 Bwanyima Shemaya mwene Netaneeli omuhandiiki ow'omu Baleevi yaabahandiikira omu maisho g'omugabe n'abanyiginya, na Zadoki omunyamurwa, na Ahimeleki mwne Abiasaari, n'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, enju emwe yaatooranirwa Eleazaari, n'endiijo Itamaari nibakuratana." 
1Chronicles24:7 Orubu rw'okubanza rwaba orwa Yehoyaribu, orwa kabiri Yedaaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 orwa kashatu Harimu, orwa kana Serorimi," 
1Chronicles24:9 orwa kataano Malukiya, orwa mukaaga Miyamiinu," 
1Chronicles24:10 orwa mushanju Hakozi, orwa munaana Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 orwa mwenda Yeshua, orwa ikumi Shekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 orwa ikumi na rumwe Eliashibu, orwa ikumi na ibiri Yakimi," 
1Chronicles24:13 orwa ikumi na ishatu Huupa, orwa ikumi na ina Yeshebeabu," 
1Chronicles24:14 orwa ikumi na itaano Biluga, orwa ikumi na mukaaga Imeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 orwa ikumi na mushanju Heziri, orwa ikumi na munaana Hapizeezi," 
1Chronicles24:16 orwa ikumi na mwenda Pesahia, orwa makumi abiri Yehezekeeli," 
1Chronicles24:17 orwa makumi abiri na rumwe Yakini, orwa makumi abiri na ibiri Gamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 orwa makumi abiri na ishatu Delaaya, orwa makumi abiri na ina Maaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Ezo nizo zaabaire ziri embu z'emirimo y'obuheereza bwabo okutaaha omu nju ya MUKAMA, nibakuratira emitwarize ei baateereirweho Arooni, ishenkurubo, nk'oku MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli yaamuragiire." 
1Chronicles24:20 Kandi abandi b'omuri beene Leevi nibo aba: omuri beene Amuraamu, Shubaeli; omuri beene Shubaeli, Yehodea;" 
1Chronicles24:21 Beene Rehabia; omuri beene Rehabia, omukuru Ishia." 
1Chronicles24:22 Beene Izuhaari: Shelomoosi; omuri beene Shelomoosi, Yahasi;" 
1Chronicles24:23 Beene Heburooni: omukuru Yeria, owa kabiri Amari; owa kashatu Yahazieli, owa kana Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles24:24 Beene Uzieli, Muika; omuri beene Miika, Shamiri." 
1Chronicles24:25 Murumuna wa Miika, Ishia; omuri beene Ishia, Zekaria." 
1Chronicles24:26 Beene Merari: Mahili na Muushi. Beene Yaaziya: Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Beene Merari: aba Yaaziya, Beno, Shohamu, Zakuri, na Iburi." 
1Chronicles24:28 Owa Mahili, Eleazaari, owaabaire ataine baana b'aboojo." 
1Chronicles24:29 Aba Kiishi, beene Kiishi Yerameeli." 
1Chronicles24:30 Beene Muushi, Mahili, Ederi na Yerimoosi. Abo nibo batabani ba beene Leevi nk'amaju ga baishenkurubo oku gaabare gari." 
1Chronicles24:31 kandi abo bakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, omukuru wa buri nju ya baishenkuru hamwe n'omurumuna, baateera enteenyu nka beene waabo beene Arooni, nibaziteerera omu maisho g'omugabe Daudi, na Zadoki na Ahimeleki, kandi n'omu maisho g'abakuru b'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi." 
1Chronicles25:1 Daudi n'abakuru b'omurimo gw'obuheereza omuri hekalu baashoroora bamwe omuri beene Asafu n'aba Hemani n'aba Yedusuuni ahabw'omurimo, ngu babe ab'okuragura n'enanga n'endingiri n'ebitaasa. Amaziina g'abaabaire nibakora ogwo murimo omu mbu zaabo nigo aga:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Omuri beene Asafu, Zakuri, Yosefu, Netania, na Ashareela, beene Asafu, abaabaire nibeebemberwa Asafu, naaragura nk'ekiragiro ky'omugabe oku kyabaire kiri." 
1Chronicles25:3 Aba Yedusuuni, beene Yedusuuni: Gedalia, Zeeri, Yeshaaya, Shiemei, Hashabia na Matisia, boona mukaaga nibeebemberwa ishebo Yedusuuni, owaabaire naaragura n'endingiri, naasiima MUKAMA kandi naamuhimbisa." 
1Chronicles25:4 Aba Hemani, beene Hemani: Bukia, Matania, Uzieli, Shebueli, na Yerimoosi, Hanania, Hanani, Eliata, Gidaliti, na Romamutiezeeri, Yoshibekasha, Maloosi, Hosiri na Mahaziosi." 
1Chronicles25:5 Abo boona bakaba bari beene Hemani omuhanuuzi w'omugabe, owaabaire naaanuura ebigambo bya Ruhanga eby'okumuha ekitiinisa; kandi Ruhanga yaaha Hemani abaana b'aboojo ikumi na bana, n'ab'abaishiki bashatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Abo boona bakaba beebemberwa ishebo, nibeeshongorera omu nju ya MUKAMA n'ebitaasa n'enanga n'endingiri, nibakora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu nju ya Ruhanga. Kandi Asafu na Yedusuuni na Hemani bakaba baragiirwa omugabe." 
1Chronicles25:7 Omubaro gwabo hamwe na beene waabo abaabaire beegyesiibwe okweshongorera MUKAMA, boona abaabaire nibakumanya gye, bakaba bari magana abiri na makumi munaana na munaana." 
1Chronicles25:8 Bwanyima baateerera emirimo yaabo enteenyu, abakuru n'abato, abeegyesa n'abeegi boona hamwe." 
1Chronicles25:9 Enteenyu y'okubanza yaakwata Yosefu ahabwa Asafu; eya kabiri, Gedalia na beene ishe n'abatabani, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:10 eya kashatu, Zakuri n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:11 eya kana, Izuri, n'abatabani ba beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:12 eya kataano, Netania n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:13 eya mukaaga, Bukia n'abatabani ba beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:14 eya mushanju, Yeshareela, n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri," 
1Chronicles25:15 eya munaana, Yeshaaya n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:16 eya mwenda, Matania n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:17 eya ikumi Shimei n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:18 eya ikumi n'emwe, Azareeli n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:19 eya ikumi na ibiri, Hashabia, n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:20 eya ikumi na ishatu, Shubaeli n'abatabani ba beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:21 eya ikumi na ina, Matisia, n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:22 eya ikumi na itaano Yeremoosi, n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri," 
1Chronicles25:23 eya ikumi na mukaaga, Hanania, n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:24 eya ikumi na mushanju Yeshebekasha, n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:25 eya ikumi na munaana, Hanani n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:26 eya ikumi na mwenda, Maloosi n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:27 eya makumi abiri, Eliasa n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:28 eya makumi abiri n'emwe, Hosiri n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:29 ey makumi abiri na ibiri, Gidaliti n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:30 eya makumi abiri na ishatu, Mahaziosi n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:31 n'eya makumi abiri na ina, Romamutiezeeri n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles26:1 Eby'embu z'abakumiirizi b'amarembo; ab'omu ba Koora, Meshelemia mwene Koore, ow'omuri beene Asafu." 
1Chronicles26:2 Kandi Meshelemia ogwo akaba aine abaana b'aboojo; ow'omujigaijo zekaria, owa kabiri Yedyaeli, owa kashatu Zebadia, owa kana Yatinyeli," 
1Chronicles26:3 owa kataano Elamu, owa mukaaga Yehohanani, owa mushanju Elyeho-enai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obededomu nawe akaba aine abatabani: ow'omujigaijo Shemaaya, owa kabiri Yehozabadi, owa kashatu Yoa, owa kana Skari, owa kataano Netaneeli," 
1Chronicles26:5 owa mukaaga Amieli, owa mushanju Isakaari, owa munaana Peulesa; ahakuba Ruhanga akamuha omugisha." 
1Chronicles26:6 Kandi omutabani Shemaaya akazaara abaana b'aboojo, abaabaire bari abategyeki omu maju ga baishenkurubo; ahabw'okuba bakaba bari abashaija b'amaani amamanzi." 
1Chronicles26:7 Beene Shemaaya: otuni, Refaeli, Ebedi, Elizabaadi na beene ishe abaabaire bari amamanzi, Elihu na Semakia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Abo boona bakaba bari beene Obededomu hamwe na batabani baabo na beene ishebo, abashaija b'amaani abaabaire nibabaasa ogwo murimo; aba Obededomu boona bakaba bari makumi mukaaga na babiri." 
1Chronicles26:9 Kandi Meshelemia akaba aine abatabani na beene ishe, aqbashaija amamanzi ikumi na munaana." 
1Chronicles26:10 Na Hoosa ow'omuri beene Merari akaba aine abatabani: omukuru ari Shimuri, (ahakuba n'obu araabe yaabaire atari w'omujigaijo, ishe akamuhindura mukuru)," 
1Chronicles26:11 owa kabiri Hilukia, owa kashatu Tebalia, n'owa kana Zekaria; batabani ba Hoosa na beene ishe boona bakaba bari ikumi na bashatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Abakumiirizi b'amarembo omuri ezo mbu, nk'abakuru baabo oku baabaire bari, bakaba baine emirimo ei bakwatsiibwe, nka beene waabo abaabaire nibaheereza omu nju ya MUKAMA oku baabaire bagiine;" 
1Chronicles26:13 kandi baateerera amaju ga baishenkurubo enteenyu, amakye n'amahango, kumanya ab'okurinda amarembo gaabo." 
1Chronicles26:14 Enteenyu yaakwata Shelemia kurinda eirembo ry'oburugwa-izooba. Bwanyima baateerera omutabani Zekaria enteenyu, omuhanuuzi w'obwengye; yaakwatwa ey'okurinda ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obededomu yaakwata ey'okurinda ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo; kandi abatabani baakwatsibwa eibiikiro. 
1Chronicles26:16 Shupimu na Hoosa baakwatwa ey'okurinda eirembo ry'oburengyerwa-izooba, n'eirembo rya Shalekesi aha muhanda ogurikwinamuka, ahu abakumiirizi barikureebanira." 
1Chronicles26:17 Aha burugwa-izooba haazaho mukaaga buri izooba, aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bana buri izooba; aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bana, kandi n'aha ibiikiro babiri-babiri;" 
1Chronicles26:18 ahari Paribaari oburengyerwa-izooba bana ahari ogwo muhanda, na babiri ahari Paribaari." 
1Chronicles26:19 Ezo nizo mbu z'abakumiirizi b'amarembo b'omuri beene Koore, na beene Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Kandi ab'omu Baleevi, Ahiya niwe yaabaire akwatsiibwe amabiikiro g'enju ya Ruhanga n'amabiikiro g'ebintu ebyeziibwe." 
1Chronicles26:21 Beene Ladani, beene Gereshon ab'omu ba Ladani, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo ba Ladani owa Gereshoni: Yahieli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Beene Yehieli, Zetami na Yoeli omurumuna nibo baabaire bakwatsiibwe amabiikiro g'enju ya MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles26:23 Omu ba Amuraamu, Abaizuhaari, Abaheburooni n'Abauzieli-" 
1Chronicles26:24 na Shebueli mwene Gereshoni, mwijukuru wa Musa, niwe yaabaire akwatsiibwe amabiikiro." 
1Chronicles26:25 Beene ishe Eliezeeri akakomookwaho Rehabia omutabani, mwene Rehebia Yeshaaya, mwene Yeshaaya Yoramu, mwene Yoramu Zikuri, mwene Zikuri Shelomoosi;" 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelemoosi ogwo na beene ishe nibo baabaire bakwatsiibwe amabiikiro goona ag'ebintu ebyeziibwe, ebi Daudi omugabe n'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo n'abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'aba igana-igana n'abakuru b'amahe, baayerize." 
1Chronicles26:27 Omu bintu ebi baanyagire omu ngamba bakashorooramu ebintu by'okuhunduuza enju ya MUKAMA. 
1Chronicles26:28 Kandi ebi Samueli omuhanuuzi na Saulo mwene Kiishi, na Abuneeri mwene Neeri, na Yoabu mwene Zeruiya baayerize byona, ebi omuntu weena yaabaire ahongyeire MUKAMA byona bikaba birindwa Shelomoosi na beene ishe." 
1Chronicles26:29 Omuri beene Izuhaari, Kanania n'abatabani nibo baabaire bakwatsiibwe omurimo gw'aheeru ahabw'Abaisraeli, bari abatware n'abaramuzi." 
1Chronicles26:30 Omuri beene Heburooni, Hashabia ana beene ishe, abashaija amamanzi rukumi na magana mushanju, nibo baabaire nibareeberera Israeli oburengyerwa-izooba bwa Yorudani ahabw'omurimo gwa MUKAMA gwona, n'ahabw'omurimo gw'omugabe." 
1Chronicles26:31 Omu ba Heburooni abo Yeriya niwe yaabaire ari omukuru waabo, nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rw'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo oku kwabaire kuri. (Omu mwaka gwa makumi ana ogw'omu busingye bwa Daudi bakasherura, baashanga omuri abo ba Heburooni abashaija b'amaani amamanzi, bari Yazeri omuri Gileadi.)" 
1Chronicles26:32 Omugabe Daudi yaataho Yeriya ogwo na beene ishe, abashaija amamanzi enkumi ibiri na magana mushanju, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, kuba ab'okureeberera Abareubeeni, Abagaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase, ahabw'ebintu bya Ruhanga byona, kandi n'eby'omugabe." 
1Chronicles27:1 Aga nigo maziina g'Abaisraeli, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'aba igana-igana n'abatware baabo abaabaire nibaheereza omugabe omu murimo gw'okureeberera abantu omu by'okwihaihana kw'embu zaabo, buri rubu rukaba rurimu abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:2 Yashobeamu mwene Zabudieli niwe yaabaire naareeberera orubu rw'okubanza omu kwezi kw'okubanza; ab'orubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
1Chronicles27:3 Akaba ari ow'omuri baijukuru ba Pereezi, kandi ari omutegyeki mukuru w'abakuru b'amahe boona omu kwezi kw'okubanza." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodai owa Ahohi niwe yaabaire naareeberera ab'orubu rw'okwezi kwa kabiri; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
1Chronicles27:5 Omukuru wa kashatu omu kwezi kwa kashatu akaba ari Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada omunyamurwa mukuru; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaaya ogwo niwe yaabaire ari omushaija w'amaani ow'omuri bari amakumi ashatu, kandi ari omukuru waabo. Amizabaadi omutabani akaba ari omu rubu rwe." 
1Chronicles27:7 Asaheeli murumuna wa Yoabu niwe yaabaire ari omukuru wa kana omu kwezi kwa kana, naakuratwa omutabani Zebadia; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:8 Omukuru wa kataano omu kwezi kwa kataano akaba ari Shamuhuusi owa Izuraahi; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
1Chronicles27:9 Omukuru wa mukaaga omu kwezi kwa mukaaga akaba ari Iira mwene Ikeshi owa Tekoa; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
1Chronicles27:10 Omukuru wa mushanju omu kwezi kwa mushanju akaba ari Helezi owa Pelooni ow'omuri beene Efuraimu; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
1Chronicles27:11 Owa munaana omu kwezi kwa munaana akaba ari Sibekai, owa Huusha, ow'omu ba Zeera; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:12 Owa mwenda omu kwezi kwa mwenda akaba ari Abiezeeri owa Anatoosi, Omubenyamiini; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:13 Owa ikumi, omu kwezi kwa ikumi akaba ari Maharai owa Netofa, ow'omu ba Zeera; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:14 Owa ikumi n'omwe omu kwezi kwa ikumi na kumwe akaba ari Benaaya owa Piratooni ow'omuri beene Efuraimu; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
1Chronicles27:15 Owa ikumi na babiri omu kwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri akaba ari Heludai owa Netofa mwene Otinyeli; ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
1Chronicles27:16 Kandi abategyeki b'enganda za Israeli nibo aba; omukuru w'Abareubeeni akaba ari Eliezeeri mwene Zikuri; ow'Abasimeoni, Shefatia mwwene Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 ow'Abaleevi, Hashabia mwene Kemueli; ow'aba Arooni, Zadoki;" 
1Chronicles27:18 ow'Abayuda, Elihu omwe ahari bakuru ba Daudi; ow'Abaisakaari, Omuri mwene Mikaeli;" 
1Chronicles27:19 ow'Abazebuluuni, Ishimaaya, mwene Obadia; ow'Abanafutaali, Yeremoosi mwene Azurieli;" 
1Chronicles27:20 ow'Abaefuraimu, Hoshea mwene Azazia; ow'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase, Yoeli mwene Pedaya;" 
1Chronicles27:21 ow'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase eky'omuri Gileadi, Ido mwene Zekaria; ow'Ababenyamiini, Yaasieli mwene Abuneeri;" 
1Chronicles27:22 ow'Abadaani, Azareeli mwene Yerohaamu. Abo nibo baabaire bari abakuru b'enganda za Israeli." 
1Chronicles27:23 Kwonka Daudi tarabazire batakahikize myaka makumi abiri, ahakuba MUKAMA akagamba ku arikanyisa Abaisraeli, bakaba nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yoabu mwene Zeruiya yaatandika kubara, kwonka tiyaaheza; nikyo ekiniga kyaiziire ahari Israeli, kandi omubaro ogwo tiguhandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'omugabe Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Omureeberezi w'amabiikiro g'omugabe akaba ari Azimaveesi mwene Adieli; ow'amabiikiro g'omu byaro, omu ndembo, omu birorero n'omu bigo, Yonasaani mwene Uziya;" 
1Chronicles27:26 ow'abahingi b'omu misiri, Ezeri mwene Kelubu;" 
1Chronicles27:27 ow'emisiri y'emizaabibu Shimei owa Raama; ow'ebirikuruga omu mizaabibu eby'okubiikwa omu mabiikiro ga viinyo, Zabudi owa Shiifu;" 
1Chronicles27:28 ow'emiti y'emizeituuni n'emisikamoori ey'omu ruhita, Baali-hanani owa Gederi; ow'amabiikiro g'amajuta, Yoashi;" 
1Chronicles27:29 ow'amasyo agaabaire gagisiire Sharooni, Shiturai owa Sharooni; ow'amasyo agaabaire gagisiire omu mpita, Shafati mwene Adulai;" 
1Chronicles27:30 ow'engamira, Ebili owa Ishimaeli; ow'endogoya, Yehedeeya owa Meranoosi; kandi ow'obusyo bw'entaama, Yazizi owa Hagiri." 
1Chronicles27:31 Abo boona nibo baabaire bari ababiiki b'ebintu bya Daudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonasaani ishento wa Daudi niwe yaabaire ari omuhanuuzi, omushaija orikwetegyereza kandi omuhandiiki; we na Yehieli mwene Hakimooni nibo baabaire nibarera abaana b'omugabe." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahisofeeli akaba ari omuhanuuzi w'omugabe, na Hushai owa Aruki ari munywani w'omugabe." 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahisofeeli akakuratwa Yehoyaada mwene Benaaya, na Abiasaari. Kandi Yoabu niwe yaabaire ari omukuru w'eihe ry'omugabe." 
1Chronicles28:1 Daudi yaateeranira Yerusaalemu abakuru ba Israeli boona, ab'enganda n'abategyeki b'emitwe y'abantu abaabaire baheereza omugabe omu mbu, n'abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, n'aba igana-igana, n'ababiiki b'ebintu by'omugabe, abarikureeberera amasyo ge n'ag'abatabani, hamwe n'abakuru b'ekikaari, n'abashaija bari ab'amaani amamanzi boona." 
1Chronicles28:2 Bwanyima Daudi yaimuka, yaagira ati: Imwe beene tata n'abashaija bangye, mumpurire. Nkashangwa nkiinie aha mutima kwombekyera eshanduukye y'endaagano ya MUKAMA enju y'okugitamu, n'okuba akatebe k'ebigyere ka Ruhanga; kandi nikwo naabaire nyetegwire ntyo." 
1Chronicles28:3 Kwonka Ruhanga yangira ati: Torikwija kwombekyera iziina ryangye nju, ahabw'okuba ori omushaija omurwani, kandi okasheesha eshagama nyingi." 
1Chronicles28:4 N'obu kiraabe kyabaire kiri kityo, MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli akantoorana omu ruganda rwa baatatenkuru rwona kuba omugabe wa Israeli ebiro byona; ahabw'okuba akatoorana Yuda kuba omwebembezi, omu ruganda rwa Yuda yaatoorana enju ya tata, kandi omuri beene tata yaaba niinye yaihamu, yanshemerererwa, yangira omugabe wa Israeli yoona." 
1Chronicles28:5 bwenu omuri batabani bangye boona, (ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akampa abaana b'aboojo baingi,) yaatooranamu mutabani wangye Sulemaani kuba niwe yaaza aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa MUKAMA kutegyeka Israeli." 
1Chronicles28:6 Yangira ati: Mutabani waawe Sulemaani niwe aryombeka enju yangye, n'ebikaari byangye, ahabw'okuba mmutooraine kuba omwana wangye, naanye nkaba ishe." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ku arigumizamu kworobera ebiragiro byangye n'ebi naataireho, nk'oku ari hati, ndyahamya obugabe bwe." 
1Chronicles28:8 N'ahabw'ekyo hati omu maisho ga Israeli yoona, nigwo mutwe gw'abantu ba MUKAMA abateeraine, kandi omu maisho ga Ruhanga waitu orikutuhurira, mute omutima aha biragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu byona, mubiijukye, mubone kukubuura ensi egi enungi, nyentsya mugitsigire abaana baanyu abaribakurata, ebe obuhunguzi bwabo ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles28:9 Naiwe Sulemaani mwana wangye, omanye Ruhanga wa sho, ogume omuheereze n'omutima gwawe gwona kandi ogwekundiire; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA acaaka emitima yoona, kandi amanya enaama zoona n'ebiteekateeko byona. Ku orimusherura, oryamubona; kwonka ku orimurugaho, aryakucwa obutagaruka." 
1Chronicles28:10 N'ahabw'ekyo mbwenu oyerinda; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akutooraine kwombekyera Obutaaho bwe enju: ba ow'amaani, ogikore." 
1Chronicles28:11 Bwanyima Daudi yaaha omutabani Sulemaani eky'okureeberaho ky'ekisasi kya hekalu, n'eky'amaju gaayo, n'eky'amabiikiro gaayo, n'eky'ebishengye byayo eby'ahaiguru, n'eby'omunda, n'eky'ekishengye ky'ekitebe ky'okusaasira;" 
1Chronicles28:12 kandi eky'okureeberaho ky'ebi yaabaire aine omu mutima byona, eky'ebikaari by'enju ya MUKAMA, n'ebishengye byona ebigyehinguririize, n'amabiikiro g'enju ya Ruhanga, n'ag'ebintu by'emitoijo ebyashoroirwe;" 
1Chronicles28:13 kandi n'eby'embu z'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, n'eby'emirimo yoona ey'okukorerwa omu nju ya MUKAMA; n'eby'ebintu byona eby'okukoresibwa omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles28:14 Kandi yaamugambira oburemeezi bw'ezaabu ahabw'ebintu by'ezaabu eby'okukoresa emirimo yoona, n'oburemeezi bw'efeeza ahabw'ebintu by'efeeza ahabw'emirimo yoona," 
1Chronicles28:15 n'oburemeezi bwe'ekikondo ky'amatabaaza n'amatabaaza gaakyo eby'ezaabu, n'oburemeezi bw'ezaabu ahabw'ekikondo kyona n'amataabaza gaakyo, nka buri kikondo oku kirikoresibwa omu buheereza bwabo," 
1Chronicles28:16 n'oburemeezi bw'ezaabu za buri meeza y'emigaati y'okumurikwa, n'obw'efeeza ahabw'emeeza z'efeeza," 
1Chronicles28:17 n'obw'ezaabu eshemeziibwe ahabw'eby'okwihuza enyama, n'enyabya, n'ebikopo; n'obw'ezaabu za buru bakuri y'ezaabu, n'obw'efeeza za buri bakuri y'efeeza;" 
1Chronicles28:18 kandi n'eky'okureeberaho ky'eitambiro ry'okwotereraho obubaane, ery'okukorwa omu zaabu eshemeziibwe, n'oburemeezi bwayo; kandi n'eky'okureeberaho ky'ekigaari ky'ezaabu ekya baakerubi, abashashanwire amapapa gaabo, gakashweka eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA." 
1Chronicles28:19 Daudi yaagira ati: Ebyo byona nkabimanyisibwa ebyahandiikirwe omukono gwa MUKAMA; egyo niyo mirimo yoona nk'eky'okureeberaho kyayo oku kiri. 
1Chronicles28:20 Bwanyima Daudi yaagira omutabani Sulemaani ati: Ba ow'amaani, ohame, okikore. Otatiina, kandi otahahaaza omutima; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga, niwe Ruhanga wangye, ari hamwe naiwe; tarikutsigaho, kandi tarikuhemukaho, okuhitsya ahu emirimo yoona ey'ebirikorwa omu nju ya MUKAMA erihwera." 
1Chronicles28:21 Kandi reeba, hariho embu z'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi ahabw'omurimo gwona ogw'obuheereza bw'omu nju ya Ruhanga; kandi omuri egyo mirimo yoona, oryaba oine omuntu weena oyekundiire, omunyamwoga w'okukora omurimo gwa buri muringo; kandi n'abategyeki hamwe n'abantu boona baryaba bari omu bushoboorozi bwawe kuhurira eki orikubaragiira." 
1Chronicles29:1 Bwanyima omugabe Daudi yaagambira omutwe gwona ogwabaire guteeraine ati: Mutabani wangye Sulemaani, ou Ruhanga atooraine wenka, akiri muto, takahamire, kandi omurimo ni muhango; ahabw'okuba enju teriba nju y'abantu, kureka eryaba eya MUKAMA Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles29:2 N'ahabw'ekyo ntegwire enju ya Ruhanga wangye, nk'oku ndikubaasa, naatunga ezaabu ahabw'ebintu by'ezaabu, efeeza ahabw'ebintu by'efeeza, emiringa ahabw'ebintu by'emiringa, ebyoma ahabw'ebintu by'ebyoma, n'ebiti ahabw'ebintu by'ebiti, otabariireho mabaare amaingi agarikwetwa shohamu, n'agandi mabaare maingi g'okuhunda, n'amabaare garikwengyengyeta ag'amabara maingi n'ag'obuguzi bwingi ag'emiringo yoona, n'agarikwetwa marimaari agatarikubarwa." 
1Chronicles29:3 Kandi ahabw'okukunda oku nyine aha nju ya Ruhanga wangye, nk'oku nyine obutungi bwangye ahabwangye obw'ezaabu n'efeeza, mbwenu naabuhayo ahabw'enju ya Ruhanga wangye, okwongyera ahari ebyo byona ebi naateekateekyeire egyo nju erikwera;" 
1Chronicles29:4 n'etalanta z'ezaabu za Ofiri enkumi ishatu, ez'efeeza eshemeziibwe enkumi mushanju ez'okushweka ebisiika by'enju," 
1Chronicles29:5 ezaabu ahabw'ebintu by'ezaabu, n'efeeza ahabw'ebintu by'efeeza, ebirikukorwa abanyamyoga b'obwengye. Mbwenu eri izooba n'oha orikwikiriza kugira eki yaahayo, naayeyereza MUKAMA?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Bwanyima abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, n'abeebembezi b'enganda za Israeli, n'abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, n'aba igana-igana, n'abategyeki b'emirimo y'omugabe, baahayo ebintu byabo n'omutima gwekundiire." 
1Chronicles29:7 Baahayo etalanta z'ezaabu enkumi itaano na dariki kakumi, etalanta z'efeeza kakumi, ez'emiringa kakumi n'enkumi munaana, n'etalanta z'ebyoma akasiriira, ahabw'omurimo gw'enju ya Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles29:8 Kandi omuntu weena owaabaire aine amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi, yaagahayo, baagata omu ibikiro ry'enju ya MUKAMA kurindwa Yehieli owa Gereshoni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Bwanyima abantu baashemererwa, ahabw'okuba abo bantu bakahayo n'omutima ogwekundiire; ahakuba bakahongyera MUKAMA n'omutima gwabo gwona batarikugyemwa; kandi n'omugabe Daudi yaashemererwa munonga." 
1Chronicles29:10 N'ahabw'ekyo Daudi yaasiimire MUKAMA omu maisho g'omutwe gwona ogw'abantu abaabaire bateeraine, naagira ati: MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli tatenkuriitwe, osiimwe ebiro n'ebiro." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ai MUKAMA, obukuru, obushoboorozi, ekitiinisa, obusinguzi n'okutiinwa n'ebyawe; ahakuba ebiri omu iguru n'eby'omu nsi byona n'ebyawe; obukam n'obwawe, ai MUKAMA, kandi ohimbisibwa ahabw'okuba Omutwe gwa byona." 
1Chronicles29:12 Obutungi n'ekitiinisa niiwe bikomookaho, kandi otegyeka byona. Omu mukono gwawe harimu obushoboorozi n'amaani, kandi niiwe orikubaasa kukuza, n'okuha boona amaani." 
1Chronicles29:13 Mwenu hati, Ruhanga waitu, nitukusiima, kandi nitusingiza eiziina ryawe ery'ekitiinisa." 
1Chronicles29:14 Mbwenu nkaanye ndi oha, nyowe n'abantu bangye, okubaasa kukuhongyera tuti n'omutima gwekundiire? Ahakuba byona biruga ahariiwe, kandi ebi twakuha n'ebyawe." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ahabw'okuba omu maisho gaawe turi abagyenyi n'abashuhuuki, nka baatatenkuriitwe boona oku baabaire bari; ebiro ebi tumara aha nsi ni nk'ekicuucu, tihariho matsiko g'okumereera." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, ebintu ebi byona ebingi, ebi tuteekateekire kukwombekyera enju ahabw'eiziina ryawe eririkwera, birugire omu mukono gwawe, kandi byona n'ebyawe." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ruhanga wangye, nimmanya ngu ocaaka emitima, kandi oshemerererwa amazima; naanye ahabwangye naahonga ebintu ebi byona n'omutima gw'amazima ntarikugyemwa; kandi hati naareeba abantu baawe abari aha nibakuhongyera n'okushemererwa kwingi batarikugyemwa." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ai MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, owa Isaaka, kandi n'owa Israeli baatatenkuriitwe, ebi obihamye omu biteekateeko by'omu mitima y'abantu baawe; otebeekanise emitima yaabo, ebe niiwe yaazaho." 
1Chronicles29:19 Kandi mutabani wangye Sulemaani, omuhe kworobera ebiragiro byawe n'ebi waahamize n'ebyatairweho n'omutima gwe gwona, akore ebyo byona, kandi ayombekye nyaruju ei naateekateekire kwombeka." 
1Chronicles29:20 Bwanyima Daudi yaagambira omutwe gwona ati: Musiime MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu. Batyo abantu boona abaabaire bateeraine baasiima MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo, bainika emitwe yaabo, baaramya MUKAMA, kandi baatangirira omugabe." 
1Chronicles29:21 Ku bwaseesire, baatambira MUKAMA ebitambo, kandi baamuhongyera empongano z'ebitambo by'okwotsya, enimi rukumi, empaya z'entaama rukumi, n'abaana b'entaama rukumi, hamwe n'empongano zaabyo z'eby'okunywa n'ebindi bitambo bingi munonga ahabwa Israeli yoona;" 
1Chronicles29:22 eryo izooba baarya, baanywa bashemereirwe, bari omu maisho ga MUKAMA. Baagaruka baayemeka Sulemaani mwene Daudi omugabe obwa kabiri, baamushukaho amajuta g'okumushoroorera MUKAMA kuba omugabe, na Zadoki kuba omunyamurwa." 
1Chronicles29:23 Atyo Sulemaani yaaza aha kitebe ky'obugabe ekya MUKAMA, yaaba omugabe omu mwanya gwa Daudi ishe; yaaba gye, Abaisraeli boona baamutiina." 
1Chronicles29:24 Abeebembezi boona n'abashaija amamanzi, kandi na batabani b'omugabe Daudi boona baahiga omu maisho g'omugabe Sulemaani, ku barikwija kuba abashaija be." 
1Chronicles29:25 MUKAMA yaakuza Sulemaani munonga omu maisho ga Israeli yoona, yaamuha ekitiinisa ky'obugabe ekitakabaga ha mugabe weena owaamubandiize omuri Israeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Okwo nikwo Daudi mwene Yese yaategyekire Israeli yoona. 
1Chronicles29:27 Emyaka ei yaamazire naategyeka Israeli ekahika makumi ana; emyaka mushanju akagimara Heburooni, kandi emyaka makumi ashatu n'eshatu yaagimara Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Bwanyima yaafa, yaahikire omu ngingo zaabukuru, amazire ebiro bingi ari omutungi munonga, kandi aine ekitiinisa kingi; omutabani Sulemaani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles29:29 Ebi omugabe Daudi yaakozire byona, okwiha aha by'okubanza okuhitsya aha by'aha muheru, bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebyabaireho ekya Samueli omuhanuuzi, n'ekya Nasani nabi, kandi n'ekya Gaadi omuhanuuzi," 
1Chronicles29:30 hamwe n'eby'obutegyeki bwe bwona, n'eby'amaani ge, n'ebyamubaireho, n'ahari Israeli kandi n'aha bugabe bwona obw'ezo nsi." 
2Chronicles1:1 Sulemaani mwene Daudi akahamibwa omu bugabe bwe, MUKAMA Ruhanga we yaaguma nawe, yamukuza munonga." 
2Chronicles1:2 Sulemaani yaagamba na Israeli yoona, abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'aba igana-igana, abaramuzi, n'abeembezi ba Israeli boona, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles1:3 Kandi Sulemaani hamwe n'omutwe gwona ogw'abantu baaza Gibeoni omu mwanya, mukuru gw'okuramizamu; ahabw'okuba niyo Eihema rya Ruhanga ry'okubugaabuganiramu, eri Musa omwiru wa MUKAMA yaakozire omu ihamba, ryabaire riri." 
2Chronicles1:4 (Kwonka eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, Daudi akaba agiinamwire, agiihire Kiryasi-yearimu, agitwaire omu mwanya ogu yaabaire agibonereize; ahakuba akaba agiteereire eihema Yerusaalemu.)" 
2Chronicles1:5 Kandi eitambiro ry'emiringa eryakozirwe Bezaleeli mwene Uuri, mwijukuru wa Huuri, niyo ryabaire riri omu maisho g'Obutaaho bwa MUKAMA. Okwo niyo Sulemaani n'omutwe gw'abantu baabaire baza kusherura MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles1:6 Ku baahikireyo, Sulemaani yaaza aha itambiro ry'emiringa omu maisho ga MUKAMA, eryabaire riri omu maisho g'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, yaaritambiraho ebitambo rukumi by'okwotsya." 
2Chronicles1:7 Ekyo kiro Ruhanga yaayeyoreka Sulemaani, yaamugira ati: Shaba eki orikwenda ngu nkuhe." 
2Chronicles1:8 Sulemaani yaagira Ruhanga ati: Okagirira tata Daudi embabazi nyingi, wangira omugabe omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles1:9 Mbwenu MUKAMA Ruhanga, eki waaraganiise tata Daudi kihikiirizibwe; ahakuba ongizire omugabe w'abantu abarikwingana omucuucu gw'aha nsi." 
2Chronicles1:10 N'ahabw'ekyo hati ninkushaba obwengye n'okwetegyereza oku ndaagume nintwaza omu maisho g'aba bantu omu kushohora n'omu kutaaha; ahatari ekyo, n'oha orikubaasa kutegyeka abantu baawe aba abarikwingana bati?" 
2Chronicles1:11 Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Ahabw'okuba ekyo nikyo kibairi kikuri aha mutima, kandi tiwaayeshabira bintu, nari obutungi, nari ekitiinisa, nari okushabira abazigu baawe kufa, n'obu kwakuba okweshabire okuramaara, kureka waayeshabira obwengye n'okwetegyereza, ngu obone kutegyeka abantu bangye, abu nkwemekyeire," 
2Chronicles1:12 mbwenu obwengye n'okwetegyereza waabiheebwa, kandi ndyakuha obutungi, ebintu n'ekitiinisa, ebitakagirwaga mugabe weena omu baakubandiize, kandi n'omu barikukurata tihaine oribigira." 
2Chronicles1:13 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaaruga Gibeoni omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, eryabaire riri omu mwanya mukuru gw'okuramizamu, yaagaruka Yerusaalemu; yaategyeka Israeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaateeranira hamwe ebigaari n'abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi; ebigaari bye bikaba biri rukumi n'amagana ana, n'abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi kakumi n'enkumi ibiri; yaabata omu ndembo z'ebigaari n'omuri Yerusaalemu ahu yaabaire ari." 
2Chronicles1:15 Omugabe yaareetera Yerusaalemu okugira efeeza n'ezaabu nyingi nk'amabaare, n'ebiti by'emyereezi byaba nk'emisikamoori y'omu mpita." 
2Chronicles1:16 Embaraasi ezi Sulemaani yaabaire atungire, bakaba baziiha Misri; abashuubuzi b'omugabe bakaba bazigura omu busyo, buri busyo bwine obuguzi bwabwo." 
2Chronicles1:17 Kandi ekigaari kikaba kiihwa Misri ahari shekeli z'efeeza magana mukaaga, n'embaraasi ahari igana na makumi ataano; kandi abashuubuzi ku baabaire bazireeta, baziguza abagabe boona ab'Abahiiti n'ab'Abasiria." 
2Chronicles2:1 Omu biro ebyo Sulemaani akamariira kwombekyera eiziina rya MUKAMA hekalu, kandi n'okweyombekyera nyaruju y'obugabe." 
2Chronicles2:2 Yaataho abantu obukumi mushanju b'okwekorera, obukumi munaan b'okuhigura amabaare omu nshozi, n'enkumi ishatu na magana mukaaga b'okubareeberera." 
2Chronicles2:3 Kandi Sulemaani yaatuma ahari Hiraamu omugabe wa Tuuro, ati: Nk'oku waabaire ogirira tata Daudi, okamutwekyera emyereezi y'okweyombekyera enju y'okutaahamu, naanye obe nikwo wangirira." 
2Chronicles2:4 Reeba, niinyenda kwombekyera eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye enju, n'okugimushoroorera, ngu mbone kugyotereramu obubaane oburikutaamirana omu maisho ge n'okuguma nimpongyeramu emigaati y'okumurikwa, n'okutambiramu ebitambo by'okwotsya obutoosha omu kasheeshe n'omu mwabazyo, ahari sabato, aha kuboneka kw'okwezi, n'aha magyenyi ga MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu agatairweho, nk'oku byaragiirwe Abaisraeli kuguma nibabikora ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles2:5 Enju ei ndikwenda kwombeka neija kuba mpango munonga; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga waitu ni mukuru okukira baaruhanga boona. 
2Chronicles2:6 Mbwenu n'oha orikubaasa kumwombekyera enju, ku araabe atarikuhika mu iguru, n'obu ryakuba iguru eririkweshumba agandi? Mbwenu niinye oha kumwombekyera enju, kureka ebe ey'okwotereramu obubaane omu maisho ge?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Mbwenu nyoherereza omushaija omunyamyoga, ow'okukora eby'ezaabu, eby'efeeza, eby'emiringa, n'eby'ebyoma, kandi n'eby'emyenda ya bujwa, eya karari, n'eya bururu, kandi orikumanya kusharura amabara, agume n'abanyamyoga abu nyine omuri Yuda na Yerusaalemu, abu tata Daudi yaataireho." 
2Chronicles2:8 Kandi ontwekyere embaaho z'emyereezi n'emiberooshi n'emiti ya aligumu ebya Lebanooni; ahakuba nimmanya abashaija baawe ku barikumanya kushara ebiti by'embaaho omuri Lebanooni. Kandi abashaija bangye baryakwatanisa n'abaawe," 
2Chronicles2:9 babone kunteekateekyera embaaho nyingi munonga; ahakuba enju ei ndikwenda kwombeka neija kuba mpango kandi erikutangaaza. 
2Chronicles2:10 Kandi ndyaha abashaija baawe, ababaizi b'okushara embaaho, encuro z'engano ezihwire obukumi bubiri, n'encuro za sayiri obukumi bubiri, n'enjoga za viinyo obukumi bubiri, n'entsimbo z'amajuta obukumi bubiri." 
2Chronicles2:11 Hiraamu omugabe wa Tuuro yaahandikira Sulemaani ebaruha, ei yaamutwekyeire, naamugarukamu ati: Ahabwa MUKAMA kukunda abantu be, nikyo akugiriire omugabe waabo." 
2Chronicles2:12 Hiraamu yaagaruka yaagira ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, owaahangire eiguru n'ensi, ahimbisibwe, ahabw'okuba ahaire Daudi omwana w'obwengye, omwerinzi kandi orikwetegyereza, kuba niwe yaayombekyera MUKAMA enju, kandi n'okweyombekyera nyaruju y'obugabe." 
2Chronicles2:13 Mbwenu naayohereza omushaija omunyamyoga, orikwetegyereza munonga, orikwetwa Huraamu," 
2Chronicles2:14 mutabani w'omukazi ow'omuri beene Daani, ou ishe yaabaire ari owa Tuuro. Ogwo mushaija akeegyesibwa kukora eby'ezaabu, eby'efeeza, eby'emiringa, eby'ebyoma, eby'amabaare n'eby'ebiti, kandi n'eby'emyenda ya bujwa, eya bururu, eya karari n'eya kitaani; kandi naamanya n'okusharura amabara g'emiringo yoona n'okukora ekintu kyona, eki bamuhaire eky'okureeberaho kyakyo; mbwenu akwatanise n'abanyamyoga baawe, nibo ba mukama wangye omugurusi waawe Daudi." 
2Chronicles2:15 N'ahabw'ekyo engano na sayiri, n'amajuta na viinyo, ebi mukama wangye agambireho, abitwekyere abairu be;" 
2Chronicles2:16 naitwe nitwija kushara embaaho zoona ezi orikwetenga omuri Lebanooni, tuzikomerane zibe nk'ebibaya, tuzirabye omu nyanja, tuzikureetere Yoopa, obone kuzitwara Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles2:17 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaabara abanyamahanga boona, abaabaire bari omu nsi ya Israeli, nk'oku Daudi ishe yaababazire. Yaashanga bari akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi butaano n'enkumi ishatu na magana mukaaga." 
2Chronicles2:18 Yaiha omuribo abantu obukumi mushanju, baaba ab'okwekorera, obukumi munaana ab'okuhigura amabaare omu nshozi, n'enkumi ishatu na magana mukaaga baaba abanyampara b'okubakoresa." 
2Chronicles3:1 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaatandika kwombeka enju ya MUKAMA omuri Yerusaalemu aha kibungo Moria, ahu MUKAMA yaayeyorekyeire Daudi ishe, omu mwanya ogu Daudi yaatooraine aha mbuga ya Orunaani Omuyebusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwe, omu kwezi kwa kabiri, nibwo yaatandika kwombeka." 
2Chronicles3:3 Ebi nibyo bigyero by'enju ya Ruhanga ei Sulemaani yaayombekire. Oburaingwa bwayo omu kigyero kya ira bukaba buri mikono makumi mukaaga, n'obukiika mikono makumi abiri." 
2Chronicles3:4 Ekisasi eky'omu maisho ga hekalu kikaba kiri mikono makumi abiri oburaingwa, nibwingana n'obukiika bwa hekalu, kandi obwemi bwakyo bukabba buri mikono igana na makumi abiri. Omu nda yaakyo yoona yaakishweka ezaabu eshemeziibwe." 
2Chronicles3:5 Ekishengye kya hekalu eky'ahagati yaakishweka embaaho z'emiberooshi, nazo yaazishweka ezaabu eshemeziibwe, yaazisharuraho emikindo n'emikuuru." 
2Chronicles3:6 Egyo nju yaagihunda n'amabare g'obuguzi bwingi; egyo zaabu ekaba eri eya Paruvaimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Atyo yaashweka egyo nju n'ezaabu, emitambiko yaayo, emiryango yaayo, ebisiika byayo n'enyigi zaayo; kandi ha bisiika byayo yaasharuraho ebishushani bya baakerubi." 
2Chronicles3:8 Kandi yaayombeka Aharikwera munonga; oburaingwa bwaho bwaingana n'obukiika bwa hekalu, bwaba mikono makumi abiri, kandi n'obuhango bwaho bwaba mikono makumi abiri; yaahashweka n'etalanta z'ezaabu eshemeziibwe magana mukaaga." 
2Chronicles3:9 Oburemeezi bw'emisomaari bwaba shekeli z'ezaabu makumi ataano. Kandi ebishengye bya kaanyina-ibiri nabyo yaabishweka ezaabu. 
2Chronicles3:10 Omu Mwanya ogurikwera munonga yaatamu ebishushani bya baakerubi ebi yaakozire omu mbaaho, yaabishweka ezaabu." 
2Chronicles3:11 Amapapa ga baakerubi bombi, goona hamwe gaaba mikono makumi abiri oburaingwa; eipapa ry'omwe erya mikono etaano ryahika aha kisiika ky'enju, kandi erindi ipapa, naryo rya mikono etaano, ryahika aha ipapa rya kerubi ondiijo;" 
2Chronicles3:12 kandi eipapa rya kerubi ogwo owa kabiri rya mikono etaano ryahika aha kisiika ky'enju, n'erindi, naryo rya mikono etaano, ryahika aha ipapa rya mugyenzi we ow'okubanza." 
2Chronicles3:13 Gatyo amapapa ga baakerubi abo gaaba mikono abiri oburaingwa. Ebishushani bya baakerubi bikaba byemereire, nibireeba ekishengye kya hekalu eky'ahagati." 
2Chronicles3:14 Kandi yaakora omukingo omu myenda ya bururu, bujwa, karara na kitaani, yaagutarizamu ebishushani bya baakerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Omu maisho g'egyo nju yaabyaramu enyomyo ibiri ez'oburaingwa bwa mikono makumi ashatu n'etaano, buri emwe eine omutwe gwa mikono etaano;" 
2Chronicles3:16 yaaheesha emikuufu erikushusha enkwanzi, yaagijweka omu mitwe y'ezo nyomyo; yaaheesha ebishushani igana by'ebijuma by'amakomamahanga, yaabihanika ahari egyo mikuufu." 
2Chronicles3:17 Atyo yaabyara ezo nyomyo omu maisho ga hekalu, emwe aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, endiijo aha rwa bumosho; ey'aha rwa buryo yaagyeta Yakiini, n'ey'aha rw'obwa bumosho yaagyeta Boazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Kandi yaakora eitambiro ry'emiringa, oburangwa bwaryo mikono makumi abiri, obuhango bwaryo mikono makumi abiri, n'obwemi bwaryo mikono ikumi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Bwanyima yaaheesha ekitanka ky'amaizi ekyezigoire; okukicwekanisa mikono ikumi, obwemi bwakyo mikono etaano, kandi okwehinguririza omugoma gwakyo mikono makumi ashatu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Kandi ahansi y'obugyenyero bwakyo haakiikizeamu ebishushani by'ebisisi biri omu mishorongo ebiri, biheesherainwe nakyo." 
2Chronicles4:4 Ekyo kitanka kikaba kiteekirwe aha bishushani by'enimi ikumi na ibiri, bishatu nibireeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, bishatu aha burengyerwa-izooba, bishatu aha bwa-buryo, na bishatu aha burugwa-izooba; ekyo kitanka kiteekirwe ahaiguru yaabyo, biteeraine ebibunu." 
2Chronicles4:5 Omubiri gwakyo gukaba guri ekita kimwe; eminwa yaakyo ekaba ekozirwe nk'ey'ekikopo, nari nk'ekirabyo ky'emyangangye; nikigiibwamu encuro enkumi ishatu z'ebinyungu bihango." 
2Chronicles4:6 Kandi yaakora ebinaabiro ikumi by'okunaabiramu; bitaano yaabita aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buro, n'ebitaano aha rw'obwa bumosho. Ebyo nibyo baabaire bamunyungurizamu ebintu ebi baabaire bakoresa ahabw'ebitambo by'okwotsya, kandi ekitanka nikyo abanyamurwa baabaire banaabiramu." 
2Chronicles4:7 Kandi yaakora ebikondo by'ezaabu ikumi, nk'oku kyaragiirwe, yaabita omuri hekalu, bitaano aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'ebitaano aha rwabumosho." 
2Chronicles4:8 Kandi yaakora emeeza ikumi, yaazita omuri hekalu, itaano aha rubaju rwa buryo, na itaano aha rwa bumosho; yaakora n'enyabya z'ezaabu igana." 
2Chronicles4:9 Yaakora ekikaari ky'abanyamurwa, n'ekikaari ekirikwetwa ekihango, n'enyigi zaakyo, kandi ezo nyigi yaazishwekyesa emringa." 
2Chronicles4:10 Ekitanka yaakita aha nshonda y'orubaju rwa buryo rw'oburugwa-izooba bw'egyo nju. 
2Chronicles4:11 Kandi na Huraamu yaakora ebinaabiro, n'ebyoma by'okuyooza eiju, n'enyungu. Atyo Huraamu yaaheza omurimo ogu yaakozire omu nju ya Ruhanga ahabw'omugabe Sulemaani;" 
2Chronicles4:12 enyomyo ibiri, n'enyaba, n'emitwe ebiri aha mitwe y'ezo nyomyo, n'obutimba bubiri bw'okushweka enyabya ibiri ez'aha mitwe y'ezo nyomyo;" 
2Chronicles4:13 ebishushani by'ebijuma by'amakomamahanga eby'okuhunda aha butimba bwombi obwabaire buri aha mitwe y'enyomyo. 
2Chronicles4:14 Kandi yaakora ebitebe n'ebinaabiro aharibyo," 
2Chronicles4:15 n'ekitanka kimwe n'ebishushani by'enimi ikumi na bibiri ebyabaire biri ahansi yaakyo. 
2Chronicles4:16 Ebiyungu n'ebyoma by'okuyooza eiju, kandi n'eby'okwihuza enyama, n'ebintu byabyo byona eby'okubikoresa, Huraamu yaabikorera enju ya MUKAMA omu miringa ekuubire ahabw'omugabe Sulemaani." 
2Chronicles4:17 Omugabe yaabiyagiza omu ruhita rwa Yorudani omu itaka ry'eibumba ahagati ya Sukoosi na Zereda. 
2Chronicles4:18 Sulemaani yaakora ebintu bingi munonga ebi, oburemeezi bw'emiringa yaabyo bwabaire butarikubaasa kumanywa." 
2Chronicles4:19 Atyo Sulemaani yaakora ebintu byona eby'okuta omu nju ya MUKAMA; eitambiro ry'ezaabu, emeeza z'emigaati y'okumurikwa," 
2Chronicles4:20 ebikondo by'amatabaaza n'amatabaaza gaabyo g'ezaabu eshemeziibwe g'okwakira omu maisho g'Omwanya ogurikwera ogw'omunda, nk'oku kyaragiirwe;" 
2Chronicles4:21 ebishushani by'ebirabyo, amatabaaza n'empana z'ezaabu, byona byaba eby'ezaabu eshemeziibwe munonga;" 
2Chronicles4:22 makansi, enyabya, esohaani z'obubaane n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro eby'ezaabu eshemeziibwe; kandi epata z'enyigi ez'ekishengye kya hekalu, n'ez'Aharikwera munonga, zikaba ziri ez'ezaabu." 
2Chronicles5:1 Gutyo omurimo gwona ogu Sulemaani yaakozire ahabw'enju ya MUKAMA gwahwa. Bwanyima Sulemaani yaataasyamu ebintu ebi Daudi ishe yaabaire ashorore, yaata efeeza n'ezaabu n'ebintu byona omu mabiikiro g'enju ya Ruhanga." 
2Chronicles5:2 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaateeranira abakuru ba Israeli omuri Yerusaalemu, abakuru b'enganda zoona, abeebembezi b'amaju ga baishenkurubo ab'eihanga rya Israeli, kwinamura eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA nibagiiha omu rurembo rwa Daudi, nirwo Saayuuni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Abashaija ba Israeli boona baateeranira omu maisho g'omugabe aha bugyenyi obw'omu kwezi kwa mushanju. 
2Chronicles5:4 Abakuru ba Israeli boona baija, n'Abaleevi baakiriza egyo shanduukye;" 
2Chronicles5:5 baaginamura hamwe n'Eihema ry'okubugaabuganiramu, n'ebintu byona ebirikwera ebyabaire biri omuri eryo ihema; abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi baaba nibo baabiinamura." 
2Chronicles5:6 Omugabe Sulemaani n'omutwe gwona ogw'Abaisraeli abaabaire bateeraniire omu maisho ge, bakaba bari omu maisho g'eshanduukye nibatamba ebitambo by'entaama n'eby'ente bingi munonga, ebitarikubaasa kugambwa nari okubarwa." 
2Chronicles5:7 Batyo abanyamurwa baatwara eshanduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA, baagita omu mwanya gwayo omunda y'Omwanya ogurikwera ogw'egyo nju, ogurikwetwa Aharikwera munonga, ahansi y'amapapa g'ebishushani bya baakerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Ahakuba baakerubi abo bakaba bashashaanura amapapa gaabo ahaiguru y'omwanya gw'eshanduukye n'emigamba yaayo; 
2Chronicles5:9 kandi emigamba ekaba eri miraingwa munonga; n'ahabw'ekyo emitwe yaayo ekaba ereebekyera omu mwanya ogurkwera omu maisho g'Omwanya ogurikwera ogw'omunda; kwonka ekaba etarikubaasa kureeberwa heeru; kandi na hati ekiriyo. 
2Chronicles5:10 Omuri egyo shanduukye tihaine kindi ekyabaire kibamu, kureka ebishate by'amabaare bibiri, ebi Musa yaateereiremu ahari Horebu, ahu Musa yaaraganiire n'Abaisraeli endagaano nibaruga omu nsi ya Misri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Bwanyima abanyamurwa ku baarugire omu mwanya ogurikwera, (ahakuba abanyamurwa boona abaabaire bariyo bakaba baherize kweyeza, batarikufa ha mbu zaabo," 
2Chronicles5:12 kandi abeeshongozi Abaleevi boona, Asafu, Hamani na Yedusuuni, hamwe na batabani baabo na beene waabo, bajwaire emyenda ya bafuta, baine ebitaasa n'enanga n'endingiri, baayemerera aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba rw'eitambiro hamwe n'abanyamurwa abarikuteera amakondere igana na makumi abiri;" 
2Chronicles5:13 kandi gukaba guri omurimo gw'abakondere n'abeeshongozi kuhurirwa nibeeshongora n'eiraka rimwe, nibahimbisa MUKAMA kandi nibamusiima.) baimutsya ekyeshongoro nibateera amakondere n'ebitaasa n'ebindi bintu ebirikugamba, nibahimbisa MUKAMA, bati: Ahakuba ni murungi, Kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona, egyo nju, enju ya MUKAMA, yaijura ekicu;" 
2Chronicles5:14 batyo abanyamurwa tibaabaasa kwemerera kuheereza ahabw'ekyo kicu; ahabw'okuba ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kikaijura enju ya Ruhanga. 
2Chronicles6:1 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaagira ati: MUKAMA, okagira oti: Ndyaguma omu mwirima ndindindi;" 
2Chronicles6:2 kwonak nyoowe nkwombekyeire enju y'ekitiinisa, omwanya gwawe gw'okutuuramu ebiro n'ebiro." 
2Chronicles6:3 Omugabe yaahindukira eihanga ryona ey'Abaisraeli beemereire, yaabashabira omugisha," 
2Chronicles6:4 naagira ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli asiimwe, owaahikiiriza n'omukono gwe eki yaaraganiise tata Daudi n'akanwa ke naagira ati:" 
2Chronicles6:5 Okwiha obu naiha abantu bangye omuri Misri, tinkatooranaga rurembo mu nganda za Israeli zoona kwombekamu enju, ngu eiziina ryangye ribe nimwo ryaguma; kandi tindatooraine muntu weena kuba omutegyeki w'abantu bangye Israeli;" 
2Chronicles6:6 kwonak ntooraine Yerusaalemu kuba nimwo eiziina ryangye ryaguma, kandi ntooraine Daudi kutegyeka abantu bangye Israeli." 
2Chronicles6:7 Mbwenu kikaka kiri omu mutima gwa tata Daudi kwombekyera eiziina rya MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli enju." 
2Chronicles6:8 Kwonka MUKAMA yaagira tata Daudi ati: Obaire okozire gye ahabw'enaama ei obaire one kwombekyera eiziina ryangye enju; 
2Chronicles6:9 kwonka tiiwe oryombeka egyo nju, kureka mutabani waawe, ou orizaara, niwe aryombekyera eiziina ryangye enju." 
2Chronicles6:10 Mbwenu MUKAMA yaahikiriza eki yaaraganiise, ahabw'okuba naaza omu mwanya gwa tata Daudi, naagaruka aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Israeli, nk'oku MUKAMA yaaraganiise, kandi nyombekire egi nju ahabw'eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga wa israeli." 
2Chronicles6:11 Omwo nimwo ntaire omwanya ahabw'eshanduukye, ei endagaano ya MUKAMA erimu, ei yaaragaine n'abantu ba Israeli." 
2Chronicles6:12 Atyo Sulemaani yaayemerera omu maisho g'eitambiro rya MUKAMA, eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli riri aho, yaimutsya emikono ye." 
2Chronicles6:13 Kandi Sulemaani akaba akozire ekintu ky'emiringa ky'okwemereraho, oburangwa bwakyo mikono etaano, obuhango bwakyo mikono etaano, n'obwemi bwakyo mikono eshatu, yaakita omu kikaari, yaakyemereraho. Bwanyima yaatsimba amaju omu maisho g'Abaisraeli boona, yaimutsya emikono ye ahaiguru;" 
2Chronicles6:14 yaagira ati: Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, tihariho ruhanga omu iguru nari omu nsi, orikushushan naiwe, omu kurinda endagaano, n'omu kigirira embabazi abairu baawe abarikugyendera omu maisho gaawe n'emitima yaabo yoona;" 
2Chronicles6:15 kandi okahamya eki waaraganiise omwiru waawe tata Daudi; eego, okakigamba n'akanwa kaawe, mbwenu waakihikiiriza eri izooba n'omukono gwawe." 
2Chronicles6:16 N'ahabw'ekyo, MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, hamya eki waaraganiise omwiru waawe tata Daudi, noogira oti: Batabani baawe ku barigira emicwe mirungi, baagyendera omu biragiro byangye, nk'oku iwe obaire noobigyenderamu, tiharibura muntu w'okushutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Israel." 
2Chronicles6:17 Mbwenu hati, MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, ekigambo kyawe eki waagambiire omwiru waawe Daudi, okihamye." 
2Chronicles6:18 Beitu kwo, n'eky'amazima Ruhanga oryatuura n'abantu omu nsi? Reeba, eiguru, n'obu ryakuba eiguru eririkukirira kimwe kuba ahaiguru y'agandi torikubaasa kurihikamu; kaashwa egi nju ei nyombekire!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Kwonka MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, ta omutima aha kushaba n'okweshengyereza kw'omwiru waawe, noohurira okutaka kwe n'okushaba oku arikushaba omu maisho gaawe," 
2Chronicles6:20 obone kuguma otaire amaisho gaawe ahari egi nju nyomushana na nyekiro, omwanya ogu waaraganiise kutamu eiziina ryawe, obone kuguma noohurira okushaba oku omwiru waawe arishaba naareeba omwanya ogu." 
2Chronicles6:21 Kandi ogum e ohurire okweshengyereza kw'omwiru waawe n'okw'abantu baawe Israeli, baaba nibakushaba nibareeba omwanya ogu; ogume ohurire nooyema omu iguru, omu mwanya gwawe ogu otuuramu; kandi ku oraahurire, osaasire." 
2Chronicles6:22 Omuntu ku arisiisira mutaahi we, baamurahiza, nawe yaija kyaarahira omu maisho g'eitambiro ryawe omu nju egi," 
2Chronicles6:23 ohurire nooyema omu iguru, ogire eki waakora, ocwere abairu baawe orubanja, rusingye okozire kubi, aturwe okutahikiirira kwe, oihe orubanja ahari ohikiriire, omuzimuurire nk'okuhikiirira kwe oku kuri." 
2Chronicles6:24 Kandi abantu baawe Abaisraeli ku baribingwa abazigu baabo ahabw'okukucumuraho, bwanyima baakugarukira, baikiriza eiziina ryawe, baakushaba nibeeshengyerereza omu nju egi," 
2Chronicles6:25 ohurire nooyema omu iguru, osaasire abantu baawe Israeli ekibi kyabo, obagarure omu nsi ei waabahaire na baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles6:26 Kandi eiguru ku ririkingwa, enjura yaabura ahabw'abantu baawe kukucumuraho, bwanyima baashaba nibareeba omu mwanya ogu, baikiriza eiziina ryawe, baahinduka, baareka ekicumuro kyabo ahabw'okuhana kwawe," 
2Chronicles6:27 ohurire ori omu iguru, osaasire abairu baawe, eihanga ryawe Israeli, ekibi kyabo, obeegyese emitwarize mirungi ei bashemereire kugyenderamu; kandi ogwisize ensi yaawe enjura, ei waahaire abantu baawe kuba obuhunguzi." 
2Chronicles6:28 Kandi enjara ku eriteera ensi, nari orufu, okututa, nari okusya-nyamwenga, nari enzigye, nari kanyaananga; nari abazigu okubagotera omuri ibara rurembo rwabo; nari ku haribaho kahumpuri nari endiijo ndwara yoona;" 
2Chronicles6:29 omuntu weena nari eihanga ryona ery'Abaisraeli baakushaba nibakweshengyereza, buri muntu naamanya endwara y'omu mutima gwe, n'obusaasi bwe, kandi aimukize emikono ye naagyorekyeza, ei egi nju eri," 
2Chronicles6:30 ohurire nooyema omu iguru omu mwanya gwawe ogu otuuramu, osaasire, oihure buri muntu, ou orikumanya omutima, nk'oku emitwarize ye eri; (niiwe wenka orikumanya emitima y'abaana b'abantu;)" 
2Chronicles6:31 babone kukutiina ebiro byona ebi barimara omu nsi ei waahaire baatatenkuriitwe. 
2Chronicles6:32 Kandi n'omunyamahanga otari w'omu bantu baawe Israeli, oriruga omu nsi ya hare, akaija ahabw'eiziina ryawe erikuru, n'ahabw'omukono gwawe ogw'amaani kandi ogubangire, omuntu ogwo ku ariija yaashaba naareeba enju egi," 
2Chronicles6:33 ohurire nooyema omu iguru omu mwanya gwawe ogu otuuramu, omumarire ebi ariba naakushaba byona, kibone kureetera amahanga goona ag'omu nsi kumanya eiziina ryawe n'okukutiina, nk'oku eihanga ryawe Israeli ririkukutiina, kandi bamanye egi nju ei nyombekire ku erikwetererwa eiziina ryawe." 
2Chronicles6:34 Abantu baawe ku barihurura nibaza aha rugamba kurwana n'abazigu baabo, omu muhanda gwona ogu oribatoozamu, baakushaba nibareeba ei oru rurembo oru waatooraine ruri, n'egi nju ei nyombekyeire eiziina ryawe," 
2Chronicles6:35 ohurire okushaba n'okweshengyereza kwabo, nooyema omu iguru, obarwanirire." 
2Chronicles6:36 Kandi ku barikucumuraho, (ahakuba tihariho muntu otacumura,) waabagirira ekiniga, waabahayo aha bazigu baabo, baatwarwa omu nsi y'abazigu baabo, eya hare nari eya haihi, bari enkwatwa;" 
2Chronicles6:37 kwonka ku barihikayo, baayegarukamu, baayeteisa, baakweshengyererezayo nibagira bati: Tukacumura, twashiisha, twakora eby'obugomi;" 
2Chronicles6:38 baakugarukira n'omutima gwabo gwona n'amagara gaabo goona, bakiri omu nsi y'abaabanyagire, baakushaba nibaareeba ei enis ei waahaire baishenkurubo eri, n'orurembo oru waatooraine, n'egi nju ei nyombekyeire eiziina ryawe," 
2Chronicles6:39 ohurire okushaba n'okweshengyereza kwabo nooyema omu iguru omu mwanya gwawe ogu otuuramu, obamarire ebyabo, osaasire abantu baawe abakucumwireho." 
2Chronicles6:40 Mbwenu, ai Ruhanga wangye, ote amaisho gaawe, kandi otegye amatu gaawe aha kushaba okuraagume kwashabirwe omu mwanya ogu." 
2Chronicles6:41 Mbwenu, imuka, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga, oze omu buruhuukiro bwawe, Iwe hamwe n'eshanduukye y'Amaani gaawe! Abanyamurwa baawe, MUKAMA Ruhanga, bajwekwe okujunwa, N'abarikwera baawe bashemerererwe omu burungi bwawe." 
2Chronicles6:42 Ai, MUKAMA Ruhanga, otabinga owaawe owaashukirweho amajuta! Ijuka embabazi ezi waagiriire omwiru waawe Daudi." 
2Chronicles7:1 Sulemaani ku yaaherize okushaba kwe, omuriro gwaruga omu iguru, gwayokyeza kimwe ekitambo ky'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo, ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kyaijura hekalu." 
2Chronicles7:2 Abanyamurwa tibaabaasa kutaaha mu nju ya MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kikaijura egyo nju ye." 
2Chronicles7:3 Abaisraeli boona ku baareebire omuriro gwashuuma, n'ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kiri ahari hekalu, bainama ahansi, baajuumara aha mabaare gaariire, baaramya, baasiima MUKAMA nibagira bati: Ahakuba ni murungi, Ahabw'okuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles7:4 Bwanyima omugabe n'abantu boona baatamba ebitambo omu maisho ga MUKAMA. 
2Chronicles7:5 Omugabe Sulemaani yaahonga ente obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri, n'entaama akasiriira n'obukumi bubiri kuba ebitambo. Atyo omugabe n'abantu boona baashoroora enju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles7:6 Abanyamurwa baayemerera omu myanya yaabo; n'Abaleevi baayemerera, baine ebintu by'okuteerera MUKAMA, ebi omugabe Daudi yaakozire ahabw'okusiima MUKAMA, akaguma naabiteera, ahu yaabaire ayendera kumusiimira hoona, naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona. Omu maisho g'abo Baleevi abanyamurwa baateera amakondere, kandi Abaisraeli boona baayemerera." 
2Chronicles7:7 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaayeza ahagati y'ekikaari ekyabaire kiri omu maisho g'enju ya MUKAMA; ahakuba okwo niyo yaahongyeire ekitambo ky'okwotsya, n'ebishanju by'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, ahabw'okuba eitambiro ry'emiringa eri Sulemaani yaakozire, tirirabaasize kuhikwaho bitambo by'okwotsya, n'empongano z'esaano, n'ebishaju." 
2Chronicles7:8 Omuri obwo bunaku Sulemaani yaataho obugyenyi okumara ebiro mushanju, hamwe n'Abaisraeli boona, abaabaire bari omutwe muhango munonga, abaarugire hoona okuruga ahu orikutaahira nooza Hamasi, okuhika aha mugyera gwa Misri." 
2Chronicles7:9 Aha izooba rya munaana baagira okuteerana okurikwera; ahakuba bakaba bamazire ebiro mushanju nibashoroora eitambiro, n'ebindi mushanju omu bugyenyi." 
2Chronicles7:10 Aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bishatu eky'okwezi kwa mushanju yaayohereza abantu omu maka gaabo, bashemereirwe, kandi bananukire omu mitima aha bw'oburungi obu MUKAMA yaayorekire Daudi na Sulemaani n'abantu be Israeli." 
2Chronicles7:11 Atyo Sulemaani yaaheza enju ya MUKAMA n'ey'omugabe; byona ebi Sulemaani yaabaire ateekateekire kukora omu nju ya MUKAMA n'omu nju ye, yaabiheza gye." 
2Chronicles7:12 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaayeyoreka Sulemaani nyekiro, yaamugira ati: Mpuriire okushaba kwawe, kandi nyetooraniire omwanya ogu kuba ogw'enju y'okutambiramu ebitambo." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ku ndikinga eiguru, enjura yaabura, nari naaragiira enzigye kukunuura ensi, nari naayohereza orufu omu bantu bangye," 
2Chronicles7:14 abantu bangye abarikwetererwa eiziina ryangye, ku baryecureeza, baashaba, bansherura, baareka emitwarize yaabo emibi, obwo ndyahurira niinyema omu iguru, nsaasire ekibi kyabo, kandi ntambire ensi yaabo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Okuruga hati niinyija kuguma ninta amaisho gangye, kandi nintega amatu gangye aha kushaba okurishabirwa omu mwanya ogu." 
2Chronicles7:16 Ahabw'okuba hati naatoorana egi nju, kandi naagyeeza, ngu eiziina ryangye ribone kugigumamu ebiro byona; amaisho gangye n'omutima gwangye biryagigumaho obutwire bwona." 
2Chronicles7:17 Kandi iwe ku origyendera omu maisho gangye, nka sho Daudi oku yaatwarize, waakora byona ebi nkuragiire, waayorobera ebiragiro byangye n'ebi naataireho," 
2Chronicles7:18 obwo ndyahamya ekitebe ky'obugabe bwawe, nk'oku naaragaine na sho Daudi, ningira nti: Toribura muntu w'okutegyeka Israeli." 
2Chronicles7:19 Kwonka ku muriteishuka, mwayanga kworobera ebiragiro byangye n'ebyatairweho ebi naataire omu maisho gaanyu, mwagyenda mwaheereza baaruhanga abandi, kandi mwabaramya," 
2Chronicles7:20 obwo ndyabarandura omu nsi ei naabahaire, kandi n'enju egi ei naashorooreire eiziina ryangye, ndyaginaga, ngiihe omu maisho gangye, ngihindure eky'okucwaho enfumu n'ekigaaniizo omu mahanga goona." 
2Chronicles7:21 Kandi egi nju erikuhimbisibwa etyo, buri muntu oriba naarabaho aryatangaara, naagira ati: Beitu shi MUKAMA akatura ki egi nsi n'egi nju?" 
2Chronicles7:22 Bwanyima baagire bati: Ahabw'okuba bakatsigaho MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misri, baahamira ahari baaruhanga abandi, baabaramya, kandi baabaheereza; nikyo abareeteireho obubi obu bwona." 
2Chronicles8:1 Aha muheru gw'emyaka makumi abiri ei Sulemaani yaayombekyeiremu enju ya MUKAMA n'eye ahabwe," 
2Chronicles8:2 Sulemaani akombeka busya endembo ezi Hiraamu yaamuhaire, yaazitamu Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles8:3 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaateera Hamasi-zooba, yaagikwata." 
2Chronicles8:4 Yaayombeka Tadimoori omu ihamba, n'endembo zoona ez'amabiikiro ezi yaayombekire omuri Hamasi." 
2Chronicles8:5 Kandi yaayombeka Besi-horoni eya ruguru na Besi-horoni eya ifo, endembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, eziine amarembo g'enyigi ezirikukingwa empimbi," 
2Chronicles8:6 na Baalasi n'endembo z'amabiikiro zoona ezi Sulemaani yaabaire aine, n'endembo zoona ez'ebigaari bye, n'endembo z'engabo ze ezirikugyendera aha mbaraasi, n'ekindi kyona eki Sulemaani yaabaire ayenda kwombeka omuri Yerusaalemu, Lebanooni n'ensi zoona ezaabaire ziri omu bugabe bwe." 
2Chronicles8:7 Abantu boona abaahonokire aha Bahiiti, Abaamori, Abaperizi, Abahiivi n'Abayebusi abaabaire batari Baisraeli," 
2Chronicles8:8 baijukuru baabo abaahonokireho omuri egyo nsi, abu Abaisraeli bataracwekyerereize kimwe,–abo nibo Sulemaani yaahindwire abahuuku b'okubakorera emirimo, bakaguma batyo n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Chronicles8:9 Kwonka Abaisraeli bo Sulemaani tarahindwire bahuuku b'okumukorera; kureka bakaba abaserukare, abandi baaba abatware be, abandi abakuru b'ebigaari bye, n'abandi baaba engabo ze ezirikugyendera aha mbaraasi." 
2Chronicles8:10 Kandi abatware abo abakuru b'omugabe Sulemaani, abaabaire nibategyeka abantu, baaba magana abiri na makumi ataano." 
2Chronicles8:11 Sulemaani yaiha muhara wa Faraho omu rurembo rwa Daudi, yaamuta omu nju ei yaamwombekyeire; ahakuba akagira ati: Omukazi wangye tashemereire kuguma omu nju ya Daudi omugabe wa Israeli, ahabw'okuba emyanya ei eshanduukye ya MUKAMA eiziremu n'erikwera." 
2Chronicles8:12 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaatandika kutambira MUKAMA ebitambo by'okwotsya aha itambiro rya MUKAMA, eri yaayombekire omu maisho g'ekisasi kya hekalu," 
2Chronicles8:13 nk'omurimo gwa buri izooba oku gwabaire nigwetengwa, naahonga nk'oku Musa yaaragiire ebya sabato, ebya buri kuboneka kw'okwezi, n'eby'amagyenyi ashatu aga buri mwaka–obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, obugyenyi bwa saabiiti, n'obugyenyi bw'ensiisira." 
2Chronicles8:14 Nk'ekiragiro kya Daudi ishe oku kyabaire kiri, yaataho abanyamurwa b'okukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu mbu, n'Abaleevi ahabw'omurimo gwabo ogw'okuhimbisa, n'ogw'okuheereza omu maisho g'abanyamurwa, nk'omurimo gwa buri izooba oku gwabaire nigwetengwa, kandi n'abakumiirizi b'amarembo ab'okurinda amarembo goona omu mbu; ahabw'okuba okwo nikwo Daudi omushaija wa Ruhanga yaabaire aragiire." 
2Chronicles8:15 Kandi tibaateishuka kureka ebi omugabe yaaragiire abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi ebirikukwata aha kintu kyona n'aha by'amabiikiro. 
2Chronicles8:16 Okwo nikwo omurimo gwona ogwa Sulemaaani gwahweire, okwiha aha izooba eri omusingi gw'enju ya MUKAMA gwateereirweho, okuhitsya ahu yaahwereire. Batyo baahereza kimwe enju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles8:17 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaaza Ezioni-geberi na Eloosi aha rubaju rw'enyanja omu nsi ya Edomu. 
2Chronicles8:18 Hiraamu yaayohereza abagaragwa be kumutwarira emeeri n'abarimbi be abamanyiire enyanja, baaza Ofiri hamwe n'abashaija ba Sulemaani, baihayo etalanta z'ezaabu magana ana na makumi ataano, baazireetera omugabe Sulemaani." 
2Chronicles9:1 Omugabekazi wa Sheeba ku yaahuriire okurangaanwa kwa Sulemaani, yaija Yerusaalemu kumubuuza ebibuuzo bigumire naamugyeza; yaija ashendekyereziibwe abantu baingi munonga, n'engamira zeekoreire emigaju, n'ezaabu nyingi munonga, kandi n'amabaare ag'obuguzi bwingi. Ku yaahikire ahari Sulemaani, yaamugambira kyona ekyabaire kimuri aha mutima." 
2Chronicles9:2 Sulemaani yaagarukamu ebi yaamubuurize byona; tihariho kigambo na kimwe ekyayeshobire Sulemaani, eki ataramushobororeire." 
2Chronicles9:3 Omugabekazi wa Sheeba ku yaareebire obwengye bwa Sulemaani, enju ei yaayombekire," 
2Chronicles9:4 eby'okurya by'aha meeza ye, emishutamire y'abagaragwa be, n'emiheerereze y'abaheereza be, n'ebijwaro byabo, n'abagabuzi be ba viinyo n'ebijwaro byabo, n'ebitambo by'okwotsya ebi yaabaire naahongyera aha nju ya MUKAMA, omutima gwamuhwa omunda." 
2Chronicles9:5 Yaagira omugabe ati: Ebigambo ebi naahuriire ndi omu nsi yangye ebirikugamba aha by'emitwarize yaawe n'obwengye bwawe bikaba biri eby'amazima," 
2Chronicles9:6 kwonka tindabiikiriize okuhitsya obu nyeiziire, eriisho ryangye rikabyereebera; nkashanga batarangambiire n'obu kyakuba ekicweka kimwe kya kabiri ky'obwingi bw'obwengye bwawe; nookirira kimwe ebi naahuriire." 
2Chronicles9:7 Abashaija baawe bahiiriirwe! N'abaheereza baawe, abeemerera obutoosha omu maisho gaawe, bakahurira obwengye bwawe, nabo bahiiriirwe!" 
2Chronicles9:8 MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ahimbisibwe, owaakusiimire, akakuta aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwe, kuba omugabe ahabwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe! Ruhanga waawe ogwo ahabw'okukunda Abaisraeli n'okwenda kubahamya ebiro byona, nikyo yaakuteereireho kuba omugabe w'okubategyeka, ngu obone kucwa emanja z'oburyo omu kuhikiirira." 
2Chronicles9:9 Bwanyima yaaha omugabe etalanta z'ezaabu igana na makumi abiri, emigaju mingi munonga, n'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi; tihakabahoga migaju nk'ei omugabekazi wa Sheeba yaahaire omugabe Sulemaani." 
2Chronicles9:10 Kandi abashaija ba Hiraamu n'aba Sulemaani, abaabaire bareeta ezaabu okuruga Ofiri, bakareeta embaaho za alumuugi n'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi." 
2Chronicles9:11 Ezo mbaaho za alumuugi omugabe yaazibaijamu amatembero g'enju ya MUKAMA n'ag'enju ye ahabwe, n'endingiri n'enanga ahabw'abeeshongozi; hakaba hatakareebwaga mbaahoza alumuugi ezirikushusha nk'ezo omu nsi ya Yuda."
