2Chronicles9:12 Omugabe Sulemaani yaaha omugabekazi wa Sheeba ebi yaabaire naayenda byona, n'ebi yaamushabire byona, okwohaho ebi yaamureeteire. Bwanyima yaakuba, yaagaruka omu nsi ye n'abagaragwa be." 
2Chronicles9:13 Ezaabu eyaabaire ereetwa owa Sulemaani buri mwaka ekaba eba etalanta magana mukaaga na makumi mukaaga na mukaaga," 
2Chronicles9:14 otabariiremu eyaabaire eruga omu bashuubuzi n'omu batunzi; kandi abagabe ba Buharabu boona n'abategyeki b'omu nsi bakaba bareetera Sulemaani ezaabu n'efeeza. 
2Chronicles9:15 Omugabe Sulemaani yaaheeshesa engabo z'ezaabu magana abiri, engabo emwe neeheeshwa omu zaabu ya shekeli magana mukaaga." 
2Chronicles9:16 Kandi yaaheeshesa ezindi ngabo z'ezaabu magana ashatu; engabo emwe neeheeshwa omu zaabu ya shekeli magana ashatu; omugabe yaazita omu nju y'ekibira kya Lebanooni. 
2Chronicles9:17 Kandi yaabaijesa ekitebe ky'obugabe kihango omu miino y'enjojo, yaakishweka ezaabu eshemeziibwe." 
2Chronicles9:18 Ekyo kitebe ky'obugabe kikaba kiine amatembero mukaaga, n'akatebe ky'ebigyere k'ezaabu, ebyabaire bikoreirwe hamwe n'ekyo kitebe; aha buri rubaju rw'ekyo kitebe hariho ah'okuta emikono, n'ebishushani bibiri by'entare ezeemereire aha rubaju rw'ah'okuta emikono;" 
2Chronicles9:19 kandi n'ebindi bishushani by'entare ikumi na bibiri byemereire bibiri bibiri ahari buri itembero ahari ago matembero mukaaga. Omu bugabe obundi bwona tihariho kitebe ekyabaire nikishushana nakyo. 
2Chronicles9:20 Eby'okunywaisa eby'omugabe Sulemaani byona bikaba biri eby'ezaabu, kandi n'ebintu byona eby'omu nju y'omu kibira kya Lebanooni bikaba biri eby'ezaabu eshemeziibwe; omu biro bya Sulemaani efeeza ekaba etarikuteekateekwaho kuba ekintu." 
2Chronicles9:21 Ahakuba emeeri z'omugabe zikaba ziza Tarushiishi n'abashaija ba Hiraamu; omurundi gumwe omu myaka eshatu ezo meeri za Tarushiishi zikaba ziija, zireetsire ezaabu, efeeza, emiino y'enjojo, enkobe na zaanyamunyonyi." 
2Chronicles9:22 Okwo nikwo omugabe Sulemaani yaakirize abagabe boona ab'omu nsi obutungi n'obwengye. 
2Chronicles9:23 Abagabe boona ab'omu nsi bakaba beetenga kureeba Sulemaani, ngu bahurire obwengye bwe, obu Ruhanga yaamuhaire." 
2Chronicles9:24 Kandi weena owaabaire aija akaba areeta omutoijo, ebintu by'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, ebijwaro, sumuruna, emigaju, embaraasi n'enyumbu; ebyo byona nikwo byabaire biija buri mwaka." 
2Chronicles9:25 Kandi Sulemaani akaba aine emyanya obukumi buna ei embaraasi ze ezirikukurura ebigaari zaabaire ziraaramu, kandi aine abashaija abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, abu yaataire omu ndembo z'ebigaari bye, n'omuri Yerusaalemu owa omugabe." 
2Chronicles9:26 Kandi yaategyeka abagabe boona okuruga aha mugyera Furaati okuhika omu nsi y'Abafilistia n'aha mwatano gwa Misri. 
2Chronicles9:27 Omugabe yaareetera Yerusaalemu kugira efeeza nyingi nk'amabaare, n'ebiti by'emyereezi byaba nk'emisikamoori y'omu mpita." 
2Chronicles9:28 Kandi bakaba bareetera Sulemaani embaraasi nibaziiha Misri n'omu nsi ezindi zoona. 
2Chronicles9:29 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Sulemaani, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebyabaireho ekya Nasani nabi, n'omu kitabo ky'obunabi ekya Ahiya owa Shiilo, n'omu kitabo ky'okworekwa ekya Ido omuhanuuzi, aha bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Sulemaani yaamara aha ngoma emyaka makumi ana naategyekyera Israeli yoona omuri Yerusaalemu. 
2Chronicles9:31 Bwanyima Sulemaani yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omu rurembo rwa Daudi ishe; Rehoboamu omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehoboamu akaza Shekemu, ahakuba Abaisraeli boona niyo baabaire bagiire kumwemeka." 
2Chronicles10:2 Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ku yaakihuriire, (ahakuba akaba ari Misri, ei yaabaire ahungiire omugabe Sulemaani), yaaruga Misri, yaagaruka owaabo." 
2Chronicles10:3 Baatuma kumweta; atyo Yeroboamu n'Abaisraeli boona baija ahari Rehoboamu, baamugira bati:" 
2Chronicles10:4 Sho akongyera oburemeezi aha kutegyekwa kwaitu. Mbwenu otutuubize aha mirimo erikurusya, ei sho yaabaire atukoresa, n'aha buremeezi bw'okutegyeka kwe, naitwe nitwija kukuheereza." 
2Chronicles10:5 Yaabagarukamu ati: Mugarukye aha bwanyima y'ebiro bishatu. Batyo abantu baayaabuuka, baagyenda." 
2Chronicles10:6 Bwanyima omugabe Rehoboamu yaaza omu naama n'abagurusi abaabaire batabaarira Sulemaani ishe akiriho, yaabagira ati: Nimumpa bwengye ki okugarukamu abo bantu?" 
2Chronicles10:7 Baamugira bati: Ku oraatwaze gye abo bantu, waabagwisa gye, obwo nibwo bariba abairu baawe ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles10:8 Kwonka we yaayanga enaama ei abo bagurusi baamuhaire, yaaza omu naama n'abatsigazi abaanyeetsire nawe, kandi abaabaire nibamutabaarira." 
2Chronicles10:9 Yaababuuza ati: Nimumpa bwengye ki okugarukamu abo bantu, abangizire ngu mbatuubize aha buremeezi bw'obutegyeki obu tata yaabataireho?" 
2Chronicles10:10 Abo batsigazi abaanyeetsire nawe baamugira bati: Oku nikwo oraagarukyemu abantu abakushabire nibagira bati: Sho akongyera oburemeezi aha kutegyekwa kwaitu; mbwenu iwe otutuubieho; obagire oti: Akakumu kangye akahera nikakira obuhango enyugunyu ya tata. 
2Chronicles10:11 Mbwenu nk'oku tata yaabeekoreize omugamba guremeire, nyowe niinyija kukizaho. Tata akabateeza enkoba, nyowe niinyija kubateeza skorupio." 
2Chronicles10:12 Aha kiro kya kashatu Yeroboamu n'abantu boona baija aha mugabe Rehoboamu, nk'oku yaabagizire ati: Mugarukye aha kiro kya kashatu." 
2Chronicles10:13 Omugabe Rehoboamu yaabagarukamu n'amaani, naayanga obwengye obu abagurusi babaire bamuhaire;" 
2Chronicles10:14 yaabagarukamu nk'obwengye bw'abatsigazi obu bamuhaire oku bwabaire buri, ati: Tata akabeekoreza omugamba guremeire, kwonka nyowe niinyija kukizaho; akabateeza enkoba, kwonka nyowe niinyija kubateeza skorupio." 
2Chronicles10:15 Atyo omugabe tiyaabahurira, ahabw'okuba kikaba kirugire ahari Ruhanga, ngu MUKAMA ahikiirize ekigambo eki yaagambiire Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, naakirabya omuri Ahiya owa Shiilo." 
2Chronicles10:16 Abaisraeli boona ku baareebire omugabe yaayanga kubahurira, baamugira bati: Twine kakwate ki na Daudi? Titwine buhunguzi omuri mwene Yese. Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, nimugarukye omu mahema gaanyu! Naimwe aba Daudi mugume mwemarire ebyanyu n'oruganda rwanyu! Batyo Abaisraeli boona baagaruka omu maka gaabo." 
2Chronicles10:17 Kwonka Rehoboamu yaagumizamu naategyeka Abaisraeli abaabaire batwire omu ndembo za Yuda. 
2Chronicles10:18 Bwanyima omugabe Rehoboamu yaatuma Hadoraamu, owaabaire ari omukuru w'abakozi b'emirimo y'okuhatwa; Abaisraeli boona baamuteerar amabaare, yaafa. Omugabe ku yaabihuriire, ahonaaho yaaza omu kigaari kye kuhungira Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Okwo nikwo Abaisraeli baagomeire enju ya Daudi n'okuhitsya hati. 
2Chronicles11:1 Rehoboamu ku yaahikire Yerusaalemu, yaateeranira hamwe enju ya Yuda yoona n'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, yaatooranamu abashaija emanzi akasiriira n'obukumi munaana ab'okurwanisa Israeli, ngu babone kumugarurira obugabe." 
2Chronicles11:2 Kwonka ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Shemaaya, omushaija wa Ruhanga, nikigira kiti: Gambira Rehoboamu mwene Sulemaani omugabe wa Yuda n'Abaisraeli boona ab'omuri Yuda na Benyamiini, oti:" 
2Chronicles11:3  
2Chronicles11:4 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Mutahurura, n'obu kwakuba okurwanisa beene waanyu. Buri muntu agarukye omu ka ye, ahakuba ekintu eki niinye kirugireho. Batyo baahurira ekigambo kya MUKAMA, baagarukayo, tibaarwanisa Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehoboamu yaatuura Yerusaalemu, kandi yaayombeka omuri Yuda endembo z'okwerinda abazigu." 
2Chronicles11:6 Yaayombeka Betelehemu, Etamu, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Besi-zuuri, Sooko, Adulaamu," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gaasi, Mareesha, Ziifu," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraimu, Lakishi, Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zoora, Ayalooni, na Heburooni, endembo z'omuri Yuda na Benyamiini ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare." 
2Chronicles11:11 N'ebigo byazo yaabigumya, yaabitamu abakuru b'engabo, yaabibiikamu eby'okurya n'amajuta na viinyo." 
2Chronicles11:12 Kandi omuri ezo ndembo zoona yaatamu engabo n'amacumu, yaazihindura ez'amaani maingi munonga. Atyo yaagumya Abayuda n'Ababenyamiini bari abe." 
2Chronicles11:13 Bwanyima abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, abaabaire batwire omuri Israeli yoona, baaruga omu myanya yoona ei baabaire batwiremu, baija ah'ari." 
2Chronicles11:14 Ahakuba Abaleevi bakareka amariisizo gaabo n'obutaka bwabo, baija omuri Yuda na Yerusaalemu, ahabw'okuba Yeroboamu n'abatabani bakabaiha omu murimo gw'obuheereza bw'abanyamurwa ba MUKAMA," 
2Chronicles11:15 yaataho abanyamurwa abe kuheereza omu myanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, n'okukora omurimo gw'okuheereza baadaimoni, n'ebishushani by'enyana bibiri ebi yaakozire." 
2Chronicles11:16 Ab'omu nganda zoona eza Israeli, abaataire emitima yaabo aha kusherura MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, baija bakuratiire abo Baleevi, baahika Yerusaalemu, baatambirirayo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo ebitambo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Batyo baahamya obugabe bwa Yuda, kandi baamara emyka eshatu nibagumiza kimwe Rehoboamu mwene Sulemaani; ahabw'okuba omuri egyo myaka eshatu bakaguma nibagyendera omu muhanda gwa Daudi na Sulemaani." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboamu akashwera Mahalaasi muhara wa Yerimoosi mwene Daudi na Abihaili muhara wa Eliabu mwene Yese; 
2Chronicles11:19 yaamuzaarira abaana b'aboojo, Yeushi, Shemaria na Zahaamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Bwanyima y'ogwo yaashwera Maaka, muhara wa Abusalomu, yaamuzaarira Abiya, Atai, ziiza na Shelomiisi." 
2Chronicles11:21 (Kandi Rehoboamu akashwera abakazi ikumi na munaana n'ebinyanshunju makumi mukaaga; yaazaara abaana b'aboojo makumi abiri na munaana, n'ab'abaishiki makumi mukaaga); kwonka akaba akunda Maaka muhara wa Abusalomu okukira abakazi be boona n'ebinyanshunju bye;" 
2Chronicles11:22 n'ahabw'ekyo yaagira Abiya mwene Maaka omwana mukuru omuri beene ishe, ahakuba akaba naayenda kumuhindura omugabe." 
2Chronicles11:23 Yaakoresa obwengye, yaata abatabani omu byanga byona eby'omuri Yuda na Benyamiini omu ndembo zoona ezirimu ebigo; yaabaha eby'okurya bingi munonga, kandi yaabashwererera abakazi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Obugabe bwa Rehoboamu ku bwaherize kuhama n'okuba obw'amaani, we n'Abaisraeli boona baareka kukuratira ebiragiro bya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles12:2 Bwanyima omu mwaka gwa kataano ogw'omu busingye bwe Shishaki omugabe wa Misri akainamuka, yaateera Yerusaalemu," 
2Chronicles12:3 aine ebigaari rukumi na magana abiri, n'abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi obukumi mukaaga; n'abantu abarugire nawe Misri bakaba batarikubarwa, bari aba Libya, aba Sukimu n'aba Esiopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 Yaakwata endembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, yaahika Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Ku yaahikireyo, Shemaaya nabi yaija ahari Rehoboamu n'aha bategyeki ba Yuda, abaabaire bateeraniire Yerusaalemu ahabwa Shishaki, yaabagira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ondugireho, mbwenu naanye naakurekurira Shishaki." 
2Chronicles12:6 Ahonaaho abategyeki ba Israeli n'omugabe baayecureeza, nibagira bati: MUKAMA niwe ahikiriire." 
2Chronicles12:7 MUKAMA ku yaareebire baayecureeza, ekigambo kye kyaizira Shemaaya nikigira kiti: Beecureize; n'ahabw'ekyo tinkibahwerekyereza; kureka niinyija kugira eki naabajuna, kandi ekiniga kyangye tikirikwija kushukwa hari Yerusaalemu kuteerwa Shishaki." 
2Chronicles12:8 Kwonka nibaija kuba abairu be, babone kumanya obutegyeki bwangye, n'obw'abagabe b'ezo nsi." 
2Chronicles12:9 Atyo Shishaki omugabe wa Misri yaateera Yerusaalemu, yaanyaga ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi eby'omu nju ya MUKAMA, n'eby'omu nju ya MUKAMA, n'eby'omu nju y'omugabe; yaatwara ebintu byona. Kandi yaatwara n'engabo z'ezaabu ezi Sulemaani yaabaire aheesire;" 
2Chronicles12:10 bwanyima omugabe Rehoboamu yaaheesha ezindi z'emiringa omu mwanya gwazo, yaazibiitsya abakuru b'abarinzi, abaabaire barinda orwigi rw'enju y'omugabe." 
2Chronicles12:11 Obutoosha omugabe ku yaabaire aza omu nju ya MUKAMA, abo barinzi baija, bazihagatira, bwanyima bazigarura omuri egyo nju y'abarinzi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Ku yaayecureize, ekiniga kya MUKAMA kyamurugaho, ngu arekye kumucwekyerereza kimwe; kandi omuri Yuda ebintu bikaba biriho gye." 
2Chronicles12:13 Atyo omugabe Rehoboamu yaayegaruramu amaani, yaategyeka. Rehoboamu akaba aine emyaka makumi ana na gumwe, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mushanju omuri Yerusaalemu, orurembo oru MUKAMA yaatooraine omu nganda zoona ez'Abaisraeli kuba nimwo yaata eiziina rye. Nyina akaba naayetwa Naama omuamoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Akakora kubi, ahabw'okuba tarataire mutima aha kusherura MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles12:15 Mbwenu ebi Rehoboamu yaakozire okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebyabaireho ekya Shemaaya nabi, n'ekya Ido omuhanuuzi? Kandi hakaba habaho obweme ahagati ya Rehoboamu na Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles12:16 Bwanyima Rehoboamu yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omu rurembo rwa Daudi; Abiya omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles13:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Yeroboamu, Abiya akatandika kutegyeka Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Yaategyekyera emyaka eshatu omuri Yerusaalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Mikaya, muhara wa Urieli owa Gibea." 
2Chronicles13:3 Omuri obwo bunaku hakabaho obweme ahagati ya Abiya na Yeroboamu. Abiya yaahurura n'abashaija amamanzi abamanyiire engamba, abashaija entoore obusiriira buna; Yeroboamu we yaatenga orugamba kumurwanisa n'abashaija entoore abarwani b'amaani obusiriira munaana." 
2Chronicles13:4 Bwanyima Abiya yaayemerera aha kibungo Zemaraimu, ekiri omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, yaagira ati: Muntegye amatu, iwe Yeroboamu n'Abaisraeli mwena." 
2Chronicles13:5 Timushemereire kumanya ku MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli yaahaire Daudi n'abatabani obugabe kutegyeka Israeli, naabaraganisa endagaano y'omwonyo?" 
2Chronicles13:6 N'obu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, omugaragwa wa Sulemaani mwene Daudi, akaimuka yaagomera mukama we;" 
2Chronicles13:7 abashaija bamwe abataine mugasho baija, baakwatanisa nawe, baahiga Rehoboamu mwene Sulemaani akiri muto, atakahamire, atarikubaasa kubazibira." 
2Chronicles13:8 Mbwenu nimuteekateeka ngu nimwija kuzibira obugabe bwa MUKAMA oburi omu mikono ya beene Daudi, ngu niho muri omutwe muhango munonga, kandi ngu niho mwine enyana z'ezaabu ezi Yeroboamu yaabaheesheire kuba baaruhanga baanyu?" 
2Chronicles13:9 Timurabingire abanyamurwa ba MUKAMA beene Arooni, n'Abaleevi, mukeeteeraho abandi nk'abantu b'agandi mahanga? Omuntu weena orikwija kweyeza, areetsire enimi y'ekimasha nari empaya z'entaama mushanju, ahinduka omunyamurwa w'abatari baaruhanga." 
2Chronicles13:10 Kwonka itwe, MUKAMA niwe Ruhanga waitu, kandi titukamutsigahoga. Abanyamurwa abu twine, arikuheereza MUKAMA, ni batabani ba Arooni, kandi twine Abaleevi b'okubaheereza." 
2Chronicles13:11 Buri kasheeshe na buri mwabazyo bahongyera MUKAMA ebitambo by'okwotsya, bamwoterera obubaane bw'emigaju erikutaamirana, batebeekanisa emigaati ey'okumurikwa aha meeza y'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, kandi bareeberera ekikondo ky'amatabaaza ky'ezaabu, ngu amatabaaza gaakyo gabone kwaka buri mwabazyo; ahakuba itwe tukuratira ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu yaaturagiire, kwonka imwe mumutsigireho." 
2Chronicles13:12 Reeba, Ruhanga ari hamwe naitwe, naatwebembera, kandi n'abanyamurwa be bari aha, baine enzamba z'okuhuruza ab'okubarwanisa. Imwe beene Israeli 'mwe, murekye kurwanisa MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe; ahabw'okuba timurikubaasa kusingura." 
2Chronicles13:13 Obwo Yeroboamu akaba ayohereize ab'okubagwera, ngu babateere nibabareetwa enyima; n'ahabw'ekyo engabo ze zikaba ziri omu maisho g'Abayuda, n'ab'okubagwera babari enyima." 
2Chronicles13:14 Abayuda ku baanagire amaisho, baashanga orugamba rubaturukire omumaisho n'enyima; baatakira MUKAMA, abanyamurwa baateera enzamba," 
2Chronicles13:15 n'abashaija ba Yuda baateera orwari; ku baaruteire, Ruhanga yaasingura Yeroboamu n'Abaisraeli boona omu maisho ga Abiya n'Abayuda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Abaisraeli baahunga Abayuda, Ruhanga yaabahayo omu mikono yaabo." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya n'abantu be baabaitamu abantu baingi munonga; batyo Abaisraeli baafamu abashaija entoore obusiriira butaano. 
2Chronicles13:18 Okwo nikwo Abaisraeli baahweire eishaija omu bunaku obwo, Abayuda bakabasingura, ahabw'okwesiga MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Bwanyima Abiya yaakurata Yeroboamu, yaamunyaga endembo ezi, Beseeli n'ebirorero byayo, Yeshana n'ebirorero byayo na Efurooni n'ebirorero byayo." 
2Chronicles13:20 Omu busingye wa Abiya Yeroboamu taragizire bu agaruka kugira amaani; bwanyima MUKAMA yaamurwaza, yaafa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Kwonka Abiya yaayeyongyera amaani. Yaashwera abakazi ikumi na bana, yaazaara abatabani makumi abiri na babiri, na bahara ikumi na mukaaga." 
2Chronicles13:22 Endiijo mirimo ya Abiya, emicwe ye n'ebigambo bye bihandiikirwe omu kitabo kya nabi Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Bwanyima Abiya yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omu rurembo rwa Daudi; Asa omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe. Omu biro bye esni ekamara emyaka ikumi eine obusingye." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa yaakora ebirungi kandi ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA. 
2Chronicles14:3 Akaihaho amatambiro g'enduga-mahanga n'emyanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, yaasheenya enyomyo z'amabaare, yaatema Ashera," 
2Chronicles14:4 kandi yaaragiira Abayuda kusherura MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo, n'okworobera ebiragiro n'ebyatairweho." 
2Chronicles14:5 Kandi yaiha omu ndembo zoona eza Yuda emyanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, n'ebyoterero by'okwotereraho obubaane. Obugabe bwagira obuhuumure omu busingye bwe." 
2Chronicles14:6 Yaayombeka endembo ezeehinguririziibwe amabaare omuri Yuda, ahakuba ensi ekaba eine obusingye. Omuri egyo myaka tiyaagira ngamba; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akamuha obusingye." 
2Chronicles14:7 Yaagira Abayuda ati: Ka twombekye endembo ezi, tuzeehinguririze engo z'amabaare, tuzombekyeho eminaara, n'amarembo againe enyigi ezirikukingwa empimbi; ensi ekiri eyaitu, ahabw'okuba tusherwire MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu; tumusherwire, nawe yaatuha obusingye embaju zoona. Batyo baayombeka, baaba gye." 
2Chronicles14:8 Kandi Asa akaba aine eihe ry'abashaija obusiriira bushatu b'abarugire Yuda abaine engabo n'amacumu, n'abarugire Benyamiini obusiriira bubiri n'obukumi munaana, ab'engabo n'amata; abo boona bakaba bari abashaija b'amaani amamanzi." 
2Chronicles14:9 Bwanyima Zeera owa Esiopia yaija kubarwanisa n'eihe ry'engabo akakaikuru n'ebigaari magana ashatu, yaahika Mareesha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa yaashohora kumubugana, baatenga orugamba omu ruhita rwa Zefasa ahari Mareesha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa yaatakira MUKAMA Ruhanga we, naagira ati: Ai MUKAMA, tihaine orikwingana naiwe omu kuhwera abataine maani baateerwa ab'amaani. MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, otuhe emikono, ahabw'okuba niiwe turikwesiga, kandi omu iziina ryawe twizire kurwanisa omutwe ogu muhango munonga ogw'engabo. Ai MUKAMA, niiwe Ruhanga waitu, otaikiriza omuntu kukusingura." 
2Chronicles14:12 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaasingura Abaesiopia omu maisho ga Asa n'Abayuda, Abaesiopia baahunga." 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa n'abantu abu yaabaire aine baababinga, baabahitsya Geera, Abaesiopia baafa baingi munonga, tibaabaasa kugaruka kweyunga; ahabw'okuba bakacwekyerezibwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA n'eihe rya. Abashaija ba Yuda baatwara eminyago mingi munonga;" 
2Chronicles14:14 bwanyima baacwekyereza endembo zoona ezaabaire zeehinguririize Geera, ahabw'okuba Abaesiopia bakaba baitsirwe obwoba obwareetsirwe MUKAMA. Baanyaga ezo ndembo zoona, ahakuba zikaba zirimu eminyago mingi." 
2Chronicles14:15 Kandi baacwekyereza amahema g'abaabaire batungire ente, baanyaga entaama n'engamira nyingi munonga. Bwanyima baagaruka Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Omwoyo wa Ruhanga yaija ahari Azaria mwene Odedi," 
2Chronicles15:2 yaashohora kubugana Asa, yaamugira ati: Iwe n'Abayuda n'Ababenyamiini, mumpurire. Ruhanga ari hamwe naimwe, mwaba muri hamwe nawe. Ku murikumusherura, nimumuzoora; kwonak ku murikumutsigaho, nawe naabatsigaho." 
2Chronicles15:3 Nimumanya ku Abaisraeli baamazire omwanya muhango bataine Ruhanga nyamuhanga, n'obu yaakuba omunyamurwa orikubeegyesa, kandi bataine biragiro;" 
2Chronicles15:4 kwonka ku baahindukiire MUKAMA Ruhanga wa israeli omu busaasi bwabo, baamusherura, baamuzoora." 
2Chronicles15:5 Omu biro ebyo hakaba hatariho busingye aha muntu weena orikushohora, nari orikutaaha, ahabw'okuba emirabanamu mingi ekagwisa kubi munonga abatuuzi boona ab'omuri ago mahanga." 
2Chronicles15:6 Baataanamu, eihanga ryarwana n'erindi, n'orurembo rwarwana n'orundi, ahakuba Ruhanga akabatuntuza n'obusaasi bw'emiringo yoona." 
2Chronicles15:7 Kwonka imwe, mugume! Mutacweka emikono; ahabw'okuba emirimo yaanyu eryazimurirwa." 
2Chronicles15:8 Asa ku yaahuriire ebyo bigambo by'obunabi bwa Azaria mwene Odedi, yaagu, yaiha ebishushani ebirikunugwa omu nsi yoona eya Yuda n'eya Benyamiini n'omu ndembo ezi yaakubwire omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, kandi yaahunduuza eitambiro rya MUKAMA eryabaire riri omu maisho g'ekisasi eky'omu maisho ga hekalu ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles15:9 Bwanyima yaateeranira hamwe Abayuda n'Ababenyamiini boona, n'abaarugire omuri Efuraimu, Manaase na Simeoni, abaabaire baabashuhuukiiremu; ahakuba abantu baingi, ku baareebire MUKAMA Ruhanga we ari hamwe nawe, baacwa omuri Israeli, baija, baamwehongyera." 
2Chronicles15:10 Omu kwezi kwa kashatu kw'omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'etaano ogw'omu busingye bwa Asa, nibwo baateeranira Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles15:11 Ahari eryo izooba baatambira MUKAMA ente magana mushanju n'entaama obukumi mushanju, nibaziiha omu minyago ei baabaire bareetsire." 
2Chronicles15:12 Baaragaana endagaano kusherura MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo n'omutima gwabo gwona n'amagara gaabo goona; 
2Chronicles15:13 kandi ngu, omuntu weena oraayangye kusherura MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa israeli, yaaba muto, yaaba mukuru, yaaba mushaija, yaaba mukazi, aitwe." 
2Chronicles15:14 Baarahira omu maisho ga MUKAMA n'eiraka rihango, nibateera akaari, n'amakondere n'enzamba." 
2Chronicles15:15 Abayuda boona baashemerererwa egyo ndahiro; ahakuba bakarahira n'omutima gwabo gwona, kandi baamusherura n'okwetenga kwabo kwona, baamuzoora; MUKAMA yaabaha obuhuumure embaju zoona." 
2Chronicles15:16 Kandi omugabe Asa yaabinga Maaka nyina, yaamwiha aha bwanyin'omugabe, naamutura okukorera Ashara ekishushani ekirikunugwa. Asa yaatema ekyo kishushani, yaakihondahonda, yaakyokyeza aha mugyera Kidirooni." 
2Chronicles15:17 Kwonka emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu teraihirwe muri Israeli. N'obu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, omutima gwa Asa gukaba gutaine ky'okuhanywa ebiro bye byona." 
2Chronicles15:18 Kandi yaareeta omu nju ya Ruhanga ebintu ebi ishe yaashoroire, efeeza, n'ezaabu, n'ebintu by'okukoresa." 
2Chronicles15:19 Tihaabaho bundi bweme okuhitsya omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu n'etaano ogw'omu busingye bwe. 
2Chronicles16:1 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na mukaaga ogw'omu busingye bwa Asa, Baasha omugabe wa Israeli akainamuka, yaateera Yuda, yaayombeka Raama, ngu abone kuzibira omuntu weena kuruga owa Asa omugabe wa Yuda, nari okutaaha owe." 
2Chronicles16:2 Asa nikwo kwiha efeeza n'ezaabu omu mabiikiro g'omu nju ya MUKAMA, n'ag'omu nju y'omugabe, akabitwekyera Benihadadi omugabe wa Siria, owaabaire atwire Damasiko, naagira ati:" 
2Chronicles16:3 Ka turagaane endagaano y'okukwatanisa, nk'oku tata aaragaine na sho. Reeba, naakutwekyera efeeza n'ezaabu. Gyenda, oite endagaano ei waaragaine na Baasha omugabe wa Israeli, abone kundugira omu nsi." 
2Chronicles16:4 Benihadadi yaikiriza eby'omugabe Asa, yaatuma abakuru b'amahe ge kuteera endembo za Israeli, baakwata Iyooni, Daani, Abeeli-maimu n'endembo z'amabiikiro zoona ez'omuri Nafutaali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Baasha ku yaakihuriire, yaarekyera aho kwombeka Raama, yaayemereza omurimo." 
2Chronicles16:6 Bwanyima omugabe Asa yaatwara Abayuda boona, baiha omuri Raama amabaare n'embaaho, ebi Baasha yaabaire naayombekyersa; yaabyombekyesa Geeba na Mizipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Omu bunaku obwo Hanania omuhanuuzi yaija ahari Asa omugabe wa Yuda, yaamugira ati: Ahabw'okuba oyesigire omugabe wa Siria, tiwaayesiga MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, nikyo eihe ry'omugabe wa Siria rikukiriireho." 
2Chronicles16:8 Abaesiopia n'Abalibya bakaba batari eihe rihango munonga, eriine ebigaari bingi n'abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi baingi? N'obu kiraabe kyabaire kiri kityo, kwonka ahabw'okwesiga MUKAMA akabahayo omu mikono yaawe." 
2Chronicles16:9 Ahabw'okuba amaisho ga MUKAMA gairuka oku n'oku nigabuga ensi yoona, okweyoreka ku ari ow'amaani kuhwera abaine emitima eshugaine ahariwe. Omuri eki okozire eby'obushema; n'ahabw'ekyo okuruga hati noija kuguma noogira obweme." 
2Chronicles16:10 Ahonaaho Asa yaagirira omuhanuuzi ekiniga, yaamuta omu nkomo, yaamutwara omu kihome; ahabw'okuba akamugwerwa kubi munonga ahabw'ekyo. Kandi omu bunaku obwo Asa yaabonabonesa abantu bamwe." 
2Chronicles16:11 Ebi Asa yaakozire, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'abagabe ba Yuda na Israeli." 
2Chronicles16:12 Bwanyima omu mwanka gwa makumi ashatu na mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwe, Asa yaarwara ebigyere, egyo ndwara yaaba ey'amaani munonga; hoona n'obu yaarwaire, tarasherwire buhwezi ahari MUKAMA, kureka akabusherura aha bafumu." 
2Chronicles16:13 Bwanyima Asa yaafa omu mwaka gwa makumi ana na gumwe ogw'omu busingye bwe, yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles16:14 Baamuziika omu kituuro, eki yaayetimbiire omu rurembo rwa Daudi. Baarambika omutumbi gwe aha kitanda, ekiijwire emigaju ey'emiringo etari emwe, ejwangiibwe abanyamyoga, kandi baacumika omuriro mwingi kumuhaisa ekitiinisa." 
2Chronicles17:1 Yehoshafaati omutabani akategyeka omu mwanya gwa Asa ishe, yaakora eby'okwehamya ngu ayerinde Israeli." 
2Chronicles17:2 Yaata emitwe y'engabo omu ndembo zoona eza Yuda ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, yaata abarinzi omu nsi ya Yuda, n'omu ndembo za Efuraimu, ezi Asa ishe yaakubwire." 
2Chronicles17:3 MUKAMA yaaguma na Yehoshafaati, ahabw'okuba akagyendera omu micwe ya ishe ey'okubanza; tiyaakuratira Baabaali," 
2Chronicles17:4 kureka yaakuratira Ruhanga wa ishe, yaaguma naayorobera ebiragiro bye, tiyaakuratira mitwarize ya Israeli." 
2Chronicles17:5 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaahamya obugabe bwe; Abayuda boona baaguma nibatoijera Yehoshafaati, yaatunga munonga, kandi yaagira ekitiinisa kingi." 
2Chronicles17:6 Yaagyendera omu muhanda ya MUKAMA n'omutima gutaine bwoba; kandi yaihaho emyanya mikuru y'okuramizamu na Ashera omuri Yuda. 
2Chronicles17:7 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogw'omu busingye bwe, yaatuma abatware be Benihaili, Obadia, Zekaria, Netaneeli na Mikaaya kwegyesa omu ndembo za Yuda;" 
2Chronicles17:8 yaabatuma n'Abaleevi aba, Shemaya, Netania, Zebadia, Asaheeli, Shemiramoosi, Yehonasaani, Adoniya, Tobiya na Tobadoniya; hamwe n'abo Baleevi yaatuma abanyamurwa Elishaama na Yehoraamu." 
2Chronicles17:9 Baayegyesa omuri Yuda, baine ekitabo kya MUKAMA eky'ebiragiro; baaraba omu ndembo zaaona eza Yuda, nibeegyesa abantu." 
2Chronicles17:10 MUKAMA yaitsa obwoba abagabe b'amahanga goona ag'ensi ezaabaire zeehinguririize Yuda, tibaarwanisa Yehoshafaati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Abamwe aha Bafilistia baareetera Yehoshafaati ebiconco, kandi baaguma nibamutoijera efeeza; kandi n'Abaharabu baamureetera empaya z'entaama enkumi mushanju na magana mushanju, n'empaya z'embuzi enkumi mushanju na magana mushanju." 
2Chronicles17:12 Yehoshafaati yaaguma naayeyongyera ekitiinisa; yaayombeka omuri Yuda ebigo n'endembo z'amabiikiro; 
2Chronicles17:13 kandi yaabiika ebintu bingi omu ndembo zaayo. N'omuri Yerusaalemu yaagira u abaserukare, abashaija b'amaani amamanzi." 
2Chronicles17:14 Ogu nigwo mubaro gwabo, nk'amaju ga baishenkurubo oku gaabaire gari; omu Bayuda, abakuru b'amahe bakaba bari aba: Aduna, omukuru w'engabo owaabaire aine abashaija b'amaani amamanzi obusiriira bushatu," 
2Chronicles17:15 orikumukurata akaba ari Yehohanani omukuru w'engabo owaabaire aine abashaija obusiriira bubiri n'obukumi munaana," 
2Chronicles17:16 n'orikutaho akaba ari amasia mwene Zikuri, owaayehaireyo kuheereza MUKAMA n'omutima gwekundiire; we akaba aine abashaija b'amaani amamanzi obusiriira bubiri." 
2Chronicles17:17 Omu Babenyamiini abakuru b'amahe bakaba bari aba: Eliada omushaija ow'amaani emanzi, owaabaire aine abashaija b'amata n'engabo obusiriira bubiri," 
2Chronicles17:18 n'orikumukurata Yehozabadi, owaabaire aine abashaija akasiriira n'obukumi munaana abeeteekateekyeire orugamba." 
2Chronicles17:19 Abo nibo baabaire nibakorera omugabe, otabariireho abo abu omugabe yaataire omu ndembo zeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare omuri Yuda yoona." 
2Chronicles18:1 Yehoshafaati akaba atungire munonga, kandi aine ekitiinisa kingi; yaashwererana na Ahabu, baagira obuzaare." 
2Chronicles18:2 Emyaka ku yaahingwireho, yaashuuma, yaashanga Ahabu omuri Samaria; Ahabu yaamubaagira entaama n'ente nyingi, n'abu yaabaire aine, yaamubeihabeiha kuhurura nawe kuteera Ramosi-gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabu omugabe wa Israeli yaagira Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda ati: Noija kuhurura naanye Ramosi-gileadi? Yaamugarukamu ati: Nyowe naiwe turi bamwe, abantu bangye nibo baawe. Nitwija kukwatanisa naiwe omu rugamba." 
2Chronicles18:4 Yehoshafaati yaagira omugabe wa Israeli ati: Ninkweshengyereza, banza oyehanuuze ahari MUKAMA, oreebe eki arikugamba eri izooba." 
2Chronicles18:5 Atyo omugabe wa Israeli yaateerana baanabi abashaija magana ana, yaababuuza ati: Tuteere Ramosi-gileadi, nari ndereere? Baamugarukamu bati: Irooko, ohurure, ahakuba MUKAMA naija kugihayo omu mikono y'omugabe." 
2Chronicles18:6 Kwonka Yehoshafaati yaagira ati: Beitu shi aha, tihariho nabi wa MUKAMA, tukamubuuza?" 
2Chronicles18:7 Omugabe wa Israeli yaagira Yehoshafaati ati: hakiriho omushaija omwe, ou turikubaasa kweheanuuzaho ebya MUKAMA, niwe Mikaaya mwene Imula; kwonka nimmwanga, ahabw'okuba tandagurira birungi, kureka ebibi. Yehoshafaati yaagira ati: Nyakusinga, reka kugamba otyo." 
2Chronicles18:8 Atyo omugabe wa Israeli yaayeta omukuru w'abaserukare, yaamugira ati: Ndahukiza Mikaaya mwene Imula." 
2Chronicles18:9 Obwo omugabe wa israeli na Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda bakaba bashutami aha bitebe byabo eby'obugabe, bajwaire zaabushuuti zaabo, bari aha mbuga omu irembo rya Samaria, baanabi boona babari omumaisho nibaragura." 
2Chronicles18:10 Zedekia mwene Kenaana yaayekorera amahembe g'ekyoma, yaaragura ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Aga mahembe nigo oraabingise Abasiria okuhitsya obu baraacwekyerere." 
2Chronicles18:11 Kandi na baanabi boona baaragura batyo nibagira bati: Irooko oteere Ramosi-gileadi, osingure; MUKAMA naija kugihayo omu mikono y'omugabe." 
2Chronicles18:12 Entumwa eyaaza kweta Mikaaya yaamugira eti: Reeba, ebigambo bya baanabi nibiikirizana, biragura gye aha mugabe; naiwe ebigambo byawe bibe nk'ebyabo, oragure gye." 
2Chronicles18:13 Kwonka Mikaaya yaagira ati: Nindahira MUKAMA, eki MUKAMA arangambire, nikyo ndaagambe." 
2Chronicles18:14 Ku yaahikire omugabe, omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Mikaaya, tuteere Ramosi-gileadi, nari ndereere? Yaamugarukamu ati: Hurura, osingure; nibaija kuheebwayo omu mikono y'omugabe." 
2Chronicles18:15 Kwonka omugabe yaamugira ati: Nkurahize kangahi okutangambira kindi omu iziina rya MUKAMA kureka amazima? 
2Chronicles18:16 Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Ndeebire Abaisraeli boona bataataaniire aha bibungo nk'entaama ezitaine muriisa; MUKAMA yaagira ati: Aba tibaine mukama; boona bagarukyeyo n'obusingye, buri muntu omu ka ye." 
2Chronicles18:17 Omugabe wa Israeli yaagira Yehoshafaati ati: Tinaakugambira nti: Tarikwija kundagurira birungi kureka ebibi? 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaaya yaagira ati: Mbwenu hurira ekigambo kya MUKAMA. Naareeba MUKAMA ashutami aha kitebe kye, n'eihe ryona ery'omu iguru ryemereire aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo n'orwa bumosho;" 
2Chronicles18:19 MUKAMA yaagira ati: N'oha oraabeihabeihe Ahabu, akateera Ramosi-gileadi, akagwayo? Omwe yaagamba okundi, n'ondi okundi." 
2Chronicles18:20 Bwanyima haija omwoyo, gwayemerera omu maisho ga MUKAMA, gwagira guti: Niinye ndaamubeihabeihe. MUKAMA yaagubuuza ati: Noomubeihabeihesa ki?" 
2Chronicles18:21 Gwagira guti: niinyija kugyenda, mpindukye omwoyo gw'ebishuba, ngambire omuri baanabi be boona. MUKAMA yaagira ati: niiwe oraamubeihabeihe, kandi noija kukibaasa; irooko okore otyo." 
2Chronicles18:22 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA ataire omwoyo gw'ebishuba omuri baanabi baawe aba boona; kandi MUKAMA akugambireho kubi. 
2Chronicles18:23 Bwanyima Zedekia mwene Kenaana yairira haihi, yaateera Mikaaya oruhi rw'omushaaya, naagira ati: Omwoyo wa MUKAMA arabire hi kundugaho kugamba naiwe?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaaya yaagira ati: Mbwenu oryakireeba ahari eryo izooba ku oriba nooza kweshereka omu kishengye ky'omunda. 
2Chronicles18:25 Omugabe wa Israeli yaagira ati: Twara Mikaaya, omugarure ahari Amoni omukuru w'orurembo na Yoasi mutabani w'omugabe," 
2Chronicles18:26 omugire oti: oku nikwo omugabe arikugamba naagira ati: Mute ekishaija eki omu kihome, mukiriise eby'okurya kandi mukinywaise amaizi eby'akahenano, okuhitsya obu ndaagarukye n'obusingye." 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaaya yaagira ati: Ku oraagarukye n'obusingye, biri MUKAMA tagambiire muriinye. Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Naimwe bantu 'mwe mwena, mukihurire!" 
2Chronicles18:28 Bwanyima omugabe wa Israeli na Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda bainamuka, baateera Ramosi-gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:29 Omugabe wa Israeli yaagira Yehoshafaati ati: Nyowe naaza kwehindura, nze kurwana, kwonka iwe ogume ojwaire ebijwaro byawe by'obugabe. Atyo omugabe wa Israeli yaayehindura, yaaza aha rugamba." 
2Chronicles18:30 Kandi omugabe wa Siria akaba aragiire abakuru b'ebigaari bye ati: Mutarwana n'abato, n'obu baakuba abakuru, kureka omugabe wa Israeli wenka." 
2Chronicles18:31 Abo bakuru b'ebigaari, ku baareebire Yehoshafaati, baagira bati: Buzima niwe mugabe wa Israeli. Baakubuuka kurwana nawe. Yehoshafaati yaateera enduuru, MUKAMA yaamuhwera; Ruhanga yaabamwihaho;" 
2Chronicles18:32 abakuru b'ebigaari, ku baareebire atari mugabe wa Israeli, baagarukayo, baareka kumubinga." 
2Chronicles18:33 Kwonka haarugaho omushaija yaananuura obuta, yaafa okurasha omwambi, yaateera omugabe wa Israeli, ahu ebijwaro bye eby'okurwanisa n'eky'aha kifuba birikuteeranira; omugabe nikwo kugambira omuvugi w'ekigaari kye ati: Hinduka, onyihe omu rugamba, ahabw'okuba naahutaara munonga." 
2Chronicles18:34 Eryo izooba orugamba rwayeyongyera amaani, omugabe baamuhigika omu kigaari kye naareebana n'Abasiria, okuhitsya omu mwabazyo; eizooba ku ryabaire nirirengarenga, yaafa." 
2Chronicles19:1 Bwanyima Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda yaagaruka buhooro omu kikaari kye omuri Yerusaalemu. 
2Chronicles19:2 Ku yaabaire atakataahire, Yehu mwene Hanani omuhanuuzi yaaza kumubugana, yaamugira ati: Oshemereire kuha ababi emikono, n'okukunda abarikwanga MUKAMA? N'ahabw'ekyo ekiniga kya MUKAMA kyakwijaho." 
2Chronicles19:3 Kwonka, n'obu kiraabe kiri kityo, omuriiwe harimu n'ebirungi, ahakuba okacwekyereza Ashera omu nsi, kandi omutima gwawe waaguta aha kusherura MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles19:4 Bwanyima Yehoshafaati yaatuura Yerusaalemu; yaagaruka yaagyendagyenda omu bantu, okuruga Beeri-sheba okuhika omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, yaabagarura ahari MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Yaata abaramuzi omu nsi, omu ndembo zoona eza Yuda ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, omuri buri rumwe," 
2Chronicles19:6 yaagambira abaramuzi ati: Muteekateekye eki murikukora; ahakuba timurikuramurira bantu, kureka MUKAMA; kandi ari hamwe naimwe omu kucwa emanja." 
2Chronicles19:7 N'ahabw'ekyo mugume mutiine MUKAMA; kandi mwerinde omu bi murikukora; ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu taita manja, tashoroora mu bantu, kandi tarya nguzi." 
2Chronicles19:8 Kandi omuri Yerusaalemu Yehoshafaati yaataho Abaleevi bamwe n'abanyamurwa, n'abakuru b'emiryango ya Israeli, kuguma nibacwa emanja ahabwa MUKAMA, kandi n'okumarira abarikujurira emanja zaabo. Abo baramuzi bakaba batuura Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles19:9 Yaabeehanangiriza ati: Oku nikwo muritwaza omu kutiina MUKAMA, omu bwesigwa, mutaireho emitima yaanyu yoona." 
2Chronicles19:10 Beene waanyu abatwire omu ndembo zaabo, ku bariguma baabareetera emanja, z'obwitsi, ez'ebiragiro, ez'ebyaragiirwe, ez'ebyatairweho nari ez'emigyenzo, muryaguma mubahabure, barekye kugiibwaho orubanja omu maisho ga MUKAMA, naimwe na beene waanyu murekye kuhikwaho ekiniga. Okwo nikwo muritwaza, mukareka kugiibwaho orubanja." 
2Chronicles19:11 Kandi reeba, Amaria omunyamurwa omukuru niwe arikubategyeka omu bigambo byona ebya MUKAMA, na Zebedia mwene Ishimaeli omutegyeki w'enju ya Yuda, omu bigambo byona eby'omugabe; kandi Abaleevi baryaguma nibabaheereza nk'abakuru. Mukore n'obumanzi; kandi MUKAMA agume n'abarikukora eby'oburyo." 
2Chronicles20:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo Abamoabu, Abaamoni n'abamwe aha Bameuni bakaija kurwanisa Yehoshafaati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Haija abantu baagambira Yehoshafaati bati: Omutwe muhango gw'engabo guri omu muhanda niguruga Edomu, seeri y'enyanja, gwizire kukuteera; reeba, baahika Hazazoni-tamaari, niyo Enigeedi." 
2Chronicles20:3 Ahonaaho Yehoshafaati yaatiina, yaamariirira kusherura MUKAMA, kandi yaaragiira Abayuda boona kwesiibyakwo." 
2Chronicles20:4 Abayuda baayeteerana kusherura obuhwezi ahari MUKAMA; baaruga omu ndembo z'omuri Yuda zoona kuza kusherura MUKAMA. 
2Chronicles20:5 Yehoshafaati yaayemerera ahagati y'omutwe gw'Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu, abateeraniire omu nju ya MUKAMA omu maisho g'ekikaari kisya," 
2Chronicles20:6 yaagira ati: Ai MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe, tiiwe Ruhanga ow'omu iguru? Tiiwe orikutegyeka obugabe bwona obw'amahanga? Omu mukono gwawe harimu obushoboorozi n'amaani, tihariho orikubaasa kukuza omu kaso." 
2Chronicles20:7 Ai Ruhanga waitu, torabingire abatuuzi b'omuri egi nsi omu maisho g'abantu baawe Israeli, okagiha baijukuru ba Abrahamu munywani waawe kuba eyaabo ebiro byona?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Kandi kwo bakagituuramu, baayombekyeramu eiziina ryawe Omwanya ogurikwera, nibagira bati:" 
2Chronicles20:9 Akabi ku karituhikaho, rurara, okugira orubanja, orufu, nari enjara, turyayemerera omu maisho g'enju egi n'omu maisho gaawe, ahakuba eiziina ryawe rituura omuri egi nju, tukutakire omu kubonabona kwaitu; naiwe ohurire kandi ojune." 
2Chronicles20:10 Mbwenu reeba, Abaamoni, Abamoabu n'ab'omu bibungo bya Seiri, abu waayangire Abaisraeli ku bateera ensi yaabo, obu baabaire nibaruga omu nsi ya Misri, kureka bakabaraba hangahari, batabacwekyererze," 
2Chronicles20:11 reeba oku barikutuzimuurira, nibaza kutubinga omu buhunguzi bwawe, obu waatuhaire kuhungura." 
2Chronicles20:12 Ai Ruhanga waitu, torikwija kubacwera orubanja, okabafubira? Ahakuba titwine maani g'okurwanisa eri ihe rihango eriizire kuturwanisa; kandi titurikumanya oku turaagire; kureka niiwe tuhangire amaisho." 
2Chronicles20:13 Omuri obwo bunaku abashaija ba Yuda boona bakaba beemereire omu maisho ga MUKAMA n'abeereere baabo n'abakzi baabo n'abaana baabo. 
2Chronicles20:14 Ahonaaho Omwoyo wa MUKAMA yaija ahari Yahazieli mwene Zekaria, mwijukuru wa Benaaya, ya Yayeli mwene Matania, Omuleevi ow'omuri beene Asafu, ahu yaabaire ari ahagati y'ogwo mutwe." 
2Chronicles20:15 Yaagira ati: Muhurire, imwe Abayuda, n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu n'omugabe Yehoshafaati, oku nikwo MUKAMA arikubagambira naagira ati: Mutatiina ogu mutwe muhango gw'engabo, kandi mutahahaaza emitima; ahakuba orugamba ti rwanyu, n'orwa MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles20:16 Nyencakare mushuume, mubateere; nibaija kwinamukira ahu orikutembera nooza Ziizi; nimwija kubashanga aha muheru gw'oruhanga aha burugwa-izooba bw'eihamba rya Yerueli." 
2Chronicles20:17 Omuri orwo rugamba timurikwija kwetenga kurwana; muze omu myanya yaanyu, mwemerere kwonka, mureebe oku MUKAMA araabasingurire, imwe Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu. Mutatiina, kandi mutahahaaza emitima; nyencakare muhurure mubateere; MUKAMA naija kuba hamwe naimwe." 
2Chronicles20:18 Bwanyima Yehoshafaati yainika omutwe ahansi, yaaramya, n'Abayuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu boona nabo baagwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA bajuumaire, nibamuramya." 
2Chronicles20:19 Abaleevi ab'omuryango gwa Kohasi, n'ab'omu gwa Koora, baayemerera kuhimbisa MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli n'eiraka rihango munonga." 
2Chronicles20:20 Omu kasheeshe munonga baimuka, baaza omu ihamba rya Tekoa; ku baabaire nibakigyenda, Yehoshafaati yaayemerera, yaagira ati: Mumpurire, imwe Abayuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, Mwesigye MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, nibwo muraahamibwe; mwikirize baanabi be, nibwo muraabe gye." 
2Chronicles20:21 Ku yaaherize kuhanuura n'abantu, yaataho ab'okweshongorera MUKAMA, n'okumuhimbisa bajwaire ebirikwera, kugyenda beebembeire eihe, nibagira bati: Musiime MUKAMA, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles20:22 Ku baatandikire kweshongora n'okuhimbisa, MUKAMA yaataho ab'okugwera Abaamoni, n'Abamoabu n'ab'omu bibungo bya Seiri abaizire kurwanisa Abayuda; baabarabanisamu." 
2Chronicles20:23 Ahakuba Abaamoni n'Abamoabu bakagurukana abatuuzi b'omu bibungo bya Seiri, baabacwekyerereza kimwe; ku baaherize kucwekyereza aba Seiri, baayehindukiririzana, baatandika kwitana bonka, buri muntu yaita mugyenzi we." 
2Chronicles20:24 Abayuda ku baahikire aha munaara gw'abarinzi omu ihamba, baanaga amaisho ei ogwo mutwe gw'engabo gwabaire guri, baashanga boona baabaire emitumbi barambiire ahansi, hataine ohonokireho." 
2Chronicles20:25 Yehooshafaati n'abantu be ku baahikiireyo kubanyaga, baashangayo amatungo maingi munonga, ebintu, ebijwaro n'ebindi bintu eby'obuguzi bwingi, baabyetwarira okuhitsya obu byabaremeireho. Ahabw'okuba bingi munonga, baamara ebiro bishatu nibanyaga." 
2Chronicles20:26 Aha kiro kya kana baateeranira omu ruhanga rwa Beraaka, baasiimirayo MUKAMA; nikyo ogwo mwanya gurikweterwa Beraaka n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Chronicles20:27 Bwanyima buri muntu ow'omu Bayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu hamwe na Yehoshafaati abeebembeire baagaruka Yerusaalemu bashemereirwe, ahakuba MUKAMA akabaha okweraata aha bazigu baabo." 
2Chronicles20:28 Baahika Yerusaalemu aha nju ya MUKAMA, baine enanga n'endingiri n'amakondere." 
2Chronicles20:29 Ab'omu bugabe bw'amahanga goona, ku baahuriire ngu MUKAMA arwaniise abazigu ba Israeli baashwekwa obwoba ahabw'okutiina Ruhanga." 
2Chronicles20:30 N'ahabw'ekyo obugabe bwa Yehoshafaati bwatuuza, ahakuba Ruhanga we akamuha obuhuumure embaju zoona." 
2Chronicles20:31 Okwo nikwo Yehoshafaati yaategyekire Yuda. Akatandika kutegyeka aine emyaka makumi ashatu n'etaano; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano. Nyina akaba naayetwa Azuubu muhara wa Shiluhi. 
2Chronicles20:32 Yaagyendera omu muhanda gwa Asa ishe, tiyaagira bu aguteishukire; kureka yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles20:33 Kwonka emyanya mikuru ey'okuramizamu tiyaihwaho, ahakuba abantu bakaba batakataire mitima yaabo ahari Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles20:34 Endiijo mirimo ya Yehoshafaati, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, ehandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Yeehu mwene Hanani eky'eby'omu busingye, ebyahandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'abagabe ba Israeli." 
2Chronicles20:35 Bwanyima y'ebyo Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda yaayeteerana na Ahazia omugabe wa Israeli, owaabaire naakora kubi." 
2Chronicles20:36 Yaakwatanisa nawe kubaija emeeri z'okuza Tarushiishi, baazibaijera Ezioni-geberi." 
2Chronicles20:37 Bwanyima Eliezeeri mwene Dodavahu owa Mareesha, yaaragura ahari Yehoshafaati naagira ati: Ahabw'okweteerana na Ahazia, MUKAMA naija kucwekyereza eki obaizire. Ezo meeri zaahendagurika, tizaabaasa kuza Tarushiishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Yehoshafaati yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaazikwa hamwe nabo omu rurembo rwa Daudi; Yehoraamu omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles21:2 Akaba aine abarumuna, abaana ba Yehoshafaati, Azaria, Yehieli, Zekaria, Azaria, Mikaeli na Shefatia; abo boona bakaba bari batabani ba Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles21:3 Ishebo akabaha ebiconco bingi, by'efeeza, n'ezaabu n'ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi hamwe n'endembo omuri Yuda ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare; kwonka obugabe yaabuha Yehoraamu, ahabw'okuba omwana w'omujigaijo." 
2Chronicles21:4 Yehoraamu ku yaagiire aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa ishe, yaahamibwa, yaita abarumuna boona na rurara, n'abandi banyiginya b'omuri Yuda." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yehoraamu akaba ahikize emyaka makumi ashatu n'ebiri, obu yaaza aha ngoma, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka munaana." 
2Chronicles21:6 Yaagyendera omu mihanda y'abagabe ba Israeli, nk'ab'enju ya Ahabu ashweire muhara wa Ahabu. Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles21:7 N'obu biraabe byabaire biri bityo, MUKAMA akanga kucwekyerereza kimwe enju ya Daudi, ahabw'endagaano ei yaaragaine na Daudi, n'ahabw'okumuraganisa we n'oruzaaro rwe, kubaha etabaaza ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles21:8 Omu biro bye Abanyaedomu bakagoma, baaruga omu butegyeki bwa Yuda, baayeteeraho owaabo mugabe." 
2Chronicles21:9 Bwanyima Yehoraamu yaayambuka n'abakuru b'engabo n'ebigaari bye byona; yaimuka nyekiro, yaateera Abanyaedomu, abaabaire bamwehinguririize n'abakuru b'ebigaari bye." 
2Chronicles21:10 Okwo nikwo Edomu yaagomire, ekaruga omu butegyeki bwa Yuda n'okuhitsya hati. Omu bunaku obwo Libuna nayo yaamugomera, ahabw'okuba akaba atsigireho MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles21:11 Kandi akata emyanya mikuru y'okuramizamu omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Yuda, yaareetera abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu okuruga ahari MUKAMA, kandi yaahabisa n'Abayuda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Bwanyima yaatunga ebaruha erikuruga ahari nabi Eliya, neegira eti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Daudi shwenkuru arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba togyendeire mu mihanda ya sho Yehoshafaati, n'obu yaakuba eya Asa omugabe wa Yuda," 
2Chronicles21:13 ogyendeire omu mihanda y'abagabe ba Israeli, waareetera Abayuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu okuruga ahari Ruhanga, kandi waataho n'okwita barumuna baawe, ab'enju ya sho, abaabaire nibakuhita," 
2Chronicles21:14 reeba, MUKAMA naija kureeta ekibonaboneso kihango aha bantu baawe, aha baana baawe, aha bakazi baawe n'aha bintu byawe byona," 
2Chronicles21:15 kandi naiwe wenka noija kurwara endwara mbi munonga omu mara, okuhitsya obu oraagume nooreeta omwoyo buri izooba." 
2Chronicles21:16 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaareetera Abafilistia n'Abaharabu, abahereraine na Abaesiopia kugirira Yehoraamu ekiniga;" 
2Chronicles21:17 baija kurwanisa Yuda, baagiteera, baanyagayo ebintu byona ebi baashangire omu nju y'omugabe, kandi n'abatabani n'abakazi be, tiyaatsigaza mwana weena ow'omwojo kureka Yehoahazi omwana we wa bucuranda." 
2Chronicles21:18 Bwanyima y'ebyo byona, MUKAMA yaamurwaza endwara etarikukira omu mara." 
2Chronicles21:19 Ebiro ku byahingwireho, aha muheru gw'emyaka ebiri, yaatandika kureeta omwoyo ahabw'egyo ndwara, yaafa aine obuhuruzi bwingi munonga. Abantu be tibaacumika muriro gw'okumuhaisa ekitiinisa, nk'oku baagiriire baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles21:20 Obu yaatandika kutegyeka, akaba aine emyaka makumi ashatu n'ebiri, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka munaana, yaafa atakiine orikumwenda. Baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi, kwonka ti mu bituuro by'abagabe." 
2Chronicles22:1 Abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu baagira Ahazia mutabani wa Yehoraamu omuto omugabe omu mwanya gwa ishe; ahabw'okuba omutwe gw'abashaija, abaizire omu rusiisira n'Abaharabu, bakaba baitsire abaana bakuru boona. N'ahabw'ekyo Ahazia mwene Yehoraamu omugabe wa Yuda yaategyeka." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahazia akaba aine emyaka makumi ana n'ebiri, obu yaatandika kutegyeka, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu omwaka gumwe. Nyina akaba naayetwa Atalia mwijukuru wa Omuri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Ahazia nawe yaagyendera omu micwe y'ab'enju ya Ahabu, ahabw'okuba nyina niwe yaabaire amuha obwegye kukora kubi." 
2Chronicles22:4 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, nk'oku ab'enju ya Ahabu baakozire; ahakuba ishe ku yaaherize kufa, baaguma nibamuha obwengye obwamucwekyereize." 
2Chronicles22:5 Kandi akakuratira obwengye bwabo, yaagyenda na Yoramu mwene Ahabu omugabe wa Israeli kurwanisa Hazaeli omugabe wa Siria ahari Ramosi-gileadi. Abasiria baahutaaza Yoramu," 
2Chronicles22:6 yagaruka Yezereeli kurwarirayo obuhuta, obu baamuhutaariize Raama, obu baarwana na Hazaeli omugabe wa Siria. Bwanyima Ahazia mwene Yehoraamu omugabe wa Yuda yaashuuma Yezereeli kureeba Yoramu mwene Ahabu, ahakuba akaba arwaire." 
2Chronicles22:7 Kwonka kikaba kiteekateekirwe Ruhanga, ngu okufa kwa Ahazia kubeho agiire kureeba Yoramu. Ahakuba ku yaahikireyo, yaagyenda na Yoramu kubugana Yehu mwene Nimushi, ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta kucwekyereza enju ya Ahabu." 
2Chronicles22:8 Ku yaabaire naaha ab'enju ya Ahabu ekifubiro, yaabugana abanyiginya ba Yuda na batabani ba barumuna ba Ahazia, abaabaire nibaheereza Amazia, yaabaita." 
2Chronicles22:9 Bwanyima yaasherura Ahazia, baamukwata ayesherekire omuri Samaria, baamureetera Yehu, yaamwita. Baamuziika, ahabw'okuba bakagira ngu ni mwijukuru wa Yehoshafaati, owaabaire naasherura MUKAMA n'omutima gwe gwona. Okuruga aho enju ya Ahazia yaabura omuntu orikubaasa kutwara engoma." 
2Chronicles22:10 Atalia nyina wa Ahazia, ku yaareebire omutabani yaafa, yaimuka yaacwekyereza ab'oruganda rw'omugabe wa Yuda boona." 
2Chronicles22:11 Kwonka Yehoshabeasi muhara w'omugabe yaatwara Yoasi mwene Ahazia, yaamwiba omuri batabani b'omugabe, abaabaire bari haihi kwitwa, we n'omurezi we yaabata omu kishengye ky'okuraaramu. Atyo Yehoshabeasi, muhara w'omugabe Yehoraamu, kandi muka Yehoyaada omunyamurwa, ahabw'okuba munyaanya wa Ahazia, yaamushereka Atalia, tiyaamwita." 
2Chronicles22:12 Yaamara nabo emyaka mukaaga, asherekirwe omu nju ya Ruhanga; obwo Atalia naategyeka ensi." 
2Chronicles23:1 Kwonka omu mwaka gwa mushanju Yehoyaada akeegumya, yaaragaana endagaano n'abakuru b'engabo igana-igana, Azaria mwene Yerohaamu, Ishimaeli mwene Yehohanani, Azaria mwene Obedi, Maaseya mwene Adaaya na Elishafaati mwene Zikuri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Baaraba omuri Yuda yoona, baateerana Abaleevi, nibabaiha omu ndembo zoona eza Yuda, n'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'Abaisraeli, baija Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles23:3 Abateeraine boona baaragaana endagaano n'omugabe bari omu nju ya Ruhanga. Yehoyaada yaabagira ati: Omwana w'omugabe ngugu! K'ategyekye, nk'oku MUKAMA yaagambire ahari beene Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Mbwenu oku nikwo muraatwaze. Omuriimwe abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi abarikwihwa aha murimo ahari sabato, ekicweka kimwe kya kashatu kibe eky'ab'okuridna amarembo," 
2Chronicles23:5 kimwe kya kashatu kibe eky'aha nju y'omugabe, na kimwe kya kashatu ekindi kibe eky'aha irembo ry'omusingi; kandi abantu boona baze omu bikaari bye'nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles23:6 Hatagira ondiijo weena owaataaha omu nju ya MUKAMA, kureka abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi abarikuheereza; bo bataahemu, ahabw'okuba n'abarikwera; kwonka abandi boona bategyereze okuragiira kwa MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles23:7 Abaleevi beehinguririze omugabe, buri muntu aine eby'okurwanisa bye omu ngaro; kandi omuntu weena oraataahe omu nju aitwe. Mugume n'omugabe, yaaba naataahamu, nari naashohora." 
2Chronicles23:8 Abaleevi n'Abayuda boona baakora nk'ebi Yehoyaada omunyamurwa yaabaragiira byona. Buri omwe yaareeta abantu be ab'okwihwa aha murimo ahari sabato, n'ab'okwija aha murimo ahari sabato; ahabw'okuba Yehoyaada omunyamurwa tararagiire baabaire bari aha rubu kutaaha." 
2Chronicles23:9 Bwanyima Yehoyaada omunyamurwa yaaha abakuru b'engabo amacumu n'engabo mpango n'enkye, ezaabaire ziri ez'omugabe Daudi, nizibiikwa omu nju ya Ruhanga;" 
2Chronicles23:10 yaataho abantu boona kuba abarinzi b'omugabe, buri muntu aine eky'okurwanisa kye omu ngaro, okuruga aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo bw'enju, okuhika aha rw'obwa bumosho, baayehinguririza eitambiro n'enju." 
2Chronicles23:11 Bwanyima yaashohoza omwana w'omugabe, yaamujweka ekirunga, yaamuha Eby'okuhamya; baamuranga ku yaaba omugabe, Yehoyaada n'abatabani baamushukaho amajuta, baagira bati: Omugabe nakaramaare!" 
2Chronicles23:12 Atalia ku yaahuriire orwari rw'abantu nibairuka nibahimbisa omugabe, yaataaha omu nju ya MUKAMA ahu bantu bari;" 
2Chronicles23:13 ku yaanagire amaisho, yaareeba omugabe ayemereire aha rubaju rw'nyomyo ye aha irembo, n'abakuru b'engabo n'abakondere bamwemereire aha rubaju, n'abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi nibashemererwa nibateera amakondere, kandi n'abeeshongozi baine ebintu byabo by'okuteera nibeebembera abarikweshongora. Ahonaaho Atalia yaataagura ebijwaro bye, yaagira ati: Okwebumba! Okwebumba!" 
2Chronicles23:14 Yehoyaada omunyamurwa yaashohoza abakuru b'engabo abaatairweho kutegyeka eihe, yaabagira ati: Mumurabye omu ngabo, mumushohoze; oraamukurate weena, mumwite na rurara. Ahakuba omunyamurwa akaragiira ati: Mutamwitira omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles23:15 Batyo baamutaho engaro, baamurabya omu irembo ry'embaraasi aha irembo ry'enju y'omugabe, baamwitirayo." 
2Chronicles23:16 Bwanyima Yehoyaada yaaragaana endagaano n'abantu boona kandi n'omugabe kuba abantu ba MUKAMA. 
2Chronicles23:17 Okuruga aho abantu boona baaza ahari nyaruju ya Baali, baagisheenya; amatambiro ge n'ebishushani bye baabisheenyagurira kimwe, baitira Mataani omunyamurwa wa Baali omu maisho g'ago matambiro." 
2Chronicles23:18 Bwanyima Yehoyaada yaataho abantu b'okurinda enju ya MUKAMA kuguma nibareebererwa abanyamurwa Abaleevi, n'abandi Baleevi, abu Daudi yaataireho kuguma nibareeberera enju ya MUKAMA, kuhongyera MUKAMA ebitambo by'okwotsya, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu biragiro bya Musa, ngu babihongye nibashemererwa nibeeshongora, nk'oku Daudi yaaragiire." 
2Chronicles23:19 Abarinzi b'amarembo yaabata aha marembo g'enju ya MUKAMA, ngu omuntu weena otashemeire omu muringo gwona arekye kutaahamu." 
2Chronicles23:20 Bwanyima yaatwara abakuru b'engabo, n'ab'ekitiinisa, n'abategyeki b'abantu, hamwe n'abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi, baashuumya omugabe nibamwiha omu irembo rya ruguru, baamutaasya omu nju y'omugabe, baamuta aha kitebe ky'obugabe." 
2Chronicles23:21 Batyo abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi baashemererwa; kandi bwanyima y'okwita Atalia na rurara, orurembo rwatuuza." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yoasi akaba aine emyaka mushanju, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka makumi ana; nyina akaba naayetwa Zibia owa Beeri-sheba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Omu biro byona ebya Yehoyaada omunyamurwa Yoasi akakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA. 
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoyaada yaamushwererera abakazi babiri, yaazaara abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki." 
2Chronicles24:4 Bwanyima y'ekyo Yoasi yaamariirira kuhunduuza enju ya MUKAMA. 
2Chronicles24:5 Yaateerana abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, yaabagira ati: Mwirooko muze omu ndembo za Yuda, muteerane omu Baisraeli boona empiiha z'okuhunduuza enju ya Ruhanga waanyu buri mwaka; kandi mukirahutsye. Kwonka Abaleevi tibaakirahutsya." 
2Chronicles24:6 Omugabe nikwo kweta Yehoyaada omukuru, akamugira ati: Ahabw'enki toragiire Baleevi kwiha omu Bayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu emitoijo, ei Musa omugaragwa wa MUKAMA yaaragiire eihanga ryona erya Israeli kuha, ngw ebi ey'Eihema ry'Eby'okuhamya?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Ahakuba batabani ba Atalia, ogwo mukazi mubi, bakataaha omu nju ya Ruhanga, kandi ebintu byona eby'omu nju ya MUKAMA ebyashoroirwe, baabikoresa ahabwa Baabaali." 
2Chronicles24:8 N'ahabw'ekyo omugabe yaaragiira, baabaija eshanduukye, baagita aheeru y'eirembo ry'enju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles24:9 Baaranga omuri Yuda n'omuri Yerusaalemu yoona, ku baareetera MUKAMA emitoijo ei Musa omugaragwa wa Ruhanga yaaragiire Abaisraeli bari omu ihamba." 
2Chronicles24:10 Abanyiginya boona n'abantu boona baashemererwa, baareeta emitoijo yaabo, baagita omuri egyo shanduukye okuhitsya obu baaherize." 
2Chronicles24:11 Abaleevi ku baabaire bareetera abatware b'omugabe egyo shanduukye, baareeba erimu empiiha nyingi, omuhandiiki w'omugabe n'omutware w'omunyamurwa mukuru baija, baihamu ebirimu byona, bagitwara, bagigarura omu mwanya gwayo. Okwo nikwo baabaire bakora buri izooba, bakateerana empiiha nyingi munonga." 
2Chronicles24:12 Omugabe na Yehoyaada baziha abarikureeberera omurimo gw'enju ya MUKAMA, bagurira abombeki n'ababaizi kuhunduuza egyo nju, hamwe n'abaheesi b'ebyoma n'ab'emiringa." 
2Chronicles24:13 Batyo abaakwatsiibwe omurimo baakora n'amaani, baaguhereza kimwe, enju ya Ruhanga baagihunduuza, baagigarura omu buteeka, baagihamya." 
2Chronicles24:14 Ku baagiherize, baareetera omugabe na Yehoyaada empiiha ezashaagireho, baazikoramu ebintu by'enju ya MUKAMA, eby'okuheerezesa, eby'ebitambo by'okwotsya, eshohaani z'obubaane, n'ebintu by'efeeza n'ezaabu. Kandi omu biro bya Yehoyaada byona bakaguma nibatambira ebitambo by'okwotsya omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles24:15 Kwonka Yehoyaada yaakura, yaahika omu ngingo zaabukuru, yaafa; kandi akafa ahikize emyaka igana na makumi ashatu." 
2Chronicles24:16 Baamuziika omu bagabe omu rurembo rwa Daudi, ahabw'okuba akakora gye omuri Israeli ahari Ruhanga n'aha b'enju ye." 
2Chronicles24:17 Yehoyaada ku yaaherize kufa, abanyiginya ba Yuda baija, baatangirira omugabe. Okuruga aho omugabe yaaguma naahurira ebi barikumugambira." 
2Chronicles24:18 Baareka enju ya MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo, baaheereza Ashera n'ebishushani ebirikuramibwa. Ahabw'eikyo kicumuro kyabo, ekiniga kya Ruhanga kyaija aha Bayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles24:19 Hoona, n'obu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, akaguma naabatumaho baanabi kubagarura ahari MUKAMA; baanabi abo baaboomesereza, kwonka baayanga kuhurira." 
2Chronicles24:20 Bwanyima Omwoyo wa Ruhanga yaija ahari Zekaria mwene Yehoyaada omunyamurwa, yaayemerera eruguru y'abantu, yaabagira ati: Ahabw'enki mugomeire ebiragiro bya MUKAMA, kikabareetera kutaba gye? Mutsigireho MUKAMA, nawe nikyo abatsigiireho." 
2Chronicles24:21 Kwonka baamugirira enaama, baamuteerera amabaare omu kikaari ky'enju ya MUKAMA ahabw'ekiragiro ky'omugabe." 
2Chronicles24:22 Okwo nikwo Yoasi omugabe yaayebirwe embabazi, ezi Yehoyaada, ishe wa Zekaria, yaamugiriire, akamwitira omwana. Zekaria ku yaabaire naafa, yaagira ati: MUKAMA akireebe, kandi ahoore!" 
2Chronicles24:23 Aha muheru gw'omwaka eihe ry'Abasiria ryaija kuteera Yoasi. Baahika omuri Yuda na Yerusaalemu, baacwekyereza abategyeki boona ab'abantu, baabamaramu, baatwekyera omugabe wa Damasiko ebi baanyagire byona." 
2Chronicles24:24 N'obu eihe ry'Abasiria ryaizire n'abantu bakye, MUKAMA akahayo omu mikono yaabo eihe rihango munonga, ahabw'okuba Abayuda abo bakatsigaho MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo. Okwo nikwo Abasiria baahaire Yoasi ekifubiro." 
2Chronicles24:25 Abasiria ku baamurugireho, baatsiga ahutaire munonga, abaheereza be baamugirira enaama nibahoorera eshagama ya mwene Yehoyaada omunyamurwa, baamwitira aha kitanda kye. Atyo yaafa, baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi; kwonka tibaamuziika mu bituuro by'abagabe." 
2Chronicles24:26 Abaamugiriire enaama bakaba bari Zabadi mwene Shineasi Omuamonikazi, na Yehozabadi mwene Shimuriisi Omumoabukazi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Eby'abatabani, n'ebi baanabi baamuhanire, n'eby'okuhunduuza enju ya Ruhanga, bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebirikushoboorora eby'omu kitabo ky'abagabe. Amazia omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amazia akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka makumi abiri na mwenda. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yehoadaani, owa Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles25:2 Yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA, kwonka ataine mutima guhikire." 
2Chronicles25:3 Ku yaaherize kuhamibwa ati omu omu bugabe bwe, yaita abaheereza be abaitsire omugabe ishe;" 
2Chronicles25:4 kwonka tiyaita baana baabo, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Musa ey'ebiragiro, omu MUKAMA yaaragiriire ati: Baishe b'abaana batariitwa nibaturwa abaana baabo, kandi n'abaana batariitwa nibaturwa baishebo; kureka omuntu weena aryaitwa ahabw'ekibi kye." 
2Chronicles25:5 Bwanyima Amazia yaateerana abashaija ba Yuda, yaabataho kutegyekwa abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'aba igana-igana, nk'amaju ga baishenkurubo oku gaabaire gari, ahabwa Yuda na Benyamiini yoona. Yaateerana abahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, yaashanga bari obusiriira bushatu, abashaija entoore, abarikubaasa eby'engamba, bakamanya kurwanaisa amacumu n'engabo." 
2Chronicles25:6 Yaagaruka yaagurira abashaja b'amaani amamanzi aba Israeli akasiriira kamwe n'etalanta z'efeeza igana. 
2Chronicles25:7 Kwonka omushaija wa Ruhanga yaija ah'ari, yaamugira ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, otaikiriza eihe rya Israeli kuhurura naiwe, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA tari hamwe na Israeli, Abaefuraimu aba boona." 
2Chronicles25:8 Ku oraabe noogira ngu oine amaani g'okurwana, omanye ngu Ruhanga naija kukuteera ahansi omu maisho g'abazigu baawe; ahakuba Ruhanga aine obushoboorozi bw'okuhwera, nari obw'okutuura ahansi." 
2Chronicles25:9 Amazia yaagira ogwo mushaija wa Ruhanga ati: Mbwenu shi tugire tuta ezo talanta igana, ezi mpaire eihe rya Israeli? Omushaija wa Ruhanga yaamugarukamu ati: MUKAMA naabaasa kukuha nyingi munonga ezirikukira ezo." 
2Chronicles25:10 Bwanyima Amazia yaaragiira eihe, eryamwizireho niriruga Efuraimu, kugaruka omuka. Baagwerwa kubi munonga Abayuda, baagaruka omuka baine ekiniga kingi." 
2Chronicles25:11 Kwonka Amazia we yaaguma, yaahuruza abantu be, baaza omu ruhita rw'omwonyo, baita omu bashaija ba Seiri abantu kakumi." 
2Chronicles25:12 Kandi Abayuda baakwata abandi kakumi bahuriire, baabatwara aha mutwe gw'ekibaare kihango, baabatambika, baayetuura ahansi, baacwagacwagurika boona." 
2Chronicles25:13 Kwonka abashaija b'eryo ihe, abu Amazia yaagarwireyo, akanga ku bahurura nawe, baateera endembo za Yuda okuruga Samaria okuhika Besi-horoni, baaziitamu abantu enkumi ishatu, baanyaga eminyago mingi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Amazia ku yaarugire kwita Abanyaedomu, yaareeta ebishushani bya baaruhanga ba Seiri, yaabyemereza kuba baaruhanga be, yaabiramya, yaabihongyera empongano." 
2Chronicles25:15 Nikyo MUKAMA yaagwereirwe kubi Amazia, akamutumaho nabi, akamugira ati: Ahabw'enki oyehongyeire baaruhanga abatarabaasize kujuna abantu baabo omu mikono yaawe?" 
2Chronicles25:16 Ku yaabaire naakigamba, omugabe yaamugira ati: Beitu shi tukugizire omuhanuuzi w'omugabe? Hunama! Mbwenu oitirwe ki? Atyo nabi yaahunama; kwonka yaagira ati: Nimmanya ngu Ruhanga amaririire kukucwekyereza, ahabw'okukora eki, okanga kuhurira eki nkuhabwire." 
2Chronicles25:17 Bwanyima Amazia yaaza omu naama, yaatuma ahari Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi, mwijukuru wa Yehu omugabe wa Israeli, naamugira ati: Rugayo, twereebanire akaso omu kandi." 
2Chronicles25:18 Yehoashi omugabe wa Israeli yaatuma ahari Amazia omugabe wa Yuda naagira ati: Eitojo rya Lebanooni rikatuma aha mwereezi gwa Lebanooni nirigira riti: Ha mutabani wangye muhara waawe, amushwere. Ku bwaseesire, enyamaishwa y'omu ihamba rya Lebanooni yaija neerabaho, yaariribata." 
2Chronicles25:19 Ogizire oti: Reeba, nteire Abanyaedomu, naabasingura; omutima gwawe gwakureetera eishaija, waayehimbisa. Kwonka ogume omuka; ahabw'enki nootaara akabi, ngu ofe, na Yuda nayo efe." 
2Chronicles25:20 Kwonka Amazia yaayanga kuhurira, ahabw'okuba kikaba kirugire ahari MUKAMA, ngu abone kubahayo omu mikono y'abazigu baabo ahabw'okwehongyera baaruhanga ba Edomu." 
2Chronicles25:21 N'ahabw'ekyo Yehoashi omugabe wa Israeli, yainamuka; we na Amazia omugabe wa Yuda baabugaabuganira Beti-shemeshi eya Yuda, baarwanirayo." 
2Chronicles25:22 Abayuda baabingwa Abaisraeli, buri muntu yaahungira omu ka ye." 
2Chronicles25:23 Yehoashi omugabe wa Israeli yaakwata Amazia omugabe wa Yuda, mwene Yoasi, mwijukuru wa Ahazia; yaamukwatira Beti-shemeshi, bwanyima yaamureeta Yerusaalemu, yaasheenya orugo rwayo rw'amabaare ekicweka kya mikono magana ana okuruga aha irembo rya Efuraimu okuhika aha irembo ry'aha keekubo." 
2Chronicles25:24 Kandi yaanyaga ezaabu n'efeeza zoona n'ebintu byona ebyashangirwe omu nju ya Ruhanga hawe na Obededomu; yaagaruka yaanyaga eby'omu mabiikiro g'eju y'omugabe, kandi yaabaihamu abantu, yaabagira omukwato; bwanyima yaagaruka Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amazia mwene Yoasi omugabe wa Yuda akamara emyaka ikumi n'etaano bwanyima y'okufa kwa Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi omugabe wa Israeli. 
2Chronicles25:26 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Amazia, okuruga aha kutandika okuhika aha muheru, tehandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'abagabe ba Yuda na Israeli?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Okuruga omu bunaku obu yaarugiiremu ahari MUKAMA, bakamugirira enaama y'okumugomera omuri Yerusaalemu; yaahungira Lakishi; kwonak baamukuratsa abantu Lakishi, baamwitirayo." 
2Chronicles25:28 Baamureetera aha mbaraasi, baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi hamwe na baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles26:1 Abayuda boona baatwara Uziya, owaabaire aine emyaka ikumi na mukaaga, baamwemeka omu mwanya gwa ishe." 
2Chronicles26:2 Yaayombeka Eloosi, yaagigarurira Abayuda, omugabe ishe aharize kugwejegyera kushanga baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya akaba aine emyaka ikumi na mukaaga, obu yaatandiak kutegyeka, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka makumi ataano n'ebiri. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yekolia owa Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles26:4 Yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA, nk'ebi Amazia ishe yaakozire byona." 
2Chronicles26:5 Omu biro bya Zekaria, owaabaire naamwegyesa okutiina Ruhanga, akamariirira kusherura Ruhanga; kandi omwanya gwona ogu yaamazire naasherura MUKAMA, Ruhanga akamuha omugisha." 
2Chronicles26:6 Bwanyima yaahurura, yaaza kurwana n'Abafilistia, yaasheenya orugo rw'amabaare orwa Gaasi, orwa Yabune n'orwa Ashidoodi; yaayombeka endembo omu ishaza rya Ashidoodi n'aahandi omu nsi y'Abafilistia." 
2Chronicles26:7 Kandi Ruhanga yaamuhwera omu kurwanisa Abafilistia n'Abaharabu, abaabaire batwire Gurubaali, n'Abameuni." 
2Chronicles26:8 Abaamoni baareetera Uziya emitoijo; kandi okurangaanwa kwe kwabuga, kwahika n'aha mwatano gwa Misri; ahakuba akaba ow'amaani munonga." 
2Chronicles26:9 Kandi Uziya yaayombeka eminaara omuri Yerusaalemu aha Irembo ry'aha keekubo, aha Irembo ry'oruhanga, n'aha Keekubo, yaagihamya." 
2Chronicles26:10 Yaagaruka yaayombeka eminaara omu ihamba, yaatimba amaziba maingi, ahakuba akaba aine amasyo maingi omu mirambi n'omu mpita; kandi aine abahingi n'abasharizi b'emizaabibu omu bibungo n'omu byanga ebirikweza; ahabw'okuba akaba akunda munonga eby'okuhinga." 
2Chronicles26:11 Kandi Uziya akaba aine eihe ry'abaserukare, abahikire kuza aha rugamba, bari omu mitwe y'engabo, nk'oku omubaro gwabaire guri ogw'abaabazirwe Yeyeli omuhandiiki na Maaseya omutware, nibareebererwa Hanania, omwe aha bakuru b'engabo b'omugabe." 
2Chronicles26:12 Omubaro gwona ogw'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, abashaija b'amaani amamanzi, gukaba guri enkumi ibiri na magana mukaaga." 
2Chronicles26:13 Bakaba nibategyeka eihe ry'abashaija obusiriira bushatu n'enkumi mushanju na magana ataano, abaabaire nibabaasa kurwanisa amaani maingi, bakahwera omugabe kumujuna abazigu." 
2Chronicles26:14 Kandi Uziya yaateekateekyera eihe ryona engabo, amacumu, enkofiira z'orugamba, ebizibaho by'ebyoma, amata n'amabaare g'enjungu." 
2Chronicles26:15 Omuri Yerusaalemu yaakoreramu ebyoma, ebyagunzirwe abanyamyoga, eby'okuta aha minaara n'aha bwekubo bw'engo z'amabaare, okurasisa emyambi n'okurekyeza amabaare mahango. Okurangaanwa kwe kwabuga hoona; ahakuba akahwerwa okutakareebwaga, okuhitsya obu yaahamire." 
2Chronicles26:16 Kwonka ku yaaherize kuhama, yaagira amaryo, gaamwita; ahakub aakacumura ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga we, yaataaha omuri hekalu ya MUKAMA kwoterera obubaane aha kyoterero kyabwo." 
2Chronicles26:17 Kwonka Azaria omunyamurwa yaataahamu amukuratiire, n'abanyamurwa ba MUKAMA makumi munaana, abashaija amamanzi;" 
2Chronicles26:18 baamuzibira nibamugira bati: Ti murimo gwawe, Uziya, kwoterera MUKAMA obubaane, kureka n'ogw'abanyamurwa beene Aooni abashorooreirwe okwotera obubaane. Ruga omu Mwanya ogurikwera; ahakuba waacumura, kandi tikirikwija kukuhaisa kitiinisa ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga." 
2Chronicles26:19 Uziya yaagira ekiniga. Obwo akaba aine akooterero k'obubaane omu ngaro, naaza kubwotera; ku yaagiriire ati abanyamurwa ekiniga, ahonaaho ebibembe byamusheesha aha buso omu maisho g'abanyamurwa omu nju ya MUKAMA, ahu yaabaire ayemereire aha rubaju rw'ekyoterero ky'obubaane." 
2Chronicles26:20 Azaria omunyamurwa omukuru n'abandi banyamurwa baoona ku baagiire kumwetegyereza bati, baashanga aine ebibembe aha buso. Baamutsindika n'amaani kumushohoza, kandi nawe yairuka, yaashohora, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akaba amuteire." 
2Chronicles26:21 Omugabe Uziya yaaguma ari omubembe okuhitsya aha izooba eri yaafeereireho; ahabw'okubemba yaaguma hangahari naaraara omu nganyo, ahabw'okuba akacuubwa omu nju ya MUKAMA. Bwanyima Yosamu omutabani yaaguma naareeberera ekikaari ky'omugabe, kandi naategyeka abantu b'omuri egyo nsi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Endiijo mirimo ya Uziya, okuruga aha kutandika, okuhika aha muheru ekahandiikwa Isaaya nabi mwene Amozi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uziya yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika omu iziikiro eryabaire riri ery'abagabe; ahabw'okuba bakagira bati: N'omubembe. Yosamu omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yosamu akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka ikumi na mukaaga. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yerusha muhara wa Zadoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 Yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA, nk'ebi Uziya ishe yaakozire byona, okwihaho eky'okutaahisa amaani omuri hekalu ya MUKAMA. Kwonka abantu baagumizamu nibakora ebibi." 
2Chronicles27:3 Yaayombeka eirembo rya ruguru ery'enju ya MUKAMA, kandi yaayombeka ebyombeko bingi aha rugo rw'amabaare rwa Ofeli." 
2Chronicles27:4 Kandi yaayombeka endembo omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Yuda, hamwe n'ebigo n'eminaara aha bubungo bw'ebibira." 
2Chronicles27:5 Yaarwanisa abagabe b'Abaamoni, yaabasingura. Omu mwka ogwo Abaamoni baamutoijera etalanta z'efeeza igana, n'ebitenga by'engano kakumi, n'ebya sayiri kakumi. Kandi omu mwaka gwa kabiri n'ogwa kashatu Abaamoni baamutoijera batyo." 
2Chronicles27:6 Atyo Yosamu yaahinduka ow'amaani, ahabw'okushemeza emitwarize ye omu maisho ga MUKAMA Ruhanga we." 
2Chronicles27:7 Endiijo miriyo ya Yosamu, n'engamba ze zoona, n'emitwarize ye, reeba bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'abagabe ba Israeli n'aba Yuda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano, obu yaatandika kutegyeka, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka ikumi na mukaaga." 
2Chronicles27:9 Yosamu yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omu rurembo rwa Daudi. Ahazi omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri, obu yaatandika kutegyeka, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka ikumi na mukaaga. Tiyaakora birikusiimwa MUKAMA nka Daudi ishenkuru," 
2Chronicles28:2 kureka yaakuratira emicwe y'abagabe ba Israeli. Kandi yaaheesha n'ebishushani ebirikuramibwa ahabwa Baabaali; 
2Chronicles28:3 yaaguma naayoterera obubaane omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinoomu, yaarabya abaana be omu muriro, naakuratira emigyenzo erikunugwa ey'abanyamahanga, abu MUKAMA yaabingire omu maisho g'Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles28:4 Yaaguma naatambira omu myanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, aha bibungo, n'ahansi ya buri kiti ekyetwa omurinzi, kandi naayotererayo obubaane." 
2Chronicles28:5 Nikyo MUKAMA Ruhanga we yaamuheereireyo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Siria, ogwo mugabe akamusingura, akakwata abantu be baingi munonga, akabatwara Damasiko bari enkwatwa. Kandi yaaheebwayo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Israeli, yaita abantu be baingi munonga, yaamusingura." 
2Chronicles28:6 Ahakuba Peeka mwene Remalia omu izooba rimwe akaita omuri Yuda abashaija amamanzi akasiriira n'obukumi bubiri, ahabw'okuba bakatsigaho MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles28:7 Na Zikuri, omushaija rugambwa owa Efuraimu yaita Maaseya mutabani w'omugabe, na Azurikaamu omukuru w'ekikaari ky'omugabe, na Elukaana enganzi y'omugabe." 
2Chronicles28:8 Abaisraeli baakwata omuri beene waabo abantu obusiriira bubiri, abakazi, abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki; kandi baabanyaga eminyago mingi, baagitwara Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Kwonka okwo hakaba hariyo nabi wa MUKAMA owaabaire naayetwa Odedi; nabi ogwo yaashohora kubugana eihe eryabaire niritabaaruka, niriza Samaria; yaabagira ati: Nimumanya ku MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe yaagwereirwe kubi Abayuda, akabahayo omu mikono yaanyu; kwonka imwe murengyesereize, mwabaita mwine ekiniga kingi ekihinguraine munonga." 
2Chronicles28:10 Mbwenu nimwenda kugira Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu abahuuku n'abazaanz. Imwe timwine ebibi byanyu, ebi mucumwire ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Mbwenu mumpurire, mugarureyo aba bantu, abu mukwatsire omuri beene waanyu, ei mubaihire, ahakuba MUKAMA abagiriire ekiniga kingi munonga." 
2Chronicles28:12 Kandi n'abakuru bamwe b'Abaefuraimu, Azaria, mwene Yohanani, Berekia mwene Meshilemoosi, Mehizikia mwene Shalumu na Amasa mwene Hadulai, baayemerera kukumiirira abaabaire nibaruga aha rugamba," 
2Chronicles28:13 baabagira bati: Timurikwija kureeta aha nkwatwa, ahabw'okuba nimwenda kutureetera orubanja rw'okucumura ahari MUKAMA, kwongyera aha bibi n'orubanja ebi twine; haza orubanja oru twine ruri ruhango, kandi ahari Israeli hariho ekiniga kingi." 
2Chronicles28:14 N'ahabw'ekyo abo bashaija abaabaire baine eby'okurwanisa baatsiga enkwatwa n'eminyago omu maisho g'abakuru n'omutwe gwona ogw'abateeraine. 
2Chronicles28:15 Abo bakuru, abu amaziina gaabo gaagambwaho, baimuka, baayakiira enkwatwa, boona abaabire bajwaire busha omuribo baabajweka eby'omu minyago; batyo baabajweka, baabaha enkaito, baabaha eby'okurya n'eby'okunywa, baabasiiga amajuta, boona abaabaire bataine maani omuribo baabaheeka aha ndogoya, baabahitsya omuri beene waabo ahari Yeriko, orurembo rw'emikindo. Bwanyima baagaruka Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Omu bunaku obwo omugabe Ahazi akatuma aha mugabe wa Asiria kumuha emikono; 
2Chronicles28:17 ahabw'okuba Abanyaedomu bakaba batabaire Yuda, bagisingwire, bakwatsireyo enkwatwa." 
2Chronicles28:18 Kandi n'Abafilistia bakaba bateire endembo z'omu mirambi n'omuri Negebu eya Yuda, bakwatsire Beti-shemeshi, Ayalooni, Gederoosi, Sooko n'ebirorero byayo, Timuna n'ebirorero byayo, na Gimuzo n'ebirorero byayo; bwanyima baazituuramu." 
2Chronicles28:19 Ahakuba MUKAMA akabaagarwire Abayuda ahansi, naabatura Ahazi omugabe wa Israeli, ahabw'okuba akakorera omuri Yuda ebitahikire, yaacumura munonga ahari MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles28:20 N'ahabw'ekyo Tigulaasi-peleseeri omugabe wa Asiria yaija yaamuteera, yaamubonabonesa omu mwanya gw'okumugumya." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ahakuba Ahazi akaiha ebintu omu nju ya MUKAMA n'omu y'omugabe n'omu maju g'abanyiginya, yaabitoijera omugabe wa Asiria; kwonka tibyagira ki baymugasira." 
2Chronicles28:22 Kandi omu biro by'obusaasi bwe akeeyongyera kucumura ahari MUKAMA, ogwo mugabe weena Ahazi;" 
2Chronicles28:23 ahakuba akatambira baaruhanga ba Damasikio ebitambo, abaabaire bamusingwire, yaagira ati: Ahabw'okuba baaruhanga b'abagabe ba Siria bakabahwera, naanye niinyija kubatambira ebitambo, babone kumpwera. Kwonka bakaba bari ab'okumucwekyereza hamwe na Israeli yoona." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ahazi yaateeranira hamwe ebintu by'omu nju ya Ruhanga, yaabitematemamu ebicweka, yaakinga enyigi z'enju ya MUKAMA, yaayeyombekyera amatambiro buri hantu omuri Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles28:25 Kandi omuri buri rurembo rwa Yuda yaakoramu emyanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, kuguma naayoterereramu baaruhanga abandi obubaane, naagwisa kubi MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles28:26 Endiijo mirimo ye n'emitwarize ye yoona, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, reeba, bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'abagabe ba Yuda n'aba Israeli." 
2Chronicles28:27 Bwanyima Ahazi yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omu rurembo Yerusaalemu, ahabw'okuba tibaramuziikire mu bituuro by'abagabe ba Israeli. Hezekia omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekia akatandika kutegyeka aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka makumi abiri na mwenda. Nyina akaba naayetwa Abiya muhara wa Zekaria. 
2Chronicles29:2 Akakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA, nk'ebi Daudi, ishe, yaakozire byona." 
2Chronicles29:3 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwe, omu kwezi kw'okubanza, akaigura enyigi z'enju ya MUKAMA, yaazihunduuza." 
2Chronicles29:4 Yaataasyamu abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, yaabateeranira omu mwanya omuhango aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba," 
2Chronicles29:5 yaabagira ati: Imwe Baleevi 'mwe, nimupurire! Mweyeze hati, mweze n'enju ya MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baashwekuriimwe, mwihe oburofa omu Mwanya ogurikwera." 
2Chronicles29:6 Ahakuba batatenkuriitwe bakacumura, baakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, Ruhanga waitu; baamutsigaho, baagaruka baiha amaisho aha Butaaho bwa MUKAMA, baamuteera amabega." 
2Chronicles29:7 Kandi baakinga enyigi z'ekisasi, baaraaza amatabaaza, kandi tibaayoterera Ruhanga wa Israeli bubaane, n'obu kwakuba okumutambira ebitambo by'okwotsya omu Mwanya ogurikwera." 
2Chronicles29:8 Nikyo kyareeteire MUKAMA kugirira Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu ekiniga, akabahayo kuba eky'okutiinisa, n'eky'okutangarirwa, kandi n'eky'okweshaanya, nk'oku murikubireebesa amaisho gaanyu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Reeba, ebyo bikareetera baatatenkuriitwe kwitwa rurara, kandi batabani baitu na bahara baitu n'abakazi baitu baaba enkwtwa." 
2Chronicles29:10 Mbwenu ekindi aha mutima n'okuragaana endagaano na MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, ngu ekiniga kye kingi kibone kuturugaho." 
2Chronicles29:11 Baana bangye, murekye kweganda, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akabatoorana kwemerera omu maisho ge, okumuheereza, okuba abaheezera be, n'okumwoterera obubaane." 
2Chronicles29:12 Bwanyima Abaleevi baimuka, Mahasi mwene Amasai, Yoeli mwene Azaria, ab'omuri beene Kohasi; ab'omuri beene Merari, Kiishi mwene Abudi, Azaria mwene Yehaleleeli; ab'omuri beene Gereshoni, Yoa mwene Zima, na Edeni mwene Yoa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 ab'omuri beene Elizafaani, Shimuri na Yeueli; ab'omuri beene Asafu, Zekaria na Matania;" 
2Chronicles29:14 ab'omuri beene Hemani, Yehueli na Shimei; n'ab'omuri beene Yedusuuni, Shemaaya na Uzieli." 
2Chronicles29:15 Baateerana beene waabo, baayeyeza, baataaha omu nju ya MUKAMA kugishemeza, nk'omugabe oku yaaragiire naakuratira ebigambo bya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles29:16 Abanyamurwa baaza omu nju ya MUKAMA aha muheru kuhashemeza, baahsohoza oburofa bwona obu baashangire omuri hekalu ya MUKAMA, baabuhitsya omu kikaari ky'enju ya MUKAMA; bwanyima Abaleevi baabutwara, baabuhitsya aha kagyera Kidirooni." 
2Chronicles29:17 Baatandika kugyeeza aha kiro ky'okubanza ky'okwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro kya munaana ky'okwo kwezi baahika aha kisasi kya MUKAMA; bwanyima baamara ebiro munaana nibeeza enju ya MUKAMA, baagiheza aha kiro kya ikumi na mukaaga ky'okwo kwezi." 
2Chronicles29:18 Bwanyima baataaha ow'omugabe Hezekia, baamugira bati: Twaheza kushemeza enju ya MUKAMA yoona, n'eitambiro ry'ebitambo by'okwotsya n'ebintu byaryo byona, n'emeeza y'emigaati y'okumurikwa n'ebintu byayo byona." 
2Chronicles29:19 Kandi n'ebintu byona, ebi omugabe Ahazi yaanagire omu kucumura kwe ari aha ngoma, twabishemeza, twabyeza. Mbwenu biri omu maisho g'eitambiro rya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles29:20 Ku bwaseesire, omugabe Hezekia yaimuka kare, yaateerana abakuru b'orurembo, yainamuka omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles29:21 Baareeta enimi mushanju, empaya z'entaama mushanju, abaana b'entaama mushanju, kandi n'empaya z'embuzi mushanju aha bugabe, n'aha Mwanya ogurikwera, kandi n'ahari Yuda. Yaaragiira abanyamurwa beene Arooni kubitambira aha itambiro rya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles29:22 Batyo ezo nimi baaziita, abanyamurwa baatangiriza eshagama yaazo, baagishukyeera eitambiro; baita empaya z'entaama, eshagama yaazo baagishukyera eitambiro; baita n'abaana b'entaama, n'eshagama yaabo baagishukyera eitambiro;" 
2Chronicles29:23 bwanyima ezo mpaya z'embuzi ez'okuba empongano y'ekibi zaareetwa omu maisho g'omugabe n'omu maisho g'omutwe gwona oguteeraine, baazitaho engaro zaabo;" 
2Chronicles29:24 abanyamurwa baaziita, baatambira eshagama yaazo aha itambiro kuba empongano y'ekibi, okurihiirira Abaisraeli boona; ahakuba omugabe akaragiira ngu batambe ekitmbo ky'okwotsya n'empongano y'ekibi ahabwa Israeli yoona." 
2Chronicles29:25 Kandi yaata Abaleevi omu nju ya MUKAMA, baine ebitaasa n'enanga n'endingiri, nk'oku kyaragiirwe Daudi na Gaadi omuhanuuzi w'omugabe na Nasani nabi; ahabw'okuba ekiragiro kikaruga ahari MUKAMA, kyaraba omuri baanabi be." 
2Chronicles29:26 Batyo Abaleevi baayemerera, baine ebintu bya Daudi eby'okweshongoza, n'abanyamurwa baine amakondere." 
2Chronicles29:27 Bwanyima Hezekia yaaragiira kutambira ekitambo ky'okwotsya aha itambiro. Ekitambo ky'okwotsya ku kyatandikire kutambwa, ekyeshongoro ky'okweshongorera MUKAMA nakyo kyatandika, hamwe n'amakondere n'ebindi bintu by'okweshongoza bya Daudi omugabe wa Israeli." 
2Chronicles29:28 Omutwe gwona ogw'abantu gwaramya, abeeshongozi baayeshongora, n'abateezi b'amakondere baagateera; ebyo byona byagumizamu, okuhitsya obu ekitambo ky'okwotsya kyahweire."
