2Chronicles29:29 Ekitambo ku kyaherize kutambwa, omugabe n'abaabaire bari hamwe nawe boona bainama, baaramya." 
2Chronicles29:30 Omugabe Hezekia n'abanyiginya baaragiira Abaleevi kweshongorera MUKAMA eby'okuhimbisa, ebi Daudi na Asafu omuhanuuzi baagunzire. Baayeshongora eby'okuhimbisa bashemereirwe, bainama ahansi, baaramya." 
2Chronicles29:31 Bwanyima Hezekia yaagira ati: Mbwenu obu mwayohongyera MUKAMA, mwirire haihi, mureete ebitambo n'empongano z'okusiima omu nju ya MUKAMA. Batyo abantu baareeta ebitambo n'empongano z'okusiima; kandi n'abaabaire baine emitima eyekundiire boona baareeta ebitambo by'okwotsya." 
2Chronicles29:32 Omubaro gw'ebitambo by'okwotsya ebi abantu baareetsire gukaba guri enimi makumi mushanju, empaya z'entaama igana, n'abaana b'entaama magana abiri; ebyo byona bikaba biri ebitambo by'okwokyeza MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles29:33 Kandi empongano ezeeziibwe zikaba ziri enimi magana mukaaga n'entaama enkumi ishatu. 
2Chronicles29:34 Kwonka abanyamurwa bakaba bakye, tibaabaasa kubaaga bitambo by'okwotsya byona; nikyo kyareeteire beene waabo Abaleeevi kubahwera, okuhitsya obu omurimo gwahweire, abandi banyamurwa batakeeyerize; ahabw'okuba Abaleevi bakba nibakiza abanyamurwa omutima gw'okwezirikira okweyeza." 
2Chronicles29:35 Okwongyera ahari ebyo bitambo by'okwotsya ebingi munonga, hakaba hariho n'ebishaju by'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, n'ez'eby'okunywa ebirikuhongwa na buri kitambo kyona eky'okwotsya. Okwo nikwo omurimo gw'obuheereza bw'omu nju ya MUKAMA gwagarwireho." 
2Chronicles29:36 Hezekia n'abantu boona baashemerererwa ebi Ruhanga yaakoreire abantu; ahabw'okuba bikakorwa ahonaaho. 
2Chronicles30:1 Bwanyima Hezekia yaatuma aha Baisraeli n'aha Bayuda boona, kandi yaahandiikira Abaefuraimu n'Abamanaase ebaruha, kwija omu nju ya MUKAMA Yerusaalemu, kukorera MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho." 
2Chronicles30:2 Ahabw'okuba omugabe n'abanyiginya be, n'abantu boona abaateeraniire Yerusaalemu bakaba bahanwire kutaho obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho omu kwezi kwa kabiri," 
2Chronicles30:3 ahabw'okuba tibarabaasize kubutaho mu bunaku bwabwo ahabw'omubaro gw'abanyamurwa abeeyerize kutahika, kandi n'ahabw'abantu kushangwa batateeraniire Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles30:4 Egyo naama yaasiimwa omugabe n'abantu boona. 
2Chronicles30:5 Batyo baataho ekirangiriro, baakirangirira omuri Israeli yoona, okutandikira Beeri-sheba okuhika Daani, ngu abantu baije Yerusaalemu, bakorere MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho; ahabw'okuba bakaba batakibukora bari baingi munonga, nk'oku kyabaire kihandiikirwe." 
2Chronicles30:6 Batyo baamatarisi baatwara ebaruha ezirikuruga aha mugabe n'abanyiginya be, baazibuzya Israeli na Yuda yoona, ezirikugamba ekiragiro ky'omugabe naagira ati: Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, mugarukire MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, owa Isaaka kandi owa Israeli, nawe abone kubagarukira, imwe abatsigaireho, abaahonokire omu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria." 
2Chronicles30:7 Mutaba nka baashwenkuriimwe nari beene waanyu, abaabaire bacumura ahari MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo, kikamureetera kubahayo, bakahwerekyerera, nk'oku murikureeba." 
2Chronicles30:8 N'ahabw'ekyo mbwenu mutagira ebitsya bigangaire nka baashwenkuriimwe, kureka mwehongyere MUKAMA, mutaahe omu Mwanya gwe ogurikwera, ogu yaayerize kuba ogurikwera ebiro byona, muheereze MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, ekiniga kye kingi kibone kubarugaho." 
2Chronicles30:9 Ahakuba ku muraagarukire MUKAMA, beene wanyu n'abaana baanyu nibaija kugirirwa embabazi abaabatwaire bari enkwatwa, bagarukye omu nsi egi. Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu agira embabazi n'esaasi; kandi ku muraamugarukire, tarikwija kubaima maisho." 
2Chronicles30:10 Batyo baamatarisi baaraba omu nsi ya Efuraimu n'eya Manaase, nibaruga omu rurembo nibaza omu rundi, baahika n'omu nsi ya Zebuluuni; abaayo baabashekyerera munonga, baabateerera enaku." 
2Chronicles30:11 Kwonka abamwe aha Baasheri n'Abamanaase n'Abazebuluuni baayoroba, baija Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles30:12 Kandi n'omuri Yuda omukono gwa MUKAMA gwabaha kugira omutima gumwe, baayorobera ekiragiro ky'omugabe n'abanyiginya eki baaragiirwe ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles30:13 Bwanyima abantu baingi baateeranira Yerusaalemu kwijuka obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe omu kwezi kwa kabiri, bari omutwe muhango munonga." 
2Chronicles30:14 Baimuka, baiha Yerusaalemu amatambiro agaabaire gariyo, n'ebyoterero by'okwotereraho obubaane byona baabitwara, baabinaga omu kagyera Kidirooni." 
2Chronicles30:15 Batyo baita omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho aha kiro kya ikumi na bina omu kwezi kwa kabiri. Abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi baakwatwa enshoni, baayeyeza, baareeta ebitambo by'okwotsya omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles30:16 Baayemerera omu myanya yaabo nk'emigyenzo yaabo oku yaabaire eri, nibakuratira ekiragiro kya Musa omushaija wa Ruhanga; abanyamurwa baamiisha eshagama ei baahairwe Abaleevi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Ahabw'okuba hakaba hariho baingi omu mutwe ogwo abaabaire bateeyerize; nikyo kyareeteire Abaleevi kwita omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho ahabwa buri muntu weena owaabaire atashemeire, okubeereza MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles30:18 Ahakuba abantu bainti munonga omu Baefuraimu, Abamanaase, Abaisakaari n'Abazebuluuni bakaba bateeyerize, baafa okurya omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho omu muringo ogutarikwikirizibwa biragiro." 
2Chronicles30:19 Ahabw'okuba Hezekia akaba abashabiire naagira ati: MUKAMA omurungi asaasire buri muntu, omaririire kusherura Ruhanga, MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkuru, n'obu araabe ateeziibwe nk'emigyenzo y'Omwanya ogurikwera oku eri." 
2Chronicles30:20 MUKAMA yaahurira Hezekia, yaakiza abantu." 
2Chronicles30:21 Bwanyima Abaisraeli abo abaabaire bari Yerusaalemu baamara ebiro mushanju nibaijuka obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe n'okushemererwa kwingi munonga; kandi Abaleevi n'abanyamurwa baaguma nibahimbisa MUKAMA buri izooba, nibamweshongorera n'amaani gaabo goona." 
2Chronicles30:22 Kandi Hezekia yaagamba ebigambo by'okwezirikisa Abaleevi boona abayorekire obwengye omu murimo gw'okuheereza MUKAMA. Batyo abantu baarya eby'okurya by'obugyenyi okumara ebiro mushanju, nibahonga empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, nibasiima MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles30:23 Bwanyima omutwe gwona gwasiima kweyongyera ebindi biro mushanju omu bugyenyi; batyo baamara ebyo biro nibashemererwa. 
2Chronicles30:24 Ahabw'okuba Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda akaha omutwe gw'abantu enimi rukumi n'entaama enkumi mushanju kuba ebitambo; abanyiginya nabo baaha ogwo mutwe enimi rukumi n'entaama kakumi; n'abanyamurwa baingi baayeyeza. 
2Chronicles30:25 Omutwe gwona ogw'Abayuda n'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, n'omutwe gwona ogwarugire omuri Israeli n'abashuhuuki abaarugire omu nsi ya Israeli n'abashuhuuki abaabaire batwire omuri Yuda, baashemererwa." 
2Chronicles30:26 N'ahabw'ekyo haabaho okushemererwa kwingi munonga omuri Yerusaalemu, ahabw'okuba okwiha obu obusingye bwa Sulemaani mwene Daudi omugabe wa Israeli bwarugaho hakaba hatakabahoga bugyenyi nk'obwo omuri Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles30:27 Bwanyima abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi baimuka, baashabira abantu omugisha; eiraka ryabo ryahurirwa, kandi okushaba kwabo kwahika omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera ogu atuuramu omu iguru." 
2Chronicles31:1 Ebyo byona ku byahweire, Abaisraeli boona abaabaire bari aho baaza omu ndembo za Yuda, baashenyagura enyomyo, baatemagura Ashera, baasheenya ebyombeko by'omu myanya mikuru y'okuramizamu n'amatambiro omuri Yuda yoona, omuri Benyamiini, Efuraimu na Manaase, okuhitsya obu baabicwekyereize byona. Batyo Abaisraeli boona baagaruka omu ndembo zaabo, buri muntu omu butaka bwe." 
2Chronicles31:2 Bwanyima Hezekia yaabaganisa abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi omu bicweka, buri kicweka nk'omurimo gwakyo gw'okuheereza oku gwabaire guri, abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi okuguma nibatamba ebitambo by'okwotsya, okuhonga empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, okuheereza, okusiima n'okuhimbisiza omu marembo g'orusiisira rwa MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles31:3 Kandi omugabo ogu omugabe yaihire omu bintu bye kuguma naaha gukaba guri ogw'ebitambo by'okwotsya,–ebitambo by'okwotsya omu kasheeshe n'omu mwabazyo, ebya sabato, eby'okuboneka kw'ameezi n'eby'amagyenyi agaatairweho, nk'oku bihandiikirwe omu biragiro bya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles31:4 Yaagaruka yaaragiira abantu abaabaire batwire Yerusaalemu kuguma nibaha abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi emigabo ebashemereire, ngu nabo babone kwehayo omu biragiro bya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles31:5 Ekiragiro ekyo ku kyaherize kiti kubuga, Abaisraeli baareeta emiganuro mingi munonga, engano, viinyo, amajuta, obwoki n'ebindi byona ebyarugire omu misiri; kandi baareeta ana kimwe kya ikumi ekya buri kintu, byaba bingi munonga." 
2Chronicles31:6 Abaisraeli n'Abayuda abaabaire batwire omu ndembo za Yuda nabo baareeta kimwe kya ikumi eky'ente n'entaama, n'ebintu ebyeziibwe, ebyabaire bishorooreirwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, ebintu ebyo baabituuma emituumo." 
2Chronicles31:7 Omu kwezi kwa kashatu nibwo baatandika kutuuma egyo mituumo, bakaheza omu kwezi kwa mushanju." 
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekia n'abanyiginya ku baizire, baareeba egyo mituumo, baasiima MUKAMA n'abantu be Idraeli." 
2Chronicles31:9 Bwanyima Hezekia yaabuuza abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi eby'egyo mituumo. 
2Chronicles31:10 Azaria omunyamurwa omukuru, ow'omu nju ya Zadoki, yaamugarukamu ati: Obu abantu baatandika kureeta emitoijo omu nju ya MUKAMA, tukatandika obwo kurya n'okuhaaga, n'okushaazya bingi; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akaha abantu be omugisha, nikyo ebi ebyashaagire bibeereire bingi biti." 
2Chronicles31:11 Bwanyima Hezekia yaaragiira ku bateguura ebishenye by'enju ya MUKAMA; baabiteguura. 
2Chronicles31:12 Baatamu emitoijo, ebicweka bya kimwe kya ikumi, n'ebintu ebyashoroirwe n'obwesigwa. Omukuru waabo owaabaire naabareeberera akaba ari Konania Omuleevi, owa kabiri ari Shimei omurumuna;" 
2Chronicles31:13 Yehieli, Azazia, Nahasi, Asaheeli, Yerimoosi, Yozabaadi, Elieli, Ismakia, Mahasi na Benaaya, nibo baabaire bari abareeberezi nibahwera Konania na Shimei omurumuna, nk'oku kyaragiirwe Hezekia omugabe na Azaria omukuru w'enju ya Ruhanga." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kandi Koore mwene Imuna Omuleevi, omurinzi w'eirembo ry'oburugwa-izooba niwe yaabaire naategyeka emitoijo etoijeirwe Ruhanga n'omutima gwekundiire, naabaganisa ebintu ebibiikiirwe MUKAMA ahabw'empongano ezrikwera munonga." 
2Chronicles31:15 Edeni, Minyamiini, Yeshua, Shemaaya, Amaria na Shekania bakaba bari abeesigwa nibamuhwera omu ndembo z'abanyamurwa, kubaganisiza beene waabo emigabo, abakuru n'abato nibabainganisa, nk'oku ebicweka byabo byabaire biri," 
2Chronicles31:16 otaireho abaabaire nibahandiikwa nk'oku oruzaaro rwabo rwabaire nirukuratana, abeetwa abashija okuru ga aha myaka eshatu n'okukiraho, boona abaabaire bataaha omu nju ya MUKAMA, nk'okwetenga kw'omurimo gwa buri izooba oku kwabaire kuri, ngu babone kukora omurimo gwabo, nk'oku embu zaabo zaabaire nizikuratana." 
2Chronicles31:17 Abanyamurwa bakahandiikwa, nk'oku amaju ga baishenkurubo gaabaire gari; n'Abaleevi abaabaire baine emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho baahandiikwa omu bicweka byabo, nk'oku omurimo gwabo gwabaire guri." 
2Chronicles31:18 Abanyamurwa baahandiikwa n'abaana baabo abato boona n'abakazi baabo na batabani baabo na bahara baabo, okumarayo oruganda rwona; ahabw'okuba bakaba bari abeesigwa omu kwerinda kuguma bari abarikwera." 
2Chronicles31:19 Kandi ahabw'abanyamurwa beene Arooni, abaabaire batwire omu byaro ebyehinguririize endembo zaabo, omuri buri rurembo hakaba harimu abantu abagambirweho amaziina kuba ab'okugaburira oyetwa omushaija weena omu banyamurwa, n'omuntu weena ow'omu Baleevi owaahandiikirwe." 
2Chronicles31:20 Okwo nikwo Hezekia yaabitwarize omuri Yuda yoona, akakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA n'eby'oburyo kandi n'eby'obwesigwa." 
2Chronicles31:21 Ebi yaakozire byona omu murimo gw'okuheereza omu nju ya Ruhanga, naakuratira ebiragiro n'ebyaragiirwe, omu kusherura Ruhanga we, akaba abikora n'omutima gwe gwona, kandi abigiriramu omugisha." 
2Chronicles32:1 Hezekia ku yaaherize kukora ebyo n'okworeka obwesigwa bwe, Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria yaija yaateera Yuda, yaateera orusiisira kurwanisa endembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, naateekateeka ngu naija kuzeekubuurira zoona." 
2Chronicles32:2 Hezekia ku yaareebire Senakeribu yaija amaririire kuteera Yerusaalemu," 
2Chronicles32:3 yaahanuura n'abakuru b'engabo ze n'abashaija be ab'amaani kwita enshuro ezaabaire ziri enyima y'orurembo; baamuhwera. 
2Chronicles32:4 Abantu baingi munonga baateerana, baita enshuro zoona, n'akagyera akaabaire nikaraba omuri egyo nsi, ahakuba bakagira bati: Ebyo nikwo kwona Abaasiria baije, bashangye egi amaizi maingi?" 
2Chronicles32:5 Yaayezirika kukora, yaayombeka busya orugo rw'amabaare orwakumbagaziibwe, yaarwombekaho eminaara, kandi enyima yaarwo yaayombekayo orundi rugo, yaahamya Miilo omu rurembo rwa Daudi. Kandi yaaheesesa eby'okurwanisa n'engabo bingi munonga." 
2Chronicles32:6 Yaataho abakuru b'engabo kutegyeka abantu, yaabateeranira ah'ari omu kubuga eky'aha irembo ry'orurembo, yaabagambira ebigambo by'okubagumya, naagira ati:" 
2Chronicles32:7 Mube ab'amaani, mugume; mutatiina, kandi mutahahaaza emitima ahabw'omugabe wa Asiria n'engabo ze nyingi ezi aine; ahabw'okuba ori hamwe naitwe naakira ori hamwe nabo." 
2Chronicles32:8 Aha rubaju rwe aine emikono y'abantu-buntu, kwonka aha rubaju rwaitu twine MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu kutuhwera n'omkuturwanira engamba zaitu. Abantu baayesiga ebigambo bya Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Bwanyima y'ebyo Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria, owaabaire agotsire Lakishi n'engabo ze zoona, yaatuma abagaragwa be Yerusaalemu ahari Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda n'aha bantu ba Yuda boona abaabaire bari Yerusaalemu, naagira ati:" 
2Chronicles32:10 Oku nikwo Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria arikugamba naagira ati: Mbwenu mwesigire ki okutegyereza kugoterwa omuri Yerusaalemu? 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekia, orikubagira ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu naija kutujuna omu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria, tarikubabeiha, ngu mwitwe enjara n'eiriho?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Hezekia ogwo tiwe yaihireho emyanya ye mikuru ey'okuramizamu n'amatambiro, naaragiira Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu ati: Mushemereire kuguma nimuramiza omu masiho g'eitambiro rimwe ryonka, kandi n'okuritambiraho ebitambo byanyu?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Timurikumanya oku nyowe ana baatatenkuru twagizire abantu boona ab'omu gandi mahanga? Baaruhanga b'ago mahanga bakabaasa kujuna ensi zaabo omu mikono yangye? 
2Chronicles32:14 N'oha omuri baaruhanga boona ab'ago mahanga agu baatatenkuru baacwekyerereize kimwe owaabasize kujuna abantu be omu mikono yangye, naimwe mukabona kwesiga ku Ruhanga waanyu arikwija kubakiza?" 
2Chronicles32:15 N'ahabw'ekyo murekye kwikiriza Hezekia kubabeihabeiha n'okubahabya atyo, kandi murekye kumwesiga, ahabw'okuba tihariho ruhanga ow'eihanga ryona nari obugabe bwona orabaasize kujuna abantu be omu mikono yangye nari eya baatatenkuru, reero kaashwa Ruhanga waanyu!" 
2Chronicles32:16 Bwanyima abagaragwa be baayeyongyereraho ebindi bigambo baajuma Mukama RUHANGA n'omwiru we Hezekia. 
2Chronicles32:17 Kandi Senakeribu yaahandiika ebaruha z'okugayisa MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli n'okumujuma, naagira ati: Nk'oku baaruhanga b'amahanga g'omu nsi batarajunire bantu baabo mu mikono yangye, nikwo na Ruhanga wa Hezekia atarikwija kujuna abe." 
2Chronicles32:18 Ebyo bigambo baabigambira aba Yerusaalemu abaabaire bari aha rugo rw'amabaare n'eiraka rihango omu rurimi rw'Abayudaaya, ngu babatiinise, babahahaaze emitima, babone kukwata orurembo." 
2Chronicles32:19 Baagamba ahari Ruhanga wa Yerusaalemu, nk'oku bagamba ahari baaruhanga b'ensi abakozirwe emikono y'abantu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Ekyo kyareetera Hezekia omugabe na Isaaya nabi mwene Amozi kushaba nibatakira eiguru. 
2Chronicles32:21 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaayohereza maraika, yaacwekyereza abarwani boona ab'amaani, n'abakuru b'amahe n'abakuru b'engabo abaabaire bari omu rusiisira rw'omugabe wa Asiria. Atyo yaagaruka omu nsi ye aine enshoni. Ku yaahikire omuri hekalu ya ruhanga we, abu yaayezaariire baamwitiramu na rurara." 
2Chronicles32:22 Okwo nikwo MUKAMA yaajunire Hezekia n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaaklemu omu mikono ya Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria, n'omu mikono y'abandi bazigu be boona; bwanyima akabaha okuhuumura embaju zoona." 
2Chronicles32:23 Kandi abantu baingi baareetera MUKAMA emitoijo Yerusaalemu, na Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda baamutoijera ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi; okwiha obwo kyamureetera okurangaanwa omu mahanga goona." 
2Chronicles32:24 Omu biro ebyo Hezekia akarwara, yaahika aha ncwamba za rufu, yaashaba MUKAMA, yaamugarukamu, kandi yaamuha akamanyiso." 
2Chronicles32:25 Kwonka Hezekia tiyaakora nk'embabazi ezi yaagiriirwe oku zaabaire ziri; ahabw'okuba omutima gwe gukagira amaryo. Ekyarugiremu ekiniga kya MUKAMA kyamwijaho, we n'Abayuda na Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles32:26 Kwonka Hezekia yaayecureeza, yaayeteisa amaryo g'omu mutima gwe, we n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu; na'ahabw'ekyo ekiniga kya MUKAMA tikyabaijaho omu busingye bwa Hezekia." 
2Chronicles32:27 Kandi Hezekia akaba atungire munonga, aine ekitiinisa kingi; yaayekorera amabiikiro g'efeeza, ezaabu, amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi, emigaju, engabo n'ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi eby'emiringo yoona;" 
2Chronicles32:28 yaayombeka n'ebitara by'okuhunikamu engano, n'amabiikiro ga viinyo n'amajuta, kandi n'emyanya y'okuraazamu amatungo g'emiringo yoona, n'amaka g'amasyo g'entaama." 
2Chronicles32:29 Kandi yaayetungira endembo, n'amasyo g'ente n'ag'entaama nyingi munonga; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akamuha ebintu bingi munonga." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekia ogwo yaacungira ahu amizi ga Gihoni aga ruguru gaabaire nigareetwa, yaagahaburira, yaagatooza aha rubaju rw'orurembo rwa Daudi orw'oburegyerwa-izooba. Hezekia yaagira omugisha omu bi yaabaire naakora byona." 
2Chronicles32:31 Kwonka omu bigambo by'entumwa z'abategyeki ba Babulooni, ezi baamutumireho kumubuuza eby'akamanyiso akaakozirwe omu nsi ye, Ruhanga akabimurekyera kumugyeza, ngu amanye ebiri omu mutima gwe byona." 
2Chronicles32:32 Endiijo mirimo ya Hezekia n'ebirungi ebi yaakozire, reeba, bihandiikirwe omu bi nabi Isaaya mwene Amzi yaayorekirwe, n'omu kitabo ky'abagabe ba Yuda n'aba Israeli." 
2Chronicles32:33 Bwanyima Hezekia yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa aha rubaju rwa ruguru rw'ebituuro bya batabani ba Daudi; aha kufa kwe Abayuda boona n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu baamuha ekitiinisa. Bwanyima omutabani Manaase yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manaase akaba aine emyaka ikumi n'ebiri, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ataano n'etaano Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles33:2 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, naakuratira emitwarize erikunugwa ey'amahanga agu MUKAMA yaabingire omu maisho g'Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles33:3 Ahabw'okuba akagaruka yaayombeka ebyombeko by'emyanya mikuru y'okuramizamu ebi Hezekia ishe yaasheenyire, yaayombekyera Baali amatambiro, yaakora Ashera, yaaguma naaramya eihe ry'omu iguru ryona, naariheereza." 
2Chronicles33:4 Kandi yaakora n'amatambiro omu nju ya MUKAMA, ei MUKAMA yaagambireho ati: Omuri Yerusaalemu nimwo eiziina ryangye ririguma ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles33:5 Kandi yaayombekyera eihe ry'omu iguru ryona amatambiro omu bikaari byombi eby'enju ya MUKAMA. 
2Chronicles33:6 Yaarabya abatabani omu muriro omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinoomu; yaaguma naaraguza abafumu ebiribaho, naarogyesa, naakoresa abateezi b'ebyatsi, naayehanuuza aha barikugambisa emizimu n'aha barogi. Yaakora ebibi bingi omu maisho ga MUKAMA, yaamugwisa kubi." 
2Chronicles33:7 Kandi yaata ekishushani ekirikuramibwa eki yaakozire omu nju ya Ruhanga, ei Ruhanga yaagambiire Daudi n'omutabani Sulemaani, naagira ati: omuri egi nju n'omuri Yerusaalemu, ei naatooraine omu nganda za Israeli zoona, nimweo ndita eiziina ryangye kugumamu ebiro byona;" 
2Chronicles33:8 kandi Abaisraeli ku barita omutima aha kworobera ebi naabaragiire byona, n'ebiragiro ebyatairweho, n'emigyenzo yoona, ebyaragiirwe nibiraba omuri Musa, tindigaruka kwiha bigyere byabo omu nsi ei naateereireho baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles33:9 Atyo Manaase yaahabya Abayuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, kyabareetera kukora ebibi ebirikukira eby'amahanga agu MUKAMA yaacwekyerereize omu maisho g'Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles33:10 Kandi MUKAMA yaagamba na Manaase n'abantu be, kwonka tibakyetaho." 
2Chronicles33:11 Nikyo MUKAMA yaabateereize abakuru by'eihe ry'omugabe wa Asiria, bakakwata Manaase, bakamubohesa enjegyere n'emihama y'emiringa, bakamutwra Babulooni." 
2Chronicles33:12 Ku yaabaire ari omu busaasi, yaashaba MUKAMA Ruhanga we kumugirira embabazi, yaayecureeza munonga omu maisho ga Ruhanga wa baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles33:13 Atyo yaashaba Ruhanga, nawe yaikiriza okweshengyereza kwe, kandi yaahurira okushaba kwe, yaamugarura Yerusaalemu omu bugabe bwe. Manaase yaamanyira aho MUKAMA ku niwe Ruhanga." 
2Chronicles33:14 Bwanyima y'ebyo yaayombeka orugo rw'amabaare enyima y'orurembo rwa Daudi aha rubaju rwa Gihoni orw'oburengyerwa-izooba omu ruhanga, yaaruhitsya aha irembo ry'eby'enyanja, yaaruziguza Ofeli, yaarutunguura, rwahika ahaiguru munonga; kandi yaata abakuru b'amahe omu ndembo za Yuda zoona ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare." 
2Chronicles33:15 Yaihaho baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga, n'ekishushani kiri ekirikuramibwa yaakiiha omu nju ya MUKAMA, n'amatambiro goona agu yaabaire ayombekire aha kabungo k'enju ya MUKAMA n'omuri Yerusaalemu, yaabinaga aheeru y'orurembo." 
2Chronicles33:16 Kandi yaahunduuza eitambiro rya MUKAMA, yaaritambiraho ebitambo by'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye n'eby'okuhimbisa; kandi yaaragiira Abayuda boona kuheereza MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
2Chronicles33:17 N'obu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, abantu baaguma nibatambira ebitambo omu myanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, kwonka nibabitambira MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo wenka." 
2Chronicles33:18 Endiijo mirimo ya Manaase, n'okushaba oku yaashabire Ruhanga we, n'ebigambo ebi abahanuuzi baabaire bamugambira omu iziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, reeba bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebyakozirwe abagabe ba Israeli." 
2Chronicles33:19 Kandi n'okushaba kwe n'oku Ruhanga yaikiriize kuhurira okweshengyereza kwe, n'ekibi kye kyona, n'okucumura kwe, n'ahu yaayombekire ebyombeko omu myany amikuru y'okuramizamu, akatamu Ashera n'ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, obu yaabaire atakeeteisize, ebyo byona bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebyagambirwe abahanuuzi." 
2Chronicles33:20 Bwanyima Manaase yaagwejegyera, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omu nju ye, Amoni omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'ebiri, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka ebiri." 
2Chronicles33:22 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, nk'ebi Manaase ishe yaakozire. Yaatambira ebishushani byona ebi Manaase ishe yaakozire, yaabiheereza." 
2Chronicles33:23 Kandi Amoni ogwo tiyaayecureeza mu maisho ga MUKAMA, nk'oku Manaase ishe yaagizire, kureka yaaguma naayeyongyera kushiisha." 
2Chronicles33:24 Bwanyima abagaragwa be baamugirira enaama, baamwitira omu nju ye." 
2Chronicles33:25 Kwonka abantu b'omuri egyo nsi baita abaamugiriire enaama boona; baayemeka Yosia omutabani omu mwanya gwe. 
2Chronicles34:1 Yosia akaba aine emyaka munaana obu yaatandika kutegyeka, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka makumi ashatu na gumwe." 
2Chronicles34:2 Yaakora ebirikusiimwa MUKAMA, yaatwaza nka Daudi ishenkuru, tiyaateishuka kutoora aha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho." 
2Chronicles34:3 Ahakuba omu mwaka gwe gwa munaana ari aha ngoma, akiri muto, akatandika kusherura Ruhanga wa Daudi ishenkuru; kandi omu mwaka gwe gwa ikumi n'ebiri yaatandika kushemeza Yuda na Yerusaalemu, yaamaramu emyanya mukuru y'okuramizamu, na Ashera, n'ebishushani ebibaizire n'ebiheesire." 
2Chronicles34:4 Baasheenyera omu maisho ge amatambiro ga Baabaali, yaatema ebishushani by'eizooba ebyabaire biri ahaiguru yaago, byagwa ahansi; yaasheenyagura Ashera, n'ebishushani ebibaizire n'ebiheesire, yaabicwa esingo, egyo singo yaagishuka aha bituuro by'abaabaire babitambira." 
2Chronicles34:5 Yaagaruka yaayokyeza amafuga g'abanyamurwa aha matambiro gaabyo; yaashemeza atyo Yuda na Yerusaalemu. 
2Chronicles34:6 Kandi yaatwaza atyo n'omu ndembo za Manaase, Efuraimu na Simeoni ezaabaire zaabaire amatongo, nangwa n'okuhika Nafutaali," 
2Chronicles34:7 yaasheenya amatambiro, yaahondahonda Ashera, n'ebishushani yaabicwa esingo, yaatemagura ebishushani by'eizooba byona, ebyabaire biri omu nsi ya Israeli yoona, yaabinaga ahansi. Bwanyima yaagaruka Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Omu mwaka gwe gwa ikumi na munaana, ku yaaherize kushemeza ensi na hekalu, yaayohereza Shafani mwene Azalia, Maaseya omukru w'orurembo na Yoa mwene Yoahazi omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho, kuhunduuza enju ya MUKAMA Ruhanga we." 
2Chronicles34:9 Baahika owa Hilukia omunyamurwa omukuru, baahayo empiiha ezaareetsirwe omu nju ya Ruhanga, ezi Abaleevi abakumiirizi baabaire bashoroize omu Bamanaase, Abaefuraimu, n'omu Baisraeli boona abaabaire batsigaireho, n'omu Bayuda n'Ababenyamiini boona, kandi n'omu batuuzi ba Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Baaziha abakozi abarikureeberera enju ya MUKAMA; bwanyima abakozi abarikukora omu nju ya MUKAMA baatandika kuzikoresa kuhunduuza enju n'okugigira nsya. 
2Chronicles34:11 Baaziha ababaizi n'abombeki kugura amabaare agabaizire, embaaho z'okuteerana, n'emitambiko y'ebyombeko ebi abagabe ba Yuda baarekire bikasiisikara." 
2Chronicles34:12 Abo bashaija baakora omurimo n'obwesigwa. Abaabaire nibabareeberera bakaba bari Yahasi na Obadia Abaleevi ab'omuri beene Merari, na Zekaria na Meshulaamu ab'omuri beene Kohasi." 
2Chronicles34:13 Abandi Baleevi, abaabaire bari abanyabwengye omu kuteera ebirikugamba, baareeberera abeekorezi, kandi baaguma nibeezirikisa boona abaabaire nibakora emirimo y'emiringo yoona ey'okuheereza. Kandi abandi omu Baalevi bakaba bari abahandiiki, abatware n'abakumiirizi." 
2Chronicles34:14 Ku baabaire nibashohoza empiiha ezaaretsirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA, Hilukia omunyamurwa yaazoora ekitabo ky'Ebiragiro bya MUKAMA, ekyahandiikirwe Musa." 
2Chronicles34:15 Hilukia yaagambira Shafani omuhandiiki ati: Nzoire ekitambo ky'Ebiragiro omu nju ya MUKAMA. Atyo yaakiha Shafani. 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafani yaakitwarira omugabe, kandi yaagambira omugabe eby'omurimo ati: Ebi abairu baawe bakwatsiibwe babikozire byona;" 
2Chronicles34:17 batwaire empiiha zoona ezibaire ziri omu nju ya MUKAMA, baaziha abarikureeberera omurimo n'abakozi." 
2Chronicles34:18 Kandi Shafani omuhandiiki yaagaruka yaagambira omugabe ati: Hilukia omunyamurwa yampa ekitabo. Atyo yaakishomera omugabe. 
2Chronicles34:19 Omugabe ku yaahuriire ebigambo by'ebiragiro, yaataagura ebijwaro bye;" 
2Chronicles34:20 yaaragiira Hilukia, Ahikaamu mwene Shafani, Abudooni mwene Miika, Shafani omuhandiiki na Asaaya omugaragwa w'omugabe, naagira ati:" 
2Chronicles34:21 Mwirooko mumbuurize ahari MUKAMA, hamwe n'abatsigaire omuri Israeli na Yuda eby'ebigambo by'omuri eki kitabo ekizoirwe; ahabw'okuba ekiniga kya MUKAMA ekituriho ni kingi, ahakuba baatatenkuriitwe tibaroorobeire kigambo kya MUKAMA kukora ebihandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo byona." 
2Chronicles34:22 N'ahabw'ekyo Hilukia n'abu omugabe yaabaire atumire, baaza owa Hulida nabikazi muka Shalumu, mwene Tokuhaasi, mwijukuru wa Hasira, omubiiki w'ebijwaro, (kandi ogwo mukazi akaba atwire Yerusaalemu omu kicweka kyayo kya kabiri), baabimuteekyerereza." 
2Chronicles34:23 Yaabagarukamu ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Mugambire omushaija obantumireho muti: 
2Chronicles34:24 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyareeta akabi aha mwanya ogu n'aha batuuzi baamwo, n'emikyeeno yoona ehandiikirwe omu kitabo ekishomeirwe omugabe wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles34:25 Ahabw'okuba bakanfuruka, baayoterera baaruhanga abandi obubaane, ngu bangwise kubi n'ebi barikukora n'emikono yaabo byona, nikyo ekiniga kyangye kirishukirwa ahari ogu mwanya, kitaraazibwe." 
2Chronicles34:26 Kwonka omugabe wa Yuda, obatumire kumbuuza, mumugire muti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba aha bigambo ebi ohuriire, naagira ati:" 
2Chronicles34:27 Ahabw'okugira omutima gworobi, ku ohuriire ebi ngambire aha mwanya ogu n'aha batuuzi baamwo, waayecureeza omu maisho gangye, waataagura ebijwaro byawe, wandirira omumaisho; n'ahabw'ekyo nanaye nkuhuriire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
2Chronicles34:28 Reeba, ndyakushangisa baashwenkuru, oziikwe omu kituuro kyawe n'obusingye, kandi amaisho gaawe tigarireeba kabi koona aku ndireeta aha mwanya ogu n'abagutwiremu. Batyo baagyenda, baabigambira omugabe." 
2Chronicles34:29 Bwanyima omugabe yaatuma, yaateeranira hamwe abakuru boona aba Yuda na Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles34:30 Omugabe yainamuka omu nju ya MUKAMA hamwe n'abashaija ba Yuda boona n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, abantu boona abakuru n'abato; yaabashomera ebigambo byona eby'omu kitabo ky'endagaano ekizoirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles34:31 Omugabe yaayemerera omu mwanya gwe, yaaragaana endagaano omu maisho ga MUKAMA, okumukuratira n'okworebera ebiragiro bye n'ebi yaahamize kandi n'ebi yaataireho, n'omutima gwe gwona n'amagara ge goona, n'okuhikiiriza ebigambo by'egyo ndagaano ehandiikirwe omuri ekyo kitabo." 
2Chronicles34:32 Bwanyima yaareetera abaabaire bari Yerusaalemu na Benyamiini boona kwemera egyo ndagaano. N'ahabw'ekyo abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu baakora nk'endagaano ya Ruhanga, Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo, oku eri." 
2Chronicles34:33 Kandi Yosia yaihaho ebirikunugwa byona omu nsi yoona ey'Abaisraeli, n'abaabaire bari omuri Israeli boona yaabagyema kuheereza MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo. Omu busingye bwe bwona tibararekire kukuratira MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles35:1 Bwanyima Yosia yaagaruriraho MUKAMA obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho omuri Yerusaalemu; baita omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwezi kw'okubanza. 
2Chronicles35:2 Yaagarura abanyamurwa aha murimo gwabo, yaabeezirikisa kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles35:3 Kandi yaagambira Abaleevi abaabaire beegyesa Abaisraeli, akndi abayereziibwe MUKAMA, ati: Mute eshanduukye erikwera omu nju ei Sulemaani mwene Daudi omugabe wa Israeli yaayombekire; tihaakiriho kirigibaheekyesa obundi. Mbwenu muheereze MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, n'abantu be Israeli." 
2Chronicles35:4 Mweteekateekye omu mbu zaanyu, nk'oku amaju ga baashwenkuriimwe gari, nimukuratira ebyaragiirwe Daudi omugabe wa Israeli, na Sulemaani omutabani." 
2Chronicles35:5 Kandi mwemerere omu mwanya ogurikwera nk'emitwe y'amaju ga baishenkuru ba beene waanyu abatari Baleevi oku eri, buri mutwe gugire ekicweka ky'enju ya baashwenkuriimwe Abaleevi." 
2Chronicles35:6 Bwanyima mwite omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho, mweyeze, mweteekateekyere beene waanyu, mubone kukora nk'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyagambirwe Musa oku kiri." 
2Chronicles35:7 Ku baaherize, Yosia yaaha abantu abatari Baleevi abaana b'entaama n'ab'embuzi obukumi bushatu n'enimi enkumi ishatu okuruga omu masyo, kuba empongano z'Okuhingurwaho ahabwa boona abaabaire bari aho; ebyo byona bikaruga omu matungo g'omugabe." 
2Chronicles35:8 Kandi abanyiginya nabo baaha abantu b'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi eby'okuhonga, baabiha n'omutima ogwekundiire. Hilukia, Zekaria na Yehieli, abakuru b'enju ya Ruhanga, baaha abanyamurwa abaana be'entaama n'ab'embuzi enkumi ibiri na magana mukaaga, n'enimi magana ashatu, kuba empongano z'Okuhingurwaho." 
2Chronicles35:9 Kandi Konania n'abarumuna Shemaaya na Netaneeli, hamwe na Hashabia, Yeyeli na Yozabaadi, abakuru b'Abaleevi, baaha Abaleevi abaana b'entaama n'ab'embuzi enkumi itaano, n'enimi magana ataano, kuba empongano z'Okuhingurwaho." 
2Chronicles35:10 Ku baaherize kweteekateekyera okwo kuheereza, abanyamurwa baayemerera omu mwanya gwabo, n'Abaleevi omu bicweka byabo, nk'oku omugabe yaaragiire." 
2Chronicles35:11 Batyo baita omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho, abanyamurwa baamiisiira eshagama ei baahairwe Abaleevi, abaabaire nibabaaga." 
2Chronicles35:12 Baihaho ebitambo by'okwotsya, baabibaganisa nk'emitwe y'amaju ga baishenkuru b'abatari Baleevi oku yaabaire eri ngu babone kubihongyera MUKAMA, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Musa. Kandi n'enimi baazitwaza batyo." 
2Chronicles35:13 Bwanyima baayotsya omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho nk'oku kirikuragiirwa; kandi n'empongano ezirikwera baaziteeka omu nyabya, omu nyungu n'omu safuriya, ahonaaho baabitwara, baagaburira abantu boona." 
2Chronicles35:14 Bwanyima baayeteekateekyera ebyabo ahabwabo n'ahabw'abanyamurwa, ahabw'okuba abanyamurwa beene Arooni bakaba bahugiire omu kutamba ebitambo by'okwotsya n'ebishaju okuhitsya obu bwaizire; batyo Abaleevi baateekateeka ebyabo ahabwabo n'ahabw'abanyamurwa beene Arooni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Kandi abeeshongozi beene Asafu bakaba bari omu mwanya gwabo, nk'oku kyaragiirwe Daudi na Asafu, Hemani na Yedusuuni, omuhanuuzi w'omugabe; n'abakumiirizi bakaba bari aha marembo goona; abo boona bakaba batarikwenda kuruga aha mirimo yaabo, ahabw'okuba beene waabo Abaleevi bakaba nibabateekateekyera ebyabo." 
2Chronicles35:16 Okwo nikwo omurimo gw'okuheereza MUKAMA gwona gwateekateekirwe eryo izooba kwijuka obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho n'okutambira ebitambo by'okwotsya aha itambo rya MUKAMA, nk'oku omugabe Yosia yaaragiirre." 
2Chronicles35:17 Omu bunaku obwo Abaisraeli, abaabaire bari aho, baijuka obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, n'obw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe okumara ebiro mushanju." 
2Chronicles35:18 Kandi okwiha omu biro bya nabi Samueli omuri Israeli hakaba hatakabahoga bugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho nk'obwo; kandi tihariho mugabe omu bagabe ba Israeli boona owaijukire obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho nk'oku Yosia yaijukire, akwataniise n'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, n'aba Yuda na Israeli boona abaabaire bari aho, hamwe n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yosia, nibwo baijuka obwo bugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho." 
2Chronicles35:20 Bwanyima y'ebyo byona, Yosia ku yaaherize kushemeza hekalu, Neeko omugabe wa Misri yainamuka kuteera Kakemeshi aha mugyera Furaati, na Yosia yaahurura kurwana nawe." 
2Chronicles35:21 Kwonka Neeko yaamutumaho entumwa, naamugira ati: Mbwenu nyowe naiwe nitufa ki, iwe omugabe wa Yuda? Hati tiiwe nyizire kurwanisa, kureka nyine enju ei ndikurwana nayo; kandi Ruhanga andagiire ngu nyehuute. Ruga Ruhanga omu kaso ori hamwe naanye, atakaakucwekyereza." 
2Chronicles35:22 Kwonka Yosia yaayanga kumurugaho, kureka yaayehindura ngu arwane nawe; tiyaahurira bigambo bya Neeko ebirugire omu kanwa ka Ruhanga, yaaza omu rugamba omu ruhita rwa Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Abarasi baarasha omugabe Yosia; nawe nikwo kugira abashaija be ati: Muunyiha omu rugamba ahakuba naahutaara munonga. 
2Chronicles35:24 Batyo abashaija be baamwiha omu kigaari, baamuta omu kigaari kye ekya kabiri, baamutwara Yerusaalemu. Yaafa, yaaziikwa omu bituuro bya baihsenkuru. Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu boona baamucurira." 
2Chronicles35:25 Na Yeremia yaamucurira; kandi abeeshongozi boona, abashaija n'abakazi, baaguma nibamugambaho omu kutonzya kwabo n'okuhitsya hati. Baakihindura omugyenzo omuri Israeli; reeba, bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'Okutonzya." 
2Chronicles35:26 Endiijo mirimo ya Yosia, n'ebirungi ebi yaakozire naakuratira ebihandiikirwe omu biragiro bya MUKAMA," 
2Chronicles35:27 n'ebi yaakozire okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, reeba, bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'Abagabe ba Israeli n'aba Yuda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Bwanyima abantu b'omu nsi egyo baatwara Yehoahazi mwene Yosia, baamwemeka omu mwanya gwa ishe omuri Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yehoahazi akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'eshatu, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu ameezi ashatu." 
2Chronicles36:3 Bwanyima y'ago meezi ashatu omugabe wa Misri yaamwiha aha ngoma omuri Yerusaalemu, yaacwera ab'omuri egyo nsi etalanta z'efeeza igana n'etalanta emwe y'ezaabu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Bwanyima omugabe wa Misri ogwo Neeko yaayemeka Eliakimu mukuru we kuba omugabe wa Yuda na Yerusaalemu, yaahindura eiziina rye, yaamweta Yehoyakimu; kandi yaakwata Yehoahazi omurumuna, yaamutwara Misri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakimu kaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano obu yaatandika kutegyeka, yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka ikumi na gumwe. Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA Ruhanga we." 
2Chronicles36:6 Bwanyima Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yainamuka, yaamuteera, yaamubohesa emihama kumutwara Babulooni." 
2Chronicles36:7 Kandi Nebukadeneeza ogwo yaatwara Babulooni bimwe aha bintu by'enju ya MUKAMA, yaabita omu kikaari kye." 
2Chronicles36:8 Endiijo mirimo ya Yehoyakimu, n'ebirikunugwa ebi yaakozire, n'ebyabaire bimureebwaho, bihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'abagabe ba Israeli n'aba Yuda; bwanyima omutabani Yehoyakiini yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakiini akaba aine emyaka ikumi na munaan, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu ameezi ashatu n'ebiro ikumi. Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles36:10 Aha kutandika kw'omwaka Nebukadeneeza yaatuma, baamutwara Babulooni n'ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi eby'enju ya MUKAMA, yaayemeka mukuru we Zedekia kuba omugabe wa Yuda na Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekia akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri na gumwe, obu yaatandika kutegyeka; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka ikumi na gumwe." 
2Chronicles36:12 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA Ruhanga we; tiyaayecureeza mu maisho ga Yeremia nabi, owaabaire amugambira ebigambo bya MUKAMA." 
2Chronicles36:13 Kandi yaagomera omugabe Nebukadeneeza owaamurahiize ahari Ruhanga; yaagaruka yaagangaaza ebitsya, yaagumya omutima gwe, yaayanga kuhindukira MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
2Chronicles36:14 Kandi abanyamurwa abakuru boona n'abantu nabo bakaba barengyesereize omu kucumura nibakuratira ebirikunugwa byona eby'abanyamahanga, baashiisha enju ya MUKAMA ei yaabaire ayereize Yerusaalemu." 
2Chronicles36:15 MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baishenkurubo akaba atuura naabatumaho entumwa ze, ahabw'okugirira abantu be, n'obutaaho bwe, esaasi;" 
2Chronicles36:16 kwonka baaguma nibateerera enaku entumwa za Ruhanga, nibagaya ebigambo bye, nibashekyerera baanabi be, okuhitsya obu ekiniga kya MUKAMA kyaizire aha bantu be, bakabura oku baraakikire." 
2Chronicles36:17 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA yaabateeza omugabe w'Abakaludaaya, yaitira abatsigazi baabo omu nju y'Obutaaho bwabo oburikwera na rurara, tiyaagirira muntu weena saasi, omutsigazi nari empangare, omugurusi nari owaahikire omu ngingo zaabukuru; yaabahayo boona omu mikono y'ogwo mugabe." 
2Chronicles36:18 Kandi ebintu byona eby'enju ya MUKAMA, ebihango n'ebikye, n'eby'obutungi by'omuri egyo nju, n'eby'omugabe n'eby'abanyiginya be, ebyo byona yaabitwara Babulooni." 
2Chronicles36:19 Bwanyima baayotsya enju ya Ruhanga, baasheenya orugo rw'amabaare rwa Yerusaalemu, baayotsya zaanyaruju zaayo zoona, baacwekyereza n'ebintu byayo ebirungi." 
2Chronicles36:20 Abaahonokire ahari rurara Nebukadeneeza yaabatwara Babulooni, baaba abahuuku be n'aba'abatabani, okuhitsya aha kutandika kw'obugabe bwa Perisi," 
2Chronicles36:21 okuhikiiriza ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyagambirwe Yeremia, ngu ensi eryaguma etyo okuhitsya obu eriheza kushemerererwa sabato zaayo; ahabw'okuba ebiro ebi yaamazire eri omushaka byona, ekaba eijuka sabato okumara emyaka makumi mushanju." 
2Chronicles36:22 Bwanyima omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwa Kuuro omugabe wa Perisi, MUKAMA akaimutsya omutima gwa Kuuro, ngu ekigambo kye ekyagambirwe Yeremia kihikiirire, yaaragiira kuranga ebigambo ebi omu bugabe bwe bwona, kandi n'okubihandiika, naagira ati:" 
2Chronicles36:23 Oku nikwo Kuuro omugabe wa Perisi arikugamba naagira ati: MUKAMA, Ruhanga w'eiguru, ampaire obugabe bwona obw'omu nsi, kandi anyehanangiriize kumwombekyera enju omuri Yerusaalemu ey'omuri Yuda. Mbwenu omuntu weena omuriimwe ow'omu bantu be, MUKAMA Ruhanga we agume nawe; kandi ainamukye." 
Ezra1:1 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwa Kuuro omugabe wa Perisi, MUKAMA akakora aha mutima gwa Kuuro ogwo, ngu ekigambo kye ekyagambirwe Yeremia kihikiirire, yaaragiira kuranga ebigambo ebi omu bugabe bwe bwona, kandi n'okubihandiika, naagira ati:" 
Ezra1:2 Oku nikwo Kuuro omugabe wa Perisi arikugamba naagira ati: MUKAMA, Ruhanga w'eiguru, ampaire obugabe bwona obw'omu nsi, kandi anyehanangiriize kumwombekyera enju omuri Yerusaalemu ey'omuri Yuda." 
Ezra1:3 Mbwenu omuntu weena omuriimwe ow'omu bantu be, Ruhanga we agume nawe, ainamukye Yerusaalemu ey'omuri Yuda, ayombekye enju ya MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, (niwe Ruhanga otuura omuri Yerusaalemu)," 
Ezra1:4 kandi omuntu weena owaahonokireho, ori ei yaashuhuukiire, abantu baayo bamuhwere n'efeeza n'ezaabu, kandi n'ebintu n'amatungo, otabariireho mitoijo ahabw'enju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusaalemu, ei barikureeta n'omutima gwekundiire." 
Ezra1:5 Ahonaaho abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'Abayuda n'ab'Ababenyamiini baimuka n'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, hamwe na'abandi boona, abu Ruhanga yaakozire aha mutima kwinamuka kuza kwombeka enju ya MUKAMA ey'omuri Yerusaalemu;" 
Ezra1:6 kandi abaabaire batwire nabo baabatwera ebintu by'efeeza, n'ezaabu n'ebindi bintu n'amatungo, n'ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi, otabariireho ebindi byona ebi baatoizire n'omutima gwekundiire." 
Ezra1:7 Kandi omugabe Kuuro yaashohoza ebintu by'enju ya MUKAMA, ebi Nebukadeneeza yaabaire anyagire Yerusaalemu, akata omu nju ya baaruhanga be." 
Ezra1:8 Kuuro omugabe wa Perisi yaaragiira Misiredaasi omubiiki kubiihamu, akabibarira Sheshebazaari omunyiginya wa Yuda." 
Ezra1:9 Kandi ogu nigwo mubaro gwabyo: eshohaani z'ezaabu makumi ashatu, n'ez'efeeza rukumi, ebyoterero makumi abiri na mwenda," 
Ezra1:10 enyabya z'ezaabu makumi ashatu, n'ez'efeeza enkumi ibiri na magana ana na ikumi, n'ebindi bintu ebirikukoresibwa rukumi;" 
Ezra1:11 ebintu byona eby'ezaabu n'efeeza bikaba biri enkumi itaano na magana ana na makumi mukaaga na mwenda. Ebyo byona Sheshebazaari akabinamukama, obu enkwatwa zaihwa Babulooni kugarurwa Yerusaalemu." 
Ezra2:1 Aba nibo bantu b'eryo ihanga abaarugire omu bantu abu Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaatwaire Babulooni bari enkwatwa, bakagaruka Yerusaalemu na Yuda, buri muntu omu rurembo rw'owaabo." 
Ezra2:2 Bakaija na Zerubabeeli, Yeshua, Nehemia, Seraaya, Relaaya, Morodekai, Bilushaani, Misipaari, Biguvai, Rehumu na Baana. Omubaro gw'abashaija b'Abaisraeli nigwo ogu:" 
Ezra2:3 beene Paroshi enkumi ibiri na igana na makumi mushanju na babiri. 
Ezra2:4 Beene Shefatia, magana ashatu na makumi mushanju na babiri;" 
Ezra2:5 Beene Aara, magana mushanju na makumi mushanju na bataano." 
Ezra2:6 Beene Pahasimoabu, nibo beene Yeshua na Yoabu, enkumi ibiri na magana munaana na ikumi na babiri." 
Ezra2:7 Beene Elamu, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ataano na bana." 
Ezra2:8 Beene Zaatu, magana mwenda na makumi ana na bataano." 
Ezra2:9 Beene Zakai, magana mushanju na makumi mukaaga." 
Ezra2:10 Beene Baani, magana mukaaga na makumi ana na babiri." 
Ezra2:11 Beene Bebai, magana mukaaga na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:12 Beene Azigaadi, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi abiri na babiri." 
Ezra2:13 Beene Adonikaamu, magana mukaaga na makumi mukaaga na mukaaga." 
Ezra2:14 Beene Biguvai, enkumi ibiri na makumi ataano na mukaaga." 
Ezra2:15 Beene Adini, maganaana na makumi ataano na bana." 
Ezra2:16 Beene Ateeri, nibo ba Hezekia, makumi mwenda na munaana." 
Ezra2:17 Beene Bezai, magana ashatu na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:18 Beene Yoora, igana na ikumi na babiri." 
Ezra2:19 Beene Hashumu, magana abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:20 Beene Gibaari makumi mwenda na bataano. 
Ezra2:21 Beene Betelehemu, igana na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:22 Abashaija ba Netofa, makumi ataano na mukaaga." 
Ezra2:23 Abashaija ba Anatoosi, igana na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Ezra2:24 Beene Azimaveesi, makumi ana na babiri." 
Ezra2:25 Beene Kiryasarimu, Kefira na Beeroosi, magana mushanju na makumi ana na bashatu." 
Ezra2:26 Beene Raama na Geeba, magana mukaaga na makumi abiri n'omwe." 
Ezra2:27 Abashaija ba Mikimaasi, igana na makumi abiri na babiri." 
Ezra2:28 Abashaija ba Beseeli na Ai, magana abiri na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:29 Beene Neebo, makumi ataano na babiri." 
Ezra2:30 Beene Magibihsi, igana na makumi ataano na mukaaga." 
Ezra2:31 Beene Elamu ondiijo, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ataano na bana." 
Ezra2:32 Beene Harimu, magana ashatu na makumi abiri." 
Ezra2:33 Beene Loodi, Hadidi na Ono, magana mushanju na makumi abiri na bataano." 
Ezra2:34 Beene Yeriko, magana ashatu na makumi ana na bataano." 
Ezra2:35 Beene Senaha, enkumi ishatu na magana mukaaga na makumi ashatu." 
Ezra2:36 Abanyamurwa n'aba: beene Yedaaya ab'omu nju ya Yeshua, magana mwenda na makumi mushanju na bashatu." 
Ezra2:37 Beene Imeri, rukumi na magana ataano na babiri." 
Ezra2:38 Beene Peshihuuri, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ana na mushanju." 
Ezra2:39 Beene Harimu, rukumi na ikumi na mushanju." 
Ezra2:40 Abaleevi n'aba: beene Yeshua na Kadimieli ab'omuri beene Hodavia, makumi mushanju na bana." 
Ezra2:41 Abeeshongozi, beene Asafu igana na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Ezra2:42 Batabani b'abakumiirizi, beene Shalumu, Ateeri, Talumooni, Akubu, Hatita na Shobai, boona igana na makumi ashatu na mwenda." 
Ezra2:43 Abaheereza b'omuri hekalu bakaba bari aba: beene Ziiha, beene Hasufa, beene Tabaosi," 
Ezra2:44 beene Kerosi, beene Siaha, beene Padoni," 
Ezra2:45 beene Lebana, beene Hagaba, beene Akubu," 
Ezra2:46 beene Hagabu, beene Shamulai, beene Hanani," 
Ezra2:47 beene Gideli, beene Gahaari, beene Reaya," 
Ezra2:48 beene Rezini, beene Nekoda, beene Gazamu," 
Ezra2:49 beene Uzza, beene Pasea, beene Besai," 
Ezra2:50 beene Asina, beene Meunimu, beene Nefisimu," 
Ezra2:51 beene Bakibuki, beene Hakufa, beene Harihuri," 
Ezra2:52 beene Baziluusi, beene Mehida, beene Harisha," 
Ezra2:53 beene Barikoosi, beene Sisera, beene Teema," 
Ezra2:54 beene Nezia na beene hatifa. 
Ezra2:55 Batabani b'abagaragwa ba Sulemaani: beene Sotai, beene Hasoferesi, beene Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 beene Yaala, beene Darikoni, beene Gideli," 
Ezra2:57 beene Shefatia, beene Hatili, beene Pokeresi-hazebaimu na beene Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Abaheereza b'omuri hekalu boona na batabani b'abagaragwa ba Sulemaani bakaba bari magana ashatu na makumi mwenda na babiri. 
Ezra2:59 Kandi aba nibo barugire Telimeela, Teliharasha, Kerubu, Adani na Imeri, kwonka tibaarabaasize kworeka amaju ga baishenkurubo, nari obukomooko bwabo, kuhamya ku bari Abaisraeli buzima;" 
Ezra2:60 beene Delaaya, beene Tobia, na beene Nakoda, magana mukaaga na makumi ataano na babiri." 
Ezra2:61 Kandi ab'omuri batabani ba'abanyamurwa, beene Habaaya, beene Hakozi, na beene Baruzilai, owaashweire omukazi ow'omuri bahara ba Baruzilai owa Gileadi, akeetererwa eiziina ryabo." 
Ezra2:62 Abo bakasherura amaziina gaabo omu baahandiikirwe nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwa baishenkurubo oku kwabaire kuri, kwonka tigaareebekamu; nikyo baateekateekyeirwe kuba abatashemeire, bakazibirwa kukora omurimo gw'obunyamurwa;" 
Ezra2:63 omutegyeki omukuru yaabaragiira ngu barekye kurya aha by'okurya ebirikwera, okuhitsya obu haribaho omunyamurwa oine Urimu na Tumimu." 
Ezra2:64 Omutwe gw'abo bantu boona gukaba guri obukumi buna n'enkumi ibiri na magana ashatu na makumi mukaaga," 
Ezra2:65 otabariiremu bahuuku baabo n'abazaana baabo, abu omubaro gwabo gwabaire guri enkumi mushanju na magana ashatu na makumi ashatu na mushanju; kandi bakaba baine abeeshongozi, abashaija n'abakazi, magana abiri." 
Ezra2:66 Embaraasi zaabo zikaba ziri magana mushanju na makumi ashatu na mukaaga, enyumbu magana abiri na makumi ana na itaano," 
Ezra2:67 engamira magana ana na mkumi ashatu na itaano, n'endogoya enkumi mukaaga na magana mushanju na makumi abiri." 
Ezra2:68 Kandi bamwe ab'omu bakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, ku baahikire aha nju ya MUKAMA ey'omuri Yerusaalemu baahonga empongano n'omutima gwekundiire ahabw'okwombeka enju ya Ruhanga omu kibanja kyayo;" 
Ezra2:69 baahayo ebiconco nk'oku barikubaasa, nibabita omu ibiikiro ry'empiiha z'omurimo, dariki z'ezaabu obukumi mukaaga na rukumi, na miina z'efeeza enkumi itaano, n'ebijwaro by'abanyamurwa igana." 
Ezra2:70 Kandi abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi na bamwe omu bantu, n'abeeshongozi n'abakumiirizi kandi n'abaheereza b'omuri hekalu batuura omu ndembo zaabo, n'Abaisraeli boona baatuura omu zaabo." 
Ezra3:1 Okwezi kwa mushanju ku kwabonekire, Abaisraeli bari omu ndembo zaabo, abantu baayeteeranira Yerusaalemu nk'omuntu omwe." 
Ezra3:2 Ku baahikireyo, Yeshua mwene Yozadaaki yaimuka na beene ishe abanyamurwa, na Zerubabeeli mwene Shealutieli na beene waabo, baayombeka eitambiro rya Ruhanga wa Israeli kutambiraho ebitambo by'okwotsya, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu biragiro bya Musa omushaija wa Ruhanga." 
Ezra3:3 Baata eryo itambiro omu mwanya gwaryo, ahabw'okuba bakaba baine obwoba ahabw'abantu b'omuri ezo nsi, baaritambiriraho MUKAMA ebitambo by'okwotsya, omu kasheeshe n'omu mwabazyo." 
Ezra3:4 Kandi baijuka obugyenyi bwe'ebiro bikuru obw'Ensiisira, nk'oku kuhandiikirwe, baatamba ebitambo bya buri izooba, nk'omubaro gwabyo oku gwabaire guri, nibakuratira ekiragiro kya buri izooba;" 
Ezra3:5 bwanyima baahayo ebitambo by'okwotsya eby'obutoosha, n'eby'okuboneka kw'ameezi, n'eby'amagyenyi ga MUKAMA goona agaatairweho, hamwe n'empongano z'omuntu weena owaahongyeire MUKAMA n'omutima gwekundiire." 
Ezra3:6 Aha izooba ry'okubanza ery'okwezi kwa mushanju niho baatandiikire kutambira MUKAMA ebitambo by'okwotsya. Kwonka omusingi gwa hekalu ya MUKAMA gukaba gutakatairweho. 
Ezra3:7 N'ahabw'ekyo baaha abombeki n'ababaizi empiiha, kandi baaha Abasidoni n'Abatuuro eby'okurya n'eby'okunywa n'amajuta, ngu bareete emiti y'emyerezi, kugiiha Lebanooni bakagireeta aha nyanja, bakagihitsya Yoopa, nk'oku Kuuro omugabe wa Perisi yaabaikiriize." 
Ezra3:8 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri baherize kuhika aha nju ya Ruhaga omuri Yerusaalemu, omu kwezi kwa kabiri, nibwo Zerubabeeli mwene Shealutieli na Yeshua mwene Yozadaaki baatandika kwombeka, nibakwatanisa na beene waabo abandi, abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi n'abaarugire omu bukwatwa boona, bakaija Yerusaalemu. Baataho Abaleevi abaine emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho okureeberera omurimo gw'enju ya MUKAMA." 
Ezra3:9 Yeshua n'abatabani na beene waabo baimuka na Kadumieli n'abatabani beene Yuda kukoresa abakozi abarikukora enju ya Ruhanga nibakwatanisa na beene Henadaadi na beene waabo Abaleevi. 
Ezra3:10 Abomeki ku baataireho omusingi gwa hekalu ya MUKAMA, abanyamurwa baija bajwaire ebijwaro byabo baine amakondere, n'Abaleevi beene Asafu baija n'ebitaasa, kuhimbisa MUKAMA, nk'oku Daudi omugabe wa Israeli yaaragiire," 
Ezra3:11 baayeshongora nibaikirizana, nibahimbisa MUKAMA kandi nibamusiima bati: Ahakuba ni murungi, Kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona ahari Israeli. Ku baabaire nibahimbisa MUKAMA, abantu boona baateera akaari n'amaraka mahango, ahabw'okuheza kutaho omusingi gw'enju ya MUKAMA." 
Ezra3:12 Kwonka baingi omu banyamurwa n'Abaleevi n'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, abagurusi abaareebire enju y'okubanza, ku baareebire omusingi gw'enju gwaheza kuteebwaho, baarira nibaborooga munonga, n'obu abandi baraabe baabaire nibateera akaari ahabw'okushemererwa;" 
Ezra3:13 kyareetera abantu kutabaasa kutaanisa amaraka, yaaba gari ag'okushemererwa nari ag'okucura; ahakuba abantu bakaba nibayomba munonga, n'orwari rwabo niruhuririrwa hare." 
Ezra4:1 Bwanyima abazigu b'Abayuda n'Ababenyamiini ku baahuriire ngu abaarugire omu bukwatwa nibombekyera MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, hekalu," 
Ezra4:2 baija ahari Zerubabeeli n'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, baabagira bati: Ka twombekye hamwe naimwe; ahakuba naitwe turamya Ruhanga waanyu, nk'oku mumuranya, kandi tutuura nitumutambira ebitambo, okuruga omu busingye bwa Esari-hadoni, omugabe wa Asiria owaatureetsire aha." 
Ezra4:3 Kwonka Zerubabeeli na Yeshua n'abandi bakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'Abaisraeli baabagarukamu bati: Timwine kakwate naitwe kwombekyera Ruhanga waitu enju; kureka itwe twenka nitwija kwombekyera MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, nk'oku Nyakusinga Kuuro omugabe wa Perisi yaaturagiire." 
Ezra4:4 Bwanyima abantu b'omuri egyo nsi baateera Abayuda aha mutwe, baabatiinisa kwombeka," 
Ezra4:5 baaguriirira abahi b'obwengye kubazibira kuhikiiriza eki barikwenda kukora; byaguma bityo omu busingye bwa Kuuro omugabe wa Perisi bwona okuhitsya omu busingye bwa Dario omugabe wa Perisi. 
Ezra4:6 Kandi omu busingye bwa Ahasuero, ku yaabaire naakitandika, baahandiika ebaruha nibarega abatuuzi ba Yuda na Yerusaalemu." 
Ezra4:7 Bwanyima omu busingye bwa Aruta-gizakiseeski, Bishulaamu, Mesiredaasi, abeeli na bagyenzi baabo abandi baahandiikira Aruta-gizakiseesi omugabe wa Perisi; egyo baruha baagihandiika omu rurimi rwa Siria, kandi baagihindura." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumu omutegyeki na Shimushai omuhandiiki nabo baahandiikira Aruta-gizakiseesi ebaruha nibarega Yerusaalemu ni bagira bati: 
Ezra4:9 Ebaruha ya Rehumu omutegyeki na Shimushai omuhandiiki na bagyenzi baabo abandi, n'abaramuzi, n'abategyeki, n'abatware, n'Abaperisi, n'aba Suusa nibo Baelami," 
Ezra4:10 n'ab'amahanga agandi abu osinapaari omutegyeki omukuru rugambwa yaihire owaabo, akabata omu ndembo za Samaria, n'omu byaro ebindi ebiri omu nsi seeri y'Omugyera n'ebindi:" 
Ezra4:11 (ebi nibyo bigambo by'ebaruha ei baatwekire;) Nyakusinga Omugabe Aruta-gizakiseesi, itwe abairu baawe ab'omu nsi ya seeri y'Omugyera nitukuramutsya." 
Ezra4:12 Mbwenu Nyakusinga omugabe, omanye Abayuda, abaarugire okwo, bakaija kunu Yerusaalemu, orurembo orugomi kandi orubi; mbwenu nibarwombeka, kandi baaherize engo z'amabaare n'omusingi." 
Ezra4:13 Mbwenu Nyakusinga, omanye ngu, ku baraayombekye oru rurembo, baaheza n'engo zaarwo, tibarikutoijera, n'obu kwakuba okuha omushoro n'ehoozi; ekirirugamu empiiha z'obugabe ziryatuuba." 
Ezra4:14 Mbwenu ahabw'okuba tutungirwe obugabe, kandi n'ahabw'okutenda kureeba omugabe naihwaho ekitiinisa, nikyo twakutumiraho kukumanyisa," 
Ezra4:15 ngu basherure omu kitabo ekirikwijutsya ebyabaireho omu busingye bwa baashwenkru. Ebyo noija kubishanga omuri ekyo kitabo, omanye ku orurembo oru ruba orugomi, orunyangaraza abagabe n'ensi zaabo, kandi okuruga ira ku rushangwa rugomesa abantu. Ekyo nikyo kyarureeteire kucwekyerezibwa." 
Ezra4:16 Nitumanyisa omugabe ngu, oru rurembo ku ruraayombekwe, engo zaarwo zaahwa, noija kubura eki waatunga omu nsi egi eya seeri y'Omugyera." 
Ezra4:17 Omugabe yaatuma ahari Rehumu omutegyeki na Shimushai omuhandiiki na bagyenzi baabo abandi abaabaire batwire Samaria n'omu bindi byanga by'ensi eya seeri y'Omugyera, yaabagarukamu naagira ati: Muri buhooro, n'ebindi?" 
Ezra4:18 Ebaruha ei mwatutwekyeire, bagishomeire omu maisho gaitu, yaashobooroka." 
Ezra4:19 Naaragiira ku basherura, baashanga ngu okuruga ira orwo rurembo rukaba rwimukirira abagabe, kandi eby'obugomi n'okwebumba bikaba biruhanuurirwamu." 
Ezra4:20 Kandi ngu rukaba rubamu abagabe b'amaani abaabaire bategyeka Yerusaalemu n'ebyanga byona ebya seeri y'Omugyera, kandi bakaba baheebwa emitoijo n'omushoro n'empooza." 
Ezra4:21 N'ahabw'ekyo muteho ekiragiro abo bashaija barekyere aho, orwo rurembo rurekye kwombekwa, okuhitsya obu ndibaragiira ekindi." 
Ezra4:22 Kandi mwerinde, muteeganda ahari ekyo, akabai katakaakura, kakareetera abagabe kufeerwa." 
Ezra4:23 Bwanyima ku baaherize kushomera ebaruha y'omugabe Aruta-gizakiseesi omu maisho ga Rehumu na Shimushai omuhandiiki na bagenzi baabo, ahonaaho baimuka, baaza Yerusaalemu ahu Abayuda baabaire bari, baabazibira kukora n'amaani n'obushoboorozi." 
Ezra4:24 N'ahabw'ekyo omurimo gw'enju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusaalemu baagurekyera aho, okuhitsya omu busingye bwa Dario omugabe wa Perisi." 
Ezra5:1 Bwanyima baanabi Hagai na Zekaria mwene Ido baahanuurira Abayudaaya abaabaire bari Yuda na Yerusaalemu omu iziina rya Ruhanga wa Israeli. 
Ezra5:2 Ahonaaho Zerubabeeli mwwene Shealutieli na Yeshua mwene Yozadaaki baimuka, baatandika kugaruka kwombeka enju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusaalemu, nibahwerwa baanabi ba Ruhanga abo, abaabaire bari hamwe nabo." 
Ezra5:3 Omu biro ebyo Tatenai omutegyeki w'ensi egyo eya seeri y'Omugyera na Shesari-bozenai na bagyenzi baabo baabashanga ahu baabaire bari, baababuuza bati: N'oha obaragiire kwombeka enju egi n'okuheza oru rugo rw'amabaare?" 
Ezra5:4 Baagaruka baababuuza bati: Abarikwombeka egi nju amaziina gaabo nibaahi? 
Ezra5:5 Kwonka eriisho rya Ruhanga waabo ryaguma aha bategyeki b'Abayudaaya, tibaabazibira kwombeka, batakamanyise Dario, nwe akabagarukamu aha kigambo ekyo." 
Ezra5:6 Ebigambo by'ebaruha ei Tatenai omutegyeki w'ensi egyo eya seeri y'Omugyera na Shesari-bozenai na bagyenzi be abamashaza b'omuri egyo nsi, ebi baatwekyeire omugabe Dario nibyo ebi:" 
Ezra5:7 Nyakusinga Dario omugabe, nitukwendeza obusingye bwonka!" 
Ezra5:8 Nitukumanyisa ku tugiire omu ishaza rya Yuda, aha nju ya Ruhanga Nyamuhanga, erikwombekyesibwa amabaare mahango, bakatambika emitambiko mihango omu bisiika byayo; omurimo ogwo nibagukora n'obweziriki, kandi nigugyenda gye." 
Ezra5:9 Mbwenu tubuurize abo bakuru, nitubagira tuti: N'oha obaragiire kwombeka enju egi, n'okuheza oru rugo rw'amabaare?" 
Ezra5:10 Kandi twababuuza n'amaziina gaabo, ngu tubone kugakumanyisa, kandi n'okukuhandiikira amaziina g'abarikubategyeka." 
Ezra5:11 Oku nikwo baatugarukiremu, nibagira bati: Turi abairu ba Ruhanga w'eiguru n'ensi, kandi hati nitugaruka kwombeka enju eyaayombekirwe ira emyaka mingi ehingwire, ei omugabe wa Israeli rugambwa yaayombekire akaheza." 
Ezra5:12 Kwonka Ruhanga w'eiguru, ahabw'okugwisibwa kubi baatatenkuriitwe, akabahayo omu mikono ya Nebukadeneeza Omukaludaaya omugabe wa Babulooni, yaasheenya egyo nju, yaatwara abantu Babulooni bari enkwata." 
Ezra5:13 Kwonka Kuuro omugabe wa Babulooni, omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwe, akaragiira ku egi nju ya Ruhanga eshemereire kwombekwa." 
Ezra5:14 Kandi ebintu by'omu nju ya Ruhanga eby'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza, ebi Nebukadeneeza yaanyagire omuri hekalu ya Yerusaalemu, akabitwara omuri hekalu ya Babulooni, omugabe Kuuro yaabiiha omuri egyo hekalu ya Babulooni, baabiha omuntu orikwetwa Sheshebazaari, ou yaahindwire omutegyeki;" 
Ezra5:15 yaamuragiira ati: Twara ebintu ebi, ogyende, obite omuri hekalu y'omuri Yerusaaleumu, enju ya Ruhanga egarukye eyombekwe omu kibanja kyayo." 
Ezra5:16 Bwanyima Sheshebazaari ogwo yaija, yaataho emisingi y'enju ya Ruhanga omuri Yerusaalemu; mbwenu okwiha obwo n'okuhitsya hati neekyombekwa, tekahweire." 
Ezra5:17 N'ahabw'ekyo, omugabe ku araakisiime, basherure omu nju y'eibiikiro ry'omugabe wa Babulooni, bareebe Kuuro ku araabe atararagiire kwombeka egi nju ya Ruhanga omuri Yerusaalemu. Haza obwo omugabe atutumeho eki arikusiima omu kigambo eki." 
Ezra6:1 Bwanyima Dario omugabe yaaragiira kusherura omu nju y'ebitabo by'ebyabaireho omuri Babulooni, omu baabaire babiika ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi." 
Ezra6:2 Bwanyima baasherura omuri Akimeta, ekikaari ky'obugabe eky'omu ishaza rya Media, baazooramu omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogwahandiikirwemu ebigambo ebirikugira biti:" 
Ezra6:3 Omugabe Kuuro, omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwe, akataho ekiragiro eki: Ebirikukwata aha nju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusaalemu, enju egyo eyombekwe, ebe omwanya ogw'okutambiramu ebitambo, emisingi yaayo eteebweho gye, ehame; obwemi bwayo bube mikono makumi mukaaga, n'obukiika bwayo mikono makumi mukaaga;" 
Ezra6:4 egire emishorongo eshatu y'amabaare mahango n'omushorongo gumwe gw'emitambiko y'ebiti; eby'okugiihurira birugye omu ibiikiro ry'empiiha z'obugabe. 
Ezra6:5 Kandi ebintu by'enju ya Ruhanga, eby'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza, ebi Nebukadeneeza yaanyagire omuri hekalu ey'omuri Yerusaalemu, akabitwara Babulooni, babigarureyo, babite omuri hekalu egyo, buri kintu kigarukye omu mwanya gwakyo; mubite omu nju ya Ruhanga." 
Ezra6:6 Mbwenu iwe Tatenai omutegyeki w'ensi ya seeri y'Omugyera, na Shesari-bozenai, na bagyenzi baanyu abamashaza ab'ebyanga bya seeri y'Omugyera, mugume hangahari," 
Ezra6:7 mutagira eki mwakora ekirikuzibira omurimo gw'egyo nju ya Ruhanga; omutegyeki w'Abayuda n'abakuru baabo babe nibo baayombeka egyo nju ya Ruhanga omu kibanja kyayo. 
Ezra6:8 Kandi naataho ekiragiro ky'ebi mushemereire kukorera abo bakuru b'Abayudaaya ahabw'okwombeka enju ya Ruhanga; mwihe aha mpiiha z'obugabe ezirugire omu mushoro gw'abantu b'ensi ya seeri y'Omugyera, muteho omutima kuha abo bashaija eby'okwihurira omurimo, barekye kgira ekyabazibira kukora." 
Ezra6:9 Kandi eki bariba nibeetenga kyona, yaaba nimi z'ebimasha, empaya z'entaama nari entaama ahabw'ebitambo by'okwotsya kutambira Ruhanga w'eiguru, nari engano, omwonyo, viinyo nari amajuta, ebi abanyamurwa ba Yerusaalemu bariba nibeetenga, bagume babiheebwe buri izooba bitaribura," 
Ezra6:10 babone kuguma nibatambira Ruhanga w'eiguru ebitambo by'ekisooroora kirungi, kandi bashabire omugabe n'abatabani okugira amagara." 
Ezra6:11 Kandi nintaho ekiragiro nti: Omuntu weena rorihindura ekigambo ekyo, baryahigura enyomyo omu nju ye, bagimuhanikyeho, n'enju ye bagihindure orubungo." 
Ezra6:12 Kandi Ruhanga, owaagumizeyo eiziina rye, acwekyereze omugabe weena, nari abantu, abariimutsya emikono yaabo kuhindura ekiragiro eki, nari okusheenya egyo nju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusaalemu. Nyowe Dario, niinye naaragiira ekyo kiragiro; kihikiirizibwe n'obweziriki bwona." 
Ezra6:13 Bwanyima Tatenai omutegyeki w'ensi eya seeri y'Omugyera, na Shesari-bozenai na bagyenzi baabo baayezirika munonga kukora eki Dario omugabe yaaragiire, nk'ekigambo eki yaabatumireho oku kyabaire kiri." 
Ezra6:14 Abakuru b'Abayudaaya baayombeka, byagyenda gye ahabw'okuhanuura kwa nabi Hagai na Zekaria mwene Ido. Baayombeka, baaheza ahabw'okuragiirwa Ruhanga wa Israeli, kandi n'ahabw'ekiragiro ekyatairweho Kuuro na Dario na Aruta-gizakiseesi omugabe wa Perisi;" 
Ezra6:15 egyo nju yaahwa aha kiro kya kashatu ky'okwezi kwa Adari, omu mwaka gwa mukaaga ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Dario." 
Ezra6:16 Bwanyima Abaisraeli, abanyamurwa, Abaleevi n'abandi abaarugire omu bukwatwa, baagira obugyenyi bw'okushoroora egyo nju ya Ruhanga baine okushemererwa." 
Ezra6:17 Ku baabaire nibagishoroora, baahonga enimi igana, empaya z'entaama magana abiri, n'abaana b'entaama magana aha; kandi baatamba empaya z'embuzi ikumi na ibiri kuba empongano z'okurihiirira ekibi ahabw'Abaisraeli boona, nk'omubaro gw'enganda zaabo oku gwabaire guri." 
Ezra6:18 Baata abanyamurwa omu mbu zaabo, nk'oku baabaire nibakuratana, n'Abaleevi baaza omu myanya yaabo, kuheereza Ruhanga omuri Yerusaalemu, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Musa." 
Ezra6:19 Bwanyima abaarugire omu bukwatwa baijuka obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho aha kiro kya ikumi na bina ky'okwezi kw'okubanza. 
Ezra6:20 Ahabw'okuba abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi bakaba beeyereize hamwe; boona bashemeire. N'ahabw'ekyo baita omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho ahabw'abaarugire omu bukwatwa boona, n'ahabwa beene waabo abanyamurwa, n'aabwabo bonka." 
Ezra6:21 Gwariibwa Abaisraeli abaarugire omu bukwatwa, n'abantu boona abaabaire beetaaniise n'ebihagaro by'abanyamahanga ab'omu nsi egyo, bakakwatanisa n'Abaisraeli kuramya MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
Ezra6:22 Baijuka obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, baamara ebiro mushanju nibashemererwa; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akabaha okushemererwa, kandi yaahindura omutima gw'omugabe wa Asiria, yaabakunda, yaabahwera omu murimo gw'okwombeka enju ya Ruhanga, Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
Ezra7:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo omu busingye gwa Aruta-gizakiseesi, omugabe wa Perisi, hakaba hariho omushaija orikwetwa Ezera mwene Seraaya, mwijukuru wa Azaria, Azaria ya Hilukia," 
Ezra7:2 Hilukia ya Shalumu, Shalumu ya Zadoki, Zadoki ya Ahitubu," 
Ezra7:3 Ahitubu ya Amaria, Amaria ya Azaria, Azaria ya Merayoosi," 
Ezra7:4 Merayoosi ya Zerahia, Zerahia ya Uuzi, Uuzi ya Buuki," 
Ezra7:5 Buuki ya Abishua, Abishua ya Finehaasi, Finehaasi ya Eleazaari, mwene Arooni omunyamurwa omukuru;" 
Ezra7:6 Ezera ogwo akaruga Babulooni, yainamuka kuza Yerusaalemu; kandi akaba ari omuhandiiki w'obwengye omu by'ebiragiro bya Musa, ebyahairwe MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli. Omugabe yaamuha ebi yaashabire byona, ahabw'okuba omukono gwa MUKAMA Ruhanga we gukaba gumuriho." 
Ezra7:7 Kandi n'abani omu Baisraeli bainamuka hamwe nawe n'abamwe aha banyamurwa, Abaleevi, abeeshongozi, abakumiirizi n'abaheereza b'omuri hekalu, baaza Yerusaalemu omu mwaka gwa mushanju ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Aruta-gizakiseesi." 
Ezra7:8 Ezera yaahika Yerusaalemu omu kwezi kwa kataano omu mwaka gwa mushanju ogw'omu busingye bw'ogwo mugabe; 
Ezra7:9 ahakuba aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kw'okubanza akatandika kuruga Babulooni, kandi aha kiro ky'okubanza omu kwezi kwa kataano yaahika Yerusaalemu, ahabw'okuba omukono gwa Ruhanga we omurungi gukaba gumuriho." 
Ezra7:10 Kandi Ezera ogwo akaba ataire omutima gwe aha kwega ebiragiro bya MUKAMA, n'okubyorobera, kandi n'okwegyesa Abaisraeli ebyo biragiro n'emigyenzo eyaatairweho." 
Ezra7:11 Egi niyo baruha ei omugabe Aruta-gizakiseesi yaahaire Ezera omunyamurwa, kandi omuhandiiki, owaabaire ari omunyabwengye omu by'ebiragiro bya MUKAMA n'ebi yaataireho ahabwa Israeli." 
Ezra7:12 Nyowe Aruta-gizakiseesi, omugabe w'abagabe, naakuhandiikira, Ezera omunyamurwa, kandi omuhandiiki w'ebiragiro bya Ruhanga w'eiguru, ninkuramutsya munonga, n'ebindi!" 
Ezra7:13 Mbwenu nintaho ekiragiro nti: Omuntu weena omu Baisraeli, nari omu banyamurwa baabo nari ow'omu Baleevi, abari omu bugabe bwangye, orikwenda kuza Yerusaalemu atagyemirwe, agyende naiwe." 
Ezra7:14 Ahabw'okuba nyowe omugabe n'abahi b'obwengye bangye mushanju twakutuma ngu oze kubuuza ebya Yuda na Yerusaalemu, nk'ebiragiro bya Ruhanga waawe ebi oine oku biri," 
Ezra7:15 kandi otware efeeza n'ezaabu, ebi nyowe omugabe n'abahi b'obwengye bangye tutoijeire Ruhanga, otuura Yerusaalemu, ahabwaitu," 
Ezra7:16 hamwe n'efeeza yoona n'ezaabu ezi orishanga omu ishaza rya Babulooni ryona, hamwe n'emitoijo y'abantu n'abanyamurwa, ei baaraganiise kutoija n'omutima gwekundiire ahabw'enju ya Ruhanga waabo eri omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Ezra7:17 N'ahabw'ekyo oyezirikye munonga kugura n'empiiha ezo enimi empaya z'entaama n'abaana b'entaama hamwe n'empongano z'esaano, n'ez'eby'okunywa eby'okuhongwa nazo, mubitambire aha itambiro ry'enju ya Ruhanga waanyu omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Ezra7:18 Kandi ebirishaaga ahari ezo feeza n'ezaabu, iwe na beene waanyu, oku muryenda kubitwaza, mubitwaze kwo, nimukuratira ebi Ruhanga waanyu arikusiima." 
Ezra7:19 Kandi n'ebintu ebi ohairwe kukoresa omu nju ya Ruhanga waawe oryabimurikira omu maisho ga Ruhanga wa Yerusaalemu. 
Ezra7:20 Kandi ekindi kyona ekiriba nikyetengwa ahabw'enju ya Ruhanga waawe, eki oryenda kuha, okiihe omu ibiikiro ry'omugabe, okihe." 
Ezra7:21 Kandi nyowe, omugabe Aruta-gizakiseesi, naaragiira ababiiki b'omu nsi eya seeri y'Omugyera boona nti: Kyona eki Ezera omunyamurwa, kandi omuhandiiki w'ebiragiro bya Ruhanga w'eiguru, aribashaba, mukikore n'obweziriki bwona," 
Ezra7:22 okutarenzya aha talanta z'efeeza igana, encuro z'engano igana, enjoga za viinyo igana, entsimbo z'amajuta igana, n'omwonyo ogurengire ekigyero." 
Ezra7:23 Ekiriragiirwa Ruhanga w'eiguru kyona, kikorerwe kimwe ahabw'enju ye, ekiniga kye kitakaija aha mugabe n'abatabani." 
Ezra7:24 Kandi nitubamanyisa eby'abanyamurwa, Abaleevi, abeeshongozi, abakumiirizi, abaheereza b'omuri hekalu n'abandi bakozi b'omuri egyo nju ya Ruhanga boona oku baingana, ku mutarikwizibwa kubatoijesa emitoijo, nari okubahsoza omushoro, n'obu kwakuba okubahooza ehoozi." 
Ezra7:25 Kandi naiwe Ezera, nk'obwengye bwa Ruhanga waawe obu oine oku buri, oryataho abategyeki n'abaramuzi b'okucwa emanja z'abantu b'omu nsi ya seeri y'Omugyera, abarikumanya ebiragiro bya Ruhanga waawe boona; n'abatarikubimanya, muryaguma mubibeegyese." 
Ezra7:26 Kandi weena otariikiriza kworobera biragiro bya Ruhanga waawe n'eby'omugabe, aheebwe ekifubiro, atarikusaasirwa, eky'okwitwa, nari okubingwa, nari okunyagwa ebintu bye, nari okuteebwa omu kihome." 
Ezra7:27 Bwanyima Ezera yaagira ati: MUKAMA asiimwe, Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe, ahabw'okuta ekintu nk'eki omu mutima gw'omugabe, okushemeza enju ya MUKAMA ey'omuri Yerusaalemu," 
Ezra7:28 kandi n'ahabw'okumpa okugirirwa embabazi omu maisho g'omugabe n'abahi b'obwengye be, n'omu maisho g'abategyeki be boona ab'obushoboorozi. Nikyo naahamiire ahabw'omukono gwa MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye ogwabaire gundiho, nkateerana abakuru bamwe omuri Israeli ngu twinamukane." 
Ezra8:1 Aba nibo bakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, kandi oku nikwo kukuratana kw'oruzaaro rw'abaarugire naanye Babulooni omu busingye bw'omugabe Aruta-gizakiseesi." 
Ezra8:2 Omuri beene Finehaasi, Gereshoni; omuri beene Itamaari Danieli; omuri beene Daudi Hatushi;" 
Ezra8:2 Omuri beene Finehaasi, Gereshoni; omuri beene Itamaari Danieli; omuri beene Daudi Hatushi;" 
Ezra8:3 omuri beene Shekania. Omuri beene Paroshi Zakaria owaahandiikirwe hamwe n'abashaija igana na makumi ataano. 
Ezra8:4 Omuri beene Pahasi-moabu Eliehoenai mwene Zerahia, kandi ogwo akaba ari hamwe n'abashaija magana abiri." 
Ezra8:5 Omuri beene Zatu Shekania mwene Yahazieli, hamwe n'abashaija magana ashatu." 
Ezra8:6 Omuri beene Adini Ebedi mwene Yonasaani hamwe n'abashaija makumi ataano. 
Ezra8:7 Omuri beene Elamu Yeshaya mwene Atalia hamwe n'abashaija makumi mushanju. 
Ezra8:8 Omuri beene Shefatia Zebadia mwene Mikaeli hamwe n'abashaija makumi munaana. 
Ezra8:9 Omuri beene Yoabu Obadia mwene Yehieli, hamwe n'abashaija magana abiri na ikumi na munaana." 
Ezra8:10 Omuri beene Baani Shelomiisi mwene Yosifia hamwe n'abashaija igana na makumi mukaaga. 
Ezra8:11 Omuri beene Bebai Zekaria mwene Bebai hamwe n'abashaija makumi abiri na munaana. 
Ezra8:12 Omuri beene Azigaadi Yohanaani mwene Hakataani hamwe n'abashaija igana na ikumi. 
Ezra8:13 Omuri beene Adonikaamu abaizire bwanyima, amaziina gaabo Elifeleti, Yeueli, na Shemaaya hamwe n'abashaija makumi mukaaga." 
Ezra8:14 Omuri beene Biguvai Usai na Zakuri hamwe n'abashaija makumi mushanju. 
Ezra8:15 Abo boona nkabateeranira aha mugyera Ahava, twateeraho ensiisira, twamaraho kashatu. Ku naabaire niinyetegyereza abantu n'abanyamurwa, naashanga hatarimu n'omwe ow'omuri beene Leevi." 
Ezra8:16 Naatuma kweta Eliezeeri, Arieli, Shemaya, Elinasani, Yaribu, Elinasani, Nasani, Zekaria na Meshulaamu, abashaija bakuru, hamwe na Yoyaribu na Elinasani abaabaire bari abashaija abarikwetegyereza," 
Ezra8:17 naabatuma ahari Ido, omutegyeki w'ekyaro ekirikwetwa Kasifia, naabagambira ebi baraagambire Ido na beene ishe abaheereza b'omuri hekalu abaabaire bari omuri ekyo kyaro, ngu batwoherereze abaheereza by'okukora omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Ezra8:18 Ahabw'omukono gwa Ruhanga waitu omurungi ogwabaire guturiho, baatureetera omushaija orikwetegyereza ow'omuri beene Mahili mwene Leevi mwijukuru wa Israeli, orikwetwa Sherebia hamwe n'abatabani na beene waabo, boona ikumi na munaana;" 
Ezra8:19 na Hashabia hamwe na Yeshaaya ow'omuri beene Merari, na beene ishe na batabani baabo, boona makumi abiri;" 
Ezra8:20 otabariireho baheereza b'omuri hekalu magana abiri na makumi abiri, abu Daudi n'abatware be baatooraine kuheereza Abaleevi. Abo boona baagambwaho nk'oku amaziina gaabo gaabaire gari." 
Ezra8:21 Bwanyima naarangira ahari ogwo mugyera Ahava, ku habaho okwesiibyakwo, ngu tubone kwecureeza omu maisho ga Ruhanga waitu, tumuhabuzeho omuhanda gugororokire ahabwaitu, ahabw'abaana baitu abato n'ahabw'ebintu byaitu byona;" 
Ezra8:22 ahabw'okuba nkagira enshoni z'okushaba omugabe omutwe gw'engabo z'abaserukare n'ab'aha mbaraasi kturinda abazigu omu muhanda, ahakuba tukaba twagambiire omugabe tuti: Omukono gwa Ruhanga waitu guri aha barikumusherura boona kubagirira gye; kwonka amaani ge n'ekiniga kye birwanisa abamutsigaho boona." 
Ezra8:23 Tutyo twayesiibyakwo, twashaba Ruhanga waitu nitumweshengyereza; yaahurira okweshengyereza kwaitu." 
Ezra8:24 Bwanyima naatoorana abakuru ikumi na babiri omu banyamurwa, Sherebia na Hashabia n'abandi ikumi omuri beene waabo." 
Ezra8:25 Naabapimira efeeza n'ezaabu n'ebintu, ebyatoizirwe omugabe n'abahi b'obwengye be n'abatware be n'Abaisraeli boona abaabaire bari aho, ahabw'enju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Ezra8:26 Ntyo naabakwatsa etalanta z'efeeza magana mukaaga na makumi ataano, n'ebintu by'efeeza eby'etalanta igana n'etalanta z'ezaabu igana," 
Ezra8:27 n'enyabya z'ezaabu makumi abiri eza dariki rukumi, n'ebintu bibiri by'emiringa mirungi ekuubirwe eby'obuguzi bwingi nk'obw'ezaabu." 
Ezra8:28 Naabagira nti: Muri abeereziibwe MUKAMA, kandi ezi feeza n'ezaabu n'emitoijo ei baatoijeire MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe n'omutima gwekundiire." 
Ezra8:29 Mubibiikye kandi mubirinde, okuhitsya obu muribipimira omu maisho g'abanyamurwa abakuru n'Abaleevi n'abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru b'Abaisraeli omu bishengye by'enju ya MUKAMA omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Ezra8:30 Batyo abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi baayakiira efeeza n'ezaabu n'ebindi bintu, nk'oku oburemeezi bwabyo bwabaire buri, kubitwara Yerusaalemu omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Ezra8:31 Bwanyima aha kiro kya ikumi na bibiri ky'okwezi kw'okubanza twaruga aha mugyera Ahava kuza Yerusaalemu; omukono gwa Ruhanga waitu gwatugumaho, yaatujuna omu mikono y'abazigu baitu, n'abaabaire batugwereire omu muhanda." 
Ezra8:32 Ku twahikire Yerusaalemu, twahamara ebiro bishatu;" 
Ezra8:33 aha izooba rya kana twapimira efeeza n'ezaabu n'ebindi bintu omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu, twabikwatsa Meremoosi omunyamurwa mwene Uriya, owaabaire ari hamwe na Eleazaari mwene Finehaasi, bakwataniise n'Abaleevi Yozabaadi mene Yeshua na Noadia mwene Binui." 
Ezra8:34 Byona byabarwa, byapimwa, kandi oburemeezi bwa buri kintu bwahandiikwa." 
Ezra8:35 Bwanyima abaagarukire nibaruga omu bukwatwa baatambira Ruhanga wa Israeli ebitambo by'okwotsya, enimi ikumi na ibiri ahabwa Israeli yoona, empaya z'entaama makumi mwenda na mukaaga, abaana b'entaama makumi mushanju na mushanju, kandi baahonga empaya z'embuzi ikumi na ibiri kuba ekitambo ky'okurihiirira ekibi. Ebyo byona byaba ekitambo ky'okwokyeza MUKAMA." 
Ezra8:36 Kandi baaha abategyeki b'omugabe n'abamashaza b'ensi ya seeri y'Omugyera ebiragiro by'omugabe; nabo baahwera abantu n'enju ya Ruhanga. 
Ezra9:1 Ebyo byona ku byahweire, abatware bampika haihi, bangira bati: Abantu ba Israeli n'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi tibeetaaniise na bantu b'ensi ezi hamwe n'ebihagaro byabo, Abanyakanaani, Abahiiti, Abaperizi, Abayebusi, Abaamoni, Abamoabu, Abanyamisri n'Abaamori;" 
Ezra9:2 ahabw'okuba bashweire bamwe omuri bahara baabo, kand baabashwererera na batabani baabo; n'ahabw'ekyo eihanga eririkwera ryejwangize n'abanyamahanga b'omuri ezi nsi. Kandi abategyeki n'abakuru nibo bakirize abandi kukora ekyo kicumuro." 
Ezra9:3 Ku naahuriire ebyo, naataagura ebijwaro n'omunagiro gwangye, naayemaanyura eishokye omu mutwe, kandi n'obureju, naashutama ahansi nshobeirwe munonga." 
Ezra9:4 Bwanyima abantu boona, abu ebigambo bya Ruhanga wa Israeli byareeteire kutetema ahabw'ekicumuro ky'abaarugire omu bukwatwa, baateeranira ahu naabaire nshutami nshobeirwe, okuhitsya aha bunaku bw'okutamba ekitambo ky'omu mwabazyo." 
Ezra9:5 Obunaku bw'ekitambo ky'omu mwabazyo ku bwahikire, naimuka ahu naabaire nyecureereize, ebijwaro byange n'omunagiro gwangye bitaagukire, naatsimba amaju, naateega MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye emikono," 
Ezra9:6 ningira nti: Ai Ruhanga wangye, nyine enshoni z'okwimutsya amaihso kukureeba, nimbwerabwera omu maisho gaawe, Ruhanga wangye; ahabw'okuba ebibi byaitu bikanyire, byatukira aha mutwe, n'orubanja rwaitu rwatuuma, rwahika omu iguru." 
Ezra9:7 Okuruga omubiro bya baatatenkuriibwe tutuura twine orubanja ruhango n'okuhitsya hati; kandi ebicumuro byaitu nibyo byatureeteire hamwe n'abagabe baitu n'abanyamurwa baitu kuheebwayo omu mikono y'abagabe b'ezi nsi, okwitwa rurara, okutwarwa omu bukwatwa, okunyagwa n'okuhemuka, nk'oku kiri na hati." 
Ezra9:8 Kwonka omu biro ebi ebikye MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu ayorekire embabazi ze, yaagira abu yaatutsigiraho, yaatuha omwanya guhamire omu Mwanya gwe ogurikwera, ngu abone kushemuura amaihso gaitu, n'okutugaruramu otugara omu buhuuku bwaitu;" 
Ezra9:9 ahakuba kwo turi abahuuku; kwonka Ruhanga tatutsigireho mubuhuuku bwaitu, kureka atworekire embabazi ze omu maisho g'abagabe b'Abaperisi; yaatugaruramu otugara, ngu tubone agombeka enju ya Ruhanga waitu, okuhunduuza ahasiisikaire, n'okutubeera orugo rw'okuturinda omuri Yuda na Yerusaalemu." 
Ezra9:10 Mbwenu, ai Ruhanga waitu, ka waatutambiire oti, ekindi nitwenda kugamba ki? Ahabw'okuba tukareka kworobera ebiragiro byawe," 
Ezra9:11 ebi waaragiira nooraba omu bairu baawe baanabi, noogira oti: Ensi ei murikuzamu kukubuura n'ensi esiisikaire ahaba'ebihagaro by'abantu baamwo, n'ebirikunugwa byabo ebigiijwize, okutashemera kukshaagaana." 
Ezra9:12 N'ahabw'ekyo mutarihingira bahara baanyu batabani baabo, nari kushwererera batabani baanyu bahara baabo, n'obu kwakuba okubendeza obusingye nari okuba gye, mubone kuba ab'amaani, n'okurya ebirungi by'ensi, kandi n'okugitsigira abaana baanyu, ekaba obuhunguzi bwabo obw'ebiro byona." 
Ezra9:13 Mbwenu nk'oku ebi byona byatubaireho ahabw'ebibi ebi twakozire, n'ahabw'orubanja rwaitu ruhango, haza iwe, Ruhanga waitu, okatuha ekifubiro ekitakuuraine na bibi byaitu, kandi okatutsigiraho ekicweka kirikwingana kiti," 
Ezra9:14 mbwenu tugarukye tushiishe ebiragiro byawe, tushwererane n'amahanga agarikukora ebirikunugwa biti? Torikwija kutugirira ekiniga, okatumaraho, hakabura owaahonokaho, nari owaakira?" 
Ezra9:15 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli, ori ow'amazima, ahabw'okuba tutsigaireho turi ekicweka ekyahonokireho, nk'oku kiri hati. Mbwenu reeba, turi aha omu maisho gaawe, tusingirwe orubanja; kandi tihaine orikubaasa kwemerera omu maisho gaawe ahabw'ekyo." 
Ezra10:1 Ezera ku yaabaire naashaba, naayatura ebibi, naarira naayetuura ahansi omu maisho g'enju ya Ruhanga, omutwe muhango munonga gw'abashaija n'abakazi n'abaana gwaruga omuri Israeli, gwateeranira ah'ari; kandi abo bantu nabo baarira munonga." 
Ezra10:2 Bwanyima Shekania mwene Yehieli, ow'omuri beene Elamu, yaagambira Ezera ati: Tucumwire ahari Ruhanga waitu, twashwera abakazi b'abanyamahanga, kwonka n'obu kiraabe kiri kityo, na hati tukiine amatsiko ahabwa Israeli." 
Ezra10:3 N'ahabw'ekyo ka turagaane na Ruhanga waitu, tushende abakazi abo boona n'abaana baabo, nk'obwengye bwa mukama wangye n'obw'abarikutetema ahabw'ekiragiro kya Ruhanga waitu, oku buri; kandi ka kikorwe, nk'oku ebiragiro birikuragiira." 
Ezra10:4 Imuka ahakuba n'omurimo gwawe, kandi naitwe tukwataniise naiwe; ba ow'amaani, okikore." 
Ezra10:5 Ahonaaho Ezera yaimuka, yaarahiza abakuru b'omu banyamurwa, n'Abaleevi, n'Abaisraeli boona, ku bakora nk'oku kigambirwe. Batyo baarahira." 
Ezra10:6 Bwanyima Ezera yaaruga ahu yaabaire ari omu maisho g'enju ya Ruhanga, yaataaha omu kishengye kya Yehohanani mwene Eliashibu, yaaraaramu atariire n'obu kwakuba okunywa amaizi; ahakuba akaba naasaasibwa okucumura kw'abaarugire omu bukwatwa." 
Ezra10:7 Bwanyima baaranga omuri Yuda yoona na Yerusaalemu, ngu abantu boona abaarugire omu bukwatwa bateeranire Yerusaalemu;" 
Ezra10:8 kandi ngu omuntu weena ku araabe atahikireyo omu biro bishatu, ebintu bye byona binyagwe, kandi nawe acuubwe omu mutwe gw'abaarugire omu bukwatwa, nk'oku abategyeki n'abakuru baaragiire." 
Ezra10:9 Bwanyima abashaija ba Yuda na Benyamiini boona baateeranira Yerusaalemu, ebyo biro bishatu bitakahweire; obwo kukaba kuri okwezi kwa mwenda, aha kiro kyakwo kya makumi abiri. Abantu boona baashutama omu kibuga ky'omu maisho g'enju ya Ruhanga, nibatetema ahabw'ekyo kigambo, n'ahabw'enjura nyingi." 
Ezra10:10 Ezera omunyamurwa yaayemerera, yaabagira ati: Mukacumura, mwashwera abakazi b'abanyamahanga, mwayongyerera Israeli orubanja." 
Ezra10:11 N'ahabw'ekyo hati mwaturire MUKAMA Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe ekibi kyanyu, mukore eki arikwenda; mwetaanise n'abantu b'omuri egi nsi kandi n'abanyamahangakazi." 
Ezra10:12 Ahonaaho abantu boona abaabaire bateeraniireyo baagarukamu n'eiraka rihango bati: Nikwo kiri; tushemereire kukora, nk'oku waagamba." 
Ezra10:13 Kwonka abantu ni baingi; kandi n'obunaku bw'enjura nyingi; titurikubaasa kwemerera aheeru. Kandi omurimo ogu ti gw'ekiro kimwe nari bibiri; ahakuba tukacumura munonga omu kigambo eki. 
Ezra10:14 Abakuru baitu ka beemerere omu iziina ry'eihanga ryona; bwanyima ab'omu ndembo zaitu boona, abaashweire abanyamahangakazi, baije omu bunaku obu bateereirweho, hamwe n'abakuru n'abaramuzi aba buri rurembo, okuhitsya obu ekiniga kya Ruhanga waitu ekingi, eki atugiriire ahabw'ekigambo eki, kiraaturugyeho." 
Ezra10:15 Kwonka Yonasaani mwene Asaheeli na Yahazeya mwene Tikuva baayanga egyo naama, kandi Meshulaamu na Shabesai Omuleevi baikirizana nabo." 
Ezra10:16 Batyo abaarugire omu bukwatwa baaba nikwo baatwaza.
