Ezera omunyamurwa yaatoorana abashaija, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, nk'oku ago maju gaabaire gari, kuba abajwekyerwa nk'oku amaziina gaabo gaabaire gari. Aha kiro ky'okubanza ky'okwezi kwa ikumi baashutama kwetegyereza ebyo bigambo," 
Ezra10:17 kandi aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kw'okubanza baashangwa baaherize ebigambo by'abashaija boona abaabaire bashweire abanyamahangakazi. 
Ezra10:18 Omuri batabani b'abanyamurwa abaashweire abanyamahangakazi baashangamu Maaseya, Eliezeeri, Yaribu, na Gedalia, ab'omuri beene Yeshua mwene Yozadaaki na beene ishe." 
Ezra10:19 Baarahira kushenda abakazi baabo, kandi empongano yaabo y'okwihaho ekibi ekaba eri empaya y'entaama ey'omu busyo ahabw'orubanja rwabo." 
Ezra10:20 Omuri beene Imeri: Hanani na Zebadia. 
Ezra10:21 Omuri beene Harimu: Maaseya, Eliya, Shemaaya, Yehieli na Uziya." 
Ezra10:22 Omuri beene Pashihuuri: Elioenai, Maaseya, Ishimaeli, Netaneeli. Yozabaadi, na Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Omu Baleevi: Yozabaadi, Shimei, Kelaya (niwe Keliita), Pesahia, Yuda, na Eliezeeri." 
Ezra10:24 Omu beeshongozi, Eliashibu. Omu bakumiirizi, Shalumu, Telemu, na Uuri." 
Ezra10:25 Ab'omuri Israeli: omuri beene Paroshi, Ramia, Izia, Malukiya, Miyamiini, Eleazaari, Hashabia na Benaaya." 
Ezra10:26 Omuri beene Elamu: Matania, Zekaria, Yehieli, Abudi, Yeremoosi na Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Omuri beene Zaatu: Elio-enai, Eliashibu Matania, Yeremoosi, Zabadi na Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 Omuri beene Bebai: Yehohanani, Hanania, Zabai, na Asulai." 
Ezra10:29 Omuri beene Baani; Meshulaamu, Maluki, Adaya, Yashubu, Sheali na Yeremoosi." 
Ezra10:30 Omuri beene Pehasi-moabu: Aduna, Kelali, Benaaya, Maaseya, Matania, Bezaleeli, Binui, na Manaase." 
Ezra10:31 Omuri beene Harimu: Eliezeeri, Ishiya, Malukiya, Shemaaya, Shimeoni," 
Ezra10:32 Benyamiini, Maluki, na Shemaria." 
Ezra10:33 Omuri beene Hashumu: Metanai, Matasa, Zabadi, Elifeleti, Yeremai, Manaase, na Shimei." 
Ezra10:34 Omuri beene Baani: Maadai, Amuraamu, Ueli," 
Ezra10:35 Benaaya, Bedeya, Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vania, Meremoosi, Eliashibu," 
Ezra10:37 Matania, Matenai, na Yaasu." 
Ezra10:38 Omuri beene Binui: Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Shelemia, Nasani, Adaaya," 
Ezra10:40 Makundebai, Shashai, Sharai," 
Ezra10:41 Azareeli, Shelemia, Shemaria," 
Ezra10:42 Shalumu, Amaria na Yosefu." 
Ezra10:43 Omuri beene Neebo; Yeyeli, Matitia, Zabadi, Zebina, Yadai Yoeli na Benaaya." 
Ezra10:44 Abo boona bakaba bashweire abanyamahangakazi, baababinga n'abaana baabo." 
Nehemiah1:1 Ebigambo bya Nehemia, mwene Hakalia. Eizooba rimwe omu kwezi kwa Kisileevi omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri, nkaba ndi omu rurembo Suusa," 
Nehemiah1:2 Hanaani, omwe ahari beene waitu, yaija n'abashaija nibaruga Yuda; naababuuza eby'Abayudaaya, abaahonokire batatwarwe omu bukwatwa, n'ebya Yerusaalemu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Bangira bati: Abaahonokire batatwarwe omu bukwatwa, abari omuri eryo ishaza, bari omu busaasi bwingi, n'omu kuhemuka kuhango; orugo rw'amabaare orwa Yerusaalemu rusheenyirwe, n'amarembo gaayo gacwekyereziibwe n'omuriro." 
Nehemiah1:4 Ku naahuriire ebigambo ebyo, naashutama ahansi, naarira, naamara ebiro ninganya; naaguma niinyesiibyakwo, kandi ninshaba omu maisho ga Ruhanga w'eiguru." 
Nehemiah1:5 Naagira nti: Ai MUKAMA, Ruhanga w'eiguru, ori Ruhanga Nyamuhanga orikutiinwa, orinda endagaano kandi ogirira embabazi abakukunda, bakoorobera ebiragiro byawe," 
Nehemiah1:6 tega okutu, kandi oreebe n'amaisho, ohurire okushaba kw'omwiru waawe, oku ndikushaba omu maisho gaawe nyomushana na nyekiro ahabw'Abaisraeli abairu baawe, niinyatura ebibi byabo, ebi twakucumwireho. N'ekya buzima, nyowe n'enju ya tata tukacumura." 
Nehemiah1:7 Tukakora ebitahikire ahariiwe, titwayorobera biragiro, ebyatairweho n'eby'emigyenzo ebi waaragiire omugaragwa waawe Musa." 
Nehemiah1:8 Ijuka ekigambo eki waaragiire omugaragwa waawe ogwo, noogira oti: Ku muricumura, ndyabataataanisiza omu mahanga;" 
Nehemiah1:9 kwonka ku muringarukira, mwayorobera ebiragiro byangye, mwabikora, n'obu muriba mutaataanisiziibwe okwo hare aha muheru gw'ensi, ndyabateeranira hamwe, mbaiheyo, mbareete omu nsi ei naatooraine kugumyamu eiziina ryangye." 
Nehemiah1:10 N'abairu baawe, kandi abantu baawe, abu waacungwire n'amaani gaawe amaingi, kandi n'omukono gwawe ogw'amaani." 
Nehemiah1:11 Ai MUKAMA, tega okutu kwawe, ohurire okushaba kw'omwiru waawe, n'okw'abairu baawe, abashemerererwa okutiina eiziina ryawe; ohe omwiru waawe omugisha eri izooba, agirirwe embabazi omu maisho g'omushaija ogu. (Omu bunaku obwo nkaba ndi omuheereza wa viinyo y'omugabe.)" 
Nehemiah2:1 Omu kwezi kwa Nisani omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Aruta-gizakiseesi, eizooba rimwe viinyo ekaba eri omu maisho g'omugabe naagiihaho, naagimuha. Obundi bwona nkaba ntakaguubwaga nti kubi omu maisho ge." 
Nehemiah2:2 Omugabe yambuuza ati: Ahabw'enki nooreebeka ogwirwe kubi, haza otarwaire? Ekyo ti kindi, kureka n'obusaasi bw'aha mutima. Ku naakihuriire, naatiina munonga." 
Nehemiah2:3 Naagira omugabe nti: Karamaare, Nyakusinga! Ekyakunzibiire kuguubwa kubi niki, haza kunu orurembo orurimu ebituuro bya baatatenkuru, rwabaire amatongo, n'amarembo gaarwo gaacwekyereziibwe n'omuriro?" 
Nehemiah2:4 Bwanyima omugabe yangira ati: Mbwenu nooshaba ki? Ntyo naashaba Ruhanga w'eiguru. 
Nehemiah2:5 Bwanyima naagira omugabe nti: Nyakusinga omugabe, ku oraabe nookisiima, kandi nyowe omwiru waawe nyine obushongore omu maisho gaawe, nyohereza Yuda, omu rurembo rw'ebituuro bya baatatenkuru, ngarukye ndwombekye." 
Nehemiah2:6 Omugabe, omwigarire amushutami aha rubaju, yangira ati: Noija kumarayo mwanya ki, kandi oryagaruka ryari? Atyo omugabe yaasiima kuunyohereza; naanye naaragaana nawe obunaku." 
Nehemiah2:7 Bwanyima naagira omugabe nti: ku oraabe nookisiima, Nyakusinga, bampe amabaruha g'okutwarira abamashaza ba seeri y'Omugyera, baanyikirize kurabamu kuhika Yuda;" 
Nehemiah2:8 kandi mpeebwe n'ebaruha y'okutwarira Asafu, omurinzi w'ekibira ky'omugabe, abone kumpa emiti y'okwihamu enkingi z'amarembo g'ekigo kya hekalu, n'ey'orugo rw'orurembo, kandi n'ey'enju ei ndaataahemu. Omugabe yaanyikiriza ebi naashaba; ahakuba omukono gwa Ruhanga wangye omurungi gukaba gundiho." 
Nehemiah2:9 Bwanyima naaza aha bamashaza ba seeri y'Omugyera, naabaha amabaruha g'omugabe. Kandi omugabe akaba ayohereize abakuru b'engabo n'ab'aha mbaraasi kunshagara." 
Nehemiah2:10 Kwonka Sanibalati Omuhoroni na Tobia omuhuuku Omuamoni, ku baahuriire ngu hariho oizire kukorera Abaisraeli ebirungi, kyabagwisa kubi mononga." 
Nehemiah2:11 Ntyo naaza Yerusaalemu, naamarayo ebiro bishatu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Bwanyima naimuka nyekiro n'abantu bakye; kandi tinaagambira muntu weena eki Ruhanga wangye antaire aha mutima kukorera Yerusaalemu. Kandi nkaba ntaine ndiijo mbaraasi kureka ei naagyendeireho. 
Nehemiah2:13 Ekyo kiro naashohora, naaraba omu irembo ry'omu ruhanga, naahika aha iziba ry'Ekijoka, n'aha irembo ry'orubungo, naayetegyereza engo za Yerusaalemu, ezaabaire zisheenyukire, n'amarembo gaarwo agaabaire gacwekyereziibwe n'omuriro." 
Nehemiah2:14 Ntyo naagumizamu naahika aha irembo ry'enshuro, n'aha kiyanja ky'omugabe, kwonka naabura ah'okurabya embaraasi ei naabaire ntembire." 
Nehemiah2:15 Bwanyima ekyo kiro nainamuka orwo ruhanga, naayetegyereza orwo rugo; bwanyima naakuba, naaraba omu irembo ry'oruhanga, naagarukayo." 
Nehemiah2:16 Kandi abategyeki tibaamanya i naaba ngiire, nari eki naaba ninkora; kandi nkaba ntakagambiire Bayudaaya, abanyamurwa, abakungu, abatware, nari abandi abaabaire bari ab'okukora omurimo." 
Nehemiah2:17 Bwanyima naabagira nti: Nimureeba akabi aku turimu, Yerusaalemu oku ebaire amatongo, n'amarembo gaayo oku gahiire. Mwije twombekye orugo rwa Yerusaalemu, turekye kuguma nitushekyererwa." 
Nehemiah2:18 Kandi naabateekyerereza oku omukono gwa Ruhanga wangye gwambereire murungi, kandi n'ebi omugabe yangambiire. Baagira bati: Ka twimukye, twombekye. Batyo baayeteera ebinyomyo kukora omurimo ogwo omurungi." 
Nehemiah2:19 Kwonka Sanibalati Omuhoroni na Tobila omuhuuku Omuamoni, na Geshemu Omuharabu, ku baakihuriire, baatushekyerera, baatugaya nibagira bati: Mbwenu eki nimukora ki? Nimwenda kugomera omugabe?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Naanye naabagarukamu nti: Ruhanga w'eiguru naija kutuha omugisha, kandi itwe abairu be nitwija kwimuka, twombekye; kwonka imwe timwine mugabo, nari obushoboorozi, n'obu kyakuba ekiijutsyo omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Nehemiah3:1 Bwanyima Eliashibu omunyamurwa omukuru yaimuka na beene ishe abanyamurwa, baayombeka eirembo ry'entaama. Baarishoroora, baaritamu enyigi. Bwanyima baashoroora orugo okuhika aha munaara gwa Hamea, n'okuhika aha munaara gwa Hananeeli." 
Nehemiah3:2 Haakurataho aba Yeriko; nabo baakuratwa Zakuri mwene Imuri omu kwombeka. 
Nehemiah3:3 Batabani ba Hasena baayombeka eirembo ry'eby'enyanja; baabyara enkingi zaaryo, baatamu enyigi zaaryo, ebyoma bayryo by'okurikingisa, n'empimbi zaaryo." 
Nehemiah3:4 Baakuratwa Meremoosi mwene Uriya mwijukuru wa Hakozi, yaahunduuza; haataho Meshulaamu mwene Berekia, mwijukuru wa Meshezabeeli, yaahunduuza; haataho Zadoki mwene Baana, yaahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:5 Haataho aba Tekoa, baahunduuza; kwonka abakungu baabo tibarataire mutima ha murimo gwa mukama waabo." 
Nehemiah3:6 Yoyada mwene Pasea, na Meshulaamu mwene Besodeia baahunduuza eirembo erya ira; baabyara enkingi zaaryo, baatamu enyigi zaaryo, ebyoma byaryo by'okurikingisa, n'empimbi zaaryo." 
Nehemiah3:7 Haataho Melatia owa Gibeoni, yaahunduuza na Yadoni owa Meronoosi, abashaija ba Gibeoni na Mizipa, abaabaire bari omu butegyeki bw'omutegyeki w'ensi eya seeri y'Omugyera." 
Nehemiah3:8 Haataho Uzieli, mwene Haruhaaya, ow'omu baheesi b'ezaabu, yaahunduuza. Haataho Hanania, omwe aha barikujwanzya emigaju, yaahunduuza. Bo baagaruraho orugo rwa Yerusaalemu okuhika aha Rugo orugango." 
Nehemiah3:9 Haataho Refaaya mwene Huuri, omutegyeki w'ekicweka kya Yerusaalemu; yaahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:10 Haataho Yedaaya mwene Harumaafu, yaahunduuza ahashungaine n'enju ye; haataho Hatushi mwene Hashabuneia, yaahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malakiya mwene Harimu na Hashubu mwene Pahasi-moabu baahunduuza ekicweka ky'orugo, n'omunaara gw'amateekyero." 
Nehemiah3:12 Haataho Shalumu mwene Haloheeshi, omutegyeki w'ekicweka kya Yerusaalemu, yaahunduuza, we na bahara be." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuuni n'abatuuzi ba Zanoa baahunduuza eirembo ry'Oruhanga; baaryombeka, baatamu enyigi zaaryo, ebyoma byaryo ey'okurikingisa, n'empimbi zaaryo; kandi baahunduuza ekicweka ky'orugo kya mikono rukumi okuhika aha irembo ry'orubungo." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malakiya mwene Rekabu, omutware w'eishaza rya Besi-hakeremu, yaahunduuza eryo irembo ry'orubungo; yaaryombeka, yaatamu enyigi zaaryo, ebyoma byaryo eby'okurikingisa, n'empimbi zaaryo." 
Nehemiah3:15 Shalumu mwene Koluhoze, omutware w'eishaza rya Mizipa, yaahunduuza eirembo ry'enshuro; yaaryombeka, yaarishweka, yaatamu enyigi zaaryo, ebyoma byaryo eby'okurikingisa, n'empimbi zaaryo; kandi yaayombeka orugo rw'ekiyanja kya Sheela, ekyabaire kiri omu musiri gw'omugabe, okuhika aha matembero, agarikushuuma nigaruga omu rurembo rwa Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Haataho Nehemia mwene Azubuuki, omutware w'ekicweka ky'eishaza rya Besi-zuuri, yaahunduuza okuhika aharikureebana n'ebituuro bya Daudi, aha biyanja ebi baatibire, n'aha nju y'amamanzi." 
Nehemiah3:17 Yaakuratwa Abaleevi; Rehumu mwene Baani, haataho Hashabia, omutware w'ekicweka ky'eishaza rya Keila, yaahunduuza ahabw'eishaza rye." 
Nehemiah3:18 Haataho beene waabo, baahunduuza; Bavai mwene Henadaadi omutware w'ekicweka ky'eishaza rya Keila;" 
Nehemiah3:19 haataho Ezeri mwene Yehsua, omutware wa Mizipa, yaahunduuza ekindi kicweka, ekirikureebana n'ah'orikwinamukira nooza omu ibiikiro ry'eby'okurwanisa aha Keekubo." 
Nehemiah3:20 Haataho Baruki mwene Zabai, yaahunduuza ekindi kicweka, okwiha aha Keekubo okuhika aha rwigi rw'enju ya Eliashibu omunyamurwa omukuru." 
Nehemiah3:21 Haataho Meremoosi mwene Uriya, mwijukuru wa Hakozi, yaahunduuza ekindi kicweka, okwiha ahari orwo rwigi okuhika aha muheru gw'egyo nju." 
Nehemiah3:22 Yaakuratwa abanyamurwa, ab'omu ruhita, baahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:23 Haataho Benyamiini na Hashubu, baahunduuza ahashungaine n'enju yaabo. Haataho Azaria mwene Maaseya, mwijukuru wa Anania, yaahunduuza aha rubaju rw'enju ye." 
Nehemiah3:24 Yaakuratwa Benui, mwene Henadaadi, yaahunduuza ekindi kicweka, okuruga aha nju ya Azaria okuhika aha Keekubo." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palali mwene Uzai yaahunduuza aharikureebana n'Akeekubo, n'aha munaara ogukwataine n'enju y'omugabe ey'aharuguru, omu kibuga ky'abarinzi." 
Nehemiah3:26 Yaakuratwa Pedaya mwene Paroshi n'abaheereza b'omuri hekalu, abaabaire batwire Ofeli, baahunduuza okuhika ahashungaine n'eirembo ry'amaizi aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, n'omunaara ogukwataine n'orwo rugo." 
Nehemiah3:27 Haataho aba Tekoa, baahunduuza ekindi kicweka ekirikureebana n'omunaara muhango ogukwataine n'orwo rugo, okuhika aha rugo rwa Ofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Aharuguru y'eirembo ry'embaraasi abanyamurwa baahahunduuza, buri omwe yaahunduuza ahashungaine n'enju ye." 
Nehemiah3:29 Baakuratwa Zadoki mwene Imeri; yaahunduuza aharikureebana n'enju ye. Haataho Shemaaya, mwene Shekania, omurinzi w'eirembo ry'oburugwa-izooba, nawe yaahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:30 Haataho Hanania mwene Shelemia, na Hanuni mutabani wa Zalafu owa mukaaga, baahunduuza ekindi kicweka. Haataho Meshulaamu mwene Berekia, yaahunduuza ahashungaine n'ekishengye kye." 
Nehemiah3:31 Yaakuratwa Malukiya, omwe aha baheesi b'ezaabu; yaahunduuza okuhika aha nju y'abaheereza by'omuri hekalu, n'ey'abashuubuzi, aharikureebana n'eirembo ry'eiteeraniro, n'okuhika aha kishengye kya ruguru eky'aha Keekubo." 
Nehemiah3:32 Kandi abaheesi b'ezaabu n'abashubuuzi baahunduuza ahagati y'ekyo kishengye ekya ruguru eky'aha keekubo n'eirembo ry'entaama. 
Nehemiah4:1 Sanibalati ku yaahuriire ngu nitwombeka orugo rw'amabaare, yaaguubwa kubi, yaagira ekiniga kingi, yaateerera Abayudaaya enaku." 
Nehemiah4:2 Yaagambira omu maisho ga beene ishe, n'omu maisho g'eihe rya Samaria, ati: Ziriya ntakimazire z'Abayudaaya nizikora ki? Nibenda kweyombekyera ekigo? Nibenda kutamba ebitambo? nibenda kwombeka ngu baherezeho? Nibabaasa kutabuura emabaare omu mituumo y'ebyasheenyukire, haza gaabaire gaahiire?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Reero Tobia, owaabaire amuri aha rubaju, nawe yaagira ati: N'ekya buzima! Orwo rugo rwabo rw'amabaare, oru barikwombeka, muha ku ekurwemereraho, ekaarubandika ahansi." 
Nehemiah4:4 Ntyo naashaba ningira nti: Ai Ruhanga waitu, hurira; ahabw'okuba tugayirwe. Ebijumo ebi batujumire, obibagarureho, kandi obaheyo, batwarwe omu ndiijo nsi bari enkwatwa, banyagirweyo." 
Nehemiah4:5 Otashwekyerera orubanja rwabo, kandi n'ekibi kyabo kitaragazibwa omu maisho gaawe; ahakuba bakugwisiize kubi omu maisho g'abombeki." 
Nehemiah4:6 Tutyo twayombeka orugo, twaruteerana rwona, rwahika rwagati; ahabw'okuba abantu bakeezirika baakora." 
Nehemiah4:7 Kwonka Sanibalati na Tobia n'Abaharabu n'Abaamoni n'aba Ashidoodi ku baahuriire ngu omurimo gw'okuhunduuza engo za Yerusaalemu nigugyenda omumaisho, kandi ngu ahaasheenyukire hatandikire kuteeranwa, baagira ekiniga kingi;" 
Nehemiah4:8 boona baagira enaama y'okuza kurwanisa Yerusaalemu, n'okugirabanisamu." 
Nehemiah4:9 Kwonka itwe twashaba Ruhanga waitu, twataho abarinzi b'okurinda nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Nehemiah4:10 Bwanyima Abayuda baagira bati: Abarikwekorera baahwa amaani, kandi ebisheenyuka bikiri bingi; n'ahabw'ekyo titurikubaasa kwombeka rugo." 
Nehemiah4:11 Abazigu baitu baagira bati: Tibarikwija kukimanya, n'obu kwakuba okutureeba, okuhitsya obu turaabahikye ahagati, tukabaita, tukabazibira kukora." 
Nehemiah4:12 Abayudaaya abaabaire batwire n'abo bazigu baitu ku baizire, baaguma nibatugambira, nangwa baahitsya emirundi ikumi, nibagira ngu abo bazigu nibaija kuruga hoona-hoona ahu batwire, batuteere." 
Nehemiah4:13 Nikyo naateereire abantu omu buhanga enyima y'orugo, n'aha mitwe y'obubungo, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri, baine zaarurara n'amacumu n'amata." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ku naayetegyereize, naimuka, naagambira abakungu n'abatware n'abandi boona nti: Mutabatiina. Mwijukye Mukama, omukuru kandi orikutiinisa, murwanirire beene waanyu, batabani baanyu, bahara baanyu, abakazi baanyu n'amaka gaanyu." 
Nehemiah4:15 Abazigu baitu ku baahuriire ngu tukimanyire, kandi ngu Ruhanga acwire busha enaama yaabo, twena twagaruka aha rugo, buri muntu aha murimo gwe." 
Nehemiah4:16 Okuruga ahari eryo izooba, ekicweka kime kya kabiri ky'abashaija bangye kyaguma aha murimo gw'okwombeka, kimwe kya kabiri ekindi kyakwata amacumu, engabo, amata n'ebijwaro by'ebyoma eby'okurwanisa; kandi abeebembezi baayemerera enyima y'ab'enju ya Yuda boona." 
Nehemiah4:17 Abaabaire nibombeka orugo, n'abaabaire nibeekorera ebintu, buri muntu akaba akoresa omukono gumwe, ogundi guguma gukwaitse eby'okurwanisa." 
Nehemiah4:18 Buri mwombeki weena akaba ayombeka, ahagatiire rurara ye; kandi ow'okuteera eikondere anguma aha rubaju." 
Nehemiah4:19 Kandi naagmbira abakungu n'abatware n'abandi boona nti: Omurimo ni muhango, guhikire hare, kandi itwe twenaganagire aha rugo, buri muntu ari hare na mugyenzi we." 
Nehemiah4:20 Ei muraahurire eiraka ry'enzamba yoona, mube niyo mwairukira, mutushangye. Ruhanga waitu naija kuturwanirira." 
Nehemiah4:21 Okwo nikwo twabaire tukora omurimo, ekicweka kyabo kimwe kikwata amacumu, okwiha omu kasheeshe nibutaagurikana okuhitsya omu mwabazyo, ahu enyonyoozi zireebekyera." 
Nehemiah4:22 Omuri obwo bunaku naagaruka naagmbira abantu nti: Buri muntu n'omuhuuku we bagume baraare omuri Yerusaalemu, babone kuturinda nyekiro, n'okukora nyomushana." 
Nehemiah4:23 N'ahabw'ekyo tihariho n'omwe omuriitwe owaabaire ajuura ebijwaro bye, yaaba nyowe, nari beene tata, nari abashaija bangye, n'obu baakuba abarinzi abaabaire bangyenda enyima; buri muntu akaba aza kutaha amaizi, aine eky'okurwanisa kye omu ngaro." 
Nehemiah5:1 Bwanyima bamwe aha Bayudaaya n'abakazi baabo baayetomboitera beene waabo Abayudaaya; 
Nehemiah5:2 ahakuba abamwe bakagira bati: Itwe na batabani baitu na bahara baitu turi baingi; ka tuze kushaka eby'okututunga. 
Nehemiah5:3 Kandi abandi baagira bati: Nitukwatiriza emisiri yaitu, n'emizaabibu yaitu, n'amaju gaitu, ahabw'enjara, ngu tubone eby'okurya." 
Nehemiah5:4 N'abandi baagira bati: Tugurize empiiha, twakwatiriza emisiri yaitu n'emizaabibu yaitu kuha omushoro gw'omugabe." 
Nehemiah5:5 Haza itwe na beene waitu turi omubiri gumwe, n'abaana baitu nikyo kimwe n'abaabo; mbwenu batabani baitu na bahara baitu nitubagyema kuba abahuuku n'abazaana; nangwa n'abamwe ahari bahara baitu babeereire kimwe abazaana, kandi titwine ky'okukora, ngu tubacungure, ahabw'okuba emisiri yaitu n'emizaabibu yaitu biinwe abandi." 
Nehemiah5:6 Ku naahuriire okwetomboita kwabo n'ebigambo ebyo, naagira ekiniga kingi munonga." 
Nehemiah5:7 Naagira enaama n'omutima gwangye, bwanyima naatonganisa abakungu n'abatware, naabagira nti: Nimwiha hari beene waanyu ekiteebwamu, buri muntu ahari mwene waabo." 
Nehemiah5:8 Naateerana omutwe gw'abantu baingi kukibeemeza, naabagira nti: Itwe tukakora eki turikubaasa, twacungura beene waitu Abayudaaya, abaabaire baguzirwe abanyamahanga; mbwenu imwe nimwenda kutunda beene waanyu; nimugira ngu, kihikire itwe kubagura? Baahunama, baabura eky'okugarukamu." 
Nehemiah5:9 Naagaruka naagira nti: Eki murikukora ti kirungi. Ekirungi t'okugyendera omu kutiina Ruhanga waitu, mukareka kwejumisa omu banyamahanga abazigu baitu?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Kandi nyowe na beene waitu n'abashaija bangye nitubaguza empiiha n'eby'okurya; kwonka ka turekye kubashaba ekiteebwamu. 
Nehemiah5:11 Na mbwenu eri izooba mubagarurire emisiri yaabo, emizaabibu yaabo, emizeituuni yaabo, n'amaju gaabo, kandi tubagarurire na kimwe kya igana eky'empiiha, engano, viinyo n'eky'amajuta, ebi mubaire nimubahaisa." 
Nehemiah5:12 Baagarukamu nibagira bati: Twaza kubibagarurira, kandi titurikwija kugira ki twabahaisa. Nitwija kukora nk'oku waagamba. Ntyo naayeta abanyamurwa, naabarahiriza omu maisho g'abo bantu kuguma nibakora nk'oku baarahira." 
Nehemiah5:13 Kandi naakunkumura omunagiro ogu naabaire nnagiire, naagira nti: Omuntu weena, oraabe atahikiriize egi ndagaano, Ruhanga amukunkumure atyo, amwihe omu nju ye n'omu murimo gwe. Abe nikwo yaakunkumurwa atyo, akahwaho. Omutwe gw'abantu abaabaire bateeraine baagira bati: Amiina, baahimbisa MUKAMA. Bwanyima abantu baakora nk'oku baaraganisa." 
Nehemiah5:14 Kandi okuruga omu bunaku obu naatandikiiremu kuba omutegyeki w'abantu omuri Yuda, okwiha aha mwaka gwa makumi abiri okuhitsya aha gwa makumi ashatu n'ebiri ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Aruta-gizakiseesi, omuri egyo myaka ikumi n'ebiri, nyowe na gbeene tata titurariire ha by'okurya by'emitoijo y'obutegyeki." 
Nehemiah5:15 Kwonka abategyeki abambandiize bakaita kubi abantu, nibabatoijesa eby'okurya na viinyo, otabariireho shekeli z'efeeza makumi ana. Nangwa n'abagaragwa baabo bakaba batwaza abantu eikama. Kwonka nyowe tindatwarize ntyo ahabw'okutiina Ruhanga." 
Nehemiah5:16 Kureka nkaba nyezirika kukora hari orwo rugo, kandi tihariho itaka ryona eri naatwaire; n'abashaija bangye boona bakaba bateeranirayo, bareetsirwe ogwo murimo." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kandi aha meeza yangye hakaba hariiraho abashaija igana na makumi ataano, Abayudaaya n'abatware, otabariireho abaabaire baija ahariitwe, nibaruga omu mahanga agatwehinguririize." 
Nehemiah5:18 Ebago y'eizooba rimwe ekaba eba ente emwe, n'entaama mukaaga ezitoorainwe; banteekyera n'enkoko, kandi buri biro ikumi efurebe za viinyo y'emiringo mingi; kwonka ebyo byona nkaba ntabitoijesa bantu nk'omutegyeki; ahabw'okuba obuhuuku bukaba bubaruhize." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ai Ruhanga wangye, oijukye ebi naakoreire aba bantu byona, onzimuurire ebirungi." 
Nehemiah6:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, baagambira Sanibalati na Tobia na Geshemu Omuharabu n'abandi bazigu baitu, ku nyombekire orugo, kandi ku hatakiriho hasheenyukire, (n'obu ndaabe naabaire ntakataire nyigi mu marembo.)" 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanibalati na Geshemu, ku baakihuriire bantumaho nigabira bati: Ija tubugaabuganire omu kirorero kimwe omu ruhita rwa Ono. Kwonka bakaba nibenda kuunyita." 
Nehemiah6:3 Naanye nikwo kubatumaho entumwa, nkabagira nti: Ndi aha murimo muhango; tindikubaasa kushuuma okwo. Mbwenu omurimo gwemerere ngu nyizire okwo?" 
Nehemiah6:4 Bantumaho batyo kana, naanye nimbagarukamu ntyo." 
Nehemiah6:5 Bwanyima Sanibalati yaagaruka yantumaho omuheereza we omurundi gwa kataano omu muringo ogwo, aine ebaruha eshashaanire omu ngaro ze." 
Nehemiah6:6 Egyo baruha ekaba ehandiikirwemu ebigambo ebirikugira biti: Nikigambwa omu mahanga, kandi na Geshemu naakigamba, ngu iwe n'Abayudaaya nimwenda kugoma; ngu nikyo murikwobekyera orugo; kandi ngu, nooyenda kuba omugabe waabo, nk'oku kirikugambwa." 
Nehemiah6:7 Kandi ngu, otaireho na baanabi b'okubuzya ebyawe omuri Yerusaalemu, ngu, Omuri Yuda harimu omugabe. Mbenu oije tuhanuure, ahabw'okuba ebyo bigambo tibiribura kugambirwa mugabe." 
Nehemiah6:8 Naanye naamutumaho, nimmugira nti: Ebyo ebi waagamba tibikabahoga; kureka niiwe waabyegunzira omu mutima gwawe." 
Nehemiah6:9 Boona bakaba nibagira batyo, ngu batutiinise, nibateekateeka ngu emikono yaitu neija kutentebuka, omurimo nigureka kukorwa. Kwonak ai Ruhanga, gumya emikono yangye." 
Nehemiah6:10 Bwanyima naaza owa Shemaaya mwene Delaaya, mwijukuru wa Mehetabeeli, owaabaire akomirwe; yangira ati: Ija tubugaabuganire omu nju ya Ruhanga omuri hekalu, tukingye enyigi zaayo; ahabw'okuba nibaija kukwita, eego, nibaija kukwita nyekiro." 
Nehemiah6:11 Naamugarukamu nti: Omushaija nkaanye nimbaasa kuhunga? ni mushaija ki nkaanye orikubaasa kuhungira omuri hekalu, ngu akire? Tindikuzamu." 
Nehemiah6:12 Ku naayetegyereize, naamanya ku atatumirwe Ruhanga, kureka ku yandaguraho atyo, ahabw'okuguriirirwa Tobia na Sanibalati." 
Nehemiah6:13 Eki baamuguriririire, bakenda ngu antiinise, haza naanye nkore ntyo, nshiishe, ekiraarugyemu bangambeho kubi, banshekyerere." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ai Ruhanga wangye, ijuka Tobia na Sanibalati, n'ebyo byona ebi barikukora, oijukye na nabikazi Noadia, na baanabi abandi boona, ababaire nibenda kuntiinisa." 
Nehemiah6:15 Rutyo orugo rwahwa aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bitaano ky'okwezi Eluli omu biro makumi ataano na bibiri. 
Nehemiah6:16 Bwanyima abazigu baitu boona ku baakihuriire, n'amahanga goona agatwehinguririize gaakireeba, baatiina, baahwera kimwe eishaija, ahabw'okuba bakareeba ngu ogwo murimo gukozirwe ahabw'okuhwerwa Ruhanga waitu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Kandi omu biro ebyo abakungu b'Abayudaaya bakatwekyera Tobia ebaruha nyingi, n'eza Tobia zaabahikaho." 
Nehemiah6:18 Ahabw'eokuba baingi omuri Yuda bakaragaana nawe endagaano ahabw'okuba mukwe wa Shekania mwene Aara, kandi n'omutabani Yehohanani akaba ashweire muhara wa Meshulaamu mwene Berekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Kandi baagambira omu maisho gangye ebirungi ebi akora, baagaruka baamugambira n'ebigambo byangye. Atyo Tobia yaaguma nantwekyera ebaruha z'okuntiinisa." 
Nehemiah7:1 Bwanyima orugo ku rwahweire, naaheza kutaho enyigi, n'okutaho abakumiirizi, abeeshongozi n'Abaleevi," 
Nehemiah7:2 naaha mwene tata Hanani na Hanania omukuru w'ekigo obukuru bw'okutegyeka Yerusaalemu, ahabw'okuba akaba ari omuntu orikwesigwa kandi orikutiina Ruhanga okukira abandi baingi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Bwanyima naabagira nti: Enyigi za Yerusaalemu zigume zirekye kwigurwa, omushana gutakajwire; bagume bazikingye, abarizi bakyemereireho, baziteho empimbi; kandi mugum muteho abarinzi b'omu bantu ba Yerusaalemu, buri muntu mumute omu mwanya gwe, aharikureebana n'enju ye." 
Nehemiah7:4 Orurembo rukaba ruri ruhango kandi rugarami, kwonka abantu baamwo bakaba bari bakye, n'amaju gaarwo gatakombekirwe." 
Nehemiah7:5 Bwanyima Ruhanga wangye yantamu ekiteekateeko ky'okuteerana abakungu n'abategyeki n'abanei bantu, ngu babarwe nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwabo oku kwabairie kuri. Naazoora ekitambo ekirimu abaabandize kwija, nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro oku kwabaire kuri; kandi naashanga kihandiikirwemu kiti:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Aba nibo bantu b'eryo ihanga abaarugire omu bantu, abu Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaatwaire bari enkwatwa, bakagaruka Yerusaalemu na Yuda, buri muntu omu rurembo rwabo." 
Nehemiah7:7 Bakaija na Zerubabeeli, Yehsua, Nehemia, Azaria, Raamia, Nahamaani, Morodekai, Bilushaani, Biguvai, Nehumu na Baana. Omubaro gw'abashaija b'Abaisraeli nigwo ogu:" 
Nehemiah7:8 beene Paroshi enkumi ibiri na igana na makumi mushanju na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:9 Beene Shefatia, magana mushanju na makumi mushanju na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:10 Beene Aara, magana mukaaga na makumi ataano na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:11 Beene Pehasi-moabu, nibo beene Yeshua na Yoabu, enkumi ibiri na magana munaana na ikumi na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:12 Beene Elamu, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ataano na bana." 
Nehemiah7:13 Beene Zaatu, magana munaana na makumi ana na bataano." 
Nehemiah7:14 Beene Zekai, magana mushanju na makumi mukaaga." 
Nehemiah7:15 Beene Binui, magana mukaaga na makumi ana na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:16 Beene Bebai, magana mukaaga na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:17 Beene Azigaadi, enkumi ibiri na magana ashatu na makumi abiri na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:18 Beene Adoni-kaamu, magana mukaaga na makumi mukaaga na mushanju." 
Nehemiah7:19 Beene Viguvai, enkumi ibiri na makumi mukaaga na mushanju." 
Nehemiah7:20 Beene Adini, magana mukaaga na makumi ataano na bataano." 
Nehemiah7:21 Beene Ateeri, nibo ba Hezekia, makumi mwenda na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:22 Beene Hashumu, magana ashatu na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:23 Beene Bezai, magana ashatu na makumi abiri na bana." 
Nehemiah7:24 Beene Harifu, igana na ikumi na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:25 Beene Gibeoni, makumi mwenda na bataano." 
Nehemiah7:26 Abashaija ba Betelehemu na Netofa, igana na makumi munaana na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:27 Abashaija ba Anatoosi, igana na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:28 Abashaija ba Besi-azimaveesi, makumi ana na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:29 Abashaija ba Kirayasi-yarimu, Kefira na Beeroosi, magana mushanju na makumi ana na bashatu." 
Nehemiah7:30 Abashaija ba Raama na Geeba, magana mukaaga na makumi abiri n'omwe." 
Nehemiah7:31 Beene Mikimaasi, igana na makumi abiri na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:32 Abashaija ba Beseeli na Ai, igana na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Nehemiah7:33 Abashaija ba Neebo endiijo, makumi ataano na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:34 Beene Elaamu ondiijo, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ataano na bana." 
Nehemiah7:35 Beene Harimu, magana ashatu na makumi abiri." 
Nehemiah7:36 Beene Yeriko magana ashatu na makumi ana na bataano. 
Nehemiah7:37 Beene Loodi, Hadidi na Ono, magana mushanju na makumi abiri n'omwe." 
Nehemiah7:38 Beene Senaha, enkumi ishatu na magana mwenda na makumi ashatu." 
Nehemiah7:39 Abanyamurwa n'aba: beene Yedaaya ab'omu nju ya Yeshua, magana mwenda na makumi mushanju na bashatu." 
Nehemiah7:40 Beene Imeri, rukumi na magana ataano na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:41 Beene Pashihuuri, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ana na mushanju." 
Nehemiah7:42 Beene Harimu, rukumi na ikumi na mushanju." 
Nehemiah7:43 Abaleevi n'aba: beene Yeshua ba Kadimieli ow'omuri beene Hodeva, makumi mushanju na bana." 
Nehemiah7:44 Abeeshongozi beene Asafu, igana na makumi ana na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:45 Abakumiirizi: beene Shalumu, beene Ateeri, beene Talumooni, beene Akubu, beene Hatita na beene Shobai, igana na makumi ashatu na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:46 Abaheereza b'omuri hekalu bakaba bari aba: beene Ziiha, beene Hasufa, beene Tabaosi," 
Nehemiah7:47 beene Kerosi, beene Siaha, beene Padoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 beene Lebana, beene Hagaba, beene Shalumai," 
Nehemiah7:49 beene Hanani, beene Gideli, beene Gahaari," 
Nehemiah7:50 beene Reaya, beene Rezini, beene Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 beene Gazamu, beene Uzza, beene Pasea," 
Nehemiah7:52 beene Besai, beene Meunimu, beene Nefushesimu," 
Nehemiah7:53 beene Bakibuki, beene Hakufa, beene Harihuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 beene Baziluusi, beene Mehida, beene Harisha," 
Nehemiah7:55 beene Barikoosi, beene Sisera, beene Teema," 
Nehemiah7:56 beene Nezia, na beene Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Batabani b'abagaragwa ba Sulemaani: beene Sotai, beene Soferesi, beene Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 beene Yaala, beene Darikoni, beene Gideli," 
Nehemiah7:59 beene Shefatia, beene Hatili, beene Pokeresi-hazebaimu, na beene Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Abaheereza b'omuri hekalu boona na batabani b'abagaragwa ba Sulemaani bakaba bari magana ashatu na makumi mwenda na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:61 Kandi aba nibo baarugire Telimeela, Teliharasha, Kerubu, Adoni na Imeri, kwonak tibarabaasize kworeka maju ga baishenkurubo, nari obukomooko bwabo, kuhamya ku bari Abaisraeli buzima;" 
Nehemiah7:62 beene Delaaya, beene Tobia, na beene Nekoda, magana mukaaga na makumi ana na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:63 Kandi ab'omu banyamurwa; beene Hobaaya, beene Hakozi, na beene Baruzilai, owaashweire omukazi ow'omuri bahara ba Baruzilai owa Gileadi, akeetererwa eiziina ryabo." 
Nehemiah7:64 Abo bakasheura amaziina gaabo omu baahandiikirwe nk'okukuratana kw'oruzaaro rwa baishenkurubo oku kwabaire kuri, kwonka tigaareebgekamu; nikyo baateekateekyeirwe kuba abatashemeire, bakazibirwa kukora omurimo gw'obunyamurwa;" 
Nehemiah7:65 omutegyeki omukuru yaabaragiira ngu barekye kurya aha by'okurya ebirikwera, okuhitsya obu haribaho omunyamurwa oine Urimu na Tumimu." 
Nehemiah7:66 Omutwe gw'abo bantu boona gukaba guri obukumi buna n'enkumi ibiri na magana ashatu na makumi mukaaga," 
Nehemiah7:67 otabariiremu abahuuku baabo n'abazaana baabo, abu omubaro gwabo gwabaire guri enkumi mushanju na magana ashatu na makumi ashatu na mushanju; kandi bakaba baine abeeshongozi, abashaija n'abakazi, magana abiri na makumi ana na bataano." 
Nehemiah7:68 Embaraasi zaabo zikaba ziri magana mushanju na makumi ashatu na mukaaga, enyumbu magana abiri na makumi ana na itaano," 
Nehemiah7:69 engamira magana ana na makumi ashatu na itaano, n'endogoya enkumi mukaaga na magana mushanju na makumi abiri." 
Nehemiah7:70 Kandi bamwe ab'omu bakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo baahayo eby'okuhwera omurimo. Omutegyeki yaata omu ibiikiro dariki z'ezaabu rukumi, enyabya makumi ataano, n'ebijwaro by'abanyamurwa magana ataano na makumi ashatu." 
Nehemiah7:71 N'abamwe ab'omu bakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo baata omu ibiikiro ry'empiiha z'omurimo dariki z'ezaabu obukumi bubiri, na miina z'efeeza enkumi ibiri na magana abiri." 
Nehemiah7:72 Ebi abandi bantu baahaireyo bikaba biri dariki z'ezaabu obukumi bubiri, miina z'efeeza enkumi ibiri, n'ebijwaro by'abanyamurwa makumi mukaaga na mushanju." 
Nehemiah7:73 Batyo abanyamurwa, Abaleevi, abakumirizi, abeeshongozi, abamwe omu bantu, abaheerea b'omuri hekalu, n'Abaisraeli boona, baatuura omu ndembo zaabo. Okwezi kwa mushanju ku kwahikire, Abaisraeli baashangwa batwire omu ndembo zaabo." 
Nehemiah8:1 Bwanyima abantu baateeranira hamwe nk'omuntu omwe omu kubuga ekiri omu maisho g'eirembo ry'Amaizi, baagambira Ezera omuhandiiki kureeta ekitabo ky'Ebiragiro bya Musa, ebi Ruhanga yaahaire Abaisraeli." 
Nehemiah8:2 Aha kiro ky'okubanza ky'okwezi kwa mushanju Ezera omunyamurwa yaareeta ekyo kitabo ky'Ebiragiro omu maisho g'omutwe gw'abashaija n'abakazi, boona abaabaire nibabaasa kuhurira, bakeetegyereza." 
Nehemiah8:3 Yaashoma ebirimu, ayorekyeire ekibuga ekiri omu maisho g'eirembo ry'Amaizi, okwiha omu kasheeshe kare okuhitsya omu ihangwe, abashaija n'abakazi n'abandi abrikubaasa kwetegyereza bariho; kandi abantu boona baatega amatu kuhurira eby'omuri ekyo kitabo ky'Ebiragiro." 
Nehemiah8:4 Kandi Ezera omuhandiiki yaayemerera aha kituuti ky'embaaho, eki baabaire bakozire ahabw'ogwo murimo; aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo haayemereraho Matisia, Sheema, Anaya, Uriya, Hilukia na Maaseya; n'aha rwa bumosho, Pedaaya, Mishaeli, Malikiya, Hashumu, Hashibadana, Zekaria na Meshulaamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Atyo Ezera yaashuuruurira ekitabo omu maisho g'abantu boona, ahakuba akaba ari ahatunguukire naabeeshumba; ku yaakishuurwire, abantu boona baayemerera." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezera yaasiima MUKAMA Ruhanga omukuru, n'abantu boona baikiriza nibaimutsya emikono yaabo, nibagira bati: Amiina, Amiina; bainika emitwe yaabo, baaramya MUKAMA bajuumaire ahansi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Kandi Yeshua, Baani, Sherebia, Yamiina, Akubu, Shabetai, Hodia, Maaseya, Kelita, Azaria, Yozabaadi, Hanani, Pelaaya, Abaleevi, baahwera abantu kwetegyereza Ebiragiro; obwo abantu boona bari omu myanya yaabo." 
Nehemiah8:8 Baashoma omu kitabo ky'Ebiragiro bya Ruhanga omu iraka eririkuhurirwa gye, baabishoboorora; n'ahabw'ekyo abantu baayetegyereza ebyashomwa." 
Nehemiah8:9 Kandi Nehemia, owaabaire ari omutegyeki, na Ezera omunyamurwa kandi omuhandiiki, n'Abaleevi abaabaire nibeegyesa abantu, baagambira abantu boona bati: Eizooba eri n'eririkwera ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu; murekye kuganya, nari kurira. Ahabw'okuba abantu boona ku baahuriire ebigambo by'Ebiragiro, baarira." 
Nehemiah8:10 Bwanyima yaabagira ati: Mwirooko murye ez'ebishaju, munywe ebirikunuriirira, mutwekyere abataine obabisiire egabo; ahakuba eri izooba n'eryereziibwe Mukama waitu; kandi murekye kushaasha, ahabw'eokuba okushemerererwa omuri MUKAMA nigo maani gaanyu." 
Nehemiah8:11 Batyo Abaalevi baahunamya abantu boona nibagira bati: Mucureere, ahakuba eizooba eri n'eririkwera; murekye kushaasha." 
Nehemiah8:12 Bwanyima abantu boona baayaabuuka, baaza kurya n'okunywa kandi n'okutwekyera bagyenzi baabo egabo, n'okushemererwa munonga, ahabw'okushoborokyerwa ebigambo ebi baagambirwa." 
Nehemiah8:13 Aha kiro kya kabiri abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkuru ab'eihanga ryona, hamwe n'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, baateeranira ahari Ezera omuhandiiki kuhurira ebigambo by'omu Biragiro." 
Nehemiah8:14 Baashanga bihandiikirwe omu Biragiro, ebi MUKAMA yaaragiire naaraba omuri Musa, ngu Abaisraeli baryaguma nibaraara omu nsiisira omu bugyenyi bw'okwezi kwa mushanju," 
Nehemiah8:15 kandi baryaguma babirangye, babibuzye omu ndembo zaabo zoona n'omuri Yerusaalemu, nibagira bati: Mwirooko muze omu bibungo, mureete amataagi g'emizeituuni, n'ag'emizeituuni ey'omu ishwa, n'ag'emikadasi, n'ag'emikindo, n'ag'ebiti by'amababi gashakambire, mukore ensiisira, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe." 
Nehemiah8:16 Batyo abantu baagyenda, baareeta amataagi, baayeyombekyera ensiisira, buri muntu aha mutwe gw'enju ye, n'omu bibuga byabo, n'omu bikaari by'enju ya Ruhanga, n'omu kibuga ky'aha Irembo ry'Amaizi, kandi n'omu kibuga ky'aha irembo rya Efuraimu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Omutwe gwona ogw'abaarugire omu bukwatwa baayombeka ensiisira, baaziraaramu; ahakub aokwiha omu biro bya Yoshua mwene Nuuni okuhitsya ahari eryo izooba Abaisraeli bakaba batakakitwazaga batyo. Haabaho okushemererwa kwingi munonga." 
Nehemiah8:18 Kandi okwiha aha kiro ky'okubanza okuhitsya aha ky'aha muheru, Ezera akaba ashoma ekitabo ky'Ebiragiro bya Ruhanga buri izooba. Batyo baamara ebiro mushanju omuri obwo bugyenyi; aha kya munaana haabaho okuteerana okurikwera, nk'oku ekiragiro kyabaire kiri." 
Nehemiah9:1 Bwanyima aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina ky'okwo kwezi Abaisraeli baateerana, baayesiibyakwo bajwaire ebiguniya, beeshukyeire eiju omu mutwe." 
Nehemiah9:2 Kandi Abaisraeli baayetaanisa n'abanyamahanga boona, baayemerera, baayatura ebibi byabo, n'eby'okushisha bya baishenkurubo." 
Nehemiah9:3 Baayemerera omu mwanya gwabo, baamara ekicweka kimwe kya kana ky'eizooba nibasho ekitabo ky'Ebiragiro bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo; kandi ekindi kicweka kimwe kya kana baakimara nibaatura ebibi byabo, nibaramya MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Bwanyima Yeshua, Baani, Kadimieli, Sebania, Buuni, Sherebia, Baani na Kenani, baayemerera aha matembero g'Abaleevi, baatakira MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo n'eiraka rihango." 
Nehemiah9:5 Bwanyima Abaleevi, Yeshua, Kadimieli, Baani, Hashabuneya, Sherebia, Hodia, Shebania na Pesahia, baagira bati: Mwimukye, musiime MUKAMA, oba Ruhanga waanyu okwiha ira ryona okuhitsya ebiro byona, nimugira muti: Eiziina ryawe ery'ekitiinisa, eririkukira okusiimwa kwona n'okusingizibwa kwona, rihimbisibwe." 
Nehemiah9:6 Kandi Ezera yaagira ati: niiwe MUKAMA, niiwe wenka, owaahangire eiguru n'eiguru eririkweshumba agandi, n'eihe ryaryo ryona, ensi n'ebigirimu byona, n'amayanja n'ebigarimu byona; kandi niiwe obibaisaho byona; n'amahe g'omu iguru goona gakuramya." 
Nehemiah9:7 Niiwe MUKAMA, Ruhanga owaatooraine Abramu, okamwiha omuri Uuri ey'Abakaludaaya, okamweta eiziina Abrahamu;" 
Nehemiah9:8 okashanga aine omutima ogurikwesigwa omu maisho gaawe, okaragaana nawe endagaano y'okuha abaijukuru ensi y'Abanyakanaani, ey'Abahiiti, ey'Abaamori, ey'Abaperizi, ey'Abayebusi n'ey'Abagirugashi; kandi ebyo ebi waaraganiise okabihikiiriza, ahabw'okuba ori ohikiriire." 
Nehemiah9:9 Bwanyima waareeba okubonabonesibwa kwa baatatenkuriitwe bari Misri, waahurira okutaka kwabo bari aha Nyanja erikutukura," 
Nehemiah9:10 waayoreka obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza ebi waakozire ahari Faraho n'abagaragwa be n'abantu b'omu nsi ye boona; ahabw'okuba okamanya oku baagizire baatatenkuriitwe n'amaryo; ekyarugiremu waayetungira eiziina rugambwa, nk'oku kiri na hati." 
Nehemiah9:11 Bwanyima waataanisamu enyanja habiri omu maisho gaabo, baaraba ahagati yaayo hoomire, kwonka abaabaire babakuratiire waabanaga ahagati y'amaizi, baatobera omu maiszi maingi nk'eibaare." 
Nehemiah9:12 Kandi nyomushana okaba obeebembera n'enyomyo y'ekicu, na nyekiro obeebembera n'enyomyo y'omuriro, kubamurikira omuhanda ogu bashemereire kutoora." 
Nehemiah9:13 Okashuuma aha rushozi Sinai, waagamba nabo nooyema omu iguru, waabateeraho emigyenzo ehikire n'ebiragiro by'amazima, ebyatairweho ebirungi, n'ebyaragiirwe;" 
Nehemiah9:14 waabamanyisa sabato yaawe erikwera, waabaragiira nooraba omu mwiru waawe Musa ebiragiro n'ebyatairweho, byaba ebiragiro byawe." 
Nehemiah9:15 Ku baagizire enjara, waabaha eby'okurya ebirikuruga omu iguru; ku baagizire eiriho, waabaihira amaizi omu rukiri, waabaragiira kuza omu nsi ei waarahiire kubaha, ngu bagikubuure." 
Nehemiah9:16 Kwonka bo na baatatenkuriitwe baagira amaryo, baagangaaza ebitsya byabo, tibaayorobera biragiro byawe," 
Nehemiah9:17 baayanga kuhurira, kandi tibaijuka by'okutangaaza, ebi waakoreire omuribo; kureka baagangaaza ebitsya byabo, kandi ahabw'obugomi bwabo baayeteeraho omwebembezi, ngu bagarukye Misri omu buhuuku bwabo. Kwonka Iwe ori Ruhanga oyeteekateekire kusaasira, oine embabazi n'esaasi, otarahuka kuguubwa kubi, kureka ogira okukunda okutaruga ha rugyero; torabarekire." 
Nehemiah9:18 Nangwa n'obu baayeheeshera ekishushani ky'enyana bakagira bati: Ogu niwe Ruhanga waanyu, owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misri, bakakora ebirikukugwisa kubi ebirengyesereize," 
Nehemiah9:19 kwonka Iwe ahabw'embabazi zaawe nyingi torabatsigireho bari omu ihamba; enyomyo y'ekicu ey'okubeebembera omu muhanda nyomushana ekaba etabaruga mumaisho, n'obu yaakuba ey'omuriro kubamurikira nyekiro kubooreka ei baraatoore." 
Nehemiah9:20 Waabaha Omwoyo waawe omurungi kubeegyesa, kandi tiwaabaima maanu yaawe kubura eky'okurya, waabaha amaizi kubatambira eiriho." 
Nehemiah9:21 Waabatungira omu ihamba okumara emyka makumi ana, tibaagira ki baakyena; ebijwaro byabo tibyakura, n'ebigyere byabo tibyazimba." 
Nehemiah9:22 Waabaha ensi z'abagabe, n'amahanga nk'oku emigabo yaabo yaabaire eri; batyo baakubuura ensi ya Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni, n'eya Ogi omugabe wa Bashani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Waakanyisa oruzaaro rwabo, rwaba nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, waabahitsya omu nsi, ei waagambiire baishenkurubo ku barigizamu, bakagikubuura." 
Nehemiah9:24 Batyo baijukuru baabo baaza omuri egyo nsi, baagikubuura; Abanyakanaani abatuuzi b'omuri egyo nsi, waabasingurira omu maisho gaabo, waabahayo omu mikono yaabo hamwe n'abagabe baabo n'abantu baamwo, kubagira nk'oku barikwenda." 
Nehemiah9:25 Bwanyima baakwata endembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, n'ensi ezirikweza munonga, baakubuura amaju agaijwire ebintu byona ebirungi, n'amaziba agafukwire, n'emisiri y'emizaabibu n'ey'emizeituuni n'ey'ebiti bingi ebirikwana ebijuma; batyo baarya, baahaaga, baagomoka, baashemerererwa omu burungi bwawe bwingi." 
Nehemiah9:26 Kwonka baayanga kukuhurira, baakugomera, ebiragiro byawe baabyenaga enyima, baita baanabi baawe, abaabaire babateisa ngu bakugarukire, baakora ebirikukugwisa kubi ebirengyesereize." 
Nehemiah9:27 Nikyo waabaheereireyo omu mikono y'abazigu baabo, bakabaita kubi; kwonka omu biro by'obusaasi bakaba bakutakira, obahurira oyemi omu iguru, kandi nk'oku embabazi zaawe ziba nyingi, obaha ab'okubajuna, babaiha omu mikono y'abazigu baabo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Kwonka ku baabaire bamara ebiro baagira obusingye, bagaruka bakora ebi orikwanga; nikyo waabaire obarekyera omu mikono y'abazigu baabo, bakabatwara; kwonka ku baabaire bahinduka, baakutakira, obahurira oyemi omu iguru, emirundi mingi obajuna, nk'oku embabazi zaawe ziri." 
Nehemiah9:29 Okaba obateisa, ngu obone kubagarura, boorobere ebiragiro byawe. Kwonka bagira amaryo, banga kubyorobera, bashiisha ebiragiro ebi waaragiire, haza biri ebi omuntu yaakukozire, bikamubaisaho, batunika amabega gaabo, bagangaaza ebitsya, banga kuhurira." 
Nehemiah9:30 Obagumisiririza emyaka mingi, obateisa n'Omwoyo waawe noogambira omuri baanabi baawe; kwonka banga kutega amatu kuhurira. Nikyo waabaire obaheerayo omu mikono y'amahanga g'omu nsi ezo." 
Nehemiah9:31 N'obu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, torabamariireho kimwe ahabw'embabazi zaawe, kandi torabatsigireho; ahabw'okuba ori Ruhanga ow'embabazi n'okusaasira." 
Nehemiah9:32 N'ahabw'ekyo, ai Ruhanga waitu, Ruhanga Nyamuhanga ow'amaani kandi orikutiinwa, otaita ndagaano, kandi ow'okukunda okutaruga ha rugyero, noomanya enaku zoona ezi twareebire, itwe n'abagabe baitu, abanyiginya baitu, abanyamurwa baitu, baanabi baitu, baatatenkuriitwe, n'abantu baawe boona, okwiha omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Asiria n'okuhitsya hati, ezo naku orekye kuzeeta busha." 
Nehemiah9:33 Kwonka omuri ebyo byona ebyatubaireho, okaguma ori ow'amazima; ahakuba Iwe okakora eby'obwesigwa, haza itwe twakora kubi." 
Nehemiah9:34 Abagabe baitu, abanyiginya baitu, abanyamurwa baitu, na baatatenkuriitwe tibaroorobeire biragiro byawe, n'obu kwakuba okweta aha bi waaragiire n'ebi waabaire obateisa." 
Nehemiah9:35 Ku baabaire bari omu bugabe bwabo, omu birungi bingi ebi waabahaire, n'omu nsi mpango kandi erikweza munonga, ei waataire omu maisho gaabo, tibaragikuheerereizemu, kandi tibararekire micwe yaabo emibi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Mbwenu reeba, turi abahuuku na hati; turi abahuuku omu nsi ei waahaire baatatenkuriitwe kurya ebijuma byamwo n'ebirungi byamweo byona." 
Nehemiah9:37 Emyaka yaamwo etungisa munonga abagabe abu waataireho kututegyeka ahabw'ebibi byaitu; kandi abo bagabe baine obushoboorozi aha mibiri yaitu n'aha matungo gaitu, kubikora nk'oku barikwenda; turi omu busaasi bwingi munonga." 
Nehemiah9:38 Ahabw'ebyo byona twaza kuragaana endagaano, tugihandiikye, abakuru baitu, Abaleevi baitu n'abanyamurwa baitu, bagiteho akamanyiso kaabo." 
Nehemiah10:1 Abaataireho akamanyiso nibo aba: Nehemia omutegyeki mwene Hakalia, Zedekia," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraaya, Azaria, Yeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pashihuuri, Amaria, Malikiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatushi, Shebania, Maluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harimu, Meremoosi, Obadia," 
Nehemiah10:6 Danieli, Ginesooni, Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:6 Danieli, Ginesooni, Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:7 Meshulaamu, Abiya, Miyamiini," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maazia, Biligai, Shemaaya; abo bakaba bari abanyamurwa." 
Nehemiah10:9 Abaleevi nibo aba: Yeshua mweene Azania, Binui ow'omuri beene Henadaadi, na Kadimieli;" 
Nehemiah10:10 na beene waabo n'aba, Shebania, Hodia, Kelita, Pelaya, Hanai," 
Nehemiah10:11 Miika, Rehobu, Hashabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zakuri, Sherebia, Shebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia, Baani, na Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Abategyeki b'abantu nibo aba: Paroshi, Pahasi-moabu, Elamu, Zaatu, Baani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buuni, Azigaadi, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniya, Biguvai, Adini," 
Nehemiah10:17 Ateri, Hezekia, Azuri," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodia, Hashumu, Bezai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Harifu, Anatoosi, Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magipiashi, Meshulaamu, Heziri," 
Nehemiah10:21 Meshezabeeli, Zadoki Yadua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia, Hanani, Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoshea, Hanania, Hashubu," 
Nehemiah10:24 Haloheeshi, Piliha, Shobeki," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehumu, Hashabuna, Maaseya," 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahia, Hanani, Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluki, Harimu na Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 N'abandi bantu boona, abanyamurwa, Abaleevi, abakumiirizi, abeeshongozi, abaheereza b'omuri hekalu, na boona abaabaire beetaaniise n'amahanga g'omuri egyo nsi, bakoorobera ebiragiro bya Ruhanga, hamwe n'abakazi baabo, batabani baabo, bahara baabo, na boona abaabaire baine obwengye n'okwetegyereza," 
Nehemiah10:29 baakwatanisa na beene waabo n'abakungu baabo, baikiriza eby'omukyeeno n'endahiro, kugyendera omu biragiro bya Ruhanga, ebyahairwe Musa omugaragwa we, n'okworobera ebi MUKAMA, Mukama waitu, yaaragiire byona n'okubihikiiriza, hamwe n'emigyenzo n'eby'oburyo ebi yaataireho." 
Nehemiah10:30 Kandi baagira bati: Titurishwererana na mahanga ag'omuri egi nsi; 
Nehemiah10:31 kandi abanyamahnga b'omuri egi nsi, ku barireeta ebintu nari eby'okurya byona kubitunda aha kiro kya sabato, tituribigura ha kiro kya sabato, nari aha kiro kikuru kyona; kandi omu mwaka gwa mushanju turyaraaza ensi, turekye kugihinga, n'obu kwakuba okwihuza omuntu weena eibanja." 
Nehemiah10:32 Kandi twayeteeraho ebiragiro by'okuguma kuha ekicweka kimwe kya kashatu kya shekeli buri mwaka, ahabw'okukora omurimo gw'enju ya Ruhanga waitu;" 
Nehemiah10:33 emigaati y'okumurikwa, empongano z'esaano ezihongwa obutoosha, ebitambo by'okwotsya ebitambwa buri izooba, eby'amasabato, eby'emboneko z'ameezi, eby'ebiro bikuru ebyatairweho, eby'ebintu ebirikwera, eby'empongano z'okwihaho ekibi ez'okurihiirira Abaisraeli, n'eby'emirimo yoona ey'omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Kandi twateerera enteenyu abanyamurwa, Abaleevi n'abandi bantu, okumanya oku baraagume nibareeta enku omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu nk'omutoijo, nk'oku amaju aga baatatenkuriitwe gaabaire gari, omu bunaku obwatairweho buri mwaka, kuba ez'okuhemba aha itambiro rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'Ebiragiro." 
Nehemiah10:35 Kandi twayemera kureeta emiganuro y'emisiri yaitu, n'ey'ebijuma byona ebya buri muti ebirikuriibwa, omu nju ya MUKAMA buri mwaka;" 
Nehemiah10:36 n'okureeta emijigaijo ya batabani baitu n'ey'amatungo gaitu, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'Ebiragiro, emijigaijo y'ente zaitu n'ey'entaama zaitu, kugireeta omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu, n'okugiha abanyamurwa abarikukorera omuri egyo nju omurimo gw'obuheereza," 
Nehemiah10:37 kandi n'okuguma nitureeta omuganuro gw'ebiihuro byaitu, n'empongano ezizongazongiibwe, n'ebijuma ebirikuriibwa eby'aha miti ebirikuriibwa byona, na viinyo n'amajuta, nitubireetera abanyamurwa omu bishengye by'enju ya Ruhanga waitu, n'okuha Abaleevi ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi ky'ebyezire omu misiri yaitu; ahabw'okuba Abaleevi nibo batwara kimwe kya ikumi ky'emisiri y'endembo zaitu zoona." 
Nehemiah10:38 Kandi Abaleevi ku bariba nibaheebwa kimwe kya ikumi, omunyamurwa, mwene Arooni, agume abeh; bwanyima Abaleevi nabo bareete kimwe kya ikumi ky'ebyo ebi baaheebwa omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu, babite omu bishengye by'enju y'eibiikiro." 
Nehemiah10:39 Ahabw'okuba Abaisraeli n'Abaleevi baryaguma bareete empongano z'engano, viinyo n'amajuta, babite omu bishengye, ebirimu ebintu by'Omwanya ogurikwera, bibe eby'abanyamurwa abarikuheereza n'abakumiirizi n'abeeshongozi. Titurireka kuta omutima aha nju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Nehemiah11:1 Omu biro ebyo abeebembezi b'eihanga bakaguma batwire omuri Yerusaalemu, kwonka abandi bantu baateera enteenyu okwiha omuntu omwe ahari buri ikumi kutuura omuri Yerusaalemu orurembo orurikwera, kandi abandi boona abaatsigaireho baaza omu zindi ndembo." 
Nehemiah11:2 Abantu baasiima abashaija boona abaayehaireyo n'omutima gwekundiire kutuura Yerusaalemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Abo nibo bategyeki b'amashaza abaabaire batwire Yerusaalemu; kwonka omu ndembo za Yuda buri muntu akaba atwire omu kibanja kye omu rurembo rw'owaabo, Abaisraeli, abanyamurwa, Abaleevi, abaheereza b'omuri hekalu, na baijukuru b'abagaragwa ba Sulemaani." 
Nehemiah11:4 Omuri Yerusaalemu hakaba harimu bamwe omu Bayuda n'omu Babenyamiini. Omuri beene Yuda, Ataaya mwene Uziya, mwijukuru wa Zekaria, Zekaria ya Amaria, Amaria ya Shefatia, Shefatia ya Mehalaleeli, ow'omuri beene Pereezi;" 
Nehemiah11:5 na Maaseya mwene Baruki, mwijukuru wa Kolihoze, Kolihoze ya Hazaaya, Hazaaya ya Adaaya, Adaaya ya Yoyaribu, Yoyaribu ya Zekaria owa Shiilo." 
Nehemiah11:6 Beene Pereezi boona abaabaire batwire Yerusaalemu bakaba bari abashaija amamanzi magana ana na makumi mukaaga na munaana. 
Nehemiah11:7 Kandi aba nibo beene Benyamiini: Saalu mwene Meshulaamu mwijukuru wa Yoedi, Yoedi ya Pedaaya, Pedaaya ya Kolaaya, Kolaaya ya Maaseya, Maaseya ya Ityeli, Ityeli ya Yeshaaya," 
Nehemiah11:8 Yaakuratwa Gabai, na Salai, boona magana mwenda na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoeli mwene Zikuri akaba ari omureeberezi waabo; kandi Yuda mwene Hasenua ari owa kabiri omu bategyeki b'orurembo. 
Nehemiah11:10 Omu banyamurwa: Yedaaya mwene Yoyaribu, Yakiini," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya mwene Hilukia, mwijukuru wa Meshulaamu, Meshulaamu ya Zadoki, Zadoki ya Merayosi, Merayosi ya Ahitubu, omutegyeki w'enju ya Ruhanga," 
Nehemiah11:12 hamwe na beene waabo abaabaire nibakora omurimo gw'enju, boona magana abiri na makumi abiri na babiri; kandi na Adaya mwene Yerohaamu, mwijukuru wa Pelalia, Pelalia ya Amuzi, Amuzi ya Zekaria, Zekaria ya Pashihuuri, Pashihuuri ya Malukiya." 
Nehemiah11:13 hamwe na beene ishe, abategyeki b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, boona magana abiri na makumi ana na babiri; kandi na Amashisai mwene Azareeli, mwijukuru wa Ahazai, Ahazai ya Mehsilemoosi, Meshilemoosi ya Imeri," 
Nehemiah11:14 hamwe na beene ishe, abashaija b'amaani amamanzi igana na makumi abiri na munaana; kandi omureeberezi waabo akaba ari Zabudieli mwene Hagedolimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Kandi omu Baleevi: Shemaaya mwene Hashubu, mwijukuru wa Azurikaamu, Azurikaamu ya Hashabia, Hashabia ya Buuni," 
Nehemiah11:16 kandi na Shebatai na Yoazabaadi ab'omu bategyeki ba'omu Baleevi, abaabaire bareeberera emirimo y'enju ya Ruhanga ey'aheeru;" 
Nehemiah11:17 kandi na Matania mwene Miika, mwijukuru wa Zabudi, Zabudi ya Asafu, owaabaire ari omutegyeki w'okwebembera abarikuhimbisa omu kushaba, na Bakibukia owaabaire ari owa kabiri ahari beene ishe, na Abuda mwene Shamua, mwijukuru wa Galali, Galali ya Yedusuuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Abaleevi boona ab'omu rurembo orurikwera bakaba bari magana abiri na makumi munaana na bana. 
Nehemiah11:19 Kandi abakumiirizi Akubu, Talumooni na beene waabo, abaabaire barinda amarembo, boona bakaba bari igana na makumi mushanju na babiri." 
Nehemiah11:20 Abandi Baisraeli boona n'abandi banyamurwa n'Abaleevi, bakaba batwire omu ndembo za Yuda zoona buri muntu omu buhunguzi bwe." 
Nehemiah11:21 Kwonka abaheereza b'omuri hekalu bakaba batwire Ofeli, nibareebererwa Ziiha na Gishupa." 
Nehemiah11:22 Omureeberezi w'Abaleevi omuri Yerusaalemu akaba ari Uuzi mwene Baani, mwijukuru wa Hashabia, Hashabia ya Matania, Matania ya Miika ow'omuri beene Asafu, abeeshongozi, abaabaire bareeberera omurimo gw'enju ya Ruhanga." 
Nehemiah11:23 Ahabw'okuba omugabe akaba aragiire ebyabo, kandi agyereire abeeshongozi egabo ya buri izooba." 
Nehemiah11:24 Kandi Pesahia mwene Meshezabeeli, ow'omuri beene Zeera, mwene Yuda, akaba ari omuntu w'omugabe owaabaire amuhwera omuri byona ebirikufa aha bantu." 
Nehemiah11:25 Kandi aha birikukwata aha birorero n'emisiri yaabyo, abamwe aha Bayuda bakaba batwire Kiryasi-araba n'omu birorero byayo, Diboni n'omu birorero byayo, Yekabuzeeli n'omu birorero byayo," 
Nehemiah11:26 Yeshua, Molada, Besi-peleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 Hazarishuali, Beeri-sheba n'omu birorero byayo," 
Nehemiah11:28 Zikulaagi, Mekona n'omu birorero byayo," 
Nehemiah11:29 Enirimooni, Zoora, Yaramuusi," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanoa, Adulaamu n'omu birorero byayo, Lakishi n'emisiri yaayo, na Azaka n'omu birorero byayo. Nikwo bateire batyo ensiisira okuruga Beeri-sheba okuhika omu ruhanga rwa Hinoomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ababenyamiini bakatuura okuruga Geeba n'okweyongyera omumaihso, Mikimaashi, Aiya, Beseeli n'omu birorero byayo," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anatoosi, Noobu, Anania," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazora, Raama, Gitaimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadidi, Zeboimu, Nebalaati," 
Nehemiah11:35 Loodi, na Ono, oruhanga rw'abanyamyoga." 
Nehemiah11:36 Kandi ebicweka bimwe by'Abaleevi omuri Yuda bakateeranwa na Benyamiini. 
Nehemiah12:1 Aba nibo banyamurwa n'Abaleevi abaizire na Zerubabeeli mwene Shealutieli, na Yeshua: Seraya, Yeremia, Ezera," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Maluki, Hatushi," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekani, a Rehumu, Meremoosi," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Ginesooni, Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamiini, Maadia, Biliga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Shemaaya, Yoyaribu, Yedaaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Saalu, Amoki, Hilukia, na Yedaaya. Abo nibo baabaire bari bakuru omu banyamurwa n'omuri beene waabo omu biro bya Yeshua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Kandi Abaleevi n'aba: Yeshua, Binui, Kadimieli, Sherebia, Yuda, na Matania, owaabaire naakwatanisa na beene ishe kwebembera ebyeshongoro by'okuhimbisa." 
Nehemiah12:9 Kandi Bakibukia na Uuno beene waabo bakaba beemerera nibareebana omu kushaba. 
Nehemiah12:10 Yeshua akazaara Yoyakimu, Yoyakimu yaazaara Eliashibu, Eliashibu yaazaara Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada yaazaara Yonasaani, na Yona saani yaazaara Yadua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Abanyamurwa b'omu biro bya Yoyakimu abaabaire bari bakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo, n'aba: ow'enju ya Seraaya akaba ari Meraaya, ow'eya Yeremia, ari Hanania," 
Nehemiah12:13 ow'eya Ezera, ari Meshulaamu, ow'eya Amaria ari Yehohanani," 
Nehemiah12:14 ow'eya Maluki ari Yonasaani, ow'eya Shebania ari Yosefu," 
Nehemiah12:15 ow'eya Harimu ari Aduna, ow'eya Merayosi ari Helekai," 
Nehemiah12:16 ow'eya Ido ari Zekaria, ow'eya Ginesooni ari Meshulaamu," 
Nehemiah12:17 ow'eya Biya ari Zikiri, ow'eya Minyamiini owa Moadia, ari Pilutai," 
Nehemiah12:18 ow'eya Biliga ari Shamua, ow'eya Shemaaya ari Yehonasani," 
Nehemiah12:19 ow'eya Yoyaribu ari Matenai, ow'eya Yedaaya ari Uuzi," 
Nehemiah12:20 ow'eya Salai ari Kalai, ow'eya Amoki ari Eberi," 
Nehemiah12:21 ow'eya Hilukia ari Hashabia, n'ow'eya Yedaaya ari Netaneeli." 
Nehemiah12:22 Omu biro bya Eliashibu, Yoyada, Yohanaani na Yadua, Abaleevi n'abanyamurwa bakaba bahandiikwa omu kitabo ky'amaziina g'abakuru ba'maju ga baishenkurubo, okuhitsya omu busingye bwa Dario Omuperisi." 
Nehemiah12:23 Na beene Leevi, abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo bakaba bahandiikwa omu kitabo ky'eb'omu busingye okuhitsya omu biro bya Yohanaani mwene Eliashibu." 
Nehemiah12:24 Kandi abakuru b'Abaleevi bakaba abari Hashabia, Sherebia, na Yeshua mwene Kadimieli, abaabaire bakwatanisa na beene waabo abaabaire beemerera nibareebana, kuhimbisa n'okusiima, nk'ekiragiro kya Daudi omushaija wa Ruhanga oku kyabaire kiri, nibakikora omu mbu zaabo." 
Nehemiah12:25 Kandi Matania, Bakibukia, Obadia, Mehsulaamu, Talumooni na Akubu bakaba bari abakumiirizi, abaabaire barinda amaju g'amabiikiro g'aha marembo." 
Nehemiah12:26 Abo nibo baabaire bariho omu biryo bya Yoyakimu mwene Yeshua, mwijukuru wa Yozadaaki, n'omu biro bya Nehemia omutegyeki na Ezera omunyamurwa, kandi omuhandiiki." 
Nehemiah12:27 Ku baabaire nibenda kweza orugo rw'amabaare rwa Yerusaalemu, bakasherura Abaleevi ahu baabaire batwire hoona, kubareeta Yerusaalemu aha bugyenyi bw'okurweza baine okushemererwa, nibahimbisa n'ebyenshongoro, baine ebitaasa n'endingiri n'enanga." 
Nehemiah12:28 Kandi abaana b'abeeshongozi baateeranira hamwe nibaruga omu mpita ezeehinguririize Yerusaalemu n'omu birorero by'Abanetofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 na Besi-gilugaali n'omu byaro bya Geeba na Azimavesi; ahabw'okuba abeeshongozi bakaba beeyombekyeire ebirorero embaju zoona eza Yerusaalemu. 
Nehemiah12:30 Kandi abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi baayeyeza, baayeza na'bantu n'amarembo n'orwo rugo rw'amabaare." 
Nehemiah12:31 Bwanyima naatembya abakuru ba Yuda aha mutwe gw'orwo rugo, naabaganisa abantu omu mitwe ebiri mihango okugyenda aha mutwe gw'orugo bakurataine nibahimbisa. Omutwe gumwe gwatoora aha rubaju rwa buryo, gugyemire ow'Eirembo ry'orubungo;" 
Nehemiah12:32 baakuratwa Hoshaaya n'ekicweka ky'abakuru ba Yuda," 
Nehemiah12:33 na Azaria, Ezera, Meshulaamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda, Benyamiini, Shemaaya, Yeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 na batabani b'abanyamurwa abamwe baine amakondere, Zekaria, mwene Yonasaani, mwijukuru wa Shemaaya, Shemaaya ya Matania, Matania ya Mikaaya, Mikaaya ya Zikuri, mwene Asafu;" 
Nehemiah12:36 na beene waabo Shemaaya, Azareeli, Yuda na Hanani, baine ebirikugamba bya Daudi omushaija wa Ruhanga, beebembeirwe Ezera omuhandiiki." 
Nehemiah12:37 Ku baahikire aha Irembo ry'enshuro, bainamuka bagyemire omu maihso gaabo, baatembera aha matembero agarikuza omu rurembo rwa Daudi, ahu orugo rwabiare nirwinamukira aharuguru y'enju ya Daudi, baahika aha Irembo ry'amaizi ery'oburugwa-izooba." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ogundi mutwe gw'abarikugyenda nibahimbisa gwatoora aha rubaju rwa bumosho, naanye naagyenda mbakuratiire aha mutwe gw'orugo, nyine ekicweka ky'abantu, twatoora aha rubaju rw'omunaara gw'ebikoomi, twahika aha rugo ruhanga," 
Nehemiah12:39 bwanyima twaraba aha Irembo rya Efuraimu, n'aha Irembo rya ira, n'aha Irembo ry'eby'enyanja, n'aha munaara gwa Hananeeli, n'aha gwa Hameeya, twahika aha Irembo ry'entaama, twayemerera aha Irembo ry'abakumiirizi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Etyo egyo mitwe yombi y'abantu abarikusiima yaayemerera omu nju ya Ruhanga, hamwe naanye n'ekicweka ky'abatware abu naabaire nyine," 
Nehemiah12:41 n'abanyamurwa Eliakimu, Maaseya, Minyamiini, Mikaaya, Elio-enai, Zekaria na Hanania baine amakondere;" 
Nehemiah12:42 kandi na Maaseya, Shemaaya, Eleazaari, Uuzi, Yehohanani, Malikiya, Elamu na Ezeri. Kandi abeeshongozi baayeshongora n'amaraka mahango, nibeebemberwa Yezerahia." 
Nehemiah12:43 Eryo izooba baatabma ebitambo bingi nibashemererwa; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akaba abahaire okushemererwa kwingi; kandi abakazi n'abaana bato nabo baashemererwa. Kyareetera akaari k'okushemererwa kw'omuri Yerusaalemu kuhuririrwa hare. 
Nehemiah12:44 Bwanyima eryo izooba baatoorana abantu b'okureeberera ebishengye by'amabiikiro, agarikubiikwamu emitoijo, n'emiganuro, n'ebicweka bya kimwe kya ikumi, n'okuteeraniramu emigabo y'abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi nk'ebiragiro oku birikuragiira, nk'oku emisiri y'endembo zaabo yaabaire eri; ahabw'okuba Abayuda bakashemererwa ahabw'okureeba abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi bari ha mirimo yaabo;" 
Nehemiah12:45 nibakora emirimo ya Ruhanga waabo n'okuhikiiriza eby'okweyeza; kandi abeeshongozi n'abakumiirizi nabo nikwo baabaire nibatwaza, nibakuratira ekiragiro kya Daudi n'eky'omutabani Sulemaani." 
Nehemiah12:46 Ahabw'okuba ira omu biro bya Daudi na Asafu hakaba hariho omwebembezi w'abeeshongozi, n'ebyenshongoro by'okuhimbisa Ruhanga n'okumusiima." 
Nehemiah12:47 Kandi omu biro bya Zerubabeeli n'omu bya Nehemia Abaisraeli boona bakaba bahayo emigabo ya buri izooba ahabw'abeeshongozi n'abakumiirizi; kandi baihaho eby'okubiikira Abaleevi, n'Abaleevi baihaho eby'okubiikira beene Arooni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Kandi eryo izooba bakashomera abantu eby'omu kitabo kya Musa, baashanga hahandiikirwemu ku hatariho Muamoni nari Omumoabu orikwikirizibwa kuza omu kuteerana kw'abantu ba Ruhanga ebiro byona;" 
Nehemiah13:2 ahabw'okuba tibarabuganiise Baisraeli by'okurya na maizi, kureka bakaguriirira Balamu ngu abakyeene; kwona Ruhanga witu yaahindura ogwo mukyeeno kuba omugisha." 
Nehemiah13:3 Abantu ku baahuriire Ebiragiro, baiha omu Baisraeli ekijwangye kyona ekirikukomooka omu banyamahanga." 
Nehemiah13:4 Kwonka ebyo bitakabaireho, Eliashibu omunyamurwa, owaatairweho kutegyeka enju ya Ruhanga waitu, ahabw'okugira obuzaare na Tobia," 
Nehemiah13:5 akaba amushemereize ekishengye kihango, ekyabaire kibiikwamu ira empongano z'esaano, obubaane, ebirikukoresibwa, ebicweka bya kimwe kya ikumi eby'eby'okurya na viinyo n'amajuta, ebyabaire biragiirwa kuheebwa Abaleevi, abeeshongozi n'abakumiirizi, hamwe n'emitoijo erikutoijwa ahabw'abanyamurwa." 
Nehemiah13:6 Kwonka obu ebyo byakorwa, nkaba ntari Yerusaalemu; ahabw'okuba omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu n'ebiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Aruta-gizakiseesi omugabe wa Babulooni, nkaba ngiire ow'omugabe. Bwanyima ku haahingwireho ebiro, naashaba omugabe ngu anyohereze," 
Nehemiah13:7 naagaruka Yerusaalemu; ku naahikireyo, naamanya ekibi eki Eliashibu yaakozire ahabw'okushemereza Tobia ekishengye omu bikaari by'enju ya Ruhanga." 
Nehemiah13:8 Naagira ekiniga kingi, naahuruutura ebintu bya Tobia byona omuri ekyo kishengye, naabinaga aheeru." 
Nehemiah13:9 Ntyo naaragiira ku bashemeza ebyo bishengye; bwanyima naagaruramu ebintu by'enju ya Ruhanga, hamwe n'empongano z'esaano n'obubaane." 
Nehemiah13:10 Kandi naamanya ku Abaleevi batarahairwe migabo yaabo; n'ahabw'ekyo Abaleevi n'abeeshongozi, abaabaire bakora emirimo, bakaba bahungire, buri muntu agarukire omu kibanja kye." 
Nehemiah13:11 Ntyo naahana abatware ningira nti: N'enki ekyareeteire enju ya Ruhanga kutsigwaho? Ahonaaho naateerana Abaleevi, naabagarura omu myanya yaabo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Bwanyima aba Yuda boona baareeta kimwe kya ikumi ky'eby'okurya na viinyo n'amajuta, baabita omu mabiikiro." 
Nehemiah13:13 Bwanyima naataho ababiiki aba kurinda amabiikiro, Shelemia omunyamurwa, Zadoki omuhandiiki na Pedaaya ow'omu Baleevi, nibahwerwa Hanani mwene Zakuri, mwijukuru wa Matania, ahakuba bakaba nibateekateekwa kuba abeesigwa; omurimo gwabo gukaba guri ogw'okugaburira beene waabo." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ai Ruhanga wangye, onyijukye ahabw'ekyo, kandi otaragaza emirimo yangye emirungi ei nkoreire enju ya Ruhanga wangye, kandi n'omurimo ogurikukorerwa omuriyo." 
Nehemiah13:15 Omu biro ebyo nkareeba omuri Yuda abashaija nibanyuukira emizaabibu omu inyuukiro ahari sabato, abandi nibareeta ebiba, nibabyekoreza endogoya zaabo; naareeba na viinyo n'emizaabibu n'ebijuma by'emitiini n'emitwaro y'emiringo yoona, ei baabaire bareeta Yerusaalemu aha izooba rya sabato; naabateiseza aha izooba eri baabaire nibatundiraho eby'okurya." 
Nehemiah13:16 Kandi n'abashaija ba Tuuro, abaabaire batwire omu rurembo, bakaba bareeta eby'enyanja, n'ebintu by'emiringo yoona, babiguza aba Yuda n'aba Yerusaalemu ahari sabato." 
Nehemiah13:17 Ku naabireebire, naatonganisa abakungu ba Yuda, naabagira nti: Ahabw'enki nimukora ekibi ekirikushusha kiti, kushiisha eizooba rya sabato?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Na baashwenkuriimwe tikwo baakozire batyo, kikareetera Ruhanga waitu okutureetaho akabi aka koona, n'aha rurembo oru? Mbwenu imwe nimweyongyera kureeta ahari Israeli ekiniga ahabw'okushiisha sabato." 
Nehemiah13:19 Aha izooba eririkukuratwa sabato omu mwabazyo nibutandika kwira, ku naabaire ndi aha irembo rya Yerusaalemu, naaragiira kukinga amarembo, kandi kutagaruka kwigurwa okuhitsya obu sabato eraahwe. Kandi naataho bamwe aha bashaija bangye kurinda amarembo, ngu hatagira omutwaro gwona ogu baataasyamu aha izooba rya sabato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Bwanyima abashuubuzi n'abarikutunda ebintu by'emiringo yoona baaraara enyima ya Yerusaalemu ekiro kimwe nari bibiri. 
Nehemiah13:21 Ku naabareebire, naabahana nimbagira nti: N'enki ekibaraarize enyima y'orugo? Ku muraagarukire, niinyija kubakwata. Okuruga obwo tibaagaruka kwija ahari sabato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Kandi naaragiira Abaleevi kweyeza, ngu babone kwija kurinda amarembo, eizooba rya sabato rirekye kusiisikara. Ai Ruhanga wangye, onyijukye n'ahabw'ekyo, kandi onsaasire nk'embabazi zaawe nyingi oku ziri." 
Nehemiah13:23 Kandi omuri ebyo biro naareeba Abayudaaya abaashweire abakazi b'omuri Ashidoodi, n'Abaamonikazi, n'Abamoabukazi," 
Nehemiah13:24 kandi abaana baabo bakaba bagamba orurimi rwabo nibarujwanzya n'orurimi rw'aba Ashidoodi, batarikubaasa kugamba gye ruyudaaya, kureka bagambaho rumwe ahari ezo." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ntyo naabatonganisa nimbajuma, nangwa na bamwe omuribo naabateera, naabamaanyura eishokye, naabarahiza omu iziina rya Ruhanga, nti: Mutarihingirana nabo, kandi naimwe mutaribasheramu." 
Nehemiah13:26 Timurikumanya ku Sulemaani omugabe wa Israeli yaasiisire ahabw'abakazi nk'aba? N'obu haraabe hatarabaireho mugabe ondiijo owaashushaine nawe omu mahanga maingi, kandi Ruhanga we yaamukunzire, akamugira omugabe wa Israeli yoona, kwonak nawe abanyamahangakazi bakamusiisisa." 
Nehemiah13:27 Mbwenu nimugira ngu nitwija kwikiria ebyanyu, tukore ekibi ekirikwingana kiti, kushwera abanyamahangakazi?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Kandi omwe ahari batabani ba Yehoyada mwene Eliashibu omunyamurwa omukuru, akaba ari mukwe wa Sanibalati Omuhoroni; nikyo naamubingiire omu maisho gangye." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ai Ruhanga wangye, ogume obaijukye, ahabw'okuba bakashiisha obunyamurwa, n'endagaano y'obunyamurwa n'ey'Abaleevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Okwo nikwo naabashemeize, nkabamaramu abanyamahanga boona, nkataho embu z'abanyamurwa n'ez'Abaleevi, buri muntu kukora omurimo gwe;" 
Nehemiah13:31 Kandi nkaragiira eby'okureeta emitoijo y'enku omu bunaku obutairweho, n'eby'emiganuro. Ai Ruhanga wangye, ogume onyijukye, onzimuurire ebirungi." 
Esther1:1 Omu busingye bwa Ahasuero, Ahasuero owaategyekire amashaza igana na makumi abiri na mushanju, okuruga Buhindi okuhika Esiopia," 
Esther1:2 omu biro by'ogwo mugabe Ahasuero, ku yaabaire ari aha ngoma omuri Shushani orurembo orukuru," 
Esther1:3 omu mwaka gwe ogwa kashatu, akateeka obugyenyi, yaayeta abanyiginya be boona, abagaragwa be, abakuru b'amahe aba Buperisi na Bumeedi, abakungu hamwe n'abategyeki b'ago mashaza, baateeranira omu maisho ge," 
Esther1:4 yaamara ebiro igana na makumi munaana naayoreka eitungo ry'obugabe bwe, n'ekitiinisa ky'obukuru bwe ekyabaire kihinguraine." 
Esther1:5 Ebiro ebyo ku byahweire, yaateekyera abantu boona obugyenyi, abakuru n'abato abaabaire bari omuri orwo rurembo rukuru Shushani, bwamara ebiro mushanju omu kibuga ky'aha musiri gw'omu kikaarai ky'omugabe." 
Esther1:6 Aho hakaba hakingireho emikingo y'emyenda erikwera, n'eya bururu, ehanikirwe aha bugoye bwa bafuta n'obwa bujwa buhamiibwe empeta z'efeeza aha nyomyo z'amabaare agarikwetwa maburo; kandi aha mabaare agaariire agarikutukura, agarikwera, aga kinekye n'agarikwiragura, baataho ebitanda by'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza." 
Esther1:7 Baabanywaisiza viinyo y'omugabe omu bintu by'ezaabu ebitarikushushana, yaatereka nyingi munonga, nk'obufura bw'omugabe oku bwabaire buri." 
Esther1:8 Abantu baanywa nk'oku ebiragiro byabaire biri, tihaabaho muntu owaagyemwa; ahabw'okuba omugabe akaba aragiire abatware b'ekikaari kye boona kuheereza omuntu weena, nk'oku arikwenda." 
Esther1:9 N'omwigarire Vasita yaateekyera abakazi obugyenyi omu kikaari ky'omugabe Ahusuero. 
Esther1:10 Aha izooba rya mushanju, omugabe Ahusuero ku yaagizire ebyera, yaaragiira Mahumaani, Bizisa, Harabona, Bigusa, na Abaguta, Zesaari na Karakaasi, abakonwa mushanju, abaabire bamuheereza," 
Esther1:11 kureeta omwigarire Vasita omu maisho ge, ajwaire ekirunga ky'obugabe, kworeka abantu n'abanyiginya oburungi bwe; ahabw'okuba akba ari murungi w'okureebwa." 
Esther1:12 Kwonka omwigarire Vasita yaayanga kuhurira ekiragiro eki omugabe yaamutumireho abakonwa be ngu aije. Ekyo kyareetera omugabe ekiniga kingi, kyayenda kumubarura." 
Esther1:13 Bwanyima omugabe yaabuuza abahi b'obwengye, abaabaire nibamanya oku bitwazibwa, (ahabw'okuba niyo yaabaire eba entwaza ye okubuuza abarikumanya ebiragiro n'emicwere y'emanja;" 
Esther1:14 kandi abashaija abaabaire nibakurata omugabe omu kitiinisa, bakaba bari Karisheena, Shesaari, Adimaasa, Tarushiishi, Meresi, Mariseena na Memukaani, abanyiginya mushanju aba Buperisi na Bumeedi, abaabaire bari empika-mugabe, baine emyanya mikuru erikukira ey'abandi omu ihanga.)" 
Esther1:15 Omugabe yaababuuza ati: Omu biragiro, tugire tuta omwigarire Vasita, oyangire kukora eki omugabe amutumireho abakonwa?" 
Esther1:16 Memukaani yaagarukamu ari omu maisho g'omugabe n'abanyiginya ati: Omwigarire Vasita tacumwire ha mugabe wenka, kureka ashobize n'aha banyiginya boona n'amahanga goona agari omu mashaza g'omugabe Ahasuero goona." 
Esther1:17 Ahabw'okuba eki, eki omwigarire akozire, nikiija kumanywa abakazi boona, kibareetere kugaya baibabo, ahkuba nibaija kugira bati: Omugabe Ahasuero ka yaatumire omwigarire Vasita kwija mu maisho ge, akanga." 
Esther1:18 Kandi eri izooba abanyiginyakzi ba Buperisi na Bumeedi, abaahurira eki omwigarire akozire, nibaija kukigambira abanyiginya b'omugabe boona; ekiraarugyemu habeho okugayana kwingi n'okugirirana ekiniga." 
Esther1:19 Nyakusinga, ku oraabe nookisiima, omugabe ateho ekiragiro, ku Vasita atarigaruka omu maisho g'omugabe Ahasuero, kandi kihandiikwe omu biragiro by'Abaperisi n'Abameedi, kirekye kuhindurwa; bwanyima omwanya gwe gw'obwigarire omugabe aguhe ondiijo orikumuhitsa emicwe." 
Esther1:20 Kityo ekiragiro ky'omugabe ku kiraarangwe omu bugabe bwe bwona, nk'oku bwingana, abakazi boona nibaija kutiina baibabo, ab'ekitiinisa n'abatakiine." 
Esther1:21 Obwo bwengye bwasiimwa omugabe n'abanyiginya, omugabe yaatwaza nk'oku Memukaani yaamuhabwire." 
Esther1:22 Yaatweka ebaruha omu mashaza g'obugabe bwe bwona, omuri buri ishaza nk'oku emihandiikire yaaryo eri, kandi n'omuri buri ihanga omu rurimi rwaryo, ngu omushaija weena ashemereire kutegyeka eka ye, kandi ngu nawe akibuzye omu rurimi rw'eihanga rye." 
Esther2:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo, ekiniga ky'omugabe Ahasuero ku kyaikaikaine, yaijuka Vasita n'eki yaakozire, n'ekiragiro eki yaamuteereireho." 
Esther2:2 Bwanyima abagaragwa b'omugabe abaabaire nibamuheereza baamugira bati: Ka basherurire omugabe abaishiki barungi empangare. 
Esther2:3 Kandi omugabe ateho abatware omu mashaza goona ag'omu bugabe bwe, bateeranire hamwe empangare nungi zoona omu nju y'abakazi omu rurembo Shushani, babakwatse Hegai omukonwa w'omugabe, omurinzi w'abakazi; kandi baheebwe ebintu by'okwecuma." 
Esther2:4 Bwanyima omwishiki, ou omugabe arisiima, abe omwigarire omu mwanya gwa Vasita. Omugabe yaasiima egyo naama, yaatwaza atyo." 
Esther2:5 Omu biro ebyo omu rurembo Shushani, hakaba harimu Omuyudaaya orikwetwa Morodekai, mwene Yairi, mwijukuru wa Shimei, mwene Kiishi Omubenyamiini." 
Esther2:6 Omushaija ogwo akaba anyagirwe Yerusaalemu, atwairwe n'ezindi nkwatwa, na Yekonia omugabe wa Yuda, ou Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaatwaire." 
Esther2:7 Morodekai ogwo akoorora Hadasa muhara wa ishento, niwe Esteeri; ahabw'okuba akaba ari efuuzi, ataine ishe na nyina; kandi ogwo mwishiki akaba akuzire gye, kandi ari murungi w'okureebwa. Ishe na nyina ku baaherize kufa, Morodekai yaamutwara, yaamworora nk'omwana we ou ayezaariire." 
Esther2:8 Bwanyima ekiragiro ky'omugabe, ku kyaherize kubuga, abaishiki baingi baateeranirwa omu rurembo Shushani kurindwa Hegai; na Esteeri yaatwarwa omu kikaari ky'omugabe, yaakwatsibwa Hegai omurinzi w'abakazi." 
Esther2:9 Ogwo mwishiki yaasiimwa Hegai, yaamugiraho obuganzi. Hegai yaarahuka kumuha eby'okwecuma, n'egabo ye, n'abazaana mushanju abaarugire omu kikaari ky'omugabe, abu yaabaire ashemereire kuheebwa; yaamutoorana omu bandi, yaamutwara n'abazaana be, yaamuta omu mwanya ogurikukira oburungi omu nju y'abakazi." 
Esther2:10 Kandi Esteeri ogwo akaba atakagambaga ihanga rye, n'obu baakuba beene waabo; ahabw'okuba Morodekai akaba amwehanangiriize kutabigamba." 
Esther2:11 Kandi Morodekai akaba agyendagyenda obutoosha omu maisho g'ekikaari ky'enju y'abakazi, ngu amanye Esteeri oku ari, kandi n'oku ariba." 
Esther2:12 Kandi omwishiki ku yaabaire aheza ameezi ikumi n'abiri naayecuma nk'ebiragiro by'abakazi oku biri, akaba amurikirwa omugabe Ahasuero; ahakuba ameezi ago nigo gaabaire garagiirwa kwecumiramu, ameezi mukaaga nibeesiiga amajuta ga sumuruna, n'agndi mukaaga eby'emigaju n'amajuta ag'okwarika abakazi." 
Esther2:13 Omwishiki ku yaabaire aza kutaaha ow'omugabe, aheebwa ekintu kyona eki arikwenda omu nju y'abakazi kugyendana omu kikaari ky'omugabe." 
Esther2:14 Akaba azayo omu mwabazyo, agaruka omu kasheeshe, ataaha omu nju y'abakazi eya kabiri, akwatsibwa Shaashigazi omukonwa w'omugabe, owaabaire arinda ebinyanshunju; akaba atagaruka w'omugabe, kureka omugabe ku yaabaire amukunda, amweta naamugamba eiziina." 
Esther2:15 Bwanyima obunaku bwa Esteeri, muhara wa Abihaili, ishento wa Morodekai owaamworoire nk'omwana we, bw'okumurikirwa omugabe, bwahika. Ku baamwetsire, tiyaagira ki yaashaba, kureka eki yaasiimiirwe Hegai omukonwa w'omugabe kandi omurinzi w'abakazi. Atyo Esteeri yaasiimwa boona abaamureebire." 
Esther2:16 Kandi Esteeri yaatwarwa aha mugabe Ahasuero omu kikaari ky'omugabe omu kwezi kwa ikumi okurikwetwa Tebesi, omu mwaka gwe gwa mushanju agiire aha ngoma." 
Esther2:17 Omugabe, ku yaareebire Esteeri, yaamukunda okukira abandi bakazi boona, Esteeri yaagirirwa embabazi omu maisho ge, kandi yaakundwa okukira ezo mpangare zoona; omugabe yaamujweka ekirunga aha mutwe, yaamugira omwigarire omu mwanya gwa Vasita." 
Esther2:18 Bwanyima omugabe yaateekyera abanyiginya be boona n'abagaragwa be obugyenyi bwingi munonga ahabwa Esteeri. Kandi yaasaasira amashaza ge goona omushoro, yaahereza ebiconco nk'omugabe." 
Esther2:19 Kandi abaishiki, ku baateerainwe obwa kabiri, Morodekai akaba ashutami aha irembo ry'omugabe;" 
Esther2:20 (obwo Esteeri akaba atakagambaga beene waabo nari eihanga rye, nk'oku Morodekai yaabaire amwehanangiriize; ahabw'okuba Esteeri akaba ayorobera Morodekai, nk'oku yaabaire amworobera, naakimworora)." 
Esther2:21 Omu biro ebyo Morodekai ku yaabaire ashutami aha irembo ry'omugabe, abashaija babiri b'omu bakonwa b'omugabe, abaabaire barinda orwigi, Bigisaana na Tereshi, baagira ekiniga, baaza omu naama y'okwita omugabe Ahasuero." 
Esther2:22 Enaama yaabo yaamanywa Morodekai, yaagigambira omwigarire Esteeri, omwigarire yaagimugambirira omugabe." 
Esther2:23 Ku baabibuuriririize, baashanga biri kwo, abo bashaija bombi baahanikwa aha biti. Ekyo kyahandiikirwa omu maisho g'omugabe omu kitabo ky'ebyabaireho." 
Esther3:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo omugabe Ahasuero yaakuza Hamani mwene Hamedasa Omugagi, yaamugira omutegyeki mukuru, ekitebe kye yaakiha omwanya gw'ahaiguru okukira eby'abanyiginya bagyenzi be boona." 
Esther3:2 Abashaija b'omugabe boona, abaabaire batuura aha irembo ry'omugabe bakaba bamwinamira, bamutangirira; ahakuba omugabe nikwo yaabaire aragiire. Kwonka Morodekai we akaba atamwinamira, n'obu kwakuba okumutangirira." 
Esther3:3 Bwanyima abo bashiaja b'omugabe baabuuza Morodekai ogwo bati: Ahabw'enki noohenda ekiragiro ky'omugabe? 
Esther3:4 Baaguma nibamuteisa buri izooba, yaayanga kubahurira, nabo nikwo kubigambira Hamani, ngu bareebe ku araabe naikiriza ebya Morodekai; ahabw'okuba akaba naayetonganira ngu n'Omuyudaaya." 
Esther3:5 Hamani ku yaareebire Morodekai ataamwinamira, n'obu kwakuba okumutangirira, yaagira ekiniga kingi." 
Esther3:6 Kwonka yaareeba okukwata Morodekai wenka, ku kitaine mugasho; ahabw'okuba bakaba bamugambiire eihanga rya Morodekai. N'ahabw'ekyo yaasherura oburyo bw'okucwekyereza Abayudaaya boona, abaabaire bari omu bugabe bwona obwa Ahasuero, eihanga rya Morodekai." 
Esther3:7 Bwanyima omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ebiri ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Ahasuero, omu kwezi kw'okubanza okurikwetwa Nisani, baaragurisa Puuri, nikwo kuteera enteenyu, baaguma nibakikorera omu maisho ga Hamani buri izooba, ngu babone kumanya ekiro n'okwezi nibakuratanisa ebiro n'ameezi byona okuhitsya obu enteenyu yaakwatsire ekiro kya ikumi na bishatu ky'okwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri okurikwetwa Adari." 
Esther3:8 Bwanyima Hamani yaagambira omugabe Ahasuero ati: Hariho eihanga eyataataine rikajanjaara omu mashaza g'omu bugabe bwawe goona; ebiragiro byaryo tibiri nk'eby'agandi mahanga, kandi tibarikworobera biragiro by'omugabe; n'ahabw'ekyo tikiine ki kirikugasira omugabe kurigumisiririza." 
Esther3:9 Nyakusinga omugabe, ku oraabe nookisiima, hateebweho ekiragiro kihandiikwe, bacwekyerezibwe; nyowe niinyija kuha etalanta z'efeeza kakumi, zaakiirwe abarikureeberera omurimo gw'omugabe, bazite omu mabiikiro ge." 
Esther3:10 Atyo omugabe yaajuura empeta ya'kamanyiso ke, yaagiha Hamani mwene Hamedasa Omuagagi, omuzigu w'Abayudaaya." 
Esther3:11 Omugabe yaagira Hamani ati: Efeeza zaawe yegumire nazo, kandi eryo ihanga naarikuha, origire nk'oku orikwenda." 
Esther3:12 Bwanyima aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu ky'okwezi kw'okubanza abahandiiki b'omugabe baayetwa, baahandiika ebi Hamani yaaragiira byona, baabitwekyera abategyeki b'omugabe, n'abategyeki abaabaire nibatwara amashaza g'omu bugabe bwe bwona, n'abanyiginya b'amahanga goona, omuri buri ishaza omu mihandiikire yaaryo, n'omuri buri ihanga omu rurimi rwaryo. Baabihandiika omu iziina ry'omugabe Ahasuero, baataho akamanyiso k'empeta ye." 
Esther3:13 Ezo baruha zaatwarwa baamatarisi omu mashaza g'omugabe goona, nizigamba kucwekyereza, okwita n'okumaraho Abayudaaya boona, abato n'abakuru, abaana n'abakazi, aha izooba rimwe, aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu kw'okwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri okurikwetwa Adari, kandi n'okunyaga ebintu byabo;" 
Esther3:14 kandi ngu ebihandiikirwe omuri egyo baruha bishemereire kubugibwa omuri buri ishaza nk'ekiragiro, nibagambira amahanga goona kweteekatekyera eryo izooba." 
Esther3:15 Baamatarisi baagyenda nibeehuta ahabw'ekiragiro ky'omugabe, kandi ekyo kiragiro kyabugibwa omu rurembo rukuru Shushani. Omugabe na Hamani baashutama kwenywera, kwonka ab'omuri orwo rurembo Shushani baashoberwa." 
Esther4:1 Morodekai ku yaamanyire ebibaireho byona, yaataagura ebijwaro bye, yaajwara ebiguniya, yaayeshukyera eiju, yaashohora, yaaza omu rurembo ahagati, yaayamuza naataka n'eiraka rihango ry'obusaasi." 
Esther4:2 Bwanyima yaaza aha irembo ry'omugabe, ahabw'okuba tihariho waabaire naikirizibwa kutaaha omu kikaari ajwaire ebiguniya." 
Esther4:3 Kandi omu mashaza goona, ei ekiragiro ky'omugabe kyabaire kihika, Abayudaaya bagira amaganya maingi, beesiibyakwo, barira nibaborooga, kandi abaingi omuribo babyama ahansi aha biguniya n'omu iju." 
Esther4:4 Bwanyima abazaana ba'omwigarire Esteeri, n'abakonwa be, baija, baabimugambira; yaagira obusaasi bwingi; yaayoherereza Morodekai ebijwaro by'okujwara, ngu ajure ebiguniya; kwonak we yaabyanga." 
Esther4:5 Bwanyima Esteeri yaatuma kweta Hasaki, omwe aha bakonwa b'omugabe, ou omugabe yaabaire ataireho kumuheereza, yaamuragiira kuza ahari Morodekai kumubuuza ebibaireho n'ekibireetsire." 
Esther4:6 Atyo Hasaki yaagyenda, yaashanga Morodekai omu kibuga ky'orurembo, omu kangara-teete omu maisho g'eirembo ry'omugabe." 
Esther4:7 Morodekai yaamuteekyerereza ebimubaireho byona, n'omubaro gw'empiiha zoona ezi Hamani araganiise kuta omu ibiikiro ry'omugabe, ahabw'okucwekyereza Abayudaaya." 
Esther4:8 Kandi yaamuha ebigambo ebihandiikirwe omu kiragiro ekibugiibwe omuri Shushani, eky'okubacwekyereza, ngu abyorekye Esteeri, abimushobororere, amwehanangirize kuza aha mugabe kumweshengyereza n'okumushaba kukiza eihanga rye."
