Esther4:9 Hasaki yaagaruka ahari Esteeri, yaamugambira obutumwa bwa Morodekai." 
Esther4:10 Bwanyima Esteeri yaagaruka yaatuma Hasaki ahari Morodekai naamugira ati: 
Esther4:11 Abaheereza b'omugabe boona, n'abantu b'omu mashaza ge nibamanya ngu omuntu weena, yaaba mushaija nari omukazi, orikuza ow'omugabe omu kikaari ky'omunda ateetsirewe, hariho ekiragiro kimwe aha muntu nk'ogwo, nikwo kwitwa, kureka ou omugabe yaimukiza enkoni ye ey'ezaabu, ngu arekye kufa. Kandi naanye hahingwire ebiro makumi ashatu nteetsirwe kushanga omugabe." 
Esther4:12 Baagambira Morodekai ebigambo bya Esteeri. 
Esther4:13 Atyo Morodekai yaabagambira kugarukamu Esteeri bati: Otateekateeka ngu noija kuhonoka aha bandi Bayudaaya boona, ngu ahabw'okuba ori omuri nyaruju y'omugabe." 
Esther4:14 Omanye ngu, ku oraahuname omu biro ebi, eky'okuhuumuriza n'okukiza Abayudaaya nikiija kureetwa ahandi, kwonak iwe n'enju ya sho muryacwekyerera. N'oha orikumanya ekyakutaire aha ngoma, ku kutari kuhwera omu bunaku bw'akabi nk'obu?" 
Esther4:15 Esteeri nawe yaabaragiira kugarukamu Morodekai ati: 
Esther4:16 Gyenda oteeranire hamwe Abayudaaya boona abari omu rurembo Shushani, mwesiibyekwo ahabwangye, mumare ebiro bishatu nyomushana na nyekiro, mutarikurya n'obu kwakuba okunywa. Naanye n'abazaana bangye twaza kwesiibyakwo nkaimwe. Bwanyima y'ebyo niinyija kuza ow'omugabe, n'obu kirabe kitari ky'ebiragiro; ku ndaabe ningwayo, ngweyo." 
Esther4:17 Atyo Morodekai yaayegyendera, yaakora ebi Esteeri yaamuragiira byona." 
Esther5:1 Aha kiro kya kashatu Esteeri yaajwara ebijwaro bye by'obwigarire, yaaza omu kibuga ky'omugabe eky'omunda, yaayemerera aharikureebana n'enju y'omugabe; kandi omugabe akaba ashutami aha kitebe ky'obugabe omuri nyaruju ye, aharikureebana n'eirembo eririkutaaha omu kibuga." 
Esther5:2 Omugabe ku yaarebire omwigarire Esteeri ayemereire omu kibuga, yaamushemerererwa, yaamwimukiza enkoni y'ezaabu eyaabaire eri omu ngaro ze. Atyo Esteeri yairira haihi, yaakora aha ifundo ryayo." 
Esther5:3 Omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Omwigarire Esteeri, oine eki orikwenda? Nooshaba ki? Eki orikushaba kyona ninkikuha, n'obu kyakuba ekicweka ky'obugabe bwangye." 
Esther5:4 Esteeri yaagira ati: Nyakusinga omguabe, ku oraabe nookisiima, eri izooba oije na Hamani aha bugyenyi obu nkuteekateekyeire." 
Esther5:5 Omugabe yaagira ati: Nimwete Hamani juba, eki Esteeri arikwenda kikorwe. Atyo omugabe na Hamani baija aha bugyenyi obu Esteeri yaabaire abateekateekyeire." 
Esther5:6 Ku baabaire nibanywa viinyo, omugabe yaamugira ati: N'enki, Omwigarire Esteeri? nooshaba ki, okakiheebwa? Noija kukiheebwa, n'obu kiraabe ekicweka ky'obugabe bwangye." 
Esther5:7 Esteeri yaamugarukamu ati: Eki ndikushaba, kandi eki ndikwenda nikyo eki." 
Esther5:8 Ku ndaabe ndi ow'okugirirwa embabazi omu maisho g'omugabe, kandi omugabe ku araaba naakisiima kumpa eki ndikushaba, n'okuhikiiriza eki ndikwenda, omugabe na Hamani bagarukye nyencakare aha bugyenyi obu ndaabateekateekyere; obwo nibwo ndaakore eki omugabe yaagamba." 
Esther5:9 Eryo izooba Hamani yaashohora ashemereirwe kandi ananukire. Ku yaareebire Morodekai ari omu irembo ry'omugabe ataamwimukira n'obu kwakuba kumuhigiza, yaamugirira ekiniga kingi." 
Esther5:10 Kwonka yaagumisiriza, yaataaha omuka, yaatuma kweta banywani be n'omukazi we Zereshi;" 
Esther5:11 yaabagambira ekitiinisa eki aine ahabw'obutungi bwe, abaana be ku bari baingi, na byona ebi omugabe amukurizemu, akamutunguura okukira abanyiginya n'abandi bagaragwa be." 
Esther5:12 Kandi Hamani yaagaruka yaagira ati: Nangwa n'omwigarire Esteeri tiyaayeta ondiijo kwija n'omugabe aha bugyenyi kureka nyowe nyenka. Kandi na hati yaanyeta n'omugabe aha bugyenyi nyencakare. 
Esther5:13 Kwonka ebyo byona tibiine ki birikungasira, ninkireeba ogwo Muyudaaya Morodekai ashutami omu irembo ry'omugabe." 
Esther5:14 Bwanyima Zereshi omukazi we n'abanywani be boona baamugira bati: Ka bakore ekiti ky'oburaingwa bwa mikono makumi ataano, kibyarwe; omu kasheeshe ogambire omugabe, bakihanikyeho Morodekai, obone kuza aha bugyenyi n'omugabe oshemereirwe. Egyo naama yaashemeza Hamani; yaabyara ekyo kiti." 
Esther6:1 Ekyo kiro omugabe yaabura oturo; yaaragiira ku bamureetera ekitabo ekirikwijutsya ebyabaireho, baakimushomera." 
Esther6:2 Baashanga kihandiikirwemu, ku Morodekai niwe yaaregire abashaija babiri b'omu bakonwa b'omugabe, abaabaire barinda omuryango gw'enju ye, Bigisaana na Tereshi, abaabaire nibenda kwita omugabe Ahasuero." 
Esther6:3 Omugabe yaabuuza ati: Beitu Morodekai ogwo hariho ekitiinisa nari obukuru, ebi arahairwe, nibamuzimuurira ekyo eki yaakozire? Abagaragwa b'omugabe abaabaire nibamuheereza, baagarukamu bati: Taine ki arakoreirwe." 
Esther6:4 Omugabe yaababuuza ati: N'oha ori omu kibuga? Kandi Hamani akaba yaahika ati omu kibuga eky'aheeru ky'ekikaari ky'omugabe, naaza kumugambira eby'okuhanika Morodekai ahari ekyo kiti, eki yaabaire amuteekateekyeire." 
Esther6:5 Batyo abagaragwa b'omugabe baamugira bati: Hamani niwe ayemereire omu kibuga, Nyakusinga. Omugabe yaagira ati: Mumurekye aije." 
Esther6:6 Atyo Hamani yaija; omugabe yaamugira ati: Tukorere ki omushaija ou omugabe arikusiima kuha ekitiinisa? Hamani yaagira omu mutima gwe ati: Ni muntu ki ogwo, ou omugabe arikusiima kuha ekitiinisa kukira nyowe?" 
Esther6:7 Hamani nikwo kugarukamu omugabe ati: Omushaija ou omugabe arikusiima kuha ekitiinisa," 
Esther6:8 ka bareete bushuuti y'omugabe, ei omugabe ajwara, bareete n'embaraasi ei omugabe atemba, eine ekirunga ky'obugabe aha mutwe;" 
Esther6:9 ebyo bijwaro n'egyo mbaraasi babikwatse omwe aha banyiginya b'omugabe abarikweshumba abandi, aije ajwekye ogwo mushaija ou omugabe arikusiima kuha ekitiinisa, amutembye embaraasi, amurabye omu kibuga kihango ky'orurembo amwebebembeire, naaranga ati: Oku nikwo omushaija weena araatwazibwe ou omugabe araasiime kuha ekitiinisa." 
Esther6:10 Ahonaaho omugabe yaagira Hamani ati: Rahuka oreete ebijwaro n'embaraasi, nk'oku waagamba, otwaze otyo Morodekai Omuyudaaya, oshutama aha irembo ry'omugabe. Otagira eki waatsiga ahari ebyo byona ebi waagamba." 
Esther6:11 Atyo Hamani yaihayo bushuuti n'embaraasi, yaajweka Morodekai, yaamurabya omu kibuga kihango ky'orurembo, naaranga ati: Oku nikwo omushaija weena aritwazibwa ou omugabe arisiima kuha ekitiinisa." 
Esther6:12 Bwanyima Morodekai yaagaruka aha irembo ry'omugabe; kwonka Hamani yaayehuuta, yaataaha owe ayetwekyereire aha mutwe naarira." 
Esther6:13 Yaateekyerereza omukazi we Zereshi na banywani be boona ebyamubaho. Abahi be b'obwengye n'omukazi we Zereshi baamugira bati: Morodekai ogwo, ou waatandiak kufoobeera omu maisho ge, ku araabe ari ow'omu ihanga ry'Abayudaaya, torimubaasa, kureka noija kugwa omu maisho ge." 
Esther6:14 Ku baabaire nibakigamba nawe, abakonwa b'omugabe baija, baatwara Hamani aha bugyenyi obu Esteeri yaabaire ateekire nibeehuuta." 
Esther7:1 Batyo omugabe na Hamani baaza aha bugyenyi kurya n'omwigarire Esteeri. 
Esther7:2 Ahari ekyo kiro kya kabiri, ku baabaire nibanywa viinyo, omugabe yaagaruka yaabuuza Esteeri ati: Hari omwigarire Esteeri, nooshaba ki? noija kukiheebwa. N'enki eki orikwenda? Eki oraashabe kyona, n'obu kiraabe kiri ekicweka ky'obugabe bwangye, nikiija kuhikiirizibwa." 
Esther7:3 Omwigarire Esteeri yaagarukamu ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, ku ndaabe ndi ow'okugirirwa embabazi omu maisho gaawe, kandi ku oraabe nookisiima, ninkushaba amagara gangye, kandi ninkweshengyereza ahabwa beene waitu;" 
Esther7:4 ahabw'okuba nyowe eihanga ryaitu, tuguzirwe ngu twitwe, tucwekyerezibwe, tumarweho. Nangwa kuri tuguzirwe ngu tube abahuuku n'abazaana, tiinyine ki naakugambire, n'obu omuzigu waitu atakubaasize kuriha ebi omugabe yaakufeereirwe." 
Esther7:5 Ahonaaho omugabe Ahaseuro yaabuuza omwigarire Esteeri ati: N'oha oyehangire kukora ekyo, kandi arahi?" 
Esther7:6 Esteeri yaagarukamu ati: Omuzigu waitu orikuturwanisa n'eri ihano Hamani. Hamani yaatetemera omu maisho g'omugabe n'omwigarire. 
Esther7:7 Ahonaaho omugabe yaimuka, yaaruga aha bugyenyi asambisiirwe, yaashohora, yaaza omu musiri gw'ekikaari; kwonka Hamani yaimuka kushaba omwigarire ngu ataitwa; ahabw'okuba akareeba ku omugabe amaririire kumukora kubi." 
Esther7:8 Bwanyima omugabe yaagaruka naaruga omu musiri gw'ekikaari, yaataaha omu kishengye omu baabaire nibanywera viinyo, yaashanga Hamani ajuumaire aha kitabo ahu Esteeri yaabaire ari; omugabe yaagira ati: Kandi yaaza kuhambira omwigarire omu maisho gangye omu nju yangye? Ebigambo ebyo ku byarugire biti omu kwnwa k'omugabe, abantu baashweka Hamani ahamaisho." 
Esther7:9 Bwanyima Harabona, omwe aha bakonwa abaabaire nibaheereza omugabe, yaagira ati: Manya, omu kibuga kya Hamani habyairwemu ekiti kiraingwa kya mikono makumi ataano, eki Hamani ateekateekire kuhanikaho Morodekai, owaagambire ekigambo ky'okukiza omugabe." 
Esther7:10 Omugabe nikwo kuragiira ati: Mube nikyo mwamuhanikaho. Batyo baahanika Hamani aha kiti eki yaabaire ateekateekyeire Morodekai. Okuruga aho ekiniga ky'omugabe kyaikaikana. 
Esther8:1 Eryo izooba omugabe Ahasuero yaaha omwigarire Esteeri enju ya Hamani omuzigu w'Abayudaaya. Kandi Morodekai yaija omu maisho g'omugabe, ahabw'okuba Esteeri akaba agambire oku ari nawe." 
Esther8:2 Omugabe yaajuura empeta y'akamanyiso ke ei ayakire Hamani, yaagiha Morodekai. Na Esteeri yaataho Morodekai kutegyeka enju ya Hamani." 
Esther8:3 Bwanyima Esteeri yaagaruka yaagamba n'omugabe; yaamukwata amaguru, yaamweshengyereza naarira, ngu amareho enaama mbi ya Hamani Omuagagi, n'obwengye obu yaabaire acwire kucwekyereza Abayudaaya." 
Esther8:4 Omugabe yaimukiza Esteeri enkoni ye y'ezaabu," 
Esther8:5 Esteeri yaimuka, yaayemerera omu maisho ge, yaagira ati: Omugabe ku araabe naakisiima akanshemerererwa, n'ebi ndaagambe bikamugwisa gye, kandi nkaba orikumushemeza, nimmweshengyereza, ku bahandiika ebaruha y'okuhindura busha ezi Hamani mwene Hamedasa Omuagagi yaahandiikire kucwekyereza Abayudaaya abari omu mashaza g'omugabe goona." 
Esther8:6 Mbwenu nimbaasa nta kugumisiririza akabai akarihika aha ihanga ryaitu? Nari shi nimbaasa nta kugumisiririza aokureeba beene waitu nibacwekyerezibwa? 
Esther8:7 Omugabe Ahasuero yaagarukamu omwigarire Esteeri na Morodekai Omuyudaaya ati: Reeba, mpaire Esteeri enju ya Hamani, kandi Hamani bamuhanikire aha kti nimmutura okubangira Abayudaaya omukono." 
Esther8:8 N'ahabw'ekyo naimwe muhandiikire Abayudaaya, nk'oku murikwenda, omu iziina ry'omugabe, muteho akamanyiso k'empeta ye; ahabw'okuba ekiragiro ekihandiikirwe omu iziina ry'omguabe, kikaamibwa akamanyiso k'empeta ye, tihariho muntu orikubaasa kukiihaho." 
Esther8:9 Batyo omu bunaku obwo, aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bishatu omu kwezi kwa kashatu okurikwetwa Sivani, abahandiiki b'omugabe baayetwa, baahandiika ebi Morodekai aragiire aha by'Abayudaaya byona, baabitwekyera abategyeki b'omugabe, n'abandi bategyeki, n'abanyiginya b'omu mashaza goona, oku gari igana na makumi abiri na mushanju, okuruga Buhindi okuhika Esiopia, buri ishaza ryona nk'emihandiikire yaaryo oku yaabaire eri, na buri ihanga omu rurimi rwaryo; baabihandiikira n'Abayudaaya omu mihandiikire yaabo n'omu rurimi rwabo." 
Esther8:10 Ebyo byona Morodekai yaabihandiika omu iziina ry'omugabe, yaabihamisa akamanyiso k'empeta y'omugabe, ebaruha yaazikwatsa baamatarisi, abaabaire bagyendera aha mbaraasi ezirikwiruka munonga, ezaabaire zizaaziibwe omu masho g'omugabe, nizikora emirimo ye." 
Esther8:11 Omuri ezo baruha omugabe yaikiriza Abayudaaya b'omu ndembo zoona, ngu bateeranire hamwe, beerwaneho bahamire, babone kwita n'okucwekyereza n'okumaraho engabo zoona z'eihanga ryona nari ez'eishaza ryona, eziribateera, baite n'abaana baabo abato n'abakazi baabo, kandi banyagye ebintu byabo;" 
Esther8:12 kandi ngu ebyo byona bikorerwe aha izooba rimwe, aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu omu kwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri okurikwetwa Adari, omu mashaza goona ag'omugabe Ahasuero;" 
Esther8:13 kandi ngu ebihandiikirwe omuri ezo baruha bibugibwe nk'ekiragiro omuri buri ishaza, kandi birangwe omu mahanga goona, nibimanyisa Abayudaaya ku bashemereire kweteekateeka kwerwanaho ahari eryo izooba, nibahoora abazigu baabo." 
Esther8:14 Batyo baamatarisi baatemba embaraasi ezirikwiruka munonga, ezaabaire zikora emirimo y'omugabe, baashohora nibeehuuta, nibagyemwa ekiragiro ky'omugabe. Kandi ekyo kiragiro kyabugibwa omu rurembo Shushani." 
Esther8:15 Bwanyima Morodekai yaaruga omu maisho g'omugabe, yaashohora ajwaire bushuuti y'omugabe eya bururu kandi erikwera, ajwaire ekirunga kihango ky'ezaabu, kandi anagiire omunagiro gwa bafuta na bujwa; batyo ab'omu rurembo Shushani baateera akaari baashemererwa." 
Esther8:16 N'Abayudaaya baajwerwa omushana, baatunga okushemererwa n'okwesiima n'ekitiinisa." 
Esther8:17 Kandi omuri buri ishaza n'omu buri rurembo ahu ekiragiro ky'omugabe n'ekihandiiko kye byabaire bihika, Abayudaaya bakaba bashemererwa, beesiima, baagira obugyenyi n'ekiro kikuru ky'okuhuumuriraho. Baingi omu mahanga g'omuri egyo nsi baayehindura Abayudaaya, ahabw'okuba Abayudaaya bakabatiinisa." 
Esther9:1 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu ky'okwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri okurikwetwa Adari, ekiragiro ky'omugabe n'ekihandiiko kye bikaba nibyenda kuhikiirizibwa. Eryo izooba niryo abazigu b'Abayudaaya baabaire nibagira ngu nibaija kugira obushoboorozi aha Bayudaaya, kwonak kyahinduka, Abayudaaya baaba nibo baabugira aha bazigu baabo." 
Esther9:2 Batyo Abayudaaya baateeranira omu ndembo zaabo z'omu mashaza g'omugabe Ahasuero goona, kukwata abaabaire nibenda kubakora kubi. Tihariho muntu n'omwe owaabaire naabaasa kubaza omu kaso, ahabw'okuba amahanga goona gakaba gabatiinire." 
Esther9:3 Kandi abategyeki ba'amshaza boona, n'abategyeki b'omugabe n'abandi bategyeki, n'abatware b'omu kikaari ky'omugabe, baaha Abayudaaya emikono, ahabw'okuba nabo bakaba batiinire Morodekai." 
Esther9:4 Morodekai ogwo akaba ahindukire rugambwa omu ka y'omugabe, kandi okurangaanwa kwe kubugire omu mashaza goona; ahabw'okuba akaguma naayeyongyera kuhama." 
Esther9:5 Batyo Abayudaaya baitsa abazigu baabo rurara, baabacwekyereza, baabamaraho; abaabaire nibabanga, baabagira nk'oku barikwenda." 
Esther9:6 Omu rurembo rukuru Shushani Abayudaaya baitamu abashaija magana ataano, baabamaraho;" 
Esther9:7 kandi baita na Parishanidasa, Dalifooni, Asipaasa," 
Esther9:8 poraasa, Adalia, Aridasa," 
Esther9:9 Parimashiita, Arisai, Aridai na Vaizaasa," 
Esther9:10 boona ikumi beene Hamani mwene Hamedasa, omuzigu w'Abayudaaya; kwonka tibaagira ki baanyaga." 
Esther9:11 Eryo izooba omubaro gw'abaitwa omu rurembo rukuru Shushani gwagambirwa omugabe. 
Esther9:12 Omugabe yaagira omwigarire Esteeri ati: Abayudaaya baita abashaija magana ataano omu rurembo Shushani, baabamaraho; baita na beene Hamani ikumi. Mbwenu noogira ngu omu gandi mashaza g'omu bugabe bakozire ebirikwingana ki? Hariho ekindi eki orikushaba, okakiheebwa? nari hariho ekindi eki orikwenda, ngu kihikiirizibwe?" 
Esther9:13 Esteeri yaamugarukamu ati: Omugabe ku araabe naasiima, aikirize Abayudaaya abari omuri Shushani nyencakare batwaze nk'ekiragiro ky'eri izooba oku yaba; kandi beene Hamani abo, oku bari ikumi, bahanikwe aha biti." 
Esther9:14 Atyo omugabe yaaragiira ku kiba kityo; ekiragiro kyabugibwa omuri Shushani, na beene Hamani oku bari ikumi baahanikwa." 
Esther9:15 Ku bwaseesire aha kiro kya ikumi na bina ky'okwezi Adari, Abayudaaya abaabaire bari omuri Shushani baateeranira hamwe, baita abashaija magana ashatu, kwonka nabwo tibaagira ki baanyaga." 
Esther9:16 N'bandi Bayudaaya b'omu mashaza g'omugabe baateeranira hamwe, baayerwanaho, baita omu bazigu baabo abantu obukumi mushanju n'enkumi itaano, baahuumura ahabw'abazigu baabo, kandi nabwo tibaagira ki baanyaga." 
Esther9:17 Okwo nikwo byabaire aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu ky'okwezi Adari; aha kiro kya ikumi na bina baahuumura, baakigira ekiro kikuru ky'obugyenyi ky'okuriira hamwe n'okushemererwa." 
Esther9:18 Kwonka Abayudaaya ab'omuri Shushani baateeranira hamwe aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu n'ekya ikumi na bina eby'okwo kwezi; bwanyima aha kya ikumi na bitaano baahuumura, baakigira ekiro kikuru ky'obugyenyi ky'okuriira hamwe n'okushemererwa." 
Esther9:19 Nikyo Abayudaaya ab'omu byaro, abatuura omuri tauni ezitaine ngo z'amabaare, baijukira ekiro kya ikumi na bina ky'okwezi Adari, bakakigira eizooba ry'okushemerererwaho n'okuriira hamwe, n'eizooba rirungi ry'okutwekyereraniraho eby'okurya." 
Esther9:20 Bwanyima Morodekai yaahandiika ebyo byona, kandi yaahandiika n'ebaruha, yaazitwekyera Abayudaaya boona, abaabaire bari omu mashaza g'omugabe Ahasuero goona, aba haihi n'aba hare," 
Esther9:21 naabeehangiriza kwijuka ekiro kya ikumi na bina n'ekya ikumi na bitaano eby'okwezi Adari, kubigira ebiro bikuru buri mwaka;" 
Esther9:22 ahabw'okuba ahari ebyo biro nibwo Abayudaaya baahuumura abazigu baabo, kandi okwo kwezi nikwo kwababeereire okw'okushemererwa omu mwanya gw'obusaasi, kukaba okw'okuhuumuriramu omu mwanya gw'okuganya; kandi yaabaragiira ku babigira ebiro by'okuriira hamwe n'okushemererwa, n'eby'okutwekyereraniraho eby'okurya, n'okuha abooro ebiconco." 
Esther9:23 Batyo Abayudaaya baaragaana ku bariguma nibabitwaza nk'oku baabitandika, kandi nk'oku Morodekai abahandiikiire." 
Esther9:24 Ahabw'okuba Hamani mwene Hamedasa Omuagagi, omuzigu w'Abayudaaya boona, akaba abagiriire enaama y'okubacwekyereza, kandi akaba aragwize enteenyu ezirikwetwa Puuri, kubasingyeera n'okubamaraho;" 
Esther9:25 kwonka egyo naama ku yaahikire aha mugabe, omugabe yaaragiirira omu baruha ati: Egyo naama mbi y'okwita Abayudaaya ebe niwe yaagarukana, kandi ngu we n'abatabani bahanikwe aha biti." 
Esther9:26 Nikyo ebyo biro babyetera Purimu, nibagyeterera Puuri. N'ahabw'ekyo ahabw'ebyahandiikirwe omuri egyo baruha, n'ebi Abayudaaya bareebire omuri ako kabi, kandi n'ebyabahikireho," 
Esther9:27 bakaragiira, kandi baaragaana ahabwabo n'ahaba baijukuru baabo, n'ahabwa boona abaakwataniise nabo, ku batarireka kwijuka ebyo biro bibiri, nk'ekihandiiko kyabyo oku kyabaire kiri, n'obunaku bwabyo obwataireho buri mwaka." 
Esther9:28 Kandi baragiira ngu, omu miryango yoona, n'omuri buri ishaza, n'omuri buri rurembo bagume baijukye ebyo biro, babigire ebiro bikuru omu busingye bwona, kandi ngu ebyo biro bya Purimu, bitarihugwaho omu Bayudaaya, nari ekiijutsyo kyabyo okweba omu ruzaro rwabo." 
Esther9:29 Bwanyima omwigarire Esteeri, muhara wa Abihaili, na Morodeaki Omuyudaaya, baahandiika n'obushoboorozi nibahamya egyo baruha ya kabiri eya Purimu." 
Esther9:30 Ebaruha zaatwekyerwa Abayudaaya boona ab'omu mashaza igana na makumi abiri na mushanju ag'omu bugabe bwa Ahasuero, ezabaire zirimu ebigambo by'obusingye n'amazima;" 
Esther9:31 ngu zibone kuhamya ebyo biro bikuru bya Purimu omu bunaku obutairweho, nk'oku Morodekai Omuyudaaya n'omwigarire Esteeri baabiragiire Abayudaaya, bakabiragaana ahabwabo n'oruzaaro rwabo, eby'okwesiibyakwo n'amaganya gaabo." 
Esther9:32 Kityo ekiragiro ky'omwigarire Esteeri kyahamya egyo migyenzo ya Purimu, kyahandiikwa n'omu kitabo." 
Esther10:1 Bwanyima omugabe Ahasuero yaacwera ensi n'ebirwa by'omu mayanja omushoro. 
Esther10:2 Mbwenu emirimo yoona ei yaakozire n'obushoboorozi bwe n'amaani ge, n'ebirikworeka ekitiinisa eki yaahaire Morodekai, akaba omuntu rugambwa, tibihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Bumeedi na Buperisi?" 
Esther10:3 Ahabw'okuba ogwo Muyudaaya Morodekai niwe yaabaire ari owa kabiri aha mugabe Ahasuero; kandi akaba ari rugambwa omu Bayudaaya, naasiimwa beene waabo boona, ahabw'okuba akaba asherurira eihanga rye eby'okurikiza, kandi n'okwendeza abantu be obusingye." 
Job1:1 Omu nsi ya Uuzi hakaba harimu omushaija orikwetwa Yobu; ogwo mushaija akaba ari omuntu otaine kabara, kandi ohikiriire, owaabaire atiina Ruhanga, akeetantara ekibi." 
Job1:2 Akazaara aboojo mushanju n'abaishiki bashatu. 
Job1:3 Kandi akaba atungire entaama enkumi mushanju, engamira enkumi ishatu, enimi z'okuhingisa rukumi, ebuguma z'endogoya magana ataano, n'abahuuku baingi munonga. N'ahabw'ekyo ogwo mushaija akaba ari omushaija rugambwa orikukira abashaija boona ab'omu nsi z'oburugwa-izooba." 
Job1:4 Kandi abatabani bakaba bakunda kuriira obugyenyi omu nju ya buri omwe aha izooba rye, kandi batuma ahari banyaanyabo bonshatu kwija kurya n'okunywa nabo." 
Job1:5 Bwanyima ebiro byabo eby'obugyenyi bikihwa, Yobu abatumaho kubeeza, aimuka kare omu kasheeshe, atamba ebitambo by'okwotsya ebirikwingana n'omubaro gwabo boona; ahabw'okuba Yobu akaba agira ati: Obundi abaana bangye bakaaba basiisire, bahemukire ahari Ruhanga omu mitima yaabo. Okwo nikwo Yobu yaabaire atwaza obutoosha." 
Job1:6 Eizooba rimwe abaana ba Ruhanga bakaija kwemurika ahari MUKAMA, na Sitaane yaabaijamu." 
Job1:7 MUKAMA yaabuuza Sitaane ati: Nooruga hi? Sitaane yaamugarukamu ati: Ninduga kugyendagyenda omu nsi, n'okugizengyereramu." 
Job1:8 MUKAMA yaagaruka yaamubuuza ati: Ebyo waayetegyereza omwiru wangye Yobu, ku hataine mushaija orikumushusha omu nsi, ku ataine kabara kandi ku ahikiriire, omushaija orikuntiina, kandi orikwetantara ekibi?" 
Job1:9 Sitaane yaagarukamu MUKAMA ati: Noogira ngu Yobu akutiinira busha? 
Job1:10 Tiiwe omurinda embaju zoona, we n'enju ye n'ebi atungire byona? Okaha omugisha ebi yaakozire n'emikono ye, kandi waakanyisa ebi atungire byona." 
Job1:11 Kwonka hati gorora omukono gwawe, okore aha bintu bye byona; naija kukwehakana butunu." 
Job1:12 MUKAMA yaagira Sitaane ati: Reeba, ebi atungire byona biri omu bushoboorozi bwawe; kwonka we, otamukoraho. Atyo Sitaane yaaruga omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Job1:13 Eizooba rimwe abatabani na bahara be bakaba nibarya nibanywera viinyo omu nju ya mukuru waabo; 
Job1:14 entumwa yaija ahari Yobu, yaamubikira eti: Enimi zaaba nizihinga, n'endogoya niziriira aha rubaju rwazo;" 
Job1:15 ahonaaho aba Sabeya baazeeshukamu, baazinyaga, n'abariisa baazo baabaitsa rurara; niinye nyenka owaahonokaho, nkaija kubikubikira." 
Job1:16 Ku yaabaire naakigamba, endiijo ntumwa yaija, yaagira eti: Omuriro gwa Ruhanga gwaruga omu iguru, gwayotsya entaama n'abariisa baazo, gwabicwekyereza; niinye nyenka owaahonokaho, nkaija kubikubikira." 
Job1:17 Nawe ku yaabaire naakigamba, haija ondiijo, yaagira ati: Abakaludaaya baija omu mitwe eshatu, baayeshuka omu ngamira, baazinyaga, n'abariisa baazo baabaitsa rurara; niinye nyenka owaahonokaho, nkaija kubikubikira." 
Job1:18 N'ogwo ku yaabaire naakigamba, haija ondiijo, yaagira ati: Batabani baawe na bahara baawe baaba nibarya, nibanywera viinyo omu nju ya mukuru waabo;" 
Job1:19 omuyaga gw'amaani gwareetwa omu ihamba, gwateera embaju ina z'enju, enju yaagwera abo batsigazi, baafa; niinye nyenka owaahonokaho, nkaija kubikubikira." 
Job1:20 Yobu, ku yaabihuriire, yaimuka, yaataagura ekijwaro kye, yaamwa eishokye rye, yaajuumara ahansi, yaaramya, naagira ati:" 
Job1:21 Nkaruga omu nda ya maawe ntaine ki njwaire, kandi nikwo ndigarukayo ntyo. MUKAMA akampa, mbwenu abiinyihireho. Eiziina rya MUKAMA risiimwe!" 
Job1:22 Omuri ebyo byona Yobu tarakozire kibi, n'obu kwakuba okubarira Ruhanga okushobya." 
Job2:1 Kandi aha izooba erindi abaana ba Ruhanga bakaija kwemurika ahari MUKAMA, na Sitaane yaabaijamu ngu nawe ayemurikye ahari MUKAMA." 
Job2:2 MUKAMA yaabuuza Sitaane ati: Nooruga hi? Sitaane yaamugarukamu ati: Ninduga kugyendagyenda omu nsi, n'okugizengyereramu." 
Job2:3 MUKAMA yaagaruka yaabuuza Sitaane ati: Ebyo oyetegyereize omwiru wangye Yobu, ku hataine mushaija orikumushusha omu nsi, ku ataine kabara, kandi ku ahikiriire, omushaija orinkutiina akeetantara ekibi? Na mbwenu, n'obu oraabe wandeeteire kumukora kubi, n'okumucwekyereza nimmutura busha, kwonka akihamiire aha kuhikiirira kwe." 
Job2:4 Sitaane yaamugarukamu ati: Amagara gakira amagana. Ebi omuntu atungire byona, akaabihayo ahaw'amagara ge." 
Job2:5 Kwonka mbwenu gorora omukono gwawe, okore aha magufa ge n'aha mubiri gwe, naija kukwehakana butunu." 
Job2:6 MUKAMA yaagira Sitaane ati: Reeba, ari omu bushoboorozi bwawe; kwonka otamwita." 
Job2:7 Atyo Sitaane yaaruga omu maisho ga MUKAMA, yaarwaza Yobu ebihuute bibi, okuruga aha mara g'ebigyere okuhika aha kazingiro k'eishokye." 
Job2:8 Yobu yaayesherurira orugusyo rw'okweyaguza, yaashutama omu iju." 
Job2:9 Bwanyima omukazi we yaamugira ati: Beitu na hati okuhamiire aha kuhikiirira kwawe? Yehakane Ruhanga, ofe." 
Job2:10 Kwonka we yaamugarukamu ati: Noogamba nk'omukazi omushema. Noogira ngu turyaheebwa ebirungi byonka omu mikono ya Ruhanga, tituriheebwa n'ebibi? Omuri ebyo byona Yobu taracumwire na rurimi rwe." 
Job2:11 Bwanyima banywani ba Yobu bashatu, ku baahuriire ezo naku zoona ezimuhikireho, baija, buri muntu naaruga owe, Elifaazi Omutemaani, Biludaadi Omushuuhi, na Zofari Omunaamasi. Baaragaana kwija kumuyaagira n'okumugumya." 
Job2:12 Ku baamureebire bakiri hare, baamwebwa, baimutsya amaraka gaabo, baarira; baataagura ebijwaro byabo, baayeshuka eiju omu mutwe, kandi baarimiisha n'ahaiguru." 
Job2:13 Bwanyima baashutama nawe ahansi okumara ebiro mushanju nyomushana na nyekiro; tihaagira n'omwe owaamugambira ekigambo, ahabw'okureeba obusaasi bwe burengyesereize." 
Job3:1 Bwanyima y'byo Yobu yaayashamya akanwa ke, yaagamba, yaakyeena eizooba eri yaazaariirweho," 
Job3:2 naagira ati: 
Job3:3 Nkaahenwa ki, eizooba eri naazaariirweho ricwekyerezibwa, N'ekiro eki baagambiireho ngu, Maawe abakira enda y'omwana w'omwojo." 
Job3:4 Eryo izooba rihinduka omwirima! Ruhanga ow'ahaiguru areka kuryetaho, Kandi rireka kujwerwa omushana;" 
Job3:5 Omwirima n'ekibunda kya rufu birihindura eryabyo, Ebicu birikondakondera, Obwira-kabiri bwona buritiinisa," 
Job3:6 Ekyo kiro kikwatwa omwirima ndindindi, Kireka kushemererwa omu biro by'omwaka, N'obu kwakuba okubarirwa omu gandi meezi;" 
Job3:7 Eego, ekyo kiro kiba engumba, Kireka kuhurirwamu akaari k'okushemererwa;" 
Job3:8 Rikyeenwa abakyeena ebiro, Abarikumanya kwimutsya Leviasaani;" 
Job3:9 Enyonyoozi z'omu buturuturu bwaryo zireka kujwa, Ritegyereza omushana, guriburira, Kandi ribura kureeba okujuguta kw'omushekye;" 
Job3:10 Ahabw'okuba tiriragaize nda ya maawe, N'obu kwakuba okuzibira amaisho gangye kureeba obusaasi." 
Job3:11 Ahabw'enki ntarafiire ninzaarwa, Nkabura kwitsya ninkishohora nti?" 
Job3:12 Ahabw'enki naashangire ebibero by'okukiikirwaho, N'amabeere g'okwonka?" 
Job3:13 Kuri kyabaire kityo, nkaabaire mbyami, mpunami; Nkaabaire ngwejegyeire, nyehuumuriire," 
Job3:14 Ndi hamwe n'abagabe b'ensi n'abahi b'obwengye baabo, Abaayeyombekyeire ebituuro by'ekitiinisa by'okuziikwamu;" 
Job3:15 Nari shi, n'abanyiginya abaabaire baine ezaabu, Baijwize amaka gaabo efeeza." 
Job3:16 Kuri naabaire nk'enda erugamu etamanyirwe, Nk'abeereere abatarareebire mushana;" 
Job3:17 Okwo niyo abasiisi baba batakiitira kubi bantu, Kandi niyo abaruhire baruhuukira." 
Job3:18 Niyo enkwatwa zihuumurira hamwe, zituurize, Zitakihurira iraka ry'orikuzikoresa kubi." 
Job3:19 Omuto n'omukuru niyo bataaha, Kandi omuhuuku tategyekyerwayo mukama we." 
Job3:20 Ahabw'enki Ruhanga ajwisiza enshoberwa omushana, N'abaine entimba aha mutima akabagumyaho?" 
Job3:21 Ahabw'okuba beetenga rufu, tibagibona; Bagitimba okukira oku abantu batimba ezaabu esherekirwe." 
Job3:22 Ku bahika aha kituuro, bashemererwa munonga, beesiima." 
Job3:23 Ahabw'enki Ruhanga ajwisiza omuntu omushana, Otaine butooro, kandi ou akubiire hamwe?" 
Job3:24 Manya okutsinda kwangye kumbeereire eby'okurya, N'okuborooga kwangye nikweshuka nk'amaizi;" 
Job3:25 Ahabw'okuba eki ndikutiina, nikyo kirikumpikaho, Kandi ekirikuunyitsa obwoba nikyo kirikungwaho." 
Job3:26 Tiinyine busingye, tintuurize, kandi tiinyine buhuumure, Kureka enaku nizo zirikuunyeshukyera." 
Job4:1 Bwanyima Elifaazi Omutemaani yaagarukamu ati: 
Job4:2 Omuntu ku yaakuteeraho kugamba naiwe, okaaguubwa kubi? Beitu shi hoona n'oha orikubaasa kwezibira kugamba?" 
Job4:3 Reeba, okaba oyegyesa baingi, Kandi okaba ohamya emikono etaine maani." 
Job4:4 Ebigambo byawe bikaba biramira orikwenda kugwa, Kandi okaba ohamya entegye ezirikubonda." 
Job4:5 Kwonka mbwenu niiwe bihikireho, kandi tiwaagumisiriza! Bikukozireho, waahahaaza omutima!" 
Job4:6 Obwesigye bwawe tiburi omu kutiina Ruhanga, Kandi amatsiko gaawe tigari omu kuhikiirira kw'emitwarize yaawe?" 
Job4:7 Mbwenu ijuka; n'oha oracwekyereire ataine rubanja? Nari shi, abahikiriire baramazirweho?" 
Job4:8 Nyowe nk'oku ndareebire, abahinga okutahikiirira, Bakabiba obubi, nibyo bagyesha." 
Job4:9 Bacwekyerezibwa omwitsyo gwa Ruhanga, Bamarwaho okuhoorera kw'ekiniga kye." 
Job4:10 Okutsinda kw'entare, n'eiraka ry'entare enshaarizi bihunama, N'amaino g'emigunju y'entare gacweka." 
Job4:11 Ekisimba ky'entare kifa ahabw'okubura omuhiigo, Kandi n'obwana bw'entare enkazi butaataana." 
Job4:12 Mbwenu hariho ekigambo eki naagambiirwe bwesherekye, Okutu kwangye kukakihurira nikiij mpora," 
Job4:13 Omu biteekateeko ebyarugire omu kworekwa kwa nyekiro, Abantu baahirwayo." 
Job4:14 Naagira obwoba, naatetema, Kyareetera amagufa gangye goona kukomangana." 
Job4:15 Omuzimu gwandaba omumaisho, Ekikoba kyampwa aha mutwe;" 
Job4:16 Gwayemerera aho, kwonka tinaamanya oku gurikushusha; Omu maisho gangye haabamu waringa. Haaabaho akaceceko, bwanyima naahurira eiraka eririkugira riti:" 
Job4:17 Omuntu ofa naabaasa kuba ohikiriire omu maisho ga Ruhanga? Naabaasa kuba oshugaine omu maisho g'Owaamuhangire? 
Job4:18 Nangwa n'abagaragwa be tabeesiga, Na baamaraika be aboomesereza ebishobyo;" 
Job4:19 Kaashwa abo abatuura omu maka g'eitaka, Agu omusingi gwago guri omu mucuucu; Abarikuribatwa bakatanga ekiyenje kubaruka." 
Job4:20 Bacwekyererera ahagati y'akasheeshe n'omwabazyo; Bahweraho kimwe, hataine okyetaireho." 
Job4:21 Omurunga gw'eihema ryabo ku gubaihwamu, Tibafa, kandi bakafa bataine bwengye?" 
Job5:1 Hati taka; hariho n'omwe orikukugarukamu? Omu barikwera ou waakwagira n'oha? 
Job5:2 Buzimazima ekiniga kiita omushema, Kandi eihari riita otaine bwengye." 
Job5:3 Nkareeba omushema naatsimba emizi, Kwonka omu mwanya mukye naakyeena obutaaho bwe;" 
Job5:4 Abaana be obuhooro bubari hare, Basingyererwa omu marembo, Babura kijuna." 
Job5:5 Ebi ashaarwire biriibwa abaine enjara, Bagaruka batwara n'ebiri omu mahwa; Abaine eiriho bainiire ebintu bye ekyaka;" 
Job5:6 Ahabw'okuba okubonabona tikuruga mu mucuucu, N'enaku tizimera mu itaka," 
Job5:7 Kwonka omuntu azaarirwa enaku Nk'oku esiriira zituumuuka omu mwanya. 
Job5:8 Nyowe ahabwangye nkaasherwire Ruhanga, Kandi Ruhanga mba niwe naayegyekyera ebyangye." 
Job5:9 Niwe akora eby'amaani ebitakareebwaga, N'eby'okutangaaza ebitarikubasa kubarwa." 
Job5:10 Niwe agwisiza ensi enjura, Akashandaaza amaizi omu misiri." 
Job5:11 Niwe atunguura ab'ahansi, N'abarikuborooga akabaimutsya, bakaba buhooro." 
Job5:12 Ahindura busha enaama z'engobya, Ngu emikono yaazo eremwe kuhitsya eki zimaririire kukora." 
Job5:13 Akwatira abanyabwengye omu bugobya bwabo, N'enaama z'engobya zimarwaho juba." 
Job5:14 Babugaabugana n'omwirima nyomushana, Babandagira omu ihangwe nk'owa nyekiro." 
Job5:15 Kwonka omworo amujuna omu kanwa kaabo, N'omukyene amwiha omu mikono y'ab'amaani." 
Job5:16 N'ahabw'ekyo omworo agira amatsiko, Kandi n'akanwa k'abatahikiriire kabumbwa." 
Job5:17 Manya, omuntu ou Ruhanga ahana, aba ahiiriirwe, N'ahabw'ekyo otagaya okuhana kw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona;" 
Job5:18 Ahabw'okuba ahutaaza, kwonka ashemba obuhuta, Ateera, kwonka engaro ze nizo zikiza." 
Job5:19 Aryakujuna obugwe mukaaga, Nangwa n'omu bugwe mushanju tihariho kibi ekirikuhikaho." 
Job5:20 Omu biro by'enjara aryakucungura, orekye kufa; N'omu rugamba aryakukiza amaani ga rurara." 
Job5:21 Oryasherekwa orurimi rurikubambura, Kandi okuhwerekyerera ku kuriija, torikutiina." 
Job5:22 Okuhwerekyerera n'enjara oryabishekyerera, Kandi toritiina nyamaishwa z'omu nsi;" 
Job5:23 Ahabw'okuba oryaragaana n'amabaare g'omu bwerere, N'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba ziryagira obusingye naiwe." 
Job5:24 Oryamanya ku eka yaawe eine obusingye, Oryaguma nooreeba engombe y'amatungo gaawe, oshangye hataine kibuziremu." 
Job5:25 Nibwo orimanya ku oruzaaro rwawe rurikanya, Na baijukuru baawe bakaba nk'obunyaatsi bw'omu nsi." 
Job5:26 Oryataaha omu kituuro kyawe okuzire gye, Nk'ekiba ky'engano oku kihunikwa omu bunaku bwakyo." 
Job5:27 Reeba, ebyo nibyo twacondoorize, tukashanga biri bityo; Obihurire, obyegyereho eky'okukugasira." 
Job6:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job6:2 Ai bambe! Nkaabaasibwa ki, obugwa kubi bwangye burengwa, Nari ebihikiirizi byangye byona biteebwa aha minzaani!" 
Job6:3 Bikaaremeera okukira omusheenyi ogw'omu nyanja. Nikyo kindeeteire kurahuka kugamba; 
Job6:4 Ahabw'okuba emyambi y'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona endi omunda, Amagara gangye niganywa obushegu bwayo, Eby'okutiinisa bya Ruhanga bitengire orugamba kundwanisa." 
Job6:5 Noogira ngu enturegye neekunga, eine obunyaatsi omu kanwa, Nari shi ente ejuga neerya?" 
Job6:6 Ekitaine nsha kiriibwa kitarimu mwonyo, Nari omu maizi g'eihuri habamu akanuzi?" 
Job6:7 Omutima gwangye tigurikwenda kubirozaho; Nibinsusira nk'eby'okurya birikunugwa. 
Job6:8 Nkaabaasibwa ki, ntunga eki ndikushaba, Ruhanga ampa eki ndikwetenga!" 
Job6:9 Ruhanga aikiriza kunsingyera, Atayo omukono gwe, ampuhura." 
Job6:10 Obwo nkaatunga obuhuumure, Nangwa n'omu busaasi obutarikutuuza nkaayesiima, Ahabw'okuba tindikuhakanisa bi Orikwera arikugamba." 
Job6:11 Nyine maani ki g'okutegyereza? Omuheru gw'obusaasi bwangye n'enki, ngu mbone kugumisiriza?" 
Job6:12 Amaani gangye n'amaani g'amabaare, Nari omubiri gwangye n'omuringa?" 
Job6:13 Buzimazima omuriinye tinkiinemu buhwezi, Kandi obundi buhwezi bwona buunyihirweho." 
Job6:14 Munywani w'omuntu orembire ashemereire kumugirira embabazi, Ngu atakaareka kutiina Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Job6:15 Beene waitu n'endyarya, nk'otugyera, Nk'omukuru ogurikureetwamu omwegyemure, gukooma," 
Job6:16 Ogurikwiraguzibwa amaizi agakwatsire, Omu orubaare rweshereka." 
Job6:17 Hakibaho obutagatsi bikahwerera, Omushana gukijwa, bikaruga omu mwanya gwabyo." 
Job6:18 Emitwe y'abagyenzi eyaabaire eraba aha rubaju rw'ogwo mukura, eteishuka, Eza omu ihamba, egwayo." 
Job6:19 Emitwe y'Abateema eguma neesherura, N'abagyenzi ba Sheeba baguma bategyereize;" 
Job6:20 Bahwa amatsiko, ahabw'okuba bakaba bagira obwesigye, Bakihikayo, bashoberwa." 
Job6:21 Okwo nikwo mumbeereire; Ku mureebire ebihikiirizi ebimpikireho, mwatiina." 
Job6:22 Hariho obu naagizire nti: Mugire eki mwampa? Nari shi nti: Mumpe ekiconco aha bi mutungire? 
Job6:23 Nari nti: Munjune omu mikono y'omuzigu? Nari nti: Muncungure omu mikono y'abarikumpata? 
Job6:24 Muunyegyese, naanye niinyija kwetsiza; Mummanyise eki naashobize." 
Job6:25 Ebigambo by'okuhikiirira ka n'eby'amaani! Mbwenu empaka zaanyu nizimpana ki? 
Job6:26 Nimwenda kuhana ebigambo? Manya ebigambo by'owaayehweire amatsiko biri nk'omuyaga. 
Job6:27 Buzima nimukunda kuteerera efuuzi enteenyu, N'okwiha ahari munywani waanyu enshaagi." 
Job6:28 Mbwenu hati nimbeeshengyereza mundeebe; Ahabw'okuba buzima tindikubeiha, nk'oku murikundeeba." 
Job6:29 Nimbeeshengyereza muhindukye, mutakora ebitari by'okuhikiirira. Eego muhindukye; ebyangye n'eby'oburyo." 
Job6:30 Nimugira ngu orurimi rwangye rwine oku ruri? Tirurikubaasa kumanya ekibi? 
Job7:1 Omuntu okiri omu nsi tari aha rubu rw'okurwana orugamba? Ebiro bye ti nk'eby'orikukorera ebihembo? 
Job7:2 Nk'oku omuhuuku ayetenga ekicuucu, Kandi nk'oku orikukorera ebihembo abitegyereza," 
Job7:3 Naanye nikwo naahairwe ameezi ga busha, Nkateerwaho ebiro birikurusya." 
Job7:4 Ku mbyama, ngira nti: Nibusheesha ryari, nkaimuka? Kwonka ekiro kigyenda ira; Ndaara niinyehindaguturana, burugaho busheesha." 
Job7:5 Omubiri gwangye gushwekirwe enyogori n'ebikoko, Oruhu rwagwo nirugangaara, rugaruka rushatuka." 
Job7:6 Ebiro byangye nibyehuuta okukira eky'okurukisa ky'omuriki w'emyenda; Bihwaho ntaine matsiko. 
Job7:7 Ai bambe, ijuka amagara gangye, ku gari nk'omuyaga; Amaisho gangye tigarigaruka kureeba birungi." 
Job7:8 Orikundeeba tarigaruka kundeeba bundi; Amaisho gaawe ku gariba nigakindeeba, ndyabura." 
Job7:9 Nk'oku ekicu kiyaayuuka, kikabura, Nikwo orikushuuma okuzimu atarigaruka;" 
Job7:10 Tarigaruka mu ka ye obundi, Kandi omwanya gwe tigurigaruka kumumanya." 
Job7:11 Nikyo ntarikubaasiza kwezibira kugamba; Niinyija kugambisibwa obusaasi bw'omu mutima gwangye, Nyetomboite ahabw'entimba y'omu magara gangye." 
Job7:12 Nyowe ndi enyanja, nari ndi omugoye, Waaza kuntaho ow'okundinda?" 
Job7:13 Ku ndaagire nti: Ekitanda kyangye nikiija kumpuumuza, Ekitabo kyangye nikiija kutuubya aha busaasi bwangye," 
Job7:14 Obwo nonkangisa n'ebirooto, Ontiinisa n'ebi oyorekirwe," 
Job7:15 Ngu nyihemu okuteebwa aha munigo, nkafa, Okukira okuguma mpweire aha magufa." 
Job7:16 Amagra gangye ngatamirwe, tinkyenda kugumaho; Ndeka, ahabw'okuba ebiro byangye n'ebya busha." 
Job7:17 Omuntu ni kintu ki, Iwe okumutunguura, N'okumwetaho okamwetaho," 
Job7:18 Okamutaayayira buri kasheeshe, Okamugyeza buri kaanya?" 
Job7:19 Oryahitsya hi okutaanyihao riisho, N'okutampa kaanya k'okumira amacwante?" 
Job7:20 Ku ndaabe naasiisire, iwe Omurinzi w'abantu, nkwitsize ki? Ahabw'enki ompindwire ekimaasho? Ahanki nkubeereire omutwaro?" 
Job7:21 N'enki ekikuzibiire kusaasira ekicumuro kyangye, Okaanyihaho ekibi? Ahabw'okuba hati naaza kubyama omu mucuucu; Naiwe oryayezirika kunsherura, oshangye ntakiriho." 
Job8:1 Bwanyima Biludaadi Omushuuhi yaamugarukamu ati: 
Job8:2 Beitu oryahitsya hi okugamba otyo, Kandi ebigambo by'omu kanwa kaawe kuba nk'omuyaga gw'amaani?" 
Job8:3 Noogira ngu Ruhanga asingisiriza, Nari Ow'obushoboorozi bwona aita emanja z'oburyo?" 
Job8:4 Abaana baawe ku baraabe baacumwire ahari Ruhanga, Akabahayo omu bushoboorozi bw'ekicumuro kyabo." 
Job8:5 Kwonka iwe, ku oraayezirikye kusherura Ruhanga, Waayeshengyereza Ow'obushoboorozi bwona," 
Job8:6 Ku oraabe oshemeire kandi ohikiriire, Buzimazima Ruhanga naija kwimuka ahabwawe, Akugarurire eka yaawe eyaabaire ehikiriire." 
Job8:7 Kandi n'obu okutandika kwawe kuraabe kwabaire kuri kukye, Kwonka omu biro byawe ebya bwanyima ebyawe biryakanya munonga." 
Job8:8 Ninkweshengyereza, buuza eby'ebiro bya ire, Oyetegyereze eki baatatenkuriitwe baareebire;" 
Job8:9 Ahabw'okuba itwe turi aba nyomwabazyo, titwine ki turikumanya, Kandi ebiro byaitu omu nsi ni nk'ekicuucu." 
Job8:10 Tibarikwija kukwegyesa, bakakugambire, Nibahamya ebigambo ebi barikumanya?" 
Job8:11 Orufunjo nirubaasa kumera ahataine byondo, Nari omubimbiri kumera ahataine maizi?" 
Job8:12 Ku biba bikiri bibisi, bitakatemirwe, Bibandiza ebindi binyaatsi byona kwoma." 
Job8:13 Emihanda y'abarikwebwa Ruhanga boona nikwo eri, N'amatsiko g'otarikutiina Ruhanga garyahwaho." 
Job8:14 Eki arikwesiga kiryacuubwamu kabiri, N'obwesigye bwe ni nk'orububi rw'orutangura." 
Job8:15 Aryayegamira enju ye, kwonka teryemerera; Aryagikwata, kwonka terigumaho." 
Job8:16 Naabengyeya aha mushana, N'omurubo gwe gubuga omusiri gwe;" 
Job8:17 Emizi ye neerandira aha mutuumo gw'amabaare, Atuura omu nkiri." 
Job8:18 Ku ariihwa ahu yaabaire ari, Haryamwehakana hati: Tinkakureebaga." 
Job8:19 Reeba, okwo nikwo kushemererwa kw'omuhanda gwe, Kandi omu itaka haryameramu abandi." 
Job8:20 Reeba, tarinaga muntu ohikiriire, Kandi tariramira nkozi z'ebibi." 
Job8:21 Kwonka obunaku butari obu aryaijuza akanwa kaawe esheko N'eminwa yaawe eteere akaari. 
Job8:22 Abaabaire nibakwanga, baryashwekwa enshoni, Kandi eihema ry'enkozi z'ebibi tiririgaruka kubaho." 
Job9:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job9:2 N'amazima nimmanya ngu nikwo kiri; Beitu shi, omuntu akaabaasa ata kuba ohikiriire omu maisho ga Ruhanga?" 
Job9:3 Omuntu ku yaakwenda kuhakana nawe, Takaabaasa kumugarukamu kigambo na kimwe omu bigambo rukumi." 
Job9:4 Omutima gwe n'ogw'obwengye, kandi amaani ge ni maingi; (N'oha owaakumugangaarira, haza akaba gye?)" 
Job9:5 Aihaho enshozi zitakimanyire, Ku aba naazijuumika n'ekiniga kye." 
Job9:6 Atengetsa ensi, agiiha omu mwanya gwayo, Enyomyo zaayo zitengyeta." 
Job9:7 Aragiira eizooba, tirituruka, N'enyonyoozi azitwekyerera." 
Job9:8 Niwe wenka owaabambire eiguru, Akaribatiirira ebingonzi by'enyanja." 
Job9:9 Akahanga enyonyoozi Dubu na Orioni, Na Kakaaga n'emyanya y'obukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Job9:10 Akora ebikuru ebitarikubaasa kushoboororwa, N'eby'okutangaaza ebitarikubaasa kubarwa." 
Job9:11 Reeba, andabaho, kwonka timmureeba; Agumizamu, kwonka timmwetegyereza." 
Job9:12 Reeba, anyaga; n'oha orikubaasa kumuzibira? N'oha owaakubaasa kumugira ati: Ekyo nookora ki?" 
Job9:13 Ruhanga tariihaho kiniga kye; Nangwa n'abahwezi ba Rahabu bamwinamira. 
Job9:14 Mbwenu shi niinye naakumugarukamu, Nkeesherurira ebigambo by'okumuhakanisa?" 
Job9:15 N'obu naakuba ndi ohikiriire, tinkaamugarukamu, Kureka nkaamushaba kusaasirwa, ahakuba niwe arikunshinja." 
Job9:16 Nangwa n'obu naakumweta, akangarukamu, Tinkaikiriza ngu yampurira;" 
Job9:17 Ahabw'okuba ansingyeera n'eihunga, Akanyisa ebihuta byangye nantura busha." 
Job9:18 Tandeka ngu nyitsye, Kureka anyijuza obushaarizi." 
Job9:19 Ku ndaagambe aha maani g'emanzi, Mukama waago ngugu! Ku biraabe biri eby'okucwa emanja, We naagira ati: N'oha oranteereho obunaku?" 
Job9:20 N'obu ndaabe ndi ohikiriire, akanwa kangye nikancwera orubanja; N'obu ndaabe ntaine kabara, nanshinja obugomi." 
Job9:21 Ndi ohikire! Tiinyine ki nyeteireho! Ntamirwe amagara gangye. 
Job9:22 Byona nikyo kimwe; nikyo ndikugirira nti: Acwekyereza abahikire n'ababi. 
Job9:23 Akagwe ku kagwa, kaakinura abantu, Ashekyeerera abataine rubanja baaguubwaho akabi." 
Job9:24 Ensi eheirweyo omu mikono y'ababi, Ashweka amaisho g'abaramuzi baayo; Ku araabe atari We, ondiijo n'oha?" 
Job9:25 Ebiro byangye nibiiruka okukira matarisi, Nibihunga, kandi tibigira kirungi kyona eki bireeba;" 
Job9:26 Nibihingura, nk'amaato ganguhi, Nk'oku empungu erahuka neeza kuteera eki ehiigire." 
Job9:27 Ku naakugira nti: Niinyija kwehuzya ekirikunsaasa, Ndekye kumanywa ku ngwirwe kubi, nyesiime," 
Job9:28 Biri ntiinire obusaasi bwangye bwona; Ahabw'okuba nimmanya ngu torinteekateekaho nk'otaine rubanja. 
Job9:29 Ndyasingwa orubanja; Mbwenu niinyeruhiza ki? 
Job9:30 N'obu naakwoga amaizi g'ebirika, Nkanaaba engaro zangye n'esabuuni," 
Job9:31 Nabwo noija kunnaga omu kiina, N'ebijwaro byangye ahabwangye bintamwe." 
Job9:32 Ahabw'okuba Ogwo ti muntu nkaanye, ngu mmugarukyemu, Twemerere hamwe, tutongane;" 
Job9:33 Tihariho w'okuturamura, Akatucura engaro omumaisho." 
Job9:34 Mbwenu anyiheho enkoni ye, N'okutiinisa kwe kurekye kuunyitsa obwoba;" 
Job9:35 Haza obwo ngambe ntarikumutiina, Ahabw'okuba ahabwangye tindi w'okutiina." 
Job10:1 Ntamirwe amagara gangye; Tindikwija kwezibira kutaka; Niinyija kugamba ahabw'obusaasi bw'omu mutima gwangye. 
Job10:2 Ngambire Ruhanga nti: Otancwera orubanja kunsinga, Kureka onyorekye eki orikuntura." 
Job10:3 Nooyesiimira okuhata, Okugaya eki waahangire, N'okushemerererwa enaama z'enkozi z'ebibi?" 
Job10:4 Amaisho gaawe n'ag'omubiri, Nari sho oreeba nk'oku abantu bareeba?" 
Job10:5 Naiwe ebiro byawe ni nk'eby'abantu, Nari emyaka yaawe ni nk'ey'abantu," 
Job10:6 Kikabona kukureetera kucondooza okutahikiirira kwangye, N'okucaaka ekibi kyangye," 
Job10:7 N'obu orikumanya ku ntaine rubanja, Kandi ku hatariho orikubaasa kujuna omuntu omu mikono yaawe?" 
Job10:8 Engaro zaawe nizo zambumbire, zikampanga, Mbwenu wampindukana, wancwekyereza." 
Job10:9 Ijuka ku wambumbire nk'eibumba; Mbwenu nooyenda kugaruka kumpindura omucuucu? 
Job10:10 Okanshuka nk'amate, Wankamya nk'amajuta ga kiizi," 
Job10:11 Wanshweka oruhu n'enyama, Wanteeranisa amagufa n'emitsi;" 
Job10:12 Wampa amagara n'obushongore, Okureeberera kwawe nikwo kungumizeho." 
Job10:13 Kwonka ebyo byona okabibiika omu mutima gwawe, Kandi nimmanya ebyo ku waabigyendereire." 
Job10:14 Ku nshobya, ommanya, Kandi toonyihaho rubanja;" 
Job10:15 Ku mba mubi, ndeeba enaku; Ku mba ohikiriire, timbaasa kwimutsya mutwe; Ahabw'okuba mba nyijwire okuhemuka, Nindeeba okubonabona kwangye." 
Job10:16 Kandi n'obu naakwimutsya omutwe, okaampiiga nk'entare, Ogaruka onkoraho eby'amahano," 
Job10:17 Oimutsya busya baamushinja b'okunshinja, Oyongyera kungwerwa kubi, Kandi oguma noondeetera amahe masya g'okundwanisa." 
Job10:18 Mbwenu okaanyihira ki omu nda ya maawe? Nangwa kuri naafiire hatakagizire riisho ryona eryandeeba," 
Job10:19 Nkaba nk'otakabahoga, Nkaziikwa ninkiruga omu nda." 
Job10:20 Beitu ebiro by'amagara gangye ti bikye? Ndeka, nduhuukyeho kakye," 
Job10:21 Ntakagiire ei ntariruga, Omu nsi y'omwirima, kandi ey'ekibunda kya rufu," 
Job10:22 Omu nsi y'omwirima etarimu buteeka, Ei omushana guba nk'omwirima." 
Job11:1 Bwanyima Zofari Omunaamasi yaagarukamu ati: 
Job11:2 Ebigambo bingi bityo bitishemereire kugarukwamu? Nari shi, engambi y'amaingi eshemereire kwihwaho orubanja?" 
Job11:3 Abantu bashemereire kuhunamisibwa emyehimbiso yaawe? Kandi ku oraateere enaku, tihariho orikukukwatsa enshoni?" 
Job11:4 Ahabw'okuba noogira oti: Ebi ndikwegyesa bihikire, Ndi mwere omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
Job11:5 Nkaabasibwa ki, Ruhanga agamba, Ayashamya akanwa ke, akwomesereza." 
Job11:6 Akugambira emibonano y'obwengye, Ahabw'okuba n'obw'emiringo mingi. Mbwenu omanye ku Ruhanga atarikufubira, Nk'oku ebibi byawe biri." 
Job11:7 Noogira ngu okaabaasa kucondooza Ruhanga, omumanya? Okaabaasa kumanya Ow'obushoboorozi bwona, omumarayo?" 
Job11:8 Kiri ahaiguru okukira eiguru; nooyenda kukigira ota? Kiri okuzimu okukira owa Nyamuteza; nookimanya ota? 
Job11:9 Oburaingwa bwakyo nibukira ensi, N'obukiika bwakyo nibukira enyanja." 
Job11:10 Ku yaakuraba omu nsi, yaata abantu omu kihome, Yaabeeta omu rubanja, n'oha owaakumuzibira?" 
Job11:11 Ahabw'okuba naamanya abantu entakimazire; Ku araareebe okutahikiirira, noogira ngu naakwehuzya?" 
Job11:12 Enturegye ku yaakuzaara omuntu, Entakimazire akaagira obwengye." 
Job11:13 Ku oraashemeze omutima gwawe, Omutegye emikono." 
Job11:14 Ku haraabe hariho okutahikiirira omu ngaro zaawe, okute hare; Otaikiriza obubi kuguma omu ka yaawe." 
Job11:15 Buzimazima obwo nibwo oriimutsya amaisho gaawe otaine kamogo, Oryahama, kandi toritiina." 
Job11:16 Oryayebwa obujune bwawe, Obwijukye nk'amaizi agaheza kurabaho." 
Job11:17 Amagara gaawe garyayaka okukira eihangwe; N'obu gariba garimu omwirima, garyaba nk'akasheeshe." 
Job11:18 Oryagira obwesigye, ahabw'okugira amatsiko; Oryarindwa, ohuumure buhooro;" 
Job11:19 Oryabyama, tiharigira owaakutiinisa; Eego, baingi baryakuhakwaho." 
Job11:20 Kwonka amaisho g'ababi garyabwerabwera, Baryabura obuhungiro, Kandi amatsiko gaabo garyaba okuhwamu omwitsyo." 
Job12:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job12:2 Eego, niimwe bantu mwenka; Kandi ku murifa, obwengye buryahwaho naimwe!" 
Job12:3 Kwonka naanye nyine obwengye nkaimwe; Timurikunkira. Mbwenu n'oha otarikumanya ebigambo nk'ebyo? 
Job12:4 Ndi eky'okushekyererwa ahari bagyenzi bangye, Nyowe owaabaire atakira Ruhanga, akangarukamu, Omuntu ohikiriire, otaine kamogo; Mbwenu ndi ow'okushekyererwa." 
Job12:5 Omu mutima gw'omuntu ogaramisiriize habamu okugaya abahikiriirwe. Ebihikiirizi bitegyereize abarikuterera. 
Job12:6 Amahema g'abambuzi gari gye; Abarikugwisa kubi Ruhanga bahamire, Abu emikono yaabo eba ruhanga waabo." 
Job12:7 Mbwenu buuza enyamaishwa, niziija kukwegyesa, N'enyonyi z'omu mwanya niziija kukugambira;" 
Job12:8 Nari ogambire ensi, neija kukwegyesa, Kandi eby'omu nyanja nabyo nibiija kukumanyisa." 
Job12:9 Omuri ebyo byona n'oha otarikumanya, Ku MUKAMA niwe yaakozire ekyo?" 
Job12:10 Omu mukono gwe nimwo amagara g'ekintu kyona ekihuriire gari, Kandi n'omwitsyo gw'abantu boona nimwo guri." 
Job12:11 Okutu tikutaanisa ebigambo, Nk'oku akanwa kamanya eby'okurya?" 
Job12:12 Abagurusi nibo bagira obwengye, N'abahikize emyaka mingi nibo beetegyereza." 
Job12:13 Obwengye n'amaani biinwe Ruhanga, Niwe ahanuura, kandi aine okwetegyereza." 
Job12:14 Ku asheenya, tihaine ogaruka kwombeka; Kandi ku akingirana omuntu, tihaine obaasa kwiguraho." 
Job12:15 Ku acungira amaizi, gooma; Kandi ku agaigurira, ensi etabaarwa." 
Job12:16 Niwe agira amaani n'obwengye; Abarikugobezibwa n'abarikugobya n'abe. 
Job12:17 Atwara abahanuuzi banyagirwe, N'abaramuzi abahindura abashema." 
Job12:18 Abagabe abaihaho obushoboorozi Abazirika obutanda omunda. 
Job12:19 Abanyamurwa abatwara banyagirwe, N'ab'amaani abamaraho." 
Job12:20 Abarikwesigwa ababuza ebigambo, Kandi abagurusi abaihaho okwetegyereza." 
Job12:21 Ashuka aha banyiginya okugaywa, Ayuzya orukoba rw'ab'amaani." 
Job12:22 Ashuuruura ebisherekirwe omu mwirima, N'omwirima ndindindi agujwisiza omushana." 
Job12:23 Akanyisa amahanga, kandi agacwekyereza; Ahangusya amahanga, kandi agatuubya." 
Job12:24 Abategyeki b'amahanga g'omu nsi abaihaho okwetegyereza, Abazengyereza omu ihamba eritarimu mihanda." 
Job12:25 Babandagira omu mwirima bataine ky'okubahwezesa. Bagwererana nk'omusinzi. 
Job13:1 Reeba, eriisho ryangye rikareeba ebyo byona, N'okutu kwangye kwabihurira, naabimanya." 
Job13:2 Ebi murikumanya, naanye nimbimanya; Timwine ki murikunkiza." 
Job13:3 Buzima nkaayenzire kugamba n'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona, Kandi n'okwetonganira ahari Ruhanga." 
Job13:4 Imwe ahabwanyu muri abagunzi b'ebishuba, Mwena muri abafumu abataine mutambo." 
Job13:5 Nkaabaasibwa ki, muhunamira kimwe! Obwo nibwo mwakuba ab'obwengye." 
Job13:6 Mbwenu muhurire ebi ndikufa, Mutegye amatu ebi ndikwetonganira." 
Job13:7 Nimwenda kutonganira Ruhanga nimubeiha, Kandi nimuryarya ahabwe?" 
Job13:8 Nimwija kugwera orubaju rwe? Nimwenda kurwanirira Ruhanga? 
Job13:9 Mbwenu ku yaakubacaaka, bikaabagyendera gye? Nimubaasa kumuryarya, nk'oku omuntu aryarya mugyenzi we?" 
Job13:10 Buzimazima aryabahana, Ku murigira orubaju oru mwagwera bwesherekye." 
Job13:11 Ekitiinisa kye tikiribaitsa obwoba, N'okutiinisa kwe kukabagwaho?" 
Job13:12 Ebigambo ebi murikuhamya n'enfumu eziri nk'eiju; Ebi murikwerinza ni nk'eibumba. 
Job13:13 Nimuhuname, ngambe; Ekirambeho kimbeho!" 
Job13:14 N'obu byakuba bita, Niinyija kwoga amagara." 
Job13:15 N'obu araanyite, tiinyine gandi matsiko; Ndyayetonganira omu maisho ge, niinyoreka ebinaakozire." 
Job13:16 Ekyo nakyo kiryambeera okujunwa, Ahabw'okuba tihariho otatiina Ruhanga orihika omu maisho ge." 
Job13:17 Mute omutima aha bigambo byangye, Mutegye amatu ebi ndikubagambira." 
Job13:18 Reeba, mperize kuteekateeka ebi ndaayetonganire, Nimmanya ku ndikwija kusinga orubanja." 
Job13:19 Oraatongane naanye n'oha? Ahabw'okuba ku akureebeka, nkaahunama, nfa." 
Job13:20 Onyikirize ebintu bibiri byonka; Obwo nibwo ntarikwija kukweshereka. 
Job13:21 Onyiheho omukono gwawe, gunze hare; Kandi okutiinisa kwawe kurekye kuunyitsa obwoba." 
Job13:22 Bwanyima onyete, nkwetabe; Nari shi onyikirize, ngambe, naiwe ongarukyemu." 
Job13:23 Ebicumuro byangye n'ebibi byangye ni bingahi? Mmanyisa okushiisha kwangye n'ekibi kyangye. 
Job13:24 Ahabw'enki noonyima amaisho, Okanteekateekaho nk'omuzigu waawe?" 
Job13:25 Nooyenda kutiinisa eibabi eririkutwarwa omuyaga, N'okuhiiga ebishushunga ebyomire?" 
Job13:26 Ahabw'okuba nompandikaho ebirikushaarira, Ongaruraho ebibi by'obutsigazi bwangye;" 
Job13:27 Otaire ebigyere byangye omu nkomo, Waagumya amaisho aha mihanda yangye yoona, Ebigyere byangye waabiteeraho obugarukiro." 
Job13:28 Omuntu weena ahwaho nk'ekintu ekijunzire, Nk'ekijwaro ekiriirwe ebiyenje." 
Job14:1 Omuntu ozairwe omukazi amara ebiro bikye, Aba ow'enaku nsha." 
Job14:2 Arabya nk'ekirabyo, ayoma; Ahingura nk'ekicuucu, tagumaho." 
Job14:3 Mbwenu shi Iwe, omuntu ori otyo okaayerusya kumureeba, Nari nkaanye, okandeeta kutongana naiwe?" 
Job14:4 N'oha owaakubaasa kwiha ekirungi omu kibi? Tihariho n'omwe. 
Job14:5 Nk'oku ebiro bye byamugyereirwe, Omubaro gw'ameezi ge okagumanya, Okamuteeraho obugarukiro, obu atarikubaasa kurenga," 
Job14:6 Omwiheho amaihso, abone kuhuumuraho, Okuhitsya obu ariheza ebiro bye, nk'orikukorera ebihembo." 
Job14:7 Manya, hariho amatsiko ngu, ekiti ku kitemwa, kitooka, Kandi ngu emitwe y'amataagi mato gaakyo egumizamu neekura." 
Job14:8 N'obu emizi yaakyo yaakuguma omu itaka, ekakura, N'ekitsintsi kyakyo kikajundira aho," 
Job14:9 Kwonka ku kihurira okufukiirira kw'amaizi, kitooka, Kimera amataagi nk'ekiti kito." 
Job14:10 Kwonka omuntu we afa bwamperayo; Buzima omwitsyo gumuhwamu. Mbwenu obwo aba akirahi? 
Job14:11 Nk'oku amaizi g'omu kiyanja gaijurururka, N'omugyera gukatuuba, gukooma," 
Job14:12 Nikwo n'omuntu abyama ataimukye; Tariimuka, n'obu kwakuba lusisiimurwa, Okuhitsya obu eiguru ririba ritakiriho." 
Job14:13 Nkaabaasibwa ki, onshereka okuzimu, Ondindira omu mubonano, okuhitsya ahu ekiniga kyawe kirihwera, Onteeraho obunaku, onyijuka!" 
Job14:14 (Omuntu ku afa, agaruka abaho?) Ebiro byangye byona ebyanteereirweho nkaabigumisiririza, Ntegyereza obunaku bwangye bw'okurekurwa." 
Job14:15 Ku waakuunyeta, nkaakwetaba; Kandi naiwe okaayetenga kureeba eki emikono yaawe yaakozire;" 
Job14:16 Ahabw'okuba hati noobara entambwe zangye, Kandi otaire eriisho aha kibi kyangye." 
Job14:17 Okushiisha kwangye kukomirwe omu nshaho, N'okutahikiirira kwangye kukomeirwe hamwe." 
Job14:18 Kwonka orushozi orutuura nirugwa, ruguubwa rwahwaho; N'orukiri rwihwa omu mwanya gwarwo;" 
Job14:19 Amaizi gagyenda nigarya amabaare, N'emitunga etwara eitaka ry'ensi; Naiwe nikwo omaraho amatsiko g'omuntu." 
Job14:20 Ebiro byona omusingura, nawe ahwaho; Aha maisho ge ohahindura okundi; omwohereza." 
Job14:21 Abatabani batunga ekitiinisa, atakikimanya; Bagarurwa ahansi, kwonka tamanya byabo;" 
Job14:22 Kureka obusaasi obu ahurira, n'obw'omubiri gwe; Kandi amaganya agu agira, gaba age wenka." 
Job15:1 Bwanyima Elifaazi Omutemaani yaagarukamu ati: 
Job15:2 Noogira ngu omuntu w'obwengye ashemereire kugarukamu n'ebigambo ebitaine muhoho, N'okwijuza enda ye omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba?" 
Job15:3 Ashemereire kuteera empaka n'ebigambo ebitaine buryo, Nari okugamba ebitaine ki birikugasira abandi?" 
Job15:4 Kwonka nooyenda kwihaho okutiina Ruhanga, N'okuzibira abantu kugira eki baateekateekaho bari omu maisho ge;" 
Job15:5 Ahabw'okuba okutahikiirira kwawe nikwo kwegyesa akanwa kaawe eby'okugamba, Naiwe okunda kugambisa orurimi r'obugobya." 
Job15:6 Akanwa kaawe niko karikukucwera orubanja, tiinye; N'eminwa yaawe yonka niyo erikukushinja." 
Job15:7 Niiwe waabandiize abandi kuzaarwa? Nari okazaarwa, enshozi zitakabaireho?" 
Job15:8 Orashutamire omu naama za Ruhanga ez'omu mubonano? Nooyenda kuba niiwe waagira obwengye wenka? 
Job15:9 Eki orikumanya, itwe eki tutarikumanya, niki? Nooyetegyereza ki, itwe eki tutarikushoborokyerwa?" 
Job15:10 Omuriitwe harimu abamezire enju, N'abakuzire munonga abarikukira sho." 
Job15:11 Okuhuumuriza kwa Ruhanga ahabwawe ni kukye, N'ebigambo ebi ogambiirwe gye, noobigaya?" 
Job15:12 Ahabw'enki omutima gwawe nigukubambaaza, Amaisho gakakutukura," 
Job15:13 Kikareetera omutima gwawe kurwanisa Ruhanga, Okagamba ebigambo nk'ebyo?" 
Job15:14 Omuntu ni kintu ki, kuba oshemeire, N'owaazairwe omukazi, kuba ohikiriire?" 
Job15:15 Reeba, Ruhanga tayesiga barikwera be, Nangwa n'eiguru tirishemeire mu maisho ge," 
Job15:16 Kaashwa omuntu ekihagaro owaasiisikaire, Ogotomera okutahikiirira nk'amaizi." 
Job15:17 Naaza kukushobororera, haza ompurire! Kandi ebi naareebire, nibyo ndikwija kukumanyisa," 
Job15:18 (Ebyagambirwe abanyabwengye, Ebi baishebo batarasherekire," 
Job15:19 Abbaheirwe ensi bonka, Batagiibwemu munyamahanga weena)" 
Job15:20 Omusiisi atuura n'obusaasi ebiro byona, Niyo myaka eyateereirweho abarikuhata." 
Job15:21 Ebirikutiinisa biteerera enduuru omu matu ge; N'obu ariba ari omu kugogyera, Omuhwerekyerezi aryamugwaho." 
Job15:22 Taikiriza ngu aryagaruka arugye omu mwirima, Kandi ateekateekyeirwe rurara." 
Job15:23 Azengyerera hoona naaza kushaka, naagira ati: Eby'okushaka birahi? Naamanya ku ekiro ky'omwirima kiri haihi kumuhikaho." 
Job15:24 Enaku n'obusaasi bimutiinisa, Bimusingura nk'omugabe oyeteekateekyeire orugamba;" 
Job15:25 Ahabw'okuba akabanga omukono kurwanisa Ruhanga, Yaahiga Ow'obushoboorozi bwona," 
Job15:26 Yaamwegyemera agangaize ebitsya, Akingire engabo eine eiromba rihango." 
Job15:27 Ahabw'okuba omugomoko gukamushweka aha maisho, N'ebigojo byahingamirana aha nyugunyu ze," 
Job15:28 Kandi yaatuura omu ndembo ezihindukire amatongo, N'omu maju agatashemereire kutaahwamu muntu, Agabaire gari haihi kuhinduka emungo z'amatongo." 
Job15:29 N'ahabw'ekyo taritunga, n'eitungo rye tiririgumaho, Kandi taritsimba mizi omu itaka." 
Job15:30 Tarikira mwirima, Endimi z'omuriro ziryayomya amataagi ge, Atwarwe omwitsyo gwa Ruhaga." 
Job15:31 Arekye kwesiga ebitaine mugasho, naayebeiha; ahakuba ebitaine mugasho nibyo arizimuurirwa." 
Job15:32 Aryahembwa byona, obunaku bwe butakahikire, Amataagi agarikumutookaho gatakabaire kijubwe." 
Job15:33 Aryaba nk'omuzaabibu, ogu ebijuma byagwo biragarika bitakahiisize, Abe nk'omuzeituuni ogurikuragaza orurabyo." 
Job15:34 Ahabw'okuba omutwe gw'abatarikutiina Ruhanga guryaba engumba, Kandi omuriro guryamaraho amahema g'abarikurya enguzi." 
Job15:35 Babaka enda z'eitima, bazaara obubi, N'emitima yaabo eteekateeka obugobya." 
Job16:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job16:2 Manya mpuriire bingi ebirikushusha bityo; Mwena muri abayaagi abarikurusya. 
Job16:3 Ebigambo ebitaine mugasho biherera hi? Ekyakureetera kungarukamu niki? 
Job16:4 Kuri noogira ngu niimwe muri nkaanye, Nkaabaasize kugamba nkaimwe; Nyungayunga ebigambo by'okubapaatiika, Mbazongoreza omutwe;" 
Job16:5 Kwonka nkaabagumize n'akanwa kangye, N'ebigambo by'orurimi rwangye bibatuubiza aha busaasi." 
Job16:6 N'obu ndaagambe, obusaasi bwangye tiburikutuuba, Nari shi bwo ku ndaayegumey, niinyija kutuubizibwa ki?" 
Job16:7 Mbwenu ho Ruhanga andembize, Ammazireho abangye boona." 
Job16:8 Ankwatsire; nikyo kirikunshinja, Okuhwa aha magufa kwangye kuunyimukiriire; Nikwo kurikuunyomesereza." 
Job16:9 Antaanyagwize anyiniire ekiniga, yaanyita kubi; Anneneire amaino, Ogwo mubisha wangye anzooreire amaisho." 
Job16:10 Abantu baanyashamiire, Banteera aha itama nibanjuma; Nibateeranira hamwe kunteera." 
Job16:11 Ruhanga nampayo omu mikono y'abarikumutiina, Yannaga omu mikono y'enkozi z'ebibi." 
Job16:12 Nkaba ndi aho ngaramisiriize, yampendagura; Yankwata aha bitsya, yancwa obusaasingo; Bwanyima yangira ekimaasho kye." 
Job16:13 Abarasi be bangotsire, Anteire aha ntsigo, zaashohora, tiyansaasira, Yaasheesha endurwe yangye aha nsi." 
Job16:14 Anfumagwire, Yaanyegyemera nk'emanzi." 
Job16:15 Omubiri gwangye ngubaziireho ebiguniya, N'eihembe ryangye naaritabika omu itaka." 
Job16:16 Amaisho gangye gahonoirwe okurira, N'ebitsigye byangye byeririmba," 
Job16:17 N'obu engaro zangye ziraabe zitaine itima, N'okushaba kwangye kushemeire." 
Job16:18 Iwe nsi 'we, otataba eshagama yangye, Kandi okutaka kwangye kurekye kugira ahu kwatuuriza." 
Job16:19 Na mbwenu, reeba, omujurizi wangye ari omu iguru, N'omwema wangye ari ahaiguru;" 
Job16:20 Banywani bangye nibangaya, amaisho gangye nigashuka amarira ahari Ruhanga," 
Job16:21 Ngu aikirize omuntu kumwetonganiraho, Nk'omuntu na mutaahi we." 
Job16:22 Ahabw'okuba emyaka mikye ku erihwa, Ndyatoora omuhanda ogu ntarigaruka kureetwa." 
Job17:1 Omutima gwangye gucwekire, ebiro byangye bihwire, Ekituuro kintegyereize." 
Job17:2 Buzimazima nyehinguririziibwe abarikunteerera enaku; Eriisho ryangye nditaire aha bi barikundahuza. 
Job17:3 Mbwenu taho omusingo, onyemererere; Ori aho orikwija kuunyemererrera n'oha?" 
Job17:4 Nk'oku ozibiire emitima yaabo kwetegyereza, Nikyo otarikubaikiririza kusingura." 
Job17:5 Orikurega banywani be, ngu abagane aha bintu byabo, Amaisho g'abaana be garyabwerabwera." 
Job17:6 Ampindwire eky'okucweraho enfumu omu mahanga, Mpindukire ou abantu barikunuga butunu." 
Job17:7 Ahabw'obusaasi amaisho gangye garimu oruho, N'engingo zangye zoona ziri nk'ekibunda." 
Job17:8 Abantu abagororokire nibakitangaarira, Kandi abatariho rubanja nibeezirika kurwanisa abatarikutiina Ruhanga;" 
Job17:9 Kwonka ohikiriire ahamiire omu muhanda gwe, Kandi oine engaro zishemeire naayeyongyera kugira amaani." 
Job17:10 Mbwenu imwe mwena, mugarukye mwije; Tihariho munyabwengye n'omwe ou ndikwija kushanga omuriimwe." 
Job17:11 Ebiro byangye bihwire, Ebi mbaire niinyenda kukora bifiire, Nibyo byetengo by'omutima gwangye." 
Job17:12 Ekiro nibakihindura nyomushana, Nibagira ngu omushana guri haihi kuba nk'omwirima." 
Job17:13 Ku naakwenda okuzimu ku eba eka yangye, Naayara ekitabo kyangye omu mwirima," 
Job17:14 Naagira ekiina nti: Niiwe tata, N'enyogori nti: Ori maawe, nari munyaanyazi," 
Job17:15 Mbwenu obwo amatsiko gangye gakaaba gakirahi? Kandi ago matsiko garyareebwa oha? 
Job17:16 Garyashuuma naanye, tuhikye aha mpimbi z'okuzimu, Ku ndiba naahumwire nago omu mucuucu." 
Job18:1 Bwanyima Biludaadi Omushuuhi yaagarukamu ati: 
Job18:2 Muryahitsya hi okutegana n'empaka z'ebigambo? Nimuteekateekye, haza tubone kugamba." 
Job18:3 Ahabw'enki nitutwazibwa nk'ente, Okatuteekateekaho nk'abataine bwengye?" 
Job18:4 Iwe orikwetaagura ahabw'ekiniga, Noogira ngu ensi neija kutsigwaho ahabwawe, Nari orukiri rwihwe omu mwanya gwarwo?" 
Job18:5 Eego, etabaaza y'omunyabibi eryaraazibwa, N'endimi z'omuriro gwe tiziryaka;" 
Job18:6 Okuhweza kw'omu nju ye kuryaba omwirima, N'etabaaza emuri ahaiguru eryaraazibwa." 
Job18:7 Entambwe ze endaingwa ziryahindurwa ngufu. N'enaama ze ziryamugwisa; 
Job18:8 Ahabw'okuba ebigyere bye nibyo birumunaga omu kigoye, Akagyendera aha busya." 
Job18:9 Omuriiti guryamukwata ekitsintsino, N'omwiniko gumukwate, gumuhamye." 
Job18:10 Aryategwa omurunga omu itaka, Omutego gumukwatire omu kahanda." 
Job18:11 Ebirikutiinisa biryamwitsa obwoba embaju zoona, Bimubingye bimuhambize." 
Job18:12 Amaani ge garyatuubibwa enjara; Ku ariza kuteera entsibo, aryashanga akagwe kamugwereire." 
Job18:13 Omubiri gwe guryamirwa kwo; Eego, omujigaijo gwa rufu guryamira engingo ze." 
Job18:14 Aryahuruuturwa omu ihema rye, eri yaabaire ayesiga, Atwarwe aha mukama w'ebirikutiinisa." 
Job18:15 Abatari be baryatuura omu ihema rye; Obuganga buryabuga ahu atwire hoona," 
Job18:16 Emizi ye eyomere okuzimu, N'amataagi ge goomere eruguru." 
Job18:17 Aryayebera kimwe omu nsi, N'eiziina rye tiririgaruka kugambwa mu mihanda." 
Job18:18 Aryabingwa, arugye omu mushana, aze omu mwirima, Kandi acwerwe kimwe omu nsi." 
Job18:19 Tarigira mwana nari mwijukuru omu baabo, N'obu yaakuba emponoka y'okutsigara ahu yaabaire atwire." 
Job18:20 Abarimukurata baryatangaarira ekiro kye, Nk'oku abaamubandiize baagizire obwoba." 
Job18:21 Buzimazima obwo nibwo butaaho bw'abatahikiriire, Kandi ogwo nigwo mwanya gw'abatarikutiina Ruhanga." 
Job19:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job19:2 Muryahitsya hi okuunyita kubi, N'okumpendagura n'ebigambo?" 
Job19:3 Ogu n'omurundi gwa ikumi nimunjuma. Tikirikubaitsa enshoni kunkora kubi? 
Job19:4 Hoona, n'obu naakubaire nsiisire, Ekicumuro kyangye niinye kyakubaireho." 
Job19:5 Ku muraabe nimwenda kuunyehimbisizaho N'okuunyomesereza ahabw'enaku zangye," 
Job19:6 Mumanye ngu Ruhanga niwe aitsire orubanja rwangye, akankubaakuba n'ekigoye kye." 
Job19:7 Reeba, nintaka nti: Baanyita! Kwonka timpairwe mikono; Niinyeta munonga, kwonka mbura ow'okuncwera orubanja rw'oburyo." 
Job19:8 Aitsire omuhanda gwangye, tiinyine burabo, N'emihanda yangye yaagitamu omwirima." 
Job19:9 Anjwire ekitiinisa kyangye, Yaanyiha ekirunga aha mutwe." 
Job19:10 Ansheenyagwire embaju zoona, mpweireho, N'amatsiko gangye agarandwire nk'ekiti." 
Job19:11 Angiriire ekiniga kingi, Yanteekateekaho nk'omubisha we," 
Job19:12 Engabo ze zihururiire hamwe, Zaarunda eby'okungotesa, Zaateera orusiisira okwehinguririza eihema ryangye." 
Job19:13 Antaanise na bagyenzi bangye, N'abamanyi bambeera kimwe abanyamahanga;" 
Job19:14 Abaitu na banywani bangye bampemukireho," 
Job19:15 Abagyenyi b'omu nju yangye baanyebirwe, Abazaana bangye nibanteekateekaho nk'omunyaihanga, Mbahindukiire omwijaija." 
Job19:16 Niinyeta omuheereza wangye, tarikuunyetaba, N'obu ndikumweshengyereza." 
Job19:17 Ntamirwe omukazi wangye, N'abaana ba maawe nibannuga." 
Job19:18 Nangwa n'abaana bato nibangaya; Ku ndikwimuka, bangambuura." 
Job19:19 Banywani bangye boona ab'aha mara nibannyangira kimwe, N'abo abu mbaire ninkunda baanyehindukiriize." 
Job19:20 Amagufa gangye garamataine n'oruhu n'enyama, Ntsigaize amaino gonka." 
Job19:21 Mungirire esaasi, imwe bagyenzi bangye; mungirire esaasi, Ahabw'okuba omukono gwa Ruhanga gumpikireho." 
Job19:22 Nimumpiigira ki nka Ruhanga? Oku ndikushusha, tikurikubamara?" 
Job19:23 Nangwa kuri ebigambo byangye bihandiikirwe, Bikahandiikwa omu kitabo!" 
Job19:24 Bikasharurwa aha rukiri n'akacumu k'ekyoma na rusasi, Bikagumaho ebiro byona!" 
Job19:25 Ahakuba nimmanya ku Omucunguzi wangye abaho, Kandi ku aryemera aha nsi aha muheru;" 
Job19:26 Omubiri gwangye ku guriba gwamazirweho gutyo, Bwanyima ndyareeba Ruhanga ntakigwine," 
Job19:27 Ou ndyereebera nyenka, Eriisho ryangye, eritari ry'ondiijo, rikamwetegyereza. Na mbwenu omutima gwangye nigugwa enshazi." 
Job19:28 Ku muraabe nimugira ngu: Nitwija kumuhiiga, Kandi ngu, enaku ze niwe zaakomookireho," 
Job19:29 Mwerinde rurara, Ahabw'okuba ekiniga kireeta ekifubiro kya rurara, Ngu mubone kuhamya ku hariho okucwa orubanja." 
Job20:1 Bwanyima Zofari Omunaamasi yaagarukamu ati: 
Job20:2 Mbwenu ebiteekateeko byangye nibingarukamu, Ahabw'obwire obu nyine;" 
Job20:3 Nimpurira okuhana okurikunkwatsa enshoni; Kwonka oku ndikureeba, hariho omwoyo ogurikungarukamu." 
Job20:4 Torikumanya okuruga ira ryona, Omuntu yaaba kuteebwa aha nsi," 
Job20:5 Ngu okwesiima kw'ababi kuhwaho juba, N'okushemererwa kw'abatarikutiina Ruhanga kuba okw'akaanya kakye?" 
Job20:6 N'obu yaakutunguuka, akahika ahaiguru munonga, Omutwe gwe gukaza omubicu," 
Job20:7 Kwonka aryacwekyererera kimwe nk'eishaazi rye, Abaamureebire baryagira bati: Mbwenu shi arahi?" 
Job20:8 Aryagaruka nk'ekirooto, tarireebwa; Ahiigwe nk'okworekwa kwa nyekiro." 
Job20:9 Eriisho eryamureebire tiririgaruka kumureeba, N'omwanya gwe tigurimureeba bundi." 
Job20:10 Abaana be baryayekundisa abooro, N'engaro ze ziryagarura eitungo rye;" 
Job20:11 Amagufa ge gaijwire amaani g'obutsigazi, Kwonka aryaziikwa nago omu mucuucu." 
Job20:12 N'obu araabe naanurirwa obubi omu kanwa ke, Akaguma naabunuriiriza ahansi y'orurimi rwe," 
Job20:13 Akanga kubureka, Kureka akaguma abuhunikire omu kanwa," 
Job20:14 Kwonka omu nda ye eby'okurya bye biryahinduka, Bimubeere obushegu bw'encwera." 
Job20:15 Amira obutungi, agaruka abutanaka, Ruhanga abwiha omu nda ye." 
Job20:16 Aryanyuunyuuta obushegu bw'encwera, Aitwe orurimi rw'empiri," 
Job20:17 Tarireeba migyera, Nari otugyera otwijwire obwoki n'amakamo;" 
Job20:18 Ebi yaafeereire kubi aryabigarura, taribimira, amagoba g'obushuubuzi bwe tarigashemerererwa;" 
Job20:19 Ahabw'okuba akaita kubi abooro, yaabatsigaho; Yaanyaga enju, ei atarombekire." 
Job20:20 Ahabw'okugira omurur ogutarikuhwa, Tarirokora kintu na kimwe aha bi akunda." 
Job20:21 Ku yaariire, taine ki yatsigire; N'ahabw'ekyo okugogyera ke tikurigumaho." 
Job20:22 Omu bunaku obu ariba aijwize ebintu bingi ebirikumumara, aryakyena; Emikono y'abaine obujune boona eryamuteeraniraho." 
Job20:23 Ku ariba ari haihi kwigutsa enda ye, Ruhanga aryamushukaho ekiniga kye kingi, Akimugwiseho nk'enjura naarya." 
Job20:24 Aryahunga eky'okurwanisa ky'ekyoma, Omwambi gw'omuringa gumucumite, gumwogyemu;" 
Job20:25 Agwekuure, gumurugyemu, Omunwa gwagwo ogurikumurinkana gurugye omu ndurwe ye, Eby'okutiinisa bimuhikyeho." 
Job20:26 Obutungi bwe bubiikiirwe omwirima ndindindi, Omurimo ogutaakibwa bantu guryamumaraho, Kandi ebitsigaire omu ihema rye ryona gubitookyeze." 
Job20:27 Eiguru riryashuuruura okutahikiirira kwe, N'ensi emwimukirire." 
Job20:28 Eby'omu nju ye biryanyagwa, Bitwarwe aha izooba ry'ekiniga kya Ruhanga." 
Job20:29 Ogwo nigwo mugabo gw'enkozi y'ebibi ogurikuruga ahari Ruhanga, N'obuhunguzi obu Ruhanga yaamuteereireho." 
Job21:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job21:2 Nimuhuguukye, muhurire ebi ndikugamba, Haza obwo nimuba muunyaagiire." 
Job21:3 Mungumisiririze, naanye ngambe; Ku ndaaheze, mugumizemu nimusheka." 
Job21:4 Nimugira ngu niinyetomboitera omuntu? Mbwenu ekyakunzibira kugumisiriza niki? 
Job21:5 Mundeebe, mushoberwe, Engaro muzite aha munwa." 
Job21:6 Ku ndikwijuka oku ndi, ngira obwoba, Omubiri gwangye gutetema." 
Job21:7 Ahabw'enki enkozi z'ebibi zigumaho, zikakura, Zikahika omu ngingo zaabukuru, Zikagira obushoboorozi bw'amaani?" 
Job21:8 Abaana baazo bahama zikiriho, N'oruzaaro rwazo rugumaho nizirureeba." 
Job21:9 Amaka gaazo tigagira ki gatiina, N'enkoni ya Ruhanga tegahikaho." 
Job21:10 Enimi yaabo eyemya, teremwa; Ente yaabo ezaara, tetorooga;" 
Job21:11 Abaana baabo abato babaseetura nk'obusyo, N'abandi baana baabo bagyenda nibatara." 
Job21:12 Beeshongorera aha mataari n'endingiri. Bashemerererwa okugamba kw'emikuri. 
Job21:13 Ebiro byabo babimara omu kugogyeera, Bashuuma okuzimu bagwirwe gye." 
Job21:14 Bagira Ruhanga bati: Turugyeho! Titurikwenda kumanya muhanda yaawe. 
Job21:15 Ow'obushoboorozi bwona nikyo ki, itwe kumuheereza? Kandi ku turikumushaba, nikitugasira ki?" 
Job21:16 Reeba, okugwa gye kwabo tikuri mu mikono yaabo; Enaama z'enkozi z'ebibi zindi hare." 
Job21:17 Ni kangahi obu etabaaza y'ababi eraaziibwe, Bakaguubwaho akabi, Ruhanga akabaha obusaasi abainiire ekiniga?" 
Job21:18 Kandi ni kangahi obu babaire nk'ebinyaatsi birikutwarwa omuyaga, Nari nk'ebishushunga ebirikutwarwa akasooroora?" 
Job21:19 Imwe nimugira ngu Ruhanga abiikira abaana b'omusiisi ekifubiro ahabw'okutahikiirira kwe. Ka Ruhanga abe niwe yaahana, abone kumanya ekibi kye!" 
Job21:20 Ka amaisho ge geereebere okucwekyerera kwe, Anywe ekiniga ky'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona!" 
Job21:21 Nimugira ngur, ebiriba aha b'enju ye abarimukurata aryaba naakibyetaho, Haza ebiro by'emyaka byacwirweho?" 
Job21:22 Hariho oryegyesa Ruhanga obwengye? Haza kunu niwe acwera ab'ekitiinisa emanja. 
Job21:23 Omwe afa akiine amaani ge goona, Aine obusingye, agaramisiriize;" 
Job21:24 Omubiri gwe gugomokire, guriitiraine, N'omushokooro gw'omu magufa ge niguyagayaga." 
Job21:25 Ondiijo afa n'obusaasi bw'aha mutima, Atakarozaga ha kirungi;" 
Job21:26 Kwonka bombi babyama omu mucuucu, Bashwekwa enyogori." 
Job21:27 Reeba, nimmanya ebi murikuteekateeka, N'enaama mbi ezi muunyiniire;" 
Job21:28 Ahakuba nimugira muti: Enju y'omunyiginya erahi? Enju ei abasiisi baabaire batuuramu erahi? 
Job21:29 Beitu shi, timukabuuzaga abagyenzi, Kandi timurikwikiriza ebi bahamya," 
Job21:30 Ku omusiisi ahonoka aha kiro ky'akabi, Akajunwa aha kiro ky'okugirirwaho ekiniga?" 
Job21:31 N'oha owaakumugambira butunu omuhanda gwe? Kandi n'oha owaakumuzimuurira ebi yaakozire? 
Job21:32 Ku aritwarwa kuziikwa omu kiina, Ekituuro kye kiryarindwa;" 
Job21:33 Ebitsinde by'omu ruhanga biryamunurira, Abantu boona baryamukurata, Ahakuba abaamubandiize bakaba batarikubarwa." 
Job21:34 Mbwenu imwe nimubaasa muta kungumya n'ebitaine muhoho? Ahkuba tihaine kindi ekitsigaire omu kugarukamu kwanyu kureka ebishuba. 
Job22:1 Bwanyima Elifaazi Omutemaani yaagarukamu ati: 
Job22:2 Omuntu aine eki yaakugasira Ruhanga? N'eky'amazima omunyabwengye obwengye bwe niwe bugasira. 
Job22:3 Noogira ngu iwe okuba ohikiriire, kiine eki kirikushemeza Ow'obushoboorozi bwona, Nari shi okushemeza emitwarize yaawe kiine eki kirikumwongyeraho?" 
Job22:4 Noogira ngu okumutiina kwawe nikwo kumureeteire kukuhana? Nikyo arikutonganira naiwe? 
Job22:5 Ebibi byawe ti bingi? Eby'okutahikiirira byawe tibiine bugarukiro; 
Job22:6 Ahabw'okuba okaihira busha omukwato ahari beene waanyu; Otaine ki ajwaire, waamujuura akajwaro ke." 
Job22:7 Orikukooza okaba otamuha twizi tw'okunywa. N'oine enjara omwima eby'okurya. 
Job22:8 Haza ow'obushoboorozi yaaba niwe yaatunga ensi, Kandi ow'ekitiinisa yaagituuramu." 
Job22:9 Abafaakazi okababinga emikono misha, N'emikono y'abataine baishebo yaahendagurwa." 
Job22:10 Nikyo emitego ekwehinguriririze, Ebihikiirizi ebirikutiinisa bikakutuntuza;" 
Job22:11 Okuhweza kwawe kuhindwirwe omwirima; nikyo otarikubaasiza kureeba, N'omwegyemure gw'amaizi gukushwekire." 
Job22:12 Ruhanga tari omu iguru ahaiguru? Reeba, enyonyoozi z'ahaiguru munonga oku ziri hare omu rya nyakacu!" 
Job22:13 Haza ogira oti: Ruhanga naamanya ki? Naabasa kucwa orubanja, naayozya amaisho omu mwirima ndindindi?" 
Job22:14 Oti: Ebicu ebikwaitse bimuturukire oku n'oku, byamuzibira kureeba, Kandi naagyendera aha iguru eriri ahaiguru y'ensi." 
Job22:15 Nooyenda kugumizamu omu muhanda ogwa ira, Ogu abantu babi baatoiremu?" 
Job22:16 bakabakurwa, baatwarwa obunaku bwabo butakahikire, Omusingi gwabo gwatwarwa amaizi." 
Job22:17 Baagira Ruhanga bati: Turugyeho! Kandi bati: Ow'obushoboorozi bwona naabaasa kutugira ata? 
Job22:18 N'obu baraabe baagizire batyo, Ruhanga akaijuza amaju gaabo ebirungi, (Kwonka nyowe enaama z'ababi zindi hare!)" 
Job22:19 Abahikiriire babireeba, beesiima; Abataine rubanja babashekyerera, babagaya," 
Job22:20 Nibagira bati: Buzimazima ababisha baitu bacwekyereziibwe, Kandi n'ebi batsigireho omuriro gwabimaraho." 
Job22:21 Garukana na Ruhanga, obone kugira obusingye; Obwo nibwo ebirungi biriija ahariiwe." 
Job22:22 Ikiriza okuhabura okurikuruga omu kanwa ke, N'ebigambo bye obigumye aha mutima." 
Job22:23 Ku oraagarukire Ow'obushoboorozi bwona, waayecureeza, Waata okutahikiirira hare n'amahema gaawe;" 
Job22:24 Kandi ku oraate eitungo ryawe omu mucuucu, N'ezaabu ya Ofiri waagita omu mabaare g'omu kagyera," 
Job22:25 N'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona yaaba eitungo ryawe, Yaakubeera efeeza y'obuguzi bwingi," 
Job22:26 Obwo nibwo orishemerererwa omu W'obushoboorozi bwona, Okaimutsya amaisho gaawe ahari Ruhanga." 
Job22:27 Oryamushaba, akuhurire, Kandi ohikiirize ebi waahigire nooraganisa;" 
Job22:28 Oryagira eki waihamu kukora, kibe nk'oku orikwenda, N'omushana guryajwera emihanda yaawe." 
Job22:29 Abantu ku barikugwisa, oryagira oti: Hariho orikuunyimutsya, Kandi omucureezi Ruhanga aryamujuna." 
Job22:30 Aryajuna otaine rubanja, Kandi oryajunwa ahabw'okushemera kw'engaro zaawe." 
Job23:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job23:2 Na hati amaganya gangye n'obugomi, Okuteerwa kwangye nikuremeera okukira okutsinda kwangye," 
Job23:3 Nangwa ku naakumanya ahu naakumushanga, Nkahika aha kitebe kye!" 
Job23:4 Nkaata orubanja rwangye omu maisho ge, Nyijuza akanwa kangye eby'okwetonganira." 
Job23:5 Obwo mmanya eki arangarukyemu Nshoborokyerwa eki arangambire; 
Job23:6 Akaantonganiise nk'omukuru ow'obushoboorozi bwingi? Ngaaha! kureka akaanyetaireho. 
Job23:7 Okwo niyo oine omutima ogugororokire yaakutonganira nawe; Orikuncwera orubanja akarucwa, nkarusingira kimwe." 
Job23:8 Reeba, ku ndikuza omumaisho, nshanga atariyo; Nkigaruka enyima, amburira;" 
Job23:9 Nkitoora aha rubaju rwa bumosho ndemwa kumureeba; Nkihindukira aha rwa buryo, nabwo ndemwa kumubona." 
Job23:10 Kwonka We naamanya omuhanda ogu ndikutoora; Ku ariheza kungyeza, ndyarugamu ninshusha ezaabu." 
Job23:11 Ekigyere kyangye kihamiire omu kirari kye, Omuhanda gwe ngugumiremu, tinaaguteishuka." 
Job23:12 Tindagarukire nyima kuruga omu biragiro ebi yaaragiire, N'ebigambo by'omu kanwa ke mbikunzire okukira eby'okurya ebi ncumiirwe." 
Job23:13 Kwonka We tahinduka. Owaakumuhindura n'oha? Eki ayenda, nikyo akora." 
Job23:14 Mbwenu naija kuhikiiriza eki anteekateekyeire, Kandi ebigambo bingi nk'ebyo abiine aha mutima." 
Job23:15 Nikyo nyiniire obwoba omu maisho ge; Ku ndikuteekateeka, mmutiina." 
Job23:16 Ruhanga agwisize omutima gwangye enshazi, Ow'obushoboorozi bwona antuntwize," 
Job23:17 Ahabw'okuba nyehinguririziibwe omwirima, Kandi omwirima ndindindi gwanshwenka ahamaisho." 
Job24:1 Ahabw'enki Ow'obushoboorozi bwona tataho bunaku bw'okucweraho emanja? Kandi ahabw'enki abarikumumanya batabureeba? 
Job24:2 Hariho abakuura ebiti by'emyatano, Bakanyagisa amaani amasyo, bakagariisa;" 
Job24:3 Bakafunya endogoya y'abataine baishebo, N'ente y'omufaakazi bakagikwatiriza;" 
Job24:4 Bakabinga abakyene omu muhanda, N'abooro b'omu nsi boona bakeeshereka." 
Job24:5 Reeba, ni nk'enturegye z'omu ihamba, bashohora, baza aha murimo, Nibasherura omu ihamba eky'okwita, kuba eby'okurya by'abaana baabo;" 
Job24:6 Batema obunyaatsi oburiibwa enyamaishwa omu ishwa, Bahumba omu musiri gw'emizaabibu y'omusiisi;" 
Job24:7 Baraara batajwaire burugaho busheesha, Tibagira ky'okwefubika omu mbeho;" 
Job24:8 Bajubibwa enjura y'omu bibungo, Beekinga omu mabaare babuzire obwegamo." 
Job24:9 Hariho abashahura abataine baishebo, bakabaiha aha mabeere, Bakakwatiriza omwereere w'omukyene;" 
Job24:10 Bagyendagyenda bataine ki bajwaire, Beekorera ebiba baine enjara;" 
Job24:11 Banyuukira majuta g'emizeituuni omu misiri y'ababi, Banyuukira omu manyuukiro gaabo ga viinyo baine eiriho." 
Job24:12 Omu rurembo abarikuga batsinda, Nibataka ngu baheebwe emikono, Kwonka Ruhanga tayeta ha kutaka kwabo." 
Job24:13 Abo n'ab'omuri abo abagomera omushana, Tibamanya mihanda yaagwo, N'obu kwakuba okuguma omu tuhanda twagwo." 
Job24:14 Omwitsi aimuka omu kairima kwita omworo n'omukyene, Kandi nyekiro aba nk'omushuma." 
Job24:15 Eriisho ry'enshambani ritegyereza orwita-waabo, Neegira eti, tihaine orandeebe; Ayetwekyerera ahamaisho." 
Job24:16 Omu mwirima barimiirira amaju, Nyomushana beekingirana, tibamanya kashana." 
Job24:17 Ahabw'okuba aharibo omwirima ndindindi ni nk'akasheeshe, Kandi ebitiinisa abantu omu mwirima ndindindi bo bakabimanyiira." 
Job24:18 Imwe nimugira ngu, Batwarwa juba omwegyemure gw'amaizi, Omugabo gwabo omu nsi n'omukyeeno, Tihariho munyuuki wa viinyo oza omu misiri yaabo y'emizaabibu." 
Job24:19 Ekyanda n'omushana bimaraho amaizi g'ebirika, Kandi n'Okuzimu nikwo egira abasiisire." 
Job24:20 Enda eyaamuzire eryamwebwa, Enyogori zimurye nizimunuriiriza, Tarigaruka kwijukwa bundi; Okutahikiirira kwona kuryahendagurwa nk'ekiti." 
Job24:21 Barya eby'engumba ezitakazaaraga, Tibagira ki bagasira abafaakazi." 
Job24:22 N'obu kiraabe kiri kityo, abo bantu b'amaani Ruhanga abagumyaho n'amaani ge; Ku baba beehweire amatsiko, abaimutsya;" 
Job24:23 Abarinda baguma bari buhooro, bagira obwegamo, amaisho ge tigaruga ha mihanda yaabo." 
Job24:24 Batunguurwa; ku hahwaho akaanya kakye, bahwaho; Bagarurwa ahansi, baihwa omu muhanda nk'abandi boona, Bagyeshwa nk'obushiisha bw'engano." 
Job24:25 Ku biraabe bitari kwo, n'oha oraanyomesereze ekishuba, akahamya ku ebi ndikugamba bitaine ku biri?" 
Job25:1 Bwanyima Biludaadi Omushuuhi yaagarukamu ati: 
Job25:2 Obutegyeki n'ekitiinisa biinwe Ruhanga, Kandi areeta obusingye omu myanya ye ey'omu iguru." 
Job25:3 Amahe ge nigabaasa kubarwa? N'oha otajwerwa mushana gwe? 
Job25:4 omuntu naabaasa ata kuba ohikiriire omu maisho ga Ruhanga? Owaazairwe omukazi naabaasa ata kuba oshemeire? 
Job25:5 Reeba, n'okwezi tikurikumurinkana, N'enyonyoozi tizishemeire mu maisho ge;" 
Job25:6 Reero kaashwa omuntu enyogori, N'omwana w'omuntu omunyongororwa!" 
Job26:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job26:2 Eshi waamanya kuhwera otaine bushoboorozi! Omukono ogutaine maani waamanya kugujuna! 
Job26:3 Otaine bwengye waamanya kumuhabura, Kandi waagamba ebigambo bingi ebirimu okumanya okuhikire!" 
Job26:4 Owaakugambisa ebyo bigambo n'oha? Kandi owmoyo ogwakugambisa n'ogw'oha? 
Job26:5 Abaafiire nibatetemera ahansi y'amaizi, Hamwe n'ebituurayo." 
Job26:6 Okuzimu eri omu maisho ga Ruhanga ajwaire busha, Kandi n'owa nyamuteza taine ky'okweshweka." 
Job26:7 Akabamba obukiizi-bwa-bumosho omu mwanya kwonka, N'ensi yaagihanika ahari busha." 
Job26:8 Yaakoma amaizi omu bicu bikwataine, Ebiro tibyataaguka." 
Job26:9 Ekitebe kye atuura akikingiire, Akishwekire ekicu kye." 
Job26:10 Amaizi akagateeraho obugarukiro, Ahu omushana n'omwirima byatanira." 
Job26:11 Enyomyo z'eiguru zitetema, Zitangaarira okuhana kwe." 
Job26:12 Ahabw'obushoboorozi bwe acureeza enyanja, N'ahabw'obwengye bwe akacumita Rahabu." 
Job26:13 Omwitsyo gwe gureetera eiguru entsya nungi, N'omukono gwe agucumitisa ekijoka ekirikuhunga." 
Job26:14 Reeba, ebyo nibyo, kwonka n'otw'aha rubaju omu mitwarize ye, Kandi n'ebi tumuhuriraho ni bikye munonga nk'okugambirana omu kutu; Kwonka okuhinda kw'obushoboorozi bwe n'oha orikubaasa kukwetegyereza?" 
Job27:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagumizamu naacwa enfumu ze naagira ati: 
Job27:2 Nindahira Ruhanga otahwaho, ogwo onyimire ebyabaire binshemereire, Ow'obushoboorozi bwona otuntwize amagara gangye," 
Job27:3 Nk'oku nkiri ohuriire, N'omwoyo gwa Ruhanga oku gukirikumpa okwitsya," 
Job27:4 Eminwa yangye teribeiha, N'orurimi rwangye tiruriryarya." 
Job27:5 Nikikabure nyowe okugira nti: Muhikire. Okuhitsya obu ndifa, tindireka kuguma ndi omwesigwa;" 
Job27:6 Okuhikiirira kwangye nkuhamiireho, tindikwija kukurekura; Ahi naahika, omutima gwangye tigwine ki gurikunshinja omu bi ndakozire." 
Job27:7 Omuzigu wangye abe nk'ababi, N'orikuunyimukiirira abe nk'abatahikiriire."
