Job27:8 Mbwenu amatsiko g'otarikutiina Ruhanga garahi, Ruhanga ku araabe ari ow'okumucwekyereza, akaihaho amagara ge?" 
Job27:9 Enaku ku zirimuteera, Ruhanga aryahurira okutaka kwe?" 
Job27:10 Aryashemerererwa omu W'obushoboorozi bwona, Agume naatakira Ruhanga ebiro byona?" 
Job27:11 Niinyija kubeegyesa aha by'omukono gwa Ruhanga, Tindikwija kubashereka by'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Job27:12 Reeba, mwena mukabyereebeera; Mbwenu shi, ahabw'enki mwena mubeereire kimwe abataine mugasho?" 
Job27:13 Ogu nigwo mugabo ogu omubi aine ahari Ruhanga; Obu nibwo buhunguzi obu abarikuhata baheebwa Ow'obushoboorozi bwona. 
Job27:14 Abaana be ku barikanya, baryakanyira rurara, Kandi oruzaaro rwe tiruritunga by'okurya eby'okuruhaazya." 
Job27:15 Abarihonokaho, rufu eryabamira, N'abafaakazi be tibaribacurira." 
Job27:16 N'obu arirunda efeeza nk'omucuucu, Akeegirira ebijwaro ebirikwingana eitaka," 
Job27:17 Abirunde, kwonak abahikiriire nibo baribijwara, N'efeeza ze ziryabaganwa abataine rubanja." 
Job27:18 Enju ei arikwombeka ni nk'orububi rw'orutangura, Nk'akaju akasharabagwa omurinzi." 
Job27:19 Aza kubyama ari omutungi, kwonka tariba atyo obundi; Ku aza kubuurura ati amaisho, ashanga obutungi bwe bwagyenzire." 
Job27:20 Ebirikutiinisa bimweshukaho nk'omwegyemure, Akasooroora kamutwara nyekiro;" 
Job27:21 Omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba gumutuntumura, agyenderayo, Gumwihira kimwe ahu yaaba ari." 
Job27:22 Ruhanga amuteera atarikumusaasira, N'obu yaakwenda kumwoga omu mikono kuhunga." 
Job27:23 Abantu baryamubinga nibamwemaamaatira, Nibeeshaanya ngu arugye omu ka ye." 
Job28:1 Buzimazima efeeza egira ekiina eki etimbwamu, N'ezaabu ei bashemeza egira omwanya gwayo;" 
Job28:2 Ekyoma kiihwa omu itaka, N'omuringa gyagibwa omu butare." 
Job28:3 Abantu tibeeta ha mwirima, Bagwogamu, bahika aha muheru gwagwo, Nibasherura obutare omu mwirima gw'ekibunda kya rufu." 
Job28:4 Batimba ebiina hare n'ahu abantu batwire; Beebwa abagyenzi, barereetera hare n'abantu, Beecunda nibakora oku n'oku." 
Job28:5 Eitaka ryo rirugwamu eby'okurya, Kwonka okuzimu oshusha oti eitaka ryayo niritabuurwa omuriro." 
Job28:6 Amabaare gaayo garugwamu safiro, Kandi egira ezaabu y'omucuucu." 
Job28:7 Ogwo muhanda tigumanywa mpungu, N'eriisho ry'eishamba tirikagureebaga;" 
Job28:8 Enyamaishwa z'amaryo tizikaguribatamuga, N'entare enshaarizi tekagurabamuga." 
Job28:9 Omuntu akununkirira eibaare ry'enkangabuye, Arimiirira emizi y'enshozi, azijuumika;" 
Job28:10 Acwa emikura omu nkiri, Kandi eriisho rye rireeba ekintu kyona eky'obuguzi bwingi;" 
Job28:11 Aigarira amaizi ngu garekye kujwa, Kandi ekituura kisherekirwe, akiihayo kireebwa." 
Job28:12 Mbwenu obwengye bukaazoorwa hi? Nari shi okwetegyereza kukaaboneka hi? 
Job28:13 Tihariho orikumanya omuhanda ogurikuza ei buri, Tibuzoorwa mu nsi y'abahuriire." 
Job28:14 Okuzimu neegira eti: Tiburi muriinye, N'enyanja eti: Tiinye mbwine." 
Job28:15 Tiburikubaasa kutungwa ahabw'ezaabu, Kandi tihariho feeza erikupimwa ekahitsya obuguzi bwabwao." 
Job28:16 Tiburikubaasa kwinganisibwa na zaabu ya Ofiri, Nari shohamu ey'obuguzi bwingi, n'obu yaakuba safiro." 
Job28:17 Ezaabu n'ebirahuri tibirikwingana nabwo, Kandi tiburikubaasa kuhingisibwa bintu by'ezaabu eshemeziibwe;" 
Job28:18 Korali na kristalo nabyo tibikaagambwaho, Obuguzi bwabwao nibukira obw'eruuru." 
Job28:19 Topazi ya Esiopia terikubaasa kugyeranisibwa nabwo, Kandi tiburikubaasa kwinganisibwa n'ezabu enungi." 
Job28:20 Mbwenu shi obwengye buruga hi? N'omwanya gw'okumanya gurahi? 
Job28:21 Ahakuba busherekirwe abahuriire boona, Kandi bushwekirwe ngu enyonyi z'omu mwanya zitabureeba." 
Job28:22 Okuzimu na Rufu nibigira biti: Tuhuriire nibabugambaho. 
Job28:23 Ruhanga niwe arikumanya omuhanda ogurikuza ei buri, Kandi naamanya ahu butaaha;" 
Job28:24 Ahabw'okuba anaga amaisho aha muheru gw'ensi, Kandi ebiri ahansi y'eiguru byona abireeba." 
Job28:25 Obu yaaha omuyaga ekiragiro, Akarengyesa amaizi endengo," 
Job28:26 Obu yaateeraho enjura ekiragiro, Akateeraho emirabyo emihanda," 
Job28:27 Obwo nibwo yaabureeba, akabumanyisa, Akabuhamya, akabucondooza," 
Job28:28 Akagira omuntu ati: Reeba, okutiina MUKAMA nibwo bwengye, N'okutaana n'ekibi nikwo kwetegyereza." 
Job29:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagumizamu naacwa enfumu ze, naagira ati:" 
Job29:2 Nkaabaasibwa ki, mba nk'oku naabaire ndi omu meezi agaahingwire, Nk'omu biro ebi Ruhanga yaabaire andindiramu," 
Job29:3 Etabaaza ye neeyakira aha mutwe gwangye, Nindaba omu mwirima ahabw'okuhwezesa kwe," 
Job29:4 Nk'oku naabaire ndi, ndi omushaija waahamya, Obu Ruhanga yaabaire akiine omukago n'eka yangye." 
Job29:5 Obwo Ow'obushoboorozi bwona akaba ari hamwe naanye, Abaana bangye bankiikize;" 
Job29:6 Ebigyere byangye nibinaabisibwa n'amate, N'orukiri niruunyitururira emigyera y'amajuta." 
Job29:7 Ku naabaire nza aha irembo ry'orurembo, Naata ekitebe kyange omu mbuga," 
Job29:8 Abatsigazi bakaba bandeeba, bampigiza, N'abagurusi baimuka, beemerera; q" 
Job29:9 Abanyiginya baceceka, bafa mamigye, Bataire engaro aha munwa;" 
Job29:10 Eiraka ry'abakungu rihunamisibwa, Endimi zibaramata omu nkanka." 
Job29:11 Okutu kwona okwabaire kumpurira, kuunyeta ohiiriirwe, N'eriisho eryabaire rindeeba, rikihamya;" 
Job29:12 Ahabw'okuba nkaba njuna omworo owaabaire ataka, N'efuuzi etaine kihwera;" 
Job29:13 Orikwenda kufa anshabira omugisha, Kandi nkaba ndeetera omutima gw'omufaakazi kweshongora ahabw'okushemererwa." 
Job29:14 Nkaba njwara okuhikiirira, kumpika; Obwinganisa bwangye bukaba buri nk'omunagiro n'ekikwemba." 
Job29:15 Empumi nkaba nzibeera amaisho, N'ebirema mbibeera amaguru;" 
Job29:16 Nkaba ndi ishe w'abooro, N'abu ntarikumanya, mbuuririza ekirikubasaasa;" 
Job29:17 Nkaba mpigura emba z'abasiisi, Mbanagisa ebi baine omu maino." 
Job29:18 Omu biro ebyo nkaba ngira nti: Ndyagwa omu kyashuri kyangye, Nkanyise ebiro byangye bibe nk'omusheenyi;" 
Job29:19 Emizi yangye erandire omu maizi, N'amataagi gangye gatondweho orume, burugyeho busheeshe," 
Job29:20 Ekitiinisa kyangye kigume kibe kisya, N'obuta bwangye bugume buri busya omu ngaro zangye." 
Job29:21 Obwo abantu bakaba bantega okutu, Batengyereza eki ndaahanuure bahunami." 
Job29:22 Ku naabaire mpeza kugamba, bakaba batagarukamu, Ebigambo byangye bibatoonyereraho." 
Job29:23 Bakaba bantegyereza nk'abategyereize enjura, Baashama nk'abategyereize enjura ya katumba." 
Job29:24 Nkaba mbasherekyera, beehweire amatsiko, Kandi bakaba batammaraho kushemuuka." 
Job29:25 Nkaba mbaihiramu ebi baraakore, nshutama nabo nk'omukuru waabo, Mbatuuramu nk'omugabe omu ngabo ze, Kandi nk'orikugumya abarikucura." 
Job30:1 Kwonka mbwenu abu ndikukira obukuru, Abu naakugayire baishebo ngu batahika embwa ezirinda obusyo bwangye, Nibanteerera enaku." 
Job30:2 Abo bantu abahweirwemu amaani, Emikono yaabo ekaangasira ki?" 
Job30:3 Bahweire aha magufa ahabw'obukyene n'enjara, Nibaguga eitaka ryomire ery'aha mbuga," 
Job30:4 Nibashoroma emifura n'amababi g'ebindi bishaka, N'enkonya z'ebinyagashani nibo by'okurya byabo." 
Job30:5 Nibacuubwa omu bantu, Enduuru neebajuga enyima nk'abashuma." 
Job30:6 Obutaaho bwabo n'ensa z'emitunga, N'amaaya g'omu itaka, n'enyanga z'omu mabaare." 
Job30:7 Nibaririra omu bishaka nk'endogoya, Beeteeranira omu bicuragyenyi;" 
Job30:8 N'abaana ba'abashema, b'abantu abataine ku bari, Nibabingwa omu nsi n'enkoba." 
Job30:9 Mbwenu hati mpindukire ekyeshongoro kyabo, Buzima mbabeereire eky'okucweraho enfumu;" 
Job30:10 Bantamirwe, baanyetantara, Kandi tibarikutiina kuncwera mumaisho;" 
Job30:11 Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ayugize omurunga gwangye, yancureeza. Tibakingirira kashoni." 
Job30:12 Aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo haimukire omutwe gw'abantu abataine ku bari, Bambinga, bamburabuza, Barunda eby'okutemberaho ngu bancwekyereze;" 
Job30:13 Baita omuhanda gwangye, bakanyisa enaku zangye; Tihaine orikubazibira." 
Job30:14 Baija nk'abarikuraba ahasheenyukire ahahango, Baayekumbagariza aha rugo rugwire, bangwaho." 
Job30:15 Ebirikutiinisa biinyehindukiriize, Ekitiinisa kyangye kibingirwe nk'ekirikubingwa omuyaga; Okugogyera kwangye nikuyaayuuka nk'ekicu." 
Job30:16 Kandi hati omutima gumpwire omunda, Ebiro by'obusaasi bimbumbatiire;" 
Job30:17 Nyekiro amagufa gangye nigaanyogamu, Obuhuruzi oburikunsaasa tiburikutuuza;" 
Job30:18 Ahabw'amaani gaabwo ekijwaro kyangye nikisiisikara, Nibunniga nk'ebitsya by'ekanzu." 
Job30:19 Ruhanga annagire omu byondo, Naahinduka nk'omucuucu n'eiju." 
Job30:20 Ninkutakira, torikungarukamu; Nyemereire, torikuunyetaho." 
Job30:21 Ompindukiire enshaarizi, Nompiiga n'omukono gwawe ogw'amaani." 
Job30:22 Nontumuura n'omuyaga oguntembesaho, Onnaga oku n'oku n'eihunga ry'amaani;" 
Job30:23 Eego nimmanya ku orimpitsya ha kufa, N'omu nju eyaateereirweho abahuriire boona." 
Job30:24 Beitu shi, omuntu obandamiirwe enju, tiamutsya omukono, N'omu kabi ke tateera enduuru?" 
Job30:25 Tindariire owaabaire ari omu busaasi? Omutima gwangye tigurasaasiibwe omworo? 
Job30:26 Kwonka nyowe, ku naabaire ntegyereza ebirungi, haija ebibi; Nkitegyereza omushana, haija omwirima." 
Job30:27 Omutima gwangye nigurabanamu tigutuurize; Ebiro by'okubonabona byampikaho. 
Job30:28 Ningyenda nyiragwire, ntairaguziibwe mushana, Nyemerera omu iteeraniro, ninteera enduuru." 
Job30:29 Ndi ishe-emwe na zaamuha, Mugyenzi wa zaamaaya." 
Job30:30 Omubiri gwangye gwiragwire, gwayonoka, N'amagufa gangye gucumikirwemu omuriro." 
Job30:31 Nikyo enanga yangye ehinduriirwe ey'okucura, N'omukuri gwangye gukateererwa abarikurira." 
Job31:1 Nkaragaana endagaano n'amaisho gangye; Mbwenu nimbaasa nta kureeba omwishiki, nkamwetenga?" 
Job31:2 Nkaatunga mugabo ki ahari Ruhanga? Kandi obuhunguzi bwangye oburikuruga aha W'obushoboorozi bwona ahaiguru bukaba ki? 
Job31:3 Ebihikiirizi tibigwera abatahikiriire, N'akagwe kakagwera enkozi z'ebibi?" 
Job31:4 Ruhanga tarikureeba emihanda yangye, Akabara entambwe zangye zoona?" 
Job31:5 Ku ndaabe ndagyenzire nimbeiha, Ebigyere byangye bikeehuuta kuza kugobya," 
Job31:6 (Ka mpimwe omu minzaani ey'amazima, Ruhanga amanye obwesigwa bwangye!)" 
Job31:7 Ekigyere kyangye ku kiraabe kirateishukire omuhanda, N'omutima gwangye gukakurata ebi amaisho gangye geetenga, Nari engaro zangye ku ziraabe ziragiirweho akabara koona," 
Job31:8 Ninkabibe, ondiijo akarya, N'ebi naahingire omu musiri gwangye bikakuurwamu." 
Job31:9 Omutima gwangye ku guraabe guratwairwe omukazi, Nkagwera aha rwigi rwa mutaahi wangye," 
Job31:10 Omukazi wangye naakaseere ondiijo, N'abandi bakamujuumarira;" 
Job31:11 Ahabw'okuba ekyo kikaabaire ekicumuro kihango munonga; Eego, kikaabaire ekibi ky'okufubirwa abaramuzi." 
Job31:12 ahakuba ekyo kibi n'omuriro ogurikwokyeza kimwe, gukamaraho, Kandi ekirikubaasa kurandura ebi mpingire byona." 
Job31:13 Ku ndaabe ndagayire orubanja rw'omuhuuku wangye, nari orw'omuzaana wangye, Obu bantonganisa," 
Job31:14 Ndyagira nta, Ruhanga ku ariimuka? Nari shi, ku yaakubimbuuza, nkaamugarukamu ki?" 
Job31:15 Owampangire omu nda ya maawe, tiwe yaahangire n'ogwo? Owaatuhangire omu nda t'omwe?" 
Job31:16 Hariho obu ndaimire omworo eki arikwetenga, Nari shi, okumara amatsiko amaisho g'omufakaazi?" 
Job31:17 Nari hariho obu ndariire ak'okurya kangye nyenka, Efuuzi etakaboneho?" 
Job31:18 Kureka okuruga omu butsigazi bwangye nkarera ogwo mworo nka ihse, N'omufaakazi nkamureeberera, okwiha obu naaruga omu nda ya maawe." 
Job31:19 Ku ndaabe ndareebire omuntu naafa ahabw'okubura ekijwaro, Nari enshoberwa ebuzire eky'okweshweka," 
Job31:20 Nari obwezirikiro bwe butaransiimire, Kandi atamarwe mbeho oruhu rw'entaama zangye;" 
Job31:21 Ku ndaabe ndabangiire efuuzi omukono, Ahabw'okureeba aha irembo orikugwera orubaju rwangye," 
Job31:22 Eibega ryangye nirikataane n'orwano, N'omukono gwangye gukanyukuka omu ngingo!" 
Job31:23 Ahabw'okuba ebihikiirizi ebirikuruga ahari Ruhanga bikaba biinyitsa obwoba, Kandi ndemwa kugumisiririza ekitiinisa kye ekingi." 
Job31:24 Ku ndaabe ndahindwire ezaabu amatsiko gangye, Nkagira ezaabu eshemeziibwe nti, Niiwe bwesigye bwangye," 
Job31:25 Ku ndaabe ndeesiimire ahabw'okugira eitungo ringi, Nari ahabw'omukono gwangye kutunga bingi;" 
Job31:26 Ku ndaabe ndahangire eizooba amaisho niryaka, Nari okwezi nikugyenda nikumurinkana," 
Job31:27 Kandi omutima gwangye gukabeihwabeihwa bwesherekye, Akanwa kangye kakanywegyera engaro zangye," 
Job31:28 Ekyo nakyo kikaabaire ekibi eky'okufubirwa mpemukire ahari Ruhanga ow'ahaiguru munonga. 
Job31:29 Hariho obu ndashemerereirwe okucwekyerera kw'orikuunyanga, Nari shi nkeesiima habw'akagwe akaamugwaho?" 
Job31:30 (Ngaaha! tindarekire kanwa kangye kucumura, Ngu mmushabire okufa nimmukyeena.)" 
Job31:31 Hariho obu ab'omu ka yangye batagira bati: N'oha omuriimwe otaarya nyama, akahaaga?" 
Job31:32 (Tihariho mushuhuuki ou ndaraarize omu muhanda; Kureka nkaba nyigurira omuhinguzi weena.) 
Job31:33 Ku ndaabe ndasherekire abantu okushiisha kwangye, Nkashereka omu kifuba okutahikiirira kwangye," 
Job31:34 Ahabw'okutiina munonga omutwe muhango gw'abantu, N'okutiina okugaywa ab'emiryango yaitu, Kikandeetera kuhunama n'omkutashohora;" 
Job31:35 Nkaabasibwa ki, hagira owampurira! (Reeba, akamanyiso kangye nkaka! Ow'obushoboorozi bwona angarukyemu, Naanye ndeebe ebirego ebihandiikirwe omubisha wangye.)" 
Job31:36 Buzimazima nkaabiheeka aha mabega, Mbijwara nk'ekirunga," 
Job31:37 Nkaamumanyisa ebi naakozire byona omu mitwarize yangye, Mmuhika haihi nk'omunyiginya." 
Job31:38 Ekyaro kyangye ku kiraabe kirantabaarize, Entabire zaakyo zikaririra hamwe," 
Job31:39 Ku ndaabe ndariire omweru gwakyo ntaine u mpaire ebihembo, Nari shi nkareetera bakama baakyo kufa," 
Job31:40 Amatojo nigakamere omu mwanya gw'engano, N'orumbugu rukamera omuri sayiri. Ebigambo bya Yobu byagarukira aha." 
Job32:1 Batyo abo bantu bonshatu baarekyera aho kugarukamu Yobu, ahabw'okuba akaba naayemanya ku ahikiriire." 
Job32:2 Bwanyima Elihu mwene Barakeeli, Omubuuzi ow'omu muryango gwa Raamu, yaagira ekiniga. Yaagirira Yobu ekiniga ahabw'okweyeta ohikiriire okukira Ruhanga;" 
Job32:3 kandi yaakigirira na bagyenzi ba Yobu abo bonshatu, ahabw'okubura eky'okumugarukamu, n'ou baraabe bahamize ku ari omusiisi." 
Job32:4 Kwonka Elihu akaba ategyereize kugamba na Yobu, ahabw'okuba abo bakaba nibamukira obukuru." 
Job32:5 Elihu ku yaareebire abo bonshatu baabura eky'okugarukamu, yaagira ekiniga." 
Job32:6 Atyo Elihu mwene Barakeeli Omubuuzi yaagira ati: Ndi muto; imwe muri abagurusi; Nikyo kindeeteire kutiina, ntarahukye kubamanyisa eki ndikuteekateeka;" 
Job32:7 Nkagira nti: Ka hagambe abaine ebiro bingi, Abamazire emyaka mingi babe nibo baayegyesa obwengye." 
Job32:8 Kwonka ekihaisa omuntu okwetegyereza N'omwoyo oguri omuriwe, omwitsyo gw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Job32:9 Abahikire omu ngingo zaabukuru tibo baine bwengye, N'abagurusi tibo barikumanya by'oburyo." 
Job32:10 Nikyo ndikugirira nti: Muntegye amatu, Naanye mbagambire ebi ndikuteekateeka." 
Job32:11 Reeba, mbaire ntegyereize ebigambo byanyu; Obu mubaire nimuteekateeka eby'okugamba, Naagira ngu, mpurire ebi muraagambe." 
Job32:12 Buzimazima ntaireho omutima kubahurira, Kwonka tihariho n'omwe omuriimwe oyemeize Yobu, N'obu kwakuba okugarukamu ebigambo bye." 
Job32:13 Mwerinde, mutakaayekwatsa mukagira ngu: Niitwe tuzoirwe obwengye; Tihariho muntu owaakumubaasa, kureka akaabaasibwa Ruhanga." 
Job32:14 Manya, ebi agambire, tiinye ahakaniise; Naanye tindikwija kumugarukisamu ebyanyu." 
Job32:15 Bashobeirwe, tibakigarukamu, Tibaine ky'okugamba." 
Job32:16 Mbwenu mpuname, ngu niho batakiine ky'okugamba, Kureka okwemerera aho, bakabura eky'okugarukamu?" 
Job32:17 Naanye niinyija kugira eki naagarukamu, Ngambe eki ndikuteekateeka;" 
Job32:18 Ahabw'okuba nyine bingi munonga eby'okugamba; Omwoyo oguri omuriinye nigwo gurikungyema. 
Job32:19 Reeba, omutima gwangye nigushusha viinyo etaine bwikizo, Nigwenda kubaruka nk'efurebe za viinyo y'omutahe." 
Job32:20 Ka ngambe, nyitsye; Nyashame, mbone kugarukamu." 
Job32:21 Tindikwija kugwera rubaju rw'omuntu weena, N'obu kwakuba okugira ou naashunga;" 
Job32:22 Ahabw'okuba timmanya kushunga; ku naakukikora, Omuhangi wangye akaanyita kitaraariire." 
Job33:1 Mbwenu, Yobu, ninkweshengyereza, hurira ebi ndikugamba; Ote omutima aha bigambo byangye byona." 
Job33:2 Reeba naayashama, Orurimi rw'omu kanwa kangye nirugamba;" 
Job33:3 Ebigambo byangye nibyoreka ku omutima gwangye gugororokire, Kandi ebi ndikumanya nibyo eminwa yangye eraagambe etaine buryarya." 
Job33:4 Omwoyo wa Ruhanga niwe yampangire, N'omwityso gw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona nigwo gumpa amagara." 
Job33:5 Ku oraabe noobaasa, ngarukamu; Tebeekanisa gye ebigambo byawe omu maisho gangye, oyemerere aho." 
Job33:6 Reeba, omu maisho ga Ruhanga nyowe naiwe nitwingana; Naanye nkahangwa omu itaka." 
Job33:7 Reeba, omuriinye tiharimu kirikutiinisa ekishemereire kukwitsa obwoba; Tindikwija kukurusya." 
Job33:8 Buzimazima, ebi obaire noogamba, mbihuriire, N'eiraka ryabyo ryampika omu matu." 
Job33:9 Noogira oti: Ndi mwere, tiinyine ki nshobize; Ndi oshemeire, kandi omuriinye tiharimu kutahikiirira;" 
Job33:10 Kwonka Ruhanga aine ahu aihire kundwanisa, Nanteekateekaho nk'omuzigu we;" 
Job33:11 Ata ebigyere byangye omu nkomo, Aguma ataire eriisho aha mihanda yangye yoona." 
Job33:12 Reeba, ka nkugarukyemu, omuri ebyo tohikire; ahakuba Ruhanga ni mukuru okukira omuntu." 
Job33:13 Ahabw'enki noomuhakanisa, noogira oti: Tarikwija kugarukamu kigambo kyangye na kimwe?" 
Job33:14 Ahakuba Ruhanga agamba omu muringo gumwe nari ebiri, N'obu omuntu araabe atakyetaho," 
Job33:15 Omu kirooto, omu kworekwa nyekiro, Abantu bahirwayo, bagwejegyereire omu bitanda byabo." 
Job33:16 Obwo nibwo aiguru amatu g'abantu, akabatiinisa naabahana," 
Job33:17 Ngu abone kuzibira omuntu ebi arikwenda kukoa, N'okumumaramu amaryo." 
Job33:18 Ruhanga azibira omutima gwe kugwa omu Kiina, N'amagara ge kumarwaho rurara." 
Job33:19 Kandi omuntu ahanwa obusaasi ari aha kitanda kye, N'omu magufa ge haguma harimu orugamba," 
Job33:20 Bireetera amagara ge kutamwa eby'okurya; N'obu byakuba ebirikunura munonga tabigirira ifa. 
Job33:21 Enyama zimuhwa aha magufa, zibura kureebwa; N'amagufa ge, agaabaire gatarikureebwa, gatunama." 
Job33:22 Omwoyo gwe gwiririra Ekiina, N'amagara ge gairirira abahwerekyerezi." 
Job33:23 Ku akubonekyerwa maraika w'okumutonganira, Nangwa omwe wenka omuri rukumi ow'okumumanyisa ebimushemereire," 
Job33:24 Yaamugirira embabazi naagira ati: Mujune, atagwa omu Kiina; ndeebire, eky'okumucungura." 
Job33:25 Omubiri gwe gugarukye gube muto nk'ogw'omwana, Agire amaani nk'agu yaabaire aine omu butsigazi bwe." 
Job33:26 Obwo nibwo omuntu yaakushaba Ruhanga, akamwakiira, Akaija ah'ari n'okushemererwa, Akagambira abantu eby'okujuna kwe," 
Job33:27 Akeeshongorera omu maisho g'abantu, Akagira ati: Nkashiisha, naakiikamya ebyabaire bihikire, tinaabiturwa;" 
Job33:28 Kureka yaacungura omwoyo gwangye, tigwaza mu Kiina; N'amagara gangye garyareeba omushana." 
Job33:29 Reeba, Ruhanga akora ebyo byona, Naatwaza atyo omuntu kabiri nari kashatu," 
Job33:30 Ngu abone kwiha omwoyo gwe omu Kiina, Ngu areebe omushana gw'amagara." 
Job33:31 Nyaabura 'we, Yobu, tega amatu, ompurire; Ohuname, ngambe." 
Job33:32 Ku oraabe oine eki orikugamba, ngarukamu; Gamba; ahabw'okuba niinye nda kukwihaho orubanja." 
Job33:33 Ku oraabe otakiine, ntega okutu; Ohuname, nkuhabure obwengye." 
Job34:1 Bwanyima Elihu yaagaruka yaagira ati: 
Job34:2 Imwe banyabwengye 'mwe, nimuhurire ebigambo byangye; Imwe abaine okumanya, muntegye amatu;" 
Job34:3 Ahabw'okuba okutu kutaanisa ebigambo, Nk'oku orurimi rumanya eby'okurya." 
Job34:4 Ka tutoorane ebihikire, Tweyihiremu ekirungi;" 
Job34:5 Ahakuba Yobu agizire ati: Ndi ohikiriire, Ruhanga anyihireho ebinshemereire." 
Job34:6 N'obu ndaabe mpikiriire, niinyetwa omunyakishuba, Obuhuta bwangye tiburikutambwa, n'obu ndaabe ntaine kicumuro." 
Job34:7 Ni muntu ki ori nka Yobu, Orikugotomera okugaya nk'amaizi," 
Job34:8 Akagyenda n'ebigombe by'enkozi z'ebibi, Naakwatanisa n'abantu babi." 
Job34:9 Ahakuba agizire ati: okushemerererwa omuri Ruhanga Tikwine ki kurikugasira omuntu. 
Job34:10 N'ahabw'ekyo mumpurire, imwe bantu abarikwetegyereza 'mwe, Nikikabure Ruhanga okukora ebitahikire, O'owobushoboorozi bwona okukora kubi!" 
Job34:11 Ahakuba aryazimuurira omuntu, nk'oku emirimo ye eri, Kandi amareetere okuhikwaho ebishemereire emitwarize ye." 
Job34:12 Buzimazima Ruhanga tarikora kubi, O'wobushoboorozi bwona tariita manja." 
Job34:13 N'oha owaamukwatsize ensi kugitegyeka? Nari shi n'oha owaamwekoreize ensi yoona? 
Job34:14 Ku yaakwaka abantu omwoyo gwe, Yaayegarurira omwitsyo gwe," 
Job34:15 Abaine omubiri boona bakaacwekererera hamwe, Omuntu agaruka omu mucuucu." 
Job34:16 Ku oraabe nooyetegyereza, hurira eki, Otegye okutu eki ndikugamba." 
Job34:17 Noogira ngu orikwanga obwinganisa, aryategyeka? Okaacwera Ohikiriire kandi Ow'obushoboorozi orubanja kumusinga," 
Job34:18 Kihikire okugira omugabe oti: Toine mugasho, N'abakungu oti: Muri babi!" 
Job34:19 Otagwera orubaju rw'abanyiginya, N'obu kwakuba okweta aha batungi okukira abooro, Haza boona yaabahangire n'emikono ye?" 
Job34:20 Bafa omu kaanya kakye, N'omu itumbi abantu batema, bagyenderayo, Ab'amaani baihwaho, bataihirweho mukono gw'omuntu." 
Job34:21 Manya, amaisho ge atuura agataire aha mitwarize y'omuntu, Kandi ayetegyereza emigyendere ye yoona." 
Job34:22 Tihariho mwirima, n'obu kyakuba ekibunda kya rufu, Ahu enkozi z'ebibi zaakubaasa kweshereka." 
Job34:23 Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga tarikwetenga kugaruka kwetegyereza omuntu, Ataikaizire mu maisho ge kucwerwa orubanja." 
Job34:24 Ahendagura ab'amaani atabuurize, Ata abandi omu myanya yaabo." 
Job34:25 Ahabw'okumanya atyo ebi barikukora, Abajuumika nyekiro, bacwekyerera." 
Job34:26 Abateerera omu maisho g'abantu, Naabatura obubi bwabo," 
Job34:27 Ahabw'okuba bakateishuka, baareka kumukurata, Baayanga kuta omutima aha mihanda ye yoona." 
Job34:28 Batyo baamuhitsyaho okutaka kw'abooro, Yaahurira okutaka kw'abarikubonabonesibwea." 
Job34:29 Ku yaakuha obusingye, n'oha owaakureeta okujagarara? Ku yaakushereka ah'amaisho ge, n'oha owaakumureeba, Yaaba ihanga, nari omuntu?" 
Job34:30 Ngu omuntu otarikutiina Ruhanga arekye kutegyeka, Akanaga abantu omu mutego." 
Job34:31 Mbwenu hariho oragizire Ruhanga ati: Mpanirwe; tindigaruka kucumura; 
Job34:32 Eki ntarikureeba, kiinyegyese; Ku ndaabe naakozire kubi, tindigarukira?" 
Job34:33 Noogira ngu ahabw'okwanga ekifubiro kya Ruhanga, Aryakuzimuurira nk'oku orikwenda? Manya niiwe oshemereire kwihamu eki orikwenda, tiinye. N'ahabw'ekyo gamba eki orikumanya." 
Job34:34 Abantu abarikwetegyereza, n'omunyabwenge weena orikumpurira, Nabaija kugira bati:" 
Job34:35 Yobu naagamba ebi atarikumanya, Ebigambo bye tibirimu bwengye." 
Job34:36 Nkaahenwa ki, Yobu agyezibwa okuhika aha muheru, Ahakuba naagarukamu nk'oku ababi bagarukamu." 
Job34:37 Ahabw'okuba naayongyera obugomi aha kibi kye, Atuteerera engaro naatuhena, Agamba ebigambo bingi eby'okuhakanisa Ruhanga." 
Job35:1 Elihu yaagaruka yaagira ati: 
Job35:2 Noogira ngu ekigambo eki kihikire, Iwe okugira oti: Okuhikiirira kwangye nikukira okwa Ruhanga," 
Job35:3 N'okubuuza okabuuza oti: Nikingasira ki? Noogira ngu hati ndi gye okukira oku naakubaire ndi, kuri naasiisire?" 
Job35:4 Naaza kukugarukamu hamwe na bagyenzi baawe. 
Job35:5 Ta amaisho ahaiguru, oreebe, Oyetegyereze ebicu, ebiri ahaiguru munonga okukukira." 
Job35:6 Ku oraabe waasiisire, oine eki omwitsize? N'eby'okushiisha byawe, ku biraabe bikanyire, biine oku bimugizire?" 
Job35:7 Ku ohikiriire, omuhaire ki? Nari shi, ahairwe ki ekirugire omu ngaro zaawe?" 
Job35:8 Ebibi byawe nibisaasa omuntu-buntu nkaiwe, Kandi okuhikiirira kwawe nikugasira omwana w'omuntu." 
Job35:9 Abantu batakisibwa okwitwa kubi okurengyesereize, Bashaba kuheebwa emikono ahabw'okuhata ab'obushoboorozi." 
Job35:10 Kwonka tihariho orikugira ati: Ruhanga Omuhangi wangye arahi, Oreetera abantu kweshongora nyekiro," 
Job35:11 Otwegyesa bingi tukakira enyamaishwa z'omu nsi, Kandi otuha obwengye okukira enyonyi z'omu mwanya?" 
Job35:12 Okwo niyo batakira, kwonka atabagarukyemu, Ahabw'amaryo g'abantu babi." 
Job35:13 N'ekya buzima Ruhanga tahurira barikurizibwa busha, Kandi Ow'obushoboorozi bwona tabyetaho;" 
Job35:14 Kaashwa iwe orikugira ngu tomureeba, Orubanja rwawe ruri omu maisho ge, Kandi ngu omutegyereize!" 
Job35:15 Mbwenu, nk'oku atahanisa kiniga, Kandi nk'oku ateeta ha banyamaryo," 
Job35:16 Nikyo Yobu arikugambira busha, Akafukunkuka ebigambo bitarimu bwengye." 
Job36:1 Kandi Elihu yaagumizamu naagira ati: 
Job36:2 Ngumisiririza kakye, nkworekye, Ahakuba nkiine ebi ndikwenda kugamba ahabwa Ruhanga." 
Job36:3 Niinyija kureeta obwengye bwangye, mbwihe hare, Ngambe nimpamya ku Omuhangi wangye ahikiriire;" 
Job36:4 Ahabw'okuba buzima ebigambo byangye ti bishuba; Oine okumanya okuhikire ari hamwe naiwe. 
Job36:5 Reeba, Ruhanga n'ow'amaani, kandi tagira u agaya; N'ow'obushoboorozi, kandi amaani ge gari omu kwetegyereza." 
Job36:6 Tagumyaho mubi, Kwonka abarikubonabona abaha ebibashemereire." 
Job36:7 Taiha maisho ge aha bahikiriire, Kureka abashutamya n'abagabe aha bitebe obutarugaho, batunguuka." 
Job36:8 Kandi ku bakomwa omu mihama, Baakwatwa emirunga y'okubonabona," 
Job36:9 Atyo abooreka ebi baakozire n'ebicumuro byabo, Kuhamya ku baabikoreise amaryo." 
Job36:10 Aigura amatu gaabo, kuhurira ebirikwegyesibwa, Abaragiira kuruga omu kutahikiirira." 
Job36:11 Ku bamuhurira, baamuheereza, Bamara ebiro byabo omu kugogyera, N'emyaka yaabo bagimara bagwirwe gye." 
Job36:12 Kwonka ku banga kuhurira, bamarwaho na rurara, Bafa bataine kibamanyire." 
Job36:13 Abatatiina Ruhanga mu mitima yaabo beebiikira ekiniga, Ku ababoha, tibataka ngu bahwerwe." 
Job36:14 Bafa bahenderwa omunyeeto, N'omuheru gw'amagara gaabo guba okuhemuka." 
Job36:15 Ruhnaga ajuna abarikubonabonesibwa naaraba omu kubonaboona kwabo, Aigura amatu gaabo ahabw'okureeba enaku." 
Job36:16 N'ekya buzima, akaabaire akwihire omu naku, Akutaire ahagarami ahatafunzire, Haza ebyakutairwe ahameeza yaawe biba eby'ebishaju." 
Job36:17 Kwonka omutima gwawe tigubamu kindi kureka okucwera ababi emanja; Mbwenu orubanja rw'oburyo orukushemereire rwakukwata. 
Job36:18 Oyerinde ekiniga kitakaakureetera okwemanya; Okubonabona kwawe kwingi kukakuteishura omuhanda. 
Job36:19 Noogira ngu obutungi bwawe n'obushoboorozi bw'amaani gaawe bwona Nibiija kukumara, bikuzibire kureeba enaku?" 
Job36:20 Oteetenga ekyo kiro kuhika, Eki amahanga gaihirwaho, gakacwekyerezibwa." 
Job36:21 Oyerinde, orekye kuta amaisho aha kutahikiirira; Ahakuba otooraine kutwaza otyo, okukira okubonabona." 
Job36:22 Reeba, Ruhanga ahimbisibwa ahabw'obushoboorozi bwe. N'oha oyegyesa nkawe?" 
Job36:23 N'oha oramuhabwire oku ashemereire kutwza? Nari shi n'oha owaakumugira ati: Waashobya. 
Job36:24 Ijuka kusingiza omurimo gwe, Ogu abantu baabaire beeshongoraho." 
Job36:25 Abantu boona bakaba bagureeba, Omuntu agwetegyerereza hare." 
Job36:26 Reeba, Ruhanga ni mukuru, kwonka itwe titumumanya; Emyaka ye terikubaasa kubarwa;" 
Job36:27 Ahakuba ainamura amatondo g'amaizi, gaba ekicu, Akihindura enjura," 
Job36:28 Ehiika ahaiguru, ekasheesheka ahansi, Ekateera abantu, ekagwa nyingi munonga." 
Job36:29 Hariho owaakubaasa kumanya oku ebicu bibuga hoona, N'oku okuhinda kuhindira omu ihema rya Ruhanga?" 
Job36:30 Reeba, ashashaanura omushana, gumwehinguririza, Kandi ashweka emizi y'enyanja." 
Job36:31 Ahabw'okuba ebyo nibyo acwisa emanja z'amahanga, Kandi nibyo ahaisa abantu eby'okurya bingi munonga." 
Job36:32 Engaro ze azishweka enkuba, Agiragiira; ahi yaagiragiira, ehateera." 
Job36:33 Okuhinda kwayo kumanyisa ebye, Kandi kumanyisa enyamaishwa ku eihunga ryaza kwija." 
Job37:1 Kandi ebi nabyo bireetera omutima gwangye Kutetema n'okwesikura. 
Job37:2 Yeimwe, nimuhurire okuhinda kw'eiraka rye, Okurikurigitira omu kanwa ke." 
Job37:3 Akwohereza kubuga eiguru ryona, N'okutyankana kw'emirabyo ye kuhika aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Job37:4 Bwanyima yaayo eiraka rye rihinda, Arigitsa eiraka ry'ekitiinisa kye, Eiraka rye ku rihurirwa, tazibira nkuba." 
Job37:5 Ruhanga ahindisa eiraka rye omu buryo bw'okutangaaza, Akora ebikuru ebi tutarikubaasa kushoboorora;" 
Job37:6 Ahabw'okuba agambira ebirika ati: Gwa ahansi, Kandi agira orutoonyerera n'enjura ati: Mugire amaani." 
Job37:7 Azibira abantu kukora, Ngu boona bamanye ebi arikukora." 
Job37:8 Obwo enyamaishwa zitaaha omu bweshereko bwazo, Ziguma omu nyanga zaazo," 
Job37:9 Omuyaga gw'akasooroora gureetwa obukiizi-bwa-buryo, N'embeho eruga aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Job37:10 Ahabw'omwitsyo gwa Ruhanga amaizi gakwata, N'ebiyanja bikwata okuhika ahi birikugarukira." 
Job37:11 Ekicu kikwaitse akiijuza amaizi, Abamba ebicu ebirimu enkuba ze." 
Job37:12 Biguma nibyehinguririza ahabw'okwebembera kwe, Ngu bibone kuhikiiriza eki arikubiragiira kukora kyona Omu nsi etuurwamu abantu." 
Job37:13 Eki abiikiririza kubaho, n'ahabw'okuhana, Nari ahabw'ensi ye, nari ahabw'embabazi ze." 
Job37:14 Iwe Yobu, hurira ebi; ba orekire, Obanze oteekateekye aha mirimo ya Ruhanga erikutangaaza." 
Job37:15 Noomanya oku Ruhanga ateeraho ebicu bye ebiragiro, Akaragiira omurabyo gwe kubityankaniramu?" 
Job37:16 Nari shi noomanya okuzeereera kw'ebicu, Ku guri omurimo ogurikutangaaza ogw'Ogwo oine okumanya okuhikire," 
Job37:17 Iwe, ou ebijwaro bitagata, Ensi ku egira obucureera ahabw'omuyaga gw'obukizi-bwa-buryo?" 
Job37:18 Noobaasa kubamba eiguru nkawe, Erigumire nk'endeeberwamu eheesirwe?" 
Job37:19 Twegyese ebi turaamugambire; Ahabw'okuba titurikubaasa kutebeekanisa bigambo byaitu ahabw'omwirima. 
Job37:20 Akaagambirwa ku ndikwenda kugamba nawe? Hariho omuntu oyenda kumirirwa kimwe? 
Job37:21 Kandi na hati abantu tibarikubaasa kureeba omushana ogurikumurinkana omu iguru Omuyaga gwaheza kuhinguraho, gwayeruuraho ebicu." 
Job37:22 Aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho harugayo okumurinkana nk'okw'ezaabu; Ruhanga ajwaire ekitiinisa kirikwitsa obwoba. 
Job37:23 Ow'obushoboorozi bwona titurikubaasa kumwetegyereza, Rugambwa omu bushoboorozi, taita manja, Kandi omu kuhikiirira kwe okuhikire taribonabonesa." 
Job37:24 N'ahabw'ekyo abantu bamutiina; Kandi tayeta ha muntu weena orikweyeta omunyabwengye. 
Job38:1 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagarukamu Yobu omu muyaga mwingi gw'akasooroora ati: 
Job38:2 Ogu n'oha orikugamba ebigambo ebitarimu bwengye, Ebirikushereka enaama?" 
Job38:3 Yezirikye mashaija, Naaza kukubuuza, naiwe ongarukyemu." 
Job38:4 Obu naataho omusingi gw'ensi, okaba orahi? Ku oraabe nooyetegyereza, ngambira." 
Job38:5 N'oha owaataireho orugyero rwayo, ku oraabe noomumanya? Nari shi, owaagigyereise omugoye n'oha?" 
Job38:6 Omusingi gwayo gukabyarwa ahari ki, Nari shi, owaataireho eibaare ry'obuhamizo n'oha," 
Job38:7 Obu enyonyoozi z'akasheeshe zaayeshongorera hamwe, N'abaana ba Ruhanga boona bakateera akaari k'okushemererwa?" 
Job38:8 N'oha owaacungiire enyanja n'enyigi, Obu yaatimbira omu nda y'ensi," 
Job38:9 Obu naakora ebicu kuba ekujwaro kyayo, N'omwirima ndindindi gukaba engozi yaayo," 
Job38:10 Nkagiteeraho obugarukiro, Nkataho empimbi n'enyigi," 
Job38:11 Kandi nkagira nti: Garukira aha, otariharenga; Aha niho ebingonzi byawe by'amaryo biricungirirwa?" 
Job38:12 Waaba kubaho, oraragiire akasheeshe, Kandi oramanyiise omushekye omwanya gwagwo," 
Job38:13 Gukabona kukwata enshonda z'ensi, Okakunkumura ababi abagirimu?" 
Job38:14 Ensi ehinduka, eba nk'eibumba eritairweho akamanyiso, N'ebintu byona bireebeka nk'ebijwaro byayo." 
Job38:15 Ababi baimwe omushana, N'emikono yaabo ebangire ehendeka." 
Job38:16 Orahikire okuzimu omu nshuro z'enyanja, Nari oragyendeire okuzimu ahagati y'enyanja?" 
Job38:17 Orashuuruuriirwe amarembo ga rufu, Nari orareebire amarembo g'ekibunda kyayo?" 
Job38:18 Oramanyire obuhango bw'ensi? Ku oraabe noomanya ebyo byona, bigambe." 
Job38:19 Omuhanda ogurikuza ahu omushanga gutuura, gurahi, Kandi omwirima gwo gutaaha hi," 
Job38:20 Obone kugutwara omu nsi yaagwo, N'okumanya emihanda erikuza omu ka yaagwo?" 
Job38:21 Eego noobimanya, ahabw'okuba okaba waazairwe, N'ebiro byawe bikaba byabaire baingi!" 
Job38:22 Hariho obu orahikire omu mabiikiro g'ebirika? Nari shi, orareebire ahu orubaare rubiikwa," 
Job38:23 Oru naabiikiire ebiro by'enaku, Kurukoresa omu biro by'orugamba n'obweme?" 
Job38:24 Omushana ku guba nigugyenda, gutoora muhanda ki? Nari shi, omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba guraba hi, niguza kutaataanira omu nsi?" 
Job38:25 N'oha oracwereire enjura emikura, Akaha omurabyo gw'enkuba omuhanda," 
Job38:26 Okugwisa enjura aha nsi etarimu bantu, Omu ihamba eritatuurwamu," 
Job38:27 Okuhaazya eitaka ry'amatongo eririmu busha, Ngu ribone kumera obunyaatsi bw'oruhiira?" 
Job38:28 Noogira ngu enjura egira isheyo, Nari n'oha owaazaire amatondo g'orume?" 
Job38:29 Amaizi gakwataine gakaruga omu nda y'oha? Kandi n'oha owaazaire embeho y'enyababa? 
Job38:30 Amaizi gakwata gaba nk'eibaare, N'aha mutwe gw'amaizi hakwata." 
Job38:31 Okaabaasa kuboherana enyonyoozi za Kakaaga n'enjegyere, Nari shi okuyuzya emirunga ya Orioni?" 
Job38:32 Noobasa kushohoza Mazaroosi omu bunaku bwazo, Nari shi noobaasa kwebembera Arukutuuro n'abaana baayo?" 
Job38:33 Noomaya ebiragiro ebirikutegyeka eiguru? Noobaasa kuhamya obutegyeki bwaryo aha nsi? 
Job38:34 Noobaasa kwimutsya eiraka ryawe, rikahika omu bicu, Ngu amaizi gakweshukyera?" 
Job38:35 Noobaasa kwohereza enkuba, ngu zigyende, Zikakwetaba zitakagyenzire ziti: Turi aha?" 
Job38:36 N'oha owaataire obwengye omu bicu, Nari owaahaire oruho okwetegyereza?" 
Job38:37 N'oha orikubaasa kubara ebicu ahabw'obwengye bwe? N'oha orikubaasa kushuka amaizi g'omu furebe z'ahaiguru," 
Job38:38 Obu omucuucu guba ebyondo, N'ebitaka bikakwatana?" 
Job38:39 Okaabaasa kugira eki waahiigira entare, Nari okumara emigunju y'entare eifa," 
Job38:40 Zibyami omu maaya gaazo, Nari ziri omu myanya ei zigwereiremu?" 
Job38:41 N'oha otungira ekikoona eby'okurya, Ebyana byakyo ku bitakira Ruhanga, Byazegyerera nibisherura eby'okurya?" 
Job39:1 Noomanya ahu enzaza z'omu nshozi zizaarira? Nari noobaasa kureeba enuuma neezaara? 
Job39:2 Okaabaasa kumanya ameezi agu zimara zihakire, Nari shi noomanya obunaku obu zizaariramu," 
Job39:3 Zihenda enkokora, zizaara abaana baazo, Zikira obusaasi?" 
Job39:4 Abaana baazo bagira amaani, bakurira omu bwerere, Bacuuka, tibagaruka ahari zaanyinabo." 
Job39:5 Owaarekire enturegye kugyenda nk'oku zirikwenda n'oha? Kandi n'oha owaazitsibwire," 
Job39:6 Ezi naahaire eihamba ngu zituuremu, N'ensi y'engugo kuba obutaaho bwazo?" 
Job39:7 Zanga orwari rw'omu rurembo, Kandi tizihurira kwamira kw'orikuziseetura." 
Job39:8 Zitarangira omu nshozi ei ziriira, Nizisherura ekintu kyona ekibisi." 
Job39:9 Embogo neikiriza kukukorera, Nari shi okuraara omu kihongore kyawe?" 
Job39:10 Noobaasa kukomerana embogo n'omuguha, ekaguma omu minyarara neehinga? Neebaasa kwanjara eitaka ry'omu mpanga ekukuratiire?" 
Job39:11 Noija kugyesiga, ngu ahabw'okuba amaani gaayo ni maingi, Nari shi, noija kugirekyera omurimo gwawe?" 
Job39:12 Noogyesiga ngu neija kugaruka, Kukureetera oburo bwawe aha mbuga?" 
Job39:13 Amapapa ga maaya egateera n'amaryo; Beitu noogira ngur ago mapapa n'amooya gaayo gagira embabazi? 
Job39:14 Ahabw'okuba amahuri gaayo egatsiga aha itaka, Gabumbatirwa omucuucu;" 
Job39:15 Eyebwa ku ekigyere kyakugaata, Nari enyamaishwa ku yaakubaasa kugaribatiirira." 
Job39:16 Eita kubi abaana nk'abatari baayo; N'obu eraabe ehendekyera busha, kwonka tetiina." 
Job39:17 Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akagiima obwengye, Tiyaagiha kwetegyereza." 
Job39:18 Ku eba neeyenda kuhunga, Egaya embaraasi n'ogitembire." 
Job39:19 Niiwe oha embaraasi amaani gaayo? Niiwe waagihaire omugaara gw'okugijangarara omu bitsya? 
Job39:20 Niiwe ogigurukisa nk'oruzigye? Ekitiinisa ky'okukanga kwayo kiitsa obwoba. 
Job39:21 Erahiza omu ruhanga, neeyemanya amaani; Eshohora kubugaabugana n'engabo eziine eby'okurwanisa." 
Job39:22 Eshekyerera obwoba; tegira ki etiina, Tehunga rurara." 
Job39:23 Omutana, eicumu eririkutyanka n'emihunda Bigibomborekanira aha mugongo." 
Job39:24 Ahabw'obushaarizi n'ekiniga emaraho ensi n'eiruka; Tebaasa kuhamira hamwe yaahurira eiraka ry'enzamba. 
Job39:25 Ku ehurira eiraka ry'enzamba, egira eti: Otyo! Ekagira orugamba hare, endigito n'orwari eby'abakuru b'engabo." 
Job39:26 Akaca kashungyezibwa obwengye bwawe, Obu kajanjamura amapapa gaako, kagyemire obukiizi-bwa-buryo?" 
Job39:27 Eishamba ritumbiika eiguru ahabw'ekiragiro kyawe, Kandi nikyo kiryarikisa ahaiguru?" 
Job39:28 Omu bibaare nimwo ritaaha, rikahagira eka yaaryo, N'omu bicokoromi by'amabaare." 
Job39:29 Ryema okwo, riranzya eki riraateere; amaisho gaaryo gakireebera hare." 
Job39:30 Onwana bwaryo bunywa eshagama; Ahu omutumbi guri, niho riza." 
Job40:1 MUKAMA yaagaruka yaagira Yobu ati: 
Job40:2 Omuhakani naabaasa kuhakanisa Ow'obushoboorozi bwona? Orikuteera empaka na Ruhanga, naakigarukyemu." 
Job40:3 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu MUKAMA ati: 
Job40:4 Reeba, nyowe tiinyine ku ndi. Mbwenu nkugarukyemu ki? Naata engaro aha munwa." 
Job40:5 Ngambire rimwe, tinkigarukamu; Eego nangwa ni kabiri, kwonka tinkyeyongyera." 
Job40:6 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagarukamu Yobu omu muyaga mwingi gw'akasooroora ati: 
Job40:7 Yezirikye mashaija; Naaza kukubuuza, naiwe ongambire." 
Job40:8 Nooyenda kumpindura otahikire, N'okuncwera orubanja, ngu iwe obone kurwihwaho?" 
Job40:9 Noinganisa na Ruhanga emikono? Noobasa kuhindisa eiraka nkawe? 
Job40:10 Yehunde obwanyakusinga n'obukuru; Yejwekye ekitiinisa n'okumurinkana kwakyo. 
Job40:11 Shuka omwegyemure g'ekiniga kyawe, Oreebe omuntu weena ow'amaryo, omucwe busha." 
Job40:12 Reeba ow'amaryo weena, omugarure ahansi; Kandi oribatiirire ababi ahu beemereire." 
Job40:13 Boona obasherekye hamwe omu mucuucu, Obakome ahamaisho bari omu mwanya ogwekiikire." 
Job40:14 Obwo nibwo ndikugambira, Ku omukono gwawe gwa buryo gurikubaasa kukujuna." 
Job40:15 Reeba Behemoosi ei naahangire nkaiwe; Neerya obunyaatsi nk'ente. 
Job40:16 Reeba amaani g'omu bishohoro byayo, N'amaani g'enyama z'ebikamba by'enda yaayo." 
Job40:17 Ehanika omukira gwayo nk'omwereezi; Emitsi y'omu kibero kyayo erabainemu. 
Job40:18 Amagufa gaayo ni nk'enshekye z'emiringa; Amaguru gaayo ni nk'empimbi z'ebyoma. 
Job40:19 Omu byahangirwe Ruhanga niyo nyamaishwa rugambwa; Owaagihangirre wenka niwe arikubaasa kugiirira haihi na rurara. 
Job40:20 Buzimazima ebibungo bigyeerera eby'okurya, Ei enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba zoona zikinira." 
Job40:21 Eyebyamira ahansi y'amarebe, Omu mwanya ogwekiikire omu mubimbiri n'omu rufunjo." 
Job40:22 Ebiti ebiine ekicuucu bigisangira; Emikinga y'aha mugyera egyehinguririza. 
Job40:23 Reeba, omugyera ku guba gwijwire, tetiina; N'obu Yorudani yaakwijura ekaboogaboogyera omu kanwa kaayo, teine ki eyetaho." 
Job40:24 Noogira ngu hariho owaakugikwata neereeba, Nari akagirabya omurunga omu nyindo?" 
Job41:1 Mbwenu okaabaasa kukwata Leviasaani n'eirobo, ogiiha omu maizi, Nari okukomesa orurimi rwayo omurunga?" 
Job41:2 Okaabaasa kurabya omuguha omu nyindo zaayo, Nari okufumura oruba rwayo n'eirobo?" 
Job41:3 Noogira ngu neija kukweshengyereza, Nari okugamba gye naiwe?" 
Job41:4 Neija kuragaana naiwe endagaano, Ngu ebe omuhuuku waawe ebiro byona?" 
Job41:5 Okaagizaanisa nk'orikuzaanisa enyonyi, Nari okaagita aha nkomo kushetsya abazaana baawe?" 
Job41:6 Abajubi bakaacwererana obuguzi bwayo; Bakaagibaganisiza abashuubuzi? 
Job41:7 Okaabaasa kwijuza oruhu rwayo eshando, Nari omutwe gwayo engobe?" 
Job41:8 Gibangire omukono; kwonka oijukye ku ruri orugamba, Kandi torikigarukira." 
Job41:9 Reeba, omuntu okugigiraho amatsiko n'okweruhiza busha; Ahakuba owaakugicwa ati eriisho, omutima gukaamuhwa omunda." 
Job41:10 Tihariho manzi eyaakwehanga kugiturukirira; Mbwenu shi n'oha owaakubaasa kuunyemerera omumaisho? 
Job41:11 N'oha oragizire eki yampa, ngu mmugarurire? Byona ebiri ahansi y'eiguru oku ringana n'ebyangye." 
Job41:12 Tindikwija kureka kugamba aha ngingo zaayo, Nari aha maani gaayo amaingi, nari aha kyemerero kyayo ekirungi." 
Job41:13 N'oha owaakujuura ekijwaro kyayo eky'enyima? N'oha owaakwozya omu kooti zaayo ez'ekyoma? 
Job41:14 N'oha owaakubaasa kugyashamura? Amaino gaayo oku gakiikiize goona nigaitsa obwoba. 
Job41:15 Engamba zaayo ezigumire nizo eyehimbisizaho, Zitembekyeraine hamwe, zaaramatana." 
Job41:16 Engamba emwe ekwataine n'endiijo, Kireetera embeho kutazirabamu." 
Job41:17 Zikwataine, tizirikubaasa kutaanisibwa." 
Job41:18 Ku eyetsyamura, orwoya rwayo rurabya nk'omushana; Kandi amaisho gaayo ni nk'ebitsigye by'omushekye gurikujuguta." 
Job41:19 Omu kanwa kaayo harugamu emuri ezirikwaka, Ensasi z'omuriro zitaraaka." 
Job41:20 Omu nyindo zaayo hacumbuukamu omwika, Nk'ogw'enyungu erikutogota, nari nk'ekibingo ekirikusya." 
Job41:21 Orwoya rwayo rwatsya amakara, Kandi omu kanwa kaayo harugamu endimi z'omurio." 
Job41:22 Omu bitsya byayo nimwo amaani gaba, Okutiinisa kwayo kugyenda nikugigurukaguruka omumaisho." 
Job41:23 Enyama z'omubiri gwayo zihingamiraine, Zigihamiireho, tizirikubaasa kugirugaho." 
Job41:24 Omutima gwayo gugumire nk'eibaare; Buzimazima gugumire nk'orubengo. 
Job41:25 Ku eimuka, amamanzi gatiina, Ahabw'okukangarana kwayo gagwa eiraro." 
Job41:26 N'obu baakugiteera rurara, teine ki yaakugiitsa, N'obu ryakuba eicumu, nari endiga, nari omuhunda." 
Job41:27 Ebyoma ebireeba nk'ekumbwe, N'emiringa nk'ekiti kijunzire." 
Job41:28 Emyambi tegibinga; Ahariyo amabaare g'enjungu ni nk'ebishushunga. 
Job41:29 Emihini ahariyo neeshusha nk'embuba, Eshekyerera okukomangana kw'emihunda." 
Job41:30 Aha nda yaayo ni nk'engusyo z'obwogi; Ku erambira aha byondo, eba nk'ekyoma kirikuhuura." 
Job41:31 Ereetera amaizi g'okuzimu kutogota nk'enyungu, Ehindura enyanja nk'amajuta." 
Job41:32 Ahi yaaraba, ehatsiga ekirari kirikwengyengyeta; Omuntu akaateekateeka, ngu ahagati y'amaizi hamezire enju." 
Job41:33 Omu nsi tiharimu erikugishusha, Ekihangirwe ekitagira bwoba." 
Job41:34 Ereeba ebiri ahaiguru byona, Niyo mukama w'ebinyamaryo byona." 
Job42:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu MUKAMA ati: 
Job42:2 Nimmanya ku orikubaasa byona, Kandi tihariho kirikubaasa kuzibira eki omaririire kukora." 
Job42:3 Ogwo n'oha orikushereka enaama, haza ataine arikumanya? Nikyo kingambiise ebi ntarikushoborokyerwa, Ebirikutangaaza munonga ebindengire, Ebi mbaire ntarikumanya." 
Job42:4 Ogizire oti: Tega okutu, naaza kugamba; Nkubuuze, haza naiwe ongarukyemu." 
Job42:5 Nkaba nkuhuriza amatu, Kwonka hati eriisho ryangye ryakwereebera." 
Job42:6 Nikyo ndikwetamira, Nkeeteisiza omu mucuucu n'omu iju." 
Job42:7 MUKAMA ku yaaherize kugambira Yobu ebyo bigambo, yaagira Elifaazi Omutemaani ati: Nkugiriirre ekiniga kingi, iwe na bangyenzi baawe bombi, ahabw'okuba timungambireho bihikire, nk'omwiru wangye Yobu oku agizire." 
Job42:8 N'ahabw'ekyo hati mutware enimi mushanju n'empaya z'entaama mushanju, muze ow'omwiru wangye Yobu, mwetambirireyo ekitambo ky'okwotsya; bwanyima omwiru wangye Yobu naija kubashabira; ahabw'okuba niwe ndikwija kwikiriza, nkareka kubatwaza nk'obushema bwanyu oku buri; ahakuba timungambireho bihikire nk'omwiru wangye Yobu oku agizire." 
Job42:9 Elifaazi Omutemaani na Biludaadi Omushuuhi na Zofari Omunaamasi nikwo kugyenda, bakakora eki MUKAMA yaabaragiira, na MUKAMA akaikiriza okushaba kwa Yobu." 
Job42:10 Yobu ku yaaherize kushabira bagyenzi be, MUKAMA yaamutambira enaku ze; yaamushumbuusha ebirikwingana kabiri n'ebi yaafeereirwe." 
Job42:11 Bwanyima beene ishe boona na banyaanya, n'abaabaire nibamumanya baija ah'ari, baariira hamwe nawe omu nju ye, baamugirira esaasi, baamugumya ahabw'ebihikiirizi byona ebi MUKAMA yaamureetsireho; buri muntu yaamuha ekicweka ky'efeeza n'empeta y'ezaabu." 
Job42:12 MUKAMA yaaha omugisha ebiro bya Yobu ebya bwanyima okukira eby'okubanza; yaatunga entaama kakumi n'enkumi ina, engamira enkumi mukaaga, enimi z'okuhingisa enkumi ibiri, n'ebuguma z'endogoya rukumi." 
Job42:13 Kandi yaazaara aboojo mushanju n'baishiki bashatu. 
Job42:14 Omwishiki w'okubanza yaamweta Yemima, orikumukurata yaamweta Keeziya, n'owa kashatu yaamweta Kerenihapuki." 
Job42:15 Kandi omu nsi egyo hakaba hatarimu bakazi barungi nka bahara ba Yobu. Ishe yaabaraga ebye na banyaanyabo. 
Job42:16 Bwanyima y'ebyo yaamara emyaka igana na makumi ana, yaareeba abaijukuru n'abaijukuruza, okuhika aha ruzaaro rwa kana." 
Job42:17 Bwanyima Yobu yaafa, ari omugurusi amazire emyaka mingi." 
Psalms1:1 Aine omugisha omuntu otakuratira naama z'ababi, Nari okwemerera omu muhanda gw'abasisi, N'obu kwakuba okushutama aha bitebe by'abarikugaya;" 
Psalms1:2 Kureka oshemerererwa Ebiragiro bya MUKAMA, Kandi Ebiragiro ebyo nibyo ateekateekaho nyomushana na nyekioro." 
Psalms1:3 Ari nk'omuti ogubyairwe aha rubaju rw'amaizi, Ogwana ebyana byagwo omu bunaku bwabyo, N'amababi gaagwo tigahotoka; Ebi akora byona bigyenda gye." 
Psalms1:4 Kwonka ababi tikwo baba, Kureka bashusha nk'ebishushunga ebirikutwarwa omuyaga." 
Psalms1:5 Nikyo ababi bataribaasiza kwemerera mu rubanja, N'obu baakuba abasiisi omu kuteerana kw'abahikiriire;" 
Psalms1:6 Ahakuba MUKAMA naamanya omuhanda gw'abahikiriire, Kwonka omuhanda gw'ababi guryabura." 
Psalms2:1 N'enki ekiteeraine hamwe amahanga? Ahabw'enki abanyamahanga nibaza omu naama za busha? 
Psalms2:2 Abagabe b'ensi bategnire orugamba, N'abategyeki nibahanuura hamwe, Okurwanisa MUKAMA n'ou yaashukireho amajuta, ni bagira bati:" 
Psalms2:3 Ka tucwe enjegyere zaabo, Tunagye hare emirunga yaabo." 
Psalms2:4 Oshutami omu iguru naasheka; MUKAMA naabateerera enaku. 
Psalms2:5 Aryabagambira abagwereirwe kubi, Abatiinise n'ekiniga kingi, ati:" 
Psalms2:6 Nyowe nemekire omugabe wangye Aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera Saayuni. 
Psalms2:7 Niinyija kuranga ekiragiro kya MUKAMA; Yangira ati: Ori Omwana wangye, Eri izooba naakuzaara." 
Psalms2:8 Nshaba, ndyakuha amahanga gabe obutaka bwawe, N'embaju zoona ez'ensi zibe eitungo ryawe." 
Psalms2:9 Oryabacoocoora n'enkoni y'ekyoma, Obaatagure nk'enyungu y'omubumbi." 
Psalms2:10 N'ahabw'ekyo, imwe bagabe 'mwe, mugire obwengye, Naimwe abategyeki b'ensi, mwikirize kuhaburwa." 
Psalms2:11 Muheereze MUKAMA n'okutiina, Mushemererwa n'okutetema." 
Psalms2:12 Munywegyere Omwana, atakaabagirira ekiniga, Mukahwerekyererera omu muhanda; Ahakuba ekiniga kye nikiija kurahuka kwaka. Boona abamuhungiraho baine omugisha." 
Psalms3:1 MUKAMA wangye, abazigu bangye ka ni baingi! Baingi baanyimukiriire;" 
Psalms3:2 Bainti nibangambaho bati: Taine kuhwerwa kwona ahari Ruhanga. 
Psalms3:3 Kwonka Iwe MUKAMA, ori engabo enyehinguririize; Niiwe ndikwehimbisizaho, kandi niiwe oimukize omutwe gwangye." 
Psalms3:4 Ntakira MUKAMA n'eiraka ryangye, Nawe angarukamu naayema aha rushozi rwe orurikwera." 
Psalms3:5 Nkabyama, naagwejegyera, Kandi naasisiimuka, ahakuba MUKAMA niwe andamira." 
Psalms3:6 Tinditiina bukumi bw'abantu Abankubire kundwanisa. 
Psalms3:7 Ai bambe MUKAMA, imuka; Ruhanga wangye, njuna; Ahakuba okateera abazigu bangye boona aha mushaya, Waacwa amaino g'ababi." 
Psalms3:8 Okujuna n'okwa MUKAMA; Omugisha gwawe gube aha bantu baawe. 
Psalms4:1 Ai Ruhanga, omanya okuhikiirira kwangye; Ku ndaagume naakweta, onyetabe. Ku naabaire nfunziibwe, wampa omwanya, naayeshanja. Ongirire embabazi, ohurire okushaba kwangye." 
Psalms4:2 Imwe bantu 'mwe, muryahitsya hi okuhemura ekitiinisa kyangye? Muryahitsya hi okukunda ebitaine mugasho, n'okukuratira ebishuba?" 
Psalms4:3 Kwonka mumanye ngu MUKAMA ayetooraniire orikumutiina; MUKAMA ampurira, ku mmutakira." 
Psalms4:4 Mugire ekiniga, kwonka murekye kushiisha; Muhanuure n'emitima yaanyu mubyami, mucecekye." 
Psalms4:5 Muheyo ebitambo ebihikire, Kandi mwesigye MUKAMA." 
Psalms4:6 Hariho baingi abarikubuuza bati: N'oha oraatworekye ebirungi? ai MUKAMA, otwakize omushana gw'amaisho gaawe." 
Psalms4:7 Otaire okushemererwa omu mutima gwangye Okurikukira oku bagira omu biro by'omweru n'eby'emihiiso ya viinyo. 
Psalms4:8 Niinyija kubyama ntaine ki ndikwekyenga, ngwejegyere, Ahakuba niiwe wenaka, MUKAMA, ondinda nkagira obusingye." 
Psalms5:1 Ai MUKAMA, tega amatu, ohurire ebigambo byangye, Ote omutima aha kuteekateeka kwangye." 
Psalms5:2 Hurira eiraka ry'okutaka kwangye, Mukama wangye, kandi Ruhanga wangye, Ahakuba niiwe ndikushaba." 
Psalms5:3 Ai MUKAMA, buri kasheeshe noija kuguma noohurira eiraka ryangye, Buri kasheeshe nintebeekanisa eby'okukuhongyera, ngume nindeeba." 
Psalms5:4 Ahakuba tori Ruhanga orikushemerererwa obubi, Ekibi tikiriguma h'ori." 
Psalms5:5 Abarikwehimbisa tibaryemerera mu maisho gaawe; Oyanga boona abakora ebibi. 
Psalms5:6 Ababeihi oryabahwerekyereza; MUKAMA ayangira kimwe omwitsi w'abantu, n'engobya." 
Psalms5:7 Kwonka nyowe, ahabw'embabazi zaawe nyingi Ndyataaha omu nju yaawe; Ndamye ntaire amaisho ahari hekalu yaawe erikwera ninkuha ekitiinisa." 
Psalms5:8 Ahabw'abantu abangwereire, ai MUKAMA, onyebembere omu kuhikiirira kwawe; Onshemereze omuhanda gwawe omu maisho gangye." 
Psalms5:9 Ahakuba omu kanwa kaabo tiharimu mazima, Emitama yaabo n'obubi busha, Emimiro yaabo n'ekituuro kirangaire, Bashunga abantu n'endimi zaabo." 
Psalms5:10 Obasingise orubanja, ai Ruhanga; Bagwe ahabw'enaama zaabo; Obabingye ahabw'eby'okushiisha byabo bingi, ahakuba bakugomeire." 
Psalms5:11 Kwonka boona abarikukuhungiraho bashemererwe; Bagume bateere akaari ahabw'okunanuka; ahakuba niiwe obarinda, Kandi n'abakunda eiziina ryawe bashemerererwe omuriiwe." 
Psalms5:12 Ahakuba Iwe MUKAMA, oryaha omugisha abahikiriire, Obakingize embabazi nk'engabo." 
Psalms6:1 Ai MUKAMA, otanteisa ongwereirwe kubi, N'obu kwakuba okumpana n'ekiniga kyawe kingi." 
Psalms6:2 Ongirire embabazi, ai MUKAMA, ahakuba nyomeire kimwe; Ontambire, MUKAMA, ahakuba amagufa gangye nigajegajega," 
Psalms6:3 Kandi n'omutima gwangye nigutetema munonga. Beitu Iwe, ai MUKAMA, oryandeka okuhitsya ryari?" 
Psalms6:4 Ai MUKAMA, garuka ojune amagara gangye, Onkize ahabw'embabazi zaawe;" 
Psalms6:5 Ahakuba ofiire aba atakikwijuka. n'oha orikubaasa kukuhimbisiza okuzimu? 
Psalms6:6 Okutsinda kunkabize; Buri kiro ndirira aha kitabo kyangye; Ekitanda kyangye nkijubya n'amarira. 
Psalms6:7 Amaisho gampwereire ahabw'amaganya; Gakambire ahabw'abazigu bangye boona. 
Psalms6:8 Imwe mwena enkozi z'ebibi, mundugyeho, Ahakuba MUKAMA ahuriire eiraka ry'okurira kwangye;" 
Psalms6:9 MUKAMA ahuriire okweshengyereza kwangye; MUKAMA naikiriza okushaba kwangye. 
Psalms6:10 Abazigu bangye boona baryakwatwa enshoni, bateteme munonga; Baryagaruka enyima, bahemukye omuri ako kaanya." 
Psalms7:1 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, niiwe ndikwesiga; Njuna boona abarikumpiiga, kandi onkize," 
Psalms7:2 Barekye kuntaagataagura nk'entare, Nibantwara ntaine kijuna." 
Psalms7:3 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, ku ndaabe nyine eki naakozire, Emikono yangye ku eraabe yaakozire ekibi," 
Psalms7:4 Ku ndaabe naakozire kubi owaabaire atuura gye naanye, Ku ndaabe naatuzire busha omuzigu wangye," 
Psalms7:5 Orekye omuzigu wangye ampiigye, ankwate, Aribatiirire amagara gangye, N'ekitiinisa kyangye akite omu mucuucu." 
Psalms7:6 Imuka, ai MUKAMA, n'ekiniga kyawe, Oyemerere ogungire abazigu bangye abaanyiniire ekiniga kingi; Sisiimuka, Ruhanga wangye; ahakuba niiwe waaragiire kucwa orubanja." 
Psalms7:7 K'emitwe y'amahanga ekwehinguririze, Naiwe obategyekye, oshutami aha kitebe kyawe eky'ahaiguru." 
Psalms7:8 MUKAMA acwera amahanga emanja; Ai MUKAMA, oncwere orubanja nk'okuhikiirira kwangye oku kuri, N'amazima agari omuriinye oku gari." 
Psalms7:9 Ai bambe Ruhanga ohikiriire, ogyeza emitima n'ebiteekateeko, Reka obubi bw'ababi buhweho, Kwonka abahikiriire obagumye." 
Psalms7:10 Engabo yangye ni Ruhanga Okiza abaine emitima egororokire. 
Psalms7:11 Ruhanga n'Omucwi w'emanja ohikiriire, Ogwerwa kubi ababi obutoosha." 
Psalms7:12 Omuntu ku ayanga kweteisa, Ruhanga atyaza rurara ye; Areegire obuta bwe, Yaabuteekateeka." 
Psalms7:13 Amuteekateekyeire eby'okurwanisa by'okumwita; Emyambi ye agitaireho omuriro. 
Psalms7:14 Omusiisi arumwa okuzaara obubi, Agira enda y'eitima, kandi azaara ebishuba." 
Psalms7:15 Atimbire ekiina, yaakiihamu eitaka, Kandi yaagwa omu busya obu atimbire." 
Psalms7:16 Eitima rye riryamugarukira; Omwaga ogu agirira abandi guryamugwisiza akagwe. 
Psalms7:17 Ndyasiima MUKAMA okusiima okushemereire okuhikiirira kwe; Ndyayeshongora, mpimbise eiziina rya MUKAMA Rukira-boona." 
Psalms8:1 Ai MUKAMA, Mukama waitu, Eiziina ryawe ka ni rirungi omu nsi yoona! Okata ekitiinisa kyawe ahaiguru y'eiguru." 
Psalms8:2 Ahabw'abarikukurwanisa, okaha abaana bato n'abarikwonka Amaani g'okugamba eby'okuhunamya abazigu n'abahoozi b'enzigu." 
Psalms8:3 Ku nteekateeka aha iguru ryawe eri waahangire n'engaro zaawe, Okwezi n'enyonyoozi ebi waataireho," 
Psalms8:4 Omuntu ni kintu ki Iwe kumwijuka? Nari shi omwana w'omuntu Iwe kumutaayaayira? 
Psalms8:5 Kwonka okamuhanga yaaburaho kakye kwingana na Ruhanga; Waamujweka ekirunga ky'ekitiinisa n'okuhimbisibwa. 
Psalms8:6 Waamutegyekyesa emirimo y'emikono yaawe; Waata ebintu byona ahansi y'ebigyere bye," 
Psalms8:7 Entaama n'ente zoona, N'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa," 
Psalms8:8 N'enyonyi z'omu mwanya, n'eby'enyanja eby'omu mayanja, N'ebirikuraba omu nyanja byona." 
Psalms8:9 Ai MUKAMA, Mukama waitu, Eiziina ryawe ka ni rirungi munonga omu nsi yoona!" 
Psalms9:1 Ndyasiima MUKAMA n'omutima gwangye gwona; Mmanyise abantu eby'okutangaaza byona ebi waakozire. 
Psalms9:2 Ndyashemererwa, nyesiimire omuriiwe, Ndyayeshongora eby'okuhimbisa eiziina ryawe, Iwe Rukira-boona." 
Psalms9:3 Ahabw'okuba abazigu bangye bagarukire enyima, Baagwa, baahwerekyererera omu maisho gaawe." 
Psalms9:4 Ahakuba okandwanaho, naasinga orubanja omu mazima; Oshutami aha kitebe kyawe eky'obukama, noocwa emanja omu buryo." 
Psalms9:5 Okahana amahanga, waacwekyereza ababi; Waamariraho kimwe amaziina gaabo ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms9:6 Abazigu bahweireho, bacwekyerereziibwe kimwe; Endembo zaabo ozisheenyire, n'okwijukwa tizaakiijukwa." 
Psalms9:7 Kwonka MUKAMA atuura aha ngoma obutwire bwona, Ateekateekire ekitebe kye kucwa emanja;" 
Psalms9:8 Kandi aryacwera ensi yoona orubanja omu kuhikiirira, Acwere abantu boona orubanja omu mazima." 
Psalms9:9 MUKAMA n'obuhungiro bw'abarikuburabuzibwa, Obu bahungiramu omu biro by'obusaasi." 
Psalms9:10 Abo abarikumanya eiiina ryawe baryakwesiga, Ahakuba iwe, MUKAMA, tokahemukaga ha bakusherura." 
Psalms9:11 Mweshongore eby'okuhimbisa Mukama otuura omuri Saayuuni; Kandi mumanyisa abantu boona ebi akora; 
Psalms9:12 Ahakuba Ogwo ohoorera eshagama abataho omutima, Kandi tayebwa kutaka kw'abari omu busaasi." 
Psalms9:13 Ai MUKAMA, ongirire embabazi! Reeba okubonabona oku ndikubonabonesibwa abarikuunyanga, Iwe onyimutsya okanyiha aha marembo ga rufu," 
Psalms9:14 Ngu mbone kumanyisa okuhimbisibwa kwawe kwona; Kandi ndyashemerererwa okujuna kwawe Omu marembo ga Saayuuni. 
Psalms9:15 Abanyamahanga bagwire omu busya obu batimbire; Ebigyere byabo byakwatwa ekigoye eki bategire. 
Psalms9:16 MUKAMA akeeyoreka, yaacwa orubanja; Ababi bakwatirwa omutego omu bi bakozire n'emikono yaabo. Higayoni." 
Psalms9:17 Ababi baryagaruka okuzimu; Nigo mahanga goona ageebwa Ruhanga. 
Psalms9:18 Abakyene tibariguma nibeeba, Kandi amatsiko g'abooro tigarihwaho ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms9:19 Imuka, ai MUKAMA! otaikiriza abantu kusingura; Amahanga gacwerwe orubanja omu maisho gaawe." 
Psalms9:20 Obatiinise, ai MUKAMA! Amahanga gamanye ku bari abantu-buntu." 
Psalms10:1 Ahabw'enki oyemereire hare, ai MUKAMA? Ahanki nooyeshereka omu biro by'obusaasi?" 
Psalms10:2 Ahabw'amaryo omubi ahiiga munonga omworo; Ka bagwe omu naama ezi baagizire. 
Psalms10:3 Ahakuba omubi ayehimbisa ahabw'ebi omutima gwe gwetenga; N'omwetengi w'ensaagi ayehakana MUKAMA, kandi amugaya." 
Psalms10:4 Omubi omu maryo g'emireebere ye tasherura Ruhanga; Kandi omu biteekateeko bye byona agira ngu, Tihariho Ruhanga." 
Psalms10:5 Ahiirwa omu mihanda ye obutoosha bwona; Okucwa emanja kwawe kumuri hare ahu atarikureeba; Abazigu be boona abeeshaanya. 
Psalms10:6 Agira omu mutima gwe ati: Tindiihwa hu ndi; Ebiro byona tindigira by'okunnyangaraza. 
Psalms10:7 Akanwa ke kaijwire okukyeena n'obugobya n'okubonabonesa; Ahansi y'orurimi rwe hariho eitima n'okutahikiirira. 
Psalms10:8 Agwera omu birorero; Omu myanya eyekiikire nimwo aitira abataine kabi; Amaisho ge agata aha bataine kihwera omu mubonano. 
Psalms10:9 Agwera ayesherekire nk'entare eri omu ryaya ryayo; Agwera omuntu enshoberwa kumukwata; Kandi kwo amukwata, amukuruza ekigoye kye." 
Psalms10:10 Egyo nshoberwa eshekurwa, einama, Kandi ebandama ahabw'amaani ge." 
Psalms10:11 Agira omu mutima gwe ati: Ruhanga ayebirwe, Akyehugize; tarikireeba." 
Psalms10:12 Imuka, ari MUKAMA; imutsya omukono gwawe, ai Ruhanga; Oteebwa abari omu busaasi." 
Psalms10:13 Omubi agayira ki Ruhanga. Akagira omu mutima gwe ati: Tarikimbuuza? 
Psalms10:14 Okireebire; ahakuba oyetegyereza eitima n'okushaazya, Ngu obone kubikoraho n'omukono gwawe; Omuntu enshoberwa ayeta omu mikono yaawe; Ahakuba niiwe oshangwa oba omuhwezi w'efuuzi." 
Psalms10:15 Henda omukono gw'obubi n'enkozi y'ebibi; Ocaakye obubi bwe, okuhitsya obu oribureeba bwona." 
Psalms10:16 MUKAMA niwe Mugabe ebiro n'ebiro; Abanyamahanga baryahwera kimwe omu nsi ye. 
Psalms10:17 Ai MUKAMA, ohuriire okwetenga kw'abacureezi; Oryagumya emitima yaabo, obategye okutu," 
Psalms10:18 Kucwera efuuzi n'abarikuburabuzibwa emanja z'oburyo, Omuntu-buntu arekye kubatiinisa obundi." 
Psalms11:1 MUKAMA niwe mpungiraho; Noobaasa ota kungira oti: Hungira aha bibungo nk'enyonyi; 
Psalms11:2 Ahakuba, reeba, ababi bareega obuta bwabo, Babutamikamu omwambi gwabo, Kurasira omu mwirima ab'emitima egororokire." 
Psalms11:3 Emisingi ku yaakuhwerekyerezibwa, Abahikiriire bakaakora ki?" 
Psalms11:4 MUKAMA ari omuri hekalu ye erikwera, Ekitebe kya MUKAMA kiri omu iguru; Amaisho ge gareeba abantu, n'ekitsigye kye kibagyeza." 
Psalms11:5 MUKAMA agyeza abahikiriire; Kwonka ababi n'abakunda endwano omutima gwe gubanga. 
Psalms11:6 Ababi aryabagwisaho amakara g'omuriro n'obuganga nk'enjura; Omuyaga gwa nyeirurwe guryaba omugabo omu kikopo kyabo. 
Psalms11:7 Ahakuba MUKAMA n'ohikiriire, kandi akunda eby'okuhikiirira; Ab'emitima egororokire baryareeba amaisho ge." 
Psalms12:1 Njuna, MUKAMA! ahakuba tihaakiriho orikutiina Ruhanga; Ahabw'okuba abarikwesigwa babuzire omu bantu." 
Psalms12:2 Buri muntu naabeihana na mutaahi we, Nibagamba n'eminwa erikushungana baine emitima ebiri." 
Psalms12:3 MUKAMA aryacwaho eminwa yoona erikushungana, N'orurimi orurikugamba eby'okwetunguura," 
Psalms12:4 Abo abagira bati: Turyasinguza endimi zaitu; Eminwa yaitu n'eyaitu; n'oha orikututegyeka? 
Psalms12:5 Ahabw'okunyagwa kw'abooro, n'ahabw'okutsinda kw'abakyene, Mbwenu ka nyimukye, nikwo MUKAMA arikugira, Mmute omu mwanya gw'obusingye ogu atuura naayetenga." 
Psalms12:6 Ebigambo bya MUKAMA n'ebigambo bishemeire, Ni nk'efeeza eshemeziibwe omu iziiko ry'ahansi, Eshemeziibwe emirundi mushanju." 
Psalms12:7 MUKAMA, ogume oturinde, Kandi otujune ab'obusingye obu." 
Psalms12:8 Obufamutima ku buhingurana bwasiimwa abantu, Ababi bagyenda nibanaga omukono hoonahoona." 
Psalms13:1 MUKAMA, oryahitsya hi okuunyebwa obutwire bwona? Oryahitsya hi okuunyima amaisho?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndyahitsya hi okwehanuurira, N'okurenzya eizooba nyine obusaasi omu mutima gwangye? Omuzigu wangye aryahitsya hi okuunyetunguuraho?" 
Psalms13:3 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, kiteekateekyeho, ongarukeymu, Hwezesa amaisho gangye, ntakaagwejegyera oturo tw'okufa;" 
Psalms13:4 Omuzigu wangye arekye kugira ati: Mmusingwire; Abazigu bangye barekye kushemerererwa okutengyetsibwa kwangye. 
Psalms13:5 Kwonka nyesigire embabazi zaawe, Omutima gwangye guryashemererwa okujuna kwawe." 
Psalms13:6 Ndyayeshongorera MUKAMA, Ahakuba akangirira embabazi nyingi." 
Psalms14:1 Omushema agira omu mutima gwe ati: Ruhanga tabaho. Basiisikaire nibakora ebihagaro, Tihariho n'omwe orikukora gye." 
Psalms14:2 MUKAMA akeema omu iguru, yaareeba abantu, Ngu amanye ku haraabe hariho abarikwetegyereza Bakasherura Ruhanga." 
Psalms14:3 Boona bahabire, boona hamwe basiisikaire; Tihariho n'omwe orikukora gye; buzima tihariho n'omwe." 
Psalms14:4 Beitu enkzo z'ebibi zoona tizigira bwengye? Barya abantu bangye nk'abarikurya eby'okurya, Kandi tibatakira MUKAMA." 
Psalms14:5 Okwo baryagirirayo obwoba bwingi, Ahakuba Ruhanga ari hamwe n'abahikiriire." 
Psalms14:6 Mushiisha enaama z'omukyene; Kwonka MUKAMA n'obuhugiro bwe. 
Psalms14:7 Nkaabaasibwa ki, okujunwa kwa Israeli kuruga omuri Saayuuni! MUKAMA ku arigarura abantu be abaanyagirwe, Yakobo aryayesiima, na Israeli ananukye." 
Psalms15:1 MUKAMA, n'oha oriraara omu ihema ryawe? N'oha orituura aha kibungo kyawe ekirikwera?" 
Psalms15:2 Niwe ogwo ogyenda ataine ki arikuhanwa, okora eby'okuhikiirira, Kandi akagamba eby'amazima aihire aha mutima;" 
Psalms15:3 Otabeiherera bandi na rurimi rwe, N'obu kwakuba okukora kubi mugyenzi we, Nari okuyaaga mutaahi we;" 
Psalms15:4 Otaine mugasho agaywa omu maisho ge, Kwonka abatiina MUKAMA abaha ekitiinisa; Ku arahira, n'obu afeerwa, tahinduka." 
Psalms15:5 Taguza mpiiha ze ahabw'enshaagi ehinguraine, N'obu kwakuba okurya enguzi, ngu asingise rubanja abatarwine. Okora ebyo taritengyetsibwa ebiro byona." 
Psalms16:1 Ndinda, ai Ruhanga, ahakuba niiwe nyesiga." 
Psalms16:2 Nkagambira MUKAMA nti: Niiwe Mukama wangye, Tiinyine karungi koona ahu otari." 
Psalms16:3 Abarikwera abari omu nsi nibo barungi, Abu nshemerererwa n'omutima gwangye gwona." 
Psalms16:4 Abaimuura MUKAMA bakeehongyera ruhanga ondiijo Beekanyisiza obusaasi; Ebihongwa byabo by'eshagama tindibihayo, N'obu kwakuba okugamba aha maziina gaabo." 
Psalms16:5 MUKAMA n'omugabo gw'obuhunguzi bwangye, n'egabo omu kikopo kyangye; Niiwe orinda ebyangye." 
Psalms16:6 Emigoye ekangyerera emyanya erikushemeza, N'ekya buzima nyine obuhunguzi burungi." 
Psalms16:7 Ninsiima MUKAMA ompa obwengye, Kandi nyekiro omutima gwangye guunyegyesa." 
Psalms16:8 MUKAMA niwe ntaho amaisho obutoosha; Tinditengyetsibwa, ahakuba ari aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo." 
Psalms16:9 Nikyo omutima gwangye gushemerererwa, n'amagara gangye gakeesiima; N'omubiri gwangye guryaguma guri buhooro." 
Psalms16:10 Ahakuba toritsiga magara gangye Kuzimu, N'obu kwakuba okureka Orikwera waawe kujunda." 
Psalms16:11 Oryanyoreka omuhanda gw'amagara, Omu maisho gaawe hariho okushemererwa kwingi munonga; Omu mukono gwawe gwa buryo harimu ebirikushemeza ebiro byona." 
Psalms17:1 Hurira eby'amazima, ai MUKAMA; ote omutima aha kutaka kwangye; Otegye okutu okushaba kwangye, okutarikuruga mu minwa y'obugobya." 
Psalms17:2 K'obe niiwe wancwera orubanja; Amaisho gaawe gareebe eby'oburyo! 
Psalms17:3 Ku oraarengye omutima gwangye, wantaayaayira nyekiro, Wangyeza, torikwija kundeebamu kibi kyona; Mmaririire kutashiisha n'akanwa kangye." 
Psalms17:4 Omu by'emirimo y'abantu, ahabw'ekigambo ky'eminwa yaawe Nyetantaire emihanda y'abanyamwaga." 
Psalms17:5 Tinkarugaga mu mihanda yaawe, N'ebigyere byangye tibikateereraga." 
Psalms17:6 Ai Ruhanga, nkutakiire, ahakuba nimmanya ngu noija kungarukamu. Ontegye okutu, ohurire ebigambo byangye." 
Psalms17:7 Oyorekye embabazi zaawe ez'okutangaaza, Iwe Omujuni w'abo abasherura obuhungiro aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo, Nibahunga abazigu baabo." 
Psalms17:8 Ondinde nk'embone y'eriisho, Ombumbatire n'amapapa gaawe," 
Psalms17:9 Onkize ababi abannyaga, Nibo bazigu bangye abanyehinguririize, abarikwenda kuunyita." 
Psalms17:10 Emitima yaabo terikwenda kusaasira; Akanwa kaabo kagamba eby'amaryo. 
Psalms17:11 Bantangatangire, bambuza obutooro; Banzooreire amaisho kunteera ahansi." 
Psalms17:12 Nibashusha nk'entare eine amairu g'eki erikwenda kwita, Nk'ekitsigazi ky'entare ekigwereire aheekiikire." 
Psalms17:13 Imuka, ai MUKAMA, obatangye omumaisho, obatuure ahansi! Okize amagara gangye ababi na rurara yaawe;" 
Psalms17:14 Ai MUKAMA, onjune abantu babi n'omukono gwawe, Abu omugabo gwabo guri ogw'ensi egi. Oijuze enda zaabo ebi waababiikiire, N'abaana baabo babihaagye, Kandi nabo babitsigire n'abeereere baabo." 
Psalms17:15 Kwonka nyowe ndyakureeba aha maisho ndi ohikiriire; Ku ndisisiimuka, ndyamarwa okureeba oku orikushusha." 
Psalms18:1 Ninkukunda, ai MUKAMA, maani gangye." 
Psalms18:2 MUKAMA n'orukiri rwangye, orugo rwangye orugumire, kandi Omujuni wangye; Ruhanga wangye, orukiri rwangye orugumire oru mpungiramu, Engabo yangye, eihembe ry'okujunwa kwangye, Kandi omunaara gwangye omuraingwa." 
Psalms18:3 Ndyatakira MUKAMA oshemereire kuhimbisibwa; Obwo nibwo ndikira abazigu bangye. 
Psalms18:4 Emigoye ya Rufu ekanzingazinga, N'emyegyemure y'okuhwerekyerera yantiinisa;" 
Psalms18:5 Emigoye y'Okuzimu ekanzingazinga; Emitego ya Rufu yantanga omumaisho. 
Psalms18:6 Omu busaasi bwangye naayeta MUKAMA, Naatakira Ruhanga wangye kumpa emikono; Yaahurira eiraka ryangye ari omuri hekalu ye, N'okurira kwangye kwahika omu matu ge." 
Psalms18:7 Bwanyima ensi yaatengyeta, yaatetema; N'emisingi y'ebibungo yaanyiganyiga, Yaatengyetsibwa ekiniga kye." 
Psalms18:8 Omwika gukaruga omu nyindo ze, N'omu kanwa ke haarugamu omuriro ogurikurya busha, Gwayatsya amakara." 
Psalms18:9 Kandi akainamya eiguru, yaashuuma, Omwirima ndindindi guri ahansi y'ebigyere bye;" 
Psalms18:10 Yaagaruka aheekirwe kerubi, Yaija naarahuka ari aha mapapa g'omuyaga." 
Psalms18:11 Akahindura omwirima obweshereko nk'eihema erimwehinguririize, N'ebicu ebikwaitse, ebitimbire omwirima mwingi gw'enjura, Yaabigira eky'okumusangira." 
Psalms18:12 Omu kumurinkana okwabaire kuri omu maisho ge Haarugamu orubaare n'amakara garikwaka nibiruga omu bicu bye. 
Psalms18:13 MUKAMA yaahindira omu iguru, Rukira-boona yaagamba n'eiraka rye, Haija orubaare n'amakara agarikwaka;" 
Psalms18:14 Yaarasha emyambi ye, yaabataataanisa, Niyo mirabyo ye mingi, yaababinga." 
Psalms18:15 Obwo nibwo emikura y'amaizi yaareebwa, N'emisingi y'ensi ekashuuruuka Ahabw'okuhuuha kw'amaani okw'omwitsyo gw'omu nyindo zaawe." 
Psalms18:16 Yankununkirira ari ahaiguru, yankwata, Yaanyiha omu maizi maingi;" 
Psalms18:17 Yankiza omuzigu wangye ow'amaani, N'abo abaabaire nibaanyanga, ahakuba bakaba nibankiza amaani." 
Psalms18:18 Bakampurira aha izooba ry'okureeberaho enaku; Kwonka MUKAMA yaaba obwegamo bwangye. 
Psalms18:19 Taaziinyihamu, yanta omu mwanya ogugarami; Yanjuna, ahabw'okuba akaba nanshemerererwa." 
Psalms18:20 MUKAMA akampa ebihembo nk'okuhikiirira kwangye oku kuri, Yanzimuurira nk'okushemera kw'emikono yangye oku kuri;" 
Psalms18:21 ahakuba nkagumira omu mihanda ya MUKAMA, Kandi tinkacumuraga kuruga ahari Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms18:22 Ebiragiro bye byona bikaba biri omu maisho gangye, Tinkeetantaraga bi yaaragiire." 
Psalms18:23 Nkaba ntaine ky'okuhanwa omu maisho ge, Kandi nkeerinda okushiisha" 
Psalms18:24 Nikyo MUKAMA yaanyihuriire, nk'okuhikiirira kwangye oku kuri, Kandi akanzimuurira ebishemereire okushemera kw'emikono yangye omu maisho ge." 
Psalms18:25 Aha munyambabazi oyeyoreka ori ow'embabazi; Ahari ohikire oyeyoreka ori ohikire; 
Psalms18:26 Ahari oshemeire oyeyoreka ori oshemeire; Aha mugomi oyeyoreka ogumire. 
Psalms18:27 Ahakuba ojuna abacureezi; Konka ab'amaisho g'amaryo obagarura ahansi. 
Psalms18:28 Eego, niiwe okongyeza etabaaza yangye; MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye niwe ayakira omwirima gwangye." 
Psalms18:29 Eego, ahabwawe nimbaasa kurwanisa omutwe gw'engabo, Ahabw'okuhwerwa Ruhanga wangye nimbaasa kuguruka orugo." 
Psalms18:30 Ruhanga ogwo, omuhanda gwe n'oguhikire; Okuraganisa kwa MUKAMA kurengirwe, n'okw'amazima; Niwe ngabo ekingira abamuhungiraho boona." 
Psalms18:31 Mbwenu n'oha oba Ruhanga otari MUKAMA? N'oha oba Rukiri, otari Ruhanga waitu?" 
Psalms18:32 Niwe Ruhanga onzirika amaani, Akashemeza omuhanda gwangye." 
Psalms18:33 Agira ebigyere byangye nk'eby'empara, Anyemereza aha nengo mpamire." 
Psalms18:34 Ayegyesa engaro zangye okurwana, Ngu emikono yangye ebaase kureega obuta bw'omuringa." 
Psalms18:35 Ompaire engabo y'okujuna kwawe, N'omukono gwawe gwa buryo gumbangiire, Okutwaza gye kwawe kunkurize." 
Psalms18:36 Ompanguhiize ah'okuraba, Ebigyere byangye tibyaterera." 
Psalms18:37 Nkakurata abazigu bangye, naabahika, Kandi tindagarukire okuhitsya obu baahweireho;" 
Psalms18:38 Naabacumita, tibaabaasa kwimuka, Baagwa ahansi y'ebigyere byangye," 
Psalms18:39 Ahakuba okanzirika amaani g'okurwana, Waagomoora abaabaire nibaija kundwanisa." 
Psalms18:40 Okareetera abazigu bangye kumpunga, Kandi n'abaabaire nibanyanga naabacwekyereza." 
Psalms18:41 Baataka, kwonka baabura kijuna; Baatakira MUKAMA, tiyaabagarukamu." 
Psalms18:42 Naabateera, naabatuntumura nk'oku omuyaga gugira omucuucu; Naabanaga nk'ebyondo by'omu nguuto." 
Psalms18:43 Okankiza okurwana n'amahanga, Wampindura omukuru waago; Naaheerezibwa abantu abu ntakamanyaga." 
Psalms18:44 Ahonaaho abanyamahanga, ku bampuriirre, Baanyorobera, baanyehongyera." 
Psalms18:45 Abo banyamahanga bakeehwa amatsiko, Baaruga omu bigo byabo nibatetema." 
Psalms18:46 MUKAMA n'ohuriire; Rukiri rwangye ahimbisibwe! Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwangye aheebwe ekitiinisa. 
Psalms18:47 Niwe Ruhanga owampooreire, Akangomoorera amahanga;" 
Psalms18:48 Akankiza abazigu; Eego, okanta ahaiguru y'abarikundwanisa, Waanyiha omu mikono y'abanyamwaga." 
Psalms18:49 N'ahabw'ekyo, ai MUKAMA, ndyakusiimira omu mahanga, Kandi nyeshongore eby'okuhimbisa eiziina ryawe." 
Psalms18:50 Omugabe ou yaataireho amuha obusinguzi bwingi, Kandi ayoreka ou yaashukireho amajuta embabazi, Niwe Daudi n'abaijukuru ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms19:1 Eiguru rimanyisa ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga, N'omwanya gw'ahaiguru gworeka emirimo y'emikono ye." 
Psalms19:2 Nyomushana egambira nyomushana endiijo ebigambo, N'ekiro kimanyisa ekindi kiro obwengye." 
Psalms19:3 Tihariho rurimi, n'obu byakuba ebigambo; Amaraka gaabyo tigahurirwa." 
Psalms19:4 Kwonka eiraka ryabyo ribuga ensi yoona, Kandi n'ebigambo byabyo bihika aha muheru gw'ensi. Omuribyo nimwo yaateire eihema ahabw'eizooba," 
Psalms19:5 Riri nka kishwera oku ashohora omu kishengye kye, Rishemererwa nk'ow'amaani, niriraba omu rugyendo rwaryo." 
Psalms19:6 Riruga aha muheru gw'eiguru, Ryehinguririza, rihika aha gundi; Tihariho kisherekwa okwotsya kwaryo." 
Psalms19:7 Ekiragiro kya MUKAMA kihikire, Kigarura omutima omunda; n'eby'okwesigwa, Biha obwengye otabwine;" 
Psalms19:8 Eby'okwegyesa bya MUKAMA bihikire, Bigwisa gye omutima; Ekiragiro kya MUKAMA kishemeire, Kihwezesa amaisho;" 
Psalms19:9 Okutiina MUKAMA ni kurungi, Kugumaho ebiro byona; Ebi MUKAMA aragiira n'eby'amazima, Kandi n'eby'okuhikiirira buzima." 
Psalms19:10 Bishemereire kwetengwa okukira ezaabu, Nangwa n'ezaabu enungi munonga; Binuzire okukira obwoki, Oburikutoonya niburuga omu ngabo yaabwo." 
Psalms19:11 Kandi nibyo bihabura omwiru waawe, N'omu kubyorobera harimu ebihembo bingi." 
Psalms19:12 N'oha orikubaasa kumanya ebishobyo bye? Onshemezeho ebibi ebisherekirwe. 
Psalms19:13 Kandi ozibire omwiru waawe kukora ebibi nkana; Otabiikiriza kuntegyeka! Obwo ndyaba otaine ky'okuhanwa, Kandi tindigira rubanja rw'okushiisha okuhinguraine." 
Psalms19:14 Ebigambo by'omu kanwa kangye, N'okuteekateeka kw'omu mutima gwangye Bisiimwe omu maisho gaawe, Ai MUKAMA, orukiri rwangye, kandi omucunguzi wangye." 
Psalms20:1 MUKAMA akugarukyemu aha izooba ry'okureeberaho enaku, Eiziina rya Ruhanga wa Yakobo rikurinde!" 
Psalms20:2 Akutwekyere okuhwera okurikuruga omu Mwanya ogurikwera, Akuhe amaani agarikuruga omuri Saayuuni." 
Psalms20:3 Aijukye empongano zaawe zoona, aikirize ebitambo byawe ebyokize!" 
Psalms20:4 Akuhe eki omutima gwawe gurikwetenga, Kandi ahikiirize enaama zaawe zoona!" 
Psalms20:5 Turyateera akaari k'okushemerererwa okusingura kwawe, Kandi omu iziina rya Ruhanga waitu turyaimutsya endango zaitu. MUKAMA ahikiirize ebi orikushaba byona!" 
Psalms20:6 Mbwenu nimmanyira kimwe ngu MUKAMA aryahwera ou yaashukireho amajuta, Amugarukyemu, naayema omu iguru rye eririkwera, N'obusinguzi bw'amaani g'omukono gwe gwa buryo." 
Psalms20:7 Abamwe beesiga ebigaari by'okurwanisa, n'abandi beesiga embaraasi, Kwonka itwe twesiga eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu." 
Psalms20:8 Bo baryainama, bagwe; Kwonka itwe turyaimuka, twemerere tuhamire." 
Psalms20:9 Ai MUKAMA, ohe omugabe okusingura; Kandi ku turaakutakire, otuhurire." 
Psalms21:1 Ai MUKAMA, omugabe naayesiimira amaani gaawe; Eshi okuhwera kwawe naakushemerererwa munonga!" 
Psalms21:2 Omuhaire eki omutima gwe gurikwetenga, Kandi tomwimire ki eminwa ye eshabire." 
Psalms21:3 Ahakuba omubuganiise eby'emigisha ebirungi, Waamujweka ekirunga ky'ezaabu enungi aha mutwe." 
Psalms21:4 Akakushaba amagara, waagamuha, Nikwo kumereera ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms21:5 Ekitiinisa kye ni kingi ahabw'okuhwera kwawe, Kandi omujwekire okusiimwa n'obukuru." 
Psalms21:6 Omuhaire emigisha mingi ebiro byona, Kandi omunanwire n'okushemererwa ahabw'okuguma omu maisho gaawe;" 
Psalms21:7 Ahakuba omugabe ayesiga MUKAMA; Kandi ahabw'embabazi za Rukira-boona taritengyetsibwa. 
Psalms21:8 Omukono gwawe guryagwa aha bazigu baawe boona, Omukono gwawe gwa buryo guryakwata abarikukwanga." 
Psalms21:9 Oryabagira nk'ekikoomi ekirikubuguma omu biro by'ekiniga kyawe; MUKAMA aryabamira n'ekiniga kye, Kandi omuriro guryabamaraho." 
Psalms21:10 Oruzaaro rwabo oryarumara omu nsi, Na baijukuru baabo obamare omu baana b'abantu." 
Psalms21:11 N'obu barihanuura kukukora kubi, Bakakugiraho enaama mbi, tibaribaasa." 
Psalms21:12 Oryababinga bakuhungye, Otaire emyambi yaawe omu buta ogyorekyeize aha maisho gaabo." 
Psalms21:13 Ohimbisibwe, ai MUKAMA, omu maani gaawe; Naitwe turyayeshongora tusingize obushoboorozi bwawe." 
Psalms22:1 Ruhanga wangye, Ruhanga wangye, n'enki ekyakuntsigisaho? ahabw'enki ori hare, otarikumpwera, kandi otarikuhurira bigambo by'okutsinda kwangye?" 
Psalms22:2 Ai bambe Ruhanga wangye, nkutakira nyomushana, tongarukamu; Kandi na nyekiro, timpunama." 
Psalms22:3 Kwonka Iwe ori Orikwera, Iwe otuura aha kitebe ky'okuhimbisa kwa Israeli." 
Psalms22:4 Baatatenkuriitwe bakakwesiga; Ku baakwesigire, waabajuna." 
Psalms22:5 Bakakutakira, waabakiza; Bakakwesiga, tibaayefuuza." 
Psalms22:6 Kwonka nyowe ndi omunyongororwa, tindi muntu, Ou abantu bajuma, kandi ogaywa boona." 
Psalms22:7 Boona abandeeba banshekyerera, Banteerera enaku n'eminwa yaabo, nibazongoza emitwe," 
Psalms22:8 Nibagira bati: Akeesiga Ruhanga; mbwenu naamujune; Amukize, ahakuba amushemerererwa." 
Psalms22:9 Kwonka niiwe waanyihire omu nda ya maawe, Kandi okandinda nkiri aha mabeere." 
Psalms22:10 Okwiha obu naazarwa, niiwe nyegamira; Okwiha obu maawe yanzaara, niiwe oba Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms22:11 Otanza hare, ahakuba akabi kari haihi; Kandi tiinyine kihwera." 
Psalms22:12 Enimi nyingi ziinyehinguririize; Enimi z'amaani eza Bashani zintangatangire; 
Psalms22:13 Ziinyashamiire, Nk'entare esheegire, erikutsinda." 
Psalms22:14 Nyatikire nk'amaizi, Amagufa gangye goona gataine; Omutima gwangye guri nk'entsinda, Niguyagira omu kifuba kyangye." 
Psalms22:15 Amaani gampweiremu, nyomire nk'orugusyo, Orurimi rundamatiire aha nkanka; Ontaire omu mucuucu gw'okufa." 
Psalms22:16 Embwa ziinyehinguririize, Omutwe gw'enkozi z'ebibi guntaire ahagati; Banfumwire ebiganja n'ebigyere." 
Psalms22:17 Nimbaasa kubara amagufa gangye goona; Banteireho amaisho nibanshamaarira," 
Psalms22:18 Baabagana eby'okujwara byangye, Baateerera enteenyu ekijwaro kyangye." 
Psalms22:19 Kwonka ai MUKAMA, otaza hare! Iwe omuhwezi wangye, rahuka ompe emikono!" 
Psalms22:20 Onkize rurara, Amagara gangye ogaihe omu maani g'embwa!" 
Psalms22:21 Onjune omu kanwa k'entare, N'amagara gangye agarikubonabona ogaihe omu mahembe g'embogo!" 
Psalms22:22 Ndyagambira ab'eishe-emwe eiziina ryawe; Nkuhimbisize ahagati omu mutwe gw'abantu. 
Psalms22:23 Imwe abatiina MUKAMA, mumuhimbise! Naimwe oruzaaro rwa Yakobo, mumuhe ekitiinisa, Kandi imwe baijukuru ba Israeli mwena, mumutiine!" 
Psalms22:24 Ahakuba takagayaga n'obu kwakuba okunuga Okubonabona kw'orikubonabonesibwa; Kandi takamwimaga maisho, Kureka ku yaamutakiire, yaamuhurira." 
Psalms22:25 Ahariiwe niho okuhimbisa kwangye kuruga, oku nkuhimbisiza omu mutwe muhango gw'abantu; Ndyahikiiriza okuhiga kwangye omu maisho g'abarikumutiina." 
Psalms22:26 Abacureezi baryarya, bahaagye, N'abasherura MUKAMA baryamuhimbisa. Emitima yaanyu emereere ebiro byona." 
Psalms22:27 Ab'embaju zoona ez'ensi baryaijuka, Bahindukire MUKAMA; N'enganda zoona ez'amahanga ziryaramiza omu maisho ge;" 
Psalms22:28 Ahakuba obutegyeki n'obwa MUKAMA, Kandi niwe ategyeka amahanga." 
Psalms22:29 Eego, abanyamaryo boona ab'omu nsi baryamwinamira, N'abashuuma omu mucuucu boona baryainama omu maisho ge, Omuntu weena otarikubaasa kuzibira amagara ge kufa." 
Psalms22:30 Abaijukuru baryamuheereza, Abantu bayragambira ab'obusingye oburikurataho ebya MUKAMA," 
Psalms22:31 Bamanyise abantu abarizaarwa okuhikiirira kwe, Ku niwe yaakikozire." 
Psalms23:1 MUKAMA niwe muriisa wangye, tindikyena kintu kyona." 
Psalms23:2 Ambyamya omu iriisizo ry'obunyaatsi buto, Antwara aha rubaju rw'amaizi agarikusheneneka;" 
Psalms23:3 Agarura amaani omu magara gangye. Anyebembera omu mihanda y'okuhikiirira ahabw'eiziina rye. 
Psalms23:4 N'obu ndiraba omu ruhanga rw'ekibunda ky'okufa, Tinditiina kabi koona, Ahabw'okuba ori hamwe naanye; Oruga rwawe n'enkoni yaawe bimpuumuza." 
Psalms23:5 Ontebeekanisiza emeeza omu maisho g'abazigu bangye, Onshuka amajuta aha mutwe, Ekikopo kyangye kiijwire nikisheesheka." 
Psalms23:6 Buzimazima oburungi n'embabazi biryaguma naanye Ebiro byona eby'amagara gangye; Naanye ndyaguma omu nju ya MUKAMA Ebiro n'ebiro. 
Psalms24:1 Ensi n'eya MUKAMA n'ebirimu byona, Ensi yoona n'abagituuramu;" 
Psalms24:2 Ahakuba akata emisingi yaayo aha nyanja, Yaagihamiza aha migyera y'amaizi maingi." 
Psalms24:3 N'oha oritemba aha kibungo kya MUKAMA? Kandi oryemerera omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera n'oha? 
Psalms24:4 Nogwo oine engaro ezishemeziibwe n'omutima ogushemeire, Otata mutima gwe ha by'ebishuba, Kandi otarahira by'obubobya." 
Psalms24:5 Ogwo niwe ariheebwa omugisha kuruga ahari MUKAMA, N'okuhikiirira kuruga ahari Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwe." 
Psalms24:6 Abamusherura n'abari nk'ogwo, Abenda kureeba amaisho ga Ruhanga wa Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Imwe marembo 'mwe, nimwimutsye emitwe yaanyu, Naimwe enyigi eza ira, mwimukye, Mukama w'ekitiinisa abone kutaahamu." 
Psalms24:8 Ogwo Mukama w'ekitiinisa n'oha? Ni MUKAMA ow'amaani, ow'obushoboorozi, MUKAMA ow'obushboorozi omu kurwana." 
Psalms24:9 Imwe marembo 'mwe, nimwimutsye emitwe yaanyu, Naimwe enyigi eza ira, mwimukye, MUKAMA w'ekitiinisa abone kutaahamu." 
Psalms24:10 Ogwo Mukama w'ekitiinisa n'oha? MUKAMA w'amahe niwe Mukama ow'ekitiinisa. 
Psalms25:1 Ai MUKAMA, niiwe nyimukiza omutima." 
Psalms25:2 Ai Ruhanga wangye, niiwe nyesiga; Otandeka kwitwa enshoni, Otaikiriza abazigu bangye kuunyehimbisizaho." 
Psalms25:3 Eego, otaikiriza weena orikukutegyereza kwitwa enshoni; Abareebeza abandi busha bakwatwe enshoni." 
Psalms25:4 Ompabure emihanda yaawe, ai MUKAMA; Kandi onyegyese emitwarize yaawe." 
Psalms25:5 Onyebembere omu mazima gaawe, kandi onyegyese, ahakuba niiwe Ruhanga w'okujunwa kwangye; Niiwe ntegyereza eizooba ryona." 
Psalms25:6 Ai MUKAMA, ijuka okusaasira kwawe n'embabazi zaawe, Ahakuba bikaba biriho okuruga ira ryona." 
Psalms25:7 Otaijuka ebibi by'obutsigazi bwangye, n'obu byakuba eby'okushiisha byangye; Onyijukye nk'embabazi zaawe oku ziri, Ahabw'oburungi bwawe, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms25:8 MUKAMA ni murungi kandi ow'amazima; Nikyo ahaburira abasiisi omuhanda. 
Psalms25:9 Abacureezi abeebembera omu by'oburyo, Kandi abeegyesa omuhanda gwe." 
Psalms25:10 Emihanda yoona eya MUKAMA n'embabazi n'amazima Ahari abo abarinda endagaano ye n'ebi yahamize. 
Psalms25:11 Ahabw'eiziina ryawe, ai MUKAMA, Saasira okushiisha kwangye, ahabw'okuba ni kwingi." 
Psalms25:12 Omuntu orikutiina MUKAMA n'oha? Ogwo niwe aryegyesa omuhanda ogu ashemereire kutoora. 
Psalms25:13 Amagara ge garyaguma omu busingye, Kandi abaana be baryahungura ensi." 
Psalms25:14 Emibonano ya MUKAMA emanywa abarikumutiina, Kandi aryabooreka endagaano ze." 
Psalms25:15 Amaisho gangye ntuura ngahangire MUKAMA, Ahakuba niwe ariiha ebigyere byangye omu mutego." 
Psalms25:16 Ompindukire, ongirire embabazi, Ahakuba tiinyine ifo na ruguru, kandi nimbonabona." 
Psalms25:17 Otuubye enaku z'omu mutima gwangye, Onyihe omu busaasi bwangye." 
Psalms25:18 Reeba okubonabona kwangye n'enaku zangye, Onsaasire ebibi byangye byona." 
Psalms25:19 Reeba abazigu bangye ku bari baingi, Kandi ku barikuunyanga okwanga okubi." 
Psalms25:20 Rinda amagara gangye, onjune; Otandeka kwitwa enshoni, ahabw'okuba nkuhungiireho." 
Psalms25:21 Okuhikiirira n'amazima bindinde, Ahabw'okuba nkutegyereize." 
Psalms25:22 Ai Ruhanga, cungura Israeli, Omwihe omu naku ze zoona." 
Psalms26:1 Oncwere orubanja, ai MUKAMA, Ahakuba okuhikiirira kwangye nikwo ngyendeiremu, Kandi nyesigire MUKAMA ntarikubanganisa."
