Psalms26:2 Onshwijume, ai MUKAMA, ongyeze; Orengye omutima gwangye n'obwengye bwangye." 
Psalms26:3 Ahakuba embabazi zaawe ziri omu maisho gangye, Kandi ngyendeire omu mazima gaawe." 
Psalms26:4 Tinshutama na bantu bataine mugasho, Kandi tinkwatanisa na ndyarya." 
Psalms26:5 Nyanga omutwe gw'enkozi z'ebibi, Kandi tindishutama na basiisi." 
Psalms26:6 Nnaabisa engaro zangye ntaine rubanja, Ngu mbone kwehinguririza eitambiro ryawe, ai MUKAMA," 
Psalms26:7 Niinyeshongora munonga eby'okusiima, Nimaamnyisa emirimo yaawe yoona erikutangaaza." 
Psalms26:8 MUKAMA, nkunda oburaaro bw'omu nju yaawe, N'ahi ekitiinisa kyawe kituura." 
Psalms26:9 Otampwerekyereza n'abanyabibi, N'obu gaakuba amagara gangye n'abasheesha eshagama," 
Psalms26:10 Abu emikono yaabo eine eitima, Kandi abu emikono yaabo eya buryo eijwire enguzi." 
Psalms26:11 Kwonka nyowe ndyagyendera omu kuhikiirira kwangye; Oncungure, ongirire embabazi." 
Psalms26:12 Ekigyere kyangye kyemereire aharinganiire. Ndyahimbisiza MUKAMA omu iteeraniro rihango ry'abantu. 
Psalms27:1 MUKAMA niwe mushana gwangye kandi okujunwa kwangye; N'oha ou nditiina? MUKAMA niwe maani g'amagara gangye; Orintiinisa n'oha? 
Psalms27:2 Enkozi z'ebibi ku zampururiire kummira, Nibo bazigu bangye n'abarikuunyanga, Bakateera entsibo, baagwa." 
Psalms27:3 N'obu engabo zaakuteeka enteeko kundwanisa, Omutima gwangye tigukaatiina; N'obu orugamba rwakumbaho, hoona nabwo nkaaguma omutima." 
Psalms27:4 Ekigambo eki nshabire MUKAMA ni kimwe, Kandi nikyo ndiguma ninsherura; Nikwo kuguma omu nju ya MUKAMA ebiro byona eby'amagara gangye, Okureeba oburungi bwa MUKAMA, n'okwehanuuza omuri hekalu ye." 
Psalms27:5 Ahakuba aha izooba ry'okureeberaho enaku aryandindira omu mubonano omu kibanda kye, Omu bweshereko bw'eihema rye nimwo arinshereka, Akanyimutsya, akanyemereza aha rukiri." 
Psalms27:6 Na mbwenu hati omutwe gwangye nigwija kutunguurwa, Gube ahiguru y'abazigu bangye abandi embaju zoona; Ndyahonga ebitambo omu ihema rye n'okwesiima, Nyeshongore; eego nyeshongorere MUKAMA eby'okumuhimbisa." 
Psalms27:7 Hurira, ai MUKAMA, ku ndaakutakire n'eiraka rihango, Ongirire embabazi, kandi ongarukyemu." 
Psalms27:8 Ku waagizire oti: Musherure amaisho gangye, Omutima gwangye gwakugarukamu guti: Ai MUKAMA, amaisho gaawe nigo ndiguma ninsherura." 
Psalms27:9 Otanyima amaisho, otabinga omwiru waawe n'ekiniga; Niiwe waabaire ori Omuhwezi wangye; Otannaga, n'obu kwakub aokuntsigaho, Ai Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwangye." 
Psalms27:10 Tata na maawe bantsigireho, Kwonka MUKAMA naija kuunyanduura." 
Psalms27:11 Onyegyese omuhanda gwawe, ai MUKAMA, Onyebembere omu muhanda ogutarikuhabya ahabw'abazigu bangye." 
Psalms27:12 Otareka ababisha bangye kunkora eki barikwenda, Ahakuba baakareebi b'ebishuba baanyimukiriire, Nibagamba n'amaani eby'okuntiinisa." 
Psalms27:13 Nkaagwire enshazi, kuri ntaraikiriize kureeba oburungi bwa MUKAMA Omu nsi y'abahuriire;" 
Psalms27:14 Tegyereza MUKAMA; gira amaani; Guma omutima. Eego otegyereze MUKAMA. 
Psalms28:1 Ai MUKAMA, niiwe ndikutakira; Iwe Rukiri rwangye, otaanyetsiza; Ahakuba ku waakuunyetsiza, Nkaaba nk'abarikushuuma omu Kiina." 
Psalms28:2 Ohurire eiraka ry'okweshengyereza kwangye, Ku ndaakutakire niinyimutsya emikono yangye, Ngyorekyeize Omwanya gwawe ogurikwera munonga." 
Psalms28:3 Otantwarirana n'abasiisi n'enkozi z'ebibi, Abagamba gye na bataahi baabo, Kwonka baine eitima omu mitima yaabo." 
Psalms28:4 Obazimuurire ebishemereire emirimo yaabo, Kandi nk'obubi bw'emicwe yaabo oku buri; Obahe nk'ebi bakozire n'engaro zaabo oku biri, Obaihure ebibashemereire." 
Psalms28:5 Ahakuba tibata mutima ha mirimo ya MUKAMA, Nari aha bi emikono ye ekora; Aryabasheenya, taribombeka bundi." 
Psalms28:6 MUKAMA ahimbisibwe, Ahakuba ahuriire eiraka ry'okweshengyereza kwangye." 
Psalms28:7 MUKAMA niwe maani gangye, kandi engabo yangye; Omutima gwangye gumwesigire, naahwerwa; Nikyo omutima gwangye gushemerererwa munonga, Nkamusingiza n'ekyeshongoro kyangye." 
Psalms28:8 MUKAMA n'amaani g'abantu be, Niwe buhungiro oburikujuna ou yaashukireho amajuta." 
Psalms28:9 Juna abantu baawe, n'obuhunguzi bwawe obuhe omugisha; Obe omuriisa waabo, kandi obaramire ebiro byona." 
Psalms29:1 Imwe ab'omu iguru, muhimbise MUKAMA, Muhimbise MUKAMA, mugambe ku aine ekitiinisa n'amaani;" 
Psalms29:2 Muhe MUKAMA ekitiinisa ekishemereire eiziina rye; Muramye MUKAMA, mujwaire eby'okuhikiirira." 
Psalms29:3 Eiraka rya MUKAMA rigambira aha maizi, Ruhanga ow'ekitiinisa ahinda, Niwe MUKAMA ohindira aha maizi maingi." 
Psalms29:4 Eiraka rya MUKAMA n'ery'amaani, Eiraka rya MUKAMA riijwire ekitiinisa." 
Psalms29:5 Eiraka rya MUKAMA rihenda ebiti by'emyereezi; Eego, MUKAMA ahenda ebiti bya Lebanooni eby'emyereezi." 
Psalms29:6 Akinisa Lebanooni nk'enyana, Na Sirioni nk'enyana y'embogo." 
Psalms29:7 Eiraka rya MUKAMA ribaganisa endimi z'omuriro. 
Psalms29:8 Eiraka rya MUKAMA ritengyetsa eihamba, MUKAMA atengyetsa eihamba rya Kadeshi." 
Psalms29:9 Eiraka rya MUKAMA ritoroozya empara, rikonkobora ebibira; Kandi omuri hekalu ye byona bigira biti: Oheebwe ekitiinisa." 
Psalms29:10 MUKAMA akashutama aha kitebe ky'obukama bwe ha mwegyemure gw'amaizi; Eego, MUKAMA atuura ari Omukama ebiro byona." 
Psalms29:11 MUKAMA aryaha abantu be amaani; MUKAMA aryaha abantu be omugisha gw'obusingye. 
Psalms30:1 Ai MUKAMA, ninkuhimbisa, ahakuba onyimukize, Kandi tiwaareka bazigu bangye kuunyehimbisizaho." 
Psalms30:2 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, Nkakutakira, wankiza." 
Psalms30:3 MUKAMA, okaiha amagara gangye Okuzimu, Wandinda, naaguma ndi ohuriire, Waanyiha omu barikushuuma omu Kiina." 
Psalms30:4 Imwe abarikwera be, mweshongorere MUKAMA eby'okuhimbisa, Kandi musiime eiziina rye eririkwera." 
Psalms30:5 Ahakuba ekiniga kye n'eky'akaanya kakye, Kwonka embabazi ze zigumaho ebiro byona eby'amagara g'omuntu. Okurira kukaaraarira omuntu nyekiro, Kwonka okushemererwa kwija omu kasheeshe." 
Psalms30:6 Nyowe omu biro by'okuhiirwa kwangye nkagira nti: Tinditengyetsibwa ebiro byona. 
Psalms30:7 Iwe MUKAMA, ahabw'embabazi zaawe okangumya nk'ekibungo; Ku wanyimire amaisho naaburaburirwa," 
Psalms30:8 Naakutakira, ai MUKAMA; Kandi niiwe naayeshengyereza, nkeebuuza nti:" 
Psalms30:9 Ku ndishuuma omu Kiina, eshagama yangye eryangasira ki? Omucuucu guryakuhimbisa, nari gumanyise amazima gaawe?" 
Psalms30:10 Hurira, ai MUKAMA, ongirire embabazi! MUKAMA, ogume ori Omuhwezi wangye!" 
Psalms30:11 Okucura kwangye okakuhindura okuzina; Okanzirikuurura ekiguniya, wanzirika okushemererwa," 
Psalms30:12 Ngu amagara gangye gakuhimbise, garekye kuhunama. Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, ndyakusiima ebiro byona." 
Psalms31:1 Ai MUKAMA, niiwe ndikwesiga, otarindeka kuhemuka ebiro byona; Onjune ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe." 
Psalms31:2 Ontegye okutu, orahukye kunjuna; Ombeere orukiri rw'okuhungiramu, kandi orugo rugumire orw'okunjuna." 
Psalms31:3 Eego niiwe rukiri rwangye, kandi orugo rwangye orugumire; Ahabw'eiziina ryawe onyebembere, kandi ompabure," 
Psalms31:4 Onyihe omu mutego ogu bantegire, Ahakuba niiwe buhungiro bwangye." 
Psalms31:5 Ninta omwoyo gwangye omu mikono yaawe; Okancungura, ai MUKAMA, iwe Ruhanga orikwesigwa." 
Psalms31:6 Nyanga abata omutima aha bishushani ebirikuramibwa ebitaine mugasho; Kandi nyesiga MUKAMA. 
Psalms31:7 Ndyashemererwa, nyesiime ahabw'embabazi zaawe; Ahakuba okareeba obusaasi bwangye, Waamanya enaku zangye," 
Psalms31:8 Kandi tokampayoga mu mikono y'abazigu; Okata ebigyere byangye omu mwanya ogugarami. 
Psalms31:9 Ongirire embabazi, ai MUKAMA, ahakuba nyine obusaasi; Eriisho ringwire omunda, amagara gangye n'omubiri gwangye binyangaraire ahabw'obusaasi." 
Psalms31:10 Ahakuba ebiro byangye byona mbimazire nyine enaku, N'emyaka yangye ngimazire nintsinda; Mpweirwemu amaani ahabw'okushiisha kwangye, N'amagufa gangye goomire." 
Psalms31:11 Aha bazigu bangye boona mpindukira ekujumo, N'okukira munonga ahari bataahi bangye, Kandi ahari bagyenzi bangye mbaire ekirikutiinisa; Abarikumbugana omu muhanda, nibampunga." 
Psalms31:12 Nyebire nk'ofiire otakiijukwa, Ndi nk'orwabya orwatikire." 
Psalms31:13 Eego, nimpurira baingi nibambeiherera; Obwoba bunturukire embaju zoona, Nibangiira omu naama, kusherura obwengye bw'okuunyita." 
Psalms31:14 Kwonka niiwe ndikwesiga, ai MUKAMA, Ningira nti: Niiwe Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms31:15 Ebiro byangye biri omu mikono yaawe; Onyihe omu mikono y'abazigu bangye n'abarikumpiiga. 
Psalms31:16 Oyakize omwiru waawe omushana gw'amaisho gaawe; Onjune ahabw'embabazi zaawe enyingi. 
Psalms31:17 Otandeka kwitwa enshoni, ai MUKAMA, Ahabw'okuba nkutakiire; Ababi ka babe nibo baitwa enshoni, Bashuume Okuzimu bahunami." 
Psalms31:18 Abarikubeiha bagobwe endimi, Abarikugamba kubi aha bahikiriire, Baine amaryo n'okwemanya n'okugaya." 
Psalms31:19 Oburungi bwawe ka ni bwingi, obu waabiikiire abarikukutiina, Obu waagiriire abarikukwesiga omu maisho g'abantu!" 
Psalms31:20 Omu bweshereko ahu otuura niho oribashereka enaama mbi z'abantu, Oryabarindira omu kibanda kyawe, bakire empaka z'endimi." 
Psalms31:21 MUKAMA ahimbisibwe, Ahakuba akanyoreka embabazi ze ez'okutangaaza omu rurembo rw'amaani." 
Psalms31:22 Nkagambisa obwoba nti: Ncwirwe omu maisho gaawe; Kwonka ku naakutakiire, waahurira okweshengyereza kwangye." 
Psalms31:23 Mukunde MUKAMA, imwe abarikwera be boona! MUKAMA arinda abeesigwa, Kwonka orikukoresa emyekunikon, amuzimuurira bingi ebimushemereire." 
Psalms31:24 Mugira amaani, mugume omutima, Imwe mwena abategyereza MUKAMA." 
Psalms32:1 Aine omugisha osaasiirwe eby'okushiisha bye, N'ebibi bye bikashwekwa." 
Psalms32:2 Aine omugisha omuntu ou MUKAMA atabarira kutahikiirira, Ou omutima gwe gutarimu bugobya." 
Psalms32:3 Ku naayangire kwatura ekibi kyangye, naahwa aha magufa Ahabw'okurenzya eizooba nintsinda." 
Psalms32:4 Ahabw'okuba omukono gwawe gukaba gumpingamira nyomushana na nyekiro, Amagara gangye gaayoma nk'oku omuntu ayomibwa omushana gw'ekyanda." 
Psalms32:5 Nkakugambira ekibi kyangye, Tinaakushereka kutahikiirira kwangye; Naagira nti: Naaza kwaturira MUKAMA eby'okushiisha byangye. Naiwe nikwo kunsaasira orubanja rw'ekibi kyangye." 
Psalms32:6 N'ahabw'ekyo orikutiina Ruhanga weena akushabe omu biro by'obusaasi, Kandi omwegyemure gw'amaizi maingi tigurimuhikaho." 
Psalms32:7 Niiwe bweshereko bwangye, oryandinda ndekye kureeba enaku; Oryanyehinguririza n'ebyeshongoro by'okujunwa." 
Psalms32:8 Ndyakwegyesa, nkuhabure omuhanda ogu oritoora; Ndyakuha obwengye, nkutaireho eriisho." 
Psalms32:9 Mutariba nk'embaraasi nari enyumbu, ezitaine bwengye, Ezishemereire kutegyekyesibwa ekyoma ky'omu kanwa, n'enkoba z'omu bitsya, Ahatari ebyo, tizaakugumire naiwe." 
Psalms32:10 Ababi baryareeba obusaasi bwingi; Kwonka oyesiga MUKAMA, embabazi ziryamwehinguririza." 
Psalms32:11 Mushemerererwe omuri MUKAMA, mwesiime, imwe abahikiriire; Muteere akaari k'okushemererwa, imwe mwena abaine emitima egororokire." 
Psalms33:1 Imwe abahikiriire, mushemerererwe omuri MUKAMA, Okuhimbisa kushemereire ab'amazima." 
Psalms33:2 Muhimbise MUKAMA n'enanga; Mumuteerere enanga ey'emirya ikumi! 
Psalms33:3 Mumweshongorere ekyeshongoro kisya; Mugiteere gye, mugijumeeze." 
Psalms33:4 Ahakuba ekigambo kya MUKAMA kihikire; Kandi emirimo ye yoona agikora n'obwesigwa. 
Psalms33:5 Akunda okuhikiirira n'eby'oburyo; Ensi eijwire embabazi za MUKAMA. 
Psalms33:6 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA nikyo kyahangire eiguru; N'omwitsyo gw'omu kanwa ke nigwo gwahangire amahe gaamwo goona. 
Psalms33:7 Akarundaana amaizi g'omu nyanja nk'agari omu cupa; Yaabiika eby'okuzimu omu bitara bye. 
Psalms33:8 Ensi yoona ehe MUKAMA ekitiinisa, N'abagituuramu boona bamutiine!" 
Psalms33:9 Ahakuba akagamba, kyabakwo; Yaaragiira, kyahama." 
Psalms33:10 MUKAMA ahindura busha enaama mbi z'amahanga, Azibira ebi abantu bateekateeka kukora." 
Psalms33:11 Enaama za MUKAMA zihamire ebiro byona, Ebiteekateeko by'omu mutima gwe bigumaho okuhitsya obusingye bwona." 
Psalms33:12 Riine omugisha eihanga eri MUKAMA ari Ruhanga waaryo, Abantu abu yaatooraine kuba obuhunguzi bwe." 
Psalms33:13 MUKAMA anaga amaisho ari omu iguru, Areeba abantu boona;" 
Psalms33:14 Areeba abatuura omu nsi boona Ashutami aha kitebe kye ky'obukama. 
Psalms33:15 Niwe abumba emitima y'abo boona, qaketegyereza ebi bakora byona." 
Psalms33:16 Omugabe tajunwa ngabo ze nyingi; Emanzi tekira habw'amaani gaayo amaingi. 
Psalms33:17 Embaraasi n'ekintu ekitarikubaasa kureeta businguzi, N'obu kwakuba okujuna omuntu ahabw'amaani gaayo amaingi." 
Psalms33:18 Reeba, eriisho rya MUKAMA riguma aha barikumutiina, Abagira amatsiko omu mbabazi ze," 
Psalms33:19 Ngu akize amagara gaabo okufa. Kandi abarinde okutaitwa njara. 
Psalms33:20 Amagara gaitu gategyereza MUKAMA; Niwe Muhwezi waitu kandi engabo yaitu. 
Psalms33:21 Eego, emitima yaitu eshemerererwa omuriwe. Ahakuba twesiga eiziina rye eririkwera." 
Psalms33:22 Embabazi zaawe, ai MUKAMA, zigume naitwe, Nk'oku turikukwesiga." 
Psalms34:1 Ndyahimbisa MUKAMA ebiro byona; Okusingizibwa kwe kuryaguma omu kanwa kangye. 
Psalms34:2 amagara gangye garyayeraatira omuri MUKAMA; Abarikubonabonesibwa bakihurire, beesiime." 
Psalms34:3 Mukwatanise naanye okuha MUKAMA ekitiinisa. Tuhimbise kumwe eiziina rye. 
Psalms34:4 Nkasherura MUKAMA, yaangarukamu; Yankiza ebyabaire nibintiinisa byona." 
Psalms34:5 Mumuhangye amaisho, mujwerwe omushana; N'amaisho gaanyu tigarikwatwa nshoni obundi." 
Psalms34:6 Enshoberwa egi ekatakira MUKAMA, yaagihurira, Yaagikiza enaku zaayo zoona." 
Psalms34:7 Maraika wa MUKAMA ateera amahema okwehinguririza abarikumutiina, Kandi abajuna." 
Psalms34:8 Yeimwe, nimuroze, mureebe MUKAMA ku ari murungi! Orikumwesiga weena aine omugisha." 
Psalms34:9 Mutiine MUKAMA, imwe abarikwera be; ahakuba abarikumutiina tibagira ki bakyena," 
Psalms34:10 Obwana bw'entare bubura eby'okurya, bwitwa enjara, Kwonka abasherura MUKAMA, tibariburirwa kirungi kyona." 
Psalms34:11 Imwe baana 'mwe, mwije mumpurire; Mbeegyesa okutiina MUKAMA." 
Psalms34:12 N'oha orikwenda amagara, akakunda okuhangaara Ngu abone omugisha?" 
Psalms34:13 Zibira orurimi rwawe kugamba ebibi, N'eminwa yaawe okuryarya." 
Psalms34:14 Reka ebibi, okore ebirungi; Sherura obusingye, kandi obukuratire." 
Psalms34:15 Amaisho ga MUKAMA agata aha bahikiriire, N'amatu ge agatega okutaka kwabo." 
Psalms34:16 Ekitsyori kya MUKAMA akiteera abakora kubi, Kumaraho okwijukwa kwabo omu nsi." 
Psalms34:17 Abahikiriire ku bataka, MUKAMA ahurira, Abajuna omu naku zaabo zoona." 
Psalms34:18 MUKAMA aba haihi ab'emitima ehendekire, Ajuna ab'omutima ogweteisiize kimwe." 
Psalms34:19 Ebibonabono by'ohikiriire ni bingi; Kwonka MUKAMA abimwihamu byona. 
Psalms34:20 Arinda amagufa ge goona, Tihahendekaho na rimwe." 
Psalms34:21 Obubi buryaita ababi; N'abanga ohikiriire baryasingwa orubanja. 
Psalms34:22 MUKAMA acungura amagara g'abairu be; Tihariho n'omwe omu bamuhungiraho orisingwa orubanja. 
Psalms35:1 Ai MUKAMA, tongana n'abarikuntonganisa; Orwane n'abarikundwanisa." 
Psalms35:2 Kwata engabo n'akagabo, Oimukye, ompe emikono!" 
Psalms35:3 Ihayo eicumu, okumiirire abambingire; Ogire amagara gangye oti: Niinye kujunwa kwawe." 
Psalms35:4 Haza abarikwenda kuunyita Bahemurwe, baihweho ekitiinisa! Abangiriire enaama mbi Bagarurwe enyima, bagaywe!" 
Psalms35:5 Babe nk'ebishushunga ebitwarwa omuyaga, Na maraika wa MUKAMA ababingye." 
Psalms35:6 Omuhanda gwabo gugire omwirima n'obuterezi, Obwo maraika wa MUKAMA ababingire." 
Psalms35:7 Ahakuba bantegire omutego, Amagara gangye bagategire obusya, nibantura busha." 
Psalms35:8 Okucwekyerera kubagweho batakimanyire, Omutego ogu bategire gube nibo gwakwata, Bagugwemu, bacwekyerere." 
Psalms35:9 Obwo nibwo amagara gangye garishemerererwa omuri MUKAMA, Nigeesiimira okujuna kwe." 
Psalms35:10 Amagufa gangye goona garyagira gati: Ai MUKAMA, n'oha orikushushana naiwe, Iwe oiha otaine maani Omu mikono y'orikumukiza amaani, Okakiza otaine maani kandi enshoberwa Omu mikono y'orikumunyaga." 
Psalms35:11 Baamushinja b'ebishuba baimuka, Bantabaaririza ebi ntarikumanya;" 
Psalms35:12 Baanyihura ebibi ahabw'ebirungi, Baareetera amagara gangye okushoberwa." 
Psalms35:13 Haza bo, ku baabaire barwaire, Naajwara ebiguniya, naayebonabonesa niinyesiibyakwo, Naashaba ncurikire omutwe omu kifuba kyangye," 
Psalms35:14 Nk'orikusaasibwa munywani we nari mwene ishe; Naagyendagyenda nk'orikucurira nyina, Nyinami n'amaganya maingi." 
Psalms35:15 Kwonka nyowe, ku naagwire, baayesiima, Baayeteerana kundwanisa; N'abataine ku bari, abu naabaire ntarikumanya, Baaguma nibannyaanyaata;" 
Psalms35:16 Baagumizamu nibanteerera enaku, Nibannenera amaino baine ekiniga, Nk'abatatiina Ruhanga oku bagira." 
Psalms35:17 Ai MUKAMA, oryahitsya hi okufa okundeeba? Onjune batampwerekyereza, Okize amagara gangye entare." 
Psalms35:18 Naanye ndyakusiimira omu mutwe muhango gw'abantu, Nkuhimbisize omu bantu baingi." 
Psalms35:19 Otaikiriza abazigu bangye abarikuunyangira ebitahikire kuunyehimbisizaho; N'abanyanigira busha barekye kuunyitiranira amaisho. 
Psalms35:20 Ahakuba tibagamba by'obusingye, Kureka bateekateeka enaama z'ebishuba kurwanisa abatuurize omu nsi." 
Psalms35:21 Baanyashamiire munonga, nibagira bati: Otyo! Otyo! Mbwenu twakyereebera!" 
Psalms35:22 Ai MUKAMA, waakireeba; otahunama! Ai MUKAMA, otamba hare!" 
Psalms35:23 Ruhanga wangye, kandi MUKAMA wangye, Sisiimuka, oimukye oncwere orubanja omu buryo." 
Psalms35:24 Oncwere orubanja, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, Nk'okuhikiirira kwawe oku kuri; Otabareka kuunyehimbisizaho." 
Psalms35:25 Barekye kugira omu mitima yaabo bati: Otyo! ekyo nikyo twabaire nitwenda. Barekye kugira bati: Mbwenu ho, twamumirira kimwe." 
Psalms35:26 K'abarikwesiimira enaku zangye bakwatwe enshoni, boona bashoberwe; Abarikuunyehimbisizaho bajwekwe enshoni n'okugaywa!" 
Psalms35:27 Abarikuunyendeza okusinga omu mazima Bateere akaari k'okushemererwa, beesiime! Eego, bagume bagire bati: MUKAMA orikwesiimira omwiru we kuba gye, Aheebwe ekitiinisa." 
Psalms35:28 Kandi orurimi rwangye ruryagamba aha by'okuhikiirira kwawe, N'aha kuhimbisibwa kwawe eizooba ryona." 
Psalms36:1 Ekibi kigamba n'omusiisi omu mutima gwe hare, Kandi okutiina Ruhanga tikuba mu maisho ge;" 
Psalms36:2 Ahakuba omu kwebeiha kwe agira ngu, Eby'okutahikiirira bye tibirireebwa, bikangwa." 
Psalms36:3 Ebigambo ebi agamba birimu eitima n'obugobya, Takikoresa bwengye, kandi takikora gye." 
Psalms36:4 Ateekateeka enaama z'okukora kubi, ari aha kitabo kye; Ayeta omu muhanda ogutari murungi, tayangira kimwe kibi." 
Psalms36:5 Embabazi zaawe, ai MUKAMA, ni nyingi, zihika omu iguru, N'okwesigwa kwawe kuhika omu bicu." 
Psalms36:6 Okuhikiirira kwawe ni nk'enshozi za Ruhanga, Emicwere yaawe eri hare nk'okuzimu. Ai MUKAMA, niiwe orinda abantu n'enyamaishwa." 
Psalms36:7 Ai Ruhanga, embabazi zaawe ka n'ez'obuguzi bwingi! N'ahabw'ekyo abantu bahungira omu mapapa gaawe." 
Psalms36:8 Baryagutira kimwe ebishaagaine eby'omu nju yaawe; Kandi oryabanywaisa aha mugyera gw'eby'okushemererwa byawe. 
Psalms36:9 Ahakuba ah'ori niho enshuro y'amagara eri; Omu mushana gwawe nimwo turireebera omushana. 
Psalms36:10 Guma ogirire abarikukukunda embabazi nyingi; Kandi oyorekye abaine emitima egororokire okuhikiirira kwawe. 
Psalms36:11 Otaikiriza ekigyere ky'ab'amaryo kumpikaho, N'obu gwakuba omukono gw'omubi kumbinga." 
Psalms36:12 Okwo niyo abakozi b'ebibi bagwire; Batwirwe ahansi, kandi tibaribaasa kwimuka." 
Psalms37:1 Otaryemereza omutima ahabw'abai, N'obu kwakuba okugirira enkozi z'ebibi eihari." 
Psalms37:2 Ahakuba baryarahuka kutemwa nk'obunyaatsi, Bahotokye nk'amababi." 
Psalms37:3 Oyesigye MUKAMA, okore ebirungi, Obwo nibwo orituura omu nsi, nooriira omu mariisizo n'obusingye." 
Psalms37:4 Kandi oshemerererwe omuri MUKAMA, Nawe aryakuha ebi omutima gwawe gurikwetenga." 
Psalms37:5 Orugyendo rwawe orwegyekyerere MUKAMA; Kandi omwesigye; nawe aryaruhikiiriza. 
Psalms37:6 Aryayoreka okuhikiirira kwawe nk'omushana, N'amazima gaawe nk'eihangwe." 
Psalms37:7 Huumurira omuri MUKAMA, omutegyereze n'okugumisiriza; Oteemereza omutima ahabw'omuntu orikuhiirwa omu muhanda gwawe, Akahikiiriza enaama ze embi." 
Psalms37:8 Reka kuguubwa kubi, ruga omu kiniga; Oteemereza omutima; ahakuba ekirugamu n'okukora ekibi." 
Psalms37:9 Mumanye ngu ababi baryacwekyerezibwa; Kwonka abategyereza MUKAMA baryahungura ensi. 
Psalms37:10 Bwanyima y'akaanya kakye omubi aryaba atakiriho; Buzima oryamusherura aha mwanya gwe, oshangye atariho." 
Psalms37:11 Kwonka abacureezi baryahungura ensi, Beesiime ahabw'okugira obusingye bwingi." 
Psalms37:12 Omubi agiira ohikiriire omu naama mbi, Kandi amunenera amaino." 
Psalms37:13 Kwonka Mukama ashekyerera omubi, Ahakuba areeba eizooba rye riri haihi." 
Psalms37:14 Ababi baasyoireyo zaarurara zaabo, batamikire emyambi omu mata gaabo, Kuteera ahansi enshoberwa n'abakyene, N'okwita abagyenda baine emitima egororokire." 
Psalms37:15 Zaarurara zaabo nibo zirirezya emitima, Kandi amata gaabo garyahendwa." 
Psalms37:16 Ebikye ebi ohikiriire aine Bikira ebishaagire eby'ababi baingi; 
Psalms37:17 Ahakuba emikono y'ababi eryahendeka, Kwonka MUKAMA akwatirira abahikiriire." 
Psalms37:18 MUKAMA amanya ebiro ebi abashugaine barimara, N'obuhunguzi bwabo buryagumaho ebiro byona;" 
Psalms37:19 Omu biro by'okureeba enaku tibariitwa nshoni, Kandi omu biro by'enjara baryaiguta." 
Psalms37:20 Kwonka ababi baryahwerekyerera, Abazigu ba MUKAMA baryaba nk'obunyaatsi burungi obw'omu iriisizo; Baryahwerekyerera, bahweho nk'omwika." 
Psalms37:21 Omubi ayeguza, taihura; Kwonka ohikiriire aba efura, kandi agaba." 
Psalms37:22 Ahakuba abu MUKAMA aha omugisah baryahungura ensi, Kwonka abu akyeenire baracwekyerera." 
Psalms37:23 Orugyendo rw'omuntu ku ruhamibwa MUKAMA, Yaasiima emihanda ye," 
Psalms37:24 N'obu agwa, tagwera kimwe, Ahakuba MUKAMA amuramira n'omukono gwe." 
Psalms37:25 Nkaba ndi omutisgazi, mbwenu ndi omurugurusi; Kwonka tinkareebaga ohikiriire atsigirweho, N'obu baakuba abaana be nibashaba ak'okurya." 
Psalms37:26 Obutoosha agaba n'obufura, kandi aguza abandi, N'abaana be baryaheebwa omugisha." 
Psalms37:27 Ruga omu bibi, okore ebirungi, Naiwe obwo oryagumaho ebiro byona;" 
Psalms37:28 Ahakuba MUKAMA akunda eby'oburyo, Taritsigaho barikwera be. Baryarindwa ebiro byona; Kwonka oruzaaro rw'ababi ruryacwekyerezibwa." 
Psalms37:29 Abahikiriire baryahungura ensi, Bagituuremu ebiro byona." 
Psalms37:30 Akanwa k'ohikiriire kagamba eby'obwengye, N'orurimi rwe rugamba eby'oburyo;" 
Psalms37:31 Ebiragiro bya Ruhanga biba omu mutima gwe; Ebigyere bye tibiterera. 
Psalms37:32 Omubi agyenza ohikiriire, Naasherura oku araamwitwe." 
Psalms37:33 MUKAMA tarimutsiga mu mikono ye, N'obu kwakuba okumusingisa emanja." 
Psalms37:34 Tegyereza MUKAMA, ogume omu muhanda gwe; Niwe arikutunguura, okahungura ensi; Oryareeba okuhwerekyerera kw'abasiisi." 
Psalms37:35 Nkareeba omubi aine obushoboorozi bwingi, Agaire nk'omwereezi gwa Lebanooni." 
Psalms37:36 Naagaruka, naarabaho; kwonka eky'okutangaaza, akaba atakiriho; N'obu ndaabe naamusherwire, tarabonekire." 
Psalms37:37 Yetegyereze omuntu oshugaine, kandi oreebe ow'amazima; ahakuba omuheru gw'omuntu ogwo n'obusingye;" 
Psalms37:38 Kwonka abasiisi baryahwerekyererezibwa kimwe, Kandi omuheru gw'omubi n'okucwekyerezibwa." 
Psalms37:39 Okujunwa kw'abahikiriire kuruga ahari MUKAMA; Niwe buhungiro bwabo omu biro by'okureeba enaku. 
Psalms37:40 MUKAMA abahwera, kandi abakiza; Abaiha omu mikono y'ababi, kandi abajuna, Ahabw'okuba bamuhungiraho." 
Psalms38:1 Ai MUKAMA, otanteisa onyiniire ekiniga, N'obu kwakuba okumpana ongwereirwe kubi munonga;" 
Psalms38:2 Ahakuba emyambi yaawe empwereiremu, N'omukono gwawe gumpingamiire munonga." 
Psalms38:3 Tihariho hahuriire omu mubiri gwangye ahabw'ekiniga kyawe; N'amagufa gangye tigari gye ahabw'ekibi kyangye. 
Psalms38:4 Ahakuba eby'okushiisha byangye bindengyeire aha mutwe, Bindemire nk'omutwaro guremeire." 
Psalms38:5 Obuhuta bwangye nibunuuka, bujunzire, ahabw'obushema bwangye." 
Psalms38:6 Mpetami omugongo, nyeinamiriire; Ngyendagyenda nincura okurenzya eizooba;" 
Psalms38:7 Ahakuba nimbabiirirwa munonga omu manyaanya; Kandi omu mubiri gwangye tiharimu hahuriire. 
Psalms38:8 Ninkabaakaba mpendagurikire; Nintsinda ahabw'omutima gwangye kutatuuza. 
Psalms38:9 Ai MUKAMA, noomanya ebi nyetenga byona, Kandi tosherekirwe kutsinda kwangye." 
Psalms38:10 Omutima gwangye niguteera munonga enkuratima, amaani gampweiremu; amaisho gangye nago tigakihweza." 
Psalms38:11 Banywani bangye na bagyenzi bangye nibanyetantara ahabw'okubonabona kwangye, N'abanyaruganda baanyemereire hare." 
Psalms38:12 Kandi abarikwenda kuunyita nibantega emitego; N'abarikwenda kunkora kubi nibagamba eby'okumpwerekyereza, Kandi bateekateeka eby'okundeebya eizooba ryona." 
Psalms38:13 Kwonka nyowe ndi nk'ekifa-matu, tindikuhurira; Ndi nk'ekiteta ekitarikugamba." 
Psalms38:14 Eego, ndi nk'omuntu otarikuhurira, Otaine bigambo by'okuteisa abandi." 
Psalms38:15 Kandi ai MUKAMA, niiwe ndikutegyereza; Oryangarukamu, Mukama Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms38:16 N'ahabw'ekyo ninkushaba, otaikiriza abarikwesiimira okuterera kwangye Kuunyehimbisizaho." 
Psalms38:17 Ndaariire kugwa, Kandi obusaasi bwangye tindikubaasa kubwehuzya obutoosha." 
Psalms38:18 Ahakuba niinyatura eby'okushiisha bayngye, Ninshaasha ahabw'ekibi kyangye." 
Psalms38:19 Kwonka abazigu bangye abanyangira busha baine amaani; N'abanyangira ebitahikire bakanyire. 
Psalms38:20 Abazimuurira ekibi ahabw'ekirungi nabo n'abazigu bangye, ahakuba ninkuratira ebirungi." 
Psalms38:21 Otantsigaho, ai MUKAMA; Ruhanga wangye, otanza hare!" 
Psalms38:22 Rahuka kumpwera, ai Mukama, okujunwa kwangye." 
Psalms39:1 Nkagira nti: Ndyarinda emitwarize yangye, Ndekye kushiisha n'orurimi rwangye; Kandi ndyabumba akanwa kangye, omubi akiri omu maisho gangye." 
Psalms39:2 Naahunama nk'ekiteta, Naacureera, kyabura eki kyangasira. Okuganya kwangye kwayeyongyera." 
Psalms39:3 Omutima gwangye gwabugumwamu omuriro; Ku naateekateekire, gwayaka, Ahonaaho naagamba." 
Psalms39:4 MUKAMA, ommanyise omuheru gwangye, N'obunaku bw'ebiro byangye oku burikwingana; Ommanyise ku ndi ow'okuhwaho juba." 
Psalms39:5 Reeba, ohindwire ebiro byangye nk'ebita bikye, N'emyaka yangye omu maisho gaawe ni busha; buzimazima omuntu weena, n'obu yaakuba agumire ata, n'omwitsyo." 
Psalms39:6 Buzima omuntu weena agyenda ari nk'ekinyimanyimi, Buzima bahendekyera busha; Omuntu ashanguruza ebintu, atarikumanya oribitwara." 
Psalms39:7 Mbwenu Mukama, ntegyereize ki? amaisho gangye goona gari omuriiwe." 
Psalms39:8 Onjune eby'okushiisha byangye byona, Otampindura ekirikugaywa abashema." 
Psalms39:9 Mpunamire, tinaagira ky'okugamba, ahakuba niiwe okikozire." 
Psalms39:10 Onyiheho enkoni yaawe; Ahakuba empi zaawe zaanyita. 
Psalms39:11 Ku ohana omuntu, noomuteisa ahabw'okushiisha kwe, Omumariramu kimwe oburungi bwe, nk'oku ebiyenje bigira. Buzima kwo, omuntu weena ni nk'omwitsyo!" 
Psalms39:12 Ai MUKAMA, hurira okushaba kwangye, Otegye okutu okutaka kwangye, Oteetsiza okurira kwangye; Ahakuba ahariiwe ndi omugyenyi, Kandi omuhinguzi, nka baatatenkuriitwe boona." 
Psalms39:13 Ongirire embabazi, mbone kugarukwamu amaani, Ntakarugire aha kubura." 
Psalms40:1 Nkategyereza MUKAMA n'okugumisiriza; Yantega okutu, yaahurira okutaka kwangye." 
Psalms40:2 Yaanyiha omu kiina ky'okuhwerekyereramu omu byondo; Yaayemereza ebigyere byangye aha rukiri, Yaahamya entegye zangye;" 
Psalms40:3 Taanyegyesa ekyeshongoro kisya eky'okuhimbisa Ruhanga waitu; Baingi baryakireeba, batiine, Kandi beesigye MUKAMA." 
Psalms40:4 Aine omugisha omuntu, ou MUKAMA aba obwesigye bwe, Otakubuukira banyamaryo, N'obu baakuba abahabisibwa baaruhanga ab'ebishuba." 
Psalms40:5 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, eby'okutangaaza, ebi waakozire, N'ebiteekateeko ebi otuteekateekaho ka ni bingi! Tihariho orikwingana naiwe. Ku naakwenda kubigamba n'okubitondoora, Ni bingi, tibirikubaasa kubarwa." 
Psalms40:6 Ebitambo n'empongano tobishemerererwa; Amatu gangye ogaigwire; Ebitambo eby'okwokyeza kimwe n'ebitambo by'ebibi torabyenzire; 
Psalms40:7 Naanye nikwo kugira nti: Reeba, naija! Nk'oku kyampandiikirweho omu muzingo gw'ekitabo;" 
Psalms40:8 Ninshemerererwa okukiora ebi okunda, ai Ruhanga wangye; Ebiragiro byawe biri omu mutima gwangye." 
Psalms40:9 Mbwenu eby'okuhikiirira omu mutwe muhango gw'abantu; Reebam tindekire kugamba; Naiwe nookimanya, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms40:10 Tinsherekire by'okuhikiirira kwawwe omu mutima gwangye; Ngambire eby'okwesigwa kwawe n'okujuna kwawe; Embabazi zaawe n'amazima gaawe timbisherekire mutwe muhango gw'abantu. 
Psalms40:11 Ai MUKAMA, otaanyima okusaasira kwawe kwingi; Embabazi zaawe n'amazima gaawe bigume bindinde." 
Psalms40:12 Ahakuba obubi bwingi obuhinguraine bunyehinguririize; Eby'okutahikiirira byangye bimpikireho, Byanzibira kwimutsya amaisho; Ni bingi okukira eishokye ry'aha mutwe gwangye; Omutima gwampwa omunda." 
Psalms40:13 Ai MUKAMA, ikiriza kunjuna; Orahukye kumpwera, MUKAMA wangye!" 
Psalms40:14 Abarikwenda kuhwerekyereza amagara gangye Bakwatwe enshoni, boona bashoberwe; Abarikwesiimira enaku zangye, bagarurwe enyima, bagaywe." 
Psalms40:15 Abarikunteerera enaku, nibagira bati: Otyo! Otyo! Bashobererwe kimwe ahabw'enshoni zaabo." 
Psalms40:16 Boona abakusherura bashemererwe, bananukire omuriiwe; Abarikukunda okujuna kwawe bagume bagire bati: MUKAMA aheebwe ekitiinisa!" 
Psalms40:17 N'obu ndaabe ndi omworo kandi omukyene, Kwonka Mukama anteekateekaho. Niiwe Muhwezi wangye kandi Omujuni wangye; Ai Ruhanga wangye, otatuuraho." 
Psalms41:1 Osaasibwa abooro aine omugisha; MUKAMA aryamujuna aha izooba ry'okureeberaho enaku. 
Psalms41:2 MUKAMA aryamurinda, agume ari ohuriire; Kandi aryaheebwa omugisha akiri omu nsi. Otamurekurira abazigu be kumukora nk'oku barikwenda." 
Psalms41:3 MUKAMA aryamweyegamiza, arembeire aha kitabo kye; Niiwe orimwarira arwaire." 
Psalms41:4 Nyowe nkagira nti: Ngirira embabazi, ai MUKAMA! Kiza amagara gangye; ahakuba nkucumwireho." 
Psalms41:5 Abazigu bangye bangambaho kubi nibagira bati: Aryafa ryari, eiziina rye rikeeba?" 
Psalms41:6 Ku aija kundeeba, ayegambagambisa ebitaine mugahso; Haza obwo omutima gwe nigushaguruza orukuru; Ngu ku araashohore, arubuzya." 
Psalms41:7 Abarikuunyanga boona bangambuura nibagambirana omu kutu; Bangirira enaama mbi. 
Psalms41:8 Nibagira bati: Endwara mbi emukwatiire kimwe; Ahu abyami tarikwija kwimukaho. 
Psalms41:9 Nangwa na munywani wangye w'aha mara, ou naabaire niinyeisga, Ou naabaire ndya nawe ambagiire omugyere." 
Psalms41:10 Kwonka iwe ai MUKAMA, ongirire embabazi, Onyimutsye, mbone kubahoora." 
Psalms41:11 Ekyo nikyo kirikummanyisa ku onshemerererwa, ahakuba omuzigu wangye tansingwire." 
Psalms41:12 Kwonka nyowe omu bwesigwa bwangye onkwatiriire, Wanta omu maisho gaawe, okuguma naiwe ebiro byona." 
Psalms41:13 MUKAMA Ruhanga w'Abaisraeli ahimbisibwe, Okwiha iranaira, okuhitsya obusingye bwona. Amiina, kandi Amiina." 
Psalms42:1 Nk'oku empara egira ekyaka neeyenda amaizi, N'omutima gwangye nikwo gugira ekyaka ahabwawe, ai Ruhanga." 
Psalms42:2 Amagara gangye gagirira Ruhanga eiriho, Ruhanga ohuriire; Ndyaija ryari, nkareebwa omu maisho ga Ruhanga?" 
Psalms42:3 Amarira gangye gambeereire eby'okurya nyomushana na nyekiro, Abantu nibanteerera enaku obutoosha, Nibagira bati: Ruhanga waawe arahi?" 
Psalms42:4 Ku mba ningamba naamara omu kashansha, Nyijuka oku naabaire ngyenda n'abantu baingi, Nkabeebembera kuza omu nju ya Ruhanga, Nituteera akaari k'okushemererwa n'ebyeshongoro, Turi omutwe muhango gw'abantu abarikwijuka ekiro kikuru." 
Psalms42:5 Ahabw'enki oyehweire amatsiko, iwe magara gangye? ahabw'enki oyemereize omutima omunda yangye? Ta amatsiko ahari Ruhanga; ahakuba ndyagaruka mmuhimbise, Niwe Muhwezi wangye kandi Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms42:6 Ai Ruhanga wangye, amagara gangye geehweire amatsiko; Nikyo ndikwijukira, ndi omu nsi ya Yorudani na Herumooni, N'aha kabungo ka Mizaari." 
Psalms42:7 Amaizi agaijwire geetana n'agandi, ahabw'okuhoorera kw'obururuma bwawe. Ebingonzi byawe n'emijumba yaawe byona bindengyeireho." 
Psalms42:8 MUKAMA antwekyera embabazi ze nyomushana, Na nyekiro ekyeshongoro kye kiba kiri omu kanwa kangye, Nikwo kushaba Ruhanga ow'amagara gangye." 
Psalms42:9 Niinyija kubuuza Ruhanga orukiri rwangye nti: Onyebeirwe ki? ahabw'enki ninguma n'amaganya ahabw'okubonabonesibwa abazigu? 
Psalms42:10 Ababisha bangye ni nka rurara omu magufa gangye, Nibanteerera enaku obutoosha, Nibagira bati: Ruhanga waawe arahi?" 
Psalms42:11 Ahabw'enki oyehweire amatsiko iwe magara gangye? Ahabw'enki oyemereize omutima omunda yangye? Ta amatsiko ahari Ruhanga; ahakuba ndyagaruka mmuhimbise, Niwe Muhwezi wangye kandi Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms43:1 Oncwere orubanja, ai Ruhanga, ontonganire aha bantu abatarikukutiina, Onkize abantu engobya kandi abatari b'amazima!" 
Psalms43:2 Ahakuba niiwe Ruhanga obuhungiro bwangye. Mbwenu onaagiire ki? Ahanki ninguma n'amaganya ahabw'okubonabonesibwa abazigu? 
Psalms43:3 Nyakusinga, yohereza omushana gwawe n'amazima gaawe, binyebembere; Bimpitsye aha kibungo kyawe ekirikwera ahu otuura!" 
Psalms43:4 Obwo nibwo ndaaze aha itambiro rya Ruhanga, Ahari Ruhanga okushemererwa kwangye okwingi munonga; Kandi ndyakuhimbisa n'enanga, ai Ruhanga, Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms43:5 ahabw'enki oyehweire amatsiko, iwe magara gangye? Ahabw'enki oyemereize omutima omunda yangye? Ta amatsiko ahari Ruhanga; ahakuba ndyagaruka mmuhimbise, Niwe Muhwezi wangye kandi Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms44:1 Ai Ruhanga, tukeehurira n'amatu gaitu, Baatatenkuriitwe baatugambira, Ebi waakozire omu bunaku bwabo omu biro ebya ira;" 
Psalms44:2 Amahanga okagabingamu n'omukono gwawe, Kwonka bo waabareeta, baatuuramu; Okabonabonesa abanyamahanga, Kwonka bo waababuzya omunsi." 
Psalms44:3 Ahakuba rurara yaabo tiyo yaabakubwize ensi, Kandi n'omukono gwabo tigwo gwabajunire; Kureka omukono gwawe gwa buryo n'amaani gaawe, N'omushana gw'amaisho gaawe; Ahakuba okabeekundira." 
Psalms44:4 Ruhanga wangye, niiwe MUKAMA wangye; Ragiira Yakobo asingure." 
Psalms44:5 Niiwe oritubaasisa kuteera ahansi abazigu baitu, N'eiziina ryawe niryo rirituha amaani g'okuribatiirira abarikuturwanisa." 
Psalms44:6 Ahakuba tindyesiga buta bwangye, Kandi na rurara yangye tiyo erinjuna." 
Psalms44:7 Kureka niiwe waatujunire ababisha baitu, Okakwatsa enshoni abarikutwanga." 
Psalms44:8 Tutuura nitwehimbisiza omuri Ruhanga; Kandi turyasiima eiziina ryawe ebiro byona. 
Psalms44:9 Kwonka mbwenu otunagire, waatuhemura, Tokihurura na ngabo ziatu." 
Psalms44:10 Otureeteire okubingwa abazigu, N'abarikutwanga batwenyagiire." 
Psalms44:11 Otuhaireyo nk'entaama z'okubaagwa, Waatutaataanisiza omu mahanga." 
Psalms44:12 Abantu baawe obatunziremu busha, Obuguzi bwabo tibwine ki bukwongyeireho." 
Psalms44:13 Otuhindwire ekijumo ahari bataahi baitu, Ekirikugaywa kandi eky'okugaaniiza aha batwehinguririize." 
Psalms44:14 Otugizire eky'okucweraho enfumu omu mahanga, Abu abantu bazongoreza emitwe." 
Psalms44:15 Nsiiba n'ekihemu eizooba ryona, N'enshoni zinshwekire ahamaisho," 
Psalms44:16 Ahabw'ebigambo by'orikungaaniiza nanjuma, N'ahabw'omuzigu n'orikumpoora." 
Psalms44:17 Ebyo byona n'obu biraabe byatuhikireho, Kwonka titurakwebirwe, N'obu kwakuba okwita endagaano yaawe." 
Psalms44:18 Emitima yaitu teragarukire nyima, N'ebigyere byaitu bitirateishukire muhanda gwawe," 
Psalms44:19 Ebyakukureeteire okutuhendagurira omu maaya g'emishega, N'okutushweka ekibunda ky'okufa." 
Psalms44:20 Kuri twayebirwe eiziina rya Ruhanga waitu, Nari tukaimukiza baaruhanga abandi emikono yaitu," 
Psalms44:21 Ekyo Ruhanga takukimanyire? ahakuba amanya ebisherekirwe omu mitima. 
Psalms44:22 Eego, ahabwawe nitwitwa eizooba ryona Nituteekateekwaho nk'entaama z'okubaagwa." 
Psalms44:23 Sisiimuka, ai MUKAMA, ogwejegyeeziibwe ki? Imuka, otatunagira kimwe!" 
Psalms44:24 Ahabw'enki otwehugize, Okeebwa okubonabona n'okwitwa kubi kwaitu?" 
Psalms44:25 Ahakuba amagara gaitu gainami ahansi omu mucuucu, N'emibiri yaitu ehikiire kimwe aha itaka." 
Psalms44:26 Imuka otuhwere, Otucungure ahabw'embabazi zaawe!" 
Psalms45:1 Omutima gwangye gwijwire ebigambo birungi nibisheesheka; Ningamba ebigambo ebi naahimbiire omugabe; Orurimi rwangye n'ekaraamu y'omuhandiiki orikurahutsya. 
Psalms45:2 Ori murungi noohita abaana b'abantu; Oburungi bushukirwe aha minwa yaawe. Nikyo Ruhanga akuheereire omugisha ebiro n'ebiro. 
Psalms45:3 Hagatira rurara yaawe, Iwe emanzi, Ojware ekitiinisa n'obukuru bw'obugabe bwawe." 
Psalms45:4 Omu bukuru bwawe otembe embaraasi yaawe, Ogyende ori omusinguzi, Orwanirire amazima n'obucureezi n'okuhikiirira; Omukono gwawe guryarasha, batiine." 
Psalms45:5 Emyambi yaawe eine obwogi Omu mitima y'abazigu b'omugabe; Amahanga nigagwa omu maisho gaawe. 
Psalms45:6 Ekitebe kyawe eky'obukama, ai Ruhanga, n'eky'ebiro n'ebiro; Enkoni yaawe n'obukama n'ey'okuhikiirira;" 
Psalms45:7 Okakunda okuhikiirira, waayanga obubi; Nikyo Ruhanga, Ruhanga waawe, yaakushukiireho amajuta G'okushemererwa okukira bagyenzi baawe." 
Psalms45:8 Ebijwaro byawe byona nibitaamirana omugaju Gwa sumuruna, obunyanunga n'omudarasiini; Enanga ezirikuteererwa omu bikaari ebihunzire emiino nzikushemeza." 
Psalms45:9 Omu baheereza baawe abakazi ab'ekitiinisa harimi bahara b'abagabe; Aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo heemereireho omugabekazi ajwaire ezaabu y'Ofiri. 
Psalms45:10 Iwe mwishiki 'we, hurira, oteekateekye, otegye okutu; Oyebwe eihanga ryawe n'enju ya sho." 
Psalms45:11 Obwo nibwo omugabe arikurigira ahabw'oburungi bwawe; Ahakuba niwe Mukama waawe; obe niwe waaramya. 
Psalms45:12 Aba Tuuro bayrakwekundisa n'emitoijo, N'abarikukira obutungi omu bantu baryakweshengyereza ngu obahakye gye." 
Psalms45:13 Muhara w'omugabe omu kishengye kye ajwaire eby'ekitiinisa kingi ebirukirwemu ezaabu. 
Psalms45:14 Baryamutwarira omugabe ajwaire emyenda etariize n'amabara maingi; Abaishiki bagyenzi be abamukuratiire baryareetwa ah'ori; 
Psalms45:15 Baryareetwa baine okushemererwa n'okwesiima, Bataahe omuri nyaruju y'omugabe." 
Psalms45:16 Omu mwanya gwa baashwenkuru haryagarukamu batabani baawe; Oryabahindura abategyeki omu nsi yoona. 
Psalms45:17 Eiziina ryawe ndyariijutsya ab'obusingye bwona; N'ahabwe'kyo abantu baryakuhimbisa ebiro n'ebiro. 
Psalms46:1 Ruhanga niwe buhungiro bwaitu, kandi amaani gaitu, Omuhwezi buzima otabura mu biro by'enaku." 
Psalms46:2 N'ahabw'ekyo tituritiina, n'obu ensi yaakuhinduka, Enshozi zikatsindukira ahagati y'enyanja," 
Psalms46:3 Amaizi gaayo gakahoorera, gakahinduriza, N'ebibungo bikatengyetsibwa okwehuura kwayo." 
Psalms46:4 Hariyo omugyera, okusheneneka kwagwo nikushemeza orurembo rwa Ruhanga, Omwanya Ogurikwera ahu Rukira-boona atuura." 
Psalms46:5 Ruhanga ari ahagati yaarwo; tiruritengyetsibwa; Ruhanga aryaruhwera kare nibutaagurukana. 
Psalms46:6 Amahanga gakajagarara, obugabe bwarababanym Yaagamba n'eiraka rihango, ensi yaayaga." 
Psalms46:7 MUKAMA ow'amahe ari hamwe naitwe; Ruhanga wa Yakobo niwe buhungiro bwaitu. 
Psalms46:8 Mwije mureebe emirimo ya MUKAMA, Oku areetsire okuhwerekyerera omu nsi." 
Psalms46:9 Amaraho engamba okuhika aha muheru gw'ensi; Ahenda amata, amacumu agatemamu kabiri; N'ebigaari abyotsya n'omuriro." 
Psalms46:10 Mucureere, mumanye ku ndi Ruhanga. Ndyahimbisibwa omu mahanga, Ndyahimbisibwa omu nsi." 
Psalms46:11 MUKAMA ow'amahe hamwe naitwe, Ruhanga wa Yakobo niwe buhungiro bwaitu!" 
Psalms47:1 Imwe ab'amahanga goona, muteere omu ngaro; Mweshongorere Ruhanga n'amaraka mahango g'okusingura;" 
Psalms47:2 Ahakuba MUKAMA Rukira-boona naatiinisa, N'Omugabe rugambwa orikutegyeka ensi zoona." 
Psalms47:3 Akatugomoorera abantu, twabategyeka, N'amahanga yaagata ahansi y'ebigyere byaitu." 
Psalms47:4 Yaatutooranira obuhunguzi, Nikyo kyeraato kya Yakobo ou yaakunzire." 
Psalms47:5 Ruhanga ainamukire n'akaari k'okushemererwa, MUKAMA ainamukire n'eiraka ry'enzamba." 
Psalms47:6 Mweshongorere Ruhanga eby'okuhimbisa, mweshongore eby'okuhimbisa! Mweshongorere MUKAMA waitu eby'okuhimbisa, mweshongore eby'okuhimbisa;" 
Psalms47:7 Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga niwe Mukama w'ensi yoona; Mweshongore zaaburi z'okumuhimbisa n'obwengye! 
Psalms47:8 Ruhanga ategyeka amahanga; Ruhanga ashutami aha kitebe kye ekirikwera. 
Psalms47:9 Abakuru b'amahanga bateeraine nk'abantu ba Ruhanga wa Abrahamu; 
Psalms47:10 Ahakuba engabo z'omu nsi n'eza Ruhanga; Naaheebwa ekitiinisa kingi. 
Psalms48:1 MUKAMA ni mukuru; ashemereire kuhimbisibwa munonga Omu rurembo rwa Ruhanga waitu aha kibungo kye ekirikwera. 
Psalms48:2 Ekibungo Saayuuni ekiri aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, Ekirungi munonga omu kunyeeta kwakyo, nikyo ensi yoona eshemerererwa, andi nirwo rurembo rw'Omukama rugambwa." 
Psalms48:3 Ruhanga akeemanyisa omu bikaari byarwo Ku ari orugo rugumire orw'okuhungiramu. 
Psalms48:4 Reeba, abagabe bakateerana, baizira hamwe;" 
Psalms48:5 Ku baarureebire, baatangaara, Baakwatwa obwoba, baahunga;" 
Psalms48:6 Orutetema rwabakwatirayo, Baarumwa nk'omukazi orikwenda kuzaara." 
Psalms48:7 Waareeta omuyaga ogw'oburugwa-izooba, Gwahendagura emeeri za Tarushiishi." 
Psalms48:8 Nkoku twahuriire, nikwo twareebire omu rurembo rwa MUKAMA ow'amahe, Omu rurembo rwa Ruhanga waitu. Ruhanga aryarugumiza kimwe ebiro byona." 
Psalms48:9 Ai Ruhnaga, tuteekateekire munonga aha mbabazi zaawe Turi omuri hekalu yaawe." 
Psalms48:10 Nk'oku eiziina ryawe riri, ai Ruhanga, N'okuhimbisibwa kwawe nikwo kuri, nikuhika aha muheru gw'ensi. Omukono gwawe gwa buryo gwijwire okuhikiiira." 
Psalms48:11 Ekibungo Saayuuni kishemererwe, Abaishiki ba Yuda beesiime ahabw'emicwere yaawe y'oburyo!" 
Psalms48:12 Mugyendagyende aha kibungo Saayuuni, mukyehinguririze, Mubare eminaara y'orwo rurembo." 
Psalms48:13 Mwetegyereze orugo rwarwo, oku ruzitiire; Mumanye ebikaari byarwo, Mureebe oku muribiteekyerereza ab'obusingye oburiija." 
Psalms48:14 Ahakuba Ruhanga ogu ni Ruhanga waitu ebiro byona, Niwe aritwebembera okuhitsya aha kufa." 
Psalms49:1 Muhurire eki, imwe amahanga goona; Mutegye amatu, imwe mwena abatuura omu nsi;" 
Psalms49:2 Ab'ekitiinisa n'abatakiine, Abatungi hamwe n'abooro!" 
Psalms49:3 Akanwa kangye kaaza kugamba eby'obwengye; Okuteekateeka kw'omu mutima gwangye kurugwemu okwetegyereza. 
Psalms49:4 Niinyija kutega okutu, mpurire enfumu; Nshoboorore ekigambo kyangye ekitarikushobooroka, ninteera enanga." 
Psalms49:5 N'enki ekyakuntiinisa omu biro by'enaku, Obubi bw'abarikumpiiga bunyehinguririize?" 
Psalms49:6 Abo abeesiga eitungo ryabo, Bakeehimbisa ahabw'obutungi bwabo bwingi," 
Psalms49:7 Tihariho n'omwe aharibo orikubaasa kucungura mwene ishe, N'obu kwakuba okuha Ruhanga eky'okumucungura," 
Psalms49:8 Ngu abone kugumaho ebiro byona, atafiire akajunda." 
Psalms49:9 Ahakuba okucungura amagara gaabo n'okw'obuguzi bwingi,Tikushemereire kwehangwa." 
Psalms49:10 Eego, areeba abanyabwengye nibafa; Omushema n'ekituuriizi boona bahwerekyerera, Batsigira abandi eitungo ryabo." 
Psalms49:11 Bateekateeka ngu amaka gaabo garyagumaho ebiro byona, Kandi ngu obutaaho bwabo buryagumaho okuhitsya obusingye bwona; N'ebibanja byabo bigume nibibeetererwa." 
Psalms49:12 Kwonka omuntu taguma na kitiinisa kye; Naashusha nk'enyamaishwa ezifa, zikahwaho." 
Psalms49:13 Ogwo nigwo muheru gw'abeesiga busha, N'abarikwesiima ahabw'omugabo gwabo nikwo bafa." 
Psalms49:14 Bafunywa nk'obusyo bw'entaama, nibaza Okuzimu; Rufu n'omuriisa waabo kandi omutegyeki waabo. Oburungi bwabo buryahwaho; Kandi Okuzimu eryaba eka yaabo." 
Psalms49:15 Kwonka Ruhanga aryacungura amagara gangye, agaihe omu bushoboorozi bw'okuzimu; Ahakuba aryanyakiira." 
Psalms49:16 Otaritiina ku orireeba omuntu yaatunga, Ekitiinisa ky'eka ye kyakanya;" 
Psalms49:17 Ahabw'okuba ku arifa, tarigira ki yaatwara; N'ekitiinisa tikirimukurata Kuzimu." 
Psalms49:18 N'obu araabe yaayeyetsire ohiiriirwe akiriho, Kandi abntu bakamusiima ahabw'okwegirira gye," 
Psalms49:19 Kwonka aryakurata baishenkuru, Abatarigaruka ruguru kureeba omushana obundi." 
Psalms49:20 Omuntu oine ekitiinisa, atagire bwengye, Naashusha nk'enyamaishwa ezifa, zikahwaho." 
Psalms50:1 Ruhanga, MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi agambire, Yaayeta ensi, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba." 
Psalms50:2 Ruhanga ayakire, naayema omuri Sayuuni, Ahu oburungi obutaine kamogo buba." 
Psalms50:3 Ruhanga waitu naija, taryetsiza; Omuriro ogurikwokyeza kimwe gumwebembeire, Ayehinguririziibwe eihunga ry'amaani;" 
Psalms50:4 Naayeta eiguru n'ensi, Ngu abone kucwera abantu be orubanja." 
Psalms50:5 Naagira ati: Muteerane abarikwera bangye, baije ahariinye, Abaaragaine naanye endagaano nibahayo ebitambo." 
Psalms50:6 Eiguru rimanyisa okuhikiirira kwe, Ahakuba Ruhanga we wenka niwe Mucwi w'emanja." 
Psalms50:7 Muhurire, imwe abantu bangye, ngambe; Hurira, Israeli, nkuhamize. Niinye Ruhanga, Ruhanga waawe." 
Psalms50:8 Tindikukuhana habw'ebitambo byawe; Ebitambo byawe ebyokize biri omu maisho ganbye obutoosha. 
Psalms50:9 Tindikwija kwakiira nimi y'omu nju yaawe, N'obu yaakuba empaya y'embuzi omu busyo bwawe;" 
Psalms50:10 Ahakuba enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu kibira n'ezangye, N'ente ez'aha bibungo rukumi nazo n'ezangye." 
Psalms50:11 Nimmanya enyonyi zoona ez'omu mwanya, Kandi enyamaishwa ez'omu ishwa n'ezangye." 
Psalms50:12 Kuri naagizire enjara, tinaakukugambiire, Ahakuba ensi n'ebigirimu byona n'ebyangye." 
Psalms50:13 Noogira ngu ndya enyama y'enimi, Nari nnywa orwamba rw'embuzi?" 
Psalms50:14 Ohe Ruhanga ekitambo ky'okusiima, Ohikiirize eki waaraganiise Rukira-boona;" 
Psalms50:15 Kandi ontakire aha izooba ry'okureeba enaku, Ndyakukiza, naiwe ompimbisise." 
Psalms50:16 Kwonka omubi Ruhanga amugira ati: Oine bushoboorozi ki okugambira abandi ebiragiro byangye, N'okwegambisa eby'endagaano yangye?" 
Psalms50:17 Haza oyanga okuhanwa, Kandi ebigambo byangye obyenaga enyima?" 
Psalms50:18 Ku oreeba omushuma, onywana nawe, Kandi okwatanisa n'abashambani." 
Psalms50:19 Orekire akanwa kaawe kugamba eby'obubi, N'orurimi rwawe rwehangira eby'obugobya." 
Psalms50:20 Otuura noogambuura mwene sho, Kandi obeherera mwene nyoko." 
Psalms50:21 Ebyo byona okabikora, naakwetsiza; Waateekateeka ngu niinyinganira kimwe naiwe, Kwonka ndyakuhana, mbikuratanise omu maisho gaawe." 
Psalms50:22 Mbwenu imwe abeebwa Ruhanga, mwetegyereze eki, Ntakaabataagataagura, mukabura kijuna." 
Psalms50:23 Orikuhayo ekitambo ky'okusiima, naaba mpaire ekitiinisa; Kandi orikutwza gye omu micwe ye, ndyamworeka okujuna kwa Ruhanga." 
Psalms51:1 Ai MUKAMA, onsaasire nk'embabazi zaawe nyingi oku ziri; Nk'okusaasira kwawe kwingi oku kuri, oragaze eby'okushiisha byangye." 
Psalms51:2 Onyogyeze kimwe okutahikiirira kwangye. Kandi onshemeze, onyiheho ekibi kyangye;" 
Psalms51:3 ahakuba niinyemera eby'okushiisha byangye, N'ekibi kyangye kiri omu maisho gangye obutoosha." 
Psalms51:4 Iwe, niiwe wenka ou naacumwireho, Nkakora ekihagaro omu maisho gaawe, N'ahabw'ekyo ohikire omu kwomesereza kwawe, Kandi ori ow'amazima omu micwere yaawe." 
Psalms51:5 Reeba, nkahangirwa omu kutahikiirira; N'omu kibi maawe nimwo yanzaariire." 
Psalms51:6 Reeba, okunda amazima g'omunda, N'ahabw'ekyo onyegyese obwengye omu mutima ahatareebwa." 
Psalms51:7 Onyeze n'enyaweera, niinyija kushemera; Onyozye nyere okukira orubaare." 
Psalms51:8 Onyijuze okushemererwa n'okwesiima, Amagufa agu waahenzire gananukye." 
Psalms51:9 Otareeba ebibi byangye, Oragarize kimwe eby'okushiisha byangye byona." 
Psalms51:10 Ompangyemu omutima ogushemeire, ai Ruhanga; Ogarure omwoyo murungi omunda yangye." 
Psalms51:11 Otambinga ahu ori, Kandi otaanyihaho Omwoyo waawe Orikwera." 
Psalms51:12 Ongarurire okushemererwa kw'okujuna kwawe, Ompamye n'omwoyo ogurikukworobera." 
Psalms51:13 Obwo nibwo ndyegyesa abasiisi emihanda yaawe, N'enkozi z'ebibi zikakuhindukira." 
Psalms51:14 Onkize orubanja rw'obwitsi, Ai Ruhanga, iwe Ruhanga w'okujunwa kwangye, Kandi orurimi rwangye ruryayeshongora munonga eby'okuhikiirira kwawe." 
Psalms51:15 Ai MUKAMA, yashamya akanwa kangye, N'eminwa yangye emanyise okuhimbisibwa kwawe;" 
Psalms51:16 Ahakuba toshemerererwa bitambo, nkaabikuhaire; Ebitambo ebyokize tobisiima." 
Psalms51:17 Ebitambo ebi Ruhanga asiima n'omutima oguhendekire, Omutima oguhendekire, ogweteisiize kimwe," 
Psalms51:18 Kora gye Saayuuni, nk'oku orikusiima; Zitirira Yerusaalemu orugo rw'amabaare." 
Psalms51:19 Obwo nibwo orishemerererwa ebitambo ebihikire, N'ebitambo ebyokize, n'ebitambo ebyokyeize kimwe; Haza nibwo enimi zirihongyerwa aha itambiro ryawe." 
Psalms52:1 Ahabw'enki oyesiimira eitima, iwe manzi 'we, Noorwanisa embabazi za Ruhanga? Orenzya eizooba noocuma enaama z'okuhwerekyereza." 
Psalms52:2 Orurimi rwawe ni nk'orumweiso rw'obwogi, Iwe orikuhanuura eby'okureebya." 
Psalms52:3 Okunda ebibi okukira ebirungi, N'okubeiha okukira okugamba eby'amazima." 
Psalms52:4 Okunda ebigambo byona ebirikuhwerekyereza, Iwe orurimi orurikugobya." 
Psalms52:5 Naiwe nikwo Ruhanga arikuhwerekyereza ebiro byona; Aryakukwata n'amaani, akuhuruuture omu ihema ryawe, Akurandure omu nsi y'abahuriire." 
Psalms52:6 Abahikiriire baryakireeba, batiine, Bamushekyerere nibagira bati:" 
Psalms52:7 Nimureebe ogu mushaija otaragizire Ruhanga buhungiro bwe, Kureka owaayesigire eitungo rye ringi, N'obutungi bwe akabugira obuhungiro." 
Psalms52:8 Kwonka nyowe ndi kn'omu zeituuni mubisi omu nju ya Ruhanga, Nyesiga embabazi za Ruhanga ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms52:9 Ndyagamba eiziina ryawe omu maisho g'abarikwera baawe, Ahabw'okuba ni rirungi." 
Psalms53:1 Omushema agira omu mutima gwe ati: Ruhanga tabaho; Basiisikaire, nibakora ebihagaro; Tihariho n'omwe orikukora gye." 
Psalms53:2 Ruhanga akeema omu iguru, yaareeba abantu, Ngu amanye ku haraabe hariho abarikwetegyereza, Bakasherura Ruhanga." 
Psalms53:3 Boona bagarukire enyima; boona basiisikaire hamwe; Tihariho orikukora gye; buzima tihariho n'omwe. 
Psalms53:4 Beitu enkozi z'ebibi tizigira obwengye? Barya abantu bangye nk'abarikurya eby'okurya, Kandi tibatakira Ruhanga." 
Psalms53:5 Okwo bakagirirayo obwoba bwingi, Ahu batakubugiriire. Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akanaganaga amagufa g'oteekire enteeko kukuteera; Waabaitsa enshoni, ahakuba Ruhanga abangire." 
Psalms53:6 Nkaabaasibwa ki, okujunwa kwa Israeli kuruga omuri Saayuuni! Ruhanga ku araagarure abantu be abanyagirwe, Yakobo aryayesiima, na Israeli ananukye." 
Psalms54:1 Ai Ruhanga, njunisa eiziina ryawe, Omu bushoboorozi bwawe oncwere orubanja omu mazima." 
Psalms54:2 Ohurire okushaba kwangye, ai Ruhanga, Otegye okutu ebigambo ebi ndikugamba;" 
Psalms54:3 Ahakuba abanyamaryo banyimukiriire, Abataine saasi nibacwa obwengye oku baraanyite; Tibeeteire hari Ruhanga." 
Psalms54:4 Reeba, Ruhanga niwe Muhwezi wangye; Mukama niwe akwatirira amagara gangye." 
Psalms54:5 Aryahoora abazigu bangye ahabw'obubi bwabo; Obamareho, nk'obwesigwa bwawe oku buri." 
Psalms54:6 Ndyakubohgyera ekitambo nyihire aha mutima; Ndyasingiza eiziina ryawe, ai MUKAMA, Ahakuba ni rirungi." 
Psalms54:7 Ahabw'okuba onyihire omu naku zangye zoona; Kandi eriisho ryangye ryareeba eki naayetegyeire abazigu bangye. 
Psalms55:1 Otegye okutu okushaba kwangye, ai Ruhanga, Kandi oteehuzya okweshengyereza kwangye." 
Psalms55:2 Ompurire, ongarukyemu, Ninfa kubi ahabw'obusaasi bwangye, kandi nintsinda." 
Psalms55:3 Orwari rw'abazigu n'okwitwa kubi ababi byankabya, Ahakuba nibandusya, kandi nibampiiga n'ekiniga." 
Psalms55:4 Omutima gwangye gwine obusaasi bwingi; Nkwatsirwe obwoba bwingi ahabw'okutiina rufu," 
Psalms55:5 Nintiina kandi nintetema; omutima gumpweire omunda. 
Psalms55:6 Naanye nikwo kugira nti: Ekyakumbaasa, n'okugira amapapa nk'enkombe, Nkeegurukira, nkaruhuuka!" 
Psalms55:7 Nkaagiire hare, ndarira omu ihamba." 
Psalms55:8 Nkaarahukire kwesherurira obwegamo, Ndeka kwitwa eihunga n'omuyaga mwingi." 
Psalms55:9 Shiisha enaama zaabo, ai Mukama, n'endimi zaabo ozirabanisemu; Ahakuba ndeebire okwitana n'okurwana omu rurembo." 
Psalms55:10 Nyomushana na nyekiro nibagyendagyendera aha mutwe gw'orugo rwarwo nibarwehinguririza; Omurirwo harimu okutahikiirira n'eitima. 
Psalms55:11 Obubi buri ahagati omurirwo; Okwita kubi n'oburyarya tibiruga mu nguuto zaarwo. 
Psalms55:12 Kwonka owanjumire akaba atari muzigu wangye; Kandi owaanyekunikireho akaba atari mubisha, Nkaamwesherekire;" 
Psalms55:13 Kureka akaba ari iwe, ou turikwingana, Mugyenzi wangye kandi munywani wangye buzima." 
Psalms55:14 Tukaba tugaaniira hamwe n'okushemererwa; Tugyendana omu nju ya Ruhanga, tukwataniise." 
Psalms55:15 Ka rufu ebagweho; Bashuume okuzimu bahuriire; Ahakuba obubi buri omuribo n'omu maka gaabo. 
Psalms55:16 Kwonka nyowe ahabwangye ndyatakira Ruhanga; Kandi MUKAMA aryanjuna. 
Psalms55:17 Omu mwabazyo, omu kasheeshe n'omu ihangwe, Ndyatonzya nintsinda; kandi aryahurira eiraka ryangye." 
Psalms55:18 Aryajuna amagara gangye, Ankize abarikuunyirira haihi kundwanisa; Ahakuba abarikundwanisa ni baingi." 
Psalms55:19 Ruhanga otuura aha kitebe kye eky'obukama okuruga iranaira, Aryahurira, abacureeze, Ahakuba tibahinduka, tibatiina Ruhanga." 
Psalms55:20 Mugyenzi wangye ogwo akabanga omukono kuteera banywani be; Yaita endagaano ye. 
Psalms55:21 Akaba agamba ebyorobi nk'amajuta, Kwonka omutima gwe gukaba gubamu orugamba; Ebigambo bye bikaba byorobi nk'amajuta g'emizeituuni, Kwonka biri nka zaarurara ezisyoirweyo." 
Psalms55:22 Yegyekyerera MUKAMA omutwaro gwawe, Nawe aryaguma naakukwatirira; Tariikiriza ohikiriire kutengyetsibwa." 
Psalms55:23 Kwonka Iwe, Ruhanga, oryabanaga omu kiina ky'okuhwerekyerereramu; Abaitsi n'engobya baryafa batakahikize kicweka ky'emyaka yaabo; Kwonka nyowe ndyaguma nkwesigye." 
Psalms56:1 Ngirira embabazi, ai Ruhanga, Ahakuba abantu nibenda kummira; Eizooba ryona nibandwanisa, nibaanyita kubi." 
Psalms56:2 Abazigu bangye barenzya eizooba nibenda kummira; Ahakuba abarikundwanisa n'amaryo ni baingi. 
Psalms56:3 Ku ndaagume naatiina, ninkwesiga." 
Psalms56:4 Ruhanga aryampa okusiima ekigambo kye; Ruhanga niwe ndikwesiga; tinditiina; Abantu-buntu nibabaasa kunkora ki? 
Psalms56:5 Barenzya eizooba nibahindahindura ebigambo byangye; Ebiteekateeko byabo byona n'eby'okundwanisa kunkora kubi. 
Psalms56:6 Beeteerana hamwe, beesherekire; Nibareebereza ahu ndikuraba. Nk'oku baagwereire amagara gangye," 
Psalms56:7 Naiwe obazimuurire ahabw'ekibi kyabo; Ai Ruhanga, omu kiniga kyawe otuure ahansi amahanga." 
Psalms56:8 Niiwe omanya okuzengyerera kwangye; Ote amarira gangye omu cupa yaawe. Tigarahandiikirwe omu kitabo kyawe? 
Psalms56:9 Aha izooba eri ndikutakiriraho, Abazigu bangye baryagarurwa enyima. Eki ndikumanya n'eki ngu, Ruhanga ari aha rubaju rwangye." 
Psalms56:10 Ruhanga aryampa okusiima ekigambo kye; MUKAMA aryampa okusiima ekigambo kye; 
Psalms56:11 Ruhanga niwe nyesiga; tinditiina; Abantu-buntu nibabaasa kunkora ki? 
Psalms56:12 Ebi naakuraganiise nshemereire kubihikiiriza, ai Ruhanga; Ndyakuha ebihongwa by'okusiima;" 
Psalms56:13 Ahakuba okaiha amagara gangye omu kufa, Waazibira ebigyere byangye kuterera, Ngu mbone kugyendera omu maisho ga Ruhanga Omu mushana gw'amagara." 
Psalms57:1 Nsaasira, ai Ruhanga, onsaasire, Ahakuba amagara gangye niiwe gahungiraho; Ndyahungira omu mapapa gaawe, gambumbatire, Okuhitsya obu akabi aka koona karihwaho." 
Psalms57:2 Ndyatakira Ruhanga Rukira-boona, Niwe Ruhanga onkorera byona." 
Psalms57:3 Aryayema omu iguru, anjune; Aryahemura abarikwenda kummira. Ruhanga aryayohereza embabazi ze n'amazima ge." 
Psalms57:4 Amagara gangye gari ahagati y'entare Ezishonsomera abantu n'mururu. Amaino gaabo n'amacumu n'emyambi, Kandi endimi zaabo ni zaarurara z'obwogi." 
Psalms57:5 Oteebwe ahaiguru okukira eiguru, ai Ruhanga! Ekitiinisa kyawe kibe ahaiguru y'ensi yoona!" 
Psalms57:6 Bategire ebigyere byangye omutego; Omutima gwangye gucuramiriirwe; Batimbire obusya ahu ndikuraba; Kwonka baaba nibo baabugwamu. 
Psalms57:7 Omutima gwangye gugumire, ai Ruhanga, Omutima gwangye gugumire; Ndyayeshongora; eego, ndyayeshongora eby'okuhimbisa!" 
Psalms57:8 Sisiimuka, iwe magara gangye! Sisiimuka, iwe enanga n'endigiri! Naanye ahabwangye niinyija kusisiimuka kare munonga." 
Psalms57:9 Ai Mukama, ndyakusiima omu bantu, Ndyayeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa omu mahanga." 
Psalms57:10 Ahakuba embabazi zaawe ni nyingi, nizihika omu iguru, N'okwesigwa kwawe kuhika omu bicu." 
Psalms57:11 Oteebwe ahaiguru okukira eiguru, ai Ruhanga! Ekitiinisa kyawe kibe ahaiguru y'ensi yoona!" 
Psalms58:1 Beitu kwo imwe bantu 'mwe, mugamba eby'amazima? Mucwera abantu emanja omu buryo?" 
Psalms58:2 Ngaaha! kureka omu mitima yaanyu mucwa obwengye kukora eby'okutahikiirira; Endwano z'emikono yaanyu nirwo rubanja oru mucwa omu nsi. 
Psalms58:3 Ababi bataana na Ruhanga nibakiruga omu nda; Ku bazaarwa, bahaba, nibagamba eby'ebishuba." 
Psalms58:4 Obushegu bwabo ni nk'obw'enjoka; Bari nk'empoma etarikuhurira, eyeitsire amatu," 
Psalms58:5 Eyanga kuhurira eiraka ry'abarogi, N'obu baakuroga n'obwengye buta." 
Psalms58:6 Ai Ruhanga, bacwe amaino, ogamare omu kanwa; Okuure ebigigo by'ebitsigazi by'entare, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms58:7 Ka batuube, boome nk'emaizi agarikuhwererera omu itaka. Baribatiirirwe nk'obunyaatsi bubisi, bahotokye." 
Psalms58:8 Babe nk'ekinyangondokyera, ekiyaga kikahwaho; Nk'omwana ozaarwa atakahikire, otakareebaga izooba." 
Psalms58:9 Enyungu zaanyu zitakatagatsiibwe muriro gw'amahwa, Ruhanga aryagatwaza omuyaga gw'akasooroora, amabisi n'agahiire goona." 
Psalms58:10 Ohikiriire ku arireeba okwo kuhoora enzigu, aryayesiima; Aryayogyesa ebigyere bye eshagama y'ababi." 
Psalms58:11 Ekirirugamu, abantu baryagira bati: Buzimazima hariho ebihembo by'abahikiriire; Buzimazima hariho Ruhanga ocwa emanja omu nsi." 
Psalms59:1 Onkize abazigu bangye, ai Ruhanga; Ondinde abampururiire." 
Psalms59:2 Onkize enkozi z'ebibi, Onjune abakunda kusheesha eshagama;" 
Psalms59:3 ahakuba bagwereire amagara gangye; Amamanzi geeteeraine kundwanisa, Ntaine kibi kyona, n'obu kyakuba eki nsiisire." 
Psalms59:4 Bairukanga nibaza kweteekateeka kundwanisa, ntaine ki nshobize. Sisiimuka, ompwere, oyereebere." 
Psalms59:5 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, Imuka ohane abanyamahanga boona; Otasaasira omunyabibi weena orikureebya." 
Psalms59:6 Buri mwabazyo bagaruka nibarira nk'embwa, Nibagyendagyenda hoona omu rurembo." 
Psalms59:7 Reeba, bakankama n'akanwa kaabo; Basinikire amaino, Ahakuba bagira bati: Ebyo hariho orikutuhurira?" 
Psalms59:8 Kwonka iwe, MUKAMA, oryabashekyerera; Oteerere enaku abanyamahanga boona." 
Psalms59:9 Iwe Maani gangye, ndyakutegyereza; Ahakuba Ruhanga niwe rugo rwangye orugumire." 
Psalms59:10 Ruhanga omu kusaasira kwe aryambugana; Ruhanga aryanyikiriza ndeebe eki naayetengyeire abazigu bangye. 
Psalms59:11 Otabaita, abantu bangye barekye kwebwa; Obatetemye n'amaani gaawe, Obacwe amaryo, ai Mukama engabo yaitu." 
Psalms59:12 Ka bakwatirwe omu maryo gaabo Ahabw'ebibi by'omu kanwa kaabo n'ebigambo by'eminwa yaabo, N'ahabw'okukyeena n'ebishuba ebi bagamba." 
Psalms59:13 Obamareho n'ekiniga kyawe, Obamareho okuhitsya obu baraahwereho kimwe, Bamanye ku Ruhanga ategyeka Yakobo, Okuhika aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Psalms59:14 Buri mwabazyo bagaruka nibarira nk'embwa, Nibagyendagyenda hoona omu rurembo." 
Psalms59:15 Bazengyerera nibasherura eby'okurya; Ku baba batahaagire, bubasheesheraho." 
Psalms59:16 Kwonka nyowe ndyayeshongora aha by'amaani gaawe, Eego, omu kasheeshe ndyayeshongora n'eiraka rihango eby'embabazi zaawe; ahakuba ombeereire orugo rugumire, Kandi obuhungiro omu biro by'okubonabona kwangye." 
Psalms59:17 Iwe Maani gangye, ndyayeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa; Ahakuba Ruhanga onsaasira niwe rugo rwangye orugumire." 
Psalms60:1 Ai Ruhanga, otwangire, waatucwa emikono; Waatugwerwa kubi; Nyakusinga, otagarure omu buteeka." 
Psalms60:2 Otetemize ensi, waagigangabura; Ita obwatika bwayo; ahakuba neetengyeta." 
Psalms60:3 Oreeteire abantu baawe omu nyangararo; Otunyweisize viinyo y'okugyenda nitugwererana. 
Psalms60:4 Ohaire abarikukutiina orurango, Ngu baruteeranireho nibahunga emyambi." 
Psalms60:5 Ahabw'omukono gwawe ogwa buryo otuhe obusinguzi, otugarukyemu, Eihanga ryawe eririkukundwa ribone kukira abazigu." 
Psalms60:6 Ruhanga akeema omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera, yaagira ati: Ndyabaganisa Shekemu n'okwesiima kuhango, Ngabe oruhanga rwa Sukoosi omu bicweka." 
Psalms60:7 Gileadi n'eyangye; na Manaase nayo n'eyangye; Efuraimu n'enkofiira y'okundinda; Yuda n'enkoni yangye ey'obukama. 
Psalms60:8 Moabu n'ekinaabiro kyangye; Edomu niho nnaga enkaito yangye; Filistia niho nteerera akaari k'okusingura. 
Psalms60:9 N'oha orindeeta omu rurembo rw'amaani? Kandi orimpitsya Edomu n'oha? 
Psalms60:10 Ai Ruhanga, toratwangire? Ebi biro tokihurura na ngabo zaitu, ai Ruhanga." 
Psalms60:11 Otuhe emikono, turwanise abazigu baitu; Ahakuba okuhwera kw'abantu tikwine mugasho." 
Psalms60:12 Ahabw'amaani ga Ruhanga, turyarwana mashaija; Ahakuba niwe ariribatiirira abazigu baitu." 
Psalms61:1 Hurira okutaka kwangye, ai Ruhanga; Ote omutima aha kushaba kwangye;" 
Psalms61:2 Ku ndiba ndi aha muheru gw'ensi, omutima gwangye gwagwa enshazi, Ndyaguma nkutakire; Ompitsye aha mutwe gw'orukiri, ahu ntarikubaasa kwehitsya." 
Psalms61:3 Ahakuba niiwe buhungiro bwangye, N'omunaara gw'amaani gw'okundinda abazigu." 
Psalms61:4 Ndyaguma omu ihema ryawe ebiro byona; Ndyahungira omu mapapa gaawe, gambumbatire." 
Psalms61:5 Ahakuba iwe Ruhanga, ohuriire okuhiga kwangye; Ompaire obuhunguzi obuheebwa abatiina eiziina ryawe." 
Psalms61:6 Oyengyere aha biro by'amagara g'omugabe; Emyaka ye ebe ey'obusingye bwingi. 
Psalms61:7 Agume aha ngoma omu maisho gaawe, ai Ruhanga, ebiro n'ebiro; Omutwekyere embabazi n'obwesigwa, bimurinde." 
Psalms61:8 Obwo nibwo ndyeshongora eby'okuhimbisa eiziina ryawe ebiro byona, Nkahikiiriza obutoosha ebi naaraganiise nimpiga." 
Psalms62:1 Amagara gangye gacureera nigategyereza Ruhanga wenka, Ou okujunwa kwangye kurugaho." 
Psalms62:2 We wenka niwe rukiri rwangye kandi okujunwa kwangye; Niwe rugo rwangye orugumire; tinditengyeta munonga. 
Psalms62:3 Muryahitsya hi okujumbukana omuntu, ngu mukwatanise, mumwite, Nk'ekisiika kibogami, nk'orugo orurikugogoma kugwa." 
Psalms62:4 Enaama ei bagira n'emwe yonka, nikwo kumwiha aha bukuru bwe. Bashemerererwa ebishuba. Bashabira abantu omugisha n'akanwa kaabo, Kwonka omunda nibabakyeena." 
Psalms62:5 Amagara gangye gacureera nigategyereza Ruhanga wenka; ahakuba niwe amatsiko gangye garugaho. 
Psalms62:6 We wenka niwe rukiri rwangye kandi okujunwa kwangye; Niwe rugo rwangye orugumire; tinditengyeta. 
Psalms62:7 Okujunwa kwangye n'ekitiinisa kyangye biri ahari Ruhanga; Ruhanga niwe rukiri rwangye orw'amaani, kandi obuhungiro bwangye." 
Psalms62:8 Imwe abantu, mumwesigye buri kaanya; Mumugambire byona, mumare omu kashansha; Ruhanga n'obuhungiro bwaitu." 
Psalms62:9 Abantu abataine kitiinisa baba omwityo kwonka; N'abaine ekitiinisa ni busha; Ku bateebwa aha minzaani, ebaimutsya; Boona hamwe banguhi okukira omwitsyo." 
Psalms62:10 Mutaryesiga okuhata abandi; Mutarigira amatsiko ga busha aha kunyaga. Eitungo ku ririkanya, mutariritaho omutima." 
Psalms62:11 Ruhanga akagamba rimwe; naakihurira kabiri, Ku obushoboorozi buri obwa Ruhanga," 
Psalms62:12 Kandi ku embabazi ziri ezaawe, ai Mukama; ahakuba ozimuurira omuntu weena ebishemereire ebi yaakozire." 
Psalms63:1 Ai Ruhanga, niiwe Ruhanga wangye; ndyaimuka kare kukusherura. amagara gangye gakwiniire eiriho; omubiri gwangye nigukwetenga Nk'ori omu nsi eyomire, erikurusya, kandi etarimu maizi." 
Psalms63:2 Okwo nikwo nkuhangire amaisho omu mwanya gwawe ogurikwera, Ngu nkaareeba obushoboorozi bwawe n'ekitiinisa kyawe." 
Psalms63:3 ahakuba embabazi zaawe ni nungi okukira amagara, Eminwa yangye eryakuhimbisa." 
Psalms63:4 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyakusiima nkiri ohuriire; Nyimutsye emikono yangye nintakira eiziina ryawe. 
Psalms63:5 Amagara gangye garyahaaga nk'oriire omushokooro n'ebishaju, N'akanwa kangye karyakuhimbisa n'eminwa eshemereirwe," 
Psalms63:6 Ku ndikukwijuka ndi aha kitabo kyangye, Naakuteekateekaho omu kusisiimuka kwa nyekiro;" 
Psalms63:7 Ahakuba okaba ori omuhwezi wangye; Kandi omunda y'amapapa gaawe nimwo ndyeshongorera ahabw'okushemererwa. 
Psalms63:8 Amagara gangye niiwe geegamiire; Omukono gwawe gwa buryo gunkwatirira; 
Psalms63:9 Kwonka abahiiga amagara gangye kumpwerekyereza, Baryaza okuzimu omu itaka." 
Psalms63:10 Baryaheebwayo baitwe rurara; Baryaba omugabo gw'emishega. 
Psalms63:11 Kwonka omugabe aryashemerererwa omuri Ruhanga; Weena orikumurahira aryayesiima; ahakuba akanwa k'ababeihi karyaigarwa. 
Psalms64:1 Hurira eiraka ry'okuganya kwangye, ai Ruhanga; Okize amagara gangye okutiina abazigu." 
Psalms64:2 Onsherekye enaama, ezi ababi barikungirira, N'okujagarara kw'enkozi z'ebibi," 
Psalms64:3 Abatyaza endimi zaabo nka rurara, Bakatamika emyambi yaabo, nibyo bigambo byabo ebirikushaarira," 
Psalms64:4 Ngu babone kurasha otaine rubanja, bamugwereire; Barahuka kumurasha, batarikutiina." 
Psalms64:5 Beegumiza omu naama zaabo mbi; Bahanuura kutega emitego omu mubonano, Nibagira bati: N'oha orikwija kutureeba?" 
Psalms64:6 N'oha orikubaasa kuzoora ebibi byaitu? Ahakuba enaama ezi tugizire n'ez'obwengye. Manya, ebiteekateeko by'omu mutima gw'omuntu biri hare!" 
Psalms64:7 Kwonka Ruhanga aryabarasha; Abahutaaze ahonaaho; 
Psalms64:8 Atyo abamareho, bazire orurimi rwabo; Boona abaribareeba baryazongoza emitwe." 
Psalms64:9 Obwo nibwo abantu boona baritiina, Bakamanyisa omurimo gwa Ruhanga. Kandi bakateekateeka munonga aha bi yaakozire." 
Psalms64:10 Abahikiriire baryashemerererwa omuri MUKAMA, bamwesigye; Boona abaine emitima egororokire beesiime." 
Psalms65:1 Ai Ruhanga, okuhimbisibwa kukushemereire omuri Saayuni; Kandi niiwe barihikiiririzaho ebi baaraganiise nibahiga." 
Psalms65:2 Iwe ohurira okushaba, abantu boona baryaija ah'ori." 
Psalms65:3 Eby'okutahikiirira n'obu biraabe nibituremesa, Kwonka Iwe otusaasire eby'okushiisha byaitu." 
Psalms65:4 Aine omugisha ou otoorana, okamwiriza haihi, kuguma omu bikaari byawe. Turyahaagibwa oburungi bw'omu nju yaawe, Omwanya ogurikwera omuri hekalu yaawe." 
Psalms65:5 Omu kuhikiirira kwawe oryatugarukamu n'ebirikutiinisa, Ai Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwaitu; Niiwe matsiko g'abari aha muheru gw'ensi, N'abari hare aha nyanja." 
Psalms65:6 Niiwe waagumize ebibungo, Oyezirikire amaani gaawe;" 
Psalms65:7 Niiwe ocureeza okuhoorera kw'enyanja n'okw'ebingonzi byayo, Kandi n'okujagarara kw'amahanga;" 
Psalms65:8 N'ahabw'ekyo abatuura aha muheru gw'ensi Batiina, baareeba obumanyiso bwawe; Ku butsya bwaira, oreetera akasheeshe n'omwabazyo Kuteera akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Psalms65:9 Otaayaayira ensi, kandi ogigwisiza enjura, Ngu ogihindure erikweza munonga. Omugyera gwa Ruhanga gwijwire amaizi. Niiwe obatungira oburo, Waaheza kushemeza otyo eitaka." 
Psalms65:10 Niiwe oshukyerera empazo zaayo amaizi maingi, Okaringaniza emigongo yaayo, Okagyorobya n'orutoonyerera, Okaha omugisha ebigimeramu." 
Psalms65:11 Ojweka omwaka ekirunga ky'oburungi bwawe; Ebigaari byawe bigyenda nibisheesha omweru; 
Psalms65:12 Niguragarika omu mariisizo g'omu ihamba, Ebibunto byezirika okushemererwa;" 
Psalms65:13 Amariisizo gashwekwa amagana, N'empanga zishwekwa oburo, Ziteera akaari k'okushemererwa, kandi zeeshongora." 
Psalms66:1 Iwe ensi yoona, teerera Ruhanga akaari k'okushemererwa;" 
Psalms66:2 Oyeshongore eby'okuhimbisa eiziina rye, N'okuhimbisibwa kwe okuhe ekitiinisa." 
Psalms66:3 Ogire Ruhanga oti: Emirimo yaawe ka n'ey'okutiinisa! Ahabw'amaani gaawe maingi abazigu baawe bayrakugomokyera. 
Psalms66:4 Ab'ensi yoona baryakuramya, bakweshongorere, Beeshongore eby'okuhimbisa eiziina ryawe." 
Psalms66:5 Mwija mureebe emirimo ya Ruhanga; N'ow'okutiinisa omu bi akorera abantu. 
Psalms66:6 Akahindura enyanja ensi eyomire, Abantu baaraba omu mugyera n'ebigyere; Okwo niyo twamusiimiire munonga." 
Psalms66:7 Ategyekyesa obushoboorozi ebiro byona; Amaisho ge agatuuza aha mahanga. Abagomi beerinde, barekye kwetunguura." 
Psalms66:8 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, muhe Ruhanga waitu ekitiinisa, Amaraka agarikumuhimbisa gahurirwe;" 
Psalms66:9 Ahakuba aturinda tuguma turi abahuriire, Kandi taikiriza bigyere byaitu kuterera." 
Psalms66:10 Iwe Ruhanga, okatugyeza, Waaturabya omu iziiko, nk'oku bagira efeeza." 
Psalms66:11 Okatutooza ekigoye; Waatuhatisa ebirikutusaasa omu manyaanya. 
Psalms66:12 Waikiriza abantu kuturibatiirira, batembire embaraasi; Tukaraba omu muriro n'omu maizi, Kwonka waatuhitsya omu mwanya ogwine obweshanziro." 
Psalms66:13 Niinyija kutaaha omu nju yaawe n'ebitambo ebyokize, Mpikiirize ebi naaraganiise nindahira," 
Psalms66:14 Ebi eminwa yangye yaagambire, N'ebi akanwa kangye kaaraganiise, obu naareeba enaku." 
Psalms66:15 Niinyija kukuha ebitambo byokize eby'ebishaju, N'ekisooroora ky'ebitambo by'empaya y'entaama, Nkuhongyere enimi n'embuzi." 
Psalms66:16 Imwe abatiina Ruhanga, mwije muhurire, Mbagambire ebi yaakoreire amagara gangye." 
Psalms66:17 Nkamutakira munonga n'akanwa kangye, N'orurimi rwangye rwamuhimbisa." 
Psalms66:18 Kuri naataire omutima aha by'okutahikiirira, Mukama takumpuriire." 
Psalms66:19 Kwonka buzima Ruhanga akahurira, Yaata omutima aha iraka ry'okushaba kwangye." 
Psalms66:20 Ruhanga asiimwe, ahakuba tayangire kuhurira kushaba kwangye, Kandi taanyihireho kukunda kwe." 
Psalms67:1 Ruhanga atugirire embabazi, atuhe omugisha, Atwakize amaisho ge," 
Psalms67:2 Omuhanda gwawe gubone kumanywa omu nsi, N'amaani gaawe agarikujuna gamanywe omu mahanga goona." 
Psalms67:3 Abantu bakuhimbise, ai Ruhanga; K'abantu boona bakuhimbise!" 
Psalms67:4 Amahanga geesiime, geeshongore ahabw'okushemererwa; Ahabw'okuba ocwera abantu emanja omu bwinganisa, Kandi oyebembera amahanga agari omu nsi." 
Psalms67:5 Abantu bakuhimbise, ai Ruhanga; K'abantu boona bakuhimbise!" 
Psalms67:6 Ensi ereetsire omweru gwayo, Ruhanga, Ruhanga waitu, atuhaire omugisha." 
Psalms67:7 Ruhanga aryatuha omugisha; Kandi boona ab'aha muheru gw'ensi baryamutiina. 
Psalms68:1 Ka Ruhanga aimukye, abazigu be bataataane! N'abarikumwanga bamuhungye." 
Psalms68:2 Obatuntumure nk'omwika; Ababi bahwerekyererere omu maisho ga Ruhanga, Nk'oku entsinda eyagira aha muriro;" 
Psalms68:3 Kwonka abahikiriire bo bananukye; Beesime munonga omu maisho ge; Eego, bashemererwe n'okunanuka." 
Psalms68:4 Mweshongorere Ruhanga, mweshongore eby'okuhimbisa eiziina rye; Mwimutsye amaraka, mweshongorere Ogwo ogyendera aha bicu; Eiziina rye ni Yehova; mwesiimire munonga omu maisho ge!" 
Psalms68:5 Ruhanga omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera ogu atuuramu N'ishe w'efuuzi kandi omucwi w'emanja w'abafaakazi. 
Psalms68:6 Ruhanga aha amaka abataine ifo na ruguru; Abohoorora embohe, ngu zitungye ebirungi, Kwonka abagomi batuura omu nsi eyomire." 
Psalms68:7 Ai Ruhanga, obu waayebembera abantu baawe, Nooraba omu ihamba," 
Psalms68:8 Ensi ekatengyeta, eiguru ryagwisa enjura habw'okwija kwawe, Na Sinai yaatengyeta ahabw'okwija kwawe, iwe Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
Psalms68:9 Ai Ruhanga, okagwisa enjura y'omugisha aha buhunguzi bwawe, Waabugaruramu amaani buruhire." 
Psalms68:10 Abantu baawe baabubonamu obutaaho; Omu burungi bwawe, ai Ruhanga, waatungira abakyene eby'okubahwera." 
Psalms68:11 Mukama aha ekiragiro, Abakazi abarikutwara amakuru n'eihe rihango." 
Psalms68:12 Abagabe b'amahe bahunga, eego bahunga; Abakazi abatsigara omuka babagana eminyago." 
Psalms68:13 Ahabw'enki muraara omu kibuga ky'entaama, Nk'amapapa g'enkombe agashwekirwe efeeza, N'ebyoya byayo ebishwekirwe ezaabu?" 
Psalms68:14 Obu Ow'obushoboorozi bwona yaabinga abakama baabo, bakataataana, Orubaare rukaba nirugwa ahari Salumooni." 
Psalms68:15 Iwe orushozi rw'amaani, orushozi rwa Bashani, Iwe orushozi rwa Bashani orwine emitwe mingi," 
Psalms68:16 Imwe enshozi ndaingwa, ahabw'enki mureebesa eihari Orushozi oru Ruhanga yaasiimire kutuuraho? N'ekya buzima, MUKAMA aryarutuuraho ebiro byona." 
Psalms68:17 Ebigaari bya Ruhanga n'obukumi bubiri, Enkumi n'enkumi; Mukama akaija omu Mwanya ogurikwera, naaruga Sinai." 
Psalms68:18 Okatemba orushozi ruraingwa, Nootwara abu waanyagire bakukuratiire, N'abandi bantu baakureetera emitoijo, Nangwa n'omu bagomi nabo, Ngu MUKAMA Ruhanga abone kutuura omuribo." 
Psalms68:19 Mukama asiimwe, otwekorerera emitwaro obutoosha, Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwaitu." 
Psalms68:20 Ruhanga waitu ni Ruhanga orikujuna; Ahari Yehova Mukama niho haruga okukira okufa. 
Psalms68:21 Kwonka Ruhanga aryayatagura emitwe y'abazigu be, Kandi ahutaaze ekikoba ky'omutwe gw'ogwo orikugumira omu kushobya kwe." 
Psalms68:22 Mukama akagira ati: Ndyabagarura barugye Bashani, Ndyabagarura mbaihe okuzimu ahagati y'enyanja," 
Psalms68:23 Ngu obone kwozya ebigyere byawe omu shagama, Kandi ngu endimi z'embwa zaawe zitungye omugabo gwazo omu bazigu." 
Psalms68:24 Bareebire emigyendere yaawe, ai Ruhanga, Ruhanga wangye kandi Mukama wangye, Okuratiirwe abantu baawe nootaaha omu Mwanya ogurikwera;" 
Psalms68:25 Abeeshongozi beebembeire, abateezi b'enanga bari enyima; N'ahagati yaabo hariho abaishiki nibateera ebitaasa." 
Psalms68:26 Muhimbise Ruhanga omu iteeraniro rihango ry'abantu; Muhimbise MUKAMA, imwe abaakomookire omu ihanga rya Israeli!" 
Psalms68:27 Benyamiini bucuracuriro abari omu mutwe, Abanyiginya ba Yuda n'omutwe muhango, Abanyiginya ba Zebuluuni, abanyiginya ba Nafutaali." 
Psalms68:28 Ragiira amaani gaawe, ai Ruhanga; Ohamye ebi waatukoreire." 
Psalms68:29 Abagabe bakureetera emitoijo, ahabwa hekalu yaawe, eri omuri Yerusaalemu," 
Psalms68:30 Hana n'amaani enyamaishwa z'omu rufunjo, Eigana ry'enimi n'enyana z'amahanga; Oribatiirire abantu abaine omururu gw'okutoijesa agandi mahanga; Otaataanise amahanga agakunda kurwana." 
Psalms68:31 Abanyiginya baryaruga Misiri; Na Esiopia eryarahuka kutega Ruhanga emikono. 
Psalms68:32 Imwe obugabe bwona obw'ensi, mweshongorere Ruhanga, Mweshongore eby'okuhimbisa Mukama," 
Psalms68:33 Orikutemba ahaiguru y'eiguru omu iguru erya ira. Reeba, naagamba n'eiraka rihango, n'eiraka rye ery'amaani." 
Psalms68:34 Mugambe ku Ruhanga aine amaani; Ategyeka Israeli omu kitiinisa ky'obukama bwe, Kandi amaani ge gari omu bicu." 
Psalms68:35 Ruhanga n'Ow'okutiinisa omu Mwanya gwe ogurikwera; Ruhanga wa Israeli niwe aha abantu be obushoboorozi n'amaani. Ruhanga asiimwe! 
Psalms69:1 Njuna, ai Ruhanga; Ahakuba amaizi nigenda kuunyita;" 
Psalms69:2 Ninshaaya omu byondo bingi, Ebi ntarikubaasa kuhamyamu bigyere; Naahika omu maizi maraingwa, Ahi amaizi agaijwire garikummirira." 
Psalms69:3 Okurira kunduhize; amaraka ganzindaire; Amaisho gangye gahotokire ahabw'okutegyereza Ruhanga wangye. 
Psalms69:4 Abarikuunyangira busha ni baingi okukira eishokye ry'aha mutwe gwangye; Abazigu bangye abarikwenda kuunyitira busha n'ab'amaani. Nshemereire kuriha ebi ntaraibire? 
Psalms69:5 Ai Ruhanga, noomanya obushema bwangye; N'ebibi byangye tibikusherekirwe." 
Psalms69:6 Abarikukwesiga, Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe, Barekye kukwatwa enshoni ahabwangye; Abarikukusherura, ai Ruhanga wa israeli, Batahemurwa ahabwangye." 
Psalms69:7 Ahakuba ahabwawe nyemeire okujumwa, N'enshoni zinshwekire ahamaisho." 
Psalms69:8 Mpindukire otarikumanywa ahari beene tata, N'omunyaihanga aha baana ba maawe." 
Psalms69:9 Okusaasibwa enju yaawe kummazireho, Kandi ebijumo ebi barikukujuma niinye bigweireire." 
Psalms69:10 Ku naarizire, naayeburabuza niinyesiibyakwo, Kyampindukira ekijumo." 
Psalms69:11 Ku naahindwire ekiguniya eky'okujwara, Bampindura eky'okucweraho enfumu." 
Psalms69:12 Ndi ekigaaniiro ky'abashutama aha irembo, Kandi ekyeshongoro ky'abasinzi." 
Psalms69:13 Kwonka nyowe, ai MUKAMA, niiwe nshaba. Omu bunaku oburikwikiririzibwamu, ai Ruhanga, ahabw'embabazi zaawe nyingi ongarukyemu." 
Psalms69:14 Ahabw'okuhwera kwawe okurikwesigwa onjune, Ntashaayira omu byondo; Nkire abarikuunyanga, kandi ndugye omu maizi maraingwa." 
Psalms69:15 Otaikiriza omwegyemure kuntwara, N'obu kwakuba okumirirwa ahagati y'amaizi maingi; Kandi otaikiriza Ekiina kunkingirana omu kanwa kaakyo." 
Psalms69:16 Ongarukyemu, ai MUKAMA ahabw'okuba embabazi zaawe ni nungi; ahabw'okusaasira kwawe kwingi ompindukire;" 
Psalms69:17 Kandi otaanyima amaisho gaawe, nyowe omwiru waawe; ahakuba ndi omu kabi, orahukye kungarukamu." 
Psalms69:18 Onyirire haihi, oncungure; Onyihe omu mikono y'abazigu bangye." 
Psalms69:19 Noomanya okujumwa kwangye, enshoni zangye, n'okuhemuka kwangye; Ababisha bangye boona noobamanya." 
Psalms69:20 Ebijumo bincwire omutima, ninshaasha munonga; Nsherwire ow'okunsaasira, yaabura; Kandi naasherura ab'okumpuumuriza, nabo bamburira." 
Psalms69:21 Bampa ebirikushaarira kubirya; N'ahabw'eiriho bampa viinyo erikushaarira kuginywa. 
Psalms69:22 Emeeza yaabo ebabeere omutego, N'okugira obusingye kubabeere orugogo." 
Psalms69:23 Amaisho gaabo gashwekwe oruho, barekye kureeba; Otetemye enyugunyu zaabo obutoosha." 
Psalms69:24 Obashukyeho okuguubwa kubi kwawe, Kandi ekiniga kyawe kingi kibahikyeho;" 
Psalms69:25 Eka yaabo ehindukye eitongo; Hatagira owaatuura omu mahema gaabo. 
Psalms69:26 Ahakuba nibahiiga ou waateire, Nibagambirana eby'obusaasi bw'ogwo ou waahutaize." 
Psalms69:27 Oyongyere ebiheneso aha biheneso byabo, Hatagira owaasinga orubanja omu maisho gaawe." 
Psalms69:28 amaziina gaabo gaihwe omu kitabo ky'amagara; Barekye kuhandiikwa n'abahikiriire. 
Psalms69:29 Kwonka nyowe ndi omworo, kandi ow'obusaasi; Okujuna kwawe, ai Ruhanga, kuntunguure." 
Psalms69:30 Ndyahimbisa eiziina rya Ruhanga n'ekyeshongoro, Mmuhe ekitiinisa n'eby'okumusiima." 
Psalms69:31 Ebyo biryagwisa gye MUKAMA okukira enimi, Nari enimi y'ekimasha eine emahembe n'ebyara." 
Psalms69:32 Abarikubonabonesibwa bakireebe, bashemererwe; Imwe abarikusherura Ruhanga, emitima yaanyu ehimbuukye!" 
Psalms69:33 Ahakuba MUKAMA ahurira abakyene, Kandi tagaya bantu be abari omu kihome." 
Psalms69:34 Eiguru n'ensi bimuhimbise, N'enyanja n'ebirikugyenderamu byona." 
Psalms69:35 Ahakuba Ruhanga aryajuna Saayuuni, Agarukye ayombekye endembo za Yuda, Abantu be baryagituuramu, ebe eyaabo;" 
Psalms69:36 Abaana b'abairu be baryagihungura, N'abakunda eiziina rye baryagituuramu." 
Psalms70:1 Ikiriza kunjuna, ai Ruhanga! Ai MUKAMA orahukye kumpwera!" 
Psalms70:2 Abarikwenda kuunyita Bahemurwe, bashoberwe; N'abarikwesiima naakorwa kubi bagarurwe enyima, bagaywe." 
Psalms70:3 Abarikunteerera enaku, nibagira bati: Otyo! Otyo! Batsigweho ahabw'enshoni zaabo." 
Psalms70:4 Boona abarikukusherura bashemererwe, bananukire omuriiwe! Abarikukunda okujuna kwawe bagume bagire bati: Ruhanga aheebwe ekitiinisa!" 
Psalms70:5 Kwonka ndi omworo kandi omukyene; Rahuka kumpikaho, ai Ruhanga; Niiwe Muhwezi wangye, kandi Omujuni wangye; Ai MUKAMA otaikarayo!" 
Psalms71:1 Ai MUKAMA, niiwe mpungiraho; Otandeka kuhemurwa!" 
Psalms71:2 Onjune ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe, onkize; Ontegye okutu, onjune!" 
Psalms71:3 Ombeere orukiri rw'okutuuramu, Omu ndaabaase kuguma nimpungira. Okaragiira kunjuna; ahakuba niiwe rukiri rwangye, kandi orugo rwangye orugumire." 
Psalms71:4 Ai Ruhanga wangye, onyihe omu mikono y'omubi, Onsikure omu mikono y'omuntu enshaarizi otahikiriire." 
Psalms71:5 Ahakuba niiwe matsiko gangye, ai Mukama RUHANGA. Ou naayesigire okwiha omu buto bwangye." 
Psalms71:6 Niiwe nyegamira okwiha obu naazaarwa; Niiwe waanyihire omu nda ya maawe. Niiwe ndiguma nimpimbisa. 
Psalms71:7 Ndi nk'eihano eririkutangaaza baingi, Kwonka Iwe ori obuhungiro bwangye obugumire." 
Psalms71:8 Akanwa kangye kaijura eby'okukuhimbisa, N'eby'okukuha ekitiinisa eizooba ryona." 
Psalms71:9 Ku ndiba naabaire omugurusi, otarinnaga; Kandi ku ndihwamu amaani, otarintisigaho!" 
Psalms71:10 Ahakuba abazigu bangye nibangambaho, Abagwereire amagara gangye nibahanuura hamwe," 
Psalms71:11 Nibagira bati: Ruhanga amutsigireho; Mumukurate, mumukwate; Ahakuba taine kijuna." 
Psalms71:12 Ai Ruhanga, otanza hare, Ruhanga wangye, rahuka kumpwera." 
Psalms71:13 Ababisha b'amagara gangye bakwatwe enshoni, bamarweho; Abarikwenda kunkora kubi bahindukye ekijumo, bagaywe." 
Psalms71:14 Kwonka nyowe ndyaguma n'amatsiko obutoosha, Nyeyongyere kukuhimbisa buri izooba." 
Psalms71:15 Akanwa kangye karyamanyisa eby'okuhikiirira kwawe, N'eby'okujuna kwawe eizooba ryona; ahakuba ni bingi, tindikubaasa kubibara." 
Psalms71:16 Ndyaija ngambe ebikuru ebi Mukama RUHANGA yaakozire; Ndyahimbisa okuhikiirira kwawe wenka. 
Psalms71:17 Ai Ruhanga, okanyegyesa okwiha omu buto bwangye, Kandi ninkigamba eby'okutangaaza ebi waakozire n'okuhitsya hati." 
Psalms71:18 N'obu ndikura naamera enju, ai Ruhanga, otarintsigaho, Okuhitsya obu ndimanyisa amaani gaawe ab'obusingye bwona oburikurataho." 
Psalms71:19 Kandi n'okuhikiirira kwawe, ai Ruhanga, kuri ahaiguru munonga; Iwe Ruhanga owaakozire ebikuru, n'oha orikushushana naiwe?" 
Psalms71:20 Iwe owaanyikiriize nkareeba enaku nyingi, Oryagaruka, ompe amagara; Onzoore, onyihe okuzimu." 
Psalms71:21 Oryanyongyeraho ekitiinisa, Kandi ogarukye ompuumuze omutima." 
Psalms71:22 Naanye ndyakuhimbisa n'enanga, ahabw'okwesigwa kwawe, Ruhanga wangye; Ndyayeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa n'endingiri, Iwe Orikwera wa Israeli."
