Psalms71:23 Ku ndyeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa, eminwa yangye eryateera akaari k'okushemererwa, Kandi n'amagara gangye agu waacungwire." 
Psalms71:24 N'orurimi rwangye ruryagamba eby'okuhikiirira kwawe eizooba ryona; ahakuba abarikwenda kunkora kubi bakwatsiibwe enshoni, baahemurwa." 
Psalms72:1 Ohe omugabe okucwa emanja omu buryo bwawe, ai Ruhanga, N'omwana we omuhe okuhikiirira kwawe." 
Psalms72:2 Aryacwera abantu baawe emanja omu kuhikiirira, N'abooro baawe omu buryo." 
Psalms72:3 Ebibungo n'otubungo biryareetera abantu obusingye omu kuhikiirira. 
Psalms72:4 Aryacwera abooro b'omu bantu emanja, Ajune abaana b'abakyene, Kandi acwanyagure orikubonabonesa." 
Psalms72:5 Baryakutiina obusingye bwona, Eizooba n'okwezi bikiriho." 
Psalms72:6 Aryaija nk'enjura erikugwa aha bunyaatsi butemire, Nk'orutoonyerera orurikutoonyerera aha itaka." 
Psalms72:7 Omu biro bye abahikiriire baryagogyeera, Bagire obusingye bwingi okuhitsya obu okwezi kuriburira kimwe." 
Psalms72:8 Aryategyeka okuruga aha nyanja okuhika aha nyanja, N'okuruga aha Mugyera omukuru okuhika aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Psalms72:9 Abatuura omu ihamba baryamwinamira; N'abazigu be baryarigatsa omucuucu. 
Psalms72:10 Abagabe ba Tarushiishi n'ab'omu birwa baryamutoijera; N'abagabe ba Sheeba na Seeba baryamureetera ebiconco. 
Psalms72:11 Eego abagabe boona baryagwa, bajuumare omu maisho ge, N'amahanga goona gamuheereze;" 
Psalms72:12 Ahakuba aryajuna omukyene, ku arimutakira, N'omworo otaine kihwera." 
Psalms72:13 Aryasaasira abooro n'abakyene, Kandi amagara g'enshoberwa agajune." 
Psalms72:14 Aryacungura amagara gaabo, agaihe omu kubonabonesibwa n'omu mwaga, Kandi eshagama yaabo eryamubeera ey'obuguzi bwingi." 
Psalms72:15 Aryagumaho; kandi baryamureetera ezaabu ya Sheeba; N'abantu baryaguma nibamushabira, Bamushabire omugisha eizooba ryona." 
Psalms72:16 Haryabaho omweru mwingi omu nsi, Emyaka eryakondakonda omu misiri omu bibungo; Nk'ebiti bya Lebanooni. N'abantu b'omu rurembo baryaba nk'obunyaatsi bw'omu ishwa oburabize." 
Psalms72:17 Eiziina rye riryagumaho ebiro byona, N'okurangaanwa kwe kuryagumaho, eizooba ku ririba rikiriho; Kandi omuriwe abantu boona nimwo bariheerwa omugisha; Amahanga goona garyamweta Oine omugisha." 
Psalms72:18 MUKAMA asiimwe, niwe Ruhanga wa Israeli; We wenka akora eby'okutangaaza." 
Psalms72:19 Kandi eiziina rye ery'ekitiinisa risiimwe ebiro byona; Ekitiinisa kye kiijure ensi yoona. Amiina, kandi Amiina!" 
Psalms72:20 Eby'okushaba bya Daudi mwene Yese byagarukira aha. 
Psalms73:1 Buzimazima Ruhanga ni murungi aha Baisraeli Abaine emitima eshemeire. 
Psalms73:2 Kwonka nyowe, ebigyere byangye bikaba byatereire, Nkaba ndi haihi kugwa;" 
Psalms73:3 Ahakuba ku naareebire okugogyeera kw'ababi, Naagirira abanyamaryo eihari." 
Psalms73:4 Ku baba nibafa, tibashaasha, Batuura bari gye, kandi bagomokire." 
Psalms73:5 Tibareeba naku nk'abandi, N'obu kwakuba okugwerwa akagwe nkabo." 
Psalms73:6 N'ahabw'ekyo amaryo gaba nk'orukwanzi omu bitsya byabo; N'omwaga gubashweka nk'eky'okujwara. 
Psalms73:7 Amaisho gabahwererera omu mutwe ahabw'okugomoka; N'emitima yaabo egira ebiteekateeko by'obushema ebirengyesereize. 
Psalms73:8 Bashekyerera abandi, bagamba eby'eitima, Omu maryo gaabo bakangisa abantu ku barikwija kubabonabonesa." 
Psalms73:9 Akanwa kaabo kagamba eby'okujuma eiguru, N'orurimi rwabo rugyendagyenda omu nsi nirugamba eby'okwehimbisa." 
Psalms73:10 N'ahabw'ekyo abantu bahinduka, babasiima, Babura ekibi ki babareebamu;" 
Psalms73:11 Kandi bagira bati: Ruhanga naakimanya ata? rukira-boona aine eki arikumanya? 
Psalms73:12 Reeba, ababi n'aba; Kandi ahabw'okugira obusingye obutoosha, beeyongyera kugira obutungi." 
Psalms73:13 Nkeeruhiza busha kushemeza omutima gwangye, N'okunaabisa engaro zangye omu kutashiisha;" 
Psalms73:14 ahakuba ndenzya eizooba nimbonabonesibwa, Kandi buri kasheeshe mpeebwa ebiheneso." 
Psalms73:15 Kuri naagizire nti: Ka ngambe ntyo, Nkaagobeize ab'obusingye bw'abaana baawe." 
Psalms73:16 Ku naateekateekire oku ndaashoborokyerwe ekyo, Kikandusya, kyandema," 
Psalms73:17 Okuhitsya obu naagiire omu Mwanya gwa Ruhanga ogurikwera; Nkateekateeka ebiribabaho aha muheru. 
Psalms73:18 Buzimazima obata aharikuterera, Obagwisa, bahwrekyerera." 
Psalms73:19 Ka bahindukire eitongo omu mwanya mukye! Ebirikutiinisa bibamariireho kimwe. 
Psalms73:20 Nk'oku ekirooto kiba omuntu yaasisiimuka, Ku oriimuka, ai Mukama, Nikwo origaya otyo ebiteekateeko ebitariho." 
Psalms73:21 Ahakuba omutima gwangye gukagwisibwa kubi, Naacumitwa omunda yangye;" 
Psalms73:22 Naaba omushema, otaine ki arikumanya, Naaba nk'enyamaishwa omu maisho gaawe." 
Psalms73:23 Kwonka nyowe ndi hamwe naiwe obutoosha; Okwaitse omukono gwangye gwa buryo. 
Psalms73:24 Oryampabura n'obwengye bwawe, Kandi aha muheru oryantaasya omu kitiinisa." 
Psalms73:25 N'oha ou nyine omu iguru kureka Iwe? Tihariho ondiijo weena aha nsi ou nyiniire orushusho kureka Iwe. 
Psalms73:26 omubiri gwangye n'omutima gwangye n'obu byakuhwaho, Kwonka Ruhanga niwe rukiri oru omutima gwangye guhungiraho, Kandi niwe omugabo gwangye ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms73:27 Abakuza hare baryahwerekyerera; Omariraho kimwe abakutsigaho, bakeegyendera." 
Psalms73:28 Kwonka ekirungi ahariinye n'okwirira haihi Ruhanga; Mukama RUHANGA mmuhindwire obweshereko bwangye, Mbone kumanyisa abantu ebi waakozire byona." 
Psalms74:1 Ai Ruhanga, ahabw'enki otunagire ebiro byona? Ahanki ekiniga kyawe nikibuguma aha ntaama z'omu iriisizo ryawe?" 
Psalms74:2 Ijuka omutwe gw'abantu baawe abu waaguzire ira, Abu waacungwire kuba oruganda rw'obuhunguzi bwawe, N'orushozi Saayuuni oru waatwireho." 
Psalms74:3 Imuka oze omu mwanya ogwahindukiire kimwe amatongo, Oreebe obubi bwona obu abazigu baakozire omu Mwanya ogurikwera." 
Psalms74:4 Ababisha baawe bakatontomera ahagati y'enju yaawe ey'okuteeraniramu; Baahanika endango zaabo kuba obumanyiso. 
Psalms74:5 Aha irembo rya ruguru baatemagura Orugo rw'obubaaho bwogainemu n'empango zaabo. 
Psalms74:6 Nk'abantu abakwaitse empango nibatema emiti y'omu kibira, Nikwo baashatagwire n'empango n'enyondo ebintu ebisharwire;" 
Psalms74:7 Baayotsya Omwanya gwawe ogurikwera, Kandi ahi Eiziina ryawe rituura baahashiihsa nibahasheenyagura." 
Psalms74:8 Baagira omu mitima yaabo bati: Ka tubahwerekyerereze kimwe! Baayotsya sinagogi za Ruhanga zoona omu nsi. 
Psalms74:9 Titukireeba bumanyiso bwaitu; Tihaakiriho nabi n'omwe, Kandi tihariho n'omwe ahariitwe orikumanya ahi ebi birigarukira." 
Psalms74:10 Ai Ruhanga, ababisha baryahitsya hi okutujuma? Abazigu baryaguma barogote aha Iziina ryawe ebiro byona?" 
Psalms74:11 Ahabw'enki ohinyire omukono gwawe, omukono gwawe gwa buryo? Gwihe omu kifuba kyawe, obahwerekyereze." 
Psalms74:12 Kwonka Ruhanga niwe Mukama wangye okwiha ira ryona, Otuura naakora eby'okujuna omu nsi." 
Psalms74:13 Okabaganisa enyanja n'amaani gaawe, Waayatagurira kimwe emitwe y'ebijoka omu maizi;" 
Psalms74:14 Niiwe waayatagwire emitwe ya Leviasaani, Okagiha enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba kugirya." 
Psalms74:15 Okaigura enshuro n'obugyera, Waayomya emigyera etooma." 
Psalms74:16 Nyomushana n'eyaawe, kandi na nyekiro n'eyaawe; Niiwe waataireho omushana n'eizooba." 
Psalms74:17 Niiwe waataireho emyatano yoona ey'ensi. Kandi okataho ekyanda n'eitumba. 
Psalms74:18 Ijuka eki, ai Ruhanga, oku abazigu barikukujuma, Nk'oku abantu abashema barikurogota aha Iziina ryawe." 
Psalms74:19 Otaha enyamaishwa amagara g'enkombe yaawe; Oteebwa amagara g'abooro baawe ebiro byona. 
Psalms74:20 Ta omutima aha ndagaano yaawe; ahabw'okuba emyanya y'omwirima omu nsi eijwire obutaaho bw'abanyamwaga. 
Psalms74:21 Otaikiriza abarikubonabonesibwa kuhemurwa; Abooro n'abakyene bahimbise Eiziina ryawe. 
Psalms74:22 Imuka, ai Ruhanga, oyetonganire; Oijukye oku abashema barikukujuma okurenzya eizooba." 
Psalms74:23 Oteebwa orwari rw'abazigu baawe, N'okujagarara kw'abakugomeire oku baimutsya obutoosha." 
Psalms75:1 Nitukusiima, ai Ruhanga; nitukusiima; ahakuba eiziina ryawe riri haihi; Abantu nibagamba eby'okutangaaza ebi waakozire." 
Psalms75:2 Omu bunaku obu nditaho, Ndyacwa emanja omu mazima." 
Psalms75:3 Ensi n'abagituuramu n'obu biraabe nibitengatenga kugwa, Kwonka niinye mpamya enyomyo zaayo." 
Psalms75:4 Nkagambira abanyamaryo nti: Mutagira amaryo; N'ababi nti: Mutaimutsya amahembe gaanyu. 
Psalms75:5 Mutaimutsya amahembe gaanyu; mutagamba mugangaize ebitsya. 
Psalms75:6 Mumanye ngu okukuzibwa tikuruga burugwa-izooba, Nari oburengyerwa-izooba, n'obu bwakuba obukiizi-bwa-buryo;" 
Psalms75:7 Kureka Ruhanga niwe mucwi w'emanja, Ogarura ahansi omwe, akatunguura ondiijo." 
Psalms75:8 Ahakuba omu mikono gwa MUKAMA harimu ekikopo, Ekirimu viinyo etimbwire erikubira; aryagishuka; Buzima ababi boona ab'omu nsi baryaginywa, bagimaremu, Bacence n'ebikanja byayo." 
Psalms75:9 Kwonka nyowe ndyashemererwa ebiro byona; Nyeshongore eby'okuhimbisa Ruhanga wa Yakobo. 
Psalms75:10 Amahembe goona ag'ababi aryagatemaho, Kwonka amahembe g'abahikiriire garyaheebwa ekitiinisa." 
Psalms76:1 Omuri Yuda Ruhanga naamanywa; Eiziina rye ni rukuru omuri Israeli. 
Psalms76:2 Eihema rye riri omuri Saalemu, Kandi atuura omuri Saayuuni." 
Psalms76:3 Okwo niyo yaahendeire emyambi y'obuta, Engabo, na rurara, n'eby'okurwanisa omu rugamba." 
Psalms76:4 Ori ow'ekitiinisa, kandi ori murungi okukira boona, Otabaarukire aha bibungo ebiriho eminyago." 
Psalms76:5 Ab'omutima gw'obumanzi banyagirwe, Bagwejegyeire obutasisiimuka, Abarwani boona tibabaasize kwerwanaho n'emikono yaabo." 
Psalms76:6 Ahabw'okuhana kwawe, ai Ruhanga wa Yakobo, Embaraasi n'abarikuzigyenderaho bagwejengyeire obutaimutsya mutwe." 
Psalms76:7 Kwonka Iwe ori ow'okutiinisa! N'oha orikubaasa kukwemerera omumaisho waagira ekiniga? 
Psalms76:8 Okeema omu iguru, waamanyisa oku waacwire orubanja, Ensi yaatiina, yaacureera," 
Psalms76:9 Ruhanga ku yaimukire kucwa orubanja, N'okujuna boona abarikubonabonesibwa omu nsi." 
Psalms76:10 Buzimazima ekingia ky'abantu kiryakuhimbisa, N'ekiniga ekiritsigaraho oryakizibira." 
Psalms76:11 Ohigye ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, kandi ohikiirize okuhiga kwawe; Boona abamwehinguririize bareete emitoijo ahari Ogwo oshemereire kutiinwa," 
Psalms76:12 Niwe ahwerekyereza amagara g'abanyiginya, Kandi otiinisa abagabe b'ensi." 
Psalms77:1 Ka ntakire Ruhanga n'eiraka ryangye, Ka mmutakire n'eiraka rihango, naija kumpurira." 
Psalms77:2 Aha izooba eri naareebeireho enaku, nkasherura Mukama; Naimutsya emikono yangye nyekiro, tinaaruha; amagara gangye gaayanga kuhuumuzibwa." 
Psalms77:3 Ku nyijuka Ruhanga, nyemereza omutima, Ngira amaganya, omutima gwangye gugwa enshazi." 
Psalms77:4 Ozibira amaisho gangye kuteerana; Nyine enaku; tindikubaasa kugamba. 
Psalms77:5 Nteekateekire ebiro ebya ira, N'emyaka eya iranaira." 
Psalms77:6 Naijuka ekyeshongoro kyangye kya nyekiro; Naateekateeka munonga, omutima gwangye gwayezirika kwecaaka." 
Psalms77:7 Mukama aryanagira kimwe? Tarigaruka kugira embabazi obundi? 
Psalms77:8 Okusaasira kwe kuhwereireho kimwe ebiro byona? Ebi yaaraganiise biryaguma bibuzire obutwire bwona? 
Psalms77:9 Ruhanga ayebirwe okugira embabazi? Aimire embabazi ze nyingi ahabw'ekiniga? 
Psalms77:10 Bwanyima naagira nti: Ebyo nibiruga omu bweremwa bwangye; Okuteekateeka ngu omukono gwa buryo ogwa Rukira-boona niguginduka! 
Psalms77:11 Ndyaijutsya abantu ebi MUKAMA yaakozire. Kandi ndyaijuka eby'okutangaaza byawe ebya ira. 
Psalms77:12 Ndyateekateeka munonga aha murimo gwawe gwona, Ngumye ebiteekateeko byangye aha bikuru ebi waakozire." 
Psalms77:13 Omuhanga gwawe, ai Ruhanga, nigwera. N'oha ruhanga omukuru orukwingana na Ruhanga waitu?" 
Psalms77:14 Niiwe wenak Ruhanga okora eby'okutangaaza; Okooreka amaani gaawe omu mahanga; 
Psalms77:15 Waacungura abantu baawe n'omukono gwawe, Nibo baana ba Yakobo na Yosefu." 
Psalms77:16 Amaizi gakakureeba, ai Ruhanga; Ku gaakureebire, gaatiina; ahagati omu maizi maingi haatetema." 
Psalms77:17 Ebicu byashuka amaizi, eiguru ryahinda; Emyambi yaawe yamurinkana hoona;" 
Psalms77:18 Eiraka ry'okuhinda kwawe ryaizira omu kasooroora; Emirabyo yaawe yaamurika ensi yoona; Ensi yaatetema, yaatengyeta." 
Psalms77:19 Omuhanda gwawe gukaba guri omu nyanja, N'otuhanda twawe nituraba omu maizi maingi; Ahi ebigyere byawe byarabire, tiharamanyirwe." 
Psalms77:20 Ahabw'omukono gwa Musa na Arooni Okeeebembera abantu baawe nk'obusyo bw'entaama. 
Psalms78:1 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, nimuhurire okwegyesa kwangye, Mutege amatu ebigambo, ebirikuruga omu kanwa kangye." 
Psalms78:2 Ndyayashamya akanwa kangye, ncwe enfumu; Ngambe ebitarikushobooroka ebya ira," 
Psalms78:3 Ebi twahuriire tukamanya, Ebi baatatenkuriitwe baatugambiire." 
Psalms78:4 Tituribishereka baana baabo, Kureka turyagambira ab'obusingye oburiija Eby'ekitiinisa ebi MUKAMA yaakozire n'amaani ge, N'eby'okutangaaza ebi yaakazire." 
Psalms78:5 Ahakuba akataho eby'okumuhamya omuri Yakobo, Yaaragiira ekiragiro omuri Israeli, Ebi yaaragiire baatatenkuriitwe kwegyesa abaana baabo," 
Psalms78:6 Ngu ab'obusingye oburiija babimanye, nibo baana abarizaarwa, Bakaimuka, bakabigambira abaana baabo;" 
Psalms78:7 Ngu babone kwesiga Ruhanga, n'okuteebwa mirimo ye, Kureka boorobere ebiragiro bye;" 
Psalms78:8 Kandi barekye kuba nka baishenkurubo Ab'obusingye obugangaire obw'obugomi, Abaabaire baine emitima etahamiire hamwe, Kandi abaagizire omwoyo ogutarikwesigwa ahari Ruhanga." 
Psalms78:9 Abefuraimu, abaabaire bahagatiire amata, Bakahunga aha izooba ry'orugamba." 
Psalms78:10 Tibararinzire ndagaano ya Ruhanga, Bakanga kugyenda nk'oku ebiragiro bye biri." 
Psalms78:11 Baayebwa ebi yaakozire, N'eby'okutangaaza ebi yaaboorekire." 
Psalms78:12 Akakora eby'okutangaaza omu maisho ga baishenkurubo, Omu nsi ya Misri n'omu mariisizo ga Zoani." 
Psalms78:13 Yaabaganisa enyanja, yaagibarabyamu, Yaayemereza amaizi, gaaba nk'omugongo." 
Psalms78:14 Nyomushana abeebembeza ekicu, Kandi nyekiro abeebembeza omuriro gurikwaka." 
Psalms78:15 Akaata enkiri omu ihamba, aabanywaisa amaizi maingi nk'agarikuruga aha nshuro z'okuzimu." 
Psalms78:16 Akaigura enshuro omu rukiri, amaizi gaahimintika nigashuuma nk'emigyera." 
Psalms78:17 Kwonka baayeyongyera kumucumuraho, Nibagomera Rukira-boona bari omu ihamba." 
Psalms78:18 Baagyeza Ruhanga omu mitima yaabo, Nibamushaba eby'okurya ebi baayetengire." 
Psalms78:19 Baagamba nibagaya Ruhanga, nibagira bati: Ebyo Ruhanga naabaasa kutugaburira eby'okurya omu ihamba?" 
Psalms78:20 N'eky'amazima akateera orukiri, amaizi gaahimintika, emigyera yaashandaara, Beitu naabaasa kuha abantu be eby'okurya, abahe n'enyama?" 
Psalms78:21 N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA ku yaakihuriire, yaakwatwa ekiniga; Omuriro gwahembwa kwotsya Yakobo, Ekiniga kyacumbuukira israeli;" 
Psalms78:22 Ahabw'okuba tibaraikiriize Ruhanga, n'obu kwakuba okwesiga okujuna kwe." 
Psalms78:23 Kwonka yaaragiira ebicu by'omu iguru, Yaigura enyigi z'eiguru," 
Psalms78:24 Taabagwisiza emaanu ey'okurya, Taaguma naabaha engano z'eiguru." 
Psalms78:25 Abantu baarya aha mugaati gw'ekinyamaraika, Yaabagaburira, baahaaga." 
Psalms78:26 Yaareeta omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba, gwahuuha omu iguru, Ahabw'amaani ge yaahabura omuyaga gw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo;" 
Psalms78:27 Taabagwisiza enyama nyingi nk'omucuucu, Endahi ezirikwingana nk'omusheenyi gw'omu nyanja;" 
Psalms78:28 Taazigwisa ahagati omu nsiisira zaabo Embaju zoona ez'amahema gaabo; 
Psalms78:29 Batyo baarya, baahaagira kimwe; Ahjakuba akabaha eki baayetengire;" 
Psalms78:30 Kwonka ku baabaire batakahweire kwetenga, N'enyama zikiri omu kanwa kaabo," 
Psalms78:31 Ekiniga kya Ruhanga kyabagwaho, Kyabitamu ab'amaani, Kyahwerekyereza abatsigazi ba Israeli." 
Psalms78:32 Kwonka ebyo byona n'obu biraabe byabaireho, bakaguma nibashiisha, Tibaikiriza by'okutangaaza ebi yaakozire." 
Psalms78:33 N'ahabw'ekyo yaafiisa ebiro byabo busha, N'emyaka yaabo baagimara baine obwoba." 
Psalms78:34 Ku yaabaire abaita, bamusherura; Beeteisa, beezirika kusherura Ruhanga." 
Psalms78:35 Kandi baijuka ku Ruhanga ari orukiri rwabo, Ruhanga Rukira-boona ku ari Omucunguzi waabo." 
Psalms78:36 Kwonka bamuha ekitiinisa ky'aha minwa, Nibamubiha n'endimi zaabo;" 
Psalms78:37 ahakuba emitima yaabo ekaba etamuhamiireho, Kandi batari beesigwa ha ndagaano ye." 
Psalms78:38 Kwonka We ahabw'embabazi ze nyingi Taabasaasira okutahikiirira kwabo, Tiyaabahwerekyereza; Kaingi akaba ayezibira kubagwerwa kubi, Areka kubamariraho ekiniga kye kyona." 
Psalms78:39 Aijuka ku bari abantu-buntu, Nk'omuyaga oguhingura, gutagarukye." 
Psalms78:40 Ka ni kaingi obu baamugomera omu ihamba, Bakamugwisiza kubi ahatatuurwa bantu!" 
Psalms78:41 Bakaguma nibamugyeza, Baakwatsa ekiniga Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Psalms78:42 Tibaijuka bushoboorozi bwe, N'obu ryakuba eizooba eri yaabakiriizeho abazigu baabo," 
Psalms78:43 Obu yaakora obumanyiso omuri Misri, N'eby'okutangaaza omu mariisizo ga Zoani." 
Psalms78:44 Akahindura emigyera yaabo eshagama, Tibaabaasa kunywa maizi gaayo." 
Psalms78:45 Taabateeza emizinga y'enshohera, zaabaruma, N'ebikyere ebyabahwerekyereize." 
Psalms78:46 Yaariisa emisiri yaabo kanyananga, N'ebi baahingire yaabiriisa enzigye." 
Psalms78:47 Yaateeza emizaabubu yaabo orubaare, N'emisikamoori yaabo yaagiitsa embeho y'enyababa." 
Psalms78:48 Yaareka ente zaabo, zaateerwa orubaare, N'asyo gaabo gaateerwa enkuba." 
Psalms78:49 Taabashukaho ekiniga kye kingi, Okuguubwa kubi, okutamwa, n'enaku, Nigwo mutwe gwa baamaraika abarikuhwerekyereza." 
Psalms78:50 akacwera ekiniga kye ekirarai, Tiyaabakiza kufa, kureka yaahayo amagara gaabo kubonabonesibwa." 
Psalms78:51 Yaita emijigaijo yoona omuri Misri, Abaana b'amaani gaabo ag'okubanza omu mahema ga Haamu." 
Psalms78:52 Kwonka abantu be yaabeebembera nk'entaama, naabashohoza, Yaabahabura, naabarabya omu ihamba nk'amasyo g'entaama." 
Psalms78:53 Yaabeebembera gye, tibaatiina; Kwonak enyanja yaamira abazigu baabo." 
Psalms78:54 Taabahitsya aha mwatano gw'ensi ye erikwera, N'aha kibungo, eki yaakubwire n'omukono gwe gwa buryo." 
Psalms78:55 Yaabingamu amahanga, gaabahunga; Yaagibabaganisiza kuba obuhunguzi bwabo, Yaata enganda za Israeli omu mahema gaabo." 
Psalms78:56 Kwonka baagyeza Ruhanga Rukira-boona, baamugomera, Tibaata mutima aha bi yaahamize;" 
Psalms78:57 Kureka baagaruka enyima, baagobya nka baishenkurubo; Baategama nk'obuta obureebya nyinabwo;" 
Psalms78:58 Ahabw'okuba bakamukwatsa ekiniga n'emyanya yaabo mikuru ey'okuramizamu, Baamwitsya eihari n'ebishushani byabo ebibaizire." 
Psalms78:59 Ruhanga ku yaakihuriire, yaagira ekiniga kingi, Yaayangira kimwe Israeli;" 
Psalms78:60 N'ahabw'ekyo yaatsigaho eihema rye omuri Shiilo, Eri yaabaire atuuramu omu bantu," 
Psalms78:61 Yaahayo eshanduukye y'amaani ge kunyagwa, Kandi ey'ekitiinisa kye omu mikono y'abazigu." 
Psalms78:62 Yaareka abantu be kwitwa rurara, Yaagirira obuhunguzi bwe ekiniga." 
Psalms78:63 Omuriro gwayokyeza kimwe abatsigazi baabo, N'abaishiki baabo tibaagaruka kweshongorera ha bugyenyi." 
Psalms78:64 Abanyamurwa baabo baitwa rurara, N'abafaakzi baabo tibaabacurira." 
Psalms78:65 Bwanyima Mukama yaasisiimuka nk'owaaba agwejegyeire, Nk'omushaija ow'amaani orikuyombesibwa viinyo;" 
Psalms78:66 Yaateera abazigu be, yaabagarura enyima, Yaabataho ekihemu eky'ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms78:67 Kandi yaayanga eihema rya Yosefu, Tiyaatoorana ruganda rwa Efuraimu;" 
Psalms78:68 Kureka yaatoorana orwa Yuda, N'ekibungo Saayuuni eki akunda." 
Psalms78:69 Yaayombeka Omwanya gwe ogurikwera gwaba nk'enshozi ndaingwa, Kandi gwaguma nk'ensi ei yaahamiize kimwe." 
Psalms78:70 Yaatoorana Daudi omwiru we, Yaamwiha omu ntaama," 
Psalms78:71 Omu kuriisa ebuguma ezirikwontsya Ngu ariise Yakobo abantu be, na Israeli obuhunguzi bwe." 
Psalms78:72 Yaabariisa n'omutima gw'amazima, Yaabeebembeza obwengye bw'emikono ye." 
Psalms79:1 Ai Ruhanga, abanyamahanga bataahire omu buhunguzi bwawe, Baashiisha hekalu yaawe erikwera, Baashenya Yerusaalemu, baagihindura omutuumo." 
Psalms79:2 Emitumbi y'abairu baawe bagihaire enyonyi z'omu mwanya kugirya, Baagaburira enyamaishwa z'omu nsi emibiri y'abarikwera baawe." 
Psalms79:3 Baseesire eshagama yaabo nk'amaizi okwkehinguririza Yerusaalemu; Kandi tibaine kiziika. 
Psalms79:4 Ahari bataahi baitu tuhindukire ekijumo, Kandi abatwehinuririize nibatushekyerera, nibatugaya." 
Psalms79:5 Oryahitsya hi, ai MUKAMA okutugirira ekiniga ebiro byona? Eihari ryawe riryayaka nk'omuriro?" 
Psalms79:6 Shuka ekiniga kyawe aha mahanga agatarikukumanya, N'aha bugabe obutatakira iziina ryawe;" 
Psalms79:7 Ahabw'okuba bamizire Yakobo, N'ahu atwire baahahindura eitongo." 
Psalms79:8 Otaijuka eby'okutahikiirira bya baatatenkuriitwe, okabitutura; Okusaasira kwawe kurahukye kutuhikaho, Ahabw'okuba tugarwirwe ahansi munonga." 
Psalms79:9 Ai Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwaitu, otuhwere Ahabw'ekitiinisa ky'eiziina ryawe; Otujune, oshwekye ebibi byaitu ahabw'eiziina ryawe." 
Psalms79:10 Ahabw'enki abanyamahanga nibagira bati: Ruhanga waabo arahi? Okuhoora enzigu ahabw'eshagama y'abairu baawe eyaasheeshekire Kumanywe omu banyamahanga, naitwe tukireebe." 
Psalms79:11 Okutsinda kw'embohe kukuhikyeho; Ahabw'amaani gaawe maingi okize abateekateekyeirwe okufa. 
Psalms79:12 Oihure bataahi baitu emirundi mushanju ebijumo Ebi baakujumire, ai Mukama!" 
Psalms79:13 Naitwe abantu baawe, entaama z'omu iriisizo ryawe, Turyakusiima ebiro byona, Tumanyise ab'obusingye bwona okuhimbisibwa kwawe." 
Psalms80:1 Tega okutu, Iwe Omuriisa wa Israeli, Oyebembera Yosefu nk'obusyo! Iwe oshutama aha kitebe ahagati ya baakerubi, jwisa omushana gwawe!" 
Psalms80:2 Omu maisho ga Efuraimu, Benyamiini na Manaase Sisimura amaani gaawe, oije otujune!" 
Psalms80:3 Otugarure aha buteeka, ai Ruhanga, Otwakize amaisho gaawe, tubone kujunwa!" 
Psalms80:4 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe, Oryahitsya hi okugwerwa kubi okushaba kw'abantu baawe?" 
Psalms80:5 Obagaburiire okurira nk'eby'okurya, Waabanywaisa amarira maingi munonga." 
Psalms80:6 Otuhindwire eki bataahi baitu barikurwanira; Abazigu baitu nibeeshekyera. 
Psalms80:7 Ai Ruhanga omuzaabibu omuri Misri, Waabinga amahanga, waagubyara." 
Psalms80:8 Okaiha omuzaabibu omuri Misri, Waabinga amahanga, waagubyara." 
Psalms80:9 Waaguhingirira, gwahitsya emizi okuzimu, Gwabuga ensi." 
Psalms80:10 Gwarandira aha bibungo byona, N'amataagi gaagwo gaasheka emyereezi mihango;" 
Psalms80:11 Gwanaga amataagi, gaahika aha Nyanja, Gwazaara abaana, baahika aha Mugyera mukuru." 
Psalms80:12 Mbwenu ahabw'enki osheenyire orugo rwagwo, Ngu abahinguzi boona bagucweho?" 
Psalms80:13 Engiri z'omu ihamba nizigushiisha, Enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa nizigwona." 
Psalms80:14 Ai Ruhanga ow'amahe, nitukweshengyereza otugarure aha buteeka, Oyeme omu iguru, oreebe oyetegyereze, Ote omutima ahari ogu muzaabibu," 
Psalms80:15 Ekitsintsi kyawe eki waayebyariire, Kandi eitaagi eri waayehamiize." 
Psalms80:16 Bagwokize n'omuriro, baagutema. Nkaahenwa ki bahwerekyerezibwa okuhana kw'ekitsyori kyawe!" 
Psalms80:17 Kwonka omukono gwawe gugume aha muntu waawe empika, Aha mwana w'omuntu ou waahaire amaani kukugasira." 
Psalms80:18 Mbwenu obwo naitwe titurigaruka enyima, tukakutsigaho; Otuhe amagara, tugume tutakire eiziina ryawe!" 
Psalms80:19 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe, otugarure aha buteeka, Otwakize amaisho gaawe, tubone kujunwa!" 
Psalms81:1 Mweshongorere Ruhanga amaani gaitu n'eiraka rihango, Muteerere Ruhanga wa Yakobo akaari k'okushemererwa!" 
Psalms81:2 Mwimutsye ekyeshongoro, muteere ebitaasa, N'enanga nungi n'endingiri." 
Psalms81:3 Muteere amakondere okwezi kubonekire, kandi mugateere kukuzire, aha izooba ryaitu ry'obugyenyi erikuru." 
Psalms81:4 Ahakuba n'ekiragiro ahabw'Abaisraeli, Ekyaragiirwe Ruhanga wa Yakobo;" 
Psalms81:5 Akakitaho kuba eky'okureeberaho omu ba Yosefu, Obu yaaraba omu nsi ya Misri, Ei naahuririire orurimi oru ntarikumanya." 
Psalms81:6 Nkabaiha omutwaro aha mabega, Engaro zaanyu zaarekura ekiibo." 
Psalms81:7 Ku mwatakire muri omu busaasi, naabakiza; Naabagarukamu ndi omu mwanya gw'enkuba ogutarikumanywa; Naabagyereza aha maizi ga Meriba. Sela." 
Psalms81:8 Bantu bangye, muhurire ebi ndikubahana; Iwe Israeli, nkaabaasibwa ki, ompurira!" 
Psalms81:9 Mutarigira ruhanga w'abanyamahanga omuriimwe, N'obu kwakuba okumaramya." 
Psalms81:10 Niinye MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misri; Yashamya munonga akanwa kaawe, nkaijuze." 
Psalms81:11 Kwonka abantu bangye tibarahuriire iraka ryangye, Kandi Israeli tarankunzire na kakye;" 
Psalms81:12 Nikwo kubareka, bakaguma baine emitima egangaire, Bakakurata obwengye bwabo ahabwabo." 
Psalms81:13 Nkaabaasibwa ki, abantu bangye bampurira, Abaisraeli bagyendera omu mihanda yangye!" 
Psalms81:14 Naanye ndahuka kugomoora abazigu baabo, Ndwanisa ababisha baabo." 
Psalms81:15 Abangi ba MUKAMA bamugomookyera, Kandi n'ebiro byabo tibyakuhweireho ebiro byona." 
Psalms81:16 Nkaabagaburiire engano nungi munonga, Mbaigutsa obwoki oburikuruga omu rukiri." 
Psalms82:1 Ruhanga ayemereire omu ishengyero rye; Ahagati ya baaruhanga naacwa emanja. 
Psalms82:2 Muryahitsya hi okucwa emanja ezitari z'oburyo, N'okugwera orubaju rw'ababi?" 
Psalms82:3 Mucwere abooro n'efuuzi emanja z'oburyo, Mukorere abarikubonabonesibwa n'enshoberwa eby'amazima." 
Psalms82:4 Mujune abooro n'abakyene, Mubaihe omu mikono y'ababi." 
Psalms82:5 Tibaine ki barikumanya, n'obu kwakuba okwetegyereza; Bagyendagyendera omu mwirima; Emisingi y'ensi yoona etengyesibwa." 
Psalms82:6 Nkagira nti: Muri baaruhanga; Imwe mwena muri abaana ba Rukira-boona," 
Psalms82:7 Kwonka muryafa nk'abantu, Mugwe nk'abanyiginya boona oku bagwa." 
Psalms82:8 Imuka, ai Ruhanga, ocwere ensi orubanja; Ahabw'okuba amahanga goona garyaba obuhunguzi bwawe." 
Psalms83:1 Ai Ruhanga, otaceceka, otahunama, Kandi otahugaho, ai Ruhanga!" 
Psalms83:2 Ahabw'okuba abazigu baawe bajagaraire, N'abarikukwanga baimukize emitwe nibeekunika." 
Psalms83:3 Bacumiire abantu baawe enaama mbi, Nibahanuura hamwe kukora kubi abu waasherekire." 
Psalms83:4 Nibagira bati: Nimwije tubamareho, barekye kuba eihanga, Eiziina rya Israeli ritagaruka kwijukwa obundi." 
Psalms83:5 Ahakuba bakahanuura hamwe n'omutima gumwe; Baakora endagaano y'okukurwanisa," 
Psalms83:6 Nibo Banyedomu n'Abaishimaeli abatuura omu mahema," 
Psalms83:7 Abagebali, Abaamoni n'Abaamaleki, Abafilistia n'abatuura omuri Tuuro;" 
Psalms83:8 Abasiria bakwataniise nabo, Baaha emikono aba Looti. Sela." 
Psalms83:9 Obagire nk'oku waagizire Abamidiani, Nka Sisera na Yabini aha mugyera Kisoni." 
Psalms83:10 Abacwekyerereziibwe Endoori Bakahinduka nk'amasha omu itaka. 
Psalms83:11 Abakuru baabo obagire nka Orebu na Zeebu, N'abanyiginya baabo boona nka Zeeba na Zalumuuna," 
Psalms83:12 Abagizire bati: Ka twetwarire amaka ga Ruhanga, tuganyagye!" 
Psalms83:13 Ruhanga wangye, obagire nk'omucuucu ogurikutwarwa akasooroora, Nk'ebishushunga ebiririkutwarwa omuyaga." 
Psalms83:14 Nk'oku omuriro gurikwotsya ekibira, Nk'oku omuriro gurikwotsya ebibungo, bikabuguma," 
Psalms83:15 Obe nikwo waabakurata n'omuyaga gwawe ogw'amaani, Kandi obatiinise n'eihunga ryawe." 
Psalms83:16 Oitse amaisho gaabo enshoni, Babone kusherura eiziina ryawe, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms83:17 Bakwatwe enshoni, batiine ebiro byona; Baburaburirwe, bahwerekyerere;" 
Psalms83:18 Bamanye ngu niiwe wenka, orikwetwa Yehova, Okira boona, kandi otegyeka ensi yoona." 
Psalms84:1 Ai MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ahu otuura ka ni harungi!" 
Psalms84:2 Amagara gangye ni geetenga kureeba ebikaari byawe, ai MUKAMA, Nangwa kigareeteire n'okugwa enshazi; Omutima gwangye n'omubiri gwangye nibitakira Ruhanga ohuriire." 
Psalms84:3 Ekiteerankumba kigira obutaaho, N'entaratambi egira ekyashuri, ahi ezaarira obwana bwayo, Nigo matambiro gaawe, ai MUKAMA ow'amahe, Mukama wangye, kandi Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms84:4 Baine omugisha abatuura omu nju yaawe; Baryaguma nibakuhimbisa Sela. 
Psalms84:5 Aine omugisha omuntu, ou amaani ge gaba omuriiwe, Omu mutima gwe hakabamu emihanda erikuza Saayuuni." 
Psalms84:6 Ku baba nibaraba omu ruhanga rw'amarira, Baruhindura omwanya gw'enshuro z'amaizi; Kandi enjura y'empangukano erushweka emigisha." 
Psalms84:7 Bagyenda nibeeyongyera amaani; Buri muntu omuribo areebwa omu maisho ga Ruhanga omuri Saayuuni. 
Psalms84:8 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe, hurira okushaba kwangye; Otegye okutu, ai Ruhanga wa Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Ai Ruhanga reeba engabo yaitu, Kandi oreebe ahamaisho g'ogwo ou waashukireho amajuta." 
Psalms84:10 Ahakuba okumara ekiro kimwe omu bikaari byawe Nikikira okumara ebiro rukumi ahandi. Nkaayenzire kuba omukumiirizi omu nju ya Ruhanga wangye, Okukira okutuura omu mahema g'obubi." 
Psalms84:11 Ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga niwe izooba kandi engabo; MUKAMA aha embabazi n'ekitiinisa; Taine kirungi kyona eki aima abagyendera omu mazima. 
Psalms84:12 Ai MUKAMA ow'amahe, Omuntu orikukwesiga aine omugisha." 
Psalms85:1 MUKAMA, okagirira ensi yaawe embabazi; Waagarura aba Yakobo abaabaire banyagirwe." 
Psalms85:2 Okaihaho okutahikiirira kw'abantu baawe; Waasaasira ebibi byabo byona. 
Psalms85:3 Okaihaho ekiniga kyawe kyona; Waareka ekiniga kyawe ekirikwaka. 
Psalms85:4 Otugarure aha buteeka, ai Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwaitu, Kandi orekye kutugwerwa kubi!" 
Psalms85:5 Oryatugirira ekiniga ebiro byona? Oryaguma ogwereirwe kubi ab'obusingye bwona? 
Psalms85:6 Toritugaruramu amagara, Abantu baawe bakashemerererwa omuriiwe?" 
Psalms85:7 Otworekye embabazi zaawe, ai MUKAMA, Otuhe okujuna kwawe." 
Psalms85:8 Ka mpurire ebi Ruhanga MUKAMA araagambe, Ahakuba naija kugambira abantu be n'abarikwera be eby'obusingye; Kwonka barekye kugaruka omu bushema." 
Psalms85:9 Buzimazima okujuna kwe kuri haihi n'abarikumutiina, Ngu ekitiinisa kibone kuguma omu nsi yaitu." 
Psalms85:10 Okusaasira n'amazima biryakwatanisa, Okuhikiirira n'obusingye binywegyerane." 
Psalms85:11 Amazima gamezire omu itaka; N'okuhikiirira kwemire omu iguru, kwareeba aha nsi." 
Psalms85:12 Eego, MUKAMA aryagaba ekirungi, N'ensi yaitu eryareeta omweru gwayo." 
Psalms85:13 Okuhikiirira kuryamwebembera, Kumubandire ah'okuraba." 
Psalms86:1 Tega okutu, ai MUKAMA, ongarukyemu; Ahabw'okuba ndi omworo kandi omukyene." 
Psalms86:2 Orinde amagara gangye, ahakuba nintiina Ruhanga; Iwe Ruhanga wangye, juna omwiru waawe orikukwesiga." 
Psalms86:3 Ongirire embabazi, ai Mukama; ahakuba niiwe ntakira eizooba ryona." 
Psalms86:4 Ohe amagara g'omwiru waawe okushemererwa; Ahakuba, ai Mukama, nyimutysa omutima gwangye ahariiwe." 
Psalms86:5 Ahabw'okuba Iwe Mukama ori murungi, orahuka kusaasira, Kandi ogira embabazi nyingi ahari boona abakutakira." 
Psalms86:6 Otegye okutu okushaba kwangye, ai MUKAMA; Kandi ohurire eiraka ry'okweshengyereza kwangye." 
Psalms86:7 Aha kiro eki ndireeberaho enaku, ndyakutakira; Ahakuba oryangarukamu." 
Psalms86:8 Omuri baaruhanga abandi tiharimu orikushushana naiwe, ai Mukama; Kandi omu birikukorwa byona tiharimu ebiri nk'ebyawe." 
Psalms86:9 Amahanga goona agu waahangire garyaija, Gakwinamire, ai Mukama, kandi gahimbise eiziina ryawe." 
Psalms86:10 Ahakuba ori mukuru, okora eby'okutangaaza; Kandi niiwe Ruhanga wenka." 
Psalms86:11 Ai MUKAMA, onyegyese omuhanda gwawe, Mbone kugyendera omu mazima gaawe; Teerana hamwe ebiri omu mutima gwangye, Gubone kutiina eiziina ryawe." 
Psalms86:12 Ndyakuhimbisa, Mukama Ruhanga wangye, n'omutima gwangye gwona, Moe eiziina ryawe ekitiinisa ebiro byona." 
Psalms86:13 Ahakuba onyiniire okusaasira kwingi, Kandi oihire amagara gangye okuzimu owa Nyamuteza." 
Psalms86:14 Ai Ruhanga abanyamaryo banyimukiriire, Omutwe gw'abataine saasi nigucwa obwengye bw'okuunyita, Kandi tibakwetaireho." 
Psalms86:15 Kwonka Iwe Mukama, ori Ruhanga oijwire okusaasira n'embabazi, Otarahuka kuguubwa kubi, oine embabazi nyingi n'amazima." 
Psalms86:16 Ompindukire, onsaasire; Ohe omwiru waawe amaani gaawe, Kandi ojune omwana w'omuzaana waawe." 
Psalms86:17 Onyorekye akamanyiso akarikuhamaya ku onkunda, Abarikuunyanga bakireebe, bahemukye; Ahakuba MUKAMA, niiwe ompwereire, okampuumuza omutima." 
Psalms87:1 Omusingi ogu yaataireho guri aha bibungo birikwera. 
Psalms87:2 MUKAMA naakunda amarembo ga Saayuuni Okukira amaka goona aga Yakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Iwe orurembo rwa Ruhanga, ogambwaho eby'ekitiinisa. Sela." 
Psalms87:4 Ahari abo abarikummanya ndyagamba ahari Rahabu na Babulooni; Reeba Filistia na Tuuro hamwe na Esiopia; Ogu niyo yaazaariirwe. 
Psalms87:5 Eego baryagamba ahari Saayuuni bati: Ogu n'oriya niyo baazaariirwe. ahakuba Rukira-boona niwe arigigumya wenka. 
Psalms87:6 MUKAMA ku arihandiika abantu, aryahamya ati: Ogu niyo yaazaariirwe." 
Psalms87:7 Abeeshongozi n'abazini nabo baryagira bati: Enshuro zangye zoona ziri omuriiwe. 
Psalms88:1 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwangye, Ntakira omu maisho gaawe nyomushana na nyekiro;" 
Psalms88:2 Okushaba kwangye kukuhikyeho; Otegye okutu okutaka kwangye; 
Psalms88:3 Ahakuba omutima gwangye gwijwire enaku, N'amagara gangye gari haihi kuza Okuzimu." 
Psalms88:4 Nimbarirwa hamwe n'abarikushuuma omu Kiina; Ndi nk'otaine kihwera," 
Psalms88:5 Nnagirwe hamwe n'abafu, nk'abaitsirwe abari omu kituuro, Abu otakiijuka, kandi abataanisiibwe n'omukono gwawe." 
Psalms88:6 Ontaire omu Kiina kiraingwa munonga, Omu myanya y'omwirima okuzimu hare." 
Psalms88:7 Ekiniga kyawe kimbandamiire, Kandi ebingonzi byawe bimmiriire kimwe. Sela." 
Psalms88:8 Oreeteire abamanyi kuunyetantara, Wampindura eki barikunuga; Nkingirainwe, tindikubaasa kushohora." 
Psalms88:9 Eriisho ringwire omunda ahabw'okubonabonesibwa; Buri izooba nkutakira, nkutegire emikono, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms88:10 Ebyo oryayoreka abafu eby'okutangaaza? Abafiire baryazooka, bakuhimbise?" 
Psalms88:11 Embabazi zaawe ziryagambirwa okuzimu, Nari okwesigwa kwawe omu ihwero?" 
Psalms88:12 Eby'okutangaaza byawe biryamanyirwa omu mwirima, Nari okuhikiirira kwawe omu nsi y'abayebire?" 
Psalms88:13 Kwonka ai MUKAMA, niiwe ntakira; Buri kasheeshe okushaba kwangye kukuhikaho." 
Psalms88:14 MUKAMA, onagiire ki amagara gangye? Ahabw'enki onyimire amaisho?" 
Psalms88:15 Nkaiha omu buto nimbonabona, ndi haihi kufa; Ebirikutiinisa byawe ku bimpikaho, nyehwa amatsiko." 
Psalms88:16 Ekiniga kyawe ekingi kindengyeireho; N'eby'okutiinisa byawe bincwekyereize. 
Psalms88:17 Binyehinguririza eizooba ryona nk'omwegyemure, Nibindeetwa embaju zoona." 
Psalms88:18 Oreeteire nkunzi zangye n'abanywani bangye kuunyetantara; Abarikummanya bari omu mwirima. 
Psalms89:1 Ndyayeshongora eby'embabazi za MUKAMA ebiro byona; Ndyaguam niinyeshongora eby'embabazi zaawe, ai MUKAMA, Mmanyise ab'obusingye bwona okwesigwa kwawe n'akanwa kangye." 
Psalms89:2 Ahakuba ngizire nti: Embabazi zaawe ziryaguma zongyerweho ebiro byona; Kandi okwesigwa kwawe kuryahamibwa omu iguru. 
Psalms89:3 Ndagaine endagaano n'ou naatooraine, Nindahirira Daudi omwiru wangye, nti:" 
Psalms89:4 Baijukuru baawe ndyabagumyaho ebiro byona, Mpamye ekitebe ky'obukama bwawe obusingye bwona." 
Psalms89:5 Ai MUKAMA, eiguru rihimbisa eby'okutangaaza byawe, Kandi n'okwesiga kwawe omu mutwe gw'abarikwera." 
Psalms89:6 Ahakuba n'oha omu iguru orikubaasa kugyeranisibwa na MUKAMA? N'oha omu b'omu iguru ori nka MUKAMA," 
Psalms89:7 Ruhanga ow'okutiinisa omu ishengyero ry'abahikiriire, Kandi ow'okutiinwa okukira abamwehinguririize boona?" 
Psalms89:8 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe, n'oha ow'obushoboorozi nkaiwe, Oyehinguririziibwe okwesigwa kwawe, ai MUKAMA?" 
Psalms89:9 Niiwe otegyeka okuhinduriza kw'enyanja; Ebingonzi byayo ku bisiikuuka, obicureeza." 
Psalms89:10 Okahondahonda Rahabu nk'oitsirwe, Waabingisa abazigu baawe omukono gwawe ogw'amaani, baataataana." 
Psalms89:11 Eiguru n'eryawe, n'ensi nayo n'eyaawe; Ensi n'ebirimu byona niiwe waabitaireho." 
Psalms89:12 Obukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'obwa-buryo niiwe waabihangire; Tabora na Herumooni zishemerererwa eiziina ryawe; 
Psalms89:13 Oine omukono gw'obushoborozi; Omukono gwawe n'ogw'amaani, omukono gwawe gwa buryo gubangirwe." 
Psalms89:14 Okuhikiirira n'amazima niyo misingi y'ekitebe kyawe ky'obukama; Embabazi n'okwesigwa bikwebembera. 
Psalms89:15 Abarikumanya eiraka ry'okushemererwa baine omugisha; Bagyendera omu mushana gw'amaisho gaawe, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms89:16 Beesiimira eiziina ryawe eizooba ryona; Kandi omu kuhikiirira kwawe nimwo batunguurirwa. 
Psalms89:17 Ahakuba niiwe kitiinisa ky'amaani gaabo; Kandi embabazi zaawe nizo ziriimutsya eihembe ryaitu. 
Psalms89:18 Ahakuba engabo yaitu n'eya MUKAMA, Kandi omugabe waitu n'ow'Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Psalms89:19 Omu bunaku obwa ira okagambira abarikwera baawe omu kworekwa oti: Njwekire ow'amaani ekirunga; Ntungwire owaatoorainwe omu bantu. 
Psalms89:20 Mboine Daudi omwiru wangye, Naamushukaho amajuta gangye agarikwera." 
Psalms89:21 Engaro yangye eryaguma nawe obutoosha, N'omukono gwangye guryamugumya." 
Psalms89:22 Omuzigu tarimubuza bwengye; N'omubi tarimubonabonesa. 
Psalms89:23 Ndyahondahondera ababisha be omu maisho ge, N'abarikumwanga mbateere, bagwe." 
Psalms89:24 Kwonka okwesigwa kwangye n'embabazi zangye biryaguma nawe; Kandi omu iziina ryangye eihembe rye nimwo riritunguurirwa. 
Psalms89:25 Ndyategyekyesa enyanja omukono gwe, N'emigyera omukono gwe gwa buryo." 
Psalms89:26 Aryantakira ati: Niiwe Tata; Ruhanga wangye, kandi orukiri rw'okujunwa kwangye." 
Psalms89:27 Ndyamugira omujigaijo gwangye, Omugabe orikukira abandi boona ab'omu nsi." 
Psalms89:28 Ndyamubiikira embabazi zangye ebiro n'ebiro, N'wendagaano yangye nawe eryahama." 
Psalms89:29 Ndyagumyaho oruzaaro rwe ebiro byona, N'ekitebe kye ky'obugabe nk'ebiro by'eiguru." 
Psalms89:30 Abaana be ku barireka ekiragiro kyangye, Bataatwaza nk'oku naaragiire," 
Psalms89:31 Kandi ku barishiisha ebi naataireho, Bataayorobera biragiro byangye," 
Psalms89:32 Ndyahanisa eby'okushiisha byabo enkoni, N'okutahikiirira kwabo nkuhanise enkoba;" 
Psalms89:33 Kwonka tindimwihiraho kimwe mbabazi zangye, Kandi tindireka bwesigwa bwangye kuba ebishuba." 
Psalms89:34 Tindiita ndagaano yangye, Nobu kwakuba okuhindura eki naagambire." 
Psalms89:35 Nkarahira okuhikiirira kwangye rimwe naaheza, Tindibeiha Daudi." 
Psalms89:36 Oruzaaro rwe ruryagumaho ebiro byona, N'ekitee kye ky'obugabe kigume omu maisho gangye nk'eizooba." 
Psalms89:37 Kiryagumibwa ebiro byona nk'okwezi, Kandi nk'omujurizi ow'okwesigwa omu iguru." 
Psalms89:38 Kwonka hati onagire ou waashukireho amajuta, Waamwanga, kandi waamugirira ekiniga;" 
Psalms89:39 Oyangiire kimwe endagaano ei waaragaine n'omwiru waawe; Waashiisha ekirunga kye, waakinaga omu mucuucu." 
Psalms89:40 Osheenyire engo ze zoona, N'engo ze z'amaani waazihwerekyereza." 
Psalms89:41 Abahinguzi boona nibamunyaga; Ahindukire orikugaywa bataahi be. 
Psalms89:42 Otungwire omukono gw'ababisha be ogwa buryo; Waareetera abazigu be boona kwesiima. 
Psalms89:43 Ogaranjwire rurara ye ey'obwogi, Tiwaamubaasisa kwemerera ahamire omu rugamba." 
Psalms89:44 Omazireho ekitiinisa kye, Waanaga ahansi ekitebe kye ky'obugabe." 
Psalms89:45 Otuubize ebiro by'obutsigazi bwe, Waamujweka enshoni. Sela." 
Psalms89:46 Oryahitsya hi, ai MUKAMA, okweshereka ebiro byona? Ekiniga kyawe kiryahitsya hi okwaka nk'omuriro?" 
Psalms89:47 Ijuka ebiro byangye ku biri bikye, Abaana b'abantu ka waabahangiire busha!" 
Psalms89:48 Ni muntu ki origuma ari ohuriire, atafe, Akaiha amagara ge omu bushoboorozi bw'Okuzimu? Sela." 
Psalms89:49 Mukama, embabazi zaawe eza ira ziri nkahi, Ezi waarahiriire Daudi omu bwesigwa bwawe?" 
Psalms89:50 Mukama, ijuka oku barikujuma abairu baawe, Oku ndikugumisiririza ebijumo by'amahanga goona ag'amaani," 
Psalms89:51 Ebi abazigu baawe barikujuma ou waashukireho amajuta, ai MUKAMA, Bakashekyerera emigyendere ye." 
Psalms89:52 MUKAMA asiimwe ebiro n'ebiro. Amiina kandi Amiina. 
Psalms90:1 MUKAMA, niiwe waabaire ori obutaaho bwaitu obusingye bwona." 
Psalms90:2 Ebibungo bitakabaireho, otakahangire nsi n'ebirimu byona, Okwiha obusingye bwona n'okuhitsya obusingye bwona Niiwe Ruhanga." 
Psalms90:3 Ogarura abantu omu mucuucu, Noogira oti: Nimugarukyeyo, iwme bantu 'mwe!" 
Psalms90:4 Ahakuba emyaka rukumi omu maisho gaawe Eri nk'eizooba rya nyomwabazyo erihweire, Nari nk'ahu abantu basisiimukira nyekiro." 
Psalms90:5 Obatwarira kimwe, nk'abarikutwarwa omwegyemure; Bari nk'abagwejegyeire; Omu kasheeshe baba nk'obunyaatsi oburikumera;" 
Psalms90:6 Omu kasheeshe butooka, kandi bukura; Omu mwabazyo butemwa, kandi buhonga;" 
Psalms90:7 Ahakuba tumazirweho okuguubwa kubi kwawe, N'ekiniga kyawe nikitureebesa enaku." 
Psalms90:8 Oyetaire okutahikiirira kwaitu omumaisho, N'ebibi byaitu ebisherekirwe waabita omu mushana gw'amaisho gaawe." 
Psalms90:9 Ahakuba ebiro byaitu byona bigyenda nibihwaho otwiniire ekiniga, Emyaka yaitu ehwaho nk'omwityso." 
Psalms90:10 Emyaka y'amagara gaitu eba makumi mushanju, Nari ku tuba twagizire amaani, ehika makumi munaana; Kwonka okugyogamu n'okufa kubi n'okureeba enaku; ahakuba erahuka kuhwaho, naitwe twegyendera." 
Psalms90:11 N'oha orikumanya amaani g'okuguubwa kubi kwawe, N'ekiniga kyawe, oku oshemereire kutiinwa?" 
Psalms90:12 N'ahabw'ekyo otwegyese kubara ebiro byaitu, Tubone kugira omutima gw'obwengye." 
Psalms90:13 Garuka, ai MUKAMA! Oryahitsya hi? Saasira abairu baawe." 
Psalms90:14 Omu kasheehse otuhaazye embabazi zaawe, Tubone kushemererwa n'okwesiima ebiro byaitu byona." 
Psalms90:15 Otuhe okwesiima okurikwingana n'ebiro ebi waatubonaboneseizemu, N'emyaka ei twareebeiremu enaku." 
Psalms90:16 Itwe abairu baawe, otworekye omurimo gwawe, N'abaana baitu oboorekye ekitiinisa kyawe." 
Psalms90:17 Embabazi za Mukama Ruhanga waitu zigume ahariitwe, Ohamye omurimo gw'emikono yaitu; Eego, omurimo gw'emikono yaitu; Eego, omurimo gw'emikono yaitu oguhamye." 
Psalms91:1 Otuura omu mwanya gw'omubonano gwa Rukira-boona, Kandi oguma asangiirwe Ow'obushoboorozi bwona," 
Psalms91:2 Aryagira MUKAMA ati: Niiwe buhungiro bwangye, kandi orugo rwangye orugumire, Ruhanga wangye ou ndikwesiga." 
Psalms91:3 Aryakwiha omu mutego gw'omutegi, akukize orufu orurikwita." 
Psalms91:4 Aryakushweka amoya ge, Ahansi y'amapapa ge niho orishanga obuhungiro; Amazima ge n'engabo n'akagabo." 
Psalms91:5 Toritiina kirikutiinisa kyona nyekiro, Nobu gwakuba omwambi ogurashwa nyomushana," 
Psalms91:6 Nari orufu orushoobera omu mwirima, N'obu kwakuba okucwekyereza okumaraho abantu omu ihangwe." 
Psalms91:7 Abantu rukumi bakaagwa aha rubaju rwawe, Na kakumi bagwa aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo, Kwonka iwe torihikwaho;" 
Psalms91:8 Oryabireebesa amaisho kwonka, Oyetegyereza ebihembo by'ababi." 
Psalms91:9 Ahakuba ogizire MUKAMA obuhungiro bwawe, Na Rukira-boona waamugira obutaaho bwawe," 
Psalms91:10 Akabi koona tikarikuhikaho, Kandi orufu rwona tirurihika haihi n'eihema ryawe." 
Psalms91:11 Ahakuba aryaragiira baamaraika be, Bakurinde omu mihanda yaawe yoona;" 
Psalms91:12 Baryakutega emikono yaabo Ngu orekye kuhikiza ekigyere kyawe aha ibaare. 
Psalms91:13 Oryaribata entare n'empiri; Oribatiirire ekitsigazi ky'entare n'enjoka. 
Psalms91:14 Ndyamukiza, ahabw'okuba nankunda, Ndyamurinda, ahakuba naamanya eiziina ryangye." 
Psalms91:15 Ku arintakira, ndyamugarukamu; Ndyaguma nawe omu naku; Ndyamujuna, mmuhe ekitiinisa;" 
Psalms91:16 Ndyamuhaazya amagara g'ebiro bingi, Kandi mmworekye okujuna kwangye." 
Psalms92:1 Ni kirungi okusiima MUKAMA, N'okweshongora eby'okhimbisa eiziina ryawe, iwe Rukira-boona," 
Psalms92:2 Okumanyisa embabazi zaawe omu kasheeshe, N'okwesigwa kwawe buri kiro," 
Psalms92:3 Ninteera omukuri n'endingiri omu iraka eririkugyendera hamwe n'enanga. 
Psalms92:4 Ahakuba Iwe MUKAMA, okangwisa gye n'omurimo gwawe, Ndyayeshongora, nshemerererwe ebi emikono yaawe yaakozire." 
Psalms92:5 Ai MUKAMA, emirimo yaawe ka ni mikuru! Ebiteekateeko byawe ka biri hare!" 
Psalms92:6 Ekitsire tikirikukimanya, N'omushema tarikukyetegyereza;" 
Psalms92:7 Ababi n'obu bamera nk'obunyaatsi, N'enkozi z'ebibi zikagogyera, Kwonka n'ab'okuhwerekyerera ebiro byona." 
Psalms92:8 Kwonka Iwe MUKAMA, ori ow'ekitiinisa ebiro byona." 
Psalms92:9 Ahakuba reeba abazigu baawe, ai MUKAMA! Ahakuba reeba, abazigu baawe baryahwerekyerera, N'enkozi z'ebibi ziryataataanisibwa." 
Psalms92:10 Kwonka otungwire eihembe ryangye nk'ery'embogo, Wanshukaho amajuta masya." 
Psalms92:11 Amaisho gangye gareebire eki ndikwetengyera abazigu bangye; N'amatu gangye gaahurira eki ndikwetengyera enkozi z'ebibi eziimukire kundwanisa. 
Psalms92:12 Abahikiriire nibabengyeya nk'omukindo, Nibakura nk'omwereezi gwa Lebanooni." 
Psalms92:13 Abo ababyairwe omu nju ya MUKAMA Baryagogyerera omu bikaari bya Ruhanga waitu. 
Psalms92:14 Baryaguma nibaana ebyana baakuzire, Bagume baine amaizi nibabebyeya," 
Psalms92:15 Kibone kworeka ku MUKAMA ari ow'amazima; Ogwo niwe rukiri rwangye; kandi omuriwe tiharimu kutahikiirira. 
Psalms93:1 MUKAMA ari aha ngoma; ajwaire ekitiinisa; MUKAMA ajwaire, ayezirikire amaani; Eego, ensi ehamire; terikubaasa kutengyetsibwa." 
Psalms93:2 Ekitebe kyawe ky'obukama kituura kihamire okwiha ira ryona. 
Psalms93:3 Emyegyemure ehooreire, ai MUKAMA; Emyegyemure ehooreire n'amaraka gaayo; Emyegyemure eborogotsire munonga." 
Psalms93:4 Okuhoorera kw'amaizi maingi N'ebingoozi by'amaani eby'enyanja, MUKAMA naabikiza amaani." 
Psalms93:5 Ebi waahamize n'eby'okwesigwa munonga; MUKAMA, okwera kushemereire enju yaawe ebiro byona." 
Psalms94:1 Ai MUKAMA, Ruhanga omuhoozi w'enzigu, Iwe Ruhanga omuhoozi w'enzigu, jwisa omushana gwawe!" 
Psalms94:2 Imuka, Iwe ocwera ensi emanja, Ozimuurire ab'amaryo ebibashemereire." 
Psalms94:3 MUKAMA, ababi baryahitsya hi, Baryahitsya hi okwehimbisa?" 
Psalms94:4 Batungikirana ebigambo byabo by'amaryo; Enkozi z'ebibi zoona zeehimbisa. 
Psalms94:5 Baita kubi abantu baawe, ai MUKAMA, Kandi babonabonesa obuhunguzi bwawe." 
Psalms94:6 Baita omufaakazi n'omunyaihanga, Bahotora efuuzi;" 
Psalms94:7 Haza bagira ngu: MUKAMA tarikukireeba, Ruhanga wa Yakobo tarikukyetaho." 
Psalms94:8 Imwe bitsire by'omu bantu 'mwe, nimuteekateekye; Imwe bashema 'mwe, muryagira ryari obwengye?" 
Psalms94:9 Owaataireho okutu tarihurira? Owaahangire eriisho tarireeba? 
Psalms94:10 Ohana amahanga tarihana, Kandi ari oyegyesa abantu obwengye?" 
Psalms94:11 MUKAMA amanya ebiteekateeko by'abantu, Ku biri nk'omwitsyo kwonka." 
Psalms94:12 Ai MUKAMA, aine omugisha omuntu ou ohana, Okamwegyesa eby'omu Biragiro byawe," 
Psalms94:13 Ngu omuhuumuze, arekye kureeba enaku, Okuhitsya obu ababi baririmirwa ekiina." 
Psalms94:14 Ahakuba MUKAMA tarinaga bantu be, N'obu kwakuba okutsigaho obuhunguzi bwe;" 
Psalms94:15 Ahakuba emanja ziryagaruka zicuubwe omu kuhikiirira, Kandi boona abaine emitima egororokire baryakukuratira." 
Psalms94:16 N'oha oriimuka akandwanisiza ababi? N'oha oryemerera akandwanira n'enkozi z'ebibi? 
Psalms94:17 Kuri MUKAMA atarabaire Muhwezi wangye, Amagara gangye gakaarahukire kutuura omu nsi etagira kateezo." 
Psalms94:18 Ku naagizire nti: Mpwera, naaterera, Embabazi zaawe, MUKAMA, zandamira." 
Psalms94:19 Ku nteekateeka bingi, naayemereza omutima, Okuhuumuriza kwawe kugwisa gye amagara gangye." 
Psalms94:20 Abategyeki babi nibabaasa kukwatanisa naiwe, Abakora eby'eitima nibeekwatsa ebiragiro?" 
Psalms94:21 Beeteerana kurwanisa amagara g'ohikiriire, Bacwera otaine kabi orubanja rw'okufa." 
Psalms94:22 Kwonka MUKAMA ambeereire orugo rugumire, Kandi Ruhanga wangye yaaba orukiri rwangye rw'okuhungiramu." 
Psalms94:23 Aryabagaruraho okutahikiirira kwabo, Abamarireho kimwe ahabw'obubi bwabo; MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu aryabamariraho kimwe." 
Psalms95:1 Nimwije tweshongorere MUKAMA, Tuteerere Rukiri rw'okujunwa kwaitu akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Psalms95:2 Twije omu maisho ge nitusiima, Tumuteerere akaari k'okushemererwa na zaaburi." 
Psalms95:3 Ahakuba MUKAMA ni Ruhanga omukuru, Omukama omukuru orikukira baaruhanga boona." 
Psalms95:4 Ensa z'ensi ziri omu mukono gwe, N'emitwe y'enshonzi nayo n'eye." 
Psalms95:5 Enyanja n'eye, ahakuba niwe yaagihangire, N'engaro ze zikabumba ensi." 
Psalms95:6 Mwija tumuramye nitwinama, Tutsimbire amaju MUKAMA Omuhangi waitu;" 
Psalms95:7 Ahakuba niwe Ruhanga wiatu, Naitwe turi abantu b'omu iriisizo rye, kandi entaama z'omu mukono gwe." 
Psalms95:8 Nkaabaasibwa ki, hati muhurira eiraka rye, Mureka kugangaaza emitima yaanyu nk'ahari Meriba, Nk'obwa Maasa muri omu ihamba," 
Psalms95:9 Obu baashwenkuriimwe bangyeza, Bakantega, nibareeba emirimo yangye." 
Psalms95:10 Nkamara emyaka makumi ana ngwereirwe kubi ab'obusingye obwo, Naagira nti: N'abantu abatuura nibahaba omu mitima yaabo, Kandi tibarikumanya mihanda yaabo, Kandi tibarikumanya mihanda yangye." 
Psalms95:11 Nikyo naarahiriire n'ekiniga nti: Tibaritaaha mu buruhuukiro bwangye. 
Psalms96:1 Nimweshongorere MUKAMA ekyeshongoro kisya; Imwe abari omu nsi mwena, mweshongorere MUKAMA." 
Psalms96:2 Mweshongorere MUKAMA, musiime eiziina rye, Mworekye okujuna kwe buri kasheeshe." 
Psalms96:3 Mumanyise ekitiinisa kye omu mahanga, Emirimo ye ey'okutangaaza omu mahanga goona." 
Psalms96:4 Ahakuba MUKAMA ni mukuru, ashemereire kuhimbisibwa munonga, Kandi n'okutiinwa okukira baaruhanga boona." 
Psalms96:5 Ahabw'okuba baaruhanga boona ab'abantu baba ebishushani; Kwonka Ruhanga niwe yaahangire eiguru. 
Psalms96:6 Ekitiinisa n'obukuru bimwebembeire, Amaani n'oburungi biri omu Mwanya gwe ogurikwera." 
Psalms96:7 Imwe enganda z'amahanga, mugambe, Mugambe ku MUKAMA aine ekitiinisa n'amaani." 
Psalms96:8 Mugambe ku MUKAMA aine ekitiinisa ekishemereire eiziina rye; Mureete empongano, mwija omu bikaari bye!" 
Psalms96:9 Muramye MUKAMA mujwaire ebirikwera, Muteteme omu maisho ge, imwe ab'omu nsi mwena!" 
Psalms96:10 Mugambire omu mahanga muti: MUKAMA ari aha ngoma! Eego, ensi ehamire; terikubaasa kutengyetsibwa; Aryacwera amahanga emanja z'oburyo." 
Psalms96:11 Eiguru rishemererwe, n'ensi eyesiime; Enyanja ehoorere na byona ebiijwiremu;" 
Psalms96:12 Emisiri eyesiime n'ebirimu byona! Obwo nibwo emiti yoona ey'omu kibira eryeshongora ahabw'okushemererwa 
Psalms96:13 Omu maisho ga MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba naija, Naija kucwera ensi orubanja; Aryacwera ensi orubanja omu kuhikiirira, N'amahanga omu mazima ge." 
Psalms97:1 MUKAMA ari aha ngoma; ensi k'eyesiime, Ebirwa bingi bishemererwe!" 
Psalms97:2 Ebicu n'omwirima bimbwehinguririize; Okuhikiirira n'amazima nigwo musingi gw'ekitebe kye ky'obukama. 
Psalms97:3 Omuriro gumwebembera, Nigwotsya abazigu be abamuri embaju zoona." 
Psalms97:4 Emirabyo ye emurika ensi, Ensi ereeba, kandi etetema." 
Psalms97:5 Enshozi ziyagira omu maisho ga MUKAMA nk'entsinda, Omu maisho ga MUKAMA ow'ensi yoona." 
Psalms97:6 Eiguru rimanyisa okuhikiirira kwe, N'amahanga goona gareeba ekitiinisa kye," 
Psalms97:7 Boona abaramya ebishushani bakwatwe enshoni, Abarikwehimbisa ahabw'ebishushani ebitaine mugasho. Imwe baaruhanga mwena, mumuramye." 
Psalms97:8 Saayuuni ekabihurira, yaashemererwa, N'abaishiki ba Yuda baayesiima Ahabw'emicwere yaawe, ai Ruhanga;" 
Psalms97:9 Ahakuba Iwe, ai MUKAMA, nookira ebiri omu nsi yoona, Noohimbisibwa okukirira kimwe baaruhanga boona." 
Psalms97:10 Imwe abakunda MUKAMA, mwangye obubi. Arinda amagara g'abarikwera be, Abaiha omu mikono y'ababi." 
Psalms97:11 Omushana gujwera abahikiriire, Kandi okushemererwa kujwera ab'emitima egororokire." 
Psalms97:12 Imwe abahikiriire, mushemerererwa omuri MUKAMA, Kandi musiime eiziina rye eririkwera." 
Psalms98:1 Mweshongorere MUKAMA ekyeshongoro kisya, Ahakuba akozire eby'okutangaaza; Omukono gwe gwa buryo kandi ogurikwera Gumureeteire obusinguzi." 
Psalms98:2 Mukama amanyiise okujuna kwe, Okuhikiirira kwe okushuurwire butunu omu maisho g'amahanga." 
Psalms98:3 Aijukire embabazi ze n'okwesigwa kwe, Ebi yaagiriire enju ya israeli. Embaju zoona ez'ensi zaareeba okujuna kwa Ruhanga waitu." 
Psalms98:4 Muteera MUKAMA akaari k'okushemererwa, imwe ab'omu nsi mwena, Mwimutsye amaraka, mweshongore ekyeshongoro ky'okushemererwa n'eby'okuhimbisa." 
Psalms98:5 Mweshongorere MUKAMA aha nanga, N'eiraka eririkugyendera hamwe nayo;" 
Psalms98:6 Muteere akaari k'okushemererwa omu maisho ga MUKAMA kandi Omugabe N'amakondere n'eiraka ry'enzamba. 
Psalms98:7 Enyanja ehoorere na byona ebiijwiremu, N'ensi n'abagitwiremu." 
Psalms98:8 Emyegyemure eteere omu ngaro; Ebibungo byeshongorere hamwe ahabw'okushemererwa 
Psalms98:9 Omu maisho ga MUKAMA; ahakuba naija kutegyeka ensi; Aryacwera ensi emanja omu kuhikiirira, N'amahanga omu bwinganisa." 
Psalms99:1 MUKAMA ari aha ngoma; k'amahanga gateteme! Ashutami ahagati ya baakerubi; k'ensi etengyete! 
Psalms99:2 MUKAMA ni mukuru omuri Saayuuni; Ari ahaiguru, naakira amahanga goona." 
Psalms99:3 Ka bahimbise eiziina ryawe erikuru kandi eririkutiinisa; Bati: N'Orikwera kandi Ow'amaani," 
Psalms99:4 Omukama okunda eby'oburyo! Niiwe otaho obwinganisa omu bantu; Okacwa emanja z'oburyo n'okuhikiirira omuri Yakobo. 
Psalms99:5 Muhimbise MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu; Mumuramize omu maisho g'akatebe k'ebigyere bye, Nimugira muti: N'Orikwera!" 
Psalms99:6 Musa na Arooni bakaba bari omu banyamurwa be, Na Samueli ari omu barikutakira eiziina rye. Bakatakira MUKAMA, yaabagarukamu." 
Psalms99:7 Akabagambira ari omu nyomyo y'ekicu, Baayorobera ebi yaahamize n'ebiragiro ebi yaabateereireho." 
Psalms99:8 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, okaba obagarukamu; Okaba ori Ruhanga orikubasaasira, N'obu oraabe waabahoire enzigu ahabw'ebibi ebi baakozire." 
Psalms99:9 Muhe MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu ekitiinisa, Mumuramize aha kibungo kye ekirikwera. Ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu n'Orikwera." 
Psalms100:1 Imwe ab'omu nsi zoona, Muteerere MUKAMA akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Psalms100:2 Muheereze MUKAMA mushemereirwe; Mwije omu maisho ge nimweshongora. 
Psalms100:3 Mumanye ngu MUKAMA ni Ruhanga. Niwe yaatuhangire, kandi turi abe. Turi abantu be, kandi entaama z'omu iriisizo rye." 
Psalms100:4 Mutaahe omu marembo ge nimumusiima, N'omu bikaari bye nimumuhimbisa. Mumusiime, musingize eiziina na rye!" 
Psalms100:5 Ahakuba MUKAMA ni murungi; Embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro n'ebiro, n'okwesigwa kwe n'okw'obusingye bwona." 
Psalms101:1 Niinyeshongora aha by'embabazi eby'okuhimbisa. 
Psalms101:2 Ndyayerinda ngyendere omu muhanda oguhikire. Oryaija ryari ahi ndi? 
Psalms101:3 Tindigira kintu kyona ekibi eki naayebembeza; Niinyangira kimwe ekirikukorwa abarikuteishuka omuhanda gwawe; Tindikwatanisa nakyo. 
Psalms101:4 Omutima gw'obugomi guryanza hare; Tindimanya kintu kyona ekibi. 
Psalms101:5 Orikubeiherera mutaahi we omu mubonano, ndyamucwekyereza; Orikureebesa abantu esheshemi, kandi ow'omutima gw'amaryo, tindimugumisiririza." 
Psalms101:6 Ndyareeba n'embabazi abarikwesigwa omu nsi, Bagume naanye. Orikugyendera omu muhanda oguhikire, Niwe ariguma nampeereza." 
Psalms101:7 Omuntu weena okora eby'okugobya, tariguma mu nju yangye; Omuntu weena orikubeiha, tarihamibwa mu maisho gangye." 
Psalms101:8 Buri kasheeshe ndyaguma ncwekyereze ababi boona ab'omu nsi, Mbone kumariraho kimwe enkozi z'ebibi zoona omu rurembo rwa MUKAMA." 
Psalms102:1 Hurira okushaba kwangye, ai MUKAMA, N'okutaka kwangye kukuhikyeho." 
Psalms102:2 Otaanyima amaisho aha izooba ry'obusaasi bwangye, Ontegye okutu kwawe, Orahukye kungarukamu aha izooba eri ndaakutakirireho;" 
Psalms102:3 Ahakuba ebiro byangye bihwaho nk'omwika, N'amagufa gangye nigabugumwamu omuriro nk'ekikoomi." 
Psalms102:4 Omutima gwangye guri nk'obunyaatsi obuteirwe omushana, bukahonga; Mbuzire n'agarya eby'okurya." 
Psalms102:5 Ahabw'okutsinda kwingi munonga Amagufa gangye garamataine n'omubiri. 
Psalms102:6 Ndi nka nyamunyonyi y'omu ihamba, Nari nk'ekihihizi omu myanya etarimu bantu." 
Psalms102:7 Ndaara nindeeba; Ndi nk'ekiteerankumba ekiteekami kyonka aha mutwe gw'enju. 
Psalms102:8 Abazigu bangye banjuma eizooba ryona; Abangwereire eiraro bampindwire eky'okujumisa abandi; 
Psalms102:9 Ahakuba ndiire eiju ry'akashenda nk'omugaati, Naajwanzya eky'okunywa kyangye n'amarira," 
Psalms102:10 Ahabw'okuguubwa kubi kwawe n'ekiniga kyawe, Ahabw'okuba ontwaire, wannaga." 
Psalms102:11 Ebiro byangye ni nk'ekicuucu ky'omu mwabazyo ekihwaho. Kandi nyomire nk'obunyaatsi. 
Psalms102:12 Kwonka Iwe MUKAMA, oryaguma aha ngoma ebiro byona; Kandi eb'obusingye bwona baryaguma bakwijukye." 
Psalms102:13 Oryaimuka osaasire Saayuuni; ahakuba nibwo bunaku bw'okugigirira embabazi; Eego, obunaku obwatairweho buhikire." 
Psalms102:14 Ahakuba abairu baawe bakunda amabaare gaayo, Kandi basaasibwa omucuucu gwayo." 
Psalms102:15 Amahanga garyatiina eiziina rya MUKAMA, N'abagabe boona ab'ensi batiine ekitiinisa kyawe;" 
Psalms102:16 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aryagaruka ayombekye Saayuuni, Kandi areeberwe omu kitiinisa kye." 
Psalms102:17 Aryata omutima aha kushaba kw'enshoberwa; Tarigaya kweshengyereza kwabo. 
Psalms102:18 Ekyo ka kihandiikirwe ab'obusingye oburiija, Ngu abantu abarizaarwa bahimbise MUKAMA;" 
Psalms102:19 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akareeba ahansi, ari ahaiguru omu Mwanya gwe ogurikwera, Yaareeba n'ensi, naayema omu iguru," 
Psalms102:20 Ngu ahurire okutsinda kw'embohe, Akomorore abacwereirwe orubanja rw'okufa;" 
Psalms102:21 Ngu abantu bagambe omuri Saayuuni eiziina rya MUKAMA. N'okuhimbisibwa kwe omuri Yerusaalemu," 
Psalms102:22 Abantu bateeraniire hamwe N'amahanga goona kuramya MUKAMA. 
Psalms102:23 Akatuubya amaani gangye nkiri rwagati. Yaacwa aha biro byangye. 
Psalms102:24 Naagira nti: Ai bambe Ruhanga wangye, otantwara nkiri ahagati y'ebiro byangye, Haza emyaka yaawe eba ey'obusiingye bwona." 
Psalms102:25 Okutaho omusingi gw'ensi iranaira, N'eiguru rikahangwa emikono yaawe." 
Psalms102:26 Ebyo biryahwaho, kwonka Iwe oryagumaho; Eego, ebyo byona biryakura nk'ekijwaro, Oryabihindura nk'omwenda, bihindukye okundi;" 
Psalms102:27 Kwonka Iwe tohinduka, Kandi emyaka yaawe terihwaho;" 
Psalms102:28 Abaana b'abairu baawe baryagumaho; Kandi oruzaaro rwabo ruryahambibwa omu maisho gaawe. 
Psalms103:1 Singiza MUKAMA, iwe magara gangye! Na byona ebiri omuriinye bisingize eiziina rye eririkwera!" 
Psalms103:2 Singiza MUKAMA, iwe magara gangye, Kandi oteebwa ebirungi byona ebi yaakukoreire." 
Psalms103:3 Niwe asaasira eby'okutahikiirira byawe byona, Akakiza endwara zaawe zoona;" 
Psalms103:4 Akacungura amagara gaawe, ngu garekye kuhwerekyerera, Akakujweka embabazi n'okusaasirwa nk'ekirunga;" 
Psalms103:5 Akakuhaazya ebirungi, Ngu obutsigazi bwawe bugarukye busya nk'empungu." 
Psalms103:6 MUKAMA akora eby'okuhikiirira; Boona abarikubonabonesibwa abakorera eby'oburyo. 
Psalms103:7 Akamanyisa Musa emitwarize ye, N'Abaisraeli yaabooreka ebi yaakozire." 
Psalms103:8 MUKAMA n'omunyambabazi, kandi omusaasizi; Tarahika kuguubwa kubi, kureka agira okusaasira kwingi." 
Psalms103:9 Tariguma naahana obutoosha, N'obu kwakuba okuguma n'ekiniga ebiro byona." 
Psalms103:10 Tatugira nk'ebibi byaitu oku biri, N'obu kwakuba okutuzimuurira nk'okutahikiirira kwaitu oku kuri." 
Psalms103:11 Ahakuba nk'eiguru oku riri ahaiguru munonga okuruga ahansi, N'embabazi ezi agirira abarikumutiina nikwo ziri nyingi." 
Psalms103:12 Nk'oburugwa-izooba oku eri hare n'oburengyerwa-izooba, Nikwo atwaire atyo hare eby'okushiisha byaitu." 
Psalms103:13 Nka ishe w'abaana oku asaasira abaana be, Nikwo MUKAMA asaasira abarikumutiina;" 
Psalms103:14 Ahakuba naamanya obuhangwa bwaitu, Naijuka ku turi omucuucu." 
Psalms103:15 Eby'omuntu, ebiro bye biri nk'obunyaatsi; Aba gye, nk'ekirabyo ky'omu ishwa;" 
Psalms103:16 Ahakuba omuyaga ku gukihuuha, kihwaho, Omwanya gwakyo gutsigara gutakikimanya." 
Psalms103:17 Kwonka embabazi za MUKAMA ziguma aha barikumutiina okwiha iranaira, okuhitsya obusingye bwona, N'okuhikiirira kwe kuhika aha baijukuru." 
Psalms103:18 Aha barinda endagaano ye, Bakaijuka ebiragiro bye, bakabyorobera." 
Psalms103:19 MUKAMA akahamya ekitebe kye eky'obukama omu iguru, N'obukama bwe butegyeka byona." 
Psalms103:20 Musingize MUKAMA, imwe baamaraika be, Imwe amamanzi g'amaani, abarikukora ebi yaaragiire, mukahurira eiraka ry'ekigambo kye." 
Psalms103:21 Musingize MUKAMA, iwme amahe ge goona, Abaheereza be abakora ebi akunda." 
Psalms103:22 Musingize MUKAMA, imwe emirimo ye yoona omu myanya yoona ei arikutegyeka. Singiza MUKAMA, iwe magara gangye!" 
Psalms104:1 Singiza MUKAMA, iwe magara gangye! Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, ori mukuru munonga; Ojwaire ekitiinisa n'obukuru." 
Psalms104:2 Ojwara okumurinkana nk'ekijwaro; Okabamba eiguru nk'eihema. 
Psalms104:3 Waataho enyomyo z'ekishengye kyawe omu maizi; Ebicu waabigira ekigaari kyawe, Noogyenda aha mapapa g'omuyaga." 
Psalms104:4 Emiyaga ogigira entumwa zaawe, N'abaheereza baawe baba omuriro ogurikwaka." 
Psalms104:5 Okata ensi aha misingi yaayo, Ngu etaritengyetsibwa ebiro byona." 
Psalms104:6 Waagishweka enyanja nk'ekijwaro; amaizi gaashweka enshozi. 
Psalms104:7 Ku waagakabukiire, gaahunga; ahabw'eiraka ry'okuhinda kwawe, gairukira kimwe." 
Psalms104:8 Enshozi zimuka, empanga zaagaruka ahansi Omu mwanya ogu waaziteekateekyeire." 
Psalms104:9 Waataho emyatano ei gatashemereire kurenga, Ngu gatagaruka kushweka ensi." 
Psalms104:10 Ku oragiira, enshuro zifumuka omu mpanga; Emigyera ehimintika ahagati y'ebibungo;" 
Psalms104:11 Enywaisa enyamaishwa zoona; Kandi enturegye zihweraho eiriho. 
Psalms104:12 Aha rubaju rwayo enyonyi n'amahungu niho byarika, Bikeeshongorera omu mataagi g'ebiti." 
Psalms104:13 Ogwisiza ebibungo enjura, neeruga omu iguru, Ensi ehaaga ebyana by'omurimo gwawe." 
Psalms104:14 Omereza ente obunyaatsi, N'abantu obaha eby'okubyara, Ngu babone kwiha eby'okurya omu itaka," 
Psalms104:15 Na viinyo ey'okugwisa gye emitima yaabo, N'amajuta g'okuyagayagisa ahamaisho gaabo, N'eby'okurya by'okugumya emitima yaabo." 
Psalms104:16 Emiti ya MUKAMA ehaagire amaizi, Emyereezi ya Lebanooni ei yaabyaire." 
Psalms104:17 Omuriyo nimwo enyonyi zaarika, Oruyongoyongo rwine enju yaarwo omu miberooshi." 
Psalms104:18 omu nshozi ndaingwa enzaza nimwo ziba, N'enkiri n'obweshereko bw'endirira." 
Psalms104:19 Okataho okwezi kumanyisa obunaku, N'eizooba rimanya obunaku obu rirengyeraho." 
Psalms104:20 Oreeta omwirima, kiba ekiro; Enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ihamba zibona kushohora nizishooba." 
Psalms104:21 Ebitsigazi by'entare biboorogyera eki biraarye, Nibisherura eby'okurya byabyo ahari Ruhanga." 
Psalms104:22 Eizooba ku rirasha, zigyenda, Zibyama omu maaya gaazo." 
Psalms104:23 Abantu bashohora, baza aha mirimo yaabo, Basiiba nibafa kubi okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Psalms104:24 Ai MUKAMA, emirimo yaawe ka n'ey'emiringo mingi! Ebyo byona okabikoresa obwengye. N'ensi eijwire ebihangirwe byawe." 
Psalms104:25 Reeba, eriya nyanja ndaingwa kandi empango, Ebamu ebintu ebitarikubarwa, Ebiine amagara ebikye n'ebihango." 
Psalms104:26 Nimwo emeeri ziraba, Na Leviasaani ei waahangire kuguma neezaniramu." 
Psalms104:27 Ebyo byona bikuhanga amaisho Ngu obigaburire omu bunaku bwabyo. 
Psalms104:28 Ebi obiha, nibyo bitorotoora; Ku oshashaanura engaro zaawe, biiguta ebirungi." 
Psalms104:29 Ku obiima amaisho, bishoberwa; Ku obiihamu omwitsyo, bifa. Bigaruka omu mucuucu omu byarugire." 
Psalms104:30 Ku oyohereza Omwoyo waawe, bihangwa, Ohindura eitaka, rigaruka riba risya." 
Psalms104:31 Ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kigumeho ebiro byona, Mukama ashemerererwa emirimo ye," 
Psalms104:32 Oreeba ensi ekatetema, Akikora aha nshozi, zikacumba omwika." 
Psalms104:33 Ndayeshongorera MUKAMA, nkiri ohuriire, Nyeshongorere Ruhanga wangye, nkiriho." 
Psalms104:34 Okuteekateeka kwangye kugume kumugwise gye; Ahakuba nshemerererwa omuri MUKAMA. 
Psalms104:35 K'abasiisi bahwerekyerezibwe, barugye omu nsi, N'ababi batarirangwa omu nsi. Singiza MUKAMA iwe magara gangye! Haleluya." 
Psalms105:1 Musiime MUKAMA, murangaane eiziina rye, Mumanyise ebi yaakozire omu mahanga." 
Psalms105:2 Mumweshongorere, mweshongore eby'okumuhimbisa, Mugambire abantu eby'emirimo ye yoona ey'okutangaaza." 
Psalms105:3 Mwesiime ahabw'eiziina rye eririkwera, Emitima y'abarikusherura MUKAMA eshemererwa." 
Psalms105:4 Musherure MUKAMA n'amaani ge, Mwetengye okuguma omu maisho ge obutoosha." 
Psalms105:5 Mwijukye emirimo ye ey'okutangaaza, N'ebitakareebwaga ebi yaakozire, n'emanja ezi yaacwire," 
Psalms105:6 Imwe ab'oruzaaro rw'omwiru we Abrahamu, Abaana ba Yakobo, abu yaatooraine." 
Psalms105:7 Niwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, Emicwere ye eri omu nsi yoona." 
Psalms105:8 Aijuka endagaano ye ebiro byona, Ekigambo eki yaaragiire ab'obusingye rukumi," 
Psalms105:9 Niyo ndagaano ei yaaragaine na Abrahamu, Ei yaarahiire naaraganisa Isaaka," 
Psalms105:10 Akagihamiza Yakobo kuba ekiragiro, Na Israeli okuba endagaano etarihwaho," 
Psalms105:11 Naagira ati: Niiwe ndiha ensi ya Kanaani, Kuba omugabo gw'obuhunguzi bwanyu." 
Psalms105:12 Obu baabaire bakiri bakye, Eego bakye munonga kandi abashuhuuki omu nsi egyo," 
Psalms105:13 Nibazengyerera omu mahanga agatari gamwe, Okuruga omu bugabe bumwe okuza omu bundi," 
Psalms105:14 Taraikiriize muntu weean kubakora kubi; Akateisa abagabe ahabwabo," 
Psalms105:15 Naagira ati: Mutakora aha bu naashukireho amajuta, N'obu kwakuba okukora kubi baanabi bangye." 
Psalms105:16 Obu yaayeta enjara, ekateera ensi egyo, Akahendera kimwe enkoni ei baabaire beesigire, nibyo by'okurya byabo." 
Psalms105:17 Akashangwa yaatumire omuntu kubabandizayo, Niwe Yosefu owaaguzirwe kuba omuhuuku." 
Psalms105:18 Ebigyere bye baabisaasa n'emihama, Baamubohesa enjegyere z'ebyoma." 
Psalms105:19 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaguma nikimugyeza, Okuhitsya obu eki yaagambire kyabaireho." 
Psalms105:20 Omugabe yaatuma, baamubohoorora, omutegyeki w'amahanga yaamurekura;" 
Psalms105:21 Yaamuhindura omukuru w'eka ye, Kandi omutegyeki w'ebintu bye byona," 
Psalms105:22 Okuboha abanyiginya be nk'oku arikwenda, N'okwegyesa abakuru be obwengye." 
Psalms105:23 Bwanyima Israeli yaija omuri Misiri Yakobo yaashuhuukira omu nsi ya Haamu. 
Psalms105:24 MUKAMA yaakanyisa abantu be munonga, Yaabahindura ab'amaani okukira abazigu baabo." 
Psalms105:25 Yaahihdura emitima yaabo kwanga abantu be, N'okugira obwengye bw'okutwaza kubi abairu be." 
Psalms105:26 Yaatuma Musa omwiru we, Na Arooni ou yaatooraine;" 
Psalms105:27 Baakora obumanyiso bwe omuribo, N'eby'okutangaaza omu nsi ya Haamu." 
Psalms105:28 Yaareeta omwirima, gwashweka ensi; 1Ngu barekye kugomera ekigambo kye." 
Psalms105:29 Yaahindura amaizi gaabo eshagama, Yaita eby'enyanja byabo." 
Psalms105:30 Ensi yaabo yaijura ebikyere, Byaza n'omu bishengye by'abagabe baabo." 
Psalms105:31 Yaaragiira, haija emizinga y'eshohera, Enda zaanyiga omu nsi yaabo yoona." 
Psalms105:32 Omu mwanya gw'enjura yaabagwisiza orubaare, N'emirabyo yaatyankana omu nsi yaabo." 
Psalms105:33 Yaateera emizaabibu yaabo n'emitiini yaabo, Yaahendagura ebiti by'omu nsi yaabo." 
Psalms105:34 Yaagamba, enzigye zaateera, Na kanyananga nyingi munonga," 
Psalms105:35 Byarya ebimezire byona omu nsi yaabo, N'emyaka ey'omu misiri yaabo." 
Psalms105:36 Kandi yaateera emijigaijo yoona ey'omu nsi yaabo, Abaana b'amaani gaabo ag'okubanza." 
Psalms105:37 Bwanyima yaiha Abasraeli omu nsi egyo, baine efeeza n'ezaabu; Tihariho n'omwe aharibo owaabaire ataine maani." 
Psalms105:38 Ku baarugiremu, Abanyamisiri baashemererwa, Ahabw'okuba bakaba baine obwoba ahabwabo." 
Psalms105:39 Yaashashaanura ekicu ky'okubasangira, Yaataho n'omuriro gw'okubamurikira nyekiro." 
Psalms105:40 Baashaba, yaareeta endahi, Yaabahaazya eby'okurya by'omu iguru." 
Psalms105:41 Yaayata orukiri, amaizi gaahimintika; Gaaraba omu myanya eyomire nk'emigyera;" 
Psalms105:42 Ahakuba akaijuka ekigambo kye ekirikwera, Na Abrahamu omwiru we." 
Psalms105:43 Yaihayo abantu be n'okushemererwa, Abu yaatooraine baija nibeeshongora." 
Psalms105:44 Yaabaha ensi z'abanyamahanga, Baahungura ebi abanyamahanga baahendekyeire," 
Psalms105:45 Ngu babone kworobera ebiragiro bye n'okurinda ebi yaataireho. Haleluya. 
Psalms106:1 Haleluya; Musiime MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba ni murungi; Kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms106:2 N'oha owaakubaasa kugamba eby'amaani ebi MUKAMA yaakozire, Nari okumanyisa ebirikumuhimbisisa byona?" 
Psalms106:3 Baine omugisha abarikukora eby'oburyo, Abakora eby'okuhikiirira buri kaanya." 
Psalms106:4 Onyijukye, ai MUKAMA, n'embabazi ezi ogirira abantu baawe; Ontaayaayire n'okujuna kwawe," 
Psalms106:5 Mbone kureeba okugogyeera kw'abu waatooraine, Nshemererwe ahabw'okwesiima kw'eihanga ryawe, Kandi nyehimbise hamwe n'ab'obuhunguzi bwawe." 
Psalms106:6 Itwe na baatatenkuriitwe tukashiisha, Twakora eby'okutahikiirira; twakora kubi." 
Psalms106:7 Baatatenkuriitwe tibareetegyereize by'okutangaaza ebi waakozire omuri Misri; Tibaraijukire by'embabazi bingi ebi waakozire, Kureka bakagomera Rukira-boona aha Nyanja erikutukura." 
Psalms106:8 Kwonka yaabajuna ahabw'eiziina rye, Ngu amanyise obushoboorozi bw'amaani ge." 
Psalms106:9 Yaakabukira egyo Nyanja erikutukura, yaayoma, Yaabarabya ahagati yaayo nk'abarikuraba omu bwerere;" 
Psalms106:10 Yaabajuna omu mukono gw'ogwo owaabaire naabanga, Yaabaiha omu mikono y'abazigu baabo." 
Psalms106:11 Amaizi gaashweka ababisha baabo, Tihaatsigara n'omwe." 
Psalms106:12 Obwo baikiriza ebigambo bye, Baayeshongora eby'okumuhimbisa." 
Psalms106:13 Ku haahingwire akaanya kakye, baayebwa emirimo ye, Tibaategyereza naama ye kuhikiirizibwa;" 
Psalms106:14 Kureka baagira okwetenga kwingi omu ihamba, Baagyereza Ruhanga ahatatuurwa bantu." 
Psalms106:15 Yaabaha ebi baamushabire, Kwonka omu magara gaabo yaabareetera okuhururuka." 
Psalms106:16 Baagirira Musa eihari omu nsiisira z'amahema, Na Arooni orikwera wa MUKAMA." 
Psalms106:17 Ensi yaayashama, yaamira Dasani, Yaashweka abantu ba Abiraamu;" 
Psalms106:18 N'omuriro gwayaka omu mutwe gw'abo bantu, Endimi zaagwo zaayotsya ababi." 
Psalms106:19 Baakorera enyana omuri Horebu, Baaramya ekishushani ekiheesirwe." 
Psalms106:20 Okwo nikwo baahindwire ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga, Omu mwanya gwakyo bakatamu ekishushani ky'enimi erikurya obunyaatsi." 
Psalms106:21 Baayebwa Ruhanga Omujuni waabo, Owaakoreire ebikuru omuri Misri;" 
Psalms106:22 Akakora eby'okutangaaza omu nsi ya Haamu, N'ebirikutiinisa aha Nyanja erikutukura." 
Psalms106:23 N'ahabw'ekyo yaabahayira ku arikwija kubahwerekyereza; Akaabaire yaabaherizeho, kuri Musa ou yaatooraine ataramwemereire mumaisho ahasheenyukire, Kutuubya ekiniga kye, ngu atakaabacwekyereza." 
Psalms106:24 Eego, baagaya ensi egyo erikukundwa; Tibaikiriza kigambo kye;" 
Psalms106:25 Kureka baayetomboitera omu mahema gaabo, Tibaayorobera iraka rya MUKAMA." 
Psalms106:26 Nikyo yaabarahiriire, aimukize omukono gwe, Ku aribagwisa omu ihamba," 
Psalms106:27 Kandi ku aribingira oruzaaro rwabo omu mahanga, Bakataataanira omu nsi zaago." 
Psalms106:28 Bwanyima baakwatanisa na Baali-peori, Baarya ebitambirwe ahabw'abafiire." 
Psalms106:29 Okwo nikwo baamukwatsize ekiniga n'emicwe yaabo; Orufu rukabaijamu. 
Psalms106:30 Ahonaaho Finehaasi yaimuka, yaakora eky'okuhikiiriza ebiragiro, Orufu rwahwaho." 
Psalms106:31 Ekyo kyamubarirwa kuba okuhikiirira, Okuhitsya obusingye bwona obutarihwaho." 
Psalms106:32 Kandi baakwatsa MUKAMA ekiniga aha maizi ga Meriba, Kyareetera Musa okugwa omu kabi ahabwabo," 
Psalms106:33 Ahabw'okuba bakagomera Omwoyo wa Ruhanga; Ekyo kyareetera Musa okugamba ebitahikire. 
Psalms106:34 Tibarahwerekyereize mahanga, Nk'oku MUKAMA yaabaragiire;" 
Psalms106:35 Kureka bakeejwanzya n'ago mahanga, Baayega kukora nkabo." 
Psalms106:36 Baaheereza ebishushan byabo ebirikuramibwa, Byabahindukira omutego." 
Psalms106:37 Kandi baahongyera baadaimoni abaana baabo, aboojo n'abaishiki, nk'ebitambo;" 
Psalms106:38 Baasheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja, Ey'abao boojo n'abaishiki baabo, Abu baahongyeire ebishushani ebyabaire nibiramibwa omuri Kanaani; Ensi yaasiisikara ahabw'okusheesha eshagama." 
Psalms106:39 Nikwo baasiisikaire batyo ahabw'emicwe yaabo, Bakahinduka abashambani omu bi baabaire nibakora." 
Psalms106:40 Nikyo ekiniga kya MUKAMA kyaiziire aha bantu be, Akatamirwa kimwe obuhunguzi bwe;" 
Psalms106:41 Akabahayo omu mikono y'abanyamahanga; Abaabaire nibabanga bakabategyeka. 
Psalms106:42 Abazigu baabo baababonabonesa; Baabagomoora, baabategyeka omu bushoboorozi bwabo." 
Psalms106:43 Kaingi akaba abakiza; Kwonka bamugomera omu naama zaabo, N'okutahikiirira kwabo kubagarura ahansi." 
Psalms106:44 N'obu byabaire biba bityo, ku yaabaire ahurira okutaka kwabo, Ata omutima aha busaasi bwabo," 
Psalms106:45 Aijuka endagaano ye ahabwabo, Ayegarukamu, nk'embabazi ze nyingi oku ziri." 
Psalms106:46 Abareetera okusaasirwa abo boona, Abaabaire baba babanyagire." 
Psalms106:47 Otujune, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, Otutaaruure, otwihe omu mahanga, Tubone kusiima eiziina ryawe eririkwera, Twesiimire okuhimbisibwa kwawe." 
Psalms106:48 MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli ahimbisibwe Okwiha ira ryona okuhitsya ebiro byona! Kandi abantu boona bagire bati: Amiina. Haleluya 
Psalms107:1 Yeimwe, musiime MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba ni murungi, Kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms107:2 Abacungwirwe MUKAMA bagire batyo, Abu yaacungwire, akabaiha omu mikono y'omuzigu," 
Psalms107:3 Akabataarura naabaiha omu nsi nyingi, Okuruga oburugwa-izooba, n'oburengyerwa-izooba, N'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'obwa-buryo." 
Psalms107:4 Bakazengyerera omu ihamba, Baabura omuhanda gw'okubahitsya omu rurembo rw'okutuuramu;" 
Psalms107:5 Baagira enjara n'eirho, Emitima yaabo yaagwa enshazi." 
Psalms107:6 Bwanyima baatakira MUKAMA omu naku zaabo, Yaabaiha omu busaasi bwabo;" 
Psalms107:7 Yaabahabura omuhanda ogugororokire, Ngu babone kuhika omu rurembo rw'okutuuramu." 
Psalms107:8 Kuri abantu basiima MUKAMA ahabw'embabazi ze, N'ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi akorera abantu!" 
Psalms107:9 Ahabw'okuba ahaazya omutima gw'oine eiriho, Kandi oine enjara amwigutsa ebirungi." 
Psalms107:10 Abamwe bakaba bashutami omu mwirima n'omu kibinda ky'okufa, Babohirwe obusaasi n'ebyoma," 
Psalms107:11 Ahabw'okugomera ebigambo bya Ruhanga, N'okugaya enaama za Rukira-boona." 
Psalms107:12 Nikyo yainikiire emitima yaabo n'emirimo erikurusya; Bakagwa ahansi, bakabura kihwera." 
Psalms107:13 Bwanyima bakatakira MUKAMA omu naku zaabo, Akabakiza obusaasi bwabo." 
Psalms107:14 Akabaiha omu mwirima n'omu kibunda ky'okufa, akacwanyagura enjegyere zaabo." 
Psalms107:15 Kuri abantu basiima MUKAMA ahabw'embabazi ze, N'ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi akorera abantu!" 
Psalms107:16 Ahakuba ahenda enyigi z'emiringa, Kandi atemamu kabiri empimbi z'ebyoma." 
Psalms107:17 Abashema bakabonabonesibwa ahabw'okushiisha kwabo N'ahabw'okutahikiirira kwabo; 
Psalms107:18 Amagara gaabo gaatamwa eby'okurya byona, Bairira haihi amarembo g'okufa." 
Psalms107:19 Bwanyima baatakira MUKAMA omu naku zaabo, Yaabaiha omu busaasi bwabo;" 
Psalms107:20 Taayohereza ekigambo kye, yaabakiza, Yaabaiha omu kuhwerekyerera kwabo." 
Psalms107:21 Kuri abantu basiima MUKAMA ahabw'embabazi ze, N'ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi akorera abantu!" 
Psalms107:22 Ka bahongye ebitambo by'okusiima, Bamanyisize omu kweshongora ebi yaakozire." 
Psalms107:23 Abarikuza aha nyanja omu meeri, Bakakorera emirimo yaabo omu mayanja," 
Psalms107:24 Nibo baareeba emirimo ya MUKAMA, N'eby'okutangaaza bye omuri ago maizi maingi." 
Psalms107:25 Ahakuba aragiira, eihunga ry'amaani riija, Riimutsya ebingonzi byayo." 
Psalms107:26 Batemba ahaiguru, bagaruka ahansi; Emitima yaabo eyaga ahabw'obusaasi;" 
Psalms107:27 Bagyenda nibazonga oku n'oku, nibagwererana nk'omusinzi, Baburirwa kimwe obwengye." 
Psalms107:28 Bwanyima batakira MUKAMA omu naku zaabo, Abaiha omu busaasi bwabo;" 
Psalms107:29 Acureeza eihunga, Rbingonzi byayo bituuza." 
Psalms107:30 Bwanyima bashemererwa ahabw'okutuuza; Kandi abahitsya aha nyambukiro ei baba nibeetenga. 
Psalms107:31 Kuri abantu basiima MUKAMA ahabw'embabazi ze, N'ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi akorera abantu!" 
Psalms107:32 Ka bamuye ekitiinisa omu mutwe gw'abantu, Bamuhimbisize omu ishengyero ry'abakuru." 
Psalms107:33 Emigyera agihindura eihamba ry'omusheenyi, N'enshuro z'amaizi azihindura empaama;" 
Psalms107:34 Kandi ensi erikweza agihindura eihamba ry'orwonyo ahabw'obubi bw'abagitwiremu. 
Psalms107:35 Kandi ahaindura eihamba ebiyanja by'amaizi, N'eitaka eryomire arifumuramu enshuro." 
Psalms107:36 Omwo nimwo atuuza abaine enjara, Ngu beeyombekyeremu orurembo rw'okutuuramu," 
Psalms107:37 Babibe embibo omu misiri, babyare emizaabibu, Beetungire emyaka eyezire munonga." 
Psalms107:38 Abaha omugisha, bakanya munonga; Kandi taikiriza nte zaabo kutuuba." 
Psalms107:39 Obundi ku batuuba, bagarurwa ahansi Ahabw'okubonabonesibwa n'enaku n'obusaasi," 
Psalms107:40 Areetera abakuru okugayirwa kimwe, Abazengyereza omu ihamba eritarimu kirari." 
Psalms107:41 Kwonka abakyene abatunguura, abaiha omu kubonabona, Abakanyisiza enganda nk'amasyo." 
Psalms107:42 Abahikiriire baryakireeba, beesiime; Okutahikiirira kwona kwigara akanwa." 
Psalms107:43 Oine obwengye weena ate omutima aha bigambo ebyo; Abantu bateekateekye ha mbabazi za MUKAMA. 
Psalms108:1 Omutima gwangye gugumire, ai Ruhanga. Ndyayeshongora; eego, ndyayeshongora eby'okuhimbisa n'obwengye bwangye." 
Psalms108:2 Musisiimukye, imwe enanga n'endingiri! Naanye ahabwangye niinyija kusisiimuka kare munonga." 
Psalms108:3 Ai MUKAMA, ndyakusiima omu bantu, Ndyayeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa omu mahanga." 
Psalms108:4 Ahakuba embabazi zaawe ni nyingi okukira eiguru, N'okwesigwa kwawe nikuhika omu bicu." 
Psalms108:5 Oteebwe ahaiguru okukira eiguru, ai Ruhanga, Ekitiinisa kyawe kibe ahaiguru y'ensi yoona." 
Psalms108:6 Ahabw'omukono gwawe ogwa buryo otuhe obusinguzi, otugarukyemu, Eihanga ryawe eririkukundwa ribone kukira abazigu." 
Psalms108:7 Ruhanga akeema omu Mwanya gwe ogurikwera, yaagira ati: Ndyabaganisa Shekemu n'okwesiima kuhango, Ngabe oruhanga rwa Sukoosi omu bicweka." 
Psalms108:8 Gileadi n'eyangye; na Manaase nayo n'eyangye; Efuraimu n'enkofiira y'okundinda; Yuda n'enkono yangye ey'obukama. 
Psalms108:9 Mobau n'ekinaabiro kyangye; Edomu niho nnaga enkaito yangye; Filistia niho nteerera akaari k'obusinguzi. 
Psalms108:10 N'oha orindeeta omu rurembo rw'orugo rugumire? Kandi orimpitsya Edomu n'oha? 
Psalms108:11 Ai Ruhanga, toratwangire? Ebi biro tokihurura na ngabo zaitu, ai Ruhanga." 
Psalms108:12 Otuhe emikono, turwanise ababisha baitu; Ahakuba okuhwera kw'abantu tikwine mugasho." 
Psalms108:13 Ahabw'amaani ga Ruhanga turyarwana mashaija; Ahakuba niwe ariribatiirira ababisha baitu. 
Psalms109:1 Ai Ruhanga ou ntuura nimpimbisa, oteetsiza," 
Psalms109:2 Ahakuba bakanyashamira n'akanwa k'obubi n'obugobya, Nibambeiherera." 
Psalms109:3 Bantangatangire n'ebigambo by'orwango, Nibandwanisiza busha." 
Psalms109:4 Okukunda oku ndikubakunda bakuzimwire okuba abazigu bangye; Kwonka nyowe nguma ninshaba. 
Psalms109:5 Batyo banzimuriire ebibi ahabw'ebirungi, Na rwango ahabw'okubakunda." 
Psalms109:6 Omutegyekyese omubi; Omuregi amwemerere aha rubaju rwa buryo. 
Psalms109:7 Ku araacwerwe orubanja, ashohore rumusingire; Okushaba kwe kuhindukye ekibi." 
Psalms109:8 Ebiro by'amagara ge bituube, Obureeberezi bwe butwarwe ondiijo." 
Psalms109:9 Abaana be babe efuuzi, N'omukazi we abe omufaakazi." 
Psalms109:10 Abaana be babe ebizengyerezi, basheegye; Babingwe omu matongo ahu baabaire batwire." 
Psalms109:11 Omwihuza anyagye byona ebi aine; Abanyamahanga banyagye ebi yaahendekyeire. 
Psalms109:12 Hatarigira owaamugirira embabazi, N'obu yaakuba ow'okusaasira efuuzi ze." 
Psalms109:13 Oruzaaro rwe rucwekyerezibwe; Omu busingye oburiija eiziina ryarwo ryebe. 
Psalms109:14 Okutahikiirira kwa baishenkuru kwijukwe MUKAMA, N'ekibi kya nyina kirekye kuragazibwa!" 
Psalms109:15 Bigume omumaisho ga MUKAMA obutoosha, amareho okwijukwa kwabo omu nsi;" 
Psalms109:16 Ahabw'okuba taraijukire kusaasira, Kureka akahiiga omukyene n'enshoberwa, N'ab'emitima ehendekire ngu abaite." 
Psalms109:17 Akakunda okukyeena; k'emikyeeno emuhikyeho; Tarashemerereirwe kushabira abandi omugisha; nkaahenwa ki gumuza hare. 
Psalms109:18 Akaba ajwara okukyeena nk'ekijwaro; Nkaahenwa ki kumuza omunda nk'amaizi, kandi nk'amajuta omu magufa ge." 
Psalms109:19 Kumuhindukira nk'omunagiro ogu ayehumbikire, N'omushumi ogu ayezirikisa obutoosha." 
Psalms109:20 Ebyo bibe nibyo byaba ebihembo by'abazigu bangye ebirikuruga ahari MUKAMA, N'abarikugamba kubi aha magara gangye." 
Psalms109:21 Kwonka Iwe RUHANGA Mukama wangye, ahabw'eiziina ryawe ongirire eby'embabazi; Onkize, ahabw'okuba okusaasira kwawe ni kurungi;" 
Psalms109:22 Ahakuba ndi omukyene kandi enshoberwa; N'omutima gwangye guhutaire omunda yangye. 
Psalms109:23 Bingyendera kimwe, mpwaho nk'ekirengabazaana; Nkunkumurwa, naaagwa nk'oruzigye." 
Psalms109:24 Amaju gangye tigaine maani ahabw'okusiibakwo; Omubiri gwangye guhururukire ahabw'okubura ebishaju. 
Psalms109:25 Mpindukire ekirikugaywa aharibo; Ku barikundeeba, bazongoza emitwe yaabo." 
Psalms109:26 Mpwera, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye; Onjune, nk'oku embabazi zaawe ziri," 
Psalms109:27 Babone kumanya ngu ebyo n'omukono gwawe; Niiwe obikozire, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms109:28 Bo ka bakyeene, kwonka Iwe ohe omugisha; Ku baraimukye, bakwatwe enshoni; Kwonka omwiru waawe ashemererwe!" 
Psalms109:29 Ababisha bangye bajwekwe okugaywa; Beehumbikye enshoni zaabo nk'omunagiro.
