Psalms109:30 Ndyasiima MUKAMA munonga n'akanwa kangye; Eego, ndyamuhimbisa omu iteeraniro rihango ry'abantu;" 
Psalms109:31 Ahakuba ayemerera aha rubaju rwa buryo rw'enshoberwa, Okugikiza abarikugicwera orubanja rw'okufa." 
Psalms110:1 MUKAMA akagambira Mukama wangye ati: Shutama aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo, Okuhitsya obu ndigira abazigu baawe akatebe k'ebigyere byawe." 
Psalms110:2 MUKAMA aryayohereza enkoni y'obushoboorozi bwawe, ari omuri Saayuuni; Otegyekye ahagati omu bazigu baawe." 
Psalms110:3 Abantu baawe baryayehayo beekundiire aha izooba eri origabiraho engabo, Abatsigazi baawe baije ah'ori nk'ekime, Bajwaire eby'obwecumi ebirikwera, baimukire kare omu kasheeshe." 
Psalms110:4 MUKAMA akarahira, kandi taryefuuza, naagira ati: Ori omunyamurwa w'ebiro byona omu muringo gwa Melikizedeki." 
Psalms110:5 Mukama ari aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo; Aryacwanyagura abagabe aha izooba ry'ekiniga kye. 
Psalms110:6 Aryacwa emanja omu mahanga. Aryaijuza emyanya emitumbi, Ayatagurire emitwe y'engabo omu mwanya gugarami." 
Psalms110:7 Aryanywa aha kagyera k'omu muhanda; Nikyo kirimureetera kwimutsya omutwe. 
Psalms111:1 Haleluya. Ndyasiima MUKAMA n'omutima gwangye gwona, Omu ishengyero r'abahikiriire n'omu mutwe gwabo." 
Psalms111:2 Ebi MUKAMA akora ni bikuru, Abarikubishemerererwa babyetegyereza." 
Psalms111:3 Emirimo ye n'ey'ekitiinisa n'obukuru, Kandi obkuhikirira kwe n'okw'ebiro byona." 
Psalms111:4 Areetera emirimo ye ey'okutangaaza okwijukwa. MUKAMA n'ow'embabazi, kandi ow'okusaasira kwingi." 
Psalms111:5 Abarikumutiina abaha eby'okurya; Aryaguma naijuka endagaano ye. 
Psalms111:6 Akooreka abantu be ebi yaakozire oku biri bikuru, Obu yaabaha obuhunguzi bw'abanyamahanga." 
Psalms111:7 Ebi yaakozire n'emikono ye n'eby'okwesigwa kandi eby'oburyo; Ebiragiro bye byona bihamire. 
Psalms111:8 Bikateebwaho kuba eby'ebiro n'ebiro; Byaragiirwa omu mazima n'okuhikiirira. 
Psalms111:9 Akatwekyera abantu be eky'okubacungura; Yaataho endagaano ye kuba ey'ebiro byona; Eiziina rye niryera kandi n'ery'okutiinwa. 
Psalms111:10 Omu kutiina MUKAMA nimwo obwengye bukomooka; Boona abakugyenderamu baine okwetegyereza kurungi. Okuhimbisibwa kwe n'okw'ebiro byona. 
Psalms112:1 Haleluya. Aine omugisha omuntu orikutiina MUKAMA, Akashemerererwa munonga ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms112:2 Baijukuru be baryaba ab'amaani omu nsi; Oruzaaro rw'ohikiriire ruryaheebwa omugisha. 
Psalms112:3 Eitungo n'obutungi biryaba omu nju ye; Kandi okuhikiirira kwe kuryaba okw'ebiro n'ebiro. 
Psalms112:4 Ow'omutima ogugororokire ajwerwa omushana omu mwirima, Gujwera oine embabazi n'okusaasira kwingi kandi ohikiriire." 
Psalms112:5 Aine omugisha omuntu ogira obufura, akaguza abandi, akakora emiromo ye omu buryo buhikire;" 
Psalms112:6 Ahakuba ohikiriire taritengyetsibwa, Aryaijukwa ebiro byona." 
Psalms112:7 Taritiinisibwa nkuru mbi; Omutima gwe guhamire nigwesiga MUKAMA. 
Psalms112:8 Omutima gwe guhamiire hamwe, taritiina, Okuhitsya obu arireeba ebi arikwetengyera abazigu be." 
Psalms112:9 Akagabisa obufura, yaagabira abooro; Okuhikiirira kwe nikugumaho ebiro byona; Eihembe rye riryatunguurwa n'ekitiinisa." 
Psalms112:10 Omubi aryakireeba, aguubwe kubi; Aryanena enshaya, ahwereho kimwe; Eki omubi ayetenga kiryabura."

Psalms116:4 Ahonaaho naatakira eiziina rya MUKAMA, Nti: Ai MUKAMA, ninkweshengyereza, juna amagara gangye!"

Psalms116:19 Omu bikaari by'enju ya MUKAMA Ahagati yaawe, iwe Yerusaalemu. Haleluya!"

Psalms118:1 Nimusiime MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba ni murungi; Kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona." 
Psalms118:2 Israeli agire ati: Embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona. 
Psalms118:3 Ab'enju ya Arooni bagire bati: Embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona. 
Psalms118:4 Abatiina MUKAMA bagire bati: Embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona. 
Psalms118:5 Ku naabaire ndi omu busaasi, nkatakira MUKAMA, MUKAMA yangarukamu, yanta omu mwanya gugarami." 
Psalms118:6 MUKAMA ari aha rubaju rwangye, tinditiina; Omuntu naabaasa kungira ata?" 
Psalms118:7 MUKAMA ari aha rubaju rwangye kumpwera; N'ahabw'ekyo ndyareeba eki ndikwetengyera abarikuunyanga. 
Psalms118:8 Ni kirungi okwesiga MUKAMA Okukira okwesiga abantu; 
Psalms118:9 Ni kirungi okwesiga MUKAMA Okukira okwesiga abategyeki. 
Psalms118:10 Amahanga goona gantangatangire; Omu iziina rya MUKAMA ndyagahwerekyereza. 
Psalms118:11 Gantangatangire; buzima gantangatangire; Omu iziina rya MUKAMA ndyagahwerekyereza. 
Psalms118:12 Bampumbatsi nk'enjoki, Nibabuguma nk'omuriro gw'amahwa; Omu iziina rya MUKAMA ndyabahwerekyereza." 
Psalms118:13 Baanyohire kungwisa; Kwonka MUKAMA yampwera. 
Psalms118:14 MUKAMA niwe maani gangye n'ekyeshongoro kyangye; Kandi ahindukire okujunwa kwangye. 
Psalms118:15 Eiraka ry'okushemererwa ahabw'okujunwa Nirihurirwa omu mahema g'abahikiriire; Omukono gwa buryo gwa MUKAMA gukora eby'obumanzi. 
Psalms118:16 Omukono gwa buryo gwa MUKAMA gubangirwe; Omukono gwa buryo gwa MUKAMA gukora eby'obumanzi. 
Psalms118:17 Tindifa, kureka ndyagumaho, Mmanyise abantu ebi MUKAMA yaakozire." 
Psalms118:18 MUKAMA akampana munonga; Kwonka tarampaireyo hari rufu. 
Psalms118:19 Muunyigurire amarambo g'okuhikiirira, Ntaahemu, nsiime MUKAMA." 
Psalms118:20 Eri niryo irembo rya MUKAMA; Abahikiriire nibo baririrabamu. 
Psalms118:21 Ninkusiima, ahabw'okuba ongarukiremu, Waahinduka okujunwa kwangye." 
Psalms118:22 Eibaare eri abombeki baayangire, Niryo ryahindukire erikuru ery'obuhamizo bw'enju," 
Psalms118:23 Ekyo kikaruga ahari MUKAMA, Kandi n'eky'okutangaaza omu maisho gaitu." 
Psalms118:24 Eri niryo izooba eri MUKAMA yaataireho; Ka turishemerererwa, turyesiimireho." 
Psalms118:25 Ai MUKAMA, nitukweshengyereza, otujune; Ai MUKAMA, nitukweshengyereza, otuhe okuhitsya gye ebi turikukora." 
Psalms118:26 Orikwija omu iziina rya MUKAMA aine omugisha; Twabashabira omugisha turi omu nju ya MUKAMA. 
Psalms118:27 MUKAMA niwe Ruhanga, kandi atujwisza omushana. Mubohese ekitambo emigoye, mukitware aha mahembe g'eitambiro." 
Psalms118:28 Niiwe Ruhanga wangye, ninkusiima; Niiwe Ruhanga wangye, ninkuha ekitiinisa." 
Psalms118:29 Musiime MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba ni murungi; Kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms119:1 Baine omugisha abu emitwarize yaabo ehikire, Abagyendera omu kutegyekwa ebiragiro bya MUKAMA." 
Psalms119:2 Baine omugisha abarinda ebi yaahamize, Abamusherura n'omutima gwabo gwona," 
Psalms119:3 Kandi abatakora kibi kyona, Kureka abagyendera omu mihanda ye." 
Psalms119:4 Okatuha ebiragiro byawe, Ngu twezirikye kubyorobera." 
Psalms119:5 Nkaahenwa ki emitwarize yangye eba ehamire, Mbona kworobera ebi waataireho!" 
Psalms119:6 Ku ndita omutima aha biragiro byawe byona, Tindikwatwa nshoni." 
Psalms119:7 Ndyakusiima n'omutima ogugororokire, Ku ndiba naayegire emicwere yaawe ey'oburyo." 
Psalms119:8 Ndyaguma ndinde ebi waataireho; Ai bambe, otantsigiraho kimwe." 
Psalms119:9 Omutsigazi aryashemeza ata omuhanda gwe? Aryagushemeza ahabw'okugurinda, nk'ekigambo kyawe oku kiri." 
Psalms119:10 Ninkusherura n'omutima gwangye gwona; Otandeka kuruga omu biragiro byawe, nkahaba." 
Psalms119:11 Ekigambo kyawe nkibiikire omu mutima gwangye, Ngu ndekye kukucumuraho." 
Psalms119:12 Ori ow'okusiimwa, ai MUKAMA; Onyegyese ebiragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:13 Nkagambira abantu n'eminwa yangye Emanja zoona ezi waacwire. 
Psalms119:14 Nyesiimira omuhanda gw'ebi waahamize, Nk'oku nyesiimira okugira eitungo ryona." 
Psalms119:15 Ndyateekateeka munonga aha kuhabura kwawe, Nte omutima gwangye aha mihanda yaawe." 
Psalms119:16 Ndyayesiimira ebiragiro ebi waataireho; N'ekigambo kyawe tindikyebwa. 
Psalms119:17 Ogirire omwiru waawe embabazi nyingi, mbone kuguma ndi ohuriire; Haza ngume nyorobere ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:18 Humuura amaisho gangye, Mbone kureeba eby'okutangaaza eby'omu biragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:19 Omu nsi ndi empinguzi; Otanshereka ebiragiro byawe. 
Psalms119:20 Omutima gwangye gucwekire ahabw'okwetenga Ebi oragiira buri kaanya. 
Psalms119:21 Okahana ab'amaryo abakyeenirwe, Abarikuhaba okuruga omu biragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:22 Onyiheho okujunwa n'okugaywa; Ahabw'okuba ndinzire ebi waahamize. 
Psalms119:23 Abanyiginya n'obu baraabe baashutamire bakangiira omu naama, Kwonka omwiru waawe naija kuguma naateekateeka aha biragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:24 Ebi waahamize nibyo nshemerererwa, Kandi nibyo bimpa obwengye." 
Psalms119:25 Amagara gangye gakwataniire kimwe n'omucuucu; Ompimbuure, nk'ekigambo kyawe oku kiri." 
Psalms119:26 Ku naakugambiire eby'emihanda yangye, wangarukamu; Onyegyese ebiragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:27 Ommanyise omuhanda gw'ebi oyegyesa, Mbone kuguma ninteekateeaka aha by'okutangaaza ebi waakozire." 
Psalms119:28 Omutima gwangye niguyaga ahabw'obusaasi; Ongaruremu amaani, nk'ekigambo kyawe oku kiri." 
Psalms119:29 Onyiheho emitwarize y'ebishuba; Ahabw'embabazi zaawe onyegyese ebiragiro byawe. 
Psalms119:30 Nyihiremu omuhanda gw'obwesigwa; Emicwere yaawe ngitaire omu maisho gangye. 
Psalms119:31 Mpamiire aha bi waahamize; Ai MUKAMA, otankwatsa enshoni." 
Psalms119:32 Ku oriha omutima gwangye obusingye. Ndyaguma niinyiruka, ndi omu muhanda gw'ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:33 Ai MUKAMA, onyegyese omuhanda gw'ebiragiro ebi waataireho; Ndyagugumamu okuhitsya aha muheru." 
Psalms119:34 Ompe okwetegyereza, mbone kworobera ebiragiro byawe, N'okubikwata n'omutima gwangye gwona." 
Psalms119:35 Ongyendese omu muhanda gw'ebiragiro byawe; Ahakuba nigwo nshemerererwamu. 
Psalms119:36 Okundise omutima gwangye ebi waahamize, Gurekye kuhugira omu kwetenga." 
Psalms119:37 Ohindure amaisho gangye, garekye kureeba ebitaine mugasho; Ompimbuure, ngyendere omu mihanda yaawe." 
Psalms119:38 Ohamize omwiru waawe ekigambo kyawe, Ekyaraganisiibwe abarikukutiina." 
Psalms119:39 Ompinguzeho ekijumo eki ndikutiina; Ahakuba emicwere yaawe ni mirungi. 
Psalms119:40 Reeba, ntuura niinyetenga ebi oyegyesa; Omu kuhikiirira kwawe ompe amagara." 
Psalms119:41 Embabazi zaawe zimpikyeho, ai MUKAMA, Nikwo kujuna kwawe, nk'ekigambo kyawe oku kiri;" 
Psalms119:42 Mbone kugira eky'okugarukamu orikunjuma; Ahakuba nyesiga ekigambo kyawe. 
Psalms119:43 Kandi ekigambo ky'amazima otakiihira kimwe omu kanwa kangye; Ahakuba nyine amatsiko aha micwere yaawe; 
Psalms119:44 Nahabw'ekyo ndyaguma nyorobere ebiragiro byawe Ebiro n'ebiro. 
Psalms119:45 Kandi ndyaguma ngyende n'obusingye; Ahakuba nsherwire ebi oyegyesa. 
Psalms119:46 Ndyagambira omu maisho g'abagabe ebi waahamize, Kandi tindikwatwa nshoni." 
Psalms119:47 Ndyashemerererwa ebiragiro byawe, Ebi naakunzire." 
Psalms119:48 Ndyaha ekitiinisa ebiragiro byawe, ebi naakunzire; Kandi ndyaguma ninteekateeka aha biragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:49 Ijuka ekigambo eki waagambiire omwiru waawe, Eki wangiriizemu amatsiko." 
Psalms119:50 Ekyo nikyo kimpuumuza omutima omu kubonabona kwangye; Ahakuba ekigambo kyawe kingarwiremu amagara. 
Psalms119:51 Ab'amaryo bakanshekyerera munonga; Kwonka tinaateishuka kureka ebiragiro byawe. 
Psalms119:52 Ku nyijuka emicwere yaawe eya ira, ai MUKAMA, Ngarukwa omutima omunda." 
Psalms119:53 Ngira ekiniga kingi, Ahabw'ababi abarikureka ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:54 Ebiragiro ebi waataireho bimbeereire ebyeshongoro Omu nju ei ncumbikiremu 
Psalms119:55 Ai MUKAMA, ntuura niinyijuka eiziina ryawe nyekiro, Kandi nyorobera ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:56 Omugisha ogu nkagutunga Ahabw'okworobera ebi oyegyesa. 
Psalms119:57 Mukama niwe mugabo gwangye; Nkagira nti: Ndyayorobera ebigambo byawe. 
Psalms119:58 Ninkweshengyereza n'omutima gwangye gwona, ongirire embabazi; Onsaasire, nk'ekigambo kyawe oku kiri." 
Psalms119:59 Ku naateekateekire aha mihanda yangye, Naahindura ebigyere byangye kukuratira ebi waahamize;" 
Psalms119:60 Naarahuka kworobera ebiragiro byawe, Tinaayeziringa." 
Psalms119:61 Emigoye y'ababi n'obu eraabe yanzingazingire, Kwonka tineebwaga biragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:62 Obutoosha nyimuka omu itumbi kukusiima Ahabw'emicwere yaawe ey'oburyo. 
Psalms119:63 Ndi mugyenzi wa boona abakutiina, Kandi n'abakwata ebi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:64 Ai MUKAMA, ensi eijwire okusaasira kwawe; Onyegyese ebiragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:65 Otwarize gye omwiru waawe, Ai MUKAMA, nk'oku ekigambo kyawe kiri." 
Psalms119:66 Onyegyese okucwamu ekihikire, kandi n'okumanya; Ahakuba nyikirize ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:67 Obu naabaire ntakabonabonesiibwe, nkahaba; Kwonka hati niinyorobera ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:68 Ori murungi, kandi okora ebirungi; Onyegyese ebiragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:69 Ab'amaryo bancwereire ekishuba; Kwonka ndyakwata ebi oyegyesa n'omutima gwangye gwona. 
Psalms119:70 Omutima gwabo gugomokire n'ekirite; Kwonka nyowe nyesiimira ebiragiro byawe. 
Psalms119:71 Kikangasira okubonabonesibwa, Ngu mbone kwega ebiragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:72 Ebiragiro by'omu kanwa kangye nibimpitira Ebicweka rukumi eby'ezaabu n'efeeza. 
Psalms119:73 Engaro zaawe nizo zampangire, kandi nizo zambumbire; Ompe okwetegyereza, mbone kwega ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:74 Abarikukutiina baryandeeba, bashemererwe; Ahabw'okuba ntuura nyine amatsiko aha kigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:75 Ai MUKAMA, nimmanya ngu emicwere yaawe n'ey'oburyo, Kandi ngu okambonabonesa omu bwesigwa." 
Psalms119:76 Ninkweshengyereza embabazi zaawe ezitahinduka zibe ez'okumpuumuza omutima, Nk'ekigambo eki waagambiire omwiru waawe oku kiri." 
Psalms119:77 Embabazi zaawe zimpikyeho, mbone kugama ndi ohuriire; Ahakuba ebiragiro byawe nibyo nshemerererwa." 
Psalms119:78 Ab'amaryo bakwatwe enshoni, ahabw'okunteerera ahansi busha, Kwonka nyowe ndyaguma nteekateekye aha kuhabura kwawe." 
Psalms119:79 Abarikukutiina bampindukire, Babone kumanya ebi waahamize." 
Psalms119:80 Omutima gwangye gube oguhikire omu biragiro ebi waataireho, Ndekye kukwatwa enshoni." 
Psalms119:81 Amagara gangye gagwire enshazi ahabw'okwetenga okujuna kwawe; Kandi ekigambo kyawe nikyo nyineho amatsiko. 
Psalms119:82 Amaisho gampotokire ahabw'okutegyereza ekigambo kyawe, Nimbuuza nti: Oryampuumuza ryari omutima?" 
Psalms119:83 Ahakuba mpindukire nk'efurebe ehanikire omu mwika; Kwonka tinkeebwaga biragiro ebi waataireho. 
Psalms119:84 Omwiru waawe aryahitsya hi okugumisiriza? Oryacwa ryari orubanja rw'abarikumpiiga? 
Psalms119:85 Ab'amaryo abatoorobera biragiro byawe, Bandimiire obusya." 
Psalms119:86 Ebiragiro byawe byona n'eby'okwesigwa; Nibampiigira busha; ompe emikono. 
Psalms119:87 Bari haihi kuunyiha omu nsi; Kwonka tinkarekire bi oyegyesa. 
Psalms119:88 Mpimbuura, nk'embabazi zaawe nyingi oku ziri; Mbone kworobera ebi akanwa kaawe kahamize." 
Psalms119:89 Ai MUKAMA, ekigambo kyawe kihamire omu iguru ebiro byona." 
Psalms119:90 Okwesigwa kwawe kugumaho okuhitsya obusingye bwona; Okataho ensi, yaahamira kimwe." 
Psalms119:91 Bikiriho n'eri izooba nk'oku waaragiire; Ahakuba ebintu byona biba abairu baawe. 
Psalms119:92 Kuri ntarashemerereirwe biragiro byawe, Nkaahwerekyerereire omu kubonabona kwangye." 
Psalms119:93 Tindyebwa bi oyegyesa; Ahabw'okuba nibyo ompeereiremu amagara. 
Psalms119:94 Ndi owaawe; onjune; Ahakuba nsherwire ebi oyegyesa. 
Psalms119:95 Ababi bangwereire kuunyita; Kwonka niinyija kuteekateeka aha bi waahamize. 
Psalms119:96 Ndeebire ngu ebihikire byona biine obugarukiro; Kwonka ebiragiro byawe nibihika hare munonga. 
Psalms119:97 Eshi nkunda ebiragiro byawe! Nibyo nsiiba ninteekateekaho eizooba ryona. 
Psalms119:98 Ebi oragiira bimpa obwengye oburikukira obw'abazigu bangye; Ahakuba biguma naanye obutoosha. 
Psalms119:99 Nyine okwetegyereza okurikweshumba okw'abarikuunyegyesa boona; Ahakuba ebi waahamize nibyo ntuura ninteekateekaho. 
Psalms119:100 Niinyetegyereza okukira abagurusi, Ahakuba nyorobera ebi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:101 Nzibira ebigyere byangye kutoora omuhanda gwona omubi, Ngu mbone kworobera ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:102 Tinkateishukaga micwere yaawe; Ahakuba niiwe onyegyesa. 
Psalms119:103 Ebigambo byawe ka nibinnurira, Nibinnurira munonga okukira obwoki!" 
Psalms119:104 Ebi oyegyesa bimpa okwetegyereza; Nikyo nyangira omuhanda gwona ogw'ebishuba. 
Psalms119:105 Ekigambo kyawe n'etabaaza emurika ebigyere byangye, N'omushana ogujwera omuhanda gwangye." 
Psalms119:106 Nkarahira endahiro, kandi naagihamya, Nti: Ndyayorobera emicwere yaawe ey'oburyo." 
Psalms119:107 Nimbonabona munonga; Mpimbuura nk'ekigambo kyawe oku kiri, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms119:108 Ninweshengyereza, oyakiire empongano zangye ez'okuhimbisa, Kandi onyegyese emicwere yaawe, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms119:109 Amagara gangye gari omu kabi obutoosha, Kwonka tinkeebwaga biragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:110 Ababi bantegire omutego, Kwonka tinkahabaga kuruga omu bi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:111 Ebi waahamize nibwo buhunguzi bwangye ebiro byona; Buzima nibyo omutima gwangye gushemerererwa. 
Psalms119:112 Ntaire omutima gwangye aha kuhitsya ebiragiro byawe ebi waataireho Ebiro byona okuhitsya aha muheru. 
Psalms119:113 Nyanga abantu b'emitima ebiri; Kwonka ebiragiro byawe nibyo nkunda. 
Psalms119:114 Niiwe bweshereko bwangye, kandi engabo yangye; Nyesiga ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:115 Imwe nkozi z'ebibi 'mwe, mundugyeho, Mbone kworobera ebiragiro bya Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms119:116 Onkwatirire, mbone kugumaho, nk'okuraganisa kwawe oku kuri, Ndekye kukwatirwa enshoni amatsiko gangye." 
Psalms119:117 Ondamire, mbone kugira obusingye, N'okuguma ninta omutima aha biragiro bi waataireho." 
Psalms119:118 Ogaya abahaba okuruga omu biragiro byawe; Buzima, obwengye bwabo n'obwa busha." 
Psalms119:119 Omaraho ababi boona ab'ensi nk'enkamba; Nikyo nkundira ebi waahamize. 
Psalms119:120 Omubiri gwangye nigutetema ahabw'okukutiina; Kandi n'emicwere yaawe ningitiina. 
Psalms119:121 Nkozire eby'oburyo n'ebya'amazima; Otandekyera abarikuunyita kubi. 
Psalms119:122 Oyemererere omwiru waawe ahabw'oburungi; Ab'amaryo barekye kuunyita kubi. 
Psalms119:123 Amaisho gangye gahotokire ahabw'okutegyereza okujuna kwawe, N'ahabw'ekigambo kyawe eky'okuhikiirira." 
Psalms119:124 Otwaze omwiru waawe, nk'oku embabazi zaawe ziri. Kandi onyegyese ebiragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:125 Ndi omwiru waawe, ompe okwetegyereza, Mbone kumanya ebi waahamize." 
Psalms119:126 Obunaku bwa MUKAMA obw'okukoreramu bwahika; Ahakuba ebiragiro byawe babihindwire busha. 
Psalms119:127 Nikyo ndikukundira ebiragiro byawe Okukira ezaabu, n'obu yaakuba ezaabu enungi munonga." 
Psalms119:128 Nikyo nteekateekyera ngu ebi oyegyesa aha bintu byona bihikire; Kandi nyanga omuhanga gwona ogw'ebishuba. 
Psalms119:129 Ebi waahamize n'eby'okutangaaza; Nikyo kireetera omutima gwangye kubyorobera. 
Psalms119:130 Ebigambo byawe, ku bishuuruurwa, bireeta omushana; Biha aboorobi okwetegyereza." 
Psalms119:131 Nkaashamya akanwa kangye, nyine ekyaka, Ahabw'okwetenga munonga ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:132 Ompindukire, ongirire embabazi; Nk'oku ozigirira abakunda eiziina ryawe." 
Psalms119:133 Oshoronzye ebigyere byangye omu kigambo kyawe; Otaikiriza okutahikiirira kwona kuntegyeka. 
Psalms119:134 Oncungure, ndekye kwitwa kubi abantu; Mbone kworobera ebi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:135 Oyakize omwiru waawe omushana gw'amaisho gaawe, Onyegyese ebiragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:136 Amaisho gangye gahimintika obutoosha emigyera y'amaizi, Ahabw'abntu kutoorobera biragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:137 Ai MUKAMA, ori ohikiriire; Kandi emicwere yaawe n'ey'oburyo." 
Psalms119:138 Okataho ebi waahamize omu kuhikiirira N'omu bwesigwa buzima. 
Psalms119:139 Obweziriki bwangye bummazireho, Ahakuba ababisha bangye beebirwe ebigambo byawe." 
Psalms119:140 Ekigambo kyawe kishemeire munonga; Nikyo omwiru waawe akikundira. 
Psalms119:141 Tiinyine ku ndi, nibangaya; Kwonka tinkeebwaga bi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:142 Okuhikiirira kwawe n'okw'ebiro n'ebiro; Kandi ebiragiro byawe n'amazima. 
Psalms119:143 Enaku n'obusaasi binkwatsire; Kwonka ebiragiro byawe nibyo nshemerererwa. 
Psalms119:144 Ebi waahamzie bituura bihikiriire ebiro byona; Ompe okwetegyereza, mbone kuguma ndi ohuriire." 
Psalms119:145 Ai MUKAMA, ninkutakira n'omutima gwangye gwona; Ongarukyemu, mbone kworobera ebiragiro ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:146 Ninkutakira; njuna; Mbone kworobera ebi waahamize. 
Psalms119:147 Nyimuka omushekye gutakajugutsire kukutakira, Ntaire amatsiko aha bigambo byawe." 
Psalms119:148 Ku nsisiimuka, amaisho gangye gaguma nigareeba, obunaku bw'okusisiimuka nyekiro butakahikire, Ngu mbone kuguma ninteekateeka aha kigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:149 Hurira eiraka ryangye, nk'embabazi zaawe ezitahinduka oku ziri; Ompimbuure, ai MUKAMA, nk'oku emicwere yaawe eri." 
Psalms119:150 Abarikumpiiga ahabw'eitima nibaanyirira haihi; Ebiragiro byawe bibari hare. 
Psalms119:151 Kwonka Iwe ai MUKAMA, ori haihi; Ebiragiro byawe byona n'amazima." 
Psalms119:152 Kandi mmazire omwanya muhango nimmanyira aha bi waahamize, Ku waabitaireho kugumaho ebiro byona." 
Psalms119:153 Teekateeka aha kubonabona kwangye, onjune; Ahakuba tiinyebwa biragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:154 Ontonganire, kandi oncungure; Ompimbuure, nk'ekigambo kyawe oku kiri." 
Psalms119:155 Ababi okujunwa kubari hare; Ahakuba tabata mutima ha biragiro ebi waataireho. 
Psalms119:156 Ai MUKAMA, embabazi zaawe ni nyingi; Ompimbuure, nk'emicwere yaawe ey'oburyo oku eri." 
Psalms119:157 Abarikumpiiga n'abazigu bangye ni baingi; Kwonka tinkateishukaga kureka ebi waahamize. 
Psalms119:158 Nkareeba abarikukora eby'obugobya, bantama; Ahakuba tiboorobera biragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:159 Teekateeka oku nkunda ebi oyegyesa; Ompimbuure, ai MUKAMA, nk'embabazi zaawe ezitahinduka oku ziri." 
Psalms119:160 Okutwarira hamwe ekigambo kyawe kyona gaba amazima; Emicwere yaawe yoona ey'oburyo egumaho ebiro byona. 
Psalms119:161 Abanyiginya bampiigira busha; Kwonka ebigmabo byawe bikwatsa omutima gwangye obwoba. 
Psalms119:162 Nshemerererwa ekigambo kyawe, Nk'owaagwa aha minyago mingi." 
Psalms119:163 Nyanga ebishuba, kandi mbinuga; Kwonka ebiragiro byawe mbikunda." 
Psalms119:164 Buri izooba nkuhimbisa emirundi mushanju, Ahabw'emicwere yaawe y'oburyo." 
Psalms119:165 Abakunda ebiragiro byawe baine obusingye bwingi; Tihariho kirikubaasa kubateeza entsibo. 
Psalms119:166 Ai MUKAMA, ntegyereize okujuna kwawe; Kandi nkora ebi oragiira." 
Psalms119:167 Omutima gwangye gworobera ebi waahamize; 
Psalms119:168 Obutoosha nyorobera ebi oyegyesa n'ebi waahamize; Ahakuba emitwarize yangye yoona eri omu maisho gaawe. 
Psalms119:169 Ai MUKAMA, ikiriza okutaka kwangye kukuhikyeho; Ompe okwetegyereza, nk'ekigambo kyawe oku kiri." 
Psalms119:170 Okweshengyereza kwangye kuhikye omu maisho gaawe; Onkize nk'ekigambo kyawe oku kiri. 
Psalms119:171 Eminwa yangye eryagamba eby'okuhimbisa; Ahakuba onyegyesa ebiragiro ebi waataireho. 
Psalms119:172 Orurimi rwangye ruryayeshongora eby'ekigambo kyawe; Ahakuba ebiragiro byawe byona bihikire. 
Psalms119:173 Omukono gwawe gugume gweteekateekire kumpwera; Ahakuba nkatoorana ebi oyegyesa. 
Psalms119:174 Ntuura niinyetenga munonga okujuna kwawe, ai MUKAMA; Kandi ebiragiro byawe nibyo nshemerererwa." 
Psalms119:175 Ondekye ngume ndi ohuriire, mbone kukuhimbisa; Emicwere yaawe ey'oburyo empwere." 
Psalms119:176 Mpabire nk'entaama ebuzire; sherura omwiru waawe; Ahakuba tiinyebwa biragiro byawe. 
Psalms120:1 Omu busaasi bwangye nkatakira MUKAMA, yangarukamu." 
Psalms120:2 Ai MUKAMA, kiza amagara gangye eminwa erikubeiha, N'orurimi orurikugobya." 
Psalms120:3 Iwe rurimi orurikugobya 'we, baryakuha ki, Kandi baryakukorera ki ekindi?" 
Psalms120:4 Emyambi y'obwogi y'amamanzi, N'amakara g'omushasha." 
Psalms120:5 Ka ndeebire enaku ahabw'okushuhuukira Mesheki, N'okutuura omu mahema ga Kedari." 
Psalms120:6 Mmazire omwanya muhango, Ntwire n'abarikwanga obusingye." 
Psalms120:7 Nyowe eki nkunda n'obusingye; Kwonka ku ngamba, bo baimutsya orugamba." 
Psalms121:1 Nyimutsye amaisho gangye aha bibungo? Okuhwerwa kwangye kuruga hi? 
Psalms121:2 Okuhwera kwangye kuruga ahari MUKAMA, Owaahangire eiguru n'ensi." 
Psalms121:3 Tariikiriza kigyere kyawe kutsimbuka; Orikukurinda tarihungira. 
Psalms121:4 Reeba, Orikurinda Israeli taruhingira, n'obu kwakuba okugwejegyera." 
Psalms121:5 MUKAMA niwe Murinzi waawe, MUKAMA niwe ky'okwesangira kyawe aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo." 
Psalms121:6 Izooba tiririkuteera nyomushana, N'obu kwakuba okwezi nyekiro." 
Psalms121:7 MUKAMA aryakurinda akabi koona; Niwe aririnda amagara gaawe. 
Psalms121:8 MUKAMA aryakurinda omu magyenda n'amagaruka, Okwiha hati okuhitsya ebiro byona." 
Psalms122:1 Nkashemererwa ku bangambiire Ngu tugyende omu nju ya MUKAMA. 
Psalms122:2 Iwe Yerusaalemu, ebigyere byaitu Byemereire omu marembo gaawe," 
Psalms122:3 Iwe Yerusaalemu eyaayombekirwe Nk'orurembo orukwataine," 
Psalms122:4 Ei enganda ziinamuka, nizo nganda za MUKAMA, Kuba eky'okuhamya ahari Israeli, n'okusiima eiziina rya MUKAMA." 
Psalms122:5 Ahakuba niyo baataire ebitebe by'okucweraho emanja, Nibyo bitebe by'obugabe eby'enju ya Daudi." 
Psalms122:6 Mushabire Yerusaalemu obusingye; Abarikukukunda baryagogyera. 
Psalms122:7 Obusingye bugume omunda y'orugo rwawe, N'omu bikaari byawe habemu omugisha." 
Psalms122:8 Ahabwa beene waitu na bagyenzi bangye Ningira nti: Obusingye bugume omuriiwe! 
Psalms122:9 Ahabw'enju ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu Ndyateeraho kusherura oku ndaabaase kukukorera gye. 
Psalms123:1 Iwe oshutami omu iguru, Niiwe nyimukiza amaisho." 
Psalms123:2 Reeba, nk'oku abahuuku bahanga mukama waabo amaisho, N'abazaana nk'oku bagahanga mugore waabo, Naitwe nikwo tuhangiire MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu amaisho, Okuhitsya obu aritugirira embabazi." 
Psalms123:3 Otugirire embabazi, ai MUKAMA, otugirire embabazi, Ahakuba barengyesereize kutugaya." 
Psalms123:4 Amagara gaitu gatamiirwe kimwe okuteererwa enaku abagaramisiriize, N'okugaywa ab'amaryo." 
Psalms124:1 MUKAMA ku araabe yaabaire atari ha rubaju rwaitu, Israeli naakigambe hati mbwenu-" 
Psalms124:2 MUKAMA kuri yaabaire atari ha rubaju rwaitu, Obu abantu baimuka kuturwanisa," 
Psalms124:3 Obwo bakaatumizire tuhuriire, Obu ekiniga kyatwakaho nk'omuriro;" 
Psalms124:4 Obwo amaizi gakaatutwariire kimwe, Omugyera ogurikuhimintika gushweka amagara gaitu;" 
Psalms124:5 N'amaizi agarikutabanguka gashweka amagara gaitu. 
Psalms124:6 MUKAMA asiimwe, otaratuhaireyo Kuba omuhiigo gw'okutaagataagurwa amaino gaabo." 
Psalms124:7 Amagara gaitu gacwire, nk'oku enyonyi eruga omu mutego gw'abategi; Omutego gucwekire; naitwe twarugamu." 
Psalms124:8 Okuhwerwa kwaitu kuri omu iziina rya MUKAMA Owaahangire eiguru n'ensi. 
Psalms125:1 Abarikwesiga MUKAMA bari nk'orushozi Saayuuni, Orutarikubaasa kutengyetsibwa, kureka orutuura ruhamire ebiro byona." 
Psalms125:2 Nk'oku ebibungo byehinguririize abantu be Okwiha hati okuhitsya ebiro byona. 
Psalms125:3 Ahakuba enkoni y'obutegyeki bw'obubi Teriguma neetegyeka abahikiriire omu buhunguzi bwabo, Ngu abahikiriire batakaagorora emikono yaabo kukora kubi." 
Psalms125:4 Ai MUKAMA, abarungi obakorere ebirungi, N'abaine emitima egororokire." 
Psalms125:5 Kwonka abarikuteishuka, bakatoora emihanda yaabo ekiikami, MUKAMA aryabatwarirana n'enkozi z'ebibi. Obusingye bugume omuri Israeli!" 
Psalms126:1 MUKAMA obu yaagarura aba Saayuuni abaanyagirwe, Obwo tukashusha nk'abarikuroota;" 
Psalms126:2 2 Akanwa kaitu kakaijura esheko, N'orurimi rwaitu rwayeshongora. Obwo ab'omu banyamahanga baagambirana bati: MUKAMA abakoreire ebikuru." 
Psalms126:3 Eego, MUKAMA atukoreire ebikuru; Nikyo tushemerereirwe." 
Psalms126:4 MUKAMA, itwe abaanyagirwe otugarure, Tube nk'emigyera ya Negebu!" 
Psalms126:5 Abarikubiba nibarira, baryagyesha nibashemererwa." 
Psalms126:6 Orikugyenda naarira, naaza kubiba embibo, Aryagaruka n'okushemererwa, ayekoreire ebiba bye." 
Psalms127:1 MUKAMA ku aba atombekire nju, abombeki beeruhiza busha. MUKAMA ku aba atarinzire rurembo, omurinzi araara naareebera busha." 
Psalms127:2 Muhendekyera busha okwimuka kare, mukakyerererwa kubyama, Kandi mukarya eby'okurya ebi muhendekyeire; Haza ebyo abiha abu akunda, beegwejegyereire." 
Psalms127:3 Reeba, abaana n'obuhunguzi oburuga ahari MUKAMA, N'enda ezizaarwa n'ebiconco ebi agaba." 
Psalms127:4 Nk'oku emyambi eba omu mukono gw'emanzi, N'abaana b'omu butsigazi nikwo baba." 
Psalms127:5 Omuntu ou omutana gwe gwijwire gutyo ahiiriirwe. Abari nk'abo tibarikwatwa nshoni, Baba nibagamba n'abazigu baabo omu irembo." 
Psalms128:1 Aine omugisha omuntu weean orikutiina MUKAMA, Akagyendera omu mihanda ye." 
Psalms128:2 Oryaguma orye ebi emikono yaawe ehendekyeire; Oryayesiima, kandi ogire omugisha." 
Psalms128:3 Omukazi waawe aryaba nk'omuzaabibu ogurikwana Omu bishengye by'omu nju yaawe, N'abaana baawe nk'amataagi g'omuzeituuni Beehinguririize emeeza yaawe." 
Psalms128:4 Reeba, okwo nikwo omuntu orikutiina MUKAMA Ariheebwa omugisha." 
Psalms128:5 MUKAMA akuhe omugisha naayema omuri Saayuuni, Oreebe omugisha gwa Yerusaalemu ebiro byona eby'amagara gaawe." 
Psalms128:6 Eego, oreebe abaana b'abaana baawe! Obusingye bugume ahari Israeli." 
Psalms129:1 Bakambonabonesa kaingi okwiha omu butsigazi bwangye; Israeli abe nikwo yaagamba hati mbwenu; 
Psalms129:2 Bakambonabonesa kaingi okwiha omu butsigazi bwangye, Kwonka tibarambazise." 
Psalms129:3 Abahingi bakahinga aha mugongo gwangye; Baahateera emikura miraingwa. 
Psalms129:4 MUKAMA n'ohikiriire; Emigoye y'ababi agicwiremu kabiri. 
Psalms129:5 Boona abarikwanga Saayuuni Bakwatwe enshoni, bagarurwe enyima;" 
Psalms129:6 Babe nk'obunyaatsi obumera aha mutwe gw'enju, Obwoma butakakuzire;" 
Psalms129:7 Obu omugyesi ataijuza ngaro ze, N'obu yaakuba orikuboha enganda obu atijuza mikono ye;" 
Psalms129:8 Kandi n'abahinguzi tibagira bati: Omugisha gwa MUKAMA gugume ahariimwe. Nitubashabira omugisha omu iziina rya MUKAMA. 
Psalms130:1 Ai MUKAMA, ninkutakira ndi hare okuzimu." 
Psalms130:2 Hurira eiraka ryangye, ai Mukama, Otegye amatu eiraka ry'okweshengyereza kwangye." 
Psalms130:3 MUKAMA, kuri noofa aha by'okutahikiirira, N'oha owaakubaasa kwemerera, ai MUKAMA?" 
Psalms130:4 Kwonka ah'ori hariho okusaasirwa, Ngu obone kutiinwa." 
Psalms130:5 Nintegyereza MUKAMA; n'amagara gangye nigategyereza; Kandi n'amatsiko gangye gaba aha kigambo kye; 
Psalms130:6 Amagara gangye nigategyereza MUKAMA, Okukira oku abarinzi beetenga obusheeshe, Eego, okukira oku abarinzi beetenga obusheeshe." 
Psalms130:7 Iwe Israeli, ta amatsiko gaawe ahari MUKAMA, Ahakuba ahari MUKAMA hariho embabazi ezitahinduka; Kandi ahariwe hariho okucungurwa kwingi;" 
Psalms130:8 Na mbwenu aryacungura Israeli, Amwiheho eby'okutahikiirira bye byona." 
Psalms131:1 Ai MUKAMA, omutima gwangye tigugira maryo, N'amaisho gangye tigeetenga by'ahaiguru, Kandi tiinyeta ha bikuru, n'obu byakuba eby'okutangaaza ebi ntarikubaasa." 
Psalms131:2 Buzimazima ncureize omutima gwangye, naaguhunamya, Nk'omwana ou nyina yaarembesereza, akamuha akabeere; Omutima gwangye guri nk'omwana owaarembeserezibwa." 
Psalms131:3 Iwe Israeli, ta amatsiko ahari MUKAMA, Okwiha hati okuhitsya ebiro byona." 
Psalms132:1 Ai MUKAMA, ijuka Daudi n'eby'okubonabona kwe byona;" 
Psalms132:2 Oku yaarahiire ahari MUKAMA, Akahiga ahari Ruhanga wa Yakobo ow'obushoboorozi bwona;" 
Psalms132:3 Naagira ati: Buzimazima tinditaaha hansi y'akanono k'enju yangye, N'obu kwakuba okutemba ekitabo kyangye," 
Psalms132:4 Tindihumiza maisho gangye kugwejegyera, N'obu kwakuba okuhungira," 
Psalms132:5 Okuhitsya obu nditungira MUKAMA omwanya, Ahu Ruhanga wa Yakobo ow'obushoboorozi bwona arituura." 
Psalms132:6 Reeba, tukakihiriraho Efuraata, Twakishana Kiryasi-yearimu." 
Psalms132:7 Nibagira bati: Ka tutaahe omu mahema ge; Turamize aha katebe k'ebigyere bye. 
Psalms132:8 Imuka, ai MUKAMA, oze omu buruhuukiro bwawe, Iwe hamwe n'eshanduukye y'Amaani gaawe." 
Psalms132:9 Abanyamurwa baawe bajware eby'okuhikiirira; N'abarikwera baawe bateere akaari k'okushemererwa. 
Psalms132:10 Ahabw'omwiru waawe Daudi, Otabinga owaawe owaashukirweho amajuta." 
Psalms132:11 MUKAMA akarahira Daudi omu mazima; tariita ndahiro; Naagira ati: Ndyayemeka omwe aha baana b'enda yaawe, Arye engoma yaawe." 
Psalms132:12 Abaana baawe ku baririnda endagaano yangye N'ebi naahamize, ebi ndibeegyesa, Abaana baabo nabo baryaguma aha ngoma yaawe ebiro byona." 
Psalms132:13 Ahakuba MUKAMA akeetooranira Saayuuni, Yaayenda ku eba omwanya gwe gw'okutuuramu;" 
Psalms132:14 Naagira ati: Nibwo buruhuukiro bwangye obw'ebiro byona; Aha niho ndituura, ahakuba niho naayenzire." 
Psalms132:15 Buzimazima eby'okubagaburira ndyabiha omugisha mwingi, Mpaazye abooro baayo eby'okurya." 
Psalms132:16 Abanyamurwa baayo nabo ndyabajweka okujunwa, N'abarikwera baayo baryateera akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Psalms132:17 Aho niho ndifunduurira Daudi eihembe; Owangye ou naashukireho amajuta, nkamuteekateekyera etabaaza." 
Psalms132:18 Abazigu be ndyabajweka enshoni, Kwonka we ekirunga kye kiryamumurinkaniraho." 
Psalms133:1 Reeba, ku kiri kirungi kandi ekirikushemeza, Ab'eishe-emwe kutuura hamwe nibakwatanisa!" 
Psalms133:2 Ni nk'amajuta g'obuguzi bwingi agaashukirwe aha mutwe gwa Arooni, Gakaitururukira omu bireju bye, Gakahika aha kitogi ky'ekijwaro kye," 
Psalms133:3 Nk'orume rwa Herumooni oruragarika aha bibungo bya Saayuuni; Ahakuba aho niho MUKAMA yaaragiire ngu hagire omugisha, Nigo magara ag'ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms134:1 Imwe abairu ba Mukama mwena, mumusiime, Abeemerera omu nju ye nibagirinda nyekiro." 
Psalms134:2 Mwimutsye emikono yaanyu, mugyorekire Omwanya ogurikwera, Kandi musiime MUKAMA." 
Psalms134:3 MUKAMA owaahangire eiguru n'ensi Akuhe omugisha naayema omuri Saayuuni. 
Psalms135:1 Haleluya! Muhimbise eiziina rya MUKAMA; Imwe abairu ba MUKAMA, mumuhimbise!" 
Psalms135:2 Imwe abeemerera omu nju ya MUKAMA, Omu bikaari by'enju ya MUKAMA waitu!" 
Psalms135:3 Haleluya, ahakuba ni murungi; Mweshongore eby'okuhimbisa eiziina rye, ahakuba nirishemeza." 
Psalms135:4 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akeetooranira Yakobo, Na Israeli okuba owe wenka." 
Psalms135:5 Nimmanya ngu MUKAMA ni mukuru, Kandi MUKAMA waitu naakira baaruhanga boona." 
Psalms135:6 Eki MUKAMA akunda kyona, akikora Omu iguru n'omu nsi n'omu nyanja n'omu myanya yoona eya hare okuzimu." 
Psalms135:7 Niwe aimutsya ebicu aha mbaju zoona ez'ensi; Akareeta emirabyo ahabw'enjura; Akashohoza omuyaga okuruga omu mabiikiro ge. 
Psalms135:8 Niwe yaateire emijigaijo ya Misri, Ey'abantu n'ey'enyamaishwa;" 
Psalms135:9 Akareeta obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza omuriiwe, Misri, Ahari Faraho n'abairu be boona." 
Psalms135:10 Akateera amahanga maingi, Yaita abagabe b'amaani," 
Psalms135:11 Sihooni, omugabe w'Abaamori, na Ogi omugabe wa Bashani, N'amahanga goona aga Kanaani;" 
Psalms135:12 Kandi yaagaba ensi yaabo kuba obuhunguzi, Obuhunguzi bwa Israeli abantu be." 
Psalms135:13 Eiziina ryawe, ai MUKAMA, rigumaho ebiro byona; Kandi ab'obusingye bwona baryaguma bakwijukye." 
Psalms135:14 Ahakuba MUKAMA aryacwera abantu be orubanja, Agirire abairu be embabazi." 
Psalms135:15 Ebishushani by'amahanga ebirikuramibwa n'efeeza n'ezaabu, Ebikozirwe emikono y'abantu;" 
Psalms135:16 Bigira eminwa, kwonka tibigamba; Bigira amaisho, tibireeba;" 
Psalms135:17 Bigira amatu, tibihurira; Kandi tibigira mwitsyo mu kanwa kaabyo." 
Psalms135:18 Ababikora baryashusha nkabyo, Kandi n'omuntu weena obyesiga." 
Psalms135:19 Imwe enju ya Israeli, siima MUKAMA! Iwe enju ya Arooni, siima MUKAMA!" 
Psalms135:20 Iwe enju ya Leevi, siima MUKAMA! Naimwe abarikutiina MUKAMA, mumusiime!" 
Psalms135:21 MUKAMA otuura omuri Yerusaalemu Ahimbisizibwe omuri Saayuuni. Haleluya! 
Psalms136:1 Musiime MUKAMA, ahakuba ni murungi; Kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona." 
Psalms136:2 Musiime Ruhanga Nyamuhanga; Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona; 
Psalms136:3 Musiime Mukama w'abakama; Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona; 
Psalms136:4 Ogwo wenka akora eby'okutangaaza bikuru; Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona; 
Psalms136:5 Ogwo owaahangire eiguru n'obwengye; Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona; 
Psalms136:6 Ogwo owaayazire ensi ahaiguru y'amaizi; Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona; 
Psalms136:7 Ogwo owaahangire ebirikwaka ebikuru, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:8 Eizooba okutegyeka nyomushana, ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:9 Okwezi n'enyonyoozi okutegyeka nyekiro; Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona; 
Psalms136:10 Ogwo owaateire emijigaijo ya Misri, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:11 Akaiha Abaisraeli omuribo, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:12 N'engaro z'amaani n'omukono ogubangire, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:13 Ogwo owaacwiremu Enyanja erikutukura habiri, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:14 Akarabya Abaisraeli ahagati yaayo, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:15 Kwonka Faraho n'eihe rye akabacwekyererezamu, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:16 Ogwo owaayebembeire abantu be, akabarabya omu ihamba, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:17 Ogwo owaateire abagabe b'ekitiinisa, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:18 Akaita abagabe rugambwa, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:19 Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:20 Na Ogi omugabe wa Bashani, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:21 Akagaba ensi yaabo kuba obuhunguzi, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:22 Obuhunguzi bw'omwiru we Israeli, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:23 Ogwo owaatwijukire turi habi munonga, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:24 Akatukiza abazigu baitu, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:25 Ogwo oriisa ebiine omubiri byona, Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona;" 
Psalms136:26 Musiime Ruhanga ow'omu iguru; Ahakuba embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona. 
Psalms137:1 Aha rubaju rw'emigyera ya Babulooni tukashutama, Twarira ahabw'okwijuka Saayuuni." 
Psalms137:2 Twahanika enanaga zaitu aha biti, Ebyabaire biri aha rubaju rw'ebyo migyera." 
Psalms137:3 Ahakuba abaatunyagire, aho niho baaturagiririire kweshongora, Kandi abaabaire nibatuboroozya, baaturagiira kusheka, Nibagira bati: Mutweshongorere ekyeshongoro kimwe aha bya Saayuuni." 
Psalms137:4 Nitubaasa tuta kweshongora ekyeshongoro kya MUKAMA Omu ihanga eritari ryaitu? 
Psalms137:5 Ku ndaakwebwe, iwe Yerusaalemu, Omukono gwangye gwa buryo gukookoote." 
Psalms137:6 Orurimi runyomere aha nkanka, Ku ndaabe ntakwijukire, Ntakunzire Yerusaalemu okukira ebirikunshemeza byona." 
Psalms137:7 Ai MUKAMA, ijuka eki Abanyedomu baakozire buri Aha izooba rya Yerusaalemu, obu baagira bati: Nimugisheenye, mugisheenye, muhikye aha misingi yaayo." 
Psalms137:8 Iwe Babulooni 'we, orikwija kuhwerekyerezibwa, Orikuzimuurira nk'ebi waatugiriire, ahiiriirwe!" 
Psalms137:9 Orikwata abaana baawe abato, akabateera aha nkiri, Ahiiriirwe!" 
Psalms138:1 Ndyakusiima n'omutima gangye gwona; Omu maisho ga baaruhanga ndyayeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa. 
Psalms138:2 Ndyaramua, mpindukire ei hekalu yaawe erikwera eri, Nsiime eiziina ryawe ahabw'embabazi zaawe ezitahinduka n'ahabw'amazima gaawe; Ahabw'okuba okaha ekigambo kyawe ekitiinisa okukira ebindi byona." 
Psalms138:3 Aha izooba eri naakutakiriireho, okangarukamu, Wangumya ahabw'okuha amagara gangye amaani." 
Psalms138:4 Abagabe boona ab'omu nsi baryakusingiza, ai MUKAMA; Ahakuba bahuriire ebigambo by'omu kanwa kaawe." 
Psalms138:5 Kandi baryayeshongora eby'emitwarize ya MUKAMA, ahakuba ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA ni kingi." 
Psalms138:6 Mumanye ngu MUKAMA, n'obu araabe ari ahaiguru munonga, Ata omutima aha bacureezi; Kwonka ab'amaryo abamanyira hare." 
Psalms138:7 N'obu ndaabe ningyenda enaku ziinyehinguririize, Kwonka oryarinda amagara gangye. Oryagorora omukono gwawe kurwanisa ekiniga ky'abazigu bangye, Kandi omukono gwawe gwa buryo guryankiza." 
Psalms138:8 MUKAMA aryahikiiriza byona ebi yanteekateekyeire; Embabazi zaawe, ai MUKAMA, n'ez'ebiro byona; Otareka ebi waayekoreire n'emikono yaawe." 
Psalms139:1 Ai MUKAMA, okancaaka, wammanya." 
Psalms139:2 Noomanya emishutamire yangye, n'emyimukire yangye, Omanyiire hare ebiteekateeko byangye." 
Psalms139:3 Orondoreza kimwe emigyendere yangye n'emibyamire yangye, Kandi noomanya emihanda yangye yoona;" 
Psalms139:4 Ahakuba orurimi rwangye ku ruba rutakashohoize kigambo, Reeba MUKAMA, iwe oba waakimanyiire kimwe." 
Psalms139:5 Ondi omumaisho n'enyima, Kandi ontaireho omukono gwawe." 
Psalms139:6 Okumanya nk'okwo nikuntangaaza kurengyesereize; N'okw'ahaiguru munonga, tindikukubaasa." 
Psalms139:7 Ndyayetantarira hi Omwoyo waawe? Nari ndyahungira hi amaisho gaawe? 
Psalms139:8 Ku ndaatembe omu iguru, okwo niyo ori; Ku ndaatinde ekitabo kyangye Okuzimu, reeba nayo oriyo." 
Psalms139:9 Ku ndaagurukise amapapa g'akasheeshe, Naatuura aha muheru gw'enyanja," 
Psalms139:10 N'okwo nayo omukono gwawe guryanyebembera, Omukono gwawe gwa buryo gunkwate." 
Psalms139:11 Ku ndaagire nti: Buzima omwirima nigwija kunshweka, Kandi n'omushana oguunyehinguririize gube ekiro;" 
Psalms139:12 Omwirima nagwo tigwine ki gukushereka; Ahakuba ekiro kihweza nka nyomushana; Omwirima n'omushana nikyo kimwe ahariiwe. 
Psalms139:13 Ahakuba niiwe waahangire ebicweka by'omunda yangye, Okanteeranira omu nda ya maawe." 
Psalms139:14 Ninkuhimbisa ahabw'okumpanga omu muringo gw'eihano kandi ogurikutangaaza; Ebi waakozire n'eby'okutangaaza, Kandi eby'omu mutima gwangye noobimanya gye buzima." 
Psalms139:15 Ekyemerero kyangye tikirakusherekirwe, Ibu naabaire nimpangirwa omu mubonano, Ninkorwa omu muringo ogutarikushobooroka omu myanya y'okuzimu ahansi y'ensi." 
Psalms139:16 Amaisho gaawe gakaba gandeebera omu nda, nkiri amaizi; Omu kitabo kyawe hahandiikirwemu ebiro byangye byona, Nk'oku byaragiirwe, hatakabaireho na kimwe." 
Psalms139:17 Ai Ruhanga, ebiteekateeko byawe ka n'eby'obuguzi bwingi ahariinye! Ku orikubiteeranira hamwe ni bingi." 
Psalms139:18 Ku naakubibara, bikaakira omusheenyi obwingi. Ku nsisiimuka, mba nkiri hamwe naiwe." 
Psalms139:19 Nkaahenwa ki, oita ababi, ai Ruhanga, Abakunda kusheesha eshagama bandugaho," 
Psalms139:20 Abakugambaho kubi, Abazigu baawe abarahirira busha eiziina ryawe." 
Psalms139:21 Ai MUKAMA, abakwanga timbanga? Tingwerwa kubi abaimuka kukurwanisa?" 
Psalms139:22 Nimbangira kimwe buzima; Mbeeta abazigu bangye. 
Psalms139:23 Oncaakye, ai Ruhanga, omanye omutima gwangye; Ongyeze, omanye ebiteekateekateeko byangye;" 
Psalms139:24 Oreebe omuriinye ku haraabe harimu emitwarize yoona emibi, Haza onyebembere omu muhanda ogw'ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms140:1 Ai MUKAMA, onkize abantu babi; Ondinde abanyamwaga," 
Psalms140:2 Abateekateeka enaama mbi omu mitima yaabo, Abeeteerana obutoosha kurwana." 
Psalms140:3 Bashongoire orurimi rwabo nk'enjoka, Omu minwa yaabo harimu obushegu bw'encwera." 
Psalms140:4 Ai MUKAMA, ondinde emikono y'ababi; Ondinde abanyamwaga, abahanwire kutega ebigyere byangye." 
Psalms140:5 Ab'amaryo bantegire omutego n'emigoye; Bategire ekigoye aha muhanda, Bantega orugogo." 
Psalms140:6 Naagira MUKAMA nti: Niiwe Ruhanga wangye; Tega amatu eiraka ry'okweshengyereza kwangye, ai MUKAMA." 
Psalms140:7 Ai RUHANGA, Mukama wangye, Omujuni wangye ow'amaani, Okakingira omutwe gwangye aha izooba ry'orugamba." 
Psalms140:8 Ai MUKAMA, otaikiriza kuha omubi ebi arikwetenga, Kandi otamukwatsa kugumizamu n'enaama ye embi, Arekye kwehimbisa." 
Psalms140:9 Abanyehinguririize nibeehimbisa; Eitima ry'eminwa yaabo ribamareho; 
Psalms140:10 Amakara agarikwaka gabagweho; Banagwe omu biina batarirugayo. 
Psalms140:11 Orikugambuura atarihama omu nsi; Ekibi kihiigye omunyamwaga, kimuhwerekyereze." 
Psalms140:12 Nimmanya ngu MUKAMA aryatonganira abarikubonabonesibwa, Arwanirire amazima g'abakyene." 
Psalms140:13 Buzimazima abahikiriire baryasiima eiziina ryawe; N'ab'emitima egororokire baryatuura ah'ori. 
Psalms141:1 Ai MUKAMA, rahuka kumpikaho; Ohurire eiraka ryangye, ku ndaakutakire!" 
Psalms141:2 Okushaba kwangye kube nk'omugaju omu maisho gaawe, N'okwimutsya emikono yangye kube nk'ekitambo ky'omu mwabazyo." 
Psalms141:3 Ote omurinzi aha kanwa kangye, ai MUKAMA, Kandi ogume noorinda omuryango gw'eminwa yangye!" 
Psalms141:4 Otaanyikiriza kuta omutima aha kintu kyona ekibi, Ndekye kuguma ninkora eby'okutahikiirira n'ekozi z'ebibi, N'obu kwakuba okurya aha by'okurya byazo ebinuzire." 
Psalms141:5 Omuntu murungi anteere nari ampane n'embabazi; Kwonka amajuta g'omubi gatarishukwa aha mutwe gwangye; Ahakuba obutoosha nshaba nindwanisa emicwe yaabo emibi. 
Psalms141:6 Ku bariheebwayo omu mikono y'abaribacwera orubanja, Obwo nibwo barimanya ngu ekigambo kya Ruhanga n'eky'amazima." 
Psalms141:7 Nk'oku omuhingi abanjura eitaka, akaritabira, Nikwo amagufa gaabo garinaganagwa gatyo aha munwa gw'Okuzimu." 
Psalms141:8 Kwonka niiwe ntaireho amaisho, ai MUKAMA Ruhanga; Niiwe nsheruramu obuhungiro; otantsiga ntaine kirinda!" 
Psalms141:9 Ondinde omutego ogu bantegire, n'orugogo rw'enkozi z'ebibi." 
Psalms141:10 K'ababi bagwe omu migoye ei bategire, Haza nyowe nkire." 
Psalms142:1 Ntakira MUKAMA n'eiraka ryangye; Ngaruka mmweshengyereza naryo. 
Psalms142:2 Nshuka amaganya gangye omu maisho ge; Kandi mmworeka enaku zangye. 
Psalms142:3 Omwoyo gwangye ku gwagwire enshazi, Okamanya omuhanda gwangye. Omu muhanda ogu ndabamu, Nimwo bantegire omutego." 
Psalms142:4 Naareeba aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo, Kwonka naashanga hatariho orikuunyetaho; Ntakiine h'okuhungira, hataine orikuntaho omutima." 
Psalms142:5 Naakutakira, MUKAMA wangye; naagira nti: Niiwe buhungiro bwangye, Kandi omugabo gwangye omu nsi y'abahuriire." 
Psalms142:6 Hurira okutaka kwangye; ahakuba ngarwirwe ahansi munonga. Onkize abarikumpiiga; ahakuba nibankiza amaani. 
Psalms142:7 Onyihe omu kihome, mbone kusiima eiziina ryawe, Abahikiriire bamanye hamwe naanye, Ku onkorera eby'embabazi." 
Psalms143:1 Hurira okushaba kwangye, ai MUKAMA; otegye okutu okweshengyereza kwangye; Ahabw'okwesigwa kwawe n'okuhikiirira kwawe ongarukyemu." 
Psalms143:2 Otacwera omwiru waawe orubanja; ahabw'okuba omu maisho gaawe tihariho muntu weena ohuriire orisinga orubanja. 
Psalms143:3 Noomanya ngu omuzigu wangye ampiigire, Yaateera amagara gangye ahansi; Yanshutamya omu kizima, nk'abaafiire ira." 
Psalms143:4 Nikyo omwoyo gwangye gurikugwera enshazi omunda yangye, N'omutima gwangye gukeeshobera." 
Psalms143:5 Niinyijuka ebiro ebya ira; nguma ninteekateeka ahari byona ebi okora; Ninteekateeka aha bi emikono yaawe yaakozire. 
Psalms143:6 Nkutegire emikono; Omutima gwangye gukwiniire eiriho, nk'ori omu nsi eyomire. Sera" 
Psalms143:7 Rahuka kungarukamu, ai MUKAMA, omwoyo gwangye nigugwa enshazi; Otaanyima amaisho, nkaba nk'abarikushuuma Okuzimu." 
Psalms143:8 Ompurize omu kasheeshe eby'embabazi zaawe ezitahinduka; Ahakuba niiwe nyesiga. Ompabure omuhanda ogu nshemereire kurabamu, Ahakuba niiwe nyimukiza omutima." 
Psalms143:9 Onkize abazigu bangye, ai MUKAMA! Niiwe mpungiireho ntakwakwa." 
Psalms143:10 Onyegyese kukora ebi okunda, Ahakuba niiwe Ruhanga wangye; Omwoyo waawe omurungi anyebembere omu muhanda oguringaniire." 
Psalms143:11 Ompimbuure, ai MUKAMA, ahabw'eiziina ryawe; Ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe onyihe omu naku!" 
Psalms143:12 Ahabw'embabazi zaawe ezitahinduka cwekyereza abazigu bangye; Kandi omareho boona abarikubonabonesa amagara gangye; Ahabw'okuba ndi omwiru waawe. 
Psalms144:1 MUKAMA orukiri rwangye ahimbisibwe, Oyegyese emikono yangye kurashana, n'engaro zangye kurwana;" 
Psalms144:2 Niwe rukiri rwangye, n'orugo rwangye orugumire; Omunaara gwangye omuraingwa, kandi omujuni wangye; Engabo yangye, kandi ou nyesiga, Ongomoorera abantu bangye." 
Psalms144:3 Omuntu ni kintu ki Iwe okumwijuka, Nari shi omwana w'omuntu Iwe okumuteekateekaho?" 
Psalms144:4 Omuntu ni nk'omwitsyo; Ebiro bye ni nk'ekibunda ekirikuhwaho. 
Psalms144:5 Ai MUKAMA, inamya eiguru ryawe, oshuume; Okore aha bibungo, bicumbe omwika." 
Psalms144:6 Yohereza emirabyo y'enkuba, obataataanise; Orashe emyambi yaawe, obabingye." 
Psalms144:7 Gorora omukono gwawe nooyema ahaiguru; Onjune, onyihe omu maizi maingi, Omu mikono y'abanyamahanga;" 
Psalms144:8 Akanwa kaabo kagamba ebitaine mugasho, N'omukono gwabo gwa buryo n'ogw'ebishuba." 
Psalms144:9 Ai Ruhanga, naaza kukweshongorera ekyeshongoro kisya, Nyeshongore eby'okukuhimbisa ninteera enanga y'mirya ikumi." 
Psalms144:10 Niiwe oha abagabe obusinguzi, Okakiza omwiru waawe Daudi rurara erikwita kubi." 
Psalms144:11 Onjune, onyihe omu mikono y'abanyamahanga, Abu akanwa kaabo kagamba ebitaine mugasho, N'omukono gwabo gwa buryo gukaba ogw'ebishuba." 
Psalms144:12 Nkaabaasibwa ki, batabani baitu bakura nk'emiti erikunyeeta omu butsigazi bwabo; Bahara baitu baba nk'amabaare agabaizirwe kwombeka nyaruju;" 
Psalms144:13 N'ebitara byaitu biijura eby'okurya by'emiringo yoona; Entaama zaitu zizaara enkumi n'obukumi omu mariisizo gaitu; 
Psalms144:14 Ente zaitu zihaka, zireka kutorooga; Hareka kugira abaasheenya orugo, bakataaha, Nari abaashohora kuza kurwana; N'obu kwakuba okuboroogyera omu bihandagazi byaitu!" 
Psalms144:15 Eihanga eryakuba rityo rikaaba rihiiriirwe! Eego, eihanga eri Ruhanga waaryo aba Yehova rihiiriirwe!" 
Psalms145:1 Ndyakuhimbisa, ai Ruhanga wangye kandi Omugabe wangye; Ndyasiima eiziina ryawe ebiro byona." 
Psalms145:2 Buri izooba ndyakusiima, Mpimbise eiziina ryawe ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms145:3 MUKAMA ni mukuru, kandi ashemereire kuhimbisibwa munonga, Obukuru bwe tibwetegyerezibwa." 
Psalms145:4 Ab'obusingye bumwe baryagambira ab'obundi busingye, nibasiima emirimo yaawe, Kandi bamanyise eby'amaani ebi waakozire." 
Psalms145:5 Ndyagamba aha burungi bw'ekitiinisa ky'obukuru bwawe, Ngume ninteekateeka aha mirimo yaawe y'okutangaaza." 
Psalms145:6 Abantu baryagamba aha maani g'ebirikutiinisa ebi okora; Kandi naanye ndyagamba aha bukuru bwawe. 
Psalms145:7 Baryagamba munonga aha kurangaanwa kw'oburungi bwawe obwingi, Beeshongore eby'okuhikiirira kwawe." 
Psalms145:8 MUKAMA n'owembabazi kandi n'omunyasaasi buzima, Tarahuka kuguubwa kubi, kandi aine okusaasira kwingi." 
Psalms145:9 MUKAMA ni murungi ahari boona, Kandi agira embabazi nyingi ahari byona ebi yaahangire." 
Psalms145:10 Ai MUKAMA, ebi waahangire byona biryakuhimbisa, N'abarikwera baawe baryakusingiza." 
Psalms145:11 Baryagamba aha kitiinisa ky'obukama bwawe, Bagambe aha by'obushoboorozi bwawe," 
Psalms145:12 Okumanyisa abantu eby'amaani ebi okora, N'ekitiinisa ky'obukuru bw'obukama bwawe." 
Psalms145:13 Obukama bwawe n'obukama bw'ebiro byona, N'obutegyeki bwawe buryagumaho obusingye bwona." 
Psalms145:14 MUKAMA aramira boona abarikugwa, Kandi aimutsya boona abeyinamiriire." 
Psalms145:15 Ebintu byona bikutega amaisho, Naiwe obiha eby'okurya omu bunaku obuhikire." 
Psalms145:16 Oshashaanura engaro zaawe, Ohaazya ekintu kyona ekihuriire ebi kirikwetenga." 
Psalms145:17 MUKAMA n'ohikiriire omu mitwarize ye yoona, Kandi ow'embabazi omu bi akora byona." 
Psalms145:18 MUKAMA ari haihi na boona abamutakira, Boona abamutakira omu mazima." 
Psalms145:19 Abarikumutiina aryabamarira ebi barikwetenga, Kandi aryahurira okutaka kwabo, abajune." 
Psalms145:20 MUKAMA arinda boona abarikumukunda; Kwonka ababi boona ryabahwerekyereza. 
Psalms145:21 Akanwa kangye karyagamba eby'okuhimbisa MUKAMA; Ebiine omubiri byona bisiime eiziina rye eririkwera ebiro n'ebiro. 
Psalms146:1 Haleluya Himbisa MUKAMA, iwe magara gangye!" 
Psalms146:2 Ndyayeshongorera MUKAMA, nkiri ohuriire, Nyeshongorere Ruhanga eby'okuhimbisa, nkiriho." 
Psalms146:3 Mutaryesiga abanyiginya, N'obu yaakuba omuntu, otaine kuhwera kwona." 
Psalms146:4 Omwitsyo ku gumuhwamu, agaruka omu itaka; Eryo izooba ebiteekateeko bye bihwaho." 
Psalms146:5 Omuntu ahiiriirwe, ou Ruhanga wa Yakobo aba Muhwezi we, Kandi ota amatsiko ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga we," 
Psalms146:6 Owaahangire eiguru n'ensi, enyanja na byona ebirimu, Otuura ari omwesigwa ebiro byona," 
Psalms146:7 Ocwera abarikubonabonesibwa emanja z'oburyo; Oha abaine enjara eby'okurya. MUKAMA akomorora embohe; 
Psalms146:8 MUKAMA ahumuura empumi; MUKAMA aimutsya abeyinamiriire; MUKAMA akunda abahikiriire. 
Psalms146:9 MUKAMA arinda abashuhuuki, Aramira abafaakazi n'efuuzi, Kwonka omuhanda gw'ababi agwitira kimwe." 
Psalms146:10 MUKAMA aryategyeka ebiro byona; Iwe Saayuni, Ruhanga waawe aryategyeka okuhitsya obusingye bwona. Haleluya!" 
Psalms147:1 Haleluya! ahakuba ni kirungi okweshongorera Ruhanga waitu eby'okuhimbisa; Ahabw'okuba n'ow'embabazi, kandi okuhimbisa kuhikire." 
Psalms147:2 MUKAMA ayombeka busya Yerusaalemu, Ataruura Abaisraeli abaabingirwe." 
Psalms147:3 Akiza ab'emitima ehendekire, Ashemba obuhuta bwabo." 
Psalms147:4 Amanya obwingi bw'enyonyoozi, Zoona azeeta amaziina gaazo" 
Psalms147:5 MUKAMA waitu ni mukuru, kandi n'ow'obushoboorozi bwingi; Okwetegyereza kwe kurengire orugyero." 
Psalms147:6 MUKAMA akwatirira abacureezi; Kwonka ababi abanagira kimwe ahansi. 
Psalms147:7 Mweshongorere MUKAMA n'okusiima; Mweshongorere Ruhanga waitu n'enanga! 
Psalms147:8 Niwe ashweka eiguru ebicu, akateekateekyera ensi enjura, Kandi akameza obunyaatsi aha migongo." 
Psalms147:9 Aha enyamaiswa eby'okurya byazo, Kandi ariisa abaana b'ebikoona abarikwaniira." 
Psalms147:10 Tayesiimira maani g'embaraasi, M'amaguru g'omuntu tigo ashemerererwa," 
Psalms147:11 Kureka MUKAMA ashemerererwa abarikumutiina, Bakeesiga embabazi ze ezitahinduka." 
Psalms147:12 Iwe Yerusaalemu, himbisa MUKAMA! Naiwe Saayuuni, himbisa Ruhanga waawe!" 
Psalms147:13 Ahakuba akagumya empimbi z'amarembo gaawe; N'abaana baawe abari omuriiwe yaabaha omugisha. 
Psalms147:14 Areeta obusingye omunda y'emyatano yaawe; Akwijuza engano nungi munonga. 
Psalms147:15 Atweka ekiragiro kye ahansi; Ekigambo kye kiirukanga munonga. 
Psalms147:16 Agwisa ebirika nk'ebyoya; amaamagiza ekime ky'embeho nk'eiju. 
Psalms147:17 Anaga orubaare rwe nk'oburagarika. N'oha owaakubaasa kwemera embeho ye? 
Psalms147:18 Atweka ekigambo kye, abiyazya; Ahuuhisa omuyaga gwe, amaizi gagyenda." 
Psalms147:19 Amanyisa Yakobo ekigambo kye, Na Israeli amumanyisa ebiragiro bye n'emicwere ye." 
Psalms147:20 Tihariho ihanga erindi ryona eri aragizire atyo; Kandi n'emicwere ye tibakagimanyaga. Haleluya! 
Psalms148:1 Haleluya! Imwe ab'omu iguru, muhimbise MUKAMA, Naimwe abari omu myanya y'ahaiguru mumuhimbise!" 
Psalms148:2 Imwe baamaraika be mwena, mumuhimbise; Naimwe ab'omu ihe rye mwena, mumuhimbise." 
Psalms148:3 Iwe eizooba n'okwezi, mumuhimbise; Naimwe enyonyoozi ezirikwaka mwena, mumuhimbise." 
Psalms148:4 Iwe eiguru eririkweshumba erindi, muhimbise; Naimwe amaizi agari ahaiguru y'eiguru." 
Psalms148:5 Ka bihimbise eiziina rya MUKAMA; Ahakuba akaragiira, byahangwa;" 
Psalms148:6 Kandi yaabihamiza kimwe ebiro n'ebiro; Yaataho ekiragiro ekitarihwaho. 
Psalms148:7 Imwe eby'omu nsi, muhimbise MUKAMA! Imwe emigoye, n'ahagati y'amayanja hoona;" 
Psalms148:8 Omuriro n'orubaawe, ebirika n'omwika, Omuyaga gw'amaani, oguhikiiriza ekiragiro kye;" 
Psalms148:9 Ebibungo n'emigongo yoona; Emiti erikwana, n'emyereezi yoona;" 
Psalms148:10 Enyamaishwa n'amatungo goona, Ebirikwekurura, n'enyonyi ezirikuguruka;" 
Psalms148:11 Abagabe b'ensi, n'amahanga goona; Abanyiginya n'abaramuzi boona ab'omu nsi;" 
Psalms148:12 Abatsigazi n'empangare; Abagurusi n'abaana! 
Psalms148:13 Bihimbise eiziina rya MUKAMA; Ahakuba eiziina rye wenka niryo rihimbisibwa; Ekitiinisa kye nikyeshumba ensi n'eiguru. 
Psalms148:14 Aimukize eihembe ahabw'abantu be, eririkuhimbisibwa abarikwera be boona; Nibo baana ba Israeli, eihanga erimuri haihi. Haleluya!" 
Psalms149:1 Haleluya! Mweshongorere MUKAMA ekyeshongoro kisya, Kandi mweshongore eby'okumuhimbisa omu mutwe gw'abarikwera." 
Psalms149:2 Israeli ashemerererwe Owaamuhangire, N'abaana ba Saayuuni bashemerererwe Omugabe waabo." 
Psalms149:3 Bahimbise eiziina rye nibazina, Bamweshongorere eby'okuhimbisa n'engarabi n'enanga;" 
Psalms149:4 Ahakuba MUKAMA ashemerererwa abantu be; Abacureezi aryabahunda okujunwa. 
Psalms149:5 Abarikwera beesiimire omu kitiinisa, Beeshongore ahabw'okushemererwa, bari aha bitabo byabo." 
Psalms149:6 Ebyeshongoro by'okusingiza Ruhanga bigume omu kanwa kaabo, Na rurara ey'amoogi abir egume omu ngaro zaabo," 
Psalms149:7 Okuhoora amahanga, N'okuha abantu ebiheneso," 
Psalms149:8 Okuboha abagabe baabo n'enjegyere, N'abakuru baabo n'emihama y'ebyoma," 
Psalms149:9 Kandi n'okubataho orubanja oruhandiikirwe. Ekitiinisa ekyo n'eky'abarikwera be boona. Haleluya! 
Psalms150:1 Haleluya! Muhimbisize Ruhanga omu Mwanya gwe ogurikwera; Mumuhimbisize omu kaabunga k'amaani ge. 
Psalms150:2 Mumusiime ahabw'eby'amaani ebi akora; Mumusiime nk'obukuru bwe obutakareebwaga oku buri. 
Psalms150:3 Mumusiime n'eiraka ry'amakondere; Mumusiime n'endingiri n'enanga; 
Psalms150:4 Mumusiime n'engarabi n'okuzina; Mumusiime n'ebiine emirya n'esheegu; 
Psalms150:5 Mumusiime n'ebitaasa ebirikugamba, Mumusiime n'ebitaasa ebirikukwaya munonga." 
Psalms150:6 Byona ebiine omwitsyo bihimbise MUKAMA. Haleluya! 
Proverbs1:1 Enfumu za Sulemaani mwene Daudi, omugabe wa Israeli," 
Proverbs1:2 Ez'okumanyisa obwengye n'okuhabura, N'ez'okushoboorora ebigambo ebirimu okwetegyereza," 
Proverbs1:3 Ez'okwegyesa okukoresa obwengye Omu kuhikiirira, omu buryo n'omu bwinganisa;" 
Proverbs1:4 Okuhaisa otaine bwengye okwerinda; N'omutsigazi okumuha okumanya obwerinzi," 
Proverbs1:5 Ngu omunyabwengye ahurire, ayeyongyere kwega, Kandi omushaija oine okwetegyereza atungye obwengye obuhikire;" 
Proverbs1:6 Okumanya enfumu n'eby'okurengyezana, Ebigambo by'abanyabwengye n'ebishaakuzo." 
Proverbs1:7 Okutiina MUKAMA niyo ntandikiro y'okumanya, Kwonka abashema bagaya obwengye n'okuhaburwa." 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wangye, guma ohurire ebi sho arikukuhabura, Kandi otanga ebi nyoko arikukwegyesa;" 
Proverbs1:9 Ahabw'okuba biryaba eihunde aha mutwe gwawe, Kandi emikuufu omu bitysa byawe." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wangye, abasiisi ku barikubeihabeiha, Otariikiriza." 
Proverbs1:11 Ku barigira ngu, Ija tugyendane, tugwere ab'okwita, N'abataine rubanja tubature busha," 
Proverbs1:12 Tubamire bahuriire, nk'oku Okuzimu emira abantu bashugaine, Nk'abo abashuuma omu Kiina;" 
Proverbs1:13 Turyagwa aha bintu by'obuguzi bwingi, Twijuze amaka gaitu eminyago;" 
Proverbs1:14 Mbwenu kwatanisa naitwe, Twena tugire enshaho emwe;" 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wangye, otarigyenda nabo, N'obu kwakuba okwimutsya ekigyere kyawe kutoora emihanda yaabo;" 
Proverbs1:16 Ahabw'okuba ebigyere byabo biirukira ebibi, Birahuka kusheesha eshagama." 
Proverbs1:17 Manya, okutega omutego enyonyi neegureeba, N'okweruhiza busha." 
Proverbs1:18 Kwonka abo bantu baba nibagwera eshagama yaabo bonak, Nibagiira amagara gaabo omu kyetindo." 
Proverbs1:19 Niyo mihanda y'abo boona abagira omururu gw'amagoba, Gaihaho amagara ga bakama baago." 
Proverbs1:20 Bwengye naayeta naayamuriza omu nguuto, Eiraka rye naariimukiza omu butare." 
Proverbs1:21 Naayetera aha mutwe gw'engo z'amabaare z'orurembo, Aha marembo gaarwo niho arikugambira ebigambo bye, naagira ati:" 
Proverbs1:22 Imwe abataine bwengye, muryahitsya hi okukunda okutagira bwengye? Abateezi b'enaku baryahitsya hi okwesiimira okuteera enaku kwabo, N'abashema okwanga okumanya?" 
Proverbs1:23 Mute omutima aha kuhana kwangye; Reeba, naaza kushuka Omwoyo wangye ahariimwe, Mbamanyise ebigambo byangye." 
Proverbs1:24 Ahabw'okubeeta, mukanga kuhurira, Nkatega emikono, hakabura owaakitaho omutima;" 
Proverbs1:25 Ahabw'okuteeta ha kuhabura kwangye kwona, Mukangira kimwe okuhana kwangye," 
Proverbs1:26 Naanye ndyasheka omu bunaku bw'ebihikiirizi byanyu; Ndyabateerera enaku, ekimurikutiina kyabahikaho." 
Proverbs1:27 Ekirikubatiinisa ku kiriija nk'eihunga, N'ebihikiirizi byanyu byaija nk'omuyaga gw'akasooroora, Mwagira enaku n'obusaasi," 
Proverbs1:28 Obwo baryantakira, kwonka tindigarukamu; Baryayezirika kunsherura, kwonka tibarindeeba." 
Proverbs1:29 Ahabw'okwanga okumanya, N'okwihamu okutiina MUKAMA," 
Proverbs1:30 Bakangira kimwe okuhabura kwangye, Bakagaya okuhana kwangye kwona," 
Proverbs1:31 Nikyo baririira ebyana by'emitwarize yaabo, Bakaiguta enaama zaabo mbi." 
Proverbs1:32 Ahabw'okuba okugaruka enyima kw'abataine bwengye kuryabaita, N'okugogyera kw'abashema kuryabacwekyereza;" 
Proverbs1:33 Kwonka weena orikumpurira aryatuura buhooro, Agume agaramisiriize, ataine kabi k'arikutiina." 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wangye, ku oraikirize ebigambo byangye, Waagumya ebiragiro byangye aha mutima," 
Proverbs2:2 Waatega okutu kwawe obwengye, Omutima gwawe waaguta aha kwetegyereza;" 
Proverbs2:3 Eego, ku oriririra obwengye bw'okukyenga, Eiraka waariimutsya nooshaba okwetegyereza," 
Proverbs2:4 Waakusherura nk'efeeza, Waakuronda nk'eky'eitungo ekisherekirwe," 
Proverbs2:5 Obwo nibwo orishoborokyerwa okutiina MUKAMA, okazoora okumanya Ruhanga;" 
Proverbs2:6 Ahakuba MUKAMA niwe aha obwengye, Kandi omu kanwa ke nimwo haruga okumanya n'okwetegyereza;" 
Proverbs2:7 Abaine emitima egororokire ababiikira obwengye obuhikire, Kandi abagyendera omu bwesigwa ababeera engabo;" 
Proverbs2:8 Arinda emihanda y'eby'oburyo, Kandi n'abarikwera be abarinda omu mihanda yaabo." 
Proverbs2:9 Obwo oryamanya okuhikiirira n'eby'oburyo, N'obwinganisa, na buri muhanda gwona omurungi;" 
Proverbs2:10 Ahabw'okuba obwengye buryataaha omu mutima gwawe, N'amagara gaawe gashemerererwe okumanya." 
Proverbs2:11 Okwerinda kuryakureeberera, N'okwetegyereza kukurinde," 
Proverbs2:12 Kukwihe omu mihanda y'obubi, Kukujune abantu abarikugamba eby'obutahurira," 
Proverbs2:13 Abareka emihanda ehikire, Bakagyendera omu mihanda y'omwirima," 
Proverbs2:14 Abeesiima nibakora ebibi, Bakashemerererwa obutahurira bw'abanyabibi," 
Proverbs2:15 Abantu abatoora emihanda eteegami, Kandi abu emitwarize yaabo etagororokire." 
Proverbs2:16 Oryajunwa omu mikono y'omukazi enshambani, Omukazi owaariire enshoni, owa karimi karungi," 
Proverbs2:17 Owaataine n'owaabaire amushweire omu buhangare bwe, Kandi akeebwa endagaano ya Ruhanga we;" 
Proverbs2:18 Ahabw'okuba enju ye neeza omu kufa, N'emihanda ye neeshuuma omu bafu." 
Proverbs2:19 Abaza owe tibagaruka, N'obu kwakuba okugaruka omu muhanda gw'amagara." 
Proverbs2:20 N'ahabw'ekyo oshemereire kugyendera omu mihanda y'abarungi, N'okugumira omu mihanda y'abahikiriire;" 
Proverbs2:21 Ahabw'okuba ab'emitima egororokire nibo batuura omu nsi, N'abeesigwa bakagigumamu;" 
Proverbs2:22 Kwonka ababi baryamarwaho omu nsi, Kandi abarikureebya baryagikuurirwamu kimwe." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wangye, oteebwa okwegyesa kwangye, Kureka omutima gwawe gugume gworobere ebiragiro byangye;" 
Proverbs3:2 Ahakuba ebyo biryakureetera kugira ebiro bingi, N'emyaka mingi, n'okuba gye munonga omu magara gaawe." 
Proverbs3:3 Embabazi n'obwesigwa birekye kukurugaho, obijware omu maraka, Obihandiikye aha kishate ky'omutima gwawe." 
Proverbs3:4 Obwo nibwo oraashongokye, okagira eiziina rirungi Omu maisho ga Ruhanga n'abantu." 
Proverbs3:5 Yesigye MUKAMA n'omutima gwawe gwona, Orekye kwegamira okwetegyereza kwawe ahabwawe;" 
Proverbs3:6 Omwemere omu mitwarize yaawe yoona, Nawe aryaguma naatebeekanisa emihanda yaawe yoona." 
Proverbs3:7 Reka kwemanya obwengye; Tiina MUKAMA, orugye omu bibi." 
Proverbs3:8 Kiryaba eky'okutambira omubiri gwawe, Kandi ekirikuruhuura amagufa gaawe." 
Proverbs3:9 Haisa MUKAMA ekitiinisa ebintu byawe, Kandi n'emiganuro y'ebi oyerize." 
Proverbs3:10 Obwo ebitara byawe biryaijura n'aha bunwa, N'amaato gaawe garyaijura viinyo, esheeshekye." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wangye, otarigaya okutegyeka kwa MUKAMA, N'obu kwakuba okutamwa okuhana kwe;" 
Proverbs3:12 Ahakuba ou MUKAMA akunda, amuhana, Nk'oku ishe w'omwana ahana omwana we ou ashemerererwa," 
Proverbs3:13 Ohiiriirwe n'omuntu ozoora obwengye, Kandi n'omuntu otunga okwetegyereza;" 
Proverbs3:14 Ahabw'okuba omugasho ogurimu nigukira ogw'omu feeza, Kandi n'amagoba gaabwo nigakira ag'ezaabu;" 
Proverbs3:15 N'obw'obuguzi bwingi okukira amabaare g'omuhendo, Kandi omu bi waakwetenga byona, tihaine kirikwingana nabwo." 
Proverbs3:16 Okuhangaara kuri omu mukono gwabwo gwa buryo, N'omu gwa bumosho harimu obutungi n'ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs3:17 Emihanda yaabwo n'emihanda erikugwisa gye, N'otuhanda twabwo twona n'obusingye." 
Proverbs3:18 N'omuti gw'amagara aha barikubukwata, N'abarikubuhamya nibeetwa abahiiriirwe." 
Proverbs3:19 MUKAMA ahabw'obwengye bwe akahanga ensi, N'eiguru yaarihamya ahabw'okwetegyereza kwe." 
Proverbs3:20 Ahabw'okumanya kwe enshuro z'okuzimu zikafumuka, N'ebicu byatoonya orume ahansi." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wangye, guma n'obwengye obuhikire, n'okwerinda; Otaribireka bikakurugaho." 
Proverbs3:22 Ebyo biryahangaaza amagara gaawe, Kandi bikubeere eby'okwehunda omu maraka." 
Proverbs3:23 Nibwo origyenda omu muhanda gwawe buhooro, N'ekigyere kyawe kitateere ntsibo." 
Proverbs3:24 Ku orishutama, toritiina; Ku oribyama, oturo turyakunurira." 
Proverbs3:25 Otaritiina okukangwa kw'ahonaaho, Nari okuhwerekyerera kw'ababi kwabaho," 
Proverbs3:26 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aryaba obwesigye bwawe, Kandi arinde ekigyere kyawe kirekye kukwatwa omutego." 
Proverbs3:27 Ebirungi ebiri omu bushoboorozi bwawe, Otaribiima ababishemereire." 
Proverbs3:28 Otarigira mutaahi waawe oti: Irooko ogarukye; Nyencakare nkikuhe. Haza obwo okiine. 
Proverbs3:29 Otarigirira mutaahi waawe enaama mbi, Ou otwire nawe naakwesiga." 
Proverbs3:30 Otaritonganisiza busha omuntu weean, Ataine ki akwitsize." 
Proverbs3:31 Otarigirira eihari orikunyagisa abandi amaani, Kandi omu mitwarize ye otarigira ei waamwegaho;" 
Proverbs3:32 Ahakuba omuntu orikwehabagiza n'ekirikunugwa ahari Ruhanga, Kwonka ab'omutima ogugororokire abeesiga." 
Proverbs3:33 Omukyeeno gwa MUKAMA guri aha nju y'ababi, q1 Kwonka obutaaho bw'abahikiriire abuha omugisha." 
Proverbs3:34 Aha barikugaya, aba omugayi; Kwonka abacureezi abagirira embabazi." 
Proverbs3:35 Ab'obwengye baryahungura ekitiinisa, Kwonka abashema baryahemuka." 
Proverbs4:1 Baana bangye, mugume mutegye amatu okwegyesa kwa shoimwe, Kandi mukuteho omutima, mubone kugira okwetegyereza;" 
Proverbs4:2 Ahabw'okuba nimbaha ebiragiro birungi, Mutarireka okwegyesa kwangye." 
Proverbs4:3 Ku naabaire ndi omwana, ndi hamwe na tata, Ndi omwana orikworoba, kandi omwe wenka ahari maawe," 
Proverbs4:4 Tata akanyegyesa, yangira ati: Omutima gwawe gugume guhamye ebigambo byangye, Oyorobere ebiragiro byangye, obone kugumaho." 
Proverbs4:5 Otaryebwa ebigambo by'omu kanwa kangye, kandi otaribireka. Gira obwengye; gira okwetegyereza." 
Proverbs4:6 Otaribureka, nibwo burikugumyaho; Obukunde, buryakurinda." 
Proverbs4:7 Obwengye n'ekintu kikuru; gira obwengye; Ebi otungire byona, obisheruze okwetegyereza." 
Proverbs4:8 Obusingize munonga, nabwo buryakutunguura; Ku oribubumbatira, buryakuhaisa ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs4:9 Buryakujweka eihunde rirungi aha mutwe, Kandi bukuteho ekirunga kirungi." 
Proverbs4:10 Mwana wangye, hurira ebigambo byangye, kandi obiikirize, Emyaka y'amagara gaawe ebone kuba mingi." 
Proverbs4:11 Nkakwegyesa oku oraatungye obwengye, Naakuhabura emihanda egororokire." 
Proverbs4:12 Omu kugyenda kwawe toritsibaaza, Kandi ku oriiruka, toriteera ntsibo." 
Proverbs4:13 Hamya ebi oyegyesiibwe, otaribireka; Obirinde, ahabw'okuba nigo magara gaawe." 
Proverbs4:14 Otaritoora akahanda k'enkozi z'ebibi, Kandi otarigyendera omu muhanda gw'abantu babi." 
Proverbs4:15 Ogume ogwetantare, orekye kugurabamu; Ogwehuzye, ogumizemu;" 
Proverbs4:16 Ahakuba bo, ku baba batakakozire kibi, tibagwejegyera; Ku baba batakateerize muntu ntsibo, babura oturo." 
Proverbs4:17 Ahabw'okuba barya eby'okurya by'obubi, Kandi banywa viinyo y'okunyagisa abandi amaani." 
Proverbs4:18 Kwonka omuhanda gw'abahikiriire ni nk'omushana ogw'omu kasheeshe Ogugumizamu nigwaka gukahitsya omu ihangwe. 
Proverbs4:19 Omuhanda gw'ababi ni nk'omwirima ndindindi; Tibamanya kibateeza entsibo. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wangye, ta omutima aha bigambo byangye, Otegye okutu ebi ndikugamba." 
Proverbs4:21 Otaribireka bikakuruga omumaisho, Obigumye aha mutima gwawe;" 
Proverbs4:22 Ahabw'okuba n'amagara ahari abo ababizoora, Kandi n'omubazi aha mibiri yaabo yoona." 
Proverbs4:23 Rinda omutima gwawe okukira ebindi byona ebi orikurinda, Ahakuba nigwo gurugwamu enshuro z'amagara." 
Proverbs4:24 Yete hare akanwa akarikugamba eby'okwehabagiza, Kandi n'ebigaaniiro ebirikuhabisa obyete hare." 
Proverbs4:25 Shoronzya amaisho gaawe gareebere kimwe omumaisho, Kandi ogahamizeyo kimwe." 
Proverbs4:26 Yetegyereze ahu ebigyere byawe birikuraba, Obwo nibwo emihanda yaawe erihama." 
Proverbs4:27 Otarigwera aha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho; Iha ekigyere kyawe omu bubi. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wangye, ta omutima aha bwengye bwangye, Otegye okutu okwetegyereza kwangye," 
Proverbs5:2 Obone kugumya okwerinda, Kandi eminwa yaawe erinde okumanya," 
Proverbs5:3 Ahabw'okuba eminwa y'omukazi enshambani etoonya obwoki, N'ebigambo bye bikiza amajuta kuterera," 
Proverbs5:4 Kwonka aha muheru ashaarira nk'omuravunga, Agira obwogi nka rurara y'amoogi abiri." 
Proverbs5:5 Ebigyere bye bishuuma omu kufa, N'entambwe ze zitoora omuhanda ogurikuza Okuzimu." 
Proverbs5:6 Tayeta ha muhanda gw'amagara. Emihanda ye n'ey'okuzengyerera, kwonka we tabimanya." 
Proverbs5:7 Mbwenu baana bangye, mumpurire, Murekye kuruga aha bi ndikugamba." 
Proverbs5:8 Mwetantarire hare, Kandi otairira haihi emiryango y'enju ye," 
Proverbs5:9 Otakaaha ekitiniisa kyawe abandi, N'emyaka yaawe abatarikusaasira," 
Proverbs5:10 Abanyamahanga batakaakumaramu amaani, N'emirimo yaawe ekakorerwa omu nju y'omunyaihanga;" 
Proverbs5:11 Kandi aha muheru gw'amagara gaawe okaborooga, Waahweire aha magufa," 
Proverbs5:12 Okeefuuza noogira oti: Eshi nkaba eihano kwanga kutegyekwa, N'omutima gwangye kwanga kuhanwa!" 
Proverbs5:13 Tindahuriire bi abashomesa bangye bangambiire, N'obu kwakuba okutega amatu abarikumpabura." 
Proverbs5:14 Nkaba ndi haihi kufeera kimwe, N'okugwa ahagati y'omutwe gw'abantu." 
Proverbs5:15 Nywa amaizi g'eiziba ryawe, Agarikuruga omu iziba eri oyefukuriire." 
Proverbs5:16 Beitu shi, enshuro zaawe zishemereire kumaamagizibwa oku n'oku, Zikaba emigyera y'amaizi omu nguuto?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ka gabe agaawe wenka, Garekye kuba ag'abagyenyi baawe." 
Proverbs5:18 K'enshuro yaawe eheebwe omugisha, Oshemerererwe omukazi ow'omu butsigazi bwawe," 
Proverbs5:19 Akubeere nk'ebuguma y'empara erikukundwa, n'ey'esirabo erikushemeza; Amabeere ge gagume gakuhaazye, Kandi obutoosha oshemezibwe okukunda kwe." 
Proverbs5:20 Mwana wangye, ahabw'enki oshemezibwa omukazi enshambani, Okenda ngu ofumbate ogwo mukazi waariire enshoni?" 
Proverbs5:21 Ahakuba emitwarize y'omuntu eba omu maisho ga MUKAMA, Kandi niwe agumya eriisho aha mihanda ye yoona." 
Proverbs5:22 Omunyabibi aryakwatwa okutahikiirira kwe, Emigoye y'ekibi kye emugumye." 
Proverbs5:23 Afe azire okwanga kuhaburwa, Kandi ahabw'obufa-mutima bwe afeere kimwe." 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wangye, ku oryemererera mutaahi waawe, Waakwatiriza omunyaihanga," 
Proverbs6:2 Bwanyima waashanga ogwire omu mutego omu bi ogambire, Okwatiirwe omu bigambo ebirugire omu kanwa kaawe," 
Proverbs6:3 Obwo oryatwaza oti, mwana wangye, obone kwejuna; Ahakuba oryaba ogwire omu mikono ya mutaahi waawe; Oryagyenda nooyehuuta, omukwate amaguru noomweshengyereza;" 
Proverbs6:4 Otariikiriza amaisho gaawe kugwejegyera, N'ebitsigye byawe kuhungira;" 
Proverbs6:5 Yejune nk'oku enzaza eyejuna omuhiigi, Nk'oku enyonyi esyoka omu ngaro z'ogitegire." 
Proverbs6:6 Iwe mweremwa 'we, ow'ekimunyu, Oyetegyereze oku kitwaza, haza ogire obwengye." 
Proverbs6:7 Tikigira mukuru, Nari omutware, nari omutegyeki;" 
Proverbs6:8 Kwonka kyehunikira eby'okurya omu kyanda, Kandi omu ishaaruura kyeshangururiza eby'okukitunga." 
Proverbs6:9 Iwe mweremwa 'we, oryabyama ohitsye hi? Oryasisiimuka ryari kuruga omu turo?" 
Proverbs6:10 Noogira oti: Reka ngwejegyereho kakye, mpungireho kaingana busha; Nangwa mpinyeho nti omukono, ngwejengyereho." 
Proverbs6:11 Kwonka omanye obworo ku burikwizira nk'omunyagi, N'obukyene bukakuhikaho nk'omuntu ohagatiire eby'okurwanisa." 
Proverbs6:12 Omuntu otaine mugasho, omuntu omubi, Agyenda naagamba ebikiikami," 
Proverbs6:13 Aitira abandi amaisho, agambisa ebigyere, Arengyeza bagyenzi be n'engaro." 
Proverbs6:14 Ateekateeka enaama mbi omu mutima ogurikwehabagiza, Obutoosha abiba okwangana." 
Proverbs6:15 N'ahabw'ekyo aryagwerwa akagwe kitaraariire, Ahendekye ahonaaho okuhendeka okutaribungwa." 
Proverbs6:16 Hariho ebintu mukaaga, nangwa ni mushanju, Ebi MUKAMA ayanga, kandi ebi anuga," 
Proverbs6:17 Amaisho g'amaryo, orurimi orubeiha, Emikono esheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja," 
Proverbs6:18 Omutima oguteekateeka enaama mbi, Ebigyere ebirahukira ekibi," 
Proverbs6:19 Mushinja otari w'amazima ogamba ebishuba, N'omuntu obiba eby'okuteerana abantu omu b'eisheemwe" 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wangye, ogume oyorobere ebiragiro bya sho, Kandi otaruga aha kwegyesa kwa nyoko." 
Proverbs6:21 Ogume obikomeire aha mutima gwawe, Kandi obizingirire omu maraka gaawe." 
Proverbs6:22 Biryakwebembera omu kugyenda, Bikurinde ogwejegyeire, Kandi bigaaniire naiwe waasisiimuka." 
Proverbs6:23 Ahabw'okuba ebiragiro n'etabaaza, n'okwegyesa n'omushana, N'okuhana kw'orikukutegyeka nigwo muhanda gw'amagara," 
Proverbs6:24 Okukurinda omukazi mubi, N'okukurinda karimi karungi, omukazi owaariire enshoni." 
Proverbs6:25 Otaryetenga oburungi bwe omu mutima gwawe, Kandi otaritwarwa engohe ze;" 
Proverbs6:26 Ahabw'okuba maraaya agurwa akagaati, Kwonka omukazi enshambani ahiiga amagara g'omushaija." 
Proverbs6:27 Omuntu akaabaasa kutwarira omuriro omu kifuba kye, Emyenda ye etasye?" 
Proverbs6:28 Nari omuntu akaabaasa kugyendera aha makara garikwotsya, Ebigyere bye bitababukye?" 
Proverbs6:29 Nikwo ari atyo oza ahari muka mutaahi we; Tihariho n'omwe omukoraho oribura kufubirwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Abantu tibagaya mushuma Yaiba kwemara enjara; 
Proverbs6:31 Kwonka ku akwatwa, ariha emirundi mushanju, Ahayo eby'omu ka ye byona." 
Proverbs6:32 Oshambana, aba ataine bwengye; Okikora, aba naacwekyereza amagara ge." 
Proverbs6:33 Eki aihayo n'obuhuta n'okuhemuka, Kandi okuhemuka kwe tikuriragazibwa;" 
Proverbs6:34 Ahabw'okuba obufuuhi bureetera omuntu ekiniga kingi, Omu kuhoora enzigu tasaasira." 
Proverbs6:35 Taikiriza kuhongyerwa kwona, N'obu waakumuha ebiconco ebirikwingana bita, takaikaikana." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wangye, rinda ebigambo byangye, Kandi ebiragiro byangye obyezirikye." 
Proverbs7:2 Ogume oyorobere ebiragiro byangye, obone kugumaho; N'ebi ndikwegyesa obirinde nk'emboni y'eriisho ryawe." 
Proverbs7:3 Bikome aha nkumu zaawe, Obihandiikye aha kishate ky'omutima gwawe." 
Proverbs7:4 Gira Bwengye oti: Niiwe munyaanyazi; Kandi okwetegyereza okwete munywani waawe ow'aha mara. 
Proverbs7:5 Ebyo bikurinde omukazi enshambani, N'akarimi karungi ak'omukazi owaariire enshoni." 
Proverbs7:6 Ahakuba nkaringuririza Omu dirisa y'enju yangye," 
Proverbs7:7 Naareeba, kandi naayetegyereza, Omu batsigazi abataine bwengye," 
Proverbs7:8 Naaraba omu nguuto eririkuraba haihi n'akeekubo k'aha nju y'ogwo mukazi, Agyemire omuhanda ogurikuzayo," 
Proverbs7:9 Omu rwita-waabo omu mwabazyo, Nyekiro omu mwirima ndindindi." 
Proverbs7:10 Kandi reeba ogwo mukazi yaamubugana, Ajwaire eby'obwamaraarya, aine omutima gw'oburyarya." 
Proverbs7:11 N'omukazi omuhwa-nshoni kandi ekyegyengye, Ou ebigyere bye bitaikara mu nju." 
Proverbs7:12 Obumwe aza omu nguuto, obundi omu katare, Naategyereza ahari buri keekubo k'omuhanda." 
Proverbs7:13 Ku yamureebire, yaamukwata, yaamunywegyera, Yaagamba nawe ataine kashoni, naamugira ati:" 
Proverbs7:14 Mbaire ndi ow'okuhonga empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, Mbwenu ebi naaraganiise naabiheza eri izooba." 
Proverbs7:15 Nikyo naizira hati kukubugana, Ninkusherura nkwiniire orushusho; mbwenu naakubona." 
Proverbs7:16 Ekitabo kyangye nkyazireho emyenda etariize eya bafuta, Ecwererainemu amabara g'emyenda ya Misri." 
Proverbs7:17 Nyoteire ekitanda kyangye n'emigaju erikutaamirana Ya sumuruna n'obunyanunga n'omudarasiini. 
Proverbs7:18 Ija tuhikiirize okukundana kwaitu, burugyeho busheeshe, Tweshemeze omu kukundana kwaitu;" 
Proverbs7:19 Ahakuba ibanye tarimu, Azindukiire hare;" 
Proverbs7:20 Atwaire enshaho y'empiiha; Aryagaruka okwezi kuri ekizooro. 
Proverbs7:21 Ahabw'ebigambo ebirikunuriirira, yaamubeihabeiha, Yaamutwaza akarimi karungi." 
Proverbs7:22 Ahonaaho yaamukurata, Nk'ente erikuza kubaagwa, Nk'omugwa-iraro orikutwarwa omu nkomo kuhanwa;" 
Proverbs7:23 Okuhitsya obu omwambi gwamucumitsire omu kitugu; Nk'oku enyonyi eiruka ekagwa omu mutego, Etarikumanya ku amagara gaayo gategirwe." 
Proverbs7:24 Mbwenu baana bangye, mutegye amatu; Mute omutima aha bigambo ebirikuruga omu kanwa kangye." 
Proverbs7:25 Otaikiriza omutima gwawe kuhungutukira omu mihanda ye, Otahabira omu tuhanda twe;" 
Proverbs7:26 Ahabw'okuba agwisize baingi; Eego, boona abu araitsire n'eihe rihango." 
Proverbs7:27 Enju ye n'omuhanda ogurikuza Okuzimu, nigushuuma omu bishengye bya rufu." 
Proverbs8:1 Bwangye tarikweta, Kandi Kwetegyereza tarikwimutsya eiraka rye?" 
Proverbs8:2 Ayemereire aha mutwe gw'ebibungo, Omu nteeraniro z'emihanda," 
Proverbs8:3 Aha rubaju rw'amarembo omu maisho g'orurembo, Ahu orikutaahira nooza omu irembo, niho arikwetera n'eiraka rihango naagira ati:" 
Proverbs8:4 Imwe bashaija 'mwe, manya niimwe ndikweta, Kandi eiraka ryangye niryeta abaana b'abantu." 
Proverbs8:5 Imwe abataine bwengye, mwegye okwerinda, Naimwe abashema, mugire omutima ogurikwetegyereza." 
Proverbs8:6 Muhurire, ahabw'okuba ebi naaza kubagambira ni bikuru, Kandi eminwa yangye neija kugamba ebihikire;" 
Proverbs8:7 Ahakuba akanwa kangye kaaza kugamba amazima, Kandi okugamba ebibi eminwa yangye nikyo enuga." 
Proverbs8:8 Ebigambo by'omu kanwa kangye byona bihikiriire; Tibirimu kigambo na kimwe ekikiikakiikire nari ekitegami; 
Proverbs8:9 Byona nibishoborokyera orikwetegyereza, Kandi n'ebihikire aha barikuzoora okumanya." 
Proverbs8:10 Mwakiire okwegyesa kwangye okukira efeeza, N'okumanya okukira ezaabu etoorainwe;" 
Proverbs8:11 Ahabw'okuba obwengye nibukira amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi, Kandi omu birikwetengwa byona tihaine kirikwingana nabwo." 
Proverbs8:12 Nyowe Bwengye, okwerinda nkakugira obutaaho bwangye, Nzoire okumanya n'okwetwara." 
Proverbs8:13 Okutiina MUKAMA nikwo kwanga ebibi; amaryo n'emyehimbiso, omuhanda gw'obubi, N'ebigambo by'okwehabagiza nibyo nyanga." 
Proverbs8:14 Niinye mukama w'enaama n'obwengye obuhikire, Niinye kwetegyereza, kandi nyine obushoboorozi," 
Proverbs8:15 Abagabe bategyeka ahabwangye, N'abategyeki bataho ebiragiro by'oburyo." 
Proverbs8:16 Ahabwangye abanyiginya bategyeka N'abakungu batwara ensi. 
Proverbs8:17 Abankunda mbakunda, N'abataho omutima kunsherura, bambona." 
Proverbs8:18 Eitungo n'ekitiinisa niinye mbiine, Hamwe n'obutungi oburikugumaho n'okugogyera." 
Proverbs8:19 Ebijuma byangye nibikira ezaabu, nangwa n'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, Kandi ebi nyerize nibikira efeeza etoorainwe." 
Proverbs8:20 Ngyendera omu mihanda y'okuhikiirira, N'omu tuhanda tw'oburyo," 
Proverbs8:21 Ngu mbone kutungisa abarikunkunda, N'okwijuza amabiikiro gaabo." 
Proverbs8:22 MUKAMA akampanga naakitandika emirimo ye, Atakagizire ki yaahanga." 
Proverbs8:23 Okwiha ira ryona nkateebwaho, Omu kutandika, ensi etakahangirwe." 
Proverbs8:24 Okuzimu etakabaireho nkoorekwa butunu, Enshuro ezirikuhimintika amaizi maingi zitakabaireho," 
Proverbs8:25 Enshozi zitakahangirwe, N'ebibungo bitakabaireho, nibwo naayorekwa;" 
Proverbs8:26 Ruhanga atakahangire nsi n'obwerere, N'obu gwakuba omucuucu gw'omu nsi ogwabandize." 
Proverbs8:27 Obu yaataho eiguru, nkaba ndiho; Obu yaataho obugarukiro bw'okuzimu," 
Proverbs8:28 Obu yaahamya eiguru ahaiguru, Obu yaataho enshuro z'okuzimu," 
Proverbs8:29 Obu yaateeraho enyanja obugarukiro, Ngu amaizi gatarenga emisingi y'ensi;" 
Proverbs8:30 Obwo nkaba ndi hamwe nawe, ndi omukozi mukuru; Obutoosha niinye naabaire ndi okushemererwa kwe, Niinyesiimira omu maisho ge buri izooba," 
Proverbs8:31 Niinyesiimira omu nsi eyaahangirwe kutuurwamu, Kandi okushemererwa kwangye kukaba kuri okuguma n'abntu." 
Proverbs8:32 Mbwenu hati, baana bangye, mumpurire, Ahabw'okuba abarikugumizamu emihanda yangye bahiiriirwe." 
Proverbs8:33 Muhurire ebi ndikubahabura, Mugire obwengye, mutabyanga." 
Proverbs8:34 Ohiiriirwe n'orikuunyorobera, Akaguma omu marembo gangye naareeba, Ategyerereize aha biti by'emiryango yangye;" 
Proverbs8:35 Ahabw'okuba ondeebire weena aba aboine amagara, Kandi atunga obushongore ahari MUKAMA;" 
Proverbs8:36 Kwonka orikuncumuraho, naaba asiisire amagara ge. Boona abarikuunyanga, nibaba bakunzire rufu." 
Proverbs9:1 Bwengye ayombekire enju ye, Yaabyara enyomyo ze mushanju." 
Proverbs9:2 Aitsire amatungo ge, yaaturira viinyo ye, Yaatebeekanisa emeeza ye." 
Proverbs9:3 Yaatuma abazaana be kweta n'eiraka rihango, Beemereire omu myanya mikuru y'omu irembo etunguukire Nibagira bati:" 
Proverbs9:4 Weena otaine bugobya, aije aha! Kandi nawe naagambira abataine bwengye ati:" 
Proverbs9:5 Mwije murye aha by'okurya byangye, Kandi munywe ahari viinyo ei nturiire."
