Proverbs9:6 Murekye obushema, mubone kugumaho, N'okugyendera omu muhanda gw'okwetegyereza." 
Proverbs9:7 Orikuhana omugayi, naaba ayereeteire okujumwa; Kandi orikuhana enkozi y'ebibi, naaba ayegwisiize akagwe." 
Proverbs9:8 Otarihana omugayi, nyentsya akakwanga; Ohane omunyabwengye, naija kukukunda." 
Proverbs9:9 Ohabure omunyabwengye, aryayeyongyera kugira obwengye; Oyegyese ohikiriire, naija kweyongyera kwega." 
Proverbs9:10 Okutiina MUKAMA nibwo butandikiro bw'obwengye, N'okumanya Orikwera nikwo kwetegyereza;" 
Proverbs9:11 Ahakuba niinye ndikanyisa ebiro byawe, Nkakwongyeraho emyaka ei orimara omu nsi." 
Proverbs9:12 Ku oraabe oine obwengye, obweiniire; Kandi ku oraabe omugayi, noomwebeera." 
Proverbs9:13 Omukazi ekifa-mutima ayomba, Tagira buntu, kandi tagira kashoni." 
Proverbs9:14 Ashutama aha muryango gw'enju ye, Kandi arumbaara aha kitebe omu myanya mikuru y'orurembo" 
Proverbs9:15 Kweta abarikuhingura, Abakwaitse emihanda yaabo naagira ati:" 
Proverbs9:16 Otaine bugobya aije aha! Kandi agambira abataine bwengye ati: 
Proverbs9:17 Amaizi g'enyibano ganura, Kandi ebiriibwa bwesherekye nibyo bishemeza." 
Proverbs9:18 Kwonka we tamanya ku abafu niyo bari, Kandi n'abagyenyi be ku bari okuzimu owa Nyamuteza." 
Proverbs10:1 Enfumu za Sulemaani. Omwana w'obwengye ashemeza ishe; Kwonka omwana omushema agwisa kubi nyina. 
Proverbs10:2 Obutungi oburugire omu bibi tibugira mugasho, Kwonka okuhikiirira kujuna omuntu omu kufa." 
Proverbs10:3 MUKAMA tarireka bahikiriire kwitwa enjara, Kwonka okwetenga kw'ababi akurwanisa." 
Proverbs10:4 Engaro z'omweremwa zireeta obworo, Kwonka ez'omweziriki zimutungisa." 
Proverbs10:5 Omwana oshaaruura omu kyanda aba aine obwengye, Kwonka ogwejegyera omu igyesha aitsa enshoni." 
Proverbs10:6 Emigisha eba aha mutwe gw'ohikiriire, Kwonka akanwa k'omubi kashereka okukora kubi." 
Proverbs10:7 Okwijuka ohikiriire kureeta omugisha, Kwonka eiziina ry'omubi riryajunda." 
Proverbs10:8 Omunyabwengye omu mutima ayeta aha biragiro, Kwonka omushema engambi ya maingi aryagwa." 
Proverbs10:9 Orikugyendera omu bwesigwa, naagyenda ahamire, Kwonka orikwehabagiza aryamanywa." 
Proverbs10:10 Oitira abandi eriisho ateerana abantu, Kwonka ohana butunu areeta obusingye." 
Proverbs10:11 Akanwa k'ohikiriire n'enshuro y'amagara, Kwonka akanwa k'omubi kashereka okukora kubi." 
Proverbs10:12 Okwangana kureeta okurwana, Kwonka okukundana kushweka ebishobyo byona." 
Proverbs10:13 Eminwa y'orikwetegyereza ereebekwaho obwengye, Kwonka amabega g'otaine bwengye gaba ag'enkoni." 
Proverbs10:14 Abanyabwengye babiika okumanya, Kwonka omushema w'orurimi ayekururira okucwekyerera." 
Proverbs10:15 Eitungo ry'omutungi rimubeera orurembo rugumire; Ekicwekyereza abooro n'obworo bwabo. 
Proverbs10:16 Ebi ohikiriire akora bimureetera amagara; Amagoba g'omubi gamureeteera okukora ekibi. 
Proverbs10:17 Okunda kuhaburwa aba ari omu muhanda gw'amagara, Kwonka nyantagambirwa ahaba." 
Proverbs10:18 Oshereka orwango, agira eminwa y'ebishuba, Kandi obeiherera abandi aba ekifa-mutima." 
Proverbs10:19 Ebigambo bingi tibiburamu kushobya, Kwonka oyerinda omu bi arikugamba, aba aine obwengye." 
Proverbs10:20 Orurimi rw'ohikiriire n'efeeza etoorainwe, Omutima gw'enkozi y'ebibi gugasha kakye." 
Proverbs10:21 Eminwa y'ohikiriire egaburira baingi, Kwonka abashema bafa, bazira okutagira bwengye." 
Proverbs10:22 Omugisha ogu MUKAMA aha, gutungisa abantu, Kandi tagwongyeraho busaasi." 
Proverbs10:23 Aha mushema, okukora kubi ni nk'omuzaano, Kwonka orikwetegyereza eki ayesiimira n'okukora n'obwengye." 
Proverbs10:24 Eki omubi atiina kiryamuhikaho, Kandi eki ohikiriire ayetenga aryakiheebwa." 
Proverbs10:25 Omuyaga gw'akasooroora ku gurabaho, omubi ahwaho; Kwonka ohikiriire aguma ahamire ebiro byona." 
Proverbs10:26 Nk'oku viinyo erikushaarira ereeta amangigina, Kandi nk'oku omwika gusaasa amaisho, N'orikweganda nikwo aba aha barikumutuma." 
Proverbs10:27 Okutiina MUKAMA kureeta okuhangaara, Kwonka emyaka y'omubi eryacuubwaho." 
Proverbs10:28 Omuheru gw'amatsiko g'ohikiriire n'okushemererwa, Kwonka amatsiko g'omubi garyabura." 
Proverbs10:29 MUKAMA n'orugo rugumire aha muntu ou omuhanda gwe gugororokire, Kwonka aha nkozi z'ebibi n'okucwekyerera." 
Proverbs10:30 Ohikiriire tarihwaho na kakye, Kwonka omubi tariguma mu nsi." 
Proverbs10:31 Akanwa k'ohikiriire karugwamu obwengye, Kwonka orurimi orurikwehabagiza ruryacuubwaho." 
Proverbs10:32 Eminwa y'ohikiriire emanya ebirikusiimwa, Kwonka akanwa k'omubi kagamba ebikiikami." 
Proverbs11:1 Eminzani y'oburyarya n'ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA, Kwonka ebipimo by'amazima bimushemeza." 
Proverbs11:2 Amaryo gakuratwa okuhemuka, Kwonka obwengye bugirwa abacureezi." 
Proverbs11:3 Obwesigwa bw'abahikiriire bubahabura, Kwonka obugobya bw'abarikureebya buryabacwekyereza." 
Proverbs11:4 Eitungo tiriine ki rigasha aha izooba ry'ekiniga, Kwonka okuhikiirira kwiha omu kufa." 
Proverbs11:5 Okuhikiirira kw'otaine kamogo kumushorongyeza omuhanda, Kwonka omubi agwisibwa obubi bwe." 
Proverbs11:6 Okuhikiirira kw'abahikire kuryabajuna, Kwonka abarikureebya baryakwatwa eitima ryabo." 
Proverbs11:7 Omubi ku afa, amatsiko ge gahwaho, Kandi amatsiko g'abatarikutiina Ruhanga gahwerekyerera." 
Proverbs11:8 Ohikiriire ajunwa omu kabi, Omubi aba niwe yaakagwamu." 
Proverbs11:9 Otarikutiina Ruhanga acwekyereza mutaahi we n'akanwa ke, Kwonka abahikiriire baryatambirwa okumanya." 
Proverbs11:10 Abahikiriire ku baba gye, orurembo rushemererwa; Kandi ababi ku bacwekyerera, habaho okuteera akaari." 
Proverbs11:11 Orurembo rutunguurwa omugisha gw'ow'omutima ogugororokire, Kwonka rusheenywa akanwa k'omubi." 
Proverbs11:12 Ocamura mutaahi we, aba ataine bwengye; Kwonka omuntu orikwetegyereza aguma ayehunamiire." 
Proverbs11:13 Orikugyenda naagambuura bagyenzi be, agamba emibonano, Kwonka ow'omutima gw'obwesigwa tagigamba." 
Proverbs11:14 Ahu abahabuzi b'obwengye batari, abantu bagwa; Kwonka ahu abahi b'obwengye bari, habaho obusingye." 
Proverbs11:15 Orikwemererera ou atarikumanya, aryakizira; Kwonka orikwanga okwemererera, naaguma ari buhooro." 
Proverbs11:16 Omukazi w'embabazi aheebwa ekitiinisa; Abarikuunyagisa amaani bagira obutungi. 
Proverbs11:17 Ow'embabazi ayezimuurira ebirungi, Kwonka omunyamwaga ayesaasa." 
Proverbs11:18 Omubi aheebwa ebihembo by'omuyaayuuko, Kwonka orikubiba okuhikiirira taribura kutunga ebihembo by'amazima." 
Proverbs11:19 Orikuhamira omu kuhikiirira aryagumaho, Kwonka orikukuratira ebibi aryafa." 
Proverbs11:20 Abaine omutima ogurikwehabagiza n'ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA, Kwonka ab'emitwarize ehikire bamushemeza." 
Proverbs11:21 Mumanyire kimwe ngu omunyabibi taribura kufubirwa, Kwonka abahikiriire baryajunwa." 
Proverbs11:22 Omukazi murungi otaine mutima Ni nk'empeta y'ezaabu ejwekirwe omu nyindo z'empunu. 
Proverbs11:23 Omuheru gw'ebi ohikiriire ayetenga n'ebirungi bisha, Kwonka ogw'amatsiko g'omubi n'okugirirwa ekiniga." 
Proverbs11:24 Omuntu, n'obu agabisa emikono ebiri, ayeyongyera kutunga; Ondiijo aima eki ashemereire kuha, haza kimureetera kugira obworo bwonka." 
Proverbs11:25 Omuntu efura aryatunga, Kandi orikuha abandi amaizi, nawe aryagaheebwa." 
Proverbs11:26 Orikwima abantu engano, aryajumwa boona; Kwonka omugisha guryaba ahari orikuzibaguza." 
Proverbs11:27 Orikwezirika kusherura ebirungi, aba ayesheruriire okukundwa; Kwonka orikwendeza abandi obubi, buryamugarukana." 
Proverbs11:28 Orikwesiga eitungo rye aryahotoka, Kwonka ohikiriire aryabengyeya nk'eibabi ribisi." 
Proverbs11:29 Orikurabanisamu eka ye, aryahungura omuyaga, Kandi omushema aryahakwa omunyabwengye." 
Proverbs11:30 Ebyana by'ohikiriire n'ekiti ky'amagara, Kandi oine obwengye ajunisa abantu." 
Proverbs11:31 Abahikiriire ku baraabe nibafubirwa bakiri omu nsi, Kaashwa ababi n'abasiisi." 
Proverbs12:1 Okunda kuhanwa aba naakunda obwengye, Kwonka oyanga kuhanwa aba ari omushema." 
Proverbs12:2 Omuntu murungi agira obushongore ahari MUKAMA, Kwonka ogira enaama mbi, MUKAMA amucwera orubanja." 
Proverbs12:3 Omuntu tahamibwa bubi, Kwonka emizi y'abahikiriire terikuurwa." 
Proverbs12:4 Omukazi w'emicwe mirungi aba ekirunga kya iba, Kwonka okora ebirikuhemura buba obujunde omu magufa ge." 
Proverbs12:5 Ebiteekateeko by'ohikiriire n'eby'oburyo, Kwonka okuhanuura kw'ababi n'okureebya." 
Proverbs12:6 Ebigambo by'ababi biba eby'okugwera kujwisa eshagama, Kwonka akanwa k'abaine emitima egororokire kakiza abantu." 
Proverbs12:7 Ababi banagwa ahansi, bahwaho; Kwonka enju y'abahikiriire eryagumaho." 
Proverbs12:8 Omuntu asiimwa nk'oku obwengye bwe buri, Kwonka ow'omutima ogurikwehabagiza agaywa." 
Proverbs12:9 Omuntu otaine kitiinisa, orikwekorera, Naakira orikwegira mukuru, haza ataine ky'okurya." 
Proverbs12:10 Omuntu ohikiriire ata omutima aha matungo ge, Kwonka embabazi z'omubi guba omwaga." 
Proverbs12:11 Ohinga emisiri ye, agira eby'okurya bingi; Kwonka okuratira ebitaine mugasho, tagira bwengye." 
Proverbs12:12 Omunaara gugumire ogw'ababi gusheenyagurika, Kwonka emizi y'abahikiriire eguma ehamire." 
Proverbs12:13 Okushobya kw'eminwa y'omubi kumunaga omu mutego, Kwonka ohikiriire akira enaku." 
Proverbs12:14 Ebiruga omu kanwa k'omuntu nibyo bimuhaazya ebirungi; Kandi ebi omuntu akora n'engaro ze nibyo azimuurirwa. 
Proverbs12:15 Omuhanda gw'omushema omu kureeba kwe guba guhikire, Kwonka omunyabwengye aikiriza kuhaburwa." 
Proverbs12:16 Okuguubwa kubi kw'omushema kumanywa ahonaaho, Kwonka omuntu orikwerinda tayeta ha bijumo." 
Proverbs12:17 Ogamba amazima, aha obwakareebi obuhikire; Kwonka kareebi ow'ebishuba agamba eby'obugobya." 
Proverbs12:18 Hariho orahukiiriza ebigambo, ebirikucumita nka rurara, Kwonka orurimi rw'omunyabwengye rutamba." 
Proverbs12:19 Eminwa egamba amazima egumaho ebiro byona, Kwonka orurimi orubeiha ruba orw'akaanya kakye." 
Proverbs12:20 Obugobya buba omu mitima y'abaza omu naama z'obubi, Kwonka abo abaza omu naama z'obusingye bagira okushemererwa." 
Proverbs12:21 Ohikiriire tahikwaho kabi, Kwonka ababi batuura baijwire enaku." 
Proverbs12:22 Eminwa ebeiha eba ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA, Kwonka abakora eby'obwesigwa nibo ashemerererwa." 
Proverbs12:23 Omuntu orikwerinda ashereka okumanya kwe, Kwonka abashema babuzya obushema bwabo." 
Proverbs12:24 Omukono gw'omweziriki guryategyeka, Kwonka omweremwa aryakoresibwa eby'obuhuuku." 
Proverbs12:25 Amaganya g'omutima gw'omuntu gamureetera okweyinamirira, Kwonka ekigambo kirungi kigushemeza." 
Proverbs12:26 Omuntu ohikiriire ayebembera mutaahi we, Kwonka omuhanda gw'ababi gubahabya." 
Proverbs12:27 Omweremwa takwata ki ahiigire, Kwonka omweziriki aryatunga ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi." 
Proverbs12:28 Omu muhanda gw'okuhikiirira harimu amagara, Kwonka omuhanda gw'okushobya gutwara omu kufa." 
Proverbs13:1 Omwana oine obwengye ahurira okuhabura kwa ishe, Kwonka omugayi taikiriza kuhanwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Omuntu arya ebirungi naabiiha omu birikuruga omu kanwa ke, Kwonka eki endeebya zeetenga n'okunyagisa abandi amaani." 
Proverbs13:3 Orinda akanwa ke aba arinzire amagara ge, Kwonka okaashamya munonga aryacwekyerera." 
Proverbs13:4 Omutima gw'omweremwa gwetenga, haza tiguritunga; Kwonka omutima gw'omweziriki guhaaga ebirungi." 
Proverbs13:5 Omuntu ohikiriire ayanga ebishuba, Kwonka omubi ayetamisa, kandi ayehemura." 
Proverbs13:6 Okuhikiirira kurinda ou omuhanda gwe gugororokire, Kwonka obubi bugwisa ababi." 
Proverbs13:7 Hariho oyegira omutungi, haza ataine ki arine; Kandi hariho oyegira omworo, haza aine eitungo ringi." 
Proverbs13:8 Amagara g'omuntu gacungurwa eitungo rye, Kwonka omworo tagira ky'okumucungura." 
Proverbs13:9 Omushana gw'ohikiriire gwaka gye, Kwonka etabaaza y'omubi eryaraazibwa." 
Proverbs13:10 Amaryo gareeta entongane zonka, Kwonka obwengye bugirwa abaikiriza kuhaburwa." 
Proverbs13:11 Eitungo rya bugubugu riryatuuba, Kwonka orikutunga mporampora aryarikanyisa." 
Proverbs13:12 Amatsiko gatahweire garusya omutima, Kwonka ekirikwetengwa ku kiboneka, kiba ekiri ky'amagara." 
Proverbs13:13 Ogaya ekigambo kya Ruhanga, ayereetera kucwekyerera, Kwonka oyorobera ekiragiro kye, aryaheebwa ebihembo." 
Proverbs13:14 Okwegyesa kw'abanyabwengye n'enshuro y'amagara, Kureetera omuntu kwetantara emitego ya rufu." 
Proverbs13:15 Okumanya okuhikire kureeta obushongore, Kwonka omuhanda gw'abasiisi gurusya." 
Proverbs13:16 Orikwerinda weena akoresa okumanya, Kwonka omushema ayoreka obushema bwe butunu." 
Proverbs13:17 Entumwa mbi enaga abantu omu kabi, Kwonka entumwa erikwesigwa ereeta obugwa gye." 
Proverbs13:18 Oyanga kuhaburwa, omugabo gwe guba obworo n'okuhemuka, Kwonka okunda kuhanwa aryaheebwa ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs13:19 Ebirikwetengwa ku bihikiirizibwa, bishemeza omutima, Kwonka okwetantara ebibi n'ekirikunugwa aha bashema." 
Proverbs13:20 Ogyenda n'abanyabwengye, nawe ahinduka omunyabwengye, Kwonka mungyenzi w'abashema aryakizira." 
Proverbs13:21 Akagwe kahiiga abasiisi, Kwonka abahikiriire baryaheebwa okugogyera." 
Proverbs13:22 Omuntu murungi atsigira abaijukuru obuhunguzi, Kwonka eitungo ry'omusiisi ribiikirwa abahikiriire." 
Proverbs13:23 Emisiri y'abooro eyeza bingi, Kwonka ehwa neenyagirwa busha." 
Proverbs13:24 Otateera mwana we, amwanga, Kwonka omukunda, amuhana bukiri kare." 
Proverbs13:25 Ohikiriire agira ebirikumuhaazya, Kwonka enda y'omubi eguma n'enjara." 
Proverbs14:1 Omukazi w'obwengye weena ayombeka eka ye, Kwonka omukazi omushema agyesheenyera." 
Proverbs14:2 Ogyenda n'omutima ogugororokire aba naatiina MUKAMA, Kwonka oyehabagiza omu mihanda ye, aba naamugaya." 
Proverbs14:3 Ebi omushema agamba bimuteeza enkono y'amabega, Kwonka eminwa y'abanyabwengye eryabarinda." 
Proverbs14:4 Ahu ente z'okuhingisa zitari, tihagira bihunikirwe; Kwonka ahabw'amaani g'ezo nte ebyezire biba bingi." 
Proverbs14:5 Kareebi orikwesigwa tabeiha, Kwonka kareebi ow'ebishuba abeiha." 
Proverbs14:6 Omuteezi w'enaku ayeruhiza busha kusherura obwengye, Kwonka okumanya kurahukira orikwetegyereza." 
Proverbs14:7 Ruga aha mushema, Ahakuba tihariho kigambo ky'obwengye, eki orimushangamu." 
Proverbs14:8 Obwengye bw'omwerinzi n'okumanya omuhanda gwe, Kwonka obushema bw'abashema n'okugobya." 
Proverbs14:9 Ekibi kiryarya abashema, Kwonaka ab'emitima egororokire bagira obushongore." 
Proverbs14:10 Obusaasi bumanywa omutima ogu burimu, Kandi omu kushemererwa kwagwo tihariho mugyenyi okwatanisa nagwo." 
Proverbs14:11 Enju y'omubi ryasheenywa, Kwonka eihema ry'ow'omutima gugororokire riryahama." 
Proverbs14:12 Hariho omuhanda ogu omuntu ayeta murungi, Kwonka omuheru gwagwo guri omuhanda gw'okufa." 
Proverbs14:13 Nangwa n'obu asheka, omutima gwe guguma gwine obusaasi, Kandi omuheru gw'okushemererwa n'enaku." 
Proverbs14:14 Omuntu orikwehabagiza aryahaagibwa ebyana by'emitwarize ye, Kandi omuntu murungi aryahaagibwa ebyana by'ebi arikukora." 
Proverbs14:15 Otaine bwengye aikiririza eryo, Kwonka omwerinzi ayetegyereza ahu arikuraba." 
Proverbs14:16 Omunyabwengye ayerinda, kandi ayetantara obubi, Kwonka omushema tayenda kutegyekwa, kandi tagira ki ayetaho." 
Proverbs14:17 Orahuka kugira ekiniga, akora eby'obushema; Kwonka omuntu orikwerinda agumisiriza." 
Proverbs14:18 Abataine bwengye batunga obushema, Kwonka abeerinzi bajwekwa ekirunga ky'okumanya." 
Proverbs14:19 Enkozi z'ebibi ziinamira abarungi, N'ababi baguma aha marembo g'abahikiriire." 
Proverbs14:20 Omworo ayangwa; nangwa na bataahi be tibamwenda; Kwonka omutungi agira abanyamikago baingi. 
Proverbs14:21 Orikugaya mutaahi we n'omusiisi, Kwonka orikugirira abooro embabazi, ahiiriirwe." 
Proverbs14:22 Abagira enaama mbi, baba batahabire? Kwonka abagira enaama nungi, baryakorerwa eby'embabazi n'eby'amazima." 
Proverbs14:23 Omu kufa kubi okw'emiringo yoona habamu omugasho; Kwonka okugamba kwonka kureeta obworo. 
Proverbs14:24 Ekirunga ky'abanyabwengye n'obutungi bwabo, Kwonka obushema n'eihunde ry'abashema." 
Proverbs14:25 Kareebi ow'amazima akiza amagara g'abantu, Kwonka ogamba ebishuba aba omureebya." 
Proverbs14:26 Omu kutiima MUKAMA omuntu agiriramu obwesigye buhamire, Kandi abaana be baryabona obuhungiro." 
Proverbs14:27 Okutiina MUKAMA n'enshuro y'amagara, Kureetera abantu kuruga omu mitego ya rufu." 
Proverbs14:28 Ekihaisa omugabe ekitiinisa n'okugira abantu baingi munonga, Kwonka omutegyeki otaine bantu acwekyerera." 
Proverbs14:29 Otarahuka kugira kiniga, aba aine okwetegyereza kwingi, Kwonka orahuka kukigira, ahimbisisa obushema." 
Proverbs14:30 Omutima ogutuurize gureetera omubiri amagara, Kwonka eihari rireetera amagufa kujunda." 
Proverbs14:31 Ohata omunaku, aba naajuma Omuhangi we, Kwonka ogirira abakyene embabazi, amuha ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs14:32 Omubi agarurwa ahansi okukora kubi kwe, Kwonka ohikiriire aguma n'amatsiko, nangwa n'omu kufa kwe." 
Proverbs14:33 Obwengye butuura omu mutima gw'orikwetegyereza, Kwonka omu mitima y'abashema tibumanywamu." 
Proverbs14:34 Okuhikiirira kuhimbisisa eihanga; Kwonka ekibi kijumisa ibara ihanga. 
Proverbs14:35 Omugabe agirira embabazi omugaragwa orikukora n'obwengye; Kwonka agirira ekiniga orikukora ebirikuhemura. 
Proverbs15:1 Okugarukamu gey kwikaikanisa ekiniga; Kwonka ekigambo ekirikusaasa kiimutsya ekiniga. 
Proverbs15:2 Orurimi rw'abanyabwengye rumanyisa okumanya nk'oku kishemereire, Kwonka akanwa k'abashema kafukunkuka eby'obushema." 
Proverbs15:3 Amaisho ga MUKAMA gaba hoonahoona, Gareeba ababi n'abarungi." 
Proverbs15:4 Orurimi orurikukiza n'ekiti ky'amagara; Kwonka ku rukiikama, omutima gucweka." 
Proverbs15:5 Omushema agaya okuhabura kwa ishe, Kwonka ota omutima aha kuhanwa, niwe aba omwerinzi." 
Proverbs15:6 Omu nju y'ohikiriire habamu obutungi bwingi, Kwonka omu magoba g'omubi habamu enaku." 
Proverbs15:7 Eminwa y'abanyabwengye ebuzya okumanya, Kwonka emitima y'abashema tekora etyo." 
Proverbs15:8 Ekitambo ky'omubi n'ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA, Kwonka okushaba kw'ow'omutima ogugororokire nikwo ashemerererwa." 
Proverbs15:9 Omuhanda gw'omubi n'ogurikunugwa ahari MUKAMA, Kwonka akunda orikukuratira okuhikiirira." 
Proverbs15:10 Orikuteishuka omuhanda naaheebwa ekifubiro ekirikusaasa, Kwonka orikwanga kuhanwa aryafa." 
Proverbs15:11 Okuzimu n'okucwekyerera nibireebwa butunu omu maisho ga MUKAMA, Kaashwa ebiri omu mitima y'abantu!" 
Proverbs15:12 Omugayi takunda kuhanwa, Kandi taza w'abanyabwengye." 
Proverbs15:13 Omutima gunanukire gushemuura ahamaisho, Kwonka omutima ogwine obusaasi gureeta okwehwa amatsiko." 
Proverbs15:14 Omutima gw'orikwetegyereza gusherura okumanya, Kwonka akanwa k'abashema katungwa obushema." 
Proverbs15:15 Ebiro by'abarikubonabona byona ni bibi, Kwonka oine omutima ogushemereirwe ni nk'omuntu otuura omu bugyenyi." 
Proverbs15:16 Akakye akarimu okutiina MUKAMA Nikakira obutungi bwingi oburimu obujune. 
Proverbs15:17 Okurya obunyaata okurimu okukundana Nikukira okurya ente y'ebishaju okurimu okwangana. 
Proverbs15:18 Orahuka kubakirwa aimutsya entongane, Otarahuka kugira kiniga acureeza empaka." 
Proverbs15:19 Omuhanda gw'omweremwa gufa ahabw'okumerwamu amahwa, Kwonka akahanda k'ow'omutima ogugororokire guba omuhanda rugyendwa." 
Proverbs15:20 Omwana oine obwengye ashemeza ishe, Kwonka omuntu omushema agaya nyina." 
Proverbs15:21 Obushema bureetera otaine bwengye kushemererwa, Kwonka omuntu orikwetegyereza ayetebeekanisiza omuhanda oguhikire." 
Proverbs15:22 Ahatari kuhanuura enaama zifa busha, Kwonka ahu abahi b'obwengye bari baingi, zihikiirizibwa." 
Proverbs15:23 Okugarukamu gye kureetera omuntu kushemererwa, Kandi ekigambo ekigambiirwe omu bunaku bwakyo ka ni kirungi!" 
Proverbs15:24 Aha munyabwengye omuhanda gw'amagara gwinamuka, Ngu abone kuruga okuzimu owa Nyamuteza." 
Proverbs15:25 MUKAMA asheenyera kimwe orugo rw'ab'amaryo, Kwonka ahamya orubibi rw'omufaakazi." 
Proverbs15:26 Ebiteekateeko by'ababi n'ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA, Ebigambo by'abashemeire bimushemeza." 
Proverbs15:27 Omunyamururu gw'amagoba agatahikire areetera eka ye omurabanamu; Kwonka orikwanga enguzi aryagumaho. 
Proverbs15:28 Omutima gw'ohikiriire guteekateeka oku araagarukyemu, Kwonka akanwa k'omubi kafukunkuka ebigambo bibi." 
Proverbs15:29 MUKAMA aba hare enkozi z'ebibi, Kwonka ahurira okushaba kw'ohikiriire." 
Proverbs15:30 Amaisho gashemuukire gashemeza omutima, N'enkuru nungi ziruhuura amagufa." 
Proverbs15:31 Orikutega okutu okuhana kurungi Aryatuura n'abanyabwengye. 
Proverbs15:32 Oyanga kuhanwa aba naayeyanga, Kwonka ota omutima aha kuhanwa ayeyongyera okwetegyereza." 
Proverbs15:33 Okutiina MUKAMA nikwo kuhaburwa omu by'obwengye, Kandi okwecureeza kukuratwa ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs16:1 Enaama ei omuntu agira omu mutima ebe eye, Kwonka ogarukamu kw'orurimi kuruga ahari MUKAMA." 
Proverbs16:2 Emitwarize y'omuntu yoona, omu kureeba kwe, eba eshemeire; Kwonka MUKAMA apima emitima." 
Proverbs16:3 Emirimo yaawe gyegyekyerere MUKAMA; Obwo nibwo enaama zaawe zirihamibwa. 
Proverbs16:4 Buri kintu MUKAMA agira eki yaakihangiire; Nangwa n'ababi akabateeraho ekiro ky'enaku. 
Proverbs16:5 Omuntu weena ow'amaryo g'omu mutima n'ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA, Buzimazima taribura kufubirwa." 
Proverbs16:6 Embabazi n'amazima nibyo birihiirira okutahikiirira, Kandi okutiina MUKAMA nikwo kurekyesa abantu eibi." 
Proverbs16:7 Emitwarize y'omuntu ku eshemeza MUKAMA, Areetera abantu kuba gye nawe, nangwa n'abazigu be." 
Proverbs16:8 Akakye akarimu okuhikiirira Nikakira empiiha nyingi ezitungirwa omu kutahikiirira. 
Proverbs16:9 Omutima gw'omuntu guteekateeka eby'orugyendo rwe; Kwonka MUKAMA niwe amuhabura oku araateere entambwe. 
Proverbs16:10 Okuragura okuri nk'okwa Ruhanga kuruga aha rurimi rw'omugabe; Omu kucwa emanja akanwa ke tikashobya. 
Proverbs16:11 Eminzaani ehikire n'eby'okupimisa n'ebya MUKAMA, N'amabaare goona agarikupima ag'omu nshaho n'omurimo gwe." 
Proverbs16:12 Abagabe okukora ebibi n'ekirikunugwa, Ahakuba ekitebe ky'obugabe kihamibwa okuhikiirira." 
Proverbs16:13 Eminwa y'okuhikiirira niyo eshemeza omugabe, Kandi akunda orikugamba ebihikire." 
Proverbs16:14 Ekiniga ky'omugabe n'entumwa ya rufu, Kwonka omunyabwengye aryakiikaikanisa." 
Proverbs16:15 Omugabe ku ashemuuka ahamaisho, kireeta amagara; Kandi okukunda kwe kushusha ebicu ebirugamu enjura ya katumba." 
Proverbs16:16 Okugira obwengye ni kurungi okukira okutunga ezaabu; Eego, omuntu akaatoorana okugira okwetegyereza okukira okutunga efeeza." 
Proverbs16:17 Omuhanda rugyendwa gw'ow'omutima gugororokire n'okwetantara ebibi; Orinda emitwarize ye, aba naarinda amagara ge." 
Proverbs16:18 amaryo gakuratwa okucwekyerera, N'omutima ogurikwetunguura gukuratwa okugwa." 
Proverbs16:19 Ni kirungi okugira omutima gworobi, okakwatanisa n'abooro, Okukira okubagana eminyago n'abanyamaryo." 
Proverbs16:20 Orikuta omutima aha kigambo kya Ruhanga aryagogyera, Kandi oyesiga MUKAMA aba ahiiriirwe." 
Proverbs16:21 Oine omutima gw'obwengye ayetwa omuntu orikukyenga; Emigambire mirungi eyongyera kwikirizisa abantu. 
Proverbs16:22 Obwengye bubeera obwine enshuro y'amagara, Kwonka ekifubiro ky'abashema n'obushema bwabo." 
Proverbs16:23 Omutima gw'omunyabwengye guhindura emigambire ye kuba ehikire, Kandi gumwongyera kugamba ebirikwikirizisa abantu." 
Proverbs16:24 Ebigambo ebirikushemeza ni nk'obwoki, Binurira amagara g'omuntu, kandi bihamya amagufa ge." 
Proverbs16:25 Hariho omuhanda ogu omuntu ayeta murungi, Kwonka omuheru gwagwo guri omuhanda gw'okufa." 
Proverbs16:26 Enda y'omukozi niyo emukoresa, N'akanwa ke niko kamugyema kukora." 
Proverbs16:27 Omuntu otaine mugasho agira enaama z'okukora kubi, Kandi emigambire ye ni nk'omuriro ogurikubabura." 
Proverbs16:28 Omuntu orikwehabagiza abuzya entongane, Kandi omuhwihwitsi ataanisa abanyamikago." 
Proverbs16:29 Omunyaitima abeihabeiha mutaahi we, Amutwara omu muhanda ogutari murungi." 
Proverbs16:30 Oitira abandi eriisho, aba naahanuura enaama zikiikami; Onena enshaya, aba naayenda kuhikiiriza obubi." 
Proverbs16:31 Omutwe gujwengize enju n'ekirunga ky'ekitiinisa, Kandi kitungwa ahabw'okugyendera omu muhanda gw'okuhikiirira." 
Proverbs16:32 Otarikurahuka kugira ekiniga naakira emanzi, Kandi orikutegyeka omutima gwe naakira okwatsire orurembo." 
Proverbs16:33 Abantu baraguzisa entetere aha ruhu, Kwonka endagu yoona eruga ahari MUKAMA." 
Proverbs17:1 Ak'okurya k'obunyaata, kwonka karimu obusingye, Nikakira eka eijwire eby'okurya by'obugyenyi, kwonka erimu entongane." 
Proverbs17:2 Omuhuuku orikukoresa obwengye, Aryategyeka omwana wa mukama we orikuhemura, Kandi aragwe hamwe n'abaana ba mukama we." 
Proverbs17:3 Eiziiko riba ery'okushemerezamu efeeza, N'omuriro guba ogw'okushemerezamu ezaabu, Kwonka MUKAMA niwe agyeza emitima." 
Proverbs17:4 Enkozi y'ebibi ehurira emigambire y'obubi, Kandi orikubeiha atega okutu orurimi rw'eitima." 
Proverbs17:5 Oteerera enaku omukyene, aba naajuma Omuhangi we; Orikwesiimira abandi kugwerwa akagwe, taribura kufubirwa." 
Proverbs17:6 Abaijukuru n'ekirunga ky'abagurusi, Kandi ekitiinisa ky'abaana ni baishebo." 
Proverbs17:7 Emigambire ehikire teizihira mushema, Kandi okukira munonga emigambire y'ebishuba teizihira mutegyeki." 
Proverbs17:8 Enguzi aha muntu ogihaire ni nk'eibaare eririkukora eby'okutangaaza; Ahu arikuza hoona, naagogyera." 
Proverbs17:9 Oshwekyerera ekishobyo, aba naayenda kukundwa; Kwonka oyata eibanga, aba naayeyangisa munywani we." 
Proverbs17:10 Okuhanwa kuhika omunyabwengye aha mutima, Okukira okuhanisa omushema enkoni igana." 
Proverbs17:11 Omuntu mubi akunda obugomi bwonka; Nikyo aritumirwa entumwa y'enshaarizi kumukwata. 
Proverbs17:12 Haakiri okubugana edubu eyakirwe ebyana byayo Okukira okubugana omushema oitsirwe obushema. 
Proverbs17:13 Orikuzimuura obubi ahabw'oburungi, Obubi tiburiruga mu ka ye." 
Proverbs17:14 Okutandika entongane ni nk'okwigurira amaizi; N'ahabw'ekyo reka empaka zitakarugiremu okutongana. 
Proverbs17:15 Oiha orubanja aha babi, kandi n'orusingisa abahikiriire, Bombi n'ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA." 
Proverbs17:16 Ahabw'enki omushema agira empiiha omu ngaro ngu agure obwengye, Haza ataine mutima?" 
Proverbs17:17 Munywani w'omuntu amukunda ebiro byona, Kandi ow'eishe-emwe azaarirwa okuhwera abantu omu bihikiirizi." 
Proverbs17:18 Omuntu otaine bwengye aha omukwato, Kandi ayemererera ondi omu maisho ga mutaahi we." 
Proverbs17:19 Okunda entongane, aba akunzire okushiisha; Orikukunda kweshumbya abandi eka, naaba ayesheruriire okucwekyerera." 
Proverbs17:20 Oine omutima ogurikwehabagiza, taribona kirungi; Kandi n'ow'orurimi orukiikami aryagwa omu kabi." 
Proverbs17:21 Ozaara omushema, aba ayereeteire obusaasi; Ishe w'otaine bwengye tashemererwa." 
Proverbs17:22 Omutima ogushemereirwe n'omubazi murungi, Kwonka omutima ogucuramiriirwe gureetera omuntu kuhwa aha magufa." 
Proverbs17:23 Omubi ayakiira enguzi rikushooboorwa omu kwahwa, Ngu abone kwita emanja z'oburyo." 
Proverbs17:24 Orikwetegyereza, amaisho ge agata aha bwengye; Kwonka amaisho g'omushema, agata aha by'aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Proverbs17:25 Omwana ekifa-mutima areetera ishe obusaasi, Na nyina owaamuzaire amureetera obushaarizi." 
Proverbs17:26 Okubonabonesa ohikiriire ti kirungi, N'obu kwakuba okuteera abakungu noobatura oburungi bwabo." 
Proverbs17:27 Oyetwara omu kugamba aba ow'obwengye, Kandi ow'omutima gutuurize aba omuntu orikwetegyereza." 
Proverbs17:28 Nangwa n'omushema ku ahunama, bateekateeka ngu n'omunyabwengye; Ku aba abumbire eminwa, bagira ngu, N'omwerinzi." 
Proverbs18:1 Oyetaanisa n'abandi, aba naasherura ebye wenka; Kandi aba ayangire obwengye bwona obuhikire." 
Proverbs18:2 Omushema tashemerererwa kwetegyereza, Kureka ashemezibwa okugamba ebiteekateeko bye." 
Proverbs18:3 Ku haija obubi, n'okugaya kwija; Kandi emitwarize mibi ereeta okuhemuka." 
Proverbs18:4 Ebigambo by'omu kanwa k'omuntu ni nk'amaizi maingi, Kandi enshuro y'obwengye ni nk'omugyera gurikuhimintika." 
Proverbs18:5 Ti kirungi kugwera orubaju rw'omubi omu rubanja, N'obu kwakuba okwita orubanja rw'ohikiriire." 
Proverbs18:6 Ebigambo by'omushema bireeta entongane, Kandi orurimi rwe rumuteeza enkoni." 
Proverbs18:7 Akanwa k'omushema kamucwekyereza, N'eminwa ye niyo emugwisa omu mutego." 
Proverbs18:8 Ebigambo by'abahwihwitsi ni nk'eby'okurya ebinuzire munonga, Bishuuma omu bicweka by'omunda." 
Proverbs18:9 Orikweganda aha murimo gwe Ni murumuna w'orikucwekyereza. 
Proverbs18:10 Eiziina rya MUKAMA n'omunaara gugumire, Ohikiriire ku aguhungiramu, aguma ari buhooro." 
Proverbs18:11 Eitungo ry'omutungi nirwo rurembo rwe oruhamire, Kandi ni nk'orugo ruraingwa rw'amabaare orurikumurinda." 
Proverbs18:12 Okwehimbisa kw'omutima gw'omuntu kukuratwa okucwekyerera, Kwonka okwecureeza kukuratwa ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs18:13 Ogarukamu atabandize kuhurira Kyoreka obushema bwe n'okuhemuka. 
Proverbs18:14 Omutima guhamire gugumya omuntu omu ndwara ye, Kwonka oguhahaire n'oha owaakubaasa kugwemera?" 
Proverbs18:15 Omutima gw'omwerinzi gutunga okumanya, Kandi okutu kw'omunyabwengye nikyo kwetenga." 
Proverbs18:16 Ekiconco ky'omuntu kimuhaisa omwanya, Kandi kimuhitsya omu maisho g'ab'ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs18:17 Omu rubanja, obanza kutongana oshusha oti, ebye nibyo bihikire; Kwonka kitabaarizibwa ku aija, amwomesereza." 
Proverbs18:18 Enteenyu emara empaka, Kandi eramura ab'ekitiinisa abarikuhakana." 
Proverbs18:19 Okugarukana n'ow'eishe-mwe ogwisiibwe kubi kugumire okukira okwata orurembo rw'amaani, Kandi entongane nk'ezo zigumire okukira ebihongorezo by'ekigo." 
Proverbs18:20 Ebiruga omu kanwa k'omuntu nibyo bimuhaazya, Kandi omweru gw'eminwa ye nigwo gurimuhaazya." 
Proverbs18:21 Orurimi rugira obushooborozi bw'okwita n'obw'okukiza, N'abarukunda baryaheebwa ebi ruribareetera." 
Proverbs18:22 Oboine mukazi w'okushwera, aba aboine ekintu kirungi; Kandi aba atungire omugisha ogurugire ahari MUKAMA." 
Proverbs18:23 Omworo agamba naayeshengyereza munonga; Kwonka omuntungi amugarukisamu ekikabuko. 
Proverbs18:24 Emikago mingi esheenya eka, Kwonka habaho munywani w'omuntu okira owaanyina owaazairwe nawe." 
Proverbs19:1 Omworo ogyendera omu bwesigwa Akira ow'orurimi rurikukiikamya ebigambo kandi omushema. 
Proverbs19:2 Omuntu okubaho otaine bwengye ti kirungi, Kandi ogyenda naayehuuta, ahaba omuhanda." 
Proverbs19:3 Obushema bw'omuntu ku bumuhabya omuhanda, Omutima gwe gwetomboitera MUKAMA." 
Proverbs19:4 Obutungi bureeta emikago mingi, Kwonka omworo atsigwaho munywani we." 
Proverbs19:5 Kareebi w'ebishuba taribura kufubirwa, Kandi orikugamba ebishuba tarikira." 
Proverbs19:6 Baingi basherura obuhakwa ha muntu efura, Kandi buri muntu aba munywani w'ogwo orikugaba." 
Proverbs19:7 Abazairwe n'omworo boona bamwanga, Mbwenu banywani be tibakiraho kumwetantara? Ku abakuratsa amaganya, bamuhugaho beegyendera." 
Proverbs19:8 Owaagira obwengye, akunda amagara ge; Orikurinda okwetegyereza, aryagogyera." 
Proverbs19:9 Kareebi ow'ebishuba taribura kufubirwa Kandi omunyabishuba aryacwekyerera. 
Proverbs19:10 Omushema tashemereire kuba orikwegira gye, N'okukira munonga omuhuuku tashemereire kutegyeka abanyiginya." 
Proverbs19:11 Okwerinda kw'omuntu kumuzibira kurahuka kugira ekiniga, Kandi okwehuzya eki bamushobeize kumuhaisa ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs19:12 Ekiniga ky'omugabe ni nk'okutsinda kw'entare, Kwonka embabazi ze ziba nk'orume orutonzire aha bunyaatsi." 
Proverbs19:13 Omwana ekifa-mutima n'akabi ahari ishe, Kandi okutongana kw'omukazi ni nk'enjura erikuguma neetoonyerera." 
Proverbs19:14 Eka n'eitungo, omuntu abiragwa abazaire be; Kwonka omukazi orikwerinda amuheebwa MUKAMA." 
Proverbs19:15 Okweganda kureeta okugwejegyera obutasisiimuka, Kandi omweremwa aryaitwa enjara." 
Proverbs19:16 Oyorobera ebiragiro, aba naarinda amagara ge; Kwonka otarikweta ha mitwarize ye aryafa." 
Proverbs19:17 Ogirira abooro embabazi, aba naaguza MUKAMA; Aryamuzimuurira ebi yaakozire." 
Proverbs19:18 Hana omwana waawe, okimwineho amatsiko; Kwonka otamuteera ez'okumwita." 
Proverbs19:19 Ow'ekiniga kingi aryakizira, Ahakuba n'obu waakumuramura, oryaguma okikora." 
Proverbs19:20 Guma ohurire enaama, oikirize okuhaburwa, Obone kugira obwengye omu biro by'omumaisho." 
Proverbs19:21 Omu mutima gw'omuntu habamu enaama nyingi, Kwonka enaama ya Ruhanga niyo egumaho." 
Proverbs19:22 Embabazi z'omuntu nizo zimureetera kukundwa, Kandi omworo naahita omunyabishuba." 
Proverbs19:23 Okutiina MUKAMA kureeta amagara, Kandi okwine aryaguma amazirwe; Tarihikwaho kabi." 
Proverbs19:24 Omweremwa ata engaro ze omu rwabya, Abura ageetamika." 
Proverbs19:25 Teera omugayi, abataine bugobya beegye okwerinda; Hana orikwetegyereza, aryayeyongyera obwengye." 
Proverbs19:26 Oshiisha ebya ishe, akabinga nyina, N'omwana orikuhemura, kandi areeta ekijumo." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wangye, reka kufa okuhurira ebi orikuhaburwa, Haza okahaba, okareka ebigambo by'okumanya." 
Proverbs19:28 Kareebi otaine mugasho ashekyerera emanja z'oburyo, Kandi akanwa k'omubi kamirakwo okutahikiirira." 
Proverbs19:29 Ebifubiro biteekateekyeirwe abateezi b'enaku, Kandi enkoni zicumiirwe amabega g'abashema." 
Proverbs20:1 Amaarwa n'omuteezi w'enaku, n'ekirikusinza kiyombesa, Kandi ohabisibwa ebyo, tagira bwengye." 
Proverbs20:2 Okutiinisa kw'omugabe ni nk'okutsinda kw'entare; Owaamukwatsa ekiniga, aba ayekoreire kubi." 
Proverbs20:3 Okwetantara entongane kihaisa omuntu ekitiinisa, Kwopnka omushema weena akunda okutongana." 
Proverbs20:4 Omweremwa tayenda kuhinga mu ishekyera; N'ahabw'ekyo aryashabiriza omu ishaaruura, kwonka taine ki ariheebwa." 
Proverbs20:5 Enaama z'omu mutima gw'omuntu ni nk'amaizi maingi, Kwonka orikwetegyereza aryazikyenga." 
Proverbs20:6 Baingi omu bantu bakunda kwegamba marungi; Mbwenu omuntu orikwesigwa okaamuzoora hi? 
Proverbs20:7 Ohikiriire, kandi orikugyendera omu bwesigwa– Abaana be abarimukurata bahiiriirwe!" 
Proverbs20:8 Omugabe oshutama aha kitebe ky'eiramuriro, Ebibi byona abibingisa amaisho ge, bitaataana." 
Proverbs20:9 N'oha owaakubaasa kugira ati: Niinye nshemeize omutima gwangye; Hati ekiti kyangye kingugireho? 
Proverbs20:10 Eby'okupimisa n'eby'okurengyesa ebitahikire, Byombi n'ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA." 
Proverbs20:11 Omuntu n'obu yaakuba omwana amanyirwa aha bi arikukora, Omurimo gwe gwaba gushemeire, kandi guhikire." 
Proverbs20:12 Okutu okuhurira, n'eriisho erireeba, Byombi bikahangwa MUKAMA." 
Proverbs20:13 Otakunda okugwejegyera, nyentsya okaba omworo; Imuka ogume nooreeba; oryagira eby'okurya, ohaagye." 
Proverbs20:14 Orikugura, acamura eki arikugura ati: Ni kibi! Ni kibi! Kwonka ku agyenda, ayesiima ahabw'eki yaagura." 
Proverbs20:15 Hariho ezaabu n'amabaare agarikutukurikana, Kwonka eminwa y'obwengye n'enkwanzi z'obuguzi bwingi." 
Proverbs20:16 Omuntu ku aryemerera ou atarikumanya, omwiheho ekijwaro kye; Kandi ku aryemererera abanyamahanga, omugumye nk'omukwato." 
Proverbs20:17 Eby'okurya ebirugire omu bugobya binurira omuntu; Kwonka bwanyima bimubeera omusheenyi omu kanwa. 
Proverbs20:18 Enaama zoona zihamibwa okuhanuura; Kandi ku oriza kuhurura, ohurure oine enaama z'obwengye." 
Proverbs20:19 Ogyendagyenda naagamba maingi, agamba emibonano; N'ahabw'ekyo otarikwatanisa n'orikugambira eryo." 
Proverbs20:20 Orikukyeena ishe nari nyina, Etabaaza ye eryaraarizibwa omu mwirima ndindindi." 
Proverbs20:21 Obuhunguzi obutungirwa ahonaaho omu kutandika, Omuheru gwabwo tigurigira mugisha." 
Proverbs20:22 Otarigira oti: Ndyayehoorera. Tegyereza MUKAMA, nawe aryakuhwera." 
Proverbs20:23 Amabaare ag'okupimisa agatahikire n'ekirikunugwa ahari MUKAMA, Kandi eminzaani y'ebishuba teba mirungi." 
Proverbs20:24 Orugyendo rw'omuntu ruragiirwa MUKAMA. Mbwenu omuntu naabaasa ata kumanya omuhanda gwe? 
Proverbs20:25 Omuntu okurahukwa ha rurimi, akarahira ati: Ekintu eki n'ekirikwera! n'omutego; Akiheza kurahira, akatsigara naayefuuza." 
Proverbs20:26 Omugabe w'obwengye ashungura ababi, Kandi abaribatisa nyamuziga." 
Proverbs20:27 Omwoyo gw'omuntu n'etabaaza ya MUKAMA, Ecaaka ebisherekirwe omu mutima gwe." 
Proverbs20:28 Embabazi n'amazima nibyo birinda omugabe, Kandi ekitebe ky'obugabe bwe kihamibwa okuhikiirira." 
Proverbs20:29 Ekitiinisa ky'abatsigazi n'amaani gaabo, Kandi oburungi bw'abagurusi n'enju zaabo." 
Proverbs20:30 Okwasha omuntu na kibooko kumaraho ebibi, Kandi enkoni zishemeza ebicweka by'omunda ebya hare." 
Proverbs21:1 Omutima gw'omugabe guba omu mukono gwa MUKAMA, Agutooza ahu arikwenda hoona, nk'orikuhabura amaizi omu mikua yaago." 
Proverbs21:2 Omuhanga gw'omuntu gwona, omu kureeba kwe, guba ogushemeire; Kwonka MUKAMA apima omutima." 
Proverbs21:3 Okukora eby'okuhikiirira n'eby'oburyo; Bisiimwa MUKAMA okukira ebitambo. 
Proverbs21:4 Ekitsyori n'omutima gw'amaryo Niyo tabaaza y'ababi; byombi n'ekibi. 
Proverbs21:5 Ebi omweziriki ateekateeka kukora tibibura kureeta mweru; Kwonka weena orahukiiriza, ayereetera obukyene." 
Proverbs21:6 Obutungi obu omuntu atunga ahabw'okubeiha, n'omuyaayuuko; Ababusherura baba ni basherura rufu." 
Proverbs21:7 Eitima ry'ababi riryabamaraho, Ahabw'okuba banga kukora ebihikire." 
Proverbs21:8 Omuhanda gw'abaine orubanja gukiikami, Kwonka emicwe y'oshemeire ehikire." 
Proverbs21:9 Haakiri okutuura omu karugu k'aha mutwe gw'enju Okukira okukwatana enju mpango n'omukazi entongani. 
Proverbs21:10 Omutima gw'omubi gwetenga ebibi; Mutaahi we tamureebamu mbabazi. 
Proverbs21:11 Omuteezi w'enaku ku afubirwa, Abataine bwengye bahinduka ababwine. Omunyabwengye ku ahaburwa, aihamu okumanya." 
Proverbs21:12 Ohikiriire ayetegyereza enju y'omubi; Amanya oku ababi banagwa ahansi, bakacwekyerera." 
Proverbs21:13 Oyanga kuhurira okutaka kw'abooro, Nawe aryataka, abure ow'okumuhurira." 
Proverbs21:14 Ekiconco ky'omu mubonano kiikaikanisa okuguubwa kubi, Kandi empongano esherekirwe omu kwahwa eikaikanisa ekiniga kingi." 
Proverbs21:15 Emanja ku zicuubwa omu buryo abahikiriire bakishemerererwa Kwonka ababi bo bahahaaza omutima. 
Proverbs21:16 Omuntu orikuhaba, akaruga omu muhanda gw'okwetegyereza, Aryahuumurira omu mutwe gw'abaafiire." 
Proverbs21:17 Orikukunda eby'okweshemeza aryaba omworo; Orikukunda viinyo n'amajuta tariba mutungi. 
Proverbs21:18 Omubi n'eky'okucungura ohikiriire, Kandi endeebya n'eky'okucungura ow'omutima gugororokire." 
Proverbs21:19 Haakiri okutuura omu nsi etatuurwamu bantu Okukira okutuura n'omukazi entongani kandi orikuguubwa kubi hakyehakye. 
Proverbs21:20 Omu ka y'omunyabwengye harimu obutungi bw'obuguzi bwingi n'amajuta, Kwonka omushema abimurakwo." 
Proverbs21:21 Orikukuratira okuhikiirira n'embabazi, Aryagira amagara n'ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs21:22 Omunyabwengye atemba orugo rw'orurembo rw'emanzi, Asheenya ekigo eki baabaire nibeesiga." 
Proverbs21:23 Orinda akanwa ke n'orurimi rwe, Ayerinda akabi." 
Proverbs21:24 Omunyamaryo kandi ow'ekiziizi ayetwa omugayi; Akora n'amaryo n'emyekuniko. 
Proverbs21:25 Omweremwa aitwa okwetenga kwe, Ahabw'okuba emikono ye eyanga kufa kubi." 
Proverbs21:26 Eizooba ryona omubi ayetenga, Kwonka ohikiriire we aha, kandi taima." 
Proverbs21:27 Ekitambo ky'omubi n'ekirikunugwa; Reero kaashwa okukitamba n'omutima mubi! 
Proverbs21:28 Kareebi w'ebishuba aryacwekyerera, Kwonka omuntu orikuhurira aryagamba atarikuzibirwa." 
Proverbs21:29 Omubi ayoma ahamaisho, Kwonka ow'omutima gugororokire atebeekanisa emihanda ye." 
Proverbs21:30 Tihariho bwengye, nari okwetegyereza, n'obu yaakuba enaama Ebirikubaasa kurwanisa MUKAMA." 
Proverbs21:31 Embaraasi eteekateekyerwa eizooba ry'orugamba, Kwonka okusingura kuba okwa MUKAMA." 
Proverbs22:1 Eiziina rirungi n'ey'okwetengwa okukira eitungo ringi; N'okugira obushongore nikukira efeeza n'ezaabu. 
Proverbs22:2 Abatungi n'abooro bateeranira hamwe; Boona MUKAMA niwe yaabahangire. 
Proverbs22:3 Omwerinzi ku areeba akabi kaija, ayeshereka; Kwonka otaine bwengye akeegyema, kamwita." 
Proverbs22:4 Ebihembo by'omucureezi kandi orikutiina MUKAMA N'obutungi n'ekitiinisa n'amagara. 
Proverbs22:5 Amahwa n'emitego biri omu muhanda gw'orikwehabagiza; Orikwerinda aryabyetantara. 
Proverbs22:6 Manyiiza omwana omuhanda ogu ashemereire kutoora; Kandi n'obu arikura, tarigurugamu." 
Proverbs22:7 Omutungi ategyeka omworo, Kandi oyegurize aba omuhuuku w'omugurize." 
Proverbs22:8 Orikubiba okutahikiirira, aryagyesha akagwe; N'enkoni y'ekiniga kye eryaremawa." 
Proverbs22:9 Oine eriisho ry'obufura aryaheebwa omugisha, Ahabw'okuba abooro abaha aha by'okurya bye." 
Proverbs22:10 Binga omuteezi w'enaku; nibwo entongane ziraarugyeho, Okutongana n'okujumiirana bikahwaho." 
Proverbs22:11 Orikukunda omutima ogushemeire, kandi orikugamba eby'embabazi, Omugabe aryaba munywani we." 
Proverbs22:12 Amaisho ga MUKAMA garinda oine okumanya, Kwonka ebigambo by'endeebya abibuzabuzqa." 
Proverbs22:13 Omweremwa ayekwatsakwatsa ati: Aheeru hariho entare. Ku ndikushohora, neenyitira omu muhanda." 
Proverbs22:14 Akanwa k'omukazi enshambani n'ekiina kiraingwa; Ou MUKAMA agwereirwe kubi aryakigwamu. 
Proverbs22:15 Obushema bubohirwe omu mutima gw'omwana; Kwonka enkoni y'okuhana eryabumwihamu, ebute hare." 
Proverbs22:16 Orikuhata abooro ahabw'okwekanyisiza obutungi, Nari orikuha abatungi, eki ariihamu n'okukyena." 
Proverbs22:17 Tega okutu, ohurire ebigambo by'abanyabwengye, Kandi ote omutima gwawe aha kumanya kwangye;" 
Proverbs22:18 Ahabw'okuba kiryaba kirungi, waabigumya omu mutima gwawe, Kandi waabigumya omu mutima gwawe, Kandi waabigumya aha minwa yaawe byona." 
Proverbs22:19 Nikyo naabikumanyisiza eri izooba, iwe wenka, Ngu ogume nooyesiga MUKAMA." 
Proverbs22:20 Tinaakuhandiikira ebigambo ebirikukira oburungi, Eby'okuhana n'eby'okumanya," 
Proverbs22:21 Okukworeka ebihikire n'eby'amazima, Ngu obone kugarukamu abakutumire ebigambo by'amazima?" 
Proverbs22:22 Otarinyaga omworo, ngu niho ari omworo, Nari okwita kubi abarikusingisirizibwa aha marembo;" 
Proverbs22:23 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aryabatonganira, Kandi abarikubanyaga, aryabaihaho amagara gaabo." 
Proverbs22:24 Otarinywana n'omuntu orikurahuka kuguubwa kubi, N'obu kwakuba okugyenda n'omunyakiniga," 
Proverbs22:25 Nyentsya otakaayega emitwarize ye, Okeenaga omu mutego." 
Proverbs22:26 Otariba nk'abo abaha emikwato, Abeemererera abaine amabanja." 
Proverbs22:27 Ku oraabe otaine ky'okumwihurira, Nooyenda ku bakwiha aha kitanda kyawe, bakakitwara?" 
Proverbs22:28 Otarikuura ekiti ky'omwatano, Ekyabyairwe baashwenkuru." 
Proverbs22:29 Nooreeba omuntu orikwezirika omu murimo gwe? Aryayemerera omu maisho g'abagabe naabaheereza; Tariheereza bataine iziina. 
Proverbs23:1 Ku orishutama kurya n'omutegyeki, Oteekateekye ahari ogwo muntu okuri omumaisho." 
Proverbs23:2 Ku oraabe noomanya ngu ori omunyamururu, Oyegumye omusyo aha mumiro." 
Proverbs23:3 Otaryetenga eby'okurya bye ebinuzire, Ahabw'okuba nibibihabeiha." 
Proverbs23:4 Otarigwa ahaiguru noosherura eitungo; Gira obwengye, okirekye." 
Proverbs23:5 Ku origumyaho amaisho, ribura, Ahabw'okuba ahonaaho rigira amapapa, Riguruka nk'empungu erikuza ahaiguru." 
Proverbs23:6 Otarirya eby'okurya by'efura-nkye; Kandi otaryetenga eby'okurya bye ebinuzire. 
Proverbs23:7 N'obu araabe naakugira ati: Ija orye, kandi onywe! Kwonka omu mutima gwe, naaba atakwetsire." 
Proverbs23:8 Ekitongye eki oriba waamira, oryakitanaka, N'ebigambo byawe birungi bife busha." 
Proverbs23:9 Otarigira eki waagamba, omushema akuhuriire; Ahabw'okuba aryagira ngu ebigambo byawe tibirimu bwengye." 
Proverbs23:10 Otarikuura ekiti ky'omwatano ogwa ira, Nari okurenga, okaza omu kibanja ky'efuuzi;" 
Proverbs23:11 Ahabw'okuba Omucunguzi waabo n'ow'amaani; Aryakutonganisa, naabatonganira." 
Proverbs23:12 Omutima gwawe ogute aha kuhaburwa, N'okutu kwawe aha bigambo by'okumanya." 
Proverbs23:13 Otarireka kuhana omwana; Ku orikumuteera omunyaafu, tarikufa." 
Proverbs23:14 Ku orimuteera omunyaafu, Oryakiza amagara ge okuza Okuzimu." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wangye, omutima gwawe ku guraabe gwine obwengye, N'ogwangye nigwija kushemererwa." 
Proverbs23:16 Ku origuma noogamba ebihikire, Amagara gangye garyashemererwa." 
Proverbs23:17 Omutima gwawe gutarigirira abasiisi eihari, Kureka gugume nigutiina MUKAMA okurenzya eizooba." 
Proverbs23:18 Buzimazima haryabaho ebihembo; Kandi amatsiko gaawe tigariihwaho. 
Proverbs23:19 Mwana wangye, hurira, kandi ogire obwengye, Oshoronzye omutima gwawe omu muhanda." 
Proverbs23:20 Otariza omu mutwe gw'abanywi ba viinyo, N'obu gwakuba ogw'abanyamairu;" 
Proverbs23:21 Ahakuba omusinzi n'omunyanda baryaba abooro, Kandi n'okuhungira kuryajweka omuntu obucancabari." 
Proverbs23:22 Hurira sho owaakuzaire, Kandi otarigaya nyoko yaakura." 
Proverbs23:23 Gura amazima, kwonka otarigatunda; Kandi ogure obwengye, okuhaburwa n'okwetegyereza." 
Proverbs23:24 Ishe w'ohikiriire aryashemererwa munonga; Orikuzaara omwana w'obwengye aryayesiima ahabwe. 
Proverbs23:25 Ka sho na nyoko bashemererwe, Kandi nyoko bashemererwe, Kandi nyoko owaakuzaire ayesiime!" 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wangye, mpa omutima gwawe, N'amaisho gaawe geetegyereze emitwarize yangye;" 
Proverbs23:27 Ahakuba maraaya n'ekiina kiraingwa, Kandi omukazi owaariire enshoni n'obusya bufunzire." 
Proverbs23:28 Agwera nk'omwambuzi, Kandi akanyisa endeebya omu bantu." 
Proverbs23:29 Enaku zigirwa oha? Obusaasi bugirwa oha? Empaka zigirwa oha? Okwetomboita kugirwa ha? Obuhuta bwa busha bugirwa oha? Okutukura amaisho kugirwa oha? 
Proverbs23:30 Bigirwa abaraara enkyera, Abaza kuvumba enturire." 
Proverbs23:31 Otareeba viinyo ngu niho erikutukura, Yaaba neebirira omu kikopo, Neesheneneka aha mumiro." 
Proverbs23:32 Bwanyima eruma nk'enjoka, Etema nk'empiri." 
Proverbs23:33 Amaisho gareeba ensi neegyenda, Omutima gwawe gugamba ebitakwatairaine." 
Proverbs23:34 Oshusha nk'obyami ahagati y'enyanja, Nari nk'obyami ahaiguru y'omurongooti gw'omu meeri;" 
Proverbs23:35 Okagira oti: Banteire, kwonka tinsaasire! Baanyasire, kwonka tiinyine ki mpuriire! Nsisiimukye ryari, nkaza kuvumba agandi!" 
Proverbs24:1 Otarigirira abantu babi eihari, N'obu kwakuba okwetenga kuguma nabo;" 
Proverbs24:2 Ahabw'okuba emitima yaabo eteekateeka eby'okurwana, N'eminwa yaabo egamba eby'eitima." 
Proverbs24:3 Ahabw'obwengye enju eyombekwa, N'ahabw'okwetegyereza ehamira kimwe." 
Proverbs24:4 Ahabw'okumanya, ebishengye byayo Biijura ebintu byona ebirikushemeza kandi eby'obuguzi bwingi." 
Proverbs24:5 Omunyabwengye aba ow'amaani; Eego, omuntu oine okumanya ayeyongyera amaani." 
Proverbs24:6 Ahakuba oshemereire kuhurura, nooyebemberwa obwengye; Kandi ahu abahi b'obwengye baingi bari, habaho obusinguzi." 
Proverbs24:7 Obwengye n'obw'ahaiguru, omushema tarikubaasa kubuhika; Aha irembo, ahu abantu bateeraniire, tateerezaho." 
Proverbs24:8 Ogira enaama ez'okukora kubi, Ayetwa omunyaitima." 
Proverbs24:9 Enaama z'obushema n'ekibi, Kandi omuteezi w'enaku n'ekirikunugwa omu bantu." 
Proverbs24:10 Ku orikugwa enshazi aha izooba ry'okuhikiirirwa, Biri amaani gaawe ni makye." 
Proverbs24:11 Juna abarikutwarwa kwitwa, N'abarikutetema nibaza kwitwa, obazibire." 
Proverbs24:12 Ku oraagire oti: Ekyo titurakimanyire, Torikumanya opima emitima ku arikukireeba? Noogira ngu orinda amagara gaawe tarikukimanya, Tarizimuurira omuntu weena ebishemereire ebi yaakozire?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wangye, guma orye obwoki; ahabw'okuba ni burungi, Orye n'omushongi, ogurikuruga omu ngabo zaabwo, nigukunurira." 
Proverbs24:14 Omanye ngu n'obwengye nikwo buriba omu magara gaawe; Ku oribubona, oryaba oboine ebihembo, N'amatsiko gaawe tigariihwaho." 
Proverbs24:15 Iwe muntu mubi 'we, otarigwera enju y'ohikiriire, Kandi otarikora kubi eka ye;" 
Proverbs24:16 Ahakuba ohikiriire agwa emirundi mushanju naimuka, Kwonka ababi bagwisibwa ebihikiirizi." 
Proverbs24:17 Otarishemerererwa okugwa kw'omuzigu waawe, Kandi omutima gwawe gutaryesiima yaateera entsibo," 
Proverbs24:18 MUKAMA atakaakireeba, kikamusaasa, Akamwihaho ekiniga kye." 
Proverbs24:19 Otaryemereza omutima ahabw'enkozi z'ebibi, N'obu kwakuba okugirira ababi eihari;" 
Proverbs24:20 Ahabw'okuba omubi tarigira bihembo, Kureka etabaaza ye eryaraazibwa." 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wangye, tiina MUKAMA n'omugabe, Kandi bombi otagira ou waagomera;" 
Proverbs24:22 Ahabw'okuba akabi nikaija kubarugaho kitaraariire. Kandi n'oha orikumanya okucwekyereza okuribarugaho bombi? 
Proverbs24:23 Ebi nabyo n'ebigambo by'abanyabwengye. Ni kibi okugwera orubaju omu kucwa emanja. 
Proverbs24:24 Orikugira omubi ati: Ori mwere! Aryakyeenwa abantu, amahanga gamutamwe;" 
Proverbs24:25 Kwonka abarikuhana omubi baryashemererwa, Kandi omugisha murungi guryabahikaho." 
Proverbs24:26 Ogarukamu ebihikire, aba anywegyeire eminwa." 
Proverbs24:27 Banza otebeekanise ebi orikwija kukora aheeru, Oteekateekye ekintu kyona eki orikwenda omu ishwa; Bwanyima obone kwombeka enju yaawe." 
Proverbs24:28 Otarishinja mutaahi waawe noomutura busha, Kandi otarigobya n'eminwa yaawe." 
Proverbs24:29 Otarigira oti: Ndyamugira nk'oku yanginzire, Ndyamuhoora ahabw'eki yaakozire." 
Proverbs24:30 Nkaraba aha musiri gw'omweremwa, N'aha musiri gw'emizaabibu gw'omuntu otaine bwengye;" 
Proverbs24:31 Naashanga gwona gumezire amahwa, Gushwekirwe ebicuragyenyi, Kandi orugo rwagwo rw'amabaare rusheenyukire." 
Proverbs24:32 Ku naabireebire, naabiteekateekaho munonga, Naabyetegyereza, naihamu okushoborokyerwa." 
Proverbs24:33 Noogira oti: Reka ngwejegyereho kakye, mpungireho kaingana busha; Nangwa mpinyeho nti omukono, mpuumureho!" 
Proverbs24:34 Obwo, obworo buryakwizira nk'omunyagi, N'obukyene bukuhikyeho nk'omuntu ohagatiire eby'okurwanisa." 
Proverbs25:1 Ezi nazo n'enfumu za Sulemaani, ezi abashaija ba Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda baahandukurwire." 
Proverbs25:2 Ebi Ruhanga asherekire nibyo bimuhaisa ekitiinisa, Kwonka ekihaisa abagabe ekitiinisa n'okucondooza ebintu." 
Proverbs25:3 Nk'oku eiguru riri ahaiguru munonga, kandi nk'oku ensi ehikire hare okuzimu, N'emitima y'abagabe nikwo etarikwetegyerezibwa." 
Proverbs25:4 Iha enkamba aha feeza, Haza omuheesi abone kutunga eky'okuheeshamu ekintu." 
Proverbs25:5 Iha ababi omu maisho g'omugabe, Ekitebe ky'obugabe bwe kibone kuhamibwa okuhikiirira." 
Proverbs25:6 Otaryekuza omu maisho g'omugabe, Kandi otaryemerera omu mwanya gw'abakuru;" 
Proverbs25:7 Ahakuba ekirungi n'okwetwa ngu, Garuka aha! Okukira okugarurwa enyima omu maisho g'omugabe naakureeba." 
Proverbs25:8 Otarirahuka kutabaariza mutaahi waawe, Nyentsya akikusinga okaitwa enshoni, Okabura oku waagira;" 
Proverbs25:9 Kureka gamba nawe, mubyemarire mwenka, Orekye kubibuzya," 
Proverbs25:10 Owaakihurira akakugaya, Ekihemu kikakugumaho." 
Proverbs25:11 Ekigambo kihikire, ekigambirwe omu bunaku bwakyo, Ni nk'amapeera g'ezaabu agari omu kiibo ky'efeeza." 
Proverbs25:12 Nk'empeta y'ezaabu ey'omu matu, nari nk'enkwanzi z'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, N'omuhani ow'obwengye nikwo aba atyo ahari ogwo omutegire okutu." 
Proverbs25:13 Nk'embeho y'ebirika oku eba omu ishaaruura, Nikwo n'entumwa etaangirira eba aha bagitumire, ahabw'okuba eruhuura emitima y'abakama baayo." 
Proverbs25:14 Nk'oku enjura erimu omuyaga ehiika, ekabura, Nikwo n'omuntu aba oyehimbisiza aha kiconco eki atarikwija kuha." 
Proverbs25:15 Okugumisiriza kwikirizisa omutegyeki, N'orurimi rworobi rwata eigufa." 
Proverbs25:16 Ku oraabe waagwire aha bwoki, oryeho oburikukuhaazya, Otakaarengyesereza, okabutanaka." 
Proverbs25:17 Orekye kwitsa omwa mutaahi waawe akaribatiiriro, Atakaakuhararuka, akakwanga." 
Proverbs25:18 Mushinja orikushinja mutaahi we ebishuba, Ni nk'akateererezo nari rurara, nari omwambi gw'omunwa." 
Proverbs25:19 Okwesiga otarikwesigwa omu bunaku bw'akabi Ni nk'eriino rijunzire, nari ekigyere ekikonyokire." 
Proverbs25:20 Orikweshongorera ow'omutima ogweshobeire Ni nk'orikujuura ekijwaro omu mbeho, Kandi nka viinyo erikushaarira omu buhuta." 
Proverbs25:21 Omuzigu waawe, ku arigira enjara, omugaburire; Ku arikwatwa eiriho, omuhe eky'okunywa;" 
Proverbs25:22 Ahabw'okuba oryaba omurunzire amakara g'omuriro aha mutwe, Kandi MUKAMA aryakuzimuurira." 
Proverbs25:23 Omuyaga gw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho gureeta enjura, Kandi orurimi orurikugambuura rureeta okuhinduriza ahamaisho." 
Proverbs25:24 Haakiri okutuura omu keehogo k'aha mutwe gw'enju, Okukira okukwatana enju n'omukazi entongani." 
Proverbs25:25 Nk'amaizi agarikufuka oku gaba aha muntu oine ekyaka, Nikwo n'amakuru marungi gaba agarikuruga omu nsi ya hare." 
Proverbs25:26 Ohikiriire orikuhigiza omubi Ni nk'eiziba ry'amaizi gatabangukire, nari enshuro esiisikaire." 
Proverbs25:27 Ti kirungi kurya obwoki bwingi, Kandi n'ebigambo by'okumamarika toshemereire kubirengyesereza." 
Proverbs25:28 Omuntu otarikubaasa kwezibira, Ni nk'orurembo orusheenyirwe, rukagumira aho, rutaine rugo." 
Proverbs26:1 Nk'oku orubaare rutashemereire kubaho mu kyanda, n'enjura omu igyesha, Nikwo n'omushema atashemereire kitiinisa." 
Proverbs26:2 Nk'oku ekiteera-nkumba kizengyerera, kandi nk'oku entaratambi eguruka, Nikwo n'omukyeeno gwa busha gutagira u gwita." 
Proverbs26:3 Kibooko eshemerera embaraasi, n'enkoba z'omu kanwa zishemerera endogoya, Kandi n'enkoni zishemerera amabega g'abashema." 
Proverbs26:4 Otarigarukamu omushema nk'oku obushema bwe buri, Haza naiwe okaba nkawe." 
Proverbs26:5 Garukamu omushema nk'oku obushema bwe buri, Atakaayemanya ku aine obwengye." 
Proverbs26:6 Otuma omushema aba naayehenda amaguru, Kandi ayereetera okufeerwa." 
Proverbs26:7 Nk'oku amaguru g'ebirema gatuura nigaregyeijana, Nikwo n'enfumu eba etyo omu kanwa k'abashema." 
Proverbs26:8 Okuha omushema ekitiinisa Ni nk'okukomera eibaare omu kenda k'enjungu. 
Proverbs26:9 Nk'oku eihwa ricumita engaro y'omusinzi, rikagihweramu, Nikwo n'enfumu eba omu kanwa k'abashema." 
Proverbs26:10 Nk'oku omurasi arasha weena ou yaabanda, N'orikukoresa omushema nari omuhinguzi nikwo ari." 
Proverbs26:11 Nk'oku embwa egarukira ebitanaki byayo, Nikwo n'omushema ari orikugarukira obushemba bwe." 
Proverbs26:12 Nooreeba omuntu orikwemanya obwengye? Okaagira amatsiko aha mushema okukira ahari ogwo muntu. 
Proverbs26:13 Omweremwa agira ati: Omu nguuto harimu ntare; N'omu mihanda harimu entare. 
Proverbs26:14 Nk'oku orwigi rwecundira aha pata zaarwo, Nikwo n'omweremwa ayehindahindurira aha kitanda kye." 
Proverbs26:15 Omweremwa atibika engaro ze omu rwabya, Abura agaazigarura omu kanwa." 
Proverbs26:16 Omweremwa, omu kureeba kwe, aba ow'obwengye Okukira abashaija mushanju abarikubaasa kugarukamu nibeerinda." 
Proverbs26:17 Orikwetaasya omu ntongane zitari ze, Ni nk'orikukwata mata g'embwa erikuhingura." 
Proverbs26:18 Omuntu ogobeza mutaahi we, akagira ati: Naaba ninteera obuyaga!" 
Proverbs26:19 Ni nk'omugwa-iraro orikurekyera ebikongyezo n'emyambi na rufu. 
Proverbs26:20 Ahu enku zibura, omuriro guraara; N'ahu omuhwihwitsi atari, entongane zihwaho." 
Proverbs26:21 Nk'oku bongyera amakara aha makara gaacwetsya, nari enku aha muriro, Nikwo omuntu entongani akanyisa entongane." 
Proverbs26:22 Ebigambo by'omuhwihwitsi n'otw'okurya tunuzire, Bimirwa, bihika omunda omu kishansha." 
Proverbs26:23 Omuntu orikugamba eby'okukunda, haza aine omutima mubi, Ni nk'enyungu eshwekirwe ebirikwengyengyeta by'efeeza." 
Proverbs26:24 Omwangani aryarya n'eminwa ye, Kwonka omu mutima gwe aba asherekiremu eitima." 
Proverbs26:25 N'obu arigamba gye, otarimwesiga; ahabw'okuba omu mutima gwe harimu ebirikunugwa mushanju." 
Proverbs26:26 N'obu yaakushweka rwango ye n'oburyarya, Obubi bwe buryareebeka butunu, ahu abantu bateeraniire." 
Proverbs26:27 Orikutimba ekiina aryakigwamu, Kandi orikukumbagaza eibaare, riryamugarukira." 
Proverbs26:28 Orurimi rurikubeiha rwanga abu rwahutaize, Kandi akanwa akarikumamarika kareeta okucwekyerera." 
Proverbs27:1 Otaryehimbisa ahabw'ebya nyencakare, Ahabw'okuba torikumanya ebi eryo izooba riraareete." 
Proverbs27:2 Reka ondiijo akusiime okukira iwe okwesiima; Haakiri osiimwe omugyenyi, kunu ti minwa yaawe." 
Proverbs27:3 Eibaare riremeera, n'omusheenyi gugira oburemeezi; Kwonka ekiniga ky'omushema nikibikira byombi." 
Proverbs27:4 Ekiniga tikisaasira, n'okuguubwa kubi ni nk'omutunga ogutwara ebintu; Kwonka n'oha owaakubaasa kugumisiririza eihari?" 
Proverbs27:5 Okuhana butunu nikukira okukunda kusherekirwe. 
Proverbs27:6 Obuhuta obu ohutaazibwa omunyamukago n'obuhikire; Kwonka okunywegyera kw'omuzigu kuba okurengyesereza. 
Proverbs27:7 Ohaagire atamwa obwoki, Kwonka aha mujara ekirikushaarira kyona kinuriirira." 
Proverbs27:8 Nk'oku enyonyi egyenda ekatsigaho ekyashuri kyayo, Nikwo n'omuntu, orara, akatsigaho eka ye, aba." 
Proverbs27:9 Nk'oku amajuta g'omugaju gashemeza omutima, Nikwo n'omuntu ananurwa enaama za mugyenzi we ez'aha mutima." 
Proverbs27:10 Otaritsigaho munywani waawe na munywani wa sho, Kandi aha izooba eri origiriraho ebihikiirizi, Otaryerusya kuza kweta mwene sho. Mutaahi waawe okuri haihi naakira ou ozairwe nawe okuri hare." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wangye, gira obwengye, oshemeze omutima gwangye, Mbone kugarukamu ogwo otuura nanjuma." 
Proverbs27:12 Omwerinzi ku areeba akabi kaija, ayeshereka; Kwonka otaine bwengye akeegyema, kamwita." 
Proverbs27:13 Omuntu ku araayemererere ou atarikumanya, omwiheho ekijwaro kye, Kandi ku araayemererere abanyamahanga, omugumye nk'omukwato." 
Proverbs27:14 Oimuka kare akaza kwendeza mutaahi we omugisha naayomba, Aryabarwa nk'orikumukyeena." 
Proverbs27:15 Amaizi agarikuguma nigatoonya aha izooba ry'enjura, N'omukazi entongani nibishushana." 
Proverbs27:16 Orikwenda kumuzibira ni nk'owaakwenda kuzibira omuyaga, Nari okukwata amajuta omu mukono gwe gwa buryo." 
Proverbs27:17 Nk'oku ekyoma kityaza ekindi, Nikwo n'omuntu atyaza mugyenzi we." 
Proverbs27:18 Orikuhingirira omutiini niwe arirya ebijuma byagwo; N'orikurinda mukama we aryaheebwa ekitiinisa. 
Proverbs27:19 Nk'oku amaisho g'omuntu geereebera omu maizi, Nikwo n'omutima gw'omuntu gureebana n'ogundi." 
Proverbs27:20 Nk'oku Okuzimu owa Nyamuteza etahaaga, Nikwo n'amaisho g'omuntu gatahaaga kureeba." 
Proverbs27:21 Eiziiko riba ery'okushemerezamu efeeza, N'omuriro guba ogw'okushemerezamu ezaabu, Kandi n'omuntu amanyirwa aha bi barikumusiima." 
Proverbs27:22 N'obu waakushekura omushema n'omuhini hamwe n'ekihere ky'engano, Obushema bwe tibukaamurugamu." 
Proverbs27:23 Yezirikye kumanya amatungo gaawe oku gari, Kandi oteho omutima kureeberera ente zaawe;" 
Proverbs27:24 Ahabw'okuba eitungo tirigumaho ebiro byona. Noogira ngu ekirunga kigumaho obusingye bwona? 
Proverbs27:25 Obunyaatsi obukuru ku buhwaho, haamera obuto, N'obw'omu bibungo bwateeranirwa omuka," 
Proverbs27:26 Nibwo abaana b'entaama bakuha eby'okujwara, N'embuzi zikarugwamu empiiha z'okugura emisiri." 
Proverbs27:27 Amahenehene garyaba eky'okurya kyawe, Gakuhaazye n'ab'omu ka yaawe, Kandi gatungye n'abazaana baawe." 
Proverbs28:1 Omubi ahunga, hataine omubingire; Kwonka abahikiriire baba emanzi nk'entare." 
Proverbs28:2 Ensi ku eshobya, egira abategyeki baingi; Kwonka ku egira abanyabwengye abaine okumanya, Bagireetera okuguma ehamire" 
Proverbs28:3 Omworo orikuhata abandi booro, Ni nk'enjura etatsiga myaka." 
Proverbs28:4 Abareka ebiragiro basiima ababi, Kwonka ababyorobera babarwanisa." 
Proverbs28:5 Enkozi z'ebibi tizimanya by'oburyo, Kwonka bashrura MUKAMA bamanya byona." 
Proverbs28:6 Omworo ogyendera omu bwesigwa Akira omutungi oyehabagiriza omu mihanda ye. 
Proverbs28:7 Omwana oyorobera ebiragiro aba ow'obwengye, Kwonka onywana n'abanyamururu ahemura ishe." 
Proverbs28:8 Okanyisa eitungo rye ahabw'ebiteebwamu n'amagoba ebirengyesereize, Aba ahendekyeire orikusaasira abooro." 
Proverbs28:9 Oyeita amatu ngu atahurira ebiragiro, Okushaba kwe kuba ekirikunugwa." 
Proverbs28:10 Orikuhabisa ow'omutima gugororokire, akamutooza omuhanda mubi, Aryagwa omu kiina eki atimbire; Kwonka otaine kamogo aryahungura ebirungi." 
Proverbs28:11 Omuntungi ayeyeta omunyabwengye, Kwonka omworo orikwetegyereza amumanyira kimwe." 
Proverbs28:12 Abahikiriire ku basingura, habaho ekitiinisa kingi; Kwonka ababi ku batunguuka, abantu beeshereka." 
Proverbs28:13 Orikushereka eby'okushiisha bye, tariba gye; Kwonka orikubyatura, akabireka, aryasaasirwa." 
Proverbs28:14 Omuntu orikutiina MUKAMA obutoosha aine omugisha; Kwonka orikugangaaza omutima gwe, aryagwerwa akagwe." 
Proverbs28:15 Omutegyeki mubi orikutegyeka eihanga ry'abooro, Ni nk'entare erikutsinda, nari nk'edubu eyaasyokayo kurwana." 
Proverbs28:16 Omutegyeki otaine kwetegyereza abonabonesa abantu munonga, Kwonka omuntu orikwanga amagoba mabi aryhangaara." 
Proverbs28:17 Omuntu otukuriirwe eshagama y'ou aitsire, K'agume ari omuhungi, okuhitsya aha kufa; Kandi hatarigira owaamuhwera." 
Proverbs28:18 Orikugyendera omu bwesigwa aryajunwa. Kwonka orikwehabagiriza omu mihanda ye, aryagwa omu kiina." 
Proverbs28:19 Orikuhinga emisiri ye, aryagira eby'okurya bingi, Kwonka orikukuratira ebitaine mugasho, aryagira obworo bwingi." 
Proverbs28:20 Omuntu omwesigwa aryagira emigisha mingi, Kwonka orikutunga ebya bugubugu taribura kufubirwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Okushoroora omu bantu ni kirungi, N'obu kwakuba omuntu okushiisha ahabw'ak'okurya kakye." 
Proverbs28:22 Omuntu engumya asheruza eitungo obwira, Kandi tamanya ku obworo burimuhikaho." 
Proverbs28:23 Orikuhana omuntu aryakundwa Okukira ow'orurimi rurikumamarika. 
Proverbs28:24 Oiba ishe nari nyina, akagira ati: Tiinyine ki naashobya, Ogwo aba ari munywani w'omuhwerekyerezi." 
Proverbs28:25 Omunyamururu aimutsya entongane, Kwonka orikwesiga MUKAMA aryatungisibwa." 
Proverbs28:26 Orikwesiga omutima gwe n'omushema; Kwonka orikugyendera omu bwengye aryajunwa. 
Proverbs28:27 Orikuha abooro, tarikyena; Kwonka orikubeehuzya aryagira emikyeeno mingi." 
Proverbs28:28 Ababi ku batunguuka, abantu beeshereka; Kwonka ku bacwekyerera, abahikiriire bakanya." 
Proverbs29:1 Orikuhanwa kaingi, akaguma agangaize ebitsya, Aryahendeka kitaraariire, kandi taritambirwa." 
Proverbs29:2 Abahikiriire ku bategyeka, abantu bashemererwa; Kwonka ababi ku bategyeka, abantu batsinda, baborooga." 
Proverbs29:3 Okunda obwengye ashemeza ishe; Kwonka okwatanisa na baamaraaya, ashiisha ebye." 
Proverbs29:4 Omugabe ocwera ensi ye emanja z'oburyo, agihamya; Kwonka orya enguzi, agicwekyereza." 
Proverbs29:5 Omuntu ogira ekimama ahari mutaahi we, Aba nk'omutegire ekigoye." 
Proverbs29:6 Omu kucumura kw'omuntu mubi habamu omutego; Kwonka ohikiriire ayesiima, ateera akaari." 
Proverbs29:7 Ohikiriire amanya ebishemereire omunaku, Kwonka omubi tagira kwetegyereza kw'okubimanya." 
Proverbs29:8 Abagayi bajagaraza orurembo, Kwonka abanyabwengye baikaikanisa ekiniga." 
Proverbs29:9 Ow'obwengye ku ahakana n'omushema, Omushema n'obu agira ekiniga kingi, nari akasheka, Hoona tihabaho buhuumure." 
Proverbs29:10 Abakunda kwitana banga otaine kamogo; Kandi n'ow'omutima gugororokire basherura oku baraamwite. 
Proverbs29:11 Omushema ayoreka butunu ekiniga kye kyona, Kwonka omunyabwengye ayezibira, akiikaikanisa." 
Proverbs29:12 Omutegyeki ku arikutega amatu enkuru z'ebishuba, Abatware be boona baryahinduka babi." 
Proverbs29:13 Omworo n'orikuhata bateeranira hamwe; MUKAMA ahwezesa amaisho gaabo bombi. 
Proverbs29:14 Omugabe orikucwera abooro emanja omu bwinganisa, Ekitebe ky'obugabe bwe kiryahamibwa ebiro byona." 
Proverbs29:15 Omunyaafu n'okuhana byegyesa obwengye; Kwonka omwana ou bahugaho, ahemura nyina." 
Proverbs29:16 Ababi ku bakanya, n'eby'okushiisha bikanya; Kwonka abahikiriire baryareeba okugwa kwabo." 
Proverbs29:17 Hana omwana waawe, arykuruhuura, Ashemeze omutima gwawe." 
Proverbs29:18 Ahatari kworekwa abantu banga kutegyekwa, Kwonka oyorobera ebiragiro, ahiiriirwe." 
Proverbs29:19 Omuheereza tategyekwa bigambo byonka, Ahakuba, n'obu abihurira, tabyetaho." 
Proverbs29:20 Beitu nooreeba omuntu orahukwa aha rurimi? Bakaagira amatsiko aha mushema okukira ogwo. 
Proverbs29:21 Omuhuuku orikwiha omu buto naatetsibwa mukama we, Aha muheru aryashangwa yaabaire omuhunguzi." 
Proverbs29:22 Omunyakiniga aimutsya entongane, Orikurahuka kuguubwa kubi akanyisa ebicumuro." 
Proverbs29:23 Amaryo g'omuntu garyamugarura ahansi, Kwonka orikucureera omu mutima aryaheebwa ekitiinisa." 
Proverbs29:24 Okwatanisa n'omushema, aba ayangire amagara ge; Ku ahurira nibamurahiza, tagira ki agarukamu." 
Proverbs29:25 Okutiina abantu kureeta omutego, Kwonka orikwesiga MUKAMA aryaguma ari buhooro." 
Proverbs29:26 Baingi bakunda kushongoka aha mutegyeki, Kwonka MUKAMA niwe areetera omuntu kucwerwa orubanja rw'oburyo." 
Proverbs29:27 Otahikiriire n'ekirikunugwa aha bahikiriire, Kandi ow'omutima gugororokire n'ekirikunugwa aha babi." 
Proverbs30:1 Ebigambo bya Aguri mwene Yaake owa Maasa. Ogwo mushaija naagira Ityeli, Ityeli hamwe na Ukaali ati:" 
Proverbs30:2 Buzima ndi ekituuriizi, ekitashemereire kuba omuntu; Tiinyine kwetegyereza nk'okw'omuntu." 
Proverbs30:3 Tindeegire bwengye, kandi tindikumanya Orikwera." 
Proverbs30:4 N'oha owaatembire omu iguru, akagaruka, akashuuma? N'oha owaafumbatiize omuyaga omu ntomi? N'oha owaazingiriire amaizi omu mwenda? N'oha owaateireho enshonda zoona ez'ensi? Eiziina rye n'oha, n'ery'omutabani niriiha, Ku oraabe noogamanya?" 
Proverbs30:5 Buri kigambo kya Ruhanga kihamibwa ku kiri eky'amazima; Niwe ngabo y'abamuhungiraho. 
Proverbs30:6 Otagira eki waayongyera aha bigambo bye, Atakaakuhana, okashangwa ori omubeihi." 
Proverbs30:7 Ninkushaba ebintu bibiri, otabiinyima ntakafiire." 
Proverbs30:8 Nyihaho ebitaine mugasho n'ebishuba, obite hare; Otampindura omworo nari omutungi, Kureka ogume ompe eby'okurya ebinshemereire," 
Proverbs30:9 Ntakaiguta munonga, nkakwehakana, Nkagira nti: MUKAMA niki? Nari shi, ntakaba omworo nkaiba. Nkajumisa eiziina rya Ruhanga wangye." 
Proverbs30:10 Otaribeiherera omuheereza ahari mukama we, Nyentsya atarikukyeena, okagiibwaho orubanja." 
Proverbs30:11 Hariho abakyeena baishebo, Kandi batashabira baanyinabo omugisha." 
Proverbs30:12 Hariho abeeyeta abashemeire, Kwonka bateeziibweho bihagaro byabo." 
Proverbs30:13 Hariho n'abandi; yeimwe, eshi bagira amaisho g'amaryo, Bagayisa abantu amaisho!" 
Proverbs30:14 Hariho abu amaino gaabo geemi nka rurara, N'ebigigo byabo biri nk'emisyo, Okumira abooro, bakabamara omu nsi, N'abakyene, bakabamara omu bantu." 
Proverbs30:15 Omushundo gwine bahara baagwo babiri, Bashaba obutoosha nibagira bati: Mpa! Mpa! Hariho ebintu bishatu ebitahaaga, Nangwa ni bina, ebitagira biti, Naiguta;" 
Proverbs30:16 Nibyo ebi–Okuzimu, enda y'engumba, Ensi etahaaga amaizi. N'omuriro ogutakagiraga guti, Naiguta." 
Proverbs30:17 Eriisho ry'oteerera ishe enaku, Akeekunika, akanga kworobera nyina, Riryanonkoorwa ebikoona by'omu mpanga, Ririibwe amahungu." 
Proverbs30:18 Hariho ebintu bishatu ebikira kuntangaaza, Nangwa ni bina ebi nteetegyereza," 
Proverbs30:19 Nibyo ebi: Emizeereerere y'empungu omu mwanya, Emigyendere y'enjoka aha rukiri, Emigyendere y'emeeri aha nyanja, N'emitwarize y'omushaija aha mwishiki." 
Proverbs30:20 Nikwo n'emitwarize y'omukazi enshambani eba. Arya, ayeragaza aha minwa, agira ati: Tiinyine ki naashobya." 
Proverbs30:21 Hariho ebintu bishatu ebitengyetsa ensi, Nangwa ni bina ebi etabaasa kugumisiririza," 
Proverbs30:22 Nibyo ebi: Omuhuuku kuba omugabe, Omushema kuhaaga eby'okurya," 
Proverbs30:23 Omwishiki owaabengirwe kushwerwa, N'omuzaana kuhungurira mugore we." 
Proverbs30:24 Aha nsi hariho ebintu bina, n'obu biraabe biba bikye, Kwonka bigira obwengye bwingi munonga." 
Proverbs30:25 Nibyo ebi: Ebimunyu n'eihanga eritagira maani, Kwonka byehunikira eby'okurya omu kyanda;" 
Proverbs30:26 Endirira n'eihanga eritagira maani, Kwonka zeegirira amaju omu mabaare;" 
Proverbs30:27 Enzigye tizigira mukama, Kwonka zigyendera hamwe omu buteeka;" 
Proverbs30:28 N'ekinya n'ekintu eki orikubaasa kutwara omu ngaro, Kwonka kituura omu bikaari by'abagabe." 
Proverbs30:29 Hariho ebintu bishatu nangwa ni bina, Ebinyigimba omu migyendere yaabyo." 
Proverbs30:30 Nibyo ebi: Entare egira amaani okukira ezindi nyamaishwa, Kandi tegira kindi kyona eki ehunga;" 
Proverbs30:31 Embaraasi y'aha rugamba, empaya y'embuzi, N'omugabe otaturukirirwa." 
Proverbs30:32 Ku oraabe okozire eby'obushema, okeetunguura, Nari okateekateeka kukora kubi, kwata aha munwa;" 
Proverbs30:33 Ahabw'okuba okucunda amate kujwisa amajuta, Okumiga enyindo kujwisa eshagama, N'okwitsa ekiniga kureeta entongane." 
Proverbs31:1 Ebigambo bya Lemueli, omugabe wa Maasa, ebi yaayegyesiibwe nyina." 
Proverbs31:2 N'enki, mwana wangye, ou naayezaariire? N'enki, mwana wangye, ou naaraganiise Ruhanga nimpiga?" 
Proverbs31:3 Otariha abakzi amaani gaawe, N'obu kwakuba okuza omuri abo abacwekyereza abagabe." 
Proverbs31:4 Tikishemereire bagabe, iwe Lemueli, Ti ky'abagabe kunywa viinyo, N'obu baakuba abategyeki kwetenga ebirikusinza," 
Proverbs31:5 Ngu batakaanywa, bakeebwa ebiragiro, Bakaita emanja z'abarikubonabonesibwa boona." 
Proverbs31:6 Ekirikusinza okihe orikwenda kufa, Na viinyo ogihe oine obusaasi bwingi omu mutima," 
Proverbs31:7 Anywe, ayebwe obworo bwe, arekye kwijuka enaku ze." 
Proverbs31:8 Yashamya akanwa kaawe, ogambirire ebiteta, Kandi otonganire abatsigirweho abataine ifo na ruguru." 
Proverbs31:9 Yashamya akanwa kaawe, ocwe emanja z'oburyo, Orwanirire abooro n'abakyene." 
Proverbs31:10 Omukazi w'omutima, n'oha owaakumuzoora? Ahakuba naakira amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi." 
Proverbs31:11 Omutima gwa iba gumwesiga, Kandi omushaija we taribura kutunga." 
Proverbs31:12 Ebiro byona eby'amagara ge Akora gye iba, tamukora kubi." 
Proverbs31:13 Ayezirika kutunga ebyoya by'entaama na furakisi, Kandi akora n'emikono eyekundiire." 
Proverbs31:14 Omukazi ogwo ni nk'amaato g'abashuubuzi, Aiha eby'okurya bye hare." 
Proverbs31:15 Aimuka butakaseesire, Atebeekanisiza ab'omu ka ye eby'okurya, Kandi n'abazaana be abateekateekyera emirimo." 
Proverbs31:16 Ayetegyereza omusiri, agugura, Agubyaramu emizaabibu, naakoresa ebirugire omu mikono ye." 
Proverbs31:17 Ayezirika amaani nk'omweko, kandi ahamya emikono ye." 
Proverbs31:18 Amanya ebi arikukora ku bimwiniire omugasho, Kandi etabaaza ye nyekiro teraara." 
Proverbs31:19 Emikono ye agita aha kiti ky'ebyoya by'entaama, N'engaro ze zikwata akati k'okukaragisa." 
Proverbs31:20 Ashashaanurira abooro engaro, N'abakyene abahwera n'emikono ye." 
Proverbs31:21 Tatiinirira b'omu ka ye biro by'embeho, Ahabw'okuba ab'omu ka ye boona bajwara ebirikutukura." 
Proverbs31:22 Ayebaziirira eby'okwefubika, Kandi ajwara emyenda ya bafuta na bujwa." 
Proverbs31:23 Iba amanyirwa omu marembo, ashutami n'abakuru b'ensi." 
Proverbs31:24 Abaziira ebijwaro bya kitaani, kandi abitunda, Abashuubuzi abaha emyeko." 
Proverbs31:25 Amaani n'ekitiinisa nibyo bijwaro bye; Ebiriija tabitiina, abishekyerera." 
Proverbs31:26 Akanwa ke kagamba eby'obwengye, Kandi okwegyesa eby'embabazi tikumuruga mu kanwa." 
Proverbs31:27 Areeberera gye emicwe y'ab'omu ka ye; Kandi tariira koya. 
Proverbs31:28 Abaana be baimuka, bamweta ow'omugisha; Kandi na iba amusingiza naagira ati:" 
Proverbs31:29 Abakazi baingi batwaza gye, kwonka iwe obakira boona." 
Proverbs31:30 Karimi karungi n'oburyarya; kandi oburungi ni busha; Kwonka omukazi otiina MUKAMA aba ow'okusiimwa. 
Proverbs31:31 Mumusiime ahabw'ebi emikono ye ekozire, Kandi emirimo ye emuhimbisise omu marembo." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Ebigambo by'Omubuurizi, mwene Daudi, omugabe ow'omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Omubuurizi naagira ati: Busha erikukira busha yoona, Byona ni busha!" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Ni mugasho ki ogu omuntu aiha omu kufa kubi kwona, Oku afa kubi ahansi y'eizooba?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Obusingye burugaho, obundi bwija, Kwonka ensi yo egumaho obutwire bwona." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Eizooba rituruka, kandi rirenga, Bwanyima rirahuka kugaruka ei riruga." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Omuyaga gutoora obukiizi-bwa-buryo, Gugaruka gutoora obwa-bumosho, Guhindahinduka omu rugyendo rwagwo, Kandi gugaruka omu kwehinguririza kwagwo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Emigyera yoona ehsuka omu nyanja, Kwonka enyanja teijura; Ei emigyera eza, niyo egaruka kuza." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ebintu byona biijwire oburuhe, Obu omuntu atarikubaasa kushoboorora. Eriisho tirihaaga kureeba, N'okutu tikuhaaga kuhurira." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Ekirabaireho nikyo kiriguma nikibaho; Kandi ekirakozirwe nikyo kiriguma nikikorwa. Tihariho kisya ahansi y'eizooba. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Hariho eki abantu baakugambaho ngu, Reeba, eki ni kisya? Nakyo kirabaireho ira omu biro ebyatubandiize." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ebya ira tibikiijukwa, N'ebiribaho, ebitakabeireho, abarikurataho tibaribiijuka." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Nyowe Omubuurizi nkaba ndi omugabe wa Israeli omuri Yerusaalemu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Nkata omutima aha kusherura n'okucondooza obwengye, ngu mbone kumanya ebirikukorwa ahansi y'eiguru byona; naashanga kuri okufa kubi okw'obusaasi oku Ruhanga yaahaire abantu kubarusya." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nkeetegyereza byona ebirikukorwa ahansi y'eizooba, naashanga byona biri busha, biri okwitanira omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Ekikiikami tikirikubaasa kugororwa, Kandi ekitahikire tikirikubaasa kubarwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Naateekateeka omu mutima gwangye nti: Reeba, ngizire obwengye bwingi okukira boona ab'omuri Yerusaalemu abambandiize; omutima gwangye gumazire omwanya muhango nigukoresa obwengye n'okumanya." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Naata omutima aha kwetegyereza obwengye n'obugwa-iraro n'obushema; naashanga nabyo kuri okwitanira omuyaga. 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ahakuba obwengye bwingi bubamu enaku nyingi, Kandi oyeyongyera okumanya, ayeyongyera obusaasi." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Kandi nkagira omutima gwangye nti: Ka nkugyeze n'eby'okweshemeza, oshemererwe, ogwe gye. Kwonka ekyo nakyo naashanga kuri okwitanira omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Naagamba aha nsheko nti: N'eiraro! n'aha kweshemeza nti: Nikugasha ki? 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Naateekateeka omu mutima gwangye oku naakubaasa kweshemeza na viinyo, omutima gwangye gukaguma nigumpabura obwengye, n'oku naakubaasa kumanya oku abantu bashemereire kutwaza ahansi y'eizooba omu biro ebi bamara omu nsi." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Naakora emirimo mikuru; naayeyombekyera amaju, naayebyarira emizaabibu," 
Ecclesiastes2:5 naayehingira emisiri, naayekorera ebibanja, naabibyaramu emiti erikwana ebijuma," 
Ecclesiastes2:6 naayecungirira ebiyanja, naataho emikura y'okutwara amaizi omu misiri ey'okwororeramu emiti." 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Naagura abahuuku n'abazaana, n'abandi baazaarirwa omu ka yangye; kandi naagira amasyo maingi g'ente n'ag'entaama, agarikukira ag'abandi boona abambandiize omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Kandi naayerundaanira efeeza n'ezaabu, n'eby'eitungo eby'abagabe n'eby'amashaza; naayetungira abeeshongozi abashaija n'abakazi, n'ebinyanshunju bingi ebirikushemeza abantu." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ntyo naaba mukuru, naakira boona abambandiize omuri Yerusaalemu, kandi n'obwengye bwangye naaguma nabwo." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Eki amaisho gangye gaabaire geetenga kyona, nkaba ntakigaima; nkaba ntazibira mutima gwangye kweshemeza omu muringo gwona, ahakuba nkashemerererwa okufa kubi kwangye kwona; ebyo nibyo byabaire ebihembo byakwo." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Bwanyima naayetegyereza ebi naakozire n'emikono yangye byona, n'okufa kubi oku naafiire kubi nimbikora, naashanga byona biri busha, biri okwitanira omuyaga, kandi hataine kiine omugasho ahansi y'eizooba." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ntyo naagaruka naareeba obwengye n'obugwa-iraro n'obushema; mbwenu ekindi eki ohungurira omugabe yaakukora niki? kureka ebibaire byakozirwe. 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Bwanyima naareeba ku obwengye burikukira obushema, nk'oku omushana gukira omwirima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Omunyabwengye agira amaisho, kwonka omushema agyendera omu mwirima ataine ki arikureeba; n'obu kiraabe kiri kityo, nkeetegyereza ngu omuheru gwabo boona guba gumwe." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Nikwo kuteekateeka omu mutima gwangye nti: Ebihika aha mushema, naanye nibyo birimpikaho. Mbwenu shi, okumukiza obwengye nikingasira ki? Ntyo naagira omu mutima gwangye nti: Ekyo nakyo ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Manya, omunyabwengye n'omushema nikyo kimwe; tihariho origuma naijukwa, ahabw'okuba omu biro ebiriija bombi baryaba baayebire. Ka n'eihano omunyabwengye kufa nk'omushema!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ntyo naatamwa amagara, ahabw'okuba ebikorerwa ahansi y'eizooba byona bikangwisa kubi; byona ni busha n'okwitanira omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Kandi naatamwa ebi naafeereire kubi byona ahansi y'eizooba, ahabw'okureeba ngu ndyabitsigira orimpungurira." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Mbwenu n'oha orikumanya yaaba ariba omunyabwengye nari omushema? Kwonka niwe ariba mukama wa byona ebi naafeereire kubi ninkoresa obwengye bwangye ahansi y'eizooba. Ekyo nakyo ni busha. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Nikyo naahindukiire, omutima gwangye nkagumara amatsiko aha bi naafeereire kubi byona ahansi y'eizooba;" 
Ecclesiastes2:21 ahakuba obundi hariho omuntu okora n'obwengye n'okumanya n'obuhangu; kwonka aryabitsigira otarabihendekyeire, abigaramisirizemu. Ekyo nakyo ni busha, n'ekibi kihango." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Mbwenu shi, omuntu aiha ki omu kufa kubi kwe kwona, n'omu bi omutima gwe gwayezirikiire kukora hansi y'eizooba?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Ahabw'okuba ebiro bye byona biijwire obusaasi, n'okukora kwe n'enaku; nangwa na nyekiro omutima gwe tiguruhuuka. Ekyo nakyo ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Tihariho kigasira omuntu ekikira okurya n'okunywa n'okutunga okushemererwa omu bi afeereire kubi. Ekyo nakyo nkareeba ku kiruga omu mikono ya Ruhanga; 
Ecclesiastes2:25 mbwenu We ah'atari n'oha orikubaasa kurya nari kweshemeza? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Ahabw'okuba omuntu oshemeza Ruhanga niwe aha obwengye n'okumanya n'okushemererwa; kwonka omusiisi Ruhanga amuha omurimo gw'okushaaruura n'okuhunika, ngu abone kubitsigira omuntu orikushemeza Ruhanga. Ekyo nakyo ni busha, n'okwitanira omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Buri kintu kiine ebiro byakyo, kandi ekyatairweho ahansi y'eiguru kyona kiine obunaku bwakyo:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Obunaku bw'okuzaarwa, n'obunaku bw'okufa, Obunaku bw'okubyara, n'obunaku bw'okukuura ebyabyairwe;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Obunaku bw'okwit, n'obunaku bw'okukiza, Obunaku bw'okusheenya, n'obunaku bw'okwombeka;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Obunaku bw'okurira, n'obunaku bw'okusheka, Obunaku bw'okucura, n'obunaku bw'okuzina;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Obunaku bw'okunaga amabaare, n'obunaku bw'okugarunda hamwe; Obunaku bw'okufumbatana, n'obunaku bw'okwerinda kufumbatana;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Obynaku bw'okusherura, n'obunaku bw'okubuza, Obunaku bw'okubiika, n'obunaku bw'okunaga;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Obunaku bw'okutaagura, n'obunaku bw'okubaziira, Obunaku bw'okuhunama, n'obunaku bw'okugamba;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Obunaku bw'okukunda, n'obunaku bw'okwanga, Obunaku bw'obweme, n'obunaku bw'obusingye." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Beitu omukozi atunga magoba ki omu bi ahendekyeire? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nkareeba emirimo ei Ruhanga yaahaire abantu kukora. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Buri kintu akakihanga kiri kirungi omu bunaku bwakyo; kandi yaata omu mitima y'abantu ebiteekateeko by'obunaku obutarihwaho, n'obu omuntu araabe atarikubaasa kumanya ebi Ruhanga yaakozire okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Nimmanya ku hatariho kirikubakiriira okushemererwa n'okukora gye ebiro byona ebi bariba bakiriho; 
Ecclesiastes3:13 kandi ku kiri ekiconco kya Ruhanga aha muntu weena okurya n'okunywa n'okushemerererwa ebi arikufeera kubi byona. 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Nimmanya ngu, eki Ruhanga akora kyona kiryagumaho ebiro byona; tihaine kirikubaasa kukyongyerwaho, nari okukituubyaho; kandi Ruhanga akakihanga atyo, ngu abantu bamutiine." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ekiriho kirabaireho; ekiribaho nakyo kirabaireho; kandi Ruhanga agaruraho ekyabaire kihirweho. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Kandi nkareeba ahansi y'eizooba, omu mwanya gw'okucweramu emanja z'oburyo, harimu obubi; kandi omu mwanya ogwabaire gurimu okuhikiirira, harimu obubi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Nikwo kugira omu mutima gwangye nti: Ruhanga aryacwera abahikiriire n'ababi orubanja; ahabw'okuba buri kintu na buri murimo akabiteeraho obunaku bwabyo. 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Kandi naagira omu mutima gwangye nti: Ruhanga naagyeza abaana b'abantu, ngu babone kumanyiraho ku batari kindi kureka enyamaishwa." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ahabw'okuba ekihika aha bantu, nikyo kihika aha nyamaishwa; nk'oku omuntu afa, nikwo n'enyamaishwa efa. Byona bigira emiikize emwe; omuntu taine ki akiza enyamaishwa, ahabw'okuba byona ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Byona biza omu mwanya gumwe; byona bikaruga omu mucuucu, kandi byona nimwo birigaruka." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 N'oha orikumanya yaaba omwitsyo gw'omuntu gwinamuka ahaiguru, ogw'enyamaishwa gukashuuma omu itaka?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Nikyo ndikureebera ngu tihariho kirikukirira omuntu okushemerererwa emirimo ye, ahabw'okuba ogwo nigwo mugabo gwe. N'oha owaakumugarura kureeba ebiribaho yaarugireho?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Kandi nkagaruka naareeba eby'okuhata byona ebirikukorerwa ahansi y'eizooba. Naareeba okurira okw'abarikuhatwa bataine kihuumuriza; obushoboorozi bwinwe abo abarikubaita kubi, kandi bataine w'okubahuumuriza." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Naateekateeka nti, abafu abaafiire bahiirirwe okukira abahuriire abakiriho;" 
Ecclesiastes4:3 kwonka orikubakira bombi n'otakabahoga, kandi otakareebaga bibi ebirikukorwa ahansi y'eizooba."
