Ecclesiastes4:4 Bwanyima naareeba emirabanamu yoona y'eby'emirimo y'obuhangu byona, ku nibyo bireetera omuntu okugirirwa mutaahi we eihari. Kandi ekyo nakyo ni busha n'okwitanira omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Omushema ayefumbata, atsigarira okwerya." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Oruhi rumwe rwijwire obusingye niruhita empi ibiri eziijwire emirabanamu n'okwitanira omuyaga. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Kandi hoona nkagaruka naareeba busha ahansi y'eizooba; 
Ecclesiastes4:8 omuntu otaine waabo, n'obu yaakuba omutabani, nari mwene ishe; kwonka okufa kubi kwe kutaine bugarukiro, kandi amaisho ge gatakahaagaga butungi, haza atakeebuuzaga ati: Beitu obu nfa kubi nti, mpendekyera ki ekinzibira kweshemeza? Ekyo nakyo ni busha n'emirabanamu mibi." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Ababiri nibakira omwe; ahabw'okuba baheebwa ebihembo birungi ahabw'okufa kubi kwabo. 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Ahakuba ku bagwa, omwe aimutsya mugyenzi we; kwonka ogwa ari omwe wenka, akabura kiimutsya, areeba enaku." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ekindi, ababiri ku babyama hamwe, batagatirwa; mbwenu omwe naabaasa ata kutagatirwa ari wenka?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Omuntu n'obu yaakusingura omwe, ababiri takaababaasa; kandi omurunga gw'enyabushatu tigucweka juba." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Omutsigazi omworo ow'obwengye naakira omugabe okuzire omushema, otakyenda kuhaburwa;" 
Ecclesiastes4:14 n'obu yaakuba yaarugire omu kihome akaza aha ngoma, nari yaazairwe ari omworo omu ihanga rye." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nkareeba abantu boona abahuriire abarikugyendagyenda ahansi y'eizooba, beemereire aha rubanju rw'ogwo mutsigazi owaabaire naazakuhungurira ogwo mugabe;" 
Ecclesiastes4:16 abantu abu yaabaire naategyeka bakaba bari baingi bataine bugarukiro. Kwonka abarikurataho tibarimushemerererwa. Buzimazima ekyo nakyo ni busha n'okwitanira omuyaga. 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Ku oriba nooza omu nju ya Ruhanga, ogume orinde ekigyere kyawe; okwirira haihi kuhurira nikukira okutamba ebitambo by'abashema, ahabw'okuba bo tibamanya ku barikukora kubi." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Otarirahukwa aha rurimi, kandi otariikiriza omutima gwawe kurahukiriza kurahira omu maisho ga Ruhanga; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ari omu iguru, naiwe ori aha nsi; n'ahabw'ekyo ebigambo byawe bibe bikye." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ahabw'okuba ebirooto bireetwa emirabanamu mingi, kandi eiraka ry'omushema rimanyirwa aha bigambo bingi." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Ku orirahira nooraganisa ahari Ruhanga, otarikyerererwa kukihikiirirza; ahabw'okuba tashemerererwa bashema. Ogume ohikiirize eki oraganiise." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Okuraganisa otahikiirize nikikirwa okutaraganisa. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Otariikiriza akanwa kaawe kukucumuza, kandi otarigamba omu maisho ga maraika oti: Kikaba kiri ekishobyo. Nooyendera ki ku Ruhanga agirira eiraka ryawe ekiniga, akacwekyereza emirimo y'emikono yaawe?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Manya, ebirooto ku bikanya, n'ebigambo bitaine muhoho bikanya; kwonka iwe ogume otiine Ruhanga." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ku orireeba omu ishaza abooro nibahatwa, emanja zaabo niziitwa, kandi nibaakwa n'amaani ebi bashemereire, otaritangaara; ahakuba orikukiza abakuru obukuru aryaba naabireeba; kandi hariho orikubakirira kimwe." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Kwonka omweru gw'ensi guba ogwa boona; n'omugabe atungwa ebi ahingiirwe. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Okunda efeeza tahaaga feeza; kandi n'okunda obutungi tahaaga magoba. Ekyo nakyo ni busha. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ebintu ku bikanya, n'ab'okubirya bakanya; mbwenu nyinabyo aba ayeyongyeireho ki? Tokubireeba n'amaisho kwonka?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Oturo tw'omukozi tumugwa gye, n'obu arya bikye nari bingi; kwonka omwiguto gw'omutungi gumubuza oturo." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Hariho ekibi ekirengyesereize eki naareebire ahansi y'eizooba; nibwo butungi obu omuntu ayeebiikira, haza bukamureetera akabi;" 
Ecclesiastes5:14 obutungi bwe obwo bukamarwaho ebihikiirizi; kandi akizaara omwana, akabura eky'okumuha." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Nk'oku yaarugire omu nda ya nyina ataine ki ajwaire, nikwo arigyenda ataine ki aihire omu kufa kubi kwe, ekiyaakutwara omu ngaro ze." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Kandi ekyo nakyo n'ekibi ekirengyesereize; oku yaizire, nikwo arigyenda. Mbwenu nikimugasira ki okwitanira omuyaga," 
Ecclesiastes5:17 akamara ebiro bye byona ari omu mwirima, aine enaku nyingi n'endwara n'okwetomboita?" 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Reeba, eki naareebire kiri kirungi aha muntu, kandi kihikire, n'okurya n'okunywa n'okushemerererwa okufa kubi kwe ebiro bikye ebi Ruhanga amuhaire; ahabw'okuba ogwo nigwo mugabo gwe." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 N'omuntu weena ou Ruhanga ahaire eitungo n'ebintu n'obushoboorozi bw'okubishemerererwa omu kufa kubi kwe, ekyo nakyo n'ekiconco kya Ruhanga." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Ahakuba taritongyeza munonga biro by'amagara ge, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga aryaguma naamuhuzya n'okushemererwa omu mutima gwe, naabimwebesa." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Hariho ekibi eki naareebire ahansi y'eizooba, kandi ekituura kiremereire abantu," 
Ecclesiastes6:2 niwe muntu ou Ruhanga ahaire eitungo n'ebintu n'ekitiinisa, ataine kintu kyona eki arikwetenga, kwonka akamwima okubishemerererwamu, kureka omunyaihanga akaba niwe yaabishemerererwamu. Ekyo nakyo ni busha, kandi n'okubonabona kw'obusaasi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Omuntu okuzaara abaana igana, akahangaara emyaka mingi, ebiro by'amagara ge bikakanya, kwonka omutima gwe gutahaagye birungi, akabura kiziika, ningira ngu omuntu ogwo naakirwa enda erugiremu;" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 ahakuba egyo nda erugamu etari kintu, eza omu mwirima, gushweka eiziina ryayo," 
Ecclesiastes6:5 kandi eba etakareebaga izooba n'obu kwakuba okumanya ekintu kyona; n'obu eraabe eba etyo, etunga obuhuumure okukira ogwo muntu." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 N'obu yaakuhangaara emyaka rukumi kabiri, atarikushemerererwa birungi, timurikumanya ngu byona biza omu mwanya gumwe?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Okufa kubi kwona oku omuntu afa kubi, aba naahendekyera enda ye, kwonka tahaaga." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Omunyabwengye naakiza ki omushema? Kandi omworo naakiza ki omuntu mukuru orikumanya kutwaza gye omu maisho g'abantu? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Okushemerererwa ebi orikureeba nikikira okugama noozengyereza omutima aha bi orikwetenga. Ekyo nakyo ni busha n'okwitanira omuyaga. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ekiriho kyona kikeetwa eiziina ira; oku omuntu ari hati kukamanywa ira, kandi tarikubaasa kuhakanisa Orikumukiza amaani." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ebigambo ku byongyera kukanya, busha nayo ekanya; mbwenu ekyo omuntu kimwongyeraho ki?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 N'oha owaakumanya ebishemereire kugirira omuntu omugasho akiriho ebiro byona eby'amagara ge agataine ku gari, agarikuhinguraho nk'ekicuucu? N'oha owaakugambira omuntu ebiribaho ahansi y'eizooba yaarugireho?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Okugira eiziina rirungi nikikira amajuta g'omugaju ag'obuguzi bwingi; Eizooba ey'okufeeraho nirikira ery'okuzaarirwaho. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Okuza omu ka erimu okucura Nikikira okuza omu ka erimu obugyenyi; Ahabw'okuba ekyo nigwo muheru gw'abantu bona, Kandi abahuriire baryakigumya aha mutima." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Entimba y'aha mutima ekira ensheko, Ahabw'okuba enaku z'ahamaisho zishemeza omutima." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Omutima gw'omunyabwengye guba omu nju ei barikucuriramu; Kwonka emitima y'abashema eba omu nju y'okwesiima. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Haakiri omuntu okuhurira okuhana kw'abanyabwengye, Okukira okuhurira ekyehsongoro ky'abashema;" 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ahakuba okusheka kw'omushema ni nk'amahwa Agarikubarabarukira ahansi y'enyungu eteeka. Ekyo nakyo ni busha. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Buzimazima okuhata kuhindura omunyabwengye omushema, Kandi enguzi eita obwengye." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Omuheru gw'ekintu gukira okutanidka kwakyo; Ow'omutima ogurikugumisiriza akira ow'omutima gw'amaryo. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Otarirahuka kugira ekiniga, Ahabw'okuba ekiniga kituura omu mutima gw'abashema." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Otagira oti: Ahabw'enki ebiro bya ira nibihita ebya hati? Ahabw'okuba obwengye tibwo burikukureetera kubuuza otyo. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Obwengye ni burungi waaba oine obuhunguzi, Kandi nibugasira abakirikureeba eizooba." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ahabw'okuba obwengye n'obweshereko, nk'oku empiiha ziba obweshereko; Kandi omugasho gw'okumanya n'obwengye bw'okurinda amagara g'obwine." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Yetegyereze omurimo gwa Ruhanga! N'oha owaakubaasa kugorora eki yaakiikamize? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Aha izooba ery'okuhiirwa, oshemererwe; n'aha izooba ry'akabi oteekateekye ku Ruhanga niwe yaabihangire byombi, ngu omuntu atarimanya ebiribaho atakiriho." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ebyo byona nkabireeba omu biro by'amagara gangye g'enfabusha; hariho ohikiriire ofa ahabw'okuhikiirira kwe, kandi hariho omubi ohangaara ahabw'obubi bwe." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Otarengyesereza okuhikiirira, kandi oteehindura omunyabwengye orengyesereize. Nooyendera ki kwereetera okufa?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Otarengyesereza kuba mubi, kandi otaba omushema. Nooyendera ki kufa obunaku bwawe butakahikire?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ni kirungi okuhamyaho kimwe, n'ekindi okutakireka; ahabw'okuba orikutiina Ruhanga aryaruga gye omuri ebyo byona." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Obwengye bureetera omunyabwengye amaani okukira abategyeki ikumi abari omu rurembo. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Buzimazima tihariho ohikiriire omu nsi okora gye, atashiishe na kakye." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kandi otarita omutima aha bigambo by'abantu, nyentsya otakaahurira omuhuuku waawe naakujuma;" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 ahakuba naiwe noomanya omu mutima gwawe kaingi ku okyeena abandi. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ebyo byona nkabihamya ahabw'obwengye. Nkagira nti: Ndyaba omunyabwengye, kwonka bwamba hare." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ekyo kiri hare munonga okuzimu; n'oha owaakubaasa kukizoora? 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Bwanyima naahinduka, naamariirira omu mutima gwangye kumanya, kucondooza, kusherura obwengye, kwehanuuza ebintu, n'okumanya obubi bw'obushema, n'obushema oku buri eiraro." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Naagaruka naareeba ekintu ekirikukira rufu obushaarizi, niwe mukazi ou omutima gwe guri omutego n'ekigoye, kandi n'emikono ye eri enkomo. Orikushemeza Ruhanga niwe arimukira; kwonka omusiisi, ogwo mukazi aryamukwata." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Omubuurizi yaagaruka yaagira ati: Reeba, eki nikyo naaboine, ahabw'okuteerana ekintu n'ekindi, ngu ndeebe oku birikwingana," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 eki omutima gwangye gusherwire kaingi, kwonka eki ntakareebire. Omu bashaija rukumi nkareebamu omwe, kwonka omu bakazi boona tindaboinemu n'omwe." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Reeba, eki kyonka nikyo naareebire, ngu Ruhanga akahanga omuntu agororokire, kwonka abantu baayesherurira bingi ebi baayegunziire." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 N'oha ori nk'omunyabwengye? Kandi n'oha orikumanya ekintu oku kirikushoboororwa? Obwengye bw'omuntu bureetera aha maisho ge kushemuuka, Bumaraho emifunya." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ninkuhabura, oyorobere ekiragiro ky'omugabe, kandi ahabw'endahiro ei waarahiire ahari Ruhanga otarihahaaza omutima;" 
Ecclesiastes8:3 ruga omu maisho ge, oteeziringa eki yaakuragiira, n'obu kiraabe kitarikukushemeza; ahabw'okuba akora eki arikwenda kyona." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Manya, ekigambo ky'omugabe kigira obushoboorozi. N'oha owaakwehanga kumugira ati: Ekyo nookora ki?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Orikworobera ekiragiro, tarihikwaho kabi; kandi omutima gw'omunyabwengye gumanya obunaku buhikire, n'oburyo bw'okukoreramu;" 
Ecclesiastes8:6 ahabw'okuba ekintu kyona kigira obunaku bwakyo n'oburyo obu kishemereire kukorwamu, omuntu n'obu araabe ahendwa obusaasi bwe." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Ahabw'okuba tamanya biribaho; mbwenu n'oha owaakubaasa kumugambira oku biriba? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Tihariho muntu oine obushoboorozi bw'okutegyeka omuyaga, n'obu kwakuba okwemereza eizooba rya rufu; omuri orwo rugamba tihabaho kuraga, kandi owaayehaireyo kukora ebibi, tibirimujuna." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ebyo byona nkabireeba, obu naata omutima gwangye aha kumanya ebirikukorwa ahansi y'eizooba, omuntu naayekuriza ahari mugyenzi we kumukora kubi." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Bwanyima nkareeba ababi nibaziikwa, nibaza okuzimu; kwonka abaakozire gye baaruga omu Mwanya ogurikwera, baayeba omu rurembo. Ekyo nakyo ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ahabw'ekifubiro ky'ekibi kutaija juba, nikyo emitima y'abantu emariiririra kukora ebibi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Omusiisi n'obu akora ebibi emirundi igana, akahangaara, kwonka nimmanyira kimwe ngu abatuura omu maisho ga Ruhanga nibamutiina nibo bariba gye;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 kwonka omubi we tariba gye, n'obu kwakuba okwongyera aha biro bye ebiri nk'ekicuucu, ahabw'okuba tatiina Ruhanga." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Hariho busha obundi obubaho omu nsi; hariho abahikiriire abahikwaho ebyakushemereire ebi ababi bakora, kandi hariho ababi abahikwaho ebyakushemereire ebi abahikiriire bakora. Nikwo kugira nti: Ekyo nakyo ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ntyo naasiima okweruhuura; ahabw'okuba tihariho ekirikukirira omuntu okurya n'okunywa n'okweruhuura; ahakuba ebyo nibyo ariguma nabyo omu kufa kubi kwe ebiro byona ebi Ruhanga amuhaire kumara ahansi y'eizooba. 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ku naataire omutima aha kumanya obwengye n'okureeba emirabanamu eri aha nsi, (ahabw'okuba hariho abatagwejegyera na kakye nyomushana na nyekiro,)" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 bwanyima naayetegyereza emirimo ya Ruhanga yoona, naashanga omuntu atarikubaasa kushoborokyerwa murimo gwona ogukorwa ahansi y'eizooba. Omuntu n'obu yaakufa kubi ata kwenda kugumanya, takaagushoborokyerwa; nangwa n'obu omunyabwengye yaakugira ngu naagumanya, kwonka taribaasa kugumanya." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ebyo byona nkabita aha mutima, naabyetegyereza, abahikiriire n'abanyabwengye n'ebi bakora oku biri omu mikono ya Ruhanga; yaaba biruga ahari rukundo, nari ahari rwango, tihaine orikukimanya. Byona biri aho omu maisho gaabo." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Byona bihika ahari boona omu muringo gumwe, ahari ohikiriire n'ahari otahikiriire, aha murungi n'aha mubi, ahari oshemeire n'ahari otashemeire, aha mutambi w'ebitambo n'aha muntu otabitamba. Oku omurungi aba, nikwo n'omusiisi aba; arahira ni nk'otarahira." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Obwo n'obubi obuba omuri byona ebikorwa ahansi y'eizooba, abantu boona kuhikwaho omuheru gumwe; ekindi, emitima y'abantu eijwire ebibi, kandi n'omu mitima yaabo habamu eiraro bakiriho; bwanyima y'ebyo bakurata abaafiire." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Kwonka okwatanisa n'abahuriire boona aba aine amatsiko, ahabw'okuba embwa ehuriire ekira entare efiire." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Abahuriire bamanya ku barifa; kwonka abafiire tibagira ki bamanya, kandi baba batakiine bindi bihembo; ahabw'ouba tibaakiijukwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Okukunda kwabo n'okwangana kwabo n'eihari ryabo, byona biba byahweireho; kandi baba batakiine mugabo gwona omuri byona ebirikukorwa ahansi y'eizooba okuhitsya ebiro byona." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Irooko oyeriire eby'okurya byawe n'okushemererwa, kandi oyenywere viinyo yaawe n'okweruhuura; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga aherize kusiima ebi orikukora." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ebijwaro byawe bigume nibyera, kandi omutwe gwawe gurrekye kuburamu amajuta." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Oyesiime n'omukazi waawe ou okunda ebiro byona eby'amagara gaawe agataine muhoho, ebi Ruhanga akuhaire kumara ahansi y'eizooba, ahabw'okuba ogwo nigwo mugabo gwawe omu biro by'amagara gaawe n'omu kufa kubi kwawe oku orikufa kubi ahansi y'eizooba." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kyona eki orikwenda kukora n'emikono yaawe, okikore n'amaani; ahabw'okuba okuzimu ei oriza tihabayo murimo, nari enaama, nari okumanya, n'obu bwakuba obwengye." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Naagaruka naareeba ahansi y'eizooba ngu abairuki rugambwa tibo basinga omu mpaka z'okwiruka, n'ab'amaani tibo basingura omu rugamba, n'ab'obwengye tibo batunga eby'okurya, n'abarikwegyereza tibo bagira eitungo, n'abahangu tibo bashongoka; kureka boona bahikwaho obunaku n'ebihikiirizi." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ahabw'okuba tihariho muntu omanya obunaku bwe; nk'oku eby'enyanja bikwatwa akatimba kabi, n'enyonyi zikakwatwa omutego, nikwo n'abantu bakwatwa omutego omu bunaku bubi, ku bubagwaho kitaraariire." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Kandi naareeba ahansi y'eizooba eky'okureeberaho eki eky'obwengye ekyansusiire kikuru. 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Omu rurembo rukye hakaba harimu abantu bakye; bwanyima omugabe rugambwa yaija, yaarugota, yaarwombekaho ebigo bihango." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kwonka omuri orwo rurembo hakaba harimu omworo oine obwengye; bwanyima ahabw'obwengye bwe yaarukiza. N'obu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, tihaine muntu weena owaijukire ogwo mworo." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ntyo naagira nti: Obwengye bukira amaani; kwonka obwengye bw'omworo bugaywa, kandi ebigambo bye tibabyetaho." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Ebigambo by'omunyabwengye ebirikugambwa mpora nibikir aebi omutegyeki orikuyombera omu bashema. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Obwengye nibukira eby'okurwanisa, kwonka omusiisi omwe aita ebirungi bingi." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Enshohera ezifiire zinuutsya amajuta g'omugaju, N'obushema bukye bumaraho obwengye n'ekitiinisa." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Omutima gw'omunyabwengye gumutooza ahari buryo, Kwonka ogw'omushema gumutooza ahari bumosho." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Haza kandi omushema ku aba ari omu muhanda, aburwa obwengye, Ou yaareeba weena amweta omushema." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Omutegyeki ku arikugirira ekiniga, otariruga omu mwanya gwawe, Ahabw'okuba okworoba kusaasiza ebicumuro bihango." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kandi hariho ekibi eki naareebire ahansi y'eizooba, nikwo kushobaya kw'omutegyeki." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Obushema buteebwa omu myanya mingi y'ekitiinisa, n'abatungi bashutama omu myanya erikugaywa." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nkareeba abahuuku nibagyendera aha mbaraasi, n'abanyiginya nibagyendesa ebigyere nk'abahuuku." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Orikutimba ekiina aryakigwamu, Kandi orikufumura orugo aryariibwa enjoka." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ohigura amabaare, gamuhutaaza, N'oyatsa enku zimunaga omu kabi." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ekyoma ku kihwa obwogi, nyinakyo ataakityaza, Aba ashemereire kwongyera amaani; Kwonka obwengye nibwo buhwera omuntu okuhikiiriza Eki arikwenda kukora." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Enjoka ku eruma omuntu etarogirwe, Omurogi waayo aba atakiine mugasho." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Ebigambo ebiruga omu kanwa k'omunyabwengye bimureetera okukundwa, Kwonka ebigambo by'omushema biryamumaraho." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Okutandika kw'ebigambo ebiruga omu kanwa ke n'obushema, N'omuheru gwabyo n'eiraro ribi." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Omushema ayongyerera ebigambo, N'obu haraabe hataine orikumanya ebiribaho; Kandi n'oha owaakubaasa kumugambira ebiribaho yaarugireho?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Okufa kubi kw'omushema kumurusya, Ahabw'okuba tamanya kahanda kaza obukama." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Iwe nsi 'we, oryareeba enaku, omugabe waawe ku araabe akiri muto, N'abanyiginya baawe nibaimukira aha by'okurya!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Iwe nsi 'we, ohiiriirwe, omugabe waawe ku araabe ari ow'omu ruganda rw'abakungu, Kandi abanyiginya baawe ku baraagume nibariira omu bunaku buhikire, Nibariira amaani, batarikunywera sindo!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Obweremwa bubonza orukanga, Kandi emikono emyeremwa ereetera enju kwogwamu enjura." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Obugyenyi buteekyerwa okusheka, Na viinyo ereetera amagara kushemererwa, Kandi empiiha ekyenuura byona." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Otarikyeena omugabe, nangwa n'omu biteekateeko byawe, Otarijumira abatungi omu kishengye kyawe eki oraaramu; Ahabw'okuba enyonyi y'omu mwanya eryatwara eiraka ryawe, Nari ekiine amapapa kyona kibigambe." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Mamagiza embibo zaawe aha maizi, Bwanyima y'ebiro bingi oryazireeba." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Ha abantu mushanju nari munaana omugabo; Ahabw'okuba torikumanya kabi akaribaho omu nsi. 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ebicu ku biba biijwire enjura, Esheesheka aha nsi; Kandi ekiti ku kigwa nikireeba obukiizi-bwa-buryo nari obwa-bumosho, Ahu kigwa, niho kiguma." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ohanga amaisho omuyaga, tabiba; Kandi ogahanga ebicu, tagyesha." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nk'oku otarikumanya muhanda gw'omuyaga, nari oku amagufa gakurira omu nda y'oine enda, nikwo otarikumanya murimo gwa Ruhanga okora byona." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Omu kasheeshe ogume obibe embibo, kandi n'omu mwabazyo orekye kugwisa omukono; ahabw'okuba torikumanya ekiryera, yaaba eki nari kiriya, nari shi yaaba byombi biriba birungi." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Buzimazima omushana ni murungi, n'okureeba eizooba kushemeza amaisho." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Omuntu ku araahangaare emyaka mingi, agishemerererwemu yoona; kwonka amanye ngu ebiro by'omwirima biryaba bingi. Ebiribaho byona ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Iwe mutsigazi 'we, shemerererwa obutsigazi bwawe, kandi omutima gwawe gugume gunanukye omu biro by'okunyeeta kwawe. Gyendera omu mihanda ei omutima gwawe gurikukunda, nk'oku amaisho gaawe garikureeba. Kwonka omanye ngu ahabw'ebyo byona Ruhanga aryakucwera orubanja." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 N'ahabw'ekyo iha amaganya omu mutima gwawe, kandi omubiri gwawe ogutaanisa n'ebibi; ahabw'okuba obuto n'obutsigazi ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Kandi ogume oijukye Omuhangi waawe omu biro by'obutsigazi bwawe, ebiro bibi bitakaizire, n'emyaka etakahikire ei origiriramu oti: Tinkigishemerererwamu," 
Ecclesiastes12:2 eizooba n'omushana n'okwezi n'enyonyoozi bitakashwekirwe mwirima, kandi n'ebicu bitakagarukire enjura yaatsya;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 obunaku obu abarizni b'enju baritetema, n'emanzi zikabundabunda, abasi bakarereera ahabw'okuba bakye, n'abarikuringuririza omu dirisa amaisho gakagiibwaho oruho;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 enyigi ezirikureeba omu nguuto zikakingwa, okugamba kw'emengo kukaba kukye, omuntu akasisiimurwa eiraka ry'enyonyi, kandi n'abaishiki boona abeeshongozi bakagarurwa ahansi;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 baryatiina ekiri ahaiguru, kandi ebirikutiinisa biryaba biri omu muhanda; omurozi guryarabya, eseeneene ziryarusya, n'ebirikwetengwa biryahwaho, ahabw'okuba omuntu aryaba naaza omu ka y'entuura, n'abarikucura nibazengyerera omu nguuto;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 akagoye k'efeeza katakacwekire, orwbya rw'ezaabu rutakaatikire, enyungu etakaatikiire ha nshuro, enziga etakahendekyeire ha iziba," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 omucuucu gukagaruka omu itaka, nk'oku gwabaire guri, n'amagara gakagaruka ahari Ruhanga owaagahaire." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Atyo Omubuurizi yaagaruka yaagira ati: Ni busha bwa busha; byona ni busha! 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Bwanyima kandi Omubuurizi, ahabw'okuba omunyabwengye, yaagumizamu kwegyesa abantu okumanya; yaateekateeka enfumu nyingi, yaazeetegyereza, yaazitebeekanisa." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Kandi Omubuurizi yaasherura ebigambo ebirikushemeza, yaahandiika ebigambo by'amazima n'omutima gugororokire." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Ebigambo by'abanyabwengye ni nk'emihunda, kandi ebigambo by'Omuriisa omwe ebiteerainwe hamwe ni nk'emisumaari ehamire." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Kandi mwana wangye, oyerinde ekintu kyona ekitari ebyo. Okuhandiika ebitabo bingi tikugira bugarukiro, n'okwega munonga kurusya." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Oku nikwo kuhendera ebigambo; ahabw'okuba byona bikahurirwa. Tiina Ruhanga, oyorobere ebiragiro bye; ahakuba ekyo kyonka nikyo omuntu ashemereire kukora;" 
Ecclesiastes12:14 ahabw'okuba Ruhanga aryacwera orubanja ekintu kyona ekyakozirwe, n'ekintu kyona ekyasherekirwe, yaaba kirungi nari kibi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ekyeshongoro kya Sulemaani ekirikukira byona. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Nkaabaasibwa ki, onnywegyera n'eminwa yaawe, Ahabw'okuba okukunda kwawe nikumpitira viinyo;" 
SongOfSongs1:3 Amajuta gaawe g'okwesiiga garimu omugaju, Eiziina ryawe ni nk'amajuta agashukirwe; Nikyo empangare zikukundira." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Nyriza ah'ori; nitwija kwiruka tukukuratiire. Omugabe antaahize omu bishengye bye; Nitwija kwesiima, tushemerererwe omuriiwe, Tusingize okukunda kwawe okukira viinyo. Eki barikukukundira n'eky'amazima." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Imwe baishiki ba Yerusaalemu 'mwe, Niinyiragura, kwonka ndi murungi; Ndi nk'amahema ga Kedari, Nk'emikingo ya Sulemaani." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Murekye kunshamaarira ahabw'okwiragura, Ahakuba eizooba niryo ryanyokize. Abaana ba maawe bakangirira ekiniga, Bangira omurinzi w'emizaabibu, Kwonka eyangye tinaagirinda!" 
SongOfSongs1:7 Iwe ou nkunda n'omutima gwangye gwona, Ngambira ahu oriisiza obusyo bwawe, N'ahu obuzaagiza omu ihangwe; Ahabw'enki nimba nk'orikuzengyerera Omu masyo ga bagyenzi baawe." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Iwe mukazi orikuhita abandi 'we, Ku oraabe otarikuhamya, Toora ekirari ky'obwo busyo haihi n'amahema g'abariisa, Oriisizeyo abaana b'entaama." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Nkunzi yangye, ninkushushanisa n'ebuguma y'embaraasi y'ebigaari bya Faraho." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Enshaya zaawe ni nungi, zirengyeirweho obutsibo bw'eishokye, N'omu maraka gaawe harimu orukwanzi rw'amabaare ag'obuguzi bwingi." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Nitwija kukukorera amahunde g'ezaabu N'amapeesha g'efeeza. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Omugabe ku yaabaire aba ashutami aha kitabo kye, amajuta gangye g'omugaju gataamirana." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Nkunzi yangye ahariinye ni nk'akashaho ka sumuruna akari ahagati y'amabeere gangye. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Nkunzi yangye ni nk'enganda y'ebirabyo bya Koferi Omu misiri y'emizaabibu ya Eni-geedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Nkunzi yangye, ori murungi; Eshi ori murungi, amaisho gaawe ni nk'ag'enkombe." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Nkunzi yangye, eshi ori murungi; Buzimazima nooshemeza, Kandi ekitanda kyaitu ni nk'obunyaatsi buto." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Emitambiko y'enju yaitu n'emyereezi, N'emiraba yaayo n'emiberooshi." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndi nk'endungu ya Sharooni, Omwangangye gw'omu mpita." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Nk'omwangangye oku guba omu mahwa Na nkunzi yangye nikwo aba omu baishiki. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Nk'omucungwa omu biti by'omu ihamba, Nikwo nkunzi yangye ari omu batsigazi. Nkashutama ahansi y'ekicuucu kye n'okushemererwa kwingi, Ebijuma bye byannurira;" 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yantaasya omu nju y'obugyenyi, Orurango rwe orwabaire ruri ahaiguru y'omutwe gwangye kukaba kuri okukunda." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Mpimbuuza otuzaabibu, onduhuuze otucungwa; Ahabw'okuba rukundo n'ey'okuunyita." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Nkaabaasibwa ki, omukono gwe gwa bumosho gunshegura, N'ogwa buryo gungumbata!" 
SongOfSongs2:7 Imwe baishiki ba Yerusaalemu 'mwe Nimbarahiza esirabo n'ebuguma y'empara, Mutasisiimura nkunzi yangye, n'obu kwakuba okumwimutsya Atakeeyendeire." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Hurira! eiraka rya nkunzi yangye! Ngugwo yaija aha nshozi naaguruka, Naagurukagurukira omu bibungo." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Nkuunzi yangye ni nk'esirabo, nari eshonga y'empara; Reeba, ayemereire enyima y'orugo rwaitu, Naaringuririrza omu madirisa, Naayeyoreka nitumureebera omu mbazi zaago." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Nkunzi yangye yaagamba nangira ati: Imuka, nkunzi yangye, murungi wangye, tugyendane;" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Ahakuba reeba, katumba ehweire, Obunaku bw'enjura buhingwire;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 Ensi neetandika kurabya, Obunaku bw'okweshongora bwahika, N'eiraka ry'enkombe nirihurirwa omu nsi yaitu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Omutiini nigwera ebijuma byagwo, N'emizaabibu neerabya, neetaamirana emigaju, Imuka, nkunzi yangye, tugyendane." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Nkombe yangye, otuura omu bwatika bw'orukiri N'omu nyanga z'amabaare, Ka nkureebe ahamaisho, mpurire eiraka ryawe; Ahabw'okuba eiraka ryawe nirishemeza, N'aha maisho gaawe ni harungi." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Mutukwatire zaamuha, Bwamuha obuto oburikushiisha emizaabibu, Ahabw'okuba emizaabibu neerabya." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Nkunzi yangye n'owangye, naanye ndi owe; Ariisiza obusyo bwe omu myangangye." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Okuhitsya obu burisheehsa, ebibunda bikahwaho, Nkunzi yangye, kubuuka, obe nk'esirabo Nari eshonga y'empara aha nshozi za Beteeri." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ku naabaire ndi aha kitanda kyangye nyekiro, Naasherura ou omutima gwangye gukunda; Naamusherura, kwonka tinaamureeba;" 
SongOfSongs3:2 Nikwo kugira nti: Ka nyimukye, ngyendagyende omu rurembo, Omu nguuto n'omu nteeraniro z'emihanda, Nsherure ou omutima gwangye gukunda. Naamusherura, kwonka tinaamureeba." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Abarinzi abarikugyendagyenda omu rurembo bandeeba; Naababuuza nti: Mwareeba ou omutima gwangye gukunda? 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ku naabaire naabarugaho nti, Naareeba ogwo ou omutima gwangye gukunda, Naamukwata, naayanga kumurekura, Okuhitsya obu naamuhikize omu nju ya maawe, Omu kishengye ky'owanzaire." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Imwe baishiki ba Yerusaalemu 'mwe, Nimbarahiza esirabo n'ebuguma y'empara, Mutasiisimura nkunzi yangye, n'obu kwakuba okumwimutsya, Atakeeyendeire." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Oriya n'oha orikuruga omu ihamba, Orikushusha enyomyo y'omwika, Oyoteire sumuruna n'obubaane n'emigaju yoona ey'abashuubuzi?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Reeba, n'engozi ya Sulemaani Eyeehinguririziibwe abashaija b'amaani makumi mukaaga Ab'omu mamanzi ga Israeli;" 
SongOfSongs3:8 Boona bahagatiire zaarurara, n'amahano omu kurwana; Buri muntu aine rurara aha kibero kye Ahabw'okutiina akabi nyekiro." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Omugabe Sulemaani akeekorera engozi y'ekitiinisa Omu miti ya Lebanooni; 
SongOfSongs3:10 Yaakora enyomyo zaayo omu feeza, Eky'okwegamira kyayo kyaba eky'ezaabu, Aharikushutamwa yaahakoresa omwenda gwa bujwa, N'omunda yaayo haakorwa abaishiki ba Yerusaalemu na rukundo." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Imwe baishiki ba Saayuuni 'mwe, nimushohore, Mureebe omugabe Sulemaani, Aine ekirunga eki yaajwekirwe nyina Aha izooba eri yaashwereireho, Niryo izooba eri omutima gwe gwananukiireho." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Eshi ori murungi, nkunzi yangye, Buzimazima ori murungi! amaisho gaawe ni nk'ag'enkombe omu kyetwekyerero kyawe; Eishokye ryawe ni nk'obusyo bw'embuzi Ezibyami omu rukiizi rw'orushozi Gileadi;" 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amaino gaawe ni nk'obusyo bw'entaama ezikyemwirwe, Ezirikuruga kwogibwa; Zoona zigira babiri, tihaine n'emwe efiisa." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Eminwa yaawe ni nka karari, N'akanwa kaawe ni karungi, Enshaya zaawe ni nk'embari y'eikomamahanga omu kyetwekyerero kyawe;" 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ebitsya byawe ni nk'omunaara gwa Daudi, Ogwayombekyeirwe okubiikamu eby'okurwanisa, Oguhanikirwemu engabo rukumi, Engabo zoona ez'amamanzi ge;" 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabeere gaawe ni nk'abaana b'esirabo Abarikuriira omu myangangye. 
SongOfSongs4:6 Okuhitsya obu buraasheeshe, ebibunda bikahwaho, Niinyija kwegiira aha rushozi rwa sumuruna N'aha kibungo ky'obubaane." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Nkunzi yangye, ori murungi weena, Toine kamogo." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Mugore wangye, ija turugye hamwe Lebanooni, Turugye hamwe Lebanooni; Naga amaisho nooyema aha mutwe gwa Amano, Aha mutwe gwa Seniiri na Herumooni, Ori omu nyanga z'entare, n'omu bibungo by'engwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Ontwaire omutima iwe munyaanyazi, mugore wangye; ku ondeebeise oti eriisho, wantwara omutima N'orukwanzi rw'omu maraka gaawe." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Rukundo yaawe ka ni nungi, munyaanyazi mugore wangye! okukunda kwawe ka nikunkirira viinyo! Kandi okutaamirana kw'amajuta gaawe nikunkirira emigaju y'emiringo yoona." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Eminwa yaawe, mugore wangye, neetoonya nk'omushongi; Obwoki n'amate biri ahansi y'orurimi rwawe, Okutaamirana kw'ebijwaro byawe ni nk'okwa Lebanooni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Iwe munyaanyazi mugore wangye, ori omusiri oguzitiire, N'enshuro eigaire, n'eziba eryatairweho akamanyiso;" 
SongOfSongs4:13 Ebibyairwe byawe n'omusiri gw'amakomamahanga Ogweramu ebijuma birungi by'emiringo yoona, Koferi n'otuti twa narada," 
SongOfSongs4:14 Narada na karakoomu, kalamo na kinamoono, N'ebiti byona eby'obubaane, Surumuna na ahalooti, n'eby'emigaju byona ebirikukira oburungi." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ori enshuro eri ahagati y'emisiri, Ori eiziba ery'amaizi g'amagara, N'emigyera erikushuuma neeruga Lebanooni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Iwe muyaga gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso 'we, sisiimuka; Naiwe ogw'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, rugayo! Huuha omusiri gwangye, omugaju gwagwo gutaamirane hoona. Ka nkunzi yangye aije omu musiri gwe, Arye aha bijuma bye ebirikukira oburungi." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Naija omu musiri gwangye, iwe munyaanyazi mugore wangye, Kushoroma sumuruna yangye n'emigaju yangye, N'okurya engabo zangye n'obwoki bwamwo, N'okunywa viinyo yangye n'amate gangye. Imwe banywani bangye, nimurye, kandi munywe; Buzimazima munywe munonga, nkunzi zangye!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Nkaba ngwejegyeire, kwonka omutima gwangye nigureeba; Naahurira eiraka rya nkunzi yangye naakongoota, naagira ati: Nyigurira, munyaanyazi, nkunzi yangye, Nkombe yangye, owangye oshugaine; Ahakuba omutwe gwangye gutonzirweho orume, N'eishokye ryangye ririmu amatondo ga nyekiro." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Naajwire ekijwaro kyangye, Nimbaasa nta kukigarukamu? Naanaabire ebigyere, ngarukye mbishiishe?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Nkunzi yangye yaayozya engaro ze omu kihengyere ky'orwigi, Omutima gwangye gwaijura okushemererwa." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Naimuka kwigurira nkunzi yangye, Engaro zangye nizitoonya sumuruna, Sumuruna neeyagayaga aha nkumu zangye, Yaatoonya aha byoma ebikinga orwigi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Baigurira nkunzi yangye; Naashanga yaayegyendeire, atakiriho- Kwonka obu yaabaire naagamba, omutima gukampuruutuka- Naamusherura, yaamburira; Naamweta, tiyaanyetaba." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Abarinzi abaabaire bagyendagyenda omu rurembo Bambugana, banteera, bamputaaza; Abarinzi b'orugo rwarwo baanyaka omunagiro gwangye." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Imwe baishiki ba Yerusaalemu 'mwe, nimbarahiza, Ku muraareebe nkunzi yangye, mumugambire Ku rukundo erikwenda kuunyita." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Beitu nkunzi yaawe naakiza ki abandi, Iwe mukazi ohita abandi 'we? Waaza kuturahiza otyo, Nkunzi yaawe naakiza ki abandi?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Nkinzi yangye naayera, naamwamwatikana, Tarikubura mu bantu kakumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Omutwe gwe ni nk'ezaabu nungi munonga, Eishokye rye n'omushasha, Niriiragura nk'omubiri gw'ekikoona," 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amaisho ge ni nk'ag'enkombe eziri aha mugyera, Googiibwe amate, geemi gye;" 
SongOfSongs5:13 Enshaya ze ni nk'akasiri k'emigaju erikutaamirana, Eminwa ye ni nk'emyangangye erikutoonya sumuruna erikuyagayaga." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Engaro ze ni nk'empeta z'ezaabu ezirimu berulo; Omubiri gwe ni nk'emiino y'enjojo ebaizirwe, ehunzirwe n'otubaare twa safiro;" 
SongOfSongs5:15 Amaguru ge ni nk'enyomyo za marimaari, Ezibyairwe omu biina by'ezaabu nungi; Emishusire ye ni nka Lebanooni, Ni mirungi nk'emyereezi." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Emigambire ye ni mirungi munonga; Buzimazima ni murungi weena. Imwe baishiki ba Yerusaalemu 'mwe, Ogwo niwe nkunzi yangye, kandi niwe munywani wangye." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Iwe mukazi ohita abandi 'we, Nkunzi yaawe agiire hi? Nkunzi yaawe yaagaruka hi, Tukabona kumusherura naiwe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 nkunzi yangye yaashuuma omu musiri gwe, Omu tusiri tw'emigaju, Kuriisa obusyo bwe omu musiri, N'okucwa emyangangye." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ndi owa nkunzi yangye na nkunzi yangye nawe n'owangye; Ariisiza obusyo bwe omu myangangye. 
SongOfSongs6:4 Nkunzi yangye, ori murungi nka Tiruza, Oshemeire nka Yerusaalemu, Nootinisa nk'eihe eririkugyenda n'endango." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Nyihaho amaisho, ahakuba gankozire kubi; Eishokye ryawe ni nk'obusyo bw'embuzi Ezibyami omu rukiizi rwa Gileadi;" 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amaino gaawe ni nk'obusyo bw'entaama Ezirikuruga kwogibwa, Zoona zigira babiri, tihaine n'emwe efiisa;" 
SongOfSongs6:7 Enshaya zaawe ni nk'embari z'eikomamahanga omu kyetwekyerero kyawe. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Hariho abagarire makumi mukaaga n'ebinyanshunju makumi munaana, N'abaishiki batarikubarwa." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Kwonka nkombe yangye, owangye oshugaine, n'omwe wenka, N'omwana omwe nyamunegyere ahari nyina, Orikukundwa owaamuzaire. Abaishiki ku baamureebire, baamweta ohiiriirwe, Nangwa n'abaigarire n'ebinyanshunju baamusingiza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ogu n'oha owaija orikushusha nk'omushekye ogurikujuguta, Murungi nk'okwezi, orikumurinkana nk'eizooba, Orikutiinisa nk'eihe eririkugyenda n'endango?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Nkashuuma omu musiri gw'ebinyoobwa Kureeba ebimezire omu mpita, kureeba yaaba omuzaabibu gutookire, Nari amakomamahanga garabize." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ntakakimanyire, omutima gwangye gwanta omu kigaari Aha rubaju rw'omunyiginya mukama wangye." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Garuka, garuka, iwe Mushulaami 'we, Garuka, garuka, tukwetegyereze. Ahabw'enki nimwenda kwetegyereza Omushulaami Nk'ekizino kya Mahanaimu?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Iwe muhara w'omugabe 'we, Ebigyere byawe ka nibishemera omu nkaito! Enyugunyu zaawe ni nk'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi, Nomurimo gw'engaro z'omuhangu;" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Ekishoroshoro kyawe ni nk'ekikopo Ekitakooshaga viinyo ejwangize; Enda yaawe ni nk'ekirundo ky'engano Ekyehinguririziibwe emyangangye; 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabeere gaawe ni nk'abaana b'esirabo babiri Abaazairwe empasha. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Ebitsya byawe ni nk'omunaara gw'emiino y'enjojo; Amaisho gaawe ni nk'ebiyanja bya Heshibooni Ebiri aha irembo rya Batirabiimu; Enyindo yaawe ni nk'omunaara gwa Lebanooni Ogurikureeba Damasiko; 
SongOfSongs7:5 Omutwe gwawe ni nka Karumeeli; Eishokye ryawe ni nk'omwenda gwa bujwa, Omugabe akwatwa obutsibo bwaryo nk'enkwatwa." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Iwe orikukundwa, omwishiki orikurigirwa, Eshi ori murungi kandi nooshemeza!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Ekyemerero kyawe ni nk'omukindo, Amabeere gaawe ni nk'omutsitsa gwagwo." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ningira nti: Niinyija kutemba ogwo mukindo, Nkwate amataagi gaagwo. Nkaabaasibwa ki, amabeere gaawe gaba nk'ebijuma by'omuzaabibu, n'okutaamirana kw'omwitsyo gwawe kuba nk'okw'emicungwa." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Akanwa kaawe kaba nka viinyo erikuhita ezindi, Erikuraba omu kanwa n'omu maino, Ekasheneneka gye aha mumiro." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ndi owa nkunzi yangye, Kandi rukundo ye niinye eriho." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Nkunzi yangye, ija tugyendane omu ishwa, Tuze omu birorero, tucumbikyeyo;" 
SongOfSongs7:12 Tugurukire omu misiri y'emizaabibu, Tureebe oku erikutooka, Tureebe ku eraabe yaarabize, N'amakomamahanga gaarabize. Okwo niyo ndaakworekyere rukundo yangye." 
SongOfSongs7:13 amadudayimu gareeta okutaamirana, Kandi aha muryango gwaitu hariho ebijuma binuzire Eby'emiringo yoona, ebisya n'ebikuru, Ebi naakubiikiire, iwe nkunzi yangye." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Nkaabaasibwa ki, oba nka munyaanyazi, Owaayonkire aha mabeere ga maawe! Ku nkukubugaine aheeru, nkaakunywegyeire, Kandi tihaine owaakungayire." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Nkaakutwaire, nkuhitsya omu nju ya maawe, Omu kishengye ky'ogwo owanzaire, Nkunywaisa aha nturire ya viinyo N'aha shande y'amakomamahanga gangye." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Nkaabaasibwa ki, omukono gwe gwa bumosho gunshegura, N'ogwa buryo gunfumbata!" 
SongOfSongs8:4 Imwe baishiki ba Yerusaalemu 'mwe, nimbarahiza, Mutasisiimura nkunzi yangye, n'obu kwakuba okumwimutsya, Atakeeyendeire." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Oriya orikwinamuka naaruga omu ihamba, Ayegamiire nkunzi ye, n'oha? Nkusisiimwire ahansi y'omucungwa, Ahu nyonko yaarumiirwe naayenda kukuzaara; Eego owaakuzaire niho yaarumiirwe." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Onte aha mutima gwawe nk'akamanyiso, Kandi onte n'aha mukono gwawe; Ahabw'okuba rukundo n'ey'amaani nka rufu, Kandi okufuuha tikusaasira, ni nk'ekituuro; Endimi zaakwo nizityankana nk'ez'omuriro, Nk'ez'omuriro ogurikurya busha." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Amaizi maingi tigarikubaasa kuraaza rukundo, N'emyegyemure tekaagimira; Omuntu n'obu yaakuhayo ebi atungire omu ka ye byona, Bikaagayirwa kimwe." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Twine murumuna waitu omuto, Takashunire mabeere. Mbwenu turyamugira tuta Aha izooba eri arigambirwaho obugyenyi?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ku ariba orugo rw'amabaare, Turyamwombekaho omunaara gw'efeeza; Kwonka ku ariba omuryango, Turyamukingisa embaaho z'emyereezi." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Nyowe nkaba ndi orugo rw'amabaare; N'amabeere gangye gari nk'eminaara Okuruga obwo naagira obusingye omu maisho ge. 
SongOfSongs8:11 Sulemaani akaba aine omusiri gw'emizaabibu Baali-hamoni, Yaarutamu abarinzi, Buri muntu okuguma naaha ebicweka by'efeeza ahabw'ebijuma byamwo." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Omusiri gwangye gw'emizaabiru n'ogwangye ahabwangye. Iwe Sulemaani, oryaheebwa rukumi rwawe, N'abarinzi b'ebijuma baheebwe magana abiri." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Iwe otuura omu misiri, Bagyenzi bangye nibenda kuhurira ebi orikugamba; Naanye ka mbihurire." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Nkunzi yangye, rahuka, obe nk'esirabo, Nari nk'eshonga y'empara Aha nshozi z'eby'emigaju." 
Isaiah1:1 Okworekwa kwa Isaaya mwene Amozi, oku yaareebire ahari Yuda na Yerusaalemu obu busingye bwa Uziya, Yosamu, Ahazi na Hezekia abagabe ba Yuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Iwe iguru 'we, hurira; naiwe nsi 'we, tega okutu, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA agizire ati: Nkontsya abaana, naaboorora, Kwonka mbwenu bangomeire." 
Isaiah1:3 Ente emanya mukama waayo, N'endogoya emanya eka ya mukama waayo, Kwonka Israeli taine ki arikumanya, Abantu bangye tibarikwetegyereza." 
Isaiah1:4 Ai bambe, eihanga ry'ebibi, Abantu abaijwire okutahikiirira, Oruzaaro rw'enkozi z'ebibi, Abaana abarikukora ebitahikire! Baimwire MUKAMA, Baagaya Orikwera wa Israeli, Baahinduka, baagaruka enyima." 
Isaiah1:5 Niimwendera ki kuguma nimuteerwa, Nimuturwa okugumizamu nimugoma? Omutwe gwona gurwaire, Omutima gugwereire kimwe enshazi;" 
Isaiah1:6 Okuruga aha mara g'ekigyere okuhika aha mutwe Tihaine hahuriire, Kureka ebihuta, n'ebihonoka, N'ebironda ebirikunuuka; Tibikamigwaga, tibikashembwaga, Nobu kwakuba okubobeezibwa n'amajuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Ensi yaanyu n'amatongo, Endembo zaanyu zookibwwe n'omuriro; Ensi yaanyu abanyamahanga nibagibariira omumaisho, Ebaire amatongo, emazirweho abanyamahanga." 
Isaiah1:8 Saayuuni etsigirweho Nk'akaju k'omu musiri gw'emizaabibu, Nk'eirindiro ry'omu musiri gw'emyongo, Nk'orurembo rugotsirwe." 
Isaiah1:9 Kuri MUKAMA ow'amahe ataratukwatiire ihembe, Tukaabaire nka Sodoma, tuba nka Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Imwe bategyeki ba Sodoma 'mwe, Muhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA! Naimwe abantu ba Gomora, mutegye okutu, Muhurire ebiragiro bya Ruhanga waitu!" 
Isaiah1:11 MUKAMA naagira ati: Ebitambo byanyu ebirengyesereize nibingasira ki? Ntamirwe ebitambo byanyu ebyokize eby'empaya z'entaama, N'ebishaju by'amatungo agagomokire; Kandi tindikushemerererwa shagama y'enimi, Nari ey'abaana b'entaama, nari ey'empaya z'embuzi." 
Isaiah1:12 Ku muba mwizire omu maisho gangye, N'oha owaabaragiire kuguma nimundibatiiririra ekibuga?" 
Isaiah1:13 Mutagaruka kundeetera empongano ezitaine mugasho; Obubaane n'ekirikunugwa ahariinye; Okuboneka kw'ameezi, na zaasabato, n'okutaho enteerane- Tindikubaasa kugumisiririza kutahikiirira hamwe n'okuteerana okurikwera." 
Isaiah1:14 Amagyenyi gaanyu ag'okuboneka kw'okwezi, n'agandi agaatairweho, omutima gwangye nigugangira kimwe; Gankabize; okugagumisiririza kunduhize." 
Isaiah1:15 Ku muritega emikono yaanyu, ndyabaima amaisho; Nangwa n'obu muriguma nimushaba hakey-hakye, tindibahurira; Ahabw'okuba engaro zaanyu ziijwire eshagama." 
Isaiah1:16 Mwogye, mweboneze, Mwiheho obubi bw'emicwe yaanyu omu maisho gangye; Murekya kukora kubi," 
Isaiah1:17 Mwegye okukora gye, Musherure eby'oburyo, Muhane abarikuhata abandi; Murwanirire efuuzi, mutonganire abafaakazi." 
Isaiah1:18 MUKAMA naagira ati: Mbwenu nimwije tuhanuure hamwe; Ebibi byanyu n'obu biraabe nibitukura nka karari, Biryayera nk'orubaare; N'obu biraabe nibitukura tuku-tuku, Biryaba nk'ebyoya by'entaama ebirikwera." 
Isaiah1:19 ku muraikirize, mwayoroba, Muryarya ebirungi by'ensi;" 
Isaiah1:20 Kwonka ku maraayangye, mukagoma, Muryariibwa rurara; Ahabw'okuba akanwa ka MUKAMA niko kaakigamba." 
Isaiah1:21 Orurembo orwabaire nirwesigwa Ka ruhindukire maraaya! Omu eby'oburyo byabaire biri, n'eby'okuhikiirira, Mbwenu hati abaitsi nibo barimu." 
Isaiah1:22 Efeeza yaawe ehindukire enkamba, Viinyo yaawe efungwire;" 
Isaiah1:23 Abanyiginya baawe n'abagomi, kandi nibakwatanisa n'abashuma. Buri muntu naayenda enguzi n'okutoijerwa, Tibarikurwanirira fuuzi, Kandi emanja z'abafaakazi tizaakihika mu maramuriro gaabo." 
Isaiah1:24 Nikyo Mukama, MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ow'obushoboorozi owa Israeli arikugirira ati: Iwe, ndyayemarira ekiniga aha bazigu bangye, N'ababisha bangye mbahoore enzigu." 
Isaiah1:25 Ndyakutaho omukono gwangye, gukurwanise, Nyihiremu kimwe enkamba zaawe, Nkumaremu ebyoma by'amabaati." 
Isaiah1:26 Ndyagaruraho abaramuzi baawe nk'obunyaakare, N'abahi b'obwengye baawe nk'omu kutandika. Bwanyima oryayetwa orurembo rw'okuhikiirira, Kandi orw'okwesigwa." 
Isaiah1:27 Saayuuni eryacungurwa okukora eby'oburyo, N'abaamwo abarikweteisa bacungurwe okuhikiirira;" 
Isaiah1:28 Kwonka abagomi n'abasiisi baryacwekyerezibwa kumwe, N'abarikwimuura MUKAMA bamarweho." 
Isaiah1:29 Ahabw'okuba muryakwatwa enshoni ahabw'ebiti by'emirinzi ebi mwakunzire, Kandi n'ahabw'emisiri ei mwayetooraniire;" 
Isaiah1:30 Ahakuba muryaba nk'omwela oguhotoka amababi, N'omusiri ogutaine maizi." 
Isaiah1:31 Ow'amaani aryaba nk'eshisha, N'omurimo gwe guryaba nk'esiriira; Byombi biryahiira hamwe, Habure ow'okubiraaza." 
Isaiah2:1 Eki Isaaya mwene Amozi yaareebire ahari Yuda na Yerusaalemu- 
Isaiah2:2 Obunaku buryahika omu biro bya bwanyima, Orushozi rw'enju ya MUKAMA ruhamibwe aha mitwe y'enshozi, Rutunguukye, rukire ebibungo byona, N'amahanga goona gahimintikireyo." 
Isaiah2:3 Kandi amahanga maingi garyaija, gagire gati: Mwije twinamukye aha rushozi rwa MUKAMA Omu nju ya Ruhanga wa Yakobo, Atwegyese emitwarize ye, Naitwe tubone kugigyenderamu; Ahabw'okuba ebiragiro biryaruga Saayuuni, N'ekigambo kya MUKAMA kirugye Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah2:4 Aryacwera amahanga emanja, Aramure enganda nyingi; Obwo zaarurara zaabo baryaziheeshamu amafuka, N'amacumu gaabo bagaheeshemu empabyo; Eihanga tiriribangira rindi rurara, Kandi tibarigaruka kwega by'engamba." 
Isaiah2:5 Imwe nju ya Yakobo 'mwe, Nimwije tugyendere omu mushana gwa MUKAMA." 
Isaiah2:6 Okareka abantu baawe, enju ya Yakobo, Noobatura okugira abafumu baingi b'oburugwa-izooba N'abaraguzi nk'Abafilistia, Kandi n'okukora endagaano n'abanyamahanga." 
Isaiah2:7 Ensi yaabo eijwire efeeza n'ezaabu, Obutungi bwabo tibwine bugarukiro; Ensi yaabo eijwire embaraasi, N'ebigaari byabo tibiine bugarukiro." 
Isaiah2:8 Ensi yaabo eijwire ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, Nibaramya emirimo y'emikono yaabo, Ebi engaro zaabo ahabwabo zikozire." 
Isaiah2:9 Abantu b'obutoosha nibacureezibwa, N'abakuru nibagarurwa ahansi. N'ahabw'ekyo otabasaasira." 
Isaiah2:10 Taaha omu nkiri z'amabaare, Oyesherekye omu mucuucu okutiinisa kwa MUKAMA N'ekitiinisa ky'obukuru bwe." 
Isaiah2:11 Emyekuniko y'omuntu eryagarurwa ahansi, N'amaryo g'abantu garibatiirirwe, Eryo izooba MUKAMA wenka niwe arihimbisibwa." 
Isaiah2:12 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ow'amahe aine ekiro Eki arirwanisizaho eby'amaryo n'ebirikwekuza byona N'ekintu kyona ekirikwetunguura; Kandi byona biryagarurwa ahansi; 
Isaiah2:13 Akarwanisa emyereezi ya Lebanooni yoona Emiraigwa kandi erikwetunguura, N'emyela ya Bashani yoona," 
Isaiah2:14 N'enshozi zoona endaingwa, N'ebibungo byona ebiraingwa," 
Isaiah2:15 N'omunaara gwona omuraingwa, N'orugo rwona orw'amabaare orugumire," 
Isaiah2:16 N'emeeri zoona eza Tarushiishi, N'ebishushani byona ebirikushemeza." 
Isaiah2:17 Kandi emyekuniko y'omuntu eryacureezibwa, N'amaryo g'abantu garyagarurwa ahansi; Eryo izooba MUKAMA wenka niwe arihimbisibwa." 
Isaiah2:18 Ebishushani byona ebirikuramibwa biryahweraho kimwe. 
Isaiah2:19 Abantu baryahungira omu nyanga z'amabaare, N'omu biina by'eitaka Nibahunga okutiinisa kwa MUKAMA N'ekitiinisa ky'obukuru bwe, Ku ariimuka kutetemya ensi munonga." 
Isaiah2:20 Eryo izooba abantu baryanaga ebishushani byabo Eby'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, Ebi baayekoreire kuramya, Babinagire efukuzi n'obuhundu," 
Isaiah2:21 Beesherekye omu nyanga n'omu biharamanga by'amabaare agaatikire, Nibahunga okutiinisa kwa MUKAMA N'ekitiinisa ky'obukuru bwe, Ku ariimuka kutetemya ensi munonga." 
Isaiah2:22 Murugye aha bantu-buntu abarikwitsya. Mbwenu bo nibo baahi? 
Isaiah3:1 Reeba Mukama, MUKAMA ow'amahe, Naija kwiha ahari Yerusaalemu na Yuda Ekibaire kibatungire, n'eki babaire beegamiire, Eby'okurya byona n'amaizi goona ebibaire bibatungire-" 
Isaiah3:2 Ow'amaani weena, omurwani, Omuramuzi, nabi, omufumu, omukuru," 
Isaiah3:3 Omukuru w'engabo makumi ataano, ow'ekitiinisa, Omuhi w'obwengye, omunyamwoga w'obwengye, N'omuhaki w'engisha." 
Isaiah3:4 Ndyataho abaan babe abanyiginya baabo, N'abeereere babategyekye." 
Isaiah3:5 Abantu baryaitwa kubi, Omuntu weena aite kubi mugyenzi we, Na buri muntu mutaahi we, Abato bagaye abakuru, N'abataine kitiinisa bagaye abakiine." 
Isaiah3:6 Obwo omuntu aryakwata mwene ishe, Ow'omu ka ya ishe, amugire ati: Iwe, nk'oku oine eky'okujwara, Obe niiwe waaba omutegyeki waitu; N'eri itongo, obe niiwe waaritegyeka;" 
Isaiah3:7 Eryo izooba aryahakana, agambe munonga ati: Tindikwikiriza kuba ow'okubatambira, Ahabw'okuba omu ka yangye tiharimu by'okurya, nari ebijwaro; Timurikwija kungira mutegyeki w'abantu;" 
Isaiah3:8 Ahabw'okuba Yerusaalemu ecwekyereziibwe Na Yuda egwire, Kandi nabarwanisa MUKAMA omu bigambo byabo n'omu bi barikukora, Bagwisa kubi amaisho ge ag'ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah3:9 Emireebekyere yaabo neehamya ku orubanja rubasingire, Nibakora ekibi butunu nk'aba Sodoma. Tibarikukishereka. Baryareeba enaku, Ahabw'okuba beereeteire akabi!" 
Isaiah3:10 Mugambire abahikiirire, ku barikwija kuba gye, Ahabw'okuba baryarya ebi emikono yaabo ekozire." 
Isaiah3:11 Omubi we aryareeba enaku, Ahabw'okuba ebi emikono ye yaakozire nibyo arizimuurirwa." 
Isaiah3:12 Abantu bangye nibaitwa kubi abaana, Kandi nibategyekwa abakazi. ai bambe bantu bangye! abeebembezi baanyu nibahabya, Batsibyatsibya emihanda ei murikurabamu." 
Isaiah3:13 MUKAMA aimukire kutonganisa abantu be, Ayemereire kubacwera orubanja." 
Isaiah3:14 MUKAMA naija kucwera emanja abakuru n'abanyiginya b'eihanga rye. Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe naagira ati: Niimwe mwariire omusiri gw'emizaabibu, mukagumaraho, N'ebi mwanyagire abooro biri omu maka gaanyu." 
Isaiah3:15 Eki eki mukozire niki, kusingyera abantu bangye, N'okucwa abooro obusaasingo." 
Isaiah3:16 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Abaishiki ba Saayuuni baine emyekuniko, Nibagyenda nibanaga ebitsya, Nibareebana n'amaisho g'amakune, Nibagyenda nibakimbagira, nibarangiza amajugo aha maguru;" 
Isaiah3:17 Nikyo MUKAMA arirwariza aba baishiki ba Saayuuni Ebiguuna omu mitwe, Akajweka busha ebicweka byabo ebirikwitsa enshoni." 
Isaiah3:18 Eryo izooba Mukama aryacwa enyerere zaabo ezi babaire nibakunisa, amahunde n'ebirezi" 
Isaiah3:19 ebitaako, endaaba, ebitambaara," 
Isaiah3:20 ebikwemba, engoro, emyeko, otushanduukye tw'emigaju, engisha," 
Isaiah3:21 empeta z'omu nkumu n'ez'omu nyindo," 
Isaiah3:22 ebijwaro by'amagyenyi, emyenda, eminagiro, enshaho z'omu ngaro," 
Isaiah3:23 emyenda y'obutimba n'eya kitaani, ebikwemba n'eby'okwetwekyerera ahamaisho." 
Isaiah3:24 Bwanyima omu mwanya gw'emigaju haryabamu ekinuuko, Omu mwanya gw'omweko habemu omugoye, Omu mwanya gw'eishokye ry'omushasha habemu oruhara, Omu mwanya gw'okwokwezirika emitanda, beezirikye ebiguniya, N'ahaabaire hari harungi hagire enkojo." 
Isaiah3:25 Abaishaija baawe baryaitwe rurara, N'amamanzi gaawe gagwe aha rugamba;" 
Isaiah3:26 Omu marembo ga Saayuuni baryarira, baboroogye, Bashutame ahansi beeshobeire." 
Isaiah4:1 Eryo izooba abakazi mushanju baryaza aha mushaija omwe, bamugire bati: Nitwija kweriisa, twejwekye, kwona otwikirize, twetererwe eiziina ryawe; otwiheho ekihemu." 
Isaiah4:2 Eryo izooba eitaagi rya MUKAMA riryaba rirungi kandi ery'ekitiinisa; n'Abaisraeli abariba bahonokireho, ebyezire omu nsi yaabo biryabeehimbisisa, bibareetere ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah4:3 Bwanyima omuntu weena oriba atisigaireho omuri Saayuuni na Yerusaalemu, akahandiikwa omu bahuriire baamwo, aryayetwa orikwera," 
Isaiah4:4 Mukama ku ariba yaherize kwozya oburofa bw'abaishiki ba Saayuuni, n'okumaraho amabara g'eshagama omuri Yerusaalemu, naabiihisaho omwoyo gw'emanja z'oburyo n'ogurikwotsya." 
Isaiah4:5 Bwanyima MUKAMA aryata aha rushozi rwona orwa Saayuuni n'aha bantu abariba bateeraniireyo ekicu n'omwika nyomushana, n'okuhweza kw'omuriro ogurikwaka nyekiro; ahabw'okuba ekitiinisa kyaho kyona haryagira eky'okukisangira kandi n'eihema;" 
Isaiah4:6 kibe eky'okukisangira omushana nyomushana, kandi obuhungiro n'obwegamo bw'eihunga n'enjura." 
Isaiah5:1 Ka nyeshongorere nkunzi yangye ekyeshongoro kya rukundo aha musiri gwe gw'emizaabibu. Nkunzi yangye akaba aine omusiri gw'emizaabibu Aha kibungo kirikweza munonga. 
Isaiah5:2 Yaaguhinga, gaagwihamu amabaare, Yaagubyaramu omuzaabibu ogurikuhita endiijo yoona, Yaagwombekamu omunaara gw'abarinzi, Yaagutamu einyuukiro, Yaagira ngu nigwija kwana emizaabibu, Kwonka gwayana ey'omu kishaka." 
Isaiah5:3 Mbwenu imwe batuuzi ba Yerusaalemu 'mwe, N'abashaija ba Yuda, Nimbeeshengyereza mutushoboorore Nyowe n'omusiri gwangye gw'emizaabibu." 
Isaiah5:4 Ekindi nkaakoreire ki ogu musiri gwangye gw'emizaabibu Eki ntaragukoreire? Nkaba nyine amatsiko ngu guryayera emizaabibu; Mbwenu ahabw'enki gwanire ey'omu kishaka? 
Isaiah5:5 Mbwenu ka mbagambire eki ndaakore omusiri gwangye gw'emizaabibu. Niinyija kwihaho orugo rwagwo, Haza gwonerwe kimwe; Nsheenye orugo rwagwo rw'amabaare, guribatiirirwe;" 
Isaiah5:6 Nguraze gurekye kusharirwa n'okuhingirirwa, Kureka gumerwemu emikwatangwe n'amahwa; Kandi ndyaragiira ebicu birekye kugugwisiza enjura." 
Isaiah5:7 Ahabw'okuba omusiri gw'emizaabibu ogwa MUKAMA ow'amahe n'enju ya Israeli, N'abashija ba Yuda nikyo kibyairwekye ekirikushemeza; akaba abaineho amatsiko g'okukora eby'oburyo, Kwonka yaabashangamu okusheesha eshagama, N'amatsiko g'okuhikiirira, Kwonka yaabashangamu okurira!" 
Isaiah5:8 Baryareeba enaku, abarikwongyera amaka aha gandi, Bakeekubiraho ebibanja, Okuhitsya obu baraabimareho, hatagire ahatsigara, Naiwme mukatsigara omu nsi mwenka." 
Isaiah5:9 Mpuriire MUKAMA ow'amahe naarahira ati: Buzimazima amaka maingi, amahango kandi amarungi garyaba emishaka;" 
Isaiah5:10 Ahakuba emisiri y'emizaabibu ikumi eryarugwamu ekiibo kimwe, Na homero emwe y'embibo erugwemu eefa emwe." 
Isaiah5:11 Baryareeba enaku, abaimuka kare Kuza kusherura ebirikusinza, Abatarama bakarenzya, okuhitsya obu amaarwa gabasinza!" 
Isaiah5:12 Omu magyenyi gaabo bagira enanga n'endingiri, Ebitaasa n'esheegu na viinyo; Kwonka tibeeta ha mirimo ya MUKAMA, N'obu kwakuba okuteekateeka aha bi arikukora." 
Isaiah5:13 Nikyo abantu bangye barikutwarirwa omu bukwatwa ahabw'okutamanya; Abashaija baabo b'ekitiinisa bakaitwa enjara, N'abandi boona bakaitwa omwoma." 
Isaiah5:14 N'ahabw'ekyo Okuzimu eruruuhire, Yaarangaaza munonga akanwa kaayo, Abakungu ba Yerusaalemu n'abantu baamwo nibashuumayo Hamwe n'orikugyehimbisizamu." 
Isaiah5:15 Omuntu w'obutoosha agarwirwe ahansi, n'abakuru bacwirwe eishaija, N'amaisho g'abarikwekunika gacureeziibwe;" 
Isaiah5:16 Kwonka MUKAMA ow'amahe ahimbisiibwe ahabw'okukora eby'oburyo, Ruhanga orikwera naayeyoreka ku ari orikwera omu kuhikiirira." 
Isaiah5:17 Omu biro ebyo abaana b'entaama baryarya nk'oku bariira omu mariisizo gaabo, Enyana ezigomokire n'abaana b'embuzi biriire omu matongo." 
Isaiah5:18 Baryareeba enaku, abakurura okutahikiirira n'emirunga y'ebishuba, Abakurura ekibi nk'oku bakurura ekigaari n'emirunga," 
Isaiah5:19 Abagira bati: Naayehuute! Naarahutsye emirimo ye, tugireebe! Enaama z'Orikwera wa Israeli zihikye haihi, ziije tuzimanye!" 
Isaiah5:20 Baryareeba enaku, abeeta ekibi ekirungi, N'ekirungi bakakyeta ekibi, Abata omwirima omu mwanya gw'omushana, N'omushana omu mwanya gw'omwirima, Abata ebirikushaarira omu mwanya gw'ekirikunuuriirira!" 
Isaiah5:21 Baryareeba enaku, abeemanya obwengye, Bakeeteekateekaho ku bari enkyengi." 
Isaiah5:22 Baryareeba enaku, baarurangaanwa omu kunywa amaarwa, N'amamanzi omu kuturira ebirikusinza," 
Isaiah5:23 Abasingisa abaakusingirwe ahabw'enguzi, N'otaine rubanja bakamwima ebimushemereire!" 
Isaiah5:24 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku ekirimi ky'omuriro kyokyeza kimwe ebitsintsi by'embuba, Kandi nk'oku ebinyaatsi byomire bihwerererra omu muriro ogurikwaka, Nikwo emizi yaabo eriba obujunde, N'ebirabyo byabo bikooma, biakatuumuuka nk'omucuucu; Ahabw'okuba bakanga Ebiragiro bya MUKAMA ow'amahe, Baagaya ekigambo ky'Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Nikyo Ruhanga agiririire abantu be ekiniga, Akabanga omukono kubarwanisa, akabateera, Enshozi zikatetema, Emitumbi yaabo ekaba nk'esingo omu mihanda. Hoona nabwo ekiniga kye tikikabarugireho. Kureka omukono gwe gukibangire." 
Isaiah5:26 Aryaimukiza amahanga ga hare orurango, Ageetese ekicurizo, garugye aha muheru gw'ensi; Nago gaija juba nigeehuuta." 
Isaiah5:27 Omurigo tiharigira owaaruha, akateera entsibo, Tihaine n'omwe orihungira nari origwejegyera, Enkoba ezi beezirikiise tiziriyuga, N'enkaito zaabo tiziricweka;" 
Isaiah5:28 Emyambi yaabo eryaba eine obwogi, amata gaabo gareegire, Ebyara by'embaraasi zaabo biryaba nibishusha nk'amabaare g'enkangabuye, Na nyamuziga zaabo niziiruka nk'akasoorora." 
Isaiah5:29 Okutsinda kwabo kuryaba nk'okw'entare, Batsinde nk'emigunju y'entare, Baryaruruma, bakwate eminyago, Bagitwarire kimwe, habure ow'okujuna." 
Isaiah5:30 Eryo izooba baryabahoorereraho nk'okuhoorera kw'enyanja. Omuntu weena ku ariza kugira ati, Aryareeba ensi eijwire omwirima n'obusaasi Kandi n'ebicu bizibiire omushana kwaka." 
Isaiah6:1 Omu mwaka ogu omugabe Uziya yaafeereiremu, nkareeba Mukama ashutami aha kitebe ky'obukama, kiraingwa, ekitairwe ahaiguru, n'ebijwaro bye ebiragaize biijwire hekalu." 
Isaiah6:2 Baaserafi beemereire ahaiguru ye; buri omwe aine amapapa mukaaga, abiri ageekingiize ahamaisho, abiri agashwekire ebigyere, kandi abiri naagagurukisa." 
Isaiah6:3 Omwe yayeta mutyenzi we naagira ati: MUKAMA ow'amahe n'Orikwera, n'Orikwea, n'Orikwera; ensi yoona eijwire ekitiinisa kye." 
Isaiah6:4 Emisingi y'ebiti by'amarembo yaatengyetsibwa eiraka ry'ogwo owaagambire, enju yaijura omwika." 
Isaiah6:5 Bwanyima naagira nti: Ai bambe! Mbwenuho naahitsya, ahakuba ndi omuntu w'eminwa etashemeire, kandi ntuura omu bantu abaine eminwa etashemeire; ahabw'okuba amaisho gangye gaareeba Mukama, MUKAMA ow'amahe." 
Isaiah6:6 Ahonaaho omwe ahari baasiraafi yaaguruka, yaija ahi ndi aine eikara eririkwotsya omu ngaro, eri yaiha aha itambiro n'oruhana." 
Isaiah6:7 Yaarinta aha minwa, yaagira ati: Reeba, eri ryakukora aha minwa, okutahiirira kwawe kwakwihwaho, n'ekibi kyawe kyasaasirwa." 
Isaiah6:8 Bwanyima naahurira eiraka rya Mukama naagira ati: Ntume oha, kandi n'oha oraatugyendere? Ntyo naagarukamu nti: Ndi aha; ba niinye waatuma." 
Isaiah6:9 Yangira ati: Irooko ogambire abo bantu oti: Okuhurira kwo muhurire, kwonka mutashoborokyerwa; N'okureeba mureebe, kwonka muteetegyereza;" 
Isaiah6:10 Hindura emitima y'abo bantu ebirite, Oigare amatu gaabo, Kandi ohumye amaihso gaabo, Batakaareebesa amaisho gaabo, N'okuhurira n'amatu gaabo, N'okwetegyereza n'emitima yaabo, N'okuhinduka ngu bakizibwe." 
Isaiah6:11 Bwanyima naagira nti: Mukama wangye, ebyo biryahitsya ryari? Yangarukamu ati: Okuhitsya obu endembo ziriba emishaka, Hatakiine otwiremu, N'amaju hatakiine ogarimu, N'ensi ekabeera kimwe amatongo," 
Isaiah6:12 MUKAMA akaihayo abantu, akabatwara hare, Omu nsi yoona hakabamu emyanya mingi y'ebifurukwa." 
Isaiah6:13 Kandi n'obu haritsigaramu ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi, Nakyo kiryamarwaho, nk'ekiti ky'omwela, Nari omunyinya, ekyatemirwe kikatsigara kiri ekitsintsi. Nikwo n'oruzaaro orurikwera ruriba ekitsintsi kyabo." 
Isaiah7:1 Omu busingye bwa Ahazi mwene Yosamu, mutabani wa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, Rezini omugabe wa Siria na Peeka mwene Remalia omugabe wa Israeli, bakainamuka Yerusaalemu kugirwanisa, kwonka tibaagibaasa." 
Isaiah7:2 Ab'enju ya Daudi ku baagambiirwe ngu Abasiria bakwataniise na Abaefuraimu, omutima gwa Ahazi n'emitima y'abantu be yaatetema nk'emiti y'omu kibira erikutengyetsibwa omuyaga." 
Isaiah7:3 MUKAMA yaagira Isaaya ati: shohora hati, ogyende na mutabani waawe Sheari-yashubu, obugane Ahazi aha muheru gw'omukura gw'ekiyanja kya ruguru, ekiri aha muhanda ogurikuza aha musiri gw'omwozi;" 
Isaiah7:4 haza omugire oti: Oyerinde, ohitsye omutima omunda, orekye kutiina, kandi otahahaazibwa ekiniga kingi kya Rezini n'Abasiria, n'ekya mwene Remailia; bari nk'ebicumurwa bibiri by'enkanza zirikucumba." 
Isaiah7:5 Noomanya ku Abaisria n'Abaefuraimu na mwene Remalia bakugiriire enaama mbi nibagira bati: 
Isaiah7:6 Mwije twinamukye tuteere Yuda, tubatiinise, tubeekubuurire, twemekye mwene Tabeeli, abe omugabe waayo." 
Isaiah7:7 Kwonka Mukama RUHANGA agizire ati: Enaama yaabo terikwija kuhama, kandi terihikiirira;" 
Isaiah7:8 Ahabw'okuba omutwe gwa Siria ni Damasiko, n'omutwe gwa Damasiko ni Rezini; kandi emyaka makumi mukaaga n'etaano etakahwireho, Abaefuraimu baryacuubwamu ebicweka, babae batakiba ihanga." 
Isaiah7:9 Omutwe gwa Efuraimu ni Samaria, n'omutwe gwa Samaria ni mwene Remalia. Ku muraayangye kwikiriza, buzimazima timurihama." 
Isaiah7:10 MUKAMA yaagaruka yaagira Ahazi ati: 
Isaiah7:11 Shaba MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akamanyiso, oshabe akarikuhika Okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, nari akarikuhika ahaiguru owa Herebe." 
Isaiah7:12 Kwonka Ahazi yaagira ati: Tindikwija kushaba, kandi tindikwija kugyeza MUKAMA." 
Isaiah7:13 Isaaya yaagira ati: Imwe nju ya Daudi 'mwe, nimuhurire! Nimugira ngu n'ekintu kikye okurusya abantu, mukataho n'okurusya Ruhanga wangye?" 
Isaiah7:14 Nikyo Mukama wenak aribaheera akamanyiso. Reeba, omwishiki oshugaine aryagira enda, azaare omwana w'omwojo, amwete Emanueli." 
Isaiah7:15 Ogwo mwana, ku arimanya kwanga ekibi n'okwihamu ekirungi, aryatungwa amate g'amakamo n'obwoki." 
Isaiah7:16 Ahabw'okuba omwana ogwo ku ariba atakagizire bwengye bw'okwanga ekibi n'okwihamu ekirungi, ensi z'abo bagabe bombi, abu orikutiina, ziryaba ebifurukwa." 
Isaiah7:17 Iwe n'abantu baawe n'enju ya sho, MUKAMA aryabareetaho ebiro ebitakabahoga okwiha obu Abaefuraimu baataana n'Abayuda, nikwo kuteerwa omugabe wa Asiria." 
Isaiah7:18 Omu bunaku obwo MUKAMA aryayetesa ekicurizo eshohera eziri omu bicweka by'obukomooko bw'emigyera ya Misri, n'enjoki z'omu nsi ya Asiria," 
Isaiah7:19 byona biije bijanjaare omu mpanga ezitatuurwamu n'omu nyanga z'amabaare n'omu bishaka by'amahwa byona n'omu mariisizo goona. 
Isaiah7:20 Omu bunaku obwo Mukama aryamwa eishokye aha mutwe n'obwoya aha bigyere, abimwaise orumweiso rw'entiizano oruriruga seeri y'omugyera Furaati, niwe mugabe wa Asiria; kandi rumareho n'obureju." 
Isaiah7:21 Omuri obwo bunaku omuntu aryariisa ente nto y'ejigija, n'entaama ibiri;" 
Isaiah7:22 kandi ahabw'amate agu zirikukamwa kuba maingi, aryatungwa amate g'amakamo; kandi n'abaritsigara omu nsi boona baryatungwa amate g'amakamo n'obwoki." 
Isaiah7:23 Kandi omu bunaku obwo omwanya gwona ogwabaire gubamu emizaabibu rukumi, erikugura shekeli rukumi, guryamerwamu emikwatangwe n'amahwa." 
Isaiah7:24 Oine obuta n'emyambi niwe arihikayo, ahabw'okuba ensi yoona eryaba emezibwamu emikwatangwe n'amahwa." 
Isaiah7:25 Kandi n'ebibungo byona ebyabaire bihingisibwa efuka, oryatiina kubihikamu ahabw'egyo mikwatangwe n'amahwa, kureka biryaba eby'okunaguramu ente n'entaama." 
Isaiah8:1 Kandi MUKAMA yangira ati: Twara ekishate kihango ky'eibaare, okihandiikyeho omu nyuguta mpango oti: Ebya Maheri-shalali-hashibaazi." 
Isaiah8:2 Bwanyima naatunga baakareebi abarikwesigwa kubihamya, Uriya omunyamurwa na Zekaria mwene Yeberekia." 
Isaiah8:3 Ntyo naaza owa nabikazi, yaagira enda, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo. Bwanyima MUKAMA yangira ati: Mwete eiziina Mahari-shalali-hashibaazi;" 
Isaiah8:4 ahabw'okuba ogwo mwana ku ariba atakamanyire kugamba “taata” nari “maama”, obutungi bwa Damasiko n'eminyago ya Samaria biryatwarwa omugabe wa Asiria, agyende abyebembeize." 
Isaiah8:5 MUKAMA yaagaruka yangira ati: 
Isaiah8:6 Aba bantu obu baayanga amaizi ga Shiloa agarikugyenda mpora, bakatiina Rezini na mwene Ramalia," 
Isaiah8:7 Mukama naija kubarwanisa n'amaizi maingi g'amaani ag'omugyera Furaati, niwe mugabe wa Asiria n'ekitiinisa kye kyona; amaizi ago garyaijura, gashwekye emikura yoona, garengyere n'aha nkungu zaagwo zoona;" 
Isaiah8:8 kandi garyahimintika, gahikye Yuda, gashandaare, gaijure, gahikye omu bitsya, kandi n'amapapa gaago agashashaanwire garyabuga ensi yaawe yoona, Emanueli." 
Isaiah8:9 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, mweteerane, kwonka muryahendagurika; Kandi naimwe ab'omu nsi za hare, mutegye amatu mwena; Mwezirikye, kwonka muryahendagurika; Mutyo mwezirikye, kwona muryahendagurika." 
Isaiah8:10 Muhanuure hamwe, kwonka enaama zaanyu ziryafa busha, Mugambe ekigambo, kwonka tikirihama, Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ari hamwe naitwe." 
Isaiah8:11 MUKAMA antaireho omukono gwe gw'amaani, yanteisa okutagyendera omu mitwarize y'eihanga eri nagira ati:" 
Isaiah8:12 Eki ab'eihanga eri barikweta obugomi, murekye kukyeta obugomi, kandi mutaritiina eki barikutiina, n'obu kwakuba okwitwa obwoba;" 
Isaiah8:13 kureka MUKAMA ow'amahe mube niwe mwaha ekitiinisa ahabw'okwera kwe, mube niwe mwatiina, akabaitsa obwoba." 
Isaiah8:14 Kandi niwe aribabeera Omwanya ogurikwera; kwonka aryabeera amaju ga Israeli gombi eibaare eririkuteeza entsibo n'orukiri orurikugwisa, abeere abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu obusya n'omutego." 
Isaiah8:15 Baingi baryamuteeraho entsibo, bagwe, bahendekye, bakwatwe omutego, batwarwe." 
Isaiah8:16 Komera kimwe ebirikuhamya, ohamye n'akamanyiso ebiragiro omu beegi bangye." 
Isaiah8:17 MUKAMA orikwima enju ya Yakobo amaisho ndyamutegyereza, mmwineho amatsiko." 
Isaiah8:18 Reeba, nyowe n'abaana abu MUKAMA ampaire turi akamanyiso n'eky'okutangaarira ahari Israeli, ebirikuruga ahari MUKAMA ow'amahe, otuura aha rushozi Saayuuni." 
Isaiah8:19 Kandi ku baraabagire ngu, muraguze aha barikugambisa emizimu n'aha bafumu, abarikuviigiira, n'abarikuhuhuma, timurikumanya ngu abantu bashemereire kwehanuuza ahari Ruhanga waabo? Nimugira ngu eby'abahuriire bishemereire kwehanuuzibwa aha baafiire?" 
Isaiah8:20 Ebiragiro n'ebirikuhamya mube nibyo mwayehanuuzaho! Ku baraabe batarikugamba nk'oku ekigambo eki kiri, buzimazima omushekye tiguribajugutira." 
Isaiah8:21 Kureka baryaraba omu nsi, baine obusaasi bwingi n'enjara; kandi ku barigira enjara, bayragira ekiniga kingi, bakyeene omugabe waabo na Ruhanga waabo, baimutsye amaisho, bagahangye eiguru," 
Isaiah8:22 kandi bagahangye ensi, babure eki baareeba, kureka obusaasi n'omwirima n'enaku eziri nk'obwire; bwanyima banagwe omu mwirima ndindindi." 
Isaiah9:1 Kwonka aha mwishiki ogwo owaabaire aine obusaasi, tiharibaho mwirima. Omu biro bya ira Ruhanga akagayisa ensi ya Zebuluuni n'eya Nafutaali, kwonka omubiro bya bwanyima egyo nsi aryagihindura ey'ekitiinisa, Galilaaya eyaabaire ekubwirwe abanyamahanga, seenu ya Yorudani, aha muhanda ogurikuza aha Nyanja." 
Isaiah9:2 Abantu abaabaire nibagyendera omu mwirima Bareebire omushana mwingi, N'abaabaire batwire omu nsi y'ekibunda kya rufu Omushana gubajwereire." 
Isaiah9:3 Okanyiise eihanga, Waayongyera aha kushemererwa kwabo; Nibashemererwa omu maisho gaawe, Nk'oku abashaija bashemererwa nibabagana eminyago." 
Isaiah9:4 Ahabw'okuba omutwaro ogwabaire gubaremereire, N'enkoni eyaabaire ebatuura aha mabega, N'ekihuuzo ky'orikubahata, Obihenzire nk'aha izooba rya Midiani;" 
Isaiah9:5 Ahakuba eby'okurwanisa byona ebihagatirwa abarwani aha rugamba, N'ebijwaro ebikuringirwe omu shagama, Biryaba eby'okwokibwa nk'enku omu muriro;" 
Isaiah9:6 Ahabw'okuba Omwana atuzaariirwe, Omwana w'omwojo atuhairwe, Obutegyeki buryaba aha mabega ge, N'eiziina rye aryayetwa Omuhanuuzi orikutangaaza, Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi, Tataitwe otahwaho, Mukama w'obusingye." 
Isaiah9:7 Okweyongyera kw'obutegyeki bwe n'obusingye Tibirigira bugarukiro Aha kitebe kya Daudi n'aha bukama bwe, Okubutaho n'okubuhigikiza eby'oburyo n'okuhikiirira, Okwiha hati n'okuhitsya ebiro byona. Obweziriki bwa MUKAMA ow'amahe nibwo burihikiiriza ekyo." 
Isaiah9:8 Mukama atumire ekigambo kuhana Yakobo, Nikiija kuhika n'ahari Israeli," 
Isaiah9:9 Kandi abantu boona baryakimanya. Abaefuraimu n'abatwirewe omuri Samaria, Abarikugambisa amaryo n'emyekuniko y'omu mutima, nibagira bati:" 
Isaiah9:10 Amatafaari gagwire, Kwonka nitwija kwombekyesa amabaare gabaizire; Emisikamoori etemirwe, Kwonka omu mwanya gwayo nitwija kutamu emyereezi." 
Isaiah9:11 Nikyo MUKAMA arikwija kwimukiza ababisha, N'abazigu baabo kubarwanisa," 
Isaiah9:12 Abasiria bakareetwa oburugwa-izooba, N'Abafilistia oburengyerwa-izooba, Baarangaaza akanwa, baamira Abaisraeli. Hoona nabwo ekiniga kya MUKAMA tikikabarugireho, Omukono gwe gukigangire." 
Isaiah9:13 Kwonka abantu tibakagarukiire owaabateire, N'obu kwakuba okusherura MUKAMA ow'amahe." 
Isaiah9:14 Nikyo MUKAMA arikwizira kutema ahari Israeli omutwe n'omukira, akamaraho amataagi g'emikindo n'ekibingo aha izooba rimwe-" 
Isaiah9:15 Omushaija mukuru ow'ekitiinisa, nigwo mutwe, Kandi nabi orikwegyesa ebishuba, nigwo mukira;" 
Isaiah9:16 Ahabw'okuba abarikwebembera aba bantu nibabahabisa, Kandi abo abu beebembeire nibamarwaho." 
Isaiah9:17 N'ahabw'ekyo Mukama tarikwesiima habw'abatsigazi baabo, Kandi tarigirira saasi fuuzi zaabo n'abafaakazi baabo, ahakuba buri muntu tarikweta hari Ruhanga, kandi n'enkozi y'ebibi, Kandi omuntu weena naagamba eby'obushema. Hoona nabwo ekiniga kya MUKAMA tikikabarugireho, Omukono gwe gukibangire." 
Isaiah9:18 Manya, okutahikiirira nikwotsya nk'omuriro, Kumaraho emikwatangwe n'amahwa, kutweka ekishaka kikwataine eky'omu kibira, Bituumuukira omu kiika kingi." 
Isaiah9:19 Ahabw'ekiniga kya MUKAMA ow'amahe ensi neesya, N'abantu baayo nibashusha nk'enku z'okuhembesa omuriro; Tihariho n'omwe orikusaasira mwene ishe." 
Isaiah9:20 Omuntu aryashahura eby'okurya aha rubaju rwa buryo, kwonka agume n'enjara; Ondiijo aryamirakwo eby'aha rubaju rwa bumosho, kwonka tarihaaga; Buri muntu aryarya enyama y'omubiri gwa mutaahi we." 
Isaiah9:21 Manaase aryarya Efuraimu, na Efuraimu arye Manaase; Kandi bombi bakwatanisa bateere Yuda. Hoona nabwo ekiniga kye tikikabarugireho. Omukono gwe gukibangire." 
Isaiah10:1 Baryakareea abataho ebiragiro ebitari by'okuhikiirira N'abahandiiki abahandiika eby'okuhata," 
Isaiah10:2 Ngu babone kwitaita emanja z'abakyene, N'okwaka abooro b'omu bantu bangye ebibashemereire, N'okunyaga abafaakazi, N'efuuzi okuzigira eminyago." 
Isaiah10:3 Muryakora ki aha izooba ry'okufubirwa kwanyu, N'okuhwerekyerezibwa okuriruga hare? Muryahungira ahari oha, ngu abahe emikono? Kandi obutungi bwanyu muryabutsiga hi?" 
Isaiah10:4 Muryaba mutakiine kindi ky'okukora, Kureka okweyinamirira omu mbohe, Nari okugwa ahansi omu baitsirwe. Hoona nabwo ekiniga kye tikikabarugireho, Omukono gwe gukibangire." 
Isaiah10:5 Asiria, enkoni y'okuguubwa kubi kwangye, Ekihuuzo ky'ekiniga kyangye," 
Isaiah10:6 Ndyamwohereza kurwanisa eihanga eriteeta hari Ruhanga, Mmuragiire kuteera abantu abu nyiniire ekiniga, Abanyagye, atware eminyago, Abaribatiiririre ahansi nk'ebyondo by'omu muhanda." 
Isaiah10:7 Kwonka tikwo arikwenda kukora, N'omutima gwe tikwo gurikuteekateeka; Kureka ekiri omu mutima gwe n'okucwekyereza Kandi n'okumariraho kimwe amahanga gatari makye;" 
Isaiah10:8 Ahabw'okuba naagira ati: Abakuru b'engabo zangye boona t'abagabe? 
Isaiah10:9 Kalino terikwingana na Kakemishi? Hamasi terikwingana na Arupaadi, Nari shi Samaria na Damasiko?" 
Isaiah10:10 Nk'oku omukono gwangye gwahikire aha mahanga Agaabaire garimu ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, ebibaizire, Ebirikukira eby'omuri Yerusaalemu na Samaria," 
Isaiah10:11 Tindigira Yerusaalemu n'ebishushani byayo, Nk'oku naagizire Samaria n'ebyabyo?" 
Isaiah10:12 Mukama ku ariheza kukora byona, ebi amaririire kukora aha rushozi Saayuuni na Yerusaalemu, aryafubira omugabe wa Asiria naamutura amaryo ge n'okwehimbisa kwe n'emyekuniko ye;" 
Isaiah10:13 ahabw'okuba naagira ati: Nkabikoresa amaani g'omukono gwangye, N'obwengye bwangye, ahakuba nyine okwetegyereza; Naihaho emyatano y'amahanga, Naanyaga obutungi bwago, Nk'emanzi naiha aha ngoma abaabaire bari aha bitebe by'obugabe." 
Isaiah10:14 Omukono gwangye gwagwa aha butungi bw'amahanga, Nk'owaagwa aha kyashuri ky'enyonyi, Kandi nk'oku omuntu ateeranira hamwe amahuri agu enyonyi etsigireho, Nikwo naanye naateeraniire hamwe amahanga g'ensi yoona, Hakabura owaimutsya eipapa. Nari owaayashamya akanwa, n'obu kwakuba okuteeza." 
Isaiah10:15 Nimugira ngu empango neebaasa kwehimbisiza aha muntu orikugitemesa, Nari omusimeeno ahari ogwo orikugusharisa? Ni nk'oku enkoni yaakutengyetsa ogikwaitse, Nari nk'oku ekihuuzo kyakwimutsya omuntu otari kiti!" 
Isaiah10:16 Nikyo Mukama, MUKAMA ow'amahe, Arirwariza engabo ze amamanzi omunywengerero, Kandi ahansi y'ekitiinisa kye haryaimukayo okwaka Okurikushusha okwaka kw'omuriro." 
Isaiah10:17 Omushana gwa Israeli guryaba omuriro, N'Orikwera we abe ekirimi kyagwo; Ogwo muriro guryayotsya amahwa ge N'emikwatangwe ye, gubimareho eizooba rimwe." 
Isaiah10:18 Kandi MUKAMA aryamaraho ekitiinisa ky'ekibira kye n'eky'ensi ye erikweza munonga, Ahwerekyereze omutima n'omubiri gwe, Abe nk'omuntu orwaire oku ahwa aha magufa." 
Isaiah10:19 Emiti eritsigara omu kibira kye ebe mikye, Ei omwana arikubaasa kuhandiika." 
Isaiah10:20 Eryo izooba Abaisraeli abariba batsigaireho, n'ab'enju ya Yakobo abariba bahonokireho, tibarigaruka kwegamira owaabateire, kureka omu mazima baryayegamira MUKAMA Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Isaiah10:21 Aba Yakobo abariba bahonokireho baryagarukira Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi. 
Isaiah10:22 Kwonka, n'obu abantu baawe Abaisraeli baraabe nibaingana nk'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja, ekicweka kyabo kikye ekirihonokaho nikyo kirigaruka. Okucwekyerera kukaragiirwa, kushandaarira hamwe n'okuhikiirira," 
Isaiah10:23 ahabw'okuba Mukama, MUKAMA ow'amahe, aryabamaraho omu nsi yoona, nk'oku kyaragiirwe." 
Isaiah10:24 Nikyo Mukama, MUKAMA ow'amahe, arikugirira ati: Imwe bantu banguye 'mwe, abatwire Saayuuni, mutatiina Abaasiria, ku baraabateeze enkoni, baababangira ebihuuzo, baabagira nk'oku Abanyamisri baabagizire," 
Isaiah10:25 ahabw'okuba hatsigaireho akaanya kakye, okuguubwa kubi kwangye kurugye ahariimwe; bwanyima ekiniga kyangye kiryabahindukana, mbacwekyereze." 
Isaiah10:26 MUKAMA ow'amahe arybaasha, nk'oku yaagizire Midiani aha rukiri rwa Orebu, kandi enkoni ye aryagiimutsya aha nyanja, agibangye, nk'oku yaagizire omuri Misri." 
Isaiah10:27 Eryo izooba omutwaro ogu yaakwekoreize guryakuruga aha ibega, kandi enkomo ye eryakwihwa omu bitsya. Yainamuka naaruga Rimoni," 
Isaiah10:28 Yaahika Ayasi, yaaraba Migirooni, Mikimaashi niyo abiikire ebintu bye," 
Isaiah10:29 Baarengyera omu kakiro, baaraara Geeba, Aba Raama nibatetema, Aba Gibeya eya Saulo baahunga." 
Isaiah10:30 Iwe Galimu, imutsya eiraka, otakye! Naiwe Laisha, okihurire! Iwe Anatoosi, mugarukyemu!" 
Isaiah10:31 Aba Madimeena nibacwa, N'abatuuzi ba Gebimu nibahunga kuronda obukiriro." 
Isaiah10:32 Eri izooba naija kuraara Noobu, Atigitire orushozi Saayuuni entomi, Nikyo kibungo kya Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Reeba, Mukama, MUKAMA ow'amahe, Aryatema amataagi n'amaani garikutiinisa, Abarikukira abandi aha mutwe baryatemwa, N'abaraingwa baryagarurwa ahansi;" 
Isaiah10:34 Kandi aryamaraho ebishaka by'omu kibira, Lebanooni eryagwa n'emiti yaayo ey'ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah11:1 Omu kitsintsi kya Yese haryatookamu akataagi, N'omu mizi ye haryarugamu eitaagi." 
Isaiah11:2 Omwoyo wa MUKAMA aryguma ahariwe, Agire omwoyo gw'obwengye n'okwetegyereza, Omwoyo gw'okuhanuura n'obushoboorozi, Omwoyo gw'okumanya n'okutiina MUKAMA." 
Isaiah11:3 Omu kutiina MUKAMA nimwo arishemerererwa; Taricwa rubanja rw'amaisho, N'obu rwakuba orw'okugambirwa," 
Isaiah11:4 Kureka aryacwera abooro emanja omu kuhikiirira N'abacureezi b'omu nsi aryabashoboorora omu bwinganisa; Kandi ensi aryagiteeza enkoni y'akanwa ke, N'ababi aryabaitsa omwitsyo gwe." 
Isaiah11:5 Okuhikiirira kuryaba orukoba rwe rw'okwezirikisa, N'obwesigwa bube orukoba omu bwezirikiro bwe." 
Isaiah11:6 Omushega guryataaha n'omwana gw'entaama, N'engwe eryabyama n'omwana gw'embuzi, Enyana n'entare n'enimi y'ekimasha ekigomokire biryaguma hamwe, Kandi omwana muto niwe aribifunya." 
Isaiah11:7 Ente ziryariira hamwe n'edubu, Abaana baazo baraare hamwe, Kandi entare eryarya obunyaatsi nk'ente." 
Isaiah11:8 Omwana orikwonka aryazaanira aha mwina gw'encwera, N'omwana w'encuukye aryata omukono gwe aha kiina ky'empiri." 
Isaiah11:9 Ebyo byona tibirikora kubi, n'obu kwakuba okwita Aha rushozi rwangye rwona orurikwera; Ahabw'okuba okumanya MUKAMA kuryabuga ensi yoona, Nk'oku amaizi gabuga hoona omu nyanja." 
Isaiah11:10 Kandi eryo izooba Orikwetwa ekitsintsi kya Yese aryabeera amahanga orurango; niwe amahanga garyetuurira, n'obutaaho bwe buryagira ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah11:11 Eryo izooba Mukama aryagorora omukono gwe obwa kabiri kugarura abantu be abaahonokireho, naabaiha Asiria, Misri, Patiroosi, Esiopia, Elamu, Shinaari, Hamasi, n'aha birwa by'omu nyanja." 
Isaiah11:12 Aryaimukiza amahanga orurango, Ateeranire hamwe Abaisraeli abaabingirwe N'Abayuda abaataataine, Naabaiha aha nshonda ina z'ensi." 
Isaiah11:13 Eihari rya Efuraimu riryahwa, Abarikuburabuza Yuda baryamarwaho; Efuraimu tarigirira Yuda ihari, Na Yuda tariburabuza Efuraimu." 
Isaiah11:14 Baryahanantuka, bagwe aha mabega g'Abafilistia oburengyerwa-izooba, Kandi baryakwatanisa, banyagye ab'oburugwa-izooba. Baryabangira Edomu na Moabu emikono, N'Abaamoni baryabakubuukira." 
Isaiah11:15 MUKAMA aryayomeza kimwe omukono gw'enyanja ya Misri, Aryareeta omuyaga gwe ogurikwomya Naarabya omukono gwe aha mugyera Furaati, Aguteere, agucwemu emigyera mushanju, Abantu babone kugwambuka enkaito zitajubire." 
Isaiah11:16 Kandi abantu be abaahonokireho Baryabona omuhanda rugyendwa gw'okubaiha Asiria, Nk'ogu Abaisraeli baaboine Nibaruga omu nsi ya Misri." 
Isaiah12:1 Eryo izooba muryagira muti: MUKAMA, ninkusiima, Ahabw'okuba, n'obu wangiriire ekiniga, Kikatuuba; mbwenu ongarwire omutima omunda." 
Isaiah12:2 Reeba, Ruhanga niwe kujunwa kwangye, Ndyaguma nimmwesiga, tinditiina; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Yehoova niwe maani gangye n'ekyeshongoro kyangye, Kandi ahindukire okujunwa kwangye." 
Isaiah12:3 Nikyo muriguma nimutahira amaizi omu maziba g'okujunwa mushemereirwe; 
Isaiah12:4 kandi eryo izooba muryagira muti: Musiime MUKAMA, mutakire eiziina rye, Mubuzye omu mahanga ebi yaakozire, Muryangye eiziina rye kuririkuhimbisibwa." 
Isaiah12:5 Mwehongorere MUKAMA eby'okumuhimbisa, Ahabw'okuba akozire eby'ekitiinisa. Ebyo bibugye ensi yoona." 
Isaiah12:6 Iwe mutuuzi wa Saayuuni 'we, teera akaari, Oyeshongore ahabw'okushemererwa, Ahabw'okuba Orikwera wa Israeli ori omuriiwe ni mukuru." 
Isaiah13:1 Eby'okuhanuura ebi Isaaya mwene Amozi yaareebire ahari Babulooni. 
Isaiah13:2 Mwimutsye orurango aha kibungo kiraingwa, Mubarangire n'eiraka rihango, Mubeetese omukono, bataahe Omu marembo g'abakuru." 
Isaiah13:3 Nyowe ndagiire abu naashoroire, Naayeta amamanzi gangye agarikugyenda nigeesiima Kuhikiiriza eki ndikwenda ahabw'ekiniga kyangye." 
Isaiah13:4 Nimuhurire! Omu bibungo nihareetwamu orwari Nk'orw'omutwe gw'abantu baingi munonga. Muhurire oruyombo rw'amahanga agateeraniire hamwe! MUKAMA ow'amahe naateerateerana amahe kuza aha rugamba. 
Isaiah13:5 Garugire omu nsi ya hare aha muheru gw'eiguru, Gari hamwe na MUKAMA n'eby'okurwanisa by'ekiniga kye, Naaza kucwekyereza ensi yoona." 
Isaiah13:6 Muboroogye, ahabw'okuba eizooba rya MUKAMA riri haihi; Niriija nk'okucwekyereza okurikuruga aha W'obushoboorozi bwona!" 
Isaiah13:7 N'ahabw'ekyo emikono yoona neija kuhwa amaani, Buri muntu omutima gumuhwe omunda, bahahaare," 
Isaiah13:8 Bagire obuhuruzi n'obusaasi, Bashaashe nk'omukazi orikurumwa. Baryareebana nibatangaara, Amaisho gabatukure." 
Isaiah13:9 Reeba, eizooba rya MUKAMA niriija, Ritarikusaasira, riine ekiniga kingi, Okuhindura ensi amatongo N'okucwekyereza abasiisi baayo n'okubamaramu." 
Isaiah13:10 Ahakuba enyonyoozi z'omu iguru Na zaakakaaga zaazo tiziryaka, Eizooba riryairagura nirituruka, N'okwezi tikuryaka." 
Isaiah13:11 Ndyafubira ensi yoona ningitura eby'okushiisha byayo, N'ababi ahabw'okutahikiirira kwabo; Ndyamaraho emyehimbiso y'abanyamaryo, Ntuubye emyekuniko y'abataine saasi." 
Isaiah13:12 Abashaija baryaba ab'eicweka okukira ezaabu eshemeziibwe, N'ekyetwa omuntu okukira ezaabu ya Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Nikyo nditengyetseza eiguru, N'ensi ekatengyeta, ekaruga omu mwanya gwayo, ahabw'ekiniga kya MUKAMA ow'amahe Aha izooba ry'ekishinjo kye ekingi." 
Isaiah13:14 Nk'esirabo ehiigirwe, Nk'entaama ezitaine kitanga, Buri muntu aryagaruka omu ihanga rye, N'omuntu weena ahungire omu nsi yaabo." 
Isaiah13:15 Orireebwa weena aryacumitwa, ryogyemu; Kandi orikwatwa weena aryagwa na rurara." 
Isaiah13:16 Abeereere baabo baryateerwa ahansi bacwagurikye, nibabareeba. Amaju gaabo garyanyagwa, N'abakazi baabo bahambwe." 
Isaiah13:17 Reeba, nimbaimukiza Abameedi kubarwanisa, Abantu abateeta aha feeza N'obu kwakuba okukunda ezaabu." 
Isaiah13:18 Amata gaabo garyaita abatsigazi, tibarisaasira ruzaaro rw'enda zaabo, Kandi amaisho gaabo tigarigirira baana saaski." 
Isaiah13:19 Babulooni, ekitiinisa ky'amahanga, Oburungi n'okwehimbisa by'Abakaludaaya, Eryaba nka Sodoma na Gomora, Obu Ruhanga yaazicwekyereza." 
Isaiah13:20 Terigaruka kutaahwamu, Nari okutuurwamu obusingye bwona; Abaharabu tibariteerayo mahema gaabo, Kandi n'abariisa tibarizaagizayo magana gaabo;" 
Isaiah13:21 Kureka haryazaagirayo enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa, Kandi amaju gaayo garyaijura enyamaishwa ezirikuhuuma. Okwo niyo maaya zirituura, N'embuzi z'obwoshe niyo zirikinira." 
Isaiah13:22 Empitsi ziryahuumira omu minaara yaarwo, Na zaamuha ziboigorere omu bikaari birungi byarwo; Mbwenu obunaku bwarwo bwafunzire, N'ebiro byarwo tibyakyongyerwaho." 
Isaiah14:1 MUKAMA aryagirira Yakobo esaasi, kandi aryagaruka atoorane Abaisraeli, abagarure omu nsi yaabo; n'abanyamahanga baryaija beeteerane nabo, beekome aha nju ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Kandi abanyamahanga baryabatwara, babahitsye owaabo, ab'enju ya Israeli baryabahakira omu nsi ya MUKAMA, babagire abahuuku n'abazaana; baryatwara omu bukwatwa abo abaabaire babatwaire omu bukwatwa, kandi baryategyeka abaabaire babatwaza eikama."
