Isaiah14:3 MUKAMA ku ariheza kubahuumuza obusaasi n'enaku n'obuhuuku obu mwabaire mwitirwamu kubi nibabakoresa," 
Isaiah14:4 muryateerera omugabe wa Babulooni enaku nimugira muti: Mamya omurahuzi takiriho, N'ekiniga ky'omunyarubwa kihweireho!" 
Isaiah14:5 MUKAMA ahenzire ekihuuzo ky'ababi, Niyo nkoni y'abategyeki," 
Isaiah14:6 Abaabaire bateera abantu n'ekiniga batarekire, Bakategyekyesa amahanga ekiniga, bakagahiiga batarikusaasira." 
Isaiah14:7 Mbwenu ensi yoona ehuumwire, etuurize; Abantu nibateera akaari nibeeshongora." 
Isaiah14:8 Emiberooshi neekwesiimirana, N'emyereezi ya Lebanooni neegira eti: Okwiha obu waagarurwa ahansi, Tihariho mutemi oragarukire kututema." 
Isaiah14:9 Okuzimu owa Nyamuteza neeshutuka kukubugana, Neimutsya emizimu y'abaabaire bari abategyeki b'ensi kukutangirira. Boona abaabaire bari abagabe b'amahanga Neebaiha aha bitebe byabo by'obugae." 
Isaiah14:10 Abo boona baryagamba nibakugira bati: Naiwe ohindukire otaine maani nkaitwe, Waaba nk'oku turi?" 
Isaiah14:11 Ekitiinisa kyawe kishuumiibwe n'amaraka g'enganga zaawe, Bishuumiibwe Okuzimu; Waayeyarira enyogori, kandi waazeeshweka." 
Isaiah14:12 Iwe nyonyoozi y'omu buturuturu 'we, omwana w'omushekye, K'orugire omu iguru okagwa! Iwe owaabaire ocwa amahanga busha, K'otemirwe, okaza aha itaka!" 
Isaiah14:13 Okaba ogira omu mitima gwawe oti: Ndyatemba omu iguru ahaiguru y'enyonyoozi za Ruhanga, Ekitebe kyangye nkite ahaiguru. Ndyashutama aha rushozi rw'eiteeraniro okwo hare Aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Isaiah14:14 Ndyatemba mpikye ahaiguru y'ebicu, Nyehindure, mbe nk'Orikukira byona." 
Isaiah14:15 Mbwenu shi ka waashuuma Okuzimu, Okahika owa Nyamuteza!" 
Isaiah14:16 Abaraakureebe nibaija kukushamaarira, Bakwetegyereze, nibagira bati: Ogu niwe mushaija owaabaire atengyetsa ensi, Akatetemya amahanga g'abagabe," 
Isaiah14:17 Akahindura ensi eihamba ry'omusheenyi Akasheenya endembo zaamwo, Akanga kureka enkwatwa ze kugaruka owaabo?" 
Isaiah14:18 Abagabe b'amahanga boona bagwejegyereire omu kitiinisa, Buri muntu omu kituuro kye;" 
Isaiah14:19 Kwonka iwe onagirwe aheeru hare n'ekituuro kyawe nk'eitaagi eryangiirwe kimwe; Oshwekirwe emitumbi eitsirwe rurara, Ekashuuma omu mabaare g'Okuzimu, Nk'omutumbi oguribatiirirwe n'ebigyere." 
Isaiah14:20 Omu kuziikwa toriteerana nabo, Ahabw'okuba okacwekyereza ensi yaawe, Waita abantu baawe. Oruzaaro rw'enkozi z'ebibi tirurigambwaho ebiro byona!" 
Isaiah14:21 Muteguure ah'okwitira abaana be Nibaturwa okutahikiirira kw'ishebo, Bataimuka bakakubuura ensi, Bakagibuzya endembo." 
Isaiah14:22 MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Niinyija kwimuka ndwanise aba Babulooni, mbabuze eiziina, habure owaahonokaho, mbamareho abaijukuru n'abaikukuruza; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndyagigira obutuuro bw'ebisegyesi n'ebiyanja by'amaizi. Kandi ndyagyeyerera n'ekyeyerezo ekirikuhwerekyereza; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira. 
Isaiah14:24 MUKAMA ow'amahe arahiire naagira ati: Nk'oku naateekateekire, nikwo kiriba, Kandi kiryaba nk'oku naamaririire." 
Isaiah14:25 Ndyahendagura Omuasiria ori omu nsi yangye, Mmuribatiiririre aha bibungo byangye, Enkomo ye ebone kubarugaho, N'emitwaro ye ebarugye aha mabega." 
Isaiah14:26 Egyo niyo naama eyaagiriirwe ensi yoona, Kandi ogwo nigwo mukono ogubangiirwe amahanga goona." 
Isaiah14:27 Mbwenu MUKAMA ow'amahe ku araabe niwe akimaririire, N'oha orikizibira? Omukono gwe ku guraabe gubangire, N'oha origuhinya?" 
Isaiah14:28 Ebi nibyo byahanwirwe omu mwaka ogu omugabe Ahazi yaafeereiremu. 
Isaiah14:29 Imwe Bafilistia 'mwe mwena, mutashemererwa, Ngu ahabw'okuba enkoni eyaabateire ehendekire; ahakuba omu kitsintsi ky'enjoka haryarugamu empiri, N'ekyana kyayo kibe enjoka y'obushegu erikuguruka." 
Isaiah14:30 Emijigaijo y'abooro eryatunga eby'okurya, N'abakyene baryabyama buhooro; Kwonka ekitsintsi kyawe ndyakiitsa enjara, N'abarihonokaho baryaitwa." 
Isaiah14:31 Iwe irembo 'we, borooga! Naiwe rurembo 'we, ocure! Abafilistia mwena, muhahaaze emitima, ahabw'okuba omwika gwareetwa aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, Kandi omu ngabo ze tihaine otsigaire enyima." 
Isaiah14:32 Entuma z'eihanga bayrazigarukamu bata? Bati: MUKAMA niwe yaataireho Saayuuni, Kandi omuriyo abantu be abarikwitwa kubi nimwo barihungira." 
Isaiah15:1 Ebi nabi yaahanwire ahari Moabu. Aari orurembo rwa Moabu rucwekyereziibwe, Rwamarwaho omu kiro kimwe; Na Kiiri eya Moabu ecwekyereziibwe, Yaamarwaho omu kiro kimwe." 
Isaiah15:2 Omwishiki wa Diboni ainamukire omu myanya mikuru kucurirayo, Abamoabu nibaboroogyera Neebo na Medeba. Emitwe yaabo yoona n'enkomborora, Kandi boona bamweire ebireju;" 
Isaiah15:3 Nibagyenda omu mihanda bajwaire ebiguniya, Aha mitwe y'amaju gaabo n'omu nteeraniro z'emihanda Buri muntu naaborooga, naacura munonga." 
Isaiah15:4 Aba Heshibooni n'aba Eleale nibataka, amaraka gaabo nigahika Yahazi; Nikyo engabo za Moabu zirikucurira, N'emitima yaabo ekatetema." 
Isaiah15:5 Omutima gwangye niguririra Moabu, Abanyiginya baayo nibahungira Zoari Na Egelaasi-shelishiya; Aharikwinamuka Luhiisi niho barikwinamukira nibacura; N'omu muhanda ogurikuza Horonaimu Nimwo barikutakira okutaka kw'abarikucwekyerera." 
Isaiah15:6 Amaizi ga Nimuriimu goomire, Obunyaatsi buhotokire, obunyaatsi busya bwangire kumera, Tihakiriho kintu kyona ekibisi." 
Isaiah15:7 Nikyo barikucwisiza ebi baatungire byona, N'ebi baabiikire, bakabyambutsya omugyera gw'emikinga;" 
Isaiah15:8 Ahabw'okuba okurira kubugire ensi ya Moabu, N'okuborooga kuhikire Egulaimu na Beereliimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Ahakuba amaizi ga Diboni gaijwire eshagama; Kandi niinyija kureetera Diboni ebindi bihikiirizi, Niyo ntare erikwija kurya Abamoabu abahonokireho N'abatsigaire omu nsi yaabo." 
Isaiah16:1 Mutwekyere omutegyeki w'ensi abaana b'entaama, Mubaihe Seela aharikureeba omu ihamba, Mubahitsye aha rushozi Saayuuni." 
Isaiah16:2 Nk'oku enyonyi zitaataana, ekyashuri kisheenyirwe, Nikwo n'abaishiki ba Moabu bari aha nyambukiro za Arunooni," 
Isaiah16:3 Nibagira bati: Tuhe obwengye, ocwe emanja z'oburyo; Omu mushana gw'eihangwe otubeere ekibunda kibe nka nyekiro; Osherekye encuubwa, kandi otareebya abacwire." 
Isaiah16:4 Encuubwa za Moabu ozirekye zigume omu nsi yaawe, Ozibeere obuhungiro aha muhwerekyerezi. Orikuhata ku ariba atakiriho, Okucwekyereza kwahweireho, Kandi n'orikuribatiirira abantu atakireebwa mu nsi," 
Isaiah16:5 Obwo ekitebe ky'obugabe kuryahamibwa omu kugirirwa embabazi, Habeho owaakishutamaho omu mazima omu ihema rya Daudi, Omuramuzi orikucwa emanja omu bwinganisa, Kandi orikurahuka kukora eby'okuhikiirira." 
Isaiah16:6 Tukahurira eby'amaryo ga Moabu, Ku arikwekunika munonga; Emyekuniko ye, amaryo ge, n'orubwa rwe; Kwonka okwehimbisa kwe n'okwa busha." 
Isaiah16:7 Nikyo Abamoabu bariboroogyera, Buri muntu akacurira Moabu. Muryaririra ebiihuro by'emizaabibu Ya Kiruharaseesi, mushobererwa kimwe." 
Isaiah16:8 Ahabw'okuba emisiri ya Heshibooni, N'omuzaabibu gwa Sibuma, bihotokire; Abategyeki b'amahanga bacwire amataagi gaagwo Agaabaire gahikire Yazeri, gakaregyera n'omu ihamba, Kandi gukagaba agandi mataagi agaabugire hoona, Gakambuka n'enyanja." 
Isaiah16:9 Nikyo ndikuriririra omuzaabibu gwa Sibuma Nk'oku aba Yazeri barikuguririra. Iwe Heshibooni na Eleale, Ndyakushukaho amarira gangye; Ahabw'okuba ebijuma byawe by'omu kyanda n'eby'omu ishaaruura ryawe, Bibairemu enduuru z'engamba." 
Isaiah16:10 Okushemererwa n'okwesiima biihirwe Omu misiri erikwera munonga; Omu misiri y'emizaabibu tibakyeshongoreramu byeshongoro, N'obu kwakuba okuteera akaari. Tihakibamu munyuuki wa viinyo orikunyuukira omubwato, N'akaari k'abanyuuki tikakihurirwa." 
Isaiah16:11 N'ahabw'ekyo omutima gwangye nigucurira Moabu nk'enagna y'omu rufu, Kandi n'omu nda yangye ninsaasibwa Kiriheresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Kandi Moabu ku ariija omu mwanya mukuru gw'okuramizamu kweyoreka, n'obu aryerusya akaza omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera kushaba, taine ki ariihamu." 
Isaiah16:13 Ekyo nikyo kigambo eki MUKAMA yaagambire ira ahari Moabu. 
Isaiah16:14 Kwonka hati MUKAMA naagira ati: Omu myaka eshatu nk'ey'orikukorera ebihembo, ekitiinisa kya Moabu, n'obu araabe aine eihe rihango munonga, kiryagaywa, kandi abarihonokaho baryaba bakye munonga abataine maani." 
Isaiah17:1 Ebi nabi yaahanwire ahari Damasiko. Reeba, Damasiko teriba rurembo bundi, Kureka eryaba emituumo y'ebisheenyuka." 
Isaiah17:2 Endembo za Aroeri ziryaba ebifurukwa, Zibe amariisizo g'amasyo agaribyamamu, Hatagire kyagakanga." 
Isaiah17:3 Omuri Efuraimu ebigo biryamarwaho, Na Damasiko terigaruka kuba bugabe, N'Abasiria abarihonokaho baryaba nk'ekitiinisa ky'Abaisraeli; Nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Isaiah17:4 Eryo izooba ekitiinisa kya Yakobo kiryabaganuka, N'okugomoka kwe kuryatuuba ahoroote." 
Isaiah17:5 Kiryaba nk'omugyesi oku agyesha oburo bwezire, Omukono gwe gukagyesha obushiisha, Kandi nk'orikuhumba oburo omu ruhita rwa Reefa." 
Isaiah17:6 Kwonka haryatsigaramu eby'okuhumba Nk'ebitsigara omu mutiini gutengyetsiibwe, Ebijuma bishatu nari bibiri ha itaagi eririkukira agandi aha mutwe; Kandi ebijuma bitaano nari bina aha mataagi ag'omu mbaju zaagwo agarikwana munonga; Nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba." 
Isaiah17:7 Eryo izooba abantu baryata omutima aha Muhangi waabo, amaisho bagahangye Orikwera wa Israeli;" 
Isaiah17:8 tibarita mutima ha matambiro agaayombiekirwe emikono yaabo, kandi amaisho tibarigahanga Ashera nari ebishushani by'eizooba, ebi baakozire n'engaro zaabo." 
Isaiah17:9 Eryo izooba endembo zaabo ezigumire ziryaba nk'ebifurukwa by'Abahiivi n'Abaamori, ebi baafurukiremu nibahunga Abaisraeli, haza habe amatongo." 
Isaiah17:10 Ahabw'okuba mukeebwa Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwanyu, Kandi timwaijuka Rukiri obuhungiro bwanyu, N'ahabw'ekyo n'obu muraabyare emiti y'okweshemeza, mukagibyaraho engurukira ezirikuruga ahandi," 
Isaiah17:11 N'obu mwakugimeza aha izooba eri mwagibyariraho, Mukagireetera kurabya omuri ako kasheeshe, Kwonka eishoroma ryayo riryabura aha izooba ry'enaku n'obusaasi obutarikutuuza." 
Isaiah17:12 Ai bambe, hurira okuhoorera kw'abantu bainti! Nibahoorera nk'okuhoorera kw'enyanja. Ai bambe okurigita kw'amahanga! Nigarigita nk'okurigita kw'amaizi g'amaani." 
Isaiah17:13 Amahanga nigarigira nk'okurigita kw'amaizi maingi; Kwonka We aryagakabukira, agahungire hare, Gabingwe nk'ebishushunga ebirikutwarwa omuyaga aha mutwe gw'ebibungo, Kandi nk'omucuucu ogurikutuumuurwa akasooroora." 
Isaiah17:14 Reeba, omu mwabazyo buryaba buri obwoba, Kandi butakaseesire baryaba batakiriho! Ogwo nigwo mugabo gw'abarikutunyaga, Kandi ebyo nibyo birihika aha barikutwambura." 
Isaiah18:1 Ai bambe, iwe nsi erikuhooreza amapapa 'we, Eya seeri y'omugyera gwa Esiopia," 
Isaiah18:2 Etuma entumawa, zikaraba omu nyanja Nizigyendera aha maizi omu bwato bw'ebifunjo! Mwirooko, imwe ntumwa z'amaguru 'mwe, Muze omu ihanga ry'abantu baraingwa, ab'omubiri gurikuterera, Eritiinwa aba haihi n'aba hare, Eihanga ery'amaani eriribatiirira agandi, Eri ensi yaaryo etaanisiibwe emigyera." 
Isaiah18:3 Imwe batuuzi b'omu nsi 'mwe mwena, Abatuura omu nsi yoona, Orurango ku ruriimukibwa aha bibungo, mureebe! Kandi n'enzamba ku eriteerwa, muhurire!" 
Isaiah18:4 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA angambiire naagira ati: Ndyayegumira omu mwanya gwangye nindeeba, Nk'akashana kaamara embeho ahansi, Nk'orume rw'omu bunaku bw'omushana gw'eishaaruura." 
Isaiah18:5 N'ahabw'ekyo eishaaruura ritakahikire, orurabyo rwaragaire, Emizaabibu etakahiisize, Amataagi mato aryagashariza oruhabyo, N'amataagi gatagwize agatemeho." 
Isaiah18:6 Goona garyatsigarira amahungu g'omu nshozi N'enyamaishwa z'omu nsi. amahungu garyagaraaramu omu kyanda, n'enyamaishwa z'omu nsi zoona zigatuuremu omu itumba." 
Isaiah18:7 Omuri obwo bunaku baryareetera MUKAMA ow'amahe emitoijo erikutoijwa abantu baraingwa, kandi ab'emibiri erikuterera, eihanga eririkutiinwa aba haihi n'aba hare, ery'amaani eririkuribatiirira, eri ensi yaaryo etaanisiibwe emigyera, bagireete aha rushozi Saayuuni, omwanya gw'eiziina rya MUKAMA ow'amahe." 
Isaiah19:1 Ebi nabi yaahanwire ahari Misri. Reeba MUKAMA aheekirwe ekicu kirikwiruka Naaza Misri; Ebishushani bya Misri ebirikuramibwa biryatetemera omu maisho ge, emitima y'Abanyamisri ebahwe omunda." 
Isaiah19:2 Ndyateerana Abanyamisri barwane, Buri muntu arwane na mwene ishe, Kandi buri muntu arwane na mutaahi we, Orurembo rurwane n'orundi, N'obugabe burwane n'obundi." 
Isaiah19:3 Abanyamisri emitima eryabahwa omunda, Naanye nyite enaama zaabo, Baraguze aha bishushani ebirikuramibwa, Abarogi, abafumu, n'abarikugambisa emizimu;" 
Isaiah19:4 Abanyamisri mbaheyo omu mikono y'omutegyeki w'omwaga, Kandi bategyekwe omugabe enshaarizi; Nikwo Mukama, MUKAMA ow'amahe, arikugamba." 
Isaiah19:5 Amaizi g'enyanja garyayoma, N'omugyere gwome, guhweho," 
Isaiah19:6 Emikura yaagwo enuukye, N'amaizi g'otugyera twa Misri gaijururukye, goome, Ebifunjo n'emibimbiri bijunde, bihweho." 
Isaiah19:7 amariisizo ga Nailo ag'aha nkungu zaayo, N'ebihingirwe byona biryayoma, Bihweho, birekye kugaruka kureebwa." 
Isaiah19:8 Abategi b'eby'enyanja abarikutegyesa amarobo omuri Nailo boona Baryacura, baboroogye; N'abarikutegyesa obutimba omu maizi gaayo baryacweka entegye." 
Isaiah19:9 Abakozi ba furakisi eshemeziibwe baryashoberwa Hamwe n'abaruki b'emyenda ya pamba erikwera. 
Isaiah19:10 Abaabaire bari enyomyo za Misri baryahendagurika, N'abarikukorera ebihembo boona baryagira obusaasi." 
Isaiah19:11 Abanyiginya ba Zoani n'abashema buzima, N'abahi b'obwengye ba Faraho nibamuha enaama z'obushema. Noobaasa ota kugira Faraho oti: Ndi omwana w'omunyabwengye, Mwijukuru w'abagabe ba ira?" 
Isaiah19:12 Mbwenu abanyabwengye baawe barahi? Nibakugambire, bakumanyise Eki MUKAMA ow'amahe amaririire kukora Misri." 
Isaiah19:13 Abanyiginya ba Zoani bahindukire abashema, N'aba Noofu babeihabeihirwe; Kandi nibo bahabize Misri, Haza kunu bari enyomyo z'enganda zaayo." 
Isaiah19:14 MUKAMA ataire omuri Misri omwoyo gw'okurabanamu, Baagireetera kugwererana omu bi erikukora byona, Nk'oku omusinzi agwererana naatanaka." 
Isaiah19:15 Kandi Misri terigira murimo gwona ogwakorwa, Ogwakukozirwe omutwe nari ekibunu, Amataagi g'emikindo nari ekibingo." 
Isaiah19:16 Eryo izooba Abanyamisri baryaba nk'abakazi, batetemesibwe obwoba oburikureetwa omukono gwa MUKAMA ow'amahe, ogu ababangiire." 
Isaiah19:17 Ensi ya Yuda eryaba ekirikutiinisa Abanyamisri; omuntu weena origigambirwa aryatiina, ahabw'eki MUKAMA ow'amahe amaririire kukora, ngu abarwanise." 
Isaiah19:18 Omuri obwo bunaku haryabaho endembo itaano ezirikugamba orurimi rw'Abanyakanaani, zikarahira MUKAMA ow'amahe. Rumwe ahari ezo ruryayetwa Orurembo rw'okuhwerekyerera." 
Isaiah19:19 Eryo izooba haryabaho eitambiro eryombekyeirwe MUKAMA ahagati omu nsi ya Misri, kandi n'enyomyo eribyarirwa MUKAMA aha mwatano gwayo." 
Isaiah19:20 Eryaba akamanyiso n'ekirikuhamya MUKAMA ow'amahe omu nsi ya Misri. Ku baritakira MUKAMA ahabw'abarikubahata, aryabooherereza omujuni w'okubarwanirira, abajune." 
Isaiah19:21 Obwo aryamanywa omuri Misri, n'Abanyamisri baramumanya, bamuramye nibamutambira ebitambo, n'okumuhongyera empongano, kandi bamuraganise, bahikiirize ebi baamuraganiise." 
Isaiah19:22 Kandi MUKAMA aryarwanisa Misri; omu kubarwanisa abaite kandi abatambire, bwanyima bagarukye ahari MUKAMA; kandi aryahurira okweshengyereza kwabo, abatambire." 
Isaiah19:23 Omu bunaku obwo haryabaho omuhanda rugyendwa okuruga Misri okuhika Asiria; Abaasiria baze Asiria, baramye hame nabo." 
Isaiah19:24 Kandi obwo Abaisraeli, Abanyamisri na Abaasiria bonshatu baryakwatanisa, bagume nibahaisa ensi omugisha;" 
Isaiah19:25 ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ow'amahe abahaire omugisha naagira ati: Misri abantu bangye, Asiria ei emikono yangye yaahangire, na Israeli obuhunguzi bwangye baheebwe omugisha." 
Isaiah20:1 Omu mwaka ogu Tarutaani, owaatumiirwe Sarugooni omugabe wa Asiria, yaiziiremu Ashidoodi, akagirwanisa, akagikwata," 
Isaiah20:2 omu bunaku obwo MUKAMA akagambira Isaaya mwene Amozi, ati: Irooko, oyezirikuurure ebiguniya, ojuure enkaito. Nawe nikwo yaakozire, akagyenda ajwaire busha, kandi ataine nkaito." 
Isaiah20:3 MUKAMA akagira ati: Nk'oku omwiru wangye Isaaya amazire emyaka eshatu naagyenda ajwaire busha kandi ataine nkaito, okubeera Misri na Esiopia akamanyiso n'eky'okutangaaza," 
Isaiah20:4 nikwo n'omugabe wa Asiria aritwara Abanyamisri bari enkwatwa, n'Abaesiopia bari encuubwa, abato n'abakuru, bakagyenda bajwaire busha, bataine nkaito, ebibunu biri aheeru, kuhemura Misri." 
Isaiah20:5 Bwanyima abo abaabaire bataire amatsiko ahari Esiopia, nibeehimbisiza ahari Misri, baryahahaaza emitima, bashoberwe." 
Isaiah20:6 Eryo izooba abatuuzi b'omuri egi nsi y'aha rubaju rw'enyanja baryagira bati: Mbwenu, abu twabaire tutaireho amatsiko, tukabahungiraho ngu batujune omugabe wa Asiria, ku baraabe babaire batyo, itwe turyakira tuta?" 
Isaiah21:1 Ebi nabi yaahanwire aha ihamba ry'aha rubaju rw'enyanja. Nk'akasooroora k'omuri Negebu oku kagyenda nikasingoorera, Nikwo ebyahanwirwe ebyo biruga omu ihamba, omu nsi rikutiinisa." 
Isaiah21:2 Nyorekirwe okworekwa kw'obusaasi; Omunyagi naanyaga, Omuhwerekyerezi naahwerekyereza. Iwe Ealmu, hurura, Naiwe Media, obagote. amaganya goona agu yaareetsire ngamazireho." 
Isaiah21:3 N'ahabw'ekyo nyine obusaasi bw'okuunyita; Ninshaasha munonga nk'omukazi orikurumwa; Obusaasi nibunzibira kuhurira, N'okuhahaaza omutima nikunzibira kureeba." 
Isaiah21:4 Obwengye bwampwamu, ebirikutiinisa byanyitsya obwoba, Akairima aku nyetegyere kandugiramu okutetema." 
Isaiah21:5 Abantu nibatebeekanisa gye emeeza, Nibaara emikyeeka, Nibarya kandi nibanywa. Mwimukye, imwe banyiginya 'mwe, Musiigye amajuta aha ngabo!" 
Isaiah21:6 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akangira ati: Irooko, oteho omurinzi, Agume agambe eki araareebe." 
Isaiah21:7 Ku araareebe omutwe gw'abantu Abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi babiri-babiri, Abarikugyendera aha ndogoya n'aha ngamira, Ahurire ataireho omutima, Ataireho omutima munonga." 
Isaiah21:8 Bwanyima owaareebire yaagamba munonga ati: Ai MUKAMA, obutoosha nyomushana Nyemerera aha munaara gw'abarinzi, Kandi buri kiro nguma omu mwanya ogu ntairweho." 
Isaiah21:9 Kandi reeba, nihaija omutwe gw'abantu Abatembire embaraasi babiri-babiri! Yaagarukamu ati: Babulooni egwire! Babulooni egwire! N'ebishushani bya baaruhanga baayo byona byahendagurika." 
Isaiah21:10 Iwe muntu wangye 'we, ou mpirwe, nkaheheeza, Ebi mpuriire MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli nangambira, Nibyo ndikukugambira." 
Isaiah21:11 Ebi nabi yaahanwire ahari Duma. Hariho orikuunyeta naayema Seiri, naagira ati: Iwe murinzi 'we, ekiro kyahika hi! Iwe murinzi 'we, ekiro kyahika hi?" 
Isaiah21:12 Omurinzi nawe yangarukamu ati: Nibuza kusheesha, kandi kwira. Ku muraabe nimwenda kwehanuuza, mwehanuuze; Muhindukye, mwije." 
Isaiah21:13 Ebi nabi yaahanwire ahari Buharabu. Imwe emitwe y'Abadedani erikuhingura, Muryaraara omu bishaka bya Buharabu." 
Isaiah21:14 Imwe abatwire omu nsi ya Teema, Nimureetere abaine eiriho amaizi, Abarikucwa mubabuganise eby'okurya;" 
Isaiah21:15 Ahakuba bahungire zaarurara, Zaarurara ezisyoirweyo, Amata agareegire, N'ahu orugamba ruhamire." 
Isaiah21:16 Ahakuba oku nikwo Mukama arikungambira naagira ati: Omwaka gutakahweireho, nk'emyaka y'orikukorera ebihembo oku eri, ekitiinisa kya Kedari kiryahwaho," 
Isaiah21:17 kandi n'abaritsigara aha barasi, abashaija rugambwa aba Kedari, baryaba mbarwa; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli niwe akigambire." 
Isaiah22:1 Ebi nabi yaahanwire aha ruhanga rw'okworekyerwamu. Mbwenu obaire ota, n'abantu baawe boona? Ka muri aha mitwe y'amaju," 
Isaiah22:2 Iwe rurembo rwijwire oruyombo 'we, Orujagaraire, orurikwesiima! Abantu baawe abaitsirwe ka bataitsirwe na rurara, Kandi ka batagwire ha rugamba!" 
Isaiah22:3 Abategyeki baawe boona bahungiire hamwe, Baakwatwa bateerwaineho; Abantu baawe, ahu bashangirwe hoona, baakwatwa. N'obu baraabe babaire bahungiire hare." 
Isaiah22:4 Nikyo ngiriire nti: Muunyiheho amaisho. Mundekye, ndire munonga, Muteerusya kwenda kummara obusaasi, Obu nyine ahabw'eihanga ryangye erinyagirwe." 
Isaiah22:5 Ahakuba n'eizooba ery'okujagarara, eery'okuribatiirirwaho, Ery'okushoberererwaho omu ruhanga rw'okworekyerwamu, Erirugire ahari Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe, Ery'okusheenyeraho engo z'amabaare, Kandi n'ery'okuboroogyeraho nibatakira ebibungo." 
Isaiah22:6 Aba Elamu bahagatiire emitana, Baija n'ebigaari n'abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi, N'aba Kiiri baashohoza engabo." 
Isaiah22:7 Empita zaawe ezirikukira oburungi ziijwire ebigaari, N'abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi babambiire amarembo." 
Isaiah22:8 Yaihaho ekyabaire kikingiire Yuda. Ahari eryo izooba mukata amaisho aha by'okurwanisa by'omu nju y'ekibira," 
Isaiah22:9 Mwareeba emyanya y'omu rugo rw'orurembo rwa Daudi esheenyukire eri mingi; mwateeranira hamwe amaizi g'omu kiyanja kya ifo," 
Isaiah22:10 mwabara amaju ga Yerusaalemu, mwagasheenya ahabw'okugumya orugo;" 
Isaiah22:11 bwanyima amaizi g'omu kiyanja ekya ira mwagatimbira eiziba ahagati y'engo zombi. Kwonka timwaijuka owaakozire ebyo, n'obu kwakuba okweta aha Waateekateekire ira ku bibaho." 
Isaiah22:12 Eryo izooba Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe Akeeta abantu ngu barire, baboroogye, Bamwe enkomborora, kandi bajware ebiguniya." 
Isaiah22:13 Mbwenu reeba, n'okushemererwa, n'okunanuka, N'okwita ente n'entaama, N'okurya enyama n'okunywa viinyo, Nimugira muti: Reka tweriire, twenywere, ahakuba nyencakare turi ab'okufa." 
Isaiah22:14 MUKAMA ow'amahe yaanyeyoreka, nangambira omu kutu ati: Buzimazima okutahikiirira oku timurikusaasirwa Okuhitsya obu murifa; Nikwo Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Isaiah22:15 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Irooko oze ow'ogwo mubiiki, Shebuna, orikutegyeka eby'omuri nyaruju, omubuuze oti:" 
Isaiah22:16 Nookora ki aha; kandi aha oineho oha, waaza kwetimbira aha ekituuro, iwe orikukyetimbira omu mwanya gw'ahaiguru, okeekorera aha'okutuura omu rukiri?" 
Isaiah22:17 Iwe mushaija w'amaani 'we, reeba, MUKAMA aryakujuguta n'amaani; aryakukwata, akuhamye," 
Isaiah22:18 akuzongoze, akurekyere nk'omupiira, akungaye omu nsi egarami; okwo niyo origwa, n'ebigaari byawe by'ekitiinisa niyo biriguma, iwe orikuhemura enju ya mukama waawe." 
Isaiah22:19 Ndyakubinga omu murimo gwawe, ogarurwe ahansi orugye omu bukuru bwawe." 
Isaiah22:20 Eryo izooba ndyayeta omwiru wangye Eliakimu mwene Hilukia," 
Isaiah22:21 mmujwekye ekanzu yaawe, mmuzirikye orukoba rwawe, n'obushoboorozi bwawe mbumuhe; kandi aryaba ishe w'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, n'ab'enju ya Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Ekishumuruzo ky'enju ya Daudi ndyakita aha ibega rye. Niwe ariigura, hatagire waakinga, kandi arikinga, hatagire waigura." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndyamuteererera omu mwanya guhamire nk'enkondo, abeere enju ya ishe ekitebe ky'ekitiinisa," 
Isaiah22:24 bamuhanikyeho oburemeezi bwona obw'enju ya ishe, ab'enda ye n'oruzaaro rwe, ebintu byona ebikye, okwiha aha bikopo okuhika aha nnywero zoona." 
Isaiah22:25 Kandi MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Eryo izooba egyo nkondo, eyaateerereirwe omu mwanya oguhamire, eryakuuka, etemwe, egwe; n'ebibaire bigihanikirweho biihweho; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA niwe akigambire." 
Isaiah23:1 Ebi nabi yaahanwire ahari Tuuro. Imwe meeri za Tarushiishi 'mwe, nimuboroogye, Ahabw'okuba Tuuro ecwekyereziibwe, tihaatsigara nju nari nyambukiro! Ebyo biboorekirwe nibiruga omu nsi ya Kitimu." 
Isaiah23:2 Imwe abatwire aha mbaju z'enyanja, Abaabaire batungisibwa abashuubuzi ba Sidoni, Abarikuraba omu nyanja, nimuhuname!" 
Isaiah23:3 Eby'okurya baya Shihoori, n'ebishaaruurwa bya Nailo, Nibyo byabaire bibareetera amagoba. Okwo niyo akatare k'amahanga kaabaire kari." 
Isaiah23:4 Iwe Sidoni, gira enshoni; ahabw'okuba enyanja yaagamba, Nikyo kigo kyayo, neegira eti: Tinkarumwaga, tinkazaaraga, Tinkontsyaga baana b'aboojo, N'obu kwakuba okworora abaishiki." 
Isaiah23:5 Enkuru ya Tuuro ku erihika Misri, Baryagigirira obusaasi." 
Isaiah23:6 Imwe abatwire aha mbaju z'enyanja, Nimwambukye, muze Tarushiishi, mucure!" 
Isaiah23:7 Beitu shi, oru nirwo rurembo rwanyu ruri Orwabaire rwesiima orwa ira ryona, Oru abantu baamwo baabaire bakunda kuza hare kutuurayo?" 
Isaiah23:8 N'oha owaamaririire kukora eki, Kurwanisa Tuuro, haza ruri orurembo orwabaire rwemeka abagabe, N'abatuuzi baarwo bari ab'ekitiinisa omu nsi?" 
Isaiah23:9 MUKAMA ow'amahe niwe akimaririire, Ngu abone kugayisa amaryo g'ekitiinisa kyona, N'okukwatsa enshoni abanyakitiinisa boona ab'omu nsi." 
Isaiah23:10 Iwe Tarushiishi 'we, Shandaara omu nsi yaawe nk'omugyera Nailo, Ahabw'okuba tokiine kirikukuzibira." 
Isaiah23:11 MUKAMA agoroire omukono gwe aha nyanja, Yaatengyetsa amahanga g'abagabe, Yaagamba aha bya Kanaani naaragiira, Ngu bacwekyereze ebigo byayo eby'amaani." 
Isaiah23:12 Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Iwe Sidoni 'we, omwishiki oshugaine orikuhatwa, Tokigaruka kushemererwa; Imuka, oyambukye Kitimu, Kandi nayo, torigirirayo buhuumure." 
Isaiah23:13 Mureebe ensi y'Abakaludaaya! Tekiri ihanga. Abaasiria bakagihindura ey'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba. Bakagota Tuuro, baagyombekaho eminaara, baasheenya zaanyaruju zaayo, baagigira amatongo." 
Isaiah23:14 Imwe meeri za Tarushiishi 'mwe, mucure ahabw'okuba ekigo kyanyu kicwekyereziibwe." 
Isaiah23:15 Omu bunaku obwo Tuuro eryayeba okumara emyaka makumi mushanju, nk'emyaka ei omugabe amara aha ngoma. Egyo myaka makumi mushanju ku erihwa, ebirihika ahari Tuuro biryaba nk'ebiri omu kyeshongoro kya maraaya, ekirikugira kiti:" 
Isaiah23:16 Iwe maraaya waayebire 'we, Twara enanga, ogyendagyende omu rurembo! Ogiteere, ogijumeeze, Oyeshongore ebyeshongoro bingi, obone kwijukwa." 
Isaiah23:17 Bwanyima y'egyo myaka makumi mushanju MUKAMA aryataayaayira Tuuro, eryagaruka aha bushuubuzi bwayo, eshambane n'amahanga g'abagabe b'omu nsi zoona." 
Isaiah23:18 Obutungi n'obushuubuzi bwayo buryayerezibwa MUKAMA; tiburibiikwa, tiburiteebwa hangahari nk'obw'engumya, kureka buryaheebwa abatuura omu maisho ga MUKAMA, ngu babone kurya n'okuhaaga, kandi babone ebijwaro ebirikuterera." 
Isaiah24:1 Reeba, MUKAMA aryahwerekyereza ensi, agihindure amatongo, Agijuumikye, ataataanise abagitwiremu." 
Isaiah24:2 Kandi ebirihika aha bantu b'obutoosha, nibyo birihika n'aha banyamurwa; Ebirihika aha muhuuku, nibyo birihika ahari mukama we; Ebirihika aha muzaana, nibyo birihika ahari mugore we; Ebirihika aha muguzi, nibyo birihika aha mutunzi; Ebirihika aha muntu orikukuguza abandi, nibyo birihika aha muntu orikweguza; Ebirihika aha muntu orikwihuza, nibyo birihika n'aha muntu orikwihuzibwa." 
Isaiah24:3 Ensi eryacwekyerezibwa, enyagirwe kimwe, Ahakuba MUKAMA niwe agambire ekigambo eki." 
Isaiah24:4 Ensi neeganya, neehotoka, Ensi yoona ehweire amaani, neehotoka; Abeekuniki b'omu nsi bahweire amaani." 
Isaiah24:5 Ensi esiisirwe abagitwiremu, Ahabw'okuba basiisire ekiragiro, baihireho ebyatairweho, Baita endagaano etahwaho." 
Isaiah24:6 Nikyo omukyeeno guhereizeho ensi, N'abatuuzi baamwo bakasingwa orubanja; N'ahabw'ekyo abagitwiremu bookiibwe, baatsigara mbarwa." 
Isaiah24:7 Viinyo neeganya, omuzaabibu guruhire, Ab'emitima eshemereirwe nibatsinda." 
Isaiah24:8 Okusheka kw'abarikuteera enjogyera kucecekire, Akaari k'abarikushemererwa kahunamire, N'okushemererwa okurikureetwa enanga kuhweireho." 
Isaiah24:9 Tibarigauka kunywa viinyo nibeeshongora, Ebirikusinza biryashaarira abarikubinywa." 
Isaiah24:10 Orurembo orubaire rujagaraire rusheenyukire, Amaju goona gakingire, ngu hatagira owaataahamu." 
Isaiah24:11 Nibaboroogyera omu nguuto ahabw'okubura viinyo; Ahu okushemererwa kubaire kuri, mbwenu n'ekizima; Okwesiima kw'omu nsi kuhweireho." 
Isaiah24:12 Orurembo tirutsigairwemu kindi kureka amatongo, amarembo gaarwo gasheenyirwe, gaacwekyerezibwa." 
Isaiah24:13 N'ahabw'ekyo okwo nikwo biriba aha mahanga g'omu nsi; Garyaba nk'omutiini ogurikutegyetsiba, Nari nk'oku bahumba emizaabibu, eishaaruura rihweire." 
Isaiah24:14 Baryaimutsya amaraka gaabo, beeshongore ahabw'okushemererwa, Ab'oburengyerwa-izooba bateere akaari ahabw'ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA." 
Isaiah24:15 N'ahabw'ekyo imwe ab'oburugwa-izooba, muhimbise MUKAMA, Naimwe abatwire aha mbaju z'enyanja, Musiime eiziina rya MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
Isaiah24:16 Naitwe nituhurira ebyeshongoro by'eokuhimbisa, nibiruga aha muheru gw'ensi, Nibasiima Ogwo orikwera munonga. Kwonka nyowe ningira nti: Ai bambe, ka naareeba! Mpweire aha magufa! Mpweire aha magufa! Ahabw'okuba abarikureebya bareebize; Buzimazima abarikureebya bareebize munonga." 
Isaiah24:17 Iwe otwire omu nsi, Obwoba, ekiina n'omutego bikuriho!" 
Isaiah24:18 Orikuhunga orwari rw'ebirikutiinisa Naija kugwa omu kiina; Kandi orikutemba kuruga omu kiina Naija kukwatwa omutego, Ahabw'okuba amadirisa g'eiguru gaigwire, n'emisingi y'ensi neetetema." 
Isaiah24:19 Ensi eyatikire kimwe, Ensi eyabiire kimwe, Ensi etengyetsiibwe munonga." 
Isaiah24:20 Ensi neegwererana nk'omusinzi, Neezonga nk'akaju; Okushiisha kwayo kugihingamiire, Neija kugwa, kandi teriimuka bundi." 
Isaiah24:21 Eryo izooba MUKAMA aryafubira amahe g'ahaiguru omu iguru N'abagabe b'ahansi omu nsi; 
Isaiah24:22 Baryateeranirwa hamwe nk'oku embohe ziteeranirwa omu kiina; Baryakingiranwa omu nju y'ekihome, Kandi ku ahrihinguraho ebiro bingi, baryafubirwa." 
Isaiah24:23 Obwo okwezi kuryashoberwa, N'eizooba riryakwatwa enshoni, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ow'amahe arytegyekyera Aha rushozi Saayuuni n'omuri Yerusaalemu, Kandi aryayoreka ekitiinisa kye Omu maisho g'abantu be abakuru." 
Isaiah25:1 Ai MUKAMA, niwe Ruhanga wangye; Ndyakuhimbisa, nsingize eiziina ryawe, ahabw'okuba okozire eby'okutangaaza, Ebi waateekateekire ira kukora omu bwesigwa n'amazima." 
Isaiah25:2 Ahakuba orurembo oruhindwire orubungo, Orurembo orwehinguririziibwe orugo rw'amabaare oruhindwire amatongo. Ekikaari ky'abanyamahanga tikikiba rurembo, Kandi tikirigaruka kwombekwa bundi." 
Isaiah25:3 Nikyo eihanga ry'amaani ririkuheera ekitiinisa, Endembo z'amahanga agataine saasi zikakutiina." 
Isaiah25:4 Omworo n'omukyene okababeera ekigo kigumire omu kushoberwa kwabo, Waababeera obwegamo bw'eihunga n'ekicuucu ky'okubatambira omushana; ahabw'okuba abataine saasi babateera, nk'oku eihunga riteera orugo, Nari nk'omushana gw'amaani omu nsi eyomire." 
Isaiah25:5 Niiwe ocureeza enduuru z'abanyamahanga, Okahunamya ebyevugo by'abataine saasi, Nk'oku omushana gwikaikanisibwa ekibunda ky'ekicu." 
Isaiah25:6 MUKAMA ow'amahe aryateekyera amahanga goona obugyenyi bw'eby'ebishaju ahari oru rushozi, na viinyo y'omurera, eby'ebishaju ebirimu omushokooro, na viinyo y'omurera egyegyeinwe gye." 
Isaiah25:7 Kandi ahari oru rushozi aryamariraho kimwe ekirikushweka ekishwekire enganda zoona, n'eky'okwetwekyerera ekisangiire amahanga goona." 
Isaiah25:8 Kandi Mukama RUHANGA aryamirira kimwe rufu, aragaze amarira aha maisho goona, n'ekijumo eki barikujuma abantu be akiihe aha nsi yoona; ahakuba MUKAMA niwe akigambire." 
Isaiah25:9 Eryo izooba baryagira bati: Reeba, Ogu niwe Ruhanga waitu, tutuura tumutegyereize, ngu atujune; Ogu niwe MUKAMA tutuura tumutegyereize; ka tushemererwe, twesiimire okujuna kwe;" 
Isaiah25:10 ahakuba omukono gwa MUKAMA guryaguma ahari oru rushozi, kandi Moabu eryaribatiiririrwa omu mwanya gwayo, nk'oku baribatiirira embuba omu kiina ky'amasha." 
Isaiah25:11 Kandi Moabu eryanagiramu emikono, nk'oku orikuziha anaga emikono naaziha; kwonka MUKAMA aryamucwa amaryo, amumaremu obuhangu bw'engaro ze," 
Isaiah25:12 kandi ebigo bye by'eminaara ebyombekirwe aha ngo z'amabaare ez'endembo ze, aryabisheenya, abihigure, abikumbagaze ahansi, bihikire kimwe omu mucuucu." 
Isaiah26:1 Eryo izooba ekyeshongoro eki kiryayeshongorerwa omu nsi ya Yuda, nibagira bati: Twine orurembo rugumire, Ruhanga naataho okujunwa Kuba orugo rwarwo orw'okurukingira." 
Isaiah26:2 Nimwigure amarembo, Eihanga erihikiriire, kandi eririkwesigwa, ribone kutaahamu." 
Isaiah26:3 Omuntu orikukwegyekyerera omutima gwe, Oryamurindira omu busingye buzima, Ahabw'okuba naakwesiga." 
Isaiah26:4 Mwesigye MUKAMA ebiro byona, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Yehova n'orukiri rutahwaho." 
Isaiah26:5 Niwe agarwire ahansi abatuura omu rurembo orurikwetunguura; Yaarugarura ahansi, yaaruhitsya aha itaka, Yaarunaga omu mucuucu." 
Isaiah26:6 Ebigyere biryaruribatiirira, Eby'abooro n'eby'abakyene." 
Isaiah26:7 Omuhanda gw'abahikiriire gutebeekaine, Kandi Iwe ohikiriire, niiwe ohabura abahikiriire omuhanda." 
Isaiah26:8 Ai MUKAMA, tutuura tukutegyereize Omu muhanda gw'ebiragiro byawe; Emitima yaitu neeyetenga eiziina ryawe n'okukwijuka." 
Isaiah26:9 Omutima gwangye nigukugirira orushusho nyekiro, Omwoyo oguri omuriinye nigwezirika kukusherura; Ahabw'okuba ebiragiro byawe ku biba biri omu nsi, Abagitwiremu beega eby'okuhikiirira." 
Isaiah26:10 Omubi n'obu akorerwa eby'embabazi Tayega by'okuhikiirira; N'omu nsi y'okuhikiirira akoreramu kubi, Kandi tareeba bukuru bwa MUKAMA." 
Isaiah26:11 Ai MUKAMA, omukono gwawe gubangire, Kwonka tibarikugureeba. Ka bareebe obweziriki obu oiniire abantu baawe, baitwe enshoni, Abazigu baawe omuriro gubamareho." 
Isaiah26:12 MUKAMA, niiwe orituteeraho obusingye, Ahabw'okuba emirimo yaitu yoona, niiwe ogitukorera." 
Isaiah26:13 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, Abandi bagabe abatari Iwe nabo bakatutegyeka, Kwonka eiziina ryawe ryonka niryo turikumanya." 
Isaiah26:14 Abo bakafa, tibarigaruka kubaho; Bakaba emizimu, tibarizooka; Nikyo waabateereire okabacwekyereza, Okatsibyatsibya okwijukwa kwabo kwona." 
Isaiah26:15 Ai MUKAMA, okanyiise eihanga ryaitu, Okanyiise eihanga, waaheebwa ekitiinisa, Kandi wairizayo emyatano yaaryo yoona." 
Isaiah26:16 Ai MUKAMA, ku baabaire bari omu busaasi noobahana, Bakakusherura, baakushaba n'emitima yaabo yoona." 
Isaiah26:17 Nk'omukazi oine enda, ou obunaku bwe buhikire, Oku arumwa, akaamuza omu kushaasha kwe, MUKAMA, naitwe nikwo twabaire turi omu maisho gaawe." 
Isaiah26:18 Tukaba twine enda, twarumwa, Twaba nk'abazaire omuyaga. Titwareetera nsi yaitu kujunwa, Kandi abatuuzi b'omu nsi tibakagwaga." 
Isaiah26:19 Abantu baawe abaafiire bayaba abahuriire, Emitumbi yaabo ezookye. Imwe abatuura omu mucuucu, musisiimukye, Mweshongore ahabw'okushemererwa! Ahakuba orume rwawe ni nk'orume rw'aha bunyaatsi, Kandi omu nsi y'emizimu nimwo orirureka rukatonda." 
Isaiah26:20 imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, nimwije mutaahe omu bishengye byanyu, Mube mwekingirainemu akaanya kakye, Okuhitsya ahu ekiniga kiraahwere;" 
Isaiah26:21 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA naija kuruga ah'atuura, Kuhana ab'omu nsi naabatura okutahikiirira kwabo. Kandi ensi aryayoreka eshagama eyaagiseesirweho, Kandi terigaruka kushweka bantu baayo abaitsirwe." 
Isaiah27:1 Eryo izooba MUKAMA aryahana Leviasaani, egyo njoka erikuhunga, kandi enjoka erikwenyogoora, agihanise rurara ye mpango kandi ey'amaani eine obwogi; kandi aryaita ekijoka ky'omu nyanja." 
Isaiah27:2 Eryo izooba baryagira bati: Reeba, omusiri gw'emizaabibu ya viinyo! Mugweshongore." 
Isaiah27:3 Nyowe, MUKAMA, niinye murinzi waagwo; Ndyaguma ngushukyeere amaizi buri mwanya, Kandi ngurinde nyomushana na nyekiro, Ngu hatagira owaagushiisha." 
Isaiah27:4 Tiinyine kiniga; Kwonka emikwatangwe n'amahwa ku byakwija kundwanisa, Nkaabirwanisa, mbyotsya hamwe byona." 
Isaiah27:5 Nari bankwate amaguru ngu mbarinde, Babone kugira obusingye naanye; Kandi bayabugira." 
Isaiah27:6 Ebiro ebiriija Yakobo aryatsimba emizi, Israeli aryatooka, arabye ebirabyo, Kandi baryabuzya ensi yoona ebijuma." 
Isaiah27:7 Beitu abateire nk'oku yaateire abo abaabateire? Nari shi baitsirwe, nk'oku abaabaitsire baitsirwe?" 
Isaiah27:8 Omu kubacwa omu nsi yaabo, okabahana noobabarira, Aha izooba ry'omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba yaayemereza omuaga gw'eihunga." 
Isaiah27:9 N'ahabw'ekyo ebyo nibyo birireetera Yakobo kwihwaho okutahikiirira, Kandi ebyo nibyo byana byona ebiriruga omu kumwihaho ekibi; Ku ariheza kuhindura amabaare goona ag'eitambiro Nk'amabaare g'ebisooni agahondagwirwe, Tiharitsigaraho Ashera nari ekishushani ky'eizooba kyona ekirikuramibwa kyemereire." 
Isaiah27:10 Ahakuba orurembo rw'orugo rw'amabaare n'ekifurukwa, amaju gaarwo gatsigirweho garimu busha nk'eihamba. Okwo niyo enyana ziriira, zikazaagira, Zikakonkobora amataagi gaayo." 
Isaiah27:11 Amataagi gaayo ku garyoma, garyahendwaho, Abakazi baije, bagahembe. Ahakuba eihanga eri n'eihanga eritarikwetegyereza; Nikyo Ogwo owaabahangire ataribagiririra saasi, Owaababumbire ataribagiririra mbabazi." 
Isaiah27:12 Eryo izooba MUKAMA aryahuura embibo okuruga aha mugyera Furaati okuhika aha kagyera ka Misri; naimwe Baisraeli 'mwe, muryatorotoorwa omwe omwe." 
Isaiah27:13 Eryo izooba enzamba mpango eryateerwa, abaabaire nibenda kucwekyererera omu nsi ya Asiria, n'ababingiirwe omu nsi ya Misri, baryaija, baramize MUKAMA aha rushozi orurikwera Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Ekirunga ky'amaryo g'abasinzi ba Efuraimu kiryareeba enaku, Hamwe n'orurabyo rw'oburungi bw'ekitiinisa kye orurikuhonga, Oruri aha mutwe gw'oruhanga rurikweza munonga rw'abamzirweho viinyo!" 
Isaiah28:2 Reeba, MUKAMA aine omuntu w'amaani emanzi; Aryabateera ahansi n'amaani, Nkeihunga ry'orubaare eririkucwekyereza, Nk'omwegyemure gw'amaizi maingi agashandaire munonga." 
Isaiah28:3 Ekirunga ky'amaryo g'abasinzi ba Efuraimu Kiryaribatiirirwa; 
Isaiah28:4 Kandi orurabyo rw'oburungi bw'ekitiinisa kye orurikuhonga, Oruri aha mutwe gw'oruhanga orurikweza munonga, Ruryaba nk'ekijuma ky'omutiini ekirikubanza kwera, Ekyanda kitakataahire; Omuntu ku akireeba, yaakihitsya ati omu ngaro, akirya." 
Isaiah28:5 Eryo izooba MUKAMA ow'amahe aryabeera abantu be abahonokireho Ekirunga ky'ekitiinisa, n'eihunde;" 
Isaiah28:6 N'orikucwa emanja ahsutami aha kitebe ky'eiramuriro Amubeere omwoyo gw'okucwa emanja z'oburyo, Kandi abantu abarikugarurayo abazigu bahikire omu marembo, ababeere amaani." 
Isaiah28:7 Kandi Abayuda nabo nibahabisibwa viinyo, Ebirikusinza nibibagwereranisa; Omunyamurwa na nabi nibagwereranisibwa ebirikusinza, Viinyo ebamaziremu obwengye; Nibahabisibwa ebirikusinza, Nibahaba omu kworekwa. Bateera entsibo omu kucwa emanja." 
Isaiah28:8 Emeeza zoona ziijwire entanaki n'oburofa, Tihariho hashemeire hoona." 
Isaiah28:9 (Abayuda nibatsyorera nabi bati:) Mbwenu shi, n'oha ou aryegyesa obwengye? Kandi n'oha ou arishobororera obutumwa? Noogira ngu n'encuukye ezirugire aha mabeere?" 
Isaiah28:10 Ahakuba ebye n'okwongyera ekiragiro aha kiragiro, Ekiragiro aha kindi, Omushorongo aha mushorongo, n'omushorongo aha gundi, Aha kakye, hariya kakye." 
Isaiah28:11 Tikwo; kureka abantu b'eminwa y'endugamahanga, Abarikugamba orudni rurimu, Nibo MUKAMA arigambirira mu aba bantu," 
Isaiah28:12 Abu yaagizire ati: Okwo nikwo kuhuumura; Murekye oruhire ahuumure; Kandi oku nikwo kuruhuuka. Kwonka baayanga kuhurira. 
Isaiah28:13 N'ahabw'ekyo ekigambo kya MUKAMA kiryababeera Ekiragiro aha kiragiro, ekiragiro aha kindi; Omushorongo aha mushorongo, n'omushorongo aha gundi, Aha kakye, hariya kakye, Babone kugyenda, bagwe bagarami. Bahendekye, bagwe omu mutego, bakwatwe." 
Isaiah28:14 N'ahabw'ekyo, imwe bagayi 'mwe, Abarikutegyeka aba bantu abatwire Yerusaalemu, Muhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA!" 
Isaiah28:15 Mugizire muti: Turagaine endagaano na rufu, Kandi twikirizaine n'Okuzimu; Ekibonaboneso ekirikumaraho ku kiriraba omu nsi, Tikirituhikaho, Ahabw'okuba tweboneire obuhungiro omu bishuba, Twayegama omu bugobya;" 
Isaiah28:16 Nikyo Mukama Yehova arikugirira ati: Reeba, ninta omuri Saayuuni eibaare kuba omusingi, Eibaare ry'obuhamizo bw'enju, Ery'obuguzi bwingi, kandi erihamire. Orikwikiriza tarirahukiiriza." 
Isaiah28:17 Eby'oburyo ndyabigira omugoye gw'okugyeresa, N'okuhikiirira nkugire kariisho; Orubaare ruryatwarira kimwe obwo buhungiro bw'ebishuba, N'amaizi gamareho obwo bwegamo." 
Isaiah28:18 Obwo endagaano ei mwaragaine na rufu eryafa, Kandi n'ebi mwaikirizaine n'Okuzimu tibirigumaho; Kureka ekibonaboneso ekirikumaraho, ku kiriraba omu nsi, Kiryabaribatiirira." 
Isaiah28:19 Buri kaanya ku kiriba nikirabamu, kiryabakwata; Ahakuba kiryaguma nikirabamu buri kasheeshe, Kirabemu nyomushana na nyekiro; Kandi okushoborokyerwa obutumwa kuryaba okwitsa obwoba kwonka." 
Isaiah28:20 Ahakuba ekitanda ni kigufu, omuntu tarikubaasa kukirambikiririzaho, N'eky'okweshweka n'enkyetero etarikumuhika;" 
Isaiah28:21 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aryaimuka nk'oku yaimukire aha rushozi Peraziimu, Aryagira ekiniga, nk'eki yagiriire omu ruhanga rwa Gibeoni, Abone kukora omurimo gwe, omurimo ogutari gw'obutoosha, N'okuhikiiriza ebi ashangwa atakora." 
Isaiah28:22 N'ahabw'ekyo hati murekye kugaya, Ebibakomire bitakaabariitira kimwe, Ahabw'okuba mpuriire ekiragiro ky'okucwekyereza ensi yoona, Ekirugire ahari Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe." 
Isaiah28:23 Mutegye okutu, muhurire eiraka ryangye, Muhuguukye, muhurire ebi ndikugamba!" 
Isaiah28:24 Ohingira okubiba, ahinga obutoosha? Atuura naateera amatsinde?" 
Isaiah28:25 Ku aheza kwanjara eitaka, Tabibamu oburo, n'eshogye, Akabiba engano omu mishorongo, Na sayiri akagibiba ahagishemereire, N'ebicoori aha mbibi?" 
Isaiah28:26 Ahabw'okuba ayorekyererwa gye; Ruhanga we niwe amwegyesa. 
Isaiah28:27 Oburo tibuhuuzibwa kihuuzo ky'obwogi. N'ebicoori tibihuruburwa nziga z'ekigaari, Kureka oburo buhuurwa enkoni, N'ebicoori bihuurwa ekihuuzo." 
Isaiah28:28 Nimugira ngu engano z'emigaati bazisa? Ngaaha! tibazisa, bazihuura. N'obu azirabyaho enziga z'ekigaari kye N'ebyara by'embaraasi, hoona nabwo tazisa." 
Isaiah28:29 Ekyo nakyo kiruga ahari MUKAMA ow'amahe; Niwe muhanuuzi orikutangaaza, Kandi orikukiza abantu boona obwengye." 
Isaiah29:1 Yeiwe, Arieli, Arieli, Orurembo oru Daudi yaateiremu orusiisira! Mwongyere omwaka aha mwaka, Amagyenyi gabeho omu bunaku bwago;" 
Isaiah29:2 Kwonka hoona ndyabonabonesa Arieli, Habeho okucura n'amaganya. Kandi Arieli haryambeera nk'amahega ga Ruhanga." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndyakuteeraho ensiisira embaju zoona kukurwanisa, Nkugotese eminaara, Nkutuumeho eby'okukurwanisizaho." 
Isaiah29:4 Bwanyima oryagarurwa ahansi, ogambire omu itaka, Ebigambo byawe birugye ahansi omu mucuucu, Eiraka ryawe rirugye okuzimu nk'ery'omuzimu, Rigambire mpora omu mucuucu." 
Isaiah29:5 Kwonka omutwe gw'abazigu baawe guryaba guri nk'omucuucu, N'omutwe gw'abataine saasi nk'ebishushunga birikutuntumuka. Nikwo biriba omuri ako kaanya." 
Isaiah29:6 MUKAMA ow'amahe aryabateeza okuhinda kw'enkuba, N'omutsitsa, n'endigito mpango, N'akasooroora, n'eihunga, n'ebirimi by'omuriro gurikurya busha." 
Isaiah29:7 Omutwe gw'amahanga goona agarikurwanisa Arieli, Boona abarikumurwanisa n'ekigo kye, bakamubonabonesa, Baryaba nk'ekirooto, nari nkworekwa kwa nyekiro." 
Isaiah29:8 Nk'oku omujara aroota naarya, Akasisiimuka aine enjara, Nari nk'oine eiriho oku aroota naanywa, Akasisiimuka n'ekyaka akiriinie, Okwo nikwo omutwe gw'amahanga goona Agarikurwanisa Saayuuni gariba." 
Isaiah29:9 Mwegire ebifa-mutima, mube byo! Mwehumye, mube empumi! Mwesinze, mutanyweire! Mugwererane mutanyweire birikusinza!" 
Isaiah29:10 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA abashukireho Omwoyo gw'oturo twingi, Yaahumya amaisho gaanyu, nibo baanabi, Yaatwekyerera emitwe yaanyu, nibo bahanuuzi." 
Isaiah29:11 Okworekwa kwona kubahindukiire nk'ebigambo by'omu kitabo ekikwatanisiibwe akamanyiso. Abantu ku bakiha omuntu orikumanya kushoma, baamugira bati, Kishome, abagarukamu ati: Tindikubaasa kukishoma, ahabw'okuba kikwatanisiibwe akamanyiso." 
Isaiah29:12 Kandi ku bakiha otarikumanya kushoma, baamugira bati, Kishome, abagarukamu ati: Tindikumanya kushoma." 
Isaiah29:13 Mukama yaagira ati: Abantu aba nibaanyirira haihi, Bampa ekitiinisa n'akanwa kaabo n'eminwa yaabo, Kwonka emitima yaabo endi hare, Kandi okuntiina kwabo n'ekiragiro eki baayegyesiibwe abantu." 
Isaiah29:14 N'ahabw'ekyo reeba, niinyija kukora omurimo gw'okutangaaza omuri aba bantu, Omurimo gw'eihano kandi ogurikutangaariza kimwe; Obwengye bw'abanyabwengye baabo buryahwaho, N'okwetegyereza kw'abantu baabo abarikwetegyereza kuryasherekwa." 
Isaiah29:15 Baryareeba enaku, abarukusherura munonga ah'okushereka MUKAMA enaama zaabo, Abu emirimo yaabo eri omu mwirima, Abarikugira bati: N'oha orikutureeba? Kandi bati: Orikutumanya n'oha?" 
Isaiah29:16 Ka nimumanya kucurika ebintu! Omubumbi ashemereire kwinganisibwa n'eibumba? Kikaareetera ekibumbirwe kugamba aha mubumbi kiti: Twe yambumbire; Nari shi ekyahangirwe kugamba ahari Ogwo owaakihangire Kiti: Tarikwetegyereza. 
Isaiah29:17 Timurikumanya ku hatsigaire akaanya kakye Lebanooni kuhinduka omusiri gurikweza munonga, N'omusiri gurikweza munonga kuba nk'ekibira?" 
Isaiah29:18 Eryo izooba ebifa-matu biryahurira ebigambo by'omu kitabo, N'empumi ziryahumuuka, Zikire obuhumi n'omwirima;" 
Isaiah29:19 N'abacureezi baryayeyongyera kushemerererwa omuri MUKAMA N'abooro b'omu bantu baryayesiimira Orikwera wa Israeli," 
Isaiah29:20 Ahakuba abataine saasi baryaba busha, N'abagayi baryahwaho, Kandi abarikusherura oburyo bw'okukora eby'okutahikiirira Baryamarwaho," 
Isaiah29:21 Aboomesereza omuntu ekigambo nibamubeiherera, Orikuhanira abantu omu marembo bakamutega omutego, Kandi ohikiriire bakamwimisa ekimushemereire, Nibamutura busha." 
Isaiah29:22 Nikyo MUKAMA owaacungwire Abrahamu arikugirira eby'enju ya Yakobo ati: Yakobo tarigaruka kukwatwa nshoni, N'aha maisho ge tiharihinduka kundi." 
Isaiah29:23 Ahakuba ku arireeba abaana be abu naahangire Bari omu nsi ye ahagati, Baryahaisa eiziina ryangye ekitiinisa; Kandi bayraha Orikwera wa Yakobo ekitiinisa, Batiine Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
Isaiah29:24 Abarikuhaba omu mitima baryahinduka abarikwetegyereza, N'abarikwetomboita baikirize kwegyesibwa." 
Isaiah30:1 MUKAMA naagira ati: Abaana abagomi baryareeba enaku, Abeehanuuza aha bandi, bataanyehanuuzeho, Abaragaana endagaano, kwonka etari y'Omwoyo gwangye, Ngu babone kwongyera ekibi aha kindi;" 
Isaiah30:2 Abarikwimuka kushuuma Misri, bataanyehanwizeho, Ngu beesigye amaani ga Faraho, Basherure obwegamo omu kicuucu kya Misri!" 
Isaiah30:3 Nikyo ago maani ga Faraho garibakwatsiza enshoni, N'okwesiga ekicuucu kya Misri kukaba okuhemuka kwanyu." 
Isaiah30:4 Ahabw'okuba abanyiginya be n'obu baraabe bari Zoani, N'entumwa ze zihikire Hanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 Baryahemuka, ahabw'okuba baryashanga bari abantu Abatarikubaasa kubagasira, Kandi abatarikubaha buhwezi n'obu gaakuba amagoba, Kureka ab'okubahemura n'okubajumisa." 
Isaiah30:6 Eki nabi yaahanwire aha nyamaishwa z'omuri Negebu. Nibaraba omu nsi y'akabi n'obusaasi, Erikurugwamu entari y'enkazi n'enshija, Erimu encwera n'enjoka z'obushegu oburikubabiirira, Baheekyeise endogoya eby'obutungi byabo, Bataire ebintu byabo aha mabango g'engamira, Nibaza omu ihanga ry'abantu abataribagasira." 
Isaiah30:7 Ahakuba obuhwezi bwa Misri tibwine mutambo kandi ni busha; Nikyo ndikugyetera eiziina Rahabu oshutami kwonka. 
Isaiah30:8 Hati gyenda, okihandiikye aha kishate ky'eibumba, Okihandiiye n'omu kitabo, Kibe ek'obunaku oburiija, Kigume kiboomesereze ebiro byona;" 
Isaiah30:9 Ahabw'okuba n'eihanga eririkugoma, Abaana abarikubeiha, Aboojo abarikwanga kuhurira ebiragiro bya MUKAMA," 
Isaiah30:10 Abarikugambira abahanuuzi bati: Mutareeba, Bakagira baanabi bati: Mutatuhanuurira ebihikire, Kureka mugume mutugambire ebyorobi, Muhanuure eby'obugobya." 
Isaiah30:11 Mutuhigize, muturugye omumaisho; Titurikwenda kugaruka kuhurira eby'Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Isaiah30:12 Nikyo Orikwera wa Israeli arikugirira ati: Ahabw'okugaya ekigambo eki, Mukeesiga okuhata n'okwehabagiza, Mukaba nibyo mwayegamira," 
Isaiah30:13 Okwo kutahikiirira kuryababeera Nk'ekisiika kiraingwa ekishatukire, ekirikugogoma, ekiri haihi kugwa, Eki okugwa kwakyo kubaho ahonaaho omu kaanya kakye;" 
Isaiah30:14 Kandi kiryayatika nk'enyungu y'omubumbi oku eyatika Akagyata atarikugibariirira, N'aha ngusyo zaayo hatatsigareho rwa kuguhisa omuriro omu mahega, Nari orw'okutahisa amaizi omu iziba." 
Isaiah30:15 Ahakuba oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA Orikwera wa Israeli yaagizire ati: Omu kugaruka n'omu kuhuumura nimwo murijunirwa, Omu kutuuza n'omu kwesiga nimwo amaani gaanyu gariruga." 
Isaiah30:16 Ngaaha! Nitwija kuhunigra aha mbaraasi; Kwokwo muryahunga. Muti: Nitwija kuhungira aha mbaraasi ezirikwiruka munonga; N'ahabw'ekyo abaribakurata nabo baryaba abarikwiruka munonga. 
Isaiah30:17 Abantu rukumi baryahunga okukangisa kw'omuntu omwe, Abantu bataano ku baribakangisa, muryahunga, Okuhitsya obu muritsigara muri nk'ekiti kitsimbirwe aha mutwe gw'orushozi, Nari nk'ekiti ky'orurango kitsimbirwe omu kibungo." 
Isaiah30:18 Nikyo MUKAMA aritegyerereza, ngu abagirire embabazi, Kandi nikyo ariheerwa ekitiinisa, ngu abagirire esaasi; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ni Ruhanga ocwa emanja z'oburyo, Abarikumutegyereza boona baine omugisha." 
Isaiah30:19 Iwe ihanga rya Saayuuni 'we, eritwire Yerusaalemu, torigaruka kurira. Ku arihurira eiraka ry'okutaka kwawe, taribura kukugirira mbabazi. Ku arikuhurira aryakugarukamu." 
Isaiah30:20 Kandi Mukama n'obu arikuha eby'okurya by'obusaasi n'amaizi g'okubonabonesibwa, Orikukwegyesa tarigaruka kweshereka, kureka amaisho gaawe garyaguma gamureebe." 
Isaiah30:21 Kandi ku muritoora aha mukono gwa buryo nari aha gwa bumosho, amatu gaanyu garyaguma nigahurira ekigambo nikibareetwa enyima nikigira kiti: Ogu nigwo muhanda, mube nigwo mwahamya." 
Isaiah30:22 Kandi muryashiisha ebishushani byanyu ebibaizirwe ebishwekirwe efeeza, n'ebiheesirwe ebishwekirwe ezaabu. Muryabinagira kimwe nk'ebintu ebisiisikaire, mubigire muti: Murugyeho!" 
Isaiah30:23 Embibo ei muribiba aryagigwisiza enjura, kandi ebi murihinga omu itaka biryayera, bibe bingi. Omu biro ebyo amasyo gaanyu garyariira omu mariisizo mahango," 
Isaiah30:24 ente n'endogoya ezirikuhinga ziryarya eby'okurya ebirimu omwonyo, ebiheheziibwe engari n'entaara." 
Isaiah30:25 Aha izooba ry'okwitirwaho baingi, eminaara ku eriba neesheenywa, orushozi rwona oruraingwa n'ekibungo kyona ekiraingwa, biryahimintikamu emigyera n'enshuro z'amaizi." 
Isaiah30:26 Kandi aha izooba eri MUKAMA arishemberaho obuhuta bw'abantu be, akabakiza ebihonoka by'enkoni ze, okwaka kw'okwezi kuryaba nk'okujwa kw'eizooba, n'omushana gwaryo guryayeyongyera emirundi mushanju, gube nk'omushana gw'ebiro mushanju." 
Isaiah30:27 Reeba, eiziina rya MUKAMA niriruga hare, Niryaka n'ekiniga kye, omu mwika mwingi ogurikucumbuuka; Eminwa ye eijwire okuguubwa kubi, N'orurimi rwe ruri nk'omuriro gurikurya busha." 
Isaiah30:28 Orwoya rwe ruri nk'omugyera gushandaire, Ogurikuhika omuntu omu bitsya, Kushungura amahanga n'orugari orurikucwekyereza, N'okuta omu nshaya z'amahanga orukoba orurikuhabya." 
Isaiah30:29 Muryayeshongora ekyeshongoro nk'eki beeshongora nyekiro aha kiro ky'obugyenyi oburikwera; muryagira omuhimbo omu mutima nk'ogw'omuntu oine omukuri, orikuza aha rushozi rwa MUKAMA ahari Rukiri wa israeli." 
Isaiah30:30 Kandi MUKAMA aryahuriza eiraka rye ry'ekitiinisa, ayorekyere okuteera kw'omukono gwe omu kiniga kye kingi n'omu kirimi ky'omuriro gurikurya busha, n'eshato, n'eihunga, n'orubaare." 
Isaiah30:31 Abaasiria emitima eryabahwa omunda ahabw'okutiina eiraka rya MUKAMA, ku aribateera n'enkoni ye." 
Isaiah30:32 Kandi ku bariba nibabateera enkoni ezi MUKAMA ariragiira kubateera, haryabaho okuteera amataari n'enanga; aryabarwanisa naatigita omukono gwe." 
Isaiah30:33 Ahakuba Tofeti ekateekateekwa okuruga ira, yaateekateekyerwa omugabe. Mbwenu MUKAMA agigizire mpango kandi ndaingwa, yaaba ekikoomi ky'omuriro gw'enku nyingi, kandi omwitsyo gwe, oguri nk'omugyera gw'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti, nigwo guhatweka." 
Isaiah31:1 Baryareeba enaku abarikushuuma Misri kusherura obuhwezi, Abarikwesiga embaraasi, bakata amatsiko aha bigaari, Ahabw'okuba bingi, Kandi bakeesiga abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi, Ahabw'okuba ab'amaani maingi, Bakanga kuta amaisho ahari Orikwera wa Israeli, N'okwehanuuza ahari MUKAMA!" 
Isaiah31:2 Haza kunu iwe aine obwengye, kandi niwe areeta akabi, Atahindure bi agambire, Kureka aryaimuka arwanise enju y'enkozi z'ebibi, N'abarikuhwera abakora ebitari by'okuhikiirira." 
Isaiah31:3 Manya, Abanyamisri baba abantu, tibaba Ruhanga, N'embaraasi zaabo ti myoyo, ziine emibiri kwonka. N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA ku aribanga omukono gwe, Ogwo orikuhwera aryateera entsibo, n'orikuhwerwa aryagwa; Boona bahwerekyerere hamwe." 
Isaiah31:4 Ahakuba MUKAMA angizire ati: Nk'oku entare entsigazi etontomera aha ki yaita, Abariisa bahuruziibwe kurwana nayo, Etatiine rwari rwabo, N'obu kwakuba okwehiga ahabw'enduuru zaabo, Nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arishuuma Kurwanira aha rushozi Saayuuni n'aha kabungo kaayo." 
Isaiah31:5 Nk'oku amahungu gazeereera, Nikwo na MUKAMA ow'amahe aririnda Yerusaalemu; Aryagirinda, agijune; Aryagisaasira, agikize abazigu." 
Isaiah31:6 Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, mugarukire Ogwo ou mwagomeire mukarengyesereza;" 
Isaiah31:7 ahakuba eryo izooba ebishushani bye by'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, ebyakozirwe engaro zaanyu, bikabarugiramu ekibi." 
Isaiah31:8 Obwo Abaasira baryaitwe rurara etari y'omuntu, Kandi rurara etari y'abantu ebamareho; Baryagihunga, N'abatsigazi baabo babe ab'okukoresibwa n'amaani." 
Isaiah31:9 Orukiri rwabo ruryaihwaho ahabw'obwoba, N'abakuru baabo baryayehwa amatsiko ahabw'orurango; Nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba ou omuriro gwe guri omuri Saayuuni, N'ekikoomi kye omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah32:1 Reeba, haryayema omugabe oritegyekyera omu kuhikiirira, N'abanyiginya baryategyekyera omu buryo." 
Isaiah32:2 Kandi omuntu aryaba nk'omwanya ogw'okwekingaho omuyaga, N'obwegamo bw'eihunga, Kandi abe nk'emigyera y'amaizi aha itaka ryomire, N'ekicuucu ky'eibaare rihango omu nsi erikurusya." 
Isaiah32:3 Obwo amaisho g'abarikuhweza tigarigiibwaho ruho, N'amatu g'abarikuhurira garyahurira." 
Isaiah32:4 Omutima gw'omuntu embakuki guryagira okwetegyereza, N'orurimi rw'orikuhebebera ruryagamba gye." 
Isaiah32:5 Omushema tarigaruka kwetwa ow'ekitiinisa, N'obu yaakuba engumya kwetwa efura;" 
Isaiah32:6 Ahabw'okuba omushema aryaguma agambe eby'obushema, N'omutima gwe gugire enaama z'okutahikiirira, Akore eby'okutatiina Ruhanga, Agambe eby'okuhabisa ahari MUKAMA, Abajara abatsigye n'enjara yaabo, N'abaine eiriho abaime eky'okunywa." 
Isaiah32:7 Eby'okurwanisa by'engumya biba bibi, Acwa obwengye bubi, Ngu acwekyereze omworo n'ebigambo by'ebishuba, N'obu omukyene aba naagamba ebihikire." 
Isaiah32:8 Kwonka efura ecwa obwengye bw'okukora eby'obufura, Kandi obwo bufura nibwo bumubaishaho." 
Isaiah32:9 Imwe bakazi bajarami 'mwe, nimwimukye mumpurire; Naimwe baishiki bataine ki mwetaireho 'mwe, mutegye amtu eki ndikugamba." 
Isaiah32:10 Imwe abakazi abataine ki mwetaireho, muryamara ebiro, Ebirikweshumba aha mwaka, mwemereize omutima; Ahabw'okuba eibiika rya viinyo riryabura, N'eishaaruura tiriribaho." 
Isaiah32:11 Imwe bakazi bajarami 'mwe, muteteme! Imwe abataine ki mwetaireho, muhahaaze emitima, Mujuure ebi mujwaire, mujware busha, Mwezirikye ebiguniya." 
Isaiah32:12 Baryayemaamaata nibasaasibwa emisiri yaabo, Emisiri eyaabaire ebashemeza, n'emizaabibu eyaabaire eyera munonga," 
Isaiah32:13 N'emisiri y'abantu bangye emezirwemu amahwa n'emikwatangwe, N'amaju goona agarikushemeza, Ag'omu rurembo orurikushemererwa;" 
Isaiah32:14 Ahabw'okuba ekikaari ky'omugabe kiryatsigwaho, Orurembo orutwirwemu abantu baningi ruhindukye amatongo, Ekibungo n'omunaara gw'abarinzi bihindukye amaaya ebiro byona, Amakiniro g'enturegye n'amariisizo g'amasyo," 
Isaiah32:15 Okuhitsya obu Omwoyo aritushukwaho naaruga omu iguru, Amahamba gakabona kuba emisiri erikweza munonga, N'omusiri ogurikweza munonga bakagweta ekibira." 
Isaiah32:16 Obwo eby'oburyo biryashangwa omu ihamba, N'okuhikiirira kushangwe omu misiri erikweza munonga." 
Isaiah32:17 Eki okuhikiirira kurireeta kiryaba obusingye, Kandi ekiriruga omuri okwo kuhikiirira kibe okutuuza N'amatsiko agatarikubanganisibwa ebiro byona." 
Isaiah32:18 Abantu bangye baryatuura omu nsi baine obusingye, Bagume omu maju gaabo agahamire, N'omu myanya y'okuhuumuriramu etuurize." 
Isaiah32:19 Kwonka ekibira ku kiriba nikigwa, orubaare ruryagwa, N'orurembo rusheenyerwe kimwe." 
Isaiah32:20 Muhiiriirwe, imwe ababiba aha mbaju z'amaizi goona, Mukanagurayo ente n'endogoya." 
Isaiah33:1 Oryakareeba, iwe orikunyaga, Haza otakanyagwaga, Iwe orikugobya otakagobezibwaga! Ku oriheza kunyaga, naiwe oryanyagwa; Kandi ku oriheza kugobya, naiwe oryagobezibwa." 
Isaiah33:2 Ai MUKAMA, otugirire embabazi, tukutegyereize; Otubeere amaani buri kasheeshe, Kandi otubeere okujunwa omu biro by'enkau." 
Isaiah33:3 Amahanga gabingirwe enduuru z'okwimukirira, Kandi oimukire, amahanga gaataataana." 
Isaiah33:4 Baryateerana eminyago, nk'oku kanyananga eshanguruza, Bagyeshukyemu nk'enzigye." 
Isaiah33:5 MUKAMA naahimbisibwa, ahabw'okuba atuura ahaiguru, Aryaijuza Saayuuni eby'oburyo n'okuhikiirira." 
Isaiah33:6 Omu biro byawe aryaba okuhama kwawe, Okujunwa kwawe kwingi, obwengye n'okumanya; Okutiina MUKAMA niryo itungo rya Saayuuni." 
Isaiah33:7 Reeba, amamanzi gaabo nigaboroogyera aheeru, Entumwa z'okushaba obusingye nizirira munonga," 
Isaiah33:8 Emihanda rugyendwa erimu busha, Omugyenzi takigirabamu. Endagaano ziriire, Baakareebi nibagaywa, Omuntu takyetwaho." 
Isaiah33:9 Ensi neecura, neehwerera, Lebanooni eshobeirwe, ehotokire; Sharooni ni nk'eihamba, Bashani na Karumeeli nizikunkumuka amababi." 
Isaiah33:10 MUKAMA naagira ati: Hati naimuka, Naaza kweta ahaiguru, nsingizibwe hati hati." 
Isaiah33:11 Muryatwara enda y'ebishushunga, muzaare ebitsintsi by'embuba, Omwitsyo gwanyu gube omuriro oguribootsya." 
Isaiah33:12 Amahanga garyayokibwa, gacwekye einoni, Gabe nk'oku amahwa gatemwa, gakookibwa omu muriro." 
Isaiah33:13 Imwe abari hare munonga, muhurire eki nkozire; Naimwe abari haihi, mwikirize amaani gangye." 
Isaiah33:14 Abasiisi b'omuri Saayuuni nibatiina, Abatarikutiina Ruhanga bakwatsirwe orutetema. N'oha omuriitwe owaakubaasa kutuura n'omuriro gurikurya busha? N'oha omuriitwe owaakubaasa kutuura n'omuriro gurikwotsya ebiro byona?" 
Isaiah33:15 Orikugyendera omu kuhikiirira, akagamba ebihikire, Orikwanga amagoba g'okuhata, Orikukunkumura engaro ze, ngu zitakaaakwata enguzi, Orikwekwata aha matu, ngu atahurira eby'okusheesha eshagama, Orikuhumiza amaisho ngu atareeba ekibi." 
Isaiah33:16 Ogwo niwe arituura omu myanya y'ahaiguru, Omwanya gwe gw'okwerindiramu guryaba oguzitiirwe amabaare; Aryaguma agaburirwe eby'okurya, N'amaizi g'okunywa tigarimuburira." 
Isaiah33:17 Amaisho gaawe garyareeba omugabe aine oburungi, Gareebe n'ensi eyaaririkire okuhika hare." 
Isaiah33:18 Omutima gwawe guryateekateeka aha birikutiinisa; Ogire oti: Owaabazire emitoijo, Akagipima, arahi? Owaabazire eminaara, we arahi?" 
Isaiah33:19 Torigaruka kureeba ihanga eririkushaarira Ery'engambo etarikwetegyerezibwa, Ei otarikubaasa kumanya, Ery'orurimi rw'enduga-mahanga oru otarikubaasa kuhurira." 
Isaiah33:20 Yetegyereze Saayuuni, orurembo oru twabaire tukoreramu amagyenyi agaatairweho; Amaisho gaawe garyareeba Yerusaalemu, Oshangye eri obutuuro bucureire, Eihema ryayo tiririfururwa, Enkondo zaaryo tizirikuurwa ebiro byona, N'omurunga gwaryo na gumwe tiguricweka;" 
Isaiah33:21 Kureka okwo niyo MUKAMA ariguma naitwe aine ekititiinsia, Omwanya gw'emigyera mihango n'emikye, Etarirabwamu maato agarikuvugisibwa engahi, N'obu yaakuba emeeri y'ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah33:22 Ahakuba MUKAMA niwe muramuzi waitu, kandi omutegyeki waitu; MUKAMA niwe Mugabe waitu: aryatujuna." 
Isaiah33:23 Emigoye yaawe eyugire, Tekibaasa kuhamya murongooti omu mwanya gwagwo, N'obu kwakuba okureega amatanga; N'ahabw'ekyo eminyago n'ebinyagirwe bingi biryabaganwa, Nangwa n'ebirema nabyo biryatwara eminyago." 
Isaiah33:24 Kandi tihaine mutuuzi waayo origira ati: Ndwaire, Abantu abatwireyo baryasaasirwa okutahikiirira kwabo." 
Isaiah34:1 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, mwirire haihi, muhurire; Naimwe abantu, mutegye amatu! Ensi ehurie, n'ebigirimu byona, Kandi n'ebigirugamu byona." 
Isaiah34:2 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA agwereirwe kubi amahanga goona, Agiriire eihe ryago ryona ekiniga. Abacwereire orubanja kubasinga, Yaabahayo kwitwa." 
Isaiah34:3 Abantu baabo abaitsirwe baryanagwa aheeru, Ekinuuko ky'emitumbi yaabo kiimukye, N'enshozi ziryatengurwa eshagama yaabo." 
Isaiah34:4 Eihe ryona ery'omu iguru riryahwerera, Eiguru riryazingwa nk'omuzingo gw'empapura, N'amahe gaaryo goona garyahotoka Nk'amababi g'omuzaabibu, Nari ag'omutiini oku gahotoka, gakaragarika." 
Isaiah34:5 Ahakuba rurara yangye enywereire munonga omu iguru, yaiguta; Mbwenu yaaza kushuuma Edomu N'omu bantu abu naakyeenire, ebahane." 
Isaiah34:6 Rurara ya MUKAMA enyweire eshagama, Yaagomorwa ebishaju N'eshagama y'entaama n'embuzi, N'ebishaju by'aha ntsigo z'empaya; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA yaaza kwetambirira ebitambo Bozira, N'okwita baingi omu nsi ya Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Embogo ziryagwa ahamwe nabo, N'ebimasha hamwe n'enimi z'ebigundu; Ensi yaabo ejengibwe eshagama, N'eitaka ryayo rigomorwe ebishaju." 
Isaiah34:8 Ahabw'okuba eryo izooba n'eri MUKAMA arihooreraho enzigu, N'omwaka gw'okubazimuurira ebi bakoreire Saayuuni." 
Isaiah34:9 Emigyera ya Edomu eryahinduka koroto, N'eitaka ryayo riryaba nk'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti, Ensi yaayo ehindukye koroto erikubira." 
Isaiah34:10 Teri raazibwa nyekiro na nyomushana, Omwika gwayo guryacumbuuka ebiro byona. Okuruga aha busingye okuhika aha bundi eryaguma eri amatongo, Tihaine origirabamu okuhitsya ryari na ryari," 
Isaiah34:11 Kureka empungu n'ebinyogote nibyo birigikubuura, Ebihihizi n'ebikoona bikagituuramu; Aryahagyeresa omugoye, nikwo kujagarara, Na kariisho, nikwo kutsigarwamu busha." 
Isaiah34:12 Baryayeta abakungu baayo kwihamu omwe ow'okwemeka, Kwonka tihaine oribayo; N'abanyiginya baayo boona baryaba busha." 
Isaiah34:13 Zaanyaruju zaayo ziryamerwamu amahwa, N'ebigo byayo bimerwemu ebicuragyenyi n'amatojo. Haryaba eikoobaaniro rya zaamuha N'obutaaho bwa zaamaaya." 
Isaiah34:14 Enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa ziryabugaabugana n'emishega, N'empaya y'obwoshe eryayetana na ngyenzi yaayo, Kandi orukooko rwa nyekiro ruryateekama okwo, Rebonere ah'okuhuumurira." 
Isaiah34:15 Okwo niyo ekihihizi kiryarika, kikateera amahuri, Kikagaatira, kikabumbatira abaana baakyo; Kandi okwo niyo zaamareere ziriteeranira, Buri emwe n'enkazi yaayo." 
Isaiah34:16 Musherure omu kitabo kya MUKAMA, mushomemu; Omuri ebyo tiharigira na kimwe ekiriburayo, Tiharigira na kimwe ekiribura ekikazi kyakyo; Ahabw'okuba akanwa ka MUKAMA niko kakiragiire, Kandi Omwoyo we niwe abiteeraine." 
Isaiah34:17 Abiteereire enteenyu, N'omukono gwe gwagibibaganisiza n'omugoye. Eryaba eyaabyo ebiro byona, Bigituuremu nk'oku obusingye burigyenda nibwihaihana." 
Isaiah35:1 Eihamba n'ensi eyomire biryashemererwa, Eihamba ry'omusheenyi riryashemererwa, rirabye ebirabyo nk'esheko y'ensi." 
Isaiah35:2 Riryarabya ebirabyo bingi munonga, Ryesiime, rishemererwe, ryeshongore. Riryaheebwa ekitiinisa kya Lebanooni, N'oburungi bwa Karumeeli na Sharooni. Baryareeba ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA, Oburungi bwa Ruhanga waitu." 
Isaiah35:3 Mugumye emikono etaine maani, Muhamye amaju agatahamire," 
Isaiah35:4 Mugambire ab'omutima gw'obwoba muti: Mugume, murekye kutiina! Reeba Ruhanga waanyu naija kuhoora enzigu, Nikwo kuzimuura kwe; Aryaija, abajune." 
Isaiah35:5 Obwo amaisho g'empumi garyahumuurwa, N'amatu g'ebifa-matu garyaigurwa;" 
Isaiah35:6 Ekirema kiryaguruka nk'empara, N'orurimi rw'ekiteta rweshongore ahabw'okushemererwa; Ahabw'okuba amaizi garyafumuka omu ihamba N'emigyera omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi;" 
Isaiah35:7 Omusheenyi gurikwotsya guryahinduka ekiyanja, N'ensi ekarangataine ehindukye ey'enshuro z'amaizi; Eikobezo rya zaamuha riryaba ekisharara, N'obunyaatsi bwaho buhindukye ekibingo n'omubimbiri." 
Isaiah35:8 Kandi haryabaho omuhanda rugyendwa, Gwetwe Omuhanda ogurikwera. Abatashemeire tibarigurabamu, Kureka guryaba ogw'abagyenzi; N'obu bariba bari abashema, Tibariguhabiramu." 
Isaiah35:9 Tiharibayo ntare, Kandi enyamaishwa yoona enshaarizi teriguzamu; Tizirishangwayo, Kureka abacungwirwe nibo barigugyenderamu." 
Isaiah35:10 N'abacungwirwe MUKAMA baryagaruka, Baije Saayuuni nibeeshongora, Okushemererwa okutahwaho kuri aha maisho gaabo; Baryagira okushemererwa n'okunanuka, Kandi obusaasi n'okutsinda biryakwata akakiro." 
Isaiah36:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ena gw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Hezekia, Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria akainamuka, yaateera endembo zoona eza Yuda, ezaabaire zeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, yaazikwata." 
Isaiah36:2 Bwanyima omugabe wa Asiria, ku yaabaire akiri Lakishi, yaatuma omutware Rabushaake n'eihe rihango aha mugabe Hezekia omuri Yerusaalemu. Rabushaake ku yaahikireyo, yaayemerera aha mukura gw'ekiyanja kya ruguru, ekiri aha muhanda rugyendwa ogurikuza aha kibanja ky'omwozi." 
Isaiah36:3 Okwo yaashangwayo Eliakimu mwene Hilukia, owaabaire ari omukuru w'ekikaari, Shebuna omuhandiiki na Yoa mwene Asafu omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho." 
Isaiah36:4 Omutware Rabushaake yaabagira ati: Mugambire Hezekia muti: oku nikwo omugabe rugambwa, omugabe wa Asira, arikugamba naagira ati: Mbwenu ou orikwesiga n'oha?" 
Isaiah36:5 Noogira ngu ebigambo bugambo nibyo naama n'amaani by'okurwanisa? Hari ou oyegamiire hati n'oha, waaza kungomera?" 
Isaiah36:6 Reeba, hati oyegamiire Misri, orubango oruri nk'ekibingo ekihendekire, ekirikwija kucumita ekiganja ky'omuntu weena orikukihimbagiriraho. Okwo nikwo na Faraho omugabe wa Misri ari ahari boona abarikumwesiga." 
Isaiah36:7 Kandi ku murangire muti: Nitwesiga MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, tiwe Ogwo ou Hezekia yaihireho emyanya ye mikuru ey'okuramizamu, n'amatambiro ge, naagira Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu ati: Mushemereire kuramiza omu maisho g'eri eitambiro eriri Yerusaalemu?" 
Isaiah36:8 Mbwenu, ija okwatirizane na mukama wangye omugabe wa Asiria, nkuhe embaraasi enkumi ibiri; ku oraabone ab'okuzitemba, ongire kwo!" 
Isaiah36:9 Noija kubaasa ota kubinga omwe aha bakuru bangye b'engabo ab'amaani makye okukira abandi, ku oraabe oyesigire Misri kuba nibo baakuha ebigaari n'ab'aha mbaraasi?" 
Isaiah36:10 Kandi noogira ngu nyizire kuteera ensi egi n'okugicwekyereza, ntaragiirwe MUKAMA? Omanye ngu MUKAMA niwe angizire ati: Inamuka oteere egyo nsi, ogicwekyereze." 
Isaiah36:11 Bwanyima Eliakimu, Shebuna na Yoa baagira omutware Rabushaake bati: Twakweshengyereza, gamba n'abairu baawe omu rurimi rw'Abasiria; ahakuba itwe niturumanya; reka kugamba omu rurimi rw'Abayuda, abantu abari aha rugo rw'amabaare bakabihurira." 
Isaiah36:12 Kwonka omutware Rabushaake yaabagarukamu ati: Nimugira ngu mukama wangye antumire ahari mukama waanyu naimwe, kuba niimwe naagambira ebigambo ebi mwenka? Tantumire kubigambira n'abashaija bariya abashutami aha rugo, abarikwija kurya naimwe amazi gaabo n'okunywa naimwe enkari yaabo?" 
Isaiah36:13 Ahonaaho omutware Rabushaake yaayemerera, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango omu rurimi rw'Abayuda, naagira ati: Muhurire obutumwa bw'omugabe rugambwa, omugabe wa Asiria." 
Isaiah36:14 Oku nikwo omugabe arikugamba naagira ati: Mutaikiriza Hezekia kubabeihabeiha; ahabw'okuba tarikwija kubaasa kubajuna. 
Isaiah36:15 Mutaikiriza Hezekia kubeesigisa MUKAMA naabagira ati: Buzimazima MUKAMA naija kutujuna, kandi orurembo oru tirurikwija kuheebwayo mu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria." 
Isaiah36:16 Kandi mutahurira Hezekia; ahakuba oku nikwo omugabe wa Asiria arikugamba naagira ati: Mugarukane naanye, mwije munshangye aha; obwo buri omwe omuriimwe nibwo araarye omuzaabibu gwe n'omutiini gwe, kandi akanywa amaizi g'omu iziba rye," 
Isaiah36:17 okuhitsya obu ndiija nkabatwara omu nsi erikushushana n'eyaanyu, ensi y'engano na viinyo, n'ey'emigaati n'emizaabibu." 
Isaiah36:18 Mwerinde, Hezekia atakaababeihabeiha naagira ati: MUKAMA naija kutujuna. Nimugira ngu hariho ruhanga omuri baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga orajunire ensi ye omu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Mbwenu baaruhanga ba Hamasi na Arupaadi barahi? Na baaruhanga ba Sefavaimu barahi? Barajunire Samaria omu mikono yangye? 
Isaiah36:20 Nibaahi omuri baaruhanga boona ab'ezo nsi abarajunire ensi yaabo omu mikono yangye, mukabona kwesiga ku MUKAMA arikwija kwiha Yerusaalemu omu mikono yangye?" 
Isaiah36:21 Kwonka abantu boona baahunama, tibaagira ki baamugarukamu, ahabw'okuba ekiragiro ky'omugabe kikaba nikigira kiti: Mutamugarukamu." 
Isaiah36:22 Bwanyima Eliakimu mwene Hilukia, owaabaire ari mukuru w'ekikaari, Shebuna omuhandiiki, na Yoa mwene Asafu, omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho, baija ahari Hezekia, bataagwire ebijwaro byabo, baamuteekyerereza ebigambo by'omutware Rabushaake." 
Isaiah37:1 Omugabe Hezekia ku yaakihuriire, yaataagura ebijwaro bye, yaayefubika ekiguniya, yaaza omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
Isaiah37:2 Yaatuma Eliakimi omukurur w'ekikaari, Shebuna omuhandiiki n'abanyamurwa abakuru ahari nabi Isaaya mwene Amozi, bajwaire ebiguniya." 
Isaiah37:3 Baamugira bati: Oku nikwo Hezekia arikugamba naagira ati: Eri izooba n'eizooba ry'obusaasi n'okhanwa n'okuteererwa enaku; ahakuba abaana bahikire kuzaarwa, kwona amaani g'okubazaara tigariho." 
Isaiah37:4 Shana MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ahuriire ebigambo byona ebigambirwe omutware Rabushaake, ou mukama we omugabe wa Asiria atumire kugaya Ruhanga otahwaho; obundi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akaamuhana ahabw'ebyo bigambo ebi ahuriire. N'ahabw'ekyo imutsya eiraka ryawe, oshabire abantu abakiriho abahonokire." 
Isaiah37:5 Abaheereza b'omugabe Hezekia ku baahikire owa Isaaya," 
Isaiah37:6 yaabagira ati: Mugambire mukama waanyu muti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Otatiina ebyo bigambo ebi ohuriire, ebi abaheereza b'omugabe wa Asiria banjumire." 
Isaiah37:7 Reeba, niinyija kumutamu ogundi mutima, ahurire orukuru, agarukye omu nsi ye; kandi ku araahikyeyo, mmwitse rurara." 
Isaiah37:8 Bwanyima omutware Rabushaake yaagarukayo, yaashanga omugabe wa Asiria naarwanisa Libuna; ahabw'okuba akaba ahuriire ku arugire Lakishi." 
Isaiah37:9 Omugabe yaahurira ebya Tiruhaaka omugabe wa Esiopia, nibagira bari, Reeba, aizire kukuteera. Ku yaakihuriire, yaagaruka yaatuma ahari Hezekia naagira ati:" 
Isaiah37:10 Oku nikwo muraagire Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda muti: Otaikiriza Ruhanga waawe ogwo, ou orikwesiga, kukubeiha naakuraganisa ati: Yerusaalemu teriheebwayo mu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria." 
Isaiah37:11 Ohuriire oku abagabe ba Asiria baagizire ensi zoona, bakazicwekyerereza kimwe. Noogira ngu niiwe orikwija kukira?" 
Isaiah37:12 Amahanga aga, Gozani, Harani, Rezefu, n'ab'omuri Edeni abaabaire batwire Telasaari, agu baatatenkuru baacwekyereize, noogira ngu baaruhanga baago bakagajuna?" 
Isaiah37:13 Nyoreka omugabe wa Hamasi, owa Arupaadi, ow'orurembo rwa Sefavaimu, owa Hena, n'owa Iiva!" 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekia yaayakiira ebaruha eyaareetsirwe ezo ntumwa, yaagishoma; bwanyima yainamuka, yaaza omu nju ya MUKAMA, yaagimushashaanurira omumaisho." 
Isaiah37:15 Hezekia yaashabira omu maisho ga MUKAMA naagira ati: 
Isaiah37:16 Ai MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, otuura aha kitebe ky'obukama ahagati ya baakerubi, iwe wenka niiwe Ruhanga w'obugabe bwona obw'omu nsi; niiwe waahangire eiguru n'ensi." 
Isaiah37:17 Ai MUKAMA, tega okutu kwawe; igura amaisho gaawe, MUKAMA, oreebe, ohurire ebigambo ebi Senakeribu atumire kurogota ahari Ruhanga otahwaho." 
Isaiah37:18 N'ekya buzima, ai MUKAMA, abagabe ba Asiria bakacwekyereza abantu b'ago mahanga n'ensi zaabo," 
Isaiah37:19 baanaga baaruhanga baabo omu muriro, ahabw'okuba bakaba batari baaruhanga nyamuhanga, kureka bakaba bakozirwe engaro z'abantu, omu biti n'omu mabaare; nikyo baacwekyerereziibwe." 
Isaiah37:20 N'ahabw'ekyo ahati, MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, ninkweshengyereza otujune, otwihe omu mikono ye, obugabe bwona obw'omu nsi bumanye ku niiwe wenka oba MUKAMA." 
Isaiah37:21 Bwanyima Isaaya mwene Amozi yaatuma ahari Hezeki naagira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'okunshaba kukuhwera aha bya Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria," 
Isaiah37:22 eki nikyo kigambo eki MUKAMA amugambireho naagira ati: Saayuuni oshugaine naakugaya, naakushekyerera; Na Yerusaalemu naakuzongoreza omutwe." 
Isaiah37:23 N'oha ou ojumire, okarogotaho? Kandi ou okabukiire, okateera ekitsyori n'oha? N'Orikwera wa Israeli" 
Isaiah37:24 Ojumiise MUKAMA entumwa zaawe, Noogira oti: Nyinamukire n'ebigaari byangye bingi Aha mitwe y'enshozi Hare munonga ahagati ya Lebanooni. Niinyija kutema emyereezi yaayo emiraingwa N'emiberooshi yaayo emirungi munonga; Niinyija kuhika omu bweshereko bwayo hare munonga, Omu kibira kyayo ekikwataine." 
Isaiah37:25 Nkatimba amaziba, naanywa amaizi gaago; Naaribatiirira emigyera ya Misri yoona, Naagyomya." 
Isaiah37:26 Torahuriire ku naamaririire ira kukikora? Omu biro bya ira nkacuma enaama y'okukora Ebi ndikuhikiiriza omu biro ebi, Ngi ocwekyereze endembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, Ozihindure amatongo." 
Isaiah37:27 Nikyo kyareeteire abazitwiremu kucweka entegye, Bakahahaaza emitima, bakarimbagirirwa, Bakaba nk'obunyaatsi bw'omu ishwa, Nk'obunyaatsi buto, Bakahotoka nk'obunyaatsi obumezire aha mutwe gw'enju, Nk'omusiri gw'engano ezitakakuzire." 
Isaiah37:28 Kwonka nimmanya emishutamire yaawe, Emihururire yaawe n'emitabaarukire yaawe, Kandi n'ekiniga eki wangiriire." 
Isaiah37:29 Ahabw'okungirira ekiniga, Kandi nkahurira eby'amaryo gaawe, Niinyija kukuta eirobo ryangye omu nyindo, N'ekyoma kyangye omu kanwa, Nkugarure omuhanda gwakureetsire." 
Isaiah37:30 Kandi aha karyakubeera akamanyiso; omu mwaka ogu nimwija kurya ebyemerize, omu gwa kabiri murye ebyemeize eby'emiragarika y'ebyo; bwanyima omu mwaka gwa kashatu muryabiba mugyeshe, mubyare emizzaabibu, murye ebijuma byayo." 
Isaiah37:31 Kandi abaatsigaire aha b'enju ya Yuda abaahonokireho, baryagaruka batsimbe emizi okuzimu, n'ahaiguru baane ebyana;" 
Isaiah37:32 ahabw'okuba omuri Yerusaalemu haryarugamu ekicweka, ekiriba kitsigaireho, n'aha rushozi Saayuuni harugyeho omutwe gw'abaahonokireho. Obweziriki bwa MUKAMA buryakihikiiriza." 
Isaiah37:33 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugambira aha mugabe wa Asiria, ati: Tarihika muri oru rurembo, nari okururashamu omwambi, nari okurwemurikira omumaisho aine engabo ye, n'obu kwakuba okurutuumaho omutuumo gw'eitaka." 
Isaiah37:34 Omuhanda ogwamureetsire nigwo gurimugarurayo, kandi taritaaha muri oru rurembo, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah37:35 Ahakuba ndyarinda oru rurembo, ndujune ahabwangye n'ahabw'omwiru wangye Daudi." 
Isaiah37:36 Ekyo kiro maraika wa MUKAMA yaija, yaateera orusiisira rw'Abaasiria, yaitamu engabo zaabo akasiriira n'obukumi munaana n'enkumi itaano. Abantu ku baimukire omu kasheeshe, baashanga ezo ngabo zoona ziri emitumbi." 
Isaiah37:37 Bwanyima Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiria yaarugayo, yaagaruka Nineeve, yaatuurayo." 
Isaiah37:38 Ku yaabaire ari omuri nyaruju ya ruhanga we Nisirooki naamuramya, Adurameleki na Sharezeeri abatabani baija, baamwitsa rurara, baacwa, baahungira omu nsi ya Araraati. Esari-hadooni omutabani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
Isaiah38:1 Omu biro ebyo Hezekia akarwara, yaahika aha ncwamba za rufu. Nabi Isaaya mwene Amozi yaija ah'ari, yaamugira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Tebeekanisa eka yaawe; ahabw'okuba noija kufa, tori w'okukira." 
Isaiah38:2 Ahonaaho Hezekia yaahinduka, yaareeba ekisiika, yaashaba MUKAMA naagira ati:" 
Isaiah38:3 Ai MUKAMA, ninkweshengyereza ijuka hati oku ngyendeire omu maisho gaawe omu bwesigwa n'omutima oguhikire, ninkora ebi orikusiima. Yaarira munonga." 
Isaiah38:4 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Isaaya nikigira kiti: 
Isaiah38:5 Garukayo ogambire Hezekia oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Daudi shwenkuru, arikugamba naagira ati: Naahurira okushaba kwawe, kandi naareeba n'amarira gaawe; reeba, niinyija kukwongyeraho emyaka ikumi n'etaano." 
Isaiah38:6 Ndyakujuna, iwe n'orurembo oru, omu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiria, kandi ndyarurinda." 
Isaiah38:7 Aka niko kamanyiso aku MUKAMA akuhaire, akarikuhamya ku arikwija kuhikiiriza eki agambire." 
Isaiah38:8 Reeba, ekicuucu eky'aha ky'okugyeresa kya Ahazi, ekirikureetwa eizooba eririkurenga, niinyija kukigarura enyima entambwe ikumi. Rityo eizooba ryaiha aha ryaba ryahika nirirenga, ryagaruka enyima entambwe ikumi ez'aha ky'okugyeresa ekyo." 
Isaiah38:9 Ebi Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda yaahandiikire, obu yaarwara, akakira, nibyo ebi." 
Isaiah38:10 Mbaire ningira nti: Nshemereire kurugaho Nkiri ahagati y'emyaka yangye, Naaza kuraba omu marembo g'okuzimu, Ncwirweho emyaka yangye." 
Isaiah38:11 Naagira nti: Tindireeba MUKAMA Omu nsi y'abahuriire; Tindigaruka kucwa muntu riisho Omu bantu abatwire omu nsi. 
Isaiah38:12 Eka yangye ehurutwirwe, yaanyihwaho Nk'eihema ry'omuriisa w'entaama; Nzingire amagara gangye nk'omuruki w'emyenda, Naija kuncwa aha biti by'okurukiraho emyenda. Okwiha omu kasheehse okuhitsya nyekiro, ommariramu kimwe amaani." 
Isaiah38:13 Nindaara nintaka ngu mpwerwe okuhitsya omu kasheeshe, Kwonka noohenda amagufa gangye goona nk'entare. Okwiha omu kasheeshe okuhitsya nyekiro, ommariramu kimwe amaani." 
Isaiah38:14 Nintaka nk'entaratambi nari nk'entuuha, Ninganya nk'enkombe; amaisho gangye garuhire ahabw'okugwa ahaiguru gategyereize. Ai MUKAMA, niinyitwa kubi, onyemererere." 
Isaiah38:15 Mbwenu ngambe ki? Ahabw'okuba niwe anyegambiriire, Kandi niwe akikozire. Oturo tungurukire ahabw'obushaarizi bw'omu mutima." 
Isaiah38:16 Ai Mukama, ebyo nibyo bibaisaho abantu, Kandi omuri ebyo byona nimwo amagara g'omwoyo gwangye gari. Naakweshengyereza ngaruramu amagara, ombaiseho!" 
Isaiah38:17 Reeba, onyikiriize kugira obusaasi bwingi, Ngu bundugiremu obusingye. Kwonka ahabw'oknkunda waazibira amagara gangye Kugwa omu kiina ky'okuhwerekyerereramu; Ahabw'okuba ebibi byangye byona Obyenagire enyima." 
Isaiah38:18 Manya Okuzimu terikubaasa kukusiima, Rufu terikubaasa kukuhimbisa; Abo abashuuma okuzimu tibarikubaasa Kuta amatsiko aha bwesigwa bwawe." 
Isaiah38:19 Ohuriire, ohuriire, niwe akusiima, Nk'oku ndikukusiima eri izooba; Omuzaire w'abaana abamanyisa obwesigwa bwawe." 
Isaiah38:20 MUKAMA naija kunjuna, N'ahabw'ekyo nitwija kuguma nitweshongorera omu nju ya MUKAMA Ebyeshongoro ebi naagunzire, Nitubyeshongorera aha nanga z'emiraya Ebiro byona eby'amagara gaitu." 
Isaiah38:21 Obwo Isaaya akaba agizire ngu, Bareete ekitongye ky'emitiini, bakibatikye aha kizimba, akire." 
Isaiah38:22 Na Hezekia akaba agizire ati: Ni kamanyiso ki akarikummanyisa ku ndaije kwinamuka omu nju ya MUKAMA. 
Isaiah39:1 Omu biro ebyo Merodaaki-baladaani mwene Baladaani omugabe wa Babulooni, akatuma ahari Hezekia entumwa, zaamutwarira ebaruha n'ekiconco, ahabw'okuba kaba ahuriire ngu arwaire." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekia yaazaakiira n'okushemererwa, yaazooreka enju ye yoona omu abiika ebintu bye eby'obuguzi bwingi, efeeza, ezaabu emigaju, amajuta g'obuguzi bwingi, n'ahu abiika eby'okurwanisa bye, n'ebyshangirwe omu mabiikiro ge byona. Tihariho kintu na kimwe omu nju ye nari omu bugabe bwe bwona, eki atarazoorekire." 
Isaiah39:3 Bwanyima nabi Isaaya yaija aha mugabe Hezekia yaagira ati: Barugahi? Hezekia yaagira ati: Barugire omu nsi ya hare Babulooni. 
Isaiah39:4 Onu ati: Bareebire ki omwawe? Hezekia yaagarukamu ati: Byona ebiri omwangye babireebire; tihariho kintu kyona omu mabiikiro gangye eki ntaboorekire. 
Isaiah39:5 Isaaya yaagira Hezikia ati: Mbwenu hurira ekigmbo kya MUKAMA ow'amahe. 
Isaiah39:6 Reeba, obunaku buryahika, ebintu by'omu nju yaawe byona, n'ebi baashwenkuru baabiikire okuhitsya hati, bitwarwe Babulooni, harekye kugira ekyatsigaraho, nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Isaiah39:7 Kandi bamwe ahari batabani baawe, abu oriba oyezaariire, baryatwarwa, bahindukye abakonwa omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Babulooni." 
Isaiah39:8 Bwanyima Hezekia yaagira Isaaya ati: Ekigambo kya MUKAMA eki waagamba ni kirungi. Ahakuba Hezekia ogwo akagira ati: Niho harikwija kubaho obusingye n'obuhooro omu biro byangye. 
Isaiah40:1 Muhuumurize abantu bangye, mubahuumurize, Nikwo Ruhanga waanyu arikugira." 
Isaiah40:2 Mugambire Yerusaalemu n'embabazi, Mugirangire n'eiraka rihango, Ku engamba zaayo zihweire, Ku okutahikiirira kwayo kusaasirwe, Kandi ku MUKAMA agihaire kabiri ekifubiro Neeturwa ebibi byayo byona." 
Isaiah40:3 Muhurire eiraka ry'orikuranga naagira ati: Mushemeze omuhanda gwa MUKAMA omu ihamba, Mugororere MUKAMA omuhanda rugyndwa omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi." 
Isaiah40:4 Empanga zoona ziryatunguurwa, N'enshozi zoona n'ebibungo biryabandikwa; Ebitegami biryagororwa, N'emyanya etaringaniire eryaringanizibwa," 
Isaiah40:5 Kandi ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kiryashuuruurwa, Abantu boona bakireebere hamwe, Ahakuba akanwa ka MUKAMA niko kaakigamba." 
Isaiah40:6 Eiraka nirigira riti: Ranga! Naanye naagira ati: Ndangye ki? Emibiri yoona eba nk'obunyaatsi, N'oburungi bwayo bwona buba nk'orurabyo rw'obunyaatsi." 
Isaiah40:7 Obunyaatsi buhonga, n'orurabyo ruhunduura, Ahakuba MUKAMA arwikiza omwitsyo gwe. Buzimazima abantu n'obunyaatsi." 
Isaiah40:8 Obunyaatsi buhonga, orurabyo ruhunduura, Kwonka ekigambo kya Ruhanga waitu kiryagumaho ebiro byona." 
Isaiah40:9 Iwe Saayuuni, orikuranga amakuru marungi, Irooko otembe orushozi ruraingwa; Iwe Yerusaalemu, orikuranga amakuru marungi, Imutsya eiraka ryawe n'amaani; Riimutsye, orekye kutiina; Ogambire endembo za Yuda oti: Reeba Ruhanga waanyu!" 
Isaiah40:10 Reeba, Mukama RUHANGA naija n'amaani, Naategyekyesa omukono gwe; Reeba, naija aine ebihembo, N'enzimuurano ye emwebembeire."
