Isaiah40:11 Aryariisa obusyo bwe nk'omuriisa, Aryakiikira abaana b'entaama ze omu mikono, Abatwarire omu kifuba kye, N'ezirikuhaka azishotoore." 
Isaiah40:12 N'oha orarengire amaizi g'omu nsi yoona omu ngaro ze, Akateera eiguru ekita, Akata omucuucu gw'ensi yoona omu ndengo, Akapima enshozi n'ebibungo aha minzaani?" 
Isaiah40:13 N'oha orahabwire Omwoyo wa MUKAMA, Akamwegyesa nk'omuhi w'obwengye we?" 
Isaiah40:14 N'oha ou areebuurizeho obwengye kumuhabura, Kandi n'oha oramwegyeise emihanda y'eby'oburyo, Akamwegyesa okuamanya n'okwetegyereza?" 
Isaiah40:15 Reeba, amahanga ni nk'eitondo ry'omu ndobo, Kandi nigagyeranisibwa n'omucuucu gw'aha minzaani; Reeba, akiriza ebirwa nk'orikukiriza akantu kakye munonga." 
Isaiah40:16 Lebanooni tekaarugwamu nku zirikumara, Kandi n'enyamaishwa zaayo tizikaamara kuba ekitambo ky'okwotsya." 
Isaiah40:17 Amahanga goona ni busha omu maisho ge, Ahariwe ni busha, nangwa nigabarwa nk'agarikukirwa busha." 
Isaiah40:18 Mbwenu n'oha ou waakushushanisa na Ruhanga, Nari mukaamushushanisa na kintu ki?" 
Isaiah40:19 Reeba ekishushani ekiheesire! Omukozi akiheesha, Omuheesi w'ezaabu akishweka ezaabu, Kandi akiheeshera emikuufu y'efeeza." 
Isaiah40:20 Omworo otarikubona ky'okuhonga nk'ekyo, Ashrura ekiti ekitarikujunda, Bwanyima ayesherurira omukozi omunyamwoga Kutaho ekishushani ekibaizirwe ekitarikubaasa kugwa." 
Isaiah40:21 Timukamanyaga? Timukahuriraga? Timukakigambirwaga okuruga iranaira? Timukeetegyerezaga okuruga aha kuhangwa kw'ensi? 
Isaiah40:22 Niwe Ogwo oshutama ahaiguru y'ensi eyebumburikire. N'abagituuramu bakaba nk'eseenene, Niwe abamba eiguru nk'omukingo, Akariteera nk'eihema ry'okuraaramu," 
Isaiah40:23 Ocwa busha abanyiginya, Akahindura abategyeki b'omu nsi busha." 
Isaiah40:24 Ku baba nibakibyarwa bati, nibakibibwa bati, Ekitsintsi kyabo nikikitsimba emizi omu itaka, Ruhanga akibahuuha, bahotoka, Akasooroor kabatwara nk'ekumbwe." 
Isaiah40:25 N'oha ou mwakungyeranisa nawe, Tukaingana? Nikwo Orikwera arikubuuza." 
Isaiah40:26 Mwimutsye amaisho gaanyu ahaiguru, mureebe; N'oha owaahangire biriya? Niwe Ogwo oshohoza amahe gaabyo omu mitwe, Byona akabyeta omu maziina; Ahabw'obukuru bw'amaani ge, Kandi ahabw'okuba ow'amaani omu bushoboorozi, Tihariho na kimwe ekibuzireho." 
Isaiah40:27 Iwe Yakobo, ningira Israeli, ahabw'enki nooyesaasira noogra oti: Omuhanda gwangye gusherekirwe MUKAMA, tarikugureeba, Kandi n'ebyangye Ruhanga wangye tarikubyetaho?" 
Isaiah40:28 Tokamanyaga? Tokahuriraga? MUKAMA ni Ruhanga otahwaho, Owaahangire emperu z'ensi. Tagwa nshazi, n'obu kwakuba okuruha; Okucondooza obwengye bwe tikurikubaasika." 
Isaiah40:29 Abarikugwa enshazi abaha amaani, Kandi n'otarikwebaasa, amwongyeraho amaani." 
Isaiah40:30 Abarikunyeeta baryagwa enshazi, baruhe, N'abatsigazi baryaghweramu kimwe amaani," 
Isaiah40:31 Kwonka abategyereza MUKAMA Baryagarukwamu amaani, Batumbiikye ahaiguru n'amapapa nk'amashamba, Baryairuka, tibariruha, Baryagyenda, tibarigwa nshazi." 
Isaiah41:1 Imwe birwa 'mwe, nimuhuname mumpurire; K'amahanga gagarukwemu amaani; Gairire haihi, gagambe; Twena tuteeranire hamwe, tushoboororane." 
Isaiah41:2 N'oha owaimukize ow'oburugwa-izooba, Otuura naasingura ahi aza hoona? Ahayo amahanga omu maisho ge, Ngu abone kuribatiirira abagabe; Abahindura omucuucu na rurara ye, Abagira ebishushunga ebirikutwarwa omuyaga n'obuta bwe." 
Isaiah41:3 Ababinga, arabaho n'obusingye, Naaraba omu mihanda ei atakaribatamuga." 
Isaiah41:4 Owaakozire ekyo, akakihitsya, n'oha, Akeeta abantu, nk'oku obusingye bwabo bwabaire nibukuratana, Okwiha aha kutandika? Nyowe MUKAMA, ow'okubanza, Kandi ow'aha muheru. Niinye naakikozire." 
Isaiah41:5 Ebirwa bikareeba, byatiina, Emperu z'ensi zaatetema; Byairira haihi, byaija." 
Isaiah41:6 Buri muntu naahwera mutaahi we, Naagira mwene ishe ati: Guma!" 
Isaiah41:7 Omunyamyoga naagumya omuheesi w'ezaabu, N'orikuteteza ekyoma n'enyondo agumya orikuheesha, naagira ati: Ebyoma twabiteerana gye. Bwanyima babihamya n'emisomaari, Ngu birekye kujegajega." 
Isaiah41:8 Kwonka iwe, Israeli omwiru wangye, Yakobo ou naatooraine, Oruzaaro rwa Abrahamu munywani wangye;" 
Isaiah41:9 Iwe ou naayetsire nkaiha aha muheru gw'ensi, Kandi nkakwiha aha nshonda zaayo za har3e, Ninkugira nti: Ori omwiru wangye; Nkakutorana, tindakucwire." 
Isaiah41:10 Otatiina, ahabw'okuba nkwine; Otahahaaza omutima, ahabw'okuba ndi Ruhanga waawe. Ndyakuha amaani, ndyakuhwera, Nkuramire n'omukono gwangye gawa buryo ogw'obusinguzi." 
Isaiah41:11 Reeba, abakwiniire ekiniga boona Baryakwatwa enshoni, bashoberwe; Abo abarikukurwanisa Baryacweka busha, bahwerekyerere." 
Isaiah41:12 Oryasherura abarikukuhakanisa, bakuburire; Kandi abarikukurwanisa baryacweka busha, babe nk'ebitariho." 
Isaiah41:13 Ahabw'okuba nyowe, MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Ndyakukwata omukono gwa buryo, Nkugire nti: Otatiina, Naija kukuhwera." 
Isaiah41:14 Iwe munyongororwa 'we Yakobo, otatiina, Naimwe bantu ba Israeli 'mwe, Ndyabahwera, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba. Omucunguzi waanyu niwe Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Isaiah41:15 Reeba, ndyakugira ekihuuzo kisya, Ky'obwogi, kandi eky'amaino; Oryahuura enshozi, ozaatagure, Kandi ebibungo obihindure ebishushunga." 
Isaiah41:16 Oryabiheheeza, omuyaga gubitware, N'eihunga ribitaatanise; Oryayesiimira omuri MUKAMA, Oyeraatire omuri Orikwera wa Israeli" 
Isaiah41:17 Abooro n'abakyene ku barisherura amaizi, Gaababurira, orurimi rwabakarangatana, Nyowe, MUKAMA, ndyabagarukamu; Nyowe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, tindibahemukaho." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndyaigura emigyera aha bibungo by'emparamaata, N'enshuro ahagati y'empanga, Mpindure eihanga ekiyanja ky'amaizi, N'ensi ekarangataine ngihindure enshuro z'amaizi," 
Isaiah41:19 Omu ihamba ndyabyaramu emyereezi, Eminyinya, emikadasi, n'emizeituuni; Kandi n'omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi ndyabyaramu emiberoohsi, Emikadasi n'emiteyashuuri, bikurire hamwe," 
Isaiah41:20 Abantu babone kureeba, bamanye, Bateekateekye, beetegyereze hamwe, Ku omukono gwa MUKAMA nigwo gukikozire, Kandi Orikwera wa Israeli ku niwe yaakihangire." 
Isaiah41:21 Nimutongane orubanja rwanyu, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, Mureeba ebi murikuhamizaho, nikwo Mukama wa Yakobo arikugamba." 
Isaiah41:22 Bareete ebishushani baybo, batuhanuurire ebiribaho. Mutugambire ebyabaireho, nk'oku byabaire biri, Tubiteekateekyeho, Tumanye obugarukiro bwabyo; Nari mutugambire ebirikwenda kubaho," 
Isaiah41:23 Mutuhanuurire ebiribaho bwanyima, Tumanye ku muri baaruhanga buzima; Mukore kurungi, nari kubi, Tubireebe, emitima etuhwe omunda, tutiine." 
Isaiah41:24 Reeba, timuri kintu, Kandi timwine ki mwakukora; Owaakuba niimwe yaihamu, akaaba ekihagaro." 
Isaiah41:25 Nyine ou nyimukize nkaiha aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; Mbwenu yaija. Yaaruga oburugwa-izooba, omuntu orikurahira eiziina ryangye; Aryaribatiirira abategyeki, nk'orikukaata obudongo, Kandi nk'omubumbi oku akaata eibumba." 
Isaiah41:26 Owaakirangire okwiha aha kutandika, ngu tukimanye, n'oha, Akakihanuuraho ira, tukabona kugira ngu ahikire? Tihariho owaakirangire, tihariho owaakigambire, N'obu yaakuba owaahuriire ebigambo byanyu." 
Isaiah41:27 Niinye naabandize kukigambira Saayuuni, Nkatuma Yerusaalemu entumwa Y'okubagambira ebigambo birungi." 
Isaiah41:28 Kwonka ku ndikureebayo, nshaga hatariyo muntu n'omwe; Nangwa n'omuri baaruhanga abo, ku ndikubuuza, Nshanga hatarimu muhi w'obwengye, Orikubaasa kungarukamu." 
Isaiah41:29 Reeba, boona n'entakimazire, Emirimo yaabo ni busha, N'ebishushani byabo ebiyagiibwe, n'omuyaga musha." 
Isaiah42:1 Reeba omuheereza wangye, ou ndamira, Ou naatooraine, ou omutima gwangye gushemerererwa; Mmutaireho Omwoyo wangye; Aryareetera amahanga eby'oburyo." 
Isaiah42:2 Taritongana, tariyomba, N'eiraka rye tiririhurirwa mu mihanda." 
Isaiah42:3 Orubingo orushatukire tariruhenda, N'orurimi orurikwaka kubi tariruraaza; Aryayoreka eby'oburyo omu mazima." 
Isaiah42:4 Tariremwa n'obu kwakuba okucuubwa omuhimbo, Okuhitsya obu ariteeraho kimwe eby'oburyo omu nsi; N'ebirwa biryategyereza ebiragiro bye." 
Isaiah42:5 Oku nikwo Ruhanga MUKAMA arikugamba, Owaahangire eiguru, akaribamba, Owaashashaanwire ensi, akagibuzya ebigirugamu. Abantu baamwo akabaha omwitsyo, N'abarikugigyendamu akabaha omwoyo." 
Isaiah42:6 Nyowe MUKAMA, nkakwetera omu kuhikiirira, Ndyakukwata omukono, ndyakurinda, Nkuhe okuba endagaano y'abantu N'omushana gw'okumurikira amahanga," 
Isaiah42:7 Okuhumuura amaisho g'empumi, Okwiha embohe omu kihome, N'abashutami omu mwirima, okubaiha omu nju y'embohe." 
Isaiah42:8 Ndi MUKAMA; eryo niryo iziina ryangye, Ekitiinisa kyangye tindikiha ondiijo, N'obu kwakuba okuha ebishushani ebibaizirwe okuhimbisibwa kwangye." 
Isaiah42:9 Reeba, ebyahanwirwe ira, mbwenu bihikiriziibwe, Hati nimbarangira ebisya, Nimbibagambira bitakabaireho." 
Isaiah42:10 Mweshongorere MUKAMA ekyeshongoro kisya, Naimwe abari aha muheru gw'ensi, mweshongore eby'okumusingiza! Reka enyanja ehinde n'ebigirimu byona, N'ebirwa n'ababitwiremu." 
Isaiah42:11 Ka eihamba n'endembo zaamwo biimutsye amaraka gaabyo, N'ebirwa ebitwirwemu Abakedari; Abatuuzi ba Seela beeshongore ahabw'okushemererwa, Bateerere akaari aha mitwe y'ebibungo." 
Isaiah42:12 Bahe MUKAMA ekitiinisa, Baruangy eokuhimbisibwa kwe omu birwa." 
Isaiah42:13 MUKAMA aryahurura nk'omushaija emanzi; Aryaimutsya ekiniga kye, nk'omushaija omanyiire engamba, Ahigye, agambe n'eiraka rihango, Ayeyorekye abazigu be ku ari emanzi." 
Isaiah42:14 Mmazire omwanya muhango mpunami, Ntarikuteeza, kandi nyegumize; Hati naaza kutaka nk'omukazi orikurumwa, Mpeere, nsheemeekye." 
Isaiah42:15 Ndyacwekyereza enshozi n'ebibungo, Nyomye obunyaatsi bwabyo bwona; Kandi emigyera ndyagihindura ebirwa N'ebiyanja mbyomye." 
Isaiah42:16 Empumi ndyazikwatira oruhimbo, Nzitooze omuhanda ogu zitarikamanya, Nzirabye omu tuhanda otu zitakamanyaga. Ndyahindura omwirima omushana omu maisho gaazo, N'emyanya etaringaniire ngiringaanize. Ebyo ndyabikora, tindibahemukaho." 
Isaiah42:17 Kwonka abarikwesiga ebishushani ebibaizirwe, Bakagira ebishushani ebiyagiibwe bati: Niimwe baaruhanga baitu, Baryagarurwa enyima, bahemurirwe kimwe." 
Isaiah42:18 Imwe bifa-matu 'mwe, muhurire; Naimwe empumi, mubuuruure mubone kuhweza!" 
Isaiah42:19 N'oha ori empumi okwihaho omuheereza wangye, Nari ekifa-matu nk'entumwa ei ndikutuma? N'oha ohumire nk'owangye owaayehaireyo, Nari empumi nk'omuheereza wa MUKAMA?" 
Isaiah42:20 Areeba bingi, kwonka tabyetegyereza, Amatu ge gaigwire, kwonka tarikuhurira." 
Isaiah42:21 MUKAMA ahabw'okuhikiirira kwe akasiima Kukuza ebiragiro bye n'okubiha ekitiinisa. 
Isaiah42:22 Kwonka eri n'eihanga eryakirwe ebyaryo, rikagaruka rikanyagwa. Abantu baamwo boona bagwire omu busya, Kandi basherekirwe omu bihome. Bahindukire enkwatwa, baabura kijuna, Baaba eminyago, baabura owaagira ati: Mubibagarurire." 
Isaiah42:23 Ebyo omuriimwe hariho otegire amatu, Akataho omutima kuhurira eby'obunaku oburiija?" 
Isaiah42:24 N'oha owaahaireyo Yakobo kunyagwa, Kandi akahayo Israeli omu bambuzi? Ti MUKAMA ou twacumwireho, Kandi ou bataraikiriize kugyendera mu mihanda ye, N'okworobera ebiragiro bye?" 
Isaiah42:25 Nikyo yaamushukiireho ekiniga kye ekirikwaka nk'omuriro N'engamba z'amaani, Kikamwotsya embaju zoona, kwonak atakimanye, Kikamubabura, kwonka atakyeteho." 
Isaiah43:1 Kwonka hati MUKAMA owaakuhangire, iwe Yakobo, Kandi akakubumba, iwe Israeli, naagira ati: Otatiina, ahabw'okuba nkakucungura, Naakweta omu iziina, ori owangye." 
Isaiah43:2 Ku oriraba omu maizi, ndyaba nkwine; Ku oriraba omu migyera, terikutwara; Ku origyendera omu muriro, torisya, N'ebirimi byagwo tibirikubabura." 
Isaiah43:3 Ahabw'okuba ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Orikwera wa Israeli, kandi Omujuni waawe. Nkahayo Misri kuba eky'okukucungura, Esiopia na Seeba nkazihayo ahabwawe." 
Isaiah43:4 Ahabw'okuba okambeera enkora-mutima, Waaba ow'okuheebwa ekitiinisa, naanye naakukunda, Nikyo ndiheerayo abantu ahabwawe, N'amahanga ahabw'amagara gaawe." 
Isaiah43:5 Otatiina, ahabw'okuba nkwine; Ndyareeta oruzaaro rwawe, ndwihe oburugwa-izooba." 
Isaiah43:6 Ndyagambira obukiizi-bwa-bumosho nti: Barekure! N'obukiizi-bwa-buryo nti: Otabaanyima; Ndeetera batabani bangye barugye hare, Na bahara bangye barugye aha muheru gw'ensi," 
Isaiah43:7 Buri muntu weena orikwetererwa eiziina ryangye, Ou naahangire kumpaisa ekitiinisa. Eego niinye naamuhangire, kandi niijye naamubumbire." 
Isaiah43:8 Shohoza abantu abaine amaisho, kwonka bahumire, Kandi abaine amatu, kwonka gafiire. K'amahanga goona gateeranire hamwe, Enganda zoona ziteerane." 
Isaiah43:9 Hariho omuribo abaakubaasa kugamba eki, Bakatworeka ebyabaireho ira? Ka bareete baakareebi, basingye orubanja, Babone kuhurira, bagire bati: N'eky'amazima." 
Isaiah43:10 MUKAMA naagira ati: Imwe n'omuheereza wangye ou naatooraine, Muri baakareebi b'okuhamya ebyangye, Ngu mubone kummanya, muunyikirize, Mwetegyereze ku ndi We. Ntakabaireho, tihariho ruhanga orabaireho, Kandi tihariho oribaho akankurata." 
Isaiah43:11 Nyowe nyenka, niinye MUKAMA, Kandi tihariho ondiijo mujuni kureka nyowe." 
Isaiah43:12 Niinye naarangire eby'okujunwa, nkabyoreka, Obwo hatariho ruhanga w'enduga-mahanga omuriimwe. Nikyo mubeereire baakareebi bangye b'okukihamya, Nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah43:13 Niinye MUKAMA, kandi okuruga hati Niinyija kuguma ndi We. Kandi tihariho orikubaasa kwiha ekintu kyona omu mikono yangye; Niinyija kukora; n'oha orikubaasa kukizibira?" 
Isaiah43:14 MUKAMA omucunguzi waanyu, Orikwera wa Israeli naagira ati: Ahabwanyu ndyatuma Babulooni, Nshuumye abaayo boona bari empungi, Nibo Bakaludaaya, bahungye n'emeeri zaabo, Ezi baabaire nibeesiimira." 
Isaiah43:15 Ndi MUKAMA, Orikwera waanyu, Omuhangi wa Israeli, kandi Mukama waanyu." 
Isaiah43:16 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, Orabya omuhanda omu nyanja, N'akahanda omu maizi maingi," 
Isaiah43:17 Akashohoza ebigaari n'embaraasi, N'eihe ry'engabo, n'abarwani b'engamba; Babyama hamwe, tibabaasa kwimuka, Baraazibwa nk'oku baraaza orumuri;" 
Isaiah43:18 Naagira ati: Ebya ira murekye kubiijuka, N'ebyahingwire, murekye kubyetaho." 
Isaiah43:19 Reeba, naaza kukora ekintu kisya, Hati kyaza kwatuka; timurikukireeba? Ndyarabya omuhanda omu ihamba, N'emigyera omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi." 
Isaiah43:20 Enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa, zaamuha na zaamaaya, Ziryampa ekitiinisa, Ahabw'okuba nindeeta amaizi omu ihamba, N'emigyera omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi Kunywaisa abantu bangye abatoorainwe," 
Isaiah43:21 Abu naayehangiire, Ngu bamanyise eby'okuhimbisibwa kwangye." 
Isaiah43:22 Kwonka, iwe Yakobo torantakiire, Iwe Israeli, okantamwa!" 
Isaiah43:23 Torandeeteire ntaama zaawe kuba empongano z'okwotsya, Kandi tompaisize kitiinisa bitambo byawe. Tinkuhenzire n'emitoijo, N'obu kwakuba okukurusya n'obubaane bw'okuunyokyeza." 
Isaiah43:24 Tonguriire bikoijo n'empiiha zaawe, Kandi tonyigutsize bishaju by'ebitambo byawe, Kureka ompenzire n'ebibi byawe, Wandusya n'eby'okutahikiirira byawe." 
Isaiah43:25 Nyowe, nyowe nyenka, niinye orikuragaza Ebicumuro byawe, nkakwesaasirira, Kandi ebibi byawe tindibiijuka." 
Isaiah43:26 Nyijutsya, tutongane; Tongana ebyawe, obone kusinga." 
Isaiah43:27 Shwenkuru ow'okubanza akashiisha, N'abatonganizi baawe bancumuraho," 
Isaiah43:28 Nikyo naagayisiize abakuru b'Omwanya ogurikwera, Nkagira Yakobo ekijumo, Na Israeli eky'okukyeenwa." 
Isaiah44:1 Kwonka hati mbwenu, Yakobo omwiru wangye, Iwe Israeli ou naatooraine, hurira!" 
Isaiah44:2 MUKAMA owaakuhangire, akakworora okwiha obu waazarwa, Kandi origuma naakuhwera, naagira ati: Otatiina, iwe Yakobo omwiru wangye, Yeshuruuni ou naatooraine," 
Isaiah44:3 Ahabw'okuba ndyashuka amaizi aha nsi ekarangataine, N'emigyera aha itaka ryomire. Ndyashika Omwoyo wangye aha ruzaaro rwawe, Na baijukuru baawe mbahe omugisha." 
Isaiah44:4 Baryamera nk'emikinga y'aha mugyera Oku emera omu bunyaatsi. 
Isaiah44:5 Omwe aryagira ati: Ndi owa MUKAMA, Ondi ayeyeterere Yakobo, N'ondiijo ayehandiikire n'omukono gwe ku ari owa MUKAMA, Ayekubye Israeli." 
Isaiah44:6 MUKAMA, Mukama wa Israeli, MUKAMA ow'amahe omucunguzi we, naagira ati: Ndi ow'okubanza kandi ow'aha muheru; Tihariho Ruhanga ondiijo kureka nyowe." 
Isaiah44:7 N'oha orikushushana naanye? Naakigambe, Akirangye, akyorekye omu maisho gangye. Abaarangire ira ebirikwenda kwija nibaahi? Nibatugambire ebirikwija kubaho." 
Isaiah44:8 Mutatiina, kandi mutahahaaza omutima; Tiinye naabagambiire okuruga ira, Nkabibamanyisa? Naimwe muri baakareebi bangye! Hariho Ruhanga ondiijo okwihaho nyowe? Tihariho Rukiri ondiijo; tiinyine ondiijo weena ou ndukumanya." 
Isaiah44:9 Abakora ebishushani ebirikuramibwa boona ni busha; n'ebintu ebi barikwesiimira tibiine mugasho; abarikubiramya tibarikureeba, tibaine ki barikumanya, kandi aha muheru baryaitwa enshoni." 
Isaiah44:10 N'oha orabaizire ekishushani kya ruhanga, nari oraheeesire ekishushani ekiyagiibwe ekitaine mugasho?" 
Isaiah44:11 Reeba, bagyenzi be boona baryakwatwa enshoni, ahabw'okuba abanyamyoga baabyo n'abantu-buntu; ka boona bateeranire hamwe, beemerere; haza oreebe ku baitwa obwoba, enshoni zikababumbira hamwe." 
Isaiah44:12 Omuheesi akijugutirira omu makara, bwanyima akiteeza enyondo, akiheeshesa omukono gwe gw'amaani; kwonka ku agira enjara, ahwamu amaani; ku abura amaizi, agwa enshazi." 
Isaiah44:13 Omubaizi areega omugoye, aharaatuzaho ekaraamu akibaija n'embaijo, akigyeresamu ekyoma ekirikugyera, akishushanisa n'omuntu, kigira oburungi nk'obw'omuntu, kiguma omu nju." 
Isaiah44:14 Atema emyereezi, nari atooranamu omuzo nari omwela, agureka gukurira omu miti y'omu kibira; kandi abyara omuberooshi, enjura egwitirira." 
Isaiah44:15 Bwanyima gurugamu enku z'abantu; omuntu aihaho omuganda, agwota; ahemba omuriro, ateeka eby'okurya; kandi agubaijamu ekishushani kya ruhanga, akiramya, akihindura ekishushani ekirikuramibwa, akijuumara omumaisho." 
Isaiah44:16 Empimbi yaagwo agihemba; endiijo agyokyesa enyama, agirya, ahaaga; kandi ogwo muriro agaruka agwota, agira ati: Ayaayaaya, eshi naabona akariro, naahwa embeho!" 
Isaiah44:17 Bwanyima empimbi eyatsigaraho agibaijamu ruhanga we, nikyo kishushani kye ekibaizirwe, akijuumara omumaisho, akiramya, akishaba ati: Nkiza; ahabw'okuba ori ruhanga wangye." 
Isaiah44:18 Tibaine ki barikumanya; kandi tibagira ki bateekateeka; ahakuba akabahumya amaisho, tibarikubaasa kureeba, yaabaita omutima, tibarikubaasa kwetegyereza." 
Isaiah44:19 Tihariho orikuteekateeka, tihariho orikumanya nari orikwetegyereza, akagira ati: Ekicweka kyagwo nkihembire, amakara gaakyo naagateekyesa omugaati, naayootsyaho enyama, naagirya; mbwenu ekitsigaireho nkihindure ekirikuzira, njuumare omu maisho g'empimbi y'ekiti, ngiramye?" 
Isaiah44:20 Omuntu ogwo arya eiju, ahabisiibwe omutima ogurikwebeiha; tarikubaasa kwejuna nari okugira ati: Eki nyine omu mukono gwangye gwa buryo, ti ky'ebishuba?" 
Isaiah44:21 Iwe Yakobo, kandi Israeli, ijuka ebyo; Ahabw'okuba ori omwiru wangye. Niimye naakuhangire; ori omwiru wangye. Buzimazima Israeli, tindikwebwa." 
Isaiah44:22 Nkwerwireho ebicumuro byawe nk'ekicu, N'ebibi byawe nk'oruho; Ngarukira, ahabw'okuba nkakucungura." 
Isaiah44:23 Iwe iguru 'we, yeshongore; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA niwe yaakikozire; Iwe Okuzimu, gamba munonga; Imwe enshozi, muteere akaari, mweshongore; Naiwe Kibira 'we, n'emiti yoona erimu! Ahakuba MUKAMA acungwire Yakobo, Kandi aryaheebwa ekitiinisa omuri Israeli." 
Isaiah44:24 MUKAMA Omucunguzi waawe, Owaakworoire okwiha obu waazaarwa, naagira ati: Niinye MUKAMA, owaahangire ebintu byona, Nkabamba eiguru nyenka, Nkashashaanura ensi. N'oha ou naabaire nyine?" 
Isaiah44:25 Niinye ohindura busha okuragura kw'abanyabishuba, N'abafumu nkabahindura abashema, Nkagarura enyima abanyabwengye, Okumanya kwabo nkakuhindura obushema." 
Isaiah44:26 Niinye ohamya ekigambo ky'omuheereza wangye, Nkahikiiriza enaama y'entumwa zangye, Nkagamba ahari Yerusaalemu nti: Eryatuurwamu, N'endembo z'omuri Yuda nti: Ziryayombekwa. Kandi ndyagaruraho emyanya yaamwo eyaahindukire amatongo." 
Isaiah44:27 Niinye ogambira amaizi maingi nti: Yoma, Kandi ndyayomya emigyera yaawe;" 
Isaiah44:28 Orikugamba ahari Kuuro nti: N'omuriisa wangye; Aryahikiiriza ebi ndikwenda byona; N'ahari Yerusaalemu nti: Eryayombekwa; N'ahari hekalu nti: Omusingi gwawe guryateebwaho. 
Isaiah45:1 Oku nikwo nyowe, MUKAMA, ndikugambira Ou naashukireho amajuta, Kuuro, Ou naakwatsire omukono gwa buryo, Ngu mmugomoorere amahanga, Nzirikuurure abagabe, Mmwigurire enyigi, Amarembo garekye kukingwa;" 
Isaiah45:2 Ningira nti: Ndyakwebembera, Ahataringaniire mparingaanize; Ndyahendagura enyigi z'emiringa, N'empimbi z'ebyoma nzihirimburemu kabiri." 
Isaiah45:3 Ndyakuha obutungi oburi omu mwirima, N'ebintu ebibiikirwe omu myanya y'omu mubonano, Obone kumanya ku niinye MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, okwetsire omu iziina." 
Isaiah45:4 Ahabw'omwiru wangye Yakobo, Israeli ou naatooraine, Nkwetsire omu iziina, naakukubya ekikubyo, N'obu oraabe otakammanyaga." 
Isaiah45:5 Niinye MUKAMA, tihariho ondiijo, Kandi tihariho Ruhanga ondiijo, kureka nyowe. Ndyaguma nkuzirikye, n'obu oraabe otakammanyaga," 
Isaiah45:6 Abantu b'oburugwa-izooba n'oburengyerwa-izooba Babone kumanya ku hatariho ondiijo, okwihaho nyowe. Niinye MUKAMA, tihariho ondiijo." 
Isaiah45:7 Niinye ntaho omushana, nkahanga omwirima, Nkareeta obusingye n'enaku; Niinye MUKAMA okora ebyo byona." 
Isaiah45:8 Iwe iguru 'we, toonyerera, N'akaabunga kashukye okuhikiirira, Ensi eigukye, okujunwa kushohore, Kandi kumeremu okuhikiirira. Nyowe MUKAMA, niinye owaabihangire." 
Isaiah45:9 Orikuhakanisa Omuhangi we aryakareeba, Haza nawe ari orugusyo omu zindi! Nimugira ngu eibumba rikaabuuza orikuribumba riti: Nombumbamu ki? Nari eki arikukora kimugira kiti: Toine ngaro?" 
Isaiah45:10 Aryakareeba orikubuuza ishe ati: Noozaara ki? Akagaruka akabuuza nyina ati: Noorumwa ki? 
Isaiah45:11 Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Orikwera wa Israeli, Kandi Omuhangi we arikugira ati: Mukambuurize eby'abaana bangye, Nari mundagiira oku ndatwaze ebi ndikukora n'emikono yangye?" 
Isaiah45:12 Nkakora ensi, naagihangamu omuntu; Emikono yangye niyo yaabambire eiguru, N'amahe gaaryo goona nkagategyeka." 
Isaiah45:13 Nyimukize Kuuro omu kuhikiirira, Kandi ndyagorora emihanda ye yoona. Aryayombeka orurembo rwangye, Arekure abantu bangye abaanyagirwe, Ataguririirwe, n'obu kwakuba okuheebwa ebihembo. Nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba." 
Isaiah45:14 MUKAMA naagira ati: Abatungi ba Misri n'abashuubuzi ba Esiopia, N'aba Seeba, abashaija baraingwa, Baryaija ahariiwe, babe abaawe, bakukuratire; Baryaija omu njegyere, bakwinamire, Bakweshengyereze nibagira bati: Ruhanga ari hamwe naiwe wenka; Tihariho Ruhanga ondiijo kureka We." 
Isaiah45:15 Ai Ruhanga wa Israeli, Omujuni, Buzimazima ori Ruhanga orikweshereka." 
Isaiah45:16 Abarikukora ebishushani boona baryaitwa enshoni, Bashoberwe, baburaburirirwe hamwe." 
Isaiah45:17 Kwonka Abaisraeli baryajunwa MUKAMA, Batungye okujunwa okutahwaho; Timuriitwa nshoni, kandi timurishoberwa Okuhiitsya ryari na ryari." 
Isaiah45:18 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, Owaahangire eiguru, (niwe Ruhanga) Akahanga ensi, akagibumburika, Kandi akagihamya. (Taragihangire etari mu buteeka, Kureka akagihanga kutuurwamu.) Naagira ati: Niinye MUKAMA; tihariho ondiijo." 
Isaiah45:19 Tinkagambiraga mu mubonano Omu nsi y'omwirima; Tinkagiraga ruzaaro rwa Yakobo nti: Munsherurire busha. Nyowe MUKAMA ngamba amazima, Ndanga ebihikire." 
Isaiah45:20 Imwe ab'amahanga abahonokireho, Mweteerane, mwije, Mwirire haihi hamwe. Abagyenda n'ebishushani byabo by'ebiti, Bakaguma nibashaba ruhanga otarikubaasa kujuna, Tibaine bwengye." 
Isaiah45:21 Mureete ebyanyu, mubitongane: Ka bahanuure hamwe. N'oha owaakyorekire obutakimanywa? N'oha owaakirangire omu biro bya ira? Tiinye MUKAMA? Kandi tihariho ruhanga ondiijo kureka nyowe, Ruhanga ohikiriire, kandi Omujuni; Tihariho ondiijo weena, kureka nyowe." 
Isaiah45:22 Imwe mwena abari aha mperu z'ensi, Mundeebe, mujunwe! Ahakuba niinye Ruhanga, tihariho ondiijo." 
Isaiah45:23 Niinyerahira; Ekigambo kirugire omu kanwa kangye omu kuhikiirira, Kandi tikirifa busha; nindahira nti: Abantu boona baryantsimbira amaju, Na buri rurimi rube niinye rwarahira." 
Isaiah45:24 Baryangambaho bati: Omuri MUKAMA wenka nimwo okuhikiirira n'amaani biri; Abaamugiriire ekiniga boona Baryaija ah'ari, bakwatwe enshoni." 
Isaiah45:25 Omuri MUKAMA nimwo oruzaaro rwa Israeli rwona Rurisingurira, rukeesiima." 
Isaiah46:1 Beeli nainama, Neebo naabandama, Ebishushani byabo byekoreirwe enyamaishwa n'amatungo. Ebintu ebi mwekorera bihindukire emitwaro Erikwekorezibwa enyamaishwa eziruhire." 
Isaiah46:2 Nibainama, nibabandamira hamwe, Tibarikubaasa kwihaho egyo mitwaro, Kureka nayo yaatwarwa omu bukwatwa." 
Isaiah46:3 Iwe nju ya Yakobo 'we, ntega okutu; Naimwe ab'enju ya Israeli abaahonokireho, Abu ntuura mpeekire, Okwiha obu mwaruga omu nda mukazaarwa," 
Isaiah46:4 Mukahika n'omu bugurusi, nkiba We; Kandi muryarugaho mumere enju nkibaheekire. Niinye naahangire, kandi niinye ndiheeka; Ndyaheeka, kandi njune." 
Isaiah46:5 Mukaanshushanisa n'oha, ou mwakuunyiganisa nawe, Mukangyeranisa nawe, tukashushana?" 
Isaiah46:6 Abafukunkura ezaabu omu nshaho, Bakapima efeeza aha minzaani, Baguriirira omuheesi w'ezaabu, aziheeshamu ruhanga; Batyo bajuumara omu maisho g'ekyo kishushani, bakiramya!" 
Isaiah46:7 Bakita aha mabega, bakiheeka; Bakita omu mwanya gwakyo, kyemereramu; Tikibaasa kugurugamu; Omuntu ku akitakira, tikimugarukamu, N'obu kwakuba okumujuna omu kabi." 
Isaiah46:8 Imwe abarikucumura, mwijukye ebyo, Mweyorekye ku muri abashaija; mugarukye mubiteekateekyeho." 
Isaiah46:9 Mwijukye ebyabandize kubaho ira, Ahakuba niinye Ruhanga, tihariho ondiijo; Niinye Ruhanga; tihariho orikushushana naanye," 
Isaiah46:10 Okwiha aha kutandika nkaranga eby'emperu, Naiha omu biro bya ira, nindanga ebitakabaireho, Ningira nti: Enaama yangye eryahama, Mpikiirize ebi naamaririire kukora byona." 
Isaiah46:11 Ndyayeta empungu, erugye oburugwa-izooba, Omushaija oine enaama zangye arugye omu nsi ya hare. Nkakigamba, kandi ndyakihikiiriza, Nkakimariirira, kandi ndyakukora." 
Isaiah46:12 Mumpurire, imwe abaine emitima egangaire, Abari hare n'okuhikiirira;" 
Isaiah46:13 Reeba, nairiza haihi okuhikiirira kwangye, Tikuri hare munonga, N'okujuna kwangye tikurituurayo; Ndyakuta omuri Saayuuni Ahabwa Israeli ekitiinisa kyangye." 
Isaiah47:1 Iwe Babulooni oshugaine, Shuuma, oshutame omu mucuucu! Iwe Bukaludaaya 'we, Shutama ahansi, otakiri ha kitebe ky'obugabe; Ahabw'okuba torigaruka kwetwa ojarami, Nari ogwirwe gye." 
Isaiah47:2 Kwata eseiso, ose; Oyeshuuruure ahamaisho; Hinyirira ekiteetei kyawe, oyeshuuruure amaguru, Orabe omu migyera, oyambukye." 
Isaiah47:3 Enjuuro yaawe eryareebwa, N'enshoni zaawe ziryareebwa butunu. Ndyahoora enzigu, tindisaasira muntu n'omwe." 
Isaiah47:4 Omucunguzi waitu, eiziina rye ni MUKAMA ow'amahe, Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Isaiah47:5 Iwe Bukaludaaya 'we, Shutama ohuname, oze omu mwirima, Ahabw'okuba torigaruka kwetwa Omugabekazi w'ensi z'abagabe." 
Isaiah47:6 Nkagwerwa kubi abantu bangye, Naagayisa obuhunguzi bwangye; Naabahayo omu mikono yaawe, Tiwaabasaasira na kakye, Abagurusi waabakorera omutwaro guremeire munonga;" 
Isaiah47:7 Waagira oti: Ndyaba omugabekazi ebiro byona. Ebyo tiwaabyetaho, Kandi tiwaijuka bugarukoro bwabyo." 
Isaiah47:8 N'ahabw'ekyo hurira ebi, iwe oyehaireyo kukora eby'okweshemeza, Okashutama otaine ki oyetaireho, Okagira omu mutima gwawe oti: Niinye ndiho, tihariho ondiijo okwihaho nyowe. Tindiba mufaakazi, Kadi tindifiisa baana." 
Isaiah47:9 Kwonka eizooba rimwe ebyo byombi biryakuhikaho kitaraariire, Okufiisa abaana n'obufaakazi biryakugwaho bitatuubiibweho, N'obu oburogi bwawe buraabe buri bwingi buta, N'okubandwa kwawe kurengyesereize munonga." 
Isaiah47:10 Ahabw'okuba oyesigire obugomi bwawe, Waagira oti: Tihariho ori kundeeba; Obwengye bwawe n'okumanya kwawe nibyo bikuhabize, Okagira omu mutima gwawe oti: Niinye ndiho; tihariho ondiijo okwihaho nyowe." 
Isaiah47:11 Kwonka oryahikwaho akabi, Aku otarikubaasa kuzibira; Oryagwerwa akagwe, Aku otaribaasa kweihaho; N'okucwekyerera oku otakamanyaga Kuryakuhikaho kitaraariire." 
Isaiah47:12 Mbwenu gumira aha kubandwa kwawe N'oburogo bwawe oburengyesereize, Ebi waafeereire kubi okwiha omu buto; Obundi nyentsya biryagira eki byakugasira, Oitse abantu obwoba." 
Isaiah47:13 Enaama zaawe nyingi zikuruhize. K'abantu abaragura eby'eiguru n'enyonyoozi N'eby'okuboneka kw'ameezi Baimukye, bakujune ebirikubaho." 
Isaiah47:14 Reeba, baryaba nk'ebitsintsi by'embuba, Omuriro gguryabootsya; Tibaryeiha mu maani g'okubuguma kwagwo. Ogwo muriro tiguriba makara g'okwota, N'obu kwakuba okushutamwaho!" 
Isaiah47:15 Okwo nikwo abo abu waabaire ofa kubi nabo barikubeera, Abaabaire baashuubura naiwe okwiha omu butsigazi bwawe; Baryayegyendera, buri omwe atoore omuhanda gwe; Obure ow'okukujuna." 
Isaiah48:1 Muhurire ebi, imwe ab'enju ya Yakobo, Imwe abarikwetererwa eiziina rya Israeli, Abaakomookire omu nda ya Yuda, Abarahira eiziina rya MUKAMA, Bakagamba ku bari aba Ruhanga wa Israeli, Kwonka batarikukikora mu mazima nari omu buryo." 
Isaiah48:2 Obwo bwona nibeeyeterera orurembo orurikwera, Nibeegamira Ruhanga wa Israeli, Ou eiziina rye riri MUKAMA ow'amahe." 
Isaiah48:3 Ebya ira nkabiranga obutakimanywa, Byaruga omu kanwa kangye, naabimanyisa; Naabikora ahonaaho, byabaho." 
Isaiah48:4 Nkaba nimmanya ku ori engangaazi, N'ebitsya byawe ku biri nk'omutsi gw'ekyoma, N'aha buso bwawe ku hari nk'omuringa." 
Isaiah48:5 Nkabikurangira ira, Naabikumanyisa bitakabaireho, Ngu otakaagira oti: Ekishushani kyangye ekirikuramibwa Nikyo kibikozire, Ekishushani kyangye ekibaizire kandi n'ekiheesire Nibyo bibiragiire." 
Isaiah48:6 Okakihurira; mbwenu reeba ebi byona, Torikwija kubimanyisa? Okwiha hati niinyija kukuhuriza ebigambo bisya, Ebisherekirwe, ebi otakamanyaga." 
Isaiah48:7 Byahangwa hari, ti bya ira; Okuhitsya eri izooba tokabihurirahoga, Ngu otakaagira oti: Nkaba nimbimanya." 
Isaiah48:8 Tokahuriraga, tokamanyaga, Okwiha ira okutu kwawe kukaba kutakaigukaga; Ahabw'okuba nkamanya ngu noija kuba endeebya, Kandi okwiha obu waazaarwa okeetwa omugomi." 
Isaiah48:9 Ahabw'eiziina ryangye naaza kuba ndekire kukugirira ekiniga; Ahabw'okuhimbisibwa kwangye naaza kukugumisiririza, Ndekye kukwihiraho kimwe." 
Isaiah48:10 Reeba, nkushemeize, kwonka ti nk'efeeza, Nkugyereize omu iziiko ry'okubonabonesibwa." 
Isaiah48:11 Nyowe ahabwangye, nyowe nyenka ndyakikora; Mbwenu eiziina ryangye rijumirwe ki? Ekitiinisa kyangye tindikiha ondiijo." 
Isaiah48:12 Mpurira, iwe Yakobo, Kandi Israeli, ou naayetsire! Niinye We; ndi ow'okubanza, Kandi ow'aha muheru." 
Isaiah48:13 Omukono gwangye nigwo gwataireho omusingi gw'ensi, Omukono gwangye gwa buryo nigwo gwabambire eiguru. Ku mbyeta, byemerera hamwe." 
Isaiah48:14 Imwe mwena, mute3eranire hamwe, muhurire! N'oha omuribo orarangire ebyo? Ogwo muntu MUKAMA naamukunda, Kandi aryagira Babulooni nk'oku MUKAMA arikwenda, N'omukono gwe guryarwanisa Abakaludaaya." 
Isaiah48:15 Nyowe ahabwangye nkakigamba, naamweta, Kandi mmureetsire; aryaba gye omu rugyendo rwe." 
Isaiah48:16 Mumpikye haihi, muhurire ebi; Okuruga aha kutandika tinkagambaga mu mubonano; Okwiha byaba kubaho ntuurayo. Mbwenu hati Mukama RUHANGA antumire, Yantuma n'Omwoyo we." 
Isaiah48:17 Oku nikwo MUKAMA Omucunguzi waawe, Orikwera wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Niinye MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Orikukwegyesa eby'okukugasira, Nkakwebembera omu muhanda ogu oshemereire kutoora." 
Isaiah48:18 Nangwa kuri waayorobeire ebiragiro byangye! Obwo obusingye bwawe bukaabaire nk'omugyera, N'okuhikiirira kwawe kuba nk'ebingonzi by'enyanja;" 
Isaiah48:19 Oruzaaro rwawe rukaabaire nk'omusheenyi, Na baijukuru baawe baba nk'omucuucu gwagwo; Eiziina ryabo tiryakwihirweho, N'obu kwakuba okumarwaho omu maisho gangye." 
Isaiah48:20 Mushohore, murugye Babulooni, Muhungye, murugye omu Bakaludaaya; Mukirangye, nimuteera akaari k'okushemererwa, Mukimanyise, mukibuzye, kihikye aha muheru gw'ensi, Nimugira muti: MUKAMA acungwire omwiru we Yakobo!" 
Isaiah48:21 Ku yaabeebembeire naabarabya omu ihamba, Tibaragizire iriho; Akabaihira amaizi omu rukiri, gaahimintika; Yaayata orwo rukiri, amaizi gaayerekyera." 
Isaiah48:22 Aha mubi tibahaho busingye, Nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah49:1 Imwe birwa 'mwe, mumpurire, Naimwe amahanga agarugire hare, mutegye amatu. MUKAMA akaanyeta ntakazairwe, Yaanyeta eiziina nkiri omu nda ya maawe." 
Isaiah49:2 Akanwa kangye yaakagira nka rurara y'obwogi, Yanshereka omu kicuucu ky'omukono gwe; Yampiika omu mutaana gwe;" 
Isaiah49:3 Kandi yangira ati: Ori omwiru wangye, Israeli, Omuriiwe nimwo ndiheerwa ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah49:4 Kwonka naagira nti: Nkahendekyera busha, Amaani gangye gaaga busha. Kwonka ebyangye MUKAMA niwe arikubimanya, Kandi Ruhanga wangye niwe arinzimuurira." 
Isaiah49:5 Kandi hati, oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba Owampindwire omuheereza we, ninkiruga omu nda ya maawe, Ngu mmugarurire Yakobo, Abaisraeli babone kumuteeraniraho; Ahabw'okuba ndi ow'ekitiinisa omu maisho ga MUKAMA, Kandi Ruhanga wangye ahindukire amaani gangye" 
Isaiah49:6 Naagira ati: Okuba omuheereza wangye ow'owimutsya enganda za Yakobo, N'okugarura Abaisraeli abaahonokireho, n'ekintu kikye munonga; Kureka ndyakugira omu shana gw'okujwera amahanga, Okujuna kwangye kubone kuhika aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Isaiah49:7 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, Omucunguzi wa Israeli kandi Orikwera we, Ou amahanga garikugaya, gakatamirwa kimwe, Omuheereza w'abategyeki, naagira ati: Abagabe baryakureeba, baimukye Hamwe n'abanyiginya, baramye, Ahabwa MUKAMA orikwesigwa, Orikwera wa Israeli owaakutooraine." 
Isaiah49:8 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Omu bunaku bw'okwikiririzibwamu nkakugarukamu, N'aha izooba ry'okujunirwaho naakuhwera; Ndyakurinda, nkuteho kuba endagaano y'abantu, Obone kuhamya ensi N'okubaganisa obuhunguzi obwatsigirweho," 
Isaiah49:9 Okugambira embohe oti: Mushohore, N'abari omu mwirima oti: Mweyorekye. Baryariira omu mihanda, N'aha mitwe y'enshozi zoona ez'emparamaata Habe amariisizo gaabo;" 
Isaiah49:10 Tibarigira njara nari eiriho, N'obu kwakuba okwokibwa ekibabo ky'eizooba nari omushana; Ahabw'okuba Ogwo obainiire esaasi aryabeebembera, Abahitsye aha nshuro z'amaizi." 
Isaiah49:11 Kandi enshozi zangye zoona ndyazigira omuhanda, N'emihanda yaangye rugyendwa eryatunguurwa." 
Isaiah49:12 Reeba, aba baryaruga hare, Bariya barugye aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho N'obw'oburengyerwa-izooba, N'abandi barugye omu nsi ya Sinimu." 
Isaiah49:13 Iwe iguru 'we, yeshongore; naiwe nsi 'we, yesiime; Naimwe nshozi 'we, muteere akaari, mweshongore! Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ahuumuriize abantu be, Kandi abantu be abarikubonabonesibwa aryabagirira esaasi." 
Isaiah49:14 Kwonka Saayuuni agizire ati: MUKAMA antisigireho, Mukama wangye anyebirwe." 
Isaiah49:15 Omukama naabaasa kwebwa omwana we ou arikwontsya, Abure kugirira esaasi omwana orugire omu nda ye? Nangwa bo bakaabaasa kwebwa, Kwonka nyowe tindikwebwa." 
Isaiah49:16 Reeba, nkusharwire aha biganja by'engaro zangye, Orugo rwawe ruryaguma omu maisho gangye obutoosha." 
Isaiah49:17 Abombeki baawe nibarahutsya kukwombeka; Kandi abacwekyerezi baawe n'abaakugizire amatongo Nibaija kukurugamu. 
Isaiah49:18 Imutsya amaisho gaawe, oreebe; Bariya boona nibeeteerana kwija ahariiwe. Niinyerahira, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, Boona oryabajwara nk'eihunde, Obeezirikye, obe nk'omugore." 
Isaiah49:19 Buzimazima emyanya yaawe ey'amatongo n'eyaatsigirweho, N'ensi yaawe eyaacwekyereziibwe, Eryafundira abatuuzi baawe, Kandi abaakumizire baryaba hare." 
Isaiah49:20 Abaana abaazairwe omu biro by'okufiisa kwawe, Baryakugambira omu kitu nibagira bati: Omwanya ogu gutufundiire; Tubonere omwanya gw'okutuuramu." 
Isaiah49:21 Obwo oryagira omu mutima gwawe oti: Aba baana, n'oha owaabanzaariire? Ka naafiisize abangye, nkaba engumba, Encuubwa kandi ekizengyerezi; Mbwenu owaayoroire aba n'oha? Ka naatisigaire nyenka; Mbwenu aba barugire hi?" 
Isaiah49:22 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyaimukiza amahanga omukono gwangye, N'enganda nzeetese orurango rwangye; Obwo baryareeta batabani baawe, babaine omu kifuba, Na bahara baawe babaheekire aha mabega." 
Isaiah49:23 Abagabe baryaba baasho bakworore, N'abaigarire babe baanyoko bakwontwye. Baryakwinamira, bajuumare ahansi, Barigatse omucuucu gw'aha bigyere byawe. Obwo nibwo orimanya ku ndi MUKAMA; Kandi abarikuntegyereza tibarikwatwa nshoni." 
Isaiah49:24 Ab'amaani nibabaasa kwakwa eminyago, Nari enkwatwa z'abarikuhatwa kwihwa omu mikono yaabo?" 
Isaiah49:25 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Buzimazima enkwatwa z'ab'amaani ziryaihwayo, N'eminyago y'abarikuhata eryagarurwa, Ahabw'okuba niinye ndikurwanira n'abarikukurwanisa, Nkajuna n'abaana baawe." 
Isaiah49:26 Abarikukuhata ndyabagyema kurya enyama yaabo, Kandi baryasinda eshagama yaabo nk'oku basinda viinyo. Batyo abantu boona baryamanya Ku ndi MUKAMA omujuni waawe, Kandi Omucunguzi waawe, Ow'amaani wa Yakobo." 
Isaiah50:1 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ebaruha ei naashendeise nyokoimwe erahi? Nari shi n'oha omu barikuunyihuza Ou naabagurize? Reeba, mukagurwa ahabw'ebibi byanyu, N'ebicumuro byanyu nibyo byashendeise nyokoimwe." 
Isaiah50:2 Ahabw'enki, obu naija, ntarashangireyo muntu, Ku naayetsire, hataragizire owaanyetaba? Nimugira ngu omukono gwangye gubaire mugufu, Tigurikubaasa kucungura? Tiinyine maani g'okujuna? Reeba, ahabw'okukabuka kwangye, nyomya enyanja, Mpindura emigyera eihamba ry'omusheenyi; Eby'enyanja binuuka ahabw'okubura amaizi, Kandi bifa ahabw'eiriho." 
Isaiah50:3 Eiguru ndijweka okwiragura, Ndishweka ebiguniya." 
Isaiah50:4 Mukama RUHANGA ampaire orurimi rw'abeegyesiibwe, Ngu mbone kumanya ekigambo eki ndaahangaanise oruhire. Buri kasheeshe ansisiimura, Asisiimura okutu kwangye kuhurira Nk'abarikwegyesibwa." 
Isaiah50:5 Mukama RUHANGA aigwire okutu kwangye, Tinaagoma, kandi tinaagaruka nyima." 
Isaiah50:6 Amabega gangye ngateegyeize abateezi, N'amatama gangye naagaha abarikumaanyura ebireju; Tindasherekire maisho gangye enshoni n'okucwerwa amacwante." 
Isaiah50:7 Ahabw'okuba Mukama RUHANGA ampwera, Nikyo ntarikushobererwa. N'ahabw'ekyo ngumize aha maisho gangye nk'eibaare ry'enkangabuye, Kandi nimmanya ngu tindikwatwa nshoni." 
Isaiah50:8 Orikuunyihaho orubanja ari haihi; N'oha orintonganisa? Ka twemerere, tutongane; Omuzigu wangye n'oha? Naanyirire haihi." 
Isaiah50:9 Reeba, Mukama RUHANGA nampwera; N'oha oricwa orubanja kunsinga? Reeba, boona baryakura nk'ekijwaro, Ebiyenje bibariire kimwe." 
Isaiah50:10 N'oha omuriimwe orikutiina MUKAMA, Akoorobera eiraka ry'omuheereza we, Orikugyendera omu mwirima, ataine mushana, Kwonka akeesiga eiziina rya MUKAMA, Akeegamira Ruhanga we?" 
Isaiah50:11 Reeba, imwe mwena abarikuhemba omuriro, Mukeekiikiza emuri embaju zoona! Mugyende nimumurikirwa omuriro gwanyu, N'ogw'emuri zi mukongyerize. Ebi nibyo mbacumiire, Muryabyama n'obusaasi." 
Isaiah51:1 Mumpurire, imwe abarikukuratira okuhikiirira, Imwe abarikusherura MUKAMA, Mureebe orukiri oru mwashatwirweho, N'ekiina ky'amabaare eki mwatimbirwemu." 
Isaiah51:2 Mureebe Abrahamu shoimwe, Na Saara owaabazaire; Ahakuba, ku yaabaire akiri omwe wenka, nkamweta, Naamuha omugisha, naamukanyisa." 
Isaiah51:3 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aryhuumuriza Saayuuni, N'emyanya yaayo yoona eyaatsigirweho; Eihamba ryayo aryarihindura nka Edeni, N'eihamba ryayo ry'omusheenyi arigire nk'omusiri gwa MUKAMA; Haryabamu okushemererwa n'okunanuka, Okusiima n'amaraka g'okweshongora." 
Isaiah51:4 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, nimumpurire, Naiwe ihanga ryangye 'we, ntega okutu! Ahakuba ndyashohoza ekiragiro, N'eby'oburyo byangye biryaba omushana gw'okujwera amahanga." 
Isaiah51:5 Okuhikiirira kwangye kuri haihi, N'okujuna kwangye kushohoire. Emikono yangye eryategyeka amahanga, Ebirwa biryantegyereza, Kandi omukono gwangye nigwo baryesiga." 
Isaiah51:6 Mwimutsye amaisho ahaiguru, Mureebe ensi ahansi; Ahabw'okuba iguru riryahwaho nk'omwika, N'ensi eryakura nk'ekijwaro, N'abagitwiremu bafe nka mukwikwi; Kwonka okujuna kwangye kuryagumaho ebiro byona, N'okuhikiirira kwangye tikurihwaho." 
Isaiah51:7 Mumpurire, imwe abarikumanya okuhikiirira, Abantu abu ebiragiro byangye biri omu mitima yaanyu; Murekye kutiina okujuna kw'abantu, Kandi mutahahaaza emitima ahabw'okukyeena kwabo." 
Isaiah51:8 Ahabw'okuba ebiyenje biryabarya nk'ekijwaro, Na kooya ebarye nk'ebyoya by'entaama; Kwonka okuhikiirira kwangye kuryagumaho ebiro byona, N'okujuna kwangye obusingye bwona." 
Isaiah51:9 Sisiimuka, sisiimuka, ojware amaani, Iwe omukono gwa MUKAMA! Sisiimuka nk'omu biro bya ira, Omu busingye obwa iranaira. Tiiwe waatemagwire Rahabu, Okacumita ekijoka kiri?" 
Isaiah51:10 Tiiwe waayomize enyanja, Amaizi maingi ag'ahagati yaayo gakarugaho, Okagicwamu omuhanda, ngu abacungwirwe barabemu?" 
Isaiah51:11 Kandi abu MUKAMA yaacungwire baryagaruka, Baije Saayuuni nibeeshongora; Okushemererwa okutahwaho kuri aha maisho gaabo; Baryagira okushemererwa n'okunanuka, Kandi obusaasi n'okutsinda biryakwata akakiro." 
Isaiah51:12 Nyowe, niinye orikubahuumuriza. Obaire ota, iwe orikutiina omuntu orikufa, Omwana w'omuntu owaahangirwe nk'obunyaatsi," 
Isaiah51:13 Haza okeebwa MUKAMA Omuhangi waawe, Owabambire eiguru, akataho emisingi y'ensi, Okaguma noorenzya eizooba Nootiinisibwa ekiniga ky'orikuhata, yaaba amaririire kucwekyereza Mbwenu ekiniga kye kirahi?" 
Isaiah51:14 Enkwatwa eyaanyagirwe eryarekurwa juba; Terifa, ekaza omu kiina; N'eby'oburyo byayo tibiribura," 
Isaiah51:15 Ahabw'okuba niinye MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Oimutsya enyanja, ebingonzi byayo bikahoorera MUKAMA ow'amahe niryo iziina ryangye" 
Isaiah51:16 Kandi ntaire ebigambo byangye omu kanwa kaawe, Naakushereka omu kicuucu ky'omukono gwangye, Naabamba eiguru, naataho emisingi y'ensi, Naagira Saayuuni nti: Muri abantu bangye." 
Isaiah51:17 Sisiimuka, sisiimuka, oyemerere, iwe Yerusaalemu, Iwe onywereire omu mukono gwa MUKAMA Ekikopo ky'ekiniga kye, Okanywa ekikopo ky'okugwererana, Okakyeranguuza." 
Isaiah51:18 Omu boojo abu yaazaire boona Tiharimu n'omwe ow'okumwebembera, Kandi n'omu bu yaayoroire boona Tiharimu w'okumukwata omukono." 
Isaiah51:19 Ebyo byombi bikuhikireho; N'oha oraakuyaagire? Kandi n'okuba amatongo n'okucwekyerera, N'enjara na rurara, N'oha oraakuhuumurize?" 
Isaiah51:20 Batabani baawe bagwire enshazi, Babyami omu nteeraniro z'enguuto, Nk'empara ekwatsirwe ekigoye; Bajuumikiirwe ekiniga kya MUKAMA, Okuhana kwa Ruhanga waanyu." 
Isaiah51:21 N'ahabw'ekyo muhurire ebi, imwe abarikubonabonesibwa, Abasinzire, kwonka mutasinzire viinyo." 
Isaiah51:22 Oku nikwo Mukama, MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, Orikutonganira abantu be, arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, nyihire omu ngaro zaawe Ekikopo ky'okugwererana, N'orushara rw'ekiniga kyangye Torigaruka kurunywaho;" 
Isaiah51:23 Kureka ndyaruta omu mikono y'abarikukwita kubi, Abaakugizire bati: Inama, tukwambukireho, Naiwe omugongo gwawe okagugira nk'ahansi, Nk'enguuto yaabo y'okurabamu." 
Isaiah52:1 Sisiimuka, sisiimuka, Ojware amaani gaawe, iwe Saayuuni; Jwara ebijwaro byawe ebirungi, Iwe Yerusaalemu, orurembo orurikwera; Ahabw'okuba abatashazirwe n'abatashemeire Tibarigaruka kukwijamu." 
Isaiah52:2 Yekunkumure omucuucu, oimukye, oshutame, Iwe Yerusaalemu enkwatwa; Yuzya enkomo ezikuri omu bitsya, Iwe saayuuni enkwatwa." 
Isaiah52:3 Ahabw'okuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Mukagurwa busha, kandi muryacungurwa ahatari mpiiha." 
Isaiah52:4 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Okubanza abantu bangye bakashuuma Misri kushuuhuukirayo; bwanyima Abaasiria baabaitira kubi busha. 
Isaiah52:5 Mbwenu aha nteekirweho ki, nindeeba abantu bangy enibatwarirwa busha? nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba. Abarikubategyeka nibababoroozya, kandi obutoosha eiziina ryangye risiiba nirigaywa, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah52:6 Nikyo abantu bangye barimanyira eiziina ryangye; ahari eryo izooba baryamanya ngu niinye orikugamba; reeba niinye. 
Isaiah52:7 Ebigyere by'orikureeta amakuru g'ebigambo birungi Ka ni birungi aha bibungo, Orikuranga eby'obusingye, akareeta amakuru marungi g'ebigambo birungi, Orikuranga eby'okujunwa, akagira Saayuuni ati: Ruhanga waawe ari aha ngoma." 
Isaiah52:8 Hurira, abarinzi baawe nibaimutsya eiraka, Nibeeshongorera hamwe n'okushemererwa, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA, ku arigaruka Saayuuni, Baryareebana nawe." 
Isaiah52:9 Imwe emyanya ya Yerusaalemu eyaabaire amatongo, Muteere akaari k'okushemererwa nimweshongorera hamwe, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ahuumuriize abantu be, Yaacungura Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah52:10 MUKAMA afungiize omukono gwe ogurikwera Omu maisho g'amahanga goona, N'emperu z'ensi zoona Ziryareeba okujuna kwa Ruhanga waitu." 
Isaiah52:11 Mugyende, mugyende, murugyemu, Mutakora aha kintu kyona ekitashemeire, Imwe abeekorera ebintu bya MUKAMA; Murugye ahagati yaarwo, mweyeze." 
Isaiah52:12 Ahabw'okuba timurirugayo nimurahukiiriza, Kandi timurigyenda nimuhunga; Ahakuba MUKAMA niwe aribeebembera, Kandi Ruhanga wa Israeli niwe aribaza enyima, Akaguma naabarinda." 
Isaiah52:13 Reeba, omuheereza wangye aryakoresa obwengye, Aryahimbisibwa, atunguurwe, Aze ahaiguru mononga." 
Isaiah52:14 Nk'oku baingi baamutangaariire, Ahabw'okusiisikara ahamaisho okukira abantu boona, N'enshusha ye okutaba nk'ey'abantu," 
Isaiah52:15 Nikwo arikanga amahanga maingi, Abagabe bakeekwata aha munwa ahabwe; Ahabw'okuba baryareeba ekitakabahoga, Kandi n'eki batakahuriraga baryakyetegyereza." 
Isaiah53:1 N'oha oikiriize ebi tuhuriire? Kandi omukono gwa MUKAMA gushuururiirwe oha? 
Isaiah53:2 Ahakuba akakurira omu maisho ge nk'ekibyairwe ekito, Kandi nk'akati akatookire omu itaka ryaomire. Akaba ataine ku arikushusha, n'obu bwakuba oburungi, ngu tumureebe, Nari akandi karungi aku turikumwetengaho." 
Isaiah53:3 Akagaywa, yaayangwa abantu, Omuntu w'obujune, omanyiire enaku; Kandi nk'ou abantu batiinisa amaisho, Kandi nk'ou abantu batiinisa amaisho, Nikwo yaagayirwe atyo, naitwe tutamwetemu kaabuntu." 
Isaiah53:4 Buzimazima akeekorera enaku zaitu, Yaatwara obujune bwaitu, Haza itwe twateekateeka ngu Ruhanga niwe amuteire, Akamwasha, akamubonabonesa." 
Isaiah53:5 Kwonka akahutaazibwa ahabw'eby'okushiisha byaitu, Yaahondahondwa ahabw'okutahikiirira kwaitu; Okuteerwa kw'okutureetera obusingye niwe yaakuteirwe, Kandi emihiririzi ye niyo etukiza." 
Isaiah53:6 Twena tukahaba nk'entaama, Twateishuka, buri muntu yaatoora omuhanda gwe, Kwonka MUKAMA yaamutaho okutahikiirira kwaitu twena." 
Isaiah53:7 Akaitwa kubi yaabonabonesibwa, Kwonka tiyaayashamya kanwa ke; Yaaba nk'akataama akarikutwarwa kwitwa, Kandi nk'entaama oku ecureera omu maisho g'abakyemuzi b'ebyoya; Okwo nikwo nawe ataraashamize kanwa ke." 
Isaiah53:8 Ahabw'okwitwa kubi n'okucwerwa orubanja akaihwaho; Omu b'omu busingye bwe n'oha owaateekateekire Ngu akaihirwaho kimwe omu nsi y'abahuriire? Ahabw'eby'okushiisha by'abantu bangye nikyo yaateereirwe. 
Isaiah53:9 Bakamuteekateekyera ah'okuziikwa hamwe n'ababi, Kandi n'omutungi omu kufa kwe. N'obu araabe atarakozire by'obubisha, N'obu bwakuba obugobya kuruga omu kanwa ke." 
Isaiah53:10 Kwonka MUKAMA akasiima kumuhondahonda, Yaamusaasa; Ku araayehindure ekitambo ahabw'ekibi, Aryareeba oruzaaro rwe, ayongyere aha biro bye, Ebi MUKAMA arikwenda bihikiirizibwe gye omu mukono gwe." 
Isaiah53:11 Aryareeba ebirikuruga omu busaasi bw'amagara ge, amarwe; Ahabw'okumanya kwe omuheereza wangye ohikiriire Aryahaisa baingi okuhikiirira, Kandi ayekorere eby'okutahikiirira byabo." 
Isaiah53:12 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyamubaganisiza omugabo hamwe n'abakuru, Nawe aryabagana eminyago n'ab'amaani, Ahabw'okuba akashuka amagara ge okuhitsya aha kufa, Yaabarirwa hamwe n'enkozi z'bibi, Yaayekorera ebibi by'abaingi, Kandi yaatonganira abasiisi." 
Isaiah54:1 Iwe ngumba 'we, yeshongore, Iwe otakazaaraga, teera akaari, Oyeshongore n'eiraka rihango, Iwe otakarumwaga; Ahabw'okuba abaana b'otsigirweho nibakira ab'oine iba, Nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah54:2 Hangusya omwanya gw'eihema ryawe, Oreegye emikingo y'omu maju gaawe, Otagira eki waima, yongyera aha mirunga yaawe, Ohamye enkondo zaawe;" 
Isaiah54:3 Ahabw'okuba muryayeshanzira aha rubaju rwa buryo n'orwa bumohso, Oruzaaro rwawe rukubuure amahanga, N'endebo ezaabaire ziri amatongo zituurwemu." 
Isaiah54:4 Otatiina, ahabw'okuba torihemuka; Otashoberwa, ahabw'okuba toriitwa nshoni, Kureka oryayebwa enshoni z'omu butsigazi bwawe, Kandi ekijumo ky'obufaakazi bwawe torigaruka kukiijuka." 
Isaiah54:5 Ahakuba Omuhangi waawe niwe baro, MUKAMA ow'amahe niryo eiziina rye; Kandi Orikwera wa Israeli niwe Mucunguzi waawe, Naayetwa Ruhanga w'ensi yoona." 
Isaiah54:6 Ahakuba MUKAMA akwetsire Nk'omukazi otsigirweho, ou omutima gwe gwijwire enaku, Nk'omukazi oshenzirwe akiri muto, Nikwo Ruhanga waawe arikugamba." 
Isaiah54:7 Ahabw'okuba mbaire nkutsigireho akaanya kakye; Kwonka ndyakutaaruura, nkwiniire embabazi nyingi." 
Isaiah54:8 Ahabw'okukugirira ekiniga kingi Nkamara akaanya kakye nkwimire amaisho, Kwonka ndyakugirira esaasi, nkwiniire rukundo etahwaho, Nikwo MUKAMA, Omucunguzi waawe, arikugamba." 
Isaiah54:9 Ahabw'okuba ebyo nibishusira eby'omu biro bya Noa; Nk'oku naarahiire ku amaizi g'omu biro bye Gatarigaruka kushandaara mu nsi, Nikwo ndahiire ku ntarigaruka kukugirira kiniga N'obu kwakuba okukukabukira." 
Isaiah54:10 Ahakuba enshozi ziryarugaho, N'ebibungo biihweho, Kwonka embabazi zangye, ezitaruga ha rugyero, tizirikurugaho, N'endagaano yangye ey'obusingye teriihwaho, Nikwo MUKAMA okwiniire esaasi arikugamba." 
Isaiah54:11 Ai bambe iwe orikubonabonesibwa, Okanagwa oku n'oku omuyaga, otarikuhuumurizibwa, Reeba, amabaare gaawe ndyagasharuraho amabara marungi, N'emisingi yaawe ngyeombekyese safiro." 
Isaiah54:12 Amatungu gaawe ndyagombekyesa kalukedoni, Kandi amarembo gaawe ngombekyese kabunkulo, N'orugo rwawe rwona ndwombekyese amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi." 
Isaiah54:13 Batabani baawe boona baryayegyesibwa MUKAMA, Kandi okugogyera kwabo kuryaba kwingi;" 
Isaiah54:14 Omu kuhikiirira nimwo orihamiibwa, Okuhatwa kuryakuba hare, Ahabw'okuba toritiina; N'ebirikwitsa obwoba biryakuba hare, Ahabw'okuba tibirikuhikaho." 
Isaiah54:15 Ku haribaho owaimutsya engamba, Ziryaba zitarugire ahariinye; Orikwimukiza engamba aryakuzira." 
Isaiah54:16 Reeba, mpangire omuheesi Ojugutirira omuriro gw'amakara, Akaihamu eby'okurwanisa; Kandi mpangire omuhwerekyerezi kucwekyereza." 
Isaiah54:17 Tihariho ky'okurwanisa, eki baheesire kukurwanisa, ekirikubaasa, Kandi orurimi rwona oruriimuka kukutonganisa oryarusinga. Obwo nibwo buhunguzi bw'abaheereza ba MUKAMA, Kandi okwo nikwo kuhikiirira kwabo okurikuruga ahariinye, Nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah55:1 Imwe mwena abaine eiriho, mwije aha maizi, Kandi otaine mpiiha, aije, agure, arye; Mwije mugure viinyo n'mate Ahatari kuha mpiiha, ahatari kucwererana." 
Isaiah55:2 Ahabw'enki nimuheera empiiha zaanyu ebitari by'okurya, N'okuhendekyera ebitari kuhaazya? Mumpurire mutaireho omutima, mubone kurya ebirungi, Amagara gaanyu gashemerererwe ebirimu ebishaju." 
Isaiah55:3 Mutegye amatu, mwije ahariinye; Muhurire, amagara gaanyu gabone kugumaho, Naanye ndyaragaana naimwe endagaano etarihwaho, Nizo mbabazi ezitarirugaho ezi naaraganiise Daudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Reeba, mmugizire kareebi aha mahanga kuhamya ebyangye, Kuba omwebembezi kandi omutegyeki waago." 
Isaiah55:5 Reeba oryayeta eihanga eri otakamanyaga, Kandi amahanga agatarikukumanya garyakwehongyera Ahabwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Orikwera wa Israeli. Ahabw'okuba akuhaire ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah55:6 Musherure MUKAMA naakiboneka, Mumutakire akiri haihi." 
Isaiah55:7 Omubi arekye omuhanda gwe, N'otahikiriire arekye ebiteekateeko bye, Agarukye ahair MUKAMA, abone kumusaasira, Ahari Ruhanga waitu, ahakuba naija kumusaasirira kimwe." 
Isaiah55:8 Mumanye ngu ebiteekateeko byangye tibyo biteekateeko byanyu, N'emitwarize yaanyu tiyo mitwarize yangye, Nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah55:9 Ahakuba nk'oku eiguru riri ahaigur okukira ensi, 1Nikwo n'emitwarize yangye eri ahaiguru okukira eyaanyu, N'ebiteekateeko byangye nikwo birikukira ebyanyu." 
Isaiah55:10 Ahakuba nk'oku enjura nari ebirika biruga ahaiguru bikagwa, Bitagarukyeyo, kureka bikaitirira eitaka, Bikarireetamu okutooka n'okumera, Omubibi akabona embibo, N'omuri bikamuha eby'okurya," 
Isaiah55:11 Nikwo n'ekigambo kyangye ekirikuruga omu kanwa kangye kiriba; Tikirigaruka hariinye busha, Kureka kiryahikiiriza ebi ndikwenda, Kigire omugisha omuri ebyo ebi nkitumiire." 
Isaiah55:12 Ahabw'oku muryashohora n'okushemererwa, Murugyeyo mwebembeirwe, mwine obusingye; Enshozi n'ebibungo biryateera akaari, Byeshongore omu maisho gaanyu, N'ebiti byona eby'omu ishwa biteere omu ngaro." 
Isaiah55:13 Omu mwanya gw'amahwa haryameramu omuberooshi, N'omu mwanya gw'emikwatangwe hameremu omukadasi, Kibe eky'okwijukiraho MUKAMA, Akamanyiso akatarihwayho ebiro byona." 
Isaiah56:1 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Muhamire omu by'oburyo, mukore eby'okuhikiirira, Ahabw'okuba okujuna kwangye kuri haihi kwija, N'okuhikiirira kwangye kuri haihi kushuuruurwa." 
Isaiah56:2 Omuntu orikubikoa aine omugisha, Omwana w'omuntu orikubihamiraho, Akarinda sabato, atagishiishe, Kandi akazibira omukono gwe kukora ekibi kyona." 
Isaiah56:3 Omunyaihanga oyehongyeire MUKAMA arekye kugira ati: MUKAMA taribura kuntaanisa n'abantu be. Kandi omukonwa arekye kugira ati: Reeba, ndi ekiti kyomire." 
Isaiah56:4 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Abakonwa abarikurinda sabato zangye, Abatoorana ebirikunshemeza, Bakahamira aha ndagaano yangye," 
Isaiah56:5 Ndyabaha ekiijutsyo omu nju yangye n'omu rurembo rwangye, Mbahe n'eiziina eririkukira okugira abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki; Ndyabaha eiziina eririgumaho Eritariihwaho." 
Isaiah56:6 Kandi abanayamahanga abarikwehongyera MUKAMA Kumukorera, kukunda eiziina rye, N'okuba abaheereza be, Buri muntu orikurinda sabato, atagishiishe, Akahamira aha ndagaano yangye-" 
Isaiah56:7 Abo nabo ndyabareeta aha nju yangye ey'okushabiramu, Ebitambo byabo by'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo byabo Biryaikirizibwa kutambirwa aha itambiro ryangye; Ahabw'okuba enju yangye eryayetwa ey'okushabirwamu amahanga goona." 
Isaiah56:8 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA orikutaaruura encuubwa za Israeli Arikugamba naagira ati: Ndyamutaaruuriraho abandi, Mbongyere aha baabaire baataarwirwe." 
Isaiah56:9 Imwe nyamaishwa z'omu ishwa 'mwe mwena, Naimwe mwena enyamaishwa z'omu kibiria, Nimwije mushonshomere." 
Isaiah56:10 Abarinzi be n'empumi, Boona tibaine bwengye, Boona n'embwa ezikwatsirwe aha munwa, Ezitarikubaasa kumoka; Nibaroota, nibabyama, kandi nibakunda kuhungira;" 
Isaiah56:11 Eego n'embwa z'omururu, ezitahaaga, N'abariisa abataine ki barikumanya; Boona bateishukire omuhanda, baatoora eyaabo, Buri muntu naayesherurira amagoba ge Ah'arikubaasa kuhika hoona." 
Isaiah56:12 Nibagira bati: Mwije, tushengyeere viinyo, Twenywere ebirikusinza, tubikimbuure; Kandi na nyencakare tugire nka hati, Turengyesereze." 
Isaiah57:1 Ohikiriire naahwerekyerera, Kwonka tihariho orikukitaho omutima; Abarikutiina Ruhanga nibaihwaho, Kwonka tihariho orikuteekateeka ngu, Naaba aihirwe omu kabi," 
Isaiah57:2 Ataahire omu busingye; Abagyendera omu kuhikiirira Bahuuumuria aha bitabo byabo. 
Isaiah57:3 Kwonak imwe, batabani b'omurogikazi 'mwe, Oruzaaro rw'omushambani na maraaya, Nimwirire aha." 
Isaiah57:4 Ou murikugaaniiza n'oha? Ou murikushekyerera nimworekyeza orurimi n'oha? Timuri abaana b'ebibi, oruzaaro rw'obugobya," 
Isaiah57:5 Imwe abarikubuugumwamu okwetenga, muri omu myela, N'ahansi ya buri kiti kibisi ekyetwa omurinzi; Mukaitira abaana omu mpanga, Omu biharamanga by'amabaare?" 
Isaiah57:6 Omugabo gwanyu guri omu mabaare ag'omu ruhanga agarikuterera; Ago nigwo mubagano gwanyu. Nigo mwashukiire empongano zaanyu z'eby'okunywa, Mukagahongyera empongano z'esaano. Nimugira ngu ekiniga eki nyine ahabw'ebyo nikibaasa kwikaikana?" 
Isaiah57:7 Otaire ekitanda kyawe aha rushozi oruraingwa kandi orutunguukire, Kandi okwo niyo waagiire kutambira ebitambo." 
Isaiah57:8 Otaire akamanyiso kaawe Enyima y'orwigi n'ebiti by'omuryango; Ahakuba ojwariire busha ondiijo, otariinye, Waatemba ekitanda kyawe, waakihangusya, Waaragaana nabo endagaano. Ku waareeeba ekitanda kyabo, waakikunda." 
Isaiah57:9 Waaza ow'omugabe oyeesiigire, Oyongyeire aha migaju yaawe, Waatuma entumwa zaawe hare, Waayemaramu ak'obuntu, waahika Okuzimu." 
Isaiah57:10 Waaruhibwa orugyendo ruhango, Kwonka tiwaagira oti: Tikiine mugasho; Kureka waabona eky'okukwongeramu amaani, Tiwaagwa nshazi." 
Isaiah57:11 Beitu shi owaakwitsize obwoba, okatiina, Kikakureetera okubeiha, otanyijukye, Okanga kuunyetaho, n'oha? Timmazire omwanya muhango, nyetsirize, Haza otantiine?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ndyagamba aha kuhikiirira kwawe n'aha bi orikukora; Kwonka tibiine ki birikugasira. 
Isaiah57:13 Guma otakye, haza tureebe ebishushani ebi waashangurwize, ku byakutambira! Omanye ku omuyaga gurikwija kubitwara, N'omwitsyo gukabituntumura; Kwonka orikuunyesiga niwe arikubuura ensi, Akahungura orushozi rwangye orurikwera." 
Isaiah57:14 Kandi kiryagambwa kiti: Mutinde, mutinde, mushemeze, Murimbure enkongi zoona omu muhanda gw'abantu bangye." 
Isaiah57:15 Ahakuba oku nikwo Orw'ahaiguru, kandi Omukuru, arikugamba, Otuura Ahatahwaho, ou eiziina rye riri Orikwera, Naagira ati: Ntuura omu mwanya gw'ahaiguru kandi ogurikwera Hamwe n'ow'omutima ogurikweteisa kandi omucureezi, Ngu mbone kuhimbuura emyoyo y'abacureezi, N'emitima y'abarikweteisa." 
Isaiah57:16 Ahabw'okuba tinditongana ebiro byona, Kandi tindiguma nyine ekiniga, Ahakuba ku naakutwaza ntyo, Emyoyo n'emitima ei naahangire Ekakancwekyererera omumaisho." 
Isaiah57:17 Ahabw'ekibi ky'okururuuha kwe nkaguubwa kubi, Naamuteera, naamwima amaisho nyine ekiniga; Kwonka yaagumizamu kugaruka enyima Omu muhanda ogu omutima gwe gurikwenda." 
Isaiah57:18 Ndeebire emicwe ye, ndyamutambira, Mmwebembere, mmugarurire obuhuumure, Mpangye omu barikumuyaagira eminwa erikuhimbisa." 
Isaiah57:19 Obusingye, Obusingye bube omu ba hare n'aba haihi. Naanye ndyamutambira, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah57:20 Kwonka ababi ni nk'enyanja erikwecunda, Ahakuba terikubaasa kucureera, Kureka amaizi gaayo gaimukiiriza ebyondo n'oburofa." 
Isaiah57:21 Aha mubi tihabaho busingye, Nikwo Ruhanga wangye arikugamba." 
Isaiah58:1 Ranguuza, otazinda eiraka, Imutsya eiraka ryawe nk'enzamba, Ogambire abantu bangye okushiisha kwabo, Ab'enju ya Yakobo oboorekye ebibi byabo." 
Isaiah58:2 Kwonka bansherura buri izooba, Bashemerererwa okumanya emihanda yangye, Nk'eihanga erikora eby'okuhikiirira, Ritarekye biragiro bya Ruhanga waaryo; Banshaba kubacwera emanja z'oburyo, Bashemerererwa kwirira haihi Ruhanga." 
Isaiah58:3 (Nibagira bati): Ahabw'enki twesiibizekwo, otakyeteho, Tukeebonabonesa, otakiteho omutima? Mumanye ngu, omu biro by'okwesiibyakwo kwanyu Muba nimusherura eby'okweshemeza N'okwita kubi abarikubakorera." 
Isaiah58:4 Reeba, eki mwesiibizakwo, n'okutongana n'okurwana, N'okuteerana entomi z'obubi. Okwesiibyakwo nk'okwanyu okw'eri izooba Tikurikwija kureetera iraka ryanyu kuhurirwa ahaiguru." 
Isaiah58:5 Nimugira ngu oku nikwo kwesiibyakwo oku ndikusiima, Eizooba eri omuntu ayebonabonesezaho? N'okwinika omutwe nk'ekibingo, Omuntu akeeyarira ebiguniya, akabyama omu iju? Okwo nikwo murikweta okwesiibyakwo, N'eizooba eri MUKAMA arikusiima?" 
Isaiah58:6 Okwesiibyakwo oku ndikusiima t'oku? Okubohoorora emirunga y'obubi, Okukomoorora enkomo z'obuhuuku, Okurekura abarikuhatwa, bakeegyendera, Kandi n'okuhenda emigamba yoona?" 
Isaiah58:7 T'okubagana eby'okurya byawe n'abaine enjara, N'okutaasya enshoberwa ezitaine butaaho omu maka gaawe; Okireeba ojwaire busha, okamujweka, N'okuteehuzya abaanyu?" 
Isaiah58:8 Obwo nibwo omushana gwawe gurijuguta nk'omushekye, N'okukira kwawe kukarahuka kwija, Okuhihiirira kwawe kukakwebembera, N'ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kikakuza enyima, kikakurinda." 
Isaiah58:9 Kandi obwo nibwo oryeta MUKAMA, akakwetaba, Okamutakira, akakuhuumuriza ati: Ndi aha! Ku muryemaramu okuhata, okutunga omuntu orukumu, n'okugamba kubi," 
Isaiah58:10 Ku oryehotorera omujara, Okamarira abarikubonabonesibwa ebi barikwetenga, Obwo nibwo omushana gwawe gurijwa omu mwirima, N'omwirima gwawe ndindindi gukaba nk'omushana gw'eihangwe." 
Isaiah58:11 Kandi MUKAMA aryaguma akwebembere, Ahaazye amagara gaawe omu biro by'enjara, Agumye amagufa gaawe. Oryaba nk'omusiri ogurikwitirirwa amaizi, Kandi obe nk'enshuro y'amaizi etarikwoma." 
Isaiah58:12 Amatongo gaawe aga ira garyagaruka gombekwemu; Oryagaruka oteho emisingi emazire obusingye bwingi egwireho; Kandi oryayetwa omuhunduuzi w'ahasheenyukire, Orikugaruraho otuhanda oturikutaaha omu maka." 
Isaiah58:13 Ku orireka kuribatiirira sabato, N'okukora eby'okweshemeza aha izooba ryangye eririkwera, Kureka sabato waagyeta okushemererwa, Eizooba rya MUKAMA eririkwera waaryeta ery'ekitiinisa, Kandi waariha ekitiinisa, otaagyendera omu by'emitwarize yaawe wenka, N'obu kwakuba okusherura eby'okweshemeza, Nari okugamba ebigambo ebitaine ku biri," 
Isaiah58:14 Obwo oryashemerererwa omuri MUKAMA, Naanye ndyakuha okutoogooga aha mitwe y'ebibungo by'ensi; Kandi ndyakutungisa obuhunguzi bwa Yakobo shwenkuru; Ahabw'okuba akanwa ka MUKAMA niko kaakigamba." 
Isaiah59:1 Reeba, omukono gwa MUKAMA tigubaire mugufu Kutabaasa kujuna, N'okutu kwe tikufiire kutabaasa kuhurira;" 
Isaiah59:2 Kureka eby'okutahikiirira byanyu Nibyo bibataaniise na Ruhanga waanyu, N'ebibi byanyu nibyo bimureeteire kubaima amaisho, Akanga kubahurira." 
Isaiah59:3 Ahabw'okuba emikono yaanyu esiisirwe eshagama, N'engaro zaanyu zisiisirwe okutahikiirira; Eminwa yaanyu egambire ebishuba, N'orurimi rwanyu niruhwihwitsa eby'obugobya." 
Isaiah59:4 Tihariho orikutabaaririza mugyenzi we eby'oburyo, Tihariho orikutongana eby'amazima; Kureka nibeesiga ebitaine mugasho, bagamba ebishuba, Bakaba enda z'eitima, bazaara okutahiikiirira." 
Isaiah59:5 Baatira amahuri g'empiri, Baruka orububi rw'orutangura; Orikurya amahuri gaabo naafa, Eihuri rikyatwa, hatimbiramu encwera." 
Isaiah59:6 Embubi zaabo tizirikubaasa kuba bijwaro; Tihaine orikwenda kweshweka ebi bakozire; Emirimo yaabo n'ey'okutahikiirira, Ebi barikukora n'engaro zaabo birimu eitima." 
Isaiah59:7 Ebigyere byabo biirukira ebibi, Barahuka kusheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja; Ebiteekateeko byabo n'ebiteekateeko by'okutahikiirira; Ei baza yoona, n'okuhwerekyereza n'okumaraho." 
Isaiah59:8 Tibarikumanya muhanda gw'obusingye, Kandi omu mitwarize yaabo tiharimu mazima. Beeteereireho emihanda ekiikami; Ogitooramu weena, tagira busingye." 
Isaiah59:9 Nikyo eby'oburyo bitubeereire hare, N'eby'okuhikiirira bitatuhikyeho; Nitutegyereza omushana, tureeba omwirima; Tutegyereza okwaka, tugyendera omu mwirima ndindindi." 
Isaiah59:10 Tukorakora aha rugo nk'empumi; Eego, tubandagira nk'abataine maisho. Tuteera entsibo omu ihangwe nk'omu rwita-waabo; Omu b'amaani turi nk'emitumbi." 
Isaiah59:11 Twena nitutsinda nk'edubu, Nituganya nk'enkombe. Nitutegyereza eby'oburyo, kwonka bibura; Nitutegyereza okujunwa, kwona kutuba hare." 
Isaiah59:12 Ahabw'okuba eby'okushiisha byaitu birengyesereize omu maisho gaawe, N'ebibi byaitu nibitushinja. Ahabw'okuba eby'okushiisha byaitu bitwezingiriire, Kandi n'okutahikiirira kwaitu nitukumanya," 
Isaiah59:13 Nitucumura, twehakana MUKAMA, Nituteishuka, tureka kukuratira Ruhanga waitu, Nitugamba eby'okwita kubi n'eby'obugomi, Nitugunja eby'ebishuba, tubigamba tubiihire aha mutima." 
Isaiah59:14 Eby'oburyo nibinagwa enyima, N'okuhikiirira kwemerera hare; Ahabw'okuba amazima gagwire omu muhanda, Kandi okugororoka tikurikubaasa kutaaha." 
Isaiah59:15 Eego, amazima gabuzire; Orikureka ebibi, nibamwoya. MUKAMA akabiireeba, byamugwisa kubi Ahabw'okureeba hatariho by'oburyo." 
Isaiah59:16 Yaareeba hatariho muntu, Yaatangaara ahabw'okutabaho mutonganizi; N'ahabw'ekyo omukono gwe gwamureetera obusinguzi, N'okuhikiirira kwe kwamuhigika." 
Isaiah59:17 Taajwara okuhikiirira nk'ekyoma ky'okwekingiza aha kifuba, Yaata aha mutwe enkofiira y'okujuna; Yaajwara eby'okuhoora enzigu, kuba ebijwaro bye, Yaayehumbika obweziriki nk'omunagiro." 
Isaiah59:18 Aryabazimuurira, nk'ebi baakozire oku biri, Ababisha be abazimuurire ekiniga, n'abazigu be abaihure, N'ebirwa nabyo abizimuurire." 
Isaiah59:19 N'ahabw'ekyo baryatiina eiziina rya MUKAMA okuruga oburengyerwa-izooba, N'ekitiinisa kye okwiha ei eizooba riruga; Ahabw'okuba aryaija nk'omugyera ogurikuhimintika, Ogurikutwarwa omwitsyo gwa MUKAMA." 
Isaiah59:20 Kandi aryaija Saayuuni ari omucunguzi aha ba Yakobo abarikuhinduka kuruga omu bibi, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah59:21 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Egi niyo ndagaano ei ndikuragaana nabo. Omwoyo wangye ori ahariiwe, n'ebigambo byangye, ebi naata omu kanwa kaawe, tibiriruga aha rurimi rwawe, n'obu rwakuba orw'abaana baawe, nari orwa baijukuru baawe, okwiha hati n'okuhitsya ebiro byona, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah60:1 Imuka, oyakye; ahakuba omushana gwawe gwizire, N'ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kukujwereire." 
Isaiah60:2 Ahakuba, reeba, omwirima guryashweka ensi, Omwirima ndindindi gushwekye amahanga; Kwonka MUKAMA aryakuturukiraho, N'ekitiinisa kye kikureebekyereho." 
Isaiah60:3 Amahanga garyaija omu mushana gwawe, N'abagabe omu kumurinkana kw'okuturuka kwawe." 
Isaiah60:4 Imutsya amaisho gaawe, omagamagye, oreebe; Boona nibateerana, nibaija ahariiwe; Batabani baawe baryaija barugye hare, Na bahara baawe baije bakiikiirwe omu mikono." 
Isaiah60:5 Obwo nibwo orireeba, okashemuuka, Omutima gwawe gukagurukaaguruka, gukashemererwa, Ahabw'okbua obwingi bw'ebirikuruga omu nyanja buryagarukira, Obutungi bw'amahanga bukwizire." 
Isaiah60:6 Amasyo g'engamira garyakushweka, Engamira nto za Midiani n'eza Efa; N'eziriruga Sheeba zoona ziryaija, Zireetsire ezaabu n'obubaane, Zimanyise hoona okusingizibwa kwa MUKAMA." 
Isaiah60:7 Amasyo ga Kedari goona garyakuteeraniraho, N'empaya z'entaama za Nebayoosi zikuheereze, Ziije aha itambiro ryangye, ziri ebitambo ebirikusiimwa; Naanye ndyahimbisisa enju yangye y'ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah60:8 Aba nibaahi abarikuguruka nk'ekicu, Bakashusha nk'enkombe ezirikugaruka kutaahira omu madirisa gaazo." 
Isaiah60:9 Buzimazima ebirwa biryantegyereza, N'emeeri za Tarushiishi nizo ziribanza Kureeta batabani baawe nizibaiha hare, Baine efeeza n'ezaabu zaabo Ahabw'eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Orikwera wa Israeli; Ahabw'okuba akuhaisize ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah60:10 Abanyamahanga baryakwombekyera engo z'amabaare, N'abagabe baabo bakuheereze, Ahabw'okuba nkakuteera nkwiniire ekiniga, Kwonka nkusaasiire ahabw'embabazi zangye." 
Isaiah60:11 Amarembo gaawe garyaguma gaigwirwe, Tigarikingwa nyomushana na nyekiro, Abantu babone kukureetera obutungi bw'amahanga, Beebembeirwe abagabe baabo." 
Isaiah60:12 Ahabw'okuba eihanga n'obugabe ebiryanga kukuheereza Biryahwerekyerera; Eego, ago mahanga gahwerekyererezibwe kimwe." 
Isaiah60:13 Ekitiinisa kya Lebanooni kiryakwizira, Emyereezi, emiberooshi, n'emiteyashuuri, Okushemeza Omwanya gwangye ogurikwera; Kandi omwanya ogu ntamu ebigyere byangye ndyagugira ogw'ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah60:14 Batabani b'abaabaire nibakuhata Baryaija nibakwinamira; N'abaabaire nibakugaya baryajuumara aha bigyere byawe, Bakwete Orurembo rwa MUKAMA, Saayuuni y'Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Isaiah60:15 N'obu oraabe waatsigirweho, okangwa, Okabura ow'okukurabamu, Ndyakuhindura ow'ekitiinisa ebiro byona okukira abandi boona, Ow'kushemererwa, nk'oku obusingye burigyenda nibwihaihana." 
Isaiah60:16 Oryanywa amate g'amahanga, Oyonkye amabeere g'abagabe; Kandi oryamanya ku nyowe, MUKAMA, ndi Omujuni waawe, Omucunguzi waawe, Ow'amaani owa Yakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Omu mwanya gw'omuringa ndyareeta ezaabu, Omu mwanya gw'ekyoma ndeete efeeza; Omu mwanya gw'ebiti ndyatamu emiringa, N'omu mwanay gw'amabaare, ntemu ebyoma. Obusingye nibwo ndigira abareeberezi baawe, Kandi okuhikiirira nikwo ndigira abarikukoresa." 
Isaiah60:18 Eitima tiririgaruka kuhurirwa mu nsi yaawe, n'obu kwakuba okuhwerekyereza n'okumaraho; Kureka engo zaawe oryazeeta Kujunwa, N'amarembo gaawe ogeete Kuhimbisa." 
Isaiah60:19 Eizooba tiririgaruka kukwakira nyomushana, Okumurinkana kw'okwezi tikurigaruka kukwakira, Kureka MUKAMA niwe ariba omushana gwawe ogutahwaho, Na Ruhanga waawe akaba ekitiinisa kyawe." 
Isaiah60:20 Eizooba ryawe tiririgaruka kurenga, N'okwezi kwawe tikurituubya kwaka kwakwo; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aryaba omushana gwawe ogutahwaho, N'ebiro by'okuganya kwawe biryahwaho." 
Isaiah60:21 Abantu baawe boona baryaba abahikiriire, Bakubuure ensi, ebe eyaabo ebiro byona, Babe eitaagi eri nyebyariire, omurimo gw'engaro zangye, Mbone kuheebwa ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah60:22 Orikukira boona obuto aryarugwamu oruganda, N'orikukira boona obukye arugyemu eihanga ry'amaani. Niinye MUKAMA; Kandi ndyakirahutsya omu bunaku bwakyo." 
Isaiah61:1 Omwoyo wa Mukama RUHANGA ari ahariinye, Ahakuba MUKAMA anshukireho amajuta Kureetera abooro ebigambo birungi, Kushemba abacwekire emitima, Kumanyisa enkwatwa eby'okurekurwa, N'ababohirwe eby'okwigurirwa ekihome" 
Isaiah61:2 Kurangira abantu omwak gwa MUKAMA ogw'embabazi, N'eizooba eri Ruhanga waitu arihooreraho enzigu, Kuhuumuriza boona abarikuganya," 
Isaiah61:3 N'okuha ab'omuri Saayuuni abarikuganya Eihunde ry'ebirabyo omu mwanya gw'eiju, Amajuta g'okushemererwa omu mwanya gw'okuganya, Omunagiro gw'okuhimbisa omu mwanya gw'omutima gw'obujune, Babone kwetwa ebiti by'okuhikiirira, Ebyabyairwe MUKAMA kumuhaisa ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah61:4 Baryayombeka omu myanya ya ira eyaasheenyirwe, Baimutsye amaju agaabaire gaahindukire amatongo, Bahunduure endembo ezaasheenyirwe, Ezaakurataine omu kusheenywa omu busingye butari bumwe." 
Isaiah61:5 Abanyamahanga nibo baribariisiza amasyo, Abantu b'enduga-mahanga nibo baribahingira, Bakasharira emizaabibu yaanyu;" 
Isaiah61:6 Kwonka imwe muryayetwa abanyamurwa ba MUKAMA; Abantu babeete abaheereza ba Ruhanga waitu; Muryatungwa obutungi bw'amahanga, Mwehimbisize omu kitiinisa kyago." 
Isaiah61:7 Omu mwanya gw'okukwatwa enshoni muryatunga emigabo ebiri, Omu mwanya gw'okuhemuka muryashemerererwa ebi mubagaine. N'ahabw'ekyo muryatunga emigabo ebiri omu nsi yaanyu, Kandi okushemererwa kwanyu tikurihwaho." 
Isaiah61:8 Ahakuba nyowe MUKAMA nkunda eby'oburyo, Nyanga okunyaga n'okukora kubi; Kandi ndyabazimuurira omu mazima, Ndagaane nabo endagaano etarihwaho." 
Isaiah61:9 Oruzaaro rwabo ruryamanywa omu mahanga, Na baijukuru baabo bamanywe omu bantu b'enganda nyingi. Abaribareeba boona baryaikiriza Ku bari oruzaaro oru MUKAMA ahaire omugisha." 
Isaiah61:10 Ndyashemerererwa munonga omuri MUKAMA, Omitima gwangye gwesiimire omuri Ruhanga wangye; Ahabw'okuba anjwekire ebijwaro by'okujunwa, Yantaho ekanzu y'okuhikiirira, Nk'oku kishwera ajwara eihunde, Kandi nk'oku omugore ayehunda otubaare tw'obuguzi bwingi." 
Isaiah61:11 Ahakuba nk'oku ensi emeza ebirikutooka, Kandi nk'oku omusiri gumeza ebigubyairwemu, Nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arimeza okuhikiirira n'okuhimbisa Omu maisho gw'amahanga goona." 
Isaiah62:1 Ahabwa Saayuuni tindihunama, Ahabwa Yerusaalemu tindihuumura, Okuhitsya obu okuhikiirira kwayo kurishohora nk'okumurinakan, N'okujunwa kwayo kukaba nk'etabaaza erikwaka." 
Isaiah62:2 Amahanga garyareeba okuhikiirira kwawe, N'abagabe boona bareebe ekitiinisa kyawe, Haza obwo oryayetwa eiziina risya, Eri akanwa ka MUKAMA karikweta." 
Isaiah62:3 Kandi oryaba ekirunga kirungi omu ngaro za MUKAMA, N'eihunde ry'obugabe omu ngaro za Ruhanga waawe." 
Isaiah62:4 Torigaruka kwetwa Owaatsigirweho, N'ensi yaawe terigaruka kwetwa Amatongo; Kureka oryayetwa Enkundwakazi, N'ensi yaawe eyetwe Oshweirwe; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akushemerereirwe, Kandi ensi yaawe eryashwerwa." 
Isaiah62:5 Ahakuba, nk'oku omutsigazi ashwera omwishiki, Nikwo batabani baawe barikushwera; Kandi nk'oku kishwera ashemerererwa kishwerwa, Nikwo Ruhanga waawe arikushemerererwa." 
Isaiah62:6 Iwe Yerusaalemu, ntaire abarinzi Aha ngo zaawe z'amabaare; Tibarihunama nyomushana na nyekiro. Imwe abaijutsya MUKAMA, mutahuumura;" 
Isaiah62:7 Kandi mutamureka akahuumura Okuhitsya obu arihamya Yerusaalemu, Akagihindura eky'okuhimbisibwa omu nsi." 
Isaiah62:8 MUKAMA arahiire omukono gwe gwa buryo, Kandi omukono gwe gw'amaani, naagira ati: Buzimazima tindigaruka kuha abazigu baawe, Engano zaawe kuba eby'okurya byabo, Kandi abanyamahanga tibarigaruka kunywa viinyo yaawe, Ei waafeereire kubi;" 
Isaiah62:9 Kureka abarizishaaruura nibo barizirya, Bakahimbisa MUKAMA, Kandi abaricwa emizaabibu yaawe Nibo bariginywera omu bikaari by'Omwanya gwangye ogurikwera." 
Isaiah62:10 Murabe omu marembo, mugarabemu, Mubonereze abantu omuhanda; Mutinde omuhanda rugyendwa, mugutinde, Mwihemu amabaare, Mwimukize abantu orurango." 
Isaiah62:11 Reeba, MUKAMA arangire okuhika aha muheru gw'ensi, Naagira ati: Mugambire Saayuuni muti: Reeba, okujunwa kwawe nikwija; Reeba Mukama naija aine ebihembo, N'enzimuurano ye emwebembeire." 
Isaiah62:12 Kandi baryayetwa abantu abarikwera, Abacungwirwe MUKAMA; Naiwe oryayetwa Oshweirwe, Orurembo orutatsigirweho." 
Isaiah63:1 Oriya n'oha owaareetwa Edomu, Owaaruga Bozira ajwaire emyenda etukuziibwe, Ojwaire eby'ekitiinisa, Kandi orikugyendesa amaani maingi? Niinye, orikuranga okuhikiirira, Oine amaani kujuna." 
Isaiah63:2 Ahabw'enki emyenda yaawe neetukura, Ebijwaro byawe bikashusha eby'orikunyuukira omu inyuukiro rya viinyo?" 
Isaiah63:3 Nnyukiire omu inyuukiro nyenka; Omu bantu b'omu mahanga tihariho n'omwe ou mbaire nyine; Naabaribata ngwirwe kubi, Naabaribatiirira nyine ekiniga; Eshagama yaabo yaataraakira ebijwaro byangye, Emyenda yangye yaagiibwaho amabara." 
Isaiah63:4 Ahabw'okuba ku naabaire mmaririire kutaho eizooba ry'okuhooreraho enzigu, Omwaka gwangye gw'okucungura gwahika." 
Isaiah63:5 Naamagamaga, naareeba hatariho w'okumpa emikono; Naatangaara kureeba hatariho w'okumpwera; N'ahabw'ekyo omukono gwangye gwandeetera obusinguzi, N'ekiniga kyangye kyangumya." 
Isaiah63:6 Naaribatiirira amahanga ngwirwe kubi, Naagasinza n'ekiniga kyangye; Eshagama yaabo naagishesha ahansi." 
Isaiah63:7 Ndyagamba aha by'embabazi ebi MUKAMA yaakozire, N'aha by'okumuhimbisa, Nk'ebi yaatuhaire byona oku biri, N'ebirungi bingi ebi yaahaire enju ya Israeli, Nk'okusaasira kwe oku kuri, N'embabazi ze nyingi oku ziri." 
Isaiah63:8 Ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Buzimazima aba n'abantu bangye, Abaana abatarikukoresa bugobya; Atyo yaaba Omujuni waabo." 
Isaiah63:9 Omu kubonabonesibwa kwabo kwona nawe akabonabonesibwa. Kandi maraika wa Ruhanga wenka yaabajuna; Ahabw'okukunda kwe n'okubagirira esaasi akabajuna, Yaabakiriza, yaabaheeka omu biro bya ira byona." 
Isaiah63:10 Kwonka bakagoma, baagwisa kubi Omwoyo we Orikwera; N'ahabw'ekyo yaahinduka omuzigu waabo; Kandi We wenka yaabeerwanisiza." 
Isaiah63:11 Bwanyima abantu be baijuka ebiro bya ira, Baijuka na Musa omugaragwa we, nibagira bati: Owaabaihire omu nyanja N'abariisa b'entaama ze, arahi? Owaabataire Omwoyo we Orikwera ahagati, arahi," 
Isaiah63:12 Owaagyendeise omukono gwe gw'ekitiinisa Aha mukono gwa buryo ogwa Musa, Akataanisa amaizi omu maisho gaabo, Ngu ayetungire eiziina eritahwaho," 
Isaiah63:13 Akabarabya ahagati y'amaizi maingi, Batateere ntsibo nk'embaraasi erikuraba omu ihamba?" 
Isaiah63:14 Nk'ente ezirikushuuma omu ruhita Nikwo Omwoyo wa MUKAMA yaabahaire obuhuumure. Okwo nikwo yaayebembeire abantu baawe, Ngu oyetungire eiziina ry'ekitiinisa." 
Isaiah63:15 Naga amaisho ahansi nooyema omu iguru, Oreebe ori omu butaaho bwawe oburikwera kandi obw'ekitiinisa. Obweziriki bwawe n'eby'amaani ebi waakozire, birahi? Okwetenga kw'omu mutima gwawe n'embabazi zaawe Mbiimirwe." 
Isaiah63:16 Manya, niiwe Tataitwe, N'obu Abrahamu araabe atarikutumanya, Israeli atwogire. Iwe MUKAMA niiwe Tataitwe; Omucunguzi waitu okuruga ira ryona niryo iziina ryawe." 
Isaiah63:17 Ai MUKAMA, ahabw'enki nootuhabya emihanda yaawe, Okatugangaaza emitima, tutakutiine? Garuka ahabw'abairu baawe, Nizo nganda z'obuhunguzi bwawe." 
Isaiah63:18 Abantu baawe abarikwera bakamara omwanya mukye Baine Omwanya gwawe ogurikwera; Mbwenu abazigu baitu baguribatiriire. 
Isaiah63:19 Twaba nk'abu otakategyekahoga, Kandi nk'abatakeetererwaga iziina ryawe." 
Isaiah64:1 Nkaabaasibwa ki, oshatura eiguru, oshuuma, Enshozi zitengatenga omu maisho gaawe," 
Isaiah64:2 Nk'oku omuriro gwotsya obuyaayo, Gukareetera amaizi kubira Eiziina ryawe ribona kumanywa ababisha baawe, Amahanga gatetemera omu maisho gaawe!" 
Isaiah64:3 Obu waakora ebirikwitsa obwoba, ebi twabaire tutarikuteekateeka, okashuuma, enshozi zaatengatenga omu maisho gaawe." 
Isaiah64:4 Ahakuba okuruga ira abantu bakaba batakamanyaga, Kandi n'okutu kwabo kutakahuriraga, N'amaisho gatakareebaga Ruhanga ondiijo, Oine eki arikukorera abarikumutegyereza, okwihaho iwe." 
Isaiah64:5 Iwe otangirira abarikushemerererwa eby'okuhikiirira, bakabikora, Abarikukwijuka, iwe n'emitwarize yaawe; Kwonka okagira ekiniga ahabw'okuba tukakora ebibi; Twabimaramu omwanya muhango. Ebyo turyajunwa?" 
Isaiah64:6 Ahabw'okuba twena tukahinduka nk'omuntu otashemeire, N'eby'okuhikiirira kyaitu byona ni nk'ekijwaro ekisiisikaire. Twena tuhonga nk'eibabai, N'eby'okutahikiirira byaitu bitutwara nk'ekirikutwarwa omuyaga." 
Isaiah64:7 Tihariho orikutakira eiziina ryawe, Nari orikwebatura kukukwata amaguru; Ahabw'okuba otwimire amaisho, Waatumaraho ahabw'eby'okutahikiirira byaitu." 
Isaiah64:8 Kwonka, ai MUKAMA, niiwe Tataitwe, Itwe turi eibumba, niiwe mubumbi waitu; Twena turi ebibumbirwe engaro zaawe." 
Isaiah64:9 Ai MUKAMA, otatugirira ekiniga, okarengyesereza, Kandi otaijuka eby'okutahikiirira byaitu ebiro byona." 
Isaiah64:10 Endembo zaawe ezirikwera zihindukire eihamba, Saayuuni ebaire eihamba, Yerusaalemu yaaba amatongo." 
Isaiah64:11 Enju yaitu erikwera, kandi enungi, Ei baatatenkuriitwe baabaire bakuhimbisizamu, Ekasya; Ebi twabaire nitukunda byona byacwekyerera." 
Isaiah64:12 Ai MUKAMA, noija kwehuzya ebi bintu, Ohuname, otubonabonese munonga?" 
Isaiah65:1 Nkaba nyeteekateekire kusherurwa Abatakambuuririzaga; Nkaba nyeteekateekire kubonwa Abakansheruraga. Naagira eihanga eritakatakiraga iziina ryangye nti: Reeba, ndi aha! Reeba, ndi aha!" 
Isaiah65:2 Eizooba ryona nsiiba ntegire emikono eihanga erigomi Abantu abarikugyendera omu muhanda ogutashemeire, Nibakuratira obwengye bwabo bonka;" 
Isaiah65:3 Abantu abarikungwisa kubi obutoosha nindeeba, Nibatambira ebitambo omu misiri, Nibooterera obubaane aha matofaari," 
Isaiah65:4 Abashutama omu bituuro, Bakaraara aha kiro bari omu myanya eyekiikire, Abarya enyama y'empunu, N'omucuuzi gw'enyama zirikunugwa Guri omu nyabya zaabo;" 
Isaiah65:5 Abarikugira bati: Guma wenka; Otampika; ahabw'okuba ndi orikwera okukukira. Abo bantu n'omwika gw'omu nyindo zange, Omiriro ogusiiba nigwaka." 
Isaiah65:6 Reeba, kihandiikirwe omu maisho gangye; Tindihunama, kureka ndyahoora;" 
Isaiah65:7 Eego, ndyabazimuurira ahabw'ebibi byabo, N'ahabw'ebya baishenkurubo, Kibasaase munonga, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba; Ahabw'okwoterera obubaane aha nshozi, Kandi bakanjumira aha bibungo, Ndyabanza ngyere eki bashemereire, Bwanyima mbafubire nk'ebi baakozire oku biri." 
Isaiah65:8 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Nk'oku viinyo eshangwa omu mutsitsa, Bakagira bati: Otagushiisha, ahakuba gurimu omugisha, Naanye nikwo nditwaza, ahabw'abaheereza bangye, Nkareka kubamaraho boona." 
Isaiah65:9 Ndyaiha omuri Yakobo abaijukuru, N'omuri Yuda nyihemu abarihungura ebibungo byangye; Abashongore bangye babihungure, N'abaheereza banye babituuremu." 
Isaiah65:10 Sharooni eryaba amariisizo g'amasyo g'entaama, N'oruhanga rwa Akori rube orw'amasyo g'ente kubyamamu Ahabw'abantu bangye abanshwerwire." 
Isaiah65:11 Kwonka imwe abarikutsigaho MUKAMA, Mukeebwa orushozi rwangye orurikwera, Mukateekyera Gaadi obugyenyi, Mukaijuriza Meeni ebikopo bya viinyo ejwangize," 
Isaiah65:12 Ndyabateeraho okwitwa rurara; Mwena muryacureerera okwitwa, Ahabw'okuba, ku naayetsire, timureetabire; Ku naagambire, timurategire kutu; kureka mukakora ebi ntarikusiima, Mwatoorana ebi ntarikushemerererwa." 
Isaiah65:13 N'ahabw'ekyo, oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, abaheereza bangye baryarya, Kwonka imwe mugume n'enjara; Reeba, abaheereza bangye baryanywa, Kwonka imwe mugume n'eiriho; Reeba, abaheereza bangye baryashemererwa, Kwonka imwe mwitwe enshoni;" 
Isaiah65:14 Reeba, abaheereza bangye baryayeshongora ahabw'obunanukye bw'omu mutima, Kwonka imwe muryaborooga ahabw'obusaasi bw'omu mutima, Muteere ekiboroogo ahabw'emitima y'obujune." 
Isaiah65:15 Eiziina ryanyu riryatsigara aha batoorainwe bangye riri ekijumo. Mukama RUHANGA aryabaita, Kwonka abaheereza be aryabeeta erindi iziina." 
Isaiah65:16 Atyo orikweshabira omugisha omu nsi! Aryagweshabira ahari Ruhanga ow'amazima, Kandi orikurahirira omu nsi Aryarahira Ruhanga ow'amazima; Ahabw'okuba enaku eza ira zeebire, Zanduga omumaisho." 
Isaiah65:17 Reeba, nimpanga eiguru risya n'ensi nsya; Ebya ira tibiriijukwa, N'obu kwakuba okuteebwaho omutima."
