Isaiah65:18 Kwonka mushemererwe, munanukye ebiro byona Ahabw'okuba, reeba, nimpanga Yerusaalemu kuba ey'okunanukiramu, N'abantu baayo kuba abarikushemeza." 
Isaiah65:19 Ndyashemerererwa Yerusaalemu, Nnanukye ahabw'abantu bangye. Terihuririrwamu iraka ry'okucura, N'obu kwakuba okurira kw'abaine enaku." 
Isaiah65:20 Tiharigaruka kubayo keereere Akarikufa kamazire ebiro bikye, N'obu yaakuba omugurusi otarikuhitsya biro bye; Ahakuba omwana aryafa ahikize emyaka igana, Kandi omusiisi, orifa ahikize emyaka igana, biri akyeenirwe." 
Isaiah65:21 Bayrayombeka amaju, bagatuuremu; Baryabyara emizaabibu, barye ebijuma byayo." 
Isaiah65:22 Tibaryombeka maju, abandi bakagataahamu; Tibaribyara mizaabibu, ekariibwa abandi; Ahabw'okuba nk'oku ebiro by'omuti biba, n'eby'abantu bangye nikwo biriba, Kandi abatoorainwe bangye baryamara omwanya muhango Nibashemerererwa ebi emikono yaabo ekozire." 
Isaiah65:23 Tibarihendekyera busha, N'obu kwakuba okuzaara abaana b'okugwerwa akagwe; Ahabw'okuba baryaba oruzaaro rw'abu MUKAMA ahaire omugisha Hamwe na baijukuru baabo." 
Isaiah65:24 Batakaanyetsire, ndyabeetaba; Kandi ndyabahurira nibakigamba." 
Isaiah65:25 Omushega n'omwana gw'entaama biryarya kumwe; Entare eryarya obunyaatsi nk'ente, Kandi omucuucu guryaba eby'okurya by'enjoka. Aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera rwona Tibarikoreraho kubi, n'obu kwakuba okucwekyereza, Nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah66:1 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Eiguru nikyo kitebe kyangye ky'obukama, N'ensi n'akatebe k'ebigyere byangye. Ni nju ki ei muriinyombekyera, Nari shi ni mwanya ki ogu ndihuumuriramu?" 
Isaiah66:2 Ebyo byona omukono gwangye nigwo gwabihangire; N'ahabw'ekyo byona n'ebyangye, Nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. Kwonka omuntu ou nditaho omutima N'oine omutima omucureezi, kandi ogirikweteisa, Kandi orikutetema ahabw'ekigambo kyangye." 
Isaiah66:3 Orikwita ente ni nk'orikwita omuntu; Orikutamba omwana gw'entaama, ni nk'orikuhotora embwa ebitsya; Orikuhonga empongano y'eby'okunywa ni nk'orikuhonga eshagama y'empunu; Orikwotera obubaane, ni nk'orikushabira ekishushani ekirikuramibwa omugisha. Buzima beetooraniire emihanda yaabo, Emitima yaabo eshemerererwa ebirikunugwa byabo." 
Isaiah66:4 Naanye ndyabatooranira okubonabonesibwa, Nbareeteho ebi barikutiina; Ahabw'okuba ku naayetsire, haabura owaayetaba; Ku naagambire, tibaatega matu; Kureka baakora ebi ntarashemerereirwe." 
Isaiah66:5 Imwe abarikutetema ahabw'ekigambo kya MUKAMA, Nimuhurire ekigambo kye. Beene waanyu abarikubanga, Bakabacwa nibabatura eiziina ryangye, Bagizire bati: Ka MUKAMA ahimbisibwe, Haza tureebe okwo kushemererwa kwanyu. Kwonka nibo barikwatwa enshoni." 
Isaiah66:6 Hurira orwari orurikwimuka omu rurembo, Eiraka eririkuruga omuri hekalu, Eiraka rya MUKAMA orikuzimuurira abazigu be!" 
Isaiah66:7 Ku yaabaire atakarumirwe, yaazaara; Ku yaabaire atakagizire bisha, Yaateeraho omwana w'omwojo." 
Isaiah66:8 Orareebire ekinti nk'ekyo n'oha? Nari shi, ebyo birareebirwe oha? Ensi ekaabaasa kuzaarwa omu izooba rimwe? Eihanga rikaabaasa kuruga omu nda omu kaanya kakye? Ahakuba Saayuuni ku yaarumirwe ati, Ahonaaho yaazaara abaana be b'aboojo." 
Isaiah66:9 Ndyakuhitysa aha bunaku bw'okuzaara, Ndemwe kukuzaaza? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. Nyowe oha okuzaara, niinye ndiigara enda? Nikwo Ruhanga waawe arikugira." 
Isaiah66:10 Imwe abarikukunda Yerusaalemu mwena, Mushemererwe hamwe nayo, mwesiime ahabwayo; Imwe abarikugicurira mwena, Mwesiime hamwe nayo n'okushemererwa." 
Isaiah66:11 Mwonkye amabeere g'okurembesereza kwayo, muhaagye, Munywe munonga aha kitiinisa kyayo kingi mushemereirwe." 
Isaiah66:12 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba ndyamuha obusingye oburi nk'omugyera, Mmuhe n'obutungi bw'amahanga nk'omugyera ogushandaire; Mwonkye, muheekwe omu rubaju, Mugurukagurukibwe aha bibero." 
Isaiah66:13 Nk'oku nyina w'omwana amurembesereza, Nikwo ndibarembesereza, Mukagwisizibwa gye omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah66:14 Ku murikireeba, emitima yaanyu eryashemererwa, Amagufa gaanyu gakure gye nk'obunyaatsi bw'omuroba; Kandi kiryamanywa ku omukono gwa MUKAMA guri hamwe n'abaheereza be, N'ekiniga kye ku kiri aha bazigu be." 
Isaiah66:15 Ahabw'okuba, reeba, MUKAMA aryaija n'omuriro, N'ebigaari bye biri nk'akasooroora, Ngu okuguubwa kubi kwe akuhikiirize n'ekiniga kingi, Kandi abahanise endimi z'omuriro." 
Isaiah66:16 Ahakuba MUKAMA aryacwera abantu boona orubanja, Abareho ekifubiro ky'omuriro na rurara; Kandi abariitwa MUKAMA baryaba baingi." 
Isaiah66:17 Abarikweyeza, bakeeshemeza, ngu baze omu misiri bakurataine, barye empunu n'ebirikunugwa n'embeba, abo boona baryacwekyererera hamwe, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah66:18 Ahakuba nimmanya emirimo yaabo n'ebiteekateeko byabo; obunaku nibwija, obu nditeeranira ahamwe amahanga goona n'endimi zoona, bakaija, bakareeba ekitiinisa kyangye." 
Isaiah66:19 Ndyata akamanyiso omuribo, abaahonokireho mbatume omu b'amahanga, Tarushiishi, Puuli, Luudi, ab'omu barasi, Tubali, Yavani omu birwa ebiri hare, ei batakahuriraga kurangaanwa kwangye, n'obu kwakuba okureeba ekitiinisa kyangye; baryo baryamanyisa amahanga ekitiinisa kyangye." 
Isaiah66:20 Kandi baryareeta beene waanyu boona, baheekirwe aha mbaraasi, omu bigaari, omu ngozi, aha nyumbu n'aha ngamira, nibabaiha omu mahanga goona kuba empongano y'okuhongyera MUKAMA, babahitsye Yerusaalemu aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera, babitwaze nk'oku Abaisraeli bashangwa bareeta omu nju ya MUKAMA empongano zaabo z'esaano, omu nyabya zishemeziibwe, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah66:21 Kandi ndyaihamu bamwe omuribo, mbagira abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah66:22 Nk'oku eiguru risya n'ensi nsya ebi ndihanga birigumaho omu maisho gangye, nikwo n'oruzaaro rwanyu n'eiziina ryanyu birigumaho, nikwo MUKAMA arigamba." 
Isaiah66:23 Obunaku buryahika, obu abantu boona bariguma nibaija omu maisho gangye kuramya, buri kuboneka kw'okwezi, n'ahari buri sabato, nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba." 
Isaiah66:24 Kandi baryahsohora baze kureeba emitumbi y'abangomeire; ahabw'okuba enyogori zaabo tizirifa, n'omuriro gwabo tiguriraazibwa, baryaba ekihagaro aha bantu boona." 
Jeremiah1:1 Ebigambo bya Yeremia, mwene Hilikia, ow'omu banyamurwa abaabaire batwire Anatoosi omu ishaza rya Benyamiini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikamwijaho omu butegyeki bwa Yosia mwene Amini omugabe wa Yuda, omu mawak gwa ikumi n'eshatu ogw'omu butegyeki bwe;" 
Jeremiah1:3 kandi kyagaruka kyaija omu butegyeki bwa Yehoyakimi mwene Yosa omugabe wa Yuda, okuhitsya aha muheru gw'omwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe ogwa Zedekia mwne Yosia ogwo, omugabe wa Yuda, obu Yerusaalemu yaakwatwa omu mwezi kwa kataano kw'ogwo mwaka." 
Jeremiah1:4 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah1:5 Ku naabaire ntakakuhangire mu nda ya nyoko, nkakumanya; Naakweza otakazairwe, Naakutaho kuba nabi w'amahanga." 
Jeremiah1:6 Naanye nikwo kugira nti: Ai bambe, Mukama RUHANGA, reeba, tindikumanya kugamba; ahabw'okuba nkiri muto." 
Jeremiah1:7 Kwonka MUKAMA yangira ati: Reka kugira oti: Ndi muto; Ahabw'okuba abu ndikutumaho boona nibo orizamu, Kandi eki ndikuragiira kyona nikyo origamba." 
Jeremiah1:8 Otarubatiina, Ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe kukujuna; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah1:9 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagorora omukono gwe, yaakora aha minwa yangye, yangira ati: Reeba, naata ebigambo byangye omu kanwa kaawe;" 
Jeremiah1:10 Kandi omanye ku eri izooba naakutaho Kutegyeka amahanga n'ensi z'abagabe, Kurandura n'okusheenya, Kucwekyereza n'okujuumika, Kwombeka n'okubyara." 
Jeremiah1:11 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: Yeremia, nooreeba ki? Naagira nti: Nindeeba enkoni y'omuti gw'endozi." 
Jeremiah1:12 MUKAMA yangira ati: Waareeba gye; ahabw'okuba ntaire omutima aha kigambo kyangye kukihikiiriza. 
Jeremiah1:13 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho obwa kabiri nikigira kiti: Nooreba ki? Naagira nti: Nidneeba enyungu erikubira etaire ekibunu aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. 
Jeremiah1:14 MUKAMA nikwo kungira ati: Akabi karyagwa aha batuuzi b'omu nsi egi boona nikaruga aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. 
Jeremiah1:15 Reeba, ndyayeta enganda zoona ez'omu nsi z'abagabe b'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho baije, buri omwe ate ekitebe kye ky'obugabe aha marembo ga Yerusaalemu, n'aha ngo zaayo zoona ezigyehinguririize, n'aha ndembo zoona eza Yuda; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah1:16 Kandi abantu baamwo ndyabacwera orubanja, rubasingye, ahabw'obubi bwabo boona obwabantusigiiseho, bakooterera baaruhanga abandi obubaane, bakaramya ebi emikono yaabo yaakozire." 
Jeremiah1:17 Kwonka iwe, yezirikye, oimukye, obagambire ebi ndaakuragiire byona. Batakuhahaaza omutima, ntakaahahaaza ogwawe omu maisho gaabo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Kandi reeba, eri izooba naakugira orurembo orwehinguririziibwe ebigo, enyomyo y'ekyoma n'engo z'emiringa, kurwanisa ensi egi yoona, abagabe ba Yuda, abanyiginya baayo, abanyamurwa baayo n'abantu baayo." 
Jeremiah1:19 Baryakurwanisa, kwonka tibarikubaasa; ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe kukujuna; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah2:1 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah2:2 Irooko orangye, aba Yerusaalemu bakuhuriire, noogira oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Niinyijuka okwehayo kw'omu buhangare bwawe, Na rukundo yaawe y'omu bugore, Oku wankuratiire omu ihamba Omu nsi etakahingwamuga." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israeli akaba ari oshororeirwe MUKAMA, Omuganuro gwe gw'okubanza. Abaaguriireho boona bakagiibwaho orubanja, Akabi kaabahikaho; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah2:4 Imwe ab'enju ya Yakobo, naiwe enganda zoona ez'enju ya Israeli, muhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah2:5 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ni kibi ki, eki baashwenkuriimwe bandeebireho, Kikabareetera kuunyimuura, N'okukuratira ebitaine buryo Bakahinduka abataine mugasho?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Haza batabuuze bati: MUKAMA ari nkahi, Owaatwihire omu nsi ya Misri, Akaturabya omu ihamba, Omu nsi y'amarungu n'ebiina, Omu nsi eyomire, kandi ey'ekibunda kya rufu, Ensi etarabwamu bantu, kandi etatuurwamu?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Kaandi nkabahitsya omu nsi y'omweru, Kurya ebijuma byayo n'ebindi birungi byamwo; Kwonka ku mwahikireyo, mwansiisira ensi, Obuhunguzi bwangye mwabuhindura ekihagaro." 
Jeremiah2:8 Abanyamurwa tibaagira bati: Beitu MUKAMA arahi? N'abanyabiragiro tibammanya, Abategyeki bancumuraho, Na baanabi baaragura ebya Baali, Baakuratira ebitaine muhoho." 
Jeremiah2:9 Nikyo ndikubatonganisiza hati, Kandi na baijukuru baanyu ndyabatonganisa." 
Jeremiah2:10 Mwambukye muhikye aha birwa bya Kitimu, mureeba; Muteme Kedari, mwetegyereze munonga, Mureebe ku haraabe harabaireho ekigambo nk'ekyo." 
Jeremiah2:11 Hariho eihanga erirahingiise baaruhanga baaryo, N'obu baraabe batari baaruhanga buzima? Kwonka abantu bangye bahingiise ekitiinisa kyabo Ebitaine mugasho." 
Jeremiah2:12 Iwe iguru 'we, kwata aha munwa ahabw'ekyo, Ogire obwoba bwingi, oshoberwe munonga; Nikwo MUKAMA arikugira;" 
Jeremiah2:13 Ahabw'okuba abantu bangye bakozire ebibi bibiri- Baanyimwire, nyowe enshuro y'amaizi g'amagara, Baayetimbira ebiziba, Ebiziba bifumukire, ebitarikubaasa kugumwamu maizi." 
Jeremiah2:14 Israeli n'omuhuuku? N'omuhuuku owaazairwe omuka? Ahabw'enki ahindukire omunyago? 
Jeremiah2:15 Entare z'omutontomeire, Zaatsinda munonga, Zaahindura ensi ye amatongo, Endembo ze zihiire, tizikiine bantu." 
Jeremiah2:16 Kandi Noofu na Tahapenesi Baakwata eigufa ry'akazingiro k'omutwe. 
Jeremiah2:17 Beitu tiiwe waayereeteire ebyo Ahabw'okwimuura MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Obu yaakwebembera omu muhanga?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Mbwenu okuza Misri okanywa amaizi ga Nailo Nikikugasira ki? Nari shi, nikikugasira ki okuza Asiria Kunywa amaizi ga Furaati?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Obubi bwawe buryakwehanira, N'okugaruka enyima kwawe kukuteise; Omanye, kandi oreebe ku kiri ekintu kibi kandi ekirikushaarira Kuunyimuura, nyowe MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, otantiine; Nikwo Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Jeremiah2:20 Ahakuba ira okahenda omugamba gwawe, Waacwa ebyabaire bikubohire, Kandi waagira oti: Tindigaruka kuheereza; Haza waaramiza aha mutwe gwa buri kubungo kiraingwa N'ahansi ya buri kiti kibisi ekyetwa omurinzi, Nka maraaya." 
Jeremiah2:21 Haza naabaire nkugizire omuzaabibu murungi munonga, Gw'embibo etoorainwe. Mbwenu kikaruga hi waaza kusiisikara, Okaba omuzaabibu ogw'omu ishwa?" 
Jeremiah2:22 N'obu waakwoga ota n'eiju ry'akashenda, Okagaruka okooga na sabuuni nyingi, Kwonka eibara ry'ekibi kyawe rikiri omu maisho gangye; Nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Jeremiah2:23 Noobaasa ota kugira oti: Tinsiisikaire, Kandi tinkuratiire Baabaali. Reeba omuhanda gwawe omu ruhanga, Omanye ebi okozire. Ori nk'engamira erikukina neekora oku n'oku;" 
Jeremiah2:24 Kandi ori nk'enturegye emanyiire eihamba, Erikukagiiriza omuyaga erinzire; N'oha owaakubaasa kugizibira? Tihariho n'emwe eruha neegisherura, Ahakuba egibona omu kwezi kwayo." 
Jeremiah2:25 Otaikiriza ebigyere byawe kugyenda bitajwaire nkaito, N'omumiro gwawe kugyenda gwine ekyaka. Kwonka okagira oti: Nooyeruhiza busha, Ahabw'okuba nkunzire abanyamahanga, Kandi nibo ndikwija kukuratira." 
Jeremiah2:26 Nk'oku omushuma ahemuka yaakwatwa, Nikwo enju ya Israeli erihemuka, Bo n'abagabe baabo, abategyeki baabo, Abanyamurwa baabo na baanabi baabo," 
Jeremiah2:27 Abagira ekiti, buri omwe ati: Niiwe tata, N'eibaare ati: Niiwe wanzaire; Ahabw'okuba banteire amabega, Baanyima amaisho. Kwonka omu biro by'okureeba enaku Baryataka bati: Imuka otujune." 
Jeremiah2:28 Mbwenu baaruhanga baawe Abu waayeteereireho barahi? Ku baraabe nibabaasa kukujuna Omu biro by'enaku zaawe, nibaimukye; Ahabw'okuba, nk'oku endembo zaawe zirikwingana, Na baaruhanga baawe nikwo bari, iwe Yuda." 
Jeremiah2:29 Ahabw'enki noonyetomboitera? Manya mwena mungomeire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah2:30 Nyeruhiize busha kuteera abaana baanyu; Tibaikiriza kuhanwa; Rurara yaanyu niyo emazireho baanabi baanyu Nk'entare esheegire. 
Jeremiah2:31 Naimwe ab'obusingye obu, mute omutima aha kigambo kya MUKAMA. Ndabeereire Israeli eihamba, Nari ensi y'omwirima ndindindi? Mbwenu abantu bangye nibagirira ki bati: Nitwetegyeka; titurikugarukaho bundi?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Nimugira ngu empangare neebaasa kwebwa eby'okwetiiba, Nari omugore kwebwa ekyetwekyerero kye? Kwonka abantu bangye banyebirwe Ebiro bingi ebitarikubarwa." 
Jeremiah2:33 Eshi omanya kusherura nkunzi zaawe! Nangwa n'abakazi babi obeegyeise emize yaawe. 
Jeremiah2:34 Kandi aha kipumpuriya kyawe Hareebekireho eshagama y'abanaku abu waatuzire busha, Abu otakashangaga nibafumura enju." 
Jeremiah2:35 Haza ebyo byona obyogaho, Ogira oti: Tiinyine rubanja; Buzimazima takiinyiniire kiniga. Reeba, ndyakutonganisa Ahabw'okugira oti: Tincumwire." 
Jeremiah2:36 Ahabw'enki orahuka kukora oku n'oku, N'okuhindura emitwarize yaawe? Misri neija kukuhemura Nk'oku Asiria yaakugizire." 
Jeremiah2:37 Naiwe oryarugayo oyekoreire emikono, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ayangire abu oyesiga, Kandi tibaine ki barikugasira." 
Jeremiah3:1 Omushaija ku ashenda omukazi we, Ogwo mukazi yaamurugaho Yaaba muka ondiijo, Iba aryagaruka amushwere? Egyo nsi tekaasiisikara munonga? Iwe okaraaya na bashambane baawe baingi, Ebyo nookingarukira? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah3:2 Naga amaisho gaawe aha bibungo by'emparamaata, oreebe; Ahu otarashambaniire ni nkahi? Okaba oshutama aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, otegyereize bashambane baawe Nk'Omuharabu omu ihamba. Oshiisha ensi n'ebihagaro by'obwamaraaya bwawe." 
Jeremiah3:3 Nikyo kyazibiire enjura kugwa, Enjura ya katumba ekabura; N'obu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, okaguma oyomire aha maisho nka maraaya, Tiwaagira kashoni." 
Jeremiah3:4 Na hati tokantakiire, oti: Taata, niiwe mugyenzi wangye omu buhangare bwangye;" 
Jeremiah3:5 Kandi oti: Aryaguma n'ekiniga ebiro byona? Aryaguubwa kubi okuhitsya aha muheru? Reeba okwo nikwo waagizire, Kwonka okakora ebibi byona nk'oku orikwenda." 
Jeremiah3:6 Kandi omu biro by'omugabe Yosia, MUKAMA akangira ati: Oreebire eki Israeli owaagarukire enyima yaakozire? Akatemba ekibungo kyona ekiraingwa, yaaza ahansi ya buri kiti kibisi ekyetwa omurinzi, yaashambanirayo." 
Jeremiah3:7 Naateekateeka nti: Bwanyima y'okukora ebyo byona, naija kungarukira. Kwonka tiyaagaruka; kandi omurumuna Yuda endeebya yaakireeba." 
Jeremiah3:8 Kandi egyo ndeebya Yuda, n'obu araabe yaareebire oku naabinga mukuru we Israeli, nkamuha ebaruha y'okumushenda nimmutura obushambani bwe bwona, taratiinire, kureka nawe akagyenda, yaaza kuraaya." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ahabw'okwo kuraaya kumurahukira, yaashiisha ensi, naashambana n'amabaare n'ebiti." 
Jeremiah3:10 Ebyo byona n'obu biraabe byabaire bityo, egyo ndeebya Yuda tarangarukiire n'omutima gwe gwona, kureka omu kuryarya; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah3:11 Kandi MUKAMA yaagaruka yangira ati: Israeli owaagarukire enyima, ayeyorekire ku ataine rubanja nk'orwa Yuda endeebya." 
Jeremiah3:12 Irooko, orangire ebi bigambo aharikureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho noogira oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Garuka, iwe Israeli owaagarukire enyima, Tindikwija kukureebesa kiniga, Ahabw'okuba ndi ow'embabazi; Tindiguma na kiniga ebiro byona; Nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah3:13 Kwonka oyemere ekibi kyawe, Ku waagomeire MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Okayabatikana n'abanyamahanga Ahansi ya buri kiti kibisi ekyetwa omurinzi, Kandi otoorobere iraka ryangye; Nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah3:14 Imwe baana abaagarukire enyima 'mwe, Nimugarukye; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira; Ahabw'okuba niinye mukama waanyu. Ndyabatwara niinyiha omwe-omwe omu rurembo, Babiri-babiri omu ruganda, Mbahitsye Saayuuni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Kandi ndyabaha abariisa abarikunshusha omutima, babariise n'obwengye n'okwetegyereza." 
Jeremiah3:16 Omu biro ebyo ku muriheza kukanya, mwaba baingi omu nsi, tibarigaruka kugamba ha by'eshenduukye y'endagaano ya MUKAMA; teriteekateekwaho, teriijukwa, kandi tibarigyefuuza n'obu kwakuba okugaruka kugikora." 
Jeremiah3:17 Omu bunaku obwo Yerusaalemu eryayetwa ekitebe kya MUKAMA eky'obukama, amahanga goona garyakiteeraniraho, ei MUKAMA ariomuri Yerusaalemu, kandi tibarigaruka kukuratira obugangaazi bw'emitima yaabo emibi." 
Jeremiah3:18 Omuri ebyo biro enju ya Yuda eryakwatanisa n'eya Israeli, bombi barugye omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, bataahe omu nsi ei naahaire baashwenkuriimwe kuba obuhunguzi bwabo." 
Jeremiah3:19 Nkagira nti: Ka nkubarire omuri batabani bangye, Nkuhe ensi nungi, Obuhunguzi burungi munonga okukira obw'amahanga goona. Kandi naagira nti: Oryanyeta Sho, torindugaho." 
Jeremiah3:20 Kwonka iwe nju ya Israeli 'we, otuura nondeebya, Nk'oku omukazi endeebya atsigaho iba. Nkwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah3:21 Eiraka nirihuririrwa omu bibungo by'emparamaata, Okurira n'okweshengyereza kw'abaana ba Israeli Ahabw'okushiisha emitwarize yaabo, Bakeebwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Imwe baana baagarukire enyima 'mwe, nimugarukye; Niinyija kubatambira okugaruka enyima kwanyu. Reeba, twaija ahariiwe, Ahabw'okuba ori MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Buzimazima okuteerera omuhira aha bibungo N'okubandirwa aha nshozi n'ebya busha; Buzimazima okujunwa kwa Israeli Kuri omuri MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu. 
Jeremiah3:24 Kwonka okwiha omu buto bwaitu ekirikwitsa enshoni kimazireho byona ebi baatatenkuriitwe baahendekyeire, amasyo gaabo ag'entaama n'ag'ente, kandi na batabani baabo na bahara baabo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Ka tubyame n'enshoni zaitu, okuhemuka kwaitu kutushwekye, ahabw'okuba tukacumura ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, itwe na baatatenkuriitwe, okwiha omu buto bwaitu n'okuhitsya eri izooba, kandi titukooroberaga iraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah4:1 MUKAMA naagira ati: Iwe Israeli, ku oraikirize kugaruka, Obe niinye waagarukira; Kandi ku oraiheho ebihagaro byawe, byanduga omumasiho, Otarikubangaanisa," 
Jeremiah4:2 Ku oraarahire oti: Nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire, Waarahira omu mazima, omu buryo n'omu kuhikiirira, Obwo amahanga garyayeshabira omugisha omuriwe, Kandi omuriwe nimwo garyesiimira." 
Jeremiah4:3 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugambira abantu ba Yuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, ati: Mutabire endaara zaanyu, Kandi mutabiba omu mahwa;" 
Jeremiah4:4 Mweshare, mube aba MUKAMA, Mwiheho ekishushu ekiri aha mitima yaanyu, Imwe aba Yuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, Ekiniga kyangye kitakaija nk'omuriro, Kikabuguma, hakabura owaakiraaza, Ahabw'obubi bw'ebi murikukora." 
Jeremiah4:5 Mukimanyise omuri Yuda, mukirangye omuri Yerusaalemu nimugira muti: Muteere enzamba omu nsi yoona, Mugambe n'eiraka rihango nimugira muti: Muteerane, tuze omu ndembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare;" 
Jeremiah4:6 Mwimutsye orurango, nimureeba Saayuuni, Muhungye, musherure obukiriro muteeziringa; Ahabw'okuba naaza kureeta akabi karugye aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, Ndeete n'okucwekyerera kw'amaani." 
Jeremiah4:7 Entare erugire omu kishaka kyayo, Omuhwerekyerezi w'amahanga ari omu muhanda; Arugire owe, naija kucwekyereza ensi yaawe, Endembo zaawe zibe amatongo, zibure ab'okuzituuramu." 
Jeremiah4:8 N'ahabw'ekyo mwezirikye ebiguniya, Mucure, muboroogye, Ahabw'okuba ekiniga kya MUKAMA tikikaturugireho." 
Jeremiah4:9 Kandi MUKAMA yaagira ati: Ahari eryo izooba omutima gw'omugabe, n'ey'abategyeki, eryayehwa amatsiko; abanyamurwa baryayekwata aha munwa, na baanabi bashoberwe." 
Jeremiah4:10 Bwanyima naagira nti: Ai bambe, Mukama RUHANGA, buzimazima obeiheire kimwe eri ihanga n'aba Yerusaalemu, noogira oti: Muryaba gye; haza kunu rurara ehikiire kimwe aha magara gaabo." 
Jeremiah4:11 Omu biro ebyo baryagira eri ihanga n'aba Yerusaalemu bati: Omuyaga ogurikwotsya kuhuuha abantu bangye, ogurireetwa omu bibungo by'emparamaata eby'omu ihamba, gutari gw'okuheheeza nari okushemeza," 
Jeremiah4:12 kureka ogw'amaani okukira aho, niinye gurikwizira. Mbwenu niinye ndikugamba nimbacwera orubanja." 
Jeremiah4:13 Reeba, naija nk'ebicu, Ebigaari bye by'orugamba biri nk'akasoorora, N'embaraasi ze nizirahuka okukira amashamba. Tutoore hi? Ka twaza kuhwaho!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Iwe Yerusaalemu, yoozya obubi aha mutima gwawe, Obone kujunwa. Ebiteekateeko byawe bibi biryahitsya hi Kuguma omuriiwe!" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ahabw'okuba eiraka eririkuruga Daani nirigamba, Niriranga obubi niryema omu bibungo bya Efuraimu." 
Jeremiah4:16 Mugambire amahanga, ku arikwija; Mumanyise aba Yerusaalemu nimugira muti: Abagotsi nibaija nibaruga omu nsi ya hare, Nibateerera endembo za Yuda orwari." 
Jeremiah4:17 Bagyehinguririize nk'abarinzi b'omusiri kugiteera, Ahabw'okuba ekangomera; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah4:18 Emitwarize yaawe n'ebi orikukora Nibyo bikureeteire ebyo. Ekyo nikyo kifubiro kyawe, kandi nikishaarira, Ahabw'okuba kikuhikiire kimwe aha mutima." 
Jeremiah4:19 Ai bambe! Ai bambe! Nyine obusaasi bwingi; Omutima gwangye tigwine buhuumure. Tindikubaasa kuhunama, Ahabw'okuba nimpurira eiraka ry'enzamba, N'enduuru y'orugamba." 
Jeremiah4:20 Ebihikiirizi nibiihaihana, Ensi yoona ehindwirwe amatongo; Amahema gangye nigacwekyerezibwa kitaraariirwe, Emikingo yangye neecwekyerezibwa omu kaanya kakye." 
Jeremiah4:21 Niinyija kuheerera hi n'okureeba orurango, N'okuhurira eiraka ry'enzamba?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Ahabw'okuba abantu bangye n'abashema, Tibarikummanya; N'abaana bataine bwengye, Kandi abatarikwetegyereza. Omu kukora ebibi n'abanyabwengye, Kwonka omu kukora ebirungi tibaine ki barikumanya." 
Jeremiah4:23 Ku naayetegyereize ensi, naareeba eri amatongo, kandi erimu busha, N'eiguru ritarimu kashana." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ku naayetegyereize enshozi, naareeba nzitengyeta, N'ebibungo byona nibizonga." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ku naayetegyereize, naareeba hatariho muntu, N'ebirikuguruka omu mwanya byona byahungire." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ku naayetegyereize, naareeba ensi, eyaabaire eyeza, yaabaire eihamba, N'endembo zaayo zoona zaasheenyeirwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA, omu maisho g'ekiniga kye kingi." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ensi yoona eryaba amatongo; kwonak tindigimariraho kimwe. 
Jeremiah4:28 Nikyo ensi ericurira, N'eiguru rikairagura, Ahabw'okuba nkakigamba, naakimariirira, Tindikyefuuza, kandi tindikireka." 
Jeremiah4:29 Ab'omuri buri rurembo baryahunga Ahabw'okuhurira endigito y'ab'aha mbaraasi n'ab'amata, Bashenshere omu bishaka, bataahe omu nkiri, Endembo zoona zitsigweho, Habure owaazituuramu." 
Jeremiah4:30 Mbwenu iwe nshoberwa 'we, N'enki ekirikukujwaza karari, Okeehunda eby'ezaabu, Okahangusya amaisho gaawe n'erangi? Nooyeshemereza busha, Nkunzi zaawe nizikugaya, Kandi nizihiiga amagara gaawe." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ahabw'okuba mpuriire eiraka nk'ery'omukazi orikurumwa, Obusaasi nk'obw'omukazi orikujigaija, Eiraka rya Saayuuni orikusheemeeka, Akanaga emikono, naagira ati: Ai bambe! naagwa omu maisho g'abaitsi." 
Jeremiah5:1 Nimwirukye, mukore oku n'oku omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu, Mureebe, kandi mwetegyereze! Musherure omu nteeraniro zaayo z'emihanda, Ku muraabe nimubaasa kubonayo omuntu n'omwe, Orikukora eby'oburyo, akasherura amazima, Mbone kugisaasira." 
Jeremiah5:2 N'obu baraabe nibagira bati: Niturahira MUKAMA ohuriire, Kwonka nibarahira ebishuba." 
Jeremiah5:3 Ai MUKAMA, amaisho gaawe tigarikusherura amazima? Okabateera, kwonka tibaahurira busaasi; Waabamaraho, kwonka baayanga kuhanwa, Baagumya aha maisho gaabo okukira eibaare, Baayanga kweteisa." 
Jeremiah5:4 Bwanyima naagira nti: Abantu aba ni busha, tibaine bwengye; Ahabw'okuba tibarikumanya muhanda gwa MUKAMA, N'obu byakuba ebiragiro bya Ruhanga waabo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ka nyegiire aha bakuru, Mbe nibo naagamba nabo; Ahabw'okuba bo nibamanya omuhanda gwa MUKAMA N'ebiragiro bya Ruhanga waabo. Kwonka naashanga nabo boona baahenzire omugamba, Baacwire ebyabaire bibakomire." 
Jeremiah5:6 Nikyo entare erikuruga omu kibira eribaitira, N'omushega gurikuruga omu ihamba gukabacwekyereza; Knadi engwe eryagwera aha ndembo zaabo, Buri muntu orizirugamu aryataagataagurwa, Ahabw'okuba ebicumuro byabo ni bingi, N'okugaruka enyima kwabo kukanyire." 
Jeremiah5:7 Nimbaasa nta kukusaasira? Abaana baawe banyimwire, Baarahira abo abatari baaruhanga. Ku naabagaburiire, naabahaazya, Baashambana, baayerunda aha maju ga baamaraaya." 
Jeremiah5:8 Bakaba nibashusha enimi y'embaraasi eriisibwe gye, erikushiija, Buri muntu naashiija muka mutaahi we." 
Jeremiah5:9 Nimugira ngu tindibafubira ahabw'ebyo? Tindihoora enzigu eihanga nk'eri? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah5:10 Mwinamukye, murabe omu mishorongo y'emizaabibu yaayo, Mugicwekyereze; Kwonka mutagimariraho kimwe. Mugikonkoboreho amataagi, Ahabw'okuba ti ga MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah5:11 Ahakuba enju ya Israeli n'eya Yuda Zindeebeize kimwe; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah5:12 Babeihereire MUKAMA, Nibagira bati: Taine ki arikora; Tihariho kabi koona akarituhikaho; Tituriitwa rurara, n'obu kwakuba okuteerwa enjara." 
Jeremiah5:13 Baanabi abo baryahinduka omuyaga, Ahabw'okuba ekigambo ky'amazima tikibarimu. Okwo nikwo barikorwa." 
Jeremiah5:14 Nikyo MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Ahabw'okugamba ekyo kigambo, Reeba, naaza kuhindura ebigambo byangye eby'omu kanwa kaawe omuriro, N'abo bantu mbahindure enku, omuriro gubamareho." 
Jeremiah5:15 Iwe nju ya Israeli 'we, reeba, Niinyija kukuteeza eihanga erya ira, Eihanga eri otarikumanya rurimi rwaryo, N'obu kwakuba okwetegyereza eki barikugamba." 
Jeremiah5:16 Omutana gwabo ni nk'ekituuro kyashami, Boona n'amamanzi." 
Jeremiah5:17 Baryarya emyaka yaaawe n'eby'okurya byawe, Barye batabani baawe na bahara baawe, Barye amasyo gaawe g'entaama n'ag'ente, Barye emizaabibu yaawe n'emitiini yaawe, Kandi endembo zaanyu ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, Ezi murikwesiga, Baryazicwekyereza na rurara." 
Jeremiah5:18 Kandi hoona n'omu biro ebyo tindibamariraho kimwe, nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah5:19 Abantu baawe ku barigira bati: Ahabw'enki MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu atukozireho ebyo byona? Oryabagira oti: Nk'oku mwanyimwire, mukaheereza baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga muri omu nsi yaanyu, nikwo muriheereza abanyamahanga muri omu nsi etari yaanyu." 
Jeremiah5:20 Mukigambe omu nju ya Yakobo, Mukirangye omuri Yuda, nimugira muti:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Muhurire eki, imwe abashema, kandi abataine bwengye, Abaine amaisho, kwonka batarikureeba, Abaine amatu, kwonka batarikuhurira;" 
Jeremiah5:22 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Timurikutiina? Timurikutetemera omu maisho gangye? Nkataho omusheenyi kuba omwatano gw'enyanja, Omucungiro gw'ebiro byona, ogu etarikubaasa kurengyeraho; Ebingozi n'obu byakwecunda bita, tibikaabaasa; Kandi n'obu byakuhoorera bita, tibikaagurengyeraho." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kwonka eri ihanga riine omutima gugangaire, Bagomire, baayegyendera." 
Jeremiah5:24 Tibarikugira mu mitima yaabo bati: Ka tutiine MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, Otuha enjura omu bunaku bwayo, Enjura y'ebiba n'eya katumba, Akaturindira saabiiti ezateereirweho amagyesha." 
Jeremiah5:25 Eby'okushiisha byanyu nibyo biihireho ebyo byona, Kandi ebibi byanyu bibazibiire kutunga ebirungi;" 
Jeremiah5:26 Ahabw'okuba abantu babi nibashangwa omu bantu bangye, Nibagwera nk'abategi b'enyonyi, Batega emitego, bakwata abantu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Amaju gaabo gaijwire obugobya, Nk'ekitukuru kiijwire enyonyi; N'ahabw'ekyo bahindukire bakuru n'abatungi," 
Jeremiah5:28 Bagomokire, baasiigiriza; Omu kukora kubi tibaine bugarukiro; Emanja z'efuuzi tibazicwa mu bwinganisa, Ngu ezo fuuzi zibe gye, Kandi tibatonganira bakyene." 
Jeremiah5:29 Nimugira ngu tindibafubira ahabw'ebyo? Tindihoora enzigu eihanga nk'eri? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah5:30 Ekintu ky'eihano kandi ekirikutiinisa munonga Kigwire omu nsi egi," 
Jeremiah5:31 Baanabi nibahanuura ebishuba, Abanyamurwa nibategyeka nibagyendera aha bya baanabi abo; Kandi abantu bangye nibasiima ku biba bityo. Mbwenu muheru ku erihika, muryagira muta?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Imwe bantu ba Benyamiini 'mwe, nimuhungye, Murugye omuri Yerusaalemu, musherure obukiriro! Muteere enzamba omuri Tekoa, Mwimutsye orurango ahari Besi-hakeremu; Ahabw'okuba akabi kaareetana nikareetwa aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, N'okucwekyerera kuhango." 
Jeremiah6:2 Saayuuni omurungi kandi owaayoroirwe gye, Naaza kumucwekyereza." 
Jeremiah6:3 Abariisa nibaija kumurwanisa baine amasyo gaabo, Bateere amahema gaabo, bamwehinguririze, Buri omwe ariise ahakwe." 
Jeremiah6:4 Mweteekateekye kuza kumurwanisa, Mwimukye mumuteere omu ihangwe. Mbwenu ho twahitsya! ahabw'okuba bwaza kwira; Ebicuucu by'omu mwabazyo nibigyenda nibiba biraingwa." 
Jeremiah6:5 Mwimukye, tumuteere nyekiro, Tucwekyereze ebikaari bye." 
Jeremiah6:6 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Muhonde ebiti bya Yerusaalemu, Mugirundeho eby'okutemberaho. Oru nirwo rurembo orushemereire kufubirwa, Orutarimu kindi kureka okuhatana." 
Jeremiah6:7 Nk'oku enshuro eguma neereeta amaizi gaayo, Narwo nikwo ruguma nirureeta obubi bwarwo; Obubisha n'okucwekyereza nibiruhurirwamu; Obutoosha nindeeba endwara n'okuhutaazana." 
Jeremiah6:8 Iwe Yerusaalemu, ikiriza okuhaburwa, Ntakaataanira kimwe naiwe, Nkakugira amatongo, n'ensi etatuurwamu." 
Jeremiah6:9 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Humbira kimwe Abaisraeli abatsigaireho, Nk'oku bahumba omuzaabibu; Garuka omu mataagi gaagwo, ohumbe n'engaro zaawe, Nk'oku omucwi w'ebijuma by'emizaabibu agira." 
Jeremiah6:10 Mbenu n'oha ou naakugambira nkahana, Bakahurira? Reeba, amatu gaabo gaigaire, Tibarikubaasa kuhurira; Reeba, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kibahindukiire ekirikugaywa, Tibarikukishemerererwa." 
Jeremiah6:11 Nikyo nyijuriire ekiniga kya MUKAMA, Nkaremwa kugumisiriza. Kishukye aha baana abaari omu muhanda, N'omu nteerane z'abatsigazi, Ahabw'okuba omushaija n'omukazi we bombi baryatwarwa, Abagurusi n'empwitsi nabo batwarwe." 
Jeremiah6:12 Amaju gaabo garyaba ag'abandi, N'emisiri yaabo hamwe n'abakazi baabo; Ahabw'okuba ndyabangira abatwire omu nsi omukono; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah6:13 Okuruga aha muto okuhika aha mukuru omuribo, Buri muntu aine omururu gw'amagoba gatahikire. Okuruga ahari nabi okuhika aha munyamurwa, Buri muntu naakora eby'obugobya." 
Jeremiah6:14 Obuhuta bw'abantu bangye babutambire eruguru, Nibagira bati: N'obusingye! N'obusingye! Haza obusingye butariho." 
Jeremiah6:15 Beitu ku baaherize kukora ebihagaro, baagira enshoni? Ngaaha! Tibarazigizire na kakye, N'obu kwakuba okubwerabwera. N'ahabw'ekyo baryagwa omuri abo abagwa; Omu bunaku obu ndibafubiriramu, Baryakumbagazibwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah6:16 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Mwemerere aha mihanda, mureebe, Mubuuririze otuhanda otwa ira, Ahu omuhanda murungi guri, mube nigwo mwatoora. Nimwo muribonera emitima yaanyu oburuhuukiro. Kwonka baagira bati: Titurikwija kuguritaho." 
Jeremiah6:17 Kandi nkataho ab'okubarinda ningira nti: Mute omutima aha iraka ry'enzamba; Kwonka baagira bati: Titurikwija kuguritaho. 
Jeremiah6:18 N'ahabw'ekyo, iwe iguru 'we, hurira; Omanye ekiribabaho;" 
Jeremiah6:19 Naiwe nsi 'we, hurira. Reeba, niinyija kureeta akabi ahari abo bantu, Nibyo byana ebirikuruga omu naama zaabo, Ahabw'okuba tibarataire mutima ha bigambo byangye, N'ebiragiro byangye bakabyanga." 
Jeremiah6:20 Ahabw'enki nibandeetera obubaane oburikuruga Sheeba, N'emigaju erikuruga omu nsi ya hare? Ebitambo byanyu ebyokize tibirikwikirizibwa, N'empongano zaanyu tizirikunshemeza." 
Jeremiah6:21 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Reeba, ndyata enkongi omu maisho g'abo bantu, Ezi abaana na baishebo bariteeraho entsibo, Bataahi baabo na bagyenzi baabo bakahwerekyerera." 
Jeremiah6:22 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, eihanga niriija niriruga omu nsi ey'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, Eihanga rikuru niriimuka kuruga ha muheru gw'ensi," 
Jeremiah6:23 Rikwaitse amata n'amacumu; N'abantu enshaarizi abataine saasi, Endigito yaabo ni nk'enyanja erikuhoorera, Nibagyendera aha mbaraasi, Batengire orugamba nk'abarikurwana, Kukurwansia iwe Saayuuni." 
Jeremiah6:24 Ku tuhuriire enkuru yaabyo, Emikono yaatentebuka, Twagira obusaasi bwingi Nk'obw'omukazi orikurumwa kuzaara." 
Jeremiah6:25 Otashohora aheeru kuza omu ishwa, N'obu kwakuba okuraba omu muhanda; Ahabw'okuba omuzigu aine rurara, N'okutiinisa kuri embaju zoona." 
Jeremiah6:26 Iwe ihanga ry'abantu bangye 'we, yezirikye ebiguniya, Oyekuringye omu iju; Ocure nk'ofiisize omwana omwe nyamunegyere, otonzye n'obusaasi bwingi, Ahabw'okuba omuhwerekyerezi aryatuteera kitaraariire." 
Jeremiah6:27 Nkuhindwire orikugyeza abantu bangye, Ngu omanye emitwarize yaabo, ogicondooze." 
Jeremiah6:28 Boona n'abagomi kandi enteegi, Nibagyenda nibabiherera abandi; Bagumire nk'omuringa nari nk'ekyoma; Boona nibakora ebitahikire." 
Jeremiah6:29 Emijuba yaabo neejugutirirwa n'amaani, Risasi ehwereziibwe omuriro, Nibeeruhiza busha kugumizamu nibashemeza, Ahabw'okuba ababi tibarikwihwamu." 
Jeremiah6:30 Abantu nibabeeta efeeza y'enkamba, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA abangire." 
Jeremiah7:1 Ekigambo kikaija ahari Yeremia nikiruga ahari MUKAMA; kyagira kiti: 
Jeremiah7:2 Yemerera omu irembo ry'enju ya MUKAMA, orangireyo ekigambo eki, noogira oti: Nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA, imwe mwena Abayuda abarikuraba omuri aga marembo nimuza kuramya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah7:3 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Mushemeze emitwarize yaanyu n'ebi murikukora, mbone kubaiikiriza kutuura omuri ogu mwanya." 
Jeremiah7:4 Murekye kwesiga ebigambo ebi ebirikuhabisa nimugira muti: Hekalu ya MUKAMA, hekalu ya MUKAMA, hekalu ya MUKAMA niyo egi!" 
Jeremiah7:5 Mumanye ngu, ku muraashemereze kimwe emitwarize yaanyu n'ebi murikukoa, mwakorerana eby'oburyo omu mzima," 
Jeremiah7:6 mwareka kwita kubi omunyaihanga, efuuzi n'omufaakazi, n'okusheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja omuri ogu mwanya, mwareka n'okukuratira baaruhanga abandi kwereetaho akabi," 
Jeremiah7:7 obwo ndyabaikiriza kutuura omuri ogu mwanya, omu nsi ei naahaire baashwenkuriimwe ira kuba eyaabo ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah7:8 Reeba, nimweruhiza busha kwesiga ebigambo ebirikuhabisa." 
Jeremiah7:9 Nimwija kwiba, kwita, kushambana, kurahira ebishuba, kwoterera Baali obubaane, n'okukuratira baaruhanga abandi abu mutakamanyaga," 
Jeremiah7:10 haza mwije muunyemerere omumaisho omuri egi nju erikwetererwa eiziina ryangye, mugire muti: Tujunirwe! haza kuri okugumizamu nimukora ebyo bihagaro byona?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Egi nju erikwetererwa eiziina ryangye ebahindukiire enyanga y'abambuzi? Reeba, nyowe ahabwangye nikireebire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah7:12 Nimwirooko muze omu mwanya gwangye ogwabaire guri Shiilo, ei naabandize kutuuza eiziina ryangye, mureebe oku naagugizire ningitura obubi bw'abantu bangye Israeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Mbwenu, ahabw'okukora ebyo byona, mukanga kuhurira n'obu ndaabe naagumiizemu nimbagambira, kandi nkibeeta mutaanyetabe," 
Jeremiah7:14 nikyo ndigirira kubi enju erikwetererwa eiziina ryangye ei murikwesiga, n'omwanya ogu naabahaire na baashwenkuriimwe, nk'oku naagizire Shiilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Kandi ndyabacwa mundugye omumaisho, nk'oku naacwire beene waanyu boona oruzaaro rwona orwa Efuraimu; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah7:16 N'ahabw'ekyo otashabira aba bantu, n'obu kwakuba okwimutsya eiraka kubeeshengyerereza; kandi otanyeshengyereza, ahabw'okuba tindikwija kukuhurira." 
Jeremiah7:17 Yorikureeba ebi barikukora omu ndembo za Yuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu? 
Jeremiah7:18 Abaana ni batorotoora enku, baishebo nibahemba omuriro, abakazi nibabumbabumba eisyanga, kuteekyera omugabekazi w'eiguru otukeeki, kandi bashukira baaruhanga abandi empongano z'eby'okunywa kuunyitsa ekiniga." 
Jeremiah7:19 Nimugira ngu niinye barikwitsa ekiniga? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira; tibo barikukyeitsa, bakeereetera okubwerabwera?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Reeba, okuguubwa kubi kwangye n'ekiniga kyangye biryashukwa aha mwanya ogu, aha bantu n'ematungo, aha biti by'omu ishwa n'aha myaka y'omu midiri, kyakye, kireme kuraaza." 
Jeremiah7:21 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamb anaagira ati: Mwongyere ebitambo byanyu eby'okwotsya aha bindi bitambo;" 
Jeremiah7:22 ahabw'okuba aha izooba eri naihiireho baashwenkuriimwe omu nsi ya Misri, tindabagambiire, kandi tindabaragiire by'ebitambo by'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo;" 
Jeremiah7:23 kuraka eki nikyo kiragiro ki naabahaire, ningira nti: Mworobere eiraka ryangye, naanye ndyaba Ruhanga waanyu, naimwe mube abantu bangye, kandi mugyendere omu mitwarize yoona ei ndikubaragiira, mubone kuba gye." 
Jeremiah7:24 Kwonka baayanga kworoba, n'obu kwakuba okutega amatu, kureka baaguma nibagyendera omu naama zaabo n'omu buteegi bw'emitima yaabo emibi; omu mwanya gw'okugyenda omumaisho, baagaruka enyima." 
Jeremiah7:25 Okwiha aha izooba eri baashwenkuriimwe baarugiireho omu nsi ya Misri n'okuhitsya eri izooba nkaguma nimbooherereza abairu bangye boona baanabi ntarikwosha; 
Jeremiah7:26 kwonka hoona tibaraanyorobeire n'obu kwakuba okutega amatu, kureka bakagangaaza ebitsya, baakora kubi okukira baishenkurubo." 
Jeremiah7:27 Mbwenu obagambire ebigambo ebyo byona, kwonka tibarikwija kukuhurira; noija kubeeta, kwonak tibarikwija kukwetaba;" 
Jeremiah7:28 kandi obagire oti: Eri n'eihanga eritaroorobeire iraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waaryo, rikanga kutegyekwa; amazima gahwerekyereire, tigakiri mu kanwa kaabo." 
Jeremiah7:29 Shara eishokye ryawe, orinagye hare, Ocurire aha bibungo by'emparamaata; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ayangire abantu Abu ainiire ekiniga, yabatsigaho." 
Jeremiah7:30 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Aba Yuda bakozire kubi nimbareeba, baata ebihagaro byabo omu nju erikwetererwa eiziina ryangye kugihagara." 
Jeremiah7:31 Kandi bombekyeire Tofeti omwanya mukuru gw'okuramizamu omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinoomu, kurabya abaana baabo b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki omu muriro, eki ntarabaragiire, kandi ekitakaijaga mu biteekateeko byangye." 
Jeremiah7:32 N'ahabw'ekyo mumanye ngu ebiro biryaija, obu ogwo mwanya gutarigaruka kwetwa ogwa Tofeti nari oruhanga rwa mwene Hinoomu, kureka guryayetwa oruhanga rw'eriitiro; ahabw'okuba omuri Tofeti nimwo bariziika ahabw'okubura ahandi hoona." 
Jeremiah7:33 Emitumbi y'aba bantu eryariibwa amahungu g'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu nsi, habure ow'okubikanga." 
Jeremiah7:34 Kandi ndyahamya eiraka ry'okushemererwa n'ery'okwesiima, n'eiraka rya kishwera na kishwerwa ngamare omu ndembo za Yuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu, ahabw'okuba ensi eryaba amatongo." 
Jeremiah8:1 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Omu biro ebyo amagufa g'abagabe ba Yuda, ag'abanyiginya baayo, ag'abanyamurwa, aga baanabi, n'ag'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, garyaihwa omu bituuro byabo," 
Jeremiah8:2 bagaanikye omu maisho g'eizooba, omu maisho g'okwezi n'omu maisho g'eihe ryona ery'omu iguru, ebi baabaire bakunda bakabiheereza, bakabikuratira, bakabidherura kubiramya; tigarishanguruzibwa n'obu kwakuba okuziikwa, kureka garyaba nk'amasha aha itaka" 
Jeremiah8:3 Abaritsigaraho omuri orwo ruganda rubi, ei ndiba mbataataanisiize yoona, okufa kuryabakirira okugumaho; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Jeremiah8:4 Kandi oryabagira oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Beitu abantu ku bagwa, tibaimuka? Omuntu ku ahaba, tahabuuka?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Mbwenu shi, ahabw'enki aba bantu bagarukire enyima, Bakagumizamu? Bahamiire omu bugobya, Baayanga kugaruka." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ntaireho omutima kutega okutu, Naahurira nibagamba ebitahikire; Tihariho n'omwe orikweteisa ebibi bye, Akagira ati: Mbwenu eki naakora ki? Brui muntu naatoora omuhanda gwe, Nk'oku embaraasi eturumbuza neeza aha rugamba." 
Jeremiah8:7 Buzimazima enkongoro ez'omu mwanya Zimanya obunaku bwazo; Enkombe, entaratambi n'entuuha Bimanya obunaku bwabyo bw'okwiziramu; Beitu abantu bangye bo tibarikumanya Ekiragiro kya MUKAMA?" 
Jeremiah8:8 Nimubaasa muta kugira muti; Turi abanyabwengye, Kandi ebiragiro bya MUKAMA niitwe tubiine? Haza kunu ekaraamu y'abahandiiki embeihi Ebihindwire eby'ebishuba." 
Jeremiah8:9 Abanyabwengye baryahemurwa, Bahahaaze emitima, bakwatwe. Reeba, beehakaine ekigambo kya MUKAMA; Mbwenu ni bwengye ki obu baine?" 
Jeremiah8:10 N'ahabw'ekyo abakazi baabo ndyabaha abandi bashaija, N'emisiri yaabo ngihe abaribasingura, Ahabw'okuba okuruga aha muto okuhika aha mukuru Boona baine omururu gw'amagoba gatahikire; Okuruga ahari nabi okuhika aha munyamurwa Boona nibakora eby'obugobya." 
Jeremiah8:11 Obuhuta bw'abantu bangye babutambire aharuguru, Nibagira bati: N'obusingye! N'obusingye! Haza obusingye butariho." 
Jeremiah8:12 Beitu, ku baaherize kukora ebihagaro, bakagira enshoni? Ngaaha! Tibarazigizire na kakye, N'obu kwakuba okubwerabwera; N'ahabw'ekyo baryagwa omuri abo abagwa; Omu bunaku obu ndibafubiririramu, Baryakumbagazibwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah8:13 Ndyabamariraho kimwe, Ebijuma tibiriboneka ha mizaabibu nari aha mitiini, Kandi n'amababi gaayo garyahotoka, N'ebi naabahaire biryabaihwaho." 
Jeremiah8:14 Mbwenu nitugumibwa ki aha? Muteerane, tutaahe omu ndembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, Tube niyo twacwekyererera; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu atucwereire orubanja rw'okucwekyerera, Yaatuha amaizi agarikwita kuganywa, Ahabw'okuba tucumwire ahari MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah8:15 Tutegyereize obusingye, kwonka titwine karungi aku tureebire; Tutegyereize obunaku bw'okutambirirwamu, Mbwenu reeba, haija ebirikutiinisa." 
Jeremiah8:16 Okufuureeka okububura kw'embaraasi zaabo nikuhuririrwa omuri Daani; Eiraka ry'okububura kw'enimi zaazo Nirireetera ensi yoona kutengyeta, Ahabw'okuba baizire, baamaraho ensi, N'ebigirimu byona, orurembo n'abarutwiremu." 
Jeremiah8:17 Reeba, naaza kubooherereza enjoka N'empiri ezitarikubaasa kurogwa, Zibarume; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah8:18 Obusaasi bwangye burengyesereize, tiburikubaasa kutambwa; Omutima gwangye gugwire enshazi." 
Jeremiah8:19 Muhurire eiraka ry'eihanga ry'abantu bangye, Eririkureetwa oku n'oku omu nsi yoona, nibagira bati: MUKAMA tari omuri Saayuuni? Omugabe waayo timwo ari? Ahabw'enki bangwisize kubi n'ebishushani byabo ebibaizire, N'ebirikuramibwa eby'enduga-mahanga?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Eigyesha rihweire, n'ekyanda kyahwa, Kandi titukajunirwe." 
Jeremiah8:21 Omutima gwangye nigusaasibwa obuhuta bw'abantu bangye, Ndi omu rufu, nshobeirwe." 
Jeremiah8:22 Omuri Gileadi tihakibamu omubazi gw'okwomoora? Tihaakibayo omufumu? Ahabw'enki abantu bangye batakakizire? 
Jeremiah9:1 Nkaabaasibwa ki, omutwe gwangye gwijura amaizi, N'amaisho gangye gaba enshuro y'amarira, Ncura nyomushana na nyekiro Ahabw'abantu bangye abaitsirwe!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Nkaabaasibwa ki, ngira eicumbi ry'abagyenzi omu ihamba, Mbona kutsigaho abantu bangye, nza hare yaabo! Ahabw'okuba boona n'enshambani N'omutwe gw'abantu endeebya." 
Jeremiah9:3 Bananuura orurimi rwabo nk'obuta, rurekura ebishuba; Bahinduka ab'amaani omu nsi, kwonka kutarikurwanira mazima; Kureka ku baheza kukora ekibi, bagaruka bakora ekindi, Kandi tibarikummanya; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah9:4 Buri muntu agume ayerinde mutaahi we, Arekye kugira mwene ishe weena ou yaayesiga; Ahabw'okuba buri w'eishe-emwe n'engobya, Na buri mutaahi naagyenda naabeiherera abandi." 
Jeremiah9:5 Buri muntu naagobeza mutaahi we, Tihaine orikugamba amazima; Beegyeise endimi zaabo kubeiha, Kandi nibakora ebibi, babura agabyeteisa." 
Jeremiah9:6 Nibatungika okuhata aha kundi n'obugobya aha bundi, Banga kummanya; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah9:7 Nikyo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Reeba, ndyabashemeza, mbagyeze. Mbwenu ekindi eki naakukorera abantu bangye niki?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Orurimi rwabo n'omwambi ogurikugwisaho, Nirugamba eby'obugobya; Buri muntu naagamba gye na mugyenzi we aha rurimi, Kwonka omu mutima gwe ari omu naama y'okumugiira omu kyetindo." 
Jeremiah9:9 Nimugira ngu tindibafubira ahabw'ekyo? Tindihoora enzigu eihanga nk'eri? Nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah9:10 Nimucure, muboroogyere ebibungo. Mutongyeze amariisizo g'omu ihamba, Ahabw'okuba bihindukire amarungu, Tihaine orikubirabamu, Kandi n'okujuga kw'ente tikurikuhurirwayo. Enyonyi z'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa Bihungire, byagyenda." 
Jeremiah9:11 Ndyahindura Yerusaalemu emituumo y'ebisheenyukire, N'eikoobaniro rya zaamuha; N'endembo za Yuda nzigire amatongo, Zibure ow'okuzituuramu." 
Jeremiah9:12 Ni muntu ki oine obwengye bwingi orikubaasa kumanya ebyo? N'oha oyegambiriirwe MUKAMA, ngu abone kubimanyisa? Ahabw'enki ensi ehwerekyereziibwe, ekahinduka amatongo, ekaba nk'eihamba, ekabura owaagirabamu?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Ahabw'okureka ebiragiro byangye ebi naabahaire, batoorobere iraka ryangye, nari okutwaza nk'oku ririkubaragiira," 
Jeremiah9:14 kureka bakakuratira ebi emitima yaabo egangaire erikwenda, hamwe na Baabaali, nk'oku baishenkurubo baabeegyeise." 
Jeremiah9:15 Nikyo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugirira ati: Reeba, eri ihanga ndyarigaburira apusinto, ndinywaise amaizi agarikwita;" 
Jeremiah9:16 ndyabataataanisiza omu mahanga agu bo na baishenkurubo batakamanyaga, mbakuratse rurara, okuhitsya obu ndibamaraho." 
Jeremiah9:17 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Muteekateekye, mwete abakazi abarikumanya kucura, Mutume aha bakazi abahangu, baije;" 
Jeremiah9:18 Barahukye, batucurire, Amarira gatufukunkukye omumaisho, n'ebitsigye byaitu bihimintikye amaizi;" 
Jeremiah9:19 Ahabw'okuba eiraka ry'okuborooga nirihurirwa nirireetwa Saayuuni, Nirigira riti: Eshi tucwekyereziibwe! Tuhemuriirwe kimwe, Ahabw'okuba tutsigireho ensi, Amaka gaitu baagasheenya." 
Jeremiah9:20 Imwe bakazi 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA, Kandi amatu gaanyu gaakiire ekigambo ekirikuruga omu kanwa ke; Mwegyese bahara baanyu okucura, Kandi buri muntu ayegyese mutaahi we okutonzya;" 
Jeremiah9:21 Ahabw'okuba rufu etembire omu madirisa gaitu, Yaataaha omu bikaari byaitu, Yaamara abaana omu nguuto, N'abatsigazi omu nteeraniro z'emihanda." 
Jeremiah9:22 Gira oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Emitumbi y'abantu eryagwa omu ishwa nk'amasha, Nk'enganda zitsigaire enyima y'omugyesi Ezitaine kishanguruza." 
Jeremiah9:23 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Omunyabwengye arekye kwehimbisa ahabw'obwengye bwe, n'ow'amaani arekye kwehimbisa ahabw'amaani ge, n'omutungi arekye kwehimbisa ahabw'eitungo rye;" 
Jeremiah9:24 kureka orikwehimbisa ayehimbise ahabw'ebi, ahabw'okuunyetegyereza n'ahabw'okummanya, ku ndi MUKAMA okora omu nsi eby'embabazi, eby'oburyo n'eby'okuhikiirira; ahabw'okuba ebyo nibyo nshemerererwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah9:25 Reeba ebiro nibiija obu ndifubira abashazirwe boona, haza kunu batashazirwe mu mazima-" 
Jeremiah9:26 Misri, Yuda, Edomu, beene Amoni, Moabu n'abatwire omu ihamba boona, abatega ebyeyera; ahabw'okuba amahanga ago goona tigashazirwe; kandi n'enju ya Israeli teshazirwe mu mutima." 
Jeremiah10:1 Imwe b'enju ya Israeli 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo eki MUKAMA arikubagambira." 
Jeremiah10:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Mutaritooreza emicwe y'abanyamahanga, Nari okuhahaaza emitima ahabw'obumanyiso bw'omu iguru, Ahabw'okuba amahanga gabuhahaariize emitima." 
Jeremiah10:3 Mumanye ngu emigyenzo y'amahanga ni busha, Ahakuba abantu batema ekiti omu kibira, Omunyamwoga akibaija n'embaijo," 
Jeremiah10:4 Abantu bakihunda efeeza n'ezaabu, Bakihamisa emisumaari n'enyondo, Ngu kitajegajega." 
Jeremiah10:5 Ebishushani byabo ni nk'eby'okurindisa enyonyi Omu musiri gw'ekihambo; Tibigamba, biba eby'okuheekwa, Ahabw'okuba tibibaasa kugyenda. Mutaribitiina, ahakuba tibiine ki birikubaasa kukora, Yaaba kibi, yaaba kirungi." 
Jeremiah10:6 Ai MUKAMA, tihariho orikushushana naiwe; Ori mukuru, n'eiziina ryawe ni rikuru kandi ery'amaani." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ai MUKAMA ow'amahanga, n'oha otakaaakutiina? Manya ekyo nikyo oshemereire, Ahabw'okuba omu banyabwengye boona ab'omu mahanga, N'mu nsi z'abagabe baago zoona, Tihaine orikushushana naiwe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Boona oku baingana ni nk'enyamaishwa, kandi ebifeera; Ebi ebishushani byegyesa n'ebiti nkabyo." 
Jeremiah10:9 Bareeta ebibaati by'efeeza ebi baihire Tarushiishi, N'ezaabu eya Ufaazi. Ebyo bishushani n'omurimo gw'abanyamyoga n'abaheesi b'ezaabu; Ebijwaro byabo n'ebya bururu na bujwa; Byona bikorwa abahangu." 
Jeremiah10:10 Kwonka MUKAMA niwe Ruhanga Nyamuhanga, Ruhanga ohuriire, kandi Omukama otahwaho. Ku agira ekiniga, ensi etengyeta, Kandi amahanga tigarikubaasa kwemera kuguubwa kubi kwe." 
Jeremiah10:11 Oku nikwo muribagambira muti: Baaruhanga abatarahangire eiguru n'ensi baryahwerekyerera, bahwe omu nsi n'ahansi y'eiguru." 
Jeremiah10:12 Niwe yaahangire enis n'obushoboorozi bwe, Akagihamya n'obwengye bwe, N'okwetegyereza kwe nikwo yaabambiise eiguru." 
Jeremiah10:13 Ku agamba n'eiraka rye, omu iguru habamu okuhoorera kw'amaizi; Ainamura oruho okuruga aha mperu z'ensi, Ataho emirabyo kugwisa enjura, Kandi areeta omuyaga naagwiha omu mabiikiro ge." 
Jeremiah10:14 Buri muntu ni nk'enyamaishwa, taine bwengye; Buri muheesi w'ezaabu ahemwirwe ebishushani bye ebirikuramibwa, Ahabw'okuba ebishushani bye n'eby'ebishuba, Kandi tibiine mwityso." 
Jeremiah10:15 Tibiine mugasho; n'omurimo gw'okubeihabeiha; Omu biro by'okufubirwa kwabyo biryahwerekyerera. 
Jeremiah10:16 Kwonka Otuura ari omugabo gwa Yakobo ti nkabyo, Ahabw'okuba niwe yaahangire ebintu byona, Kandi Israeli n'oruganda rw'obuhunguzi bwe; MUKAMA ow'amahe niryo iziina rye." 
Jeremiah10:17 Iwe otuura omu rurembo rugotsirwe, Iha ebintu byawe ahansi;" 
Jeremiah10:18 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA naagira ati: Reeba, naaza kunaga hare abatuuzi b'omuri egi nsi, Nk'orikurekyera enjungu; Mbareetere obusaasi, babuhurire." 
Jeremiah10:19 Ai bambe, obusaasi bwanyita! Obuhuta bwangye nibumpurura. Kwonka naagira nti: Buzimazima oku n'okubonabona, Nshemereire kukwemera." 
Jeremiah10:20 Eihema ryangye ricwekyereziibwe, Emirunga yangye yoona ecwekire; Abaana bangye bantsigireho, tibakiriho. Tihariho w'okugaruka kunteerera eihema n'okumpanikira emikingo." 
Jeremiah10:21 Ahabw'okuba abariisa bahindukire nk'enyamaishwa, tibarikwehanuuza ahari MUKAMA; Nikyo kibazibiire kuba gye, N'obusyo bwona butaataine." 
Jeremiah10:22 Nimuhurire enkuru! Reeba neija; Hariho okujagarara kwingi okurikuruga omu nsi y'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, okurihindura endembo za Yuda amatongo, N'eikoobaniro rya zaamuha." 
Jeremiah10:23 Ai MUKAMA, nimmanya ngu omuhanda gw'omuntu tiguba mu bushoboorozi bwe, Kandi omuntu weena ogyenda tabaasa kwehabura mu rugyendo rwe ahu yaahika hoona." 
Jeremiah10:24 Ai MUKAMA, ompane, kwonka ompane nombarira, Otampanisa ekiniga, okancwekyereza." 
Jeremiah10:25 Shuka ekiniga kyawe aha mahanga agatarikukumanya, Aha nganda ezitatakira iziina ryawe; Ahabw'okuba bashonshomeire Yakobo; Bamushonshomeire, baamumaraho, N'ahu atwire baahahindura amatongo." 
Jeremiah11:1 Ekigambo kikaruga ahari MUKAMA, kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah11:2 Hurira ebigambo byendagaano egi, ogambire Abayuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu oti:" 
Jeremiah11:3 Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Omuntu otarikuta mutima ha bigambo by'endagaano egi, akyeenwe;" 
Jeremiah11:4 niyo ndagaano ei naaragiire baashwenkuriimwe, obu naabaiha omu nsi ya Misri, omu iziiko ry'ekyoma, ningira nti: Mugume muhurire eiraka ryangye, mukore ebi ndikubaragiira byona. Obwo nibwo muriba abantu bangye, naanye nkaba Ruhanga waanyu," 
Jeremiah11:5 mukabona kuhikiiriza endahiro ei naarahiire baashwenkuriimwe kubaha ensi y'amate n'obwoki, nk'oku kiri hati. Ntyo naamugarukamu nti: MUKAMA, kibe nikwo kyaba." 
Jeremiah11:6 Kandi MUKAMA yangira ati: Ebigambo ebi byona obirangye omu ndembo za Yuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu, noogira oti: Muhurie ebigambo by'egi ndagaano, mubihikiirize;" 
Jeremiah11:7 ahabw'okuba, obu naiha baashwenkuriimwe omu nsi ya Misri, nkabeehanangiriza munonga, naaguma nimbateisa obutoosha n'okuhitsya hati, nti: Muhurire eiraka ryangye." 
Jeremiah11:8 Kwonka tibaanyorobera n'obu kwakuba okutega amatu, kureka buri muntu yaakuratira obugangaazi bw'omutima gwe omubi. Nikyo naabareeteireho ebigambo byona eby'egi ndagaano, ebi naabaragiire kukora, kwonka batabikore." 
Jeremiah11:9 MUKAMA yaagaruka yangira ati: Omu bashaija ba Yuda n'omu batuuzi ba Yerusaalemu hareebekiremu obugomi. 
Jeremiah11:10 Bagarukire enyima omu by'okushiisha bya baishenkurubo abaayangire kuhurira ebigambo byangye; mbwenu bakuratiire baaruhanga abandi kubaheereza; enju ya Israeli n'eya Yuda baitsire endagaano yangye, ei naaragaine na baishenkurubo." 
Jeremiah11:11 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Reeba, naaza kubareetaho akabi, aku batarikubaasa kukira; n'obu barintakira, tindibahurira." 
Jeremiah11:12 Obwo ab'omu ndembo za Yuda n'abatwire omuri Yerusaalemu baryaza kutakira baaruhanga abu booterera obubaane; kwonka tibaribaasa kubajuna mu biro by'obusaasi bwabo. 
Jeremiah11:13 Ahabw'okuba iwe Yuda, nk'oku endembo zaawe zirikwingana, na baaruhanga baawe nikwo bari; kandi nk'oku enguuto za Yerusaalemu zirikwingana, nikwo n'amatambiro gaanyu gari, agu mwayombekyeire ekirikwitsa enshoni, nigo g'okwotereraho Baali obubaane." 
Jeremiah11:14 N'ahabw'ekyo otashabira aba bantu, n'obu kwakuba okwimutsya eiraka kubeeshengyerereza; ahabw'okuba ku barintakira omu biro by'obusaasi bwabo, tindibahurira." 
Jeremiah11:15 Nkunzi yangye naakireetwa ki omu nju yangye, yaakozire n'abaingi ebihagaro? Noogira ngu eby'okuragaanisa noorahira n'enyama z'ebitambo nibibaasa kwihaho ekifubiro kyawe? Mbwenu noobaasa kwehimbisa, haza okozire ekibi?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Ira MUKAMA akaba akwetsire omuzeituuni murungi oguyumbize, kandi ogwine ebijuma birungi, mwenu ahabw'okuhoorera kw'omuyaga mwingi aryagwotsya, amataagi gaagwo gasiriire." 
Jeremiah11:17 MUKAMA ow'amahe owaakubyaire, akucwereire orubanja rw'okuhikwaho akabi, naakutura ebibi ebi enju ya Israeli n'eya Yuda baakozire, bakangwisa kubi ahabw'okwoterera Baali obubaane." 
Jeremiah11:18 MUKAMA akakimmanyisa, naakimanya; Bwanyima waanyoreka ebibi byabo, ebi barikukora." 
Jeremiah11:19 Kwonka nkaba ndi nk'omwana gw'entaama omucureezi Ogurikutwarwa kwitwa. Tindamanyire ku niinye barikurwanisa, Nibangiira omu naama, nibagira bati: Ka tucwekyereze omuti n'ebijuma byagwo, Ka tumumareho omu nsi y'abahuriire, Eiziina rye ritariijukwa obundi." 
Jeremiah11:20 Kwonka ai MUKAMA ow'amahe, iwe ocwa emanja z'oburyo, Okagyeza emitima n'ebiteekateeko, Bahoore nindeeba, Ahabw'okuba niiwe nyegyekyereire ebyangye." 
Jeremiah11:21 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugambira aha bantu ba Anatoosi abarikwenda kukwita, nibagira bati: Reka kuhanuura omu iziina rya MUKAMA, tutakaakwita," 
Jeremiah11:22 kandi nikyo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Reeba, ndyabafubira; abatsigazi baitwe rurara, abaana baabo b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki baitwe enjara," 
Jeremiah11:23 habure owaarokokaho; ahabw'okuba ndyareeta akabi ahari abo bantu b'omuri Anatoosi omu mwaka ogu barifubirirwamu. 
Jeremiah12:1 Ai MUKAMA, n'obu ndikukwetomboitera, Ori ohikiriire; Kwonka nkaayenzire kwetonganira omu maisho gaawe. Ahabw'enki ababi bahiirwa omu mihanda yaabo? Ahabw'enki endeebya zoona ziba gye?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Niiwe obabyara, bakatsimba emizi, Bakakura, bakaana. Tobaruga ha rurimi, Haza emitima yaabo ekuri hare." 
Jeremiah12:3 Kwonka iwe MUKAMA, nommanya; Ondeeba kandi omanya oku omutima gwangye gwemi ahariiwe. Bahuruutureyo nk'entaama ezirikuza kubaagwa, Obabiikire eizooba ry'okwitirwaho." 
Jeremiah12:4 Mbwenu ensi eryahitsya hi n'okucura, N'obunyaatsi bw'omuri buri ishwa kuhotoka? Amatungo n'ebirikuguruka biryamarwaho Ahabw'obubi bw'abagitwiremu, Ahabw'okuba abantu bakagira bati: Tarireeba muheru gwaitu." 
Jeremiah12:5 Ku oraabe wairukire n'ab'amaguru, bakakurusya, Noobaasa ota kuhakana n'embaraasi? Ku oraabe nooremwa ori omu nsi y'obusingye, Oryagira ota omu bishaka bya Yorudani ebikwataine." 
Jeremiah12:6 Ahabw'okuba beene sho n'ab'enju ya sho Nabo bakureebize; Nibakuyombera enyima, bakubingire; N'obu barikugambira gye, otaribeesiga." 
Jeremiah12:7 Ntsigireho eka yangye, N'obuhunguzi bwangye naabureka; Nkunzi yangye y'aha mara Naamuhayo omu mikono y'abazigu be." 
Jeremiah12:8 Obuhunguzi bwangye bumpindukiire entare y'omu kibira, Bwaimutsya eiraka ryabwo, bwantontomera; Nikyo ndikubwangira." 
Jeremiah12:9 Beitu hsi, obuhunguzi bwangye bumbeereire empungu y'amabara? Agandi mahanga agabwehinguririize nigaburwanisa? Mugyende, muteerane enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ishwa, Muzireete, zishonshomere." 
Jeremiah12:10 Abariisa baingi basiisire omusiri gwangye gw'emizaabibu, Baaribatiirira omugabo gwangye; Omugabo gwangye murungi baagugira eihamba eritatuurwamu." 
Jeremiah12:11 Baguhindwire amatongo, Niguntakira ahabw'okushoberwa; Ensi yoona ehindwirwe amatongo, Kwonka tihariho muntu n'omwe okyetaireho." 
Jeremiah12:12 Abahwerekyerezi baizire Aha bibungo by'emparamaata eby'omu ihamba, Ahabw'okuba rurara ya MUKAMA neerya busha Okuruga aha rubaju rumwe rw'ensi okuhika aha rundi; Tihariho kiine omubiri kyona ekiine obusingye." 
Jeremiah12:13 Babiba engano, bashaaruura amahwa, Beerusya, babura eki baihamu; Ebi basharwire biryabakwatsa enshoni Ahabw'ekiniga kingi kya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah12:14 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba ahari bataahi bangye boona ababi, abarikukora aha buhunguzi obu naahaire abantu bangye Israeli kuba obwabo, naagira ati: Reeba, ndyabarandura omu nsi yaabo, n'enju ya Yuda nayo ngibaranduremu." 
Jeremiah12:15 Kandi ku ndiheza kubarandura, ndyagaruka mbagirire esaasi, mbagarure, buri muntu agarukye omu buhunguzi bwe n'omu butaka bwe." 
Jeremiah12:16 Kandi obunaku ku burihika, baayezirika kutooreza emicwe y'abantu bangye okurahira eiziina ryangye bati: Nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire, nk'oku baayegyeise abantu bangye kurahira Baali, obwo baryahamibwa omu bantu bangye." 
Jeremiah12:17 Kwonka eihanga ryona ku riryanga kuhurira, ndyarirandurira kimwe, ndicwekyereze; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah13:1 Oku nikwo MUKAMA yangambiire naagira ati: Irooko ogure orukoba rwa kitaani, orwezirikise, kwonka otarujabika omu maizi." 
Jeremiah13:2 Ntyo naagura orukoba, naarwezirikisa nk'ekigambo kya MUKAMA oku kyabaire kiri." 
Jeremiah13:3 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho obwa kabiri nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah13:4 Twara orwo rukoba oru oguzire, oru oyezirikiise, oimukye oze Para, orusherekye omu nonko y'orukiri." 
Jeremiah13:5 Ntyo naagyenda, naarushereka haihi na Para, nk'oku MUKAMA yandagiira." 
Jeremiah13:6 Ebiro bingi ku byahingwireho, MUKAMA yangira ati: Imuka ogarukye Para, oiheyo orukoba oru naakuragiire kusherekayo." 
Jeremiah13:7 Naanye nikwo kugaruka Para, nkacukura, nkaiha orwo rukoba ahu naabaire ndusherekire. Kandi reeba, orwo rukoba rukaba rusiisikaire, rutakiine mugasho." 
Jeremiah13:8 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah13:9 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ikwo nikwo ndishiisha amaryo ga Yuda n'amaryo ga Yerusaalemu agarengyesereize. 
Jeremiah13:10 Eihanga eri eribi eririkwanga kuhurira ebigambo byangye, abantu abarikukuratira ebi emitima yaabo egangaire erikwenda, bakakuratira baaruhanga abandi kubaheereza n'okubaramya, baryaba nk'orwo rukoba orutakiine mugasho." 
Jeremiah13:11 Ahabw'okuba nk'oku orukoba ruhamira omuntu omu bwezirikiro, nikwo naayehamiizeho enju ya Israeli yoona n'eya Yuda yoona, ngu bambeere eihanga, eiziina ery'okumpimbisisa, n'okumpaisa ekitiinisa; kwonak baayanga kuhurira." 
Jeremiah13:12 Nikyo oraabagambirire eki kigambo noogira oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Buri njoga neija kwijuzibwa viinyo; kandi nabo nibaija kukugira bati: Noogira ngu itwe titurikumanya ku buri njoga erikwija kwijuzibwa viinyo? 
Jeremiah13:13 Naiwe obagire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kusindiza kiwme abatwire omu nsi egi boona, abagabe abashutami aha kitebe kya Daudi, abanyamurwa, baanabi n'abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusaalemu boona," 
Jeremiah13:14 mbahondanise, buri muntu na mugyenzi we, abaana na baishebo. Tindikwija kubasaasira, nari okubareka, n'obu kwakuba okubagirira esaasi, ngu ntabahwerekyereza; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah13:15 Muhurire, kandi mutegye amatu; Murekye amaryo, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA niwe yaagamba." 
Jeremiah13:16 Muhe MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu ekitiinisa, Atakareetsire mwirima, Ebigyere byanyu bitakateereire ntsibo aha bibungo omu rwita-waabo, Kandi, mukiba nimusherura okuhweza, Akakuhindura ekicuucu kya rufu, Kukaba omwirima ndindindi." 
Jeremiah13:17 Kwonka ku muraayangye kuhurira, Omutima gwangye nigwija kuririra omu mubonano Nindizibwa amaryo gaanyu, Niinyija kurira munonga, amarira nigampimintika omu maisho, Ahabw'okuba obusyo bwa MUKAMA bunyagirwe." 
Jeremiah13:18 Gambira omugabe na nyina, noogira oti: Mwecureeze, mushutame ahansi; Ahabw'okuba ebirunga byanyu ebirungi Bibarugire aha mitwe." 
Jeremiah13:19 Endembo z'omuri Negebu zikingirwe, Tihariho w'okuziigura; Abayuda batwairwe omu bukwatwa, Baatwarirwa kimwe." 
Jeremiah13:20 Munagye amaisho, mureebe abareetwa aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; obusyo bwawe buri oburungi, obu waabaire ohairwe, burahi?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Oryagamba ki ku barikutegyekyesa Abu waayegyeise, bakaba banywani baawe? Torikwatwa obusaasi, nk'obw'omukazi orikurumwa kuzaara?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Kandi ku oraagire omu mutima gwawe oti: Ahabw'enki ebi byona bimpikireho? Eby'okushiisha byawe ebirengyesereize Nibyo bireeteire ekipumpuriya kyawe kuhenuka, okufa kubi, obubisha bukakubonabonesa." 
Jeremiah13:23 Omunyesiopia naabaasa kuhindura omubiri gwe, Nari engwe kuhindura amabara gaayo? Kuri ekyo nikibaasika, Naimwe abamanyiire kukora kubi Mukaabaasize kukora kurungi." 
Jeremiah13:24 Nikyo ndibataataanisiza nk'ebishushunga Ebirikutwarwa omuyaga gw'omu ihamba. 
Jeremiah13:25 Ebyo nigwo mugabo gwawe ogu naakuteekateekyeire Ahabw'okuunyebwa, okeesiga ebishuba; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah13:26 Nyowe nyenka nikyo ndihenurira ekipumpuriya kyawe, Nkakikuhitsya aha buso, enshoni zaawe zikareebwa." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndeebire ebihagaro byawe, obushambani bwawe, N'eiraka ry'obwamaraaya bwawe Ebi okoreire omu ishwa aha bibungo. Oryakareeba, iwe Yerusaalemu! Oryahitsya hi n'okwanga kwezibwa?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaija ahari Yeremia ahabw'omushana mwingi gw'ekyanda, nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah14:2 Yuda neecura, Omu marembo gaayo abantu nibagwa enshazi. Abantu baayo nibatongyeza ahansi, N'okuborooga kwa Yerusaalemu kuhikire ahaiguru." 
Jeremiah14:3 Abakungu baayo nibatuma abambari baabo amaizi, Bakihika aha maziba, bashanga amaizi gatarimu, Bagaruka enyungu zaabo zirimu busha, Baine enshoni bashobeirwe, Beekoreire emikono." 
Jeremiah14:4 Abahingi baine enshoni, beekoreire emikono, Ahabw'ensi kugangabuka, ebuzire enjura." 
Jeremiah14:5 N'empara neetsiga abaana baayo omu ishwa Yaaheza kubazaara, ahabw'okubura obunyaatsi." 
Jeremiah14:6 Enturegye nizeemerera aha bibungo by'emparamaata, Zihaahagira nk'emishega; Amaisho gazigwire omunda ahabw'okubura obunyaatsi." 
Jeremiah14:7 N'obu eby'okushiisha byaitu biraabe nibitushinja, Ai MUKAMA, kora ahabw'eiziina ryawe; Ahabw'okuba okugaruka enyima kwaitu ni kwingi; Tukakucumuraho." 
Jeremiah14:8 Iwe matsiko ga Israeli, Omujuna omu biro by'enaku, Okaahindukiire ki nk'omunyaihanga omu nsi, Nk'omugyenzi okiikama kuraara bwaira?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Okaahindukiire ki nk'omuntu oshobeirwe, Nk'emanzi eremirwe kujuna? Ai MUKAMA, n'obu kiraabe kiri kityo, Ori omuriitwe, nitwetererwa eiziina ryawe. Otatutsigaho." 
Jeremiah14:10 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba ahari aba bantu naagira ati: Okwo nikwo baayenzire kurara Batabandame hamwe; Nikyo MUKAMA atarikubaikiririza; Aryaijuka eby'okushiisha byabo, Abafubire ahabw'ebibi byabo." 
Jeremiah14:11 Kandi MUKAMA yangira ati: Reka kushabira abo bantu ebirungi. 
Jeremiah14:12 N'obu baraayesiibyekwo, tindikwija kuhurira kutaka kwabo; kandi n'obu barampongyere ebitambo by'okwotsya n'empongano z'esaano, tindikwija kubyakiira; kureka ndyabamaraho na rurara n'enjara n'orufu." 
Jeremiah14:13 Bwanyima naagira nti: Ai bambe, Mukama RUHANGA, reeba, baanabi nibabagira bati: Timurikwija kwitwa rurara, n'obu kwakuba okuteerwa enjara; kureka ndyabaheera obusingye obwa nyamazima omuri ogu mwanya." 
Jeremiah14:14 MUKAMA yangira ati: Baanabi abo nibahanuura ebishuba omu iziina ryangye; tiinye mbatumire, tiinye mbaragiire, n'obu kwakuba okubagambira. Nibabahanuurira okworekwa kw'ebishuba, baragura ebitaine mutambo, n'obugobya bw'omu mitima yaabo." 
Jeremiah14:15 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugambira aha bya baanabi abarikuhanuura omu iziina ryangye, haza ntabatumire, bakgira bati: Rurara n'ejara tibiriteera egi nsi; naagira ati: Baanabi abo nibaija kumarwaho rurara n'ejara;" 
Jeremiah14:16 n'abantu abu baanabi barikuhanuurira baryanagwa omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu, nibaitwa enjara na rurara, babure kiziika, bo n'abakazi baabo na batabani baabo kandi na bahara baabo; ahabw'okuba ndyabashukaho obubi bwabo." 
Jeremiah14:17 Kandi oryabagambira ekigambo eki, noogira oti: K'amaisho gangye gahimitikye amarira Nyomushana na nyekiro, garekye kwoma; Ahabw'okuba abantu bangye bateirwe munonga, Baahutaazibwa obuhuta buhango." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ku ndikuza omu ishwa, Nshangayo abaitsirwe rurara; Ku ndikuza omu rurembo, Nshangamu abarembiibwe enjara, Ahabw'okuba baanabi n'abanyamurwa nibazengyerera omu nsi egi Bataine ki barikumanya." 
Jeremiah14:19 Beitu oyangiire kimwe Yuda? Omutima gwawe gutamirwe Saayuuni? Otuteereire ki, tukabura kutambirwa? Tukategyereza obusingye, titwabona karungi; Twategyereza okutambirwa, haija okushoberwa." 
Jeremiah14:20 Ai MUKAMA, twemeire obubi bwaitu, N'eby'okushiisha bya baatatenkuriitwe; Ahabw'okuba tukakucumuraho." 
Jeremiah14:21 Otatutamirwa kimwe, ahabw'eiziina ryawe; Otakwatsa enshoni ekitebe kyawe ky'ekitiinisa. Ijuka endagaano ei waaragaine naitwe, otagiita." 
Jeremiah14:22 Omuri baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga b'ebishuba Harimu owaakubaasa kugwisa enjura? Nari eiguru ahabwaryo niribaasa kugwisa enjura y'orutoonyerera? Tiiwe MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu? Niiwe twineho amatsiko, Ahabw'okuba ebyo byona niiwe obikora." 
Jeremiah15:1 Bwanyima MUKAMA yangira ati: N'obu Musa na Samueli baakuunyemerera omumaisho, omutima gwangye tigukaagaruka hari aba bantu. Obaanyihe omumaisho, bagyende!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Kandi ku baraakubuuze bati: Tuze hi? obagire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ab'okwitwa rufu, baitwe rufu; Ab'okwitwa rurara, baitwe rurara; Ab'okwitwa enjara, baitwe enjara, N'ab'okutwarwa omu bukwatwa, batwarwe." 
Jeremiah15:3 Kandi MUKAMA yaagira ati: Niinyija kubateeraho okucwekyerezibwa omu miringo ena, rurara y'okubaita, embwa z'okubataanyagura, amahungu g'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba by'okugaashuura n'okubamaraho." 
Jeremiah15:4 Kandi ndyabahindura eky'okutiinisa amahanga g'abagabe boona ab'omu nsi nimbatura ebi Manaase mwene Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda yaakoreire Yerusaalemu. 
Jeremiah15:5 Iwe Yerusaalemu, n'oha oraakugirire esaasi? Nari shi, n'oha oraakucurire? N'oha oraayerusye kukiikama kukubuuza oku oraire?" 
Jeremiah15:6 MUKAMA naagira ati: Okanyanga, Waaguma noogaruka enyima; Nikyo nkubangiriire omukono, nkakumaraho. Ahabw'okuba okugumisiriza kunduhize." 
Jeremiah15:7 Nkabeeresa orugari omu marembo g'ensi, Naabamaraho abaana, naacwekyereza abantu bangye; Kwonka tibaareka mitwarize yaabo mibi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Naabakanyisamu abafaakazi, Baaba baingi okukira omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja. Ndeeteire baanyina b'abatsigazi omuhwerekyerezi omu ihangwe; Naabareetera obusaasi n'obwoba, Naabibagwisaho kitaraariire." 
Jeremiah15:9 Owaazaire mushanju ayehweire amatsiko, Yaagwa enshazi; Eizooba rye ryarenga butakaizire; Akwatsirwe enshoni, yaabwerabwera. Kandi abahonokireho ndyabacwekyerereza Omu maisho g'abazigu baabo na rurara; nikow MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah15:10 Ai bambe maawe, okanzaarira ki ndi omushaija w'empaka n'entongane aha b'omu nsi egi boona! Tihariho u ndagurize, kandi tihariho u ndeegurizeho; kwonka boona nibanjuma." 
Jeremiah15:11 Ai MUKAMA, nkaashemereire kujunwa, kuri ntarakweshengyereize kubakorera ebirungi, nari kukweshengyereza kubakiza abazigu omu biro by'enkau n'omu biro by'obusaasi!" 
Jeremiah15:12 Hariho omuntu owaakubaasa kuhenda ekyoma, ekyoma ekirikuruga aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, akahenda n'omuringa?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Ebintu byawe n'obutungi bwawe ndyabihayo kuba eminyago, bitaine ki biguzirwe, babimare omu nsi yaawe yoona, ninkutura ebibi byawe byona." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndyabareetera kuheerereza abazigu baawe omu nsi i otarikumanya; ahabw'okuba omuriro ogwakiibwe ekiniga kyangye guryaguma nigwaka ebiro byona. 
Jeremiah15:15 Ai MUKAMA, niiwe orikumanya; Onyijukye, ontaayaayire, Ompoorere enzigu abarikumpiiga; Ahabw'okugumisiriza kwawe otaanyihaho, Omanye ku ndikujumwa ninturwa iwe ahabwawe." 
Jeremiah15:16 Ebigambo byawe bikaboneka, naabirya, Byambeera okushemererwa, N'okunanuka kw'omu mutima; Ahabw'okuba niinyetererwa eiziina ryawe, MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe." 
Jeremiah15:17 Tindashutamire mu mutwe gw'abantu abarikwesiima, Kandi naanye tindashemereirwe, Kureka nkashutama nyenka ahabw'omukono gwawe, Ahabw'okuba okanyijuza okuguubwa kubi." 
Jeremiah15:18 Ahabw'enki obusaasi bwangye butatuuza, N'obuhuta bwangye butatambwa, bukanga kukira? Noija kumbeera nk'akagyera akarikubeiha, N'amaizi agarikwoma?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Ku oraagarukye, niinyija kukugarura, Obone kuunyemerera omumaisho. Ku oraataanise eby'omugasho n'ebitagwine, Oryaba nk'akanwa kangye. Baryakugarukira, kwonka iwe torigarukira." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ahari abo bantu ndyakugira orugo orwombekyeise emiringa; Baryakurwanisa, kwonka tibarikubaasa, Ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe Kukukiza n'okukwiha omu mikono yaabo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ndyakujuna nkwihe omu mikono y'ababi, Nkucungure, orugye omu mikono y'abarikutiinisa." 
Jeremiah16:1 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah16:2 Otarishwera omukazi, kandi otarizaarira abaana b'aboojo n'aba'abaishiki omu mwanya ogu." 
Jeremiah16:3 Ahabw'okuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugmaba aha baana ba'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki abarizaarirwa omu mwanya ogu, n'ahari baanyinabo na baishebo abaabazaariire omu nsi egi, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah16:4 Baryafa baitwe endwara ezirikwita. Tihariho oribacurira nari oribaziika; emitumbi yaabo eryaba nka'amasha aha itaka. Baryahwerekyerezibwa rurara n'ejara; kandi emitumbi yaabo eryaba egabo y'amahungu g'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba. 
Jeremiah16:5 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Otaritaaha omu nju omu barikucurira, otariza kubatongyeza, n'obu kwakuba okubaririra; ahabw'okuba obusingye bwangye n'embabazi n'esaasi mbiihire ahari abo bantu; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah16:6 Abakuru n'abato baryafeera omuri egi nsi hatariho mutaano; tibariziikwa, kandi tihariho oribacurira n'obu kwakuba okweshara nari okumwa enkomborora ahabwabo." 
Jeremiah16:7 Tihariho baribegyera ori omu rufu omugaati kumuyaagira ahabw'okufeerwa; kandi tibariha ofeereirwe ishe nari nyina ekikopo ky'amaizi kumugwisa gye. 
Jeremiah16:8 Kandi otaritaaha omu nju omu barikuriira obugyenyi kushutamanabo kurya n'okunywa; 
Jeremiah16:9 ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyahunamya amaraka gw'okwesiima n'okushemererwa, erya kishwera n'erya kishwerwa omu mwanya ogu, mukiriho nimureeba." 
Jeremiah16:10 Kandi ku origambira abantu aba ebigambo ebyo byona, nabo baakubuuza bati: N'enki ekireeteire MUKAMA kutugambaho obubi obwo bwona obuhango oburitubaho? Naatutura ki? Ni kibi ki eki twacumwire ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu?" 
Jeremiah16:11 naiwe oryabagarukamu oti: Kireetsirwe baashwenkuriimwe abaanyimwire, bakakuratira baaruhanga abandi, bakabaheereza, bakabaramya, bakantsigaho, batoorobere biragiro byangye;" 
Jeremiah16:12 kandi naimwe mukirize baashwenkuriimwe abo kukora kubi, ahabw'okuba buri muntu weena omuriimwe naakuratira ebibi by'omu mutima gwe gw'obugangaazi naayanga kumpurira." 
Jeremiah16:13 Nikyo ndibabingira omuri egi nsi, mukaza omu nsi ei mutaamanyaga n'obu baakuba baashwenkuriimwe, kandi okwo niyo muriheererereza baaruhanga abandi nyomushana na nyekiro; ahabw'okuba tindibagirira mbabazi." 
Jeremiah16:14 Kandi MUKAMA nagira ati: Reeba, obunaku buryahika, obu batarigaruka kugira bati: Nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire owaihire Abaisraeli omu nsi ya Misri;" 
Jeremiah16:15 kureka bagira bati: Nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire owaihire Abaisraeli omu nsi y'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso n'omu nsi zoona ei yaabaire ababingiire; ahabw'okuba ndyabagarura omu nsi yaabo y'obuzaarwa ei naahaire baishenkurubo. 
Jeremiah16:16 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Reeba, naaza kutuma abajubi baingi baije babajube, bwanyima y'ebyo ndyatuma abahiigi baingi, baije babahiigye ahari buri rushozi n'ahari buri kibungo n'omu nyanga z'amabaare." 
Jeremiah16:17 Ahabw'okuba amaisho gangye ngataire aha mitwarize yaabo yoona; tensherekirwe, n'eby'okushiisha byabo tibisherekirwe, ngu ntabireeba." 
Jeremiah16:18 Eby'okushiisha byabo n'ekibi kyabo ndyabibazimuurira kabiri, ahabw'okuba bakahagaza ensi yangye emitumbi y'ebishushani byabo ebirikunugwa, obuhunguzi bwangye baabwijuzamu ebihagaro byabo." 
Jeremiah16:19 Ai MUKAMA, maani gangye, ekigo kyangye, Kandi obuhungiro bwangye omu biro by'okubonabonesezibwamu, Amahanga garyakwijaho, Nigaruga aha mpeuru z'ensi, gagire gati: Ebi baatatenkuriitwe baahungwire n'ebishuba bisha, Ni busha, n'ebintu bitaine mugasho." 
Jeremiah16:20 Nimugira ngu omuntu akaayekorera baaruhanga? Baaruhanga nk'abo ti baaruhanga! 
Jeremiah16:21 N'ahabw'ekyo reeba, ndyabamanyisa; aha murundi ogu niinyija kubamanyisa obushoboorozi bwangye n'amaani gangye, nabo bamanye ku eiziina ryangye ndi Yehova." 
Jeremiah17:1 Ekibi kya Yuda kihandiikirwe n'ekaraamu y'ekyoma, n'akabaare k'arimaasi akashongoize; kyasharurwa aha kishate ky'omutima gwabo n'aha mahembe g'amatambiro gaabo," 
Jeremiah17:2 n'abaana baabo nibakiijuka amatambiro gaabo n'ebishushani byabo bya Ashera ebyabaire biba haihi na buri kiti kibisi ekyetwa omurinzi aha bibungo biraingwa," 
Jeremiah17:3 n'aha nshozi omu nsi z'obwerere. Obutungi bwawe n'ebintu byawe byona ebirungi ndyabihayo kuba eminyago omu nsi yaawe yoona nooturwa ekibi kyawe. 
Jeremiah17:4 Naiwe wenka toriguma mu buhunguzi bwawe obu naakuhaire, kureka oryaheerereza abazigu baawe omu nsi ei otarikumanya; ahabw'okuba omuriro ogwakiibwe ekiniga kyangye guryaguma nigwaka ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah17:5 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Orikwesiga ondiijo muntu, Akahindura omuntu-buntu eky'okumurinda, Akaimuura MUKAMA omu mutima gwe, akyeenirwe." 
Jeremiah17:6 Ari nk'akashaka k'omu ihamba, Kandi ekirungi kyona ekiriija tarikireeba, Kureka aryatuura omu myanya y'omu ihamba ekarangataine, Omu nsi y'omwonyo etatuurwamu bantu." 
Jeremiah17:7 Orikwesiga MUKAMA, kandi ou MUKAMA aba amatsiko ge, Ahiiriirwe;" 
Jeremiah17:8 Ahakuba ni nk'omuti ogubyairwe aha rubaju rw'amaizi, Ogurikutsimba emizi yaagwo haihi n'omugyera; Tigutiina mushana gw'ekyanda, Kureka amababi gaagwo gaguma nigabengyeya, N'omu mwaka gw'omushana mwingi tigwemereza mutima, Ahabw'okuba tigureka kwera bijuma." 
Jeremiah17:9 Omutima n'engobya okukira ebintu byona, Gwine endwara etarikutambwa; N'oha owaakubaasa kugumanya?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Nyowe MUKAMA niinye ncaaka ebiteekateeko, Nkagyeza omutima Nkazimuurira omuntu weena nk'emitwarize ye oku eri, Nk'ebyana ebirugire omu bi akozire oku biri." 
Jeremiah17:11 Omuntu weena atunga obutungi omu muringo gutari gw'amazima, ni nk'endahi erikubumbatira abaana abu etazire. Obwo butungi buryamuhwaho akiri rwagati y'amagara ge, Bwanyima aha muheru gwe abe omushema." 
Jeremiah17:12 Omwanya gwaitu ogurikwera n'ekitebe ky'obukama bw'ekitiinisa; Kikateebwa ahaiguru okuruga aha kutandika. 
Jeremiah17:13 Ai MUKAMA, matsiko ga Israeli, Abarikukwimuura boona baryakwatwa enshoni; Abarikukurugaho baryahandiikwa omu nsi, ahabw'okuba baimwire MUKAMA, Enshuro y'amaizi g'amagara." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ntambira, ai MUKAMA, nibwo ndaatambirwe; Njuna, nibwo ndaajunwe; Ahabw'okuba niiwe ky'okutiinisa kyangye." 
Jeremiah17:15 Reeba, nibangira bati: Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kirahi? Mbwenu nu nikiije!" 
Jeremiah17:16 Tindakugyemire kwohereza obubi, N'obu kwakuba okwetenga eizooba ry'akabi kwija, Noobimanya. Ekyarugire omu kanwa kangye kikaba nikireetwa butunu omu maisho gaawe." 
Jeremiah17:17 Otambeera eky'okutiinisa; Ori obuhungiro bwangye aha izooba ry'enaku. 
Jeremiah17:18 K'abarikumpiiga bakwatwe enshoni, Kwonka nyowe zirekye kunkwata; Bo bahahaare omutima, Kwonka ogwangye gurekye kuhahaara; Obahitsyeho eizooba ry'akabi, Obahwerekyereze kabiri." 
Jeremiah17:19 Oku nikwo MUKAMA yangambiire naagira ati: Irooko oyemerere omu irembo rya Benyamiini, ahu abagabe ba Yuda bataahira n'ahu bashohorera, n'omu marembo goona aga Yerusaalemu," 
Jeremiah17:20 obagire oti: Imwe bagabe ba Yuda 'mwe, na Yuda yoona, n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu mwena abaraba omuri aga marembo, nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah17:21 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Mwerinde, muteekorera omutwaro gwona aha izooba rya sabato, n'obu kwakuba okugurabya omu marembo ga Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah17:22 Kandi mutashohoza omutwaro omu maka gaanyu aha izooba rya sabato, n'obu kwakuba okurikoreraho omurimo gwona, kureka mugume murinde eryo izooba kuba eririkwera, nk'oku naaragiire baashwenkuriimwe." 
Jeremiah17:23 Kwonka tibarahuriire n'obu kwakuba okutega amatu, kureka bakagangaaza ebitsya, ngu barekye kuhurira n'obu kwakuba okwikiriza kwegyesibwa." 
Jeremiah17:24 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Kwonak ku murampurire, mutaarabya mutwaro gwona omu marembo g'oru rurembo aha izooba rya sabato, kureka mwaririnda kuba eririkwera, mutaagira murimo gwona ogu mwarikoreraho," 
Jeremiah17:25 obweo abagabe abari aha ngoma ya Daudi baryataaha omu marembo g'oru rurembo bari omu bigaari by'orugamba n'aha mbaraasi, hamwe n'abanyiginya baabo n'abantu ba Yuda, n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu; akndi oru rurembo ruryagumaho ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah17:26 Kandi abantu baryaguma nibaruga omu ndembo za Yuda, n'omu myanya yoona eyehinguririize Yerusaalemu, omu ishaza rya Benyamiini omu mpita, omu nsi y'ebibungo, n'omuri Negebu, nibareeta ebitambo by'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo, n'empongano z'esaano n'obubaane, kandi nibareeta empongano z'okusiima omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah17:27 Kwonka ku muraayangye kumpurira n'okurinda eizooba rya sabato riri eririkwera, mwaraba omu marembo ga Yerusaalemu aha izooba rya sabato mwekoreire emitwaro, obwo ndyatweka omuriro omu marembo gaayo, gwotsye zaanyaruju za Yerusaalemu, kandi tiguriraazibwa." 
Jeremiah18:1 Ekigambo ekyarugire ahari MUKAMA kikaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah18:2 Imuka oshuume, oze ow'omubumbi, kandi okwo niyo ndaakugambirire ebigambo byangye." 
Jeremiah18:3 Ntyo naashuuma, naaza ow'omubumbi, naashanga naabumbisa enziga ye." 
Jeremiah18:4 Eki yaabaire naabumba omu ibumba kyasiisikarira omu ngaro ze; yaagaruka yaaribumbamu ekindi, nk'oku yaabaire naayenda." 
Jeremiah18:5 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah18:6 Imwe b'enju ya Israeli 'mwe, nimugira ngu tinkaabaasa kubagira nk'oku ogwo mubumbi yaagira eibumba? Reeba, nk'oku eibumba riri omu ngaro z'omubumbi, naimwe nikwo muri omu ngaro zangye, imwe nju ya Israeli 'mwe."
