Jeremiah18:7 Omu bunaku bwona obu ndigambiramu aha ihanga nari aha bugabe kurirandura, kurisheenya n'okuricwekyereza," 
Jeremiah18:8 eryo ihanga eri ndiba naagambireho, ku ririhinduka, ryareka ebibi byaryo, naanye ndyayegarukamu, ndekye akabi aku mbaire niinyenda kurireetaho." 
Jeremiah18:9 Kandi omu bunaku obu ndigambiramu aha ihanga nari aha bugabe kuryombeka n'okuribyara," 
Jeremiah18:10 eryo ihanga kuririkora ebirikwangwa omu maisho gangye, ryayanga kuhurira eiraka ryangye, obwo ndyayefuuza, ndekye kukora ebirungi ebi mbaire niinyenda kurikorera." 
Jeremiah18:11 Mbwenu irooko ogambire abantu ba Yuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu oti: Oku niwko MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ninteekateeka kubareetaho akabi, nkandi ncumire n'enaama y'okubarwanisa. Nyaabura 'mwe, nimugarukye, buri muntu arugye omu muhanda gwe omubi, mushemeze emitwarize yaanyu n'ebi murikukora." 
Jeremiah18:12 Kwonka bo nibagira bati: Nooyeruhiza busha! Nitwija kukuratira enaama zaitu, buri muntu akuratire obugangaazi bw'omutima gwe omubi." 
Jeremiah18:13 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Mubuuririze omu mahanga, Ku haraabe hariho orahuriire ebigambo nk'ebyo. Israeli akozire ekibi ky'eihano." 
Jeremiah18:14 Nimugira ngu ebirika bya Lebanooni Ebiri aha rukiri rw'omu ishwa biryabura? Nari shi amaizi agarikufuka Agarikuhimintika nigaruga hare garyayoma? 
Jeremiah18:15 Kwonka abantu bangye banyebirwe, Baayoterera baaruhanga b'ebishuba obubaane; Kandi kibareeteire kuteera entsibo omu mihanda yaabo eya ira, Baatora obuhanda obw'aha rubaju, Baareka omuhanda rugyendwa," 
Jeremiah18:16 Baareetera ensi yaabo kuba erikutiinisa, N'ekintu ky'okweshaanya ebiro byona. Orikugirabamu weena agyenda naashoberwa, q1 Naazongoza omutwe." 
Jeremiah18:17 Ndyabataataanisa omu maisho g'abazigu baabo, Nk'abarikuhunga omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba. Aha izooba eri barigwererwaho akagwe Ndyabateera amabega, tindireeba i bari." 
Jeremiah18:18 Bwanyima baagira bati: Mwije tugiire Yerusaalemu omu naama; ahabw'okuba ebiragiro tibiriruga ha munyamurwa, nari enaama kuruga aha munyabwengye, n'obu kyakuba ekigambo ahari nabi. Mwije tumubeiherere, tumushiishe, turekye kweta aha kibambo kye na kimwe." 
Jeremiah18:19 Ai MUKAMA, ompurire, Ohurire amaraka g'abarikumpakanisa." 
Jeremiah18:20 Ekirungi nikizimuurirwa ekibi? Kwonka bo bantumbiire obusya. Ijuka oku mbaire niinyemerera omu maisho gaawe, Kubatonganira, ngu mbaiheho ekiniga kyawe." 
Jeremiah18:21 N'ahabw'ekyo orrekye abaana baabo baitwe enjara; Kandi obaheyo, bamarweho rurara; Abakazi baabo babe abamazire abaana, kandi abafaakazi, Abashaija baabo bamarweho orufu, N'abatsigazi baabo baitirwe rurara omu rugamba." 
Jeremiah18:22 Enduuru ehurirwe omu maka gaabo, Ku oraabateeze ababisha kitaraariire! Ahabw'okuba bantimbiire obusya, N'ebigyere byangye baabitega emiriiti." 
Jeremiah18:23 Kwonka iwe, MUKAMA, noomanya Enaama zaabo zoona ezi baanyiniire kuunyita. Otabasaasira eby'okushiisha byabo, N'obu kwakuba okuragaza ekibi kyabo omu maisho gaawe. Kureka bateezibwe entsibo, bakugwere kimwe omumaisho, Kandi omu biro by'ekiniga kyawe ogire oku waabagira." 
Jeremiah19:1 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Irooko ogure orunywero aha mubumbi, otware bamwe aha bakuru b'eihanga, n'abandi aha banyamurwa abakuru," 
Jeremiah19:2 muze omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinoomu, aharikutaahirwa omu Irembo ry'Engusyo, orangireyo ebigambo ebi ndaakugambire," 
Jeremiah19:3 noogira oti: Imwe bagabe ba Yuda 'mwe n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA. Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyareeta akabi omuri ogu mwanya, akarireetera amatu g'orikahurira weena kuteera enduuru." 
Jeremiah19:4 Ahabw'abantu kuunyimuura, bakahagara ogu mwanya nibagusiisisa okugwotereramu baaruhanga abandi obubaane, abu batakamanyaga n'obu baakuba baishenkurubo nari abagabe ba Yuda, n'okugwijuza eshagama y'abataine rubanja," 
Jeremiah19:5 n'okwombekyera Baali emyanya mikuru y'okuramizamu, okurabizamu batabani baabo omu mruriro kuba ebitambo by'okwotsya by'okutambira Baali, ebi ntararagiire n'obu kwakuba okutaho, kandi ebitakaijaga mu biteekateeko byangye;" 
Jeremiah19:6 n'ahabw'ekyo, reeba, obunaku buryaija, obu ogu mwanya gutarigaruka kwetwa ogwa Tofeti, n'obu rwakuba oruhanga rwa mwene Hinoomu, kureka guryayetwa oruhanga rw'eiriitiro; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah19:7 Kandi omuri ogu mwanya enaama za Yuda na Yerusaalemu nimwo ndizicwera busha, nkareetera abantu baabo kwitirwa omu maisho g'abazigu baabo bakaitwa abarikubahiiga. Kandi emitumbi yaabo ndyagigaburira amahungu g'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba." 
Jeremiah19:8 Kandi orurembo ndyaruhindura ekirikutiinisa n'eky'okweshaanya, orirurabaho weena ashishwe, ayeshaanye ahabw'akabi koona aku rwareebire." 
Jeremiah19:9 Ndyabariisa abaana baabo b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki, buri muntu arye mutaahi we omu biro by'okugotwa n'eby'enaku, ezi abazigu baabo n'abaribahiiga baribareebesa." 
Jeremiah19:10 Bwanyima oyatire orwo runywero omu maisho g'abashaija abaraagyende naiwe," 
Jeremiah19:11 obagire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Oku nikwo ndyata aba bantu n'oru rurembo, nk'oku omunutu ayata enyungu y'omubumbi, ekarema kuhomeererwa. Abantu baryaziika omuri Tofeti ahabw'okubura ahandi hoona ah'okuziika." 
Jeremiah19:12 Okwo nikwo ndigira ogu mwanya n'abagutwiremu, nkagira oru rurembo nka Tofeti; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah19:13 Amaju ga Yerusaalemu na zaanyaruju z'abagabe ba Yuda biryahagarwa nk'ogwo mwanya gwa Tofeti; nigo maju goona agaabaire nigookyezibwaho obubaane nibooterera eihe ryona ery'omu iguru, bakashukiriraho baaruhanga abandi empongano z'eby'okunywa." 
Jeremiah19:14 Bwanyima Yeremia yaaruga Tofeti, ei MUKAMA yaabaire amutumire kuhanuura, yaayemerera omu kibuga ky'enju ya MUKAMA, yaagira abantu boona ati:" 
Jeremiah19:15 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyareeta omuri oru rurembo na tauni zaarwo zoona akabi koona aku ndugambireho; ahabw'okuba bakagangaaza ebitsya, baayanga kuhurira ebigambo byangye." 
Jeremiah20:1 Kandi Pashuri omunyamurwa, mwene Imeri owaabaire ari omutegyeki mukuru omu nju ya MUKAMA, yaahurira Yeremia naahanuura ebigambo ebyo." 
Jeremiah20:2 Pashuri ogwo yaateera nabi Yeremia, yaamuta omu nkomo ezaabaire ziri omu Irembo rya Benyamiini ery'eruguru ery'enju ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah20:3 Ku bwaseesire, Pashuri yaiha Yeremia omu nkomo; Yeremia nikwo kumugira ati: MUKAMA tarikukweta Pashuri, kureka Magori-misabiibu, amakuru ngu “Ebirikutiinisa embaju zoona”." 
Jeremiah20:4 Ahabw'okuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyakugira ekirikutiinisa ahariiwe n'ahari bagyenzi baawe boona. Baryaitwa rurara y'omugabe wa Babulooni, abarware Babulooni bari enkwatwa, abaite na rurara." 
Jeremiah20:5 Kandi obutungi bwona obw'oru ruembo, amagoba gaarwo goona, ebintu byarwo byona eby'obuguzi bwingi, n'eitungo ryona ery'abagabe ba Yuda, ndyabihay omu mikono y'abazigu baabo, babanyagye, babakwate, babatware Babulooni." 
Jeremiah20:6 Kandi naiwe Pashuri n'abatuura omu nju yaawe boona, muryagyenda muri enkwatwa, oze Babulooni; okwo niyo origwa, kandi niyo oriziikwa, iwe na bagyenzi baawe boona abu ohanuurira ebishuba." 
Jeremiah20:7 Ai MUKAMA, okambeiha, naabiikiriza; Nonkiza amaani, kandi osingwire. Mpindukire eky'okushekyererwa eizooba ryona, Buri muntu nanteerera enaku." 
Jeremiah20:8 Ahakuba buri murundi gwona ogu ngamba, ntaka, Ningira nti, Obubisha n'okucwekyereza! Ahabw'okuba ekigambo kya MUKAMA kimpindukiire Ekijumo n'ekigaaniizo eizooba ryona." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ku ndikugira nti: Ka ndekye kumugambaho, N'obu kwakuba okugaruka kugamba omu iziina rye, Omu mutima gwangye oshusha oti harimu omuriro Ogurikubuguma oguri omu magufa gangye; Okufa mamigye nikundusya, Kandi tindikukubaasa." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ahakuba nimpurira baingi nibahwihwitsa. Okutiinisa kuri embaju zoona! Banywani bangye ab'ah'amara Abategyereize okugwa kwangye, nibagira bati: Muregye, naitwe nitwija kumurega, Shana akaabeihwabeihwa, Tubone kumusingura, tumuhoora." 
Jeremiah20:11 Kwonka MUKAMA ari hamwe naanye nk'omurwani orikutiinisa; N'ahabw'ekyo abarikumpiiga baryateera entsibo, Tibarinsingura. Baryakwatirwa kimwe enshoni, Ahabw'okuba tibaribaasa. Okuhemuka kwabo okw'ebiro n'ebiro tikuryeba." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ai MUKAMA ow'amahe, ogyeza abahikiriire, Kandi oreeba eby'omu mutima n'ebiteekateeko; Ka ndeebe oku oraabahoore, Ahabw'okuba niiwe nyegyekyereire ebyangye." 
Jeremiah20:13 Mweshongorere MUKAMA, mumuhimbise, Ahabw'okuba ajunire amagara g'abakyene, Yaagaiha omu mikono y'enkozi z'ebibi." 
Jeremiah20:14 Eizooba eri naazaariirweho nirikakyeenwe! Ekiro eki maawe yanzaariireho nikikabure omugisha! 
Jeremiah20:15 N'omuntu owaagambiire tata ati: Waazaara omwana w'omwojo, naamushemeza, Nawe naakakyeenwe!" 
Jeremiah20:16 Nkahenwa ki ogwo mushaija aba nk'endembo Ezi MUKAMA yaacwejtereuze ataube saasi, Ahrira okucura omu kasheeshe, N'enduuru omu ihangwe;" 
Jeremiah20:17 Ahabw'okuba taraanyitiire mu nda, Maawe akaba akituuro kyangye, N'enda ye ekaguma eri nyarwegye." 
Jeremiah20:18 Mbwenu nkaba naarugira ki omu nda, Kufa kubi n'okureeba enaku, N'okumara ebiro byangye nyine enshoni?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Eki n'ekigambo ekyaizire ahari Yeremia nikiruga ahari MUKAMA, obu omugabe Zedekia yaamutumaho Pashuri mwene Malikia, na Zefania omunyamurwa mwene Maaseya," 
Jeremiah21:2 naagira ati: Tubuurize MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni aizire kuturwanisa; obundi MUKAMA akaatugirira nk'eby'okutangaaza ebi akora oku biri, amutwihaho, areka kututeera." 
Jeremiah21:3 Atyo Yeremia yaabagira ati: Oku nikwo muraagire Zedekia muti: 
Jeremiah21:4 Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kucwa busha eby'okurwanisa ebi mukwaitse kurwanisa omugabe wa Babulooni n'Abakaludaaya abari enyima y'orugo babagotsire, imwe mbagarure omu rurembo;" 
Jeremiah21:5 kandi nyowe nyerwanire naimwe mbabangiire omukono gw'amaani, mbagwereirwe kubi, mbainiire ekiniga kingi munonga." 
Jeremiah21:6 Niinyija kuteera eby'omuri oru rurembo, abantu n'amatungo, biitwe orufu rw'amaani." 
Jeremiah21:7 Kandi bwanyima y'ebyo Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda n'abagaragwa be n'abantu boona abariba baari omuri oru rurembo, barokokire ahari orwo rufu, n'ahari rurara n'enjara, ndyabahayo omu mikono ya Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni n'ey'abazigu baabo, n'ey'abarikwenda kubaita. Aryabaitsa rurara, taribasaasira, nari kubareka, n'obu kwakuba okubagirira esaasi; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah21:8 Kandi ogambire abantu aba oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ntaire omu maisho gaanyu omuhanda gw'amagara n'ogw'okufa." 
Jeremiah21:9 Origuma omuri oru rurembo aryaitwa rurara, enjara n'orufu; kwonka orishohora, akeenaga omu mikono y'Abakaludaaya ababagotsire, aryagumaho, atimbuukye omu rugamba n'engabirano, nigo magara ge." 
Jeremiah21:10 Ahabw'okuba ntaire amaisho gangye ahari oru rurembo kurukora kubi, ti kurukora gye, kandi ruryaheebwayo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Babulooni, arwotsye n'omuriro; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah21:11 Muhurire ekigambo eki MUKAMA arikugambira enju y'omugabe wa Yuda," 
Jeremiah21:12 naagira ati: Iwe nju ya Daudi 'we, Mugume mucwe emanja z'oburyo buri kasheeshe, Mujune abanyagirwe, Mubaihe omu mikono y'abarikubahata, Ekiniga kyangye kitakaayaka nk'omuriro, Kikaaka, hakabura owaakiraaza, nimbatura ebibi ebi murikukora." 
Jeremiah21:13 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, naaba omuzigu wawe, iwe otwire omu ruhanga, N'aha rukiri rw'omu ruhita, Iwe orikugira oti: N'oha orishuuma kuturwanisa? Nair n'oha oritaaha omu maka gaitu?" 
Jeremiah21:14 Ndyabaha ekifubiro ekishemereire ebi murikukora, Ntwekye omuriro omu kibira kyaho, Gumareho byona ebiheehinguriririize." 
Jeremiah22:1 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Shuuma oze ow'omugabe wa Yuda, ogambireyo ekigambo eki," 
Jeremiah22:2 noogira oti: Iwe mugabe wa Yuda 'we ori aha ngoma ya Daudi, hurira ekigambo kya MUKAMA, iwe n'abagaragwa baawe n'abantu baawe abaraba omuri aga marembo." 
Jeremiah22:3 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Mugume mukore eby'oburyo n'eby'okuhikiirira, abanyagirwe mubaihe omu mikono y'abarikubahata, kandi omunyaihanga n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi mutabakora kubi, n'obu kwakuba okubakorera eby'obubisha, nari okusheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja omuri ogu mwanya." 
Jeremiah22:4 Ahabw'okuba ku muraayorobere ekigambo eki omu mzaima, abagabe abari aha ngoma ya Daudi baryaguma nibataahira omu marembo g'ebikaari by'egi nju, bari omu bigaari by'orugamba n'aha mbaraasi, bo n'abaragwa baabo, n'abantu baabo." 
Jeremiah22:5 Kwonka ku muraayangye kuta omutima ahari ebyo bigambo, niinyerahira ti: Egi nju eryahinduka omushaka; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah22:6 Ahabw'okuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba aha nju y'omugabe wa Yuda ati: Ombeereire nka Gileadi, N'omutwe gw'orushozi Lebanooni, Kwonka buzimazima ndyakuhindura eihamba ry'omusheenyi, Orurembo orutatwirwemu." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ndyakuteekateekyera abahwerekyerezi b'okukirwanisa, Buri omwe akwaitse eby'okurwanisa bye; Baryatema emyereezi yaawe erikukira oburungi, Baginagye omu muriro." 
Jeremiah22:8 Amahanga maingi garyaraba ahari oru rurembo, buri muntu abuuze mugyenzi we ati: Ahabw'enki MUKAMA agizire ati oru rurembo ruhango?" 
Jeremiah22:9 Nabo baryagarukamu bati: Ahabw'okuba bakatsigaho endagaano ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, baaramya baaruhanga abandi, baabaheereza." 
Jeremiah22:10 Mutacurira ofiire, N'obu kwakuba okumuboroogyera, Kureka muririre munonga ogyenzire, Ahabw'okuba tarigaruka bundi Kureeba ensi ye y'obuzaarwa." 
Jeremiah22:11 Ahabw'okuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba ahari Shalumu mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda, owaahungwire engoma ya Yosia ishe, kandi owaagyenzire, akaruga omuri ogu mwanya, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah22:12 Tarigaruka aha bundi, kureka ei baamutwairwe ari enkwatwa, niyo arigwa, kandi tarigaruka kureeba egi nsi." 
Jeremiah22:13 Aryakareeba, orikwombekyesa enju ye okutahikiirira, N'ebishengye bye akabyombekyesa obutainganisa, Orikukoreseza mutaahi we busha, Atamuhe bihembo bye," 
Jeremiah22:14 Orikugira ati: Ndyayeyombekyera enju rutaaba, Eine ebishengye bihango by'ahaiguru, Ngicwemu amadirisa, Ngikiikizemu embaaho z'emyereezi, Ngisiigye erangi erikutukura." 
Jeremiah22:15 Noogira ngu okwenda kukira abandi omu kwombekyesa emyereezi Nikyo kiraakugire omugabe? Sho akaba atarya, akanywa, Kandi omu biro bye taratungire, akagogyera?" 
Jeremiah22:16 Akaba acwera abooro n'abakyene emanja. Nabwo biba gye. Okwo tikwo kummanya? Nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah22:17 Kwonka amaisho gaawe n'omutima gwawe Nibiruruuhira amagoba gatari g'amazima, Kusheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja, N'okukora eby'okuhata n'eby'obubisha." 
Jeremiah22:18 Nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba ahari Yehoyakimu mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda ati: Tibarimutongyeza nibagira bati: Ai bambe, mukuru wangye! nari shi bati, Ai bambe munyaanyazi! Kandi tibarimutongyeza nibagira bati: Ai bambe, mukama wangye! nari shi bati, Nangwa ndikaitwa ekyo kitiinisa kye!" 
Jeremiah22:19 Aryaziikwa nk'oku baziika endogoya, Akururwe, anagwe enyima y'amarembo ga Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah22:20 Inamuka oze Lebanooni oteere enduuru; Oimutsye eiraka ryawe omuri Bashani, Oboroogye nooyema Abariimu, Ahabw'okuba nkunzi zaawe zoona zicwekyereziibwe." 
Jeremiah22:21 Nkagamba naiwe obu waabaire ogogyeire, Kwonka wangira oti: Tindikwija kukuhurira. Egyo niyo yaabaire eri emitwarize yaawe, okutoorobera iraka ryangye okwiha omu buto bwawe." 
Jeremiah22:22 Omuyaga guryariisa abariisa baawe boona, Nkunzi zaawe zize omu bukwatwa; Obwo nibwo oriitwa enshoni, okabwerabwera Ahabw'obubi bwawe bwona." 
Jeremiah22:23 Iwe mutuuzi wa Lebanooni 'we, Otwire omu myereezi, Eshi oryatsinda ku orihikwaho obusaasi, Waagira ebisha nk'omukazi orikwenda kuzaara!" 
Jeremiah22:24 MUKAMA naagira ati: Niinyerahira, iwe Konia mutabani wa Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda, n'obu waakuba empeta y'akamanyiso aha rukumu rw'omukono gwangye gwa buryo, nkaakuhuruuturaho," 
Jeremiah22:25 nkuhayo omu mikono y'abarikwenda kukwita, omu mikono ya Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni n'omu y'Abakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah22:26 Kandi iwe na nyoko kikuzaara ndyababinga, mbanagye omu ndiijo nsi, ei otarazaariirwemu; okwo niyo murigwa." 
Jeremiah22:27 Kwonka ensi ei baryatenga munonga kugarukamu, tibarigigarukamu." 
Jeremiah22:28 Beitu ogwo mushaija Konia t'enyungu eyatikire erikugaywa, Ei omuntu weena atarikwetaho? Ahabw'enki we n'abaana be nibabingwa, Kunagwa omu nsi ei batarikumanya?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Iwe nsi 'we, nsi 'we, nsi 'we, hurira ekigambo kya MUKAMA!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Muhandiikye ogu mushaija nk'encwekye, Omushaija otariba gye mu biro bye; Ahabw'okuba tihariho w'omu ruzaaro rwe n'omwe oriba gye, Akaza aha ngoma ya Daudi, Akagaruka kutegyeka Yuda." 
Jeremiah23:1 MUKAMA naagira ati: Abariisa, abahwerekyereza entaama z'omu iriisizo, kandi bakazitaataanisa, baryakareeba." 
Jeremiah23:2 Nikyo MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugambira aha bariisa abarikureeberera abantu bangye, naagira ati: Mutaataaniise obusyo bwangye, mwabubinga, timwabutaho mutima. Reeba, naanye ndyabafubira mbarute ebibi ebi murikukora; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:3 Bwanyima ndyataaruura ab'obusyo bwangye abaritsigaraho, mbaihe omu nsi ezi naababingiiremu, mbagarure omu ka yaabo, bazaare, bakanye;" 
Jeremiah23:4 mbateho abariisa abaribataho omutima, tibaritiina bundi, n'obu kwakuba okuhahaaza omutima, kandi tiharigira n'omwe owaabura; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:5 MUKAMA naagira ati: Reeba, obunaku buryahika, nyimukize Daudi Eitaagi erihikiriire, ategyekye nk'omugabe, akorese obwengye, akore eby'oburyo n'eby'okuhikiirira omu nsi." 
Jeremiah23:6 Omu biro bye Yuda eryajunwa na Israeli etuure buhooro. Kandi eri niryo iziina eri aryetwa, MUKAMA OKUHIKIIRIRA kwaitu." 
Jeremiah23:7 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: N'ahabw'ekyo reeba, obunaku buryahika obu abantu bariba batakigira bati: Nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire, owaihire Abaisraeli omu nsi ya Misri;" 
Jeremiah23:8 kureka bati: Nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire, owaareetsire baijukuru b'enju ya Israeli, akabeebembera naabaiha omu nsi y'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'omu nsi zoona ezi yaabaire ababingiiremu. Obwo nibwo barituura omu nsi yaabo ey'obuzaarwa." 
Jeremiah23:9 Ebya baanabi; Omutima gwangye omuhanda gucwekire, Amagufa gangye goona gajogajogokire, Ninshusha omusinzi, Kandi ndi nk'omuntu orembiirwe viinyo, Ahabwa MUKAMA n'ahabw'ebigambo bye ebirikwera." 
Jeremiah23:10 Ahabw'okuba ensi eijwire abashambani, Kandi omukyeeno gureeteire ensi okuborooga, N'amariisizo g'omu ihamba goomire; Emitwarize yaabo ni mibi, N'amaani gaabo ti marungi." 
Jeremiah23:11 MUKAMA naagira ati: Baanabi n'abanyamurwa tibarikutiina Ruhanga, Kandi n'omu nju yangye nshangiremu obubi bwabo." 
Jeremiah23:12 N'ahabw'ekyo omuhanda guryababeera Nk'akahanda akarikuteerera omu mwirima, Aku baribingirwamu, bakakagwamu; Ahabw'okuba ndyabareetaho akabi Omu biro by'okufubirwa kwabo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:13 Omuri baanabi ba Samaria Nkareebamu ekintu ky'obushema; Oku baabaire bahanuura omu iziina rya Baali, Bakahabisa abantu bangye Israeli." 
Jeremiah23:14 Kwonka omuri baanabi b'omuri Yerusaalemu Nkareebamu ekirikureetera omuntu kushishwa, Oku baabaire bashambana, bakabeiha; Kandi bakaha emikono y'enkozi z'ebibi amaani, Hakabura owaahinduka kureka obubi bwe; Boona bakambeera nk'aba Sodoma, N'abatuuzi baamwo nk'aba Gomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 Nikyo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugambira ahari baanabi abo ati: Reeba, niinyija kubagaburira apusinto, Mbanywaise amaizi garimu obushegu; ahabw'okuba omuri baanabi b'omuri Yerusaalemu Harugiremu okutatiina Ruhanga, kwabuga ensi yoona." 
Jeremiah23:16 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Mutahurira ebigambo ebi baanabi barikubahanuurira, bakabeesigisa ebitariho, nibagamba eby'okworekwa ebirugire omu biteekateeko byabo, ebitarugire omu kanwa kangye." 
Jeremiah23:17 Baguma nibagambira abarikungaya, nibagira bati: MUKAMA agizire ati: Muryaba gye; kandi bagambira omuntu weena orikukuratira ebi omutima gwe gurikwenda, bati: Tihariho kabi koona akarikuhikwaho." 
Jeremiah23:18 N'oha omuribo oragiire omu ishengyero rya MUKAMA Okwetegyereza n'okuhurira ekigambo kye? Nari n'oha orataire omutima Aha kigambo kye, akakihurira?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Reeba eihunga rya MUKAMA! Ekiniga kye kyashohoire! Eego, omuyaga gw'akasooroora gwaza kuteera emitwe y'ababi." 
Jeremiah23:20 Ekiniga kya MUKAMA tikirigarukayo, Okuhitsya obu ariheza kufubira N'okuhikiiriza ebi arikwenda kukora. Omu biro by'aha muheru nibwo murikimanyira kimwe." 
Jeremiah23:21 Baanabi abo tiinye naabatumire, Kwonka bakarahuka, baayetumisiriza. Tindabagambiire, kwonka bakahanuura." 
Jeremiah23:22 Kwonka kuri baagiire omu ishengyero ryangye, Bakaagambiire abantu bangye ebigambo byangye, Nabo bahinduka bareka emihanda yaabo mibi N'obubi bw'ebi barikukora." 
Jeremiah23:23 MUKAMA naagira ati: Nimugira ngu ndi Ruhanga wa haihi kwonka, otari Ruhanga wa hare munonga?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Kandi naagira ati: Hariho owaakubaasa kweshereka aheekiikire, ntamureebe? Tiinyijwire eiguru n'ensi? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:25 Mpuriire ebi baanabi baagambire nibahanuura ebishuba omu iziina ryangye, nibagira bati: Ndootsire! Ndootsire!" 
Jeremiah23:26 Mbwenu ebyo biryahitsya hi okuguma omu mitima ya baanabi abarikuhanuura ebishuba n'eby'obugobya bw'omu mitima yaabo," 
Jeremiah23:27 abarikuteekateeka kwebesa abantu bangye eiziina ryangye, ahabw'ebirooto byabo ebi barikurootororerana, nk'oku baishenkurubo baayebirwe eiziina ryangye ahabwa Baali?" 
Jeremiah23:28 Nabi oine eki arootsire, akirootorore; kandi n'oine ekigambo kyangye, akigambe n'obwesigwa. Ebishushunga biine kakwate ki n'engano? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:29 Ekigambo kyangye tikiri nk'omuriro, nari nk'enyondo erikwatagura orukiri? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:30 N'ahabw'ekyo reeba, naaba omuzigu wa baanabi abarikwibana ebigambo byangye; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:31 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Reeba, naaba omuzigu wa baanabi abarikugambira eryo n'endimi zaabo nibagira bati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:32 Reeba, naaba omuzigu w'abarikuhanuura ebirooto by'ebishuba, bakabirootorora, bakahabya abantu bangye n'ebishuba byabo n'okugambira eryo kwabo, haza ntabatumire n'obu kwakuba okubaragiira; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. N'ahabw'ekyo tibaine ki barikugasira aba bantu na kakye; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:33 Omwe ahari aba bantu nari nabi nainga omunyamurwa ku haraagire owaakubuuza naagira ati: Omutwaro gwa MUKAMA niki? obagire oti: Ogwo mutwaro niimwe, kandi ndyabanagira kimwe; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah23:34 Kandi nabi ogwo nari omunyamurwa, nari omwe aha bantu orikugira oti: Omutwaro gwa MUKAMA, ndyafubira ogwo muntu n'eka ye." 
Jeremiah23:35 Oku nikwo buri muntu aribiiza mutaahi we na buri muntu mwene ishe ati: MUKAMA akugarukiremu ki? nari ati: MUKAMA agambire ki? 
Jeremiah23:36 Kwonak mutarigaruka kugamba Omutwaro gwa MUKAMA obundi, ahabw'okuba ogwo mutwaro n'ekigambo eki buri muntu ayegunziire, kandi mutuura nimukiikamya ebigambo bya Ruhanga ohuriire, MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah23:37 oku nikwo oribuuza nabi ogwo oti: MUKAMA akugarukiremu ki? nari oti MUKAMA agambire ki? 
Jeremiah23:38 Kwonka ku murigira muti: Omutwaro gwa MUKAMA, oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'okugamba ekigambo eki muti, Omutwaro gwa MUKAMA, haza naabaire naabatumireho nti: Mutarigira muti, Omutwaro gwa MUKAMA," 
Jeremiah23:39 n'ahabw'ekyo reeba, buzimazima ndyabakiriza mbanagye, mundugye omumaisho, imwe n'orurembo oru naabahaire na baashwenkuriimwe," 
Jeremiah23:40 mbareeteho ekijumo ekitarihwaho, n'enshoni ez'ebiro n'ebiro ezitaryeba." 
Jeremiah24:1 Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni ku yaaherize kwiha Yekonia mwene Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda Yerusaalemu, yaamutwara Babulooni ari enkwatwa, hamwe n'abanyiginya ba Yuda n'ababaizi n'abaheesi, MUKAMA yaanyoreka okworekwa oku. Reeba, ebiibo bibiri by'emitiini bikaba bitairwe omu maisho ga hekalu ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah24:2 Ekiibo kimwe kikaba kirimu emitiini mirungi munonga nk'ey'okubanza; kwonka ekya kabiri kikaba kirimu emitiini mibi munonga, etarikubaasa kuriibwa." 
Jeremiah24:3 MUKAMA yangira ati: Yeremia, nooreba ki? Naanye nti: Nindeeba emitiini, emirungi ni mirungi munonga, n'emibi ni mibi munonga etarikubaasa kuriibwa." 
Jeremiah24:4 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah24:5 Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Nk'oku egi mitiini eri mirungi, nikwo ndibara Abayuda abatwairwe bari enkwatwa kuba barungi, abu naabingire omu mwanya ogu, nkabatwara omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ndyaguma mbataireho amaisho kubagirira gye, mbagarure omuri egi nsi. Ndyabombeka, tindibasheenya; ndyababyara, tindibakuura." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndyabaha omutima gw'okummanya ku niinye MUKAMA; kandi baryaba abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo, ahabw'okuba baryangarukira n'omutima gwabo gwona." 
Jeremiah24:8 Kwonka oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Nk'emitiini egyo emibi munonga etarikubaasa kuriibwa, oku eri, nikwo nditwaza Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda, abanyiginya be, n'abantu abaahonokireho omuri Yerusaalemu, bakatsigara omu nsi egi, kandi n'abatwire omu nsi ya Misri," 
Jeremiah24:9 mbahindure eky'okunaganwa omu bugabe bwona obw'omu nsi, babe eky'okujumwa, eky'okucweraho enfumu, ekigaaniizo n'eky'okukyeenwa omu myanya yoona ei ndibabingiramu." 
Jeremiah24:10 Kandi ndyabaitsa rurara, mbateeze enjara n'orufu, okuhitsya obu barimarirwaho kimwe omu nsi ei naabahaire na baishenkurubo." 
Jeremiah25:1 Omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda (nigwo mwaka gw'okubanza gwa Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni), ekigambo kikaija ahari Yeremia, nikigamba aha Bayuda boona." 
Jeremiah25:2 Nabi Yeremia ogwo yaakigambira Abayuda boona n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu boona, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah25:3 Okwiha omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'eshatu ogwa Yosia mwene Amoni omugabe wa Yuda okuhitsya hati, mmazire emyaka makumi abiri n'eshatu ekigambo kya MUKAMA nikiinyijaho, kandi ntuura nimbagambira, kwonka mukanga kuhurira." 
Jeremiah25:4 Mukanga kuhurira n'obu kwakuba okutega amatu, n'obu MUKAMA araabe atuura naabatumaho abairu be baanabi boona naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah25:5 Muhindukye hati, buri muntu omuriimwe arekye emitwarize ye mibi, n'ebibi ebi arikukora, mugume omu nsi ei MUKAMA yaabahaire na baashwenkuriimwe kuba eyaanyu okwiha ira okuhitsya ebiro byona;" 
Jeremiah25:6 kandi murekye kukuratira baaruhanga abandi kubaheereza n'okubaramya, murekye kungwisa kubi n'ebi murikukora n'emikono yaanyu. Obwo nibwo ntaribakora kubi." 
Jeremiah25:7 Kwonka na hati timukanyorobeire, kureka nimukingwisa kubi n'ebi murikukora n'emikono yaanyu, kwereetera akabi; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah25:8 Nikyo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Ahabw'owanga kworobera ebigambo byangye," 
Jeremiah25:9 reeba, niinyija kutuma aha nganda zoona ez'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'aha mwiru wangye Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni, baije, mboohereze kuteera egi nsi n'abatuuzi baamwo, n'amahanga aga goona agabeehinduririize. Ndyabacwekyerereza kimwe, mbagire ekirikutiinisa, n'eky'okweshaanyua, n'eky'okujumwa ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah25:10 Kandi ndyabamaramu eiraka ry'okwesiima n'ery'okushemererwa, erya kishwera n'erya kishwerwa, ery'orubengo n'okwaka kw'etabaaza." 
Jeremiah25:11 Egi nsi yoona eryaba amatongo n'eihamba, kandi ago mahanga garyamara emyaka makumi mushanju nigaheereza omugabe wa Babulooni." 
Jeremiah25:12 Bwanyima egyo myaka makumi mushanju ku erihwa, ndyafubira omugabe wa Babulooni n'eryo ihanga, n'ensi y'Abakaludaaya, nimbatura eby'okushiisha byabo, mpagire eihamba ebiro byona; nkwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah25:13 Kandi ndyareeta aha nsi egyo ebigambo byona ebi naagigambireho, ebihandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo eky'ebi Yeremia yaahanwire aha mahanga goona." 
Jeremiah25:14 Ahabw'okuba amahanga maingi n'abagabe b'amaani baryabahindura abahuuku; ntyo mbazimuurire ebirikwingana n'ebi baakozire, kandi nk'emirimo y'emikono yaabo oku eri." 
Jeremiah25:15 Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, yangagambiire naagira ati: Twara eki kikopo kya viinyo y'ekiniga ekiri omu ngaro zangye, okinywaise amahanga goona, agu ndikukutumaho." 
Jeremiah25:16 Nigaija kunywa, gagwererane, gagwe eiraro, ahabwa rurara ei ndaagooherezemu." 
Jeremiah25:17 Ntyo naiha ekikopo omu ngaro za MUKAMA, naakinywaisa amahanga goona agu MUKAMA yantumaho;" 
Jeremiah25:18 Yerusaalemu n'endembo za Yuda, abagabe baayo n'abanyiginya baayo, kubahindura amatongo, eihamba, eky'okweshaanya n'eky'okukyeenwa nk'oku kiri hati;" 
Jeremiah25:19 na Faraho omugabe wa Misri, abaheereza be boona;" 
Jeremiah25:20 n'abanyiginya boona ababatwir3emu, abagabe boona ab'omu nsi ya Uuzi, n'abagabe boona ab'omu nsi y'Abafilisita (Ashekelooni, Gaaza, Ekurooni n'abatsigaire omuri Ashidoodi);" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edomu, Moabu n'Abaamojni," 
Jeremiah25:22 abagabe boona aba Tuuro, n'abagabe boona aba Sidoni, n'abagabe b'ensi za seeri y'enyanja," 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedani, Teema, Buuzi, abarikutega ebyeyera," 
Jeremiah25:24 abagabe ba Buharabu boona, n'abagabe boona ab'enganda z'ebijwangye abatwire omu ihamba," 
Jeremiah25:25 n'abagabe boona aba Zimuri, n'ab'omuri Elamu boona, n'aba Bumeedi boona," 
Jeremiah25:26 n'ab'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho boona, abari hare n'abari haihi, nk'oku barikukuratana, n'obugabe bwona obw'omu nsi yoona. Kandi ku bariheza, n'omugabe wa Babulooni aryanywa." 
Jeremiah25:27 Bwanyima obagire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Munywe, musinde, mutanakye, mugwe obutaimuka, ahabwa rurara ei ndikwoherereza kubaita." 
Jeremiah25:28 Kandi ku baraayangye kwakiira ekikopo ekiri omu ngaro zaawe kukinwa, obagire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Nimuragiirwa kukinwa!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Ahabw'okuba reeba, orurembo orurikwetererwa eiziina ryangye, ku ndaabe nirwo ntandikiireho kukora kubi, nimugira ngu imwe nimwija kutsigara mutafubiirwe? Timuribura kufubirwa; ahabw'okuba niinyija kuhuruza rurara, erwanise abatwire omu nsi boona; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Jeremiah25:30 N'ahabw'ekyo obahanuurire ebi bigambo byona, noobagira oti: MUKAMA naija kutsinda ari ahaiguru, Aimutsye eiraka rye naayema omu butaaho bwe oburikwera; Naija kutsinda n'amaani, ateere eka y'obusyo bwe, Ateere akaari nk'abarikunyuuka emizaabibu, Arwanise abatwire omu nsi boona." 
Jeremiah25:31 Obwaku nibwija kuhika aha muheru gw'ensi, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aine eki arikufa n'amahanga; Naija kutonganisa abaine omubiri boona, N'ababi abaitse rurara; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah25:32 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, akabi nikagyenda nikaranda, Nikaruga omu ihanga nikaza omu rindi; Eihunga ry'amaani niriimuka, Niritandikira aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Jeremiah25:33 Kandi abariitwa MUKAMA eryo izooba baryashangwa hoona, okuruga aha muheru gumwe gw'ensi okuhika aha gundi. Tibaricurirwa, tibarishanguruzibwa n'obu kwakuba okuziikwa, kureka baryaba nk'amasha aha itaka." 
Jeremiah25:34 Imwe bariisa 'mwe, nimucure, muboroogye, Naimwe bakama b'obusyo, mwekuringye omu iju, Ahabw'okuba ebiro by'okwitwa n'okutaataana kwanyu bihikire; Nimwija kugwa nk'empaya z'entaama ezicookirwe." 
Jeremiah25:35 Abariisa baryabura obuhungiro, Na bakama b'obusyo babure obukiriro." 
Jeremiah25:36 Nimuhurire okutaka kw'abariisa, N'okuborooga kwa bakama b'obusyo! Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA naashiisha eiriisizo ryabo," 
Jeremiah25:37 N'amaka g'amasyo g'ebusingye gasheenyukire Ahabw'ekiniga kya MUKAMA eky'amaani. 
Jeremiah25:38 Atsigireho obutaaho bwe nk'entare, Ahabw'okuba ensi yaabo ehindukire eihamba, Ahabwa rurara ya MUKAMA n'ekiniga kye kingi." 
Jeremiah26:1 Omu kutandia kw'obutegyeki bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda, ekigambo eki kikaruga ahari MUKAMA nikigira kti:" 
Jeremiah26:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Irooko oyemerere omu kikaari ky'enju ya MUKAMA, ogambire ab'omu ndembo za Yuda zoona, abatuura nibaija kuramiza omu nju ya MUKAMA, ebigambo byona ebi ndikukuragiira kubagambira; otagira ekigambo na kimwe eki waatsigayo." 
Jeremiah26:3 Obundi bakaahurira, buri muntu ahinduka, aruga omu mitwairize ye embibi, naanye mbona kwegarukamu kureka akabi akau naaba niinyenda kubareetaho nimbatura ebibi ebi barikukora." 
Jeremiah26:4 Kandi obagire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ku muraayangye kumpurira kugyendera omu biragiro byangye ebi naataire omu maisho gaanyu," 
Jeremiah26:5 n'okuta omutima aha bigambo by'abaheereza bangye baanabi, abu ntuura nimbatumaho, kwonka mutarikukyetaho," 
Jeremiah26:6 egi nju ndyagigira nka Shiilo, n'oru rurembo ndugire eky'okukyeenwa omu mahanga goona ag'omu nsi." 
Jeremiah26:7 Abanyamurwa, baanabi n'abantu boona bahurira Yeremia naagambira ebyo bigambo omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah26:8 Yeremia ku yaaherize kugamba byona ebi MUKAMA yaamuragiire kugambira abantu boona, abanyamurwa na baanabi n'abantu boona baamukwata, baagira ati: Buzimazima noija kufa." 
Jeremiah26:9 Ahabw'enki ohanwire omu iziina rya MUKAMA noogira oti: Egi nju eryaba nak Shiilo, n'oru rurembo ruryaba amatongo, rubure ow'okurutuuramu? Abantu boona baateeranira ahari Yeremia omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah26:10 Abanyiginya ba Yuda, ku baabihuriire, baaruga ow'omugabe, baija omu nju ya MUKAMA, baashutqma aharikutaahirwa omu Irembo Risya ry'enju ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah26:11 Bwanyima abanyamurwa na baanabi baagambira abanyiginya n'abantu boona bati: Ogu muntu ashemereire kucwerwa orubanja rw'okufa, ahabw'okuba ahanwire kubi ahari oru rurembo, nk'oku mubihuriire n'amatu gaanyu." 
Jeremiah26:12 Yeremia nikwo kugambira abanyiginya n'abantu boona ati: MUKAMA antumire kuhanuura aha nju egi n'ahari oru rurembo ebigambo ebi byona ebi muhuriire, ebirirubaho." 
Jeremiah26:13 Mbwenu mushemeze emitwarize yaanyu n'ebi murikukora, kandi mworobere eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu; na MUKAMA naija kwegarukamu, arekye akabi akau abagambireho." 
Jeremiah26:14 Kwonka nyowe reeba, ndi omu mikono yaanyu. Munkore eki murikusiima ngu ni kirungi kandi kihikire." 
Jeremiah26:15 Kwonka mumanyire kimwe ngu, ku muraanyite, nimuba mwereetsireho eshagama y'otaine rubanja, kandi n'ahari oru rurembo n'abatuuzi baarwo; ahabw'okuba buzimazima MUKAMA niwe abantumireho kubagambira ebyo bigambo." 
Jeremiah26:16 Bwanyima abanyiginya n'abantu boona baagambira abanyamurwa na baanabi bati: ogu muntu tashemereire kucwerwa rubanja rw'okufa, ahabw'okuba atugambiire omu iziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah26:17 Bamwe aha bakuru b'omuri egyo nsi baagambira abantu abateeraniire sho, bati:" 
Jeremiah26:18 Omu busingye bwa Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda Miika owa Moresheesi akahanuura, yaagira Abayuda boona ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Saayuuni eryahingwa nk'omusiri, Yerusaalemu ebe emituumo y'ebisheenyuka, N'orushozi rw'enju ya MUKAMA rube nk'akabungo kashwekirwe ekibira." 
Jeremiah26:19 Nimugira ngu Hezekia omugabe wa Yuda n'Abayuda boona bakamwita? Timurikumanya ku yaatiinire MUKAMA, akamweshengyereza kumugirira embabazi, MUKAMA akeegarukamu, akareka akabi aku yaabagambireho? Kwonka itwe nitwenda kwereetaho akabi kahango." 
Jeremiah26:20 Kandi hakaba hariho ondiijo mushaija owaahanwire omu iziina rya MUKAMA, owaabaire naayetwa Uria mwene Shemaaya owa Kiryasi-yearimu. Nawe akahanuura ahari oru rurembo n'ahari egi ensi ebigambo ebirikushushana n'ebya Yeremia." 
Jeremiah26:21 Omugabe Yehoyakimu hamwe n'amamanzi ge goona n'abanyiginya be boona, ku baahuriire ebigambo bye, omugabe yaayenda kumweita; kwonka Uria ku yaakihuriire, yaatiina, yaacwa, yaahungira Misri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Bwanyima omugabe Yehoyakimu yaatuma abantu Misri, Elinasani mwene Akiboora n'abandi abu yaabaire aine," 
Jeremiah26:23 baihayo Uria, baamureetera omugabe Yehoyakimu, yaamwitsa rurara, omutumbi gwe baagunaga omu iziikiro ry'abantu b'obutoosha." 
Jeremiah26:24 Kwonka Ahikaamu mwene Shafani yaarwana ahari Yeremia, tiyaaheebwayo mu mikono y'abantu kwitwa." 
Jeremiah27:1 Omu kutandika kw'obutegyeki bwa Zedekia mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda, ekigambo eki kikaija ahari Yeremia nikiruga ahari MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah27:2 Yeremia yaagira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA angambiire naagira ati: Yesharire enkoba, oyebaijere emigamba, obite omu bitysa." 
Jeremiah27:3 Bwanyima otume aha mugabe wa Edomu, owa Moabu, ow'Abaamoni, owa Tuuro n'owa Sidoni, obatumeho entumwa eziizire Yerusaalemu ahari Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Ozitume ahari bakama baazo oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Oku nikwo muraagambire bakama baanyu muti:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Niinye naahangire ensi n'abantu n'enyamaishwa ebigirimu, nkabihangisa obushoboorozi bwangye bwingi n'omukono gwangye ogugoroirwe, kandi ningiha weena ou ndikusiima." 
Jeremiah27:6 Mbwenu hati ezi nsi zoona naaziha omwiru wangye Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni, kandi naamuha n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa zoona kumuheereza." 
Jeremiah27:7 Amahanga goona garyamukorera, n'omwana we n'omwijukuru, okuhitsya obu obunaku bw'ensi ye burihika; bwanyima amahanga maingi n'abagabe g'amaani baryamugira omuhuuku waabo." 
Jeremiah27:8 Kwonka eihanga ryona nari obugabe bwona, oburyanga kuheereza Nebukadeneeza ogwo, omugabe wa Babulooni, n'okwikiriza kwinika ebitsya kutegyekwa ogwo mugabe, ndyafubira eryo ihanga na rurara n'enjara n'orufu, okuhitsya obu ndirimarisaho oukono gwe; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah27:9 N'ahabw'ekyo murekye kuhurira baanabi baanyu, abafumu baanyu, nari abarogi baanyu, abarikubagira bati: Timuriheereza omugabe wa Babulooni;" 
Jeremiah27:10 ahabw'okuba ebi barikubahanuurira n'ebishuba ebirikwija kubareetera okutwarwa hare n'ensi yaanyu; kandi naanye ndyabgibabingamu, muhwerekyerere." 
Jeremiah27:11 Kwonka eihanga ryona eririikiriza kwinika ebitsya kutegyekwa omugabe wa Babulooni n'okumuheereza, eryo niryo ndireka omu nsi yaaryo kugihinga n'okugituuramu; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah27:12 Bwanyima naagambira Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda omu muringo nk'ogwo, ningira nti: Mwinikye ebitsya byanyu, mutegyekwe omugabe wa Babulooni, mumuheereze, we n'abantu be, mubone kugumaho." 
Jeremiah27:13 Mbwenu iwe n'abantu baawe ku mwakwitwa rurara n'enjara n'orufu, nk'oku MUKAMA agambire aha ihanga ryona eririkwanga kuheereza omugabe wa Babulooni, mukaazira ki?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Mutahurira ebigambo bya baanabi abarikubagira bati: Timuriheereza omugabe wa Babulooni; ahabw'okuba ebi barikubahanuurira n'ebishuba. 
Jeremiah27:15 Tiinye mbatumire, kureka nibahanuura ebishuba omu iziina ryangye; ekiraarugyemu ndyababinga omuri egi nsi, muhwerekyerere, imwe na baanabi abarikubahanuurira; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah27:16 Bwanyima naagambira abanyamurwa n'abantu abo boona nti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Mutahurira ebi baanabi barikubahanuurira nibagira bati: Reeba, ebintu by'omu nju ya MUKAMA nibiija kwihwa Babulooni, bigarurwe juba; ahabw'okuba ebi barikubahanuurira n'ebishuba." 
Jeremiah27:17 Mutabahurira; muheereze omugabe wa Babulooni, mubone kugimaho. Mbwenu oru rurembo ku rwakuhinduka amatongo, rukaazira ki?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Ku baraabe bari baanabi, kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA ku kiraabe kiri hamwe nabo, nibeeshengyereze MUKAMA ow'amahe, ebintu ebitsigaire omu nju ya MUKAMA n'omu nju y'omugabe wa Yuda kandi n'omuri Yerusaalemu birekye kutwarwa Babulooni." 
Jeremiah27:19 Ahabw'okuba oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba aha nyomyo, ekitanka, ebitebe by'ebinaabiro, n'ebindi bintu ebitsigaire omuri oru rurembo," 
Jeremiah27:20 ebi Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni ataratwaire, obu yaatwara Yekonia mwene Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda, naamwiha Yerusaalemu akamutwara Babulooni ari enkwatwa hamwe n'abakungu ba Yuda n'aba Yerusaalemu-" 
Jeremiah27:21 naagira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba aha bintu ebitsigaire omu nju ya MUKAMA n'omu nju y'omugabe wa Yuda n'omuri Yerusaalemu, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Biryatwarwa Babulooni, kandi niyo biriguma okuhitsya aha izooba eri ndibiijukiraho. Bwanyima ndyabigarura, mbite omuri ogu mwanya." 
Jeremiah28:1 Omuri ogwo mwaka aha kutandika kw'obutegyeki bwa Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda, omu kwezi kwa kataano okw'omu mwaka gwa kana, Hanania mwene Azuuri, nabi ow'omuri Gibeoni, akangambirira omu nju ya MUKAMA omu maisho g'abanyamurwa n'abantu boona naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah28:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Mpenzire omugamba gw'obutegyeki bw'omugabe wa Babulooni." 
Jeremiah28:3 Emyaka ebiri etakahweire, ndyagarura omu mwanya ogu ebintu byona eby'enju ya MUKAMA, ebi Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaihiremu, katwara Babulooni;" 
Jeremiah28:4 kandi ndyagarura Yekonia mwene Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda n'Abayuda boona abaagiire Babulooni bari enkwatwa; ahabw'okuba ndyahenda omugamba gw'obutegyeki bw'omugabe wa Babulooni. 
Jeremiah28:5 Bwanyima nabi Yeremia yaagambirira nabi Hanania omu maisho g'abanyamurwa n'abantu boona abaabaire beemereire omu nju ya MUKAMA," 
Jeremiah28:6 naagira ati: Amiina! Nkaabaasibwa ki MUKAMA akora atyo; kandi ahikiiriza ebi waahanuura, agarura omu mwanya ogu ebintu by'enju ya MUKAMA ebiri Babulooni, hamwe n'abatwairweyo boona bari enkwatwa." 
Jeremiah28:7 Kwonka hati hurira ekigambo eki ndikukugambira, iwe n'abantu boona." 
Jeremiah28:8 Baanabi aba ira abaatubandiize twembi bakahanuurira amahanga maingi n'obugabe bw'amaani, ku birihikwaho engamba, enjara n'orufu." 
Jeremiah28:9 Kwonka nabi orikuhanuura eby'obusingye, ekigambo kya nabi ogwo ku kiriba kwo, niho kirimanyirwa ngu buzimazima MUKAMA niwe yaamutumire." 
Jeremiah28:10 Bwanyima nabi Hanania yaiha emigamba eyaabaire eri aha bitsya bya nabi Yeremia, yaagihenda," 
Jeremiah28:11 kandi yaagambira omu maisho g'abantu boona ati: oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Nikwo ndihenda ntyo omugamba gw'obutegyeki bwa Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni, nkwagwiha aha bitsya by'amahanga goona, emyaka ebiri etakahweire. Kwonka nabi Yeremia yaayegyendera." 
Jeremiah28:12 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, nabi Hanania aherize kuhenda emigamba eyaabaire eri aha bitsya bya nabi Yeremia, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah28:13 Irooko ogambire Hanania oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ohenzire emigamba y'ebiti, kwonka nyowe niinyija kukora ey'ebyoma omu mwanya gwayo;" 
Jeremiah28:14 ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Ntaire omugamba gw'ekyoma aha bitsya by'ago mahanga goona kuba abahuuku ba Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni; kandi baryamuheereza, ahabw'okuba mmuhaire nangwa n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa." 
Jeremiah28:15 Kandi nabi Yeremia yaagira nabi Hanania ati: Hurira, iwe Hanania; MUKAMA takutumire, kandi oreeteire aba bantu kwesiga ebishuba." 
Jeremiah28:16 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Reeba, niinyija kukwiha omu nsi. Ogu mwaka noogufamu, ahabw'okuba ogambire eby'okugomera MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah28:17 Omuri ogwo mwaka omu kwezi kwa mushanju nabi Hanania yaafa. 
Jeremiah29:1 Ebi nibyo bigambo by'ebaruha ei bnabi Yeremia yaahandiikire ari Yerusaalemu, naahandiikira abakuru omu nkwatwa, abanyamurwa, baanabi, n'abantu boona, abu Nebukadeneeza yaihire Yerusaalemu, akatwara Babulooni bari enkwatwa." 
Jeremiah29:2 Omuri obwo bunaku omugabe Yekonia, nyina-omugabe, abakonwa, abanyiginya ba Yuda na Yerusaalemu, ababaizi n'abaheesi, bakaba barugire Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah29:3 Egyo baruha ekatwarwa Elasa mwene Shafani, na Gemaria mwene Hilukia, abu Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda yaatumire Babulooni ahari Nebukadeneeza omugabe waayo," 
Jeremiah29:4 neegira eti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugambira enkwatwa zoona, ezi yaihire Yerusaalemu akoohereza Babulooni, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Nimwombekye amaju, mugatuuremu; muhingye emisiri, murye ebi muryezamu;" 
Jeremiah29:6 mushwere abakazi, muzaare abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki; mushwererere batabani baanyu, kandi muhingire bahara baanyu, nabo bazaare abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki, mukanyireyo, murekye kutuuba." 
Jeremiah29:7 Kandi orwo rurembo oru naabatwairemu muri enkwatwa, murwendeze ebirungi, murushabire ahari MUKAMA; ahabw'okuba ku ruriba gye, naimwe muryaba gye." 
Jeremiah29:8 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Mutaikiriza baanabi n'abafumu baanyu abari omuriimwe kubahabya, kandi muteeta aha birooto ebi barikuroota," 
Jeremiah29:9 ahabw'okuba ebi barikubahanuurira omu iziina ryangye n'ebishuba. Tiinye mbatumire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah29:10 Kureka oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Emyaka makumi mushanju eyaahanwirwe ahari Babulooni ku erihwa, ndyabaayaayira, mpikiirize eki naabaraganiise, mbagarure omu mwanya ogu." 
Jeremiah29:11 Ahakuba nimmanya ebi ndikubateekateekyera, eby'oburungi, bitari by'obubi, ngu mbone kubatamu amatsiko g'ebiribaho bwanyima; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah29:12 Obwo nibwo murintakira, mukaija mukanshaba, naanye nkabahurira." 
Jeremiah29:13 Muryansherura, mumbone, ku murinsherura n'omutima gwanyu gwona." 
Jeremiah29:14 Buzimazima muryambona, kandi ndyabaiha omu bukwatwa, mbataaruure omu mahanga goona n'omu myanya yoona, ei naababingiiremu, mbagarure omu mwanya ogu naabaihiremu nimbatwara omu bukwatwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah29:15 Ahabw'okuba mugizire muti: MUKAMA atwimukiize baanabi omuri Babulooni- 
Jeremiah29:16 oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba aha mugabe ori aha ngoma ya Daudi, n'aha bantu boona abatwire omuri orwo rurembo, beene waanyu abataratwairwe naimwe mu bukwatwa," 
Jeremiah29:17 naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kubaitsa rurara, mbateeze enjara n'orufu, mbagire nk'emitiini eri emibi munonga etarikubaasa kuriibwa." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ndyabakuratsa rurara, enjara n'orufu, mbagire ekirikutiinisa aha mahanga goona ag'omu nsi, babe eky'okukyeenwa, eky'okutiinisa, eky'okweshaanya, n'ekijumo omu mahanga goona agu ndiba mbabingiiremu," 
Jeremiah29:19 ahabw'okutata mutima aha bigambo byangye, ebi naabaire ntuura nimbatumaho abairu bangye baanabi, kwonka mukanga kuhurira; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah29:20 Mbwenu muhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA, imwe mwena enkwatwa abu naabingire Yerusaalemu kuza Babulooni." 
Jeremiah29:21 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba ahari Ahabu mwene Kolaaya, na Zedekia mwene Maaseya, abarikubahanuurira ebishuba, naagira ati: Reeba, ndyabahayo omu mikono ya Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni, abaitire omu maisho gaanyu." 
Jeremiah29:22 Enkwatwa zoona eziri Babulooni ezaarugire Yuda nibo ziriihaho ekijumo nizigira ziti: MUKAMA nakakugire nka Zedekia na Ahabu, abu omugabe wa Babulooni yaayokize omu muriro" 
Jeremiah29:23 ahabw'okukora eby'obushema omuri Israeli, bakashambana n'abakazi ba bataahi baabo, bakagamba ebigambo by'ebishuba omu iziina ryangye, ebi ntarabaragiire. Niinye ndikubimanya, kandi niinye mushinja; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah29:24 Kandi mugambire Shemaanya owa Nehelaamu, muti:" 
Jeremiah29:25 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Oyeragiire, waatwekyera abantu boona ab'omuri Yerusaalemu ebaruha, na Zefania mwene Maaseya omunyamurwa, n'abanyamurwa boona noogira oti:" 
Jeremiah29:26 MUKAMA akugizire omunyamurwa omu mwanya gwa Yehoyaada omunyamurwa, kugira obushoboorozi omu nju ya MUKAMA bw'okutegyeka omushazi weena orikuhanuura, kumuboha amaguru n'okumuta omu nkomo." 
Jeremiah29:27 Mbwenu n'enki ekikuzibiire kuhana Yeremia owa Anatoosi, oyegizire nabi ahariimwe?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Ahabw'okuba itwe abari omuri Babulooni atutumireho, naagira ati: obukwatwa bwanyu nibwija kumara omwanya muhango; mbwenu mwombekye amaju, mugatuuremu; muhingye emisiri, murye ebi muryezamu." 
Jeremiah29:29 Zefania omunyamurwa, ku yaareebire egyo baruha, yaagishomera nabi Yeremia." 
Jeremiah29:30 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah29:31 Tuma aha nkwatwa zoona, ozigire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba ahari Shemaaya owa Nehelaamu, naagira ati: Ahabwa Shemaaya kubahanuurira ntamutumire, akabeesigisa ebishuba," 
Jeremiah29:32 nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Ndyafubira Shemaaya owa Nehelaamu n'abaijukuru; tarigira n'omwe oritsigara omu ihanga eri orireeba ebirungi ebi ndikorera abantu bangye, ahabw'okuba agambire eby'okungomera; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah30:1 Ekigambo ekyarugire ahari MUKAMA kikaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah30:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Handiika omu kitabo ebigambo byona ebi naakugambiire;" 
Jeremiah30:3 ahakuba reeba, obunaku buryahika, obu ndimariraho kimwe obukwatwa bw'abantu bangye Abaisraeli n'Abayuda, nkabagarura omu nsi ei naahaire baishenkurubo, kandi baryagikubuura." 
Jeremiah30:4 Ebi nibyo bigambo ebi MUKAMA yaagambire ahari Israeli na Yuda. 
Jeremiah30:5 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Tuhuriire eiraka ry'abantu abarikukangarana, Baine obwoba, kandi bataine busingye." 
Jeremiah30:6 Mbwenu mubuuze, mureebe; Omushaija naabaasa kurumwa okuzaara? Ahabw'enki nindeeba buri mushaija Ayekwaitse omu manyaanya nk'omukazi orikurumwa, Aha maisho ge hahinduriize?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Ai bambe! eshi eryo izooba rigumire, Tihaine rindi eririkushushana naryo; Nibyo biro by'enaku za Yakobo, Kwonka aryabyogamu." 
Jeremiah30:8 Kandi MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Ahari eryo izooba ndyahenda omugamba gw'obuhuuku, ngwihe aha bitsya byabo, ncwe ebibabohire; kandi abanyamahanga tibarigaruka kubagira bahuuku bundi;" 
Jeremiah30:9 kureka baryaheereza MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo na Daudi omugabe waabo, ou ndibaimukiza." 
Jeremiah30:10 N'ahabw'ekyo otatiina, iwe Yakobo omwiru wangye, Nikwo MUKAMA arikugira; Naiwe Israeli, otahahaaza omutima, Ahabw'okuba ndyakujuna, nkwihe hare, N'oruzaaro rwawe ndwihe omu nsi y'obukwatwa bwarwo. Yakobo aryagaruka, ahitsye omutima omunda, aruhuukye, Tihaine orimutiinisa." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe kukujuna; Nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. Ndyamariraho kimwe amahanga goona, Agu naakutaataanisiizemu; Kwonka iwe tindikumariraho kimwe, Kureka ndyakuteera ninkubarira; Kandi hoona tindikureka ntakufubiire." 
Jeremiah30:12 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Obusaasi bwawe ti bw'okukira, Obuhuta bwawe nibuhurura munonga," 
Jeremiah30:13 Tihaine w'okukutonganira, Tihariho mubazi gw'okubwomoora, N'obu kyakuba eky'okukutambira." 
Jeremiah30:14 Nkunzi zaawe zoona zikwebirwe, Tizaakikwetaho, Ahabw'okuba nkuhutaarize obuhuta bw'obuzigu, N'ekifubiro ky'omuzigu otaine saasi, Ahabw'okuba orubanja rwawe ni ruhango, N'ebibi byawe birengyesereize." 
Jeremiah30:15 Ahabw'enki nootakisibwa obusaasi? Okuhururwa kwawe tikurikubaasa kutambwa. Ebyo byona nkabikukorera Ahabw'orubanja rwawe ruhango, N'ahabw'ebibi byawe ebirengyesereize." 
Jeremiah30:16 N'ahabw'ekyo abarikukumaraho baryamarwaho, N'abazigu baawe boona oku baingana baryatwarwa omu bukwatwa; Abarikukunyaga baryanyagwa, N'abarikukushahura, ndyabahindura eky'okushahurwa," 
Jeremiah30:17 Ahabw'okuba ndyakugaruramu amagara, n'obuhuta bwawe mbukize, Ahakuba bakakweta encuubwa nibagira bati: Ni Saayuuni, etagira ogyetaho!" 
Jeremiah30:18 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyagarura ab'omu mahema ga Yakobo, mbaihe omu bukwatwa, Ngirire embabazi amaka ge. Orurembo ruryagaruka kwombekwa aha mituumo yaarwo, Kandi n'ekikaari kiryaza ahu kyabaire kiri." 
Jeremiah30:19 Omuribyo haryarugamu ebyeshongoro by'okusiima, N'amaraka g'abarikushemererwa. Ndyabahaisa ekitiinisa, tibariba abarikugaywa." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abaana baabo baryaba nk'oku baabaire bari ira, N'eihanga ryabo riryahamibwa omu maisho gangye, Kandi ndyafubira abarikubahata boona." 
Jeremiah30:21 Omugabe waabo aryaba omwe, Omutegyeki waabo abakomookyemu; Ndyamwiriza haihi, ampikye. Mbwenu owaakwehanga kumpika n'oha? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah30:22 Muryaba abantu bangye, Naanye mbe Ruhanga waanyu." 
Jeremiah30:23 Reeba, eihunga rya MUKAMA! Ekiniga kye kyashohora nk'omuyaga gw'akasooroora; Nikiza kuteera emitwe y'ababi." 
Jeremiah30:24 Ekiniga kya MUKAMA ekingi tikirigarukayo, Okuhitsya obu ariheza kufubira, N'okuhikiiriza ebi arikwenda kukora. Omu biro by'aha muheru nibwo murikimanyira kimwe." 
Jeremiah31:1 MUKAMA naagira ati: Omu bunaku obwo ndyaba Ruhanga w'enganda za Israeli zoona, nabo babe abantu bangye." 
Jeremiah31:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Abantu abahonokire ahari rurara, Bakagirirwa embabazi omu ihamba; Israeli ku yaasherwire oburuhuukiro," 
Jeremiah31:3 MUKAMA yaamweyoreka ari omu nsi ya hare, naagira ati: Nkakukunda na rukundo etahwaho, Nikyo ngumiire ninkugirira embabazi." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ndyagaruka nkwombekye, naiwe oyombekwe, Iwe mwishiki wa Israeli 'we oshugaine! Oryagaruka oyehunde ebitaasa, Oshohore oze kuzina n'abarikushemererwa." 
Jeremiah31:5 Oryagaruka ohingye emizaabibu Aha bibungo bya Samaria; Ababyazi baryagibyara, Bashemerererwe ebijuma byayo." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ahabw'okuba haryabaho eizooba Ei abarinzi bariimukizaho amaraka Omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu nibagira bati: Mwimukye tugyende, twinamukye Saayuuni, Tushangyeyo MUKAMA, Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah31:7 Ahabw'okuba nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Mweshongore n'okushemererwa ahabwa Yakobo, Muteere akaari ahabw'eri ihanga eririkukira agandi obukuru; Murangye, muhimbise, mugire muti: MUKAMA ajunire abantu be Abaisraeli abahonokireho." 
Jeremiah31:8 Reeba, ndyabareeta nimbaiha omu nsi y'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, Mbataaruure nimbaiha aha muheru gw'ensi, Barimu empumi, ebirema, Abakazi abaine enda, n'abarikurumwa kuzaara, Bagarukye aha, bari omutwe muhango." 
Jeremiah31:9 Baryaija nibarira, Mbeebembere, mbagarure nimbarembesereza. Ndyabarabya aha tugyera, Omu muhanda ogugororokire, omu batariteerera ntsibo, Ahakuba ahari Israeli ndi omuzaire, Kandi Efuraimu n'omujigaijo gwangye." 
Jeremiah31:10 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA, Mukirangye omu birwa ebiri hare, nimugira muti: Owaataataaniise Israeli niwe arimutaaruura, Akamurinda nk'oku omuriisa arinda obusyo bwe." 
Jeremiah31:11 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA acungwire Yakobo, Yaamwiha omu mikono y'orukumukiza amaani." 
Jeremiah31:12 Baryaija aha mutwe gw'orushozi Saayuuni, Beeshongorereyo munonga, Bashemerererwe oburungi bwa MUKAMA, Bashangyeyo engano, viinyo n'amajuta, Kandi n'abaana b'omu masyo g'entaama n'ag'ente, Amagara gaabo garyaba nk'omusiri ogurikwitirirwa amaizi; Kandi tibarigaruka kuhwa maani." 
Jeremiah31:13 Obwo nibwo abaishiki barizina, bakashemererwa, Abatsigazi n'abagurusi bakeesiimira hamwe; Ahabw'okuba okucura ndyakuhindura okushemererwa, Mbahuumurize, mbahe okwesiima omu mwanya gw'enaku;" 
Jeremiah31:14 Kandi amagara g'abanyamurwa ndyagaigutsa eby'ebishaju, Abantu bangye bahaagye oburungi bwangye; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah31:15 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Enduuru neehurirwa omuri Raama, Okucura n'okurira munonga, Rakeeli naacurira abaana be; Tarikwenda kuyaagirwa, ahabw'okuba bahweireho." 
Jeremiah31:16 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Zibira eiraka ryawe kucura, N'amaisho gaawe kuhimintikwamu amarira; Ahabw'okuba ebi orikukora biryakuhaisa ebihembo, Kandi abo baana baryaruga omu nsi y'abazigu baabo, bagarukye; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah31:17 Hakiriho amatsiko ahabw'ebirikubaho bwanyima; Abaana baawe baryagaruka omu nsi yaabo y obuzaarwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah31:18 Nkahurira Efuraimu naaborooga ati: Okampana, naahanwa Nk'ekimasha kitakeegyesiibwe kuhinga; Ongarure, mbone kugarurwa; Ahabw'okuba niiwe MUKAMA, Ruhanga wangye." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ku naaherize kuhinduka, naayeteisa; Kandi ku naaherize kwegyesibwa, naayemamaata, Naagira enshoni, naabwerabwera, Ahakuba nkaba nyekoreire ekihemu ky'obutsigazi bwangye." 
Jeremiah31:20 Efuraimu t'omwana wangye ou nkunda? T'omwana wangye enkoramutima? Ahabw'okuba kaingi, n'obu ndaabe mmugambaho, nimmuhana; Kwonka na hati ninkimwijuka. Nikyo omutima gwangye gumwiniriire orushusho. Buzimazima ndyamugirira embabazi; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah31:21 Yeteereho obumanyiso bw'omuhanda, Oyeteereho ebyapa by'okukuhabura; Oyetegyereze gye omuhanda rugyendwa, Ogu waatoire noogyenda. Garuka, iwe Israeli 'we, Ogarukye omuri ezi ndembo zaawe." 
Jeremiah31:22 Oryahitsya hi n'okukora oku n'oku, Iwe mwishiki orikugaruka enyima 'we? Ahakuba MUKAMA ahangire ekitakareebwaga mu nsi, Omukazi kurinda omushaija." 
Jeremiah31:23 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Ku ndibaiha omu bukwatwa, naabagarura, bayragaruka bakorese egi ndamutsyo omu nsi ya Yuda n'omu ndembo zaayo, nibagira bati: MUKAMA akuhe omugisha, iwe butaaho bw'okuhikiirira 'we, Ekibungo ekirikwera!" 
Jeremiah31:24 Abayuda n'ab'omu ndembo zaayo zoona baryatuurayo kumwe, abahingi n'abarikufurafuruka n'amasyoo gaabo." 
Jeremiah31:25 Ahabw'okuba ndyahaazya abaruhire, n'abahweirwemu amaani ngabagaruremu." 
Jeremiah31:26 Ahonaaho ku naasisiimukire, naashanga oturo nitukinnurira." 
Jeremiah31:27 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Reeba, obunaku nibwija, obu ndibiba omu nju ya Israeli n'omu ya Yuda embibo z'abantu n'ez'amatungo." 
Jeremiah31:28 Nk'oku naabataireho amaisho kubarandura, kubasheenya, kubakumbagaza, kubacwekyereza n'okubareetaho akabi, nikwo ndibataho amaisho kubombeka n'okubabyara, nikow MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah31:29 Omu biro ebyo tibarigaruka kugira bati: Abazaire bariire emizaabibu erikushaarira, Amaino g'abaana gaaba nigo gaagira amangigina;" 
Jeremiah31:30 kureka buri muntu aryafa azire ekibi kye, n'omuntu weena orirya emizaabibu erikushaarira, amaino ge nigo garigira amangigina." 
Jeremiah31:31 MUKAMA naagira ati: Reeba, ebiro biryaija, obu ndiragaana endagaano nsya n'enju ya Israeli n'eya Yuda," 
Jeremiah31:32 etarikushushana n'ei naaragaine na baishenkurubo, obu naabakwata aha mukono kubaiha omu nsi ya Misri; haza egyo ndagaano yangye bakagiita, n'obu ndaabe naabaire ndi ibabo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah31:33 Kureka egi niyo ndagaano ei diragaana n'enju ya Israeli bwanyima y'ebiro ebyo; ndyabatamu ebiragiro byangye, mbihandiikye omu mitima yaabo; kandi ndyaba Ruhanga waabo, nabo babe abantu bangye; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah31:34 Kandi omuntu aryaba atakyegyesa mutaahi we nari mwene ishe, naamugira ati: Manya MUKAMA; ahabw'okuba boona baryammanya okuruga aha muto okuhika aha mukuru; ahakuba ndyabasaasira eby'okushiisha byabo, n'ekibi kyabo tindikiijuka bundi; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah31:35 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugira, Oha eizooba kwakira abantu nyomushana, Akaragiira okwezi n'enyonyoozi kubamurikira nyekiro, Oreetera enyanja kwimuka, ebingonzi byayo bikahoorera, MUKAMA ow'amahe niryo iziina rye." 
Jeremiah31:36 MUKAMA ogwo naagira ati: Ebyo bintu ku byakuruga omu buteeka bwabyo omu maisho gangye, Obwo n'oruzaaro rwa Israeli rukaarekyera aho Kuba eihanga omu maisho gangye ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah31:37 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Eiguru eriri ahaiguru ku ryakubaasa kugyerwa, N'emisingi y'ensi okuzimu ekazoorwa, Obwo nkaacwa oruzaaro rwa Israeli rwona, Ndutura ebi rwakozire byona; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah31:38 Kandi MUKAMA yaagira ati: Reeba, obunaku nibwija, obu oru rurembo rurigaruka kwombekyerwa MUKAMA, okuruga aha munaara gwa Hananeeli okuhika aha Irembo ry'Akeekubo." 
Jeremiah31:39 Kandi omugoye gw'okugyeresa guryayeyongyera omumaisho, gugumizemu guhikye aha kibungo Garebu, gukube guze Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 N'oruhanga rwona, oruteebwamu emitumbi n'eiju rya kashenda, n'emisiri yoona okuhika aha kagyera Kidirooni, n'okuhika aha keekubo k'aha Irembo ry'Embaraasi eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba, biryayerezibwa MUKAMA. Orwo rurembo tiruriihwaho bundi n'obu kwakuba okusheenywa ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah32:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi ogw'omu bisingye bwa Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda, nigwo mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana gwa Nebukadeneeza, ekigambo kikaruga ahari MUKAMA, kyaija ahari Yeremia." 
Jeremiah32:2 Omu bunaku obwo eihe ry'omguabe wa Babulooni rikaba rigootsire Yerusaalemu, kandi nabi Yeremia akaba akomeirwe omu kibuga ky'abarinzi ekiri omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Ahakuba Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda akaba amutaire omu kihome, naamugira ati: Ahabw'enki noohanuura, okagira oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, oru rurembo niinyija kuruhayo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Babulooni, arukwate;" 
Jeremiah32:4 na Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda tarikira Bakaludaaya, kureka buzimazima aryaheebwayo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Babulooni, bagambe hamwe nibareebana;" 
Jeremiah32:5 bwanyima aryatwara Zedekia Babulooni; okwo niyo ariguma okuhitsya obu ndimutaayaayira; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. N'obu murirwanisa Abakaludaaya, timuribabaasa." 
Jeremiah32:6 Yeremia yaagira ati: Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kiinyizireho nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah32:7 Reeba, Hanameeli, mwene Shalumu shwento, naija kukwijaho akugire ati: Gura ekibanja kyangye ekiri Anatoosi; ahabw'okuba niiwe oine obushoboorozi bw'okukicungura, okakigura." 
Jeremiah32:8 Bwanyima Hanameeli mwene tatento yanshanga omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, nk'oku ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyabaire kiri, yangira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, gura ekibanja kyangye ekiri Anatoosi omu ishaza rya Benyamiini; ahabw'okuba niiwe oine obushoboorozi bw'okukihungura n'okukicungura; mbwenu okyegurire. Ntyo naamanyira aho ku ekyo kigambo kirugire ahari MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah32:9 Bwnayima naagura ekyo kibanja ekyabaire kiri Anatoosi hari Hanameeli mwene tatento, naamupimira obuguzi bwakyo, shekeli z'efeeza ikumi na mushanju." 
Jeremiah32:10 Naata omukono aha ndagaano, naagitaho akamanyiso, naareeta baakareebi, naapima efeeza aha minzaani." 
Jeremiah32:11 Bwanyima naatwara endagaano y'okugura eitairweho akamanyiso, hamwen na kopi yaayo etakubire, nk'ebiragiro n'emigyenzo byabyo oku byabaire biri;" 
Jeremiah32:12 egyo ndagaano naagiheera Baruki mwene Neria, mwijukuru wa Maaseya, omu maisho ga Hanameeli mwene tatento, n'omu maisho ga baakareebi abataire emikono aha ndagaano, kandi n'omu maisho g'Abaydaaya boona abaabaire bashutami omu kibuga ky'abarinzi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Naayehanangiririza Baruki omu maisho gaabo nti: 
Jeremiah32:14 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Twara ezi ndagaano z'okugura, egi etairweho akamanyiso n'etakubire, ozite omu nyungu y'eibumba, zibone kumara ebiro bingi." 
Jeremiah32:15 Ahabw'okuba oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Amaju n'emisiri n'emisiri y'emizaabibu, biryagaruka bigurwe omu nsi egi." 
Jeremiah32:16 Ku naaherize kuha Baruki mwene Neria egyo ndagaano y'okugura, naashaba MUKAMA ningira nti:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Ai Mukama RUHANGA, niiwe waahangiise eiguru n'ensi obushoboorozi bwawe n'omukono gwawe ogugoroire. Tihariho kintu na kimwe ekikurema." 
Jeremiah32:18 Iwe ogirira embabazi abantu enkumi n'enkumi. Kwonka ohoora abaana noobatura ebibi bya baihsenkurubo. Ori Ruhanga omukuru; MUKAMA ow'amahe niryo iziina ryawe. 
Jeremiah32:19 Ori rugambwa omu naama, kandi omu kukora ori ow'amaani; amaisho gaawe gareeba emitwarize y'abantu yoona, noozimuurira buri muntu nk'emitwarize ye n'ebirugire omu bi akaozire oku biri." 
Jeremiah32:20 Niiwe waayorekire obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza omu nsi ya Misri, okaguma noobyoreka omu Baisraeli n'omu bantu boona n'okuhitysa hati, kandi okeetungira eiziina, nk'oku kiri hati." 
Jeremiah32:21 Okaiha abantu baawe Abaisraeli omuri Misri, waabaihisayo obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza n'omukono gw'amaani ogubangire n'okutiinsia kwingi;" 
Jeremiah32:22 waabaha ensi egi, ei waarahiire kuha baishenkurubo, ensi y'amate n'obwoki," 
Jeremiah32:23 baagizamu, baagikubuura; kwonak tibaayorobera iraka ryawe, n'obu kwakuba okugyendera omu biragiro byawe; tibaagira kintu na kimwe eki baakora omu bi waabaragiire byona. Nikyo waabareeteireho akabi aka koona." 
Jeremiah32:24 Reeba eby'okutemberaho bigootsire orurembo; baahikire aha rurembo kurukwata; kandi orurembo ruhairweyo omu mikono y'Abakaludaaya, abarikururwanisa, ahabwa rurara n'enjara n'orufu. Ebi waagambire byona bihikiriire; naiwe nookireeba." 
Jeremiah32:25 Kwonka ai Mukama RUHANGA, n'obu orurembo ruraabe ruhairweyo omu mikono y'Abakaludaaya, ongizire oti: Gura ekyo kibanja n'efeeza, kandi ogire baakareebi." 
Jeremiah32:26 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah32:27 Reeba, ndi MUKAMA, Ruhanga w'ebiine omubiri byona; hariho ekirikundema?" 
Jeremiah32:28 N'ahabw'ekyo, oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, naaza kuhayo oru rurembo omu mikono y'Abakaludaaya n'omu mikono ya Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni, arukwate." 
Jeremiah32:29 Abakaludaaya abarikururwanisa nibaija kwija, barutwekyemu omuriro, barwotsye, hamwe n'amaju agu batuura nibootererera aha mitwe yaago Baali obubaane, bakashukiriraho baaruhanga abandi empongano z'eby'okunywa, kungwisa kubi." 
Jeremiah32:30 Ahakuba Abaisraeli n'Abayuda, okwiha omu buto bwabo, tibaine kindi eki barakozire omu maisho gangye kureka ebibi byonka; kandi Abaisraeli tibaine kindi eki barakozire kureka okungwisa kubi n'ebi bakora; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah32:31 Oru rurembo rukanyitsa ekiniga, rwangwisa kubi, okwiha aha izooba eri rwayombekyeirweho n'okuhitsya hati; n'ahabw'ekyo niinyija kurwiha omu maisho gangye," 
Jeremiah32:32 nintura Abaisraeli n'Abayuda ebibi byona ebi baakozire kungwisa kubi, abagabe baabo, abanyiginya baabo, abanyamurwa baabo, baanabi baabo, abantu ba Yuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah32:33 Omu mwanya gw'okuntaho amaisho bakanteera omugongo; kandi n'obu ndaabe ntuura nimbegyesa, tibakategaga matu kuhurira okwegyesibwa." 
Jeremiah32:34 Bakata ebirikunugwa byabo omu nju erikwetererwa eiziina ryangye kugihagara. 
Jeremiah32:35 Bakombekyera Baali emyanya mikuru y'okuramizamu omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinoomu, kuhongyererayo Moleki abaana baabo b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki, eki ntarabaragiire, kandi ekitakaijaga mu biteekateeko byangye, ngu bakore ekirikunugwa ekyo okusiisisa Yuda." 
Jeremiah32:36 N'ahabw'ekyo oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba ahari oru rurembo oru orikugira ngu ruhairweyo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Babulooni kwitwa rurara, enjara n'orufu," 
Jeremiah32:37 naagira ati: Reeba, ndyabataaruura, mbaihe omu nsi zoona ezi naababingiiremu, ngwirwe kubi, nyine ekiniga, kandi nyine ekiniga kingi, mbagarure omuri ogu mwanya, mbatuuzemu buhooro." 
Jeremiah32:38 Kandi baryaba abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndyabaha omutima gumwe n'emitwarize emwe, babone kuntiina ebiro byona, babe gye, bo n'abaana baabo abarikurataho." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndyaragaana nabo endagaano etarihwaho, ku ntarireka kubakorera gye, kandi ndyata okuntiina omu mitima yaabo, ngu barekye kundugaho." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ndyashemerererwa okubakora gye, mbabyare omuri egi nsi omu mazima n'omutima gwangye gwona n'amagara gangye goona." 
Jeremiah32:42 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Nk'oku naareetsire ako kabi kahango koona ahari aba bantu, nikwo ndibareetaho ntyo ebirungi byona ebi ndikubaraganisa." 
Jeremiah32:43 Bwnayima egi nsi, ei murikugirangu n'amatongo, etarimu bantu nari amatungo, kureka ehairweyo omu mikono y'Abakaludaaya, niyo muriguramu ebibanja." 
Jeremiah32:44 Abantu baryagura ebibanja n'empiiha, bahandiikye endagaano z'okugura, baziteho emikono n'akamanyiso kandi zigire na baakareebi, omu ishaza rya Benyamiini, omu myanya eyehinguririize Yerusaalemu, omu ndembo za Yuda, omu ndembo z'omu nsi y'ebibungo, omu z'omu mpita n'omu ndembo z'omuri Negebu; ahabw'okuba ndyagarura abantu baabo abaatwairwe omu bukwatwa." 
Jeremiah33:1 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyaija ahari Yeremia obwa kabiri, obu yaabaire akikingirainwe omu kibuga ky'abarinzi nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah33:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, owaahangire ensi, akagikora kugihamya, MUKAMA niryo iziina rye, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Onyete, nkwetabe, nkugambire ebikuru eby'omubonano, ebi otakamanyaga." 
Jeremiah33:4 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba aha maju g'omuri oru rurembo, n'ahari zaanyaruju z'abagabe ba Yuda ezaasheenyirwe, ngu ebisheenyuka babone kubikumiiriza abarikutemba aha by'okutemberaho, n'abarikurwansia rurara, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah33:5 Abakaludaaya nibaija kwija kurwana n'okwijuza ago maju emitumbi y'abantu, abu ndiita ngwirwe kubi, nyine ekiniga kingi; ahabw'okuba obubi bwabo bwona bundeeteire kwima oru rurembo amaisho." 
Jeremiah33:6 Reeba, ndyarureetera okuba gye, ndutambire, n'abantu baamwo mbakize, mboorekye obusingye bwingi n'amazima." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ndyagarura aha buteeka Abayuda n'Abaisraeli abaatwairwe omu bukwatwa, ngarukye mbombekye, babe nk'oku baabaire bari okubanza." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ndyabashemeza, mbaiheho orubanja rwona orw'ebibi ebi bancumwireho; kandi ndyabasaasira eby'okushiisha byabo byona, ebi bancumwireho n'ebi baakozire nibangomera." 
Jeremiah33:9 Kandi orurembo oru ruryambeera eiziina ry'okushemererwa, n'eky'okumpimbisisa, n'okumpaisa ekitiinisa omu maisho g'amahanga goona ag'omu nsi yoona, agarihurira ebirungi byona ebi ndikubakorera; kandi baryatiina, bateteme ahabw'ebirungi byona n'obusingye bwona obu nduhaire." 
Jeremiah33:10 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ogu mwanya ogu murikugira ngu n'amatongo, tigurimu bantu nari amatungo, n'endembo za Yuda, n'enguuto za Yerusaalemu, ezibaire amatongo, ezitaine bantu bazitwiremu n'obu gaakuba amatungo," 
Jeremiah33:11 nigwo gurigaruka kuhurirwamu eiraka ry'okushemererwa n'okwesiima, eiraka rya kishwera na kishwerwa, n'amaraka g'abarikweshongora, nibareeta omu nju ya MUKAMA empongano z'okusiima nibagira bati: Musiime MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ahabw'okuba ni murungi, Kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona. Ahakuba ndyagarura ensi aha buteeka nk'oku yaabaire eri okubanza; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah33:12 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Omwanya ogu ogwabaire amatongo ogutarimu bantu nari amatungo, n'endembo zaagwo zoona, nigwo gurigaruka kuba obutaaho bw'abariisa, omu barizaagiza amasyo gaabo." 
Jeremiah33:13 Endembo z'omu nsi y'ebibungo, ez'omu mpita, ez'omuri Negebu, omu ishaza rya Benyamiini, emyanya eyehinguririize Yerusaalemu, n'endembo za Yuda, amasyo garyagaruka kuraba ahansi y'omukono gw'orikugabara; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah33:14 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Reeba, obunaku nibwija obu ndihikiiriza eki naaraganiise neju ya Israeli n'eya Yuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Omuri ebyo biro n'omuri obwo bunaku ndyamereza Daudi Eitaagi ry'okuhikiirira, kandi Itaagi ogwo aryahikiiriza emanja z'oburyo n'okuhikiirira omu nsi." 
Jeremiah33:16 Omuri ebyo biro Yuda aryajunwa, Yerusaalemu etuure buhooro. Kandi eri niryo iziina eri eryetwa, MUKAMA Kuhikiirira kwaitu." 
Jeremiah33:17 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Daudi taribura muntu w'okushutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bw'enju ya Israeli; 
Jeremiah33:18 n'abanyamurwa Abaleevi tibaribura muntu w'okuunyemerera omumaisho kutamba ebitambo by'okwotsya, n'okwotsya empongano z'esaano n'okutamba ebitambo obutwire bwona." 
Jeremiah33:19 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah33:20 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ku mwakuba nimubaasa kwita endagaano yangye, ei naaragaine na nyomushana na nyekiro birekye kubaho omu bunaku bwabyo," 
Jeremiah33:21 n'endagaano ei naaragaine n'omwiru wangye Daudi ekaafa, abura omwana w'okuza aha ngoma kutegyeka, kandi n'ei naaragaine n'abaheereza bangye abanyamurwa, Abaleevi nayo efa." 
Jeremiah33:22 Nk'oku eihe ry'omu iguru ritarikubaasa kubarwa, n'omusheenyi gw'aha nyaja gutarikubaasa kurengwa, nikwo naanye ndikanyisa oruzaaro rw'omwiru wangye Daudi, n'abanayamurwa Abaleevi abarikumpeereza." 
Jeremiah33:23 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah33:24 Torikuteekateeka aha ki abo bantu barikugamba nibagira bati: MUKAMA ayangire enganda ezo ibiri ezi yaatooraine? Okwo nikwo bagayire abantu bangye, ngu tibakiri ihanga omu maisho gaabo." 
Jeremiah33:25 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Kuri ntarahamize ndagaano yangye ei naaragaine na nyomushana na nyekiro, kandi ntarahamize biragiro by'eiguru n'ensi," 
Jeremiah33:26 Obwo nibwo naakwangire oruzaaro rwa Yakobo n'orwa Daudi omwiru wangye, nkanga kutoorana omwe aha baijukuru be kutegyeka oruzaaro rwa Abrahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo. Ahabw'okuba ndyabagarura, mbaihe omu bukwatwa, mbagirire embabazi." 
Jeremiah34:1 Eki n'ekigambo ekyarugire ahari MUKAMA, kikaija ahari Yeremia, obu Nebukadeneeza n'eihe rye ryona n'abantu b'abagabe boona ab'endi z'omu butegyeki bwe n'ab'amahanga goona baarwanisa Yerusaalmu n'endembo zaayo zoona, nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah34:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Irooko ogambe na Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda, omugire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, oru rurembo ninduhayo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Babulooni, kandi aryarwotsya n'omuriro;" 
Jeremiah34:3 kandi naiwe torimukira, kureka buzimazima oryakwatwa, oheebweyo omu mikono ye; ogwo mugabe wa Babulooni muryagamba hamw enimureebana, bwanyima otwarwe Babulooni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Kwonka iwe Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda, hurira ekigambo kya MUKAMA! Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikukugambaho naagira ati: Yoriitwa rurara, kureka oryafa gye." 
Jeremiah34:5 Kandi nk'oku baayoterire baashwenkuru abagabe abaakubandiize obubaane, nikwo naiwe barikwoterera obubaane, bakakucurira nibagira bati: Ai bambe, mukama wangye! Ahakuba niinye naagamba ekyo kigambo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah34:6 Atyo nabi Yeremia yaagambira Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda ebigambo ebyo byona bari Yerusaalemu," 
Jeremiah34:7 obu eihe ry'omugabe wa Babulooni ryabaire nirirwanisa Yerusaalemu n'endembo za Yuda, Lakishi na Azeeka, ezaabaire zitsigaireho; ahabw'okuba ezo zombi nizo ndembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare ezaabaire zitsigaireho." 
Jeremiah34:8 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaija ahari Yeremia, omugabe Zedekia aharize kuragaana n'ab'omuri Yerusaalemu endagaano y'okubarangira eby'okurekura abahuuku," 
Jeremiah34:9 ngu buri muntu weena arekure abahuuku be n'abazaana be b'Abaheburaayo, harekye kubaho omuntu weena owaagira mwene waabo Omuyudaaya omuhuuku." 
Jeremiah34:10 Boona baagyorobera; abanyiginya boona n'abantu boona abaaragaine egyo ndagaano erikugira ngu buri muntu arekure omuhuuku we n'omuzaana we, barekye kugaruka kuza omu buhuuku; boona baabyorobera, baabarekura." 
Jeremiah34:11 Kwonka bwanyima baahinduka, baagarura abo bahuuku n'abazaana abu baarekwire, baabagarura omu buhuuku." 
Jeremiah34:12 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah34:13 Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Nkaragaana na baashwenkuriimwe, obu naabaiha omu nsi ya Misri omu nju y'obuhuuku, ningira nti:" 
Jeremiah34:14 Ahari buri muheru gw'emyaka mukaaga, buri muntu omuriimwe aryarekura Omuheburaayo mugyenzi we ou yaaguziibwe, omazire emyaka mukaaga naamukorera; aryamurekura arugye omu buhuuku. Kwonka baashwenkuriimwe tibarampuriire n'obu kwakuba okuntega amatu." 
Jeremiah34:15 Ebiro ebi mweteisize, mwakora ebi ndikusiima, mwaranga obusingye, buri muntu yaagambira mugyenzi we eby'okurekurwa, mwaraganira endagaano omu maisho gangye omu nju erikwetererwa eiziina ryangye." 
Jeremiah34:16 Kwonka muhindukire, mwajumisa eiziina ryangye, buri muntu omuriimwe yaagarura abahuuku be n'abazaana be, abu mubaire murekwire, nk'oku babaire nibenda, mwabagarura omu buhuuku kuba abahuuku n'abazaana." 
Jeremiah34:17 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Timumpuriire, buri muntu kurangira mugyenzi we na mutaahi we eby'okurekurwa. Reeba, nyowe nimbarangira okurekurwa, nikwo kurekurirwa rurara, n'orufu n'enjara, mbahindura eky'okutiinisa aha mahanga goona ag'omu nsi; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah34:18 Kandi n'abo bashaija abaitsire endagaano yangye, bakanga kuhitsya egyo ndagaano ei baragaine omu maisho gangye, niinyija kubagira nk'enyana ei baacwiremu ebicweka bibiri, bakabiraba ahagati:" 
Jeremiah34:19 abanyiginya ba Yuda, aba Yerusaalemu, abakonwa, abanyamurwa n'abantu boona ab'omuri egi nsi, abaarabire ahagati y'ebicweka by'egyo nyana," 
Jeremiah34:20 ndyabahayo omu mikono y'abazigu baabo n'ey'abarikwenda kubaita. Kandi emitumbi yaabo eryaba eby'okurya by'amahungu g'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba. 
Jeremiah34:21 Kandi Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda n'abanyiginya be ndyabahayo omu mikono y'abazigu baabo n'ey'abarikwenda kubaita, n'omu mikono y'eihe ry'omugabe wa Babulooni, eryabarugireho rikagarukayo." 
Jeremiah34:22 Reeba, niinyija kubaragiira, bagarukye ahari oru rurembo, barurwanise, barukwate, barwotsye n'omuriro. N'endembo za Yuda ndyazihindura amatongo, zibure ab'okuzituuramu; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah35:1 Ekigambo kikaruga ahari MUKAMA, kyaija ahari Yeremia omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda, nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah35:2 Irooko oze omu nju y'aba Rekabu, ogambe nabo, kandi obareete omu nju ya MUKAMA omuri kimwe aha bishengye byayo, obahe viinyo y'okunywa." 
Jeremiah35:3 Ntyo naatwara Yaazania mwene Yeremia, omwijukuru wa Habazinia, na beene ishe, n'abatabani boona." 
Jeremiah35:4 Naabareeta omu nju ya MUKAMA omu kishengye kya beene Hanani mwene Igidalia omuntu wa Ruhanga, ekyabaire kiri haihi n'ekishengye ky'abanyiginya ekiri ahaiguru y'ekishengye kya Maaseya mwene Shalumu, omurinzi w'ekisasi." 
Jeremiah35:5 Bwanyima naata omu maisho g'aba Rekabu enjoga ziijwire viinyo hamwe n'ebikopo, naabagira nti: Nimunywe viinyo." 
Jeremiah35:6 Kwonka baagarukamu bati: Titurikwija kuginywa, ahabw'okuba Yonadabu mwene Rekabu tatenkuriitwe akaturagiira ati: Mutarinywa viinyo, imwe na batabani baanyu ebiro byona;" 
Jeremiah35:7 kandi mutaryomeka amaju, mutaribiba embiho, mutaribyara emizaabibu, n'obu ukwakuba okugira omusiri gwayo; kureka mugume mutaahe omu mahema ebiro byanyu byona, mubone kuhangaarira omu nsi ei murishuuhuukiramu." 
Jeremiah35:8 Naitwe twayorobera ekigambo kya Yonadabu mwene Rekabu tatenkuriitwe, omu bi yaaturagiire byona, kutanywa viinyo ebiro byaitu byona, itwe n'abakazi baitu na batabani baitu na bahara baitu," 
Jeremiah35:9 n'okutombeka maju g'okutaahamu. N'ahabw'ekyo titwine misiri y'emizaabibu, nari endiijo misiri nari embibo;" 
Jeremiah35:10 kureka tutaaha omu mahema, kandi tutuura nitworobera ebi Yonadabu tatenkuriitwe yaaturagiire byona nitubikora." 
Jeremiah35:11 Kwonka Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni ku yaizire kuteera ensi egi, twagira tuti: Mwije tuze Yerusaalemu, tuhungye eihe ry'Abakaludaaya n'ery'Abasiria. Nikyo tutuuriire Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah35:12 Bwanyima ekigambo kay MUKAMA kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah35:13 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Irooko ogambire abantu ba Yuda oti: MUKAMA naabagira ati: Timurikwikiriza kuhaburwa, mukahurira ebigambo byangye?" 
Jeremiah35:14 Ekigambo, eki Yonadabu mwene Rekabu yaaragiire abatabani, kutanywa viinyo, kikahikiirizibwa; n'okuhitsya hati tibaginywa; ahabw'okuba bakoorobera ekiragiro kya ishenkurubo. Kwonka nyowe ntuura ningamba naimwe, haza mwanga kuunyorobera." 
Jeremiah35:15 Kandi ntuura nimbatumaho abaheereza bangye baanabi, nimbatuma obutoosha ningira nti: Nimuhindukye, buri muntu omuriimwe arekye emitwarize ye emibi, mushemeze ebi murikukora, murekye kukuratira baaruhanga abadi kubaheereza; obwo nibwo murituura omu nsi ei naabahaire na baashwenkuriimwe. Kwonka timurantegire matu, n'obu kwakuba okumpurira." 
Jeremiah35:16 Beene Yonadabu mwene Rekabu bakakora eki ishenkurubo yaabaragiire, kwonka abantu aba bo tibakanyoroberaga." 
Jeremiah35:17 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, nindeeta ahari Yuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu boona akabi koona aku naabagambireho, ahabw'okuba ngambire nabo, baayanga kuhurira; naabeeta, tibaanyetaba." 
Jeremiah35:18 Kwonka ab'enju ya Rekabu Yeremia yaabagira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'okworobera ekiragiro kya Yonadabu shwenkuriimwe, n'ebi yaataireho, mukakora ebi yaaragiire," 
Jeremiah35:19 nikyo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugirira ati: Yonadabu mwene Rekabu taribura muntu w'okumpeereza." 
Jeremiah36:1 Omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda, ekigambo eki kikaruga ahari MUKAMA, kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah36:2 Kwata omuzingo gw'ekitabo, oguhandiikyemu ebigambo byona ebi naakugambiire nimpana Israeli na Yuda n'amahanga goona, okwiha aha busingye bwa Yosia n'okuhitsya hati."
