Jeremiah36:3 Obundi ab'enju ya Yuda bakaahurira akabi koona aku mmaririire kubareetaho, buri muntu abona kuhinduka, areka emitwarize ye embibi, naanye mbona kubasaasira eby'okushiisha byabo n'ekibi kyabo." 
Jeremiah36:4 Atyo Yeremia yaayeta Baruki mwene Neria, Baruki ogwo yaahandiika omu muzingo gw'ekitabo ebigambo byona ebirikuruga omu kanwa ka Yeremia, ebi MUKAMA yaabaire amugambira." 
Jeremiah36:5 Bwanyima Yeremia yaagira Baruki ati: Banzibiire kuza omu nju ya MUKAMA; 
Jeremiah36:6 n'ahabw'ekyo obe niiwe waagyenda, kandi oshome ebigambo bya MUKAMA ebihandiikirwe omu muzingo gw'ekitabo ogu ohandiikiremu ebigambo ebi nkugambiire; obishomere abantu boona abateeraniire omu nju ya MUKAMA aha izooba ry'okwesiibyakwo. Kandi obishomere n'Abayuda boona abarugire omu ndembo zaabo." 
Jeremiah36:7 Obundi okweshengyereza kwabo kukaahika ahari MUKAMA, buri muntu ahinduka areka emitwarize ye emibi, ahabw'okuba okuguubwa kubi kwa MUKAMA n'ekiniga kye, ebi agambire kugirira abo bantu, ni bingi." 
Jeremiah36:8 Atyo Baruki mwene Neria yaakora byona ebi nabi Yeremia yaamuragiira, yaashoma ebigambo bya MUKAMA ebihandiikirwe omuri ogwo muzingo gw'ekitabo, naabishomera omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah36:9 Omu mwaka gwa kataano ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda, omu kwezi kwa mwenda, abantu ba Yerusaalemu boona n'abandi boona abaizire Yerusaalemu nibaruga omu ndembo za Yuda, baaranga ku habaho okwesiibyakwo omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah36:10 Bwanyima Baruki yaashoma omu muzingo gw'ekitabo ebigambo bya Yeremia, naabishomera omu nju ya MUKAMA omu kishengye kya Gemaria mwene Shafani omuhandiiki, ekiri omu kibuga kya ruguru, aharikutaahirwa omu Irembo Risya ery'enju ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mikaaya mwene Gemarira, mwijukuru wa Shafani, ku yaahuriire ebigambo bya MUKAMA byona, ebyashomwa omuri ogwo muzingo," 
Jeremiah36:12 yaashuuma, yaaza omuri nyaruju y'omugabe omu kishngye ky'omuhandiiki; yaashanga abanyiginya boona bashutami omwo, Elishaama omuhandiiki, Delaaya mwene Shemaaya, Elinasani mwene Akiboora, Gemaria mwene Shafani Zedekia mwene Hanania n'abanyiginya boona." 
Jeremiah36:13 Atyo yaabagambira ebigambo byona ebi yaahurira, obu Baruki yaaba naashomera abantu boona omuzingo gw'ekitabo." 
Jeremiah36:14 Abanyiginya boona kikwo kutuma Yehudi mwene Netamia mwikukuru wa Shelemia mwene Kuushi, kugira Baruki bati: Kwata omuzingo ogu waashomera abantu, oije. Atyo Baruki mwene Neria yaagukwata, yaija ahu bari." 
Jeremiah36:15 Baamugira bati: Shutama, ogushome. Atyo yaagubashomera." 
Jeremiah36:16 Ku baahuriire ebigambo byona, baahindukirana baine obwoba, baagira Baruki bati: Buzimazima tushemereire kugambira omugabe ebigambo ebi byona." 
Jeremiah36:17 Bwanyima baabuuza Baruki bati: Tugambire oku waahandikiikire ebyo bigambo byona, ebi Yeremia yaakugambiire." 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruki yaabagarukamu ati: Akaba angambira ebigambo ebi byona, naanye mbihandiikisa bwino omuri ogu muzingo." 
Jeremiah36:19 Abanyiginya baagira Baruki bati: Iwe na Yeremia mwirooko mwesherekye, hatagira owaamanya ahu muri." 
Jeremiah36:20 Bwanyima ku baaherize kuta ogwo muzingo omu kishengye kya Elishaama omuhandiiki, baaza omu kikaari, ahu omugabe ari, baamugambira ebyo bigambo byona." 
Jeremiah36:21 Ahonaaho omugabe yaatuma Yehudi kureeta ogwo muzingo, yaagwiha omu kishengye kya Elishaama omuhandiiki. Yehudi ku yaagureetsire, yaagushomera omugabe, abanyiginya boona bamwemereire aha rubaju." 
Jeremiah36:22 Obwo kukaba kuri okwezi kwa mwenda, kandi omugabe akaba ashutami omu nju ei ashutamamu omu biro by'embeho, omuriro nigwaka omu mahega omu maisho ge." 
Jeremiah36:23 Yehudi ku yaabaire aheza kushoma ebicweka bishatu nari bina, omugabe abishara n'akasyo, abinaga omu muriro omu mahega, okuhitsya obu ogwo muzingo gwona gwahwereire omu muriro omu mahega." 
Jeremiah36:24 Kwonka n'obu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, omugabe n'obu yaakuba omwe aha bagaragwa be boona, abaahuriire ebyo bigambo byona, tibaratiinire, n'obu kwakuba okutaagura ebijwaro byabo." 
Jeremiah36:25 Kandi hoona Elinasani na Delaaya na Gemaria n'obu baraabe bayeshengyereize omugabe kutootsya ogwo muzingo, kwonka tarabakundiire." 
Jeremiah36:26 Bwanyima omugabe yaaragiira Yerameeli omutabani na Seraya mwene Azirieli na Shelemia mwene Abudeeli kukwata Baruki omuhandiiki na nabi Yeremia; kwonka MUKAMA yaabashereka. 
Jeremiah36:27 Omugabe ku yaaherize kwotsya omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogurimu ebigambo ebi Yeremia yaagambiire Baruki kuhandiika, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Yeremia nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah36:28 Kwata ogundi muzingo, oguhandiikyemu ebigambo byona ebibaire biri omu muzingo gw'okubanza, ogu Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda ayokize." 
Jeremiah36:29 Na Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda omugire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Oyokize ogwo muzingo gw'ekitabo, noogira oti: Ahabw'enki waaguhandiikiremu oti: Buzimazima omugabe wa Babulooni aryaija acwekyereze egi nsi, agimaremu abantu n'amatungo?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugambira ahari Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda ati: tarigira w'okuza aha ngoma ya Daudi, kandi omutumbi gwe guryanagwa aheeru omu kibabo ky'omushana nyomushana, n'omu mbeho nyekiro." 
Jeremiah36:31 Kandi ndyamuhana n'oruzaaro rwe n'abagaragwa be, mbature eby'okushiisha byabo; bo n'abatwire Yerusaalemu, n'abantu ba Yuda, ndyabareetaho akabi koona aku naabagambireho, haza bakanga kuhurira." 
Jeremiah36:32 Atyo Yeremia yaakwata ogundi muzingo, yaaguha Baruki omuhandiiki mwene Neria, yaaguhandiikamu ebigambo byona ebyabaire biri omu muzingo ebyagambirwe Yeremia, ogu Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda yaayokize omu muriro; kandi yaayongyeraho ebindi bingi ebirikushushana nabyo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Zedekia mwene Yosia, ou Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaataire aha ngoma omu nsi ya Yuda, akategyeka omu mwanya gwa Konia mwnee Yehoyakimu." 
Jeremiah37:2 Kwonka we n'abagaragwa be n'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi, tihaine waahuriire ebigambo bya MUKAMA ebi yaagambire naaraba omuri nabi Yeremia." 
Jeremiah37:3 Omugabe Zedekia yaatuma Yehukaali mwene Shelemia, na Zefania omunyamurwa mwene Maaseya, ahari nabi Yeremia naagira ati: Tushabire ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah37:4 Obwo Yeremia akaba akiine obusingye kuza omu bantu naagaruka omuka, ahabw'okuba akaba atakatairwe mu kihome." 
Jeremiah37:5 Kandi eihe rya Faraho rikaba rirugire Misri; Abakaludaaya abaabaire bagotsire Yerusaalemu, ku baahuriire enkuru yaabo, baaruga Yerusaalemu, baagyenda." 
Jeremiah37:6 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari nabi Yeremia nikigira kiti: 
Jeremiah37:7 Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Oku mube nikwo mwagambira omugabe wa Yuda obatumire kuunyehanuuzaho muti: Reeba, eihe rya Faraho, eriizire kubaha emikono, riri haihi kugaruka Misri omu nsi yaabo." 
Jeremiah37:8 Bwanyima Abakaludaaya nibaija kugaruka, bateere oru rurembo, barukwate, barwotsye." 
Jeremiah37:9 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Murekye kwebeiha nimugira muti: Buzimazima Abakaludaaya baryagumayo; mumanye ngu tibarikwija kugumayo. 
Jeremiah37:10 Ahakuba n'obu mwakusingura eihe ry'Abakaludaaya ryona eririkubarwanisa, hakatsigara emputa zonka, buri mputa ekaahuruutuka omu ihema ryayo, ziimuka, zootsya oru rurembo n'omuriro." 
Jeremiah37:11 Eihe ry'Abakaludaaya ku ryarugire Yerusaalemu ahabw'okutiina eihe rya Faraho," 
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremia yaaruga Yerusaalemu kuza omu nsi ya Benyamiini kutunga omugabo gwe omu bantu baayo. 
Jeremiah37:13 Ku yaabaire yaahika aha irembo rya Benyamiini, omuserukare orikurinda orikwetwa Iriiya mwene Shelemia, mwijukuru wa Hanania, yaamukwata, yaamugira ati: Noocwa kuza omu Bakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremia yaamugarukamu ati: Ngaaha! noobeiha; tindikucwera omu Bakaludaaya. Kwonka Iriiya tiyaikiriza bi arikugamba, yaamukwata, yaamutwarira abategyeki." 
Jeremiah37:15 Abategyeki baagirira Yeremia ekiniga kingi, baamuteera, baamuta omu nju ya Yonasaani omuhandiiki, ahabw'okuba bakaba bagihindwire ekihome." 
Jeremiah37:16 Yeremia ku yaagiire omu kihome, yaamara ebiro bingi omu kashengye kafunzire." 
Jeremiah37:17 Bwanyima omugabe Zedekia yaatuma ku bamureeta, yaamwakiira, yaamubuuriza omu nju ye bari bombi, naagira ati: Hariho ekigambo kyona ekirugire ahari MUKAMA? Yeremia yaamugira ati: kiriho. Yeremia yaagaruka yaagira ati: Noija kuheebwayo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Babulooni." 
Jeremiah37:18 Kandi Yeremia yaagaruka yaamubuuza ati: Nkucumwireho ki, iwe n'abaheereza baawe, nari ncumwire ki ahari eri ihanga, mwaza kunta omu kihome?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Baanabi baanyu, ababaire nibabahanuurira nibagira ngu omugabe wa Babulooni taribateera, n'obu kwakuba okurwanisa egi nsi, barahi?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Mbwenu mpurira, ninkweshengyereza, Nyakusinga Omugabe, oikirize okweshengyereza kwangye, orekye kungarura omu nju ya Yonasaani omuhandiiki, natakaagwayo." 
Jeremiah37:21 Atyo omugabe Zedekia yaaragiira ku barindira Yeremia omu kibuga ky'abarinzi; yaaguma naaheebwa omugaati gumwe buri izooba, okuruga omu nguuto y'abateeki b'emigaati, okuhitsya obu emigaati yoona yaahweire omu rurembo. Atyo Yeremia yaaguma omu kibuga ky'abarinzi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Kandi Shefania mwene Mataani, Gedalia mwene Pashuri, Yukaali mwene Shelemia na Pashuri mwene Malukia baahurira ebigambo ebi Yeremia yaagambiire abantu boona, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah38:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Omuntu oraagume omuri oru rurembo naija kwitwa rurara, n'enjara, kandi n'orufu; kwonka oraarugyemu akeehongyera Abakaludaaya aryagumaho, atimbuukye omu rugamba n'engabirano, nigo magara ge." 
Jeremiah38:3 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Buzimazima orurembo oru nirwija kuheebwayo omu mikono y'eihe ry'omugabe wa Babulooni, rukwatwe." 
Jeremiah38:4 Bwanyima abategyeki baagira omugabe bati: Reka ogu mushaija aitwe, ahabw'okuba naacwa abaserukare abatsigaire omuri oru rurembo, n'abandi bantu boona, entegye, ahabw'okubagambira ebigambo ebyo. Nimureeba omushaija ogu ku atarikwendeza eri ihanga ebirungi, kureka akabi." 
Jeremiah38:5 Omugabe Zedekia yaagira ati: Reeba, ari omu mikono yaanyu; ahabw'okuba omugabe tarikubaasa kubazibira." 
Jeremiah38:6 Batyo baatwara Yeremia, baamunaga omu kiziba kya Malukia kiri omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, baamushuumisamu emirunga. Kwonka omuri ekyo kiziba hakaba hatarimu maizi, kureka ebyondo. Yeremia yaabishaayiramu." 
Jeremiah38:7 Bwanyiam Ebedi-meleki Omunyesiopia omukonwa, owaabaire ari omu nju y'omugabe, ku yaahuriire ngu banagire Yeremia omu kiziba obwo omugabe akaba ashutami omu irembo rya Benyamiini" 
Jeremiah38:8 yaashohora, yaaruga omuri nyaruju, yaagira omugabe ati:" 
Jeremiah38:9 Nyakusinga Omugabe, abo bantu, omu bi bakozire Yeremia byona, bakozire kubi kumunaga omu kiziba; kandi naija kwitirwamu enjara, ahabw'okuba omu rurembo tihaakirimu mugaati gwona." 
Jeremiah38:10 Ahonaaho omugabe yaaragiira Ebedi-meleki Omunyesiopia naamugira ati: Twara abashaija bashatu okuruga aha, mugyende mwihe nabi Yeremia omu kiziba atakafiire." 
Jeremiah38:11 Atyo Ebedi-meleki yaagyenda n'abo bashaija, yaataaha omuri nyaruju omu kishengye ekibiikwamu emyenda, baihamu obucancabari bw'emyenda n'ebijwaro bikuzire, yaabishuumisa emirunga omu kiziba, yaabiha Yeremia." 
Jeremiah38:12 Bwanyima Ebedi-meleki Omunyesiopia yaagira Yeremia ati: Ta obucancabari n'ebijwaro bikukuzire omu maahwa, orabyeho emirunga. Yeremia yaakora atyo." 
Jeremiah38:13 Batyo baiha Yeremia omu kiziba n'emirunga, baamutuuhuurayo. Okuruga aho Yeremia yaaguma omu kibuga ky'abarinzi." 
Jeremiah38:14 Omugabe Zedekia yaatuma kweta nabi Yeremia, yaamwakiirira aha irembo rya kashatu erya hekalu ya MUKAMA. Omugabe yaagira Yeremia ati: Naaza kukubuuza; haza otagira eki wanshereka." 
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremia yaagarukamu Zedekia ati: Ku ndaakugambire, buzimazima torikwija kuunyita? Kandi n'obu ndaakuhe obwengye, torikwija kuunyikiriza." 
Jeremiah38:16 Bwanyima omugabe Zedekia yaarahirira Yeremia omu mubonano naagira ati: Nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire owaatuhangire, tindikwija kukwita, n'obu kwakuba okukuhayo omu mikono y'abantu abarikwenda kukwita." 
Jeremiah38:17 Ahonaaho Yeremia yaagira Zedekia ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Ku oraayehongyere abategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni, noija kukiza amagara gaawe, orurembo oru tiruryokibwa, kandi iwe n'eka yaawe muryagumaho." 
Jeremiah38:18 Kwonka ku oraabe oteehongyeire bategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni, oru rurembo nirwija kuheebwayo omu mikono y'Abakaludaaya, barwotsye n'omuriro, kandi naiwe toribakira." 
Jeremiah38:19 Omugabe Zedekia yaamugira ati: Nintiina Abayudaaya abeehongyeire Abakaludaaya, ngu ntakaaheebwayo omu mikono yaabo, bakandeebesa enaku." 
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremia yaamugira ati: Torikwija kuheebwayo mu mikono yaabo. Ninkweshengyereza, yorobera eiraka rya MUKAMA omu bi ndikukugambira; obwo nibwo orikwija kuba gye, n'amagara gaawe gakakira." 
Jeremiah38:21 Kwonka ku oraayangye kugomooka, eki nikyo MUKAMA anyorekire." 
Jeremiah38:22 Ndeebire abakazi boona abatsigirwe omu nju y'omugabe wa Yuda, nibabashohoza, nibabatwarira abategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni; kandi abo bakazi babaire nibagira ngu, Banywani baawe abu oyesiga bakubeihire, Baakusingura, Mbwenu ebigyere byawe ku biherize kushaayira omu byondo, Baakutsigaho." 
Jeremiah38:23 Kandi abakazi baawe boona na batabani baawe nibaija kutwariwa Abakaludaaya, naiwe torikwija kubakira, kureka noija kukwatwa omugabe wa Babulooni, n'orurembo oru barwotsye n'omuriro." 
Jeremiah38:24 Bwanyima Zedekia yaagira Yeremia ati: Hatagira owaamanya ebyo bigambo, otakaafa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Abategyeki ku baraahurire ngu ngambire naiwe, baakwijaho, baakubuuza bati: Tugambire ebi ogambiire omugabe, kandi n'ebi omugabe akugambiire; otagira eki waatushereka tukakwita," 
Jeremiah38:26 obwo obagire oti: Nyeshengyereize omugabe n'obucureezi ngu atangarura omu nju ya Yonasaani, nkagwamu." 
Jeremiah38:27 Bwanyima abategyeki boona baija ahari Yeremia, baamubuuza, nawe yaabagarukamu nk'oku omugabe amuhabwire. Batyo baareka kugamba nawe; habw'okuba eki yaagambire n'omugabe tikiramanyirwe." 
Jeremiah38:28 Okuruga aho Yeremia yaaguma omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, okuhitsya aha izooba eri Yerusaalemu yaakwatiirweho." 
Jeremiah39:1 Omu mwaka gwa mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda, omu kwezi kwa ikumi, Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni kaija n'eihe rye ryona, yaateera Yerusaalemu, yaagigota." 
Jeremiah39:2 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe ogw'omu busingye bwa Zedekia, omu kwezi kwa kana, aha kiro kyakwo kya mwenda, bakasheenya aha'okutaahira omu rurembo." 
Jeremiah39:3 Ku baaherize kurukwata, abategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni boona baarutaahamu, baashutama omu irembo ry'ahagati; amaziina gaabo ni Nerigali-sharezeeri, Samugaari-neebo, Sarusekimu, Rabusarisi, na Nerugaali-sherezeeri Rabumaagi, hamwe n'abandi bategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni boona." 
Jeremiah39:4 Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda n'abaserukare be boona ku baabareebire, baahunga, baacwa omu rurembo nyekiro nibatoora omuhanda ogurikuraba omu musiri gw'omugabe omu irembo ry'ahagati y'engo zombi, baatoora ogurikuza Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Kwonka eihe ry'Abakaludaaya ryabakurata, ryakwatira Zedekia omu ruhita rwa Yeriko. Ku baaherize kumukwata, baamutwarira Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni Ribula omu nsi ya Hamasi, yaamucwera orubanja." 
Jeremiah39:6 Omugabe wa Babulooni yaitirayo batabani ba Zedekia omu maisho ga ishebo, kandi yaita n'abakungu ba Yuda boona." 
Jeremiah39:7 Bwanyima yaihamu Zedekia amaisho, yaamubohesa emihama, yaamutwara Babulooni." 
Jeremiah39:8 Kandi Abakaludaaya baayotsya nyaruju y'omugabe n'amaju g'abantu, baasheenya n'orugo rw'amabaare rwa Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah39:9 Bwanyima Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaatwara abantu abaatsigaire omu rurembo, abaabaire bamwehongyeire hamwe n'abaabaire batsigaire omu rurembo, yaabatwara Babulooni bari enkwatwa." 
Jeremiah39:10 Kwonka Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaatsiga omuri Yuda abooro bamwe abataine kantu, yaabaha emisiri y'emizaabibu n'eshambu omuri obwo bunaku." 
Jeremiah39:11 Kandi Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaaragiira Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi ebya Yeremia, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah39:12 Mutware, omurinde gye, otagira eki waamwitsa, kureka eki araakugambire, obe nikyo waamukorera." 
Jeremiah39:13 Atyo Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi, Nebushazibaani Rabusarisi, Nerugaali-sharezaari Rabumaagi, n'abandi bategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni boona" 
Jeremiah39:14 baatuma, baiha Yeremia omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, baamukwatsa Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu, mwijukuru wa Shafani, ngu amugarure omu ka ye. Atyo ku yaahikireyo, yaatuura omu bantu baayo." 
Jeremiah39:15 Yeremia, obu yaabaire akikingirainwe omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikamwijaho nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah39:16 Irooko ogambire Ebedi-meleki Omunyesiopia oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kuhikiiriza ahari oru rurembo ebi naagambire kurureetaho kaabi, kutari kurureetaho birungi, kandi biryahikiirizibwa eryo izooba noobireeba;" 
Jeremiah39:17 kwonak iwe, eryo izooba ndyakujuna, orekye kuheebwayo omu mikono y'abo bantu bu orikutiina; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ahabw'okuba buzimazima ndyakujuna, toriitwa rurara; kureka oryatimbuuka omu rugamba n'engabirano, nigo magara gaawe, ahabw'okuba okanyesiga; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah40:1 Eki n'ekigambo ekyaizire ahari Yeremia nikiruga ahari MUKAMA, obu Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaabaire aherize kumurekura kuruga Raama, naamutwara abohirwe n'enjegyere hamwe n'ezindi nkwatwa zoona eza Yerusaalemu na Yuda, ezaabaire nizitwarwa Babulooni." 
Jeremiah40:2 Omukuru w'abarinzi yaatwara Yeremia, yaamugira ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe akagamba akabi aka akarihika aha mwanya ogu;" 
Jeremiah40:3 MUKAMA akihikiriize, yaakora nk'oku yaagambire. Ebi byona bibahikireho ahabw'okuba mukacumura ahari MUKAMA, mwayanga kuhurira eiraka rye." 
Jeremiah40:4 Mbwenu eri izooba naaza kukwiha enjegyere aha mikono. Ku oraabe noosiima kugyenda naanye Babulooni, ija, naanye niinyija kukurinda gye. Kwonka ku oraabe otarikusiima kugyenda naanye Babulooni, orereere. Reeba, ensi yoona eri omu maisho gaawe; za ahu orikwenda hoona, ah'orikuteekateeka ngu ni harungi kandi hahikire." 
Jeremiah40:5 Ku oraatsigare, ogarukye ahari Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu, mwijukuru wa Shafani, ou omugabe wa Babulooni ataireho kutegyeka endembo za Yuda, otuure nawe omu bantu; nari shi oze ahu orikusiima hoona. Atyo omukuru w'abarinzi yaamuha entanda n'ekiconco, yaamureka." 
Jeremiah40:6 Bwanyima Yeremia yaagyenda yaashanga Gedalia mwene Ahikamu Mizipa, yaatuura nawe omu bantu abaabaire batsigaire omu nsi." 
Jeremiah40:7 Bwanyima abakuru b'engabo boona abaabaire bari omu bwerere, bo n'abantu baabo, ku baahuriire ngu omugabe wa Babulooni agizire Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu omutegyeki omuri egyo nsi, kandi ngu amukwatsize abashaija, abakazi n'abaana abarikukira abandi boona kuba abooro, abaabaire batatwairwe Babulooni omu bukwatwa," 
Jeremiah40:8 baaza Mizipa owa Gedalia, amaziina gaabo nigo aga, Ishimaeli mwene Nesania, Yohanaani mwenge Karea, Seraaya mwene Tanihumeesi, beene Efai aba Netofa, na Yezania mutabani w'Omunyamaaka, bo n'abashaija baabo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu mwijukuru wa Shafani yaabarahira, bo n'abashaija baabo, yaabagira ati: Murekye kutiina kwehongyera Abakaludaaya. Mugume omu nsi egi, nimuheereza omugabe wa Babulooni; obwo nibwo muraije kuguma muri gye." 
Jeremiah40:10 Nyowe niinyija kuguma Mizipa nimbatabaarira aha Bakaludaaya abariija owaitu; kwonka imwe mugume mushanguruze viinyo n'ebijuma by'omu kyanda n'amajuta, mubibiikye omu nyungu zaanyu, mutuure omu ndembo ezi mukubwire." 
Jeremiah40:11 N'Abayuda boona abaabaire batwire Moabu n'omu Baamoni n'omuri Edomu n'omu nsi ezindi zoona, ku bahuriire ngu omugabe wa Babulooni atsigireyo abaahonokire aha Bayuda, yaataho Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu mwijukuru wa Shafani kuba omutegyeki waabo," 
Jeremiah40:12 Abayudaaya abo boona baagaruka, baaruga ei baabaire babingiirwe yoona, baija Mizipa owa Gedalia omu nsi ya Yuda; baashanguruza viinyo n'ebijuma by'omu kyanda bingi munonga." 
Jeremiah40:13 Bwanyima Yohanaani mwene Karea n'abakuru b'engabo abaabaire bari omu nsi y'obwerere, baija Mizipa hari Gedalia," 
Jeremiah40:14 baamugira bati: Torikumanya ku Baalisi omugabe w'Abaamoni ayohereize Ishimaeli mwene Nesania kukwita? Kwonka Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu tiyaabaikiriza. 
Jeremiah40:15 Bwanyima Yohanaani mwene Karea yaagambirira Gedalia Mizipa omu mubonano, ati: Ninkushaba, ondekye nze kwita Ishimaeli mwene Nesania, kandi tihariho orikwija kukimanya. Mbwenu, ku yaakukwita, Abayudaaya boona abaakuteeraniireho baataataana, n'abahonokire aha Bayuda baahwerekyerera, okaazira ki?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Kwonka Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu yaagira Yohanaani mwene Karea ati: Otakora ekyo kintu, ahabw'okuba noobeiherera Ishimaeli." 
Jeremiah41:1 Omu kwezi kwa mushanju Ishimaeli mwene Nesania, mwijukuru wa Elishaama, omunyiginya kandi omutegyeki mukuru omu bategyeki b'omugabe, yaija n'abantu ikumi Mizipa owa Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu. Ku baabaire nibariira hamwe eby'okurya omuri Mizipa," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishimaeli mwene Nesania n'abo bashaija ikumi abu yaabaire aine, baimuka, baateera Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu, mwijukuru wa Shafani, rurara, baamugwisaho; kandi ogwo ou baitsire niwe omugabe wa Babulooni yaabaire ataireho kuba omutegyeki omuri egyo nsi." 
Jeremiah41:3 Kandi Ishimaeli yaagaruka yaita Abayudaaya boona abu Gedalia yaabaire aine Mizipa, hamwe n'abaserukare b'Abakaludaaya abaabaire bariho." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ku yaamazire kabiri aitsire Gedalia, kandi kitakamanyirwe muntu weena," 
Jeremiah41:5 haija abantu makumi munaana nibaruga Shekemu, Shiilo na Samaria bamweire ebireju, bajwaire ebijwaro bitaagukire, beesharashazire emibiri, bareetsire empongano z'esaano n'obubaane, kubihongyera omuri hekalu ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ishimaeli mwene Nesania yaaruga Mizipa kuza kubabugana, yaagyenda naarira. Ku yaabaire naakibabugana, yaabagira ati: Mwije tuze owa Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu." 
Jeremiah41:7 Ku baahikire omu rurembo, Ishimaeli mwene Nesania n'abashaija abu yaabaire aine baita abo bantu, baabanaga omu kiina." 
Jeremiah41:8 Kwonka hakaba hariho abantu ikumii omuribo abaagizire Ishimaeli bati: Otatwita, ahabw'okuba twine engano, sayiri, amajuta n'obwoki, bisherekire omu ishwa. Atyo yaabareka, tiyaabaita na bagyenzi baabo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ekyo kiina eki Ishimaeli yaanagiremu emitumbi y'abu yaitsire boona kikaba kiri ekiina kihango ekyatimbisiibwe omugabe Asa ahabw'okutiina Baasha omugabe wa Israeli. Ishimaeli mwene Nesania yaakiijuza emitumbi y'abaitsirwe. 
Jeremiah41:10 Bwanyima Ishimaeli yaatwara abantu abaabaire bari Mizipa na bahara b'omugabe n'abantu boona abaabaire batsigaire Mizipa, abu Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaabaire akwatsize Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu. Ishimaeli mwene Nesania yaabatwara bari enkwatwa, yaimuka kwambuka kuhungira omu Baamoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Bwanyima Yohanaani mwene Karea n'abakuru b'engabo abu yaabaire aine, ku baahuriire akagwe aku Ishimaeli mwene Nesania agwisize," 
Jeremiah41:12 baahurura n'engabo zaabo zoona, baaza kurwanisa Ishimaeli mwene Nesania. Baamugwaho aha kiyanja kihango ekyabaire kiri Gibeoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Abantu boona abaabaire bari hamwe na Ishimaeli, ku baareebire Yohanaani mwene Karea n'abakuru b'engabo boona abu yaabaire aine, baahsemererwa." 
Jeremiah41:14 N'ahabw'ekyo abantu boona abu Ishimaeli mwene Nesania yaabaire aihire Mizipa, akabatwara bari enkwatwa, baakuba, baagaruka, baashanga Yohanaani mwene Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Kwonka Ishimaeli mwene Nesania yaahunga Yohanaani aine abantu munaana, yaaza omu Baamoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Bwanyima Yohanaani mwene Karea n'abakuru b'engabo boona abu yaabaire aine baatwara abantu boona abaabaire batsigaire, abu Ishimaeli mwene Nesania yaabaire atwaire bari enkwatwa naabaiha Mizipa, aherize kwita Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu. Yohanaani yaabagarura naabiaha Gibeoni, abaserukare, abakazi abaana n'abakonwa." 
Jeremiah41:17 Baagyenda, baaguma Gerutikimuhaamu haihi na Betelehemu; obwo nibenda kuza Misri ahabw'Abakaludaaya;" 
Jeremiah41:18 ahabw'okuba bakaba nibabatiina ahabwa ishimaeli mwene Nesania kwita Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu, ou omugabe wa Babulooni yaabaire ataireho kuba omutegyeki w'ensi egyo." 
Jeremiah42:1 Bwanyima abakuru b'engabo boona na Yohanaani mwene Karea, na Azaria mwene Hoshaaya, n'abantu boona okuruga aha muto okuhika aha mukuru, bairira haihi nabi Yeremia," 
Jeremiah42:2 baamugira bati: Nitukweshengyereza oikirize okushaba kwaitu; otushabire ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, itwe twena abatsigaireho; ahabw'okuba tukaba turi baingi, mbwenu tutisgaire bakye nk'oku orikutureeba." 
Jeremiah42:3 MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe atworekye omuhanda ogu tushemereire kutoora n'ebi tushemereire kukora. 
Jeremiah42:4 Nabi Yeremia yaabagarukamu ati: Naabahurira. Mbwenu naaza kushaba MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, nk'oku mwashaba; kandi eki MUKAMA araagarukyemu kyona, niinyija kukibagambira. Tiinyine ki ndaabasherekye." 
Jeremiah42:5 Bwanyima baagira Yeremia bati: Ku turaabe tutakozire ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe araakutume kutugambira, MUKAMA abe niwe yaaba mushinja waitu ow'amazima kandi omwesigwa." 
Jeremiah42:6 Yaaba biba birungi nari bibi, nitwija kworobera eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu ou turikukutumaho, tubone kuba gye, ku tubaabe twayorobeire eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah42:7 Bwanyima ku haahingwireho ebiro ikumi, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Yeremia." 
Jeremiah42:8 Yaayeta Yohanaani mwene Karea n'abakuru b'amahe boona abu yaabaire aine, n'abantu boona okuruga aha muto okuhika aha mukuru," 
Jeremiah42:9 yaabagira ati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, ou mwantumireho kumuhitsyaho okweshengyereza kwanyu, arikugamba naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Ku muraagume omuri egi nsi, niinyija kubombeka, tindikwija kubasheenya; niinyija kubabyara, tindikwija kubakuura; ahabw'okuba nyefuurize ahabw'akabi aku naabareetsireho." 
Jeremiah42:11 Murekye kutiina omugabe wa Babulooni, ou murikutiina; mutamutiina; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira; ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naimwe kubajuna n'okubaiha omu mikono ye." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ndyabaha okugirirwa embabazi, nawe abone kuzibagirira, kandi abarekye mugume omu nsi yaanyu." 
Jeremiah42:13 Kwonka ku muraagire muti: Titurikwija kuguma omuri egi nsi, mwagomera eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu," 
Jeremiah42:14 nimugira muti: Ngaaha, nitwija kwegiira omu nsi ya Misri, ei tutarireeba ngamba, n'obu kwakuba okuhurira eiraka ry'enzamba, nari okubura eby'okurya, kandi okwo niyo turituura," 
Jeremiah42:15 mbwenu nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA, imwe abatsigaire omuri Yuda. Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: KU muraate amaisho aha kuza Misri, mwaza kutuurayo," 
Jeremiah42:16 mumanye ngu rurara ei murikutiina neija kubahambiza omu nsi ya Misri, kandi n'enjara ei murikutiina neija kugyenda ebeezingiriire, okuhitsya obu murihikayo; kandi okwo niyo murigwa." 
Jeremiah42:17 Abantu boona abataire amaisho aha kuza Misri kutuurayo nibaija kwitirwayo rurara n'enjara n'orufu; kandi tihariho n'omwe omuribo orihonokaho nari oritsigaraho, akakira akabi aku ndibareetaho." 
Jeremiah42:18 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Nk'okuguubwa kubi kwangye n'ekiniga kyangye oku byashukirwe aha batuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, nikwo naimwe murishukwaho ekiniga kyangye mwahika Misri. Kandi muryaba ekirikwamaganwa, ekirikutiinisa, eky'okukyeenwa n'eky'okushekyererwa; kandi timurigaruka kureeba ogu mwanya bundi." 
Jeremiah42:19 Imwe abatsigaire omuri Yuda, MUKAMA abagizire ati: Mutaza Misri. Mukimanyire kimwe ku naabeehanangiriza eri izooba," 
Jeremiah42:20 ku mutashemereire kuhaba mukafa, ahabw'okuba mukantuma ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, nimugira muti: Tushabire ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu; kandi kyona eki MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu araagambe, okutugambire, naitwe nitwija kukikora." 
Jeremiah42:21 Mbwenu eri izooba naakibagambira, kwonka timwayorobera iraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu omuri byona ebi abantumireho." 
Jeremiah42:22 N'ahabw'ekyo mumanyire kimwe, ku rurara n'enjara n'orufu birikwija kubaitira, ei murikwenda kuza kutuura." 
Jeremiah43:1 Yeremia ku yaaherize kugambira abantu boona ebigambo bya MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo byona, ebi MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo amubatumireho," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azaria mwene Hoshaaya na Yohanaani mwene Karea n'abanyarubwa boona baagira Yeremia bati: Noobeiha; MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu takutumire kugira oti: Mutaza Misri kutuurayo; 
Jeremiah43:3 kureka Baruki mwene Neria niwe atuteeraine naiwe kutuhayo omu mikono y'Abakaludaaya kutwita nari okututwara Babulooni turi enkwatwa. 
Jeremiah43:4 Atyo Yohanaani mwene Karea n'abakuru b'amahe boona n'abantu boona baayanga kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA kuguma omu nsi ya Yuda," 
Jeremiah43:5 kureka Yohanaani mwene karea n'abakuru b'amahe boona baatwara Abayuda boona abaabaire bagarukire kutuura omu nsi ya Yuda, barugire omu mahanga goona ei baabaire babingiirwe," 
Jeremiah43:6 abashaija, abakazi, abaana, bahara ba'omugabe, na buri muntu weena ou Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaabaire akwatsize Gedalia mwene Ahikaamu, mwijukuru wa Shafani, hamwe na nabi Yeremia na Baruki mwene Neria." 
Jeremiah43:7 Batyo baaza omu nsi ya Misri, ahabw'okuba bakanga kuhurira eiraka rya MUKAMA. Bwanyima baahika Tahapenesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija ahari Yeremia ari Tahapenesi, nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah43:9 Twara amabaare mahango omu ngaro, ogasherekye omu budongo ahansi y'amabaare agaariire aha irembo ry'ekikaari kya Faraho omuri Tahapenesi, Abayuda boona nibakureeba;" 
Jeremiah43:10 obagire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyayohereza omwiru wangye Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni, ate ekitebe kye ky'obugabe ahari aga mabaare agu naashereka, kandi ateere eihema rye ry'obugabe ahaiguru yaago." 
Jeremiah43:11 Aryaija ateere ensi ya Misri, aheyo ab'okwitwa rufu ebaite, ab'okutwarwa omu bukwatwa batwarwe, n'ab'okwitwa rurara ebaite." 
Jeremiah43:12 Kandi aryatweka omuriro omuri hekalu za baaruhanga ba Misri, abootsye, abatware bari enkwatwa, ashemeze ensi ya Misri, nk'oku omuriisa ashemeza ekijwaro kye, akakimaramu enda. Bwanyima arugyeyo n'obusingye." 
Jeremiah43:13 Aryasheenyagura enyomyo z'amabaare Beti-shemeshi ey'omu nsi ya Misri, kandi na hekalu za baaruhanga ba Misri aryazootsya n'omuriro." 
Jeremiah44:1 Bwanyima ekigambo kikaija ahari Yeremia nikigamba aha Bayudaaya boona abaabaire batwire omuri Misri, Migidooli, Tahapenesi, Noofu n'omu nsi ya Pasiroosi, nikigira kiti:" 
Jeremiah44:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Mukareeba akabi koona aku naareetsire ahari Yerusaalemu n'aha ndembo zaoona eza Yuda. Hati n'amatongo; tihaine ozitwiremu," 
Jeremiah44:3 ahabw'obubi bw'ebi baakozire nibangwisa kubi, obu baaza kwotera obubaane, bakaheereza baaruhanga abandi abu batakamanyaga, bo naimwe na baashwenkuriimwe." 
Jeremiah44:4 Kwonka nkaguma nimbatumaho abaheereza bangye baanabi boona, ningira nti: Nyaabura 'mwe, murekye kukora ebirikunugwa ebyo ebi ndikwanga." 
Jeremiah44:5 Kwonka tibaahurira n'obu kwakuba okutega amatu, kuhinduka kureka obubi bwabo, n'okutooterera baaruhanga abandi obubaane." 
Jeremiah44:6 Nikyo okuguubwa kubi kwangye n'ekiniga kyangye byashukiirwe, bikabuguma omu ndembo za Yuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu, zikahinduka amatongo eihamba, nk'oku ziri hati." 
Jeremiah44:7 Mbwenu oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'enki nimukora akabi kahango kati aha magara gaanyu, mukeemaraho omushaija n'omukazi, omwana muto n'omwereere ou mwatsigaza?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Ahabw'enki nimuunyitsa ekiniga n'ebi murikukora n'emikono yaanyu, mukooterera baaruhanga abandi obubaane omu nsi ya Misri, ei mwaizire kutuuramu, ngu mucuubwe, mube eky'okukyeenwa n'eky'okushekyererwa omu mahanga goona ag'omu nsi?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Mwebirwe obubi bwa baashwenkuriimwe n'obw'abagabe ba Yuda, obw'abakazi baabo, obwanyu n'obw'abakazi baanyu, obw'ebi baakoreire omu ndembo za Yuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Nangwa n'okuhitsya hati tibakeecureize, n'obu kwakuba okutiina, kandi tibakagyendeire mu biragiro byangye n'omu byatairweho, ebi naataire omu maisho gaanyu n'aga baanshwenkuriimwe." 
Jeremiah44:11 Nikyo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugirira ati: Reeba, niinyija kubata omu kaso, mbakore kubi, mmareho Abayuda boona." 
Jeremiah44:12 Kandi Abayuda abaatsigaireho abamaririire kwija omuri Misri kutuuramu, ndyabatwara, bamarweho; omuri egi nsi ya Misri nimwo barigwa, bakamarwaho rurara n'enjara; okuruga aha muto okuhika aha mukuru baryaitwa rurara n'enjara, kandi baryaba ekirikwamaganwa, ekirikutiinisa, eky'okukyeenwa n'eky'okushekyererwa." 
Jeremiah44:13 Ndyafubira abatwire omu nsi ya Misri, nk'oku naafubiire Yerusaalemu, mbaitwe rurara n'enjara n'orufu," 
Jeremiah44:14 habure n'omwe omu Bayuda abaatsigaireho abagiire omu nsi ya Misri kutuurayo owaahonokaho nari owaatsigaraho, nari owaagaruka omu nsi ya Yuda ei barikwetenga kugaruka kutuuramu; ahabw'okuba tihaine barigarukayo, kureka bakye abaacwire." 
Jeremiah44:15 Bwanyima abashaija boona, abaabaire nibamanya ngu abakazi baabo nibooterera baaruhanga abandi obubaane, kandi n'abakazi boona abaabaire beemereire aho, bari omutwe muhango munonga, n'abantu boona abaabaire batwire Pasiroosi omu nsi ya Misri, baagarukamu Yeremia nibagira bati:" 
Jeremiah44:16 Titurikwija kukuhurira omuri ekyo kigambo ki otugambiire omu iziina rya MUKAMA," 
Jeremiah44:17 kureka nitwija kuhikiiriza ekigambo kyona eki twagambire nituhiga, okwoterera omugabekazi w'omu iguru obubaane, n'okumushukira empongano z'eby'okunywa, nk'oku twabaire tukora, itwe na baatatenkuriitwe n'abagabe baitu n'abanyaginya baitu, tukiri omu ndembo za Yuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu; ahabw'okuba omuri obwo bunaku tukaba twine eby'okurya bingi, turi gye, tutaine kabi karikutuhikaho." 
Jeremiah44:18 Kwonka okwiha obu twarereera kwoterera omugabekazi w'omu iguru obubaane n'okumushukira empongano z'eby'okunywa, tukabura byona, twamarwaho rurara n'enjara." 
Jeremiah44:19 Kandi abo bakazi baagira bati: Obu twabaire twoterera omugabekazi w'omu iguru obubaane, tukamushukira empongano z'eby'okunywa, noogira ngu tukaba tumukorera otukeeki tumuramya, tumushukira empongano z'eby'okunya, abashaija baitu batarikubisiima?" 
Jeremiah44:20 Bwanyima Yeremia yaabuuza abantu boona, abashaija n'abakazi abaamugarukiremu batyo ati:" 
Jeremiah44:21 Beitu obubaane obu mwayotereire omu ndembo za Yuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu, imwe na baashwenkuriimwe, abagabe baanyu n'abanyiginya baanyu, n'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi, MUKAMA tarabiijukire, bikamuhika aha mutima?" 
Jeremiah44:22 MUKAMA akaba atakibaasa kugumisiririza bibi byanyu n'ebihagaro ebi mwabaire nimukora; nikyo ensi yaanyu yaahindukiire amatongo n'eihamba n'eky'okukyeenwa, etagire owaagituuramu, nk'oku kiri na hati." 
Jeremiah44:23 Ekyabareeteire kuhikwaho akabi aka koona, nk'oku kiri hati, n'ahabw'okuba mukootera obubaane, mwacumura ahari MUKAMA, timwayorobera iraka rye, n'obu kwakuba okugyendera omu biragiro bye, n'omu byatairweho, n'omu bi yaahamize." 
Jeremiah44:24 Bwanyima Yeremia yaagaruka yaagambira abantu boona n'abakazi boona ati: Imwe Bayuda 'mwe mwena abari omu nsi ya Misri, nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah44:25 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe n'abakazi baanyu mukeegambira n'endimi zaanyu, mwabihikiiriza n'emikono yaanyu, nimugira muti: Tituribura kuhikiiriza ebi twagambire nituhiga, kwoterera omugabekazi w'omu iguru obubaane, n'okumushukira empongano z'eby'okunywa. Mpaho nimwirooko mugumizemu n'okuhiga kwanyu, kandi mukuhikiirize." 
Jeremiah44:26 Kwonka imwe Bayuda 'mwe mwena abatwire omu nsi ya Misri, muhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA. Reeba, ndahiire eiziina ryangye erikuru, ku eiziina ryangye ritarigaruka kurahirwa muntu wa Yuda weena ori omu nsi ya Misri naagira ati: Nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah44:27 Reeba, mbataireho abiri kubakora kubi, ti kubakora gye. Abayuda boona abari omu nsi ya Misri baryamarwaho rurara n'enjara, okuhitsya obu barihweraho kimwe." 
Jeremiah44:28 N'abarihonoka ahari rurara baryaruga omu nsi ya Misri, bagarukye omu nsi ya Yuda bari mbarwa; kandi Abayuda boona abatsigaireho abaizire omu nsi ya Misri kutuuramu baryamanya ou ekigambo kye krigumaho, yaaba kyangye nari kyabo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Aka niko karibabeera akamanyiso, ku ndibafubirira omuri ogu mwanya, mukabona kumanya ku ebigambo byangye biriguma biri eby'amazima, bikabareetaho akabi." 
Jeremiah44:30 Kandi oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kuhayo Faraho Hofura omugabe wa Misri omu mikono y'abazigu be n'abarikumuhiiga kumwita, nk'oku naahaireyo Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda omu mikono ya Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni, owaabaire ari omuzigu we, kandi naamuhiiga kumwita." 
Jeremiah45:1 Eki n'ekigambo eki nabi Yeremia yaagmbiire Baruki mwene Neria, obu yaahandiika ebigambo ebi omu kitabo, naabigambirwa Yeremia omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda, naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah45:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikukugira, iwe Baruki, ati:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Okagira oti: Ai bambe! ehsi ndeebire, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ayongyeire enaku aha busaasi bwangye; okutsinda kwankabya, tiinyine buhuumure." 
Jeremiah45:4 Mbwenu omugire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, eki naayombekire, ninkisheenya; kandi eki naabyaire, ninkikuura; kandi niinyija kukikora omu nsi yoona." 
Jeremiah45:5 Mbwenu nooyesherurira ebikuru? Otabisherura. Ahabw'okuba reeba, naaza kureeta akabi aha bantu boona; kwonak iwe ndyakutimbuura omu rugamba n'engabirano, nigo magara gaawe, omu myanya yoona ei orizamu; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah46:1 Eki n'ekigambo ekyaizire ahari nabi Yeremia, nikigamba aha mahanga." 
Jeremiah46:2 Ebya Misri. Eby'eihe rya Faraho-Neeko omugabe wa Misri, eryabaire riri Kakemishi aha mugyera Furaati, eri Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaasingwire omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosia omugabe wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah46:3 Nimuteekateekye engabo nkye n'mpago, Muze aha rugamba." 
Jeremiah46:4 Mutandiikye embaraasi, Muzitembe, imwe abazigyenderaho! Muze omu myanya yaanyu mujwaire enkofiira, Mweze amacumu gaanyu, mujware ebijwaro by'ebyoma." 
Jeremiah46:5 Mbwenu naaba naakireebera ki? Bahahaize emitima, baagaruka enyima, N'amamanzi gaabo gasingwirwe, Gairuka nigahunga, gatarikureeba nyima; Ebirikutiinisa biri embaju zoona; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah46:6 Empaya-maguru tizirikubaasa kuhunga, N'amamanzi tigarikubaasa kukira. Bateire entsibo, baagwa Aha mugyera Furaati aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ogu n'oha, orikwijura nk'omugyera Nailo, Nk'emigyera ei amaizi gaayo garikuboroogota?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Misri neijura nka Nailo, Nk'emigyera ei amaizi gaayo garikuboroogota, Neegira eti: Ndyaijura, nshwekye ensi yoona, Ncwekyereze endembo n'abazitwiremu." 
Jeremiah46:9 Nimuhurure, imwe mbaraasi 'mwe; Naimwe bigaari 'mwe, nimurigite! K'amamanzi gashohore, Abanyesiopia n'Abapuuti enkwata-ngabo, N'Abaluudi baarugambwa enkwata-mata." 
Jeremiah46:10 Ahakuba eryo izooba n'eizooba rya MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe, Eizooba ry'okuhooreraho abazigu be enzigu; Rurara eryarya, ehaagye, Enywe eshagama yaabo, eigute; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA, Ruhanga ow'amahe, naatambira ebitambo Aha mugyera Furaati aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso." 
Jeremiah46:11 Inamuka, oze Gileadi, oiheyo omubazi gw'okwomoora, Iwe Misri 'we, omwishiki oshugaine! Emibazi mingi ei otuura nookoresa n'eya busha; Tori w'okukira." 
Jeremiah46:12 Amahanga gahuriire okuhemuka kwawe, N'ensi eijwire okuborooga kwawe; Ahabw'okuba emanzi ebandaine n'endiijo, Zombi zaagwera hamwe." 
Jeremiah46:13 Eki n'ekigambo eki MUKAMA yaagambiire nabi Yeremia, nikigamba aha kuhurura kwa Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni kuteera ensi ya Misri." 
Jeremiah46:14 Murangye omuri Misiri, mumanyise omuri Migidooli, Murangye omuri Noofa na Tahapenesi, Nimugira muti: Yemerera, kandi oyeteekateekye; Ahabw'okuba rurara neija kumaraho embaju zaawe zoona." 
Jeremiah46:15 Ahabw'enki Apisi ehungire? Ahabw'enki enimi yaawe tegumireho eyemereire? Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA niwe agiteire ahansi. 
Jeremiah46:16 Ateerize baingi entsibo, baagwa batungamiraine; Bwanyima baagira bati: Ka twimukye, Tugarukye omuri beene waitu omu nsi ei twazaarirwemu, Tuhungye rurara y'orikuhata." 
Jeremiah46:17 Mukubye Faraho omugabe wa Misri, Mumwete Ruyomba oteeta ha bunaku obutairweho." 
Jeremiah46:18 Mukama, ou eiziina rye riri MUKAMA ow'amahe, Naagira ati: Niinyerahira, Ku hariija orikushusha nk'oku Tabora eri omu nshozi, Kandi nk'oku Karumeeli eri aha rubaju rw'enyanja." 
Jeremiah46:19 Imwe abatwire omuri Misri, Mukome ebintu byanyu, mweteekateekyere okutwarwa omu bukwatwa; Ahabw'okuba Noofu eryahinduka amatongo, Eyokibwe, habure owaagituuramu." 
Jeremiah46:20 Misri n'enyana enyamibwa, Kwonka enkuriikizi erugire omu bukiizi-bwa-bumohso yaagigwaho." 
Jeremiah46:21 Nangwa n'abaserukare abarikukorera ebihembo Ni nk'enyana ezigomokire; Eego, bahindukire, boona baahunga; Tibaayemerera; Ahakuba eizooba ryabo ry'okugwererwaho akagwe riizire, Nibwo bunaku bw'okufubirwa kwabo." 
Jeremiah46:22 Eiraka ryayo ni nk'ery'enjoka erikusherebuza neehunga; Ahabw'okuba abazigu baayo nibaija n'amaani, Kugirwanisa n'empango Nk'ez'abarikwatsa enku." 
Jeremiah46:23 Baryatema ekibira kyayo, N'obu kiraabe kitarikwogwamu; Ahabw'okuba ni baingi okukira enzigye, Tibarikubarwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah46:24 Misri eryakwatwa enshoni, Eheebweyo omu mikono y'abantu Abarikuruga aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Jeremiah46:25 MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, agizire ati: Niinyija kufubira Amoni owa Tebesi, Faraho, Misri, baaruhanga baayo, abagabe baayo n'abarikwesiga Faraho boona." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ndyabahayo omu mikono y'abarikubahiiga, omu mikono ya Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni n'omu y'abakuru b'engabo ze. Bwanyima Misri erytuurwamu nk'omu biro bya ira; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah46:27 Kwonka otatiina, iwe Yakobo mwiru wangye, Kandi otahahaaza omutima, iwe Israeli, Ahabw'okuba ndyakujuna, nkwihe hare, N'oruzaaro rwawe ndwihe omu nsi ei baatwairwemu bari enkwatwa. Yakobo aryagaruka atuuze, agaramisiriize, Kandi tiharigira waamutiinisa." 
Jeremiah46:28 MUKAMA naagira ati: Otatiina, Iwe Yakobo mwiru wangye; Ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe. Ndyamariraho kimwe amahanga goona, Agu naakubingiiremu; Kwonka iwe tindikumariraho kimwe. Ndyakuhana ninkubarira, Kandi buzimazima tindireka kukufubira." 
Jeremiah47:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyaizire ahari nabi Yeremia nikigamba aha Bafilistia, Faraho atakasingwire Gaaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, reeba amaizi maingi nigaijura omu bukiizi-bwa-bumohso; Kandi garyarugwamu omwegyemure gw'amaani, Gushandaare omu nsi egi, gushwekye ebirimu byona N'orurembo n'abarutwiremu boona; Abashaija baryateera enduuru, N'abatwire omu nsi boona baboroogye." 
Jeremiah47:3 Kandi emitsindo y'ebyara by'embaraasi ze, N'endigito y'enziga z'ebigaari bye ebirikwiruka, Biryareetera abazaire kuhunga batareebire nyima kureeba abaana baabo, Ahabw'emikono yaabo okutenteburwa," 
Jeremiah47:4 Eizooba eri Abafilistia boona baricwekyererezibwaho Kumara omuri Tuuro na Sidoni Omuhwezi weena oriba atsigairemu; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aryacwekyereza Abafilistia Abaatsigaire aha baarugire omu kirwa Kafutoori. 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaaza egizire oruhara, Ashikelooni ehwerekyereire. Yeimwe Abaanaki abatsigaireho, Muryahitsya hi okwesharashara." 
Jeremiah47:6 Ai bambe, iwe rurara ya MUKAMA 'we, Oryatuuza ryari? Yegarure omu kyobati kyawe; Tuuza, oteetengyetsa." 
Jeremiah47:7 Neebaasa eta kutuuza MUKAMA agiragiire kukora? Agitaireho kurwanisa Ashikeloonio n'orubaju rw'enyanja. 
Jeremiah48:1 Ebya Moabu. Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli arikugamba naagira ati: Neebo eryakareeba, ahabw'okuhindurwa amatongo; Kiryasaimu ehemwirwe, yaakwatwa; Ekigo kyayo kihemwirwe," 
Jeremiah48:2 Okurangaanwa kwa Moabu tikwakiriho, Omuri Heshibooni bamugiriire enaama mbi, Nibagira bati: Nimwije, tumumareho, arekye kuba eihanga! Naiwe oryahunamibwa, Kandi rurara eryakuhiiga." 
Jeremiah48:3 Nimuhurire! Hariho okuborooga nikwema Horonaimu, Nikugira kuti: Okweshobera n'okucwekyerera kuhango!" 
Jeremiah48:4 Moabu ecwekyereziibwe, Okuborooga nikuhurirwa kuhika Zoari," 
Jeremiah48:5 Ahakuba aharikwinamuka Luhiisi Nibainamuka nibarira, Kandi aharikushuumirwa Horonaimu Bahuriire okuborooga kw'abarikucwekyerezibwa." 
Jeremiah48:6 Muhungye, mukize amagara gaanyu! Mube nk'enturegye y'omu ihamba!" 
Jeremiah48:7 Ahabw'okwesiga ebigo byawe ebigumire n'eitungo ryawe, Naiwe oryakwatwa; Na Kemoshi eryatwarwa omu bukwatwa Hamwe n'abanyamurwa n'abanyiginya baayo." 
Jeremiah48:8 Omuhwerekyerezi aryagwa aha ndembo zoona kitaraariire; Tihariho rurembo na rumwe orurikira; Oruhanga ruryahwerekyerera, N'oruhita ruryacwekyerezibwa, Nk'oku MUKAMA agizire." 
Jeremiah48:9 Ha Moabu amapapa, Agurukye, ahungye; Endembo ze zihindukye amatongo, Zibure owaazituuramu." 
Jeremiah48:10 Orikukora omurimo gwa MUKAMA n'obweremwanaakakyeenwe! N'orikuzibira rurara ye kusheesha ehsagama nawe naakakyeenwe! 
Jeremiah48:11 Moabu akagogyera okuruga omu buto bwe, Yaateeka nka viinyo y'omurera; Tarashukanwirwe mu zindi nyungu, N'obu kwakuba okuza omu bukwatwa; Nikyo agumiire n'obunuzi bwe, N'omugaju gwe tigukahindukire." 
Jeremiah48:12 MUKAMA naagira ati: N'ahabw'ekyo reeba obunaku buryahika, obu ndimwoherereza ab'okumushuka, ebiri omu nyungu ze bakabimaramu, n'enywero ze bakazaatagura." 
Jeremiah48:13 Haza obwo Moabu aryakwatwa enshoni ahabwa Kemoshi, nk'oku enju ya Israeli yaakwatsirwe enshoni ahabwa Beseeli, eyaabaire eri obwesigye bwabo." 
Jeremiah48:14 Nimubaasa muta kugira muti: turi amamanzi kandi abashaija, rugambwa aha rugamba?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Omuhwerekyerezi wa Moabu n'endembo ze aizire, Abatsigazi be entoore bashuumire kwitwa; Nikwo Mukama, ou eiziina rye riri MUKAMA ow'amahe, arikugira." 
Jeremiah48:16 Akabi akaza kuhika ahari Moabu kari haihi; Okubonabona kwe nikwiruka. 
Jeremiah48:17 Imwe abamwehinguriririize mwena, mumucurire; Naimwe mwena abarikumanya eiziina rye mugire muti: Eshi enkoni y'amaani ey'obugabe ehendekire, Enkoni ey'ekitiinisa." 
Jeremiah48:18 Iwe mutuuzi wa Diboni 'we, Shuuma orugye omu kitiinisa kyawe, Oshutame aha nsi ekarangataine! Ahabw'okuba omuhwerekyerezi wa Moabu aizire kukurwanisa, Aherize kucwekyereza ebigo byawe." 
Jeremiah48:19 Yemerera aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, oreebe, Iwe mutuuzi wa Aroeri! Obuuze omushaija ocwire n'omukazi ohungire, Oti: Biri bita?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Moabu ehemwirwe ahabw'okusheenywa; Mucure, muboroogye! Mugambire aha mugyera Arunooni Muti: Moabu egizirwe amatongo." 
Jeremiah48:21 Orubanja ruhikire aha nsi z'empita, Horoni, Yahaza, Mefaasi," 
Jeremiah48:22 Diboni, Neebo, Besidibulaimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiryasaimu, Besigamuli, Besi-meoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriosi, Bozira, n'endembo zoona ez'omu nsi ya Moabu eza hare n'eza haihi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Eihembe rya Moabu ricwirweho, n'omukono gwe guhendekire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah48:26 Mumusinze, ayekuringye omu bitanaki bye, nawe ashekyererwe, ahabw'okuba ayekurize ahari MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah48:27 Israeli okaba omushekyerera, omuzongoreza omutwe, obu waabaire omugambaho, nk'okwatiirwe omu bashuma." 
Jeremiah48:28 Imwe abatwire Moabu, Murugye omu ndembo, mutuure omu nyanga z'amabaare! Mube nk'enkombe eyarika aha rubaju rw'omunwa gw'orusa." 
Jeremiah48:29 Tuhuriire amaryo ga Moabu- Aine amaryo maingi- Emyemanyo n'emyehimbiso ye Kandi n'emyekuniko y'omu mutima gwe. 
Jeremiah48:30 MUKAMA naagira ati: Nimmanya orubwa rwe; Ebi arikwehimbisizaho ti by'amazima, Kandi n'ebi arikukora n'eby'ebishuba." 
Jeremiah48:31 Nikyo ndiririra Moabu, Nkaboroogyera Moabu yoona, Nkacurira abashaija ba Kiriheresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Iwe muzaabibu gwa Sibuma 'we, Ndyakucurira okukira oku naacuriire Yazeri; Amataagi gaawe gakambuka enyanja, Gaahika Yazeri; Omuhwerekyerezi ayetwire omu myaka yaawe y'ekyanda n'omu mizaabibu yaawe." 
Jeremiah48:33 Okwesiima n'okushemererwa biihirwe Omu nsi ya Moabu erikweza. Nkabuza viinyo omu manyuukiro; Tihariho orikunyuuka naateera akaari; Kandi n'obu bariteera akaari, Tikariba k'okushemererwa." 
Jeremiah48:34 Heshibooni na Eleale nibataka; eiraka ry'okutaka kwabo nirihuririrwa Yahazi, okuruga Zoari okuhika Horonaimu na Egulaati-shelishiya. Ahabw'okuba amaizi ga Nimuriimu gatsigirweho." 
Jeremiah48:35 Kandi ndyamariraho kimwe omuntu weena otambira ebitambo omu myanya mikuru ey'omuri Moabu, akooterera ruhanga we obubaane; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah48:36 Nikyo omutima gwangye gurikuboroogyerera Moabu nk'eiraka ry'esheegu; kandi gukaboroogyera gutyo abashaija ba kiriheresi; kandi nikyo eitungo eri baabaire baine rihwereireho. 
Jeremiah48:37 Buri mutwe gwona n'enkomborora, na buri bireju bimweirwe; emikono yoona esharashazirwe, kandi beezirikire ebiguniya." 
Jeremiah48:38 Aha mitwe y'amaju ga Moabu goona n'omu nteeraniro z'emihanda zoona tihariyo kindi kureka okutonzya; ahabw'okuba nyatagwire Moabu nk'enyungu etarikweteebwaho; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah48:39 Yeimwe, eshi ehendekire! Eshi nibaborooga! Eshi Moabu eteire abazigu omugongo, yaahemuka! Okwo nikwo ebaire eky'okushekyererwa n'kirikutiinisa ahari boona abagyehinguriririize." 
Jeremiah48:40 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, haryagira owaaguruka nk'eishamba, amapapa ge agashashaanure kurwanisa Moabu;" 
Jeremiah48:41 Endembo zikubuurwe, n'ebigo bikwatwe. Kandi eryo izooba emitima y'amamanzi ga Moabu Eryaba nk'ogw'omukazi orikurumwa kuzaara." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moabu eryacwekyerezibwa, terigaruka kuba ihanga obundi, Ahabw'okuba ekeekuza ahari MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah48:43 Iwe mutuuzi wa Moabu 'we, Ekirikutiinisa, ekiina, n'omutego Bikuri omumaisho; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah48:44 Orihunga ekirikutiinisa aryagwa omu kiina, N'oriruga omu kiina aryagwa omu mutego; Ahabw'okuba ebyo byona ndyabireeta ahari Moabu Omu mwaka gw'okufubirwa kwabo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah48:45 Omu kicuucu kya Heshibooni Abacwire beemereire, bataine maani; Ahabw'okuba omuriro gurugire Heshibooni, N'ekirimi kyagwo kyaruga omu nju ya Sihooni, Gwacwekyereza obuso bwa Moabu, Ekirunga ky'aha mutwe gw'abarikujagarara." 
Jeremiah48:46 Eshi waakareeba, Moabu! Abantu ba Kemoshi beeshobeire, Ahabw'okuba batabani baawe bakwatsirwe, Na bahara baawe banyagirwe." 
Jeremiah48:47 Kwonka omu biro by'aha muheru Ndyagarura Abamoabu abaatwairwe omu bukwatwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. Aha niho orubanja rwa Moabu rwagarukira. 
Jeremiah49:1 Eby'Abaamoni. Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Beitu Israeli tagira batabani, Tagira w'okumuhungurira? Mbwenu ahabw'enki Milikomu abingire oruganda rwa Gaadi, Abantu be bakakubuura endembo zaarwo, bakazituuramu?" 
Jeremiah49:2 MUKAMA naagira ati: Reeba, obunaku nibwija, Obu ndireetera enduuru y'okuhuruza kuhurirwa Abarirwanisa Rabba ey'Abaamoni; Kandi eryahinduka emituumo y'ebisheenyirwe, Ebirorero byayo byokibwe. Bwanyima Israeli eryakubuura abaagikubwire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah49:3 Borooga, iwe Heshibooni, ahakuba Ai ehindwirwe amatongo! Imwe bahara ba Rabba, nimucure, Mwezirikye ebiguniya, mutonzye, Nimukora oku n'oku omu ngo; Ahabw'okuba Milikomu aryatwarwa omu bukwatwa Hamwe n'abanyamurwa n'abanyiginya be." 
Jeremiah49:4 Ahabw'enki nooyehimbisa ahabw'empanga zaawe, Iwe mwishiki orikugaruka enyima 'we, Owaabaire naayesiga eitungo rye, naagira ati: N'oha oriija kundwanisa?" 
Jeremiah49:5 MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, ndyakureetaho ekirikutiinisa, Kireetwe abakwehinguririize boona; Kandi muryabingwa omu nsi, buri muntu atoore ogwe, Habure ow'okubagarura." 
Jeremiah49:6 Kwonka bwanyima ndyagarura Abaamoni abaatwairwe omu bukwatwa, nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah49:7 Ebya Edomu. Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Beitu omuri Temani tihaakibamu bwengye? Okuhabura kuhweire omu banyabwengye? Obwengye bwabo buhwereireho kimwe? 
Jeremiah49:8 Imwe batuuzi ba Dedani 'mwe, Muhungye, mugarukyeyo mutuure omu bicokoromi ahatarikuhikwa. Ahabw'okuba obunaku bw'okumufubira ku burihika, Ndyamureetaho akabi ka Esau." 
Jeremiah49:9 Abashoromi b'emizaabibu ku baakwija owaawe, Tibakaakutsigira eby'okuhumba? Abashuma ku baakwija nyekiro, Tibakaiba ebirikubahaazya byonka?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Kwonka Esau nyowe mmumazireho ebi aine byona, Nshurwire obweshereko bwe, Takibaasa kweshereka. Abaana be, beene ishe na bataahi be, Bacwekyereziibwe, kandi nawe takiriho." 
Jeremiah49:11 Tsiga efuuzi zaawe, nzoorore, N'abafakaazi baawe baanyesigye." 
Jeremiah49:12 Ahabw'okuba oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Abaabaire batashemereire kunywa ekikopo, ku baraabe nibaragiirwa kukinywa, iwe oryagyenda otafubiirwe? Torigyenda otafubiirwe; oshemereire kukinywa." 
Jeremiah49:13 MUKAMA naagira ati: Nyerahiire, ku Bozira eriba ekirikutiinisa, eky'okushekyererwa, amatongo n'eky'okukyeenwa; n'endembo zaayo zoona ziryaguma ziri amatongo ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah49:14 Mpuriire amakuru agarugire ahari MUKAMA; Entumwa etumirwe aha mahanga neegira eti: Mweteerane, muze kumurwanisa, Mwimukye, muze aha rugamba!" 
Jeremiah49:15 Ahabw'okuba reeba, niinyija kukugira mukye omu mahanga, Obe orikugaywa omu bantu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Okutiinisa kwawe n'amaryo g'omu mutima gwawe Bikubeihire, Iwe otuura omu bicokoromi by'amabaare, Okeegumira aha mutwe gw'ekibungo. N'obu waakwarika ahaiguru nk'eishamba, Ndyakuhanurayo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah49:17 Edomu eryaba eky'okutangaarirwa; origirabaho weena aryatangaara, ayeshaanye ahabw'akagwe koona akagigwereire." 
Jeremiah49:18 Nk'oku Sodoma na Gomora n'endembo ezaabaire ziherereine nazo zaakumbagaziibwe, nikwo hatarigira waatuurayo, n'obu yaakuba ow'okushuhuukirayo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah49:19 Reeba, nk'oku entare ejumbuka omu kishaka kya Yorudani kuteera eka y'entaama egumire, nikwo ndibareetera okumuhunga kitaraariire, nkamuteeraho ou ndikwenda weena kumutegyeka. Mbwenu n'oha orikushushana naanye? N'oha owaakubaasa kunteeraho obunaku bw'okwiziramu?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ni muriisa ki owaakunza omu kaso? N'ahabw'ekyo muhurire enaama ei MUKAMA acumire kurwanisa Edomu, n'ebi amaririire kukora kurwanisa abatuuzi ba Temani. Buzimazima n'abaana b'entaama baryakururwa batwarwe, n'eka yaabo eshoberwe munong aahabw'ebiribaho." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ensi eryatengyetsibwa obwaku bw'okugwa kwabo, eiraka ry'okuborooga kwabo riryahuririrwa aha Nyanja erikutukura." 
Jeremiah49:22 Reeba, haryagira owaimuka agurukye naarahuka nk'eishamba, ashashaanure amapapa ge kuza kurwanisa Bozira; kandi ahari eryo izooba emitima y'amamanzi ga Edomu eryaba nk'ogw'omukazi orikurumwa kuzaara." 
Jeremiah49:23 Ebya Damasiko. Hamasi na Arupaadi bashobeirwe, Ahabw'okuhurira enkuru mbi; Emitima ebahweire omunda ahabw'okutiina, nibarabanamu nk'enyanja etarikubaasa kucureera." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damasiko ehweire amaani, yaahinduka kuhugna, Yaakwatwa obwoba bwingi, Obuwsaasi n'enaku byamugira Nk'eby'omukazi orikwenda kuzaara." 
Jeremiah49:25 Orurembo rugambwa kandi orurikushemeza Ka rutsigirweho! 
Jeremiah49:26 Nikyo abatsigazi baarwo barigwera omu nteeraniro z'enguuto, Kandi ahari eryo izooba abaserukare baarwo boona baryacwekyerezibwa; nikwo MUKMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah49:27 Kandi ndyatweka omuriro omu rugo rwa Damasiko, Gwokyeze kimwe zaanyaruju za Benihadadi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Ebya Kedari n'obugabe bwa Hazori, obu Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaasingwire. Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Nimwimukye, mwinamukye muteere Kedari! Mucwekyereze abantu b'oburugwa-izooba!" 
Jeremiah49:29 Amahema gaabo n'amasyo gaabo garyanyagwa Hamwe n'emikingo yaabo n'ebintu byabo byona; Engamira zaabo ziryabaakwa zitwarwe, Abantu baryabateerera enduuru nibagira bati: Reeba, eby'okutiinisa byabareetwa embaju zoona!" 
Jeremiah49:30 Imwe batuuzi ba Hazori 'mwe, Nimuhungye, muze hare, mutuure omu bicokoromi ahatarikuhikwa; Ahabw'okuba Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni Acumire enaama y'okubarwanisa, Kandi amaririire kubateera; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah49:31 Mwimukye, muhurure, muteere eihanga Erigaramisiriize kandi eritwire buhooro, Eritaine marembo n'obu zaakuba empimbi z'okukingisa, Kandi eryetuuriire ryonka; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah49:32 Engamira zaabo ziryatwarwa, N'amasyo gaabo g'ente ganyagwe. Abarikutega ebyeyera, Ndyabataataanisiza embaju zoona ei emiyaga ereetwa, Mbareeteho akabi akaribareetwa embaju zoona; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah49:33 Na Hazoori eryaba eikoobaaniro rya zaamuha, Ebe amatongo ebiro byona; Terituurwamu muntu, Kandi tiharigira waagishuhuukiramu." 
Jeremiah49:34 Eki n'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyaizire ahari nabi Yeremia nikigamba ahari Elamu omu kutandika kw'obutegyeki bwa Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda. 
Jeremiah49:35 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyahenda obuta bwa Elamu, obu amaani gaabo gahamiraho." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndyareeta emiyaga ena, ereetwe aha mbaju ina z'eiguru, eteere Elamu, mbataataanisize ei egyo miyaga yoona yaareetwa; kandi tiharibaho ihanga eri abaribingwa omuri Elamu batarizamu." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndyatiinisiza Elamu omu maisho g'abazigu be n'omu maisho g'abarikumuhiiga. Ndyabareetaho akabi, nikyo kiniga kyangye ekingi; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. Kandi ndyabakuratsa rurara, okuhitsya obu ndibamaraho," 
Jeremiah49:38 bwanyima nte ekitebe kyangye ky'obukama omuri Elamu, ncwekyereze omugabe waabo n'abanyiginya baabo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah49:39 Kwonka omu biro bya bwanyima ndyagarura aba Elamu abaatwairwe bari enkwatwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah50:1 Eki n'ekigambo eki MUKAMA yaagambire ahari Babulooni n'aha nsi y'Abakaludaaya, naaraba omuri nabi Yeremia." 
Jeremiah50:2 Mumanyise amahanga, murangye, Mwimutsye orurango, murangye, Murekye kukishereka, mugire muti: Babulooni ekwatsirwe, Beeli ehemwirwe, Na Merodaaki ehahaize omutima; Ebishushani bye bihemwirwe, Ebirikuramibwa bihahaize omutima;" 
Jeremiah50:3 Ahabw'okuba aha bukiizi-ba-bumosho hareetsirweho eihanga kumuteera, niriija kuhindura ensi ye amatongo, kandi tihaine origituuramu; abantu n'amatungo byona biryahunga." 
Jeremiah50:4 MUKAMA naagira ati: Omu biro ebyo n'omu bunaku obwo Abaisraeli n'Abayuda baryaija kumwe, baije nibarira, kandi baryasherura MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Baryahabuza omuhanda ogurikuza Saayuuni, bataireyo amaisho, nibagira bati: Nimwije, twehitsye MUKAMA, turagaane nawe endagaano etarihwaho, kandi etaryeba." 
Jeremiah50:6 Abantu bangye bakaba nk'entaama ezibuzire, abariisa baabo bakabahabye, baabahabisiza omu bibungo; baaruga omu bibungo, baaza omu kabungo, baayebwa eka yaabo." 
Jeremiah50:7 Abaabaire babashangayo baabashonshomera; abazigu baabo baagira bati: Titwine rubanja, ahabw'okuba bakacumura ahari MUKAMA, obutaaho bwabo obw'amazima, kandi amatsiko ga baishenkurubo." 
Jeremiah50:8 Nimuhungye, murugye omuri Babulooni, murugye omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya, mube nk'empaya z'embuzi ezeebembeire obusyo;" 
Jeremiah50:9 ahabw'okuba reeba, niinyija kwimutsya omutwe gw'amahanga mahango, ngaihe omu nsi y'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, gateere Babulooni, bagitengyere orugamba, bakwatireyo abantu baayo, babatware. Emyambi yaabo ni nk'omurwani rugambwa otagaruka ngaro nsha." 
Jeremiah50:10 Bukaludaaya eryanyagwa; abariginyaga boona baryahaaga; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah50:11 Imwe banyagi b'obuhunguzi bwangye 'mwe, N'obu mwakushemererwa, n'obu mwakwesingiza, N'obu mwakurinda nk'enyana erikwenda kwema, Mukabubura nk'enimi," 
Jeremiah50:12 Nyokoimwe aryakwatirwa kimwe enshoni, Owaabazaire ahemukye. Reeba, aryaba eihanga eririkuhereeruka enyima y'agandi, Eihamba ryomire kandi ery'omusheenyi." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ahabw'ekiniga kya MUKAMA tarituurwamu, Kureka aryahindukira kimwe eihamba; Buri muntu weena oriraba ahari Babulooni aryata engaro aha munwa, Ayeshaanye ahabw'ebibonabono byayo byona." 
Jeremiah50:14 Mutengye orugamba, mwehinguririze Babulooni kugirwanisa, Imwe mwena abananuuzi b'amata, mugirashe, mutatsigaza mwambi na gumwe, Ahabw'okuba ekacumura ahari MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah50:15 Mugiteerereho akaari embaju zoona, ahakuba yaabagomookyera, Ebigo byayo bigwire, Engo zaayo zikumbagaziibwe, Ahabw'okuba oku n'okuhoora enzigu kwa MUKAMA. Mumuhoore, mumugire nk'oku yaagizire." 
Jeremiah50:16 Mumare omuri Babulooni omubibi, N'orikukwata omusyo gw'engyesho omu igyesha; Ahabwa rurara y'orikuhata buri muntu aryagaruka omuri beene waabo, Kandi buri muntu aryahungira omu nsi ye." 
Jeremiah50:17 Israeli entaama ehiigirwe, ebingirwe entare. Omugabe wa Asiria niwe yaabandize kumushonshomera, mbwenu aha muheru Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaamemena amagufa ge." 
Jeremiah50:18 Nikyo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, arikugirira ati: Reeba, niinyija kufubira omugabe wa Babulooni n'eni ye, nk'oku naafubiire omugabe wa Asiria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ndyagarura Israeli omu mariisizo ge, ariisize ahari Karumeeli n'omri Bashani; kandi omutima gwe guryahaahaagirira aha bibungo bya Efuraimu n'omuri Gileadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Omu biro ebyo n'omu bunaku obwo eby'okushiisha biryasherurwa omuri Israeli, biburel; kandi n'ekibi kiryasherurwa omuri Yuda, habure ekibi kyona ekyashangwamu; ahabw'okuba ndyasaasira abu nditsigamu abaatsigaireho; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah50:21 Inamuka, oteere ensi ya Merasaimu, Oteere n'abatuuzi ba Pekodi; Obaite; ku oriheza kubaita, ocwekyerereze kimwe, Okore byoan ebi naakuragiire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah50:22 Orwari rw'orugamba, n'okucwekyereza kwingi Biri omuri egyo nsi!" 
Jeremiah50:23 Enyondo y'ensi yoona, K'etemirwe, ekagutuka! Babulooni k'ehindukire Ekirikwitsa amahanga obwoba." 
Jeremiah50:24 Iwe Babulooni, nkakutega omutego, gwakukwata, Kandi tiwaakimanya; okareebwa, kandi waakwatwa Nooturwa okurwanisa MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah50:25 MUKAMA aigwire eibiikiro ry'eby'okurwanisa bye, Yaihamu eby'okurwanisa by'ekiniga kye, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga aine Eki arikuza kukora omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah50:26 Nimwije, mugiteere, nimugireetwa embaju zoona, Mwigure ebitara byayo; Mugicwekyerereze kimwe, mutagira ekyayo eki mwatsigaho." 
Jeremiah50:27 Murekye enimi zaayo zoona Zishuume omu ibaagiro, muziitireyo. Baryakareeba, ahabw'okuba obunaku bwabo buhikire, Obunaku bw'okufubirwa kwabo." 
Jeremiah50:28 Nimuhurire eiraka ry'abarikuhunga, nibacwa kuruga omu nsi ya Babulooni, ngu babone kumanyisa omuri Saayuuni enzigu ei MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu arikuhoorera hekalu ye." 
Jeremiah50:29 Muhuruze abarasi boona, abananuuzi b'amata, bateere Babulooni. Mugyehinguririze ensiisira kugirwanisa; harekye kugira n'omwe owaacwa. Mugizimuurire ebirikwingana n'ebi yaakozire, mugigire nk'oku yaagizire kwona; ahabw'okuba ekagira amaryo, yaagaya MUKAMA, Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Nikyo abatsigazi barigwera omu nteeraniro z'enguuto zaayo; kandi ahari eryo izooba abaserukare baayo boona baryacwekyerezibwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Jeremiah50:31 Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe, iwe munyamaryo 'we, Ahabw'okuba eizooba ryawe ryahika, Obunaku obu ndikwija kukufubiriraho." 
Jeremiah50:32 Omunyamaryo aryateera entsibo, agwe, Abure owaamwimutsya; Ndyatweka omuriro omu ndembo ze, Gumarireho kimwe ebimwehinguriririize byona." 
Jeremiah50:33 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Abaisraeli nibahatwa hamwe n'Abayuda; abaabatwaire omu bukwatwa babagumize, bangire kubarekura." 
Jeremiah50:34 Omucunguzi waabo n'ow'amaani; MUKAMA ow'amahe niryo iziina rye. Buzimazima aryabatonganira, abone kuha ensi obuhuumure, kwonka abatuuzi ba Babulooni abahe omurabanamu." 
Jeremiah50:35 MUKAMA naagira ati: Rurara yaaza kwita Abakaludaaya, Abatuuzi ba Babulooni, Abanyiginya n'abanyabwengye baayo." 
Jeremiah50:36 Rurara yaaza kwita abafumu, Bahindukye ebifeera; Yaaza kwita amamanzi gaayo, gacwekyerezibwe." 
Jeremiah50:37 Rurara yaaza kwita embaraasi zaayo n'ebigaari byayo, N'abaserukare b'endugamahanga boona abagitwiremu, Babe abakazi. Rurara yaaza kugwa aha butungi bwayo, Abantu baayo banyagwe." 
Jeremiah50:38 Omushana gwaza kwomya amaizi gaayo, goome, Ahabw'okuba n'ensi y'ebishushani ebibaizirwe, Kandi ebishushani ebirikuramibwa bibatwaire omutima." 
Jeremiah50:39 Nikyo enyamaishwa mbi na zaamuha zirituurira Babulooni, na zaamaya zikatuurayo; terigira bantu ebiro byona, n'obu kwakuba okutuurwamu obusingye bwona." 
Jeremiah50:40 Nk'oku Ruhanga yaacwekyereize Sodoma na Gomora n'endembo ezihereraine nazo, nikwo nayo etarituurwamu muntu, n'obu kwakuba okushuhuukirwamu omwana w'omuntu; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah50:41 Reeba, eihanga niriija, niriruga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; Eihanga ry'amaani n'abagabe baingi Nibaimuka nibaruga omu bicweka ry'ensi ebirikuhereerukayo." 
Jeremiah50:42 Bakwaitse amata na'amacumu; N'enshaarizi, tibaine saasi. Orwari rwabo ni nk'enyanja erikuhoorera; Nibagyendera aha mbaraasi, Bajwaire nk'omuntu orikuza aha rugamba Kukurwanisa, iwe Babulooni!" 
Jeremiah50:43 Omugabe wa Babulooni ahuriire enkuru yaabo, Emikono ye yaatentebuka, Yaakwatwa obusaasi bwingi, Nk'obw'omukazi orikurumwa kuzaara." 
Jeremiah50:44 Reeba, nk'oku entare ejumbuka omu kishaka kya Yorudani kuteera eka y'entaama egumire, naanye nikwo ndibareetera kumuhunga ahonaaho, nkamureetera ou ndikwenda weena kumutegyeka. Mbwenu n'oha orikushushana naanye? N'oha owaakubaasa kunteeraho obunaku bw'okwiziramu? Ni muriisa ki owakunza omu kaso?" 
Jeremiah50:45 N'ahabw'ekyo nimuhurire enaama ei MUKAMA acumire kurwanisa Babulooni, n'ebi amaririire kukora kurwansia ensi y'Abakaludaaya. Buzimazima abaana b'entaama zaabo baryakururwa batwarwe, n'eka yaabo eshoberwe munong aahabw'ebiribabaho." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ensi eryatetemesibwa obwaku bw'okukwatwa kwa Babulooni, eiraka ry'okuborooga kwayo rihuririrwe omu mahanga." 
Jeremiah51:1 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba naaza kwimukiza Babulooni N'abatwire Bukaludaaya Omuyaga ogurikuhwerekyereza; 
Jeremiah51:2 Nyoherereze Babulooni abaheheezi, Bagiheheeze, Ebyanga byayo babitsigyemu busha, Ku bariija kugirwanisa aha izooba ry'enaku, Bagiturukire embaju zoona." 
Jeremiah51:3 Omurasi arekye kunanuura obuta bwe, Arekye kwimuka kuhurura, ajwaire ekijwaro kye ky'ekyoma. Mutarisaasira abatsigazi baayo, Mucwekyerereze kimwe eihe ryayo ryona;" 
Jeremiah51:4 emitumbi yaayo eryarambirirana omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya N'emputa zirambirirane omu nguuto zaayo. 
Jeremiah51:5 Ahabw'okuba Abaisraeli n'Abayuda tibatsigirweho Ruhanga waabo, MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ensi yaabo yoona n'obu eraabe eine orubanja Ahari Orikwera wa Israeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 Nimuhungye murugye omuri Babulooni, Buri muntu akize amagara ge! Mutacwekyererezibwa omu kufubirwa kwayo; Ahabw'okuba obu n'obunaku bwa MUKAMA bw'okuhoora enzigu, Naagizimuurira ebi yaakozire." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babulooni ekaba eri ekikopo ky'ezaabu omu ngaro za MUKAMA, Neesinza ensi yoona; Amahanga gakanywa aha maarwa gaayo, Nikyo gashariire." 
Jeremiah51:8 Mbwenu Babulooni egwire kitaraariire, Yaahendeka. Nimugicurire! Musherure omubazi gw'okugitambira obusaasi; Obundi ekaakira." 
Jeremiah51:9 Tukaabaire twatambiire Babulooni, Kwonka teratambiirwe. Nimugitsigyeho, tugyende, Buri muntu agarukey owaabo, Ahabw'okuba orubanja rwayo ruhikire omu iguru, Rwahika ahaiguru omu mwanya." 
Jeremiah51:10 MUKAMA ayorekire ku tutaine rubanja; Mwije tumanyise omuri Saayuuni Omurimo gwa MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu. 
Jeremiah51:11 Nimutyaze emyambi, mukwate engabo! MUKAMA aimukize emitima y'abagabe b'Abameeedi, ahabw'enaama ye ei aine ahari Babulooni n'okugicwekyereza; kandi egyo niyo nzigu ya MUKAMA ei arikuhoorera hekalu ye." 
Jeremiah51:12 Mwimutsye orurango aha ngo za Babulooni, muteho abarinzi b'amaani Ab'okurinda n'ab'okugwera; Ahabw'okuba enaama y'ebi MUKAMA yaagambire aha batuuzi ba Babulooni, Mbwenu agihikize." 
Jeremiah51:13 Imwe abatwire aha maizi maingi, Abaine eitungo ringi, Omuheru gwanyu gwahika, Akagoye k'amagara gaanyu kaacweka." 
Jeremiah51:14 MUKAMA ow'amahe naayerahira ati: Buzimazima ndyakwijuzamu abantu baingi nk'enzigye, Bakuteerereho akaari k'obusinguzi." 
Jeremiah51:15 Niwe yaahangire ensi n'obushoboroozi bwe, Akagihamya n'obwengye bwe; N'okwetegyereza kwe Nikwo yaabambiise eiguru." 
Jeremiah51:16 Ku agamba n'eiraka rye, Omu iguru habamu okuhoorera kw'amaizi; Ainamura oruho okuruga aha muheru gw'ensi, Ataho emirabyo kugwisa enjura, Kandi aiha omuyaga omu mabiikiro ge." 
Jeremiah51:17 Buri muntu ni nk'enyamaishwa, taine bwengye; Buri muheesi w'ezaabu ahamwirwe ebishushani bye ebirikuramibwa; Ahabw'okuba ebishushani bye n'eby'ebishuba, Tibiine mwitsyo." 
Jeremiah51:18 Tibiine mugasho, n'omurimo gw'okubeihabeiha; Omu biro by'okufubirwa kwabyo biryahwerekyerera." 
Jeremiah51:19 Ogwo ori omugabo gwa Yakobo ti nkabyo; Ahabw'okuba niwe yaahangire ebintu byona, Kandi Israeli n'oruganda rw'obuhunguzi bwe. MUKAMA ow'amahe niryo iziina rye." 
Jeremiah51:20 Ori enyondo yangye kandi eky'okurwanisa kyangye; Niiwe nsheenyaguza amahanga, Kandi niiwe ncwekyerezesa ensi z'abagabe;" 
Jeremiah51:21 Niiwe ncwagacwaguza embaraasi n'ogitembire; 
Jeremiah51:22 Niiwe nsheenyaguza ekigaari ky'orugamba n'omuvugi waakyo; Niiwe ncwagacwaguza abashaija n'abakazi; Niiwe ncwagacwaguza abagurusi n'abatsigazi; Niiwe ncwagacwaguza abatsigazi n'empangare; 
Jeremiah51:23 Niiwe ncwagacwaguza omuriisa n'ebusyo bwe; niiwe ncwagacwaguza omuhingi n'ente ze ezi arikuhingisa; Kandi niiwe ncwagacwaguza abategyeki n'abakuru b'engabo. 
Jeremiah51:24 Ndyazimuurira Babulooni n'abatwire Bukaludaaya boona, mbahoorere omu maisho gaanyu, nimbaturaa obubi bwona obu bakoreire omuri Saayuuni; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah51:25 Iwe rushozi rurikuhwerekyereza 'we, Reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe; nikwo MUKAMA orikucwekyereza ensi yoona arikugira. Ndyagorora omukono gwangye, nkukwate, Nkwihe aha mutwe gw'ebibaare, nkukumbagaze, Nkuhindure orushozi rwokiibwe." 
Jeremiah51:26 Toriihwamu ibaare na rimwe ry'okwombekyesa enshonda, N'obu gaakuba amabaare g'emisingi, Kureka oryaguma ori amatongo ebiro byona; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah51:27 Mwimutsye orurango omu nsi, muteere enzamba omu mahanga, Muhateekateekyere amahanga g'okuhateera, Muhuruze ensi z'abagabe kuharwanisa, Araraati, Mini na Ashikenazi; muhateekateekyere omwebembezi, Muhateeze embaraasi eziri nk'ebitootera by'enzigye." 
Jeremiah51:28 Muhateekateekyere amahanga g'okuhateera, Abagabe b'Abameedi hamwe n'abategyeki baabo n'abatsigire baabo; Na buri ihanga eriri omu butegyeki bwabo." 
Jeremiah51:29 Mbwenu ensi neetetema, neeshamba ahabw'obusaasi; Ahabw'okuba enaama, ei MUKAMA acumiire Babulooni Ey'okuhindura ensi yaayo amatongo, Ekabura ow'okugituuramu, ehamire." 
Jeremiah51:30 Abarwani ba Babulooni barekyeire aho okurwana, Baaguma omu bigo byabo ebigumire; Eishaija ribahweire, baaba nk'abakazi; Amaka gaabo nigasya, Emikingo yaabo ehendagwirwe." 
Jeremiah51:31 Entumwa y'amaguru neiruka kubugana endiijo, N'omubiki nairuka kubugana mugyenzi we, kubikira omugabe wa Babulooni, Ku orurembo rwe rukwatsirwe embaju zoona." 
Jeremiah51:32 Enyambukiro zikwatsirwe, Orufunjo barwokize, N'abarwani baine obwoba bwingi, barimbagiriirwe." 
Jeremiah51:33 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli, Arikugamba naagira ati: Babulooni ni nk'eihuuriro omu bunaku bw'okuhuura; Hatsigaire omwanya mukye, Obunaku bw'okushaaruurwa kwayo bukahika." 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni akanshonshomera, Yampendagura, Akangira nk'orunywero orurimu busha, Yammira nk'omugoye; Enda ye yaagiijuza ebyangye ebinuzire, Yammunyunguza." 
Jeremiah51:35 K'omutuuzi wa Saayuuni agire ati: Obubisha obu naagiriirwe na beene waitu Nibukagirirwe Babulooni; Kandi owa Yerusaalemu agire ati: Eshagama yangye etukurire abatwire Bukaludaaya. 
Jeremiah51:36 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Reeba, naaza kukutonganira, Kandi nkuhoorere. Ndyayomya enyanja yaayo, n'enshuro zaayo nzikarangatanise." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babulooni ehindukye emituumo y'amatongo, Eikoobaaniro rya zaamuha, Eky'okutiinisa n'eky'okweshaanya, Ebure owaagituuramu." 
Jeremiah51:38 Baryatsindira hamwe nk'entare, Barurume nk'emigunju yaazo." 
Jeremiah51:39 Ku bariba bakiine ekiniga, ndyabateekyera obugyenyi, Mbasiinze, bashemererwe, Bagwejegyere obutasisiimuka; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira;" 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndyabashuumya omu ibaagiro nk'abaana b'entaama, Nk'empaya z'entaama n'ez'embuzi." 
Jeremiah51:41 Eshi Babulooni enyagirwe, Yaakwatwa, haza yaabaire eri rurangaanwa omu nsi yoona! Eshi ebaire ekirikutiinisa omu mahanga!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Enyanja yaagihikaho, Yaashwekwa ebingonzi byayo ebirikwimukirira;" 
Jeremiah51:43 Endembo zaayo zihindukire ekirikutiinisa, Yaaba ensi y'omushana mwingi n'eihamba ry'omusheenyi, Ensi etatuurwamu muntu weena, N'obu kwakuba okurabwamu omwana w'omuntu." 
Jeremiah51:44 Kandi ndyafubirira Beeli omuri Babulooni, Ngitanatsye eki yaamizire. N'amahanga tigarigaruka kuhimintika nigagiijaho; Orugo rwa Babulooni rugwire." 
Jeremiah51:45 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, nimugirugyemu! Buri muntu ahungye ekiniga kya MUKAMA ekingi, Akize amagara ge." 
Jeremiah51:46 Emitima yaanyu erekye kufoobeera, N'obu kwakuba okutiina enkuru ezirikuhurirwa omu nsi; Ahabw'okuba omu mwaka gumwe haija enkuru, N'omu gundi hakurataho ezindi nkuru, Obubisha buba omu nsi, n'omutegyeki arwana n'ondiijo." 
Jeremiah51:47 N'ahabw'ekyo obuaku nibwija kuhika, Obu ndifubira ebishushani bya Babulooni, Ensi yaayo yoona ekakwatwa enshoni, Emitumbi y'abantu baayo ekagirambiriranamu." 
Jeremiah51:48 Obwo eiguru n'ensi n'ebirimu byona Biryayeshongora nibyesiimirana Babulooni, Ahabw'okuba abahwerekyerezi baryagiteera, Nibareetwa aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babulooni eshemereire kwitwa, ekaturwa Abaisraeli abaitsirwe, Nk'oku ab'omu nsi yoona abaitsirwe baitsirwe ahabwayo." 
Jeremiah51:50 Imwe abahonokire ahari rurara, Nimugyende, murekye kuguma mwemereire! Mwijukye MUKAMA mukiri hare, Kandi muteekateekye ahari Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Tukwatsirwe enshoni ahabw'okuhurira ebijumo, Enshoni zitubumbire, Ahabw'okuba abanyamahanga batabaire Emyanya erikwera ey'enju ya MUKAMA." 
Jeremiah51:52 MUKAMA naagira ati: Mbwenu reeba, obunaku nibwija, Obu ndifubira ebishushani byayo, emputa zikatsindira omu nsi yaayo yoona." 
Jeremiah51:53 N'obu Babulooni yaakutunguuka, ekahika omu iguru, Kandi n'obu yaakwombeka engo zaayo ndaingwa ez'amaani, Hoona ndyayohereza abahwerekyerezi bagiteere; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Jeremiah51:54 Nimuhurire! Okutaka nikuruga Babulooni! Eiraka ry'okucwekyerera kuhango Niriruga omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya! 
Jeremiah51:55 Ahakuba MUKAMA naahindura Babulooni amatongo, Naahunamya eiraka ryayo ery'amaani. Ebingonzi byabo nibihoorera nka'amaizi maingi, Orwari rwabo ruri ahaiguru;" 
Jeremiah51:56 Ahabw'okuba omuhwerekyerezi ahikire Babulooni, Amamanzi gaayo gaakwatwa, Amata gaayo gaahendagurwa, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ni Ruhanga ozimuura; Buzimazima aryahoora." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ndyasinza abanyiginya baayo, abanyabwengye baayo, Abategyeki, abakuru b'engabo n'abarwani baayo; Baryagwejegyera obutasisiimuka; nikwo MUKAMA ou eiziina rye riba MUKAMA ow'amahe, arikugira." 
Jeremiah51:58 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Orugo ruhango rwa Babulooni ruryasheenyerwa kimwe, N'amarembo gaayo maraingwa gookibwe." 
Jeremiah51:59 Eki n'ekigambo eki nabi Yeremia yaaragiire Seraaya mwene Neria, mwijukuru wa Maaseya, obu yaatwarwa Babulooni na Zedekia omugabe wa Yuda omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu butegyeki bwe. Seraaya ogwo akaba ari omukuru w'amabiikiro." 
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremia yaahandiika omu kitabo akabi koona akrihika ahari Babulooni, ebyo bigambo byona ebyahandiikirwe nbigamba ahari Babulooni." 
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremia yaagira Seraaya ati: Ku oraahikye Babulooni, otabura kushoma ebyo bigambo byona," 
Jeremiah51:62 kandi ogire oti: Ai bambe MUKAMA, ogambire akabi aha mwanya ogu kuguherekyereza, ngu hatagira owaagutuuramu, yaaba bantu nari amatungo, kureka gube amatongo ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah51:63 Ku oriheza kushoma ekitabo eki, okikomeho eibaare, okinagye omu mugyera Furaati," 
Jeremiah51:64 kandi ogire oti: Oku nikwo Babulooni erimirwa, etagarukye kutuuhuuka bundi ahabw'akabi aku ndigireetaho. Ogu nigwo muheru gw'ebigambo bya Yeremia." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia akatandika kutegyeka aine emyaka makumi abiri na gumwe; yaategyekyera Yerusaalemu emyaka ikumi na gumwe. Nyina akaba naayetwa Hamutaali muhara wa Yeremia owa Libuna. 
Jeremiah52:2 Yaakora ebirikwangwa MUKAMA, nk'ebi Yehoyakimu yaakozire byona." 
Jeremiah52:3 Buzimazima ebyo byagwisa kubi MUKAMA; kandi hoona ebyo eby'omuri Yerusaalemu na Yuda byayeyongyera kuba kubi, okuhitsya obu MUKAMA yaababingire omu maisho ge. Bwanyima Zedekia yaagomera omugabe wa Babulooni." 
Jeremiah52:4 Omu mwaka gwa mwenda ogw'omu butegyeki bwe, omu kwezi kwa ikumi aha kiro kyakwo kya ikumi, Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni yaija n'eihe rye ryona kuteera Yerusaalemu, bwanyima baagigota, baagyombekaho eby'okugitemberaho embaju zoona." 
Jeremiah52:5 Rutyo orurembo rwagotwa okuhitsya omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe ogw'omu butegyeki bw'omugabe Zedia. 
Jeremiah52:6 Aha kiro kya mwenda eky'omu kwezi kwa kana, enjara yaaba nyingi omu rurembo, yaahebesereza, abantu b'omuri egyo nsi baabura eby'okurya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Bwanyima orugo rw'orurembo rwasheenywaho ah'okuraba, abarwani boona baacwa, baashohora nyekiro, baahunga, baaraba omu irembo ry'ahagati y'engo zombi, eirir aha musiri gw'omugabe, baatoora ogurikuza Araba; obwo Abakaludaaya bagotsire orurembo." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kwonka eihe ry'Abakaludaaya ryaza omugabe Zedekia omu kirari, ryamukwatira omu ruhita rwa Yeriko, engabo ze zoona zaamuhungaho, zaataataana." 
Jeremiah52:9 Batyo baakwata omugabe Zedekia, baamutwara aha mugabe wa Babulooni Ribula omu nsi ya Hamasi, yaamucwera orubanja." 
Jeremiah52:10 Omugabe wa Babulooni yaamwitira abatabani omumaisho, n'abanyiginya ba Yuda boona yaabaitira Ribula." 
Jeremiah52:11 Yaihamu Zedekia amaisho, yaamubohesa emihama, yaamutwara Babulooni, yaamuta omu kihome, okuhitsya aha izooba eri yaafeereireho." 
Jeremiah52:12 Bwanyima omu kwezi kwa kataano aha kiro kyakwo kya ikumi na mwenda, nigwo mwaka gwa Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni ogwa ikumi na mwenda, Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi, owaabaire ari omuheereza w'omugabe wa Babulooni, yaataaha omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Yaayotsya enju ya MUKAMA, na nyaruju y'omugabe, n'amaju ga Yerusaalemu goona; eyetwa enju mpango yoona yaagyotsya." 
Jeremiah52:14 Eihe ryona ery'Abakaludaaya, eri ogwo mukru w'abarinzi yaabaire aine, ryasheenya engo zoona ezaabaire zeehinguriririize Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah52:15 Kandi Nebuzaradaani ogwo, omukuru w'abarinzi, yaatwara bamwe aha barikukira abandi boona kuba abooro bari enkwatwa, n'ababaaire batsigaire omu rurembo, n'abaabaire beehongyeire omugabe wa Babulooni, hamwe n'abanyamyoga abaabaire batsigaire." 
Jeremiah52:16 Kwonka Nebuzaradaani ogwo omukuru w'abarinzi yaatsigamu abandi abarikukiza abandi obworo kuba ab'okurinda emizaabibu n'ab'okuhinga. 
Jeremiah52:17 Bwanyima Abakaludaaya baasheenyagura enyomyo z'emiringa ezaabaire ziri omu nju ya MUKAMA, n'ebitebe by'ebinaabiro, n'ekitanka ky'emiringa, ebyabaire biri omu nju ya MUKAMA, baatwara emiringa yaabyo yoona Babulooni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Baatwara enyungu n'ebyoma eby'okuyooza eiju, na makansi, n'enyabya, n'enyabya z'obubaane, n'ebindi bintu by'emiringa byona ebyabaire bikoresibwa omu murimo gwa hekalu;" 
Jeremiah52:19 kandi n'enyabya nkye, n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro, n'enyabya mpango, n'enyungu, n'ebikondo by'etabaaza, n'eby'okutamu obubaane, n'enyabya z'empongano ez'ebirikushukwa. Ebintu ebyabaire bikozirwe omu zaabu, omukru w'abarinzi yaabitwara biri ezaabu, n'eby'efeeza yaabitwara biri efeeza." 
Jeremiah52:20 Enyomyo ziri zombi, n'ekitanka, n'enimi z'miringa ikumi na ibiri, ezi ekyo kitanka kyabaire kitairweho, n'ebitebe by'ebinaabiro, ebi omugabe Sulemaani yaakozire kukoresa omu nju ya MUKAMA, emiringa yaabyo yoona ekaba etarikubaasa kupimwa." 
Jeremiah52:21 Eby'ezo nyomyo, oburaingwa bw'emwe bukaba buri mikono ikumi na munaana, obuhango bwayo okugyehinguririza mikono ikumi n'ebiri, n'omuzimba gwayo enkumu ina, kandi omunda eri omurangara." 
Jeremiah52:22 Aha mutwe gwayo ekaba eine omutwe gw'omikono etaano; hashobeekaineho ebiri nk'akatimba n'amakomamahanga, byona biri emiringa, okugwehinguririza. Enyomyo ya kabiri nayo ekaba eine ebirikushusha bityo hamwe n'amakomamahanga."
