Jeremiah52:23 Omu mbaju zaayo hakaba harimu makomamahanga makumi mwenda na maukaaga; n'amakomamahanga goona agaabaire gari ahari ako katimba gakaba gari igana. 
Jeremiah52:24 Bwanyima Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaatwara Seraaya omunyamurwa omukuru na Zefania omunyamurwa wa kabiri n'abakumiirizi b'aha irembo; 
Jeremiah52:25 kandi omu rurembo yaihamu omukuru w'engabo owaabaire naategyeka abaserukare, n'abashaija mushanju b'omu ishengyero ry'omugabe, abashangirwe omu rurembo, n'omuhandiiki w'omukuru w'eihe owaabaire ahandiika abantu b'omuri egyo nsi, kandi n'abashaija makumi mukaaga b'omuri egyo nsi abashangirwe omu rurembo." 
Jeremiah52:26 Yaabatwara, yaabahitsya omugabe wa Babulooni omuri Ribula." 
Jeremiah52:27 Omugabe wa Babulooni yaabateera, yaabaitira Ribula omu nsi ya Hamasi. Batyo Abayuda baihwa omu nsi yaabo, baatwarwa bari enkwata." 
Jeremiah52:28 Ogu nigwo mubaro gw'abantu abu Nebukadeneeza yaatwaire bari enkwatwa; omu mwaka gwa mushanju akatwara Abayudaaya enkumi ishatu na makumi abiri na bashatu; 
Jeremiah52:29 omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana yaiha omuri Yerusaalemu abantu magana munaana na makumi ashatu na babiri, yaabatwara bari enkwatwa;" 
Jeremiah52:30 n'omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri n'eshatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Nebukadeneea, Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaatwara Abayudaaya magana mushanju na makumi ana na bataano; abntu boona abaatwairwe bakahika enkumi ina na magana mukaaga." 
Jeremiah52:31 Yehoyakiini omugabe wa Yuda ku yaabaire amazire emyaka makumi ashatu na mushanju ari omu bukwatwa, omu kwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri, aha kiro kyakwo ekya makumi abiri na bitaano, omu mwaka ogwo ogu Evili-merodaaki omugabe wa Babulooni yaatandikiiremu kutegyeka, yaiha Yehoyakiini omu kihome, yaamukuza;" 
Jeremiah52:32 yaagamba gye nawe, yaamuha ekitebe ekirikukira eby'abandi bagabe abaabaire bari hamwe nawe Babulooni." 
Jeremiah52:33 Atyo Yehoyakiini yaajuura ebijwaro bye by'ekihome. Okuruga aho yaaguma naariira aha meeza y'omugabe ebiro byona ebi yaamazire. 
Jeremiah52:34 Kandi eby'okumutunga omugabe yaaguma naamuha omugabo ogutarikurugaho, nk'okwetenga kwe okwa buri izooba oku kwabaire kuri, ebiro byona ebi yaamazire okuhitsya obu yaafiire." 
Lamentations1:1 Ka n'eihano, orurembo orwabaire rwijwire abantu kugira eirungu! Orwabaire ruba rukuru omu mahanga kuba nk'omufaakazi! Orwabaire ruri omunyiginyakazi omu ndembo Ruhindukire orw'okutoija!" 
Lamentations1:2 Nyekiro nirurira munonga, amatama gashwekwa amarira; Omuri nkunzi zaarwo tiharimu n'omwe W'okururembesereza. Banywani baarwo boona barureebize, Baahinduka abazigu baarwo." 
Lamentations1:3 Ahabw'okubonabonesibwa n'ahabw'obuhuuku bw'amaani Yuda agiire omu bukwatwa; Hati atwire omu mahanga, Kwonka abuzire ah'okuhuumurira; Abarikumuhiiga boona bamukwatsire, Enaku zimukondahiriire." 
Lamentations1:4 Emihanda erikuza Saayuuni neecura, Ahabw'okubura omuntu weena owaija aha magyenyi agaatairweho; Amarembo gaayo goona n'ebifurukwa; Abanyamurwa baayo nibatsinda, Abaishiki baayo bakurwirwe, baatwarwa, Kandi nayo neeshaasha munonga." 
Lamentations1:5 Abazigu baayo nibo bahindukire abategyeki, N'abarikugyanga bagogyeire. Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA agireeteire okubonabona Ahabw'eby'okushiisha byayo kuba bingi munonga; Abaana baayo bagyenzire bari enkwatwa, Beebembeire abazigu baabo." 
Lamentations1:6 Ekitiinisa kya Saayuuni kyona kigihweireho; Abanyiginya baayo babaire nk'empara zibuzire oburiiro; Bahungire abarikubahiiga nibakooza. 
Lamentations1:7 Omu biro by'okubonabona n'okushaarirwa kwayo, Yerusaalemu neijuka ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi byona Ebi yaabaire eine okwiha ira. Abantu baayo ku baagwire omu mikono y'abazigu, Yaabura kihwera, Abazigu baayo baagyesiimirana, Nibagishekyerera ahabw'okugwa kwayo." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusaalemu ekashiisha munonga, Nikyo yaahindukiire ekihagaro; Boona abaabaire bagiha ekitiinisa, hati nibagigaya; Ahabw'okuba bareebire enjuuro yaayo; Eego yo neetsinda, ehugika omushaya." 
Lamentations1:9 Oburofa bwayo bukaba buri omu kipumpuriya kyayo, Tereetaire ha birigibaho aha muheru; N'ahabw'ekyo okugwa kwayo nikutiinisa, Teine w'okugihuumuriza. Ai MUKAMA, reeba okubonabona kwangye, Ahabw'okuba omuzigu asingwire!" 
Lamentations1:10 Omuzigu naakununkirira ebintu byayo byona eby'obuguzi bwingi; Eego, ereebire amahanga gahurwire nigataaha omu Mwanya gwayo ogurikwera, Agu waazibiire kutaaha omu iteeraniro ry'abantu baawe." 
Lamentations1:11 Abantu baayo nibaaniira, nibaza kushaka, Nibahayo eby'obutungi byabo Kugura eby'okurya by'okubagaruramu amaani. Ai MUKAMA, reeba, oyetegyereze, Ahabw'okuba ningaywa." 
Lamentations1:12 Imwe mwena abarikuhingura, timurikukyetaho? Mureebe, mwetegyereze, Ku haraabe hariho obusaasi bwona oburi nk'obwangye, Obu baanyitsize, Obu MUKAMA yantaireho aha kiro ky'ekiniga kye kingi." 
Lamentations1:13 Akeema ahaiguru, yaayohereza omuriro, Yaagushuumya omu magufa gangye; Yaatega ebigyere byangye ekigoya, Yangarura enyima; Yantsigaho nyeshobeire, Ningwa enshazi eizooba ryona." 
Lamentations1:14 Eby'okushiisha byangye bikoogoshwa, Omukono gwe gwabikomerana, Byanteebwa omu bitsya nk'omugamba. MUKAMA yammaramu amaani, Yampayo omu mikono y'abu ntarikubaasa kuza omu kaso." 
Lamentations1:15 MUKAMA agayiise amamanzi gangye goona, Agaabaire gari omuriinye; Yaahuruza omutwe gw'abantu kundwanisa, Ngu abone kusingyera abatsigazi bangye. MUKAMA aribatiriire Yuda omwishiki oshugaine, Nk'orikunyuukira omu inyuukiro rya viinyo." 
Lamentations1:16 Ebyo nibyo birikundiza, Amaisho gangye gakafukunkuka amarira, Ahakuba omuhuumuza owaakungarwire omutima omunda Andi hare. Abaana bangye beeshobeire, ahakuba omuzigu asingwire." 
Lamentations1:17 Saayuuni neetega emikono, Kwonka tihaine w'okugihuumuriza. MUKAMA aragiire ebya Yakobo, Ngu bataahi be babe abazigu be. Yerusaalemu ehindukira ekihagaro omuribo." 
Lamentations1:18 MUKAMA niwe ahikire, Ahabw'okuba ngomeire ekigambo kye; Kwonka imwe mahanga 'mwe mwena, muhurire, Mureebe obusaasi bwangye. Empangare zangye n'abatsigazi bangye Baagiire omu bukwatwa." 
Lamentations1:19 Nyetsire nkunzi zangye, Kwonka bandyarya; Abanyamurwa bangye n'abakuru bangye Bacwekyerereire omu rurembo, Nibasherura eby'okurya By'okubagaruramu amaani." 
Lamentations1:20 Reeba, ai MUKAMA, ahakuba nyine enaku nyingi; Omutima guunyemereire, Omunda ninkaanyuurwa, Ahabw'okuba mbaire ndi omugomi orengyesereize. Omu nju harimu rufu." 
Lamentations1:21 Hurira oku ndikutsinda; Tihaine w'okumpuumuriza. Abazigu bangye boona bahuriire enaku zangye, Nibeesiima ahabw'okuba okukozire. Ohikiirize ekiro eki waagambire, Nabo babe nkaanye." 
Lamentations1:22 Obubi bwabo bwona buze omu maisho gaawe, Obagirire nk'oku wangiriire Nontura ebicumuro byangye byona; Ahabw'okuba okutsinda kwangye ni kwingi, N'omutima gwangye gugwire enshazi." 
Lamentations2:1 Eshi MUKAMA ashekire Saayuuni ekicu, Agiiniire ekiniga! Oburungi bwa Israeli yaabwiha omu iguru, Yaabunaga ahansi; Taikukire katebe k'ebigyere bye Aha izooba ry'ekiniga kye." 
Lamentations2:2 MUKAMA acwekyereize amaka ga Yakobo goona Ataine saasi; Asheenyire ebigo bya Yuda Aine ekiniga kingi. Kandi obugabe n'abategyeki baabwo Abigarwire ahansi, yaabihemura." 
Lamentations2:3 Amazireho amaani ga Israeli goona Amwiniire ekiniga kingi, Yaahinya omukono gwe gwa buryo omu maisho g'abazigu baabo. Yaayotsya Yakobo, naabuguma nk'omuriro Ogurikurya busha embaju zoona." 
Lamentations2:4 Ananwire obuta bwe nk'omuzigu, Ayemereire abangire omukono gwe gwa buryo nk'omubisha; Aitsire boona abashemeza amaisho gaitu Abari omu ihema rya Saayuuni; Yaashuka ekiniga kye nk'omuriro." 
Lamentations2:5 MUKAMA ahindukire nk'omuzigu, Yaamaraho Israeli, Yaacwekyereza ebikaari byayo byona, Ebigo byayo yaabigira amatongo, Yaakanyisa okucura n'okutonzya omuri Yuda." 
Lamentations2:6 Yaasheenya akaju ke nk'ak'aha musiri, Omwanya gw'amagyenyi agu yaateireho Yaagugira amatongo. MUKAMA yaamariraho kimwe omuri Saayuuni Obugyenyi na Sabato ebyatairweho, Kandi omugabe n'omunyamurwa Yaababingisa ekiniga kye kingi." 
Lamentations2:7 MUKAMA agayire eitambiro rye, Yaatamirwa kimwe Omwanya gwe ogurikwera, Engo z'ebikaari byayo Yaazihayo omu mikono y'abazigu, Baateerera omu nju ya MUKAMA orwari Nk'orw'aha izooba ry'obugyenyi obwataireho." 
Lamentations2:8 MUKAMA amaririire kusheenyera kimwe Orugo rwa Saayuuni; Yaarugyeresa omugoye; Tiyaahinya mukono gwe kurekyera aho okucwekyereza; Yaareetera ekigo n'orugo kutonzya, Amaani gaabiheramu hamwe." 
Lamentations2:9 Ebiti by'amarembo gaayo byakyengyera omu itaka, Empimbi zaayo yaazihendagura, yaazicwekyereza, Omugabe waayo n'abanyiginya be bari omu mahanga, Ebiragiro bya Ruhanga tibikiriho, Na baanabi baayo tibakiine kworekwa Okurikuruga ahari MUKAMA." 
Lamentations2:10 Abakuru ba Saayuuni Bashutami ahansi bahunami, Nibeeshuka omucuucu omu mitwe Bajwaire ebiguniya; Abaishiki ba Yerusaalemu bajuumikire emitwe omu itaka." 
Lamentations2:11 Amaisho gangye garuhiibwe okurira, Omutima guunyemereire, Omu busaasi bwangye amagara gampweiremu Ahabw'okucwekyerezibwa kw'abantu bangye, Ahabw'okuba abeereere n'abaana bato bagweireire enshazi Omu nguuto z'orurembo." 
Lamentations2:12 Nibatakira baanyinabo nibagira bati: Akagaati na viinyo birahi? Nibarabira omu nguuto z'omu rurembo Nk'abashaija bahutaire, Nibahondobererera omu bifuba bya baanyinabo." 
Lamentations2:13 Iwe Yerusaalemu 'we, Mbwenu nkugambeho ki? Nkugyeranise na ki? Iwe Saayuuni 'we, omwishiki oshugaine, Nkaakushushanisa na ki, Ngu mboen kukuhuumuriza? Ahabw'okub aokucwekyerera kwawe ni kwingi nk'enyanja, N'oha owaakubaasa kukutambira?" 
Lamentations2:14 Baanabi baawe boorekirwe ahabwawe Eby'ebishuba kandi ebirikuhabisa; Tiboorekire butunu by'okutahikiirira kwawe Kugarura abantu baawe abaatwairwe omu bukwatwa; Kureka ahabwawe boorekirwe Okuragura kw'ebishuba kandi okurikuhabisa. 
Lamentations2:15 Abahinguzi boona nibakuteerera entomi ahansi, Nibeeshaanya Yerusaalemu, Nibagizongoreza omutwe nibagira bati: Beitu oru nirwo rurembo Orwabaire nirwetwa rurungi orutaine kabara, Oru ensi yoona eshemerererwa?" 
Lamentations2:16 Abazigu baawe boona nibakujuma, Nibakweshaanya, nibanena amaino, Nibagira bati: Tumucwekyereize! Otyo! Eri niryo izooba eri tutuura nitwenda; Mbwenu twaribona, twarireeba!" 
Lamentations2:17 MUKAMA akozire eki yaagyendereire, Yaahikiiriza ekigambo kye, Eki yaaragiire omu biro bya ira; Yaakukumbagaza ataine saasi, Yaareetera omuzigu kukwesiimirana, Yaatunguura amaani g'abazigu baawe." 
Lamentations2:18 Iwe Saayuuni 'we, takira munonga MUKAMA, Amarira gahimintikye nk'omutunga Nyomushana na nyekiro! Otahuumura, amaisho gaawe garekye kutuuza." 
Lamentations2:19 Imuka, otakye nyekiro, Ahu abarinzi batandikira, Shuka ebiri omu mutima gwawe Omu maisho ga MUKAMA nk'amaizi! Omutegye emikono ahabw'amagara g'abaana baawe, Abu enjara erikugwisiza enshazi Omu mateeraniro g'enguuto zoona." 
Lamentations2:20 Ai MUKAMA, reeba oyetegyereze Abu waakozire otyo! Nimugira ngu abakazi bashemereire kurya oruzaaro rwabo, Abaana abu baayeyororoire? Nari shi omunyamurwa na nabi Bashemereire kwitirwa omu Mwanya gwa MUKAMA ogurikwera?" 
Lamentations2:21 Abato n'abakuru babyami omu mucuucu gw'enguuto; Empangare zangye n'abatsigazi bangye Baitsirwe rurara; Waabaita aha izooba ry'ekiniga kyawe, Waabamaraho otaine saasi." 
Lamentations2:22 Oyetsire ebirikuunyitsa obwoba embaju zoona, Nk'oku beeta abantu aha izooba ry'obugyenyi obuteekateekirwe, Aha izooba ry'ekiniga kya MUKAMA; Tihaine waarokokire nari owaahonokireho; Abu naakiikiire nkoorora Omuzigu wangye abamazireho." 
Lamentations3:1 Niinye muntu ori, owaabonabonesiibwe Enkoni y'ekiniga kye." 
Lamentations3:2 Akambiga, yampitsya omu mwirima, Ahataine kuhweza kwona." 
Lamentations3:3 Buzimazima akaguma nambangira omukono Buri kaanya, bwarugaho bwaira." 
Lamentations3:4 Omubiri gwangye n'oruhu rwagwo abihwereize, N'amagufa gangye yaagahendagura," 
Lamentations3:5 Angotsire, yanshweka Obushaarizi n'okubonabona." 
Lamentations3:6 Tantuuza omu mwirima Nk'abaafiire ira. 
Lamentations3:7 Ankubiise orugo; n'ahabw'ekyo tindikubaasa kucwa; Yambohesa enjegyere ziremeire; 
Lamentations3:8 N'obu ndikweta, nkataka, Tarikwenda kuhurira kushaba kwangye;" 
Lamentations3:9 Emihanda yangye agiitiise amabaare gabaizire, N'otuhanda twangye atukiikamize." 
Lamentations3:10 Ambeereire nk'edubu egwereire, Kandi nk'entare eyesherekire." 
Lamentations3:11 Anteishwire omuhanda, yantaanyagura, Yampindura enshoberwa." 
Lamentations3:12 Ananwire obuta, Yampindura ekimaasho ky'omwambi gwe." 
Lamentations3:13 Emyambi y'omu mutana gwe Yaagimarira omu mutima gwangye; 
Lamentations3:14 Mpindukire eky'okushekyererwa omu ihanga ryangye, Nibaanyeshongora eizooba ryona." 
Lamentations3:15 Anyijwize obushaarizi, Yaanyigutsa apusinto." 
Lamentations3:16 Amaisho gangye agacwisie amabaare, Yanshweka eiju rya kashenda." 
Lamentations3:17 Omutima gwangye gubuzirwe obusingye, Naayebwa oku okushemererwa kushusha." 
Lamentations3:18 Ntyo naagira nti: Eitiinisa kyangye N'amatsiko gangye ahari MUKAMA bihweireho. 
Lamentations3:19 Ijuka okubonabona kwangye n'enaku zangye, Apusinto n'endurwe." 
Lamentations3:20 Omutima gwangye gutuura nigubiijuka, Gweinamiriire omunda yangye." 
Lamentations3:21 Kwonka eki nikiijuka; N'ahabw'ekyo nyine amatsiko. 
Lamentations3:22 Embabazi za MUKAMA tizihwaho, N'okusaasira kwe kugumaho ebiro byona." 
Lamentations3:23 Buri kasheeshe ziba nsya; Obwesigwa bwawe ni bwingi. 
Lamentations3:24 Omutima gwangye nigugira guti: MUKAMA niwe mugabo gwangye; Nikyo ndimugiriraho amatsiko. 
Lamentations3:25 MUKAMA ni murungi aha barikumutegyereza, N'aha muntu orikumusherura." 
Lamentations3:26 Ni kirungi omuntu okutegyereza Okujuna kwa MUKAMA atuurize. 
Lamentations3:27 Ni kirungi omuntu okwemera omugamba Akiri omutsigazi. 
Lamentations3:28 Ashutame wenka ahunami, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA niwe agumukoreire." 
Lamentations3:29 Ate eminwa ye omu mucuucu, Obundi hakaabaho amatsiko." 
Lamentations3:30 Ategye abateezi omushaya gwe, Bamwitse ebijumo." 
Lamentations3:31 Ahakuba MUKAMA taribingira kimwe Muntu ebiro byona; 
Lamentations3:32 Kandi, n'obu yaakusaasa omuntu, Kwonka aryamugirira esaasi, nk'oku embabazi ze nyingi ziri." 
Lamentations3:33 Ahabw'okuba tabonabonesa bantu nkana, N'obu kwakuba okubasaasa." 
Lamentations3:34 Okusingyera embohe zoona ez'omu nsi," 
Lamentations3:35 Nari okuzibira omuntu kutunga Ebimushemereire omu maisho ga Rukira-boona," 
Lamentations3:36 Nari okumwitira orubanja, Ebyo byona MUKAMA tabyenda." 
Lamentations3:37 N'oha oraragiire kikabaho, MUKAMA atakiragiire?" 
Lamentations3:38 Ebibi n'ebirungi tibiruga Omu kanwa ka Rukira-boona? 
Lamentations3:39 Ahabw'enki omuntu ohuriire Ayetomboitera okufubirwa ahabw'ebibi bye? 
Lamentations3:40 Ka tureebe emitwarize yaitu, tugishwijume, Tugarukye ahari MUKAMA." 
Lamentations3:41 Ka twimutsye emitima n'emikono yaitu Ahari Ruhanga omu iguru, tugire tuti:" 
Lamentations3:42 Tukashiisha, kandi twagoma; Tiwaatusaasira." 
Lamentations3:43 Okeehumbika ekiniga kyawe, Waatuhiiga, waatwita otaine saasi." 
Lamentations3:44 Okeeshweka ekicu, Okushaba kwona kwabura oburabo." 
Lamentations3:45 Okatuhindura ekumbwe N'bisingo omu mahanga. 
Lamentations3:46 Abazigu baitu boona nibatujuma; 
Lamentations3:47 Obwoba n'obusya, okusheenywa n'okucwekyerera, Byona bituhikireho." 
Lamentations3:48 Amaisho gangye nigahimintika emigyera y'amarira, Nindizibwa okucwekyerera kwa kw'eihanga ryangye." 
Lamentations3:49 Amaisho gangye nigahimintika amaizi Obutaitsya, gatarikurereera," 
Lamentations3:50 Okuhitsya obu MUKAMA aryema omu iguru, Akareeba ahansi;" 
Lamentations3:51 Amaisho gangye nigandeetera obujune, Ku ndikureeba ebiri aha baishiki b'omu rurembo rwangye." 
Lamentations3:52 Abaanyangiire busha Bampiigire nk'enyonyi; 
Lamentations3:53 Bannagire omu busya mpuriire, Banteereramu amabaare;" 
Lamentations3:54 Amaizi gandengyera aha mutwe; Naagira nti: Mbwenuho naafeera kimwe. 
Lamentations3:55 Ai MUKAMA, nkatakira eiziina ryawe, Ndi okuzimu omu kiina;" 
Lamentations3:56 Waahurira okweshengyereza kwangye, nti: Otanga kutega okutu kwawe kuhurira okutaka kwangye." 
Lamentations3:57 Ku naakutakiire, waanyirira haihi, Waagira oti: Otatiina." 
Lamentations3:58 Ai MUKAMA, okantonganira, Waacungura amagara gangye." 
Lamentations3:59 Ai MUKAMA, okareeba okukorwa kubi kwangye; Ba niiwe wancwera orubanja." 
Lamentations3:60 Okareeba okuhoora enzigu kwabo kwona, N'enaama yaabo yoona ei bangiriire." 
Lamentations3:61 Ai MUKAMA, ohuriire ebigaaniizo byabo, N'enaama yaabo yoona, ei bangiriire;" 
Lamentations3:62 Abaanyimukiriire, nibarenzya eizooba nibandwanisa N'ebigambo byabo kandi n'ebiteekateeko byabo." 
Lamentations3:63 Reeba emishutamire yaabo n'emiimukire yaabo, Nibaanyeshongora." 
Lamentations3:64 Ai MUKAMA, oryabazimuurira Nk'emirimo y'emikono yaabo oku eri." 
Lamentations3:65 Oryabaha omutima gugangaire, Omukyeeno gwawe gubahikyeho." 
Lamentations3:66 Ai MUKAMA, oryabahiiga obainiire ekiniga; Obahwerekyereze, obamare ahansi y'eiguru ryawe." 
Lamentations4:1 Eshi ezaabu eiragwire, Ezaabu eshemeziibwe ehindukire! Amabaare g'Omwanya ogurikwera Ganaganagire ahu buri nguuto erikutandikira." 
Lamentations4:2 Abaana ba Saayuuni b'enkora-mutima Abari nk'ezaabu eshemeziibwe Ka bainganisiibwe n'enyungu z'eibumba, Ezi omubumbi abumbisa engaro ze!" 
Lamentations4:3 Nangwa na zaamuha niziha ebibwana byazo amabwabwa Zibyontsya, Kwonka abantu bangye bahindukire enshaarizi Nka zaamaya omu ihamba." 
Lamentations4:4 Endimi z'abarikwonka Zibaramatiire omu nkanka; Abaana nibashaba eby'okurya, Haabura owaabibaha." 
Lamentations4:5 Abaabaire barya gye Hati nibacwekyererera omu nguuto; Abaayororeirwe omuri zaabujwa Hati nibabyama ahu baata eiju. 
Lamentations4:6 Ahabw'okuba ekifubiro ky'eby'okushiisha by'abantu bangye Nikikira ekifubiro kya Sodoma, Eyaacwekyereziibwe omu kaanya kakye, Hataine mukono ogugikozireho." 
Lamentations4:7 Abanyiginya be bakaba nibeera okukira ebirika, Nibakira amate okwera, Emibiri yaabo neemwamwatikana okukira amabaare agarikutukurikana, N'okwengyengyeta kwabo kukaba kuri nk'okwa safiro." 
Lamentations4:8 Kwonka hati aha maisho gaabo nihakiza enziro kwiragura; Tibaakimanywa omu nguuto; Omubiri gwabo guramataine na'amagufa gaabo, Gwayoma, gwaba nk'ekiti." 
Lamentations4:9 Abaitsirwe rurara bakahiirwa Okukira abaitsirwe enjara, Abaahwereire ahabw'okubura ebishaarwirwe omu misiri." 
Lamentations4:10 Emikono y'abakazi abanyambabazi Ekateeka abaana abu beezaariire, Omu kuhwerekyerera kw'abantu bangye Baabagira eby'okurya." 
Lamentations4:11 MUKAMA ahikiriize okuguubwa kubi kwe kwona, Yaashuka ekiniga kye ekirikubuguma; Yaatweka omuriro omuri Saayuuni Ogwokize emisingi yaayo." 
Lamentations4:12 Abagabe b'omu nsi n'abatuuzi baamwo Bakaba bataine kiteekateeko, Ngu omuzigu nari omubisha weena naabaasa Kutaaha omu marembo ga Yerusaalemu." 
Lamentations4:13 Ekyo kikagibaho ahabw'ebibi bya baanabi baayo N'eby'okushiisha by'abanyamurwa baayo Abaabaire bagisheeshamu eshagama y'abahikiriire. 
Lamentations4:14 Bakabandagira omu nguuto nk'empumi, Basiisirwe munonga eshagama, Hataine waakubaasa kukora aha bijwaro byabo." 
Lamentations4:15 Abantu bakabaamagana nibagira bati: Nimurugyeho, imwe abasiisikaire! nimurugyeho! Nimurugyeho! Mutagira eki mwakoraho! Batyo baahinduka abahungi n'ebizengyerezi; Abantu baagirira omu mhanga bati: Tibarigaruka kutuura naitwe bundi." 
Lamentations4:16 MUKAMA wenka niwe abataataaniise, Taribeetaho bundi; Abanyamurwa tibarahairwe kitiinisa, N'abakuru tibaragiriirwe mbabazi." 
Lamentations4:17 Amaisho gaitu gaagwa omu nkiro, Tuhendekyeire busha tutegyereize okuhwerwa; Omu kutegyereza kwaitu, tukategyereza Eihanga eritarikubaasa kujuna." 
Lamentations4:18 Abantu baatuhiiga batuhambize, Kyatuzibira kuraba omu nguuto zaitu; Omuheru gwaitu gwairira haihi; ebiro byaitu byaba mbarwa; Ahabw'okuba omuheru gwaitu gukaba guhikire." 
Lamentations4:19 Abaatuhiigire baakiza amaguru Amashamba g'omu mwanya; Baatukurata omu nshozi batubingire, Baatugwera omu ihamba." 
Lamentations4:20 Owaabaire ari omwitsyo gwaitu, ou MUKAMA yaashukireho amajuta, Akakwatirwa omu busya bwabo, Haza niwe twabaire twesigire ngu omu kicuucu kye nimwo turituura, turi ahagati y'amahanga." 
Lamentations4:21 Iwe Edomu 'we, otwire omu nsi ya Uuzi, Yesiime, kandi oshemererwe; Kwonka naiwe ekikopo kiryakuhikaho, Osinde, oyejwekye busha." 
Lamentations4:22 Iwe Saayuuni 'we, Ekifubiro ky'eby'okushiisha byawe kihweire, Tarikugumya mu bukwatwa obundi; Kwonka iwe Edomu, Aryakufubira ahabw'okushiisha kwawe, Ashuuruure ebibi byawe." 
Lamentations5:1 Ai MUKAMA, ijuka ebyatubaireho, Reeba oyetegyereze okuhemuka kwaitu!" 
Lamentations5:2 Obuhunguzi bwaitu buhindwirwe obw'abanyamahanga, N'amaka gaitu gabaire ag'enduga-mahanga." 
Lamentations5:3 Tuhindukire efuuzi, ezitaine baishezo, Baamaaweitwe bahindukire abafaakazi." 
Lamentations5:4 Nitunywa amaizi g'engurano, Twaza kubona enku nitubanza kuzigura." 
Lamentations5:5 Nitukoresibwa n'amaani, omugamba guturi aha mabega; Turuhire, titurikuheebwa kahuumuro," 
Lamentations5:6 Twerekuriire Abanyamisri n'Abaasiria, Ngu tubone ak'okurya k'okututunga." 
Lamentations5:7 Baatatenkuriitwe bakashiisha, tibaakiriho; Mbwenu itwe twekoreire eby'okushiisha byabo." 
Lamentations5:8 Abahuuku nibo barikututegyeka, Tihaine w'okubatujuna." 
Lamentations5:9 Eby'okurya byaitu nitubitunga twogire amagara, Ahabwa rurara y'omu ihamba." 
Lamentations5:10 Emibiri yaitu eiraguriirwe nk'enziro ahabw'ekibabo ky'omushana ogureetsire rwaranda. 
Lamentations5:11 Abakazi nibahambirwa omuri Saayuuni, N'empangare omuri tauni za Yuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Abanyiginya nibahanikwa emikono ekomeirwe ahaiguru, N'abakuru tibarikuheebwa kitiinisa." 
Lamentations5:13 Abatsigazi nibeekorezibwa emengo, N'aboojo nibataruza n'emba z'enku." 
Lamentations5:14 Abagurusi tibakishutama ha irembo ry'orurembo, N'abatsigazi tibakiteera nanga." 
Lamentations5:15 Okushemererwa kw'omu mitima yaitu kuhweireho, N'okuzina kwaitu kuhindukire okucura." 
Lamentations5:16 Ekirunga kiturugire aha mutwe, kyagwa; Tugwereirwe akagwe, ahabw'okuba tukashiisha." 
Lamentations5:17 N'ahabw'ekyo emitima yaitu egwire enshazi; Ebyo nibyo bireeteire amaisho gaitu kubamu ebisanganana," 
Lamentations5:18 Ahabw'orushozi Saayuuni orubaire amatongo; Zaamuha zikarushoobamu. 
Lamentations5:19 Kwonka iwe, MUKAMA, otuuraho ebiro byona, Ekitebe kyawe kigumaho okuhitysa aha busingye bwona." 
Lamentations5:20 Ahabw'enki otwebwa ebiro byona? Ahabw'enki omazire omwanya muraingwa gutyo otutsigireho? 
Lamentations5:21 Ai MUKAMA, otwegarurire, tubone kugarurwa! Ogarure busya ebiro byaitu nka ira!" 
Lamentations5:22 Bari shi otunagiire kimwe? Otugwereirwe kubi munonga? 
Ezekiel1:1 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu, omu kwezi kwa kana, aha kiro kyakwo kya kataano, nkaba ndi omu baatwairwe omu bukwatwa aha mugyera Kebari, eiguru ryashuuruuka, naareeba okworekwa nikuruga ahari Ruhanga." 
Ezekiel1:2 Aha kiro kya kataano eky'okwo kwezi (gukaba guri omwaka gwa kataano okwiha obu omugabe Yehoyakiini yaatwarwa omu bukwatwa)," 
Ezekiel1:3 ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaija ahari Ezekieli omunyamurwa, mwene Buuzi, ari omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya aha mugyera Kebari; ikwo niyo omukono gwa MUKAMA gwamuhikiireho." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba omuyaga gw'amaani gwaija niguruga aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'ekicu kuhango ekyehinguririziibwe omushana ogurikumurinkana, kyaguma nikirugwamu omuriro ogurikurabya nk'omurabyo, kandi ahagati y'ogwo muriro haabaho ekintu ekirikushusha nk'omuringa ogurikwengyengyeta." 
Ezekiel1:5 Omuri ekyo kicu haarugamu ebihangwirwe bina ebiine emagara. Kandi oku nikwo byabaire nibishusha. Bikaba biine ekyemerero nk'eky'omuntu; 
Ezekiel1:6 kwonka buri kimwe kikaba kiine obuso buna, kandi kiine amapapa ana." 
Ezekiel1:7 Amaguru gaabyo gagororokire, ahansi y'ebigyere byabo nihashusha nk'ebyara by'enyana, kandi nibyengyengyeta nk'omuringa ogweziibwe." 
Ezekiel1:8 Aha mbaju zaabyo ina bikaba biine engaro nk'ez'omuntu ahansi y'mapapa gaabyo. Kandi byona bikaba biine obuso n'amapapa ebirikushusha biti. 
Ezekiel1:9 Amapapa gaabyo gakaba nigakoranaho; buri kimwe nikigyenda omumaisho kitarikuhinduka; byona nibigyendera hamwe. 
Ezekiel1:10 Emisusire yaabyo ahamaisho, buri kimwe kikaba kiine aha maisho nk'ah'omuntu; kandi byona bina biine aha maisho nk'ah'entare aha rubaju rwa buryo, biine aha maisho nk'ah'ente aha rubaju rwa bumosho, kandi biine aha maisho nk'ah'eishamba aha nkomo." 
Ezekiel1:11 Okwo nikwo aha maisho gaabyo haabaire nihashusha. Amapapa gaabyo gakaba gashashaanwire; buri kimwe kiine amapapa abiri, buri ipapa nirikora ah arya kigyenzi kyakyo, n'agandi abiri gashwekire omubiri gwakyo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Brui kimwe kikaba nikigyenda omumaisho kitarikuhinduka. Ei Omwoyo yaabaire aza yoona, niyo byabaire bitoora bitarikuhinduka." 
Ezekiel1:13 Ahagati y'ebyo bihangirwe bina ebiine amagara hakaba hariho ekirikushusha nk'amakara agarikwaka, nk'emuri ezirikukora oku n'oku ahagati yaabyo; ogwo muriro nigwaka munonga, kandi omuri ogwo muriro haaguma niharugamu omurabyo." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ebyo bihangirwe byaguma nibikora oku n'oku nk'omurabyo gurikurabya. 
Ezekiel1:15 Ku naabaire ninkireeba ebyo bihangirwe bina ebiine amagara, naareeba enziga aha nsi aha rubaju rw'ebyo bihangirwe, enziga emwe ahabwa buri kimwe ahari ebyo ebina." 
Ezekiel1:16 Emisusire y'ezo nziga n'oku zaabaire zikozirwe zikaba nizengyengyeta nka berulo; zoona ina zikaba nizishushana; oku zaabaire zikozirwe, zikaba nizireebeka oti, buri nziga eri omu ndiijo." 
Ezekiel1:17 Ku zaabaire ziba nizigyenda, zigyenda zitarikuhinduka, nizitoora orubaju rwona oru zaayenda ahari ezo ina." 
Ezekiel1:18 Ezo nziga zikaba ziine empanka n'enyomyo; ezo mpanka zikaba ziijwire amaisho okuzeehinguririza. 
Ezekiel1:19 Ebyo bihangirwe ku byabaire bigyenda, ezo nziga zibigyenda aha rubaju; kandi ku byabaire biimuka byaza ahaiguru, nazo ziimuka ziza ahaiguru." 
Ezekiel1:20 Ei Omwoyo yaabaire aza yoona, niyo byabaire bitoora, n'ezo nziga ziimuka nabyo; ahabw'okuba Omwoyo w'ebyo bihangirwe ebiine amagara akaba ari n'omuri ezo nziga." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ku byabaire bigyenda, nazo zigyenda; bikyemerera, nazo zeemerera; ku byabaire biimuka byaza ahaiguru, ezo nziga nazo ziimuka nabyo, ziza ahaiguru; ahabw'okuba Omwoyo w'ebyo bihangirwe ebiine amagara akaba ari n'omuri ezo nziga." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ahaiguru y'emitwe y'ebyo bihangirwe ebiine amagara, hakaba hariho ekirikushusha eiguru, ekirikumurinkana nka kristalo, kibambire ahaiguru y'emitwe yaabo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ahansi yaakyo amapapa gaabyo gashashaanwire, buri rimwe nirireebana na rigyanzi ryaryo; kandi buri kuhangirwe kiine amapapa abiri gashwekire omubiri gwakyo." 
Ezekiel1:24 Kandi ku byabaire bigyenda, mpurira okuhoorera kw'amapapa gaabyo kuri nk'okuhoorera kw'amaizi maingi, nk'okuhinda kw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona, obwaku bwakwo buri nk'obw'orwari rw'eihe ry'engabo; ku byabaire byemerera, bigwisa amapapa gaabyo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Kandi ahaiguru y'ekirikushusha eiguru ekyabaire kiri aha mitwe yaabyo, haareetwaho eiraka; ku byabaire byemerera, bigwisa amapapa gaabyo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Kandi ahaiguru y'ekirikushusha eiguru ekyabaire kiri aha mitwe yaabyo, hakaba hariho ekirikushusha ekitebe ky'obukama, nikishusha eibaare rya safiro, kandi ahari ekyo ekirikushusha ekitebe ky'obukama hariho ekirikushusha omuntu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Okwiha omu bwezirikiro bwe okugarura ahaiguru naareeba nihengyengyeta nk'omuringa gweziibwe, ogurikushusha nk'omuriro gwehinguririize embaju zoona; kandi okwiha omu bwezirikiro bwe okugarura ahansi, naareeba nihashusha omuriro; kandi hariho ekirikumurinkana aha mbaju ze zoona." 
Ezekiel1:28 Nk'oku omuhanganzima gureebeka aha kicu aha izooba ry'enjura, nikwo okureebeka kw'okumurinkana kwabaire kumehinguririize. Ebyo bikaba biri ekishushani ky'ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA. Ku naakireebire, naagwa ahansi njuumaire, naahurira eiraka ry'orikugamba." 
Ezekiel2:1 Yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, imuka oyemerere, ngambe naiwe." 
Ezekiel2:2 Ky yangambiire, Omwoyo yantaahamu, yaanyemereza, naahurira ogwo owaabaire naagamba naanye," 
Ezekiel2:3 nangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, ninkutuma aha bantu ba Israeli, eihnaga ry'abagomi abangomeire; bo na baishenkurubo bakancumuraho n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Ezekiel2:4 Abo bantu n'abanyarubwa, baine emitima egangaire. Abo nibo ndikukutumaho; ku oraabahikye, obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba." 
Ezekiel2:5 Kandi bo, yaaba bahurira, yaaba banga, (ahabw'okuba n'ab'enju engomi,) kwonka nibaija kumanya ku nabi abaire abarimu." 
Ezekiel2:6 Naiwe Mwana w'omuntu 'we, otabatiina, kandi otatiina ebigambo byabo, n'obu oraabe ori omu mikwatangwe n'omu mahwa, kandi otwire omuri skoropio. Otatiina ebigambo byabo, n'obu kwakuba okuhahaaza omutima ahabw'emireebekyere yaabo, ahakuba n'enju engomi." 
Ezekiel2:7 Obagambire ebigambo byangye, yaaba bahurira, yaaba banga kuhurira; ahakuba n'enju engomi." 
Ezekiel2:8 Kwonka iwe mwana w'omuntu, hurira eki ndikukugambira; otaba omugomi nk'egyo nju engomi; yashamya akanwa kaawe, orye eki ndaakuhe." 
Ezekiel2:9 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba omukono gungororoirwe; kandi reeba, gukaba gwine omuzingo gw'ekitabo;" 
Ezekiel2:10 yaaguzingururira omu maisho gangye, kandi gukaba guhandiikirwe omunda n'enyima, n'ebiguhandiikirwemu bikaba biri eby'amaganya, n'eby'okucura, n'eby'obusaasi." 
Ezekiel3:1 Bwanyima yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, rya eki waaheebwa, orye ogu muzingo, ogyende, ogambire enju ya Israeli." 
Ezekiel3:2 Ntyo naayashama, yampa ogwo muzingo kugurya." 
Ezekiel3:3 Yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, rya ogu muzingo ogu naakuha, ogwojuze omu nda yaawe. Ahonaaho naagurya; omu kanwa gwannurira nk'obwoki." 
Ezekiel3:4 Yaaguruka yangira ati: Mwana w'omntu, irooko oze aha nju ya Israeli, obagambire ebigambo byangye;" 
Ezekiel3:5 ahakuba tiwaatumwa ha bantu b'orurimi rw'enduga-mahanga nari orugumire, kureka waatumwa aha nju ya Israeli," 
Ezekiel3:6 ti ha mahanga maingi g'orurimi rw'enduga-mahanga nari orugumire, abu otarikuhurirana nabo. Buzimazima kuri naakutuma aha bantu nk'abo, bakaakuhuriire." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kwonka ab'enju ya Israeli tibarikwija kukuhurira; ahabw'okuba naanye tibarikwenda kumpurira; ahakuba ab'enju ya Israeli boona baine obuso bugumire n'emitima egangaire. 
Ezekiel3:8 Reeba, ngangaize aha maisho gaawe, ngu habone kugangaarira ahaabo, n'obuso bwawe kugangaarira obwabo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Naahindura obuso bwawe nk'arimaasi, bugume okukira eibaare ry'enkangabuye. Otatiina, kandi otahahaazibwa emireebekyere yaabo, n'bu baraabe bari enju engomi." 
Ezekiel3:10 Kandi yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, ebigambo byangye byona, ebi naaza kukugambira, obitaasye omu mutima gwawe, kandi obihurire n'amatu gaawe." 
Ezekiel3:11 Bwanyima ogyende, oze omu bantu baawe abaatwairwe omu bukwatwa, obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba, yaaba bahurira, yaaba banga." 
Ezekiel3:12 Bwanyima Omwoyo yankiriza; ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA ku kyabaire nikikiimuka omu mwanya gwakyo, naahurira okuhoorera kwingi munonga;" 
Ezekiel3:13 nikwo kuhoorera kw'amapapa g'ebyo bihangirwe ebiine amagara nigakoranaho, n'okuhoorera kw'ezo nziga aha rubaju rwabyo okurikushusha okurigita kw'omutsitsa." 
Ezekiel3:14 Omwoyo yankiriza, yantwara, naagyenda ngwirwe kubi, nyine ekiniga kingi; kandi omukono gwa MUKAMA gukaba gungumize;" 
Ezekiel3:15 naahika Telabiibu, naashanga abaabaire batwairwe omu bukwatwa, batwire aha mugyera Kebari, naamarayo ebiro mushanju nshutami ahagati yaabo nshobeirwe." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ebyo biro mushanju ku byahweire, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti:" 
Ezekiel3:17 Mwana w'omuntu, nkugizire omurinzi w'enju ya Israeli; ku oraagume waahurira ekigambo ekirikuruga omu kanwa kangye, obanteisize." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ku ndigira omubi nti: Buzimazima oryafa, naiwe otaamuteisa, nari okumwehanangiriza kuruga omu muhanda gwe omubi, ngu abone kujuna amagara ge, ogwo mubi aryafeera omu bibi bye, kwonka eshagama ye niiwe ndigibuuza." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kwonka ku oriteisa ogwo mubi, yaayanga kuruga omu bubi bwe, nari omu muhanda gwe omubi, aryafeera omu kutahikiirira kwe, kwonka iwe oryaba okirize amagara gaawe." 
Ezekiel3:20 Kandi ohikiriire, ku arireka okuhikiirira kwe, yaakora eby'okutahikiirira, naanye naata enkongi omu maisho ge, aryafa; ahakuba tomuteiseize, aryafa ahabw'ekyo kibi kye, kandi eby'okuhikiirira bye ebi yaakoziretibiriijukwa; kwonka eshagama ye niiwe ndigibuuza." 
Ezekiel3:21 Kwonka ku oriteisa ohikiriire ogwo ngu atashiisha, nawe ataashiisha, buzimazima aryaba ohuriire, habw'okuba aikiriize kuteisibwa; naiwe oryaba okirize amagara gaawe." 
Ezekiel3:22 Okwo niyo omukono gwa MUKAMA gwanyiziireho, akangira ati: Imuka, oze omu ruhita; okwo niyo ndaagambire naiwe." 
Ezekiel3:23 Ntyo naimuka naaza omu ruhita; kandi reeba, ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA, ekirikushusha eki naareebeire aha mugyera Kebari, kyayemerera aho, naagwa ahansi njuumaire." 
Ezekiel3:24 Kwonka Omwoyo yantaahamu, yaanyemereza, yaagamba naanye, naagira ati: Irooko oyekingirane omu nju yaawe." 
Ezekiel3:25 Kandi iwe Mwana w'omuntu, nibaija kukutaho emirunga, bagikubohese, kandi toribaasa kuza mu bantu;" 
Ezekiel3:26 kandi niinyija kuramatisa orurimi rwarwe omu nkanka, obe ekiteta, obure agabahana; ahabw'okuba n'enju engomi." 
Ezekiel3:27 Kwonka ku ndigamba naiwe, ndyayashamya akanwa kaawe, obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugmba. Orikwenda kuhurira, ahurire; n'otarikwenda kuhurira, arereere; ahabw'okuba n'enju engomi." 
Ezekiel4:1 Mbwenu iwe Mwana w'omuntu, twara eitafaari, orite omu maisho gaawe, oriteereho ekishushani ky'orurembo Yerusaalemu," 
Ezekiel4:2 orugote, orwombekyeho ebigo, orurundeho eby'okutemberaho, kandi oruteereho ensiisira kururwanisa, orubyareho ebiti by'okuhiguza orugo embaju zoona;" 
Ezekiel4:3 kandi ogire ekyoma ky'eibaati, okyemereze nk'ekisiika ahagati yaawe n'orurembo; orugumyeho amaisho, rube nk'orugotsirwe, orugotere kimwe. Ekyo kiryaba akamanyiso aha nju ya Israeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 Bwanyima obyamire orubaju rwa bumosho, nkuteho ekifubiro ky'enju ya Israeli; kandi oryayekorera ekifubiro kyabo, ekirikwingana n'ebiro byona ebi orimara orubyamiire." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ahabw'okuba ndyakutaho omubaro gw'ebiro magana ashatu na makumi mwenda, ogurikwingana n'omubaro gw'emyaka y'ekifubiro kyabo; okwo nikwo orimara omwanya oyekoreire ekifubiro ky'enju ya Israeli." 
Ezekiel4:6 Kandi ku oriheza ebyo, oryagaruka obyame, kwonka obyamire orubaju rwa buryo, oyekorere ekifubiro ky'enju ya Yuda; ekiro kimwe eki nkuteereireho kingane omwaka gumwe gw'ekifubiro." 
Ezekiel4:7 Kandi oryagumya amaisho gaawe aha kugotwa kwa Yerusaalemu, omukono gwawe gutaine ki gushwekire, orwo rurembo oruhanuurire ebirirubaho." 
Ezekiel4:8 Kandi reeba, nkutaireho emirunga, ngu otarihindukira orundi rubaju, okuhitsya obu orihikiiriza ebiro byona eby'okugota kwawe." 
Ezekiel4:9 Kandi ogire engano, sayiri, ebihimba, enkoore, omugusha n'oburo, obite omu nyungu emwe, obigoyemu oburo. Omuri ebyo biro magana ashatu na makumi mwenda, ebi orimara obyamiire orubaju rumwe, nibyo origuma nooryaho." 
Ezekiel4:10 Eby'okurya ebi orirya, biryaguma bipimwe, shekeli makumi abiri buri izooba, obirye rimwe buri izooba." 
Ezekiel4:11 Kandi oryaguma onywe amaizi garengirwe; kimwe kya mukaaga kya hiini, oganywe rimwe buri izooba." 
Ezekiel4:12 Ebyo by'okurya oryaguma obirye nk'embumburi ya sayiri, noobiteekyesa amazi g'abantu nibakureeba." 
Ezekiel4:13 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Okwo nikwo Abaisraeli barirya eby'okurya byabo bisiisikaire omu maisho g'amahanga agu ndibabingiramu. 
Ezekiel4:14 Bwanyima naagira nti: Ai bambe, Mukama RUHANGA! Reeba, naaba kubaho tinkeeshiishaga na kintu kyona; ahakuba okwiha omu buto bwangye n'okuhitsya hati tinkaryaga kyefeereire, nari ekitaafura kyona; kandi n'enyama erikuzira tekahikaga mu kanwa kangye." 
Ezekiel4:15 Nikwo kungira ati: Reeba, naakwikiriza kuteekyesa amasha g'ente omu mwanya gw'amazi g'abantu." 
Ezekiel4:16 Yaagaruka yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, reeba, ndyahenda eky'okwehimbagiririzaho ky'aba Yerusaalemu, nibyo by'okurya byabo, bagume barye eby'okurya bipimirwe nibatiina, kandi banywe amaizi agu barengyeirwe bahahaize emitima." 
Ezekiel4:17 Ekyo ndyakikora, ngu baboe kutuubirwa eby'okurya byabo n'amaizi gaabo, baareebane bonka na bonka bashobeirwe, bahwe aha magufa ahabw'okufubirwa kwabo." 
Ezekiel5:1 Kandi iwe Mwana w'omuntu, gira rurara y'obwogi, ogikorese nk'orumweiso rw'omumwi, omwe omutwe gwawe n'ebireju byawe; bwanyima ogire eminzaani y'okupimisa, obone kubaganisa eishokye." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ebiro by'okugota ku birihwa, kimwe kya kashatu kyaryo okyokyeze ahagati y'orurembo; kimwe kya kashatu kyaryo ekindi okitware, oyehinguririze orurembo nookitemesa rurara; kandi kimwe kya kashatu kyaryo ekindi okumaamagize omu mwanya, kitwarwe omuyaga; naanye ndyasyorayo rurara, ngibikuratse." 
Ezekiel5:3 Ahari ebyo bicweka oiheho rikye, orizingiririre omu kicweka kya ifo ky'ekanzu yaawe." 
Ezekiel5:4 Kandi oihe rikye ahari eryo orinagye omu muriro, risye; aho niho omuriro guriruga gukahika aha nju ya Israeli." 
Ezekiel5:5 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Egi niyo Yerusaalemu, ei naataire ahagati y'amahanga n'ensi ezigyehinguriririize." 
Ezekiel5:6 Kwonka ekagomera ebiragiro byangye, yaarengyesereza okukira ago mahanga, kandi ekagomera ebi naataireho okukira ezo nsi ezigyehinguriririize, ahabw'okwanga ebiragiro byangye n'okutagyendera mu bi naataireho." 
Ezekiel5:7 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugambira naagira ati: Nk'oku muri abanyarubwa okukira amahanga agabeehinguriririize, mukanga kworobera ebiragiro byangye, mutagyendere mu bi naataireho, kureka mukatwaza nk'emigyenzo y'abanyamahanga ababeehinguriririize oku eri," 
Ezekiel5:8 nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugambira naagira ati: Reeba, nyowe, nyowe buzima naaba omubisha waawe, ndyakureetamu ebifubiro, amahanga nigakireeba." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ahabw'ebihagaro byawe, ndyakugira oku ntakakugiraga, kandi tindigaruka kukikora obundi." 
Ezekiel5:10 Nikyo baishe b'abaana na batabani baabo bariryanirira omuriiwe, nkakureetaho ebifubiro, kandi ab'omuriiwe abariba bahonokireho, nkabataataanisiza ei emiyaga yona ereetwa." 
Ezekiel5:11 N'ahabw'ekyo Mukama RUHANGA naagira ati: Nk'oku mwahagaize Omwanya gwangye ogurikwera ebintu byanyu ebirikunugwa n'ebihagaro byanyu byona, buzimazima niinyerahira nti: Niinyija kukutuubya, eriisho rayngye tiririkusaasira, kandi tindikugirira mbabazi." 
Ezekiel5:12 Kimwe kya kashatu ky'abantu baawe kiryaitwa orufu, kimarirweho enjara omuriiwe; kimwe kya kashatu ekindi kiryaitwa rurara aha mbaju zaawe zoona; kandi na kimwe kya kashatu ekindi ndyakitaataanisiza ei emiyaga yoona ereetwa, nsyoreyo rurara, ngibakuratse." 
Ezekiel5:13 Okwo nikwo ekiniga kyangye kirihwa, nkabamariraho ekiniga kyangye, nkeemara akandi aha mutima; bwanyima ku ndibamariraho ekiniga kyangye, baryamanya ku nyowe, MUKAMA, ngambire, nyine eihato." 
Ezekiel5:14 Kandi bwanyima ndyakuhindura amatongo n'ekijumo omu mahanga agakwehinguriririize n'omu maisho g'abahinguzi boona. 
Ezekiel5:15 Ku ndibataho ebifubiro mbagwereirwe kubi, mbainiire ekiniga kingi nimbahana munonga," 
Ezekiel5:16 ku ndibarekurira emyambi y'enjara erikwita, ei ndyohereza kubacwekyereza; ku ndiguma nimbareetaho enjara, naahenda eki murikwehimbagiririzaho, nibyo by'okurya byanyu, muryaba ekijumo eky'okugaaniiza, eky'okureeberaho, kandi ekirikutiinisa aha mahanga agabeehinguriririize. Nyowe MUKAMA, niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel5:17 Kandi ndyabateeza enjara, n'enyamaishwa mbi zibashahure abaana; orufu n'okusheesha eshagama biryabarabamu, kandi ndyabareetaho rurara. Nyowe MUKAMA, niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel6:1 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti. 
Ezekiel6:2 Mwana w'omuntu, naga amaisho aha bibungo bya Israeli, obihanuurire ebiribigwera," 
Ezekiel6:3 noogira oti: Imwe bibungo bya Israeli 'mwe, muhurire ekigambo kya Mukama RUHANGA. Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugambira enshozi, ebibungo, emigyera n'empanga, naagira ati: Reeba, nyowe, nyowe nyenka ndyabareetaho rurara, ncwekyereze emyanya yaanyu mikuru ey'okuramizamu." 
Ezekiel6:4 Amatambiro gaanyu garyacweka busha, n'ebishushani byanyu by'eizooba bisheenyagurwe, kandi emitumbi y'abantu baanyu abariitwa ndyaginaga omu maisho g'ebishushani byanyu ebirikuramibwa." 
Ezekiel6:5 Kandi emitumbi y'Abaisraeli ndyaginaga omu maisho g'ebishushani byabo, nnaganagye amagufa gaanyu embaju zoona ez'amatambiro gaanyu." 
Ezekiel6:6 Ahu murituura hoona, endembo zaanyu ziryahinduka amatongo, n'myanya yaanyu mikuru y'okuramizamu eryasheenywa, amatambiro gaanyu gasheenywe, gacwekye busha; ebishushani byanyu ebirikuramibwa biryayatagurwa, bicwekyerezibwe, ebyoterero byanyu biihweho, n'emirimo yaanyu emarweho." 
Ezekiel6:7 Abarikwitwa baryagwa ahaga tiyaanyu, mumanyireho ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel6:8 Kwonka ndyagira omuriimwe abu naarokora. Ku muriba mwagizire abaahonoka ahari rurara omu mahanga, ku muriba mwataataaniire omu nsi zaago," 
Ezekiel6:9 bwanyima abarirokokaho omuriimwe baryanyijukira omu mahanga, ei bariba batwairwe bari enkwatwa, bamanye oku naahenzirwe emitima yaabo erikururuuha eyaanyimwire, n'amaisho gaabo agarikururuuha gakatwarwa ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa; baryayetamwa ahabw'ebihagaro byona ebi baakozire." 
Ezekiel6:10 Obwo baryamanya ku ndi MUKAMA, kandi eki naagambire nti: Ndyabareetaho ako kabi, ku ntarakigambiire busha." 
Ezekiel6:11 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'ebihagaro byona ebi enju ya Israeli yaakozire, yemaamaate, oteere omutsindo ahansi, ogire oti: Ai bambe! ahakuba baryaitwa rurara, enjara n'orufu." 
Ezekiel6:12 Ori hare aryaitwa rurara, n'oriba yaatsigaireho agoteirwe omu rurembo, aryaitwa enjara. Okwo nikwo ndihikiiriza ekiniga kyangye aharibo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Emitumbi yaabo ku erirambirirana ahagati y'ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa, n'okwehinguririza amatambiro gaabo, aha mitwe y'ebibungo byona n'enshozi zoona, ahansi y'ekiti kyona ekibisi ekyetwa omurinzi, n'ahansi y'omwela gwona oguyumbize, ahu baabaire bootererera ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa emigaju erikutaamirana, obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndyababangira omukono, ensi ngihindure amatongo, n'ahatarikutuurwa, ahu baabaire batwire hoona, okuruga omu ihamba okuhika Ribula. Obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel7:1 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel7:2 Kandi iwe Mwana w'omuntu 'we, hurira eki Mukama RUHANGA arikugambira enju ya Israeli, naagira ati: Mbwenu byahwa! Muheru yaahika aha nshonda ina zoona ez'ensi." 
Ezekiel7:3 Mbwenu naiwe yaakuhikaho, naaza kukurekurira ekiniga kyangye, nkucwere orubanja orushemereire emitwarize yaawe, nkufubire ahabw'ebihagaro byawe byona." 
Ezekiel7:4 Eriisho ryangye tiririkusaasira, kandi tindikugirira mbabazi, kureka ndyakufubira, nkuture emitwarize yaawe n'ebihagaro byawe ebiri ahagati omuriiwe. Obwo nibwo orimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel7:5 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Akabi, akabi k'aha muheru! Reeba nikaija." 
Ezekiel7:6 Muheru yaija, omuheru gwahika, byakwimukirira. Reeba, nibikuhikaho." 
Ezekiel7:7 Iwe otwire omu nsi 'we, ekifubiro kyawe kyakuhikaho; obunaku bwahika, eizooba riri haihi, eizooba ry'okujagararira omu bibungo, ti ry'okuteereraho kaari k'okushemererwa." 
Ezekiel7:8 Mbwenu naaza kukushukaho ekinig akyangye, nkumarireho okuguubwa kubi kwangye, nkucwere orubanja nk'emitwarize yaawe oku eri, nkufubire ninkutura ebihagaro byawe byona." 
Ezekiel7:9 Eriisho ryangye tiririkusaasira, kandi tindikugirira mbabazi; kureka ndyakufubira nkuture emitwarize yaawe n'ebihagaro byawe ebiri omuriiwe. Obwo nibwo murimanya ku ndi MUKAMA ofubira." 
Ezekiel7:10 Reeba, eryo izooba! Reeba niriija. Ekifubiro kywawe kyaija, enkoni yaarabya, amaryo gaatooka." 
Ezekiel7:11 Orubwa rukuzire, rwahinduka enkoni y'obubi. Omuribo tihaine oritsigaraho; n'omu bintu byabo enbingi, nari omu butungi bwabo tihaine kiritsigaraho, n'obu kwakuba okugira omukuru orikweshumba abandi." 
Ezekiel7:12 Obunaku bwahika, eizooba niriirira haihi. Omuguzi arekye kushemererwa, n'omutunzi arekye kuganya, ahabw'okuba ekiniga kiri aha ihanga ryabo ryona." 
Ezekiel7:13 Abatunzi tibarigarurirwa bi baatunzire, n'obu bariba bakiriho; ahabw'okuba ekiniga kiri aha ihanga ryabo ryona, kandi tikirihinduka; n'ahabw'okutahikiirira kwe tihariho muntu origumya ho amagara ge." 
Ezekiel7:14 Bateire enzamba, baateekateeka byona, kwonka tihaine ohurwire, ahabw'okuba ekiniga kyangye kiri aha ihanga ryabo ryona." 
Ezekiel7:15 Aheeru hariho rurara, omunda harimu orufu n'enjara, abari omu ishwa nibaitwa rurara, n'abari omu rurembo nibamarwaho orufu n'enjara." 
Ezekiel7:16 Kandi ku harigira abaahonokaho, baryahungira omu bibungo nk'enkombe z'omu mpanga, boona nibaganya, buri muntu naaborooga ahabw'ebibi bye." 
Ezekiel7:17 Emikono ya boona eyahwa amaani, n'entegye za boona ziryabonda, zibe nk'amaizi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Baryayezirika ebiguniya, obwoba bubashekye; boona bagire enshoni ahamaisho, n'emitwe y'abantu boona ebe enkomborora." 
Ezekiel7:19 Baryanaga efeeza zaabo omu mihanda, n'ezaabu zaabo tiziribaasa kubajuna aha izooba ry'ekiniga kya MUKAMA. Tiziribamara njara, kandi tiziribaigutsa; ahabw'okuba ezo nizo zaababeereire ekirikuteeza entsibo, ekyabareeteire okutahikiirira." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ebyo bintu byabo ebihunzire bakaba babikoresa okwehaisa ekitiinisa ekitaine mugasho, kandi baabikoramu ebishushani byabo by'ebihagaro, n'ebintu byabo by'ebihagaro, n'ebintu baybo ebirikunugirwa kimwe. Nikyo mbihinduriire ebitashemeire aharibo." 
Ezekiel7:21 Kandi ndyabihayo omu mikono y'abanyamahanga, babinyagye, n'omu mikono y'ababi ab'omu nsi babishahure, babihagare." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ndyabaihaho amaisho, bashiishe Omwanya gwangye ogw'obuguzi bwingi, abambuzi bagutaahemu, bagushiishe," 
Ezekiel7:23 baguhindure amatongo. Nk'oku ensi eijwire obwitani, n'orurembo rukaijura eitima," 
Ezekiel7:24 nikyo ndireetera amahanga agarikukira obubi, gakakubuura amaka gaabo. Ndyamaraho amaani gaabo agu barikwehimbisizaho, n'emyanya yaabo erikwera eshiishwe." 
Ezekiel7:25 Enaku ku ziriija, baryasherura obusingye, kwonka tibaribubona." 
Ezekiel7:26 Akabi karyakuratwa akandi, orukuru rukuratwe orundi; baryasherura okworekwa ahari nabi, kwonka omunyamurwa aryabura ekiragiro, n'abakuru babure obwengye bw'okuha abantu." 
Ezekiel7:27 Omugabe aryaganya, omunyiginya aryayehumbika okushoberwa, n'emikono y'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi eryasharazibwa obwoba. Ndyabagira nk'oku emitwarize yaabo eri, mbacwere emanja, nk'oku emicwere yaabo eri; haza bamanye ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel8:1 Omu mwaka gwa mukaaga, omu kwezi kwa mukaaga aha kiro kyakwo kya kataano, nkaba nshutami omu nju yangye, abakuru ba Yuda banshutami omumaisho; omukono gwa Mukama RUHANGA gwampikiraho okwo." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeeba orikushusha omuntu; okwiha omu bwezirikiro bwe okugarura ahansi gukaba guri omuriro; kandi okwiha omu bwezirikiro bwe okugarura ahaiguru nihengyengyeta nk'omuringa ogweziibwe." 
Ezekiel8:3 Yaagorora ekirikushusha omukono, yaakwata obutsibo bw'eishokye ryangye, Omwoyo yankiriza, yampitsya ahagati y'ensi n'eiguru, yantwara Yerusaalemu ndi omu kworekwa kwa Ruhanga, yampitsya ah'orikutaahira nooza omu irembo ry'ekikaari ky'omunda, ekirikureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, ahu ekitebe kye'kishushani ekirikugwisa kubi Ruhanga kyabaire kir." 
Ezekiel8:4 Kandi reeba, ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga wa Israeli kikaba kiri okwo, nk'oku naakyorekyeirwe omu ruhita." 
Ezekiel8:5 Bwnayima yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, hati imutsya amaisho gaawe, oreebe aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. Ntyo naagaimutsya, naareebayo, kandi reeba, aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bwa'ah'orikutaahira omu irembo ry'eitambiro hakaba hariho ekishushani ekirikureetera Ruhanga eihato." 
Ezekiel8:6 Yaagaruka yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, nooreeba ebi barikukora? Nooreeba ebihagaro by'eihano ebi ab'enju ya Israeli barikukorera aha, ebirikumbinga nkaza hare n'Omwanya gwangye ogurikwera? Kwonka noija kureeba ebindi bihagaro by'eihano ebirikukira ebyo." 
Ezekiel8:7 Beanyima yantwara aha irembo ry'ekyo kikaari; ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba ekishenshero omu rugo." 
Ezekiel8:8 Yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, hangusya ekyo kishenshero. Ntyo ku naahereize kukihangusya, naareeba orwigi." 
Ezekiel8:9 Yaagaruka yangira ati: Taahamu, oreebe ebihagaro by'eihano ebi barikukorera aha." 
Ezekiel8:10 Naanye naataahamu; ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba ebishushani by'emiringo yoona y'ebirikwekurura ahansi, n'eby'enyamaishwa ezirikunugwa, n'eby'ebishushani byona ebirikuramibwa ab'enju ya Israeli, biteirwe aha kisiika embaju zoona." 
Ezekiel8:11 Kandi omu maisho gaabyo heemereiremu abashaija makumi mushanju ab'omu bakuru b'enju ya Israeli, n'ahagati yaabo heemereireho Yaazania mwene Shafani, buri omwe aine ekyoterero kye omu ngaro; obwo omwika gw'obubaane nigucumbuuka ahaiguru nigutaamirana." 
Ezekiel8:12 Bwanyima yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, ebyo waareeba ebi abakuru b'enju ya Israeli barikukorera omu mwirima, buri muntu omu bishengye by'ebishushani by'ebishushani by'ebiteekateeko bye? Ahabw'okuba nibagira bati: MUKAMA tarikutureeba; MUKAMA atsigireho ensi yaitu." 
Ezekiel8:13 Yaagaruka yangira ati: Noija kureeba ebindi bihagaro by'eihano ebi barikukora. 
Ezekiel8:14 Bwanyima yantwara ah'orikutaahira nooza omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho ery'enju ya MUKAMA; kandi reeba, hakaba hashutamiyo abakazi nibacurira Tamuzi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu 'we, ebyo waabireeba? Noija kureeba ebindi bihagaro ebirikukira ebyo." 
Ezekiel8:16 Bwanyima yantwara, yampitsya omu kikaari ky'omunda eky'enju ya MUKAMA. Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba aha rwigi rwa hekalu ya MUKAMA ahagati y'ekisasi n'eitambiro abashaija nka makumi abiri na bataano, bateire hekalu ya MUKAMA emigongo nibareeba oburugwa-izooba, nibaramya eizooba, amaisho bagahangire ei ririkureetwa." 
Ezekiel8:17 Yaagaruka yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu 'we, ebyo waabireeba? Noogira ngu ebihagaro ebi ab'enju ya Yuda barikukora n'ekintu kikye? Bashemereire kubuzya ensi eby'eitima n'okweyongyera kungwisa kubi? Reeba, nibata amataagi aha nyindo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Nikyo ndikorera eby'ekiniga kingi; eriisho ryangye tiriribasaasira, kandi tindibagirira mbabazi; n'obu barimboroogyera omu matu bata, tindibahurira." 
Ezekiel9:1 Bwanyima naahurira naagamba n'eiraka rihango, naagira ati: Imwe abarikurinda orurembo, mwirire haihi, buri muntu aine eky'okurwanisa ekirikucwekyereza omu ngaro ze." 
Ezekiel9:2 Kandi reeba, haija abashaija mukaaga, baareetwa omu muhanda gw'eirembo rya ruguru, eririkureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, buri omwe aine eky'okurwanisa ekirikwita omu ngaro ze; kandi ahakaba hariho ondiijo mushija, ojwaire ebijwaro bya kitaani, ari hamwe nabo, aine eihembe rya bwino aha izinio. Baataaha, baayemerera aha rubaju rw'eitambiro ry'omuringa." 
Ezekiel9:3 Baashanga ekitiinsia kya Ruhanga wa Israeli kyatembire kuruga ahari baakerubi, ahu kyabaire kiba, kyahika aha murynago gw'enju. MUKAMA yaayeta ogwo mushaija owaabaire ajwaire ebijwaro bya kitaani, aine eihembe rya bwino aha izinio." 
Ezekiel9:4 Yaamugira ati: Irooko orabarabe omu rurembo Yerusaalemu, ote akamanyiso aha buso bw'abantu abarikutsinda nibabooga ahabw'ebihagaro byona ebirikukorerwamu;" 
Ezekiel9:5 kandi abo bashaija mukaaga yaabagambira mpuriire, naagira ati: Mwirooko murabarabe omu rurembo mumukuratiire, mwite abantu; amaisho gaanyu garekye kusaasira, kandi mutagira ou mwagirira embabazi;" 
Ezekiel9:6 mumareho abagurusi, abatsigazi, empangare, abaana bato n'abakazi; kwonka omuntu weena oine ako kamanyiso mutamukoraho. Kandi mutandikire omu Mwanya gwangye ogurikwera. Batyo baatandikira ahari abo bakuru abaabaire bari omu maisho g'enju." 
Ezekiel9:7 Yaagaruka yaabagira ati: Mushiishe enju, kandi ebikaari byayo mubiijuze emitumbi. Mbwenu mwirooko mugyende. Batyo baagyenda, baita ab'omu rurembo." 
Ezekiel9:8 Ku baabaire nibakibaita, naatsigara nyenka, naagwa ahansi njuumaire, naataka nti: Ai bambe, Mukama RUHANGA! Mbwenu omu kushuka ahari Yerusaalemu ekiniga kyawe nooyenda kumaraho Abaisraeli boona abatsigaireho?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Yangira ati: Orubanja rw'enju ya Israeli n'eya Yuda rurengyesereize munonga; ensi eijwire eshagama, n'orurembo rwijwirwemu okwita emanja; ahakuba nibagira bati: MUKAMA atsigireho ensi yaitu, kandi taine ki arikureeba." 
Ezekiel9:10 Naanye eriisho ryangye tiriribasaasira, kandi tindibagirira mbabazi; kureka ndyabatura ebi baakozire, mbibarunde aha mitwe." 
Ezekiel9:11 Bwanyima reeba, ogwo mushaija owaabaire ajwaire ebijwaro bya kitaani, aine eihembe rya bwino aha izinio, yaija, yaagamba ebi baamutuma, naagira ati: Naakora nk'oku wandagiira." 
Ezekiel10:1 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba, omu mwanya ogw'ahaiguru y'emitwe ya baakerubi, ekirikushusha eibaare rya safiro, ekiri nk'ekitebe ky'obukama." 
Ezekiel10:2 MUKAMA yaagambira ogwo mushaija owaabaire ajwaire ebijwaro bya kitaani ati: Irooko oze ahagati y'enziga ezirikwehinguririza, eziri ahansi ya baakerubi; bwanyima oijuze engaro zaawe zombi makara agarikwotsya, agu oraihe ahagati ya baakerubi, oganaganagye ahaiguru y'orurembo. Atyo yaazizamu nindeeba." 
Ezekiel10:3 Obu ogwo mushaija yaataahamu, baakerubi bakaba beemereire aha rubaju rw'enju orw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'ekicu kiijwire ekikaari ky'omunda." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kyaruga ahari baakerubi, kyainamuka, kyayemerera aha muryango gw'enju; egyo nju yaijura ekicu, n'ekikaari kyaijura okumurinkana kw'ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel10:5 Okuhoorera kw'amapapa ga baakerubi kwahuririrwa hare, kwahika n'omu kikaari ky'aheeru, kuri nk'eiraka rya Ruhanga Ow'obushoboorozi bwona yaaba naagamba." 
Ezekiel10:6 MUKAMA ku yaaherize kuragiira ogwo mushaija owaabaire ajwaire ebijwaro bya kitaani ati: Iha omuriro ahagati y'enziga ezirikwehinguririza, ahagati ya baakerubi, yaazizamu, yaayemerera aha rubaju rw'enziga emwe." 
Ezekiel10:7 Bwanyima kerubi yaagorora omukono gwe, ari ahagati ya baakerubi bagyenzi be, yaakununkirira omuriro oguri ahagati ya baakerubi, yaiha omuriro ahari ogwo, yaaguta omu ngaro z'ogwo mushaija owaabaire ajwaire ebijwaro bya kitaani; nawe yaagutwara, yaashohora." 
Ezekiel10:8 Kandi baakerubi abo bakaba baine ekirikushusha engaro y'omuntu ahansi y'amapapa gaabo. 
Ezekiel10:9 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba enziga ina ziri aha rubaju rwa baakerubi, enziga emwe aha rubaju rwa buri kerubi; kandi ezo nziga zikaba nizishusha eibaare rya berulo." 
Ezekiel10:10 Emisusire y'ezo nziga, zoona ina zikaba nizishushana, nizireebeka oti buri nziga eri omu ndiijo." 
Ezekiel10:11 Ku zaabaire ziba nizigyenda, zigyenda zitarikuhinduka, nizitoora ibara rubaju ahari ezo ina. Ei enziga ey'omumaisho yaabaire ereeba yoona, ngenzi zaayo zigikurata, nizigyenda zitarikuhinduka." 
Ezekiel10:12 Ezo nziga ezi baakerubi bana baabaire baine, hamwe n'empanka zaazo n'enyomyo zaazo, byona bikaba biine amaisho embaju zoona." 
Ezekiel10:13 Ezo nziga, oku naahuriire, zikaba nizeetwa “enziga ezirikwehinguririza”." 
Ezekiel10:14 Kandi buri kerubi akaba aine obuso buna; ahamaisho h'ow'okubanza hakaba hari ahamaisho ha kerubi; ahamaisho h'owa kabiri hari ah'omuntu; ah'owa kashatu hari ah'entare, kandi ah'owa kana hari ah'eishamba." 
Ezekiel10:15 Baakerubi abo baaguruka, baaza ahaiguru. Baakerubi abo nibyo bihangirwe ebiine amagara ebi naareebire aha mugyera Kebari." 
Ezekiel10:16 Baakerubi abo ku baabaire bagyenda, ezo nziga zibagyenda aha rubaju; ku baabaire baimutsya ampapa kuguruka kuza ahaiguru, ezo nziga zikaba zitahinduka kubaruga aha rubaju." 
Ezekiel10:17 Ku baabaire beemerera, nazo zeemerera; bakiguruka, nazo ziguruka nabo; ahabw'okuba Omwoyo w'ebyo bihangirwe ebiine amagara akaba azirimu." 
Ezekiel10:18 Bwanyima ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kyaruga aha muryango gw'enju, kyayemerera ahaiguru ya baakerubi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Baakerubi baimutsya amapapa gaabo, baaguruka baaza ahaiguru, ezo nziga zibari aha rubaju, nimbareeba nibagyenda; baayemerera aha rwigi rw'eirembo ry'enju ya MUKAMA ery'oburugwa-izooba; n'ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga wa Israeli kyabasangira." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ebyo nibyo bihangirwe ebiine amagara ebi naareebire ahansi ya Ruhanga wa Israeli aha mugyera Kebari; bwanyima naamanya ku bari baakerubi. 
Ezekiel10:21 Buri omwe akaba aine ahamaisho hana, n'amapapa ana, kandi ahansi y'amapapa gaabo hariho ebirikushusha engaro z'omuntu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Kandi emisusire yaabo ey'ahamaisho niyo eri ei naareebire aha mugyera Kebari. Buri omwe yaagumizamu atarikuhinduka. 
Ezekiel11:1 Bwanyima Omwoy yankiriza, yantwara aha irembo ry'enju ya MUKAMA, eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba; kandi reeba, aha rwigi rw'eryo irembo hakaba hariho abashaija makumi abiri na bataano; omuri abo naareebamu Yaazania mwene Azuri, na Pelatia mwene Benaaya, abategyeki b'eihanga." 
Ezekiel11:2 Atyo yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, aba bashaija nibo bantu abacuma enaama z'okutahikiirira, bakaha ab'omuri oru rurembo obwengye bubi," 
Ezekiel11:3 nibagira bati: Obunaku bw'okwombeka amaju tibukahikire; oru rurembo n'enyungu, naitwe turi enyama." 
Ezekiel11:4 N'ahabw'ekyo Mwana w'omuntu, hanuura, obahanuurire ebiribabaho." 
Ezekiel11:5 Bwanyima Omwoyo wa MUKAMA yaanyijaho, yangira ati: Gira oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe nju ya Israeli 'mwe, ebi nibyo murikuteekateeka; ahakuba nimmanya ebiri omumitima yaanyu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Murengyesereize kwita abantu baanyu omuri oru rurembo, n'enguuto zaamwo mwaziijuza emitumbi." 
Ezekiel11:7 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Abantu baanyu abu mwaitsire, mukarambika emitumbi yaabo omuri oru rurembo nibo nyama, n'oru rurembo nirwo nyungu; kwonka imwe muryarwihwamu." 
Ezekiel11:8 Mukaba mutiina rurara, kwonka ndyagireeta, ebaite; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba." 
Ezekiel11:9 Kandi ndyarubaihamu, mbaheyo omu mikono y'abanyamahanga, mbateho ebifubiro." 
Ezekiel11:10 Muryaitwa rurara, mbacwere orubanja muri aha mwatano gwa Israeli; haza mumanye ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel11:11 Oru rurembo tiruribabeera nyungu, kandi naimwe timuriba nyama omuriyo; kureka ndyabacwera orubanja muri aha mwatano gwa Israeli;" 
Ezekiel11:12 haza muryamanya ku ndi MUKAMA; ahabw'okuba timuragyendeire mu biragiro byangye, n'obu kwakuba okuhikiiriza ebi naataireho; kureka mukakuratira ebiragiro by'abanyamahanga ababeehinguriririize." 
Ezekiel11:13 Bwanyima ku naabaire ninkihanuura, Pelatia mwene Benaaya yaafa. Naagwa ahansi njuumaire, naataka n'eiraka rihango ningira nti: Ai bambe, Mukama RUHANGA! Noija kumariraho kimwe abatsigaireho omu Baisraeli?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel11:15 Mwana w'omuntu, beene waanyu, abu waabingirwe nabo, enju ya Israeli yoona, abo boona nibo abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu bagambireho nibagira bati: Barugire ahari MUKAMA, baaza hare; ensi egi niitwe tugihairwe kuba obuhunguzi." 
Ezekiel11:16 N'aabw'ekyo obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: N'obu ndaae naabaihire omu nsi yaabo, nkabatwara hare omu mahanga, kandi nkabataataanisiza omu nsi zaago, kwonka ndyababeera Omwanya ogurikwera okumara omwanya mukye omuri ezo nsi ezi baagiiremu." 
Ezekiel11:17 N'ahabw'ekyo ogire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama arikugamba naagira ati: Ndyabataaruura mbaihe omu mahanga, mbateeranire hamwe, nimbaiha omu nsi ezi mwataataaniiremu, mbahe ensi ya Israeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Kandi ku barihikayo, bayaihamu ebintu byona ebirikunugwa, n'ebihagaro byayo byona." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndyabaha omutima gumwe, mbatemu omwoyo musya, nyihe omutima gw'eibare omu buhangwa bwabo, mbahe omutima gworobi," 
Ezekiel11:20 babone kugyendera omu biragiro byangye, n'okukwata ebi naataireho n'okubyorobera; kandi baryaba abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Kwonka abo abu emitima yaabo erikukuratira ebyabo ebirikunugwa n'ebihagaro byabo, ndyabatura ebi baakozire, mbibatungikirire aha mitwe; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba." 
Ezekiel11:22 Bwanyima baakerubi baimutsya amapapa gaabo, n'enziga zaabo zibari aha rubaju, n'ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga wa Israeli kiri ahaiguru yaabo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kyaimuka, kyaruga ahagati y'orurembo, kyayemerera aha kibungo ekiri aha burugwa-izooba bw'orurembo." 
Ezekiel11:24 Bwanyima Omwoyo yankiriza, yantwara Bukaludaaya omu nkwatwa, nkiri omu kworekwa kw'Omwoyo wa Ruhanga. Ku naahikireyo, okwo kworekwa oku naareebire kwandugaho." 
Ezekiel11:25 Ntyo naateekyerereza ezo nkwatwa, ebi nyorekirwe MUKAMA byona." 
Ezekiel12:1 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel12:2 Mwana w'omuntu, otuura omu b'enju engomi, abaine amaisho g'okureeba, kwonka tibareeba, n'amatu g'okuhurira, kwonka tibahurira; ahakuba n'enju engomi." 
Ezekiel12:3 N'ahabw'ekyo, Mwana w'omuntu, koma ebintu byawe by'okufuruka, ofuruye nyomshana nibakureeba, ogyende nk'omufurki orugye omu mwanya gwawe, oze omu gundi nibakureeba. Obundi bakaayetegyereza, n'obu baraabe bari enju engomi." 
Ezekiel12:4 Oshohoze ebintu byawe nyomushana nibakureeba, nk'eby'okufuruka oku biba; naiwe oshohore wenka omu mwabazyo nibakureeba, nk'oku abarikufuruka bagira." 
Ezekiel12:5 Bwanyima ocwe ekishenshero omu rugo nibakureeba, obe nimwoo waarabya ebyo bintu." 
Ezekiel12:6 Ote ebyo bintu byawe aha ibega nibakureeba, obishohoze hariho omwirima; kandi oyeshwekye ahamaisho, orekye kureeba ahansi, ahabw'okuba nkutaireho kuba ak'okureeberaho aha nju ya Israeli." 
Ezekiel12:7 Ntyo naakora nk'oku naaragiirwa. Naashohoza ebintu byangye nyomushana, nk'oku eby'okufuruka biba; kandi omu mwabazyo naacwa ekishenshero omu rugo n'emikono yangye nyenka. Naahsohora hariho omwirima, ntaire ebintu byangye aha ibega nibandeeba." 
Ezekiel12:8 Omu kasheeshe ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel12:9 Mwana w'omuntu, enju ya Israeli, enju engomi, tekubuurize eti: Nookora ki?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Mbwenu obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Okuhanuura oku n'okw'eby'omunyiginya w'omuri Yerusaalemu, n'eby'ab'enju ya Israeli boona barimu." 
Ezekiel12:11 Ogire oti: Ndi ak'okureeberaho kaanyu; nk'oku nkozire, nabo nikwo barikorwa batyo; baryatwarwa omu bukwata, bari enkwatwa." 
Ezekiel12:12 N'munyiginya, oriba ari omuribo, aryata ebintu bye aha ibega hariho omwirima, ahsohore, acwe ekishenshero omu rugo, akirabemu; aryayeshweka ahamaisho, arekye kureeba ahansi n'amaisho ge." 
Ezekiel12:13 Kandi ndyamurengyezaho ekigoye, akwatwe omuteg gwangye; bwanyima mmutware Babulooni omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya, kwonka tarigireeba; kandi niyo arigwa." 
Ezekiel12:14 Boona ababriba bamushagatiire kumuhwera, n'ngabo ze zoona, ndyabataataanisiza embaju zoona ei emiyaga ereetwa, nsyoreyo rurara, ngibakuratse." 
Ezekiel12:15 Ku ndibataataanisiza omu mahanga, naabanaganaga omu nsi zaago, baryamanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel12:16 Kwonka ndyareka bamwe omuribo bahonokye ahari rurara, enjara n'orufu, babone kwaturira ebihagaro byabo byona omu mahanga ei bariza; kandi bamanye ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel12:17 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel12:18 Mwana w'omuntu, rya eby'okurya byawe nootengyeza, kandi onywe amaizi nootetema, oyemereize omutima," 
Ezekiel12:19 ogambire abantu omuri egyo nsi oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba aha by'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu n'ab'omu nsi ya Israeli, naagira ati: Baryarya eby'okurya byabo beemereize emitima, kandi banywe amaizi bashobeirwe, ahabw'okuba ensi yaabo eryaba emazirwemu ebigirimu byona, nibaturwa eitima ry'abagitwiremu boona." 
Ezekiel12:20 Endembo ezitwiremu ziryahingurwa amatongo, ensi ebe kifurukwa, naimwe muryamanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel12:21 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel12:22 Mwana w'omuntu, egi nfumu ei mucwa aha nsi ya Israeli, erikugira eti: Ebiro bitwireho; okworekwa kwona kurugiremu busha, neemanyisa ki?" 
Ezekiel12:23 N'ahabw'ekyo obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugmba naagira ati: Egyo nfumu ndyagimaraho, kandi tibarigaruka kugicwa omuri Israeli. Kureka obagire oti: Ebiro biiriire haihi, na buri kworekwa kuri haihi kuhikiirizibwa." 
Ezekiel12:24 Ahabw'okuba tiharigaruka kubaho kworekwa kw'ebishuba, nari okuragura kw'okumamarika omu nju ya Israeli;" 
Ezekiel12:25 kureka nyowe MUKAMA, ndyagamba, kandi eki ndigamba kiryaba kwo; tikirigaruka kukyererezibwa, kureka omu biro byanyu, imwe enju engomi, ndyagamba ekigambo, nkihikiirize; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba." 
Ezekiel12:26 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel12:27 Mwana w'omuntu, reeba, ab'enju ya Israeli nibagira bati; Ebi ayorekirwe ebiro ebi, n'ebiriija hahweireho ebiro bingi; kandi naahanuura eby'obunaku obukiri hare munonga." 
Ezekiel12:28 N'ahabw'ekyo obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Tihariho kigmbo kyangye na kimwe ekirigaruka kukyererezibwa; kureka ekigambo eki ndikugamba kiryaba kwo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira. 
Ezekiel13:1 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel13:2 Mwana w'omuntu, hanuura ebiriba ahri baanabi ba Israeli abarikuhanuura; ogambire abarikuhanuura ebi barikugunja omu mitima yaabo, noogira oti: Muhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA!" 
Ezekiel13:3 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Baanabi b'ebifa-mutima baryareeba enaku, abakuratira eby'omu mitima yaabo bonka, haza bataine ki boorekirwe." 
Ezekiel13:4 Iwe Israeli, baanabi baawe bari nka zaamuha z'omu matongo." 
Ezekiel13:5 Timukainamukaga ha bisheenyuka, n'obu kwakuba okwombeka orugo, ahabw'enju ya Israeli, ngu mubone kwemerera omu rugamba muhamire, aha izooba rya MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel13:6 Baanabi abo boorekirwe ebitaine ku biri, baaragura eby'ebishuba, nibagira bati: Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba, haza MUKAMA atabatumire; kandi baareetera abantu kugira amatsiko ngu ekigambo kyabo kiryaba kwo." 
Ezekiel13:7 Timurikumanya ku okworekwa oku mureebire kuri okwa busha, kandi okuragura kwanyu ku kuri okw'ebishuba, obu murikugira muti: MUKAMA niwe akigambire, haza ntaine ki ngambire?" 
Ezekiel13:8 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Ahabw'okugamba ebitaine mugasho, mukoorekwa eby'ebishuba, reeba, nikyo ndikubarwanisiza, nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel13:9 Omukono gwangye guryaguma guranise baanabi, abarikworekwa ebitaine mugasho, bakaragura eby'ebishuba; tibariba b'omu ishengyero ry'abantu bangye, tibarihandiikwa mu kitabo ky'amaziina g'ab'enju ya Israeli, n'obu kwakuba okutaaha omu nsi ya Israeli; kandi muryamanya ku ndi Mukama RUHANGA." 
Ezekiel13:10 Baanabi abo bahabiise abantu bangye nibagira bait: N'obusingye, haza obusingye butariho; kandi abantu ku barikwombeka ekisiika ekitagumire, baanabi abo baija bakisiigiriza n'obudongo butanogire;" 
Ezekiel13:11 N'ahabw'ekyo ogambire abo abarikukisiigiriza n'obudongo butanogire oti: Nikiija kugwa. Haryagwa enjura nyingi n'emengo z'orubaare, haije n'eihunga ry'amaani." 
Ezekiel13:12 Mbwenu ekyo kisiika ku kirigwa, tibaribabuuza bati: Nya budongo buri obu mwasiigiriize burahi?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Ahabw'ekiniga ndyareeta eihunga ry'amaani; ahabw'okuguubwa kubi ngwise enjura nyingi, kandi ahabw'ekiniga ngwise emengo z'orubaare, bikicwekyereze." 
Ezekiel13:14 Ndyasheenya ekisiika eki mwasiigiriize n'obudongo, nkigwise ahansi, omusingi gwakyo gureebwe; omu kugwa kwakyo naimwe mucwekyereremu; haza mumanye ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel13:15 Okwo nikwo ndimarira ekiniga kyangye ahari ekyo kisiika n'ahari abo abaakisiigiriize n'obudongo obutanogire; kandi imwe, ndyabagambira nti: Ekisiika n'abaaakisiigiriize n'obudongo tibikiriho," 
Ezekiel13:16 abo nibo baanabi ba Israeli abaabaire nibahanuura ebya Yerusaalemu, bakagireebera okworekwa kw'obusingye, haza obusingye butariho; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba." 
Ezekiel13:17 Naiwe Mwana w'omuntu 'we, teera ekitsyori bahara b'abantu baawe abarikhanuura ebi barikugunja omu mitima yaabo, obahanuurire ebiribabaho," 
Ezekiel13:18 noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Baryareeba enaku, abakazi ababaziira engisha, bakazijweka abantu boona omu bujwariro bw'enyerere, bakakora n'ebitambaara by'okwetwekyerera eby'abantu aba buri rugyero, nibahiiga amagara gaabo! nimwija kuhiiga amagara g'abantu bangye, mukiza ag'abandi, ngu mubone kwetungira amagoba?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Mukanjumisa omu bantu bangye ahabw'eigaro rimwe rya sayiri n'otwate tw'oburo, nimwita abantu abatakufiire, mukakiza abatashemereire kugumaho, nimubakirisa ebishuba ebi murikubeihabeihesa abantu bangye, abakunda kuhurira ebishuba." 
Ezekiel13:20 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Reeba, niinyanga engisha zaanyu ezi murikutegyesa abantu; ndyazibahuruutura aha mikono, ndekye abantu abu murikutega beegyendere nk'enyonyi." 
Ezekiel13:21 Ebitambaara byanyu eby'okwetwekyerera ndyabibataagurira aha mutwe, njune abantu bangye, mbaihe omu mikono yaanyu; tibarigaruka kuba mu mikono yaanyu obundi nk'eminyago; kandi murymanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel13:22 Mukahahaaza omutima gw'ohikiriire n'ebishuba byanyu, ou nyowe ntahahaarize; mwagumya omubi ngu arekye kuhinduka kuruga omu mitwarize ye emibi, akajuna amagara ge;" 
Ezekiel13:23 n'ahabw'ekyo timurigaruka kureeba kworekwa okutaine mugasho, n'obu kwakuba okuragura; kandi ndyajuna abantu bangye, mbaihe omu mikono yaanyu. Obwo nibwo murimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel14:1 Bwanyima bamwe aha bakuru ba Israeli baija ahi ndi, banshutama omumaisho." 
Ezekiel14:2 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel14:3 Mwana w'omuntu, aba bantu bataahize omu mitima yaabo ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa, baata ekirikuteeza entsibo eky'okutahikiirira kwabo omu maisho gaabo. Noogira ngu nshemereire kubaikiriza kugira ekintu kyona eki baanyehanuuzaho?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Mbwenu ogambe nabo, obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Ibara muntu ow'omu nju ya Israeli otaahize omu mutima gwe ebishushani bye ebirikuramibwa, akata ekirikuteeza entsibo eky'okutahikiirira kwe omu maisho ge, haza akaza owa nabi, nyowe MUKAMA niinye ndimwegarukiramu nimmutura omuna gw'ebishushani bye ebirikuramibwa," 
Ezekiel14:5 mbone kukwata emitima y'ab'enju ya Israeli, abampararukire ahabw'ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa." 
Ezekiel14:6 N'ahabw'ekyo ogire enju ya Israeli oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Mweteise, mutaane n'ebishushani byanyu, mwihe amaisho aha bihagaro byanyu byona." 
Ezekiel14:7 Ahabw'okuba ibara muntu ow'omu nju ya Israeli nari ow'omu banyamahanga owaabashuuhuukiremu orikumpararuka, akataasya omu mutima gwe ebishushani bye ebirikuramibwa, akata ekirikuteeza entsibo eky'okutahikiirira kwe omu maisho ge, haza akaza owa nabi ngu amuunyehanuuzeho, nyowe MUKAMA niinye ndimwegarukiramu;" 
Ezekiel14:8 ogwo mushaija ndyamuta omu kaso, mmugire eky'okureeberaho n'eky'okucweraho enfumu, mmucwere kimwe omu bantu bangye; kandi muryamanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel14:9 Kandi nabi ku aribeihwabeihwa, yaagira eki yaagamba, nyowe MUKAMA niinye ndiba mmubeihabeihire, ndyamubangira omukono, mmucwekyereze arugye omu bantu bangye Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Baryagiibwaho ekifubiro, ekifubiro kya nabi n'eky'orimwehanuuzaho biryaingana," 
Ezekiel14:11 ab'enju ya Israeli barekye kugaruka kuhaba kundugaho, nari kugaruka kweshiisha n'ebicumuro byabo byona; kureka babe abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel14:12 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel14:13 Mwana w'omuntu, ensi ku erincumuraho, yaakora ebitari by'obwesigwa, naanye naagibangira omukono, naahenda eki erikwehimbagiririzaho, nibyo by'okurya byayo, naagiteeza enjara, naagimaramu abantu n'amatungo," 
Ezekiel14:14 n'obu abantu aba bashatu, Noa, Danieli na Yobu baakuba barimu, bakaakiza amagara gaabo bonka ahabw'okuhikiirira kwabo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba." 
Ezekiel14:14 n'obu abantu aba bashatu, Noa, Danieli na Yobu baakuba barimu, bakaakiza amagara gaabo bonka ahabw'okuhikiirira kwabo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ku ndyohereza enyamaishwa kubuga ensi, zaagishiisha, yaaba amatongo, hataagira owaagirabamu ahabw'ezi nyamaishwa," 
Ezekiel14:16 n'obu abo bantu bonshatu baakuba barimu, niinyerahira, tibakaabaasa kukiza batabani baabo nari bahara baabo; bo bonka bakaakira, kwonka ensi yo ehinduka amatongo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel14:17 Nari shi, ku nditeeza ensi rurara, ningira nti: Ka rurara ebugye ensi, nigmaremu abantu n'amatungo;" 
Ezekiel14:18 n'obu abo bantu bonshatu baakuba barimu, niinyerahira, tibakaabaasa kukiza batabani baabo nari bahara baabo; kureka bo bonka bakaakira; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba." 
Ezekiel14:19 Nari shi, egyo nsi ku ndigiteeza orufu, naagishukaho ekiniga kyangye, ninsheesha eshagama kugimaramu abantu n'amatungo," 
Ezekiel14:20 n'obu Noa, Danieli na Yobu baakuba barimu, niinyerahira tibakaabaasa kukiza batabani baabo nari bahara baabo, kureka bakaakiza amagara gaabo bonka ahabw'okuhikiirira kwabo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel14:20 n'obu Noa, Danieli na Yobu baakuba barimu, niinyerahira tibakaabaasa kukiza batabani baabo nari bahara baabo, kureka bakaakiza amagara gaabo bonka ahabw'okuhikiirira kwabo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel14:21 Ahakuba oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Mbwenu tindikizaho kuteeza Yerusaalemu ebifubiro by'amaani ebi bina, rurara, enjara, enyamaishwa mbi, n'orufu, ngu mbone kugimaramu abantu n'amatungo!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Kwonka ku hariba haagizire abaahonokaho ab'okugiihamu abaana baabo b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki, bwanyima baija ahariimwe, mwareeba emitwarize yaabo n'ebi barikukora, muryagarukwa emitima omunda ahabw'enaku ezi ndiba nyitsize Yerusaalemu, ahabw'ebyo byona ebi naagiteerize." 
Ezekiel14:23 Kandi baryabagarura emitima omunda, ku murireeba emitwarize yaabo n'ebi barikukora; obwo nibwo murimanya ku ebi naagikoziremu byona, ntarabatuzire busha; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel15:1 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel15:2 Mwana w'omuntu, ekiti ky'omuzaabibu n'amataagi gaakyo nibikiza ki ebindi biti by'omu kibira?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Hariho owaakugitemaho empimbi, akagira eki yaagibaijamu? Nari shi, abantu bakaakitemaho enkondo y'okuhanikaho ekintu kyona?" 
Ezekiel15:4 Reeba, kicumiirwe okuba enku z'okuhemba; mbwenu omutwe gwakyo n'ekibunu kyakyo ku birisya, byahwaho, ahagati yaakyo haasiriira, kiryaba kikiine omugasho gwona?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Reeba, obu kibaire kikihundiriire, kibaire kitaine mugasho, reero kaashwa, obu kihiire kikasiriira!" 
Ezekiel15:6 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Nk'oku ekiti ky'omuzaabibu kiri omu biti by'omu kibira, eki naahaireyo kuba enku, nikwo ndihayo abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndyabata omu kaso; n'obu barihunga omuriro, kwonka ogwo muriro guryabamaraho; kandi ku ndibata omu kaso, nibwo murimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel15:8 Bwanyima ndyahindura egyo nsi amatongo, ahabw'okuba bakakora ebitari by'obwesigwa; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel16:1 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel16:2 Mwana w'omuntu, manyisa Yerusaalemu ebihagaro byayo," 
Ezekiel16:3 noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugambira Yerusaalemu, ati: Obukomooko bwawe n'obuzaarwa bwawe ori ow'omu nsi ya Kanaani; sho akaba ari Omuamori na nyoko ari Omuhiitikazi." 
Ezekiel16:4 Eby'okuzaarwa kwawe obu waazaarwa, tibarakushariire, tibarakwogize kukushemeza, tibarakusiigire mwonyo, n'obu kwakuba okukuta omu twenda tw'obwereere." 
Ezekiel16:5 Tihariho owaakureebeise eriisho ry'embabazi, ngu akugirire esaasi, akukorere ebyo; kureka okanagwa omu ishwa aha izooba eri waazaariirweho, ahabw'okuba okaba noonugwa." 
Ezekiel16:6 Bwanyima ku naabaire ninkurabaho, naareeba nooyekuringa omu shagama, naakugira, okiri omuri egyo shagama, nti: Kagire amagara," 
Ezekiel16:7 okakura nk'ekimezire omu ishwa. Naiwe waakura, waanyeeta, waaba empangare, amabeere gaagwa, n'eishokye ryawe ryakura; kwonka waaguma ojwaire busha, ori entangaare." 
Ezekiel16:8 Ku naabaire ninkurabaho obundi, naakwetegyereza, naareeba ohikize obunaku bw'okurigirwa; naakunagaho omunagiro gwangye, naajweka enjuuro yaawe, naakurahira, naaragaana naiwe endagaano, waaba owangye; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel16:9 Bwanyima naakwozya, naakwogyezaho kimwe eshagama; naakusiiga amajuta." 
Ezekiel16:10 Kandi naakujweka emyenda y'amabara g'ebicwererane, naakujweka enkaito z'oruhu rw'engongi; naakuzirika emyenda ya bafuta, naakushweka emyenda ya riiri." 
Ezekiel16:11 Naakujweka amahunde, engoro aha mukono, n'emikuufu omu bitysa." 
Ezekiel16:12 Naakuta empeta aha nyindo n'omu matu, n'ekirunga kirungi aha mutwe." 
Ezekiel16:13 Okwo nikwo waahunzirwe ezaabu n'efeeza, n'ebijwaro byawe bikaba biri bafuta na riiri n'emyenda y'amabara gacwereraine. Okaba orya eby'esaano y'obunono n'obwoki n'amajuta. Okaba ori murungi okutakareebwaga, waarugaho waaba omwigarire." 
Ezekiel16:14 Okurangaanwa kwawe kwahika omu mahanga ahabw'oburungi bwawe, ahabw'okuba bukaba buhikiibwe ekitiinisa eki naakuhaire; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel16:15 Kwonka okeesiga oburungi bwawe, waaba maraaya ahabw'okurangaanwa kwawe, waayehayo waaba owa ibara muhinguzi." 
Ezekiel16:16 Waatwara bimwe aha bijwaro byawe, waayekorera endaaro zihunzire, waazishambaniramu; tihariho nk'ebyo ebirabaireho, kandi tibiribaho." 
Ezekiel16:17 Kandi okatwara amahunde gaawe amarungi agaakozirwe omu zaabu zangye n'efeeza zangye, ebi naakuhaire waabyekoreramu ebishushani by'abashaija, waashambana nabyo;" 
Ezekiel16:18 waatwara ebijwaro byawe eby'amabara agacwereraine, waabibishweka, kandi waata amajuta gangye n'obubaane bwangye omu maisho gaabyo." 
Ezekiel16:19 Kandi n'eby'okurya byangye ebi naakuhaire, eby'esaano y'obunono n'amajuta n'obwoki, ebi naabaire nkugaburira, waabita omu maisho gaabyo, ngu bibe ekisooroora ekirungi; nikso Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel16:20 Kandi okatwara batabani baawe na bahara baawe, abu wanzaariire, waababitamgira ngu bibamareho." 
Ezekiel16:21 Noogira ngu obwamaraaya bwawe n'ekintu kikye, kandi okongyeraho n'okwita abaana bangye, okabahayo aharibyo kuba ebitambo by'okurabya omu muriro?" 
Ezekiel16:22 Kandi omuri ebyo bihagaro byawe byona n'obwamaraaya bwawe toraijukire biro by'obuto bwawe, obu waabaire ojwaire busha, ori entangaare, nooyekuringa omu shagama." 
Ezekiel16:23 Mbwenu bwanyima y'ebyo bibi byawe byona, (oryareeba enaku; eego oryazireeba, nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira)," 
Ezekiel16:24 waayeyombekyera enju ahatunguukire, waayekorera omwanya mukuru ogw'okuramizamu omuri buri nguuto," 
Ezekiel16:25 ahari buri iteeraniro ry'emihanda waaraayisizaho oburungi bwawe nooyehayo ahari ibara muhinguzi; otyo waahinguranisa obwamaraaya bwawe; 
Ezekiel16:26 Kandi okaraaya n'Abanyamisri, bataahi baawe enduruuhi, waakanyisa obwamaraaya bwawe kungwisa kubi." 
Ezekiel16:27 Reeba, nikyo nkubangiriire omukono, nkatuubya egabo yaawe, nkakuhayo aha bazigu baawe abarikwenda kukumira, bahara b'Abafilistia abaitsirwe enshoni ahabw'emitwarize yaawe mibi erengyesereize." 
Ezekiel16:28 Kandi okaraaya n'Abaasiria, ahabw'okuba tohaaga; buzimazima okaraaya nabo, nabwo tiwaahaaga." 
Ezekiel16:29 Kandi okahinguranisa obwamaraaya bwawe omu nsi y'abashuubuzi ba Bukaludaaya; n'abo nabo tibaakuhaazya. 
Ezekiel16:30 Mukama RUHANGA yaagira ati: omutima gwawe ka gurwaziibwe okwetenga, ahabw'okuba okozire ebyo byona, ebikorwa omukazi maraaya owaariire enshoni," 
Ezekiel16:31 kandi oyeyombekyeire enju ahatunguukire, waayekorera omwanya mukur ahari buri nteeraniro y'emihanda; kandi torabaire nka baamaraaya abandi, ahabw'okuba okaba ogaya okugurirwa." 
Ezekiel16:32 Eshi ori omukazi enshambani, otaasya abahinguzi omu mwanya gwa baro!" 
Ezekiel16:33 Baamaraaya boona bagurirwa abashaija, kwonka iwe niiwe oha bashambane baawe boona ebiconco, noobagurira ngu bakwijeho nibaruga embaju zoona ahabw'obwamaraaya bwawe." 
Ezekiel16:34 N'ahabw'ekyo obwamaraaya bwawe bwine omutaano n'obw'abandibakazi; kandi tihariho owaakwohize kuba maraaya, kureka iwe niiwe ogurira abantu, bo tibaakugurira. Nikyo obeereire ow'omutaano n'abandi." 
Ezekiel16:35 Mbwenu, iwe maraaya 'we, hurira ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel16:36 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Manya, obuhemu bwawe bushuurwirwe, n'enjuuro yaawe yaareebwa butunu ahabw'obwamaraaya bwawe, obu waagizire na bashambane baawe, n'ahabw'ebishushani byawe byona ebirikuramibwa, n'ahabw'eshagama y'abaana ei waabihaire." 
Ezekiel16:37 Reeba ahabw'ebyo byona ndyateeranira hamwe bashambane baawe boona, abaabaire bakushemeza, abu waabaire okunda boona, n'abau waabaire oyanga boona. Ndyabateeranira hamwe, bakurwanise nibaruga oku n'oku, nkujwekyere busha omu maisho gaabo, bareebe enjuuro yaawe yoona."
