Ezekiel33:3 ku arireeba rurara neija omu nsi, yaateera enzamba, yaagambira abantu;" 
Ezekiel33:4 obwo omuntu weena ku arihurira eiraka ry'enzamba, ataayeta hari okwo kubuura, rurara yaija, yaamwita, eshagama ye niwe eribarirwa;" 
Ezekiel33:5 ahakuba akahurira eiraka ry'enzamba, tiyaaryetaho; eshagama ye eryamubarirwa. Ahabw'okuba kuri yaaryetaireho, akaajunire amagara ge." 
Ezekiel33:6 Kwonka omurinzi, ku arireeba rurara neija, ataateera nzamba kugambira abantu, rurara yaija, yaabaitamu omuntu, omuntu ogwo aryaitirwa omu by'okushiisha bye; kwonka eshagama ye ndyagibuuza ogwo murinzi." 
Ezekiel33:7 Naiwe Mwana w'omuntu, nkutaireho kuba omurinzi w'enju ya Israeli; n'ahabw'ekyo hurira ekigambo ekirikuruga omu kanwa kangye, obampanire." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ku ndigira omubi nti: Iwe mubi 'we, buzimazima oryafa, naiwe otaagamba, okahana ogwo mubi ngu arekye omuhanda gwe omubi, omubi ogwo aryafeera omu by'okushiisha bye, kwonka eshagama ye niiwe ndigibuuza." 
Ezekiel33:9 Kwonka ku orihana omubi ngu arekye omuhanda gwe omubi, yaayanga kugureka, aryafeera omu by'okushiisha bye, kwonka iwe oryaba okirize amagara gaawe." 
Ezekiel33:10 Kandi, Mwana w'omuntu, gambira enju ya Israeli oti: Imwe nimugira muti: Ebicumuro byaitu n'ebibi byaitu bituriho, bitureeteire okuhwa aha magufa. Mbwenu nitubaasa tuta kugumaho?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Bagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Niinyerahira, tinshemerererwa kufa kw'omubi, kureka omubi okureka omuhanda gwe, akaba ohuriire; muhindukye, muhindukye murekye emihanda yaanyu emibi. Mbwenu nimwendera ki kufa, imwe nju ya Israeli 'mwe?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Kandi iwe, Mwana w'omuntu, gambira abantu baawe oti: Ohikiriire, ku arishiisha, okuhikiirira kwe tikurimukiza; kandi omubi, ku arihinduka yaareka obubi bwe, obwo bubi bwe buryaba butakimwita; kandi ohikiriire, ku arishiisha, taribaasa kubaisibwaho okuhikiirira kwe." 
Ezekiel33:13 N'obu naakugambira ohikiriire nti: Buzimazima oryaba ohuriire, kwonka ku arysiga okuhikiirira kwe, yaakora eby'okushiisha, tihariho na kimwe omu by'okuhikiirira bye ekiriijukwa; kureka aryafeera omu by'okushiisha bye ebi akozire." 
Ezekiel33:14 Kandi ekindi, n'obu naakugambira omubi nti: Buzimazima oryafa, kwonka ku arihinduka, yaareka ekibi kye, kyaakora eby'ebiragiro kandi ebihikire," 
Ezekiel33:15 ogwo muntu yaagarura eki akwatiriziibwe, kandi yaagaruraho eki anyagire, yaagyendera omu biragiro ebirikuhaisa amagara, ataakora by'okushiisha, buzimazima aryagumaho, tarifa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Tihariho kibi na kimw eomu bi yaakozire ekirimwijukwaho; ahakuba akozire eby'ebiragiro kandi ebihikire, buzimazima aryagumaho." 
Ezekiel33:17 Kwonka abantu baawe nibagira bati: Emitwarize ya MUKAMA tehikire; haza eyaabo niyo etahikire. 
Ezekiel33:18 Ohikiriire ku arihinduka, yaareka okuhikiirira kwe, yaakora eky'okushiisha, aryafa abizire." 
Ezekiel33:19 Kandi omubi ku arihinduka, yaareka obubi bwe, yaakora eby'ebiragiro kandi ebihikire, biryamubaisaho." 
Ezekiel33:20 Kwonka nimugira muti: Emitwarize ya MUKAMA tehikire. Imwe nju ya Israeli 'mwe, ndyabacwera orubanja, buri muntu nk'oku emitwarize ye eri." 
Ezekiel33:21 Bwanyima ku twabaaire tumazire emyaka ikumi n'ebiri turi omu bukwatwa, omu kwezi kwa ikumi aha kiro kyakwo kya kataano, haija omushaija ocwire naaruga Yerusaalemu, yampikaho, yaagira ati: Orurembo rukwatsirwe." 
Ezekiel33:22 Omukono gwa MUKAMA gukaba guraire guunyizireho omu mwabazyo, ogwo mushaija ocwire atakaizire; kandi MUKAMA akaba yaayashamize akanwa kangye, obu ogwo mushaija yampikaho omu kasheeshe; ntyo naagamba, tinaaguma ndi ekiteta." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ekigambo kay MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel33:24 Mwana w'omuntu, abatwire omu myanya y'omu nsi ya Israeli eyaatsigirweho batuura nibagira bati: Abrahamu akaba ari omuntu omwe wenka, kwonka yaakubuura ensi; mbwenu itwe turi baingi; buzimazima egi nsi tugihairwe kuba eyaitu." 
Ezekiel33:25 N'ahabw'ekyo obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Murya enyama n'eshagama, mwimukiza amaisho gaanyu ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, kandi musheesha eshagama. Mbwenu ebyo muryakubuura egyo nsi?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Nimwesiga rurara, mukora ebihagaro, kandi buri muntu ashiisha muka mutaahi we. Mbwenu ebyo muryakubuura egyo nsi?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Okwo nikwo oraabaigire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Niinyerahira, buzimazima abatwire omuri egyo myanya eyaatsigirweho baryaitwa rurara; ori omu ishwa ndyamurekurira enyamaishwa, zimutaanyaguze, n'abari omu bigo bigumire n'omu maaya baitwe orufu." 
Ezekiel33:28 Kandi ensi ndyagihindura amatongo, ebe eihamba, amaani g'amaryo gaayo gahwereho kimwe; n'ebibungo bya Israeli bibeere kimwe amatongo, harekye kugira owaarabamu." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ku ndi heza kuhindura ensi amatongo, yaaba eihamba nimbatura ebihagaro byabo byona ebi baakozire, nibwo barimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel33:30 Naiwe Mwana w'omuntu, abantu baawe abarikukugambaho aha rubaju rw'engo n'aha miryango y'amaju, nibagambirana buri muntu na mwene ishe, nibagira bati: Nimwije tuhurire oku ekigambo kiri ekirikuruga omu kanwa ka MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel33:31 Batyo bakwijaho nk'oku abantu baija, bashutama omu maisho gaawe nk'abantu bangye, bahurira ebi orikugamba, kwonka batarikwija kubikora; ahabw'okuba booreka okukunda kwingi n'eminwa yaabo, kwonka emitima yaabo eraramiire amagoba gaabo." 
Ezekiel33:32 Kandi reeba, iwe aharibo ori nk'orikweshongora ekyeshongoro kirungi n'eiraka rirungi naateera gye enanga; ahabw'okuba nibahurira ebi orikugamba, kwonka batarikwija kubikora." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ebyo ku biriija, kandi kwo biryaija, obwo nibwo barimanya ku nabi abaire abarimu." 
Ezekiel34:1 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel34:2 Mwana w'omuntu, hanuura ebiriba aha bariisa ba Israeli; obahanuurire noobagira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugambira abariisa ba Israeli, naagira ati: Imwe bariisa ba Israeli 'mwe, abarikweriisa mwenka, omuriisa tashemereire kuriisa entaama?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Nimurya ebishaju, mujwara eby'ebyoya, mubaaga ezigomokire, haza mutarikuziriisa." 
Ezekiel34:4 Ezitaine maani timurikuzigaruramu maani; ezirwaire timurikuzitambira; ezihendekire timurikuzibunga; ezirazire timurikuzitaaruura; ezibuzire timurikuzisherura, kureka nimuzitegyekyesa amaani n'omwaga." 
Ezekiel34:5 Nikyo zaataataaniire, ahabw'okubura omuriisa, zikaba ez'okuriibwa enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ishwa." 
Ezekiel34:6 Entaama zikataataana, zaazengyerera omu nshozi zoona n'omu bibungo biraingwa byona; entaama zangye zikataataanira omu nsi yoona, zaabura ow'okuzisherura, n'obu yaakuba ow'okuzibuuririza." 
Ezekiel34:7 N'ahabw'ekyo imwe bariisa 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel34:8 Mukama RUHANGA naayerahira naagira ati: Nimumanya ku entaama zangye zibaire eky'okwitwa, kandi zikaba ez'okuriibwa enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ishwa ahabw'okutagira muriisa, n'abariisa kwanga kuzisherura, kureka bakaba ab'okweriisa bonka batariise ntaama zangye;" 
Ezekiel34:9 n'ahabw'ekyo, imwe bariisa 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel34:10 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, naaba omuzigu w'abariisa; ndyababuuza entaama zangye, mbacwe aha kuziriisa; kandi abo bariisa tibarigaruka kweriisa. Ndyaiha entaama zangye omu kanwa kaabo, zirekye kugaruka kuba eby'okurya byabo." 
Ezekiel34:11 Kwonka oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, nyowe, nyowe nyenka, naaza kwesherurira entaama zangye, nzibuuririze." 
Ezekiel34:12 Nk'oku omuriisa ashanga zimwe aha ntaama ze zitaataine, akazisherura kuzigarura omu busyo, naanye nkwo ndisherura entaama zangye, nkaziiha ei zaataataaniire yoona aha izooba ry'ekibunda n'omwirima ndindindi." 
Ezekiel34:13 Kandi ndyazireeta ninziiha omu mahanga, nzitaaruure omu nsi zoona, nzigarure omu nsi yaazo, nziriisize omu nshozi za Israeli, aha mbaju z'emigyera n'omu myanya yoona ey'omu nsi etwirwemu abantu." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndyaziriisiza omu mariisizo marungi, amariisizo gaazo gabe aha bibungo biraingwa bya Israeli; okwo omu mariisizo marungi niyo ziribyama, zikariira omu mariisizo ga Israeli ag'obunyaatsi bwingi." 
Ezekiel34:15 Nyowe nyenak niinye ndiba omuriisa w'entaama zangye," 
Ezekiel34:16 nkazizaagiza; ndyasherura ezibuzire, ngarure ezirazire, mbungye ezihendekire; ezitaine maani, nzigagaruremu, ezigomokire n'ez'amaani nzirinde; kandi zoona ndyaziriisa omu bwinganisa; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel34:17 Kandi oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Mbwenu imwe busyo bwangye 'mwe, reeba, nincwa orubanja rw'entaama na ngyenzi zaazo, n'orw'empaya z'entaama n'ez'embuzi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Nimugira ntu n'ekintu kikye, imwe kuheza kurya obunyaatsi bw'omu mariisizo marungi, haza mukaribatiirira obwatsigaraho, n'okunywa amaizi marungi, haza mukatabangura n'ebigyere byanyu agaatsigaraho?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Entaama zangye zishemereire kurya obunyaatsi obu muribaririire, kandi zikanywa amaizi agu mutabangwire?" 
Ezekiel34:20 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikubagirira ati: Reeba, nyowe, nyowe nyenka, ndyacwa orubanja rw'entaama ezigomokire n'ezihururukire." 
Ezekiel34:21 Mutsikanisa embaju n'amabega, ezitaine maani muzicumitisa amahembe, okuhitsya obu muzitaataanisa zikaza hare;" 
Ezekiel34:22 nikyo ndijunira obusyo bwangye, butagarukye kuba eky'okwitwa, nkacwa orubanja rw'entaama na ngyenzi zaazo." 
Ezekiel34:23 Bwanyima ndyaziteeraho omuriisa omwe, omwiru wangye Daudi aziriise; niwe ariziriisa, akaba omuriisa waazo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Kandi nyowe MUKAMA ndyaba Ruhanga waazo, n'omwiru wangye Daudi abe omugabe omurizo. Nyowe MUKAMA niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ndyaragaana nazo endagaano y'obusingye, mmare enyamaishwa mbi omu nsi, zibone kuguma omu ihamba ziri buhooro, ziraare omu bishaka." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ezo ntaama zangye n'emyanya eyehinguririize orushozi rwangye byona, ndyabihindura ebirikuhaisa omugisha, ngwise enjura omu bunaku bwayo, ebe enjura y'omugisha." 
Ezekiel34:27 Kandi ebiti by'omu ishwa biryayera ebijuma byabyo, n'eitaka ryeze emyaka yaaryo; zigume omu nsi yaazo ziri buhooro; kandi ku ndihenda omugamba gw'obuhuuku bwazo, naazijuna ninziiha omu mikono y'abarikuzigira abahuuku, obwo nibwo zirimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel34:28 Tizirigaruka kuba minyago y'amahanga, nari kuriibwa enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba; kureka ziryaguma ziri buhooro, kandi tihaine orizitiinisa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndyazimereza obunyaatsi oburikutangaaza, zirekye kugaruka kwitirwa enjara omuri egyo nsi, n'obu kwakuba okujumwa abanyamahanga." 
Ezekiel34:30 Kandi ziryamanya ku nyowe Mukama RUHANGA waazo ya Israeli, ku nibo bantu bangye; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba." 
Ezekiel34:31 Naimwe muri entaama zangye, entaama z'omu iriisizo ryangye, naanye ndi Ruhanga waanyu; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel35:1 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel35:2 Mwana w'omuntu, ta amaisho gaawe aha rushozi Seire, oruhanuurire ebirirubaho," 
Ezekiel35:3 noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Iwe orushozi Seiri, reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe, kandi naaza kukubangira omukono, nkuhindure amatongo, obe eihamba." 
Ezekiel35:4 Endembo zaawe ndyazihindura amahamba, iwe ohindukye amatongo, omanye ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel35:5 Ahabw'okugira enzigu etarihwa, okahayo Abaisraeli kwitwa rurara omu biro by'enaku zaabo, n'omu bunaku bw'okufubirwa kwabo kw'aha muheru," 
Ezekiel35:6 n'ahabw'ekyo niinyerahira, nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira, ndyakuteekateekyera okujwisibwa eshagama, kandi eryakuhiiga ahabw'okusingwa orubaja rw'eshagama, nikyo erikuhiigira." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndyahindura orushozi Seiri eihamba, rube amatongo, ndumaremu boona abarikurwijamu n'abarikururugamu." 
Ezekiel35:8 Orushozi rwawe ndyarwijuza emitumbi, abarikwitwa rurara bagwe omu bubungo byawe n'omu mpanga zaawe n'omu binonko byawe byona." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndyakuhindura amatongo g'ebiro byona, n'endembo zaawe tizirituurwamu. Haza obwo nibwo orimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel35:10 Ahabw'okugira oti: Amahanga ago gombi n'ensi ezo zombi biryaba ebyangye, tubikubuure (n'obu MUKAMA araabe yaabaire atwireyo);" 
Ezekiel35:11 nikyo nyowe MUKAMA ndikwerahirira ningira nti: Ndyakutwaza nk'ekiniga n'eihari ebi waayorekire oku biri, ninkutura rwango ei waabagiriire, kandi ndyayemanyisa omuriimwe omu bunaku obu ndibacwereramu emanja." 
Ezekiel35:12 Ekirirugamu oryamanya ku nyowe MUKAMA naahuriire ebijumo byawe byona, ebi waajumire ebibungo bya Israeli noogira oti: Bihindwirwe amatongo, byatuheebwa kubirya." 
Ezekiel35:13 Kandi mukanyekuzaho, orurimi rwanyu rwankanyisaho ebigambo, naabihurira." 
Ezekiel35:14 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Ndyakuhindura amatongo, ensi yoona ebone kwesiima." 
Ezekiel35:15 Nk'oku waayesiimire ahabw'obuhunguzi bw'enju ya Israeli kuba amatongo, naiwe nikwo ndikugira, okaba amatongo. Iwe rushozi Seiri na Edomu yoona ahu erikugarukira, muryaba amatongo. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel36:1 Mbwenu, Mwana w'omuntu, hanuurira ebibungo bya Israeli noobigira oti: Imwe bibungo bya Israeli 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel36:2 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugmaba naagira ati: Ahabw'omuzigu kukugambaho ati: Otyo, nikyo kihena! kandi ati: Ebibungo byabo bya ira tubikubwire, byaba ebyaitu;" 
Ezekiel36:3 n'ahabw'ekyo hanuura noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahakuba, eego, ahakuba bakuhindwire amatongo, baakusingyera nibakuturuka embaju zoona, mwahinduka ensi erikukubuurwa agandi mahanga agaatsigaireho, mwaba ekigaaniiro ky'okugambwaho kubi abantu," 
Ezekiel36:4 n'ahabw'ekyo, imwe bibungo bya Israeli 'mwe, muhurire ekigambo kya Mukama RUHANGA. Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira enshozi, ebibungo, ebinonko n'empanga, amatongo n'amahamba, n'endembo ezihwiremu abantu, zikahinduka eminyago n'eky'okushekyererwa amahanga agatsigaireho agabyehinguririize, naagira ati:" 
Ezekiel36:5 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Ngambire n'eihato eririkwaka nk'omuriro, nimpana amahanga agatsigaireho na Edomu yoona, abeehaire ensi yangye kuba eyaabo, baine okwesiima kwingi munonga omu mitima, n'okugaya kwingi, ahabw'okugikubuura n'okuginyaga." 
Ezekiel36:6 N'ahabw'ekyo ohanuure ebiriba aha nsi ya Israeli, ogambire enshozi, ebibungo, ebinonko, n'empanga oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ningambisa ekiniga n'eihato, ningira nti: Ahabw'okwemera kuhemurwa amahanga," 
Ezekiel36:7 nikyo ndikwerahirira nti: Buzimazima amahanga agabeehinguririize nago garyahemurwa; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira. 
Ezekiel36:8 Kwonka mwe bibungo bya Israeli 'mwe, muryatooka amataagi, mwanire abantu bangye Israeli ebijuma, ahabw'okuba bari haihi kugaruka." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ahakuba reeba, ndi aha rubaju rwanyu, niinyija kubagarukira, mubone kuhingwa n'okubibwamu." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ndyabakanyisamu abantu, ab'enju ya Israeli yoona; endembo ziryatuurwamu, n'amatongo gagarukye gombekwemu;" 
Ezekiel36:11 ndyabakanyisamu abantu n'amatungo, nabyo bizaare, bikanye; kandi ndyabareetera kutuurwamu nk'omu biro byanyu ebya ira, mbagire gye okukira oku naabagizire omu kubanza. Haza obwo nibwo murimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel36:12 Buzimazima ndyareka abantu bangye Abaisraeli babagyendagyendeho; baryabakubuura, mube obuhunguzi bwabo, akdni timurigaruka kubaitira baana obundi." 
Ezekiel36:13 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'abantu kubagira ngu, muri ebibungo ebirikwita abantu, kandi eihanga ryanyu mukarimaramu abaana," 
Ezekiel36:14 nikyo mutarigarukira kwita bantu bundi, omu ihanga ryanyu; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel36:15 Kandi tindikwenda ku mugaruka kuhurira okujuma oku abanyamahanga barikubajuma, n'obu kwakuba okwemera okuhemura kwabo; n'eihanga ryanyu timurigaruka kuriteeza ntsibo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel36:16 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel36:17 Mwana w'omuntu, obu ab'enju ya Israeli baabaire batwire omu nsi yaabo y'obuzaarwa bakagisiisisa emitwarize yaabo ekansusira nk'okutashemera kw'omukazi ori omu kwezi." 
Ezekiel36:18 Nikyo naabashukiireho ekiniga kyangye, nimbatura eshagama ei baaseesire omu nsi, kandi n'ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa ebi baagisiisiise." 
Ezekiel36:19 Ntyo naabataataanisiza omu mahanga, baanaganagwa omu nsi zaago, naabacwera orubanja orushemereire emitwarize yaabo n'ebi barikukora." 
Ezekiel36:20 Kandi ku baahikire omuri ago mahanga ei baabaire baza yoona, baashiisha eiziina ryangye eririkwera; ahabw'okuba abantu bakabagambaho bati: Aba n'abantu ba MUKAMA; kwonka bakabingwa omu nsi ye." 
Ezekiel36:21 Kwonka naasaasibwa eiziina ryangye eririkwera, eri enju ya Israeli yaajumiise omu mahanga agu baagiiremu." 
Ezekiel36:22 Mbwenu gambira enju ya Israeli oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe nju ya Israeli 'mwe, niinyija kukora, kwonka ti habwanyu kureka ahabw'eiziina ryangye eririkwera, eri mwajumiise omu mahanga agu mwagiiremu." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ndyahimbisisa eiziina ryangye erikuru eryajumisiibwe omu mahanga, kandi eri mwagajumiisemu, gaikirize ku riri eririkwera; bwanyima ku ndiheza kwehimbisisa omuriimwe omu maisho g'ago mahanga ku ndi Orikwera, garyamanya ku ndi MUKAMA; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel36:24 Ahabw'okuba ndyabaiha omu mahanga, mbataaruure omu nsi zoona, mbagarure omu nsi yaanyu ey'obuzaarwa." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ndyabashukyeera amaizi maingi, mushemezibweho oburofa bwanyu bwona, mbamaremu ebishushani byanyu byona ebirikuramibwa, mushemere." 
Ezekiel36:26 Kandi ndyabaha omutima musya, mbatemu omwoyo musya; ndyabaihamu omutima gw'eibaare, mbatemu ogworobi." 
Ezekiel36:27 Kandi ndyata omwoyo gwangye omuriimwe, mbagyendeseze omu biragiro byangye, mubone kurinda ebi naataireho n'okubikora." 
Ezekiel36:28 Kandi muryatuura omu nsi ei naahaire baashwenkuriimwe; muryaba abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waanyu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ndyabaiha omu burofa bwanyu bwona; ndyabamereza engano, nzikanyise, kandi tindibaitsa njara." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndyakanyisa ebijuma n'ebirikushaaruurwa omu misiri, murekye kugarukwaho ekijumo ky'enjara omu mahanga." 
Ezekiel36:31 Haza obwo nibwo muriijuka emitwarize yaanyu emibi, n'ebi mwabaire mukora ebitari birungi, mukeetamwa ahabw'okutahikiirira kwanyu n'ebihangao byanyu." 
Ezekiel36:32 Tindibikora habwanyu, nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira. Ekyo mukimanye. Imwe b'enju ya Israeli 'mwe, mugire enshoni, mubwerabwere ahabw'emitwarize yaanyu." 
Ezekiel36:33 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Aha izooba eri ndibashemerezaho eby'okutahikiirira byanyu byona, ndyareetera endembo kutuurwamu abantu, n'amatongo kwombekwamu." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ensi eyaabaire eri eihamba eryahingwa, erekye kuba amatongo nk'oku yaabaire eri omu maisho g'abahinguzi boona." 
Ezekiel36:35 Bwanyima baryagira bati: Ensi egi ekaba eri amatongo, mbwenu ebaire nk'ekibanja kya Edeni; n'endembo ezaabaire zirugirwemu abantu zisheenyirwe, zihindukire amatongo, mbwenu zitwirwemu abantu, kandi zeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare." 
Ezekiel36:36 Obwo amahanga agariba gabeehinguririize garyamanya ku nyowe MUKAMA niinye nyombekire emyanya eyaabaire esheenyirwe, nkahinga ahaabaire hari endaara. Nyowe MUKAMA niinye naakigamba, kandi ndyakikora." 
Ezekiel36:37 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Kandi eki nakyo ndyaikiriza ab'enju ya Israeli kukinshaba ngu nkibakorere, nikwo kubakanyisiza abantu nk'obusyo." 
Ezekiel36:38 Endembo ezaabaire zisheenyirwe ziryaijuramu obureetwa kutambirwa omuri Yerusaalemi aha magyenyi gaayo agatairweho. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi MUKAMA. 
Ezekiel37:1 Omukono gwa MUKAMA gukaba guri ahariinye, yanshohoza ndi omu Myoyo wa MUKAMA, yantwara, yanta ahansi ahagati omu ruhita, kandi orwo ruhita rukaba rwijwire amagufa." 
Ezekiel37:2 Yanyebembera, yaagyenda naagandabyamu; reeba, gakaba gari maingi munonga omuri orwo ruhita, kandi goomire, gakarangataine." 
Ezekiel37:3 Bwanyima yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, ebo aga magufa gakaabaasa kuba agahuriire? Naamugarukamu nti: Mukama RUHANGA, niiwe orikukimanya." 
Ezekiel37:4 Yaagaruka yangira ati: Hanuurira aga magufa, ogagire oti: Imwe magufa goomire 'mwe, muhurire ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel37:5 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugambira aga magufa naagira ati: Reeba, naaza kubatamu omwitsyo, mube abahuriire." 
Ezekiel37:6 Naaza kubataho emitsi, mbagarureho enyama, mbashwekyeho oruhu, mbatemu omwitsyo, mube abahuriire; haza mumanye ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel37:7 Ntyo naahanuura nk'oku naaragiirwa; ku naabaire ninkihanuura, naahurira okukomangana, amagufa gaateerana, eigufa ryakwatana na ringyenzi ryaryo." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba gaagiibwaho emitsi n'enyama, byashwekwa oruhu, kwonka bitaabamu omwitsyo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Bwanyima yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, hanuurira omwitsyo, ogugire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: iwe mwitsyo 'we, ruga omu mbaju ina ei emiyaga ereetwa, ohuuhe ahari egi mitumbi y'abaitsirwe, babe abahuriire." 
Ezekiel37:10 Ntyo naahanuura nk'oku yandagiira, omwitsyo gwabazamu, baaba abahuriire, baayemerera eihe rihango munonga." 
Ezekiel37:11 Bwanyima yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, aga magufa n'enju yoona eya Israeli. Reeba, nibagira bati: Amagufa gaitu goomire, titukiine matsiko; tubeereire kimwe encuubwa." 
Ezekiel37:12 N'ahabw'ekyo obahanuurire, obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, reeba, ndyaigura ebituuro byanyu mbaihemu, mbagarure omu nsi ya Israeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Kandi ku ndiheza kwigura ebituuro byanyu, naabaihamu, muryamanya ku ndi MUKAMA, Bantu bangye 'mwe." 
Ezekiel37:14 Kandi ndyabatamu Omwoyo wangye, mube abahuriire, mbate omu nsi yaanyu y'obuzaarwa; haza obwo nibwo murimanya ku nyowe MUKAMA niinye naakigambire kandi nkakikora; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Ezekiel37:15 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel37:16 Mwana w'omuntu, kwata enkoni, ogihandiikyeho oti: N'eya Yuda n'abaana ba Israeli bagyenzi be; bwanyima okwate endiijo nkoni, ogihandiikyeho oti: N'eya Yosefu (enkoni ya Efuraimu), n'ab'enju ya Israeli boona bagyenzi be;" 
Ezekiel37:17 bwanyima oziteerane zibe enkoni emwe omu ngaro zaawe. 
Ezekiel37:18 Kandi abantu baawe, ku baraakugira bati: Tokaatushoboororera amakuru g'ebyo?" 
Ezekiel37:19 obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyatwara enkoni ya Yosefu eri omu ngaro za Efuraimu, n'enganda z'Abaisraeli bagyenzi be, ngiteerane n'eya Yuda, mbahindure enkoni emwe, babe bamwe omu ngaro zangye." 
Ezekiel37:20 Ezo nkoni zi orikuhandiikaho, ku ziraabe ziri omu ngaro zaawe nibakureeba," 
Ezekiel37:21 obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyaiha Abaisraeli omu mahanga agu baagiiremu, mbataaruure nimbaiha embaju zoona, mbareete omu nsi yaabo y'obuzaarwa." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ndyabahindura eihanga rimwe omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Israeli; kandi omugabe omwe niwe aribategyeka boona; tibarigaruka kuba mahanga abiri, n'obu kwakuba okucuubwamu obugabe bubiri." 
Ezekiel37:23 Tibarigaruka kwesiisisa bishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa nari ebihagaro byabo nainga ebicumuro byabo byona; kurek ndyabajuna, mbatambire okugaruka enyima kwona, oku baacumuriiremu, mbashemeze; babe abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo." 
Ezekiel37:24 Kandi omwiru wangye Daudi aryaba omugabe waabo, boona baryagira omuriisa omwe, bagyendere omu biragiro baynagye, bate omutima aha bi naataireho, babikore." 
Ezekiel37:25 Baryatuura omu nsi ei naahaire omwiru wangye Yakobo, ei baashwenkuriimwe baabaire batwiremu; okwo niyo bariguma, bo n'abaana baabo na baijukuru baabo ebiro byona; kandi omwiru wangye Daudi niwe ariba omugabe waabo ebiro byona." 
Ezekiel37:26 Kandi ndyaragaana bato endagaano y'obusingye, ebe endagaano ei ndagaine nabo ey'ebiro byona; ndyabaha omugisha, mbakanyise nte Omwanya gwangye ogurikwera ahagati yaabo, gube ogw'obutwire bwona." 
Ezekiel37:27 Obutaaho bwangye buryaba omuribo, mbe Ruhanga waabo nabo babe abantu bangye." 
Ezekiel37:28 Omwanya gwangye ogurikwera ku guriguma ahagati yaabo ebiro byona, obwo nibwo amahanga garimanya ku nyowe MUKAMA niinye nyeza Israeli." 
Ezekiel38:1 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Ezekiel38:2 Mwana w'omuntu, ta amaisho gaawe ahari Googi omu nsi ya Magoogi, omugabe wa Rooshi, Mesheki na Tubali, omuhanuurire ebirimubaho," 
Ezekiel38:3 noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Iwe Googi, omugabe wa Rooshi, Mesheki na Tubali, reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe;" 
Ezekiel38:4 ndyakuhindura, nkute amarobo omu matama, nkureete n'eihe ryawe ryona, embaraasi n'abarikuzigyenderaho, boona bajwaire eby'okurwanisa ebihikire, omutwe muhango munonga, boona baine engabo enkye n'empango, bakwaitse zaarurara," 
Ezekiel38:5 aba Peresi Kuushi na Puuti bari hamwe nabo, baine engabo n'enkofiira z'ebyoma;" 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomeri n'amahe ge goona, na Besi-togaruma owaarugire omu bicweka by'aha muheru gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, amahanga amaingi gari hamwe naiwe." 
Ezekiel38:7 Yeteekateekye, kandi ogume oyeteekateekire, iwe n'amahe goona agahurwire kandi agakwehinguririize, obe omurinzi waago." 
Ezekiel38:8 Bwanyima y'ebiro bingi oryahuruzibwa; omu myaka ey'aha muheru oryahurura, oteere egyo nsi eyaabaire ecwekyereziibwe rurara, bwanyima ekagarurwa omu buteeka, ekatuurwamu abantu abataarwirwe omu mahanga maingi, bakaza omu bibungo bya Israeli ebyabaire biri amatongo; abo bantu bakaihwa omu mahanga, mbwenu batwire buhooro boona oku baingana." 
Ezekiel38:9 Oryainamuka, oije ori nk'eihunga; oryaba nk'ekicu ekishwekire ensi, iwe n'amahe gaawe goona n'amahanga maingi agariba gari hamwe naiwe." 
Ezekiel38:10 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Eryo izooba oryaizirwa ebiteekateeko, ogire enaama mbi," 
Ezekiel38:11 ogire oti: Naaza kwinamuka, nteere ensi y'ebirorero ebitaine ngo z'amabaare, ngwe aha bantu abagaramisiriize, abatwire buhooro, boona batwire ahataine ngo z'amabaare, n'obu gaakuba amarembo againe enyigi ezirikukingwa empimbi," 
Ezekiel38:12 kunyaga eminyago n'okugitwara, okuteera emyanya eyaabiare eri amatongo, mbwenu etwirwemu, n'okuteera abantu abaataarwirwe omu mahanga bakeetungira ente n'ebintu, bakatuura ahagati y'ensi." 
Ezekiel38:13 Aba Sheeba na Dedani n'abahsuubuzi ba Tarushiishi n'ebirorero byabyo byona baryakubuuza nibagira bati: Beitu oizire kunyaga? Ohurwize engabo zaawe kwija kunyaga, kutwara efeeza n'ezaabu, amatungo n'ebintu, kukukumbura eminyago mingi?" 
Ezekiel38:14 N'ahabw'ekyo, Mwana w'omuntu, hanuurira Googi, noomugira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Eryo izooba abantu bangye Abaisraeli ku bariba batwire buhooro, oryayehuruza," 
Ezekiel38:15 orugye omu mwanya gwawe gw'omu bicweka by'aha muheru gw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, iwe n'amahanga maingi agari hamwe naiwe, boona bari aha mbaraasi, eihe rihango kandi ry'amaani," 
Ezekiel38:16 oteere abantu bangye Israeli, ori nk'ekicu ekishwekire ensi. Omu biro by'aha muheru ndyakuteeza ensi yangye, amahanga gabone kummanya, ku ndiba naakweyorekyeiremu, ku ndi Orikwera, iwe Googi." 
Ezekiel38:17 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Niiwe ou naagambireho ira nindaba omu bairu bangye baanabi ba Israeli, abaamazire emyaka mingi nibahanuura omu bunaku obwo, ku niiwe ndyohereza kubateera?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Kwonka eryo izooba eri Googi ariteereraho ensi ya Israeli, ekiniga kyangye kiryaimuka; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ahabw'okuba ningambisa eihato n'ekiniga ekirikubuguma, ningira nti: Buzimazima eryo izooba haryabaho okutengatenga kw'amaani omu nsi ya Israeli," 
Ezekiel38:20 okurireetera eby'enyanja, amahungu g'omu mwanya, enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa, ebirikwekurura ahansi byona n'abantu ab'omu nsi boona, kutetemera omu maisho gangye, enshozi zikakumbagazibwa, ebibaare bikahiguka, n'engo z'amabaare zoona zikakumbagara ahansi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ndyayeta ebirikutiinisa eby'emiringo yoona kurwanisa Googi, buri muntu aitsie mugyenzi we rurara; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ndyamucwera orubanja, mmuteho ekifubiro ky'oruru n'eky'okusheesha eshagama ye; kandi we n'amahe ge n'amahanga maingi, agu ariba aine, ndyabateeza omutsindansi gw'enjura, n'emengo z'orubaare, n'omuriro, n'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti;" 
Ezekiel38:23 ntyo nyorekye obukuru bwangye n'okwera kwangye, kandi nyemanyise omu maisho g'amahanga maingi. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel39:1 Kandi iwe, Mwana w'omuntu, hanuurira Googi ebirimubaho, noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugmba naagira ati: Iwe Googi omugabe wa Rooshi, Mesheki na Tubali, reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe;" 
Ezekiel39:2 ndyakuhindura, nkwebembeze, nkwihe omu bicweka by'aha muheru gw'obukiizi-bwa-bumohso, nkwinamure, nkuhitsye omu bibungo bya Israeli;" 
Ezekiel39:3 ku orihikayo, ndyateera obuta bwawe oburi omu mukono gwawe gwa bumosho, mbukunagise, n'emyambi yaawe eri omu mukono gwawe gwa buryo ngigwise ahansi." 
Ezekiel39:4 Oryagwa aha bibungo bya Israeli, iwe n'amahe gaawe n'amahanga agu oriba oine, nkugaburire amahungu g'emiringo yoona n'enyamaishwa mbi, bikugaashe," 
Ezekiel39:5 ogwe omu bwerere; ahabw'okuba niinye naakigamba; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira. 
Ezekiel39:6 Kandi ndyayohereza omuriro, gwotsye Magoogi n'abantu abatwire buhooro omu birwa, bamanye ku ndi MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel39:7 Bwanyima ndyamanyisa eiziina ryangye eririkwera omu bantu bangye Israeli; tindireka iziina ryangye kugaruka kujumwa; kandi amahanga garyamanya ku ndi MUKAMA Orikwera omuri Israeli. 
Ezekiel39:8 Reeba, nibiija, kandi biryabaho; eryo niryo izooba eri naagambire; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel39:9 Obwo abariba batwire omu ndembo za Israeli baryashohora, bahembe eby'okurwanisa, bisye, engabo enkye n'empango, amata n'emyambi, ebikoni n'amacumu, bamare emyaka mushanju nibabyotsya;" 
Ezekiel39:10 tibaryetenga kusheenya omu ishwa, n'obu kwakuba okukonda ebiti omu kibira; ahabw'okuba baryahemba eby'okurwanisa byabo; baryatwara ebintu by'abaatwaire ebyabo, banyagye abaabanyagire; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel39:11 Eryo izooba ndyaha Googi ah'okuziikwa omuri Israeli, omu ruhita rw'abahinguzi aha bukiizi bw'enyanja bw'oburugwa-izooba; okwo niyo bariziika Googi n'enyanja y'abantu be boona, omuhanda gw'abagyenzi gukafa; kandi haryayetwa Oruhita rwa hamoni-googi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ab'enju ya Israeli baryamara ameezi mushanju nibabaziika, babone kushemeza ensi." 
Ezekiel39:13 Abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi baryabaziika; kandi aha izooba eri ndihimbisizibwaho, kiryabahaisa ekitiinisa; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel39:14 Bwanyima baryatoorana abantu b'okuguma nibaraba omu nsi nibaziika emitumbi eriba etsigaire omu nsi, ngu ensi eshemere; ago meezi mushanju ku garihwaho barysherura." 
Ezekiel39:15 Abo basheruzi ku bariraba omu nsi, omwe omuribo yaagwa aha igufa ry'omuntu, aryarita akamanyiso aha rubaju, okuhitsya obu abaziiki baririziika omu ruhanga rwa Hamoni-googi." 
Ezekiel39:16 (Kandi aho niho hariba orurembo orurikwetwa Hamona). Okwo nikwo barishemza egyo nsi. 
Ezekiel39:17 Mbwenu iwe, Mwana w'omuntu, oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Gambira amahungu g'emiringo yoona n'enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ishwa oti: Muteerane, murugye embaju zoona, mwije aha bugyenyi bw'ebitambo obu ndikubatebeekanisiza, obugyenyi bukuru bw'ebitambo aha bibungo bya Israeli, murye enyama kandi munywe eshagama." 
Ezekiel39:18 Nimwija kurya enyama z'amamanzi, munywe eshagama y'abagabe b'omu nsi; murye enyama z'empaya z'entaama, ez'abaana baazo, ez'embuzi, n'ez'enimi zoona ez'ebishaju eza Bashani;" 
Ezekiel39:19 nimwija kurya ebishaju, okuhitsya obu muraigute, munywe eshagama okuhitsya obu muraasinde aha bugyenyi bw'ebitambo, obu ndikubatebeekanisiza." 
Ezekiel39:20 Kandi nimwija kwigutira aha meeza yangye embaraasi n'abarikuzigyenderaho hamwe n'amamanzi n'abarwani b'emiringo yoona; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira. 
Ezekiel39:21 Bwanyima ndyata ekitiinisa kyangye ahagati y'amahanga, amahanga goona gareebe ekifubiro eki mbahaire, ekirugire omu rubanja oru ncwire, gareebe n'omukono gwangye ogu mbabangiire." 
Ezekiel39:22 Batyo ab'enju ya Israeli baryamanya ku ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, okutandikira ahari eryo izooba n'okugumizamu." 
Ezekiel39:23 Kandi amahanga garyamanya ku ab'enju ya Israeli baatwairwe bari enkwatwa nibaturwa eby'okushiisha byabo, ahabw'okuba bakancumuraho, kyandeetera kubaihaho amaisho, n'okubahayo omu mikono y'abazigu baabo; boona baitwa rurara." 
Ezekiel39:24 Nkabatwaza nk'okutahikiirira kwabo n'ebicumuro byabo oku byabaire biri, naabaima amaisho." 
Ezekiel39:25 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Mbwenu niinyija kugarura aba Yakobo abaatwairwe bari enkwatwa, ngirire embabazi enju ya Israeli yoona ahabw'okusaasibwa eiziina ryangye eririkwera." 
Ezekiel39:26 Ku bariba batwire buhooro bataine orikubatiinisa, baryayebwa enshoni zaabo ahabw'ebicumuro byona ebi bancumwireho." 
Ezekiel39:27 Ku ndi heza kubaiha omu mahanga, naabagarura, naabataaruura omu nsi z'abazigu baabo, naayorekyera okwera kwangye omuribo omu maisho g'amahanga," 
Ezekiel39:28 obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, ahabw'okuba nkabareetera kutwarwa omu mahanga bari enkwatwa, bwanyima naabataaruura, naabagarura omu nsi yaabo ey'obuzaarwa. Tindigira n'omwe ou naatsiga omu mahanga obundi;" 
Ezekiel39:29 Kandi, ku ndishuka Omwoyo wangye aha nju ya Israeli, tindigaruka kubaima maisho bundi; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel40:1 Ku twabaire tumazire emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano omu bukwatwa, aha kutandika kw'omwaka, aha kiro kya ikumi ky'okwezi kw'okubanza, orurembo rumazire emyaka ikumi n'ena rukwatsirwe, ahari eryo izooba omukono gwa MUKAMA gukampikaho," 
Ezekiel40:2 gwantwarira omu kworekwa omu nsi ya Israeli, gwanta aha kibungo kiraingwa munonga, ekyabaire kiriho ekintu ekirikushusha orurembo kishungaine naanye." 
Ezekiel40:3 Ku yampikizeyo, reeba, hakaba hariyo omuntu orikushusha omuringa, aine omurunga gwa furakisi omu ngaro n'ekibingo ky'okugyeresa, ayemereire omu irembo." 
Ezekiel40:4 Ogwo mushaija yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, ta amaisho aha bi naaza kukworeka, obitegye amatu, kandi obiteho omutima, ahabw'okuba ekikureetsire aha n'okubikworeka; ebi oraareebe byona, obigambire enju ya Israeli." 
Ezekiel40:5 Reeba, hakaba hariho orugo orwehinguririize ekibuga kya hekalu, kandi oburaingwa bw'ekyo kibingo ky'okugyeresa ekyabaire kiri omu ngaro z'ogwo mushaija bukaba buri mikono mukaaga emiraingwa, buri mukono gwine oburaingwa bwa mukono gumwe n'ekita; atyo yaagyera omuzimba gw'orugo, gwaingana ekibingo kimwe, kandi obwemi bwarwo bwaba ekibingo kimwe." 
Ezekiel40:6 Bwanyima yaahika aha irembo eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba; ku yaatembire aha matembero gaaryo, yaagyera ekisasi kyaryo eky'aheeru, haaba ekibingo kimwe;" 
Ezekiel40:7 buri kishengye eky'aha mbaju kyaba ekibingo kimwe oburaingwa kandi ekibingo kimwe obukiika; ahagati y'ebyo bishengye haabaho omwanya gwa mikono etaano; ekisasi ky'eirembo eky'omunda haihi naryo aharikureebana n'enju, naho haaba ekibingo kimwe." 
Ezekiel40:8 Bwanyima yaagyera ekisasi eky'omunda kyaba mikono munaana. 
Ezekiel40:9 Kandi yaagyera ebiti by'eirembo, byaba mikono ebiri; ekyo kisasi ky'eirembo kikaba kishungaine n'enju." 
Ezekiel40:10 Kandi aha rubaju rw'eirembo ry'oburugwa-izooba hakaba hariho ebishengye bishatu ahari buri rubaju; byona biri orugyero rumwe, n'ebiti by'eirembo ahari buri rubaju nabyo biri orugyero rumwe." 
Ezekiel40:11 Okuruga aho yaagyera obuhangoa bw'eirembo, bwaba mikono ikimi, n'obukiika bwaryo bwaba mikono ikumi n'eshatu." 
Ezekiel40:12 Omu maisho g'ebishengye by'aha mbaju haabamu omwanya gwa mukono gumwe ahari buri rubaju, kandi ebyo bishengye by'ahari buri rubaju bikaba biri mikono mukaaga." 
Ezekiel40:13 Bwanyima yaagyera eirembo, naiha enyima y'ekishengye kimwe okuhitsya enyima y'ekindi; obukiika obwo bwaba mikono makumi abiri n'etaano, okuruga aha rwigi okuhika aha rundi." 
Ezekiel40:14 Yaagyera n'omu kisasi, haaba mikono makumi abiri; owkehinguririza ekyo kisasi ky'eirembo kyaba ekibuga." 
Ezekiel40:15 Okuruga omu maisho g'eirembo okuhika ah'orikutaahira nooza omu kisasi ky'omunda aha muheru gwakyo haaba mikono makumi ataano. 
Ezekiel40:16 Kandi ebishengye by'eirembo bikaba biine amadirisa okubyehinguririza, gafunzire omunda aharikureeba ebiti byago omu bishengye by'omunda; kandi n'ekisasi kikaba kiine amadirisa omunda okukyehinguririza; ebiti by'ago madirisa bikaba biriho emikindo." 
Ezekiel40:17 Bwanyima yantwara omu kibuga ky'enyima; reeba, hakaba hariyo ebishengye n'ekicweka ekyariirwe amabaare okwehinguririza ekibuga; omu maisho g'ekyo kicweka kyariirwe amabaare harimu ebishengye makumi ashatu." 
Ezekiel40:18 Omwanya ogwo ogwariirwe gukaba gugyenzire aha rubaju rw'amarembo, nigwingana nago omu buraingwa; ekyo nikyo kyabaire kiri ekicweka kyariire ekya ifo." 
Ezekiel40:19 Yaagaruka yaagyera naiha omu kicweka ky'omunda eky'omu maisho g'eirembo rya ifo okuhika aha rubaju rw'aheeru orw'ekibuga ky'omunda, kyaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel40:20 Bwanyima yaanyebembera, naatoora aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso, reeba hakaba hariyo eirembo eryabaire nirireebayo ery'ekibuga ky'enyima; yaagyera oburaingwa bwakyo n'obukiika bwakyo." 
Ezekiel40:21 Ebishengye byaryo eby'aha rubaju, bishatu aha rubaju rumwe, na bishatu aha rundi, ebiti byaryo, n'ekisasi kyaryo, byona bikaba biri orugyero rumwe n'eby'eirembo ery'okubanza; oburaingwa bwaryo bukaba buri mikono makumi ataano, n'obukiika bwaryo buri mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:22 Amadirisa gaaryo, ekisasi kyaryo, n'ebiti byaryo by'enkindo bikaba biri eby'orugyero rumwe n'eirembo eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba; kandi amatembero agaabaire niagarihikaho gakaba gari mushanju, n'ekisasi kyaryo kikaba kiri omunda." 
Ezekiel40:23 Ahashungaine n'eirembo ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso hakaba hariho eirembo eririkutaaha omu kibuga ky'omunda, nk'oku kiri aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba. Yaagyera okuruga aha irembo okuhika aha rindi, haaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel40:24 Bwanyima yaanyebembera yantwara nantooza aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo; reeba, n'ahari orwo rubaju hakaba hariho eirembo; yaagyera ebiti byaryo n'ekisasi kyaryo; byaba eby'orugyero rumwe n'ebindi." 
Ezekiel40:25 Omunda yaaryo n'omu kisasi kyaryo hakaba heehinguririziibwe amadirisa agarikwingana n'ag'omu gandi marembo; oburaingwa bwaryo buri mikono makumi ataano, n'obukiika bwaryo mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:26 Kandi amatembero agaabire nigarihikaho gakaba gari mushanju, n'ekisasi kyaryo kiri omunda; kandi ebiti byaryo bikaba biriho emikindo, gumwe aha rubaju rumwe, n'ogundi aha rundi." 
Ezekiel40:27 Kandi aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo obw'ekibuga eky'omunda hakaba hariho eirembo; yaagyera okuruga aha irembo okuhika aha rindi ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, haaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel40:28 Bwanyima yandyabya omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, yantaasya omuri ekyo kibuga ky'omnda, yaagyera eryo irembo, ryaba ery'orugyero rumwe n'agandi." 
Ezekiel40:29 Ebishengye by'aha mbaju zaaryo, n'ebiti byaryo, n'ekisasi kyaryo, bikaba biri eby'orugyero rumwe n'ebindi; kandi omuri eryo irembo n'omu kisasi kyaryo hakaba harimu amadirisa agarikwingana n'agandi okwehinguririza; oburaingwa bwaryo bwaba mikono makumi ataano, n'obukiika bwaryo mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:30 Kandi hakaba hariho ebisasi okwehinguririza, oburaingwa bwabyo buri mikono makumi abiri n'etaano, n'obukiika bwabyo mikono etaano." 
Ezekiel40:31 Ekisasi kyaryo kikaba nikireeba ekibuga ky'aheeru, n'amatembero agarikurihikaho gari munaaga." 
Ezekiel40:32 Yaagaruka yantaasya omu kibuga ky'omunda aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, yaagyera eirembo ry'aho, ryaba ery'orugyero rumwe n'agandi." 
Ezekiel40:33 Ebishengye byaryo eby'omu mbaju, ebiti byaryo, n'ekisasi kyaryo, byaba eby'orugyero rumwe n'ebindi; omuri eryo irembo n'omu kisasi kyaryo hakiikizemu amadirisa; oburaingwa bwaryo buri mikono makumi ataano, n'obukiika bwaryo mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ekisasi kyaryo kikaba nikireeba ekibuga ky'aheeru, ebiti byaryo biriho emikindo, gumwe aha rubaju rumwe n'ogundi aha rundi; n'amatembero agarikurihikaho gari minaana." 
Ezekiel40:35 Bwanyima yantwara aha irembo ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, yaarigyera; ryaba ery'orugyero rumwe n'agandi;" 
Ezekiel40:36 ebishengye byaryo eby'omu mbaju n'ebiti byaryo, n'ekisasi kyaryo, byaba eby'orugyero rumwe n'ebindi; rikiikiiziibwemu amadirisa; oburaingwa bwaryo buri mikono makumi ataano, n'obukiika bwaryo mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ekisasi kyaryo kikaba nikireeba ekibuga ky'aheeru; ebiti byaryo bikaba biriho emikindo, gumwe aha rubaju rumwe n'ogundi aha rundi; n'amatembero agarikurihikaho gari munaana." 
Ezekiel40:38 Hakaba hariho ekishengye, eki omuryango gwakyo gwabaire nigureeba omu kisasi ky'eirembo, omu baabaire boogyeza ekitambo ky'okwotsya;" 
Ezekiel40:39 kandi omuri ekyo kisasi ky'eirembo hakaba harimu emeeza ibiri aha rubaju rumwe n'ezindi ebiri aha rundi rubaju, ez'okwitiraho ebitambo by'okwotsya, empongano y'ekibi, n'ey'okwihaho orubanja rw'ekibi." 
Ezekiel40:40 Kandi aheeru y'ekisasi y'ah'orikutaahira nooza omu irembo ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho hakaba hariyo emeeza ibiri, n'aha rundi rubaju ezindi ibiri." 
Ezekiel40:41 Aha rubaju rw'omunda orw'eryo irembo hariho emeeza ina, n'aha rubaju rwaryo orw'aheeru ezindi ina, zoona munaana ziri ez'okwitiraho ebitambo." 
Ezekiel40:42 Hakaba hariho n'ezindi meeza ina ezibaizirwe omu mabaare, ez'okutaho ebitambo by'okwotsya, oburaingwa bwazo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka, obukiika bwazo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka, n'obwemi bwazo mukono gumwe, ezaabaire ziteebwaho eby'okwitsa ebitambo by'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Kandi omuri ekyo kisasi hakaba hateereiremu ebyoma by'okuhanikaho eby'oburaingwa bw'ekita kimwe, bikiikiize omunda. Ahari ezo meeza niho haabaire haba ah'okuta enyama z'empongano." 
Ezekiel40:44 Bwanyima yaanyiha aheeru, yantaasya omu kibuga ky'omunda, kandi reeba, omuri ekyo kibuga ky'omunda hakaba harimu ebishengye, ekimwe aha rubaju rw'eirembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso nikireeba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'ekindi aha rubaju rw'eirembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo nikireeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso." 
Ezekiel40:45 Yangira ati: Eki kishengye ekirikureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo n'eky'abanyamurwa abareeberera hekalu; 
Ezekiel40:46 n'ekishengye ekirikureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'eky'abanyamurwa abareeberera eitambiro; abo nibo beene Zadoki ab'omu ruganda rwa Leevi abarikwikirizibwa bonka kwirira haihi MUKAMA kumuheereza. 
Ezekiel40:47 Yaagyera ekyo kibuga, kyaba mikono igana oburaingwa, na mikono igana obukiika, embaju zoona oku ziri ina zaingan; kandi eitambiro rikaba riri omu maisho ga hekalu." 
Ezekiel40:48 Bwanyima yantwara aha kisasi kya hakelu, yaagyera enyomyo zaakyo zombi, ey'aha rubaju rumwe yaaba mikono etaano, n'ey'aha rubaju rundi nayo mikono etaano; obuhango bw'eirembo bwaba mikono ikumi n'ena, n'ebisiika by'omu rubaju rw'eirembo byaba mikono eshatu buri rubaju." 
Ezekiel40:49 Oburaingwa bw'ekyo kisasi bwaba mikono ikumi n'ebiri; amatembero agarikukikhikaho gari ikumi; kandi aha rubaju rw'ebiti by'eirembo hakaba hariho enyomyo emwe aha rubaju rumwe n'endi aha rundi. 
Ezekiel41:1 Bwanyima yantwara omuri hekalu, yaagyera ebiti byayo by'emiryango; ahari buri rubaju obukiika bwabyo bwaba mikono mukaaga." 
Ezekiel41:2 Obuhango bw'omuryango gwayo bwaba mikono ikumi; ebisiika by'omuryango orubaju n'orubaju byaba mikono etaano; yaagaruka yaagyera oburaingwa bwayo, bwaba mikono makumi ana oburaingwa, n'obukiika mikono makumi abiri." 
Ezekiel41:3 Banyima yaataaha omu kishengye ky'omunda, yaagyera ebiti by'omuryango gwakyo, byaba mikono ebiri; obuhango bw'omuryango bwaba mikono mukaaga, n'ebisiika byagowo orubaju n'orubaju byaba mikono mushanju." 
Ezekiel41:4 Yaagyera oburaingwa bw'kyo kishengye, bwaba mikono makumi abiri, n'obukiika bwakyo mikono makumi abiri omu maisho g'ekishengye kya rwagati. Yaagaruka yangira ati: Aha n'Omwanya ogurikwera munonga." 
Ezekiel41:5 Bwanyima yaagyera ekisiika kya hekalu, omuzimba gwakyo gwaba mikono mukaaga, n'obukiika bw'ebishengye byona ebikiikiize omu mbaju za hekalu bwaba mikono ena." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ebyo bishengye by'omu mbaju za hekalu bikaba biri kaanyina-ishatu bitungamiraine; omuri buri mushorongo harimu ebishengye makumi ashatu. Okwehinguririza ekisiika kya hekalu hakaba hariho ah'okutaahiza ebishengye by'omu mbaju omuri ekyo kisiika kuhamiramu, kwonka bitarikwoga mu kisiika kya hekalu." 
Ezekiel41:7 Ebyo bishengye by'omu mbaju byagyenda nibiba bihango, nk'oku bigyenzire nibitembekyerana okuza ahaiguru, nk'obuhango bw'okutaaha omu kisiika okwa buri mushorongo oku buri; aha rubaju rwa hekalu hakaba hariho amatembero g'okutemberaho; kandi omuntu ku yaabaire aruga omu kishengye ky'ahansi, naaza omu kya kaanyina-ishatu, araba omu kya kaanyina-ibiri." 
Ezekiel41:8 Kandi naareeba hekalu eyehinguririziibwe ekicweka ky'omusingi ekitunguukire; emisingi y'ebishengye by'omu mbaju ekaba eri ey'orugyero rw'ekibingo kimwe kya mikono mukaaga emiraingwa. 
Ezekiel41:9 Omuzimba gw'ebisiika by'aheeru eby'ebishengye ebikiikiize hekalu guri mikono etaano, kandi ekicweka ky'omusingi ekyatsigariire aho nakyo kiri mikono etaano." 
Ezekiel41:10 Okuruga aha muheru gw'ekyo kicweka ky'omusingi okuhika aha bishengye by'omu kibuga ekaba eri mikono makumi abiri okwehinguririza hekalu embaju zoona. 
Ezekiel41:11 Emiryango y'ebyo bishengye ebikiikiize hekalu ekaba neereeba ahari ekyo kicweka ky'omusingi ekyatsigariire aho, ogumwe nigureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, ogundi aha bwa-buryo; kandi obukiika bw'ekyo kicweka ky'omusingi ekyatsigariire aho embaju zoona bukaba buri mikono etaano." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ekyombeko ekyabaire nikireeba omu kibuga kya hekalu aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba kikaba kiri mukono makumi mushanju obukiika; kandi omuzimba gw'ekisiika ky'ekyo kyombeko gukaba guri mikono etaano embaju zoona n'oburaingwa bwakyo mikono makumi mwenda. 
Ezekiel41:13 Bwanyima yaagyera hekalu, oburaingwa bwayo bwaba mikono igana; ekibuga kyayo n'ekyombeko hamwe n'ebisiika byayo, oburaingwa bwabyo bwaba mikono igana;" 
Ezekiel41:14 kandi obukiika bw'omu maisho ga hekalu aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba hamwe n'ekibuga kyaho bwaba mikono igana. 
Ezekiel41:15 Bwanyima yaagyera oburaingwa bw'ekyombeko ekirikureeba omu kibuga, eky'aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba, hamwe n'ebisiika byakyo orubaju n'orubaju, bwaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel41:16 Ebisiika by'ekishengye kya hekalu ekya rwagati, n'eby'eky'omunda, n'eby'ekisasi ky'aheeru, bikaba bishekirwe embaaho; byonshatu bikaba biine amadirisa agataahire omu kisiika embaju zoona. Ahashungaine n'ekisasi ekisiika kya hekalu nakyo kikaba kishwekirwe embaaho, okuruga ahansi okuhika aha madirisa; (kandi ago madirisa gakaba gashwekire)," 
Ezekiel41:17 n'okuhika aha mwanya ogw'ahaiguru y'omuryango, kandi n'okuhika aha kishengye ky'omunda n'aheeru." 
Ezekiel41:18 Kandi ebisiika byona eby'ekishengye eky'omunda n'eby'ekya rwagati, bikaba bisharwirweho ebishushani bya baakerubi n'eby'emikindo, ahagati y'ekishushani kya kerubi n'ekindi ekishushani ky'omukindo." 
Ezekiel41:19 Buri kerubi akaba aine ahamaisho habiri, ahamaisho h'omuntu nihareeba omukindo aha rubaju rumwe, n'ahamaisho h'entare nihareeba ogundi mukindo aha rundi rubaju." 
Ezekiel41:20 Okwo nikwo byabaire bisharwirwe ahari hekalu yoona embaju zoona; okuruga ahansi okuhika ahaiguru y'omuryangohakba hasharwirweho baakerubi n'emikindo. 
Ezekiel41:21 Ebiti by'omuryango by'ekishengye ekya rwagati bikaba biine embaju ina ezirikwingaingana. 
Ezekiel41:22 Kandi omu maisho g'Omwanya ogurikwera hakaba harimu ekirikushusha eitambiro ry'embaaho, obwemi bwakyo mikono eshatu, oburaingwa bwakyo mikono ebiri, n'obukiika bwakyo mikono ebiri; enshonda zaakyo n'ekitebe kyakyo, n'embaju zaakyo, biri eby'embaaho. Yangira ati: Egi niyo meeza etairwe omu maisho ga MUKAMA." 
Ezekiel41:23 Kandi ekyo kishengye ekya rwagati n'ogwo Mwanya ogurikwera bikaba biine enyigi z'embari ibiri buri kimwe; 
Ezekiel41:24 kandi ezo mbari zikaba ziina ebishate bibiri ebirikukubwa buri emwe. 
Ezekiel41:25 Aha nyigi ez'ekishengye ekya rwagati hakaba hasharwirweho ebishushani bya baakerubi n'emikindo, nk'ebyababire bisharwirwe aha bisiika; kandi omu maisho g'ekisasi ky'aheeru hakaba hariho ekisanga ky'embaaho." 
Ezekiel41:26 Kandi aha bisiika by'aha rubaju rw'ekisaski hakaba hariho amadirisa agataahire omu kisiika hamwe n'emikindo orubaju n'orubaju. 
Ezekiel42:1 Bwanyima yantwara omu kibuga ky'omunda aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, yampitsya aha bishengye ebirikureebana n'ekibuga kya hekalu, kandi ekishungaine n'ekyombeko eky'aha rubaju rwa bumosho." 
Ezekiel42:2 Oburaingwa bw'ekyo kyombeko ky'aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumohso bukaba buri mikono igana, n'obukiika bwakyo mikono makumi ataano." 
Ezekiel42:3 Kandi hakaba hariho amabaraza ga kaanyina-ishatu gatungamiraine, gahereraine n'omwanya gwa mikono makumi abiri ogw'ekibuga ky'omunda, kandi nigareeban n'ekicweka ekyariirwe amabaare." 
Ezekiel42:4 Omu maisho g'ebyo bishengye ahagati hakaba hariho omwanya gw'okurabamu gwa mikono ikumi obukiika, na mikono igana oburaingwa; n'emiryango y'ebyo bishengye neereeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Ezekiel42:5 Ebishengye by'ahaiguru bikaba bifunzire okukira eby'ahagati n'eby'ahansi, ahabw'okuba ago mabaraza gakaba gabifundize okukira ebindi." 
Ezekiel42:6 Ahakuba bikaba biri ebya kaanyina-ishatu, kandi bitaine nyomyo nk'ez'omu kibuga ky'aheeru; n'ahabw'ekyo ebishengye by'ahaiguru bikaba biri bikye okukira eby'ahagati n'eby'ahansi." 
Ezekiel42:7 Kandi enyima y'ebyo bishengye hakaba hariyo ekisiika kiringaaniire nabyo, kandi kishungaine nabyo aha rubaju rw'ekibuga ky'aheeru, oburaingwa bwakyo mikono makumi ataano." 
Ezekiel42:8 Ahakuba oburaingwa bw'ebishengye by'omu kibuga ky'aheeru bukaba buri mikono makumi ataano, kwonka obw'ebishungaine na hekalu buri mikono igana." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ahansi y'ebyo bishengye hakaba hariho omuryango aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, ogwabaire gutaahirwamu abarikuruga omu kibuga ky'enyima," 
Ezekiel42:10 ahu orugo rw'aheeru rwabaire nirutandikira. Kandi aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, ahashingaine n'ekibuga kandi n'ekyo kyombeko, hakaba hariho ebishengye eibiine omuhanda gw'okurabamu omumaisho;" 
Ezekiel42:11 bikaba nibishushana n'eby'aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, biri eby'orugyero rumwe oburaingwa n'obukiika, kandi nibishushanisa nabyo aharikushohorerwa, emyombekyere, n'emiryango." 
Ezekiel42:12 Kandi ahansi y'ebyo bishengye by'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, hakaba hariho omuryango ogurikutaaha omu muhadna gw'ahagati gw'okurabamu; kandi ahashungaine nagwo hariho ekisiika ekirikubitaanisa." 
Ezekiel42:13 Bwanyima yangira ati: Ebyo bishengye by'aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'orwa buryo ebishungaine n'ekibuga n'ebishengye ebirikwera, omu abanyamurwa abahika MUKAMA baririira empongano ezirikwera munonga; okwo niyo bariguma nibata empongano ezirikwera munonga, empongano z'esaano, empongano y'ekibi, n'empongano y'okwihaho orubanja rw'ekibi, ahabw'okuba ogwo mwanya n'ogurikwera." 
Ezekiel42:14 Abanyamurwa ku bariguma baataaha omu Mwanya ogurikwera, tibarishohora kuza omu kibuga ky'aheeru, batabandize kujuura bijwaro ebi bajwara nibaheereza, bakabibiika, ahabw'okuba n'ebirikwera. Kandi ku bariba batakahikire mpongano z'abantu, bajware ebindi bijwaro." 
Ezekiel42:15 Ku yaaherize kugyera ekibuga kya hekalu omunda, yantwara yandabya omu irembo ry'oburugwa-izooba, yaagyera omwanya gwa hekalu embaju zoona." 
Ezekiel42:16 Yaagyeresa ekyo kibingo orubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, byaba ebibingo magana ataano;" 
Ezekiel42:17 yaahinduka yaakigyeresa orubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumohso, byaba ebibingo magana ataano." 
Ezekiel42:18 Yaahinduka yaakigyeresa orubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, byaba ebibingo magana ataano;" 
Ezekiel42:19 kandi yaahindukira orubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba, yaarukigyeresa, rwaba ebibingo magana ataano." 
Ezekiel42:20 Yaagyera embaju zaakyo ina, yaashanga kyehinguririziibwe orugo rwa mikono magana ataano oburaingwa na magana ataano obukiika, okutaanisa aharikwera n'ahatari harikwera." 
Ezekiel43:1 Bwanyima yantwara aha irembo eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba," 
Ezekiel43:2 kandi reeba, ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga wa Israeli kyareetwa oburugwa-izooba; okuhoorera kw'okwija kwe kwaba nk'okw'amaizi maingi, kandi ensi yaayakwamu ekitiinisa kye." 
Ezekiel43:3 Okworekwa oku naareebire kwaba nka kuri oku naareebire, obu yaija kucwekyereza orurembo, kandi nk'okworekwa oku naareebire aha mugyera Kebari; naagwa ahansi njuumaire." 
Ezekiel43:4 Ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA ku kyabaire nikitaaha omuri hekalu, nikireetwa omu irembo ery'oburugwa-izooba," 
Ezekiel43:5 Omwoyo yankiriza, yantaasya omu kibuga ky'omunda; kandi reeba, ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kyaijura hekalu." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ogwo mushaija, ku yaabaire akiinyemereire aha rubaju, naahurira orikugamba naanye naayema omuri hekalu;" 
Ezekiel43:7 yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, ogu nigwo mwanya gw'ekitebe kyangye ky'obukama, kandi ahu nta ebigyere byangye, ahu ndituura ahagati y'abantu ba Israeli ebiro byona. Kandi ab'enju ya Israeli n'abagabe baabo tibarigaruka kusiisisa eiziina ryangye eririkwera obwamaraaya bwabo, nari emitumbi y'abagabe baabo," 
Ezekiel43:8 n'obu kwakuba okuhikaanisa ekisasi kyabo n'ekyangye, n'enyomyo zaabo n'ezangye; ahagati yangye nabo hakabaho ekisiika kyonka. Ahabw'okuba bakasiisisa eiziina ryangye eririkwera ebihagaro byabo ebi baakozire; nikyo naabamariireho, mbainiire ekiniga." 
Ezekiel43:9 Mbwenu hati baanyihe omumaisho okuramya ebishushani kwabo n'emitumbi y'abagabe baabo, babite hare, mbone kuguma omuribo ebiro byona." 
Ezekiel43:10 Kandi iwe, Mwana w'omuntu, shoboororera ab'enju ya Israeli hekalu egi oku erikushusha n'oku egyezirwe, bakwatwe enshoni ahabw'eby'okutahikiirira byabo." 
Ezekiel43:11 Ku baraakwatwe enshoni ahabw'ebyo byona ebi baakozire, oboorekye enyombekyere ya hekalu, obushohorero bwayo n'obutaahiro bwayo n'oku eyemi kwona; obamanyise emigyenzo yaayo yoona, n'ebiragiro byayo byona; kandi obihandiikye nibakureeba, babone kurinda n'okuhitsya ebiragiro byayo byona, n'emigyenzo yaayo yoona." 
Ezekiel43:12 Eki nikyo kiragiro kya hekalu. Omwanya gwona ogw'aha mutwe gw'orushozi embaju zoona guryaba ogurikwera munonga. Reeba, ekyo nikyo kiragiro kya hekalu." 
Ezekiel43:13 Oru nirwo rugyero rw'eitambiro, nk'oku mikono yaaryo eri, (buri mukono gurimu mukono gumwe n'ekita). Ekitebe kyaryo, obwemi bwakyo buryaba mukono gumwe, obukiika bwakyo mukono gumwe, n'omugoma gwakyo gube ekita kimwe okwehinguririza." 
Ezekiel43:14 Obu nibwo buriba obwemi bw'eitambiro, okuruga ahansi aha kitebe kyaryo okuhika ah amukugiro gw'ahansi mikono ebiri, n'obukiika bwaryo mukono gumwe; kandi okuruga aha mukugiro omukye okuhika aha muhango mikono ena, n'obukiika mukono gumwe; n'amahega gaaryo mikono ena;" 
Ezekiel43:15 kandi okuruga aha mahega gaaryo habeho amahembe ana ageemereire bwemi, oburaingwa bwa buri ihembe mukono gumwe." 
Ezekiel43:16 Amahega g'eitambiro garyagira embaju ina ezirikwingaingana, oburaingwa mikono ikumi n'ebiri, n'obukiika mikono ikumi n'ebiri." 
Ezekiel43:17 Omukugiro gwaryo nagwo guryagira embaju ina ezirikwingaingana, oburaingwa bwagwo mikono ikumi n'ena, n'obukiika mikono ikumi n'ena, kandi gwehinguririzibwe omuguno, obuhango bwagwo ekicweka kya mukono, n'ekitebe kyaryo mukono gumwe okwehinguririza; kandi amatembero g'eryo itambiro garyareeba oburugwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel43:18 Kandi yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Egi niyo migyenzo y'eitambiro erikuratirwa. Aha izooba eri baririteeraho kuritambiraho ebitambo by'okwotsya n'okurimiishaho eshagama," 
Ezekiel43:19 abanyamurwa b'Abaleevi ab'omu ruzaaro rwa Zadoki, abanyirira haihi kumpeereza, oryabaha enimi kuba empongano y'ekibi; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel43:20 Kandi otware aha shagama yaayo, ogite ahari ago mahembe ana g'eitambiro n'aha nshonda ina z'omukugiro, n'aha muguno oguryehinguririize; okwo nikwo oririshemeza, okaririhiirira." 
Ezekiel43:21 Bwanyima oryatwara egyo nimi ey'empongano y'ekibi, eyokyezibwe omu mwanya gwa hekalu ogwaragiirwe, enyima y'orugo rw'ekibuga ekirikwera." 
Ezekiel43:22 Aha kiro kya kabiri oryahonga empaya y'embuzi etaine kamogo kuba empongano y'ekibi; rityo eitambiro riryashemezibwa, nk'oku barishemeize n'egyo nimi." 
Ezekiel43:23 Ku oriheza kurishemereza kimwe, oryahonga enimi etaine kamogo, n'empaya y'entaama y'omu busyo etaine kamogo," 
Ezekiel43:24 ozimurikire MUKAMA; bwanyima abanyamurwa bazimemeerereho omwonyo, bazihongyere MUKAMA, zibe ekitambo ky'okwotsya." 
Ezekiel43:25 Oryamara ebiro mushanju noohonga embuzi buri izooba kuba empongano y'ekibi, kandi bahongye enimi n'empaya y'entaama y'omu busyo etaine kamogo." 
Ezekiel43:26 Baryamara ebiro mushanju nibarihiirira eitambiro n'okuryeza; batyo barihsoroore. 
Ezekiel43:27 Kandi ku bariheza ebyo biro, okwiha aha kiro kya munaana n'okweyongyerayo, abanyamurwa bayraguma nibahongyera aha itambiro ebitambo byanyu by'okwotsya n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye; naanye ndyabaikiriza; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel44:1 Bwanyima yangarura, yampitsya aha irembo ry'Omwanya ogurikwera ery'aheeru, eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba; naashanga rikingire." 
Ezekiel44:2 Yangira ati: Eirembo eri riryaguma rikingire; tiririigurwa, kandi tihaine oririrabamu, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga wa israeli arirabiremu; nikyo ririgumira rikingire." 
Ezekiel44:3 Omunyiginya wenka niwe aririshutamamu kuriira eby'okurya omu maisho ga MUKAMA; aryaguma ataahe naaraba omu kisasi ky'eryo irembo; kandi nimwo ariguma naashohorera. 
Ezekiel44:4 Bwanyima yandabya omu irembo ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, yampitsya omu maisho ga hekalu; ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA kyaijura hekalu ye, naagwa ahansi njuumaire." 
Ezekiel44:5 MUKAMA yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, yetegyereze gye, oreebe n'amaisho gaawe, kandi ohurire n'amatu gaawe, ebi naaza kukugambira byona eby'emigyenzo ya hekalu ya MUKAMA yoona, n'ebiragiro byayo byona; kandi oyetegyereze gye abarikwikirizibwa kutaaha omuri hekalu, n'abatarikwirizibwa kutaaha omu Mwanya ogurikwera." 
Ezekiel44:6 Ogambire egyo nju engomi, enju ya Israeli, oti: Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe nju ya Israeli 'mwe, nyaabura 'mwe nimurekyere kimwe ebihagaro byanyu byona," 
Ezekiel44:7 eby'okwikiriza abanayamahanga abatashazirwe omu mutima n'omu mubiri, kuguma omu Mwanya gwangye ogurikwera nibagushiisha, mwaba nimumpongyera eby'okurya, ebishaju n'eshagama. Mwitsire endagaano yangye n'ebihangaro byanyu byona." 
Ezekiel44:8 Kandi timurinzire bintu byangye ebirikwera; kureka mutaireho abanyamahanga kuba nibo baabirindira omu Mwanya gwangye ogurikwera. 
Ezekiel44:9 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Tihariho munyaihanga otashazirwe mu mutima n'omu mubiri ow'omu banyamahanga boona ab'omu ihanga rya Israeli oriikirizibwa kutaah omu Mwanya gwangye ogurikwera. 
Ezekiel44:10 Kandi Abaleevi abaanyimwire bakahaba nibakuratira ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa, obu Israeli yaahaba, baryagiibwaho ekifubiro ky'ebibi byabo." 
Ezekiel44:11 Kwonka baryaba abaheereza omu Mwanya gwangye ogurikwera bari abakumiirizi aha marembo ga hekalu, kandi nibakoramu omurimo; baryaguma nibaita ebitambo by'okwotsya n'ebindi bitambo by'abantu b'obutoosha, kandi bagume beemerere omu maisho gaabo nibabaheereza;" 
Ezekiel44:12 ahabw'okuba abo Baleevi bakabaheerereza enju ya Israeli kucumura, nikyo naimukiize omukono nkarahira nti: Baryagiibwaho ekifubiro ky'ebibi byabo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel44:13 Tibarimpika haihi kunkorera omurimo gw'obunyamurwa, nari okugira eki bairira haihi omu bintu byangye ebirikwera n'ebindi ebirikwera munonga; kureka baryaitwa enshoni, ahabw'ebihagaro byabo ebi baakozire." 
Ezekiel44:14 N'obu kiraabe kiri kityo, ndyabataho kuba abarinzi ba hekalu, kukora obuheereza bwamwo bwona, n'ebindi byona ebishemereire kukorwamu." 
Ezekiel44:15 Kwonka abanyamurwa b'Abaalevi beene Zadoki, abaabaire bakwatsiibwe emirimo y'Omwanya gwangye ogurikwera, nibo barimpika, bakaguma nibeemerera omu maisho gangye kumpongyera ebishaju n'eshagama; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel44:16 Abo baryaguma nibataaha omu Mwanya gwangye ogurikwera, nibairira haihi emeeza yangye kumpeereza, nibakora ebi ndikubaragiira." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ku bariguma baataqaha omu marembo g'ekibuga ky'omunda, baryataahamu bajwaire ebijwaro bya kitaani, tibarijwara kintu kyona ekirimu ebyoya by'entaama, baaba nibakora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu marembo g'ekyo kibuga n'omunda yaakyo." 
Ezekiel44:18 Baryaguma bajware ebikwemba bya kitaani omu mitwe, bajware n'empare za kitaani omunda; kandi tibaryezirika kintu kyona ekirikubareetera okutuutuka." 
Ezekiel44:19 Kandi ku barishohora, baaza omu bantu omu kibuga ky'aheeru, baryajuura ebyo bijwaro, ebi bariba nibaheererezamu, babite omu bishengye ebirikwera, bajware ebindi bijwaro, ngu batakaayeza abantu n'ebyo bijwaro byabo." 
Ezekiel44:20 Tibarimwa, kandi tibarikuza ishokye, kureka baryarituubya." 
Ezekiel44:21 Tihariho munyamurwa weena orinywa viinyo, yaaba naataaha omu kibuga ky'omunda." 
Ezekiel44:22 Tibarishwera mufaakazi, nari omukazi oshenzirwe, kureka omwishiki oshugaine ow'omu ruganda rw'enju ya Israeli, nari omufaakazi owaabaire ari muka omunyamurwa." 
Ezekiel44:23 Baryaguma nibeegyesa abantu bangye omutaano gw'ebirikwera n'ebitari birikwera, baboorekye oku baakutaanisa ebishemeire n'ebitashemeire." 
Ezekiel44:24 Ku haribaho empaka, baryakora nk'abaramuzi, baramure abantu nk'oku emicwere yangye eri. Baryayorobera ebiragiro byangye n'ebi naataireho omu magyenyi gangye goona agaatairweho, beeze na sabato zangye." 
Ezekiel44:25 Tibaryesiisisa okuhika haihi omufu; kwonka omunyamurwa naikirizibwa kweshiisha ahabwa ishe, nari nyina, ahabwa mutabani we nari muhara we, n'ahabwa mwene ishe nari munyaanya otakashweirwe." 
Ezekiel44:26 Kandi ku ariheza kusiisikara, aryayebarira ebiro mushanju, bwanyima abe oshemeire." 
Ezekiel44:27 Aha izooba eri arigiiraho omu Mwanya ogurikwera omu kibuga ky'omunda kuheererezamu, aryahonga empongano ye y'ekibi; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel44:28 Tibarigira buhunguzi, niinye buhunguzi bwabo; timuribaha mugabo omuri Israeli, niinye mugabo gwabo." 
Ezekiel44:29 Baryaguma barye aha mpongano z'esaano n'aha mpongano y'ekibi, n'aha mpongano ey'okwihaho orubanja; kandi ekintu kyona ekyabiikirwe Ruhanga omuri Israeli kiryaguma kibe ekyabo." 
Ezekiel44:30 Emiganuro y'ebiribanza kwera byona eby'emiringo yoona, na buri mpongano yoona ey'omu mpongano zaanyu zoona ez'emiringo yoona biryaguma bibe eby'abanyamurwa; kandi muryaguma muhe abanyamurwa emiganuro y'ebiihuro byanyu, amaka gaanyu gabone kugumwamu emigisha." 
Ezekiel44:31 Kandi abanyamurwa tibarirya ha kintu kyona ekyefeereire, nari ekiitsirwe enyamaishwa eky'ekirikuguruka nari eky'enyamaishwa." 
Ezekiel45:1 Ku muribagana ensi kuba obuhunguzi bwanyu, muryaihiraho MUKAMA omugabo gw'ekicweka ky'ensi, kibe ekyanga ekirikwera, oburaingwa bwakyo mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano, n'obukiika bwakyo mikono obukumi bubiri; ekyo kyanga kyona oku kiingana kibe ekirikwera." 
Ezekiel45:2 Omuri ekyo kyanga ekibanja kya mikono magana ataano oburaingwa n'obukiika mikono magana ataano kiryaba obutaaho oburikwera bwehinguririzibwe akataajuure k'obukiika bwa mikono makumi ataano. 
Ezekiel45:3 Kandi omuri ekyo kyanga ekirikwera ogyeremu ekicweka kya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburanigwa, n'obukiika mikono kakumi ahu Obutaaho oburikwera buryombekwa, nigwo Omwanya gurikwera munonga." 
Ezekiel45:4 Ogwo mwanya guryaba ekicweka ky'ensi ekirikwera, kibe eky'abanyamurwa abaheereza omu Butaaho burikwera, kandi abahika MUKAMA kumuheereza; guryaba omwanya gw'okutamu Omwanya ogurikwera munonga." 
Ezekiel45:5 Ekindi kicweka kya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburaingwa, n'obukiika mikono kakumi, kiryaba eky'Abaleevi, abaheerereza omuri hekalu, kibe ekyabo eky'okwombekamu endembo z'okutuuramu." 
Ezekiel45:6 Aha rubaju rw'ekyo kicweka ekyaihirweho kuba ekyanga ekirikwera, muryahatooranira orurembo omwanya gwa mikono enkumi itaano obukiika, noburaingwa mikono obukimi n'enkumi itaano; guryaba ogw'enju ya Israeli yoona." 
Ezekiel45:7 Kandi ekicweka ky'endi eky'omugabe kiryaba aha mbaju zombi ez'ekyanga ekirikwera, n'omwanya gw'orurembo, omu mbaju z'ekyo kyanga ekirikwera, n'ez'ogwo mwanya gw'orurembo, aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba, nihainganisa oburaingwa n'eky'omugabo gw'oruganda rumwe, okuruga aha mwatano gw'ensi ogw'oburengyerwa-izooba okuhika aha gw'oburugwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel45:8 Kiryaba omugabo gwe omuri Israeli. Kandi abagabe bangye tibarigaruka kwita kubi bantu bangye, kureka baryareka enju ya Israeli etungye ensi nk'enganda zaabo oku ziri." 
Ezekiel45:9 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe banyiginya ba Israeli 'mwe, nimurekyere aho! Mwiheho omwaga n'okuhata; mukore eby'oburyo n'eby'okuhikiirira; murekyere aho kubinga abantu bangye omu bibanja byabo; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel45:10 Mugire eminzaani ehikire, eefa ehikire, n'encuro ehikire." 
Ezekiel45:11 Eefa n'encuro bibe eby'orugyero rumwe; encuro egiibwemu ekicweka kya ikumi kya homeri, na eefa nayo ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi kya homeri; homeri nayo ebi niyo yaaguma neeba eky'okurengyesa." 
Ezekiel45:12 Shekeli eryabamu geera makumi abiri; shekeli itaano zibe shekeli itaano buzima, shekeli ikumi zibe shekeli ikumi buzima, kandi miina yaanyu eingane shekeli makumi ataano." 
Ezekiel45:13 Egi niyo mpongano ei muriguma nimuhonga; ekicweka kimwe kya mukaaga kya eefa y'engano ekiihirwe omuri buri homeri; na kimwe kya mukaaga kya eefa ya sayriri omuri buri homeri," 
Ezekiel45:14 n'encuro y'amajuta eyaatairweho, kimwe kya ikumi ky'enjoga omuri buri kooru (kooru emwe erimu enjoga ikumi, nk'oku kiri omuri homeri emwe);" 
Ezekiel45:15 kandi muhongye entaama emwe omuri buri busyo bw'entaama magana abiri. Emiryango ya Israeli yoona nikwo erihonga etyo, empongano y'esaano, ebitambo by'okwotsya, n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, kugirihiirira; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel45:16 Abantu b'omu nsi boona baryaha omugabe wa Israeli egyo mpongano. 
Ezekiel45:17 Kandi guryaba omurimo gw'ogwo mugabe kureeta ebitambo by'okwotsya, empongano z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa, omu magyenyi n'ahari buri kuboneka kw'okwezi n'aha sabato, amagyenyi goona agu enju ya Israeli yaaragiirwe; niwe aritebeekanisa empongano z'ekibi, empongano z'esaano, ebitambo by'okwotsya n'empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye okurihiirira enju ya Israeli." 
Ezekiel45:18 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro kyakwo ky'okubanza, oryatwara enimi nto etaine kamogo, oshemeze Omwanya ogurikwera." 
Ezekiel45:19 Omunyamurwa aryatwara aha shagama y'empongano y'ekibi, agite aha biti by'emiryango ya hekalu, aha nshonda ina z'omukugiro gw'eitambiro, n'aha biti by'eirembo ry'ekibuga ky'omunda." 
Ezekiel45:20 Kandi oryatwaza otyo aha kiro kya mushanju eky'okwo kwezi ahabw'omuntu weena oshobize nari omushema; okwo nikwo muririhiirira hekalu. 
Ezekiel45:21 Omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro kyakwo kya ikumi na bina, muryagira obungyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, mumare ebiro mushanju nimurya omugaati ogutatumbisiibwe." 
Ezekiel45:22 Ahari ekyo kiro omugabe aryareeta enimi nto ahabwe n'ahabw'abantu b'omu nsi boona, kuba empongano y'ekibi." 
Ezekiel45:23 Kandi buri izooba omuri ebyo biro mushanju by'obugyenyi aryahongyera MUKAMA enimi mushanju n'empaya z'entaama mushanju ezitaine kamogo kuba ekitambo ky'okwotsya; kandi buri izooba ahongye empaya y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ebibi. 
Ezekiel45:24 Kandi aryatebeekanisa empongano y'esaano, eefa emwe ahabwa buri nimi, eefa emwe ahabwa buri mpaya y'entaama, na hiini emwe y'amajuta ahabwa buri eefa." 
Ezekiel45:25 Omu kwezi kwa mushanju aha kiro kyakwo kya ikumi na bitaano, aryatwaza atyo, n'ahabw'ebiro mushanju by'obugyenyi, ahongye empongano z'ekibi, ebitambo by'okwotsya, empongano z'esaano, n'amajuta." 
Ezekiel46:1 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Omu biro mukaaga ebikorerwamu emirimo, eirembo ry'ekibuga ky'omunda eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba riryaguma rikingire; kwonka riryaigurwa aha izooba rya sabato n'aha izooba ry'okuboneka kw'okwezi." 
Ezekiel46:2 Omugabe aryaguma ataahire omu kisasi ky'eirembo eky'aheeru, ayemerere aha rubaju rw'ekiti kyaryo; abanyamurwa batambe ekitambo kye ky'okwotsya, bahongye empongano ze z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, nawe aramize omu kisasi ky'eirembo; bwanyima ashohore, kwonka eirembo rirekye kukingwa okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Ezekiel46:3 Abantu b'omu nsi barayguma baramize ah'orikutaahira nooza omuri eryo irembo omu maisho ga MUKAMA ahari buri sabato n'ahari buri kuboneka kw'okwezi. 
Ezekiel46:4 Ekitambo ky'okwotsya, eki omugabe ariguma naahongyera MUKAMA ahari sabato kiryaba abaana b'entaama mukaaga abataine kamogo, n'empaya y'entaama etaine kamogo;" 
Ezekiel46:5 kandi empongano y'esaano erikuhongwa n'egyo mpaya y'entaama eryaba eefa emwe, n'esaano ey'okuhongwa n'abaana b'entaama ebe nyingi nk'oku arikubaasa, hamwe na hiini y'amajuta ahabwa buri eefa." 
Ezekiel46:6 Aha izooba ry'okuboneka kw'okwezi aryaguma ahongye enimi nto etaine kamogo, n'abaana b'entaama mukaaga, n'empaya y'entaama etaine kamogo;" 
Ezekiel46:7 kandi ahongye empongano y'esaano eefa emwe ahabwa buri nimi, eefa emwe ahabwa buri mpaya y'entaama, n'esaano nyingi ezi arikubaasa ahabw'abaana b'entaama, hamwe na hiini emwe y'amajuta ahabwa buri eefa y'esaano." 
Ezekiel46:8 Omugabe ku ariba naataaha omuri hekalu, aryaguma arabe omu kisasi ky'eirembo; kandi n'omu kushohora, abe nimwo yaaraba." 
Ezekiel46:9 Kwonka abantu b'obutoosha ab'omu nsi ku bariba nibaija omu maisho ga MUKAMA omu magyenyi agaatairweho, oritaahira omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho aizire kuramya, aryashohohorera omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo; kandi oritaahira omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, aryashohorera omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; tihariho n'omwe oriikirizibwa kugaruka omu irembo eri yaatahiramu, kureka omuntu weena aryashohora agumizemu." 
Ezekiel46:10 Ku baritaahamu, omugabe aryataahamu nabo; kandi ku barishohora, nawe aryashohora." 
Ezekiel46:11 Omu biro by'amagyenyi n'omu biro bikuru ebyatairweho, empongano eryaguma ebi eefa emwe ahabwa buri nimi nto, na eefa emwe ahabwa buri mpaya y'entaama, n'ahabw'abaana b'entaama omuntu ahe esaano nyingi nk'oku arikubaasa, hamwe na hiini y'amajuta ahabwa buri eefa y'esaano." 
Ezekiel46:12 Kandi omugabe ku ariteekateeka kuhongyera MUKAMA empongano n'omutima gwekundiire, yaaba kitambo ky'okwotsya nari empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, aryaigurirwa eirembo eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba, ahongye ekitambo kye ky'okwotsya n'empongano ze z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, nk'oku ashangwa atwaza aha izooba rya sabato. Bwanyima aryashohora; ku ariheza kushohora, eriembo rikingwe." 
Ezekiel46:13 Buri izooba omugabe aryahongyera MUKAMA omwana gw'entaama oguhikize omwaka gumwe, ogutaine kamogo, kuba ekitambo ky'okwotsya; aryaguma aguhongye buri kasheeshe." 
Ezekiel46:14 Kandi aryahonga n'empongano y'esaano buri kasheeshe kimwe kya mukaaga kya eefa emwe, na kimwe kya kashatu kya hiini y'amajuta g'okworobya egyo saano, kuba empongano y'esaano ehongyeirwe MUKAMA; ekyo nikyo kiragiro ky'ekitambo ky'okwotsya ekiriguma nikitambwa." 
Ezekiel46:15 Kandi okwo nikwo bariteebeekanisa omwana gw'entaama n'empongano y'esaano n'amajuta kuba ekitambo ky'okwotsya ekriguma nikitambwa. 
Ezekiel46:16 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Omugabe ku ariiha ekiconco omu buhunguzi bwe, yaakiha omwe aha batabani, kiryaba eky'abatabani; omu biragiro by'obuhunguzi n'ekyabo." 
Ezekiel46:17 Kwonka ku ariiha ekiconco omu buhunguzi bwe, yaakiha omwe aha baheereza be, kiryaguma kiri ekye okuhitsya omu mwaka gw'obusingye, bwanyima kigarukire omugabe; abatabani bonka nibo bariikirizibwa kugama n'ekiconco ekirugire omu buhunguzi bwe." 
Ezekiel46:18 Kandi omugabe taritwara ha buhunguzi bw'abantu ahabw'okubabinga omu bintu byabo, kureka aryaraga abatabani ebirugire omu bi atungire byonka, harekye kugira n'omwe omu bantu bangye owaayakwa ebi atungire." 
Ezekiel46:19 Bwanyima yandabya aharikutaahirwa aha rubaju rw'eirembo, yampitsya aha mushorongo gw'ebishengye ebirikwera eby'abanyamurwa eby'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; naareebayo omwanya oguri aha muheru gwabyo aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel46:20 Yangira ati: Hariya niho abanyamurwa bariguma nibateekyera empongano y'okwihaho orubanja, n'empongano y'ekibi; kandi niho bariguma nibateeka empongano y'esaano, ngu barekye kubishohoza omu kibuga ky'aheeru, bakabyezesa abantu." 
Ezekiel46:21 Bwanyima yantwara omu kibuga ky'aheeru, yampitsya aha nshonda ina zaakyo; ahari buri nshonda hakaba hariho ekibuga;" 
Ezekiel46:22 omuri ezo nshonda ina z'ekibuga hakaba hariho obubuga bukye, buri kamwe mikono makumi ana oburaingwa, n'obukiika mikono makumi ashatu, bwona buna nibwingaingana." 
Ezekiel46:23 Omunda y'obwo bubuga bwona, hakaba hombekirwemu omushorongo okwehinguririza ogurimu emyanya y'okuteekyeramu embaju zoona." 
Ezekiel46:24 Yangira ati: Ago nigo mateekyero agu abarikuheereza omuri hekalu bariteekyeramu ebitambo by'abantu. 
Ezekiel47:1 Bwanyima yangarura aha muryango gwa hekalu, naareeba amaizi nigaruga ahansi y'ekisasi kyayo, nigatoora oburugwa-izooba, (ahabw'okuba hekalu niyo yaabaire neereeba); kandi ago maizi gakaba nigaruga okuzimu, nigashuumira aha rubaju rwa buryo iwa hekalu, nigaraba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bw'eitambiro." 
Ezekiel47:2 Atyo yanshohoreza omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, yanziguurutsya, yampitsya aha iremb ry'aheeru eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba; naashanga ago maizi nigashohorera aha rubaju rwayo rwa buryo." 
Ezekiel47:3 Ogwo muntu yaatoora aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, naagyera aine omu ngaro omugoye gw'okugyeresa, yaagyera mikono rukumi, yaanyambutsya omuri ago maizi, naashanga nigahika aha bugombamburi." 
Ezekiel47:4 Yaagaruka yaagyera mikono rukumi, yaanyambutsya, naashanga nigahika omu maju. Yaagaruka yaagyera mikono rukumi, aho naashanga nigakwata omunda." 
Ezekiel47:5 Yaagaruka yaagyera mikono rukumi; aho gwaba omugyera ogu ntarikubaasa kwambuka; ahabw'okuba maizi gakaba gaijwire, gari ag'okuziha, omugyera ogutarikwambukwa n'amaguru." 
Ezekiel47:6 Yangira ati: Mwana w'omuntu, ekyo waakireeba? Bwanyima yangarurayo, yandabya aha nkungu y'omugyera;" 
Ezekiel47:7 ku naabaire ningarukayo naareeba ebiti bingi aha mbaju zombi z'omugyera. 
Ezekiel47:8 Yangira ati: Amaizi aga nigahimintika nigatoora oburugwa-izooba, nigashuuma omuri Araba; ku garaahikye omu g'enyanja agatarikugyenda, ago maizi g'enyanja nigaija kuba marungi." 
Ezekiel47:9 Ei ogwo mugyera gurihika yoona, ebihuriire byona biryagira amagara; kandi haryabamu eby'enyanja bingi munonga, ahabw'okuba amaizi ago nigaza omu nyanja, ngu ago maizi g'enyanja gabe marungi; n'ahabw'ekyo ei ogwo mugyera gurihika yoona, buri kintu kiryagira amagara." 
Ezekiel47:10 Abajubi baryayemerera aha rubaju rw'enyanja; okuruga Eni-geedi okuhika Enegulaimu haryabaho okutega obutimba; haryababamu eby'enyanja by'emiringo mingi munonga, nk'eby'omu Nyanja empango." 
Ezekiel47:11 Kwonka amaizi g'omu bisharara byayo n'ag'omu myanya yaayo yorutenga tigariba marungi; garyatsigwaho kwihwamu omwonyo. 
Ezekiel47:12 Kandi aha nkungu z'aha mbaju zombi z'ogwo mugyera haryamera ebiti by'emiringo yoona eby'ebijuma ebirikuriibwa. Amababi gaabyo tigarihotoka, n'ebijuma byabyo tibirihunduura, kureka ebyo biti biryaguma nibyana buri kwezi; ahabw'okuba amaizi gaabyo nigaruga omu Mwanya ogurikwera. Ebijuma byabyo biryaba eby'okurya, n'amababi gaabyo gabe ag'okutamba." 
Ezekiel47:13 Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Egi niyo myatano ei muryatanisisa ensi nimugibaganisiza enganda ikumi na ibiri za Israeli kuba obuhunguzi bwazo. Yosefu aryagira emigabo ebiri. 
Ezekiel47:14 Muryagibagana omu bwinganisa, ahabw'okuba nkarahira kugiha baashwenkuriimwe; kandi egyo nsi eryaba obuhunguzi bwanyu." 
Ezekiel47:15 Ogu nigwo guriba omwatano gw'ensi. Aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho guryaruga aha Nyanja empango, gurabe Heselooni okuhika ah'orikutaahira nooza Hamasi, guhikye Zedadi," 
Ezekiel47:16 Berosa, Siburaimu eri aha mwatano ogurikutaanisa Damasiko na Hamasi, n'okuhika Hazeri-hatikooni aha mwatano gwa Hauraani." 
Ezekiel47:17 Kandi omwatano guryaruga aha nyanja, guhikye Hazarenooni eri aha mwatano gwa Damasiko ogw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, gwatane n'ogwa Hamasi aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. Ogwo nigwo guriba omwatano ogw'aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Ezekiel47:18 Aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba omwatano guryaruga Hazarenooni eri ahagati ya Hauraani na Damasiko, guryende aha rubaju rwa Yorudani ahagati ya Gileadi n'ensi ya Israeli, guhikye aha nyanja y'oburugwa-izooba, gugumizemu guhikye Tamari. Ogwo nigwo mwatano gw'oburugwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel47:19 Aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo guryaruga Tamari, guhikye aha maizi ga Meribati-kadeshi, gurugyeyo gurabe aha rubaju rw'akagyera ka Misri, guhikye aha Nyanja empango. Ogwo nigwo mwatano gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Ezekiel47:20 Aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba Enyanja empango niyo eriba omwatano, okuhika ahashungaine n'ah'orikutaahira nooza Hamasi. Orwo nirwo ruriba orubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel47:21 Okwo nikwo muribaganisa egyo nsi, nk'oku enganda za Israeli ziri." 
Ezekiel47:22 Muryagibagana, ebe obuhunguzi bwanyu n'obw'abanyamahanga abatwire naimwe, bakabazaariramu; ahariimwe baryaba nk'enzaarwa za Israeli; baryaheebwa naimwe obuhunguzi omu nganda za Israeli." 
Ezekiel47:23 Oruganda rwona oru omunyaihanga ariba atwiremu, mube nimwo mwamuha obuhunguzi; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel48:1 Aga nigo maziina g'enganda. Okutandikira aha mwatano gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, okuruga aha Nyanja empango, okuraba Heselooni, okuhika ah'orikutaahira nooza Hamasi, n'okugumizamu okuhika Hazarenooni eri aha mwatano gwa Damasiko ahashingaine na Hamasi, okuruga aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, guryaba omugabo gwa Daani." 
Ezekiel48:2 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Daani, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, guryaba omugabo gwa Ashera." 
Ezekiel48:3 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Ashera, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba guryaba omugabo gwa Nafutaali." 
Ezekiel48:4 Aheereraine n'ekyanga kya Nafutaali, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba guryaba omugabo gwa Manaase." 
Ezekiel48:5 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Manaase, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, guryaba omugabo gwa Efuraimu." 
Ezekiel48:6 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Efuraimu, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba guryaba omugabo gwa Reubeeni." 
Ezekiel48:7 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Reubeeni, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, guryaba omugabo gwa Yuda." 
Ezekiel48:8 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Yuda, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, guryaba omugabo ogu murishoroora, mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano obukiika, kandi oburaingwa bwagwo bwingane n'omugabo gw'oruganda rumwe, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, gwine Omwanya ogurikwera ahagati yaagwo." 
Ezekiel48:9 Ekicweka eki muriihiraho MUKAMA kiryaba mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburaingwa, n'obukiika mikono obukumi bubiri." 
Ezekiel48:10 Ekyo kicweka ekirikwera kiryabaganisibwa omu bicweka ebi-abanyamurwa baryatunga omugabo gw'ekicweka kya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, mikono kakumi aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba, mikono kakumi aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, na mikono oukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-rwa-buryo, kiine Omwanya ogurikwera gwa MUKAMA ahagati." 
Ezekiel48:11 Ekyo kiryaba eky'abanyamurwa abashoroirwe, beene Zadoki, abaarinzire ebi naabakwatsize, abatarahabire, obu Abaisraeli baahaba, nk'oku Abaleevi baahabire." 
Ezekiel48:12 Guryaba omugabo gwabo ogu bacumiirwe ogwihirwe omuri ekyo kicweka ky'enki ekirikwera, ekiheereraine n'ekicweka ky'Abaleevi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Ahaheereraine n'ekicweka ky'abanyamurwa, Abaleevi baryaheebwa omugabo gwa mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburaingwa, n'obukiika mikono kakumi. Oburaingwa bw'ekyo kicweka kyona buryaba mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano n'obukiika mikono obukumi bubiri." 
Ezekiel48:14 Ekyo kicweka ky'ensi ekiriihwaho tibarikitunda n'obu kwakuba okuhingisa ekicweka kyakyo kyona n'ekindi; kandi tikiriba ky'abandi bantu; ahabw'okuba n'ekyereziibwe MUKAMA.
