Ezekiel48:15 Kandi ekicweka ekiritsigaraho kya mikono enkumi itaano obukiika n'oburaingwa mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano, kiryaba eky'abantu b'obutoosha okwombekamu orurembo n'amaka n'eky'omwanya gw'akataajuure. Ahagati yaakyo haryabaho orurembo." 
Ezekiel48:16 Kandi ezi nizo ngyero zaarwo; aha rubaju rw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso ruryaba mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano; orw'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano; orw'oburugwa-izooba mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano; n'orw'oburengyerwa-izooba narwo mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano. 
Ezekiel48:17 Kandi orurembo ruryagira ogwo mwanya gw'akataajuure, aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumohso mikono magana abiri na makumi ataano, aha rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo mikono magana abiri na makumi ataano, aha rw'oburugwa-izooba mikono magana abiri na amkumi ataano, naha buryengyerwa-izooba naho mikono magana abiri na makumi ataano." 
Ezekiel48:18 Ekicweka ekiritsigaraho, ekiheereraine n'ekicweka ky'omugabo ogurikwera, kiryaba mikono kakumi aha rubaju rw'orurembo orw'oburugwa-izooba, kandi mikono kakumi aha rubaju rwarwo orw'oburengyerwa-izooba; hoona haheererane n'ekyo kicweka ekirikwera. Kandi emyaka yaaho eryaguma ebe eby'okurya by'abakozi b'omu rurembo." 
Ezekiel48:19 Abakozi b'omu rurembo, abarikuruga omu nganda zoona eza Israeli, nibo bariguma nibahahinga." 
Ezekiel48:20 N'ahabw'ekyo ekicweka kyona, eki muriihaho, kiryaba ekya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano embaju zaakyo zoona ina, nikyo kicweka ky'omugabo ogurikwera yhamwe n'omwanya gwona ogw'orurembo." 
Ezekiel48:21 Kandi ekicweka ekiritsigara aha mbaju zombi ez'ekicweka ky'omugabo ogurikwera n'omwanya gw'orurembo kiryaba eky'omugabe. Okuruga ahari ogwo mwanya gw'omugabo ogurikwera gwa mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano, okuhika aha mwatano gw'oburugwa-izooba, kandi okutoora oburengyerwa-izooba okuruga ahari ogwo mwanya gw'omugabo ogurikwera gwa mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano okuhika aha mwatano gw'oburengyerwa-izooba, ahaheereraine n'emigabo y'enganda, haryaba ah'omugabe. Kandi ogwo mugabo ogurikwera ogurimi Omwanya ogurikwera gwa hekalu ahagati," 
Ezekiel48:22 hamwe n'omwanya gw'orurembo, guryaba ahagati y'ekynaga ky'omugabe. Ekyo kyanga kirayaba ahagati y'omugabo gwa Yuda n'ogwa Benyamiini." 
Ezekiel48:23 Kandi eby'ezindi nganda, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, guryaba omugabo gwa Benyamiini." 
Ezekiel48:24 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Benyamiini okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba guryaba omugabo gwa Simeoni. 
Ezekiel48:25 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Simeoni, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, guryaba omugabo gwa Isakaari." 
Ezekiel48:26 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Isakaari, okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, guryaba ekyanga kya Zebuluuni." 
Ezekiel48:27 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Zebuluuni, okuruga aha burugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba, guryaba omugabo gwa Gaadi." 
Ezekiel48:28 Ahaheereraine n'ekyanga kya Gaadi aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, omwatano guryaruga Tamari, guhikye aha maizi ga Meribati-kadeshi, gugumizemu gurabe aha rubaju rw'akagyera ka Misri, guhikye aha Nyanga empango." 
Ezekiel48:29 Egyo niyo nsi ei muribagana omu nganda za Israeli kuba obuhunguzi, kandi egyo niyo migabo yaazo buri rumwe; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Ezekiel48:30 Kandi aga nigo gariba amarembo g'orurembo; aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho orwa mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano 
Ezekiel48:31 haryabaho amarembo ashatu, eirembo rya Reubeeni, erya Yuda n'erya Leevi, ago marembo geetererwa amaziina g'enganda za Israeli." 
Ezekiel48:32 Aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, orwa mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano, amarembo ashatu, erya Yosefu, erya Benyamiini, n'erya Daani;" 
Ezekiel48:33 aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, orwa mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano, erya Simeoni, erya Isakaari n'erya Zebuluuni;" 
Ezekiel48:34 n'aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba, orwa mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano, narwo amarembo ashatu, erya Gaadi, erya Asheri n'erya Nafutaali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Aheehinguririize orurembo hoona haryaba mikono kakumi n'enkumi munaana. Kandi okwiha obwo orwo rurembo ruryayetwa Yehova-shama, amakuru ngu MUKAMA niyo ari." 
Daniel1:1 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda, Nebukadeneeza omugabe wa Babulooni akateera Yerusaalemu, yaagigota." 
Daniel1:2 Mukama yaahayo Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Yuda omu mikono ye, hamwe n'ebintu bimwe eby'omu nju ya Ruhanga; Nebukadeneeza yaabitwara Shinaari, yaabita omu ibiikiro ry'omuri hekalu ya ruhanga we." 
Daniel1:3 Omugabe yaaragiira Ashipenazi omukuru w'abakonwa be kureeta bamwe aha batsigazi b'omu Baisraeli, ab'omu ruganda rw'abagabe n'orw'abakungu," 
Daniel1:4 abatsigazi abataine kamogo, abarungi, abaine obwengye omu by'emyoga byona, abaine okumanya kwingi, abarikwetegyereza omu by'okwega, kandi abarikubaasa kuheereza omu kikaari ky'omugabe, ngu abeegyese obwengye bw'Abakaludaaya n'orurimi rwabo." 
Daniel1:5 Atyo omugabe yaabateeraho omugabo gwa buri izooba gw'eby'okurya ebi yaabaire aryaho, na viinyo ei yaabaire anywaho, kumara emyaka eshatu nibariisibwa gye, ngu aha muheru gwayo babone kwemerera omu maisho g'omugabe." 
Daniel1:6 Omuri abo hakaba harimu Danieli, Hanania, Mishaeli na Azaria ab'omu ruganda rwa Yuda." 
Daniel1:7 Kandi ogwo mukuru w'abakonwa yaabakubya agandi maziina; Danieli yaamweta Beliteeshaza, Hanania yaamweta Seduraaka, Mishaeli yaamweta Mesaaki, na Azaria yaamweta Abedeneego." 
Daniel1:8 Kwonka Danieli yaamariirira omu mitima gwe okuteeshiisha n'eby'okurya by'omugabe, n'obu yaakuba viinyo ei yaabaire anywa; nikyo yaayeshengyerereize omukuru w'abakonwa ngu amwikirize, arekye kweshiisha." 
Daniel1:9 Kandi Ruhanga yaaha Danieli okugirirwa embabazi n'esaasi omu maisho g'ogwo mukuru w'abakonwa. 
Daniel1:10 Omukuru w'abakonwa yaagira Danieli ati: Nintiina mukama wangye omugabe, owaabateereireho eby'okurya n'eby'okunywa, atakaasahanga muhundamire okukira abatsigazi abu murikwingana nabo, mukantemesaho omutwe." 
Daniel1:11 Bwanyima Danieli yaashaba omugabuzi, owaabaire atairweho omukuru w'abakonwa kureeberera Danieli ogwo Hanania, Mishaeli na Azaria, ati:" 
Daniel1:12 Ninkweshengyereza otugyeze, tumare ebiro ikumi niturya ebihimba, kandi ninywa amaizi." 
Daniel1:13 Bwanyima otureebe, otushushanise n'abandi batsigazi abarikurya aha by'okurya by'omugabe; haza oku oraareebe, obe nikwo waatwaza abairu baawe." 
Daniel1:14 Atyo yaabahurira, yaikiriza kumara ebiro ikumi naabagyeza, ahabw'ekyo eki baashaba." 
Daniel1:15 Aha muheru gw'ebyo biro ikumi yaashanga nibareebeka gye, kandi bagomokire okukira abatsigazi boona, abaabaire nibarya aha by'okurya by'omugabe." 
Daniel1:16 N'ahabw'ekyo ogwo mugabuzi yaabaiha ahari ebyo by'okurya ebi baabaire nibaragiirwa kurya, na viinyo ei baabaire nibaragiirwa kunywa, yaaguma naabaha ebihimba." 
Daniel1:17 Bwanyima abo batsigazi bana Ruhanga yaabaha okumanya n'okuba abahangu omuri byona ebi barikwega n'omu bwengye; kandi Danieli we yaagira okwetegyereza omu by'okworekwa byona n'omu by'okushoboorora ebirooto. 
Daniel1:18 Obunaku, obu omugabe Nebukadeneeza yaaragiire kubareeteramu, ku bwahikire, omukuru w'abakonwa yaabareeta kubamumurikira." 
Daniel1:19 Ku baahikire aho, omugabe yaagaaniira nabo; kwonka omu bandi boona tiharabonekiremu owaabaire ari nka Danieli, Hanania, Mishaeli na Azaria; nikyo baabeereire ab'okuheereza omugabe." 
Daniel1:20 Kandi omu bigambo byona eby'obwengye n'eby'okwetegyereza, akashanga nibakira abafumu n'abarogi boona, abaabaire bari omu bugabe bwe bwona emirundi ikumi." 
Daniel1:21 Bwanyima Danieli yaagum aho okuhitsya omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwa Kuuro. 
Daniel2:1 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri Nebukadeneeza aherize kuza aha ngoma, akaroota ebirooto, byamureetera kwemereza omutima, yaabura oturo." 
Daniel2:2 Atyo omugabe yaaragiira ku baamwetera abafumu, abahi b'engisha, abarogi n'Abakaludaaya, ngu barootorore ebi arootsire. Batyo baija, baayemerera omu maisho g'omugabe." 
Daniel2:3 Yaabagira ati: Ndootsire ekirooto; ahabw'okwenda kukimanya kyandeetera kwemereza omutim. 
Daniel2:4 Batyo Abakaludaaya baagira omugabe bati: Karamaare, Nyakusinga! Gambira abairu baawe ekyo kirooto, tubone kukikushobororera." 
Daniel2:5 Omugabe yaagarukamu Abakaludaaya ati: Eki ngamba tikihinduka; ku muraabe mutakindootororeire, mukanshobororera amakuru gaakyo, nimwija kutemagurwa, n'amaka gaanyu gahindurwe orubungo." 
Daniel2:6 Kwonka ku mraakindootororere n'amakuru gaakyo, niinyija kubaha ebiconco, n'ebihembo kandi n'ekitiinisa kingi. Mbwenu mpaho, nimukinshobororere n'amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel2:7 Baamugarukamu obwa kabiri bati: Nyakusinga naagambire abairu be ekyo kirooto, naitwe nitwija kukimushobororera." 
Daniel2:8 Omugabe yaabagarukamu ati: Nimmanyira kimwe ku murikwenda kumara omwanya gwa busha, ahakuba nimumanya ngu eki naagamba nikwo kiri;" 
Daniel2:9 ku muraabe mutandootororeire eki kirooto, hariho ekigambo kimwe kyonka eki ndikwija kubakora. Mugiire omu naama kumbeiha n'okugambira ebitahikire omu maisho gangye, okuhitsya obu ebintu biraahindukye. Mbwenu nimungambire eki ndootsire, mbone kumanya ku murikubaasa n'okunshobororera amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel2:10 Abakaludaaya baagarukamu omugabe bati: Tihariho muntu n'omwe omu nsi owaakubaasa kugambira omugabe ekyo kigambo; ahabw'okuba tihariho mugabe, n'obu yaakuba mukuru kandi ow'amaani ata, orabuurize omufumu weena, omurogi weena, nari Omukaludaaya weena ekigambo nk'ekyo." 
Daniel2:11 Eki omugabe arikubuuza kigumire, tihariho orikubaasa kukishobororera omugabe kureka baaruhanga, abatatuura mu bantu." 
Daniel2:12 Ekyo kyareetera omugabe kuguubwa kubi n'okugira ekiniga kingi; atyo yaaragiira kucwekyereza abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni boona. 
Daniel2:13 N'ahabw'ekyo ekiragiro kyashohozibwa kwita abanyabwengye boona, baasherura Danieli na bagyenzi be kubaita." 
Daniel2:14 Bwanyima Arioki omukuru w'abarinzi b'omugabe, owaagiire kwita abanyabwengye b'omuri Babuklooni, ku yaahikire Danieli, Danieli yaamugarukisamu obwengye n'okwerinda," 
Daniel2:15 naagira ati: Ahabw'enki omugabe ashohoize ekiragiro ekirikushaarira kiti? Atyo Arioki yaakishobororera Danieli. 
Daniel2:16 Ahonaaho Danieli yaaza ow'omugabe, yaamushaba kumuha obunaku, obu araizireho kumushobororera amakuru g'ekyo kirooto." 
Daniel2:17 Bwanyima Danieli yaataaha omu nju ye, yaabimanyisa bagyenzi be Hanania, Mishaeli na Azaria," 
Daniel2:18 yaabagambira kushaba Ruhanga ow'omu iguru kubagirira embabazi, akabashuuruurira ekyo kigambo, ngu we na bagyenzi be barekye kucwekyerezibwa n'abandi banyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni." 
Daniel2:19 Ahonaaho ekyo kigambo kyashuuruurirwa Danieli nyekiro omu kworekwa. Danieli nikwo kusiima Ruhanga ow'omu iguru," 
Daniel2:20 naagira ati Eiziina rya Ruhanga rihimbisibwe ebiro byona, Ahabw'okuba obwengye n'obushoboorozi n'ebye." 
Daniel2:21 Niwe ahindura obunaku n'emyaka; Niwe aihaho, abagabe, akataho abandi; Aha abanyabwengye obwengye, N'abarikwetegyereza abaha okumanya;" 
Daniel2:22 Ashuuruura ebya hare ebitarikumanywa; Amanya ebiri omu mwirima, Kandi n'omushana gutuura nawe." 
Daniel2:23 Ai Ruhanga wa baatatenkuru, Ninkusiima, kandi ninkuhimbisa, Ahabw'okuba wampa obwengye n'amaani, Kandi hati wanshobororera ebi twakushaba; Ahakuba waatumanyisa eki omugabe arikufa." 
Daniel2:24 N'ahabw'ekyo Danieli yaaza owa Arioki, ou omugabe yaabaire aragiire kucwekyereza abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni, yaamugira ati: Otacwekyereza abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni; kureka ontwara ow'omugabe, mmushobororere amakuru g'ekirooto." 
Daniel2:25 Atyo Arioki yaarahuka, yaatwara Danieli aha mugabe, yaamugira ati: Ndeebire omushaija w'omu Bayuda abaanyagirwe, orikubaasa kushobororera omugabe ekirooto kye." 
Daniel2:26 Omugabe yaabuuza Danieli orikwetwa Beliteeshaza, ati: Iwe, noobaasa kungambira eki ndootsire n'amakuru gaakyo?" 
Daniel2:27 Danieli yaagarukamu omugabe ati: Omu banyabwengye, nari abarogi, nari abafumu, n'obu haakuba omu barikuragura eby'enyonyoozi, tiharimu n'omwe orikubaasa kushobororera omugabe ekitarikumanywa eki arikubuuza;" 
Daniel2:28 kureka hariho Ruhanga omu iguru, oshuuruura ebitarikumanywa, kandi niwe amanyiise omugabe Nebukadeneeza ebiribaho omu biro ebiriija. Ekirooto kyawe n'ebi oyorekirwe obyami aha kitanda kyawe nibyo ebi." 
Daniel2:29 Nyakusinga, ku obaire obyami aha kitanda kyawe, waizirwa ebiteekateeko by'ebiribaho omu biro ebiriija; Oshuuruura ebitarikumanywa niwe akumanyiise ebiribaho." 
Daniel2:30 Kandi nyowe ahabwangye timbishuuruuriirwe ahabw'okuba omunyabwengye okukira abandi boona, kureka ngu omugabe amanyisibwe amakuru gaabyo, kandi amanye ebiteekateeko by'omu mutima gwe." 
Daniel2:31 Nyakusinga, ku ogiire kugira oti, waareeba ekishushani kihango. Ekyo kishushani rutaaba ekirikumurinkana kyarumbaara omu maisho gaawe, kandi okureebeka kwakyo kubaire nikutiinisa." 
Daniel2:32 Omutwe gw'ekyo kishushani gubaire guri ogw'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, ekifuba kyakyo n'emikono yaakyo biri eby'efeeza, enda yaakyo n'ebibero byakyo biri eby'emiringa," 
Daniel2:33 amaguru gaakyo gari ag'ekyoma, kandi ebigyere byakyo bibaire biri ekyoma n'ebumba." 
Daniel2:34 Ku obaire nookikyetegyereza, haatimbirayo eibaare, eritahingwirwe muntu, ryateera ebigyere by'ekyo kishushani eby'ekyoma n'eibumba, ryabyatagura;" 
Daniel2:35 ahonaaho ekyoma, eibumba, emiringa, efeeza n'ezaabu byayatagurikira kimwe, byahinduka nk'omweziga omuyaga gwabituntumura, waashusha oti haaba hataine kiriho. Kwonka eryo ibaare, eryateera ekyo kishushani, ryahinduka orushozi ruhango, rwamara ensi yoona." 
Daniel2:36 Ekyo nikyo kirooto; mbwenu twaza kushobororera omugabe amakuru gaakyo. 
Daniel2:37 Nyakusinga, omugabe w'abagabe, ou Ruhanga w'omu iguru yaahaire obugabe, obushoboorozi, amaani n'ekitiinisa," 
Daniel2:38 kandi akakuha abaana b'abantu, enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa n'amahungu g'omu mwanya, akakugira omutegyeki waabyo byona, ahu bituura hoona, mbwenu niiwe ogwo mutwe gw'ezaabu." 
Daniel2:39 Ku orirugaho, haryaimuka obundi bugabe orikukirwa obwawe; bwanyima kahurateho obundi bugabe bwa kashatu obw'omuringa, butegyekye ensi yoona." 
Daniel2:40 Kandi haryabaho obugabe bwa kana, obugumire nk'ekyoma, ahabw'okuba ekyoma kyatagura ebintu byona, kibicwa obusaasingo; nk'oku ekyoma kyatagura, nikwo n'obwo bugabe buryatagura obwo bwona, bukabucwa obusaasingo." 
Daniel2:41 Kandi nk'oku oreebire ebigyere n'enkumi zaabyo biri eibumba ry'omubumbi n'ekyoma, nikwo obwo bugabe buryebaganisamu; kwonka omuribwo haryabamu okuguma kw'ekyoma, nk'oku oreebire ekyoma kijwangizemu eibumba." 
Daniel2:42 Kandi nk'oku enkumu z'ebigyere zibaire ziri ekyoma kandi eibumba, nikwo n'obwo bugabe buriba; ekicweka kyabwo kiryaba ekigumire, n'ekindi kibe ekirikwetwa busha." 
Daniel2:43 Kandi nk'oku oreebire ekyoma kijwangire n'eibumba, nikwo barishwerana, bakajwanga, kwonka tibariguma hamwe, nk'oku ekyoma kitajwanga na ibumba." 
Daniel2:44 Kandi omu busingye bw'abo bagabe Ruhanga w'omu iguru aryataho obundi bugabe, obutaricwekyerezibwa ebiro byona, kandi obutegyeki bwabwo tiburihungurwa rindi ihanga; kureka buryayatagura obwo bugabe bona, bubumareho, kandi bwo buryagumaho," 
Daniel2:45 nk'oku oreebire eibaare ryatimbira omu rushozi, ritahingwirwe muntu, rikaacwanyagura ekyoma, emiringa, eibumba, efeeza n'ezaabu. Ruhanga omukuru ashuuruuriire omguabe ebiribaho bwanyima. Ekyo kirooto n'eky'amazima, n'amakuru gaakyo tigarikubanganisibwa." 
Daniel2:46 Ahonaaho omugabe Nebukadeneeza yaajuumara omu maisho ga Danieli, yaamuramya, yaaragiira ku bamutambira ebitambo, bakamwoterera obubaane." 
Daniel2:47 Yaagira Danieli ati: Buzimazima Ruhanga waanyu niwe Ruhanga Nyamuhanga, Mukama w'abagabe, kandi niwe ashuuruura ebitarikumanywa; ahabw'okuba obaasize kushuuruura eki ekitarikumanywa." 
Daniel2:48 Bwanyima omugabe yaaha Danieli ekitiinisa kingi n'ebiconco bingi bihango, yaamugira omutegyeki w'eishaza omureeberezi mukuru w'abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni boona." 
Daniel2:49 Kandi Danieli yaashaba omugabe, omugabe yaataho Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego kureeberera eishaza rya Babulooni; kwonka Danieli we yaaguma omu kikaari ky'omugabe." 
Daniel3:1 Omugabe Nebukadeneeza akakora ekishushani ky'ezaabu, oburaingwa bwakyo mikono makumi mukaaga, n'obuhango bwakyo mikono mukaaga. Yaakyemereza omu ruhita rwa Duura omu ishaza rya Babulooni." 
Daniel3:2 Bwanyima omugabe Nebukadeneeza yaatuma kuteeranira hamwe ab'amashaza, abareeberezi, abakuru b'amahe, abahi b'obwengye, ababiiki, abahi b'ebiragiro, abaramuzi, n'abakungu boona ab'omu mashaza ngu baije kushoroora ekishushani eki omugabe Nebukadeneeza yaayemereize." 
Daniel3:3 Batyo ab'amashaza, abareeberezi, abakuru b'amahe, abahi b'obwengye, ababiiki, abahi b'ebiragiro, abaramuzi n'abakungu boona ab'omu mashaza, baija, baateeranira hamwe kushoroora ekishushani eki omugabe Nebukadeneeza yaayemereize." 
Daniel3:4 Omurangi yaaranga n'eiraka rihango, naagira ati: Imwe abantu b'amahanga, n'enganda, n'ab'endimi ezitari zimwe, nimuragiirwa ngu," 
Daniel3:5 ku muraahurire amaraka g'enzamba, esheegu, endingiri, amakondere, enanga, obunyamurera n'emiringo yoona ey'ebirikugamba, mujuumare ahansi, muramye ekishushani ky'ezaabu eki omugabe Nebukadeneeza ayemereize;" 
Daniel3:6 kandi omuntu weena oraayangye kujuumara ahansi kukiramaya, naija kunagwa ahonaaho omu kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma." 
Daniel3:7 N'ahabw'ekyo abantu boona ku bahuriire amaraka g'enzamba, esheegu, endingiri, amakondere, enanga, obunyamurera n'emiringo yoona ey'ebirikugamba, abantu boona ab'amahanga, n'enganda n'ab'endimi ezitari zimwe, baajuumara ahansi, baaramya ekyo kishushani ky'ezaabu, eki omugabe Nebukadeneeza yaayemereize." 
Daniel3:8 Omuri ako kaanya Abakaludaaya bamwe baija, baarega Abayudaaya," 
Daniel3:9 nibagira omugabe Nebukadeneeza bati: Karamaare, Nyakusinga!" 
Daniel3:10 Nyakusinga omugabe, otaireho ekiragiro, ngu omuntu weena oraahurire amaraka g'enzamba, esheegu, endigiri, amakondere, enanga, obunyamurera, n'emiringo yoona ey'ebirikugamba ajuumare ahansi, aramye ekishushani ky'ezaabu;" 
Daniel3:11 kandi ngu oraayangye kujuumara ahansi kukiramya, anagwe omu kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma." 
Daniel3:12 Mbwenu hariho Abayudaaya bamwe, abu waataireho kureeberera eishaza rya Babulooni, Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego. Nyakusinga, abo bashaija tibarikukwetaho; tibarikuheereza baaruhanga baawe, kandi bangire kuramya ekishushani ky'ezaabu, eki oyemereize." 
Daniel3:13 Ahonaaho Nebukadeneeza yaagira ekiniga kingi, yaaragiira ku bareeta Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego. Batyo baabareeta omu maisho g'omugabe." 
Daniel3:14 Nebukadeneeza yaababuuza ati: Iwe Seduraaka, na Mesaaki na Abedeneego, n'eky'amazima, mwangire kuheereza baaruhanga bangye n'okuramya ekishushani ky'ezaabu, eki nyemereize?" 
Daniel3:15 Mbwenu ku muraahurire amaraka g'enzamba, esheegu, endingiri, amakondere, enanga, obunyamurera, n'miringo yoona ey'ebirikugamba, mwaikiriza kujuumara ahansi kuramya ekishushani eki nyemereize, obwo biri byaba gye; kwonka ku muraayangye kuramya, ahonaaho nimwija kunagwa omu kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma. Mbwenu ni ruhanga ki oraabaihe omu mikono yangye?" 
Daniel3:16 Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego baagarukamu omugabe bati: Nyakusinga Nebukadeneeza, tihaine kurikutugyema kukugarukamu aha kigambo ekyo." 
Daniel3:17 Ku kiraabe kityo, Ruhanga waitu, ou tuheereza, naabaasa kutwiha omu kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma; kandi naija kutwiha omu mikono yaawe, Nyakusinga Omugabe." 
Daniel3:18 Kandi n'obu kuraabe kitabaaire kityo, Nyakusinga, okumanyire kimwe ku tutarikwija kuheereza baaruhanga baawe, n'obu kwakuba okuramya ekishushani ky'ezaabu eki oyemereize." 
Daniel3:19 Okuruga aho Nebukadeneeza yaagira ekiniga kingi, aha maisho ge haahinduriza, yaateera Seduraaka, Mesaaki, na Abedeneego ekitsyori; yaaragiira okukoomeera omuriro ngu gubone kwaka n'amaani okukira oku gutakabaga emirundi mushanju." 
Daniel3:20 Bwanyima yaatoorana abashaija b'amaani omu ngabo ze, yaabaragiira kuboha Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego, n'okubanaga omu kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma." 
Daniel3:21 Batyo baaboha abo bashaija bajwaire empare ndaingwa n'ekooti n'enkofiira n'ebindi bijwaro, ebi baabaire bajwaire, baabanaga omu kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma." 
Daniel3:22 Kandi ahabw'ekiragiro ky'omugabe kuba eky'amaani, n'omuriro kubugumira kimwe, endimi z'omuriro zaita abo bashaija, abaakiriize Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego." 
Daniel3:23 Batyo abo bashaija bonshatu, Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego baagwa omu kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma babohirwe." 
Daniel3:24 Bwanyima omugabe Nebukadeneeza yaatangaara, yaimuka n'obwira, yaabuuza abahi b'obwengye be ati: Hari abashaija abu twanaga omu muriro babohirwe baaba batari bashatu? Baamugarukamu bati: Nikwo, Nyakusinga." 
Daniel3:25 Yaabagira ati: Mbwenu nindeeba abashaija bana batabohirwe, nibagyendagyenda ahagati omu muriro, bataine ku babaire; kandi emishusire y'owa kana neeshusha ey'omwana wa baaruhanga." 
Daniel3:26 Nebukadeneeza yairira aha muryango gw'ekikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma, yaagira ati: Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego, imwe abairu ba Ruhanga orikukira boona, nimushohore, mwije aha. Batyo Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego baaruga omu muriro." 
Daniel3:27 Ab'amashaza, abakuru b'amahe, n'abahi b'obwengye b'omugabe baateeranira hamwe, baareeba abo bashaija, baashanga omuriro gutaine ki gubaitsize, eishokye ry'aha mitwe yaabo ritababukire, ebijwaro byabo bitaine ku bibaire, n'ekibabo ky'omuriro kitarikubanuukaho." 
Daniel3:28 Bwanyima Nebukadeneeza yaagira ati: Ruhanga wa Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego asiimwe; niwe yaayohereza maraika we, akajuna abairu be abaamwesiga, bakahindura busha ekiragiro ky'omugabe, bakooga amagara gaabo okukira okuheereza ruhanga ondiijo otari Ruhanga waabo buzima." 
Daniel3:29 Nikyo ndikuteeraho ekiragiro ngu, abantu boona b'omu mahanga goona n'enganda zoona ez'endimi ezitari zimwe, abarirogota ahari Ruhanga wa Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego, batemagurwe, n'amaka gaabo gasheenywe; ahabw'okuba tihariho ruhanga ondiijo orikubaasa kujuna ebi bigyene." 
Daniel3:30 Okuruga aho omugabe yaakuza Seduraaka, Mesaaki na Abedeneego omu ishaza rya Babulooni." 
Daniel4:1 Imwe amahanga goona, n'enganda zoona ez'endimi ezitari zimwe, abatwire omu nsi yoona, nyowe, omugabe Nebukadeneeza, naabahandiikira. Obusingye bukanye omuriimwe!" 
Daniel4:2 Kyanshemeza kworeka obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza ebi Ruhanga orikukira boona ankoreire. 
Daniel4:3 Obumanyiso bwe ka ni bwingi, N'eby'okutangaaza bye ka ni bikuru! Obukama bwe n'obukama obutarihwaho, N'obutegyeki bwe bugumaho, nk'oku obusingye bugyenda nibwihaihana." 
Daniel4:4 Nyowe, Nebukadeneeza, nkaba ngaramisiriize omu nju yangye, eby'omu kikaari kyangye byona ibigyenda gye." 
Daniel4:5 Ekiro kimwe naaroota ekirooto ekyantiiniise; ku naabaire mbayami aha kitanda kyangye, ebiteekateeko n'ebi naayorekirwe omu mutwe gangye bayndeetera kwemereza omutima." 
Daniel4:6 Nikyo naaragiriire ku bandeetera abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni boona, ngu banshobororere ebi naarootsire," 
Daniel4:7 Batyo abafumu n'abhi b'engisha n'Abakaludaaya, n'abarikuragura eby'enyonyoozi, baija, naabagambira ekyo kirooto, kwonka baaremwa kukinshobororera." 
Daniel4:8 Bwanyima Danieli yaija omu maisho gangye, (Danieli ogwo niwe owaayetsirwe Beliteeshaza, nibamweterera ruhanga wnagye, kandi owaabaire aine omwoyo gwa baaruhanga abarikwera) naamugambira ekyo kirooto, ningira nti:" 
Daniel4:9 Iwe Beliteeshaza, omukuru w'abafumu, nimmanya ngu oine omwoyo gwa baaruhanga abarikwera, kandi tihaine kitarikumanywa eki oremwa kushoboorora; mbwenu nshobororera ekirooto eki ndootsire, mmanye amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel4:10 Ebi nyorekirwe ndi aha kitanda kyangye nibyo ebi. Ku ngiire kugira nti, naareeba ekiti kirumbaire ahagati y'ensi, oburaingwa bwakyo burengyesereize." 
Daniel4:11 Ekyo kiti kyakura, kyahama, omutwe gwakyo gwahika omu iguru, kyareebwa ab'aha muheru gw'ensi yoona;" 
Daniel4:12 amababi gaakyo gaabengyeya, n'ebijuma byakyo byaba bingi; kandi kyabamu eby'okurya ebirikuhaazya abantu boona; enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa zaabona ekicuucu ahansi yaakyo, amahungu g'omu mwanya gaatuura omu mataagi gaakyo, n'ebiine omubiri byona kyaba nikyo kyabitunga." 
Daniel4:13 Ebindi ebi ndeebire ndi aha kitanda kyangye nibyo ebi; ndeebire orikwera owaagizirwe omurinzi naashuuma naaruga omu iguru. 
Daniel4:14 Yaaragiira n'eiraka rihango naagira ati: Tema ekyo kiti, okikonkoboreho amataagi, okiiheho amababi, onaganagye ebijuma byakyo, enyamaishwa zihungye ahansi yaakyo, n'amahungu garugye omu mataagi gaakyo;" 
Daniel4:15 kwonka ekitsintsi okirekye kiri aha mizi yaakyo omu itaka omu bunyaatsi bw'omuroba obw'omu ishwa kibohirwe ebyoma n'emiringa, kigume nikitondwaho orume orurikuruga omu iguru, kandi kirye n'enyamaishwa obunyaatsi bw'omu ishwa;" 
Daniel4:16 omutima gwakyo gurekye kuguma guri ogw'omuntu, kureka kiheebwe omutima gw'enyamaishwa; kigume kityo okumara omwanya nk'ogw'emyaka mushanju." 
Daniel4:17 Ekyo kifubiro kiragiirwe abarinzi, kyateebwaho ekigambo ky'abarikwera, ngu abakiriho abahuriire bamanye ngu Orikukira boona niwe ategyeka obugabe bw'abantu, kandi akabugabira ou arikwenda, akabwemekamu ab'ahansi okukira abandi boona." 
Daniel4:18 Ekyo kirooto, nyowe omugabe Nebukadeneeza, niinye nkirootsire. Mbwenu iwe Beliteeshaza, okunshobororere, ahabw'okuba abanyabwengye boona tibarikubaasa kukinshobororera; kwonka iwe nookibaasa, ahabw'okuba omwoyo gwa baaruhanga abarikwera guri omuriiwe." 
Daniel4:19 Bwanyima Danieli owaayetsirwe Beliteeshaza yaamara omwanya muhango ashobeirwe, ayemereize omutima ahabw'ebiteekateeko bye. Omugabe yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Iwe Beliteeshaza, ekyo kirooto n'amakuru gaakyo birekye kukwemereza omutima. Beliteeshaza yaamugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, ekyo kirooto nikikabe aha barikukwanga, n'amakuru gaakyo nigakabe aha bazigu baawe!" 
Daniel4:20 Mbwenu ekyo kiti ki oreebire nikikura, kikahama, omutwe gwakyo gukahika omu iguru, kikareebwa ab'aha muheru gw'ensi yoona," 
Daniel4:21 n'amababi gaakyo gakabengyeya, kikagira ebijuma bingi, kikabamu eby'okurya ebirikuhaazya abantu boona, kandi enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa zikabona ekicuucu ahansi yaakyo, amahungu g'omu mwanya gakatuura omu mataagi gaakyo," 
Daniel4:22 Nyakusinga, ekyo kiti niiwe. Okakura, waahama, obukuru bwawe bwayeyongyera bwahika omu iguru, n'obutegyeki bwawe bwahika aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Daniel4:23 Kandi, nk'oku omugabe areebire orikwera ogizirwe omurinzi naashuuma naaruga omu iguru, akagira ati: Tema ekyo kiti, okimareho; kwonka ekitsintsi n'emizi yaakyo obibohese ebyoma n'emiringa, obirekye omu itaka omu bunyaatsi bw'omuroba obw'omu ishwa, kigume nikitondwaho orume orurikuruga omu iguru, kandi kirye n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa, kigume kityo okumara omwanya nk'ogw'emyaka mushanju;" 
Daniel4:24 mbwenu Nyakusinga, amakuru gaakyo nigo aga. Omanye ku kiri ekiragiro kya Rukira-boona, ekyahika ahari mukama wangye omguabe." 
Daniel4:25 Noija kubingwa omu bantu, otaahe n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa, orye obunyaatsi nk'ente, otondweho orume orurikuruga omu iguru, omare omwanya nk'ogw'emyaka mushanju ori otyo, okuhitsya obu orimanya ngu Rukira-boona niwe ategyeka obugabe bw'abantu, akabuha ou arikwenda weena." 
Daniel4:26 Kandi nk'oku baragiire kureka ekitsintsi n'emizi y'ekyo kiti, nikwo obugabe bwawe burikwija kukurindirwa, okuhitsya obu orimanya ngu Eiguru niryo ritegyeka." 
Daniel4:27 N'ahabw'ekyo, Nyakusinga, ninkushaba oikirize obwengye obu ndikukuha; omareho ebibi byawe ahabw'okukora eby'okuhikiirira, kandi ebicumuro byawe obiihiseho okugirira abarikuhatwa embabazi, obundi okuba gye kwawe kukaabaasa kwongyerwaho." 
Daniel4:28 Bwanyima ebyo byona byahika aha mugabe. Nebukadeneeza. 
Daniel4:29 Ku haahingwire ameezi ikumi n'abiri, eizooba rimwe omugabe akaba naagyendagyenda aha mutwe gw'enju, nyarufu y'obugabe bwa Babulooni." 
Daniel4:30 Yaagira ati: Babulooni egi yoona t'ei naayombekire n'amaani g'obushoboorozi bwangye kandi n'ekitiinisa ky'obukuru bwangye? 
Daniel4:31 Ebyo bigambo ku byabaire bitakarugire mu kanwa k'omugabe, eiraka ryaruga omu iguru nirigira riti: Iwe mugabe 'we Nebukadeneeza, niiwe orikugambirwa. Obugabe bwawe bwakwihwaho," 
Daniel4:32 noija kubingwa omu bantu, otuure n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa; noija kurya obunyaatsi nk'ente; kandi omare omwanya nk'ogw'emyaka mushanju ori otyo, okuhitsya obu orimanya ku Rukira-boona niwe ategyeka obugabe bw'abantu, akabuha ou arikwenda weena." 
Daniel4:33 Ahonaaho ekigambo ekyo kyahikiirira ahari Nebukadeneeza, yaabingwa omu bantu, yaaguma naarya obunyaatsi nk'ente, omubiri gwe nigutondwaho orume orurikuruga omu iguru, okuhitsya obu eishokye rye ryakuzire rikaba nk'amooya g'eishamba, n'ebyara bye bikashokoza n'eby'enyonyi." 
Daniel4:34 Bwanyima y'ebyo biro, nyowe Nebukadeneeza nkaimutsya amaisho gangye ahainguru, naagarukwamu akengye, naasiima Rukira-boona, naahimbisa Otahwaho ebiro byona, naamuha ekitiinisa; Ahabw'okuba obutegyeki bwe n'obutegyeki obutahwaho, Kandi obukama bwe bugumaho, nk'oku obusingye bugyenda nibwihaihana." 
Daniel4:35 Abatuura omu nsi boona nibabarwa nka busha, Akora omu mahe g'omu iguru n'omu batuura omu nsi Nk'oku arikwenda, Kandi tihariho obaasa kumuteera ha mukono, Nari okugira ati: Eki nookora ki?" 
Daniel4:36 Omu bunaku nibwo bumwe naagarukwamu akengye, kandi obukuru bwangye n'okwizihirwa kwangye byangarukaho kureetera obugabe bwangye ekitiinisa. Abahi b'obwengye bangye n'abakungu bangye bankubuukira, naahamibwa omu bugabe bwangye, n'obukuru bwangye bwayongyerwaho." 
Daniel4:37 Mbwenu nyowe Nebukadeneeza ninsiima Omukama w'eiguru, nimmusingiza, kandi nimmuha ekitiinisa; ahakuba emirimo ye ehikire, emihanda ye n'ey'amazima, kandi abo abatuura n'amaryo naabaasa kubagarura ahansi." 
Daniel5:1 Omugabe Belishaza akateekyera abakungu be rukumi obugyenyi bwingi munonga, yaanywera viinyo omu maisho g'abo bakungu rukumi." 
Daniel5:2 Belishaza, ku yaashomire ati ahari viinyo, yaaragiira kumureetera ebintu by'ezaabu n'efeeza, ebi Nebukadeneeza ishe yaanyagire omuri hekalu ya Yerusaalemu, ngu we n'abakungu be, abakazi be n'ebinyanshunju bye babinywaise." 
Daniel5:3 Batyo baamureetera ebyo bintu by'ezaabu n'efeeza, ebyaihirwe omuri hekalu, enju ya Ruhanga, omuri Yerusaalemu; omugabe, abakungu be, abakazi be n'ebinyanshunju bye baabinywaisa;" 
Daniel5:4 baanywa viinyo, baahimbisa baaruhanga baabo b'ezaabu, b'efeeza, b'emiringa, b'ebyoma, b'ebiti, kandi n'ab'amabaare." 
Daniel5:5 Ahonaaho enkumu z'engaro y'omuntu zaareebeka, zaahandiika aha kisiika kya nyaruju y'omugabe aharikureebana n'ekikondo ky'etabaaza; omugabe yaareeba egyo ngaro neehandiika." 
Daniel5:6 Ku yaagireebire, yaahinduriza ahamaisho, yaayemereza omutima ahabw'ebiteekateeko; amanyaanya gaamunyuukuka, eseiso z'amaju zaakomangana." 
Daniel5:7 Omugabe yaataka n'eiraka rihango, naagira ati: Nimundeetere abafumu n'Abakaludaaya n'abarikuragura eby'enyonyoozi. Abo banyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni ku baizire, omugabe yaabagira ati: Weena oraashome ekyo kihandiiko, akakinshobororera, naija kujwekwa omwenda gwa bujwa, n'omukuufu gw'ezaabu omu bitsya, kandi abe omutegyeki wa kashatu omu bugabe." 
Daniel5:8 Batyo abo banyabwengye b'omugabe baatahamu, kwonka baaremwa kushoma ekyo kihandiiko, n'obu kwakuba okukimushobororera." 
Daniel5:9 Omugabe Belishaza yaayemereza munonga omutima, yaahinduriza ahamaisho, n'abakungu be baashoberwa." 
Daniel5:10 Nyin'omugabe, ahabw'okuhurira ebigambo by'omugabe n'abakungu be, yaataaha omu nju y'obugyenyi, yaagira ati: Karamaare, Nyakusinga! Reka kwemereza omutima ahabw'ebi orikuteekateeka, n'obu kwakuba okuhinduriza ahamaisho." 
Daniel5:11 Reeba, omu bugabe bwawe harimu omushaija oine omwoyo gwa baaruhanga abarikwera. Nangwa n'omu busingye bwa sho, okuhweza okwetegyereza n'obwengye nk'obwa baaruhanga bikaba bimureebekamu, kandi sho, omugabe Nebukadeneeza, akamugira omukuru w'abafumu, abahi b'eobwengye, Abakaludaaya n'abarikuragura eby'enyonyoozi;" 
Daniel5:12 ahabw'okuba ogwo mushaija Danieli, ou omugabe yaayetsire Beliteeshaza, akareebwamu omwoyo murungi n'okwetegyereza, akaba abaasa kurootorora ebirooto, n'okwita ebishaakuzo, n'okushoboorora ebiremire. Mbwenu nibamukwetere, naija kushoboorora n'eki." 
Daniel5:13 Bwanyima baareeta Danieli omu maisho g'omugabe. Omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Niiwe Danieli ow'omu Bayuda abaanyagirwe, ou tata omugabe yaihire omuri Yuda?" 
Daniel5:14 Mpuriire nibakugambaho ku oine omwoyo gwa baaruhanga abarikwera, kandi ngu okwaka, okwetegyereza n'obwengye ebirikukira eby'abandi nibikureebekamu." 
Daniel5:15 Baanyetera abanyabwengye n'abafumu kushoma eki kihandiiko, n'okunshobororera amakuru gaakyo, kwonka tibaakibaasa." 
Daniel5:16 Mbenu mpuriire ngu iwe noobaasa kumanyisa amakuru g'ebintu n'okushoboorora ebiremire. Hati ku oraabe noobaasa kushoma eki kihandiiko, n'okunshobororera amakuru gaakyo, noija kujwekwa omwenda gwa bujwa, n'omukuufu gw'ezaabu omu bitysa, kandi obe omutegyeki wa kashatu omu bugabe." 
Daniel5:17 Danieli yaagarukiramu omu maisho g'omugabe ati: Ebiconco byawe guma nabyo, n'ebihembo byawe obihe abandi; kwonka nyowe naaza kushomera omugabe eki kihandiiko, kandi mmushobororere n'amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel5:18 Nyakusinga, Ruhanga orikukira boona akaha sho Nebukadeneeza obugabe, okurangaanwa, ekitiinisa n'obukuru;" 
Daniel5:19 abantu b'amahanga goona, n'enganda z'endimi ezitari zimwe, bakaba bamutiina, batetema omu maisho ge ahabw'obukuru obu Ruhanga yaamuhaire. Akaba aita ou arikwenda kwita, akiza ou arikwenda kukiza, atunguura ou arikwenda kutunguura, agarura ahansi ou arikwenda kugaruraho." 
Daniel5:20 Kwonka ku yaayetungwire, yaagangaaza omutima gwe, yaakora eby'amaryo, yaihwa aha kitebe ky'obugabe, n'ekitiinisa kye kyamwihwaho." 
Daniel5:21 Yaabingwa omu bantu, omutima gwe gwahinduka nk'ogw'enyamaishwa, yaatuura n'enturegye, yaarya obunyaatsi nk'ente, n'omubiri gwe gwaguma nigutondwaho orume orurikuruga omu iguru, okuhitsya obu yaamanyire ngu Ruhanga orikukira boona niwe ategyeka obugabe bw'abantu, kandi akabwemekamu ou arikwenda." 
Daniel5:22 Kandi naiwe omutabani Belishaza tocureize mutima gwawe, n'obu oraabe omanyire ebyo byona," 
Daniel5:23 kureka oyetungwire, waagomera Mukama w'eiguru, baakureetera ebintu by'omu nju ye, iwe, abakungu baawe, abakazi baawe, n'ebinyanshunju byawe, mwabinywaisa viinyo, mwahimbisa baaruhanga b'efeeza, b'ezaabu, b'emiringa, b'ebyoma, b'ebiti, n'ab'amabaare abatarikureeba, abatarikuhurira, n'obu kwakuba okumanya; haza Ruhanga, ou omwitsyo gwawe guba omu mukono gwe, kandi orikutegyeka orugyendo rw'amagara gaawe rwona, tiwaamuha kitiinisa." 
Daniel5:24 Nikyo ayoherereize egyo ngaro, ekahandiika eki kihandiiko;" 
Daniel5:25 kandi ebihandiikirwe nibyo ebi-MENE, MENE, TEKEELI, PARASIINI." 
Daniel5:26 Kandi oku nikwo birikushoboororwa. MENE, Ruhanga abazire ebiro by'obugabe bwawe, yaabugarukiza aho;" 
Daniel5:27 TEKEELI, opimirwe aha minzaani, waashangwa otahikire;" 
Daniel5:28 PERESI, obugabe bwawe bubaganisiibwemu, bwaheebwa Abameedi n'Abaperesi." 
Daniel5:29 Ahonaaho Belishaza yaaragiira ku bajweka Danieli omwenda gwa bujwa n'omukuufu gw'ezaabu omu bitysa, kandi baamuranga ku arikwija kuba omutegyeki wa kashatu omu bugabe." 
Daniel5:30 Kwonka ekyo kiro Belishaza omugabe w'Abakaludaaya yaitwa. 
Daniel5:31 Bwanyima Dario Omumeedi yaaheebwa obugabe, aine emyaka makumi mukaaga n'ebiri." 
Daniel6:1 Dario akasiima kucwa obugabe bwe omu bicweka igana na makumi abiri, n'okubitamu ab'amashaza, ngu babone kubuga obugabe bwe bwona;" 
Daniel6:2 kandi yaataho abakuru bashatu b'okubareeberera; omwe aharibo akaba ari Danieli; abo nibo ab'amashaza baabaire bahikizaho eby'omugabe, ngu arekye kufeerwa." 
Daniel6:3 Bwanyima Danieli ogwo yaayoga ahari abo bakuru bagyenzi be n'abamashaza boona, ahabw'okuba akaba aine omwoyo murungi; nangwa n'omgabe akaba naayenda kumukwatsa obugabe bwona." 
Daniel6:4 N'ahabw'ekyo abakuru n'abamashaza baasherura eki baraiheho kukwatsa Danieli orubanja omu bigambo by'obugabe; kwonka baabura ahu baraihe kumukwatsa orubaja, nari okumureebaho ekicumuro kyona, ahabw'okuba kaba ari omwesigwa, atarikureebwamu kishobyo, n'obu kyakuba ekicumuro." 
Daniel6:5 Abo bashaija baagira ati: Titwine ki turaiheho kukwatsa Danieli orubanja, kureka tumuturukye omu biragiro bya Ruhanga we." 
Daniel6:6 Bwanyima abo bakuru n'abamashaza baija aha mugabe n'omutima gumwe, baamugira bati: Karamaare, Nyakusinga Omugabe Dario!" 
Daniel6:7 Abakuru b'omu bugabe bwona, abareeberezi, abamashaza, abahi b'obwengye n'abategyeki baikirizana ngu omugabe ateho ekiragiro kihamire, ekirikugira kiti: Omu biro makumi ashatu omuntu oraashabe ruahga weena, nari omuntu weena otariiwe, anagwe omu kiina ky'entare." 
Daniel6:8 Mbwenu, Nyakusinga, hamya ekyo kiragiro, okiteho omukono, kirekye kuhindurwa, nk'oku ebiragiro by'Abameedi n'Abaperesi bitahindurwa." 
Daniel6:9 Atyo omugabe Dario yaata omukono aha kihandiiko ky'ekyo kiragiro. 
Daniel6:10 Danieli, ku yaamanyire ngu ekiragiro kyateebwaho omukono, yaataaha omu nju ye; (kandi amadirisa g'omu kishengye kye ky'ahaiguru gakaba gaigwire nigareeba Yerusaalemu) yaaguma naatsimba amaju kashatu buri izooba omu maisho ga Ruhanga we, naashaba kandi naasiima, nk'oku yaabaire atwaza." 
Daniel6:11 Eizooba rimwe abo bashaija baija n'omutima gumwe, baashanga Danieli naashaba kandi naayeshengyereza omu maisho ga Ruhanga we." 
Daniel6:12 Bwanyima baaza omu maisho g'omugabe, baagamba aha by'ekiragiro kye, nibabagira bati: Nyakusinga, hari totaire omukono aha kiragiro ekirikugira kiti: Omu biro makumi ashatu omuntu oraashabe ruhanga weena nari omuntu weena otariiwe, anagwe omu kiina ky'entare? Omugabe yaagarukamu ati: Ekyo kiragiro nikwo kiri, n'ekiragiro kihamire, nk'oku ebiragiro by'Abameedi n'Abaperesi bitahindurwa." 
Daniel6:13 Baamugarukamu bati: Eryo ihano Danieli ow'omu Bayuda abaanyagirwe tarikukwetaho, Nyakusinga n'obu kwakuba okweta aha kiragiro eki otaireho omukono; kureka naashaba kashatu buri izooba." 
Daniel6:14 Omugabe ku yaahuriire ebigambo ebyo, yaashaasha munonga, yaata omutima ahari Danieli kumujuna; yaarabanamu okurenzya eizooba naasherura oburyo bw'okumukiza." 
Daniel6:15 Abo bashaija baagaruka baateeranira ow'omugabe, baamugira bati: Nyakusinga, noomanya ku guba omucwe gw'Abameedi n'Abaperesi, ku ekiragiro nari ekitairweho eki omugabe ahamya kitabaasa kuhindurwa." 
Daniel6:16 Atyo omugabe yaaragiira, baareeta Danieli, baamunaga omu kiina ky'entare. Omugabe yaagira Danieli ati: Nangwa bambe Ruhanga waawwe, ou oheereza obutoosha, takujuna!" 
Daniel6:17 Bwanyima baareeta eibaare, baarita aha munwa gw'ekiina, omugabe yaarihamisa akamanyiso ke n'akamanyiso k'abakungu be, ngu omu bigambo bya Danieli hatagira ekyahindurwaho na kimwe." 
Daniel6:18 Okuruga aho omugabe yaagaruka omu kikaari kye, yaayeraazakwo, tibaamuteerera nanga, n'oturo twamuguruka." 
Daniel6:19 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, omugabe yaimuka, yaagyenda naayehuuta, yaaza aha kiina ky'entare." 
Daniel6:20 Ku yaahikire ahari ekyo kiina ki Danieli yaabaire arimu, yaayeta n'eiraka ry'obusaasi naagira ati: Iwe Danieli, omuheereza wa Ruhanga ohuriire, Ruhanga waawe ou oheereza obutoosha, abaasize kukujuna entare?" 
Daniel6:21 Danieli yaagarukamu omugabe ati: Karamaare, Nyakusinga!" 
Daniel6:22 Ruhanga wangye atumire maraika we, yaigara eminwa y'entare, tiziine ku zingizire, ahabw'okuba mbaire ntaine kamogo omu maisho ge, kandi ntaine ki ncumwire omu maisho gaawe, Nyakusinga." 
Daniel6:23 Omugabe yaashemererwa munonga, yaaragiira ku baiha Danieli omu kiina. Batyo baamwihamu, baashanga ataine ku abaire kwona, ahabw'okuba akeesiga Ruhanga we." 
Daniel6:24 Bwanyima omugabe yaaragiira, baareeta abo bashaija abaregire Danieli, hamwe n'abaana baabo n'abakazi baabo, baabanaga omuri ekyo kiina ky'entare; entare zaabashamira omu mwanya, zaahendagura amagufa gaabo goona batakahikire hansi omu kiina." 
Daniel6:25 Bwanyima omugabe Dario yaahandiikira abantu b'amahanga goona n'ab'enganda z'endimi ezitari zimwe, abatwire omu nsi yoona, naagira ati: Obusingye bukanye omuriimwe!" 
Daniel6:26 Naataho ekiragiro nti: Abantu b'omu bugabe bwangye bwona bagume bateteme omu maisho ga Ruhanga wa Danieli, bamutiine, Ahakuba niwe Ruhanga ohuriire Ogumaho ebiro byona; Obugabe bwe tiburihwerekyerezibwa, N'obutegyeki bwe buryahika aha mperu." 
Daniel6:27 Niwe ajuna, kandi akakiza; Niwe akora obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza omu iguru n'omu nsi; Kandi niwe ajunire Danieli, akamwiha omu byara by'entare." 
Daniel6:28 Atyo Danieli yaaguma ari gye omu busingye bwa Dario n'omu bwa Kuuro Omuperesi. 
Daniel7:1 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwa Belishaza omugabe wa Babulooni, Danieli akaroota ekirooto, kandi yaayorekwa abyami aha kitanda kye. Bwanyima yaahandiika eki arootsire, yaakishoboorora omu bigambo bigufu." 
Daniel7:2 Atyo yaagira ati: Ekiro kimwe nkoorekwa, naareeba emiyaga ena y'omu iguru neetabangura enyanja mpango." 
Daniel7:3 Kandi omuri egyo nyanja haarugamu enyamaishwa mpango ina ezitarikushushana. 
Daniel7:4 Ey'okubanza ekaba neeshusha entare kandi eine amapapa g'empungu. KU naabaire nkigihangire amaisho, amapapa gaayo gaakuurwa, yaimukibwa, yaayemerera n'ebigyere bibiri nk'omuntu, kandi yaaheebwa obwengye n'abantu." 
Daniel7:5 Naagaruka naareeba endiijo nyamaishwa ya kabiri, erikushusha edubu. Etunguukire orubaju rumwe, eine embaju eshatu omu maino; baagiragiira bati: Imuka, oshonshomere enyama nyingi." 
Daniel7:6 Bwanyima y'ekyo naareeba endiijo nyamaishwa erikushusha engwe, eine amapapa g'empungu aha mugongo. Egyo nyamaishwa ekaba eine emitwe ena, kandi yaaheebwa obutegyeki." 
Daniel7:7 Bwanyima y'ekyo naagaruka naareeba omu kworekwa kwa nyekiro enyamaishwa ya kana erikutiinisa, erikwitsa obwoba, kandi ey'amaani agatakareebwaga. Ekaba eine ebiino by'ebyoma, yaashonshomera ebintu, yaabihendagura, n'ebyatsigaraho yaabiteera emigyere. Ekaba eine omutaano n'enyamaishwa zoona ezaagibandiize; kandi eine amahembe ikumi." 
Daniel7:8 Ku naabaire ninkyetegyereza ago mahembe, naareeba gaamerwamu erindi ihembe eryabaire riri rikye; amahembe ashatu omu g'okubanza gaakuuka n'emizi omu maisho gaaryo. Kandi reeba, omuri eryo ihembe rikye hakaba harimu amaisho garikushusha ag'omuntu, n'akanwa akarikugmba ebintu bikuru." 
Daniel7:9 Ku naabaire ninkyetegyereza, Naareeba ebitebe by'obukama byateebwaho, Omukuru owa iranaira yaashutama; Ebijwaro bye bikaba nibyera nk'orubaare, Kandi eishokye rye niryerera kimwe nk'ebyoya by'entaama; Ekitebe ky'obukama bwe kiri endimi z'omuriro, Kandi n'enziga zaakyo ziri omuriro ogurikwaka." 
Daniel7:10 Omu maisho ge haarugamu omugyera gw'omuriro, Rukumi emirundi enkumi baamuheereza, N'akakumi emirundi obukumi baayemerera omu maisho ge. Emanja zaatandika kuhurirwa, Ebitabo byashuuruurwa." 
Daniel7:11 Omuri ako kaanya naareeba kandi naatangaara ahabw'eiraka ry'eryo ihembe eryabaire nirigamba ebintu bikuru. Ku naabaire ninkyetegyereza, egyo nyamaishwa yaitwa, omutimbi gwayo gwacwekyerezibwa, gwaheebwayo kwokibwa omu muriro." 
Daniel7:12 Ezindi nyamaishwa ezaatsigaireho zaihwaho obutegyeki, kwonka zaarekyerwa amagara gaazo kumara omwanya n'obunaku." 
Daniel7:13 Bwanyima naareeba omuri okwo kworekwa nyekiro, kandi Reeba, Orikushusha omwana w'omuntu Yaija n'ebicu by'omu iguru, Yaahika Ogwo mukuru owa iranaira, Yaamurikwa omu maisho ge;" 
Daniel7:14 Yaaheebwa obutegyeki, ekitiinisa n'obukama, Ngu abantu b'amahanga goona, n'enganda zoona z'endimi ezitari zimwe, Bagume bamuheereze; Ogutegyeki bwe n'obutegyeki bw'ebiro byona obutarihwaho, Kandi n'obukama bwe n'obukama oburarimarwaho." 
Daniel7:15 Kwonka nyowe, Danieli, omutima gwanyemerera, n'ebi nyorekirwe byantiinisa." 
Daniel7:16 Nairira haihi omwe ahari abo abaabaire beemereire aho, naamubuuza amazima g'ebyo byona. Atyo yangambira, yanshobororera amakuru gaabyo," 
Daniel7:17 naagira ati: Ezo nyamaishwa mpango ina nibo bagabe bana, abariimuka omu nsi." 
Daniel7:18 Kwonka abarikwera ba Rukira-boona nibo bariheebwa obukama, bukaba obwabo okuhitsya ryari na ryari." 
Daniel7:19 Bwanyima naayetenga kumanya amazima g'eby'enyamaishwa ya kana, eyaabaire eine omutaano n'ezindi zoona, neetiinisa munonga, ebiino byayo biri eby'ebyoma, n'ebyara byayo biri eby'emiringa, eyaashonshomeire ebintu ekabihendagura, kandi ebyatsigaireho ekabiteera omugyere;" 
Daniel7:20 kandi n'okumanya eby'ago mahembe ikumi agaabaire gari aha mutwe gwayo, n'eby'erindi ihembe eryamezire bwanyima, ashatu omuri gari gakakuurwa omu maisho gaaryo; n'eihembe eryabaire riine amaisho n'akanwa karikugamba ebintu bikuru, eryareebekire nirikira magyenzi gaaryo." 
Daniel7:21 Ku naabaire ninkyetegyereza, eryo ihembe ryarwanisa abarikwera, ryaguma niribabinga," 
Daniel7:22 okuhitsya obu Ogwo Mukuru owa iranaira yaizire, abarikwera ba Rukira-boona bakasinga orubaja, obunaku bukahika, abarikwera bakaheebwa obukama." 
Daniel7:23 Atyo ogwo muntu yaagira ati: Eby'egyo nyamaishwa ya kana, Haryabaho obugabe bwa kana omu nsi, Obutarishushana na bundi bugabe bwona; Buryashonshomera ensi yoona, Bugiribatiirire, bugicwanyagurire kimwe." 
Daniel7:24 Kandi eby'amahembe ikumi, Omuri obwo bugabe haryaimukamu abagabe ikumi; Bwanyima yaabo haimukye ondiijo mugabe, Abe ow'omutaano aha baamubandiize; Kandi bashatu ahari abo aryabagarura ahansi." 
Daniel7:25 Ogwo niwe arigamba eby'okugomera Rukira-boona; Kandi aryanyangaraza abarikwera ba Rukira-boona, Agire enaama y'okuhindura obunaku n'ebiragiro. Kandi biryarekwa omu mikono ye, Okuhitsya obu obunaku, obunaku bubiri, n'ekicweka ky'obunaku birihwaho." 
Daniel7:26 Kwonka bwanyima emanja ziryatandika kuhurirwa, Bamwiheho obutegyeki, Abone kuhwerekyerezibwa n'okumarirwaho kimwe okuhitsya aha muheru." 
Daniel7:27 Reero bwanyima obukama n'obutegyeki N'obukuru bw'amahanga agari ahansi y'eiguru ryona Biryaheebwa eihanga ry'abarikwera ba Rukira-boona, Obukama bwabo buryaba obukama obutarihwaho, Kandi obugabe bwona buryaguma bubaheereze, buboorobere." 
Daniel7:28 Aha niho ebyo byagarukira; kwonka nyowe, Danieli, ebiteekateeko bikandeetera kwemereza omutima, naahinduriza ahamaisho; kwonka ekyo kigambo naakigumya omu mutima gwangye." 
Daniel8:1 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Belishaza, nyowe Danieli nkareeba okworekwa, okwabaire nikukurata okw'okubanza." 
Daniel8:2 Naareeba ebintu omu kworekwa. Obwo nkaba ndi omu rurembo Shushani, oruri omu ishaza rya Elamu. Omuri okwo kworekwa naareeba ndi aha mugyera Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba empaya y'entaama eyemereire aha nkungu y'omugyera. Egyo mpaya ekaba eine amahembe abiri, gombi gakaba gari maraingwa, kwonka erimwe niryeshumba erindi; kandi eriraingwa niryo ryamezire bwanyima." 
Daniel8:4 Naareeba egyo mpaya neegyenda neeshengura busha aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba, aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso n'obwa buryo; hakaba hatariho nyamaishwa erikubaasa kugiza omu kaso, n'obu yaakuba orikubaasa kugijuna ekintu; yaaguma neeyegirira nk'oku erikwenda, eine eigundu." 
Daniel8:5 Ku naabaire ninkyetegyereza, reeba haija empaya y'embuzi neeruga oburengyerwa-izooba, yaacwekanisa ensi yoona etarikuhitsya maguru hansi; kandi egyo mpaya ekaba eine eihembe eririkureebeka munonga ahagati y'amaisho gaayo." 
Daniel8:6 Yaahika empaya y'entaama ey'amahembe abiri, ei naareebire eyemereire aha nkungu y'omugyera, yaagisyokyera n'amaani eine ekiniga kingi." 
Daniel8:7 Naareeba neegiiririra, yaagigirira ekiniga, yaagishengura, yaagikooboraho ago mahembe gombi; egyo mpaya y'enttaama yaabura agagigaruka omu kaso, kureka egyo mpaya y'embuzi yaagituura ahansi, yaagiribatiirira; haabura owaabaasa kugigikiza." 
Daniel8:8 Okuruga aho egyo mpaya y'embuzi yaagirira kimwe eigundu; kwonka ku yaakuzire yaahama, eryo ihembe rihango ryacweka, omu mwanya gwaryo haameramu agandi mahembe ana agarikureeba ei emiyaga y'omu iguru ena eruga." 
Daniel8:9 Rimwe ahari ago mahembe ryatookwaho akandi kahembe, kaakura, kaaba eihembe rihango munonga, ryatoora aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, n'omu nsi y'ekitiinisa." 
Daniel8:10 Ryaba rihango, ryahika n'eihe ry'omu iguru, kandi enyonyoozi zimwe ez'omuri eryo ihe ryazinaga ahansi, ryaziribatiirira." 
Daniel8:11 Rityo ryayetunguura, ryayeinganisa n'Omukuru w'eryo ihe; ryamwihaho ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha, kandi Omwanya ogurikwera gwasheenywa." 
Daniel8:12 Ryaheebwa eryo ihe hamwe n'ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha ekitambwa ahabw'okushiisha. Amazima gaanagwa ahansi; eryo ihembe ryangyenderwa gye omu bi ryabaire nirikora. 
Daniel8:13 Bwanyima naahurira orikwera naagamba; kandi orikwera ondiijo yaamubuuza ati: Ebyo ebyayorekwa eby'ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha, n'eby'eky'okushiisha ekirikuhindura ensi amatongo, n'eby'okurekura Obutaaho oburikwera n'eryo ihe kuribatiirirwa, biryagarukira hi?" 
Daniel8:14 Yaamugarukamu ati: Biryamara ebiro enkumi ibiri na magana ashatu nibusheesha nibwira; bwanyima Obutaaho oburikwera bugarukye aha buteeka bwabwo. 
Daniel8:15 Nyowe Danieli, ku naaherize kureeba okwo kworekwa, naateeraho kukwwetegyereza; ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba ekirikushusha omuntu kundumbaire omumaisho." 
Daniel8:16 Naahurira eiraka ry'omuntu niriruga ahagati y'omugyera Ulai, yaayeta naagira ati: Gaburieli, shobororera ogwo mushaija ebi yaayorekwa." 
Daniel8:17 Atyo yairira ahu naabaire nyemereire. Ku yaizire, naatiina, naayetuura ahansi njuumaire. Kwonka yangira ati: Iwe mwana w'omuntu 'we, yetegyereze ku ebi waayorekwa biri eby'obunaku bw'aha mperu." 
Daniel8:18 Ku yaabaire naakingambira, naagwejegyerera kimwe njuumaire; kwonka yankoraho, yaanyimutsya, naayemerera;" 
Daniel8:19 yaagira ati: Reeba, naaza kukumanyisa ebiribaho omu bunaku bw'aha muheru obw'okugirirwa ekiniga, ahabw'okuba n'eby'obunaku bw'aha muheru obwatairweho." 
Daniel8:20 Eby'empaya y'entaama ey'amahembe abiri, ei waareeba, nibo bagabe babiri aba Bumeedi na Buperesi;" 
Daniel8:21 kandi egyo mpaya y'embuzi niwe mugabe wa Bugriika; n'eryo ihembe rihango ery'ahagati y'amaisho gaayo niwe mugabe waabwo ow'okubanza. 
Daniel8:22 Kandi nk'oku ryacweka, omu mwanya gwaryo hakameramu agandi mahembe ana, nikwo haribaho obugabe buna oburikuruga omuri eryo ihanga; kwonka buryaba butaine maani nk'ag'ogwo mugabe w'okubanza." 
Daniel8:23 Omu bunaku bw'aha muheru gw'obwo bugabe buna, abasiisi ku bariba baherize kushiisha bakarengyesereza, omugabe ow'ahamaisho aharikutiinisa, orikumanya ebitarikumanywa, aryaimuka." 
Daniel8:24 Obushoboorozi bwe buryaba bwingi, aryareeta okucwekyerera okurikutiinisa, agyenderwe gye omu bi arikukora, acwekyereze abashaija b'amaani n'eihanga ry'abarikwera." 
Daniel8:25 Ahabw'okuhwetahweteka kwe obugobya buryamubaasisa kukora ebi arikwenda; aryayehimbisa omu mutima gwe. Aryacwekyereza baingi batabwirwe; kandi aryaimuka kurwanisa n'Omukama w'abakama; kwonka aryahendagurika hataine omukozireho. 
Daniel8:26 Ebyayorekirwe bikagambwa ku biribaho, omu busheeshe n'omu myabazyo n'eby'amazima; kwonka orinde okwo kworekwa, ahabw'okuba n'okw'ebiro ebiriizira ira." 
Daniel8:27 Nyowe Danieli naaraba, naamara ebiro ndwaire; bwanyima naimuka, naakora emirimo y'omugabe; kwonka naatangaazibwa ebyo ebi naayorekirwe; kandi tihaine waabyetegyereize." 
Daniel9:1 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwa Dario mwene Ahasuero, ow'omu ruganda rw'Abameedi, owaahindukire omugabe w'Abakaludaaya" 
Daniel9:2 omuri ogwo mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwe, nyowe Danieli nkamanyira omu bitabo emyaka ei Yerusaalemu erimara ekasheenywa, ku eri emyaka makumi mushanju, nk'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyahanwirwe nabi Yeremia oku kyabaire kiri." 
Daniel9:3 Naata amaisho ahari Mukama Ruhanga wangye, nimmusherurira omu kushaba n'okweshengyereza, naayesiibyakwo njwaire ebiguniya, nyesiigire eiju." 
Daniel9:4 Naashaba MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, naamwaturira ningira nti: Ai Mukama, Ruhanga omukuru kandi orikutiinisa, ohikiiriza endagaano, kandi ogirira embabazi abarikukukunda, bakoorobera ebiragiro byawe." 
Daniel9:5 Manya tukashiisha, twacumura, twakora ebitari by'okuhikiirira, twagoma, twateishuka, twareka ebiragiro byawe n'ebyatairweho;" 
Daniel9:6 kandi twayanga kuhurira abaheereza baawe baanabi, abaabaire bagambira abagabe baitu, abategyeki baitu, baatatenkuriitwe, n'abantu boona ab'omu nsi yaitu omu iziina ryawe." 
Daniel9:7 Ai Mukama, okuhikiiria n'okwawe, kwonka ekyaitu n'okwitwa enshoni, nk'oku kiri eri izooba aha bashaija ba Yuda, n'abatwire Yerusaalemu, n'aha Baisraeli boona, ahari abo abari haihi, n'abo abari hare omu nsi zoona ei waababingiire ahabw'okucumura oku baakucumwireho." 
Daniel9:8 Ai Mukama, itwe n'abagabe baitu, n'abategyeki baitu, na baatatenkuriitwe, ekyaitu n'okwitwa enshoni, ahabw'okuba tukakucumuraho." 
Daniel9:9 Kwonka Mukama Ruhanga waitu niwe wenka ogira embabazi n'okusaasira, n'obu turaabe twamugomeire," 
Daniel9:10 tutoorobere Mukama Ruhanga waitu, tukanga kukuratira ebiragiro bye, ebi yaataire omu maisho gaitu naabirabya omu baheereza be baanabi." 
Daniel9:11 Buzimazima, Abaisraeli boona bakashiisha ebiragiro byawe, baateihsuka, baatoora ahandi, baayanga kuhurira eiraka ryawe. Nikyo omukyeeno n'endahiro ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebiragiro bya Musa omuheereza wa Ruhanga bitushukiirweho, ahabw'okuba tukamucumuraho." 
Daniel9:12 Kandi ahamize ebigambo bye ebi yaagambire naatuhana, itwe n'abategyeki baitu abaabaire nibatutegyeka, ahabw'okutureetaho akabi kahango; ahabw'okuba ahansi y'eiguru tihariho kirakozirwe nk'ekyo ekyakozirwe ahari Yerusaalemu." 
Daniel9:13 Akabi ako koona katuhikireho, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebiragiro bya Musa; n'obu kiraabe kibaire kityo, MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu, titukweshengyereize, ngu otugirire embabazi, kandi titurekire by'okutahikiirira byaitu, tukamanya amazima gaawe." 
Daniel9:14 Nikyo MUKAMA ateekateekyeire akabi aka, akakatureetaho; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu n'ohikiriire omuri byona ebi akora, kwonka itwe titworobeire iraka rye." 
Daniel9:15 Mbwenu, ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, owaihire abantu baawe omu nsi ya Misri n'omukono gw'amaani, okeetungira eiziina, nk'oku kiri hati, tukacumura, twakora ebitari by'okuhikiirira." 
Daniel9:16 Ai Mukama, ninkweshengyereza ahabw'eby'okuhikiirira byona ebi okora, okubiihirwa kwawe n'ekiniga kyawe birugye aha rurembo rwawe Yerusaalemu, orushozi rwawe orurikwera; ahabw'okuba Yerusaalemu n'abantu baawe bahindukire eky'okucweraho enfumu omu bantu boona abatwehinguririize ahabw'ebibi byaitu n'ahabw'eby'okushiisha bya baatatenkuriitwe." 
Daniel9:17 Mbwenu, ai Ruhanga waitu, hurira okushaba n'okweshengyereza kw'omwiru waawe, kandi, ai Mukama, ahabw'ekitiinisa kyawe Omwanya gwawe ogurikwera, ogubaire gwabaire omushaka, ogwakize amaisho gaawe." 
Daniel9:18 Ai Ruhanga wangye, tega okutu kwawe, ohurire; igura amaisho gaawe, oreebe okweshobera kwaitu, n'orurembo orurikwetererwa eiziina ryawe; ahabw'okuba titurikukureetera kweshengyereza kwaitu ahabw'okwesiga okuhikiirira kwaitu, kureka ahabw'okwesiga embabazi zaawe." 
Daniel9:19 Ai MUKAMA, hurira; ai MUKAMA, saasira; ai MUKAMA, taho omutima, okore; ai Ruhanga wnagye, ahabwawe otakyerererwa, ahabw'okuba orurembo rwawe n'abantu baawe nibeetererwa eiziina ryawe." 
Daniel9:20 Ku naabaire ninkigamba kandi ninkishaba, niinyatura ebibi byangye n'eby'abantu bangye Abaisraeli, nindeetera MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye okweshengyereza kwangye ahabw'orushozi rwa Ruhanga wangye orurikwera;" 
Daniel9:21 ninkigamba ninshaba, omushaija Gaburieli, ou naareebire omu kworekwa kw'okubanza, yaagaruka, yaija naayehuuta, yampikaho," 
Daniel9:22 yanshobororera naagira ati: Iwe Danieli, hati naija kukuha obwengye n'okwetegyereza." 
Daniel9:23 Obu waaba nootandika kweshengyereza, haija ekigambo; mbwenu naija kukikugambira, ahakuba ori orikukundwa munonga. N'ahabw'ekyo teekateeka ahari ekyo kigambo, oyetegyereze okwo kworekwa." 
Daniel9:24 Saabiiti makumi mushanju ziteirweho ahabw'abantu baawe n'orurembo rwawe orurikwera, ngu ebicumuro bihwe, ebibi biihweho, okutahikiirira kurihiirirwe, haije okuhikiirira okutarihwaho, ebyorekirwe n'ebyahamwirwe baanabi biteebweho akamanyiso, n'Orikwera munonga ashukweho amajuta." 
Daniel9:25 Mbwenu, omanye kandi oyetegyereze, ngu okwiha aha kiragiro ky'okuhunduura n'okwombeka Yerusaalemu okuhitsya aha kwija kw'Omunyiginya owaahsukirweho amajta, haryabaho saabiiti mushanju. Bwanyima omu saabiiti makumi mukaaga na ibiri egarukye eyombekwe, egire enguuto n'enteeraniro zaazo, kwonka bikorwe omu biro by'emirabanamu." 
Daniel9:26 Ezo saabiiti makumi mukaaga na ibiri kuzirihwaho, Owaashukirweho amajuta aryaihwaho, kandi tarigira ki aritsigaza. Abantu b'omutegyeki oriija baryacwekyereza orurembo n'Omwany ogurikwera; omuheru gwe guryaba okutwarwa omwegyemure; kandi habeho obweme okuhitsya aha muheru. Eby'okuhwerekyereza biragiirwe." 
Daniel9:27 Ogwo mutegyeki aryaragaana na baingi endagaano ehamire, emare saabiiti emwe. Omu kicweka ky'okubanza ky'egyo saabiiti aryazibira abantu kutamba ebitambo n'okuhonga empongano. Bwanyima omuherekyerezi aryaizira aha ipapa ry'ebirikuzira, okuhitsya obu omuheru gwe ogwaragiirwe gurimuhikaho." 
Daniel10:1 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Kuuro omugabe wa Buperesi ekigambo kikashuuruurirwa Danieli owaayetsirwe Beliteeshaza. Kandi ekyo kigmbo kikaba kkiri eky'amazima, nikimanyisa eby'orugamba rw'amaani. Yaakyetegyereza, ebi yaayorekirwe byamushoborokyera." 
Daniel10:2 Omu biro ebyo, nyowe Danieli nkamara saabiiti ishatu ninganya;" 
Daniel10:3 kandi omu saabiiti ezo zoona tindariire k'okurya koona akanuzire; enyama n'obu yaakuba viinyo tibirahikire mu kanwa kangye, kandi tindeerabizeho kajuta koona." 
Daniel10:4 Aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina omu kwezi kw'okubanza, nkaba nyemereire aha nkungu y'omugyera ogurikwetwa Hidekeeli;" 
Daniel10:5 ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba omu shaija ojwaire omwenda gwa kitaani, ayezirikiise orukoba rw'ezaabu nungi eya Ufaazi." 
Daniel10:6 Omubiri gwe gukaba nigushusha berulo, aha maisho ge nihashusha omurabyo, amaishoge nigashusha amatabaaza g'omuriro, emikono ye n'amaguru ge nibyengyengyeta nk'omuringa ogweziibwe, n'eiraka rye riri nk'ery'abantu baingi." 
Daniel10:7 Nyowe nyenka, Danieli, niinye naareebire okwo kworekwa; abantu abu naabaire nyine tibarakureebire, kwonka bakatetema munonga, baahunga baaza kweshereka." 
Daniel10:8 Ntyo naatsigara nyenka, naareeba okwo kworekwa kuhango, omuriinye tihaatsigaramu twani twona, n'oburungi bwangye bwahindukira kimwe obujunde, amaani gampweramu kimwe." 
Daniel10:9 Bwanyima naamuhurira naagamba; ku naahuriire eiraka rye, naagwa ahansi njuumaire, naagwejegyerera kimwe, omutwe ngucurikire okuzimu." 
Daniel10:10 Kandi reeba, omukono gwankoraho, gwantsiga nintetema, ntsimbire emikono n'amaju." 
Daniel10:11 Yangira ati: Iwe Danieli omushaija orikukundwa munonga, ta omutima aha bi ndikukugambira, kandi oyemerere gye; ahabw'okuba naakutumwaho. Ku yaabaire naakingambira ekyo kigambo, naayemerera nintetema." 
Daniel10:12 Atyo yangira ati: Danieli, otatiina, ahakuba okwiha aha izooba eri otandikiireho kutaho omutima kwetegyereza n'okwecureeza omu maisho ga Ruhanga waawe, ebigambo byawe bihuriirwe; kandi nikyo kyandeeta." 
Daniel10:13 Kwonka maraika w'obugabe bwa Buperesi amazire ebiro makumi abiri na kimwe ankumiriire; bwanyima Mikaeli, omwe ahari baamaraika abakuru, yaija kumpa emikono; ntyo naamutsigaho n'ogwo mukuru w'obugabe bwa Buperesi," 
Daniel10:14 naija kukushobororera ebiriba aha bantu baawe omu biro bya bwanyima; ahabw'okuba okwo kworekwa n'okw'ebiro ebiriija. 
Daniel10:15 Ku yaaherize kungambira ebyo bigambo, naajuumara ahansi, naagobwa orurimi." 
Daniel10:16 Bwanyima reeba, haija orikushusha abaana b'abantu, yankora aha minwa; nikwo kwashamya akanwa kangye, nkagamba, ningira owaabaire anyemereire omumaisho, nti: Mukama wangye, ebi nyorekirwe bindeeteire obusaasi, naahweramu kimwe amaani." 
Daniel10:17 Mbwenu nkaanye omwiru waawe, Mukama wangye, nimbaasa kugamba naiwe? Ahabw'okuba tinkiine twani twona, n'omwitsyo gwampweiremu." 
Daniel10:18 Kandi owaabire naashusha omuntu yankoraho, yangaruramu amaani;" 
Daniel10:19 yangira ati: Iwe mushaija orikukundwa munonga 'we, otatiina, huumura; garukwamu amaani, ogume omutima. Ku yangambiire atyo, naagarukwamu amaani, naagira nti: Mukama wangye, k'ogambe, ahabw'okuba wangaruramu amaani." 
Daniel10:20 Yambuuza ati: Noomanya ekyandeeta ahariiwe? Reeba, hati naaza kugarukayo kurwana na maraika wa Buperesi; kandi ku ndiheza kumusingura, maraika wa Bugriika aryaija." 
Daniel10:21 Kwonka niinyija kukugmbira ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'amazima; kandi tihariho ondiijo ou ndikukwatanisa nawe kubarwanisa, okwihaho Mikaeli maraika waanyu." 
Daniel11:1 Kandi nyowe, omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwa Dario Omumeedi, nkaimuka kumugumya n'okumugaruramu amaani." 
Daniel11:2 Mbwenu hati naaza kukworeka amazima. Reeba, omuri Buperisi haryaimukamu abandi bagabe bashatu, kandi owa kana aryakiriza kimwe abo bonshatu obutungi; ku ariheza kugira amaani ahabw'obutungi bwe, aryimutsya engabo ze zoona kurwanisa obugabe wa Bugriika." 
Daniel11:3 Bwanyima haryayema omugabe rugambwa, ategyekyese obushoboorozi bwingi, atwza nk'oku arikwenda." 
Daniel11:4 Ku ariheza kuhama, obugabe bwe buryacwekamu ebicweka, bubaganisibwemu nibutoora ei emiyaga ena y'omu iguru ereetwa; kandi tiburihungurwa ruzaaro rwe, n'obu kwakuba okugaruka aha buteeka nk'oku yaabaire naakibutegyeka, ahabw'okuba obugabe bwe buryarandurwa, butwarwe abandi abatari abo." 
Daniel11:5 Bwanyima omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aryagira amaani; kwonka omwe aha bakuru b'engabo ze aryamukiza amaani, kandi obugabe bwe buryaba buhango." 
Daniel11:6 Ku harihinguraho emyaka, baryakwatanisa; bwanyima muhara w'omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aryaza owa omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso kuragaana endagaano y'okugarukana; kwonka ogwo mwishiki tariguma na maani g'obushoboorozi bwe, n'omushaija we tarigumaho n'obu rwakuba oruzaaro rwe, kureka ogwo mwishiki n'abaragaragwa be n'omwana we n'omushaija owaamushweire baryaheebwayo." 
Daniel11:7 Kwonka ebiro ebyo, omwe ow'omu ruzaaro rw'ogwo mwishiki, orikumukomookaho, aryaimuka, ahungurire ishenkuru; aryarwansia ihe ryabo, ataahe omu kigo ky'omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso, abarwanise, abasingure." 
Daniel11:8 Aryanyaga baaruhanga baabo, n'ebishushani byabo ebiheesirwe, n'ebintu byabo by'obuguzi bwingi eby'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, abitware Misri. Kandi aryamara emyaka atarikuteera mugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Daniel11:9 Bwanyima ogwo mugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho aryateera ensi y'omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, kwonka aryagaruka atyo omu nsi ye." 
Daniel11:10 Bwanyima abatabani baryahuruza abantu, bateerane engabo nyingi munonga; ezo ngabo ziryateera ensi, zigijanjaare yoona, zoogymu, zigumizemu nizirwana, zihikye n'aha kigo ky'omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Daniel11:11 Ekirirugamu, ogwo mugabe aryagira ekiniga, ahurure, arwane n'omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. Ogwo mugabe aryahuruza eihe rihango munonga, kwonka riyrakwatwa abazigu be." 
Daniel11:12 Omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, ku ariheza kukwata ezo ngabo, aryayetunguura, aziitemu obukumi n'obukumi, kwonka taribasingurira kimwe;" 
Daniel11:13 ahakuba omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso aryagaruka, ahuruze eihe rihango munonga eririkukira ery'okubanza; ku harihinguraho emyaka, aryahurura n'engabo nyingi n'ebintu bingi." 
Daniel11:14 Omuri obwo bunaku baingi baryaimuka kurwanisa omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'ababisha b'omu ihanga ryawe baryaimuka kuhikiiriza ebyayorekirwe, kwonka baryaremwa." 
Daniel11:15 Bwanyima omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho aryaija, agote orurembo orwehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare ezigumire, arurundeho eby'okutemberaho, arukwate. Engabo z'omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, nangwa n'ez'entoore, tiziribaasa, ahabw'okuba tizirigira garwana." 
Daniel11:16 Kureka oriija kumurwanisa, aryakora nk'oku arikwenda, kandi tihariho orimuza omu kaso; bwanyima aryayemerera omu nsi y'ekitiinisa, yoona eze omu bushoboorozi bwe." 
Daniel11:17 Aryamariirira kuhuruza engabo z'obugabe bwe bwona, aragaane n'ogwo mugabe ebyakubaasa kureeta obusingye, abihikiirize. Aryahingira omugabe wa Misri muhara we, ngu abone kushiisha obwo bugabe. Kwonka enaama ye terihikiirira, kandi terigira ki yaamugasira." 
Daniel11:18 Bwanyima aryahinduka ateere ebirwa, akubuure bingi; kwonka omukur w'eihe ondiijo aryamaraho emyekuniko ye; kandi egyo myekuniko ye nayo emuhindukane, emushongye." 
Daniel11:19 Bwanyima aryahindukira ebigo by'omu nsi ye, kwonka aryateera entsibo, agwe aburire kimwe." 
Daniel11:20 Bwanyima haryaimuka ondiijo omu mwanya gwe, ayohereze orikushoza omushoro, arabe omu nsi y'ekitiinisa; kwonka ku harihinguraho ebiro bikye, nawe aryacwekyerezibwa, ataitsirwe na kiniga, n'obu kwakuba okugwa omu rugamba." 
Daniel11:21 Omu mwanya gwe haryaimuka omuntu orikugaywa, otakaheebwaga kitiinisa ky'obugabe; aryaija atamanyirwe, aheebwe obugabe ahabw'okwesiigisiriza." 
Daniel11:22 Amahe garyatwarirwa kimwe omu maisho ge, gataataane, kandi n'Omukuru w'endagaano nawe abe atyo." 
Daniel11:23 Kandi ku bariheza kuragaana nawe endagaano, aryakora eby'obugobya, ahindukye ow'amaani, haza aine abantu bakye." 
Daniel11:24 Bwanyima aryateera ekicweka ky'egyo nsi ekirikukira oburungi atamanyirwe, akore eki baishe na baishenkuru batarakozire, abaganisize abantu be emicwijuro n'eminyago n'eby'obutungi. Kandi aryagira enaama z'okuteera ebigo byayo ebigumire, kwonka okumara akaanya kakye." 
Daniel11:25 Bwanyima ayeteere ebinyomyo, agire obumanzi bw'okurwanisa omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo n'eihe ringi; ogwo mugabe aryahurura n'eihe rihango munonga kandi ery'amaani; kwonka tarigumaho, ahabw'okuba baryamugirira enaama mbi." 
Daniel11:26 Nangwa n'abariba batungirwe eby'okurya bye nibo barimucwekyereza; eihe rye riryatwarwa, kandi baingi omuriryo baitwe." 
Daniel11:27 Abo bagabe bombi emitima yaabo eryararamira okukora eby'eitima; baryaguma nibabeihana bashutami aha meeza emwe, kwonka ebyo biryaba ebya busha, ahabw'okuba omuheru gwabyo guryabaho omu bunaku bwagwo obwatairweho." 
Daniel11:28 Bwanyima aryagaruka omu nsi ye n'ebintu bingi, kandi omutima gwe guryaba nigukyanga endagaano erikwera. Aryakora eki arikwenda, agarukye omu nsi ye." 
Daniel11:29 Omu bunaku obwatairweho aryagaruka omu nsi y'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, agiteere, kwonka omu bunaku obwo tikiriba nk'oku kyabaire bweabiso;" 
Daniel11:30 ahabw'okuba emeeri za Kitimu ziryaija kumurwanisa; nikyo aritiinira, akagarurayo engabo ze, akagyenda aine ekiniga kingi, akarwansia abarikukunda endagaano erikwera. Omu kugaruka kwe aryata omutima ahari abo abarikureka endagaano erikwera." 
Daniel11:31 Aryayohereza engabo ze, zihikyeyo, zishiishe hekalu n'ekigo kyayo, ziiheho ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoohsa, ziteho ekirikuzira ekirikuhwerekyereza." 
Daniel11:32 Abarikushiisha egyo ndagaano aryababeihabeihesa akarimi karungi; kwonka abantu abarikumanya Ruhanga waabo baryahama, bakore eby'obumanzi." 
Daniel11:33 Abaine obwengye omuri abo bantu, n'obu barimara ebiro bingi nibaitwe rurara n'omuriro, bakatwarwa bari enkwatwa banyagirwe, baryareetera baingi okwetegyereza." 
Daniel11:34 Ku barigwa, baryatunga okuhwerwa kukye; baingi baryayeteerana nabo nibamamarika." 
Daniel11:35 Kandi bamwe omuri abo banyabwengye baryaitwa, bamarwemu enkamba, bashemezibwe, kandi beezibwe, okuhitsya aha bunaku bw'aha muheru; ahabw'okuba obunaku obwatairweho buryaba butakahikire." 
Daniel11:36 Kandi ogwo mugabe aryakora nk'oku arikwenda, ayetunguure, ayekuze okukira baaruhanga boona, agambe ebirikutangaaza eby'okurogota ahari Ruhanga Nyamuhanga." 
Daniel11:37 Kandi ogwo mugabe taryeta hari baaruhanga ba baishenkuru, nari okwetenga abakazi n'obu kyakuba ekyetwa ruhanga kyona, ahakuba aryayekuza okukira boona." 
Daniel11:38 Omu mwanya gw'okuha baaruhanga abo ekitiinisa aryakiha ruhanga w'ebigo; kandi ruhanga ou baishenkuru baabaire batakamanyaga, niwe ariha ekitiinisa, naamutoijera ezaabu, efeeza, obubaare bw'obuguzi bwingi, n'ebiconco ebirikushemeza." 
Daniel11:39 Aryasingura ebigo by'amaani naahwerwa ruhanga otakamanywaga; kandi abarimwemera kuba abe aryabakuza n'ekitiinisa, abahindure abategyeki b'abaingi, ababaganisize ensi ahabw'enguzi." 
Daniel11:40 Aha bunaku bw'aha muheru omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aryamuteera; kwonka omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso aryamusyokyera nk'akasooroora n'ebigaari n'ab'aha mbaraasi n'emeeri nyingi, ateere ensi, azishandaaremu nk'omwegyemure, azoogyemu;" 
Daniel11:41 bwanyima ahikye omu nsi y'ekitiinisa. Obukumi n'obukumi baryaitwa, kwonka Abanyedomu, Abamoabu, n'abaini b'omu Baamoni baryarokorwa omu mukono gwe." 
Daniel11:42 Aryabangira amahanga maingi omukono, n'ensi ya Misri terimukira." 
Daniel11:43 Aryagira obushoboorozi aha bintu ebibiikirwe, eby'ezaabu, eby'efeeza n'ebya Misri byona eby'obuguzi bwingi; kandi Abalibya n'Abanyesiopia baryagyenda bamukuratiire." 
Daniel11:44 Kwonka bwanyima amakuru agariruga oburugwa-izooba n'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso garyamwemereza omutima, ahurure n'ekiniga kingi kuhwerekyereza baingi n'okubamariraho kimwe." 
Daniel11:45 Aryateera amahema ge g'obugabe ahagati y'enyanja n'orushozi orurikwera orw'ekitiinisa; kwonka aryahika aha muheru gw'amagara ge, ataine kihwera." 
Daniel12:1 Omu bunaku obwo Mikaeli, omukuru rugambwa oreeberera abantu baawe, aryaimuka, habeho obunaku bw'obusaasi obutakabahoga, okwiha obu eihanga ryabaho okuhitsya obwo; kwonka omuri obwo bunaku abantu baawe baryajunwa, weena ou eiziina rye ririshangwa rihandiikirwe omu kitabo." 
Daniel12:2 Kandi baingi omuri abo, abariba bagwejegyeire omu mucuucu gw'ensi, baryasisiimuka, abamwe basisiimukire amagara agatahwaho, abandi basisiimukire okuhemuka n'okugaywa okutarihwaho." 
Daniel12:3 Kandi abaine obwengye baryayaka nk'omushana ogurikwakira omu mwanya, n'abarikuhindura baingi, bakabareeta omu kuhikiirira, baryayaka nk'enyonyoozi okuhitsya ryari na ryari." 
Daniel12:4 Kwonka iwe Danieli shweka ahari ebyo bigambo, ekitabo okiteerane n'kamanyiso, okuhitsya aha bunaku bw'aha mperu. Baingi baryairuka nibakora oku n'oku, n'okumanya kuryayeyongyera." 
Daniel12:5 Bwanyima nyowe Danieli, ku naayetegyereize, naareeba abandi babiri, omwe aha nkungu y'omugyera seenu, n'ondi aha nkungu y'omugyera seeri." 
Daniel12:6 Omwe yaabuuza ori owaabaire ajwaire omwenda gwa kitaani, ari ahaiguru y'amaizi g'omugyera, ati: Eby'okutangaaza ebyo biryamara mwanya ki bitakahweireho?" 
Daniel12:7 Ogwo mushaija, owaabaire ajwaire omwenda gwa kitaani ari ahaiguru y'amaizi, yaimutsya omukono gwe gwa buryo n'ogwa bumosho, naagyoreka ahaiguru; naahurira naarahira Ogwo otuura ahuriire ebiro byona, ngu biryamara obunaku n'obunaku bubiri n'ekicweka ky'obunaku; kandi ngu, ku bariheza kusheenyagura amaani g'eihanga eririkwera, ebyo byona biryahikiirira." 
Daniel12:8 Naabihurira, kwonka tinaabyetegyereza; nikwo kubuuza nti: Mukama wangye, ekirihereeruka omuri ebyo nikiiha?" 
Daniel12:9 Yaagira ati: Yegyendere, Danieli, ahabw'okuba ebigambo bishwekirwe, kandi byahamibwa n'akamanyiso, okuhitsya aha bunaku bw'aha mperu." 
Daniel12:10 Baingi baryayeshemeza, beeyeze, barabibwe omu iziiko; kwonka ababi baryagumizamu nibakora ebibi; kandi tihariho n'omwe omuri abo babi oribyetegyereza, kwonka abaine obwengye bo baryabyetegyereza." 
Daniel12:11 Okwiha ha bunaku obu ekitambo ky'okwotsya eky'obutoosha kiriihirwaho, bakataho ekirikuzira ekirikuhwerekyereza, haryahinguraho ebiro rukumi na magana abiri na makumi mwenda." 
Daniel12:12 Oritegyereza akahika aha kiro kya rukumi na magana ashatu na makumi ashatu na bitaano, aryaba ahiiriirwe." 
Daniel12:13 Kwonka yegyendere okuhitsya aha muheru; bwanyima oryahuumura, oyemerere omu mwanya ogwakuteereirweho, aha muheru gw'ebyo biro." 
Hosea1:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyaizire ahari Hosea mwene Beeri omu busingye bwa Uziya, Yosamu, Ahazi na Hezekia abagabe ba Yuda, n'omu busingye bwa Yeroboamu mwene Yoashi omugabe wa Israeli." 
Hosea1:2 MUKAMA obu yaatandika kugamba naaraba omuri Hosea, akamugira ati: Irooko, oshwere omukazi maraaya, ozaare abaana b'obwamaraaya, ahabw'okuba ensi egi erengyesereize kukora obwamaraaya ahabw'okutsigaho MUKAMA." 
Hosea1:3 Nawe nikwo kugyenda akashwera Gomeri muhara wa Dibulaimu, akagira enda, akzaara omwana w'omwojo." 
Hosea1:4 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Eiziina rye omwete Yezereeli; ahabw'okuba hatsigaire omwanya mukye, nkafubira enju ya Yehu ahabw'eshagama ei yaasheesheire Yezereeli, kandi ndyamariraho kimwe obugabe bw'enju ya Israeli." 
Hosea1:5 Eryo izooba ndyahendera obuta bwa Israeli omu ruhita rwa Yezereeli. 
Hosea1:6 Ogwo mukazi yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaara omwishiki. MUKAMA yaagira Hosea ati: Eiziina rye omwete Lo-ruhama, amakuru ngu Okutagirirwa mbabazi; ahabw'okuba tindigaruka kugirira nju ya Israeli embabazi, kubasaasira na kakye." 
Hosea1:7 Kwonka enju ya Yuda yo, ndyagigirira embabazi, mbajunise MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo; tindibajunisa buta, rurara, rugamba, mbaraasi, n'obu baakuba abazigyenderaho." 
Hosea1:8 Ku yaacuukize Lo-ruhama, yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo." 
Hosea1:9 MUKAMA yaamugira ati: Eiziina rye omwete Lo-ami, amkuru ngu Ti bantu bangye; ahabw'okuba timuri bantu bangye, kandi naanye tindi Ruhanga waanyu." 
Hosea1:10 Kwonka omubaro gw'Abaisraeli guryaingana n'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja ogutarikubaasa kurengwa n'obu kwakuba okubarwa; kandi omu mwanya ahu baagambiriirwe ngu, Timuri bantu bangye, niho barigambirirwa ngu, Muri abaana ba Ruhanga ohuriire." 
Hosea1:11 Kandi Abayuda n'Abaisraeli baryateeranirwa hamwe, beetooranire omwebembezi omwe, kandi baryainamuka barugye omuri egyo nsi; ahabw'okuba ekiro kya Yezereeli kiryaba kikuru." 
Hosea2:1 Gira mwene sho oti: Ami; na munyaanyoko omugire oti: Ruhama. 
Hosea2:2 Tongana na nyoko, tongana; Ahabw'okuba ti mukazi wangye, Naanye tindi iba, Aihe obwamaraaya mu maisho ge, N'obushambani bwe ahagati y'amabeere ge," 
Hosea2:3 Ntakaamujweka busha, Nkamugira nk'obu yaazaarwa, Nkamuhindura nk'eihamba, Nkamugira nk'ensi ekarangataine, Nkamwitsa eiriho." 
Hosea2:4 Kandi tindigirira baana be mbabazi, Ahabw'okuba n'ab'obwamaraaya." 
Hosea2:5 Na nyinabo akaraaya, Kandi owaagizire enda yaabo akakora eby'obuhemu; Ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Ndyayekuratira nkunzi zangye, Ezimpa eky'okurya n'eky'okunywa, Ebyoya by'entaama na furakisi, amajuta n'eby'okunywa." 
Hosea2:6 Nikyo naaza kwitsiza omuhanda gwe amahwa, Nkazitira orugo rw'okumuzibira, Akabura oburabo." 
Hosea2:7 Aryakuratira nkunzi ze, Kwonka tarizihika; Aryazisherura, Kwonka tarizibona. Bwanyima aryagira ati: Kangyende, Ngarukire omushaija wangye ow'okubanza; Ahabw'okuba obwo nkaba ndi gye okukira hati." 
Hosea2:8 Kwonka taramanyire, Ku niinye naabaire mmuha Oburo, viinyo n'amajuta, Nkamukanyisiza efeeza n'ezaabu Ezi baakoreseize Baali." 
Hosea2:9 Nikyo ndimwakira oburo bwangye omu igyesha, Na viinyo yangye omu mweru gwayo; Kandi ndyamwaka ebyoya by'entaama byangye na furakisi yangye, Ebyabaire biri eby'okushweka enjuuro ye." 
Hosea2:10 Mbwenu niinyija kworeka butunu obushambani bwe Omu maisho ga nkunzi ze, Tihariho n'omwe orimuunyaka." 
Hosea2:11 Kandi ndyamumaraho ebirikumushemeza byona, Amagyenyi ge, eby'emboneko ze z'ameezi, sabato ze, N'amagyenyi goona agatairweho." 
Hosea2:12 Kandi ndyacwekyereza emizaabibu ye n'emitiini ye, Ebi yaabaire agambaho naagira ati: Ebi n'ebihembo byangye Ebi naahairwe nkunzi zangye. Byona ndyabihindura ekibira, biriirwe kimwe enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa." 
Hosea2:13 Ndyamufubira, mmuture amagyenyi ga Baabaali, Abu yaabaire ayooterera obubaane, Akeehunda empeta omu matu n'amahunde, Akakuratira nkunzi ze; Haza nyowe akanyebwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Hosea2:14 N'ahabw'ekyo reeba, niinyija kumweshengyereza, Mmureete omu ihamba, ngambe gye nawe." 
Hosea2:15 Kandi okwo niyo ndimuheera emizaabibu ye, N'oruhanga rwa Akori nkarugira eirembo ry'amatsiko, Akeetabirayo Ruhanga nk'omu biro by'obuhangare bwe, Nk'omu bunaku obu yaarugiiremu omu nsi ya Misri." 
Hosea2:16 MUKAMA naagira ati: Eryo izooba oryanyeta Ishi, amakuru ngu Ibanye; oryaba otakiinyeta Baali, amakuru ngu Mukama wangye;" 
Hosea2:17 ahabw'okuba ndyaiha omu kanwa ke amaziina ga Baabaali, garekye kugambwaho obundi." 
Hosea2:18 Eryo izooba ndyakuragaanira endagaano n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa n'amahungu g'omu mwanya kandi n'ebirikwekurura ahansi, mmareho obuta na rurara n'orugamba omu nsi, nkureetere kubyama ogaramisiriize." 
Hosea2:19 Kandi ndyakwegambira obugyenyi, obe owangye ebiro byona, nkwegambire obugyenyi omu kuhikiirira, omu bwinganisa, omu kukunda n'omu mbabazi." 
Hosea2:20 Ndyakwegambira obugyenyi omu bwesigwa, obone kumanya MUKAMA." 
Hosea2:21 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Eryo izooba Ndyayetaba eiguru, Naryo ryetabe ensi," 
Hosea2:22 Ensi eyetabe oburo na viinyo n'amajuta, Nabyo byetabe Yezereeli." 
Hosea2:23 Ndyamwebibira omu nsi, Ngirire embabazi otakazigirirwaga, Ngambire abaabaire batari bangye nti: Muri abantu bangye, Nabo bagarukyemu bati: Ori Ruhanga waitu." 
Hosea3:1 Bwanyima MUKAMA yangira ati: Irooko, ogarukye okunde ogwo mukazi orikukundwa nkunzi ye endiijo, kandi enshambani, nk'oku MUKAMA akunda Abaisraeli, n'obu baraabe bakuratira baaruhanga abandi, bakakunda ebiihuro by'emizaabibu eyomire." 
Hosea3:2 Nikwo kumucunguza shekeli z'efeeza ikumi na itaano, na homeri ya sayiri." 
Hosea3:3 Naamugira nti: Noija kumara ebiro bingi ori owangye; torigaruka kuraaya, n'obu kwakuba okuba omukazi w'ondiijo mushaija; kandi naanye nikwo ndiba ahariiwe." 
Hosea3:4 Ahabw'okuba Abaisraeli baryamara ebiro bingi bataine mugabe nari omutegyeki, bataine bitambo n'obu yaakuba enyomyo, kandi bataine efodi, n'obu zaakuba terafiimu." 
Hosea3:5 Bwanyima Abaisraeli baryagaruka, basherure MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo n'omugabe waabo Daudi, baije ahari MUKAMA n'obwoba, n'aha burungi bwe omu biro by'aha muheru." 
Hosea4:1 Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kaya MUKAMA; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA naatonganisa abatuuzi b'omuri egi nsi, Naagira ati: Omu nsi egi tiharimu bwesigwa, nari embabazi, N'obu kwakuba okumanya Ruhanga;" 
Hosea4:2 Kureka okurahira, okubeiha, okwita, okwiba n'okushambana; Abantu n'ebyegyengye; kandi okwita nikukuratwa okundi." 
Hosea4:3 N'ahabw'ekyo ensi neecura, N'abagitwiremu boona nibahwamu amaani, Kandi n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa N'enyonyi z'omu mwanya, Nangwa n'eby'enyanja nibiihwaho." 
Hosea4:4 Kwonka hatagira owaatongana, Kandi hatagira owaatabaaza; Ahakuba iwe munyamurwa 'we, niiwe ndikutonganisa." 
Hosea4:5 Oryateera entsibo nyomushana, Na nabi ateere entsibo naiwe nyekiro, Kandi ndyacwekyereza nyoko." 
Hosea4:6 Abantu bangye nibacwekyerezibwa ahabw'okubura okumanya; Naiwe ahabw'okwanga okumanya Naanye niinyanga ku oba omunyamurwa wangye; Kandi nk'oku oyebirwe ebiragiro bya Ruhanga waawe, Naanye ndyayebwa abaana baawe." 
Hosea4:7 Ei bagarukiire kukanya, Niyo bagarukiire kuncumuraho. Ekitiinisa kyabo niinyija kukihindura okuhemuka." 
Hosea4:8 Nibatungwa ekibi ky'abantu bangye, Nibaruruuhira eby'okushiisha byabo." 
Hosea4:9 Omunyamurwa n'abantu nikyo kimwe; Ndyabafubira ahabw'emitwarize yaabo, Mbazimuurire ahabw'ebi baakozire." 
Hosea4:10 Baryarya, kwonka tibarihaaga, Baryaraaya, kwonka tibarikanya, Ahabw'okuba barekire kweta ahari MUKAMA." 
Hosea4:11 Obwamaraaya, amaarwa n'amaarwa g'omutahe Biita omutima." 
Hosea4:12 Abantu bangye nibeehanuuza aha biti, N'enkoni zaabo nizo zirikuragura. Ahabw'okuba omutima gw'obwamaraaya gubahabize, Baatsigaho Ruhanga waabo, baaza kuraaya." 
Hosea4:13 Nibatambira ebitambo aha mitwe y'enshozi, Booterera obubaane aha bibungo, Ahansi y'emyela n'emilebene n'emyalooni Ahabw'okugira ekicuucu kirungi. Nikyo bahara baanyu baabeereire baamaraaya, N'abagore baanyu bakashambana." 
Hosea4:14 Bahara baanyu ku bariraaya, tindibafubira, N'obu baakuba abagore baanyu ku barishambana, Ahabw'okuba n'abashaija bo bonka nibeekiika aha rubaju na baamaraaya, Batamba ebitambo bakwataniise n'enshambani; N'ahabw'ekyo eihanga eritaine kwetegyereza, riryahwerekyerera." 
Hosea4:15 Iwe Israeli, waabaire maraaya, Omanye otasiisira Yuda. Otaza omuri Gilugaali, Otainamuka Besaveeni, N'obu kwakuba okurahira oti, Nindahira MUKAMA ohuriire." 
Hosea4:16 Nk'enyana etarikutsimbuka, Nikwo na Israeli ari empiga; Nimugira ngu MUKAMA naabaasa kubariisa Nk'omwana gw'entaama oguri omu iriisizo rihango?" 
Hosea4:17 Efuraimu ayohongyeire ebishushani ebirikuramibwa; Mumurugyeho. 
Hosea4:18 N'ekigombe ky'abasinzi, nibeehayo kuraaya; Nibakunda okuhemuka okukira ekitiinisa." 
Hosea4:19 Omuyaga gubabumbatiire omu mapapa gaagwo, Baryaitwa enshoni ahabw'amatambiro gaabo." 
Hosea5:1 Imwe banyamurwa 'mwe, nimuhurire eki; Naimwe ab'enju ya Israeli, mutegye amatu; Kandi naimwe ab'enju y'omugabe nimuhurire, Ahabw'okuba orubanja n'orwanyu, Mubaire omutego ahari Mizipa, N'ekigoye ekitegire ahari Tabora."
