Hosea5:2 Obusya bwa Shitimu babutimbire, bwahika okuzimu, Kwonka boona dyabahana." 
Hosea5:3 Efuraimu nimmumanya, Na Israeli tanyesherekire; Ahakuba iwe, Efuraimu, hati obaire maraaya, Israeli yaasiisikara." 
Hosea5:4 Ebi barikukora tibirikubareka Kugarukira Ruhanga waabo; Ahabw'okuba omutima gw'obwamaraaya gubarimu, Tibarikumanya MUKAMA." 
Hosea5:5 Amaryo ga Israeli niwe mushinja we, Efuraimu aryateerera entsibo omu kutahikiirira kwe, Kandi na Yuda aryateera entsibo hamwe nabo." 
Hosea5:6 Baryagyenda n'amasyo gaabo g'ente n'ag'entaama Kusherura MUKAMA; Kwonka tibarimubona, Ahabw'okuba abarugireho." 
Hosea5:7 Bareebize MUKAMA, Ahabw'okuba abaana abu baazaire n'abanyamahanga. Nibaija kumirwa juba n'emisiri yaabo Okwezi kutakabonekire." 
Hosea5:8 Muteerere enzamba omuri Gibea, N'eikondere omuri Raama; Muteerere enduuru Besaveeni; Iwe Benyamiini, tetema!" 
Hosea5:9 Efuraimu neija kuhinduka eihamba Aha izooba ry'okufubirirwaho. Nindanga omu nganda za israeli Ekitaribura kubaho. 
Hosea5:10 Abanyiginya ba Yuda bahindukire Nk'abarikukuura ebiti by'emyatano. Ndyabashukaho ekiniga kyangye nk'amaizi. 
Hosea5:11 Efuraimu naahatwa, asingyereirwe omu rubanja; Ahabw'okuba akamariirira kukuratira ebitaine mugasho." 
Hosea5:12 Nikyo mbeerereire Efuraimu nk'ekiyenje, N'enju ya Yuda nk'emungu." 
Hosea5:13 Efuraimu ku yaareebire endwara ye, Na Yuda yaareeba obuhuta bwe, Efuraimu yaaza Asiria, Yaatuma aha mugabe Yarebu. Kwonka tarikubaasa kubakiza, N'obu kwakuba okutamba obuhuta bwanyu." 
Hosea5:14 Ahabw'okuba ndyabeera Efuraimu nk'entare, Mbeere enju ya Yakobo nk'omugunju gwayo. Nyowe, nyowe nyenka, niinyija kutaagura, nyegyendere, Ntware eki nyitsire, habure ow'okukijuna." 
Hosea5:15 Ndyagyenda, nyegarukire omu mwanya gwangye, Okuhitsya obu baryemera ekicumuro kyabo, bakansherura. Omu kubonabona kwabo nimwo barinsherurira," 
Hosea6:1 Nibagira bati: Nimwije, tugarukire MUKAMA; Ahabw'okuba niwe yaatuhutaize, kandi niwe aritutambira; Niwe yaatuteire, kandi niwe aritushemba." 
Hosea6:2 Bwanyima y'ebiro bibiri, aryatuhimbuura; Kandi aha kiro kya kashatu arytuzoora, Tubone kuguma turi abahuriire omu maisho ge." 
Hosea6:3 Ka tumanye MUKAMA, tugumizemu kumumanya; Okwija kwe ni nk'omushekye, tikuribura; Aryatuhikaho nk'enjura, Nke'njura ya katumba erikwitirira eitaka." 
Hosea6:4 Iwe Efuraimu, mbwenu nkugire nta? Iwe Yuda, nkugire nta? Okukunda kwawe ni nk'ekicu ky'omu kasheeshe, Ni nk'orume orutsya bukiri kare." 
Hosea6:5 Nikyo naabakondeseize baanabi, Nkabaita n'ebigambo by'omu kanwa kangye; Kandi emanja zangye ezi ncwa ni nk'omushana ogubuga hoona;" 
Hosea6:6 Ahabw'okuba eki ndikwenda n'embabazi, ti bitambo; Kandi okumanya Ruhanga, nkukunda okukira ebitambo byokize." 
Hosea6:7 Kwonka bakaita endagaano nka Adamu, Bandeebezayo." 
Hosea6:8 Gileadi n'orurembo rw'enkozi z'ebibi Orusiisirwe eshagama. 
Hosea6:9 Nk'oku abambuzi bagwera omuntu, Nikwo n'abanyamurwa beeteerana, Bakaitira abantu omu muhanda ogurikuza Shekemu; Eego, bakakorerayo eby'obushambani." 
Hosea6:10 Ndeebire ekihagaro omu nju ya Israeli; Okwo niyo obwamaraaya bwa Efuraimu buri, Israeli esiisikaire." 
Hosea6:11 Kandi naiwe, Yuda, eigyesha rikuteereirweho, Omu bunaku obu ndigaruriramu abantu bangye, nimbaiha omu bukwatwa." 
Hosea7:1 Ku mba niinyenda kutambira Israeli, Okutahikiirira kwa Efuraimu N'ebibi ebi Abasamaria barikukora bishuuruuka; Ahabw'okuba bakora eby'obugobya, Omushuma afumura enju, Kandi aheeru omutwe gw'abambuzi gunyaga;" 
Hosea7:2 Haza tibateekateeka, Ku nyowe nyijuka ebibi byona ebi bakora. Hati ebi batuura nibakora bibeehinguriririize, Kandi biri omu maisho gangye." 
Hosea7:3 Bashemeza omugabe n'obubi bwabo, N'abanyiginya bashemerererwa ebishuba byabo." 
Hosea7:4 Boona n'enshambani, Bari nk'ekyoma ky'okuteekamu emigaati, Eki omuteeki waayo areka kwenegyezamu omuriro Okwiha aha kubumbabumba omugaati okuhitsya aha kutumba kwagwo." 
Hosea7:5 Aha izooba ry'omugabe waitu abanyiginya Bakarwazibwa esindo y'amaarwa, Nawe yaatezya emikono n'abagaaniizi." 
Hosea7:6 Ahabw'okuba emitima yaabo neebugumwamu enaama mbi; Ekiniga kyabo kiraara nikyaka mpora-mpora; Bukisheesha kyaka nk'omuriro gurikubuguma. 
Hosea7:7 Boona nibootsya nk'ekyoma ky'okuteekamu emigaati, Bashonshomera abaramuzi baabo. Abagabe baabo boona bagwire, Tihariho n'omwe omuribo orikuntakira." 
Hosea7:8 Efuraimu naayejwanzya n'amahanga; Efuraimu ni nk'omugaati ogutahindwirwe. 
Hosea7:9 Abanyamahanga nibamumaramu amaani, Kwonka we tarikukimanya. Enju zimubarangaine omu mutwe, Kwonka we tarikukimanya." 
Hosea7:10 Amaryo ga Israeli nigo mushinja we, Kwonka tibakagarukiraga MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, N'obu kwakuba okumusherura ahabw'ebyo byona." 
Hosea7:11 Efuraimu ni nk'enkombe, Efiire omutima, etaine bwengye. Naatakira Misri, ahungira Asiria." 
Hosea7:12 Ku bariba nbagyenda, ndyabarengyezaho ekigoye kyangye; Kandi ndyabahanura nk'enyonyi z'omu mwanya, Mbahane ahabw'ebibi ebi barikukora." 
Hosea7:13 Baryakareeba, ahabw'okuba barazire, bandugaho. Baryacwekyerera, ahabw'okuba bangomeire! Nkaayenzire kubacungura, Kwonka nibambeiherera." 
Hosea7:14 Tibarikuntakira baihire aha mutima, Kureka nibaboroogyera aha bitanda byabo, Nibeeteeranira hamwe ahabw'engano na viinyo, Nyowe bangomera." 
Hosea7:15 N'obu ndaabe naabeegyeise, nkaha emikono yaabo amaani, Kwonka banyiniire enaama mbi." 
Hosea7:16 Nibeehongyera Baali; Bari nk'obuta oburikureebya. Abanyiginya baabo baryaitwa rurara, Nibaturwa orubwa rw'endimi zaabo. Eki nikyo kiribashekyereza omu nsi ya Misri." 
Hosea8:1 Ta enzamba aha munwa, Ahakuba eishamba nirizeereera aha nju ya MUKAMA, Ahabw'okuba baitsire endagaano yangye, Baashiisha ebiragiro byangye." 
Hosea8:2 Nibantakira nibagira bati: Ruhanga waitu, itwe Abaisraeli nitukumanya." 
Hosea8:3 Israeli anagire ebirungi; Omuzigu aryamuhiiga. 
Hosea8:4 Bakeemeka abagabe, ntabaragiire; Baayeteeraho abategyeki, ntarikukimanya; Baakora ebishushani ebirikuramibwa Omu feeza n'ezaabu zaabo kwecwekyereza." 
Hosea8:5 Iwe Samaria, nyangire enyana yaawe. Ekiniga kyangye nikibaakaho. Baryahitsya hi okuguma batyo Batashemeziibwe omuri Israeli?" 
Hosea8:6 Egyo nyana ya Samarita ti Ruhanga; Omuheesi niwe yaagiheesire, Eryacwagurika." 
Hosea8:7 Ahakuba nibabiba omuyaga; Bwanyima baryagyesha akasooroora. Omugusha gukuzire, tigwine bikumba; Tigurirugamu njuma; N'obu zaakurugamu, Abanyamahanga bakaazirya." 
Hosea8:8 Abaisraeli bamizirwekwo Na mbwenu baahikire omu mahanga, Bari nk'ekintu kitaine mugasho." 
Hosea8:9 Ahabw'okuba bainamukire Asiria, Ni nk'enturegye erikuzengyerera yonka; Efuraimu aguriire nkunzi ze." 
Hosea8:10 N'obu baraaguriirire ab'okubaha emikono omu mahanga, Kwonka ndyabateeranira ahamwe juba, Bamare omwanya mukye Batakishuka majuta aha bagabe n'aha banyiginya kubeemeka." 
Hosea8:11 Ahabw'okuba Efuraimu akanyiise amatambiro g'okukoreraho ebibi, Ago matambiro gamuhindukiire ag'okukoreraho ebibi." 
Hosea8:12 Kuri naamuhandikiire ebiragiro obukumi, Bikaateekateekirweho nk'eby'enduga-mahanga." 
Hosea8:13 Bakunda kutamba ebitambo; Batamba enyana, bagirya; Kwonka MUKAMA tabishemerererwa. Mbwenu naija kwijuka eby'okushiisha byabo, Abafubire ahabw'ebibi byabo; Bagarukye Misri." 
Hosea8:14 Ahabw'okuba Israeli ayebirwe Omuhangi we, Yaayeyombekyera zaanyaruju; Na Yuda akanyiise endembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare; Kwonka ndyatweka omuriro omu ndembo ze, Gwotsye ebigo bye." 
Hosea9:1 Iwe Israeli 'we, otashemererwa! Oteesiima nk'agandi mahanga, Ahabw'okuba akaraaya, waatsigaho Ruhanga waawe, Waakunda ebihembo by'obwamaraaya Aha mbuga zoona ezi bahuuriraho." 
Hosea9:2 Kwonka eby'aha mbuga n'eby'omu manyuukiro ga viinyo tibiribatunga, Kandi na viinyo y'omutahe eryababurira." 
Hosea9:3 Tibariguma mu nsi ya MUKAMA, Kureka Abaefuraimu baryagaruka Misri; Kandi Asiria baryatungirwayo eby'okurya bitashemeire." 
Hosea9:4 Tibarishukira MUKAMA mpongano za viinyo ez'okunywa, N'obu kwakuba okumugwisa gye n'ebitambo byabo. Eby'okurya byabo biryaba nk'eby'abari omu rufu; Abaribiryaho boona baryasiisikara; Ahabw'okuba eby'okurya byabo biryaba biri eby'okubatambira enjara kwonka; Tibirishuuza mu nju ya MUKAMA." 
Hosea9:5 Mbwenu muryakora ki aha izooba ry'okuteerana okurikwera, N'aha izooba ry'obugyenyi bwa MUKAMA?" 
Hosea9:6 Ahabw'okuba reeba, nibaza Asiria; Misri eryabarunda hamwe, Memufiisi ebaziikye; Ebintu byabo by'efeeza eby'obuguzi bwingi biryashwekwa ebicurangyenyi, N'amahwa gamere omu mahema gaabo." 
Hosea9:7 Obunaku bw'okufubirwa buhikire, Obunaku bw'okuhoorwa nabwo buhikire; Israeli naija kukimanya. Nabi n'omushema, N'oriho omuzimu agwire eiraro, Ahabw'eby'okushiisha byawe bingi N'orwango rwawe rwingi." 
Hosea9:8 Nabi niwe murinzi wa Efuraimu, Abantu ba Ruhanga wangye, Kwonka ei arikuza yoona hariyo omutego gw'omutegi w'enyonyi, N'omu nju ya Ruhanga we harimu obwangani." 
Hosea9:9 Beesiisire barengyesereza Nk'omu biro bya Gibea; Aryaijuka eby'okushiihsa byabo, Abafubire ahabw'ebibi byabo." 
Hosea9:10 Nkashanga Israeli Ari nk'emizaabibu y'omu ihamba, Naareeba baashwenkuriimwe Bari nk'ebyana by'omutiini ogurikujigaija omu mwaka gwagwo ogw'okubanza. Kwonka baahika Baali-peori, Baayehongyera Baali, Baahinduka ekirikunugwa nk'ekyo kintu eki baakunzire." 
Hosea9:11 Ekitiinisa kya Efuraimu kiryaguruka nk'enyonyi, kibure; Habure okuzaara, n'okugira enda, n'okubaka." 
Hosea9:12 N'obu baryorora abaana, Ndyabareetera okufiisa, abaana baabo bahweho. Eshi ku ndibatsigaho, baryakareeba!" 
Hosea9:13 Nk'oku ndikureeba, abaana ba Efuraimu bateereirweho okutwarwa omu bukwatwa; Efuraimu aryayebembera abaana be kuza kwitwa." 
Hosea9:14 Obahe, ai MUKAMA- Mbwenu noija kubaha ki? Obahe okuguma nibarugwamu enda N'amabeere goomangataine." 
Hosea9:15 Buri kibi kyabo nikishangwa omuri Gilugaali; Okwo niyo naabandiize kubanga. Ndyababinga omu nju yangye Ahabw'obubi bw'emicwe yaabo. Tindigaruka kubakunda; Abategyeki baabo boona n'abagomi. 
Hosea9:16 Abaefuraimu bateirwe, Emizi yaabo eyomire, Tibaryana byana; N'obu baribyana, Ndyaita abaana baabo abarikukundwa." 
Hosea9:17 Ruhanga wangye aryabacwa ahabw'okutamuhurira, Babe ebizengyerezi omu mahanga." 
Hosea10:1 Israeli n'omuzaabibu guyumbize, Ogurikwana ebyana. Ei agarukiire kwana ebyana bingi, Niyo agarukiire kwombeka amatambiro maingi; Nk'oku ensi eyeyongyeire kweyombekyera enyomyo nungi." 
Hosea10:2 Omutima gwabo ti gw'amazima; N'ahabw'ekyo bashemereire kugiibwaho orubanja. MUKAMA aryasheenya amatambiro gaabo, Acwekyereze enyomyo zaabo." 
Hosea10:3 Ahabw'okuba hati nibaija kugira bati: Titwine mugabe, ahabw'okutoorobera MUKAMA; Mbwenu omugabe akaatugasira ki?" 
Hosea10:4 Bagamba ebigambo bya busha, Baragaana endagaano nibarahira ebishuba; Nikyo okucwa kubi emanja kwaza kumerera omu nsi, Nk'oku orumbugu rumera omu misiri ehingire." 
Hosea10:5 Abatuuzi ba Samaria nibaitwa obwoba Ahabw'enyana ya Besaveeni erikuramibwa. Abantu baayo baryagicurira, N'abanyamurwa baayo bagiboroogyere, Nibarizibwa ekitiinisa kyayo ekigirugireho." 
Hosea10:6 Eego, ekyo kintu kiryatwarwa Asiria Kutoijerwa omugabe Yarebu. Efuraimu aryakwatwa eshoni, Na Israeli ahemukye ahabw'ekishushani kye ekirikuramibwa." 
Hosea10:7 Omugabe wa Samaria aryahwerekyerera, Nk'ekishate ky'ekiti ekirikuzeereera aha maizi." 
Hosea10:8 Emyanya mikuru ya Aveeni ey'okuramizamu, Ekibi kya Israeli, eryacwekyerezibwa. Amahwa n'amatojo garyamera aha matambiro gaayo; Batakire enshozi nibagira bati: Mutushwekye, N'ebibungo bati: Mutugwere." 
Hosea10:9 Iwe Israeli, okwiha omu biro bya Gibea otuura noocumura; Okwo niyo baagumiriizemu. Nimugira ngu orugamba tiruribahikiraho omuri Gibea?" 
Hosea10:10 Ndyateera abo bantu b'ebyegyengye, mbafubire; Kandi amahanga garyteerana kubarwanisa, Ku bariba bafubiirwe ahabw'ekibi kyabo ekirimu bibiri." 
Hosea10:11 Efuraimu akaba ari nk'enyana eyegyesiibwe, Eyaabaire ekunda kuhuura; Naasaasira ebitsya bye birungi. Kwonka Efuraimu ogwo niinyija kumukorera omugamba, Yuda ahingye, Na Yakobo ayetabirire." 
Hosea10:12 Mwebibire okuhikiirira, Mugyeshe embabazi, Mutabire endaara zaanyu; Ahabw'okuba obunaku bw'okusherura MUKAMA buhikire, Abone kwija kubagwisaho enjura y'okujunwa." 
Hosea10:13 Mukahinga obubi, Mwagyesha okutahikiirira, Mwarya ebyana by'ebishuba; Ahabw'okuba mukeesiga ebigaari byanyu by'orugamba, N'obwingi bw'abarwani baanyu." 
Hosea10:14 Nikyo haribeeraho omurabanamu gw'obweme omu bantu baanyu; Kandi ebigo byanyu byona biryacwekyerezibwa, Nk'oku Shalumaani yaacwekyereize Besarubeeli aha izooba ry'orugamba, Obu abazire baasingyerwa n'abaana baabo." 
Hosea10:15 Okwo nikwo muritwazibwa, imwe nju ya Israeli 'mwe, Nimuturwa obubi bwanyu oburengyesereize. Omugabe wa Israeli aryamarirwaho kimwe Omushekye nigujuguta." 
Hosea11:1 Israeli ku yaabaire akiri omwana, nkamukunda, Naayeta mutabani wangye kuruga Misri." 
Hosea11:2 Ei naagarukiire kubeeta, Niyo baagarukiire kundugaho, Bakaguma nibatambira Baabaali, Nibooterera ebishushani ebirikuramibwa obubaane." 
Hosea11:3 Hoona ninye naayegyeise Abaefuraimu kugyenda, Nkabakiikira omu mikono; Kwonka tibaramanyire ku niinye naabatambiire." 
Hosea11:4 Nkabairiza haihi n'emigoye y'esaasi N'emirunga ya rukundo, Nkababeera nk'orikuyuzya enkomo aha bitsya byabo, Nainama, naabagaburira." 
Hosea11:5 Baryagaruka Misri, Kandi Omuasiria niwe ariba omugabe waabo, Ahabw'okuba bangire kungarukira." 
Hosea11:6 Endembo zaabo ziryaguubwaho rurara, Ecwekyereze empimbi z'amarembo gaabo, Ebamarireho omu bigo byabo." 
Hosea11:7 Abantu bangye bagwereire orubaju rw'okundugaho; Nikyo bateereirweho omugamba gw'obuhuuku, Kandi tihaine origubaihaho." 
Hosea11:8 Iwe Efuraimu, nimbaasa nta kukureka? Iwe Israeli, nimbaasa nta kukuhayo? Nimbaasa nta kukuhindura nka Aduma, Nari kukugira, nk'oku naagizire Zeboimu? Omutima gwangye nigwesikura, Embabazi zangy enizeeyongyera kuntagatsa omutima." 
Hosea11:9 Tindikwija kukora nk'ekiniga kyangye kingi oku kiri; Tindigaruka kucwekyereza Efuraimu; Ahabw'okuba ndi Ruhanga, tindi muntu, Orikwera ori ahagati omuriimwe; Kandi tindiija kuhwerekyereza." 
Hosea11:10 Baryakuratira MUKAMA, Atsinde nk'entare; Eego, aryatsinda, Abaana be baije nibatetema, nibaruga oburengyerwa-izooba." 
Hosea11:11 Baryaija nk'enyonyi, nibatetema nibaruga Misri, Baije nk'enkombe, nibaruga omu nsi ya Asiria. Kandi ndyabagarura omu maka gaabo, nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Hosea11:12 Efuraimu anyehinguririziise ebishuba, N'ab'enju ya Israeli baanyehinguririzisa obugobya; Kwonka Yuda we naakimanywa Ruhanga, Kandi n'omwesigwa ahari Orikwera." 
Hosea12:1 Abaefuraimu nibatungwa omuyaga, Kandi eizooba ryona nibakuratira omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba; Nibakanyisa ebishuba n'obubisha; Nibaragaana endagaano n'Abaasiria, Kandi n'amajuta nigatwarwa omuri Misri." 
Hosea12:2 MUKAMA naatonganisa Yuda, Kandi aryafubira Yakobo nk'oku emitwarize ye eri, Amuzimuurire nk'oku ebi akozire biri." 
Hosea12:3 Akakwata ekitsintsiino kya mukur rwe, akiri omu nda; Kandi ku yaabaire omushaija, yaahakanisa Ruhaga." 
Hosea12:4 Eego, akahakanisa maraika, yaamusinga, aarira, kandi yaamweshengyereza. Yaabugabugana na Ruhanga Beseeli; Okwo niyo Ruhanga yaagambiire nawe." 
Hosea12:5 Niwe MUKAMA, Ruhanga ow'amahe; MUKAMA niryo iziina rye." 
Hosea12:6 Mbwenu, ahabw'okuhwerwa Ruhanga waawe, garuka, Ohamire kimwe aha mbabazi n'amazima, Kandi ogume otegyereze Ruhanga waawe." 
Hosea12:7 Engobya eine eminzaani y'ebishuba etaruga mu ngaro, Ekunda kuzimba." 
Hosea12:8 Efuraimu agizire ati: Eshi ndi omutungi, Nyetungiire eitungo; Kwonka eitungo rye ryona tiriribaasa Kumwihaho rubanja oru yaayereeteire." 
Hosea12:9 Ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe Okwiha obu waabaire ori omu nsi ya Misri; Ndyagaruka nkutuuze omu mahema, Nk'omu biro by'obugyenyi obwatairweho." 
Hosea12:10 Nkagamba na baanabi, Kandi niinye naakanyiise okworekwa. Nkagambira abantu enfumu nindaba omuri baanabi." 
Hosea12:11 Ku haraabe hariho okutahikiirira omuri Gileadi, Buzimazima Abagileadi baryahinduka busha; Ku baraabe nibatambira enimi omuri Gilugaali, Amatambiro gaabo garyaba nk'ekirundo ky'amabaare, Agarunzire ahati y'emisiri." 
Hosea12:12 (Yakobo akahungira omu nsi ya Aramu; Okwo niyo Israeli yaakorereire omukazi, Akariisa entaama, ngu abone kushwera.)" 
Hosea12:13 MUKAMA akaiha Israeli Misri, yaamwihisayo nabi, Kandi nabi ogwo niwe yaamugumizeho." 
Hosea12:14 Efuraimu akagwisa kubi munonga MUKAMA; N'ahabw'ekyo MUKAMA aryamureka, orubanja rw'okusheesha eshagama rumugumeho, N'ebijumo bye abimugarureho." 
Hosea13:1 Efuraimu ku yaabaire agamba, abantu batetema, Ayetunguura omuri Israeli; Kwonka ku yaayereetsireho orubanja ahabwa Baali, yaafa." 
Hosea13:2 Kandi na hati nibakyeyongyera kushiisha, Nibeeheeshera ebishushani ebiyagiibwe, Ebishushani ebirikurambiwa ebirikukorwa omu feeza zaabo, Byona nibikorwa abanyamyoga. Nibagira bati: Mube nibyo mwatambira. N'eihano, abantu kunywegyera enyana!" 
Hosea13:3 Nikyo baribeera nk'oruho rw'omu kasheehse, Kandi nk'orume orutsya bukiri kare, Nk'ebishushunga ebirikutuntumurwa akasooroora aha mbuga, Nari nk'omwika ogurikuruga omu mahega." 
Hosea13:4 Ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe Okwiha obu waabaire ori omu nsi ya Misri. Tihariho Ruhanga ondiijo ou murikumanya, kureka nyowe; Kandi ahatari nyowe, tihariho ondiijo mujuni." 
Hosea13:5 Niinye naakumanyire obu waabaire ori omu ihamba Omu nsi y'omushana mwingi; 
Hosea13:6 Kwonka ku baariire, baiguta, Baahaaga, emitima yaabo yaayetunguura; N'ahabw'ekyo baanyebwa." 
Hosea13:7 Nikyo ndibabeerera nk'entare, Nkabagwera aha rubaju rw'omuhanda nk'engwe." 
Hosea13:8 Ndyabagurukira, mbagweho nk'edubu eyakirwe ebyana byayo, Ntaagure ebifuba byabo; Kandi okwo niyo ndibashonshomerera nk'entare, Enyamaishwa mbi ekabataagura." 
Hosea13:9 Ai bambe Israeli, mbwenu ku ndiba ninkucwekyereza, N'oha oribaasa kukuha emikono?" 
Hosea13:10 Omugabe waawe ow'okukujuna arahi? Abanyiginya baawe boona ba'okukurinda barahi, Abu waashabire oti: Mpa omugabe n'abanyiginya?" 
Hosea13:11 Nkakuha abagabe ngwirwe kubi, Kandi naabaihaho nyine ekiniga kingi." 
Hosea13:12 Okutahikiirira kwa Efuraimu kukomire hamwe, N'ekibi kye kibiikirwe." 
Hosea13:13 Ebisha by'omukazi orikurumwa nibiija ahabwe; Kwonka n'omwana otaine bwengye, Ahabw'okuba hati takatandikire kushuuriza." 
Hosea13:14 Nimugira ngu ndyabacungura, mbaihe omu maani g'Okuzimu, Kandi mbacungure, mbakize Rufu? Iwe Rufu 'we, ebibonaboneso byawe birahi? Iwe Kuzimu 'we, okucwekyereza kwawe kurahi? Tinkiine ku ndaabagirire esaasi." 
Hosea13:15 N'obu yaakukurira gye omuri beene-ishe, Omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba, omuyaga gwa MUKAMA, guryaija Niguruga omu ihamba; Enshuro ye eryayoma, N'eiziba rye riryakarangatana. Guryamara omu mabiikiro ge Ebintu byona eby'obuguzi bwingi." 
Hosea13:16 Samaria eryagiibwaho orubanja rwayo, Ahabw'okuba ekagomera Ruhanga waayo. Abantu baamwo baryaitwa rurara, Abeereere baabo baryateerwa ahansi, bacwagurukye, N'abakazi baabo abaine enda baryabafumurana." 
Hosea14:1 Iwe Israeli 'we, garuka ahari MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe, Ahabw'okuba okwagwisibwa eby'okushiisha byawe." 
Hosea14:2 Mugyende n'ebigambo, mugarukire MUKAMA, Mumugire muti: Twiheho eby'okushiisha byona, Oyakiire ebirungi; Naitwe nitwija kuhonga empongano z'eminwa yaitu erikuhimbisa." 
Hosea14:3 Asiria teritujuna; Titurigyendera ha mbaraasi; Titurigaruka kugira ebikozirwe emikono yaitu, Tuti: Muri baaruhanga baitu. Ahabw'okuba omuriiwe nimwo efuuzi zishanga embabazi." 
Hosea14:4 Ndyabakiza okugaruka enyima kwabo, Mbakunde, bataine ki bahaire; Ahabw'okuba tinkibainiirwe kiniga." 
Hosea14:5 Ndyabeera Israeli nk'orume, Arabye ebirabyo nk'emyangangye, Atsimbe emizi nka Lebanooni." 
Hosea14:6 Amataagi ge garyajanjamura, Oburungi bwe bube nk'omuzeituuni, N'omugaju gwe gube nk'ogwa Lebanooni." 
Hosea14:7 Baryagaruka, batuure ahansi y'ekicuucu kyangye; Baryabengyeya nk'omusiri, Barabye nk'omuzaabibu, N'omugaju gwabo gube nk'ogwa viinyo ya Lebanooni." 
Hosea14:8 Efuraimu aryagira ati: Kandi nkiine kakwate ki n'ebishushani ebirikuramibwa? Mmwetabire, kandi ndyamutaho amaisho. Ndi nk'omuberooshi guyumbize; Ebyana byawe niinye birugaho." 
Hosea14:9 Oine obwengye weena ayetegyereze ebyo; Oine okwetegyereza, abimanye; Ahabw'okuba emihanda ya MUKAMA egororokire, Kandi abahikiriire baryagigyendaramu, Kwonka abasiisi baryagigwamu." 
Joel1:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyaizire ahari Yoeli mwene Pesueli. 
Joel1:2 Imwe bagurusi 'mwe, nimuhurire eki; Naimwe mwena abatwire omu nsi, mutegye amatu! Ebintu nk'ebi birabaireho omu biro byanyu, Nari omu biro bya baashwenkuriimwe?" 
Joel1:3 Mubiteekyerereze abaana baanyu, Abaana baanyu babiteekyerereze abaabo, N'abaabo baryabiteekyerereza abaijukuruza." 
Joel1:4 Ebi rushanda etsigire, Biriirwe kahembwe. Ebi kahembwe etsigire, Biriirwe ebitootera; Kandi ebi ebitootera bitsigire, Biriirwe ikuura." 
Joel1:5 Imwe basinzi 'mwe, nimusisiimukye, murire; Imwe mwena abanywi b'amaarwa, muboroogye, Ahabw'okuburirwa amaarwa g'omutahe, Ahabw'okuba gacwekire, tigarigaruka mu kanwa kaanyu." 
Joel1:6 Ahakuba eihanga rihurwire, ryateera ensi yangye, Eihanga ry'amaani eritarikubarwa; Amaino gaaryo ni nk'ag'entare, N'ag'enshongyezo ni nk'ag'entare enkazi." 
Joel1:7 Rimazireho emizaabibu yangye, Ryahenda emitiini yangye, Ryagimaraho ebishushu, ryabinaga ahansi; Amataagi gaayo gaatsigara nigeera." 
Joel1:8 Tonzya nk'omwishiki empangare oyezirikire ekiguniya, Orikucurira obaire naayenda kumushwera." 
Joel1:9 Empongano z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa Zicwirwe omu nju ya MUKAMA; Abanyamurwa abarikuheereza MUKAMA nibacura. 
Joel1:10 Emisiri emazirweho, ensi ecuramiriirwe; Ahabw'okuba engano zihweireho, Viinyo eyomire, kandi amajuta gabuzire." 
Joel1:11 Imwe bahingi 'mwe, nimushoberwe, Imwe abasharizi b'emizaabibu, muboroogye, Muririre engano na sayiri; Ahabw'okuba emyaka y'omu misiri efiire." 
Joel1:12 Omuzaabibu niguhotoka, Omutiini nigukabakaba, Emikomamahanga, emikindo n'ebiti by'amapeera, Nangwa n'ebiti byona eby'omu misiri byomire; Kandi okushemererwa kuhweire omu bantu." 
Joel1:13 Imwe banyamurwa 'mwe, nimwezirikye ebiguniya, mutonzye; Naimwe abahereza aha itambiro, muboroogye! Imwe baheereza ba Ruhanga wangye 'mwe, Nimwije museese ekiro mujwaire ebigunyiya; Ahabw'okuba empongano z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa Zicwirwe omu nju ya Ruhanga waanyu." 
Joel1:14 Mweze eizooba ry'okwesiibyakwo, Mwetere abantu okuteerana okurikwera. Muteeranire hamwe abakuru N'abatwire omu nsi egi boona, Baije omu nju ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, Mumutakire." 
Joel1:15 Ai bambe! Ahabw'okuba eizooba rya MUKAMA riri haihi, Niriija riri nk'okucwekyereza okurikuruga aha W'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Joel1:16 Beitu eby'okurya tibituhweireho nitubireeba, Okushemererwa n'okwesiima bikahwa omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu?" 
Joel1:17 Embibo zigwire omu itaka Ebitara n'emirangara, Amabiikiro gasheenyukire ahabw'okubura engano." 
Joel1:18 Amatungo nigaboroogyerana! Amasyo g'ente gashobeirwe ahabw'okubura obunyaatsi; Nangwa n'amasyo g'entaama gaburaburiirwe. 
Joel1:19 Ai MUKAMA, niiwe ndikutakira. Ahabw'okuba omuriro gumazireho Amariisizo g'omu ihamba, N'endimi zaagwo zookize ebiti byona eby'omu ishwa." 
Joel1:20 Nangwa n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa nizikutakira, Ahabw'okuba otugyera twomire, Kandi omuriro gumazireho amariisizo g'omu ihamba." 
Joel2:1 Muteerere enzamba omuri Saayuuni; Muteerere enduuru aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera! K'abatwire omu nsi boona bateteme, Ahabw'okuba eizooba rya MUKAMA, niriija, riri haihi," 
Joel2:2 Eizooba ry'omwirima n'ekibunda, Eizooba ry'ebicu n'omwirima ndindindi! Eihanga rihango kandi ery'amaani rishwekire ebibungo nk'omwirima; Okwiha iranaira enzigye ezirikushusha zityo tizikabahoga, Kandi na bwanyima yaazo tizirigaruka kubaho Nangwa n'omu myaka yoona ey'obusingye oburikurataho." 
Joel2:3 Omuriro nigurya busha omu maisho gaazo, Kandi enyima yaazo endimi z'omuriro nizibuguma. Omu maisho gaazo ensi neeshusha nk'ekibanja kya Edeni, Kwonka enyima yaazo n'eihamba eririmu busha; Tihaine kintu kyona ekirikuzikira." 
Joel2:4 Emisusire yaazo ni nk'ey'embaraasi, Kandi niziiruka nk'embaraasi z'orugamba." 
Joel2:5 Niziguruka aha mitwe y'ebibungo, Nizihoorera nk'ebigaari by'orugamba, Nk'okubarabaruka kw'omuriro ogurikwotsya embuba, Nk'eihe ry'amaani eritengire orugamba." 
Joel2:6 Omu maisho gaazo abantu baine obusaasi; Ahamaisho ga boona hahinduriize. 
Joel2:7 Niziteera nk'abarwani, Nizitemba engo z'amabaare nk'engabo, Buri rumwe nirugyenda ruturumbwize; Tizirikushiisha mishorongo." 
Joel2:8 Tizirikubandana, Buri rumwe nirugyenda omu muhanda gwarwo, Nizitwarana ziraba omu macumu, Kandi tizikwemerezibwa." 
Joel2:9 Niziguruka, zigwa aha rurembo, Ziirukira aha ngo z'amabaare; Zitemba, zitaaha omu maju, Ziraba omu madirisa nk'abashuma." 
Joel2:10 Ensi neezitengyetera omumaisho, N'eiguru naryo niritengyeta. Eizooba n'okwezi bishwekwa omwirima, N'enyonyoozi zireka kwaka." 
Joel2:11 MUKAMA naimutsya eiraka rye omu maisho g'eihe rye, Ahabw'okuba eihe rye ni rihango munonga, Kandi orikuhikiiriza ekigambo kye n'ow'amaani. Ahakuba eizooba rya MUKAMA ni rikuru, kandi ni ritiinisa munonga; N'oha owaakuryemera?" 
Joel2:12 MUKAMA naagira ati: Kwonka na hati Mungarukire n'emitima yaanyu yoona, Nimwesiibyakwo, nimurira, kandi nimucura." 
Joel2:13 Mutaagure emitima yaanyu, ti by'okujwara byanyu, Kandi muhindukire MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, Ahabw'okuba aba ow'embabazi, agira esaasi, Tarahuka kuguubwa kubi, aijwire rukundo etahinduka. Kandi ayegarukamu, areka kureeta akabi." 
Joel2:14 N'oha orikumanya ngu takaahinduka, akeegarukamu, Akabatsigira omugisha, Mukabona kuhongyera MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu Empongano z'esaano n'ez'eby'okunywa?" 
Joel2:15 Muteerere enzamba omuri Saayuuni, Mweze eizooba ry'okwesiibyakwo;" 
Joel2:16 Muteeranire hamwe abantu, Mweze ogwo mutwe gw'abateeraine, Mureete abakuru, muteerane abaana, Nangwa n'abeereere abarikwonka. Kishwera arugye omu nju ye, Na kishwerwa arugye omu kishengye kye." 
Joel2:17 Abanyamurwa, abaheereza ba MUKAMA, baririre Ahagati y'ekisasi n'eitambiro, Nibagira bati: Ai MUKAMA, saasira abantu baawe, Otahindura obuhunguzi bwawe ekijumo, N'eky'okucweraho enfumu omu mahanga. Mbwenu abanyamahanga bagirire ki bati: Ruhanga waabo arahi?" 
Joel2:18 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaagirira ensi ye eihato, Yaagirira abantu be esaasi." 
Joel2:19 MUKAMA yaagarukamu abantu be naagira ati: Reeba, naaza kubooherereza Engano, viinyo n'amajuta, muhaagye; Kandi tindigaruka kubahindura kijumo Omuri ago mahanga obundi." 
Joel2:20 Ndyabaihaho eihe ry'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, Ndibingire omu nsi ekarangataine kandi ey'eihamba, Ekicweka kyaryo eky'omumaisho kigwe omu nyanja y'oburugwa-izooba, N'eky'enyima kigwe omu nyanja y'oburengyerwa-izooba, N'ekinuuko ky'ekijunde kyaryo kiimukye, Ahabw'okuba rikakora ebirengyesereize." 
Joel2:21 Iwe nsi 'we, otatiina; Shemererwa kandi oyesiime, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akozire bikuru!" 
Joel2:22 Imwe nyamaishwa z'omu ishwa 'mwe, mutatiina, Ahabw'okuba amariisizo g'omu ihamba gamezire; Ebiti nibyana ebijuma byabyo, Emitiini n'emizaabibu neeyera munonga." 
Joel2:23 Imwe baana ba Saayuuni 'mwe, nimushemererwe; Mwesiimire omuri MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu; Ahabw'okuba abahaire enjura y'ebiba ey'orugyero ruhikire, Kandi yaabagwisiza enjura nyingi munonga Ey'eibiba n'eya katumba nk'eya bwabiso." 
Joel2:24 Amahuuriro garyaijura engano, Amaato gaijure viinyo n'amajuta bisheeshekye." 
Joel2:25 Ndyabashumbuusha emyaka Ei enzigye zaariire, Ebitootera, kahembwe na rushanda, Eihe ryangye rihango, eri naabateize." 
Joel2:26 Muryarya bingi, muhaagye, Muhimbise eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, Owaabatwaize gye omu muringo gw'kutangaaza; N'abantu bangye tibarigaruka kuhemurwa bundi." 
Joel2:27 Muryamanya ku ndi omu Baisraeli, Kandi ku nyowe, MUKAMA, ndi Ruhanga waanyu, ku hatariho ondiijo; N'abantu bangye tibarigaruka kuhemurwa bundi." 
Joel2:28 Bwanyima obunaku ku burihika, Ndyashuka Omwoyo wangye aha bantu boona; Batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu baryaragura, Abagurusi baanyu baryaroota ebirooto, N'abatsigazi baanyu baryayorekwa." 
Joel2:29 Nangwa n'abahuuku bangye n'abazaana bangye Ndyabashukaho Omwoyo wangye omu biro ebyo. 
Joel2:30 Kandi ndyayoreka eb'amahano omu iguru n'omu nsi, eshagama n'omuriro n'okucumba kw'omwika." 
Joel2:31 Eizooba riryahinduka omwirima, n'okwezi kuhindukye eshagama, ekyo kiro kikuru kya MUKAMA ekirikutiinisa kitakahikire." 
Joel2:32 Kandi omu bunaku obwo boona abaritakira eiziina rya MUKAMA baryajunwa; ahabw'okuba aha rushozi rwangye Saayuuni n'omuri Yerusaalemu haraybayo abarihonokaho, omu baritsigaraho habemu abu MUKAMA arikweta." 
Joel3:1 Ahakuba reeba, omuri ebyo biro n'omuri obwo bunaku, obu ndigaruriramu Abayuda n'Abaisraeli nimbaiha omu bukwatwa," 
Joel3:2 ndyateeranira ahamwe amahanga goona, ngashuumye omu ruhita rwa Yehoshafaati, mbacwerereyo orubanja, nimbatura abantu bangye n'obuhunguzi bwangye Israeli, ahabw'okubataataanisiza omu mahanga, bakabaganisa ensi yangye," 
Joel3:3 bakateerera abantu bangye enteenyu, omwana w'omwojo bakamuhingisa maraaya, n'ow'omwishiki bakamuhinga viinyo, ngu babone eby'okunywa." 
Joel3:4 Iwe Tuuro na Sidoni, n'ebyanga byona eby'Abafilistia, nyine kakwate ki naimwe? Mwine eki murikwenda kunzimuurira ahabw'eki naabakoreire? Ku muranzimuurire, naanye niinyija kurahuka kubazimuurira juba eki mwakozire." 
Joel3:5 Ahabw'okuba mukatwara efeeza zangye n'ezaabu zangye, mwatwara ebintu byangye eby'obuguzi bwingi omuri hekalu zaanyu." 
Joel3:6 Abayuda n'aba Yerusaalemu mwabaguza Abagriika, mwabatwara hare n'ensi yaabo y'obuzaarwa." 
Joel3:7 Kwonka hati niinyija kubaimutsya, mbaihe omu nsi ei mwabagurizemu, mbazimuurire ebi mwakozire." 
Joel3:8 Abaana baanyu b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki ndyabaguza Abayuda, nabo babaguze aba Sheeba, eihanga erya hare; ahabw'okuba MUKAMA niwe yaakigamba." 
Joel3:9 Eki mukirangye omu mahanga, Mweteekateekyere orugamba; Mwimutsye amamanzi, Abarwani boona bairire haihi, bainamukye." 
Joel3:10 Amafuka gaanyu mugaheeshemu zaarurara, N'empabyo zaanyu muziheeshemu amacumu; Otaine maani ahigye ati, Ndi ow'amaani." 
Joel3:11 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, agari aha mbaju zoona, Nimurahukye mwije, mweteeranire ahamwe. Ai MUKAMA, okwo obe niyo waashuumya amamanzi gaawe." 
Joel3:12 Amahanga geimutsye, Gaije omu ruhita rwa Yehoshafaati; Ahabw'okuba okwo niyo ndishutama Kucwera amahanga agari aha mbaju zoona emanja." 
Joel3:13 Mutwekyere omusyo gw'engyesho, Ahabw'okuba eigyesha rihikire; Mwije munyuukye, ahabw'okuba einyuukiro riijwire; Amaato gaijwire viinyo nigasheesheka, Ahabw'okuba obubi bwabo ni bwingi." 
Joel3:14 Reeba, enyanja y'abantu, enyanja y'abantu Omu ruhita rw'okucweramu emanja! Ahakuba eizooba rya MUKAMA riri haihi Omu ruhita rw'okucweramu emanja." 
Joel3:15 Eizooba n'okwezi bishwekirwe omwirima, Kandi enyonyoozi tizrikwaka." 
Joel3:16 MUKAMA naatsinda naayema Saayuuni, Naimutsya eiraka rye ari Yerusaalemu, Kandi eiguru n'ensi nibitengyeta. Kwonka MUKAMA niwe buhungiro bw'abantu be, Ekigo kigumire eky'Abaisraeli." 
Joel3:17 Nahabw'ekyo muryamanya ku ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, Otuura Saayuuni, orushozi rwangye orurikwera. Yerusaalemu eryaba erikwera, Kandi abanyamahanga tibarigirabamu bundi." 
Joel3:18 Ahari eryo izooba enshozi ziryatoonya viinyo enuzire, Ebibungo bihimintikwemu amate, Kandi otugyera tw'omuri Yuda twona turyaijura amaizi; N'enshuro y'amaizi erugye omu nju ya MUKAMA, Eitirire oruhanga rwa Shitimu." 
Joel3:19 Misri eryaba amatongo, Na Edomu ebe eihamba ririmu busha, Niziturwa obubisha obu zaagiriire Abayuda, Ahabw'okuba zikasheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja omu nsi yaabo." 
Joel3:20 Kwonka Yuda eryatuurwamu ebiro byona, Na Yerusaalemu etuurwemu obusingye bwona." 
Joel3:21 Ndyahoorera eshagama yaabo, Kandi abasingirwe orubanja tindirubaihaho, Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA atuura Saayuuni." 
Amos1:1 Ebi n'ebigambo bya Amosi, ow'omu bariisa ba Tekoa, ebi yaareebire omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, n'omu busingye bwa Yeroboamu mwene Yoashi, omugabe wa Israeli, haatsigaire emyaka ebiri kuhika aha mutsitsa." 
Amos1:2 Akagira ati: MUKAMA naatsinda naayema Saayuuni, Naimutsya eiraka rye ari Yerusaalemu; Amariisizo g'abariisa nigacura, Omutwe gwa Karumeeli niguhotoka." 
Amos1:3 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bya Damasiko bishatu n'ahabwa bina, Tindigiihaho kifubiro, ahabw'okuba bakahuura Gileadi n'ebihuuzo by'ebyoma." 
Amos1:4 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyayohereza omuriro aha nju ya Hazaeli, Gwokyeze kimwe ebikaari bya Beni-hadadi." 
Amos1:5 Ndyahenda empimbi y'eirembo rya Damasiko, Mmareho abatwire omu ruhita rwa Aveeni, N'okwaitse enkoni y'obugabe omuri Besedeni; Kandi n'Abasiria baryatwarwa Kiiri bari enkwatwa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos1:6 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bya Gaaza bishatu n'ahabwa bina, Tindigiihaho kifubiro; Ahabw'okuba bakatwara eihanga ryona omu bukwatwa, Baarihayo omu mikono y'Abanyedomu." 
Amos1:7 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyayohereza omuriro aha rugo rwa Gaaza, Gwokyeze kimwe ebikaari byayo," 
Amos1:8 Mmareho abatwire omuri Ashidoodi, N'okwaitse enkoni y'obugabe omuri Ashikelooni; Ndyabangira Ekurooni omukono gwangye, ngiteere, N'Abafilistia abatsigaireho bacwekyerere; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos1:9 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bya Tuuro bishatu n'ahabwa bina, Tindigiihaho kifubiro; Ahabw'okuba bakahayo eihanga ryona omu mikono y'Abanyedomu, Tibaijuka ndagaano y'oruganda." 
Amos1:10 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyayohereza omuriro aha rugo rwa Tuuro, Gwokyeze kimwe ebikaari byayo." 
Amos1:11 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bya Edomu bishatu n'ahabwa bina, Tindigiihaho kifubiro; Ahabw'okuba Edomu akabingisa mwene ishe rurara, Yaayenaga enyima embabazi ze, Ekiniga kye kyaguma nikitaagura, Yaaguma agwirwe kubi ebiro byona." 
Amos1:12 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyayohereza omuriro Temani, Gwokyeze kimwe ebikaari bya Bozira." 
Amos1:13 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro by'Abaamoni bishatu n'ahabwa bina, Tindibaiho kifubiro; Ahabw'okuba bakafumurana abakazi ba Gileadi baine enda, Ngu babone kwirizayo emyatano yaabo." 
Amos1:14 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyayohereza omuriro aha rugo rwa Rabba, Gwokyeze kimwe ebikaari byayo, Habeyo orwari aha izooba ry'orugamba, N'eihunga aha izooba ry'omuyaga gw'akasooroora." 
Amos1:15 Kandi omugabe waabo aryatwarwa omu bukwatwa, We hamwe n'abanyiginya be; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos2:1 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bya Moabu bishatu n'ahabwa bina, Tindigiihaho kifubiro; Ahabw'okuba ekootsya amagufa g'omugabe wa Edomu, Yaagagira eiju." 
Amos2:2 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyayohereza omuriro ahari Moabu, Gwokyeze kimwe ebikaari bya Keriosi. Moabu eryagwa omu ruyombo, n'enduuru n'eiraka ry'enzamba." 
Amos2:3 Ndyagiihamu omutegyeki, Mmwite hamwe n'abanyiginya baayo boona; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos2:4 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bya Yuda bishatu n'ahabwa bina, Tindigiihaho kifubiro; Ahabw'eokuba bakanga ebiragiro bya MUKAMA, Tibaarinda bi yaataireho, Kureka ebishuba byabo byabahabya, Ebi baishenkurubo baabaire bakuratira." 
Amos2:5 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyayohereza omuriro ahari Yuda, Gwokyeze kimwe ebikaari bya Yerusaalemu." 
Amos2:6 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bya Israeli bishatu n'ahabwa bina, Tindigiihaho kifubiro; Ahabw'okuba nibatunda abahikiriire efeeza, N'abakyene babahinga enkaito." 
Amos2:7 Nibaribatiirira emitwe y'abooro omu mucuucu, Nibakiikamya emihanda y'abacureezi; Omushaija na ishe nibaza aha mwishiki omwe, Bireetera eiziina ryangye eririkwera kujumwa;" 
Amos2:8 Nibabyama aha rubaju rwa buri itambiro, Beeyariire ebijwaro by'omukwato; Kandi nibanywera omu nju ya Ruhanga waabo Viinyo y'abahongyesiibwe." 
Amos2:9 Kandi niinye naacwekyereize Abaamori omu maisho gaabo, Abaabaire bari baraingwa nk'emyereezi, Kandi bagumire nk'emyela; Nkacwekyereza ebyana byabo eruguru N'emizi yaabo okuzimu." 
Amos2:10 Kandi niinye naabaihire omu nsi ya Misri, Nkamara emyaka makumi ana omu ihamba nimbeebembera, Ngu mubone kukubuura ensi y'Abaamori." 
Amos2:11 Kandi omuri batabani baanyu nkaimutsyamu baanabi, N'omu batsigazi baanyu naihamu Abanaziiri. Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, buzimazima tikwo kiri? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos2:12 Kwonka mukanywaisa Abanaziiri viinyo, Na baanabi mwabaragiira muti: Mutarihanuura." 
Amos2:13 Ndyababandamirira omu mwanya gwanyu, Nk'oku ekigaari kibandama kiijwire ebiba." 
Amos2:14 Empaya-maguru eyrbura agahunga, N'ow'amaani tariguma nago, N'emanzi terikiza magara gaayo." 
Amos2:15 Kikwata-buta taryemerera, Ow'amaguru taryejuna, N'origyendera aha mbaraasi tarikiza magara ge." 
Amos2:16 Kandi na rugambwa omu mamanzi Ahari eryo izooba aryahunga ajwaire busha; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Amos3:1 Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo eki, eki MUKAMA agambire naabahana, imwe n'oruganda rwona oru naihire omu nsi ya Misri, ningira nti:" 
Amos3:2 Omu nganda zoona ez'omu nsi, Imwe mwenka niimwe naamanyire; Nikyo ndibafubirira Ahabw'eby'okushiisha byanyu byona." 
Amos3:3 Nimugira ngu abantu babiri nibabaasa kugyenda hamwe Bataikirizaine? 
Amos3:4 Entare etsindira omu kibira Etaine ki eitsire? Omugunju gw'entare gururumira ryaya, Gutaine ki gukwatsire?" 
Amos3:5 Enyonyi egwa ahansi omu mutego Gutategire? Omutego gubarashuka Gutaine ki gukwatsire? 
Amos3:6 Enzamba ekateererwa omu rurembo, Abantu batatiine? Akabi kagwa aha rurembo, MUKAMA atakareetsire?" 
Amos3:7 Buzimazima Mukama RUHANGA takora kintu kyona, Atabandize kukishuuruurira bairu be baanabi." 
Amos3:8 Entare etsinzire; Mbwenu n'oha otarikwija kutiina? Mukama RUHANGA agambire; N'oha orikubaasa kwezibira kuhanuura? 
Amos3:9 Murangire omu bikaari bya Ashidoodi N'omu bikaari by'omu nsi ya Misri, Nimugira muti: Mweteeranire omu bibungo bya Samaria, Mureebe okujagarara kwingi okuriyo, N'eby'okuhata ebigirimu." 
Amos3:10 MUKAMA naagira ati: Ababiika obubisha n'obwambuzi omu bikaari byabo Tibamanya kukora bihikire. 
Amos3:11 Nikyo Mukama RUHANGA arikugirira ati: Omuzigu aryayehinguririza ensi, Asheenye engo zaawe ezrikukurinda, N'ebikaari byawe binyagwe." 
Amos3:12 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Nk'oku omuriisa asikura amaguru abiri nari ekicweka ky'okutu omu kanwa k'entare, n'abantu abatwire Samaria abagaramisiriize omu keehogo k'ekitabo, n'aha mishego y'ekitanda ya riiri, nikwo barikunwa." 
Amos3:13 Mukama RUHANGA, Ruhanga ow'amahe naagira ati: Nimuhurire, mushinje enju ya Yakobo;" 
Amos3:14 Ahabw'okuba eizooba eri ndifubiriraho Israeli ahabw'ebicumuro bye, Ndyafubiriraho n'amatambiro ga Beseeli, Kandi amahembe g'eitambiro garyatemwaho, Gagwe ahansi." 
Amos3:15 Enju y'omuri katumba ndyagisheenya hamwe n'ey'omu kyanda; N'amaju g'emiino y'enjojo garyahwerekyerera, Kandi na zaanyaruju ziryahwaho; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos4:1 Nimuhurire ekigambo eki, imwe nte za Bashani 'mwe, Eziri omu kibungo kya Samaria, Ezirikuhata abooro, zikasingyera abakyene, Ezirikugira engundu zaazo ziti: Mureete eby'okunywa, tunywe." 
Amos4:2 Mukama RUHANGA arahiire okwera kwe, naagira ati: Ebiro nibiija kubahikaho, Obu baribatwaza amarobo, Bakatwaza abarihereeruka omuriimwe Amarobo g'okutega eby'enyanja." 
Amos4:3 Kandi muryashohorera ahasheenyirwe, Buri mukazi naatora ei agyemire; Kandi muryanagwa omuri Harumooni nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos4:4 Nimwije Beseeli, mucumure; Mwije Gilugaali, mukanyise ebicumuro; Mureete ebitambo byanyu buri kasheeshe, N'ebicweka byanyu bya kimwe kya ikumi buri biro bishatu;" 
Amos4:5 Muhongye empongano zaanyu z'okusiima, zirimu ekitumbisa, Kandi murangye empongano ezi muhonga mwekundiire, Muzirangaane hoona; Ahakuba ebyo nibyo mwenda, imwe Baisraeli 'mwe; nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugira." 
Amos4:6 Nkababuza eky'okutamira omu ndembo zaanyu zoona, Amaino gaanyu gaaguma nigeera, ahu mutwire hoona; Kwonka nabwo timwangarukira; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos4:7 Kandi nkabaima enjura, Hatsigaire ameezi ashatu eigyesha kuhika. Obundi nkaba ngwisiza orurembo rumwe enjura, Orundi ndugiima; Omusiri gumwe guguubwamu enjura, Ogu etaagwamu gwoma." 
Amos4:8 N'ahabw'ekyo ab'omu ndembo ibiri nari ishatu Bakaba bazegyerera omu rurembo rumwe Kunywa amaizi, babura kuhwa eiriho; Kwonka nabwo timwangarukira; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos4:9 Nkabateeza okubabuka n'okusya-nyamwenga, Naacwekyereza emisiri yaanyu n'ey'emizaabibu; Emitiini yaanyu n'emizeituuni yaanyu yaariibwa enzigye; Kwonka nabwo timwangarukira; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos4:10 Nkabooherereza orufu nk'orwa Misri, Naitsa abatsigazi baanyu rurara, Naanyaga embaraasi zaanyu, Enindo zaanyu naaziitsa ekinuuko ky'orusisiira rwanyu; Kwonka nabwo timwangarukira; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos4:11 Nkajuumika endembo zaanyu, Nk'oku Ruhanga yaajuumikire Sodoma na Gomora. Mwaba nk'ekicumurwa kiihirwe omu muriro; Kwonka nabwo hoona timurangarukiire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos4:12 Nikyo ndikugirira ntyo, iwe Israeli, N'ahabw'ekyo yeteekateekye kubugabugana na Ruhanga waawe, iwe Israeli; ahabw'okuba niinyija kukugira ntyo." 
Amos4:13 Ahakuba reeba, Obumba enshozi, akahanga omuyaga, Akagambira omuntu ebiteekateeko bye, Kandi Ohindura akasheeshe omwirima, Akagyendagyenda aha mitwe y'ebibungo by'omu nsi, MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe, niryo iziina rye." 
Amos5:1 Iwe nju ya Israeli 'we, hurira ekigamo eki, Eki ndikugamba ninkutongyeza;" 
Amos5:2 Israeli omwishiki oshugaine agwire, Kandi tarigaruka kwimuka; Atsigirwe omu nsi ye, Haabura ow'okumwimutsya." 
Amos5:3 Ahakuba oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba naagira ati: Orurembo orwahurwirwemu engabo rukumi, Haryatabaarukaho igana; N'orwahurwirwemu igana, Haryatabaarukaho ikumi Eziritsigara aha nju ya Israeli." 
Amos5:4 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugira enju ya Israeli ati: Munsherure, mubone kugumaho;" 
Amos5:5 Kwonka mutasherura Beseeli, Mutataaha omuri Gilugaali, N'obu kwakuba okwambuka Beeri-sheba; Ahabw'okuba buzimazima Gilugaali eryaza omu bukwatwa, Na Beseeli eryahinduka busha." 
Amos5:6 Musherure MUKAMA, mubone kugumaho, Atakaimuka omu nju ya Yosefu nk'omuriro, Gukagyenda nigurya busha, hakabura ow'okuguraariza omuri Beseeli," 
Amos5:7 Imwe abarikuhindura eby'oburyo omuravunga, Mukanaga ahansi okuhikiirira!" 
Amos5:8 Owaahangire enyonyoozi za Kakaaga na za Orioni, Ohindura omwirima ndindindi akasheeshe, Akahindura nyomushana ekiro, Otuma amaizi g'omu nyanja Akagashandaaza ahansi, MUKAMA niryo iziina rye," 
Amos5:9 Oreetera ab'amaani kucwekyerera kitaraariire, Okucwekyerera kukahika aha kigo kigumire." 
Amos5:10 Orikubahanira omu irembo nibamwanga, Kandi nibatamwa orikugamba amazima." 
Amos5:11 N'ahabw'ekyo, ahabw'okuribatiirira abooro, Mukabatoijesa engano, Mweyombekyeire amaju g'amabaare gabaizire, Kwonka timurigataahamu. Mwebyariire emisiri mirungi y'emizaabibu, Kwonka timurinywa viinyo yaayo." 
Amos5:12 Ahabw'okuba nimmanya ebicumuro byanyu ku biri bingi, N'ebibi byanyu ku birengyesereize, Imwe abarikubonabonesa abahikiriire, mukarya enguzi, Kandi abakyene mukabateereza enkokora omu irembo." 
Amos5:13 Nikyo orikwerinda aricecekyera omu bunaku nk'obu, Ahabw'okuba n'obunaku bubi." 
Amos5:14 Musherure ebirungi, t'ebibi, Mubone kugumaho; Obo nibwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga ow'amahe, Ariguma naimwe, nk'oku mugmbire." 
Amos5:15 Mwangye ebibi, mukunde ebirungi, Muhamye eby'oburyo omu irembo; Obundi MUKAMA, Ruhanga ow'amahe, Akaagirira embabazi aba Yosefu abatsigaireho." 
Amos5:16 N'ahabw'ekyo, oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'amahe, Mukama arikugamba naagira ati: Omu nteeraniro z'enguuto zoona haryabamu okuborooga, N'omu nguuto zoona baryacura bati: Ai bambe! Ai bambe! Baryatuma aha bahingi kwija omu rufu, N'abarikumanya kutonzya kwija kucura;" 
Amos5:17 N'omu misiri y'emizaabibu yoona haryabamu okuborooga, Ahabw'okuba ndyaraba ahagati omuriimwe; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos5:18 Imwe abarikwetenga eizooba rya MUKAMA, muryakareeba! Mbwenu eryo izooba rya MUKAMA nimuryendera ki? N'ery'omwirima, ti ry'omushana;" 
Amos5:19 Ni nk'oku omuntu yaakuhunga entare, Akabugana edubu; Nari nk'owaakuza omu nju, akeegamiza omukono aha kisiika, Enjoka ekamuruma." 
Amos5:20 Eryo izooba rya MUKAMA t'omwirima, n'omushana, T'omwirima ogutarimu kuhweza kwona?" 
Amos5:21 Nyanga amagyenyi gaanyu, ningagaya, Kandi tindikushemerererwa kuteerana kwanyu okurikwera na kakye." 
Amos5:22 N'obu murampongyere ebitambo byanyu eby'okwotsya, N'empongano zaanyu z'esaano, Tindikwija kubyakiira, Kandi tindikwija kweta ha mpongano zaanyu Ez'ente zaanyu z'ebishaju ez'okusiima ahabw'obusingye." 
Amos5:23 Nimuunyiheho orwari rw'ebyeshongoro byanyu; Tindikwija kutega kutu okujumeera kw'enanga zaayu. 
Amos5:24 Kureka murekye eby'oburyo bihimintikye nk'amaizi, N'okuhikiirira nk'omugyera ogutarikwoma." 
Amos5:25 Imwe b'enju ya Israeli 'mwe, niinye mwabaire muhongyera ebitambo n'empongano omuri egyo myaka makumi ana, muri omu ihamba?" 
Amos5:26 Mukaheeka ekishushani kya Sukooti omugabe waanyu, n'ekya Kiuni, enyonyoozi ya ruhanga waanyu, ebishushani ebi mwayebaijeire;" 
Amos5:27 nikyo ndibatwarira omu bukwatwa seeri ya Damasiko; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira, ou eiziina rye riba Ruhanga ow'amahe." 
Amos6:1 Baryakareeba, abagaramisiriize omuri Saayuuni, N'abatwire omu kibungo kya Samaria bataine ki beeteireho, Abakungu b'amahanga makuru agarikukira agandi, Agu ab'enju ya Israeli baijaho!" 
Amos6:2 Mwambukye Kalune, mureebe; Murugyeyo, muze Hamasi enkuru; Bwanyima mushuume Gaasi ey'Abafilistia. Nimugira ngu nizihita ezi nsi z'obugabe? Nari shi ensi yaazo neekira eyaanyu obuhango," 
Amos6:3 Imwe abata hare eizooba ribi, Mukairiza haihi ekitebe ky'obubisha?" 
Amos6:4 Baryakareeba, ababyama aha bitanda by'emiino y'enjojo, Bakeegororera aha bitabo byabo, Bakarya ebyana by'entaama, nibabiiha omu busyo, N'ebinyana ebi barikwiha omu kihongore," 
Amos6:5 Abeeshongorera aha nanga ebyeshongoro bitaine buryo, Bakeegunzira ebirikuteerwa nka Daudi," 
Amos6:6 Abanywera amaarwa aha bishare, Bakeesiiga amajuta marungi munonga; Kwonka batasaasibwe kucwekyerera kwa Yosefu!" 
Amos6:7 Nikyo baribandiriza abandi kutwarwa omu bukwatwa, Kandi okweshemeza kw'abarikwenanuura kukahwaho." 
Amos6:8 Mukama RUHANGA ayerahiire! MUKAMA, Ruhanga ow'amahe, naagira ati: Ntamirwe amaryo ga Yakobo, Ebigo bye ebigumire nimbyanga; Kandi ndyahayo oru rurembo n'ebirimu byona." 
Amos6:9 Kandi omu nju emwe ku hatsigaramu abantu ikumi, baryafa." 
Amos6:10 N'oine obuzaare n'omuntu omwe ahari abo, ku ariija kumwotsya, aryamutwara kwiha amagufa omu nju, abuuze ori omu kishengye ati: Hakiriho ondiijo okiri hamwe naiwe? Onu amugarukyemu ati: Ngaaha! Ori amugira ati: Hunama! titushemereire kugamba aha iziina rya MUKAMA." 
Amos6:11 Ahakuba reeba, MUKAMA naaragiira, Enju mpango neija kusheenywa, N'enkye esheenyagurwe." 
Amos6:12 Embaraasi ziiruka aha nkiri? Omuntu ahingisa ente enyanja? Kwonka imwe eby'oburyo mubihindwire endurwe, N'ebyana by'okuhikiirira mwabihindura omuravunga," 
Amos6:13 Imwe abashemerererwa Lodebaari, Mukagira ngu mukwatsire Karunaimu ahabw'amaani gaanyu." 
Amos6:14 Ahakuba reeba, ndyaimutsya eihanga, ribarwanise, Imwe b'enju ya Israeli 'mwe; Ribabonabonese okuruga aharikutaahirwa Hamasi, Okuhika aha kagyera k'omuri Araba; nikwo MUKAMA, Ruhanga ow'amahe, arikugira." 
Amos7:1 Eki nikyo Mukama RUHANGA yaanyorekire; reeba, akaba naakanyisa omuzinga gw'enzigye; obwo oruhiira nirutandika kumera, kandi orwo ruhiira n'orwamezire, obunyaatsi bw'omugabe buherize kutemwa." 
Amos7:2 Ku zaaherize kurya obunyaatsi omu nsi, naagira nti: Ai Mukama RUHANGA, ninkweshengyereza, gira embabazi! Yakobo naabaasa ata kugumaho, Haza ari mukye?" 
Amos7:3 MUKAMA nikwo kwegarukamu ahabw'ekyo, akagira ati: Tikiribaho." 
Amos7:4 Kandi eki nikyo Mukama RUHANGA yaanyorekire; reeba Mukama RUHANGA akaba naayeta omuriro kugucwisa orubanja, gwamaraho enyanja mpango, kandi gukaba niguza kumaraho n'ensi." 
Amos7:5 Bwanyima naagira nti: Ai Mukama RUHANGA, ninkweshengyereza, rekyera aho! Yakobo naabaasa ata kugumaho, Haza ari mukye?" 
Amos7:6 MUKAMA nikwo kwegarukamu ahabw'ekyo; Mukama RUHANGA akagira ati: N'ekyo tikiribaho. 
Amos7:7 Kandi eki nakyo nikyo yaanyorekire; reeba Mukama akaba ayemereire aha rugo rw'amabaare orwombekyesiibwe kariisho, aine kariisho omu ngaro." 
Amos7:8 MUKAMA yambuuza ati: Iwe Amosi, nooreeba ki? Naamugarukamu nti: Nindeeba kariisho. MUKAMA nikwo kugira ati: Reeba, ninta kariisho omu bantu bangye Israeli; tindibasaasira bundi;" 
Amos7:9 emyanya mikuru ya Isaaka ey'okuramizamu eryahinduka ebifurukwa, n'emyanya ya Israeli erikwera esheenywe; kandi ndyaimuka ndwanise enju ya Yeroboamu na rurara." 
Amos7:10 Bwanyima Amazia omunyamurwa wa Beseeli yaatuma ahari Yeroboamu omugabe wa Israeli, naagira ati: Amosi akugiriire enaama y'okukukora kubi ahagati y'Abaisraeli; kandi ensi yaitu terikubaasa kugumisiririza bigambo bye byona." 
Amos7:11 Ahakuba oku nikwo Amosi arikugamba naagira ati: Yeroboamu aryaitwa rurara, Na Israeli aihwe omu nsi ye, atwarwe omu bukwatwa." 
Amos7:12 Bwanyima Amazia yaagira Amosi ati: Iwe muhanuuzi 'we, irooko ohungire omu nsi ya Yuda, obe niyo waahwera omushumi, ohanuurireyo;" 
Amos7:13 kwonka otagaruka kuhanuurira Beseeli, ahakuba n'omwanya gw'omugabe ogurikwera, kandi ni nyaruju y'obugabe." 
Amos7:14 Amosi yaagarukamu Amazia ati: Nkaba ntari nabi nari mwana wa nabi; kureka nkaba ndi omuriisa, kandi omusharizi w'emisikamoori." 
Amos7:15 Bwanyima MUKAMA yanyiha omu kuriisa amatungo, yangira ati: Irooko ohanuurire abantu bangye Israeli." 
Amos7:16 Mbwenu hurira ekigambo kya MUKAMA. Noogira oti: Otahanuurira Israeli ebirigibaho, Kandi otagamba ekigambo kyona eky'okuhana enju ya Isaaka." 
Amos7:17 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Omukazi waawe aryaba maraaya omuri oru rurembo, Batabani baawe na bahara baawe baryaitwa rurara, Kandi ensi yaawe eryabaganisisibwa omugoye; Naiwe oryagwa omu nsi etashemeire, Kandi buzimazima Israeli aryaihwa omu nsi ye Atwarwe omu bukwatwa." 
Amos8:1 Eki nikyo Mukama RUHANGA yaanyorekire. Nkareeba ekiibo ky'ebijuma by'omu kyanda. 
Amos8:2 Yangira ati: Iwe Amosi, nooreeba ki? Naamugarukamu nti: Nindeeba ekiibo ky'ebijuma by'omu kyanda. MUKAMA nikwo kungira ati: Omuheru gw'abantu bangye Israeli gwahika; Tindibasaasira bundi." 
Amos8:3 Eryo izooba ebyeshongoro by'omuri hekalu Biryahinduka okuborooga; Emitumbi y'abafu eryaba mingi, Abantu baginaganagye hoona, bari omu kaceceko; nikwo Mukama RUNANGA arikugira." 
Amos8:4 Nimuhurire eki, imwe abarikuribatiirira abakyene, N'abooro b'omu nsi mukabamaraho." 
Amos8:5 Nimugira muti: Beitu oku kwezi, okwaboneka eki kiro, kurengye ryari, Tukatunda oburo? Na sabato neehwa ryari, Tukahununura engano z'okutunda, Tukatuubya eefa, tukahangusya shekeli, tukaryangatanisisa eminzaani y'obugobya," 
Amos8:6 Tukabona kugura abooro efeeza, N'abakyene tukabagura enkaito, Tukagura entiti z'engano?" 
Amos8:7 MUKAMA arahiire oburungi bwa Yakobo ati: Buzimazima tindyebwa kintu kyona eki baakozire," 
Amos8:8 Ekyo tikirireetera ensi kutetema, N'abagitwiremu boona bakacura? Yoona eryaijura nka Nailo, Eyecunde, eijururukye nk'ogwo mugyera gwa Misri." 
Amos8:9 Mukama RUHANGA naagira ati: Ahari eryo izooba Ndyarenzya eizooba omu ihangwa, Nshwekye ensi omwirima nyomushana." 
Amos8:10 Amagyenyi gaanyu ndyagahindura okucura, N'ebyeshongoro byanyu byona mbihindure okutonzya. Ndyareetera boona kwezirika ebiguniya, N'emitwe ya boona ngihindure enkomborora. Ndyarigira nk'ery'okucuririraho omwana w'omwojo omwe nyamunegyere, N'omuheru gwaryo gube nk'eizooba ry'obusaasi." 
Amos8:11 Mukama RUHANGA naagira ati: Reeba, obunaku nibwija kuhika, Obu nditeeza ensi enjara, Etari njara y'eby'okurya, nari eiriho ry'eby'okunywa, Kureka enjara y'okuhurira ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Amos8:12 Baryazegyerera nibaruga aha nyanja nibahika aha ndiijo, Nibaruga aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, nibahika oburugwa-izooba; Baryairuka nibakora oku n'oku kusherura ekigambo kya MUKAMA, Kwonka tibarikibona." 
Amos8:13 Ahari eryo izooba empangare nungi n'abatsigazi Baryagwa enshazi nibaitwa eiriho. 
Amos8:14 Abarahira ekibi kya Samaria bati: Iwe Daani, nindahira ruhanga waawe; Kandi bati: Nindahira omuhanda ogurikuza Beeri-sheba, Nabo baryagwa, kandi tibariimuka bundi." 
Amos9:1 Nkareeba MUKAMA ayemereire aha rubaju rw'eitambiro; kandi yaagira ati: Teera emitwe y'enyomyo, okuhitsya obu ebisasi biraatengyete; Ogisheenyagurire aha mitwe y'abantu boona; Abaraahonokyeho mbaitse rurara; Tihariho n'omwe omuribo oraahungye, Tihariho n'omwe omuribo oraakire." 
Amos9:2 N'obu baakutimba, bakahika Okuzimu, Nayo omukono gwangye gukaabaihayo; N'obu baakutemba, bakahika omu iguru, Nayo nkaabahanurayo." 
Amos9:3 N'obu baakweshereka aha mutwe gwa Karumeeli, Nkaabasherura, mbaihayo; N'obu baakuunyeshereka okuzimu ahansi y'enyanja, Okwo nayo nkaayohereza enjoka, ebarumirayo." 
Amos9:4 Kandi n'obu baakutwarwa omu bukwatwa, bafunyirwe abazigu baabo, Okwo nayo nkaaragiira rurara, ebaita; Kandi nguma mbataireho eriisho Ahabw'okubakora kubi, kutari kubakora gye." 
Amos9:5 Mukama RUHANGA ow'amahe, Ogwo okora aha nsi, ekayaga, Abagitwiremu boona bakacura, Egyo nsi yoona ekaijura nka Nailo, Ekaijura nk'ogwo mugyera gwa Misri," 
Amos9:6 Oyombeka ebishengye bye by'ahaiguru omu iguru, Akahahamiza orukanga rwaryo ahansi, Otuma amaizi g'omu nyanja kwija, akagashandaaza aha nsi, MUKAMA niryo iziina rye." 
Amos9:7 MUKAMA naagira ati: Imwe Baisraeli 'mwe, Ahariinye timuri nk'Abanyesiopia? Tindaihire Baisraeli omu nsi ya Misri, Abafilistia omuri Kafutoori, N'Abasiria omuri Kiiri?" 
Amos9:8 Reeba, amaisho ga Mukama RUHANGA Gari aha bugabe oburikukora ebibi, Ndyabucwekyereza, mbumare aha nsi; Kwonka enju ya Yakobo yo, tindigicwekyerereza kimwe; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Amos9:9 Ahakuba reeba, ndyaragiira, Kandi nshungurire enju ya Israeli omu mahanga goona, Nk'oku engano zishungurwa n'engari, Hatagire ezaaragara ahansi." 
Amos9:10 Abasiisi b'omu bantu bangye boona baryaitwa rurara, Abarikugira bati: Titurihikwaho kabi, N'obu kwakuba okukareeba." 
Amos9:11 Eryo izooba ndyaimutsya eihema rya Daudi eryagwire, Ndibaziire ahataagukire; Nyimutsye ebicwagurika byaryo, Ndyombekye, ribe nk'oku ryabaire riri obunyakare;" 
Amos9:12 Babone kukubuura ekicweka kya Edomu ekyatsigaireho, N'amahanga goona agarikwetererwa eiziina ryangye; nikwo MUKAMA orikukora ebyo arikugira." 
Amos9:13 MUKAMA naagira ati: Reeba, obunaku nibwija, Obu omuhingi arihinga omugyesi atakasharwire, N'omunyuuki w'emizaabiru akanyuuka omubibi naakibiba; Enshozi ziryatoonya viinyo enuzire, N'ebibungo byona ebihimintikyemu." 
Amos9:14 Ndyagarura abantu bangye Israeli abaatwairwe omu bukwatwa. Bagarukye bombekye endembo ezaabaire zisheenyirwe, Bazituuremu. Baryabyara emizaabibu, banywe viinyo yaayo, Bahingye emisiri, barye ebyeziremu." 
Amos9:15 Ndyababyara omu nsi yaabo, Tibarigaruka kukuurwa bundi Omu nsi ei naabahaire; nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arikugira." 
Obadiah1:1 Okworekwa kwa Obadia. Oku nikwo Mukama RUHANGA arikugamba ahari Edomu naagira ati: Tuhuriire amakuru agarugire ahari MUKAMA, Entumwa etumirwe aha mahanga. Nimwimukye, twimukye tumurwanise." 
Obadiah1:2 Reeba, niinyija kukugira mukye omu mahanga, Obe orikugayirwa kimwe." 
Obadiah1:3 Amaryo g'omu mutima gwawe gakubeihire, Iwe otuura omu bicokoromi by'amabaare, Otuura omu myanya y'ahaiguru, Orikugira omu mutima gwawe oti: N'oha owaakumpanurayo, akangarura ahansi?" 
Obadiah1:4 N'obu oraatumbiikye eiguru nk'eishamba, Okaarika ahaiguru ahagati y'enyonyoozi, Okwo nayo ndyakuhanurayo, ogarukye ahansi; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Obadiah1:5 Abashuma nari abambuzi ku baakukwijaho nyekiro, Tibakaiba ebirikubamara byonaka? (Eshi ocwekyereziibwe!) Abashoromi b'emizaabibu ku baakwija owaawe, Tibakaakutsigira eby'okuhumba?" 
Obadiah1:6 Eshi Esau anyagirwe, Ebintu bye by'obuguzi bwingi byacaakwa!" 
Obadiah1:7 Abakwatanisa naiwe boona bakubeihire, Baakubinga, baakuhitsya aha mwatano; Abantu abu ogira nabo obusingy ebakusingwire, Banywani baawe abu orikwesiga bakutegire omutego; Kwonka tiwaakimanya." 
Obadiah1:8 MUKAMA naagira ati: Eryo izooba Tindicwekyereza abanyabwengye, nkabamara omuri Edomu, Okwetegyereza kukahwa aha rushozi rwa Esau?" 
Obadiah1:9 Iwe Temani, amamanzi gaawe garyahahaaza emitima, Buri muntu w'aha rushozi rwa Esau aitwe." 
Obadiah1:10 Obubisha obu waagiriire murumuna waawe Yakobo Buryakureetera kushwekwa enshoni, Omarirweho kimwe ebiro byona." 
Obadiah1:11 Eizooba riri obu waamwemerera hangahari, Obu bahinguzi baanyaga obutungi bwe, Abanyamahanga bakataaha omu marembo ge, Bakateerera Yerusaalemu enteenyu, Naiwe okaba ori nkabo." 
Obadiah1:12 Kwonka okaba otashemereire kuteerera murumuna waawe omu kwahwa Aha izooba eri yaagwereirweho akagwe; Okaba otashemereire kwesiimirana Abayuda Aha izooba eri baacwekyerereziibweho; Okaba otashemereire kwehimbisa Aha izooba ry'okwehobera; 
Obadiah1:13 Okaba otashemereire kutaaha omu irembo ry'abantu bangye Aha izooba eri baareebeireho enaku, Nari okubateerera omu kwahwa Aha izooba eri baareebeireho enaku, Bari okushahura ebintu byabo Aha izooba eri baareebeireho enaku;" 
Obadiah1:14 Okaba otashemereire kwemerera omu ntaaniro z'emihanda Kumaraho abantu be abarikuhunga; Kandi okaba otashemereire kuhayo abantu be abahonokireho Aha izooba ryabo ry'okureeberaho enaku. 
Obadiah1:15 Ahabw'okuba eizooba rya MUKAMA riri haihi kuhika aha mahanga goona. nk'oku mwagizire, naimwe nikwo murigirwa; Ebi mwakozire, biryabahindukana." 
Obadiah1:16 Nk'oku mwanywereire aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera, Nikwo n'amahanga goona agari embaju zoona garinywa; Buzima garyanywa, gataruze, Gabe nk'agatakabahoga." 
Obadiah1:17 Kwonka aha rushozi Saayuuni haryabaho abahonokireho; Habe aharikwera. Kandi ab'enju ya Yakobo baryagaruka batungye Ebyabaire biri ebyabo. 
Obadiah1:18 Enju ya Yakobo eryaba omuriro; Enju ya Yosefu eryaba ekirimi ky'omuriro, N'enju ya Esau ebe nk'ebitsintsi by'embuba. Baryabootsya, babamareho, Habure owaahonokaho aha b'omuri egyo nju; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA niwe yaakigamba." 
Obadiah1:19 Ab'omuri Negebu baryakubuura orushozi rwa Esau, Ab'omu mpita bakubuure ensi y'Abafilistia, Bakubuure ensi ya Efuraimu n'eya Samaria; Kandi Benyamiini eryakubuura Gileadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Enkwatwa z'omuri Hala ez'omu Baisraeli Ziryakubuura Foiniiki okuhika Zarefaasi, N'enkwatwa za Yerusaalemu ez'omuri Sefaraadi Ziryakubuura endembo z'omuri Negebu." 
Obadiah1:21 Abajuni baryainamuka aha rushozi Saayuuni Kutegyeka orushozi rwa Esau; Kandi obugabe buryaba obwa MUKAMA. 
Jonah1:1 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaija ahari Yona mwene Amitai, nikigira kiti:" 
Jonah1:2 Imuka, oze Nineeve orurembo orwo ruhango, orurangire ebirirubaho; ahabw'okuba obubi bwarwo buhikire omu maisho gangye." 
Jonah1:3 Kwonka Yona yaimuka kuhungira MUKAMA Tarushiishi, yaashuuma Yoopa, yaashangayo emeeri erikuza Tashiishi; yaaha empiiha z'okumutwara, yaaza omu meeri kugyenda nabo Tarushiishi, ngu ahungye MUKAMA." 
Jonah1:4 Kwonka MUKAMA yaayohereza omuyaga mwingi aha nyanja, enyanja yaagira ebingonzi bingi, emeeri yaayenda kusheenyagurika." 
Jonah1:5 N'ahabw'ekyo abarimbi baatiina, buri omwe yaatakira ruhanga we, n'ebintu ebyabaire biri omu meeri baabinaga omu nyanja kwanguhiza emeeri. Kwonka Yona we akaba yaagiire omu kicweka kyayo eky'omunda, abyami, ayegwejegyereire." 
Jonah1:6 Omukuru w'emeeri nikwo kwija ah'ari, akamugira ati: Obaire ota, iwe mugwejegyezi 'we? Imuka, otakire ruhanga waawe. Obundi ruhanga waawe akaatwijuka, tureka kucwekyerera." 
Jonah1:7 Bwanyima baagambirana bati: Nimwije tuteere enteenyu, tubone kumanya otureeteire aka kabi. Batyo baateera enteenyu, yaakwata Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Baamubuuza bati: Tugambire otureeteire aka kabi. Okora murimo ki? Nooruga hi? Owaanyi ni nkahi? Kandi ori owa ihanga ki? 
Jonah1:9 Yaabagarukamu ati: Ndi Omuheburaayo, nintiina MUKAMA Ruhanga ow'omu iguru, owaahangire enyanja n'ensi." 
Jonah1:10 Okuruga aho baagira obwoba bwingi, baamubuuza bati: Beitu ekyo eki okozire niki? Ahabw'okuba abo bashaija bakamanya ku yaabaire ahungire MUKAMA; ahakuba akaba yaabagambiire." 
Jonah1:11 Baamubuuza bati: Mbwenu tukugire tuta, enyanja ekabona kutuuza, tukakira? Ahabw'okuba enyanja ekaba neeyeyongyera kuhinduriza." 
Jonah1:12 Yaabagarukamu ati: Nimunkirize, munnagye omu nyanja; obwo nibwo enyanja eraatuuze, mukakira; ahabw'okuba nimmanya ngu eri ihunga ry'amaani eryabajuumikira niinye ruabatura." 
Jonah1:13 Kwonka abo bashaija baavuga munonga gu babone kuhitsya emeeri aha nkungu, baaremwa; ahabw'okuba enyanja ekaba neeyeyongyera kubatabangurira ebingonzi." 
Jonah1:14 Nikyo baatakiriire MUKAMA, nibagira bati: Nitukweshengyereza, ai MUKAMA, otatureka tukahwerekyerera, tukazira ogu mushaija; kandi tukazira otatutaho orubanja rw'eshagama y'otaine rubaja; ahabw'okuba, ai MUKAMA, niiwe okozire nk'oku osiimire." 
Jonah1:15 Batyo baakiriza Yona, baamunaga omu nyanja, enyanja yaatuuza." 
Jonah1:16 Ahonaaho abo bashaija baatiina munonga MUKAMA, baamutambira ebitambo, baahiga nibarahira." 
Jonah1:17 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaateekateeka eky'enyanja kihango kumira Yona; kyamumira, yaamara omu nda y'ekyo ky'enyanja ebiro bishatu nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Jonah2:1 Bwanyima Yona yaashaba MUKAMA Ruhanga we, ari omu nda y'eky'enyanja, naagira ati:" 
Jonah2:2 Ahabw'obusaasi ntakiire MUKAMA, Yangarukamu; Naataka ndiu omu nda y'Okuzimu, Waahurira eiraka ryangye." 
Jonah2:3 Ahabw'okuba onnagire omu maizi maingi Ahagati y'enyanja; Ago maizi gaanyehinguririza, Ebingonzi byawe n'emijumba yaawe byona byandengyeraho." 
Jonah2:4 Ntyo naagira nti: Ncwirwe omu maisho gaawe; Mbwenu ndyareeba nta hekalu yaawe erikwera obundi. 
Jonah2:5 Amaizi ganshwekire, Amaizi maingi gaanyehinguririza, Amarebe gaanyezingirira omu mutwe Ahu enshozi zitsimbire emizi." 
Jonah2:6 Naashuuma, naahika omu nsi Ei empimbi zaayo zinkingiraniire kimwe; Kwonka waiha amagara gangye omu Kiina, Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye." 
Jonah2:7 Omutima gwangye ku gwagwire enshazi, Naakwijuka, MUKAMA; Okushaba kwangye kwahika omuri hekalu yaawe erikwera." 
Jonah2:8 Abata omutima aha bishushani ebitaine mugasho Baba batsigireho Orikubasaasira. 
Jonah2:9 Kwonka nyowe ndyakutambira ebitambo n'eiraka ry'okusiima; Eki naahigire nindaganisa, ndyakihikiiriza. Okujuna n'okwa MUKAMA." 
Jonah2:10 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaaragiira ekyo ky'enyanja, kyatanaka Yona aha nkungu." 
Jonah3:1 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyaija ahari Yona obwa kabiri, nikigira kiti:" 
Jonah3:2 Imuka, oze Nineeve, orurembo orwo oruhango, orugambire obutumwa obu ndikukutuma." 
Jonah3:3 Atyo Yona yaimuka, yaaza Nineeve, nk'oku MUKAMA yaamugambira. Kandi Nineeve rukaba ruri orurembo ruhango munonga, oru obuhango bwarwo burikugyenderwa ebiro bishatu." 
Jonah3:4 Yona yaatandika kugyendagyenda omu rurembo, naagyenda orugyendo rw'eizooba rimwe; naagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: Hatsigaire ebiro makumi ana, Nineeve ecwekyerezibwe." 
Jonah3:5 Abantu ba Nineeve baikiriza Ruhanga; baaranga okwesiibyakwo, baajwara ebiguniya, okuruga aha mukuru okuhika aha muto." 
Jonah3:6 Bwanyima egyo nkuru yaahika aha mugabe wa Nineeve, yaimuka omu kitebe kye, yaajuura bushuuti ye, yaayehumbika ebiguniya, yaashutama omu iju." 
Jonah3:7 Yaaragiira kubuzya ekiragiro omuri Nineeve, ekirikugira kiti: Ahabw'ekiragiro ky'omugabe n'abakungu be, hatagira ekyatamira eky'okurya kyona, yaaba muntu, yaaba busyo bw'ente nari obw'emtaama, bitarya n'obu kwakuba okunywa;" 
Jonah3:8 kureka omuntu weena n'enyamaishwa yoona bihumbikwe ebiguniya, kandi abantu batakire munonga Ruhanga, buri muntu arekye omuhanda gwe omubi, n'obubisha oburi omu ngaro ze." 
Jonah3:9 N'oha orikumanya ngu, obundi Ruhanga takaayegarukamu, akareka ekiniga kye kingi, tukareka kuhwerekyerera?" 
Jonah3:10 Ruhanga ku yaareebire eki baakora, n'oku baahinduka kureka emihanda yaabo emibi, yaayegarukamu, yaareka akabi aku yaagambire kubareetaho; tiyaakabareetaho." 
Jonah4:1 Kwonka ekyo kyagwisa kubi munonga Yona, yaagira ekiniga." 
Jonah4:2 Yaashaba MUKAMA ati: Ai MUKAMA, eki tikyo naagambire, obu naabaire nkiri owaitu? Nikyo kyandeeteire kuhungira Tarushiishi; ahabw'okuba nkamanya ku ori Ruhanga ow'embabazi kandi orikusaasira, otarikurahuka kuguubwa kubi, oine rukundo etahinduka, kandi oyegarukamu okutareeta kabi." 
Jonah4:3 N'ahabw'ekyo, ai MUKAMA, ninkweshengyereza, ihaho amagara gangye; haakiri nfe okukira okugumaho." 
Jonah4:4 MUKAMA yaamugarukamu ati: Ebyo waakora gye okugira ekiniga? 
Jonah4:5 Bwanyima Yona yaaruga omu rurembo, yaashutama aha rubaju rwarwo rw'oburugwa-izooba, yaayeyombekyerayo akaju, yaakahungiramu omushana, okuhitsya ahu arireebera oku orurembo ruriba." 
Jonah4:6 Bwanyima MUKAMA Ruhanga yaaragiira omwongo kurandira ahu Yona yaabaire ari, gukamusangira aha mutwe kumutambira omushana ogwabaire nigumwita. Atyo Yona yaashemererwa munonga ahabw'ogwo mwongo." 
Jonah4:7 Kwonka omu kasheeshe omushekye ku gwajugutsire, Ruhanga yaaragiira akakooko, kaarya ogwo mwongo, gwayoma." 
Jonah4:8 Eizooba ku ryaturukire, Ruhanga yaaragiira omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba ogurikwomya, omushana gwateera omutwe gwa Yona, yaayenda kugwa enshazi, yaayeshabira okufa, naagira ati: Haakiri nfe okukira okugumaho." 
Jonah4:9 Kwonka Ruhanga yaagira Yona ati: Ebyo waakora gye okugira ekiniga ahabw'omwongo? Onu ati: Eego, naakora gye okugira ekiniga, nangwa eky'okuunyita." 
Jonah4:10 MUKAMA yaagira ati: Noosaasibwa omwongo, ogu otarahendekyeire, ogu otaramerize, ogwayemerize nyekiro, gukagaruka gukooma ekindi kiro." 
Jonah4:11 Mbwenu noogira ngu tinkusaasiibwe Nineeve, orwo rurembo ruhango, orurimu abantu akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi bubiri n'okukiraho abatarikubaasa kutaanisa ndyo na mosho, kandi orurimu amatungo maingi?" 
Micah1:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyaizire ahari Miika owa Moresheeshi, eki yaayorekirwe ahari Samaria na Yerusaalemu, omu busingye bwa Yosamu, Ahazi na Hezekia abagabe ba Yuda." 
Micah1:2 Imwe bantu 'mwe, mwena, nimuhurire; Naiwe ensi n'ebigirimu byona, mutegye amatu; Mukama RUHANGA abe niwe yaababeera mushinja, Naayema omuri hekalu ye erikwera." 
Micah1:3 Ahakuba reeba, MUKAMA naija naaruga omu mwanya gwe, Naija kushuuma, aribatiirire ebibungo by'omu nsi." 
Micah1:4 Kandi enshozi ziryayagira ahansi ye, N'empanga zigangabukye Nke'cumbwe omu maisho g'omuriro, Nari nk'amaizi gaashukwa aheecurikire." 
Micah1:5 Ebyo byona n'ahabw'ekicumuro kya Yakobo, N'ahabw'ebibi by'enju ya Israeli. Beitu ekicumuro kya Yakobo nikiiha? Ti Samaria? Kandi ekibi ky'enju ya Yuda nikiiha? Ti Yerusaalemu?" 
Micah1:6 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyagira Samaria omutuumo omu bwerere, Omwanya gw'okubyaramu emizaabibu; Ndyashuka amabaare ge omu ruhanga, Nshuuruure emisingi ye." 
Micah1:7 Ebishushani bye byona biryahondagurwa, Ebihembo bye byona biryayokibwa omuriro, Kandi ebishushani bye ebirikuramibwa ndyabicwekyereza; Ahabw'okuba akabiiha omu bihembo bya maraaya, Kandi niyo birigaruka." 
Micah1:8 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyatonzya, mboroogye, Ngyende ntajwaire nkaito, kandi njwaire busha; Nduyatonzya, nimboigora nka zaamuha, Ncure nka zaamaaya." 
Micah1:9 Ahabw'okuba obuhuta bwe ti bw'okutambwa; Buhikire ahari Yuda, Bwahika n'aha irembo ry'abantu bangye omuri Yerusaalemu." 
Micah1:10 Mutakigamba omuri Gaasi, Mutarira na kakye; Mwekuringye omu mucuucu Omuri Besi-leafura." 
Micah1:11 Imwe batuuzi ba Shafiri 'mwe, Murabeho mujwaire busha, mwine enshoni; Abatuuzi ba Zaanani tibarikushohora; Okuborooga kwa Betazeeli Kuryabazibira ku ebaha emikono." 
Micah1:12 Ahabw'okuba abatuuzi ba Maroosi Bategyereize ebirungi beemereize emitima; Ahakuba akabi kashuumire nikaruga ahari MUKAMA, Kaahika aha irembo rya Yerusaalemu." 
Micah1:13 Imwe batuuzi ba Lakishi 'mwe, Mukomere ebigaari aha mbaraasi; Niimwe mwabandize kucumuza Saayuuni, Ahabw'okuba omuriimwe nimwo ebicumuro bya Israeli byashangirwe." 
Micah1:14 Nikyo oriheera Moresheeti-gaasi Ebiconco by'okuragana; Amaju ga Akiziibu gakaba Eky'okureebya abagabe ba Israeli. 
Micah1:15 Naimwe batuuzi ba Mareesha 'mwe, Ndyagaruka mbareeteho ow'okubasingura; Kandi ekitiinisa kya Israeli kiryahika Adulaamu." 
Micah1:16 Mwemwe enkomborora, mushare amashokye, Ahabw'abaana baanyu abu murikukunda; Mwemwe enkomborora, emitwe yaanyu ebe nk'ey'ebihuhura-bahuta, Ahabw'okuba baryaruga omuriimwe, batwarwe omu bukwata." 
Micah2:1 Baryakareeba, abacuma enaama z'obubi, Bakakora kubi bakiri aha bitabo byabo! Kandi bukisheesha, bakabikora, Ahabw'okuba biri omu bushoboorozi bwabo." 
Micah2:2 Bibeetenga ebibanja by'abandi, babikwata; Kandi beetenga n'amaju, baganyaga; Bahata omuntu n'eka ye, Omuntu n'obuhunguzi bwe." 
Micah2:3 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Reeba, nincumira oru ruganda enaama y'okurureetaho akabi, Aku mutaribaasa kwiha mu bitsya byanyu; Kandi timurigyenda na myekuniko, Ahabw'okuba obunaku obwo buryaba bubi." 
Micah2:4 Eryo izooba baryayeshongora ekyeshongoro ky'okubagaaniiza, Baboroogye, nibatonzya n'obusaasi bwingi, Nibagira bati: Tumariirweho kimwe; Yaahingisa omugabo gw'abantu bangye; Mbwenu ka yaaguunyaka! Emisiri yaitu agibaganisiize abarikutunyaga." 
Micah2:5 Nikyo muriburira ow'okubaganisisa omugoye Emigabo y'omu ihanga rya MUKAMA. 
Micah2:6 Batyo nibahanuura bati: Mutahanuura! Omuntu tashemereire kuhanuura ebigambo nk'ebi; Okuhemuka tikurituhikaho. 
Micah2:7 Iwe nju ya Yakobo 'we, eki kikaagambirwe? Omwoyo wa MUKAMA takiine kugumisiriza? Ebi niwe arikubikora? Ebigambo byangye tibirikugasira Orikugyenda n'omutima gugororokire?" 
Micah2:8 Kwonka mwimukire kurwanisa abantu bangye nk'omuzigu; Abarikuba nibahingura baine obusingye Batarikwenda kurwana, Mubaaka eminagiro yaabo." 
Micah2:9 Abakazi b'abantu bangye mubabinga Omu maju gaabo marungi, N'abaana baabo abato mubaihiraho kimwe ekitiinisa kyangye." 
Micah2:10 Nimwimukye mugyende; Ahabw'okuba ogu ti mwanya gw'okuhuumuriramu, Ahabw'oburofa bwagwo oburikucwekyereza Okucwekyereza kubi munonga." 
Micah2:11 Omuntu orikugyendagyenda, naagamba eby'omwoyo n'eby'ebishuba, Naagira ati: Niinyija kubahanuurira ebya viinyo n'ebirikusinza; Ogwo niwe yaakuba nabi w'aba bantu!" 
Micah2:12 Iwe Yakobo, abaawe boona ndyabataaruura, Ntaaruure Abaisraeli abatsigaireho; Ndyabateeranira hamwe Nk'entaama eziri omu kibuga kyazo, Nk'obusyo oburi omu iriisizo ryabwo, Bagire akaari kaingi ahabw'okuba baingi." 
Micah2:13 Orikusheenya ah'okuraba, aryabeebembera; Bahabandanire, bashohore Nibaraba omu irembo. Omugabe waabo aryarabaho, abaze omumaisho, MUKAMA abeebembeire." 
Micah3:1 Bwanyima naagira nti: Imwe bakuru ba Yakobo 'mwe, Naimwe abategyeki b'enju ya Israeli, nimuhurire! T'omurimo gwanyu okumanya eby'oburyo?" 
Micah3:2 Imwe abanga ebirungi, mukakunda ebibi, Abantu bangye mukabaihaho oruhu, Mukoonoora enyama aha magufa gaabo," 
Micah3:3 Mukagirya, Mukababaagaho oruhu, Mukabacwagacwagura amagufa, Mukabatematema nk'enyama Ezi barikwenda kuta omu rwabya Nari omu nyungu egoya." 
Micah3:4 Obwo baryatakira MUKAMA, Kwonka taribagarukamu; Omuri obwo bunaku aryabaima amaisho Ahabw'okukora kubi omu mitwarize yaabo." 
Micah3:5 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba ahari baanabi abarikuhabya abantu bangye, bakagira ngu, N'obusingye, obu baine eby'okurya, haza bakarwanisa owaabura eki yaabatamika." 
Micah3:6 Nikyo biribabeerera ekiro, mukabura okworekwa, Bikababeera omwirima, mukabura okuragura; Eizooba riryarengyera ahari baanabi, Na nyomushana ebairagurire;" 
Micah3:7 Abahanuuzi baryahemuka, N'abafumu baitwe enshoni, Boona engaro bazite aha munwa Ahabw'okubura okugarukamu kwa Ruhanga." 
Micah3:8 Kwonka nyowe nyijwire amaani Ahabw'Omwoyo wa MUKAMA; Nyijwirwe obwinganisa n'obushoboorozi Bw'okumanyisa Yakobo ekicumuro kye Na Israeli ekibi kye. 
Micah3:9 Nimuhurire eki, imwe bakuru b'enju ya Yakobo 'mwe, N'abategyeki b'enju ya Israeli, Abangira kimwe eby'oburyo, Obwinganisa bwona mukabukiikamya," 
Micah3:10 Abombekyesa Saayuuni eshagama, Na Yerusaalemu mukagyombekyesa okukora kubi." 
Micah3:11 Abakuru baayo bacwa emanja z'enguzi, Abanyamurwa baayo beegyesa ahabw'okugurirwa, Na baanabi baayo baragura ahabw'empiiha; Haza beegamira MUKAMA nibagira bati: MUKAMA tari omuriitwe? Tihaine kabi karituhikaho." 
Micah3:12 Nikyo Saayuuni erihingirwa nk'omusiri ahabwanyu, Yerusaalemu ekaba omutuumo gw'ebisheenyuka, N'orushozi rw'enju ya MUKAMA rukaba nk'ekibungo kishwekirwe ekibira." 
Micah4:1 Kwonka omu biro by'aha muheru Orushozi rw'enju ya MUKAMA ruryahamibwa Kuba orushozi orurikukira ezindi aha mutwe, Rutunguurwe, ruze ahaiguru y'ebibungo; Kandi amahanga garyahimintikirayo." 
Micah4:2 N'amahanga maingi garyaija gagire gati: Nimwije twinamukye aha rushozi rwa MUKAMA, Aha nju ya Ruhanga wa Yakobo, Atwegyese emihanda ye, Tubone kugigyenderamu; Ahakuba omuri Saayuuni nimwo hariruga Ebiragiro, N'omuri Yerusaalemu hakarugamu ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Micah4:3 Aryaramura amahanga maingi, Ahane amahanga g'amaani agari hare; Zaarurara zaabo baryaziheeshamu amafuka, N'amacumu gaabo bagaheeshemu empabyo; Eihanga tiriribangira rindi rurara, Kandi tibarigaruka kwega by'engamba;" 
Micah4:4 Kureka buri muntu aryashutama Ahansi y'omuzaabibu gwe n'ahansi y'omutiini gwe, Kandi tihaine oribakangisa; Ahabw'okuba akanwa ka MUKAMA niko kaakigamba." 
Micah4:5 Ahakuba amahanga goona nigagyenda, Buri rimwe omu iziina rya ruhanga waaryo; Kwonka itwe turyaguma nitugyedera Omu iziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu okuhitsya ryari na ryari." 
Micah4:6 MUKAMA naagira ati: Eryo izooba Ndyateeranira hamwe ebirema, Ntaaruure abaataataine, N'abu naabonaboneise." 
Micah4:7 Ebyo birema nibyo ndigira abaatsigaireho, N'abacwirwe mbagire eihanga ry'amaani; Kandi MUKAMA aryabategyekyera aha rushozi Saayuuni, Okwiha obwo okuhitsya ebiro byona." 
Micah4:8 Kandi naiwe, munaara gw'obusyo 'we, Ekibungo Saayuuni niiwe kirihikaho, Obutegyeki bwa ira bukagaruka, Obutegyeki bwa Yerusaalemu." 
Micah4:9 Mbwenu ekirikukuboroozya niki? Omuriiwe tiharimu omugabe? Omuhanuuzi waawe afiire, Obusaasi bwaza kukukwata nk'omukzi orikurumwa?" 
Micah4:10 Iwe Saayuuni 'we, yehotore, otsinde, Nk'omukazi orikurumwa kuzaara, Ahakuba hati waaza kuruga omu rurembo, Otuure omu bwerere, Bwanyima oze Babulooni; Okwo niyo MUKAMA arikucungurira, Akakwiha omu mikono y'abazigu baawe." 
Micah4:11 Hati amahanga maingi gateeraine kukurwanisa, Nigagira gati: Saayuuni k'eshiishwe, Tugishamaarire." 
Micah4:12 Kwonka tigarikumanya biteekateeko bya MUKAMA, N'obu kwakuba okwetegyereza enaama ye, Ku agateeraniire hamwe nk'ebiba ebirunzire aha mbuga." 
Micah4:13 Iwe Saayuuni 'we, imuka ohuure; Ahabw'okuba eihembe ryawe ndyarihindura ekyoma, N'ebyara by'ebigyere byawe mbigire emiringa. Oryacwagacwagura amahanga maingi, Amagoba gaabo ogahongyere MUKAMA, N'eitungo ryago oryereze MUKAMA ow'ensi yoona." 
Micah5:1 Mbwenu oyehinguririziibwe orugo rw'amabaare; Twagotwa; Nibateeza omutegyeki wa Israeli Enkono aha matama. 
Micah5:2 Kwonka iwe, Betelehemu eya Efuraata, Ori mukye kubarirwa omu nganda za Yuda, Omuriiwe nimwo hariruga Orimbeera omutegyeki wa Israeli, Ou obukomooko bwe buri obwa iranairea Omubiro ebitakimanywa." 
Micah5:3 Nikyo aribaheerayo okuhitsya obunaku Obu orikurumwa arizaariramu; Obwo ab'omuri beene ishe abariba batsigaireho Baryagarukira Abaisraeli. 
Micah5:4 Nawe aryahama, ariise obusyo bwe Aine amaani ga MUKAMA, N'ekitiinisa ky'eiziina rya MUKAMA Ruhanga we. Kandi nabo baryatuura buhooro, Ahabw'okuba aryaba mukuru okuhitsya aha muheru gw'ensi, Kandi omuntu ogwo aryaba obusingye bwaitu." 
Micah5:5 Omuasiria ku ariteera ensi yaitu, Yaagiribatiirira, Turyaimutsya abariisa mushanju N'abanyiginya munaana, bamurwanise." 
Micah5:6 Bwanyima baryategyekyesa ensi ya Asiria rurara, N'ensi ya Nimuroodi bagitegyekyese rurara esyoirweyo. Kandi Omuasirira ku arirenga emyatano yaitu, Yaateera ensi yaitu, yaagiribatiirira, Nibo barimutujuna." 
Micah5:7 Batyo aba Yakobo abariba batsigaireho Baryaba ahagati y'amahanga maingi, Nk'orume orurugire ahari MUKAMA, Nari nk'orutoonyerera orurikugwa aha bunyaatsi, Orutarinda muntu, n'obu kwakuba okutengyereza abantu." 
Micah5:8 Kandi aba Yakobo abariba batsigaireho Baryaba omu mahanga ahagati y'amahanga maingi, Nk'entare eri ahagati y'enyamaishwa z'omu kibira, Kandi nk'omugunju gw'entare oguri omu busyo bw'entaama, Oguba niguzirabamu, gukaziribatiirira, Gukazitaagataagura, hakabura ow'okuzijuna." 
Micah5:9 Omukono gwawe guryabangirwa abazigu baawe, N'abarikukwanga boona bamarweho." 
Micah5:10 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Eryo izooba Ndyakumaraho embaraasi zaawe, N'ebigaari byawe by'orugamba mbicwekyereze." 
Micah5:11 Ndyamaraho endembo z'omu nsi yaawe, N'ebigo byawe byona mbisheenye." 
Micah5:12 Ndyamaraho oburugo oburi omu ngaro zaawe, Kandi torigira barangi bundi." 
Micah5:13 Ndyakumaramu ebishushani byawe n'eyomyo zaawe, Kandi torigaruka kuramya bikozirwe emikono yaawe." 
Micah5:14 Ndyakuranduramu za Ashera zaawe, Ncwekyereze endembo zaawe;" 
Micah5:15 Kandi amahanga agataroorobire Ndyagahoora enzigu ngwirwe kubi, ngainiire ekiniga." 
Micah6:1 Mbwenu nimuhurire eki MUKAMA arikugamba, Mwimukye, mwetonganire omu maisho g'enshozi, Ebibungo bihurire eiraka ryanyu." 
Micah6:2 Imwe nshozi 'mwe, nimuhurire okutongana kwa MUKAMA, Naimwe emisingi y'ensi ey'entuura; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA aine eki arikufa n'abantu be, Kandi naatonganisa Israeli." 
Micah6:3 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, mbwenu ndabaitsize ki? Ndabaruhize na ki? Nimungarukyemu!" 
Micah6:4 Ahabw'okuba nkabaiha omu nsi ya Misri, Naabacungura omu nju y'obuhuuku; Naatuma Musa, Arooni na Miriamu Kubeebembera." 
Micah6:5 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, mwijukye enaama, Ei Balaki omugabe wa Moabu yaacumire, N'eki Balamu mwene Beori yaamugarukiremu, Kandi n'ebyabaireho okuruga Shitimu okuhika Gilugaali, Ngu mubone kumanya eby'okujuna ebi MUKAMA yaakozire." 
Micah6:6 Nyije na ki omu maisho ga MUKAMA, Nkainama omu maisho ga Ruhanga orikukira boona? Nyije omu maisho ge n'ebitambo by'okwotsya, N'enyana ezihikize omwaka gumwe?" 
Micah6:7 Ebyo MUKAMA naija kusiima empaya z'entaama enkumi, Nari emigyera y'emajuta obukumi? Mpeyo omwana wangye w'omujigaijo ahabw'ekicumuro kyangye, Ekyana ky'omubiri gwangye nkihongye ahabw'ekibi ky'amagara gangye?" 
Micah6:8 Iwe muntu 'we, akorekire ekirungi; Mbwenu eki MUKAMA arikukwenza niki, Kureka okukora eby'oburyo, okukunda embabazi, N'okugyenda na Ruhanga waawe n'obucureezi?" 
Micah6:9 MUKAMA naagambira orurembo n'eiraka rihango- Kandi okutiina eiziina ryawe n'obwengye buhikire; Iwe ruganda 'we, kandi naimwe abateeraine omu rurembo, Nimuhurire." 
Micah6:10 Nimugira ngu nkaabaasa kwebwa eitungo ry'obubi Eriri omu nju y'enkozi z'ebibi, Kandi n'endengo zitahikire ezikyeenirwe?" 
Micah6:11 Oine omunzaani mubi, mmwiheho orubanja, N'oine enshaho y'amabaare agu arikugobezesa?" 
Micah6:12 Abatungi baanyu baijwire obubisha, Abatuuzi baawe nibabeiha, Kandi orurimi rw'omu kanwa kaabo niruryarya." 
Micah6:13 Nikyo ntandikiire kubateera, Nkabahindura enshoberwa ahabw'ebibi byanyu." 
Micah6:14 Muryarya, kwona timurihaaga; Omuriimwe haryabamu enjara. Muryabiika, kwonka ebi muribiika tibirigumaho, Kandi ebi muribiika ndyabigaburira rurara." 
Micah6:15 Muryabiba, kwonka timurigyesha; Muryanyuuka ebyana by'emitiini, Kwonka timuryesiiga majuta gaabyo; Muryanyuuka ebijuma by'emizaabibu, Kwonka timurinywa viinyo yaabyo;" 
Micah6:16 Ahabw'okuba mukoorobera ebiragiro bya Omuri, N'ebyakozirwe ab'enju ya Ahabu byona. Kandi mutuura nimukuratira obwengye bwabo, Nikyo naaza kuabahindurira enshoberwa, N'abatuuzi baanyu nkabagira eky'okweshaanya; Mutyo mukaba ekirikugaywa amahanga." 
Micah7:1 Eshi naareeba! ahabw'okuba mpindukire nk'orikusherura ebijuma by'omu kyanda, ahu baaherize kushoroma, n'eby'emizaabibu, ahu baaherize kuhumba, hakabura omutsitsa na gumwe gw'okurya, n'obu kyakuba ekijuma ky'omutiini eky'omujigaijo eki omutima gwangye gurikwetenga." 
Micah7:2 Abarikutiina Ruhanga bahweire omu nsi, Kandi omu bantu tihariho n'omwe oine omutima gugororokire; Boona nibagwera kusheesha eshagama, Buri muntu naatega mwene ishe ekigoye." 
Micah7:3 Emikono yaabo neekununkirira ekibi Kukikoresa obweziriki. Omutegyeki n'omuramuzi nibashaba enguzi, N'omuntu mukuru naagamba butunu ekibi Eki omutima gwe gurikwetenga. Okwo nikwo barikubugaabuganisa enaama zaabo." 
Micah7:4 Omurungi omuribo ni nk'omukwatangwe, N'orikukira kuba ohikiriire omuribo ni nk'orugo rw'amahwa. Eizooba ry'abarinzi baabo, kandi ery'okufubirwa kwabo ryahika; Mbwenuho baarimbagirirwa." 
Micah7:5 Muteesiga omutaahi, Mutagira obwesigye ahari munywani waanyu; Kandi okwate akanwa Nangwa n'aha mukazi waawe ou ofumbata;" 
Micah7:6 Ahabw'okuba omwana naagaya ishe, Omwishiki naagomera nyina, N'omukaamwana naagomera nyina-zaara, Kandi abazigu b'omuntu n'ab'omu ka ye." 
Micah7:7 Kwonka nyowe amaisho gangye ndyagata ahari MUKAMA, Ntegyereze Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwangye. Ruhanga wangye aryampurira." 
Micah7:8 Iwe muzigu wangye 'we, otaanyesiimirana; N'obu ndigwa, ndyaimuka; N'obu ndishutama omu mwirima, MUKAMA aryambeera omushana." 
Micah7:9 Ndyayemera ekiniga kya MUKAMA, Ahabw'okuba nkamugomera, Okuhitysa obu arintongainira, Akansingirira. Aryanshohoza ampitsye omu mushana, Ndeebe okuhikiirira kwe;"
