Micah7:10 Haza omuzigu wangye akireebe, Akwatwe enshoni, owangizire ati: MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arahi? Amaisho gangye garyamwesiimirana. Kandi obwo aryaribatiirirwa Nk'ebyondo by'omu muhanda." 
Micah7:11 Eizooba ry'okwombekyeraho engo zaawe z'amabaare! Eryo izooba emyatano eryairizibwa hare. 
Micah7:12 Eryo izooba baryabahika, Barugire Asiria okuhika Misri, Okuruga Misri okuhika aha mugyera Furaati, Okuruga aha nyanja okuhika aha ndiijo, Okuruga aha rushozi okuhika aha rundi." 
Micah7:13 Kwonka ensi eyrahinduka eihamba, Neeturwa abatuuzi baayo Ahabw'ebirugire omu bi barikukora." 
Micah7:14 Riisa abantu baawe n'enkoni yaawe, Obusyo bw'obuhunguzi bwawe, Abatuura bonka omu ihamba Eriri omuri Bashani na Gileadi Nk'omu biro bya ira." 
Micah7:15 Ndyabooreka eby'okutangaaza, Nk'ebi naayorekire, obu waabaire nooruga Misri." 
Micah7:16 Amahanga garyabireeba, Gakwatirwe enshoni amaani gaago goona; Engaro gazite aha munwa, N'amatu gaago gaigare." 
Micah7:17 Kandi garyarigatsa omucuucu nk'enjoka, Nk'ebintu by'omu nsi ebirikugyendesa enda. Baryaruga omu bigo byabo nibatetema, Bahindukire MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu baine obwoba, Batiine ahabwawe." 
Micah7:18 Ni ruhanga ki orikushushana naiwe, Osaasira okutahikiirira, Oyehuzya ebicumuro by'ab'obuhunguzi bwe abatsigaireho? Taguma na kiniga ebiro byona; Ahabw'okuba ashemerererwa embabazi." 
Micah7:19 Aryagaruka kutugirira esaasi; Aryaribatiirira eby'okushiisha byaitu ahansi y'ebigyere bye. Oryanaga ebibi byaitu byona omu maizi maingi Agari ahagati y'enyanja. 
Micah7:20 Aryakorera Yakobo eby'amazima, Na Abrahamu omukorere eby'embabazi, Nk'oku waaraganiise baatatenkuriirwe Okwiha omu biro bya ira." 
Nahum1:1 Ebyahanwirwe ahari Nineeve. Ekitabo ky'okworekwa kwa Nahumu owa Elikooshi. 
Nahum1:2 MUKAMA ni Ruhanga orwana eihato kandi ohoora, MUKAMA naahora, kandi aine ekiniga kingi; MUKAMA ahoora abazigu be, Kandi abarikumwanga aguma abainiire ekiniga." 
Nahum1:3 MUKAMA tarahuka kuguubwa kubi, Aine obushoboorozi bwingi, Kandi taiha orubanja ha muntu ou rusingire. Omuhanda gwe guba mu kasooroora n'eihunga, Kandi ebicu n'omucuucu gw'ebigyere bye." 
Nahum1:4 Akabukira enyanja, eyoma, Ayomya n'emigyera yoona; Bashani na Karumeeli bihotoka, Ebirabyo bya Lebanooni bihonga." 
Nahum1:5 Enshozi zitetemera omu maisho ge, Ebibungo biyaga, N'ensi ehindurwa busha omu maisho ge, Ensi n'abagitwiremu boona." 
Nahum1:6 N'oha owaakubaasa kwemerera omu maisho ge aine ekiniga? N'oha owaakwemera okubuguma kw'ekiniga kye? Ekiniga kye kishukirwe nk'omuriro, Kandi enkiri niwe azishatura." 
Nahum1:7 MUKAMA ni murungi, N'ekigo kigumire aha izooba ry'enaku, Kandi amanya abamuhungiraho." 
Nahum1:8 Kwonka aryamariraho kimwe abazigu be N'omwegyemure ogurikuhimintika n'amaani, N'abarikumwanga ababingye, abahitsye omu mwirima." 
Nahum1:9 Ni naama ki mbi, ei murikugirira MUKAMA? Aryamariraho kimwe; Abazigu be taribahoora bwa kabiri." 
Nahum1:10 Baryayokibwa nk'amahwa gakwataine, Kandi nk'ebitsintsi by'embuba ebyomire." 
Nahum1:11 Tihaine owaakurugiremu, Akagirira MUKAMA enaama mbi, Akaha abantu obwengye bw'okukora kubi?" 
Nahum1:12 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: N'obu baraabe bari ab'amaani kandi baingi, Baryamarwaho, bahweho; N'obu ndaabe naakubonaboneise, Tindikubonabonesa bundi." 
Nahum1:13 Kandi na hati niinyija kuhenda omugamba gwe, ngukwiheho, Ncwe n'ebikubohire." 
Nahum1:14 MUKAMA aine eki agambire aha byawe, naagira ati: Eiziina ryawe tiririguma nirihungurwa, Ndyacwekyereza ekishushani kyona ekibaizire, N'ekiheesirwe ebiri omu nju ya baaruhanga baawe; Kandi ndyakurimira ekituuro, ahabw'okuba ori orikugaywa." 
Nahum1:15 Reeba aha bibungo ebigyere by'ogwo Orikureeta amakuru g'ebigambo birungi, Akaranga eby'obusingye! Iwe Yuda, guma oijukye amagyenyi gaawe, Ohikiirize ebi waaraganiise noorahira; Ahabw'okuba omubi tarigaruka kukurwanisa bundi; Acwekyerereziibwe kimwe." 
Nahum2:1 Omusheenyaguzi aizire kukurwanisa; Ta abarinzi aha ngo z'amabaare; Guma otaire amaisho aha muhanda, Oyezirikye, oyegaruremu amaani gaawe goona." 
Nahum2:2 (Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA naagaruraho ekitiinisa kya Yakobo Nke'kitiinisa kya Israeli; ahakuba abanyagi bamazireho ebyabo byona, Baakonkobora amataagi g'emizaabibu yaabo.)" 
Nahum2:3 Engabo z'amamanzi ge nizitukurikana, Abaserukare be bajwaire ebijwaro bya karari; Ebigaari ebitengire orugamba Nibimurinkana nk'ekirimi ky'omuriro; Embaraasi nizikangaza," 
Nahum2:4 Ebigaari by'orugamba nibirigitira omu mihanda rugyendwa; Nibimurinkana nk'emuri, Kandi nibirabya nk'omurabyo." 
Nahum2:5 Abakuru b'engabo nibeetwa, Bagyenda nibateera entsibo; Nibeehuuta baza aha ngo z'amabaare, Bataho eky'okwesangiza." 
Nahum2:6 Amarembo g'aha mugyera gaigwire; Ekikaari kyona emitima ebahweire omunda. 
Nahum2:7 Huzabu ajwekirwe busha, anyagirwe, Abazaana be nibatonzya, Nibacura, nibahuuma nk'enkombe, nibahuuma nk'enkombe, nibeemaamaata." 
Nahum2:8 Nineeve ni nk'enyanja, Ei amaizi gaayo gagyenzire, Nibeeta nibagira bati: Mwemerere! Mwemerere! Kwonka habura n'omwe owaareeba enyima." 
Nahum2:9 Nimunyagye efeeza, munyagye n'ezaabu! Ahakuba ebibiikire ti by'okuhwaho, N'obu byakuba ebitungirwe eby'obuguzi bwingi." 
Nahum2:10 Eshi yaayeshobera! Eshi yaasheenyuka, yaaba amatongo! Emitima ebahweire omunda, amaju nigatetema, Boona bahinduriize ahamaisho!" 
Nahum2:11 Enyanga y'entare erahi, N'ahu emigunju yaazo eriira, Ahu entare ereetera ebyana byayo eki yaita, Hataine orikubikanga?" 
Nahum2:12 Entare etaanyaguriza ebyana byabo eby'okubihaazya, Eniganigira enkazi zaayo, Eijuza amaanya gaayo ebi eitsire, Enyanga zaayo n'enyama ezi etaanyagwire." 
Nahum2:13 MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe; ndyayotsya obutaaho bwawe n'omuriro, rurara emareho emigunju yaawe y'entare; eminyago yaawe ndyagimaraho omu nsi, n'eiraka ry'entumwa zaawe tiririgaruka kuhurirwa bundi." 
Nahum3:1 Oru rurembo orurikusheesha eshagama ruryakareeba. Rwona rwijwire ebishuba n'obunyagi; Eminyago yaarwo terikubarwa. 
Nahum3:2 Okukwaya kwa kibooko, n'endigito y'enziga, Emitsindo y'embaraasi n'okubomborekana kw'ebigaari!" 
Nahum3:3 Abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi nibeeroha omu rugamba, Zaarurara nizityankana, n'amacumu nigamurinkana; Enyanja y'abantu eitsirwe, Emitumbi etungamiraine etarikubaasa kubarwa; Abantu nibagiteeraho entsibo." 
Nahum3:4 Ebyo byona bireetsirwe obwamaraaya oburengyesereize; Obwamaraaya bw'ogwo orikurigirwa, kandi oine oburogo oburikwita, Orikureebya amahanga n'obwamaraaya bwe, Akarogyesa enganda oburogo bwe." 
Nahum3:5 MUKAMA naagira ati: Reeba naaba omuzigu waawe. Ndyahenuura ekipumpuriya kyawe, kikushwekye ahamaisho, Ndekye amahanga gareebe enjuuro yaawe, n'ensi z'obugabe nzoorekye enshoni zaawe." 
Nahum3:6 Ndyakuteera ebihagaro, nkugayise, Nkugire eky'okushamaarirwa." 
Nahum3:7 Kandi abarikureeba boona baryakunuga, bakuhungye, Bagire bati: Nineeve ebaire amatongo, N'oha oraagicurire? Mbwenu nyihe hi ab'okugiyaagira?" 
Nahum3:8 Noogira ngu nookira Tebesi, Eyaabaire eri ahagati y'emigyera, Eyehinguririziibwe amaizi, Ekigo kyayo kiri enyanja, N'amaizi gari orugo rwayo?" 
Nahum3:9 Esiopia na Misri zikaba ziri amaani gaayo Agataine bugarukiro; Aba Puuti n'Abalibya bakaba bari abahwezi baayo. 
Nahum3:10 N'obu eraabe yaabaire eri etyo, Ekanyagwa, yaatwarwa omu bukwatwa; Abaana baayo abato baateerwa ahansi, Baacwagurukira omuri buri nteeraniro y'enguuto. Baateerera enteenyu abashaija baayo b'ekitiinisa, Kandi abantu baayo boona abakuru baabobohesa enjegyere." 
Nahum3:11 Naiwe oryasinda, oshoberwe, Osherure ah'okuhungira abazigu." 
Nahum3:12 Ebigo byawe byona ni nk'emitiini eine ebijuma ebirikubanza kuhiisa, Ku etengyetsibwa, bigwa omu kanwa k'omuri." 
Nahum3:13 Reeba, abaserukare baawe abari omuriiwe n'abakazi; Amarembo g'ensi yaawe gaiguriirwe abazigu, Omuriro gwokize empimbi zaawe." 
Nahum3:14 Yetahire amaizi agarimara omu biro by'okugotwa, Ogumye ebigo byawe; Oze omu ibumba, okaate obudongo, Okwate eby'okubumbisa amatafaari." 
Nahum3:15 Okwo niyo omuriro gurikwokyeza, Okaitwa rurara, ekakumaraho nk'enzigye, Yekanyise nk'enzigye, Oyekanyise nk'eseenene." 
Nahum3:16 Okakanyisa abashuubuzi baawe, Baakira enyonyoozi z'omu iguru obwingi. Enzigye ziimutsya amababa, ziguruka, zigyenda." 
Nahum3:17 Abanyiginya baawe ni nk'eseenene, Abahandiiki baawe ni nk'ekicu ky'enzigye, Eziguma zibandami aha ngo Aha izooba ry'embeho; Omushana gukijwa, zikaguruka, zikagyenda, Hakabura owaamanya ei ziri." 
Nahum3:18 Iwe mugabe wa Asiria 'we, Abariisa baawe bagwejegyeire, N'abakungu baawe nibahungira; Abantu baawe bataataaniire aha bibungo, Babuzire ow'okubataaruura." 
Nahum3:19 Tihariho w'okutuubya obusaasi bwawe, Obuhuta bwawe ni bubi munonga; Boona abarikuhurira ebyawe Bateera omu ngaro nibakwesiimirana. Mbwenu n'oha otakahikwahoga obubi bwawe obutahwa?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Eby'okuhanuura ebi nabi Habakuuki yaayorekirwe. 
Habakkuk1:2 Ai MUKAMA, ndyahitysa hi okukutakira, Okanga kumpurira? Nari okukutakira ahabw'okukorwa kubi, Otanjune?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Ahabw'enki nondeebesa ebitahikire n'eby'eitima? Okuhwerekyerera n'obubisha birii omu maisho gangye, Entongane n'empaka ziri ahaiguru." 
Habakkuk1:4 N'ahabw'ekyo ebiragiro tibikiine maani, Kandi n'emanja tizirikucuubwa mu buryo. Ahabw'okuba ababi nibeehinduririza abahikiriire, Nikyo emanja z'oburo zirikwitirwa." 
Habakkuk1:5 Nimwetegyereze omu muhanga, mureebe; Mutangaare, mute engaro aha munwa; Ahabw'okuba ninkora omurimo omu biro byanyu, Ogu mutarikubaasa kwikiriza, n'obu mwakugambirwa muta." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ahakuba reeba, niinyimutsya Abakaludaaya, Eryo ihanga ry'enshaarizi kandi eririkubakuka, Eririkubuga ensi yoona Kukubuura amaka agatari gaaryo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Nibatiinisa, kandi nibaitsa obwoba, Emicwe yaabo n'ekitiinisa kyabo Nibo barikubyeha." 
Habakkuk1:8 Embaraasi zaabo ziine amaguru kukira engwe, Nizishaarira okukira emishega y'omu mwabazyo; Abarikuzigyenderaho nibazikinisa n'amaryo, Buzima abantu baabo abazitembire nibaruga hare. Nibaguruka nk'eishamba eririkusyoka kuteera eky'okurya." 
Habakkuk1:9 Boona nibareetwa okukora eby'obubisha, Okutiinisa kwabo kubeebembeire, Nibarunda hamwe enkwatwa nk'omusheenyi." 
Habakkuk1:10 Nibateerera abagabe enaku, Nibagaaniiza abategyeki. Buri kigo nibakishekyerera, Ahabw'okuba nibakirundaho eitaka, bakikwata." 
Habakkuk1:11 Batyo barabaho nk'omuyaga, bagumizamu, N'abantu abaine orubanja, abahindwire amaani gaabo ruhanga waabo." 
Habakkuk1:12 Ai MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye, Orikwera wangye, Tori otahwaho ebiro byona? Titurifa. Ai MUKAMA, obataireho kucwera abantu emanja; Naiwe Rukiri, obahamize ngu babone kuhana." 
Habakkuk1:13 Iwe ow'amaisho gashemeire, agatenda kureeba kibi, Kandi agatarikwemera kureeba bitahikire, Ahabw'enki nooreeba abantu endeebya, Omubi naamirakwo orikumukiza okuhikiirira, Haza okeetsiza?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Ahakuba noohindura abantu nk'eby'enyanja, Baba nk'ebirikugyendesa enda, ebitagira mukama." 
Habakkuk1:15 Boona abatuuhuuzamu eirobo, Abaihisamu akatimba ke, Abakwatsa entukuru; Atyo ashemererwa, ayesiima." 
Habakkuk1:16 N'ahabw'ekyo atambira akatimba ke ebitambo, Ayooterera entukuru ye obubaane, Ahakuba ebyo nibyo bimureetera kujarama, Akarya eby'ebishaju." 
Habakkuk1:17 Naija kuguma naafukunkura entukuru ye, Naita amahanga ebiro byona ataine saasi?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Niinyija kwemerera kureeba, Nyemerere aha munaara gw'okurindiraho, Nnagye amaisho, ndeebe eki arangambire, N'eki ndaagarukyemu ahabw'ebi ndikwetonganira." 
Habakkuk2:2 MUKAMA yangarukamu ati: Handiika ebi waayorekwa, Obihandiikye gye aha bishate, Oraabishome abishome naarahutsya." 
Habakkuk2:3 Ahabw'okuba ebi waayorekwa ebyo biine obunaku bwabyo obwatairweho; Tibirituuraho kuhikiirizibwa, Kandi tibiribeiha. N'obu byakutuuraho, obitegyereze; Buzimazima biryaija, tibirikyerererwa." 
Habakkuk2:4 Reeba, ow'omutima ogutagororokire aryaremwa; Kwonka ohikiriire aryaba ohuriire ahabw'okwikiriza kwe." 
Habakkuk2:5 Kandi buzimazima viinyo eba bareebyana, Kandi omunyamaryo otaikara muka. Omururu gwe ni mwingi nk'Okuzimu; Ni nka rufu, tahaaga. Ayeteeraniraho amahanga goona, Ayeshangururizaho enganda zoona." 
Habakkuk2:6 Abo boona tibarimugaaniiza, bakamuteerera enaku? nibagira bati: Eshi oyerundira ebitari bye, aryakareeba! Mbwenu aryahitsya hi? Orikwerundaho emikwato nawe aryakareeba!" 
Habakkuk2:7 Abu orikwihuza tibariimuka kitaraariire, N'abarikutetemesa bakasisiimuka? Obwo oryaba omunyago gwabo." 
Habakkuk2:8 Ahabw'okunyaga amahanga maingi, Amahanga goona agatsigaireho naiwe garyakunyaga, Nigakutura eshagama y'abantu n'obubisha, Obu waagiriire ensi n'endembo n'abazitwiremu boona." 
Habakkuk2:9 Aryakareeba, otunga amagoba mabi ahabw'eka ye, Ngu ayeyarikire ekyashuri kye ahaiguru, Akabi koona karekye kumuhikaho." 
Habakkuk2:10 Enaama ei waagizire, okamaraho amahanga maingi, Okahemura eka yaawe; Waareebya amagara gaawe." 
Habakkuk2:11 Ahabw'okuba eibaare riryaboroogyera omu kisiika, N'omutambiko gw'omu biti by'enju gurigarukyemu." 
Habakkuk2:12 Orikwombekyesa tauni eshagama, Akahamisa orurembo okutahikiirira, ayakareeba!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Mbwenu, eki tikirikuruga ahari MUKAMA ow'amahe, Abantu okuhendekyera omuriro gwonka, N'amahanga okwerusya ahabw'ebitaine mugasho?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Ahabw'okuba ensi eryabugwa Okumanya ekitiinisa kya MUKAMA, Nk'oku amaizi gabuga hoona omu nyanja." 
Habakkuk2:15 Aryakareeba, orikunywaisa mutaahi we ekikopo ky'ekiniga kye, Akakimusinzisa, ngu areebe enjuuro ye." 
Habakkuk2:16 Oryaiguta enshoni omu mwanya gw'ekitiinisa. Naiwe nywa, otaruze! Ekikopo ekiri omu ngaro ya MUKAMA eya buryo Nikiija kurugaho kikuhikyeho, Enshoni zize aha ktiinisa kyawe." 
Habakkuk2:17 Obubisha obwagiriirwe Lebanooni buryakumaraho, Okucwekyereza enyamaishwa kwawe kukwitse obwoba, Ahabw'eshagama y'abantu ei waaseesire, N'obubisha obu waagiriire ensi, N'endembo n'abazitwiremu boona." 
Habakkuk2:18 Ekishushani ekirikuramibwa nikigasha ki, Omukozi waakyo yaaheza kukikora, Ekishushani ky'ekyoma ekirikwegyesa ebishuba? Ahakuba omukozi ku aba naakora ebishushani bitarikugamba, Aba naayesiga ebi ayekoreire n'emikono ye." 
Habakkuk2:19 Aryakareeba, orikugira ekiti ati: Sisiimuka! N'eibaare eritarikugamba ati: Imuka! Nimugira ngu ebyo nibibasa kwegyesa? Reeba, bishwekirwe ezaabu n'efeeza, Kandi tibirimu mwitsyo gwona." 
Habakkuk2:20 Kwonka MUKAMA ari omuri hekalu ye erikwera; Ensi yoona ececekye omu maisho ge. 
Habakkuk3:1 Okushaba kwa Habakuuki omu iraka rya Shigionoosi. 
Habakkuk3:2 Ai MUKAMA, mpuriire ebyawe, naatiina, Ai MUKAMA, garura busya omurimo gwawe omuri egi myaka, Ahagati y'egi myaka ogumanyise; Omu kugira ekiniga oijukye okugira embabazi." 
Habakkuk3:3 Ruhanga akaruga Temani, Orikwera yaaruga aha rushozi Parani, Ekitiinisa kye kyashweka eiguru, Kandi ensi yaijura okuhimbisibwa kwe. Sela" 
Habakkuk3:4 Okumurinkana kwe kwaba nk'omushana, Amaranzi gaaturuka omu ngaro ze nigarabya; Kandi okwo niyo yaasherekire amaani ge." 
Habakkuk3:5 Orufu rwamwebembera, Emyambi y'omuriro yaamukuratira, emuri omu ntegye." 
Habakkuk3:6 Yaayemerera, yaagyera ensi; Yaanga amaisho, yaatengyetsa amahanga; Obwo enshozi ezituuraho zaataataanisibwa, N'ebibungo by'ebiro byona byabandama, Emitwarize ye yaaba nk'eya ira." 
Habakkuk3:7 Naareeba amahema ga Kushani nigabonabona; Emikingo y'ensi ya Midiani yaatetema. 
Habakkuk3:8 Ai MUKAMA, beitu shi okaba oiniire emigyera ekiniga, Nari shi egyo migyera niyo waagwereirwe kubi, Nari shi okagirira enyanja ekiniga, Obu waagyendera aha mbaraasi zaawe, N'omu kigaari kyawe ky'obusinguzi?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Okashembuura obuta bwawe, Waatamika emyambi omu rugye. Sela Ensi waagicwamu emikura y'emigyera." 
Habakkuk3:10 Enshonzi zaakureeba, zaatiina, Emyegyemure y'amaizi yaahimintika, Eiraka ry'amaizi g'ahagati y'enyanja ryahurirwa, Ebingozi byayo byanaga emikono." 
Habakkuk3:11 Eizooba n'okwezi byayemerera omu myanya yaabyo, Ahabw'okumurinkana kw'emyambi yaawe neerashwa, N'ahabw'okurabya kw'eicumu ryawe eririkutyankana." 
Habakkuk3:12 Okagyenda nooraba omu nsi oine ekiniga kingi, Waaribatiirira amahanga ogagwereirwe kubi." 
Habakkuk3:13 Okahurura kujuna abantu baawe, N'okujuna ou waashukireho amajuta. Waasingyera omutwe gw'omubi, Waamujweka busha okuruga aha bibero okuhika omu bitsya. Sela" 
Habakkuk3:14 Waacumuta emitwe y'abarwani be emango zaawe, Abaizire nk'akasooroora kuntuntumura, Nibeesiima nk'abarikwenda kumaraho abooro bwesherekye." 
Habakkuk3:15 Enyanja waagiribatiiriza embaraasi zaawe, Okwecunda kw'amaizi g'amaani." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ku naahuriire, naagira orutetema omunda, Eminwa yangye yaagira ekitengo ahabw'eryo iraka; Okujunda kwantaaha omu magufa, Amaguru ganjogajogoka. Ndyategyereza eizooba ry'enaku, ntuurize, Ku rihika aha bantu abarihurura kututeera." 
Habakkuk3:17 N'obu emitiini eraabe etarikurabya, Emizaabibu etaine bijuma, Emizeituuni ebuzire amajta, Emisiri etarikwera by'okurya, Obusyo bw'entaama buhweire omu kibuga, N'obw'ente buhweire omuka," 
Habakkuk3:18 Kwonka ndyashemerererwa MUKAMA, Nyesiimire omuri Ruhanga ow'okujunwa kwangye." 
Habakkuk3:19 RUHANGA Mukama niwe amaani gangye; Ahindura ebigyere byangye nk'eby'empara, Kandi angyendesa omu myanya yangye etunguukire. Aha mukuru w'abeeshongozi byeshongorerwe aha nanga y'emirya." 
Zephaniah1:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyaizire ahari Zefania mwene Kuushi, mwijukuru wa Gedalia, mwene Amaria, mwijukuru wa Hezekia, omu busingye bwa Yosia mwene Amoni omugabe wa Yuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 MUKAMA naagira ati: Ndyamariraho kimwe Ebintu byona aha nsi," 
Zephaniah1:3 Mmareho abantu n'enyamaishwa, Mmareho ebirikuguruka omu mwanya, Kandi n'eby'omu nyanja. Ndyahwerekyereza ababi, Mmareho oyetwa omuntu weena ori omu nsi; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Zephaniah1:4 Ndyabangira Yuda omukono, N'abatwire omuri Yerusaalemu boona; Kandi omuri ogu mwanya ndyamaramu aba Baali abatsigaireho, Mmareho eiziina ry'abanyamurwa abarikuramya ebishushani;" 
Zephaniah1:5 Abarikuramiza eihe ry'omu iguru Aha mitwe y'amaju, Abarikuramya nibarahira MUKAMA, Kandi bakaramya na Milikoomu;" 
Zephaniah1:6 Kandi n'abaagarukire enyima, bakareka kukuratira MUKAMA, Abatakisherura MUKAMA, n'obu kwakuba okumwehanuuzaho." 
Zephaniah1:7 Ceceka omu maisho ga Mukama RUHANGA! Ahakuba eizooba rya MUKAMA riri haihi; MUKAMA atebeekaniise ekitambo, Yaayeza abagyenyi be." 
Zephaniah1:8 Aha izooba ry'ekitambo kya MUKAMA Ndyafubira abategyeki na batabani b'omugabe N'abajwaire ebijwaro by'enduga-mahanga boona. 
Zephaniah1:9 Kandi eryo izooba ndyafubira Buri muntu orikuguruka omuryango, N'abariwijuza enju ya mukama waabo Obubisha n'oburyangatanisa." 
Zephaniah1:10 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Eryo izooba Enduuru eryahurirwa neeruga aha irembo ry'Eby'enyanja, N'okuborooga nikur3eetwa omu kicweka kya kabiri, N'okubaruka kuhango nikuruga omu bibungo." 
Zephaniah1:11 Imwe batuuzi ba Makiteehsi 'mwe, nimuboroogye! Ahakuba abashuubuzi boona tibaakiriho, N'abarikupima efeeza boona bamazirweho." 
Zephaniah1:12 Omuri obwo bunaku ndyacaakisa Yerusaalemu amatabaaza, Nfubire abantu abarikugira omu mitima yaabo Bati: MUKAMA tarikora kurungi, n'obu kwakuba okukora kubi." 
Zephaniah1:13 Ebintu byabo biryanyagwa, N'amaju gaabo gacwekyerezibwe. N'obu baraayombekye amaju, Kwonka tibarigaraaramu; N'obu baraabyare emizaabibu, Kwonka tibarinywa viinyo yaayo." 
Zephaniah1:14 Eizooba rya MUKAMA erikuru riri haihi; Riri haihi, kandi nirirahuka munonga; Nimuhurire! Eizooba rya MUKAMA! Emanzi neetakirayo munonga." 
Zephaniah1:15 Eryo izooba n'eizooba ry'ekiniga, Ery'enaku n'obusaasi, Ery'okucwekyereza n'okumariraho kimwe, Ery'ekibunda n'omwirima, Ery'ebicu n'omwirima ndindindi," 
Zephaniah1:16 Ery'okuteera enzamba y'akasirikiriro n'enduuru y'orugamba, Kurwanisa endembo ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare N'eminaara miraingwa." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ndyareetera abantu okweshobera, Babandagire nk'empumi; Ahabw'okuba bakacumura ahari MUKAMA, Eshagama yaabo eryasheeshwa nk'omucuucu, n'emibiri yaabo enagwe nk'amazi." 
Zephaniah1:18 Efeeza zaabo, n'obu zaakuba ezaabu zaabo, Tiziribaasa kubajuna aha izooba ry'ekiniga kya MUKAMA. Kureka ensi yoona eryamarwaho Omuriro gw'eihato ry'ekiniga kye; Eego, aryamariraho kimwe Abatwire omu nsi boona kitaraariire." 
Zephaniah2:1 Imwe ihanga ritaine kashoni 'mwe, Nimwije, muteeranire hamwe," 
Zephaniah2:2 Mutakabingirwe Nk'ebishushunga ebirikutuntumuka, Mutakahikirweho kiniga kya MUKAMA ekingi, Mutakahikirweho izooba ry'ekiniga kya MUKAMA." 
Zephaniah2:3 Imwe abacureezi b'omu nsi mwena, Abakora ebi MUKAMA aragiira, Nimumusherure; Kandi musherure okuhikiirira n'obucureezi; Obundi mukaasherekwa aha izooba ry'ekiniga kya MUKAMA." 
Zephaniah2:4 Ahabw'okuba Gaaza eryatsigwaho, Ashikelooni ehindukye amatongo, Ab'omuri Ashidoodi babingwe omu ihangwe, Na Ekurooni erandurwe." 
Zephaniah2:5 Imwe ihanga ry'Abakeresi 'mwe, Abatwire aha rubaju rw'enyanja, muryakareeba! Imwe Abanyakanaani, ensi y'Abafilistia, Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kiryabarwanisa. Ndyabacwekyereza okuhitsya obu hatarigira Mutuuzi weena owaatsigaraho." 
Zephaniah2:6 Kandi ezo mbaju z'enyanja ziryaba amariisizo, Amaka g'abariisa n'ag'amasyo g'entaama," 
Zephaniah2:7 Zibe ez'ab'enju ya Yuda, Abariba batsigaireho, baziriisizemu, Kandi omu maju g'omuri Ashikelooni Nimwo baribyama omu mwabazyo; Ahakuba MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo aryabataho omutima, Abaihe omu bukwatwa, abagarure." 
Zephaniah2:8 MUKAMA ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Israeli naagira ati: Nkahurira ebigaaniizo bya Moabu N'ebijumo by'Abaamoni, Oku baagaaniirize abantu bangye, Bakeehimbisa ku barikwija kuteera ensi yaabo." 
Zephaniah2:9 N'habw'ekyo niinyerahira nti: Buzimazima Moabu eryaba nka Sodoma N'Abaamoni babe nka Gomora, Ensi emazirweho ebicuragyenyi n'ebiina by'omwonyo, Ebeere kimwe amatongo ebiro byona. Abantu bangye abaritsigaraho baryabanyaga, N'ab'eihanga ryangye abarihonokaho baryabakubuura." 
Zephaniah2:10 Ebyo nibyo barizimuurirwa ahabw'amaryo gaabo, ahabw'okuba bakateerera enaku abantu ba MUKAMA ow'amahe, Baabeesiimirana." 
Zephaniah2:11 MUKAMA aryabarwanisa omu muringo gurikutiinisa; Eego, baaruhanga b'ensi boona aryabahorootsa, Kandi abantu baryamuramya, Buri muntu amuramize ei ari, Nangwa n'ab'omu nsi zoona ez'amahanga." 
Zephaniah2:12 Naimwe Abanyesiopia, Muryaitwa rurara yangye;" 
Zephaniah2:13 Kandi aryabanga omukono gwe kurwanisa obukiizi-bwa-bumohso, Acwekyereze Asiria, Ahindure Nineeve amatongo, Ebe ensi ekarangataine nk'eihamba ry'omusheenyi." 
Zephaniah2:14 Kandi amasyo g'ente garyagibyamamu, N'enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ishwa, Ebihuhura-bahuta n'ebinyogote Biryatuura omu bisheenyuka by'enyomyo zaayo, Ebihihizi bihihirire omu madirisha gaayo, N'ebikoona bigambire omu bisasi by'amaju gaayo; Ahakuba embaaho zaayo z'emyereezi ziryashuuruurwa." 
Zephaniah2:15 Oru nirwo rurembo ruri orwabaire rutwire buhooro, Nirwehimbisa, nirwegira ruti: Niinye ndiho, tihariho ondiijo. Mbwenu ka ruhindukire amatongo, Rukaba oburaaro bw'enyamaishwa! Orikururabaho weena Naayeshaanya, aruha mutinzi." 
Zephaniah3:1 Orurembo orurikuhata, orugomi, Kandi orusiisikaire, ruyakareeba!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Tirurikuhurira iraka, Tirurikwenda kuhanwa, Tirurikwirira haihi Ruhanga waarwo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Abategyeki baamwo n'entare ezirikutsinda, Abaramuzi baarwo n'emishega y'omu mwabazyo Etagira ki etsiga okuhitsya omu kasheehe;" 
Zephaniah3:4 Baanabi baarwo n'abantu batyo Abatarikwesigwa; Abanyamurwa baarwo nibashiisha ekyetwa ekirikwera kyona, Nibashiisha nkana Ebiragiro." 
Zephaniah3:5 MUKAMA ori ahagati yaarwo n'ohikiriire, Takora kubi; Buri kasheeshe areeta eby'oburyo bye omu mushana, Tayosha; Kwonka otahikiriire tagira kashoni." 
Zephaniah3:6 Mmazireho amahanga, Eminaara yaago n'ebisheenyuka; Nyitiire kimwe enguuto zaago, Ngu hatagira owaazirabamu; Endembo zaago zihindukire amatongo, Zaabura omuntu, zaabura n'ow'okuzituuramu." 
Zephaniah3:7 Naagira nti: Buzimazima ruryantiina, Rwikirize kuhanwa, Rurekye kwehuzya Ebi naaruragiire byona. Kwonka abarutwiremu baayeyongyera kwezirika Kushiisha omu kukora kwabo kwona." 
Zephaniah3:8 MUKAMA naagira ati: N'ahabw'ekyo muntegyereze, Okuhitsya aha izooba eri ndiimukiraho ndi mushinja; Ahabw'okuba mmaririire kuteeranira hamwe Amahanga n'obugabe butari bumwe, Mbone kubishukaho ekiniga kyangye N'okuguubwa kubi kwangye kwona, Ahakuba ensi yoona eryamarwaho Omuriro gw'eihato ry'ekiniga kyangye." 
Zephaniah3:9 Eego, omuri obwo bunaku ndyahindura engambo y'amahanga, Ebe engambo nungi, Ab'omuri ago mahanga boona Babone kutakira eiziina rya MUKAMA N'okumuheereza n'omutima gumwe." 
Zephaniah3:10 Abariinyeshengyereza nibo bantu bangye abaataataine; Baryandeetera empongano, nibagiiha seeri y'emigyera ya Esiopia." 
Zephaniah3:11 Iwe Israeli, eryo izooba torikwatwa nshoni Ahabw'ebi waakozire nongomera; Ahabw'okuba obwo ndyakwihamu Abanyamaryo baawe abarikwehimbisa; Kandi torigaruka kwekunikira Ha rushozi rwangye orurikwera." 
Zephaniah3:12 Ahakuba ndyakutsigamu Abantu abacureezi kandi abatarikwetunguura; Baryasherura obuhungiro omu iziina rya MUKAMA. 
Zephaniah3:13 Kandi abaritsigara omuri Israeli tibarikora kubi, N'obu kwakuba okugamba ebishuba, N'orurimi rw'obugobya Tirurishangwa mu kanwa kaabo; Ahakuba baryarya, babyame Hataine orikubatiinisa." 
Zephaniah3:14 Iwe Saayuuni, yeshongore munonga; Iwe Israeli, teera akaari! Naiwe Yerusaalemu, shemererwa, Oyesiime n'omutima gwawe gwona!" 
Zephaniah3:15 MUKAMA akwihireho emanja ezi obaire oine, N'abazigu baawe yaabanaga aheeru. Omugabe wa Israeli, MUKAMA, ari ahagati yaawe; Torigaruka kutiina kabi bundi." 
Zephaniah3:16 Eryo izooba baryagira Yerusaalemu bati: Iwe Saayuuni 'we, otatiina, Emikono yaawe etatentebuka." 
Zephaniah3:17 MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe ari ahagati yaawe, Emanzi erikujuna. Aryakushemerererwa, aine obunanukye, Aryakushemerererwa, naayeshongora Nk'aha izooba ry'obugyenyi." 
Zephaniah3:18 MUKAMA naagira ati: Ndyakwihaho akabi, Karekye kukujumisa." 
Zephaniah3:19 Reeba, omuri obwo bunaku Ndyaitana n'abarikukuhata boona. Ndyakiza abarema, Ntaaruure encuubwa; Kandi abaabaire bahemukiire omu nsi yoona Ndyabaha okugmbwa gye n'eiziina rirungi." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ndyabagarura owaanyu omu bunaku Obu ndibataaruuriramu; Ahakuba ku ndigarura abantu baanyu Abatwairwe omu bukwatwa nimureeba, Ndyabaha eiziina rirungi n'okuhimbisibwa Omu mahanga goona ag'omu nsi; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Haggai1:1 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Dario, omu kwezi kwa mukaaga, aha kiro kyakwo ky'okubanza, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaija ahari Zerubabeeli, mwene Shealutieli, omutegyeki wa Yuda, n'ahari Yoshua mwene Yehozadaaki omunyamurwa omukuru, nikiraba omuri nabi Hagai, nikigira kiti:" 
Haggai1:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Abantu aba nibagira bati: Obunaku bw'okugaruka kwombeka enju ya MUKAMA tibukahikire. 
Haggai1:3 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija nikiraba omuri nabi Hagai nikigira kiti: 
Haggai1:4 Nimugira ngu obu nibwo bunaku obu mushemereire kuraara omu maju gaanyu agashwekirwe embaaho omunda, haza enju egi ekaguma eri omushaka?" 
Haggai1:5 N'ahabw'ekyo hati MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Muteekateekye aha mitwarize yaanyu. 
Haggai1:6 Mukabiba bingi, mwagyesha bikye; nimurya kwonka timurikuhaaga; nimunywa, kwonka timurikuhwa iriho; nimujwara, kwonka timurikutagatirwa; kandi n'orikukorera ebihembo, naabikorera kubibiika omu nshaho efumukire." 
Haggai1:7 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Muteekateekye aha mitwarize yaanyu. 
Haggai1:8 Mwinamukye omu bibungo, mureete ebiti, mwombekye egyo nju, mbone kugishemerererwa n'okugihimbisizibwamu; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Haggai1:9 Mukagira amatsiko g'okutunga bingi, mbwenu reeba, bibaire bikye; kandi ku mubireetsire omuka, naabihuuha, byatuntumuka. Nimugira ngu ekyo kireetsirwe ki? nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikubuuza. Kireetsirwe enju yangye kuguma eri omushaka, haza buri muntu omuriimwe akahugira aha kwombeka eye." 
Haggai1:10 Nikyo eiguru ahaiguru yaanyu riimiire orume ahabwanyu, n'ensi ekanga kweza," 
Haggai1:11 naanye nkareeta omushana mwingi omu nsi n'aha bibungo, aha mbibo, ahari viinyo, aha majuta, aha birikumera omu itaka byona, aha bantu, aha matungo n'aha bi barikuhendekyera byona." 
Haggai1:12 Bwanyima Zerubabeeli mwene Shealutieli, na Yoshua mwene Yehozadaaki omunyamurwa omukuru n'abantu boona abaatsigaireho, baayorobera eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo yaamutumire; kandi abantu boona baatiina MUKAMA." 
Haggai1:13 Bwanyima Hagai, entumwa ya MUKAMA, yaagambira abantu ebi MUKAMA amutumire, naagira ati: MUKAMA naagira ati: Ndi hamwe naimwe." 
Haggai1:14 Atyo MUKAMA yaimutsya omutima gwa Zerubabeeli mwene Shealutieli omutegyeki wa Yuda, n'ogwa Yoshua mwene Yehozadaaki omunyamurwa omukuru, n'ey'abantu boona abaatsigareho, baija, baatandika kwombeka enju ya MUKAMA ow'amahe Ruhanga waabo," 
Haggai1:15 aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina omuri okwo kwezi kwa mukaaga. 
Haggai2:1 Omuri ogwo mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Dario, omu kwezi kwa mushanju, aha kiro kyakwo ekya makumi abiri na kimwe, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyaija nikiraba omuri nabi Hagai, nikigira kiti:" 
Haggai2:2 Gambira Zerubabeeli, mwene Shealutieli na Yoshua mwene Yehozadaaki omunyamurwa omukuru n'abantu boona abatsigaireho oti:" 
Haggai2:3 Beitu omuriimwe harimu otsigaireho owaareebire ekitiinisa eki enju egi yaabaire eine obunyakare? Mbwenu hati nimugireeba muta? Ti busha omu maisho gaanyu? 
Haggai2:4 Kwonka hati guma, iwe Zerubabeeli; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira; naiwe Yoshua mwene Yehozadaaki omunyamurwa omukuru, guma; kandi naimwe abantu b'omuri egi nsi mwena, mugume, kandi mukore; ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naimwe; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira," 
Haggai2:5 nk'eki naaragaine naimwe, obu mwaruga Misri, oku kiri. Omwoyo wangye atuura omuriimwe, mutatiina." 
Haggai2:6 Ahakuba oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: omu kaanya kakye niinyija kugaruka ntengyetse eiguru n'ensi, enyanja n'eitaka;" 
Haggai2:7 kandi ndyatengyetsa amahanga goona, eitungo ry'ago mahanga goona riije, n'egi nju ngiijuze ekitiinisa; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Haggai2:8 Efeeza n'ezangye, ezaabu nazo n'ezangye; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Haggai2:9 Ekitiinisa ky'egi nju ekya bwanyima kiryakira ekyayo eky'okubanza; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira; kandi omuri ogu myanya nimwo ndiheera obusingye; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira. 
Haggai2:10 Kandi aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina omu kwezi kwa mwenda omuri ogwo mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Dario, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyaija nikiraba omuri nabi Hagai, nikigira kiti:" 
Haggai2:11 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Buuza abanyamurwa ekibuuzo eki oti: 
Haggai2:12 Omuntu ku yaakutwarira enyama eyeziibwe omu kicweka kya ifo eky'ekanzu ye, yaakikoza aha mugaati, nari aha kicumbe, nari omuri viinyo nari omu majuta nari aha by'okurya by'omuringo gwona, kikaaba ekirikwera? Abanyamurwa baagarukamu bati: Ngaaha." 
Haggai2:13 Hagai yaagaruka yaababuuza ati: omuntu orikushiishwa okukora aha mutumbi, ku yaakukora aha kintu kimwe ahari ebyo, kikaaba ekitashemeire? Abanyamurwa baagarukamu bati: Eego, kikaaba ekitashemeire." 
Haggai2:14 Bwanyima Hagai yaagira ati: MUKAMA naagira ati: Kandi nikwo kiri n'omu maisho gangye ahari aba bantu n'ahari eri ihanga; kandi nikwo kiri n'aha murimo gwona ogu barikukoresa emikono yaabo; kandi n'eki barikuhongyerayo kyona kisiisikaire. 
Haggai2:15 Mbwenu nimbeeshengyereza, muteekateekye ebirikwija kubaho okwiha hati. Obu eibaare ryona ryabaire ritakatairwe ha rindi omuri hekalu ya MUKAMA, bikabasusira ki?" 
Haggai2:16 Obu omuntu yaabaire ahika aha kirundo ky'encuro makumi abiri, akashangamu ikumi ryonka; kandi obu omuntu yaabaire ahika aha bwato bwa viinyo kutahamu enjoga makumi ataano, akashanga ziri makumi abiri zonka." 
Haggai2:17 Nkabateeza okubabuka, okusya-nyamwenga n'orubaare, kwonka nabwo timurangarukiire; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Haggai2:18 Nimbeeshengyereza muteekateekye okwiha hati, aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina eky'okwezi kwa mwenda n'omu biro ebirikwija. Okwiha aha izooba eri omusingi gwa hekalu ya MUKAMA gwateereirweho, muteekateekye." 
Haggai2:19 Embibo zikiri omu bitara? Emizaabibu, emitiini9, emikomamahanga n'emizeituuni nibikyera buhsa? Okwiha eri izooba niinyija kubaha omugisha." 
Haggai2:20 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyaija ahari Hagai obwa kabiri aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina ky'okwo kwezi nikigira kiti: 
Haggai2:21 Gambira Zerubabeeli omutegyeki wa Yuda noogira oti: Niinyija kutengyetsa eiguru n'ensi," 
Haggai2:22 njuumikye ekitebe ky'obugabe; kandi niinyija kumaraho amaani g'obugabe bw'amahanga, njuumikye ebigaari by'orugamba n'abarikubigyenderamu; biryagwa ahansi, buri muntu aitwe rurara ya mugyenzi we." 
Haggai2:23 Kandi MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Eryo izooba ndyakutwara, iwe Zerubabeeli omwiru wangye, mwene Shealutieli, nkugire empeta y'akamanyiso; ahabw'okuba nkutooraine; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Zechariah1:1 Omu kwezi kwa munaana omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Dario, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaija ahari nabi Zekaria mwene Berekia mwijukuru wa Ido, nikigira kiti:" 
Zechariah1:2 MUKAMA akagwerwa kubi munonga baashwenkuriimwe; 
Zechariah1:3 n'ahabw'ekyo obagire oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Mungarukire, naanye niinyija kubagarukira; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Zechariah1:4 Mutaba nka baashwenkuriimwe, abu baanabi aba ira baabaire bagambira n'eiraka rihango bati: Mugarukye, murekye emitwarize yaanyu mibi, n'ebibi ebi murikukora. Kwonka baayanga kumpurira, n'obu kwakuba okuunyetaho; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Zechariah1:5 Mbwenu, baashwenkuriimwe barahi? Na baanabi, nimugira ngu batuuraho ebiro byona?" 
Zechariah1:6 Beitu ebigambo byangye n'ebiragiro byangye, ebi naaragiire abairu bangye baanabi, tibirahikire ahari baashwenkuriimwe? N'ahabw'ekyo bakeeteisa nibagira bati: Nk'oku MUKAMA ow'amahe yaamaririire kutugira, nk'emitwarize yaitu n'ebi twakozire, oku biri, nikwo atugizire." 
Zechariah1:7 Aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina omu kwezi kwa ikumi na kumwe, okwezi okurikwetwa Shebati, omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Dario, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaija ahari nabi Zekaria, mwene Berekia, mwijukuru wa Ido; nawe nikwo kugira ati:" 
Zechariah1:8 Nyekiro ku ngiire kugira nti, naareeba omushaija naagyendera aha mbaraasi erikutukura; yaayemerera ahagati y'emiti emikadasi eri omu kahanga; kandi enyima ye habaire ahariyo embaraasi ezirikutukura, ez'obugondo n'ezirikwera." 
Zechariah1:9 Ntyo naabuuza nti: Biriya niki, mukma wangye? Maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye yangarukamu ati: Naaza kukworeka amakuru gaabyo." 
Zechariah1:10 Atyo omushaija owaabaire ayemereire omu mikadasi yaagira ati: Aba nibo MUKAMA atumire kugyendagyenda nibeetegyereza ensi. 
Zechariah1:11 Baagarukamu maraika owaabaire ayemereire omu mikadasi, nibagira bati: Tuherize kugyendagyenda omu nsi, twagyetegyereza, twashanga ensi yoona ecureire, etuurize." 
Zechariah1:12 Bwanyima maraika wa MUKAMA yaagira ati: Ai MUKAMA ow'amahe, oryahitsya hi okutasaasira Yerusaalemu n'endembo za Yuda, ezi omazire emyaka makumi mushanju ogwereirwe kubi?" 
Zechariah1:13 Maraika ogwo owaabaire naagamba naanye, MUKAMA yaamugarukamu ebigambo by'embabazi kandi ebirikuhuumuriza." 
Zechariah1:14 Atyo maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye yangira ati: Gamba n'eiraka rihango, noogira oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Nyine eihato ringi ahabwa Yerusaalemu na Saayuuni." 
Zechariah1:15 Kandi nyine ekiniga kingi ahabw'amahanga agataine ki geetaireho; ahabw'okuba ku naagwereirwe kubi kakye Abaisraeli, ago mahanga gaababonabonesa, gaarengyesereza." 
Zechariah1:16 Nikyo MUKAMA arikugirira ati: Ngarukiire Yerusaalemu, ngiiniire embabazi; enju yangye eryagyombekwamu, kandi omugoye gw'okugyeresa guryagyeresibwa omuri Yerusaalemu; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Zechariah1:17 Garuka ogambe n'eiraka rihango oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Endembo zangye ziryagaruka ziijure obugwa gye, bushandaare hoona, MUKAMA agarukye ahuumurize Saayuuni, atoorane Yerusaalemu." 
Zechariah1:18 Bwanyima naimutsya amaisho; ku naagire kugira nti, naareeba amahembe ana." 
Zechariah1:19 Naabuuza maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye nti: Biriya niki? Yangarukamu ati: Biriya nigo mahembe agaataataaniise Yuda, Israeli na Yerusaalemu." 
Zechariah1:20 Bwanyima MUKAMA yaanyoreka abaheesi bana. 
Zechariah1:21 Naamubuuza nti: Bariya baija kukora ki? Yangarukamu ati: Ago nigo mahembe agaataataaniise Yuda, hakabura owaimutsya omutwe, kandi abo baheesi baizire kutiinisa amahanga agaimukize amahembe gaago kurwanisa ensi ya Yuda kugitaataanisa, n'okuteera ahansi ago mahembe." 
Zechariah2:1 Kandi naimutsya amaisho; ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba omuntu oine omugoye gw'okugyeresa omu ngaro ze." 
Zechariah2:2 Naamubuuza nti: Nooza hi? Yangarukamu ati: Ninza kugyera Yerusaalemu kumanya obukiika n'oburaingwa bwayo. 
Zechariah2:3 Reeba, maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye yaashohora, kandi maraika ondiijo yaija kumubugana;" 
Zechariah2:4 yaamugira ati: Imuka ogambire oriya mutsigazi, noogira oti: Yerusaalemu eryatuurwamu, nk'oku batuura omu birorero ebitaine ngo, ahabw'abantu baamwo n'amatungo gaabo kuba bingi;" 
Zechariah2:5 ahakuba niinye ndba orugo rwayo rw'omuriro orugyehinguririize, kandi niinye ndiba ekitiinisa omuriyo; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Zechariah2:6 MUKAMA naagira ati: Yeimwe! Yeimwe! Nimuhungye, murugye omu nsi y'obukiizi-bwa-bumohso, ahabw'okuba niinyija kubataaruura, mbaihe ei emiyaga ena y'omu iguru ereetwa." 
Zechariah2:7 Imwe batuuzi ba Babulooni 'mwe, nimuhungire Saayuuni;" 
Zechariah2:8 ahakuba MUKAMA ow'amahe ku yaaherize kuntuma aha mahanga agaabaire nigabanyaga, kumuhaisa ekitiinisa, (ahabw'okuba obakoraho aba akozire aha mboni y'eriisho rye)" 
Zechariah2:9 yangira ati: Reeba, ndyagatigitira omukono, ngubangire, gahindukye eminyago y'abaabaire nibagaheereza. Haza obwo muryamanya ku MUKAMA ow'amahe niwe antumire." 
Zechariah2:10 Iwe Saayuuni, yeshongore, oshemererwe; ahakuba reeba, niinyija, kandi ndyatuura omuriiwe ahagati; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Zechariah2:11 Eryo izooba amahanga maingi garyayehongyera MUKAMA, babe abantu bangye; ndyaguma omuriiwe ahagati." 
Zechariah2:12 Haza obwo oryamanya ku MUKAMA ow'amahe akuntumireho. Bwanyima MUKAMA aryahungura Yuda ebe omugabo gwe omu nsi erikwera, agarukye atoorane Yuda." 
Zechariah2:13 Imwe abaine omubiri mwena, mucecekye omu maisho ga MUKAMA, ahabw'okuba ayebandatwire omu butaaho bwe oburikwera." 
Zechariah3:1 Bwanyima yaanyoreka Yoshua omunyamurwa omukuru ayemereire omu maisho ga maraika wa MUKAMA, na Sitaane amwemereire aha rubaju rwa buryo kumutabaariza." 
Zechariah3:2 MUKAMA yaagira Sitaane ati: Iwe Sitaane, MUKAMA akuhane! Torikumanya ogu ku ari ekicumurwa ekiihirwe omu muriro?" 
Zechariah3:3 Obwo Yoshua akaba ayemereire omu maisho ga maraika, ajwaire ebijwaro bisiisikaire munonga." 
Zechariah3:4 Maraika yaagira abaamwemereire omumaisho ati: Mumujuure ebyo bijwaro bisiisikaire munonga. Kandi yaagira ati: Reeba, naakwihaho okutahikiirira kwawe, niinyija kukujweka ebijwaro birungi munonga." 
Zechariah3:5 Naanye naagira nti: Bamute ekikwemba kishemeire aha mutwe. Batyo baamuta ekikwemba kishemeire aha mutwe, baamujweka ebijwaro; obwo maraika wa MUKAMA ayemereire aho." 
Zechariah3:6 Maraika wa MUKAMA yaayehanangiriza Yoshua ati: 
Zechariah3:7 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Ku oraagyendere omu mihanda yangye, waarinda gye ebi naakukwatsize, oryategyeka enju yangye, orinde n'ebikaari byangye; naanye ndyakuha obushoboorozi bw'okwehikira omuri aba abeemereire aha." 
Zechariah3:8 Mbwenu, iwe Yoshua omunyamurwa omukuru, hurira, iwe na bagyenzi baawe abashutama omu maisho gaawe, ahabw'okuba abo bantu n'akamanyiso. Reeba, ndyareeta omuheereza wangye Itaagi." 
Zechariah3:9 Reeba, aha ibaare eri ntaire omu maisho ga Yoshua, eibaare rimwe eriine embaju mushaju, ndyasharuraho eihandiiko byaryo; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira; kandi orubanja rw'egi nsi ndyarwihaho omu izooba rimwe." 
Zechariah3:10 Eryo izooba buri muntu omuriimwe aryayeta mutaahi we kushutama ahansi y'omuzaabibu gwe n'ahansi y'omutiini gwe; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira. 
Zechariah4:1 Bwanyima maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye yaagaruka yansisiimura, nk'oku omuntu asisiimurwa omu turo;" 
Zechariah4:2 yangira ati: Nooreeba ki? Naamugira nti: Nindeeba ekikondo ky'etabaaza eky'ezaabu nsha, ekiteekirweho orwabya, kandi ekiriho amatabaaza mushanju, buri emwe eine eminwa mushanju." 
Zechariah4:3 Kandi aha rubaju rwakyo hariho emizeituuni ebiri, gumwe aha rubaju rwakyo rwa buryo, n'ogundi aha rwa bumosho." 
Zechariah4:4 Naabuuza maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye nti: Ebyo amakuru gaabyo niki, Mukama wangye?" 
Zechariah4:5 Maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye yambuuza ati: Ebyo torikumanya amakuru gaabyo? Naagarukamu nti: Ngaaha, Mukama wangye." 
Zechariah4:6 Bwanyima yangira ati: Eki n'ekigambo eki MUKAMA arikutuma ahari Zerubabeeli, naagira ati: Ti habw'amaani, kandi ti habw'obushoboorozi, kureka n'ahabw'Omwoyo wangye; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Zechariah4:7 Iwe rushozi ruraingwa 'we, niiwe oha? Omu maisho ga Zerubabeeli oryahinduka oruhita. Kandi oryareeta eibaare ery'aha mutwe gw'agandi eririkuhamirwaho, obwo abantu nibateera akaari nibagira bati: Nirikagire omugisha! Nirikagire omugisha!" 
Zechariah4:8 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Zechariah4:9 Emikono ya Zerubabeeli niyo yaataireho omusingi gw'egi nju, kandi emikono ye niyo erigiheza. Haza obwo nibwo murimanya ku MUKAMA ow'amahe abantumireho." 
Zechariah4:10 Mbwenu n'oha oragayire ebintu nibikitandika? Baryashemererwa, baareeba kariihso omu ngaro za Zerubabeeli. Ago matabaaza nigo maisho ga MUKAMA agarikubuga hoona nigareeba ebiri omu nsi yoona." 
Zechariah4:11 Bwanyima naamubuuza nti: Eriya mizeituuni ebiri eri aha rubaju rw'ekikondo ky'etabaaza orwa buryo n'orwa bumohso, amakuru gaayo niki?" 
Zechariah4:12 Naagaruka naamubuuza obwa kabiri nti: Kandi gariya mataagi abiri g'emizeituuni agari aha mbaju zombi z'enshekye ibiri z'ezaabu omu amajuta garikushohorera, amakuru gaago niki?" 
Zechariah4:13 Yangarukamu ati: Torikumanya amakuru gaago? Naamugarukamu nti: Ngaaha, Mukama wangye." 
Zechariah4:14 Yangira ati: Ago mataagi n'abaashukirweho amajuta ababiri abeemerera aha rubaju rwa MUKAMA ow'ensi yoona. 
Zechariah5:1 Kandi naagaruka naimutsya amaisho; ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba omuzingo gw'ekitabo niguguruka." 
Zechariah5:2 Yangira ati: Nooreeba ki? Naagarukamu nti: Nindeeba omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogurikuguruka; oburaingwa bwagwo mikono makumi abiri, n'obukiika bwagwo mikono ikumi." 
Zechariah5:3 Bwanyima yangira ati: Ogwo nigwo mukyeeno ogurikushohora kubuga ensi yoona; ahabw'okuba omuntu weena orikwiba okwiha hati aryamarwaho, nk'oku gurikugira, kandi weena orikurahira ebishuba aryamarwaho nk'oku gurikugira." 
Zechariah5:4 MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Ndyagwohereza gutaahe omu nju y'omushuma, n'omu nju y'orikurahira eiziina ryangye naabeiha, gugume omu maju gaabo, gumarireho kimwe embaaho n'amabaare." 
Zechariah5:5 Bwanyima maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye yaija, yangira ati: Imutsya amaisho gaawe, oreebe eki ekirikushohora, omanye oku kiri." 
Zechariah5:6 Naagira nti: Ni kintu ki? Yaagira ati: Ni eefa erikushohora. Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Eki n'eky'okushiisha ekiri omu nsi yoona. 
Zechariah5:7 Kandi reeba, ekifundikizo kyayo ky'eibaati ku kyafundwirwe, naareeba omukazi agishutamimu." 
Zechariah5:8 Maraika ogwo yaagira ati: Ogwo niwe Bubi. Yaamwigatira omuri eefa, yaagarura ekyo kifundikizo ky'eibaati ekiremeire aha minwa yaayo." 
Zechariah5:9 Naagaruka naimutsya amaisho; ku naagiire kugiria nti, naareeba abakzi babiri nibaija, baine omuyaga omu mapapa gaabo; bakaba baine amapapa nk'ag'enkongoro; baakiriza eefa egyo, baagitwarira omu kaabunga." 
Zechariah5:10 Naabuuza maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye nti: Eefa eriya nibagitwara hi? 
Zechariah5:11 Yangarukamu ati: Nibagitwara omu nsi ya Shinaari kugyombekyerayo enju; kandi egyo nju ku erihwa, baryata eefa egyo omu mwanya gwayo." 
Zechariah6:1 Kandi naagaruka naimutsya amaisho; ku naagire kugira nti, naareeba ebigaari bina nibiruga ahagati y'enshozi ibiri; ezo nshozi zikaba ziri ez'emiringa." 
Zechariah6:2 Ekigaari ky'okubanza kikaba nikikururwa embaraasi zirikutukura, ekya kabiri nikikururwa ezirikwiragura;" 
Zechariah6:3 ekya kashatu nikikururwa ezirikwera, kandi ekya kana nikikururwa ez'ebihuura by'obugondo." 
Zechariah6:4 Bwanyima naabuuza maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye nti: Ebi niki, Mukama wangye?" 
Zechariah6:5 Maraika yangarukamu ati: Ebi nibiija kushohora kuza ei emiyaga ena y'omu iguru ereetwa, byaheza kweyoreka omu maisho ga MUKAMA ow'ensi yoona." 
Zechariah6:6 Ekigaari ekirikukururwa embaraasi ezirikwiragura nizigyenda nizitoora omu nsi y'obukiizi-bwa-bumohso; ezirikwera nizitoora omu nsi y'oburengyerwa-izooba, ez'ebihuura by'obugondo nizitoora omu nsi y'obukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Zechariah6:7 Ezo mbaraasi ku zaashohoire, zaagira obwira bw'okwend akugyenda hoona, nizeetegyereza ensi. Yaagira ati: Nimwirooko mugyendagyende omu nsi, mugyetegyereze. Ztiyo zaagyena nizeetegyereza ensi." 
Zechariah6:8 Bwanyima yangambira n'eiraka rihango ati: Reeba, ziriya ezirikuza omu nsi y'obukiizi-bwa-bumohso ziikaikaniise ekiniga kyangye eki nyiniire ab'omuri egyo nsi." 
Zechariah6:9 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Zechariah6:10 Iha omu baatwairwe omu bukwatwa Heludai, Tobiya na Yedaaya abarugire Babulooni, oze omwe Yosia mwene Zefania eri izooba." 
Zechariah6:11 Obaakye efeeza n'ezaabu, obiheeshemu ekirunga, okite aha mutwe gwa Yoshua mwene Yehozadaaki omunyamurwa omukuru," 
Zechariah6:12 omugira oti: Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, omuntu orikwetwa Itaagi; ahabw'okuba aryakurira gye omu mwanya gwe, kandi aryayombeka hekalu ya MUKAMA." 
Zechariah6:13 Niwe aryombeka hekalu ya MUKAMA, akagira ekitiinisa ky'obugabe, akshutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe, akategyeka. Kandi aha rubaju rw'ekitebe kye ky'obugabe aharyabaho omunyamurwa, bombi bagire okumanyana kw'obusingye ahagati yaabo." 
Zechariah6:14 Ekyo kirunga kiryaguma omuri hekalu ya MUKAMA, kubeera Heludai, Tobiya, Yedaaya na Yosia mwene Zefania ekiijutsyo." 
Zechariah6:15 Bwanyima abariba bari hare baryaija, bahwere omu by'okwombeka hekalu ya MUKAMA; haza obwo muryamanya ku MUKAMA ow'amahe niwe abantumireho. Kandi ku murita omutima aha kworobera eiraka rya MUKAMA Ruhanga waanyu, ebyo biryabaho." 
Zechariah7:1 Omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Dario, ekigambo kya MUKAMA kikaija ahari Zekaria aha kiro kya kana ky'okwezi kwa mwenda okurikwetwa Kisileevi." 
Zechariah7:2 Omu biro ebyo aba Beseeli bakaba batumire Sharezeeri na Regyemu-meleki n'abashaija baabo kweshengyereza MUKAMA kubagirira embabazi," 
Zechariah7:3 n'okubuuza abanyamurwa b'enju ya MUKAMA ow'amahe na baanabi, bati: Tushemereire kuza omu magyenyi n'okwesiibyakwo omu kwezi kwa kataano, nk'oku tubaire nitugira omu myaka egi yoona?" 
Zechariah7:4 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA ow'amahe kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Zechariah7:5 Gambira abantu b'omuri egi nsi boona n'abanyamurwa oti: Obu mwabaire mwesiibyakwo, mukaza omu magyenyi omu kwezi kwa kataano n'okwa mushanju omuri egyo myaka makumi mushanju, obwo niiye mwabaire mwesiibizakwo?" 
Zechariah7:6 Kandi ku murya, mwanywa, ti mweriira mukeenywera?" 
Zechariah7:7 Ebyo tibyo MUKAMA yaagambire naaraba omuri baanabi aba ira, obu Yerusaalemu yaabaire ekitwirwemu, ekigogyeire kandi ekyehinguririziibwe endembo zaayo, n'ensi y'obukiizi-bwa-buryo bikitwirwemu?" 
Zechariah7:8 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA kyagaruka kyaija ahari Zekaria nikigira kiti: 
Zechariah7:9 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Mucwe emanja z'oburyo, buri muntu agirire mwene waabo embabazi n'esaasi." 
Zechariah7:10 Murekye kuhata abafaakazi, efuuzi, abashuuhuuki n'abooro; kandi harekye kugira n'omwe omuriimwe owaagirira omwene waabo enaama mbi omu mutima gwe." 
Zechariah7:11 Kwonka baayanga kuhurira, baatunika amabega, baayereebera kuriya, amatu baagahenderamu ebiti, ngu batampurira." 
Zechariah7:12 Baagangaaza emitima yaabo nk'amabaare, ngu batahurira ebiragiro bya MUKAMA ow'amahe, n'ebigambo ebi yaabatumireho Omwoyo we, naaraba omuri baanabi aba ira. Nikyo ekiniga kingi kyarugiire ahari MUKAMA ow'amahe." 
Zechariah7:13 MUKAMA naagira ati: Nk'oku naabeetsire, bakanga kuhurira, nikwo nabo baanyetsire, nkanga kubahurira," 
Zechariah7:14 nkabataataanisisa omuyaga gw'akasooroora omu mahanga goona, agu batakamanyaga. Okwo nikwo ensi ei baatsigireho yaahindukire eihamba, ekabura owaagirabamu naagyenda nari naagaruka; etyo egyo nsi erikukundwa yaahinduka eihamba." 
Zechariah8:1 Kandi ekigambo kya MUKAMA ow'amahe kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Zechariah8:2 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Nyiniire Saayuuni eihato ringi, kandi ngiriiniire nyine ekiniga kingi." 
Zechariah8:3 Oku nikwo MUKAMA arikugamba naagira ati: Ndyagaruka Saayuuni, ntuure omuri Yerusaalemu; kandi Yerusaalemu egyo eryayetwa orurembo orurikwesigwa, n'orushozi rwa MUKAMA ow'amahe rwetwe orushozi orurikwera." 
Zechariah8:4 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Abagurusi n'abakaikuru baryagaruka, bashutame omu nguuto za Yerusaalemu, buri muntu naayehimbagiririza aha kibango kye ahabw'okukura munonga." 
Zechariah8:5 Kandi enguuto z'orurembo ziryaijura aboojo n'abaishiki nibazizaaniramu. 
Zechariah8:6 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Ku kiraabe kiri eky'okutangaaza omu maisho g'abantu aba abatsigaireho omuri ebi biro, nimugira ngu kishemereire kuba eky'okutangaaza omu maisho gangye? nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Zechariah8:7 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyajuna abantu bangye, mbaihe omu nsi y'oburugwa-izooba, n'omu nsi y'oburengyerwa-izooba," 
Zechariah8:8 mbareete batuure omuri Yerusaalemu; kandi baryaba abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo omu mazima n'omu kuhikiirira." 
Zechariah8:9 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe abarikuhurira omu biro ebi ebigambo ebigambirwe baanabi, okwiha aha izooba eri omusingi gw'enju ya MUKAMA gwateereirweho, ngu hekalu eyombekwe, murekye kugwa emikono;" 
Zechariah8:10 ahakuba ebyo biro bitakahikire, tihaine waabaire aheebwa ebihembo ahabwe nari ahabw'enyamaishwa ye; kandi ahabw'ababisha hakaba hatariho busingye aha muntu weena owaabaire ataaha nari owaabaire ashohora; ahabw'okuba buri muntu nkamuteerana na mugyenzi we, baayangana." 
Zechariah8:11 Kwonka hati tindikwija kugira aba bantu abatsigaireho, nk'oku naabagizire obunyakare; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Zechariah8:12 Ahakuba haryabaho okubibira omu busingye n'omu kugogyera; emizaabibu eryayera ebijuma byayo, eitaka ryeze emyaka yaaryo, n'eiguru ritoonyereze orume; kandi ndyaha abo bantu abatsigaireho ebyo bintu byona, bibe ebyabo." 
Zechariah8:13 Kandi imwe nju ya Yuda n'eya Israeli 'mwe, nk'oku mwabaire muri eky'okucweraho enfumu n'eky'okukyeenwa omu mahanga, nikwo ndibajuna, mukaba ab'okuhaisa abandi omugisha. Mutatiina, kureka emikono yaanyu egume." 
Zechariah8:14 Ahabw'okuba oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Nk'oku naamaririire kubakora kubi, obu baashwenkuriimwe bankwatsa ekiniga, nkanga kwegarukamu," 
Zechariah8:15 nikwo n'omuri ebi biro mmaririire kukora gye Yerusaalemu n'enju ya Yuda. Mutatiina; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. 
Zechariah8:16 Ebi nibyo muraagume nimukora. Mugume mugambirane amazima, mucwere omu marembo gaanyu emanja z'oburyo, kandi ezirikureeta obusingye;" 
Zechariah8:17 murekye kugirirana enaama mbi omu mitima yaanyu, kandi murekye kukunda endahiro z'ebishuba; ahabw'okuba ebyo byona mbyanga; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Zechariah8:18 Bwanyima ekigambo kya MUKAMA ow'amahe kyanyijaho nikigira kiti: 
Zechariah8:19 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Okwesiibyakwo okw'omu kwezi kwa kana, okw'omu kwa kataano, okw'omu kwamushanju n'okw'omu kwa ikumi kuryabeera ab'enju ya Yuda obunaku bw'okwesiima, bw'okunanuka, n'obw'amagyenyi g'okushemererwa; n'ahabw'ekyo mukunde amazima n'obusingye." 
Zechariah8:20 Kandi oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Obunaku buryahika, amahanga gaije, nibo batuuzi b'omu ndembo nyingi;" 
Zechariah8:21 abatwire omu rurembo rumwe baryaza aha rundi, bagire bati: Ka tuze kweshengyereza MUKAMA kutugirira embabazi, tusherure MUKAMA ow'amahe; naanye niinyija kuzayo." 
Zechariah8:22 Enganda nyingi n'amahanga g'amaani baryaija kusherura MUKAMA ow'amahe omuri Yerusaalemu, n'okumweshengyereza ngu abagirire embabazi." 
Zechariah8:23 Oku nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugamba naagira ati: Omuri ebyo biro abantu ikumi, abarikuruga omu mahanga aga buri rurimu, baryakwata omukugiro gw'ekanzi y'Omuyudaaya, bamugire bati: Ka tugyende naiwe; ahabw'okuba tuhuriire ku Ruhanga ari hamwe naimwe." 
Zechariah9:1 Ekigambo kya MUKAMA nikirwanisa ensi ya Haduraaka, kandi kiryaguma ahari Damasiko; ahabw'okuba endembo za Aramu n'eza MUKAMA, nk'oku enganda za Israeli zoona ziri eze." 
Zechariah9:2 Kandi Hamasi eri aha myatano yaazo, na Tuuro na Sidoni, zoona n'eze, n'obu ziraabe ziine obwengye bwingi." 
Zechariah9:3 Aba Tuuro beeyombekyeire ekigo kigumire, Baarunda efeeza nk'omucuucu, N'ezaabu nk'ebyondo by'omu nguuto." 
Zechariah9:4 Kwonka reeba, MUKAMA aryabamaraho ebi batungire, Eitungo ryabo arinagye omu nyanja, Na Tuuro emarweho omuriro." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashikelooni eryakireeba, etiine; Na Gaaza ekireebe, egire obusaasi bwingi; Na Ekurooni yoona, ahabw'okuba ebi yaayesigire bihindukire busha. Gaaza eryabura omugabe, Na Ashikelooni ebure ab'okugituuramu;" 
Zechariah9:6 Eihanga ryebizaarwa riryatuura Ashidoodi, N'amaryo g'Abafilistia ndyagamaraho." 
Zechariah9:7 Ndyaiha eshagama omu kanwa kaaryo, Ndiihe n'ebihagaro omu maino; Kandi naryo riryaba ekicweka ekitsigaireho ahabwa Ruhanga waitu, Ribe nk'oruganda omuri Yuda, Na Ekurooni ebe nk'Abayebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Bwanyima ndyateera orusiisira aha nju yangye, Ngyehinguririze nk'abarinzi, Harekye kugira abaaguma nibarabaho; Tihariho ihanga eririkuhata eririgaruka kubajuumikira; Ahakuba hati nimbyereebera." 
Zechariah9:9 Iwe Saayuuni, shemererwa munonga! Naiwe Yerusaalemu, teera akaari! Reeba, omugabe waawe naija ah'ori, Ahikiriire kandi ari omusinguzi, Omucureezi, kandi atembire endogoya, Endogoya nto, omwana gw'endogoya." 
Zechariah9:10 Efuraimu ndyamumaraho ebigaari, Na Yerusaalemu ngimaremu embaraasi z'orugamba, M'amata g'orugamba garyamarwaho, Aragiire amahanga kugira obusingye. Obutegyeki bwe buryaruga aha nyanja, buhikye aha ndiijo, Burugye aha Mugyera, buhikye aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Zechariah9:11 Kandi naimwe, ahabw'eshagama y'endagaano ei naaragaine naimwe, Ndyarekura enkwatwa, nziihe omu kiina kitarimu maizi." 
Zechariah9:12 Imwe mbohe z'amatsiko 'mwe, nimugarukye aha kigo kyanyu; Eri izooba nimpamya ku ndibashumbuusha Ebirimu ebyanyu kabiri." 
Zechariah9:13 Ahakuba nkananuura Yuda nk'obuta bwangye, Na Efuraimu naagigira omwambi gwabwo. Iwe Saayuuni, ndyaimutsya batabani baawe Kurwanisa batabani ba Bugriika, Nkugire rurara y'emanzi." 
Zechariah9:14 Bwanyima MUKAMA aryareebwa ari ahaiguru yaabo, Omwambi gwe gusyokye nk'omurabyo; Mukama RUHANGA aryateera enzamba, Ahururire omu kasoroora k'obukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Zechariah9:15 MUKAMA ow'amahe aryabarinda; Baryamaraho abarekyezi b'enjungu, babaribatiirire; Baryanywa eshagama yaabo nka viinyo, Baijure nk'orwabya, Ebajubye nk'ey'aha nshonda z'eitambiro." 
Zechariah9:16 Eryo izooba MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo aryabajuna, Ahabw'okuba n'obusyo bw'abantu be; Baryayengyengyetera aha nsi ye, Nk'amabaare g'omu kirunga ag'obuguzi bwingi." 
Zechariah9:17 Eshi biryashemera bibe birungi! Engano ziryareetera abatsigazi kuba gye, Kandi viinyo y'omutahe ereetere abaishiki kubengyeya." 
Zechariah10:1 Mushabe MUKAMA enjura omu biro bya katumba, Mushabe MUKAMA oreeta emirabyo; Nawe aryabagwisiza enjura ey'orutoonyerera, Buri muntu amumereze obunyaatsi omu mariisizo ge." 
Zechariah10:2 Ahabw'okuba zaaterafimu ni zigamba busha, N'abafumu nibareeba eby'ebishuba, Nibahuumuriza abantu n'ebitaine mugasho. Nikyo abantu barikuzengyererera nk'entaama, Bakabonabonesibwa ahabw'okubura omuriisa." 
Zechariah10:3 Nyiniire abariisa ekiniga ekirikubuguma, N'abeebembezi b'abantu ndyabafubira; Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ow'amahe naasaasibwa obusyo bwe, Niyo nju ya Yuda; Aryabagira nk'embaraasi ye y'ekitiinisa omu rugamba." 
Zechariah10:4 Omuri egyo nju ya Yuda haryarugamu eibaare ry'obuhamizo, Omuriyo harugyemu enkondo y'eihema, Omuriyo harugyemu obuta bw'orugamba, Kandi omuriyo nimwo abategyeki boona bariruga." 
Zechariah10:5 Boona hamwe baryaba nk'abarwani b'amaani omu rugamba, Baribatiiririre ababisha omu byondo by'omu nguuto; Baryarwana, ahabw'okuba MUKAMA ari hamwe nabo, Barimbagirize abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi." 
Zechariah10:6 Ndyahamya ab'enju ya Yuda, Njune ab'enju ya Yosefu; Ndyabagarura, ahabw'okuba mbainiire esaasi, Kandi baryaba nk'abu ntakacwaga; Ahabw'okuba ndi MUKAMA Ruhanga waabo, Kandi ndyaguma mbagarukyemu." 
Zechariah10:7 Obwo Abaefuraimu baryahinduka abarwani rugambwa, N'emitima yaabo eryashemererwa nk'abarikushemezibwa viinyo; Kandi abaana baabo baryakireeba, bashemererwe, N'emitima yaabo eyesiimire omuri MUKAMA." 
Zechariah10:8 Ndyabeetesa engaro, mbataaruure, Ahabw'okuba nkabacungura; Kandi baryaba baingi nk'obunyakare." 
Zechariah10:9 n'obu ndaabe naabataataanisiize omu mahanga, Kwonka baryanyijukira omu nsi za hare, Baryagumaho n'abaana baabo, kandi baryagaruka." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndyabagarura owaabo, mbaihe omu nsi ya Misri, Mbataaruure, mbaihe n'omuri Asiria, Mbahitsye omu nsi ya Gileadi na Lebanooni, Okuhitsya obu barifundamu." 
Zechariah10:11 Baryaraba omu nyanja y'okubonabona, Kandi ebingonzi by'enyanja biryateerwa, Hoona ahu amaizi maingi ga Nailo gari, hoome. Amaryo ga Asiria garyacureezibwa, N'enkoni y'obugabe bwa Misri eryarugiraho kimwe." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndyabahamiza omuri MUKAMA, Nabo beesiimire omu iziina rye; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Zechariah11:1 Iwe Lebanooni, igura amarembo gaawe, Omuriro gumareho emyereezi yaawe!" 
Zechariah11:2 Iwe muberooshi 'we, borooga, ahabw'okuba omwereezi gugwire, Kandi ebiti birungi munonga bicwekyereziibwe! Imwe myela ya Bashani 'mwe, nimuboroogye, Ahabw'okuba ekibira ekikwataine kitemirwe!" 
Zechariah11:3 Hurira okuborooga kw'abariisa, Ahabw'okuba ekitiinisa kyabo kibaihirweho! Hurira okutsinda kw'entare, Ahabw'okuba amaryo ga Yorudani gamazirweho!" 
Zechariah11:4 Oku nikwo MUKAMA Ruhanga wangye agizire ati: Riisa obusyo bw'okubaagwa. 
Zechariah11:5 Abarikuzigura nibaziita, haza bagira ngu tibaine rubanja; n'abarikuzitunda nibagira bati: MUKAMA asiimwe, ahabw'okuba twaba abatungi; kandi abariisa baazo tibarikuzigirira saasi." 
Zechariah11:6 Kandi MUKAMA naagira ati: Tinkigaruka kugirira saasi abatwire omuri egi nsi. Reeba, ndyabahayo, buri muntu agwe omu mikono y'omuriisa we, kandi buri muntu omu mikono y'omugabe we; abo bariisa baryasingyera ensi, kandi tiinyine u ndiiha omu mikono yaabo." 
Zechariah11:7 Ntyo naaba omuriisa w'obusyo bw'entaama z'okubaagwa. Naakwata enkoni ibiri, emwe naagyeta Mbabazi, endiijo naagyeta Bumwe; ntyo naariisa obusyo." 
Zechariah11:8 Omu kwezi kumwe naacwekyereza abariisa bashatu; bwanyima zandusya, kandi nazo zantamwa." 
Zechariah11:9 Naanye nikwo kugira nti: Tindibariisa. Ow'okufa afe; ow'okucwekyerezibwa acwekyerezibwe; kandi abaritsigaraho baryane. 
Zechariah11:10 Bwanyima naakwata enkoni yangye Mbabazi, naagihenda, niinyita endagaano ei naaragaine n'amahanga goona." 
Zechariah11:11 Eryo izooba egyo ndagaano yaitwa, n'abashuubuzi b'entaama, abaabaire bampangire amaisho, baamanya ku kiri ekigambo kya MUKAMA." 
Zechariah11:12 Bwanyima naabagira nti: Ku muraabe nimukisiima, mumpe ebihembo byangye; nari ku muraabe mutarikukisiima, murereere. Batyo baapima shekeli z'efeeza makumi ashatu kuba ebihembo byangye." 
Zechariah11:13 Bwanyima MUKAMA yangira ati: Binagye omu ibiikiro, nibyo bihembo ebi bansiimiire. Ntyo naatwara shekeli ezo z'efeeza makumi ashatu, naazinaga omu ibiikiro eriri omu nju ya MUKAMA." 
Zechariah11:14 Bwanyima naahenda enkoni yangye ya kabiri erikwetwa Bumwe, niinyita obuzaare bwa Yuda na Israeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Bwanyima MUKAMA yangira ati: Garuka okwate ebintu by'omuriisa, omuriisa otaine mugasho;" 
Zechariah11:16 ahakuba reeba, ninyiija kwimutsya omuriisa omu nsi, otarikweta ha ntaama ezibuzire, nari okusherura ezirazire, nari okubunga ezihendekire, n'obu kwakuba okuriisa ezihuriire, kureka orikwija kushonshomera enyama z'ezigomokire, akaguguna n'ebyara byazo." 
Zechariah11:17 Aryakareeba, ogwo muriisa wangye, Orikutsigaho obusyo! Rurara eryamutema omukono, n'eriisho rya buryo, Omukono gwe guryayoma, N'eriisho rye rya buryo rifeere kimwe!" 
Zechariah12:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyahanwirwe ahari Israeli. MUKAMA owaabambire eiguru, akataho emisingi y'ensi, kandi akahangira omwoyo omu muntu, naagira ati:" 
Zechariah12:2 Reeba, niinyija kuhindura Yerusaalemu ekikopo ky'okugwereranisa amahanga goona agagyehinguririize, kandi kigwereranise na Yuda, Yerusaalemu yaaba neegotwa." 
Zechariah12:3 Eryo izooba Yerusaalemu egyo ndyagihindura eibaare eririkurema amahanga goona; abaririkiriza boona baryashaasha munonga. Amahanga goona ag'omu nsi garyayeteerana kugirwanisa. 
Zechariah12:4 MUKAMA naagira ati: Ndyaitsa buri mbaraasi yoona obwoba, n'ogitembire weena mmugwise eiraro. Kwonka enju ya Yuda ndyagigumyaho amaisho, kandi embaraasi z'amahanga zoona ndyazihumya." 
Zechariah12:5 Bwanyima enganda za Yuda ziryagira omu mitima yaazo ziti: Abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu baine amaani agu barikuheebwa MUKAMA ow'amahe Ruhanga waabo. 
Zechariah12:6 Eryo izooba enganda za Yuda ndyazigira nk'orugusyo orurikubugumwaho omuriro ahagati y'enku, nari nk'enkanza erikubugumira omu biba by'engano; ziryamaraho amahanga goona agaziri aha rubaju rwa buryo n'orwa bumosho; haza obwo Yerusaalemu eryaba neekituurwamu, nk'oku yaabaire eri." 
Zechariah12:7 Kandi MUKAMA aryabanza kuha amahema ga Yuda obusinguzi, ngu ekitiinisa ky'enju ya Daudi n'eky'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu kirekye kukira ekya Yuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Eryo izooba MUKAMA aryarinda abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu, abataine maani omuribo babe nka Daudi, n'enju ya Daudi ebe nka Ruhanga, nka maraika wa MUKAMA obeebembeire." 
Zechariah12:9 Kandi eryo izooba ndyayehayo kucwekyereza amahanga goona agateera Yerusaalemu. 
Zechariah12:10 Kandi ndyashuka aha nju ya Daudi n'aha batwire Yerusaalemu omwoyo gw'embabazi n'okweshengyereza; ku barireeba ou baacumitsire, baryamucurira, nk'omwe nyamunegyere, bamuririre munonga, nk'oku omuntu aririra omwana we w'omujigaijo." 
Zechariah12:11 Eryo izooba omuri Yerusaalemu haryabamu okucura kwinigi okurikwinga n'oku baacuriire Hadadi-rimoni omu ruhita rwa Megido. 
Zechariah12:12 Kandi ensi eryacura, buri ruganda rucure okwarwo, oruganda rw'enju ya Daudi okwarwo n'abakazi baabo okwabo; oruganda rw'enju ya Nasani okwarwo, n'abakazi baabo okwabo;" 
Zechariah12:13 oruganda rw'enju ya Leevi okwarwo n'abakazi baabo okwabo; oruganda rw'aba Shimei okwarwo n'abakazi baabo okwabo; 
Zechariah12:14 kandi n'enganda zoona eziritsigaraho, buri ruganda okwarwo n'abakazi baabo okwabo." 
Zechariah13:1 Eryo izooba ab'enju ya Daudi n'abatuuzi ba Yerusaalemu baryaigurirwa enshuro y'okuboozyaho ebibi n'oburofa. 
Zechariah13:2 MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Eryo izooba ndyamariraho kimwe omu nsi amaziina g'ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, birekye kwijukwa obundi; kandi ndyaiha omu nsi baanabi n'omwoyo ogutashemeire." 
Zechariah13:3 Ku harigira owaagaruka kuba nabi, ishe na nyina abaamuzaire baryamugira bati: Tori w'okugumaho; ahabw'okuba noohanuura ebishuba omu iziina rya MUKAMA; kandi ishe na nyina abaamuzaire, ku ariba naahanuura, baryamuteera eicumu, rimwogyemu." 
Zechariah13:4 Eryo izooba buri nabi, ku ariba naahanuura, aryakwatwa enshoni ahabw'ebi ayorekirwe; tarijwara kijwaro ky'ebyoya kubeiha abantu," 
Zechariah13:5 kureka aryagira ati: Tindi nabi, ndi omuhingi; ahabw'okuba okwiha omu buto bwangye eitaka rituura riri eitungo ryangye." 
Zechariah13:6 Kandi ku harigira owaamubuuza ati: Obwo buhuta bw'omu ngaro zaawe bukaruga hi? aryagarukamu ati: obuhuta obu nkabuhutaarizibwa omu nju ya banywani bangye. 
Zechariah13:7 Iwe rurara 'we, sisiimuka, orwane n'omuriisa wangye, Mugyenzi wangye onyemerera aha rubaju; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira. Teera omuriisa, entaama zitaataane, Kandi abaana baazo ndyabateeza omukono gwangye." 
Zechariah13:8 MUKAMA naagira ati: Omuri egyo nsi yoona Ebicweka bibiri bya kashatu biryamarwaho, bicwekyerere; Kwonka kimwe kya kashatu kiryatsigaraho kihuriire." 
Zechariah13:9 Kandi ekyo kicweka kya kashatu ndyakirabya omu muriro, Mbashemeze nk'oku bashemeza efeeza, Mbagyeze nk'oku bagyeza ezaabu. Baryatakira eiziina ryangye, Naanye mbagarukyemu. Kandi ndyagira nti: Aba n'abantu bangye, Nabo bagire bati: MUKAMA niwe Ruhanga waitu." 
Zechariah14:1 Reeba, ekiro kya MUKAMA nikiija, obu omunyago ogu orinyagwa guribaganirwa omuriiwe." 
Zechariah14:2 Ahakuba ndyateeranira hamwe amahanga goona, gateere Yerusaalemu, kandi orurembo ruryakwatwa, amaju ganyagwe, n'abakazi bahambwe. Ekicweka ky'ab'omu rurembo kiryatwarwa omu bukwatwa, kwonka abarirokokaho tibarimarwamu." 
Zechariah14:3 Obwo MUKAMA aryahurura, arwane n'ago mahanga, nk'oku arwana aha izooba ry'orugamba." 
Zechariah14:4 Eryo izooba aryayemerera aha kibungo kya Zeituuni ekishungaine na Yerusaalemu aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba; bwanyima ekyo kibungo kya Zeituuni kiryashatukamu kabiri okuruga aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba, hagire oruhanga ruhango munonga, ekicweka kimw eky'ekyo kibungo kigwe aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumohso, n'ekindi aha rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Zechariah14:5 Kandi muryahunga, murabe omu ruhanga rw'ahagati y'ebibungo byangye; ahabw'okuba orwo ruhanga rw'omu bibungo ruryahika Azeli; mutyo muhungye, nk'oku mwahungire omutsitsa ogwabaireho omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda. Bwanyima MUKAMA Ruhanga waawe arayija hamwe n'abarikwera be boona." 
Zechariah14:6 Eryo izooba omushana tigurijwa, kandi tiharigira kibunda," 
Zechariah14:7 kureka riryaba eizooba rimwe eririkumanywa MUKAMA; tiburiba nyomushana, kandi tiburiba nyekiro, ahakuba n'omu mwabazyo omushana guryajwa." 
Zechariah14:8 Eryo izooba amaizi g'amagara garyahimintika nigaruga omuri Yerusaalemu, ekicweka kyago kize omu nyanja y'oburugwa-izooba, n'ekindi kize omu nyanja y'oburengyerwa-izooba. Biryaba biryo omu kyanda n'omuri katumba." 
Zechariah14:9 Kandi MUKAMA aryaba omugabe orikutegyeka ensi yoona; eryo izooba MUKAMA aryaba omwe, n'eiziina rye ribe rimwe." 
Zechariah14:10 Ensi yoona, okuruga Geeba okuhika Rimoni aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo orwa Yerusaalemu, eryaba oruhita; kwonka Yerusaalemu eryaguma etunguukire eri omu mwanya gwayo, okuruga aha Irembo rya Benyamiini okuhika aha mwanya gw'eirembo ry'okubanza aha Irembo ry'Akeekubo, n'okuruga aha munaara gwa Hananeeli okuhika aha manyuukiro ga viinyo ag'omugabe." 
Zechariah14:11 Kandi eryatuurwamu; ahakuba haryaba hatakiriho mukyeeno; aba Yerusaalemu baryatuura buhooro. 
Zechariah14:12 Kandi eki nikyo kibonaboneso eki MUKAMA ariteeza amahanga goona agarirwanisa Yerusaalemu; embiri yaabo eryajunda bakyemereire, amaisho gajundire omu binonko byago, n'endimi zibajundire omu kanwa." 
Zechariah14:13 Eryo izooba baryakwatwa obwoba bwingi oburikuruga ahari MUKAMA, buri muntu akwatane na mugyenzi we, babangirane entomi;" 
Zechariah14:14 nangwa na Yuda eryarwanisa Yerusaalemu. Knadi obutungi bw'amahanga goona agagyehinguriririize buryateeranirwa hamwe, ezaabu, efeeza n'ebijwaro bingi munonga." 
Zechariah14:15 Kandi ekibonaboneso nk'ekyo kiryahika aha mbaraasi, enyumbu, engamira, endogoya n'ahari ibara nyamaishwa eriba eri omu nsiisira zaabo." 
Zechariah14:16 Bwanyima omuntu weena orihonoka aha mahanga goona agariba gaizire kurwanisa Yerusaalemu, aryaguma nainamuka buri mwaka kuramya Omugabe, MUKAMA ow'amahe, n'okwijuka obugyenyi bw'ensiisira." 
Zechariah14:17 Kandi oruganda rwona orw'omu nsi, ku ruriba rutainamukire Yerusaalemu kuramya Omugabe, MUKAMA ow'amahe, owaabo teriguubwa njura." 
Zechariah14:18 Kandi oruganda rwa Misri ku ruriba rutainamukire kweyoreka, baryahikwaho ekyo kibonaboneso ki MUKAMA ata aha mahanga aganga kwinamuka kwijuka obugyenyi bw'ensiisira." 
Zechariah14:19 Ekyo nikyo kiriba ekifubiro kya Misri n'eky'amahanga goona agatainamuka kwijuka bugyenyi bw'ensiisira. 
Zechariah14:20 Eryo izooba emirebe y'embaraasi eryahandiikwaho ebigambo ebi, Ekyereziibwe MUKAMA. N'enyungu eziri omu nju ya MUKAMA ziryaba nk'enyabya eziri omu maisho g'eitambiro." 
Zechariah14:21 Kandi buri nyungu yoona ey'omuri Yerusaalemu n'ey'omuri Yuda eryaba eyereziibwe MUKAMA ow'amahe, boona abarikutamba baije batwareho zimwe kuziteekamu enyama z'ebitambo. Kandi eryo izooba tiharibaho Munyakanaani omu nju ya MUKAMA ow'amahe obundi." 
Malachi1:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya MUKAMA ekyahanuuriirwe Israeli nikiraba omuri Malaki. 
Malachi1:2 MUKAMA naagira ati: Nkabakunda; kwonka imwe nimubuuza muti: Okatukunda ota? MUKAMA naagira ati: Esau akaba atari mukuru wa Yakobo? Kwonka nkakunda Yakobo," 
Malachi1:3 Esau naamwanga; ensi ye y'ebibungo naagihindura eihamba, n'obuhunguzi bwe naabuha zaamuha z'omu ihamba." 
Malachi1:4 Edomu n'obu araagira ati: Tushenyagwirwe, kwonka nitwija kugaruka kwombeka ebyasheenyukire; MUKAMA naagira ati: Nibombekye, kwonka niinyija kubisheenya, okuhitsya obu abantu baribeeta ensi esiisikaire, abantu abu MUKAMA atuura naagirira ekiniga ebiro byona." 
Malachi1:5 Amaisho gaanyu garyakeyereebera, mugire muti: MUKAMA ni mukuru, n'obukuru bwe niburenga emyatano ya Israeli!" 
Malachi1:6 Imwe banyamurwa 'mwe abarikugaya eiziina ryangye, omwana aha ishe ekitiinisa, n'omuheereza akiha mukama we. Mbwenu ku ndaabe ndi shoimwe, ekitiinisa kyangye kirahi? Nari shi ku ndaabe ndi mukama waanyu, okutiinwa kwangye kurahi? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira. Kandi imwe nimugira muti: Beitu eiziina ryawe niturigaya tuta?" 
Malachi1:7 Nimurigayira omu kuhongyera empongano z'eby'okurya bisiisikaire aha itambiro ryangye. Kandi nimugira muti: Nitubishiisha tuta? Ahabw'okuba nimugira muti: Emeeza ya MUKAMA n'ey'okugaywa. 
Malachi1:8 Obu muba nimutamba ebitambo by'enyamaishwa ezihumire, mugira ngu ekyo ti kibi? Obu muba nimuhonga ezi remaire, nari ezirwaire, ekyo kyo ti kibi? Irooko obihongyere omutegyeki waawe. Noogira ngu naija kukusiima? Naija kukureeba gye? nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Malachi1:9 Mbwenu, mweshengyereze Ruhanga abaikirize, abone kutugirira embabazi. Ku muraabe nimumuhongyera ebirikushusha bityo, naabaasa ata kubaikiriza? nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi1:10 Nkaabaasibwa ki omwe omuriimwe akinga enyigi, mureka kuguma nimuhembera busha omuriro aha itambiro ryangye! Tindikubashemerererwa na kakye, kandi tindikwija kwikiriza mpongano yoona ei murampongyere; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi1:11 Okuruga oburugwa-izooba okuhika oburengyerwa-izooba eiziina ryangye ni rikuru omu mahanga, kandi omuri buri mwanya gwona eiziina ryangye niryotererwa obubaane, kandi nirihongyerwa empongano ezishemeire; ahabw'okuba eiziina ryangye ni rikuru omu mahanga; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi1:12 Kwonka imwe nimurihemura, obu murikuba nimugira muti: Emeeza ya MUKAMA esiisikaire, n'eby'okurya ebigiriho n'eby'okugaywa." 
Malachi1:13 Kandi nimugira muti: Ebi ka byaturusya! kandi nimubyeshaanya; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira. Nimureeta ekinyagirwe n'amaani, nari ekiremaire, nari ekirwaire, ngu ebyo ga mukireetsire kukihonga; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi1:14 Omuntu endeebya akyeenwe, oine empaya omu busyo bwe, akahiga naaraganisa kugiha Ruhanga, kwonka akiza kutambira MUKAMA, akamutambira eine akamogo; ahabw'okuba ndi Omugabe mukuru, kandi eiziina ryangye ritiinwa omu mahanga; nikwo MUKAMA arikugira." 
Malachi2:1 Mbwenu imwe banyamurwa 'mwe, ekiragiro eki n'ekyanyu." 
Malachi2:2 MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Ku muraayangye kuhurira, mwayanga kuta omutima aha kuhaisa eiziina ryangye ekitiinisa, niinyija kubooherereza omukyeeno, n'emigisha yaanyu ngikyeene; kandi buzimazima naaherize kugikyeena, ahabw'okuba mwangire kukita aha mutima." 
Malachi2:3 Reeba, ndyahana oruzaaro rwanyu, mbasiigye amasha g'empongano zaanyu ahamaisho, mbacwe omu maisho gangye." 
Malachi2:4 Haza obwo nibwo murimanya, ku niinye naabahaire ekyo kiragiro, ngu endagaano ei naaragaine na Leevi ebone kugumaho; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi2:5 Egyo ndagaano ei naaragaine nawe ekaba eri endagaano y'amagara n'obusingye; nkabimuha ngu atiine; kandi yantiina, yaagira obwoba ahabw'eiziina ryangye." 
Malachi2:6 Okwegyesa eby'amazima kukab akutamuruga mu kanwa, kandi akaba atashangwa naagamba ebitahikire. Akaba agyendera naanye omu busingye n'omu kuhikiirira, kandi akaba ahindura baingi okuruga omu bibi." 
Malachi2:7 Ahakuba eminwa y'omunyamurwa eshemereire kurinda okumanya, n'abantu bashemereire kuba niwe baayehabuzaho; ahabw'okuba n'enutmwa ya MUKAMA ow'amahe." 
Malachi2:8 Kwonka imwe muteeshukire omuhanda, muteerize baingi entsibo omu bi murikwegyesa; mwashiisha endagaano ya Leevi; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi2:9 Nikyo ndikubagayisiza, nkabahindura abataine kitiinisa omu maisho g'abantu boona, ahabw'okuba timurarinzire biragiro byangye, kureka mukashoroora abantu omubi murikwegyesa, mwagira orubaju." 
Malachi2:10 Twena titwine Tataitwe omwe? Ruhanga owaatuhangire t'omwe? Ahabw'enki buri muntu ti mwesigwa ahari mugyenzi we, nitushiisha endagaano ya baatatenkuriitwe?" 
Malachi2:11 Yuda tabaire mwesigwa, kandi omuri Israeli na Yerusaalemu hakozirwemu ebirikunugwa; ahabw'okuba Yuda ahagaire Omwanya gwa MUKAMA ogurikwera, ogu arikukunda, yaashwera muhara wa ruhanga w'enduga-mahanga." 
Malachi2:12 Omuntu orikutwaza atyo, nkaabaasibwa ki MUKAMA amumariraho kimwe omuntu weena ow'okuhamya, ow'okugarukamu, nari ow'okuhongyera MUKAMA ow'amahe, omu mahema ga Yakobo!" 
Malachi2:13 Kandi eki nakyo nimukikora. Nimwitsa eitambiro rya MUKAMA amarira gaanyu, nimurira kandi nimuborooga, ahabw'okuba takyeta ha mpongano ezi murikuhonga, n'obu kwakuba okuziikiriza ashemereirwe." 
Malachi2:14 Kwonka nimubuuza muti: Ahabw'enki atarikubiikiriza? Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA akaba kareebi w'okuhamya endagaano ei waaragaine n'omukazi w'omu butsigazi bwawe, ou waareebize, haza ari mugyenzi waawe, kandi omukazi waawe ou waaragaine nawe endagaano." 
Malachi2:15 Ruhanga ogwo omwe taratuhangiire omwoyo gw'amagara, akagutugumizaho? Mbwenu ekindi naayenda ki? Naayenda oruzaaro orurikutiina Ruhanga. N'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde, hatagira owaareebya omukazi w'omu butsigazi bwe." 
Malachi2:16 Ahabw'okuba MUKAMA Ruhanga wa Israeli naagira ati: Nyanga okushenda, n'omuntu orikweshwekyerera, aine obubisha aha mukazi we; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira. N'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde, murekye kuba endeebya." 
Malachi2:17 Muruhize MUKAMA n'ebigambo byanyu. Kwonka nimugira muti: Tumuruhize tuta? Ahabw'okuba nimugira muti: Buri muntu orikukora ebibi ni murungi omu maisho ga Ruhanga, kandi naabashemerererwa. Nari shi nimubuuza muti: Ruhanga ocwa emanja z'oburyo arahi?" 
Malachi3:1 Reeba, nintuma entumwa yangye kutebeekanisa omuhanda omu maisho gangye, kandi Mukama, ou murikusherura, aryaija omuri hekalu ye kitaraariire; n'entumwa y'endagaano ei murikushemerererwa, reeba neija; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi3:2 Mbwenu n'oha oribaasa kwemera eizooba eri ariiziraho, kandi ku arireebwa, n'oha oribaasa kwemereraho? Ahabw'okuba ni nk'omuriro gw'omuheesi ogurikushemeza, kandi nka sabuuni y'omwozi." 
Malachi3:3 Aryashutama nk'orikushemeza efeeza akagimaramu enkamba, ashemeze Abaleevi, abagire nk'oku bamara enkamba omu zaabu n'efeeza, okuhitsya obu barihongyera MUKAMA empongano zihikire." 
Malachi3:4 Obo nibwo empongano za Yuda na Yerusaalemu zirishemeza MUKAMA, nk'oku zaabaire zimushemeza omu biro bya ira, omu myaka eyaahingwire." 
Malachi3:5 Bwanyima ndyabairira haihi kucwa orubanja; ndyaba mushinja orikurahuka kushinja abarogi, abashambani, abarikurahira ebishuba, abarikwima abakozi ebihembo byabo, abarikwita kuba abafaakazi n'efuuzi, abarikwita emanja z'abanyamahanga n'abatarikuntiina; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi3:6 Ahabw'okuba nyowe MUKAMA timpinduka; nikyo imwe beene Yakobo mutarikumarirwaho. 
Malachi3:7 Okwiha omu biro bya baashwenkuriimwe mutuura nimuteishuka nimureka ebiragiro byangye, mutarikubyorobera. Mungarukire, naanye niinyija kubagarukira; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira. Kwonka nimugira muti: Tugarukye tuta?" 
Malachi3:8 Omuntu akaabaasa kwima Ruhanga ebye? Kwonka imwe nimuunyima ebyangye. Haza mugira muti: Nitukwima tuta? Nimuunyima ebicweka bya kimwe kya ikumi n'emitoijo. 
Malachi3:9 Mukyeenirwe omukyeeno, ahabw'okuba imwe eihanga ryona nimuunyima ebyangye." 
Malachi3:10 Mureete ebicweka bya kimwe kya ikumi ebihikire omu mabiikiro gangye, enju yangye ebone kubamu eby'okurya, mubingyerese, haza mureebe ku ntaabaigurira madarisa g'omu iguru, nkabashukaho omugisha, mukabura n'ah'okuguta; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi3:11 Ndyakabukira orikwenda kubamira, arekye kucwekyereza emyaka y'omu itaka ryangyu, n'emizaabibu yaanyu teribura kwana; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi3:12 Kandi obwo amahanga goona garyabeeta abahiiriirwe, ahabw'okuba muryaba ensi y'okushemererwa; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi3:13 MUKAMA naagira ati: Ebigambo ebi mubaire nimuunyetomboitera bigumire. Kwonka nimugira muti: Tukwetomboiteire tuta? 
Malachi3:14 Mugizire muti: Tikiine mugasho kukorera Ruhanga. Kandi muti: Nikitugasira ki okworobera ebiragiro bye n'okugyendera omu maisho ga MUKAMA ow'amahe, turi nk'abari omu rufu?" 
Malachi3:15 Hati abanyamaryo nibo turikweta abahiiriirwe; kandi enkozi z'ebibi tizirikugogyera kwonka; n'obu zirikugyeza Ruhanga, nizikira." 
Malachi3:16 Omu biro ebyo abaabaire nibatiina MUKAMA baaguma nibagambirana; MUKAMA yaatega amatu, yaabahurira, kandi ekitambo ekirimu ebirikwijutsya kyahandiikirwa omu maisho ge ahabw'abaabaire nibatiina MUKAMA, bakateekateeka aha iziina rye." 
Malachi3:17 Kandi MUKAMA ow'amahe naagira ati: Aha izooba eri ndikoreraho, baryaba abangye, babe eitungo ryangye eritoorainwe; kandi ndyabasaasira, nk'oku omuntu asaasira omwana we orikumukorera;" 
Malachi3:18 haza obwo muryagaruka mumanye kutaanisa abahikiriire n'ababi, abarikukorera Ruhanga n'abatarikumukorera." 
Malachi4:1 Ahakuba reeba, eizooba niriija, niryotsya nk'etanuuru, obu abanyamaryo n'enkozi z'ebibi bariba nk'ebitsintsi by'embuba; ekyo kiro ekiriija kiryabookyeza kimwe, tikiribatsigira muzi n'obu ryakuba eitaagi; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi4:2 Kwonka imwe abarikutiina eiziina ryangye, eizooba ry'okuhikiirira riryaturuka ahabwanyu, riine okutamba omu mapapa gaaryo. Muryashohora nimukina nk'enyana zirikuruga omu kihongore." 
Malachi4:3 Aha izooba eri ndikoreraho, muryaribatiirira ababi, babe eiju ahansi y'ebigyere byanyu; nikwo MUKAMA ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi4:4 Mwijukye ebiragiro by'omuheereza wangy Musa, ebyataireho n'emigyenzo ei naamuragiriire ahari Horebu ahabwa Israeli yoona." 
Malachi4:5 Reeba, ndyabooherereza nabi Eliya, ekiro kya MUKAMA ekikuru kandi ekirikutiinisa kitakizire." 
Malachi4:6 Niwe arihindura emitima y'abazaire bakagarukana n'abaana baabo, n'ey'abaana bakagarukana n'abazaire baabo, ngu ntakaija nkaitsa ensi omukyeeno." 
Matthew24:15 Kandi ku murireeba ekirikuzira ekirikuhwerekyereza, ekyagambirwe nabi Danieli, kyemereire omu Mwanya ogurikwera, (orikushoma ayetegyereze)" 
Luke3:25 owa Matatia, owa Amosi, owa Nahumu, owa Esili, owa Nagai," 
Luke3:25 owa Matatia, owa Amosi, owa Nahumu, owa Esili, owa Nagai," 
Romans9:25 Nk'oku yaagambire naaraba omuri nabi Hosea ati: Abantu abatari b'eihanga ryangye Ndyabeeta eihanga ryangye; Kandi owaabaire ari enyangwakazi Ndyamweta enkundwakazi.
